Genesis1:1 Agwo Omochakano Nyasae nigo atongete igoro na ense. 
Genesis1:2 Na ense nigo yarenge bosa, tiyarenge na kieni kende, nigo yaare nomosunte otubete endiba; na Omoika o Nyasae nigo orenge goetanana igoro y’amache." 
Genesis1:3 Nyasae agateba, “Tiga oborabu bobeo”, na oborabu bokabao." 
Genesis1:4 Nyasae akarora oborabu obwo ng’a nobuya, agaatanana oborabu korwa ase omosunte." 
Genesis1:5 Nyasae akaroka oborabu boria omobaso, na omosunte akayoroka obotuko. Erio agwo rikaba mogoroba, naende bokaba mambia, rituko rie ritang’ani." 
Genesis1:6 Nyasae agateba, “Tiga eaanga ebe egati‐gati y’amache, yaatanane amache korwa ase amache ande.”" 
Genesis1:7 Igo Nyasae agakora eaanga eria, agaatanana amache ayare inse y’eaanga korwa ase amache ayare igoro y’eaanga; akaba boigo." 
Genesis1:8 Nyasae akaroka eaanga eria igoro. Erio agwo rikaba mogoroba, naende bokaba mambia, rituko ria kabere." 
Genesis1:9 Erio Nyasae agateba, “Tiga amache ayare inse ya igoro asangererekane aase aamo, ense enyomo erorekane”; akaba boigo." 
Genesis1:10 Nyasae akaroka eria enyomo ense, na amache aria asangererekanete amo akayaroka chinyancha. Nyasae akarora ayio ng’a namaya." 
Genesis1:11 Naende Nyasae agateba, “Tiga ense emere ebinto bigokina, buna ebimeri bikorua chimbusuro, na emete ekwama amatunda are ne chimbusuro chire imeo, kera oyomo ase egesaku kiaye ekenyene”; akaba boigo." 
Genesis1:12 Na ense ekamera bionsi ebigokina: ebimeri bikorua chimbusuro chiabo chinyene, na emete ekwama amatunda are ne chimbusuro chire imeo, kera oyomo ase egesaku kiaye ekenyene. Nyasae akarora ayio ng’a namaya." 
Genesis1:13 Erio agwo rikaba mogoroba, naende bokaba mambia, rituko ria gatato." 
Genesis1:14 Erio Nyasae agateba, “Tiga emebaso ebe ase eaanga aaria igoro, yaatanane omobaso korwa ase obotuko; ero ebe ebimanyererio bikworokia Amatuko Amanene, na amatuko, na emiaka," 
Genesis1:15 ebe emebaso ase eaanga aaria igoro, eyee ense omobaso na oborabu,” akaba boigo." 
Genesis1:16 Nyasae agakora emebaso emenene ebere. Omobaso oria omonene ase eyio ebere ogambere ekero kia mobaso, na oria omoke ekero kia botuko; agakora ne ching’enang’eni boigo." 
Genesis1:17 Erio Nyasae akayebeka ase eaanga aaria igoro, eyee ense omobaso na oborabu," 
Genesis1:18 egambere omobaso na obotuko, na gwatanana oborabu korwa ase omosunte. Nyasae akarora ayio ng’a namaya." 
Genesis1:19 Erio agwo rikaba mogoroba, naende bokaba mambia, rituko ria kane." 
Genesis1:20 Nyasae agateba, “Tiga amache atware obonge bw’ebitongwa bire moyo, ne chinyoni chikoiruruka igoro ase ense, chigoetanana inse y’eaanga ya igoro.”" 
Genesis1:21 Naende Nyasae agatonga ebitongwa ebinene bire ase amache ime, amo nebitongwa binde bionsi bire moyo, ebio bigoetanana ase obonge imeo; agatonga kera egesaku nengencho yaye. Agatonga ne chinyoni chibwate chimbaba, kera egesaku nengencho yaye. Nyasae akarora ayio ng’a namaya." 
Genesis1:22 Erio agwo Nyasae akabisesenia, agateba, “Ibora, momenteke, moichore ime ase chinyancha, ne chinyoni chibuche ase ense.”" 
Genesis1:23 Erio agwo rikaba mogoroba, naende bokaba mambia, rituko ria gatano." 
Genesis1:24 Naende Nyasae agateba, “Tiga ense etware ebitongwa bire moyo, kera egesaku nengencho yaye: ching’iti chigotugwa, na echikwagura, ne ching’iti chi’orosana, kera egesaku nengencho yaye”; akaba boigo." 
Genesis1:25 Nyasae agakora ching’iti chi’orosana, kera egesaku nengencho yaye, ne ching’iti chigotugwa, kera egesaku nengencho yaye, ne ching’iti chikwagura, kera egesaku nengencho yaye. Nyasae akarora ayio ng’a namaya." 
Genesis1:26 Erio Nyasae agateba, “Tiga tokore omonto ase omogwekano oito, otogwekaine, agambere chinswe chia nyancha, ne chinyoni chikoiruruka igoro, ne ching’iti chigotugwa, ne ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana, na ense yonsi, ne ching’iti chionsi chikwagura igoro ase ense.”" 
Genesis1:27 Nabo Nyasae agatonga mwanyabanto ase omogwekano oye omonyene; ase omogwekano o Nyasae ere akamotonga. Agatonga omosacha na omokungu. 
Genesis1:28 Nyasae akabasesenia, akabatebia, “Moibore, momenteke, moichore ase ense, na moyegambere. Mogambere ne chinswe chia nyancha, ne chinyoni chikoiruruka, na kera egetongwa kere moyo kegotaara igoro ase ense,”" 
Genesis1:29 Naende Nyasae agateba, “Rora, nabaeire kera ekemeri gekwama chimbusuro ase ense engima, na kera omote okwama amatunda are ne chimbusuro chire imeo; nabio birabe endagera yaino." 
Genesis1:30 Na ebimeri ebibese bionsi nabirure bibe endagera ye ching’iti chionsi chire moyo ase ense”; akaba boigo. 
Genesis1:31 Nyasae akarigereria ebinto ebio bionsi akorete, na birobio nigo biarenge ebiya mono. Erio agwo rikaba mogoroba, naende bokaba mambia, rituko ria gatano na rimo." 
Genesis2:1 Naboigo igoro na ense bigaikeranigwa amo nemeganda yonsi y’ebitongwa. 
Genesis2:2 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere Nyasae agaikerania emeremo yaye yonsi, eye konya akorire; ase rituko ria gatano na kabere agatimoka korwa ase emeremo yaye yonsi, eye konya akorire." 
Genesis2:3 Nyasae agasesenia rituko ria gatano na kabere, akariatanana, akarikora richenu, ekiagera ase rituko erio Nyasae agatimoka korwa ase emeremo yaye yonsi, eye konya akorire ase obotongi." 
Genesis2:4 Oyo noro omogano buna igoro na ense biatongetwe. 
Genesis2:5 Ase engaki eria Omonene Nyasae atongete igoro na ense, kemeri kende tikiarenge komera korwa ase riroba, gose nyeni chinde, ekiagera Omonene Nyasae konya taratoma embura etwe ase ense, nonya monto onde tarengeo ore korema riroba." 
Genesis2:6 Korende obotooru nigo bware gotiira korwa inse na konyiyia riroba ri’ense yonsi. 
Genesis2:7 Erio Omonene Nyasae akabomba na koroisia omonto korwa ase orotu rw’amaroba, akamoutera omoika bw’obogima ase chimioro chiaye, na igo omonto akaba ore nobomoyo." 
Genesis2:8 Erio Omonene Nyasae akaroisia omogondo aaria Edeni, ensemo ya moocha, na aroro akabeka omonto oria abombete na komoroisia." 
Genesis2:9 Omonene Nyasae agakinia emete korwa ase riroba, emete yonsi egosanerwa ase okororwa, na egwansa ase okoriegwa. Egati‐gati y’omogondo oria akabeka omote bw’obogima na omote bw’okomanyera amaya na amabe." 
Genesis2:10 Orooche rogasoka korwa ase Edeni na kobekera omogondo oria amache. Korwa agwo rogaatananeka, rokaba chindooche inye." 
Genesis2:11 Orooche rwe ritang’ani rokarokwa Pisoni. Orwo narwo roetanaine ense yonsi ya Havila aase etahabu egotoka. 
Genesis2:12 Etahabu y’ense eyio nengiya. Naende amagena e rigori rinene nareo, ayakorokwa bedola na berulo." 
Genesis2:13 Na orooche rwa kabere rokarokwa Gihoni. Orwo narwo roetanaine ense yonsi ya Kusi. 
Genesis2:14 Na orooche rwa gatato rokarokwa Tigirisi, orwo rogoeta moocha y’Asuri. Na orooche rwa kane narororwo rokarokwa Eufarati." 
Genesis2:15 Omonene Nyasae akaira omonto oria, akamobeka ase omogondo o Edeni, ayoroisie na koyorenda." 
Genesis2:16 Erio Omonene Nyasae agachika omonto oria, akabora, “Amatunda a kera omote ore ase omogondo oyo nonyare koyaria," 
Genesis2:17 korende amatunda ’omote bw’okomanyera amaya na amabe toyaria, ekiagera rituko riria orayarie goika okwe.”" 
Genesis2:18 Erio Omonene Nyasae agateba, “Tai buya omonto oyo abe bweka, nimokorere omokonyi barakonyane nere.”" 
Genesis2:19 Ekero Omonene Nyasae konya akorire korwa ase amaroba kera eng’iti y’orosana, ne chinyoni chikoiruruka, agachirenta ase omonto oria, arore buna agochiroka; na buna arogete kera egetongwa kere moyo, erieta riaye rikaba rirorio erio." 
Genesis2:20 Omonto oyio akaroka kera eng’iti egotugwa, na kera enyoni ekoiruruka, na kera eng’iti y’orosana erieta riaye. Korende tarorekana mokonyi onde, barakonyane nere." 
Genesis2:21 Erio Omonene Nyasae akabekera omonto oria chitoro chindito mono. Ekero araire akamorusia orobaru rwaye oromo, na akairanerania chinyama aase aria." 
Genesis2:22 Na orobaru roria Omonene Nyasae arusetie ase omonto oria akarotonga rokaba omokungu, akamoirera omonto oria." 
Genesis2:23 Erio omonto oria agateba, “Bono oyo neriuga korwa ase amauga aane, ne chinyama korwa ase chinyama chiane; ere nigo ararokwe omokungu, ekiagera nigo arusirie ase omosacha.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ase ayio, omonto natige ise na ng’ina, abwatane na mokaye, na abwo babere nababe omobere oyomo." 
Genesis2:25 Na abwo babere, omonto oyio na mokaye, nigo barenge getirianda, na tibaare kororerana obosooku." 
Genesis3:1 Bono eng’iti engenda inse nigo yarenge eng’ainereria kobua ching’iti chinde chionsi chi’orosana, echi Omonene Nyasae akorete. Erio ekaboria omokungu, “Inee! Namaene ng’a Nyasae nigo abakanetie ng’a timoria amatunda ’omote onde bwonsi ore mogondo?”" 
Genesis3:2 Omokungu oria akairaneria eng’iti eria, “Amatunda a kera omote ore ase omogondo natonyare koria," 
Genesis3:3 otatiga amatunda ’omote ore mogondo gatigati. Nyasae nigo atotebetie: Moise koyaria gose koyakuna nigo morakwe.” 
Genesis3:4 Eng’iti egatebia omokungu, “Ogokwa, timogokwa nonya ng’ake." 
Genesis3:5 Naki Nyasae namanyete ng’a ekero morarie amatunda ’omote oyio nigo moraramokigwe amaiso aino, na inwe mobe buna Nyasae, mokomanya amaya na amabe.”" 
Genesis3:6 Omokungu agachia korora omote oria ng’a nomuya ore ase okoriegwa na okogwenera amaiso, na omote oria noyo bw’okoganigwa, ekiagera okobaa okomanya, agatwa amatunda aye, akaria. Erio akaa omosacha oye, nere akaria." 
Genesis3:7 Na amaiso abo bonsi babere akaramokigwa, bakamanya ng’a ngetirianda bare; bagatabora amato ’omoko, bakayabwatania, bakeboyia." 
Genesis3:8 Omonto oria na mokaye bakaigwa eriogi ri’Omonene Nyasae kagotaara ase omogondo engaki ya mogoroba ense koyakendire, na barabwo bakebisa mogondo gati y’emete, ng’a Omonene Nyasae tabarora." 
Genesis3:9 Omonene Nyasae akarangeria omonto oria, akamoboria, “Ng’ai ore?”" 
Genesis3:10 Ere akamoiraneria, “Nigo naigwa eriogi riao kogotaara ase omogondo, noboa ekiagera ngetirianda nare; ase ayio nebisa.”" 
Genesis3:11 Nyasae akamoboria, “Ing’o ogotebia ng’a ngetirianda ore? Inee! Nkwarire amatunda ’omote oria nagokanetie ng’a toria?”" 
Genesis3:12 Omonto oria akamoiraneria, “Omokungu oyo kwang’ete ng’a abe amo nainche, nere ong’ete amatunda ’omote oyio, na inche nkaria.”" 
Genesis3:13 Erio Omonene Nyasae akaboria omokungu oria, “Ninki eke gwakorire?” Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Neng’iti yang’ainete, nkaria.”" 
Genesis3:14 Omonene Nyasae agatebia eng’iti eria, “Ekiagera gwakorire aya, aye kwaragererigwe kobua ching’iti chionsi chigotugwa, ne ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana; aye nenda oragendere, na orotu orarie ase obogima bwao bwonsi." 
Genesis3:15 Inche nimbeke obobisa ase egati yao na omokungu oyo, na ase egati y’oroiboro rwao na oroiboro rwaye; rororwo narogosenyente omotwe oo, na aye nomorome egetingiro kiaye.”" 
Genesis3:16 Akaonchokera omokungu, akamotebia, “Ninkomentere emechando emenge ekero okoba morito, na ekero okoibora abana nonyore obororo; nonya nabo okogania kwao nigo korabe ase omosacha oo, na ere nakogambere.”" 
Genesis3:17 Agatebia Adamu, “Ekiagera kwaigwerete mokao na okaria amatunda ’omote oria nagokanetie ng’a toria, riroba riaragererigwe ase engencho yao. Ase ogwechanda norie okwama kwaye amatuko onsi ay’obogima bwao." 
Genesis3:18 Riroba narikwamere amagwa na amageri, na aye norie okwama kw’ebimeri bi’orosana." 
Genesis3:19 Noiteke ebigeri korwa ase obosio bwao omanye konyora endagera orie; goika oirane ase riroba, ekiagera agwo nao kwarwete. Naki aye norotu, naende noirane ase orotu.”" 
Genesis3:20 Omonto oria akaroka mokaye Hawa, ekiagera ere nere ng’ina bw’abare moyo bonsi." 
Genesis3:21 Omonene Nyasae akaroiseria Adamu na mokaye chingobo chi’amasankwa, akababoyia." 
Genesis3:22 Erio Omonene Nyasae agateba, “Rora, omonto oyo obeire buna oyomo oito ase okomanya amaya na amabe. Aande nabaise gochia korambora okoboko kwaye atwe amatunda ’omote bw’obogima arie, erinde abe moyo kare na kare.”" 
Genesis3:23 Ase ayio Omonene Nyasae akamoseria korwa ase omogondo o Edeni, akamobeka areme riroba agwo ase arwete." 
Genesis3:24 Igo agaseria omonto oria, na ensemo ya moocha y’omogondo o Edeni akabeka omokerubi, na omoyio o birende ogwoka omorero okona‐koonchaonchoka chinsemo chionsi korenda enchera ekogenda ase omote bw’obogima." 
Genesis4:1 Bono Adamu akaba na mokaye, na ere akaba morito, akaibora Kaini, akabora, “Nanyorire omonto ase ogokonywa kw’Omonene.”" 
Genesis4:2 Naende akaibora Abeli omwabo. Abeli akaba omorisia bwe ching’ondi, na Kaini akaba omoremi bw’omogondo." 
Genesis4:3 Engaki egaika Kaini akarenta okwa ma kw’omogondo kobe ekeegwa ase Omonene. 
Genesis4:4 Abeli nere akarenta chimanwa chintangi chinoru korwa ase riicho riaye. Na Omonene aganchera ekeegwa ki’Abeli," 
Genesis4:5 korende tancherete Kaini na ekeegwa kiaye. Ase ayio Kaini akagechigwa, na obosio bwaye bokaonchoka, bokairura." 
Genesis4:6 Na Omonene akamoboria, “Kaini, nase ki okoba nendamwamu na obosio bwao bwairurire?" 
Genesis4:7 “Korakore buya, nabwancherwe. Otakoreti buya, ebibe nigo bikoganyererete gesieri; na birobio nigo bikoganetie. Korende nekogwenerete aye obibue.”" 
Genesis4:8 Erio Kaini agatebia Abeli omwabo, “Inchuo, togende getii borabu.” Ekero baare agwo borabu, Kaini akaimokera Abeli omwabo, akamoita." 
Genesis4:9 Erio Omonene akaboria Kaini, “Ng’ai Abeli omino are?” Kaini akamoiraneria, “Timanyeti inche. Inee! Ninche nkomorenda oyominto?”" 
Genesis4:10 Naende Omonene akamotebia, “Inki eke gwakorire? Eriogi ri’amanyinga ’oyomino riarure ase riroba, riang’ikeire." 
Genesis4:11 Bono aye kwaragererigwe na goserigwa korwa ase riroba erio riaasamirie omonwa oye na konywa amanyinga ’oyomino korwa ase okoboko kwao. 
Genesis4:12 Ekero orabe gokorema riroba tirigokwamera endagera nonya ng’ake. Igo orabe omoomboganu na omoetanani ase ense.” 
Genesis4:13 Erio Kaini agatebia Omonene, “Egesusuro kiane nekerito, tinkonyara gokebogoria." 
Genesis4:14 Rora, rero gwanseririe korwa ase riroba eri, nimbiseke korwa ase obosio bwao, timborora naende. Nimbe omoomboganu na omoetanani ase ense, na onde bwensi orang’umere nigo arang’ite.”" 
Genesis4:15 Korende Omonene akamotebia, “Taibo! Onde bwensi oraite Kaini nigo araakanigwe egesiomba ara gatano na kabere.” Na Omonene akabekera Kaini ekemanyererio ng’a onde bwensi oramoumere tabaisa komoita." 
Genesis4:16 Erio Kaini akarua ase obosio bw’Omonene, akagenda, akamenya ase ense ya Nodi, moocha ya Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini akaba na mokaye, na ere akaba morito, akaibora Enoku; na Kaini akaagacha omochie, akayoroka Enoku, erieta ri’omwana oye." 
Genesis4:18 Enoku akaibora Iradi, Iradi akaibora Metusaeli, Metusaeli akaibora Lameki." 
Genesis4:19 Lameki akanyuoma abakungu babere. Omokungu bwe ritang’ani nigo are korokwa Ada, na oyo o kabere Zila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada akaibora Yabeli; oyo nere sokoro bw’abaare komenya ase chiema na babwate ching’iti chigotugwa. 
Genesis4:21 Na momura omwabo nigo are korokwa Yubali; oyio nere sokoro bw’abaare kobugia amakano na ebiroria. 
Genesis4:22 Zila akaibora Tubali‐Kaini. Ere nigo arenge omoturi bw’ebinto bi’ebioma na ebie chitaai. Na omosubati omwabo nere Naama. 
Genesis4:23 Lameki agatebia abakungu baye, “Ada na Zila, igwa eriogi riane, inwe abakungu ba Lameki, tegerera ogokwana kwane, igo ndaite omonto karanyate orogoma, naisa koba omwana omomura karang’ake." 
Genesis4:24 Onye Kaini ogoakanerwa egesiomba ara gatano na kabere, amaene, Lameki ere naakanerwe ara emerongo etano na ebere, na gatano na kabere.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu akaba na mokaye naende na ere akaibora omwana omomura, akamoroka Seti, agateba, “Bono Nyasae ong’eire omwana onde ribaga ri’Abeli, oria Kaini aitete.”" 
Genesis4:26 Seti nere akaibora omwana omomura, akamoroka Enosu. Erio agwo abanto bagachaka korangeria erieta ri’Omonene ase okomosasima." 
Genesis5:1 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’ororeria rw’Adamu. Ekero keria Nyasae atongete omonto, akamokora ase omogwekano oye omonyene." 
Genesis5:2 Ere akabatonga omosacha na omokungu, akabasesenia, akabaroka mwanyabanto, ekero ekio abatongete." 
Genesis5:3 Ekero Adamu abeire nemiaka rigana erimo na emerongo etato (130), akaibora omwana omomura ase omogwekano oye, omogwekaine, akamoroka Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Nyuma y’okoiborwa gwa Seti, Adamu nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano na atato (800), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:5 Adamu nigo akoorete emiaka amagana kianda, na emerongo etato (930), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:6 Ekero Seti abeire nemiaka rigana erimo, na etano (105), akaibora Enosu." 
Genesis5:7 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Enosu, Seti nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano na atato, na etano na ebere (807), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:8 Seti nigo akoorete emiaka amagana kianda, na ikomi na ebere (912), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:9 Ekero Enosu abeire nemiaka emerongo kianda (90), akaibora Kainani." 
Genesis5:10 Nyuma y’okoiborwa gwa Kainani, Enosu nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano na atato, na ikomi na etano (815), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:11 Enosu nigo akoorete emiaka amagana kianda, na etano (905), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:12 Ekero Kainani abeire nemiaka emerongo etano na ebere, (70), akaibora Mahalaleeli." 
Genesis5:13 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Mahalaleeli, Kainani nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano na atato, na emerongo ene (840), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:14 Kainani nigo akoorete emiaka amagana kianda, na ikomi (910), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:15 Ekero Mahalaleeli abeire nemiaka emerongo etano nomo, na etano (65), akaibora Yaredi." 
Genesis5:16 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Yaredi, Mahalaleeli nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano na atato, na emerongo etato (830), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:17 Mahalaleeli nigo akoorete emiaka amagana atano na atato, na emerongo kianda, na etano (895), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:18 Ekero Yaredi abeire nemiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etano nomo, na ebere (162), akaibora Enoku." 
Genesis5:19 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Enoku, Yaredi nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano na atato (800), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:20 Yaredi nigo akoorete emiaka amagana kianda, na emerongo etano nomo, na ebere (962), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:21 Ekero Enoku abeire nemiaka emerongo etano nomo, na etano (65), akaibora Metusela." 
Genesis5:22 Enoku akaba ogotaara amo na Nyasae. Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Metusela, Enoku nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atato (300), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:23 Enoku nigo abete nemiaka amagana atato, na emerongo etano nomo, ne etano (365)," 
Genesis5:24 akaba ogotaara amo na Nyasae. Erio tarorekana naende, ekiagera Nyasae nigo amoirete." 
Genesis5:25 Ekero Metusela abeire nemiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etano na etato, na etano na ebere (187), akaibora Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Lameki, Metusela nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano na etato, na ebere, (782), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:27 Metusela nigo akoorete emiaka amagana kianda, na emerongo etano nomo, na kianda (969), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:28 Ekero Lameki abeire nemiaka rigana erimo na emerongo etano na etato, na ebere (182), akaibora omwana omomura," 
Genesis5:29 akamoroka Nuhu agateba, “Oyo nere oratoremie intwe ase emeremo yaito, na obokong’u bwaito, ase riroba eri Omonene aragereretie.”" 
Genesis5:30 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Nuhu, Lameki nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano, na emerongo kianda, na etano (595), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis5:31 Lameki nigo akoorete emiaka amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano na ebere, na etano na ebere (777), erio agakwa." 
Genesis5:32 Ekero Nuhu abeire nemiaka amagana atano (500), akaibora abana abamura, nabwo Shemu, na Hamu, na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Mwanyabanto bakagenderera komentekana ase ense, na abana abaiseke bakaiborwa asebare." 
Genesis6:2 Abamura ba Nyasae bakarora abaiseke ba mwanyabanto ng’a nigo baare nebieni ebiya, bakenyuomeria ase ogwechorera onde bwensi baganetie." 
Genesis6:3 Erio Omonene agateba, “Omoika one tokonyara komenya ime ase mwanyabanto kare na kare, ekiagera ere nomobere ogokwa. Ase ayio emiaka yaye nigo erabe rigana erimo na emerongo ebere yoka.”" 
Genesis6:4 Ase engaki eyio, na kogenderera, amamonto namenyete ase ense, ekero abana abamura ba Nyasae baare konyuoma abaiseke ba mwanyabanto na konyora abana. Abwo nabwo barenge abanto chituoni, baare gotogigwa agwo kare." 
Genesis6:5 Omonene akarora ng’a obobe bwa mwanyabanto nobonge ase ense, na kera okoroberia na okorengereria gwe chinkoro chiabo nokobe botambe." 
Genesis6:6 Ase ayio Omonene ageitia, ekiagera atongete mwanyabanto ase ense, agaichana ase omoyo oye." 
Genesis6:7 Erio Omonene agateba, “Mwanyabanto abwo natongete nimbarusie ase ense, gose tari mwanyabanto boka, korende ne ching’iti, na echi kwagura, ne chinyoni. Neitirie ekiagera natongete barabwo na chirochio.”" 
Genesis6:8 Korende Nuhu akanyora ogwancherwa ase obosio bw’Omonene. 
Genesis6:9 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’ororeria rwa Nuhu. Ere nigo arenge omonto omoronge na omoikeranu ase ekiaare kiaye; ere akaba ogotaara amo na Nyasae. 
Genesis6:10 Akaibora abana abamura batato, nabwo Shemu, na Hamu, na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Ense ekaba yasarekire ase obosio bwa Nyasae, egaichorwa nobotindi na oboregani." 
Genesis6:12 Nyasae akarora ng’a ense yasarekire, ekiagera kera omonto obwatirie chinchera chi’obosareku ase ense." 
Genesis6:13 Erio Nyasae agatebia Nuhu, “Narorire ng’a ninkoore okobao kwa mwanyabanto bonsi, ekiagera baichoirie ense obotindi na oboregani, nimbasirie amo nense." 
Genesis6:14 Ekorere obwato obonene bw’emete y’ebirobo; obonachane ime ebinyomba, na oboome eramu ime na isiko." 
Genesis6:15 Obwato obwo nigo orabokore iga: Obotambe bwaye nigo borabe obw’ebirengo bi’amaboko amagana atato, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo etano, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro amaboko emerongo etato." 
Genesis6:16 Inse y’ekerama otige ribaga ri’okorenta oborabu ase obwato obwo, orikore obotambe gochia igoro obw’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo, obeke egesieri rikere ensemo. Onachane obwato obwo amarongo atato." 
Genesis6:17 Naki rora, nindete etoigo igoro y’ense, ninsirie mwanyabanto na binde bionsi bire moyo; kera egento kere ase ense goika gekwe." 
Genesis6:18 Korende ninkore okobwatana kw’ogotianania naye; aye nosoe ase obwato amo nabana bao abamura, na mokao, na baka bamura bao." 
Genesis6:19 Na orente ase obwato ime ching’iti, na chinde chionsi chire moyo echia kera egesaku, ibere ibere, chinsacha ne chinkungu, chibe moyo amo naye." 
Genesis6:20 Ase kera egesaku gie chinyoni, ne ching’iti chionsi, na echikwagura igoro ase ense, ochirente ibere ibere amo naye, erinde chibe moyo." 
Genesis6:21 Oire endagera egochia koriegwa, oyegache. Eyio erabe endagera yaino na eya chirochio.”" 
Genesis6:22 Naboigo Nuhu akorete; agakora ayio onsi Nyasae amochigete. 
Genesis7:1 Erio Omonene agatebia Nuhu, “Soa ase obwato ime amo nabanto bao, ekiagera nakororire ng’a aye bweka ase ekegori eke nigo ore omonto omoronge ase obosio bwane." 
Genesis7:2 Oirane amo naye ching’iti chichenegete chirabe ekeng’wanso, isano na ibere isano na ibere, chinsacha ne chinkungu; na ase kera eng’iti etachenegeti, ibere ibere, ensacha na enkungu." 
Genesis7:3 Naende oirane ne chinyoni chikoiruruka, isano na ibere isano na ibere, chinsacha ne chinkungu. Okore ayio ase engencho y’okorenda kera egesaku kegenderere koba moyo ase ense." 
Genesis7:4 Nyuma y’amatuko atano na abere nindete embura ase ense etwe amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko, na kende gionsi nakorete kere moyo ase ense ningesirie.”" 
Genesis7:5 Na Nuhu agakora ayio onsi buna Omonene amochigete. 
Genesis7:6 Nuhu nigo arenge nemiaka amagana atano na rimo (600) engaki etoigo yachete ase ense. 
Genesis7:7 Nuhu agasoa ase obwato ime amo nabana baye abamura, na mokaye, na baka bamura baye, ase ogwetooria korwa ase etoigo eria." 
Genesis7:8 Na ase ching’iti chichenegete chirabe ekeng’wanso, ne ching’iti chitachenegeti, ne chinyoni, na echi chionsi chikwagura igoro ase ense," 
Genesis7:9 chigasoa ase obwato amo na Nuhu ibere ibere, chinsacha ne chinkungu, buna Nyasae achigete Nuhu." 
Genesis7:10 Ekaba nyuma y’amatuko atano na abere, etoigo egacha ase ense." 
Genesis7:11 Ase omwaka oria ekero Nuhu akoorire emiaka amagana atano na rimo (600), ase rituko ria ikomi, na gatano na kabere ri’omotienyi o kabere, chinsoko chionsi chi’amache chikabera ne chinguru korwa inse, na ebibao bia igoro bikaigoka," 
Genesis7:12 na embura egatwa igoro ase ense ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko." 
Genesis7:13 Ase rituko erio erio Nuhu agasoa ase obwato ime amo na Shemu, na Hamu, na Yafeti, bamura baye, na mokaye, na baka bamura baye batato." 
Genesis7:14 Amo nabarabwo chigasoa ching’iti chi’orosana echia kera egesaku, ne ching’iti chigotugwa echia kera egesaku, na echikwagura echia kera egesaku, na kera enyoni y’egesaku kende gionsi." 
Genesis7:15 Na chirochio chionsi echiare moyo chigasoa ase obwato amo na Nuhu, ibere ibere." 
Genesis7:16 Echi chionsi chiasoete, chinsacha ne chinkungu chire moyo chia kera egesaku, chigasoa buna Nyasae achigete Nuhu, na Omonene akamosiekera egesieri." 
Genesis7:17 Etoigo eria ekagenderera igoro y’ense ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, naro amache akamentekana, agacheng’enenia obwato na koboimokereria igoro mono korwa ase ense." 
Genesis7:18 Amache agaichora, akamenteka mono igoro y’ense, na obwato boria bogacheng’enena ase amache igoro." 
Genesis7:19 Amache akagenderera komenteka goichora igoro ase ense goika ebitunwa bionsi ebitambe, ebiare ande onsi inse y’erioba, bigatubwa." 
Genesis7:20 Amache akamenteka goichora, agatiira goika ebirengo bi’amaboko ikomi na atano igoro y’ebitunwa bionsi." 
Genesis7:21 Na chionsi echiare moyo, chiare gotaara ase ense, chigakwa; chinyoni, ne ching’iti chiatugire, ne ching’iti chi’orosana, na echikwagura, amo na mwanyabanto bonsi." 
Genesis7:22 Bionsi ebiarenge ase ense enyomo bigasirigwa, ebi bionsi biare koeyanera chimioro bire moyo." 
Genesis7:23 Nyasae agasiria ebinto bionsi biare moyo, ebiarenge igoro ase ense, mwanyabanto ne ching’iti, na echikwagura, ne chinyoni chia igoro; bionsi bigasirigwa korwa ase ense engima; Nuhu bweka agatoorigwa amo nabwo barenge amo nere ase obwato ime." 
Genesis7:24 Amache akagenderera goichora igoro ase ense ase engaki y’amatuko rigana erimo, na emerongo etano (150)." 
Genesis8:1 Nyasae akaba oinyorete Nuhu ne ching’iti chionsi, echi’orosana, na echiatugire, echiarenge amo nere ase obwato ime. Erio agwo Nyasae akagusia omwaga ase ense, na amache agachaka gokea." 
Genesis8:2 Chinsoko chiare kobera korwa inse amo nebibao bia igoro bigasiekwa, na embura yare korwa igoro egasira," 
Genesis8:3 na amache akagenderera gokea korwa ase ense, na ekero amatuko rigana erimo, na emerongo etano (150) aerete, amache agachaka gokeana." 
Genesis8:4 Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano na kabere, ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere, obwato bogeterekerera ase egetunwa egetambe ki’Ararati." 
Genesis8:5 Na amache akagenderera gokea goika omotienyi o ikomi. Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o ikomi ebichuria bi’ebitunwa bikarorekana. 
Genesis8:6 Nyuma y’amatuko emerongo ene kaerire Nuhu akaigora ekebao keria akorete ase obwato," 
Genesis8:7 agatoma ekegonkoru, na kerokio gekairuruka gochia aaria na aaria goika amache agakamoka korwa ase ense." 
Genesis8:8 Erio agatoma riruma arore gose amache akamokire korwa ase ense," 
Genesis8:9 korende riruma riria tirianyora aase rikogwa na gotacha namagoro aye, rikairana ase Nuhu obwato ime, ekiagera amache nao arenge igoro y’ense engima. Ase igo akarambora okoboko kwaye, akaribwata, akarisoyia obwato ime ase arenge." 
Genesis8:10 Erio akaganya amatuko ande atano na abere, naende agatoma riruma riria korwa ase obwato." 
Genesis8:11 Riruma riria rikairana chinsa chia mogoroba, na rora, ndiabwate rito ribese ri’omozeituni ase omonwa oye. Ase ayio Nuhu akamanya ng’a amache akamokire korwa ase ense." 
Genesis8:12 Naende akaganya amatuko ande atano na abere, agatoma riruma riria, na rirorio tiriairana asare naende." 
Genesis8:13 Ase omwaka bw’amagana atano na rimo, na oyomo, rituko rie ritangani ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, amache agasira korwa ase ense. Nuhu akarusia ekerama ki’obwato, akarigereria, akarora ng’a ense yakamokire." 
Genesis8:14 Rituko ri’emerongo ebere, na gatano na kabere ri’omotienyi o kabere, ense ekaba yakamokire kegima." 
Genesis8:15 Erio Nyasae agatebia Nuhu," 
Genesis8:16 “Soka korwa ase obwato, aye na mokao, na abana bao abamura, na abakungu babo." 
Genesis8:17 Osoke amo na kera egetongwa kere moyo amo naye: chinyoni, ne ching’iti chigotaara, na echikwagura igoro ase ense, erinde chiibore chimenteke, chiichore ase ense.”" 
Genesis8:18 Erio Nuhu agasoka amo na bamura baye, na mokaye, na baka bamura baye." 
Genesis8:19 Na kera eng’iti, na kera eyekwagura, na kera enyoni, na ebitongwa binde bionsi bigotaara ase ense bigasoka amo noroiboro rwabo, korwa ase obwato." 
Genesis8:20 Erio Nuhu akaagachera Omonene egesasimero, akarusia eyemo ase kera eng’iti, na ase kera enyoni echenegete, agachirua chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa igoro ase egesasimero keria." 
Genesis8:21 Na ekero Omonene aigwete rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera, agateba ase omoyo oye ime, “Tinkoragereria ense naende nonya ng’ake ase engencho ya mwanyabanto, naki ebirengererio bie chinkoro chia mwanyabanto nebibe korwa obwana bwabo; nonya nebitongwa bionsi bire moyo tingocha kobisiria naende buna nakorete." 
Genesis8:22 “Engaki ense egendererete kobao, nebe engaki y’ogosimeka na ey’okogesa, engaki y’obokendu na ey’omobaso omororo, engaki y’etoigo na ey’egurugura, omobaso na obotuko, tichikoera nonya ng’ake.”" 
Genesis9:1 Nyasae agasesenia Nuhu amo nabamura baye, akabatebia, “Moibore, momeneteke, moichore ase ense." 
Genesis9:2 Ching’iti chionsi chire ase ense chiboboe na kobairoka inwe: chinyoni chia igoro, ne ching’iti chikwagura igoro ase ense, ne chinswe chionsi chi’enyancha; echio chionsi chiabekirwe ase amaboko aino." 
Genesis9:3 Kera egetongwa kere moyo na kegotaara inakebe endagera yaino; buna nabaete chinyeni na ebimeri binde bigokina, naboigo nabaeire nebio bionsi." 
Genesis9:4 Korende timoria chinyama chire nobomoyo, engencho yaye chire namanyinga ime yabo." 
Genesis9:5 Amaene, amanyinga ’obogima bwaino ninyaganie ng’akanwe; korwa ase kera eng’iti ninyaganie, na korwa ase kera omonto oyogoita oyomwabo ninyaganie ng’akanwe obogima bw’omonto oyio." 
Genesis9:6 “Onde bwensi oraitere amanyinga a mwanyabanto, amanyinga ’omonto oyio naiterwe na mwanyabanto, ekiagera Nyasae nigo atongete mwanyabanto ase omogwekano oye." 
Genesis9:7 “Na inwe moibore, momenteke, mosarare, mobe abange ime ase ense.”" 
Genesis9:8 Erio Nyasae agatebia Nuhu amo nabamura baye," 
Genesis9:9 “Rora, inche ngokora nde okobwatana kw’ogotianania nainwe, amo nororeria rwaino roraiborwe korwa nyuma yaino," 
Genesis9:10 naende na kera egetongwa kere moyo kere amo nainwe, chinyoni chionsi ne ching’iti chigotugwa, ne ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana chire amo nainwe, chionsi echiasokire korwa ase obwato." 
Genesis9:11 Ngokora nde okobwatana kw’ogotianania nainwe, ng’a kende gionsi kere moyo tigekomerwa naende namache ’etoigo, gose etoigo tegocha koba naende egosaria ense nyuma y’ayio.”" 
Genesis9:12 Naende Nyasae agateba, “Eke nakio ekemanyererio gi’okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania nakorire egati yane nainwe, na kera egetongwa kere moyo amo nainwe, na ase ebiaare bigochigocha:" 
Genesis9:13 Inche nabekire omokubinyongo ase amare, noro nobe ekemanyererio gi’okobwatana egati yane na ense." 
Genesis9:14 Ekero nkwara amare igoro y’ense, na omokubinyongo nobe okororekana ase amare," 
Genesis9:15 erio nimbe nkoinyora okobwatana kwane, okwo nakorire egati yane nainwe, amo na kera egetongwa kere moyo. Amache takoba naende etoigo egosaria ebitongwa bionsi bire moyo." 
Genesis9:16 Ekero omokubinyongo okoba ase amare, na inche nkoyorigereria, ning’inyore okobwatana kwane gwa kare na kare, okwo nakorire egati yane, inche Nyasae, na kera egetongwa kere moyo ase ense.”" 
Genesis9:17 Nyasae agatebia Nuhu, “Eke nakio ekemanyererio gi’okobwatana okwo nakorire egati yane na ebitongwa bionsi bire moyo ase ense.”" 
Genesis9:18 Abana ba Nuhu abarwete ase obwato nabwo aba: Shemu, na Hamu, na Yafeti. Hamu nere ise Kanani." 
Genesis9:19 Aba batato nabwo barenge abana ba Nuhu, na korwa ase abwo mwanyabanto bakaranda ase ense engima." 
Genesis9:20 Nuhu akaba omoremi, akaba oyo bwe ritang’ani gosimeka emesabibu, nero ekoroisigwa edivai." 
Genesis9:21 Ere akanywa edivai; erio agatinda, akarara ore getirianda ase eema yaye ime." 
Genesis9:22 Hamu, ise Kanani, akamorora ore getirianda, agatebia bamura bamwabo babere barenge isiko amang’ana aya aroche." 
Genesis9:23 Erio Shemu na Yafeti bakabogoria engobo, bakayebeka amareko abo igoro, bakagenda kenyuma‐nyuma, bakabisia ise obogetirianda bwaye. Amaiso abo nigo arigereretie aase bakorwa, na tibarora obogetirianda bwa ise." 
Genesis9:24 Ekero Nuhu atindokire korwa ase okonywa kwaye kw’edivai, akamanya eke omwana oye omoke amokoreire," 
Genesis9:25 agateba, “Kanani aragererigwe; nigo arabe omosomba bw’abasomba ase abamwabo.”" 
Genesis9:26 Naende agateba, “Omonene, Nyasae o Shemu, nasesenigwe, na Kanani abe omosomba oye." 
Genesis9:27 Nyasae agareerie Yafeti obomenyo, tiga amenye ase chiema chia Shemu, na Kanani abe omosomba oye.”" 
Genesis9:28 Nyuma y’etoigo eria Nuhu nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atato, na emerongo etano (350)." 
Genesis9:29 Nuhu nigo akoorete emiaka amagana kianda, na emerongo etano (950), erio agakwa." 
Genesis10:1 Oro narwo ororeria rw’abana ba Nuhu, nabwo Shemu, na Hamu, na Yafeti. Asebare mbaiboretwe abana abamura nyuma y’etoigo eria." 
Genesis10:2 Abana ba Yafeti nabwo aba: Gomeri, na Magogu, na Madai, na Yavani, na Tubali, na Mesheki, na Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Na abana ba Gomeri nabwo aba: Asikenasi, na Rifati, na Togama." 
Genesis10:4 Na abana ba Yavani nabwo aba: Elisha, na Tarisisi, na Kitimu, na Rodani." 
Genesis10:5 Korwa ase abwo abanto b’enyancha mbarabare na ab’ebisinka bagesiarera, bakaba ababiare be chinsemo echio, kera eamate nomonwa obo na egesaku kiabo." 
Genesis10:6 Na abana ba Hamu nabwo aba: Kusi, na Misiri, na Putu, na Kanani." 
Genesis10:7 Na abana ba Kusi nabwo aba: Seba, na Havila, na Sabuta, na Raama, na Sabiteka. Na abana ba Raama nabwo aba: Seba na Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kusi akaibora Nimurodi. Nimurodi akaba omonto bwe ritang’ani ore nokobua ase ense. 
Genesis10:9 Nigo arenge omotwari ching’iti omokong’u, ase obosio bw’Omonene. Ase ayio abanto nigo banarete goteba igoro y’omonto, “Nigo anga buna Nimurodi, omotwari ching’iti omokong’u, ase obosio bw’Omonene.”" 
Genesis10:10 Omochakano bw’obogambi bwaye nigo bware Babeli, na Ereku, na Akadi, [na Kaline]; eyio yonsi nigo yare ase ense ya Shinari." 
Genesis10:11 Akarua ase ense eria, akagenda goika Asuri, akaagacha Nineva, na Rehoboti‐Iri, na Kala," 
Genesis10:12 na Reseni, omochie omonene oyorenge egati ya Nineva na Kala." 
Genesis10:13 Misiri nere oiborete Abaludi, na Abaanami, na Abalehabi, na Abanafutu," 
Genesis10:14 na Abapaturusi, Abakasiluhi, (korwa asebare nao Abafilisti barwete), na Abakafitori." 
Genesis10:15 Kanani akaibora Sidoni, omwana oye omotangi, na Heti," 
Genesis10:16 na Abayebusi, na Abaamori, na Abagirigasi," 
Genesis10:17 na Abahivi, na Abaarikiti, na Abasini," 
Genesis10:18 na Abaarivadi, na Abaseremari, na Abahamati. Erio nyuma y’ayio eamate ya Kanani egesiarera." 
Genesis10:19 Orobebe rw’Abakanani rogachaka korwa ase Sidoni, rokagenda enchera ya Gerari, rogaika Gasa, naende ase enchera ya Sodomu, na Gomora, na Adima, na Seboimu, rogaika Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Aba nabwo abana ba Hamu, buna barenge ase chiamate chiabo, na emenwa yabo, ne chinse chiabo, na ebisaku biabo." 
Genesis10:21 Shemu, oyorenge sokororia bw’abana bonsi b’Eberi, naende orenge omomura omonene omwabo Yafeti, akaiborerwa abana." 
Genesis10:22 Abana ba Shemu nabwo aba: Elamu, na Asuri, na Arifaksadi, na Ludi, na Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Na abana b’Aramu nabwo aba: Usi, na Huli, na Geteri, na Masi." 
Genesis10:24 Arifaksadi akaibora Sela, na Sela akaibora Eberi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberi akaibora abana babere abamura. Oria omotangi nigo aare korokwa Pelegi, ekiagera ase amatuko aye nario ense yaatananegete, na oyomwabo nigo aare korokwa Yokitani." 
Genesis10:26 Yokitani akaibora Alimodadi, na Selefu, na Hasarmaweti, na Yera," 
Genesis10:27 na Hadoramu, na Usali, na Dikila," 
Genesis10:28 na Obali, na Abimaeli, na Seba," 
Genesis10:29 na Ofiri, na Havila, na Yobabu. Abwo bonsi nabwo abana ba Yokitani." 
Genesis10:30 Ensemo eria bamenyete nigo yachakerete Mesa gochia Sefari, ase ebitunwa bia moocha." 
Genesis10:31 Aba nabwo abana ba Shemu, buna barenge ase chiamate chiabo, na emenwa yabo, ne chinse chiabo, na ebisaku biabo." 
Genesis10:32 Echio nachio chiamate chi’abana ba Nuhu, gotunyana ororeria rwabo ase ebisaku biabo; na korwa asebare ebisaku bigesiarera ase ense yonsi nyuma y’etoigo eria." 
Genesis11:1 Abanto b’ense engima nigo barenge nomonwa oyomo na enkwana eyemo. 
Genesis11:2 Ekaba abanto bakaimoka kogenda orogendo gochia ensemo ya moocha, bakanyora ense omweya ase ense ya Shinari, bagachaka komenya aroro." 
Genesis11:3 Barabwo bagatebania, “Inchuo, tokore amatabori na toyasambe nomorero.” Igo bakanyora amatabori ribaga ri’amagena, na esike gete ase okoyabwaterania." 
Genesis11:4 Erio bagateba, “Inchuo tweagachere omochie na omorobiri, na obotambe bwaye boike erioba igoro, twekorere erieta rinene, titobaisa gocha goserebanigwa ase ense yonsi.”" 
Genesis11:5 Erio Omonene agaika gocha inse arore omochie na omorobiri oyio mwanyabanto baagachire. 
Genesis11:6 Omonene agateba, “Rora, abanto aba negesaku ekemo, na bagokwana omonwa oyomo bonsi, naya naro bachakire gokora, na nyuma y’ayio tibagosinywa gento kende gionsi bararengererie gokora." 
Genesis11:7 Eta togende toike asebare, tobatantanie omonwa obo tibaigwana ase chinkwana barabwo ase barabwo, ase chinkwana chiabo.”" 
Genesis11:8 Ase igo Omonene akabaserebania korwa agwo, besiarere ase ense yonsi, bayemenye. Bagatiga koagacha omochie oria." 
Genesis11:9 Ase ayio okarokwa Babeli, ekiagera Omonene atantanetie omonwa bw’abanto b’ense yonsi, na korwa agwo Omonene akabaserebania bagende ense yonsi, bayemenye." 
Genesis11:10 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’ororeria rwa Shemu. Ekero Shemu abeire nemiaka rigana erimo (100), akaibora Arifaksadi; ekaba emiaka ebere nyuma y’etoigo eria." 
Genesis11:11 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Arifaksadi, Shemu nigo amenyete emiaka amagana atano (500), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:12 Ekero Arifaksadi abeire nemiaka emerongo etato, na etano (35) akaibora Sela." 
Genesis11:13 Nyuma y’okoiborwa gwa Sela, Arifaksadi nigo amenyete emiaka amagana ane, na etato (403), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:14 Ekero Sela abeire nemiaka emerongo etato (30), akaibora Eberi." 
Genesis11:15 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Eberi, Sela nigo amenyete emiaka amagana ane, na etato (403), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:16 Ekero Eberi abeire nemiaka emerongo etato, na ene (34), akaibora Pelegi." 
Genesis11:17 Nyuma y’okoiborwa gwa Pelegi, Eberi nigo amenyete emiaka amagana ane, na emerongo etato (430), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:18 Ekero Pelegi abeire nemiaka emerongo etato, akaibora Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Reu, Pelegi nigo amenyete emiaka amagana abere, na kianda (209), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:20 Ekero Reu abeire nemiaka emerongo etato, na ebere (32), akaibora Serugi," 
Genesis11:21 Nyuma y’okoiborwa gwa Serugi, Reu nigo amenyete emiaka amagana abere, na etano na ebere (207), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:22 Ekero Serugi abeire nemiaka emerongo etato (30) akaibora Nahori. 
Genesis11:23 Nyuma y’okoiborwa kwa Nahori, Serugi nigo amenyete emiaka amagana abere (200), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:24 Ekero Nahori abeire nemiaka emerongo ebere, na kianda (29), akaibora Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Nyuma y’okoiborwa gwa Tera, Nahori nigo amenyete emiaka rigana erimo, na ikomi na kianda (119), akaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
Genesis11:26 Ekero Tera abeire nemiaka emerongo etano na ebere (70), akaibora Aburamu, na Nahori, na Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’ororeria rwa Tera. Tera akaibora Aburamu, na Nahori, na Harani. Harani akaibora Loti." 
Genesis11:28 Harani agatanga gokwa, agatiga Tera ise moyo are, ase ense eria aiboreretwe, ase Uru y’Abakalidayo." 
Genesis11:29 Aburamu na Nahori bakanyuoma abakungu. Moka Aburamu nigo arenge korokwa Sarai, na moka Nahori Milka, omwana omosubati o Harani; oyio nere ise Milka na Isika." 
Genesis11:30 Korende Sarai nigo arenge omogomba, tabwate mwana." 
Genesis11:31 Tera akaira Aburamu omwana oye, na Loti omochokoro oye, omwana o Harani, amo na Sarai, moka momura oye Aburamu; bakagenda komo gochia Uru y’Abakalidayo, bakagenda goika ense ya Kanani. Korende ekero baigete omochie o Harani, bakamenya aroro." 
Genesis11:32 Tera nigo akoorete emiaka amagana abere, na etano (205); erio agakwera aaria Harani." 
Genesis12:1 Omonene agakwana na Aburamu, akamotebia, “Karue ase ense eye yao, na ase eamate yao, na ase omochie o iso, ogende goika ense ndakworokie." 
Genesis12:2 Ningokore obe egesaku ekenene, ningosesenie, ninkore erieta riao ribe rinene, na aye nobe omosesenigwa." 
Genesis12:3 “Nimbasesenie abwo baragosesenie, nere oyorakoragererie nimoragererie, na goetera asore aye ebisaku bionsi bi’ense inabisesenigwe.”" 
Genesis12:4 Erio Aburamu akaimoka, akagenda buna Omonene amotebetie, na Loti akagenda amo nere. Aburamu nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etano na ebere, na etano (75), ekero arenge kong’anya korwa Harani." 
Genesis12:5 Aburamu akaira Sarai mokaye, na Loti, omwana omomura omwabo, na ebinto bionsi ebi babwate, ebio konya benyoreire abanyene, na abanto babo bonsi babwate agwo Harani, bakaimoka, bakagenda ense ya Kanani." 
Genesis12:6 Ekero baigeteo, Aburamu agaeta gati y’ense eria goika aase aachenu agwo Shekemu, aase omote onga buna omotontera orenge, agwo More. Ase engaki eyio Abakanani nabwo bamenyete ase ense eyio." 
Genesis12:7 Erio Omonene akamoorokera Aburamu, akamotebia, “Ning’ee ororeria rwao ense eye ebe omwando obo.” Ase igo Aburamu akaagachera Omonene egesasimero agwo, Omonene oyo omoorokerete." 
Genesis12:8 Erio akarua agwo, akagenda ebitunwa ebire ensemo ya moocha ya Beteli, agatenenia eema yaye aroro. Korwa aase agwo Beteli nigo orenge ensemo ya bosongo, na Ai ensemo ya moocha. Na agwo akaagachera Omonene egesasimero akarangeria erieta ri’Omonene." 
Genesis12:9 Na Aburamu akabwatia orogendo akagenderera bosio gochia ensemo ya Negebu. 
Genesis12:10 Bono enchara egasoa ase ense eria, na ekiagera enchara eria yarenge enene mono ekagera Aburamu agatirimboka gochia Misiri." 
Genesis12:11 Kobaikire ang’e gosoa Misiri, agatebia Sarai mokaye, “Nimanyete ng’a nigo ore omokungu omonyakieni ase okororekana;" 
Genesis12:12 aande gose Abamisiri, ekero barakorore, nigo baratebe: Oyo mokaye; erio bang’ite inche, korende aye bagotige moyo." 
Genesis12:13 Ase ayio, obatebie ng’a mosubati ominto ore, erinde ebe buya asende, na ase engencho yao imbe moyo.”" 
Genesis12:14 Ekero Aburamu asoete Misiri, Abamisiri bakarora omokungu oyio ng’a nigo arenge omonyakieni mono." 
Genesis12:15 Ekero abarenge abagambi inse ya Farao bachia korora omokungu oria, bakamotogia ase obosio bwa Farao. Na omokungu oria akairwa komenya mwa Farao." 
Genesis12:16 Farao agakorera Aburamu buya ase engencho ya Sarai, na Aburamu nigo anyorete ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chitigere, na abasomba, abamura na abaiseke, ne chitigere chiaberi, ne chingamia." 
Genesis12:17 Korende Omonene akarenta amaakwa amanene ase Farao na ase abanto baye ase engencho ya Sarai, moka Aburamu." 
Genesis12:18 Erio Farao akarangeria Aburamu, akamoboria, “Inki eke gwankoreire iga, otare gontebia ng’a oyo mokao?" 
Genesis12:19 Naki gwakorete ogateba ng’a oyo mosubati omino, na inche nkamoira akaba mokane? Bono mokao oyio moire, ogende nere.”" 
Genesis12:20 Erio Farao agachika abanto bakoobe Aburamu amo na mokaye na kende gionsi abwate. 
Genesis13:1 Aburamu akarua Misiri, akagenda Negebu, ere amo na mokaye na ebi bionsi abwate, na Loti akagenda amo nere." 
Genesis13:2 Nabo Aburamu arenge omotenenku mono, nigo abwate etugo enyinge, ne chifeta, ne chitahabu." 
Genesis13:3 Akaimoka korwa Negebu, akagenda agaika Beteli, agwo aase atenenetie eema yaye ritang’ani, gati ya Beteli na Ai," 
Genesis13:4 agwo nao aase Aburamu aagachete egesasimero kie ritang’ani na korirangeria erieta ri’Omonene. 
Genesis13:5 Na Loti, nere oyogendete amo n’Aburamu, nigo abwate ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chiema." 
Genesis13:6 Ase igo ense eria tiyabaisana banyare komenya amo bonsi babere, ekiagera chinibo chiabo nechinyinge chiarenge, goika tibanyara komenya amo." 
Genesis13:7 Agwo eriomana rigatuboka egati y’abarisia b’Aburamu, na abarisia ba Loti. Ase engaki eyio Abakanani na Abaperisi mbarabwo bamenyete ase ense eria." 
Genesis13:8 Erio Aburamu agatebia Loti, “Tai buya twomane inche naye, abarisia baane na abao, ekiagera intwe nabanto abamo tore." 
Genesis13:9 Inee! Ense eye yonsi teri ase obosio bwao? Tiga twatananeke. Koragende ensemo ya bomosi, inche ningende eya borio; koragende ensemo ya borio, inche ningende eya bomosi.”" 
Genesis13:10 Loti akaimokia amaiso aye akarigereria, akarora ense omweya ya Yorodan ng’a nigo yare namache amange kera aase; goika Soari nigo yare buna omogondo bw’Omonene, buna ense ya Misiri. Nabo yarenge ritang’ani Omonene atarasaria Sodomu na Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 Ase igo Loti agechorera ere bweka ense omweya yonsi ya Yorodan. Igo Loti akamanora kogenda gochia moocha. Barabwo bagaatananekana. 
Genesis13:12 Aburamu akamenya ase ense ya Kanani, na Loti nere akamenya egati y’emechie agwo ase ense eria omweya, akang’anyia eema yaye gochia Sodomu." 
Genesis13:13 Abanto ba Sodomu nigo barenge ababe, barenge gokora ebibe ebinge ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Genesis13:14 Nyuma Loti na Aburamu kobaatananekire, Omonene agatebia Aburamu, “Imokia amaiso ao, origererie korwa agwo aase ore, origererie ensemo ya sugusu, na irianyi, na moocha, na bosongo;" 
Genesis13:15 naki ense eye yonsi oroche ninkoyee aye na ororeria rwao kare na kare. 
Genesis13:16 Ninkore ororeria rwao robe buna orotu rw’ense rotanyare kobareka; onye omonto okonyara kobara orotu rw’ense, rirorio nanyare kobara ororeria rwao narororwo." 
Genesis13:17 Bono imoka, otaare ense eye, orore obotambe na obogare bwaye, ekiagera ninkoe aye ense eyio.”" 
Genesis13:18 Erio Aburamu akang’anyia eema yaye, agacha akamenya akanani k’emete enga buna emetontera agwo Mamure, ang’e na Heburoni. Akaagachera Omonene egesasimero aroro." 
Genesis14:1 Ekaba ase amatuko ’Amurafeli, omoruoti o Shinari, na Arioki, omoruoti o Eleasari, na Kedorilaoma, omoruoti o Elamu, na Tidali, omoruoti o Goimu," 
Genesis14:2 abaruoti aba bagakora esegi na Bera, omoruoti o Sodomu, na Birisa, omoruoti o Gomora, na Shinabu, omoruoti o Adima na Shemeberi, omoruoti o Seboimu, na omoruoti o Bela noro Soari." 
Genesis14:3 Aba bonsi bakabwatana, bagasangererekana ase ense omweya ya Sidimu, agwo nao Enyancha y’Omonyo ere." 
Genesis14:4 Konya bamokoreire Kedorilaoma emiaka ikomi na ebere, korende omwaka o ikomi na gatato bakaanga, tibamokorera naende." 
Genesis14:5 Na omwaka o ikomi na kane Kedorilaoma na abaruoti baria babwataine nere bagacha, bakarwania na kobua Abarefai ase Asteroti‐Karinaimu, na Abasusi ase Hamu, na Abaemi ase Shawe‐Kiriataimu," 
Genesis14:6 na Abahori ase egetunwa Seiri goika Eli‐Parani ore ang’e nerooro. 
Genesis14:7 Erio bakairana goika Enimisifati, noro Kadeshi, bagasaria ense yonsi y’Abaamaleki, na eya Abaamori abwo bamenyete Hasasoni‐Tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Agwo omoruoti o Sodomu, na oyo o Gomora, na oyo bw’Adima, na oyo o Seboimu, na oyo o Bela, noro Soari, bakagenda, bakabwatana ase okorwana esegi ase ense omweya ya Sidimu," 
Genesis14:9 barwane na Kedorilaoma, omoruoti o Elamu, na Tidali, omoruoti o Goimu, na Amurafeli, omoruoti o Shinari, na Arioki, omoruoti o Eliesari. Abaruoti abwo bane bakarwania baria batano." 
Genesis14:10 Na ense omweya ya Sidimu nigo yaichire amabwago ’esike gete, na abaruoti abwo ba Sodomu na Gomora ekero barenge gotama, bakagwa ase amabwago ayio ime, na abatigarete bagatama gochia ebitunwa igoro." 
Genesis14:11 Erio ababisa bagasakora chinibo chionsi chia Sodomu na Gomora, na endagera yabo yonsi bakaira chinsobo." 
Genesis14:12 Naboigo bagoosa Loti, omwana omomura omwabo Aburamu, oyomenyete agwo Sodomu, bakamoira amo nenibo yaye." 
Genesis14:13 Omonto oyomo, oyotamete korwa ase abooswa, akagenda agatebia Aburamu Omoibirania, oyomenyete ase akanani k’emete enga buna emetontera ka Mamure, oria Omoamori, momura omwabo Esikoli na Aneri. Abwo konya bakorire okobwatana na Aburamu." 
Genesis14:14 Aburamu agachia koigwa ng’a oyomwabo osakoirwe na gwoswa, agatoma abamura baye abakong’u, abaiboire bwoye, abamanyire korwana esegi, babwatie ababisa goika Dani. Abarwani aba nigo barenge amagana atato, na ikomi na batano na batato." 
Genesis14:15 Bwachia koba botuko, Aburamu agaatanana abanto baye, erinde barwanie ababisa babo, akababua akabaseria goika Hoba, sugusu ya Damesiki." 
Genesis14:16 Erio akairania enibo yonsi, na akairania boigo Loti omwabo amo nenibo yaye, na abakungu, na abanto bande abasakoretwe." 
Genesis14:17 Ekero Aburamu are koirana korwa ase ogoita Kedorilaoma amo nabaruoti baria barenge nere, omoruoti o Sodomu agasoka komorototera ase ense omweya ya Shawe, eyio n’Ense omweya y’Omoruoti." 
Genesis14:18 Erio Melkizedeki, omoruoti o Salemu, akarenta omogati na edivai; ere nigo arenge omokuani o Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono." 
Genesis14:19 Akamosesenia, akabora, “Aburamu asesenigwe na Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono, oyotongete igoro na ense;" 
Genesis14:20 Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono atogigwe, oyo obekire ababisa bao ase amaboko ao!” Aburamu akamoa ensemo ya ikomi ya kera egento ekiabwate." 
Genesis14:21 Omoruoti o Sodomu agatebia Aburamu, “Ing’a abanto baane, korende enibo ero oire aye.”" 
Genesis14:22 Korende Aburamu agatebia omoruoti o Sodomu, “Naimokirie okoboko kwane na gotiana ase Omonene Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono, oyotongete igoro na ense," 
Genesis14:23 ng’a tinkoira nonya ng’ake eusi, gose enuga y’egekoroto kiao, gose kende gionsi kiao, obaise gocha goteba: Ninche natenenkirie Aburamu." 
Genesis14:24 Tinkoira gento otatiga endagera eyio abamura abwo bariete, na ensemo y’abwo bagendete amo nainche; tiga Aneri, na Esikoli, na Mamure, barabwo baire ebiabo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Nyuma y’amang’ana ayio, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigachiera Aburamu ase okorora, rigoteba, “Aburamu, toiroka, Inche nenguba yao, na eng’eria yao nebe enene mono.”" 
Genesis15:2 Aburamu akamoboria, “Inee! Omonene Nyasae, ninki orang’e? Naki nigo ngendererete gochia gokwa ntari na mwana, na oyorache koira omwando o bwone n’Eliezeri, oyo Omodamesiki.”" 
Genesis15:3 Aburamu akabora naende, “Rora, tong’eti abana, na omosomba oyoiboirwe aa bwone, nere oraire omwando o bwone.”" 
Genesis15:4 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rikamochiera naende, rigateba, “Omonto oyio, tari ere oraire omwando oo, otatiga omwana oo bori, orarwe ase enda yao, nere oraire omwando oo.”" 
Genesis15:5 Omonene akamosokia isiko, akamotebia, “Rigereria gochia igoro, na obare ching’enang’eni, gose nonyare gochibara.” Erio akamotebia, “Ororeria rwao naboigo rorabe.”" 
Genesis15:6 Aburamu nigo amwegenete Omonene, na ase engencho eyio akabarwa koba omonyene oboronge." 
Genesis15:7 Erio akamotebia, “Inche ninche Omonene, nakorusetie korwa ase Uru y’Abakalidayo, ninkoe ense eye ebe omwando oo.”" 
Genesis15:8 Aburamu akamoboria, “Inee! Omonene Nyasae, naki ndakore imanye ng’a nebe omwando one?”" 
Genesis15:9 Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ndetera emori ritororo y’emiaka etato, na embori esubeni y’emiaka etato, na emingichi y’emiaka etato, ne riruma ne riige rie riruma.”" 
Genesis15:10 Akamorentera echio chionsi, agatandora kera eyemo chimbaara ibere, akabeka kera orobaara rogachikana norwamwabo, korende chinyoni chirochio tachitandora." 
Genesis15:11 Na ekero chinsoti chiachia kogwa ase amabego aria, Aburamu agachiseria." 
Genesis15:12 Erioba koriabeire ang’e kogwa, Aburamu akabwatwa ne chitoro chindito, na obwoba obonene mono bokamosoa." 
Genesis15:13 Erio Omonene agatebia Aburamu, “Manya amaene ng’a ororeria rwao inabache koba abamenyi ase ense etari eyabo, na barabwo inababe abasomba b’abanto b’agwo, na abwo inababachande mono ase engaki y’emiaka amagana ane." 
Genesis15:14 Abanto b’egesaku keria, barabakore babe abasomba babo, nimbagambie, na nyuma y’ayio nabaruo bare nenibo enyinge mono." 
Genesis15:15 Korende aye nogende ase chisokoro chiao ase omorembe. Igo oratindekwe ase obogotu obuya. 
Genesis15:16 Barabwo bagoika ase ekiaare gia kane inabairane gocha aa, ekiagera obobe bw’Abaamori tiboraikerana goika bono.”" 
Genesis15:17 Ekero erioba riagure, na omosunte osoire, eriko rigosokia erioki amo nekieri kere nomorero ekebemberi, bigaeta gati ye chinyama chiria." 
Genesis15:18 Ase rituko erio Omonene agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania n’Aburamu, agateba, “Ororeria rwao nabaeire ense eye gochakera ase orooche orwo oronene rokorokwa Eufarati," 
Genesis15:19 ase ense y’Abakeni, na Abakenisi, na Abakadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 na Abahiti, na Abaperisi, na Abarefai," 
Genesis15:21 na Abaamori, na Abakanani, na Abagirigasi, na Abayebusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Bono Sarai, moka Aburamu, tamoiborerete bana. Ere narenge nomoiseke omosomba Omomisiri, ore korokwa Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai agatebia Aburamu, “Noroche bono ng’a Omonene ontangire tinyora abana, menyana nomoiseke oyo one omosomba; aande nabo ndanyore abana korwa asare.” Aburamu akaigwera ogokwana gwa Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Ase igo, nyuma Aburamu kamenyire ense ya Kanani emiaka ikomi, Sarai akaimokia Hagari, omosomba oye Omomisiri, akamomoa Aburamu, omosacha oye, ng’a abe mokaye o sere‐sere." 
Genesis16:4 Erio bakamenyana na Hagari, na ere akaba morito. Ekero arora ng’a obeire morito, akaba ogochaya moibori omwabo." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai agatebia Aburamu, “Obobe obo bwanyorete, tiga naye bokonyore! Inakoa omoiseke one omosomba koboko kwao; ere, ekero arora ng’a obeire morito, onchayire. Tiga Omonene atogambane inche naye!”" 
Genesis16:6 Aburamu nere agatebia Sarai, “Rora, omosomba oo oyio nase amaboko ao are; mokorere buna oranche.” Erio Sarai akamochanda bobe, na ere agatama korwa asare." 
Genesis16:7 Omomalaika bw’Omonene akarora Hagari ase erooro ase ensoko y’amache yarenge ase enchera ekogenda Suri. 
Genesis16:8 Akamoboria, “Aye omosomba o Sarai, ng’ai okorwa, naende ng’ai okogenda?” Akamoiraneria, “Nigo ngotama korwa ase moibori ominto Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Erio omomalaika bw’Omonene akamotebia, “Irana gochia ase moibori omino, na bwekeyie asare.”" 
Genesis16:10 Naende omomalaika bw’Omonene akamotebia, “Nimentekanie ororeria rwao, na omobaro obo tokonyarwa kobareka, ekiagera barabe abange mono.”" 
Genesis16:11 Naende Omomalaika bw’Omonene akamotebia, “Rora, morito ore, noibore omwana omoisia; nomoroke Isumaeli, ekiagera Omonene oigure ekerero ki’emechando yao." 
Genesis16:12 Ere nigo arabe buna etigere y’orosana ase egati y’abanto, na okoboko kwaye nigo korabe igoro y’abanto bonsi, na amaboko ’abanto bonsi nigo arabe igoro yaye; ere nigo aramenye bosio bw’abamwabo bonsi.”" 
Genesis16:13 Ase ayio Hagari akaroka Omonene oyo okwanete nere Eli‐Roi, engencho yaye “Aye naye Nyasae bw’okorora”; naki akeboria, “Inee! Amaene, narorire Nyasae, na ere ontiga inde moyo nyuma konamororire?”" 
Genesis16:14 Ase ayio ensoko eria ekarokwa Beeri‐Lahai‐Roi; ero nigo ere egati ya Kadeshi na Beredi. 
Genesis16:15 Erio Hagari akaiborera Aburamu omwana omoisia; nere akaroka omwana oria oye, Isumaeli." 
Genesis16:16 Aburamu konya obeire nemiaka emerongo etano na etato, na etano nomo (86), ekero Hagari amoiborerete Isumaeli." 
Genesis17:1 Ekero Aburamu abeire nemiaka emerongo kianda, na kianda (99). Omonene akamoorokera, akamotebia, “Inche ninche Nyasae Omobui; genderera ase obosio bwane, na obe omoikeranu." 
Genesis17:2 Inche ninkore okobwatana kw’ogotianania egati yane naye, ninkomentekanie mono.”" 
Genesis17:3 Erio Aburamu agatung’ama inse akaumama, na Nyasae akamotebia," 
Genesis17:4 “Rora, okobwatana kwane nabwatanire naye nakwo oko: Aye nobe sokoro bw’ebisaku ebinge." 
Genesis17:5 Bono erieta riao tirikoba naende Aburamu, korende nigo orarokwe Ibrahimu, ekiagera nagokorire obe sokoro bw’ebisaku ebinge." 
Genesis17:6 Ninkomente obe nororeria oronge mono, ninkore ebisaku ebinge birue asore, na abaruoti nabarue asore boigo." 
Genesis17:7 “Ning’ikeranie okobwatana kw’ogotianania egati yane naye, na ororeria rwao korwa nyuma yao, kogenderere ekiaare ase ekiaare, kobe okobwatana gwa kare na kare; imbe Nyasae oo, na oyo bw’ororeria rwao korwa nyuma yao." 
Genesis17:8 Inche ninkoe aye, na ororeria rwao rorache korwa nyuma yao, ense eye omenyete bono buna omomenyi, ense yonsi ya Kanani, ebe eyaino kare na kare, na inche nimbe Nyasae obo.”" 
Genesis17:9 Nyasae agatebia Ibrahimu, “Aye goika obwate okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, aye na ororeria rwao rorache korwa nyuma yao, ekiaare ase ekiaare." 
Genesis17:10 Oko nakwo okobwatana kwane, orabwate egati yane naye, na ororeria rwao rorache korwa nyuma yao: Kera omosacha ore asemore arokigwe." 
Genesis17:11 Goika mokebwe risankwa ria isiko ri’ekiimo kiaino ki’obosacha, na ayio nabe ekemanyererio gi’okobwatana egati yane nainwe." 
Genesis17:12 Ekiaare ase ekiaare kera omwana omoisia ore ase egati yaino goika arokigwe ekero akoorire amatuko atano na atato, omobiare o inka amo nomogorwa chibesa korwa ase abanto ba isiko, otari bw’ororeria rwao." 
Genesis17:13 Omobiare o inka na omogorwa chibesa, bonsi goika barokigwe. Ase igo ekemanyererio gi’okobwatana kwane inakebe ase emebere yaino goika kare na kare." 
Genesis17:14 Omosacha onde bwensi otakebiri risankwa ria isiko ri’ekiimo kiaye ki’obosacha, omonto oyio nigo araatananwe korwa ase abanto bamwabo, aserigwe gochia isiko, ekiagera osaririe okobwatana kwane.”" 
Genesis17:15 Naende Nyasae agatebia Ibrahimu, “Sarai mokao, tobaisa komoroka naende Sarai, korende erieta riaye nigo rirabe Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Nimosesenie, nkonyorere omwana omomura korwa asare, nimosesenie, abe ng’ina bw’ebisaku; na abaruoti b’abanto inabaiborwe korwa asare.”" 
Genesis17:17 Erio Ibrahimu agatung’ama inse, agaseka, akabora ase omoyo oye ime, “Inee! Omonto ore nemiaka rigana nanyare koibora omwana?” Sara nere oyo ore nemiaka emerongo kianda aibore omwana?" 
Genesis17:18 Ibrahimu agatebia Nyasae, “Koranche, Isumaeli abe moyo ase obosio bwao!”" 
Genesis17:19 Nyasae akamokania, akamotebia, “Taibo, Sara mokao nakoiborere omwana omomura, na aye nomoroke Isaka. Inche ning’ikeranie nere okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, kobe okobwatana gwa kare na kare ase ororeria rwaye rorache korwa nyuma yaye." 
Genesis17:20 Ase amang’ana igoro ya Isumaeli nakoigure, rora, nimosesenie nimomentekanie mono, naibore abagambi ikomi na babere; ninkore egesaku ekenene kerue asare." 
Genesis17:21 Korende ning’ikeranie okobwatana kwane na Isaka, oyo Sara araibore ase engaki buna eye iga, ase omwaka ogocha.”" 
Genesis17:22 Nyasae ekero akoorire gokwana na Ibrahimu, akairana korwa asare, akagenda." 
Genesis17:23 Erio Ibrahimu akabwata Isumaeli omwana oye, na abasomba aba baiboire ase enka yaye, na abagorwa chibesa, kera omonto omosacha ore ase abanto b’enka ya Ibrahimu, akabakeba risankwa ria isiko ri’ekiimo kiabo ki’obosacha, ase rituko riria riria, buna Nyasae amotebetie." 
Genesis17:24 Ibrahimu konya obeire nemiaka emerongo kianda, na kianda (99), ekero akebetwe, risankwa ria isiko ri’ekiimo kiaye ki’obosacha." 
Genesis17:25 Na Isumaeli, omwana oye, nigo konya abeire nemiaka ikomi, na etato, ekero akebetwe risankwa ria isiko ri’ekiimo kiaye ki’obosacha." 
Genesis17:26 Ase rituko erio erio Ibrahimu agasarwa amo na Isumaeli, omwana oye," 
Genesis17:27 na abanto bonsi baiboire ase enka yaye, na abagorwa chibesa korwa ase abanto ba isiko, bagasarwa amo nere." 
Genesis18:1 Omonene akaorokera Ibrahimu ase emete enga buna emetontera agwo Mamure, ekero ere aikaransete gesieri ki’eema yaye, engaki y’omobaso omororo." 
Genesis18:2 Agwo akaimokia amaiso aye, akarora abanto batato bateneine bosio bwaye. Ekero abarora, akaminyoka korwa gesieri ki’eema, agachia kobarotota, agatung’ama inse," 
Genesis18:3 akabora, “Omonene one, onye nanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, tong’etania inche, omosomba oo." 
Genesis18:4 Tiga morenterwe amache make, mwesibie amagoro, na motimokere aa ase ekiriri ki’omote oyo." 
Genesis18:5 Inche imbarentere endagera inke morie, erio monyore chinguru; nyuma yaye mogenderere ase mware kogenda, naki aase aiga mwaeta naase aane inche omosomba oino.” Bakamotebia, “Gaki, kora buna gwateba.”" 
Genesis18:6 Ase igo Ibrahimu akaayerera, agasoa eema ime ase Sara, akamotebia, “Renta bwango obosie, ebirengo bitato, obokonye, okore emegati.”" 
Genesis18:7 Erio Ibrahimu akaminyoka getii ase riicho riaye, akarenta emori engiya enoru, enterere, akayea omosomba oye, akamotebia, “Yeroisie bwango, oyerente.”" 
Genesis18:8 Akabogoria amaguta, na amabeere, ne chinyama chi’emori eria aroisetie, agaterekera abageni baria. Ere agatenena asebare ensemo ase ekiriri ki’omote, ekero baare koragera." 
Genesis18:9 Barabwo bakamoboria, “Ng’ai Sara mokao are?” Ere akabairaneria, “Neema ime are.”" 
Genesis18:10 Omonene akamotebia, “Amaene, inche ning’irane asore omwaka ogocha engaki enga buna eye, na ninyore ng’a Sara mokao onyorire omwana omoisia.” Sara nigo ategererete gesieri ki’eema yarenge magega Omonene." 
Genesis18:11 Bono Ibrahimu na Sara konya bagotire mono, baetanirie emiaka y’oboke, na Sara konya oeteire emiaka y’okonyora abana." 
Genesis18:12 Ase ayio, Sara agaseka ase omoyo oye ime, ogoteba, “Buna inde omogotu iga, na omosacha one nere ogotire, naki ndakore inyore omogoko oyio?”" 
Genesis18:13 Omonene akaboria Ibrahimu, “Ninki Sara agosekera, ogoteba: Inche amaene ninyibore omwana buna nagotire iga?" 
Genesis18:14 Ing’ana ki rire rikong’u riramosinye Omonene? Engaki ndairane asore ase omwaka ogocha, engaki enga buna eye, ninyore ng’a Sara onyorire omwana omoisia.”" 
Genesis18:15 Sara agakana, agateba, “Inche tinsegeti,” naki nigo oboete. Omonene akamotebia, “Taibo; korende aye ngwaseka.”" 
Genesis18:16 Erio abanto abwo bakaimoka korwa agwo, bakagenda, bakaba barigereretie gochia Sodomu, na Ibrahimu akagenda amo nabarabwo, akabakooba." 
Genesis18:17 Omonene agateba, “Inee! Imobise Ibrahimu ring’ana ngochia gokora," 
Genesis18:18 ekero ndoche ng’a ngochia are koba egesaku ekenene gie chinguru, na ebisaku bionsi bi’ense inabisesenigwe goetera asare?" 
Genesis18:19 Naki nimomanyete, ng’a nachike abana baye na abwo b’enka yaye, abarache koiborwa korwa nyuma yaye, babwatie enchera y’Omonene, bakore oboronge na ekeene, erinde Omonene aikeranerie Ibrahimu aya amorierete eira.”" 
Genesis18:20 Naende Omonene agateba, “Ekiagera ekerero gia Sodomu na Gomora nekenene, na ebibe biabo biamentekire mono," 
Genesis18:21 nigo ndaike gochia inse, indore onye bakorire amabe amange buna ekerero eke kiang’ikeire kegoteba; onye taibo, nimanye ayio.”" 
Genesis18:22 Erio abanto baria bakarua agwo, bakagenda gochia Sodomu, korende Ibrahimu agatigara oteneine agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Genesis18:23 Ibrahimu agasuka gochia ase Omonene, akamoboboria, “Inee! Amaene, nigo orasirie abanyene oboronge amo nabakori amabe?" 
Genesis18:24 Aande ase omochie oria abanyene oboronge emerongo etano mbakareo, nigo orayosirie, gose noyororere amabera ase engencho y’abwo abanyene oboronge emerongo etano?" 
Genesis18:25 Yaya, tokora bo, tosiria omonyene oboronge amo nabakori amabe; omonyene oboronge takorwa buna omokori amabe! Ayio takoba bo. Inee! Omogambi bw’ense engima tagokora oboronge?”" 
Genesis18:26 Omonene akamotebia, “Inse konyora abanyene oboronge emerongo etano ase omochie oria o Sodomu, rirorio nigo ndatige aase aria ase engencho y’abwo, tinkoyosaria.”" 
Genesis18:27 Ibrahimu akairaneria, “Rigereria, ningendererete gokwana n’Omonene, nonya inche inde orotu rw’amaroba, na eribu bosa." 
Genesis18:28 Aande ase baria emerongo etano baise koba batano tibaiyo, abanyene oboronge, Inee, nosarie omochie ekiagera batano tibaiyo?” Akairaneria, “Tingosaria omochie, kondarore agwo emerongo ene, na batano.”" 
Genesis18:29 Akagenderera naende gokwana nere, “Aande baraisa kororekana rende emerongo ene?” Ere akairaneria, “Ase engencho y’abwo emerongo ene, tingosaria omochie.”" 
Genesis18:30 Ibrahimu akabora, “Omonene, koranche, tobaisa kombea ningendererete gokwana naye. Aande barabaisa konyorekana rende emerongo etato?” Omonene akairaneria, “Tingosaria omochie inse konyora bare emerongo etato aroro.”" 
Genesis18:31 Ibrahimu akabora, “Rora, ningendererete gokwana n’Omonene. Baise konyorekana rende emerongo ebere?” Omonene akairaneria, “Ase engencho y’abwo emerongo ebere, tingosaria omochie.”" 
Genesis18:32 Ibrahimu akamoboria naende, “Omonene, tobaisa kombea, bono ndimo rioka ngokoboria, barachia konyorekana rende ikomi boka?” Akairaneria, “Tingosaria omochie, inse konyora agwo ikomi boka.”" 
Genesis18:33 Ekero Omonene akoorete gokwana na Ibrahimu, akagenda; na Ibrahimu akairana bwoye." 
Genesis19:1 Abamalaika baria babere bakagenda, bagaika Sodomu mogoroba, na Loti nigo arenge oikaransete geita gia Sodomu. Ekero Loti abaroche, akaimoka kobarotota, agatung’ama inse, akaumama," 
Genesis19:2 akabora, “Abanene baane, gobera gocha aa, mosoe mw’omosomba oino, monyore amache mwesibie amagoro aino, morare goika mambia bokie; erio moche moimoke mambia, mogende.” Barabwo bagakana, bagateba, “Yaya, nigo tokoba aa inchera obotuko obo bwonsi.”" 
Genesis19:3 Korende akabasorora mono, na barabwo bakagobera, bagasoa nyomba mwaye. Erio akabakorera endagera, akaroisia na emegati etabekiri memera, na barabwo bakaria." 
Genesis19:4 Ritang’ani batarachia korara, abanto bonsi pi b’omochie oria o Sodomu, abamura na abagaaka, bagacha bagaetanana enyomba," 
Genesis19:5 bakarangeria Loti, bakamoboria, “Abanto abwo bacha mwao bono botuko, ng’ai bare? Basokie isiko aa, tobakorere obosooku.”" 
Genesis19:6 Loti agasoka isiko ase abanto baria, agasieka egesieri korwa nyuma yaye," 
Genesis19:7 akabatebia, “Baminto, nabasoroire, timokora bobe buna iga." 
Genesis19:8 Rora, nimbwate abaiseke baane babere abekungi; tiga mbabarentere, na mobakorere buna moranche, korende abanto aba iga timobakorera ing’ana riibe, ekiagera basoire nyomba mwane ime.”" 
Genesis19:9 Korende barabwo bakamotebia, “Karuo!” Naende bagatebania, “Omonto oyo nomomenyi are aa seito, na bono nigo arigetie kogamba! Bono nigo toragokorere bobe mono kobua buna nanga tware gokorera abanto abwo.” Erio bagatwoma‐twoma Loti mono, bagaika ang’e gosaria egesieri." 
Genesis19:10 Korende abanto baria barenge ime bakarambora amaboko abo, bakang’usa Loti gochia nyomba ime, bagasieka egesieri." 
Genesis19:11 Erio bakabaukoria abanto baria barenge gesieri isiko, abake na abanene, erinde bagasinywa konyora egesieri." 
Genesis19:12 Erio abasacha baria babere bakaboria Loti, “Nore nonde omino aa? Nobwate abana bao banyuomete abaiseke bao, gose abamura na abaiseke bao, gose kobwate bande bamino ase omochie oyo, barusie korwa aase aa." 
Genesis19:13 Naki intwe nigo twachire gosaria aase aa, ekiagera ekerero kiaye kiamentekire ase obosio bw’Omonene; ase ayio Omonene ototomire tosarie aase aa.”" 
Genesis19:14 Erio Loti agasoka, agatebia abamura aba konya bariereire abaiseke baye boko, “Imoka bwango, morue aase aa, ekiagera Omonene ngocha are gosaria omochie oyo,” Korende barabwo bagakaga ng’a negosori akobakorera." 
Genesis19:15 Bogachia gokia mambia, abamalaika baria bakaayereria Loti, bakamotebia, “Imoka bwango, ira mokao na abaiseke bao babere abare aa amo naye, tobaisa gosirigwa ase egesusuro keria omochie oyo ogochia konyora.”" 
Genesis19:16 Ekero abete ogotebana, abanto abwo bakamobwata okoboko, bakabwata na mokaye na abaiseke baye, ekiagera Omonene amororerete amabera, akamosokia isiko y’omochie." 
Genesis19:17 Ekero babasokirie isiko, oyomo obo akabatebia, “Tama, motoorie obogima bwaino; timorigereria nyuma, gose timotenena aande onsi ase ense eraire. Motame gochia ase ebitunwa, timobaisa gosira.”" 
Genesis19:18 Loti akabakania, akabatebia, “Taibo, Omonene one;" 
Genesis19:19 rora omosomba oo onyorire ogwancherwa ase amaiso ao, kwamentire amabera ao asende ase ogotooria obogima bwane; korende inche tinkonyara gotama ng’ikeere ebitunwa; amabe abaise konyora, ang’ite." 
Genesis19:20 Rora omochie oyo ore ang’e aiga, omochie omoke, noro ndaike bwango. Tiga ntame gochia ase omochie oria, ore omoke iga, ntoorie obogima bwane.”" 
Genesis19:21 Ere akamotebia, “Rora, nagwancheire ase ring’ana erio boigo. Tingosaria omochie oyio gwateba." 
Genesis19:22 Ayerera, bwetoorie, ekiagera tingokora ing’ana rinde rionsi goika gwasoire omochie oria ime.” Ase ayio, omochie oyio okarokwa Soari." 
Genesis19:23 Erioba konya riaorokire ekero Loti asoete Soari. 
Genesis19:24 Erio Omonene akaruta korwa igoro amagena ’omorero akonyititoka na omorero igoro ya Sodomu na Gomora," 
Genesis19:25 agasamba emechie eyio, amo nense eyio yonsi eraire, na agasiria bonsi abamenyete imeo, na ebinto bionsi biare gokina ase ense eria." 
Genesis19:26 Korende moka Loti nigo arenge korwa nyuma, akarigereria magega, akaonchoka, akooma, akaba buna rigena ri’omonyo." 
Genesis19:27 Mambia kobwakia, Ibrahimu akagenda aase aria atenenete ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Genesis19:28 Ere akarigereria maate gochia ensemo ya Sodomu na Gomora, na ense yonsi eraire, na agwo akarora erioki rigotiira korwa inse, buna erioki rikorwa ase eriko rinene." 
Genesis19:29 Ekaba ekero Nyasae asaretie emechie eyio y’ense eraire, akaba okoinyora Ibrahimu, akarusia Loti ase ogosarigwa koria, ekero asambete emechie eyio ase Loti amenyete." 
Genesis19:30 Loti agatiira korwa Soari, agacha akamenya ase ebitunwa amo nabaiseke baye babere, ekiagera nigo oboete komenya Soari; akamenya ase rikuruma amo nabaiseke baye babere." 
Genesis19:31 Omoiseke oye omotangi agatebia oyomwabo omoke, “Tata ogotire, gose monto onde tari ase ense oyorache gotonyuoma buna engencho y’ense yonsi ere." 
Genesis19:32 Bono, tiga toe tata edivai anywe, atinde, torare nere, erinde tomotenenerie egesaku kiaye, tigesira.”" 
Genesis19:33 Bakanyoisia ise edivai ase obotuko boria; omoiseke oria omotangi agachia, akarara nere, ise tamanya ekero arara, gose ekero aboka." 
Genesis19:34 Rituko ria kabere omoiseke oria omotangi agatebia oria omoke omwabo, “Rora, obotuko bwa igoro nigo naraire na Tata; tomonyoisie naende edivai ase obotuko obo, erio naye ochie, orare nere, erinde tomotenenerie egesaku kiaye, tigesira.”" 
Genesis19:35 Bakamonyoisia naende edivai ase obotuko obwo. Omoiseke oria omoke akaimoka, akarara nere, ise tamanya ekero arara, gose ekero aboka." 
Genesis19:36 Naboigo abaiseke abwo babere ba Loti bakorete, bakaba barito korwa ase ise." 
Genesis19:37 Oria omotangi akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Moabu; oyio nere sokoro bw’Abamoabu goika rero iga." 
Genesis19:38 Na oria omwabo omoke, nere akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Ben‐Ami; oyio nere sokoro bw’Abaamoni goika rero iga." 
Genesis20:1 Erio Ibrahimu akaimoka korwa agwo, akagenda gochia ense ya Negebu, akamenya buna omomenyi aria Gerari, egati ya Kadeshi na Suri." 
Genesis20:2 Ibrahimu agakwana igoro ya Sara mokaye, “Oyo mosubati ominto.” Abimeleki, omoruoti o Gerari agatoma abanto kwoyia Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Korende Nyasae akaorokera Abimeleki botuko ase okorota, akamotebia, “Aye goika okwe, ekiagera omokungu oyo kwarentire nomokungu bw’omonto onde.”" 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleki konya taraba nere, akabora, “Aye Omonene, Inee, nigo oraite nonya nabanto abanyene oboronge?" 
Genesis20:5 Inee! Omonto oyio tantebetie ere omonyene ng’a oyo mosubati omwabo? Na omokungu nere agantebia ng’a oyo momura omwabo? Ase enkoro etari na komocha, na ase amaboko amarabu nakorire ayio.”" 
Genesis20:6 Erio Nyasae akamotebia ase okorota, “Inche namanyire ng’a ase enkoro etari na komocha gwakorire aya, na inche nkagotanga tigwankorera ebibe. Ase ayio, tinakoa ribaga omokune." 
Genesis20:7 Bono moiranerie omonto oria mokaye, ekiagera ere nomobani, nagosabere onyare koba moyo. Korende otamoiranereti, manya amaene, goika okwe, aye amo na abanto bao bonsi ore nabarabwo.”" 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleki akaimoka mambia chuni akarangeria abasomba baye bonsi, akabatebia amang’ana aya onsi, na abanto abwo bakaondoka mono." 
Genesis20:9 Erio Abimeleki akarangeria Ibrahimu, akamoboria, “Inki eke gwatokoreire iga? Inki nakomocheire goika kwarentire igoro yane na igoro y’oboruoti bwane ebibe ebinene buna ebi? Gwankoreire amang’ana atagwenerete gokorwa.”" 
Genesis20:10 Naende Abimeleki akaboria Ibrahimu, “Inki kwarengereretie goika ogakora ring’ana eri?”" 
Genesis20:11 Ibrahimu akamoiraneria, “Nabo nakorete igo, ekiagera naroche ng’a abamoirogete Nyasae tibari aase aa, na barabwo nigo barang’ite ase engencho ya mokane." 
Genesis20:12 Ere amaene nomoiseke ominto, tata noyomo, korende ng’ina nomoao, na inche nkamonyuoma." 
Genesis20:13 Ekero Nyasae andusetie korwa ase omochie o tata kogenda gochia aaria na aaria ngatebia mokane: Aya naro amaya orankorere: kera aase toragende otebe igoro yane ng’a inche momura omino.” 
Genesis20:14 Erio Abimeleki akaimokia ching’ondi ne chiombe, amo nabasomba, abamura na abaiseke, akaa Ibrahimu, akamoiraneria na Sara mokaye." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleki akamotebia, “Rora, ense yane nigo ere ase obosio bwao; menya aande onsi ase oranche komenya.”" 
Genesis20:16 Ere agatebia Sara, “Rora naeire momura omino chisekeli chie chifeta elifu eyemo, chibe entorobi yao ase amaiso ’abanto bonsi abare amo naye, erio omanyekane ng’a nomonto omoronge ore.”" 
Genesis20:17 Erio Ibrahimu agasaba Nyasae; na Nyasae akagwenia Abimeleki amo na mokaye, na abasomba baye abakungu, na barabwo bakaibora abana." 
Genesis20:18 Naki Omonene konya ogombairie chinda chi’abanto bonsi b’enka y’Abimeleki, tibaibora, ase engencho ya Sara moka Ibrahimu." 
Genesis21:1 Erio Omonene akarigereria Sara, akamokorera buya buna konya amoriereire eira." 
Genesis21:2 Sara akaba morito, akaiborera Ibrahimu omwana omoisia ase obogotu bwaye, ase engaki eria Nyasae amotebetie." 
Genesis21:3 Omwana oyio Sara aiborerete Ibrahimu, Ibrahimu akamoroka Isaka." 
Genesis21:4 Ekero Isaka akoorire amatuko atano na atato, Ibrahimu akamosara, buna Nyasae konya amochikire." 
Genesis21:5 Ibrahimu nigo arenge nemiaka rigana erimo ekero Isaka, omwana oye, aiboretwe." 
Genesis21:6 Sara akabora, “Nyasae onkoreire amaseko, na onde bwensi orayaigwe nansegisie.”" 
Genesis21:7 Naende agateba, “Ning’o nanga ore komotebia Ibrahimu ng’a Sara nagonkie abana? Na bono namoiboreire omwana ase obogotu bwaye.”" 
Genesis21:8 Omwana oria agakina, agatiga okogonka. Ase rituko riria Isaka atigete kogonka, Ibrahimu agakora omoyega omonene." 
Genesis21:9 Korende Sara akarora omwana oria bwa Hagari Omomisiri, oyio aiborerete Ibrahimu, ogosekereria Isaka, omwana oye." 
Genesis21:10 Ase ayio agatebia Ibrahimu. “Moserie omokungu oyo omosomba amo nomwana oye, ekiagera omwana bw’omokungu oyo omosomba takoria omwando amo nomwana one Isaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Ring’ana erio tiriamogwenera Ibrahimu nonya ng’ake, ase engencho y’omwana oye." 
Genesis21:12 Korende Nyasae agatebia Ibrahimu, “Ring’ana eri tiriba riibe asore, ase engencho y’omwana oyo, na ase engencho y’omokungu oyo, omosomba oo. Rinde roinsi Sara akogotebia riigwere, ekiagera korwa ase Isaka ororeria rwao narwatorwe." 
Genesis21:13 Nere omwana bw’omokungu oyo omosomba nimokore abe egesaku ekenene, ekiagera nere oyio nomwana oo.”" 
Genesis21:14 Erio Ibrahimu akaimoka mambia chuni, akaimokia omogati na ebirandi bikorire korwa ase amasankwa, bire namache, akabia Hagari, akamobibekera mareko. Akamorentera na omwana, akamotebia agende nere. Akagenda, akana‐koong’anya ase erooro ya Beeri‐Seba." 
Genesis21:15 Ekero amache aria arenge ebirandi ime aerire, akaareria omwana inse y’egetutu." 
Genesis21:16 Erio akagenda, agaikaransa are ake, ase oboare bw’okoruta omogwe, ekiagera nigo atebete, “Tinkorora omwana one kagokwa.” Ekero aikaransete amorigereretie, agaaka eriogi riaye, akarera." 
Genesis21:17 Nyasae akaigwa okorera kw’omwana, na omomalaika o Nyasae akarangeria Hagari korwa igoro, akamotebia, “Hagari, inki okorera? Tibwoboa, ekiagera Nyasae oigure okorera kw’omwana agwo ase araire." 
Genesis21:18 Imoka, oimokie omwana, omobwate koboko kwao; naki nimokore abe egesaku ekenene.”" 
Genesis21:19 Erio Nyasae akaramokia Hagari amaiso, na ere akarora ensoko y’amache, akagenda, akabuucha, agaichoria ekerandi amache, akaa omwana akanywa." 
Genesis21:20 Nyasae akaba amo nomwana oria. Ere akamenya ase erooro, akaba omomanyi bw’okorasa nemegwe." 
Genesis21:21 Akamenya ase erooro ya Parani, na ng’ina akamonyuomeria omokungu korwa ase ense ya Misiri." 
Genesis21:22 Ase engaki eyio Abimeleki na Pikoli, omochiki omonene bw’abarwani baye, bagatebia Ibrahimu, “Nyasae nigo are amo naye ase ande onsi ogokora." 
Genesis21:23 Ase ayio, bono ndiere eira na gotiana ase Nyasae ng’a togonkorera obong’ainereria inche, na abana baane, na abachokoro baane, korende koreng’ana buna inche nagokorerete aye, obuya obo obo naye onkorere inche, amo nense eye ore omomenyi ime yaye.”" 
Genesis21:24 Ibrahimu agateba, “Ee, ninkoriere eira.”" 
Genesis21:25 Ibrahimu akamororera Abimeleki bobe ase engencho y’ensoko eria abasomba b’Abimeleki bamourete. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki akamotebia, “Inche timanyeti ning’o okorete ring’ana erio, gose tikwana gontebia; nonya nokoigwa, tinana koyaigwa otatiga rero rioka.”" 
Genesis21:27 Erio Ibrahimu akaimokia ching’ondi ne chiombe, akaa Abimeleki, na barabwo babere bagakora okobwatana." 
Genesis21:28 Ibrahimu agaatanana chimanwa chisigiti isano na ibere, agachibeka ensemo." 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki akaboria Ibrahimu, “Chimanwa echi chisigiti isano na ibere gwatanana, engencho yaye inki?”" 
Genesis21:30 Ibrahimu akamoiraneria, “Chimanwa echi chisigiti isano na ibere nigo nagochieire korwa ase okoboko kwane, erinde chibe kirori asende, ng’a ensoko eye ninche nayeremete.”" 
Genesis21:31 Ase ayio bakaroka aaee agwo Beeri‐Seba, ekiagera barabwo babere bariereranete emuma aroro." 
Genesis21:32 Ekero bakorire okobwatana aria Beeri‐Seba, Abimeleki na Pikoli, oria omochiki omonene bw’abarwani baye, bakaimoka korwa agwo, bakairana ase ense y’Abafilisti." 
Genesis21:33 Ibrahimu agasimeka omote onga buna ekerachuoki aria Beeri‐Seba, na agwo akarangeria erieta ri’Omonene Nyasae o kare na kare ase okomosasima." 
Genesis21:34 Ibrahimu akamenya buna omomenyi ase ense y’Abafilisti amatuko amange. 
Genesis22:1 Ekaba nyuma y’amang’ana ayio, Nyasae akabekera Ibrahimu ogoteemwa. Akamorangeria, “Ibrahimu!” Na Ibrahimu akamoitabera. “Nao inde aa.”" 
Genesis22:2 Nyasae akamotebia, “Moire Isaka, omwana oyo oo omomoima, oyobwanchete, ogende nere goika ense ya Moria. Agwo omorue abe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase egetunwa ekemo ki’ebio ndakworokie.”" 
Genesis22:3 Ibrahimu akaimoka mambia chuni, akabeka ebinto ase etigere yaye, akairana abamura babere amo nere, na Isaka omwana oye. Agaatia chinko agochia gosambera ekeng’wanso, akaimoka, akagenda gochia aase aria atebetigwe na Nyasae." 
Genesis22:4 Rituko ria gatato Ibrahimu akaimokia amaiso aye, akarora aase aria akare are." 
Genesis22:5 Erio Ibrahimu agatebia abamura abarenge komo, “Ikaransa inwe aiga amo netigere! Inche amo nomwana oyo one nkogenda tore gochia aria, tosasime, erio toirane asemore naende.”" 
Genesis22:6 Ibrahimu akaimokia chinko echi arenge gochia gosambera ekeng’wanso, agatweka Isaka omwana oye, na ere omonyene akaimokia omorero na omoyio. Bakagenda amo bonsi babere." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka agakwana na Ibrahimu ise, agateba, “Tata!” Ise akamoitabera, “Nao inde aa, omwana one.” Isaka akamoboria, “Rora, omorero ne chinko ntobwate, korende ng’ai emanwa y’engondi ere togochia gokorera ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa?”" 
Genesis22:8 Ibrahimu akamoiraneria, “Omwana one, Nyasae nenyorere emanwa y’eng’ondi ase ekeng’wanso eke.” Erio bakagenderera amo bonsi babere." 
Genesis22:9 Kobaikire aase aria atebetigwe na Nyasae, Ibrahimu akaagacha egesasimero agwo, akaara chinko igoro yaye, agasiba Isaka omwana oye, akamwareria igoro ye chinko chiria." 
Genesis22:10 Erio Ibrahimu akarambora okoboko kwaye, akabogoria omoyio anyenye omwana oye." 
Genesis22:11 Korende omomalaika bw’Omonene akamorangeria korwa igoro, akabora, “Ibrahimu, Ibrahimu!” Ere akamoitabera, “Nao inde aa.”"
