Genesis22:12 Omomalaika oria akamotebia, “Toramborera omwana okoboko kwao, gose tomokorera ing’ana rinde rionsi. Bono namanyire ng’a nomoirogete Nyasae, naende narorire ng’a tondineti omwana oo omomoima.”" 
Genesis22:13 Ibrahimu akaimokia amaiso aye, akarora magega aye eng’ondi emingichi ebwatire chingunchara ase orosana nemerande. Ibrahimu akagenda, akarusia eng’ondi eyio, akayerua, ekaba ekeng’wanso ase ribaga ri’omwana oye." 
Genesis22:14 Ibrahimu akaroka aase aria Yahwe‐Yire; buna abanto bagokwana goika rero iga, “Ase egetunwa ki’Omonene nao ekonyorekana.”" 
Genesis22:15 Omomalaika bw’Omonene akarangeria Ibrahimu korwa igoro eria kabere, akamotebia," 
Genesis22:16 “Omonene otebire: Netianirie inche omonyene, ekiagera gwakorire ring’ana eri, gose tondineti omwana oo omomoima." 
Genesis22:17 Ase ogosesenia ningosesenie, na ase okomenta nimente ororeria rwao, robe oronge buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro na buna omokenye ore engegu y’enyancha, na ororeria rwao inarobue emechie y’ababisa babo," 
Genesis22:18 na ase ororeria rwao ebisaku bionsi bi’ense inabisesenigwe, ekiagera kwanyigwereire.”" 
Genesis22:19 Erio Ibrahimu akairana gochia ase abamura baria barenge komo; bonsi bakaimoka, bakagenda amo gochia Beeri‐Seba; na Ibrahimu akaba okomenya agwo Beeri‐Seba." 
Genesis22:20 Nyuma y’amang’ana ayio kaerire Ibrahimu agatebigwa ng’a, “Milka oiboreire momura omino Nahori abana." 
Genesis22:21 Abana abwo nabwo aba: Usi, omwana oye omotangi, na Busi omwabo, na Kemueli, ise Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 na Kesedi, na Haso, na Pilidasi, na Yidilafu, na Betueli.”" 
Genesis22:23 Betueli nere omoiborete omoiseke ore korokwa Rebeka. Abwo batano na batato nabwo Milka aiborerete Nahori, momura omwabo Ibrahimu." 
Genesis22:24 Naende omokungu oye o sere‐sere, ore korokwa Reuma, akamoiborera Teba, na Gahamu, na Tahasi, na Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara nigo akoorete emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na etano na ebere (127); eye nero emiaka y’obogima bwa Sara." 
Genesis23:2 Sara agakwera ase Kiriati‐Ariba, agwo nao Heburoni, ase ense ya Kanani. Ibrahimu akaba okomoreera Sara na kweumia ase engencho yaye." 
Genesis23:3 Ibrahimu akaimoka korwa ase egetondo kiaye, agatebia Abahiti," 
Genesis23:4 “Inche nomomenyi inde, imenyete ase egati yaino; komoranche mong’e aase ntindeke omokungu one onkwereire, imorusie ase obosio bwane.”" 
Genesis23:5 Abahiti bakairaneria Ibrahimu, bakamotebia," 
Genesis23:6 “Omonene, totegerere! Aye nigo ore omonto omonene o Nyasae ase egati yaito. Tindeka omokungu oo ase embeera ende yonsi engiya orachore. Onde tari ase egati yaito orakorine embeera yaye gose agotange totindeka omokungu oo.”" 
Genesis23:7 Ibrahimu akaimoka, agatung’ama inse ase amasio ’Abahiti, abanto b’ense eria." 
Genesis23:8 Ere agakwana nabarabwo, akabora, “Komoranche mong’e ribaga ntindeke omokungu one, imorusie ase obosio bwane, monyigwe na monsabere ase Efuroni, omwana o Sohari," 
Genesis23:9 ang’e rikuruma riaye, erio rire agwo Makipela, ase ensinyo y’oboremo bwaye. Ase rigori riikeranu tiga ang’ere ase amasio aino, togoranereo, ribe aase aane ndabe ngotindeka abakure.”" 
Genesis23:10 Bono Efuroni nigo arenge oikaransete agwo ase egati y’Abahiti. Ere Efuroni, Omohiti, akairaneria Ibrahimu ekero Abahiti bonsi, abaare goetera egeita ki’omochie oye, bamotegererete," 
Genesis23:11 agateba, “Yaya, omonene one, ntegerera. Oboremo boria nakoeire amo ne rikuruma riria rire imeo, ase amaiso ’abanto baminto nakobieire; otindeke mokao aroro.”" 
Genesis23:12 Erio Ibrahimu agatung’ama inse ase amasio ’abanto b’ense eria. 
Genesis23:13 Agatebia Efuroni ekero abanto b’ense eria bamotegererete, “Koranche, ntegerera! Inche nindue rigori ri’oboremo; naye obogorie chifeta korwa asende, na inche nintindeke mokane aroro.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni akairaneria Ibrahimu," 
Genesis23:15 akamotebia, “Omonene one, ntegerera! Oboremo obwo bwe rigori rie chisekeli chi’efeta amagana ane, ngento ki toengereranie inche naye? Tindeka mokao agwo.”" 
Genesis23:16 Ibrahimu bagaancherana na Efuroni; na Ibrahimu akarengera Efuroni chifeta chiria atebete Abahiti kobaigwete, chisekeli chie chifeta amagana ane, koreng’ana nekerengo giancheranire nabaonchoreria." 
Genesis23:17 Oboremo bw’Efuroni obwo bware agwo Makipela moocha ya Mamure, oboremo amo ne rikuruma riria riare imeo na emete yonsi yarengeo, ensemo eria yonsi Ibrahimu akayeegwa." 
Genesis23:18 Igo ayeetwe ase amasio ’Abahiti, abwo bonsi baare gosoera egeita kiaye." 
Genesis23:19 Nyuma y’ayio Ibrahimu agatindeka Sara mokaye ase rikuruma ri’oboremo bware agwo Makipela, moocha ya Mamure, agwo nao Heburoni, ase ense ya Kanani." 
Genesis23:20 Nabo oboremo boria, ne rikuruma riria riare imeo, Ibrahimu akabinyora korwa ase Abahiti bibe aase aye agotindeka abakure." 
Genesis24:1 Bono Ibrahimu konya obeire omogotu, akoorire emiaka emenge; na Omonene konya omosesenirie ase amang’ana onsi." 
Genesis24:2 Ibrahimu akarangeria omosomba oye oyorenge konya omokoreire ase emiaka emenge mono, na orendete enibo yaye yonsi, akamotebia, “Beka okoboko kwao inse y’ekebono kiane," 
Genesis24:3 na inche ninkoborie otiane ase Omonene Nyasae o igoro na ense, ng’a tokorigeria omwana one omokungu korwa ase abaiseke b’Abakanani, aba imenyete ase egati yabo." 
Genesis24:4 Korende ogende ase ense yane na ase eamate yane, orentere omwana one Isaka omokungu korwa aroro.”" 
Genesis24:5 Omosomba oria akamoiraneria, “Aande, omokungu oria atancheraneti gocha amo nainche goika ase ense eye; Inee, nigo ndaire omwana oo goika ase ense eria kwarwete?”" 
Genesis24:6 Ibrahimu akamoiraneria, “Bwerende, tobaisa koira omwana one aroro." 
Genesis24:7 Omonene, Nyasae o igoro na ense, oyondusetie o tata korwa ase ense eria naiboreretwe, ere nigo akwanete nainche na gotiana, ogoteba: Ning’ee ororeria rwao ense eye, ere natome omomalaika oye agotang’ane; aye norentere omwana one omokungu korwa aroro." 
Genesis24:8 Na omokungu oria atancheti moche komo, rirorio nosiborwe korwa ase eira eye okoria asende, korende tobaisa koira omwana one gochia aroro.”" 
Genesis24:9 Erio omosomba oria akabeka okoboko kwaye inse y’ekebono kia Ibrahimu, omonene oye, akerama ase ring’ana erio." 
Genesis24:10 Erio omosomba oria akarusia chingamia ikomi chi’omonene oye, akaimokia na ebiegwa ebinge ebiya; akaimoka, akagenda gochia Mesopotamia, agaika omochie oria Nahori amenyete." 
Genesis24:11 Agwo agatimokeria chingamia isiko y’omochie ang’e nensoko y’amache engaki ya mogoroba, ekero abakungu bagocha kobuucha amache." 
Genesis24:12 Ere agasaba, agateba, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’omonene one Ibrahimu, nagosabire, onsesenie ase amang’ana aane a rero, okorere omonene one Ibrahimu obuya." 
Genesis24:13 Rora, ninteneine aiga ase ensoko y’amache, na abaiseke b’omochie oyo ngocha bare kobuucha amache." 
Genesis24:14 Tiga ebe iga; Kondaborie oyomo obo: Koranche obeke enyongo yao inse, inche inywe amache, na ere karang’iranerie: Ee, kanywe aye, na nimbuuchere chingamia chiao nachirochio; otige oyio abe nere gwachoreire omosomba oo Isaka, na inche erio nimanye ng’a gwakoreire omonene one obuya.”" 
Genesis24:15 Ritang’ani atarakoora ogosaba kwaye, akarora Rebeka ogocha obogoretie enyongo yaye mareko. Ere nomoiseke o Betueli, na Betueli nomwana o Milka, moka Nahori, momura omwabo Ibrahimu." 
Genesis24:16 Na omoiseke oria nigo arenge omonyakieni, naende nomwekungi, otaraba na mosacha onde. Agatirimboka gochia ase ensoko, agaichoria enyongo yaye amache, agatiira." 
Genesis24:17 Erio omosomba oria akaminyoka bwango gochia komorotota, akamosaba, “Koranche, ong’e amache inywe.”" 
Genesis24:18 Ere akamoiraneria akamotebia, “Kanywe, omonene one!” Agatoora enyongo yaye bwango, akayebeka koboko kwaye, akamoa, na ere akanywa." 
Genesis24:19 Gakoorire komoa amache, akabora, “Ne chingamia chiao boigo ninchibuuchere, na chirochio chinywe.”" 
Genesis24:20 Akaayerera, akaumora amache aria arenge ase enyongo ase orotuba ime, akaminyoka bwango ase ensoko naende, agachibuuchera chingamia chiaye chionsi." 
Genesis24:21 Erio omonto oria akamobeta amaiso, akaba okirete kiri, erinde amanye gose Omonene osesesenirie orogendo rwaye, gose taibo." 
Genesis24:22 Ekero chingamia chiakoorire konywa amache, omonto oria akamoruseria ekegera gi’etahabu, kiare noborito bwe chigiramu isano na isato, na ebitange bibere bie chitahabu ase amaboko aye, ebiare noborito bwe chigiramu rigana erimo, na emerongo etano," 
Genesis24:23 akamoboria, “Nomoiseke o ng’o ore? Naende ontebie gose ribaga ndire mwa iso toranyare korara botuko.”" 
Genesis24:24 Ere akamoiraneria, “Inche nomoiseke o Betueli, oyo Milka aiborerete Nahori.”" 
Genesis24:25 Naende akamotebia, “Seito obonyansi mboreo, na aase tokorisia aisaine, na enyomba y’abageni bakorara nereo.”" 
Genesis24:26 Erio omonto oria agatung’ama inse, agasasima Omonene," 
Genesis24:27 agateba, “Omonene, Nyasae bw’omonene one Ibrahimu, atogigwe! Ere tatigeti koorokia omonene one obuya na obwegenwa. Omonene ondaaire enchera, naikire enka y’abamwabo omonene one.”" 
Genesis24:28 Erio omoiseke oria akaminyoka, agaika inka sobo, agatebia abanto ba nyomba mwa ng’ina amang’ana ayio." 
Genesis24:29 Rebeka nabwate momura omwabo ore korokwa Labani. Ekero Labani aroche ekegera na ebitange ase amaboko ’omoiseke omwabo, na kaigure amang’ana omonto oria atebetie Rebeka, agasoka, akaminyoka gochia ase ensoko ase omonto oria arenge, akamorora oteneine ase chingamia chiaye," 
Genesis24:30  
Genesis24:31 akamotebia, “Inchuo, aye osesenirie n’Omonene! Naki oteneine isiko aa? Inche nakoroiseirie enyomba ase ogochia korara, na aase e chingamia chiao.”" 
Genesis24:32 Erio omonto oria agasoa nyomba, na Labani agasiborera chingamia chigurube chiabo, agachia obonyansi, na chirochio chikaria. Naende akarentera omonto oria amache, akarentera na abwo barenge komo, bagesibia amagoro." 
Genesis24:33 Erio akarenterwa na endagera, korende agateba, “Tinkoria goika ndateba amang’ana aane.” Labani akairaneria, “Gaki, yakwane!”" 
Genesis24:34 Erio agateba, “Inche nomosomba o Ibrahimu." 
Genesis24:35 Omonene Nyasae osesenirie omonene one mono, na ere obeire omotenenku. Omoeire amaicho e ching’ondi, na aye chiombe, chifeta ne chitahabu, na abasomba, abamura na abaiseke, chingamia ne chitigere." 
Genesis24:36 Na Sara, moka omonene one, akamoiborera omwana omomura ekero abeire omogotu; na omonene one oeire omwana oyio bionsi ebiabwate." 
Genesis24:37 Omonene one akamboria ntiane, agantebia: Torigeria omwana one omokungu korwa ase abaiseke b’Abakanani, aba imenyete ase ense yabo;" 
Genesis24:38 Korende ogende ase omochie o tata, ase eamate yane, orentere omwana one omokungu korwa aroro." 
Genesis24:39 Na inche ngatebia omonene one: Aande omokungu oria atancheraneti gocha amo nainche. 
Genesis24:40 Korende agantebia: Omonene oyo ngendererete ase obosio bwaye, natome omomalaika oye amo naye, asesenie orogendo rwao. Naye orentere omwana one omokungu korwa ase eamate yane, korwa ase omochie o tata;" 
Genesis24:41 erio nosiborwe korwa ase eira eyio nakoboririe otiane. Ekero oraike ase eamate yane, onye tibagokoa omoiseke oyio, aye rirorio nobe gwasiboirwe korwa ase ogotiana kwao." 
Genesis24:42 “Inche nacha rero ase ensoko, nasaba iga: Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’omonene one Ibrahimu, koranche onsesenie bono ase orogendo rwane nkogenda." 
Genesis24:43 Rora ninteneine aiga ase ensoko y’amache. Tiga ebe iga: Omoiseke onde omo orache kobuucha amache, na inche imosabe oyio: Koranche ong’e amache make korwa ase enyongo yao inywe." 
Genesis24:44 Onye ere okong’iraneria: Ee, kanywe, na nimbuuchere chingamia chiao nachirochio; otige oyio abe nere omokungu Omonene achoreire omwana bw’omonene one." 
Genesis24:45 “Ritang’ani ntarakoora ogosaba ase omoyo one, narora Rebeka ogocha obegete enyongo yaye mareko, ogotirimboka gochia ase ensoko kobuucha amache, na inche namosaba: Koranche, ong’e amache inywe." 
Genesis24:46 Ere orusia enyongo yaye bwango korwa ase amareko aye, oyebeka inse, ontebia: Kanywe, ne chingamia chiao ninchinyoisie boigo. Erio ong’a, nanywa, oa ne chingamia, nachirochio chianywa." 
Genesis24:47 Erio namoboria: Nomoiseke o ng’o ore? Ere ong’iraneria: Inche nomoiseke o Betueli oyo Milka aiborerete Nahori. Agwo namobekera ekegera chimioro chiaye, na ebitange ase amaboko aye." 
Genesis24:48 Erio natung’ama inse nasasima Omonene. Naende namotogia Omonene, Nyasae bw’omonene one Ibrahimu, oyontang’anete ase enchera endonge, erinde imorentere omwana bw’omonene one omokungu korwa ase eamate yaye." 
Genesis24:49 Bono rende, onye morigetie gokorera omonene one amaya, na ayare boronge, montebie; onye taibo, montebie, ngende ensemo ende eng’ao korigia.”" 
Genesis24:50 Erio Labani na Betueli bakamoiraneria, bakamotebia, “Amang’ana aya nigo arure ase Omonene; intwe titokonyara gokwana ande, amabe gose amaya." 
Genesis24:51 Rora, Rebeka oyio ore ase obosio bwao, moire, mogende komo, achie koba omokungu bw’omwana bw’omonene oo, buna Omonene konya atebire.”" 
Genesis24:52 Ekero omosomba o Ibrahimu aigwete amang’ana abo, agatung’ama inse ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Genesis24:53 Erio omosomba oria akarusia ebinto bi’ogwechabera bie chitahabu, na ebie chifeta, amo ne chianga, akaa Rebeka. Naende akaa momura omwabo amo na ng’ina ebiegwa bie rigori rinene." 
Genesis24:54 Ere na abanto baria barenge komo bakaria na bakanywa, erio bakarara aroro. Mambia kobwachia gokia akabatebia, “Ing’a ribaga ng’irane ase omonene one.”" 
Genesis24:55 Momura omwabo Rebeka na ng’ina bakamotebia, “Tiga omoiseke oyo arabeere aiga koreng’ana amatuko ikomi; nyuma y’ayio mogende komo.”" 
Genesis24:56 Ere akabatebia, “Timobaisa gontebania, ekiagera Omonene onsesenirie ase orogendo rwane; ing’a ribaga ngende ase omonene one.”" 
Genesis24:57 Bakamotebia, “Tiga torangerie omoiseke, tomoborie, toigwe buna agoteba.”" 
Genesis24:58 Bakarangeria Rebeka, bakamoboria, “Inee! Inabwanche ogende nomonto oyo?” Akairaneria, “Ee, nanchire, ngende nere.”" 
Genesis24:59 Erio bakaa Rebeka ribaga amo nomoreri oye bagende nomosomba o Ibrahimu na abanto baye. 
Genesis24:60 Bagasesenia Rebeka, bakamotebia, “Oyominto, obe ng’ina abanto chilifu ne chilifu; ororeria rwao inarobue emechie y’ababisa bao, royegambere!”" 
Genesis24:61 Erio Rebeka akaimoka amo nabaiseke baye abasomba, bakariina chingamia, bagatunyana omonto oria. Naboigo omosomba oria akaira Rebeka, akagenda nere sobo." 
Genesis24:62 Bono Isaka konya orure ase ensoko ya Beeri‐Lahai‐Roi, ekiagera nigo amenyete ase ense ya Negebu." 
Genesis24:63 Isaka nigo agendete mogondo ekero kia mogoroba, akaba ore nebirengererio. Agwo akaimokia amaiso aye, akarora chingamia chigocha." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka nere akaimokia amaiso aye, akarora Isaka; erio agaika bwango korwa ase engamia igoro," 
Genesis24:65 akaboria omosomba oria, “Monto ki oria ogotaara ase omogondo, ogocha koumerana naintwe?” Omosomba oria akamoiraneria, “Oria nere omonene one.” Erio omoiseke oria akabwata egietubo kiaye, agetuba." 
Genesis24:66 Na omosomba oria agatebia Isaka amang’ana onsi, buna akorete." 
Genesis24:67 Isaka agasoyia Rebeka ase eema ya ng’ina ime, akaba omonyuomire, naende akaba omwanchete. Ase igo Isaka akaremigwa korwa ase omoichano bw’ogokwa kwa ng’ina." 
Genesis25:1 Ibrahimu akanyuoma omokungu onde, ore korokwa Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Nere akamoiborera Simurani, na Yokisani, na Medani, na Midiani, na Isibaki, na Sua." 
Genesis25:3 Yokisani akaibora Seba na Dedani. Na basinto ba Dedani nabwo aba: Ashuri, na Letusi, na Leumi." 
Genesis25:4 Basinto ba Midiani nabwo aba: Efa, na Eferi, na Hanoki, na Abida, na Elidaa. Abwo bonsi nabwo barenge abana ba Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Ibrahimu akaa Isaka ebinto bionsi ebi abwate. 
Genesis25:6 Korende abana b’abakungu baria ba sere‐sere Ibrahimu akabaa ebiegwa. Ekero are moyo, konya atarakwa, akabatebia barue ase omwana oye Isaka, bagende gochia moocha, ase ense ya Moocha." 
Genesis25:7 Ibrahimu nigo akoorete emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etano na ebere, na etano (175), ase obogima bwaye." 
Genesis25:8 Nigo akwete ase obogotu obuya, ore omogaaka, oisanekire nemiaka emenge; agasangerekana amo nabanto baye." 
Genesis25:9 Isaka na Isumaeli bakamotindeka ase rikuruma agwo Makipela ase oboremo bwa Efuroni, omwana o Sohari, Omohiti, moocha ya Mamure," 
Genesis25:10 ase oboremo boria Ibrahimu agorete korwa ase Abahiti. Agwo nao Ibrahimu atindegetwe ase Sara mokaye nere atindegetwe. 
Genesis25:11 Nyuma y’ogokwa kwa Ibrahimu, Nyasae agasesenia Isaka, omwana oye. Na Isaka akamenya ang’e nensoko yare korokwa Beeri‐Lahai‐Roi." 
Genesis25:12 Oro narwo ororeria rwa Isumaeli, omwana o Ibrahimu, oyo Hagari, omosomba o Sara, amoiborerete." 
Genesis25:13 Aya naro amarieta ’abana ba Isumaeli, ase omoroberio bw’okoiborwa kwabo: Nebayoti, nere omwana oye omotangi, na Kedari, na Adibeeli, na Mibusamu," 
Genesis25:14 na Misima, na Duma, na Masa," 
Genesis25:15 na Hadadi, na Tema, na Yeturi, na Nafisi, na Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Aba nabwo abana ba Isumaeli, na aya naro amarieta abo ase emechie yabo na ebitwori biabo, na barabwo nigo barenge abagambi ikomi na babere, ase ebisaku biabo." 
Genesis25:17 Isumaeli nigo akoorete emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na etano na ebere (137), erio agakwa; agasangererekana amo nabanto baye." 
Genesis25:18 Abana ba Isumaeli nigo bamenyete bagachakera Havila, bagaika Suri moocha ya Misiri, ase enchera ekogenda Asuri; bakamenya bosio bw’abamwabo bonsi." 
Genesis25:19 Oro narwo ororeria rwa Isaka, mosinto o Ibrahimu. Ibrahimu nere oiborete Isaka." 
Genesis25:20 Isaka nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ene ekero anyuomete Rebeka, omoiseke o Betueli, Omoaramu o Padan‐Aramu, omoiseke omwabo Labani, Omoaramu." 
Genesis25:21 Isaka agasabera mokaye ase Omonene, ekiagera nigo arenge omogomba. Omonene akaigwa ogosaba kwaye, na Rebeka mokaye akaba morito." 
Genesis25:22 Abana bakaba bakomigana enda yaye ime. Ere akabora, “Onye nabo iga, okoba moyo kwane ninki korangwenere?” Akagenda koboria Omonene." 
Genesis25:23 Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ebisaku bibere mbire enda yao ime, abanto babere orache koibora, na barabwo mbaatananekane korwa okoiborwa kwabo; oyomo nabe ne chinguru kobua oria onde, oria omonene nakorere oria omoke.”" 
Genesis25:24 Ekero amatuko aye ay’okoibora achia goikerana, bakanyora ne chibarongo chiare enda yaye ime." 
Genesis25:25 Oyo bwe ritang’ani agasoka, ere nigo arenge omobariri, omobere bwonsi nigo orenge namarionya; bakamoroka Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Nyuma yaye oyomwabo agasoka, okoboko kwaye kobwatete egetingiro gia Esau na ere bakamoroka Yakobo. Isaka nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etano nomo, ekero mokaye abaiborete." 
Genesis25:27 Ekero abana abwo bakinire, Esau akaba omotwari bwe ching’iti, korende Yakobo nigo arenge omonto omotoereru, ore kobeera ase chiema." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka nigo amwanchete Esau, ekiagera arenge komorentera chinyama chi’obotwari bwaye; korende Rebeka nigo amwanchete Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Rituko erimo Yakobo naiyegete omosori gete. Esau agacha korwa orosana, konya orosire mono, ogoyire ase engencho y’enchara." 
Genesis25:30 Na Esau agasaba Yakobo, “Koranche, ong’e endagera eyio embariri indie, ekiagera nanyarekire.” Ase ayio bakamoroka Edomu (engencho yaye, omobariri)." 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Ritang’ani ng’ooneria omwando oo bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esau agateba, “Rora, inche nigo inde ang’e gokwa, omwando oyo bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi inki orankonye?”" 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo akamotebia, “Karatiana ritang’ani asende,” Esau agatiana, erio akaooneria Yakobo omwando oye bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi." 
Genesis25:34 Erio Yakobo akaa Esau omogati na omosori bwe ching’ende, na ere akaria na konywa; erio akaimoka akagenda. Naboigo Esau achayete omwando oye bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi." 
Genesis26:1 Bono enchara yachete ase ense eria, enchara ende eng’ao, tari eria yachete ritang’ani ase engaki ya Ibrahimu. Erio Isaka agachiera Abimeleki, omoruoti bw’Abafilisti, aria Gerari." 
Genesis26:2 Na Omonene akaorokera Isaka, akamotebia, “Totirimboka gochia Misiri, korende omenye ase ense eye ndagotebie." 
Genesis26:3 Obe buna omomenyi ase ense eye, na inche nimbe amo naye, ningosesenie; naki ninkoe aye na ororeria rwao chinse echi chionsi, na ning’ikeranie eira yane eyio natianete ase Ibrahimu iso." 
Genesis26:4 Nimente ororeria rwao robe oronge buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro; ne chinse echi chionsi ninchiee ororeria rwao; na ase ororeria rwao ebisaku bionsi bi’ense inabisesenigwe," 
Genesis26:5 ekiagera Ibrahimu naigwerete amang’ana aane, akabwata aya nachigete, na amachiko aane, na aya narigete, amo nogotebereria kwane.”" 
Genesis26:6 Ase igo Isaka akamenya Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Ekero abanto b’aase aria bamoboretie amang’ana igoro ya mokaye, akabatebia, “Oyo mosubati ominto.” Naki nigo oboete goteba ng’a ere mokaye, akarengeria ng’a abanto b’aase aria mbabaise komoita ase engencho ya Rebeka, ekiagera ere arenge omonyakieni." 
Genesis26:8 Ekero konya bamenyire aria engaki entambe, Abimeleki, omoruoti bw’Abafilisti, akarigereria korwa ase ekebao, akarora Isaka bakogosoria na Rebeka mokaye." 
Genesis26:9 Erio Abimeleki akarangeria Isaka, akamoboria, “Amaene, oyo mokao? Naki gwakora ogateba ng’a oyo mosubati omino?” Isaka akamoiraneria, “Nigo narengereretie ng’a, aande nimbaise goitwa ase engencho yaye.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki akamoboria, “Inki eke gwatokoreire iga? Aande monto onde oito arenge gochia arare na mokao, na aye anga nigo gwatobeka ase okomocha.”" 
Genesis26:11 Ase ayio Abimeleki agatianera abanto bonsi, akabatebia, “Monto onde bwensi aise gokuna omonto oyo ore aa, gose mokaye, goika aitwe.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isaka agasimeka endagera ase ense eria, akagesa ase omwaka oyio ara rigana, na Omonene akamosesenia." 
Genesis26:13 Omonto oyio akaba ne chinguru, akagenderera komenteka gokina, goika akaba nokobua okonene." 
Genesis26:14 Nigo abete nenibo y’amaicho e ching’ondi ne chiombe, na abasomba abange. Ase igo Abafilisti bakamororera ribero." 
Genesis26:15 (Ne chinsoko chiria chionsi abasomba ba Ibrahimu ise Isaka baremete, Abafilisti konya bachitichire namaroba.)" 
Genesis26:16 Erio Abimeleki agatebia Isaka, “Karue asetore, ekiagera aye kwabeire ne chinguru chinyinge gotobua.”" 
Genesis26:17 Ase igo Isaka akang’anya korwa aroro, agatoora ase ense eraire ya Gerari, akamenya aroro." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka akarubora chinsoko chiria naende, echio chiaremetwe ase engaki ya Ibrahimu ise, ekiagera Abafilisti konya bachitichire nyuma Ibrahimu gakure. Isaka agachiroka buna ise achirogete ritang’ani." 
Genesis26:19 Abasomba ba Isaka bakarema agwo ase ense eraire, bakanyora entuboka y’amache." 
Genesis26:20 Abarisia b’ensemo ya Gerari bakaba bakwomana nabarisia ba Isaka, bagoteba, “Amache aya nayaito.” Ase igo Isaka akaroka entuboka eria Eseki, ekiagera bamwomaneretie aroro." 
Genesis26:21 Naende bakarema, bakanyora entuboka ende, nero bakayiomanera. Ase igo akayeroka Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Akaimoka korwa agwo, akagenda akarema akanyora entuboka ende; eyio ero tibayiomanera. Ase ayio akayeroka Reoboti, akabora, “Naki bono Omonene otoeire ense engare, na toragenderere komenteka ase ense eye.”" 
Genesis26:23 Isaka akarua aroro, agatiira gochia Beeri‐Seba." 
Genesis26:24 Ase obotuko obwo obwo Omonene akamoorokera, akamotebia, “Inche ninche Nyasae o Ibrahimu iso, tibwoboa, ekiagera nigo inde amo naye, ningosesenie aye amo nororeria rwao, ase engencho y’omosomba one Ibrahimu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Na Isaka akaagacha egesasimero aroro, akarangeria erieta ri’Omonene, agatenenia chiema chiaye aroro. Na agwo abasomba baye bakarema, bakanyora entuboka." 
Genesis26:26 Erio Abimeleki akarua Gerari, amo n’Ahusati, omosemia oye ase obogambi, na Pikoli, oria omochiki omonene bw’abarwani baye, bagachiera Isaka." 
Genesis26:27 Na Isaka akababoria, “Inki mwacha korigia aa bwone? Nainwe nigo mongechete, naende mwanseretie korwa seino.”" 
Genesis26:28 Bakamoiraneria, “Amaene, twarorire maiso marore ng’a Omonene nigo are amo naye. Na nigo torengereretie ng’a totiananie na tokore okobwatana naye ng’a," 
Genesis26:29 bono togotokorera bobe bonde, buna intwe totagokunete, gose totagokorerete bobe, otatiga amaya oka; tokagotiga okagenda bwoo nomorembe. Naye bono nomosesenigwa bw’Omonene.”" 
Genesis26:30 Erio Isaka akabakorera omoyega, bakaria na bakanywa." 
Genesis26:31 Bakaimoka mambia chuni, bagatianania barabwo ase barabwo; na Isaka akabakooba, na barabwo bakarua asare, bakagenda nomorembe." 
Genesis26:32 Ase rituko riria riria abasomba ba Isaka bagacha, bakamorentera amang’ana igoro y’entuboka eria banyorete, bakamotebia, “Twanyorire amache.”" 
Genesis26:33 Ere akayeroka Seba; na ase engencho eyio omochie oyio nigo okorokwa Beeri‐Seba goika rero iga. 
Genesis26:34 Ekero Esau abeire nemiaka emerongo ene akanyuoma Yuditi, omoiseke o Beeri, Omohiti, na Basemati, omoiseke o Eloni, nere n’Omohiti." 
Genesis26:35 Barabwo babere bagakora obogima bwa Isaka na Rebeka koba nobororo obonge. 
Genesis27:1 Ekero Isaka konya abeire omogotu, na amaiso aye konya abeire orotutu, atari korora buya, akarangeria Esau, omwana oye omotangi, akamotebia, “Omwana one!” Ere akamoitabera, “Nao inde aa”" 
Genesis27:2 Akamotebia, “Rora bono inche nagotire, gose timanyeti engaki y’ogokwa kwane." 
Genesis27:3 Bono bogoria ebitwarero biao, nabio egochi yao ere ne chinsara amo nobota bwao, ogende borabu otware ching’iti, ondetere chinyama." 
Genesis27:4 Erio ondoiserie endagera engiya, eria nyanchete, oyendetere indie, erinde ngosesenie konde moyo, ntarakwa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Bono Rebeka nigo arenge otegererete ekero Isaka are gokwana nomwana oye Esau. Ase igo, ekero Esau agendete borabu gotwara ching’iti amorentere ise," 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka agatebia Yakobo, omwana oye, “Naigure iso ogotebia momura omino Esau:" 
Genesis27:7 Ndetere chinyama chia borabu, ondoiserie endagera engiya indie, erio inyare kogosesenia ase obosio bw’Omonene, konde moyo, ntarakwa." 
Genesis27:8 Ase igo, omwana one, ntegerera bono aya nkogotebia." 
Genesis27:9 Genda getii ase riicho, ondetere chimanwa chie chimbori ibere chingiya, na inche nimoroiserie iso endagera engiya, eria anchete." 
Genesis27:10 Erio oirere iso arie, erinde anyare kogosesenia ritang’ani atarakwa.”" 
Genesis27:11 Korende Yakobo agatebia Rebeka ng’ina, “Noroche Esau ominto nomonto obwate amarionya ase omobere oye, korende inche omobere one nomoterere." 
Genesis27:12 Aande, tata nigo arantaba‐tabe, na inche imbe ase amaiso aye buna omong’ainereria, inyerentere okoragererigwa ribaga ri’ogosesenigwa.”" 
Genesis27:13 Ng’ina akamotebia, “Okoragererigwa kwao tiga kobe igoro yane; igwa aya nkogotebia rioka, genda ondetere chimanwa echio chie chimbori.”" 
Genesis27:14 Erio agwo akagenda, agachirentera ng’ina, na ere akaroisia endagera engiya, eria ise anchete." 
Genesis27:15 Erio Rebeka akabogoria eanga eria engiya mono ya Esau, omwana oye omotangi; eye nigo yagachire nyomba mwaye, akayebekera Yakobo, omwana oye omoke." 
Genesis27:16 Na amasankwa aria e chimanwa chie chimbori akamoboyia ase amaboko aye ne rigoti. 
Genesis27:17 Erio akabeka ase amaboko ’omwana oye Yakobo endagera eria engiya aroisetie, amo nomogati." 
Genesis27:18 Yakobo akagenda ase ise, akamotebia, “Tata!” Nere agaitaba, “Nao inde aa. Naye ng’o, mwana one?”" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo akairaneria ise, “Ninche Esau, omwana oo omotangi. Nakorire buna gwantebetie; boka, oikaranse orie enyama y’obotwari bwane, erio onsesenie.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaka akamoboria, “Omwana one, naki gwakora kwanyora ching’iti iga bwango?” Akamoiraneria, “Omonene, Nyasae oo, nere ochindetera.”" 
Genesis27:21 Erio Isaka agatebia Yakobo, “Inchuo aiga ang’e asende, ngotabatabe, erinde imanye gose naye omwana one Esau, gose tari aye.”" 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo akagenda akamoika ise ang’e, na ere akamotaba‐taba, akabora, “Eriogi rirorio neria Yakobo, korende amaboko naya Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Na ise tamomanya, ekiagera amaboko aye nigo arenge namarionya buna aya Esau omwabo. Ase igo akamosesenia." 
Genesis27:24 Akamoboria, “Amaene, naye omwana one Esau?” Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Ee, ninche.”" 
Genesis27:25 Naende Isaka akamotebia, “Yendetere aiga ang’e, omwana one, indie enyama y’obotwari bwao, erio ngosesenie.” Ase igo akamoyeirera na ere akaria, akamoa na edivai, akanywa." 
Genesis27:26 Isaka ise akamotebia, “Omwana one, inchuo aiga ang’e asende, onyunyunte.”" 
Genesis27:27 Erio akamoika ang’e, akamonyunyunta. Isaka agatiokerera rimisu rie chianga chiaye, akamosesenia, akabora, “Naama! Rimisu ri’omwana one nigo rigotioka buna rimisu ri’omogondo omuya, osesenirie n’Omonene!" 
Genesis27:28 Nyasae akoe ebie riime rikorwa igoro na obonoru bwe riroba, ne rigesa riao ribe eringe, na edivai boigo." 
Genesis27:29 Abanto bagokorere, na ebisaku bigotung’amere. Obe omonene ase abamino, abana ba nyoko bagotung’amere; oyorakoragererie, nere naragererigwe, na oyoragosesenie, nere nasesenigwe!”" 
Genesis27:30 Ekero Isaka akoorire gosesenia Yakobo, na Yakobo karure ase obosio bwa Isaka ise, Esau omwabo agacha korwa ase obotwari bwaye." 
Genesis27:31 Nere boigo akaroisia endagera engiya, akarentera ise, akamotebia, “Tata, inchuo orie endagera y’obotwari bwane, inche omwana oo, erinde onsesenie.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isaka ise akamoboria, “Naye ng’o?” Ere akamoiraneria, “Ninche Esau omwana oo omotangi.”" 
Genesis27:33 Erio Isaka agakumia mono na koiguswa, akabora, “Ning’o oria ocha ondetera endagera engiya, na inche naria yonsi ekero otaracha, namosesenia?—Ee, nere nabe osesenirie.”" 
Genesis27:34 Ekero Esau achia koigwa amang’ana a ise, akarera ekerero ekenene mono ki’obororo, akamotebia, “Nsesenie nainche boigo, tata!”" 
Genesis27:35 Korende Isaka akamoiraneria, “Oyomino nigo achicha nobong’ainereria, na ere oirire ogosesenigwa kwao.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau akabora, “Inee! Tari korokwa Yakobo ase oboronge? Naki eye nengaki ya kabere ang’ainereirie. Ritang’ani akaira omwando one bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi, naende bono oirire ogosesenigwa kwane.” Naende akamoboria, “Tontigereti inche gosesenigwa konde?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka akamoiraneria, “Rora, namokorire abe omonene oo, na abamwabo bonsi babe abasomba baye, naende namoeire endagera y’omogondo na edivai. Inki rende ndanyare kogokorera aye, omwana one?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau akaboria ise, “Ogosesenia nokomo gwoka kwabwate, tata? Nsesenia inche nainche boigo, tata ominto.” Esau agaaka eriogi, akarera nobororo." 
Genesis27:39 Erio Isaka ise akamoiraneria, akamotebia, “Rora, obomenyo bwao inabobe aare korwa ase obonoru bwe riroba, na aare korwa ase riime rikorwa igoro." 
Genesis27:40 Omoro oo bw’esegi nogere obe moyo, aye nomokorere oyomino; korende engaki neche orekong’ie, nobune rikorogoto erio akobekeire ase rigoti riao.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau akagecha Yakobo ase engencho y’ogosesenigwa okwo ise amosesenetie, agateba ase omoyo oye ime, “Amatuko ay’okomoreera tata ng’ang’e are; erio nario ndaite Yakobo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Korende ekero Rebeka atebigwa aya Esau, omwana oye omonene, agoteba, agatoma omonto korangeria Yakobo, omwana oye omoke, akamotebia, “Rora, momura omino Esau ogotianeire ng’a agoite." 
Genesis27:43 Na bono, omwana one, igwa amang’ana aane, imoka otame gochia o Labani, momura ominto aaria Harani." 
Genesis27:44 Omenye aroro ase engaki enke, goika ekeririanda kia momura omino gekende." 
Genesis27:45 Ekero endamwamu yaye erakee, na ere ebire aya kwamokorerete, erio nintome abanto bache gokorangeria oirane korwa aroro. Nase ki ndakwerwe nainwe mwensi babere ase rituko erimo.”" 
Genesis27:46 Erio Rebeka agakwana na Isaka, akamotebia, “Nigo ngechirie mono ase obogima bwane ase engencho y’abaiseke b’Abahiti. Onye Yakobo ogochia konyuoma oyomo bw’abaiseke b’Abahiti, koreng’ana buna aba bamenyete ase ensemo eye, rirorio obogima bwane, inki borangwenere?”" 
Genesis28:1 Erio Isaka akarangeria Yakobo, akamosesenia, akamotebia, “Tobaisa konyuoma omoiseke bw’Abakanani." 
Genesis28:2 Imoka, ogende Padan‐Aramu ase omochie o Betueli, sokoro yao, onyuome omokungu oyomo korwa ase abaiseke ba Labani, nyoko rome." 
Genesis28:3 Na Nyasae Omobui nagosesenie, agokinie, na oroiboro rwao naromente robe omoganda omonene bw’ebisaku." 
Genesis28:4 Ere nakoe ogosesenigwa kwa Ibrahimu, aye amo nororeria rwao, erinde onyare koira ense eye ore omomenyi bono, eye Nyasae aete Ibrahimu!”" 
Genesis28:5 Naboigo Isaka agatebia Yakobo agende, na ere akagenda Padan‐Aramu ase Labani, mosinto o Betueli Omoaramu, Labani nere momura omwabo Rebeka, ng’ina Yakobo na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Bono Esau akarora buna Isaka asesenirie Yakobo na komotoma agende Padan‐Aramu anyuome omokungu korwa aroro, ekiagera ekero amosesenetie, akamokania tabaisa konyuoma moiseke onde bwensi bw’Abakanani!" 
Genesis28:7 Naende akarora ng’a Yakobo oigwereire ise na ng’ina ogendire Padan‐Aramu. 
Genesis28:8 Ase igo ekero Esau aroche ng’a Isaka ise tancheti abaiseke b’Abakanani," 
Genesis28:9 akagenda o Isumaeli, akanyuoma Mahalati, omoiseke o Isumaeli mosinto o Ibrahimu, mosubati omwabo Nebayoti, abe omokungu oye amo nabakungu baria bande abwate ritang’ani." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo akaimoka korwa Beeri‐Seba kogenda Harani. 
Genesis28:11 Agaika aase gete, akarara agwo botuko, ekiagera erioba konya riagure. Akabogoria rigena erimo ri’aase aria, akarara, agatoorera omotwe oye ase rigena riria." 
Genesis28:12 Akarota, akarora ekeriinero getenenirie korwa inse riroba, keigete igoro, na abamalaika ba Nyasae bagokeriinera na goikera." 
Genesis28:13 Akarora Omonene oteneine ase obosio bwaye, okobora, “Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na Nyasae o Isaka. Ense eye oraire ninkoyee aye amo noroiboro rwao;" 
Genesis28:14 narororwo inarobe oronge buna orotu rw’ense, naye norande gochia ensemo ya bosongo, na moocha, na sugusu, na irianyi; na asore aye, na ase ororeria rwao, chiamate chionsi chi’ense inachisesenigwe." 
Genesis28:15 Rora, inche nimbe amo naye, ninkorende aande onsi orabe gokogenda, naende ninkoiranie gocha ase ense eye; naki tinkogotiga goika nagokoreire ayio nagotebirie.”" 
Genesis28:16 Yakobo akaboka korwa ase chitoro chiaye, akabora, “Amaene, Omonene nao are aase aa, na inche tinamanyete.”" 
Genesis28:17 Ere akoboa, akabora, “Aa naase okoirokia! Aa takomocha koba enyomba ya Nyasae, aa nao egeita kia igoro.”" 
Genesis28:18 Yakobo akaboka mambia chuni, akaimokia rigena riria atoorerete omotwe oye, akaritenenia buna esiiro koba ekeinyorio, akaumora amaguta igoro yaye." 
Genesis28:19 Aase aria akaaroka Beteli. Korende ritang’ani omochie oria nigo ore korokwa Lusu. 
Genesis28:20 Erio Yakobo akaria eira, okobora, “Nyasae karabe amo nainche, andende ase orogendo rwane na kong’a endagera nkoria, ne chianga nkobeka," 
Genesis28:21 na inche kondairane ase omochie o tata nomorembe, erio Omonene nabe Nyasae one;" 
Genesis28:22 ne rigena eri natenenia aa buna esiiro nigo rirabe enyomba yao, Nyasae. Na kende gionsi orang’e inche, amaene tinkomocha gokoa ensemo ya ikomi.”" 
Genesis29:1 Erio Yakobo akabwatia orogendo rwaye, agaika ense y’abanto ba moocha." 
Genesis29:2 Agwo akarora ensoko yare aase aarabu, na amaicho atato e ching’ondi araire ensoko ensemo, ekiagera ase ensoko eyio nao amaicho are konywera amache. Na ndiarengeo rigena rinene igoro y’omonwa bw’ensoko." 
Genesis29:3 Agwo nao amaicho onsi arenge gosangererekana, na abarisia nigo baare korusia rigena riria korwa ase omonwa bw’ensoko banyoisia ching’ondi, naende bariirania ase omonwa bw’ensoko." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo akababoria, “Baminto, ng’ai seino?” Bakamoiraneria, “Seito naiga Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Naende akababoria, “Inee! Momanyete Labani, mochokoro o Nahori?” Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Ee, ntomomanyete.”" 
Genesis29:6 Naende akababoria, “Mbuya are?” Bakamoiraneria, “Ee, mbuya are; na rigereria, Raeli, omoiseke oye oyio ogocha ne ching’ondi!”" 
Genesis29:7 Akabatebia, “Rigereria, bono mobaso, chinsa chi’ogosangereria amaicho tichiraika, nyoisia ching’ondi, naende mochiire gochirisia.”" 
Genesis29:8 Korende barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Titokonyara gokora bo goika ekero amaicho onsi arache asangererekane amo, erinde abarisia bamanye gotigeria rigena korwa ase omonwa bw’ensoko; erio tomanye konyoisia ching’ondi.”" 
Genesis29:9 Ekero arenge ogendererete gokwana nabarabwo, Raeli agacha obwate ching’ondi chia ise, naki nere orenge gochirisia." 
Genesis29:10 Bono ekero Yakobo achia korora Raeli, omoiseke o Labani, ng’ina rome, okorenta riicho ria Labani, akaimoka, agatigeria rigena riria korwa ase omonwa bw’ensoko, akanyoisia ching’ondi chia Labani, ng’ina rome." 
Genesis29:11 Erio Yakobo akanyunyunta Raeli, akarera na koiyeria amariga." 
Genesis29:12 Agatebia Raeli, “Inche nomoigwa o iso inde, omwana o Rebeka.” Raeli akaminyoka, agatebia ise amang’ana ayio." 
Genesis29:13 Ekero Labani achia koigwa amang’ana a Yakobo, omoigwa oye, akaminyoka gochia komorotota, akamoboania na komonyunyunta, akamoira nka bwoye. Yakobo agatebia Labani amang’ana onsi." 
Genesis29:14 Erio Labani akamotebia, “Amaene, aye namanyinga ’omobere one.” Ere akamenya bwoye ase engaki y’omotienyi oyomo." 
Genesis29:15 Erio Labani agakwana na Yakobo, akamotebia, “Nonya kore omoigwa one, tegwenereti onkorere bosa. Ntebia eng’eria yao ninki ndakoe!”" 
Genesis29:16 Bono Labani nigo abwate abaiseke babere; omoiseke oria omonene nigo are korokwa Lea, na oria omoke Raeli." 
Genesis29:17 Lea amaiso aye nigo arenge amatu, korende Raeli nigo arenge omonyakieni, naende omwasioku." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo konya omwanchire Raeli, na ase ayio agatebia Labani, “Ningokorere emiaka etano na ebere, erinde ong’e Raeli, omoiseke oo omoke.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani akamoiraneria, “Ayio mbuya. Tiga nkomoe aye kobua nkomoa omonto onde; menya aa bwone.”" 
Genesis29:20 Ase igo Yakobo akamokorera emiaka etano na ebere aegwe Raeli. Emiaka eyio ekarorekana asare buna namatuko amake oka, ekiagera amwanchete mono." 
Genesis29:21 Erio Yakobo agatebia Labani, “Bono naikeranirie engaki yane, ing’a mokane, torare komo.”" 
Genesis29:22 Ase igo Labani akarangeria abanto bonsi b’ensemo eria, agakora omoyega." 
Genesis29:23 Rigachia koba mogoroba akaimokia Lea, omoiseke oye, akamorentera Yakobo, na barabwo babere bakaba bakorara amo." 
Genesis29:24 Ase ekero ekio Labani akarua omosomba oye omoiseke okorokwa Silpa, abe ogokorera Lea, omwana oye." 
Genesis29:25 Bogachia gokia mambia, Yakobo akanyora ng’a Lea aetwe. Erio akaboria Labani, “Inki eke gwankorerete? Tinagokorerete, erinde ong’e Raeli? Naki gwakorete okang’aina?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labani akamoiraneria, “Aiga seito intwe titori gokora bo, gosokia omoiseke omoke, na gotiga omonene." 
Genesis29:27 Tiga omoyega bw’amatuko aya atano na abere oraera bw’oyio omonene, erio noegwe na oria omoke, naende aye onkorere emiaka etano na ebere ende.”" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo agancha bo, agaikerania amatuko ayio atano na abere. Erio Labani akamomoa Raeli, omoiseke oye, abe mokaye." 
Genesis29:29 Labani akamoa Raeli, omwana oye, omokoreri, nere Bilia, omosomba oye omoiseke." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo akaba na Raeli; agancha Raeli mono kobua Lea. Erio Yakobo agakorera Labani emiaka etano na ebere ende. 
Genesis29:31 Ekero Omonene aroche ng’a Lea tanchiri, akaigora enda yaye, korende Raeli akagombaa." 
Genesis29:32 Lea akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Reuben, naki nigo atebete, “Omonene nigo aroche buna nchayire. Bono omosacha one nanyanche.”" 
Genesis29:33 Naende Lea akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, akabora, “Omonene ororire ng’a tinyanchiri, ong’eire noyo nere omoisia boigo,” akamoroka Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Naende akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, akabora, “Bono engaki eye omosacha one nabwatane amo nainche, ekiagera namoiboreire abana abaisia batato.” Ase ayio akamoroka Lawi." 
Genesis29:35 Akaba morito naende, akaibora omwana omoisia, akabora, “Engaki eye nintogie Omonene.” Ase ayio akamoroka Yuda. Erio agatenena koibora." 
Genesis30:1 Ekero Raeli aroche ng’a tari koiborera Yakobo abana, akarorera mosubati omwabo ribero, agatebia Yakobo, “Ing’a abana! Otabang’eti, rirorio nigo ndakwe!”" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo akabea Raeli mono, akamoboria, “Inee! Ninche inde ribaga ria Nyasae, oyogotangete tikwanyora abana?”" 
Genesis30:3 Erio akamoiraneria, “Nimbwate omosomba one omoiseke, Bilia. Motware, erinde inyore abana korwa asare, barokwe abana baane, na goetera asare na inche inyore oroiboro.”" 
Genesis30:4 Naboigo Yakobo akaegwa Bilia, omosomba omoiseke o Raeli, abe mokaye, na Yakobo akaba nere." 
Genesis30:5 Bilia akaba morito, akaiborera Yakobo omwana omoisia." 
Genesis30:6 Erio Raeli akabora, “Nyasae ong’eire oboronge bwane, amaene, oigure ekerero kiane, ong’eire omwana omoisia.” Ase ayio akamoroka Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Bilia, omosomba o Raeli, akaba morito naende, akaiborera Yakobo omwana omoisia o kabere." 
Genesis30:8 Raeli akabora, “Ase okoamererania okonene nabeire nkoamererania na mosubati ominto, nabuire.” Ase igo akamoroka Nafutali." 
Genesis30:9 Ekero Lea achia korora ng’a otenenire koibora, akaimokia Silpa, omosomba oye omoiseke, akamomoa Yakobo, abe mokaye." 
Genesis30:10 Erio Silpa, omosomba omoiseke o Lea, akaiborera Yakobo omwana omoisia." 
Genesis30:11 Lea akabora, “Ninde negesio.” Akamoroka Gadi." 
Genesis30:12 Silpa, omosomba o Lea, akaiborera Yakobo omwana omoisia o kabere." 
Genesis30:13 Lea akabora, “Inche ninde nomogoko omonene, naki abakungu nabandoke Oyore nomogoko.” Ase igo akamoroka Aseri." 
Genesis30:14 Ase engaki ye rigesa ri’engano Reuben akagenda akanyora amasooni ng’ombe getii, akayatwa, akayarentera Lea ng’ina." 
Genesis30:15 Erio Raeli agasaba Lea amwatanere amasooni ng’ombe ay’omwana oye, korende Lea akamoiraneria, “Inee! Nering’ana rike kwang’urire omosacha one, na bono korigetie koira amasooni ng’ombe ay’omwana one boigo?” Raeli akamoiraneria, “Rero nache arare naye, korang’e amasooni ng’ombe ay’omwana oo.”" 
Genesis30:16 Ekero Yakobo arenge koirana korwa mogondo mogoroba, Lea akagenda komorotota, akamotebia, “Rero goika orare mwane, nakogorire namasooni ng’ombe ay’omwana one.” Ase obotuko obwo akarara nere." 
Genesis30:17 Nyasae akaigwa Lea, na ere akaba morito, akaiborera Yakobo omwana omoisia o gatano." 
Genesis30:18 Lea akabora, “Nyasae ong’eire eng’eria yane, ekiagera naete omosacha one omosomba one omoiseke.” Ase igo akaroka omwana oria Isakaru." 
Genesis30:19 Lea akaba morito naende, akaiborera Yakobo omwana omoisia o gatano na rimo." 
Genesis30:20 Erio Lea akabora, “Nyasae ong’eire ekeegwa ekiya; bono omosacha one nansike, ekiagera namoiboreire abana abaisia batano nomo.” Ase igo akamoroka Sabuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Nyuma yaye akaibora omwana omoiseke, akamoroka Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Korende Nyasae akaba okoinyora Raeli, akaigwa ogosaba kwaye, akaigora enda yaye;" 
Genesis30:23 ere akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, akabora, “Nyasae onduseirie ogochaywa kwane.”" 
Genesis30:24 Akaroka omwana oria Yusufu, akabora, “Omonene karanche amentere omwana onde omoisia.”" 
Genesis30:25 Ekero Raeli aiboire Yusufu, Yakobo agatebia Labani, “Ing’a ribaga ngende seito, ase ense yane." 
Genesis30:26 Ing’a abakungu baane na abana baane, aba nabeire nkogokorera, ontige ngende seito; naki nomanyete obokoreri nabeire nkogokorera.”" 
Genesis30:27 Labani akamoiraneria, “Nigo nganetie ogwancherwa korwa asore, nigo namanyire boronge ng’a Omonene onsesenirie mono ase engencho yao." 
Genesis30:28 Bono ntebia eng’eria yao oganetie, na inche ninkoyee.”" 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Aye omonyene nomanyete buna nabeire nkogokorera, na amaicho ao buna abeire ase oborendi bwane." 
Genesis30:30 Naki enibo yao nigo yarenge enke ritang’ani ekero ntaracha aa, korende bono yamentekanire mono. Omonene ogosesenirie aande onsi nabeire nkogenda. Korende bono indi ndabe nkoroisia amang’ana a bwone inche omonyene?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labani akamoboria, “Ninki ndakoe rende?” Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Tinganeti ong’e kende. Oise gonkorera ring’ana eri ndagotebie rioka, rirorio naende ningenderere korisia amaicho ao, na koyarenda." 
Genesis30:32 Tiga ng’ete rero ase amaicho ao onsi, ndusie korwao kera eng’ondi emechege na egesembe, na emanwa y’eng’ondiemwamu, na kera embori nyankororo na nyankanga. Echio nachio chirabe eng’eria yane." 
Genesis30:33 Ase amatuko arache ekero orachiche korora eng’eria yane, oboronge bwane nabombere kirori. Kera embori etari nyankanga gose nyankororo, na kera emanwa y’engondi etari emwamu, onye ekonyorekana asende, oyebare ng’a eyio nigo eibire.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani agancha amang’ana ayio, agateba, “Tiga abe buna gwatebire.”" 
Genesis30:35 Ase rituko erio erio Labani akarusia chigoree chimarera ne chinkororo, ne chimbori chiaberi, echiare chinkanga ne chinkororo, na kera eyare nebimoa ebirabu ase omobere oye, na kera eng’ondi eyare emwamu. Echio chionsi agachiaa abana baye abamura bachirende." 
Genesis30:36 Erio ageatanana korwa ase Yakobo oboare bw’orogendo rw’amatuko atato; na Yakobo agatigerwa okorisia riicho ria Labani eriatigarete. 
Genesis30:37 Yakobo agatwa ebite ebibese bi’emete gete enga buna omosobeti, na omolozi, na omouru, akabisata chinsemo, erinde emeng’ororia emerabu ekarorekana ase ebite biria." 
Genesis30:38 Erio akabeka ebite biria ase chintuba chi’amache ase amaicho are gocha konywera. Na ekiagera ching’iti chiria chiare koa chinkungu amarieme, ekero chigocha konywa amache," 
Genesis30:39 chirochio chikanyora amarieme bosio bw’ebite ebio, chikabiara chimanwa chire chimarera, ne chinkanga, ne chinkororo." 
Genesis30:40 Na Yakobo agaatanana ching’ondi chimingichi, ne ching’ondi chinkungu agachisang’anania ne chimingichi chie riicho ria Labani echiarenge namagwari, na echiare chimwamu. Naboigo akenyorera amaicho aye ere omonyene, ayio atabegete amo naya Labani." 
Genesis30:41 Kero kende gionsi chimbori gose ching’ondi echiare ne chinguru gochiaganirie amarieme, Yakobo nigo are kobeka ebite biria bosio bwe ching’iti ase chintuba chiria chinyare konyora amarieme gochikorigereria ebite ebio." 
Genesis30:42 Korende echiare chinyoro tare gochibekera ebite ebio. Ase igo echiare chinyoro nigo chiare koba echia Labani, na echiare ne chinguru chiba echia Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Naboigo Yakobo akaba okomenteka koba omotenenku, akaba namaicho amange, na abasomba, abaiseke na abamura, ne chingamia, ne chitigere." 
Genesis31:1 Bono Yakobo akaigwa aya basinto ba Labani bagoteba ng’a, “Yakobo oirire enibo yonsi ya tata; na ase enibo ya tata onyorire obotenenku obwo bwonsi abwate.”" 
Genesis31:2 Yakobo akarora ng’a Labani oonchokire, tari komorigereria buya buna botambe." 
Genesis31:3 Erio Omonene agakwana na Yakobo, akamotebia, “Irana gochia ase ense ye chisokoro chiao, ase eamate yao, na inche nimbe amo naye.”" 
Genesis31:4 Ase igo Yakobo agatoma abanto barangerie Raeli na Lea bagende getii ase are korisia amaicho aye. 
Genesis31:5 Agwo akabatebia, “Narorire ng’a iso tari kondigereria buya rero buna botambe. Korende Nyasae o tata obeire ore amo nainche." 
Genesis31:6 Inwe momanyete ng’a nabeire ngokorera iso ne chinguru chiane chionsi; 
Genesis31:7 nonya nabo, iso obeire okong’ainereria, na koonchora eng’eria yane ara ikomi, korende Nyasae tamoete ribaga gonkorera bobe." 
Genesis31:8 Ekero atebete: Echire nebisembe chibe eng’eria yao, amaicho onsi akabiara echire nebisembe, na ekero atebete: Echire namagwari chibe eng’eria yao, amaicho onsi akabiara echire namagwari." 
Genesis31:9 Naboigo Nyasae akarusia etugo ya iso, akang’a inche." 
Genesis31:10 “Ase engaki eria amaicho gachiire rieme nkarigereria, nkarora ase chindoto ng’a chigoree echiaete amaicho amarieme nigo chiare namagwari na ebisembe, ne chimechege." 
Genesis31:11 Erio omomalaika bw’Omonene akandangeria ase chindoto: Yakobo! Inche ngaitaba: Nao inde aa! 
Genesis31:12 Agantebia: Imokia amaiso ao, origererie orore, ng’a chigoree echiaete amaicho amarieme nigo chiare namagwari, na ebisembe, ne chimechege, naki narorire onsi aya Labani abeire okogokorera." 
Genesis31:13 Inche ninche Nyasae oria kwaroche aria Beteli, aria ase kwaumorerete rigena amaguta rikaba esiiro y’ekeinyorio, na okandiera eira. Bono imoka korwa ase ense eye, oirane gochia ase ense eria kwaiboreretwe.”" 
Genesis31:14 Erio Raeli na Lea bakamoiraneria, “Inee! Ntwatigaretie egetari gose omwando ase omochie o tata?" 
Genesis31:15 Tatokorete buna abamenyi? Naki nigo atoonetie, naende akaria enibo eria yonsi." 
Genesis31:16 Naki enibo eyio yonsi Nyasae arusirie korwa ase tata nigo etotungetie intwe na abana baito. Ase igo ayio onsi Nyasae agotebirie, yakore.”" 
Genesis31:17 Erio Yakobo akaimoka, akariinia abana baye na abakungu baye ase chingamia igoro;" 
Genesis31:18 akaira amaicho aye onsi, na enibo yaye yonsi eyio anyorete ase Padan‐Aramu, akagenda ase ense ya Kanani o Isaka ise." 
Genesis31:19 Ekero Labani konya achiire konacha ching’ondi chiaye amarionya, Raeli akaiba ebinyasae biaye bi’ogosasimwa, ebiarenge nyomba mwaye." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo nigo agendete bobisi korwa o Labani Omoaramu, tamotebetie ng’a nkogenda are sobo." 
Genesis31:21 Agatama amo nenibo yaye yonsi eye abwate, akaamboka orooche roria Eufarati, akagenda gochia ebitunwa bia Gileadi." 
Genesis31:22 Ase rituko ria gatato Labani agatebigwa ng’a Yakobo otamire. 
Genesis31:23 Erio Labani akaira abamwabo, bakamobwatia orogendo rw’amatuko atano na abere, akamoikeera ase ebitunwa bia Gileadi." 
Genesis31:24 Korende Nyasae agachera Labani Omoaramu ase chindoto botuko, akamotebia, “Bwerende, tobaisa kwomania Yakobo, korende okwane nere ase obwororo.”" 
Genesis31:25 Ekero Labani aikeereire Yakobo ang’e, Yakobo nere konya otenenirie eema yaye agwo ase ebitunwa bia Gileadi. Labani nere amo nabamwabo bagatenenia chiema chiabo agwo." 
Genesis31:26 Labani akaboria Yakobo, “Inki eke gwakorire iga, okweiberia na koira abana baane abasubati buna abasakorwa korwa ase esegi?" 
Genesis31:27 Nase ki gwatamete okeiberia, tigwantebia? Inche anga nagokoobete nomochengo na amatera, na kobugia chikonu na amakano." 
Genesis31:28 Naki otantigerete ribaga inyunyunte abachokoro baane na abana baane abasubati, mbatebie ng’a bagende buya? Amaene, nigo gwankorerete egento ki’oboriri." 
Genesis31:29 Ninde nokobua gw’okogokorera amabe, korende Nyasae o iso nakwanete nainche ase obotuko bwaetete, agantebia: Bwerende, tobaisa kwomania Yakobo, korende okwane nere ase obwororo." 
Genesis31:30 Na bono gwachiire, ekiagera ore namaiga amange ay’aba inka seino, korende naki gwakorete okaiba ebinyasae biane?”" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo akamoiraneria, akamotebia, “Nigo nobcete, nkarengereria ng’a nobaise kong’ura abana bao abasubati." 
Genesis31:32 Onde bwensi oranyore obwate ebinyasae biao goika aitwe akwe. Tiga abaminto aba bare aa babe kirori. Rigia! Koranyore kende kiao kere asende, okeire.” Yakobo tamanyete ng’a Raeli obiibire." 
Genesis31:33 Erio Labani agasoa eema ya Yakobo, na eya Lea, na ey’abakungu baria babere abasomba, tanyora kende. Agasoka korwa ase eema ya Lea, agasoa eya Raeli." 
Genesis31:34 Korende Raeli konya obisire ebinyasae ebio ase egeikaransero kiaye igoro y’engamia, akaba obiikaranserete. Labani akariga‐rigia eema ime, tabinyora." 
Genesis31:35 Raeli agatebia ise, “Tata, onyabere, tobaisa kombea, naki tinkonyara koimoka ase obosio bwao, ekiagera nimbwate engencho yaito intwe abakungu.” Nabo akariga‐rigia, tabinyora." 
Genesis31:36 Erio Yakobo akabea mono, akomania Labani ase okomotogonyera na goteba, “Nkomocha ki nakorire? Nebibe biane nakorire mbiribi, goika kwambwatirie nobororo engencho enga buna eye?" 
Genesis31:37 Kwariga‐rigirie ase ebinto bionsi. Ngento ki kiao kwanyorao narentanire? Kebeke aiga ase obosio bw’abaminto na obw’abamino, batwatanane inche naye." 
Genesis31:38 Bono inche namenyire bwoo emiaka emerongo ebere. Ching’ondi chiao gose chimbori, ekero chiabwate amarieme, ende terekereti; gose inche tinyenyeti chimingichi chinde chie riicho riao, na gochiria." 
Genesis31:39 Echiaitetwe ne chinyang’au tingochirentereti, ninche omonyene nachiakanete. Echiaibetwe mobaso gose botuko ogachinsaba korwa ase amaboko aane." 
Genesis31:40 Eye nero yarenge engencho yane: Riberera ri’omobaso boira rikaba rigonsamba, na obokendu boganchanda botuko, ne chitoro chikaera korwa ase amaiso aane." 
Genesis31:41 Emiaka eye emeronge ebere imenyete bwoo, nabeire nkogokorera emiaka ikomi na ene ase okonyora abaiseke bao babere, na emiaka etano nomo ase okonyora amaicho ao, na aye kwabeire gokoonchora eng’eria yane ara ikomi." 
Genesis31:42 Onye Nyasae o tata, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, Nyasae oyio Isaka airogete atarenge amo nainche, amaene, nanga nigo gwanseria bono inde namaboko amasa. Emechando na emeremo yane Nyasae oyerorire, ase igo ere nagotogonyerete obotuko bwaetete.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani akairaneria Yakobo, akamotebia, “Abasubati aba nabana baane, na abana babo nabarabwo nabana baane, na amaicho aya, naro nayane, na bionsi ebio oroche nebiane. Bono ninki ndanyare gokorera abana baane na abana babo baiboire?" 
Genesis31:44 Inchuo bono, tokore okobwatana, aye nainche, na korokwo inakobe kirori egati yao nainche.”" 
Genesis31:45 Erio Yakobo akaimokia rigena, akaritenenia ribe esiiro y’ekeinyorio." 
Genesis31:46 Yakobo agatebia abamwabo, “Sangereria amagena”, na barabwo bakayasangereria, bakayakora etui, bakariera endagera ase etui eyio." 
Genesis31:47 Labani akayeroka Yegari‐Sahaduta, korende Yakobo akayeroka Galeedi." 
Genesis31:48 Labani akabora, “Etui eye nero kirori egati yane naye rero iga.” Ase ayio akayeroka Galeedi." 
Genesis31:49 Naende ekarokwa Misipa, naki nigo atebete, “Omonene nere orabe ogotorigereria aye nainche, ekero torabe totarochaini." 
Genesis31:50 Korabe gokobachanda abana baane abasubati, gose gokonyuoma abakungu bande abaao goetania barabwo, manya ng’a nonya monto onde taiyo oyaroche, rora, Nyasae nere kirori egati yao nainche.”" 
Genesis31:51 Erio Labani agatebia Yakobo, “Rigereria etui eye na esiiro eye, natenenirie egati yao nainche." 
Genesis31:52 Etui eye ebe kirori, na esiiro eye ebe kirori boigo, ng’a tingotamboka etui eye inchiche bwoo, gose aye togoetania etui eye na esiiro eye ochiche bwone, tokorerane amabe." 
Genesis31:53 Nyasae o Ibrahimu, Nyasae o Nahori, oyorenge Nyasae o ise obo, agambe ase egati yaito.” Ase igo Yakobo agatiana ase Oyio Isaka ise airogete." 
Genesis31:54 Yakobo akarua ekeng’wanso agwo ase egetunwa, akarangeria abanto baye bache koragera amo nere, bakaba aroro ase egetunwa obotuko obwo bwonsi." 
Genesis31:55 Mambia chuni Labani akaimoka, akanyunyunta abachokoro baye na abana baye abasubati, akabasesenia; erio akairana gocha bwoye." 
Genesis32:1 Erio Yakobo akagenderera norogendo rwaye, bakaumerana nabamalaika ba Nyasae." 
Genesis32:2 Na ekero Yakobo abaroche akabora, “Oyo nomoganda o Nyasae!” Ase igo akaroka aase aria Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo agatoma abatomwa batang’ane kogenda ase Esau omwabo, baike ensemo ya Seiri, ase ense y’Edomu." 
Genesis32:4 Akabachika batebie Esau omonene oye iga, “Aya naro Yakobo, omosomba oo, agokwana: Nabeire nkomenya ase ense y’obogeni, ense ya Labani goika rero iga;" 
Genesis32:5 nanyorire chiombe, ne chitigere, ne ching’ondi, na abasomba, abamura na abaiseke. Na bono, omonene one, nigo natomire abanto nkomanyie amang’ana ayio, inyore ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao.”" 
Genesis32:6 Abatomwa baria, ekero bairanete ase Yakobo bakamotebia, “Ntwaika o momura omino Esau, ere ngocha are gokorotota ore nabanto amagana ane.”" 
Genesis32:7 Erio Yakobo akaondoka mono na koumata, agaatanana abanto baria barenge amo nere, ne ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chingamia, bikaba ebiombe bibere," 
Genesis32:8 akarengereria ng’a, “Esau karache aumokere ekeombe kie ritang’ani na kogesiria, keria kende nagetooreke.”" 
Genesis32:9 Erio Yakobo agasaba, akabora, “Aye Nyasae o sokoro yane Ibrahimu, Nyasae o Isaka tata, aye Omonene, gwantebetie ng’a: Oirane gochia seino, na eamate yao, na inche ningokorere amaya." 
Genesis32:10 Inche tingwenereti nonya ng’ake obuya na obwegenwa bwonsi gwankorerete inche, omosomba oo, naki engaki naambogete orooche rwa Yorodan nigo nabwate enyimbo yoka koboko kwane, na bono nabeire ebiombe bibere." 
Genesis32:11 Koranche ontoorie bono korwa ase okoboko kw’oyominto Esau, ekiagera nairokire ng’a nabaise kong’ita, aite na abakungu na abana." 
Genesis32:12 Korende aye ngwantebetie: Ningokorere amaya, ninkore ororeria rwao robe buna omokenye o nyancha, otanyare kobareka, ekiagera nomonge.”" 
Genesis32:13 Erio Yakobo akarara aroro ase obotuko obwo; agachora korwa ase etugo eria abwate, echio aranyare koa Esau omwabo ebiegwa." 
Genesis32:14 Agachora chimbori chiaberi amagana abere, ne chigoree emerongo ebere, ne ching’ondi chiaberi amagana abere, ne chimingichi emerongo ebere," 
Genesis32:15 ne chingamia chiare gokamwa emerongo etato, amo ne chimori chiabo, ne chiombe chiaberi emerongo ene, ne chintang’ana ikomi, ne chitigere chiaberi emerongo ebere, ne chitigere chinsacha ikomi." 
Genesis32:16 Akabeka ching’iti echio ase amaboko ’abasomba baye, kera riicho akaribeka ao, agatebia abasomba baye, “Eta motang’ane, na egati ya kera riicho motige ribaga.”" 
Genesis32:17 Agachika omosomba oria bwe ritang’ani, akamotebia, “Esau ominto, ekero araumerane naye, na gokoboria: Noyo ng’o ore? Ng’ai ogochia? Etugo eye otang’anetie, neya ng’o?" 
Genesis32:18 Erio omoiranerie, omotebie: Ney’omosomba oo Yakobo, nekeegwa akorenteire aye omonene one Esau; ere omonyene ngotobwatia are korwa nyuma,”" 
Genesis32:19 Agachika naende oyo o kabere, na oyo o gatato, na abande bonsi abaare gotunyana amaicho, akabatebia, “Motebie Esau amang’ana ayio ayio ekero mokoumerana nere." 
Genesis32:20 Naende momotebie: Omosomba oo Yakobo ngotobwatia are korwa nyuma.” Ere nigo arengereretie ng’a, “Nimwororobie nebiegwa ebi namotang’aneirie; nyuma yaye nindore obosio bwaye, aande nanyanchere.”" 
Genesis32:21 Naboigo ebiegwa biria bigatang’anigwa gochia bosio bwaye, ere omonyene akarara obotuko obwo aase aria atenenetie eema yaye." 
Genesis32:22 Ase obotuko obwo Yakobo akaimoka, akaira abakungu baye babere, na abasomba baye babere abakungu, na abana baye ikomi nomo, akaamboka orooche rwa Yaboki." 
Genesis32:23 Akabaimokia, akabaambokia orooche, akaambokia na bionsi ebi arenge nabio." 
Genesis32:24 Yakobo agatigara ere bweka. Erio omonto oyomo agacha bagakinana nere, goika bogakiamoka." 
Genesis32:25 Nere omonto oria, ekero arora ng’a tari kobua Yakobo, akamokuna enengo y’ebachwa, akamoteng’eria, kobagendererete gokinana." 
Genesis32:26 Erio akamotebia, “Ntige ngende, ekiagera bwakiire.” Korende Yakobo akamotebia, “Tingokoa ribaga ogende, otaransesenia.”" 
Genesis32:27 Akamoboria, “Naki okorokwa?” Akamoiraneria, “Yakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Erio akamotebia, “Bono tokorokwa naende Yakobo, nigo orarokwe Israeli, ekiagera mwakinanire na Nyasae na abanto, na aye kwabuire.”" 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo akamoboria, “Koranche, ontebie erieta riao.” Korende akamotebia, “Nase ki okomboria erieta riane?” Agwo akamosesenia." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo akaroka aase aria Penieli, naki nigo atebete, “Naroranire na Nyasae obosio ase obosio, na obogima bwane bwatoorigwe.”" 
Genesis32:31 Erioba rikaorokera Yakobo kagoeta Penueli, akaba ogosegora, ekiagera ateng’eretigwe enengo y’ebachwa." 
Genesis32:32 Ase ayio Abaisraeli tibari koria omoki bw’enengo y’ebachwa goika rero iga, ekiagera omonto oria namoteng’eretie Yakobo omoki bw’enengo y’ebachwa yaye." 
Genesis33:1 Yakobo akaimokia amaiso aye, akarigereria, akarora Esau ogocha amo nabanto amagana ane. Erio agaatanana abana, akaa kera omokungu abaye, Lea, na Raeli, na abakungu baria babere abasomba." 
Genesis33:2 Akabeka abakungu baria abasomba amo nabana babo batang’ane, na Lea amo nabana baye korwa nyuma yabo, na Raeli na Yusufu akababeka nyuma kegima." 
Genesis33:3 Ere omonyene agatang’ana bosio bwabo, akaba okona‐gotung’ama inse chintunda isano na ibere goika agaika ase oyomwabo." 
Genesis33:4 Esau akaminyoka gochia komorotota, akamoboania rigoti riaye, na komonyunyunta, barabwo bakarererana." 
Genesis33:5 Ekero Esau achia koimokia amaiso aye, akarora abakungu na abana, akamoboria, “Aba naba ng’o more komo?” Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Aba nabana Nyasae ang’eire inche, omosomba oo, ase obuya bwaye.”" 
Genesis33:6 Erio abakungu baria abasomba bagasuka gochia ang’e, kera oyomo nabana baye, bagatung’ama inse." 
Genesis33:7 Lea nere boigo agasuka gochia ang’e amo nabana baye, nabarabwo bagatung’ama inse. Nyuma kegima Yusufu na Raeli bagasuka gochia ang’e, nabarabwo boigo bagatung’ama inse." 
Genesis33:8 Naende Esau akamoboria, “Emeganda eye yonsi twaumerana gochia aa, neya ki?” Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Engencho yaye inyore ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, aye omonene one.”" 
Genesis33:9 Esau akamoiraneria, “Oyominto, echi mbwate nching’isaine. Echire echiao, kabe nachirochio.”" 
Genesis33:10 Korende Yakobo akamotebia, “Taibo, onye nanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, koranche obwate ekeegwa eke korwa ase okoboko kwane; naki okorora obosio bwao nigo enga buna okorora obosio bwa Nyasae, ase ogwanchera kwanyancheire inche." 
Genesis33:11 Koranche oire ebiegwa ebi nakorenteire, ekiagera Nyasae onkoreire obuya obonge, na inche nimbwate ebing’isaine.” Naboigo ere akaebereria Esau na ere agancha, akabiira." 
Genesis33:12 Erio Esau akamotebia, “Eta, togende seito, na inche ningotang’ane.”" 
Genesis33:13 Korende Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Omonene one, nomanyete ng’a abana nebing’werere mbwate, naende chimbori ne ching’ondi nigo chibwate chimanwa chikogonka, ne chiombe boigo. Ching’iti echio chiise koayererigwa ase rituko erimo, nigo chirakwe chionsi." 
Genesis33:14 Koranche, omonene one, oete otang’ane bosio bwane, inche omosomba oo; na inche nindaae ching’iti echio ng’ora ng’ora, buna orogendo rwabo rong’ana, na abana buna chinguru chiabo ching’ana, goika ng’ike bwoo, omonene one, aaria Seiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 Erio Esau akamotebia, “Ningotigere abanto bande ase aba inde nabwo.” Korende Yakobo akairaneria, “Bakore ki? Otatiga ndore ng’a nanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, omonene one.”" 
Genesis33:16 Ase rituko erio erio Esau akabwatia enchera, akairana gochia Seiri." 
Genesis33:17 Korende Yakobo akagenderera, agaika Sukoti, akeagachera enyomba, akaagachera na amaicho aye ebigutu. Ase igo aase aria akarokwa Sukoti." 
Genesis33:18 Yakobo kairanire korwa Padan‐Aramu, agaika buya ase omorembe ase Sekemu, omochie omonene bw’ense ya Kanani, agatenenia eema yaye isiko y’omochie oyio." 
Genesis33:19 Korwa ase basinto ba Hamori, ise Sekemu, Yakobo akagora oboremo obwo ase rigori rie chifeta rigana erimo, agwo ase atenenetie eema yaye." 
Genesis33:20 Akaagacha agwo egesasimero, agakeroka Eli‐Elohe‐Israeli." 
Genesis34:1 Dina, omoiseke o Lea, oyio Lea aiborerete Yakobo, akagenda kororana nabaiseke b’ense eria." 
Genesis34:2 Ekero Sekemu, omwana o Hamori Omohivi, omonene bw’ense eria, amoroche, akamobwata, akarara nere, akamosareria obwekungi bwaye." 
Genesis34:3 Korende nyuma y’ayio agakorera Dina, omoiseke oyio o Yakobo, buya, akamwancha na gokwana nere amang’ana amaya." 
Genesis34:4 Sekemu agakwana na Hamori ise, akamotebia, “Mborerie omoiseke oyo abe mokane!”" 
Genesis34:5 Ekero Yakobo achia koigwa ng’a Sekemu osaririe Dina, omoiseke oye, abana baye ngetii barenge korisia, ase igo Yakobo agakira‐kiri goika bakairana inka." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, ise Sekemu, akaimoka akagenda o Yakobo gokwana nere." 
Genesis34:7 Abamura ba Yakobo, ekero bachia koigwa ayio, bagacha korwa getii, bakaigwa obororo, bakaba nekeririanda ekenene mono, ekiagera Sekemu akorete obokayayu ase Abaisraeli ase okorara nomoiseke o Yakobo, ring’ana ritagwenerete gokoreka." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori agakwana nabarabwo, akabora, “Omomura one Sekemu omwanchire omoiseke oino, komoranche amonyuome." 
Genesis34:9 Tonyuomerane intwe nainwe, motoe abaiseke baino, naintwe tobae abaito." 
Genesis34:10 Inwe nabo moramenye egati yaito, aiga ase ense yaito ribaga ndireo asemore, moramenye na koonchoreria, mwenyorere enibo.”" 
Genesis34:11 Sekemu agatebia ise Dina na bamura bamwabo, “Nyanchere aya naboria asemore, kende gionsi moramborie nindue." 
Genesis34:12 Mborie enibo ende yonsi na ebiegwa boigo, nimbae buna moraganie, kogicha mong’e omoiseke oyo abe mokane.”" 
Genesis34:13 Erio abamura ba Yakobo bakairaneria Sekemu na Hamori ise ase okong’ainereria, ekiagera konya osaririe Dina, omoiseke omwabo." 
Genesis34:14 Bakairaneria, “Titokonyara gokora ring’ana eri, komoa omonto otarogeti, omoiseke ominto, ekiagera ayio nigo arabe obosooku asetore." 
Genesis34:15 Natonyare gwancha okoboria kwaino ase ring’ana erimo rioka, nario eri: Komoranche mobe buna intwe, kera omonto omosacha ore asemore arokigwe." 
Genesis34:16 Erio natobae abaiseke baito, na intwe toire abaino, tomenye amo, tobe abanto abamo." 
Genesis34:17 Korende motancheti mwarokigwe, rirorio nigo torarusie omoiseke ominto aa, togende nere.”" 
Genesis34:18 Amang’ana abo akagwenera Hamori na omomura oye Sekemu. 
Genesis34:19 Omomura oyio tatebana gokora ring’ana riria, ekiagera omoiseke oria o Yakobo konya omogweneire. Bono Sekemu nigo asikire kobua abande bonsi ase eamate yabo." 
Genesis34:20 Ase igo Hamori na Sekemu, omomura oye, bakagenda ase egeita ki’omochie obo, bagakwana nabanto babo, bakabatebia," 
Genesis34:21 “Abanto aba babeire abasani baito, tiga bamenye ase ense yaito, babe abaonchoreria, ekiagera ense eye nenene, nebaisaine. Intwe tonyuome abaiseke babo, na barabwo banyuome abaito." 
Genesis34:22 Barabwo banchire komenya seito babe obomo naintwe, korende mbaganetie tokore ring’ana erimo, nario eri, ng’a kera omosacha ore asetore arokigwe buna barabwo barogete." 
Genesis34:23 Amaicho abo, na enibo yabo, na etugo yabo yonsi, Inee, tibikoba ebiaito? Tiga twancherane nabarabwo rioka, bamenye aa seito.”" 
Genesis34:24 Abanto bonsi abamenyete ase omochie oria, bakaigwera Hamori na omomura oye Sekemu, na kera omosacha oyomenyeteo akaarokigwa." 
Genesis34:25 Ase rituko ria gatato ekero abwo barogete barenge koromwa mono, abamura babere ba Yakobo, Simeoni na Lawi, bamura ba ng’ina omo na Dina, bakaimoka nemeyio ya birende, bagasoa ase omochie ime mobosokano, bagaita abasacha bonsi abarengeo." 
Genesis34:26 Bagaita Hamori amo nomomura oye nemeyio ya birende, bakarusia Dina omwabo mwa Sekemu, bakagenda nere." 
Genesis34:27 Erio abamura bande ba Yakobo bagachiera abwo baitetwe na bagasakora omochie, ekiagera konya basaririe omoiseke omwabo;" 
Genesis34:28 bakaira ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chitigere, na bionsi ebiarenge ase omochie ime, na bionsi ebiarenge ase emegondo boigo." 
Genesis34:29 Bagasakora enibo yabo yonsi, na abana babo, na abakungu babo, na bionsi ebiarenge ase chinyomba bakabiira." 
Genesis34:30 Erio Yakobo agatebia Simeoni na Lawi, “Inwe mwambekire ase emechando, mwankorire ntioke bobe egati y’abanto b’ebisaku bi’ense eye, Abakanani na Abaperisi. Inche na abanto baane nabake tore; barabwo baise gosangererekana na kong’umokera nigo barang’ite na gonsiria amo nabanto baane.”" 
Genesis34:31 Korende barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Inee! Nabo barabwo bagwenerete bakorere omoiseke ominto buna omokungu omotayayi?”" 
Genesis35:1 Nyasae agatebia Yakobo, “Imoka, otiire ogende Beteli, omenye aroro, oagachere Nyasae egesasimero agwo, Nyasae, oyo okoorokerete ekero kware gotama korwa ase Esau omino.”" 
Genesis35:2 Erio Yakobo agatebia abanto baye amo nabwo bonsi barenge komo, “Rusia ebinyasae ebigeni, ebi mobwate ase egati yaino, mwesibie inwe abanyene, moonchorerie chianga chiaino." 
Genesis35:3 Toimoke totiire kogenda Beteli, erinde ing’agachere Nyasae egesasimero aroro, Nyasae oyonyigwete ekero keria narenge nobokong’u, akaba amo nainche ase orogendo rwane rwonsi.”" 
Genesis35:4 Barabwo bakaa Yakobo ebinyasae ebigeni bionsi ebio babwate, na ebigera babegete ase amato abo, na Yakobo akabitindeka inse y’omote onga buna omotontera, oyorenge ang’e na Sekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Ekero baimogete kogenda orogendo rwabo, okoondokia gokarua ase Nyasae, gokabwata abanto b’emechie eria yabaetanaine; ase igo tibanyara kobwatia basinto ba Yakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Yakobo amo nabwo bonsi barenge nere bagaika Lusu, noro Beteli, ase ense ya Kanani." 
Genesis35:7 Agwo akaagacha egesasimero, akaroka aase aria Eli‐Beteli, ekiagera agwo nao Nyasae aorokerete Yakobo, ekero ere arenge gotama korwa ase oyomwabo." 
Genesis35:8 Agwo Debora, omoreri o Rebeka, agakwa, agatindekwa inse y’omote onga buna omotontera. Aase agwo akarokwa Aloni‐Bakuti." 
Genesis35:9 Nyasae akaorokera Yakobo naende, ekero ere are korwa Padan‐Aramu, akamosesenia." 
Genesis35:10 Agwo Nyasae akamotebia, “Erieta riao n’Yakobo, bono tokorokwa naende Yakobo, korende nigo orarokwe Israeli.” Ase igo akamoroka Israeli." 
Genesis35:11 Naende Nyasae akamotebia, “Inche Nyasae Omobui, genderera komenteka, obuche. Egesaku na emeganda y’ebisaku nigo erarue asore, na abaruoti mbarue asore." 
Genesis35:12 Na ense eye naete Ibrahimu na Isaka, ninkoyee aye na ororeria rwao rorache korwa nyuma yao.”" 
Genesis35:13 Erio Nyasae akaimoka gochia igoro korwa asare, agwo ase arenge gokwana nere." 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo agatenenia rigena buna esiiro aase aria Nyasae akwanerete nere, akaumora ekeng’wanso gi’ekenyugwa amo namaguta igoro yaye." 
Genesis35:15 Igo Yakobo akaroka aase aria Nyasae akwanerete nere Beteli. 
Genesis35:16 Erio kobare orogendo rwabo korwa Beteli, ekero batigairie orogendo oroke baike Efarati, Raeli agachaka kobina ase okoibora, akaba nobokong’u bw’okoibora." 
Genesis35:17 Ekero arenge koromwa mono, omoiboria akamotebia, “Toondoka, ekiagera naende nomwana omoisia oraibore.”" 
Genesis35:18 Agwo akaba okogireka ase ogokwa; na ekero arenge ang’e ase ogokwa, akaroka omwana oyio Ben‐Oni, korende ise akamoroka Benjamin." 
Genesis35:19 Erio Raeli agakwa, agatindekwa agwo ase enchera ekogenda Efarati, nao Bethlehemu." 
Genesis35:20 Na Yakobo agatenenia rigena ri’ekeinyorio ase embeera ya Raeli, nao rire goika rero iga." 
Genesis35:21 Erio Israeli akaimoka, akagenda, agatenenia eema yaye ng’umbu y’omorobiri o Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Engaki eria Israeli amenyete ase ense eria, Reuben akagenda akarara na Bilia, omokungu o ise, oria o sere‐sere, na Israeli akaigwa amang’ana ayio. Abamura ba Yakobo nigo barenge ikomi na babere." 
Genesis35:23 Abana abamura ba Lea nabwo aba: Reuben, omwana omotangi o Yakobo, na Simeoni, na Lawi, na Yuda, na Isakaru, na Sabuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Abana abamura ba Raeli nabwo Yusufu na Benjamin. 
Genesis35:25 Abana abamura ba Bilia, omoiseke omosomba o Raeli, nabwo Dani na Nafutali." 
Genesis35:26 Abana abamura ba Silpa, omoiseke omosomba o Lea, nabwo Gadi na Aseri. Aba nabwo abana abamura Yakobo aiboreretwe agwo Padan‐Aramu." 
Genesis35:27 Yakobo agaika ase omochie o Isaka ise aaria Mamure, ang’e na Kiriati‐Ariba, nao Heburoni, agwo ase Ibrahimu na Isaka bamenyete buna abamenyi." 
Genesis35:28 Isaka nigo akoorete emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etano na etato (180)." 
Genesis35:29 Erio Isaka agakwa, agasangerereka amo nabanto baye, ore omogotu kegima, omonto bw’emiaka emenge, na abamura baye, Esau na Yakobo, bakamotindeka." 
Genesis36:1 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’ororeria rwa Esau, nere Edomu." 
Genesis36:2 Esau akanyuoma abakungu baye korwa ase Abakanani: Ada, omoiseke o Eloni, Omohiti, na Oholibama, omoiseke o Ana, mosinto o Sibeoni, Omohivi," 
Genesis36:3 na Basemati, omoiseke o Isumaeli, omoiseke omwabo Nebayoti," 
Genesis36:4 Ada akaiborera Esau Elifasi, na Basemati akaibora Reueli," 
Genesis36:5 na Oholibama akaibora Yeusi, na Yalamu, na Kora. Aba nabwo abana abamura Esau aiboreretwe ase ense ya Kanani." 
Genesis36:6 Erio Esau akaimokia abakungu baye, na abamura na abaiseke baye, na abanto bonsi ababwate bwoye, ne chiombe chiaye, ne ching’iti chiaye chionsi echi atugete, na enibo yaye yonsi eyaniberete ase ense ya Kanani; akagenda agaika ase ense ere aare korwa ase Yakobo omwabo." 
Genesis36:7 Ekiagera babwate enibo enyinge tibare konyara komenya amo; na ense eria tiyare kobaisana bamenye babere bonsi ne chitugo chiabo. 
Genesis36:8 Ase igo Esau, oyokorokwa naende Edomu, akaba okomenya ase ense y’ebitunwa bia Seiri." 
Genesis36:9 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’ororeria rwa Esau sokoro bw’Abaedomu, ase ense y’ebitunwa bia Seiri." 
Genesis36:10 Aya naro amarieta a basinto b’Esau: Elifasi, omomura o Ada moga Esau, na Reueli, omomura o Basemati moga Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Na basinto b’Elifasi nabwo aba: Temani na Omari, na Sefo, na Gatamu, na Kenasi." 
Genesis36:12 Timuna nigo arenge omokungu o sere‐sere o Elifasi, mosinto bw’Esau. Ere akaiborera Elifasi Amaleki. Aba nabwo barenge abachokoro abamura b’Ada moga Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Aba nabwo basinto ba Reueli: Nahati, na Zera, na Sama, na Miza. Aba nabwo barenge abachokoro abamura ba Basemati, moga Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Na abana aba nabwo abamura ba Oholibama, moga Esau mosubati o Ana, mosinto o Sibeoni: Ere akaiborera Esau Yeusi, na Yalamu, na Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Aba nabwo barenge abagambi korwa ase ororeria rw’Esau. Basinto b’Elifasi, omomura omotangi bw’Esau, nabwo aba: Omogambi Temani, na omogambi Omari, na omogambi Sefo, na omogambi Kenasi," 
Genesis36:16 na omogambi Kora, na omogambi Gatamu, na omogambi Amaleki. Aba nabwo barenge abagambi korwa ase ororeria rw’Elifasi, ase ense y’Edomu. Barabwo nabachokoro abamura b’Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Naba nabwo basinto ba Reueli, mosinto bw’Esau: Omogambi Nahati, na omogambi Zera, na omogambi Sama, na omogambi Miza. Aba nabwo barenge abagambi korwa ase ororeria rwa Reueli ase ense y’Edomu. Aba nabwo abachokoro abamura ba Basemati, moga Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Naba nabwo abamura b’Oholibama, moga Esau: Omogambi Yeusi, na omogambi Yalamu, na omogambi Kora. Aba nabwo abagambi baiboretwe na Oholibama, mosubati o Ana moga Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Aba nabwo basinto b’Esau, nere Edomu; naba nabwo abagambi babo." 
Genesis36:20 Aba nabwo basinto ba Seiri Omohori, ababiare b’ense eria: Lotani, na Sobali, na Sibeoni, na Ana," 
Genesis36:21 na Disoni, na Eseri, na Disani. Aba nabwo barenge abagambi b’Abahori, basinto ba Seiri, ase ense y’Edomu." 
Genesis36:22 Na basinto ba Lotani nabwo Hori na Hemamu, na mosubati omwabo Lotani nigo arenge korokwa Timuna." 
Genesis36:23 Naba nabwo basinto ba Sobali: Alivani, na Manahati, na Sefo, na Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Naba nabwo basinto ba Sibeoni: Aya na Ana. Ana oyo nere onyorete chinsoko chi’amache are morero, ase erooro, ekero arenge korisia chitigere chia Sibeoni ise." 
Genesis36:25 Na mosinto o Ana nere Disoni, na omoiseke o Ana nere Oholibama." 
Genesis36:26 Naba nabwo basinto ba Disoni: Hemudani, na Esibani, na Itirani, na Kerani." 
Genesis36:27 Naba nabwo basinto b’Eseri: Bilihani, na Sawani, na Akani." 
Genesis36:28 Na basinto ba Disani nabwo Usi na Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Na abagambi barwete ase Abahori nabwo aba: Omogambi Lotani, na omogambi Sobali, na omogambi Sibeoni, na omogambi Ana," 
Genesis36:30 na omogambi Disoni, na omogambi Eseri, na omogambi Disani. Aba nabwo abagambi b’Abahori, koreng’ana nebisaku biabo, ase ense ya Seiri." 
Genesis36:31 Na abaruoti abagamberete ense y’Edomu ritang’ani moruoti onde bwensi ataragambera Abaisraeli nabwo aba: 
Genesis36:32 Bela, mosinto o Beori, akaba okogamba ase ense y’Edomu, na omochie oye nigo ore korokwa Dinihaba." 
Genesis36:33 Bela agakwa, na Yobabu mosinto o Zera, oyo orwete Bosira, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
Genesis36:34 Yobabu nere agakwa, na Husamu bw’ense y’Abatemani akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
Genesis36:35 Husamu nere agakwa, na Hadadi, mosinto o Bedadi, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye; oyo nere obuete Abamidiani, ase ense ya Moabu na omochie oye nigo ore korokwa Aviti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi nere agakwa, na Samula, oyo orwete Masereka, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
Genesis36:37 Samula nere agakwa, na Sauli, oyo orwete Rehoboti, omochie orenge orooche ensemo, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
Genesis36:38 Sauli nere agakwa, na Baali‐Hanani mosinto o Akibori akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
Genesis36:39 Baali‐Hanani, mosinto o Akibori, nere agakwa, na Hadari akaba ogokamba ase ribaga riaye, na omochie oye nigo ore korokwa Pau, na mokaye nigo arenge korokwa Mehetabeli, mosubati o Matiredi, mosubati o Mesahabu." 
Genesis36:40 Aya naro amarieta ’abagambi barwete ase ororeria rwa Esau, gotunyana chiamate chiabo, na aase bamenyete nigo are namarieta abo: Omogambi Timuna, na omogambi Aliva, na omogambi Yeteti," 
Genesis36:41 na omogambi Oholibama, na omogambi Ela, na omogambi Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 na omogambi Kenasi, na omogambi Temani, na omogambi Mibusari," 
Genesis36:43 na omogambi Magadieli, na omogambi Iramu. Aba nabwo abagambi barwete ase ororeria rw’Edomu, koreng’ana buna bamenyete chinsemo chiabo ase ense eria bairete ekaba eyabo. (Esau nere sokoro bw’Abaedomu)." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo akaba okomenya ase ense eyio ise amenyete buna omomenyi, ense y’Abakanani." 
Genesis37:2 Oyo noro omogano bw’ororeria rwa Yakobo. Yusufu, ekero konya abeire nemiaka ikomi, na etano na ebere, nigo arenge korisia amaicho amo na bamura bamwabo. Omosae oyio akaba ore amo nabamura bamwabo, abana ba Bilia na Silpa, abakungu ba ise. Yusufu akaba okorentera ise amang’ana igoro y’ogokora kwabo okobe." 
Genesis37:3 Bono Israeli nigo anchete Yusufu kobua abana baye bande bonsi, ekiagera nigo arenge omwana oye bw’obogotu. Akamoroiseria eanga engiya entambe." 
Genesis37:4 Abamwabo ekero baroche ng’a ise nigo amwanchete ere kobua abamwabo bonsi, barabwo bakamogecha, tibare gokwana amang’ana amaya nere." 
Genesis37:5 Yusufu akarota chindoto, na ekero atebetie abamwabo chindoto echio, barabwo bakamenta mono komogecha." 
Genesis37:6 Akabatebia, “Montegerere, moigwe okorota oko narotete." 
Genesis37:7 Nkarora ng’a intwe nigo twarenge mogondo tokoboa emesaima y’endagera, na omosaima one okaimoka ogatenena boronge, na emesaima yaino ekaba ekoyoetanana, egotung’ama inse ase omosaima one.”" 
Genesis37:8 Abamwabo bakamoboria, “Inee! Aye nigo orengereretie ng’a nigo orabe omogambi oito, otogambere?” Ase igo barabwo bakamenta komogecha mono ase engencho y’okorota kwaye, na ase engencho y’amang’ana aye." 
Genesis37:9 Naende akarota okorota konde, na okwo agatebia abamwabo, akabora, “Moigwe! Inche nigo narotete okorota konde. Nkarora erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni ikomi nemo chigotung’ama inse ase obosio bwane.”" 
Genesis37:10 Korende ekero atebetie ise na bamura bamwabo amang’ana ayio, ise akamotogonyera, akamoboria, “Nkorota ki okwo okorota? Inee! Inche na nyoko, na bamura bamino, amaene, nigo torache togotung’amere togosasime aye?”" 
Genesis37:11 Abamwabo bakamobwaterwa ribero, korende ise ere akagacha ogokwana okwo ase enkoro yaye, takweba." 
Genesis37:12 Erio abamwabo bakagenda korisia amaicho a ise ang’e na Sekemu. 
Genesis37:13 Na Israeli akarangeria Yusufu, akamotebia, “Inee! Abamino tibakari korisia amaicho aaria Sekemu? Inchuo ngotome gochia ase bakare.” Ere akamoitabera, “Nao inde aa.”" 
Genesis37:14 Ise akamotebia, “Genda bono orore gose abamino mbuya bare amo namaicho, na ondetere amang’ana.” Ase igo akamotoma korwa ase omweya o Heburoni, akagenda agaika Sekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Omonto oyomo akamonyora, ekero arenge kona‐goetanana ase erooro, na omonto oyio akamoboria, “Inki okorigia?”" 
Genesis37:16 Akamoiraneria, “Nabaminto nkorigia; koranche ontebie aase bakorisia amaicho.”" 
Genesis37:17 Omonto oria akamotebia, “Barure aa, bachiire, naki nigo nabaigwa bagotebania: Tiga togende Dotani.” Erio Yusufu akababwatia korwa nyuma, akabanyora Dotani." 
Genesis37:18 Barabwo bakamorora ere okare egeka, ritang’ani konya ataraika ang’e asebare, bakagamba buna bamoite." 
Genesis37:19 Barabwo bagatebania, “Omonyandoto oyio ogocha." 
Genesis37:20 Bono ntore ne ribaga; tiga tomoite, tomorute ase engoro eyemo ye chingoro chire aa, erio totebe ng’a neng’iti y’orosana yamoriete, na torore chindoto echio chiaye buna chirabe.”" 
Genesis37:21 Reuben ekero ayaigwete, akarigia komotooria korwa ase amaboko abo, akabatebia, “Titomoita akwe.”" 
Genesis37:22 Naende akabatebia, “Timoitera amanyinga aye; morute ase engoro eyemo y’echi chire aa ase erooro, korende timorambora amaboko aino gochia asare ase okomoita.” Ere nigo abatebetie igo, erinde anyare komotooria korwa ase amaboko abo, amoiranie ase ise." 
Genesis37:23 Ekaba ekero Yusufu achia goika ase abamwabo, barabwo bakamorusia eanga eria engiya entambe abegete," 
Genesis37:24 bakamobwata, bakamoruta engoro ime. Engoro eyio nigo yarenge bosa, mache tarengeo." 
Genesis37:25 Erio bagaikaransa inse koragera; bagachia koimokia amaiso abo korigereria, bakarora omoganda bw’Abaisumaeli ogocha korwa Gileadi. Barabwo nigo baare ne chingamia chiabo, chibogoretie ubani, na amaguta akogwenia, na manemane, ase orogendo rwabo baare kogenda Misiri."
