Genesis37:26 Agwo Yuda agatebia abamwabo, “Inki eratogwenere toite oyominto na kobisa ogokwa kwaye?" 
Genesis37:27 Tiga tomoonie ase Abaisumaeli aba, erinde titobaisa komoita namaboko aito, ekiagera noyominto, toiboire komo.” Na abamwabo bagancherana nere." 
Genesis37:28 Erio Abamidiani bagaeta aroro, baare gokora oboonchoreria; abamwabo bakarusia Yusufu korwa ase engoro eria, na komooneria Abaisumaeli ase chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo ebere; barabwo bakamoira goika Misiri." 
Genesis37:29 Reuben agachia koirana korigereria ase engoro, akanyora Yusufu taiyo ase engoro, ere agatandora chianga chiaye," 
Genesis37:30 akeonchora gochia ase abamwabo, akabatebia, “Omwana timonyoreti ase engoro. Ng’ai rende nkogenda?”" 
Genesis37:31 Erio bakaimokia eanga ya Yusufu, na bakanyenya embori, bakaimokia eanga eria, bakayetobeka ase amanyinga;" 
Genesis37:32 bakagenda nero eanga eria entambe bakayeirera ise, bakamotebia, “Yemanye eanga eye gose ney’omwana oo gose tari ero.”" 
Genesis37:33 Yakobo akayemanya, akabora, “Neanga y’omwana one, amaene neching’iti chi’orosana chiamoitire; Yusufu orirwe.”" 
Genesis37:34 Erio Yakobo agatandora chianga chiaye, akeboyia chigunia kenema kiaye, akaba okomoreera omwana oye engaki entambe." 
Genesis37:35 Abana baye, abamura na abaiseke bonsi, bakaimoka gochia komoremia, korende akaanga, taremigwa, agateba, “Yaya, goika inkwe, ngende inse ase oboina nkona‐komoreera omwana one.” Ise akaba okona‐kweumia." 
Genesis37:36 Na Abamidiani baria bakamoonia aaria Misiri ase Potifari, omoteneneri bw’enka ya Farao na omotang’ani bw’abarendi baye bande." 
Genesis38:1 Ekaba ase engaki eria Yuda agatiga abamwabo, agatirimboka, agaika ase omonto gete Omoadulamu ore korokwa Hira, bakabwatana nere." 
Genesis38:2 Aroro Yuda akarora Batisua, omoiseke bw’Omokanani gete, akamonyuoma. Bakaba bakorara amo," 
Genesis38:3 na Batisua akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Naende akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Akaba morito naende, akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Sela. Yuda nere nao arenge aria Kisibo ekero amoiborete." 
Genesis38:6 Na Yuda akanyuomeria Eri, omwana oye omotangi, omokungu ore korokwa Tamari." 
Genesis38:7 Nere Eri, omomura omotangi o Yuda, nigo arenge omobe ase obosio bw’Omonene; ase ayio Omonene akamoita." 
Genesis38:8 Erio Yuda agatebia Onani, “Motware moka momura omino, erinde omotenenerie egesaku.”" 
Genesis38:9 Korende Onani akamanya ng’a abana abwo agochia koibora tibari gochia korokwa abaye. Akaba ekero are koba na moka momura omwabo, oroiboro korwachire, arorusia aitera inse, ng’a tabaisa goteneneria oyomwabo egesaku." 
Genesis38:10 Ayio akorete akaba amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, nere Omonene akamoita." 
Genesis38:11 Erio Yuda agatebia Tamari, moka momura oye, “Genda omenye buna omoboraka ase omochie o iso goika Sela omwana one akine”; naki nigo oboete ng’a nere nabaise gocha gokwa, buna abamwabo bakwete. Ase igo Tamari akagenda akamenya o ise." 
Genesis38:12 Amatuko amange gaetire Batisua, moka Yuda, agakwa; Yuda gakoorire okomoreera, agatiira gochia Timuna ase abanachi amarionya be ching’ondi chiaye, amo nomosani oye Hira Omoadulamu." 
Genesis38:13 Ekero Tamari atebetigwe ng’a ise biara nkogenda akare Timuna konacha ching’ondi chiaye amarionya," 
Genesis38:14 akarusia chianga chiaye chi’ogokobania, akeboyia chianga na gwetuba obosio bwaye, agaikaransa geita ki’Enaimu, ang’e nenchera ekogenda Timuna; naki nigo aroche ng’a Sela obeire omonto omonene, na tamoeiri amotware." 
Genesis38:15 Ekero Yuda amoroche, agakaga ng’a nomokungu omotayayi, ekiagera nigo atubete obosio bwaye." 
Genesis38:16 Yuda akagobera gochia asare enchera ensemo, akamotebia, “Inyanchere insoe asore,” naki tamanyete gose moka momura oye orenge. Tamari akamoboria, “Inki orang’e, erinde osoe asende?”" 
Genesis38:17 Akamoiraneria, “Ninchie kogotomera emanwa egoree korwa ase riicho riane.” Omokungu oria akamoboria, “Inee! Inki orang’e kebe intenenera goika kwayentomeire?”" 
Genesis38:18 Akamoboria, “Ngento ki origetie nkoe kebe intenenera?” Akamoiraneria, “Ebonyi yao ere nekemanyererio, na orokini rwao, na enyimbo yao obwate koboko.” Erio akamobia, akarara nere, na ere akaba morito." 
Genesis38:19 Erio akaimoka akagenda, akarusia egietubo, akabeka chianga chiaye chi’ogokobania." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda akaa omosani oye Omoadulamu emanwa egoree airere omokungu oria, erinde ere airanie ebinto biria amoete bibe intenenera, korende tamonyora." 
Genesis38:21 Omoadulamu oria akaboria abanto b’aase aria, “Ng’ai are omokungu oria omotayayi, oyorenge aa Enaimu enchera ensemo?” Bakamokania, “Omokungu omotayayi tana koba aa.”" 
Genesis38:22 Ase igo akairana gochia ase Yuda, akamotebia, “Timonyoreti; naboigo nonya nabanto b’aase aria nigo bankania ng’a mokungu omotayayi tana kobao.”" 
Genesis38:23 Yuda akabora, “Tiga atware ebinto ebio namoete bibe intenenera, titobaisa gocha kororekana nobosooku. Rora, namotomerete emanwa egoree, na aye tikwamonyorete.”" 
Genesis38:24 Ekaba nyuma y’emetienyi etato Yuda agatebigwa ng’a Tamari, moka momura oye, okorire obotomani bw’obotayayi; amo nayio morito are ase obotayayi. Erio Yuda akabora, “Mosokie isiko, asambwe nomorero.”" 
Genesis38:25 Gasokigwe isiko agatoma abanto ase ise biara, bamotebie, “Omonto omonyene ebinto ebi, nere ong’ete oborito obo.” Naende akabora, “Manya ebonyi eyio ere nekemanyererio, na orokini oro, na enyimbo eye, gose nebia ng’o.”" 
Genesis38:26 Erio Yuda akabimanya, akabora, “Ere nomoronge kombua, nigo akora ayio, ekiagera ntamoete Sela, omwana one, amotware.”" 
Genesis38:27 Ekero engaki yaye y’okoibora yachia goika, akarorekana ore ne chibarongo enda yaye ime." 
Genesis38:28 Ekero arenge koibora, omwana oyomo agatang’ania okoboko isiko, na omoiboria akamosibera okoboko okwo eusi embariri, agateba, “Oyo nere otanga gosoka isiko.”" 
Genesis38:29 Kairanirie okoboko kwaye, rora, oyomwabo akaromeng’ana, agasoka isiko. Erio omoiboria agateba, “Naki okoromeng’ana ne chinguru iga?” Ase ayio bakamoroka Peresi." 
Genesis38:30 Nyuma yaye oyomwabo agasoka ore neusi embariri koboko kwaye. Nere akarokwa Zera. 
Genesis39:1 Bono Yusufu agatirimbokigwa gochia Misiri; na Potifari, omoteneneri bw’enka ya Farao na omotang’ani bw’abarendi baye bande, omonto o Misiri, akamogora korwa ase Abaisumaeli, abwo bamotirimbogetie gochia aroro." 
Genesis39:2 Omonene nigo arenge amo na Yusufu, na ere akanyora ogosesenigwa. Yusufu akamenya ase enka y’omonene oye, oria Omomisiri." 
Genesis39:3 Ere nigo aroche ng’a Omonene nigo arenge amo na Yusufu, ogerire ebinto bionsi biasesenigwe ase amaboko aye." 
Genesis39:4 Ase igo Yusufu akanyora ogwancherwa ase obosio bw’omonene oye ng’a amokorere; na ere akamobeka abe omoteneneri bw’enka yaye yonsi, na omorigereria bw’ebinto bionsi ebi abwate." 
Genesis39:5 Korwa engaki eyio amobegete abe omoteneneri igoro y’enka yaye, na bionsi ebi abwate. Omonene agasesenia Omomisiri oria ase engencho ya Yusufu, na ogosesenia kw’Omonene gokaba ase ebinto bionsi abwate ase enyomba na emegondo." 
Genesis39:6 Ase igo agatiga bionsi ebiarenge nabio ase amaboko a Yusufu; gose taba ogwechandera gento kende gionsi otatiga endagera yoka eria arenge koria. Yusufu nigo arenge omonto omerete buya, naende omonyakieni." 
Genesis39:7 Nyuma y’engaki gete moka omonene oye akarigereria Yusufu ase okomogania, akamotebia, “Inchuo orare nainche!”" 
Genesis39:8 Korende ere akaanga, agatebia moka omonene oye, “Rora, omonene one techandereti gento kende gionsi ase enka yaye, na bionsi ebi abwate obibekire ase amaboko aane." 
Genesis39:9 Onde tari ase enyomba yaye oeire okobua kobua inche, gose tantangeti gento kende gionsi otatiga aye bweka, ekiagera aye mokaye ore. Naki rende ndanyare gokora ebibe ebinene buna ebi, imomochere Nyasae?”" 
Genesis39:10 Akaba okonagokwana na Yusufu rituko ase rituko, korende Yusufu tamwanchera barare komo, gose koba amo." 
Genesis39:11 Ekaba rituko erimo, ekero Yusufu asoete nyomba gokora emeremo yaye, gose monto onde bw’abanto b’enyomba eria tarengeo," 
Genesis39:12 omokungu oria akamobwata eanga yaye eyare kwambara, akamotebia, “Rara nainche.” Korende Yusufu agatigera omokungu oria eanga yaye eyare kwambara, agatama gochia isiko." 
Genesis39:13 Omokungu oria, ekero aroche ng’a Yusufu omotigeire eanga yaye koboko kwaye, na gotama gochia isiko," 
Genesis39:14 akarangeria abanto ba nyomba mwaye, akabatebia, “Rigereria, omosacha one otorenteire omonto oyo Omoibirania ase egati yaito atokorere echeche; nigo acha asende ng’a arare nainche, na inche nakuura neriogi rinene," 
Genesis39:15 na ekero aigwa ng’a nakuurire neriogi rinene, ontigera eanga yaye koboko kwane, otama gochia isiko.”" 
Genesis39:16 Akagacha eanga eria goika omosacha oye agacha inka," 
Genesis39:17 akamotebia amang’ana ayio ayio, agateba, “Omoibirania oyo omosomba kwarenta aa nabo asoa asende gonkorera echeche." 
Genesis39:18 Korende ekero nachaka gokuura na goaka eriogi ontigera eanga yaye koboko kwane, otama gochia isiko.”" 
Genesis39:19 Ekero omonene o Yusufu achia koigwa aya mokaye amotebirie ng’a, “Aya naro omosomba oo ankorera”, akaba nekeririanda ekenene." 
Genesis39:20 Omonene oyio akabwata Yusufu, akamobeka echela ime, aase abasomba b’omoruoti basibire, na ere akaba agwo echela ime." 
Genesis39:21 Korende Omonene akaba ore amo na Yusufu, akamokorera obuya, akamoa ogwancherwa ase omonene bw’echela." 
Genesis39:22 Omonene oria akabeka abasibwa bonsi abwo barenge echela ime ase amaboko a Yusufu; na onsi ayare gokoreka ase echela, ere akaba okoyakora." 
Genesis39:23 Na omonene oria bw’echela tachia goitaa kende gionsi kiare ase amaboko a Yusufu, ekiagera Omonene nigo arenge amo nere, na ande onsi are gokora, Omonene nigo are koyasesenia." 
Genesis40:1 Ekaba nyuma y’amang’ana ayio, omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa bia Farao na omoteneneri oye bw’abaroisia emegati bakamochera omonene obo, omoruoti o Misiri." 
Genesis40:2 Ase igo Farao akabea abateneneri abwo babere, omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa na omoteneneri bw’abaroisia emegati." 
Genesis40:3 Akababeka barendwe ase enyomba yomotang’ani bw’abarendi, ase echela eyio Yusufu nere asibetwe." 
Genesis40:4 Omotang’ani bw’abarendi akabeka Yusufu abe okobarigereria na kobakorera, na barabwo bakabeera ase egesibo ase engaki enke." 
Genesis40:5 Ase obotuko obomo bonsi babere, omoteneneri oria bw’ebinyugwa na omoteneneri bw’abaroisia emegati b’omoruoti o Misiri, abwo basibetwe echela, bakaba bakorota chindoto. Kera oyomo akarota okorota kwaye okware nengencho eng’ao korwa ase okw’oyonde." 
Genesis40:6 Ekero Yusufu agendete mambia kobarigereria akabanyora nigo baichanete. 
Genesis40:7 Ase igo akaboria abateneneri abwo ba Farao, abarenge amo nere ase egesibo ase enyomba y’omonene oye, akabora, “Naki moichanete iga rero?”" 
Genesis40:8 Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Nigo twarotete chindoto, na onde tari oranyare gototebia engencho ye chindoto chiaito.” Yusufu akabatebia, “Nigoro ya Nyasae kobatebia engencho yaye. Komoranche, mochintebie.”" 
Genesis40:9 Omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa agatebia Yusufu okorota kwaye, akabora, “Ase okorota kwane nigo naroche omosabibu ore ase obosio bwane," 
Genesis40:10 na omosabibu oyio nigo orenge ne chinsagia isato; bwango ogasomoria, ogasokia ebisicha, na okaama ebisago bi’amasabibu amatobu." 
Genesis40:11 Na egekombe kia Farao nigo nakebwate ase okoboko kwane; nkabogoria amasabibu aria, nkayamitera ase egekombe kia Farao, nkaa Farao egekombe eke koboko kwaye.”" 
Genesis40:12 Yusufu akamotebia, “Engencho y’okorota okwo nero eye: Chinsagia echio isato, ayio namatuko atato." 
Genesis40:13 Nyuma y’amatuko atato Farao nakorusie aiga, akoe ogosika, akoiranie ase emeremo yao, na aye nobe gokomoa egekombe koboko kwaye, buna kware komoa agwo ritang’ani, ekero kwarenge omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa biaye." 
Genesis40:14 Korende ekero oranyore amaya, ong’inyore nainche, ondorere amabera. Koranche nagosabire onyatore ase Farao, ondusie ase enyomba eye," 
Genesis40:15 ekiagera nigo naibetwe korwa ase ense y’Abaibirania, nonya naa tinkoreti ing’ana rinde riibe riagwenerete kombeka ase echela.”" 
Genesis40:16 Ekero omoteneneri bw’abaroisia emegati aroche ng’a okoonchora okwo nigo kwabete okuya, agatebia Yusufu, “Nainche boigo nigo narotete. Nkarora ng’a inyetwegete chinteru isato chire nemegati emerabu ase omotwe one." 
Genesis40:17 Ase oroteru rwa igoro kegima yarengeo emegati y’ebisaku ao ao yaroiseretigwe Farao, korende chinyoni chigacha chikayeria korwa ase oroteru igoro, oro netwegete ase omotwe one.”" 
Genesis40:18 Na Yusufu akamoiraneria, “Engencho y’okorota okwo nero eye: Chinteru echio isato, ayio namatuko atato." 
Genesis40:19 Nyuma y’amatuko atato Farao nakoimokie, agosunge ase omote igoro ne chinyoni nachirie chinyama chi’omobere oo.”" 
Genesis40:20 Rituko ria gatato, erio riaare ri’okoinyora okoiborwa gwa Farao, ere agakorera abasomba baye bonsi omoyega, akabarusia echela baria babere, omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa na omoteneneri bw’abaroisia emegati, ase egati y’abasomba baye." 
Genesis40:21 Akairania omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa ase emeremo yaye y’obonyoisia, na ere akaba okomoa Farao egekombe ase okoboko kwaye;" 
Genesis40:22 korende omoteneneri bw’abaroisia emegati ere akamosunga ase omote igoro, buna Yusufu abanorete chingencho chie chindoto chiabo." 
Genesis40:23 Nonya nabo oyio omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa taba okoinyora Yusufu, korende akamweba." 
Genesis41:1 Nyuma y’emiaka ebere koyaetire Farao akarota chindoto. Akarora ng’a oteneine engegu y’orooche rwa Naili," 
Genesis41:2 akarora chiombe isano na ibere, chingiya mono chinoru, chikorwa rooche, chikorisia amasangaka." 
Genesis41:3 Naende akarora chiombe chinde isano na ibere, chimbe mono chindeu, chikorwa rooche, chigochitunyana korwa nyuma, chigatenena ase engegu y’orooche ang’e nase chiombe chiria chinde." 
Genesis41:4 Agwo chiombe chiria chimbe chindeu chikaria chiria chingiya chinoru. Erio Farao akaboka. 
Genesis41:5 Akarara naende, akarota eria kabere, akarora ebigara bitano na bibere ebinene ebinoru, bikinete ase oroboba oromo." 
Genesis41:6 Nyuma yabo ebigara binde ebireu, ebiasusanirie nomwaga ore korwa moocha, bikaoroka." 
Genesis41:7 Agwo ebigara ebio ebireu bitano na bibere bikaria biria binde ebinene ebinoru. Farao akaboka, akanyora ng’a nigo are korota." 
Genesis41:8 Ekero bwachia gokia mambia, akaba oichanete, agatoma abanto barangerie abaringoria bonsi ba Misiri na abanto abang’aini bonsi abarengeo. Farao akabatebia chindoto chiaye, korende onde tatogete ore konyara komotebia engencho ye chindoto echio." 
Genesis41:9 Erio omoteneneri bw’ebinyugwa agatebia Farao, “Bono nainyoire okomocha kwane." 
Genesis41:10 Ekero aye Farao gwatobeete intwe abasomba bao, na gotosiekera, inche na omoteneneri bw’abaroisia emegati, ase echela eyere ase enyomba y’omotang’ani bw’abarendi," 
Genesis41:11 intwe ase obotuko obomo tokarota chindoto twensi, kera oyomo okorota kwaye kore nengencho yaye eng’ao." 
Genesis41:12 Agwo amo naintwe narengeo omomura oyomo Omoibirania, omosomba bw’omotang’ani bw’abarendi. Tokamotebia chindoto chiaito, na ere agatotebia engencho ye chindoto chiria, agatobanorera kera oyomo engencho y’okorota kwaye." 
Genesis41:13 Na buna ere atotebetie engencho ye chindoto chiaito, naboigo abete; inche nkairanigwa ase emeremo yane, na oria onde agasungwa ase omote igoro.”" 
Genesis41:14 Erio Farao agatoma abanto korangeria Yusufu. Bakamorenta bwango korwa ase echela, na ere akagingirwa, akaonchoreria chianga chiaye, akagenda ase obosio bwa Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao agatebia Yusufu, “Nigo narota okorota, gose onde tari oranyare gontebia engencho y’okorota kwane. Inche naigure amang’ana ao ng’a gokwaigure chindoto, nabo okomanya engencho ye chindoto echio.”" 
Genesis41:16 Yusufu akairaneria Farao, akabora, “Tari inche, korende Nyasae orakoe aye Farao okoiraneria kw’omorembe.”" 
Genesis41:17 Erio Farao agatebia Yusufu, “Ase okorota kwane nigo naroche ng’a nteneine ase engegu y’orooche." 
Genesis41:18 Nkarora chiombe isano na ibere, chinoru chingiya mono, chikorwa rooche, chikorisia amasangaka;" 
Genesis41:19 naende nkarora chiombe chinde isano na ibere, chimbe mono chindeu, chikorwa rooche, chigochitunyana korwa nyuma. Ase ense yonsi ya Misiri tinana korora chiombe chimbe buna echio." 
Genesis41:20 Agwo chiombe chiria chimbe chindeu chikaria chiombe chiria isano na ibere chie ritang’ani, chiare chingiya chinoru," 
Genesis41:21 korende ekero chiachirire tichiarorekana ng’a nchiachiria, nkarora nabo chire buna chiare ritang’ani. Erio nkaboka." 
Genesis41:22 Naende konararire nkarora ase okorota kwane ebigara ebinene ebinoru bitano na bibere, bikinete ase oroboba oromo;" 
Genesis41:23 na ebigara ebiomo ebireu, ebiasusanirie nomwaga ore korwa moocha, bikaoroka korwa nyuma yabo," 
Genesis41:24 na ebigara biria ebireu bikaria biria ebinoru bitano na bibere. Inche ngatebia abaringoria, korende onde tari onyarete gontebia engencho y’okorota kwane.”" 
Genesis41:25 Erio Yusufu agatebia Farao, “Chindoto chiao, aye Farao, nigo chire echimo. Nyasae okworokirie, aye Farao, aya agochia gokora iga bwango." 
Genesis41:26 Chiombe chiria chingiya isano na ibere, eyio nemiaka etano na ebere, na ebigara biria ebiya bitano na bibere, eyio nemiaka etano na ebere; chindoto echio nechimo." 
Genesis41:27 Ne chiombe chiria isano na ibere chimbe chindeu, chiachitunyanete chiria chinoru, eyio nemiaka etano na ebere, na ebigara biria bitano na bibere bitaamete, biasusanirie nomwaga ore korwa moocha, eyio nemiaka etano na ebere y’enchara." 
Genesis41:28 Aya naro buna nagotebia aye Farao, ng’a Nyasae okworokirie aya agochia gokora iga bwango." 
Genesis41:29 Rora, ngochi‐gocha ere emiaka etano na ebere y’omoigoto ase ense yonsi ya Misiri," 
Genesis41:30 korende nyuma y’ayio neche emiaka ende etano na ebere y’enchara; na omoigoto oria bwonsi nigo ogochia kwebwa ase ense ya Misiri, ekiagera enchara eria nigo erarie ense eye." 
Genesis41:31 Omoigoto oria tokoinyorwa ase ense eye, ase engencho y’enchara eye erache gocha korwa nyuma yaye, ekiagera nigo erabe endito mono." 
Genesis41:32 Na bono Farao, okorota kwao nigo gwachete eria kabere, aya nigo akoorokia ng’a Nyasae ochikire amang’ana aya, na Nyasae nayaikeranie iga bwango." 
Genesis41:33 “Ase ayio Farao, rigia omonto ore omomanyi na omong’aini, omobeke igoro y’ense yonsi ya Misiri." 
Genesis41:34 Na bono Farao, aya naro ogwenerete okore: Obeke abateneneri igoro y’ense eye bachoge ensemo ya isano y’endagera ase ense ya Misiri ase emiaka eye etano na ebere y’omoigoto." 
Genesis41:35 Tiga basangererie endagera eye yonsi y’emiaka eye emiya egocha, bayebeke erendwe ase emechie, ase okobua gwa Farao." 
Genesis41:36 Na endagera eye egachwe eche koegwa abanto emiaka eye etano na ebere y’enchara, erache gocha ase ense ya Misiri, abanto tibabaisa gocha gosira ase enchara eyio.”" 
Genesis41:37 Amang’ana ayio akagwenera Farao amo nabasomba baye bonsi. 
Genesis41:38 Farao akaboria abasomba baye, “Inee! Ng’ai toranyore omonto onga buna oyo ore n’Omoika o Nyasae ime yaye?”" 
Genesis41:39 Erio Farao agatebia Yusufu, “Ekiagera Nyasae okomanyirie amang’ana ayio onsi, onde tari aa omanyete, naende ore na omong’aini buna aye." 
Genesis41:40 Bono naye orabe omoteneneri bw’enka yane, na abanto baane bonsi nabakoigwere buna orabe gokobachika. Ase ekerogo kiane ki’obogambi oka, nao ndabe omonene gokobua.”" 
Genesis41:41 Farao agatebia Yusufu, “Rora nakobekire aye igoro y’ense yonsi ya Misiri.”" 
Genesis41:42 Erio Farao akarusia ebonyi yaye ere nekemanyererio korwa ase ekiara kiaye, akamoyebekera Yusufu kiara kiaye, akamobekera na eanga engiya y’egatani, akamobekera ne chisonoi chi’etahabu igoti riaye." 
Genesis41:43 Akamoriinia ase egari yaye ya kabere y’oboruoti. Abanto bagaaka eriogi, bakobora, “Tung’ama inse!” Naboigo akamobeka abe omogambi bw’ense yonsi ya Misiri." 
Genesis41:44 Naende Farao agatebia Yusufu, “Ninche Farao. Otancheti aye, onde takoba ase ense yonsi ya Misiri oraimoke gokora gento.”" 
Genesis41:45 Farao akaroka Yusufu Safenati‐Panea; akamonyuomeria omokungu, nere Asenati, omoiseke o Potifera, omokuani bw’Oni. Yusufu akagenda aaria na aaria korigereria ense yonsi ya Misiri." 
Genesis41:46 Agwo Yusufu, ekero asoete gokorera Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etato. Na Yusufu akarua ase obosio bwa Farao, agaetanana ase ense yonsi ya Misri." 
Genesis41:47 Emiaka eria etano na ebere y’omoigoto egaika, ense ekaama endagera enyinge," 
Genesis41:48 na Yusufu agasangereria endagera yonsi ase emiaka eria etano na ebere, ase ense ya Misiri, akayegacha ase emechie. Ase kera omochie akagacha endagera yonsi y’emegondo eria yayoetanaine." 
Genesis41:49 Yusufu akagacha endagera ase obonge mono, ekaba enyinge buna omokenye bw’enyancha, goika agatiga koyerenga, ekiagera tiyare konyara korengeka." 
Genesis41:50 Ritang’ani emiaka eria y’enchara etaracha, Asenati, mosubati o Potifera, omokuani bw’Oni, akaiborera Yusufu abana abaisia babere." 
Genesis41:51 Yusufu akaroka omwana oria omotangi Manase, agateba, “Nyasae ogerire inyebe obokong’u bwonsi na abanto b’enka ya tata.”" 
Genesis41:52 Na omwana o kabere akamoroka Efraimu, agateba, “Nyasae ong’eire oroiboro ase ense y’emechando yane.”" 
Genesis41:53 Emiaka eria etano na ebere y’omoigoto ekaera ase ense ya Misiri," 
Genesis41:54 na emiaka eria etano na ebere y’enchara egachaka gocha, buna Yusufu abanete. Enchara egacha ase chinse chionsi, korende ase ense yonsi ya Misiri endagera yarengeo." 
Genesis41:55 Ekero enchara yariete abanto bonsi ba Misiri, barabwo bakamorera Farao abae endagera; na Farao agatebia Abamisiri bonsi, “Genda ase Yusufu, na rinde rionsi arabatebie, goika morikore.”" 
Genesis41:56 Ase igo, ekero enchara yasoete ase ense eria engima, Yusufu akaigora ebiage bionsi, akaooneria Abamisiri endagera, ekiagera enchara nigo yabete endito ase ense ya Misiri." 
Genesis41:57 Abanto be chinse chionsi bagacha Misiri kogora endagera korwa ase Yusufu, ekiagera enchara nigo yarenge endito ase ense engima." 
Genesis42:1 Ekero Yakobo aigwete ng’a endagera nekare ase ense ya Misiri, akaboria abamura baye, “Inaki morigereranetie iga?”" 
Genesis42:2 Naende akabatebia, “Naigure ng’a endagera nekare Misiri, tirimboka gochiao, motogorere endagera toche koria, tobe moyo, titokwa.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ase igo bamura bamwabo Yusufu ikomi bagatirimboka gochia Misiri kogora endagera. 
Genesis42:4 Korende Benjamin, omwabo Yusufu, Yakobo tamotiga agende amo nabarabwo, ekiagera nigo oboete ng’a aande nabaise gochia konyorwa namabe." 
Genesis42:5 Nabo basinto ba Israeli bakagenda amo nabanto bande abachiete kogora endagera, ekiagera enchara yarenge ase ense ya Kanani." 
Genesis42:6 Yusufu nere orenge gavuna igoro y’ense yonsi ya Misiri, naende nere orenge kooneria abanto bonsi b’ense eria endagera. Na abamwabo Yusufu, ekero baigete asare, bagatung’ama inse ase obosio bwaye." 
Genesis42:7 Yusufu, ekero abarora, akabamanya, korende agekora buna tabamanyeti, agakwana nabarabwo amang’ana amakong’u. Akababoria, “Abanto aba, ng’ai mwarure?” Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Nigo twarure ase ense ya Kanani, twachire kogora endagera.”" 
Genesis42:8 Nonya Yusufu omanyete abamwabo, barabwo tibamomanyete ere." 
Genesis42:9 Erio Yusufu akainyora chindoto chiria arenge kobarotera, akabatebia, “Inwe nechirooti more, nigo mwachire koroota ense eye, na korora ase ere bosa etari na getango.”" 
Genesis42:10 Bakamokania, “Taibo, omonene, intwe abasomba bao nigo twachire kogora endagera." 
Genesis42:11 Intwe twensi nabana b’omonto oyomo. Intwe abasomba bao nigo tore abanto abaronge, titori chirooti.”" 
Genesis42:12 Akabakania, “Yaya, nigo mwachire koroota ense, na korora ense ase ere bosa etari na getango.”" 
Genesis42:13 Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Intwe abasomba bao nigo tore abamura ikomi na babere, abana b’omonto oyomo, ase ense ya Kanani; na bono omoke ominto tari aa, inka akare ase tata, na oyomo ere takaiyo.”" 
Genesis42:14 Korende Yusufu akabatebia “Nabo ere buna konya naikire kobatebia, ng’a inwe nechirooti more." 
Genesis42:15 Ase amang’ana aya nimbateeme: Amaene, buna Farao are moyo, timokorua aa mogende, oria omino omoke ataracha aa." 
Genesis42:16 Toma oyomo oino agende korenta oyio omino, na inwe abande motigare echela. Nabo morateemwe gose namaene mogoteba. Onye taibo, amaene buna Farao are moyo, inwe nechirooti more.”" 
Genesis42:17 Erio agasiekera bonsi amo echela ime ase amatuko atato. 
Genesis42:18 Rituko ria gatato Yusufu akabatebia, “Mokore iga buna ndabatebie, nario morabe moyo; naki inche nomonto imoirogete Nyasae." 
Genesis42:19 Onye inwe more abanto abaronge, tiga oyomo oino atigare aa ase echela, na inwe abande moirere abwo mwatigete inka endagera, ase engencho y’enchara;" 
Genesis42:20 erio morente oria omino omoke asende. Igo amang’ana aino aenekigwe ng’a namaene are, na inwe timobaisa gokwa. Barabwo bagakora bo.”" 
Genesis42:21 Erio bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, “Amaene, ntwamocherete oyominto. Nigo twaroche ogochandeka kw’omoyo oye, na ekero atosororete titwamoigwete. Ase ayio nakio kiagerire obokong’u obo bwatonyorire.”" 
Genesis42:22 Reuben akabairaneria, “Tinabakanetie ng’a timomochera omosae oyo? Korende inwe mokaanga, timwanyigwera. Ase igo bono amanyinga aye aganigwe aakanwe.”" 
Genesis42:23 Barabwo tibamanya ng’a Yusufu nayaigwete, ekiagera omonogi narengeo ore komoonchorera." 
Genesis42:24 Erio akarua asebare, akagenda ensemo, akarera amariga; naende akairana, agakwana nabarabwo. Akarusia Simeoni korwa asebare, akamosiba ase amasio abo." 
Genesis42:25 Yusufu agachika abanto baichorie chigunia chiabo endagera, na kera oyomo airanerigwe chibesa chiaye, chibekwe egunia yaye ime, na aegwe endagera agochia koria inchera. Naboigo babakorerete." 
Genesis42:26 Erio bakaberekia chitigere chiabo endagera, bakagenda." 
Genesis42:27 Ekero baigete ase bakorara botuko, oyomo obo agasansora egunia yaye arusie endagera ae etigere yaye, akarora chibesa chiaye igoro y’endagera ase egunia yaye ime," 
Genesis42:28 agatebia abamwabo, “Ayee! Chibesa chiane nigo chiairanetigwe, rigereria, nao chire aa egunia yane ime!” Chinkoro chiabo chikagoyaana, bakarigererania na koiguswa, bagateba, “Inki eke Nyasae atokoreire iga?”" 
Genesis42:29 Ekero baigete ase Yakobo ise, ase ense ya Kanani, bakamotebia ayio onsi abanyorete, bakabora," 
Genesis42:30 “Omonto oria omonene bw’ense eria nigo akwanete naintwe amang’ana amakong’u agatoroka ng’a intwe nechirooti, tokoroota ense." 
Genesis42:31 Korende tokamotebia: Intwe nigo tore abanto abaronge, titori chirooti." 
Genesis42:32 Nigo tore abamura ikomi na babere, tata noyomo. Oyomo oito takaiyo, na omoke kegima nere okare ase tata inka, ase ense ya Kanani." 
Genesis42:33 Omonto oyio, omonene bw’ense eria, agatotebia: Ase amang’ana aya naro ndamanyere gose nabanto abaronge more: Tiga oyomo oino aiga asende, inwe abande genda, moire endagera ase engencho y’enchara ekare inka seino." 
Genesis42:34 Genda mondetere oyio omino omoke, erio nario ndamanye ng’a timori chirooti, korende nabanto abaronge. Erio nimbairanerie oyomino, na inwe inamonyore ribaga mobe mokoonchoreria ase ense eye.”" 
Genesis42:35 Ekaba ekero baumorete endagera korwa ase chigunia, bakanyora kera oyomo esaro ye chibesa chiaye nao ere egunia yaye ime. Na ekero barabwo amo na ise baroche chisaro chie chibesa chiabo, bakaondoka." 
Genesis42:36 Yakobo ise akabatebia, “Mwang’urire abana baane, Yusufu taiyo, na Simeoni taiyo, na bono morigetie koira Benjamin nere. Amang’ana aya onsi anyorire inche.”" 
Genesis42:37 Erio Reuben agatebia ise “Oite abana baane babere abamura onye tinkomoirania gocha asore. Mobeke ase amaboko aane na inche nimoiranie.” 
Genesis42:38 Akamokania, “Omwana one tagotirimboka amo nainwe, ekiagera oyomwabo okure, na oyo nere otigarete bweka. Amabe aise gochia komonyora agwo inchera, nigo moragere ngende ase oboina ne chimbuche chiane inde nomoichano.”" 
Genesis43:1 Enchara ekaba enene ase ense. 
Genesis43:2 Na ekero bakoorire endagera eria bagorete korwa Misiri, ise akabatebia, “Irana naende motogorere endagera nke toche koria.”" 
Genesis43:3 Korende Yuda akamotebia, “Omonto oria nigo atochigete bokong’u, agatotebia: Timogocha kondora obosio bwane oyio omino atacheti amo nainwe." 
Genesis43:4 Koratoe oyominto agende amo naintwe, rirorio inatotirimboke tokogorere endagera." 
Genesis43:5 Korende onye togotomoa togende komo, rirorio titokogenda, ekiagera omonto oria nigo atotebetie: Timokondora obosio bwane motacheti noyio omino.”" 
Genesis43:6 Israeli akababoria, “Ninki mwankorera igo na gonchanda, goika mogatebia omonto oria ng’a mokare noyomino onde inka?”" 
Genesis43:7 Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Omonto oria nigo atounetie mono amanye amang’ana aito na ay’eamate yaito, agatoboria: Iso moyo are? Mokare nonde omino? Na intwe tokamoiraneria buna atoboretie. Inee! Ntwamanyete aya agochia gokwana ng’a: Gachie morente oyomino?”" 
Genesis43:8 Yuda agatebia Israeli ise, “Mong’e omosae oyo agende amo nainche, erio toimoke togende aroro, erinde egere tobe moyo, titokwa, intwe, naye, amo nabana baito abake." 
Genesis43:9 Nerure imbe intenenera asare: korwa ase okoboko kwane oche komonsaba. Onye tinkomoirania gocha asore, rirorio ontige mbogorie okomocha okwo amatuko onsi ase obosio bwao." 
Genesis43:10 Onye totatebanire nanga twairanire chintunda ibere.” 
Genesis43:11 Israeli ise akabatebia, “Onye naboigo are, bono mokore iga: Mobeke ebinto ebiya bi’ense eye yaito ase chigunia chiaino, moirere omonto oyio buna ebiegwa. Momoirere amaguta okogwenia make, na obooke boke, na ubani, na manemane, na amajozi, na amalozi." 
Genesis43:12 Mobogorie chibesa ara kabere ase amaboko aino, moirane chibesa chiria chiairanetigwe, echio chiabegetwe igoro y’endagera ase chigunia chiaino ime. Aande nigo chiebetwe chikabekwao." 
Genesis43:13 Moire na oyomino, mogende komo, mogende ase omonto oria naende." 
Genesis43:14 Nyasae Omobui abae ogwancherwa ase obosio bw’omonto oyio, erio abasiborere oria omino onde, erinde moirane nere amo na Benjamin. Onye inche ekongwenera nsirerwe nabana baane, tiga abe bo.”" 
Genesis43:15 Ase igo abanto abwo bakaimokia ebiegwa, bakaimokia ne chibesa ara kabere; amo na Benjamin bakagenda, bagatirimboka gochia Misiri, bagachia bagatenena ase obosio bwa Yusufu." 
Genesis43:16 Ekero Yusufu aroche Benjamin ore amo nabarabwo agatebia omoteneneri bw’enka yaye, “Barente abanto abwo nyomba, na onyenye emori, oyeroisie, ekiagera abanto abwo nigo bagocha koragera amo nainche endagera ya mobaso.”" 
Genesis43:17 Omonto oria agakora buna Yusufu amotebetie, agasoyia abanto abwo nyomba ime." 
Genesis43:18 Korende abanto aba bakaondoka, ekiagera bairetwe nyomba mwa Yusufu, bakabora, “Nigo twarentirwe nyomba ime ase engencho ye chibesa chiria chiabegetwe ase chigunia chiaito engaki eria entang’ani. Na bono nigo ararigie gotosoera, na atoimokere, atobwate, atokore tobe abasomba baye, aire ne chitigere chiaito.”" 
Genesis43:19 Ase igo bakamoika ang’e omoteneneri oria bw’enka ya Yusufu, bakaba bagokwana nere gesieri ki’enyomba," 
Genesis43:20 bakamotebia, “Koranche omonene, otoigwe! Engaki eria entang’ani twachete aiga kogora endagera," 
Genesis43:21 ekero twairanete gochia seito, gotwaikire ase twararete botuko, togachia gosansora chigunia chiaito, tokanyora kera omonto chibesa chiaye nao chire igoro y’endagera ase egunia yaye ime, chibesa chionsi pi. Bono chibesa echi chionsi ntwachirentana, naa tochibwate amo naintwe." 
Genesis43:22 Naende ntwarentana chibesa chinde, echi togocha kogora endagera. Titomanyeti gose ning’o ochibegete ase chigunia chiaito ime.”" 
Genesis43:23 Akabairaneria “Timoka, motoerere, timoondoka; Nyasae oino, oyore Nyasae o iso, nere obaete enibo eye ase chigunia chiaino; chibesa chiaino inachinyorete.” Erio akarenta Simeoni asebare." 
Genesis43:24 Omonto oria akaira abanto baria nyomba mwa Yusufu, akabaa amache bagesibia amagoro abo, akaa ne chitigere chiabo endagera." 
Genesis43:25 Barabwo bakabeka ebiegwa biabo ang’e, baganye Yusufu kagocha mobaso, ekiagera konya baigure ng’a nao bagocha koragerera endagera ya mobaso." 
Genesis43:26 Na ekero Yusufu achete nyomba ime bakamoirera ebiegwa biria barentete, bagatung’ama inse ase obosio bwaye." 
Genesis43:27 Akabakwania, akababoria, “Inee! Iso mbuya are, omogaaka oria mwantebia? Moyo are?”" 
Genesis43:28 Bakamoiraneria, “Ee, omosomba oo tata mbuya are. Nabo moyo are.” Barabwo bagatureka emetwe yabo inse." 
Genesis43:29 Yusufu agachia koimokia amaiso aye, akarora Benjamin omwabo, omwana omwabo baruete enda eyemo nere, akababoria, “Oyo nere oria omoke omino, oria mwantebia?” Akaonchokera Benjamin, akamotebia, “Nyasae akoe obuya, omwana one!”" 
Genesis43:30 Erio Yusufu akaimoka, agasoa enyomba ende, ekiagera enkoro yaye nigo yare namaiga ase omwana omwabo, aroro ase enyomba eyio akarera amariga." 
Genesis43:31 Erio agesibia obosio, agasoka oremereretie. Naende akabora, “Renta endagera!”" 
Genesis43:32 Bakamobekera endagera bweka ao, na abamwabo boka ao, na Abamisiri baria konya bakoragera komo boka ao, ekiagera Abamisiri nigo bagechete Abaibirania, tibari koria amo nabarabwo." 
Genesis43:33 Abamwabo Yusufu bagaikaransigwa ase obosio bwaye, bakaroberigwa gochakera ase oria omonene kogenderera goika ase oria omoke. Bonsi kobaikaransire, bakarigererania, bagakumia." 
Genesis43:34 Bakaegwa endagera korwa ase emesa ya Yusufu, korende Benjamin ere akarenterwa enyinge kobua abwo bande, ebirengo bitano. Naboigo bakanywa, bakagoka amo nere." 
Genesis44:1 Erio Yusufu agachika omoteneneri bw’enka yaye, “Ichoria chigunia chi’abanto aba endagera, koreng’ana buna baranyare kobogoria, obeke ne chibesa chia kera omonto igoro y’endagera ase egunia yaye ime." 
Genesis44:2 Obeke na egekombe kiane keria kiaroisetigwe korwa ase chifeta, okebeke ime ase egunia y’omomura oria omoke kegima, amo ne chibesa chiria achete nachio kogora endagera.” Ere agakora buna Yusufu amotebetie." 
Genesis44:3 Bogachia gokia mambia abanto baria bakaegwa ribaga baimokie chitigere chiabo, bagende sobo." 
Genesis44:4 Ekero bagendire egeka geke korwa ase omochie, Yusufu agatebia omoteneneri bw’enka yaye. “Imoka, obwatie abanto baria! Ekero orabanyore obaborie: Nase ki mogoakana amabe ase amaya?" 
Genesis44:5 Inee! Egekombe eke mwaibete, tai kerokio omonene one akonywera? Naende nakio agokorera oboringoria. Mwakorire bobe ase ogokora iga.”" 
Genesis44:6 Ekero abaikerete agakwana nabarabwo amang’ana aria aria. 
Genesis44:7 Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Naki aye, omonene oito, ogokwana amang’ana buna ayio?" 
Genesis44:8 Taibo, intwe abasomba bao titware gokora bo. Inee! Chibesa chiria twanyorete igoro y’endagera ase chigunia chiaito ime, titwagochiiraneria naende korwa ase ense ya Kanani? Naki tware gokora toibe efeta gose etahabu korwa ase enyomba y’omonene oo?" 
Genesis44:9 Oyoranyorekane ore negekombe ekio ase egati yaito intwe abasomba bao, oyio akwe, naintwe boigo rirorio tobe abasomba bao, omonene oito.”" 
Genesis44:10 Akabora, “Tiga abe buna mwateba, omonto oranyorekane okebwate nigo arabe omosomba one, korende inwe abande inamobe motari na komocha.”" 
Genesis44:11 Erio bagakora bwango, bagaikia kera omonto egunia yaye inse, na koyesansora." 
Genesis44:12 Na omosomba oria agachaka koriga‐rigia, agachakera ase omomura omonene, agachia gokoorera ase omoke, na egekombe gekanyorekana ase egunia ya Benjamin." 
Genesis44:13 Erio bonsi bagatandora chianga chiabo; kera omonto akabekera etigere yaye egurube, bakairana gochia ase omochie." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda na abamwabo, ekero bairanete ase omochie, bakanyora Yusufu nao are nyomba, barabwo bagatung’ama inse bakaumama, ase obosio bwaye." 
Genesis44:15 Yusufu akababoria, “Ing’ana ki eri mwakorire? Timomanyeti ng’a omonto buna inche nigo ndanyare gokora oboringoria imanye?”" 
Genesis44:16 Yudaakairaneria, “Ninkitogoteba asore, omonene oito? Ninki togokwana? Gose inatonyare kweenekia ng’a nabaronge tore? Nyasae ororire ebibe biaito intwe abasomba bao; na bono, omonene oito, intwe amo nere, oyo egekombe kianyorekana ase okoboko kwaye, tiga tobe abasomba bao.”" 
Genesis44:17 Yusufu akabora, “Yaya, taibo; tingokora bo. Omonto oyo bweka egekombe kianyorekana koboko kwaye, nere orabe omosomba one, korende inwe abande, genda nomorembe seino ase iso.”" 
Genesis44:18 Erio Yuda akamoika ang’e, akamotebia, “Koranche, omonene one, ong’e inche, omosomba oo, ribaga ngotebie ring’ana erimo. Tobaisa kombea inche, omosomba oo, naki aye nigo ore buna Farao." 
Genesis44:19 Aye omonene one, nigo gwatoboretie intwe abasomba bao: Inee! Mokare na iso gose onde omino?" 
Genesis44:20 Intwe togakoiraneria aye, omonene one: Ee, ntokare na tata, ere ogotire, nakabwate omwana omomura bw’obogotu bwaye, korende momura omwabo nakwete, oyo nere otigarete bweka ase ng’ina, na ise nigo amwanchete mono." 
Genesis44:21 Erio ogatotebia intwe, abasomba bao: Gachie momondetere, ache aa imorore." 
Genesis44:22 Na intwe togakoiraneria aye, omonene one, ng’a omosae oyo takonyara gotiga ise; aise komotiga, ise nigo arakwe." 
Genesis44:23 Naye ogatotebia intwe abasomba bao: Momura omino omoke atatirimbogeti amo nainwe, timogocha ase obosio bwane naende." 
Genesis44:24 “Ekero twairanete ase tata, omosomba oo, tokamotebia amang’ana ao, omonene one." 
Genesis44:25 Na ekero tata atotebetie ng’a toirane tomogorere endagera inke," 
Genesis44:26 tokamoiraneria: Titokonyara gotirimboka gochia ase obosio bw’omonto oria, oyominto omoke atari amo naintwe, korende onye oyominto ogotirimboka amo naintwe, rirorio natogende." 
Genesis44:27 Erio omosomba oo tata agatotebia: Momanyete ng’a omokungu one nigo anyiborerete abana abamura babere boka. 
Genesis44:28 Oyomo nigo ansirerete, na inche ngateba: Tekomocha koba ng’a neching’iti chi’orosana chiamoitete, tinana komorora goika rero iga." 
Genesis44:29 Onye mokoirana oyo nere korwa asende, na amabe achie komonyora, rirorio nigo moragere inkwe ngende ase oboina ne chimbuche chiane, inde nomoichano." 
Genesis44:30 “Na bono kondagende inka ase tata, omosomba oo, ntaireti omosae oyo amo naintwe, oyo tata nigo amwanchete mono, takorora buya." 
Genesis44:31 Ekero ararore ng’a omosae oyo taiyo, nigo arakwe, na intwe, abasomba bao, nigo toragere agende ase oboina ne chimbuche chiaye, ore nomoichano." 
Genesis44:32 Naki inche, omosomba oo, nigo nebegete nkaba intenenera ase omosae oyo ase tata, nkamotebia: Ntamoiraneti asore, nigo ndabe omomochi asore ase obogima bwane bwonsi." 
Genesis44:33 Na bono, omonene one, nagosoroire, ntige imbe omosomba oo ribaga ri’ omosae oyo; ere omotige agende amo nabamwabo inka." 
Genesis44:34 Naki ndakore ing’irane ase tata, omosae oyo atari amo nainche? Tinkoremereria korora emechando enga buna eyio ekomonyora tata.”" 
Genesis45:1 Agwo Yusufu agasinywa gotanga okweigwa kwaye, ase obosio bw’abanto bonsi abateneine ang’e nere, agaaka eriogi, akabora, “Barusie aa bonsi ase obosio bwane!” Ase igo monto onde tarengeo ase obosio bwa Yusufu ekero emanyekanetie ase abamwabo," 
Genesis45:2 korende ekero aagete eriogi ase okorera, Abamisiri amo nabanto b’enka ya Farao bakamoigwa." 
Genesis45:3 Yusufu agatebia bamura bamwabo, “Ninche Yusufu. Tata moyo are?” Korende bamura bamwabo tibanyara komoiraneria, ekiagera basoetwe nobwoba obonene." 
Genesis45:4 Erio Yusufu agatebia bamura bamwabo, “Inchuo asende ang’e!” Barabwo bakamoika ang’e. Naende akabatebia, “Ninche Yusufu omino, oyo mwaoonetie gocha aa Misiri." 
Genesis45:5 Korende timoichana, gose timwechanda ase emioyo yaino, ekiagera mwang’oonetie gocha aa. Naki Nyasae nere ontomete mbatang’anere gocha aa, erinde ntoorie obogima bw’abanto." 
Genesis45:6 Omwaka oyo noyo o kabere enchara ere ase ense, naende netigarete emiaka etano abanto batareme gose kogesa." 
Genesis45:7 Nyasae nigo antomete mbatang’anere inwe, erinde motigare ase ense, na koba moyo ase ogotooreka kw’abange." 
Genesis45:8 Ase igo, tari inwe mwantomete gocha aa, korende Nyasae omonyene. Nere ombegete imbe ise Farao, na omonene ase enka yaye yonsi, na omogambi ase ense yonsi ya Misiri." 
Genesis45:9 “Ayerera bwango, moirane gochia ase tata, momotebie iga: Aya naro omwana oo Yusufu agoteba: Nyasae ombekire koba omonene ase ense yonsi ya Misiri; tirimboka gocha asende, totebana." 
Genesis45:10 Aye nigo oramenye ase ensemo ya Goseni, nigo oramenye ang’e nainche, aye amo nabana bao, na abachokoro bao." 
Genesis45:11 Agwo inche ninkoragerie, erinde tobaisa gocha gosoa ase okoremerwa, aye amo nabanto bao, na bionsi ebi ore nabio, ekiagera emiaka etano y’enchara netigarete." 
Genesis45:12 “Na bono imoroche namaiso aino, na Benjamin boigo naroche namaiso aye, ng’a ninche omonyene ngokwana nainwe." 
Genesis45:13 Motebie tata obonene bwonsi mbwate aiga Misiri, na binde bionsi mwarorire. Mokore bwango, momorente gocha aa.”" 
Genesis45:14 Erio akaboania Benjamin rigoti, akarera; Benjamin nere akarera kamoboanetie rigoti riaye." 
Genesis45:15 Yusufu akanyunyunta abamwabo bonsi, akarera asebare. Na nyuma y’ayio abamwabo bakagosoria nere." 
Genesis45:16 Ekero chinkuma chiaigwetwe ase enka ya Farao ng’a abamwabo Yusufu bachire, amang’ana ayio akagwenera Farao amo nabasomba baye bonsi." 
Genesis45:17 Farao agatebia Yusufu, “Batebie abamino iga: Berekia ching’iti chiaino chigurube, moimoke mogende ase ense yaino ya Kanani," 
Genesis45:18 Morente iso na abanto b’enka yaye bache asende. Inche nimbae ebire ebiya bi’ense ya Misiri, na inwe namorie obonoru bw’ense eye." 
Genesis45:19 Naende goika obatebie iga, Ira chigari korwa aa Misiri, ase okobogoreria abana baino abake, na abakungu baino, mobogorerie na iso, moche nabarabwo." 
Genesis45:20 Timochandekera ebinto biaino, ebi moratige nyuma, ekiagera bionsi ebire ebiya mono ase ense ya Misiri nebiaino.”" 
Genesis45:21 Erio basinto ba Israeli bagakora buna batebetigwe, na Yusufu akabaa chigari buna Farao achigete, amo nendagera bagochia koria inchera." 
Genesis45:22 Akaa kera oyomo eanga agochia koonchoreria, korende Benjamin ere akamoa chisekeli chie chifeta amagana atato amo ne chianga isano, echi agochia koonchoreria." 
Genesis45:23 Agatomera na ise chitigere ikomi chiabogoretie ebinto ebiya mono bia Misiri, ne chitigere chinkungu chiabogoretie endagera, na emegati, na endagera ende agochia koria inchera." 
Genesis45:24 Erio agatigana nabamwabo bagende sobo, akabatebia, “Timobaisa kwomana inchera!”" 
Genesis45:25 Barabwo bakarua Misiri, bagaika ense ya Kanani ase Yakobo ise." 
Genesis45:26 Agwo bakamanyia ise amang’ana ng’a Yusufu moyo are, naende nere omogambi ase ense yonsi ya Misiri. Yakobo agachia koyaigwa, akagoyaana ase omoyo oye, tanyara kwegena amang’ana abo." 
Genesis45:27 Korende bakamotebia amang’ana onsi Yusufu abatebetie. Ere agachia korora chigari chiria Yusufu amotomerete chigocha komoimokia, omoyo oye okaba nobogima oboyia." 
Genesis45:28 Israeli akabora, “Ayio aisanire. Yusufu, omwana one, moyo are. Nigo ndagende komorora ritang’ani ntarakwa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Ase igo Israeli akaimoka, akagenda, akaira ebinto bionsi ebi abwate, agaika Beeri‐Seba, akaruera Nyasae o Isaka ise ekeng’wanso." 
Genesis46:2 Nyasae akarangeria Israeli ase okorora ekero kia botuko, akabora, “Yakobo! Yakobo!” Ere agaitaba, “Nao inde aa.”" 
Genesis46:3 Erio akamotebia, “Inche ninche Nyasae, Nyasae o iso; tobaisa kwoboa gotirimboka gochia Misiri, ekiagera ningokore obe egesaku ekenene aroro." 
Genesis46:4 Inche nintirimboke amo naye goika Misiri, naende tinkomocha gokoirania; na Yusufu nabe okoirania amaiso ao kogwakure.”" 
Genesis46:5 Erio Yakobo akaimoka korwa Beeri‐Seba, akagenda. Basinto ba Israeli bakabogoria Yakobo ise, amo nabana babo abake, na abakungu babo ase chigari chiria Farao abatomerete chibabogorie." 
Genesis46:6 Bakaira chitugo chiabo ne chinibo chiabo echi baniberete ase ense ya Kanani. Nabo bagaika Misiri, Yakobo na oroiboro rwaye rwonsi amo nere," 
Genesis46:7 abana baye abamura na abamura babo; na abana baye abaiseke, na abaiseke b’abamura babo. Naboigo akaira oroiboro rwaye rwonsi, akagenda nabarabwo goika Misiri." 
Genesis46:8 Aya naro amarieta Abaisraeli abwo bagendete Misiri: Yakobo na abana baye, nabwo aba: Reuben, nere omotangi o Yakobo." 
Genesis46:9 Abana abamura ba Reuben nabwo aba: Hanoki, na Palu, na Hezironi, na Karimi." 
Genesis46:10 Na abana abamura ba Simeoni nabwo aba: Yemueli, na Yamini, na Ohadi, na Yakini, na Sohari, na Sauli, omwana bw’omokungu Omokanani." 
Genesis46:11 Na abana abamura ba Lawi nabwo aba: Gerisoni, na Kohati, na Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Na abana abamura ba Yuda nabwo aba: Eri, na Onani, na Sela, na Peresu, na Zera; korende Eri na Onani bagakwera ase ense ya Kanani. Na abana ba Peresu nabwo Hezironi na Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Na abana abamura ba Isakaru nabwo aba: Tola, na Pua, na Yobu, na Simuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Na abana abamura ba Sabuloni nabwo aba: Seredi na Eloni, na Yaleeli." 
Genesis46:15 Aba nabwo abana abamura Lea aiborerete Yakobo agwo Padan‐Aramu. Na omoiseke oyomo aiborete, nere Dina. Abana baye bonsi amo nabachokoro, abamura na abaiseke, nigo barenge emerongo etato na batato." 
Genesis46:16 Abana abamura ba Gadi nabwo aba: Sifioni, na Hagi, na Suni, na Esiboni, na Eri, na Arodi, na Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Na abana abamura b’Aseri nabwo aba: Imuna, na Isiva, na Isivi, na Beria, na omoiseke omwabo nere Sera. Na abamura ba Beria nabwo Heberi na Malikieli." 
Genesis46:18 Aba nabwo abamura na abachokoro ba Silpa, oyio Labani aete Lea, omwana oye omosubati. Abwo Silpa aiborerete Yakobo, abanto ikomi na batano nomo." 
Genesis46:19 Abana abamura ba Raeli, moka Yakobo, nabwo Yusufu na Benjamin." 
Genesis46:20 Yusufu akaiborerwa Manase na Efraimu, ase ense ya Misiri. Asenati, mosubati o Potifera, omokuani bw’Oni, akamoiborera abana abwo abamura." 
Genesis46:21 Na abana abamura ba Benjamin nabwo aba: Bela, na Bekeri, na Asibeli, na Gera, na Naamani, na Eki, na Roshi, na Mupimu, na Hupimu, na Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Aba nabwo abamura na abachokoro Raeli aiborerete Yakobo, abanto ikomi na bane." 
Genesis46:23 Omwana omomura o Dani nere Husimu. 
Genesis46:24 Na abana abamura ba Nafutali nabwo aba: Yaseeli, na Guni, na Yaseri, na Silemu." 
Genesis46:25 Aba nabwo abamura na abachokoro abamura Bilia aiborerete Yakobo, abanto batano na babere." 
Genesis46:26 Abanto bonsi abagendete amo na Yakobo ase ense ya Misiri, abwo baiboretwe korwa asare, nigo barenge emerongo etano nomo, na batano nomo. Abakungu b’abana abamura ba Yakobo, barabwo tibabariri." 
Genesis46:27 Na abana abamura ba Yusufu, abaiboreretwe agwo Misiri, mbabere barenge. Abanto bonsi ba Yakobo abasoete Misiri nigo barenge emerongo etano na ebere." 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo agatoma Yuda amotang’anere kogenda ase Yusufu, erinde aoroke ase obosio bwaye agwo Goseni, Naboigo bagaika ase ensemo ya Goseni." 
Genesis46:29 Erio Yusufu akabeka egari yaye ang’e, akayeriina, akagenda korotota Israeli aria Goseni. Ekero achia goika asare akamoboania rigoti riaye engaki etari nke." 
Genesis46:30 Israeli agatebia Yusufu, “Bono tiga inkwe, ekiagera nakororire obosio bwao, naende narorire ng’a moyo ore.”" 
Genesis46:31 Yusufu agatebia abamwabo na abanto b’enka ya ise, “Nkogenda inde ase Farao imotebie: Abaminto na abanto b’enka ya tata, aba barenge ase ense ya Kanani, bachire asende." 
Genesis46:32 Na abanto abwo nabatugi be chitugo, na bono barentire chitugo chiabo, ching’ondi ne chiombe, na binde bionsi bare nabio." 
Genesis46:33 Bono, Farao karabarangerie na kobaboria meremo ki monarete gokora," 
Genesis46:34 nigo moramoiranerie: Intwe abasomba bao nigo tore abatugi be chitugo korwa obwana bwaito goika rero; buna tore igo, nabo ne chisokoro chiaito chiarenge. Na igo namonyore ribaga komenya ase ensemo ya Goseni, ekiagera kera omorisia bwe chitugo nigo are okogechia ase Abamisiri.”" 
Genesis47:1 Erio Yusufu akagenda agatebia Farao, “Tata na bamura baminto bachire korwa ase ense ya Kanani, amo ne chitugo chiabo, ching’ondi ne chiombe, na binde bionsi bare nabio; barabwo nao bare ase ensemo ya Goseni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Agachora abamwambo batano, akabaira ase obosio bwa Farao." 
Genesis47:3 Farao akababoria, “Emeremo yaino nereri?” Bakamoiraneria, “Intwe abasomba bao nigo tore abarisia be chitugo, buna nechisokoro chiaito chiarenge.”" 
Genesis47:4 Naende bakamotebia, “Nigo twachire tobe abamenyi b’ense eye, ekiagera intwe, abasomba bao, titori naase tokorisia amaicho aito, ekiagera enchara nenene mono ase ense ya Kanani. Ase igo koranche otoe intwe, abasomba bao, ribaga tomenye ase ensemo ya Goseni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Erio Farao agakwana na Yusufu, akamotebia, “Narorire ng’a iso na abamino bagocheire." 
Genesis47:6 Bono ense ya Misiri nigo ere ase obosio bwao; bae iso na bamura bamino ribaga bamenye aase are aagiya. Tiga bamenye ase ensemo ya Goseni, naende onye komanyete bande ase egati yabo abamanyete mono emeremo y’obotugi, obabeke babe abateneneri ase chitugo chiane.”" 
Genesis47:7 Erio Yusufu akarenta Yakobo ise, akamoira ase obosio bwa Farao; na Yakobo agasesenia Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Farao akaboria Yakobo, “Inee! Emiaka yao nerenga?”" 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo akamoiraneria, “Emiaka yane nakoorire ase ense eye nerigana erimo, na emerongo etato (130). Ase obogima bwane nigo nabeire nobokong’u, naende emiaka yane nemeke, teikereti eye chisokoro chiane bakoorete ase obogima bwabo.”" 
Genesis47:10 Yakobo agasesenia Farao naende, akarua ase obosio bwaye." 
Genesis47:11 Yusufu akaa ise amo na bamura bamwabo aase bakomenya, akabaa Ramesesi, orogongo oruya, ensemo engiya mono y’ense eria, buna Farao achigete." 
Genesis47:12 Nere Yusufu akaba okorenda ise amo nabamwabo bonsi, akabaa endagera buna kera omonto abwate abanto baye bang’ana." 
Genesis47:13 Bono ase ense yonsi endagera tiyarengeo; na enchara nigo yarenge endito mono, konya yanyarire abanto ba Misiri na aba Kanani." 
Genesis47:14 Yusufu agasangereria chibesa chionsi echianyorekanete korwa ase ense ya Misiri na eya Kanani ase okooneria abanto endagera, agachibeka ase ekungo ya Farao." 
Genesis47:15 Ekero chibesa chionsi chiaerire ase ense ya Misiri na ase ense ya Kanani, Abamisiri bagachiera Yusufu, bakamosaba, “Toe endagera, titobaisa gokwera ase obosio bwao, ekiagera chibesa chiaito chiaerire.”" 
Genesis47:16 Yusufu akabairaneria, “Onye chibesa chiaino chiaerire, ndetera chitugo chiaino, na inche mbae endagera morie.”" 
Genesis47:17 Erio bakarentera Yusufu chitugo chiabo, na Yusufu akabaa endagera. Bakarentera Yusufu chibarasi chiabo, ne ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chitigere. Igo akaba okobarenda na kobaa endagera ase omwaka oyio oyomo, na barabwo bakamoa chitugo chiabo." 
Genesis47:18 Omwaka oria oyomo okaera. Naende omwaka o kabere bakamochiera, bakamotebia, “Titokonyara gokobisa, omonene oito, ng’a chibesa chiaito chiaerire, ne chitugo chiaito chiabeire echiao. Titotigareti gento kende togokoa, omonene oito, otatiga emebere yaito na amaremo aito." 
Genesis47:19 Nase ki torakwere ase obosio bwao, na amaremo aito asareke? Togore intwe, ogore na amaremo aito, na intwe tobe abasomba ba Farao, na amaremo aito abe ayaye. Toe chimbusuro tosimeke, titokwa, na amaremo aito abe bosa.”" 
Genesis47:20 Erio Yusufu akagorera Farao amaremo onsi arenge Misiri, naki Abamisiri nigo baoonetie kera omonto oboremo bwaye, ekiagera enchara yarenge endito mono. Naboigo ense ekaba eya Farao." 
Genesis47:21 Farao akang’anyia abanto abwo bamenye ase emechie, babe abasomba baye, bakore emeremo korwa ensemo eyemo ya Misiri goika eyende." 
Genesis47:22 Korende Yusufu tagorete amaremo ’abakuani, ekiagera abwo konya bachikeirwe endagera baare konyora korwa ase Farao, nero baare koria. Ase igo tibagwenerete koonia amaremo abo." 
Genesis47:23 Yusufu agatebia abanto, “Igwa! Rero nabagorire inwe amo namaremo aino, mobe enibo ya Farao. Bwata chimbusuro chiaino echi, chiire mochisimeke ase emegondo." 
Genesis47:24 Engaki ye rigesa moruserie Farao ensemo ya isano. Chinsemo inye chintigari inachibe echiaino ase chimbusuro na endagera yaino inwe abanyene, na ey’abare ase chinka chiaino, na ey’abana baino.”" 
Genesis47:25 Abanto abwo bakamoiraneria, “Gwatooririe obogima bwaito. Onye twanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, omonene oito, tiga tobe abasomba ba Farao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Yusufu akabeka ogochika ase ense ya Misiri, ng’a ensemo ya isano ebe eya Farao; na ogochika okwo ngokora kore emeremo nonya ngoika bono. Korende amaremo ’abakuani oka naro atabete aya Farao." 
Genesis47:27 Israeli na abana baye bakaba bakomenya ase ense ya Misiri, ensemo ya Goseni, bakayeira ekaba eyabo, bakamenteka na kobucha mono." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo akamenya ase ense ya Misiri emiaka ikomi, na etano na ebere. Ase igo agakoora emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo ene, na etano na ebere (147) ase obogima bwaye." 
Genesis47:29 Ekero engaki y’ogokwa gwa Israeli yabete ang’e, ere akarangeria Yusufu, omwana oye, akamotebia, “Onye nkonyora ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, beka okoboko kwao inse y’ekebono kiane, na ondiere eira, ng’a nonkorere amabera na obwanchani. Tontindeka aa ase ense ya Misiri," 
Genesis47:30 korende ekero ndakwe, tiga ndare ne chisokoro chiane. Ombogorie korwa aa Misiri, ontindeke aase barabwo batindegetwe.” Yusufu akamoiraneria, “Ninkore buna gwantebirie.”" 
Genesis47:31 Korende Israeli akamotebia, “Tiana ng’a nonkorere bo.” Ere agatiana. Erio Israeli agetureka ase ogotoorera omotwe borere bwaye." 
Genesis48:1 Ekaba engaki nyuma y’ayio Yusufu agatebigwa ng’a, “Iso nomorwaire.” Erio akaimokia abana baye babere abamura, Manase na Efraimu, bakagenda komorora." 
Genesis48:2 Yakobo nere agatebigwa ng’a, “Yusufu, omwana oo, ngocha are gokorora.” Erio Israeli agekomereria, akaboka, agaikaransa borere igoro." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobo agatebia Yusufu, “Nyasae Omobui nang’orokerete aaria Lusu ase ense ya Kanani, agansesenia," 
Genesis48:4 agantebia: Inche ninkomente, na oroiboro rwao robuche goika robe emeganda y’ebisaku. Ning’ee ororeria rwao rorache korwa nyuma yao ense eye ebe omwando obo kare na kare." 
Genesis48:5 “Bono abana bao abamura babere kwaiborerete ase ense ya Misiri ritang’ani ntaracha aa, barabwo nabaane bararokwe. Efraimu na Manase nigo barabe abaane, buna Reuben na Simeoni bare abaane." 
Genesis48:6 Abana bao bande baiboire nyuma y’aba, barabwo nabao barabe; korende nigo baratorwe ase amarieta ’abamwabo, na komenya ase omwando obo." 
Genesis48:7 Ekero nare korwa Padan‐Aramu, Raeli nyoko agankwera inchera gonkogenda Kanani, ritang’ani ntaraika Efarati. Nkamotindeka agwo enchera ekogenda Efarati, nao Bethlehemu.”" 
Genesis48:8 Israeli, ekero aroche abana ba Yusufu, akamoboria, “Aba mbarabi?”" 
Genesis48:9 Yusufu akamoiraneria, “Aba nabana baane Nyasae ang’erete aiga.” Erio Israeli akamotebia, “Bandetere aiga asende, mbasesenie.”" 
Genesis48:10 Bono amaiso a Israeli konya abeire chinchingori ase engencho y’obogotu, tare korora buya. Igo Yusufu akamorentera abana abwo, na ere akabanyunyunta na kobaboania." 
Genesis48:11 Erio Israeli agatebia Yusufu, “Tinasemeretie ng’a kaa ninche korora obosio bwao naende, na bono Nyasae onyancheire narorire abana bao nabarabwo,”" 
Genesis48:12 Yusufu akarusia abana korwa ase amagoro a ise, agatung’ama inse." 
Genesis48:13 Erio Yusufu akabwata bonsi babere, Efraimu ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, akamobeka ensemo y’okobee ya Israeli, na Manase akamobwata ase okoboko kwaye gw’okobee, akamobeka ensemo y’okorio ya Israeli." 
Genesis48:14 Israeli akarambora okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, agakobeka igoro ase omotwe o Efraimu, nonya ere orenge omoke; agakorekania amaboko aye na kobeka okoboko kwaye gw’okobee igoro ase omotwe o Manase, nere orenge omotangi." 
Genesis48:15 Erio agasesenia Yusufu, akabora, “Nyasae o sokoro yane Ibrahimu na o Isaka tata, oyio baare gotaara ase obosio bwaye; Nyasae oyo nere ondisirie ase obogima bwane bwonsi goika rero," 
Genesis48:16 omomalaika oria ontooretie korwa ase amabe onsi, asesenie abamura aba. Abana aba babe bagwatorwa ase erieta riane, na ase erieta ria sokoro yane Ibrahimu, na eria Isaka tata; tiga bakine babe abanto abange ase ense.”" 
Genesis48:17 Yusufu agachia korora ng’a ise obekire okoboko kwaye gw’okorio igoro ase omotwe o Efraimu, ayio tayancha. Akabwata okoboko gwa ise akorusie korwa ase omotwe o Efraimu, erio akobeke ase oyo o Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Yusufu agatebia ise, “Taibo, tata, naki oyo nere omotangi; beka okoboko kwao gw’okorio ase omotwe oye.”" 
Genesis48:19 Korende ise akaanga, akabora, “Nimanyete, omwana one, nimanyete. Nere boigo nabe egesaku; ere boigo nabe omonene, korende oyomwabo omoke nabe omonene komobua, na oroiboro rwaye narobe egesaku kiabo ao boka.”" 
Genesis48:20 Rituko erio akabasesenia, akabora, “Ekero ogosesenigwa kogokwanwa ase Abaisraeli, abanto baatore amarieta aino na goteba: Nyasae abakore mobe buna Efraimu na Manase.” Agwo agwo agatang’ania Efraimu ase obosio bwa Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Erio Israeli agatebia Yusufu, “Rora ng’ang’e inde gokwa. Nyasae nigo arabe amo nainwe, nabairanie gochia ase ense ye chisokoro chiaino." 
Genesis48:22 Inche nakomentire ensemo y’ekenyoro ekeao kobua abamino. Eyio naurete Abaamori nomoro one, na obota bwane.”" 
Genesis49:1 Erio Yakobo akarangeria abamura baye, akabatebia, “Sangererekana asende aa, mbatebie amang’ana arabanyore ase amatuko agochi‐gocha.”" 
Genesis49:2 “Inchuo montegerere, inwe abana ba Yakobo; montegerere inche Israeli iso." 
Genesis49:3 “Reuben, aye nomwana one omotangi, aye nokobua kwane, na ogotongora gwe chinguru chiane. Noetanetie abamino ase okobua, nobaetanetie ase chinguru." 
Genesis49:4 Aye nkwaberete buna amache; korende togoetania abande, ekiagera nkwararete na moga iso, ase igo okarenta obosooku." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeoni na Lawi naba ng’ina omo, ebirwanero biabo nebi’obotindi." 
Genesis49:6 Omoyo one tosoa ase obobisi bwabo, gose enkoro yane tesanga ase omosangererekano obo; naki ase endamwamu yabo mbaitete abanto, na ase obomwenu bwabo bakanacha chinteng’e chie chintang’ana." 
Genesis49:7 Endamwamu yabo eragererigwe, ekiagera nigo yarenge entindi, na ekeririanda kiabo, ekiagera tikiarenge namabera. Nimbaatanane ase abana ba Yakobo, nimbasiarere ase abana ba Israeli." 
Genesis49:8 “Aye Yuda, abamino inabagotogie; okoboko kwao inakobwate ebigoti bi’ababisa bao; abamura ba iso inabagosike." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda, aye nendo ensae. Omwana one, gokorwa gotwara, nigo oratiire, na korara, na gotimoka buna endo, buna endo eaberi—ning’o orabe noboremu kogotura?" 
Genesis49:10 Enyimbo y’obogambi tekorua o Yuda, gose omobeki amachiko ase ororereria rwaye, goika achiche oyo orabogorie obogambi, oyo abanto b’ebisaku bionsi baraigwere." 
Genesis49:11 Nigo arasibe etigere yaye ase omote bw’omosabibu, na emori y’etigere yaye ase chinsagia chi’omosabibu omuya. Nigo arasibie egetambaa kiaye akwambara nedivai, ne chianga chiaye namache amonyinga ’amasabibu." 
Genesis49:12 Amaiso aye nigo arabe amabariri ase okonywa edivai, na amaino aye abe amarabu ase okonywa amabeere." 
Genesis49:13 “Sabuloni nigo aramenye ase enyancha mbarabare, agwo ase chimeeri chigotenenigwa, orobebe rwaye rosinyane norw’Abasidoni." 
Genesis49:14 “Isakaru netigere ere ne chinguru, ekorara obweri bwe chitugo." 
Genesis49:15 Akarora ng’a aase agotimokera naagiya, na ense eria nero ekomogwenera. Ase igo agekumba abogorie egurube, akerua kogenderera nemeremo emekong’u." 
Genesis49:16 “Dani nagambere abanto baye, buna egesaku ekemo ki’Abaisraeli." 
Genesis49:17 Dani nabe eng’iti ekweriba inchera, ring’ere ase oboeto, rikoroma egetingiro ki’ebarasi, goika oyoyeriinete agwe masogota." 
Genesis49:18 Omonene, ninganyete ogotooreka kwao nogosemeria!" 
Genesis49:19 “Gadi namigwe nemeganda y’esegi, korende nere nabamige korwa nyuma." 
Genesis49:20 “Aseri natware endagera y’obonoru, narue endagera engiya eragwenere abaruoti." 
Genesis49:21 “Nafutali nengabi esiboire ekominyoka mono, nigo agosokia amang’ana amaya." 
Genesis49:22 “Yusufu nomote omorere okwama ang’e nensoko; chinsagia chiaye nigo chikoranda orobago igoro. 
Genesis49:23 Abaruti emegwe bakomoimokera ase okomochanda bororo, bakomoruta emegwe na komorosia," 
Genesis49:24 korende obota bwaye tibogosukigwa. Amaboko aye nigo are ne chinguru, naende namaango, goetera ase amaboko ’Omonyene Chinguru o Yakobo, oyore Omorisia na Egetare gia Israeli." 
Genesis49:25 Nyasae o iso, nere oragokonye, Nyasae Omonguru, nere oragosesenie nogosesenigwa gokorwa igoro, na ogosesenigwa gokorwa chindiba inse, na ogosesenigwa gokorwa inda na ase chimbeere." 
Genesis49:26 Ogosesenigwa gwa iso nkore ne chinguru ngoetanetie okw’ebitunwa bia kare, na obonene bw’ebigoro bia kare na kare. Ogosesenigwa okwo kobe egutwa y’omotwe o Yusufu, igoro y’egiototeri ki’oyore omogambi ase egati y’abamwabo." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamin nesese y’orosana ekoria mono, engaki ya mambia yaria ebi’obotwari bwaye, na engaki ya mogoroba bwatanana ebiasakoire.”" 
Genesis49:28 Ebi nabio ebisaku bia Israeli ikomi na bibere; naya naro ise abatebetie ekero are kobasesenia na koa kera oyomo ogosesenigwa kwaye. 
Genesis49:29 Erio Israeli akabachika, akabora, “Inche nkoirwa inde gosangererekana amo nabanto baane. Montindeke ase chisokoro chiane chiatindegetwe ase rikuruma ri’oboremo bware bw’Efuroni Omohiti," 
Genesis49:30 rikuruma eri rire ase oboremo agwo Makipela, moocha ya Mamure, ase ense ya Kanani. Oboremo boria Ibrahimu agorete korwa ase Efuroni Omohiti bobe aase ogotindeka." 
Genesis49:31 Agwo nao Ibrahimu atindegetwe ase Sara mokaye ensemo; agwo nao Isaka na Rebeka mokaye batindegetwe, na agwo inche omonyene natindegete Lea." 
Genesis49:32 Oboremo obwo amo ne rikuruma riria nigo biagoretwe korwa ase Abahiti.” 
Genesis49:33 Ekero Yakobo akoorete gochika abamura baye amang’ana aya, akaimokia amagoro aye, akayabeka borere igoro; erio agakwa agasangererekana amo nabanto baye." 
Genesis50:1 Erio Yusufu akamogwera ise obosio bwaye, akarera na komonyunyunta." 
Genesis50:2 Agachika abarwaria abaare komokorera, ng’a baake Israeli ise amariogo, tabaisa kogunda; naboigo abarwaria bamokorerete," 
Genesis50:3 goika amatuko emerongo ene agaikerana. Ase amatuko ang’ana buna ayio naro egetondo kiare goakwa amariogo. Abamisiri bakamoreera Israeli amatuko emerongo etano na ebere. 
Genesis50:4 Ekero amatuko okomoreera Israeli aerete, Yusufu agakwana nabanto b’enka ya Farao, akabora, “Onye nkonyora ogwancherwa ase amaiso aino, komoranche monteberie Farao" 
Genesis50:5 ng’a tata nandierete omwando ogoteba: Ng’ang’e inde gokwa, ong’ire ontindeke ase oboina boria naremete ase ense ya Kanani. Momonsabere ribaga ngende gotindeka tata, erio ning’irane.”" 
Genesis50:6 Farao akairaneria, “Tiira ochie gotindeka iso, buna akorierete omwando.”" 
Genesis50:7 Erio Yusufu agatiira gochia gotindeka ise. Abasomba bonsi ba Farao bakagenda amo nere, na abagaaka bonsi b’enka yaye, na abagaaka bonsi ba Misiri," 
Genesis50:8 na bonsi ab’enka ya Yusufu, amo nabamwabo, na ab’enka ya ise. Abana babo boka bagatigara Goseni amo ne ching’ondi ne chiombe chiabo." 
Genesis50:9 Naende Yusufu akaira amo nere chigari na abariini chibarasi; bakaba omoganda omonene mono. 
Genesis50:10 Ekero baigete ase ekeooreri gi’Atadi ng’umbu y’orooche rwa Yorodan, bakaba bakorera ebirero ebinene mono. Agwo Yusufu akagenderera komoreera ise ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Genesis50:11 Na Abakanani abamenyete ase ense eria, ekero bachia korora ebirero agwo Atadi ase ekeooreri, bakabora, “Ebirero ebi bi’Abamisiri nebinene mono.” Ase ayio, aase aria ng’umbu ya Yorodan akarokwa Abeli‐Misiri." 
Genesis50:12 Naboigo basinto ba Yakobo bakorete buna ise abachigete. 
Genesis50:13 Bakamoimokia, bakamoira goika ase ense ya Kanani. Erio bakamotindeka ase rikuruma riria riare, ase oboremo agwo Makipela, moocha ya Mamure, oboremo boria Ibrahimu agorete korwa ase Efuroni Omohiti abe aase aye agotindeka abakure." 
Genesis50:14 Yusufu, ekero akoorire gotindeka ise, akairana Misiri amo nabamwabo na bonsi abatiirete amo nere." 
Genesis50:15 Ekero abamwabo Yusufu baroche ng’a ise okure, bagatebania. “Aande Yusufu nigo aratorege, arusie egesiomba ase amabe aria twamokorerete.”" 
Genesis50:16 Ase ayio bagatoma abanto ase Yusufu komotebia ng’a, “Iso nigo atebete iga ritang’ani atarakwa." 
Genesis50:17 Motebie Yusufu iga: Nagosabire obaabere abamino amamocho abo na ebibe biabo bagokorerete. Nimanyete ng’a mbagokorerete bobe. Ase igo bono twagosabire, otwabere ebibe biaito, naki intwe nabasomba ba Nyasae o iso.” Yusufu akarera ekero abamwabo bamoboretie amang’ana ayio." 
Genesis50:18 Erio abamwabo bagacha, bagatung’ama inse ase obosio bwaye, bakabora, “Intwe iga nabasomba bao tore.”" 
Genesis50:19 Korende Yusufu akabatebia, “Timoiroka! Inee! Inche inde ribaga ria Nyasae?" 
Genesis50:20 Ekeene, inwe nabo mwarengereretie gonkorera amabe, korende Nyasae akayaonchora akaba amaya, na buna mwarorire rero iga, otooririe obogima bw’abanto abange." 
Genesis50:21 Gaki, bono timoiroka! Nimbaragerie inwe amo nabana baino.” Naboigo akaba okobaremia, agakwana nabarabwo amang’ana amaya." 
Genesis50:22 Yusufu akamenya Misiri, ere amo nabanto bamwabo, agakoora emiaka rigana erimo, na ikomi (110)." 
Genesis50:23 Agwo akarora abana b’Efraimu na abachokoro baye goika ekiaare kia gatato, akarora na abana ba Makiri, omwana o Manase, baiboreretwe ase Yusufu." 
Genesis50:24 Yusufu agatebia abamwabo, “Ng’ang’e inde gokwa, korende amaene Nyasae nabanyorere enchera y’okobarusia ase ense eye, abatiirie mogende ase ense eria abarierete eira na gotiana, ng’a nae Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo.”" 
Genesis50:25 Yusufu agatiania abana ba Israeli agwo, akabora, “Bono, ekero Nyasae arabachere abakonye, goika moire amauga aane; mogende naro.”" 
Genesis50:26 Erio Yusufu agakwa gakoorire emiaka rigana erimo na ikomi (110). Bakamoaka amariogo, tabaisa kogunda, bakamobeka ase esanduku ime aaria Misiri." 
Exodus1:1 Aya naro amarieta ’abamura ba Israeli abasoete Misiri amo na Yakobo ise, kera oyomo amo nabanto b’omochie oye:" 
Exodus1:2 Reuben na Simeoni, Lawi na Yuda;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakaru na Sabuloni, na Benjamin;" 
Exodus1:4 Dani na Nafutali, Gadi na Aseri." 
Exodus1:5 Abanto bonsi abaiboire korwa ase Yakobo nigo barenge emerongo etano na ebere. Yusufu ere konya nao amenyete Misiri korwa kare. 
Exodus1:6 Yusufu agakwera aroro, na bamura bamwabo bonsi, na abanto bonsi b’ekegori keria." 
Exodus1:7 Abaisraeli bagasarara na komenteka, bakaba abange mono, bakabucha kegima ase ense eria." 
Exodus1:8 Omoruoti omoyia, oyotamomanyete Yusufu, akaira obogambi bw’ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus1:9 Ere agatebia abanto baye, “Rigereria, Abaisraeli aba babeire abange kobua intwe, naende babeire ne chinguru gotobua." 
Exodus1:10 Torigie nsemi ki tokobakorera tobatange, tibabaisa komenteka. Toise gosoa esegi, barabwo mbabaise kobwatana nababisa baito batorwanie, erio bang’anye korwa ense yaito.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ase ayio bakabeka abateneneri abatindi igoro asebare babachande nemeremo emekong’u mono. Agwo Abaisraeli bakaagachera Farao emechie y’okogacha chinibo, nero Pitoni na Ramesesi." 
Exodus1:12 Korende buna Abamisiri bagendererete kobachanda mono, naboigo Abaisraeli bagendererete komenteka na gwesiarera, goika Abamisiri bakabagecha na kobairoka." 
Exodus1:13 Bagakoria Abaisraeli emeremo emekong’u 
Exodus1:14 y’ogotiringa esike na gokora amatabori, na emeremo ende ao ao ase emegondo. Ase emeremo ende yonsi Abaisraeli baare gokora nigo baare gokorigwa ase obotindi." 
Exodus1:15 Omoruoti o Misiri agachika Sifura na Pua, abaiboria b’Abaibirania, akabatebia," 
Exodus1:16 “Ekero mogosaacha abakungu b’Abaibirania kobakoibora, morigererie mwana ki oiborwa; onye nomoisia, momoite, korende onye nomoiseke, momotige abe moyo.”" 
Exodus1:17 Korende abaiboria baria nigo bamoirogete Nyasae. Tibakorete buna omoruoti o Misiri abatebetie, korende bagatiga abana abaisia babe moyo." 
Exodus1:18 Omoruoti o Misiri akarangeria abaiboria baria, akababoria, “Nase ki mwakorire iga? Mwatigire abana abaisia bare moyo.”" 
Exodus1:19 Abaiboria bakairaneria Farao, “Abakungu b’Abaibirania tibari buna aba Abamisiri; barabwo nabaango ase okoibora, nigo bakoibora ritang’ani omoiboria ataraika.”" 
Exodus1:20 Nyasae agakorera abaiboria baria amaya, na abanto bakagenderera komenteka koba abange." 
Exodus1:21 Na ekiagera abakungu baria abaiboria bamoirogete Nyasae, ere akabasesenia, na barabwo bakaibora abana abange." 
Exodus1:22 Erio Farao agachika abanto baye bonsi, akabatebia, “Kera omwana omoisia okoiborwa ase Abaibirania, momotugute ase orooche rwa Naili, korende kera omwana omoiseke momotige abe moyo.”" 
Exodus2:1 Omonto oyomo bw’enyomba ya Lawi akanyuoma omoiseke o Lawi. 
Exodus2:2 Omokungu oria akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, na ekero aroche ng’a omwana oria nomuya mono, akamobisa ase engaki y’emetienyi etato." 
Exodus2:3 Ekero aroche ng’a takonyara komobisa goetania agwo, akaimokia ekebaari ki’amauncho, agakeooma esike, erio agaaka eramu korwa isiko. Erio akaareria omwana oria ase ekebaari ime, agakebeka ase amauncho ime y’orooche rwa Naili." 
Exodus2:4 Omoiseke omwabo omwana oria agatenena aare ake amanye egekonyora omwana. 
Exodus2:5 Erio omoiseke o Farao agatirimboka gochia rooche gwesibia, na abasomba baye abaiseke bakaba bakonagotaara ase engegu. Ekero aroche ekebaari keria ase amauncho, agatoma omoiseke oyomo akerente;" 
Exodus2:6 agakemumora, akanyora omwana omoke ore imeo. Omwana oria akarera, na omoiseke o Farao akamororera amabeebe, agakwana, “Oyoiga noyomo bw’abana b’Abaibirania.”" 
Exodus2:7 Omoiseke omwabo omwana oria akaboria omoiseke o Farao, “Inee! Norigetie ngende nkorangererie omokungu oyomo bw’Abaibirania ache gokomogonkeria?”" 
Exodus2:8 Omoiseke o Farao akamoiraneria, “Ee, genda!” Erio akagenda, akarangeria ng’ina omwana oria." 
Exodus2:9 Omoiseke o Farao agatebia omokungu oria, “Moire omwana oyo, omongonkerie, na inche ninkoe eng’eria yao.” Erio omokungu oria akaira omwana, akamorera." 
Exodus2:10 Ekero omwana oria akinire, omokungu oria akamoirania ase omoiseke o Farao koba omwana oye na ere akamoroka Musa, ogoteba, “Ndooche namorusetie.”" 
Exodus2:11 Egachia koba ekero Musa abeire omonto omonene, rituko erimo akagenda gokwania Abaibirania bamwabo, akarora buna baare gokorigwa emeremo emekong’u. Agwo akarora Omomisiri ogoaka oyomo bw’Abaibirania bamwabo." 
Exodus2:12 Erio akamaga‐maga chinsemo chionsi, na ekero arora ng’a monto onde tari aande, agaita Omomisiri oria, akabisa omobere oye ase omokenye ime." 
Exodus2:13 Naende akagenda rituko ria kabere, akarora Abaibirania babere bakorwana; akamoboria oria ochegetie oyomwabo, “Nase ki ogoaka oyomino?”" 
Exodus2:14 Omonto oria akamoiraneria, “Ning’o okobegete koba omoteneneri na omogayani igoro yaito? Inee! Nigo origetie kong’ita buna gwaita Omomisiri oria?” Aya akagera Musa akoboa. Ere agateba ase omoyo oye ime, “Ndoche ng’a amang’ana aya amanyekanire.”" 
Exodus2:15 Ekero Farao achia koigwa amang’ana ayio akarigia goita Musa, korende Musa agatama korwa o Farao gochia komenya Midiani, agaika ase ensoko yare, agaikaransa aroro." 
Exodus2:16 Narengeo omokuani o Midiani obwate abaiseke batano na babere. Barabwo bagacha kobuucha amache; bagaichoria chintuba amache banyoisie riicho ria ise. 
Exodus2:17 Erio abarisia b’aroro bagacha bakabaseria, korende Musa agatenena agakonya abaiseke baria na kobanyoiseria riicho riabo." 
Exodus2:18 Ekero abaiseke baria bairanete ase Reueli ise, ere akababoria, “Nakimwakora rero mwairana bwango iga?”" 
Exodus2:19 Bakamoiraneria, “Omomisiri oyomo otokonya korwa ase abarisia baria; amo nayio otobuuchera amache na gotonyoiseria riicho riaito.”" 
Exodus2:20 Erio ise akababoria, “Ng’ai are? Naki mwakora mwatiga omonto oyio? Gachie momorangerie ache koragera amo naintwe.”" 
Exodus2:21 Musa agancha komenya bw’omonto oria na ere akaa Musa Sipora, omoiseke oye, akaba mokaye." 
Exodus2:22 Omokungu oyio akamoiborera omwana omoisia, na Musa akamoroka Gerisomu, ogoteba, “Nabeire omomenyi ase ense engeni.”" 
Exodus2:23 Nyuma y’engaki entambe koyaetire omoruoti o Misiri agakwa. Abaisraeli bakaba bakwerera inse y’obosomba obwo, bakarera bakonywe, na ekerero kiabo kegaika igoro, ase Nyasae." 
Exodus2:24 Nyasae akaigwa ekerero kiabo, akaba okoinyora okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, okwo akorete na Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo;" 
Exodus2:25 akarorera Abaisraeli amabeebe na kobechandera. 
Exodus3:1 Musa nigo arenge korisia riicho ria Yetero ise biara, omokuani o Midiani, akariraa gochia bosongo y’erooro, agaika Horebu, egetunwa kia Nyasae." 
Exodus3:2 Agwo omomalaika bw’Omonene akamoorokera ase omogwekano bwe risase ri’omorero riare gwoka korwa ase egetutu gati. Musa akarigereria, akarora ng’a nonya kiare gwoka, tikiare koyia keere." 
Exodus3:3 Musa akarengereria, “Nigo ngoeta korwa moino ndore okorora oko kw’ogokumia, imanye naki egetutu eke getari koyia keere.”" 
Exodus3:4 Ekero Omonene aroche ng’a Musa oikire ang’e arore, akamorangeria korwa ase egetutu ime, “Musa! Musa!” Musa agaitaba, “Nao inde aa.”" 
Exodus3:5 Nyasae akamotebia, “Tobaisa goika ang’e aa. Rusia ebikoroto biao, ekiagera aase agwo oteneine naachenu.”" 
Exodus3:6 Naende akamotebia, “Inche ninche Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiao, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Yakobo.” Erio Musa agatuba obosio bwaye, ekiagera nigo airogete korigereria Nyasae." 
Exodus3:7 Omonene akabora, “Amaene narorire emechando y’abanto baane abwo bakare Misiri; naigure buna bakorera ase engencho y’abwo bakobachanda, na inche namanyire kegima obororo bwabo." 
Exodus3:8 Nigo naikire mbatoorie korwa ase amaboko ’Abamisiri, mbatiirie korwa ase ense eria, mbaire ase ense engiya engare, eyere entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, emenyire n’Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abaamori, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Ekerero ki’Abaisraeli giaikire asende, naende narorire buna Abamisiri babachandire." 
Exodus3:10 Ase ayio, inchuo bono, ngotome gochia ase Farao, naye orusie abanto baane Abaisraeli korwa Misiri.”" 
Exodus3:11 Korende Musa akamotebia Nyasae, “Inche ninche ng’o, ngende ase Farao ndusie Abaisraeli korwa Misiri?”" 
Exodus3:12 Nyasae akamoiraneria, “Inche nimbe amo naye, na eke nakio kerabe ekemanyererio asore ng’a ninche omonyene nagotoma: Ekero orabe kwarusirie abanto abwo korwa Misiri inamobe mogonsasimera inche Nyasae oino ase egetunwa eke.”" 
Exodus3:13 Erio Musa agatebia Nyasae, “Kondagende ase Abaisraeli na kobatebia: Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino ontomire asemore, amaene, barabwo baramboria: Erieta riaye, nere ng’o? Inaki rende ndabatebie?”" 
Exodus3:14 Nyasae akairaneria Musa, “INCHE NINCHE INDE BUNA INDE. Obatebie Abaisraeli: INCHE INDE ontomire asemore.”" 
Exodus3:15 Naende Nyasae akamotebia, “Goika otebie Abaisraeli: Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Yakobo ontomire asemore; erio nario erieta riane kare na kare; ase erio nigo ndabe nkoinyorwa nebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Exodus3:16 Genda, osangererie abagaaka b’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a: Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Yakobo nang’orokera, agantebia ng’a mbatebie: Amaene, narorire aya Abamisiri bakobakorera," 
Exodus3:17 na igo narengereirie kobang’anyia korwa Misiri ase mogochandwa, na kobaira ase ense y’Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abaamori, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi, ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke." 
Exodus3:18 “Na abagaaka b’Abaisraeli inabaigwe amang’ana ao. Erio mogende, aye na barabwo, ase omoruoti o Misiri, momotebie: Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaibirania, natoorokera; na bono twagosabire, otoe ribaga togende orogendo rw’amatuko atato gochia ase erooro, erio toruere Omonene, Nyasae oito, ekeng’wanso." 
Exodus3:19 Korende inche omonyene nimanyete ng’a omoruoti o Misiri takobaa ribaga mogende atabetereirie nokoboko kwane gwe chinguru. 
Exodus3:20 Inche nindambore okoboko kwane, ng’ake Abamisiri namaakwa ’ogokumia ndakore ase egati yabo. Erio nyuma babae ribaga mogende." 
Exodus3:21 “Nimbae abanto baane ogwancherwa ase obosio bw’Abamisiri; ekero moragende, timokogenda more namaboko amasa." 
Exodus3:22 Kera omokungu asabe omogisangio oye, na omokungu onde bwensi omenyete nyomba mwaye, ebinto bie chifeta na ebie chitahabu amo ne chianga; mobibekere abana baino, abamura na abaiseke. Ase enchera eyio nero morasakore Abamisiri.”" 
Exodus4:1 Erio Musa akairaneria, “Korerende onye barabwo bakwanga konyegena, gose koigwa amang’ana aane, inki rende ndakore? Aande nigo baratebe: Omonene takoorokereti.”" 
Exodus4:2 Omonene akamoboria, “Inki ekio obwate koboko kwao?” Musa akairaneria, “Nenyimbo.”" 
Exodus4:3 Omonene akamotebia, “Yerute inse!” Na ekero Musa ayeruta inse, ekaonchoka ekaba eng’iti, na Musa agatama korwa asere." 
Exodus4:4 Erio Omonene akamotebia, “Rambora okoboko kwao, oyebwate ekemincha.” Musa akarambora okoboko, akayebwata, na ase okoboko kwaye ekaonchoka, ekaba enyimbo naende." 
Exodus4:5 Na Omonene akamotebia, “Okore igo, na barabwo inabegene ng’a inche Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Yakobo nakoorokera.”" 
Exodus4:6 Naende Omonene akamotebia, “Soyia okoboko kwao eanga ime ase egekuba kiao.” Musa agakora boigo; na ekero akorusetie akanyora ng’a kwabeire okorabu se ase oborwaire bwa ukoma." 
Exodus4:7 Naende Omonene akamotebia, “Irania okoboko kwao eanga ime ase egekuba kiao.” Musa agakora bo, na ekero akorusetie akanyora ng’a kwabeire buya, buna omobere oye ore." 
Exodus4:8 Omonene akamotebia, “Onye tibakwegena amang’ana ao, gose tibagwancha ase egekone kie ritang’ani, rirorio mbanche ase egia kabere." 
Exodus4:9 Onye tibakwegena nonya nase ebikone ebio bibere, gose gwancha amang’ana ao, goika obuuche amache make korwa ase orooche rwa Naili, oyaitere ase ense enyomo; amache ayio orabuuche korwa ase orooche naonchoke abe amanyinga ase ense enyomo.”" 
Exodus4:10 Erio Musa akamotebia, “Koranche, Omonene, inche tindi omonto omanyete gokwana buya, nonya nkorwa kare, gose korwa riria gwachagete gokwana nainche, omosomba oo. Tindi omwango bw’ogokwana, na oromeme rwane nororito.”" 
Exodus4:11 Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ning’o oete mwanyabanto omonwa? Ning’o omokorete abe rimama, gose omotino, gose abe okorora, gose omouko? Inee! Tari inche Omonene?" 
Exodus4:12 Bono genda! Ninkoe amang’ana ogochia gokwana na gokworokereria aya ogochia goteba.” 
Exodus4:13 Korende Musa akamoiraneria, “Omonene, koranche, otome omonto onde omoao oyo oranche.”" 
Exodus4:14 Erio Omonene akaba nendamwamu egwoka igoro ya Musa, akamotebia, “Inee! Haroni omino, oria Omolawi, takaiyo? Nimanyete ng’a ere nere omonto omanyete gokwana buya. Naama! Ngocha are gokorotota; ere ekero arakorore nabe nomogoko omonene." 
Exodus4:15 Aye nokwane nere, omotebie aya agochia gokwana. Inche nimbae inwe babere amang’ana mogochia gokwana, na koborokereria aya morakore." 
Exodus4:16 Nere orabe ogokwana nabanto ribaga riao; ere abe omokwani oo, na aye obe ribaga ria Nyasae asare." 
Exodus4:17 Aye obogorie enyimbo eyio koboko kwao, nero orakorere ebikone.”" 
Exodus4:18 Musa akairana gochia ase Yetero, ise biara, akamotebia, “Koranche, ong’e ribaga ng’irane Misiri korora abaminto gose moyo bare.” Yetero akamotebia, “Ee, ogende nomorembe.”" 
Exodus4:19 Omonene agakwana na Musa aaria Midiani, akamotebia, “Irana gochia Misiri, ekiagera baria bonsi barigetie kogoita bakure.”" 
Exodus4:20 Musa akaimokia mokaye na abana baye, akabariinia etigere igoro, na barabwo bakairana gochia ase ense ya Misiri. Ere akabogoria enyimbo ya Nyasae koboko kwaye." 
Exodus4:21 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Bono ekero orairane Misiri, origererie buya ng’a nokore ase obosio bwa Farao amakumia onsi aya nakoeire okobua gw’okoyakora. Korende ninkong’ie enkoro yaye, na ere tagotiga abanto bagende." 
Exodus4:22 Erio omotebie Farao: Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Abaisraeli nomwana one omotangi. 
Exodus4:23 Inche nagotebirie: Moe omwana one ribaga agende gonkorera korende koraange, rirorio nigo ndaite omwana oo omotangi.”" 
Exodus4:24 Kobare nchera kogenda, Omonene akaumerana na Musa aase baare gotimokera, akarigia komoita." 
Exodus4:25 Erio Sipora akaimokia rigena riare erioge, agasara omwana oye risankwa ria isiko ri’ekiimo kiaye ki’obosacha akarikunia amagoro a Musa, akabora, “Amaene, nigo ore omonyuomi one bw’amanyinga.”" 
Exodus4:26 Agwo Omonene agatiga Musa, tamoita. Erio omokungu oyio agateba, “Omonyuomi bw’amanyinga ase engencho y’okwaroka.”" 
Exodus4:27 Omonene agatebia Haroni, “Genda gochia ase erooro orotote Musa.” Erio akagenda, akaumerana nere ase egetunwa kia Nyasae, akamonyunyunta." 
Exodus4:28 Musa agatebia Haroni amang’ana onsi Omonene amotebetie, na igoro y’ebikone bionsi amochigete akore." 
Exodus4:29 Musa na Haroni bakagenda, bagasangereria abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli."
