Exodus4:30 Haroni akabatebia amang’ana onsi Omonene atebetie Musa, na ere agakora ebikone biria ase amaiso ’abanto." 
Exodus4:31 Erio abanto bakegena; na ekero baigwete ng’a Omonene bwechandeire Abaisraeli, na ororire emechando yabo, barabwo bagatung ama inse, bakamosasima." 
Exodus5:1 Erio Musa na Haroni bakagenda ase Farao, bakamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Bae abanto baane ribaga bagende bankorere Rituko Rinene aaria ase erooro.”" 
Exodus5:2 Farao akairaneria, “Omonene nere ng’o inyigwe amang’ana aye, na koa Abaisraeli ribaga bagende? Inche timomanyeti Omonene, gose tinkoa Abaisraeli ribaga bagende.”" 
Exodus5:3 Barabwo bakamotebia, “Nyasae bw’Abaibirania natoorokera. Koranche, otoe ribaga togende orogendo rw’amatuko atato gochia ase erooro, erinde toruere Omonene, Nyasae oito, ebing’wanso, tabaisa gocha gotoita namarwaire gose nemioro.”" 
Exodus5:4 Omoruoti o Misiri akabairaneria, “Musa na Haroni, nase ki mogotenenia abanto korwa ase emeremo yabo? Irana gochia ase emeremo yaino y’obosomba.”" 
Exodus5:5 Naende Farao akabora, “Abanto aba babeire abange kobua abanyene ense eye. Naende morigetie kobarusia ase emeremo yabo.”" 
Exodus5:6 Ase rituko erio erio Farao agachika abwo abachandi amo nabateneneri, akabatebia," 
Exodus5:7 “Timoa abanto aba naende chimboba ase ogokorera amatabori, buna mware kobaa agwo ritang’ani. Tiga bagende barabwo boka kwerigeria chimboba." 
Exodus5:8 Korende mobabetererie bakore omobaro bw’amatabori oyo baare gokora ritang’ani, batari koyokeyia. Barabwo naboro. Ase ayio nigo bakona‐koboria ng’a: Toe ribaga togende koruera Nyasae oito ekeng’wanso." 
Exodus5:9 Bae abanto abwo emeremo emerito mono, baisaneke nero, na tibabaisa gotegerera amang’ana ’oborimo.”" 
Exodus5:10 Abachandi abwo na abateneneri bagasoka bagatebia abanto, “Farao otebire iga: Tinkobaa inwe chimboba naende." 
Exodus5:11 Genda inwe mweka mwerigerie chimboba aande onsi morachinyore; korende goika mokore omobaro bw’amatabori oria o botambe, timokoyokeyia nonya ng’ake.”" 
Exodus5:12 Abanto abwo bagesiarera ase ense yonsi ya Misiri na kwerigeria obonyansi ribaga rie chimboba. 
Exodus5:13 Abachandi baria bakagenderera kobabetereria, bagoteba, “Goika mokore kera rituko omobaro bw’amatabori buna konya mogokora ekero mware korenterwa chimboba.”" 
Exodus5:14 Abachandi abwo babekire na Farao bakaba bagoaka abateneneri b’Abaisraeli, abwo babegetwe gotenenera emeremo, bakabatebia, “Naki motaikeranetie omobaro oino bw’amatabori igoro na rero, oyio konya mogokora botambe?”" 
Exodus5:15 Erio abateneneri b’Abaisraeli bakagenda ase Farao, bagateba, “Inki ogotokorera iga intwe abasomba bao?" 
Exodus5:16 Chimboba titori koegwa, korende nigo tokona‐kobetererigwa ng’a tokore amatabori. Na bono intwe, abasomba bao, nigo tokona‐goakwa; korende okomocha nokw’abanto bao.”" 
Exodus5:17 Farao akabairaneria, “Inwe naboro mono. Nakio gekogera mogoteba ng’a: Toe ribaga togende toruere Omonene ekeng’wanso." 
Exodus5:18 Irana gochia ase emeremo yaino. Timokorenterwa chimboba, korende goika mokore omobaro bw’amatabori, oria oria mochikire gokora.”" 
Exodus5:19 Abateneneri b’Abaisraeli bakarora ng’a basoire ase obokongu ekiagera batebetigwe ng’a. “Goika moikeranie kera rituko omobaro oria oria bw’amatabori.” 
Exodus5:20 Ekero baare korua ase Farao, bakanyora Musa na Haroni agwo nchera babaganyete," 
Exodus5:21 bakabatebia, “Omonene abarigererie na konacha ekina, ekiagera mwatokorire koba rimisu riibe ase Farao na ase abasomba baye. Mwababekeire emioro maboko abo batoite.”" 
Exodus5:22 Erio Musa akairana gochia ase Omonene, akamotebia, “Omonene, nase ki ogokorera abanto aba amabe buna aya? Inki rende gwantomera inche?" 
Exodus5:23 Naki korwa riria nagendete ase Farao gokwana amang’ana ao omentire gokorera abanto bao bobe mono, na aye torakora kende ase okobatooria.”" 
Exodus6:1 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Bono norore aya ndakorere Farao. Naki ase okoboko kwane gwe chinguru nimobetererie abae abanto baane ribaga bagende, ee, ase okoboko kwane gwe chinguru nabetererigwe abaserie korwa ase ense yaye.”" 
Exodus6:2 Nyasae agakwana na Musa, akamotebia, “Inche ninche Omonene." 
Exodus6:3 Naorokerete Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo buna Nyasae Omobui. Korende ase erieta riane Yahwe, gose Omonene, tinamanyekanete asebare." 
Exodus6:4 Ninche nakorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabarabwo ng’a nimbae ense ya Kanani, ense eria barenge buna abamenyi." 
Exodus6:5 Na bono naigure okwerera kw’Abaisraeli abwo Abamisiri babegete inse y’obosomba, naende ning’inyorete okobwatana koria kwane." 
Exodus6:6 Ase igo otebie Abaisraeli ng’a, Inche ninche Omonene, ndabarusie korwa ase emeremo emerito inse y’Abamisiri. Nimbatoorie korwa ase obosomba bwaino. Ase okoboko kwane koramboire, na goetera ase ebisusuro ebinene, nimbaboorie." 
Exodus6:7 Nimbakore mobe abanto baane, na inche nimbe Nyasae oino. Inwe namomanye ng’a ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, oyokobarusia korwa ase emeremo emerito inse y’Abamisiri." 
Exodus6:8 Nimbaire goika ense eria nariete eira inyimogetie okoboko kwane koa Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo. Nimbayee ebe omwando oino. Inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Exodus6:9 Musa agatebia Abaisraeli amang’ana ayio, korende barabwo tibancha gotegerera, ekiagera tibare konyara koremereria, ase engencho y’emeremo y’obosomba obotindi." 
Exodus6:10 Erio Omonene agakwana na Musa akamotebia," 
Exodus6:11 “Genda okwane na Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, omotebie abae Abaisraeli ribaga bagende, barue ase ense yaye.”" 
Exodus6:12 Musa agakwana ase obosio bw’Omonene, agateba. “Onye Abaisraeli baanga konyigwera, naki rende Farao ere arakore anyigwere, inche omonto ebikoba biane bitarokiri.”" 
Exodus6:13 Korende Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabachika bagende batebie Abaisraeli na Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, ng’a batomirwe barusie Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus6:14 Abanto aba nabwo barenge emetwe ye chiamate chiabo. Abana abamura ba Reuben, omomura omotangi o Israeli, nabwo aba: Hanoki, na Palu, na Hezironi, na Karimi. Aba nabwo chiamate chia Reuben." 
Exodus6:15 Abana abamura ba Simeoni nabwo aba: Yemueli, na Yamini, na Ohadi, na Yakini, na Sohari, na Sauli, omwana bw’omokungu Omokanani. Aba nabwo chiamate chia Simeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Aya naro amarieta ’abamura ba Lawi, buna batunyaine ase okoiborwa kwabo: Gerisoni, na Kohati, na Merari. Lawi nigo akoorete emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na etano na ebere (137)." 
Exodus6:17 Abana abamura ba Gerisoni nabwo Libini na Simei, ne chiamate chiabo." 
Exodus6:18 Na abana abamura ba Kohati nabwo aba: Amuramu, na Isari, na Heburoni, na Usieli. Kohati nigo akoorete emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na etato (133)." 
Exodus6:19 Na abana abamura ba Merari nabwo Mali na Musi. Aba nabwo chiamate chia Lawi, buna batunyaine ase okoiborwa kwabo." 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu akanyuoma Yokebedi, omoiseke omwabo ise; na ere akamoiborera Haroni na Musa. Amuramu nigo akoorete emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na etano na ebere (137)." 
Exodus6:21 Na abana abamura ba Isari nabwo aba: Kora, na Nefegi, na Sikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Na abana abamura ba Usieli nabwo aba: Mishaeli na Elisafani, na Sitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Haroni akanyuoma Elisheba, omoiseke bw’Aminadabu, omoiseke omwabo Nashoni. Ere akamoiborera Nadabu, na Abihu, na Eleazari, na Itamari." 
Exodus6:24 Na abana abamura ba Kora nabwo aba: Asiri, na Elikana, na Abiasafu. Aba nabwo chiamate chia Kora." 
Exodus6:25 Eleazari, omwana o Haroni, akanyuoma omoiseke oyomo bw’abaiseke ba Putieli, na ere akamoiborera Finehasi. Abanto aba nabwo barenge emetwe ye chinyomba chi’Abalawi, eamate ase eamate." 
Exodus6:26 Haroni oria oria amo na Musa nabwo baria Omonene atebetie, “Barusie Abaisraeli ase ense ya Misiri, omoganda ase omoganda.”" 
Exodus6:27 Aba nabwo baria batebetie omoruoti o Misiri ng’a barusie Abaisraeli korwa Misiri. Musa na Haroni nabwo baria baria. 
Exodus6:28 Ekero Omonene akwanete na Musa ase ense ya Misiri 
Exodus6:29 akamotebia, “Inche ninche Omonene. Otebie Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, amang’ana onsi nkogotebia.”" 
Exodus6:30 Korende Musa akamoiraneria, “Inche nomonto ebikoba biane bitarogeti, naki rende Farao arakore anyigwere?”" 
Exodus7:1 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Rora nagokorire obe buna Nyasae ase Farao, na Haroni akwane nere buna omobani oo." 
Exodus7:2 Goika otebie oyomino Haroni ayio onsi nagochikire, na ere akwane na Farao, amotebie ng’a ae Abaisraeli ribaga barue ase ense yaye." 
Exodus7:3 Korende ninkong’ie enkoro ya Farao; nonya nabo ninkore ebikone ebinge na amakumia amange ase ense ya Misiri. 
Exodus7:4 Korende Farao takobaigwa. Inche nindambore okoboko kwane igoro y’Abamisiri na kobaa ebisusuro ebinene, na nindusie emeganda yane, abanto baane Abaisraeli, korwa ase ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus7:5 Ekero ndarambore okoboko kwane igoro y’Abamisiri, na korusia Abaisraeli korwa asebare, erio nario Abamisiri baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Exodus7:6 Musa na Haroni bagakora buna Omonene abachigete. 
Exodus7:7 Ekero keria bakwanete na Farao, Musa nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etano na etato (80), na Haroni emiaka emerongo etano na etato, na etato (83)." 
Exodus7:8 Omonene agatebia Musa na Haroni," 
Exodus7:9 “Ekero Farao arababorie ng’a mokore egekone, erio aye Musa otebie Haroni abogorie enyimbo yaye, ayerute inse bosio bwa Farao, na ero neonchoke ebe eng’iti.”" 
Exodus7:10 Musa na Haroni bakagenda ase Farao, bagakora buna Omonene abachigete. Haroni akaruta enyimbo yaye bosio bwa Farao na bw’abasomba baye, na ero ekaonchoka ekaba eng’iti." 
Exodus7:11 Erio Farao akarangeria abanto abanyasemi na abaragori, na abwo abaringoria ba Misiri bagakora boigo ase oborogi bwabo." 
Exodus7:12 Kera oyomo obo akaruta enyimbo yaye inse, na chirochio chikaonchoka, chikaba ching’iti chinene; korende enyimbo ya Haroni ekamera chinyimbo chiabo." 
Exodus7:13 Enkoro ya Farao nigo yarenge enkong’u, na buna Omonene atebete, taigwera Musa na Haroni." 
Exodus7:14 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Farao okong’irie enkoro yaye, bwangire koa abanto aba ribaga bagende." 
Exodus7:15 Ankio mambia, ekero Farao aragende rooche, naye ogende otenene ase engegu, omoganye aroro. Enyimbo eria yaonchogete ekaba eng’iti, oyebogorie koboko kwao." 
Exodus7:16 Omotebie ng’a: Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abiabirania, ontomire ngotebie ng’a oe abanto baye ribaga bagende komokorera ase erooro. Naye goika bono toraigwa." 
Exodus7:17 Ase igo Omonene otebire iga: Ase ring’ana eri ndakore, nario oramanye ng’a ninche Omonene. Rigereria, ning’ake amache ’orooche rwa Naili nenyimbo eye mbwate koboko kwane, na amache aya naonchoke abe amanyinga." 
Exodus7:18 Ne chinswe chire ase orooche ime inachikwe, chigunde, na orooche narotioke bobe, na Abamisiri nabasinywe konywa amache aria.”" 
Exodus7:19 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa amotebie Haroni, “Imokia enyimbo yao, orambore okoboko kwao igoro ase amache onsi ay’Abamisiri, ase chindooche chiabo na ase ebirooche, ase amatibo onsi ne chinsoko. Amache ayio onsi aonchoke abe amanyinga. Naboigo amanyinga abe ase ense yonsi ya Misiri, nonya nase chintuba na ase chinyongo chionsi.”" 
Exodus7:20 Musa na Haroni bagakora buna Omonene abachigete. Haroni akaimokia enyimbo yaye, agaaka orooche bosio bwa Farao na bw’abasomba baye, na amache ayare imeo akaonchoka, akaba amanyinga." 
Exodus7:21 Ne chinswe chiare ase orooche chigakwa, na orooche rokagunda na gotioka, na Abamisiri bagasinywa konywa amache aria. Amanyinga akaba ase ense yonsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus7:22 Erio abaringoria ba Misiri bagakora boigo ase oborogi bwabo. Farao akagenderera gokong’ia enkoro yaye, na buna Omonene konya atebire, tabaigwa." 
Exodus7:23 Farao akairana kogenda bwoye, amang’ana aria tayabeka ase omoyo oye." 
Exodus7:24 Abamisiri bonsi bagakunya‐kunya mbarabare y’orooche ase okorigia amache bakonywa, ekiagera tibare konyara konywa amache a rooche." 
Exodus7:25 Amatuko atano na abere akaera korwa riria Omonene aagete orooche rwa Naili. 
Exodus8:1 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Genda otebie Farao: Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Bae abanto baane ribaga bagende gonkorera." 
Exodus8:2 Korende koraange kobaa ribaga bagende, rirorio inche ning’ake ense yao yonsi ase okorenta ebioto." 
Exodus8:3 Orooche rwa Naili naroichorwe nebioto, na birobio nabitiire korwa aroro, nabisoe nyomba mwao, na enyomba yao y’okorara, amo noborere bwao; nabisoe ne chinyomba chi’abasomba bao na echi’abanto bao, ase amariko ao ase okogekera emegati, na ase ebituba biao bi’ogokonyera obosie." 
Exodus8:4 Ebioto ebio inabikogenderere omobere oo, na ey’abanto bao, na ey’abasomba bao.”" 
Exodus8:5 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Motebie Haroni abwate enyimbo yaye, ayeimokie igoro ye chindooche, na ebirooche, na amatibo, erinde agere ebioto bigende igoro ase ense yonsi ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus8:6 Haroni akarambora okoboko kwaye igoro y’amache onsi a Misiri, na ebioto bigatiira, bigatuba ense eyio yonsi." 
Exodus8:7 Na abaringoria bagakora boigo ase oborogi bwabo, bakarenta ebioto igoro ase ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus8:8 Erio Farao akarangeria Musa na Haroni, akabatebia, “Mosabe Omonene arusie ebioto korwa ase ense na korwa ase abanto baane, na inche ning’ee abanto baye ribaga bagende koruera Omonene ekeng’wanso.”" 
Exodus8:9 Musa agatebia Farao, “Ase amasikani ao, naye orantebie ngaki ki ndagosabere aye amo nabasomba bao, na abanto bao, erinde ebioto birue asore na ase chinyomba chiao, bitigare koba ase orooche rwa Naili oka.”" 
Exodus8:10 Farao akairaneria, “Ng’ankio.” Musa akamotebia, “Nigo erabe buna gwateba, erinde omanye ng’a onde tari buna Omonene, Nyasae oito." 
Exodus8:11 Ebioto nabirue asore na ase chinyomba chiao, ase abasomba bao na ase abanto bao; binde tibigotigara otatiga ase orooche rwa Naili oka.”" 
Exodus8:12 Musa na Haroni bakarua o Farao, na Musa akaboria Omonene arusie ebioto ebio amorenterete Farao." 
Exodus8:13 Omonene agakora buna Musa amoboretie, na ebioto ebio biare ase chinyomba, na ase chigoora, na aande onsi isiko, bigakwa." 
Exodus8:14 Abanto bakabisangereria, bakabibeka chitui chinyinge, na ense yonsi egatioka bobe." 
Exodus8:15 Korende ekero Farao aroche ng’a amang’ana abeire buya, agakong’ia enkoro yaye naende, na buna Omonene atebete, akaanga koigwa Musa na Haroni." 
Exodus8:16 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Motebie Haroni aimokie enyimbo yaye aake orotu rwe riroba, na rororwo naroonchoke robe chinsona ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus8:17 Barabwo bagakora bo. Haroni akarambora okoboko kwaye, agaaka riroba nenyimbo yaye, na orotu rokaonchoka rokaba chinsona, na chirochio chikaroma mwanyabanto ne chitugo. Orotu rwonsi rwe riroba rokaonchoka rokaba chinsona." 
Exodus8:18 Abaringoria nabarabwo bagateema korenta chinsona ase oborogi bwabo, korende tibanyara. Chinsona echio chikaba aande onsi, ase mwanyabanto na ase chitugo." 
Exodus8:19 Abaringoria bagatebia Farao, “Eke nekiara kia Nyasae.” Korende Farao agakong’ia enkoro yaye, na buna Omonene atebete, akaanga kobaigwa." 
Exodus8:20 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Oche oimoke mambia chuni ekero Farao agochia kogenda rooche, otenene ase obosio bwaye, omotebie: Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Bae abanto baane ribaga bagende bankorere." 
Exodus8:21 Onye tokoa abanto baane ribaga, rirorio nintome chingi chinyinge igoro yao na abasomba bao, na igoro y’abanto bao ne chinyomba chiao. Chinyomba chi’Abamisiri inachiichorwe ne chingi, nonya nense eyio yonsi bamenyete." 
Exodus8:22 Korende ase rituko erio nintige ensemo ya Goseni, ase abanto baane bamenyete; chingi echio tichigochiao, erio nomanye ng’a ninche Omonene bw’ense eye." 
Exodus8:23 Ninkore ogwatananeka egati y’abanto baane na abao. Ankio egekone eke nagekoreke.” 
Exodus8:24 Omonene agakora ayio. Chingi chigacha ase obonge mono ase chinyomba chia Farao, na echi’abasomba baye, na ase ense yonsi ya Misiri. Na ense eria egasarigwa ne chingi chiria." 
Exodus8:25 Erio Farao akarangeria Musa na Haroni, akabatebia, “Genda moruere Nyasae oino ekeng’wanso, korende naiga ase ense yaito.”" 
Exodus8:26 Musa akamoiraneria, “Titokonyara gokora igo, ekiagera intwe ntoruere Omonene, Nyasae oito, ekeng’wanso ekeragechie Abamisiri. Na onye Abamisiri bagotorora tokorua ekeng’wanso buna ekio, Inee, tibagocha gotoaka amagena?" 
Exodus8:27 Goika togende orogendo rw’amatuko atato gochia ase erooro, erinde toruere Omonene, Nyasae oito, ekeng’wanso buna atochigete.”" 
Exodus8:28 Farao akabora, “Nimbae ribaga mogende moruere Omonene, Nyasae oino, ekeng’wanso ase erooro, korende timogenda aare, naende monsabere inche.”" 
Exodus8:29 Musa akamoiraneria, “Bono buna nkorua asore nimosabe Omonene arusie chingi korwa asore aye Farao, na ase abasomba bao, na ase abanto bao, ankio mambia. Korende aye Farao, tokora obong’ainereria naende, na kwanga koa abanto ribaga bagende baruere Omonene ekeng’wanso.”" 
Exodus8:30 Erio Musa akarua o Farao, agasaba Omonene." 
Exodus8:31 Omonene agakora buna Musa atebete, akarusia chingi chiria ase Farao, na ase abasomba baye, na ase abanto baye; tichiatigara nonya neyemo." 
Exodus8:32 Korende Farao agakong’ia enkoro yaye nonya nengaki eyio, taa abanto ribaga bagende." 
Exodus9:1 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Genda otebie Farao: Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaibirania, agoteba: Bae abanto baane ribaga bagende, erinde bankorere." 
Exodus9:2 Naki onye gokwanga kobaa ribaga, na kogenderera kobatanga," 
Exodus9:3 erio nario okoboko kw’Omonene koraake chitugo chiao aase chikorisia, ne chibarasi chiao, ne chitigere, ne chingamia, ne chiombe, ne ching’ondi; chirochio chinyore oborwaire obobe mono borachiite." 
Exodus9:4 Korende Omonene nakore ogwatananeka egati ye chitugo chi’Abaisraeli na echi’Abamisiri. Ase echi’Abaisraeli ende tegokwa nonya neyemo.” 
Exodus9:5 Omonene agachora engaki, akabora, “Ankio inche Omonene ninchiche nkore ayio ase ense eye.”" 
Exodus9:6 Rituko ria kabere Omonene agakora buna atebete. Chitugo chionsi chi’Abamisiri chigakwa, korende echi’Abaisraeli ende tiyakwa nonya neyemo." 
Exodus9:7 Farao agatoma abanto barigie egiakoregete, na barabwo bakamorentera amang’ana ng’a ase Abaisraeli tugo yabo ende tekweti. Nonya nabo enkoro ya Farao ekagenderera koba enkong’u, taa abanto ribaga bagende." 
Exodus9:8 Omonene agatebia Musa na Haroni, “Genda mobuuche ribu riichire roe korwa riko, na Musa arisiare gochia igoro, ase obosio bwa Farao." 
Exodus9:9 Narirorio rionchoke ribe orotu, roirurukigwe ase ense yonsi ya Misiri, rorente amagumba na amaote amabe, ase mwanyabanto ne chitugo.”" 
Exodus9:10 Erio bakabuucha ribu korwa riko, bakagenda ase obosio bwa Farao. Musa akarisiara gochia igoro, na rirorio rikarenta amagumba na amaote amabe ase mwanyabanto ne chitugo." 
Exodus9:11 Na abaringoria tibanyara gotenena ase obosio bwa Musa, ekiagera amagumba konya abariire barabwo buna Abamisiri bande." 
Exodus9:12 Korende Omonene agakong’ia enkoro ya Farao, na buna Omonene konya atebirie Musa, Farao akaanga koigwa Musa na Haroni." 
Exodus9:13 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Oche oimoke mambia chuni, otenene ase obosio bwa Farao, omotebie: Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaibirania, agoteba: Bae abanto baane ribaga bagende, erinde bankorere." 
Exodus9:14 Engaki eye nindete amaakwa aane onsi igoro yao aye omonyene, na igoro y’abasomba bao, na ase abanto bao, erinde omanye ng’a onde tari, nonya noyomo, ore buna inche, ase ense engima." 
Exodus9:15 Naki ase engaki eye nanga narambora okoboko kwane ngoake aye amo nabanto bao namarwaire amabe abaite, aye nanga ngwasira korwa ase ense eye." 
Exodus9:16 Korende nagotigire obe moyo ase engencho eye inyare kworokia okobua kwane, na erieta riane nario rirararigwe ase ense yonsi." 
Exodus9:17 Ekiagera aye nigo ogendererete gotanga abanto baane, na tori kobaa ribaga bagende." 
Exodus9:18 Ankio norore, engaki buna eye, nindete embura y’amagena endito mono, eyio omogwekano oye etana gotwa rinde ase Misiri korwa riria ense eye yachagete goika bono." 
Exodus9:19 Gaki, origererie orore ng’a chitugo chiao chiarenterwe inka, naboigo na kende kiao gionsi kere isiko. Onye abanto bonsi abare isiko tibakorentwa ase chinyomba ime, embura y’amagena nebaite bakwe, ne chitugo chionsi boigo.”" 
Exodus9:20 Abande b’abasomba ba Farao, abwo bairogete ring’ana ri’Omonene, bakaayerera korenta abasomba babo ne chitugo chiabo inka." 
Exodus9:21 Korende abwo basiereretie ring’ana ri’Omonene, bagatiga abasomba babo ne chitugo chiabo isiko." 
Exodus9:22 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Rambora okoboko kwao gochia igoro, erio embura y’amagena etwe ase ense ya Misiri, etwere mwanyabanto ne chitugo, na ebimeri bionsi bi’emegondo ase ense yonsi ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus9:23 Musa akaimokereria enyimbo yaye gochia igoro, na Omonene akarenta chinkoba na embura y’amagena, na okomesa gw’enkoba kogaika ase ense. Naboigo Omonene agaitera embura y’amagena igoro ya Misiri." 
Exodus9:24 Embura enene y’amagena egatwa, na okomesa gw’enkoba gokagenderera amo nembura eyio. Na embura y’amagena eria yarenge endito mono, eyio omogwekano oye etana gotwa ase ense ya Misiri korwa ekero egesaku ekio giachagete komenyao." 
Exodus9:25 Ase ense yonsi ya Misiri embura eria y’amagena egaita mwanyabanto bonsi abarenge isiko, amo ne chitugo chionsi. Na embura eria y’amagena egaita na gosaria ebimeri bionsi bi’emegondo, ekabuna na emete yonsi y’orosana." 
Exodus9:26 Ase ensemo ya Goseni yoka, ase Abaisraeli bamenyete, nao embura y’amagena etatwete." 
Exodus9:27 Farao akarangeria Musa na Haroni, akabatebia, “Ase engaki eye inche nakorire ebibe; Omonene nere omonyene oboronge, inche na abanto baane nabamochi tore." 
Exodus9:28 Nsabere ase Omonene. Chinkoba echi amo nembura y’amagena biatonyarire. Nimbae ribaga mogende, timogwenereti mobeere aa goetania.”" 
Exodus9:29 Musa akamoiraneria, “Ekero nkorua ase omochie oo ninyimokie amaboko aane nsabe Omonene. Chinkoba echi nachisire, na embura y’amagena tegotwa goetania. Erio aye onyare komanya ng’a ense ney’Omonene." 
Exodus9:30 Korende nimbamanyete inwe, aye na abasomba bao, ng’a timomoirogeti Omonene Nyasae nonya mbono.”" 
Exodus9:31 Egatani na esairi bigaakwa, bigasarigwa, naki esairi konya yabekire ebigara, na egatani ngosomoria yare." 
Exodus9:32 Korende chingano tichiasaretigwe, ekiagera konya tichirakina." 
Exodus9:33 Musa akarua o Farao, na ase omochie, akaimokia amaboko aye, agasaba Omonene. Erio chinkoba chiria na embura y’amagena bigatangwa, na embura tiyagenderera gotwa ase ense." 
Exodus9:34 Ekero Farao aroche ng’a embura y’amagena ne chinkoba biatangirwe, akagenderera gokora ebibe, bagakong’ia chinkoro chiabo ere amo nabasomba baye." 
Exodus9:35 Enkoro ya Farao ekagenderera koba enkong’u, na buna Omonene konya akwanire goetera ase Musa, akaanga gotiga Abaisraeli bagende." 
Exodus10:1 Nyuma y’ayio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Genda ase Farao. Nakong’irie enkoro yaye na echi’abasomba baye, erinde inyare koorokia ebikone ebi biane ase egati yabo;" 
Exodus10:2 naye nonyare gotebia abana bao na abachokoro bao amang’ana aya nakorire ase egati y’Abamisiri, na ebikone ebi naorokirie ase egati yabo. Erio momanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Exodus10:3 Musa na Haroni bakagenda ase Farao, bakamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaibirania, agoteba: Inee! Ngoika ririri orabe gokwanga gwekeyia ase obosio bwane? Bae abanto baane ribaga bagende bankorere." 
Exodus10:4 Onye gokwanga koa abanto baane ribaga bagende, rigereria ankio nindete chingige ase ense yao." 
Exodus10:5 Ne chingige echio inachitube ense eye yonsi, erio monto tanyara korora riroba, na chirochio inachisirie endagera eria etasaretigwe nembura y’amagena, amo na kera omote ore ase ense yao." 
Exodus10:6 Chinyomba chiaino amo nechi’abasomba bao, na echi’Abamisiri bonsi inachiichorwe ne chingige. Omogwekano bw’echio chisokoro chiao gose chisokororia chitaroche nonya ng’ake korwa ekero bachagete komenya ase ense eye goika rero iga.” Erio Musa akaonchoka, akarua o Farao." 
Exodus10:7 Farao agatebigwa nabasomba baye, “Ngoika ririri omonto oyo aratotege? Batige abanto aba bagende bakorere Omonene, Nyasae obo. Toramanya nonya mbono ng’a ense ya Misiri yasarekire?”" 
Exodus10:8 Ase igo Musa na Haroni bakarentwa naende ase Farao. Ere akabatebia, “Genda, mokorere Omonene, Nyasae oino. Korende ning’o nang’o moganetie mogende komo?”" 
Exodus10:9 Musa akamoiraneria, “Nigo toragende twensi, abake na abagotu, na abana baito, abamura na abaiseke, ching’ondi ne chitugo chiaito chinde chionsi, ekiagera ntobwate Rituko Rinene ri’Omonene.”" 
Exodus10:10 Korende Farao akabatebia, “Haha! Omonene abe amo nainwe onye nkobaa ribaga mogende amo nabana baino. Korende momanye ng’a amabe nabatang’aine ase mokogenda." 
Exodus10:11 Yaya, taibo, genda inwe mweka abasacha, mokorere Omonene. Naki ayio naro konya moganetie.” Erio bagaserigwa korwa ase Farao." 
Exodus10:12 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Rambora okoboko kwao igoro y’ense ya Misiri, erinde chingige chichiche koria ebimeri binde bionsi ebitasaretigwe nembura y’amagena.”" 
Exodus10:13 Agwo Musa akaimokia enyimbo yaye igoro y’ense ya Misiri, na Omonene akarenta omwaga korwa moocha, rituko rigima, omobaso na obotuko. Ekero bwakia omwaga oria korwa moocha konya orentire chingige." 
Exodus10:14 Chingige echio chigacha igoro y’ense yonsi ya Misiri, chikagwa chinsemo chionsi chi’aroro. Chingige chinyinge buna echio chitana gocha ase amatuko aetire, gose tichigochi‐gocha naende nonya ng’ake." 
Exodus10:15 Chingige echio chigatuba ense eria yonsi goika ekamwama ti, chikaria ebimeri bionsi pi ase ense eria, na amatunda onsi ay’emete, ebio bionsi bitasaretigwe nembura y’amagena. Tigiatigarete kemeri kende gionsi ekebese gose amato ’emete ase ense ya Misiri engima." 
Exodus10:16 Farao akarangeria Musa na Haroni ase obwango, akabatebia, “Nakorire ebibe ase Omonene. Nyasae oino, na asemore." 
Exodus10:17 Gaki bono nasabire, monyabere ebibe biane ekero eke gioka. Monsabere ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, ng’a anduserie ogoakwa oko tikong’ita.”" 
Exodus10:18 Musa akarua o Farao, agasaba Omonene." 
Exodus10:19 Omonene akaonchora omwaga okaba bwe chinguru, okagusa korwa bosongo, okaira chingige chionsi gochia ase Enyancha Embariri. Tiyatigara engige nonya neyemo ase ense ya Misiri engima." 
Exodus10:20 Korende Omonene agakong’ia enkoro ya Farao, na ere akaanga koa Abaisraeli ribaga bagende." 
Exodus10:21 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Imokia okoboko kwao gochia igoro, erinde omosunte ekerima onyare koba ase ense ya Misiri, omosunte oranyare gotaba‐tabwa.”" 
Exodus10:22 Musa akaimokia okoboko kwaye gochia igoro, na omosunte ekerima okaba ase ense ya Misiri engaki y’amatuko atato." 
Exodus10:23 Abanto tibanyara kororana; ase amatuko atato onde tarenge gosuka kogenda aande. Korende Abaisraeli barabwo mbabwate omobaso aase onsi ase bamenyete. 
Exodus10:24 Farao akarangeria Musa, akamotebia, “Genda mokorere Omonene. Moire abana baino, korende chitugo chiaino chirochio mochitige aiga.”" 
Exodus10:25 Musa akamoiraneria, “Yaya, goika otoe ching’iti togochia koruera Omonene, Nyasae oito, ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebinde bi’okonyenywa." 
Exodus10:26 Naende ntoire chitugo chiaito chionsi, ende teri eratigare nyuma nonya neyemo. Korwa ase echio nao togochia korusia echi torakorere Omonene, Nyasae oito; intwe titomanyeti buna togochia gokorera Omonene goika toraika aroro.”" 
Exodus10:27 Omonene agakong’ia enkoro ya Farao, na ere tancha kobaa ribaga bagende." 
Exodus10:28 Farao agatebia Musa, “Karue ase obosio bwane! Bwerende, tobaisa gocha kondora naende, naki rituko riria orache korora obosio bwane naende, nigo orakwe.”" 
Exodus10:29 Musa akamoiraneria, “Gwakwanire ekeene; inche tingocha korora obosio bwao naende.”" 
Exodus11:1 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Ngotigarete ogoakwa okomo ndarente igoro ya Farao na Abamisiri. Nyuma y’okwo nabae ribaga mogende; ee ekero arabae ribaga mogende nigo arabaserie kegima morueo." 
Exodus11:2 Bono genda okwane nabanto aba, ng’a kera oyomo ase abasacha na ase abakungu asabe korwa ase omogisangio oye ebinto bie chifeta, na ebie chitahabu.”" 
Exodus11:3 Omonene akaa abanto baye ogwancherwa ase amasio ’Abamisiri; kobua ayio Musa nigo arenge omonto omonene mono ase ense ya Misiri ase amasio ’abasomba ba Farao, na ase abanto baye." 
Exodus11:4 Musa agatebia Farao, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Botuko gati ninche ng’ete egati y’Abamisiri." 
Exodus11:5 Abana abatangi bonsi ase ense ya Misiri mbakwe, amo ne ching’iti chintangi chionsi; omwana omotangi o Farao, oyogoikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obogambi, na omwana omotangi bw’omokungu omosomba ore rogena gosia, ne ching’iti chintangi chionsi." 
Exodus11:6 Erio ebirero ebinene inabibe ase ense yonsi ya Misiri, binde bitana koba bo, gose tibigocha koba bo naende nonya ng’ake." 
Exodus11:7 Korende ase Abaisraeli, nonya nesese tegokogera omonto gose etugo. Erio momanye ng’a Omonene okorire ogwatananeka ase Abamisiri na Abaisraeli." 
Exodus11:8 Na abasomba aba bao bonsi nabatirimboke gocha asende na batung’ameo, bakobora: Genda, karue aa, aye na abanto bao bonsi bakobwatie. Nyuma y’ayio nindue aa!” Erio agwo Musa akarua o Farao ore nekeririanda ekenene." 
Exodus11:9 Omonene agatebia Musa. “Farao takobaigwa inwe. Ase ayio ning’orokie amakumia ande ase ense ya Misiri.” 
Exodus11:10 Musa na Haroni bagakora amakumia ayio onsi ase obosio bwa Farao, korende Omonene agakong’ia enkoro ya Farao, na ere taa Abaisraeli ribaga barue ase ense yaye." 
Exodus12:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni aria ase ense ya Misiri, akabatebia." 
Exodus12:2 “Omotienyi oyo nobe oyo bwe ritang’ani asemore, oyo bw’ogochaka omwaka." 
Exodus12:3 Genda orarerie omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi oyo kera omonto ore na mwaye achore emanwa, erio kera enyomba ebe nemanwa eyemo." 
Exodus12:4 Korende onye abanto b’enyomba eyemo bare abake, batanyare koria emanwa eria bayekoore, rirorio ere na omogisangio oye, oyobasinyaine, basangere emanwa eyemo, koreng’ana buna omobaro bw’abanto bareo. Ase kera emanwa goika mobare abanto abarache koyeria koreng’ana buna kera oyomo aranyare koria." 
Exodus12:5 Mochore emanwa y’omwaka oyomo etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ebe emingichi gose egoree." 
Exodus12:6 Mochigache goika rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi oyio. Agwo omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli bachinyenye mogoroba. 
Exodus12:7 Barabwo goika baimokie amanyinga aria, bayagindie emetobwa ebere ya gesieri na omoribo o igoro bw’emetobwa, ase kera enyomba barayeriere emanwa eria." 
Exodus12:8 Ase obotuko obwo barie chinyama chiria chisambire nomorero, amo nemegati etabekiri memera, ne chinyeni chindoro." 
Exodus12:9 Timoria chinde imbese gose chiyekire ase amache, korende chionsi goika chisambwe nomorero amo nomotwe na ebirenge, ne chinyama chi’enda." 
Exodus12:10 Timotigaria gento kende goika mambia; onye kende kegotigara goika mambia mogesambe nomorero gesire. 
Exodus12:11 Enchera morayerie nero eye: Mweboyie chinkini chiaino, mokong’e, mobeke ebikoroto ase amagoro aino, mobwate chinyimbo maboko aino, moyerie nomoayerero. Naki eyio n’Epasaka y’Omonene." 
Exodus12:12 “Naki ase obotuko obwo ninche ng’ete ense ya Misiri, ing’ite abana abatangi bonsi ne ching’iti chintangi chionsi; ne chinyasae chionsi chia Misiri ninchigambie. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Exodus12:13 Amanyinga ayio abe ekemanyererio ase chinyomba chiria morabe momenyete. Ekero ndarore amanyinga aria ning’ete mbatige inwe, na amaakwa aria takobanyora inwe abasirie, ekero ndaake ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus12:14 Rituko eri inaribe asemore rituko rikoinyorwa, na inwe morirende ribe Rituko Rinene ri’Omonene. Nigo moraribwate ebiaare ase ebiaare, ribe rituko rinene ri’omoyega goika kare na kare.”" 
Exodus12:15 “Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere goika morie emegati etabekiri memera. Rituko rie ritang’ani morusie ememera korwa chinyomba chiaino kegima, ekiagera monto onde bwensi orarie omogati obekire ememera korwa rituko rie ritang’ani goika eria gatano na kabere, nigo araatananwe korwa ase obomo bw’Abaisraeli." 
Exodus12:16 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani inamobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima, na ase rituko ria gatano na kabere boigo mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Ase amatuko ayio timokora meremo ende yonsi, otatiga okoroisia endagera ase kera omonto; ayio oka naro morakore." 
Exodus12:17 Goika mobe mokorenda rituko eri rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera, ekiagera ase rituko eri nario emeganda yaino yarusetigwe ase ense ya Misiri. Morende rituko erio ebiaare ase ebiaare. Oko nakwo korabe ogochika asemore kogenderera botambe." 
Exodus12:18 “Goika morie emegati etabekiri memera, gochakera omogoroba bwe rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani goika omogoroba bwe rituko ri’emerongo ebere na rimo." 
Exodus12:19 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere ememera terorekana ase chinyomba chiaino nonya ng’ake; naki onde bwensi orarie egento kebekire ememera naatananwe korwa ase omoganda bw’Abaisraeli, onye ore omomenyi gose omobiare." 
Exodus12:20 Timoria gento kende gionsi kebekire ememera; mobe mokoria emegati etabekiri memera aande onsi morabe momenyete.” 
Exodus12:21 Musa akarangeria abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli, akabatebia, “Genda mochore chimanwa echirabaisane abanto ba kera enyomba, mochinyenye chibe chimanwa chi’epasaka." 
Exodus12:22 Erio moimokie chinsagia chia hisopo, mochitobeke ase amanyinga are egetaabo ime, mogindie omoriibo bw’emetobwa ya gesieri igoro amo nemetobwa eria ebere. Onde tabaisa gosoka korwa nyomba mwaye goika mambia." 
Exodus12:23 Na ki Omonene nache aete ense ya Misiri aite Abamisiri, korende ekero ararore amanyinga agindirie omoriibo bw’emetobwa ya gesieri igoro na emetobwa eria ebere, nigo araete egesieri ekio, gose tagotiga oria omosiria asoe chinyomba chiaino abaite." 
Exodus12:24 Ring’ana eri goika morirende, ribe ogochika kwaino, aye amo nabana bao kogenderera botambe." 
Exodus12:25 Ekero moraike ase ense eria Omonene arabae, buna abarierete eira, erio namobe mokomoruera ekeng’wanso eke." 
Exodus12:26 Na agwo ekero abana baino barache kobaboria: Engencho y’amang’ana aya ninki? 
Exodus12:27 Inamobairanerie: Eke nekeng’wanso ki’Epasaka y’Omonene, ekiagera naetete chinyomba chi’Abaisraeli aaria Misiri ekero aitete Abamisiri, korende agatiga chinyomba chiaito.” Erio abanto bagatung’ama inse, bagasasima Nyasae." 
Exodus12:28 Abaisraeli bakagenda, bagakora onsi aya Omonene achigete Musa na Haroni." 
Exodus12:29 Bogachia koba botuko gati, Omonene agaita abana abatangi bonsi amo ne ching’iti chintangi chionsi ase ense ya Misiri, gochakera omwana omotangi o Farao oyoikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obogambi, goika omwana omotangi bw’omonto osibire echela, ne ching’iti chintangi chionsi." 
Exodus12:30 Farao akaimoka botuko, ere amo nabasomba baye bonsi, na Abamisiri bonsi. Ebirero ebinene bikaba ase ense ya Misiri, ekiagera nyomba ende tiyatigarete monto atakwete." 
Exodus12:31 Farao akarangeria Musa na Haroni botuko, akabatebia, “Imoka, morue aa ase abanto baane, inwe na Abaisraeli bonsi! Genda mokorere Omonene buna mwabeire mokoboria!" 
Exodus12:32 Ira ching’ondi chiaino ne chiombe chiaino buna mwaboririe, morue aa; monsabere, na inche nsesenigwe.”" 
Exodus12:33 Abamisiri bagasorora abanto abwo, bakabaayereria barue ase ense yabo; naki nigo batebete ng’a, “Aande nigo torabaise gokwa intwe twensi.”" 
Exodus12:34 Abanto abwo bakaimokia amabomba abo ay’obosie ritang’ani atarabekwa memera, bakaboa ebituba biabo, ebi baare gokonyera obosie, ase ebitambaa biabo baare kwambara, bakabibogoria ase amareko abo." 
Exodus12:35 Abaisraeli konya bakorire buna Musa abatebetie; konya basabire korwa ase Abamisiri ebinto bie chifeta na ebie chitahabu amo ne chianga. 
Exodus12:36 Omonene konya oeire abanto abwo ogwancherwa ase Abamisiri, na barabwo bakabaa kende gionsi eki baganetie. Ase enchera eye bagasakora Abamisiri." 
Exodus12:37 Abaisraeli bakamanora korwa Ramesesi, bagaika Sukoti. Nigo barenge abasacha abaare kwegendera koreng’ana chilifu amagana atano na rimo (600,000), abakungu na abana tibabaretwe." 
Exodus12:38 Na omoganda omonene mono bw’abanto b’ebisaku ao ao bakagenda komo, bakairana ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chitugo chinde chinyinge mono." 
Exodus12:39 Ase amabomba aria barentanete korwa Misiri bakaroisia emegati etabekiri memera. Ememera tiyarengeo, ekiagera nigo baseretigwe korwa Misiri ase obwango, bataranyora ribaga koroisia endagera bagochia koria." 
Exodus12:40 Abaisraeli konya bamenyire ase ense ya Misiri ase engaki y’emiaka amagana ane, na emerongo etato (430)." 
Exodus12:41 Emiaka eyio amagana ane, na emerongo etato, koyaerire, ase rituko erio erio emeganda yonsi y’Omonene ekang’anya korwa ase ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus12:42 Obotuko obwo nigo bwarenge obotuko bw’okorenda, ekero Omonene abeire ang’e ase okong’anyia Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Obwo nobotuko bw’Omonene, bogwenerete korendwa n’Abaisraeli ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Exodus12:43 Omonene agatebia Musa na Haroni, “Omoroberio bw’Epasaka noro oyo: Omonto omomenyi tabaisa koyeria," 
Exodus12:44 korende omosomba onde bwensi omogorwa chibesa ere ayerie gokwamwarokirie. 
Exodus12:45 Omogeni omenyete asemore, gose omonto orikire tibayeria Epasaka eyio." 
Exodus12:46 Goika erierwe nyomba ime, timobaisa gosokia chinyama chinde isiko; timobuna riuga riaye rinde rionsi." 
Exodus12:47 Omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli goika bakore omoyega oyio. 
Exodus12:48 Onye omomenyi omenyete bwoo bwanchete koria Epasaka y’Omonene, ere na abasacha bonsi abare amo nere goika barokigwe. Erio anyare koria Epasaka, na ere abe buna omobiare oino. Korende onde bwensi otarokiri tayeria." 
Exodus12:49 Ogochika nokomo ase omobiare bw’Abaisraeli na omomenyi oyomenyete ase egati yaino.” 
Exodus12:50 Abaisraeli bonsi bagakora buna Omonene achigete Musa na Haroni. 
Exodus12:51 Ase rituko erio erio Omonene akang’anyia emeganda yonsi y’Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri. 
Exodus13:1 Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Exodus13:2 “Nyatananere kera omwana omotangi bw’Abaisraeli, oyo okoigora enda ya ng’ina, ne ching’iti chintangi boigo. Abwo nabaane, na chirochio nechiane.”" 
Exodus13:3 Erio Musa agatebia abanto, “Mobe mokoinyora rituko eri mwang’anyete korwa ase ense ya Misiri, ense eyio mwarenge abasomba, ekiagera Omonene abang’anyetie korwa agwo nokoboko kwaye gwe chinguru. Omogati obekire ememera toriegwa." 
Exodus13:4 Rituko ria rero ase omotienyi bw’Abibu noro mokong’anya korwa aa. 
Exodus13:5 Omonene nabarierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nabae ense y’Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abaamori, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi. Eyio nense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke. Ekero arabaikie agwo goika mobe mokomoruera ekeng’wanso eke ase omotienyi oyio." 
Exodus13:6 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere mobe mokoria emegati etabekiri memera; ase rituko ria gatano na kabere ribe Rituko Rinene ri’Omonene. 
Exodus13:7 Ase amatuko atano na abere emegati etabekiri memera eriegwe. Emegati ebekire ememera, gose ememera emenyene, tibirorekana ase ense yaino engima." 
Exodus13:8 Aye ase rituko erio otebie omwana oo: Aya nigo nkoyakora ase okoinyora aya Omonene ankorerete ekero ang’anyetie korwa Misiri. 
Exodus13:9 Amang’ana aya abe ekemanyererio ase okoboko kwao, na ase obosio bwao abe ekeinyorio kegokoinyoria, erinde ogenderere gokwana amachiko Omonene, ekiagera Omonene nakong’anyetie korwa Misiri nokoboko kwaye gwe chinguru." 
Exodus13:10 Ase ayio ogochika oko goika okorende omwaka ase omwaka ase engaki eyio echikire.” 
Exodus13:11 “Ekero Omonene aragoikie ase ense ya Kanani, buna akorierete eira, aye amo ne chisokoro chiao, na akoyee," 
Exodus13:12 omwatananere kera omwana omoisia omotangi; na kera eng’iti entangi y’eeri, na emingichi, na egoree; echio nigo chirabe echi’Omonene." 
Exodus13:13 Korende kera emori entangi y’etigere goika oyeboorie ase okorua emanwa y’eng’ondi ebe ekeng’wanso. Onye tibwancheti koyebooria goika oyebune ebigoti. Kera omwana omoisia omotangi o mwanyabanto goika omoboorie. 
Exodus13:14 Engaki erache omwana oo karakoborie: Engencho y’amang’ana aya ninki? Goika omoiranerie: Ase okoboko kwaye gwe chinguru Omonene agatong’anyia korwa Misiri agwo ase twarenge abasomba. 
Exodus13:15 Naki ekero Farao akong’etie enkoro yaye akaanga gotoa ribaga kogenda, Omonene agaita kera omwana omotangi ase ense ya Misiri amo ne ching’iti chintangi chionsi. Nakio gekogera nkoruera Omonene kera eng’iti entangi y’eeri, na emingichi, na egoree, na omwana one omoisia omotangi nigo nkomobooria." 
Exodus13:16 Amang’ana aya goika abe ekemanyererio ase okoboko kwao na ase obosio bwao, ekiagera Omonene natorusetie korwa Misiri nokoboko kwaye gwe chinguru.”" 
Exodus13:17 Ekero Farao aete abanto ribaga bagende, Nyasae tabaraa baetere ense y’Abafilisti, nonya enchera eyio yarenge omobutokanio. Nyasae nigo arengereretie ng’a aande onye abanto aba bagochia koumera esegi mbabaisa koirana Misiri." 
Exodus13:18 Ase ayio Nyasae akabaraa goetanana ase erooro gochia Enyancha Embariri. Na Abaisraeli bakarua ase ense ya Misiri bare nebirwanero bi’esegi. 
Exodus13:19 Musa akairana amauga a Yusufu, ekiagera Yusufu konya otianirie Abaisraeli, agateba, “Ekero Nyasae arabachere abakonye, goika moire amauga aane, mogende naro.”" 
Exodus13:20 Barabwo bakaimoka bakarua Sukoti, bagatoora agwo Etamu aase erooro echakerete." 
Exodus13:21 Omonene akaba okobatang’ana, omobaso ase riire riare buna esiiro aborokie enchera, na botuko ase omorero orenge buna esiiro abae oborabu, erio barore ase bakogenda, omobaso na obotuko." 
Exodus13:22 Riire riria riare kobaraa mobaso, na omorero botuko, tibiare korua ase amasio abo." 
Exodus14:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia." 
Exodus14:2 “Batebie Abaisraeli ng’a bairane gochia Pi‐Hahiroti, batoore agwo ase egati ya Migidoli na enyancha kororia Baali‐Sefoni ase enyancha mbarabare." 
Exodus14:3 Farao narengererie ng’a Abaisraeli batantanire enchera bakogenda, na erooro yabatangire tibagenda." 
Exodus14:4 Inche ninkong’ie enkoro ya Farao, ache kobabwatia korwa nyuma yaino, na inche ninyenyorere ogotogigwa ase okobua Farao amo nomoganda oye bwonsi, na Abamisiri bamanye ng’a ninche Omonene.” Abaisraeli bagakora buna batebetigwe." 
Exodus14:5 Ekero Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, atebetigwe ng’a Abaisraeli batamire, ere amo nabasomba baye bakaonchora ebirengererio biabo, bagateba, “Inki eke twakora? Tokaa Abaisraeli ribaga korua aa ase barenge gotokorera.”" 
Exodus14:6 Farao akabeka egari yaye y’esegi ang’e, akaira abarwani baye amo nere." 
Exodus14:7 Naende akaira chigari amagana atano na rimo, echi achorete, amo ne chigari chinde chionsi, na abariini chituoni bachiriinete." 
Exodus14:8 Omonene agakong’ia enkoro ya Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, na ere akabwatia Abaisraeli korwa nyuma, ekero barabwo bang’anyete bare nobomwenu." 
Exodus14:9 Abamisiri bakababwatia korwa nyuma amo ne chibarasi chionsi, ne chigari chia Farao, na abariini chibarasi chiaye, na abarwani baye bonsi, bakabanyora batoorire enyancha mbarabare, ang’e na Pi‐Hahiroti kororia Baali‐Sefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Ekero Farao abeire ang’e kobaikeera, Abaisraeli bakerigereria, bakarora Abamisiri bakobabwatia korwa nyuma. Erio agwo barabwo bakaba nobwoba obonene, bakarera ase Omonene." 
Exodus14:11 Bagatebia Musa, “Inee! Chimbeera tichiarenge Misiri? Nase ayio ogatorenta toche gokwera aa ase erooro? Igo gwatokorera bobe ekero gwatorusia korwa Misiri!" 
Exodus14:12 Titwagotebetie ayio aaria Misiri? Tokagotebia ng’a: Totige tokorere Abamisiri. Naki anga mbuya tware gokorera Abamisiri kobua gokwera aiga ase erooro.” 
Exodus14:13 Musa akairaneria abanto, “Timwoboa, motenene bokong’u! Igo namorore buna Omonene arabatoorie rero; naki Abamisiri aba moroche rero iga, timokobarora naende nonya ng’ake." 
Exodus14:14 Omonene nabarwanere inwe, na inwe mokire‐kiri rioka.”" 
Exodus14:15 Omonene akaboria Musa, “Inki okorera asende? Batebie Abaisraeli bagenderere bosio." 
Exodus14:16 Aye imokia enyimbo yao, na orambore okoboko kwao igoro y’enyancha, erinde yaatananeke, Abaisraeli banyare goeta egati y’enyancha ase ense enkamoku." 
Exodus14:17 Rora, ninkore chinkoro chi’Abamisiri chibe chinkong’u, barabwo mbababwatie korwa nyuma. Nabo inche inyenyorere ogotogigwa ase okobua Farao amo nemeganda yaye yonsi, ne chigari chiaye, na abariini chibarasi chiaye." 
Exodus14:18 Na Abamisiri nabamanye ng’a ninche Omonene, ekero nkwenyorera ogotogigwa ase okomobua Farao amo ne chigari chiaye na abariini chibarasi chiaye.”" 
Exodus14:19 Erio omomalaika bw’Omonene, oyio otang’aine omoganda bw’Abaisraeli, akairana nyuma yabo. Ne riire riria riateneine buna esiiro bosio bwabo rikairana nyuma yabo," 
Exodus14:20 rikabeera gati y’omoganda bw’Abaisraeli na oyo bw’Abamisiri. Agwo riire riria rikabao amo nomosunte; korende ase obotuko riire rikarenta oborabu. Na ase obotuko obogima omoganda oyomo toikanete ang’e noyonde. 
Exodus14:21 Erio Musa akarambora okoboko kwaye igoro y’enyancha; na Omonene agasukia enyancha gochia nyuma ne chinguru chi’omwaga okorwa moocha okagusa obotuko obogima. Naboigo agakora enyancha koba ense enkamoku. Amache agaatananeka," 
Exodus14:22 na Abaisraeli bagaeta egati y’enyancha ase ense enkamoku. Amache akaba agotenena buna orwaki ensemo ya borio na ensemo ya bomosi asebare. 
Exodus14:23 Na Abamisiri bagasoa na kobabwatia gochia gati y’enyancha amo ne chibarasi chionsi chia Farao, ne chigari chiaye, na abariini chibarasi." 
Exodus14:24 Bwachia koba mambia, Omonene akaba origereretie omoganda bw’Abamisiri korwa ase esiiro y’omorero na eye riire, akabatantania." 
Exodus14:25 Omonene akagokora amagoro e chigari chiabo, goika bagasinywa kogenda bosio. Erio Abamisiri bagateba, “Tiga totame korwa ase Abaisraeli, ekiagera Omonene nkobarwanera are mamincha yaito intwe Abamisiri.”" 
Exodus14:26 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Rambora okoboko kwao igoro y’enyancha, erinde amache airanerane igoro y’Abamisiri, ne chigari chiabo amo nabariini chibarasi.”" 
Exodus14:27 Musa akarambora okoboko kwaye igoro y’enyancha, na ekero bogokiamoka, amache akairana ase konya are botambe. Abamisiri bagachaka gotama, bakamerwa naro. Naboigo Omonene akabasiria ase enyancha gati‐gati." 
Exodus14:28 Amache akairanerana, akamera chigari, na abariini chibarasi amo nomoganda bwonsi bw’abarwani ba Farao, abatunyanete Abaisraeli, gochia ase enyancha. Monto onde tatigara nonya noyomo." 
Exodus14:29 Korende Abaisraeli bakagenderera goeta egati y’enyancha ase ense enkamoku, amache akaba ateneine buna orwaki ensemo ya borio na ensemo ya bomosi asebare." 
Exodus14:30 Naboigo ase rituko riria Omonene atooretie Abaisraeli korwa ase amaboko ’Abamisiri; na Abaisraeli bakarora Abamisiri bakwete bacheng’enenete ase engegu y’enyancha. 
Exodus14:31 Na ekero Abaisraeli baroche buna Omonene aorokirie okobua kwaye okonene igoro y’Abamisiri, bakamoiroka Omonene, bakamwegena Omonene na Musa, omosomba oye." 
Exodus15:1 Erio Musa na Abaisraeli bakamoterera Omonene ogotera oko, bagoteba: “Nimoterere Omonene, ekiagera ere obuire ase okobua okonene; chibarasi amo nabachiriinete obarimeirie ase enyancha ime.”" 
Exodus15:2 “Omonene nere chinguru chiane, nimoterere ere, ere nogotooreka kwane. Ere Nyasae one, nimotogie; ere Nyasae o tata, ninterere obonene bwaye." 
Exodus15:3 Omonene nomorwani bwe chisegi, Omonene nario erieta riaye." 
Exodus15:4 Orutire chigari chia Farao amo nomoganda oye ase enyancha ime; abarwani baye abachore obarimeirie ase Enyancha Embariri. 
Exodus15:5 Amache abatubire, barimeire chindiba ime buna rigena rikorutwa.”" 
Exodus15:6 “Omonene, okoboko kwao gw’okorio nkore nokobua okonene, Omonene, okoboko kwao gw’okorio ngosenyente ababisa." 
Exodus15:7 Ase okobua kwao okonene nigo okobaiyeria inse abagokoimokera; endamwamu yao egwoka, nigo ekobasamba buna chimboba chinyomo." 
Exodus15:8 Endamwamu yao entindi ekagera amache akaimoka, agatenena buna orwaki, enyancha egakamoka goika inse kegima.”" 
Exodus15:9 “Omobisa agateba,” “Nimbabwatie, mbaikeere, mbiatanane ebi ndasakore, omoyo one oisaneke; ninsomore omoyio one o birende, k nimbasirie nokoboko kwane.”" 
Exodus15:10 Naboigo ekero aye kwagusete buna omwaga, amache akabamera; bakamerwa buna embunde ekorimera ase amache amange ime, yarika inse." 
Exodus15:11 “Omonene, ning’o onga buna aye ase egati ye chinyasae? Ning’o onga buna aye ore nobonene na obochenu? Naye ogwenerete koirokwa na gotogigwa, aye naye oyogokora amakumia." 
Exodus15:12 Ekero kwaramborete okoboko kwao gw’okorio, ense ekabamera.”" 
Exodus15:13 “Ase obwanchani bwao botari koera okaraa abanto aba kwabooretie, ase chinguru chiao okabaikia ase obomenyo bwao obochenu." 
Exodus15:14 Abanto b’ebisaku bakayaigwa, bagatengechigwa ase omoondoko, omoichano na obororo bikabwata abamenyete Bofilisti." 
Exodus15:15 Abagambi b’Edomu bakaondoka, abanto abanene ba Moabu bakabwatwa nomotengecho, na abanto bonsi ba Kanani bakerusia moyo." 
Exodus15:16 Omoondoko na obwoba bikababwata; ase engencho y’okobua gw’okoboko kwao bagatenena, bagakira‐kiri buna amagena, goika abanto bao baetire, ee, Omonene, goika abanto bao kwabooretie baetire." 
Exodus15:17 Nobasoyie na kobabeka ase egetunwa kiao aye omonyene, aase aria kweroiseretie, aye Omonene, obomenyo obochenu kwaagachete namaboko ao." 
Exodus15:18 Omonene nagambe kare na kare.” 
Exodus15:19 Ekero chibarasi chia Farao, amo ne chigari na abariini basoete nyancha ime, Omonene akairania amache igoro yabo, akabatuba; korende Abaisraeli bagaeta egati y’enyancha ase ense enkamoku." 
Exodus15:20 Na Miriamu omobani, omoiseke omwabo Haroni, akaimokia ekebangarara kiaye, na abakungu bonsi bakamobwatia bakobugia ebibangarara biabo na gotenga." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu akabaitaberia, na gotera, “Moterere Omonene, ekiagera ere obuire ase okobua okonene, chibarasi amo nabachiriinete obarimeirie ase enyancha ime.”" 
Exodus15:22 Musa agatang’ana Abaisraeli kogenda orogendo korwa ase Enyancha Embariri gochia erooro ya Suri. Ase engaki y’amatuko atato bagataara ase erooro, tibanyora amache." 
Exodus15:23 Erio bagaika aase are korokwa Mara, tibanyara konywa amache arengeo, ekiagera arenge amaroro mono. Nakio kiagerete aase aria akarokwa Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Agwo abanto bakemurunganeria Musa, bakamoboria, “Ninki tokonywa?”" 
Exodus15:25 Musa akarera ase Omonene, na Omonene akamworokia omote. Omote oyio Musa akayoruta amache ime, na amache aria akaba amaansu. Agwo Omonene akabekera abanto amachiko akobaraa, na agwo akaba okobateema." 
Exodus15:26 Akabora, “Oise koigwera aya inche Omonene Nyasae oo ngokwana, na koyakora ayare boronge ase amaiso aane, na gotegerera amachiko aane, na kobwata emeroberio yane yonsi, rirorio inche tingokobekera amarwaire ande onsi buna aria nabekerete Abamisiri; naki ninche Omonene oo, oyogokogwenia.”" 
Exodus15:27 Erio abanto bagaika Elimu; agwo chinsoko nchiarengeo ikomi na ibere, na emekendo emerongo etano na ebere. Bagatoora agwo ang’e namache." 
Exodus16:1 Omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli bakamanora na koimoka korwa Elimu, na ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o kabere nyuma kobarure ense ya Misiri, bagaika ase erooro ya Sini, eyio ere egati y’Elimu na Sinai." 
Exodus16:2 Abaisraeli bonsi bakemurunganeria Musa na Haroni aaria ase erooro," 
Exodus16:3 bakabatebia, “Nanga mbuya onye twakwerete ase amaboko ’Omonene aaria ase ense ya Misiri. Agwo twaikaransete ase chinyongo chie chinyama, tware koria endagera enyinge, twaigota. Korende bono mwatorentire aa ase erooro ase ogotoita intwe twensi nenchara.”" 
Exodus16:4 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Rora, nimbatwerie omogati korwa igoro. Kera rituko abanto bagende isiko, basangererie eyekobaisana ase rituko erimo. Naboigo mbateeme gose mbaganetie kobwatia amachiko aane, gose yaya." 
Exodus16:5 Korende rituko ria gatano na rimo goika basangererie na koroisia ara kabere buna bagosangereria amatuko ande.” 
Exodus16:6 Erio Musa na Haroni bagatebia Abaisraeli bonsi, “Mogoroba rero inwe nario moramanye ng’a Omonene nere obarusia korwa ase ense ya Misiri," 
Exodus16:7 na mambia inamorore obonene bw’Omonene, ekiagera ere oigure buna mwamwemurunganeirie. Ee, ere mwamwemurunganeirie, tari intwe. Intwe inki toisaine?”" 
Exodus16:8 Naende Musa agateba, “Erio nario moramanye obonene bw’Omonene ekero arabae chinyama morie mogoroba, na mambia abae omogati morie, moigote. Naki Omonene oigure buna mwamwemurunganeirie. Intwe titoisaini gento. Tari intwe mwemurunganeirie, korende n’Omonene.”" 
Exodus16:9 Musa agatebia Haroni, “Batebie omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli basuke gocha ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekiagera oigure okwemurungania kwabo.”" 
Exodus16:10 Ekaba ekero Haroni arenge gokwana nomoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, barabwo bakeonchora bakarigereria gochia ase erooro, bakarora obonene bw’Omonene bokooroka korwa ase riire." 
Exodus16:11 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Exodus16:12 “Naigure okwemurungania kw’Abaisraeli. Kwana nabarabwo, obatebie ng’a engaki ya mogoroba mbaegwe enyama barie, na mambia inabaigote omogati. Erio bamanye ng’a ninche Omonene, Nyasae obo.”" 
Exodus16:13 Mogoroba chinkware chigacha, chigaichora ase batoorete, na inkio mambia aase onsi aetanaine aase aria akanyorwa atoorire riime." 
Exodus16:14 Na ekero riime riakamokire, bakarora inse aria ase erooro ebinto binga buna amagoocho, bikarorekana buna obosie oborabu." 
Exodus16:15 Ekero Abaisraeli babiroche tibamanyete gose mbinto ki, bagachaka koborania barabwo ase barabwo, “Mbinto ki biria?” Musa akabatebia, “Oria nomogati oyo Omonene abaeire morie." 
Exodus16:16 Ring’ana erio nario Omonene achigete: Sangereria endagera eyio, kera oyomo buna agwenerete, ebimunu bibere ase kera omonto. Kera omonto asangererie buna abwate abanto bang’ana ase eema yaye.”" 
Exodus16:17 Abaisraeli bagakora bo, bagasangereria abande enyinge, na abande enke." 
Exodus16:18 Korende ekero bayerengete ase ebirengo, oyosangereretie enyinge tatigaria kende, na ere oyosangereretie enke taremeretwe gento. Kera oyomo konya osangereirie buna okoria kwaye kwang’ana." 
Exodus16:19 Musa akabatebia, “Monto onde tatigaria endagera ende goika mambia.”" 
Exodus16:20 Korende tibaigwera Musa; abande bagatigaria eyende goika rituko ria kabere, na mambia yaye bakayenyora yagundire na yasoirwe namakonde, na Musa akababea mono." 
Exodus16:21 Ase igo kera emambia bakaba bagosangereria kera oyomo buna okoria kwaye kwang’ana; korende ekero omobaso oyesambire, yanyititoka." 
Exodus16:22 Ase rituko ria gatano na rimo baba bagosangereria endagera eria ekerengo ara kabere, ase kera omonto ebimunu bine. Abagaaka bonsi b’omoganda bakagenda gotebia Musa amang’ana ayio." 
Exodus16:23 Ere akabairaneria, “Ring’ana erio nario Omonene konya atebire: Ankio nerituko richenu ri’ogotimoka, Esabato Enchenu yaatananirwe ase Omonene. Mosambe eki moganetie gosamba, na moiyeke eki moganetie koiyeka, na ebiratigare mobigache goika ankio.”" 
Exodus16:24 Na buna Musa abachigete bakagacha endagera eria yatigarete goika rituko ria kabere; ero tiyagunda etioke, gose tiyasogwa namakonde." 
Exodus16:25 Musa akabatebia, “Karie eye rero, ekiagera rero n’Esabato yaatananirwe ase Omonene. Rero timokoyerora isiko ase erooro." 
Exodus16:26 Ase amatuko atano na rimo mobe mokoyesangereria. Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere n’Esabato, endagera eyio tegotoka ase rituko erio.”" 
Exodus16:27 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere abande ase abanto baria bakagenda koyesangereria, tibayenyora." 
Exodus16:28 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Ngoika ririri morabe mokwanga ogotebereria kwane na amachiko aane?" 
Exodus16:29 Inyora ng’a inche Omonene nabaeire Esabato. Ase rituko ria gatano na rimo nkobaa endagera y’amatuko abere. Ase ayio, ase rituko eri ria gatano na kabere mobeere kera omonto aase aye, onde tabaisa korua inka.”" 
Exodus16:30 Naboigo abanto bakaba bagotimoka ase rituko ria gatano na kabere. 
Exodus16:31 Abaisraeli bakaroka endagera eyio mana; ero nigo yare buna chinyeke chi’amaemba enkomba, chindabu, na obwansu bwaye nigo bware buna omogati ore nobooke." 
Exodus16:32 Musa akabatebia, “Ring’ana eri nario Omonene achigete: Ebimunu bibere bi’endagera eye egachwe ase engencho ye chinderia chiaino, erinde banyare gocha korora omogati oyo nabaete mokoria ase erooro, ekero nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus16:33 Musa agatebia Haroni, “Imokia ekeguuru, obeke ebimunu bibere bia mana imeo, oyebeke ase obosio bw’Omonene egachwe ase engencho y’ebigori bigochi‐gocha.”" 
Exodus16:34 Buna Omonene achigete Musa, naboigo Haroni ayebegete bosio bw’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, ekagachwao." 
Exodus16:35 Abaisraeli bakagenderera koria mana engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, goika bagaika aase abanto bamenyete; bakayeria goika bagaika orobebe rw’ense ya Kanani." 
Exodus16:36 (Ekerengo ki’ebimunu bibere ekio nensemo ya ikomi y’ekerengo gi’efa.) 
Exodus17:1 Omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli okaimoka korwa erooro ya Sini. Barabwo bakabwatia orogendo rwabo, bakana‐gotoora buna Omonene abachigete, Bagaika Refidimu, bagatoora aroro, korende mache tarengeo abanto baare konyara konywa." 
Exodus17:2 Erio abanto bakomania Musa, bagoteba, “Toe amache tonywe!” Musa akabatebia, “Nase ki mokonyomania? Nase ki mogoteema Omonene?”" 
Exodus17:3 Agwo bakaba nerang’o enene y’amache, bakemurunganeria Musa, bakabora, “Ninki gwatoruseria Misiri gocha aa, amo nabana baito ne chitugo chiaito, togokwa ase erang’o?”" 
Exodus17:4 Musa akarera ase Omonene, akabora, “Ninki ngokorera abanto aba? Barabwo nigo bare ang’e kong’aka amagena.”" 
Exodus17:5 Omonene akairaneria Musa, akamotebia, “Oire amo naye abagaaka bande b’Abaisraeli, amo nenyimbo yao, eria kwaagete orooche, motang’ane abanto mogende." 
Exodus17:6 Nondore inteneine agwo ase egetare kia Horebu, nkoganyete. Oake egetare, na amache arwe aroro, erinde abanto banyore banywe.” Musa agakora bo ase amasio ’abagaaka b’Abaisraeli." 
Exodus17:7 Akaroka aase aria Masa na Meriba, ase engencho y’eriomana ri’Abaisraeli, naende ekiagera abanto bateemete Omonene, bakobora, “Inee! Omonene nare aa ase egati yaito, gose taiyo?”" 
Exodus17:8 Abaameleki bakaoroka korwania Abaisraeli aaria Refidimu. 
Exodus17:9 Erio Musa agatebia Yoshua, “Tochorere abanto bagende korwana n’Abaameleki ankio; inche ninche ntenene ekegoro igoro, na enyimbo ya Nyasae inyebwate koboko kwane.”" 
Exodus17:10 Yoshua agakora buna Musa amotebetie, akarwania Abaameleki, na Musa, na Haroni, na Huri bagatiira gochia ekegoro igoro." 
Exodus17:11 Ekaba Musa kaimokirie amaboko aye igoro, rirorio Abaisraeli babua, na kayairanirie inse, Abaameleki babua." 
Exodus17:12 Ekero amaboko a Musa arosire, Haroni na Huri bakaimokia rigena, bakaritereka inse, na Musa akariikaransera. Erio bakaba bagosiira amaboko a Musa, oyomo okoboko okomo, na oyonde okonde. Naboigo bakamosiira goika erioba rikagwa." 
Exodus17:13 Na igo Yoshua akabua Abaameleki kegima, akabaita nemioro." 
Exodus17:14 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Yarike amang’ana aya ase ebuku, abe amang’ana ’okoinyorwa, otebie Yoshua ng’a ninkore Abaameleki bebwe kegima, tibabaisa koinyorwa inse y’erioba.”" 
Exodus17:15 Musa akaagacha egesasimero agwo, agakeroka “Yahwe Nisi”, engencho yaye, “Omonene nebendera yane y’esegi”," 
Exodus17:16 agateba, “Ninyimokie okoboko kwane igoro, kobe ekemanyererio ki’Omonene, na gotiana ng’a Omonene nigo aragenderere korwania Abaameleki ebiaare ase ebiaare.”" 
Exodus18:1 Yetero, omokuani o Midiani, ise biara Musa, akaigwa amang’ana onsi aya Nyasae akoreire Musa na Abaisraeli, abanto baye, na buna Omonene abang’anyetie korwa Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Erio Yetero agacha, akarentana Sipora, moka Musa. Musa konya omoiranirie ase ise." 
Exodus18:3 Naboigo akarentana Gerisomu na Elieseri, abana abamura babere ba Musa. (Musa nigo atebete, “Nabeire omomenyi ase ense engeni”, na akaroka omwana oyomo Gerisomu." 
Exodus18:4 Naende agateba, “Nyasae o tata obeire omokonyi one, agantooria korwa ase ogoita gwa Farao”, na akaroka oria onde Eliezeri.)" 
Exodus18:5 Nabo Yetero, ise biara Musa, amo na moka Musa na abana baye babere, bagacha ase erooro aase Musa konya atoorire ase egetunwa kia Nyasae." 
Exodus18:6 Agatoma amang’ana ase Musa, okomotebia, “Inche Yetero, iso biara, nachire amo na mokao na abana baye babere.”" 
Exodus18:7 Erio Musa agasoka komorotota, agatung’ama na komonyunyunta. Ekero bakwananirie bagasoa ase eema." 
Exodus18:8 Musa agatebia ise biara aya onsi Omonene akorerete Farao amo n’Abamisiri ase engencho y’Abaisraeli, na obokong’u bwonsi obwo banyorete inchera, naende buna Omonene abatooretie." 
Exodus18:9 Yetero akagoka ase amaya onsi Nyasae akorerete Abaisraeli ase okobatooria korwa ase amaboko ’Abamisiri," 
Exodus18:10 akabora, “Omonene atogigwe, oyo obatooretie abanto baye korwa ase amaboko ’Abamisiri, na korwa ase Farao, obatooretie korwa ase obosomba obwo." 
Exodus18:11 Bono namanyire ng’a Omonene nomonene kobua chinyasae chinde chionsi, ekiagera atooririe abanto baye korwa ase Abamisiri abwo babaenenerete.”" 
Exodus18:12 Erio Yetero akarentera Nyasae ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa na ebing’wanso binde bi’okonyenywa. Haroni amo nabagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli bagacha bakaragera amo na ise biara Musa, ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
Exodus18:13 Rituko ria kabere Musa agaikaransa kogamba ebina bi’abanto; na abanto nigo barengeo bamoetanaine korwa mambia goika mogoroba. 
Exodus18:14 Ekero ise biara Musa aroche onsi aya Musa are gokorera abanto, akamoboria. “Inki eke ogokorera abanto? Naki oikaransete aye bweka, na abanto bagoetanaine korwa mambia goika mogoroba?”" 
Exodus18:15 Musa akamoiraneria, “Nekiagera abanto bagonchichera, bakorigia oboraai bwa Nyasae." 
Exodus18:16 Ekero bomanire nigo bagocha asende, na inche nabagambera ebina biabo na kobamanyia emeroberio ya Nyasae na amachiko aye.”" 
Exodus18:17 Yetero agatebia Musa, “Enchera eye y’okobagambera ebina biabo teri engiya." 
Exodus18:18 Nigo okorosigwa, aye amo nabanto aba bonsi bare aa. Naki emeremo eye nemerito mono asore, tokonyara koyekora aye bweka." 
Exodus18:19 Bono ntegerera, ngotebie chisemi chingiya orakore, na Nyasae nabe amo naye. Aye kabe oyo ogotenenera abanto ase obosio bwa Nyasae, na komoirera amang’ana abo." 
Exodus18:20 Goika oborokererie amachiko na emeroberio, na obatebererie buna ebagwenerete babe na gokora." 
Exodus18:21 Korende ochore abanto abamoirogete Nyasae, abegenwa, abatakorigia riaaki, abaranyare koba abaraai b’abanto b’emeganda elifu, ne rigana, na emerongo etano, na ikomi." 
Exodus18:22 Otige barabwo babe bakogambera abanto ebina bia botambe. Ebina ebikong’u birobio bakobirentere, korende ebire ebike babigambe barabwo boka. Ase enchera eyio egurube yao tekoba endito mono, ekiagera barabwo mbayebogorie amo naye." 
Exodus18:23 Korakore igo, buna Nyasae aragochikere, aye nonyore chinguru chi’okogenderera, na abanto aba bonsi nabagende chinka chiabo bare nomorembe.”" 
Exodus18:24 Musa agancha amang’ana aya ise biara amosemetie. 
Exodus18:25 Agachora abanto b’Abaisraeli abaranyare gokora emeremo eyio, akababeka babe abaraai b’Abaisraeli, b’emeganda elifu, ne rigana, na emerongo etano, na ikomi." 
Exodus18:26 Barabwo bakaba bakogamba ebina bi’abanto botambe. Ebina ebikong’u baba bakobirentera Musa, korende ebire ebike baba bakobigamba abanyene." 
Exodus18:27 Erio Musa agakooba ise biara, akamotiga okogenda ase ense yaye." 
Exodus19:1 Rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatato nyuma Abaisraeli kobarure ase ense ya Misiri, bagaika ase erooro ya Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Bakamanora korwa Refidimu, bagaika ase erooro ya Sinai, bagatoora kororia egetunwa gia Sinai." 
Exodus19:3 Musa agatiira gochia egetunwa igoro koumerana na Nyasae. Omonene akamorangeria agwo ase egetunwa, akamotebia, “Amang’ana aya naro oratebie abanto b’egesaku kia Yakobo, baria Abaisraeli:" 
Exodus19:4 Inwe mwarorire aya nakoreire Abamisiri, na buna nababogoretie inwe buna ensoti ekobogoria amage aye ase chimbaba chiaye, nabarentire aiga asende." 
Exodus19:5 Bono komoranyigwere na kobwata okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, rirorio inamobe abanto baane. Naki ense yonsi neyane, korende inwe inamobe abanto baane abachore kobua abanto b’ebisaku binde." 
Exodus19:6 Inwe inamobe oboruoti bwane, abanto bagonkorera buna abakuani, egesaku kiane egechenu. Amang’ana aya naro oratebie Abaisraeli.”" 
Exodus19:7 Erio Musa akagenda akarangeria abagaaka b’Abaisraeli amo, akabatebia amang’ana ayio onsi Omonene amochigete." 
Exodus19:8 Na abanto bonsi amo bakairaneria, bakabora, “Ayio onsi Omonene atebire, inatoyakore.” Musa nere akairera Omonene amang’ana abanto bairaneretie." 
Exodus19:9 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Ninchiche asore inde ase riire ririto ime, erio abanto aba baigwe kongokwana naye, na barabwo bakwegene botambe.” Erio Musa agatebia Omonene amang’ana abanto bairaneretie." 
Exodus19:10 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Genda ase abanto aba, obachene rero na ankio. Obatebie basibie chianga chiabo," 
Exodus19:11 bebeke ang’e goika rituko ria gatato, ekiagera ase rituko eri inche Omonene ning’ike ase egetunwa gia Sinai, agwo ase abanto bonsi barandore." 
Exodus19:12 Aye goika obekere abanto aba orobebe roetanane egetunwa eke, obatebie: Mwerende, timotiira ase egetunwa igoro, gose timokuna chinsinyo chiaye. Onde bwensi oragekune nigo araitwe akwe." 
Exodus19:13 Okoboko kw’omonto onde tigokuna omonto orakore ayio, korende nigo araakwe amagena gose araswe nemegwe. Aya achikirwe ase mwanyabanto na ase ching’iti, korende ekero egetureri kerabugigwe eriogi ri’ekerondereria, erio nario abanto baratiire gocha ase egetunwa.”" 
Exodus19:14 Musa agatirimboka korwa ase egetunwa gochia ase abanto, akabachena, na barabwo bagasibia chianga chiabo." 
Exodus19:15 Musa akabatebia, “Mwebeke ang’e goika rituko ria gatato: timobaisa goika abakungu baino ang’e.”" 
Exodus19:16 Ase rituko ria gatato ekero kia mambia bikaba enkoba na okomesa, ne riire ririto rigaika ase egetunwa, na eriogi ri’egetureri rikooga mono. Abanto bonsi ase egetwori bakaondoka na koiguswa." 
Exodus19:17 Erio Musa agatang’ana abanto korwa ase egetwori bachie koumerana na Nyasae. Barabwo bagatenena ase egetunwa mbarabare. 
Exodus19:18 Egetunwa gionsi gia Sinai kegatubwa nerioki, ekiagera Omonene aigete aroro ore ase omorero ime; na erioki rigachongororoka gochia igoro buna eri’eriko rinene ri’oboturi, na egetunwa ekegima gekanyegerigwa mono." 
Exodus19:19 Eriogi ri’egetureri rikagenderera kwoga mono kobua. Musa agakwana, na Nyasae akamoiraneria nogoaka gw’enkoba." 
Exodus19:20 Omonene agaika ase egechuria ki’egetunwa gia Sinai, akarangeria Musa agende asare, na Musa agatiira gochiao." 
Exodus19:21 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Tirimboka gochia inse ase abanto, obakurere tibatamboka orobebe bache kondora. Baise gokora igo, abange babo mbakwe." 
Exodus19:22 Na abakuani barabwo kobagocha asende, inche Omonene, goika bechene, timbaisa kobaa egesusuro.”" 
Exodus19:23 Musa agatebia Omonene, “Abanto aba tibakonyara gotiira gocha aa ase egetunwa gia Sinai, ekiagera aye omonyene ngwatokania, ogatotebia: Beka orobebe roetanane egetunwa, na ogiatanane kebe egechenu.”" 
Exodus19:24 Omonene akamotebia, “Tirimboka gochia inse, orente Haroni, motiire nere gocha aa. Korende abakuani na abanto tibabaisa gotamboka orobebe gocha aa asende, mbaise kobaa egesusuro.”" 
Exodus19:25 Erio Musa agatirimboka gochia ase abanto, akabatebia amang’ana ayio." 
Exodus20:1 Nyasae agakwana amang’ana aya onsi, agateba," 
Exodus20:2 “Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oo, oyokorusetie ase ense ya Misiri, ase ense y’obosomba." 
Exodus20:3 “Toba ne chinyasae chinde otatiga inche. 
Exodus20:4 “Tobaisa gwekorera omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa, omogwekano o getongwa kende gionsi kere igoro, gose kere ense, gose kere ime ase amache inse y’ense." 
Exodus20:5 Tobaisa gosasima gose gokorera emegwekano ekorire, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oo, Nyasae bwe risemi. Ase engencho y’amabe ’abaibori nigo nkoa abana egesusuro goika ekiaare kia gatato na egia kane, abwo bangechete." 
Exodus20:6 Korende nigo nkoborokia obwanchani bwane botari koera goika ebiaare chilifu, ase abwo banyanchete na babwatete amachiko aane." 
Exodus20:7 “Toriatora bosa na korikorera bobe erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oo, ekiagera Omonene tagotiga komoa egesusuro omonto oria okoriatora bosa na korikorera bobe erieta riaye." 
Exodus20:8 “Riinyore rituko ri’Esabato, orirende ribe richenu." 
Exodus20:9 Amatuko atano na rimo okore emeremo yao yonsi," 
Exodus20:10 korende rituko ria gatano na kabere nerituko ri’Esabato, riatananetwe na Nyasae oo. Ase rituko erio tokora emeremo ende yonsi, aye, gose omwana oo, omomura gose omoiseke, nonya nomosomba oo, omomura gose omoiseke, gose chitugo chiao, gose omomenyi ore mwao." 
Exodus20:11 Naki ase amatuko atano na rimo naro Omonene atongete igoro na ense, ne chinyancha, na bionsi ebire imeo; agatimoka ase rituko ria gatano na kabere. Ase ayio Omonene agasesenia rituko ri’Esabato, akariatanana ribe richenu." 
Exodus20:12 “Sika iso na nyoko, nario oramenye amatuko amange ase ense eye Omonene, Nyasae oo, akoeire." 
Exodus20:13 “Toita. 
Exodus20:14 “Totomana. 
Exodus20:15 “Toiba. 
Exodus20:16 “Tomotebera omogisangio oo oborimo. 
Exodus20:17 “Tobaisa kogania enyomba y’omogisangio oo. Tobaisa kogania omokungu bw’omogisangio oo, nonya nomosomba oye, omomura gose omoiseke, gose eng’ombe yaye, gose etigere yaye, gose kende gionsi omogisangio oo abwate.”" 
Exodus20:18 Ekero abanto bonsi baroche okomesa, na koigwa enkoba na eriogi ri’egetureri na korora egetunwa gekoimoka erioki, bakaiguswa, bagatenenera aare." 
Exodus20:19 Barabwo bagatebia Musa, “Kwana naintwe aye, na intwe inatotegerere, korende onye Nyasae ogokwana naintwe, nigo torakwe.”" 
Exodus20:20 Musa akabairaneria, “Timoondoka! Naki Nyasae nigo achire kobateema inwe, erio agere mogenderere komoiroka, erinde timokora ebibe.”" 
Exodus20:21 Ase igo abanto bagatenena aare, ekero Musa agendete ang’e ase riire riria rimwamu, ase Nyasae arenge." 
Exodus20:22 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Amang’ana aya naro oratebie Abaisraeli: Inwe abanyene mwarorire ng’a nigo nakwanire nainwe korwa igoro." 
Exodus20:23 Timwekorera chinyasae chinde chie chifeta gose echie chitahabu chi’ogosasimwa; monsasime inche bweka. 
Exodus20:24 Ong’agachere egesasimero ki’amaroba, onduere ebing’wanso igoro yaye, ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’omorembe, korwa ase ching’ondi chiao, ne chiombe chiao. Kera aase ndatebe onsasimere, ninchiche asore, ngosesenie." 
Exodus20:25 Onye gokong’agachera egesasimero ki’amagena, tokeagacha namagena abaachire; ekiagera onye gokoyabaacha nebikorero biao, rirorio kwayabekire riko." 
Exodus20:26 Naende totiirera ebiriinero igoro, gokogenda ase egesasimero, egetirianda kiao tikebaisa kooroka.”" 
Exodus21:1 “Aya naro amachiko orae Abaisraeli: 
Exodus21:2 Koragore omosomba bw’Abaibirania, ere agokorere ase engaki y’emiaka etano nomo, korende omwaka o gatano na kabere nigo ararue bwoo ore omosibore, tagoakana kende." 
Exodus21:3 Onye ochete bwoo tarenge na mokungu, rirorio nabo aragende bweka, korende onye orenge nomokungu, omokungu oye nigo aragende amo nere." 
Exodus21:4 Onye omonene oye omonyuomeretie omokungu, na ere omoiboreire abana, abamura gose abaiseke, omokungu oria na abana baye nigo barabe enibo y’omonene oye; omosacha oria nigo ararueo ere bweka," 
Exodus21:5 Korende omosomba oria karatebe: Nimwanchete omonene one amo na mokane, na abana baane, tinganeti korua ase obosomba bwane," 
Exodus21:6 erio omonene oye amorente ase obosio bwa Nyasae, amoikie ase egesieri gose ase emetobwa ya gesieri na amotuue ogoto kwaye nesindake. Erio omonto oria abe omosomba oye ase obogima bwaye bwonsi." 
Exodus21:7 “Omonto karaoonie omwana oye omoiseke koba omosomba, omoiseke oyio tagosiborwa buna abasomba abamura barasiborwe." 
Exodus21:8 Onye omoiseke oyio tagwenereti omonene oye, oyorengereretie komokora abe mokaye, rirorio nigo araboorigwe airane. Omonene oye takoba ne ribaga komoonia ase egesaku ekegeni, ekiagera among’ainereretie." 
Exodus21:9 Onye okomoa omomura oye abe mokaye, rirorio amwanche buna omwana oye omoiseke." 
Exodus21:10 Onye omonto oyio okonyuoma omokungu o kabere, takorina oria omotang’ani endagera yaye, ne chianga chiaye na kende gionsi aganetie buna mokaye." 
Exodus21:11 Atamokorereti amang’ana aya atato, goika aegwe ribaga arue bwoye ataakaneiri embooria.”" 
Exodus21:12 “Monto onde bwensi oraake omonto na amoite akwe, nere goika aitwe akwe." 
Exodus21:13 Korende onye tamong’erete otatiga Nyasae omobegete ase amaboko aye, erio ninkworokie aase omoiti oria aratamere." 
Exodus21:14 Korende omonto ogoita oyomwabo mweno ase obong’ainereria, nere goika arusigwe nonya nase egesasimero kiane, aitwe akwe." 
Exodus21:15 “Onde bwensi oraake ise gose ng’ina, nere goika aitwe akwe." 
Exodus21:16 “Onde bwensi oraibe omonto goika aitwe akwe, karabe omoonirie gose omobwate ase amaboko aye." 
Exodus21:17 “Onde bwensi oraragererie ise gose ng’ina, nere goika aitwe akwe.”" 
Exodus21:18 “Abanto kobarabe bakorwana, na oyomo aake oyonde rigena, gose enkundi, oyio oakwa go takwa, korende abe okorwara borere," 
Exodus21:19 karabe otimokire, naende asoke isiko gotaara ogwesiirera enyimbo, rirorio oria omoagete nigo aratigwe, otatiga amoakane ase engencho y’eng’eria eria asiririe, na amorende goika agwene kegima." 
Exodus21:20 “Omonto karaake omosomba oye, omomura gose omoiseke, nenyimbo, erinde akwere ase amaboko aye, goika aegwe egesusuro." 
Exodus21:21 Korende omosomba oyio karagenderere koba moyo rituko erimo gose abere, omonto oyio takoegwa egesusuro, ekiagera omosomba oyio nenibo yaye." 
Exodus21:22 “Abanto abasacha kobarabe bakorwana, na kogwera omokungu ore morito, na oborito bwaye bogwe, korende atabeti na bobe bonde, omonto oria omogwerete goika aakane buna omosacha bw’omokungu oria araborie nyuma abagambi kobanachire ekina." 
Exodus21:23 Korende omokungu oria karakwe, rirorio egesusuro kebe obogima ase obogima," 
Exodus21:24 eriso ase eriso, na erino ase erino, okoboko ase okoboko, na okogoro ase okogoro," 
Exodus21:25 ogosambwa ase ogosambwa, na eriote ase eriote, naende ogosionorwa ase ogosionorwa." 
Exodus21:26 “Omonto karaake omosomba oye, omomura gose omoiseke, na komwata eriso, rirorio goika amotige abe omosibore ase engencho y’eriso riaye." 
Exodus21:27 Karamoake amogookore erino, goika amotige abe omosibore ase engencho y’erino riaye.”" 
Exodus21:28 “Eng’ombe eise goita omonto, omosacha gose omokungu, ne chingunchara chiaye, goika eakwe amagena ekwe, ne chinyama chiaye tichiriegwa; korende omonyene eng’ombe eyio taegwa egesusuro." 
Exodus21:29 Korende eng’ombe eyio, onye enarete goita abanto, na omonyene eng’ombe okureirwe, na ere tayesibeti, ero keraite omonto, omosacha gose omokungu, nigo eraakwe amagena ekwe, na omonyene nere aitwe akwe." 
Exodus21:30 Onye embooria ekoborigwa korwa asare, goika arue chionsi echi chiraganigwe, chibe embooria ase obogima bwaye." 
Exodus21:31 Onye eng’ombe egoita omomura gose omoiseke ne chingunchara chiaye, ogochika nakwo okwo okomo." 
Exodus21:32 Onye eng’ombe egoita omosomba, omomura gose omoiseke, omonyene eng’ombe nigo araakane omonyene omosomba oria chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etato, na eng’ombe eria eitwe ase ogoakwa amagena." 
Exodus21:33 “Omonto karatige engoro yasie, gose onye okunyire engoro na tayekuneka, na eng’ombe gose etigere egwe imeo," 
Exodus21:34 rirorio omonyene engoro goika aakane omonyene etugo chibesa. Erio eng’iti eria yakure ebe eyaye. 
Exodus21:35 Eng’ombe y’omonto keraite ey’omonto onde ekwe, erio barabwo baoonie eng’ombe eyio ere moyo, baatanane chibesa echio, baatanane ne chinyama chi’eng’ombe eria yakure boigo." 
Exodus21:36 Korende onye emanyekanete ng’a eng’ombe eria nigo enarete goita abanto, na omonyene tayesibeti, goika aakane omonyene eng’ombe eria yakure ase okomoa eng’ombe eria ere moyo; na eria yakure ebe eyaye.”" 
Exodus22:1 “Omonto karaibe eng’ombe gose eng’ondi na koyenyenya, gose ayeoonie, nigo araakane chiombe isano ribaga ri’eng’ombe eyemo, ne ching’ondi inye ribaga ri’eng’ondi eyemo." 
Exodus22:2 Igo emogwenerete aakane chionsi. Onye tabwati gento, ere omonyene goika aoonigwe ase engencho y’oboibi bwaye. Onye etugo eyio aiba ekonyorekana ase amaboko aye ere moyo, aakane ara kabere, onye neng’ombe, gose etigere, gose eng’ondi. “Omoibi karanyorekane ogotagora enyomba ase okoiba, nere aitwe akwe: omonto oria omoita takobarerwa oboiti obwo. Korende onye nigo amoita kobwakiire, rirorio nigo arabarerwe oboiti obwo." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Omonto kararisie etugo yaye ase omogondo bw’endagera, gose oyo bw’emesabibu, na gotiga riicho riaye ririe endagera y’omonto onde, nere goika aakane endagera enoru korwa ase omogondo oye, gose eyere engiya korwa ase emesabibu yaye." 
Exodus22:6 “Onye omonto ogosamba omorero, na omorero oyio bwesiarere gochia ase amagwa, na emesaima y’endagera ere ase omogondo eyie, omonto oria goika aakane yonsi pi." 
Exodus22:7 “Omonto karae omoiri oye chibesa, gose ebinto binde biaye amogachere, na birobio biibwe korwa nyomba mwaye, omoibi karanyorekane goika aakane ara kabere." 
Exodus22:8 Korende atanyorekaneti, erio oria omonyene enyomba arentwe ase obosio bwa Nyasae, erinde amanywe gose nere obiibete." 
Exodus22:9 “Eriomana rinde rionsi riise gotuboka, onye igoro y’eng’ombe, gose etigere, gose eng’ondi, gose eanga, gose gento kende gionsi kerasire, na omonto oyomo aamererie ng’a nekiaye, ekina ekio ki’abanto abwo babere nigo kerarentwe ase obosio bwa Nyasae. Ere oyo Nyasae araorokie ng’a nomomochi, goika aakane oria onde ara kabere." 
Exodus22:10 “Omonto karae omoiri oye etigere, gose eng’ombe, gose eng’ondi, gose etugo ende yonsi ebe sagare, na etugo eria eitwe gose eakwe, gose eirwe monto tarora," 
Exodus22:11 omoiri oria goika atiane ase Omonene ng’a takuneti enibo aetwe sagare. Omonyene etugo eria goika anche ng’a ayio atianwa namaene, na tagoakanwa." 
Exodus22:12 Korende onye nigo yaibwa korwa asare ere goika aakane omonyene oria. 
Exodus22:13 Onye yariegwa nenyang’au, arente chinyama chintigari chibe kirori, taakana ase eye enyang’au yaitete." 
Exodus22:14 “Omonto karasabe na koegwa etugo sagare korwa ase omoiri oye, na etugo eyio keraakwe gose ekwe, na omonyene tayerochi, omonto oria goika ayeakane." 
Exodus22:15 Onye omonyene oria ore aroro ekero egoakwa gose egokwa, rirorio tagoakanwa. Onye etugo eyio egochia goakanerwa, ogoakanerwa okwo kobe kogoisanera ogosirerwa okwo.”" 
Exodus22:16 “Omonto karamogenke na gosaria omoiseke omwekungi otararierwa boko, goika aakane enibo eraisane amonyuome." 
Exodus22:17 Korende onye ise omoiseke okwanga, tamomoa, omonto oyio goika aakane chibesa chireng’aine rigori ri’omoiseke omwekungi." 
Exodus22:18 “Totiga omokungu omorogi abe moyo. 
Exodus22:19 “Omonto orarare neng’iti goika aitwe akwe. 
Exodus22:20 “Omonto oraruere enyasae ende yonsi ekeng’wanso, otatiga Omonene bweka, goika asirigwe kegima." 
Exodus22:21 “Tobaisa gokorera omomenyi bobe, gose komochegia, ekiagera nainwe abanyene mwarenge abamenyi ase ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus22:22 Tochanda omoboraka onde bwensi, gose omwana entakana oyo abaibori baye bakure." 
Exodus22:23 Oise kobachanda abwo, na barabwo kobararere asende, amaene, inche ninyigwe ekerero kiabo." 
Exodus22:24 Endamwamu yane inayoke, na inche mbaite nomoro, na abakungu baino nababe ababoraka, na abana baino babe chintakana batari nabaise." 
Exodus22:25 “Oise komoa singo omonto onde one omotaka ore ase egati yaino, tobaisa gokora buna abwo bakoa abanto singo na koboria ebitoki ebinge; tobaisa komoboria ebitoki." 
Exodus22:26 “Onye kogosaba omonto onde egetambaa kiaye akwambara kebe intenenera, goika omokeiranerie erioba ritaragwa," 
Exodus22:27 ekiagera nakio gioka abwate akwebisia. Eke nakio abwate gekomobekera riberera ase omobere oye. Inee! Otakemoeti, inki rende araraarere? Ere kararere asende, ekeene, nimoigwe, ekiagera inche nomonyamabera." 
Exodus22:28 “Tobaisa korama Nyasae, gose koragereria omogambi bw’abanto bao.”" 
Exodus22:29 “Totebana kondetera ogotongora kwao kwe rigesa ri’endagera na eri’emesabibu. Ong’e omwana oo omomura omotangi ase abana bao, abe oyone." 
Exodus22:30 Ong’e boigo chimori chintangi chie chiombe, ne chimanwa chintangi chie ching’ondi. Ochitige chikoore amatuko atano na abere, ko rituko ria gatano na gatato ochindetere." 
Exodus22:31 “Mobe abanto baane abachenu; timobaisa koria eng’iti ende yonsi eyaitirwe nenyang’au ase orosana, motugutere chisese chinyama echio.”" 
Exodus23:1 “Tobaisa gosiarera oborimo. Tobaisa gokengera omokori amabe ase okomobera kirori bw’oborimo. 
Exodus23:2 Tobaisa koba ensemo y’abare abange kobarigetie gokora amabe, gose tobaisa kobakorera abwo bare abange ogwanchereria na gotanga oboronge ase okoba kirori bw’okoonchorana oboronge." 
Exodus23:3 Tobaisa gwanchereria omonto omotaka ase ekina kiaye. 
Exodus23:4 “Oise korora eng’ombe y’omobisa oo gose etigere yaye egosira goika omoyeiranerie.
