Exodus23:5 Korarore etigere y’oyo okogechete yagure negurube ebogoretie, tobaisa koyeetania, korende oyekonye." 
Exodus23:6 “Tobaisa korina omonto omotaka oboronge bwaye, ekero ekina kiaye gekogambwa." 
Exodus23:7 Bwetange kegima korwa ase oborimo. Tobaisa kogera omonto omoronge aitwe, ekiagera inche Omonene tingotiga koa omomochi egesusuro." 
Exodus23:8 Tobaisa gwancha oegwe riaaki, ekiagera riaaki nigo rikoukoria omonto erinde takorora ayare boronge; naende nigo rigosaria ekina ki’abanyene oboronge." 
Exodus23:9 “Tobaisa gokorera omomenyi bobe, naki inwe momanyete buna omomenyi akoigwa ase enkoro yaye, ekiagera nainwe abanyene mwarenge abamenyi ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus23:10 “Ase emiaka etano nomo osimeke na kobusura endagera, na ogese ebiamire," 
Exodus23:11 korende omwaka o gatano na kabere otige omogondo otimoke, toremwa. Ebirakine na kwama ase omogondo obitigere abataka, na ebi baratigarie bibe endagera ye ching’iti chi’orosana. Okore boigo nomogondo oo bw’emesabibu na oyo bw’emezeituni." 
Exodus23:12 “Ase amatuko atano na rimo okore emeremo yao, korende ase rituko ria gatano na kabere otimoke, na eng’ombe yao na etigere yao nachirochio chitimoke; naboigo nomosomba oo omomura oiboreire bwoo, na omomenyi oo, nabarabwo batimoke.”" 
Exodus23:13 “Motegerere mono onsi aya nabatebirie na moyabwate. Timwatora amarieta e chinyasae chinde; ayio taigugwa korwa ase emenwa yaino.” 
Exodus23:14 “Kera omwaka nobe kogontwarera Amatuko Amanene ara gatato. 
Exodus23:15 Goika orende Rituko Rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera. Na buna nagochigete orie emegati etabekiri memera ase amatuko atano na abere, ase engaki eria yabegetwe ase omotienyi bw’Abibu, ekiagera omotienyi oyio noro kwaruete Misiri. Na monto onde tabaisa gocha ase obosio bwane namaboko amasa." 
Exodus23:16 “Naende goika orende Rituko Rinene rie Rigesa ekero okogesa ogotongora gw’okwama kw’omogondo oo gwasimegete na ogakora emeremo. “Orende boigo Rituko Rinene ri’Ogosangereria Rigesa ri’omoerio bw’omwaka ekero ogosangereria okwama kw’emeremo yao emekong’u gwakorete. 
Exodus23:17 Ara gatato kera omwaka abanto bao abasacha babe bagocha ase obosio bwane, inche Omonene Nyasae." 
Exodus23:18 “Tobaisa kondetera amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso amo nomogati obekire ememera. Ebitinya bie chinyama echi nkoruerwa ekeng’wanso ase rituko riane rinene, tibitigara goika mambia." 
Exodus23:19 “Goika orente ogotongora okore okuya korwa ase omogondo oo, ase enyomba yane inche Omonene Nyasae oo. “Tobaisa koiyekera emanwa y’embori ime y’amabeere ’eng’ina.”" 
Exodus23:20 “Nintome omomalaika agotang’ane na gokorenda ase enchera, agoikie aase aria nakoroiseirie." 
Exodus23:21 Mwerende ase obosio bwaye, oigwere aya aragotebie. Tobaisa kwanga komoigwera, ekiagera erieta riane nigo rire ime yaye, ere takomororera amabera oyoramoche koigwera." 
Exodus23:22 Korende koramoigwere ere, na gokora ayio onsi nakwanire inche, rirorio nindwanie ababisa bao, ninchande abwo bakogochanda." 
Exodus23:23 Naki omomalaika one nagotang’ane akoire na kogoikia ase ense y’Abaamori, na Abahiti, na Abaperisi, na Abakanani, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi, na inche nimbasirie." 
Exodus23:24 Tosasima chinyasae chiabo, gose gochikorera; na tokora buna abanto abwo bagokora, korende osirie kegima emegwekano yabo y’ogosasimwa na moyaiyerie inse amagena abo onsi are aase bagosasimera." 
Exodus23:25 Momokorere Omonene Nyasae oino, na inche ninsesenie endagera yaino na amache aino, nindusie amarwaire asemore." 
Exodus23:26 Ase ense yaino mokungu onde tari oborito bwaye boragwe, gose onde takoba omogomba; nimbae obogima obotambe." 
Exodus23:27 “Nintang’anie okwoboyia kwane bosio bwao goichanie na gotantania abanto bonsi abwo morabe mokoumerana nabarabwo; ninkore ababisa bao bonsi baonchoke batame korwa asore. 
Exodus23:28 Nintome ebiaramba birase na goseria Abahivi, na Abakanani, na Abahiti, korwa ase Kanani bosio bwao." 
Exodus23:29 Tinkobaseria ase omwaka oyomo, ense ebaise koba bosa, ne ching’iti chi’orosana chimenteke chigochande." 
Exodus23:30 Nigo ndabaserie ng’ora ng’ora goika momenteke moisane komenya ense eyio. 
Exodus23:31 Inche ninkobekere orobebe rwao gochakera Enyancha Embariri goikera Enyancha y’Abafilisti, naende korwa ase erooro goika orooche rwa Eufarati, ekiagera nimbeke ababiare b’ense eyio ase amaboko aino, na inwe mobaserie, batame korwa asemore." 
Exodus23:32 Tobaisa gokora okobwatana konde gwonsi nabarabwo, gose ne chinyasae chiabo." 
Exodus23:33 Barabwo tibamenya ase ense yao, babaise kogera onkorere ebibe. Onye kogokorera chinyasae chiabo, chirochio nachinyare kogotega.”" 
Exodus24:1 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Tiira gocha aa asende, aye amo na Haroni, na Nadabu, na Abihu, na abagaaka b’Abaisraeli emerongo etano na ebere. Mobeere aare ake, motung’ame inse monsasime." 
Exodus24:2 Naye Musa bweka orachiche ong’ike ang’e, korende abwo bande tibang’ika ang’e. Na abanto barabwo tibachicha amo naye nonya ng’ake.”" 
Exodus24:3 Musa akagenda agatebia abanto amang’ana onsi aya Omonene akwanete, na amachiko aye onsi. Abanto bonsi bakamoiraneria ase eriogi erimo, bakabora, “Amang’ana ayio onsi Omonene akwanire inatoyakore.”" 
Exodus24:4 Erio Musa akarika amachiko onsi ay’Omonene. Akaimoka mambia chuni, akaagacha egesasimero egetunwa mbarabare, agatenenia amagena ikomi na abere abe ekeinyorio ki’ebisaku ikomi na bibere bi’Abaisraeli." 
Exodus24:5 Agatoma abamura b’Abaisraeli barue ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, banyenyere Omonene chieri chi’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe." 
Exodus24:6 Musa akabogoria ekeng’ese ki’amanyinga aya, akayabeka egetaabo ime, na ekeng’ese kende akanyororokeria egesasimero." 
Exodus24:7 Erio akaimokia ebuku y’okobwatana kw’ogotianania agasomera abanto baigwe. Barabwo bakabora, “Natoyakore onsi aya Omonene akwanire, na tomoigwere.”" 
Exodus24:8 Musa akaimokia amanyinga aria arenge egetaabo ime, akanyororokeria abanto, akabora, “Aya namanyinga ’okobwatana okwo Omonene akorire ase ogotianania nainwe ase okobaa amachiko aya onsi.”" 
Exodus24:9 Erio Musa, na Haroni, na Nadabu, na Abihu, na abagaaka baria emerongo etano na ebere b’Abaisraeli bagatiira gochia egetunwa igoro," 
Exodus24:10 bakarora Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli. Inse y’amagoro aye nigo arenge buna amagena e rigori rinene akorokwa safiro, are nobokenonoku buna obore igoro." 
Exodus24:11 Omonene tarambora okoboko kwaye kobakorera bobe abagaaka baria b’Abaisraeli. Barabwo kobarorire Nyasae, bakaria na konywa." 
Exodus24:12 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Tiira gocha aa asende egetunwa igoro, obeere aiga, na inche nkoe chibao chi’amagena chire namachiko onsi aya narikireo, ayio ogochia kworokereria abanto.”" 
Exodus24:13 Musa akaimoka amo nomosomba oye Yoshua, agatiira gochia egetunwa kia Nyasae." 
Exodus24:14 Agatebia abagaaka baria, “Motoganye aiga goika ekero torairane asemore. Rora Haroni na Huri nao bare aiga amo nainwe; onye omonto ore nobokong’u bonde, agende ababorie.”" 
Exodus24:15 Erio Musa agatiira gochia egetunwa igoro, ne riire rikagetuba." 
Exodus24:16 Obonene bw’Omonene bogacha bokabeera igoro y’egetunwa gia Sinai, ne riire rikagetuba ase engaki y’amatuko atano na rimo. Rituko ria gatano na kabere Omonene akarangeria Musa korwa riire ime." 
Exodus24:17 Ase Abaisraeli obonene bokarorekana buna omorero ogosiria, ase egetunwa igoro." 
Exodus24:18 Musa agasoa riire ime, agatiira gochia egetunwa igoro, akabeera aroro ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko." 
Exodus25:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Exodus25:2 “Batebie Abaisraeli ng’a bandetere ebiegwa; aye obisangererie korwa ase kera omonto oyoranche kobirua asende. 
Exodus25:3 Na ebiegwa orasangererie korwa asebare nabio ebi: chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitaai;" 
Exodus25:4 chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri; egatani engiya na amanya e chimbori;" 
Exodus25:5 amasankwa e chimingichi aakire etaago, na amasankwa amaterere e ching’iti chia rooche, ne chibao chi’emekonge;" 
Exodus25:6 amaguta e chitaya, na ebinto bi’okoroisia amaguta akweakwa, na ebi’okoroisia ubani;" 
Exodus25:7 amagena e rigori rinene, buna oiniki na ayande, akobekwa ase egesibao ki’omokuani na ase egesembe kiaye." 
Exodus25:8 Obatebie bandoiserie Obomenyo Obochenu, na inche inyare komenya ase egati yabo." 
Exodus25:9 Mondoiserie Obomenyo na ebinto bionsi ebirabeo, buna ndakworokie.”" 
Exodus25:10 “Mondoiserie Esanduku ye chibao chi’omokonge. Obotambe bwaye bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere na ekeng’ese, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus25:11 Oyeoome netahabu echenire ime na isiko, oyeetananie omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus25:12 Okore chibonyi inye chie chitahabu chinyititoire, ochibeke ase amagoro aye ane, ibere ase kera rikere." 
Exodus25:13 Obaache emiaro ebere y’emekonge, oyeoome netahabu." 
Exodus25:14 Osoyie emiaro eyio ase chibonyi ime ase okobogoreria Esanduku eria. 
Exodus25:15 Emiaro eyio goika ebe ime ase chibonyi echio, terusigwao." 
Exodus25:16 Ime y’Esanduku eria obeke chibao echi chirikire oborori, echi ndakoe.”" 
Exodus25:17 “Oroisie ekemumeko gi’etahabu echenire kebe Oboikaranso bw’Amabera. Obotambe bwaye bobe ekerengo ki’amaboko abere na ekeng’ese, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus25:18 Naende okore emegwekano y’abakerubi babere ey’etahabu esunyuntire, oyebeke ase chinsinyo ibere chi’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera," 
Exodus25:19 oyomo ase kera ensinyo. Oyekore ebe egento ekemo n’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera. 
Exodus25:20 Abakerubi abwo barambore chimbaba chiabo igoro y’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera, babobekere ekiriri, na amasio abo abe achikaine, na barabwo barigererie Oboikaranso bw’Amabera." 
Exodus25:21 Oterekerere Oboikaranso bw’Amabera igoro y’Esanduku eria. Erio obeke imeo chibao echi chirikire oborori, echi ndakoe." 
Exodus25:22 Agwo ninchiche ng’umerane naye. Korwa igoro y’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera, gati‐gati y’abakerubi aba babere bare igoro y’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, nimbe ngokwana naye igoro y’amachiko aya ngochia koa Abaisraeli goetera asore.”" 
Exodus25:23 “Oroisie emesa ye chibao chi’emekonge. Obotambe bwaye bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus25:24 Oyeoome netahabu echenire, oyeetananie omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus25:25 Erio obeke orosingo robe nobogare bong’ana egesanyi gi’okoboko, na oroetananie omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus25:26 Okore chibonyi inye chie chitahabu ase emesa eria, ochibeke ase chikoona inye ase amagoro aye," 
Exodus25:27 ang’e norosingo; na emiaro esoigwe imeo, erinde emesa enyare kobogorerigwa." 
Exodus25:28 Obaache emiaro eria korwa ase emekonge, oyeoome netahabu, nero emesa erabogorerigwe." 
Exodus25:29 Oroisie chinteru na ebitaabo ase ubani, ne chisani, korwa ase ebio bagocha koumora ebinyugwa ebikoruegwa. Obiroisie bionsi korwa ase chitahabu chichenire." 
Exodus25:30 Ase emesa eyio obeke emegati erabe ekoruegwa asende, imbe nkoyerora botambe.”" 
Exodus25:31 “Oroisie ekebekerero gie chitaya gi’etahabu echenire esunyuntire, okeroisie na enterekerero amo ne ritina na emegwekano y’amamumu na ebisicha, bionsi bibe egento ekemo." 
Exodus25:32 Chinsagia isano nemo chibe chigosoka korwa ase ritina, isato korwa ase ensemo eyemo, na isato korwa ase ensemo ende." 
Exodus25:33 Orosagia rwe ritang’ani robe nemegwekano etato y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi, kera ekemo kebe ne rimumu na egesicha, na orosagia rwa kabere boigo robe nemegwekano etato y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi; ne chinsagia chionsi isano nemo chibe boigo." 
Exodus25:34 Ritina rinyene ri’ekebekerero keria ribe nemegwekano ene y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi, kera ekemo kebe ne rimumu na egesicha." 
Exodus25:35 Rimumu erimo ribe inse ya kera chinsagia ibere chigosoka korwa ase ritina. Ase ayio amamumu abe inse ye chinsagia echio isano nemo, chiroisigwe chibe egento ekemo ne ritina." 
Exodus25:36 Amamumu ayio amo ne chinsagia biroisigwe bibe egento ekemo ne ritina, bionsi biroisigwe korwa ase ribomba erimo ri’etahabu echenire esunyuntire." 
Exodus25:37 “Oroisie chitaya isano na ibere, ochibeke igoro y’ekebekerero keria, erinde chimoreke gochia bosio." 
Exodus25:38 Ebinachi ne chindogio chiaye biroisigwe korwa ase chitahabu chichenire. 
Exodus25:39 Okorere chitahabu chichenire chikiro emerongo etano ase okoroisia ekebekerero gie chitaya amo nebikorero biaye. 
Exodus25:40 Origererie buya obikore buna nakworogetie ase egetunwa.” 
Exodus26:1 “Oroisie eema y’Obomenyo nebitambaa ikomi biroisirie korwa ase chiusi chi’egatani chisisire amo ne chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri. Omoroisia omong’aini abiroisie bibe nemegwekano y’abakerubi." 
Exodus26:2 Obotambe bwa kera egetambaa bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere, na atano na atato, na obogare bwaye amaboko ane. Ebitambaa ebio bionsi bibe bi’ekerengo ekemo." 
Exodus26:3 Ebitambaa bitano bibwatanigwe bibe rirondia erimo. Naboigo nebitambaa binde bitano. 
Exodus26:4 Okore ebioro bie chiusi chiburu, obibeke ase ensinyo y’egetambaa eke kere ensinyo y’ensemo eyemo ya kera rirondia." 
Exodus26:5 Okore ebioro emerongo etano, obibeke ase egetambaa kegochakera rirondia rie ritang’ani, na emerongo etano ase egetambaa kegokoorera rirondia ria kabere. Ebioro bia kera rirondia bibe bichikaine." 
Exodus26:6 Oture ebigobanio bie chitahabu emerongo etano, obwateranie amarondia ayio abere amo, ebe eema eyemo y’Obomenyo." 
Exodus26:7 “Oroisie amarondia ikomi na rimo ay’amanya e chimbori, abe eema y’ogotuba Obomenyo obwo." 
Exodus26:8 Obotambe bwa kera rirondia bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etato, na obogare bwaye amaboko ane. Amarondia onsi ikomi na rimo abe ay’ekerengo ekemo." 
Exodus26:9 Obwatanie amarondia atano amo, na amarondia ande atano na rimo oyabwateranie ao. Erio oringe erimo rirondia ria gatano na rimo igoro y’egesoero ki’eema." 
Exodus26:10 Okore ebioro emerongo etano, obibeke ase ensinyo ye rirondia rinene rie ritang’ani, na emerongo etano ase rirondia rinene ria kabere rigochakera." 
Exodus26:11 Oture ebigobanio emerongo etano bi’etaai ase ebioro biria, obwatanerie amarondia ayio abere abe eema eyemo engima." 
Exodus26:12 Ekeng’ese kie rirondia riria kementire kebekwe gesung’unane, getube magega y’Obomenyo." 
Exodus26:13 Ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo kie rirondia keringwe, getube Obomenyo ase kera rikere riaye." 
Exodus26:14 “Oroisie rirondia ri’amasankwa e chimingichi aakire etaago, ribe rigotuba eema, ne rirondia rinde ri’amasankwa amaterere e ching’iti chia rooche, ribe rikobekwa igoro ye rirondia rie ritang’ani." 
Exodus26:15 “Oroisie chibao chi’emekonge ase Obomenyo, echio chiratenenigwe." 
Exodus26:16 Obotambe bwa kera ebao bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus26:17 Okore chintamang’o ibere ase kera ebao, ase chibao echio chirabwatanerigwe. Naboigo oranyare koroisia chibao chionsi chi’Obomenyo." 
Exodus26:18 Koraroisie chibao echio, oroisie emerongo ebere ase ensemo ya irianyi." 
Exodus26:19 Oroisie ne chinterekerero chie chifeta emerongo ene, chibe ibere ibere ase kera ebao ase okobwaterania chintamang’o chiaye ibere." 
Exodus26:20 Ase ensemo ya sugusu y’Obomenyo oroisie chibao emerongo ebere," 
Exodus26:21 amo ne chinterekerero chie chifeta emerongo ene, ibere ibere ase kera ebao." 
Exodus26:22 Ase ensemo ya nyuma y’Obomenyo eyerochie bosongo, oroisie chibao isano nemo," 
Exodus26:23 naende chibao ibere chie chikoona chi’Obomenyo ensemo ya nyuma. 
Exodus26:24 Kera ebao ase echio ibere ebwatanigwe ne chibao chie chinsinyo, korwa inse goika igoro ase ebonyi entang’ani ere. Ase enchera eyio chibao ibere chibekwe ase chikoona ibere." 
Exodus26:25 Chibao chionsi nigo chirabe isano na isato, ne chinterekerero chiabo chie chifeta ikomi na isano nemo, ibere ibere inse ya kera ebao." 
Exodus26:26 “Obaache emeriibo ye chibao chi’emekonge, etano ase okoriiba chibao chie rikere erimo ri’Obomenyo," 
Exodus26:27 na etano ase okoriiba chibao chie rikere rinde, na etano y’ensemo ya nyuma, eyerochie bosongo." 
Exodus26:28 Omoriibo o gati‐gati obekwe omogima, oriibe korwa ensinyo eyemo goika eyende." 
Exodus26:29 Oome chibao echio netahabu na okore chibonyi chie chitahabu ase emeriibo erasoigwe, na emeriibo eria oyeoome netahabu." 
Exodus26:30 Otenenie Obomenyo obwo buna nakworogetie ase egetunwa. 
Exodus26:31 “Oroisie etoto ye chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo ne chiusi chi’egatani engiya, chisisire. Omoroisia omong’aini ayeroisie ebe nemegwekano y’abakerubi." 
Exodus26:32 Osunge etoto eria y’egetambaa ase chisiiro inye chi’emekonge chioomire netahabu, chire nebigobanio bie chitahabu, chiratenene ase chinterekerero inye chie chifeta." 
Exodus26:33 Osunge etoto eria inse y’ebigobanio, obeke Esanduku eyere ne chibao chirikire oborori moino y’etoto. Etoto eria yaatanane Aase Aachenu korwa ase Aase Aachenu Mono." 
Exodus26:34 Erio obeke Oboikaranso bw’Amabera igoro y’Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire oborori ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono. 
Exodus26:35 Obeke emesa isiko y’etoto ensemo ya sugusu, na ekebekerero gie chitaya ensemo ya irianyi, ase Obomenyo ime." 
Exodus26:36 Naende ase egesoero ki’eema oroisie egetambaa korwa ase chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire, amo ne chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, buna omoroisia omong’aini aranyare gokeroisia." 
Exodus26:37 Naende obaache chisiiro isano chi’emekonge ase ogosunga egetambaa ekio, ochioome netahabu; oture ebigobanio bie chitaai. Okore chinterekerero inye chie chitaai chinyititoire, chibe ase chisiiro echio.”" 
Exodus27:1 “Oagache egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge. Obotambe bwaye bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano, na obogare bwaye amaboko atano, nabo chinsemo chionsi inye chibe chireng’aine; na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atato." 
Exodus27:2 Ase chikoona inye chi’egesasimero oroisie emegwekano ye chingunchara inye. Chingunchara echio nigo chirabe egento ekemo negesasimero; oome gionsi netaai. 
Exodus27:3 Okore chindogio chi’okobuucha ribu korwa ase egesasimero. Naende okore ebichiko, na ebitaabo, ne chigami, ne chindogio chi’okorenta omorero. Ebinto ebi bionsi biroisigwe korwa ase chitaai." 
Exodus27:4 Okore boigo egechungi gi’etaai na obeke chibonyi inye chie chitaai ase chikoona chiaye inye. 
Exodus27:5 Obeke egechungi eke korwa inse y’orosingo geike gochia gati‐gati y’egesasimero. 
Exodus27:6 Obaache emiaro y’emekonge ase egesasimero ekio, oyeoome netaai." 
Exodus27:7 Oyesoyie ase chibonyi echio chie chinsemo ibere chi’egesasimero, ebeo ekero gekobogorigwa." 
Exodus27:8 Egesasimero keagachwe ne chibao, ime getigwe giasaime. Okeroisie buna kworogetigwe ase egetunwa.”" 
Exodus27:9 “Oroisie eraaro y’Obomenyo. Ase ensemo ya irianyi oroisie ebitambaa bie chiusi chindabu chi’egatani chisisire, bibe ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo, bibe bigokenga eraaro ensemo eyemo." 
Exodus27:10 Chisiiro chikobibwata chibe emerongo ebere chie chitaai, ne chinterekerero chiabo emerongo ebere chie chitaai. Ebigobanio bie chisiiro chiria ne chinuga chiabo chibe chie chifeta." 
Exodus27:11 Naboigo ase ensemo ya sugusu oroisie ebitambaa bire nobotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo, bisiirwe ne chisiiro emerongo ebere, ne chinterekerero chiabo emerongo ebere chie chitaai. Ebigobanio amo ne chinuga chiabo bibe bie chifeta." 
Exodus27:12 Ase obogare bw’eraaro ensemo ya bosongo oroisie ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano, ne chisiiro ikomi, amo ne chinterekerero chiabo ikomi." 
Exodus27:13 Obogare bw’ensemo ya bosio, erochie moocha, bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano." 
Exodus27:14 Ase ensemo eyemo y’egesoero bibe ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano, bisiirwe ne chisiiro isato ne chinterekerero chiabo isato." 
Exodus27:15 Naboigo nensemo ende y’egesoero bibekwe ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano, bisiirwe ne chisiiro isato, amo ne chinterekerero chiaye isato." 
Exodus27:16 Na ase egesoero oroisie egetambaa gi’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere, korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo ne chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire, ebe emeremo y’omoroisia omong’aini. Egetambaa ekio gesiirwe ne chisiiro inye ne chinterekerero chiabo inye." 
Exodus27:17 Chisiiro chionsi echietanaine eraaro nigo chirabe ne chinuga na ebigobanio bie chifeta, ne chinterekerero chiabo chibe chie chitaai." 
Exodus27:18 Obotambe bw’eraaro eyio bobe obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo etano. Egetambaa keria geetanaine eraaro kebe nobotambe gochia igoro bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano na keroisigwe ne chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire. Chinterekerero chi’eraaro chibe echie chitaai." 
Exodus27:19 Ebikorero bi’Obomenyo ebirabe bigokorerwa ase emeremo ende yonsi, amo nebirochi bi’ebitambaa na ebi’eraaro bionsi, nigo birabe ebie chitaai.”" 
Exodus27:20 “Ochike Abaisraeli barente amaguta amaya, amitire korwa ase amazeituni, akobekwa ase chitaya kera rituko, chibe chikogenderera gwoka botambe." 
Exodus27:21 Ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano, isiko y’etoto eria ekengete aase chibao chirikire oborori chibekire, Haroni na abamura baye inababe bakorenda chitaya chiria chigwoka korwa mogoroba goika mambia, ase obosio bw’Omonene. Okwo nigo korabe ogochika ase Abaisraeli ebiaare ase ebiaare.”" 
Exodus28:1 “Orangerie Haroni, momura omino, amo nabamura baye korwa ase Abaisraeli, bache ase obosio bwao, babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani, ere Haroni amo nabamura baye Nadabu, na Abihu, na Eleazari, na Itamari." 
Exodus28:2 Oroiserie Haroni, momura omino, chianga chinchenu chi’obonene na echi’oboseera." 
Exodus28:3 Otebie abaroisia abang’aini, abwo naeire obong’aini ne chisemi, baroiserie Haroni chianga, erinde aatananwe abe ogonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani." 
Exodus28:4 Ne chianga baramoroiserie nachio echi: Egesembe ki’obokuani, na egesibao ki’obokuani, na eganchwa, na eganchwa ende erobekanirie egoika inse, na ekegogwa, na orokini. Bakorere Haroni amo nabamura baye chianga chinchenu, erio babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani." 
Exodus28:5 Nabwo abaroisia bachiroisie korwa ase chiusi chie chitahabu, na echi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya." 
Exodus28:6 “Bakore egesibao ki’obokuani korwa ase chiusi chie chitahabu na echi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya chisisire; keroisigwe nomoroisia omong’aini." 
Exodus28:7 Egesibao ekio ki’obokuani kebe nebitwanga bibere bi’amareko, aase gekobwateranigwa." 
Exodus28:8 Orokini rw’okobwataneria egesibao ekio amo robe rw’egetambaa keria ki’egesibao, keroisirie korwa ase chiusi chie chitahabu, na echi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya chisisire." 
Exodus28:9 Orente amagena abere a oiniki, na ase amagena ayio omang’ere amarieta ’abamura ba Israeli:" 
Exodus28:10 amarieta atano na rimo ase rigena erimo, na atano na rimo ase rigena rinde, ase omoroberio bw’okoiborwa kwabo." 
Exodus28:11 Ase chisemi chi’omoroisia omanyete buya gotura na komang’a ekemanyererio, omang’e amarieta ’abamura ba Israeli ase amagena aria abere. Erio obeke amagena aria ase ebikonde bie chitahabu." 
Exodus28:12 Oyabeke ase ebitwang’a bi’amareko bi’egesibao keria ki’obokuani, abe ase okoinyora abamura ba Israeli. Naboigo Haroni abogorie amarieta abo ase amareko aye abere, abe ekeinyorio ase obosio bw’Omonene botambe." 
Exodus28:13 Oture ebikonde bibere bi’etahabu," 
Exodus28:14 na okore ebichanga bibere bie chitahabu chichenire, bisisire buna engori, bibwatanigwe nebikonde biria." 
Exodus28:15 “Oroisie egesembe gi’ekina ase omokuani. Omoroisia omong’aini akeroisie ase egetambaa kere buna eki’egesibao ki’obokuani, korwa ase chiusi chie chitahabu, na echi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya chisisire." 
Exodus28:16 Egesembe keria kebe keringire rimo. Obotambe bwaye bobe chisentimita emerongo ebere, na ibere, na obogare bwaye boigo." 
Exodus28:17 Obeke emeng’ororia ene y’amagena e rigori rinene ase egesembe keria. Ase omong’ororia bwe ritang’ani obeke saridio, na topasio, na sumaridi;" 
Exodus28:18 na ase oyo o kabere alimasi, na safiro, na yasipi;" 
Exodus28:19 na ase oyo o gatato hiakinto, na agati, na ametisito;" 
Exodus28:20 na ase oyo o kane kurusolito, na oiniki, na berulo. Amagena ayio onsi abekwe ase ebikonde bie chitahabu." 
Exodus28:21 Amagena ayio nigo arabe ikomi na abere, abe namarieta ’abamura ba Israeli. Amarieta ayio amang’erwe buna omonto akomang’a ekemanyererio. Kera rigena ribe nerieta ri’egesaku ekemo ki’ebisaku biabo ikomi na bibere." 
Exodus28:22 Okore ebichanga bie chitahabu chichenire bisisire, bibekwe ase egesembe keria." 
Exodus28:23 Okore boigo chibonyi ibere chi’etahabu, ochibeke ase emego ya igoro y’egesembe keria." 
Exodus28:24 Osiberanie ebichanga ebi bibere bie chitahabu ase chibonyi chi’emego ya igoro y’egesembe keria. 
Exodus28:25 Chinsinyo chinde chi’ebichanga biria bibere ochisiberanie nebikonde biria bibere, naende obibwateranie bionsi ase ebitwanga bi’amareko bire bosio ase egesibao ki’obokuani." 
Exodus28:26 Okore chibonyi chinde ibere chie chitahabu, ochibeke ase egesembe keria ase emego ebere ya inse korwa nyuma, echigete egesibao." 
Exodus28:27 Naende okore chibonyi chinde ibere chie chitahabu, ochibwateranie ase ebitwanga biria bibere bi’amareko bi’egesibao bire bosio, ang’e nomobarero, igoro y’orokini rw’egesibao." 
Exodus28:28 Chibonyi chiria chibekire ase egesembe chibwateranigwe ne chibonyi chi’egesibao neusi eburu; erio egesembe keria kebeere orokini igoro, tigecha gosuka." 
Exodus28:29 Naboigo Haroni arabogorie amarieta ’abamura ba Israeli ase egesembe keria gi’ekina igoro y’enkoro yaye ekero agosoa ime y’Aase Aachenu, ayarente abe ekeinyorio botambe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Exodus28:30 “Obeke Urimu na Tumimu (engencho yaye omobaso na oboikeranu) ime y’egesembe gi’ekina bibe igoro y’enkoro ya Haroni, ekero akogenda ase obosio bw’Omonene. Ekero Haroni are ase obosio bw’Omonene abogorie ekiorokererio gi’ekina botambe ase engencho y’Abaisraeli.”" 
Exodus28:31 “Okore eganchwa korwa ase egetambaa keroisirie ne chiusi chire buru chioka. 
Exodus28:32 Obochore engoro gati gati, ase omotwe ogosoera, oyebeke ekenario buna egi’esati, techa gotandoka." 
Exodus28:33 Okore emegwekano y’amatunda e rikomomanga korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, oyebeke eetanane omoringero o inse. Ase egati ya kera omogwekano bwe rikomomanga obeke chindege chie chitahabu." 
Exodus28:34 Naboigo ebe emegwekano ye rikomomanga bwateranie ne chindege chie chitahabu bietanane omoringero o inse bw’eganchwa. 
Exodus28:35 Haroni goika ayebeke ekero agokora emeremo y’obokuani, na eriogi rie chindege chiria riigweke ekero agosoa Aase Aachenu ase obosio bw’Omonene, na ekero agosoka, tabaisa gokwa." 
Exodus28:36 “Okore ebao y’etahabu echenire, na buna omonto akomang’a ekemanyererio omang’ere amang’ana ayio:” “Achenirwe ase Omonene”." 
Exodus28:37 Oyesiberanie bosio bw’ekegogwa ne chiusi chire buru. 
Exodus28:38 Haroni ayebogorie ase obosio bwaye igoro. Ase igo abogoreranie na korusia amamocho are nebiegwa ebiraatananwe, ebi Abaisraeli barabe bakoruera Omonene. Haroni nigo arabe okoyebogoria botambe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Exodus28:39 “Oroisie eganchwa entambe amo nekegogwa korwa ase chiusi chi’egatani engiya, na orokini rwe chiusi chire ne chirangi ao ao." 
Exodus28:40 “Erio oroiserie abamura ba Haroni chiganchwa, ne chinkini; naende obaroiserie ebigogwa emechoro bi’ogosika na ebi’oboseera:" 
Exodus28:41 Obekere Haroni, momura omino, amo nabamura baye, chianga echio. Erio obaake amaguta, obaatanane na kobachena, babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani." 
Exodus28:42 Obaroiserie chisirwari chi’egatani, chigoika amariagati abo, chibe chigotuba obogetirianda bwabo." 
Exodus28:43 Haroni na abamura baye goika bachibeke botambe ekero bagosoa Eema y’Omosangererekano, gose kobakogenda ase egesasimero gokora emeremo y’obokuani Aase Aachenu ime, tibabaisa kwerentera okomocha na gokwa. Oko nogochika koragenderere ase Haroni na ororeria rwaye.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Aya naro orakore ase Haroni na abamura baye ase okobaatanana, babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani: Orusie eeri ensae ne chimingichi ibere chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Exodus29:2 Orusie boigo emegati etabekiri memera na amaandasi atabekiri memera, biroisirie namaguta, na emegati emeoo eakire amaguta. Emegati eyio yonsi eroisigwe korwa ase obosie obonuke bw’engano." 
Exodus29:3 Oyebeke ase egetonga, oyendetere ebe egetonga ime ekero okondetera ekeng’wanso ki’eeri na egie chimingichi chiria ibere." 
Exodus29:4 “Erio orente Haroni amo nabamura baye ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, obasibie namache." 
Exodus29:5 Oimokie chianga chiria, obekere Haroni: Eganchwa erobekanirie egoika inse, na eganchwa eria ende, na egesibao ki’obokuani na egesembe keria; omoboerie norokini rw’egesibao." 
Exodus29:6 Omobekere na ekegogwa omotwe oye, na ase ekegogwa eke osiberanie ekemanyererio keria egechenu gekoorokia ng’a bwatananirwe." 
Exodus29:7 Erio oimokie amaguta akweakwa, omonyororokerie ase omotwe oye, omoyaake." 
Exodus29:8 “Orente na abamura baye, obabekere chianga." 
Exodus29:9 Obaboerie chinkini ebinema biabo, Haroni na abamura baye, na obabekere ebigogwa emetwe yabo. Ase enchera eyio bwatanane Haroni amo nabamura baye babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani kogenderera botambe." 
Exodus29:10 “Orente eeri bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano; Haroni na abamura baye babeke amaboko abo ase omotwe bw’eeri eyio. 
Exodus29:11 Erio oyenyenyere ase obosio bw’Omonene ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. 
Exodus29:12 Oimokie amanyinga make, erinde ogindie nekiara kiao emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero. Na amanyinga amatigari oyaumore inse ase egesasimero." 
Exodus29:13 Orusie ebitinya biria bitubete chinyama chi’enda; naboigo nebi’eriini, ne chinyigo chionsi ibere, amo nebitinya bichitubete; obisambere ase egesasimero igoro." 
Exodus29:14 Korende chinyama chi’eeri eyio, ne risankwa, na eubi yonsi y’enda obisambere isiko y’egetwori. Ekio nekeng’wanso ase engencho y’ebibe." 
Exodus29:15 “Orente emingichi eyemo ase echio ibere, na Haroni na abamura baye babeke amaboko abo ase omotwe oye." 
Exodus29:16 Erio oyenyenye na oitorore amanyinga aye ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi. 
Exodus29:17 Onache chinyama chi’emingichi eria chibe ebing’ese; osibie chinyama chi’enda eria amo nebirenge, na obibeke igoro y’ebing’ese biria na omotwe oye." 
Exodus29:18 Osambere chinyama echi chionsi chi’emingichi ase egesasimero igoro. Eke nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene, ekeng’wanso ki’omorero kere ne rimisu rigiya rikogwenera Omonene." 
Exodus29:19 “Erio orente emingichi eria ende, na Haroni na abamura baye babeke amaboko abo ase omotwe oye." 
Exodus29:20 Nyuma y’ayio oyenyenye, orusie amanyinga make, na ase amanyinga ayio ogindie mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kwa Haroni amo na mesia y’amato ’abamura baye; ogindie boigo ebiara ebinene bi’amaboko abo a borio, na ebiara ebinene bi’amagoro abo a borio. Oitorore amanyinga amatigari ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Exodus29:21 Orusie amanyinga make ayare ase egesasimero, na amaguta ayio akweakwa, onyororokerie Haroni ne chianga chiaye, na abamura baye, ne chianga chiabo. Naboigo Haroni na abamura baye baatananwe ase emeremo emechenu, amo ne chianga chiabo." 
Exodus29:22 “Orusie ebitinya bi’emingichi eyio, na omokera oye ore omonoru, na ebitinya bitubete chinyama chi’enda, na ebi’eriini, ne chinyigo chionsi ibere amo nebitinya bichitubete, na ebachwa ya borio, ekiagera emingichi eyio nigo yarurwe ase ogwatanana abakuani ase emeremo emechenu." 
Exodus29:23 Orusie omogati oyomo, ne rindasi erimo riroisirie namaguta, na omogati oyomo omoo, ebio bitabekiri memera, bire ase egetonga ime, bibekire ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Exodus29:24 Ebi bionsi obibeke ase amaboko a Haroni amo nay’abamura baye, obisungusie bibe okoruegwa ase Omonene." 
Exodus29:25 Erio obirusie ase amaboko abo, obisambere ase egesasimero igoro y’ekeng’wanso keria kere ne rimisu rigiya rikogwenera Omonene. Eke nekeng’wanso ki’omorero." 
Exodus29:26 “Obogorie ritaana ri’emingichi eyio yarurwe ase ogwatanana Haroni, orisungusie ribe okoruegwa ase Omonene. Nerio naribe eriao, erigotungetie korwa ase eng’iti eyio." 
Exodus29:27 “Naboigo oraatanane ritaana ri’emingichi eyio yarurwe ekeng’wanso amo nekenama kiaye, ebitari ebio bi’emingichi eyio bibe ebitungetie Haroni amo nabamura baye." 
Exodus29:28 Ebi nigo birabe bitungetie Haroni amo nabamura baye kogenderera botambe korwa ase Abaisraeli, bibe ekeegwa ki’Omonene korwa asebare, ekeng’wanso kiabo ki’omorembe." 
Exodus29:29 “Chianga chiria chinchenu chia Haroni nigo chiraegwe ab’ororeria rwaye nyuma gakure, bachieboyie ekero bagochia goakwa amaguta na gwatananwa." 
Exodus29:30 Omomura o Haroni, oyorabogorie emeremo y’obokuani ase ribaga riaye, goika eboyie chianga echi engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, ekero agochia gosoa Eema y’Omosangererekano na gokora emeremo ime y’Aase Aachenu." 
Exodus29:31 “Oire emingichi eria yarurwe ase ogwatanana abakuani ase emeremo emechenu, oiyekere chinyama chiaye aase aatananire." 
Exodus29:32 Agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, Haroni na abamura baye barie chinyama chi’emingichi eria amo nemegati ere ase egetonga ime." 
Exodus29:33 Barabwo barie ebinto ebi biarurwe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa ekero baatananetwe ase emeremo emechenu. Monto onde omoao takoba ne ribaga ri’okobiria, ekiagera ebinto ebi nebichenu." 
Exodus29:34 Onye chinyama gose emegati bigotigara goika mambia, erio obisambe nomorero; tibibaisa koriegwa, ekiagera nebichenu." 
Exodus29:35 “Naboigo orakorere Haroni amo nabamura baye koreng’ana buna nagochikire. Ogwatananwa kwabo kobe gokogenderera ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. 
Exodus29:36 Kera rituko orue eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa. Ase okorua ekeng’wanso ase okobwatanigwa nigo orabe kogochena egesasimero. Erio ogeake amaguta na kogiatanana ase emeremo emechenu. 
Exodus29:37 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere obe gokogenderera gokora okobwatanigwa ase egesasimero na kogechena mono; na kera egento kerabe gekogekuna, nigo kerabe egechenu.”" 
Exodus29:38 “Na ebing’wanso orabe gokorua igoro ase egesasimero nabio ebi: Kera rituko botambe, orue chimanwa ibere chie ching’ondi echiakoorire omwaka oyomo." 
Exodus29:39 Emanwa eyemo y’echio oyerue mambia na eria ende mogoroba. 
Exodus29:40 Amo nemanwa eria entang’ani orue ebimunu bibere bi’obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta amaya, egetuba ekemo na ekeng’ese, amitire korwa ase amazeituni. Naende goika orue edivai egetuba ekemo na ekeng’ese ebe okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa." 
Exodus29:41 Emanwa eria ende oyerue mogoroba; oyerue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na ogw’ekenyugwa, buna gwakorete mambia, kobe ekeng’wanso ki’omorero kebe ne rimisu rigiya ase Omonene." 
Exodus29:42 Ekeng’wanso eke ki’ogosambwa kebe gekoruegwa ebiaare ase ebiaare botambe agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, ase obosio bwane, inche Omonene. Agwo ndabe nkoumerana nainwe, naende nkwane naye." 
Exodus29:43 Agwo ning’umerane n’Abaisraeli, na aase agwo ning’akore abe aachenu nobonene bwane." 
Exodus29:44 Ninchene Eema y’Omosangererekano amo negesasimero; naboigo ninchene Haroni amo nabamura baye babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani. 
Exodus29:45 Inche nimenye ase egati y’Abaisraeli, imbe Nyasae obo." 
Exodus29:46 Barabwo nabamanye ng’a inche ninche Nyasae obo; ninche nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erinde imbe imenyete ase egati yabo. Inche ninche Nyasae obo.”" 
Exodus30:1 “Oroisie egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge ase ubani egosamberwa. 
Exodus30:2 Obotambe bwaye bobe obw’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo; nabo chinsemo chiaye inye chibe chireng’aine; na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro bobe amaboko abere. Emegwekano yaye ye chingunchara nigo eraroisigwe ebe egento ekemo negesasimero." 
Exodus30:3 Oyeoome netahabu echenire, igoro yaye, ne chinsemo chiaye inye, amo ne chingunchara chiaye; oyeetananie omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus30:4 Okore chibonyi ibere chie chitahabu ochibeke inse y’omong’ororia chinsemo ibere, na emiaro esoigwe imeo, erinde egesasimero kenyare kobogorerigwa." 
Exodus30:5 Obaache emiaro eria korwa ase emekonge, oyeoome netahabu." 
Exodus30:6 Obeke egesasimero ekio bosio bw’etoto eria ekengete aase aria esanduku egachire, eria ere ne chibao chirikire oborori amo n’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera igoro yaye. Aase agwo ndabe nkoumerana naye." 
Exodus30:7 Kera emambia ekero Haroni akoroisia chitaya nabe ogosambera agwo ubani egotioka buya," 
Exodus30:8 naende ekero arabe ogwokia chitaya engaki ya mogoroba. Ogosambwa okwo kwa ubani nigo koragenderere botambe ase obosio bw’Omonene, ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Exodus30:9 Timobaisa gosamba ubani eye etachikiri, gose ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, gose okoruegwa kw’endagera, gose timobaisa koumora okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa igoro yaye." 
Exodus30:10 Ara rimo kera omwaka Haroni akore okobwatanigwa ase emegwekano ye chingunchara ere ase chikoona chi’egesasimero. Naboigo ara rimo kera omwaka nakorere egesasimero okobwatanigwa namanyinga ’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ayio nigo arakorerwe ebiaare ase ebiaare. Egesasimero ekio nagiatananwe kebe egechenu mono ase Omonene.” 
Exodus30:11 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Exodus30:12 “Ekero orabe gokobara Abaisraeli ase okorikwa kwabo, kera omonto arue ekeegwa ase Omonene, kebe embooria ase obogima bwaye, tibabaisa konyora amaakwa ekero bakorikwa." 
Exodus30:13 Ase igo, kera omonto oyorache korikwa goika arue ekeng’ese gi’esekeli ase ekerengo gi’esekeli egokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu, ebe ekeegwa ase Omonene. (Esekeli eyemo nechigera emerongo ebere.)" 
Exodus30:14 Kera omonto oyorarikwe, engencho yaye oyokoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, goika arue ekeegwa eke ase Omonene." 
Exodus30:15 Oyore omonda takorua goetania ekeng’ese gi’esekeli, gose oyore omotaka takorua inse y’ekio, ekero morarue ekeegwa ekio ase Omonene. Kerokio kebe embooria ase obogima bwaino." 
Exodus30:16 Koranyore chibesa echi Abaisraeli bararue chibe embooria, ochikorere ase emeremo y’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Ase igo Abaisraeli babe bakoinyorwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, naende chibesa echio chibe embooria ase obogima bwabo.”" 
Exodus30:17 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Exodus30:18 “Oroisie egetuba gi’etaai amo nenterekerero yaye y’etaai. Okebeke egati y’Eema y’Omosangererekano na egesasimero, na obeke amache imeo." 
Exodus30:19 Haroni na abamura baye bagwesibia amaboko na amagoro ase amache ayio. 
Exodus30:20 Ekero bagosoa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano goika besibie ase amache ayio, tibabaisa gokwa; naboigo ekero bakogenda ase egesasimero ase okoruera Omonene ekeng’wanso ki’omorero" 
Exodus30:21 Barabwo babe bagoisaba amaboko, basibie na amagoro, tibabaisa gokwa. Ayio nigo arabe ogochika koragenderere asare na ase ororeria rwaye ebiaare ase ebiaare.”" 
Exodus30:22 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Exodus30:23 “Oimokie ebinto bigotioka buya: Amaguta a manemane chikiro ikomi, na omodalasini ore ne rimisu rigiya chikiro isano, na amanukato are ne rimisu rigiya chikiro isano," 
Exodus30:24 na kasia chikiro ikomi. (Bionsi bibe bi’ekerengo kegokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu). Oimokie na amaguta ’emezeutini ebituba bine. 
Exodus30:25 Ase ebinto ebio oroisie amaguta akweakwa ase chisemi chi’omoroisia omong’aini, abe amaguta amachenu akweakwa." 
Exodus30:26 Oake Eema y’Omosangererekano, na Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori," 
Exodus30:27 na emesa amo nebinto bireo, na ekebekerero gie chitaya amo nebikorero biaye, na egesasimero ase ubani egosamberwa," 
Exodus30:28 na egesasimero ase ebing’wanso bigosamberwa amo nebikorero biaye, na egetuba amo nenterekerero yaye." 
Exodus30:29 Naboigo oraatanane ebinto ebi, obikore ebichenu kegima, erio onde bwensi orabikune abe omochenu." 
Exodus30:30 Haroni na abamura baye obaake amaguta na kobaatanana babe bagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani. 
Exodus30:31 Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a amaguta aya akweakwa abe amachenu asende egati yaino ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Exodus30:32 Tabaisa goakwa ase emebere ya mwanyabanto. Timoroisia amaguta ande anga buna ayio. Ayio namachenu, nabe amachenu asemore." 
Exodus30:33 Monto onde bwensi aise koroisia amaguta buna ayio gose koyaaka omonto omoao, oyotari omokuani, nigo araatananwe korwa ase egesaku kiaye.”" 
Exodus30:34 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Oimokie ebinto bigotioka buya: Oborembo bwa nafiti, na amaguta ’amakorogonte na oborembo bwa kalibani, na ebinto binde ebiansu, na ubani engiya; kera egento kebe gi’ekerengo ekemo." 
Exodus30:35 Korwa ase ebinto ebio oroisie amanukato oyaroisie ase chisemi chi’omoroisia omong’aini ebekwe omonyo, abe amarabu achenire." 
Exodus30:36 Orusie bike, erio obiswage bibe obosie. Obeke boke bosio bw’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, aase ndaumerane naye. Amanukato ayio abe amachenu mono asemore." 
Exodus30:37 Timweroiseria amanukato ande onsi y’ogosambwa anga buna ayio. Abe asemore amachenu ase obosio bw’Omonene. 
Exodus30:38 Monto onde bwensi aise koroisia amanukato anga buna ayio ase okwegokeria rimisu riaye nigo araatananwe korwa ase egesaku ki’abanto b’Omonene.” 
Exodus31:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Exodus31:2 “Rora, nachorire Besaleli, oyore mosinto o Uri, mochokoro o Huri, bw’egesaku kia Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Inche Nyasae namoichoirie omoika one, namoeire obong’aini ne chisemi amanye gokora emeremo ende yonsi y’oboroisia," 
Exodus31:4 abe oyomanyete koroberia na koroisia ebinto bie chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitaai." 
Exodus31:5 Ere abe okobaacha amagena e rigori rinene na koyabeka ase ebikonde, na kobaacha emete, na gokora emeremo ende yonsi y’oboroisia." 
Exodus31:6 Nachorire Oholiabu, mosinto bw’Ahisamaki bw’egesaku kia Dani amokonye ase emeremo eyio. Nabaeire abaroisia bande bonsi obong’aini, erinde banyare gokora ebinto bionsi ebi nagochikire." 
Exodus31:7 Barabwo baroisie Eema y’Omosangererekano, na Esanduku ebe ne chibao chirikire oborori, na Oboikaranso bw’Amabera, na ebinto bionsi bi’Eema eyio," 
Exodus31:8 emesa na ebinto birabeo, ekebekerero gie chitaya gi’etahabu echenire na ebikorero biaye na egesasimero ase ubani erasamberwe," 
Exodus31:9 egesasimero ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe na ebikorero biaye, na egetuba amo nenterekerero yaye," 
Exodus31:10 ne chianga chingiya chinchenu chia Haroni omokuani, na echi’abamura baye, echi barabeke ekero bagokora emeremo y’obokuani," 
Exodus31:11 na amaguta akweakwa, na ubani ere ne rimisu rigiya esamberwe Aase Aachenu ime. Ase ogokora ebinto ebi bionsi goika bakore buna nagochikire kegima.”" 
Exodus31:12 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia." 
Exodus31:13 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli obatebie: Goika morende Chisabato chiane, ekiagera echio nekemanyererio egati yane nainwe ebiaare ase ebiaare, erinde momanye ng’a ninche Omonene oyokobachena." 
Exodus31:14 Ase igo morende rituko ri’Esabato, ekiagera ne rituko richenu asemore. Onde bwensi aise korisaria, nigo araitwe akwe. Onde bwensi aise gokora emeremo ase rituko erio nigo araatananwe korwa ase egesaku ki’abanto b’Omonene." 
Exodus31:15 Mokore emeremo amatuko atano na rimo, korende rituko ria gatano na kabere n’Esabato Enchenu, rituko ri’ogotimoka, richenu ase Omonene. Onde bwensi aise gokora emeremo ase rituko erio goika aitwe akwe." 
Exodus31:16 Nabo Abaisraeli goika babwate na korenda rituko ri’Esabato ebiaare ase ebiaare, ekiagera oko nokobwatana koragenderere botambe." 
Exodus31:17 Rituko erio ribe ekemanyererio keragenderere egati yane na Abaisraeli, ekiagera ase amatuko atano na rimo inche Omonene natongete igoro na ense, korende ase rituko ria gatano na kabere ngatiga emeremo yane yonsi, na gotimoka.”" 
Exodus31:18 Ekero Omonene akoorire gokwana na Musa agwo ase egetunwa gia Sinai, akamoa chibao ibere chi’amagena chirikire oborori nekiara kia Nyasae." 
Exodus32:1 Ekero abanto baroche ng’a Musa otebanire goika korwa ase egetunwa, bagasangererekana amo, bagachiera Haroni, bakamotebia, “Inchuo aa, tokorere enyasae eratotang’ane, ekiagera titomanyeti eki kiamonyorire Musa, oyo otong’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus32:2 Haroni akabatebia, “Rusia ebigera bie chitahabu bire ase amato ’abakungu baino, na ase abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, mobindetere.”" 
Exodus32:3 Erio abanto bonsi bakarusia ebigera bie chitahabu biare ase amato abo, bakamobiirera Haroni." 
Exodus32:4 Ere akanyora ebinto ebi korwa ase amaboko abo, akanyititora chitahabu chiria. Ekero yabwatanire, akayebomba, ekaba omogwekano bw’emori eeri. Abanto bagateba, “Abaisraeli aba, eye nero enyasae yaino, eyabang’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus32:5 Ekero Haroni ayeroche, akaagacha egesasimero bosio bw’omogwekano oria. Erio akararia, akabora, “Ankio nigo rirabe Rituko Rinene ri’Omonene.”" 
Exodus32:6 Rituko ria kabere abanto bakaimoka mambia chuni, bakarua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, bakarenta na ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe. Abanto bagaikaransa, bakaria na konywa, erio bakaimoka gotenga." 
Exodus32:7 Korende Omonene agatebia Musa, “Tirimboka gochia inse, ekiagera abanto abwo bao kwang’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri besaririe ase ogokora amabe," 
Exodus32:8 baonchokire bwango, batigire enchera eria nabachigete gotunyana, bekoreire emori eeri y’etahabu. Bayesasimire na koyeruera ekeng’wanso, bagoteba: Abaisraeli aba, eye nero enyasae yaino, eyabang’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Exodus32:9 Ase igo agatebia Musa, “Narorire abanto aba ng’a nabanyabigoti bikong’u." 
Exodus32:10 Bono tiga endamwamu yane yoke igoro asebare, erinde mbasirie, erio ngokore aye obe egesaku ekenene.”" 
Exodus32:11 Korende Musa agasorora Omonene, Nyasae oye, akabora, “Omonene nase ki endamwamu yao egwoka igoro y’abanto bao, abakwang’anyetie korwa Misiri ase okobua okonene, na ase okoboko kwao gwe chinguru?" 
Exodus32:12 Inee! Nigo origetie Abamisiri batebe: Igo abarusia aa, oganetie kobaita ase ebitunwa na kobasiria kegima? Ase igo onchoka korwa ase endamwamu yao enene, tokora amabe aya kwarengereirie gokorera abanto bao." 
Exodus32:13 Inyora abasomba bao Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Israeli, na buna kwabarierete eira ase ogwetiania, okabatebia: Nigo ndamente oroiboro rwaino robe oronge buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro. Nimbae ense eye yonsi nabarierete eira ng’a nimbae ebe omwando obo kare na kare.”" 
Exodus32:14 Erio Omonene akaonchoka, tabakorera amabe aria konya arengereirie gokorera abanto baye." 
Exodus32:15 Musa akeonchora, agatirimboka korwa ase egetunwa igoro, na ase amaboko aye obwate chibao ibere chi’amagena chirikire oborori chinsemo chionsi ibere, bosio na nyuma." 
Exodus32:16 Chibao echio nigo chiaroisetigwe na Nyasae omonyene, na amariko aya nigo arikire na Nyasae, amang’eire ase chibao chiria." 
Exodus32:17 Yoshua akaigwa eriogi ri’abanto bakwoga, agatebia Musa, “Naigure eriogi ase egetwori, eriogi buna eri’esegi.”" 
Exodus32:18 Musa akamoiraneria, “Eriogi eri tiriri eri’abanto babuire esegi, gose eri’okorera kw’abanto babuirwe, korende eriogi naigure neri’abanto bagotera.”" 
Exodus32:19 Musa gaikire ang’e negetwori akarora emori eria, na buna abanto baare gotenga, akaba nendamwamu enene; agaakera inse chibao chiria abwate maboko aye, chigaateka, chikaba ebisamunye ase egetunwa inse." 
Exodus32:20 Erio akabwata emori eria bakorete, akayesamba na koyesegenyia goika ekaba orotu, akaroitera ase amache ime, na akaa Abaisraeli amache ayio, na barabwo bakanywa." 
Exodus32:21 Agwo Musa akaboria Haroni, “Naki abanto aba bagokorete goika okagera bagakora ebibe ebinene buna ebi?”" 
Exodus32:22 Haroni akamoiraneria, “Omonene one, toba nendamwamu entindi, aye nomanyete abanto aba ng’a nababe." 
Exodus32:23 Naki nigo bantebia: Tokorere enyasae eratotang’ane, ekiagera titomanyeti eki kiamonyorire Musa, oyo otong’anyetie korwa Misiri." 
Exodus32:24 Inche: nkabatebia: Onde bwensi obwate etahabu ayerusie. Barabwo bagachirusia, bagaching’a, na inche ngachiruta ase omorero ime, na emori eye ekabao.”" 
Exodus32:25 Musa akarora abanto bakoonchobana, na buna Haroni abatigete baonchobane na gosasima omogwekano oria, ase amasio ’ababisa babo." 
Exodus32:26 Agwo Musa agatenena geita ki’egetwori, akabora, “Onde bwensi oyore ensemo y’Omonene ache aa asende.” Abalawi bonsi bagasangererekana asare." 
Exodus32:27 Ere akabatebia, “Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, otebire iga: Kera oyomo oino abogorie omoyio oye o birende, agende aaria na aaria ase egetwori korwa geita ekemo goika ekende. Kera oyomo aite onde bwensi aranyore, nonya noyomwabo, gose omosani, gose omogisangio.”" 
Exodus32:28 Abalawi bagakora buna Musa abatebetie, na abanto chilifu isato bagaitwa ase rituko erio." 
Exodus32:29 Musa akabatebia. “Rero inwe mweatananire ase ogokorera Omonene, ekiagera timwarengereretie abana baino gose abamino; ase igo Omonene obasesenirie rero.”" 
Exodus32:30 Rituko ria kabere Musa agatebia abanto, “Mwakorire ebibe ebinene mono. Na bono ngotiira inde gochia ase Omonene, aande nabo ndabanyorere okobwatanigwa, ekiagera mwakorire ebibe.”" 
Exodus32:31 Naende Musa akairana gochia ase Omonene, akamotebia, “Abanto aba bakorire ebibe ebinene mono, bekoreire enyasae y’etahabu." 
Exodus32:32 Na bono, koranche, obaabere ebibe biabo. Onye taibo, rirorio otinyie erieta riane korwa ase ebuku eria kwarigete.”" 
Exodus32:33 Omonene akairaneria Musa, “Omonto oria onkoreire ebibe, nere ndatinyie erieta riaye korwa ase ebuku yane." 
Exodus32:34 Korende bono genda, oraae abanto abwo goika aase aria nagotebetie; omomalaika one nagotang’ane. Korende rituko ndiche ekero ndabae egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo.”" 
Exodus32:35 Omonene akabaa egesusuro, ekiagera bagerete Haroni agakora emori eria, bakayesasima." 
Exodus33:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia, “Imoka korwa aa ogende, aye amo nabanto aba kwang’anyetie korwa Misiri, obaire ase ense eria narierete Ibrahimu na Isaka na Yakobo eira, ngateba: Ning’ee ororeria rwaino ense eye." 
Exodus33:2 Nintome omomalaika agotang’ane, aserie Abakanani, na Abaamori, na Abahiti, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi na Abayebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Nimbaire ase ense ere entenenku y’amabeere na amooke. Inche omonyene tinkogenda amo nainwe, mbaise kobaitera inchera, ekiagera inwe nabanyabigoti bikong’u.”" 
Exodus33:4 Ekero abanto baigwete amang’ana ayio amakong’u bagaichana gose onde taba obegete ebinto biaye bi’ogwechabera. 
Exodus33:5 Omonene agatebia Musa “Batebie Abaisraeli: Inwe nabanyabigoti bikong’u. Inse kogenda amo nainwe, nonya netagika eyemo, nigo ndabasirie kegima. Gaki bono rusia ebinto biaino ebi mwechaberete, erio ndore inki ndabakorere.”" 
Exodus33:6 Ase igo Abaisraeli bakarusia ebinto biria bechaberete, na tibabibeka korwa ekero batigete egetunwa kia Horebu kobagendererete ase orogendo rwabo." 
Exodus33:7 Musa nigo anarete koira eema na koyetenenia are ake korwa ase egetwori akayeroka “Eema y’Omosangererekano.” Na onde bwensi oganetie koboria Omonene ring’ana, goika agende ase Eema eria, isiko y’egetwori." 
Exodus33:8 Engaki ende yonsi Musa arenge kogenda ase Eema eria, abanto bonsi nigo baare koimoka na gotenena, kera omonto ase egesoero ki’eema yaye, na korigereria Musa goika osoire Eema eria ime." 
Exodus33:9 Ekero Musa asoire Eema eria, riire riare buna esiiro riba rigoika na gotenena ase egesoero ki’Eema eria, na Omonene aba ogokwana na Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Ekero abanto bonsi barorire riire riria rigotenena ase egesoero ki’Eema, baba bakoimoka na gotung’ama inse ase ogosasima, kera omonto ase egesoero ki’eema yaye." 
Exodus33:11 Na Omonene aba ogokwana na Musa obosio ase obosio, buna omonto agokwana nomonto onde. Erio Musa aba okoirana gochia ase egetwori, korende Yoshua, omosomba oye omosae, mosinto o Nuni, tare korua ase Eema eria." 
Exodus33:12 Musa agatebia Omonene, “Rora, aye nigo gwantebetie: Baire abanto aba, korende tigwantebia ng’a ning’o oratome agende amo nainche. Naende ogantebia: Ninkomanyete buya kegima, na buna okorokwa; naye kwanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwane." 
Exodus33:13 Ase igo, onye nanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, nagosabire, onyorokie chinchera chiao, erinde inyare gokomanya na konyora ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, naende rigereria ng’a abanto b’egesaku eke nabanto bao bare.”" 
Exodus33:14 Omonene akamotebia, “Inche omonyene nigo ndagende amo naye, ninkoe obotoereru.”" 
Exodus33:15 Musa akamoiraneria, “Onye aye omonyene tokogenda amo naintwe, rirorio totige, tobeere aa." 
Exodus33:16 Naki eramanyekane ng’a inche na abanto bao twanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, onye tokogenda amo naintwe? Koragende amo naintwe, natororekane ng’a twachorirwe korwa ase abanto bande b’ense eye.”" 
Exodus33:17 Omonene akairaneria Musa, “Ninkore erio kwamboria, ekiagera kwanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwane, na inche ninkomanyete buya kegima, na buna okorokwa.”" 
Exodus33:18 Musa akamosaba, “Koranche, onyorokie obonene bwao!”" 
Exodus33:19 Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ninkore obosiani bwane bwonsi boete ase obosio bwao, na erieta riane, inche Omonene, nindirarie ase obosio bwao. Nimororere amabeebe oyio ndarorere amabeebe, na nimororere amabera oyio ndarorere amabera.”" 
Exodus33:20 Naende akamokania, akamotebia, “Tokonyara korora obosio bwane, ekiagera mwanyabanto aise kondora, takonyara koba moyo.”" 
Exodus33:21 Naende Omonene akamotebia, “Rora, aase aiga are ang’e nainche, aye oranyare gotenena egetare igoro." 
Exodus33:22 Erio ekero obonene bwane borabe bogoeta, ninkobeke ase omotaro bw’egetare keria, na ngotube nokoboko kwane, goika imbe naetire." 
Exodus33:23 Erio ndusie okoboko kwane, na aye ondore amagega aane, korende obosio bwane tokonyara koborora.”" 
Exodus34:1 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Baacha chibao chi’amagena ibere chire buna chiria chie ritang’ani, na inche nindike ase chibao echio amang’ana aria arenge ase chiria chie ritang’ani, echio gwatete." 
Exodus34:2 Oche bwebeke ang’e mambia, otiire gocha ase egetunwa gia Sinai, onganye aroro ase egechuria ki’egetunwa." 
Exodus34:3 Monto onde tatiira amo naye, gose monto onde tarorekana aande onsi ase egetunwa eke, gose ching’ondi ne chiombe tichiba chikorisia ang’e negetunwa eke.”" 
Exodus34:4 Erio Musa akabaacha chibao ibere chi’amagena chire buna chiria chie ritang’ani, akaimoka mambia chuni, agatiira gochia ase egetunwa gia Sinai, buna Omonene konya amochikire, obogoretie chibao chiria ibere chi’amagena koboko kwaye." 
Exodus34:5 Omonene agaika ore riire ime, agatenena amo nere, akararia erieta riaye OMONENE." 
Exodus34:6 Omonene agaeta ase obosio bwa Musa, akeraria, “Omonene, Omonene, nere Nyasae omonyene amabera na obuya, tari omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu; nigo are nobwanchani botari koera, na obwegenwa." 
Exodus34:7 Nigo agokorera abanto chilifu obwanchani botari koera; ere nigo akwabera amamocho, na ogosaria, na ebibe, korende tagotiga koa abana na abachokoro egesusuro goika ekiaare kia gatato na egia kane ase engencho y’amabe ’abaibori babo.”" 
Exodus34:8 Erio bwango Musa agatung’ama inse, agasasima," 
Exodus34:9 akabora, “Omonene, ekiagera bono nanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, nagosabire ogende amo naintwe. Naki abanto aba nabanyabigoti bikong’u, korende otwabere ogosaria gwaito na ebibe biaito, otwanchere tobe abanto bao.”" 
Exodus34:10 Omonene akabora, “Rora, bono ngokora inde nainwe okobwatana kw’ogotianania. Ase amasio ’abanto bao bonsi ninkore ebikone ebio bitana gokoreka ase ense yonsi, gose ase egesaku kende gionsi. Na abanto bonsi abagoetanaine inabarore ogokora kw’Omonene, naki ayio ndagokorere namang’ana ay’okoondokia." 
Exodus34:11 Obwate amachiko ayio ndakoe rero. Norore ase obosio bwao ngoseria Abaamori, na Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Bwerende, tobaisa gokora okobwatana nabanyene ense eria ase okogenda, babaise kobatega mogwe." 
Exodus34:13 Inwe motagore ebisasimero biabo, mobiiyerie inse, na gosenyenta chisiiro chi’amagena ase bagosasimera, na emete y’enyasae enkungu Asera moyenache." 
Exodus34:14 “Tobaisa gosasima enyasae ende eng’ao, ekiagera Omonene nigo akorokwa Omonyaisemi, nere Nyasae bwe risemi." 
Exodus34:15 Tobaisa gokora okobwatana nabanyene ense eria, ekiagera ekero bagokora obotomani ase ogosasima chinyasae chiabo na gochiruera ebing’wanso, mbabaise kobarangeria inwe morie ebing’wanso biabo." 
Exodus34:16 Timobaisa konyuomeria abamura baino abaiseke b’abanto abwo, ekiagera abaiseke abwo, ekero baragende gokora obotomani ase ogosasima chinyasae chiabo mbabaise kogera abamura baino basasime chinyasae chiabo." 
Exodus34:17 “Tibwekorera chinyasae korwa ase ebioma binyititoire na kobombwa. 
Exodus34:18 “Orende rituko rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera; na buna nagochigete, orie emegati etabekiri memera ase amatuko atano na abere, ase engaki yachigetwe, y’omotienyi bw’Abibu, naki ase omotienyi oyio oyio noro kwaruete ense ya Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 “Kera omwana omoisia omotangi nabe oyone, ne ching’iti chintangi boigo, chibe chieri gose chimingichi." 
Exodus34:20 Korende emori entangi y’etigere goika oyeboorie ase okorua eng’ondi ebe ekeng’wanso. Onye tibwancheti koyebooria, goika oyebune ebigoti. Abana bao abaisia abatangi goika obaboorie. Onde tari orabe ogocha ase obosio bwane, inche Omonene, namaboko amasa." 
Exodus34:21 “Okore emeremo ase amatuko atano na rimo, korende rituko ria gatano na kabere otimoke, nonya nengaki y’okorema na eye rigesa." 
Exodus34:22 “Orende Rituko Rinene rie Chichuma, ase engencho y’ogotongora kw’engano, ne Rituko Rinene ri’Ogosangereria Rigesa, omoerio bw’omwaka." 
Exodus34:23 “Ara gatato kera omwaka abanto bao bonsi abasacha babe bagocha ase obosio bwane, inche Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Exodus34:24 Nyuma konaseririe abanto b’ebisaku korwa asore na kogareyia orogongo rwao, onde tari orakoroure ase chingaki echi isato kera omwaka, ekero orabe kogocha ase obosio bwane, inche Omonene, Nyasae oo." 
Exodus34:25 “Ekero okondetera amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso, tobaisa koyandetera amo nomogati obekire ememera. Tobaisa gotigaria chinyama chinde chi’ekeng’wanso kie rituko rinene ri’Epasaka goika mambia." 
Exodus34:26 “Goika orente ase enyomba yane, inche Omonene Nyasae oo, ogotongora kwao okore okuya korwa ase omogondo oo. “Tobaisa koiyekera emanwa y’embori ime y’amabeere ’eng’ina.”" 
Exodus34:27 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Rika amang’ana aya, ekiagera ase amang’ana ayio nakorire okobwatana kw’ogotianania naye amo n’Abaisraeli.”" 
Exodus34:28 Musa akabeera n’Omonene ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko, tare koria kende, gose konywa, akarika ase chibao echi ibere amang’ana ’okobwatana koria, Amachiko ayio ikomi." 
Exodus34:29 Ekero Musa arenge gotirimboka korwa ase egetunwa gia Sinai, obwate ase okoboko kwaye chibao chirikire oborori, tamanya ng’a risankwa ri’obosio bwaye nigo riare komeka‐meka, ekiagera konya okwanire n’Omonene." 
Exodus34:30 Haroni na abanto bonsi, ekero baroche buna risankwa ri’obosio bwa Musa riare komeka‐meka, bakoboa komoika ang’e." 
Exodus34:31 Korende Musa akabarangeria, erio Haroni amo nabatang’ani bonsi b’omosangererekano bakairana asare, na Musa agakwana nabarabwo." 
Exodus34:32 Nyuma y’ayio Abaisraeli bonsi bagacha ase Musa, na ere akabaa amachiko onsi aya Omonene konya amoeire ase egetunwa gia Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Ekero Musa akoorire gokwana nabarabwo, akabeka egietubo ase obosio bwaye." 
Exodus34:34 Ekero kende gionsi Musa are gosoa eema ase obosio bw’Omonene gokwana nere, nigo are korusia egietubo goika osoka korwa aroro. Ekero asokire aba ogotebia Abaisraeli amang’ana onsi aya achikirwe gokwana," 
Exodus34:35 na barabwo baba bakorora risankwa ri’obosio bwaye rikomeka‐meka. Erio Musa abeka egietubo ase obosio bwaye goika airana naende gokwana n’Omonene. 
Exodus35:1 Musa akarangeria omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli amo, akabatebia, “Aya naro Omonene achikire morakore:" 
Exodus35:2 Mokore emeremo ase amatuko atano na rimo, korende rituko ria gatano na kabere nigo rirabe richenu asemore, rituko ri’Esabato, riatananwe ase Omonene. Onde bwensi aise gokora emeremo ase rituko erio goika aitwe akwe." 
Exodus35:3 Timobaisa gouta omorero ase rituko ri’Esabato, aande onsi ase momenyete.”" 
Exodus35:4 Musa agatebia omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, “Aya naro Omonene achikire:" 
Exodus35:5 Moruere Omonene ebiegwa. Kera omonto oyore nomoyo bw’ogwancha aruere Omonene ebinto ebi: Etahabu, na efeta, na etaai;" 
Exodus35:6 chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri; egatani engiya na amanya e chimbori;" 
Exodus35:7 amasankwa e chimingichi aakire etaago, na amasankwa amaterere e ching’iti chia rooche, ne chibao chi’emekonge;" 
Exodus35:8 amaguta e chitaya, na ebinto bi’okoroisia amaguta akweakwa, na ebi’okoroisia ubani;" 
Exodus35:9 amagena e rigori rinene buna oiniki na ayande akobekwa ase egesibao na egesembe ki’obokuani.” 
Exodus35:10 “Abaroisia bonsi abang’aini abare ase egati yaino, tiga bache baroisie ebinto bionsi Omonene achikire," 
Exodus35:11 nabio ebi: Obomenyo na eema yaye, na egietubo kiaye, ebigobanio ne chibao chiaye, na emeriibo, ne chisiiro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo;" 
Exodus35:12 Esanduku na emiaro yaye, na Oboikaranso bw’Amabera, na etoto eria erabekwe ebokenge;" 
Exodus35:13 emesa na emiaro yaye, na ebikorero biaye bionsi, na emegati eria eraruegwe ase Nyasae;" 
Exodus35:14 ekebekerero gie chitaya na ebikorero biaye, ne chitaya chiaye amo namaguta e chitaya," 
Exodus35:15 na egesasimero ase ubani egosamberwa amo nemiaro yaye, na amaguta akweakwa, na amanukato are ne rimisu rigiya, na ebitambaa bigosungwa ase egesoero ki’Obomenyo obwo;" 
Exodus35:16 na egesasimero aase ebing’wanso bigosamberwa amo negechungi kiaye gi’etaai, na emiaro yaye, na ebikorero biaye bionsi, na egetuba amo nenterekerero yaye;" 
Exodus35:17 ebitambaa ebirakenge eraaro, ne chisiiro amo ne chinterekerero chiaye, na egetambaa ki’egesoero ki’eraaro," 
Exodus35:18 na ebirochi bi’Obomenyo na ebi’eraaro amo ne chingori chiabo," 
Exodus35:19 ne chianga chiria chinseera chigokorerwa ime y’Aase Aachenu, engencho yaye chianga chia Haroni omokuani, amo nechi’abamura baye, barabe bakobeka ekero bagokora emeremo yabo y’obokuani.”" 
Exodus35:20 Erio omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli okaruao agwo ase obosio bwa Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Naende bakairana kera oyomo buna enkoro yaye yamosugetie, na buna anchete ere omonyene, bakarentera Omonene ebiegwa biabo ase okoroisia Eema y’Omosangererekano na ebinto bionsi ebiaganeirie, ase emeremo eria na ase chianga chiria chinchenu." 
Exodus35:22 Barabwo bagacha, abasacha na abakungu, na ase ogwancha kwabo bakarenta amameka, na ebigera bi’amato abo, ne chibonyi chi’ebiara, ne chisonoi, na ebinto ao ao bie chitahabu bi’ogwechabera. Kera omonto akarenta ebinto bie chitahabu, ebi aatananete ase ogokorera Omonene." 
Exodus35:23 Naende kera omonto oyo obwate chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, na egatani engiya, na amanya e chimbori, na amasankwa e chimingichi aakire etaago, na amasankwa e ching’iti chia rooche, akabirenta." 
Exodus35:24 Bonsi abaare konyara korua chifeta ne chitaai bakabirenta bibe ebiegwa ase Omonene, na bonsi abarenge nemekonge eyere emiya ase emeremo ende yonsi, bakayerenta." 
Exodus35:25 Na abakungu abaroisia abang’aini bagasisa namaboko abo chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, na echi’egatani engiya, bagachirenta." 
Exodus35:26 Na abakungu bonsi, abasugetigwe ase emioyo yabo, naende bamanyete emeremo eye, bagasisa amanya e chimbori abe chiusi." 
Exodus35:27 Abatang’ani babo bakarenta amagena e rigori rinene buna oiniki na ayande arabekwe ase egesibao na egesembe ki’obokuani," 
Exodus35:28 naende ebinto bie rimisu rigiya amo namaguta e chitaya, na amaguta akweakwa, na ubani ere ne rimisu rigiya." 
Exodus35:29 Abaisraeli bonsi, abasacha na abakungu, abarenge nogwancha korenta ebinto bi’emeremo eye Omonene achigete goetera ase Musa, bakarenta ebiegwa biabo ase Omonene." 
Exodus35:30 Musa agatebia Abaisraeli, “Rora, Omonene ochorire Besaleli, oyore mosinto o Uri, mochokoro o Huri bw’egesaku kia Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Omoichoirie omoika o Nyasae, omoeire obong’aini ne chisemi anyare gokora emeremo ende yonsi y’oboroisia," 
Exodus35:32 abe oyomanyete koroberia na koroisia ebinto bie chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitaai," 
Exodus35:33 abe okobaacha amagena e rigori rinene na koyabeka ase ebikonde, na kobaacha emete, na gokora emeremo ende yonsi y’oboroisia." 
Exodus35:34 Omonene omoeire ere amo na Oholiabu, mosinto bw’Ahisamaki bw’egesaku kia Dani, obong’aini bw’okworokereria abande oboroisia bwabo." 
Exodus35:35 Obaichoirie obong’aini ase chinkoro chiabo, erinde banyare gokora emeremo ende yonsi buna okomang’a, na okoroberia, na koroisia ebitambaa bie chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, na echi’egatani engiya, na koroisia ebitambaa binde bionsi. Banyare gokora emeremo ende yonsi na bamanye koroberia oboroisia bonde bwonsi.”" 
Exodus36:1 “Besaleli na Oholiabu amo nabaroisia bande bonsi, aba Omonene konya aeire obong’aini, abare nogwancha kw’ogokora emeremo ende yonsi egwenerete ase okoagacha Obomenyo Obochenu, goika bakore kera emeremo buna Omonene konya achikire.”" 
Exodus36:2 Erio Musa akarangeria Besaleli amo na Oholiabu na abaroisia bande bonsi, aba Omonene aeire obong’aini, abare nogwancha, bache, bachake emeremo eria." 
Exodus36:3 Barabwo bakaegwa korwa ase Musa ebiegwa ebi bionsi Abaisraeli konya barentire ase okoroisia Obomenyo boria Obochenu. Na Abaisraeli bakagenderera korenta ebiegwa biabo kera emambia. 
Exodus36:4 Erio abaroisia baria abang’aini, abarenge gokora emeremo ende yonsi ase Obomenyo boria Obochenu, nyuma kobatigire emeremo eye baare gokora bagacha ase Musa," 
Exodus36:5 bakamotebia, “Abanto barentire ebiegwa ebinge goetania ebiaganeirie ase emeremo eria Omonene achigete ekorwe.”" 
Exodus36:6 Ase ayio Musa akarareria abanto bonsi b’egetwori, akabachika, “Onde tabaisa korenta ebiegwa binde goetania ebi konya biasangererigwe ase Obomenyo Obochenu, abe omosacha gose omokungu.” Ase igo abanto bagatiga korenta ebiegwa binde." 
Exodus36:7 Ebi konya barentire nigo biabete ebinge, bigaetania ebiaganeirie ase emeremo eria yare gocha gokorwa." 
Exodus36:8 Abaroisia bonsi abang’aini b’abakori emeremo bakaroisia eema y’Obomenyo. Bakayeroisia nebitambaa ikomi, biroisirie korwa ase chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire amo ne chiusi chi’amarionya chimbariri Omoroisia omong’aini akabiroisia, bire nemegwekano y’abakerubi." 
Exodus36:9 Obotambe bwa kera egetambaa nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere, na atano na atato, na obogare bwaye amaboko ane; bionsi nigo biarenge bi’ekerengo ekemo." 
Exodus36:10 Bakabwatania ebitambaa bitano amo, bikaba rirondia erimo. Naboigo nebitambaa binde bitano." 
Exodus36:11 Bagakora ebioro bie chiusi chiburu, bakabibeka ase ensinyo y’egetambaa kere ensinyo y’ensemo ya kera rirondia." 
Exodus36:12 Bagakora ebioro emerongo etano, bakabibeka ase egetambaa kegochakera rirondia rie ritang’ani, na emerongo etano ase egetambaa kegokoorera rirondia ria kabere. Ebioro bia kera rirondia bigachikana." 
Exodus36:13 Bagatura ebigobanio bie chitahabu emerongo etano, na ase ebio bakabwatania amarondia ayio amo, akaba eema eyemo y’Obomenyo." 
Exodus36:14 Erio bakaroisia amarondia ikomi na rimo ay’amanya e chigoree, akaba eema y’ogotuba Obomenyo boria." 
Exodus36:15 Obotambe bwa kera rirondia nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etato, na obogare bwaye amaboko ane. Amarondia onsi aya ikomi na rimo nigo arenge ay’ekerengo ekemo." 
Exodus36:16 Bakabwatania amarondia atano amo, akaba rirondia erimo, naende atano na rimo akaba rirondia erimo." 
Exodus36:17 Bagakora ebioro emerongo etano, bakabibeka ase ensinyo ye rirondia rinene rie ritang’ani, na emerongo etano ase rirondia rinene ria kabere ase rigochakera." 
Exodus36:18 Naende bagakora ebigobanio emerongo etano bie chitaai ase okobwaterania amarondia ayio abere, abe eema engima." 
Exodus36:19 Bagakora rirondia ri’amasankwa e chimingichi aakire etaago, ase ogotuba eema, ne rirondia rinde ri’amasankwa amaterere e ching’iti chia rooche, erirabekwe igoro ye rirondia rie ritang’ani." 
Exodus36:20 Naende bakaroisia chibao chi’emekonge ase Obomenyo, bagachitenenia." 
Exodus36:21 Obotambe bwa kera ebao nigo bware obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi, na obogare okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus36:22 Bagakora chintamang’o ibere ase kera ebao, ase chibao echio chirabwateranigwe. Naboigo baroisetie chibao echi chionsi chi’Obomenyo." 
Exodus36:23 Bakaroisia chibao emerongo ebere ase ensemo ya irianyi. 
Exodus36:24 Bagakora ne chinterekerero chie chifeta emerongo ene, chibe ibere ibere inse ya kera ebao ase chintamang’o chiaye ibere." 
Exodus36:25 Nase ensemo ya kabere, nero ya sugusu y’Obomenyo, bakaroisia chibao emerongo ebere," 
Exodus36:26 ne chinterekerero chiaye chie chifeta emerongo ene, ibere ibere inse ya kera ebao." 
Exodus36:27 Korende ase ensemo ya nyuma y’Obomenyo, eyerochie bosongo, bakaroisia chibao isano nemo." 
Exodus36:28 Naende bakaroisia chibao ibere chikaba chikoona chi’Obomenyo ensemo ya nyuma. 
Exodus36:29 Kera ebao ase echio ibere ekabwatanigwa ne chibao chie chinsinyo, korwa inse goika igoro ase ebonyi entang’ani ere; naboigo bakorete ase chibao echio ibere echiabegetwe ase chikoona ibere." 
Exodus36:30 Chibao chionsi nigo chiabete isano na isato, ne chinterekerero chiabo chie chifeta ikomi, na isano nemo, ibere ibere inse ya kera ebao." 
Exodus36:31 Bakabaacha emeriibo etano y’emekonge, eriibe chibao chie rikere erimo ri’Obomenyo," 
Exodus36:32 na etano ase rikere rinde, na etano ase ensemo ya nyuma, eyerochie bosongo." 
Exodus36:33 Bakabaacha omoriibo o gati‐gati omogima, ase okoriiba chibao korwa ensinyo eyemo goika eyende." 
Exodus36:34 Erio bakaooma chibao echio netahabu, bagakora chibonyi chie chitahabu ase emiaro erasoigwe, naende bakaooma emeriibo eria netahabu." 
Exodus36:35 Bakaroisia etoto ye chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo ne chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire. Omoroisia omong’aini akayeroisia ekaba emegwekano y’abakerubi." 
Exodus36:36 Naende bakabaacha chisiiro inye chi’emekonge, bagachiooma netahabu, na ebigobanio biaye bie chitahabu. Bagakora chinterekerero inye korwa ase efeta enyititoire." 
Exodus36:37 Na ase egesoero ki’Eema bakaroisia egetambaa korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani, keroisirie nomoroisia omong’aini." 
Exodus36:38 Bakabaacha chisiiro isano amo nebigobanio biabo, bakaooma ebisure ne chinuga chiabo netahabu. Chinterekerero chiabo isano nigo chiakorire korwa ase chitaai." 
Exodus37:1 Erio Besaleli akaroisia Esanduku ye chibao chi’emekonge. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere na ekeng’ese, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro okoboko okomo, na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus37:2 Akayeooma netahabu echenire, ime na isiko, akayeetanania omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus37:3 Agakora chibonyi inye korwa ase etahabu enyititoire, agachibeka ase amagoro aye ane, ibere ase kera rikere." 
Exodus37:4 Akabaacha emiaro y’emekonge, akayeooma netahabu." 
Exodus37:5 Agasoyia emiaro eyio ase chibonyi ime ase okobogoreria esanduku eria. 
Exodus37:6 Akaroisia ekemumeko gi’etahabu echenire ebe Oboikaranso bw’Amabera. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere na ekeng’ese, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus37:7 Erio agakora emegwekano y’abakerubi babere ey’etahabu esunyuntire, akayebeka ase chinsinyo ibere chi’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera," 
Exodus37:8 oyomo ase kera ensinyo, akayekora ekaba egento ekemo n’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera." 
Exodus37:9 Abakerubi abwo bakarambora chimbaba chiabo igoro y’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera, bakabobekera ekiriri, na amasio abo agachikana; na barabwo bakarigereria Oboikaranso bw’Amabera." 
Exodus37:10 Akaroisia emesa ye chibao chi’emekonge. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
Exodus37:11 Akayeoma netahabu echenire, akayeetanania omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus37:12 Erio agakora orosingo rore nobogare bong’ana egesanyi gi’okoboko, na akaroetanania omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus37:13 Naende agakora chibonyi inye korwa ase chitahabu, ne chibonyi echio agachibeka ase chikoona inye ase amagoro aye ane." 
Exodus37:14 Chibonyi chiria chikabekwa ang’e norosingo, na emiaro eria egasoigwa imeo, erinde emesa enyare kobogorerigwa." 
Exodus37:15 Akabaacha emiaro eria korwa ase emekonge, akayeooma netahabu." 
Exodus37:16 Agakora ebikorero biare kobekwa ase emesa igoro: chinteru na ebitaabo ase ubani, ne chisani, korwa ase ebio bagocha koumora ebinyugwa ebikoruegwa; akabiroisia bionsi korwa ase chitahabu chichenire." 
Exodus37:17 Akaroisia ekebekerero gie chitaya gi’etahabu echenire esunyuntire. Akayeroisia nenterekerero amo ne ritina, na emegwekano y’amamumu na ebisicha; bionsi bikaroisigwa bikaba egento ekemo." 
Exodus37:18 Nigo kiare ne chinsagia isano nemo, chiasogete korwa ase ritina, isato korwa ase ensemo eyemo, na isato korwa ase ensemo ende." 
Exodus37:19 Orosagia rwe ritang’ani rokaba nemegwekano etato y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi, kera ekemo ne rimumu na egesicha, na orosagia rwa kabere boigo rokaba nemegwekano y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi; ne chinsagia chionsi isano nemo chikaba boigo." 
Exodus37:20 Ritina rinyene ri’ekebekerero keria rikaba nemegwekano ene y’ebisicha binga buna ebi’omolozi. 
Exodus37:21 Rimumu erimo rikaba inse ya kera chinsagia ibere chigosoka korwa ase ritina. Ase ayio rikaba rimumu erimo inse ya kera orosagia rw’echio isano nemo chiroisirie chikaba egento ekemo ne ritina. 
Exodus37:22 Bionsi bikaroisigwa korwa ase ribomba erimo ri’etahabu echenire esunyuntire. 
Exodus37:23 Naende akaroisia chitaya chiaye isano na ibere, na ebinachi, ne chindogio chiaye chie chitahabu chichenire." 
Exodus37:24 Ekebekerero keria gie chitaya amo nebikorero biaye bionsi bikaroisigwa korwa ase chitahabu chichenire chi’ekerengo gie chikiro emerongo etano. 
Exodus37:25 Akaroisia egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge ase ubani erasamberwe. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro amaboko abere. Emegwekano ye chingunchara ekaroisigwa ekaba egento ekemo negesasimero." 
Exodus37:26 Agakeooma netahabu echenire, igoro yaye, ne chinsemo chiaye, amo ne chingunchara chiaye, akayeetanania omong’ororia bw’etahabu." 
Exodus37:27 Agakora chibonyi ibere chie chitahabu, agachibeka inse y’omong’ororia ase chinsemo ibere. Ase chibonyi echio emiaro egasoigwa, erinde egesasimero kenyare kobogorerigwa." 
Exodus37:28 Na emiaro eria akabaacha korwa ase emekonge, akayeooma netahabu." 
Exodus37:29 Naende akaroisia amaguta amachenu akweakwa, na ubani echenire are ne rimisu rigiya, akayaroisia buna omoroisia, oyomanyete buya, aranyare koyaroisia." 
Exodus38:1 Erio akaagacha egesasimero gie chibao chi’emekonge ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano, na obogare bwaye amaboko atano; nabo chinsemo chiaye inye chikaba chireng’aine, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atato." 
Exodus38:2 Ase chikoona inye chi’egesasimero akaroisia emegwekano ene ye chingunchara, akayeroisia ekaba egento ekemo negesasimero, akaooma gionsi netaai." 
Exodus38:3 Akaroisia ebikorero bionsi bi’egesasimero nabio ebi: Chindogio chi’okobuucha riibu, na ebichiko, na ebitaabo, ne chigami, ne chindogio chi’okorenta omorero. Ebinto ebi bionsi akabiroisia korwa ase chitaai." 
Exodus38:4 Agakora egechungi gi’etaai, agakebeka korwa inse y’orosingo, kegaika gochia igoro gati gati y’egesasimero." 
Exodus38:5 Agakora chibonyi inye, agachibeka ase chikoona inye chi’egechungi ekio gi’etaai, ase emiaro egosoigwa." 
Exodus38:6 Akabaacha emiaro eria korwa ase emekonge, akayeooma netaai." 
Exodus38:7 Agasoyia emiaro eria ase chibonyi chire chinsemo chi’egesasimero, erinde kenyare kobogorerigwa. Agakeagacha ne chibao, akagetiga giasaime." 
Exodus38:8 Akaroisia egetuba amo nenterekerero yaye korwa ase ebirore bie chitaai bi’abakungu baare gokorera ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. 
Exodus38:9 Ase ensemo ya irianyi akaroisia ebitambaa bie chiusi chindabu chi’egatani chisisire. Obotambe bwabo nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo. 
Exodus38:10 Chisiiro chiaye emerongo ebere echiare kobibwata nigo chiarenge ne chinterekerero chiabo emerongo ebere chie chitaai, korende ebigobanio ne chinuga chiabo nigo chiarenge chie chifeta." 
Exodus38:11 Naboigo ase ensemo ya sugusu akaroisia ebitambaa bire nobotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo. Chisiiro emerongo ebere echiare kobibwata nigo chiarenge ne chinterekerero chiabo emerongo ebere chie chitaai, korende ebigobanio ne chinuga chiabo nigo chiarenge chie chifeta." 
Exodus38:12 Ase ensemo ya bosongo bakaroisia ebitambaa bire nobotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano, ne chisiiro ikomi amo ne chinterekerero chiabo ikomi, korende ebigobanio ne chinuga chiabo nigo chiarenge chie chifeta." 
Exodus38:13 Obogare bw’ensemo ya bosio, erochie moocha, nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano." 
Exodus38:14 Ase ensemo eyemo y’egesoero bakaroisia ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano, ne chisiiro isato amo ne chinterekerero chiabo isato." 
Exodus38:15 Naboigo ase ensemo ende bakaroisia ebitambaa bi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na atano, ne chisiiro isato amo ne chinterekerero chiabo isato. Ase igo chinsemo chionsi ibere chi’egesoero chikaba chireng’aine." 
Exodus38:16 Ebitambaa bionsi ebieetanaine eraaro eria bikaroisigwa ne chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire. 
Exodus38:17 Chinterekerero chie chisiiro chiaye nigo chiarenge chie chitaai, korende ebigobanio ne chinuga chiabo nigo chiarenge chie chifeta, na ebisure biabo bikaoomwa nefeta." 
Exodus38:18 Egetambaa ki’egesoero bakaroisia korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani chisisire. Obotambe bw’egetambaa keria nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano koreng’ana nobogare bwaye buna ebitambaa binde bi’eraaro." 
Exodus38:19 Chisiiro inye, echiare gokebwata, ne chinterekerero chiabo inye, nigo chiarenge chie chitaai, korende ebigobanio biabo nigo biarenge bie chifeta, na ebisure bie chisiiro bikaoomwa nefeta, ne chinuga chiabo nigo chiarenge chie chifeta." 
Exodus38:20 Ebirochi bionsi bi’eema y’Obomenyo na ebi’ebitambaa bi’eraaro nigo biarenge bie chitaai. 
Exodus38:21 Oyo noro omobaro bw’ebinto ebiakoreretwe ase okoroisia Obomenyo, engencho yaye Obomenyo bw’Oborori. Omobaro oyo Musa achigete ogakorwa n’Abalawi inse y’oboraai bwa Itamari, mosinto o Haroni, omokuani." 
Exodus38:22 Besaleli, mosinto o Uri o Huri bw’egesaku kia Yuda, agakora onsi aya Omonene achigete Musa." 
Exodus38:23 Amo nere nigo arenge Oholiabu, omwana o Ahisamaki bw’egesaku kia Dani, komokonya. Ere nigo arenge omong’aini bw’okomang’a na kobaacha, na bw’okoroisia ebitambaa bie chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya." 
Exodus38:24 Etahabu yonsi eyakoreretwe ase emeremo y’okoroisia Obomenyo Obochenu, eyaatananetwe ebe ekerugwa, nigo yarenge chikiro elifu eyemo, na amagana ane, na emerongo etano nomo, na isano (1,465) ase ekerengo gi’esekeli y’Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Exodus38:25 Efeta eyaruetwe nomoganda bw’abwo barigetwe nigo yarenge chikiro chilifu isano, na emerongo etato, na isano (5,035), ase ekerengo gi’esekeli y’Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Exodus38:26 Kera omonto oyorigetwe, oyokoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, akarua ebeka eyemo, engencho yaye ekeng’ese gi’esekeli ase ekerengo gi’esekeli y’Obomenyo Obochenu. Abanto abwo nigo barenge chilifu amagana atano na rimo na isato, na amagana atano, na emerongo etano (603,550)." 
Exodus38:27 Chikiro chilifu isano chie chifeta chiria nigo chiakoretwe ase okoroisia chinterekerero chi’Obomenyo Obochenu ne chi’etoto eria; chikiro chilifu isano ase chinterekerero rigana erimo, chikiro emerongo etano ase kera enterekerero." 
Exodus38:28 Ase chifeta chikiro emerongo etato na isano chiatigarete chiakoreretwe ase okoroisia ebigobanio bie chisiiro na ase okooma ebisure biabo, na koroisia chinuga chiabo."
