Exodus38:29 Chitaai chiatananetwe chibe ekerugwa, nigo chiarenge chikiro chilifu isato, na amagana atano, na emerongo ene, na isano (3,545)." 
Exodus38:30 Ase chitaai chiria akaroisia chinterekerero chi’egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, na egesasimero gi’etaai amo negechungi kiaye, na ebikorero biaye bionsi," 
Exodus38:31 ne chinterekerero chie chisiiro chi’eraaro chibe chinsemo chionsi, na echi’egesoero ki’eraaro, na ebirochi bionsi bi’eema y’Obomenyo, na ebi’eraaro chinsemo chionsi." 
Exodus39:1 Korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, bakaroisia chianga chinseera chi’ogokorera emeremo ime y’Aase Aachenu. Bakaroisia chianga chinchenu chia Haroni, buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Bagakora egesibao ki’obokuani korwa ase chiusi chi’etahabu, na echi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya chisisire." 
Exodus39:3 Bagasunyunta etahabu ekaba eng’oo, naende bakayeninta ekaba chiusi chinyerere, bagachisang’ania ne chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, ase okoroisia egetambaa buna omoroisia omong’aini aranyare gokeroisia." 
Exodus39:4 Bakaroisia ebitwanga bi’amareko bi’egesibao keria, bakabibwatania nakerokio, nyuma na bosio; chinsinyo chiaye ibere ibere chikabwatanigwa amo." 
Exodus39:5 Orokini rw’okobwataneria egesibao rokaroisigwa rw’egetambaa keria ki’egesibao keroisirie korwa ase chiusi chi’etahabu, na echi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya chisisire. Bionsi bigakoreka buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Bakabaacha amagena e rigori rinene akorokwa oiniki, bakayabeka ase ebikonde bie chitahabu; na buna omoroisia omong’aini aranyare komanya komang’era ebimanyererio, bakamang’era amarieta ’abamura ba Israeli." 
Exodus39:7 Bakayabeka ase ebitwanga bi’amareko ase egesibao ki’obokuani, abe ase okoinyora abamura ba Israeli. Bionsi bigakoreka buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Egesembe ki’obokuani bagakeroisia, buna omoroisia omong’aini aranyare gokeroisia, korwa ase egetambaa kere buna eki’egesibao ki’obokuani, nakio keroisirie korwa ase chiusi chi’etahabu na echi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo nechi’egatani engiya chisisire." 
Exodus39:9 Bakaroisia egesembe keria keringire rimo; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge chisentimita emerongo ebere, na ibere, na obogare bwaye boigo. Chinsemo chiaye inye nigo chiarenge chireng’aine." 
Exodus39:10 Bagakebekera emeng’ororia ene y’amagena e rigori. Ase omong’ororia bwe ritang’ani bakabeka saridio, na topasio, na sumaridi;" 
Exodus39:11 na ase oyo o kabere alimasi, na safiro, na yasipi;" 
Exodus39:12 na ase oyo o gatato hiakinto, na agati, na ametisito;" 
Exodus39:13 na ase oyo o kane kurusolito, na oiniki, na berulo. Amagena ayio onsi bakayabeka ase ebikonde bie chitahabu." 
Exodus39:14 Na amagena ayio nigo arenge ikomi na abere, akaba namarieta ’abamura ba Israeli, amang’ekire buna ekemanyererio gekomang’wa. Kera rigena rikaba nerieta ri’egesaku ekemo ki’ebisaku biabo ikomi na bibere." 
Exodus39:15 Bagakora ebichanga bie chitahabu chichenire bisisire, bikabekwa ase egesembe keria." 
Exodus39:16 Bagakora na ebikonde bibere bie chitahabu, ne chibonyi ibere chie chitahabu, na bakabeka chibonyi echi ibere ase emego ebere ya igoro y’egesembe keria." 
Exodus39:17 Bagasiberania ebichanga ebi bibere bie chitahabu ase chibonyi echi ibere ase emego y’egesembe keria. 
Exodus39:18 Naende bakabwaterania chinsinyo chinde ibere chi’ebichanga ase ebikonde biria bibere, na buna biare igo bakabibwaterania nebitwanga bi’amareko bire bosio bw’egesibao ki’obokuani." 
Exodus39:19 Bagakora chibonyi ibere chie chitahabu bagachibeka ase egesembe keria, ase emego ebere ya inse korwa nyuma, echigete egesibao." 
Exodus39:20 Naende bagakora chibonyi chinde chie chitahabu, bagachibeka ase ebitwanga biria bibere bi’amareko bi’egesibao bire bosio, ang’e nomobarero, igoro y’orokini rw’egesibao." 
Exodus39:21 Bagachibwaterania chibonyi chi’egesembe amo nechi’egesibao ki’obokuani neusi eburu; erio egesembe gekabeera orokini igoro, tigecha gosuka. Bionsi bigakoreka buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Bagakora eganchwa korwa ase egetambaa keroisirie ne chiusi chiburu chioka. 
Exodus39:23 Ase eganchwa eria bakabochora engoro ase omotwe ogosoera, enga buna engoro y’esati. Engoro eria ekabekwa ekenaario buna egi’esati, techa gotandoka." 
Exodus39:24 Bagakora emegwekano y’amatunda e rikomomanga korwa ase chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, bakayebeka ase omoringero o inse." 
Exodus39:25 Naende bagakora chindege chie chitahabu chichenire, bagachibeka gati y’emegwekano ye rikomomanga chietanane omoringero o inse ase eganchwa." 
Exodus39:26 Ase igo omong’ororia bw’emegwekano ye rikomomanga bwateranirie ne chindege orenge ase omoringero o inse ase eganchwa eria ekobekwa ase obokoreri bw’obokuani. Naboigo buna Omonene konya achikire Musa. 
Exodus39:27 Bakaroiseria Haroni amo nabamura baye chiganchwa chi’egatani engiya," 
Exodus39:28 na egetinti amo nebigogwa emechoro bi’oboseera bi’egatani engiya, ne chisirwari chi’egatani engiya," 
Exodus39:29 na orokini rwe chiusi chi’egatani engiya chisisire, amo ne chiusi chi’amarionya chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri. Bionsi bigakoreka buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Bagatura ebao y’etahabu echenire, na buna omonto akomang’a ekemanyererio, bakamang’a amang’ana aya: “Achenirwe ase Omonene”." 
Exodus39:31 Bakayesiberania bosio bw’ekegogwa ne chiusi chiburu, buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Naboigo emeremo y’Obomenyo bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano egaikeranigwa n’Abaisraeli; bagakora onsi buna Omonene konya achikire Musa. 
Exodus39:33 Barabwo bakarentera Musa Obomenyo boria, na eema amo nebinto bionsi ebirabeo: ebigobanio, ne chibao, ne chisiiro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo," 
Exodus39:34 na egietubo ki’amasankwa e chimingichi, aakire etaago, na egietubo ki’amasankwa e ching’iti chia rooche, na etoto eria ekengete," 
Exodus39:35 na Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, amo nemiaro yaye, na Oboikaranso bw’Amabera," 
Exodus39:36 na emesa amo nebikorero biaye bionsi, na Emegati eyare koruegwa ase Nyasae," 
Exodus39:37 na ekebekerero gie chitaya gi’etahabu echenire, ne chitaya chiare kobekwa aroro amo nebikorero biaye bionsi, na amaguta e chitaya," 
Exodus39:38 na egesasimero gi’etahabu, na amaguta akweakwa, na ubani ekorua rimisu rigiya, na egetambaa ki’egesoero ki’Eema," 
Exodus39:39 na egesasimero gi’etaai amo negechungi gi’etaai, na emiaro yaye, na ebikorero biaye bionsi, na egetuba amo nenterekerero yaye," 
Exodus39:40 na ebitambaa bi’eraaro, ne chisiiro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo, na egetambaa ki’egesoero ki’eraaro, ne chingori, na ebirochi, na ebikorero bionsi bi’obokoreri ase Obomenyo ime, ase Eema y’Omosangererekano," 
Exodus39:41 ne chianga chiria chinseera chi’abakuani ase obokoreri bwabo ime y’Aase Aachenu, engencho yaye chianga chia Haroni amo nechi’abamura baye barabe bakobeka ekero bagokora emeremo y’obokuani." 
Exodus39:42 Abaisraeli konya bakorire emeremo yonsi boronge kegima buna Omonene konya achikire Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Musa akariga‐rigereria ebinto bionsi ebiakoretwe, akarora ng’a abanto babikorire boronge kegima buna Omonene konya achikire. Erio Musa akabasesenia." 
Exodus40:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Exodus40:2 “Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, otenenie Obomenyo, Eema eria y’Omosangererekano." 
Exodus40:3 Obeke Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori imeo, na oyekenge netoto." 
Exodus40:4 Osoyie emesa, na obeke ebinto biaye igoro yaye; osoyie na ekebekerero gie chitaya, na obeke chitaya igoro yaye." 
Exodus40:5 Erio obeke egesasimero gi’etahabu ase ubani erasamberwe bosio bw’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, na osunge egetambaa kere ase egesoero ki’Obomenyo." 
Exodus40:6 Obeke egesasimero ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe bosio bw’egesoero ki’Obomenyo, Eema eria y’Omosangererekano." 
Exodus40:7 Obeke egetuba egati y’Eema y’Omosangererekano na egesasimero, obeke na amache imeo." 
Exodus40:8 Otenenie orosenge rw’egetambaa roetanane eraaro, na osunge egetambaa ase egesoero ki’eraaro." 
Exodus40:9 “Oimokie amaguta akweakwa, oake Obomenyo na ebinto bionsi ebire imeo na obwatanane Obomenyo amo nebinto biaye bionsi, erinde bibe ebichenu." 
Exodus40:10 Naende oake amaguta ase egesasimero ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe, amo nebikorero biaye bionsi. Naboigo ogiatanane, kebe egechenu mono." 
Exodus40:11 Oake egetuba amaguta amo nenterekerero yaye, na kogiatanana." 
Exodus40:12 “Orente Haroni amo nabamura baye ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, obasibie namache." 
Exodus40:13 Erio obekere Haroni chianga chiria chinchenu, omoake amaguta na komwatanana, anyare gonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani," 
Exodus40:14 Orente na abamura baye, obabekere chianga chiabo," 
Exodus40:15 obaake amaguta buna oraake ise, na barabwo nababe abakuani baane. Ogoakwa kw’amaguta kwabo nkobanyorere obokuani boragenderere botambe ase ororeria rwabo, ebiaare ase ebiaare.”" 
Exodus40:16 Musa agakora onsi buna Omonene konya amochikire. 
Exodus40:17 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, omwaka o kabere nyuma kobarure Misiri, Obomenyo boria bogatenenigwa." 
Exodus40:18 Musa agatenenia Obomenyo boria, akabeka chinterekerero aase abo, agatenenia ne chibao chiaye, agasoyia emeriibo, na gotenenia chisiiro." 
Exodus40:19 Akaara eema igoro y’Obomenyo boria, na kobeka egietubo kiaye buna Omonene konya amochikire." 
Exodus40:20 Akaimokia chibao chirikire oborori, agachibeka ase Esanduku ime, agasoyia emiaro ase chibonyi, akamumeka Esanduku eria n’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera." 
Exodus40:21 Akabeka Esanduku eria ime y’Obomenyo, agasunga etoto eria y’egetambaa ase ogokenga Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, buna Omonene konya amochikire." 
Exodus40:22 Akabeka emesa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano ime, isiko y’etoto, ensemo ya sugusu," 
Exodus40:23 na akaroberia emegati igoro yaye ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna ere konya amochikire." 
Exodus40:24 Akabeka ekebekerero gie chitaya ase Obomenyo ime, ensemo ya irianyi, kororia ase emesa." 
Exodus40:25 Naende akabeka chitaya igoro y’ekebekerero ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna ere konya amochikire." 
Exodus40:26 Akabeka na egesasimero gi’etahabu ase Eema y’Omosangererekano ime, bosio bw’etoto," 
Exodus40:27 na igoro yaye agasambera ubani ekorua rimisu rigiya, buna Omonene konya amochikire." 
Exodus40:28 Agasunga egetambaa ki’egesoero ki’Obomenyo. 
Exodus40:29 Na egesasimero ase ebing’wanso birasamberwe akabeka ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Igoro yaye akarua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, buna Omonene konya amochikire." 
Exodus40:30 Akabeka egetuba ase egati y’Eema y’Omosangererekano na egesasimero, akabeka amache ogwesibia imeo." 
Exodus40:31 Musa na Haroni bakaba bagoisaba amaboko na gosibia amagoro ase amache ayio. 
Exodus40:32 Ekero baare gosoa Eema y’Omosangererekano, gose goika ang’e ase egesasimero, baba bagwesibia, buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Agatenenia orosenge rw’eraaro roetanane Obomenyo na egesasimero, na agasunga ebitambaa bi’egesoero ki’eraaro. Naboigo Musa agakoora emeremo eyio yonsi." 
Exodus40:34 Erio riire rigatuba Eema y’Omosangererekano, na obonene bw’Omonene bogaichora ime ase Obomenyo." 
Exodus40:35 Musa tanyara gosoa Eema y’Omosangererekano, ekiagera riire riria riabete igoro yaye, na obonene bogaichora ime ase Obomenyo." 
Exodus40:36 Na ekero kende gionsi riire riare koimokerera igoro korwa ase Obomenyo obwo, Abaisraeli nigo baare koimoka kogenda orogendo rwabo. Naboigo baare gokora ase orogendo rwabo rwonsi." 
Exodus40:37 Korende onye riire tiriare koimokerera igoro, barabwo tibaare koimoka kogenda goika rituko riria riire riare koimokerera igoro naende." 
Exodus40:38 Naki riire ri’Omonene nigo riare kobeera ase Obomenyo ekero kia mobaso, na ekero kia botuko omorero oba ase riire ime; na agwo Abaisraeli bonsi baba bakorirora aande onsi ase barenge ase orogendo rwabo." 
Leviticus1:1 Omonene akarangeria Musa, agakwana nere korwa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, akamotebia," 
Leviticus1:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a ekero omonto onde bwensi korwa ase egati yabo akondetera inche Omonene eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso, ayerusie korwa ase chiombe gose ching’ondi, gose chimbori." 
Leviticus1:3 Onye nigo akorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa korwa ase amaicho e chiombe, arue eeri etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ayerente agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, erinde inche mwanchere." 
Leviticus1:4 Omonto oria goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eng’iti eria ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, erinde yancherwe ase okobwatania omonto oria na Nyasae." 
Leviticus1:5 Erio omonto oria anyenyere eeri eria ensae agwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene, na abakuani, abamura ba Haroni, barente amanyinga bayasiarere chinsemo chionsi chi’egesasimero kere agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus1:6 Naende arusie riiyo ri’eng’iti eria ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso, ayenachane ebitari," 
Leviticus1:7 na abamura ba Haroni omokuani baute omorero ase egesasimero, bachoke chinko ase omorero oyio." 
Leviticus1:8 Naende abakuani, abamura ba Haroni, babeke ebitari biria, amo nomotwe na ebitinya, igoro ase chinko chiria chire ase omorero bw’egesasimero." 
Leviticus1:9 Korende chinyama chi’enda, amo nebirenge, bisibigwe namache. Omokuani oria otenenerete asambe eng’iti eria yonsi ase egesasimero, ebe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera inche Omonene." 
Leviticus1:10 “Onye omonto okorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa korwa ase amaicho e ching’ondi, gose chimbori, nigo ararente emingichi, gose egoree, etari na kemocho ase omobere oye." 
Leviticus1:11 Erio ayenyenyere ase ensemo ya sugusu y’egesasimero, agwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene, na abakuani, abamura ba Haroni, basiarere amanyinga aria ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus1:12 Naende anachane eng’iti eria ebitari, na omokuani oria otenenerete abichoke buya, amo nomotwe na ebitinya, igoro ase chinko chiria chire ase omorero bw’egesasimero," 
Leviticus1:13 korende chinyama chi’enda na ebirenge bisibigwe namache. Erio omokuani arue bionsi na kobisambera ase egesasimero. Ekio nekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera inche Omonene." 
Leviticus1:14 “Onye ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa akonduera inche Omonene gekorusigwa ase chinyoni, rirorio arente amaruma gose amage ’amaruma." 
Leviticus1:15 Omokuani arente enyoni eyio ase egesasimero, na amine omotwe oye, ayobutore. Erio ayosambe ase egesasimero. Anyititorere amanyinga ase egesasimero ensemo," 
Leviticus1:16 korende embochero yaye, amo neubi ere imeo, abitugute ensemo ya moocha y’egesasimero, ase ribu rigotugutwa." 
Leviticus1:17 Erio atandorane egekuba, korende tarusia chimbaba, ayesambere ase egesasimero, igoro ye chinko chiria chire ase omorero. Ekio nekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera inche Omonene." 
Leviticus2:1 “Ekero omonto akondetera inche Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera, arue obosie obonuke, anyororokerie amaguta ase obosie obwo, abeke na ubani." 
Leviticus2:2 Erio arente okoruegwa okwo ase abakuani, abamura ba Haroni. Omokuani otenenerete aimokie obosie boichire roe, amo namaguta, na ubani yonsi, abisambere ase egesasimero bibe ekemanyererio ng’a okoruegwa okwo nokwane inche Omonene. Okwo nokoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero kore ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera." 
Leviticus2:3 Ekeratigare korwa ase okoruegwa kw’endagera okwo nakobe okwa Haroni na abamura baye. Ekio negechenu mono, ekiagera kiarusigwe korwa ase okoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero asende." 
Leviticus2:4 “Ekero okorenta okoruegwa kw’endagera esambeire riko nebe emegati etabekiri memera eroisirie korwa ase obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta, gose emegati emeoo eakire amaguta." 
Leviticus2:5 “Onye okoruegwa kwao kw’endagera nemegati esambeire orogio, ebe eroisirie korwa ase obosie obonuke amo namaguta, korende ebe etabekiri memera." 
Leviticus2:6 Oyesamunyorane, erio oumore amaguta igoro ase ebisamunye biria. Okwo nokoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Leviticus2:7 “Onye okoruegwa kwao kw’endagera nemegati ekarangeire esuguria, ebe eroisirie korwa ase obosie obonuke amo namaguta." 
Leviticus2:8 Ondetere inche Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera eroisirie ase enchera eyemo y’echio, na ekero okoruegwa okwo kwairirwe ase omokuani nere akorente ase egesasimero." 
Leviticus2:9 Omokuani arusie ensemo y’okoruegwa okwo kw’endagera ebe ekemanyererio ng’a okoruegwa okwo nokwane inche Omonene, ayesambere ase egesasimero. Okwo nokoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero kore ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera." 
Leviticus2:10 Ekeratigare korwa ase okoruegwa okwo kw’endagera nakebe ekia Haroni na abamura baye. Ekio negechenu mono, ekiagera kiarusigwe korwa ase okoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero asende." 
Leviticus2:11 “Okoruegwa konde gwonsi kw’endagera bakonduera inche Omonene tigokoroiseranigwa nememera. Timobaisa gosamba ememera, gose obooke, bibe okoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero asende." 
Leviticus2:12 Monyare kondetera ebinto ebio buna ogotongora kw’endagera, korende timobaisa kobisambera ase egesasimero. Moise gokora igo, tigokoba ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera." 
Leviticus2:13 Goika obeke omonyo ase okoruegwa kwao gwonsi kw’endagera. Ase okoruegwa okwo tibweba kobeka omonyo bw’okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania. Omonyo tomocha kobekwa ase kera okoruegwa kwao. 
Leviticus2:14 “Aye gokorenta ogotongora kw’endagera asende inche Omonene, goika orente ebigara ebibese bisambire ase omorero, bisenyentire." 
Leviticus2:15 Oumore amaguta ase okoruegwa okwo, obeke na ubani; okwo nokoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Leviticus2:16 Omokuani asambe ebigara bike bie biria bisenyentire, amo namaguta; abisambe amo na ubani yonsi bibe ekemanyererio ng’a okoruegwa okwo nokwane inche Omonene. Okwo nokoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero asende." 
Leviticus3:1 “Omonto kararue ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe ase obosio bwane inche Omonene, nigo ararente eeri gose eng’ombe etari na kemocho ase omobere oye." 
Leviticus3:2 Omonto oyio goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eng’iti eyio ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso, erio ayenyenyere agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, na abakuani, abamura ba Haroni, basiarere amanyinga aria ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus3:3 Korwa ase eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ekio ki’omorembe arusie ebitinya bitubete chinyama chi’enda, na ebitinya binde bionsi bire ase enda ime, amo ne chinyigo chionsi ibere na ebitinya bichitubete; na ebitinya bie riini abirusie amo ne chinyigo. Ebinto ebio bionsi abirue bibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene." 
Leviticus3:4  
Leviticus3:5 Erio abamura ba Haroni babisambere ase egesasimero, igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kebekire ase chinko chiria chire ase omorero. Ekio nekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero kere ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera." 
Leviticus3:6 “Omonto kararue ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe asende inche Omonene korwa ase riicho rie ching’ondi, gose chimbori, arente eng’iti etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, etuoni gose eaberi." 
Leviticus3:7 Onye okorua eng’ondi ebe ekeng’wanso kiaye, erio ayerue ase obosio bwane." 
Leviticus3:8 Ere goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eng’ondi eyio akorua ebe ekeng’wanso, erio ayenyenyere agwo bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Abamura ba Haroni basiarere amanyinga aria ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus3:9 Korwa ase ekeng’wanso ekio ki’omorembe arue ebitinya, na omokera bwonsi ayobutore kegima korwa ase riuga ri’omogongo, na ebitinya bitubete chinyama chionsi chi’enda, na ebitinya binde bionsi bire ase enda ime, ne chinyigo chionsi ibere, amo nebitinya bichitubete; na ebitinya bie riini abirusie amo ne chinyigo. Ebinto ebio bionsi bibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene." 
Leviticus3:10  
Leviticus3:11 Omokuani otenenerete asambe ebinto ebio bionsi ase egesasimero bibe endagera ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene. 
Leviticus3:12 “Onye ekeng’wanso kiaye nembori, ayerue ase obosio bwane," 
Leviticus3:13 na omonto oyio goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’embori eyio, erio ayenyenyere agwo bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Abamura ba Haroni basiarere amanyinga aye ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus3:14 Erio korwa ase ekeng’wanso ekio arue ebitinya bionsi ebire ase enda ime, ne chinyigo chionsi ibere, na ebitinya bie riini abirusie amo ne chinyigo. Ebinto ebio bionsi abirue bibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene." 
Leviticus3:15  
Leviticus3:16 Omokuani abisambere ase egesasimero bibe endagera ekoruegwa egosambwa nomorero, ere ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera. Ebitinya bionsi nebiane." 
Leviticus3:17 Oyo nigo orabe omoroberio ochikire oragenderere botambe ebiaare ase ebiaare, aande onsi ase morabe mokomenya, ng’a timobaisa koria ebitinya, gose konywa amanyinga.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus4:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a monto onde bwensi orakore ebibe mosiabano atancheti, ase amang’ana ande onsi inche Omonene nakanete ng’a takorwa, goika abe okobwatia amachiko aya:" 
Leviticus4:3 “Onye omokuani oyoakire amaguta ogokora ebibe, na igo arentere abanto bonsi okomocha, goika arue eeri ensae etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ase engencho y’ebibe ebio akorire, ayerue asende ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe biaye." 
Leviticus4:4 Arente eeri eria ase obosio bwane agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Erio goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’eeri eria, na ayenyenyere agwo ase obosio bwane." 
Leviticus4:5 Omokuani oyoakire amaguta aimokie amanyinga make ay’eeri eria, ayarente ime ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus4:6 Naende atobeke ekiara kiaye ase amanyinga ayio, ayanyororokerie ara gatano na kabere bosio bw’etoto eyio enachete Obomenyo Obochenu, agwo ase obosio bwane." 
Leviticus4:7 Nyuma y’ayio omokuani oria agindie amanyinga make ase emegwekano ye chingunchara ere ase chikoona chi’egesasimero ase ubani egosamberwa, kere ime ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, ase obosio bwane, na amanyinga ’eeri eria agotigara ayaumore inse agwo ase egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kere ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus4:8 Erio arusie ebitinya bionsi bi’eeri eria y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na ebitinya bitubete chinyama chi’enda, na ebitinya binde bionsi bire ase enda ime," 
Leviticus4:9 amo ne chinyigo chionsi ibere, na ebitinya bichitubete bire ang’e nomogongo; na ebitinya bie riini abirusie amo ne chinyigo," 
Leviticus4:10 koreng’ana buna akobirusia korwa ase eng’ombe eria ekonyenywa ebe ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe. Erio abisambere ase egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso. 
Leviticus4:11 Korende riiyo ri’eeri eyio amo ne chinyama chionsi, na omotwe, na ebirenge, na enda, na esike," 
Leviticus4:12 ebinto ebio bionsi bi’eeri eyio abisokie isiko y’ebitwori, abiire gochia aase achenire, ase ribu rigotugutwa, abisambere ase omorero bwe chinko agwo igoro ase ribu." 
Leviticus4:13 “Onye omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli okorire ebibe mosiabano otancheti, na amang’ana ayio abe abisekanire asebare, kerabe bakorire kende gionsi eki inche Omonene nakanete ng’a tigekorwa, na igo babeire nokomocha," 
Leviticus4:14 agwo ekero ebibe biria birabe biamanyekanire, omosangererekano orue eeri ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe na koyerenta agwo bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus4:15 Agwo ase obosio bwane abagaaka b’omoganda oria goika babeke amaboko abo igoro ase omotwe bw’eeri eyio, na ero enyenyerwe agwo ase obosio bwane." 
Leviticus4:16 Omokuani oyio oakire amaguta, aire amanyinga make ay’eeri eyio ase Eema y’Omosangererekano ime." 
Leviticus4:17 Erio atobeke ekiara kiaye ime ase amanyinga na anyororokererie ara gatano na kabere ase obosio bwane agwo bosio bw’etoto eria y’egetambaa," 
Leviticus4:18 agindie amanyinga make ase emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero kere ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano, agwo ase obosio bwane, korende amanyinga onsi aya agotigara ayaumore agwo inse ase egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosamba kere ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus4:19 Naende ebitinya bionsi bi’eeri eyio abirusie na kobisambera ase egesasimero. 
Leviticus4:20 Naboigo arakore eeri eyio buna akorete eeri eria ye ritang’ani y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa asebare, na barabwo nabaaberwe." 
Leviticus4:21 Erio aire eeri eyio isiko y’egetwori, ayesambere aroro, buna asambete eeri eria ye ritang’ani. Ekio nekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase engencho y’omoganda bwonsi." 
Leviticus4:22 “Omogambi karakore ebibe mosiabano atancheti, na akore amang’ana ande onsi inche Omonene, Nyasae oye, nakanete ng’a takorwa, na igo obeire nokomocha," 
Leviticus4:23 agwo ekero ebibe biria akorete birabe biamanyekanire asare, arente egoree etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ebe ekeng’wanso kiaye." 
Leviticus4:24 Ere goika abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’egoree eyio, ayenyenyere agwo aase abanto bakonyenyera ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, ase obosio bwane inche Omonene. Ekio nekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Leviticus4:25 Omokuani atobeke ekiara kiaye ime ase amanyinga ayagindie ase emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, korende amanyinga onsi agotigara ayaumore agwo inse ase egesasimero ekio." 
Leviticus4:26 Ebitinya biaye bionsi abisambere ase egesasimero buna ebi’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe bigosambwa. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omogambi oria ase engencho y’ebibe biaye, na omogambi oria naaberwe." 
Leviticus4:27 “Onye omonto onde bwensi ogokora ebibe mosiabano atancheti, ase amang’ana ande onsi inche Omonene nakanete ng’a takorwa, na igo obeire nokomocha," 
Leviticus4:28 agwo ekero ebibe bi’omonto oria birabe biamanyekanire asare arente embori eaberi etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe biaye." 
Leviticus4:29 Erio abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’embori eria ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na ayenyenyere agwo ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa bikonyenyerwa." 
Leviticus4:30 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make, atobeke ekiara kiaye agindie emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero ki’ogosambera ebing’wanso; amanyinga aya agotigara ayaumore agwo inse, ase egesasimero ekio." 
Leviticus4:31 Erio arusie ebitinya bionsi bi’embori eyio buna ebitinya bi’eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe bikorusigwa, na omokuani asambere ebitinya ebio ase egesasimero bibe rimisu rigiya rikongwenera. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria, na omonto oria naaberwe." 
Leviticus4:32 “Omonto oria kararue emanwa y’eng’ondi ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, arente esigiti etari na kemocho ase omobere oye." 
Leviticus4:33 Ere abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase omotwe bw’emanwa eria, ayenyenyere agwo ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa bikonyenyerwa, ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Leviticus4:34 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make ay’emanwa eyio, atobeke ekiara kiaye agindie emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero ki’ogosambera ebing’wanso, korende amanyinga ayagotigara ayaumore agwo inse, ase egesasimero ekio." 
Leviticus4:35 Erio arusie ebitinya bionsi bi’eng’ondi eyio, buna ebitinya bi’emanwa y’eng’ondi y’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe bikorusigwa, na omokuani abisambere ase egesasimero, igoro ase ekeng’wanso kegosamberwa nomorero asende. Ase enchera eyio omokuani nakore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ase engencho y’ebibe biaye, na omonto oria naaberwe." 
Leviticus5:1 “Onye omonto okorangerigwa abe kirori na gotiana, anyare koorokia aya aroche, gose aigwete, ko tayaorokia, ere goika abarerwe obobe boria bw’ogotaorokia." 
Leviticus5:2 “Onye omonto ogokuna kende gionsi getachenegeti, korabe omobere okwete bw’eng’iti y’orosana etachenegeti, gose oyo bw’eng’iti etugire etachenegeti, gose oyo bw’akang’iti agake gatechenegeti, nonya amang’ana ayio abisekanete, ere nabe oyotachenegeti, abarerwe obobe bwaye." 
Leviticus5:3 “Omonto aise gokuna egento kende gionsi kia mwanyabanto getachenegeti, go korabe ogotacheneka gwa kende gionsi keramokore abe oyotachenegeti, nonya amang’ana ayio abisekanete asare, ekero arayamanye, nabe nokomocha." 
Leviticus5:4 “Omonto karabe omwango gotiana ase ogokora amabe gose amaya, ogotiana konde gwonsi abanto bakoba abaango gotiana batari korengereria, na ayio abe abisekanete ase omonto oyio, ekero arayamanye, nabe nokomocha ase amang’ana ayio." 
Leviticus5:5 “Ekero omonto arabe nokomocha ase amang’ana goika aorokie ebibe ebio akorire. 
Leviticus5:6 Naende andetere inche Omonene ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha kwaye ase engencho y’ebibe ebio akorire; arente eng’iti eaberi, eng’ondi gose embori, ebe ekeng’wanso ekio ki’ebibe, na omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria, na omonto oria naaberwe ebibe biaye." 
Leviticus5:7 “Korende onye omonto oria takonyara konyora eng’ondi, gose embori, rirorio andetere inche Omonene amaruma abere, gose amage ’amaruma abere, abe ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha kwaye ase engencho y’ebibe akorire. Erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na erinde ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa." 
Leviticus5:8 Arente amaruma ayio ase omokuani, nere arue ritang’ani riruma erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, amine ebigoti bie riruma erio, korende tabutora omotwe korwa ase ebigoti." 
Leviticus5:9 Erio anyororokerie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso ekio ki’ebibe ase egesasimero ensemo. Amanyinga agotigara ayanyititorere agwo inse ase egesasimero. Ekio nekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Leviticus5:10 Naende arue riruma ria kabere ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, koreng’ana buna achikire. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ase engencho y’ebibe ebi akorire, na omonto oria naaberwe." 
Leviticus5:11 “Korende onye omonto oria takonyara konyora amaruma abere, gose amage ’amaruma abere, rirorio arente obosie obonuke ebimunu bibere bobe okoruegwa kw’ebibe biaye. Tabeka amaguta, gose ubani, ase okoruegwa okwo, ekiagera nokoruegwa kw’ebibe." 
Leviticus5:12 Arente obosie obwo ase omokuani, na omokuani aimokie obosie obwo boichire rce bobe ekemanyererio ng’a okoruegwa okwo kwarurwe asende inche Omonene, erio abosambere ase egesasimero, igoro ase ebing’wanso bigosamberwa nomorero asende. Okwo nokoruegwa gw’okorusia ebibe." 
Leviticus5:13 Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ase engencho y’ebibe akorire ase ring’ana rinde rionsi ri’ayio, na omonto oria naaberwe. Oboratigare bobe obw’omokuani, buna obw’okoruegwa kw’endagera bokoba obwaye.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus5:15 “Monto onde bwensi karasarie na akore ebibe mosiabano atancheti ase ogotarua ebinto biatananirwe na gochenwa asende, goika andetere emingichi etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ayerusie korwa ase riicho riaye ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha kwaye. Naye oyekorere rigori rireng’aine eri’esekeli egokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Leviticus5:16 Omonto oria naakane egento keria egechenu ataruete, naende goika amente ensemo ya isano ye rigori ri’egento ekio, ayee omokuani. Erio omokuani arue emingichi eyio y’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha na akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria, na omonto oria naaberwe." 
Leviticus5:17 “Monto onde bwensi aise gokora gento ase amang’ana ayio inche Omonene nakanete ng’a takorwa, nonya tamanyeti ng’a ayio akorire nokomocha, ere omochire, goika abarerwe okomocha okwo." 
Leviticus5:18 Ase ayio arente korwa ase riicho riaye emingichi etari na kemocho ase omobere oye ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha. Naye oyekorere rigori. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ase engencho y’okomocha koria akorire mosiabano atancheti, na omonto oria naaberwe." 
Leviticus5:19 Ekio nekeng’wanso gi’okomocha. Omonto oria nigo arenge nokomocha ase obosio bw’Omonene.” 
Leviticus6:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus6:2 “Omonto aise gokora ebibe na gosaria asende inche Omonene ase okong’ainereria omogisangio oye ase okwanga koirania ebinto aetwe ase amaboko aye abirende, gose ase okomourereria, gose ase okomoibera ase okomorega," 
Leviticus6:3 gose onyorire egento giasirete, naende akane na gotiana ng’a takenyorete, bibe ebibe binde bionsi abanto bagokora," 
Leviticus6:4 ekero omonto akorire ebibe buna ebio na obeire nokomocha, nairanie egento keria airete ase obourereria, gose ase okorega, gose egento aetwe korenda, gose egento giasirete agakenyora," 
Leviticus6:5 gose egento kende gionsi keria atianete ase okong’ainereria; goika akeiranie gionsi, naende amente ensemo ya isano ase rigori riaye akee omonyene ase rituko riria akorua ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha." 
Leviticus6:6 Erio andetere inche Omonene emingichi etari na kemocho ase omobere oye; ayerusie korwa ase riicho riaye rie ching’ondi, ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha kwaye; naye oyekorere rigori, na omonto oria ayeirere omokuani." 
Leviticus6:7 Omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oyio ase obosio bwane, na omonto oyio naaberwe ase kende gionsi akorire na kwerentera okomocha.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus6:9 “Moe Haroni amo nabamura baye ogochika oko igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa; Ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kebeere igoro ase egesasimero obotuko bwonsi goika mambia, na omorero bw’egesasmiero orendwe ogenderere gwoka." 
Leviticus6:10 Omokuani abeke eganchwa yaye y’egatani, amo ne chisirwari chi’ogwetuba, erio abuuche ribu korwa ase omorero oria osamberete ekeng’wanso ase egesasimero, aribeke ase egesasimero ensemo." 
Leviticus6:11 Nyuma y’ayio arusie chianga chiaye, abeke chianga ching’ao, naende aimokie ribu, arisokie isiko y’egetwori, ariire gochia aase achenire." 
Leviticus6:12 Omorero ore ase egesasimero orendwe ogenderere gwoka, torima. Kera emambia omokuani amente chinko ase omorero oyio, naende achoke buya ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa igoro ase chinko echio na asambe ebitinya bi’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe." 
Leviticus6:13 Omorero oyio orendwe ogenderere gwoka botambe, tobaisa korima." 
Leviticus6:14 “Oko nakwo ogochika gw’okoruegwa kw’endagera: Abamura ba Haroni babe bakorua okoruegwa kw’endagera ase obosio bw’Omonene, agwo ase egesasimero." 
Leviticus6:15 Erio omokuani otenenerete aimokie obosie obonuke boichire roe korwa ase okoruegwa okwo kw’endagera, na amaguta, na ubani yonsi ere igoro yaye, abisambere ase egesasimero, bibe ekemanyererio ng’a okoruegwa okwo nokwane inche Omonene, kore ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera." 
Leviticus6:16 Haroni na abamura baye goika barie eyegotigara ase okoruegwa okwo etabekiri memera, bayeriere aase achenire, agwo ase eraaro y’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus6:17 Tebaisa koroiseranigwa nememera. Inche nabaeire endagera eyio ebe egetari kiabo gi’okoruegwa kwane kogosambwa nomorero. Ekio negechenu mono koreng’ana buna ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe na egi’okomocha bire. 
Leviticus6:18 Kera omonto omosacha ase ororeria rwa Haroni nanyare koria endagera eyio. Ekio nkebe egetari kiabo kia botambe gi’okoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene, ebiaare ase ebiaare. Monto onde bwensi orakune ebing’wanso ebio nigo arabe omochenu.”" 
Leviticus6:19 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus6:20 “Oko nakwo okoruegwa Haroni na abamura baye bararue asende inche Omonene ase rituko riria onde obo araakwe amaguta na gwatananwa: Ebimunu bibere bi’obosie obonuke, buna okoruegwa kw’endagera gwa kera rituko, ekemo mambia na ekende mogoroba." 
Leviticus6:21 Okoruegwa okwo gokarangwe namaguta ase orogio, gosamunyorwe, erio kobe okoruegwa kw’endagera kore ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera." 
Leviticus6:22 Omokuani, omomura o Haroni, oyo oakire amaguta na gwatananwa ase okomobwatia, nere orarue okoruegwa okwo asende. Okwo nogochika koragenderere botambe. Okoruegwa okwo nagosambwe gwonsi asende inche Omonene." 
Leviticus6:23 Kera okoruegwa kw’endagera omokuani akorua goika gosambwe gwonsi, tikobaisa koriegwa.”" 
Leviticus6:24 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus6:25 “Moe Haroni amo nabamura baye ogochika oko igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe: Agwo ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gekonyenyerwa nao agwo eki’ebibe keranyenyerwe, ase obosio bwane inche Omonene. Ekeng’wanso ekio negechenu mono." 
Leviticus6:26 Omokuani oyio okorua ekeng’wanso ekio nakeriere aase achenire, agwo ase eraaro y’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus6:27 Onde bwensi orakune enyama y’ekeng’wanso ekio nabe omochenu; naboigo na kende gionsi kerayekune, na amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso ekio aise gotonyera eanga, eyio esiberigwe agwo aase achenire." 
Leviticus6:28 Enyongo chinyama echio chiraiyekerwe goika yaatwe, korende onye chikoiyekerwa ase esuguria, rirorio ero esisikigwe na gosibigwa namache." 
Leviticus6:29 Kera omonto omosacha ore ase chinka chi’abakuani arie chinyama echio echire chinchenu mono. 
Leviticus6:30 Korende ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, ekio amanyinga aye ararentwe ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano ase ogokora okobwatanigwa ime y’Aase Aachenu tigekoriegwa, nigo kerasambwe nomorero." 
Leviticus7:1 “Oko nakwo ogochika gw’okorua ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha. Ekio nekeng’wanso egechenu mono. 
Leviticus7:2 Aase agwo eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ekonyenyerwa nao eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha eranyenyerwe. Amanyinga aye asiarerwe ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi. 
Leviticus7:3 Ebitinya biaye bionsi birusigwe na koruegwa; omokera na ebitinya bitubetechinyama chi’enda," 
Leviticus7:4 ne chinyigo chionsi ibere amo nebitinya bichitubete bire ang’e nomogongo, na ebitinya bie riini birusigwe amo ne chinyigo." 
Leviticus7:5 Omokuani abisambere ase egesasimero, bibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero ase Omonene. Ekio nekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha." 
Leviticus7:6 Kera omonto omosacha bw’enka y’omokuani nakeriere agwo aase achenire. Ekio negechenu mono. 
Leviticus7:7 “Ogochika gw’okorua ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha nigo kore okomo nogw’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Omokuani oria ogokora okobwatanigwa nakerokio aire chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso eke chibe echiaye. 
Leviticus7:8 Omokuani okorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosamwa ase engencho y’omonto onde, aire risankwa ri’ekeng’wanso keria ribe eriaye." 
Leviticus7:9 Kera okoruegwa kw’endagera okoroiseirie riko, na kende gionsi ekeroiseirie ase orogio, gose ase egetega, okwo nakobe okw’omokuani oria okoruete asende inche Omonene." 
Leviticus7:10 Kera okoruegwa kw’endagera gwochoganirie namaguta, gose ogotari namaguta, abamura ba Haroni baegwe, baatananerwe bareng’anerigwe." 
Leviticus7:11 “Oko nakwo ogochika gw’okorua ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe, ekio omonto ararente ase Omonene." 
Leviticus7:12 Onye omonto okorua ekeng’wanso ekio ase ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, rirorio amo nekeng’wanso ekio arue okoruegwa kw’amaandasi atabekiri memera aroisirie namaguta, na emegati emeoo etabekiri memera eakire amaguta, na emegati y’obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta." 
Leviticus7:13 Amo nekeng’wanso kiaye ki’omorembe ki’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, arente emegati ebekire ememera." 
Leviticus7:14 Korwa ase okoruegwa okwo arue omogati oyomo bwa kera egesaku, ebe ekeegwa ase Omonene. Eyio ebe ey’omokuani oyio ogosiarera amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso keria ase egesasimero." 
Leviticus7:15 Chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’omorembe ki ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono chiriegwe ase rituko riria gekoruegwa; tichibaisa gotigara nonya ne chinsinini goika rituko ria kabere. 
Leviticus7:16 “Korende onye omonto okorua ekeng’wanso ase engencho y’eira ariete, gose neki’ogwancha kwaye, nakeriegwe ase rituko riria gekoruegwa, na ekegotigara keriegwe ase rituko ria kabere." 
Leviticus7:17 Chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso ekio chigotigara ase rituko ria gatato goika chisambwe nomorero chiyie chiere. 
Leviticus7:18 Onye enyama ende yonsi y’ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’omorembe ekoriegwa ase rituko ria gatato, ekeng’wanso ekio tikegwancherwa, gose oyo okeruete takobarerwa ekeng’wanso ekio. Ekio nakebe okogechia, na onde bwensi orarie enyama y’ekeng’wanso ekio nabarerwe obobe bwaye." 
Leviticus7:19 Enyama eyio kerakune gento kende gionsi getachenegeti esambwe nomorero, eyie eere. “Onye enyama echenegete, kera omonto ochenekire nare ne ribaga ri’okoyeria," 
Leviticus7:20 korende oyotachenegeti takoria enyama y’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe gekoruegwa ase Omonene. Aise gokora igo, nigo araatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus7:21 “Naende omonto karakune egento getachenegeti, gokerabe egetachenegeti kere ase omonto, gose ase eng’iti, gose okogechia konde gwonsi, na arie enyama y’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe gekoruegwa ase Omonene, omonto oyio nigo araatananwe korwa ase abanto baye.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus7:23 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a tibabaisa koria ebitinya binde bionsi, ebi’eng’ombe, gose ebi’eng’ondi, gose ebi’embori." 
Leviticus7:24 Ebitinya bi’eng’iti egokwa yoka enyene, na ebi’eng’iti egoitwa neyende, ebio nabikorerwe emeremo emeao, korende tibikoriegwa nonya ng’ake." 
Leviticus7:25 Monto onde bwensi orarie ebitinya bi’eng’iti yarurwe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene, oyio nigo eraatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus7:26 Naende timoria amanyinga e chinyoni, gose aye ching’iti aande onsi ase moramenye." 
Leviticus7:27 Monto onde bwensi orarie amanyinga ande onsi, oyio nigo araatananwe korwa ase abanto baye.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Leviticus7:29 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a omonto onde bwensi orarue ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe, arue korwa ase ekeng’wanso ekio gentungetie inche Omonene." 
Leviticus7:30 Arente namaboko aye omonyene ekeng’wanso kiaye kegosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene; arente ebitinya amo ne ritaana, ne ritaana erio risungusigwe ribe ekeng’wanso kegosungusigwa ase obosio bwane inche Omonene." 
Leviticus7:31 Omokuani asambere ebitinya ase egesasimero, korende ritaana ribe eria Haroni na abamura baye." 
Leviticus7:32 Ekenama kia borio okee omokuani buna ekeegwa korwa ase ebing’wanso biaino bi’omorembe. 
Leviticus7:33 Omokuani, omomura o Haroni, oyio orabe okorua amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso ekio ki’omorembe amo nebitinya, nere oraire ekenama keria kia borio kebe egetari kiaye." 
Leviticus7:34 Korwa ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe gekoruegwa n’Abaisraeli narusirie ritaana rigosungusigwa amo nekenama kia borio, nabieire Haroni omokuani na abamura baye. Ebio nabio Abaisraeli barabe bakoa abakuani, bibe ebitari biabo botambe." 
Leviticus7:35 “Ekio negetari kemotungetie Haroni na abamura baye korwa ase ebing’wanso bigosambwa nomorero asende; nigo kiabete ekiabo korwa rituko riria baatananetwe bakaba abakuani bagonkorera inche Omonene. 
Leviticus7:36 Rituko riria baagetwe amaguta inche ngachika ng’a egetari ekio korwa ase Abaisraeli kebe ekiabo kogenderera botambe, ebiaare ase ebiaare.”" 
Leviticus7:37 Oko nakwo ogochika igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na egi’okorongeyia okomocha, na eki’ogosungusigwa, na eki’omorembe." 
Leviticus7:38 Ogochika okwo nakwo Omonene aete Musa ase egetunwa gia Sinai, agwo ase erooro ya Sinai, ase rituko riria achigete Abaisraeli bamoruere Omonene ebing’wanso biabo." 
Leviticus8:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus8:2 “Ira Haroni na abamura baye amo ne chianga chiabo chi’obokuani, na amaguta akweakwa, na eeri ekoruegwa ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, ne chimingichi ibere, na egetonga kere nemegati etabekiri memera." 
Leviticus8:3 Naende orangerie omoganda bwonsi osangererekane ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano.” 
Leviticus8:4 Musa agakora buna Omonene amochigete, na ekero omoganda bwonsi osangererekanete ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano," 
Leviticus8:5 Musa akayotebia. “Aya naro Omonene achikire akorwe.” 
Leviticus8:6 Musa akarenta Haroni na abamura baye, akabasibia namache." 
Leviticus8:7 Akabekera Haroni eganchwa erobekanire eigete inse, na eganchwa eria ende, akamoboeria norokini. Naende akamobekera egesibao ki’obokuani, akamoboeria norokini rw’egesibao roroisirie nomonto omong’aini." 
Leviticus8:8 Erio akamobekera egesembe, na ime ase egesembe ekio akabeka Urimu na Tumimu (omobaso na oboikeranu)." 
Leviticus8:9 Akamobekera ekegogwa ase omotwe oye, na bosio ase ekegogwa ekio agasiberania ekemanyererio egechenu gi’etahabu kiarenge kworokia ng’a bwatananirwe. Ase igo Musa agakora buna Omonene amochigete." 
Leviticus8:10 Musa akaimokia amaguta akweakwa, agaaka Obomenyo Obochenu, na kera egento kiarenge imeo, akabiatanana bikaba ebichenu." 
Leviticus8:11 Akanyororokeria egesasimero namaguta akweakwa ara gatano na kabere, naende agaaka egesasimero amaguta aria, agaaka nebikorero bionsi, na egetuba amo nenterekerero yaye ase okobiatanana bibe ebichenu." 
Leviticus8:12 Akaumora amaguta akweakwa igoro ase omotwe o Haroni, na akamoaka amaguta ase okomwatanana na komochena." 
Leviticus8:13 Naende Musa akarenta abamura ba Haroni, akababekera chiganchwa, akababoeria chinkini na akababekera ebigogwa ebike ase emetwe yabo, buna Omonene amochigete." 
Leviticus8:14 Musa akarenta eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, erio Haroni amo nabamura baye bakabeka amaboko abo igoro ase omotwe bw’eeri eyio." 
Leviticus8:15 Eeri eyio ekanyenywa, erio Musa agatobeka ekiara kiaye ase amanyinga ’eeri eyio, akayagindia ase emegwekano yonsi ye chingunchara ere ase chikoona chi’egesasimero, na agachena egesasimero; na amanyinga aria atigarete akayaumora ase egesasimero inse, akagiatanana na kogechena, na igo akagekorera okobwatanigwa." 
Leviticus8:16 Akaimokia ebitinya bionsi biarenge ase chinyama chi’enda, na ebitinya bie riini, ne chinyigo chionsi ibere amo nebitinya bichitubete, Erio Musa akabisambera ase egesasimero." 
Leviticus8:17 Korende ebiatigarete korwa ase eeri eria, riiyo riaye, ne chinyama, na esike, akabisokia isiko y’egetwori akabisambera aroro, buna Omonene amochigete." 
Leviticus8:18 Erio akarenta emingichi ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na Haroni amo nabamura baye bakabeka amaboko abo ase omotwe bw’emingichi eyio." 
Leviticus8:19 Emingichi eyio ekanyenywa, na Musa agasiara amanyinga ’emingichi eyio ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus8:20 Akanachana chinyama chi’emingichi eyio chikaba ebitari, agasibia chinyama chi’enda na ebirenge namache. Erio agasamba omotwe, na ebitari biria, na ebitinya, ne chinyama chionsi chi’emingichi eyio ase egesasimero. Emingichi eyio ekaba ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera Omonene. Naboigo Omonene achigete Musa." 
Leviticus8:21  
Leviticus8:22 Musa akarenta emingichi ya kabere, eyio yaruetwe ase ogwatanana abakuani ase emeremo emechenu, Haroni na abamura baye bakabeka amaboko abo igoro ase omotwe bw’emingichi eyio." 
Leviticus8:23 Emingichi eyio ekanyenywa, na Musa akaimokia amanyinga make, akagindia mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kwa Haroni, na ekiara ekenene gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio, na ekiara ekenene gi’okogoro kwaye kwa borio." 
Leviticus8:24 Boigo abamura ba Haroni bakarentwa na Musa akagindia amanyinga mesia y’amato abo a borio, na ebiara ebinene bi’amaboko abo a borio, na ebiara ebinene bi’amagoro abo a borio. Erio amanyinga aria atigarete akayasiarera ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus8:25 Akaimokia ebitinya, na omokera, na ebitinya bionsi bie chinyama chi’enda, na ebitinya bie riini, ne chinyigo ibere, amo nebitinya bichitubete, na ekenama kia borio." 
Leviticus8:26 Naende korwa ase egetonga keria kiarenge agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene akarusia omogati oyomo otabekiri memera, ne rindasi erimo, na omogati oyomo omoo, erio akabibeka igoro ase ebitinya ebio na ekenama ekio kia borio." 
Leviticus8:27 Akabeka ebinto ebio bionsi ase amaboko a Haroni, na ay’abamura baye, akabisungusia bibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Leviticus8:28 Naende Musa akabirusia korwa ase amaboko abo, akabisambera ase egesasimero amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, bibe ekeng’wanso gi’okobaatanana. Eke nekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero ase Omonene, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera." 
Leviticus8:29 Erio Musa akaimokia ritaana, akarisungusia ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa ase Omonene. Nigo riabete egetari kiaye kiarusetiwge korwa ase emingichi eria yaruetwe ase ogwatanana abakuani. Ase igo Musa agakora buna Omonene amochigete." 
Leviticus8:30 Musa akaimokia amaguta akweakwa amo namanyinga arenge igoro ase egesasimero, akanyororokeria Haroni amo ne chianga chiaye, akanyororokeria na abamura ba Haroni amo ne chianga chiabo. Naboigo agaatanana Haroni na abamura baye amo ne chianga chiabo ase emeremo emechenu." 
Leviticus8:31 Erio Musa agatebia Haroni na abamura baye, “Iyekera enyama eyio agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, na moyeriere aroro, moyerie amo nemegati eria ere ime ase egetonga gi’okoruegwa ase ogwatananwa kw’abakuani! Naboigo inche nachigete, ngateba: Haroni amo nabamura baye mbayerie." 
Leviticus8:32 Korende enyama amo nemegati biratigare mobisambe nomorero. 
Leviticus8:33 Inwe timobaisa gosoka isiko goetania egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, korende mobeereo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, goika amatuko ’ogwatanana kwaino aere." 
Leviticus8:34 Buna akorirwe ase rituko ria rero, naboigo Omonene achikire akorwe kogenderera ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asemore, erinde mwaberwe." 
Leviticus8:35 Inwe nigo morabeere agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, omobaso na obotuko, ase amatuko atano na abere, mobe mogokora aya Omonene achikire. Motakoreti ayio, inwe nigo morakwe.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Ase igo Haroni na abamura baye bagakora onsi aya Omonene achigete goetera ase Musa. 
Leviticus9:1 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato Musa akarangeria Haroni amo nabamura baye, na abagaaka b’Abaisraeli." 
Leviticus9:2 Naende agatebia Haroni, “Chora eeri ensae na emingichi, chionsi ibere chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, ochirue ase Omonene. Eeri eria ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na emingichi ebe eki’ogosambwa." 
Leviticus9:3 Naende otebie Abaisraeli ng’a bachore egoree ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na emori amo nemanwa y’eng’ondi echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Leviticus9:4 na eng’ombe amo nemingichi chibe ebing’wanso bi’omorembe ase obosio bw’Omonene. Naboigo barue okoruegwa kw’endagera gwochoganirie namaguta, ekiagera ase rituko ria rero Omonene nabaorokere.”" 
Leviticus9:5 Abanto bakarenta ebinto ebio bionsi Musa abachigete, bakabibeka bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano, na omoganda bwonsi ogaika ang’e, ogatenena agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Leviticus9:6 Erio Musa agateba, “Eke nakio Omonene abachigete mokore, erio obonene bw’Omonene mbobaorokere.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Erio Musa agatebia Haroni, “Suka gochia ang’e ase egesasimero, na orue ekeng’wanso kiao ki’ebibe na eki’ogosambwa, okore okobwatanigwa asore aye omonyene, na ase abanto, erinde mwaberwe. Naende orue ekeng’wanso ekio abanto barentire, na okore okobwatanigwa asebare, buna Omonene achigete.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Ase ayio Haroni agasuka gochia ang’e ase egesasimero, akanyenya emori eria ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe biaye omonyene," 
Leviticus9:9 na abamura baye bakamorentera amanyinga ekeng’wanso ekio, ere agatobeka ekiara kiaye ase amanyinga aria, erio akayagindia ase emegwekano ye chingunchara ere ase chikoona chi’egesasimero, na amanyinga atigarete akayaumora ase egesasimero inse." 
Leviticus9:10 Ebitinya ne chinyigo, na ebitinya bie riini, ebiarusetie ase ekeng’wanso keria ki’ebibe, akabisambera ase egesasimero, buna Omonene achigete Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Korende chinyama ne riiyo akabisamba nomorero isiko y’egetwori. 
Leviticus9:12 Nyuma y’ayio akanyenya eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na abamura baye bakamorentera amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso ekio, nere akayasiarera ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus9:13 Abamura baye bakamorentera ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, egetari ase egetari, amo nomotwe, na ere akabisambera ase egesasimero." 
Leviticus9:14 Agasibia chinyama chi’enda amo nebirenge, erio akabisambera amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase egesasimero." 
Leviticus9:15 Erio Haroni akarenta ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe bi’abanto. Akaimokia embori y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe bi’abanto, akayenyenya, akayerua buna aruete eria ye ritang’ani ase engencho y’ebibe biaye omonyene." 
Leviticus9:16 Naende akarenta eng’iti y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, akayerua buna konya achikirwe." 
Leviticus9:17 Akarenta okoruegwa kw’endagera, akaimokia obosie boichire roe, akabosambera ase egesasimero amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kia mambia." 
Leviticus9:18 Akanyenya boigo eeri amo nemingichi, chikaba ebing’wanso bi’omorembe ase engencho y’abanto. Abamura baye bakamorentera amanyinga ’ebing’wanso ebio, nere akayasiarera ase egesasimero chinsemo chionsi." 
Leviticus9:19 Ebitinya bi’eeri eyio, na omokera bw’emingichi na ebitinya bitubete chinyama chi’enda, ne chinyigo, na ebitinya bie riini," 
Leviticus9:20 ebitinya ebio bionsi bakabibeka igoro ase amataana, na Haroni akabisambera ase egesasimero," 
Leviticus9:21 korende amataana na ebinema bia borio akabisungusia bibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa ase Omonene, buna Musa achigete." 
Leviticus9:22 Haroni gakoorire korua ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na eki’ogosambwa, na eki’omorembe, akaimokia amaboko aye igoro ase abanto, akabasesenia, naende agaika gocha inse." 
Leviticus9:23 Erio Musa na Haroni bagasoa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano ime, naende ekero basokire korwa aroro, bagasesenia abanto, na obonene bw’Omonene bokaorokera abanto bonsi." 
Leviticus9:24 Omorero ogaika korwa ase Omonene mobosokano, ogasamba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa amo nebitinya biarenge ase egesasimero, na ebinto ebio bikayia bikaera. Ekero abanto bonsi baroche amang’ana ayio bagaaka amariogi, bagatung’ama inse, bakaumama." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadabu na Abihu, abamura ba Haroni, kera oyomo akaimokia orogio rwaye, akabeka omorero ase orogio orwo, na akabeka ubani igoro ase omorero oyio, bakarentera Omonene omorero orenge bw’engencho eng’ao, oyio Omonene atabachigete." 
Leviticus10:2 Na omorero ogaika korwa ase Omonene, okabasamba, barabwo bakayia, bagakwera agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Leviticus10:3 Erio Musa agatebia Haroni, “Aya naro Omonene atebire, ng’a ere neorokie koba omochenu ase abanto abwo bakomoika ang’e, na ase amaiso ’abanto bonsi naorokie obonene bwaye.” Haroni agakira‐kiri." 
Leviticus10:4 Erio Musa akarangeria Mishaeli na Elisafani, basinto ba Usieli, ise moke Haroni, akabatebia, “Inchuo mobogorie emebere y’abamino, abana ba iso moke, moyerusie korwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu, moyeire isiko y’egetwori.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Barabwo bagacha, bakabogoria emebere eria eboyirie chiganchwa chiabo, bakayeira isiko y’egetwori, buna Musa abatebetie." 
Leviticus10:6 Musa agatebia Haroni amo n’Eleazari na Itamari, abamura ba Haroni, “Timobaisa gotiga chitukia chiaino chitachanoiri, gose timobaisa gotandora chianga chiaino ase okobaichanera. Moise gokora igo, goika mokwe, na endamwamu entindi y’Omonene echiche igoro y’omoganda bwonsi. Korende Abaisraeli bamino bonsi barabwo mbabe bakorera ase engencho y’ogosamba ogotindi Omonene arentire." 
Leviticus10:7 Timobaisa gosoka isiko goetania egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Moise gokora igo, goika mokwe, ekiagera mwatananirwe ase ogoakwa amaguta ’Omonene.” Barabwo bagakora buna Musa abatebetie." 
Leviticus10:8 Omonene agakwana na Haroni, akamotebia," 
Leviticus10:9 “Aye amo nabamura bao timobaisa konywa edivai, gose ekenyugwa kegotindia, ekero mogosoa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano. Moise gokora igo, goika mokwe. Okwo nogochika koragenderere asemore ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Leviticus10:10 Inwe goika momanye gwatanana egento egechenu kere ekia Nyasae korwa ase ekio getaatananiri koba egechenu, na egento gechenegete korwa ase egetachenegeti." 
Leviticus10:11 Mworokererie Abaisraeli amachiko onsi aya inche Omonene nabachikire goetera ase Musa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Musa agatebia Haroni na abamura baye abatigarete, Eleazari na Itamari, “Imokia okoruegwa kw’endagera, okwo gotigarete korwa ase okwo gwasambirwe nomorero ase Omonene, mokorie gotabekiri memera, agwo ase egesasimero ensemo, ekiagera okoruegwa okwo nogochenu mono." 
Leviticus10:13 Mokoriere agwo aase gete are aachenu. Ekio negetari kiao, na eki’abamura bao, gekorusigwa korwa ase okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero ase Omonene. Ayio naro Omonene anchigete." 
Leviticus10:14 Korende ritaana rigosungusigwa, na ekenama gekoruegwa, aye amo nabana bao, abamura na abaiseke, mwaeirwe ribaga kobiriera agwo aase achenire. Ebinto ebio aye na abana bao mwabieirwe korwa ase ebing’wanso bi’omorembe bikoruegwa n’Abaisraeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Ekenama gekoruegwa, ne ritaana riria rigosungusigwa, birentwe amo nebitinya bikoruegwa ebing’wanso bigosambwa nomorero, bisungusigwe bibe ebing’wanso bi’ogosungusigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene. Ebio nabibe egetari kiao amo neki’abamura bao kogenderera botambe, buna Omonene achigete.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Musa agatuka mono komanyanaki embori y’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe yabete, akamanya ng’a embori eria nigo yasambetwe. Ase ayio akaba nendamwamu enene ase Eleasari na Itamari, abamura ba Haroni, baria batigarete, akabatebia." 
Leviticus10:17 “Nase ki motarierete ekeng’wanso keria ki’ebibe agwo aase are aachenu? Ekio negento egechenu mono mwaeirwe, erinde moruserie omoganda ebibe biabo, na gokora okobwatanigwa asebare ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Leviticus10:18 Rora, amanyinga aye tairetwe agwo Aase Aachenu; nigo yabagwenerete mokeriere agwo aase achenire.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Haroni akairaneria Musa, “Rora, rituko ria rero abanto barure ekeng’wanso kiabo ki’ebibe, na eki’ogosambwa, ase obosio bw’Omonene, korende nonya naboigo nomanyete emechando eye nanyorire. Onye inaria ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe rituko ria rero, Inee, nanga nancherwa ase obosio bw’Omonene?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Ekero Musa aigwete amang’ana ayio agaisaneka. 
Leviticus11:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Leviticus11:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, mobatebie: Ase ching’iti chire ase ense, echi nachio morarie chinyama chiabo:" 
Leviticus11:3 Eng’iti ende yonsi ebwate ebitaago biatananegete kegima, naende ekoria eng’ang’ura, nero morarie." 
Leviticus11:4 Korende ase ching’iti chikoria eng’ang’ura gose chibwate ebitaago biatananegete timoria engamia, ekiagera nigo ekoria eng’angu’ra, korende tebwati ebitaago biatananegete; ase ayio techenegeti." 
Leviticus11:5 Timoria egesengi, ekiagera nigo gekoria eng’ang’ura, korende tikebwati ebitaago biatananegete; ase ayio tigechenegeti." 
Leviticus11:6 Timoria egesusu, ekiagera nigo gekoria eng’ang’ura, korende tikebwati ebitaago biatananegete; ase ayio tigechenegeti." 
Leviticus11:7 Naende timoria embeche, ekiagera nigo ebwate ebitaago biatananegete kegima, korende teri koria eng’ang’ura; eyio techenegeti." 
Leviticus11:8 Timoria chinyama chie ching’iti echio, gose timokuna emebere yabo ekwete, ekiagera echio tichichenegeti.”" 
Leviticus11:9 “Monyare koria chinswe chire ase chinyancha ne chindooche ime, echibwate chingondo chinga buna chimbaba, na amagoocho." 
Leviticus11:10 Korende ebitongwa binde bionsi bire moyo ime ase chinyancha, gose ase chindooche, bigotaara bire amaicho bitabwati chingondo chinga buna chimbaba, na amagoocho, timobiria; ebio nokogechia asemore." 
Leviticus11:11 Ebio nabigenderere koba okogechia asemore, chinyama chiabo timochiria, na echikwete ase echio timochiria, ekiagera echio nokogechia asemore." 
Leviticus11:12 Kera egento kere ime ase chinyancha ne chindooche getabwati chingondo chinga buna chimbaba, na amagoocho, ekio nokogechia asemore.”" 
Leviticus11:13 “Nase chinyoni chirabe okogechia asemore motarie nachio echi: Ekeongo, na ensoti, na obotere;" 
Leviticus11:14 amakoru na ebisaku biamwabo; 
Leviticus11:15 ebigonkoru na ebisaku biamwabo bionsi; 
Leviticus11:16 esagero, na omoyaye, na enyakoboko, na ebisaku biamwabo;" 
Leviticus11:17 enyakweumia, na endubi, na ebarara;" 
Leviticus11:18 etibibi, na etekere, na ensoti;" 
Leviticus11:19 riagonga, na omoneke, na ebisaku biamwabo; enteema bobe na egetabora mato.”" 
Leviticus11:20 “Ebitongwa ebisinini bionsi bire moyo bire ne chimbaba na amagoro ane, ebio mbibe okogechia asemore." 
Leviticus11:21 Korende ebitongwa ebio ebisinini bibwate chimbaba na amagoro ane inamorie ebio bigotaroka nebirenge. 
Leviticus11:22 Ebisaku bionsi bie chingige, na ebi’amabururu, na ebisase, ebio nabio morarie." 
Leviticus11:23 Korende ebinde bionsi ase ebitongwa ebio ebisinini bibwate chimbaba na amagoro ane, ebio mbibe okogechia asemore.”" 
Leviticus11:24 “Ase ebitongwa ebio nigo moresoyie ase ogotacheneka. Monto onde bwensi orakune ebikwete ase ebio nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio," 
Leviticus11:25 na onde bwensi oraimokie egekwete korwa ase ebio nigo arasibie chianga chiaye, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus11:26 Kera eng’iti ebwate ebitaago, korende tibiatananegeti kegima, naende teri koria eng’ang’ura, eyio nebe eyetachenegeti asemore. Monto onde bwensi orakune ching’iti echio nabe oyotachenegeti." 
Leviticus11:27 Ching’iti chiria chikogendera ebisonsogoro ase echio chibwate amagoro ane tichichenegeti asemore. Monto onde bwensi orakune echikwete ase echio nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio. 
Leviticus11:28 Na monto onde bwensi oraimokie eyekwete ase echio nasibie chianga chiaye, nere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio. Ching’iti echio nachibe chitachenegeti asemore.”" 
Leviticus11:29 “Ase ching’iti chinke chigoetanana ase ense, echio nchibe chitachenegeti asemore; Ekenyamunyonge, na embeba, na ekiigo ekenene, amo nebisaku biamwabo;" 
Leviticus11:30 ekiigo egeke, na eng’oina, na esagara, enke na enene, amo nenyambu." 
Leviticus11:31 Ase ching’iti echio chinke echio nchibe chitachenegeti asemore. Monto onde bwensi orachikune ekero chiakure nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio. 
Leviticus11:32 Ching’iti echio chiise kogwera egento kende gionsi ekero chiakure, egento ekio nakebe egetachenegeti, onye negento keroisirie korwa ase emete, gose gokerabe eanga, gose risankwa, gose esaro, gose egento kende gionsi kegokorerwa emeremo. Egento ekio kebekwe ime ase amache, naende kebe getachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio; erio nakebe giachenekire." 
Leviticus11:33 Onye eyemo ye ching’iti echio ekogwera enyongo, gose gento kende keroisirie korwa ase amaroba, ekere ime yaye nakebe egetachenegeti, na egento ekio goika giatwe." 
Leviticus11:34 Endagera ende yonsi ekoriegwa nebe eyetachenegeti onye amache akoumorwa korwa ase enyongo buna eyio akoyekuna, na ekenyugwa kende gionsi kere ime y’enyongo buna eyio nkebe getachenegeti." 
Leviticus11:35 Gento kende gionsi keragwerwe neyemo ye ching’iti echio ekwete inakebe getachenegeti; onye ne riko rikoroisia emegati, gose neri’ endagera, erio riatwe, riabeire eritachenegeti asemore." 
Leviticus11:36 Ensoko gose aase amache akogachwa nabigenderere koba ebichenegete, korende ebinto binde bionsi ebiaao biise gokuna ching’iti echio chikwete mbibe ebitachenegeti." 
Leviticus11:37 Onye eng’iti eyemo y’echio ekwete keragwere embusuro egosimekwa, embusuro eyio negenderere koba echenegete." 
Leviticus11:38 Korende onye embusuro eyio yainekirwe ase amache ime, na egwerwe neyemo ye ching’iti echio ekwete, rirorio nebe etachenegeti.”" 
Leviticus11:39 “Eng’iti ende yonsi yancheire koriegwa kerakwe, na omonto orayekune, rirorio omonto oyio nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus11:40 Monto onde bwensi orarie enyama y’eng’iti eyio ekwete nasibie chianga chiaye, naende nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio, na onde bwensi oraimokie eng’iti eyio ekwete, nasibie chianga chiaye, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio.”" 
Leviticus11:41 “Ebitongwa ebike bionsi bigoetanana ase ense nigo bire okogechia, tibiriegwa." 
Leviticus11:42 Egetongwa kende gionsi egeke kegwekururera enda, gose gekogendera amagoro ane, gose amange, ase ebio bigoetanana ase ense, nigo bire okogechia, timobaisa kobiria." 
Leviticus11:43 Timobaisa gwekora okogechia ase engencho y’ebitongwa ebio bigoetanana, gose gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase engencho ya birobio. Moise gokora igo, namobe abatachenegeti." 
Leviticus11:44 Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino; ase ayio mweatanane inwe abanyene, mobe abachenu, ekiagera inche nomochenu inde. Timobaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase engencho y’egetongwa kende gionsi egeke ase ebio bigoetanana ase ense." 
Leviticus11:45 Inche ninche Omonene, nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri imbe Nyasae oino. Ase ayio, mobe abachenu, ekiagera inche nomochenu inde.”" 
Leviticus11:46 Oko nakwo ogochika gotenenerete ching’iti ne chinyoni, na kera egetongwa kere moyo kegoetanana ase amache ime, na ebitongwa ebisinini bigoetanana ase ense," 
Leviticus11:47 na igo momanye gwatanana ebichenegete korwa ase ebitachenegeti, ne ching’iti chire moyo chiancheire koriegwa korwa ase echitancheiri koriegwa." 
Leviticus12:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus12:2 “Otebie Abaisraeli ng’a omokungu karabe morito na aibore omwana omoisia nabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, amatuko ang’ana buna ekero abwate omotienyi abe oyotachenegeti." 
Leviticus12:3 Omwana oria omoisia asarwe ase rituko ria gatano na gatato. 
Leviticus12:4 Erio omokungu oria aganye ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etato na atato, goika amanyinga akame, na ere omonyene nabe oyochenegete. Tabaisa gokuna gento kende goinsi gechenegete, gose gosoa Aase Aachenu, goika amatuko aye ay’ogochenwa aere." 
Leviticus12:5 Korende karaibore omwana egesagane, nabe oyotachenegeti ase chichuma ibere, buna ekero abwate omotienyi, naende aganye ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etano nomo, na atano na rimo, goika amanyinga aye akame, na ere omonyene nabe oyochenegete." 
Leviticus12:6 “Ekero amatuko ’omokungu oyio ay’ogochenwa aerire, karabe nomwana omoisia aiboire, gose egesagane, omokungu oyio arente eng’ondi yakoorire omwaka oyomo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, ne riige rie riruma, gose riruma, ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Abirente ase omokuani agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus12:7 Omokuani oria arue eng’ondi eyio, gose riruma erio ase obosio bw’Omonene, na akore okobwatanigwa ase omokungu oyio, na igo nabe ochenekire korwa ase ogoiteka kw’amanyinga aye. Oko nakwo ogochika ase omokungu oiborete omwana, omoisia gose egesagane." 
Leviticus12:8 “Onye omokungu oria takonyara konyora eng’ondi, rirorio arente amaruma abere, gose amage ’amaruma abere, erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na erinde eki’ebibe. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omokungu oyio, na omokungu oyio nabe ochenekire.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia:" 
Leviticus13:2 “Ekero omonto abeire negesambo, gose abimbire risankwa ri’omobere oye, gose risankwa riatorekire na koonchoka ribe buna oborwaire bwa ukoma, omonto oyio arentwe ase Haroni omokuani, gose ase oyomo bw’abamura baye ore omokuani." 
Leviticus13:3 Omokuani oyio arenge oborwaire obwo buya. Kararore ng’a amarionya are ase egesambo keria aonchokire abeire amarabu, na oborwaire bwakorire engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, rirorio oborwaire obwo nobwa ukoma. Ekero omokuani arengire omonto oria buya, atebe ng’a oyio onyorekanire ng’a tachenegeti." 
Leviticus13:4 Onye egesambo keria kere ekerabu, korende tigekoreti engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, na amarionya egesambo keria tabeti amarabu, rirorio omokuani abeke omonto oria ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:5 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani amorenge naende, na kararore ng’a oborwaire boria tibwesiarereti ase risankwa, erio amobeke naende ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko ande atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:6 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere amorenge naende, na kararore ng’a egesambo keria giachakire gosira, na oborwaire boria tibwesiarereti ase risankwa erio omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oria ochenekire, namaote oka abwate. Omonto oria asibie chianga chiaye, erio abe oyochenegete kegima." 
Leviticus13:7 Korende egesambo keria gokerabe giesiareire ase risankwa nyuma omokuani karorire ng’a ochenekire, omonto oria goika airane ase omokuani naende," 
Leviticus13:8 na ere kararore ng’a egesambo keria giesiareire ase risankwa, erio atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti. Obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma." 
Leviticus13:9 “Ekero omonto abwate oborwaire bwa ukoma ararentwe ase omokuani," 
Leviticus13:10 na ere amorenge buya. Kararore egesambo ekerabu ase risankwa, na amarionya aonchokire abeire amarabu, naende onye enyama embariri yachakire gokina imeo," 
Leviticus13:11 obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma obokoro bogendererete ase engaki entambe ase risankwa ri’omobere bw’omonto oria. Omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti; bono tamobeka ase egesomo, ekiagera tachenegeti." 
Leviticus13:12 Onye oborwaire obwo bwa ukoma bwasokire ase risankwa isiko, na omokuani ororire ng’a bwesiareire ase omobere bwonsi korwa omotwe goika amagoro," 
Leviticus13:13 erio omokuani amorenge naende, na kararore ng’a oborwaire boria bwatubire omobere bwonsi bw’omonto oria, rirorio atebe ng’a ochenekire. Onye omobere bwonsi obeire omorabu, omonto oria obeire oyochenegete." 
Leviticus13:14 Korende onye enyama embariri yachakire gokina imeo, omonto oyio tachenegeti." 
Leviticus13:15 Ekero omokuani ararore ng’a enyama eria embariri yasokire, rirorio atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti. Enyama eria embariri nigo ere eyetachenegeti. Obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma." 
Leviticus13:16 Korende onye enyama eria embariri ekoonchoka ebe endabu, erio omonto oyio agende ase omokuani," 
Leviticus13:17 na ere amorenge buya, na onye egesambo kiaonchokire na koraba, erio omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio ochenekire." 
Leviticus13:18 “Omonto onye orenge ne rigumba ase risankwa riaye, ne rigumba erio koriagwenire," 
Leviticus13:19 na aase agwe ase risankwa riarenge obobimbu oborabu bororekane, gose egesambo gekororekana kere nobobariri na oborabu, omonto oria goika agende ase omokuani." 
Leviticus13:20 Ere amorenge buya, na kararore ng’a egesambo keria giakorire engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, na amarionya areo aonchokire na koraba, omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oria tachenegeti. Obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma bwaorokeire ase rigumba riria." 
Leviticus13:21 Korende omokuani karamorenge na arore ng’a amarionya ’egesambo keria tari amarabu, na tigekoreti engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, naende giachakire gosira, omokuani abeke omonto oria ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:22 Onye oborwaire obwo bwesiareire ase risankwa, erio omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti, risankwa rianyorire oborwaire." 
Leviticus13:23 Korende onye egesambo keria tikeonchogeti na gwesiarera, eyio nenkoru ase rigumba riariete, na omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oria ochenekire." 
Leviticus13:24 “Onye omonto ore ne risambo ri’omorero ayiete ase risankwa ri’omobere oye, na enyama embariri ekineteo ebe egesambo ki’obobariri na oborabu, gose kebe ekerabu," 
Leviticus13:25 omokuani arenge egesambo ekio. Onye amarionya egesambo ekio aonchokire na koraba, naende egesambo kiabeire engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa ri’omobere oye, obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma bwasokire ase risambo ri’omorero riarenge. Omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti. Obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma." 
Leviticus13:26 Korende omokuani kararenge egesambo keria, na arore ng’a amarionya aria areo taonchogeti abe amarabu, naende egesambo tikerakora engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, korende giachakire gosira, erio omokuani amobeke ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:27 Rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani amorenge naende. Kararore ng’a egesambo keria giesiareire ase risankwa, erio atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti. Obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma." 
Leviticus13:28 Korende onye egesambo keria tikeonchogeti gose giesiarere ase risankwa, korende giachakire gosira, okwo nokobimba kwe risambo, na omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio ochenekire. Eyio nenkoru ye risankwa ri’omobere." 
Leviticus13:29 “Onye omonto, omosacha gose omokungu, obwate egesambo ase omotwe oye, gose ase ekenyonyobu," 
Leviticus13:30 omokuani arenge egesambo ekio. Onye gekorete engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, naende onye amarionya areo are monuri na konyererea, erio omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti. Erio nerichoncho ri’oborwaire bwa ukoma ase omotwe oye, gose ase ekenyonyobu." 
Leviticus13:31 Omokuani kararenge richoncho riria na arore ng’a tirikoreti engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, naende amarionya amamwamu tari aroro, erio omokuani amobeke ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:32 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani arenge naende oborwaire boria, na onye tibwesiarereti, naende amarionya amonuri tario, naende richoncho tirikoreti engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa," 
Leviticus13:33 omonto oyio akigite etukia, korende takigita ase richoncho rire, na omokuani amwatanane, amobeke ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko ande atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:34 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani amorenge naende, na onye richoncho riria tiriesiarereti ase risankwa, na tirikoreti engoro gochia ime goetania risankwa, omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio ochenekire, ase igo asibie chianga chiaye, abe oyochenegete kegima." 
Leviticus13:35 Korende onye richoncho riria riesiareire ase risankwa nyuma gachenekire," 
Leviticus13:36 omokuani amorenge naende, na kararore ng’a richoncho riria riesiareire, takorigia korora gose amarionya are monuri nareo, omonto oyio tachenegeti." 
Leviticus13:37 Omokuani kararore ng’a richoncho riria tirionchogeti, na amarionya amamwamu amerire imeo, richoncho riria riagwenire, na omonto oria ochenekire kegima. Omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio ochenekire." 
Leviticus13:38 “Onye omosacha gose omokungu obwate ebisambo ebirabu ase risankwa ri’omobere," 
Leviticus13:39 omokuani amorenge. Nere kararore ng’a ebisambo bie risankwa ri’omobere nigo bire ebirabu ake, ebisambo ebio tibiri bobe; omonto oyio ochenekire." 
Leviticus13:40 “Onye omonto osunyokire etukia, risio riachiire magega, nigo are nyaisio, ere ochenekire," 
Leviticus13:41 na onye osunyokire etukia y’omotwe bosio, boigo ere ochenekire." 
Leviticus13:42 Korende onye ase risio ri’omotwe oye, magega gose bosio, obwate egesambo kere nobobariri na oborabu, obwo noborwaire bwa ukoma bwasokeire ase risio." 
Leviticus13:43 Ase ayio, omokuani karamorenge arore ng’a egesambo kebimbete ase risio riria, magega gose bosio, kere nobobariri na oborabu, na nigo gekororekana buna oborwaire bwa ukoma mbore ase risankwa ri’omobere," 
Leviticus13:44 omonto oyio nabwate oborwaire bwa ukoma, ere tachenegeti. Omokuani atebe ng’a omonto oyio tachenegeti; oborwaire nigo bore ase omotwe oye." 
Leviticus13:45 “Omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma abeke chianga amachanchabe, tabaisa gochanoa etukia yaye, atube omonwa oye ase egekoba kia igoro, erio aake eriogi na gokuura: Inche tinchenegeti! Tinchenegeti!" 
Leviticus13:46 Ere agenderere koba oyotachenegeti ekero are noborwaire boria, aatananwe amenye isiko y’egetwori, ao korwa ase abanto bande." 
Leviticus13:47 “Onye ukoma bore ase eanga eroisirie korwa ase amarionya gose egatani," 
Leviticus13:48 gose bore ase egetambaa keroisirie ase chingencho ao ao korwa ase egatani, gose ase amarionya, gose ase rirondia rie risankwa, gose ase egento kende gionsi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa," 
Leviticus13:49 na onye ekemoa gekororekana kere nekieni buna obonyansi, gose ekebariri, ase eanga, gose ase risankwa, gose ase egetambaa keria, gose ase egento kende keroisirie korwa ase risankwa, obwo noukoma bogwesiarera, na ebinto ebi biorokigwe ase omokuani." 
Leviticus13:50 Omokuani arenge egento kere na ukoma, erio akebeke ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:51 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani akerenge naende. Kararore ng’a ogosareka koria gwesiareire ase eanga, gose ase egetambaa keroisirie ase chingencho ao ao, gose ase risankwa, gose ase egento kende gionsi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa, nigo kiabwatetwe na ukoma obobe mono; egento ekio tigechenegeti." 
Leviticus13:52 Ase igo egento ekio gesambwe nomorero, gokerabe eanga, gose egetambaa kende gionsi, keroisirie korwa ase amarionya, gose korwa ase egatani, gose gento kende gionsi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa kere noborwaire obwo ime yaye. Obwo noborwaire obobe bwa ukoma; ebinto ebio goika bisambwe nomorero." 
Leviticus13:53 “Omokuani kararenge na arore ng’a ekemoa keria tigieserarereti ase eanga eria, gose ase egetambaa keria, gose ase kende gionsi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa," 
Leviticus13:54 rirorio achike ng’a egento ekio giasarekire, tiga gesibigwe na kebekwe ase egesomo ase engaki y’amatuko ande atano na abere." 
Leviticus13:55 Omokuani arenge ekemoa ase egento keria nyuma kogiasibigwe. Kararore ng’a ekemoa keria tikeraonchoka, egento keria tigechenegeti, nonya ekemoa ekio tigiesiarereti. Egento keria gesambwe nomorero, ekiagera ekemoa keria negi’okoboosia, onye kere isiko gose ime ase egento ekio." 
Leviticus13:56 Korende onye omokuani okorenga egento ekio nyuma kogiasibigwe, na arore ng’a ekemoa keria ngosira kere, rirorio atandore aase ekemoa keria kere, akerusie korwa ase eanga eria, gose risankwa, gose egetambaa." 
Leviticus13:57 Onye ekemoa gekororekana naende ase eanga eria, gose ase egetambaa keroisirie ase chingencho ao ao, gose ase gento kende gionsi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa, igo nekemoa gia ukoma kiaorokeire. Egento keria goika gesambwe nomorero." 
Leviticus13:58 Ekemoa gokeranyorekane ng’a giasirire ekero eanga, gose egetambaa keria, gose gento kende gionsi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa, giasibigwe, rirorio gesibigwe eria kabere. Bono egento keria nakebe giachenekire.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Oko nakwo ogochika igoro ase ebinto bire na ukoma, kobirabe chianga chiroisirie korwa ase amarionya gose egatani, gose gokerabe egetambaa keroisirie ase chingencho ao ao, gose gento kende gionsi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa. Ase ogochika okwo egento ekio inagiatorwe ng’a giachenekire, gose tigechenegeti." 
Leviticus14:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus14:2 “Oko nakwo ogochika ase omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma. Ase rituko riria arabe agochenwa arentwe ase omokuani," 
Leviticus14:3 na omokuani agende isiko y’egetwori amorenge. Kararore ng’a omonto oria ogwenire korwa ase oborwaire bwa ukoma bwamoriete," 
Leviticus14:4 omokuani achike abanto barente chinyoni ibere chichenegete chire moyo, na oroko rw’omocharake, na eusi embariri, na orosagia rwa hisopo, ase engencho y’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa." 
Leviticus14:5 Erio omokuani achike abanto banyenyere enyoni eyemo igoro ase egetega ki’amaroba kere namache amaya a rooche. 
Leviticus14:6 Naende aimokie enyoni eria ere moyo amo noroko rw’omocharake, na eusi eyio embariri, na orosagia orwo rwa hisopo, abitobeke ime ase amanyinga ’enyoni eria yanyenyeretwe igoro y’amache aria amaya a rooche." 
Leviticus14:7 Anyororokerie amanyinga aria ara gatano na kabere igoro ase omonto oyio ogochia gochenwa ase oborwaire bwa ukoma, atebe ng’a omonto oria ochenekire, na atige enyoni eria ere moyo eiruruke, egende orosana." 
Leviticus14:8 Omonto oria ogochia gochenwa goika asibie chianga chiaye, na akigite etukia yaye yonsi, naende esibie omobere namache, erio abe oyochenegete. Nyuma y’ayio asoe ase egetwori, korende abeere isiko y’eema yaye ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere," 
Leviticus14:9 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere naende akigite etukia yaye yonsi y’omotwe, ne chinderu, na ebioge bi’amaiso, na amarionya ande onsi are ase omobere oye. Erio asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, na igo nabe ochenekire." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato arente chimanwa ibere chimingichi chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, na emanwa esigiti yakoorire omwaka oyomo, etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, amo nobosie obonuke, ebimunu bitano na ekemo, bwochoganirie namaguta, ebe okoruegwa kw’endagera. Amo nayio arente amaguta egetuba ekemo." 
Leviticus14:11 Omokuani otenenerete arente omonto oria ogochia gochenwa amo nokoruegwa okwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene, agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Leviticus14:12 Erio omokuani oria aimokie emanwa eyemo, ayerue ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha, ayerue amo namaguta egetuba ekemo, erio abisungusie agwo ase obosio bwane bibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa." 
Leviticus14:13 Anyenyere emanwa eria agwo aase achenire, ase ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe na eki’ogosambwa bikonyenyerwa, ekiagera ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha neki’omokuani; ekio negechenu mono."
