Leviticus14:14 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha, na agindie mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa, naende agindie ekiara ekenene gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio, na ekiara ekenene gi’okogoro kwaye kwa borio." 
Leviticus14:15 Naende omokuani aimokie amaguta aria ataaere oroe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee," 
Leviticus14:16 atobeke ekiara kiaye gi’okoraga gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio ime ase amaguta aria are roe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee, erio ayanyororokerie ara gatano na kabere, agwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene." 
Leviticus14:17 Amaguta make ase ayio agotigara ase oroe rwaye ayagindie mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa, na ekiara ekenene gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio, na ekiara ekenene gi’okogoro kwaye kwa borio, igoro ase amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha agindirieo." 
Leviticus14:18 Naende maguta ayagotigara ase oroe rwaye ayaumore igoro ase omotwe bw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria agwo ase obosio bwane. 
Leviticus14:19 “Erio omokuani arue ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ogochia gochenwa, acheneke korwa ase ogotacheneka kwaye. Nyuma y’ayio anyenye ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Leviticus14:20 akerue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera ase egesasimero. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria, na omonto oria abe oyochenegete." 
Leviticus14:21 “Korende onye omonto oria ore omotaka na takonyara konyora ebinge akorua, rirorio arente emanwa emingichi ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha kegosungusigwa ase okobwatanigwa kwaye. Boigo arente obosie ebimunu bibere bwochoganirie namaguta, bobe okoruegwa kw’endagera, na amaguta egetuba ekemo." 
Leviticus14:22 Boigo arente amaruma abere, gose amage ’amaruma abere, buna aranyare. Erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na erinde eki’ogosambwa." 
Leviticus14:23 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato arente ebinto ebio bi’ogochenwa kwaye ase omokuani, agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, ase obosio bwane inche Omonene." 
Leviticus14:24 Omokuani aimokie emanwa y’eng’ondi eria y’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha, amo namaguta aria egetuba ekemo, abinduere inche Omonene bibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa." 
Leviticus14:25 Erio anyenye emanwa eria ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha, na omokuani aimokie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso ekio, ayagindie mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa, na ekiara ekenene gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio, na ekiara ekenene gi’okogoro kwaye kwa borio." 
Leviticus14:26 Omokuani ataaere amaguta ase oroe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee. 
Leviticus14:27 Make ay’amaguta aria are roe rw’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee ayanyororokerie ara gatano na kabere nekiara gi’okoraga gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio, agwo ase obosio bwane." 
Leviticus14:28 Naende make ay’amaguta ayio are roe rwaye agindie igoro ase amanyinga ’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha agindire: Mesia y’ogoto kwa borio kw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa, na ekiara ekenene gi’okoboko kwaye kwa borio, na ekiara ekenene gi’okogoro kwaye kwa borio." 
Leviticus14:29 Amaguta agotigara ase oroe rwaye ayaumore ase omotwe bw’omonto oria ogochia gochenwa. Ase enchera eyio akore okobwatanigwa asare, agwo ase obosio bwane." 
Leviticus14:30 Erio omonto oria arue riruma gose riige rie riruma, koreng’ana buna aranyare koyanyora." 
Leviticus14:31 Erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na erinde eki’ogosambwa, ayarue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera. Ase enchera eyio omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase obosio bwane ase omonto oria ogochia gochenwa.”" 
Leviticus14:32 Oko nakwo ogochika ase omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma, oria otanyare korua ebing’wanso bi’ogochenwa bia botambe bichikire." 
Leviticus14:33 Erio Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Leviticus14:34 “Ekero moraike ase ense ya Kanani, eyio ndabae ebe eyaino, na kondarente ukoma ase enyomba gete agwo," 
Leviticus14:35 omonto omonyene enyomba eria agende atebie omokuani: Yarorekanire ase enyomba yane ng’a ukoma mboreo. 
Leviticus14:36 Omokuani achike ng’a ebinto bionsi bire ase enyomba eyio birusigweo ritang’ani atarasoao koborenga. Onye tibagokora bo rirorio ebinto bionsi bire nyomba ime nabibe bitachenegeti. Nyuma y’ayio omokuani asoe ase enyomba eyio koyerenga. 
Leviticus14:37 Karayerenge na arore ng’a egetamase nkere ase enyasi y’enyomba eyio kere nekieni buna obonyansi, gose ekebariri, naende giakorire engoro gochia ime goetania rioomo," 
Leviticus14:38 erio omokuani asoke korwa ase enyomba eyio, na ayesieke ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus14:39 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omokuani airaneo, ayerenge naende. Kararore ng’a ukoma boria bwesiareire ase enyasi y’enyomba eria," 
Leviticus14:40 achike ng’a amagena aria asoirwe na ukoma atagorwe, atugutwe ase eubi egotugutwa, isiko y’omochie." 
Leviticus14:41 Nyuma y’ayio chinyasi chionsi chia ime chiomorwe, erio amaoomo atugutwe aase are neubi isiko y’omochie." 
Leviticus14:42 Amagena ande arentwe, abekwe ribaga ri’aria atagorwa na gotugutwa, ne chinyasi, chioomwe nesike enyia." 
Leviticus14:43 “Ukoma boria koboratuboke naende ase enyomba eria nyuma amagena aria karusigweo, ne rioomo riria koriaoomoirwe, na enyomba eria yaoomirwe naende," 
Leviticus14:44 omokuani agende ayerenge naende. Onye egetamase keria giesiareire ase enyomba eria, obwo noukoma, yabeire eyetachenegeti." 
Leviticus14:45 Enyomba eria etagorwe, na amagena onsi amo nemete ne rioomo riaye rionsi biimokigwe, bionsi biirwe ase eubi egotugutwa isiko y’omochie." 
Leviticus14:46 Monto onde bwensi orasoe ase enyomba eyio, ekero egendererete gosiekwa, nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus14:47 Monto onde bwensi aise korara ime ase enyomba eyio, gose koragerera aroro, goika asibie chianga chiaye." 
Leviticus14:48 “Korende omokuani karachiche ayerenge arore ng’a ukoma boria tibwesiarereti nyuma koyaoomirwe, rirorio ukoma bwaerire, na ere atebe ng’a enyomba eria yachenekire." 
Leviticus14:49 Omokuani arente chinyoni ibere amo noroko rw’omocharake, na eusi embariri, na orosagia rwa hisopo, ase ogochenwa kw’enyomba eria." 
Leviticus14:50 Erio anyenyere enyoni eyemo igoro ase egetega keroiseirie amaroba kere namache amaya a rooche. 
Leviticus14:51 Naende aimokie oroko orwo rw’omocharake, na orosagia rwa hisopo, na eusi eria embariri amo nenyoni eria ere moyo, abitobeke bionsi ime ase amanyinga ’enyoni eria yanyenyetwe, na amache aria amaya a rooche; erio anyororokerie enyomba eria ara gatano na kabere." 
Leviticus14:52 Ase enchera eyio omokuani nachene enyomba eyio namanyinga ’enyoni eria, amo namache aria amaya a rooche, na enyoni eria ere moyo, na oroko rw’omocharake, na orosagia rwa hisopo, na eusi eria embariri." 
Leviticus14:53 Erio omokuani atige enyoni eria ere moyo eiruruke, egende orosana isiko y’omochie. Ase enchera eyio akore okobwatanigwa ase enyomba eria, na ero ebe yachenekire.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Oko nakwo ogochika igoro y’oborwaire bwa ukoma, ne richoncho," 
Leviticus14:55 na ukoma bore ase chianga, gose ase chinyomba," 
Leviticus14:56 naende obobimbu bwe risankwa, na ebisambo, na ebimoa ebirabu." 
Leviticus14:57 Ogochika okwo nigo gokworokia onye ebinto tibichenegeti gose mbichenegete. Okwo nogochika gwa ukoma. 
Leviticus15:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Leviticus15:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, mobatebie ng’a onye omonto omosacha okorua amache anga buna chimengere korwa ase ekiimo kiaye ki’obosacha, amache ayio neubi." 
Leviticus15:3 Aya naro achikire ase amang’ana ayio: Amache ayio karagenderere korua, gose atigire korua, omonto oyio tachenegeti." 
Leviticus15:4 Ebirarero bionsi arararere, gose araikaransere, nigo birabe ebitachenegeti." 
Leviticus15:5 Monto onde bwensi aise gokuna ebirarero bi’omonto oyio goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:6 Na onde bwensi oraikaransere egento omonto oria omorwaire aikaranserete, goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:7 Na onde bwensi orakune omonto oyio omorwaire goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:8 Omonto oyio omorwaire karatwere omonto ochenegete amate, nere goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, naende abe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:9 Egeikaransero gekobekerwa eng’iti ekoriinwa, gokeraikaranserwe nomonto oria omorwaire, nakebe egetachenegeti." 
Leviticus15:10 Omonto aise gokuna egento kende gionsi kiarenge inse y’omonto oria omorwaire nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio; na onde bwensi oraimokie egento buna ekio nigo arasibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:11 Onye omonto oria omorwaire ogokuna omonto onde ataraisaba amaboko, oria okunwa goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache naende nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:12 Enyongo ende yonsi omonto oria omorwaire arakune goika yaatwe, na egekorero kende gionsi keroiseirie omote arakune goika gesibigwe namache." 
Leviticus15:13 “Omonto oria gachenekire korwa ase okorua kw’amache aria anga buna chimengere goika abare amatuko atano na abere ay’ogocheneka kwaye. Erio asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache amaya a rooche, ere nabe oyochenegete." 
Leviticus15:14 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato aire amaruma abere, gose amage ’amaruma abere, ase obosio bwane inche Omonene agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, ayae omokuani." 
Leviticus15:15 Omokuani arue erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na erinde ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa. Ase enchera eyio akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oria ase obosio bwane, ase engencho y’okorua kwaye kw’amache anga buna chimengere." 
Leviticus15:16 “Onye omonto omosacha ogosokia embusuro yaye y’oroiboro, rirorio esibie omobere namache, na agenderere koba oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:17 Eanga ende yonsi, na ebinto binde bionsi bi’amasankwa, embusuro eyio y’oroiboro eratonyere, goika bisibigwe namache, nabirobio nabibe ebitachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:18 Omonto onye orarire nomokungu, na omobekeire embusuro y’oroiboro, bonsi babere goika besibie emebere yabo namache, nabarabwo nababe abatachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:19 “Ekero omokungu are nomotienyi nigo arabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. Onde bwensi oramokune nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio. 
Leviticus15:20 Gento kende gionsi arabe okorarera ekero are nomotienyi, nigo kerabe egetachenegeti, boigo nebinto bionsi araikaransere." 
Leviticus15:21 Onde bwensi orakune ebirarero bi’omokungu oyio goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:22 Na onde bwensi orakune egento omokungu oyio aikaranserete, nigo arasibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache; ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:23 Ase igo kobirabe ebirarero, gose egento omokungu oria aikaranserete, omonto karabikune nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:24 Omosacha kararare nomokungu ore nomotienyi, ogotacheneka kw’omokungu oyio nakobe asare, ere nabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, na gento kende gionsi arararere nakebe egetachenegeti." 
Leviticus15:25 “Omokungu karagenderere goiteka amanyinga ase amatuko amange atari ay’omotienyi oye, gose ayagoiteka goetania amatuko aye ay’omotienyi, nigo arabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki eyio yonsi arabe ogoiteka amanyinga; nabe oyotachenegeti buna ekero are nomotienyi." 
Leviticus15:26 Ebirarero bionsi are korarera ekero agoiteka amanyinga, nigo birabe ebitachenegeti buna ebi akorarera ekero are nomotienyi, naboigo na kende gionsi araikaransere." 
Leviticus15:27 Na onde bwensi orakune ebinto ebio nabe oyotachenegeti; ere asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, naende nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Leviticus15:28 Ekero ogoiteka kwaye kw’amanyinga gwakamire, abare amatuko atano na abere, erio nabe ochenekire." 
Leviticus15:29 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato aire amaruma abere gose amage ’amaruma abere ase omokuani agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. 
Leviticus15:30 Omokuani arue erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na erinde eki’ogosambwa. Ase enchera eyio nakore okobwatanigwa ase omokungu oria ase obosio bwane, ase engencho y’ogotacheneka kwaye kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga." 
Leviticus15:31 “Ase enchera eyio okurere Abaisraeli igoro y’ogotacheneka kwabo, tibabaisa kogera Obomenyo bwane Obochenu bore ase egati yabo bobe obotachenegeti. Baise gokora bo, nigo barakwe.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Aya naro amachiko ase omonto okorua amache anga buna chimengere, na oyogosokia embusuro yaye y’oroiboro, na koba oyotachenegeti ase engencho eyio," 
Leviticus15:33 naboigo nase omokungu ore nomotienyi, na ase onde bwensi, omosacha okorua amache anga buna chimengere, na omokungu ogoiteka amanyinga, naende ase omosacha okorara nomokungu otachenegeti." 
Leviticus16:1 Nyuma y’ogokwa kw’abamura baria babere ba Haroni baitetwe n’Omonene, ekero bamorenterete omorero bw’engencho eng’ao, oyio batachigetwe, Omonene agakwana na Musa," 
Leviticus16:2 akamotebia, “Tebia Haroni, momura omino, ng’a tabaisa gosoa ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono, moino y’etoto, bosio bw’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera obore ekemumeko gi’Esanduku eria, engaki ende yonsi, ekiagera agwo nao ngochia kooroka ime ye riire igoro y’Oboikaranso obwo bw’Amabera. Aise gokora bo, goika akwe." 
Leviticus16:3 Igo arasoe ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono nyuma karentire eeri ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na emingichi ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa." 
Leviticus16:4 “Ritang’ani Haroni atarasoa Aase Aachenu Mono, goika esibie omobere oye namache, amanye kobeka chianga chiria chinchenu: Eganchwa erobekanirie eigete inse, ne chisirwari, na orokini, na ekegogwa, bionsi biroisirie korwa ase egatani." 
Leviticus16:5 “Erio Haroni aegwe korwa ase omoganda bw’Abaisraeli chigoree ibere chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na emingichi eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa." 
Leviticus16:6 Ritang’ani arue eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asere omonyene, na ase abanto b’enka yaye, erinde baaberwe." 
Leviticus16:7 Naende arente chigoree chiria ibere ase obosio bwane inche Omonene agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. 
Leviticus16:8 Agwo Haroni aake obomera igoro ye chigoree chiria ibere, obomera obomo asende, na obonde ase Asaseli." 
Leviticus16:9 Egoree eria erabe yagwereirwe nobomera asende, Haroni ayerente ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Leviticus16:10 Na egoree eria erabe yagwereirwe nobomera ase Asaseli ayerente ere moyo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene, erinde akore okobwatanigwa asero, na koyetiga esiboire egende ase erooro ase Asaseli." 
Leviticus16:11 “Naboigo Haroni arente eeri eria ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe biaye, akore okobwatanigwa asere omonyene, na ase abanto b’enka yaye, anyenye eeri eria." 
Leviticus16:12 Erio aimokie orogio roichire omorero bw’amakara korwa ase egesasimero kere ase obosio bwane, na ubani eichire chindoe ibere, ayerente moino y’etoto eria enachete Obomenyo Obochenu," 
Leviticus16:13 ayebeke ase omorero igoro, agwo ase obosio bwane, erinde erioki ria ubani eyio ritube Oboikaranso bw’Amabera obore ekemumeko gi’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori. Atakoreti bo, nigo arakwe." 
Leviticus16:14 Aimokie amanyinga make ay’eeri eyio, ayanyororokerie ase Oboikaranso bw’Amabera bosio, na bosio bw’Oboikaranso boria bw’Amabera ara gatano na kabere nekiara kiaye." 
Leviticus16:15 “Nyuma y’ayio anyenye embori eria ebe ekeng’wanso ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abanto, aire amanyinga ’embori eyio moino y’etoto eria, ayanyororokerie igoro ase Oboikaranso bw’Amabera bosio, na bosio bw’Oboikaranso boria akore buna akorete namanyinga ’eeri eria." 
Leviticus16:16 Naboigo akore okobwatanigwa ase Aase Aachenu Mono ase engencho y’ogotacheneka kw’Abaisraeli amo nogosaria kwabo, na ebibe biabo bionsi. Naende akore okobwatanigwa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, eyio ere amo nabarabwo na ase egati y’ogotacheneka kwabo." 
Leviticus16:17 Monto onde tatigara ime ase Eema y’Omosangererekano korwa ekero Haroni agosoa ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono akore okobwatanigwa goika arueo, gakoorire gokora okobwatanigwa asere omonyene, na ase abanto b’enka yaye, na ase omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisareli." 
Leviticus16:18 Erio asoke agende ase egesasimero kere agwo ase obosio bwane, agekorere okobwatanigwa, naende aimokie amanyinga make ay’eeri eyio, ayagindie ase emegwekano yonsi ye chingunchara ere ase chikoona chi’egesasimero ekio," 
Leviticus16:19 naende anyororokerie egesasimero namanyinga ayio nekiara kiaye ara gatano na kabere. Ase enchera eyio agesibie na kogechena korwa ase ogotacheneka kore ase Abaisraeli. 
Leviticus16:20 “Ekero Haroni akoorire gokora okobwatanigwa ase Aase Aachenu Mono, na ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, na ase egesasimero, arente embori eria ere moyo." 
Leviticus16:21 Erio goika abeke amaboko aye abere ase omotwe bw’embori eria ere moyo, aorokie igoro ase embori eyio obobe bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli na ogosaria kwabo gwonsi, na ebibe biabo bionsi. Ase enchera eyio ang’anyie ebio bionsi, abibeke igoro ase omotwe bw’embori eyio. Naende embori eyio eirwe ase erooro nomonto obekirwe ang’e." 
Leviticus16:22 Naboigo embori eria ebogorie ebibe biabo bionsi, egende nabio gochia ase erooro ase abanto batamanyeti." 
Leviticus16:23 “Nyuma y’ayio Haroni asoe Eema y’Omosangererekano, arusie chianga chi’egatani chiria abegete ritang’ani atarasoa Aase Aachenu, achitigeo." 
Leviticus16:24 Erio esibie omobere oye namache agwo aase gete are aachenu, naende abeke chianga chiaye chia botambe. Nyuma y’ayio asoke, arue ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase engencho yaye ere omonyene amo nebi’abanto bonsi na akore okobwatanigwa asere omonyene na ase abanto." 
Leviticus16:25 Naende asambere ebitinya bi’ekeng’wanso keria ki’ebibe ase egesasimero. 
Leviticus16:26 Omonto oyio oirete embori eria ase erooro ase Asaseli, asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache; nyuma y’ayio amanye gosoa ase egetwori." 
Leviticus16:27 Eeri eria amo nembori eria chiaruetwe chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, echio amanyinga abo arentwe ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono akore okobwatanigwa, chiirwe isiko y’egetwori. Riiyo ne risankwa, amo ne chinyama ne chisike chiabo, bisamberwe aroro nomorero." 
Leviticus16:28 Omonto oria orasambe ebinto ebio nigo arasibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache; nyuma y’ayio amanye gosoa ase egetwori." 
Leviticus16:29 “Oyo noro omoroberio ochikire asemore moragenderere korenda botambe. Rituko ria ikomi, ase omotienyi o gatano na kabere, inamobe mokweng’ata na gweitia; timokora emeremo ende yonsi, inwe abanyene, gose abamenyi bamenyete ase egati yaino." 
Leviticus16:30 Ase rituko erio okobwatanigwa ngokorwe asemore ase okobasibia korwa ase ebibe biaino bionsi, nainwe namocheneke ase obosio bwane inche Omonene." 
Leviticus16:31 Rituko erio naribe richenu mono asemore, rituko ri’ogotimoka, na inwe namweng’ate. Oyio nomoroberio ochikirwe oragenderere botambe." 
Leviticus16:32 Omokuani oakirwe amaguta na gwatananwa abe omokuani ribaga ria ise, nere orakore okobwatanigwa okwo. Ere nigo arabeke chianga chiria chinchenu chi’egatani," 
Leviticus16:33 na akore okobwatanigwa ase Aase Aachenu Mono, na ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, naende akore okobwatanigwa ase abakuani, na ase omosangererekano bw’Abaisraeli." 
Leviticus16:34 Omoroberio oyio ochikirwe asemore oragenderere botambe, ng’a okobwatanigwa kobe kogokorerwa ase Abaisraeli ara rimo ase omwaka ase okobachena korwa ase ebibe biabo bionsi.” Musa agakora buna Omonene amochigete." 
Leviticus17:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus17:2 “Tebia Haroni na abamura baye amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi ng’a inche Omonene nachikire iga: 
Leviticus17:3 Onye omonto onde bwensi okonyenyera eng’ombe, gose emanwa y’eng’ondi, gose embori, ase egetwori, gose isiko y’egetwori," 
Leviticus17:4 atayerenteti agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano ebe ekeng’wanso asende, bosio bw’Obomenyo bwane, rirorio okomocha kw’ogoitera amanyinga nakobarerwe omonto oyio. Ere oiteire amanyinga, ase igo naatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus17:5 Bono Abaisraeli tibakonyara gokora buna barenge gokora agwo ritang’ani, tibakonyenyera ching’iti chi’ebing’wanso biabo orosana isiko; goika bachindetere inche Omonene, bachiire ase omokuani agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, bachinyenyereo chibe ebing’wanso bi’omorembe asende." 
Leviticus17:6 Na omokuani asiarere amanyinga ase egesasimero kiane agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, naende asambe ebitinya bibe rimisu rigiya rikongwenera." 
Leviticus17:7 Abaisraeli tibabaisa konyenyera ebing’wanso biabo isiko aande na kobirua ase ebirecha, na igo babe abatari abegenwa asende. Oyio nobe omoroberio ochikire oragenderere botambe, ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Leviticus17:8 “Ase igo obatebie ng’a monto onde bwensi ase Abaisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo, kararue ekeng’wanso kegosambwa ekegima, gose ekeng’wanso kende gionsi," 
Leviticus17:9 na omonto oyio atakerenteti ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano na gokerua asende, nigo araatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus17:10 “Onde bwensi ase Abaisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo, orarie amanyinga ande onsi, inche Omonene nimbe mamincha y’omonto oyio, na inche nimwatanane korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus17:11 Obomoyo bwa kera omobere nigo bore ime ase amanyinga; nabaeire amanyinga moyanyororokererie ase egesasimero akore okobwatanigwa ase obomoyo bwaino; amanyinga naro agokora okobwatanigwa, ekiagera obomoyo bore imeo." 
Leviticus17:12 Ase ayio natebirie Abaisraeli ng’a monto onde bwensi obo, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo, tabaisa koria amanyinga ande onsi." 
Leviticus17:13 “Omonto onde bwensi ase Abaisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo, oraite eng’iti y’orosana, gose enyoni eyancheire koriegwa, goika aitere amanyinga aye inse, erio ayatube amaroba." 
Leviticus17:14 Obomoyo bwa kera omobere nigo bore ase amanyinga. Ase engencho eyio natebirie Abaisraeli ng’a tibaria amanyinga ’eng’iti ende yonsi, ekiagera obomoyo bwa kera omobere nigo bore ase amanyinga aye. Omonto onde bwensi orarie amanyinga nigo araatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus17:15 “Omonto onde bwensi, omobiare gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino, orarie eng’iti ekwete yoka enyene, gose eyeitire ne ching’iti chinde chi’orosana, goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache; nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio, erio abe ochenekire." 
Leviticus17:16 Korende onye tagosibia chianga chiaye na gwesibia omobere, rirorio nabogorie obobe bwaye.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus18:2 “Tebia Abaisraeli ng’a natebire iga: Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus18:3 Timobaisa gokora buna abanto ba Misiri bagokora, agwo ase mwamenyete, gose buna abanto ba Kanani bagokora, ense eyio nkobaira mochie komenya, gose timobaisa kobwatia chingencho chiabo." 
Leviticus18:4 Moigwere amachiko aane, na mokore aya nkobachika. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus18:5 Ee, mokore aya nkobachika, na mobwate amachiko aane. Omonto karakore amang’ana ayio nabe moyo. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus18:6 “Monto onde bwensi tabaisa korara nomokungu ore omoamate omwabo. Okwo nokorentera omoamate omwabo obosooku. Inche ninche Omonene. 
Leviticus18:7 Tobaisa korara na nyoko. Okwo nokomorentera iso obosooku. Torentera nyoko obosooku. 
Leviticus18:8 Tobaisa korara na nyoko moke, moga iso. Okwo nokomorentera iso obosooku." 
Leviticus18:9 Tobaisa korara na moiseke omino, omoiseke o iso gose oyo o nyoko, onye moiboire komo ase enyomba eyemo, gose oiboire ase enyomba ende." 
Leviticus18:10 Tobaisa korara nomochokoro oo, oyo bw’omwana oo omomura, gose oyo bw’omwana oo omosubati. Ayio nigo arakorentere obosooku." 
Leviticus18:11 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke o nyoko moke, moga iso; oyio nomoiseke omino iso aiborete." 
Leviticus18:12 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke omwabo iso; oyio nyoko moke, omwabo iso." 
Leviticus18:13 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke omwabo nyoko; oyio nyoko moke, omwabo nyoko." 
Leviticus18:14 Tobaisa korara na moga iso moke omwabo iso; okwo nokorentera iso moke obosooku, ekiagera omokungu oyio nyoko moke are." 
Leviticus18:15 Tobaisa korara na moka momura oo; obwo nobosooku, ekiagera nomokungu bw’omwana oo omomura." 
Leviticus18:16 Tobaisa korara na moka momura omino; okwo nokomorentera momura omino obosooku. 
Leviticus18:17 Tobaisa korara nomoiseke bw’omokungu kwabeire nere, gose tobaisa gotwara omochokoro oye, omoiseke bw’omwana oye omosubati, gose oyo bw’omomura oye, ekiagera abwo nabanto abamo. Obwo nobonyaka obobe." 
Leviticus18:18 Tobaisa koira mokoyoo, omwabo mokao, ekero mokao are moyo; ayio nabaise korenta obobisa." 
Leviticus18:19 “Tobaisa korara nomokungu ekero abwate omotienyi, ekiagera ere tachenegeti ase ekero ekio." 
Leviticus18:20 Tobaisa korara nomokungu bw’omosacha onde na gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka nere. 
Leviticus18:21 Tobaisa korua omwana onde oo abe ekeng’wanso ase enyasae Moleki, ekiagera okwo nokorentera erieta ria Nyasae oo obosooku. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus18:22 Tobaisa korara nomonto omosacha buna okorara nomokungu; obwo nobonyaka obobe bw’okogechia. 
Leviticus18:23 Tobaisa korara neng’iti ende yonsi na gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka nero. Na omokungu tabaisa kwerua korara neng’iti ende yonsi. Obwo nobonyaka obobe kegima bw’okogechia. 
Leviticus18:24 “Inwe timobaisa gwekora abatachenegeti ase ogokora buna okwo. Ase enchera eyio abanto b’ebisaku mbesoetie ase ogotacheneka, na bono inche Omonene nkobaseria inde babatigere inwe ense eyio." 
Leviticus18:25 Ogokora kwabo gokarentera enseeria ogotacheneka, na inche nkayea egesusuro ase engencho y’ogosaria okwo, na ense eyio ekaanga tiyatwara abanto bamenyeteo, korende ekabaseria." 
Leviticus18:26 Ase igo inwe mwensi, ababiare gose abamenyi bamenyete ase egati yaino, goika morende amachiko aane na kobwata aya onsi nabachikire, gose timobaisa gokora kende gionsi gi’okogechia okwo abanto b’ebisaku bakorete." 
Leviticus18:27 Abanto bamenyete ase ense eria ritang’ani riaino nigo bakorete okogechia okwo gwonsi, na igo ense eria ekaba etachenegeti." 
Leviticus18:28 Moise gokora ayio, ense eyio nigo erabaange morue aroro, buna yangete abanto b’ebisaku, abwo babatang’anete komenyao," 
Leviticus18:29 ekiagera monto onde bwensi orakore okogechia konde gwonsi buna okwo, oyio naatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus18:30 “Ase ayio, moigwere amang’ana aya onsi nabachikire, na moyakore. Timobasia kwenaria chingencho chi’okogechia chiakoretwe nabanto abwo babatang’anete komenya ase ense eyio. Moise gokora igo, inamwesoyie ase ogotacheneka ase chingencho echio. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus19:2 “Tebia omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli: Mobe abachenu, ekiagera inche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo inde omochenu," 
Leviticus19:3 Kera oyomo oino asike ng’ina na ise, naende morende Chisabato chiane. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Leviticus19:4 “Timontiga na koonchokera emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, gose timwekorera chinyasae korwa ase ebioma binyititoire na kobombwa. Inche ninche Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus19:5 “Onye moganetie korua ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe asende inche Omonene, mobwate emeroberio yachikirwe, erio nario ekeng’wanso ekio kerancherwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Chinyama chi’ekengw’anso ekio chiriegwe ase rituko erio erio eng’iti yanyenywa, gose rituko ria kabere, korende echiratigare ase rituko ria gatato chisambwe nomorero." 
Leviticus19:7 Chiise koriegwa ase rituko ria gatato, ekeng’wanso ekio inakebe okogechia, tikegwancherwa." 
Leviticus19:8 Monto onde bwensi orakerie ekero ekio nabarerwe obobe bwaye, ekiagera okorire egento giatananetwe asende kebe egetari egechenu. Omonto oyio naatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus19:9 “Ekero mokogesa emegondo yaino, timogesa moikie ase chingito kegima, gose timoirana gochora ebitigari ase emegondo." 
Leviticus19:10 Timobaisa gochora amasabibu atigarete, gose agwete inse, ase emegondo yaino y’emesabibu; ayio motigere abataka na abamenyi. Inche ninche Omonene Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus19:11 “Timoiba, gose timong’ainana, gose timotebania oborimo." 
Leviticus19:12 Timobaisa gotiana ogotiana kw’oborimo ase erieta riane. Moise gokora igo, nigo morarentere erieta riane obosooku. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus19:13 “Tobaisa korianania omogisangio oo, gose komourereria. Tobaisa gotanga eng’eria y’omonto origete okogokorera emeremo, tebeera asore goika mambia." 
Leviticus19:14 Tobaisa koragereria omonto omotino, gose kobeka ekegocha bosio bw’omonto omouko, korende omoiroke Nyasae oo. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus19:15 “Timokora ayatari boronge ekero ebina bikogambwa; timobaisa gwanchereria omotaka, gose koiroka omonda, korende monache ebina ebironge ase abagisangio baino." 
Leviticus19:16 Tobaisa goeta‐eta ase egati y’abanto bamino gokwana obogenki; tobaisa kogera oyomino aitwe ase okoba kirori bw’oborimo. Inche ninche Omonene. 
Leviticus19:17 “Tobaisa kogecha oyomino ime ase enkoro yao, korende omokurere maiso marore, erinde tokora ebibe ase engencho yaye." 
Leviticus19:18 Tobaisa kweruseria egesiomba, gose kogenderera kogecha monto onde bwensi ase egesaku kiao, korende ancha omogisangio oo buna bweanchete aye omonyene. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus19:19 “Mobwate amachiko aane. Timobaisa gotiga chitugo chiaino chieenane amarieme ne chitari egesaku ekemo. Timobaisa kobusura chimbusuro chi’ebisaku bibere ase omogondo oyomo, timobeka chianga chiroisirie korwa ase chiusi ao ao." 
Leviticus19:20 “Omonto aise korara nomoiseke ore omosomba na oriereirwe boko nomonto omoao, na omoiseke oria taraboorigwa, gose taranyora obosibore, barabwo babere nigo baraegwe egesusuro, ko tibagoitwa, ekiagera omoiseke oyio taranyora obosibore." 
Leviticus19:21 Omonto oyio arente emingichi eyemo asende inche Omonene, agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha kwaye." 
Leviticus19:22 Ase okorua emingichi eria y’ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha, omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omonto oyio ase obosio bwane, ase engencho y’ebibe biria akorire, na omonto oyio naaberwe ase ebibe ebio akorire." 
Leviticus19:23 “Ekero moraike ase ense ya Kanani na mosimeke emete y’ebisaku ao ao ekwama amatunda, timobaisa koria amatunda ’emete eyio ase engaki y’emiaka etato ye ritang’ani, korende moyebare ng’a nekanire." 
Leviticus19:24 Ase omwaka o kane amatunda ’emete eyio aatananwe abe amachenu asende inche Omonene, moyang’e ase okong’iraneria ng’a mbuya mono na gontogia." 
Leviticus19:25 Korende ase omwaka o gatano inamorie amatunda ’emete eyio. Komorakore igo, emete inayame amatunda amange asemore. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus19:26 “Timobaisa koria enyama ende yonsi ebwate amanyinga ime yaye. Timobaisa gwancha oboragori, gose oborogi bonde bwonsi." 
Leviticus19:27 Timobaisa konacha chitukia chiaino, gose chinderu chiaino mesia." 
Leviticus19:28 Timobaisa gwesaraga emebere yaino ase okoreera abakure, gose gwesamba kobeka ekemanyererio kende gionsi. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus19:29 “Tobaisa korentera omoiseke oo obosooku ase okomoira abe omotayayi ase chihekalu, ense yonsi nigo erabaise gokora obotayayi na goichorwa nobonyaka." 
Leviticus19:30 Morende Chisabato chiane, naende mosike Obomenyo bwane Obochenu. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus19:31 “Timorigia ogosemigwa korwa ase abanto abakoboria amang’ana korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete, gose timogenda ase abaragori. Moise gokora igo, nigo morabe abatachenegeti goetera asebare. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus19:32 “Otenene ase omonto omogotu ore ne chimbuche, ase okomosika; omoiroke Nyasae oo. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus19:33 “Timobaisa kobakorera bobe abamenyi bamenyete ase ense yaino. 
Leviticus19:34 Mokorere abamenyi bamenyete ase egati yaino buna mogokorera ababiare, mobanche buna mweanchete inwe abanyene, ekiagera nainwe nabo mwarenge abamenyi ase ense ya Misiri. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus19:35 “Timokorerana oborianania ase ebirengo binde bionsi, ebi’obotambe, gose ebi’oborito, gose ebi’obonge." 
Leviticus19:36 Mokorere ekerengo kia boronge; motware amagena ay’okorenga a boronge, na ebimunu bi’okorenga bia boronge, na ebituba bi’okorenga bia boronge. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 Mobwate amachiko aane onsi aya nabachikire. Inche ninche Omonene.” 
Leviticus20:1 Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Leviticus20:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Monto onde bwensi oino, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino, orarue omwana onde oye ase enyasae Moleki, goika aitwe akwe. Omoganda oino bwonsi omoake amagena." 
Leviticus20:3 Inche omonyene nimbe nendamwamu ase omonto oyio, ekiagera orure omwana onde oye ase enyasae Moleki. Nimwatanane korwa ase abanto baye, ekiagera ogerire Obomenyo bwane Obochenu bobe obotachenegeti, na orenteire erieta riane richenu obosooku." 
Leviticus20:4 Onye abanto b’ense yaino bakoombia, tibaita omonto oyio orure oyomo bw’abana baye ase enyasae Moleki," 
Leviticus20:5 erio inche omonyene nimbe nendamwamu ase omonto oyio na eamate yaye. Nimwatanane amo nabanto bonsi bamobwatirie, ekiagera bakoonchokera enyasae eria Moleki, ase okoyesasima, bakaba abatari abegenwa asende; nimbasirie korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus20:6 “Onye omonto okorigia ogosemigwa korwa ase abanto bakoboria amang’ana korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete, gose kogenda ase abarogi, taba omwegenwa asende, korende abe ogosasima emeika eyio, inche nimbe nendamwamu ase omonto oyio, na imwatanane korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus20:7 Eatanane, mwerue mobe abachenu, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus20:8 Mobwate amachiko aane na koyakora; inche ninche Omonene, nkobachena." 
Leviticus20:9 “Kera omonto okoragereria ise gose ng’ina, oyio goika akwe. Ekiagera oragereirie ise na ng’ina, okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga aye nigo korabe okwaye." 
Leviticus20:10 “Onye omonto ogotomana nomokungu bw’omonto onde, abwo babere, omosacha oria amo nomokungu oria, goika baitwe bakwe." 
Leviticus20:11 Onye omonto okorara nomokungu ore moga ise, igo orenteire ise obosooku; abwo bonsi babere goika baitwe bakwe. Okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga abo nigo korabe okwabo." 
Leviticus20:12 Onye omonto okorara na moka momura oye, abwo bonsi babere goika baitwe bakwe; bakorire okogechia. Okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga abo nigo korabe okwabo." 
Leviticus20:13 Onye omosacha okorara nomosacha onde buna akorara nomokungu, abwo bonsi babere bakorire okogechia okobe; goika baitwe bakwe, na okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga abo nigo korabe okwabo." 
Leviticus20:14 Onye omonto okonyuoma omokungu aire na ng’ina biara abasang’ananie, obwo nobonyaka obobe. Omosacha oria amo nabakungu baria babere basambwe nomorero bakwe, erinde obonyaka buna obwo tiboba ase egati yaino." 
Leviticus20:15 Onye omonto okorara neng’iti, omonto oyio aitwe akwe, na eng’iti eyio eitwe ekwe." 
Leviticus20:16 Onye omokungu ogoika eng’iti ende yonsi ang’e, na korara nero, omokungu oyio goika aitwe akwe, na eng’iti eyio eitwe ekwe. Okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyiga abo nigo korabe okwabo." 
Leviticus20:17 “Onye omonto okoira omoiseke omwabo, oyo o ise gose o ng’ina, nabwo barorerane bare getirianda, obwo nobosooku obonene. Barabwo goika baatananwe barusigwe ase amasio ’abanto b’egesaku kiabo. Omonto oyio orenteire omoiseke omwabo obosooku. Obobe bw’ogosaria okwo nigo borabe igoro y’omonto oyio." 
Leviticus20:18 Onye omonto omosacha okorara nomokungu ekero abwate omotienyi, omonto oyio orenteire omokungu oyio obosooku ase okorora ensoko y’amanyinga aye, nere oorokirie ase amanyinga agoiteka korwa; abwo babere baatananwe korwa ase abanto b’egesaku kiabo." 
Leviticus20:19 “Tobaisa korara nomoiseke omwabo nyoko, gose omoiseke omwabo iso; obwo nobonyaka obobe, ekiagera abwo nabanyako moke. Obobe bw’ogosaria okwo nigo borabe igoro yabo." 
Leviticus20:20 Onye omonto okorara na moga ise moke, omwabo ise, igo orenteire ise moke obosooku. Egesusuro ki’ogosaria kw’ebibe biabo nigo kerabe ekiabo, na barabwo nigo barakwe bataiboreti bana." 
Leviticus20:21 Onye omonto okoira moka momura omwabo, okwo nogosaria, ere orenteire momura omwabo obosooku. Barabwo nigo baragombae." 
Leviticus20:22 “Ase ayio mobwate amachiko aane na emeroberio yonsi nabachikire, na moyakore, erio ense eria ase nkobaira mogochia komenya tebaanga gose tebaseria korwa aroro." 
Leviticus20:23 Timochia kobwatia chingencho chi’abanto b’egesaku keria ngochia goseria kerue ase amasio aino; barabwo nigo bakorete amang’ana ayio onsi, na ase engencho y’ayio nkagechigwa nabarabwo." 
Leviticus20:24 Korende inabarierete inwe eira ng’a nimbae ense yabo ebe omwando oino, ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabaatananire inwe korwa ase ebisaku binde." 
Leviticus20:25 Inwe goika momanye gwatanana ching’iti chichenegete korwa ase echitachenegeti, ne chinyoni chichenegete korwa ase echitachenegeti. Timobaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase okoria ching’iti gose chinyoni chitachenegeti, gose timoria ching’iti chinde chionsi chikwagura ase ense, echi naatananire chibe chitachenegeti asemore." 
Leviticus20:26 Inwe mobe abachenu baane, ekiagera inche Omonene nigo inde omochenu, nabaatananire korwa ase ebisaku binde, erinde mobe abaane." 
Leviticus20:27 “Omosacha, gose omokungu, orarigie ogosemigwa korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete, gose oyore omorogi, goika aitwe akwe. Abanto abwo baakwe amagena bakwe; okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga abo nakobe okwabo.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia, “Kwana nabakuani, abamura ba Haroni, obatebie ng’a omokuani tabaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogokuna egetondo ki’omonto okure ase egati y’abanto baye." 
Leviticus21:2 Nare ne ribaga gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase abanto aba: Ng’ina na ise, na omwana oye, omomura gose omoiseke, na momura omwabo;" 
Leviticus21:3 boigo na omoiseke omwabo ore omwekungi, oyo otaraba nomosacha; asare nigo are ne ribaga gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka." 
Leviticus21:4 Ekiagera omokuani are omotang’ani ase abanto baye, tabaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka." 
Leviticus21:5 “Omokuani tabaisa kogingira ensemo ende y’etukia y’omotwe oye, gose konacha chinderu chiaye mesia, gose gwesaraga omobere." 
Leviticus21:6 Abakuani mbabe abachenu asende inche Nyasae obo, na tibarentera erieta riane obosooku, ekiagera nabwo bakorua okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene. Ase ayio goika babe abachenu." 
Leviticus21:7 Omokuani tabaisa konyuoma omokungu omotayayi, gose oyotari omwekungi, gose oyobatiganire nomosacha oye, ekiagera omokuani nigo achenegete ase Nyasae oye." 
Leviticus21:8 Goika omobare ng’a nomochenu, ekiagera nere okorua okoruegwa kw’endagera asende inche Nyasae oo; nabe omochenu asore, ekiagera inche Omonene nomochenu inde, ninche nkobachena." 
Leviticus21:9 Onye omwana omoiseke bw’omokuani ogwesaria ase okoba omotayayi, igo orenteire ise obosooku; omoiseke oyio goika asambwe nomorero akwe." 
Leviticus21:10 “Oyore omokuani omonene ase abamwabo, oyio onyororokeretigwe amaguta akweakwa ase omotwe oye, naende bwatananirwe ase okobeka chianga chi’obokuani, ere tatiga etukia yaye esang’ang’are, gose tatandora chianga chiaye ase okoreera omonto okure." 
Leviticus21:11 Tabaisa gosoa enyomba ase abanto babekire omobere bw’omonto okure, gose gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka, naba ise gose ng’ina." 
Leviticus21:12 Tasoka korwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu, gose gokora Obomenyo obo Obochenu bwa Nyasae oye bobe obotachenegeti, ekiagera amaguta aagetwe nigo amwatananete ere agenderere koba oyone, inche Nyasae oye. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus21:13 Ere anyuome omoiseke ore omwekungi. 
Leviticus21:14 Tabaisa konyuoma omokungu omoboraka, gose oyobatiganire nomosacha oye, gose oyotari omwekungi, gose ore omotayayi, korende anyuome omoiseke omwekungi korwa ase abanto b’egesaku kiaye." 
Leviticus21:15 Erio nario abana baye barabe abachenu, tibasareka ase egati y’abanto baye, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, ninche nkobachena.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Omonene agakwana na Musa naende, akamotebia," 
Leviticus21:17 “Kwana na Haroni, omotebie ng’a onde bwensi ore ekerema tabaisa goika ang’e kondetera inche, Nyasae oye, okoruegwa kw’endagera. Okwo nogochika koragenderere botambe ase ororeria rwaye ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Leviticus21:18 Omonto ore na kemocho ase omobere oye tabaisa goika ang’e, onye ore omouko, gose rigata, gose ore na kemocho ase obosio bwaye, gose ore nekiimo ekemo egetambe goetania ekende," 
Leviticus21:19 gose omonto ore na kemocho ase okoboko gose ase okogoro," 
Leviticus21:20 gose omonto ore nesukubi ase omogongo oye, gose ore oboengere, gose oyore na kemocho ase eriso, gose oyo obosisa boriete, gose oborwaire bonde ase risankwa, gose omosacha chingetia chiaye chisaregete." 
Leviticus21:21 Omonto onde bwensi ase ororeria rwa Haroni omokuani ore na kemocho ase omobere oye tabaisa goika ang’e kondetera inche Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero, ekiagera oyio ore na kemocho ase omobere oye tagoika ang’e andetere inche, Nyasae oye, okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero." 
Leviticus21:22 Ere nabe ne ribaga ri’okoria okoruegwa kw’endagera gokoruegwa asende inche Nyasae oye, okoruegwa okore ogochenu, amo nokore ogochenu mono." 
Leviticus21:23 Korende ekiagera are na kemocho ase omobere oye, tagoika ang’e netoto enachete Obomenyo Obochenu, gose tagocha aike ang’e negesasimero. Aise goika ang’e, nigo aragere Obomenyo bwane Obochenu bobe botachenegeti. Inche ninche Omonene, ninche nkobachena.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Amang’ana ayio naro Musa atebetie Haroni, amo nabamura ba Haroni, na Abaisraeli bonsi." 
Leviticus22:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus22:2 “Kwana na Haroni na abamura baye, obatebie ng’a barende na bakore amasikani ase ebinto ebichenu, biria Abaisraeli bagwatanana asende, erio tibabaisa korenta obosooku ase erieta riane richenu. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus22:3 Obatebie ng’a onye omonto onde bwensi ase ororeria rwabo, ekero are oyotachenegeti; aise goika ang’e nebinto ebio Abaisraeli barabe bagwatanana asende inche Omonene, omonto oyio naatananwe korwa ase obosio bwane, tagonkorera ase emeremo y’obokuani. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus22:4 “Omonto onde bwensi ase ororeria rwa Haroni obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma, gose okorua amache anga buna chimengere, tabaisa koria ebinto ebichenu goika ekero arabe ochenekire; naboigo na onde bwensi orakune egento getachenegeti, buna egetondo, gose omonto ogosokia embusuro yaye y’oroiboro," 
Leviticus22:5 na onde bwensi orakune eng’iti ekwagura, eye eramokore abe oyotachenegeti, gose akune omonto oragere abe oyotachenegeti, ogotacheneka kwaye gakorabe okw’engencho ende yonsi." 
Leviticus22:6 Omokuani onde bwensi orakune egento buna ekio nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio; ere takoria ebinto ebichenu goika ekero arabe bwesibirie omobere oye namache. 
Leviticus22:7 Ekero erioba riagure, abe ochenekire, na nyuma y’ayio amanye koria ebinto ebichenu, ekiagera ebinto ebio nabio endagera yaye." 
Leviticus22:8 Taria enyama y’eng’iti ekwete yoka enyene, gose eye eitire neng’iti ende y’orosana. Aise koria enyama buna eyio, nigo arabe oyotachenegeti. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus22:9 “Abakuani bonsi goika barende amang’ana aya nachikire. Batayabwateti, nababe abakori ebibe ase ayio, na barabwo mbakwe, ekiagera bagosaria aya nachikire. Inche ninche Omonene, ninche nkobachena." 
Leviticus22:10 “Omonto otari bw’eamate y’omokuani tabaisa koria ebinto ebichenu. Omomenyi omenyete amo nomokuani, gose omonto orikire komokorera emeremo, abwo tibabaisa koria ebinto ebichenu." 
Leviticus22:11 Omosomba onde bwensi omokuani agorete ne chibesa chiaye omonyene, gose omosomba oiboreire ase enka yaye, abwo nabarie endagera eria omokuani akoegwa." 
Leviticus22:12 Omoiseke bw’omokuani karanyuomwe nomonto otari omokuani tabaisa koria ebinto ebichenu bikoruegwa bibe ebing’wanso. 
Leviticus22:13 Korende omosubati bw’omokuani osogete otigirwe ore omoboraka, gose batiganire nomosacha oye, na tabwati omwana, na bono oiranire gocha o ise komenyao buna ekero arenge omoke, nanyare koria endagera eria ya ise. Korende omonto otari bw’eamate y’omokuani tabaisa koria endagera eria." 
Leviticus22:14 “Omonto onde bwensi otari bw’eamate y’omokuani orarie ebinto biria ebichenu ase ogotamanya, goika airanie egento egechenu ase omokuani, buna keria airete, na amente ensemo ya isano ye rigori ri’egento ekio." 
Leviticus22:15 Abakuani tibabaisa gokora ebinto ebi ebichenu Abaisraeli bagwatanana na kobirua ase Omonene bibe ebitachenegeti," 
Leviticus22:16 na igo bakogera abanto babogorie ebibe biabo, na okomocha kwabo, ase okoria ebinto ebichenu baruete. Inche ninche Omonene, ninche nkobachena.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus22:18 “Tebia Haroni na abamura baye, na Abaisraeli bonsi, ng’a ekero omonto onde bwensi bw’Abaisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo, aganetie konduera inche Omonene ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, kerabe nase engencho y’eira, gose neki’ogwancha kwaye," 
Leviticus22:19 goika arue eeri, gose egoree, gose emingichi, chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, erio nario ekeng’wanso kerancherwe." 
Leviticus22:20 Timobaisa korua eng’iti ende yonsi ere na kemocho ase omobere oye, naki ase ekeng’wanso buna ekio timogwancherwa." 
Leviticus22:21 Ekero omonto onde bwensi akorua ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe asende, ase engencho y’eira ariete, gose eki’ogwancha kwaye, korwa ase chiombe gose ching’ondi, goika ebe eng’iti eng’ikeranu, etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, eyio nero erancherwe." 
Leviticus22:22 Timobaisa konduera ching’iti chiukorete, gose chire ebisegora, gose ebirema, gose chire namaote akorua amaira, gose chibwate egesuneri, gose amaote, ng’a chibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende." 
Leviticus22:23 Eeri gose emanwa y’eng’ondi ebwate ekiimo egetambe goetania ekende, gose ekieng’e mono, nabo oranyare koyerua ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogwancha, korende ase okoyerua ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogoikerania eira kwariete, tegwancherwa nainche." 
Leviticus22:24 Eng’iti ende yonsi chingetia chiaye chisaregete ase ogosunyuntwa, gose ase okomiorigwa, gose ase okobutorwa, gose ase okonatwa, timobaisa koyerua ebe ekeng’wanso asende. Timokora igo ase ense yaino." 
Leviticus22:25 “Eng’iti ende yonsi ere buna echio moranyore korwa ase omomenyi, timobaisa koyerua ebe okoruegwa kw’endagera asende. Echio nigo chire nebimocho ase emebere yabo, na ase ebing’wanso buna ebio timogwancherwa.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus22:27 “Ekero emori, gose emanwa y’eng’ondi, gose ey’embori, yabiarirwe, etigwe ebe ase eng’ina ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, korende korwa ase rituko ria gatano na gatato yancherwe ebe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero asende." 
Leviticus22:28 Timobaisa konyenya eng’ombe amo nemori yaye ase rituko erimo, gose eng’ondi, gose embori amo ne chimanwa chiabo ase rituko erimo." 
Leviticus22:29 Ekero moganetie konduera inche Omonene ekeng’wanso ki’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, mokerue ase enchera endonge, erinde monyare gwancherwa." 
Leviticus22:30 Ekeng’wanso ekio keriegwe keere ase rituko erio erio, tigetigara nonya ngesinini goika rituko ria kabere. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Leviticus22:31 “Ase ayio mobwate amachiko aane na koyakora. Inche ninche Omonene," 
Leviticus22:32 Timobaisa korentera erieta riane obosooku, korende nincheneke ase Abaisraeli. Inche ninche Omonene, ninche nkobachena." 
Leviticus22:33 Ninche nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erinde imbe Nyasae oino. Inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia" 
Leviticus23:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Morarie Amatuko Amanene ay’Omonene, na mobe nemesangererekano yaatananirwe ase ogosasima." 
Leviticus23:3 Ase amatuko atano na rimo mokore emeremo yaino, korende ase rituko ria gatano na kabere n’Esabato, rituko ri’ogotimoka, rituko ri’omosangererekano bwatananirwe ase ogosasima. Timobaisa gokora meremo ende yonsi. Erio nerituko ri’Esabato ri’Omonene, aande onsi ase moramenye." 
Leviticus23:4 “Naende nareo Amatuko ande Amanene ay’Omonene, mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima, moyararie ase engaki yachikire." 
Leviticus23:5 “Rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, chinsa chia mogoroba, nario Epasaka y’Omonene." 
Leviticus23:6 Na ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi oyio ne Rituko Rinene ri’Omonene, rituko ri’Emegati etabekiri memera; inamorie emegati etabekiri memera ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus23:7 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima, na timobaisa gokora emeremo ya kera rituko," 
Leviticus23:8 korende namorue okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero ase Omonene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere namobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko.” 
Leviticus23:9 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus23:10 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Ekero moraike ase ense eria Omonene arabae, na mokogesa okwama kwaino, morente riboa ri’ogotongora kwe rigesa riaino ase omokuani." 
Leviticus23:11 Ase rituko rigotunyana eri’Esabato ere asungusie riboa erio ase obosio bwane, erio monyore ogwancherwa." 
Leviticus23:12 Ase rituko riria riboa erio rigosungusigwa inamorue boigo emanwa emingichi yakoorire omwaka oyomo, etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa asende." 
Leviticus23:13 Amo nekeng’wanso ekio morue obosie ebimunu bine bwochoganirie namaguta, bibe okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero ase Omonene, kore ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera. Amo nokwo morue edivai egetuba ekemo ebe okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa." 
Leviticus23:14 Timobaisa koria okwama okwo okoyia: Ebigara ebibese, gose ebikarangire, gose ebiaroisigwe emegati, ekero motararentera Nyasae oino okoruegwa kwaino kw’ogotongora. Ogochika okwo nigo koragenderere asemore ebiaare ase ebiaare, aande onsi ase moramenye." 
Leviticus23:15 “Mobare chichuma isano na ibere korwa ase rituko rigotunyana eri’Esabato, rituko riria mokorentera Omonene riboa ri’ogotongora rigosungusigwa." 
Leviticus23:16 Rituko ri’emerongo etano, nario rituko nyuma y’Esabato ya gatano na kabere, erio morentere Omonene okoruegwa konde kw’endagera enyia." 
Leviticus23:17 Korwa ase kera enka morente emegati ebere eroisirie korwa ase obosie obonuke ebimunu bine amo nememera erabe okoruegwa kw’endagera entang’ani y’okwama, kogosungusigwa ase Omonene." 
Leviticus23:18 Amo nokoruegwa okwo morente ching’ondi isano na ibere echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, na eeri ensae, ne chimingichi ibere, chionsi chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene, amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa okwo gochikire amo. Okwo nokoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero ase Omonene, kore ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera." 
Leviticus23:19 Naboigo morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, ne chimanwa ibere chie ching’ondi, chiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chibe ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe." 
Leviticus23:20 Erio omokuani asungusie omogati bw’ogotongora amo ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi echio ibere ase obosio bw’Omonene. Ebinto ebio biatananwe bibe ebichenu ase Omonene, bibe endagera y’omokuani." 
Leviticus23:21 Rituko erio goika morarie na mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima; timokora emeremo yaino ya kera rituko. Okwo nogochika koragenderere asemore ebiaare ase ebiaare, aande onsi ase moramenye." 
Leviticus23:22 “Ekero mokogesa emegondo yaino, timogesa moikie ase chingito kegima, gose timoirana gochora ebitigari ase emegondo yaino; eyio motigere abataka na abamenyi. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus23:24 “Batebie Abaisraeli ng’a rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere batimoke, batige emeremo kegima. Rituko erio naribe Rituko Rinene ri’Ekeinyorio, rirarigwe ase okobugigwa kw’ebiroria, babe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima." 
Leviticus23:25 Tibakora emeremo yabo ya kera rituko, nabanduere inche Omonene ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Leviticus23:27 “Rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi oyio o gatano na kabere, erio nario Rituko ri’Okobwatanigwa, mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima, na inwe inamobe mokweng’ata na gweitia, na mondetere inche Omonene ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero." 
Leviticus23:28 Ase rituko erio timokora emeremo ende yonsi; rituko erio nario Rituko ri’Okobwatanigwa ekero okobwatanigwa kogokorwa asemore, ase obosio bwane inche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus23:29 Omonto onde bwensi oteng’ate na gweitia ase rituko erio naatananwe korwa ase abanto baye. 
Leviticus23:30 Na monto onde bwensi orakore emeremo ende yonsi ase rituko erio, oyio inche Omonene nimosirie korwa ase abanto baye." 
Leviticus23:31 Timokora emeremo ende yonsi. Okwo nogochika koragenderere asemore, ebiaare ase ebiaare aande onsi ase moramenye." 
Leviticus23:32 Rituko erio naribe asemore rituko ri’Esabato, rituko ri’ogotimoka kegima, na inwe namweng’ate na gweitia. Ase rituko ria kianda ase omotienyi oyio, chinsa chia mogoroba, mochake korenda Esabato yaino, na mogenderere goika omogoroba onde.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Leviticus23:34 “Batebie Abaisraeli: Rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi oyio o gatano na kabere nario Rituko Rinene ri’ogochaka Amatuko Amanene ase Omonene. Amatuko ’Ebigutu agenderere ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. 
Leviticus23:35 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani timogokora emeremo ende yonsi ya kera rituko, korende nigo morabe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima." 
Leviticus23:36 Kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere namobe mokoruera Omonene ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero. Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima moruere Omonene ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero. Oyio nomosangererekano bw’engencho enene bwatananire ase ogosasima; timokora emeremo yaino ya kera rituko. 
Leviticus23:37 “Aya naro Amatuko Amanene ase Omonene; moyararie, mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Ase amatuko ayio momoruere Omonene ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero, na ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebing’wanso binde, na okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa, kera ekemo ase rituko riaye richikire." 
Leviticus23:38 Amatuko aya Amanene nigo amentirwe ase Chisabato chiane chia botambe, naende amentirwe ase ebiegwa biaino, na ase ebing’wanso bie chiira mwariete, na ebi’ogwancha, mokomoruera Omonene." 
Leviticus23:39 “Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere, ekero mwakoorire rigesa ri’emegondo yaino, namorende Amatuko Amanene atano na abere ase Omonene. Rituko rie ritang’ani naribe rituko ri’Esabato, rituko ri’ogotimoka kegima, naboigo nase rituko ria gatano na gatato." 
Leviticus23:40 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani namoimokie amatunda amaya korwa ase emete yaino emiya, ne chinsagia chi’emekendo, ne chinsagia chibwate amato amange, na echi’emete enga buna emesobeti, na inwe namobe nomochengo ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Leviticus23:41 Amatuko atano na abere ase kera omwaka morende Amatuko ayio Amanene ase Omonene. Okwo nogochika koragenderere botambe asemore, ebiaare ase ebiaare. Ase omotienyi o gatano na kabere namoyarende." 
Leviticus23:42 Abanto bonsi abare ababiare b’Abaisraeli nabamenye ase ebigutu ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. 
Leviticus23:43 Erio chinderia chiaino inachimanye ng’a Omonene nabamenyetie inwe Abaisraeli ase ebigutu ekero nabang’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Naboigo Musa akaba ogokwana n’Abaisraeli igoro y’Amatuko amanene ay’Omonene. 
Leviticus24:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa akamotebia," 
Leviticus24:2 “Chika Abaisraeli ng’a barente amaguta amaya amitire korwa ase amazeituni akobekwa ase chitaya, erinde chigenderere gwoka botambe." 
Leviticus24:3 Agwo isiko y’etoto eye ekengete chibao chirikire oborori chibekire ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano, Haroni abe okorenda chitaya korwa mogoroba goika mambia ase obosio bwane, incne Omonene. Okwo nogochika asemore koragenderere ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Leviticus24:4 Haroni arende chitaya echio chire ase ekebekerero gi’etahabu echenire, erinde chigenderere gwoka botambe ase obosio bwane inche Omonene." 
Leviticus24:5 “Aye goika oimokie obosie obonuke, oroisie emegati ikomi na ebere. Kera omogati oire obosie boisaine ebimunu bine." 
Leviticus24:6 Oroberie emegati eyio ase chindwaro ibere, etano nomo ase kera orwaro, igoro ase emesa eoomire netahabu echenire, agwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene." 
Leviticus24:7 Obeke ubani echenire ase kera orwaro ebe ekemanyererio, ne ribaga ri’emegati eyio ubani eyio eruegwe buna okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero asende inche Omonene." 
Leviticus24:8 Kera rituko ri’Esabato botambe emegati eroberigwe ase emesa igoro, agwo ase obosio bwane. Okwo nokoruegwa korwa ase Abaisraeli, nakobe okobwatana kw’ogotianania kwa botambe." 
Leviticus24:9 Emegati eyio nigo erabe eya Haroni amo nabamura baye, na barabwo nabayeriere aase achenire, ekiagera nemechenu mono, ebe egetari kiabo botambe gi’okoruegwa okwo kogosambwa nomorero asende.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Narenge omonto oyomo, ng’ina arenge Omoisraeli, na ise n’Omomisiri. Omonto oyio akagenda ase egetwori akomana nomonto onde Omoisraeli." 
Leviticus24:11 Omonto oria ng’ina arenge Omoisraeli akarama erieta ri’Omonene na koriragereria. Abanto bakamobwata, bakamorenta ase Musa. Ng’ina omonto oyio nigo arenge korokwa Selomiti, omosubati o Debiri bw’egesaku kia Dani." 
Leviticus24:12 Abanto bakamobeka echela, na bakaganya amang’ana korwa ase Omonene ng’a ninki omonto oyio agochia gokorerwa." 
Leviticus24:13 Na Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Leviticus24:14 “Mosokie isiko y’egetwori omonto oyio oragereretie Omonene, na abanto baria bonsi bamoigwete gakoragereria, babeke amaboko abo igoro ase omotwe oye, na omoganda bwonsi omoake amagena akwe." 
Leviticus24:15 Erio otebie Abaisraeli: Monto onde bwensi oraragererie Nyasae oye nabogorie ebibe biaye na anyore egesusuro. 
Leviticus24:16 Omonto orarame erieta ri’Omonene goika aitwe akwe; omoganda bwonsi omoake amagena. Karabe omomenyi gose omobiare, oyokorama Erieta ri’Omonene goika aitwe akwe." 
Leviticus24:17 “Omonto oraite omonto onde, nere goika aitwe akwe." 
Leviticus24:18 Omonto oraite engi’ti etugire goika nayeakane. Obogima boakanwe nobogima. 
Leviticus24:19 “Omonto karaake omonto onde asarie omobere oye, buna omonto oria akorera oyonde, nere naboigo arakorerwe." 
Leviticus24:20 Oyokobuna riuga ri’omonto onde, nere eriaye naribunwe; oyogwata eriso ri’omonto onde, nere eriaye nariaatwe; oyokogookora omonto onde erino, nere eriaye ndigookorwe; oyoraremarie omonto onde, nere goika aremarigwe." 
Leviticus24:21 Omonto oraite etugo goika nayeakane, na omonto oraite omonto onde, nere goika aitwe akwe." 
Leviticus24:22 Mobe ne richiko erimo rikogambera abanto bonsi, karabe omomenyi gose omobiare, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Nabo Musa agatebia Abaisraeli, na barabwo bagasokia isiko y’egetwori omonto oria oragereretie, bakamoaka amagena, bakamoita. Naboigo Abaisraeli bagakora buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa ase egetunwa gia Sinai, akamotebia," 
Leviticus25:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Ekero moraike ase ense eria Omonene arabae, ense eyio ebe n’Esabato ase Omonene, etimoke." 
Leviticus25:3 Namosimeke emegondo yaino na gochera emesabibu yaino, naende mogese okwama kw’emegondo y’ense eyio ase emiaka etano nomo." 
Leviticus25:4 Korende omwaka o gatano na kabere obe omwaka bw’ogotimoka; ense etimokigwe kegima ase Esabato y’Omonene. Ase omwaka oyio timosimeka kende ase emegondo yaino, gose gochera emesabibu yaino." 
Leviticus25:5 Timobaisa kogesa echikwemeria korwa ase chimbusuro chiagwete, gose timosangereria amasabibu ’emesabibu etacheretwe. Oyio nigo orabe omwaka bw’ogotimoka kegima gw’ense eyio." 
Leviticus25:6 Echio chiremerie ase omwaka bw’ogotimoka gw’ense eria, nachio chirabe chindagera chibaisaine, aye omonyene, na abasomba bao, abamura na abaiseke, na omokori emeremo oo orikire, na omomenyi omenyete bwoo." 
Leviticus25:7 Boigo ching’iti chitugire, ne ching’iti chi’orosana chire ase ense eyio nachirie okwama okwo kwemeretie." 
Leviticus25:8 “Mobare chichuma isano na ibere ara gatano na kabere. (Kera echuma eyemo ebe ey’engaki y’omwaka omogima.) Naboigo engaki eyio ebe ey’emiaka emerongo ene, na kianda." 
Leviticus25:9 Erio ase rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere, Rituko ri’Okobwatanigwa, egetureri kebugigwe ase ense yaino yonsi." 
Leviticus25:10 Mwatanane omwaka oyio bw’emerongo etano, moyochene. Morarie obosibore ase abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense yaino. Omwaka oyio nobe omwaka bw’Omochengo asemore. Kera omonto ore asemore airanigwe ase omwando oye, na kera oyomo ase eamate yaye." 
Leviticus25:11 Omwaka oyo bw’emerongo etano nobe oyio bw’Omochengo asemore. Ase omwaka oyio timobusura kende, gose kogesa echiemeretie korwa ase chimbusuro chiagwete inse, gose timosangereria amasabibu korwa emesabibu etacheretwe." 
Leviticus25:12 Omwaka oyio noyo bw’Omochengo. Nobe omochenu asemore. Inamorie chindagera chiemeretie chinyene korwa ase riroba. 
Leviticus25:13 “Ase Omwaka oyio bw’Omochengo kera omonto airanigwe ase omwando oye. 
Leviticus25:14 Ase igo onye gokooneria omonto onde gento kende gionsi, gose kogora korwa asare, timobaisa gokorerana oborianania." 
Leviticus25:15 Koragore omogondo korwa ase omonto onde oakane omonto oria koreng’ana nemiaka eyio etigarete aragese ekero Omwaka bw’Omochengo otaraika. 
Leviticus25:16 Onye emiaka ere emenge, nomente rigori, onye ere emeke, norikeeyie, ekiagera egento ekio agokooneria nomobaro bw’okwama kw’omogondo." 
Leviticus25:17 Timobaisa gokorerana oborianania, korende moiroke Nyasae oino, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus25:18 “Ase ayio, mobwate amachiko aane na koyakora, na mobwatie emeroberio yane echikire; erio nario moramenye ase ense na mobe nobotoereru." 
Leviticus25:19 Ense eria iyame okwama kwaye, na inwe monyore endagera mokoria na koigota, naende momenye ase obotoereru." 
Leviticus25:20 Namoisa koboria: Ninki torarie ase omwaka o gatano na kabere, onye titogosimeka gose gosangereria okwama?" 
Leviticus25:21 Momanye ng’a ninche Omonene ndasesenie ense yaino ase omwaka o gatano na rimo, erinde yaame endagera eraisane ase engaki y’emiaka etato." 
Leviticus25:22 Ekero morabusure chindagera ase emegondo yaino ase omwaka o gatano na gatato mogenderere koria endagera eria enkoro, goika endagera y’omwaka o kianda egeswe." 
Leviticus25:23 “Ense tekoonigwa ebe egenderere koba ey’oyio oyegora, ekiagera ense neyane; inwe nigo more abamenyi momenyete asende." 
Leviticus25:24 “Ase ense eyio yonsi moranyore ebe eyaino, ekero amaremo araoonigwe, namotige ribaga ri’okoyabooria naende." 
Leviticus25:25 Onye oyomino obeire omotaka na aoonie ensemo y’omwando oye, omoamate omwabo ore ang’e namoboorerie ensemo eyio konya aoonirie." 
Leviticus25:26 Omonto oria otabwati omonto omwabo oranyare komobooreria eria aoonetie, korende ere omonyene aise konyora enibo eisaine kobooria omwando oye," 
Leviticus25:27 rirorio omonyene oyio aboorie omwando oye, na abare emiaka gochakera engaki eria ayoonetie, erio aakane omonto oria onde korwa ekero keria goika ase omwaka bw’omochengo. Erio airanerigwe omwando oye." 
Leviticus25:28 Korende onye omonyene oria tabwati enibo eisaine akobooria omwando oye, nabo omwando oyio oratigare ase okoboko kw’omonto oria oyogorete goika Omwaka bw’Omochengo. Korende ase omwaka oria omwando oyio noiranigwe, na ere omonyene airane ase omwando oye." 
Leviticus25:29 “Onye omonto okoonia enyomba ere ime ase omochie ogiteire orwaki, nanyare koyebooria goika ase engaki y’omwaka oyomo korwa ekero ayeoonetie. Ase engaki y’omwaka oyomo omogima nabe ne ribaga ri’okoyebooria." 
Leviticus25:30 Onye enyomba eria tekoboorigwa ase engaki eria y’omwaka omogima, rirorio enyomba eria nigo erabe ey’omonto oria oyegorete, amo ney’ororeria rwaye kogenderera botambe. Enyomba eria tekoiranigwa ase omonyene ekero Omwaka bw’Omochengo oraike." 
Leviticus25:31 Korende chinyomba chire ase ebichie bitagiteiri chindwaki, nachibarwe koba echi’emegondo y’ense eria; nabo chiranyare koboorigwa na koiranigwa ase abanyene ekero Omwaka bw’Omochengo oraike." 
Leviticus25:32 Korende nonya naboigo, abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi mbare ne ribaga kobooria chinyomba chi’emechie ere emiando yabo engaki ende yonsi." 
Leviticus25:33 Onye omonto Omolawi takobooria enyomba aoonetie ere ime ase omochie ore omwando oye, enyomba eyio neiranigwe ase Omwaka bw’Omochengo, ekiagera chinyomba chire ime ase emechie y’Abalawi nigo chire omwando obo ase egati y’Abaisraeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Korende ebitii bi’oborisia bietanaine emechie yabo tibikoonigwa, ekiagera ebio nebiabo kogenderera botambe." 
Leviticus25:35 “Onye oyomino obeire omotaka ere takonyara gwetenenera ere omonyene, aye nomoe ebio aremeire, abeere bwoo buna omomenyi, gose buna omorikwa." 
Leviticus25:36 Tobaisa kwenyorera ebitoki, gose okomentekana konde korwa asare, korende aye omoiroke Nyasae oo, na otige omonto oyio omino amenye bwoo." 
Leviticus25:37 Ekero oramoe chibesa chia singo, tobaisa komosaba ebitoki korwa asare." 
Leviticus25:38 Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erinde mbae ense ya Kanani, na inche imbe Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus25:39 “Onye oyomino omenyete bwoo obeire omotaka, ere eoonie omonyene asore, tobaisa komokoria emeremo buna omosomba." 
Leviticus25:40 Nabeere asore buna omonto orikire, na buna omomenyi oo, abe okogokorera goika ekero Omwaka bw’Omochengo oraike." 
Leviticus25:41 Erio arue bwoo, ere amo nabana baye, airane gochia ase eamate yaye na amenye ase omwando bwe chisokoro chiaye." 
Leviticus25:42 Abwo nabanto bagonkorera, ninche nabarusetie ase ense ya Misiri. Abwo tibakoonigwa buna abasomba." 
Leviticus25:43 Tobaisa kobagambera nobotindi, korende aye omoiroke Nyasae oo." 
Leviticus25:44 Onye koganetie abasomba, abamura gose abaiseke, nabo oranyare kobagora korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku bibaetanaine inwe." 
Leviticus25:45 Nabo oranyare kogora abana b’abamenyi baria bamenyete asemore, abana babo baria baiboreire ase ense yaino babe abaino." 
Leviticus25:46 Monyare gotiga abasomba abwo ase abana baino barache nyuma yaino, babe omwando obo bakobakorera kogenderera botambe. Abwo mbanyare koba abasomba baino. Korende abanto bamino Abaisraeli, timobagambera nobotindi." 
Leviticus25:47 “Onye omomenyi, gose omonto orikire omenyete bwoo, obeire omonda, na omonto omino bw’Abaisraeli obeire omotaka, eoonie ere omonyene ase omomenyi oria ore bwoo, gose ase monto onde bwensi bw’eamate y’abamenyi;" 
Leviticus25:48 nyuma yaye omonto oyio nabo aranyare koboorigwa. Omonto omwabo nabo aramoboorie," 
Leviticus25:49 gose ise moke, gose omwana o ise moke, gose omoamate omwabo ore ang’e, gose ere omonyene karabe nenibo, nabo areboorie ere omonyene." 
Leviticus25:50 Ere amo noria omogorete babare emiaka gochakera korwa ekero eoonetie goika ekero ki’Omwaka bw’Omochengo oraike, erio bakore rigori ri’okoboorigwa kwaye, koreng’ana nemiaka eyio na koreng’ana neng’eria y’omonto orikire." 
Leviticus25:51 Onye emiaka emenge etigarete goika Omwaka bw’Omochengo oike, goika airanie ang’e bionsi ebi aetwe ekero eoonetie." 
Leviticus25:52 Korende onye emiaka etigarete nemeke, rirorio aakane ase emiaka eyio yoka ase okwebooria." 
Leviticus25:53 Omonene oye amokorere buna akomokorera omonto orikire ase okomokorera emeremo omwaka ase omwaka. Aye goika origererie orore ng’a onde tari okomogambera ase obotindi. 
Leviticus25:54 Onye takoboorigwa ase enchera eyemo y’echio, rirorio ere na abana baye batigwe babe abasibore ase Omwaka bw’Omochengo." 
Leviticus25:55 Abaisraeli nabasomba baane, ee, barabwo nabasomba baane aba narusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Leviticus26:1 Naende Omonene agakwana, “Timobaisa kweroiseria emegwekano mochie gosasima, gose gotenenia ase ense yaino emegwekano, gose chisiiro, gose rigena ribachire rire nemegwekano, ase okobisasima, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Leviticus26:2 Morende Chisabato chiane na mosike Obomenyo bwane Obochenu. Inche ninche Omonene. 
Leviticus26:3 “Komorabwatie aya nachikire, na kobwata amachiko aane na koyakora," 
Leviticus26:4 erio nimbatwerie embura ase engaki egwenerete, na ense inayaame endagera, na emete y’emegondo yaame amatunda." 
Leviticus26:5 Okwama kwaino nakobe okonene, na mogenderere koora goika engaki y’ogotora amasabibu eike, na mogenderere gotora amasabibu goika engaki y’ogosimeka eike; na inwe namonyore endagera enyinge, naende momenye ase ense yaino ase obotoereru." 
Leviticus26:6 “Nindete omorembe ase ense yaino, na inwe namorare motari kwoboa monto onde bwensi. Nindusie ching’iti chi’orosana chirueo, ne chisegi tichikobao." 
Leviticus26:7 Namoserie ababisa baino, nababugwe ase amasio aino, baitwe nemioro." 
Leviticus26:8 Abanto baino batano nababue abanto rigana erimo, na abanto baino rigana erimo nababue abanto chilifu ikomi; ababisa baino nababugwe ase amasio aino, baitwe nemioro." 
Leviticus26:9 Nimbasesenie moibore abana abange, momenteke. Ninkore okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania kogenderera koba nainwe." 
Leviticus26:10 Namogenderere koria endagera enkoro ere enyinge ase ebiage, na ekiagera ere enyinge mono namoyerusie aroro, erinde monyore ribaga mobeke enyia." 
Leviticus26:11 Nimenye ase egati yaino ase Obomenyo bwane Obochenu; tinkobatiga nonya ng’ake. 
Leviticus26:12 Nintaare amo nainwe; inche nimbe Nyasae oino, na inwe mobe abanto baane." 
Leviticus26:13 Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erinde timobaisa koba abasomba aroro; inche nasaretie chinguru chi’Abamisiri, nkabuna amakorogoto barabwo babegete ase amareko aino, nkabatiga mokaruao mogwesigoria." 
Leviticus26:14 “Korende onye timokonyigwera gose kobwata amachiko aya onsi," 
Leviticus26:15 na onye timokobwatia aya nachikire, naende komoraange emeroberio yane echikire, na timokora amachiko aane onsi, korende mobe mogosaria okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania," 
Leviticus26:16 rirorio nainche nimbakorere amang’ana aya: Nimbarentere omoondoko mobosokano, na oborwaire bw’okoria emebere, na obw’ogosaria amaiso, na obw’ogokoora obogima. Namobusure chindagera, korende timokonyora gento, ekiagera ababisa baino nabwo barachirie." 
Leviticus26:17 Nimbe mamincha yaino, na inwe namobugwe nababisa baino. Abanto babagechete nabwo barabagambere, na inwe namobugwe nababisa baino. Abanto babagechete nabwo barabagambere, na inwe mobe mogotama nonya monto onde tari okobabwatia." 
Leviticus26:18 “Amang’ana aya onsi karabe abanyorire, na inwe mogenderere kwanga konyingwera, erio nario ndabae egesusuro ara gatano na kabere ase engencho y’ebibe biaino." 
Leviticus26:19 Ninsarie chinguru chi’oboenenu, ninkore igoro oome pa, abe buna ekioma, embura tetwa, ne riroba ri’ense yaino rioome pa, ribe buna etaai." 
Leviticus26:20 Emeremo yaino emekong’u morabe mogokora, nigo erabe bosa, ekiagera ense yaino tekwama endagera, na emete tekwama amatunda." 
Leviticus26:21 “Onye naende mokogenderera koba mamincha yane na kwanga konyigwera, nindete amaakwa amange asemore, ara gatano na kabere, buna ebibe biaino biragwenere." 
Leviticus26:22 Nimbatomere ching’iti chintindi chi’orosana chiite abana baino, ne chitugo chiaino, chibakeyie mobe abake goika chinchera chiaino chibe bosa." 
Leviticus26:23 “Komorabe mwanyorire egesusuro ekio gionsi timong’iranera, korende mogenderere koba maminche yane," 
Leviticus26:24 rirorio boigo nimbe mamincha yaino, erio inche omonyene imbae egesusuro ara gatano na kabere buna ebibe biaino biragwenere." 
Leviticus26:25 Nindete esegi asemore, inyeruserie egesiomba, ekiagera mwasaririe okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania. Komorabe mogosangererekana ase emechie yaino korigia obotamero, nimbatomere amarwaire amabe abaite, goika mobekwe ase amaboko ’ababisa baino." 
Leviticus26:26 Ninkeyie chindagera chiaino chibe chinke; abakungu ikomi barugere eriko erimo, na barabwo babarengere endagera ensinini, na inwe namoyerie, korende timokoigota." 
Leviticus26:27 “Komorabe mwanyorire emechando eye yonsi, na mogenderere kwanga konyigwera na koba mamincha yane," 
Leviticus26:28 erio nario naende ndabae egususuro ara gatano na kabere ase engencho y’ebibe biaino. 
Leviticus26:29 Enchara nebe enene mono goika morie emebere y’abana baino, abamura na abaiseke." 
Leviticus26:30 Ninsarie obotunwa bwaino ase mogosasimera, nintagore ebisasimero biaino ase mogosambera amanukato, erio intugute emebere yaino ekwete igoro y’emegwekano yaino mogosasima etari moyo. Inche nimbaange kegima." 
Leviticus26:31 Nintagore emechie yaino ebe amatombe, ninsarie kegima aase aino ase mogosasimera; tingwanchera ebing’wanso biaino, ebio tibikoba rimisu rikongwenera." 
Leviticus26:32 Ninsarie nsarie ense yaino kegima goika ababisa baino bache komenya imeo bakumie buna esaregete. 
Leviticus26:33 Nimbaserebanie mogende komenya ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, nimbatunyanerie esegi, naende ninsarie ense yaino ebe bosa, na emechie ebe amatongo." 
Leviticus26:34 Ekero mokare ase ense y’ababisa baino, na ense yaino negendererete koba amatongo, ero negokere engaki y’ogotimoka okwo inwe mwayetangete." 
Leviticus26:35 Ekero ense eria egendererete koba amatongo netimoke ogotimoka okwo motayeete ekero mwamenyeteo. 
Leviticus26:36 “Nimbatige inwe, abwo moratigare ase ense y’ababisa baino mobe nobwoba ase chinkoro chiaino ime, goika eriogi rie rito ri’omote rikonyegerigwa nembeo naribagose motame; ee, namotame buna omonto ogotama kagoserigwa korwa ase esegi, namogwe nonya onde tari kobabwatia." 
Leviticus26:37 Namogochane buna abanto bagotama korwa ase esegi, nonya monto onde tari kobabwatia. Timokonyara koba ne chinguru chi’okorwania ababisa baino." 
Leviticus26:38 Namokwe mosirere ase ense y’ababisa baino, na ense yabo nebamere kegima." 
Leviticus26:39 Baria bare abake asemore baratigare bare moyo agwo ase ense y’ababisa baino nabasirere aroro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo, naboigo nase engencho y’ebibe bie chisokoro chiabo nabasire buna chisokoro chiabo chiasirete." 
Leviticus26:40 “Erio abwo baratigare goika baorokie ebibe biabo, naende baorokie ebie chisokoro chiabo, abwo batabete abegenwa asende, na ekiagera baangete konyigwera," 
Leviticus26:41 bakagera nkaba nendamwamu asebare goika nkabaira ase ense y’ababisa babo. Onye chinkoro chiabo echio chire chinkong’u chigwekeyia, na barabwo banche konyora egesusuro ki’ebibe biabo," 
Leviticus26:42 erio nario ndainyore okobwatana kwane k’wogotianania okwo nakorete na Yakobo, na Isaka, na Ibrahimu, naende ning’inyore ense eria nabaete." 
Leviticus26:43 Ense eria netigwe nabarabwo, erinde egokere engaki y’ogotimoka kwaye ekero etari nabanto. Abanto abwo nabanyore egesusuro, ekiagera bangete kobwata amachiko aane, na bakaanga kobwatia emeroberio yane nachigete." 
Leviticus26:44 Korende nonya nabo ase engaki eyio ekero bagendererete komenya ase ense eria y’ababisa babo, inche tinkobaanga gose kobatiga, na tinkobaseria. Tingotiga okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania nakorete nabarabwo, ekiagera ninche Omonene, Nyasae obo." 
Leviticus26:45 Ase engencho yabo ning’inyore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete ne chisokoro chiabo, echio narusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri ase obosio bw’abanto b’ebisaku, erinde imbe Nyasae obo. Inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Eyio nero emeroberio echikire amo namachiko Omonene aruete goetera ase omonwa o Musa, agwo ase egetunwa gia Sinai, ebe ase egati yaye na Abaisraeli." 
Leviticus27:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa akamotebia," 
Leviticus27:2 “Otebie Abaisraeli: Onye eira yarietwe ng’a omonto aruegwe ase ogokorera Omonene, na omonto oyio karaboorigwe arueo, goika akorerwe rigori buna iga:" 
Leviticus27:3 Rigori ri’omonto omosacha bw’emiaka emerongo ebere goika emerongo etano nomo, nigo rirabe chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etano, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli egokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Leviticus27:4 Onye nomokungu nigo rirabe chisekeli emerongo etato. 
Leviticus27:5 Onye nomonto omoke bw’emiaka etano goika emerongo ebere, rigori riaye nigo rirabe, ase omomura chisekeli emerongo ebere, na ase omoiseke chisekeli ikomi." 
Leviticus27:6 Onye nomwana bw’omotienyi oyomo goika emiaka etano, rigori riaye nigo rirabe, ase omomura chisekeli isano, na ase omoiseke chisekeli isato." 
Leviticus27:7 Onye nomonto omogotu bw’emiaka emerongo etano nomo na goetania, rigori riaye nigo rirabe, ase omogaaka chisekeli ikomi na isano, na ase omong’ina chisekeli ikomi." 
Leviticus27:8 “Onye omonto oria orieretwe eira nigo are omotaka mono otanyare goakana rigori riria riabekirwe, rirorio omonto oria nigo ararentwe ase omokuani, nere amokorere rigori koreng’ana nokonyara kw’omonto oyio oriete eira." 
Leviticus27:9 “Onye eira y’omonto oria ariete nigoro y’eng’iti yancheire nainche Omonene ebe ekeng’wanso, ekeegwa buna ekio asende nakebe egechenu." 
Leviticus27:10 Omonto oria takoba ne ribaga koonchoreria eng’iti eria arente eng’iti eng’ao, takoonchoreria eng’iti engiya arente eyere embe, gose eng’iti embe arente eyere engiya. Onye omonto okoonchoreria ching’iti, erio chionsi ibere nachibe chiatananirwe asende." 
Leviticus27:11 Kerabe eng’iti etachenegeti ebe ekeng’wanso ase Omonene, omonto oria ayerente ase omokuani," 
Leviticus27:12 na ere akore rigori ri’eng’iti eria koreng’ana buna ere engiya gose embe. Rigori omokuani arakore, nario erio rirabe." 
Leviticus27:13 Korende onye omonto omonyene oganetie kobooria eng’iti eria, rirorio aakane rigori riria ribekire, na amente eyemo ya isano ase rigori erio." 
Leviticus27:14 “Ekero omonto agwatanana enyomba yaye ebe enchenu ase Omonene, omokuani akore rigori ri’enyomba eria, buna ere engiya gose embe; buna omokuani arakore rigori ri’enyomba eria, nario erio rirabe." 
Leviticus27:15 Onye omonto oria bwatananete enyomba eria aganetie koyebooria ebe eyaye naende, rirorio aakane rigori riria ribekire, na amente eyemo ya isano ase rigori erio; ase igo etigare ebe eyaye." 
Leviticus27:16 “Onye omonto ogwatanana ensemo y’oboremo bw’omwando oye, erio aye oyekorere rigori koreng’ana nekerengo gie chimbusuro chikobusurwa aroro, chimbusuro chi’esairi ebitonga ikomi chiakanwe chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etano." 
Leviticus27:17 Omonto karaatanane oboremo bwaye korwa ase engaki y’Omwaka bw’Omochengo, rigori erio nario rirabe buna aye kwarikora." 
Leviticus27:18 Korende omonto karaatanane omogondo oye nyuma y’Omwaka bw’Omochengo, erio omokuani akore rigori rie chibesa koreng’ana nemiaka yatigaire goika Omwaka onde bw’Omochengo, na igo nakeyie rigori." 
Leviticus27:19 Omonto oria oraatanane oboremo bwaye asende, onye oganetie kobobooria, aakane rigori riria ribekire, naende amente ensemo ya isano ase rigori erio, na oboremo botigare koba obwaye." 
Leviticus27:20 Onye omonto oria taganeti kobooria oboremo boria, korende aboonerie omonto omoao, rirorio oboremo obwo tibokoboorigwa nonya ng’ake." 
Leviticus27:21 Korende ekero oboremo boria bogochia gotigwa ase engaki y’Omwaka bw’Omochengo, bobe obwatananirwe ase Omonene. Nigo borabe obw’omokuani." 
Leviticus27:22 “Omonto karaatanane ase Omonene oboremo agorete, obwo botari ensemo y’omwando oye," 
Leviticus27:23 omokuani akore rigori ri’oboremo boria koreng’ana nemiaka etigarete goika Omwaka bw’Omochengo. Ase rituko riria kegima omonto oria aakane rigori riria ribekire, ne chibesa echi chibe chiatananirwe ase Omonene." 
Leviticus27:24 Ase Omwaka oria bw’Omochengo oboremo boria boiranerigwe omonyene oria oboonetie, oyio oboremo bwarenge ensemo y’omwando oye." 
Leviticus27:25 “Kera rigori rikobekwa nigo rirareng’anigwe nekerengo gi’esekeli eyio egokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. (Esekeli eyemo nechigera emerongo ebere.) 
Leviticus27:26 “Korende chitugo chintangi nechiane, ase igo onde tachiatanana, kerabe eng’ombe gose eng’ondi, gose embori; eng’iti entangi nigo ere eyane."
