Leviticus27:27 Korende onye eng’iti eria entangi techenegeti, rirorio omonto oria ayeboorie koreng’ana ne rigori rirabekwe, naende amente ensemo ya isano ase rigori erio, gose onye tekoboorigwa rirorio eoonigwe ase rigori erabekerwe." 
Leviticus27:28 “Korende gento kende gionsi omonto aatananire ase Omonene ase enchera gete kebe ekiaye kegima, kerabe omonto, gose eng’iti gose oboremo bw’omwando oye, egento ekio tikebaisa koonigwa gose koboorigwa. Kera egento giatananirwe nigo kere egechenu mono ase Omonene." 
Leviticus27:29 Omonto onde bwensi bwatananirwe ase ogosirigwa takonyara koboorigwa; omonto oyio goika aitwe akwe. 
Leviticus27:30 “Ensemo ya ikomi y’okwama kwa mogondo, kerabe endagera gose amatunda, ebio nebi’Omonene, ebio nebichenu ase Omonene." 
Leviticus27:31 Onye omonto oganetie kobooria ensemo yaye ya ikomi, nigo aramente eyemo ya isano ase rigori riaye." 
Leviticus27:32 Boigo eyemo ya ikomi y’amaicho e chiombe, gose ching’ondi, gose chimbori, engencho yaye kera eng’iti ya ikomi ye ching’iti chigoeta inse ase enyimbo y’omorisia, nebe enchenu ase Omonene." 
Leviticus27:33 Omonyene eng’iti eria takoriga‐rigereria, onye ere engiya gose embe, na takoyeonchoreria. Onye omonto okoonchoreria ching’iti echio, erio chionsi ibere nchibe chinchenu, tichikoboorigwa.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Aya naro amachiko Omonene achigete Abaisraeli goetera ase Musa agwo ase egetunwa gia Sinai. 
Numbers1:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o kabere bw’omwaka o kabere nyuma Abaisraeli kobarure ase ense ya Misiri, Omonene agakwana na Musa ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano, agwo ase erooro ya Sinai, akamotebia," 
Numbers1:2 “Kora omobaro bw’omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba. Orike amarieta ’abanto bonsi abasacha, omonto ase omonto." 
Numbers1:3 Aye amo na Haroni mobare abanto abakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, baria baranyare korwana esegi, mobaroberie ase esegi, ekeombe ase ekeombe." 
Numbers1:4 Naende mochore korwa ase kera egesaku omonto oyomo ore omoteneneri obo. Barabwo babe amo nainwe ase okobakonya. 
Numbers1:5 Amarieta ’abanto abwo naro aya: Korwa ase egesaku kia Reuben, Elisuri, mosinto o Sedeuri." 
Numbers1:6 Korwa ase egesaku gia Simeoni, Selumieli, mosinto o Surisadai." 
Numbers1:7 Korwa ase egesaku kia Yuda, Nahasoni, mosinto bw’Aminadabu." 
Numbers1:8 Korwa ase egesaku gia Isakaru, Netaneli, mosinto o Suari." 
Numbers1:9 Korwa ase egesaku gia Sabuloni, Eliabu, mosinto o Heloni." 
Numbers1:10 Korwa ase basinto ba Yusufu: ase egesaku gi’Efraimu, Elisama, mosinto bw’Amihudi, na ase egesaku kia Manase, Gamalieli, mosinto o Pedasuri." 
Numbers1:11 Korwa ase egesaku kia Benjamin, Abidani, mosinto o Gidioni." 
Numbers1:12 Korwa ase egesaku kia Dani, Ahieseri, mosinto bw’Amisadai." 
Numbers1:13 Korwa ase egesaku gi’Aseri, Pagieli, mosinto bw’Okirani." 
Numbers1:14 Korwa ase egesaku kia Gadi, Eliasafu, mosinto o Deueli." 
Numbers1:15 Korwa ase egesaku kia Nafutali, Ahira, mosinto bw’Enani.”" 
Numbers1:16 Abanto aba nabwo barenge abateneneri ase ebisaku ebio biabo, naende abatang’ani be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, bachoretwe korwa ase omoganda bwonsi." 
Numbers1:17 Musa na Haroni bakaira abanto abwo baatoretwe ase amarieta abo," 
Numbers1:18 na ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o kabere bagasangereria omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto amo. Bakarika amarieta ’abanto abwo konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba, na omonto ase omonto." 
Numbers1:19 Musa akabara abanto abwo na kobarika, agwo ase erooro ya Sinai, buna Omonene konya amochikire." 
Numbers1:20 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Reuben, omotangi o Israeli, bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:21 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na isano nemo, na amagana atano (46,500)." 
Numbers1:22 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Simeoni bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:23 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na kianda, na amagana atato (59,300)." 
Numbers1:24 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Gadi bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:25 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na isano, na amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano (45,650)." 
Numbers1:26 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Yuda bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:27 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na ebere na inye, na amagana atano na rimo (74,600)." 
Numbers1:28 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Isakaru bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:29 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na inye, na amagana ane (54,400)." 
Numbers1:30 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Sabuloni bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:31 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na isano na ibere, na amagana ane (57,400)." 
Numbers1:32 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Yusufu, narwo orw’Efraimu, bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:33 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene, na amagana atano (40,500)." 
Numbers1:34 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Manase bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:35 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etato na ibere, na amagana abere (32,200)." 
Numbers1:36 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Benjamin bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:37 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etato na isano, na amagana ane (35,400)." 
Numbers1:38 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Dani bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:39 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano nomo na ibere, na amagana atano na abere (62,700)." 
Numbers1:40 Abanto b’ororeria rw’Aseri bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:41 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na eyemo, na amagana atano (41,500)." 
Numbers1:42 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Nafutali bakarikwa, omonto ase omonto, ase chiamate chiabo ne chinyomba chiabo. Abanto bonsi abasacha, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:43 nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na isato, na amagana ane (53,400)." 
Numbers1:44 Aba nabwo barigetwe na Musa, na Haroni, na abatang’ani b’Abaisraeli ikomi na babere, abatenenerete kera oyomo egesaku kiaye." 
Numbers1:45 Abaisraeli bonsi abarigetwe, enyomba ase enyomba, baria konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, naende baare konyara korwana esegi," 
Numbers1:46 nigo barenge chilifu amagana atano na rimo na isato, na amagana atano, na emerongo etano (603,550)." 
Numbers1:47 Korende abanto b’ororeria rwa Lawi, barabwo tibabaretwe amo nabanto abwo bande," 
Numbers1:48 ekiagera Omonene nigo atebetie Musa," 
Numbers1:49 “Abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi tobabara amo n’Abaisraeli bande. 
Numbers1:50 Obeke Abalawi babe bakorenda Obomenyo Obochenu obwo bore noborori, naende babe bakorenda ebinto bire ase Obomenyo boria ime, na ebikorero biaye. Nababe bakobobogoria amo nebinto biaye bionsi, na gokora emeremo imeo. Barabwo nigo baratenenie chiema chiabo chi’okomenya chietanane Obomenyo obwo." 
Numbers1:51 Ekero Obomenyo obwo borabe bokong’anyigwa, Abalawi nabwo barabosimore, na ekero borabe bogotenenigwa naende, nabwo barabotenenie aase agwo. Omonto onde bwensi otachikiri aise goika ang’e n’Obomenyo obwo goika aitwe akwe." 
Numbers1:52 Abaisraeli bande nabatenenie chiema chiabo, kera egesaku ase egetwori kiaye, na kera omonto abeere inse y’ebendera yaye, ase ekeombe kiaye." 
Numbers1:53 Korende Abalawi nigo baratenenie chiema chiabo chietanane Obomenyo obwo bore noborori, na komenyao, erinde endamwamu yane etangwe tebaisa kogwera omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli. Abalawi barende Obomenyo obwo bore noborori.”" 
Numbers1:54 Abaisraeli bagakora onsi buna Omonene abachigete goetera ase Musa. 
Numbers2:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Numbers2:2 “Ekero Abaisraeli baratoore, kera omonto abe inse y’ebendera y’ekeombe kiaye, na inse y’ekemanyererio ki’eamate yaye; batoore baetanane Eema y’Omosangererekano, ne chiema chi’abanto chirigererie Eema eria." 
Numbers2:3 “Abanto abaratoore ensemo ya moocha n’Abayuda, inse y’ebendera y’ekeombe kiabo. Nahasoni, mosinto bw’Aminadabu, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:4 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etano na ebere na inye, na amagana atano na rimo (74,600)." 
Numbers2:5 Abaratoore ang’e nabarabwo n’Abaisakaru. Netaneli, mosinto o Suari, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:6 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etano na inye, na amagana ane (54,400)." 
Numbers2:7 Naende abaratoore ensemo yabo n’Abasabuloni. Eliabu, mosinto o Heloni, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:8 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etano na isano na ibere, na amagana ane (57,400)." 
Numbers2:9 Abanto bonsi barikire, abare b’egetwori ki’Abayuda, ase ebiombe biabo, nigo bare chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na etato na isano nemo, na amagana ane (186,400). Aba nabwo barabe bagotang’ana komanora kogenda orogendo." 
Numbers2:10 “Abanto abaratoore ensemo ya irianyi n’Abareuben, inse y’ebendera y’ekeombe kiabo. Elisuri, mosinto o Sedeuri, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:11 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo ene na isano nemo, na amagana atano (46,500)." 
Numbers2:12 Abaratoore ang’e nabarabwo n’Abasimeoni. Selumieli, mosinto o Surisadai, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:13 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etano na kianda, na amagana atato (59,300)." 
Numbers2:14 Naende abaratoore ensemo yabo n’Abagadi. Eliasafu, mosinto o Reueli, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:15 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo ene na isano, na amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano (45,650)." 
Numbers2:16 Abanto bonsi barikire, abare b’egetwori kia Reuben, ase ebiombe biabo, nigo bare chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na eyemo, na amagana ane, na emerongo etano (151,450). Aba nabwo barabe aba kabere komanora kogenda orogendo." 
Numbers2:17 “Ekero abanto barabe bakogenda orogendo, Eema y’Omosangererekano nebe ekobogorigwa n’Abalawi, na barabwo babe gati‐gati y’ebiombe binde. Ase omoroberio oyo abanto mbabe bagotoora, naboigo barabe kobakogenda orogendo. Kera omonto abe ensemo yaye inse y’ebendera yaye." 
Numbers2:18 “Abanto abaratoore ensemo ya bosongo n’Abaefraimu, inse y’ebendera y’ekeombe kiabo. Elisama, mosinto bw’Amihudi, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:19 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo ene, na amagana atano (40,500)." 
Numbers2:20 Abaratoore ang’e nabarabwo n’Abamanase. Gamalieli, mosinto o Pedasuri, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:21 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etato na ibere, na amagana abere (32,200)." 
Numbers2:22 Naende abaratoore ensemo yabo n’Ababenjamin. Abidani, mosinto o Gidioni, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:23 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etato na isano, na amagana ane (35,400)." 
Numbers2:24 Abanto bonsi barikire, abare b’egetwori gi’Efraimu, ase ebiombe biabo, nigo bare chilifu rigana erimo na isano na isato, ne rigana erimo (108,100). Aba nabwo barabe aba gatato komanora kogenda orogendo." 
Numbers2:25 “Abanto abaratoore ensemo ya sugusu n’Abadani, inse y’ebendera y’ekeombe kiabo. Ahieseri, mosinto bw’Amisadai, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:26 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etano nomo na ibere, na amagana atano na abere (62,700)." 
Numbers2:27 Abaratoore ang’e nabarabwo n’Abaaseri. Pagieli, mosinto bw’okirani, nere orabe omotang’ani abo," 
Numbers2:28 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo ene na eyemo, na amagana atano (41,500)." 
Numbers2:29 Naende abaratoore ensemo yabo n’Abanafutali. Ahira, mosinto bw’Enani, nere orabe omotang’ani obo," 
Numbers2:30 na omoganda oye nigo ore nabanto chilifu emerongo etano na isato, na amagana ane (53,400)." 
Numbers2:31 Abanto bonsi barikire, abare b’egetwori kia Dani, ase ebiombe biabo, nigo bare chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na isano na ibere, na amagana atano na rimo (157,600). Aba nabwo barabe aba nyuma kegima komanora kogenda orogendo, babe inse y’ebendera y’ekeombe kiabo.”" 
Numbers2:32 Aba nabwo Abaisraeli barigetwe korwa ase kera eamate, ekeombe ase ekeombe. Omobaro obo nigo ore chilifu amagana atano na rimo na isato, na amagana atano, na emerongo etano (603,550)." 
Numbers2:33 Abalawi barabwo tibabaretwe amo n’Abaisraeli bande, ekiagera nabo Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Numbers2:34 Abaisraeli bagakora onsi buna Omonene konya achikire Musa. Bagatoora inse ye chibendera chiabo, naende kobakogenda orogendo, bakagenda kera oyomo amo neamate yaye, na enyomba yaye." 
Numbers3:1 Aba nabwo abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni, na orwa Musa, ase engaki eria Omonene akwanete na Musa, agwo ase egetunwa gia Sinai." 
Numbers3:2 Aya naro amarieta ’abamura ba Haroni: Nadabu, omomura oye omotangi, na Abihu, na Eleazari, na Itamari." 
Numbers3:3 Abamura aba ba Haroni nabwo baagetwe amaguta na gwatananwa ase emeremo y’obokuani. 
Numbers3:4 Korende Nadabu na Abihu, barabwo bagakwera ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekero bamoruerete omorero bw’engencho eng’ao etachikiri, agwo ase erooro ya Sinai. Barabwo tibabwate abana. Ase ayio Eleazari na Itamari bakagenderera gokora emeremo y’obokuani ase amatuko onsi Haroni ise arenge moyo." 
Numbers3:5 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers3:6 “Renta abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi, erinde obabeke bamokorere Haroni, omokuani." 
Numbers3:7 Abalawi abwo mbakorere Haroni emeremo, boigo bakorere omoganda bwonsi agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, ekero bagokora emeremo ase Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Numbers3:8 Barabwo mbatenenere ebinto bionsi bire ase Eema y’Omosangererekano. Ase ogokora emeremo yonsi ase Obomenyo Obochenu nigo barabe bagokorera Abaisraeli bonsi. 
Numbers3:9 Haroni amo nabamura baye baegwe Abalawi buna ekeegwa korwa ase Abaisraeli. 
Numbers3:10 Obeke Haroni amo nabamura baye bakore emeremo y’obokuani, korende monto onde bwensi omoao aise gwesoyia ase emeremo eyio nigo araitwe akwe.”" 
Numbers3:11 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers3:12 “Rora, inche omonyene neatananerete Abalawi korwa ase Abaisraeli ribaga ri’abana abatangi. Abalawi mbabe abaane," 
Numbers3:13 ekiagera abana abatangi bonsi nabaane. Ase rituko riria naitete abana abatangi, ne ching’iti chintangi, agwo Misiri, nigo neatananerete abana abatangi bonsi b’Abaisraeli babe abaane, ne ching’iti chintangi boigo. Inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Numbers3:14 Ekero Musa arenge agwo ase erooro ya Sinai, Omonene agakwana nere, akamotebia," 
Numbers3:15 “Bara Abalawi enyomba ase enyomba, na eamate ase eamate. Orike kera omonto omosacha okoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania.”" 
Numbers3:16 Erio Musa akababara, buna Omonene amochigete." 
Numbers3:17 Lawi nigo abwate abamura batato: Gerisoni, na Kohati, na Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Abamura ba Gerisoni nabwo Libini na Simei. 
Numbers3:19 Abana ba Kohati nabwo aba: Amuramu, na Isari, na Heburoni, na Usieli." 
Numbers3:20 Abana ba Merari nabwo Mali na Musi. Abanto abwo nigo barenge chisokoro chie chiamate chi’Abalawi, kera oyomo ase eamate yaye." 
Numbers3:21 Abanto b’eamate ya Libini na eya Simei, abwo nabwo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Gerisoni." 
Numbers3:22 Abanto abasacha, aba konya bakoorire omotiengi oyomo na goetania, nigo barenge chilifu isano na ibere, na amagana atano (7,500)." 
Numbers3:23 Abanto be chiamate chi’Abagerisoni nigo barabe bagotoora ensemo ya bosongo nyuma y’Obomenyo Obochenu. 
Numbers3:24 Eliasafu, mosinto o Laeli, nere orabe omotang’ani bwe chiamate chi’Abagerisoni." 
Numbers3:25 Ase Eema y’Omosangererekano Abagerisoni nabwo barabe bakorenda Obomenyo obonyene, na ebimumeko biaye, na ebitambaa bi’egesoero ki’Eema eria." 
Numbers3:26 Naende babe bakorenda ebitambaa bigosungwa ase ogokenga eraaro, na ebitambaa bi’egesoero ki’eraaro eetanaine Obomenyo Obochenu, na egesasimero, ne chingori chiabo. Bakore emeremo ende yonsi eganeirie gokorwa ase ebinto ebio." 
Numbers3:27 Abanto b’eamate y’Amuramu, na eya Isari, na eya Heburoni, na eya Usieli; abwo nabwo barenge abanto b’ororeria rwa Kohati." 
Numbers3:28 Abanto abasacha, aba konya bakoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania, nigo barenge chilifu isano na isato, na amagana atano na rimo (8,600). Abanto aba nabwo barabe bakorenda ebinto bire ase Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Numbers3:29 Barabwo nigo barabe bagotoora ensemo ya irianyi y’Obomenyo boria. 
Numbers3:30 Elisafani, mosinto bwa Usieli, nere orabe omotang’ani bw’egesaku ki’Abakohati." 
Numbers3:31 Barabwo nabwo barabe bakorenda ebinto ebi: Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana, na emesa, na ekebekerero gie chitaya, na ebisasimero, na ebikorero bionsi bi’Obomenyo boria, biria abakuani bagokorera emeremo, amo negetambaa gekengete Aase Aachenu Mono. Bakore emeremo ende yonsi eganeirie gokorwa ase ebinto ebio." 
Numbers3:32 Eleazari, omomura o Haroni omokuani, nere orabe omonene igoro ase abaraai b’Abalawi, naende omoteneneri bw’abanto barabe bagokora emeremo ase Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Numbers3:33 Abanto b’eamate ya Mali, na eya Musi abwo nabwo barenge abanto b’ororeria rwa Merari." 
Numbers3:34 Abanto abasacha, aba konya bakoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania, nigo barenge chilifu isano nemo, na amagana abere (6,200)." 
Numbers3:35 Barabwo nigo barabe bagotoora ensemo ya sugusu y’Obomenyo boria. Surieli, mosinto bw’Abihaili, nere orabe omotang’ani bw’abanto b’egesaku kia Merari." 
Numbers3:36 Abamerari nabwo barabe bakorenda ebinto ebi: chibao chi’Obomenyo Obochenu, na emeriibo, ne chisiiro, ne chinterekerero, amo nebikorero biabo bionsi. Bakore emeremo ende yonsi eganeirie gokorwa ase ebinto ebio." 
Numbers3:37 Nabwo naende babegetwe korenda chisiiro chi’eraaro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo na ebirochi, ne chingori chiabo." 
Numbers3:38 Musa na Haroni amo nabamura baye mbabe bagotoora kororia Obomenyo Obochenu ensemo ya moocha, bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Barabwo nigo barabe bagokora emeremo eganeirie gokorwa ime y’Aase Aachenu, na gotenenera emeremo ende yonsi erakorerwe Abaisraeli. Omonto onde bwensi otaatananiri gokora emeremo eyio, korende aike ang’e ase Obomenyo Obochenu, nigo araitwe akwe." 
Numbers3:39 Abanto abasacha b’Abalawi, aba konya bakoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania, abwo Musa na Haroni barigete, eamate ase eamate, buna Omonene abachigete, nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere (22,000)." 
Numbers3:40 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia, “Bara abanto abasacha abatangi, abakoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania, obarike." 
Numbers3:41 Inche ninche Omonene. Ase ayio Abalawi babe abaane. Obanyatananere ribaga ri’abatangi bonsi b’Abaisraeli. Naboigo ne ribaga rie ching’iti chintangi chi’Abaisraeli onyatananere ching’iti chi’Abalawi.” 
Numbers3:42 Musa akabara na korika abatangi bonsi b’Abaisraeli, ne ching’iti chintangi, buna Omonene amochigete." 
Numbers3:43 Abanto bonsi abasacha abatangi aba konya bakoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere, na amagana abere, na emerongo etano na ebere, na batato (22,273)." 
Numbers3:44 Naende Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers3:45 “Ira Abalawi babe abaane ribaga ri’abanto abasacha abatangi b’Abaisraeli, naende oire ching’iti chi’Abalawi chibe echiane ribaga rie chingiti chintangi chi’Abaisraeli. Inche ninche Omonene." 
Numbers3:46 Abanto abasacha abatangi b’Abaisraeli nabange bare, mbaetanetie Abalawi ase amagana abere, na emerongo etano na ebere, na batato (273). Ase ayio oboorie kera oyomo obo ne chibesa chie chisekeli isano, koreng’ana ne chisekeli chigokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. (Esekeli eyemo nechigera emerongo ebere)." 
Numbers3:47  
Numbers3:48 Omoe Haroni amo nabamura baye chibesa echio chi’okobooria abatangi abwo baetanetie Abalawi.” 
Numbers3:49 Ase ayio Musa agasangereria chibesa chiria chiabooretie abanto baria barenge abange goetania baria babooretigwe ekiagera Abalawi babete ribaga riabo. 
Numbers3:50 Ase engencho y’abanto baria abatangi b’Abaisraeli, akanyora chibesa chie chisekeli elifu eyemo, na amagana atato, na emerongo etano nomo, na isano (1,365), koreng’ana ne chisekeli chigokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Numbers3:51 Musa akaa Haroni amo nabamura baye chibesa chiria chi’okobooria, buna Omonene amochigete." 
Numbers4:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Numbers4:2 “Kora omobaro bw’Abalawi baria bare be chiamate chia Kohati, eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba," 
Numbers4:3 abwo bare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano, abwo bonsi baranyare gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers4:4 Emeremo Abakohati barakore agwo ase Eema eria nokorenda ebinto bire ebichenu mono. 
Numbers4:5 “Ekero abanto barabe bakomanora na koimoka korwa ase ebitwori, Haroni amo nabamura baye babe bagosoa ase Eema ime, basungore egetambaa keria gekengete Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, na gotuba Esanduku eria negetambaa ekio." 
Numbers4:6 Naende batube egetambaa ekio ne risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche, na igoro ase risankwa erio baare egetambaa kere buru kegima. Erio basoyie emiaro y’okobogoreria Esanduku eria." 
Numbers4:7 “Igoro ase emesa y’emegati ekoruegwa ase Omonene baare egetambaa kere buru kegima, naende babekeo chinteru, ne chisani ase ubani, amo nebitaabo na ebitoono, ase ebio bagochia koumora okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa. Emegati ekoruegwa botambe ase Omonene ebekweo boigo." 
Numbers4:8 Baare egetambaa ekebariri igoro ase ebinto ebio, bagetube ne risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche, na basoyie emiaro y’okobogoreria emesa eria." 
Numbers4:9 “Erio baimokie egetambaa kere buru kegima, batube ekebekerero gie chitaya amo ne chitaya chiaye, na ebinachi, ne chindogio chiaye, ne chichuba chire namaguta ’amazeituni, ebinto bigokorerwa ase emeremo y’obokuani." 
Numbers4:10 Nababeke ekebekerero ekio amo nebikorero biaye ase omobuko bwe risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche, na kobibeka ase ekebogorerio." 
Numbers4:11 “Naende baare egetambaa kere buru kegima igoro ase egesasimero keroisirie korwa ase etahabu, na bagetube ne risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche; erio basoyie emiaro y’okobogoreria egesasimero keria." 
Numbers4:12 Nabaimokie ebinto bionsi bigokorerwa ase emeremo agwo ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Babibeke ime ase egetambaa kere buru kegima; erio babitube ne risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche na kobibeka ase ekebogorerio. 
Numbers4:13 Barabwo babuuche ribu, naende batube egesasimero negetambaa kere monyinga." 
Numbers4:14 Igoro ase egesasimero ekio babeke ebikorero bionsi ebio bigokorerwa ase ogosasima: chindogio chi’okorenta omorero, ne chigami, na ebichiko, ne chisani, naende baare risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche igoro ase ebio bionsi, babitube. Erio basoyie emiaro y’okobogoreria egesasimero keria." 
Numbers4:15 Ekero engaki eraike, abanto barabe bakomanora na koimoka korwa ase ebitwori, na ekero Haroni na abamura baye bakoorire gotuba Eema y’Omosangererekano, amo nebinto bionsi bireo, Abakohati bachiche babogorie ebinto ebi ebichenu, korende tibabikuna. Baise kobikuna, nigo barakwe. “Emeremo y’okobogoria ebinto ebio bi’Eema y’Omosangererekano nigo erabe ey’Abakohati." 
Numbers4:16 “Eleazari, omomura o Haroni, nere oratenenere amaguta e chitaya, na ubani egotioka buya, na okoruegwa kw’endagera gwa kera rituko, na amaguta akweakwa. Ase igo emeremo yaye ebe ey’okorenda Obomenyo Obochenu, na ebinto bionsi ebichenu, na ebinto bionsi ebichenu ebire imeo.”" 
Numbers4:17 Omonene agatebia Musa na Haroni," 
Numbers4:18 “Timotiga abanto be chiamate chia Kohati basirigwe korwa ase Abalawi. 
Numbers4:19 Ase ayio, ekero barabe bagoika ang’e nebinto biria ebichenu mono, Haroni na abamura baye basoe aroro, bae kera oyomo obo emeremo, na komotebia eki arabe ogokora na kobogoria. Erio nario barabe moyo, tibakwa." 
Numbers4:20 Korende Abakohati baise gosoa na korora ebinto biria ebichenu, nonya netagika ensinini, nigo barakwe.”" 
Numbers4:21 Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers4:22 “Kora omobaro bw’Abalawi baria bare b’ororeria rwa Gerisoni, eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba." 
Numbers4:23 Orike abasacha bonsi abare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano, abwo bonsi baranyare gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers4:24 Eye nero emeremo abanto be chiamate chia Gerisoni barakore naende buna barabe bakobogoria ebinto ebi: 
Numbers4:25 Barabwo mbabogorie ebitambaa bi’Obomenyo Obochenu amo nebitubo bi’Eema eria, ne risankwa ri’eng’iti ya rooche rikobituba, na egetambaa ki’egesoero ki’Eema eria," 
Numbers4:26 na ebitambaa bi’eraaro eetanaine Obomenyo boria na egesasimero, na ebitambaa bi’egesoero ki’eraaro, ne chingori chionsi chireo amo nebikorero bigokorerwao. Barabwo bakore emeremo ende yonsi eganeirie gokorwa ase ebinto ebio." 
Numbers4:27 Haroni na abamura baye nabwo barachike Abagerisoni ebinto bionsi barabe bakobogoria, na onsi aya barakore; inwe mobatige batenenere ebinto bionsi barabe bakobogoria." 
Numbers4:28 Itamari, omomura o Haroni omokuani, nere oratenenere emeremo abanto be chiamate chi’Abagerisoni barabe bagokora agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano.”" 
Numbers4:29 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Kora omobaro bw’Abalawi baria bare ab’ororeria rwa Merari, eamate ase eamate na enyomba ase enyomba." 
Numbers4:30 Orike abasacha bonsi abare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano, abwo bonsi baranyare gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers4:31 Emeremo yabo ase Eema eria ebe ey’okobogoria ebinto ebi: Chibao chi’Obomenyo Obochenu, na emeriibo, ne chisiiro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo," 
Numbers4:32 ne chisiiro chi’eraaro amo ne chinterekerero chiabo, na ebirochi, ne chingori, amo nebikorero bionsi bigokorerwao. Ewatore ebinto bionsi barabwo barache kobogoria." 
Numbers4:33 Eye nero emeremo y’abanto be chiamate chia Merari barabe bagokora agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, inse y’oboteneneri bwa Itamari, omomura o Haroni omokuani.”" 
Numbers4:34 Musa, na Haroni, na abaraai b’omoganda bagakora omobaro bw’ororeria rwa Kohati, eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba." 
Numbers4:35 Bakarika abasacha bonsi abaare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano, abwo baare konyara gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers4:36 Abanto abwo barigetwe ase chiamate chiabo nigo barenge chilifu ibere, na amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano (2,750)." 
Numbers4:37 Oyio noro omobaro bwe chiamate chi’Abakohati abwo baare konyara gokora emeremo agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, abwo Musa na Haroni babarete, buna Omonene achigete Musa." 
Numbers4:38 Oyo noro omobaro bw’ororeria rwa Gerisoni, eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba." 
Numbers4:39 Abanto abwo baare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano, naende barenge konyara gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, bakarikwa." 
Numbers4:40 Abwo nigo barenge abanto chilifu ibere, na amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etato (2,630)." 
Numbers4:41 Oyo noro omobaro bwe chiamate chi’Abagerisoni, abarigetwe, abwo baare konyara gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, abwo Musa na Haroni babarete, buna Omonene achigete." 
Numbers4:42 Oyo noro omobaro bw’ororeria rwa Merari, eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba." 
Numbers4:43 Abasacha abwo baare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano, naende barenge konyara gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, bakarikwa." 
Numbers4:44 Abwo nigo barenge abanto chilifu isato, na amagana abere (3,200)." 
Numbers4:45 Oyo noro omobaro bwe chiamate chi’Abamerari, abwo Musa na Haroni babarete, buna Omonene achigete Musa." 
Numbers4:46 Musa, na Haroni, na abaraai b’Abaisraeli nigo babarete Abalawi bonsi eamate ase eamate, na enyomba ase enyomba." 
Numbers4:47 Abwo abaare egati y’emiaka emerongo etato na emerongo etano, naende barenge konyara gokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano," 
Numbers4:48 nigo barenge abanto chilifu isano na isato, na amagana atano, na emerongo etano na etato (8,580)." 
Numbers4:49 Abwo bonsi nigo babaretwe buna Omonene achigete goetera ase Musa. Kera omonto agatebigwa emeremo arakore na ebinto arabogorie buna Omonene achigete Musa. 
Numbers5:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers5:2 “Bachike Abaisraeli barusie korwa ase ebitwori biabo kera omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma, na omonto okorua amache anga buna chimengere, na omonto onde bwensi bwesoyirie ase ogotacheneka ase ogokuna egetondo." 
Numbers5:3 Goika morusie korwa ase ebitwori abasacha na abakungu abwo babeire abatachenegeti babeere isiko, erinde tibabaisa gokora ebitwori biabo bibe bitachenegeti, agwo ase inche imenyete ase egati y’abanto baane.”" 
Numbers5:4 Abaisraeli bagakora buna Omonene atebetie Musa. Bakarusia korwa ase ebitwori abanto abwo. 
Numbers5:5 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers5:6 “Tebia Abaisraeli ng’a, ekero omonto omosacha, gose omokungu, arakore ebibe binde bionsi abanto bagokora ase ogotaba abegenwa ase Omonene, na omonto oria orabe omomochi," 
Numbers5:7 omonto oyio goika aorokie ebibe biria. Boigo airanie ase omonto oria aurete rigori ri’enibo eyio amourete, naende amente eyemo ya isano ye rigori ri’egento ekio." 
Numbers5:8 Korende onye omonto oria okure, naende omoamate oye tari okoiranerigwa egento ekio kiairetwe, rirorio kerentwe ase Omonene kebe eki’omokuani. Amo nayio omonto oyio amente emingichi erakorerwe okobwatanigwa asare." 
Numbers5:9 Kera okoruegwa kw’ebinto ebichenu Abaisraeli bararente ase omokuani, ebinto ebio nabibe ebiaye." 
Numbers5:10 Ebinto bionsi omonto araatanane koba ebichenu nigo birabe ebi’omokuani oyio okobiegwa.” 
Numbers5:11 Naende Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers5:12 “Tebia Abaisraeli: Ebaise koba ng’a omokungu bw’omonto obeire otari omwegenwa’ asare. 
Numbers5:13 Omonto omoao kararare nere ase obotomani, nonya ayio karabe abisekanete ase omosacha bw’omokungu oyio, omokungu oyio bwekorire omosaria, nonya kirori onde tari okomoteba ekiagera tabwatetwe okobokora." 
Numbers5:14 Omosacha oye karabe nomoika bwe risemi akagere mokaye ng’a bwekorire omosaria, nere abe okorete ayio, gose tayakorete," 
Numbers5:15 omosacha oye amoire ase omokuani. Boigo arue obosie bw’esairi ebimunu bibere, ase engencho y’omokungu oria. Taumora amaguta igoro y’okoruegwa okwo, gose ubani, ekiagera nokoruegwa ase engencho ye risemi riaye. Okwo nokoruegwa koragere okomocha koinyorwe." 
Numbers5:16 “Omokuani arente omokungu oria amobeke ase obosio bw’Omonene," 
Numbers5:17 aumore amache amachenu ase egetaabo ki’amaroba, naende aimokie amaroba korwa inse agwo ase Obomenyo Obochenu, ayabeke ime ase amache aria." 
Numbers5:18 Omokuani abeke omokungu oria ase obosio bw’Omonene, asansore etukia y’omotwe bw’omokungu oria, naende abeke okoruegwa koria gw’ekeinyorio ase amaboko ’omokungu oria. Omokuani omonyene abwate ase okoboko kwaye egetaabo kere namache amaroro, ayio akorenta okoragereria." 
Numbers5:19 Erio omokuani abeke omokungu oyio inse y’okoragererigwa, amotebie: Onye omonto omoao tararete naye, na igo tigwakorete obotomani ase ogotaba omwegenwa ase omosacha oo, rirorio amache aya amaroro akorenta okoragererigwa takonyara kogokorera bobe bonde." 
Numbers5:20 Korende onye gwatomanire nomonto omoao ase ogotaba omwegenwa ase omosacha oo, na gwekorire omosaria," 
Numbers5:21 (agwo omokuani abeke omokungu oyio inse y’okoragererigwa gw’okomotiania) rirorio Omonene nagere abanto bao bakoragererie na kogochaya, karakore enda yao egombae na kobimba." 
Numbers5:22 Tiga amache aya akorenta okoragereria kagosoa enda yao, ayekore ebimbe na kogombaa.” Omokungu oria airanerie: Ee, ekeene, amina." 
Numbers5:23 “Erio omokuani arike amang’ana ayio ay’okoragereria okwo ime ase ebuku, naende ayasibie namache aria amaroro." 
Numbers5:24 Erio ae omokungu oria amache ayio anywe, na ekero amache aya amaroro asoire ase enda yaye arente okoragererigwa na obororo." 
Numbers5:25 Omokuani arusie korwa ase okoboko kw’omokungu oria okoruegwa kwe risemi, na kogosungusia ase obosio bw’Omonene. Nyuma y’ayio akorente ase egesasimero." 
Numbers5:26 Naende korwa ase okoruegwa okwo aimokie goke, goichire roe, kobe ekeinyorio ng’a okoruegwa okwo nokw’Omonene, na kogosambera ase egesasimero, na nyuma y’ayio ae omokungu oria amache aria anywe." 
Numbers5:27 Onye omokungu oria tabete omwegenwa ase omosacha oye, korende bwekorire omosaria, amache aya amaroro akorenta okoragererigwa akore enda yaye ebimbe, naende egombae. Ase enchera eyio omokungu oyio abe ekiorokererio gi’okoragererigwa kegwatorwa ase egati y’abanto baye." 
Numbers5:28 Onye omokungu oria takorete obotomani korende nigo are omoikeranu, rirorio tagokorerwa bobe, otatiga aibore abana." 
Numbers5:29 “Oko nogochika ase amang’ana e risemi, ekero omokungu atari omwegenwa ase omosacha oye, korende akore obotomani na gwekora omosaria." 
Numbers5:30 Naboigo ekero omosacha arabe nomoika bwe risemi na gokagera mokaye ng’a nomotomani, omosacha oria amorente ase obosio bw’Omonene, na omokuani akore onsi aya achikire." 
Numbers5:31 Omosacha oria takoba nokomocha, korende onye mokaye okorire ogosaria okwo, goika aegwe egesusuro.”" 
Numbers6:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers6:2 “Batebie Abaisraeli ng’a ekero omonto, omosacha gose omokungu, akoria eira abe oyo bweatananire ase Omonene abe Omwerwa oye," 
Numbers6:3 goika eatanane korwa ase edivai amo nebinyugwa bigotindia. Tabaisa konywa ebinyugwa binde bionsi bikoroisigwa korwa ase amasabibu, gose taria amasabibu, amabese gose amomo." 
Numbers6:4 Ase amatuko aye onsi eatananete koba Omwerwa taria gento kende gionsi gekoroisigwa korwa ase emesabibu. Taria nonya ne chimbusururo gose amasabo ’amasabibu. 
Numbers6:5 “Tabaisa konacha etukia yaye gose gwekigita goika okoorire amatuko aye onsi ariete eira gweatanana koba Omwerwa bw’Omonene. Ere nabe oyo bweatananire, na atige etukia y’omotwe oye ekine." 
Numbers6:6 Tagenda aike ang’e negetondo ase amatuko ayio onsi eatananete koba Omwerwa bw’Omonene. 
Numbers6:7 Ise nakwa, gose ng’ina, gose momura omwabo, gose omoiseke omwabo, tagenda ang’e negetondo na gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka. Ere nigo abwate ase omotwe oye ekemanyererio ng’a bweatananire koba Omwerwa o Nyasae oye." 
Numbers6:8 Ere nigo arabe omochenu ase Omonene ase amatuko aye onsi eatananete. 
Numbers6:9 “Korende omonto karakwe mobosokano ang’e nere, na akore omotwe oye ore nekemanyererio gi’okwerwa kwaye abe otachenegeti, rirorio Omwerwa oyio aganye amatuko atano na abere erio akigite etukia yaye, na abe oyochenekire." 
Numbers6:10 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato, arente amaruma abere, gose amage ’amaruma abere, ase omokuani agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers6:11 Omokuani arue riruma erimo ribe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na erinde eki’ogosambwa ase ogokora okobwatanigwa ase Omwerwa oria, ekiagera okorire ebibe ase ogoika ang’e negetondo. Ase rituko erio erio omonto oria achene omotwe oye," 
Numbers6:12 na eatanane ase Omonene naende, ase engaki eng’ana buna eria ariete eira koba Omwerwa agwo ritang’ani. Erio arente emanwa emingichi yakoorire omwaka oyomo ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha kwaye ekiagera amatuko aria aye amatang’ani eatananete ase Omonene buna Omwerwa oye takobarwa korende nigo arabe bosa, ekiagera okwerwa kwaye gwakorirwe ogotachenegeti." 
Numbers6:13 “Oko nakwo ogochika ase Omwerwa: Ekero engaki yaye y’ogweatanana yaerire, arentwe ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangerekano." 
Numbers6:14 Ere arue ekeng’wanso kiaye ase Omonene: emanwa emingichi yakoorire omwaka oyomo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na emanwa esigiti yakoorire omwaka oyomo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na emingichi eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe; chionsi chibe chitari na bimocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers6:15 Boigo arente egetonga kere nemegati etabekiri memera, na arue amaandasi aroisirie nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta, na emegati emeoo eakire amaguta, amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo." 
Numbers6:16 “Omokuani arente ebinto ebio ase obosio bw’Omonene na arue ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe na eki’ogosambwa ase engencho y’omonto oria. 
Numbers6:17 Boigo arue emingichi eria ebe ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe ase Omonene, ayerue amo nemegati etabekiri memera ere egetonga ime, na okoruegwa kw’endagera na ogw’ekenyugwa gochikire amo." 
Numbers6:18 Agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, Omwerwa oria akigite etukia y’omotwe oye ere ekemanyererio ng’a neatananete ase Omonene. Erio aire etukia yaye, ayerute ase omorero oria ore inse y’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe." 
Numbers6:19 “Nyuma, ekero Omwerwa oria akoorire gokigita etukia yaye, omokuani aimokie rireko ri’emingichi riaiyekirwe, na korwa ase egetonga arusie omogati oyomo otabekiri memera, na omogati oyomo omoo otabekiri memera, ayebeke ase amaboko ’Omwerwa oria." 
Numbers6:20 Omokuani arente ebinto ebio amo ne ritaana na ekenama bi’emingichi, abisungusie bibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa ase Omonene. Ebinto ebio nigo biatananetwe ase omokuani. Erio nario Omwerwa oria arabe ne ribaga konywa edivai.”" 
Numbers6:21 Oko nakwo ogochika ase oyoriete eira ng’a abe Omwerwa bw’Omonene, goika arue ase Omonene aya amorierete eira akorua ore Omwerwa oye, korende onye orire eira arue goetania, goika ayeikeranie kegima koreng’ana nogochika gw’okwerwa." 
Numbers6:22 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers6:23 “Motebie Haroni amo nabamura baye ng’a, ekero barabe bagosesenia Abaisraeli, bakwane amang’ana aya:" 
Numbers6:24 “Omonene abasesenie, abarende;" 
Numbers6:25 Omonene abaraberie obosio bwaye, abaabere;" 
Numbers6:26 Omonene abaonchorere obosio bwaye, abae omorembe." 
Numbers6:27 “Naboigo bararangerie erieta riane ribe igoro y’Abaisraeli ase okobasesenia, erio inche omonyene nimbasesenie.”" 
Numbers7:1 Ase rituko riria Musa konya akoorire gotenenia Obomenyo Obochenu naende kaboakire amaguta na kobwatanana amo nebinto biaye bionsi, naende gakoorire gwatanana egesasimero na ebikorero biaye," 
Numbers7:2 abatang’ani b’Abaisraeli, abwo barenge abateneneri igoro ase baria babaretwe," 
Numbers7:3 bakarentera Omonene okoruegwa kwabo. Bakarua chigari isano nemo chitubire, ne chiombe ikomi na ibere, egari eyemo ase abatang’ani babere na kera eng’ombe eyemo ase omoraai oyomo. Bakarenta ebio agwo bosio bw’Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Numbers7:4 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers7:5 “Ancha oire ebiegwa ebio korwa asebare, erinde bikorerwe emeremo agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano. Obie Abalawi, kera omonto anyore buna emeremo yaye ere.”" 
Numbers7:6 Ase ayio Musa akaira chigari chiria ne chiombe chiria erio agachia Abalawi. 
Numbers7:7 Akaa Abagerisoni chigari ibere ne chiombe inye, buna emeremo yabo yarenge." 
Numbers7:8 Naende akaa Abamerari chigari inye, ne chiombe isano na isato, buna emeremo yabo yarenge inse y’oboraai bwa Itamari, omomura o Haroni omokuani." 
Numbers7:9 Korende Abakohati Musa tabaete gento kende, ekiagera barabwo nigo baetwe emeremo y’okobogoria ebinto ebichenu, na ebio goika bibogorigwe ase amareko." 
Numbers7:10 Ase rituko riria egesasimero giatananetwe na goakwa amaguta, abatang’ani bakarenta okoruegwa kwabo bosio bw’egesasimero." 
Numbers7:11 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Kera rituko omotang’ani oyomo oyomo arue okoruegwa kwaye ase ogwatananwa kw’egesasimero.”" 
Numbers7:12 Rituko rie ritang’ani Nahasoni, mosinto bw’Aminadabu bw’egesaku kia Yuda, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:13 Ere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:14 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:15 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:16 na egoree eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:17 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kwa Nahasoni, mosinto bw’Aminadabu." 
Numbers7:18 Rituko ria kabere Netaneli, mosinto o Suari bw’egesaku gia Isakaru, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:19 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:20 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:21 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:22 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:23 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kwa Netaneli, mosinto o Suari." 
Numbers7:24 Rituko ria gatato Eliabu, mosinto o Heloni bw’egesaku gia Sabuloni, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:25 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obuya bwochoganirie namaguta, bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:26 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi giaichire na ubani. 
Numbers7:27 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:28 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:29 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kw’Eliabu, mosinto o Heloni." 
Numbers7:30 Rituko ria kane Elisuri, mosinto o Sedeuri bw’egesaku kia Reuben, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:31 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta, bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:32 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahahu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:33 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:34 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:35 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kw’Elisuri, mosinto o Sedeuri." 
Numbers7:36 Rituko ria gatano Selumieli, mosinto o Surisadai bw’egesaku gia Simeoni, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:37 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:38 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:39 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:40 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:41 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua gwa Selumieli, mosinto o Surisadai." 
Numbers7:42 Rituko ria gatano na rimo Eliasafu, mosinto o Deueli bw’egesaku kia Gadi, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:43 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:44 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:45 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:46 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:47 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kw’Eliasafu, mosinto o Deueli." 
Numbers7:48 Rituko ria gatano na kabere Elisama, mosinto bw’Amihudi, bw’egesaku gi’Efraimu, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:49 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:50 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:51 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:52 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:53 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kw’Elisama, mosinto bw’Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Rituko ria gatano na gatato Gamalieli, mosinto o Pedasuri bw’egesaku kia Manase, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:55 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:56 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:57 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:58 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:59 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri, ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kwa Gamalieli, mosinto o Pedasuri." 
Numbers7:60 Rituko ria kianda Abidani, mosinto o Gidioni bw’egesaku kia Benjamin, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:61 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:62 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:63 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emengichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:64 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:65 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. ’Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kw’Abidani, mosinto o Gidioni." 
Numbers7:66 Rituko ria ikomi Ahieseri, mosinto bw’Amisadai bw’egesaku kia Dani, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:67 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:68 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:69 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:70 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:71 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kw’Ahieseri, mosinto bw’Amisadai." 
Numbers7:72 Rituko ria ikomi na rimo Pagieli, mosinto bw’Okirani bw’egesaku gi’Aseri, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:73 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:74 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:75 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:76 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:77 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, nechimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua gwa Pagieli, mosinto bw’Okirani." 
Numbers7:78 Rituko ria ikomi na kabere Ahira, mosinto bw’Enani bw’egesaku kia Nafutali, akarenta okoruegwa kwaye." 
Numbers7:79 Nere akarua esani eyemo eroisirie korwa ase efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na egetaabo ekemo gi’efeta y’oborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere, ase ekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Bionsi bibere nigo biaichire nobosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta bokaba okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers7:80 Naende akarua egetaabo ekemo gi’etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli ikomi, giaichire na ubani." 
Numbers7:81 Boigo akarua eeri ensae, na emingichi eyemo, na emanwa emingichi eyemo yakoorire omwaka oyomo, chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa," 
Numbers7:82 na egoree eyemo ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers7:83 Na ase ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe akarua chieri ibere, ne chimingichi isano, ne chigoree isano, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano chiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okorua kw’Ahira, mosinto bw’Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Omobaro bwonsi bw’ebinto biaruetwe nabatang’ani b’Abaisraeli ase ogwatananwa kw’egesasimero ase rituko riria kiaagetwe amaguta nigo biabete iga: Chisani ikomi na ibere chiaroisirie korwa ase chifeta, na ebitaabo ikomi na bibere biaroisirie korwa ase chifeta, na ebitaabo ikomi na bibere biaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu." 
Numbers7:85 Kera esani y’efeta nigo yarenge noborito bwe chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo etato, na kera egetaabo gi’efeta noborito bwe chisekeli emerongo etano na ebere. Ase igo oborito bwonsi bwe chifeta chi’ebinto ebio nigo bwarenge chisekeli chilifu ibere, na amagana ane (2,400), koreng’ana nekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu." 
Numbers7:86 Na ebitaabo biria ikomi na bibere biaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu biichire na ubani, nigo biarenge kera ekemo noborito bwe chisekeli ikomi koreng’ana nekerengo gi’esekeli yare gokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. Oborito bwe chitahabu chi’ebinto ebio bionsi nigo bwarenge chisekeli rigana erimo na emerongo ebere." 
Numbers7:87 Ching’iti chiaruetwe chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa nigo chiarenge chieri ikomi na ibere, ne chimingichi ikomi na ibere, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiakoorire omwaka oyomo ikomi na ibere, amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera gwachikire amo, ne chigoree ikomi na ibere chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Numbers7:88 Ching’iti chionsi chiaruetwe chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe nigo chiabete: Chieri emerongo ebere na inye, ne chimingichi emerongo etano nomo, ne chigoree emerongo etano nomo, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiakoorire omwaka oyomo emerongo etano nomo. Ebio nabio ebiegwa biaruetwe ekero egesasimero giatananetwe na goakwa amaguta." 
Numbers7:89 Ekero Musa asoete ase Eema y’Omosangererekano gokwana n’Omonene, akaigwa eriogi rigokwana nere korwa ase Oboikaranso bw’Amabera, obwo bwarenge igoro ase Esanduku yarenge ne chibao chirikire oborori. Eriogi erio rikarua ase egati y’Abakerubi baria babere, rigakwana nere." 
Numbers8:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers8:2 “Tebia Haroni ng’a, ekero arabeke chitaya isano na ibere ase ekebekerero gie chitaya, achibeke erinde chimoreke gochia bosio.”" 
Numbers8:3 Haroni agakora bo, akabeka chitaya echio, erinde chimoreke gochia bosio bw’ekebekerero ekio, buna Omonene achigete Musa." 
Numbers8:4 Ekebekerero gie chitaya na enterekerero yaye, amo nemegwekano yaye y’ebisicha nigo biaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu chiturire. Nabo Musa aroisetie ekebekerero ekio buna Omonene konya amochikire." 
Numbers8:5 Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers8:6 “Atanana Abalawi korwa ase Abaisraeli na obachene. 
Numbers8:7 Ekero okobachena nigo orakore iga: Onyororokie amache ’ogwesibia igoro yabo, na barabwo bakigite emebere yabo yonsi na basibie chianga chiabo. Erio babe bachenekire." 
Numbers8:8 Naende barente eeri ensae amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera kw’obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta. Naye oire eeri ende ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. 
Numbers8:9 Osangererie omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli na orente Abalawi agwo bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano. 
Numbers8:10 Ekero kwarentire Abalawi ase obosio bwane, inche Omonene, Abaisraeli goika babeke amaboko abo igoro ase emetwe yabo." 
Numbers8:11 Naende Haroni arente Abalawi ase obosio bwane, babe buna ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa korwa ase Abaisraeli. Naboigo Abalawi baatananwe, babe ekeegwa ase ogonkorera inche Omonene." 
Numbers8:12 Nyuma yaye Abalawi goika babeke amaboko abo igoro ase emetwe ye chieri chiria, naye orusie eeri eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na eyende ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa asende inche Omonene, na igo okore okobwatanigwa ase Abalawi." 
Numbers8:13 “Obeke Abalawi babe bagokonya Haroni na abamura baye, obaatanane babe buna ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa asende inche Omonene." 
Numbers8:14 Ase enchera eyio obaatanane Abalawi korwa ase Abaisraeli, barabwo mbabe abaane." 
Numbers8:15 Ekero kwabachenire na kobaatanana babe buna ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa, barabwo basoe ase Eema y’Omosangererekano babe bagokora emeremo aroro." 
Numbers8:16 Barabwo baruegwe kegima korwa ase Abaisraeli babe abaane, ekiagera nabachorire ribaga ri’abana abatangi b’Abaisraeli." 
Numbers8:17 Abana abatangi bonsi b’Abaisraeli nabaane, ne ching’iti chintangi boigo. Rituko riria naitete abana abatangi bonsi amo ne ching’iti chintangi ase ense ya Misiri, nigo neatananerete abana abatangi b’Abaisraeli amo ne ching’iti chintangi." 
Numbers8:18 Na bono nachorire Abalawi babe abaane ribaga ri’abana abatangi bonsi b’Abaisraeli. 
Numbers8:19 Narure Abalawi babe ekeegwa ase Haroni na abamura baye korwa ase Abaisraeli, erinde bakore emeremo ase engencho y’Abaisraeli, agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano. Boigo bakore okobwatanigwa asebare, erinde nintange amaakwa tabanyora ekero bagoika ang’e n’Aase Aachenu.”" 
Numbers8:20 Naboigo Musa, na Haroni, amo nomoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli bakaba bagokorera Abalawi. Abaisraeli bakabakorera kera ring’ana Omonene konya achikire Musa babakorere." 
Numbers8:21 Abalawi bagechena korwa ase ebibe na bagasibia chianga chiabo, na Haroni akabaatanana bakaba buna ekeng’wanso ki’ogosungusigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, naende agakora okobwatanigwa asebare, na kobachena." 
Numbers8:22 Nyuma y’ayio Abalawi bakagenda ase obokoreri bwabo ime ase Eema y’Omosangererekano inse y’oborendi bwa Haroni na abamura baye. Buna Omonene konya achikire Musa igoro y’Abalawi nabo Abaisraeli babakorerete. 
Numbers8:23 Omonene agakwana naende na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers8:24 “Eye nero emeremo y’Abalawi: Abwo bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na etano, na goetania, nigo barabe bagokora emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers8:25 Ekero bakoorire emiaka emerongo etano batige batimoke korwa ase emeremo eria. 
Numbers8:26 Barabwo mbabe ne ribaga ri’ogokonya baria bamwabo bare abakoreri ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, korende tibabaisa gokora emeremo eyio abanyene. Naboigo oraroberie Abalawi ase emeremo yabo.”" 
Numbers9:1 Ase omwaka o kabere, omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, nyuma Abaisraeli kobarure ense ya Misiri, Omonene agakwana na Musa agwo ase erooro ya Sinai, akamotebia," 
Numbers9:2 “Abaisraeli goika barende rituko ri’Epasaka ase engaki echikire. 
Numbers9:3 Ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi oyo, chinsa chia mogoroba, namorende rituko erio ase engaki echikire koreng’ana nemeroberio eria yachigetwe.”" 
Numbers9:4 Ase igo Musa agatebia Abaisraeli ng’a barende rituko rinene ri’Epasaka. 
Numbers9:5 Na abanto bagakora bo, bakarenda rituko riria rinene ri’Epasaka agwo ase erooro ya Sinai, ase omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, ase rituko ria ikomi na kane, chinsa chia mogoroba. Abaisraeli bagakora amang’ana onsi buna Omonene achigete Musa." 
Numbers9:6 Korende mbarengeo abanto gete besoyirie ase ogotacheneka ase ogokuna omobere bw’omonto okwete. Barabwo tibanyarete korenda rituko ri’Epasaka ase rituko riria. Ase ayio bakagenda ase Musa na Haroni ase rituko riria," 
Numbers9:7 bakabatebia, “Intwe nigo twabeire abatachenegeti ase ogokuna egetondo. Inee! Ninki kiagera twatangirwe titorua okoruegwa ase Omonene ase engaki Abaisraeli bachikire komoruera okoruegwa kwabo?”" 
Numbers9:8 Musa akabatebia, “Ganya, inyigwe aya Omonene arachike igoro asemore.”" 
Numbers9:9 Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers9:10 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli obatebie: Onye omonto onde oino, gose oyo bw’ororeria rwaino, obeire oyotachenegeti ase ogokuna egetondo, gose nigo are aare ase orogendo, na onye origetie korenda rituko ri’Epasaka y’Omonene," 
Numbers9:11 nigo ararirende ase omotienyi o kabere, rituko ria ikomi na kane, chinsa chia mogoroba. Narie emanwa y’eng’ondi y’Epasaka amo nemegati etabekiri memera, ne chinyeni chindoro." 
Numbers9:12 Tebaisa gotigaria nonya nensinini ye chinyama echio goika rituko ria kabere, gose tabuna riuga nonya nerimo ri’emanwa eria. Narende rituko riria rinene ri’Epasaka koreng’ana nemeroberio eria yachigetwe." 
Numbers9:13 Korende omonto ochenegete gose o takari aare ase orogendo, oretange tarenda rituko ri’Epasaka, omonto oyio naatananwe korwa ase abanto baye, ekiagera ere tarenteti okoruegwa kwaye ase Omonene ase engaki eria echikire. Okomocha kw’ebibe kw’omonto oria nkobe igoro yaye." 
Numbers9:14 “Onye omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino bwanchete koria Epasaka y’Omonene nigo arakore koreng’ana nemeroberio eria yachigetwe. Mobe nogochika okomo ase omomenyi na ase omobiare.” 
Numbers9:15 Ase rituko erio Obomenyo boria Obochenu bwatenenetigwe, riire rigatuba Obomenyo obwo, engencho yaye Eema y’Oborori. Na korwa mogoroba goika mambia riire riria rikarorekana rire buna omorero." 
Numbers9:16 Naboigo riire riagendererete botambe gotuba Obomenyo boria Obochenu; ase obotuko rirorekana rire buna omorero. 
Numbers9:17 Ekero kende gionsi riire riria riarenge koimokerera igoro korwa ase Eema eria, erio Abaisraeli nigo barenge komanora, bachaka orogendo rwabo. Na aase riire riria riarenge gotenena, aroro agwo nao Abaisraeli barenge gotoora." 
Numbers9:18 Ase ogochika kw’Omonene nigo baare gochaka orogendo, na ase ogochika kwaye nigo baare gotoora. Engaki yonsi riire riria riagendererete kobeera igoro ase Obomenyo boria, abanto nigo baare kogenderera kobeera ase egetwori." 
Numbers9:19 Onye riire riria riarenge kobeera igoro ase Obomenyo boria amatuko amange, Abaisraeli nigo baigwerete Omonene, na barabwo tibarenge komanora kogenda." 
Numbers9:20 Ase chingaki chinde riire riria nigo riarenge kobeera igoro ase Obomenyo boria amatuko amake oka. Buna Omonene achigete, abanto nigo baare kobeera ase egetwori, naende ekero Omonene arenge kobachika, bachaka kogenda ase orogendo rwabo." 
Numbers9:21 Chingaki chinde riire riria nigo riarenge kobeera igoro ase Obomenyo boria korwa mogoroba goika mambia rioka. Ekero kende gionsi riire riarenge koimokerera igoro, abanto nigo barenge gochaka orogendo rwabo. Onye riarenge kobeera agwo omobaso na obotuko goika ekero riarenge koimokerera igoro naende, abanto nigo barenge gochaka orogendo ekero ekio." 
Numbers9:22 Onye riire riarenge kobeera igoro ase Obomenyo boria amatuko abere, gose omotienyi oyomo, gose engaki entambe, Abaisraeli nigo barenge kobeera ase egetwori, tibarenge komanora kogenda, korende ekero riire riaimokereire igoro, barabwo nigo barenge gochaka orogendo." 
Numbers9:23 Buna Omonene arenge gochika nigo barenge gotoora, batiga orogendo, gose baimoka bachaka orogendo. Bakaba bakoigwera Omonene buna achigete goetera ase Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers10:2 “Roisia ebirombeta bibere bie chifeta chiturire. Obe gokobibugia ekero ogosangereria omoganda amo, na ekero abanto barabe bakoimoka korwa ase ebitwori gochaka orogendo." 
Numbers10:3 Ekero ebirombeta bionsi bibere birabugigwe, abanto bonsi nabache na gosangererekana agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers10:4 Korende onye ekemo gioka gekobugigwa, abatangani abwo bare abateneneri b’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli nabwo boka barachiche asore." 
Numbers10:5 Ekero morabugie ekerombeta ase eriogi ri’ogotabobora, abanto bare ase ebitwori bi’ensemo ya moocha baimoke bachake orogendo rwabo." 
Numbers10:6 Naende ekero morabugie ekerombeta ase eriogi ri’ogotabobora eria kabere, abanto bare ase ebitwori bi’ensemo ya irianyi baimoke bachake orogendo. Ekerombeta goika kebugigwe ase eriogi erio ase chingaki chionsi abanto barabe bakomanora gochaka orogendo." 
Numbers10:7 Korende ekero omosangererekano okorangerigwa gochicha amo, ebirombeta goika bibugigwe, go tari ase eriogi ri’ogotabobora." 
Numbers10:8 Abamura ba Haroni omokuani nabwo barabe bakobugia ebirombeta ebio. “Oko nakwo korabe ogochika asemore kogenderera botambe, ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Numbers10:9 Ekero morabe mokorwana esegi nababisa baino abwo barache kobarwania ase ense yaino, mobe mokobugia ebirombeta ase eriogi ri’ogotabobora, erinde monyare koinyorwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, na inwe namotoorigwe korwa ase ababisa baino." 
Numbers10:10 Ase amatuko aino ay’omogoko, na amatuko achikire abe Amatuko Amanene asemore, na ase omochakano bw’emetienyi namobe mokobugia ebirombeta igoro y’ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’omorembe, na ebirombeta ebio bigere mobe mokoinyorwa ase obosio bwa Nyasae oino. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Numbers10:11 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere ri’omotienyi o kabere, ase omwaka o kabere, riire riria rikaimokerera igoro korwa ase Obomenyo bore noborori." 
Numbers10:12 Abaisraeli bakaimoka korwa ase erooro ya Sinai, bakagenda bakaba bakona‐gotoora egetwori ase egetwori, ne riire riria rigaika agwo ase erooro ya Parani, rikabeera aroro." 
Numbers10:13 Omonene agachika Musa, na Abaisraeli bagachaka orogendo rwabo ase ekero egetang’ani." 
Numbers10:14 Abanto b’egetwori kia Yuda, abatoorete inse y’ebendera yabo, bakaba abatang’ani b’okoimoka gochaka orogendo, ekeombe ase ekeombe, na Nahasoni, mosinto bw’Aminadabu, nere orenge omoraai bw’omoganda oria." 
Numbers10:15 Netaneli, mosinto o Suari, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku gia Isakaru," 
Numbers10:16 na Eliabu, mosinto o Heloni, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku gia Sabuloni." 
Numbers10:17 Ekero Obomenyo bwatagoretwe Abagerisoni na Abamerari, abarenge kobobogoria, bagachaka orogendo." 
Numbers10:18 Nyuma y’ayio abanto b’egetwori kia Reuben, abatoorete inse y’ebendera yabo, bakaimoka kogenda ekeombe ase ekeombe, na Elisuri, mosinto o Sedeuri, nere orenge omoraai bw’omoganda oria." 
Numbers10:19 Selumieli, mosinto o Surisadai, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku gia Simeoni." 
Numbers10:20 Eliasafu, mosinto o Deueli, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku kia Gadi." 
Numbers10:21 Erio Abakohati bakaimoka kogenda babogoretie ebinto ebichenu. Ekero konya bataraika ase egetwori bakanyora ng’a baria abande batenenirie Obomenyo boria Obochenu. 
Numbers10:22 Naende abanto b’egetwori gia Efuraimu, abatoorete inse y’ebendera yabo, bakaimoka kogenda, ekeombe ase ekeombe, na Elisama, mosinto bw’Amihudi, nere orenge omoraai bw’omoganda oria." 
Numbers10:23 Gamalieli, mosinto o Pedasuri, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku kia Manase." 
Numbers10:24 Abidani, mosinto o Gidioni, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin." 
Numbers10:25 Omoerio abanto b’egetwori kia Dani, abatoorete inse y’ebendera yabo, bakaimoka kogenda, ekeombe ase ekeombe. Abwo nigo barenge abarendi ba nyuma ase ebitwori bionsi. Ahieseri, mosinto bw’Amisadai, nere orenge omoraai bw’omoganda oria." 
Numbers10:26 Pagieli, mosinto bw’Okirani, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku gi’Aseri," 
Numbers10:27 na Ahira, mosinto bw’Enani, nere orenge omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku kia Nafutali." 
Numbers10:28 Oyo noro orenge omoroberio bw’Abaisraeli ekero barenge kogenda orogendo rwabo, ekeombe ase ekeombe, ekero kende gionsi baare koimoka korwa ase egetwori." 
Numbers10:29 Musa agakwana na Hobabu, mosinto o Reueli Omomidiani, akamotebia, “Intwe nkogenda tore aase aaria ase Omonene atotebetie ng’a natoe. Inchuo ogende amo naintwe, na intwe natogokorere amaya, ekiagera Omonene orire eira ng’a nasesenie Abaisraeli.”" 
Numbers10:30 Korende Hobabu akairaneria, “Tinkogenda amo nainwe; inche nigo nkoirana ngende ase ense yane, na ase abanto b’eamate yane.”" 
Numbers10:31 Musa akamosorora, akamotebia, “Koranche tobaisa gototiga, ekiagera aye nomanyete buna togochia konagotoora ase erooro. Ase ayio nobe kogototang’ana." 
Numbers10:32 Naende koragende amo naintwe, amaya aria Omonene agochia gotokorera, ayio naro naintwe toragokorere.”" 
Numbers10:33 Abaisraeli bakaimoka korwa ase egetunwa keria ki’Omonene, bakagenda orogendo rw’amatuko atato. Esanduku y’okobwatana kw’Omonene yare ne chibao chirikire okobwatana ekabatang’ana ekabanyorera aase bagochia gotoora," 
Numbers10:34 ne riire riria ri’Omonene nigo riarenge igoro asebare ekero kia mobaso chingaki chinde chionsi barenge koimoka korwa ase ebitwori kogenda ase orogendo. 
Numbers10:35 Ekero kende gionsi Esanduku eria yarenge gochaka kobogorigwa gotang’ana orogendo, Musa nigo arenge kobora, “Omonene, imoka, ababisa bao tiga baserigwe na goserebanigwa, na baria bakogechete tiga batame korwa ase obosio bwao.”" 
Numbers10:36 Na ekero Esanduku eria yarenge goikigwa aase bagotimokera, Musa nigo arenge goteba, “Aye Omonene, bairanere Abaisraeli aba bare chilifu ne chilifu.”" 
Numbers11:1 Abanto bakereera ase engencho y’emechando yabo. Ekero Omonene aigwete okwereera kwabo akaba nendamwamu enene, agatoma omorero ogoka ase egati y’abanto, na omorero oria ogasamba abanto barenge ase chinsinyo chi’ebitwori." 
Numbers11:2 Abanto bakarera ase Musa ng’a bakonywe, nere agasaba Omonene, na omorero oria okarimigwa." 
Numbers11:3 Aase aria akarokwa Tabera, ekiagera omorero bw’Omonene bwogete ase egati y’abanto." 
Numbers11:4 Abanto baria basang’anaine n’Abaisraeli nigo barenge nobotoonu obonene bw’okogania chinyama, na Abaisraeli boigo bakarera bagateba, “Naki totanyora chinyama torie?" 
Numbers11:5 Twainyoire chinswe twarenge koria ase ense ya Misiri totare goakanera, na endagera ende enga buna emiongo emerandi, na emenyobio, na ebitunguo biare ao ao, ebiororo amo nebiroro." 
Numbers11:6 Na bono chinguru chiaito chiatoereire, titobwati endagera ende tokoria otatiga mana yoka.”" 
Numbers11:7 Mana nigo yarenge kororekana buna chinyeke chi’amaemba enkomba. 
Numbers11:8 Abanto nigo barenge gosoka bayesangereria, naende bayesia ne chingena, gose bayeswaga ase chikonu. Erio baba bakoyeiyekera ase chinyongo na koyeroisia yaba emegati. Igo yarenge gwansa buna amaandasi aroiseirie amaguta." 
Numbers11:9 Mana eyio nigo yarenge kogwa amo ne riime ase ebitwori ekero kia botuko. 
Numbers11:10 Musa akaigwa abanto bakwereera ase chiamate chiabo, kera omonto ase egesoero ki’eema yaye. Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene asebare; ase ayio Musa akagechigwa." 
Numbers11:11 Ere akamotebia Omonene, “Nase ki gwankoreire inche, omosomba oo, obobe obo iga? Naende ntanyoreti ogwancherwa asore. Nase ki kwang’eire emeremo emenene ase okoraa abanto aba?" 
Numbers11:12 Inee! Ninche naiborete abanto aba bonsi? Gose ninche nabatongete? Naki rende ogontebia ng’a mbabogorie na kobarera ase egekuba kiane, buna omoreri akobogoria omwana ekeng’werere okogonka, goika imbaikie ase ense eria kwarierete chisokoro chiabo eira ng’a nobayee?”" 
Numbers11:13 Ng’ai nkorusia chinyama nkoa abanto aba bonsi? Barabwo nigo bakorera asende bagoteba: Toe chinyama torie! 
Numbers11:14 Inche bweka tinkonyara koraa abanto aba, egurube eye nendito mono asende." 
Numbers11:15 Onye aye kogonkorera amang’ana buna ayio, indorera amabera, ong’ite rimo rioka inkwe ase obosio bwao, erinde timbaisa korora obokong’u obo." 
Numbers11:16 Omonene akamoiraneria, “Sangereria abagaaka b’Abaisraeli emerongo etano na ebere, abwo basikire, bamanyekanete bare abatang’ani b’abanto, obarente agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, batenene aroro amo naye." 
Numbers11:17 Inche ning’ike korwa igoro, nkwane naye aroro agwo. Naende ning’ee barabwo korwa ase omoika oria ore ime asore. Erio barabwo bakore emeremo amo naye, erinde tobaisa kobogoria obokong’u bw’okoraa abanto aba aye bweka." 
Numbers11:18 Kwana nabanto, obatebie: Echene inwe abanyene ase engencho y’ankio; namonyore chinyama mokoria. Omonene oigure okwereera kwaino na buna mwaboria: Ning’o ogotoa chinyama torie? Ekero twarenge ase ense ya Misiri, nigo twarenge buya. Ase ayio Omonene nache abae chinyama morie." 
Numbers11:19 Timogochiria ase rituko erimo rioka, gose ase amatuko abere, gose atano, gose ikomi, gose emerongo ebere," 
Numbers11:20 korende namorie chinyama ase omotienyi omogima goika mochiroke chietere ase chimioro na kobagara‐garia moyo. Ayio nigo arakoreke, ekiagera mwangire Omonene oria omenyete ase egati yaino, mwarerire ase obosio bwaye na gokwana: Ninki kiagerete tokarua Misiri?”" 
Numbers11:21 Musa agatebia Omonene, “Abanto aba nkoraa, nigo bare abarwani chilifu amagana atano na rimo bagotaara namagoro, naye bono gwatebire ng’a nobae chinyama barie ase omotienyi omogima." 
Numbers11:22 Inee! Ntonyare konyenya ching’ondi gose chiombe chiisaine abanto aba baegwe barie baigote? Gose ne chinswe chionsi chia nyancha chirasangererigwe, erinde chibaisane?”" 
Numbers11:23 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Inee! Nigo oroche ng’a okoboko kwane nokweng’e? Bono norore gose amang’ana aane naikeranigwe asore, gose yaya.”" 
Numbers11:24 Ase ayio Musa akagenda, agatebia abanto amang’ana onsi Omonene akwanete. Agasangereria abagaaka emerongo etano na ebere, nabwo bagatenena agwo goetanana Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers11:25 Erio Omonene agaika korwa igoro ore riire ime, agakwana na Musa, na akaa abagaaka baria emerongo etano na ebere korwa ase omoika oria oria orenge ime ase Musa. Ekero omoika oria obete igoro asebare barabwo bakabana, korende tibagenderera gokora igo naende nonya ndinde." 
Numbers11:26 Bono abanto babere, Elidadi na Medadi, barabwo bagatigara ase egetwori, na omoika ogacha igoro asebare. Igo barenge abamo b’abwo bachoretwe, korende tibagenda agwo ase Eema, na barabwo bakabanera agwo ase egetwori." 
Numbers11:27 Omonto oyomo omosae akaminyoka ase Musa, akamotebia, “Elidadi na Medadi nkobana bare ase egetwori.”" 
Numbers11:28 Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, nigo arenge omokoreri o Musa korwa ekero arenge omosae. Ere agakwana na Musa, akamotebia, “Omonene one, bakanie.”" 
Numbers11:29 Musa akamoboria, “Aye nigo ore ne ribero ase engencho yane? Ninganetie ng’a Omonene ae abanto bonsi omoika oye, erinde babe ababani.”" 
Numbers11:30 Erio Musa na abagaaka b’Abaisraeli bakairana ase egetwori. 
Numbers11:31 Omonene akarenta omwaga, na omwaga oyio okarenta chinkware korwa ase enyancha, ogachiruta igoro y’ebitwori gochia ase oboare bw’orogendo rwe rituko erimo goetania ebitwori chigatorerekana, chikaba chinduenyi gocha igoro koreng’ana ekerengo ki’amaboko abere." 
Numbers11:32 Abanto bakaimoka, bagasangereria chinkware chiria ase rituko riria rigima, na obotuko bwonsi, naende rituko ria kabere. Oyosangereretie chinke nigo asangereretie chiaisaine goetania ebitonga rigana erimo. Bagachikora emetanda aande onsi ase ebitwori." 
Numbers11:33 Ekero abanto babekire chinyama menwa yabo, na konya batarachimera, Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene asebare, akabaita ase okobaaka namaakwa amanene mono." 
Numbers11:34 Aase aaria akarokwa Kibiroti‐Hatawa, ekiagera aroro agwo nao abanto baria barenge abatoonu b’okogania chinyama batindegetwe." 
Numbers11:35 Abanto bakarua Kibiroti‐Hatawa, bakagenda bagaika Haseroti, bakabeera aroro." 
Numbers12:1 Miriamu na Haroni bagakwana amang’ana arenge mamincha ya Musa, ekiagera Musa konya onyuomire omokungu korwa ase Abaetiopia." 
Numbers12:2 Bagakwana, bagateba, “Inee! Omonene nigo agokwana na Musa bweka? Tari gokwana naintwe?” Omonene akaigwa amang’ana ayio." 
Numbers12:3 Omonto oyio Musa nigo arenge omoitongo mono kobua abanto bonsi barenge ase ense. 
Numbers12:4 Erio agwo Omonene agakwana na Musa, na Haroni, na Miriamu, akabatebia, “Nimbaganetie inwe batato mochiche agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano.” Abwo batato bakagenda aroro." 
Numbers12:5 Omonene agaika korwa igoro ore ime ase riire riria riare buna esiiro, agatenena agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema eria, akarangeria Haroni na Miriamu. Barabwo bagasuka gochia bosio," 
Numbers12:6 na Omonene akabatebia, “Igwa amang’ana aane: Onye omobani ore ase egati yaino, inche Omonene nigo nkwemanyekania asare ase okorora, naende nakwana nere ase chindoto." 
Numbers12:7 Korende ase Musa, omosomba one, taibo, ere nomwegenwa ase enyomba yane yonsi." 
Numbers12:8 Nigo ngokwana nere obosio ase obosio, gose tindi gokwana nere ase emerabaaro; ere ororire ekieni kiane. Nase ki inwe motabete nobwoba gokwana mamincha ya Musa, omosomba one?”" 
Numbers12:9 Endamwamu y’Omonene ekaba enene asebare, akarua aroro agwo, akagenda." 
Numbers12:10 Ekero riire riria riaruete ase Eema eria, omobere o Miriamu konya obeire noborwaire bwa ukoma, okaraba se. Haroni akaonchoka komorigereria, akarora ng’a omobere oye obeire noborwaire bwa ukoma." 
Numbers12:11 Erio Haroni agatebia Musa, “Aye omonene one, koranche, tobaisa gotoa egesusuro, ekiagera intwe nigo twakorire egento ki’oboriri, na twakorire ebibe." 
Numbers12:12 Totiga Miriamu abe buna oyokure, buna omonto oiboretwe ne chinyama ekeng’ese, chianiarokeire inda, chiaerire.”" 
Numbers12:13 Musa akarera ase Omonene, “Aye Nyasae, nagosoroire, koranche ogwenie Miriamu!”" 
Numbers12:14 Korende Omonene akairaneria Musa, “Onye rende ise arenge komotwera amate ase obosio bwaye, Inee, tagwenerete anyore obosooku ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere? Tiga aatananwe korwa ase egetwori abekwe aase aao ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, na nyuma y’ayio airanigwe ase egetwori.”" 
Numbers12:15 Ase ayio Miriamu agasokigwa isiko y’egetwori, akabekwa aase aao ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, na abanto tibaimogete kogenda goika ekero Miriamu airanete ase egetwori." 
Numbers12:16 Nyuma y’ayio abanto bakaimoka kogenda korwa ase Haseroti, bagaika ase erooro ya Parani, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers13:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers13:2 “Chora omotang’ani oyomo korwa ase kera egesaku ase ebisaku bionsi ikomi na bibere bi’Abaisraeli, erio obatome bagende koroota ense ya Kanani, ense eria ngochia koa Abaisraeli.”" 
Numbers13:3 Musa agatoma abanto korwa ase erooro ya Parani, buna Omonene amochigete. Abanto abwo bonsi nigo barenge abatang’ani ase Abaisraeli." 
Numbers13:4 Aya naro amarieta abo: Korwa ase egesaku kia Reuben, Samua, mosinto o Sakuri;" 
Numbers13:5 korwa ase egesaku gia Simeoni, Safati, mosinto o Hora;" 
Numbers13:6 korwa ase egesaku kia Yuda, Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune;" 
Numbers13:7 korwa ase egesaku gia Isakaru, Igali, mosinto o Yusufu;" 
Numbers13:8 korwa ase egesaku gi’Efraimu, Hosea, mosinto o Nuni;" 
Numbers13:8 korwa ase egesaku gi’Efraimu, Hosea, mosinto o Nuni;" 
Numbers13:9 korwa ase egesaku kia Benjamin, Paliti, mosinto o Rafu;" 
Numbers13:10 korwa ase egesaku gia Sabuloni, Gadieli, mosinto o Sodi;" 
Numbers13:11 korwa ase egesaku kia Yusufu (nakio ekia Manase), Gadi, mosinto o Susi;" 
Numbers13:12 korwa ase egesaku kia Dani, Amieli, mosinto o Gemali;" 
Numbers13:13 korwa ase egesaku gi’Aseri, Seturi, mosinto o Mikaeli;" 
Numbers13:14 korwa ase egesaku kia Nafutali, Nabi, mosinto o Bofasi;" 
Numbers13:15 korwa ase egesaku kia Gadi, Geueli, mosinto o Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Aya naro amarieta ’abanto baria Musa atomete gochia koroota ense eria. Musa akaroka Hosea, mosinto o Nuni, Yoshua." 
Numbers13:16 Aya naro amarieta ’abanto baria Musa atomete gochia koroota ense eria. Musa akaroka Hosea, mosinto o Nuni, Yoshua." 
Numbers13:17 Ekero Musa are kobatoma gochia koroota ense ya Kanani, akabatebia, “Genda motiire gochia Negebu, ensemo ya irianyi y’ense eria, naende motiire gochia igoro ase ense y’ebitunwa." 
Numbers13:18 Morigererie buna ense eria ere, naende morore gose abanto bareo mbare ne chinguru, gose naboro bare, gose nabake, gose nabange." 
Numbers13:19 Naende morore gose ense eria abanto bamenyete nengiya gose nembe, naende morore emechie yabo ase bamenyete, onye nigo ere ebitwori gose nigo egiteire chindwaki." 
Numbers13:20 Morigererie gose riroba ndire nobotobu gose neritaka, naende gose emete nereo, gose teiyo. Mobe abaremu, morentane okwama kw’amatunda gw’ense eria.” (Engaki eria nigo yarenge ekero emesabibu konya yamire ase ogotongorwa.)" 
Numbers13:21 Ase ayio bakagenda bakaroota ense eria, bagachakera korwa ase erooro ya Sini bagaika Rehobu ase enchera ekogenda Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Bagatiira, bakagenda ritang’ani ase ensemo ya irianyi y’ense eria, na bagaika Heburoni, agwo ase Ahimani, na Sesai, na Talimai, abanto b’ororeria rw’Anaki, bamenyete. (Heburoni konya oagachirwe emiaka etano na ebere ritang’ani omochie o Soani o Misiri otaraagachwa.)" 
Numbers13:23 Bagaika ase rikura ri’Esikoli, na aroro bakabutora orosagia rw’emesabibu rwabwate egesago ekenene mono, bagasomeka omwaro ase orosagia roria, na abanto babere bakarwambana. Naende bagatwa amakomomanga na amako." 
Numbers13:24 Aase aria akarokwa Rikura ri’Esikoli ase engencho y’orosagia roria Abaisraeli babutorete korwa aroro.
