Numbers13:25 Ekero amatuko emerongo ene aerire, abanto baria chirooti bakairana korwa ase okoroota ense eria." 
Numbers13:26 Bakairana gochia ase Musa na Haroni, na ase omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli agwo Kadeshi ase erooro ya Parani, bakabatebia amang’ana onsi, na bakaborokia okwama gw’ense eria." 
Numbers13:27 Barabwo bagatebia Musa, “Ntwagenda ase ense eria gwatotomete, ntwayenyora ng’a nentenenku ere namabeere na amooke, rora okwama gw’ense eria." 
Numbers13:28 Korende nonya naboigo, abanto bamenyeteo nigo bare ne chinguru, na emechie yabo nemenene mono, naende egitire buya ne chindwaki. Tari ayio oka, korende boigo ntwarora abanto b’ororeria rw’Anaki bare aroro." 
Numbers13:29 Abaameleki nigo bamenyete ase ense ya Negebu, ensemo ya irianyi y’ense eria; Abahiti, na Abayebusi, na Abaamori, nigo bamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa. Abakanani barabwo nigo bamenyete ase enyancha enene mbarabare, naende ang’e norooche rwa Yorodan.”" 
Numbers13:30 Korende Kalebu agakiria abanto tibabaisa koamereria Musa, agateba, “Tiga togende bwango, erinde toire ense eria, ekiagera intwe ntonyare kobua ense eria.”" 
Numbers13:31 Abanto baria bagendete amo nere bagateba, “Intwe titokonyara korwania abanto baria tobabue; nigo bare ne chinguru gotobua.”" 
Numbers13:32 Ase ayio bakarentera Abaisraeli amang’ana amabe igoro y’ense eria bagendete koroota, bagateba, “Ense eria twataara ime yaye koyeroota, nigo ere ense egoita abanto bamenyeteo. Abanto bonsi twarora nabatambe mono." 
Numbers13:33 Ee, ntwarora amamonto, abanto b’ororeria rw’Anaki. Intwe nigo twerora ng’a nabasinini mono, tore buna ebisase. Naboigo twarorekana asebare.”" 
Numbers14:1 Erio omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto bagaaka eriogi rinene, bakaba bakorera ase obotuko boria." 
Numbers14:2 Abaisraeli bonsi bakaba bakwomania Musa na Haroni; bonsi bagakwana “Nigo anga yaba buya onye ntwakwerete Misiri, gose ase erooro eye." 
Numbers14:3 Ninki kiagera Omonene agotoira ase ense eria tochie goitwa ase esegi? Abakungu baito, na abana baito, nigo bagochia gwoswa nababisa baito. Nigo yare koba buya toirane Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:4 Barabwo bagatebania, “Tochore omonto oyomo abe omoraai oito, toirane Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Musa na Haroni bagatung’ama inse bakaumama ase amasio ’omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli osangererekanete. 
Numbers14:6 Erio Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, na Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, baria barenge abamo be chirooti chiria chiarootete ense eria, bagatandora chianga chiabo," 
Numbers14:7 bagatebia omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, “Ense eria twataarete ase okoyeroota nigo ere ense engiya mono." 
Numbers14:8 Onye Omonene okogokigwa naintwe, natoire aroro na gotoa ense eria entenenku ere namabeere na amooke." 
Numbers14:9 Timobaisa kwanga koigwera Omonene, na timobaisa kwoboa ababiare b’ense eria; abwo nigo barabe asetore buna endagera. Baurirwe okorendwa kwabo; Omonene nigo are amo naintwe; timobairoka.”" 
Numbers14:10 Korende omoganda bwonsi ogaaka eriogi, ogateba ng’a baitwe namagena. Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokaoroka mobosokano agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano ase Abaisraeli bonsi." 
Numbers14:11 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Ngoika ririri abanto aba barabe bagonchaya? Na ngoika ririri barabe batari konyegena, nonya nakorire ebikone ebinge ase egati yabo?" 
Numbers14:12 Nkobaaka inde noborwaire bogoita erinde imbasirie, na aye ngokore obe egesaku ekenene, naende kere nokobua goetania abanto aba.”" 
Numbers14:13 Korende Musa akamoiraneria, “Aye nigo kwarusetie abanto aba korwa ase ense ya Misiri ne chinguru chinene. Ekero Abamisiri bonsi baraigwe aya gwakorire ase abanto aba," 
Numbers14:14 barabwo mbatebie abanto b’ense eye amang’ana ayio. Barabwo konya baigure ng’a aye Omonene nigo ore ase egati y’Abaisraeli, kwarorekanire asebare obosio ase obosio, ne riire riao nigo riteneine asebare, naende naye okobatang’ana, omobaso ase riire rire buna esiiro, na obotuko ase omorero ore buna esiiro." 
Numbers14:15 Bono onye aye kogoita abanto aba bonsi amo, erio abanto b’ebisaku abaraigwe chinkuma chiao mbatebe:" 
Numbers14:16 Omonene nigo asinyetwe koira abanto aba ase ense eria konya arire eira akobaa; ase ayio obaiteire ase erooro. 
Numbers14:17 Bono nagosabire, tiga okobua kwao, aye Omonene, kobe okonene buna aye kwarire eira, kogokwana:" 
Numbers14:18 Inche Omonene tindi omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu, nigo inde omonyene amabera, naende nigo inde nobwanchani botari koera. Nigo nkwabera amamocho na ogosaria, korende tingotiga koa abana egesusuro goika ekiaare kia gatato, na egia kane, ase engencho y’amabe ’abaibori babo." 
Numbers14:19 Ase ayio nagosabire, bwabere ebibe bi’abanto aba koreng’ana nobonene bw’obwanchani bwao botari koera, koreng’ana buna aye kwabaaberete korwa ekero barenge Misiri goika rero iga.”" 
Numbers14:20 Erio Omonene agateba, “Nabaabeire koreng’ana buna gwansabire." 
Numbers14:21 Korende ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, naende buna ense yonsi eraichorwe nobonene bwane," 
Numbers14:22 onde tari ase abanto aba orasoe ense eria. Aba barorire obonene bwane na ebikone biria nakorete aaria Misiri, na ase erooro eye, korende nonya naboigo babeire bagonteema ase chingaki echi chionsi, nonya ng’ara ikomi, bangire konyigwera." 
Numbers14:23 Ase barabwo onde tari nonya noyomo, oranyare korora ense eria narierete chisokoro chiabo eira ng’a nimbayee. Onde tari ase abwo banchayete oranyare koyerora." 
Numbers14:24 Korende Kalebu, omosomba one, ekiagera abwate omoika ore nogwatananekana korwa ase oyo bwa baria bande, naende obeire okonyigwera buya ase amang’ana onsi, nimoire ase ense eria agendete koroota naende ning’ee abanto b’ororeria rwaye ense eria ebe eyabo." 
Numbers14:25 Na bono ekiagera Abaameleki na Abakanani bamenyete ime ase amakura, inwe ankio moonchoke, mochake koirana gochia ase enchera ekogenda ase omosomo bw’Enyancha Embariri.”" 
Numbers14:26 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Numbers14:27 “Inee! Ngoika ririri omoganda oyo omobe oremurunganie asende? Naigure Abaisraeli banyemurunganeirie. 
Numbers14:28 Obatebie ng’a inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Buna inche inde moyo, naigure amang’ana ayio mwakwanire, ayio naro ndabakorere." 
Numbers14:29 Ekiagera mwemurunganirie asende, inwe mwensi abamwabarirwe na korikwa, abamwakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, nigo morakwe, na emebere yaino ekwete ebeere aiga ase erooro." 
Numbers14:30 Ase ense eria nabarierete eira na gotiana ng’a nimbayee, onde tari asemore orachie komenyao, otatiga Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni." 
Numbers14:31 Korende abana baino, abwo mwatebete ng’a nabooswe, aba nabwo ndaire aroro, na barabwo mbamenye ase ense eria inwe mwangire." 
Numbers14:32 Korende inwe nigo morakwere aiga ase erooro, na emebere yaino esirere aiga." 
Numbers14:33 Abana baino nababe abarisia ase erooro eye ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, nabarabwo nabachandeke, ekiagera inwe motabete abegenwa asende, mbabe bagochandeka goika omonto bw’omoerio bw’ekegori kiaino akwe, na omobere oye osirere ase erooro eye." 
Numbers14:34 Inwe nigo morachandeke ase emiaka emerongo ene, omwaka oyomo ase kera rituko mwarenge koroota ense eria, nainwe namonyare komanya ng’a inki gekoba ekero nkoba mamincha yaino." 
Numbers14:35 Ninche Omonene nakwanire. Ekeene ninkore egento eke ase omoganda oyo omobe osangererekanire amo, na obeire mamincha yane. Aiga ase erooro ninsirie abanto aba, aa ase erooro nao barakwere.”" 
Numbers14:36 Abanto baria Musa atomete gochia koroota ense eria barentete amang’ana amabe igoro y’ense eria, bakagera omoganda bwonsi okemurungania ase Omonene." 
Numbers14:37 Ase ayio Omonene akabaaka noborwaire bogoita, na barabwo bagakwera agwo ase obosio bwaye." 
Numbers14:38 Korende Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, na Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, barabwo boka bagatigwa bare moyo korwa ase abanto baria bagendete koroota ense eria." 
Numbers14:39 Musa agatebia Abaisraeli amang’ana onsi Omonene akwanete, na abanto bakarera mono nobororo." 
Numbers14:40 Ase emambia ye rituko ria kabere bakaimoka, bagatiira gochia ase ense y’ebitunwa, bagakwana, “Rora twachire, nao tore aa, bono twanchire kogenda ase ense eria Omonene atotebetie. Intwe twakorire ebibe.”" 
Numbers14:41 Korende Musa akabatebia, “Nase ki bono mogosaria ogochika kw’Omonene. Timokonyara konyora ogosesenigwa ase okogendao." 
Numbers14:42 Timobaisa kogenda; moise gokora igo, rirorio nigo mogochia goitwa nababisa baino, ekiagera Omonene tari amo nainwe." 
Numbers14:43 Aroro agwo bosio bwaino Abaameleki na Abakanani mbareo. Nigo bagochia kobarwania bababue na kobaita nemioro, ekiagera inwe mwaonchokire, mwangire koigwera Omonene; nere takonyara koba amo nainwe.”" 
Numbers14:44 Korende bagekora abaremu, bagatiira gochia ase ense y’ebitunwa, nonya Esanduku eria yare ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene yatigarete ase egetwori, na Musa nao atigarete." 
Numbers14:45 Erio Abaameleki na Abakanani abamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa, bagatirimboka bakarwania Abaisraeli abwo, bakababua na kobaseria, bakababwatia goikera Horima." 
Numbers15:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers15:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie buna barachie gokora ekero baraike ase ense eria ngochia kobaa." 
Numbers15:3 Batebie: Monyare korua ase Omonene eng’iti korwa ase chiombe, gose korwa ase riicho rie ching’ondi, gose chimbori, chibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero, gose ekeng’wanso kende gionsi ase ogoikerania eira mwariete, gose eki’ogwancha kwaino, gose ase chingaki chichikire ase Amatuko aino Amanene, kebe ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera Omonene." 
Numbers15:4 Oyokorua ebing’wanso buna ebio ase Omonene, goika arue okoruegwa kw’endagera, obosie obonuke ebimunu bibere bwochoganirie namaguta egetuba ekemo," 
Numbers15:5 na edivai egetuba ekemo kebe okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa, amo na kera emanwa y’eng’ondi; onye nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gose ekeng’wanso kende gionsi." 
Numbers15:6 Ekero okorua emingichi ebe ekeng’wanso, orente amo nero obosie obonuke ebimunu bine, bwochoganirie namaguta egetuba ekemo na ekeng’ese, bibe okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Numbers15:7 Ase okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa morue edivai egetuba ekemo na ekeng’ese ebe rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera Omonene. 
Numbers15:8 Ekero okorua eeri ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, gose ekeng’wanso kende gionsi, onye nase ogoikerania eira kwariete, gose ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe ase Omonene," 
Numbers15:9 orue amo neeri eria obosie obonuke ebimunu bitano na ekemo, bwochoganirie namaguta ebituba bibere," 
Numbers15:10 na orue edivai ebituba bibere ebe okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa. Okwo nokoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero kore ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera Omonene. 
Numbers15:11 “Ebinto ebi nabio biraruegwe amo na kera eeri, gose emingichi, gose kera emanwa y’eng’ondi gose ey’embori." 
Numbers15:12 Buna koreng’ana omobaro bwe ching’iti echio chiraruegwe chibe ebing’wanso orabe, nokoruegwa kw’endagera naboigo korabe." 
Numbers15:13 Abaisraeli bonsi ababiare nabwo barabwatie omoroberio oyio, ekero bakorua okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero, kobe risimu rigiya rikomogwenera Omonene." 
Numbers15:14 Onye omogeni ore amo nainwe, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino, nere oganetie korenta okoruegwa kwaye kogosambwa nomorero, kobe rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera Omonene, nigo arabwatie omoroberio oria oria obekirwe asemore." 
Numbers15:15 Ase omosangererekano oyio ogochika nokomo korabe asemore na ase omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino. Okwo nakobe ogochika koragenderere botambe, ebiaare ase ebiaare. Buna inwe more, naboigo omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino arabe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Numbers15:16 Ogochika nokomo, na omoroberio noyomo, asemore na ase omomenyi omenyete amo nainwe.”" 
Numbers15:17 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers15:18 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Ekero moraike ase ense eria ase ngochia kobaira," 
Numbers15:19 na mokoria endagera y’ense eria, morente okoruegwa kogosungusigwa ase Omonene." 
Numbers15:20 Ekero moraroisie omogati korwa ase obosie bw’ogotongora kw’endagera, namoyorente ase Omonene obe okoruegwa kw’ogotongora buna mokomoruera endagera korwa ase ekeooreri kiaino." 
Numbers15:21 Ase ebiaare biaino bionsi morentere Omonene okoruegwa korwa ase obosie bw’ogotongora kwaino. 
Numbers15:22 “Korende nenyare koba ng’a mwamochire kobwatia amachiko ande onsi Omonene achikire Musa," 
Numbers15:23 gose abanto baino tibarakora onsi aya Omonene achikire goetera ase Musa, gochakera rituko riria Omonene aruete amachiko, na kogenderera ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Numbers15:24 Onye okomocha okwo gwakorirwe ase ogotancha, na ase ogotamanya kw’omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto, rirorio barue eeri ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kere ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera Omonene. Amo nekio barente okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ogw’ekenyugwa, koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire, amo negoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Numbers15:25 Omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, na barabwo mbaaberwe, ekiagera okomocha okwo nigo gwakoretwe mosiabano ase ogotancha. Barabwo barentire okoruegwa kwabo, ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero ase Omonene, naboigo barentire ekeng’wanso kiabo ki’ebibe ase Omonene ase engencho y’okomocha kwabo gwakoretwe mosiabano ase ogotancha." 
Numbers15:26 Naboigo omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli amo nomomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo, bonsi nabaaberwe, ekiagera abwo bonsi nigo babareretwe okomocha koria gwakoretwe mosiabano ase ogotancha." 
Numbers15:27 “Onye omonto oyomo ogokora ebibe mosiabano atancheti, arue emanwa esubeni yakoorire omwaka oyomo, ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Numbers15:28 Omokuani akore okobwatanigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene ase omonto oria okorire ebibe atancheti, na omonto oria naaberwe." 
Numbers15:29 Nigo morabe nogochika okomo ase oyio okorire ebibe mosiabano, atancheti, karabe omobiare bw’Abaisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino." 
Numbers15:30 “Korende omonto orakore gento kende gionsi moeneno, karabe omobiare bw’Abaisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yaino, oyio igo oramire Omonene, ere oyio naatananwe korwa ase abanto baye." 
Numbers15:31 Oyio ochayire ring’ana ri’Omonene, naende osaririe ogochika kwaye, takororerwa amabera. Goika aatananwe kegima, nere abarerwe ebibe biaye.”" 
Numbers15:32 Ekero Abaisraeli bagendererete koba ase erooro, omonto oyomo akanyorwa ogotenya chinko ase rituko ri’Esabato." 
Numbers15:33 Abanto baria bamonyorete bakamoira ase Musa na Haroni, na ase omoganda bwonsi." 
Numbers15:34 Omonto oria agasiekerwa aase gete akarendwa, ekiagera konya teramanyekana boronge egento agwenerete akorerwe." 
Numbers15:35 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Omonto oyio goika aitwe akwe: asokigwe isiko y’egetwori, erio omoganda bwonsi omoake amagena.”" 
Numbers15:36 Abanto bonsi b’omoganda bakamosokia isiko y’egetwori, bakamoaka amagena goika agakwa, buna Omonene achigete Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers15:38 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obachike ng’a bakore amasugunia ase emego ye chianga chiabo, babeke ase kera obosugunia eusi ere buru. Naboigo barakore ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Numbers15:39 Ekiagera amasugunia ayio abe ekeinyorio asemore. Ekero mokoyarigereria monyare koinyora amachiko aane onsi na koyabwata. Naboigo moranyare gokonywa, erinde mobe abegenwa asende na gwetanga korwa ase okogania okobe gwe chinkoro chiaino na amaiso aino." 
Numbers15:40 Ase igo moinyore na kobwata amachiko aane onsi, nainwe namobe abachenu asende inche Nyasae oino." 
Numbers15:41 Ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erinde imbe Nyasae oino. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Numbers16:1 Kora, mosinto o Isari, Omolawi bw’eamate ya Kohati, na Datani, na Abiiramu, basinto b’Eliabu, na Oni, mosinto o Peleti bw’egesaku kia Reuben," 
Numbers16:2 bakabwatana, bakaanga koigwera Musa. Amo nabwo mbarenge abanto bande b’Abaisraeli, amagana abere, na emerongo etano. Abwo barenge abaraai bachorire korwa ase omosangererekano, bamanyekanete, naende basikire." 
Numbers16:3 Barabwo bakabwatana, bakaba mamincha ya Musa na Haroni, bakabatebia, “Bono ayio aisanire. Abanto bonsi b’omoganda oyo nigo bare abachenu; Omonene nigo are amo na kera oyomo. Nase ki rende inwe mweimokereirie igoro na mogwekora abanene igoro y’omosangererekano bw’Omonene?”" 
Numbers16:4 Ekero Musa aigwete amang’ana ayio agatung’ama inse akaumama. 
Numbers16:5 Erio agakwana na Kora na abanto bonsi b’ekeombe kiaye, akabatebia, “Ankio mambia Omonene nache aorokie ng’a ning’o ore oyoye, naende ning’o ore omochenu na ning’o arae ribaga amoike ang’e. Nache arente omonto oyo achorire aike ang’e nere." 
Numbers16:6 Ankio mambia moche mokore iga: Aye Kora amo na bonsi abagokobwatia, moimokie chindogio," 
Numbers16:7 mwanchare omorero mobekeo, na igoro y’omorero oyio mobeke ubani, naende mochirente ase obosio bw’Omonene. Omonto oria Omonene arachore, nere oyio orabe oria omochenu. Inwe Abalawi, bono ayio abaisanire.”" 
Numbers16:8 Musa akagenderera gokwana na Kora, agateba, “Bono inwe Abalawi, igwa!" 
Numbers16:9 Inee! Nigo moroche ng’a negento egesinini asemore ng’a Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli obaatananire inwe korwa ase omoganda bw’Abaisraeli, na kobarenta mobe ang’e nere, na komokorera Omonene ase Obomenyo bwaye Obochenu, na gotenenera omoganda bw’abanto, na kobakorera?" 
Numbers16:10 Omonene nigo akoete aye amo n’Abalawi bamino ribaga mobeere ang’e nere. Inee! Igo mokorigia obokuani boigo? 
Numbers16:11 Haroni ninki aisaine inwe mwamwemurunganeirie mamincha yaye? Ase ayio, mwerende, aye amo na bonsi abagokobwatia. Igo mwasangererekanire mamincha y’Omonene.”" 
Numbers16:12 Erio Musa akarangeria Datani na Abiiramu, basinto b’Eliabu. Barabwo bakairaneria, “Intwe titogocha." 
Numbers16:13 Inee! Aya namang’ana amagusu asore ng’a gwatorusetie korwa ase ense eria entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, na ogatorenta aa, erinde otoite tokwere aa ase erooro eye? Na bono aye nigo ogwekora koba omonene igoro asetore?" 
Numbers16:14 Naende nonya naboigo, aye totorenteti ase ense eria entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, gose totoeti emiando y’amaremo na emegondo y’emesabibu. Inee! Igo ogochia kobaukoria abanto aba bonsi? Intwe titogocha.”" 
Numbers16:15 Musa akagechigwa mono, agatebia Omonene, “Tobaisa gwanchera ebing’wanso biabo. Inche tindaira nonya netigere yabo eyemo, gose tindakorera nonya noyomo obo bobe.”" 
Numbers16:16 Musa agatebia Kora, “Ankio aye amo na bonsi abagokobwatia mochiche ase obosio bw’Omonene. Haroni nere nache boigo." 
Numbers16:17 Kera oyomo oino aimokie orogio rwaye rw’omorero, na arobekere ubani na kororenta ase obosio bw’Omonene. Chindogio chionsi nigo chirabe amagana abere, na emerongo etano; naye orente orwao, na Haroni nere arente orwaye.”" 
Numbers16:18 Ase ayio kera omonto akaimokia orogio rwaye, akarobeka omorero, na igoro yaye ubani, bagacha bagatenena ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Musa na Haroni bagatenenenao boigo." 
Numbers16:19 Erio Kora agasangereria omoganda bwonsi, na barabwo bagatenena bosio bwa Musa na Haroni agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema eria. Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokaorokera omoganda bwonsi." 
Numbers16:20 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Numbers16:21 “Tigera, morue ase abanto b’omoganda oyo, erinde mbasirie ara rimo.”" 
Numbers16:22 Musa na Haroni bagatung’ama inse bakaumama, bagateba, “Aye Nyasae, Nyasae okorua obogima ase abanto bonsi, Inee, omonto oyomo gakorire ebibe, naye igo okogechigwa nomoganda oyo bwonsi?”" 
Numbers16:23 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers16:24 “Kwana nomoganda bw’abanto oyotebie: Tigera morue aase aetanaine chiema chia Kora, na Datani, na Abiiramu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Musa akaimoka amo nabagaaka b’Abaisraeli, bakagenda ase Datani na Abiiramu." 
Numbers16:26 Erio agatebia omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto, “Eatanane, nabasoroire, morue ase chiema chi’abanto aba abakori amabe. Timobaisa gokuna gento kende gionsi kiabo; moise kogekuna nigo mogochia gosirigwa ase engencho y’ebibe biabo bionsi.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ase ayio abanto abwo bageatanana bakarua ase chiema chia Kora, na Datani, na Abiiramu. Datani na Abiiramu bagasoka isiko, amo nabakungu babo na abana babo, abanene na abake, bagatenena ase ebisoero bie chiema chiabo." 
Numbers16:28 Musa agatebia abanto, “Ase aya namomanye ng’a Omonene ontomire gokora aya onsi, naende ng’a tari inche omonyene nebegete gokora buna inyanchete." 
Numbers16:29 Onye abanto aba bagochia gokwa buna mwanyabanto onde bwensi agokwa, gose bakonyora egesusuro buna mwanyabanto onde bwensi akonyora, rirorio Omonene tantometi." 
Numbers16:30 Korende onye Omonene ogochia gokora egento ekeyia, erinde riroba ritandoke, rimere abanto abwo amo nebinto biabo bionsi, na barabwo barimere riroba ime bare moyo, bagende gochia aase abakure, erio namomanye ng’a abanto aba bachayire Omonene.”" 
Numbers16:31 Ekero Musa akoorire gokwana amang’ana aya onsi, riroba rigatandoka inse yabo." 
Numbers16:32 Riroba rikabwereka, rikabamera, amo ne chiamate chiabo, na abanto bonsi ababwatetie Kora, amo nebinto biabo bionsi." 
Numbers16:33 Ase ayio barabwo bonsi bakamerwa bare moyo, bakagenda gochia aase abakure, boigo nebinto biabo, erio riroba rikairanerana, rikabatindeka, na barabwo bagasirigwa bakarua ase omosangererekano oria." 
Numbers16:34 Abaisraeli bonsi abarenge ang’e nabarabwo bagatama, bakarera, bakobora, “Boigo naintwe riroba ndibaise gotomera.”" 
Numbers16:35 Erio omorero okarua ase Omonene, ogasamba abanto baria amagana abere, na emerongo etano, abwo konya barentire ubani." 
Numbers16:36 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers16:37 “Tebia Eleazari, omomura o Haroni omokuani, ng’a arusie chindogio chiria chi’omorero korwa ase omorero oyio ogwoka, na omorero oyio ayosiare gochia aare. Chindogio chiria chi’omorero konya chiabeire chinchenu." 
Numbers16:38 Chindogio echio chi’abanto baria basirete ekiagera bakorete ebibe, tiga chisunyuntwe chiroisigwe, chibe ekemumeko gekomumeka egesasimero, ekiagera abanto baria nigo bachiruete ase obosio bw’Omonene; ase ayio chindogio echio konya chiabeire chinchenu. Echio nachio ekemanyererio ki’ogokurera.”" 
Numbers16:39 Nabo Eleazari omokuani akaimokia chindogio chiria chi’etaai, echio abanto baria omorero osambete konya barentire ase obosio bw’Omonene. Echio chikaroisigwa, chikaba ekemumeko ki’egesasimero." 
Numbers16:40 Ekio nakebe ekemanyererio ki’ogokurera Abaisraeli, ng’a nonya noyomo otari omokuani, otari bw’ororeria rwa Haroni, tabaisa goika ang’e gosamba ubani ase obosio bw’Omonene. Aise gokora bo, nasire buna Kora amo nabanto baria bamobwatetie basirete. Aya onsi nigo akoretwe buna Omonene konya achikire Eleazari goetera ase Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Korende rituko ria kabere, omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli okemurunganeria Musa na Haroni, okabora, “Ninwe mwaitire abanto b’Omonene.”" 
Numbers16:42 Ekero omoganda oria konya osangererekanire amo ase okoba mamincha ya Musa na Haroni, barabwo bakeonchora bakarigereria Eema y’Omosangererekano bakarora riire riayetubire, na obonene bw’Omonene bokaoroka." 
Numbers16:43 Musa na Haroni bagacha bosio bw’Eema eria. 
Numbers16:44 Na Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers16:45 “Karue ase omoganda oyo, otigere gochia aare, erio inche mbasirie ara rimo.” Musa na Haroni bagatung’ama inse bakaumama." 
Numbers16:46 Musa agatebia Haroni, “Imokia orogio rwao rw’ogosambera ubani rusia omorero ase egesasimero oyobeke igoro yaye, erio obeke ubani igoro ase omorero oyio, oroimokie ogende bwango ase omoganda bw’abanto, erinde okore okobwatanigwa asebare, ekiagera Omonene obeire nendamwamu: amaakwa achakire goita abanto.”" 
Numbers16:47 Haroni akaimokia orogio rwa ubani buna Musa amotebetie, akaminyoka gochia ase egati y’omoganda oria. Amaakwa konya achakire ase egati y’abanto, korende Haroni akabeka ubani ase orogio roria, agakora okobwatanigwa asebare." 
Numbers16:48 Ekero Haroni atenenete gati gati ya baria bakwete na baria barenge moyo, amaakwa aria agatiga goita abanto." 
Numbers16:49 Abanto konya bakure nigo barenge chilifu ikomi na inye, na amagana atano na abere (14,700). Baria bakwete ase ogosaria gwa Kora tibarenge ase omobaro oyo." 
Numbers16:50 Ekero amaakwa atigete goita abanto, Haroni akairana ase Musa agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers17:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers17:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a bakoe chinyimbo chiabo, eyemo ase kera omotang’ani o kera egesaku kiabo, chinyimbo ikomi na ibere, Orike erieta ria kera oyomo ase enyimbo yaye." 
Numbers17:3 Orike erieta ria Haroni ase enyimbo y’egesaku kia Lawi. Kera omotang’ani bwe chiamate chia kera egesaku abe nenyimbo eyemo. 
Numbers17:4 Erio obeke chinyimbo echio ime ase Eema y’Omosangererekano bosio bw’Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, agwo ase inche ndaumerane nainwe." 
Numbers17:5 Enyimbo y’omonto oria inche ndachore neseboke. Ase enchera eyio ninkore Abaisraeli batige kwemurungania mamincha yane, naende ningere batige kwemurungania mamincha yaino.”" 
Numbers17:6 Musa agakwana n’Abaisraeli, akabatebia amang’ana ayio, na abaraai bonsi be chiamate chia kera egesaku bakamoa chinyimbo chiabo, chinyimbo ikomi na ibere, na enyimbo ya Haroni nigo yarenge ase egati ye chinyimbo chiria." 
Numbers17:7 Musa akaira chinyimbo chiria ime ase Eema y’Oborori, agachibekao ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Numbers17:8 Rituko ria kabere Musa agasoa ase Eema eria y’Oborori, akarora enyimbo ya Haroni, eyatenenerete egesaku kia Lawi, yasebokire, ne chinsagia echio chiasokirie amamumu na ebisicha, naende chiamire amatunda amalozi atobire." 
Numbers17:9 Erio Musa agasokia isiko chinyimbo chiria chionsi korwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, agachirenta ase Abaisraeli bonsi. Abwo bagachirigereria, na kera omonto akabogoria enyimbo yaye." 
Numbers17:10 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Irania enyimbo ya Haroni ebeere agwo bosio bw’Esanduku ere noborori, erinde egachwe ebe ekemanyererio ki’ogokurera abanto batari koigwera. Nabo okirie okwemurungania kwabo asende, timbaisa koigwa amang’ana buna ayio, mbaise kobaita bakwe.”" 
Numbers17:11 Naboigo Musa akorete buna Omonene amochigete. 
Numbers17:12 Abaisraeli bagatebia Musa, “Rora, intwe twaikeire omoerio oito, twakure, twasirire intwe twensi." 
Numbers17:13 Kera omonto ogoika ang’e ase Obomenyo bw’Omonene, goika akwe. Inee! Ntwensi pi togochia gokwa?”" 
Numbers18:1 Omonene agatebia Haroni, “Aye na abamura bao amo nabanto b’eamate yaino nigo morabarerwe okomocha konde gwonsi korabe kogokorerwa ase obokoreri ime y’Aase Aachenu, naende aye na abamura bao inamobarerwe okomocha konde gwonsi korabe kogokorwa ase obokuani bwaino." 
Numbers18:2 Renta Abalawi bamino, egesaku gia iso, barabwo bakore emeremo aroro amo naye. Abwo bagokorere aye amo nabamura bao, ekero mogokora emeremo agwo bosio bw’Eema eria ere noborori." 
Numbers18:3 Barabwo nabagokorere, naende bakore emeremo yonsi ase Eema eria, korende tibabaisa goika ang’e ase ebikorero ebichenu bi’Aase Aachenu, gose tibaika ang’e ase egesasimero. Baise gokora igo, aye amo nabarabwo igo morakwe." 
Numbers18:4 Nigo barabwatane naye na gokora emeremo yabo yonsi y’obokoreri ase Eema y’Omosangererekano. Omonto onde omoao otachikiri tabaisa goika ang’e akore emeremo amo nainwe. 
Numbers18:5 Aye amo nabamura bao, ninwe mweka morakore emeremo ime y’Aase Aachenu na ase egesasimero, erio nario endamwamu yane etabaise koba igoro y’Abaisraeli naende." 
Numbers18:6 Ninche nachorire Abalawi bamino korwa ase Abaisraeli, babe ekeegwa asemore. Barabwo baatananirwe asende inche Omonene, bakore emeremo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers18:7 Aye amo nabamura bao, ninwe mweka morakore emeremo yonsi y’obokuani, na emeremo yonsi ase egesasimero, na eria ere moino y’etoto enachete Obomenyo Obochenu. Nabaeire obokuani buna ekeegwa kebe ekiaino. Onye omonto onde omoao otachikiri ogocha ang’e ase obokoreri obwo, goika aitwe akwe.”" 
Numbers18:8 Omonene agatebia Haroni, “Rora, nakoeire okoruegwa konde gwonsi gokoruegwa asende, obe gokorenda. Ebinto bionsi ebichenu Abaisraeli bakorua, ebio nakobieire bibe egetari kiao amo neki’ororeria rwao kogenderera botambe." 
Numbers18:9 Ase ebinto bire ebichenu mono, ebiratigare, bitari gosambwa nomorero, ebirabe ebiao, nabio ebi: Kera okoruegwa kw’endagera, na kera ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, na ekeng’wanso gi’okorongeyia okomocha. Ebinto bionsi barabwo barabe bakorua asende, nabibe ebichenu mono asore, na ase abamura bao." 
Numbers18:10 Noriere ebinto ebio aase gete are aachenu mono. Kera omonto omosacha ore asemore nanyare koria ebinto ebio. Ebio nebinto ebichenu asore. 
Numbers18:11 “Boigo nakoeire okoruegwa Abaisraeli barabe bakorenta asende buna ebing’wanso bi’ogosungusia. Nakoeire aye amo nabana bao, abamura na abaiseke, nabibe ebiaino kogenderera botambe. Kera omonto ochenegete ore ase enyomba yao nanyare koria ebinto ebio." 
Numbers18:12 “Nakoeire kera ekere ekiya mono ki’ogotongora oko Abaisraeli bakondetera: Amaguta ’amazeituni, na edivai, na endagera." 
Numbers18:13 Okwama gwonsi kwe ritang’ani ase ebinto bionsi bigokina ase ense yabo, okwo bakondetera, nakobe okwao. Kera omonto ochenegete ore ase enyomba yao nanyare koria ebinto ebio." 
Numbers18:14 “Kera egento Abaisraeli baatananire asende nakebe ekiao. 
Numbers18:15 “Kera omwana omotangi bakorua asende nabe oyoo, na kera eng’iti entangi boigo, korende nonya naboigo bwanche embooria ase omwana omotangi o mwanyabanto, na ase chintangi chie ching’iti chiria chitachenegeti." 
Numbers18:16 Abana baboorigwe ekero bakoorire omotienyi oyomo, ne ching’iti boigo. Aye nobeke rigori ri’okobooria, ribe chisekeli isano chie chifeta, koreng’ana nesekeli egokorerwa ase Obomenyo Obochenu. (Esekeli eyemo nechigera ibere.)" 
Numbers18:17 Korende ching’iti chintangi chie chiombe, gose ching’ondi, gose chimbori, tichikoboorigwa. Echio nchiatananwe asende. Amanyinga abo oyanyororokereria igoro ase egesasimero, na ebitinya biabo obisambe bibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero kere ne rimisu rikongwenera." 
Numbers18:18 Korende chinyama chiabo amo ne ritaana rigosungusigwa, na ekenama kia borio, echio nachio echiao." 
Numbers18:19 “Ebiegwa bionsi ebichenu Abaisraeli barandetere inche Omonene nakobieire aye amo nabana bao, abamura na abaiseke, bibe ebitari biaino kogenderera botambe. Okwo nokobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’omonyo gwa kare na kare ase obosio bwane inche Omonene, okwo nakorire naye na ororeria rwao.”" 
Numbers18:20 Naende Omonene agatebia Haroni, “Aye tokonyora omwando bw’orogongo ase egati y’Abaisraeli bande. Tokoegwa ensemo ende yonsi ase egati yabo. Inche ninche ensemo yao, naende omwando oo, ase egati y’Abaisraeli." 
Numbers18:21 “Naeire Abalawi ensemo ya ikomi, eye Abaisraeli bakorua, ebe eyabo, ebe eng’eria ase emeremo eye barabe bagokora agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers18:22 Korwa bono na kogenderera Abaisraeli bande tibabaisa goika ang’e n’Eema eria. Baise gokora bo, nigo barabe nebibe, erio bakwe." 
Numbers18:23 Korende Abalawi barabwo nigo barakore emeremo ase Eema y’Oniosangererekano, okomocha kw’ebibe gokorabeo nakobarwe igoro asebare. Okwo nakwo korabe ogochika asebare kogenderera ebiaare ase ebiaare. Barabwo tibakoba nomwando ase egati y’Abaisraeli." 
Numbers18:24 Ensemo ya ikomi eye Abaisraeli bakondetera buna okoruegwa kwabo nayeire Abalawi ebe eyabo. Ase ayio, nabatebirie ng’a tibakoba nomwando ase egati y’Abaisraeli bande.”" 
Numbers18:25 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers18:26 “Kwana n’Abalawi, obatebie: Ekero mokonyora ensemo ya ikomi korwa ase Abaisraeli, eria Omonene abaeire ebe eyaino, erio morusie ensemo ya ikomi y’okoruegwa okwo, moyerentere Omonene." 
Numbers18:27 Okoruegwa okwo inwe morarue, nigo korabarwe asemore buna nokoruegwa kw’endagera korwa ase ebiooreri biaino, na okw’edivai na amaguta korwa ase ekemitero, okwo abande bakorua." 
Numbers18:28 Ase enchera eye nainwe morentere Omonene okoruegwa kwaino, okwo mokorusia korwa ase ensemo ya ikomi eria mokonyora korwa ase Abaisraeli. Na okoruegwa okwo gw’ensemo ya ikomi okore kw’Omonene, moe Haroni omokuani." 
Numbers18:29 Korwa ase ebiegwa ebio bionsi moranyore korwa ase Abaisraeli, mwatananere Omonene biria bire ebiya mono." 
Numbers18:30 Ase ayio otebie Abalawi: Ekero morabe mwarure ebinto ebiya mono korwa ase ensemo ya ikomi eria, erio ebinto ebio nigo birabarwe asemore, inwe Abalawi, buna okoruegwa kwaino kw’endagera, na okomitwa kw’edivai, na okw’amaguta." 
Numbers18:31 Inwe amo nabanto be chinka chiaino namoriere ebinto ebio aase aande onsi, ekiagera eyio neng’eria yaino moraakanwe ase emeremo mogokora agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers18:32 Ekero mwarure ensemo engiya kobua korwa ase okoruegwa okwo, timokoba nokomocha ase okoria eria entigari. Timobaisa gokora ebinto ebichenu bi’Abaisraeli bibe ebitachenegeti, erinde timokwa.”" 
Numbers19:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Numbers19:2 “Oyo noro omoroberio inche Omonene nachikire: Tebia Abaisraeli ng’a barente eng’ombe eaberi embariri etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, naende etana kobekerwa rikorogoto ase ogokorigwa emeremo." 
Numbers19:3 Orente eng’ombe eria, oyee Eleazari omokuani; na eng’ombe eria eirwe isiko y’egetwori, erio enyenyerweo ase obosio bwaye." 
Numbers19:4 Eleazari atobeke ekiara kiaye ase amanyinga ’eng’ombe eria, ayanyororokerie ara gatano na kabere bosio bw’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Numbers19:5 Erio chinyama chi’eng’ombe eria, chisamberwe ase obosio bwaye amo ne riiyo na amanyinga, na esike." 
Numbers19:6 Erio omokuani abogorie oroko rw’emecharake na orosagia rwa hisopo, na eusi embariri, erio abirute aseomorero oria ogosamba eng’ombe eria." 
Numbers19:7 Erio omokuani asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache. Ekero akoorire gokora bo achiche ase egetwori, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Numbers19:8 Na omonto oria ogosamba eng’ombe eria goika asibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, ere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Numbers19:9 Omonto ochenegete abuuche ribu ri’eng’ombe eria, erio ariumore isiko y’egetwori, aase achenire. Ribu erio rigachwe agwo ase engencho y’omoganda bw’Abaisraeli ase ogokorerwa emeremo y’ogochena amache akonyororokigwa ase okorusia ebibe." 
Numbers19:10 Omonto oria orabuuche ribu riria, asibie chianga chiaye, nere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio. Oko nakwo ogochika koragenderere botambe ase Abaisraeli na ase omomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo." 
Numbers19:11 “Monto onde bwensi orakune omobere bw’omonto okwete, nabe oyotachenegeti ase amatuko atano na abere." 
Numbers19:12 Ase rituko ria gatato, naende ase rituko ria gatano na kabere, omonto oria goika esibie namache, nabe ochenekire; korende onye tagwesibia ase amatuko aya abere takoba oyochenekire." 
Numbers19:13 Monto onde bwensi orakune omobere bw’omonto okwete, korende tesibia, igo agokora Obomenyo bw’Omonene bobe obotachenegeti. Omonto oyio aatananwe korwa ase Abaisraeli, ekiagera amache aria ay’okomochena taumoiri asare; ere agenderere koba oyotachenegeti." 
Numbers19:14 “Oko nakwo ogochika: Omonto onde bwensi orasoe eema eria omonto akwereire ime yaye, na omonto onde bwensi ore imeo, nabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Numbers19:15 Egekorero kende gionsi kere ase eema eria ime, getabwati egekuneko, korende kere giasie, kiabeire egetachenegeti." 
Numbers19:16 Omonto onde bwensi oranyore omonto oitirwe nomoro orosana ime, gose okwete ogokwa konde gwonsi, na amokune, gose akune riuga ri’omonto okwete, gose oboina, omonto oyio nabe oyotachenegeti ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Numbers19:17 “Ekiagera babeire abatachenegeti, nabaimokie ribu ike ri’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, keria giasambirwe, na kobeka amache amaya a rooche igoro ye ribu riria." 
Numbers19:18 Erio omonto ochenegete aimokie orosagia rwa hisopo, arotobeke ase amache ayio ime, erio anyororokerie eema na ebinto bionsi bireo, amo nabanto barenge imeo. Naende anyororokerie omonto oria okunete riuga, gose okunete omonto oitetwe, gose oyokwete bweka, gose oboina." 
Numbers19:19 Ase rituko ria gatato, na ase rituko ria gatano na kabere, omonto ochenegete anyororokie amache ase oria otachenegeti. Ase igo ase rituko ria gatano na kabere namochene; ere oria ogochia gochenwa nasibie chianga chiaye, esibie nomobere namache, na ase engaki ya mogoroba nabe ochenekire." 
Numbers19:20 “Omonto obeire oyotachenegeti, nere tancheti gwesibia, arusigwe ase omosangererekano bw’abanto. Ere okorire Aase Aachenu y’Omonene babeire atachenegeti, ekiagera amache aria ay’okomochena tanyororokeretigwe asare; ere nigo are oyotachenegeti." 
Numbers19:21 Oko nakwo ogochika kwa botambe asebare. Omonto oria okonyororokeria amache aria ay’ogochena asibie chianga chiaye, na omonto onde omoao karakune amache aria, nere nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio." 
Numbers19:22 Egento kende gionsi omonto oria otachenegeti arakune nakerokio nakebe egetachenegeti. Omonto onde bwensi orakune egento keria nabe oyotachenegeti goika omogoroba oyio.” 
Numbers20:1 Ase omotienyi bwe ritang’ani omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli bagaika ase erooro ya Sini, bagatoora agwo Kadeshi. Miriamu agakwa na agatindekwa aroro." 
Numbers20:2 Amache tarenge agwo ase batoorete; ase ayio omoganda ogasangererekana amo, okaba mamincha ya Musa na Haroni." 
Numbers20:3 Abanto baria bakaamerererania na Musa, bagakwana, “Nanga nigo yabete buya kobua onye naintwe ntwakwete ekero abaminto baitetwe agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Numbers20:4 Nase ki mwatorentire intwe omoganda bw’Omonene ase erooro eye, erinde tokwere aiga, intwe amo ne chitugo chiaito?" 
Numbers20:5 Nase ki mwatorusetie Misiri na gotorenta aase aiga aabe mono? Aase aa atari kwama endagera, gose amako, gose amasabibu, gose amakomomanga. Nonya namache tokonywa tari aa.”" 
Numbers20:6 Musa na Haroni bakarua agwo ase omoganda oria, bakagenda ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, bagatung’ama inse bakaumama agwo ase egesoero. Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokabaorokera." 
Numbers20:7 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers20:8 “Imokia enyimbo eria, erio aye na Haroni mosangererie omoganda bwonsi, na agwo ase amasio ’abanto bonsi mokwane negetare keria, na amache nasoke korwa aroro. Ase enchera eyio mosokerie abanto amache banywe, ne chitugo chiabo chinywe.”" 
Numbers20:9 Musa akaimokia enyimbo eria korwa aase yarenge, agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna Omonene konya amochikire." 
Numbers20:10 Musa na Haroni bagasangereria omoganda bwonsi bosio bw’egetare keria, akabatebia, “Igwa inwe abasaria aba! Inee! Nkobasokeria tore amache korwa ase egetare eke?”" 
Numbers20:11 Musa akarambora okoboko kwaye, agaaka egetare keria nenyimbo yaye ara kabere. Amache agasoka amange mono, na omoganda oria okanywane chitugo chiabo chikanywa boigo." 
Numbers20:12 Omonene agatebia Musa na Haroni, “Ekiagera inwe motanyegenete na koorokia ase amasio ’Abaisraeli ng’a inche nomochenu inde, timokoraa na goikia omosangererekano oyio ase ense eria ebe eyabo." 
Numbers20:13 Aya naro amache a Meriba aase Abaisraeli baamereranetie n’Omonene, na ere akeorokia ng’a nomochenu are ase egati yabo.”" 
Numbers20:14 Musa agatoma abanto korwa Kadeshi gochia ase omoruoti o Edomu bamotebie, “Amang’ana aya naro intwe Abaisraeli bamino togoteba: Nomanyete emechando yonsi yatonyorire," 
Numbers20:15 buna chisokoro chiaito chiagendete ase ense ya Misiri, chikamenyao emiaka emenge. Abamisiri bagachichanda ase obotindi obobe, bagatochanda naintwe." 
Numbers20:16 Ekero twarerete ase Omonene, ere akaigwa ebirero biaito, agatoma omomalaika agatorusia korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Bono nao tore aiga Kadeshi, omochie ore ase orobebe kegima rw’orogongo rwao." 
Numbers20:17 Koranche otoe ribaga toete ase egati y’ense yao. Titokogobera gochia ase emegondo y’endagera, gose ey’emesabibu, gose titokonywa amache korwa ase chinsoko chiaino. Intwe nigo toraete ase enchera enene yoka, titokogobera gochia ensemo ya borio, gose eya bomosi, goika tobe twaetanirie ense yao.”" 
Numbers20:18 Korende omoruoti o Edomu akamoiraneria, “Timobaisa goeta ase egati y’ense yane; moise goeta, nigo ndabarwanie esegi imbaite nemioro.”" 
Numbers20:19 Abaisraeli bakamotebia, “Intwe nigo toraete ase enchera enene yoka, na gatoranywe amache ao, intwe gose chitugo chiaito, rirorio natoakane amache ayio. Toe ribaga toete rioka namagoro, titokogania gento kende goetania ekio.”" 
Numbers20:20 Abaedomu bakairaneria naende, “Timori ne ribaga goeta ase ense yaito.” Bagacha nabarwani barenge ne chinguru gocha korwania Abaisraeli." 
Numbers20:21 Ekiagera Abaedomu barinete Abaisraeli ribaga goeta ase ense yabo, Abaisraeli bakarua asebare, bagaeta ensemo eng’ao." 
Numbers20:22 Omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli okarua Kadeshi, okagenda ogaika egetunwa kia Hori." 
Numbers20:23 Agwo ase egetunwa keria kia Hori, ase orobebe rw’ense ya Edomu, Omonene agakwana na Musa na Haroni, akabatebia," 
Numbers20:24 “Haroni nakwe, asangererekane amo nabanto baye. Ere tagosoa ase ense eria naeire Abaisraeli, ekiagera inwe babere mwasaretie, timwanyigwera buna nabachigete agwo ase amache a Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Ira Haroni na Eleazari, momura oye, igoro ase egetunwa kia Hori." 
Numbers20:26 Orusie Haroni chianga chiaye chi’obokuani, ochibekere Eleazari, momura oye. Haroni ere nakwe, na asangererekane amo nabanto baye, ekero more aaria.”" 
Numbers20:27 Musa agakora buna Omonene amochigete. Barabwo bagatiira gochia igoro as egetunwa keria kia Hori, ekero omoganda bwonsi origereretie." 
Numbers20:28 Musa akarusia Haroni chianga chiria chi’obokuani, agachibekera Eleazari, momura o Haroni. Haroni agakwera ase egetunwa keria, na Musa na Eleazari bagatirimboka korwao." 
Numbers20:29 Ekero abanto b’omoganda bw’Abaisraeli baroche ng’a Haroni okure bakamoreera ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etato. 
Numbers21:1 Ekero omoruoti oyomo Omokanani, oyorenge kogamba agwo Aradi, ensemo ya irianyi ase ense ya Kanani, aigwete ng’a Abaisraeli nigo bare ase enchera ekogenda Atarimu, akabaumokera, akabarwania, na agoosa abande babo." 
Numbers21:2 Erio Abaisraeli bakariera Omonene eira, bakabora, “Aye korabeke abanto aba ase amaboko aito, intwe natosirie emechie yabo kegima.”" 
Numbers21:3 Omonene akaigwa ogosaba kw’Abaisraeli, akabaa obobui igoro y’Abakanani. Abaisraeli bakabasiria kegima, bagasaria nemechie yabo. Ase igo aase aria akarokwa Horima (Ogosarigwa)." 
Numbers21:4 Abaisraeli bakarua ase egetunwa keria kia Hori, bakagenda orogendo rwabo, bagaetera enchera ekogenda gochia omosomo bw’Enyancha Embariri, erio bachie goetanana ense y’Edomu. Abanto tibaba abaremereria ase ogoeta enchera eria." 
Numbers21:5 Bakemurunganeria Nyasae na Musa, bakabora, “Nase ki mwatorusetie korwa ense ya Misiri, mogatorenta aa tokwere ase erooro eye? Aiga endagera na amache tibiiyo, intwe twagechigwe nendagera eye embe.”" 
Numbers21:6 Erio Omonene agatoma ching’iti chingenda inse chire nobosongo chigacha ase egati y’Abaisraeli, chikabaroma, na abanto abange bagakwa." 
Numbers21:7 Abanto bakagenda ase Musa, bakamotebia, “Twakorire ebibe, ekiagera twakwanire mamincha y’Omonene na asore. Koranche osabe Omonene arusie ching’iti echi asetore.” Ase ayio Musa akabasabera." 
Numbers21:8 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Roisia omogwekano bw’eng’iti korwa ase etaai, erio oyebeke igoro ase omote, erinde kera omonto oromirwe neng’iti kararigererie eng’iti eria nabe moyo.”" 
Numbers21:9 Musa akaroisia eng’iti y’etaai, akayebeka igoro ase omote, na monto onde bwensi konya oromirwe neng’iti, onye orenge korigereria eng’iti eria, nigo arenge koba moyo." 
Numbers21:10 Abaisraeli bakaimoka kogenda orogendo rwabo, bagaika Oboti, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers21:11 Naende bakarua agwo Oboti, bakagenda bagaika Iye‐Abarimu, agwo ase erooro ere moocha ya Moabu, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers21:12 Na korwa aroro bakagenda bagaika ase Rikura ria Seredi, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers21:13 Nyuma y’ayio bakaimoka korwa Seredi, bakagenda bagatoora sugusu y’orooche rw’Arinoni, ase erooro eria eigete orobebe rw’Abaamori. Arinoni nigo rware orobebe gati y’Abamoabu na Abaamori." 
Numbers21:14 Aya naro akogera “Ebuku ye chisegi chi’Omonene” yakwana igoro ya “Omochie bw’Abahebu ase orogongo rwa Sufa, na amakura aase orooche rw’Arinoni rogoeta," 
Numbers21:15 na egetirimboko ki’amakura, aase omochie bw’Ari ore, na gochia orobebe rwa Moabu.”" 
Numbers21:16 Na korwa ase Arinoni bakagenderera norogendo rwabo, bagaika Beeri. Eyio nensoko eria aase Omonene atebetie Musa, “Sangereria abanto, na inche nimbae amache banywe.”" 
Numbers21:17 Erio Abaisraeli bagatera ogotera oko: “Chinsoko, sokia amache acharare gocha, naintwe togoke na gotera ase amache ayio." 
Numbers21:18 Chinsoko abanene baremete, echio chiaremetwe nenyimbo y’omogambi, ne chinyimbo chiabo chi’ogotaarera.” Korwa agwo ase erooro bakagenda bagaika Matana," 
Numbers21:19 na korwa Matana bakagenda bagaika Nahalieli, na korwa agwo bakagenda bagaika Bamoti." 
Numbers21:20 Bakarua Bamoti, bakagenda gochia ase rikura riarenge ase ense y’Abaamori, ase egetirimboko ki’egetunwa gia Pisiga, ekio kerochie maate ase erooro." 
Numbers21:21 Korwa aroro agwo Abasiraeli bagatoma abanto ase Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori bakwane nere, bamoborie," 
Numbers21:22 “Koranche, otoe ribaga toete ase egati y’ense yao. Titogotiga enchera na kogobera gochia ase emegondo y’endagera, gose ey’emesabibu, gose titokonywa amache korwa ase chinsoko chiaino, korende nigo toraete ase enchera enene goika tobe twaetanirie ense yaino.”" 
Numbers21:23 Korende Sihoni akaanga koa Abaisraeli ribaga baete ase ense yaye. Agasangereria abarwani baye b’esegi, akagenda agaika Yahasi ase erooro, na agwo akarwania Abaisraeli." 
Numbers21:24 Korende Abaisraeli bagaita abanto abange nemioro, bakaira ense ya Sihoni, korwa orooche rw’Arinoni goika orooche rwa Yaboki ase ense y’Abaamoni. Ribebe ri’Abaamoni nigo riarendire ne chinguru." 
Numbers21:25 Abaisraeli bakaira emechie yonsi y’Abaamori, bakaira na Hesiboni, erio bakamenya ase emechie eyio amo nebichie bi’emechie eyio." 
Numbers21:26 Hesiboni noro orenge omochie omonene o Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, oria konya orwanirie omoruoti orenge kogambera Abaamori agwo ritang’ani. Sihoni konya oirire ense yonsi y’omoruoti oyio goikera Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ayio naro akogera abateri be chingero bakobora: “Inchuo ase Hesiboni, tiga omochie oyo oagachwe, tiga omochie o Sihoni oagachwe na kogitwa." 
Numbers21:28 Omorero okarua ase Hesiboni, chimeme chi’omorero korwa omochie o Sihoni, ogasaria Ari, omochie o Moabu, ogasamba abanene b’ebigoro bi’Arinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Obobe nobwaino, inwe Abamoabu! Mwasirigwe, inwe abamogesasima Kemosi! Nere otigire abana baino abamura bagotama, bakorigia aase bakwebisa, na abana baino abaiseke boosirwe, barabwo bairirwe ase Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori." 
Numbers21:30 Intwe twabarasire emegwe; Abahesiboni basirigwe, twabaitire goika Diboni. Tokabasiria goika Nofa na korwa Nofa goika Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Ase igo Abaisraeli bakamenya ase ense y’Abaamori. 
Numbers21:32 Musa agatoma chirooti gochia koroota omochie o Yaeseri. Abaisraeli bakayorwania, bakayoira amo nebichie biaye, bagaseria Abaamori bamenyeteo." 
Numbers21:33 Abaisraeli bakairana, bagaetera ase enchera yarenge kogenda Basani. Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, agacha amo nabarwani baye korwania Abaisraeli agwo Edirei." 
Numbers21:34 Korende Omonene agatebia Musa, “Tobaisa komoiroka, ekiagera namobekire ase okoboko kwao, ere amo nabanto baye bonsi, na ense yaye. Aye goika omokore buna gwakorete Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, oria omenyete agwo Hesiboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Abaisraeli bagaita Ogi, bagaita nabana baye abamura, na abanto baye, goika tibatigaria nonya nomonto oyomo ore moyo. Erio bakaira ense yaye ekaba eyabo." 
Numbers22:1 Abaisraeli bakagenderera norogendo rwabo gochia ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, bagatoora aroro, moocha ya Yorodan, kororia Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Omoruoti Balaki, mosinto o Sipori, akaigwa amang’ana onsi Abaisraeli konya bakoreire Abaamori." 
Numbers22:3 Abamoabu bakoboa abanto abwo mono, ekiagera nigo barenge abange; ee Abamoabu bakabegosera Abaisraeli." 
Numbers22:4 Abamoabu bagatebia abagaaka ba Midiani, “Omoganda oyo omonene nigo ogochia koria okoore kera egento getoetanaine aiga, buna chiombe chikorisia obonyansi ase egetii chiabokoora.” Ase engaki eria Balaki, mosinto o Sipori, orenge omoruoti bw’Abamoabu." 
Numbers22:5 Ere agatoma abanto ase Baalamu, mosinto o Beori, agwo Petori ore ang’e norooche rw’Eufarati, ase ense yabo. Barabwo bakamotebia amang’ana a Balaki, “Rigereria, abanto bachire korwa ase ense ya Misiri, nabarabwo nabange, batubete orogongo rwonsi, batoorire ang’e naintwe, barigereretie ense yane." 
Numbers22:6 Bono inchuo obandagererie, ekiagera barabwo nigo bare ne chinguru chinyinge gotobua. Gokobaragereria, ande nabo ndabaise kobarwania mbabue na kobaseria, barabwo barue ase ense yane. Nimanyete ng’a oyo aye ogosesenia, nigo agoseseneka, na oyo aye okoragereria, nigo akoragerereka.”" 
Numbers22:7 Abagaaka ba Moabu na ab’Abamidiani bakabogoria eng’eria y’okoringoreria ase amaboko abo, bakayeirera Baalamu, bakamotebia amang’ana onsi a Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Baalamu agatebia abanto baria, “Rara aa ase obotuko obo, nainche nimbarentere amairanerio korwa ase Omonene ankio mambia.” Ase ayio abanene baria ba Moabu bakabeera aroro amo na Baalamu." 
Numbers22:9 Nyasae agacha ase Baalamu, akamoboria, “Abanto aba more komo mbarabi?”" 
Numbers22:10 Baalamu akamoiraneria, “Balaki, mosinto o Sipori, omoruoti o Moabu, nere otomire abanto aba asende, ogoteba ng’a" 
Numbers22:11 abanto bachire korwa ase ense ya Misiri, na barabwo nigo bare abange, batubete orogongo rwonsi. Ere nigo aganetie imbaragererie, erinde abarwanie, ababue na kobaseria.”" 
Numbers22:12 Nyasae akamoiraneria, “Tobaisa kogenda amo nabarabwo gose gochia koragereria Abaisraeli. Barabwo nigo basesenirie.”" 
Numbers22:13 Ase ayio Baalaamu akaimoka mambia rituko ria kabere, agatebia abanene baria batometwe na Balaki, “Bono inwe irana mogende ase ense yaino, ekiagera Omonene bwangire kong’a ribaga ngende amo nainwe.”" 
Numbers22:14 Ase ayio, abanene baria ba Moabu bakaimoka bakagenda ase Balaki bakamotebia, “Baalamu nigo aanga, tacheti amo naintwe.”" 
Numbers22:15 Naende Balaki agatoma abanene bande, abange kobua baria be ritang’ani, naende ababwate amasikani amanene kobua abwo." 
Numbers22:16 Nabarabwo bagacha ase Baalamu, bakamotebia, “Aya naro Balaki, mosinto o Sipori, agoteba: Koranche totiga kende gionsi kegotange tochicha." 
Numbers22:17 Ekeene, inche nigo ngochia kogokorera aya arakorentere amasikani amanene, naende kende gionsi oramborie, ekio ningokorere; aye inchuo ondagererie abanto aba.”" 
Numbers22:18 Korende Baalamu akairaneria abasomba baria ba Balaki, akabatebia, “Nonya Balaki arenge kong’a enyomba yaye eichire chifeta ne chitahabu, tintageti gosaria na kwanga koigwera amang’ana Omonene Nyasae anchikire, na gokora amang’ana ande ase ogwancha kwane, abe amake gose amanene." 
Numbers22:19 Nababoririe komoranche, mobeere aa ase obotuko bwa rero, erio imborie Omonene, imanye gose nabwate amang’ana ande arantebie.”" 
Numbers22:20 Naende Nyasae agacha ase Baalamu ase obotuko boria, akamotebia, “Onye abanto aba bachire gokorangeria, imoka ogende amo nabarabwo, korende egento ndagochike nakio gioka orakore.”" 
Numbers22:21 Baalamu akaimoka mambia rituko ria kabere, akaberekia etigere yaye egeikaransero, akagenda amo nabanene baria ba Moabu." 
Numbers22:22 Ekero Baalamu aimogete kogenda amo nabasomba baye babere oriinete etigere, Nyasae akaba nendamwamu enene asare; na omomalaika bw’Omonene agatenena ase enchera gati komotanga tagenda." 
Numbers22:23 Etigere eria egachia korora omomalaika oria obwate omoyio o birende koboko kwaye, ekagobera gochia enchera ensemo, ekagenda ase omogondo. Baalamu agaaka etigere eria koyeirania ase enchera." 
Numbers22:24 Naende omomalaika oria bw’Omonene akagenda ase enchera yarenge engote gati y’emegondo y’emesabibu, ne chimbago nchiarenge ase chinsemo chionsi ibere." 
Numbers22:25 Etigere eria egachia korora omomalaika oria bw’Omonene, ekemigereria gochia orobago ang’e, ekabwaterania okogoro kwa Baalamu ase orobago, na Baalamu akayeaka naende." 
Numbers22:26 Erio naende omomalaika bw’Omonene akagenda bosio, agatenena aase aagote mono, ase ribaga ritarenge ri’okogobera gochia ensemo ya borio, gose eya bomosi." 
Numbers22:27 Ekero etigere yaroche omomalaika oria, ekarara inse, na Baalamu oriinete omogongo igoro. Baalamu akaba nendamwamu enene mono, agaaka etigere eria nenyimbo yaye." 
Numbers22:28 Erio Omonene agakunora omonwa bw’etigere eria goika egakwana, ekaboria Baalamu, “Ngento ki nagokoreire goika kwang’akire chintunda echi isato?”" 
Numbers22:29 Baalamu akayeiraneria, “Nekiagera gwankoreire echeche. Onye nabwate omoro ase okoboko kwane, nanga nigo narenge kogoita.”" 
Numbers22:30 Naende etigere ekaboria Baalamu, “Inee! Inche tindi etigere yao, kwabeire gokondiina ase amatuko ’obogima bwao bwonsi goika rituko eri ria rero? Inee! Inche nana‐gokora egento buna eke asore?” Baalamu akairaneria, “Yaya.”" 
Numbers22:31 Erio Omonene akaramokia Baalamu amaiso, na ere akarora omomalaika bw’Omonene oteneine ase enchera gati, obwate omoyio o birende ase okoboko kwaye. Baalamu agekumba, agatung’ama inse, akaumama." 
Numbers22:32 Omomalaika bw’Omonene akaboria Baalamu, “Nase ki gwaakire etigere yao chintunda echi isato? Rora, inche nigo nacha kogotanga, ekiagera orogendo oro okogenda norw’ogosaria rore mamincha yane." 
Numbers22:33 Korende etigire ero yandora, nero yeonchora gochia enchera ensemo chintunda isato. Ekeene, onye etigere eye eteonchora gochia ensemo korwa asende, nanga nigo nagoita okwe, ntige etigere ere moyo.”" 
Numbers22:34 Erio Baalamu agatebia omomalaika bw’Omonene, “Inche nakorire ebibe, tinamanyete ng’a naye gwateneine gati y’enchera gontanga. Korende bono onye orogendo rokororekana ng’a norobe asore, tiga ing’irane.”" 
Numbers22:35 Omomalaika bw’Omonene agatebia Baalamu, “Genda amo nabanto abwo, korende amang’ana aria ndagochike, naro oka ogochia gokwana.” Bono Baalamu akagenda amo nabanene baria ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Ekero Balaki aigwete ng’a Baalamu inchera are gocha, akagenda komorototera agwo Ari, omochie orenge ang’e norooche rw’Arinoni, ase orobebe rwa Moabu." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki akaboria Baalamu, “Inee! Naki otachete ekero natomete abanto gokorangeria? Nase ki otachete? Nigo gwakagete ng’a tingocha gokoa ogosika kogoisaine?”" 
Numbers22:38 Baalamu akamoiraneria, “Rora, bono nachire asore, nigo okagete ng’a inche nimbwate okobua nonya nogoke gokwana ring’ana asore? Ring’ana riria Nyasae arantebie nario ndakwane.”" 
Numbers22:39 Erio Baalamu akagenda amo na Balaki, bagaika Kiriati‐Husoti." 
Numbers22:40 Balaki akanyenya chiombe ne ching’ondi, akaa Baalamu amo nabanene barenge amo nere." 
Numbers22:41 Rituko ria kabere mambia Balaki akaira Baalamu igoro ase Bamoti‐Baali, na korwa igoro agwo Baalamu akarora ensemo eyemo y’omoganda bw’Abaisraeli." 
Numbers23:1 Baalamu akamotebia Balaki, “Ng’agachere aiga ebisasimero bitano na bibere, naende ondetere chieri isano na ibere, ne chimingichi isano na ibere.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balaki agakora buna Baalamu amotebetie, na abwo babere bakarua ekeng’wanso igoro ase kera egesasimero, eeri eyemo na emingichi eyemo." 
Numbers23:3 Baalamu agatebia Balaki, “Beera aa, otenene mbarabare ase ekeng’wanso kiao ki’ogosambwa; inche ngende korora gose ande Omonene nang’orokerie. Kende gionsi arantebie, ekio nakio ndagotebie.” Baalamu agatiira gochia egetunwa igoro aarabu." 
Numbers23:4 Nyasae agaika korwa igoro, akaumerana na Baalamu. Baalamu akamotebia, “Naagachire ebisasimero bitano na bibere, naende narure igoro ase kera ekemo eeri eyemo na emingichi eyemo.”" 
Numbers23:5 Omonene agatebia Baalamu ring’ana agochia gokwana. Naende akamotoma airane ase Balaki namang’ana ayio ayio. 
Numbers23:6 Baalamu akairana gochia ase Balaki, akamonyora oteneine mbarabare ase ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’ogosambwa, amo nabanene bonsi b’Abamoabu." 
Numbers23:7 Baalamu agakwana obobani bwaye, agateba: “Balaki, omoruoti o Moabu, ondetire korwa Siiria, korwa ase ebitunwa bia Moocha, otebire: Inchuo, ondagererie abanto ba Yakobo, inchuo ogambie Abaisraeli." 
Numbers23:8 Naki ndakore ndagererie oyo Nyasae ataragerereti? Naki ndakore ngambie oyo Omonene atagambeti? 
Numbers23:9 Korwa aiga ase ebitare igoro nimbaroche, na korwa aiga ase ebitunwa nimbarigereretie. Abwo nabanto bamenyete boka, beatananire korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku." 
Numbers23:10 Ning’o oranyare kobara ororeria rwa Yakobo, abwo bare abange buna orotu rw’amaroba? Gose ning’o oranyare kobara nonya nensemo ya inye y’Abaisraeli? Tiga inkwe buna oyomo bw’abanyene oboronge, na omoerio bw’amatuko aane obe buna oyobo.”" 
Numbers23:11 Balaki akaboria Baalamu, “Ngento ki eke aye gwankoreire? Nigo nakorangeretie ng’a oche obaragererie ababisa baane, na rora, ribaga ri’ayio kwabasesenirie.”" 
Numbers23:12 Baalamu akamoiraneria, “Inee! Tiyangwenerete inyigwere na gokwana amang’ana aria Omonene agontebia nkwane?”" 
Numbers23:13 Balaki akamotebia, “Inchuo, togende amo naye goika aase ande aao. Korwa aroro nonyare korora abare ang’e. Tokorora bonsi. Korwa aase agwo nobandagererie.”" 
Numbers23:14 Akamoira goika ase omogondo o Sofimu agwo ase egechuria gia Pisiga. Agwo Balaki akaagacha ebisasimero bitano na bibere, akarua eeri eyemo na emingichi eyemo igoro ase kera egesasimero." 
Numbers23:15 Baalamu agatebia Balaki, “Beera aa, otenene ensemo y’ekeng’wanso kiao ki’ogosambwa inche ngende aaria ng’umbu, toumerane n’Omonene.”" 
Numbers23:16 Omonene akamoorokera Baalamu, akamotebia amang’ana arenge gochia gokwana, naende akamotoma airane ase Balaki namang’ana ayio ayio." 
Numbers23:17 Baalamu akairana gochia ase Balaki, akamonyora oteneine mbarabare ase ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’ogosambwa, na abanene b’Abamoabu bateneine agwo amo nere. Balaki akamoboria, “Mang’ana ki Omonene akwanire?”" 
Numbers23:18 Baalamu agachaka gokwana obobani bwaye, agateba, “Inchuo aye Balaki, omwana o Sipori, ontegerere oigwe aya ngokwana!" 
Numbers23:19 Nyasae tari omonto, erinde akwane oborimo, gose tari mwanyabanto, erinde anyare koonchoka. Inee! Aya akwanire, takonyara koyakora? Gose, aya atebire, takonyara koyaikerania?" 
Numbers23:20 Rora, inche nigo nachigetwe ng’a nsesenie; na ekero Nyasae asesenirie, inche tinkonyara koirania ogosesenigwa okwo." 
Numbers23:21 Ere tarochi obobe ase Yakobo, tarochi bokong’u bonde ase Abaisraeli. Omonene, Nyasae obo, nigo are amo nabarabwo, igo bakoraria nomochengo ng’a omoruoti nareo." 
Numbers23:22 Nyasae nere obarentire korwa Misiri; barabwo nigo babwate chinguru buna echi’eng’era. 
Numbers23:23 Oborogi tibogokora gento ase abanto ba Yakobo, gose oboriori ase Abaisraeli. Nakwanwe igoro y’abanto ba Yakobo, nabwo Abaisraeli: Rora aya Nyasae akorire!" 
Numbers23:24 Rigereria abanto abwo nigo banga buna endo eaberi ekoboka, na buna endo ekoimokerera igoro, teri korara goika eraria echi yatwarire, goika eranywa amanyinga ay’echi yaitire.”" 
Numbers23:25 Naende Balaki agatebia Baalamu, “Bono tobaisa kobaragereria, gose tobaisa kobasesenia nonya ng’ake.”" 
Numbers23:26 Korende Baalamu akamoiraneria, “Tinagotebia ng’a amang’ana onsi Omonene agontebia, ayio naro ndakore?”" 
Numbers23:27 Balaki agatebia Baalamu, “Bono inchuo nkoire aase ande aao. Aande gose Nyasae nanche obandagererie korwa aroro.”" 
Numbers23:28 Ase ayio Balaki akaira Baalamu gochia ase egechuria ki’egetunwa gia Peori, bakarigereria erooro inse." 
Numbers23:29 Baalamu akamotebia, “Ng’agachere aiga ebisasimero bitano na bibere, na ondetere chieri isano na ibere, ne chimingichi isano na ibere.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balaki agakora buna atebetigwe, akarua eeri eyemo amo nemingichi eyemo ase kera egesasimero." 
Numbers24:1 Ekero Baalamu aroche ng’a Omonene nigo amoganetie asesenie Abaisraeli tagendete naende ase okorigia oboringoria buna chingaki chiria chie ritang’ani, korende akaonchora obosio bwaye gochia ase erooro." 
Numbers24:2 Agachia koimokia amaiso, aye, akarora Abaisraeli batoorete egesaku ase egesaku. Erio omoika o Nyasae ogacha igoro asare." 
Numbers24:3 Agwo Baalamu agakwana obobani obo: “Amang’ana aya naro inche Baalamu, mosinto o Beori, ngokwana amang’ana aya nayane, inche omonto oramokigwe amaiso." 
Numbers24:4 Aya namang’ana ’omonto okoigwa buya aya Nyasae agoteba, oyo okorora amaroro akorwa ase ase oria Omonguru, oyogotung’ama inse na koramokigwa amaiso aye." 
Numbers24:5 Inwe abanto ba Yakobo, chiema chiaino naki chire chingiya! Inwe Abaisraeli aase momenyete, naki are aagiya mono!" 
Numbers24:6 Igo mogwekaine omweya orambogete gochia aare, gose emegondo ere mbarabare y’orooche, nigo more buna emegaka Omonene asimegete. Gose emecharake ere ase amache mbarabare." 
Numbers24:7 Amache amange naiteke korwa ase chinyongo chiabo na oroiboro rwabo nigo rorabe oronge mono. Omoruoti obo nabe omonene goetania Agagi, na oboruoti bwaye inabotogigwe mono." 
Numbers24:8 Nyasae nere obarentire korwa Misiri, chinguru chiabo nigo chire buna echi’eng’era. Barabwo mbasirie abanto abare mamincha yabo, babune amauga ’emebere y’ababisa babo, na babarase ne chinsara chiabo." 
Numbers24:9 Abaisraeli nigo batung’aime inse buna endo, buna endo eaberi, ning’o orabe noboremu abature? Asesenigwe omonto oria okobasesenia inwe, na aragererigwe omonto oria okobaragereria inwe.”" 
Numbers24:10 Ase amang’ana ayio Balaki akaba nendamwamu enene ase Baalamu, agaaka chinkobi, akamotebia, “Nigo nakorangeretie ng’a oragererie ababisa baane, na rora, bono aye kwabasesenirie chintunda echi isato." 
Numbers24:11 Bono irana gochia bwoo. Inche igo narengereretie gokoa ogosika okonene, korende Omonene okorinire, tonyora ogosikwa okwo.”" 
Numbers24:12 Baalamu agatebia Balaki, “Inee! Tinatebetie abanto baria gwatomete asende ng’a" 
Numbers24:13 Balaki naisa kong’a enyomba yaye eichire ne chifeta, ne chitahabu, tinkonyara kwanga koigwera amang’ana Omonene anchikire, na tingokora gento kende ase ogwancha kwane, abe amabe, gose amaya. Aya Omonene agoteba, ayio naro ngwenerete nkore." 
Numbers24:14 “Bono nkoirana inde gochia ase abanto baane. Inchuo nkomanyie egento Abaisraeli barakore ase abanto bao ase amatuko agochi gocha.” 
Numbers24:15 Erio Baalamu agakwana obobani obo: “Amang’ana aya inche Baalamu, mosinto o Beori, ngokwana, amang’ana aya nayane, inche omonto oramokigwe amaiso." 
Numbers24:16 Aya namang’ana ’omonto okoigwa buya aya Nyasae agoteba, naende onyorire okomanya korwa ase oria ore Igoro Mono. Na okorora amaroro akorwa ase oria Omonguru, oyogotung’ama inse na koramokigwa amaiso." 
Numbers24:17 Namororire, korende tari bono; namorigereirie, korende tari ang’e. Eng’enang’eni neoroke korwa ase egati y’abanto ba Yakobo, na enyimbo y’obogambi neoroke korwa ase Abaisraeli. Nesenyente chintakunero chi’emetwe y’Abamoabu, neiyerie abanto abebura‐buria b’esegi." 
Numbers24:18 Ense y’Edomu nebugwe eirwe, Seiri nebugwe ebe eyabo, eyio nense y’ababisa babo. Abaisraeli mbagenderere koba nokobua." 
Numbers24:19 Omogambi naoroke korwa ase egati y’abanto ba Yakobo asirie abanto batameire emechie banyore oborendi.” 
Numbers24:20 Erio Baalamu akarigereria Abaameleki, agakwana obobani obo: “Abaameleki nabwo barange abe ritang’ani ase ebisaku, korende ase omoerio nabasirigwe kegima.”" 
Numbers24:21 Naende akarigereria Abakeni, agakwana obobani obo: “Obomenyo bwabo nabogenderere kobao, buna egeswa keagachire ase engako y’egetare." 
Numbers24:22 Korende nonya naboigo, Abakeni nabasirigwe, ekero Abaasuri barabaire babe abasibwa.”" 
Numbers24:23 Baalamu akagenderera gokwana obobani bwaye: “Obee! Ning’o oranyare koba moyo ekero Nyasae arakore aya? 
Numbers24:24 Abanto mbachiche ne chimeeri korwa ase engegu ya Kitimu, nabarabwo mbachande Abaasuri na Abaeberi, korende barabwo abanyene mbasirigwe boigo.”" 
Numbers24:25 Erio Baalamu akaimoka, akairana bwoye, na Balaki nere akabwatia enchera, akagenda bwoye." 
Numbers25:1 Ekero Abaisraeli batoorete agwo Sitimu, abanto bagachaka gokora obotomani nabakungu b’Abamoabu." 
Numbers25:2 Abwo bakarangeria Abaisraeli bagende ase emeyega y’ebing’wanso yarenge gokorerwa chinyasae chiabo, na barabwo bakabiria, naende bagasasima chinyasae chi’Abamoabu." 
Numbers25:3 Abaisraeli bakabwatana nenyasae yarenge korokwa Baali‐Peori, bakayesasima. Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene asebare." 
Numbers25:4 Erio agatebia Musa, “Renta abatang’ani bonsi b’Abaisraeli, obasunge agwo ase obosio bwane erioba ribasambe, erinde endamwamu yane enene etige Abaisraeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Erio Musa agatebia abagambi b’Abaisraeli, “Kera oyomo asemore, tiga aite abanto baye bonsi baria babwatanire na Baali‐Peori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Omoisraeli oyomo agacha akarentana omokungu oyomo bw’Abamidiani ase eamate yaye, ase obosio bwa Musa amo nomoganda bwonsi kobateneine agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, bakorera." 
Numbers25:7 Finehasi, mosinto bw’Eleazari o Haroni omokuani, akaimoka korwa ase omoganda bw’Abaisraeli, akabogoria ritimo," 
Numbers25:8 akabwatia omonto oria gochia ase akanyomba ka ime, akababeta ritimo bonsi babere, Omoisraeli oria amo nomokungu oria, ase chinda chiabo. Ase igo amaakwa aria agatiga goita Abaisraeli." 
Numbers25:9 Korende abanto abakwete ase ogoakwa okwo nigo babete chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
Numbers25:10 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi, mosinto bw’Eleazari o Haroni omokuani, nere ogera endamwamu yane yatigire Abaisraeli, ekiagera ere aba ne risemi buna inche inde ne risemi ase egati y’abanto aba. Ase ayio tinasiretie bonsi ase risemi riane." 
Numbers25:12 Ase ayio, motebie ng’a, ngokora inde nere okobwatana kwane kw’omorembe." 
Numbers25:13 Okobwatana okwo kw’omorembe nkobe asare ere, na ase ororeria rwaye, okobwatana kwa botambe kw’obokuani, ekiagera abete ne risemi ase engencho yane, inche Nyasae oye, naende agakora okobwatanigwa ase Abaisraeli.”" 
Numbers25:14 Omoisraeli oria oitetwe amo nomokungu Omomidiani nigo arenge korokwa Simuri, mosinto o Salu, omotang’ani bw’eamate yaye ase egesaku gia Simeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Omokungu oria bw’Abamidiani oitetwe ere nigo arenge korokwa Kosibi. Suri ise nere orenge omotang’ani bwe chiamate chinde chi’Abamidiani. 
Numbers25:16 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers25:17 “Umokera Abamidiani, obasirie," 
Numbers25:18 ekiagera barabwo babachandire ase okobaebereria gosasima Peori, na ase amang’ana a Kosibi, omosubati oria bw’omonene bw’Abamidiani. Omosubati oria obo oitetwe ase rituko riria amaakwa achete ase engencho ya Peori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Ekaba nyuma amaakwa aria gaetire, Omonene agakwana na Musa na Eleazari, omomura o Haroni omokuani, akabatebia," 
Numbers26:2 “Mobare omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, eamate ase eamate. Morike, abanto bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, abwo baranyare korwana esegi.”" 
Numbers26:3 Erio Musa na Eleazari omokuani bagakwana nabanto baria ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, ase orooche rwa Yorodan, kororia Yeriko, akabatebia," 
Numbers26:4 “Rika abanto bonsi abakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, buna Omonene achigete Musa.” Abaisraeli abwo barwete ense ya Misiri nabwo aba:" 
Numbers26:5 Reuben nere orenge omomura omotangi o Israeli. Ase egesaku kiaye nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abahanoki, abarwete ase Hanoki, na Abapalu, abarwete ase Palu," 
Numbers26:6 na Abahezironi, abarwete ase Hezironi, na Abakarimi, abarwete ase Karimi." 
Numbers26:7 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku kia Reuben. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na isato, na amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etato (43,730)." 
Numbers26:8 Ororeria rwa Palu n’Eliabu amo nabana baye: Nemweli, na Datani, na Abiiramu. (Aba nabwo Datani na Abiiramu bachoretwe korwa ase omoganda. Barabwo bakaamererania na Musa na Haroni, bakaba ase ekeombe gia Kora, ekero baamereranetie n’Omonene." 
Numbers26:9  
Numbers26:10 Riroba rikabwereka rikabamera amo na Kora, ekero omorero osambete na gosiria abanto amagana abere, na emerongo etano. Ayio akaba ekiorokererio ki’ogokurera." 
Numbers26:11 Korende abana ba Kora barabwo tibaitetwe.) 
Numbers26:12 Ase egesaku gia Simeoni nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abanemweli, abarwete ase Nemweli, na Abayamini, abarwete ase Yamini, na Abayakini, abarwete ase Yakini," 
Numbers26:13 na Abazera, abarwete ase Zera, na Abasauli, abarwete ase Sauli." 
Numbers26:14 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku gia Simeoni. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere, na amagana abere (22,200)." 
Numbers26:15 Ase egesaku kia Gadi nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abazefoni, abarwete ase Zefoni, na Abahagi, abarwete ase Hagi, na" 
Numbers26:16 Abasuni, abarwete ase Suni, na Abaosini, abarwete ase Osini, na Abaeri, abarwete ase Eri," 
Numbers26:17 na Abaarodi, abarwete ase Arodi, na Abaareli, abarwete ase Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku kia Gadi. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifi emerongo ene, na amagana atano (40,500)." 
Numbers26:19 Basinto ba Yuda, Eri na Onani, bagakwera agwo ase ense ya Kanani." 
Numbers26:20 Ase egesaku kia Yuda nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abasela, abarwete ase Sela, na Abaperesi, abarwete ase Peresi, na Abazera, abarwete ase Zera." 
Numbers26:21 Chiamate chia Peresi nigo chiarenge: Abahezironi, abarwete ase Hezironi, na Abahamuli, abarwete ase Hamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku kia Yuda. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na ebere na isano nemo, na amagana atano (76,500)." 
Numbers26:23 Ase egesaku gia Isakaru nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abatola, abarwete ase Tola, na Abapua, abarwete ase Pua," 
Numbers26:24 na Abayasubu, abarwete ase Yasubu, na Abashimuroni, abarwete ase Shimuroni." 
Numbers26:25 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku gia Isakaru. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano nomo na inye, na amagana atato (64,300)." 
Numbers26:26 Ase egesaku gia Sabuloni nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abaseredi, abarwete ase Seredi, na Abaeloni, abarwete ase Eloni, na Abayaleeli, abarwete ase Yaleeli." 
Numbers26:27 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku gia Sabuloni. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano nomo, na amagana atano (60,500)." 
Numbers26:28 Ebisaku bia Yusufu nebi’abamura baye babere, Manase na Efraimu:" 
Numbers26:29 Ase egesaku kia Manase nao eamate ya Makiri yarwete. Makiri nere orenge ise Gileadi, na korwa asare nao Abagileadi barwete." 
Numbers26:30 Ase ororeria rwa Gileadi nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abaieseri, abarwete ase Ieseri, na Abaheleki, abarwete ase Heleki," 
Numbers26:31 Abaasirieli, abarwete ase Asirieli, na Abasekemu, abarwete ase Sekemu," 
Numbers26:32 na Abasemida, abarwete ase Semida, na Abaheferi, abarwete ase Heferi." 
Numbers26:33 Selofehadi, mosinto o Heferi, tabwate abana abamura, korende nabana abaiseke boka abwate, na amarieta ’abaiseke abwo naro aya: Mala, na Noa, na Hogila, na Milka, na Tirisa." 
Numbers26:34 Echi nachio chiarenge chiamate chi’egesaku kia Manase. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na ibere, na amagana atano na abere (52,700)." 
Numbers26:35 Ase egesaku gi’Efraimu nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abasutela, abarwete ase Sutela, na Ababekeri, abarwete ase Bekeri, na Abatahani, abarwete ase Tahani." 
Numbers26:36 Sutela nigo arenge ise Erani, na korwa asare nao Abaerani barwete." 
Numbers26:37 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku gia Efraimu. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etato na ibere, na amagana atano (32,500). Aba nabwo barenge abana ba Yusufu ne chiamate chiabo." 
Numbers26:38 Ase egesaku kia Benjamin nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Ababela, abarwete ase Bela, na Abaasibeli, abarwete ase Asibeli, na Abaahiramu, abarwete ase Ahiramu," 
Numbers26:39 na Abasefufamu, abarwete ase Sefufamu, na Abahufamu, abarwete ase Hufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Abamura ba Bela nabwo Aridi na Naamani. Korwa ase Aridi nao Abaaridi barwete, na korwa ase Naamani nao Abanaamani barwete." 
Numbers26:41 Echi nachio chiarenge chiamate chi’egesaku kia Benjamin. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na isano, na amagana atano na rimo (45,600)." 
Numbers26:42 Ase egesaku kia Dani nigo chiarenge chiamate chi’Abasuhamu, abarwete ase Suhamu. Aba nabwo abanto b’egesaku kia Dani ase chiamate chiabo." 
Numbers26:43 Ababwarete ase chiamate chi’Abasuhamu nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano nomo na inye, na amagana ane (64,400)." 
Numbers26:44 Ase egesaku gi’Aseri nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abaimuna, abarwete ase Imuna, na Abaisibi, abarwete ase Isibi, na Ababeria, abarwete ase Beria." 
Numbers26:45 Abamura ba Beria nabwo Heberi ase eamate y’Abaheberi yarwete, na Malikieli, ase eamate y’Abamalikieli yarwete." 
Numbers26:46 Omwana omoiseke o Aseri nigo arenge korokwa Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku gi’Aseri. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na isato, na amagana ane (53,400)." 
Numbers26:48 Ase egesaku kia Nafutali nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abayaseli, abarwete ase Yaseli, na Abaguni, abarwete ase Guni," 
Numbers26:49 na Abayeseri, abarwete ase Yeseri, na Abasilemu, abarwete ase Silemu." 
Numbers26:50 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku kia Nafutali. Ababaretwe nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na isano, na amagana ane (45,400)." 
Numbers26:51 Abanto bonsi b’Abaisraeli abarigetwe nigo barenge chilifu amagana atano na rimo na eyemo, na amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etato (601,730)." 
Numbers26:52 Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers26:53 “Aatananere abanto aba chingongo chibe emiando yabo. Ochiatanane kobwatekana nomobaro bw’abanto. 
Numbers26:54 Egesaku kere ekenene keegwe orogongo oronene robe omwando obo, na egesaku kere egeke keegwe orogongo oroke robe omwando obo. Kera egesaku nakeegwe omwando oye koreng’ana nomobaro obo." 
Numbers26:55 Ense yaatananwe ase ogoakerwa obomera. Abanto mbanyore omwando koreng’ana nomobaro bw’amarieta ’ebisaku bie chisokoro chiabo. 
Numbers26:56 Koreng’ana buna obomera boragwere abanto ba kera egesaku, ekenene gose egeke, nabo baranyore omwando obo.”" 
Numbers26:57 Ase egesaku kia Lawi nigo chiarenge chiamate echi: Abagerisoni, abarwete ase Gerisoni, na Abakohati, abarwete ase Kohati, na Abamerari, abarwete ase Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Echi nachio chiamate chi’egesaku kia Lawi: Eamate y’Abalibini, na ey’Abaheburoni, na ey’Abamali na ey’Abamusi, na ey’Abakora. Kohati nere orenge ise Amuramu." 
Numbers26:59 Moka Amuramu nigo arenge korokwa Yokebedi, mosubati o Lawi, oria oiboreretwe Lawi agwo ase ense ya Misiri. Omokungu oria akamoiborera Amuramu abana aba: Haroni, na Musa, na Miriamu, omoiseke omwabo." 
Numbers26:60 Basinto ba Haroni nabwo aba: Nadabu, na Abihu, na Eleazari, na Itamari." 
Numbers26:61 Korende Nadabu na Abihu bagakwa ekero baruete omorero bw’engencho eng’ao otachikiri ase obosio bw’Omonene. 
Numbers26:62 Kera omonto omosacha ase egati yabo oyo konya okoorire omotienyi oyomo na goetania nigo abaretwe. Barabwo nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na isato (23,000). Abanto aba tibabaretwe amo n’Abaisraeli bande, ekiagera tibaetwe omwando ase egati y’Abaisraeli." 
Numbers26:63 Abanto aba nabwo Musa na Eleazari omokuani barigete ekero babarete Abaisraeli agwo ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, ase Yorodan kororia Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Korende ase egati y’abanto aba onde tarengeo, nonya noyomo, ase baria Musa na Haroni omokuani babarete agwo ase erooro ya Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Omonene nakwanete igoro y’abwo, “Barabwo nigo barakwere ase erooro.” Omonto onde tagotigara ore moyo nonya noyomo, otatiga Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Ase engaki eyio abaiseke ba Selofehadi, mosinto o Heferi o Gileadi, o Makiri, o Manase bagacha. Aba nigo barwete ase chiamate chia Manase, mosinto o Yusufu, na amarieta abo naro aya: Mala, na Noa, na Hogila, na Milka, na Tirisa." 
Numbers27:2 Barabwo bagacha ase obosio bwa Musa, na obwa Eleazari omokuani, na ase amasio ’abatang’ani, na ase omoganda bwonsi, bagatenena agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano, bagateba," 
Numbers27:3 “Tata nigo akwerete agwo ase erooro. Ere tarenge ase egati y’ekeombe keria giasangererekanete amo gekaba mamincha y’Omonene, ase abwo barenge ase ensemo ya Kora, korende ere nigo akwete ase engencho y’ebibe biaye omonyene. Ekero akwete tatigete abana abamura" 
Numbers27:4 Nase ki erieta ria tata rigosirigwa korwa ase eamate yaye ekiagera tabwate abana abamura? Toe naintwe omwando ase egati y’abamura bamwabo tata.” 
Numbers27:5 Musa akaira amang’ana abo ase obosio bw’Omonene," 
Numbers27:6 na Omonene akamotebia," 
Numbers27:7 “Abaiseke ba Selofehadi nekeene bakoboria. Bae omwando obo ase egati ya bamura bamwabo ise. Tiga omwando o ise obe oyobo. 
Numbers27:8 Naende otebie Abaisraeli ng’a omonto karakwe, onye ere tabwati omwana omomura, omwando bw’omonto oyio omwana oye omoiseke ayoire." 
Numbers27:9 Onye omonto oyio tabwati nonya nomwana omoiseke, omwando oye abamura bamwabo bayoire." 
Numbers27:10 Onye omonto oyio tabwati abamura bamwabo, omwando oye oirwe nabamura bamwabo ise." 
Numbers27:11 Na onye omonto oyio tabwati abamura bamwabo ise, omwando oye oirwe nomoamate oye ore ang’e. Okwo nigo korabe ogochika kw’oboronge ase Abaisraeli, buna inche Omonene nagochikire.”" 
Numbers27:12 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia, “Tiira gochia igoro ase egetunwa eke ki’Abarimu, na origererie ense naeire Abaisraeli." 
Numbers27:13 Ekero kwayerorire, aye nigo orasangererekane amo nabanto bao buna Haroni omino asangererekanete amo nabanto baye," 
Numbers27:14 ekiagera timwaigwerete ring’ana riane agwo ase erooro ya Sini, rituko riria omoganda bwonsi bwemurunganetie, gose timwaorogetie ng’a inche nomochenu inde, ekero mware kobochorera abanto amache.” (Aya namache a Meriba ya Kadeshi ase erooro ya Sini)." 
Numbers27:15 Musa agakwana n’Omonene akabora," 
Numbers27:16 “Aye Omonene Nyasae, aye oyokorua obogima ase abanto bonsi, chora omonto oraraae omoganda oyo," 
Numbers27:17 omonto oranyare gotang’ana abanto kobagosoka na kobakoirana, erinde omoganda bw’abanto b’Omonene tobaisa koba buna ching’ondi chitari nomorisia.”" 
Numbers27:18 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Ira Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, omonto oyio omoika one ore ime yaye, erio omobekere amaboko." 
Numbers27:19 Omorente atenene ase obosio bw’Eleazari omokuani, na ase amasio ’omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto, erio ase amasio abo omorarie ng’a nere oirire ribaga riao." 
Numbers27:20 Omoe okobua buna okwao, erio nario omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli oramoigwere." 
Numbers27:21 Yoshua abe ogotenena ase obosio bw’Eleazari omokuani, na Eleazari abe okomoboreria goetera ase Urimu, agwo ase obosio bwane amanye ogwancha kwane. Yoshua amo nomoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli nigo barakore emeremo yabo yonsi buna Eleazari arabachike.”" 
Numbers27:22 Musa akaira Yoshua buna Omonene konya amochikire, akamorenta ase obosio bw’Eleazari na obw’omoganda bwonsi." 
Numbers27:23 Naende akabeka amaboko aye igoro ase omotwe o Yoshua, akamwatanana, akamobeka ase ribaga riaye, buna Omonene konya amochikire goetera ase Musa." 
Numbers28:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers28:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli obachike ng’a ase ekero keria kerageire goika banduere ebing’wanso na okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero kore ne rimisu rigiya rikongwenera. 
Numbers28:3 “Obatebie: Eke nakio ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero moramoruere Omonene: Kera rituko botambe morue chimanwa chimingichi ibere, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers28:4 Eyemo y’echio oyerue mambia, na eyende mogoroba." 
Numbers28:5 Kera eyemo oyerue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera, ebimunu bibere bi’obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta amitire korwa ase amazeituni egetuba ekemo." 
Numbers28:6 Ekio nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko, ekio Musa aruete ritang’ani agwo ase egetunwa gia Sinai gekaba rimisu rigiya, ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero ase Omonene." 
Numbers28:7 Orue okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa egetuba ekemo, amo nemingichi eria entang’ani. Ekenyugwa eke egetindi keraumorwe agwo Aase Aachenu, ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Numbers28:8 Emingichi eria ya kabere oyerue mogoroba amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera, na ogw’ekenyugwa, buna kwaruete eria ya mambia. Eke nekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikogwenera Omonene.”" 
Numbers28:9 Ase rituko ri’Esabato morue chimanwa chimingichi ibere, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo. Amo nachirochio morue obosie obonuke ebimunu bine bwochoganirie amaguta ’amazeituni, bibe okoruegwa kw’endagera. Morue boigo okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa gochikire." 
Numbers28:10 Eke nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera Esabato gekoruegwa amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko, na okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa gochikire amo."
