Numbers28:11 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ria kera omotienyi mobe mokorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene. Morue chieri chinsae ibere, na emingichi eyemo, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano na ibere, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi echitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers28:12 Morue okoruegwa kw’endagera, obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta ’amazeituni. Amo na kera eeri morue obosie ebimunu bitano na ekemo, na amo nemingichi eria obosie ebimunu bine," 
Numbers28:13 na amo na kera emanwa emingichi, obosie ebimunu bibere. Ebing’wanso ebio bi’ogosambwa nigo bire okoruegwa kw’endagera kore ne rimisu rigiya kogosambwa nomorero ase Omonene." 
Numbers28:14 Ekenyugwa gekoruegwa amo na kera eeri nigo kerabe edivai ebituba bibere, na amo nemingichi eria edivai egetuba ekemo na ekeng’ese, na amo na kera emanwa emingichi edivai egetuba ekemo. Eke nkebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gekoruegwa kera omotienyi ase emetienyi yonsi y’omwaka." 
Numbers28:15 Amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko na okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa, morue egoree eyemo ase Omonene, ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Numbers28:16 Rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani nerituko ri’Epasaka y’Omonene. 
Numbers28:17 Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi oyio nario Rituko Rinene. Ase amatuko atano na abere morie emegati etabekiri memera. 
Numbers28:18 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko ase rituko erio. 
Numbers28:19 Morue ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kegosambwa nomorero ase Omonene, chieri chinsae ibere, na emingichi eyemo, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano na ibere echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers28:20 Naende morue okoruegwa kw’endagera obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta: Amo na kera eeri ensae morue obosie ebimunu bitano na ekemo, na amo nemingichi eria obosie ebimunu bine," 
Numbers28:21 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria isano na ibere obosie ebimunu bibere. 
Numbers28:22 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asemore. 
Numbers28:23 Igo morarue ebinto ebi amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko botambe. 
Numbers28:24 Ase enchera eyio kera rituko, ase amatuko atano na abere, mobe mokoruera Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera kogosambwa nomorero, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera. Morue okoruegwa okwo amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa gochikire." 
Numbers28:25 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko ase rituko erio. 
Numbers28:26 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani rie rigesa, ekero morabe mokorenta okoruegwa kw’endagera enyia ase Omonene, ase Rituko Rinene rie Chichuma, namobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko ase rituko erio." 
Numbers28:27 Morue chieri chinsae ibere, na emingichi eyemo, amo ne chimanwa chimingichi isano na ibere, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo. Echi nchibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kere ne rimisu rigiya rikogwenera Omonene." 
Numbers28:28 Amo nekeng’wanso ekio morue okoruegwa kw’endagera, obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta ’amazeituni. Amo na kera eeri morue obosie ebimunu bitano na ekemo, na amo nemingichi eria obosie ebimunu bine," 
Numbers28:29 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria isano na ibere obosie ebimunu bibere. 
Numbers28:30 Naende morue egoree eyemo ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asemore. 
Numbers28:31 Morue ekeng’wanso ekio amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera. Ching’iti echio chionsi chi’ebing’wanso chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, chiruegwe amo nokoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa gochikire amo." 
Numbers29:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere namobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko. Rituko erio nigo rirabe rituko ri’okobugia ebiroria. 
Numbers29:2 Morue eeri ensae eyemo, na emingichi eyemo, ne chimingichi isano na ibere, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kere ne rimisu rigiya rikogwenera Omonene." 
Numbers29:3 Amo nekeng’wanso ekio morue okoruegwa kw’endagera, obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta: Amo neeri eria morue obosie ebimunu bitano na ekemo, na amo nemingichi eria obosie ebimunu bine," 
Numbers29:4 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria isano na ibere obosie ebimunu bibere. 
Numbers29:5 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekengwanso ki’ebibe ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asemore. 
Numbers29:6 Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ki’Omotienyi Omoyia, amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera gochikire, na ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko na okoruegwa kw’endagera na ogw’ekenyugwa gokorentwa amo nebio, koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire. Ebinto ebio bire ne rimisu rigiya, okoruegwa kogosambwa nomorero ase Omonene." 
Numbers29:7 Ase rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi oyio o gatano na kabere, mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Mobe mokweng’ata na gweitia. Timokora emeremo ende yonsi." 
Numbers29:8 Morue eeri ensae eyemo, na emingichi eyemo, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano na ibere, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo. Echio nchibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kere ne rimisu rigiya rikogwenera Omonene." 
Numbers29:9 Amo nachirochio morue okoruegwa kw’endagera, obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta. Amo neeri eria morue obosie ebimunu bitano na ekemo, na amo nemingichi eria obosie ebimunu bine," 
Numbers29:10 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi, chiria isano na ibere, obosie ebimunu bibere." 
Numbers29:11 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, kementwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogokora okobwatanigwa, na ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:12 Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ende yonsi, korende morende Rituko Rinene ri’Omonene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
Numbers29:13 Morue chieri ikomi na isato, ne chimingichi ibore, ne chimanwa chimingichi ikomi na inye, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari ne kemocho ase emebere yabo. Echio nchibe ekengw’anso kegosambwa nomorero, kere ne rimisu rigiya rikogwenera Omonene." 
Numbers29:14 Amo nechio morue okoruegwa kw’endagera, obosie obonuke bwochoganirie namaguta. Amo na kera eyemo ye chieri chiria ikomi na isato morue obosie ebimunu bitano na ekemo, na amo na kera eyemo ye chimingichi chiria ibere obosie ebimunu bine," 
Numbers29:15 na amo na kera eyemo ye chimanwa chimingichi chiria ikomi na inye obosie ebimunu bibere. 
Numbers29:16 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:17 Rituko ria kabere morue chieri chinsae ikomi na ibere, ne chimingichi ibere, ne chimanwa chimingichi ikomi na inye, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers29:18 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruerwa amo ne chieri chiria, ne chimingichi chiria, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiria, koreng’ana nomobaro obo. Boigo mochirue koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire." 
Numbers29:19 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko. Morue nokoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:20 Rituko ria gatato morue chieri ikomi nemo, ne chimingichi ibere, ne chimanwa chimingichi ikomi na inye, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers29:21 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo ne chieri chiria, ne chimingichi chiria, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiria, koreng’ana nomobaro obo. Boigo mochirue koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire." 
Numbers29:22 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:23 Rituko ria kane morue chieri ikomi, ne chimingichi ibere, ne chimanwa chimingichi ikomi na inye, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers29:24 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo ne chieri chiria, ne chimingichi chiria, ne chimanwa chiria, koreng’ana nomobaro obo. Boigo mochirue koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire." 
Numbers29:25 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:26 Rituko ria gatano morue chieri kianda, ne chimingichi ibere, ne chimanwa chimingichi ikomi na inye, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers29:27 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo ne chieri chiria, ne chimingichi chiria, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiria, koreng’ana nomobaro obo. Boigo mochirue koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire." 
Numbers29:28 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:29 Rituko ria gatano na rimo morue chieri isano na isato, ne chimingichi ibere, ne chimanwa chimingichi ikomi na inye, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers29:30 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo ne chieri chiria, ne chimingichi chiria, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiria, koreng’ana nomobaro obo. Boigo mochirue koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire." 
Numbers29:31 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:32 Rituko ria gatano na kabere morue chieri isano na ibere, ne chimingichi ibere, ne chimanwa chimingichi ikomi na inye, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Numbers29:33 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo ne chieri chiria, ne chimingichi chiria, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiria koreng’ana nomobaro obo. Boigo mochirue koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire." 
Numbers29:34 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:35 Rituko ria gatano na gatato goika mobe nomosangererekano bwatananire ase ogosasima. Timokora emeremo ya kera rituko ase rituko erio. 
Numbers29:36 Morue eeri eyemo, na emingichi eyemo, ne chimanwa chimingichi isano na ibere, echiakoorire omwaka oyomo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo. Echi nachibe ekeng’wanso kegosambwa nomorero ase Omonene, kebe ne rimisu rigiya rikomogwenera." 
Numbers29:37 Mochirue amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo neeri eria, na emingichi eria, ne chimanwa chimingichi chiria, koreng’ana nomobaro obo. Boigo mochirue koreng’ana nomoroberio ochikire." 
Numbers29:38 Naende morue egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Ebing’wanso ebio bimentwe ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa gochikire amo nabirobio." 
Numbers29:39 Ebing’wanso ebio amo nokoruegwa okwo goika mobirue ase Omonene ase chingaki chi’Amatuko aino Amanene achorire. Nabirobio bimentwe ase ebing’wanso biaino mwariete chiira ng’a morue, na ebing’wanso bi’ogwancha, onye nebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, gose okoruegwa kw’endagera, gose okw’ebinyugwa, gose ebing’wanso bi’omorembe." 
Numbers29:40 Musa agatebia Abaisraeli amang’ana onsi buna Omonene konya amochikire. 
Numbers30:1 Musa agakwana nabatang’ani b’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli, akabatebia, “Aya naro Omonene achikire:" 
Numbers30:2 Ekero omonto akoria eira ase Omonene, gose agotiana ng’a netange korwa ase egento gete, tagosaria eira eria yaye. Goika akore na goikerania buna akwanete." 
Numbers30:3 “Ekero omoiseke otarasoka korwa ase omochie o ise akoria eira ase Omonene, gose gotiana ng’a netange korwa ase egento gete," 
Numbers30:4 na ise karaigwe igoro y’eira eria y’omoiseke oye, korende takwana ring’ana, eira eria negenderere kobao. Kera egento omoiseke oria akwanire goika ageikeranie." 
Numbers30:5 Korende onye ise ase rituko riria araigwe ring’ana igoro y’eira eria na tayianchera, omoiseke oria tagwenereti koyeikerania. Omonene naabere omoiseke oria, ekiagera ise nangete ng’a eira eria tekobao." 
Numbers30:6 “Omoiseke oria onye onyuomirwe nomosacha ritang’ani ataraikerania eira ariete, gose amang’ana akwanete ase ogotarengereria," 
Numbers30:7 goika aikeranie onsi. Aya nigo arakoreke onye omosacha oye ase rituko riria aigwete amang’ana ’eira eria agakira, takwana ring’ana rinde rionsi." 
Numbers30:8 Korende onye omosacha oye ase rituko riria araigwe amang’ana ’eira eria tayianchera, erio eira eria omokungu oyio ariete, na amang’ana aya akwanete atarengereretie buya, tagoikeranigwa, na Omonene naabere omokungu oyio." 
Numbers30:9 “Korende eira ende yonsi, gose amang’ana ande onsi omokungu omoboraka, gose oyotiganire nomosacha oye ariete, gose aya atianete, goika aikeranigwe." 
Numbers30:10 “Onye omokungu ore bwoye ase omosacha oye oriete eira, gose agatiana ng’a netange korwa ase egento gete," 
Numbers30:11 na omosacha oye oyaigure, korende takwana ring’ana rinde rionsi, gose komokania, omokungu oyio goika akore na goikerania kera egento akwanete." 
Numbers30:12 Korende onye omosacha oye okwanga eira yaye gose ogotiana kwaye, na kobikora bibe bosa ase rituko riria akoyaigwa, amang’ana omokungu oria akwanete tagoikeranigwa. Omonene naabere omokungu oria, ekiagera omosacha oye bwangire ng’a taikerania eira eria, gose ogotiana koria." 
Numbers30:13 Eira ende yonsi, gose ogotiana konde gwonsi kw’ogwetanga korwa ase egento gete, omokungu oria arakore, omosacha oye nabo aranyare koyianchera, gose kwanga." 
Numbers30:14 Korende onye omosacha oria okirete goika rituko ria kabere, takwanete ring’ana igoro y’ayio, rirorio nayiancherete, na omokungu oria goika aikeranie chiira chiaye chionsi ariete, gose ogotiana kwaye kw’ogwetanga korwa ase egento gete. Omosacha oye nayianchete, ekiagera takwanete gento kende ase rituko riria ayaigwete." 
Numbers30:15 Korende omosacha oria karasarie na kwanga amang’ana omokungu oye akwanete nyuma kayaigure, rirorio okomocha kw’ogotayaikerania nigo korabe igoro y’omosacha oria.”" 
Numbers30:16 Eye nero emeroberio echikire, Omonene amoete Musa, yarenge koba ase egati y’omosacha na omokungu oye, na egati ya ise na omwana oye omoiseke otarasoka, ekero are ase omochie o ise." 
Numbers31:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia." 
Numbers31:2 “Genda obaruserie Abaisraeli egesiomba ase Abamidiani ase engencho y’ayio abanto abwo babakorerete, erio nyuma yaye aye nokwe, osangererekane amo nabanto bao.”" 
Numbers31:3 Musa agatebia abanto, “Beka ang’e abanto bare ase egati yaino, mobae ebirwanero bagende korwania Abamidiani, erinde bamoruserie Omonene egesiomba." 
Numbers31:4 Korwa ase kera egesaku ki’Abaisraeli motome abanto elifu eyemo, bagende korwana esegi.”" 
Numbers31:5 Ase ayio korwa ase Abaisraeli chilifu chinyinge bagachora abanto elifu eyemo korwa ase kera egesaku. Abarwani bonsi bachoretwe kogenda korwana esegi nigo baare chilifu ikomi na ibere. 
Numbers31:6 Musa agatoma abanto aba, elifu eyemo korwa ase kera egesaku, bakagenda korwana esegi. Amo nabarabwo agatoma Finehasi, mosinto o Eleazari omokuani. Ere akaira ebikorero bi’Obomenyo Obochenu na ebirombeta bi’okobugigwa." 
Numbers31:7 Barabwo bakaumokera Abamidiani, bakabarwania buna Omonene achigete Musa, bagaita kera omonto obo omosacha." 
Numbers31:8 Amo nabwo baitetwe nigo barenge abaruoti batano b’Abamidiani. Abaruoti abwo nabwo aba: Ebi, na Rekemu, na Suri, na Huri, na Reba. Boigo bagaita na Baalamu, mosinto o Beori nomoro." 
Numbers31:9 Abaisraeli bakaira abakungu b’Abamidiani amo nabana babo. Boigo bagasakora chiombe ne ching’ondi, na ebinto bionsi bi’Abamidiani." 
Numbers31:10 Bagasamba emechie ase Abamidiani bamenyete, bagasamba nebitwori biabo bionsi bie chiema." 
Numbers31:11 Bakaira ebinto bionsi basakorete, bagoosa abanto, bakaira ne chitugo chionsi." 
Numbers31:12 Erio bakarenta ebinto basakorete, na abanto boosete, ne chitugo, ase Musa na Eleazari omokuani, na ase omoganda bw’Abaisraeli otoorete ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, agwo ase orooche rwa Yorodan, kororia Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Musa na Eleazari omokuani, na abaraai bonsi b’omoganda bw’abanto, bagasoka korwa ase ebitwori, bakagenda korotota abarwani baria b’esegi." 
Numbers31:14 Musa akagechigwa nabanene b’abarwani, abatang’ani b’abarwani chilifu, na ab’amagana, baria bairanete korwa ase okorwana esegi," 
Numbers31:15 akabora, “Inee! Ninki kiaba motaita abakungu?" 
Numbers31:16 Inyora ng’a nabwo baigwerete ogosemia kwa Baalamu, bakagera Abaisraeli tibaba abegenwa ase Omonene, ekero barenge agwo Peori, na ase ayio amaakwa agacha ase egati y’omoganda bw’abanto b’Omonene." 
Numbers31:17 Ase ayio bono ita kera omwana omomura, na moite kera omokungu obeire nomosacha." 
Numbers31:18 Korende abaiseke bonsi abekungi timobaisa kobaita, mobaire babe abaino." 
Numbers31:19 Na bono, onde bwensi ore asemore oitire omonto, na onde bwensi okunire egetondo, goika abeere isiko y’egetwori ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. Ase rituko ria gatato, naende ase rituko ria gatano na kabere, mwechene inwe abanyene, amo nabooswa baino." 
Numbers31:20 Naende mochene kera eanga, na kera egento keroisirie korwa ase amasankwa, gose korwa ase amanya e chimbori, na ebinto bionsi bi’emete.”" 
Numbers31:21 Na Eleazari omokuani agatebia abanto abwo bairanete korwa ase okorwana esegi, “Oyo noro omoroberio Omonene achigete Musa:" 
Numbers31:22 Etahabu, na efeta, na etaai, na ebioma ao ao," 
Numbers31:23 na ebinto binde bionsi bitanyare gosarigwa nomorero, ebio mobibeke ase omorero ime kobiteema, nabirobio nabicheneke. Nonya naboigo goika mobisibie namache agochena, na kera egento getanyare kobua omorero goika mogeetie ime ase amache ayio." 
Numbers31:24 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere mosibie chianga chiaino, nainwe namobe abachenekire; nyuma y’ayio monyare gosoa ase ebitwori.”" 
Numbers31:25 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers31:26 “Aye amo n’Eleazari omokuani na abaraai b’ebisaku bi’omoganda bwonsi, mobare ebinto biasakorwa, na abanto booswa, amo ne chitugo barenta." 
Numbers31:27 Erio bwatanane ebinto biasakorwa, na abanto booswa amo ne ching’iti ase chinsemo ibere. Ensemo eyemo ebe ey’abarwani b’esegi, na eyende ey’omoganda." 
Numbers31:28 Korwa ase ensemo eyetungetie abarwani orusie omonto oyomo korwa ase abanto amagana atano aboosetwe abe oyo bw’Omonene. Naboigo orusie eng’iti eyemo korwa ase ching’iti amagana atano ase chiombe, ne chitigere ne ching’ondi ne chimbori, chibe echi’Omonene." 
Numbers31:29 Abanto abwo baatananwe korwa ase ekeng’ese ekio baegwe Eleazari omokuani, babe ekeegwa ase Omonene, naboigo ne ching’iti chiria." 
Numbers31:30 Naende korwa ase ekeng’ese egetungetie omoganda bw’Abaisraeli bwatanane omonto oyomo bw’abanto emerongo etano, na eyemo ye chiombe emerongo etano, naboigo ne chitigere, ne ching’ondi, ne chimbori. Abanto abwo amo ne ching’iti echio chionsi oe Abalawi abwo bagokora emeremo ase Obomenyo Obochenu bw’Omonene.”" 
Numbers31:31 Musa na Eleazari omokuani bagakora buna Omonene konya achikire Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Ebisakorwa ebiatigarete ase abarwani b’esegi, ebi barentete ekero babuete, nabio ebi: ching’ondi, amo ne chimbori, chilifu amagana atano na rimo na emerongo etano na ebere na isano (675,000)," 
Numbers31:33 ne chiombe chilifu emerongo etano na ebere na ibere (72,000)," 
Numbers31:34 ne chitigere chilifu emerongo etano nomo na eyemo (61,000)" 
Numbers31:35 na abaiseke abekungi chilifu emerongo etato; na ibere (32,000)." 
Numbers31:36 Ekeng’ese egiatungetie abarwani b’esegi nigo kiarenge: Ching’ondi amo ne chimbori chilifu amagana atato na emerongo etato na isano na ibere, na amagana atano (337,500)." 
Numbers31:37 Ebango y’Omonene yarusetigwe korwa ase ching’ondi echio, amo ne chimbori, nigo yarenge amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano na ebere, na isano (675)." 
Numbers31:38 Chiombe baetwe nigo chiarenge chilifu emerongo etato na isano nemo (36,000), na echi’Omonene nigo chiarenge emerongo etano na ebere, na ibere (72)." 
Numbers31:39 Chitigere baetwe nigo chiarenge chilifu emerongo etato, na amagana atano (30,500), na echi’Omonene nigo chiarenge emerongo etano nomo, na eyemo (61)." 
Numbers31:40 Abaiseke abekungi baetwe nigo barenge chilifu ikomi na isano nemo (16,000) na aba Omonene nigo barenge emerongo etato, na babere (32)." 
Numbers31:41 Musa akaa Eleazari omokuani ensemo eria yaruetwe ase Omonene, buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Numbers31:42 Ekeng’ese egiatungetie Abaisraeli, ekio Musa arusetie korwa ase abarwani baria b’esegi," 
Numbers31:43 nigo kiarenge ching’ondi chilifu amagana atato na emerongo etato na isano na ibere, na amagana atano (337,500)," 
Numbers31:44 ne chiombe chilifu emerongo etato na isano nemo (36,000)," 
Numbers31:45 ne chitigere chilifu emerongo etato, na amagana atano (30,500)," 
Numbers31:46 na abanto chilifu ikomi na isano nemo (16,000)." 
Numbers31:47 Korwa ase ekeng’ese egiatungete omoganda bw’Abaisraeli, Musa agaatanana oyomo bw’abanto emerongo etano, na eyemo ye ching’iti emerongo etano, akaa Abalawi baria barenge gokora emeremo ase Obomenyo Obochenu bw’Omonene, buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Numbers31:48 Erio abanene b’abarwani, abatang’ani b’abarwani chilifu, na ab’amagana, bagacha ase Musa," 
Numbers31:49 bakamotebia, “Omonene, intwe abasomba bao, twabarire abarwani b’esegi abarenge inse y’oborendi bwaito, na twanyorire ng’a mbonsi bare, onde tasireti korwa asetore." 
Numbers31:50 Ase ayio twarentire ebinto bie chitahabu bi’ogwechabera: ebitange bi’amaboko, na ebigera, ne chibonyi, na ebigera bi’amato, ne chisonoi. Ebinto ebio twasakorete kera oyomo oito, na bono twabirentire, twabirure ase Omonene, ase ogokora okobwatanigwa asetore ase obosio bwaye.”" 
Numbers31:51 Musa na Eleazari omokuani bakanyora korwa ase abatang’ani abwo chitahabu chiria chiaroisetigwe ebinto bi’ogwechabera. 
Numbers31:52 Chitahabu chionsi chiaruetwe ase Omonene, chiria abatang’ani baria b’abarwani chilifu na ab’amagana barentete, nigo chiarenge chi’oborito koreng’ana ne chikiro amagana abere." 
Numbers31:53 Abarwani b’esegi konya basakoire ebinto, na kera oyomo obo konya oirire ebiaye bweka omonyene." 
Numbers31:54 Musa na Eleazari omokuani bakanyora chitahabu chiria korwa ase abatang’ani b’abarwani chilifu na ab’amagana, bagachiira ime y’Eema y’Omosangererekano, na Abaisraeli bakainyorwa ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Numbers32:1 Abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ab’ekia Gadi, nigo babwate amaicho amange mono. Ekero baroche ense ya Yaeseri na eya Gileadi ng’a nigo chire chingiya ase oborisia," 
Numbers32:2 bakagenda ase Musa, na Eleazari omokuani, na ase abaraai b’omoganda bw’Abaisraeli, bakabatebia," 
Numbers32:3 “Ataroti, na Diboni, na Yaeseri, na Nimura, na Hesiboni, na Eleali, na Sibamu, na Nebo, na Beoni," 
Numbers32:4 nemechie y’ense eyio Omonene atigete omoganda bw’Abaisraeli okayebua, na ense eye nigo ere engiya ase oborisia bwe chitugo, na intwe abasomba bao nigo tobwate amaicho amange e chitugo.”" 
Numbers32:5 Naende bagateba, “Onye twanyorire ogwancherwa korwa asore, tiga intwe, abasomba bao, toegwe ense eye ebe eyaito, korende tobaisa gotwambokia gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan komenyao.”" 
Numbers32:6 Musa agakwana nabanto ba Gadi na aba Reuben, akabora, “Inee! Abanto bamino nigo bakogenda korwana esegi, nainwe mobe motigarete aase aa?" 
Numbers32:7 Nase ki inwe mogoita Abaisraeli emioyo, erinde tibabaisa kwamboka gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan, na koira ense eria Omonene abaeire?" 
Numbers32:8 Amang’ana aya naro chisokoro chiaino chiakorete ekero nabatomete korwa Kadeshi‐Barinea gochia koroota ense eyio. 
Numbers32:9 Barabwo bakagenda bagaika ase ense omweya y’Esikoli, na ekero baroche ense eria, bakairana bagaita Abaisraeli emioyo ase ogotagenda ase ense eria Omonene konya abaeire." 
Numbers32:10 Ase rituko riria Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene, agatiana, akabora:" 
Numbers32:11 Ekeene ase abanto bonsi baruete Misiri, aba bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, onde tari, nonya noyomo oranyare korora ense eria narierete Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo eira ng’a nimbae, ekiagera abanto aba bangire koba abegenwa asende." 
Numbers32:12 Ase barabwo onde tari oranyare goika aroro otatiga Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune Omokenisi, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni. Barabwo nabaike aroro, ekiagera babeire abegenwa asende, inche Omonene." 
Numbers32:13 Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene ase Abaisraeli, akabatiga bakana‐goetanana ase erooro ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, goika abanto bonsi b’ekiaare keria, abwo konya bakorire ebibe ase Omonene, bagasirigwa kegima." 
Numbers32:14 Na bono, inwe oroiboro rw’abanto abanyabibe, mwabeire mamincha y’Omonene, buna chisokoro chiaino chiarenge, na mwagerire Omonene omentire endamwamu yaye ase Abaisraeli." 
Numbers32:15 Inwe komoraange koigwera Omonene, ere nigo aratige abanto aba bonsi agwo ase erooro, nainwe mogere abanto aba bonsi basire.”" 
Numbers32:16 Abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ab’ekia Gadi bagacha ase Musa bakabora, “Toe ribaga toagache ameri amakong’u aiga ase chitugo chiaito chikobeera, naende toagache emechie egiteire chindwaki ase abana baito baramenye." 
Numbers32:17 Erio intwe toimokie ebirwanero bi esegi, twebeke ang’e totang’ane Abaisraeli korwana esegi goika tobaikie aase abo. Korende abana baito batigare aa, bamenyete emechie egiteire chindwaki, erinde abanto b’ense eye tibabaisa kobakora bobe." 
Numbers32:18 Titokoirana ase chinka chiaito goika torore ng’a Abaisraeli baminto banyorire kera omonto orogongo rw’omwando oye. 
Numbers32:19 Intwe titokonyora omwando oito amo nabarabwo agwo ng’umbu ya Yorodan, ekiagera twanyorire omwando oito aiga moocha ya Yorodan.”" 
Numbers32:20 Musa akabairaneria, agateba, “Onye mogochia gokora bo, rirorio bogoria ebirwanero biaino bi’esegi ase obosio bw’Omonene, erio mogende korwana esegi." 
Numbers32:21 Kera omonto ore asemore, oyobogoretie ebirwanero bi’esegi nigo aramboke gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan, ase obosio bw’Omonene: mobeereo goika ere abue ababisa baye barue asare," 
Numbers32:22 na ense eria ebe yabuirwe ase Omonene. Nyuma y’ayio nario moranyare koirana aiga motari na komocha, na igo monyore ense eye ebe eyaino, monyare komenya ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Numbers32:23 Korende motaikeraneti chiira chiaino mwarire, ekeene rirorio mwakorire ebibe ase Omonene, na mobe nobomaene ng’a nase engencho y’ebibe ebio biaino moranyore egesusuro." 
Numbers32:24 Ase ayio agacha emechie ase abana baino baramenye na ameri ase ching’ondi chiaino, erio mokore buna mwarire chiira chiaino.”" 
Numbers32:25 Erio abanto b’egesaku kia Gadi na ab’ekia Reuben bakamotebia Musa, “Omonene oito, intwe abasomba bao inatokore buna gwachikire." 
Numbers32:26 Abana baito na abakungu barabwo tiga batigare amo ne ching’ondi ne chiombe chiaito aiga ase emechie ya Gileadi. 
Numbers32:27 Korende intwe abasomba bao, kera oyomo oito oyobogoretie ebirwanero bi’okorwana esegi agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene namboke gochia ng’umbu, buna aye omonene oito gwachikire.”" 
Numbers32:28 Igoro y’amang’ana ’abanto abwo, Musa agachika Eleazari omokuani, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, na abaraai be chiamate chi’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli," 
Numbers32:29 akabatebia, “Onye Abagadi na Abareuben, abwo bonsi babogoretie ebirwanero bi’esegi, bakwamboka Yorodan amo nainwe korwana esegi ase obosio bw’Omonene, na inwe mobue ense eria, na koyeira, erio mobae ense ya Gileadi ebe eyabo." 
Numbers32:30 Korende onye tibakobogoria ebirwanero bi’esegi bamboke gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan, rirorio nigo baranyore orogongo rwabo amo nainwe agwo ase ense ya Kanani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Abagadi na Abareuben bakairaneria, bagateba, “Buna Omonene atochikire intwe abasomba bao, nabo torakore." 
Numbers32:32 Intwe ntobogorie ebirwanero biaito bi’esegi, na twamboke gochia ase ense ya Kanani ase obosio bw’Omonene, erio nario toratware ense eye ere aa moocha ya Yorodan ebe eyaito.”" 
Numbers32:33 Ase ayio Musa akaa abanto b’egesaku kia Gadi, na ab’ekia Reuben, amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, mosinto o Yusufu, orogongo rwa Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, na orw’Ogi, omoruoti o Basani. Amo nechio akabaa emechie y’ense eria amo ne chinse chiaetanaineo." 
Numbers32:34 Abagadi bakaagacha emechie ya Diboni, na Ataroti, na Aroeri," 
Numbers32:35 na Ataroti‐Shofani, na Yaeseri, ne Yogibea," 
Numbers32:36 na Beti‐Nimura, na Beti‐Harani, emechie yagiteire chindwaki, naende yabwate ameri e ching’ondi." 
Numbers32:37 Abareuben bakaagacha emechie ya Hesiboni, na Eleale, na Kiriataimu," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, na Baali‐Meoni (amarieta abo akaonchorwa), na Sibuma. Boigo bakaroka emechie eyio baagachete ase amarieta ande amayia." 
Numbers32:39 Abanto ba Makiri, mosinto o Manase, bakagenda bakaumokera ense ya Gileadi, bagaseria Abaamori bamenyeteo, erio bakaira ense eria." 
Numbers32:40 Musa akaa abanto ba Makiri, mosinto o Manase, ense ya Gileadi, na barabwo bakamenyao." 
Numbers32:41 Yairi, mosinto o Manase, akagenda, akaumokera na koira emechie emeke y’ense ya Gileadi, akayeroka Emechie ya Yairi." 
Numbers32:42 Na Noba nere akagenda akaumokera na koira Kenati amo nebichie biaetanaineo, nere akaroka Kenati Noba, erieta riaye omonyene." 
Numbers33:1 Aya naro amarieta ’ebitwori bi’Abaisraeli, ekero baare ase orogendo korwa ase ense ya Misiri, baare ase emeganda yabo inse y’oboraai bwa Musa na Haroni." 
Numbers33:2 Buna Omonene achigete Musa, nere akarika kera aase ase baare gotoora. Ebi nabio ebitwori biabo buna baare gotoora na koimoka kogenda:" 
Numbers33:3 Ase omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, rituko ria ikomi na gatano, rituko riarenge kobwatia eri’Epasaka, Abaisraeli bakang’anya korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Bakaimoka korwa Ramesesi, bare noboremu. Bakarua ase amasio ’Abamisiri," 
Numbers33:4 ekero barabwo barenge gotindeka abana babo abatangi, baria Omonene aitete, naende akanachera chinyasae chiabo ekina." 
Numbers33:5 Abaisraeli bakarua Ramesesi, bakagenda Sukoti, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:6 Bakarua Sukoti, bakagenda Etamu, ase ensinyo y’erooro, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:7 Bakarua Etamu, bakaonchoka bakairana bagaika Pi‐Hahiroti, moocha ya Baali‐Sefoni, bagatoora ang’e na Migidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Bakarua agwo Pi‐Hahiroti, bakagenda bagaeta egati y’Enyancha Embariri gochia erooro. Erio bakagenda orogendo rw’amatuko atato ase erooro y’Etamu, bagatoora agwo Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Bakarua Mara, bakagenda bagaika Elimu, aase chinsoko chi’amache ikomi na ibere chiarenge amo nemekendo emerongo etano na ebere, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:10 Bakarua Elimu, bakagenda bagaika ang’e n’Enyancha Embariri, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:11 Bakarua aase aria bagaika erooro ya Sini, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:12 Bakarua erooro ya Sini, bakagenda bagaika Dofuka, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:13 Bakarua Dofuka, bakagenda bagaika Alusi, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:14 Bakarua Alusi, bakagenda bagaika Refidimu, aase abanto batanyorete amache bakonywa, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:15 Bakarua Refidimu, bakagenda bagaika erooro ya Sinai, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:16 Bakarua erooro ya Sinai, bakagenda bagaika Kibiroti‐Hatawa, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:17 Bakarua Kibiroti‐Hatawa, bakagenda bagaika Haseroti, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:18 Bakarua Haseroti, bakagenda bagaika Ritima, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:19 Bakarua Ritima, bakagenda bagaika Rimoni‐Peresi, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:20 Bakarua Rimoni‐Peresi, bakagenda bagaika Libuna, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:21 Bakarua Libuna, bakagenda bagaika Risa, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:22 Bakarua Risa, bakagenda bagaika Kehelata, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:23 Bakarua Kehelata, bakagenda bagaika egetunwa gia Seferi, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:24 Bakarua egetunwa gia Seferi, bakagenda bagaika Harada, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:25 Bakarua Harada, bakagenda bagaika Makeloti, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:26 Bakarua Makeloti bakagenda bagaika Tahati, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:27 Bakarua Tahati, bakagenda bagaika Tera, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:28 Bakarua Tera, bakagenda bagaika Mitika, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:29 Bakarua Mitika, bakagenda bagaika Hasimona, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:30 Bakarua Hasimona, bakagenda bagaika Moseroti, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:31 Bakarua Moseroti, bakagenda bagaika Bene‐Yakani, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:32 Bakarua Bene‐Yakani, bakagenda bagaika Hori‐Hagidigadi, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:33 Bakarua Hori‐Hagidigadi, bakagenda bagaika Yotibata, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:34 Bakarua Yotibata, bakagenda bagaika Aburona, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:35 Bakarua Aburona, bakagenda bagaika Esioni‐Geberi, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:36 Bakarua Esioni‐Geberi, bakagenda bagaika erooro ya Sini (nao Kadeshi), bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:37 Bakarua Kadeshi, bakagenda bagaika egetunwa kia Hori, ang’e norobebe rw’ense ya Edomu, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:38 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatano, omwaka bw’emerongo ene nyuma Abaisraeli kobarure ense ya Misiri, Haroni omokuani agatiira gochia igoro ase egetunwa kia Hori, buna Omonene konya amochikire, agakwera aroro." 
Numbers33:39 Haroni konya okoorire emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na etato (123), ekero akwerete agwo ase egetunwa keria Hori." 
Numbers33:40 Na omoruoti orenge kogamba Aradi, ensemo ya irianyi ase ense ya Kanani, akaigwa ng’a Abaisraeli nigo bare inchera gocha." 
Numbers33:41 Abaisraeli bakarua egetunwa keria kia Hori, bakagenda bagaika Salimona bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:42 Bakarua Salimona, bakagenda bagaika Punoni, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:43 Bakarua Punoni, bakagenda bagaika Oboti, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:44 Bakarua Oboti, bakagenda bagaika Iye‐Abarimu, bagatoora aroro ase orobebe rwa Moabu." 
Numbers33:45 Bakarua agwo Iyumu, bakagenda bagaika Didoni‐Gadi, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:46 Bakarua Diboni‐Gadi, bakagenda bagaika Alimoni‐Dibulataimu, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:47 Bakarua Alimoni‐Dibulataimu, bagaika ebitunwa bi’Abarimu kororia Nebo bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:48 Bakarua ebitunwa bi’Abarimu, bakagenda bagaika ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, ang’e na Yorodan, kororia Yeriko, bagatoora aroro." 
Numbers33:49 Bagatoora ang’e na Yorodan, na egetwori kiabo kegachakera Beti‐Yesimoti, kegaikeera Abeli‐Sitimu, ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu." 
Numbers33:50 Agwo ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, ang’e na Yorodan, kororia Yeriko, Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers33:51 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Ekero morabe mwambokire Yorodan na mwaikire ase ense ya Kanani," 
Numbers33:52 moserie abanto ababiare bonsi b’ense eria barue ase amasio aino. Naende mosarie emegwekano yabo eyio bagosasima eroisirie korwa ase ebioma binyititoire na kobombwa, motagore aase aimokererete igoro ase bagosasimera." 
Numbers33:53 Moire ense yabo ebe eyaino momenyeo, ekiagera nabayeire." 
Numbers33:54 Mwatanane ense eria ase kera egesaku ase ogoaka obomera. Moe abanto b’egesaku ekenene orogongo oronene robe omwando obo, na abanto b’egesaku egeke orogongo oroke robe orwabo. Obomera koboragwere omonto, omwando oria nobe oyo bw’omonto oyio. Kera egesaku keegwe omwando buna obomera borakegwere. Inamoegwe emiando koreng’ana nebisaku bie chisokoro chiaino." 
Numbers33:55 Korende onye timogoseria ababiare b’ense eria barue asemore, rirorio baria moratige bamenye amo nainwe nababe buna chimbambo chinyoge chikobabeta amaiso aino, na buna amagwa akobabeta ase amakere aino; barabwo nababachande ase ense eyio mogochia komenya." 
Numbers33:56 Motabasereti, rirorio nimbakore inwe buna konya narengereirie gokora barabwo.”" 
Numbers34:1 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers34:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obachike: Ekero moraike ase ense ya Kanani, eyio nero ense erabe omwando oino, chimbebe chiaye nigo chirabe iga:" 
Numbers34:3 Ensemo ya irianyi, ense yaino eike ase erooro ya Sini, egenderere gochia ase orobebe rwa Edomu. Orobebe rwaino rwa irianyi rochakere ensemo ya moocha ase ensinyo y’Enyancha y’Omonyo," 
Numbers34:4 naende roonchoke gochia irianyi y’Egetunwa ki’Ebiuge roetere Sini, irianyi ya Kadeshi‐Barinea. Korwa agwo rogenderere roike Hasari‐Adari, naende roete roike Asimoni," 
Numbers34:5 na korwa agwo Asimoni rogenderere kobwatia orooche rw’orobebe rwa Misiri, roike Enyancha Enene." 
Numbers34:6 “Enyancha Enene nero erabe orobebe rwaino rwa bosongo. 
Numbers34:7 “Orobebe rwaino rwa sugusu ndochakere korwa ase Enyancha Enene, rogenderere gochia ase egetunwa kia Hori." 
Numbers34:8 Korwa aroro rogenderere roike enchera ekogenda Hamati, erio naende rogenderere goikera Sedadi," 
Numbers34:9 naende rogenderere gochia Sifuroni, na korwa aroro roike Hasari‐Enani. Oro narwo orobebe rwaino rwa sugusu." 
Numbers34:10 “Orobebe rwaino rwa moocha rochakere korwa Hasari‐Enani, roikere Sefamu," 
Numbers34:11 naende rotirimboke gochia Ribula, moocha y’Aini, rotirimboke gochia moocha y’engegu y’enyancha ya Kinereti." 
Numbers34:12 Erio rotirimboke robwatie orooche rwa Yorodan rotwomere Enyancha y’Omonyo. Eye nero erabe ense yaino, ne chimbebe chiaye chietanaineo.”" 
Numbers34:13 Musa agachika Abaisraeli, akabatebia, “Eyio nero ense morarie ebe omwando oino ase ogoaka obomera, ense eria Omonene achikire ng’a ebe ey’ebisaku kianda na ekeng’ese." 
Numbers34:14 Abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben na ab’egesaku kia Gadi amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, barabwo konya banyorire omwando obo." 
Numbers34:15 Abanto b’ebisaku ebio bibere na ekeng’ese, barabwo konya banyorire omwando obo moocha ya Yorodan, kororia Yeriko.”" 
Numbers34:16 Omonene agakwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers34:17 “Abanto aba nabwo bagochia kogokonya gwatanana ense: Ritang’ani Eleazari omokuani, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni." 
Numbers34:18 Naende ochore omoraai oyomo korwa ase kera egesaku agokonye gwatanana ense eria.” 
Numbers34:19 Aba nabwo abanto bachoretwe: Korwa ase egesaku kia Yuda, Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune;" 
Numbers34:20 korwa ase egesaku gia Simeoni, Semueli, mosinto bw’Amihudi;" 
Numbers34:21 korwa ase egesaku kia Benjamin, Elidadi, mosinto o Kisiloni;" 
Numbers34:22 korwa ase egesaku kia Dani, Buki, mosinto o Yogili;" 
Numbers34:23 korwa ase basinto ba Yusufu; ase egesaku kia Manase, Hanieli, mosinto o Efodi;" 
Numbers34:24 korwa ase egesaku gi’Efraimu, Kemueli, mosinto o Sifutani;" 
Numbers34:25 korwa ase egesaku gia Sabuloni, Elisafani, mosinto o Parinaki;" 
Numbers34:26 korwa ase egesaku gia Isakaru, Palitieli, mosinto bw’Asani;" 
Numbers34:27 korwa ase egesaku gi’Aseri, Ahihudi, mosinto o Selomi;" 
Numbers34:28 korwa ase egesaku kia Nafutali, Pedaheli, mosinto bw’Amihudi." 
Numbers34:29 Abanto aba nabwo Omonene achigete baatanane ense ya Kanani ebe emiando y’Abaisraeli. 
Numbers35:1 Ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, ang’e na Yorodan, kororia Yeriko, Omonene agkwana na Musa, akamotebia," 
Numbers35:2 “Chika Abaisraeli ng’a korwa ase emiando eyio baranyore baatananere Abalawi emechie baramenye, amo noborisia boetanaineo." 
Numbers35:3 Emechie eyio ebe eyabo baramenye, na ebitii bi’oborisia bakorisia chiombe chiabo ne ching’iti chiabo chinde chionsi." 
Numbers35:4 Ebitii bi’oborisia morae Abalawi bichakere korwa ase chindwaki chi’omochie, bigareigwe gochia ase oboare bw’amaboko elifu eyemo korwa ase kera ensemo y’omochie." 
Numbers35:5 Naende mobare isiko y’omochie, ensemo ya moocha ekerengo ki’amaboko chilifu ibere, na ensemo ya irianyi, na eya sugusu, na eya bosongo boigo, amaboko chilifu ibere; omochie obe gati‐gati. Ebitii ebi bi’oborisia Abalawi baegwe amo nemechie yabo." 
Numbers35:6 Moe Abalawi emechie etano nomo ey’obotamero, erinde ekero omonto aitire omonto onde mosiabano, anyare gotamerao, naende mobae emechie ende emeao emerongo ene na ebere." 
Numbers35:7 Emechie yonsi morabae nigo erabe emerongo ene, na etano na etato, amo nebitii bi’oborisia bietanaine emechie eyio." 
Numbers35:8 Emechie eyio morae Abalawi nigo morayerusie korwa ase eria Abaisraeli babwate. Morusie emechie emenge korwa ase egesaku keria kere ekenene kebwate emechie emenge, na korwa ase egesaku kere egeke kebwate emechie emeke morusie emekeo, koreng’ana nomobaro obo.”" 
Numbers35:9 Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Numbers35:10 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie: Ekero moramboke gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan na goika ense ya Kanani," 
Numbers35:11 mochore emechie erabe obotamero asemore, erinde omonto onde bwensi, onye oitire omonto onde mosiabano, natamere oyomo bw’emechie eyio." 
Numbers35:12 Emechie eyio nebe obotamero bwaino, erinde omonto oria okorigia korusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo oria oitwa, omoiti oria aratamere gochiao, abeereo goika rituko arache korentwa kogambigwa ase obosio bw’omosangererekano bwonsi." 
Numbers35:13 Emechie eyio morachore ebe ey’obotamero nigo erabe etano nomo. 
Numbers35:14 Etato ebe moocha ya Yorodan, na etato ebe ase ense ya Kanani. Eyio ebe emechie y’obotamero." 
Numbers35:15 Emechie eyio etano nomo ebe ey’obotamero ase Abaisraeli, na ase abageni bagoeta, na ase abanto bare abamenyi ase egati yabo, erinde monto onde bwensi oraite omonto mosiabano atancheti atamere oyomo bw’emechie eyio." 
Numbers35:16 “Korende onye omonto oakire omonto onde negento buna ekioma, na omonto oria okure, omoiti oyio nere goika aitwe akwe." 
Numbers35:17 Boigo onye omonto obwate rigena ase okoboko kwaye oakire omonto onde, na omonto oria okure, omoiti oyio nere goika aitwe akwe, ekiagera ere nomoiti omoenenu." 
Numbers35:18 Gose onye omonto oakire omonto onde nomote abwate ase okoboko kwaye, erinde omonto oria akwe, omoiti oyio nigo aita oria moeneno, nere goika aitwe akwe." 
Numbers35:19 Omonto oria okorigia korusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo oitetwe, nere oraite omoiti oria aande onsi ase araumerane nere." 
Numbers35:20 “Onye omonto ogechete oyonde na komoita ase okomotwoma, gose komoruta egento moeneno, na komoita," 
Numbers35:21 gose ase engencho y’obobisa bwarengeo agaaka oyonde nokoboko kwaye na komoita, rirorio omonto oria oaka oyonde na komoita, nere goika aitwe akwe. Ere nomoiti. Omonto oria okogania korusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo, nere oramoite aande onsi ase araumerane nere." 
Numbers35:22 “Eise koba ng’a omonto igo atwomete oyonde atamogechete agwo ritang’ani, gose igo amorutete egento mosiabano," 
Numbers35:23 gose omonto oria nigo arutete rigena, tamoroche, korende akamoaka akamoita atamogechete, gose taganetie komokorera bobe." 
Numbers35:24 Onye ekoba bo, omosangererekano bw’abanto noro oragambe ekina ase egati y’omonto oria oita omonto onde mosiabano na oria oganetie korusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo oitetwe, na onache ekina koreng’ana nemeroberio echikire." 
Numbers35:25 Omosangererekano bw’abanto notoorie omoiti oria korwa ase oria oganetie korusia egesiomba. Bamotige airane abeere ase omochie oria bw’obotamero atamerete, amenye aroro goika omokuani omonene bw’engaki eyio, oyoakire amagutwa, akwe." 
Numbers35:26 Korende onye omoiti oria o mosiabano ase engaki ende yonsi ogosoka korwa ase omochie bw’obotamero, agwo ase atamerete," 
Numbers35:27 na omonto oria okorusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo amonyore ore isiko y’omochie oria karamoite, rirorio takobarerwa okomocha ase okomoita." 
Numbers35:28 Omonto oria oitete oyonde moeneno goika agenderere kobeera ase omochie oria bw’obotamero goika omokuani bw’engaki eyio akwe. Korende omokuani oria omonene gakure, omonto oria nairane gochia ase ense yaye, na ase omwando oye." 
Numbers35:29 Okwo nogochika kwa boronge korabe asemore ebiaare ase ebiaare, aase aande onsi ase morabe momenyete." 
Numbers35:30 “Omonto onde bwensi karaite omonto onde moeneno, omonto oyio nere goika aitwe akwe ase oborori bw’abanto babere gose goetania, korende omonto tagoitwa ase oborori bw’omonto oyomo bweka." 
Numbers35:31 Omonto oitire omonto onde moeneno takoegerwa aruerwe embooria. Omoiti oria onyorekanire nokomocha kw’ogoita, nere goika aitwe akwe." 
Numbers35:32 Boigo omonto oria omoiti o mosiabano otamire gochia ase oyomo bw’emechie y’obotamero takoboorigwa ng’a erio airane ase ense yaye ekero omokuani bw’engaki eyio atarakwa. 
Numbers35:33 Moise gokora ayio, nigo morasarie ense eye ase momenyete na koyekora ebe eyetachenegeti, ekiagera amanyinga agoiterwa nigo arakore ense ebe etachenegeti, na okobwatanigwa konde tikori korakorwe ase ense eria ase engencho y’amanyinga aiteirwe, otatiga ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ay’oria omoiti oka." 
Numbers35:34 Timokora ense eyio ase momenyete ebe etachenegeti, ekiagera inche nigo imenyete ase egati yaino. Inche ninche Omonene imenyete ase egati y’abanto baane Abaisraeli.”" 
Numbers36:1 Abateneneri be chinyomba chie chiamate chi’egesaku kia Gileadi, mosinto o Makiri, o Manase, o Yusufu, bakagenda gokwana na Musa amo nabaraai bande be chiamate amo nabaraai bande be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli." 
Numbers36:2 Barabwo bakabora, “Omonene nigo agochigete aye omonene oito ng’a bwatanane ense ase Abaisraeli ebe omwando obo, ase ogoaka omobera. Naende Omonene akagochika ng’a omwando o Selofehadi ominto oegwe abaiseke baye." 
Numbers36:3 Korende kobaranyuomwe nabamura b’ebisaku binde b’Abaisraeli, rirorio omwando obo orusigwe korwa ase omwando oito, erinde abanto abwo bayoire. Ase enchera eyio omwando oito nokee." 
Numbers36:4 Ekero omwaka bw’Omochengo oraike ase Abaisraeli omwando obo nigo orarusigwe korwa ase omwando bw’egesaku keria keranyuome abaiseke abwo. Obwando obo nigo orarusigwe korwa ase omwando bw’egesaku giaito.” 
Numbers36:5 Ase igo Musa agachika Abaisraeli koreng’ana ne ring’ana ri’Omonene, agateba, “Abanto b’egesaku kia Yusufu nigo bagokwana amang’ana ay’ekeene." 
Numbers36:6 Amang’ana aya naro Omonene achikire igoro y’abaiseke ba Selefehadi: Tiga banyuomwe nabanto baria banchete, korende goika babe abanto be chiamate chi’egesaku kiabo." 
Numbers36:7 Omwando bw’egesaku ekemo ki’Abaisraeli tokonyara koonchorwa koirwa ase egesaku kende. Kera omonto ore bw’Abaisreali nigo arabe nomwando bw’egesaku kiaye. 
Numbers36:8 Kera omoiseke obwate omwando ase egesaku kende gionsi ki’Abaisraeli anyuomwe nomonto ore bw’eamate y’egesaku ki’omoiseke oria, erio nario kera omonto ore bw’eamate y’egesaku kiaye." 
Numbers36:9 Omwando onde tokonyara koonchorwa korwa ase egesaku ekemo na koirwa ase ekende. Kera omonto ore ase ebisaku bi’Abaisreali nig arabe nomwando ore ase egesaku kiaye.” 
Numbers36:10 Abaiseke be Selefehadi bagakora buna Omonene konya achikire Musa. 
Numbers36:11 Ase ayio Mala, na Tirisa, na Hogila, na Milka, na Noa, abaiseke ba Selofehadi, bakanyuomwa nabamura b’abaise moke." 
Numbers36:12 Barabwo bagasoka ase chiamate chi’egesaku kia Manase, mosinto o Yusufu. Omwando obo ogitigara ore ase egesaku ki’eamate yabo." 
Numbers36:13 Ayio naro amachiko na emeroberio Omonene achigete Abaisraeli goetera ase Musa, agwo ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, ang’e na Yorodan, Kororia Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Amang’ana aya naro Musa akwanete n’Abaisraeli bonsi ekero barenge ase erooro, moocha y’orooche rwa Yorodan. Nigo barenge ase Ekerubo Ekiomo kororia Sufu, gati gati y’omochie o Parani ase ensemo eyemo, na emechie ya Tofeli na Labani, na Haseroti, na Disahabu ase ensemo ende. (" 
Deuteronomy1:2 Orogendo korwa Horebu goetera ase ense y’ebitunwa bia Seiri goika Kadeshi‐Barinea nigo rwarenge orw’amatuko ikomi na rimo.) 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o ikomi nomo, omwaka bw’emerongo ene, Musa agatebia Abaisraeli amang’ana onsi ayio Omonene konya amochikire abatebie." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Amang’ana aya nigo abete ekero Omonene konya abuire Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, oyomenyete Hesiboni, amo na Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, oyomenyete Asitaroti ang’e na Edirei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Ekero abanto barenge ase ense ya Moabu, moocha ya Yorodan, Musa agachaka gotebereria abanto amachiko aya, ogoteba." 
Deuteronomy1:6 Ekero twarenge ase egetunwa kia Horebu, Omonene, Nyasae oito, agakwana naintwe, agatotebia, “Mwabeire mokobeera aiga ase egetunwa eke engaki entambe eisaine." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Bono imoka mochake orogendo rwaino. Moonchoke mogende gochia ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Abaamori, na ase abanto be chinse chietanaineo. Abwo bamenyete ase Ekerubo Ekiomo, na ase ense y’ebitunwa, na ase ense omweya, na ase ense ya Negebu, na ase ense ere ang’e n’Enyancha Enene. Mogende ase ense y’Abakanani gochia ase egetunwa kia Lebanoni, na goikera ase orooche roria oronene rw’Eufarati." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Rigereria, inche Omonene nabaeire ense eyio. Genda moyeire; eyio inche Omonene nariete eira na gotiana ng’a ninyee Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo, chisokoro chiaino, amo nabanto b’ororeria rwabo.”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Musa agakwana, “Ase engaki eria nigo nabatebetie ng’a inche bweka tinkonyara kobaraa." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Omonene Nyasae oino, obamentekanirie mono, na bono inwe nigo more abange mono buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Tiga Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, abamentekanie ara elifu, mobe abange goetania buna more bono, naende abasesenie buna abarierete eira." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Korende naki ndakore inyare inche bweka kobogoria egurube enene y’emechando yaino na kobagayana? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Chora korwa ase kera egesaku kiaino abanto abang’aini, abare abamanyi, abanto bamanyekanete buya, na inche nimbabeke babe abatang’ani baino." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Inwe nigo mwanchete ayio, mokairaneria: Amang’ana ayio gwatotebirie namaya, natokore boigo." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ase ayio nkabeka abanto baria bachoretwe korwa ase kera egesaku kiaino, abanto abang’aini, abamanyekanete buya, abaranyare gokora emeremo buya, babe abaraai baino: abande ase chilifu, na abande ase amagana, na abande ase emerongo etano, na abande ase ikomi. Naboigo nkababeka bakaba abateneneri b’ebisaku biaino bionsi.”" 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Ase engaki eria ngachika abagambi baino, nkabatebia: Motegerera ebina bire ase egati y’Abaisraeli bamino. Monache ekina kia boronge, kerabe ase egati y’omonto na oyomwabo, gose ase egati yaye na omomenyi omenyete bwoye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Timoba nogwanchereria komokonacha ebina; mokore boronge, abe omonto omoke gose omonene. Timoiroka omonto onde bwensi, ekiagera ekina nekia Nyasae. Ekina kende gionsi kere egekong’u asemore, mokendetere, na inche ningetegerere." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Naboigo ase engaki eria nabachigete igoro y’amang’ana onsi mogwenerete gokora.” 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Intwe togakora buna Omonene, Nyasae oito, atochigete; tokarua Horebu, tokagenda, togaeta ase egati y’erooro enene ekwoboyia mono, eria mwaroche ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Abaamori; erio togaika Kadeshi‐Barinea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Nkabatebia: Bono mwaikire ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Abaamori, eyio Omonene, Nyasae oito, agochia gotoa." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Rigereria, Omonene, Nyasae oino, obaeire ense eria. Genda moyeire ebe eyaino, buna Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, abatebirie. Timoiroka, gose timokwa emioyo.”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Erio inwe mwensi mogacha asende, mogantebia: Totome abanto bagende koroota ense eria, erinde batorentere amang’ana buna ense eria ere, barore enchera togochia goetera, naende emechie eria togochia koira, buna ere.”" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Amang’ana ayio akarorekana asende ng’a namaya, na inche ngachora abanto ikomi na babere, oyomo korwa ase kera egesaku." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Abanto abwo bakagenda gochia ase ense eria y’ebitunwa, bagaika ase ense omweya y’Esikoli, bakaroota ense eria." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Bakanyora okwama gw’ense eria, bagakorenta asetore, naende bagatorentera amang’ana aya baroche agwo ase ense eria, bagakwana: Ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oito, agochia gotoa nengiya mono.”" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Korende timwanchete kogenda ase ense eria, mokaanga koigwera ogochika Omonene, Nyasae oino, abaete." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Mokemurungania ekero mwamenyete ase chiema chiaino, mogateba: Omonene nigo atogechete, nakio kiagerete agatorusia korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erinde atobeke ase amaboko ’Abaamori, nabarabwo batoite na gotosiria.”" 
Deuteronomy1:28 “Nase ki toragende aroro? Abaminto batwoboirie, ekiagera batebire ng’a abanto bare ase ense eria nabanene naende nabatambe gotobua. Emechie yabo nemenene, naende nigo egiteire chindwaki chiigete igoro. Naende ntwarora amamonto, abanto b’ororeria rw’Anaki.”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Erio nkabatebia: Timoiroka gose goichanigwa ase abanto baria. 
Deuteronomy1:30 Omonene, Nyasae oino, oria okobaraa, nere orabarwanere esegi buna mwaroche aya abakorerete ekero mwarenge Misiri," 
Deuteronomy1:31 naende ekero mwarenge ase erooro. Mwaroche buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abaraaete, na ase chinchera chionsi echio mwaetete goika mogaika aase aa: ere nigo ababogoretie buna omonto akobogoria omwana oye." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Korende nonya okorete ayio onsi, timwamwegenete Omonene, Nyasae oino," 
Deuteronomy1:33 oyorenge kobatang’ana botambe na kobarigeria aase mware gochia gotoora. Ase obotuko nigo arenge kobaraa nomorero, na ase omobaso obaraa ne riire, koborokia aase mware goetera.”" 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Omonene akaigwa amang’ana aino, akaba nendamwamu, agatiana na goteba:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 Ekeene, onde tari ase abanto b’ekegori eke ekebe oraike ase ense eria engiya narierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nimbayee," 
Deuteronomy1:36 otatiga Kalebu mosinto o Yefune. Ere narore ense eria na koyetacha namagoro aye. Nimoyee ere na ororeria rwaye, ekiagera ere obeire okonyigwera na gokora ogwancha kwane, inche Omonene." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Omonene nigo abete nendamwamu asende ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino, agateba: Nonya naye tokonyara gosoa ase ense eria." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Korende Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, omokonyi oo, nere orasoe aroro. Mobeke chinguru, omoremie, ekiagera nere oraraae Abaisraeli bagende koira ense eria ebe omwando obo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Naende Omonene agatotebia twensi: Abana baino abake abwo mwatebete ng’a nabooswe, abwo ase rituko ria rero bataramanya ayare amabe gose amaya, nabwo baraike ase ense eria, inche nimbayee ebe eyabo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Korende inwe onchoka, mogende gochia ase erooro, gochia ase enchera ekogenda ase omosomo bw’Enyancha Embariri." 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Erio mokang’iraneria mogantebia: Twakorire ebibe ase Omonene, korende bono nkogenda tore korwana esegi buna Omonene, Nyasae oito, atochigete. Kera omonto asemore akabogoria ebirwanero biaye bi’esegi, akarengereria ng’a namang’ana amagusu kogenda koira ense eria y’ebitunwa." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Omonene agantebia: Bakanie, obatebie ng’a tibabaisa kogenda korwana esegi, ekiagera inche Omonene tindi amo nabarabwo. Kobaragende nigo bagochia kobugwa nababisa babo." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Nkabatebia amang’ana ayio Omonene akwanete, korende mokaanga koigwera, mogasaria amang’ana Omonene abachigete, mokagenda nobomwenu ase ense eria y’ebitunwa." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Abaamori abamenyete ase ense eria bagacha kobarwania, bakabaseria buna chinchoke chigoseria abanto, bakababua agwo Seiri, bakabasiarera, bakababwatia gochia Horima." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Erio inwe mokairana, mokarera ase Omonene abakonye, korende Omonene taigwete okorera kwaino gose tabategererete." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Ekio gekagera mokabeera agwo Kadeshi ase amatuko amange.” 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Erio tokaonchoka, tokagenda gochia ase erooro goetera ase enchera egochia ase Enyancha Embariri, buna Omonene konya antebirie. Ase amatuko amange, tokaba tokonakoong’anya ase ense y’ebitunwa bia Seiri.”" 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Erio Omonene agakwana nainche, agantebia:" 
Deuteronomy2:3 Mwabeire mokonakoong’anya ase ense eye y’ebitunwa ase engaki entambe eisaine; bono onchoka mogende gochia ensemo ya Sugusu. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Naende agantebia: Bachike abanto, obatebie ng’a mbare ang’e goeta ase orogongo rw’abanto bamwabo, abanto b’ororeria rw’Esau, abwo bamenyete Seiri. Barabwo nigo barabairoke. Ase ayio mwerende mono," 
Deuteronomy2:5 timobaisa korwana nabarabwo, ekiagera tinkobaa inwe ense yabo nonya nensemo enke eisaine egesanyi gi’okogoro, ekiagera naeire abanto b’ororeria rw’Esau ense y’ebitunwa ya Seiri ebe eyabo." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Nigo morarue chibesa mogore endagera korwa asebare morie. Naboigo morue chibesa mogore amache korwa asebare monywe.” 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Inyora buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abasesenirie ase emeremo yaino yonsi mwabeire mogokora. Nigo abeire obarendete ase orogendo rwaino ase erooro eye enene ase emiaka eye emerongo ene. Omonene, Nyasae oino, obeire amo nainwe, na inwe timwaremeretwe gento kende.”" 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Erio tokaimoka, tokarua ase abaminto, abanto b’ororeria rw’Esau, abwo bamenyete Seiri, togatiga enchera y’Ekerubo Ekiomo, na Elati, na Esioni‐Geberi. Erio tokaonchoka, tokagenda gochia ase erooro ya Moabu.”" 
Deuteronomy2:9 “Omonene agantebia: Timobaisa gochegia abanto ba Moabu, gose korwana nabarabwo, ekiagera tinkobaa ensemo ende yonsi y’ense yabo ebe eyaino. Naeire abanto b’ororeria rwa Loti omochie o Ari obe oyobo.” (" 
Deuteronomy2:10 “Ase chingaki chia kare, Abaemi nabwo bamenyete agwo. Abanto abwo nigo barenge abanene, naende abange mono, na abatambe bareng’aine n’Abaanaki.)" 
Deuteronomy2:11 Na buna Abaanaki abwo nigo barenge korokwa Abarefai, korende Abamoabu nigo barenge kobaroka Abaemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Agwo kare Abahori boigo mbamenyete Seiri, korende abanto b’ororeria rw’Esau bakabaseria na kobaita, bakamenya ase ense eria ribaga riabo. Bagakora buna Abaisraeli bakorete ase ense eria Omonene abaete ebe eyabo.”" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Naende Omonene agatotebia: Bono imoka, mogende mwamboke gochia ng’umbu y’akarooche ga Seredi. Erio tokagenda, tokaamboka akarooche akwo." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Korwa engaki twarwete Kadeshi‐Barinea goika ekero twambogete akarooche ga Seredi nigo yarenge emiaka emerongo etato, na etano na etato. Abanto bonsi b’ekegori keria, abamanyete korwana esegi, bagakwa bakaera, buna Omonene konya atianire." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Okoboko kw’Omonene nigo kwabaagete, gokabarusia ase egetwori, goika bonsi bagasira kegima.”" 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Ekero abarwani bonsi b’esegi konya bakure," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Omonene agantebia: 
Deuteronomy2:18 Rero moetere orobebe rwa Moabu ase enchera ya Ari. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ekero moraike ang’e nense y’Abaamori, abanto b’ororeria rwa Loti, timobaisa kobachegia gose kobarwania esegi, ekiagera tinkobaa inwe nonya nensemo eyemo y’orogongo orwo nabaeire barabwo.” (" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Orogongo orwo nigo naende rwamanyekanete buna ense y’Abarefai. Abarefai nabwo bamenyeteo agwo kare, korende Abaamoni bakabaroka Abasamusumi." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Abanto aba nigo barenge abanene naende abatambe buna Abaanaki; boigo nigo barenge abange. Korende Omonene akabasiria, na Abaamoni bakaba bakomenya ase ense eria ribaga riabo." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Naboigo Omonene akorerete abanto b’ororeria rw’Esau, baria bamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa ya Seiri. Agaita Abahori, na Abaesau bakaba bakomenya ase ense eria ribaga riabo, nao bamenyete goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Abanto abarwete Kafitori, bagaita Abaavi abamenyete ase ebichie goikera Gasa, bakabakoora pi, bakaba bakomenya ase ense eria ribaga riabo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Naende Omonene agateba: Imoka, mochake orogendo rwaino, mwamboke orooche rw’Arinoni. Naama! Nabekire ase amaboko aino Sihoni Omoamori, omoruoti o Hesiboni, amo nense yaye. Ase igo, mochake komorwania esegi, moire ense yaye." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Rero ninchake kogosa abanto bonsi bare inse y’erioba, erinde babairoke na koboboa ekero bakoigwa chinkuma chiaino, na batengechigwe nomoondoko.”" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Erio ngatoma abanto korwa ase erooro ya Kedemoti, bakagenda ase Sihoni, omoruoti o Hesiboni, nkamotomera amang’ana ’omorembe, ngateba:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 Koranche onyanchere ng’etere ase ense yao. Nigo ndaete ase enchera enene yoka; tinkogobera aande, gochia borio gose bomosi." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Nong’oonerie endagera indie na amache inywe, nainche ninkoe chibesa. Aye ing’a ribaga ng’ete namagoro ase ense yao." 
Deuteronomy2:29 Buna abanto b’ororeria rw’Esau, abamenyete Seiri, na Abamoabu, abamenyete Ari, bankorerete, naye onkorere boigo, goika imbe nambokire orooche rwa Yorodan, na nasoire ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oito, agochia gotoa." 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Korende Sihoni, omoruoti o Hesiboni, akaanga, tatoa ribaga toete ase ense yaye. Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo akong’etie enkoro yaye ekaba ey’ogotaigwera, akamobeka ase amaboko aino, na inwe mokamobua na mokaira ense yaye, buna ere bono." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Omonene agantebia: Rora, nachakire kobeka Sihoni amo nense yaye ase amaboko aino. Ase ayio, chaka koira ense yaye ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Erio Sihoni amo nabanto baye bonsi bagacha gotorwania esegi, ekero twarenge ase omochie o Yahasi," 
Deuteronomy2:33 korende Omonene, Nyasae oito, akamobeka ase amaboko aito, ere amo nabamura baye, na abanto baye bonsi, na intwe tokababua." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ase engaki eria tokabwata emechie yaye yonsi, tokayesaria, togaita abasacha, na abakungu, na abana, titwatigaretie monto ore moyo, nonya noyomo." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Togoosa chitugo chiabo, na gosakora ebinto biarenge ase emechie eyio bikaba ebiaito." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Korwa Aroeri, omochie oria ore ase engegu y’orooche rw’Arinoni, goika Gileadi, amo nomochie ore ase rikura, omochie onde torenge ne chindwaki chinkong’u totanyarete gotagora. Omonene, Nyasae oito, nigo abegete emechie yonsi ase amaboko aito." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Korende titwaigete ang’e ase ense y’Abaamori, gose ase chingegu chi’orooche rwa Yaboki, na emechie y’ense y’ebitunwa, na aande onsi ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, atokanetie titogendao.”" 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Nyuma y’ayio tokaonchoka, togatiira gochia sugusu gochia ase orogongo rwa Basani. Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, amo nabanto baye bonsi, bagacha gotorwania esegi agwo ase omochie o Edirei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Korende Omonene agantebia: Tobaisa komoiroka, ekiagera ere amo nabanto baye bonsi nababekire ase amaboko ao, boigo nakoeire ense yaye. Nomokore buna gwakorete Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, oria orenge kogamba agwo Hesiboni." 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Ase ayio Omonene, Nyasae oito, akabeka Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, amo nabanto baye bonsi, ase amaboko aito. Togaita bonsi pi, nonya noyomo tatigara ore moyo." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Tokaira emechie yaye yonsi ase engaki eria. Titwatigete nonya nomochie oyomo totairete. Emechie yonsi twairete nigo yarenge emerongo etano nomo, tokaira orogongo rwonsi rw’Arigobu, ase Ogi, Omoruoti o Basani, arenge kogamba." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Emechie eyio yonsi nigo yagiteire chindwaki chintambe gochia igoro, na ebiita biarenge gosiekwa nemekorogoto; naboigo ebichie ebinge mbiarengeo bitagiteire chindwaki." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Togasaria emechie eyio yonsi, togaita abanto bonsi, abasacha na abakungu, na abana, buna twakorete ase emechie ya Sihoni, omoruoti o Hesiboni." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Tokaira chitugo chionsi na gosakora ebinto biarenge ase emechie eyio bikaba ebiaito. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Ase engaki eria tokaira ense y’abaruoti baria babere b’Abaamori, ense yarenge moocha y’orooche rwa Yorodan, gochakera orooche rw’Arinoni goikera egetunwa kia Herimoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Abanto ba Sidoni nigo bakoroka egetunwa kia Herimoni Sirioni, na Abaamori nigo bagokeroka Seniri.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Tokaira emechie yonsi yarenge ase ense eraire eimokererete igoro na Gileadi yonsi, na Basani yonsi, goikera Saleka na Edirei, emechie y’oboruoti bwa Ogi, oyorenge kogamba agwo Basani.”" 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, nere bweka otigarete ase Abarefai. Esanduku yaye y’ogotindekerwa eyaroiseirie ebioma, nao ere agwo Raba, omochie bw’Abaamori, goika rero iga. Obotambe bwaye nigo bware obw’amaboko kianda, na obogare bwaye amaboko aane.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Ekero twairete ense eria ekaba eyaito, nkaa abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, orogongo roria rogochakera ase omochie bw’Aroeri, rore ang’e norooche rw’Arinoni amo nekeng’ese gi’ense y’ebitunwa ya Gileadi, na emechie yarengeo." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Nkaa ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase ensemo eyatigarete ase ense ya Gileadi, amo na Basani yonsi, eyio yarenge obogambi bwa Ogi. Orwo narwo orogongo rwonsi rw’Arigobu.” (Basani yonsi nigo yarenge korokwa ense ya Refaimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairi, omonto bw’ororeria rwa Manase, akaira orogongo rwonsi rw’Arigobu, narwo Basani, goikera orogongo rw’Abagesuri na Abamaaka. Akaroka emechie yarengeo ase erieta riaye, Emechie ya Yairi, nabo ekorokwa goika rero iga.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Nkaa abanto b’eamate ya Makiri, orogongo rwa Gileadi," 
Deuteronomy3:16 na abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben na ab’egesaku kia Gadi nkabaa orogongo gochakera Gileadi goikera orooche rw’Arinoni. Egati‐gati y’orooche orwo ekaba orobebe rwabo rw’ensemo ya irianyi, na orooche rwa Yaboki rokaba orobebe rwabo sugusu, orwarenge orobebe rw’Abaamori." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Bakanyora Ekerubo Ekiomo goikera orooche rwa Yorodan. Orwo rokaba orobebe rwabo rwa bosongo, korwa ase enyancha ya Kinereti, ensemo ya sugusu, goika enyancha y’Ekerubo Ekiomo, nero Enyancha y’Omonyo, ensemo ya irianyi inse y’ebitirimboko bia Pisiga, ensemo ya moocha." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Ase engaki eria inche nkabachika, nkabatebia: Omonene, Nyasae oino, obaeire ense eye, ebe eyaino. Ase ayio abarwani baino bonsi, baria bare chituoni, baimokie ebirwanero biabo bi’esegi, bagende bamboke gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan, batang’anere Abaisraeli bamwabo." 
Deuteronomy3:19 “Korende abakungu baino na abana, barabwo batigare amo ne chitugo chiaino ase emechie eyio nabaeire. (Nimanyete ng’a nigo mobwate chitugo chinyinge.)" 
Deuteronomy3:20 Mokonye abanto bamino goika banyore ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabae ng’umbu ya Yorodan na abae obotoereru buna abaete inwe. Erio namoirane, kera omonto ase orogongo rwaye namoeire." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Ase ekero keria ngachika Yoshua, nkamotebia: Nkwaroche amang’ana onsi aya Omonene, Nyasae oino, akorerete abaruoti baria babere. Naboigo Omonene arakorere kera oboruoti ase orabe kogosoa." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Timobaisa kobairoka, ekiagera Omonene Nyasae oino, nere orabarwanere esegi." 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Ase engaki eria ngasaba Omonene, nkamotebia:" 
Deuteronomy3:24 Aye Omonene Nyasae, bono kwanyorokirie inche, omosomba oo, omochakano bwoka bw’obonene bwao, na okoboko kwao gwe chinguru. Enyasae ende teri, igoro gose ase ense, eranyare gokora emeremo emenene na eya chinguru buna eye ogokora aye." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nagosabire, koranche ong’e ribaga nyamboke gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan, indore ense eria engiya y’ebitunwa amo na Lebanoni." 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Korende Omonene akaba nendamwamu asende ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino, tanchete koigwa okoboria kwane, agantebia: Ayio aisanire. Tobaisa gokwana nainche gento kende igoro ye ring’ana erio." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Tiira gochia igoro ase egentunwa gia Pisiga, otenene ase egechuria kiaye, oimokie amaiso ao, origererie gochia ensemo ya bosongo, na sugusu, na irianyi, na moocha, origererie buya ense eria orarore, ekiagera tokonyara kwamboka ng’umbu ya Yorodan." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Tebereria Yoshua, omoremie na omobeke chinguru, ekiagera nere oraraae abanto aba, abaambokie ng’umbu, naende abaatananere ense eyio orarore." 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Ase ayio tokabeera ase rikura riarochie omochie o Beti‐Peori.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 Naende Musa agakwana, “Inwe Abaisraeli, bono igwera amachiko na emeroberio nkoborokereria, moyakore, erio nario morabe moyo, erinde mogende moire ense eria, Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, agochia kobaa." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Timomenta ring’ana rinde rionsi ase aria nabachikire, gose timorusia gento aroro. Mobwate amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ayio inche nabaeire." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Inwe abanyene mwaroche aya Omonene akorerete Baali‐Peori; abanto baria bonsi basasimete Baali‐Peori, akabasiria korwa ase egati yaino." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Korende inwe abamwabete abegenwa ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, kera oyomo oino moyo are goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Naama! Inche naborokereirie amachiko na emeroberio, buna Omonene, Nyasae one, anchigete, erinde inwe moyaigwere ase ense eria mokogenda koira ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Moyabwate na koyaigwera, ekiagera aro naro arorokererie abanto b’ebisaku binde ng’a more nobong’aini. Barabwo kobaraigwe amachiko aya onsi mbatebe: Ekeene, abanto b’egesaku eke ekenene nigo bare abang’aini, naende abamanyi!" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Inee! Mbanto ba gesaku ki ekenene babwate enyasae ere ang’e nabarabwo buna Omonene, Nyasae oito, are ang’e naintwe? Nigo agotoigwa kero kende gionsi tokomorangeria atokonye." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Naende mbanto ba gesaku ki ekenene babwate amachiko amaronge na emeroberio emeronge, buna amachiko aya onsi inche naborokereirie rero?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Mwerende! Morende chinkoro chiaino, erinde timobaisa kweba aya mwarorire namaiso aino, gose koyatiga arue ase chinkoro chiaino ase amatuko onsi more moyo. Boigo moyorokererie abana baino na abachokoro baino," 
Deuteronomy4:10 erinde bamanye ayakoregete ase rituko riria mwatenenete ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, agwo Horebu, ekero Omonene akwanete nainche, agantebia: Sangereria abanto bonsi amo, na inche mbatebie amang’ana, erinde beorokererie konyiroka ase amatuko onsi barabe bare moyo ase ense, nabarabwo baborokererie abana babo boigo." 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Inwe nigo mwachete ang’e, mogatenena ase egetunwa keria mbarabare, ekero kiagendererete gwoka omorero oria ochongororogete gochia igoro obwate erioki rimwamuti, na amare, na omosunte omonene." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Erio Omonene agakwana nainwe korwa ase omorero oria ime, mokaigwa amang’ana aye, korende timwaroche ekieni kiaye. Nigo mwaigwete eriogi rioka." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Omonene akaborokereria okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, akabachika mokobwate; okwo nakwo amachiko aye ikomi. Akayarika ase chibao ibere chi’amagena." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Aroro agwo Omonene aganchika ng’a imborokererie amachiko ayio, na emeroberio echikire, erinde monyare koyaigwera ase ense eria mokogenda koira." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Ekero Omonene akwanete nainwe korwa ase omorero ime agwo Horebu, timwaroche ekieni kiaye. Ase ayio moigwere na kwerenda," 
Deuteronomy4:16 timobaisa gokora ebibe na gwesaria ase okoroisia omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa, omogwekano onde bwensi ogwekaine omonto, omosacha gose omokungu," 
Deuteronomy4:17 gose omogwekano ogwekaine eng’iti ende yonsi ere ase ense, gose oyo bw’enyoni ebwate chimbaba ekoiruruka igoro," 
Deuteronomy4:18 gose oyo bw’eng’iti ekwagura ase riroba, gose oyo bw’enswe ende yonsi ere ime ase amache inse y’ense." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Ekero okorigereria gochia igoro, gokorora ebinto bitongire bireo buna erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni, omoganda oyio bwonsi, tobaisa gotiga Omonene, erinde osasime na gokorera ebinto ebio, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oo, obirure ase ebisaku bionsi bire inse y’erioba." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Korende inwe Omonene obarusirie ase eriko ri’ebioma rigosamba, nario Misiri, erinde mobe abanto baye ere omonyene buna more goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Kobua ayio Omonene nigo ambeete ase engencho yaino, agatiana ng’a inche tinkonyara kwamboka orooche rwa Yorodan, na kogenda ase ense eria engiya Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa, ebe omwando oino." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Inche goika nkwere aiga ase orogongo oro: ting’eiri ribaga kwamboka Yorodan, korende ninwe moramboke, erinde moire ense eria engiya." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Moigwere na kwerenda, timobaisa kweba okobwatana kw’ogotianania, okwo Omonene, Nyasae oino, akorete nainwe; timobaisa koroisia omogwekano onde bwensi mogosasima. Omonene, Nyasae oino, obakanirie ayio." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo are omorero ogosamba na gosiria; ere nere Nyasae bwe risemi." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Komogochia koibora abana na abachokoro, naende komenya amatuko amange ase ense eyio; timokora ebibe na gwesaria ase okoroisia omogwekano onde bwensi mogosasima gose gokora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino. Moise gokora ayio, rirorio nigo moramogechie abe nendamwamu asemore." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Onye timokoigwera, inche nkorangeria inde igoro na ense chibe birori asemore rero ng’a, goika mosire kegima ase obwango. Timokomenya amatuko amange ase ense eyio mogochia koira, ekero moramboke Yorodan." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Omonene nabasiarere ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku binde, nainwe abamoratigare nabake ase omobaro, namomenye ase egati y’abanto baria ase Omonene arabaire." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Agwo ase morasiarerwe gochia, namobe mogosasima chinyasae chiroisirie korwa ase emete na amagena, emeremo y’amaboko a mwanyabanto, echio chitari korora, gose koigwa, gose koragera, gose konyonka." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Korende aroro agwo, komorarigie Omonene, Nyasae oino, ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na emioyo yaino yonsi, inamomonyore." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ekero morabe nemechando, na ayio onsi arabanyore ase amatuko agochigocha, imomoiranere Omonene, Nyasae oino, naende moigwere eriogi riaye." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Omonene, Nyasae oino, takobatiga, ekiagera ere noyo bw’amabera. Takobasiria, gose takweba okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania akorete ne chisokoro chiaino." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Bono boria, momanye korwa ase amatuko a kare, amatuko ayio arengeo ekero konya motaraiborwa, korwa rituko riria Nyasae atongete mwanyabanto ase ense, naende moborie momanye korwa ase ensemo eyemo y’ense goikera ensemo ende, gose amang’ana agwekaine buna aya ana koba, gose koigugwa." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Inee! Abanto bande bana koigwa Nyasae ogokwana korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero buna inwe mwaigure, naende mogendererete koba moyo?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Gose enyasae ende kero kende gionsi yana korenta egesaku kende korwa ase egati y’ebisaku binde, erinde agekore kebe abanto baye omonyene, buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abakorererete inwe agwo Misiri? Ase amaiso aino nigo arentete amateemwa, na ebikone, na amakumia, na esegi, na ase okoboko kore ne chinguru koramboire akarenta okoondokia okonene." 
Deuteronomy4:35 Omonene nigo aborogetie ayio, erinde momanye ng’a Omonene nere Nyasae; onde tari otatiga ere bweka." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Akabakora mokaigwa eriogi riaye riarwete igoro, erinde anyare koborokereria; na ase ense akaborokia omorero omonene, nainwe mokaigwa amang’ana aye korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero oria." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Agancha chisokoro chiaino, na ase engencho eyio akabachora inwe, ororeria rwabo, mobe ribaga riabo, na ere omonyene akabang’anyia korwa Misiri ase okobua kwaye okonene." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Agaseria korwa bosio bwaino ebisaku biarenge ebinene, naende biarenge ne chinguru kobabua; akabarenta ase ense yabo, nainwe mokayeira ekaba omwando oino, naboigo ere nonya ngoika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Ase ayio manya rituko ria rero, morengererie mono ng’a, Omonene nere Nyasae o igoro na ense; naende onde tari otatiga ere bweka." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Inwe goika morende emeroberio yaye echikire na amachiko aye, ayio inche nkobaa rituko ria rero, erio nario erabe buya asemore, naboigo nase abana baino, naende amatuko aino nabe amange ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe eyaino kogenderera.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Erio Musa agachora emechie etato agwo moocha ya Yorodan. 
Deuteronomy4:42 Emechie eyio nero omoiti aranyare gotamera, oria oraite omonto onde mosiabano, gose atamogechete agwo ritang’ani. Omonto oria karatamere oyomo bw’emechie eyio nigo aratigwe abe moyo." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Beseri ase erooro, ase ense eraire eimokererete igoro, nigo orenge omochie bw’obotamero ase abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na Ramoti ase ense ya Gileadi ase abanto ba Gadi, na Golani ase ense ya Basani ase abanto ba Manase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Aya naro amachiko a Nyasae Musa aruete ase Abaisraeli. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Nyuma Abaisraeli kobarure Misiri, Musa akaa Abaisraeli oborori, na emeroberio echikire, na amachiko aya." 
Deuteronomy4:46 Aya igo abete agwo moocha ya Yorodan ase rikura riarenge ensemo ekororia Beti‐Peori, ase orogongo rwa Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, oyio omenyete agwo Hesiboni. Nere oria Musa na Abaisraeli babuete ekero barwete Misiri," 
Deuteronomy4:47 bakaira ense yaye ekaba eyabo, naende bakaira ense ya Ogi, omoruoti o Basani. (Abaruoti abwo babere nigo bamenyete moocha ya Yorodan.)" 
Deuteronomy4:48 Bakaira ense gochakera Aroeri ase orobebe rwe rigoko ri’Arinoni goikera egetunwa keria Sioni (nakio Herimoni). 
Deuteronomy4:49 Bakaira na Ekerubo Ekiomo moocha ya Yorodan goikera ase Enyancha y’Omonyo inse y’ebitirimboko bi’egetunwa gia Pisiga. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Musa akarangeria Abaisraeli bonsi gocha amo, akabatebia, “Inwe Abaisraeli, igwa amachiko na emeroberio echikire nkobatebia rituko ria rero, moyeorokererie, mobe nobomaene ng’a moyakore." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Omonene, Nyasae oito, nakorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania amo naintwe agwo Horebu." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Omonene takorete okobwatana okwo ne chisokoro chiaito, korende nigo akorete okobwatana okwo naintwe abanyene, intwe twensi abatore moyo rituko ria rero." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Agwo ase egetunwa Omonene nigo akwanete nainwe obosio ase obosio korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Ase engaki eria inche nabete nteneine ase egati y’Omonene nainwe, narenge gokwana nainwe ring’ana ri’Omonene, ekiagera inwe nigo mwarenge nobwoba ase engencho y’omorero oria, timwatiirete gocha ase egetunwa. “Omonene agakwana:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, ense y’obosomba." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “Toba ne chinyasae chinde otatiga inche. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “Tobaisa gwekorera omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa, omogwekano o getongwa kende gionsi kere igoro, gose ase ense, gose ime ase amache inse y’ense." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Tobaisa gosasima gose gokorera emegwekano, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oo, Nyasae bwe risemi. Ase engencho y’amabe ’abaibori nigo nkobaa abana egesusuro goika ekiaare kia gatato na egia kane, abwo bangechete." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Korende nigo nkoborokia obwanchani bwane botari koera goika ebiaare chilifu, ase abwo banyanchete na babwatete amachiko aane." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “Toriatora na korikorera bobe erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oo, ekiagera Omonene tagotiga komoa egesusuro oria okoriatora na korikorera bobe erieta riaye." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “Bwata rituko ri’Esabato, oriatanane ribe richenu, buna Omonene Nyasae oo, agochigete." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ase amatuko atano na rimo okore emeremo yao yonsi. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Korende rituko ria gatano na kabere, nerituko ri’Esabato riatananwe ase Nyasae oo. Ase rituko erio tokora emeremo ende yonsi, aye gose omwana oo, omomura gose omoiseke, nonya nomosomba oo, omomura gose omoiseke, gose eng’ombe yao, gose etigere yao, gose etugo yao ende yonsi egokora emeremo, gose omomenyi oyomenyete mwao. Omosomba oo, omomura gose omoiseke, nabarabwo batimoke buna aye ogotimoka." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Inyora ng’a aye omonyene nigo kwarenge omosomba ase ense ya Misiri, na Omonene, Nyasae oo, agakorusia korwa aroro nokoboko kore ne chinguru koramboire. Ase ayio Omonene, Nyasae oo, nigo agochigete orende rituko ri’Esabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “Sika iso na nyoko, buna Omonene, Nyasae oo, agochikire; nario oramenye amatuko amange, naende erabe buya asore ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oo, agochia gokoa." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “Toita. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “Totomana. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “Toiba. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “Tomotebera omogisangio oo oborimo. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “Tobaisa kogania omokungu bw’omogisangio oo. Tobaisa kogania enyomba y’omogisangio oo, nonya nomogondo oye, gose omosomba oye, omomura gose omoiseke, gose eng’ombe yaye, gose etigere yaye, gose gento kende gionsi abwate." 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Amang’ana aya naro Omonene akwanete ase omosangererekano oino bwonsi agwo ase egetunwa, ekero akwanete korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero, ne riire, na omosunte ekerima. Akayakwana neriogi rinene, na tamentete gento kende gionsi. Akayarika ase chibao ibere chi’amagena, erio agaching’a." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Ekero egetunwa keria kiagendererete gwoka omorero, mokaigwa eriogi korwa ase egati‐gati y’omosunte oria, nainwe mwensi, abamore abatang’ani na abagaaka ase ebisaku biaino, mogacha asende."
