Deuteronomy5:24 Mokabora: Naama, Omonene, Nyasae oito, otworokirie obonene bwaye na obonguru bwaye, naintwe twaigure eriogi riaye korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero. Rituko ria rero twarorire Nyasae ogokwana na mwanyabanto, na mwanyabanto oyio ogendererete koba moyo." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Bono nase ki togwenerete gokwa? Omorero oyo omonene nigo ogochia gotosamba na gotosiria, onye naende togochia koigwa eriogi ri’Omonene, Nyasae oito, goika tokwe." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Inee! Omonto nareo obeire okoigwa Nyasae ore moyo kagokwana korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero, buna intwe twamoigure, na omonto oyio ogendererete koba moyo?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Naende mogantebia: Aye genda ang’e, oigwe amang’ana onsi Omonene, Nyasae oito, agokwana. Erio oche ototebie onsi ayio Omonene, Nyasae oito, aragotebie, naintwe natoyaigwe na koyakora." 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Omonene nigo aigwete amang’ana aino ekero keria mware gokwana nainche, erio agantebia: Naigure amang’ana abanto abwo bakwanire naye. Ayio onsi bagotebirie, mbuya bakwanire." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Onye ndiria baare koba nomoyo oyio botambe, na kong’iroka na korenda amachiko aane onsi, nanga kera egento nigo kiare koba buya asebare, na ase ororeria rwabo, kare na kare." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Genda obatebie bairane ase chiema chiabo. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Korende aye tigara aa asende, na inche ngotebie amachiko onsi, na emeroberio echikire, na onsi aya nachikire, ayio ogochia koborokia, erio bayarende na koyakora ase ense eria ngochia kobaa, ebe eyabo." 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Ase ayio morende na gokora aya Omonene, Nyasae oino, abachikire. Timoyatiga na koonchoka gochia aande, ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Mobwatie chinchera chionsi Omonene, Nyasae oino, abachikire, erio nario morabe moyo, naende nario erabe buya asemore, na inwe momenye amatuko amange ase ense eria mogochia koira ebe eyaino.”" 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Aya naro amachiko, na emeroberio echikire, Omonene, Nyasae oino, anchigete imborokererie, erinde moyaigwere na koyakora ase ense eria mogochia koira ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Ase obogima bwaino bwonsi, inwe amo nabana baino, na abachokoro baino, goika moiroke Omonene, Nyasae oino, na kobwata emeroberio yaye yonsi yachikirwe, na amachiko aye onsi ayio inche nkobachika, erio nario amatuko aino arabe amange." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Ase ayio inwe Abaisraeli, tegerera moigwe, monyare koyarenda; erio nario erabe buya asemore, naende momentekane mono ase ense eria entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, buna Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, abarierete eira." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Inwe Abaisraeli, tegerera moigwe! Omonene, Nyasae oito, nere bweka Omonene." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Mwanche Omonene, Nyasae oo, nenkoro yao yonsi, na omoyo oo bwonsi, ne chinguru chiao chionsi." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Amang’ana aya nkobachika rituko ria rero timobaisa koyeba nonya ng’ake. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Moyorokererie abana baino mono, mobe mokona‐koyairanerera botambe; moyakwane ekero moikaransete ase chinyomba chiaino, na ekero more ase orogendo inchera, na ekero mogochia korara, na ekero mokoboka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Moyasiberanie ase amaboko aino, na moyabeke ase amasio aino igoro, abe amariko akobainyoria." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Moyarike ase emetobwa na emeriibo y’ebisieri bie chinyomba chiaino, na ase ebiita biaino." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabaire na kobaikia ase ense eria arierete chisokoro chiaino, Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo eira, ng’a nabae inwe ense eria ebwate emechie emenene naende emiya, eyio inwe motaagachete." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Chinyomba nigo chirabe chiichire nebinto ebiya, ebio inwe motabegeteo, ne chinsoko chi’amache echio motakunyete, na emegondo y’emesabibu na ey’emezeituni, eyio motasimegete." 
Deuteronomy6:12 Komoraikeo mwerende mono, timobaisa kweba Omonene oria obarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, ase mwarenge abasomba." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Momoiroke Omonene, Nyasae oino; momokorere ere bweka na motiane ase erieta riaye rioka." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Timobaisa gosasima chinyasae chinde chionsi chiria chi’abanto babaetanaine. 
Deuteronomy6:15 Omonene, Nyasae oino, oyomenyete ase egati yaino, nigo are Nyasae bwe risemi; mwerende, erinde endamwamu yaye tebaisa gwoka igoro asemore na kobasiria korwa ase ense." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Timobaisa goteema Omonene, Nyasae oino, buna mwamoteemete aaria Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mobe abegenwa ase okobwata amachiko Omonene, Nyasae oino, na oborori bwaye, na emeroberio echikire, eyio abaeire." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Mokore ayare amaronge na amaya ase obosio bw’Omonene, erio nario erabe buya asemore, monyare gosoa na koira ense eria engiya Omonene arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nabayee," 
Deuteronomy6:19 na kobaseria ababisa baino bonsi korwa asemore, buna Omonene atebete." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Ase chingaki chigochi‐gocha ekero abana baino barababorie: Ninki engencho y’oborori obo, na amachiko aya, na emeroberio eye, ebi Omonene, Nyasae oito, abachigete? Nase ki Omonene, Nyasae oito, abachigete amachiko aya na emeroberio eye?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Goika mobairanerie: Intwe nigo twarenge abasomba ba Farao ase ense ya Misiri, na Omonene agatorusiao nokoboko kwaye gwe chinguru." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Omonene nigo aorogetie ebikone na amakumia amanene, naende ay’okoondokia, aaria ase ense ya Misiri, ase Farao, na ase abanto bonsi b’enyomba yaye, naintwe tokayarora." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Omonene agatorusia ase ense eria, erio agatorenta aa, agatoa ense eye arierete chisokoro chiaito eira ng’a nabayee." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Erio agatochika ng’a toigwere amachiko aya onsi, na koiroka Omonene, Nyasae oito, erio nario erabe buya asetore botambe. Toise gokora bo ere natorende, buna atorendete goika rero iga, naintwe natogenderere koba moyo." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Onye tokorenda na koigwera amachiko aya onsi, ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna ere atochikire, nigo torabarerwe oboronge.”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabaikie ase ense eria, mogochia koira ebe eyaino, na aserie ebisaku ebinge birue ase amasio aino, ebisaku bitano na bibere bire ebinene, naende bire ne chinguru kobabua. Ebisaku ebio nabio ebi: Abahiti, na Abagirigasi, na Abaamori, na Abakanani, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Ekero Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabeke abanto abwo ase amaboko aino, nainwe mobabue, goika mobaite na kobasiria kegima, timobaisa gokora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabarabwo, gose kobarorera amabera." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Timobaisa konyuomerana nabarabwo; timorua abana baino abaiseke ase abamura babo, gose timonyuomeria abana abamura baino abaiseke babo," 
Deuteronomy7:4 ekiagera barabwo nigo baraonchore abana baino abamura batige gosasima Omonene, erio bakorere chinyasae ching’ao. Erio Omonene abaise koba nendamwamu asemore, abasirie ara rimo rioka." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Aya naro morabakorere: Motagore ebisasimero biabo, mobutore chisiiro chiabo bagosasima, monachane emete y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, na mosambe nomorero emegwekano yabo bagosasima," 
Deuteronomy7:6 ekiagera inwe nabanto mwatananetwe koba abachenu ase Omonene, Nyasae oino. Ere obachorire mobe abanto baye omonyene kobua abanto bande bonsi bare ase ense.”" 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Omonene tang’usetwe nainwe, gose tabachorete ekiagera mwarenge abange kobua abanto bande (inwe nigo mwarenge abake mono kobua abanto bonsi)," 
Deuteronomy7:8 korende ekiagera nigo abanchete, naende akagania goikerania eira eria arierete chisokoro chiaino. Ayio akagera Omonene akabang’anyia nokoboko kwaye kore ne chinguru, na kobabooria korwa ase ense y’obosomba korwa ase okoboko gwa Farao, omoruoti o Misiri." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Gaki manya ng’a Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere bweka Nyasae bw’ekeene, naende Nyasae bw’obwegenwa, oyokorenda okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, na koorokia obwanchani bwaye botari koera goika ebiaare chilifu ase baria bamwanchete na babwatete amachiko aye." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Korende ere nigo akobaakana obobe baria bamogechete, na kobasiria. Tari gotebana koa omonto oria omogechete egesusuro." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Bono morende na koigwera amachiko, na emeroberio echikire, mokore ayio onsi nabachikire ase rituko ria rero.”" 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Komoraigwere emeroberio eye echikire na koyerenda, na koyekora, rirorio Omonene, Nyasae oino, naikeranie na gokong’ia okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, okwo akorete nainwe, na kobaorokeria obwanchani bwaye botari koera, buna arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ase ogotiana." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Ere nabanche na kobasesenia, nabamentekanie. Boigo nasesenie oroiboro rwe chinda chiaino, na okwama kw’emegondo yaino, na endagera yaino, na edivai yaino, na amaguta aino ay’amazeituni; chiombe chiaino chimentekane, amo ne ching’ondi ne chimbori chiaino, ase ense eria arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nabayee." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Namosesenigwe kobua ebisaku binde bionsi. Ase egati yaino onde tari omosacha gose omokungu, orabe omogomba, gose etugo ende yaino tekogombaa." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Omonene narusie amarwaire onsi korwa asemore; nonya nobomo bw’amarwaire aria amabe arenge Misiri, aria ase mwamenyete, tagocha igoro asemore kobachanda, korende nigo arayarente ase abanto baria bonsi babagechete." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Abanto abwo bonsi Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabeke ase amaboko aino, mobasirie, timobarorera amabera. Timobaisa gokorera chinyasae chiabo, ekiagera ase ogokora igo, chirochio nachinyare kobatega.”" 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Moise goteba ase chinkoro chiaino ime: Ebisaku ebi nigo bire ebinene gotobua, naki toranyare kobiseria birueo?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Timobairoka, korende moinyore buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, akorete Farao na abanto bonsi ba Misiri." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Moinyore amaakwa amanene aria mwaroche, na ebikone, na amakumia, na buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abarusetieo nokoboko kwaye kore ne chinguru, koramboire. Naboigo arakore abanto bonsi baria moirogete." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Naende Omonene natome ebiaramba ase egati yabo bibarase, baria abatigari barebise korwa asemore, basire kegima." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Timoondoka ase engencho yabo, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo are egati yaino, ere nere Nyasae omonene, naende oyo bw’okoondokia." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Omonene, Nyasae oino, naserie ebisaku ebio ng’ora ng’ora, birue asemore. Timobaisa kobiseria biere kegima ase ekero ekemo gioka. Moise gokora bo, ching’iti chi’orosana nigo chiramentekane chibachande." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Korende Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabeke ababisa baino ase amaboko aino, erio abatantanie, nainwe goika mobasirie kegima." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Nabeke abaruoti babo ase amaboko aino, erio mobaite na kobasiria nonya namarieta abo tainyorwa ase ense. Omonto onde tari, nonya noyomo, oranyare korwana nainwe na kobabua; goika mobasirie kegima." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Emegwekano yabo bagosasima moyesambe nomorero. Timogania koira chifeta gose chitahabu chire ase emegwekano eyio. Moise gochigania nigo chirabe chikobatega. Ayio onsi nigo arabe okogechia ase Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Timobaisa korenta okogechia buna okwo ase chinyomba chiaino. Komorakore igo, nigo moraragererigwe. Mokogeche na kogochaya, ekiagera korokwo nigo koragereirie.”" 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Moigwere amachiko aya onsi nabaeire ase rituko ria rero, moyabwate, erio nario morabe moyo na komentekana, erinde mogende moire ense eria Omonene arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nabayee." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Moinyore buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abeire okobaraa ase orogendo rwaino rwonsi ase erooro, ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene yaetire, ase okobakora mobe abaitongo na kobateema ase okomanya ebirengerio biaino, arore gose moganetie korenda amachiko aye, gose yaya." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Akabakora mokaba abaitongo, akabatiga mokaba nenchara. Erio akabaa mana, endagera eyio gete inwe motamanyete, nonya ne chisokoro chiaino chitamanyete, erinde monyare komanya ng’a omonto takonyara koba moyo ase endagera yoka, korende nigo akoba moyo ase kera ring’ana rikorwa ase omonwa bw’Omonene." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Ase emiaka eye yonsi emerongo ene, chianga chiano tichiabagoterete, gose amagoro aino tabimbete." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Momanye ng’a, buna omonto akoa omwana oye egesusuro ase okomorongeyia, naboigo n’Omonene, Nyasae oino, akobaa egesusuro ase okobarongeyia." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Ase ayio mobwate amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase ogotaara ase chinchera chiaye na komoiroka." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nkobaira are ase ense engiya ebwate chindooche ne chinsoko, ne chintuboka chigosokia amache gochia ase amagoko na ase ebitunwa." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Ense eyio ere nengano na esairi, na emesabibu, na emeko, na emekomomanga, na emezeituni, boigo namooke." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Ase ense eyio inamorie endagera enyinge etari kobaerera; aroro timokoremerwa gento kende gionsi. Amagena areo nigo are nebioma, naende namoremere chitaai korwa ase ebitunwa biaye." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Namonyore endagera morie moisaneke. Erio motogie Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase engencho y’ense eyio engiya abaeire.”" 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Mwerende mono, timobaisa kweba Omonene, Nyasae oino. Timobaisa gotiga kobwata amachiko aye, na emeroberio yaye yonsi echikire, aya nkobaa ase rituko ria rero." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ekero morabe mwanyorire endagera ebaisaine na koigota, naende mwaagachire chinyomba chingiya na komenyao," 
Deuteronomy8:13 na ekero amaicho aino e chiombe na aye ching’ondi arabe amentekanire, ne chifeta, ne chitahabu chiaino boigo, na ebinto binde bionsi mobwate biramentekane," 
Deuteronomy8:14 timobaisa koenena na kweba Omonene, Nyasae oino, oyobarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, ense y’obosomba." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Akabaraa na kobaetia ase erooro enene eyarenge ey’okoondokia, eyarenge ne ching’iti chingenda inse chire nobosongo, na ebiuge boigo: ase erooro eria enyomo etabwate amache ere akababochorera amache korwa ase egetare keria egekong’u." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Agwo ase erooro akabaa mana mokaria, endagera chisokoro chiaino chitamanyete, anyare kobakora mobe abaitongo na kobateema, erinde ase omoerio oino abakorere amaya." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Mwerende, timobaisa gokwana ase chinkoro chiaino ime: Okobua gwaito ne chinguru chi’amaboko aito nachio chiatonyoreire obotenenku obo." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Moinyore ng’a Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere okobaa chinguru chi’okonyora obotenenku, ekiagera aganetie gokong’ia okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania okwo akorete ne chisokoro chiaino buna akorire goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Komoramwebe Omonene, Nyasae oino, na koonchoka gochia ase chinyasae ching’ao ase ogochikorera, na gochisasima, nabakureire ase rituko ria rero ng’a, ekeene, goika mosire kegima." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Buna ebisaku biria, Omonene arasirie korwa ase amasio aino, naboigo nainwe morasirigwe, ekiagera motaigwerete eriogi ri’Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Inwe Abaisraeli, tegerera moigwe! Ase rituko ria rero mwabeire ang’e kwamboka Yorodan kogenda koira ense y’ebisaku bire ebinene mono, naende bire ne chinguru kobabua. Emechie yabo nemenene, naende egiteire chindwaki chintambe gochia igoro." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Abanto bakareo nabanene, naende nabatambe, abanto b’ororeria rw’Anaki mwabeire mokoigwa chinkuma chiabo, bagokwanwa: Ning’o oranyare kobua Abaanaki?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Ase ayio manya bono ng’a Omonene, Nyasae oino, oyorabatang’ane inwe, nigo are buna omorero ogosamba. Ere nasirie abanto baria na kobabeka inse yaino, erio nario moranyare kobaseria na kobaita bwango ara rimo rioka, buna abarierete inwe eira." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Ekero Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabe oseririe abanto abwo korwa ase amasio aino, timobaisa gokwana ase chinkoro chiaino ime: Oboronge bwaito nabwo bwagera Omonene agatorenta toire ense eye. Taibo! Korende Omonene nigo araserie abanto abwo barue ase amasio aino, ase engencho y’obobe bwabo." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Inwe timori gochia koira ense eria yabo ekiagera more abanyene oboronge, gose ab’ekeene ase chinkoro chiaino. Taibo! Korende obobe bw’ebisaku ebio nabwo bwagerire Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabaserie korwa ase amasio aino, crinde anyare goikerania eira ariete na gotiana ase chisokoro chiaino, Ibrahimu, na Isaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Ase ayio mobe nobomaene ng’a Omonene, Nyasae oino, tari gochia kobaa ense eria engiya ekiagera more abanyene oboronge. Taibo! Inwe nigo more abanto abanyabigoti bikong’u." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Moinyore, timobaisa kweba buna mwagerete Omonene, Nyasae oino, akaba nendamwamu agwo ase erooro. Korwa ase rituko riria mwaruete ase ense ya Misiri, goika ekero mwaigete aase aiga, mwabeire motari koigwera Omonene." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Nonya nekero mwarenge agwo Horebu, mokagera Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene, ere akebeka ang’e kegima kobasiria." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ekero inche natiirete gochia ase egetunwa igoro koegwa chibao chiria chi’amagena chiarikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania koria Omonene akorete nainwe, nkagenderera kobeera ase egetunwa igoro ase amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko, tinare koria kende, gose konywa." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Omonene akang’a chibao chiria ibere chi’amagena Nyasae arigete nekiara kiaye. Nigo chiarikire amang’ana onsi Omonene konya akwanire nainwe agwo ase egetunwa korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero, ekero mwasangererekanete aroro." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ase omoerio bw’amatuko aria emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko, Omonene akang’a chibao chiria ibere chi’amagena echio chiarikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Erio Omonene agantebia: Imoka otirimboke bwango korwa aiga ase egetunwa, ekiagera abanto abwo kwang’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri bakorire ebibe. Baonchokire bwango, batigire enchera eria nabachigete kobwatia. Beroiseirie omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa onyititoire na kobombwa." 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Boigo Omonene agakwana nainche, agantebia: Narorire abanto aba ng’a nabanyabigoti bikong’u." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Tobaisa goteema gontanga, ntige imbasirie naende intinyie amarieta abo, nimbakore bebwe kegima, tibabaisa koinyorwa ase ense, erio ngokore aye obe egesaku ekenene, naende kere ne chinguru kobabua." 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Nkairana, ngatirimboka korwa ase egetunwa imbogoretie ase amaboko aane abere chibao chiria ibere chi’amagena chiarikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania. Egetunwa keria nigo kiarenge gwoka omorero." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Erio nkarora ng’a mwakorire ebibe ase Omonene, Nyasae oino: konya mweroiseirie omogwekano bw’emori onyititoire na kobombwa, na mwaonchokire bwango, mwatigire enchera eria Omonene abachigete mobwatie." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Nkabwata chibao chiria ibere chi’amagena ase amaboko aane, ngachiakera inse, ngachiatera agwo ase amasio aino." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Erio naende nkarara maumama ase obosio bw’Omonene buna agwo ritang’ani, ase engaki y’amatuko emeronge ene, omobaso na obotuko. Tinabete nkoria kende gose konywa, ase engencho y’ebibe bionsi inwe konya mwakorire, ase ogokora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, mokamogechia goika akaba nendamwamu." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Nigo nabete nobwoba obonene ase engencho y’endamwamu entindi Omonene abete nero asemore, ekiagera nigo agechetigwe mono, goika akaba ang’e kobaita. Korende nonya nase engaki eria Omonene akanyigwa." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Omonene nigo abete nendamwamu enene ase Haroni boigo, akaba ang’e komoita, korende ase engaki eria eria nkamosabera Haroni." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Nkabogoria egento keria ki’ebibe, emori eria konya mwaroisirie, nkayesamba nomorero, nkayesunyunta, nkayesia ekaba orotu. Ngatuguta orotu orwo ase akarooche ’karenge gotirimboka korwa ase egetunwa keria." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Boigo naende mwagerete Omonene akaba nendamwamu ekero mwarenge agwo Tabera, na Masa, na Kibiroti‐Hatawa." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Na ekero Omonene abatomete korwa Kadeshi‐Barinea akabatebia: Genda moire ense eria nabaeire, korende inwe mogasaria timwaigwera ogochika kw’Omonene, Nyasae oino; timwamwegenete gose koigwera eriogi riaye." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Ee, korwa nachagete kobamanya, mwabeire motari koigwera Omonene." 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Ase igo nkarara maumama ase obosio bw’Omonene ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko, ekiagera Omonene nigo atebete ng’a goika abasirie." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ngasaba Omonene,” ngakwana, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, tobaisa goita abanto bao aba bare omwando oo, aba gwatooretie ase okobua kwao okonene, aba kwarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri nokoboko kwao kore ne chinguru." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Inyora abasomba bao, Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo; tobaisa kobarera abanto aba ogotaigwera kwabo gose obonyaka bwabo, gose ebibe biabo." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Abamisiri nigo barabaise gokwana: Omonene nigo asinyetwe kobaira na kobaikia ase ense eria konya arire eira ng’a abayee, naende nigo abagechete, nakio kiagerete akabarusia aiga, erinde agachia kobaitera agwo ase erooro." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Aba nabanto bao, na omwando oo, aba kwang’anyetie ne chinguru chinene, na ase okoboko kwao koramboire." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Erio naende Omonene agakwana nainche, agantebia: Baacha chibao chi’amagena ibere chire buna chiria chie ritang’ani. Oroisie na Esanduku ye chibao chi’emete. Erio otiire gocha aa asende egetunwa igoro." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Inche nindike ase chibao echio amang’ana aria aria arenge ase chibao chiria chie ritang’ani gwatete, naye ochibeke ime y’Esanduku eria." 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Erio nkaroisia Esanduku ye chibao chi’omokonge, na nkabaacha chibao chi’amagena ibere chiagwekaine chiria chie ritang’ani; nkabogoria chibao chiria ibere ase okoboko kwane, ngatiira gochia ase egetunwa igoro." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Omonene akarika ase chibao chiria amang’ana aria aria arigete engaki eria entang’ani, amachiko ikomi aria konya akwanire nainwe agwo ase egetunwa, korwa ase egati‐gati y’omorero, ase rituko riria mwasangererekanete aroro. Erio Omonene akang’a chibao chiria," 
Deuteronomy10:5 nainche nkeonchora, ngatirimboka korwa ase egetunwa, nkabeka chibao chiria ime ase Esanduku eria konya naroisirie buna Omonene anchigete; nao chire goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Abaisraeli bakaimoka bakagenda orogendo rwabo korwa Beeroti‐Bene‐Yakani, bagaika Mosera. Haroni agakwera aroro na agatindekwao. Eleazari, omomura oye, akaba omokuani ribaga riaye." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Bakarua aroro, bakagenda bagaika Gudigoda, naende bakarua Gudigoda, bakagenda bagaika Yotibata, ense yabwate ebirooche ebinge." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ase engaki eria Omonene agaatanana abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi babe bakobogoria Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’Omonene, naende akabakora bakaba bagotenena ase obosio bw’Omonene komokorera, na gosesenia abanto ase erieta riaye. Naboigo bagokora goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ase engencho eyio Abalawi tibaetwe omwando bw’orogongo amo nabanto bamwabo. Omonene nere omwando obo, buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abatebetie.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Nkagenderera kobeera igoro ase egetunwa ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko, buna ekero keria kie ritang’ani, na Omonene akanyigwa ase engaki eyio boigo, agatiga tabasiria." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Erio agantebia: Imoka ochake orogendo, otang’ane abanto abwo, erinde bagende koira ense eria narierete chisokoro chiabo eira ng’a nimbayee." 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Inwe Abaisraeli, ngento ki Omonene, Nyasae oino, aganetie korwa asemore? Goika moiroke Omonene, Nyasae oino, momoigwere na kobwatia chinchera chiaye chionsi; momwanche na komokorera Omonene, Nyasae oino, ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na emioyo yaino yonsi." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Mobwate amachiko aye, na emeroberio yaye echikire, eyio nkobaa ase rituko ria rero, erinde ebe buya asemore." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Rigereria, igoro ney’Omonene, Nyasae oino, na igoro ya igoro mono neyaye boigo, na ense na ebinto bionsi bireo nebiaye." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Korende Omonene nigo ang’usegete ne chisokoro chiaino na gochiancha, na nyuma yabo akabachora inwe, ororeria rwabo, ase egati y’ebisaku binde. Naboigo more abaye goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Ase ayio, arokia chinkoro chiaino na motige koba abanyabigoti bikong’u." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere Nyasae oyobuete chinyasae, na Omonene bw’abanene, nere Nyasae bw’obonene, na bw’okobua, na bw’okoirokia; tari nogwanchereria, na tari gwancha riaaki." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Nigo akonacha ekina kia boronge ase chintakana, na ase ababoraka; ere nigo anchete omomenyi, amoa endagera ne chianga." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Ase ayio ancha abamenyi, ekiagera nainwe nabo mwarenge abamenyi ase ense ya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Moiroke Omonene, Nyasae oino, momokorere ere bweka. Momobwaterere mono, naende mobe mogotiana ase erieta riaye rioka." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ere nere ogotogia kwaino, nere Nyasae oino, okorire ebinto ebinene na amakumia asemore, ebio mwarorire." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Chisokoro chiaino chiria chiatirimbogete gochia Misiri nigo chiarenge abanto emerongo etano na ebere, na bono Omonene, Nyasae oino, obamentekanirie, mwabeire abange buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro." 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Ase igo bono mwanche Omonene, Nyasae oino, botambe mobwate aya achikire, na emeroberio yaye echikire, na amachiko aye onsi." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Ase rituko ria rero inyora buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, akobaa egesusuro ase okobarongeyia. (Tindi gokwana ase abana baino, baria bataramanya gose batararora amang’ana ayio.) Inyora obonene bwaye na okoboko kwaye kore ne chinguru koramboire," 
Deuteronomy11:3 na ebikone biaye, na ogokora kwaye okwo akorete agwo Misiri ase Farao omoruoti, na ase abanto b’ense yaye." 
Deuteronomy11:4 Inyora naende buna akorete ase abarwani b’esegi ba Misiri, ne chibarasi chiabo, ne chigari chiabo, na buna atigete amache ’Enyancha Embariri akabamera, ekero barenge kobabwatia inwe, na buna basirete tibana kororekana goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Momanyete buna Omonene abakorerete, ekero mwarenge ase erooro, goika mogacha aase aa." 
Deuteronomy11:6 Moinyorete buna akorete Datani na Abiiramu, abana b’Eliabu, ab’ororeria rwa Reuben. Ase amasio ’Abaisraeli bonsi riroba rikabwereka, rikabamera, amo ne chiamate chiabo, ne chiema, ne chitugo, na abwo bonsi bababwatetie." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Inwe mwaroche namaiso aino emeremo yonsi emenene Omonene akorete. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Mobwate amachiko onsi ayio inche nkobaa rituko ria rero; erio nario morabe ne chinguru, erinde mosoe ase ense eria mogochia koira, ebe eyaino," 
Deuteronomy11:9 naende amatuko aino anyare koba amange ase ense eria Omonene arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nayee barabwo na ororeria rwabo, ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ense eria mogochia gosoa moyeire teri buna ense ya Misiri agwo ase mwarwa. Aroro nigo mwarenge kobusura chimbusuro chiaino, naende mwakora emeremo y’ogosiarera amache, buna mogosiarera amache ase egeticha gie chinyeni." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Korende ense eria mogochia gosoa moyeire nigo ere ense y’ebitunwa na amagoko, ense ekonyora embura egotwa korwa igoro." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo agwechandera ense eyio. Amaiso ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, botambe nigo ayerigereretie korwa omochakano bw’omwaka na goika omoerio oye." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Komoraigwere amachiko aya nabaeire rituko ria rero, erinde mwanche Omonene, Nyasae oino, na komokorera ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na emioyo yaino yonsi," 
Deuteronomy11:14 rirorio ere nabatwerie embura ase ense yaino ase engaki egwenerete, embura ye ritang’ani na ey’okwamia endagera nainwe monyore endagera, na edivai, na amaguta ’amazeituni." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Nabae obonyansi ase ebitii ase chitugo chiaino chikorisia. Inwe nigo moranyore endagera mokoria, moigote." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Mwerende mono chinkoro chiaino tichibang’ainereria. Timobaisa gotiga Omonene na gokorera chinyasae ching’ao, na gochisasima." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Moise komotiga rirorio endamwamu yaye nigo erabe enene asemore, erinde asieke igoro, embura tetwa, na ense etige kwama, nainwe mokwe mosire ara rimo rioka timobao ase ense eria engiya Omonene agochia kobaa." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Amang’ana aya aane moyagache ase chinkoro chiaino ime, na ase ebirengererio biaino. Moyasiberanie ase amaboko aino na moyabeke ase amasio aino igoro, abe amariko akobainyoria." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Moyorokererie abana baino, mobe mokona‐koyairanerera ekero moikaransete ase chinyomba chiaino, na ekero more ase orogendo, na ekero mogochia korara, na ekero mokoboka." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Moyarike ase emetobwa na ase emeriibo y’ebisieri bie chinyomba chiaino, na ase ebiita biaino." 
Deuteronomy11:21 Erio nario inwe amo na abana baino moramenye amatuko amange ase ense eria Omonene arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nabayee ebe eyabo. Nigo moragenderere komenyao ase engaki koreng’ana buna igoro egendererete koba igoro y’ense. 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Komoraigwere na gokora amachiko aya onsi nabaeire, erinde momwanche Omonene, Nyasae oino, naende motaare ase chinchera chiaye chionsi, na momobwatie," 
Deuteronomy11:23 erio Omonene naserie ebisaku ebi bionsi bire ase amasio aino, na inwe namonyare koira ense y’ebisaku bire ebinene, naende bire ne chinguru kobabua inwe." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Aase ande onsi morataare namagoro aino nabe aaino. Orogongo rwaino nigo rorachakere ase erooro ya irianyi na roikere Lebanoni, ensemo ya sugusu, naende rochakere orooche rwa Eufarati ensemo ya moocha na roikere Enyancha Enene ya bosongo." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Omonto onde tari oranyare kobarwania na kobabua, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nakore abanto babairoke inwe ase ense yonsi ase moraete. Naboigo abarierete eira." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Naama! Rituko ria rero nabekire ase amasio aino ogosesenigwa na okoragererigwa. 
Deuteronomy11:27 Nigo moranyore ogosesenigwa komoraigwere amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, aya nkobachika rituko ria rero," 
Deuteronomy11:28 korende monyore okoragererigwa komoraange koigwera amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, gose komoraonchoke korwa ase enchera eye nkobachika rituko ria rero. Timobaisa gosasima chinyasae chinde ching’ao, echio motamanyete agwo ritang’ani." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Ekero Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabaikie ase ense eria mokogenda koira, mokwane ogosesenigwa korwa ase egetunwa kia Gerisimu na okoragererigwa korwa ase egetunwa ki’Ebali. (" 
Deuteronomy11:30 Buna momanyete, ebitunwa ebio bibere nigo bire bosongo y’orooche rwa Yorodan, ase Enchera ya Bosongo ase orogongo rw’Abakanani, baria bamenyete ase Ekerubo Ekiomo kororia Giligali, ang’e nemete eria enga buna emetontera agwo More.)" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Bono mwabeire ang’e kwamboka Yorodan, mogende koira ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa. Ekero morabe mwayeirire na koyemenya," 
Deuteronomy11:32 mwerende na mobwate amachiko na emeroberio yonsi echikire, aya nabekire ase amasio aino rituko ria rero." 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Aya naro amachiko na emeroberio echikire moraigwere na gokora ase ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, agochia kobaa ebe eyaino. Ase amatuko onsi morabe momenyete ase ense mobe mokoyaigwera." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Ekero moraike ase ense eria y’ebisaku na koyeira, rirorio mosarie kegima aase onsi ase biarenge gosasimera chinyasae chiabo, kerabe ase ebitunwa ebitambe, gose ase ebigoro, gose inse y’emete emebese." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Motagore ebisasimero biabo, mobutore chisiiro chiabo bagosasima, mosambe nomorero emete y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, mogeche na koiyeria emegwekano ye chinyasae chiabo ebachire. Mosirie amarieta e chinyasae echio chiebwe kegima, tichisasimwa naende aase agwo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Ekero mogosasima Omonene, Nyasae oino, timobaisa gokora buna abanto abwo bagokora." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nachore aase aamo oka korwa ase ebisaku biaino bionsi, na aroro agwo nabeke erieta riaye, na obomenyo bwaye nao agwo borabe. Aase agwo nao inwe morarigie mogendeo." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Agwo nao morarente ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde, na ensemo yaino ya ikomi, na okoruegwa mokorenta, na ebi mwarierete Omonene eira komoruera, na okoruegwa kwaino kw’ogwancha, ne chintangi chiaino chie chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chimbori." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Agwo nao morabiriere ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, nainwe namobe nomogoko amo nabanto be chinka chiaino, ase ebitoki bionsi moranyore ase emeremo yaino, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, obasesenirie." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Ase ekero keria timobaisa gokora buna togokora bono aiga. Kera omonto nigo agokora buna aroche omonyene ng’a mboronge. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Inwe timoraika ase morabe nobotoereru na ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe omwando oino." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Korende ekero moramboke Yorodan na komenya ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe omwando oino, naende ekero arabae obotoereru korwa ase ababisa baino bonsi babaetanaine, erio inamomenye ase omorembe ase motabe nobwoba." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Aase agwo Omonene, Nyasae oino, arachore abe obomenyo bw’erieta riaye, nao morarente ebinto bionsi nabachikire: ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde, na ensemo yaino ya ikomi, na okoruegwa konde morarente, na ebiegwa mwarierete Omonene eira komoruera." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Na aroro agwo mogoke ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, amo nabana baino, abamura na abaiseke, na Abalawi bamenyete amo nainwe ase emechie yaino, ekiagera Abalawi tibabwati egetari gose omwando bw’orogongo amo nainwe." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Mwerende mono, timobaisa koruera ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa aase aande onsi mokorora na gochora inwe abanyene." 
Deuteronomy12:14 Korende moruere ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa aase aria Omonene arachore korwa ase orogongo rw’ebisaku biaino; agwo nao morakorere aya onsi nabachikire. 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Korende agwo ase emechie yaino nabo moranyare konyenya ching’iti chiaino na koria chinyama buna moganetie koreng’ana buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abasesenirie. Onde bwensi, oyo otachenegeti na oyo ochenegete, nabe ne ribaga ri’ogochiria buna mokoria chinyama chie chingabi, na echie chinsune." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Korende timobaisa koria amanyinga; goika moyaitere ase riroba buna amache. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Agwo ase momenyete ase emechie yaino timobaisa korierao ensemo ya ikomi y’endagera yaino, gose ey’edivai, gose ey’amaguta ’amazeituni, gose chintangi chiaino chie chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chimbori, gose ebi mwarierete Omonene eira komoruera, gose okoruegwa kwaino kw’ogwancha, gose okoruegwa konde gwonsi." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Korende moriere ebinto ebio ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, agwo aase arachore. Mobirie inwe amo nabana baino, abamura na abaiseke, na abasomba baino, abamura na abaiseke, na Abalawi bamenyete amo nainwe ase emechie yaino. Na igo mogoke ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase kera egento morabe mogokora." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Timobaisa gotiga gokonya Abalawi ase chingaki chionsi moragenderere komenya ase ense yaino. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Ekero Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabagareerie orogongo rwaino buna abarierete eira, nainwe mokwane: Natorie chinyama, ekiagera more abatoonu b’okogania chinyama, nabo morarie chinyama, morie chinyinge buna moraganie." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Aase agwo Omonene, Nyasae oino, arachore kobeka erieta riaye, karabe aare nase momenyete, nabo moranyare konyenya eng’iti ende yonsi ye chiombe chiaino, gose chimbori, gose ching’ondi, echio Omonene abaeire, buna nabachikire. Naboigo morarie chinyama chinyinge buna moraganie, ekero more agwo ase emechie yaino." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Onde bwensi, oyo otachenegeti na oyo ochenegete nabe ne ribaga ri’okoria chinyama echio, nigo morachirie buna chinyama chie chingabi gose echie chinsune chikoriegwa." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Mwerende timobaisa koria amanyinga, ekiagera obomoyo nigo bore ase amanyinga ime, timoria, obomoyo amo nenyama." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Timoyaria, korende nigo morayaitere ase riroba buna amache." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Mwerende, timoyaria. Ekero morakore ayare amaronge ase obosio bw’Omonene nigo erabe buya asemore na ase ororeria rwaino." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Ebinto biaino moraatanane bibe ebichenu amo nebi mwariete chiira ng’a mobirue, mobiire aase agwo Omonene arachore." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Morue ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa, chinyama amo namanyinga, igoro ase egesasimero ki’Omonene, Nyasae oino. Amanyinga ’ebing’wanso biaino binde, moyaumore igoro ase egesasimero ki’Omonene, Nyasae oino, korende chinyama chirochio morie." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Moigwere amang’ana aya onsi nabachikire, erio nario erabe buya asemore, na ase ororeria rwaino kare na kare; ekiagera ekero morakore igo, obwo nabwo oboronge na amaya ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Omonene, Nyasae oino, naserie korwa ase amasio aino abanto b’ebisaku ebio mogochia koira ense yabo na koyemenya. Nyuma Omonene kabasiririe," 
Deuteronomy12:30 mwerende timobaisa gotegwa nemeeto na kobwatia chingencho chiabo banarete gokora. Timorigia komanya igoro ye chinyasae chiabo na koboria: Naki ebisaku ebi biarenge gosasima chinyasae chiabo? Naboigo naintwe tochisasime. 
Deuteronomy12:31 Timobaisa gosasima Omonene, Nyasae oino, buna barabwo barenge gosasima chinyasae chiabo. Barabwo nigo barenge gokora ase chinyasae chiabo kera egento kere okogechia, eke Nyasae agechete. Nigo bagosamba nomorero abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, babe ebing’wanso ase chinyasae chiabo." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Kera ring’ana nabachikire moribwate na korikora. Timomenta amang’ana aino ase ayio nabachikire, gose timorusia egento korwao." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Nenyare koba ng’a ase egati yaino omobani, gose omonyandoto, oratuboke na koorokia ebikone na amakumia," 
Deuteronomy13:2 na amang’ana ayio aikeranigwe. Aise kobatebia: Togende tosasime chinyasae ching’ao, (echio motana gosasima agwo ritang’ani,) tochikorere," 
Deuteronomy13:3 timobaisa koigwa amang’ana ’omobani oyio gose ay’omonyandoto oyio. Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo akobateema, erinde arore gose momwanchete ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na emioyo yaino yonsi." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Mobwatie Omonene, Nyasae oino, na momoiroke. Mobwate amachiko aye na moigwere eriogi riaye, momokorere na komobwatia." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Korende omobani oyio, gose omonyondoto oyio, naitwe akwe, ekiagera oyio nigo akoborokereria ng’a mobe aba motari koigwera Omonene, Nyasae oino, oyio obarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, na kobatooria korwa ase ense y’obosomba. Omonto oyio nigo arabasirie motige enchera eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, abachigete kobwatia. Goika morusie obobe bwonsi korwa asemore." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Boigo momura omino morwete enda eyemo, gose omwana oo, omomura gose omoiseke, gose omokungu oo bwanchete, gose omosani oo bwanchete buna bweanchete aye omonyene, nanyare gokoebereria bobisi na kogotebia: Togende tosasime chinyasae ching’ao, chiria, aye otana gosasima, gose chisokoro chiao chitarenge gosasima." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Oyomo obo nanyare gokoebereria osasime chinyasae chinde chi’abanto abwo bagoetanaine, bamenyete aare korwa asore, gose ang’e, korwa ensinyo eyemo y’ense goika eyende." 
Deuteronomy13:8 Tobaisa koebererigwa nere, gose komotegerera, gose komororera amabeebe, nonya nokomororera amabera gose komoegera." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Momoite akwe. Aye obe oyo bwe ritang’ani komoaka amagena; nyuma y’ayio abanto bonsi bamanye komoaka amagena. 
Deuteronomy13:10 Momoake amagena goika akwe ekiagera aganetie kobasiria ng’a motige Omonene, Nyasae oino, oria obarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, ense y’obosomba." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Na Abaisraeli bonsi baigwe ayio akorekanire na bairoke, erinde obobe buna obwo tibokorwa ase egati yaino naende." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Ekero momenyete ase emechie yaino, eyio Omonene oino abaeire, ande namoigwe" 
Deuteronomy13:13 ng’a abanto bande ababe batarochi inchera barure ase egati yaino, bang’usire abanto b’omochie obo, na kobasiria, bagoteba: Inchuo togende gosasima chinyasae ching’ao konya motana gosasima rinde." 
Deuteronomy13:14 Mouna‐unie mono amang’ana ayio, erio momanye buya gose nabo are. Onye okogechia buna okwo gwakorekanire ase egati yaino," 
Deuteronomy13:15 moite abanto bonsi b’omochie oyio nemioro. Mosarie omochie oyio kegima amo nebinto bionsi bireo, ne chitugo mochiite boigo." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Mosangererie ebisakorwa bi’omochie oyio, mobibeke bibe etui agwo ase eraaro aarabu, erio mosambe nomorero omochie amo nebisakorwa bionsi, bibe ekeng’wanso ekegima ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene, Nyasae oino. Noro obe ritombe goika kare na kare, tokoagachwa naende." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Timobaisa koira gento kende gionsi keragereirie. Erio nario Omonene aratige endamwamu yaye enene, erinde abarorere amabera. Ere igo arabe namabeebe asemore, abakore momentekane, buna arierete chisokoro chiaino eira." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ayio nigo arakoreke onye mokoigwera Omonene, Nyasae oino, na kobwata amachiko aye onsi, aya inche nabaeire ase rituko ria rero, na komorakore ayare amaronge ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Inwe nabana b’Omonene, Nyasae oino. Timwesaraga emebere yaino gose gwekigita chitukia chia bosio ase emetwe yaino ekero mokoreera abakure," 
Deuteronomy14:2 ekiagera inwe nabanto abachenu ase Omonene, Nyasae oino. Ere obachorire mobe abanto baye, mwaatananegete korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku binde bionsi bire ase ense." 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Timobaisa koria ng’iti ende yonsi y’okogechia. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Echi nachio ching’iti morabe mokoria: chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chimbori," 
Deuteronomy14:5 ne chinsune, ne chingabi, ne ebisia, ne chimbori chi’orosana, ne chiburo, ne chitobe, ne ching’ondi chi’orosana." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Kera eng’iti ebwate ebitaago biatananegete gati ase chinsemo ibere, naende chikoria eng’ang’ura, echio nachio morarie." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ase ching’iti echio chikoria eng’ang’ura gose chibwate ebitaago biatananegete, timoria echio: engamia, na egesusu, na egesengi. Echio nigo chikoria eng’ang’ura, korende tichibwati ebitaago biatananegete, ase ayio tichichenegeti." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Timoria embeche; nebwate ebitaago biatananegete, korende teri koria eng’ang’ura. Ase ayio nebe asemore eyetachenegeti. Timoria chinyama chie ching’iti echio gose timokuna emebere yabo ekero chiakure." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Ase echio chionsi chire ase amache ime monyare koria chinswe chibwate chingondo chinga buna chimbaba, na amagoocho." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Chinde chionsi chitabwati chingondo chinga buna chimbaba, na amagoocho, timochiria; echio nchibe echitachenegeti asemore." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Chinyoni chionsi chichenegete namochirie. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Timoria chinyoni echi: ekeongo, na ensoti, na obotere;" 
Deuteronomy14:13 amakoru na ebisaku biamwabo; 
Deuteronomy14:14 ebigonkoru na ebisaku biamwabo bionsi; 
Deuteronomy14:15 esagero na omoyaye, na enyakoboke, na enyautuutu, na ebisaku biamwabo;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 enyakweumia enke na enene, na etibibi;" 
Deuteronomy14:17 etekere, na ekeongo kende, na omoneke," 
Deuteronomy14:18 na amaagonga na ebisaku biamwabo, na enteema bobe, na egetabora mato." 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Ebisaku bionsi bi’ebitongwa ebisinini bikoiruruka ne chimbaba tibichenegeti asemore, timobiria." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Ebitongwa ebichenegete bibwate chimbaba nabio moranyare kobiria. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Eng’iti ekwete yoka enyene timoyeria. Monyare koyea omomenyi omenyete amo nainwe ase omochie oino, ayerie, gose moyeoonerie omonto bw’egesaku ekeao, korende inwe nabanto abachenu, mwatananire ase Omonene Nyasae oino. “Timobaisa koiyekera emanwa y’embori ime y’amabeere ’eng’ina." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Goika morue ensemo ya ikomi ye chindagera chi’emegondo yaino echi chikwama kera omwaka. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, aase arachore abe obomenyo bw’erieta riaye, nao morariere ensemo ya ikomi ye chindagera chiaino, na edivai, na amaguta, ne chintangi chie chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chimbori; erinde monyare kweorokereria komoiroka Omonene, Nyasae oino, botambe." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Onye aase agwo Omonene Nyasae achorire abe obomenyo bw’erieta riaye are aare mono, motanyare kobogoria ensemo ya ikomi y’eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, abasesenirie nero," 
Deuteronomy14:25 rirorio moonchorerie ebinto ebio ase chibesa, erinde mochiire aase agwo Omonene oino achorire." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Chibesa echio mogore chiombe, gose ching’ondi, gose edivai, gose ebinyugwa ebiroro, kende gionsi moganetie. Mobiriere agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, erinde mogoke amo nabanto be chinka chiaino." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Timotiga gokonya Abalawi bamenyete ase emechie yaino, ekiagera barabwo tibabwati emegondo gose omwando amo nainwe." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Ase omoerio o kera emiaka etato morente ensemo ya ikomi ye chindagera chi’emegondo chi’omwaka oria, moyegache ase emechie yaino." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Endagera eyio ney’Abalawi, ekiagera barabwo tibabwati omwando bw’oboremo, na ey’abamenyi ne chintakana, na ababoraka bare ase emechie yaino. Abwo mbachiche barie endagera eyio baisaneke. Erio nario Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabasesenie ase emeremo yaino yonsi mogokora." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Ase omoerio o kera omwaka o gatano na kabere mobae abwo bariete chisira obosibore tibaakana. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Oyo noro omoroberio buna morakore: Kera omonto oete omogisangio oye egento singo, amotigere esira eyio. Tabaisa koboria oyomwabo bw’egesaku kiaye amoakane esira eyio, ekiagera obosibore bw’Omonene bw okwabera chisira bwararigwe." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Omomenyi ere nakoiranerie egento kwamoete singo. Korende egento kende gionsi kwaete oyomino tomosaba akoiranerie. 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Omonto onde takoba omotaka ase egati yaino, ekiagera Omonene nabasesenie ase ense eyio agochia kobaa ebe omwando oino," 
Deuteronomy15:5 komoraigwere Omonene, Nyasae oino, naende mobwate amachiko aya onsi nabaeire rituko ria rero." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabasesenie buna abarierete eira. Inwe inamoe ebisaku ebinge ebinto singo, korende inwe timokoremerwa erinde mogende gosaba ebinto moegwe singo; naende inwe namogambere ebisaku ebinge, korende birobio tibikobagambera inwe." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Onye omonto omino ore omotaka agwo ase emechie yaino ase ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa, timobaisa koba abang’iti gose abagoko asare, korende mokonye omonto oyio omino." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Mobe abaya asare, momoe singo ebinto biisaine ase oboremerwa bwaye bonde bwonsi." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Mwerende mono, timobaisa kwanga koa omotaka oyio egento na goteba: Omwaka bw’okwabera chisira obeire ang’e. Timoa ebirengererio ebibe buna ebio ribaga ase chinkoro chiaino. Onye mokoba abang’iti na kwanga koa oyomino ore omotaka egento, ere narere ase Omonene, ekiagera mwamorinire eki aremeire, nainwe namobe nebibe." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Momoe ebinto ase ogwancha, na timoba ne ribero ekero mokomoa. Ekero morarue igo, Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabasesenie ase emeremo yaino yonsi mogokora." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Abataka tibakoera korwa ase ense; na ase engencho eyio nabachikire ng’a mobe nemioyo emerabu ase ogokonya abamino bare abataka, na abaremeire bare ase ense yaino." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Onye Omoibirania omino, omosacha gose omokungu, oonigwe asore, nigo aragokorere emeremo ase emiaka etano nomo, korende ase omwaka o gatano na kabere, goika omoe ribaga arue asore." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ekero oramoe ribaga arue asore, tobaisa komotiga agende ore namaboko amasa." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Omoe ching’ondi kore nomoyo omorabu, omoe nendagera, na edivai, koreng’ana buna Omonene, Nyasae oo, agosesenirie." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Moinyore ng’a nainwe mwarenge abasomba ase ense ya Misiri, na Omonene, Nyasae oino, akababooria korwa aroro. Ase engencho eyio nabachikire amang’ana aya rituko ria rero." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Korende omosomba oria karatebe ng’a tatageti kogotiga agende, ekiagera ogwanchire aye, amo neamate yao, naende igo aisanegete komenya bwoo," 
Deuteronomy15:17 rirorio oimokie esindake omotue ogoto, na esindake eria esoe ase omotobwa bw’egesieri kiao, nere nabe omosomba oo ase obogima bwaye bwonsi. Naboigo orakore nase omosomba oo omokungu." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Tobaisa korora ng’a naakong’u komoa obosibore, ekiagera ase emiaka etano nomo ere nigo arenge kogokorera emeremo ara kabere buna omorikwa bw’eng’eria are kogokorera. Ase ayio Omonene, Nyasae oo, nagosesenie ase emeremo yao yonsi ogokora." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Mwatananere Omonene, Nyasae oino, chintangi chionsi chie chieri, na echie chimingichi, na echie chigoree. Timobaisa gokorera chieri echio chintangi emeremo ende yonsi, gose timobaisa konacha amarionya e chimingichi echio." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Omwaka ase omwaka, inwe amo nabanto be chinka chiaino moriere chinyama chie chitugo echio chintangi ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, aase agwo arachore." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Korende echire na bimocho ase emebere yabo, onye chire ebisegora, gose emeuko, gose na kemocho kende gionsi, timobaisa gochirua chibe ekeng’wanso ase Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Chinyama chie ching’iti buna echio mochiriere agwo ase emechie yaino. Abanto bonsi onye bare abatachenegeti, gose bachenegete, nabachirie. Nabo morachirie buna mokoria chinyama chie chingabi gose echie chinsune." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Timobaisa koria amanyinga abo, korende moyaitere ase riroba buna amache." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Mobe mokorenda Epasaka y’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase omotienyi bw’Abibu, ekiagera ase obotuko obomo bw’omotienyi oyio, nario Omonene, Nyasae oino abarusetie Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Morusie eng’ondi, gose embori, gose eng’ombe, korwa ase amaicho aino, mogende aase Omonene arachore abe obomenyo bw’erieta riaye, erio morue eng’iti eria ebe ekeng’wanso ki’Epasaka ase Omonene Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Timobaisa koria ekeng’wanso ekio amo nemegati ebekire ememera; ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere morabe mokoria emegati etabekiri memera, eyio nemegati y’emechando, ekiagera ekero mwaruete ase ense ya Misiri nigo mwaayererete gotama. Igo ase amatuko aino onsi more moyo mobe mokoinyora rituko mwaruete ase ense ya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, ememera tenyorekana ase ense yaino yonsi, na enyama y’ekeng’wanso kiaruetwe ase omogoroba bwe rituko rie ritang’ani tetigarigwa ebeo ase obotuko bwonsi goika rituko ria kabere." 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Timoruera ekeng’wanso ki’Epasaka ase emechie ende yaino, eyio Omonene Nyasae oino agochia kobaa." 
Deuteronomy16:6 Aase Omonene, Nyasae oino, arachore koba obomenyo bw’erieta riaye, agwo nao oka moraruere ekeng’wanso ki’Epasaka. Agwo nao morabe mogokerua ekero kia mogoroba, ase chinsa chireng’aine chiria mwaruete Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Moiyeke chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso ekio, mochiriere aase aria Omonene, Nyasae oino, arachore. Rituko ria kabere mambia moirane gochia ase chiema chiaino." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ase amatuko atano na rimo morie emegati etabekiri memera, na ase rituko ria gatano na kabere, mobe nomosangererekano bw’engencho enene bw’okomosasima Omonene, Nyasae oino. Ase rituko erio timokora meremo ende yonsi." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Mobare chichuma isano na ibere, mochake korwa engaki eria mogochaka rigesa ase emegondo yaino." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Morende Amatuko Amanene e Chichuma ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, Morente ebiegwa bi’ogwancha ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, mobirue buna koreng’ana abasesenirie." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Agwo aase Omonene arachore abe obomenyo bw’erieta riaye, nao moragende na mogoke ase obosio bwaye, inwe na abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, na abasomba baino, abamura na abaiseke, na Abalawi bamenyete ase emechie yaino, na abamenyi, ne chintakana, na ababoraka bare ase egati yaino." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Moinyore ng’a nainwe nigo mwarenge abasomba aaria Misiri, ase ayio morende na kobwata emeroberio eyio yonsi echikire." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Ekero mwaoorire chindagera chiaino naende mwamitire amasabibu aino inamobe n’Amatuko Amanene ay’Ebigutu ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Mogoke ase amatuko ayio, inwe amo nabana baino, abamura na abaiseke, na abasomba baino, abamura na abaiseke, na Abalawi, na abamenyi, ne chintakana, na ababoraka, abwo bamenyete ase emechie yaino." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Namorende Amatuko Amanene ay’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere; moyarende aase agwo Omonene arachore, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nasesenie okwama kw’emegondo yaino amo nemeremo yaino yonsi. Ase ayio monyare kogoka mwensi amo." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Ara gatano kera omwaka abanto baino abasacha babe bagocha ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, aase agwo arachore; bagende aroro ase Amatuko Amanene ay’Emegati etabekiri memera, na ase Amatuko Amanene aye Chichuma, na ase Amatuko Amanene ay’Ebigutu. Tibagenda ase obosio bw’Omonene bare namaboko amasa." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Kera omonto arue ebinto koreng’ana buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, amosesenirie." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Mochore abagambi na abateneneri korwa ase ebisaku biaino, babe bakogamba agwo ase emechie yaino, eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa. Abwo babe bakogamba ebina bi’abanto ase oboronge." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Timobaisa koonchorana oboronge, gose gwanchereria abanto, gose timoegwa riaaki, ekiagera riaaki nigo rikoukoria amaiso ’abang’aini, naende nigo rikoonchorana na korina abanyaboronge oboronge bwabo." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Oboronge nabwo bwoka morabe mokobwatia, erio nario morabe moyo, na koira ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Timobaisa koremera Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, omote onde bwensi, komenta ase egesasimero moraagachere Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Naende timobaisa gotenenia esiiro ende yonsi y’ogosasimwa, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nagechete ebinto buna ebio." 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Timobaisa korua eng’iti ende yonsi, chiombe, gose ching’ondi, gose chimbori, eyere na kemocho ase omobere oye, ebe ekeng’wanso ase Omonene, Nyasae oino. Eyio nigo ere okogechia asare." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Nenyare koba ng’a agwo ase omochie onde oino ase eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabae, omonto, omosacha gose omokungu, anyorekane okorire amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase ogosaria okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania," 
Deuteronomy17:3 na gosasima chinyasae ching’ao na gochikorera ase ogosasima erioba, gose omotienyi, gose ching’enang’eni chia igoro, ebio obakanirie ng’a timobisasima." 
Deuteronomy17:4 Komoratebigwe amang’ana buna ayio erio moyauna‐unie. Onye mokonyora ekeene ng’a amang’ana ayio akorirwe ase egati y’Abaisraeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 erio nario morarente agwo ase ebiita biaino omonto oria, omosacha gose omokungu, oyio okorire ogokora okwo okobe, erio momoake amagena goika akwe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Omonto oyio nigo araitwe ase oborori bw’abanto babere gose batato, korende tagoitwa ase oborori bw’omonto oyomo." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Abanto baria birori nabwo barabe abatang’ani komoaka amagena ase okomoita, na nyuma yabo abanto bande bamanye komoaka amagena. Naboigo morarusie obobe bwonsi korwa asemore." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Onye amang’ana arentirwe asemore, ayare amakong’u koyanacha, karabe amang’ana ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga, gose ay’ogokora oboronge ase omonto, gose obobe omonto akoreire omonto onde, gose ekina kende gionsi kere egekong’u asemore agwo ase emechie yaino, erio moimoke mogende aase agwo Omonene, Nyasae oino, arachore," 
Deuteronomy17:9 mogende ase abakuani Abalawi na ase omogambi bw’engaki eyio. Mobatebie amang’ana ayio amakong’u, nabarabwo nabanache ekina kia boronge." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Morende mono na gokora amang’ana ayio barabwo barabatebie korwa aase agwo Omonene arachore. Mokore koreng’ana buna barabasemie. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Mokore koreng’ana buna barabatebererie, na buna baranache ekina asemore; timotiga ogosemia kwabo na koonchoka aande, gochia ase ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Omonto onde bwensi ore omomwenu na kwanga koigwera omokuani oyio ogotenena agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, gose aange koigwera omogambi, ere goika aitwe akwe. Goika morusie obobe borue ase Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Ekero abanto bonsi baraigwe amang’ana ayio mbairoke, tibakora ogokora kw’obomwenu naende." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Ekero morabe mwaikire na komenya ase ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe eyaino, aande moganie omoruoti abagambere, buna ebisaku biria bibaetanaine bibwate abaruoti babo bakobagambera." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Erio mobeke omoruoti oyo Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabachorere. Mobeke omonto bw’abanto bamino abe omoruoti igoro asemore, korende omonto otari bw’egesaku kiaino timomobeka abe omoruoti oino." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Omoruoti oyio takwementera chibarasi chinyinge, gose tabaisa gotoma abanto bairane Misiri ase ogochia korigia chibarasi chinyinge, ekiagera Omonene obatebirie ng’a timokonyara koirana gochia ase enchera eria naende." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Omoruoti oria taba na bakungu abange, ekiagera ayio nigo aragere enkoro yaye eonchoke etige Omonene, gose takorigia kwementera chitahabu ne chifeta." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Ekero aikaransire ase ekerogo ki’obonene ase oboruoti bwaye, ’arente ebuku y’amachiko korwa ase abakuani Abalawi, naende arike amang’ana ayio ayio ase ebuku ende." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ere natware ebuku eyio abe ogosoma amachiko ayio onsi ase amatuko ’obogima bwaye bwonsi, erio neorokererie komoiroka Omonene, Nyasae oye, na korenda amang’ana onsi ay’ogochika okwo na ay’emeroberio echikire, na koyakora." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Goika akore igo, erinde tabaisa koenena ase ogochaya abanto bande bamwabo, gose tabaisa koonchoka korwa ase amachiko na kogenda ase ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee. Karaigwere, ere amo nabana baye mbabe bakogambera Abaisraeli ase engaki entambe." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Abakuani Abalawi na egesaku gionsi ki’Abalawi tibakonyora egetari gose omwando amo n’Abaisraeli bande. Nigo barabe bakoria ebing’wanso bigosambwa nomorero ase Omonene na okoruegwa konde gokorentwa asare. 
Deuteronomy18:2 Ase ayio tibakonyora omwando amo nabanto bamwabo, ekiagera Omonene omonyene nere omwando obo, buna abarierete eira." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Ekero abanto barabe bakorua eng’ombe, gose eng’ondi, gose embori, koba ekeng’wanso, bae abakuani rireko, ne chinsea ibere, na enda; ebio nabio ebitari abanto barae abakuani." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Moe abakuani ogotongora kwaino kw’endagera, na edivai, na amaguta, na amarionya amatang’ani mokonacha korwa ase ching’ondi chiaino." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Omonene, Nyasae oino, ochorire Lawi na ororeria rwaye ase egati y’ebisaku biaino bionsi, babe bagokora emeremo ase erieta riaye, ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Omolawi onde bwensi orabe omenyete ase emechie ende yonsi y’Abaisraeli karaganie koruao, nabo aranyare gocha aase agwo Omonene arachore." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Ere nabe ogokora emeremo ase erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oye, buna Abalawi bande bamwabo bagotenena gokora emeremo ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Nere oyio naatananerwe egetari kiaye ki’endagera kereng’aine neki’Abalawi bande, nonya okonyora egento ase okoonia omwando atigeretwe nabaibori baye." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Ekero moraike ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa, timobaisa kweorokereria kobwatia chingencho chi’okogechia okwo ebisaku biria bimenyeteo binarete gokora." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Monto onde oino tabaisa korua omwana oye, omomura gose omoiseke, asambwe ase omorero ime abe ekeng’wanso. Onde taba ase egati yaino oyogokora oboringoria, gose oborogi, gose koruta chinche, gose oyogokora oboragori," 
Deuteronomy18:11 gose oyokorangeria ebirecha, gose okorigia ogosemigwa korwa ase emeika y’abakure, gose oborogi bonde bwonsi." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Onde bwensi orakore ebinto ebi nigo arabe okogechia ase Omonene; na ase engencho y’okogechia buna okwo Omonene, Nyasae oino, naserie abanto abwo konya bamenyete ase ense eria, barue ase amasio aino." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Inwe goika mobe abaikeranu ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Deuteronomy18:14 Naende Musa agateba, “Abanto b’ebisaku ebio mogochia goseria nigo bakoigwera abarogi na abariori, korende inwe Omonene, Nyasae oino, obakanirie ng’a timobaisa gokora ebinto ebio." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Korende ase egati y’abamino, Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabaimokerie omobani onga buna inche. Oyio nere moraigwere." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Nigo erabe buna mwaboretie Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase rituko riria mwasangererekanete agwo Horebu, mogakwana: Tototiga toigwe eriogi ri’Omonene, Nyasae oito, kagokwana, gose titogenderera korora omorero oyio omonene. Toise koriigwa na koyorora, nigo torakwe." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Omonene agantebia: Amang’ana ayio bakwanire nay’ekeene. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Korwa ase egati y’abamwabo nimbaimokerie omobani onga buna aye, nimbeke amang’ana aane ase omonwa oye, nere nabatebie ayio onsi ndamochike." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Omonto onde bwensi oraange koigwera amang’ana aane ayio ndachike omobani oyio ayakwane ase erieta riane, inche bweka omonyene ning’ee omonto oyio egesusuro." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Korende omobani oraenene, na gokwana ase erieta riane aya ntamochigeti akwane, gose oyio orakwane ase amarieta e chinyasae ching’ao, omobani oyio nigo araitwe akwe." 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Na komoreborie ase chinkoro chiaino ime: Naki torakore tomanye gose ring’ana riria rigokwanwa neri’Omonene? 
Deuteronomy18:22 Rirorio momanye ng’a, ekero omobani arakwane ring’ana ase erieta ri’Omonene, korende ring’ana erio tiriikeranigwa, gose koba ekeene, erio nering’ana Omonene atakwanete. Omobani oyio nigo arikwana ase obomwenu bwaye, inwe timobaisa komoiroka." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Ekero Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabe osiririe abanto b’ebisaku biria mogochia koegwa ense yabo, na ekero mwairire ense amo nemechie yabo, na komenya ase chinyomba chiabo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 mwatanane emechie etato ase ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa, moyiate ase chinsemo isato, na moroisie chinchera chikogenda ase emechie eyio etato, erio omonto karaite oyonde mosiabano, abe ogotamera oyomo bw’emechie eyio." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Omonto onde bwensi oraite oyonde mosiabano, atamogechete agwo ritang’ani, nanyare gotamera oyomo bw’emechie eyio, na gotooria obogima bwaye." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Nebe ng’a omonto ogendire amo noyonde ase rinani kogecha emete, na ekero aimokirie egesire, na egesire ekio gesomoke korwa ase omote, gecharare, geite omonto oria onde, omoiti oria nabo aratamere oyomo bw’emechie eyio ase ogotooria obogima bwaye." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Nenyare koba ng’a orogendo rogochia ase omochie bw’obotamero nigo rore orotambe, na omonto oria oganetie korusia egesiomba abwatie omoiti oria, na komoikeera nchera, na ase endamwamu yaye amoite, nonya omoiti oria tagwenerete goitwa, ekiagera aitete omonto mosiabano atamogechete agwo ritang’ani." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ase ayio nabachikire mwatanane emechie etato. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Ekero Omonene, Nyasae oino, aragareyie orogongo rwaino robe oronene, buna arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ase ogotiana, na kobaa inwe ense yonsi eria atebetie chisokoro chiaino ng’a nabayee," 
Deuteronomy19:9 nainwe komorarende na kobwata amachiko aya nabaeire ase rituko ria rero na komwancha Omonene, Nyasae oino, ase okobwatia chinchera chiaye botambe, erio nario moranyare komenta emechie ende etato." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Komorakore ayio, amanyinga ’abanto batari na komocha atabaise goiterwa ase ense eye Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe omwando oino, ase igo timokoba na komocha kw’ogoitera amanyinga." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Korende onye omonto ogechete omonto onde erinde amoboere na komoaka goika akwe, na nyuma y’ayio atamere oyomo bw’emechie eyio," 
Deuteronomy19:12 erio abagaaka b’omochie bw’omoiti oria batome abanto bamorusie korwa ase omochie oria atameire, bamobeke ase okoboko kw’oria okorusia egesiomba ki’oyomwabo, nere aite omoiti oria." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Timobaisa komororera amabera, korende morusie korwa ase Abaisraeli okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ’omonto otarenge na komocha, erinde nebe buya asemore." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Tobaisa gotumana orobebe ronde rwonsi rw’omogisangio oo, orwo abanto ba kare babegete ase orogongo rw’omwando oria oraegwe ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, arakoe ebe eyao." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Omonto oyomo bweka tagoisana koba kirori igoro ase omonto onde okorire ogosaria, gose ebibe binde bionsi akorire; korende ekina nigo keranachwe ekero birori babere gose batato bakwanire oborori bwabo." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Onye omonto onde okoba kirori bw’oborimo ase okogania gokorera omonto onde bobe, na komosoera," 
Deuteronomy19:17 abanto abwo babere barenge kwomana goika bachiche ase obosio bw’Omonene, ase abakuani na abagambi abwo batenenerete ase amatuko ayio." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Abagambi goika baunenkie mono bamanye gose kirori oria nigo agosoera oyomwabo ase oborimo. 
Deuteronomy19:19 Komoranyore ng’a noborimo, erio mokorere kirori oria amang’ana aria aria ere arengereretie gokorera oyomwabo. Naboigo morusie obobe borue asemore." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Abanto bande ekero baraigwe ayio bairoke, tibakora okomocha konga buna okwo ase egati yaino." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Timobaisa komororera amabera. Egesusuro nigo kerabe obogima ase obogima, eriso ase eriso na erino ase erino, okoboko ase okoboko na okogoro ase okogoro." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Ekero morabe mokogenda korwania ababisa baino esegi, na mokorora chibarasi, ne chigari, na abarwani babo bare abange kobua abaino, timobairoka, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, oria obarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, nigo are amo nainwe." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Ekero mogoika ang’e naase esegi ekorwanera, omokuani agende bosio, akwane nabanto," 
Deuteronomy20:3 abatebie: Inwe Abaisraeli, tegerera! Bono mwabeire ang’e kogenda korwania ababisa baino. Timobaisa gokwa emioyo, timoiroka gose koiguswa, gose timoboboa," 
Deuteronomy20:4 ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nagende amo nainwe, erio arwanie ababisa baino na kobarentera obobui." 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Erio abateneneri bakwane nabanto, babatebie: Onye omonto ore aiga oagachire enyomba, korende tarayemenya, tiga airane bwoye, tabaisa gochia gokwera ase esegi, na omonto omoao achie koira enyomba yaye na koyemenya." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Gose onye omonto ore aiga osimegete emesabibu ase omogondo oye, nere tararia amatunda korwao, tiga airane agende nka, tabaisa gochia gokwera ase esegi, na omonto omoao achie koria amatunda ’omogondo oye." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Gose onye omonto ore aiga, oriereire omoiseke boko, ko taramorenta nka bwoye, tiga oyio airane agende nka, tabaisa gochia gokwera ase esegi, na omonto omoao achie koira omoiseke oria." 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Naende abateneneri baria bagenderere gokwana nabanto, babatebie: Onye omonto ore aiga ore omwoba, ore nenkoro eondogete, oyio tiga airane agende nka bwoye, tabaisa kogera chinkoro chi ’abamwabo chiondoke buna aondogete ere omonyene." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Na ekero abateneneri baria bakoorire gokwana nabarwani baria, bachore abatang’ani babe bakoraa abarwani b’esegi." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Komogoika ang’e nomochie mogochia korwania esegi, ritang’ani morarie amang’ana ’omorembe ase abanto b’omochie oyio." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Onye bakoiraneria ng’a berure abanyene asemore na kobaa ribaga mosoe ase omochie obo, rirorio abanto bonsi bare ase omochie oria mbabe bakobakorera emeremo emekong’u na babe abasomba baino." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Korende onye bakwanga kwerua abanyene asemore, korende babarwanie esegi, rirorio moire omochie obo na komenyao." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Omonene, Nyasae oino, kayobekire ase amaboko aino, moite nemioro abanto abasacha bonsi bareo." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Korende abakungu babo, na abana mobaire babe abaino, amo ne chitugo chionsi. Ebinto bionsi ebire ase omochie oyio mobisakore, mobiire bibe ebiaino, nainwe mogokere ebisakorwa bi’ababisa baino. Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere obabieire." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Ayio naro morakore ase emechie ere aare korwa asemore, eyio etari y’abanto bare ang’e naiga." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Korende ase emechie y’abanto b’ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe omwando oino, timotiga getongwa kende gionsi kereo kebe moyo." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Moite Abahiti, na Abaamori, na Abakanani, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi, mobasirie kegima buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abachigete." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Erio nario batabaise koborokereria inwe gokora okogechia kwabo, okwo banarete ase ogosasima chinyasae chiabo na gochikorera, na kogera inwe mokore ebibe ase Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Ekero mwanaaririe omochie na koyoboera ase engaki entambe, na koyorwania esegi, erinde moyoire, timobaisa gosaria emete ereo. Monyare koria amatunda ’emete eyio, korende timoyegecha. Inee! Emete nero nabanto erinde moyesirie?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Mogeche emete eria yoka momanyete ng’a teri kwama amatunda akoriegwa. Moyekorere emeremo y’okoagachera aase mogokengana korwa ase omochie oria mokorwania esegi, goika obugwe." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Omonto karanyorekane oitirwe okure ore orosana ime agwo ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa, na onye omonto omoita tamanyekaneti," 
Deuteronomy21:2 rirorio abagaaka baino amo nabagambi, bagende korenga oboaare korwa aase agwo omonto oyio akwerete goika ase emechie eetanaine ere ang’e naase agwo." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Erio abagaaka b’omochie oranyorekane ore ang’e kobua nase omonto oyio akwerete, bachore ritororo ritarakorigwa emeremo, gose ritarasiberwa rikorogoto ase ogokurura ebinto." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Barabwo baire ritororo riria, baritirimbokie gochia ase rigoko ase orooche rore namache agotirimboka, rigoko ritana koremwa gose gosimekwa chindagera, na aroro agwo ase rigoko, babune ebigoti bie ritororo riria." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Na abakuani Abalawi bagende agwo ase rigoko, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, abachorire bamokorere na gosesenia ase erieta riaye. Ase ring’ana riabo kera eriomana na ogokorerana bobe ase obotindi nabinachwe." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Abagaaka bonsi b’omochie oria ore ang’e kobua naase aria omonto oria aiteretwe baisabere amaboko abo igoro ase ritororo riria riabunetwe ebigoti agwo ase rigoko. 
Deuteronomy21:7 Erio bakwane amang’ana aya ase okoenekia oborori bwabo: Amaboko aito tari aro aitera amanyinga aya, gose amaiso aito taroche ayio kagokorwa." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Aye Omonene, abera abanto bao Abaisraeli, aba kwabooretie; tobabarera okomocha oko kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ’omonto otari na komocha. Naboigo baaberwe okomocha oko kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Goika morusie korwa asemore okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ’omonto otari na komocha; mokore boronge ase obosio bw’Omonene. 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Ekero mokogenda ase esegi korwania ababisa baino, na Omonene, Nyasae oino, ababeke ase amaboko aino, nainwe mobabue na moboosa," 
Deuteronomy21:11 na onde oino arore omokungu ore omonyakieni ase egati y’abooswa abwo, nere aganie komoira abe mokaye," 
Deuteronomy21:12 rirorio amoire nka bwoye, na omokungu oria akigite etukia y’omotwe oye naende aninte chinchara chiaye." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Aonchorerie chianga chiria abegete ekero oosetwe, na agenderere kobeera agwo enka y’omonto oyio, abe okoreera ise na ng’ina ase engaki y’omotienyi omogima. Nyuma yaye omonto oria amotware abe mokaye." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Korende kerabe ng’a tagokiri nomokungu oyio, amoe ribaga agende aande onsi ase aranche, korende tamoonia chibesa gose komokorera buna agokorera omosomba, ekiagera igo amobetereretie koba nere, na akamoa obosooku." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Nenyare koba ng’a omonto nabwate abakungu babere; ere nigo anchete oyomo na bwangete oria onde. Abakungu abwo bonsi babere baiboreire omosacha oyio abana, korende omwana omoisia omotangi nigo are oyo bw’omokungu oria angete." 
Deuteronomy21:16 Ekero rituko ri’okobariera omwando riraike, omonto oria takoba ne ribaga gwanchereria omomura oye bw’omokungu oria anchete, na komoa omwando bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi ribaga ri’okomoa oria ore omotangi bori aiboreretwe nomokungu atancheti." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Goika amoe omomura oye omotangi chinibo ara kabere, nonya ore omwana bw’omokungu atancheti. Omomura oyio nere omotangi; omwando bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi noyoye." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Nenyare koba ng’a omonto nabwate omwana omomura omobe, omoenenu, otari koigwera ise gose ng’ina, nonya bateemire komoa egesusuro ase okomorongeyia, ere tari kobaigwera." 
Deuteronomy21:19 Ise na ng’ina omwana oyio bamobwate, bamoire ase abagaaka b’omochie agwo ase bakogambera ebina geita ki’omochie." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Agwo bakwane amang’ana aya ase abagaaka baria: Omwana oyo oito nigo are omoenenu, na omosaria, tari gotoigwera, nigo are omoria bobe na gotinda ase okonywa." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Erio agwo abanto bonsi b’omochie oye bamoake amagena goika akwe. Ase enchera eyio morusie obobe borue ase egati yaino. Abaisraeli bonsi kobaraigwe ayio, mbairoke." 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Onye omonto okorire ebibe na koegwa egesusuro ki’ogoitwa, asungwe ase omote." 
Deuteronomy21:23 Omobere oye totigwa ore ase omote igoro obotuko obogima, korende otindekwe ase rituko erio erio, ekiagera omonto oitirwe ase ogosungwa nigo aragereirie na Nyasae. Timobaisa gotiga ense yaino ebe nobobe, ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, abaeire ebe omwando oino." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Korarore eng’ombe y’oyomino gose eng’ondi yaye ekogenda gosira, tobaisa koombia buna toyerochi, korende goika oyeiranie gochia ase omonyene." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Onye tamenyeti ang’e naye gose tomomanyeti, goika oyerente bwoo ebeere aroro goika oria omino ache koyerigia, erio omoyee." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Naboigo orakore koranyore etigere yaye, gose eanga yaye, gose gento kende gionsi ki’oyomino gesirete; aye kogokenyora tobaisa koombia tomogekonyera." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Koranyore etigere y’oyomino yagure inse agwo ase enchera, gose eng’ombe yaye, tobaisa koombia oyetige aroro; goika oyegororokie etenene." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Omokungu tabaisa kobeka chianga chi’omosacha, gose omosacha tabaisa kobeka echi’omokungu. Onde bwensi orakore bo, nigo arakore ayare okogechia ase Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Kerabe ng’a kwanyorire egeswa ki’enyoni kere igoro ase omote, gose inse ase riroba, na onyore enyoni eng’ina eraire igoro ase amage aye, gose ase amagena, tobaisa koira enyoni eria amo namage aye." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Oire amage oka, korende eng’ina ero oyetige eiruruke egende. Korakore igo nebe buya asore, naende nobe moyo ase engaki entambe." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Ekero okoagacha enyomba enyia, goika oagache egetango ase ekerama insinyo, erio nario omonto atagwe korwao akwe; okomocha kw’ogokwa kw’omonto oragwe korwao tigokobarerwa enyomba yao." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Tobaisa gosimeka chimbusuro chi’ebisaku bibere ase omogondo oo bw’emesabibu; oise gokora bo okwama kwao gwonsi ogw’echio gwasimegete amo nokw’emesabibu nigo korairwe kobe ogw’Aase Aachenu. 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Gokorema, tobaisa gosiberania eng’ombe na etigere ching’use obokombe amo." 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Tobaisa kobeka eanga eroiseranirie chiusi chi’amarionya na echi’egatani amo. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Okore amasugunia, oyabeke ase emego ene y’eganchwa yao entambe, eria okwambara." 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Nenyare koba ng’a omonto onyuomire omokungu bamenyane, na nyuma y’ayio amwange," 
Deuteronomy22:14 amosoere ase amang’ana ’obonyaka, erio asarie erieta riaye, ogoteba: Nigo naira omokungu oyo, na ekero naba nere tindochi ebimanyererio bi’obwekungi bwaye." 
Deuteronomy22:15 “Onye naboigo, ise na ng’ina omoiseke oria bamoire ase abagaaka b’omochie oria, ase bakogambera agwo ase egeita, babarentere ebimanyererio bi’obwekungi bw’omoiseke oria." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Ise omoiseke oria akwane nabagaaka baria, abatebie: Naa omonto oyo omoiseke one abe mokaye, na bono ere omwangire." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Boigo osoeire omoiseke oyo one na omorenteire obosooku ogoteba ng’a tarochi ebimanyererio bi’obwekungi bwaye. Korende rora aa, egetambaa eke nkebwate ebimanyererio bi’obwekungi bwaye. Erio barambore egetambaa keria ase amaiso ’abagaaka b’omochie oria." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Erio abagaaka b’omochie oria babwate omosacha oria, bamoake ebiranya." 
Deuteronomy22:19 Naende bamonachere aakane, chibesa, chisekeli chie chifeta rigana erimo, amoe ise omoiseke oria, ekiagera osaririe erieta ri’omoiseke omwekungi bw’Abaisraeli. Erio oria agenderere koba mokaye, na omosacha oye tabaisa komotiga nonya ng’ake ase obogima bwaye bwonsi." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Korende kerabe ng’a namaene ebimanyererio bi’obwekungi bw’omoiseke oria tibirorekaneti," 
Deuteronomy22:21 rirorio bamorente ase egesieri ki’enyomba ya ise, na abanto b’omochie bw’omoiseke oria bamoake amagena akwe, ekiagera orentire obosooku ase egati y’Abaisraeli ase ogokora obonyaka ekero atarasoka. Goika morusie obobe borue asemore." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Omonto omosacha aise konyorekana oraire nomokungu bw’omonto onde, bonsi babere, omosacha oria amo nomokungu oria, goika baitwe bakwe. Goika morusie obobe borue ase Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Omoiseke omwekungi oriereirwe boko nomonto, karaumerane nomosacha omoao agwo ase omochie, na omosacha oyio abe nere," 
Deuteronomy22:24 mobasokie bonsi babere, mobaire isiko y’egeita ki’omochie, erio mobaake amagena bakwe. Omoiseke oria aitwe, ekiagera atakuurete akonywe, nonya orenge ase omochie ime, na omosacha oria, ekiagera atomana nomoiseke oriereirwe boko nomonto omoao. Goika morusie obobe borue asemore." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Korende omonto karaumerane nomoiseke omwekungi oriereirwe boko nomonto omoao amobwate ne chinguru abe nere agwo ase orosana isiko y’omochie, omonto oria nere bweka oraitwe akwe." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Timokorera omoiseke oria ing’ana rinde; ere takorete okomocha kogwenerete aitwe, ekiagera amang’ana ayio nigo anga buna ekero omonto akorwania omonto onde omoao na komoita moeneno." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Omonto oyio nigo amonyorete agwo ase orosana, akamorwania ne chinguru. Nonya omoiseke oria okuurete akonywe, monto onde tarengeo okomokonya." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Omonto karaumerane nomoiseke omwekungi otararierwa boko, na komobwata ne chinguru, abe nere, nabarabwo babere banyorwe," 
Deuteronomy22:29 rirorio omonto oria naae ise omoiseke oria chibesa, chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etano, atwaare omoiseke oria abe mokaye, ekiagera omosareirie obwekungi bwaye; takoba neribaga komotiga ase obogima bwaye bwonsi." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Omonto tabaisa korara na moga ise, abaise korentera ise obosooku." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Omosacha ogombairie, gose ekiimo kiaye ki’obosacha kebutogete, tabaisa gosoa ase omosangererekano bw’Omonene." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Ekerentane, gose omonto bw’ororeria rwaye, nonya ngoika ekiaare gia ikomi, tabaisa gosoa ase omosangererekano bw’Omonene." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Abaamori, gose Abamoabu, gose ororeria rwabo, nonya ngoika ekiaare gia ikomi, tibabaisa gosoa ase omosangererekano bw’Omonene nonya ng’ake." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Barabwo tibabarototete na kobarentera endagera na amache ekero mwarenge ase orogendo korwa Misiri, naende nigo barangeretie Baalamu, mosinto o Beori, korwa Petori ya Mesopotamia achiche kobaragereria inwe." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Nonya naboigo Omonene, Nyasae oino, taigwerete Baalamu, korende akaonchora okoragereria koria gokaba ogosesenigwa asemore, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo abanchete." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Ase amatuko aino onsi more moyo, timobaisa kobarigeria omorembe, gose ogosesenigwa." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Timobaisa gochaya Abaedomu, barabwo nabanto bamino; gose timobaisa gochaya Abamisiri, ekiagera inwe agwo kare nao mwarenge abamenyi ase ense yabo." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Abanto b’ekiaare kia gatato ase ororeria rwabo, bancherwe basoe ase omosangererekano bw’Omonene." 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Ekero morabe mokogenda korwania ababisa baino, na momenyete ase egetwori, mwerende mono korwa ase kera egento getachenegeti." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Onye omonto ase egati yaino obeire oyotachenegeti ase ogosokia embusuro yaye y’oroiboro botuko, oyio asoke gochia isiko y’egetwori; tabaisa gosoa ime aroro." 
Deuteronomy23:11 “Ekero kia mogoroba, esibie omobere namache, na ekero bwairiire kegima asoe ase egetwori." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Mochore aase isiko y’ebitwori ase mogochia gwekonyera. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Mobe mokoimokia chinyimbo amo nebirwanero biaino; ekero mogochia rosana agwo isiko y’ebitwori, mokunye chingoro ne chinyimbo chiria, na ekero mwekonyire motube obonyira namaroba." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Ebitwori biaino goika bibe ebichenu, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo agotaara ase ebitwori biaino, erinde abakonye, na abeke ababisa baino ase amaboko aino. Omonene tabaisa korora obonyinyeru asemore; aise koborora, nigo arabatige." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Onye omosomba otamire korwa ase omonene oye, ochire asemore, timobaisa komoirania gochia ase omonene oye naende." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Motige amenye amo nainwe ase omochie arachore, oyio oramogokie agwo ase emechie yaino. Timobaisa komokorera bobe." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Onde taba ase Abaisraeli, omokungu gose omosacha, okwebeka ase obonyaka bwe chihekalu." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Timobaisa korenta ase enyomba y’Omonene, Nyasae oino, chibesa chikonyorekana korwa ase obonyaka bw’abakungu, gose obw’abasacha banga buna chisese, ase ogoikerania chiira. Chibesa chikonyorekana korwa ase chinchera echio nigo chire okogechia ase Omonene, Nyasae oino."
