Deuteronomy23:19 “Ekero okoa omonto bw’egesaku kiao chibesa singo, gose endagera, gose gento kende gionsi, tobaisa komoboria ebitoki ekero agokoiraneria egento keria airete singo." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Nonyare gosaba ebitoki korwa ase omonto omomenyi kwaete singo, korende tari korwa ase omonto omino Omoisraeli. Koraigwere amang’ana ayio, rirorio Omonene Nyasae oino, nagosesenie ase ense eria mogochia koira ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Ekero okoria eira ase Omonene, Nyasae oo, goika oikeranie eira eyio. Otayeikeraneti nigo Omonene arakobarere ebibe ebio." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Korende koratige koria eira, tokobarerwa ebibe ase ayio." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Orende mono, oikeranie egento gwakwanete nomonwa oo, ekiagera nigo kwariete eira y’ogwancha ase Omonene, Nyasae oo." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Ekero ogoeta ase omogondo bw’emesabibu bw’omogisangio oo norie amatunda ’emesabibu goika oigote, korende totwa nonya nerimo obeke ase esaro yao na koriira." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Ekero orabe kogoeta ase omogondo bw’omogisangio oo ore nendagera eteneine, notabore ebigara nokoboko kwao obunge otakune chinyeke, korende tobaisa kogesa nomoyio oo ore enkuro endagera yaye eteneine." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Nenyare koba ng’a omonto onyuomire omokungu, na nyuma y’ayio amwange, ekiagera anyorire ring’ana asare ritamogogeti. Erio amorikere rirube ri’ogotigana nere, ae omokungu oria na komoseria korwa bwoye." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Naende nenyare koba ng’a omokungu oyio gatigire omosacha oria, agende anyuomwe nomosacha omoao," 
Deuteronomy24:3 na oyo nere amwange, amorikere rirube ri’ogotigana, amoserie korwa bwoye, gose omosacha oyio o kabere akwe." 
Deuteronomy24:4 Ase amang’ana ayio onsi, omosacha oria bwe ritang’ani omoseretie, tabaisa komoirania gocha bwoye abe mokaye naende, ekiagera omokungu oria obeire oyotachenegeti; okwo nigo kore okogechia ase obosio bw’Omonene, nainwe timobaisa korenta okomocha kobe ase ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe omwando oino." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Onye omonto onyuomire omokungu tagenda ase esegi amo nabarwani bande, gose taegwa emeremo ende yonsi akorere egesaku, korende nigo araegwe ribaga abeere nka bwoye ase omwaka oyomo kogokia mokaye." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Onye omonto okoa omonto onde egento singo, taira orogena gose ensio bibe intenenera, ekiagera igo nobogima bwaye akoira bobe intenenera." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Omonto karanyorekane oibire Omoisraeli omwabo amokore buna omosomba, gose amoonie, omoibi oria goika aitwe akwe. Goika morusie obobe korwa asemore." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Mwerende mono ekero mwarwarire oborwaire bwa ukoma, mokore buna abakuani Abalawi barabatebie." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Ayio onsi inche nabachigete ng’a babatebie, goika moyakore. Inyora aya Omonene, Nyasae oino, akorerete Miriamu ekero mwarenge ase orogendo rwaino korwa Misiri." 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Ekero okoa omogisangio oo egento kende gionsi singo, tobaisa gosoa ase enyomba yaye koira egento keria abekire kebe intenenera." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Aye otenene isiko y’enyomba yaye, nere akorentere egento abeka koba intenenera." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Onye omonto oria nomotaka, tobaisa kogenda korara negento keria kiaye kere bwoo." 
Deuteronomy24:13 “Ekero bogochia koira omoiranerie egetambaa akwambara erinde ebisie, nario aragosesenie, na igo gwakorire ayare boronge ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oo." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Tobaisa gokorera bobe omonto omorikwa ore omotaka na oremeire, karabe omonto omino Omoisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase ense yaino." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Rituko riria akorete emeremo, omoe eng’eria yaye ritang’ani erioba ritaragwa, ekiagera ere nomotaka, nigo asemeretie konyora eng’eria yaye. Onye tokomoakana nigo arabaise korera ase Omonene igoro yao, naende ayio nigo arabe ebibe asore." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Abaibori tibagoitwa ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abana babo, gose abana tibagoitwa ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abaibori babo; korende kera omonto nigo araitwe ase engencho y’ebibe biaye omonyene." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Tobaisa korina omonto omomenyi, gose entakana, oboronge bwaye, na toira eanga y’omoboraka ebe intenenera." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Korende moinyore ing’a nainwe mwarenge abasomba ase ense ya Misiri, korende Omonene, Nyasae oino, akababooria korwa aroro; ase ayio nabachikire mobwatie amang’ana ayio." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Ekero mokogesa chindagera chi’emegondo yaino, na mwebe omosaima bw’endagera mogondo, timobaisa koirana gochia koywoyia, korende moyotige obe oyo bw’omonto omomenyi omenyete asemore, gose oyo bwe chintakana, na ababoraka, erio nario Omonene, Nyasae oino, arasesenie emeremo yaino yonsi mogokora." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Ekero mwatorire amazeituni aino, timoirana naende gosangereria ase chinsagia aya mwamochete gotora. Moyatigere abamenyi, ne chintakana, na ababoraka." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Ekero mwatorire amasabibu aino, timoirana naende gochia gosangereria ayatigaire, korende moyatigere abamenyi, ne chintakana, na ababoraka." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Inyora ng’a inwe nigo mwarenge abasomba ase ense ya Misiri; ase ayio nabachikire mobwatie amang’ana ayio. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Onye abanto babere babwate eriomana ase egati yabo, rirorio bagende ase ekegambero, erio abagambi bagambe ekina ekio, na oyio ore noboronge aegwe oboronge bwaye, na oria ore nokomocha abarerwe okomocha kwaye." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Kerabe ng’a oria omomochi nigo agwenerete goakwa ebiranya, omogambi oria amochike aramame inse agwo ase obosio bwaye na goakwa ebiranya koreng’ana buna okomocha kwaye kore." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Omonto oyio aakwe ebiranya emerongo ene, korende tari goetania ebio; aise kogenderera goakwa goetania, nigo arasookigwe ase obosio bwao. Takoegwa ogoakwa goetania okwo gochikire." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Tobaisa kobekera eng’ombe ekeokio ekero ekoora endagera. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Onye abamura babere ba ise omo bamenyete aase aamo, na oyomo akwe, nere tabwate omwana, omokungu bw’omonto oria takonyuomwa nomonto bw’eamate eng’ao, korende omomura omwabo omosacha oye nere oratware omokungu oria abe ribaga ria momura omwabo." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Omwana omoisia omotangi omokungu oria araibore, arokwe erieta ri’oyomwabo ise oria okwete. Erio nario erieta riaye ritabaise gosira korwa ase Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Korende onye omonto oria okwanga gotwara moka momura omwabo, rirorio omokungu oria agende ase abagaaka bare agwo ase egeita ki’omochie, akwane amang’ana aya: Omomura omwabo omosacha one bwangire goteneneria oyomwabo egesaku, erinde erieta riaye tirisira korwa ase Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy25:8 “Erio abagaaka baria b’omochie barangerie omonto oria, bakwane nere, na karagenderere gokana ng’a tatageti gotwara omokungu oria," 
Deuteronomy25:9 erio omokungu oria omoboraka aike ang’e ase omomura oria omwabo omosacha oye, asomore egekoroto korwa ase okogoro kw’omonto oria agwo ase amasio ’abagaaka, naende amotwere amate ase obosio bwaye, akwane: Nabo arakorwe omonto onde bwensi okwanga goteneneria omomura omwabo egesaku." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Eamate y’omonto oyio emanyekane ase Abaisraeli, buna eamate y’omonto oyio osomoretwe egekoroto korwa ase okogoro kwaye." 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Ekero abasacha babere bakorwana, na omokungu bw’omosacha oyomo achiche gokonya omosacha oye, na omokungu oria arambore okoboko abwate ekiimo ki’obosacha ki’omonto oria onde," 
Deuteronomy25:12 timororera omokungu oria amabera; goika mobutore okoboko kwaye. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Timobaisa koba nebirengo bibere ase chisaro chiaino, ekemo ekenene na ekende egeke." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Timobaisa gotwara ebimunu bikorenga bibere ase chinyomba chiaino, ekemo ekenene, na ekende egeke." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Mokorere ebirengo bi’ekeene, naende ebiisaine bi’okomanya oborito na obonge; erio nario amatuko aino arabe amange ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Abanto bonsi bagokora oborianania buna obwo, nigo bare okogechia ase Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Moinyore aya Abaameleki babakorerete ekero mwarenge ase orogendo korwa Misiri. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Barabwo tibamoirogete Nyasae. Ase ayio bagacha, bakabarwania na goita abanto abatigarete nyuma konya bagoyire na korosa." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ase ayio, nebe ekero Omonene, Nyasae oino, abaeire ense eria ebe omwando oino, naende ekero abaeire obotoereru korwa ase ababisa baino bonsi babaetanaine, goika mosirie Abaameleki bonsi, tibainyorwa nonya ng’ake inse y’erioba. Timobaisa kweba amang’ana ayio." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Ekero morabe mwaikire ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe omwando oino, na komenyao," 
Deuteronomy26:2 kera oyomo oino, arusie ogotongora gw’okwama kw’endagera aragese korwa ase omogondo bw’ense eria. Erio ayebeke ase egetonga ime, ayeire goika aase aria Omonene, Nyasae oino, arachore abe obomenyo bw’erieta riaye." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Agende ase omokuani oyo otenenerete ase engaki eyio, amotebie: Ase rituko ria rero naorokirie ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, ng’a naikire ase ense eye Omonene arierete chisokoro chiaito eira ng’a natoyee." 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Erio omokuani arusie egetonga keria korwa ase okoboko kwao akebeke bosio bw’egesasimero ki’Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Oiranerie amang’ana aya okwane ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oo: Sokororia yane nigo arenge Omoaramu, orenge okona‐koong’anyang’anya. Agatirimboka gochia Misiri, akaba omomenyi aroro amo nabanto baye. Ekero agendete ase ense eria nigo abwate abanto abake, na aroro agwo bakabucha, bakaba egesaku ekenene, kiarenge nechinguru, naende kiarenge nabanto abange." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Abamisiri bagatokora bobe, bakaba bagotochanda na gotokoria emeremo emekong’u." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Erio tokarera ase Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito, atokonye, nere agatoigwa, akarora emechando yaito, na emeremo emekong’u twarenge gokora, na ogokorerwa bobe gwaito." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Omonene agatorusia ase ense ya Misiri nokoboko kwaye kore nechinguru koramboire, na ase okoondokia okonene na ebikone na amakumia." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Agatorenta ase ense eye entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, agatoyea." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Bono rora, narentire ogotongora gwe chindagera chiamire ase riroba ri’ense eye Omonene atoeire. “Erio obeke egetonga keria inse ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oo, na osasime agwo ase obosio bwaye." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Ogokere ebinto bionsi ebio Omonene, Nyasae oo, akoeire, aye amo neamate yao; boigo Abalawi, na abamenyi bamenyete ase egati yaino bagoke amo naye." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Ase omwaka o gatato orue ensemo ya ikomi y’okwama kwao gwe chindagera ase Abalawi, na abamenyi, ne chintakana, na ababoraka, erinde barabwo banyore chindagera chibaisaine barariere agwo ase emechie yaino." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Erio okwane amang’ana aya ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oo, omotebie: Narusirie korwa ase enyomba yane ebinto biatananetwe bibe ebichenu, nabieire Abalawi, na abamenyi, ne chintakana, na ababoraka. Nakorire buna gwanchigete. Tinsareti gose tinyebeti ogochika konde kwao." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Tinariete ensemo eria ya ikomi ase omoichano, gose tinarusetie korwa ase ensemo eria ekero narenge ntachenegeti gose tinaruete ensemo ende yonsi ya ikomi ase engencho y’abakure. Nabeire ngokoigwera aye Omonene, Nyasae one; nakorire amang’ana aria onsi gwanchigete." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Korwa agwo igoro, ase Obomenyo bwao Obochenu bore, origererie, erinde otorore inse aa; osesenie abanto bao Abaisraeli, osesenie na ense eye gwatoeire buna kwarierete chisokoro chiaito eira, ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke." 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Rituko ria rero Omonene, Nyasae oo, ogochikire oigwere na kobwata amachiko aya na emeroberio echikire. Ase ayio oyarende mono na koyakora nenkoro yao yonsi, na omoyo oo bwonsi." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Rituko ria rero kwaorokirie ng’a Omonene nere Nyasae oo, naende ng’a nobwatie chinchera chiaye chionsi na kobwata emeroberio yaye echikire, na amachiko aye, na aya onsi achikire, naende ng’a nomoigwere." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Omonene nere okwanire rituko ria rero ng’a inwe nabanto baye omonyene b’ekeene, buna abarierete eira, naende obachikire ng’a morende na kobwata amachiko aye onsi." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Nabakore mobe abanene igoro ase ebisaku bionsi biria atongete; nabakore momanyekane ase ogotogigwa okuya na ogosikwa, nainwe namobe abanto bare abachenu ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, buna atebire.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Musa, ekero arenge nabagaaka b’Abaisraeli, agachika abanto akabatebia, “Mobwate amachiko onsi aya nabachikire rituko ria rero." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Ase rituko riria moramboke gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan, na ekero moraike ase ense eria. Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa, motenenie amagena amanene, moyaoomeranie." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Erio morike ase amagena ayio amang’ana onsi ay’ogochika oko. Ekero morabe mwambokire gochia ng’umbu na gosoa ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa, ense eria entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, buna Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, abarierete eira ng’a nabayee," 
Deuteronomy27:4 na komwaikire aroro ng’umbu, motenenie amagena aria ase egetunwa ki’Ebali, buna nabachikire rituko ria rero, erio moyaoomeranie." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Aroro agwo moaagachere Omonene, Nyasae oino, egesasimero ki’amagena. Timobaisa gokorera emeremo na gekorero kende gionsi gi’ekioma." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Egesasimero keria ki’Omonene, Nyasae oino, mokeagachere amagena atabaachiri; na igoro yaye momoruere ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa," 
Deuteronomy27:7 morue na ebing’wanso bi’omorembe, mobiriereo na mogoke ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Ase amagena ayio morike amang’ana onsi ay’ogochika oko, arorekane buya kegima.”" 
Deuteronomy27:9 Musa na abakuani Abalawi bagakwana n’Abaisraeli bonsi, bakabatebia, “Inwe Abaisraeli, tegerera, moigwe! Rituko ria rero inwe mwabeire abanto b’Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ase ayio moigwere Omonene, Nyasae oino, mobwate amachiko aye, na emeroberio yaye echikire, ayio inche nkobaa rituko ria rero.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Musa agachika abanto ase rituko erio erio, agakwana," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Ekero morabe mwambokire gochia ng’umbu ya Yorodan, Abasimeoni, na Abalawi, na Abayuda, na Abaisakaru, na Abayusufu, na Ababenjamin, batenene igoro ase egetunwa kia Gerisimu, basesenie abanto." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Na Abareuben na Abagadi, na Abaaseri, na Abasabuloni, na Abadani, na Abanafutali batenene igoro ase egetunwa ki’Ebali baragererie abanto." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Na Abalawi bakwane amang’ana aya neriogi rinene, erinde Abaisraeli bonsi bayaigwe:" 
Deuteronomy27:15 “Aragererigwe omonto oyoraroisie omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa, koyotenenia na koyosasima bobisi, korabe omogwekano obaachire, gose oyo bw’ebioma binyititoire na kobombwa, eyere emeremo y’omoroisia omong’aini. Okwo nokogechia ase Omonene. “Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Aragererigwe omonto ogochaya ise gose ng’ina. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:17 Aragererigwe omonto ogotumana orobebe rw’omogisangio oye. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Aragererigwe omonto ogotantania omonto omouko na komosiria enchera. “Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe:” “Amina.”" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Aragererigwe omonto okorina omomenyi, gose entakana, gose omoboraka, oboronge bwaye. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Aragererigwe omonto orarare na moga ise, ekiagera ayio nokorentera ise obosooku. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Aragererigwe omonto orarare neng’iti ende yonsi. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:22 Aragererigwe omonto orarare nomoiseke omwabo, omoiseke o ise, gose oyo o ng’ina. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Aragererigwe omonto orarare na ng’ina biara. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:24 Aragererigwe omonto oraite omonto onde bobisi. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina." 
Deuteronomy27:25 Aragererigwe omonto oraegwe riaaki, erinde agende goita omonto otari na komocha. Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe: Amina.”" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Aragererigwe omonto otari kobwata amang’ana onsi ay’ogochika oko, na koyakora.” “Abanto bonsi bairanerie, batebe:” “Amina.”" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Komoramoigwere Omonene, Nyasae oino, erinde morende na kobwata amachiko aye onsi inche nabachikire ase rituko ria rero, Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabakore mobe abanene kobua ebisaku bionsi bire ase ense." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Komoraigwere eriogi ri’ Omonene, Nyasae oino, rirorio nabae ogosesenigwa oko gwonsi kobe okwaino:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Imosesenigwe ase emechie yaino na ase emegondo yaino. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Ndosesenigwe oroiboro rwe chinda chiaino, amo nokwama kwaino kwe riroba, na okobiara gwe chitugo chiaino nachio chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chimbori." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Nesesenigwe endagera y’ebitonga biaino amo ney’ebituba biaino mogo konyera obosie. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Imosesenigwe ekero mogosoa inka, na ekero mokogenda isiko." 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Omonene natige ababisa baino, baria bagocha kobarwania, babugwe ase amasio aino. Barabwo mbabachere baetere ase enchera eyemo ekero bagocha kobarwania, korende mbatame korwa asemore baetere chinchera isano na ibere." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Omonene nachike ogosesenia kwaye gocha asemore, ase ebiage biaino, na ase emeremo yonsi mogokora; nabasesenie ase ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, agochia kobaa ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Kamorarende na kobwata amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, na gotaara ase chinchera chiaye, nabaimokererie igoro mobe abanto abachenu asare, buna abariereire eira na gotiana." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Abanto bonsi b’ense mbabarore mogwatorwa ase erieta riaye, erio babairoke." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Omonene nabae obotenenku, nabuchie oroiboro rwe chinda chiaino, nabuchie ne chitugo chiaino, naende nabae okwama okonge kwe riroba agwo ase ense eria arierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nabayee inwe." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Nabakunorere emonga yaye engiya ere igoro, na abatwerie embura ase ense yaino ase chingaki chiganeirie. Nasesenie emeremo yaino yonsi mogokora, erinde monyare koa abanto b’ebisaku ebinge ebinto singo. Korende inwe timokoremerwa, erinde mochie gosaba singo." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Komoraigwere amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ayio nkobaa rituko ria rero, na mobe abegenwa ase okoyakora, nabakore mobe ab’omotwe, gose tari ab’ekemincha. Nabakore mogenderere gokina, gose timokogenderera gokeeigwa gochia inse." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Ayio nigo arakoreke onye timokoonchoka aande, gochia ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee, timotiga nonya ne ring’ana erimo ri’ayio nabaeire ase rituko ria rero, erinde mogende gosasima chinyasae ching’ao na gochikorera." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Korende onye timokoigwera Omonene, Nyasae oino, gose onye timokoba abegenwa na gokora amachiko aye onsi, na emeroberio yaye echikire, ayio inche nabaeire ase rituko ria rero, rirorio okoragererigwa oko gwonsi nagoche asemore na kobanyore:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Imoragererigwe ase emechie yaino, na ase emegondo yaino." 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Neragererigwe endagera y’ebitonga biaino amo nebituba biaino mogokonyera obosie. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Ndoragererigwe oroiboro rwe chinda chiaino amo nokwama kwaino kwe riroba, na okobiara gwe chiombe chiaino, na ogwe ching’ondi ne chimbori chiaino." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Imoragererigwe ekero mogosoa inka, na ekero mokogenda isiko." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Omonene nabarentere okoragererigwa, na obotantanu, na emechando ase emeremo yaino yonsi mogokora, goika mosirigwe na koera bwango ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino okobe, na ekiagera mwantigire inche." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Nabarentere amarwaire agoita akobabwatia, na inwe mosire korwa ase ense eria mogochia gosoa na koyeira ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Nabaake noborwaire borakoore obogima, na obw’esosera, na obw’okobimbia omobere; narente riberera ri’egurugura entindi, na oborwaire bw’enyagetabo ase chindagera, na obw’okorigisia chindagera chiaino. Amaakwa ayio nababwatie goika abasirie kegima." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Igoro nekong’e pa, ebe buna etaai, embura tetwa, riroba ri’ense riome rikong’e pa, ribe buna ekioma." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Ribaga ri’embura egotwa ase riroba riaino, Omonene narente ebuse na omokenye bibatwere korwa igoro na kobasiria kegima." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Omonene nae ababisa baino ribaga bababue. Namoetere enchera eyemo ekero mokogenda kobarwania, korende motame korwa asebare, moetere chinchera isano na ibere. Amagambi onsi are ase ense nakumie na kwoboa ase amang’ana arabanyore inwe." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Emebere yaino ekw ete nebe endagera ye chinyoni chia igoro, na eye ching’iti chi’orosana, na onde tari orachiserie achioboyie." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Omonene nabarentere inwe amagumba buna aria arenterete Abamisiri, nabarentere namasisa, na okweagia, amarwaire ayio atanyare kogwenigwa." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Nabakore mobe chibarimo, na emeuko, na omwochogano bw’ebirengererio." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Ekero kia mobaso inamotaba‐tabe buna emeuko egotabataba ase omosunte, timokonyara korora enchera. Timogosesenigwa ase emeremo ende yonsi morabe mogokora. Namobe mogochandwa na kourwa ebinto biaino botambe, na onde tari orabakonye." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Nebe kwariereire omoiseke boko, na omonto omoao amoire arare nere: noagache enyomba, korende tokoyemenya. Nosimeke emesabibu ase omogondo oo, korende tokoria amasabibu korwao." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Chiombe chiaino nachinyenyerwe ase amaiso aino, korende timokoria chinyama chiabo. Namourwe chitigere chiaino ne chinguru ekero morigereretie, na tichikoiranigwa asemore naende. Ababisa baino mbaegwe ching’ondi chiaino, na onde tari orabakonye inwe." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, inabairwe nabanto b’egesaku ekeao ekero morigereretie, erio mobe mochandegete, ne rituko ase rituko mobe namaiga ase abana baino, korende timokonyara gotanga tibairwa." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Abanto b’egesaku motamanyeti nabarie okwama kwe riroba riaino, na baire ebinto mwabeire mogochandekera; barabwo mbabakorere bobe, babachande botambe." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Komorarore aya onsi, nigo morasareke ase ebirengererio biaino, mobe buna chiosi." 
Deuteronomy28:35 Omonene nabaake moriegwe namagumba amabe ase amaru aino na ase amagoro aino, ee amagumba ayio natuboke korwa chimbaratero chiaino goika emetwe yaino igoro, nainwe timokogwena." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Omonene nabaire inwe amo nomoruoti oyio oino morechorere, ababeke inse y’egesaku kende ekeao, eke inwe motamanyete, gose chisokoro chiaino. Aroro agwo inamokorere chinyasae ching’ao chiroisirie korwa ase emete na amagena." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ase egati y’abanto b’ense eyio ase Omonene arabasiarere gochia, inwe mobe ab’ogoichanerwa, mobe omorabaaro na gokwanwa bobe nabanto abwo." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Namosimeke chimbusuro chinyinge ase emegondo, korende mogese endagera ensinini, ekiagera chingige nachirie chindagera chiaino." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Inamosimeke emesabibu ase emegondo na gokora emeremo aroro, korende timokonywa edivai, gose koria amasabibu korwao, ekiagera amakonde nigo arasoe arie yonsi." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Inamosimeke emezeituni ase orogongo rwaino rwonsi, korende timokweaka amaguta aye, ekiagera amazeituni nigo araaroroke atarama." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Nigo moraibore abana, abamura na abaiseke, korende tibakoba abaino, mbooswe bairwe ase obosomba." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Chingige nchirie emete yaino morasimeke, na okwama kwaino kwe riroba." 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Abamenyi bamenyete ase egati yaino mbabe abanene kobabua, korende inwe mogenderere gokea mobe inse asebare." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Barabwo mbabe nebinto ebinge barabae inwe singo, korende inwe nigo moraremerwe, timokoba nebinto morabae singo. Barabwo mbabe ab’omotwe, na inwe mobe ab’ekemincha." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Okoragererigwa okwo gwonsi nagoche asemore na kobabwatia goika kobasirie kegima, ekiagera motaigwerete Omonene, Nyasae oino, na kobwata amachiko aye, na emeroberio yaye echikire, ayio abaete." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Okwo nigo korabe ekemanyererio na ogokumia igoro asemore, na ase chinderia chiaino kogenderera botambe." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo abasesenetie, akabaa ebinto ebinge, na ebinto ebio bikagera timwamokorera nomogoko bwe chinkoro chiaino." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Ase ayio namobakorere ababisa baino, abwo Omonene aratome gocha kobarwania; inamobe nenchara, na erang’o y’amache, namobe gesobono, naende namoremerwe ebinto bionsi. Nabeke rikorogoto ri’ekioma igoro ase ebigoti biaino goika abasirie kegima." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Omonene narente egesaku ekeao geche kobarwania korwa aare, korwa ensinyo y’ense, ekere ekiango gekoiruruka buna ekeongo, ekio motamanyete omonwa obo." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Abanto b’egesaku eke babwate amasio obotindi; babe batari koraara omonto omogotu gose kororera abanto abake amabera. 
Deuteronomy28:51 Barabwo mbarie chimori chie chiombe chiaino, na okwama kwe riroba riaino, goika mosirigwe kegima. Tibakobatigareria endagera yaino, gose edivai, gose amaguta, gose chimori chie chiombe chiaino, gose chimanwa chie ching’ondi na echie chimbori chiaino; nabagere mosire kegima." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Barabwo nigo barabamige mono ase emechie yaino yonsi, babarwanie goika chindwaki chiaino chintambe, echio morabe mosemeretie, chigwe inse agwo ase ense yaino yonsi; ee, mbabamige ase emechie yaino yonsi ase ense eria Omonene, Nyasae oino, abaeire." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Ekero ababisa baino barabamige na kobasiongorokana, nigo morabe nemechando emenene, goika morie emebere y’abana baino, baria Omonene, Nyasae oino, abaeire." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Omonto ore omwororo mono, naende ore bw’enyomba y’amasikani ase egati yaino nabe ne ribero rinene ri’endagera, arine momura omwabo, na mokaye oria anchete, na abana baye batigarete bare moyo." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Takobaa enyama y’emebere y’abanto baye eyio akoria ere omonyene, ekiagera tabwati kende kiamotigareire. Emechando buna eyio nero ababisa baino barabarentere ekero barasiongorokane emechie yaino yonsi." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Omokungu ore omwereria mono naende ore bw’enyomba y’amasikani ase egati yaino, oria otarenge konyara gotacha inse namagoro aye agende aande, ekiagera igo are omwereria narorere omosacha oye anchete mono ribero, narorere nabana baye, abamura na abaiseke, ribero boigo." 
Deuteronomy28:57 Ekero akoibora nigo arabarine nonya nomogoye okorwa ase enda yaye, na abana akoibora. Ere omonyene nayorie bobisi, ekiagera oborirwe ebinto akoria. Emechando eyio nero ababisa baino barabarentere ekero barasiongorokane emechie yaino yonsi." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Onye timokoba abegenwa na gokora amang’ana aya onsi ay’ogochika oko, ayio arikire ase ebuku eye, erinde moiroke erieta eri ri’obonene na erigwenerete koirokwa: Omonene, Nyasae oino," 
Deuteronomy28:59 rirorio Omonene narente asemore, na igoro ase abana baino, amaakwa are amanene na amatindi aragenderere ase engaki entambe." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Naende abarentere amarwaire onsi buna aria arenterete Abamisiri, ayio moirogete, naro nagenderere kobeera asemore." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Omonene nabarentere amarwaire ao ao, na emechando eyio etarikiri ase ebuku eye y’amachiko, goika inwe mosirigwe kegima." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Nonya more abange buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro, namosirigwe motigare more abake mono, ekiagera motaigwerete Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Nigo erabe ng’a buna Omonene agogetigwe ase okobakorera amaya, akagera mokamentekana ase enchera buna eyio, naboigo agochia kogokigwa ase okorenta ogosirigwa asemore na kobaseria kegima, nainwe morusigweo, moere kegima korwa ase ense eria mogochia koira ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Omonene nabasiarere gochia ase egati y’ebisaku ebinge, korwa ensinyo eyemo y’ense goika eyende. Agwo namokorere chinyasae ching’ao chiroisirie korwa ase emete na amagena, echio inwe motamanyete, nonya ne chisokoro chiaino." 
Deuteronomy28:65 “Ekero morabe more ase egati y’ebisaku ebio timokonyora obotoereru, gose amagoro aino takonyora aase agotimokera; korende aroro agwo Omonene nabae chinkoro chi’obwoba, na amasio agosunkera naende mobe nobogima bochandegete bw’okwerusia moyo." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Omobaso na obotuko namobe nobwoba, na obogima bwaino nabobe ase emechando; inwe timogosemeria okoba kw’obogima bwaino ng’a mbogenderere." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ase engencho y’omoondoko bwe chinkoro chirabe nobwoba, na ase amakumia ay’okoirokia, na ase aya morarore namaiso aino, nigo mora tebe ase engaki ya mambia: Naki yare koba buya onye yaba mogoroba, na ase engaki ya mogoroba motebe: Naki yare koba buya onye yaba mambia." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Omonene nabatige moriine chimeeri moirane gochia Misiri, orogendo orwo inche nabatebetie ng’a timokorogenda naende. Ekero morabe mwaikireo, ase okoremerwa kwaino namwerue inwe abanyene, morigie kweoonia ase ababisa baino mobe abasomba babo, abasacha na abakungu, korende ekero morabe mokwerwa igo, omonto tagotoka orabagore.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Aya naro amang’ana ’okobwatana kw’ogotianania Omonene achigete Musa akore n’Abaisraeli agwo ase ense ya Moabu. Okobwatana okwo nigo kwamentetwe ase koria Omonene konya akorire amo nabarabwo aria Horebu. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Musa agasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi amo, akabatebia, “Mwaroche namaiso aino amang’ana aya Omonene akorete ase ense ya Misiri, na buna akorete Farao amo nabanene b’ense yaye, na ense yaye yonsi." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Boigo mwaroche namaiso aino amaakwa aria amanene, na ebikone, na amakumia amanene;" 
Deuteronomy29:4 korende goika rituko ria rero Omonene taraigora ebirengererio biaino, erinde monyare komanya buya; gose tarabaa amaiso akorora buya, gose amato akoigwa buya" 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ase engaki yonsi y’emiaka emerongo ene Omonene abete okobaraa ase erooro. Chianga chiaino tichiabagoterete, gose ebikoroto biaino tibiabagoterete." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Timwabete mokoria omogati, gose konywa edivai, gose ekenyugwa kende gionsi kegotindia, erio nario moranyare komanya ng’a ere nere Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ekero twachete aase aa, Sihoni omoruoti o Hesiboni, na Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, bagacha gotorwania esegi, korende tokababua." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Tokaira ense yabo, tokayea abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ab’ekia Gadi, na ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, na eyio ekaba omwando obo." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Ase ayio moigwere, mokore amang’ana onsi ay’okobwatana okwo kw’ogotianania erio nario morasesenigwe ase emeremo yonsi morabe mogokora." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Rituko ria rero inwe mwensi igo moteneine aiga ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino; inwe abatang’ani b’ebisaku, na abagaaka, na abateneneri, inwe kera oyomo bw’Abaisraeli," 
Deuteronomy29:11 na abana baino, na abakungu baino, na abamenyi bamenyete amo nainwe ase ebitwori biaino, na abanto bonsi abwo bakobaateria chinko amo nabwo bakobarentera amache." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Na bono monyare gosoa ase okobwatana kw’ogotianania okwo Omonene, Nyasae oino, agokora amo nainwe rituko ria rero," 
Deuteronomy29:13 erinde ase rituko ria rero, Omonene anyare kobakora mobe abanto baye b’ekeene, ere nabe Nyasae oino, buna abatebetie na buna arierete chisokoro chiaino Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo, eira ase ogotiana." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Gose tari nainwe mweka ngokora okobwatana okwo kw’ogotianania," 
Deuteronomy29:15 korende nigo nkogokora nainwe abamoteneine aiga rero amo naintwe ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oito, naende amo nabwo batateneini amo naintwe aiga rero." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Inwe abanyene momanyete buna obogima bwaito bwarenge ekero twamenyete ase ense ya Misiri, naende buna twarweteo na goeta egati‐gati y’ebisaku ebio ase twaetete." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Mwaroche ebinto babwate bi’okogechia, emegwekano yabo baare gosasima, yaroisirie korwa ase emete, na amagena, ne chifeta, ne chitahabu, eyio yarenge ase egati yabo." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Mwerende, tabaisa koba ase egati yaino omonto omosacha gose omokungu, gose eamate, gose egesaku, oraonchoke ase rituko ria rero, atige Omonene, Nyasae oito, na gosasima chinyasae chi’abanto b’ebisaku ebio. Toba ase egati yaino omori okomera ekemeri kere nobosongo gekwama okwama okororo." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Omonto aise koba aiga, oyo oigwete amang’ana’okobwatana okwo kw’ogotianania naende eremie abe nobomaene ime ase enkoro yaye, erio akwane: Nabo erabe buya asende nonya nkogenderera koba omotaigweri, oyio nigo arabasirie mwensi, abamogotinda na abamore nerang’o." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Omonene takonyara kwabera omonto onga buna oyio, korende endamwamu yaye, ne risemi mbibe igoro y’omonto oyio, na okoragereria okwo gwonsi korikire ase ebuku eye nigo korabeere asare, na Omonene natinyie erieta ri’omonto oyio rirue inse y’erioba, tainyorwa." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Omonene namokore abe ekiorokererio ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, na amorentere amaakwa onsi koreng’ana nokoragereria gw’okobwatana kw’ogotianania oko korikire ase ebuku eye y’amachiko." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Ase ebiaare bigochi‐gocha, ne chinderia chiaino, na abamenyi barache korwa ase chinse chi’aare, mbarore emechando y’ense eria, na amarwaire Omonene ayetomeire." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Ense yonsi inayome pa ebe buna amagena ’omorero akonyititoka, na omonyo, ebe bosa etari kwama, nonya nobonyansi tibokomerao, esirigwe buna emechie ya Sodomu, na Gomora, na Adima, na Seboimu, eria Omonene asiretie ekero abete nendamwamu na okogechigwa." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Ee, ebisaku bionsi mbiborie: Ninki kiagerete Omonene akorete ense eye ekaba iga? Naki endamwamu yaye yokire iga?" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Erio abanto mbairanerie, batebe: Ayio igo akoregete, ekiagera abanto batigete okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, okwo akorete amo nabarabwo, ekero abarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Barabwo nigo barenge gokorera chinyasae ching’ao na gochisasima, chinyasae barabwo batamanyete agwo ritang’ani, echio Omonene atabaete." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ase ayio endamwamu y’Omonene ekaba enene ase ense eye, ere akarenta okoragereria gwonsi okwo korikire ase ebuku eye." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Ase endamwamu yaye enene, na obotindi, ne risemi rinene, Omonene akabaseria korwa ase ense yabo, akabasiarera gochia ase ense eng’ao; nao bare goika rero iga." 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Amang’ana a bobisi nigo are ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, korende ayio amaanoirwe nigo are asetore na ase abana baito kogenderera botambe, naintwe goika tokore amang’ana onsi arikire ase amachiko aya." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ekero ogosesenigwa na okoragererigwa, ayio naborokereirie arabe akobanyora ekero mogendererete komenya ase egati y’ebisaku bionsi ebio ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabaserie gochia, monyare koinyora amang’ana aane." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Inwe amo nabana baino komoramoiranere Omonene, Nyasae oino, na koigwera amang’ana aye ase chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na ase emioyo yaino yonsi, amang’ana ayio nabachikire rituko ria rero," 
Deuteronomy30:3 rirorio Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabarorere amabera na kobasesenia, naende abairanie korwa ase ebisaku bionsi ebio ase abasiarerete gochia." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Nonya mwasiareretwe gochia ase chinsinyo chi’ense, Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabasangererie korwao," 
Deuteronomy30:5 na kobairania gochia ase ense eria chisokoro chiaino chiairete ekaba eyabo, erio nainwe moyeire ebe eyaino. Ere nabakorere amaya, naende ababuchie mobe abange goetania chisokoro chiaino." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Omonene, Nyasae oino, narokie chinkoro chiaino, ne chinkoro chi’ororeria rwaino, nabae inwe ne chinderia chiaino chinkoro chi’okoigwera; erio nario moramwanche ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na emioyo yaino yonsi, mogenderere koba moyo." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Omonene Nyasae oino nabeke okoragereria okwo gwonsi igoro y’ababisa baino, na igoro ya baria babagechete na kobachanda." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Nainwe moigwere Omonene naende, na kobwata amachiko aye onsi aya nkobatebia rituko ria rero." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabasesenie mono ase emeremo yaino yonsi mogokora namaboko aino, nasesenie oboiboro rwaino romentekane, namente ne chiombe chiaino na okwama kwaino kwe riroba. Na buna Omonene agogete ase ogosesenia chisokoro chiaino, naboigo aragoke ase okobasesenia inwe," 
Deuteronomy30:10 komoraigwere Omonene, Nyasae oino, na mobwate amachiko aye onsi na emeroberio echikire, aya arikire ase ebuku eye y’amachiko, naende komoramoonchokere ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na emioyo yaino yonsi." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Ogochika okwo nabaeire rituko ria rero tikori ogokong’u mono asemore, gose tikori aare korwa asemore." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Tigokari aaria igoro, erinde moborie: Ning’o oranyare koriina gochia aaria igoro agotorentere korwa aroro, erinde tokoigwe na kogokora?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Gose tigokari ng’umbu y’enyancha, erinde moborie: Ning’o oranyare kwamboka gochia ng’umbu y’enyancha agotorentere, erinde tokoigwe na togokore?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Taibo! Ring’ana riria nigo rire ang’e nainwe ase emenwa yaino, na ase chinkoro chiaino, erinde monyare korikora." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Rora, rituko ria rero nabekire ase amasio aino obogima na ayare amaya, amakweri na ayare amabe." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Komoraigwere amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oino, aya inche nkobaa ase rituko ria rero, ase okomwancha na gotaara ase chinchera chiaye na kobwata amachiko aye, na emeroberio yaye echikire, erio inwe namobe moyo na komentekana, nere nabasesenie ase ense eyio mogochia gosoa na koira ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Korende mogochia koonchoka ase chinkoro chiaino na komotiga timomoigwera, korende mong’uswe moonchoke gosasima chinyasae ching’ao na gochikorera," 
Deuteronomy30:18 nabaorokeirie ase rituko ria rero ng’a goika mosire. Timogochia komenya engaki entambe ase ense eria ere ng’umbu ya Yorodan, eria mogochia koira ebe eyaino." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Rituko ria rero narangeirie igoro na ense chibe birori asemore ng’a inche nabekire ase amasio aino obogima na amakweri, ogosesenigwa na okoragererigwa. Ase ayio, chora obogima, erinde inwe amo ne chinderia chiaino monyare kogenderera koba moyo." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Mwanche Omonene, Nyasae oino, momoigwere na mobe abegenwa asare. Ekero morakore ayio, rirorio namogenderere koba moyo na komenya ase ense eyio Omonene arierete chisokoro chiaino Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo eira ng’a nabayee.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Musa akagenderera gokwana amang’ana aya ase Abaisraeli bonsi. 
Deuteronomy31:2 Akabatebia, “Bono inche nakoorire emiaka rigana erimo na emerongo ebere, tinkonyara kobaraa kogenderera. Boigo Omonene onkanirie ng’a tinkwamboka ngende ng’umbu ya Yorodan." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Omonene, Nyasae oino omonyene, nabatang’ane aserie ebisaku bionsi bire ase amasio aino, erinde moire ense yabo, na Yoshua nabe omoraai oino, buna Omonene atebire." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Omonene nakore ebisaku ebio buna akorete Sihoni na Ogi, abaruoti b’Abaamori, ekero keria abasiretie, agasaria ne chinse chiabo." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Omonene nababeke ase amaboko aino, nainwe mobakore koreng’ana namang’ana onsi nabachikire." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Motenene bokong’u, mobe abaremu, timobaisa kobairoka gose koboboa, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nagende amo nainwe, takobatiga mobugwe, gose takobatuguta.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Erio Musa akarangeria Yoshua, agakwana nere agwo ase Abaisraeli bonsi baigwete, akamotebia, “Otenene bokong’u, obe omoremu, ekiagera naye oratang’ane abanto aba gochia ase ense eria Omonene arierete chisokoro chiabo eira ng’a nabayee. Naye orabaatananere ense eria ebe omwando obo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Omonene nere oragotang’ane, nabe amo naye, takogotiga obugwe, gose takogotuguta, Tobaisa koiroka gose kwoboa.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Musa akarika amachiko ayio, erio akayaa abakuani Abalawi barenge kobogoria Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’Cmonene, boigo akayea abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Musa akabachika akabatebia, “Ase omoerio o kera omwaka o gatano na kabere, ase engaki echikire y’omwaka bw’obosibore, ase Amatuko Amanene ay’Ebigutu," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ekero Abaisraeli bonsi bagocha ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, aase agwo arachore, osome amachiko onsi, erinde Abaisraeli bonsi bayaigwe." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Mosangererie abanto bonsi, abasacha na abakungu, na abana, na abamenyi bamenyete ase emechie yaino, erio bonsi baigwe na kweorokereria komoiroka Omonene, Nyasae oino, erinde babe abegenwa na bakore amang’ana onsi ay’amachiko aya." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Erio abana babo konya bataramanya amachiko aya, bayaigwe na kweorokereria komoiroka Omonene, Nyasae oino, ekero morabe mogendererete komenya ase ense eria ng’umbu ya Yorodan, eyio mogochia koira ebe eyaino.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Omonene agatebia Musa, “Naama! Amatuko ao abereire ang’e ogochia gokwa. Rangeria Yoshua, erinde mochiche agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, erio imobeke ase emeremo agwenerete akore.” Musa na Yoshua bakagenda agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano," 
Deuteronomy31:15 Omonene akaoroka agwo ore ime ase riire rire buna esiiro, narirorio rigatenena agwo ase egesoero ki’Eema eria." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Rora kwabereire ang’e gochia gokwa na ogende gotimoka ase chisokoro chiao chitimogete; nyuma y’ayio abanto aba nigo baratige koba abegenwa asende, bakorere chinyasae chingeni chi’ense eria ase bakogenda komenya; barabwo mbantige, naende basarie okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete amo nabarabwo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ase engaki eria endamwamu yane nebe enene igoro asebare, inche imbatige na imbise obosio bwane, tibandora, barabwo mbasirigwe. Amabe amange na emechando emenge nabichiche igoro asebare, erio baborie ase rituko erio: Inee! Amabe aya onsi tari igo achire igoro asetore, ekiagera Nyasae oito atari ase egati yaito?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Ase rituko riria ekeene nimbise obosio bwane korwa asebare, ekiagera bakorire amabe baonchokeire chinyasae ching’ao." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Bono rika ogotera oko, oborokererie Abaisraeli, bamanye kogotera, erinde korokwo kobe kirori one ase Abaisraeli." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Nimbaire ase ense eyio entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, eyio narierete chisokoro chiabo eira ng’a nimbayee. Aroro agwo mbanyore ebinto ebinge barie, baisaneke na konora, korende nigo baraonchokere chinyasae ching’ao na gochikorera, erio banchaye na gosaria okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ekero amabe amange na emechando birabe bikobachera, ogotera oko nakoborokererie na kobe kirori asebare, ekiagera tigokwebwa nonya nase chinderia chiabo. Nimanyete ebirengererio bare nabio bono, ritang’ani konya ntarabarenta ase ense eyio nariete eira ng’a nimbayee.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Ase rituko erio Musa akarika ogotera koria akorokereria Abaisraeli. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Erio Omonene akamwatanana Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, akamotebia, “Otenene bokong’u, obe noboremu, ekiagera naye orabaire Abaisraeli ase ense eria nabarierete eira ng’a nimbayee. Inche nimbe amo naye.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Musa akarika amang’ana onsi ay’amachiko ayio ime ase ebuku. 
Deuteronomy31:25 Erio agachika Abalawi baria barenge kobogoria Esanduku eria y’Omonene, eyere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania, agateba," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Ira ebuku eye y’amachiko, moyebeke ensemo y’Esanduku eria ere nokobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’Omonene Nyasae oino, erio ebeereo ase okoba kirori asemore." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Inche nimanyete ng’a timori abaigweri, korende nigo more abanyabigoti bikong’u. Rora bono, ekero inde moyo amo nainwe, mwasaririe ase Omonene, Inee, ekero ndabe nakure timogosaria mono kobua?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Sangereria abagaaka bonsi b’ebisaku biaino, na abanene bonsi, obarente asende, erinde imbatebie amang’ana aya; inche nindangerie igoro na ense chibe birori asebare." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Namanyire ng’a nyuma inche konakure, ekeene inwe nigo morakore amabe, naende nigo moraonchoke na gotiga enchera eye nabachikire. Ase ayio, ase amatuko agocha obobe nabobanyore, ekiagera nigo mogochia gokora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, erio momogechie abe nendamwamu goetera ase emeremo ende yonsi morabe mogokora.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Erio Musa agakwana amang’ana onsi ay’ogotera oko ekero omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli bategererete. 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Inwe igoro, ntegerera moigwe, nkwane, naye ense, igwa amang’ana akorwa ase omonwa one." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Amorokererio aane tiga atwe buna embura, na enkwana yane etoore buna riime ri’embura, buna omonyirira okonyirira igoro ase obonyansi obobese, na buna embura engiya egotwa igoro ase ebimeri ebirere." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Inche nindarie erieta ri’Omonene. Inwe motogie Nyasae oito!” 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Omonene nere Egetare giaito, emeremo yaye nemeikeranu, ekiagera chinchera chiaye chionsi nechi’ekeene. Nyasae nomwegenwa otari nobobe; ere nigo are omonyene ekeene na oboronge." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Barabwo basaririe ase Omonene, na bono tibagenderereti korokwa abana baye; nigo bare abanto b’obosooku, ekegori egesareku, naende egesiru." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Inwe abanto abariri motari nobong’aini, Inee, eye nero enchera mogoakanera Omonene? Inee, ere tari iso, oria obatongete, na obakorire mwabeire ne chinguru?”" 
Deuteronomy32:7 “Inyora amatuko a kare, rengereria igoro y’emiaka y’ebiaare biaetire. Boria iso, nere nakworokererie amang’ana ayio, boria abagaaka baino, nabarabwo mbakoyatebie." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Ekero Oyore Igoro Mono aete abanto b’ebisaku emiando yabo, na ekero aatananete mwanyabanto. Akababekera chimbebe ase baramenye, kobwatekana nomobaro bw’Abaisraeli," 
Deuteronomy32:9 Omonene bwechoreire abanto baye babe egetari kiaye, abanto ba Yakobo nabwo barurwe babe omwando oye.”" 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Omonene nigo abanyorete ase erooro etamenyiri nabanto, eyarenge kogosa nokwoga gwe ching’iti chi’orosana, erio akabaraa aroro, akabarenda na kobarageria, akabarenda buna arendete endorero y’eriso riaye." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Buna ekeongo gekorangeria amage aye na kiayorokereria koiruruka, kiarambora chimbaba chiaye koyabogoria, naboigo Omonene akobogoria abanto baye ase chimbaba chiaye ime." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Omonene bweka omonyene nere obaraaete, na enyasae engeni tiyarenge amo nere.”" 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Akabakinia na kobatiiria ase ebitunwa igoro, akabarageria okwama kw’emegondo, na obooke korwa ase egetare ime, na amaguta ’amazeituni korwa ase egetare egekong’u." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Akabaa amanooga e chiombe, na amabeere e chimbori, ne chinyama chinoru chie chimanwa chie ching’ondi, na echie chimingichi, amo ne ching’ondi ne chimbori chingiya chikorwa Basani. Mokaria engano yarenge engiya mono, na mokanywa edivai korwa ase amasabibu amonyinga.”" 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Korende Yesuruni akanora, akaenena. Akanora na koneta, akagirigenta; erio akaanga Nyasae oria omotongete; agachecheria Egetare keria kiarenge ogotooreka kwaye." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Barabwo bakagera Omonene akaba ne risemi, ekiagera basasimete chinyasae chingeni, bakagera akaba nendamwamu enene, ekiagera akorete okogechia." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Bakarua ebing’wanso ase ebirecha bitari Nyasae: bagasasima chinyasae batamanyete agwo ritang’ani, chinyasae chinyia chiasoete nyuma, echio chisokoro chiaino chitairogete." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Mogatiga Egetare keria kiabaiborete, mokeba Nyasae oria obaete obogima.”" 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Ekero Omonene aroche amang’ana ayio, akabaanga, akaba nendamwamu ase abana baye, abamura na abaiseke." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Akabora: Nimbise obosio bwane korwa asebare, erio ndore omoerio obo buna ogochia koba, ekiagera barabwo nekegori egesisekanu, abanto batari abegenwa." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bagerire nabeire ne risemi ase engencho y’egetari Nyasae, nagechigwe ase emegwekano yabo ere bosa, eyio bagosasima. Ase ayio inche ninseegete abanto abachorochombu, erinde babagechie nimbatige bagechigwe ase okobarentera egesaku ekeriri." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Endamwamu yane yokire buna omorero, noro nosambe goika aase abakure, nosambe ense na okwama koreo, nosambe na amaroso ’ebitunwa.”" 
Deuteronomy32:23 “Nimbeke amabe onsiigoro asebare, nimbarase nemegwe yane." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Nabakwe ase engencho y’enchara ne riberera rikorura, nabariegwe namarwaire amabe agoita. Nimbatomere ching’iti chi’orosana chire namaino amooge chibarwanie, ne ching’iti chingenda inse chire nobosongo, chibarome." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ekero abana babo bare isiko mbaitwe nemioro, ekero bare ime ase chinyomba obwoba mbobaite; ebio mbiite abamura, na abaiseke, na abana bakogonka, amo nabanto abagotu." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ngateba: Nigo narenge gochia kobasiarera gochia aare, erio mbasirie kegima, tibabaisa koinyorwa ase egati ya mwanyabanto." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Onye noboete ng’a ababisa babo mbabaise gochia gwetogia na bangechie, mbabaise gochia goteba: Nintwe twababua, gose tari Omonene okorire ayio onsi.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Abaisraeli nabanto batancheti gosemigwa, na tibari nobong’aini bonde bwonsi." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Onye nabang’aini barenge nanga mbamanya amang’ana aya, na korengereria igoro y’omoerio obo." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Naki omonto oyomo arakore aserie abanto elifu eyemo, na abanto babere baserie abanto chilifu ikomi, onye oria ore egetare kiabo atabaoonetie na kobarua, naende onye Omonene tabatigete?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Egetare kiabo tikere buna Egetare giaito, nonya nababisa baito mbamanyete amang’ana ayio." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Emesabibu yabo nigo ekorwa ase emesabibu ya Sodomu, na korwa ase emegondo ya Gomora; na amasabibu abo nigo are nobosongo, ebisago biabo nigo bire ebiroro." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Edivai yabo nigo enga buna obosongo bwe ching’iti, na obotindi bwabo buna obosongo obatindi bw’amarubi.”" 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Omonene nigo akoboria: Inee! Amang’ana aya tagachiri asende? Tabekiri ekemanyererio ase ekungo yane? 
Deuteronomy32:35 Egesiomba nekiane, ninche ndaakane, kegachire goika amagoro abo atererigwe, ekiagera rituko ri’emechando yabo riaikire ang’e, na ogosirigwa kwabo nigo kogocha bwango." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Omonene nanachere abanto baye ekina kia boronge, na arorere abasomba baye amabera, ekero ararore ng’a chinguru chiabo chiaerire, naende onde tatigareti, omosomba gose omobiare." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Erio naborie: Ng’ai chinyasae chiabo chire? Egetare ekio basemeretie na kogetamera, ng’ai kere?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Chinyasae echio chiariete ebitinya bi’ebing’wanso biabo, na konywa okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa bi’edivai, ng’ai chire? Tiga chichiche erio chibakonye na kobarenda.”" 
Deuteronomy32:39 “Rora bono, inche ninche bweka Nyasae, onde tari otatiga inche bweka. Ninche ngoita, naende nairania obogima, ninche ngoaka, naende nagwenia. Onde tari oranyare kwerwanerera ekonye korwa ase okoboko kwane." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Inche ninche nkoimokia amaboko aane gochia igoro, natiana na goteba: Buna inche inde moyo kare na kare." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Nigo ngotieria omoro one okomesa, na okoboko kwane kwanacha ekina. Nindusie egesiomba igoro ase ababisa baane, ning’akane baria bonsi bangechete." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Nintindie emegwe yane namanyinga, omoro one oite abanto, oigote chinyama chi’abwo baitirwe, na amanyinga ’abooswa na emetwe y’abatang’ani b’ababisa.”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Inwe abanto b’ebisaku, goka amo nabanto b’Omonene; ekiagera orusirie egesiomba ki’amanyinga ’abasomba baye; orusirie egesiomba igoro ase ababisa baye, okorire okobwatania ase ense yaye na ase abanto baye.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Musa ekero arenge na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, agacha agakwana amang’ana onsi ay’ogotera okwo, ekero abanto bategererete." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ekero Musa akoorire gokwana amang’ana ayio ase Abaisraeli bonsi," 
Deuteronomy32:46 akabatebia, “Renda na koigwera amang’ana onsi aya nabekire abe kirori asemore ase rituko ria rero, mochike abana baino babwate na gokora amang’ana onsi ay’amachiko ayio." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Ayio tari amang’ana a bosa asemore, naro obogima bwaino; na ase okoigwera amang’ana aya namogenderere komenya engaki entambe ase ense eyio mogochia koira ng’umbu ya Yorodan.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Ase rituko erio erio Omonene agatebia Musa," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Tiira gochia ase ebitunwa bi’Abarimu, ase egetunwa kia Nebo, kere ase ense ya Moabu, kororia Yeriko, erio origererie ense ya Kanani eyio ngochia koa Abaisraeli ebe eyabo." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Aye nokwere ase egetunwa ekio ase ogotiira gochia, osangererekane amo nabanto bao, buna Haroni momura omino akwerete ase egetunwa kia Hori, agasangererekana amo nabanto baye," 
Deuteronomy32:51 ekiagera timwabete abegenwa asende ase egati y’Abaisraeli agwo ase amache a Meriba‐Kadeshi, ase erooro ya Sini. Timwansigete na kworokia Abaisraeli ng’a inche nigo inde omochenu." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Ase ayio nonyare korora ense eria ere bosio bwao, korende tokonyara kogenda aroro na gosoa ase ense eria ngochia koa Abaisraeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Oko nakwo ogosesenia Musa, omonto o Nyasae, asesenetie Abaisraeli ekero konya atarakwa." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Akabora: “Omonene agacha korwa Sinai, akabamorekera korwa Seiri, akabara buna risase korwa ase egetunwa gia Parani; agacha ore amo nabachenu chilifu ikomi, ogochika kore buna chinsase chi’omorero gokabachera korwa ase ensemo yaye y’okorio." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Amaene, nigo anchete abanto b’ebisaku bionsi; abachenu baye bonsi nigo bare ase oborendi bw’okoboko kwaye. Barabwo nigo baikaraansete inse ase amagoro ’Omonene, borokererigwe amang’ana aye." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Musa agatoa amachiko, ayio are omwando bw’omosangererekano bw’abanto ba Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Omonene akaba omoruoti o Yesuruni, ekero abatang’ani b’abanto basangererekanete amo nabanto b’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Musa agakwana: “Tiga Abareuben bagenderere koba moyo, tibabaisa gokwa, nonya abanto abwo bare abake.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Agakwana igoro y’Abayuda: “Aye Omonene, igwa okorera kw’Abayuda, obairanie naende babe amo nabanto bamwabo. Berwanerere boka namaboko abo, obakonye ekero ababisa babo bakobarwania.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Agakwana igoro y’Abalawi: “Omonene, obamaanorere babe nobomanyi goetera ase Tumimu na Urimu, ekiagera barabwo nabegenwa bao bare. Aye nkwabateemete aria Masa. Nkwaamereranetie nabarabwo ase amache a Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Barabwo nigo bakwanete igoro y’abaise na abang’ina, ng’a tibabaroche, bagatigana nabamwabo, gose tibabarete abana babo ng’a mbare nengencho asebare, ekiagera baigwete ring’ana riao, bakabwata okobwatana kw’ogotianania gwakorete nabarabwo." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Barabwo mborokererie Abayakobo emeroberio yao echikire na Abaisraeli amachiko ao, mbarente ubani ase obosio bwao, naende mbasambere ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase egesasimero kiao." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Omonene, obasesenie amo nebi bionsi babwate, bwanche emeremo eria bagokora, obune chibachwa chi’ababisa babo baria bagocha kobarwania, baria babagechete, tibabaisa gocha kobarwania naende.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Agakwana igoro y’Ababenjamin: “Aba nabanchwa b’Omonene, mbamenye inse y’oborendi bwaye bare nobotoereru, Omonene nabagitere abaetanane botambe, barabwo mbamenye ase amareko aye.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Agakwana ogoro y’Abayusufu: “Ogosesenigwa kw’Omonene koe ase riroba riabo, abae ebiegwa ebiya bikorwa igoro, abae obotooru na ebinto ebiya bire ase riroba ime," 
Deuteronomy33:14 abae amatunda amaya ay’okwama kw’omobaso, abae okwama okonge kw’emetienyi." 
Deuteronomy33:15 Asesenie ebigoro bia kare bitubwe nobonge bw’okwama okuya, na ebitunwa bireo botambe, birue okwama okonge boigo." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Abae ebinto ebiya korwa ase riroba, na ebiichire ime yayae, amo nogwancherwa gokorwa asare ere oyobweorokereretie ase egetutu keria. Ogosesenigwa okwo kobe igoro y’Abayusufu, ekiagera Yusufu nigo achoretwe akaba omogambi ase egati y’abamwabo." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Omotangi oye nigo are nobonene bwe chinguru buna echi’eeri, ne cingunchara chiaye nigo chire buna echi’eng’era, ase chirochio naserie abanto goikera ase chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense. Echio nachio chilifu ikomi chi’Abaefraimu, naende echio nachio chilifu chinyinge chi’Abamanase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Musa agakwana igoro y’Abasabuloni: “Inwe Abasabuloni, mogoke ekero mogosoka isiko, nainwe Abaisakaru, mogoke ase chiema chiaino ime." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Barabwo mbarangerie abanto b’ebisaku bachiche ase egetunwa kiabo, aroro agwo nabarue ebing’wanso ebironge, ekiagera nigo bakonyora obotenenku bwabo korwa ase chinyancha chinibo chibisekanete ime y’omokenye.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Agakwana igoro y’Abagadi: “Omonene abakwe, oria okogareyia orogongo rw’Abagadi. Abagadi nigo barabe bakoramama inse buna endo, batandora okoboko amo nekeore ki’omotwe." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Bagechorera abanyene orogongo rwarenge oruya, ekiagera agwo nao egetari ki’omogambi kiagachetwe. Bakaba amo nabatang’ani b’abanto, bakaba bagokora oboronge bw’Omonene na konacha ebina bi’ekeene ase Abaisraeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Agakwana igoro y’Abadani: “Abadani nigo banga buna endo ensae egocharoka korwa Basani.” 
Deuteronomy33:23 Agakwana igoro y’Abanafutali: “Inwe Abanafutali nigo mwanyorire ogwancherawa okonge na ogosesenigwa kw’ogoisaneka korwa ase Omonene, moire orogongo rore ase enyancha ensemo ya irianyi,”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Agakwana igoro y’Abaaseri: “Abaaseri basesenigwe kobua ebisaku binde. Tiga barabwo banchwe nabamwabo; amagoro abo atache riroba rikomera amazeituni. 
Deuteronomy33:25 Emekorogoto y’ebiita biaino ebe ey’ebioma ne chitaai, na buna amatuko aino arabe, naboigo ne chinguru chiaino chirabe." 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Aye Yesuruni, onde tari ore buna Nyasae oo, oria ogoeta igoro gati ase obonene bwaye gocha kogokonya." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Nyasae o kare na kare nere ore obotamero bwaino; Inse aa nao amaboko aye a kare na kare are kogamba. Naserie ababisa baino korwa asemore, abatebie inwe: Basirie!" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Ase ayio Abaisraeli nigo baramenye batari nobwoba, na ororeria rorwete ase Yakobo nigo roramenye ase obotoereru, ase ense eichire endagera na edivai ase riime rigotonya korwa igoro." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Inwe Abaisraeli, imosesenirie! Inwe nabanto mwatoorigwe n’Omonene. Nere enguba yaino ekobakengera; Nere omoro oino okobarentera obobui! Ababisa baino mbebeke inse asemore, nainwe motaare moete ebigoro biabo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Musa akarua emieya ya Moabu, agatiira gochia ase egetunwa kia Nebo igoro ase egechuria gia Pisiga, kororia Yeriko. Omonene akamworokia ense eria yonsi, ense ya Gileadi goika orogongo rwa Dani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 na orogongo rwonsi rwa Nafutali, na orwa Efraimu, na orwa Manase, na orwa Yuda rwonsi goika Enyancha Enene ya bosongo," 
Deuteronomy34:3 na Negebu, na ense omweya ya Yeriko, Omochie bw’Emekendo, na goika Soari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Erio Omonene agatebia Musa, “Eye nero ense eria narierete Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo eira ng’a ning’ee ororeria rwabo ebe eyabo. Inche nigo nakoeire ribaga oyerore namaiso ao, korende tokonyara kwamboka gochia aroro.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, agakwera agwo ase ense ya Moabu, buna Omonene atebete." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Omonene akamotindeka agwo ase rikura ri’ense ya Moabu kororia Beti‐Peori; korende goika rero iga monto onde tari omanyete embeera yaye. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa ekero akwete konya okoorire emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, korende amaiso aye konya tarasareka, gose chinguru chiaye konya tichiramoerera" 
Deuteronomy34:8 Abaisraeli bakamoreera ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etato agwo ase emieya ya Moabu, na nyuma y’ayio amatuko okomoreera na kobokia amagombo ase engencho yaye akaera." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, nigo aichire nomoika bw’obong’aini, ekiagera Musa konya omobekeire amaboko aye na Abaisraeli bakaba bakomoigwera, bagakora buna Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Korwa engaki eyio mobani onde tana gotoka ase Abaisraeli onga buna Musa, oria Omonene arenge gokwana nere obosio ase obosio." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Onde tana gotoka okorete ebikone buna ebi Omonene atomete Musa kobikora ase ense ya Misiri, na ase Farao amo nabasomba baye, na ense yaye yonsi." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Mobani onde tari okorete ogokora gwe chinguru chinene, na ogokora okonene, na ogw’okoondokia okwo Musa aorogetie ase amaiso ’Abaisraeli bonsi." 
Joshua1:1 Ekero Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, konya akure, Omonene agakwana na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, omokonyi o Musa," 
Joshua1:2 akamotebia, “Musa, omosomba one, okure. Imoka, bwamboke orooche oro rwa Yorodan, aye na Abaisraeli aba bonsi, mosoe ase ense eria ngochia kobaa." 
Joshua1:3 Nabaeire aase onsi morataare namagoro aino, buna narierete Musa eira ng’a nimbayee." 
Joshua1:4 Orogongo rwaino nigo rorachakere erooro ya irianyi, roikere Lebanoni ensemo ya sugusu, naende rochakere orooche oronene rw’Eufarati, robwateranie ense yonsi y’Abahiti roikere Enyancha Enene ya bosongo." 
Joshua1:5 Ase obogima bwao bwonsi, omonto tari orakobue. Buna narenge amo na Musa, naboigo ndabe amo naye, tinkogotiga nonya ng’ake." 
Joshua1:6 Obe omokong’u na omoremu, ekiagera naye oraikie abanto aba, banyore ense eyio narierete chisokoro chiabo eira na gotiana ng’a nimbayee." 
Joshua1:7 Otenene bokong’u rioka, na obe omoremu! Orende na obwate boronge amachiko onsi aya omosomba one Musa agochikerete. Tobaisa koyatiga, na koonchoka gochia aande onsi ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee; erio nario orasesenigwe aande onsi ase ogochia." 
Joshua1:8 Amang’ana ’ebuku eye y’amachiko oyakwane botambe nomonwa oo, oyairanerere omobaso na obotuko, obwate na okore onsi ayarikireo. Erio nario orasesenigwe mono ase chinchera chiao chionsi." 
Joshua1:9 Inee! Tari inche nagochikire ng’a otenene bokung’u, obe omoremu? Ase ayio, toondoka, tobaisa gokwa omoyo, ekiagera inche Omonene, Nyasae oo, nigo inde amo naye aande onsi orabe gokogenda.”" 
Joshua1:10 Erio Yoshua agachika abatang’ani b’abanto 
Joshua1:11 ng’a baete egati y’ebitwori batebie abanto ng’a beroiserie endagera, ekiagera ritang’ani amatuko atato ataraera inabamboke orooche oro rwa Yorodan, baire ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae obo, abaeire ebe eyabo." 
Joshua1:12 Yoshua agatebia abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase," 
Joshua1:13 “Inyora ring’ana riria Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, abachigete ekero abatebetie ng’a Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabae obotoereru ase ense eyio arabae momenye." 
Joshua1:14 Abakungu baino na abana baino nabatigare, amo namaicho aino, ase ense eye Musa abaete aiga moocha ya Yorodan. Inwe abanyene abamore chituoni chi’esegi goika mwamboke mobogoretie ebirwanero biaino, motang’ane abamino." 
Joshua1:15 Mobakonye goika Omonene abae barabwo obotoereru, buna abaete inwe, nabarabwo mbaire ense eyio Omonene, Nyasae oino, arabae. Erio momanye koirana ase ense yaino, eye Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, abaete aiga moocha ya Yorodan.”" 
Joshua1:16 Barabwo bakairaneria Yoshua, “Onsi ayagwatochikire natoyakore, na aase aande onsi oratotome natogende." 
Joshua1:17 Buna tware koigwera Musa, naye natokoigwere. Omonene, Nyasae oo, abe amo naye buna abete na Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Monto onde bwensi oraange koigwera amachiko ao na taigwa amang’ana okomotebia, goika aitwe akwe. Aye otenene bokong’u, obe omoremu!”" 
Joshua2:1 Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni agatoma abanto babere korwa Sitimu bobisi, bachie koroota, akabatebia, “Genda, moroote ense eria, na mono omochie o Yeriko.” Bakagenda aroro, bagasoa enyomba y’omokungu omotayayi ore korokwa Rahabu, bakarara aroro." 
Joshua2:2 Omoruoti o Yeriko agatebigwa ng’a Abaisraeli bande basoire aroro obotuko boria koroota ense eria. 
Joshua2:3 Ase ayio agatoma abanto ase Rahabu komotebia, “Abanto abwo basoire mwao, nigo bachire koroota ense engima. Ase igo, basokie gocha asetore.”" 
Joshua2:4 Omokungu oria konya oirire abanto abwo babere, obabisire. Ase ayio akairaneria, “Amaene, abanto abwo mbacha aa mwane, korende timanyeti ase barwete." 
Joshua2:5 Ekero bwairiire na egeita kiarenge gosiekwa bagenda; timanyeti ase bagenda, korende ayerera, mobabwatie, nabo morabanyore.”" 
Joshua2:6 Ere konya obairire kerama igoro, obatubire chimboba chi’egatani anekerete aroro." 
Joshua2:7 Abanto baria batometwe nomoruoti bakababwatia gochia Yorodan goika ebiambokero biaye. Kobachiire, egeita kegasiekwa." 
Joshua2:8 Ritang’ani abanto baria chirooti batararara, Rahabu akariina asebare kerama igoro," 
Joshua2:9 akabatebia, “Namanyire ng’a Omonene obaeire ense eye. Amaene twoboire bori. Abanto bonsi b’ense eye baondokire ase engencho yaino." 
Joshua2:10 Twaigure buna Omonene akamogetie amache ’Enyancha Embariri bosio bwaino, ekero mware kong’anya korwa Misiri, naende buna mwasiretie kegima Sihoni na Ogi, abaruoti baria babere b’Abaamori, ng’umbu ya Yorodan." 
Joshua2:11 Ekero twaigwete ayio, tokerusia moyo ekiagera twaboboete; onde tari noboremu bonde, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere Nyasae o igoro na oyo bw’ense inse." 
Joshua2:12 Bono nabasabire, mondiere eira na gotiana ase obosio bw’Omonene ng’a, buna nabakoreire inwe amaya, nainwe mokorere abanto b’enyomba ya tata amaya, na mong’e ekemanyererio ng’a more nobwegenwa asende." 
Joshua2:13 Mondiere eira ng’a inamotoorie obogima bwa tata, na baba, na bamura baminto, na basubati baminto, na abanto babo bonsi! Mototoorie korwa ase amakweri!”" 
Joshua2:14 Abanto baria bakamoiraneria, “Nigo tore ang’e gokwa onye titogotooria obogima bwaino, komorabe timoorogeti amang’ana aito ase ogotosigaana. Ekero Omonene arabe otoeire ense eye, ntobakorere amaya, buna twarire eira.”" 
Joshua2:15 Rahabu nigo amenyete ase enyomba yaagachetwe ekabwateranigwa norwaki rw’omochie. Ere akabaikeria nengori goetera ase ekebao," 
Joshua2:16 akabatebia, “Genda ase ebitunwa, abanto baria bakobabwatia tibabaisa kobanyora. Mwebise aroro amatuko atato, goika barabwo bairane aa. Nyuma y’ayio monyare kogenda enchera yaino.”" 
Joshua2:17 Abanto baria bakamotebia, “Intwe natosiborwe korwa ase eira twatianete, onye aye togokora aya tokoboria." 
Joshua2:18 Eke nakio togokoboria okore: Ekero torasoe ase ense eye, osibe engori eye embariri ase ekebao eke gwatoikeria. Osangererie gocha nyomba mwao iso, na nyoko, na bamura bamino, amo nabanto bonsi b’enyomba ya iso." 
Joshua2:19 Omonto onde bwensi orasoke korwa mwao na konyorwa namakweri, okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga aye nigo korabe okwaye ere omonyene, na intwe titokoba nokomocha; korende onde bwensi orabe mwao ime, na omonto oito amoite, okomocha nakobe ogwaito." 
Joshua2:20 Korararire amang’ana aito na otosigaane, erio natosiborwe korwa ase eira twatianire.”" 
Joshua2:21 Ere akabairaneria, “Abe buna mwateba.” Akabatiga bakagenda. Erio agasiba engori eria embariri ase ekebao keria." 
Joshua2:22 Abanto baria bakagenda gochia ase ebitunwa, bakebisa aroro amatuko atato, goika baria bababwatetie bakairana Yeriko. Barabwo bakaba bakobarigia ase chinchera chionsi, tibabanyora." 
Joshua2:23 Erio abanto baria babere bakairana, bagatirimboka korwa ase ebitunwa, bakaamboka orooche, bakagenda ase Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni. Agwo bakamotebia amang’ana onsi aya abanyorete," 
Joshua2:24 bakabora, “Ntwaenegetie ng’a Omonene otoeire ense eria yonsi, na bono abanto bonsi b’ense eria baondokire ase engencho yaito.”" 
Joshua3:1 Rituko ria kabere, mambia chuni, Yoshua amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakaimoka korwa Sitimu, bakagenda, bagaika orooche rwa Yorodan. Bagatoora agwo ritang’ani bataraamboka." 
Joshua3:2 Nyuma y’amatuko atato kaerire abateneneri bagaeta ase ebitwori," 
Joshua3:3 bagatebia abanto, “Ekero morarore Esanduku y’Omonene, Nyasae oino, ere ne chibao chirikire oborori bw’okobwatana, ekobogorigwa nabakuani Abalawi, morue aase aa, moyetunyane." 
Joshua3:4 Timoyeika ang’e; mobeere nyuma ase oboare bw’ekiromita eyemo. Erio namomanye ase mogoeta, naki timwana goeta enchera eyio rinde.”" 
Joshua3:5 Yoshua agatebia abanto, “Mwechene, ekiagera ankio Omonene nakore amakumia ase egati yaino.”" 
Joshua3:6 Nyuma y’ayio agatebia abakuani, “Imokia Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana, mogende motang’ane abanto.” Erio barabwo bakayeimokia, bakagenda, bagatang’ana abanto." 
Joshua3:7 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Rero ninkoimokererie igoro, ase amasio ’abanto, nabarabwo mbamanye ng’a buna narenge amo na Musa, nabo ndabe amo naye boigo." 
Joshua3:8 Aye chika abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana ng’a ekero baraike engegu y’orocche rwa Yorodan goika bateneneo.” 
Joshua3:9 Erio Yoshua agatebia Abaisraeli, “Inchuo ang’e aiga, motegerere amang’ana aya Omonene, Nyasae oino, akobatebia.”" 
Joshua3:10 Naende akabora, “Iga namomanye ng’a Nyasae ore moyo nigo are ase egati yaino, takomocha kobaseria korwa asemore Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abahivi, na Abaperisi, na Abagirigasi, na Abaamori, na Abayebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Rora, Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire oborori bw’okobwatana, eyio y’Omonene bw’ense engima, nkwambokigwa ere gochia rooche ng’umbu, bosio bwaino." 
Joshua3:12 Gaki bono chora abanto ikomi na babere korwa ase ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli, oyomo korwa ase kera egesaku." 
Joshua3:13 Igo erabe ekero abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Omonene bw’ense engima, baratache amache a Yorodan namagoro abo, amache akorwa rogoro ya Yorodan nanacheke, atenene buna enyasi.”" 
Joshua3:14 Ekero abanto baimogete korwa ase chiema chiabo erinde bamboke Yorodan, abakuani bakabatang’ana, babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana." 
Joshua3:15 Bono nigo yarenge engaki ye rigesa, na Yorodan nigo rwaichire mono namache aetanetie chingegu. Ekero abakuani, abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria, baigete Yorodan na batachete amache namagoro abo," 
Joshua3:16 erio amache ayare gotirimboka korwa rogoro agatenena buna orwaki aare mono, agwo Adamu, omochie orenge ang’e na Saretani. Amache arenge gotirimboka gochia Enyancha y’Ekerubo Ekiomo, nero Enyancha y’Omonyo, akanacheka pi. Erio abanto bakaamboka kororia omochie o Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Ekero Abaisraeli baare kwamboka ase ense yakamokire, abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene bagatenena gati‐gati ya Yorodan, ase ense yakamokire, goika abanto bonsi bakaera ase okwamboka Yorodan." 
Joshua4:1 Ekero abanto bonsi konya bambokire Yorodan, Omonene agatebia Yoshua," 
Joshua4:2 “Chora abanto ikomi na babere, oyomo korwa ase kera egesaku," 
Joshua4:3 obachike baimokie amagena ikomi na abere, korwa agwo gati‐gati ya Yorodan aase abakuani bateneine namagoro abo, bayaire na bayabeke amo ase moratoore obotuko obo.”" 
Joshua4:4 Erio Yoshua akarangeria abanto baria ikomi na babere konya achorire korwa ase Abaisraeli, oyomo korwa ase kera egesaku," 
Joshua4:5 akabatebia, “Eta mogende bosio bw’Esanduku y’Omonene, Nyasae oino, goika gati‐gati ya Yorodan. Kera oyomo oino aimokie rigena erimo, aribeke ireko riaye, erimo ase kera egesaku ki’Abaisraeli." 
Joshua4:6 Amagena aya abe ekeinyorio asemore. Ekero abana baino barache kobaboria: Ninki engencho y’amagena aya? 
Joshua4:7 Mobatebie: Engencho yaye neye: Ekero Esanduku y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene yambogetigwe Yorodan, amache nigo nanachegete bosio bw’Esanduku eria. Ase ayio amagena aya nabe ekeinyorio ase Abaisraeli botambe.”" 
Joshua4:8 Abaisraeli bagakora buna Yoshua abachigete. Bakaimokia amagena ikomi na abere korwa Yorodan, erimo ase kera egesaku ki’Abaisraeli, buna Omonene konya atebereirie Yoshua, bakayaira ase baare gochia gotoora, bakayabeka inse." 
Joshua4:9 Yoshua akabeka amo amagena ande ikomi na abere gati‐gati ya Yorodan, aase abakuani batenenete, abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana. Amagena aria nao are goika rero iga." 
Joshua4:10 Abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria bakaba bateneine gati‐gati ya Yorodan, goika amang’ana onsi agaikeranigwa, aya Omonene konya achikire Yoshua gotebia abanto. Aya naro Yoshua achigetwe na Musa. Abanto bakaayerera kwamboka." 
Joshua4:11 Ekero abanto bonsi konya bambokire, Esanduku y’Omonene ekaambokigwa nabakuani, ekabekwa bosio bw’abanto." 
Joshua4:12 Abanto ba Reuben, na aba Gadi, na ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase bagatang’ana Abaisraeli, babogoretie ebirwanero bi’esegi, buna Musa abatebetie," 
Joshua4:13 Abanto koreng’ana chilifu emerongo ene babogoretie ebirwanero, baare ang’e korwana esegi, bagaetera ebirubo ebiomo ang’e na Yeriko, ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Joshua4:14 Rituko riria Omonene akaimokereria Yoshua igoro, ase amasio ’abanto bonsi. Barabwo bakaba basigete Yoshua ase obogima bwaye bwonsi, buna basigete Musa." 
Joshua4:15 Erio Omonene agatebia Yoshua," 
Joshua4:16 “Bachike abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire oborori, ng’a batiire korwa Yorodan.”" 
Joshua4:17 Erio Yoshua agachika abakuani, akabatebia, “Karue agwo ase Yorodan.”" 
Joshua4:18 Ekero abakuani abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria batiirete korwa Yorodan bagatacha ense enyomo. Erio bwango amache a Yorodan akairanerana, agaetania chingegu chiaye chionsi akaba buna arenge agwo ritang’ani." 
Joshua4:19 Abanto abwo bakaamboka Yorodan rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, bagatoora Giligali, ase orobebe rwa moocha ya Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Agwo Giligali Yoshua akabeka amo amagena aria ikomi na abere arusetigwe Yorodan. 
Joshua4:21 Agatebia Abaisraeli, “Ase engaki egochi‐gocha abana be chinderia chiaino kobaraborie abaise engencho y’amagena aya," 
Joshua4:22 mobatebie ng’a Abaisraeli nigo baambokerete Yorodan ase ense enkamoku. 
Joshua4:23 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nigo akamogetie amache a Yorodan bosio bwaino goika mokaamboka, naboigo buna akamogetie Enyancha Embariri bosio bwaito goika tokaamboka." 
Joshua4:24 Ase ayio, abanto bonsi b’ense engima mbamanye ng’a okoboko kw’Omonene nkore ne chinguru, erinde bamoiroke Omonene, Nyasae oino, botambe.”" 
Joshua5:1 Abaruoti bonsi b’Abaamori, abamenyete bosongo ya Yorodan, na abaruoti bonsi b’Abakanani, abamenyete ang’e n’Enyancha Enene, bakaigwa buna Omonene akamogetie amache a Yorodan bosio bw’Abaisraeli goika bakaamboka. Ase igo bakoboa mono na kwerusia moyo ase engencho y’Abaisraeli." 
Joshua5:2 Ase engaki eyio Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Roisia emeyio emioge y’amagena ochake kwarokia Abaisraeli naende.”" 
Joshua5:3 Erio Yoshua akaroisia emeyio y’amagena na agasara Abaisraeli agwo ase Egetunwa gekorokwa Gibeati‐Haraloti. 
Joshua5:4 Aya naro agerete Yoshua akabasara: Abasacha bonsi b’esegi, abwo bang’anyete korwa Misiri, konya bakwereire ase erooro kobare orogendo rwabo korwa Misiri." 
Joshua5:5 Abanto baria baruete Misiri konya barokigwe bonsi, korende ase abwo baiboreretwe ase orogendo rw’erooro, onde tarenge konya bwarokigwe, nonya noyomo." 
Joshua5:6 Abaisraeli konya bataarire ase erooro ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, goika abanto bonsi abaare konyara korwana esegi konya bakure, ekiagera bangete koigwera Omonene. Ase igo Omonene agatiana ng’a takobaa ribaga ri’ogosoa ense eria konya ariereire chisokoro chiabo eira ase ogotiana ng’a natoe ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke." 
Joshua5:7 Abana baiboretwe korwa nyuma yabo konya batararokigwa kobare orogendo ase erooro, abwo nabwo Yoshua arogetie." 
Joshua5:8 Ekero abanto bonsi bakoorire gosarwa, bakabeera aase abo ase egetwori goika bakagwena." 
Joshua5:9 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Rituko ria rero narusirie korwa asemore ogochaywa mwarenteretwe n’Abamisiri.” Ase ayio aase aaria akarokwa Giligali, naboigo akorokwa goika rero iga." 
Joshua5:10 Ekero Abaisraeli batoorete Giligali ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Yeriko bakaba bakorenda rituko rinene ri’Epasaka chinsa chia mogoroba, ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi." 
Joshua5:11 Ase rituko ria kabere nyuma kobariire Epasaka, bakaria okwama gw’ense eria: emegati etabekiri memera, na engano ekarangire, ase rituko erio erio." 
Joshua5:12 Nyuma y’ayio mana ekaera, tiyagwa, na Abaisraeli tibanyora mana naende. Korwa ase omwaka oria oria, bariete okwama gwa Kanani." 
Joshua5:13 Ekero Yoshua aigete ang’e na Yeriko akarigereria akarora omonto oteneine obwate omoyio o birende koboko kwaye. Yoshua akamoika ang’e, akamoboria, “Inee! Aye nensemo yaito ore, gose nensemo y’ababisa baito?”" 
Joshua5:14 Omonto oria akairaneria, “Inche nigo inde omotang’ani bw’omoganda okorwana esegi y’Omonene, nakio bono nacheire aa.” Erio Yoshua agatung’ama inse akaumama, agasasima. Naende akamoboria. “Mang’ana ki obwate ogontebia, inche omosomba oo?”" 
Joshua5:15 Omotang’ani oria bw’omoganda okorwana esegi y’Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Rusia ebikoroto biao, ekiagera aase agwo oteneine naachenu.” Na Yoshua agakora bo." 
Joshua6:1 Ebiita bia Yeriko nigo biasiekire bokong’u ng’a Abaisraeli tibabaisa gosoa aroro. Onde tarenge gosoka gose gosoa imeo. 
Joshua6:2 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Rora, nabekire Yeriko amo nomoruoti oye, na abamura chituoni baye b’esegi, ase okoboko kwao." 
Joshua6:3 Aye amo nabarwani bao goika motaare moetanane omochie oyio ara rimo kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko atano na rimo. 
Joshua6:4 Abakuani batano na babere babogorie ebitureri bi’omochengo na bagende bosio bw’Esanduku eria. Rituko ria gatano na kabere motaare, moetanane omochie oyio ara gatano na kabere, na abakuani babugie ebitureri biria." 
Joshua6:5 Ekero egetureri kerabugigwe eriogi ri’ekerondereria, na mokoigwa eriogi eri ri’omochengo, abanto bonsi baake eriogi rinene ri’esegi, erio agwo chindwaki chi’omochie nachigwe inse kegima. Erio abarwani bonsi bayoumokere, kera omonto agende bosio rimo rioka.”" 
Joshua6:6 Nabo Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, akarangeria abakuani, akabatebia, “Imokia Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana, na abakuani batano na babere babogorie ebitureri bi’omochengo bagende bosio bw’Esanduku eria y’Omonene.”" 
Joshua6:7 Erio agatebia abanto, “Genda moetanane omochie oria, na abanto babwate ebirwanero bi’esegi bagende bosio bw’Esanduku eria y’Omonene.”" 
Joshua6:8 Erio, buna Yoshua abachigete, abakuani batano na babere bakagenda bosio bw’Esanduku y’Omonene bakobugia ebitureri biria bi’omochengo, na Esanduku y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene ebogoirie korwa nyuma." 
Joshua6:9 Abarwani abarenge nebirwanero bagatang’ana abakuani abarenge kobugia ebitureri biria, na abarwani bande bakabwatia Esanduku eria ebitureri kobigendererete kobugigwa." 
Joshua6:10 Yoshua agachika abanto baria, akabatebia, “Timoaka eriogi ri’esegi, gose gokwana ing’ana rinde nonya ng’ake goika rituko riria ndabatebie ng’a moake eriogi ri’esegi. Erio nario moraake eriogi ri’esegi.”" 
Joshua6:11 Esanduku eria ekabogorigwa goetanana omochie ara rimo. Erio bonsi bakairana ase batoorete, bakabeerao obotuko boria." 
Joshua6:12 Rituko ria kabere Yoshua akaimoka mambia chuni, na abakuani bakaimokia Esanduku eria y’Omonene." 
Joshua6:13 Abakuani baria batano na babere ababwate ebitureri bi’omochengo bitano na bibere, bakabibugia kobakogenda, bare bosio bw’Esanduku y’Omonene. Abanto ababwate ebirwanero bi’esegi bakabatang’ana, na abarwani bande bakabwatia Esanduku eria y’Omonene korwa nyuma. Ebitureri biria bikabugigwa kogenderera." 
Joshua6:14 Nabo rituko erio ria kabere bagataara na goetanana omochie ara rimo, naende bakairana ase batoorete. Bagakora boigo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na rimo." 
Joshua6:15 Rituko ria gatano na kabere bakaimoka mambia chuni, bagataara na goetanana omochie ara gatano na kabere igo igo, korende ase rituko erio rioka bakayoetanana ara gatano na kabere." 
Joshua6:16 Engaki ya gatano na kabere, abakuani kobagendererete kobugia ebitureri, Yoshua agatebia abanto, “Aka eriogi ri’esegi, ekiagera Omonene obaeire omochie oyo!" 
Joshua6:17 Omochie oyo oragererigwe, na ebinto bionsi ebire imeo biatananirwe ase Omonene. Rahabu bweka, omokungu oria omotayayi, amo nabanto bare nyomba mwaye nabwo baratigare bare moyo, ekiagera ere abisete abanto baria twatomete koroota ense." 
Joshua6:18 Nainwe mwerende mono timoba nokogania koimokia gento kende kiaragererigwe na konyora emechando. Moise gokora bo, nigo moragere Abaisraeli bonsi baragererigwe na konyora emechando." 
Joshua6:19 Korende ebinto bionsi bie chifeta, na ebie chitahabu, na ebie chitaai, na ebi’ebioma, birobio nebi’Omonene, bibekwe ase ekungo yaye.”" 
Joshua6:20 Abakuani bakabugia ebitureri, na abanto kobabiigure bagaaka eriogi rinene ri’esegi, ne chindwaki chikagwa inse kegima. Erio abanto bakagenda bosio, bagatiira gochia omochie, bakayoira." 
Joshua6:21 Bagaita abanto bonsi b’omochie, abasacha na abakungu, abasae na abagotu, nemioro, bagaita boigo chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chitigere." 
Joshua6:22 Yoshua agatebia abanto baria, babere batometwe koroota ense eria, “Soa nyomba mw’omotayayi oria, momosokie amo nabanto baye bonsi, buna mwamorierete eira na gotiana.”" 
Joshua6:23 Erio abamura baria chirooti bakagenda, bagasokia Rahabu, na ise, na ng’ina, na abana bamwabo, na abanto ba nyomba mwaye, amo neamate yaye yonsi, bakabaa ribaga bamenye ang’e negetwori ki’Abaisraeli." 
Joshua6:24 Erio bagasamba omochie nomorero, amo nebinto bionsi, otatiga ebie chifeta, na ebie chitahabu, na ebi’ebioma. Ebinto ebio bikabekwa ase ekungo y’enyomba y’Omonene." 
Joshua6:25 Yoshua agatooria obogima bwa Rahabu, na obw’abanto b’enyomba ya ise, na obw’abanto baye bonsi, ekiagera abisete abanto baria batometwe nere koroota Yeriko. Ase ayio Rahabu, oria omotayayi, nigo amenyete amo n’Abaisraeli, ororeria rwaye nao romenyete goika rero iga."
