Joshua6:26 Erio agwo Yoshua akaragereria omochie o Yeriko, agateba, “Omonene aragererie onde bwensi oraagache omochie oyo naende. “Oyo orabeke oboroso, omwana oye omomura omotangi akwe; na oyo oratenenie ebiita, omwana oye omomura omokogoti akwe.”" 
Joshua6:27 Omonene nigo abete amo na Yoshua, ne chinkuma chiaye chigasarera ase ense yonsi." 
Joshua7:1 Korende Abaisraeli tibabete abegenwa; bakaira ebinto biria biatananetwe ase ogosirigwa. Akani, mosinto o Karimi, o Sabidi, o Zera bw’egesaku kia Yuda, akaira ebinto binde biaragereretigwe: na Omonene akaba nekeririanda ekenene ase Abaisraeli." 
Joshua7:2 Yoshua agatoma abanto korwa Yeriko gochia Ai, omochie ore moocha ya Beteli, ang’e na Beti‐Aveni, bagende baroote ense eria. Erio bagatiira kogenda koroota Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Barabwo bakairana ase Yoshua, bakamotebia, “Tobaisa gotoma abanto bonsi. Abanto koreng’ana chilifu ibere, gose isato, mbaisane babue Ai. Tobaisa gotiga bonsi bechande kogenda, ekiagera abanyene omochie oria nabake.”" 
Joshua7:4 Ase igo abanto koreng’ana chilifu isato bagatiira kogendao, korende barabwo bagaserigwa nabanto ba Ai." 
Joshua7:5 Abanto ba Ai bagaita Abaisraeli emerongo etato, na batano nomo, bakabaseria korwa isiko y’egeita gochia Sebarimu, bakabaitera aroro ase ebitirimboko. Erio Abaisraeli bakoboa na kwerusia moyo." 
Joshua7:6 Yoshua amo nabagaaka b’Abaisraeli bagatandora chianga chiabo, bakagwa maumama bosio bw’Esanduku y’Omonene, bakarara agwo goika mogoroba, bagesiarera ebuse emetwe yabo" 
Joshua7:7 Na Yoshua agasaba, akabora, “Ayee! Omonene Nyasae, nase ki kwambogetie abanto aba ase Yorodan? Inee! Nase ogotobeka ase amaboko ’Abakanani, batoite? Nanga mbuya, nonya tware kobeera ng’umbu ya Yorodan nanga nao tomenyete." 
Joshua7:8 Omonene, inki ndakwane bono, ekero Abaisraeli batamire korwa ase ababisa babo?" 
Joshua7:9 Abakanani na abanto bande bonsi b’ense eye baise koigwa ring’ana eri nigo barache gotoetanana na korusia amarieta aito korwa ase ense, titoinyorwa. Inki rende otagete okore, erinde erieta riao rinene ritogigwe?”" 
Joshua7:10 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Imoka, otenene! Nase ki okorara maumama igo?" 
Joshua7:11 Abaisraeli bakorire ebibe. Basaririe okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania okwo nabachigete ng’a babwate. Barusirie ebinto biragereirie. Baibire, batebire oborimo, babisire ebinto ebio ase egati y’ebiabo." 
Joshua7:12 Nakio kiagerire Abaisraeli babuirwe nababisa babo. Batamire, ekiagera barabwo abanyene baragererigwe ase ogosirigwa. Inche tinkoba amo nainwe goika mwarusirie korwa asemore ebinto ebi bionsi biragereirie ase ogosarigwa." 
Joshua7:13 Imoka, ochene abanto! Obatebie bechene na kwebeka ang’e goika ankio, ekiagera inche Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, natebire iga: Inwe Abaisraeli imobwate ase egati yaino ebinto biatananetwe na koragererigwa, timokonyara kobua ababisa baino goika mwarusirie ebinto ebio korwa asemore." 
Joshua7:14 Ankio mambia goika mwerente aa bosio, egesaku ase egesaku. Abanto b’egesaku keria Omonene aratige obomera bobagwere goika bache bosio, eamate ase eamate Abanto b’eamate eria obomera boragwere bache bosio, enyomba ase enyomba. Abanto b’enyomba eyio Omonene aratige obomera bobagwere goika bache bosio omonto ase omonto." 
Joshua7:15 Omonto oria oranyorwe obwate ebinto biria biragereirie, goika asambwe nomorero amo nebinto bionsi are nabio, ekiagera osaririe okobwatana kw’ogotianania kwane inche Omonene, naende orentire obosooku obonene ase egati y’Abaisraeli.”" 
Joshua7:16 Rituko ria kabere, mambia chuni, Yoshua akarangeria Abaisraeli bache bosio, egesaku ase egesaku, na obomera bokagwera egesaku kia Yuda." 
Joshua7:17 Akarangeria egesaku kia Yuda, na obomera bokagwera eamate ya Zera, Akarangeria eamate ya Zera, enyomba ase enyomba, na obomera bokagwera enyomba ya Sabidi." 
Joshua7:18 Akarangeria enyomba ya Sabidi, omonto oyomo oyomo, na obomera bokagwera Akani, mosinto o Karimi, o Sabidi o Zera bw’egesaku kia Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Erio Yoshua agatebia Akani, “Omwana one, mosike Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oyaorokie erinde ere atogigwe. Ontebie aya gwakorire, toyabisa!”" 
Joshua7:20 Akani akairaneria Yoshua, “Amaene, nakoreire Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ebibe, na aya nakorire naya:" 
Joshua7:21 Ase ebinto biria biasakoretwe nkarora egetambaa gi’okwambara kiarwete Babeli, ne chifeta chikiro ibere na ekeng’ese, na ebao y’etahabu eisaine ekeng’ese gi’ekiro. Nkaba nokogania kw’ebinto ebio, nkabiira. Mobinyore bibisire gati‐gati y’eema yane, ase amaroba ime, ne chifeta chiria chibekire inse kegima.”" 
Joshua7:22 Erio Yoshua agatoma abanto, nabarabwo bakaminyoka ase eema eria, bakanyora ebinto biria ase amaroba ime, ne chifeta chibekire inse." 
Joshua7:23 Bakarusia ebinto biria korwa ase eema, bakabiira ase Yoshua na Abaisraeli, bakabibeka ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Joshua7:24 Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakaira Akani, mosinto o Zera, amo ne chifeta chiria, na egetambaa keria gi’okwambara, na ebao eria y’etahabu, goika ebate ekorokwa Akori. Bakaira na abana baye, abamura na abaiseke, ne chiombe, ne chitigere, ne ching’ondi chiaye, na eema amo nebinto binde bionsi ebi abwate." 
Joshua7:25 Agwo Yoshua akamotebia, “Naki gwatorenteire emechando iga? Bono naye Omonene okorenteire emechando.” Erio Abaisraeli bonsi bagaaka Akani amagena goika agakwa; bagaaka na baria bande amagena, bakabasamba nomorero." 
Joshua7:26 Abaisraeli bakaruta amagena igoro y’Akani goika amagena ayio akaba etui eyere aroro goika rero iga. Erio Omonene agatiga ekeririanda kiaye kegakenda. Ase ayio aase aria akarokwa Ebate y’Akori buna akorokwa nonya ngoika rero iga. 
Joshua8:1 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Toondoka, gose toiroka, imoka oire abarwani b’esegi amo naye, ogende orwanie omochie o Ai, Rora, nabekire omoruoti o Ai, na abanto baye, amo nomochie na ense yaye, ase amaboko ao." 
Joshua8:2 Okore omoruoti o Ai na omochie oye buna gwakorete Yeriko na omoruoti oye. Korende ase engaki eye monyare koira ebinto ne chitugo morasakore, bibe ebiaino. Obeke abanto baboere omochie, na koyoumokera korwa nyuma.”" 
Joshua8:3 Erio Yoshua amo nabarwani bonsi, bakebeka ang’e kogenda korwania Ai. Agachora abanto chilifu emerongo etato abaare chituoni chie chinguru, akabatoma aroro botuko." 
Joshua8:4 Akabachika akabatebia, “Genda mwebise, moboere omochie korwa nyuma, timobeera aare, korende mwebeke ang’e koyoumokera." 
Joshua8:5 Inche amo nabarwani bonsi tore komo natoumokere omochie. Ekero abanto ba Ai barasoke gotorwania, buna bakorete engaki eria ye ritang’ani, intwe ntotame." 
Joshua8:6 Erio batobwatie, naintwe tobang’use gochia aare korwa ase omochie. Barabwo barengererie iga: Bono batamire korwa asetore, buna bakorete engaki eria ye ritang’ani." 
Joshua8:7 Bono ekero togotama, inwe morue ase moboete, moumokere omochie, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, oyobekire ase amaboko aino." 
Joshua8:8 Ekero mwabwatire omochie goika moyosambe, buna Omonene achikire, Morigererie mono, mokore buna nabachikire.”" 
Joshua8:9 Naboigo Yoshua akabatoma, na barabwo bakagenda, bakaboa egati ya Beteli na Ai, bosongo ya Ai. Korende Yoshua agatigara, akabeera amo nabanto obotuko obwo." 
Joshua8:10 Rituko ria kabere, mambia chuni, Yoshua akaroberia abanto baye, ere amo nabagaaka b’Abaisraeli bagatang’ana abanto gochia Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Abarwani bonsi, abarenge amo nere, bagatiira, bagaika ang’e nomochie, bagatoora sugusu ya Ai; rikura ndiarenge egati yabo na Ai." 
Joshua8:12 Yoshua agachora abarwani chilifu isano, akababisa bosongo y’omochie, ase egati ya Beteli na Ai." 
Joshua8:13 Naboigo abarwani baroberetigwe: Omoganda omonene bw’abarwani okabekwa sugusu y’omochie, na abarwani bande bakabekwa koboa bosongo y’omochie. Yoshua akagenda, akabeera gati‐gati ye rikura obotuko boria." 
Joshua8:14 Ekero omoruoti o Ai aroche amang’ana buna are, akaayerera amo nabanto baye baare omochie ime, bakebeka ang’e. Mambia chuni bagasoka korwania Abaisraeli agwo aase aragetwe, kororia Ekerubo Ekiomo. Korende omoruoti tamanyete ng’a abarwani mbaboete magega y’omochie." 
Joshua8:15 Yoshua amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bagekora buna babuirwe, bagatama gochia erooro." 
Joshua8:16 Abanto bonsi b’omochie bakarangerigwa kobabwatia, na kobabwatirie Yoshua, bakang’uswa gochia aare korwa ase omochie." 
Joshua8:17 Kera omonto agatiga omochie ase okobwatia Abaisraeli. Onde tatigarete ime ya Ai, gose Beteli; omochie ogatigwa bosa otari na getango." 
Joshua8:18 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Raga ne ritimo riao rire koboko kwao gochia Ai, ekiagera ninkoe omochie oyo ase amaboko ao.” Yoshua akaraga omochie ne ritimo abwate koboko kwaye." 
Joshua8:19 Bwango ekero Yoshua aramborete okoboko kwaye, abarwani baria bakaimoka korwa ase baboete bakaminyoka gochia ase omochie, bakayobwata. Erio bwango bakayosamba nomorero." 
Joshua8:20 Abanto ba Ai bagachia korigereria nyuma, bakarora erioki korwa ase omochie rikoimoka igoro. Bagasinywa gotama gochia aaria na aaria, ekiagera Abaisraeli abwo konya batamire gochia erooro bakairana kobaumokera." 
Joshua8:21 Ekero Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi baroche ng’a abwo baboete babwatire omochie na koyosamba, bakairana, bagachaka goita abanto ba Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Abaisraeli abarenge ase omochie ime bagatirimboka gochiao. Ase igo abanto ba Ai bagaetananwa kegima n’Abaisraeli, na bonsi bagaitwa. Onde tatigarete otooregete," 
Joshua8:23 otatiga omoruoti o Ai. Ere akabwatwa, akarentwa ore moyo ase Yoshua." 
Joshua8:24 Ekero Abaisraeli bakoorire goita abanto bonsi ba Ai abarenge agwo aase aarabu, na ase erooro, ase babaseretie gochia, bakairana Ai, bagaita nemioro bonsi abarenge aroro." 
Joshua8:25 Bonsi abaitetwe ase rituko erio nigo barenge chilifu ikomi na ibere. Abwo nabwo barenge abanto bonsi ba Ai. 
Joshua8:26 Yoshua taringete okoboko kwaye, okwo kwabwatete ritimo goika ekero abanto bonsi ba Ai baitetwe." 
Joshua8:27 Abaisraeli bakaira chitugo na ebinto binde basakorete bikaba ebiabo, buna Omonene atebetie Yoshua." 
Joshua8:28 Yoshua agasamba omochie o Ai, akayotiga ore ritombe, nabo ore goika rero iga." 
Joshua8:29 Agatonga omoruoti o Ai ase omote igoro, akamotigao goika mogoroba. Ekero erioba rikogwa Yoshua agachika ng’a egetondo gesungorwe, getugutwe ase egeita ki’omochie; na abanto bagakora bo. Erio bakagetuba amagena, akaba etui eyereo goika rero iga." 
Joshua8:30 Yoshua akaagachera Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, egesasimero ase egetunwa ki’Ebali." 
Joshua8:31 Agakeagacha buna Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, achigete Abaisraeli, buna arikire ase Ebuku y’Amachiko a Musa: “Egesasimero keagacheire amagena atabaachetwe negekorero gi’ekioma.” Agwo bakaruera Omonene ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na eki’omorembe." 
Joshua8:32 Abaisraeli kobarigereretie, Yoshua akarika ase amagena amachiko aria aria Musa konya arikire." 
Joshua8:33 Omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli amo nabagaaka babo, na abatang’ani, na abagambi ebina, amo nabamenyi bonsi, abamenyete ase egati yabo, bagatenena ase chinsemo ibere chi’Esanduku y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene, barigereretie abakuani Abalawi abayebogoretie. Ekeng’ese ki’abanto bakarigereria egetunwa kia Gerisimu, na ekeng’ese kende egetunwa ki’Ebali. Musa omosomba bw’Omonene, konya ochikire kare ng’a Abaisraeli banyore ogosesenigwa ritang’ani." 
Joshua8:34 Erio Yoshua akabasomera amang’ana onsi ay’amachiko, ogosesenigwa na okoragererigwa, buna arikire ase Ebuku y’Amachiko." 
Joshua8:35 Yoshua agasomera omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, amo nabakungu na abana, na abamenyi, abamenyete ase egati yabo, amang’ana onsi Musa achigete, tatigete nonya nerimo." 
Joshua9:1 Obobui bw’Abaisraeli nigo bwamanyekanete ase abaruoti bonsi bamenyete bosongo ya Yorodan, ase ebitunwa, na ase ense omweya, na ense yonsi yare mbarabare y’Enyancha Enene, ebwatekaine gochia Lebanoni, abaruoti b’Abahiti, na Abaamori, na Abakanani, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi." 
Joshua9:2 Barabwo bakabwatana amo, erinde barwanie Yoshua na Abaisraeli." 
Joshua9:3 Ekero Abagibeoni baigwete buna Yoshua akorete emechie ya Yeriko na Ai," 
Joshua9:4 bakagamba bagende komong’ainereria nobong’aini. Bakamanora, bagasangereria ebinto bi’orogendo, bakaberekia chitigere chiabo chigunia chingotu, na ebirandi ebigotu bi’edivai, bikorire korwa ase amasankwa, bibekire ebiraka." 
Joshua9:5 Naende bakabeka ebikoroto ebigotu biatandogete, ne chiganchwa chingotu, na emegati bairete nigo yarenge emeboosu na emegundo." 
Joshua9:6 Erio bakagenda ase Yoshua ase egetwori kia Giligali bakamotebia ere amo n’Abaisraeli, “Intwe nigo twarure ense y’aare. Ntorigetie mokore okobwatana naintwe.”" 
Joshua9:7 Korende Abaisraeli bagatebia Abahivi baria, “Naki rende torakore okobwatana nainwe? Aande gose nigo momenyete ase egati yaito.”" 
Joshua9:8 Bagatebia Yoshua, “Intwe nabasomba bao tore.” Yoshua akababoria, “Inwe mbanto ki more? Ng’ai mokorwa?”" 
Joshua9:9 Erio bakamoiraneria, “Intwe abasomba bao nigo twarure ense y’aare, twaigure erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oo, buna riakumire. Twaigure amang’ana onsi ayakorete aria Misiri," 
Joshua9:10 na buna akorete abaruoti b’Abaamori, moocha ya Yorodan, nabwo Sihoni, omoruoti o Hesiboni, na Ogi, oyo o Basani, oyio omenyete Asitaroti." 
Joshua9:11 Abagaaka baito, na abanyene bonsi b’ense yaito, bagatotebia ng’a tobogorie endagera togochia koria inchera, na kogenda koumerana nainwe, na kobatebia ng’a ntorigetie koba abasomba baino, naende tobaborie mokore okobwatana naintwe." 
Joshua9:12 Rigereria emegatiyaito! Nigo yarenge morero korwa riko, ekero twachagete orogendo rwaito, na rora bono buna yaboosire, naende yagundire." 
Joshua9:13 Ebirandi ebi bi’edivai bikorire korwa ase amasankwa nigo biarenge ebiyia ekero twabiichoretie edivai, na rora bono biatandokire. Ne chianga chiaito na ebikoroto boigo tobegete biagotire ase engencho y’orogendo rwaito orotambe.”" 
Joshua9:14 Abaisraeli bagancha koigwa endagera yabo, korende tibarigia ogosemia korwa ase Omonene." 
Joshua9:15 Yoshua agakora omorembe na kobwatana nabarabwo, akabaa ribaga babe moyo na komenyao. Abatang’ani b’omoganda bw’Abaisraeli bagancherana nokobwatana okwo ase ogotiana." 
Joshua9:16 Amatuko atato nyuma kobakorire okobwatana nabanto abwo, Abaisraeli bakaigwa ng’a barabwo ng’ang’e bamenyete." 
Joshua9:17 Ase ayio Abaisraeli bakamanora, bakagenda, na ase rituko ria gatato bagaika emechie yabo: Gibeoni, na Kefira, na Beroti, na Kiriati‐Yearimu." 
Joshua9:18 Abaisraeli bagatiga tibaita abanto baria, ekiagera abatang’ani babo konya barire eira ase ogotiana ase erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli. Abanto b’omoganda bakemurunganeria abatang’ani." 
Joshua9:19 Korende abatang’ani baria bakabairaneria. “Intwe ntwabarierete eira na gotiana ase erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli. Ase igo titokonyara kobakorera bobe." 
Joshua9:20 Aya naro torabakorere: Tobatige babe moyo ase engencho y’ogotiana okwo twatianete. Nyasae tabaisa gotoa egesusuro.” 
Joshua9:21 Naende bakabora, “Tobatige babe moyo, korende babe bagwatia chinko, naende babe bakorentera abanto bonsi amache.”" 
Joshua9:22 Erio Yoshua akarangeria abanto baria, akababoria, “Nase ki mwatong’ainete na goteba ng’a nigo mokamenyete ense y’aare, na inwe nabanto momenyete ang’e aa ase egati yaito?" 
Joshua9:23 Ase ayio mwaragererigwe. Inwe namobe abasomba botambe, mogwatia chinko na korenta amache ase enyomba ya Nyasae one.”" 
Joshua9:24 Barabwo bakairaneria Yoshua, “Omonene, nigo twakorire aya, ekiagera twatebetigwe na koenekerigwa ng’a Omonene. Nyasae oo, nachigete Musa, omosomba oye, abae ense eye engima na gosiria bonsi abamenyete aa. Ase ayio tokaondoka, tokaba nobwoba obonene ng’a motoite; ayio akagera togakora aya." 
Joshua9:25 Intwe bono nao tore ase amaboko ao, otokorere aya oroche are amaya na amaronge.”" 
Joshua9:26 Yoshua akabakorera igo, akabatooria korwa ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli, barabwo tibabaita." 
Joshua9:27 Na ase rituko riria akababeka babe bagwatia chinko na korenta amache ase omoganda na ase egesasimero ki’Omonene, aase aria Omonene achorete asasimerwe. Naboigo bagendererete gokora goika rero iga." 
Joshua10:1 Adoni‐Sedeki, omoruoti o Yerusalemu, akaigwa ng’a Yoshua obuire omochie o Ai na oyosiririe kegima, oitire na omoruoti bw’aroro, buna akorete Yeriko na omoruoti bw’aroro. Naboigo akaigwa buna Abagibeoni bakorire omorembe na kobwatana n’Abaisraeli, naende ng’a banyorire ribaga komenya ase egati yabo." 
Joshua10:2 Bono omoruoti oria amo nabanto baye bakaondoka mono; ekiagera Gibeoni nigo orenge omochie omonene buna omochie onde bwonsi obwate omoruoti; nomonene orenge kobua Ai, na abarwani baye bonsi b’esegi nigo barenge ne chinguru chi’okorwana." 
Joshua10:3 Adoni‐Sedeki, omuruoti o Yerusalemu, agatoma abanto gochia ase Hohamu, omoruoti o Heburoni, na Piramu, omoruoti o Yarimuti, na Yafia, omoruoti o Lakisi, na Debiri, omoruoti bw’Egiloni, akabatebia," 
Joshua10:4 “Tiira gocha aa, monkonye, torwanie Abagibeoni, ekiagera barabwo bakorire omorembe na kobwatana na Yoshua na Abaisraeli.”" 
Joshua10:5 Erio abaruoti abwo batano b’Abaamori: oyo o Yerusalemu, na oyo o Heburoni, na oyo o Yarimuti, na oyo o Lakisi, na oyo bw’Egiloni, bagasangererekana amo, bagatiira amo nabarwani babo bonsi, bagaetanana Gibeoni na koyoumokera." 
Joshua10:6 Erio Abagibeoni bagatoma abanto ase Yoshua agwo Giligali ase atoorete komotebia, “Tototiga intwe abasomba bao! Ayerera, otiire gocha aa, otokonye na gototooria, ekiagera abaruoti bonsi b’Abaamori, abwo bamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa, basangererekanire gotorwania.”" 
Joshua10:7 Ase igo Yoshua na abarwani baye bonsi amo ne chituoni chi’esegi bagatiira korwa Giligali. 
Joshua10:8 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Tobairoka, nabekire abanto aba ase okoboko kwao, onde tari oranyare gokobua.”" 
Joshua10:9 Obotuko obogima Yoshua agataara korwa Giligali, akaumokera Abaamori mobosokano." 
Joshua10:10 Omonene akabatantania na kobaondokia ase amasio ’Abaisraeli, nabarabwo bakabaita ogoita okonene agwo Gibeoni, akababwatia gochia egetirimboko kia Beti‐Horoni, naende akababwatia na kobaita goika omochie bw’Aseka na oyo o Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Ekero Abaamori barenge gotama Abaisraeli, na kobaikire egetirimboko gekorua Beti‐Horoni, Nyasae akabaiyereria amagena ’embura amanene mono korwa igoro ase enchera yabo goika omochie bw’Aseka, nabarabwo bagakwa. Abwo baitetwe namagena ’embura nigo barenge abange kobua abwo baitetwe n’Abaisraeli." 
Joshua10:12 Ase rituko riria Omonene abegete Abaamori ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli, Yoshua agakwana n’Omonene. Ekero Abaisraeli bategererete, akabora, “Aye erioba, tenena, okire‐kiri igoro ya Gibeoni, naye omotienyi boigo, igoro ye Rikura ri’Ayaloni!”" 
Joshua10:13 Erio erioba rigatenena rigakira‐kiri, na omotienyi boigo, goika abanto bakeruseria egesiomba ase ababisa babo. Aya nigo arikire ase “Ebuku y’oyore omoronge.” Erioba rigatenena rigakira‐kiri aaria igoro gati‐gati kegima, ang’e rituko rigima, na tiriaayerera kogwa." 
Joshua10:14 Ituko rinde tiriana koba buna erio nonya ng’ake, ritang’ani ri’ayio, gose nyuma y’ayio, ekero Omonene aigwerete mwanyabanto. Nyasae nigo arwanererete Abaisraeli." 
Joshua10:15 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakairana Giligali ase batoorete. 
Joshua10:16 Abaruoti baria batano bagatama, bakebisa ase rikuruma ria Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Ekero Yoshua atebetigwe ng’a abaruoti baria barorekanire bebisete agwo ase rikuruma riria," 
Joshua10:18 agachika, agateba, “Turunkania amagena amanene, mosieke egesoero kie rikuruma, naende mobeke abanto barende aroro." 
Joshua10:19 Korende inwe abande, timobaisa kobeera aroro, mobwatie ababisa baino, mobaumokere korwa nyuma, na kobaita. Timobatiga basoe emechie yabo, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, obabekire ase amaboko aino.”" 
Joshua10:20 Yoshua na Abaisraeli bakabaita ogoita okonene, goika bakabasiria bonsi otatiga abanto bake boka, abwo batamerete emechie yagiteire chindwaki." 
Joshua10:21 Erio abanto bonsi bakairana buya ase Yoshua agwo Makeda ase batoorete. Onde tarenge noboremu gokwana mamincha y’Abaisraeli naende. 
Joshua10:22 Erio Yoshua agateba, “Igora egesoero kie rikuruma na mondetere abaruoti baria batano.”" 
Joshua10:23 Aya agakoreka. Bakarusia abaruoti baria batano korwa ase rikuruma: omoruoti o Yerusalemu, na oyo o Heburoni, na oyo o Yerimuti, na oyo o Lakisi, na oyo bw’Egiloni, bakabarenta ase Yoshua." 
Joshua10:24 Ekero abaruoti baria barentetwe ase Yoshua, ere akarangeria Abaisraeli bonsi amo, agatebia abatang’ani b’abarwani, abwo bagendete amo nere ase esegi, “Inchuo aiga ang’e, motache amagoti ’abaruoti aba.” Erio barabwo bagaika ang’e, bakabatacha." 
Joshua10:25 Naende Yoshua agatebia abatang’ani baria b’abarwani, “Timoiroka, timokwa emioyo; mobe noboremu na gotenena bokong’u, ekiagera naboigo Omonene arakore ababisa bonsi morarwanie.”" 
Joshua10:26 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua agaita abaruoti baria, akabatonga ase emete etano; agwo bagasung’unana goika mogoroba." 
Joshua10:27 Ekero erioba rikogwa Yoshua agachika ng’a ebitondo bi’abanto baria bisungorwe, bitugutwe ase rikuruma riria bebisete, na abanto bagakora bo. Naende bakabeka amagena amanene ase egesoero kie rikuruma, nao are goika rero iga." 
Joshua10:28 Ase rituko riria Yoshua akaumokera na kobwata omochie o Makeda, agaita na gosiria nemioro abanto bonsi pi abarenge imeo, amo nomoruoti obo. Onde tatooregete nonya noyomo. Agakora omoruoti o Makeda buna akorete omoruoti o Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakarua Makeda, bakagenda korwania Libuna." 
Joshua10:30 Omonene akabeka omochie oyio amo nomoruoti oye ase amakobo ’Abaisraeli. Bagaita nemioro abanto bonsi pi b’omochie oyio; onde tatooregete nonya noyomo. Naende agakora omoruoti bw’aroro buna akorete omoruoti o Yeriko. 
Joshua10:31 Erio Yoshua akaimoka amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi korwa Libuna, bakagenda Lakisi, bakayoetanana na koyoumokera." 
Joshua10:32 Na Omonene akabeka Lakisi ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli, erio bakayobwata rituko ria kabere, bagaita nemioro abanto bonsi b’omochie, buna bakorete agwo Libuna." 
Joshua10:33 Erio Horamu, omoruoti o Geseri, agatiira gokonya Lakisi, korende Yoshua akamoita ere amo nabarwani baye; onde tatigarete ore moyo." 
Joshua10:34 Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakarua Lakisi, bakagenda Egiloni, bakayoetanana na koyoumokera." 
Joshua10:35 Rituko erio erio bakayobwata, bagaita nemioro abanto b’aroro, buna bakorete omochie o Lakisi." 
Joshua10:36 Korwa Egiloni Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bagatiira, bagaika Heburoni bayorwanie." 
Joshua10:37 Bakayobwata na bagaita nemioro omoruoti oye na kera omonto bw’omochie oyio amo nabwo b’emechie ende yarenge ang’e Yoshua agasiria omochie oyio kegima, buna akorete omochie bw’Egiloni; tatigete nonya noyomo abe moyo." 
Joshua10:38 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakairana Debiri, akaumokera omochie oyio." 
Joshua10:39 Akayobwata amo nomoruoti oye na emechie yonsi yarenge ang’e. Bagaita nemioro abanto abarenge imeo, tibatigaretie nonya noyomo abe moyo. Agakora omochie o Debiri na omoruoti bw’aroro buna akorete omochie o Heburoni, na omochie o Libuna, na abaruoti b’emechie eyio." 
Joshua10:40 Naboigo Yoshua akaira ense eria engima. Akabua na goita abaruoti bonsi b’ense y’ebitunwa, na eye Negebu, na ey’omwenya, na ey’ebitirimboko. Agaita abanto bonsi pi, tatigaretie nonya noyomo, buna achigetwe n’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Joshua10:41 Yoshua akabua abanto bonsi korwa Kadeshi‐Barinea goika Gasa, na akaira ense yonsi ya Goseni goika Gibeoni." 
Joshua10:42 Nabo Yoshua akabua abaruoti abwo bonsi, ne chinse chiabo, ase engaki eyemo, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo arwanerete Abaisraeli." 
Joshua10:43 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua na Abaisraeli bonsi bakairana Giligali ase batoorete. 
Joshua11:1 Yabini, omoruoti o Hasori, akaigwa amang’ana ayio. Erio agatoma amang’ana ase Yobabu, omoruoti o Madoni, na ase abaruoti ba Simuroni na ase Akisafu," 
Joshua11:2 na ase abaruoti bamenyete sugusu, ase ense y’ebitunwa, na ase Ekerubo Ekiomo, irianyi ya Kinereti, na ase ense omweya amo nabwo b’engegu, ang’e na Dori, ensemo ya bosongo." 
Joshua11:3 Naboigo agatoma amang’ana ase Abakanani ba moocha na bosongo, ase Abaamori na Abahiti, na Abaperisi, na Abayebusi ase ense y’ebitunwa, amo n’Abahivi abamenyete ang’e na Herimoni, egetunwa gi’ense ya Misipa." 
Joshua11:4 Barabwo bagacha nabarwani babo bonsi, omoganda bw’abanto abange buna omokenye bw’engegu y’enyancha. Nigo barenge ne chibarasi ne chigari chinyinge mono." 
Joshua11:5 Abaruoti abwo bonsi bakabwatana, bakagenda bagatoora amo, ang’e ne chinsoko chia Meromu, ase okorwania Abaisraeli." 
Joshua11:6 Omonene agatebia Yoshua, “Toiroka abanto aba, ekiagera ankio, engaki buna eye, nimbarue bonsi bakwe ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli. Nainwe monache chibarasi chiabo chinteng’e na mosambe chigari chiabo nomorero.”" 
Joshua11:7 Yoshua amo nabarwani baye bonsi bakabachiera mobosokano, bakabarwania agwo Meromu, ase chinsoko chiarenge." 
Joshua11:8 Na Omonene akababeka ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli, nabarabwo bakabaumokera na kobaseria gochia Sidoni, omochie omonene, na Misirefoti‐Maimu, na goika ebate ya Misipa, ensemo ya moocha. Bakabaita; monto tatigara nonya noyomo." 
Joshua11:9 Yoshua akabakora buna Omonene amochigete; akanacha chibarasi chiabo chinteng’e agasamba chigari chiabo nomorero. 
Joshua11:10 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua akairana gochia Hasori, akayobwata, agaita omoruoti bw’aroro nomoro. (Engaki eria Hasori nigo orenge omochie omonene bw’amaruoti aria onsi)." 
Joshua11:11 Bagaita bonsi abarenge ase omochie oyio ime, bakabasiria kegima, tibatigaria nonya noyomo ore moyo, na omochie obo bakayosamba nomorero." 
Joshua11:12 Nabo Yoshua akaira emechie yonsi y’abaruoti baria, na abaruoti abanyene amo na bonsi abarengeo akabaita nemioro, akabasiria kegima, buna Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, konya achikire." 
Joshua11:13 Abaisraeli tibasambete emechie eyio yaagachetwe ase ebigoro igoro, otatiga Hazori bwoka, noro Yoshua asambete." 
Joshua11:14 Abaisraeli bagasakora ebinto bionsi bi’emechie eyio, ne chitugo chionsi bakaira chikaba echiabo. Korende bagaita abanto bonsi nemioro, bakabasiria kegima, tibatigaria nonya noyomo ore moyo." 
Joshua11:15 Buna Omonene achigete Musa, omosomba oye, naboigo Musa achigete Yoshua. Na Yoshua agakora ayio onsi, tatigete kende gionsi ase ayio onsi Omonene achigete Musa." 
Joshua11:16 Yoshua akaira ense eria engima: Ense y’ebitunwa, na Negebu engima, na ense yonsi ya Goseni, na ense omweya, na Ekerubo Ekiomo, amo nebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli na ense omweya y’aroro." 
Joshua11:17 Akaira ense eria yonsi gochakera egetunwa kia Halaki agwo irianyi, kegotiirerwa gochia Seiri na goikera Baali‐Gadi agwo sugusu ase ebate ya Lebanoni, inse y’egetunwa kia Herimoni. Agoosa abaruoti bonsi b’agwo, akabaaka na kobaita." 
Joshua11:18 Yoshua konya obeire okorwania abaruoti abwo ase engaki entambe. 
Joshua11:19 Omochie onde tori, nonya noyomo, okorete omorembe na kobwatana n’Abaisraeli, otatiga Gibeoni ase Abahivi bamenyete. Emechie ende yonsi nigo yabuetwe ase esegi eria." 
Joshua11:20 Omonene nere okong’etie chinkoro chiabo ng’a barwanie Abaisraeli, erinde barabwo abanyene basirigwe kegima batari kororerwa amabera. Nabo Omonene konya achikire Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Ase engaki eria Yoshua akagenda gosiria Abaanaki, abamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa, na ase Heburoni, na Debiri, na Anabu, na ase ense yonsi y’ebitunwa bi ’Abayuda na ebi’Abaisraeli, Yoshua akabasiria kegima amo nemechie yabo." 
Joshua11:22 Abaanaki bande tibatigarete ase ense y’Abaisraeli nonya noyomo. Ase Gati, na Asidodi nao bake batigarete’." 
Joshua11:23 Yoshua akaira ense eria engima, buna Omonene konya achikire Musa. Akayea Abaisraeli ebe omwando obo, akayiatananera kera egesaku ensemo yaye. Na bono ense eria ekaba nomorembe etari nesegi." 
Joshua12:1 Abaisraeli bakabua abaruoti na bakaira ense yarenge ng’umbu, moocha ya Yorodan, korwa rigoko ri’Arinoni goika egetunwa kia Herimoni, amo n’Ekerubo Ekiomo, ensemo ya moocha. Abaruoti abwo nabwo aba:" 
Joshua12:2 Oyomo obo nere Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori. Ere nigo amenyete Hesiboni, akagamba korwa Aroeri ore ensinyo ye rigoko ri’Arinoni, na korwa gati‐gati ye rigoko riria goika orooche rwa Yaboki, orore ribebe ri’Abaamoni. Ense eyio nekeng’ese kia Gileadi." 
Joshua12:3 Naende akaba okogamba ase Ekerubo Ekiomo, moocha y’enyancha ya Kinereti goika Beti‐Yesimoti, ensemo ya moocha y’Enyancha y’Omonyo, eyere ase Ekerubo Ekiomo, gochia irianyi goika ebitirimboko bi’egetunwa gia Pisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Naende bakabua Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, oyorenge oyomo bw’Abarefai abwo batigarete. Ere nigo amenyete ase Asitaroti na Edirei," 
Joshua12:5 akaba okogamba ase egetunwa kia Herimoni, na ase Saleka, na ase Basani engima goika orobebe rw’Abagesuri na Abamaaka, amo nekeng’ese kende kia Gileadi goika orogongo rwa Sihoni, omoruoti o Hesiboni." 
Joshua12:6 Abaruoti abwo konya babuirwe na Musa amo n’Abaisraeli. Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, konya oeire Abareuben na Abagadi, amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, ense eria ebe eyabo." 
Joshua12:7 Yohsua na Abaisraeli bakabua na goita abaruoti bonsi abamenyete bosongo ya Yorodan, gochakera Baali‐Gadi ase ebate ya Lebanoni goikera egetunwa kia Halaki, kegotiirerwa gochia Seiri. Yoshua agaatananera kera egesaku ki’Abaisraeli ense eria ekaba eyabo." 
Joshua12:8 Ense eria ekabwaterania ense y’ebitunwa, na ense omweya, na Ekerubo Ekiomo, na ebitirimboko bi’ebitunwa, amo nerooro, na Negebu, na ense y’Abahiti, na ey’Abaamori, na ey’Abakanani, na ey’Abaperisi, na ey’Abahivi, na ey’Abayebusi. Abaruoti abwo babuetwe nabwo aba:" 
Joshua12:9 Omoruoto o Yeriko, na oyo bwa Ai, ang’e na Beteli," 
Joshua12:10 na oyo o Yerusalemu, na oyo o Heburoni," 
Joshua12:11 na oyo o Yarimuti, na oyo o Lakisi," 
Joshua12:12 na oyo bw’Egiloni, na oyo o Geseri," 
Joshua12:13 na oyo o Debiri, na oyo o Gederi," 
Joshua12:14 na oyo o Horima, na oyo bw’Aradi," 
Joshua12:15 na oyo o Libuna, na oyo bw’Adulamu," 
Joshua12:16 na oyo o Makeda, na oyo o Beteli," 
Joshua12:17 na oyo o Tapua, na oyo o Heferi," 
Joshua12:18 na oyo bw’Afeki, na oyo o Lasaroni," 
Joshua12:19 na oyo o Madoni, na oyo o Hasori," 
Joshua12:20 na oyo o Simuroni‐Meroni, na oyo bw’Akisafu," 
Joshua12:21 na oyo o Taanaki, na oyo o Megido" 
Joshua12:22 na oyo o Kedesi, na oyo o Yokinamu, ang’e na Karimeli," 
Joshua12:23 na oyo o Dori, ase orogongo rwa Dori, na oyo o Goimu ase Giligali," 
Joshua12:24 na oyo o Tirisa. Abaruoti abwo bonsi nigo barenge emerongo etato nomo. 
Joshua13:1 Bono Yoshua konya ogotire mono. Omonene akamotebia, “Aye bono kwagotire mono, korende ensemo enene y’ense netigarete etarairwa." 
Joshua13:2 Chinsemo chiatigaire nachio echi: Chinsemo chionsi chi’Abafilisti, na ense yonsi y’Abagesuri." 
Joshua13:3 (Ense yonsi gochakera orooche rwa Sihori, moocha ya Misiri, goikera orobebe rw’Ekironi aria sugusu nigo ebarire ng’a ney’Abakanani. Abagambi batano b’Abafilisti nigo bamenyete Gasa, na Asidodi, na Asikeloni, na Gati, na Ekironi.) Naende nero ense y’Abaavi," 
Joshua13:4 na gochia irianyi ense yonsi y’Abakanani, korwa Meara eyare kogamberwa n’Abasidoni, goika Afeki na goika orobebe rw’Abaamori;" 
Joshua13:5 ense y’Abagebali amo na Lebanoni yonsi gochia moocha, na korwa Baali‐Gadi inse y’egetunwa kia Herimoni goika enchera ekogenda Hamati." 
Joshua13:6 Abasidoni abwo bonsi bamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa egati y’egetunwa kia Lebanoni na omochie o Misirefoti‐Maimu, inche omonyene nimbaserie barue bosio bw’Abaisraeli. Aye goika bwatananere Abaisraeli ense eyio ebe omwando obo, ase okoyeakera obomera, buna nagochigete." 
Joshua13:7 Ase igo bono atanana ense eye ase egati y’ebisaku kianda amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, ebe omwando obo.”" 
Joshua13:8 Abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, konya bairire ense ere ng’umbu, moocha ya Yorodan ekaba, omwando obo. Eyio nero Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, konya abaeire." 
Joshua13:9 Ense yabo nigo yachakerete korwa Aroeri, ang’e ne rigoko ri’Arinoni, na omochie ore gati‐gati ye rigoko riria, ekabwaterania nense eimokererete igoro ere enteremu, korwa Medeba goika Diboni," 
Joshua13:10 amo nemechie yonsi ya Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, oria orenge kogambera Hesiboni, goikera orogongo rw’Abaamori." 
Joshua13:11 Naende ekabwaterania Gileadi na orogongo rw’Abagesuri na orw’Abamaaka, amo negetunwa gionsi kia Herimoni, na Basani yonsi goika Saleka," 
Joshua13:12 na ime ase Basani oboruoti bwonsi bwa Ogi, oyo orenge kogambera Asitaroti na Edirei. (Ogi nere oyo otigarete korwa ase Abarefai.) Abwo Musa konya abuire na kobaseria." 
Joshua13:13 Abaisraeli tibaseretie Abagesuri na Abamaaka: barabwo nigo bamenyete ase egati y’Abaisraeli goika rero iga. 
Joshua13:14 Abanto b’egesaku kia Lawi Musa tabaete ensemo ende yonsi ebe omwando obo. Barabwo nigo barabe bakonyora omwando obo obatungetie korwa ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, egekoruegwa ase egesasimero ki’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, buna Omonene atebetie Musa." 
Joshua13:15 Musa konya oeire kera eamate y’egesaku kia Reuben ensemo y’ense ebe omwando obo. 
Joshua13:16 Orogongo rwabo nigo rwabwateranetie omochie bw’Aroeri, ang’e ne rigoko ri’Arinoni, amo nomochie ore gati‐gati ye rigoko, na ense eimokererete igoro ere enteremu, yaetanaine Medeba," 
Joshua13:17 na Hesiboni, na emechie yonsi ase ense eimokererete igoro ere enteremu; Diboni, na Bamoti‐Baali, na Beti‐Baali‐Meoni;" 
Joshua13:18 Yahasi na Kedemoti, na Mefaati;" 
Joshua13:19 Kiriataimu, na Sibuma, na Sereti‐Sahari, oyore ase ekegoro kie rigoko;" 
Joshua13:20 Beti‐Peori amo nebitirimboko bi’egetunwa gia Pisiga, na Beti‐Yesimoti;" 
Joshua13:21 emechie yonsi y’ense eimokererete igoro ere enteremu, na oboruoti bwonsi bwa Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, oyio konya ogambeire Hesiboni. Musa konya omobuire ere amo nabanene bonsi b’Abamidiani: Evi, na Rekemu, na Suri, na Huri, na Reba. Abwo bonsi barenge kogamba inse ya Sihoni bamenyete ase ense eria." 
Joshua13:22 Baalamu, omoringoria, mosinto o Beori, nigo arenge oyomo bw’abwo Abaisraeli baitete nemioro." 
Joshua13:23 Orooche rwa Yorodan nigo rwarenge orobebe rwa bosongo rw’orogongo rw’egesaku kia Reuben. Emechie eyio amo nebichie biabo nigo yaatananetwe ase kera eamate y’egesaku kia Reuben, ekaba omwando obo." 
Joshua13:24 Musa konya oeire kera eamate y’egesaku kia Gadi ensemo y’ense eria ebe omwando obo. 
Joshua13:25 Orogongo rwabo nigo rwabwateranetie Yaeseri na emechie yonsi ya Gileadi, na ekeng’se gi’ense y’Abaamori goika Aroeri, oyore moocha ya Raba," 
Joshua13:26 na ense korwa Hesiboni goika Ramati‐Misipa na Betonimu, na korwa Mahanaimu goika orobebe rwa Debiri." 
Joshua13:27 Ase riranya ria Yorodan orogongo rwabo nigo rwabwateranetie Beti‐Haramu na Beti‐Nimura, na Sukoti, na Safoni, na ensemo eye yatigarete ey’oboruoti bwa Sihoni o Hesiboni. Crooche rwa Yorodan narwo rwarenge orobebe rwabo rwa bosongo gochia sugusu goika enyancha ya Kinereti." 
Joshua13:28 Emechie eyio amo nebichie biabo nigo yaatananetwe ase kera eamate y’egesaku kia Gadi ebe omwando obo. 
Joshua13:29 Musa konya oeire kera eamate y’ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase ensemo y’ense eyio, ebe omwando obo." 
Joshua13:30 Orogongo rwabo nigo rwachakerete Mahanaimu, na nigo rwabwateranetie Basani engima oboruoti bwonsi bw’Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, amo nemechie yonsi emerongo etano nomo ya Yairi agwo Basani." 
Joshua13:31 Orogongo rwabo nigo rwabwateranetie naende ekeng’ese kia Gileadi amo n’Asitaroti, na Edirei, emechie emenene y’oboruoti bw’Ogi, omoruoti o Basani. Eyio nigo yarwetwe ase kera eamate y’ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Makiri, mosinto o Manase, ekaba omwando obo." 
Joshua13:32 Eyio nero emiando Musa aatananete agwo ase ebirubo ebiomo bia Moabu, moocha ya Yorodan, kororia Yeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Korende Musa taete egesaku kia Lawi ensemo ende yonsi ebe omwando obo. Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nere obete omwando obo, buna abatebetie." 
Joshua14:1 Echi nachio chingongo Abaisraeli baatananeretwe ase ense ya Kanani, chibe emiando yabo. Eleazari, omokuani, amo na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, na abateneneri be chiamate chi’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli bakabaatananera ense ase ogoaka obomera." 
Joshua14:2 Omonene nigo achigete Musa ng’a obomera boakwe ekero agwatanana ense ase ebisaku biria kianda, amo na keria kende ekeng’ese." 
Joshua14:3 Naki Musa konya oeire ebisaku binde bibere na ekeng’ese ense ere ng’umbu, moocha ya Yorodan, ebe omwando obo, korende Abalawi barabwo tibaetwe ense ase egati yabo, ebe omwando obo." 
Joshua14:4 Ororeria rwa Yusufu nigo rwarenge ebisaku bibere: Manase na Efraimu. Abalawi tibaetwe orogongo, otatiga baetwe emechie bakomenya, amo nebitii ase chitugo chiabo chiare korisia na ase baare kobeka ebinto biabo." 
Joshua14:5 Naboigo Abaisraeli baatananete ense ase ogoaka obomera, buna Omonene achigete Musa." 
Joshua14:6 Engaki eyio abanto bande b’egesaku kia Yuda bakagenda ase Yoshua agwo Giligali. Oyomo bw’abwo, Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, Omokenisi, akamotebia, “Nomanyete aya Omonene atebetie Musa, omonto oria o Nyasae, igoro yane naye, ekero twarenge Kadeshi‐Barinea." 
Joshua14:7 Inche konya nakoorire emiaka emerongo ene ekero Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, antomete korwa Kadeshi‐Barinea koroota ense eye, na inche nkamorentera amang’ana ’ekeene." 
Joshua14:8 Abanto baria twagendete komo bakagera abanto bakerusia moyo, korende inche nkaba omwegenwa ase okoigwera Omonene, Nyasae one." 
Joshua14:9 Rituko riria Musa akandiera eira na gotiana, agateba: Ekeene, ense eyio amagoro ao atachete nigo erabe omwando oo, na oyo bw’ororeria rwao botambe, ekiagera kwaigwerete Omonene, Nyasae one." 
Joshua14:10 Bono rora, emiaka emerongo ene, na etano, yaetire korwa rituko riria Omonene atebetie Musa amang’ana ayio, ase engaki eria Abaisraeli baetete ase erooro, na Omonene ondendire ngendererete koba moyo. Na bono, rora, nabeire nemiaka emerongo etano na etato, na etano," 
Joshua14:11 na inche nigo inde ne chinguru ching’ana buna chiria nabwate rituko riria Musa antomete. Nonya ndero nabo inde ne chinguru chi’okogenda korwana esegi na echi’okoirana. 
Joshua14:12 Ase igo, bono ing’a ense eye y’ebitunwa, eye Omonene andierete eira ase rituko riria ng’a nang’e. Nkwaigwete aye omonyene ng’a Abaanaki nigo bamenyeteo, na buna emechie yabo yarenge emenene, naende yagiteire chindwaki. Aande nabo Omonene arabe amo nainche, erinde imbaserie, buna Omonene atebete.”" 
Joshua14:13 Erio Yoshua agasesenia Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, akamoa omochie o Heburoni okaba omwando oye." 
Joshua14:14 Naboigo Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, Omokenisi, akaegwa Heburoni, okaba omwando oye. Nonya ndero iga ororeria rwaye narwo royobwate, ekiagera ere aigwerete Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Joshua14:15 Kare Heburoni nigo orenge korokwa Kiriati‐Ariba. Ariba nigo arenge omonto omonene ase Abaanaki. Na bono ense eria ekaba nomorembe, etari nesegi." 
Joshua15:1 Chiamate chi’egesaku kia Yuda nigo chiaetwe orogongo rwabo ase ensemo ya irianyi, ang’e norobebe rwa Edomu, ase erooro ya Sini ere irianyi kegima." 
Joshua15:2 Orobebe rwabo rwa irianyi nigo rwachakerete ase ensinyo y’Enyancha y’Omonyo ensemo ya irianyi," 
Joshua15:3 rokagenderera gochia irianyi y’Egetunwa ki’Ebiuge, na goetera Sini gochia irianyi ya Kadeshi‐Barinea, naende rogaeta Hezironi, rogatiira gochia Adari, rokaonchoka rogaika Karika," 
Joshua15:4 rokagenderera gochia Asimoni rokabwatia orooche rw’orobebe rwa Misiri goika Enyancha Enene ase rwatwomerete. Oro narwo orobebe rw’Abayuda, ensemo ya irianyi." 
Joshua15:5 Orobebe rwa moocha nigo rwabwatetie Enyancha y’Omonyo goika ensemo yaye ya sugusu ase orooche rwa Yorodan ronuchete. Orobebe rwa sugusu nigo rwachakerete aroro," 
Joshua15:6 rokagenderera gochia Beti‐Hogila, rogaeta sugusu ya Beti‐Araba. Erio rogaika Rigena ria Bohani, mosinto o Reuben," 
Joshua15:7 na rokagenda korwa ebate eria y’Akori goika Debiri, naende rokaonehoka sugusu gochia Giligali kororia Adumini, irianyi y’ebate eria. Naende rokagenderera goika chinsoko chia Eni‐Semesi rogaika ase ensoko ya Eni‐Rogeli. Erio rokagenderera goika chinsoko chia Eni‐Semesi, na goika ensoko ya Eni‐Rogeli." 
Joshua15:8 Erio rokagenderera gochia rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu, irianyi y’egetunwa kia Yebusi, nao Yerusalemu. Nyuma y’ayio rogatiira gochia egetunwa igoro, ekio kerochie Rikura ria Hinomu, ensemo ya bosongo, sugusu y’ense omweremo ya Refaimu." 
Joshua15:9 Korwa egetunwa igoro orobebe rogatirimboka gochia ensoko ya Nefitoa, na korwa agwo rogaikera emechie ang’e negetunwa gia Efuroni. Agwo rokaonchoka gochia Baala, (noro Kiriati‐Yearimu)," 
Joshua15:10 rogaetanana bosongo ya Baala gochia egetunwa gia Seiri, naende sugusu y’egetunwa kia Yearimu (nakio Kesaloni), na maate gochia Beti‐Semesi na rokabwatia Timuna." 
Joshua15:11 Orobebe rokagenderera gochia sugusu ase egetunwa gi’Ekironi, rokaonchoka gochia Sikironi, rokabwatia egetunwa kia Baala, naende rogaika Yabuneli, na omoerio rogaika Enyancha Enene," 
Joshua15:12 eyarenge orobebe rwa bosongo. Abanto be chiamate chia Yuda nabwo bamenyete ase orogongo orwo. 
Joshua15:13 Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, akaegwa orogongo rwaye ase egati y’abanto b’egesaku kia Yuda, buna Omonene achigete Yoshua. Akaegwa Kiriati‐Ariba, (nao Heburoni). Ariba nere orenge sokoro y’Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebu agaseria abanto batato b’ororeria rw’Anaki korwa ase omochie oyio. Abaanaki abwo nabwo aba: Sesai, na Ahimani, na Talimai." 
Joshua15:15 Korwa agwo agatiira kogenda korwania abanto ba Debiri. (Kare omochie oyio nigo ore korokwa Kiriati‐Seferi). 
Joshua15:16 Kalebu akabora, “Onde bwensi oranyare kobua na koira omochie o Kiriati‐Seferi nimoe omoiseke one Asika, abe mokaye.”" 
Joshua15:17 Otinieli, mosinto o Kenasi, momura omwabo Kalebu, akaira omochie oyio, na Kalebu akamoa omoiseke oye, akaba mokaye." 
Joshua15:18 Ekero Asika achete bw’Otinieli, akamoboria asabe ise amoe oboremo. Asika akaayerera goika korwa ase etigere igoro. Erio Kalebu akamoboria, “Inki otagete?”" 
Joshua15:19 Asika akairaneria, “Nekeegwa ntagete, ekiagera ngwansogetie okang’ira ase ense enyomo ya Negebu. Ase ayio, ong’e chinsoko chi’amache.” Kalebu akamoa chinsoko chia rogoro amo nechia maate." 
Joshua15:20 Oyo noro omwando bwe chiamate chi’egesaku kia Yuda. 
Joshua15:21 Emechie yabo eyarenge ensinyo kegima ya irianyi ang’e norobebe rw’Edomu, nigo yarenge: Kabuseli, na Ederi, na Yaguri," 
Joshua15:22 Na Kina, na Dimona, na Adada," 
Joshua15:23 na Kedesi, na Hazori, na Itinani," 
Joshua15:24 na Sifu, na Telemu, na Bealoti," 
Joshua15:25 na Hasori‐Hadata, na Kerioti‐Hezironi (noro Hasari)," 
Joshua15:26 na Amamu, na Sema, na Molada," 
Joshua15:27 na Hasari‐Gada, na Hesimoni, na Beti‐Peleti," 
Joshua15:28 na Hasari‐Sauli, na Beeri‐Seba, na Bisiotia," 
Joshua15:29 na Baala, na Iyimu, na Esemu," 
Joshua15:30 na Elitoladi, na Kesili, na Horima," 
Joshua15:31 na Sikilagi, na Madimana, na Sanisana," 
Joshua15:32 na Lebaoti, na Silihimu, na Aini, na Rimoni, emechie emerongo ebere na kianda, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:33 Ase ense omweya nero Esitaoli, na Sora, na Asina," 
Joshua15:34 na Sanoa, na Eni‐Ganimu, na Tapua, na Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 na Yarimuti, na Adulamu, na Soko, na Aseka," 
Joshua15:36 na Saaraimu, na Aditaimu, na Gedera, na Gederotaimu, emechie ikomi na ene, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:37 Naende yarengeo Senani, na Hadasa, na Migidali‐Gadi," 
Joshua15:38 na Diliani, na Misipe, na Yokiteli," 
Joshua15:39 na Lakisi, na Bosikati, na Egiloni," 
Joshua15:40 na Kaboni, na Lamasi, na Kitilisi," 
Joshua15:41 na Gederoti, na Beti‐Dagoni, na Naama, na Makeda, emechie ikomi, na etano nomo, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:42 Naende yarengeo Libuna, na Eteri, na Asani," 
Joshua15:43 na Yifuta, na Asina, na Nesibu," 
Joshua15:44 na Keila, na Akisibu, na Maresa, emechie kianda, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:45 Norengeo Ekironi, amo nemechie na ebichie biaye;" 
Joshua15:46 na korwa Ekironi gochia Enyancha Enene emechie yonsi yarengeo ensemo y’Asidodi, amo nebichie biaye." 
Joshua15:47 Naende yarengeo Asidoli na Gasa amo nemechie na ebichie biabo, goika orooche orore orobebe rwa Misiri, naende goika engegu y’Enyancha Enene." 
Joshua15:48 Na ase ense y’ebitunwa nigo yarengeo: Samiri, na Yatiri, na Soko," 
Joshua15:49 na Dana, na Kiriati‐Sana (noro Debiri)," 
Joshua15:50 na Anabu, na Esitemoa, na Animu," 
Joshua15:51 na Goseni, na Holoni, na Gilo, emechie ikomi nomo, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:52 Naende yarengeo Arabu, na Duma, na Esani," 
Joshua15:53 na Yanumu, na Beti‐Tapua, na Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 na Humuta, na Kiriati‐Ariba (noro Heburoni), na Sihori, emechie kianda, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:55 Naende yarengeo Maoni, na Karimeli, na Sifu, na Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 na Yesireeli, na Yokidamu, na Sanoa," 
Joshua15:57 na Kaini, na Gibea, na Timuna, emechie ikomi, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:58 Naende yarengeo Halihuli, na Beti‐Suri, na Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 na Maarati, na Beti‐Anoti, na Elitekoni, emechie etano nomo, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:60 Naende yarengeo Kiriati‐Baali (noro Kiriati‐Yearimu), na Raba, emechie ebere, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:61 Na aria ase erooro nigo yarengeo: Beti‐Araba, na Midini, na Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 na Nibusani, na Omochie bw’Omonyo, na Eni‐Gedi, emechie etano nomo, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua15:63 Korende Abayuda tibanyarete goseria Abayebusi, abamenyete Yerusalemu. Ase igo Abayebusi nigo bamenyete amo n’Abayuda goika rero iga." 
Joshua16:1 Orobebe rw’orogongo roria obomera bwagwerete ororeria rwa Yusufu rogachakera orooche rwa Yorodan, ang’e na Yeriko, moocha ye chinsoko chi’aroro goika erooro, rogatiira korwa Yeriko goetera ase erooro gochia ase ense y’ebitunwa ya Beteli." 
Joshua16:2 Korwa Beteli rokagenda Lusu, rogatiira gochia Ataroti ase Abaariki bamenyete." 
Joshua16:3 Erio rogatirimboka gochia ase ense y’Abayafeleti goika Beti‐Horoni ya maate, na goika Geseri, naende rogatwomera Enyancha Enene." 
Joshua16:4 Orogongo orwo narwo omwando bw’ebisaku bia Manase na Efraimu, ebi’ororeria rwa Yusufu." 
Joshua16:5 Oro narwo orogongo rwe chiamate chi’egesaku gi’Efraimu: Orobebe rwabo rwa moocha rogachakera Ataroti‐Adari, rokagenderera goika Beti‐Horoni ya rogoro," 
Joshua16:6 na korwa aroro goika Enyancha Enene. Mikimetati noro orenge orobebe rw’ensemo ya sugusu. Korwa Mikimetati orobebe rokaonchoka gochia moocha, rogaika Taanati‐Silo, rogaeta ase omochie oyio, rokagenderera gochia moocha, rogaika Yanoa." 
Joshua16:7 Korwa Yanoa rogatirimboka gochia Ataroti na Naara, erio rogatwomera Yeriko, na korwa aroro rogaika Yorodan." 
Joshua16:8 Korwa Tapua rokagenderera gochia bosongo, rogaika akarooche ga Kana, naende rogaika Enyancha Enene ase rwatwomerete. Oro narwo orogongo chiamate chi’ebisaku bi’Efraimu chianyorete, rokaba omwando obo," 
Joshua16:9 amo nemechie na ebichie barabwo baatananeretwe, ebiarenge ase orogongo rw’egesaku kia Manase." 
Joshua16:10 Korende barabwo tibaseretie Abakanani abwo bamenyete Geseri. Ase ayio Abakanani nao bamenyete amo n’Abaefraimu, naboigo nao bare nonya ngoika rero iga. Korende mbakoretwe bakaba abasomba babo b’ogokora emeremo emekong’u." 
Joshua17:1 Orogongo oro narwo rwaetwe egesaku kia Manase, omwana omomura omotangi o Yusufu ase ogoakerwa obomera, Makiri, ise Gileadi, nigo arenge omwana omomura omotangi o Manase. Ororeria rwaye rokaegwa Gileadi na Basani, ekiagera Makiri nigo arenge omonto etuoni y’esegi." 
Joshua17:2 Abanto be chiamate chinde chi’egesaku kia Manase bakaegwa chingongo chiabo. Aba nabwo barenge b’ororeria rw’Abieseri na Heleki, na Asirieli, na Sekemu, na Heferei, na Shemida. Aba nabwo abamura b’ororeria rwa Manase, mosinto o Yusufu, naende barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo." 
Joshua17:3 Korende Selofehadi, mosinto o Heferi, o Gileadi, o Makiri, o Manase, taiborete abana abamura, otatiga abaiseke boka. Amarieta ’abaiseke aba naro aya: Mala, na Noa, na Hogila, na Milka, na Tirisa." 
Joshua17:4 Barabwo bakagenda ase Eleazari, omokuani, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, na ase abatang’ani abanene, bakabora, “Omonene nachigete Musa ng’a intwe toegwe orogongo ororabe omwando oito ase egati y’abaminto.” Ase ayio bakaegwa omwando ase egati y’abamwabo ise, buna Omonene achigete." 
Joshua17:5 Ase igo abanto ba Manase bakaegwa chinsemo ikomi, amo nense eria ya Gileadi, na Basani, ng’umbu ya Yorodan," 
Joshua17:6 ekiagera abaiseke abwo b’ororeria rwa Manase nigo baetwe omwando ase egati y’abamura b’orororeria rwaye. Abana bande b’ororeria rwa Manase konya baeirwe ense ya Gileadi. 
Joshua17:7 Orogongo rwa Manase rogachakera Aseri, rogaika Mikemetati, moocha ya Sekemu. Erio rokagenda gochia irianyi ase abanto b’Eni‐Tapua." 
Joshua17:8 (Ense ya Tapua neya Manase yarenge, korende omochie o Tapua, ase orobebe rwa Manase, okaegwa Efraimu.)" 
Joshua17:9 Erio orobebe rogatirimboka gochia akarooche ga Kana. Emechie yarenge irianyi y’akarooche aka neya Efraimu, nonya yarenge ase orogongo rwa Manase. Orobebe rwa Manase rokagenderera goika sugusu y’akarooche, rogatwomera Enyancha Enene." 
Joshua17:10 Ensemo ya irianyi nense y’Efraimu, na ensemo ya sugusu neya Manase yarenge. Enyancha Enene nero yarenge orobebe rwabo ensemo ya bosongo. Ensemo ya sugusu bagasinyana nabanto b’Aseri, na ensemo ya moocha naba Isakaru." 
Joshua17:11 Ase orogongo rwa Isakaru na orw’Aseri Manase akaegwa Beti‐Sehani, na Ibileamu, amo nebichie biabo. Naende akaegwa abanto ba Dori, na Eni‐Dori, na Taanaki, na Megido, amo nebichie b’emechie eyio, na Nafati, ensemo ya gatato." 
Joshua17:12 Abanto ba Manase tibanyarete goseria Abakanani b’emechie eyio. Ase igo Abakanani bakagenderera komenya ase ense eria. 
Joshua17:13 Ekero Abaisraeli babete ne chinguru kobua bakaa Abakanani baria emeremo emekong’u, korende tibabaseretie kegima." 
Joshua17:14 Abanto b’egesaku kia Yusufu bagakwana na Yoshua, bakamotebia, “Nase ki gwatoeire ensemo eyemo yoka ebe omwando oito? Intwe nigo tore abanto abange, ekiagera Omonene otosesenirie.”" 
Joshua17:15 Yoshua akabairaneria, “Onye more abange igo, na ensemo y’ebitunwa bi’Efraimu tebaisaini, tiira gochia rinani, morirabie, na momenye aroro ase ense y’Abaperisi na ey’Abarefai.”" 
Joshua17:16 Barabwo bakairaneria, “Ense eria y’ebitunwa tegotoisana, na Abakanani abamenyete ase ense omweya nigo babwate chigari chi’ebioma, abwo bamenyete Beti‐Sehani na ebichie bire inse yabo, amo nabwo bamenyete ase ense omweremo ya Yesireeli boigo.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yoshua agatebia abanto b’ebisaku bi’Efraimu na Manase (abw’ororeria rwa Yusufu), “Amaene, inwe nabanto abange more, naende nigo more ne chinguru. Ase ayio, ensemo eyemo yoka tekobaisana ase okomenya." 
Joshua17:18 Ense y’ebitunwa nabo erabe eyaino. Nonya ere ne rinani, genda moyerabie, moyeire engima ebe eyaino, korwa ensemo eyemo goika eyende. Goika moserie Abakanani korwa aroro nonya babwate chigari chi’ebioma, naende bare ne chinguru.”" 
Joshua18:1 Ekero Abaisraeli babuete ense eria, omoganda obo bwonsi ogasangererekana agwo Silo, na agwo bagatenenia Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
Joshua18:2 Korende ebisaku bitano na bibere mbiatigarete bitaatananeretwe ensemo y’ense ebe omwando obo. 
Joshua18:3 Ase igo Yoshua agatebia Abaisraeli, “Inee! Ngoika ririri moratebane kogenda koira ense eye Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, abaeire?" 
Joshua18:4 Nchorere abanto batato korwa ase kera egesaku, na inche nimbatome bataare ase ense enigma, bayiate na kworokia ase okorika chinsemo chigwenerete koba omwando bwa kera egesaku. Erio bandetere amang’ana." 
Joshua18:5 Ense yatananwe ase chinsemo isano na ibere. Abayuda nigo baragenderere komenya ase orogongo rwabo agwo ensemo ya irianyi, na Abayusufu ase orwabo, ensemo ya sugusu." 
Joshua18:6 Morike mworokie omoroberio oyio bw’ogwaterana ense ase chinsemo isano na ibere, moyorente asende, na inche nimbaakere obomera ase okoboria Omonene, Nyasae oito." 
Joshua18:7 Abalawi barabwo tibakoegwa egetari gi’ense amo nainwe, ekiagera egetari kiabo nokomokorera Omonene ase emeremo y’obokuani. Egesaku kia Gadi, na ekia Reuben na ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase barabwo konya baeirwe omwando obo moocha ya Yorodan, omwando oria Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, abaatananerete.”" 
Joshua18:8 Abanto aba bakagenda gwata ense buna Yoshua abachigete na kobatebereria, “Genda motaare ase ense engima, mworokie ase okorika buna ense eyio ere. Erio moirane asende, na inche nimbaakere obomera ase okoboria Omonene aiga Silo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Bono abanto abwo bakagenda, bagaetanana ense eria engima, bakarika ase okworokia buna bayiatete ense ase chinsemo isano na ibere kobwatekana nemechie yonsi. Erio bakairana ase Yoshua ase egetwori agwo Silo" 
Joshua18:10 Yoshua akabaakera obomera ase okoboria Omonene aria Silo, agaatananera Abaisraeli ense eyio, kera egesaku ensemo yaye." 
Joshua18:11 Obomera bwe ritang’ani bokagwera chiamate chi’egesaku kia Benjamin. Orogongo rwabo rokaba egati y’orogongo rw’egesaku kia Yuda na orw’ekia Yusufu. 
Joshua18:12 Ensemo ya sugusu orobebe rwabo rogachakera orooche rwa Yorodan, rogatiira gochia egetirimboko sugusu ya Yeriko, naende gochia bosongo goetera ense y’ebitunwa, rogaika erooro ya Beti‐Aveni." 
Joshua18:13 Na korwa aroro rokagenderera goika ebitirimboko bia Lusu (noro Beteli), rogatirimboka goika Ataroti Adari ase egetunwa kere, irianyi ya Beti‐Horoni maate." 
Joshua18:14 Orobebe rokagenderera na rokaonchoka gochia irianyi, bosongo y’egetunwa keria kerochie Beti‐Horoni, rogaika Kiriati‐Baali (noro Kiriati‐Yearimu), omochie bw’egesaku kia Yuda. Oro nigo rwarenge orobebe rwabo rwa bosongo." 
Joshua18:15 Orobebe rwa irianyi nigo rwachakerete ensinyo ya Kiriati‐Yearimu, rokagenderera gochia ensemo ya bosongo, rogaika ase chinsoko chia Nefitoa." 
Joshua18:16 Korwa agwo rogatirimboka rogaika ensinyo y’egetunwa kerochie Rikura ria Beni‐Hinomu, rire ensemo ya sugusu y’ense omweremo ya Refaimu. Erio rokagenda gochia irianyi goetera Rikura ria Hinomu, irianyi y’esagamo y’Abayebusi gochia Eni‐Rogeli." 
Joshua18:17 Naende rokagenderera gochia sugusu rogaika Eni‐Semesi, naende goika Geliloti kororia egetirimboko ki’Adumimi. Erio rogatirimboka gochia Rigena ria Bohani, mosinto o Reuben," 
Joshua18:18 rogaeta sugusu y’esagamo ere igoro y’Ekerubo Ekiomo, naende rogatirimboka goika Ekerubo keria Ekiomo." 
Joshua18:19 Korwa agwo orobebe rokagenderera gochia esagamo ya Beti‐Hogila, rogaika ensemo ya sugusu y’Enyancha y’Omonyo ase orooche rwa Yorodan ronuchete. Oro narwo orobebe rwa irianyi." 
Joshua18:20 Yorodan narwo orobebe rwa moocha. Echio nachio chimbebe chiaetanaine orogongo orwo chiamate chi’egesaku kia Benjamin chianyorete rokaba omwando obo. 
Joshua18:21 Emechie ye chiamate chi’egesaku kia Benjamin nigo yarenge: Yeriko, na Beti‐Hogila, na Emeki‐Kesisi," 
Joshua18:22 na Beti‐Araba, na Semaraimu, na Beteli," 
Joshua18:23 na Avimu, na Para, na Ofura," 
Joshua18:24 na Kefari‐Amoni, na Ofuni, na Geba, emechie ikomi na ebere, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua18:25 Naende yarenge Gibeoni, na Rama, na Beroti," 
Joshua18:26 na Misipa, na Kefira, na Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 na Rekemu, na Iripeli, na Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 na Zela, na Elefu, na Yebusi (noro Yerusalemu), na Gibea, na Kiriati‐Yearimu, emechie ikomi na ene, amo nebichie biabo. Oyo noro orenge omwando bwe chiamate chi’egesaku kia Benjamin." 
Joshua19:1 Obomera bwa kabere bokagwera chiamate chi’egesaku gia Simeoni. Omwando obo nigo orenge gati‐gati y’omwando bw’egesaku kia Yuda. 
Joshua19:2 Emechie banyorete ase omwando obo nero: Beeri‐Seba, na Seba, na Molada," 
Joshua19:3 na Hasari‐Suali, na Bala, na Esemu," 
Joshua19:4 na Elitoladi, na Betuli, na Horima," 
Joshua19:5 na Sikilagi, na Beti‐Marikaboti, na Hasari‐Susa," 
Joshua19:6 na Beti‐Lebaoti, na Saruheni, emechie ikomi na etato, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua19:7 Naende yarenge Aini, na Rimoni, na Eteri, na Asani, emechie ene, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua19:8 Amo neyio bakanyora ebichie bionsi biaetanaine emechie eyio goika Baalati‐Beeri (noro Rama‐Negebu). Oyio noro orenge bwe chiamate chi’egesaku gia Simeoni. 
Joshua19:9 Omwando bw’egesaku gia Simeoni nigo orenge ensemo y’oyio bw’egesaku kia Yuda, ekiagera ensemo y’egesaku kia Yuda nigo yarenge enene mono asebare. Ayio naro agerete egesaku gia Simeoni gekaegwa omwando obo korwa ase omwando bw’egesaku kia Yuda." 
Joshua19:10 Obomera bwa gatato bokagwera chiamate chi’egesaku gia Sabuloni. Orogongo rwabete omwando obo rogaikera Saridi. 
Joshua19:11 Korwa agwo orobebe rwabo rogatiira gochia bosongo, rogaika Marala, rogatwomera Dabeseti ne rigoko rire moocha ya Yokinamu." 
Joshua19:12 Korwa Saridi rokagenderera goika Kisiloti‐Tabori, naende goika Daberati, erio rogatiira goika Yafia." 
Joshua19:13 Korwa agwo rokagenderera gochia moocha, rogaika Gati‐Heferi na Eta‐Kasini, rokagenda gochia Rimoni, rokaonchoka gochia Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Ensemo ya sugusu orobebe rokaonchokera Hanatoni, rogaikera ense omweremo ya Ifuta‐Eli." 
Joshua19:15 Amo neyio orogongo rwabo rokabwaterania Katati, na Nahalali, na Simuroni, na Idala, na Bethlehemu, emechie ikomi na ebere, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua19:16 Emechie eyio, amo nebichie biabo, nigo biarenge omwando bwe chiamate chi’egesaku gia Sabuloni." 
Joshua19:17 Obomera bwa kane bokagwera chiamate chi’egesaku gia Isakaru. 
Joshua19:18 Ensemo yabo nigo yabwateranetie Yesireeli, na Kesuloti, na Sunemu," 
Joshua19:19 na Hafaraimu, na Sihoni, na Anaharati," 
Joshua19:20 na Rabiti, na Kisioni, na Ebesi," 
Joshua19:21 na Remeti, na Eni‐Ganimu, na Eni‐Hada, na Beti‐Pasesi." 
Joshua19:22 Orobebe rwabo rogatwomera boigo Tabori na Sahasuma, na Beti‐Semesi, rokanucha Yorodan. Orogongo oro rokabwaterania emechie ikomi, na etano nomo, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua19:23 Emechie eyio, amo nebichie biabo, nero omwando bwe chiamate ch’egesaku gia Isakaru." 
Joshua19:24 Obomera bwa gatano bokagwera chiamate chi’egesaku gi’Aseri. 
Joshua19:25 Ensemo yabo nigo yabwateranetie Helikati, na Hali, na Beteni, na Akisafu," 
Joshua19:26 na Alameleki, na Amadi, na Misali. Ensemo ya bosongo orobebe rwabo rogatwomera Karimeli na Sihori‐Libinati." 
Joshua19:27 Erio rokaonchoka gochia moocha, rokagenderera goika Beti‐Dagoni, rogatwomera Sabuloni na ense omweremo ya Ifuta‐Eli, ensemo ya sugusu, rogaika Beti‐Emeki na Neieli. Erio rokagenderera gochia sugusu goika Kabuli," 
Joshua19:28 na Eburoni, na Rehobu, na Hamoni, na Kana, rogaika Sidoni, Omochie omonene." 
Joshua19:29 Erio orobebe rokaonchoka gochia Rama, rogaika omochie omonene o Turo, oyogiteire chindwaki, rokaonchoka gochia Hosa, na rokanucha Enyancha Enene. Naende orogongo orwo rokabwaterania engegu y’ensemo y’Akisibu," 
Joshua19:30 na Uma, na Afeki, na Rehobu, emechie emerongo ebere, na ebere, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua19:31 Emechie eyio, amo nebichie biabo, nero omwando bwe chiamate chi’egesaku gi’Aseri." 
Joshua19:32 Obomera bwa gatano na rimo bokagwera chiamate ch’egesaku kia Nafutali. 
Joshua19:33 Orobebe rwabo rogachaka korwa Helefu ase omote onga buna omotontera orenge, agwo Sananimu, na korwa Adami‐Nekebu, na Yabuneli, rogaika Lakumu, rogatwomera Yorodan." 
Joshua19:34 Erio orobebe rokaonchoka gochia bosongo goika Asinoti‐Tabori, na korwa agwo rokagenderera goika Hukoki, rogatwomera orogongo rw’egesaku gia Sabuloni ensemo ya sugusu, na orw’egia Aseri ensemo ya bosongo, na orw’ekia Yuda ensemo ya moocha ase Yorodan." 
Joshua19:35 Emechie yabo yagiteire chindwaki nero: Sidimu, na Seri, na Hamati, na Rakati, na Kinereti," 
Joshua19:36 na Adama, na Rama, na Hasori," 
Joshua19:37 na Kedesi na Edirei, na Eni‐Hasori," 
Joshua19:38 na Yironi, na Migidali‐Eli, na Horemu, na Beti‐Anati, na Beti‐Semesi, emechie ikomi na kianda, amo nebichie biabo." 
Joshua19:39 Emechie eyio, amo nebichie biabo, nero omwando bwe chiamate chi’egesaku kia Nafutali." 
Joshua19:40 Obomera bwa gatano na kabere bokagwera chiamate chi’egesaku kia Dani. 
Joshua19:41 Omwando obo okabwaterania Sora, na Esitaoli, na Iri‐Semesi," 
Joshua19:42 na Saalabini, na Ayaloni, na Itila," 
Joshua19:43 na Eloni, na Timuna, na Ekironi," 
Joshua19:44 na Eliteke, na Gibetoni, na Baalati," 
Joshua19:45 na Yehudi, na Bene‐Beraki, na Gati‐Rimoni," 
Joshua19:46 na Me‐Yarikoni, na Rakoni, amo nense erochie Yafo." 
Joshua19:47 Ekero abanto b’egesaku kia Dani basiretie ense yabo, bakagenda Lesemu, bakayoumokera, bakayoira na bagaita abanto b’agwo nemioro. Bagasakora chinibo chiarengeo, bakamenya omochie oyio. Erio bakaonchora erieta ri’omochie oyio Lesemu, bakayoroka Dani, erieta ria sokoro yabo Dani." 
Joshua19:48 Emechie eyio, amo nebichie biabo, nero omwando bwe chiamate chi’egesaku kia Dani." 
Joshua19:49 Abaisraeli kobakoorire gwatanana ense eria ase chinsemo ao ao, bakaa Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, ensemo ase egati yabo, ebe omwando oye." 
Joshua19:50 Na buna Omonene achigete bakamoa omochie oria aboretie, noro Timunati‐Sera ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu. Erio Yoshua akaagacha omochie oria okaba omoyia, akamenya aroro." 
Joshua19:51 Eyio nero emiando Eleazari, omokuani, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, amo nabateneneri be chiamate chi’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli, baatananete ase ogoaka obomera aria Silo, ase okoboria Omonene, ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano. Nabo bagakoora emeremo y’ogwatanana ense eria." 
Joshua20:1 Omonene agakwana na Yoshua, akamotebia," 
Joshua20:2 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a bachore emechie y’obotamero, buna nabatebetie goetera ase Musa." 
Joshua20:3 Omonto karaite omonto onde mosiabano atancheti, anyare gotamera oyomo bw’emechie eyio ase ogwetooria korwa ase oyomwabo oria oitetwe oganetie korusia egesiomba." 
Joshua20:4 Omonto oria omoiti, ekero aratamere oyomo bw’emechie eyio goika agende atenene ase egeita ki’omochie oyio, akwane amang’ana aye nabatang’ani b’omochie oria. Barabwo bamosoyie ase omochie bamoe aase akomenya ase egati yabo." 
Joshua20:5 Onye omonto oria oganetie korusia egesiomba okomobwatia gochiao, abanto b’omochie oyio tibakorua omoiti oria ase amaboko aye, ekiagera aitete omogisangio oye mosiabano, atamogechete." 
Joshua20:6 Omonto oria namenye ase omochie oria goika gee arentwe bosio bw’omosangererekano agambigwe na goika omokuani bw’engaki eria akwe. Nyuma y’ayio arue ase omochie oria atamerete, airane nka ase omochie oye.”" 
Joshua20:7 Ase igo bagaatanana Kedesi o Galili, ase ense y’ebitunwa ya Nafutali, na Sekemu ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, na Kiriati‐Ariba (nao Heburoni), ase ense y’ebitunwa ya Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Moocha ya Yorodan ase erooro, ase ense eimokererete igoro ere enteremu, bagachora Beseri ase orogongo rwa Reuben, na Ramoti o Gileadi, ase orogongo rw’egesaku kia Gadi, na Golani o Basani ase orogongo rw’egesaku kia Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Emechie eyio nero yachoretwe ebe obotamero ase Abaisraeli, na ase abamenyi abaare ase egati yabo. Onde bwensi orenge goita omonto mosiabano atame gochia aroro, erinde taitwa noria oganetie korusia egesiomba, ataratenena ase omosangererekano amang’ana aye agambwe." 
Joshua21:1 Abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abalawi bagacha ase Eleazari, omokuani, na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, na ase abateneneri be chiamate chi’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli," 
Joshua21:2 bagakwana nabarabwo agwo Silo, bakabatebia, “Omonene nigo achigete goetera ase Musa ng’a toegwe emechie ase tokomenya, amo namarisio, ase chitugo chiaito chirarisie.”" 
Joshua21:3 Ase igo Abaisraeli bakaa Abalawi emechie gete amo namarisio arengeo korwa ase emiando yabo, koreng’ana buna Omonene achigete." 
Joshua21:4 Obomera bokagwera chiamate chi’Abakohati buna iga: Abalawi abarenge b’ororeria rwa Haroni, omokuani, bakanyora emechie ikomi na etato korwa ase egesaku kia Yuda, na egia Simeoni, na ekia Benjamin, buna obomera bwabagwerete." 
Joshua21:5 Na Abakohati abatigarete bakanyora emechie ikomi korwa ase chiamate chi’egesaku ki’Efraimu na ekia Dani, na ekeng’ese kia Manase, buna obomera bwabagwerete." 
Joshua21:6 Abagerisoni bakanyora emechie ikomi na etato korwa ase chiamate chi’egesaku gia Isakaru, na egi’Aseri, na ekia Nafutali, na ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase agwo Basani, buna obomera bwabagwerete." 
Joshua21:7 Abamerari bakanyora emechie ikomi na ebere ase chiamate chiabo korwa ase chiamate chi’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, na egia Sabuloni." 
Joshua21:8 Nabo Abaisraeli baete Abalawi emechie eyio amo namarisio arengeo, ase ogoaka obomera, buna Omonene konya achikire goetera ase Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Korwa ase egesaku kia Yuda, na egia Simeoni bakarua emechie eyio egwatorwa aiga." 
Joshua21:10 Obomera bwe ritang’ani bokagwera abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni, eamate eyemo y’Abakohati, abarenge Abalawi." 
Joshua21:11 Barabwo bakaegwa Kiriati‐Ariba (noro Heburoni), ase ense y’ebitunwa ya Yuda, amo namarisio aetanaineo. (Ariba nigo arenge sokoro y’Anaki.)" 
Joshua21:12 Korende emegondo amo nebichie bi’omochie oyio konya baeire Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, bikaba omwando oye." 
Joshua21:13 Eye nero emechie abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni omokuani baetwe: Heburoni, omochie oyio abaiti ba mosiabano baare gotamera, na Libuna," 
Joshua21:14 na Yatiri, na Esitemoa," 
Joshua21:15 na Holoni, na Debiri," 
Joshua21:16 na Aini, na Yuta, na Beti‐Semesi, emechie kianda, amo namarisio arengeo, korwa ase ebisaku ebio bibere." 
Joshua21:17 Korwa ase egesaku kia Benjamin bakaegwa Gibeoni, na Geba," 
Joshua21:18 na Anatoti, na Alamoni, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:19 Emechie yonsi abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni baetwe nigo yarenge ikomi na etato; bakayeegwa, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:20 Abanto be chiamate chinde chi’Abakohati, abarenge Abalawi, bakaegwa emechie korwa ase egesaku gi’Efraimu, buna obomera bwabagwerete." 
Joshua21:21 Bakaegwa Sekemu, omochie oyomo abaiti ba mosiabano baare gotamera, ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, na Geseri," 
Joshua21:22 na Kibusaimu, na Beti‐Horoni, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:23 Na korwa ase egesaku kia Dani bakaegwa Eliteke, na Gibetoni," 
Joshua21:24 na Ayaloni, na Gati‐Rimoni, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:25 Na korwa ase ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase bakaegwa Taanaki na Gati‐Rimoni, emechie ebere, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:26 Abanto be chiamate echio chi’Abakohati nigo baetwe emechie eyio ikomi, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:27 Abagerisoni, chiamate chinde chi’Abalawi, bakaegwa korwa ase ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase Golani o Basani, omochie abaiti ba mosiabano baare gotamera, na Besitera, emechie ebere, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:28 Na korwa ase egesaku gia Isakaru bakaegwa Kisioni, na Daberati," 
Joshua21:29 na Yarimuti na Eni‐Ganimu, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:30 Korwa ase egesaku gi’Aseri bakaegwa Misali, na Abidoni," 
Joshua21:31 na Helikati, na Rehobo, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:32 Na korwa ase egesaku kia Nafutali bakaegwa Kedesi o Galili, omochie abaiti ba mosiabano baare gotamera, na Hamoti‐Dori, na Karitani, emechie etato, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:33 Nabo abanto be chiamate chionsi chi’Abagerisoni baetwe emechie ikomi na etato, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:34 Korwa ase egesaku gia Sabuloni, Abalawi abatigarete, chiamate chia Merari, bakaegwa emechie ya Yokinamu, na Karita," 
Joshua21:35 na Dimuna, na Nahalali, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:36 Na korwa ase egesaku kia Reuben bakaegwa Beseri, na Yahasi," 
Joshua21:37 na Kedemoti, na Mefaati, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:38 Korwa ase egesaku kia Gadi bakaegwa Ramoti o Gileadi, omochie abaiti ba mosiabano baare gotamera, na Mahanaimu," 
Joshua21:39 na Hesiboni, na Yaeseri, emechie ene, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:40 Nabo abanto b’eamate ya Merari, abatigarete ase chiamate chi’Abalawi, baetwe emechie ikomi na ebere, buna obomera bwabagwerete." 
Joshua21:41 Emechie yonsi y’Abalawi eyarenge ase egati y’omwando bw’Abaisraeli nigo yarenge emerongo ene, na etano na etato, amo namarisio arengeo." 
Joshua21:42 Kera omochie bw’eyio nigo orenge namarisio aetanaineo, Nabo arenge ase emechie eyio yonsi." 
Joshua21:43 Ase igo Omonene akaa Abaisraeli ense eyio yonsi arierete chisokoro chiabo eira ng’a nabayee; barabwo kobayeeirwe bakamenya aroro. 
Joshua21:44 Omonene akabaa obotoereru ase chinsemo chionsi, buna arierete chisokoro chiabo eira ase ogotiana. Onde tarenge ase ababisa babo obabuete, ekiagera Omonene abegete ababisa babo bonsi ase amaboko abo." 
Joshua21:45 Nabo Omonene aikeranetie chiira chionsi chingiya echi abarierete Abaisraeli. Ende teri etaikeranetigwe. 
Joshua22:1 Erio Yoshua akarangeria abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase," 
Joshua22:2 akabatebia, “Mwakorire amang’ana onsi Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, abachigete mokore, na mwaigwereire amang’ana onsi aya nabachigete." 
Joshua22:3 Ase amatuko aya amange timwatigete Abaisraeli bamino goika rero iga. Mwarendire mono na koigwera aya Omonene, Nyasae oino abachigete mokore." 
Joshua22:4 Bono Omonene, Nyasae oino, oeire abamino obotoereru, buna abarierete eira. Ase igo, bono irana ase chinka chiaino, ase ense eria mwanyorire ebe omwando oino, eria Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, abaete ng’umbu ya Yorodan." 
Joshua22:5 Morende mono na koigwera amachiko aya Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, abaete; mwanche Omonene, Nyasae oino, na motaare ase chinchera chiaye chionsi. Moigwere amachiko aye, mobe abegenwa asare, na momokorere ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, na emioyo yaino yonsi.”" 
Joshua22:6 Erio Yoshua akabasesenia, akabaa ribaga, na barabwo bakagenda chinka chiabo." 
Joshua22:7 (Musa konya oeire ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase orogongo agwo Basani, na ekeng’ese kende Yoshua agakea orogongo ang’e nabamwabo, bosongo ya Yorodan.) Na ekero Yoshua abaete ribaga bagende chinka chiabo akabasesenia," 
Joshua22:8 akabatebia “Irana chinka chiaino amo nobotenenku obo obonge mwanyorire, chitugo chinyinge amo ne chifeta ne chitahabu ne chitaai, na ebioma, amo ne chianga chinyinge. Ase ayio mwatananere abamino ebisakorwa ebio mwasakorete ababisa baino.”" 
Joshua22:9 Erio abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben na ekia Gadi, amo nekeng’ese kiegesaku kia Manase bagatiga Abaisraeli bande agwo Silo ase ense ya Kanani, bakairana ase ense ya Gileadi, ense eria banyorete ase okomenya, buna Omonene konya achikire goetera ase Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Ekero abanto abwo b’egesaku kia Reuben na ekia Dani amo nekeng’ese gi’ekia Manase baigete Yorodan mbarabare ase ensemo ya Kanani bakaagacha aroro egesasimero ekenene kiare kororekana korwa are. 
Joshua22:11 Abaisraeli bande bakaigwa amang’ana aya agokwanwa, “Naama! Abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase baagachire egesasimero aria Geliloti, ensemo ya bosio bw’ense ya Kanani, ang’e na Yorodan, erochie ensemo y’Abaisraeli.”" 
Joshua22:12 Ekero Abaisraeli baigwete amang’ana ayio, omoganda obo bwonsi ogasangererekana agwo Silo, erinde ogende kobarwania esegi." 
Joshua22:13 Erio Abaisraeli bagatoma Finehasi, mosinto bw’Eleazari, omokuani, gochia ase abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben na ekia Dani amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, ase ense ya Gileadi." 
Joshua22:14 Amo na Finehasi bagatoma abatang’ani ikomi, oyomo bwa kera egesaku ki’Abaisraeli; kera oyomo nigo arenge omoteneneri bw’eamate ase egesaku kiaye." 
Joshua22:15 Ekero barabwo baigete ase ense ya Gileadi, ase abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, na ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, bagakwana nabarabwo, bakabatebia," 
Joshua22:16 “Intwe nigo togokwana ribaga ri’omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Omonene. Nase ki motari nobwegenwa ase Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli? Mwatigire Omonene rero ase okweagachera egesasimero, mwabeire mamincha y’Omonene." 
Joshua22:17 Inee! Ebibe biria twakorete ase ogosasima Peori tibiatoisanete? Korwa ase ebibe biria titwana gochenwa nonya ngoika rero iga, na egesusuro gekanyora omoganda bwonsi bw’Omonene." 
Joshua22:18 Inee! Na bono inwe motagete gotiga Omonene? Onye mokwanga rero koigwera Omonene, ekeene, ankio nigo arabe nekeririanda ase omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli." 
Joshua22:19 Onye moroche ng’a ense eye mwaeirwe ebe eyaino tegwenereti mogosasimerao, imoka mwamboke gochia ase ense y’Omonene, ase obomenyo bwaye boteneine, moegwe chingongo chiaino agwo ase egati yaito. Timobaisa kwanga koigwera Omonene, gose kwanga gotoigwera intwe ase okweagachera egesasimero kiaino ekeao goetania eki’Omonene, Nyasae oito." 
Joshua22:20 Inyora buna Akani, mosinto o Zera, amochete ase ebinto biria biatananetwe ase ogosirigwa; omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli nigo onyorete egesusuro ase engencho eyio, tari omonto oria bweka osirete ase ogosaria koria.”" 
Joshua22:21 Erio abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ekia Gadi, amo nekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase bakairaneria abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, bakabatebia," 
Joshua22:22 “Omonguru nere Nyasae! Nere Omonene! Omonguru nere Nyasae! Nere Omonene. Ere namanyete aya twakorire, nainwe Abaisraeli boigo moyamanye. Onye aya twakorire akorirwe mamincha y’Omonene, gose onye titwarenge nobwegenwa asare, rirorio timogototooria rero." 
Joshua22:23 Onye tweagacheire egesasimero giaito intwe abanyene ase ogotiga Omonene, na onye tokoruerao ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gose okoruegwa kw’endagera, gose ogw’ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe, tiga Omonene omonyene atoe egesusuro." 
Joshua22:24 Taibo! Nigo twakorire aya, ekiagera twoboire ng’a gose ase engaki erache abana b’ororeria rwaino baise gocha koboria ab’orwaito: Inee! Nainwe more negetari ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli?" 
Joshua22:25 Naki Omonene nigo akorete orooche rwa Yorodan rokaba orobebe egati yaito nainwe, inwe Abareuben na Abagadi. Ase ayio timori negetari kende gionsi ase Omonene. Na igo abana b’ororeria rwaino mbabaise kogera ab’orwaito tibamoiroka Omonene." 
Joshua22:26 Ase ayio nigo twatebete: Tiga toagache egesasimero, tari ase okoruera ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gose ekeng’wanso kende gionsi," 
Joshua22:27 otatiga ase okoba kirori egati yaito nainwe, na egati y’ororeria rwaito na orwaino, ng’a nigo tokomokorera Omonene ase okoruera ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na ekeng’wanso kende amo neki’omorembe ase obosio bwaye. Aya nigo twakorire ase ogotanga abana b’ororeria rwaino tibabaisa gocha gotebia ab’orwaito ng’a: Timori negetari ase Omonene." 
Joshua22:28 Intwe nigo twarengerererie ng’a: Kerabe babe bagokwana igo asetore, gose ase abana b’ororeria rwaito, nabanyare kobairaneria: Rora, chisokoro chiaito nigo chiagachete egesasimero keng’ana buna eki’Omonene. Eke tikeri ase okoruera ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, gose ekeng’wanso kende, otatiga kere kirori egati yaito nainwe." 
Joshua22:29 Taibo! Ayio abe aare naintwe ng’a ntorigetie kwanga koigwera Omonene, gose komotiga bono, ase okoagacha egesasimero ki’ogosambera ekeng’wanso, gose korua okoruegwa kw’endagera, gose ekeng’wanso ki’omorembe, egesasimero kere ao na keria kere bosio bw’Obomenyo bwaye.”" 
Joshua22:30 Ekero Finehasi, omokuani, na abatang’ani b’omoganda abwo baare abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, abaare amo nere, baigwete aya abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ab’ekia Gadi, amo nab’ekia Manase bakwanete, barabwo bagaisaneka." 
Joshua22:31 Finehasi, mosinto bw’Eleazari, omokuani, agatebia Abareuben na Abagadi amo n’Abamanase, “Bono twamanyire ng’a Omonene nigo are ase egati yaito, ekiagera timwangete koba abegenwa ase Omonene. Igo mwatooririe Abaisraeli korwa ase egesusuro ki’Omonene.”" 
Joshua22:32 Nyuma y’ayio Finehasi, mosinto bw’Eleazari, omokuani, na abatang’ani baria, bagatiga Abareuben na Abagadi agwo Gileadi, bakairana gochia ase ense ya Kanani, ase Abaisraeli, bakabairera amang’ana onsi." 
Joshua22:33 Amang’ana aya akagwenera Abaisraeli, nabarabwo bagatogia Nyasae, na tibaba bakoroberia korwania Abareuben na Abagadi, gose gosaria ense eria bamenyete." 
Joshua22:34 Abareuben na Abagadi bagateba, “Egesasimero eke nkirori egati yaito nainwe ng’a, Omonene nere Nyasae”, na igo bagakeroka “Kirori”." 
Joshua23:1 Nyuma y’engaki entambe, ekero Omonene konya aeire Abaisraeli obotoereru korwa ase ababisa babo abwo babaetanaine, na Yoshua konya ogotire mono," 
Joshua23:2 akarangeria Abaisraeli bonsi: abagaaka, na abatang’ani, na abagambi, amo nabaraai babo, akabatebia, “Inche nabeire omogaaka omogotu mono." 
Joshua23:3 Inwe mweroreire aya onsi Omonene, Nyasae oino, akorire ase abanto aba bonsi b’ebisaku ebi ase engencho yaino. Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere obeire okobarwanera." 
Joshua23:4 Rora, ase ogoaka obomera naatananeire ebisaku biaino ense y’abanto aba batigarete amo ney’abwo konya nasiririe, ebe omwando oino, ense yonsi korwa orooche rwa Yorodan goika Enyancha Enene ya bosongo." 
Joshua23:5 Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere oraserie abanto abwo babatame, nainwe moire ense yabo moyemenye, buna Omonene, Nyasae oino, abarierete eira." 
Joshua23:6 Ase igo, motenene bokong’u, morende na koigwera boronge aya onsi arikire ase Ebuku y’Amachiko a Musa, timoonchoka gochia aande onsi, ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee." 
Joshua23:7 Timobaisa gosanga nabanto aba b’ebisaku batigarete ase egati yaino, gose timwatora amarieta e chinyasae chiabo, gose gotiana ase chirochio. Timochikorera gose gochisasima." 
Joshua23:8 Inwe mobe abegenwa ase Omonene, buna mwabeire goika rero iga." 
Joshua23:9 Omonene oseririe abanto b’ebisaku ebinene bire ne chinguru; onde tari obabuire goika rero iga. 
Joshua23:10 Omonto oyomo oino nanyare goseria abanto elifu eyemo, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere okobarwanera esegi, buna abarierete eira." 
Joshua23:11 Ase ayio, mwerende, momwanche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Joshua23:12 Moise koonchoka korwa asare, na mobwatane nabanto aba batigarete ase egati yaino, na konyuomerana, na igo mobe mogosanga nabarabwo, nabarabwo nainwe," 
Joshua23:13 rirorio goika momanye ng’a Omonene, Nyasae oino, tagoseria abanto aba korwa asemore, korende barabwo nigo barabe bakobatega, naende babe buna ebiranya bikobang’wania amakere aino, na buna amagwa akobeta amaiso aino. Goika mosirigwe kegima korwa ase ense eye engiya Omonene, Nyasae oino, abaeire" 
Joshua23:14 “Bono nkogenda inde enchera eria abanto bonsi b’ense bagochia. Mwamanyire buya ase chinkoro chiaino ime, na ase emioyo yaino boigo, ng’a timoremeiri gento kende gionsi ekiya eke Omonene, Nyasae oino, abarierete eira ng’a nakebae. Amang’ana ayio onsi aikeranire, rinde tiriremeti." 
Joshua23:15 Buna Omonene, Nyasae oino aikeranetie amaya onsi aya abarierete eira ng’a nakore, naboigo araikeranie amabe onsi goika abasirie korwa ase ense eye engiya abaeire." 
Joshua23:16 Onye mogosaria okobwatana kw’Omonene, Nyasae oino, okwo abachigete, naende mogokorera chinyasae chinde na gochisasima, erio endamwamu yaye inayoke igoro yaino, nainwe bwango mosire korwa ase ense eye engiya abaeire.”" 
Joshua24:1 Yoshua agasangereria ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli agwo Sekemu. Akarangeria abagaaka b’Abaisraeli, na abatang’ani, na abagambi, amo nabaraai babo, nabarabwo bagacha ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
Joshua24:2 Erio Yoshua agakwana nabanto bonsi, akabatebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli; agokwana: Agwo kare chisokoro chiaino amo na Tera, ise Ibrahimu, na Nahori, nigo bamenyete ng’umbu y’orooche rw’Eufarati bakaba bagokorera chinyasae ching’ao." 
Joshua24:3 Korende inche nkarusia Ibrahimu, sokoro yaino, korwa ng’umbu y’orooche orwo, nkamotang’ana, ere agaeta ase ense engima ya Kanani; nkamenta oroiboro rwaye. Nkamoa Isaka," 
Joshua24:4 na Isaka nere nkamoa Yakobo na Esau. Esau nkamoa ense y’ebitunwa ya Seiri ekaba eyaye, korende Yakobo na abana baye bagatirimboka gochia Misiri." 
Joshua24:5 Erio ngatoma Musa na Haroni, ngaaka Abamisiri namaakwa aya nabarenterete, na nyuma y’ayio nkabarusia inwe aroro." 
Joshua24:6 Nkarusia chisokoro chiaino korwa Misiri, mogaika ase Enyancha Embariri, Abamisiri bakababwatia goikao ne chigari ne chibarasi." 
Joshua24:7 Erio chisokoro chiaino chikarera asende inche Omonene, mbakonye, na inche nkabeka omosunte ase egati yaino na Abamisiri. Nkaonchora enyancha egatuba Abamisiri ekabamera. Ee, mwaroche namaiso aino aya nakorete ase Abamisiri. Erio ase engaki entambe mokamenya ase erooro." 
Joshua24:8 “Nyuma y’ayio nkabarenta ase ense y’Abaamori, baria bamenyete moocha ya Yorodan. Barabwo bakabarwania, korende inche nkababeka ase amaboko aino. Inwe mokaira ense yabo, na inche nkabasiria ase amasio aino." 
Joshua24:9 Erio Balaki, omoruoti o Moabu, mosinto o Sipori, akaimoka kobarwania inwe Abaisraeli. Akarangeria Baalamu, mosinto o Beori, achiche kobaragereria," 
Joshua24:10 korende tinancha koigwera Baalamu. Ase ayio akabasesenia, nainche nkabatooria korwa ase amaboko a Balaki." 
Joshua24:11 Mokaamboka Yorodan, mogaika Yeriko. Abanto ba Yeriko bakabarwania, naboigo Abaamori, na Abaperisi, na Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abagirigasi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi bakorete, korende nkababeka ase amaboko aino." 
Joshua24:12 Ngatoma ebiaramba bikabarasa, na ase ebio abaruoti babere b’Abaamori bagasirigwa bosio bwaino, tari ase emioro yaino, gose ase amata aino."
