Joshua24:13 Nkabaa ense ase motakorete emeremo, na emechie motaagachete. Nigo momenyete ase emechie eyio na koria okwama kw’emesabibu na okw’emezeituni motasimegete." 
Joshua24:14 “Ase igo moiroke Omonene na komokorera ase okoigwera na ase obwegenwa. Rusia korwa asemore chinyasae chiria chisokoro chiaino chiare gokorera aaria ng’umbu y’orooche rw’Eufarati na ase ense ya Misiri; mokorere Omonene bweka. 
Joshua24:15 Kerabe timogokiri gokorera Omonene, rirorio mwechorere rero oyo mwanchete gokorera, onye ne chinyasae chiria chisokoro chiaino chiakorerete ng’umbu y’orooche rw’Eufarati, gose chinyasae chi’Abaamori, baria momenyete ase ense yabo. Korende inche amo nabanto b’enyomba yane ntomokorere Omonene.”" 
Joshua24:16 Abanto abwo bakairaneria, “Taibo. Titorigeti gotiga Omonene na gokorera chinyasae ching’ao." 
Joshua24:17 Naki Omonene, Nyasae oito, nere otong’anyetie intwe amo ne chisokoro chiaito korwa Misiri, ense eria ase twarenge abasomba. Nere okorete ebikone ebinene ase amasio aito, naende nere otorendete aande onsi twaetete ase egati y’abanto aba bonsi." 
Joshua24:18 Omonene agatosereria Abaamori aba bonsi abamenyete ase ense eye. Ase ayio, ntorigetie komokorera Omonene. Ere nere Nyasae oito.”" 
Joshua24:19 Yoshua agatebia abanto, “Timokonyara komokorera Omonene. Ere Nyasae omochenu, na Nyasae bwe risemi; takobaabera ogosaria kwaino na ebibe biaino." 
Joshua24:20 Moise gotiga Omonene na gokorera chinyasae ching’ao, nere neonchore abatige, nabae egesusuro na abasirie, nyuma kabakoreire amaya ritang’ani.”" 
Joshua24:21 Erio abanto abwo bakamoiraneria, “Taibo! Intwe inatomokorere Omonene.”" 
Joshua24:22 Yoshua akabatebia, “Inwe mwebereire birori ng’a mwachorire Omonene.” Bakairaneria, “Ee, twebereire birori intwe abanyene.”" 
Joshua24:23 Akabatebia, “Rusia chinyasae chingeni echire ase egati yaino, moonchore chinkoro chiaino ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli.”" 
Joshua24:24 Abanto bakairaneria Yoshua, “Omonene, Nyasae oito, nere torakorere, na amang’ana aye naro toraigwere.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ase rituko riria Yoshua agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabanto abwo, na agwo Sekemu akabaa amachiko na emeroberio barabwatie." 
Joshua24:26 Yoshua akarika amang’ana aria ase Ebuku y’amachiko a Nyasae. Erio agatenenia rigena rinene agwo inse y’omote onga buna omotontera, oteneine ang’e n’Obomenyo Obochenu bw’Omonene." 
Joshua24:27 Agatebia abanto bonsi, “Rigena eri nigo rirabe kirori asetore, riaigure amang’ana onsi aya Omonene akwana naintwe. Ase igo riabeire kirori igoro yaino, erinde mobe abegenwa ase Nyasae oino.”" 
Joshua24:28 Erio Yoshua akaa abanto ribaga bakagenda kera oyomo ase omwando oye. 
Joshua24:29 Nyuma y’ayio Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, omosomba bw’Omonene, agakwa gakoorire emiaka rigana, na ikomi." 
Joshua24:30 Bakamotindeka ase omochie bw’omwando oye, agwo Timunati‐Sera, ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, sugusu y’egetunwa kia Gaasi." 
Joshua24:31 Ase amatuko a Yoshua Abaisraeli bakaba bagokorera Omonene, naende bagakora boigo ase amatuko ’abagaaka baria batigarete nyuma y’ogokwa kwa Yoshua, abwo bamanyete amang’ana aya Omonene akorete ase Abaisraeli." 
Joshua24:32 Amauga a Yusufu, aya Abaisraeli barentete korwa Misiri, agatindekwa agwo Sekemu, ase oboremo bw’ense eria Yakobo agorete korwa ase basinto ba Hamori, ise Sekemu, ase rigori rie chifeta rigana erimo. Oboremo obo bokaba omwando bw’ororeria rwa Yusufu." 
Joshua24:33 Na Eleazari, mosinto o Haroni, agakwa, agatindekwa Gibea, omochie oyio Finehasi, omwana oye, aetwe ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu." 
Judges1:1 Nyuma Yoshua gakure, Abaisraeli bakaboria Omonene, “Nabanto b’egesaku ki ase egati yaito barabe abe ritang’ani korwania Abakanani?”" 
Judges1:2 Omonene akabairaneria, “Abayuda mbabe abatang’ani kogenda; rora, nabekire ense eria ase amaboko abo.”" 
Judges1:3 Abayuda bagatebia Abasimeoni bamwabo, “Inchuo motiire amo naintwe gochia ase orogongo orore omwando oito, torwanie Abakanani. Erio nyuma intwe natogende amo nainwe ase orogongo orore orwaino.” Ase ayio Abasimeoni bakagenda amo nabarabwo." 
Judges1:4 Erio Abayuda bakagenda korwana esegi, na Omonene akabeka Abakanani na Abaperisi ase amaboko abo; Abayuda bagaita abanto chilifu ikomi agwo Bezeki." 
Judges1:5 Bakanyora Adoni‐Bezeki agwo, bakamorwania, na bakabua Abakanani na Abaperisi." 
Judges1:6 Adoni‐Bezeki agatama, korende Abayuda bakamobwatia, bakamobwata na komobutora ebiara ebinene bi’amaboko na ebi’amagoro." 
Judges1:7 Erio Adoni‐Bezeki agateba, “Abaruoti emerongo etano na ebere, abwo ebiara biabo ebinene bi’amaboko na ebi’amagoro biabutoretwe, barenge gochora amatori korwa nyaro y’emesa yane. Na bono Nyasae onkoreire inche buna inche nabakorerete barabwo.” Akarentwa Yerusalemu, agakwera aroro." 
Judges1:8 Abayuda bakarwania Yerusalemu bakayoira. Bagaita abanto b’aroro nemioro, naende bagasamba omochie nomorero." 
Judges1:9 Nyuma y’ayio bagatirimboka korwania Abakanani abamenyete ase ense y’ebigoro, na gochia irianyi ase Negebu, na ase ense omweya." 
Judges1:10 Naende bakagenda korwania Abakanani abamenyete ase omochie o Heburoni, oyio orenge korokwa Kiriati‐Ariba agwo ritang’ani. Bakabua Sesai, na Ahimani, na Talimai." 
Judges1:11 Korwa agwo Abayuda bakagenda korwania abanto b’omochie o Debiri, oyio orenge korokwa Kiriati‐Seferi agwo ritang’ani." 
Judges1:12 Kalebu agateba, “Onde bwensi oraumokere Kiriati‐Seferi na koyoira, nimoe omoiseke one Asika abe mokaye.”" 
Judges1:13 Otinieli, mosinto o Kenasi, omomura omoke omwabo Kalebu, akabua omochie oyio. Erio Kalebu akamoa Asika, omoiseke oye, akaba mokaye." 
Judges1:14 Ekero Asika aigete bw’Otinieli, akamoboria asabe ise amoe oboremo. Erio agwo Asika agaika korwa etigere igoro, na Kalebu akamoboria, “Ninki oganetie?”" 
Judges1:15 Asika akairaneria, “Nekeegwa nganetie, ekiagera ngwansogetie okang’ira ase ense enyomo ya Negebu. Ase ayio, ing’a chinsoko chi’amache.” Kalebu akamoa chinsoko chia rogoro amo nechia maate." 
Judges1:16 Abanto b’ororeria rw’oyomo bw’Abakeni, ise biara Musa, bakagenda amo n’Abayuda korwa ase Omochie bw’Emekendo gochia erooro, irianyi y’Aradi, ase ense ya Yuda, na bakamenya ase egati y’abanto b’aroro." 
Judges1:17 Abayuda bakagenda amo n’Abasimeoni bamwabo, bakarwania Abakanani aria Sefati na kobabua. Bakaragereria omochie oria, bakayosaria kegima; nyuma y’ayio bakayoroka Horima." 
Judges1:18 Abayuda bakaira Gasa, na Asikeloni, na Ekironi, amo ne chinsemo chiaetanaine emechie eyio." 
Judges1:19 Omonene nigo arenge amo n’Abayuda, na barabwo bakaira ense y’ebitunwa, korende tibanyarete goseria abanto bamenyete ase ense omweya, ekiagera abanto abwo nigo babwate chigari chi’ebioma." 
Judges1:20 Na buna Musa atebete, Kalebu akaegwa omochie o Heburoni, nere agaseria abanto batato b’ororeria rw’Anaki korwao." 
Judges1:21 Korende abanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin tibaseretie Abayebusi, abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu. Ase ayio Abayebusi nigo bagendererete komenya Yerusalemu amo n’Ababenjamin nonya ngoika rero iga." 
Judges1:22 Abanto b’egesaku kia Yusufu bakagenda korwania omochie o Beteli, na Omonene nigo arenge amo nabarabwo." 
Judges1:23 Bagatoma chirooti gochia Beteli. Omochie oyio nigo orenge korokwa Lusu agwo ritang’ani. 
Judges1:24 Abanto baria chirooti bakarora omonto oyomo ogosoka korwa ase omochie oria, bakamotebia, “Tworokie ng’ai toranyare gosoera omochie oyo, naintwe ntogokorere amaya.”" 
Judges1:25 Akaborokia ase baranyare gosoera omochie oria. Barabwo bagaita abanto bande bonsi b’omochie nemioro, korende bagatiga omonto oria amo neamate yaye bare moyo." 
Judges1:26 Omonto oria akagenda ase ense y’Abahiti, akaagacha omochie aroro, akayoroka Lusu, buna ore korokwa goika rero iga." 
Judges1:27 Abanto b’egesaku kia Manase tibaseretie abanto bamenyete Beti‐Sehani, na Taanaki, na Dori, na Ibileamu, na Megido, amo nebichie biabo. Korende Abakanani baria mbagendererete komenya ase ense eria." 
Judges1:28 Agwo nyuma, ekero Abaisraeli babeire ne chinguru, bakabetereria Abakanani babakorere emeremo emekong’u, korende tibabaseretie korwa ense eria." 
Judges1:29 Abanto b’egesaku ki’Efraimu tibaseretie Abakanani abamenyete ase omochie o Geseri. Ase igo Abakanani bakagenderera komenya ase egati yabo. 
Judges1:30 Abanto b’egesaku gia Sabuloni tibaseretie abanto bamenyete ase emechie ya Kitironi na Nahalali. Ase ayio Abakanani baria bakagenderera komenya agwo ase egati yabo, korende bakabetererigwa kobakorera emeremo emekong’u." 
Judges1:31 Abanto b’egesaku gi’Aseri tibaseretie abanto bamenyete ase emechie y’Ako, na Sidoni, na Alabu, na Akisibu, na Heliba, na Afeki, na Rehobu." 
Judges1:32 Nabo Abaaseri bagendererete komenya ase egati y’Abakanani, ababiare b’ense eria, ekiagera barabwo tibaseretigwe korwao." 
Judges1:33 Abanto b’egesaku kia Nafutali tibaseretie abanto bamenyete ase emechie ya Beti‐Semesi na Beti‐Anati. Ase igo bakaba bakomenya ase egati y’Abakanani, ababiare b’ense eria, bakabetereria abanto ba Beti‐Semesi na Beti‐Anati kobakorera emeremo emekong’u." 
Judges1:34 Abaamori bakamiga abanto b’egesaku kia Dani gochia ense y’ebigoro gose tibabatigerete ribaga batirimboke gochia ase ense omweya," 
Judges1:35 Abaamori bakabwaterera ensemo yabo y’egetunwa kia Heresi, na Ayaloni, na Shaalabimu, korende abanto b’egesaku kia Yusufu bakabaengera, bakababetereria babakorere emeremo emekong’u." 
Judges1:36 Sugusu ya Sera orobebe rw’Abaamori rokagenda goetera egetirimboko ki’Egetunwa ki’Ebiuge. 
Judges2:1 Omomalaika bw’Omonene agatiira korwa Giligali, agaika Bokimu, agatebia Abaisraeli, “Inche nigo nabang’anyetie korwa Misiri, nkabarenta ase ense eye nabarierete chisokoro chiaino eira ng’a nimbayee. Ngateba: Tingosaria okobwatana kw’ogotianania okwo nakorete nainwe," 
Judges2:2 nainwe timokora okobwatana nababiare b’ense eye; goika motagore ebisasimero biabo, mobiiyerie inse. Korende timonyigwereti. Bono ninki eke mwakorire?" 
Judges2:3 Ase ayio, bono nkobatebia inde ng’a, tingoseria abanto aba korwa ase amasio aino. Barabwo mbabe bakobamiga korwa chinsemo chionsi, naende chinyasae chiabo nchibe chikobatega.”" 
Judges2:4 Ekero omomalaika bw’Omonene atebetie Abaisraeli bonsi amang’ana ayio, barabwo bagachaka korera." 
Judges2:5 Ase engencho eyio bakaroka aase aria Bokimu. Agwo bakamoruera Omonene ebing’wanso. 
Judges2:6 Yoshua konya oeire Abaisraeli ribaga bagende, na kera oyomo akagenda koira omwando oye ase ense eria." 
Judges2:7 Abanto bakaba bagokorera Omonene ase amatuko a Yoshua, na ase amatuko ’abagaaka abatigarete nyuma y’ogokwa kwaye, abwo baroche ogokora okwo okonene Nyasae akorerete Abaisraeli." 
Judges2:8 Yoshua mosinto o Nuni, omosomba bw’Omonene, agakwa ekero akoorire emiaka rigana erimo, na ikomi." 
Judges2:9 Abanto bakamotindeka ase orogongo rware omwando oye agwo Timunati‐Heresi, irianyi y’egetunwa kia Gaasi, ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu." 
Judges2:10 Abanto b’ekegori keria gionsi bagakwa bagasangererekana amo ne chisokoro chiabo, na abanto b’ekegori kiababwatetie tibamomanyete Omonene na eki akorerete Abaisraeli." 
Judges2:11 Erio Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe ase obosio bw’Omonene, bagachaka gokorera chinyasae chiare korokwa Baali." 
Judges2:12 Bagatiga komokorera Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, oria obarusetie ase ense ya Misiri, bakaba bakobwatana ne chinyasae chinde ching’ao chinyasae chi’abanto baria bamenyete ase egati yabo. Bagasasima chirochio, na ase ayio bakagechia Omonene." 
Judges2:13 Bagatiga Omonene na bagachaka gokorera chinyasae chiria chiare korokwa Baali, na echinde chiare korokwa Asitaroti." 
Judges2:14 Ase igo Omonene akaba nendamwamu entindi ase Abaisraeli, akababeka ase amaboko ’abanto abaurereria. Naende akababeka ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, baria babaetanaine, na Abaisraeli bakabugwa nababisa baria." 
Judges2:15 Kera engaki barenge kogenda ase esegi, Omonene nigo arenge kobabeea na obarentera amabe, buna konya abatebirie na gotiana. Barabwo nigo barenge nemechando emenene." 
Judges2:16 Omonene akaa Abaisraeli abagambi baare kobatooria korwa ase abaurereria baria. 
Judges2:17 Korende nonya naboigo, tibaigwerete abagambi baria. Abaisraeli tibabete abegenwa ase Omonene, korende bakaba bagosasima chinyasae chinde ching’ao. Bwango bagatiga enchera eria chisokoro chiabo chiabwatetie, enchera y’okoigwera amachiko ’Omonene." 
Judges2:18 Ekero kende gionsi Omonene arenge kobaa omogambi nigo arenge koba amo nomogambi oria, naende aba ogotooria abanto korwa ase ababisa babo, ase engaki omogambi oria arenge moyo. Omonene nigo arenge kobarorera amabera ekero aigure okwerera kwabo inse y’abwo babamigete na kobachanda." 
Judges2:19 Korende ekero omogambi oria akure, abanto baba bakoonchoka na gokora amabe kobua aya chisokoro chiabo chiakorete. Naende baba bakobwatana ne chinyasae chinde ching’ao, bagachikorera na gochisasima. Tibatigete ogokora kwabo okobe okwo banarete gokora bare noboenenu." 
Judges2:20 Ase ayio Omonene akaba nendamwamu entindi ase Abaisraeli, agateba, “Abanto aba basaririe okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, okwo nachigete chisokoro chiabo chikobwate. Na bono ekiagera tibanyigwereti," 
Judges2:21 inche tingoseria nonya nomonto oyomo bw’ebisaku ebio Yoshua atasaretie ritang’ani atarakwa. 
Judges2:22 Ase enchera eyio ninteeme Abaisraeli, ndore gose nabarende chinchera chiane inche Omonene, na gochitunyana, buna chisokoro chiabo chiakorete, gose taibo.”" 
Judges2:23 Ase igo Omonene agatiga abanto b’ebisaku biria bamenyeo, tabaseria bwango, gose tababegete ase amaboko a Yoshua." 
Judges3:1 Omonene nigo atigete abanto b’ebisaku binde bamenye ase ense eria, erinde ateeme Abaisraeli baria konya bataramanya esegi ende yonsi ase ense ya Kanani." 
Judges3:2 Nabo akorete ase okworokereria kera ekegori ki’Abaisraeli engencho y’esegi, mono abwo konya batararwana esegi ende yonsi." 
Judges3:3 Abanto batigarete ase ense eria nabwo aba: Abagambi batano b’Abafilisti, na Abakanani bonsi, na Abasidoni, na Abahivi, baria bamenyete ase ense y’ebitunwa bia Lebanoni, korwa egetunwa kia Baali‐Herimoni goika enchera ekogenda Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Omonene nigo atigete abanto aba ase ense eria, erinde ateeme Abaisraeli, arore gose mbatagete koigwera amachiko aria achigete chisokoro chiabo goetera ase Musa." 
Judges3:5 Ase igo Abaisraeli bakamenya ase egati y’Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abaamori, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi." 
Judges3:6 Bakanyuomeria abamura babo abaiseke b’abanto baria b’ebisaku, na bagasokia abaiseke babo ase abanto abwo naende bagakorera chinyasae chiabo." 
Judges3:7 Abaisraeli bagakora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, bakeba Omonene, Nyasae obo, na bagasasima chinyasae chiria Baali na Asera." 
Judges3:8 Ase igo Omonene akaba nendamwamu entindi ase Abaisraeli, akabatiga bakabugwa na Kusani‐Risataimu, omoruoti o Mesopotamia; na Abaisraeli bakaba bakomokorera ase engaki y’emiaka etano na etato." 
Judges3:9 Erio Abaisraeli bakarera ase Omonene ng’a abatoorie, nere akabaa omonto abatoorie. Omonto oyio nere Otinieli, mosinto o Kenasi, omomura omoke omwabo Kalebu." 
Judges3:10 Omoika o Nyasae ogacha igoro asare, na ere akaba omogambi bw’Abaisraeli. Akagenda korwana esegi, na Omonene akabeka Kusani‐Risataimu, omoruoti o Mesopotamia, ase amaboko aye. Otinieli akamobua kegima." 
Judges3:11 Bono ense eria ekaba nobotoereru ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene. Erio Otinieli, mosinto o Kenasi, agakwa." 
Judges3:12 Naende Abaisraeli bagakora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, na ase engencho y’ayio Omonene akabarentera Egiloni, omoruoti bw’ense ya Moabu, nere akabarwania, akababua." 
Judges3:13 Egiloni akabwatana n’Abaamori na Abaameleki; barabwo bakarwania Abaisraeli, bakababua, bakaira Omochie bw’Emekendo." 
Judges3:14 Abaisraeli bakaba bagokorera Egiloni, omoruoti o Moabu, ase engaki y’emiaka ikomi, na etano na etato." 
Judges3:15 Erio Abaisraeli bakarera ase Omonene ng’a abatoorie, nere akabaa omonto kobatooria. Omonto oria nere Ehudi, mosinto o Gera, bw’egesaku kia Benjamin. Ehudi nigo arenge omonyakebee. Abaisraeli bagatoma Ehudi koirera Egiloni, omoruoti bw’ense ya Moabu, ebiegwa bi’amasikani." 
Judges3:16 Ehudi ageturera omoyio o birende ore nobwoge chinsemo ibere; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo; akayweboerania ensemo yaye y’okorio, ime ye chianga chiaye." 
Judges3:17 Erio akairera Egiloni, omoruoti bw’ense ya Moabu, ebiegwa biria. Egiloni nigo arenge omonto omonetu mono." 
Judges3:18 Ekero Ehudi aruete ebiegwa biria agatebia abanto baria babibogoretie bairane bagende," 
Judges3:19 korende Ehudi omonyene, ekero aigete ase amagena abaachire are emegwekano, ang’e na Giligali, akairana, akagenda naende ase Egiloni, akamotebia, “Omonene one omoruoti, nimbwate ring’ana ria bobisi nkogotebia.” Ase igo omoruoti agatebia abanto bonsi abateneine ang’e komokorera, “Toe ribaga, tobe intwe tweka!” Barabwo bonsi bagasoka." 
Judges3:20 Ehudi akariina kerama igoro ase akanyomba kare nembeo engiya, ase omoruoti aikaransete, akamotebia, “Ninde namang’ana arure ase Omonene nkogotebia.” Omoruoti oria akaimoka korwa ase aikaransete." 
Judges3:21 Ehudi akarambora okoboko kwaye gw’okobee, agasomora omoyio oye o birende, oyio eboeranetie ensemo yaye y’okorio, akabeta Egiloni enda yaye ime." 
Judges3:22 Omoyio oyio okarimera ime amo negete, na ebitinya bikayotuba, ekiagera Ehudi tarenge koyosomora korwa ase enda y’omoruoti oria. Omoyio okaorokera magega." 
Judges3:23 Erio Ehudi agasoka, agasieka ebisieri bi’akanyomba karia, akabibunga." 
Judges3:24 Ekero asokire, abasomba b’Egiloni bagacha, bakanyora ebisieri bisiekire bibungire, bakarengereria ng’a omoruoti nigo are ase akanyomba ka ime kogwekonya." 
Judges3:25 Barabwo bakaganya egeka giaisanete koganya. Nonya naboigo, omoruoti taigora egesieri ki’enyomba. Ase ayio bakaimokia ekeigorero, bakaigora egesieri, na Ani! Omonene obo nigo araire inse okwete." 
Judges3:26 Ekero abasomba baria barenge baganyete, Ehudi agatama. Ere konya oetire ase amagena arenge, aria abaachire are emegwekano, agatama gochia Seira." 
Judges3:27 Ekero aigete aroro, akabugia egetureri gi’esegi ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu. Erio Abaisraeli bagatirimboka korwa ase ebitunwa bakamobwatia, nere akaba omotang’ani obo." 
Judges3:28 Ere akabatebia, “Ntunyana, ekiagera Omonene obekire ababisa baino Abamoabu ase amaboko aino.” Erio bakamobwatia, bagasieka ebiambokero bia Yorodan, ase Abamoabu banarete kwambokera, tibaa nonya noyomo ribaga ri’okwamboka." 
Judges3:29 Ase rituko erio bagaita Abamoabu koreng’ana chilifu ikomi. Abwo bonsi nigo barenge abanto abanene, naende barenge chituoni chi’esegi; onde tatooregete nonya noyomo." 
Judges3:30 Ase rituko riria Abaisraeli bakabua Abamoabu, na ense eria ekaba nomorembe ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo etano na etato." 
Judges3:31 Oyobwatetie Ehudi ase okogamba, nere Samigari, mosinto bw’Anati Ere agaita Abafilisti amagana atano na rimo nenyimbo are gotemera chieri. Nere boigo agatooria Abaisraeli." 
Judges4:1 Ekero Ehudi akure, Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe ase obosio bw’Omonene naende." 
Judges4:2 Ase igo Omonene akabatiga bakabugwa na Yabini, omoruoti o Kanani, oyorenge kogambera omochie o Hasori. Omotang’ani bw’emeganda yaye y’esegi nigo are korokwa Sisera. Ere nigo amenyete Haroseti, omochie bw’Ebisaku." 
Judges4:3 Yabini nigo abwate chigari chi’ebioma amagana kianda. Ere agachanda Abaisraeli mono ase obotindi obonene ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere, na Abaisraeli bakarera ase Omonene abakonye." 
Judges4:4 Ase engaki eria omobani Debora, moka Lapidoti, nigo arenge omogambi bw’Abaisraeli." 
Judges4:5 Ere nigo anarete goikaransa inse y’omote orenge korokwa Omokendo o Debora, egati ya Rama na Beteli, ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, na Abaisraeli nigo banarete gocha asare abagayane." 
Judges4:6 Rituko erimo akarangeria Baraki, mosinto bw’Abinoamu, korwa ase omochie o Kedesi bw’ense ya Nafutali, akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agochikire: Genda ochore abanto chilifu ikomi korwa ase egesaku kia Nafutali na egia Sabuloni, obaire gochia ase egetunwa gia Tabori." 
Judges4:7 Inche ning’use Sisera, omotang’ani bw’emeganda y’esegi, amo ne chigari chiaye na emeganda yaye, gocha asore, ase orooche rwa Kisoni, na aroro nimobeke ase amaboko ao.”" 
Judges4:8 Baraki akairaneria Debora, “Aye koragende amo nainche, rirorio ningende, korende otagendeti amo nainche, tinkogenda.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora akamoiraneria, “Goika ngende amo naye, korende orogendo oro tirogokorentera ogotogigwa, ekiagera Omonene nigo agochia gotiga Sisera agwe ase amaboko ’omokungu.” Erio Debora akaimoka akagenda amo na Baraki, bagaika Kedesi." 
Judges4:10 Na Baraki akarangeria abanto ba Nafutali na aba Saluboni bache Kedesi, na abanto chilifu ikomi bagatiira amo na Baraki, na Debora akagenda nere." 
Judges4:11 Bono Heberi Omokeni agatenenia eema yaye ang’e nomote oria onga buna omotontera ase Sananimu, ang’e na Kedesi. Ere konya bweatananire korwa ase Abakeni bande. Abakeni nigo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Hobabu, mokoyoye Musa." 
Judges4:12 Sisera agatebigwa ng’a Baraki, mosinto bw’Abinoamu, otiirire gochia ase egetunwa gia Tabori." 
Judges4:13 Erio agasangereria chigari chiaye amagana kianda, amo nabarwani baye bonsi, korwa ase Haroseti, omochie bw’Ebisaku, gochia ase orooche rwa Kisoni." 
Judges4:14 Erio Debora agatebia Baraki, “Imoka, ogende! Rituko ria rero nario Omonene abekire Sisera ase amaboko ao. Omonene ogotang’aneire gochia korwana esegi.” Baraki agatirimboka korwa ase egetunwa gia Tabori amo nabanto chilifu ikomi baare komotunyana." 
Judges4:15 Omonene akaondokia na gotantania Sisera amo ne chigari chiaye na omoganda bwonsi bw’abarwani. Erio abarwani abwo bagatama korwa ase omoro o Baraki, na Sisera omonyene agaika korwa ase egari yaye, agatama namagoro." 
Judges4:16 Baraki akabwatia chigari na omoganda bw’abarwani goika Haroseti, omochie bw’ebisaku, na omoganda bwonsi bw’abarwani o Sisera ogaitwa. Monto onde tatigarete ore moyo, nonya noyomo." 
Judges4:17 Sisera akaminyoka, agatamera eema ya Yaeli, moka Heberi Omokeni, ekiagera ase engaki eria Yabini, omoruoti o Hasori, na eamate ya Heberi Omokeni nigo barenge abasani." 
Judges4:18 Yaeli agasoka korotota Sisera, akamotebia, “Omonene one, gobera gocha aa, soa ime aa, toba nobwoba!” Erio Sisera agasoa ase eema ya Yaeli, na Yaeli akamobisia egetambaa." 
Judges4:19 Sisera agatebia Yaeli, “Ing’a amache inywe! Igo inde nerang’o.” Omokungu oria agakunora ekerandi gekorire korwa ase amasankwa, kiare namabeere, akamoa, na ere akanywa. Nyuma y’ayio Yaeli akamobisia naende." 
Judges4:20 Sisera agatebia Yaeli, “Tenena ase egesoero ki’eema, na omonto onde bwensi orache akoborie: Onde nare ime aa? Aye okane, otebe: Yaya, onde taiyo.”" 
Judges4:21 Sisera konya orosire mono, akarara chitoro chindito. Erio Yaeli, moka Heberi, akaimokia ekerochi ki’eema na ekegogi agachoba ng’ora ng’ora gochia ase Sisera, akamoaka ekerochi keria korwa chintakunero goetera ase omotwe gochia inse ase riroba, na ere agakwa." 
Judges4:22 Engaki eria Baraki agacha, okobwatia Sisera, na Yaeli agasoka komorotota, akamotebia, “Inchuo, nkworokie omonto oria okorigia.” Agasoa amo na Yaeli, akanyora Sisera orambereretie inse, okwete, na ekerochi kere ase chintakunero chiaye ime." 
Judges4:23 Ase rituko riria Nyasae akaa Abaisraeli chinguru bakabua Yabini, omoruoti o Kanani." 
Judges4:24 Na Abaisraeli bakaengera Yabini, omoruoti o Kanani goika bakamosiria kegima." 
Judges5:1 Ase rituko riria Debora na Baraki, mosinto bw’Abinoamu, bagatera ogotera oko:" 
Judges5:2 Motogie Omonene, ekiagera abaraai batang’anete Abaisraeli, na abanto beruete ase ogwancha kwabo!" 
Judges5:3 Inwe abaruoti, igwa! Inwe abagambi, tegerera! Inche ninterere Omonene ase okomobaka, nintogie Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli!" 
Judges5:4 Omonene, ekero kwarwete ebitunwa bia Seiri, na ogataara korwa ense ya Edomu, ense egatengechigwa, ne embura egatwa korwa igoro. Ee, amare agaitera amache." 
Judges5:5 Ebitunwa bikanyegerigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, ee, nonya negetunwa keria gia Sinai, ase obosio bwa Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Judges5:6 Ase amatuko a Samigari, mosinto bw’Anati, na ase amatuko a Yaeli, chinchera chinene nigo chiariibete, abagendi nigo baare goeta ase chinsana." 
Judges5:7 Emechie y’Abaisraeli nigo yaraire, kende tikiarenge gokorekao goika aye Debora okaimoka, ee, goika okaimoka, okaba ng’ina ase Abaisraeli." 
Judges5:8 Barabwo bagachora chinyasae chinyia, erio chisegi chikaba ase ebiita biabo. Ase abanto chilifu emerongo ene ase Abaisraeli, inee, onde obo narorekanete ore nenguba gose ritimo?" 
Judges5:9 Enkoro yane nigo ere amo nabatang’ani b’Abaisraeli, na ase abanto abwo beruete ase ogwancha. Motogie Omonene!" 
Judges5:10 Inwe abamokoriina chitigere chindabu, nainwe abamogoikaransa ase emegeeke yaino, nainwe abamogotaara ase chinchera, morarie amang’ana ayio!" 
Judges5:11 Tegerera! Abwo bagoaka amariogi ase bagosangererekana kobuucha amache, nigo bagokwana igoro y’obobui bw’Omonene, ee, igoro y’ogokora kwaye okoronge gokogambera Abaisraeli. Erio abanto b’Omonene bagatirimboka gochia ase ebiita." 
Judges5:12 Imoka, Debora, imoka! Imoka, otere ogotera! Naye Baraki, mosinto bw’Abinoamu, tenena, oire abanto abwo gwosire." 
Judges5:13 Abatigarete bagatirimboka gochia ase abatang’ani babo; Omonene agacha ase engencho yane arwanie chituoni. 
Judges5:14 Abwo ritina riabo riarenge ase ense y’Abaameleki, bagatirimboka korwa ase Efraimu, abanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin bagakobwatia. Abatang’ani b’abarwani bagatirimboka korwa Makiri, na abarenge abariki ase esegi korwa Sabuloni." 
Judges5:15 Abanene b’Abaisakaru nigo babwatetie Debora, na buna Abaisakaru bakorete, naboigo na Baraki, bagatirimboka gochia ase ense omweya, bakabwatia chimbaratero chiabo. Korende ase chindooche chi’abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, okogamba na okoroberia okonene nigo biarengeo." 
Judges5:16 Nase ki moikaransete ase eero ye ching’ondi, mokoigwa abarisia bakobugia ebiroria bakorangeria ching’ondi? Ee, ase chindooche chi’abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben; okogamba na okoroberia okonene nigo biarengeo, nigo kwarenge okoamererania okonene." 
Judges5:17 Abanto ba Gileadi, moocha ya Yorodan, mbaikaranseteo. Na abanto b’egesaku kia Dani, nase ki babeerete ase chimeeri chiabo? Abanto b’egesaku gi’Aseri bagaikaransa enyancha mbarabare, bagakira‐kiri, bakabeera ase emesomo yabo." 
Judges5:18 Abasabuloni bakerua nonya ngoika ogokwa, na Abanafutali boigo ase okorwana esegi ase ebitunwa." 
Judges5:19 Abaruoti bagacha, bakarwana, ee, abaruoti ba Kanani bakarwana ase Taanaki, agwo ase chindooche chia Megido, korende tibasakorete chifeta." 
Judges5:20 Korwa igoro esegi ekarwana, ching’enang’eni chikarwania Sisera ekero chiare ase orogendo rwabo." 
Judges5:21 Orooche rwa Kisoni rokabaira, orwo norooche rwa kare rwa Kisoni. Omoyo one, genderera ne chinguru!" 
Judges5:22 Erio chibarasi chiare gotitiria nebitaago biabo, chituoni chiachiriinete chiare gocharara‐charara." 
Judges5:23 Omomalaika bw’Omonene nigo agoteba, “Ragereria Merosi, ragereria abanto bamenyeteo, ekiagera tibachete gokonya Omonene, komokonya korwania abare ne chinguru.”" 
Judges5:24 Yaeli, moka Heberi Omokeni, nasesenirie kobua abakungu bande, ee, nasesenirie kobua abakungu bande bamenyete ase chiema." 
Judges5:25 Sisera agasaba amache, erio Yaeli akamoa amabeere, akamoa amaguta amabeere are ase egetaabo ekiya." 
Judges5:26 Akarambora okoboko kwaye, akaimokia ekerochi ki’eema, na ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio akaimokia ekegogi, agaakera Sisera nakerokio, agakong’onta omotwe oye, akabeta chintakunero chiaye gochia ime." 
Judges5:27 Sisera akeringa akagwa inse, akagwa inse ase amagoro a Yaeli, akarambereria inse ase amagoro aye, agwo ase agwete agakwa." 
Judges5:28 Ng’ina Sisera akarigereria korwa ase ekebao, agatengera goetera ase ekebao kiabekire ebitange, akarera, “Nase ki chigari chiaye chiatebanire gocha? Nase ki amagoro e chibarasi chiaye chie chigari chiatebanire koirana?" 
Judges5:29 Abaiseke abang’aini abarenge amo nere bakamoiraneria, na ere omonyene akaba okoiranerera amang’ana aya:”" 
Judges5:30 “Ande, nigo banyorire ebisakorwa bakare gwatanana ase egati yabo, kera omonto aire omoiseke oyomo, gose babere; Sisera ere aire ebitambaa bi’ebieni ebiya, egetambaa keroisirie ekiya, ekemo gose bibere, bibe ebisakorwa ase rigoti riaye.”" 
Judges5:31 “Omonene, tiga ababisa bao bonsi basire buna igo, korende baria bagwanchete babe buna erioba rire ekero rigosoka ne chinguru.” Na ense eria ekaba nobotoereru ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene." 
Judges6:1 Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe naende ase obosio bw’Omonene, na Omonene akababeka ase amaboko ’Abamidiani ase engaki y’emiaka etano na ebere." 
Judges6:2 Abamidiani nigo baengerete Abaisraeli, na ase engencho y’Abamidiani Abaisraeli bakabetererigwa korigia obotamero ase amakuruma na emetaro, na ase chingoro chiakunyire ase ebitunwa." 
Judges6:3 Kero kende gionsi Abaisraeli barenge kobusura chimbusuro chiabo, Abamimidiani, na Abaameleki, na abanto ba moocha nigo baare gocha kobarwania esegi." 
Judges6:4 Bakaba bagotoora ase ense y’Abaisraeli, erio basaria chindagera chiabo goika chimbebe chia Gasa. Tibaare gotigareria Abaisraeli ching’ondi, gose chiombe, gose chitigere, nonya ngento kende gionsi Abaisraeli baare koria." 
Judges6:5 Nigo barenge gocha amo ne chitugo chiabo ne chiema chiabo, abange buna chingige. Barabwo abanyene ne chingamia chiabo, omobaro obo torenge kobareka. Bagasoa ase ense eria, bakagania koyesaria kegima." 
Judges6:6 Ase ayio Abaisraeli bagachandeka mono ase engencho y’Abamidiani; erio bakarera ase Omonene ng’a abakonye. 
Judges6:7 Ekero Abaisraeli barerete ase Omonene ase engencho y’Abamidiani," 
Judges6:8 Omonene akabatomera omobani, na ere akabarentera amang’ana korwa ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, akabatebia, “Ninche nabarusetie Miisiri, ense eria ase mwarenge abasomba." 
Judges6:9 Nkabatooria korwa ase Abamisiri, na korwa ase abanto bonsi babachandete ase ense eye. Nkabaseria, bakarua ase obosio bwaino, erio nkabaa inwe ense yabo." 
Judges6:10 Nkabatebia: Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, timobaisa koiroka chinyasae chi’Abaamori, abwo momenyete ase ense yabo. Korende timwaigwerete amang’ana aane.”" 
Judges6:11 Erio omomalaika bw’Omonene agacha, agaikaransa inse y’omote onga buna omotontera agwo Ofura, oyio orenge o Yoashi, omonto bw’eamate y’Abieseri. Gidioni, omomura oye, nigo arenge koora engano ase ekemitero ki’edivai, erinde Abamidiani tibayenyora." 
Judges6:12 Omomalaika bw’Omonene akamoorokera agwo, akamotebia, “Omonene nigo are amo naye, aye omonto omoremu ase okorwana esegi!”" 
Judges6:13 Gidioni agakwana nere, agateba, “Aye Omonene one, onye Omonene ore amo naintwe, nase ki rende aya onsi atonyorire? Naende ogokora kwaye gwe chinguru, ng’ai kore, koria chisokoro chiaito chiatotebetie ng’a Omonene nere otorusetie Misiri? Na bono Omonene otwangire na gotobeka ase amaboko ’Abamidiani.”" 
Judges6:14 Erio Omonene akeonchora gochia asare, akamotebia, “Genda ne chinguru echio chiao, otoorie Abaisraeli korwa ase amaboko ’Abamidiani. Inche ninche nkogotoma.”" 
Judges6:15 Gidioni akamoboria, “Omonene one, naki ndakore mbatoorie Abaisraeli? Eamate yane nigo ere enke kobua chiamate chinde ase egesaku kia Manase, na ase enyomba ya tata inche tindi omonto omanyekanete.”" 
Judges6:16 Omonene akamoiraneria, “Inche nimbe amo naye, naye noite Abamidiani buna nigo bare omonto oyomo.”" 
Judges6:17 Gidioni akamotebia, “Omonene, onye nanyorire ogwancherwa asore, inyorokie ekemanyererio ng’a aye naye ogokwana nainche." 
Judges6:18 Koranche, torua aase aa goika nkorentere okoruegwa kwane kw’endagera.” Omomalaika oria akamoiraneria, “Nimbeere aa, nkoganye goika oirane.”" 
Judges6:19 Erio Gidioni akagenda nyomba mwaye, akanyenya emanwa y’embori, akayeroisia; naende korwa ase obosie bw’ekerengo ki’ebimunu bibere akaroisia emegati etabekiri memera. Akabeka chinyama ase egetonga, na omosori akayoumora ase enyongo, akairera omomalaika oria orenge inse y’omote onga buna omotontera endagera eyio." 
Judges6:20 Omomalaika oria o Nyasae akamotebia, “Imokia chinyama echi na emegati eye etabekiri memera, obibeke igoro ase egetare eke, naende obiumorere omosori oyio.” Gidioni agakora bo." 
Judges6:21 Erio omomalaika oria akarambora okoboko kwaye, na ase mesia y’enyimbo yaye agakuna chinyama chiria na emegati eria etabekiri memera. Aroro agwo omorero ogatuboka ogoka korwa ase egetare keria ime, ne chinyama echio amo nemegati eyio bigasambwa bikayia bikaera. Na omomalaika oria bw’Omonene akarua ase Gidioni." 
Judges6:22 Bono Gidioni akamanya ng’a oria nomomalaika bw’Omonene orenge, akabora, “Ani! Aye Omonene Nyasae! Narorire omomalaika oo obosio ase obosio.”" 
Judges6:23 Korende Omonene akamotebia, “Omorembe obe amo naye! Toiroka! Aye togokwa.”" 
Judges6:24 Erio Gidioni akaagachera Omonene egesasimero aroro agwo, agakeroka “Omonene nere Omorembe.” Egesasimero ekio nigo geteneine agwo Ofura, omochie bw’eamate y’Abieseri, nonya ngoika rero iga." 
Judges6:25 Ase obotuko boria Omonene agatebia Gidioni, “Imokia eeri ya iso, na eeri eyemo ende ere nemiaka etano na ebere, naende otagore egesasimero gia iso, keria aagacherete Baali, na okeiyerie inse; naende onache emete y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, ere ensemo y’egesasimero keria." 
Judges6:26 Naende ong’agachere inche Omonene, Nyasae oo, egesasimero, ase ogochoka amagena buya igoro ase eburi eye enkong’u. Erio orente eeri eria ya kabere, oyerue ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, oyesambere chinko chi’omote oria bw’Asera ogochia konacha.”" 
Judges6:27 Gidioni akaimoka amo nabasomba baye ikomi, agakora buna Omonene amotebetie. Bono ekiagera arenge nobwoba ase abanto b’eamate yaye, na ab’omochie obo, gokora aya ekero kia mobaso, akayakora botuko." 
Judges6:28 Rituko ria kabere, ekero abanto babogete mambia chuni, bakanyora ng’a egesasimero kia Baali giatagoirwe amo nomote oria bw’Asera orenge ensemo yaye, naende bakarora ng’a eeri eria ya kabere yarusigwe yakoreirwe ekeng’wanso igoro ase egesasimero keria konya kiaagachirwe." 
Judges6:29 Barabwo bakaborania, “Ning’o okorete amang’ana aya?” Ekero baare koboria na kouna‐unia, bakanyora ng’a Gidioni, mosinto o Yoashi, nere okorete ayio." 
Judges6:30 Erio abanto b’omochie oria bagatebia Yoashi, “Morente omomura oyio oo aiga, ere goika aitwe, ekiagera otagoire egesasimero kia Baali, na otagoire omote oria bw’Asera orenge ensemo yaye.”" 
Judges6:31 Korende Yoashi agatebia abwo bonsi bachete koamererania nere, “Inee! Ninwe mokorwanerera Baali? Gose ninwe mokoyekengera? Onde bwensi okoyerwanerera goika aitwe ritang’ani emambia ende etaraika. Onye Baali nenyasae, tiga erwanerere ere bweka omonyene. Egesasimero kiaye nakio giatagoirwe.”" 
Judges6:32 Korwa rituko riria Gidioni akarokwa Yerubi‐Baali, engencho yaye, “Tiga Baali erwanerere ere bweka omonyene”, ekiagera Gidioni atagorete egesasimero kiaye." 
Judges6:33 Erio Abamidiani na Abaameleki, na abanto ba moocha bagasangererekana amo, na ekero bambokire Yorodan bagatoora ase ense omweremo ya Yesireeli." 
Judges6:34 Gidioni agasogwa ne chinguru chi’Omoika bw’Omonene. Ere akabugia egetureri gi’esegi, na Abaabieseri bakarangerigwa bakamobwatia." 
Judges6:35 Naende agatoma abanto ase orogongo rwonsi rw’abanto b’egesaku kia Manase barangerie abanto b’aroro bamobwatie. Naboigo akarangeria abanto b’egesaku gi’Aseri, na egia Sabuloni, na ekia Nafutali; barabwo bakaimoka, bakagenda bakamobwatia." 
Judges6:36 Gidioni agatebia Nyasae, “Aye gwatebire ng’a norigetie gotooria Abaisraeli goetera ase okoboko kwane. Onye naboigo," 
Judges6:37 rora, nkobeka nde risankwa rire namarionya e ching’ondi ase ekeooreri gekoorerwa; obotooru bokoba ase risankwa riria rire namarionya oka, korende riroba ribe eriomo, erio nario ndamanye ng’a aye notoorie Abaisraeli goetera ase okoboko kwane, buna gwatebire.”" 
Judges6:38 Ayio akaba boigo. Ekero Gidioni abogete mambia chuni, akamita risankwa riria, akanyititora amache ’obotooru, egetaabo kegaichora." 
Judges6:39 Gidioni agakwana na Nyasae, akamotebia, “Nyasae, totiga endamwamu yao yoke asende, korende ing’a ribaga nkwane naye rimo naende. Tiga nteeme rimo naende ne risankwa eri. Na bono ekero eke kora iga ng’a risankwa ribe eriomo, korende obotooru bobe ase riroba inse rionsi.”" 
Judges6:40 Na ase obotuko boria Nyasae agakora bo; mambia yaye risankwa nigo riarenge eriomo, korende riroba inse rionsi rikaba rinyiu ase obotooru." 
Judges7:1 Yerubi‐Baali (nere Gidioni) amo nabanto abarenge komo bakaimoka mambia chuni, bagatoora ang’e nensoko ya Harodi. Abamidiani nigo batoorete ase ense omweya sugusu yabo, ang’e negetunwa kia More." 
Judges7:2 Omonene agatebia Gidioni, “Abanto abwo bagokobwatia nigo bare abange goetania ntanyare kobeka Abamidiani ase amaboko abo. Aande Abaisraeli nigo barachie gwetogia mamincha yane, na goteba: Amaboko aito intwe abanyene naro atotooretie." 
Judges7:3 Ase ayio, raria ase abanto, obatebie: Onde bwensi ore nobwoba na omoondoko, airane gochia nka na arue egetunwa kia Gileadi.” Abanto chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere, bakairana, bakagenda, na abanto chilifu ikomi bagatigara." 
Judges7:4 Naende Omonene agatebia Gidioni, “Nonya mbono abanto aba nigo bare abange mono; tiga batirimboke gochia rooche, na inche nkobaatananere aroro. Ase onde bwensi ndagotebie: Omonto oyo nanyare kogenda amo naye, oyio agende; na ase onde bwensi ndagotebie: Omonto oyo takogenda amo naye, oyio takogenda.”" 
Judges7:5 Ase igo Gidioni agatirimbokia abanto baria gochia rooche, na Omonene akamotebia, “Onde bwensi orabe ogosiara amache noromeme gochia monwa oye, buna esese egosiara, omobeke ensemo eyemo; na onde bwensi oratung’ame inse namaru konywa amache, omobeke ensemo eng’ao.”" 
Judges7:6 Abanto baria basiarete amache ase okoyasiara gochia monwa nebiara bi’amaboko abo, nigo barenge amagana atato. Na abatigarete igo batung’amete namaru inse, bakanywa." 
Judges7:7 Omonene agatebia Gidioni, “Ase abanto aba amagana atato basiara amache gochia monwa nimbatoorie inwe na kobeka Abamidiani ase amaboko ao, korende tiga abanto bande bonsi bairane, kera oyomo ase enka yaye.”" 
Judges7:8 Nabo Gidioni akarusia asebare endagera eye babwate amo nebitureri, agatebia Abaisraeli bonsi, otatiga abwo amagana atato, bairane nka. Egetwori ki’Abamidiani nigo kiarenge maate yabo ase ense omweya." 
Judges7:9 Ase obotuko boria Omonene agatebia Gidioni, “Imoka, otirimboke gochia ase egetwori kiabo obaumokere, ekiagera nakebekire ase amaboko ao." 
Judges7:10 Korende onye gokoiroka, tirimboka ritang’ani amo na Pura, omosomba oo." 
Judges7:11 Aye noigwe amang’ana aya bagokwana, erio ekero kwayaigure onyore oboremu ogende gokeumokera.” Nabo Gidioni amo na Pura, omosomba oye, bagatirimboka goika ase ensinyo y’egetwori keria aase kiarendire." 
Judges7:12 Abamidiani, na Abaameleki, na abanto ba moocha nigo barenge agwo ase ense omweya abange buna chingige. Nigo barenge ne chingamia chinyinge buna omokenye ore ase engegu y’enyancha chitaare kobareka." 
Judges7:13 Ekero Gidioni aigeteo, akaigwa omonto oyomo ogotebia omogisangio oye buna arotire, ogoteba, “Nigo narota okorota, narora omogati bw’esairi ogoturunkana gocha aiga ase egetwori giaito, oaka eema, oyeonchorana, oyeiyeria inse.”" 
Judges7:14 Omogisangio bw’omonto oria akairaneria, “Oyio nomoro o Gidioni, oria Omoisraeli, mosinto o Yoashi. Tigekonyara koba gento kende ekeao. Nyasae otobekire intwe Abamidiani, amo nemeganda yaito yonsi y’abarwani, ase amaboko aye.”" 
Judges7:15 Gidioni agachia koigwa okorota okwo, naende buna engencho y’okorota okwo yarenge, agatung’ama inse, agasasima. Erio akairana gochia ase Abaisraeli, akabatebia, “Imoka mogende! Omonene obekire ebitwori bi’abarwani b’Abamidiani ase amaboko aino.”" 
Judges7:16 Agaatanana abanto baria baye amagana atato ase ebiombe bitato, akaa kera oyomo egetureri, na ekeguuru amo nekieri ki’omorero kere imeo." 
Judges7:17 Akabatebia, “Ndigererie, mokore buna ndakore. Ekero ndaike ase ensinyo y’egetwori, mondigererie buna ndakore nainwe mokore bo." 
Judges7:18 Ekero inche amo nabanto bonsi tore komo torabugie ebitureri, nainwe mobugie ebitureri biaino ase chinsemo chionsi chi’egetwori, erio moake eriogi rinene, motebe: Ase Omonene na ase Gidioni!”" 
Judges7:19 Bono Gidioni na abanto baria rigana erimo barenge amo nere bagaika ensinyo y’egetwori ki’Abamidiani ase engaki abarendi ba botuko gati bachagete korenda. Erio bakabugia ebitureri biria na bagaata ebiguuru biria babwate ase amaboko abo. 
Judges7:20 Naboigo abanto bonsi b’ebiombe biria bitato bakabugia ebitureri biabo na bagaata ebiguuru biabo; babwate ebieri bi’omorero ase amaboko abo a bomosi, na ase amaboko a borio babwate ebitureri biabo bi’okobugia, bagaaka eriogi rinene, bakabora, “Omoro ase Omonene na ase Gidioni!”" 
Judges7:21 Kera omonto agatenena aase aye goetanana ase egetwori keria; erio abarwani b’esegi abarenge imeo bagachaka kominyoka gochia aaria na aaria, bagakuura na gotama." 
Judges7:22 Ekero abanto ba Gidioni babugetie ebitureri biria amagana atato, Omonene akaondokia Abamidiani, kera oyomo akaonchokera goita oyomwabo nomoro ase egetwori keria ekegima, na abarwani bonsi bagatama gochia ensemo ya Serera goikera Beti‐Hasita, na goikera Abeli‐Mehola, ang’e na Tabati." 
Judges7:23 Erio Abaisraeli korwa egesaku kia Nafutali na egi’Aseri, amo nekia Manase gionsi bakarangerigwa gocha amo kobwatia Abamidiani." 
Judges7:24 Gidioni agatoma abanto ase ense yonsi y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu batebe, “Tirimboka gochia maate, morwanie Abamidiani; mobwate ebiambokero bie chindooche goikera Beti‐Bara, amo nebia Yorodan.” Ase igo abanto b’Efraimu bagasangererigwa amo, bakabwata ebiambokero goikera Beti‐Bara, na ebia Yorodan boigo." 
Judges7:25 Bakabwata abagambi babere b’Abamidiani, Orebu na Seebu. Bagaitera Orebu ase Egetare ki’Orebu, na Seebu bakamoitera ase ekemitero ki’edivai gia Seebu, na bakagenderera kobwatia Abamidiani. Omotwe bw’Orebu na oyo o Seebu bakayeirera Gidioni aase arenge, moocha ya Yorodan." 
Judges8:1 Abanto b’Efraimu bakaboria Gidioni, “Nase ki otatorangeretie ekero kwagendete korwania Abamidiani? Inki eke gwatokoreire?” Naende bakamwomania, bare nobotindi obonge mono." 
Judges8:2 Ere akabairaneria, “Ngento ki nakorire inche kegwekaine eki mwakorire inwe? Inee! Ogochora kw’amasabibu amatigari kw’Abaefraimu tikori okuya kobua rigesa ri’emesabibu nabanto b’Abieseri?" 
Judges8:3 Nyasae obekire Orebu na Seebu, abagambi b’Abamidiani, ase amaboko aino. Inche ngento ki nakorire kegwekaine eki mwakorire inwe?” Ekero baigwete aya Gidioni akwanete, endamwamu yabo y’okomobea egakenda." 
Judges8:4 Bono Gidioni amo nabanto baye amagana atato bagacha Yorodan, bakaamboka. Nonya konya bagoyire, bakagenderera kobwatia ababisa babo." 
Judges8:5 Gidioni agatebia abanto ba Sukoti, “Komoranche moe abanto aba bagontunyana emegati. Barabwo bagoyire, nainche nkobwatia inde Seba na Salimuna, abaruoti b’Abamidiani, mbarwanie.”" 
Judges8:6 Korende abatang’ani ba Sukoti bagateba, “Naki rende torakore tobae abarwani bao emegati? Naye torabua Seba na Salimuna.”" 
Judges8:7 Gidioni akairaneria, “Ekero Omonene arabeke Seba na Salimuna ase amaboko aane, ning’arie chinyama chi’emebere yaino namagwa ’orosana na amageri.”" 
Judges8:8 Erio Gidioni agatiga Sukoti, akagenda gochia Penueli na agwo akaboria abanto amang’ana aria aria, korende abanto ba Penueli bakamoiraneria buna abanto ba Sukoti bamoiraneretie." 
Judges8:9 Ase igo akabatebia, “Ekero ndachiche naende inde nobobui, nintagore omorobiri oyo.”" 
Judges8:10 Bono Seba na Salimuna nigo barenge agwo Karikori amo nabarwani babo chilifu ikomi na isano. Ase abarwani ba moocha nabwo boka batigarete. Abarwani chilifu rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, abarwanete nemioro, konya baitirwe." 
Judges8:11 Gidioni agatiirera enchera abagendi banarete goeta, moocha ya Noba na Yogibea, akaumokera omoganda bw’abarwani ekero orenge nobotoereru." 
Judges8:12 Seba na Salimuna, abaruoti baria babere b’Abamidiani, bagatama, korende Gidioni akababwatia akababwata. Erio akagosa abarwani bonsi na kobaserebania." 
Judges8:13 Ekero Gidioni, mosinto o Yoashi, airanete korwa ase esegi agaetera ebitirimboko bia Heresi," 
Judges8:14 akabwata omomura omosae oyomo o Sukoti, akamobora‐boria amang’ana, akamotebia amorikere amarieta ’abanto abanene, na abagaaka ba Sukoti, emerongo etano na ebere, na batano na babere." 
Judges8:15 Erio Gidioni akagenda ase abanto ba Sukoti, akabatebia, “Rora aiga Seba na Salimuna, baria inwe mwanyomaneretie mogoteba iga: Torabua Seba na Salimuna. Naki rende torakore toe abarwani bao, abwo bagoyire, emegati!”" 
Judges8:16 Akaimokia amagwa ’orosana na amageri akabaaria abagaaka b’omochie oria. 
Judges8:17 Erio agatagora omorobiri agwo Penueli, na agaita abasacha b’omochie oria." 
Judges8:18 Erio Gidioni akaboria Seba na Salimuna, “Inee! Abanto baria mwaitete agwo Tabori, nkieni ki barenge?” Bakamoiraneria, “Kera oyomo obo nigo akogwekaine. Nigo barorekanete buna bare abana b’omoruoti.”" 
Judges8:19 Gidioni akabatebia, “Baria nigo barenge bamura baminto, abamura ba baba. Amaene, buna Omonene are moyo, onye mwabatigete babe moyo, inche nanga tinabaita inwe!”" 
Judges8:20 Naende agatebia Yeteri, omwana oye omomura omotangi, “Imoka, obaite!” Korende omwana oyio tang’usa omoyio oye o birende, ekiagera nigo arenge omosae omoke." 
Judges8:21 Erio Seba na Salimuna bagatebia Gidioni, “Imoka aye omonyene, otoite, ekiagera buna omonto are, naboigo ne chinguru chiaye chire.” Ere akaimoka, agaita Seba na Salimuna; akarusia chisonoi chi’ogwechabera chiarenge ase amagoti e chingamia chiabo." 
Judges8:22 Nyuma y’ayio Abaisraeli bagatebia Gidioni, “Gwatotooririe korwa ase amaboko ’Abamidiani; ase ayio kabe omogambi oito; na nyuma yao omwana oo na omochokoro oo nabatogambere.”" 
Judges8:23 Gidioni akabairaneria, “Inche tinkobagambera, gose omwana one takobagambera; Omonene nere orabagambere.”" 
Judges8:24 Naende akabatebia, “Nkobasaba nde egento ekemo: Kera omonto asemore ang’e ebigera bire ase amato aye, biria asakorete.” (Abamidiani nigo babegete ebigera bie chitahabu, ekiagera n’Abaisumaeli barenge.)" 
Judges8:25 Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Twanchire gokobia.” Erio bakaara egetambaa inse, na ase egetambaa ekio kera oyomo akabeka ebigera biaye bi’amato ebisakorete." 
Judges8:26 Oborito bw’e bigera biria asabete aegwe nigo bwarenge koreng’ana chikiro emerongo ebere. Amo nebio akaira chisonoi, na ebigera, ne chianga chimonyinga, ebinto abaruoti b’Abamidiani barenge kobeka, amo ne chisonoi chiria chiarenge ase amagoti e chingamia chiabo." 
Judges8:27 Gidioni akaroisia egesibao ki’obokuani korwa ase chitahabu chiria, agakebeka ase omochie oye Ofura; na Abaisraeli bonsi bagatiga koba abegenwa ase Omonene, bagasasima egesibao keria. Kerokio gekaba kegotega Gidioni amo neamate yaye." 
Judges8:28 Nabo Abamidiani babuetwe n’Abaisraeli, na tibanyara koimoka gokora kende. Na bono ense eria ekaba nobotoereru ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, goika Gidioni agakwa." 
Judges8:29 Yerubi‐Baali, mosinto o Yoashi, akairana nka, akamenya ase enyomba yaye omonyene." 
Judges8:30 Gidioni oyio nigo abwate abana abamura emerongo etano na ebere, ekiagera nigo abwate abakungu abange." 
Judges8:31 Naboigo nabwate omokungu o sere‐sere, oyomenyete Sekemu; nere akamoiborera omwana omomura, na Gidioni akamoroka Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Gidioni, mosinto o Yoashi, agakwa ore nobogotu obuya, agatindekwa ase embeera ya Yoashi ise yarenge agwo Ofura, omochie bw’egesaku ki’Abieseri." 
Judges8:33 Nyuma y’ogokwa kwa Gidioni, Abaisraeli bagatiga koba abegenwa ase Omonene, na bagasasima chinyasae chiria Baali. Bagachora Baali‐Beriti ekaba enyasae yabo," 
Judges8:34 bakeba Omonene, Nyasae obo, oyobatooretie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa babo babaetanaine." 
Judges8:35 Tibakorerete abanto b’eamate ya Yerubi‐Baali (nere Gidioni) amaya, ase okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase amaya onsi akorerete Abaisraeli." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki, mosinto o Yerubi‐Baali, akagenda Sekemu, ase abang’ina rome, na ase abanto bonsi b’eamate ya ise ng’ina, akabatebia" 
Judges9:2 ng’a baborie abanto ba Sekemu, “Inki kere ekiya kobua, ng’a abana abamura emerongo etano na ebere ba Yerubi‐Baali babagambere, gose omonto oyomo bweka abagambere? Inyora boigo ng’a Abimeleki nigo are oyomino kegima bw’amanyinga ayamo.”" 
Judges9:3 Ase ayio aba ng’ina rome bagakwana amang’ana ayio ase abanto ba Sekemu ase ogokonya Abimeleki, na bonsi bakang’uswa bakaba ase ensemo yaye, naende bagateba ng’a ere nere orenge oyomwabo." 
Judges9:4 Abanto bakamoa chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etano na ebere korwa ase enyomba ya Baali‐Beriti, na ase chibesa echio akarikera abanto abatantanu batechigeti: nabarabwo bakamotunyana." 
Judges9:5 Nyuma y’ayio akagenda nyomba mwa ise agwo Ofura, na igoro ase rigena erimo agaitera abamura bamwabo aroro, abana ba Yerubi‐Baali, emerongo etano na ebere. Yotamu bweka, omomura omoke kegima o Yerubi‐Baali, nere otigarete ore moyo. Ere konya bwebisire." 
Judges9:6 Erio abanto bonsi ba Sekemu, na abwo ba Beti‐Milo, bagasangererekana amo agwo Sekemu ase omote oria onga buna omotontera ang’e nekeinyorio giatenenirieo, na agwo bakabeka Abimeleki akaba omoruoti." 
Judges9:7 Ekero Yotamu atebetigwe amang’ana ayio, akagenda, agatenena ase egetunwa kia Gerisimu igoro, agaaka eriogi rinene agateba, “Inwe abanto ba Sekemu, ntegerera, erinde Nyasae nere abategerere." 
Judges9:8 Agwo kare ekaba ng’a emete ekagenda gochora eruoti ekoyegambera. Egatebia omozeituni: Togambere! 
Judges9:9 Omozeituni oria okairaneria: Inee! Igo ngotiga amaguta aane ayakorenta ogosika ase chinyasae na ase mwanyabanto, erinde ngambere emete ende?" 
Judges9:10 Erio emete egatebia omoko: Inchuo aye otogambere! 
Judges9:11 Korende omoko oria okairaneria: Igo ngotiga obwansu bwane na amatunda aane amaya, erinde ngambere emete ende?" 
Judges9:12 Emete egatebia omosabibu: Inchuo aye otogambere! 
Judges9:13 Korende omosasibu okairaneria: Igo ngotiga okorua edivai yane, eria ekogokia chinyasae na mwanyabanto, erinde ngambere emete ende?" 
Judges9:14 Erio emete yonsi egatebia egetutu ki’amagwa: Inchuo aye otogambere! 
Judges9:15 Na egetutu ki’amagwa gekairaneria emete yonsi: Onye ekeene mwanchire gonchora imbe eruoti yaino, inchuo mokenderere inse y’ekiriri kiane, korende onye taibo, tiga omorero osoke korwa ase chinsagia chiane chi’amagwa, osambe emecharake ya Lebanoni." 
Judges9:16 “Na bono, Inee, nigo mwakorete ayare boronge na ay’obwegenwa ekero mwachorete Abimeleki akaba omoruoti oino? Naende mwakorerete Yerubi‐Baali na ab’enyomba yaye boronge na ayamogwenerete ase ogokora kwaye?" 
Judges9:17 Inyora ng’a nigo arwanete esegi ase engencho yaino. Igo ebegete ang’e ase ogokwa ase okobatooria korwa ase Abamidiani. 
Judges9:18 Rero inwe mwabeire mamincha y’enyomba ya tata, na mwaiteire abana baye abamura, abanto emerongo etano na ebere, ase rigena erimo igoro, naende mwabekire Abimeleki, omwana bw’omosomba oye omokungu, obeire omoruoti bw’abanto ba Sekemu, ekiagera are momura omino." 
Judges9:19 Onye rero mwakoreire Yerubi‐Baali amo nab’enyomba yaye ayare boronge na ay’obwegenwa, rirorio gokera Abimeleki, nere tiga abagokere." 
Judges9:20 Korende onye taibo, tiga omorero osoke korwa ase Abimeleki obasambe inwe abamomenyete Sekemu na Beti‐Milo, obasirie; naende tiga omorero osoke korwa asemore inwe abamomenyete Sekemu na Beti‐Milo, osambe Abimeleki, omosirie.”" 
Judges9:21 Erio Yotamu akaminyoka, agatama gochia Beeri, akamenya agwo, ekiagera airogete Abimeleki momura omwabo." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki akagambera Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka etato. 
Judges9:23 Erio Nyasae agatoma omoika omobe ase ogwatanana Abimeleki na abanto ba Sekemu, na abanto aba bagakorera Abimeleki obong’ainereria." 
Judges9:24 Aya nigo abete bo, erinde obotindi obwo bwakoreretwe abana abamura baria ba Yerubi‐Baali emerongo etano na ebere baakanerwe egesiomba. Ase igo okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga abo kogaakanerwa igoro y’Abimeleki, oyio obaitete, naende igoro y’abanto ba Sekemu, abwo bamobegete chinguru chi’ogokora ayio." 
Judges9:25 Abanto ba Sekemu bakabeka abanto ase ebitunwa igoro baboere abanto bonsi barenge goeta ase chinchera chiria na kobaura ebinto biabo. Abimeleki agatebigwa amang’ana ayio. 
Judges9:26 Gaali, mosinto bw’Ebedi, agacha Sekemu amo nabamura bamwabo, na abanto ba Sekemu bakamwegena na komosemeria." 
Judges9:27 Barabwo bonsi bakagenda ase emegondo y’emesabibu, bagatora amasabibu, bakayamita, bakaroisia edivai na gokora omoyega omonene. Bagasoa ase enyomba y’enyasae yabo, bakaria na bakanywa, erio bakaragereria Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Gaali, mosinto bw’Ebedi agateba, “Abimeleki nere ng’o? Naintwe, abanto ba Sekemu, mbanto ki tore? Nase ki togokorera Abimeleki? Ere mosinto o Yerubi‐Baali! Na Sebuli, nere omoteneneri bw’abanto baye! Nase ki rende togokorera Abimeleki? Taibo, tobe abegenwa ase abanto abarwete Hamori, sokoro y’abanto ba Sekemu!" 
Judges9:29 Onye abanto aba nkoba barenge ase oborendi bwane, nanga narusia Abimeleki. Nigo nare komotebia: Menta abarwani bao b’esegi, erio ochiche korwana!”" 
Judges9:30 Ekero Sebuli, omogambi bw’omochie oria, aigwete amang’ana a Gaali, mosinto bw’Ebedi, akaba nendamwamu enene." 
Judges9:31 Agatoma abanto gochia ase Abimeleki bobisi bamotebie, “Gaali, mosinto bw’Ebedi, amo nabamura bamwabo bachire Sekemu, goseegeta abanto b’omochie babe mamincha yao." 
Judges9:32 Ase ayio, aye amo nabanto bao more komo, genda botuko mwebise, moboe ase ebitii." 
Judges9:33 Ankio mambia, ekero erioba rigosoka, moimoke bwango, moumokere omochie. Erio ekero Gaali na abanto baria bare komo bakobachera kobarwania, mobakore buna moranyare ekero ekio!”" 
Judges9:34 Abimeleki amo nabanto bonsi barenge komo bakaimoka botuko, bakebisa, bakaboera Sekemu, bare ebiombe bine." 
Judges9:35 Gaali agasoka, agatenena ase egeita ki’omochie, na erio agwo Abimeleki amo nabanto baye bakaimoka korwa ase baboete." 
Judges9:36 Ekero Gaali aroche abanto, agatebia Sebuli, “Rigereria, abanto bagotirimboka korwa ebitunwa igoro.” Korende Sebuli agateba, “Ebio nebiriria bi’ebitunwa kwarorire bikororekana buna abanto.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaali agakwana naende, agateba, “Yaya, rigereria, abanto ngotirimboka bare korwa ase esagamu eria gati‐gati, na abanto b’ekeombe kende nigo bagocha ase enchera ekorwa ase omote oria onga buna omotontera, oria bw’abaringoria.”" 
Judges9:38 Erio Sebuli akamotebia, “Ng’ai are amang’ana ao ay’ogwetogia ekero gwatebete: Abimeleki nere ng’o? Nase ki tokomokorera? Aba tibari abanto abagwachayete? Soka bono obarwanie.”" 
Judges9:39 Gaali agatang’ana abanto ba Sekemu, nabarabwo bakagenda bakarwania Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleki agaseria Gaali, na ere agatama. Abange bagaitwa, bakarambereria inse goika ase egeita ki’omochie." 
Judges9:41 Abimeleki akairana Aruma, na Sebuli agaseria Gaali na abamura bamwabo, erio tibanyara kogenderera komenya Sekemu." 
Judges9:42 Rituko ria kabere abanto bagasoka ase egetii aarabu, na Abimeleki agatebigwa amang’ana ayio." 
Judges9:43 Ere akaimoka nabanto baye, akabaatanana ase ebiombe bitato, barabwo bakebisa na koboa ase egetii. Ekero aroche abanto bagosoka korwa ase omochie, agasoka korwa aase ebisete, akabaumokera na kobaita." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleki na abanto b’ekeombe kiaye bakaayerera gochia gotenena ase egeita ki’omochie, korende abanto b’ebiombe biria bibere binde bakarindokera na koumokera abanto bonsi abarenge ase egetii, bakabaita." 
Judges9:45 Na ekero Abimeleki arwanetie omochie rituko riria rigima, akayobwata na agaita abanto abamenyeteo. Erio akayoiyeria na koyoitororera omonyo." 
Judges9:46 Ekero abanto bonsi b’Omorobiri o Sekemu baigwete amang’ana ayio, bakebisa ime ase ekenunchi kiarenge obotamero obokong’u agwo ase hekalu y’Eli‐Beriti." 
Judges9:47 Abimeleki agatebigwa ng’a abanto bonsi b’Omorobiri o Sekemu nigo bagasangererekanete amo. 
Judges9:48 Erio agatiirera egetunwa gia Salimoni amo nabanto baye bonsi, akaimokia egesire, akagecha chinsagia chi’emete, agachibeka ase amareko aye. Naende agatebia abanto baye, “Aya morarore inche ngokora, nainwe mokore boigo, na moyakore bwango!”" 
Judges9:49 Ase igo, kera oyomo ase abanto baria akagecha chinsagia chiaye; erio bagatunyana Abimeleki, bakabeka emete eria ang’e ase obotamero boria obokong’u, na kobotongia omorero, bakabosiria amo nabanto bonsi b’omorobiri oria. Abwo bonsi, abanto koreng’ana elifu eyemo, abasacha na abakungu, bagakwa." 
Judges9:50 Nyuma y’ayio Abimeleki akagenda Tebesi, akayonaria na koyoira." 
Judges9:51 Korende omorobiri omokong’u norenge ase omochie oria ime, na abanto bonsi b’omochie, abasacha na abakungu, bagatama gochiao, bagesiekera imeo. Erio bakariina gochia kerama igoro." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki agacha koumokera omorobiri oyio, agaika ang’e negesieri kiaye ayosambe nomorero," 
Judges9:53 na omokungu oyomo akaruta ensio agosera, agaaka Abimeleki omotwe, agasenyenta ekeore kiaye." 
Judges9:54 Erio Abimeleki akarangeria omosae obogoretie ebirwanero biaye, akamotebia, “Somora omoyio oo o birende, ong’ite, abanto tibabaisa goteba ng’a: Nomokungu omoita.” Erio omosae oria akamobeta omoyio oye, akamoita." 
Judges9:55 Ekero Abaisraeli baroche ng’a Abimeleki okure, bakairana nka, kera oyomo goika bwoye." 
Judges9:56 Naboigo ekaba ng’a Nyasae oakanire egesiomba ase engencho y’ebibe biria Abimeleki akorerete ise ase ogoita abana baye, abamura bamwabo omonyene, emerongo etano na ebere." 
Judges9:57 Nyasae akagera abanto ba Sekemu bakanyora egesusuro ase engencho y’obonyaka babwo. Naboigo okoragereria kwa Yotamu, mosinto o Yerubi‐Baali, kogaikeranigwa igoro yabo." 
Judges10:1 Nyuma y’Abimeleki Tola, mosinto o Pua o Dodo, omonto bw’egesaku gia Isakaru, akaimoka gotooria Abaisraeli. Ere nigo amenyete Samiri, ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu." 
Judges10:2 Ere akagambera Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere, na etato. Erio agakwa, agatindekwa agwo Samiri." 
Judges10:3 Nyuma yaye Yairi Omogileadi akaimoka. Nere akagambera Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere, na ebere." 
Judges10:4 Ere nigo abwate abana abamura emerongo etato, baare koriina chitigere emerongo etato. Boigo bakaba bakogambera emechie emerongo etato agwo ase ense ya Gileadi. Emechie eyio nigo ekorokwa Hawoti‐Yairi (Emechie ya Yairi) nonya ngoika rero iga." 
Judges10:5 Yairi agakwa, agatindekwa agwo Kamoni." 
Judges10:6 Naende Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe ase obosio bw’Omonene; bagasasima chinyasae chiria chiare korokwa Baali, na echinde chiare korokwa Asitaroti, amo ne chinyasae chi’Abasiiria na Abasidoni, na Abamoabu, na Abaamoni, na Abafilisti; naende bagatiga komokorera Omonene." 
Judges10:7 Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene ase Abaisraeli, akababeka ase amaboko ’Abafilisti na ay’Abaamoni," 
Judges10:8 Ase omwaka oria barabwo bagachanda Abaisraeli na kobakorera bobe. Ase engaki y’emiaka ikomi, na etano na etato, bagachanda Abaisraeli bonsi abamenyete moocha y’orooche rwa Yorodan ase ense y’Abaamori ase Gileadi." 
Judges10:9 Amo nayio Abaamori bakaamboka Yorodan gochia korwania Abayuda, na Ababenjamin, na Abaefraimu, goika Abaisraeli bagachandwa bobe mono." 
Judges10:10 Erio Abaisraeli bakarera ase Omonene, bagoteba, “Twakorire ebibe asore, ekiagera twagotigire aye Nyasae oito, na gokorera chinyasae chiria Baali.”" 
Judges10:11 Omonene akabairaneria, “Inee! Tinabatooretie korwa ase Abamisiri, na Abaamori, na Abafilisti?" 
Judges10:12 Boigo Abasidoni, na Abaameleki, na Abaamoni, abwo bonsi mbabachandete; mokarera asende, na inche nkabatooria korwa ase amaboko abo." 
Judges10:13 Korende bono mwantigire inche na gokorera chinyasae ching’ao; ase ayio tintageti kobatooria naende. 
Judges10:14 Genda, morere ase chinyasae chiria mogokorera, tiga chirochio chibatoorie bono ekero more ase emechando.”" 
Judges10:15 Erio Abaisraeli bagatebia Omonene, “Twakorire ebibe, na bono tokorere buna oranche aye omonyene; twagosoroire, ototoorie rero, koranche.”" 
Judges10:16 Ase igo bakarusia na gotuguta chinyasae chingeni echiarenge ase egati yabo, bagakorera Omonene. Na bono Omonene tare konyara koremereria naende korora emechando y’Abaisraeli." 
Judges10:17 Abaamoni bakarangerigwa gocha korwana, bagatoora agwo Gileadi, korende Abaisraeli bagasangererigwa, bagatoora agwo Misipa." 
Judges10:18 Abanto ba Gileadi na abatang’ani babo bagakwana barabwo ase barabwo, “Ning’o oranche gochaka korwania Abaamoni? Ere oyio nabe omogambi bw’abanto bonsi ba Gileadi.”" 
Judges11:1 Yefta Omogileadi nigo arenge omorwani etuoni. Ere nigo arenge omwana bw’omokungu omotayayi, na ise Yefta nigo arenge korokwa Gileadi." 
Judges11:2 Omokungu omonyuome o Gileadi nere boigo akamoiborera abana abamura, na ekero barabwo babete abanto abanene bagaseria Yefta korwa inka, bakamotebia, “Aye tokonyara konyora omwando ase enyomba ya tata, ekiagera nigo ore omwana bw’omokungu omoao.”" 
Judges11:3 Erio Yefta agatama korwa ase bamura bamwabo, akagenda ase ense ya Tobu. Agwo agasang’ana nabanto batechigeti, nabarabwo bakana‐gotaara nere." 
Judges11:4 Engaki egaika, ekero Abaamoni bachagete korwania Abaisraeli." 
Judges11:5 Ekero keria abagaaka ba Gileadi bakagenda korangeria Yefta korwa ase ense ya Tobu," 
Judges11:6 bakamotebia, “Inchuo obe omotang’ani oito, erinde tonyare korwania Abaamoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Korende Yefta akabairaneria, “Inwe mwanyangete na moganseria korwa ase enyomba ya tata. Nase ki mwachire asende bono, ekero mwanyorire emechando?”" 
Judges11:8 Abagaaka baria ba Gileadi bakamoiraneria, “Ayio naro agerire twakoiraneire bono: Ntorigetie aye ogende amo naintwe, otokonye korwania Abaamoni, na obe omotang’ani oito, na oyo bw’abanto bonsi ba Gileadi.”" 
Judges11:9 Yefta agatebia abagaaka baria, “Onye mokong’irania inka naende ngende korwania Abaamoni, na Omonene karabeke abanto abwo ase amaboko aane, inche nimbe omotang’ani oino.”" 
Judges11:10 Abagaaka ba Gileadi bakamoiraneria, “Ntokore buna gwatebire. Omonene nabe kirori ase egati yaito.”" 
Judges11:11 Ase igo Yefta akagenda amo nabagaaka ba Gileadi, na abanto babo bakamobeka akaba omogambi na omotang’ani obo. Yefta agakwana amang’ana aye onsi ase obosio bw’Omonene agwo Misipa." 
Judges11:12 Erio Yefta agatoma abanto ase omoruoti bw’Abaamoni komoboria, “Ndiomana ki obwate asende? Nase ki gwachire korwania ense yane?”" 
Judges11:13 Omoruoti bw’Abaamoni akairaneria abanto abwo batometwe na Yefta, “Ekero Abaisraeli barwete Misiri mbairete ense yane korwa orooche rw’Arinoni goika orwa Yaboki, na goika Yorodan. Ase ayio bono yeiranie nomorembe.”" 
Judges11:14 Naende Yefta agatoma abanto eria kabere ase omoruoti bw’Abaamoni," 
Judges11:15 bamotebie “Oko nokoiraneria kwa Yefta: Abaisraeli tibairete ense y’Abamoabu, gose ey’Abaamoni," 
Judges11:16 korende ekero barwete Misiri nigo baetete ase egati y’erooro gochia Enyancha Embariri, bagaika Kadeshi." 
Judges11:17 Korwa agwo bagatoma abanto gochia ase omoruoti bw’Edomu bamoborie ribaga baetere ense yaye. Korende omoruoti bw’Edomu tanchete gotegerera amang’ana ayio. Naende bagatoma abanto ase omoruoti o Moabu, nere boigo tabaete ribaga. Ase ayio Abaisraeli bagatigara agwo Kadeshi." 
Judges11:18 Erio bagaeta ase egati y’erooro, bagaetanana ense y’Edomu na ense ya Moabu, bagaika moocha y’ense ya Moabu, goika ng’umbu y’orooche rw’Arinoni. Bagatoora agwo, korende tibaambogete Arinoni, ekiagera oro norobebe rwa Moabu." 
Judges11:19 Erio Abaisraeli bagatoma abanto gochia ase Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, agwo Hesiboni bamoborie ribaga baete ase ense yaye, bagende ase ense yabo abanyene." 
Judges11:20 Korende Sihoni tabegenete Abaisraeli, na tabaete ribaga baete ase ense yaye. Agasangereria abarwani baye, na barabwo bagatoora agwo Yahasi, bakarwania Abaisraeli." 
Judges11:21 Korende Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, akabeka Sihoni amo nabanto baye ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli, nabarabwo bakababua. Abaiisraeli bakaira ense yonsi y’Abaamori baria bamenyete ase ense eria." 
Judges11:22 Bakaira ense yonsi y’Abaamori ekaba eyabo, korwa Arinoni goika Yaboki, na korwa erooro goika Yorodan." 
Judges11:23 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nere oseretie Abaamori ase engencho y’abanto baye Abaisraeli. Inee! Aye bono nigo oganetie koira ense yabo?" 
Judges11:24 Aye togotwara egento Kemosi, enyasae yao, yakoeire, kebe ekiao? Naboigo naintwe natoire ense y’abanto baria Omonene Nyasae aseretie korwa ase amasio aito." 
Judges11:25 Bono aye nigo okorengereria ng’a nomuya ore kobua Balaki, mosinto o Sipori, omoruoti bw’Abamoabu? Inee! Ere nomanete n’Abaisraeli nonya ng’ake? Gose narwanete esegi nabarabwo?" 
Judges11:26 Ase engaki y’emiaka amagana atato Abaisraeli nigo bamenyete Hesiboni na Aroeri, amo nebichie bionsi biaetanaine emechie eyio, na emechie yonsi yare ase chingegu chi’Arinoni. Nase ki motairete chinse echio ase engaki eyio yonsi?" 
Judges11:27 Inche ase ayio tindakora ebibe asore; aye nigo ogokora bobe asende ase ogokora esegi nainche. Omonene nere omogayani. Ere nanache ekina rero ase egati y’Abaisraeli na Abaamoni.” 
Judges11:28 Korende omoruoti bw’Abaamoni taigwerete gose gosika amang’ana aya Yefta amotomerete. 
Judges11:29 Erio omoika o Nyasae ogacha igoro ya Yefta, na ere agaeta ase egati y’ense ya Gileadi na eya Manase, akagenderera goeta Misipa ase Gileadi, na korwa aroro akagenda, agaika ense y’Abaamoni." 
Judges11:30 Yefta akamoriera Omonene eira na gotiana, akabora, “Aye korabeke Abaamoni ase amaboko aane," 
Judges11:31 erio nebe ng’a onde bwensi orasoke korwa ase egesieri ki’enyomba yane abe omotang’ani kondotota ekero ndairane korwa ase Abaamoni inde nobobui, oyio nabe oyoo, Omonene, na inche nimorue abe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa asore.”" 
Judges11:32 Yefta akaamboka gochia ng’umbu, akagenda korwania Abaamoni, na Omonene akababeka ase amaboko aye." 
Judges11:33 Ere akabaita korwa Aroeri goika chinsemo chia Miniti, akaira emechie emerongo ebere goikera Abeli‐Keramimu, akabaita ogoita okonene. Abaamoni bakabugwa, bakabekwa inse y’obogambi bw’Abaisraeli." 
Judges11:34 Yefta akairana gochia inka bwoye aaria Misipa, na agwo akarora omoiseke oye ogocha komorotota, okobugia ekebangarara na gotenga. Omoiseke oria, nere bweka Yefta abwate, tabwate mwana onde, omomura gose omoiseke." 
Judges11:35 Ekero Yefta aroche omoiseke oria, agatandora chianga chiaye, akarera, “Obee! Omoiseke one! Kwagerire enkoro yane yairianyekire. Naende kwandeteire emechando emenene. Inche narierete Omonene eira, ngatiana, na tinkonyara gotiga eira eria nariete.”" 
Judges11:36 Omoiseke oria akamotebia, “Tata, onye kwarierete Omonene eira, inkorere aya gwakwanete, ekiagera Omonene okoruseirie egesiomba ase ababisa bao Abaamoni.”" 
Judges11:37 Naende omoiseke oria akamotebia, “Inkorere egento ekemo gioka! Ing’a ribaga ri’emetienyi ebere, erinde ngende amo nabasani baane ase ebitunwa, na aroro toetanane na korera, ekiagera ningenderere koba omwekungi.”" 
Judges11:38 Ise akamotebia, “Genda!” Akamotoma agende ase engaki y’emetienyi ebere. Igo omoiseke oria akagenda amo nabasani baye gochia ase ebitunwa, na aroro agwo bakareera obwekungi bwaye." 
Judges11:39 Ekero emetienyi ebere yaerete, omoiseke oria akairana ase ise, nere ise akamokora buna arierete Omonene eira ng’a akore. Omoiseke oria tabete nomosacha. Nyuma y’ayio okaba omogiro ase Abaisraeli," 
Judges11:40 ng’a abakungu b’Abaisraeli nigo barenge kogenda kobokia amagombo ase okoinyora omoiseke o Yefta, oria Omogileadi, ase engaki y’amatuko ane ase kera omwaka." 
Judges12:1 Abanto b’Efraimu bagasangererekana amo, bakaamboka gochia Safoni, bagakwana na Yefta, bakamotebia, “Nase ki kwagendete korwania Abaamoni, ko tigwatorangeria togende komo? Bono ntorigetie gosamba enyomba yao, naye boigo togosamberao.”" 
Judges12:2 Yefta akabairaneria, “Inche na abanto baane nigo twabwate eriomana ri’obobisa obonene n’Abaamoni. Inche nabarangeretie, korende timwanchete gontooria korwa ase amaboko abo." 
Judges12:3 Na ekero naroche ng’a timwanchete gontooria tinaraarete obogima bwane, nkaamboka, nkagenda korwania Abaamoni, na Omonene akababeka ase amaboko aane. Nase ki mwachire gokora esegi nainche?”" 
Judges12:4 Erio Yefta agasangereria abanto bonsi ba Gileadi, bakarwania Abaefraimu, bakababua. Abaefraimu konya batebire, “Inwe Abagileadi, nigo morwete ase Abaefraimu na ase Abamanase, nigo mwatamete korwa ase Abaefraimu.”" 
Judges12:5 Abanto ba Gileadi bakabwata ebiambokero bia Yorodan, bagatanga abanto b’Efraimu. Na ekero Omoefraimu onde bwensi oyorenge gotama are gosaba ribaga kwamboka, abanto ba Gileadi nigo baare komoboria, “Aye n’Omoefraimu ore?” Onye omonto oria orenge gokana oteba, “Yaya”," 
Judges12:6 nigo baare komoboria atebe “Shibolet”. Onye orenge goteba “Sibolet”, ekiagera tarenge konyara gwatora ring’ana riria boronge, nigo barenge komobwata, bamoitera agwo ase ebiambokero bia Yorodan. Ase engaki eria Abaefraimu chilifu emerongo ene bagaitwa." 
Judges12:7 Yefta akagambera Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka etano nomo. Erio Yefta, Omogileadi, agakwa, agatindekwa ase omochie oye agwo Gileadi." 
Judges12:8 Nyuma ya Yefta, Ibasani o Bethlehemu akagambera Abaisraeli." 
Judges12:9 Ere nigo abwate abana abamura emerongo etato, na abaiseke emerongo etato. Agasokia abana baye abaiseke ase abaamate abaao, naende akarenta abaiseke ba isiko emerongo etato, abana baye abamura bakabanyuoma. Ibasani akagambera Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka etano na ebere." 
Judges12:10 Erio Ibasani agakwa, agatindekwa agwo Bethlehemu." 
Judges12:11 Nyuma ya Ibasani, Eloni, omwa Sabuloni, akagambera Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka ikomi." 
Judges12:12 Erio agakwa, agatindekwa agwo Ayaloni, ase orogongo rwa Sabuloni." 
Judges12:13 Nyuma y’Eloni, Abidoni, mosinto o Hileli, Omopiratori, akagambera Abaisraeli." 
Judges12:14 Ere nigo abwate abana abamura emerongo ene, na abana abamura abachokoro emerongo etato. Barabwo nigo baare koriina chitigere emerongo etano na ebere. Abidoni akagambera Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka etano na etato." 
Judges12:15 Erio Abidoni, mosinto o Hileli, Omopiratoni, agakwa, agatindekwa agwo Piratoni, ase ense y’Efraimu, ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Abaameleki." 
Judges13:1 Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe naende ase obosio bw’Omonene; ere akabatiga, akababeka ase amaboko ’Abafilisti ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene." 
Judges13:2 Ase engaki eria narengeo omonto ore korokwa Manoa. Nigo arenge korwa omochie ore korokwa Sora, omonto bw’egesaku kia Dani. Omokungu oye nigo arenge omogomba, taiborete bana." 
Judges13:3 Omomalaika bw’Omonene akamoorokera, akamotebia, “Aye nigo ore omogomba, tobwati bana, korende nobe morito, erio oibore omwana omomura." 
Judges13:4 Ase ayio, bwerite, tobaisa konywa edivai, gose ebinyugwa ebigotindia, na tobaisa koria endagera ende yonsi ere etachenegeti," 
Judges13:5 ekiagera aye nobe morito, na oibore omwana omomura. Onde tabaisa kogingira etukia y’omotwe oye, ekiagera omwana oria omomura naatananwe ase Nyasae, abe Omwerwa oye korwa ase enda ya ng’ina. Ere nachake gotooria Abaisraeli korwa ase amaboko ’Abafilisti.”" 
Judges13:6 Erio omokungu oria akagenda agatebia omosacha oye, “Omonto o Nyasae nachicha asende: nigo arenge kororekana buna omomalaika o Nyasae, nigo arenge bw’okoondokia mono. Tinamoboretie ase are korwa, nere tantebetie erieta riaye." 
Judges13:7 Korende nigo antebia ng’a nimbe morito na ing’ibore omwana omoisia, naende ng’a timbaisa konywa edivai, gose ebinyugwa bigotindia, na timbaisa koria endagera ende yonsi etachenegeti, ekiagera omwana oria naatananwe ase Nyasae abe Omwerwa oye korwa okoiborwa kwaye.”" 
Judges13:8 Erio Manoa agasaba Omonene, agateba, “Omonene, nagosabire, tiga omonto oria o Nyasae gwatoma atochere naende, erinde atworokererie aya togwenerete gokora ase omwana oria omomura oraiborwe.”" 
Judges13:9 Nyasae akaigwa ogosaba kwa Manoa, na omomalaika o Nyasae agacha naende ase omokungu oria ekero aikaransete mogondo. Manoa, omosacha oye, tarenge amo nere." 
Judges13:10 Ase igo omokungu oria akaminyoka bwango akarangeria omosacha oye, akamotebia, “Rora, omonto oria ochicha asende rituko riria ong’orokeire naende.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa akaimoka, agatunyana mokaye. Erio agacha ase omonto oria, akamoboria, “Inee! Naye omonto oria okwana nomorugi one?” Omomalaika oria akamoiraneria, “Ee, ninche.”" 
Judges13:12 Manoa akamoboria, “Bono ekero amang’ana ao araikerane, naki obogima bw’omwana oria borabe? Meremo ki arakore?”" 
Judges13:13 Omomalaika bw’Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ayio onsi natebia omorugi oo, goika ayakore." 
Judges13:14 Tabaisa koria gento kende gionsi gekorwa ase omosabibu, gose tabaisa konywa edivai na ebinyugwa ebigotindia, gose taria endagera ende yonsi ere etachenegeti. Aya onsi namochika, goika ayarende.”" 
Judges13:15 Manoa agatebia omomalaika oria, “Koranche twagotangire, obeere aa, tokonyenyere emanwa y’embori, tokoyeroiserie orie.”" 
Judges13:16 Omomalaika oria bw’Omonene akamoiraneria, “Nonya gwantanga ng’a mbeere aiga, tinkoria endagera yao, korende koraroisie ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, okerue ase Omonene.” (Manoa tamanyete ng’a oria nigo arenge omomalaika bw’Omonene.)" 
Judges13:17 Manoa akabora, “Totebie buna okorokwa, erinde torue amasikani asore, ekero amang’ana ao araikerane!”" 
Judges13:18 Omomalaika oria akamoboria, “Nase ki otagete komanya erieta riane? Erieta riane neri’ogokumia.”" 
Judges13:19 Erio Manoa akaimokia emanwa y’embori amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera, akabibeka ase egetare, akabirua ase Omonene, oyokorete ogokumia ekero Manoa na mokaye barigereretie." 
Judges13:20 Ekero omorero orenge gwoka gochia igoro korwa ase egesasimero, Omomalaika bw’Omonene agatiirera ime y’omorero oria, na ekero Manoa na mokaye baroche ayio, bagatung’ama inse bakaumama." 
Judges13:21 Korwa ekero keria omomalaika oria taoroka ase Manoa naende, gose ase omorugi oye, Erio Manoa akamanya ng’a oria nigo arenge omomalaika bw’Omonene." 
Judges13:22 Manoa agatebia mokaye, “Amaene goika tokwe, ekiagera twarorire Nyasae.”" 
Judges13:23 Korende mokaye akamoiraneria, “Onye Omonene nigo aganetie gotoita, nanga tare gwancha ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa na okoruegwa kw’endagera korwa ase amaboko aito, gose gotworokia aya onsi atworokia, gose gototebia amang’ana aya twaigure.”" 
Judges13:24 Nyuma y’ayio omokungu oria akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Samison. Omwana oyio agakina, na Omonene akamosesenia." 
Judges13:25 Omoika bw’Omonene ogachaka gokora emeremo ime yaye ekero arenge ase egetwori kia Dani, agwo gati ya Sora na Esitaoli." 
Judges14:1 Samison agatirimboka gochia Timuna, na aroro agwo akarora omoiseke oyomo bw’Abafilisti." 
Judges14:2 Erio akairana nka, akamotebia ise na ng’ina, “Narora omoiseke oyomo Omofilisti agwo Timuna bono monyorere oria, imonyuome abe mokane.”" 
Judges14:3 Korende ise na ng’ina bakamoboria, “Inee! Moiseke tari, nonya noyomo, ase abanto b’egesaku giaito, gose ase eamate yaito yonsi? Nase ki okogenda konyuoma omokungu korwa ase Abafilisti abwo batarogeti?” Korende Samison akairaneria ise, “Monyorere ere oyio, ekiagera ere ongweneire.”" 
Judges14:4 Abaibori baye tibamanyete ng’a omoroberio oyio igo orure ase Omonene. Ere nigo are korigia enchera yare kogera arwanie Abafilisti. Ase engaki eria Abafilisti nigo barenge kogambera Abaisraeli. 
Judges14:5 Erio Samison agatirimboka amo na ise na ng’ina gochia Timuna. Ekero baigete ase emegondo y’emesabibu agwo Timuna, endo ensae ekamochera ekoruma." 
Judges14:6 Omoika bw’Omonene ogacha igoro ya Samison, okamobeka chinguru goika agatandora endo eria buna nemanwa y’embori yarenge, nonya tarenge nekerwanero kende gionsi maboko aye. Korende tatebetie abaibori eki akorete." 
Judges14:7 Samison akagenda agakwana nomoiseke oria, nere akamogokia mono." 
Judges14:8 Nyuma y’engaki enke akairana gochia komwoyia, akagobera enchera ensemo gochia korora ribego ri’endo eria, akanyora omwereri bwe chinchoke chibwate obooke ime ye ribego riria." 
Judges14:9 Akarusia obooke boria, akaboimokia, akaba okoboria ekero are kogenda. Akagenda ase ise na ng’ina akabaa obooke, nabarabwo bakaria. Korende Samison tabatebetie ng’a nigo aborusetie ase ribego ri’endo." 
Judges14:10 Ise Samison akagenda gochia korora omoiseke oria, na Samison agakora omoyega aroro aaria. Nabo yarenge engencho y’abamura gokora." 
Judges14:11 Ekero abanto bamoroche, bakarangeria abagisangio emerongo etato koba amo nere." 
Judges14:12 Samison akabatebia, “Tiga mbatebie omobayeno, na inwe montebie engencho yaye. Moise gontebia engencho yaye ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere ay’omoyega oyo, nigo ndabae chianga chi’egatani, ne chianga chinde chi’omoyega emerongo etato." 
Judges14:13 Korende onye timogontebia engencho yaye, erio inwe namong’e chianga chi’egatani emerongo etato, ne chianga chinde chi’omoyega emerongo etato.” Barabwo bakamotebia, “Kwana omobayeno oo, toyoigwe!”" 
Judges14:14 Samison akabatebia, “Korwa ase eyekoria, endagera y’okoria ekarwao, na korwa ase eyere ne chinguru, egento egiansu gekarwao.” Na ase amatuko atato tibanyara komotebia engencho y’omobayeno oria." 
Judges14:15 Ase rituko ria kane bagatebia moga Samison, “Ebereria omosacha oo atotebie engencho y’omobayeno oyo. Onye taibo, rirorio nigo tokogosamba nomorero, tosambe nenyomba ya iso boigo. Inee! Inwe nigo mwatorangeretie gocha aa, erinde motourererie ebinto biaito, tobe abataka?”" 
Judges14:16 Moga Samison akagenda asare, akarera akamotebia, “Aye nigo ongechete, tonyancheti, ogatebia abanto baminto omobayeno, korende tontebeti inche engencho y’omobayeno oria.” Samison akamotebia, “Rora, tindatebia tata, gose baba, engencho y’omobayeno oria, naki ndakore ngotebie aye?”" 
Judges14:17 Omokungu oria akana‐kogenderera korera asare ase amatuko aria atano na abere omoyega ogendererete. Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere Samison akamotebia engencho y’omobayeno oria, ekiagera omokungu oria amobetereretie bokong’u. Erio omokungu oria agatebia abanto baria ba sobo engencho yaye." 
Judges14:18 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere, ritang’ani erioba ritaragwa, abanto b’omochie oria bagatebia Samison, “Ninki kere egiansu kobua obooke? Ninki kere ne chinguru kobua endo?” Samison akabairaneria, “Onye motaremete ne ritororo riane, timware konyara komanya engencho y’omobayeno one.”" 
Judges14:19 Na omoika bw’Omonene ogacha igoro ya Samison, okamobeka chinguru, na ere agatirimboka gochia Asikeloni, agaita abasacha b’omochie emerongo etato, agasakora ebinto biabo, akaira ne chianga chiabo chi’omoyega, akaa abanto baria batebete engencho y’omobayeno oria. Nyuma y’ayio akairana gochia ase ise ore nekeririanda ekenene." 
Judges14:20 Erio moga Samison akaegwa omonto oria orenge omong’wansi o Samison, akaba mokaye." 
Judges15:1 Engaki enke ekaera, na ekero kie rigesa ri’engano kegaika, Samison akagenda gokwania mokaye, akamoirera emanwa y’embori buna ekeegwa, agateba, “Ninganetie gosoa nyomba mwa mokane.” Korende ise biara tamoa ribaga." 
Judges15:2 Ere agatebia Samison, “Nigo narengereretie ng’a nkwamogechete; ase ayio nkamoa omong’wansi oo, na ere akamonyuoma. Omoiseke omwabo omoke nare aa, ere nigo are omonyakieni kobua oria. Moire oyio ribaga ri’oria.”" 
Judges15:3 Korende Samison agateba, “Engaki eye tinkoba nokomocha igoro y’Abafilisti, ekero ndabakorere amabe.”" 
Judges15:4 Akagenda akabwata ebibwe amagana atato, akabisiberania bibere bibere ase ebimincha biabo, erio agasiberania ebieri bi’omorero ase egati y’ebimincha biria bibere." 
Judges15:5 Bono agatongia omorero ase ebieri biria, agatiga ebibwe bikominyoka ase emegondo y’Abafilisti, na birobio bigasamba engano yagesire ebekire amo, amo neye konya etarageswa, na emegondo y’emezeituni egasambwa boigo." 
Judges15:6 Ekero Abafilisti baboretie, “Ning’o okora aya?” Bagatebigwa ng’a Samison, oria onyuomete omoiseke bw’omonto o Timuna, nere okora ayio. Omonto oria o Timuna nigo aimogetie omokungu o Samison, akamoa omong’wansi oye, na ere akamonyuoma. Abafilisti bakagenda, bagasamba omokungu oria nomorero, bagasamba na ise; bonsi babere bagakwa." 
Judges15:7 Samison agatebia Abafilisti, “Onye mogokora amang’ana anga buna aya, natianire ng’a tingotimoka goika inyeruserie egesiomba igoro yaino.”" 
Judges15:8 Akabasanyorera, akabaaka bobe mono, agaita abange. Erio agatirimboka, akagenda komenya ase rikuruma ri’egetare gi’Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Erio Abafilisti bagatiira, bagatoora ase ense ya Yuda, bakaumokera omochie o Lei." 
Judges15:10 Abayuda bakababoria, “Nase ki mwachire gotorwania?” Barabwo bakairaneria, “Nigo twachire gosiba Samison, tomokorere ere buna atokorera intwe.”" 
Judges15:11 Abayuda chilifu isato bagatirimboka gochia ase rikuruma riria ri’egetare gi’Etamu, bakaboria Samison, “Aye tomanyeti ng’a Abafilisti nabwo bagotogambera? Ase ayio, ngento ki eke gwatokoreire?” Ere akabairaneria, “Eke bakorete asende, nakio nainche nabakoreire barabwo.”"
