Judges15:12 Barabwo bakamotebia, “Intwe nigo twachire kogosiba, erio tokobeke ase amaboko ’Abafilisti.” Samison akabatebia, “Tiana asende ng’a inwe abanyene timokong’ita.”" 
Judges15:13 Bakamotebia, “Ee bono, titokogoita, nigo toragosibe rioka, erio tokobeke ase amaboko ’Abafilisti.” Ase ayio bakamosiba ne chingori ibere chinyia, erio bakamorusia korwa ase egetare keria." 
Judges15:14 Ekero aigete Lei, Abafilisti bakaminyoka gochia asare, bagaaka eriogi bagokuura, na omoika bw’Omonene ogacha igoro asare, okamobeka chinguru, ne chingori echio asiberetwe amaboko chikaba buna chiusi chi’egatani chiabwatirwe nomorero, chigasansoka korwa ase amaboko aye." 
Judges15:15 Akanyora riuga ri’orosea rw’etigere, akariimokia na ase riuga riria agaitera abanto elifu eyemo." 
Judges15:16 Erio Samison agakwana, “Ase riuga ri’orosea rw’etigere naitire abanto elifu eyemo, ase riuga ri’orosea rw’etigere nababekire chitui.”" 
Judges15:17 Ekero akwanire amang’ana aya agatuguta riuga riria ri’orosea. Aase aria akarokwa Ramati Lei. 
Judges15:18 Samison akaba nerang’o y’amache enene mono, erio akarangeria Omonene, agateba, “Aye omonyene kwarua obobui goetera asende inche omosomba oo, na bono nigo ndakwe inde nerang’o, naende ngwe ase amaboko ’abanto batarogeti.”" 
Judges15:19 Nyasae akabochora engoro yarenge agwo Lei, na amache agasoka korwa agwo. Samison akanywa amache ayio, na akaigwa obeire buna omonto omoyia, akanyora chinguru. Eke nakio gekogera ensoko eria ya Lei ekarokwa Eni‐Hakore; nabo ekorokwa nonya ngoika rero iga." 
Judges15:20 Samison akaba omogambi bw’Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere, ekero Abafilisti baare kogambera ense eria." 
Judges16:1 Samison akagenda Gasa, na aroro akarora omokungu omotayayi, akagenda akarara nere." 
Judges16:2 Ekero abanto ba Gasa baigwete ng’a Samison nao are, bagaetanana aase aria, bakamoboera ase egeita ki’omochie obotuko obogima. Bagakira‐kiri obotuko bwonsi, bagateba, “Tiga toganye goika bokie mambia, erio tomoite.”" 
Judges16:3 Korende Samison akarara goika botuko gati, erio akaimoka, akabwata ebisieri bibere bi’egeita ki’omochie amo nemetobwa yaye ebere; erio akabisimora amo nebioma na ebisiekero, akabibeka ase amareko aye, akabiira igoro ase egetunwa keria kerochie Heburoni." 
Judges16:4 Naende nyuma y’ayio Samison akaba ogwancha omokungu ore korokwa Delila, omenyete ase ense omweya ya Soreki." 
Judges16:5 Abanto abatang’ani b’Abafilisti bakagenda ase omokungu oria, bakamotebia, “Gachie omoebererie Samison agotebie obobisi bwe chinguru chiaye, naende buna toranyare komobua; erio tonyare komosiba na komobeka inse asetore. Kera oyomo asetore nakoe chisekeli chie chifeta elifu eyemo ne rigana erimo.”" 
Judges16:6 Ase ayio Delila agatebia Samison, “Koranche, ontebie obobisi bwe chinguru chiao, naende ontebie buna omonto aranyare kogosiba akobue.”" 
Judges16:7 Samison akamoiraneria, “Kabaransibe ne chingori chi’emenyiki isano na ibere chinyia chitaroma, erio nainche nimbe omworo, na imbe buna monto onde bwensi.”" 
Judges16:8 Erio abatang’ani b’Abafilisti bakarentera omokungu oria chingori chi’emenyiki isano na ibere chinyia chitaroma, agasibera Samison nachirochio." 
Judges16:9 Omokungu oria nabisete abanto baganyete ase akanyomba ka ime. Erio akamorangeria, “Samison! Abafilisti aba bachire gokobwata!” Korende Samison akabutora chingori chiria buna eusi enyororo ekorurwa nomorero. Ase ayio, obobisi bwe chinguru chiaye tibwamanyekanete." 
Judges16:10 Delila agatebia Samison, “Rora, gwankoreire echeche, naende gwantebirie oborimo. Koranche ontebie buna oranyare gosibwa.”" 
Judges16:11 Samison akamotebia, “Kobaransibe ne chingori chinyia chitarakorerwa emeremo, erio nimbe omworo, na imbe buna monto onde bwensi.”" 
Judges16:12 Erio Delila akaimokia chingori chinyia, akamosibera. Naende akamorangeria, “Samison! Abafilisti aba bachire gokobwata!” Abanto nigo bebisete baganyete ase enyomba ende. Korende Samison akabutora chingori chiria korwa ase amaboko aye buna eusi enyororo." 
Judges16:13 Naende Delila agatebia Samison, “Goika bono gwankoreire echeche, na gontebia oborimo. Ntebie buna oranyare gosibwa.” Samison akamoiraneria, “Korasiberanie ebikundo biria bitano na bibere bi’etukia yane ase egetambaa keria okoroisia na kobisiba bokong’u nekegobanio, tibikorusigwao, erio nimbe omworo, na imbe buna monto onde bwensi.” Ekero Samison ararete, Delila akabwata ebikundo biria bitano na bibere bi’etukia yaye," 
Judges16:14 akabisiberania ase egetambaa are koroisia, akabisiba bokong’u nekegobanio. Naende akamorangeria, “Samison! Abafilisti aba bachire gokobwata!” Korende Samison akaboka, akang’usa etukia yaye korwa aase yasiberanetigwe na gokong’igwa." 
Judges16:15 Omokungu oria akamoboria, “Naki oranyare goteba ng’a nonyanchete, ekero enkoro yao etari amo nainche? Gwankoreire echeche chintunda isato na torantebia obobisi bwe chinguru chiao.”" 
Judges16:16 Na ekero omokungu oria arenge kona‐komoboraboria amang’ana ayio rituko ase rituko, Samison akarosa kegima, goika akerusia moyo." 
Judges16:17 Ase igo omoerio akamotebia obobisi bwaye bwonsi, akabora, “Onde tana gokigita etukia y’omotwe one, ekiagera inche nigo naatananetwe ase Nyasae buna Omwerwa oye korwa ase enda ya baba. Inse gokigitwa etukia y’omotwe one, chinguru chiane nigo chirarue asende, naende imbe omworo, na imbe buna monto onde bwensi.”" 
Judges16:18 Ekero Delila aroche ng’a Samison omotebirie obobisi bwaye bwonsi, agatoma abanto barangerie abatang’ani b’Abafilisti, babatebie, “Inchuo naende rimo, ekiagera ere ontebirie obobisi bwaye bwonsi.” Erio abatang’ani b’Abafilisti bagacha ase omokungu oria, bakarentana chibesa chiria." 
Judges16:19 Bono Delila akaareria Samison ase amagoro aye, akarangeria omonto ache agingire ebikundo biria bitano na bibere bi’etukia ya Samison. Erio Delila agachaka komotura, korende chinguru chia Samison konya chiarure asare." 
Judges16:20 Erio akarangeria, “Samison! Abafilisti aba bachire gokobwata!” Samison akaboka korwa ase chitoro chiaye, akarengereria ng’a “Bono ninyesibore buna botambe, ngende,” ekiagera tamanyete ng’a Omonene omotigire." 
Judges16:21 Abafilisti bakamobwata, bakamokonora amaiso, naende bakamoira gochia Gasa, bakamosiba ne chingataare chie chitaai. Bakamobeka gosia obosie agwo ase enyomba y’obosibwa." 
Judges16:22 Korende etukia yaye egachaka komera naende nyuma gakigitirwe. 
Judges16:23 Abatang’ani b’Afilisti bagasangererekana koruera Dagoni, enyasae yabo, ekeng’wanso ekenene, na gochenga, bagoteba, “Enyasae yaito yabekire omobisa oito Samison ase amaboko aito.”" 
Judges16:24 Na ekero abanto baroche Samison, bagatogia enyasae yabo, bagateba, “Enyasae yaito yabekire omobisa oito ase amaboko aito, omobisa oria osaririe ense yaito na oitire abanto baito abange.”" 
Judges16:25 Na ekero chinkoro chiabo chiabete nomochengo, bagateba, “Torentere Samison atokorere chigosori!” Ase ayio bakarenta Samison korwa enyomba y’obosibwa, ere akabakorera chigosori. Bakamobeka agatenena gati‐gati ye chisiiro." 
Judges16:26 Samison agatebia omosae oria omobwatete okoboko kwaye, “Ntige ntaba‐tabe, nkune chisiiro chisiirete enyomba, inyesiirere ase chirochio.”" 
Judges16:27 Enyomba nigo yaichire nabanto, abasacha na abakungu, na abatang’ani bonsi b’Abafilisti nao barenge, na igoro ase ekerama mbarengeo abanto koreng’ana chilifu isato, abasacha na abakungu na barabwo nigo basonchete buna Samison agokora chigosori." 
Judges16:28 Erio Samison akarangeria Omonene, akabora, “Omonene Nyasae, nagosabire, ong’inyore, ong’e chinguru ase engaki eye yoka. Aye Nyasae, erio inyeruserie egesiomba ase amaiso aane abere igoro y’Abafilisti!”" 
Judges16:29 Agwo Samison akaboania chisiiro chiria ibere chia gati‐gati, chiasiirete enyomba, agachibwata bokong’u, esiiro eyemo nokoboko okomo, na eyende nokoboko konde." 
Judges16:30 Erio agateba, “Tiga nkwe amo n’Abafilisti aba.” Naende agekumba ne chinguru chiaye chionsi, na enyomba eria ekagwera abatang’ani b’Abafilisti amo nabanto bande bonsi abarengeo. Abanto baria Samison aitete ekero akwete omonyene nigo barenge abange kobua baria bonsi abaitete ekero arenge moyo." 
Judges16:31 Abamura bamwabo amo nabanto bonsi b’eamate yaye bagatirimboka kwoyia omobere oye. Bakamoira, bakamotindeka ase egati ya Sora na Esitaoli, ase embeera ya Manoa ise. Samison konya ogambeire Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere." 
Judges17:1 Ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu narengeo omonto oyomo ore korokwa Mika. 
Judges17:2 Ere agatebia ng’ina, “Ekero omonto aibete chisekeli chie chifeta amagana ikomi na rimo naigure ng’a, nkwaragereretie omoibi bwe chifeta chiria. Rora aiga, ninche nchibwate. Ninche nachiirete.” Ngi’na akamotebia, “Omwana one, Nyasae agosesenie.”" 
Judges17:3 Omomura oria akairania chisekeli chiria chie chifeta amagana ikomi na rimo ase ng’ina. Ng’ina agateba, “Naatananire chifeta echi ase Omonene ase engencho y’omwana one. Chifeta echio nachibe echi’okoroisia omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa orabe obaachire na oomire ne chifeta. Ase ayio, omwana one, ningochiiranerie.”" 
Judges17:4 Korende ere akairaneria ng’ina chibesa chiria. Ngi’na akaimokia chifeta amagana abere, agachiirera omoturi bwe chifeta, na ere akaroisia omogwekano obaachire na oomire ne chifeta. Omogwekano oyio okabekwa ase enyomba ya Mika." 
Judges17:5 Omonto oyio Mika nabwate enyomba yaye aase arenge gosasimera ebinyasae biaye. Akaroisia egesibao ki’obokuani na emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, naende akabeka oyomo bw’abamura baye abe omokuani." 
Judges17:6 Ase amatuko aria omoruoti tarenge ase Abaisraeli; kera omonto nigo arenge gokora kende gionsi aroche kere ekeronge. 
Judges17:7 Bono narenge omomura omosae, Omolawi omenyete agwo Bethlehemu o Yuda buna omomenyi." 
Judges17:8 Omosae oria konya orure Bethlehemu ogendire korigia aase akomenya. Na ase orogendo rwaye agaika ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, ase enyomba ya Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika akamoboria, “Ng’ai okorwa?” Ere akairaneria, “Inche n’Omolawi o Bethlehemu o Yuda, naende nigo nkogenda korigia aase nkomenya.”" 
Judges17:10 Mika akamotebia, “Menya aa amo nainche, obe asende tata, na obe omokuani one, na inche nkoe chisekeli chie chifeta ikomi kera omwaka, naende nkoe chianga amo nendagera.”" 
Judges17:11 Omolawi oria agancha komenya amo nomonto oria, na ere akamokora buna oyomo bw’abana baye abamura." 
Judges17:12 Mika agaatanana omosae oria, nere akaba omokuani oye, akamenya ase enyomba ya Mika." 
Judges17:13 Mika agateba “Bono namanyire ng’a Omonene nankorere amaya, ekiagera mbwate Omolawi ore omokuani one.”" 
Judges18:1 Ase amatuko aria omoruoti tarenge ase Abaisraeli; na ase engaki eria abanto b’egesaku kia Dani nigo barenge kwerigeria orogongo ase baranyare komenya, ekiagera goika ase engaki eria konya tibaranyora omwando ase egati y’ebisaku binde bi’Abaisraeli." 
Judges18:2 Ase ayio abanto ba Dani bagachora korwa ase chiamate chiabo abarwani batano, korwa ase omochie o Sora, na obw’Esitaoli, bakabatoma bagende koroota ense, na koyerata. Ekero abanto baria chirooti baigete ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu bakagenda ase enyomba ya Mika, bakarara aroro." 
Judges18:3 Ekero barenge nyomba mwa Mika, bakaigwa na komanya eriogi ri’omosae oria Omolawi, bakamoira ensemo, bakamoboria, “Ning’o okorenta aiga? Ngento ki ogokora aa? Emeremo yao nereri?”" 
Judges18:4 Ere akabairaneria, “Aya naro Mika ankoreire: Nigo andigete, akong’a eng’eria, na inche nigo inde omokuani oye.”" 
Judges18:5 Abanto baria bakamotebia, “Koranche, oborie Nyasae, erinde tomanye orogendo oro rwaito twachakire gose noruya rorabe!”" 
Judges18:6 Omokuani oria akabairaneria, “Genda nomorembe! Orogendo rwaino nigo rore ase oborendi bw’Omonene.”" 
Judges18:7 Erio abanto baria batano bakarua aroro, bakagenda goika omochie o Laisi. Na agwo bakarora buna abanto bamenyete bare nobogima botari nobwoba, buna abanto ba Sidoni. Nigo barenge abanto abatoereru na ab’omorembe, bataremeiri gento korwa ase riroba. Nigo bamenyete are korwa ase Abasidoni, naende tibarenge gosanga nabanto bande." 
Judges18:8 Ekero abanto baria batano bairanete ase abamwabo agwo Sora na Esitaoli, barabwo bakababoria, “Mang’ana ki mwanyora?”" 
Judges18:9 Bakairaneria, “Imoka, togende korwania abanto baria, ekiagera ntwarora ense eria, ng’a nengiya mono. Inaki mogoikaransa aa bosa? Timobaisa gotebana kogenda aroro na koira ense eria." 
Judges18:10 Ekero moragende aroro nigo moranyore abanto tibebegeti ang’e korwana, na ense eria nengare. Ee, Nyasae obekire ense eria ase amaboko aino. Ense eria teremeiri gento kende gionsi gekorwa ase riroba.”" 
Judges18:11 Abanto amagana atano na rimo b’egesaku kia Dani, babogoretie ebirwanero, bakaimoka korwa Sora na Esitaoli, bagatiira," 
Judges18:12 bagatoora bosongo ya Kiriati‐Yearimu, ase ense ya Yuda. Ase engencho eyio aase aria akarokwa Egetwori kia Dani, naboigo akorokwa nonya ngoika rero iga." 
Judges18:13 Korwa aroro bakagenda gochia ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, bagaika ase enyomba ya Mika." 
Judges18:14 Erio abanto baria batano bagendete koroota ense yaetanaine Laisi, bakaboria abanto barenge komo, “Inee! Momanyete ng’a ase enyomba eyemo ase echio nkereo egesibao ki’obokuani? Naende ebinyasae bi’ogosasimwa mbireo, amo nomogwekano obaachire, na oyo onyititoire na kobombwa. Ase ayio rengereria aya mogochia gokora.”" 
Judges18:15 Barabwo bakagenda ase enyomba eria omosae oria Omolawi amenyete ase enka ya Mika, bakamoboria amang’ana aye buna agendererete." 
Judges18:16 Abanto baria amagana atano na rimo, Abadani, babogoretie ebirwanero bi’esegi, bebegete ang’e, bagatenena ase egeita." 
Judges18:17 Abanto baria batano, abarootete ense eria ritang’ani, bagasoa enyomba eria, bakaimokia omogwekano oria obaachire, na egesibao keria ki’obokuani, na ebinyasae biria, na omogwekano oria onyititoire na kobombwa, na omokuani oria agatenena ase egeita amo nabanto baria amagana atano na rimo babogoretie ebirwanero bi’esegi." 
Judges18:18 Ekero abanto baria batano basoete nyomba mwa Mika na korusia omogwekano oria obaachire, na egesibao keria ki’obokuani, na ebinyasae biria, na omogwekano oria onyititoire na kobombwa, omokuani oria akababoria, “Inki eke mogokora?”" 
Judges18:19 Barabwo bakamotebia, “Kirakiri! Tokwana nonya ne ring’ana erimo! Inchuo amo naintwe, obe asetore buna tata, obe omokuani oito! Inee! Inki kere buya kobua asore, koba omokuani ase enyomba y’omonto oyomo, gose ase egesaku ekegima ki’Abaisraeli?”" 
Judges18:20 Amang’ana aya akagokia omokuani oria mono; ere akaimoka akabogoria egesibao keria ki’obokuani, na ebinyasae biria, na omogwekano oria obaachire, akagenda amo nabanto baria." 
Judges18:21 Abadani bakeonchora, bagachaka kogenda, bagatang’ania abana, ne chitugo, amo ne chinibo chiabo." 
Judges18:22 Ekero bagendire egeka getari geke korwa ase enka ya Mika, bagaikeerwa nabagisangio ba Mika abarangeretigwe kobabwatia." 
Judges18:23 Abanto ba Mika bagaaka amariogi na gokuura. Abadani bakeonchora, bakaboria Mika, “Ninki gekogochanda goika ogotobwatia nomoganda ogokuura buna iga?”" 
Judges18:24 Mika akabairaneria, “Mwairire ebinyasae biane neroiseretie, na omokuani one mwamoirire. Ngento ki natigaire nakio? Naki rende moranyare komboria: Ninki gekogochanda?”" 
Judges18:25 Abadani bakamoiraneria “Tobaisa gokwana nonya ne ring’ana erimo naintwe. Abanto aba mbabaise koba nendamwamu na kogoita, aye amo nabanto bao bonsi mosire, mokwe.”" 
Judges18:26 Erio Abadani bakagenderera orogendo rwabo, na ekero Mika aroche ng’a abanto baria nigo barenge ne chinguru komobua, akeonchora akairana nka bwoye." 
Judges18:27 Ekero Abadani bairete ebinyasae biria Mika aroisetie, amo nomokuani oye, bakagenda koumokera abanto ba Laisi, abanto baria bamenyete ase obotoereru batare na bwoba bonde, bakabaita nemioro, na omochie obo bakayosamba nomorero." 
Judges18:28 Onde tachete kobatooria, ekiagera Laisi orenge aare korwa Sidoni, naende abanto ba Laisi tibarenge gosanga nabanto bande. Omochie oria nigo orenge ase rikura riare ang’e na Beti‐Rehobu. Abanto ba Dani bakaagacha omochie o Laisi naende, bakamenyao." 
Judges18:29 Bakaroka omochie oyio Dani, erieta ria Dani sokoro yabo, mosinto o Israeli." 
Judges18:30 Aroro Abadani bageteneneria omogwekano oria bw’ogosasimwa. Yonathani, mosinto o Gerisomu o Musa, nere orenge omokuani ase Abadani, na abana baye abamura bakaba abakuani babo goika engaki y’ogwoswa kwabo." 
Judges18:31 Barabwo bagatenenia omogwekano oria bw’ogosasimwa obaachire, oria Mika aroisetie, na omogwekano oria okabeera aroro ase engaki yonsi obomenyo bwa Nyasae bwatenenete agwo Silo." 
Judges19:1 Ase amatuko aria ekero omoruoti atarenge ase Abaisraeli, narengeo omonto gete Omolawi omenyete buna omomenyi rogoro kegima ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu. Ere agatwara omokungu o sere‐sere korwa Bethlehemu o Yuda." 
Judges19:2 Omokungu oyio tarenge omwegenwa ase omosacha oye, erio akamotiga, akairana gochia o ise, aaria Bethlehemu, akamenya aroro ase engaki y’emetienyi ene." 
Judges19:3 Omosacha oria akaimoka ore nomosomba oyomo ne chitigere ibere, akagenda kogamba nere ase obwororo, agateema komoebereria airane nere. Omokungu oria akamosoyia nyomba mwa ise, na ise akamoroisia ase omogoko." 
Judges19:4 Ise biara akamoboria abeere aroro; erio akaba amo nere amatuko atato, bakaria na konywa, bakarara aroro." 
Judges19:5 Rituko ria kane bakaboka mambia chuni, na Omolawi oria akebeka ang’e kogenda, korende ise omosubati oria akamotebia, “Kararia endagera onyore chinguru, erio mogende.”" 
Judges19:6 Abanto baria babere bagaikaransa aroro, bakaria na konywa amo. Erio ise omosubati oria agatebia omonto oria, “Koranche, orare aiga naende ase obotuko bwa rero, oigwe buya.”" 
Judges19:7 Ekero omonto oria aimogete naende ng’a agende, ise omosubati oria akamosorora arare agwo naende." 
Judges19:8 Rituko ria gatano, mambia chuni, akaimoka agachaka kogenda. Korende ise omosubati oria akamotebia, “Karie endagera onyore chinguru. Ganya goika omobaso orakenda.” Ase ayio bakaragera amo bonsi babere." 
Judges19:9 Ekero omonto oria amo nomokungu oye o sere‐sere, na omosomba oye, baimogete kogenda, ise omosubati oria akamotebia, “Rora bono omobaso oerire, na bwaisire koiira, nagosoroire, beera aiga ase obotuko bwa rero naende, oigwe buya. Ankio oimoke mambia chuni, ochake orogendo, ogende seino.”" 
Judges19:10 Korende omonto oria tancha korara aroro ase obotuko boria. Ase igo akaimoka amo nomokungu oye o sere‐sere, bagachaka orogendo rwabo gochia Yebusi, (noro Yerusalemu), babwate chitigere chiabekire ebiikaransero." 
Judges19:11 Bagaika ensemo erochie Yebusi, na konya bwairire, omosomba agatebia omonene oye, “Inchuo, togobere gochia ase omochie oyo bw’Abayebusi, erio torare aroro ase obotuko obo.”" 
Judges19:12 Omonene bw’omosomba oria akabora, “Titokogobera kogenda korara ase omochie bw’abanto batari Abaisraeli, korende tobaetanie togende Gibea.”" 
Judges19:13 Naende agatebia omosomba oye, “Eta togende, torore gose ntoike Gibea gose Rama, erio torare aroro ase obotuko obo.”" 
Judges19:14 Bakagenderera orogendo rwabo, na ekero baikire ang’e na Gibea, omochie bw’Ababenjamin, konya bwairiire kegima." 
Judges19:15 Bakagobera gochia Gibea, barare aroro ase obotuko boria. Kobasoire aroro, bagaikaransa eraaro isiko, ase omochie oria, korende onde tarenge bwanchete kobasoyia nyomba mwaye ase obotuko obwo." 
Judges19:16 Ekero baikaranseteo, omogaaka oyomo agacha, orenge korwa mogondo. Ere nigo arenge omonto bw’ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, na bono nigo arenge omomenyi bw’omochie o Gibea. (Abanto b’aase aria nigo barenge Ababenjamin)." 
Judges19:17 Omogaaka oria akarora omogendi oria ase eraaro eria, akamoboria, “Ng’ai okorwa? Naende ng’ai okogenda?”" 
Judges19:18 Omogendi oria akamoiraneria, “Igo tokorwa Bethlehemu o Yuda, tokogenda rogoro kegima ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, nao seito. Igo nagenda Bethlehemu o Yuda, na bono nkogenda inde ase enyomba ya Nyasae. Onde tari bwanchire gonsoyia nyomba mwaye." 
Judges19:19 Obonyansi obwomo na endagera ende ye chitigere ntobwate. Naboigo ntobwate omogati na edivai bitoisaine inche na omokungu oyo, omosomba oo, na omosae oyo ore amo naintwe, abasomba bao. Titoremeiri gento kende gionsi.”" 
Judges19:20 Omogaaka oria akamotebia, “Kabe nomorembe! Tiga inche ngokonye ase kende gionsi oremeire. Tokonyara korara isiko aa ase eraaro botuko.”" 
Judges19:21 Erio akabasoyia nyomba mwaye, akaa chitigere endagera. Na ekero besibirie amagoro abo, bakaria na konywa." 
Judges19:22 Ekero barenge kwegokia igo, abanto bande abanyaka b’omochie oria bagacha mobosokano, bagaetanana enyomba na goaka egesieri, bagatebia omogaaka oria, “Mosokie omonto oria ocha mwao, erinde torare nere tomosarie.”" 
Judges19:23 Omonto oria, omonyene enyomba, agasoka, akabatebia, “Taibo, abaminto, timobaisa gokora obokayayu buna obwo. Omonto oyio nomogeni one. Timobaisa komokorera obonyaka buna obwo." 
Judges19:24 Rora, nimbwate omoiseke one omwekungi, na omonto oyo nabwate omokungu oye o sere‐sere, tiga mbasokie asemore bono. Mobakorere obonyaka buna moganetie, korende timobaisa gokorera omonto oyo egento buna ekio gi’okogechia.”" 
Judges19:25 Korende abanto baria tibamoigwera. Erio Omolawi oria akabwata omokungu oye o sere‐sere, akamoira isiko asebare. Barabwo bagakora obonyaka nere bakamokorera bobe ase obotuko obogima goika mambia; na ekero bwachia gokiamoka bakamotiga agende." 
Judges19:26 Ekero bwachia koba mambia, omokungu oria agacha, akagwa inse ase egesieri ki’enyomba y’omonto oria omosacha oye arenge, akarara aroro goika ense egakiamoka na koraba." 
Judges19:27 Omosacha oye akaimoka mambia, akaigora ebisieri, na ekero are gosoka agenderere orogendo rwaye, akanyora omokungu oye o sere‐sere oraire obwatete omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri ki’enyomba." 
Judges19:28 Omonto oria akamotebia, “Imoka, tochake orogendo!” Korende omokungu oria tamoiraneria. Erio akamoimokia, akamobeka ase etigere igoro, agachaka orogendo rwaye gochia inka bwoye." 
Judges19:29 Na ekero aigete inka bwoye, akaimokia omoyio, akabwata omokungu oye o sere‐sere, akamonachana ekiimo ase ekiimo goika ebing’ese ikomi na bibere. Erio agatoma abanto, nabarabwo bakabiira chinsemo chionsi ase ense y’Abaisraeli." 
Judges19:30 Abanto bonsi abaroche amang’ana ayio nigo bakwanete, “Amang’ana anga buna ayio tana gokorekana, gose kororekana, korwa rituko riria Abaisraeli baruete ense ya Misiri goika rero! Rengereria amang’ana aya! Mogambe inki moranyare gokora!”" 
Judges20:1 Abaisraeli bonsi korwa Dani goika Beeri‐Seba, amo nab’ense ya Gileadi bakarua chinka chiabo, bagasangererekana amo, bakabwatana, bakaba buna omonto oyomo ase obosio bw’Omonene agwo Misipa." 
Judges20:2 Abatang’ani b’abanto bonsi b’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli bagacha ase omosangererekano oria bw’abanto ba Nyasae. Abwo barenge gotaara namagoro babogoretie emioro, nigo barenge chilifu amagana ane." 
Judges20:3 Bono abanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin bakaigwa ng’a Abaisraeli batiirire gochia Misipa. Abaisraeli bakabora, “Totebie, naki obonyaka obo bwakorete bokaba!”" 
Judges20:4 Omolawi oria, omosacha bw’omokungu oria oitetwe moeneno, akairaneria, agateba, “Nigo nachete Gibea, omochie, bw’Ababenjamin, inche na omokungu one o sere‐sere, erinde torare aroro agwo ase obotuko." 
Judges20:5 Abanto ba Gibea bagacha kondwania, bagaetanana enyomba ase narenge botuko, bakagania bang’ite; nabarabwo bagakorera omokungu one o sere‐sere obonyaka goika agakwa." 
Judges20:6 Inche nkabogoria omokungu one o sere‐sere, nkanachana omobere oye ebing’ese, ngatoma abanto, nabarabwo bakaira ebing’ese biria ase ense yonsi y’omwando bw’Abaisraeli, ekiagera Abagibea bakorete ebibe bi’obonyaka ase egati y’Abaisraeli." 
Judges20:7 Inwe Abaisraeli mwensi, karue amang’ana aino ay’ogosemia igoro ase aya akorekanire!”" 
Judges20:8 Abanto bakaimoka, bakabwatana buna omonto oyomo, bagakwana, “Onde tarua asetore agende mwaye, ase eema yaye gose nyomba mwaye." 
Judges20:9 Korende aya naro amang’ana torakorere Gibea. Igo togoaka obomera, torore gose mbarabi bagochia koyorwania." 
Judges20:10 Torusie abanto ikomi korwa ase abanto rigana erimo, na abanto rigana erimo korwa ase abanto elifu eyemo, na abanto elifu eyemo korwa ase abanto chilifu ikomi, korwa ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli. Abanto aba nabasangererie chindagera korwa ase abanto, erinde babarentere baria bagochia korwania Gibea o Benjamin, ekiagera barabwo bakorire ogosaria kw’obosooku ase egati y’Abaisraeli.”" 
Judges20:11 Ase igo Abaisraeli bonsi bagasangererekana, bakabwatana amo buna omonto oyomo, bakarwania omochie oria." 
Judges20:12 Abanto b’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli bagatoma abanto gochia ase chiamate chionsi chia Benjamin, bakabora, “Nobokayayu bore naki, obo bwakorekanire ase egati yaino?" 
Judges20:13 Bono barente abanto baria abanyaka ba Gibea, erinde tobaite, torusie obobe obo borue ase Abaisraeli.” Ababenjamin tibaigwerete Abaisraeli bamwabo," 
Judges20:14 korende bakarua emechie yabo, bagacha agwo Gibea, erinde barwanie Abaisraeli." 
Judges20:15 Ababenjamin abwo baroberetigwe korwa ase emechie yabo ase rituko riria nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na isano nemo, abamanyete korwanera emioro. Amo nabwo mbarengeo abanto amagana atano na abere, abachoretwe korwa ase omochie o Gibea." 
Judges20:16 Ase egati y’abanto aba nigo barenge abanto bachoretwe amagana atano na abere, barenge abanyakebee. Kera omonto obo nigo amanyete koruta rigena nenduruche, erio orenga agatukia akamo, ogaaka, tarenge gokamocha." 
Judges20:17 Abaisraeli batasang’anaine n’Ababenjamin, bakaroberia abanto chilifu amagana ane babogoretie emioro; abanto aba nigo bamanyete korwana esegi." 
Judges20:18 Abaisraeli bakaimoka, bakagenda Beteli koboria ogosemia korwa ase Nyasae, bakaboria, “Mbarabi asetore barabe abe ritang’ani gochia korwania Ababenjamin?” Omonene akairaneria, “Abayuda nababe abe ritang’ani”." 
Judges20:19 Erio Abaisraeli bakaimoka bonsi mambia chuni, bagatoora ang’e nomochie o Gibea," 
Judges20:20 na abanto babo bagasoka, bakagenda korwania Ababenjamin. Bakaroberia abarwani korwana esegi ase omochie o Gibea," 
Judges20:21 korende Ababenjamin bagasoka korwa Gibea, bagaita Abaisraeli chilifu fu emerongo ebere na ibere, ase rituko erio." 
Judges20:22 Ase igo Abaisraeli, bakeremia naende, bakaroberia abarwani barwanie aase aria ase beroberetie rituko rie ritang’ani." 
Judges20:23 Erio Abaisraeli bagatiira gochia Beteli, bakaba bakorera ase obosio bw’Omonene goika mogoroba, bakamoboria, “Natonyare naende kogenda korwana n’Ababenjamin abanto baminto?” Omonene akairaneria, “Genda, mobarwanie!”" 
Judges20:24 Ase igo Abaisraeli bakagenda korwana n’Ababenjamin rituko ria kabere. 
Judges20:25 Ase rituko erio Ababenjamin bagasoka korwa Gibea, bakarwana n’Abaisraeli, bagaita abanto chilifu ikomi na isano, abamanyete korwanera emioro." 
Judges20:26 Erio Abaisraeli bonsi bagatiira gochia Beteli, bakaba bakorera. Bagaikaransa aroro agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, bakeng’ata rituko riria goika mogoroba, na bakaruera Omonene ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebi’omorembe." 
Judges20:27 Abaisraeli bakarigia ogosemia korwa ase Omonene. (Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatanana kwa Nyasae nao yarenge ase amatuko aria," 
Judges20:28 na Finehasi, mosinto bw’Eleazari o Haroni nigo arenge gokora emeremo y’obokuani ase Esanduku eria.) Abaisraeli bakaboria Omonene, “Natonyare naende kogenda korwana esegi n’Ababenjamin baminto, gose bono ngotiga tore?” Omonene akairaneria, “Imoka mogende, ekiagera ankio nimbeke abanto abwo ase amaboko aino.”" 
Judges20:29 Abaisraeli bakabeka abarwani bakaboa goetanana omochie o Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Na ase rituko ria gatato bakagenda korwania Ababenjamin, bakeroberia ase okorwana agwo Gibea, buna chingaki chiria chie ritang’ani." 
Judges20:31 Ababenjamin bagasoka, bakagenda korwana nabanto abwo, bakang’uswa gochia aare korwa ase omochie oria, na buna chingaki chiria chinde bagachaka goita Abaisraeli ase enchera enene egotiira gochia Beteli, na ase eyende ekogenda Gibea, naboigo naase aarabu. Bagaita Abaisraeli ang’e emerongo etato." 
Judges20:32 Ababenjamin bagateba, “Twababuire buna chingaki chiria chinde.” Korende Abaisraeli konya barobeirie ng’a babang’use korwa ase omochie oria, erinde bagende gochia ase chinchera chinene." 
Judges20:33 Abaisraeli bonsi bakaimoka korwa ase barenge, erio bakeroberia agwo Baali‐Tamari, na baria baboete bakaoroka mobosokano korwa ase bebisete, ang’e na Gibea." 
Judges20:34 Erio abanto chilifu ikomi, abachoretwe korwa ase Abaisraeli bonsi, bakagenda korwania omochie o Gibea, na esegi eria ekaba entindi. Ababenjamin tibamanyete ng’a ogosirigwa kwabo konya gwaikire ang’e." 
Judges20:35 Omonene akabua Ababenjamin ase obosio bw’Abaisraeli; nabarabwo bagaita Ababenjamin chilifu emerongo ebere na isano, ne rigana erimo, ase rituko riria. Abanto abwo bonsi baitetwe nigo bamanyete korwanera emioro." 
Judges20:36 Ase igo abanto ba Benjamin bakarora ng’a babuirwe. Abaisraeli bakairana gochia nyuma korwa ase Ababenjamin, ekiagera begenete Abaisraeli baria baboerete omochie o Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Barabwo bagasoka, bakarindokera omochie oria, bagaita abanto bonsi b’omochie nemioro." 
Judges20:38 Bono ekemanyererio giancheranetwe ase egati y’ekeombe ekenene ki’abarwani b’Abaisraeli na abanto bebisete baboete nakio eke: Ekero barenge korora rikundesi ri’erioki rigochongororoka korwa ase omochie oria," 
Judges20:39 erio abarwani b’Abaisraeli bairane nyuma. Ababenjamin konya bachakire goita Abaisraeli, bagaita abanto koreng’ana emerongo etato. Erio bagateba, “Ekeene, Abaisraeli babuirwe ase obosio bwaito, buna chingaki chiria chinde.”" 
Judges20:40 Korende ekero ekemanyererio keria kie rikundesi ri’erioki kiarorekanete korwa ase omochie oria, Ababenjamin bakarigereria magega, bagakumia korora omochie omogima okoyia, na erioki richongororogete gochia igoro." 
Judges20:41 Erio Abaisraeli bakaonchoka, bakairana, na Ababenjamin bagasogwa nomoondoko, ekiagera nigo baroche ng’a ogosirigwa kwabo kwabacheire ang’e." 
Judges20:42 Ase ayio bakeonchora, bagatama korwa ase Abaisraeli gochia ensemo y’erooro, korende bakanarigwa nabarwani baria abange, na baria barwete ase omochie, bagaitwa." 
Judges20:43 Abaisraeli bakagenderera goita abanto ba Benjamin, bakababwatia na kobatiringera inse goikera aase gete moocha ya Gibea." 
Judges20:44 Abarwani chituoni b’Ababenjamin chilifu ikomi na isano na isato bagaitwa. 
Judges20:45 Abatigarete bakeonchora, bagatama gochia erooro ase egetare kia Rimoni. Abanto chilifu isano bagaitwa ekero baare ase enchera gotama. Abaisraeli bakabwatia abatigarete naende goika Gidomi, na abanto chilifu ibere bagaitwa." 
Judges20:46 Ababenjamin abaitetwe ase rituko riria nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere, na isano. Abanto abwo bamanyete korwana esegi y’emioro, naende nigo barenge abakong’u b’esegi." 
Judges20:47 Korende abanto amagana atano na rimo bagatooreka, bakaonchoka, bagatama gochia ensemo y’erooro, ase egetare kie Rimoni, bakamenya ase egetare keria ase emetienyi ene." 
Judges20:48 Abaisraeli bakairana naende korwania Ababenjamin bakabaita nemioro, bagaita abanto, ne chitugo, bagasiria ebinto bionsi banyorete aroro. Bagasamba nomorero emechie yonsi yarenge ase ensemo eria." 
Judges21:1 Bono Abaisraeli konya barire eira na gotiana agwo Misipa ng’a, “Onde tari ase egati yaito oranyare korua omwana oye omoiseke konyuomwa nomonto bw’egesaku kia Benjamin.”" 
Judges21:2 Abanto bakagenda Beteli, bagaikaransa aroro ase obosio bwa Nyasae goika mogoroba, bagaaka amariogi, bakarera nobororo," 
Judges21:3 bagakwana, “Ayee! Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nase ki amang’ana aya abeire asetore intwe Abaisraeli ng’a rero egesaku ekemo giasirire korwa asetore?”" 
Judges21:4 Rituko ria kabere abanto bakaimoka mambia chuni bakeagachera egesasimero aroro. Erio bakarua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebi’omorembe. 
Judges21:5 Abaisraeli bakaboria, “Mbarabi ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli batachicha ase omosangererekano, ase obosio bw’Omonene?” Barabwo konya barire eira na gotiana ng’a omonto onde bwensi otacheti ase Omonene agwo Misipa goika aitwe." 
Judges21:6 Abaisraeli nigo barorerete Ababenjamin bamwabo amabeebe, bakabora, “Rituko ria rero egesaku ekemo giasirigwe korwa ase Abaisraeli." 
Judges21:7 Ngento ki torakore tonyorere abwo batigarete abakungu, ekiagera ntwariete eira na gotiana ase obosio bw’Omonene ng’a titokorua nonya noyomo bw’abaiseke baito anyuomwe noyomo obo?”" 
Judges21:8 Naende bakaboria, “Gesaku kende nkereo ki’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli getachicha ase Omonene agwo Misipa?” Bakanyora ng’a onde tari nonya noyomo korwa Yabesi o Gileadi ochete ase omosangererekano oria agwo ase egetwori." 
Judges21:9 Ekero abanto baare koroberigwa na goitaagwa, bakanyora ng’a onde tacheteo nonya noyomo korwa ase abanto ba Yabesi o Gileadi," 
Judges21:10 omosangererekano ogatoma abanto abaremu mono chilifu ikomi na ibere, bakabachika, “Genda moite abanto ba Yabesi o Gileadi nemioro, moite nabakungu na abana abasinini." 
Judges21:11 Aya naro morakore: Moite kera omonto omosacha, na kera omokungu omenyanire nomosacha, mobasirie kegima.”" 
Judges21:12 Bakanyora abaiseke abekungi, abwo konya bataramenyana nomosacha onde bwensi, amagana ane, ase egati y’abanto ba Yabesi o Gileadi, bakabarenta ase batoorete agwo Silo, omochie oria orenge ase ense ya Kanani." 
Judges21:13 Erio omosangererekano bwonsi bw’abanto bagatoma amang’ana gochia ase abanto ba Benjamin baria barenge ase egetare kia Rimoni, bakabarareria omorembe." 
Judges21:14 Ababenjamin bakairana ase engaki eria, na Abaisraeli bakaa abaiseke baria korwa Yabesi o Gileadi, bataitetwe babe abakungu babo; korende abwo tibabaisanete abasacha b’Ababenjamin." 
Judges21:15 Abaisraeli bakarorera Ababenjamin amabeebe, ekiagera Omonene aatanenete ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli." 
Judges21:16 Abagaaka b’omosangererekano oria bakaborania, “Naki torakore tonyorere abasacha baria batigarete abakungu, ekiagera abakungu bonsi baitirwe korwa ase Ababenjamin?”" 
Judges21:17 Naende bagateba, “Ababenjamin abatooregete goika banyorerwe abanyamwando, erinde egesaku ekemo korwa ase Abaisraeli tigesirigwa kegima." 
Judges21:18 Korende nonya naboigo, intwe titokonyara korua abaiseke baito banyuomwe nabarabwo.” Abaisraeli konya barire eira na gotiana ng’a, “Omonto oria orarue omoiseke oye anyuomwe n’Ababenjamin aragererigwe.”" 
Judges21:19 Erio bagateba, “Rora, ndire Rituko ri’Omonene ria kera omwaka agwo Silo, sugusu ya Beteli, irianyi ya Lebona, moocha y’enchera ere gati ya Beteli na Sekemu.”" 
Judges21:20 Bagachika Ababenjamin, bakabatebia, “Genda mwebise moboe ase emegondo y’emesabibu," 
Judges21:21 motengere mono ekero abaiseke ba Silo bagosoka gochia gotenga, erio moimoke korwa ase emegondo y’emesabibu, na kera omonto akurure omoiseke oyomo bw’abaiseke baria ba Silo, amoire ase orogongo rwa Benjamin abe mokaye." 
Judges21:22 Na ekero abaise, gose abamura bamwabo, barache kobasoera asetore, intwe nigo torabatebie: Komoranche mobabatigere, ekiagera titwanyorerete kera omonto omokungu ekero gi’esegi, na ekiagera inwe abanyene timwababaete babe abakungu babo, timori nokomocha kw’ogosaria eira eria twatiananetie.”" 
Judges21:23 Ababenjamin bagakora buna batebetigwe. Kera oyomo akaira omoiseke korwa ase baria baare gotenga agwo Silo, akaba mokaye. Erio bakairana, bakagenda ase emiando yabo, bakaagacha emechie yabo naende na komenya aroro." 
Judges21:24 Ase engaki eria Abaisraeli bakarua aase agwo, na kera omonto akagenda ase egesaku kiaye na ase eamate yaye, na ase omwando oye." 
Judges21:25 Ase amatuko aria omoruoti tarenge ase Abaisraeli, kera omonto nigo arenge gokora kende gionsi aroche kere ekeronge asare." 
Ruth1:1 Ase amatuko aria, ekero abagambi ebina barenge kogambera Abaisraeli, enchara enene ekaba ase ense yabo. Ase ayio, omonto oyomo o Bethlehemu, ase ense y’Abayuda, akaimoka amo na mokaye na abamura baye babere, akagenda komenya ase ense y’Abamoabu ase engaki gete." 
Ruth1:2 Omonto oria nigo arenge korokwa Elimeleki, na mokaye Naomi, na abamura baye babere Mahaloni na Kilioni. Barabwo n’Abaefarati barenge. Ekero bamenyete aaria Moabu," 
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki agakwa, agatiga Naomi ore omoboraka, ore nabamura baye babere." 
Ruth1:4 Barabwo bakanyuoma abaiseke b’Abamoabu; oyomo nigo are korokwa Oripa na oyonde Rutu. Nyuma kabamenyire aroro koreng’ana emiaka ikomi," 
Ruth1:5 Mahaloni na Kilioni nabarabwo bagakwa. Igo Naomi agakwerwa omosacha oye na abamura baye babere. 
Ruth1:6 Naomi kare agwo ase ense y’Abamoabu akaigwa ng’a Omonene ororeire abanto baye amabera, obaeire endagera naende; ase ayio akamanora korua ense eria amo na baka bamura baye." 
Ruth1:7 Barabwo bagatiga aase aaria bamenyete, korende ekero barenge kogenda gochia ase ense y’Abayuda," 
Ruth1:8 Naomi agatebia baka bamura baye ng’a bairane, na kera oyomo agende komenya mwa ng’ina. Naende akabora, “Omonene abakorere amaya, buna inwe mwakorerete baria bakwete, mogankorera nainche." 
Ruth1:9 Omonene abanchere kera oyomo oino anyuomwe naende, na anyore mwaye.” Erio Naomi akabanyunyunta ase okobatiga. Korende barabwo bagachaka korera mono," 
Ruth1:10 bakamotebia, “Yaya, titokogotiga! Nigo torigetie kogenda amo naye ase abanto baino.”" 
Ruth1:11 Korende Naomi akabairaneria, akabatebia, “Abana baane, irana mogende seino! Nase ki moganetie kogenda amo nainche? Inee! Ninyare naende korwa ase enda yane koibora abana bagochia koba abasacha baino?" 
Ruth1:12 Abana baane, irana mogende seino, ekiagera inche nagotire mono, tinkonyuomwa naende. Nonya nare korengereria ng’a ninde nogosemeria, na onye nare konyora omosacha rero, nyibore abana abamura." 
Ruth1:13 Inee, nkoganya mware goika bakine? Gose ngwetanga mware timonyuomwa nabasacha bande? Taibo, abana baane. Omonene ong’onchokeire na kong’a emechando, nainche nabechandeire mono.”" 
Ruth1:14 Naende bagachaka korera mono goetania. Erio Oripa akanyunyunta ng’ina biara, akamotiga, korende Rutu akaanga komotiga." 
Ruth1:15 Ase igo Naomi agatebia Rutu, “Naama! Oripa, moka momura omwabo omosacha oo, oiranire ase abanto baye, na ase enyasae yaye. Naye irana, mogende komo!”" 
Ruth1:16 Korende Rutu akamoiraneria, “Tagonsorora ng’a ngotige. Tiga ngende amo naye. Aande onsi ase aye ogochia, nainche nao ndachie; na aande onsi ase aye oramenye, nainche nao ndamenye. Abanto bao mbabe abanto baane, na Nyasae oo nabe Nyasae one." 
Ruth1:17 Aase aye orakwere, nainche nao ndakwere, na ntindekwe aroro. Tiga Omonene ang’e egesusuro bono na kogenderera onye gento kende kegochia konyatanana korwa asore, otatiga amakweri oka.”" 
Ruth1:18 Ekero Naomi aroche ng’a Rutu otenenire bokong’u ase ebirengererio biaye bi’okogenda amo nere, takwana gento kende." 
Ruth1:19 Ase igo barabwo babere bakagenderera orogendo rwabo, bagaika Bethlehemu. Ekero baigete aroro, abanto bonsi b’omochie bakaeegaeega ase engencho yabo, na abakungu bakaborania, bagoteba, “Inee! Oyo Naomi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Naomi akabatebia, “Timondoka Naomi, ndoke Mara, ekiagera Nyasae Omobui ondeteire obororo obonge." 
Ruth1:21 Ekero nagendete nigo narenge omonda, korende Omonene ong’iranirie inde namaboko amasa. Nase ki rende mokondoka Naomi bono, ekero Omonene Omobui ang’onchokeire na ondeteire amaakwa?”" 
Ruth1:22 Naboigo Naomi airanete korwa ase ense y’Abamoabu amo na Rutu, oria Omomoabu, moka momura oye. Barabwo bagaika Bethlehemu ekero abanto konya bachakire kogesa esairi, endagera enga buna engano." 
Ruth2:1 Naomi nabwate omoam ate oyomo ore korokwa Boazi, omonto bw’eamate y’Elimeleki, omosacha oye. Ere nigo arenge omonto omonene, naende omonda." 
Ruth2:2 Rutu, oria Omomoabu, agatebia Naomi, “Ntige ngende gochora ebigara ebitigari ase omogondo bw’omonto orang’e ribaga nkore bo.” Naomi akamoiraneria, “Genda, mwana one!”" 
Ruth2:3 Ase igo Rutu akagenda ase omogondo gete, akaba ogochora ebigara ebitigari korwa nyuma y’abagesi. Na bono agatoka ng’a omogondo oyio nigo orenge o Boazi, omonto oria bw’eamate y’Elimeleki." 
Ruth2:4 Erio agwo Boazi agacha aroro korwa Bethlehemu, agakwania abagesi, ogoteba, “Omonene abe amo nainwe!” Nabarabwo bakairaneria, “Omonene agosesenie!”" 
Ruth2:5 Boazi akaboria omoteneneri bw’abagesi baye, “Inee! Omosubati oyo, noyo ng’o?”" 
Ruth2:6 Omoteneneri oyio akamoiraneria, “Oyo nomosubati bw’Abamoabu, oria ochicha na Naomi korwa ase ense yabo." 
Ruth2:7 Nigo aboria ribaga ri’ogochora ebigara ebitigari korwa nyuma y’abagesi, na korwa mambia goika bono nigo agendererete gochora ebigara, taratimoka rinde otatiga bono ase engaki ensinini akendererete ase ekegutu keria.”" 
Ruth2:8 Erio Boazi agakwana na Rutu, akamotebia, “Mwana one, ntegerera! Tobaisa kogenda gochora ebigara ebitigari ase omogondo omoao; obeere aa oka, obe gokobwatia abaiseke aba." 
Ruth2:9 Origererie orore ase bakogesa obabwatie korwa nyuma! Nakanirie abanto baane tibakogochanda. Gokorang’a, ogende ase chinsiongo echio baichoirie amache, otaae onywe!”" 
Ruth2:10 Rutu agatung’ama inse akaumama, akaboria Boazi, “Naki gwakora kwanyechandera na gonkorera buya iga, na inche nomomenyi inde aa?”" 
Ruth2:11 Boazi akamoiraneria, “Natebigwe amang’ana onsi gwakoreire nyoko biara korwa ekero omosacha oye akwete. Namanyire buna gwatigire iso na nyoko, na ense yao kwaiboreretwe, ogacha komenya nabanto otamanyete agwo ritang’ani." 
Ruth2:12 Omonene agoakane ase aya gwakorire; ee, Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oyo gwatameire, erinde orendwe inse ye chimbaba chiaye akoe eng’eria eng’ikeranu.”" 
Ruth2:13 Rutu akamoiraneria, “Omonene one, kwabeire omuya mono asende, kwandemirie ase ogokwana nobwororo nainche, omosomba oo, nonya tindi oyomo bw’abasomba bao abaiseke.”" 
Ruth2:14 Ekero abanto bachete koragera, Boazi agatebia Rutu, “Inchuo aa, orie omogati otongerie ase omosori ore nedivai.” Naboigo Rutu agaikaransa amo nabagesi baria, na Boazi akamoa ebigara bisambire. Rutu akaria, akaigota, naende eyende egatigara." 
Ruth2:15 Na ekero Rutu agendete gochora ebigara naende, Boazi agachika abasomba baye, akabatebia, “Momotige achore ebigara nonya nase egati y’emesaima, timomokania." 
Ruth2:16 Naende momoruserie ebigara korwa ase emesaima, momotigere abichore, timobaisa komotanga.”" 
Ruth2:17 Igo Rutu akagenderera gochora ebigara ase omogondo oria goika mogoroba, na ekero abibungete akanyora ng’a biaisanire ebitonga bibere." 
Ruth2:18 Erio agetweka ebitonga biria, akairana omochie, akorokia ng’ina biara eyio achorete. Naende akamoa endagera eria yatigarete ekero ariete akaigota." 
Ruth2:19 Naomi akamoboria, “Ng’ai kware gochora ebigara rero? Nase omogondo o ng’o kware gokora emeremo? Nyasae asesenie omonto oyio ogwechandera kogokonya!” Rutu agatebia Naomi ng’a nigo arenge gokora emeremo ase omogondo bw’omonto ore korokwa Boazi." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi agatebia Rutu, moka momura oye, “Boazi oyio tiga asesenigwe n’Omonene, oyo ogoikerania chiira chiaye ase abwo bare moyo, na ase abwo bakure.” Naende agateba, “Omonto oyio nomonyamwando ominto, oyomo bw’abagwenerete gotorenda.”" 
Ruth2:21 Naende Rutu, Omomoabu oria, akamotebia, “Amo nayio ere nigo antebia ng’a mbeere amo nabasomba baye goika bakoore rigesa riaye rionsi.”" 
Ruth2:22 Erio Naomi agetebia Rutu, “Ee, omwana one, mbuya mono kobua asore okore emeremo nabaiseke abwo bakomokorera Boazi. Oise kogenda ase omogondo bw’omonto omoao, abanto bare aroro mbabaise kogokorera bobe.”" 
Ruth2:23 Ase ayio Rutu agakora emeremo amo nabaiseke baria, akaba ogochora ebigara goika bagakoora rigesa ri’esairi na eri’engano. Korende akagenderera komenya amo na ng’ina biara." 
Ruth3:1 Rituko erimo Naomi agatebia Rutu, moka momura oye, “Narorire ng’a mbuya nkonyorere omosacha, erinde onyore enka yao." 
Ruth3:2 Nomanyete ng’a Boazi, oria ase konya ogokora emeremo nabasomba baye, nigo are omonyamwando ominto? Naama! Ase omogoroba o rero nache abe okoora esairi ase ekeooreri kiaye." 
Ruth3:3 Ase ayio esibie, bweake amaguta agotioka buya, obeke chianga chiao chingiya. Erio otirimboke gochia ase ekeooreri, korende tobaisa kweorokia ase omonto oria goika ekero akoorire koragera na konywa." 
Ruth3:4 Ekero ararire, origererie omanye aase aria. Erio ogende aroro, otubore ekiebisio kiaye korwa ase amagoro aye maate, orareo nere nagotebie aya ogwenerete gokora.”" 
Ruth3:5 Rutu akairaneria, “Aya onsi gwantebia ninyakore.”" 
Ruth3:6 Ase igo Rutu agatirimboka gochia ase ekeooreri, agakora buna ng’ina biara konya amotebirie." 
Ruth3:7 Boazi kariire na konywa akaigwa buya, akagenda ang’e netui y’esairi, akarara aroro. Erio Rutu agachoba ng’ora‐ng’ora, agatubora ekiebisio korwa ase amagoro a Boazi, akarara aroro." 
Ruth3:8 Na kobwabeire botuko gati, Boazi agataboboka. Ani! Omokungu naraire magoro aye maate." 
Ruth3:9 Boazi akamoboria, “Naye ng’o?” Ere akamoiraneria, “Ninche Rutu omosomba oo, nachire ontuge, ekiagera nigo ore omonyamwando o tata biara.”" 
Ruth3:10 Erio Boazi akamotebia, “Mwana one, Omonene agosesenie. Aye bono kworokirie obwegenwa kobua obwo kworogetie ritang’ani ase nyoko biara. Tikware korigia abamura bande, abataka gose abanda." 
Ruth3:11 Ase ayio, mwana one, toiroka, ekiagera abanto bonsi ase omochie oyo nigo bamanyete ng’a aye nomokungu omweriti. Ningokorere ande onsi oraganie." 
Ruth3:12 Nabo nekeene ng’a inche nomonyamwando o iso biara inde, korende nare omonyamwando onde omoao ore ang’e kombua." 
Ruth3:13 Bono beera aa ase obotuko obo goika mambia, torore gose omonyamwando oria onde ore ang’e kombua nanche gokorenda. Karakore igo mbuya. Onye tagwancha, rirorio ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, inche ninkorende. Bono rara aiga goika mambia.”" 
Ruth3:14 Ase igo omokungu oria akarara ase amagoro aye maate goika mambia, korende mambia chuni botarakiamoka akaimoka kogenda, erinde monto onde tamorora, ekiagera Boazi tatagete monto onde amanye ng’a omokungu oria nachete ase ekeooreri kiaye." 
Ruth3:15 Naende Boazi akamotebia, “Renta egetambaa ekio bwambarete, okiaare.” Na Rutu agakiaara. Erio Boazi akamorengera esairi eisaine ebitita bitano na ekemo, akamoyetweka. Erio omokungu oria akairana gochia ase omochie." 
Ruth3:16 Ekero Rutu aigete ase ng’ina biara, ere akamoboria, “Mang’ana ki, omwana one?” Rutu akamotebia amang’ana onsi Boazi amokorerete." 
Ruth3:17 Naende agateba, “Boazi nigo antebia ng’a tinkonyara koirana gocha asore namaboko amasa. Ase igo ong’a esairi eye ebitita bitano na ekemo.”" 
Ruth3:18 Naomi akamotebia, “Bono omwana one, remereria oganye goika orore aya arabe asore. Boazi tagokira rero goika arore ng’a oroisirie amang’ana ao.”" 
Ruth4:1 Boazi akagenda agaikaransa ase etureti agwo ase egeita ki’omochie. Ekaba ng’a omonto oria omonyamwando bw’Elimeleki ore ang’e kobua Boazi, oria Boazi akwanete igoro yaye, ngoeta arenge. Boazi akamorangeria, akamotebia, “Oyominto, gobera gocha aa, oikaranse!” Omonto oria akagobera, agaikaransa." 
Ruth4:2 Naende Boazi akarangeria abagaaka ikomi b’omochie baikaranse aroro. Ase igo bagaikaransa. 
Ruth4:3 Erio Boazi agatebia omonyamwando oria, “Naomi, oria oirana korwa ense y’Abamoabu, nkoonia are oboremo boria bwarenge omwando bw’Elimeleki ominto." 
Ruth4:4 Inche nigo narengereretie gokomanyia amang’ana aya. Bono nonyare kobogora aiga ase amasio ’abagaaka aba, na ase aba bonsi baikaransete igaa. Onye kogwancha kobogora, bogore, korende onye taibo, ntebie imanye, ekiagera naye ore omonyamwando ore ang’e, na nyuma yao ninche.” Omonto oria akairaneria, “Ee, nimbogore.”" 
Ruth4:5 Erio Boazi akamotebia, “Korende onye gokogora oboremo korwa ase Naomi, rirorio oire Rutu, Omomoabu oria, moka oria okwete, abe mokao, naye omotenenerie oria okwete egesaku kerarie omwando oye.”" 
Ruth4:6 Omonyamwando oria akairaneria, akabora, “Onye naboigo, tinkobogora, mbaise gosiria omwando one. Ribaga riane ri’okobogora, aye riire; tinkonyara kobogora.”" 
Ruth4:7 Ase amatuko a kare ase Abaisraeli, ekero enibo yare koboorigwa, gose koonchorerigwa, engencho yabo nigo yarenge ng’a oyomo bw’abwo nigo arenge gosomora egekoroto kiaye ekemo omoa oria onde. Ayio nigo are kogera aria agambwa takoonchoranwa, na ogokora okwo kwaba kirori." 
Ruth4:8 Ase igo omonyamwando oria agatebia Boazi, “Aye bogore”, na akamosomorera egekoroto kiaye." 
Ruth4:9 Erio Boazi agatebia abagaaka baria na abanto bonsi abarengeo, “Inwe mbirori more rero ng’a nagorire korwa ase amaboko a Naomi bionsi ebiarenge ebi’Elimeleki, na ebia Kilioni amo nebia Mahaloni." 
Ruth4:10 Amo nayio Rutu, Omomoabu oria, oyorenge moka Mahaloni, namoirire abe mokane, erinde inyare goteneneria oria okwete egesaku kerarie omwando oye, nario ororeria rwaye rotasire ase abamwabo, gose ase abanto b’omochie oye. Ase amang’ana aya mbirori more rero.”" 
Ruth4:11 Abagaaka baria na abanto bande bonsi abarenge ase etureti agwo ase egeita ki’omochie bakairaneria, “Ee, mbirori tore. Tiga Omonene asesenie omokungu oyio orache ase enka yao abe buna Raeli na Lea, abwo baiborerete Israeli abana abange bakaba egesaku. Aye osesenigwe ase egati y’Abaefarati na omanyekane ase Bethlehemu." 
Ruth4:12 Naende enka yao ebe buna eya Peresi, oria Tamari aiborerete Yuda, goetera ase oroiboro roria Omonene arakoe korwa ase omokungu oyio.”" 
Ruth4:13 Ase igo Boazi akaira Rutu, na ere akaba mokaye. Erio bakamenyana, na Omonene aganchera Rutu koba morito, na ere akaibora omwana omoisia." 
Ruth4:14 Erio abakungu b’omochie oyio bagatebia Naomi, “Omonene atogigwe! Ere tagotigeti; rero okoeire omonyamwando, oyio erieta riaye riramanyekane ase egati y’Abaisraeli!" 
Ruth4:15 Nere oragotimokie, abe chinguru chiao abe ogokorageria ase obogotu bwao. Moka momura oo nigo agwanchete; ere ogokoreire amaya kobua abamura batano na babere, na bono oiboire omwana oyio.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naomi akaimokia omwana oria, akamoagata, akaba okomorera." 
Ruth4:17 Abakungu abarenge abagisangio baye bakabora, “Naomi oiboreirwe omwana omochokoro omomura”, bakamoroka Obedi. Obedi oyio nere oiborete Yese, na Yese akaibora Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Abanto aba nabwo ororeria rwa Peresi: Peresi akaibora Hezironi; 
Ruth4:19 Hezironi akaibora Ramu, na Ramu akaibora Aminadabu;" 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu akaibora Nahesoni, na Nahesoni akaibora Salimoni;" 
Ruth4:21 Salimoni akaibora Boazi, na Boazi akaibora Obedi;" 
Ruth4:22 Obedi akaibora Yese, na Yese akaibora Daudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Narenge omonto ore korokwa Elikana korwa ase egesaku gi’Efraimu, omenyete Ramataimu‐Sofimu, ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu. Ere nigo arenge mosinto o Yerohamu bw’Elihu, o Tohu, o Sufu, Omoefraimu." 
1Samuel1:2 Elikana nabwate abakungu babere, Hana na Penina. Penina nabwate abana, korende Hana tabwate bana." 
1Samuel1:3 Kera omwaka omonto oyio nigo arenge gotiira korwa ase omochie oye, ogenda gosasima na korua ebing’wanso ase Omonene bw’Emeganda agwo Silo. Aroro agwo Ofini na Finehasi, abamura babere ba Eli, nigo barenge abakuani b’Omonene." 
1Samuel1:4 Kera engaki Elikana arenge korua ekeng’wanso, nigo arenge koa Penina amo nabana baye, abamura na abaiseke, kera oyomo egetari kiaye." 
1Samuel1:5 Korende ase Hana nigo arenge komoa ebitari bibere, ekiagera nigo amwanchete nonya Omonene omotangete koibora abana." 
1Samuel1:6 Penina, moibori omwabo, nigo anarete goichania Hana ase okomochaya, ekiagera Omonene konya omotangire koibora." 
1Samuel1:7 Nabo agendererete gokora omwaka ase omwaka. Ekero barenge kogenda gosasima ase enyomba y’Omonene, Penina akaba ogoichania Hana, na Hana nigo arenge kona‐korera goika takoria gento." 
1Samuel1:8 Erio Elikana akamoboria, “Nase ki okona‐korera? Naki otari koria endagera? Naende oichanete iga? Inee! Inche tindi buya asore goetania abana abamura ikomi?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Rituko erimo nyuma kobakoorire koragera na konywa aaria Silo, Hana akaimoka, na ase emechando yaye akarera mono ore nobororo, agasaba Omonene. Eli nao aikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ang’e nomotobwa bw’egesieri gie Hekalu y’Omonene." 
1Samuel1:10  
1Samuel1:11 Hana akaria eira, agakwana, “Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, ondigererie inche omosomba oo ase emechando yane! Tonyeba! Korang’e omwana omomura, nigo ndamorue abe oyoo, aye Omonene; ase amatuko onsi ay’obogima bwaye takogingirwa etukia yaye.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Buna omokungu oyio agendererete gosaba Omonene, Eli akaba origereretie omonwa oye." 
1Samuel1:13 Hana nigo arenge gosabera enkoro yaye ime bokiriru; akaba okomonya‐monyia ebikoba biaye rioka, korende riogi tiriare koigweka. Ase ayio Eli agakaga ng’a nigo atindire," 
1Samuel1:14 akamotebia, “Ngoika ririri oragenderere gotinda? Tiga ogotinda kwao, otindoke!”" 
1Samuel1:15 Hana akamoiraneria, “Taibo, omonene one, inche nomokungu inde nobororo ase enkoro yane. Tinyweti edivai gose ekenyugwa kende kegotindia. Nigo nabeire ngosaba na kobeka emechando yane yonsi ase Omonene." 
1Samuel1:16 Tokaga ng’a inche, omosomba oo, nomokungu otagwenereti, naki ase engaki eye yonsi nabeire ngokwana ase engencho y’emechando yane na ogoichana kwane.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Erio Eli akamoiraneria, akamotebia, “Genda nomorembe, na Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli nakoe aya kwamosabire.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Hana akabora, “Tiga inche, omosomba oo, inyore ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao.” Erio omokungu oria akarua aase agwo, akagenda koragera, gose taba oichanete naende." 
1Samuel1:19 Rituko ria kabere Elikana na abanto baye bakaimoka mambia chuni, bagasasima ase obosio bw’Omonene. Erio bakairana gochia nka sobo agwo Rama. Elikana akaba na Hana mokaye, na Omonene akaba omoinyorete." 
1Samuel1:20 Hana akaba morito, na ekero engaki yaigete akaibora omwana omoisia, akamoroka Samweli, agateba, “Nekiagera namosabete korwa ase Omonene.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Elikana amo nabanto b’enka yaye bakagenda naende koruera Omonene ekeng’wanso gia kera omwaka na goikerania eira bariete. 
1Samuel1:22 Korende ase engaki eyio Hana tagendeteo, agatebia omosacha oye, “Ninganye goika ntache omwana, erio nario ndamoire imoorokie ase obosio bw’Omonene, erinde imotige amenye aroro botambe.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elikana, omosacha oye, akamotebia, “Kora aya orarore are buya; ganya goika otache omwana. Tiga Omonene aikeranie ring’ana riaye.” Erio omokungu oria agatigara nka korera omwana goika akamotacha." 
1Samuel1:24 Ekero omwana oria atachirwe, Hana akamoira ase enyomba y’Omonene agwo Silo, akaira na eeri yakoorire emiaka etato, na obosie ebimunu emerongo ebere, na ekerandi kiaroisirie korwa ase risankwa kere nedivai. Omwana oria omomura nigo arenge omoke." 
1Samuel1:25 Erio bakanyenya eeri eria, na bakaa Eli omwana oria." 
1Samuel1:26 Hana agatebia Eli, “Omonene one, inyigwa. Amaene, buna ogendererete koba moyo, inche nomokungu oria natenenete aiga ase obosio bwao, narenge gosaba Omonene." 
1Samuel1:27 Nigo nasabete ng’a ng’egwe omwana oyo omomura, na Omonene akaigwa ogosaba kwane." 
1Samuel1:28 Ase ayio namorentire ase Omonene. Ase obogima bwaye bwonsi abe oyoye.” Erio bagasasima Omonene aroro agwo. 
1Samuel2:1 Hana agasaba, agakwana, “Enkoro yane yachengeire Omonene; ase Omonene orogunchara rwane rwaimokereire igoro. Omonwa one nigo ogosekereria ababisa baane; nagokire ase ogotooreka kw’Omonene." 
1Samuel2:2 “Onde tari ore omochenu buna Omonene, onde tari buna ere, egetare kende tikeri buna Nyasae oito." 
1Samuel2:3 Timogenderera gokwana amang’ana obwerori, oboenenu tiborua ase emenwa yaino. Omonene nigo are Nyasae oyomanyete onsi, ere nigo akorenga aya onsi abanto bagokora." 
1Samuel2:4 Amata ’abanto chituoni abunekire, korende abakogochwa babekirwe chinguru." 
1Samuel2:5 Abanto ababwate endagera eisaine kare bono berure gokora emeremo, erinde banyore endagera, nabwo barenge nenchara, baigotire bono. Omokungu orenge omogomba oiboire abana batano na babere, korende oria konya obwate abange otigaire ore bosa." 
1Samuel2:6 Omonene nigo agoita, naende oirania obogima; ere nigo agotoma abanto gochia aase abakure, naende obabokia." 
1Samuel2:7 Omonene nigo agokora omonto oba omotaka, gose omonda, ere nigo agokeyia omonto, gose omoimokereria igoro." 
1Samuel2:8 Nigo akoimokia omotaka korwa ase obotaka obweere, na omoremerwa korwa ase ribu, obabeka baikaransa amo nabwo bare nokobua, na kobaa omwando bw’ebirogo bi’obonene. Oboroso bw’ense nobw’Omonene, na igoro y’oboroso obwo oterekereire enseo." 
1Samuel2:9 “Narende amagoro ’abegenwa baye, korende abakori amabe nigo barasirigwe ase omosunte, onde tari orabue ase chinguru chiaye ere omonyene." 
1Samuel2:10 Abare mamincha y’Omonene nabasenyentwe, Omonene nabaake nenkoba korwa igoro. Ere nanachere ense yonsi ekina. Omonene nae omoruoti oye okobua na aimokererie igoro orogunchara rw’omoakwa amaguta oye.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Erio Elikana akairana gochia Rama nka bwoye, korende omwana oria Samweli agatigara ogokorera Omonene inse y’oboteneneri bwa Eli omokuani." 
1Samuel2:12 Abamura ba Eli nigo barenge abanto ababe batarochi inchera. Tibasigete Omonene," 
1Samuel2:13 na tibare gokora buna abakuani bagwenerete gokora ase abanto. Ribaga ri’ayio, ekero omonto arure ekeng’wanso kiaye, omosomba bw’omokuani nigo arenge gocha abwate euma ere namaino atato, na ekero enyama egendererete koiyekwa," 
1Samuel2:14 omosomba oria aba ogosoyia euma eria ime ase esuguria, gose enyongo, gose ase gento kende enyama ekoiyekerwa ime yaye, ne chinyama chionsi arenge korusia neuma eria nigo chiarenge koirerwa omokuani. Naboigo abakuani abwo barenge gokorera Abaisraeli bonsi barenge gocha agwo Silo." 
1Samuel2:15 Amo nayio, ekero enyama enoru etarayia, omosomba bw’omokuani nigo arenge gocha otebia omonto oria orenge korua ekeng’wanso, “Kae omokuani enyama achie gosamba, ekiagera tagwancha enyama enyiyeke; igo anchete enyama embese.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Onye omonto oria orenge gotebia omosomba oria, “Tiga tosambe enyama enoru ritang’ani, erio nyuma omanye koira enyama ende yonsi oganetie,” nere igo arenge goteba, “Yaya, taibo, goika oyeng’e bono iga. Onye tokong’a enyama eyio, rirorio nigo nkoyerusia ne chinguru, inyeire.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Ebibe ebi bi’abamura ba Eli nigo biarenge ebinene mono ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekiagera ase enchera eyio abanto nigo beorokereretie gochaya ebing’wanso bi’Omonene." 
1Samuel2:18 Samweli akagenderera gokora emeremo ase obosio bw’Omonene. Ere nigo arenge omosae ore kobeka egesibao ki’egatani. 
1Samuel2:19 Kera omwaka ng’ina nigo arenge komoroiseria eanga, omoirera ekero arenge kogenda amo nomosacha oye gochia korua ekeng’wanso gia kera omwaka." 
1Samuel2:20 Erio Eli nigo arenge koba ogosesenia Elikana na mokaye, atebia Elikana, “Omonene asesenie omokungu oyo akoiborere abana bande babe ribaga ri’omwana oyo gwatananete ase Omonene.” Erio baba bakoirana gochia nka." 
1Samuel2:21 Omonene agasesenia Hana, ere akaibora abamura bande batato na abaiseke babere. Omwana oria Samweli akaba ogokina ore ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Samuel2:22 Bono Eli konya ogotire mono. Ere nigo abete okona‐koigwa amang’ana onsi abamura baye baare gokora ase Abaisraeli bonsi, na buna baare gotomana nabakungu abarenge gokora emeremo ase egesoero ki’Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
1Samuel2:23 Erio akabatebia, “Nase ki mogokora amang’ana buna ayio? Abanto bonsi bantebirie amabe aino mogokora." 
1Samuel2:24 Abana baane, tiga timokora bo. Chinkuma echio naigure ase egati y’abanto b’Omonene tichiri chingiya." 
1Samuel2:25 Omonto karakore ebibe ase omonto onde, Nyasae nabe omobwatania, korende omonto karakore ebibe ase Nyasae, ning’o oranyare koba omobwatania?” Korende barabwo tibaigwerete ise, ekiagera Omonene konya oganirie kobaita." 
1Samuel2:26 Bono omwana oria Samweli akagenderera gokina ase omobere, akamogwenera Omonene na mwanyabanto." 
1Samuel2:27 Omonto oyomo o Nyasae agacha ase Eli, akamotebia, “Amang’ana aya naro Omonene akwanire: Inee! Inche tineorogetie ase sokororia yao na ase ororeria rwaye, ekero barenge abasomba ba Farao agwo ase ense ya Misiri?" 
1Samuel2:28 Tinabachorete inwe korwa ase ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli mobe abakuani baane, na morue ebing’wanso ase egesasimero kiane, naende mosambe ubani na mobe mokobeka egesibao ki’obokuani komogocha ase obosio bwane? Tinaete abanto b’ororeria rwa sokororia yao baire ebing’wanso bionsi Abaisraeli baare gosamba nomorero?" 
1Samuel2:29 Nase ki rende mwabeire mogochaya na koba ne ribero ase ebing’wanso biane, na okoruegwa kwane, nachigete birentwe ase Obomenyo bwane? Aye Eli kwaeire abamura bao ogosika kong’etania ase okobaa ribaga kwenoria ase eyere enoru mono kobua, ase kera ekeng’wanso abanto baane Abaisraeli bakonduera." 
1Samuel2:30 Ase engencho eyio, inche Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, natebire iga: Nigo nariete eira ng’a abanto b’eamate yao, na ab’ororeria rwa sokororia yao mbabe bagokora emeremo y’obokuani ase obosio bwane kogenderera botambe. Korende bono nigo ngoteba ng’a tinyancheti bo, ekiagera abanto bansigete, nainche nimbasike, na baria banchayete, nabarabwo mbachaywe goetania." 
1Samuel2:31 Naama! Amatuko ngocha are, ekero ndasirie chinguru chiao ne chinguru chi’abanto b’ororeria rwa sokororia yao, erio tanyorekana omonto omogotu ase eamate yao." 
1Samuel2:32 Aye ekero ore nemechando norore obotenenku boraruegwe ase Abaisraeli, na igo aye nobe ne ribero, korende ase eamate yao omonto omogotu tagotokao." 
1Samuel2:33 Tinkorusia kera oyomo oino korwa ase egesasimero. Oyo ntarusie korwao nigo arabe okogoukoria amaiso, na goichania enkoro yao, na abanto bonsi b’enyomba yao nigo barakwe bataragota." 
1Samuel2:34 Abamura bao babere, Hofini na Finehasi, nigo barakwe ase rituko erimo, na ayio nabe ekemanyererio asore ase aya nakwanire." 
1Samuel2:35 Ninyechorere omokuani omwegenwa, oyorabe ogokora ogwancha kwane na onsi aya nganetie. Oyio nere ndae ororeria rwaye rorabe rogotenena bokong’u, na abanto b’ororeria rwaye mbagenderere gokora emeremo y’obokuani ase obosio bw’omoakwa amaguta one." 
1Samuel2:36 Nebe ng’a omonto onde bwensi ase eamate yao oratigare ore moyo nagende gotung’ama ase obosio bw’omokuani oyio, amosabe amoe ebesa gose omogati, ogoteba: Nagosabire ombeke nainche nkonye ase emeremo gete y’obokuani, erinde inyore omogati nkoria.”" 
1Samuel3:1 Omwana oria Samweli akaba ogokora emeremo ase obosio bw’Omonene inse y’oboteneneri bwa Eli. Ase amatuko aria ring’ana ri’Omonene tiriarenge gokwanwa mono na amaroro ’obobani tarenge konyorekana otatiga okomo okomo. 
1Samuel3:2 Ase amatuko aria amaiso a Eli konya achakire koba chinchingori, tare korora buya. Ase obotuko obomo ere nigo arenge oraire aase aye a botambe," 
1Samuel3:3 na Samweli nigo arenge oraire ime ase Obomenyo Obochenu aase Esanduku ya Nyasae yarenge. Ritang’ani chitaya chia Nyasae chitararima," 
1Samuel3:4 Omonene akarangeria Samweli! Ere agaitaba, “Nao inde aa!”" 
1Samuel3:5 Erio akaminyoka gochia ase Eli, akamotebia, “Nao inde aa! Aye nigo kwandangeria.” Korende Eli akamoiraneria, “Inche tinkorangereti, genda orare.” Erio Samweli akairana gochia korara." 
1Samuel3:6 Omonene akarangeria Samweli naende; ere akaimoka akagenda ase Eli, akamotebia, “Nao inde aa. Aye nigo kwandangeria.” Korende Eli akamoiraneria, “Omwana one, tinkorangereti, genda orare.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Bono Samweli konya taramanyereria eriogi ri’Omonene, ne ring’ana ri’Omonene konya tiriraorokigwa asare." 
1Samuel3:8 Omonene akarangeria Samweli eria gatato. Ere akaimoka, akagenda ase Eli, akamotebia, “Nao inde aa. Aye nigo kwandangeria.” Erio Eli akamanya ng’a n’Omonene okorangeria omwana oria." 
1Samuel3:9 Ase ayio, agatebia Samweli, “Genda orare, na karakorangerie naende, okwane iga: Omonene kwana, inche omosomba oo ninyigwete.” Erio Samweli akagenda, akarara naende aase aye." 
1Samuel3:10 Erio Omonene agacha, agatenena aria, akarangeria buna chingaki chinde, “Samweli! Samweli!” Samweli agaitaba, “Kwana. Inche, omosomba oo, ninyigwete.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Omonene agatebia Samweli, “Rituko erimo ninkore egento gete ase egati y’Abaisraeli, egento gi’okwoboyia, na kera omonto orakeigwe, amato aye nigo arabe akoeera." 
1Samuel3:12 Ase rituko erio ning’ikeranie amang’ana onsi, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, ayio nakwanete ng’a ninyakore ase Eli na ase eamate yaye." 
1Samuel3:13 Namotebetie ng’a nabeire ang’e koa eamate yaye egesusuro kogenderera botambe, ekiagera okorire ebibe. Ere nigo amanyete ng’a abamura baye mbabete bakorama erieta riane, korende tabakania batige." 
1Samuel3:14 Ase ayio natianire ase eamate ya Eli ng’a okobwatanigwa tigokoba nonya ng’ake ase ebibe biabo ase enchera y’ebing’wanso gose okoruegwa konde gwonsi.” 
1Samuel3:15 Samweli akarara goika mambia; erio akaboka, akaigora ebisieri bi’enyomba y’Omonene. Ere akoboa gotebia Eli okorora koria aroche." 
1Samuel3:16 Eli akamorangeria, akabora, “Samweli, omwana one!” Nere agaitaba, “Nao inde aa!”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eli akamoboria, “Ninki Omonene agotebetie? Tobaisa kombisa gento. Korambise gento kende gionsi, nonya ne ring’ana erimo, rirorio Nyasae akoe egesusuro ekenene.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Erio Samweli akamotebia kera ring’ana, tamobisa rinde rionsi. Eli akabora, “Nere Omonene; tiga akore eri rikomogwenera.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Samweli akamenta gokina; Omonene akaba nere, erinde tatiga ring’ana riaye nonya nerimo ritaikeranetigwe." 
1Samuel3:20 Abaisraeli bonsi korwa Dani goika Beeri‐Seba bakamanya ng’a Samweli ekeene bwegenirwe koba omobani bw’Omonene. 
1Samuel3:21 Omonene akagenderera kweorokia agwo Silo, akeorokia ase Samweli goetera ase ring’ana riaye. Na ekero Samweli arenge gokwana, Abaisraeli bonsi nigo barenge gotegerera." 
1Samuel4:1 Abaisraeli bakagenda korwania Abafilisti. Barabwo bagatoora agwo Ebeni‐Eseri, na Abafilisti agwo Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisti bakeroberia korwania Abaisraeli. Esegi egatindia, na Abafilisti bakabua Abaisraeli, bagaita abanto chilifu inye." 
1Samuel4:3 Ekero abarwani abatigarete bairanete gocha ase egetwori, abagaaka b’Abaisraeli bagateba, “Nase ki Omonene atotiga twabugwa n’Abafilisti ase rituko ria rero? Togende torente korwa Silo Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene, erinde eche ebe egati yaito na gototooria korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baito.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Erio abanto bagatomwa Silo, bakarenta Esanduku eria y’Omonene bw’Emeganda, oyio omenyete nobonene bwaye igoro y’abakerubi; na Hofini na Finehasi, abamura babere ba Eli, bagacha amo n’Esanduku eria." 
1Samuel4:5 Ekero Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene yaigete ase egetwori, Abaisraeli bonsi bagaaka amariogi amanene goika ense ekoga." 
1Samuel4:6 Abafilisti bagachia koigwa amariogi aria agoakwa bakaborania, “Ninki engencho y’ogoakwa kw’amariogi ayio amanene ase egetwori ki’Abaibirania?” Ekero banyorete amang’ana ng’a n’Esanduku y’Omonene yarentirwe ase egetwori," 
1Samuel4:7 bakaondoka mono, bagakwana, “Enyasae yachire ase egetwori keria.” Naende bagateba, “Obobe nobwaito! Egento kenga buna ekio tikiana gokorekana asetore nonya ng’ake." 
1Samuel4:8 Obobe nobwaito! Ning’o oratotoorie korwa ase amaboko e chinyasae echio chire nokobua gotoetania? 
1Samuel4:9 Chinyasae echio nachio chiagete Abamisiri namaakwa amange aaria ase erooro. Korende inwe Abafilisti, motenene bokong’u buna abasacha, ede timoa abasomba b’Abaibirania baria, buna barabwo barenge abasomba baino. Ee, motenene buna abasacha, morwane!”" 
1Samuel4:10 Ase igo Abafilisti bakarwana bokong’u, na Abaisraeli bakabugwa, bagatama kera oyomo gochia ase enka yaye. Okobugwa okwo nigo kwarenge okonene mono. Abarwani b’Abaisraeli chilifu emerongo etato bagaitwa bagakwa." 
1Samuel4:11 Esanduku ya Nyasae ekairwa, na Hofini na Finehasi, abamura babere ba Eli, bagaitwa." 
1Samuel4:12 Omonto oyomo bw’egesaku kia Benjamin agatama korwa ase esegi, akaminyoka gochia Silo, agaikao rituko erio erio, ore ne chianga chiatandoire, na obegete ebuse ase omotwe oye." 
1Samuel4:13 Ekero omonto oria aigeteo, Eli nigo arenge oikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye agwo enchera ensemo otengerete, ekiagera nigo arenge nobwoba ase engencho y’Esanduku eria ya Nyasae. Na ekero omonto oria arentete amang’ana ayio akorekire, abanto bonsi b’omochie bakarera mono." 
1Samuel4:14 Erio Eli akaigwa okorera kw’abanto, akaboria, “Eriogi eri ri’okorera okonene neria ki?” Erio omonto oria akaayerera gochia ase Eli komotebia amang’ana ayio." 
1Samuel4:15 (Eli konya okoorire emiaka emerongo kianda, na etano na etato; amaiso aye konya aukoire; ase ayio tarenge konyara korora.)" 
1Samuel4:16 Omonto oria agatebia Eli, “Ninche narua ase esegi, natama korwao ase rituko ria rero.” Erio Eli akamoboria, “Omwana one, naki esegi yagenderera?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Erio oria orentete amang’ana akamoiraneria, “Abaisraeli batamire korwa ase Abafilisti, abanto abange baitirwe; Hofini na Finehasi, abana bao babere, bakure; boigo Esanduku ya Nyasae yairirwe.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Ekero omonto oria atorete Esanduku eria ya Nyasae, Eli akagwa gochia magega korwa ase ekerogo, agwo ase egeita ensemo, akabuneka ebigoti agakwa, ekiagera konya ogotire mono, naende nigo arenge omorito. Ere konya ogambeire Abaisraeli ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene." 
1Samuel4:19 Bono moga Finehasi, omomura o Eli, nigo arenge morito; engaki yaye y’okogonkia konya yabereire ang’e. Ekero aigwete amang’ana ng’a ise biara amo nomosacha oye bakure, obororo bw’okobina bokamochera, agatung’ama inse, akagonkia." 
1Samuel4:20 Ekero arenge ang’e nogokwa, abakungu abarenge komokonya ase okomoiboria bakamotebia, “Toiroka, ekiagera kwaiboire omwana omomura.” Korende omokungu oria tabairaneria gento, gose tategerera amang’ana abo." 
1Samuel4:21 Akaroka omwana oria I‐Kabodi, ogoteba, “Obonene bwarure ase Abaisraeli.” Nigo akwanete igo, ekiagera Esanduku eria ya Nyasae konya yairirwe, boigo ekiagera ise biara konya okure, na omosacha oye konya oitirwe." 
1Samuel4:22 Agateba, “Obonene bwarure ase Abaisraeli,” ekiagera Esanduku eria ya Nyasae konya yairirwe." 
1Samuel5:1 Ekero Abafilisti bairete Esanduku eria ya Nyasae, bakayebogoria korwa Ebeni‐Eseri, bakayeira goika Asidodi," 
1Samuel5:2 bakayesoyia ase hekalu ya Dagoni, bakayebeka ensemo ya Dagoni, enyasae yabo." 
1Samuel5:3 Rituko ria kabere mambia chuni, ekero abanto b’Asidodi babogete, bakanyora Dagoni egwete inse maumama bosio bw’Esanduku eria y’Omonene. Bakayegororokia, bakayetenenia aase aye." 
1Samuel5:4 Rituko ria gatato bagachia koboka mambia chuni, bakanyora naende Dagoni yagure inse maumama, bosio bw’Esanduku eria y’Omonene. Omotwe o Dagoni, na amaboko aye, konya biabutokire bire agwo ase omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri, ne rieene rioka nario riatigarete." 
1Samuel5:5 Ayio naro akogera abakuani ba Dagoni na abanto bonsi baria bagosoa ase hekalu ya Dagoni agwo Asidodi batari gotacha omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri nonya ngoika rero iga. 
1Samuel5:6 Okoboko kw’Omonene gokaritoera abanto b’Asidodi. Ere agachanda na kwoboyia abanto bonsi b’Asidodi amo nab’orogongo orwo rwonsi, akabaaka bakariegwa namagumba." 
1Samuel5:7 Ekero abanto b’Asidodi baroche amang’ana ayio, bagateba, “Esanduku eye ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli tekonyara kobeera aiga amo naintwe, ekiagera okoboko kw’Omonene nokorito igoro asetore, na igoro ase Dagoni, enyasae yaito.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Bagatoma abanto basangererie amo abanene bonsi b’Abafilisti, bakababoria, “Naki togokora n’Esanduku eye ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli?” Barabwo bakairaneria, “Esanduku eria ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli tiga eirwe Gati.” Ase igo bakaira Esanduku eria ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli aroro." 
1Samuel5:9 Ekero bayeirireo, Omonene akarenta obotantanu obonene ase abanto b’omochie oria, agaaka abanto bonsi, abanene na abake, ase okobarentera amagumba." 
1Samuel5:10 Erio bakaira Esanduku eria ya Nyasae goika omochie bw’Ekironi. Korende ekero yaigete aroro, abanto b’Ekironi bagaaka amariogi, bakabora, “Barentire Esanduku eria ya Nyasae aiga seito, erinde batoite intwe twensi.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Ase ayio bagatoma abanto basangererie amo abanene bonsi b’Abafilisti, bakabora, “Rusia aiga Esanduku eye ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, moyeiranie gochia aase aye, tebaisa gotoita intwe amo nabana baito.” Obwoba bw’amakweri konya bwasoire ase omochie bwonsi, ekiagera okoboko kw’Omonene nigo kwarenge okorito mono aroro." 
1Samuel5:12 Abanto baria batakwete bakariegwa namagumba, bakarera, na ekerero kiabo kegaika igoro." 
1Samuel6:1 Esanduku eria y’Omonene ekabeera ase ense y’Abafilisti ase engaki y’emetienyi etano na ebere. 
1Samuel6:2 Erio Abafilisti bakarangeria abakuani babo na abaringoria, bakababoria, “Ninki togokora ase Esanduku eye y’Omonene? Totebie inchera ki torayeiranie aase aye.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Barabwo bakabairaneria, “Onye mokoirania Esanduku eyio ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, timobaisa koyeirania bosa etari nebiegwa; goika momoruere okoruegwa ase engencho y’okomocha. Erio namogwene, naende monyare komanya ng’a nase ki Omonene agendererete kobaa egesusuro.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Bakaboria, “Inee! Okoruegwa okwo gw’okomocha nkoroki torairanie ase Omonene?” Barabwo bakabairaneria, “Emegwekano etano y’amagumba, na etano ye chimbeba, yonsi eroisirie korwa ase etahabu. Moire emegwekano ereng’aine nomobaro bw’abagambi b’Abafilisti, ekiagera amaakwa ayio nigo abete igoro asemore mwensi, na igoro ase abanene baino boigo." 
1Samuel6:5 Goika moroisie emegwekano y’amagumba, na eye chimbeba, ebio bigosaria ense yaino; erio motogie Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli. Ande nabo arakore emechando yaino ebe emegusu asemore, na ase chinyasae chiaino, na ase ense yaino." 
1Samuel6:6 Nase ki mogokong’ia chinkoro chiaino buna Abamisiri na Farao bakong’etie echiabo. Inee! Ekero Omonene abaete amaakwa amakong’u tibaete Abaisraeli ribaga bakaruao? 
1Samuel6:7 Ase igo roisia egari enyia, morente chiombe ibere chigokamwa, chitana gosiberwa rikorogoto; mosibere chiombe echio egari eyio, korende morusie chimori chiabo korwa ase chirochio, mochitige nka." 
1Samuel6:8 Moimokie Esanduku eye y’Omonene ase egari igoro, na emegwekano eria y’etahabu, moyebeke ase esanduku eng’ao ebeere ensemo y’Esanduku eria y’Omonene. Emegwekano eyio moyeirere Omonene ebe okoruegwa ase engencho y’okomocha okwo. Nyuma y’ayio motige Esanduku egende aase aye." 
1Samuel6:9 Erio moyerigererie. Onye ekogenda enchera ya boronge gochia ase ense yaye ya Beti‐Semesi, rirorio momanye ng’a n’Omonene otorentera obobe obwo obonene, korende onye taibo, rirorio tomanye ng’a tari okoboko kwaye gwatoaka; ande nigo twanyora emechando eye mosiabano.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Erio abanto abwo bagakora bo. Bakaimokia chiombe ibere chigokamwa, bagachisibera egari, bagasiekera chimori nka." 
1Samuel6:11 Bakabeka Esanduku y’Omonene ase egari, bakabeka na esanduku eria yabekire emegwekano eria ye chimbeba na ey’amagumba eroisirie korwa ase etahabu." 
1Samuel6:12 Chiombe chiria chikagenda chikona‐kwana, chikabwatia enchera endonge ekogenda Beti‐Semesi, tichiagobera aande, ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee, na abagambi b’Abafilisti bakaba bagochitunyana korwa nyuma, goika ase orobebe rwa Beti‐Semesi." 
1Samuel6:13 Bono abanto ba Beti‐Semesi nkogesa barenge engano yabo agwo ase rikura, na ekero barigereretie, bakarora Esanduku eria, bakagoka mono." 
1Samuel6:14 Ekero egari eria yaigete ase omogondo o Yoshua o Beti‐Semesi egatenenao, ase rigena rinene riarenge. Abanto bagaatia chibao chi’egari eria, erio bakarua chiombe chiria chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene." 
1Samuel6:15 Abalawi bakarusia Esanduku eria y’Omonene, amo nesanduku eria ende yabekire amo, eyarenge nemegwekano eria y’etahabu, bagachibeka igoro ase rigena riria rinene. Erio ase rituko riria abanto ba Beti‐Semesi bakaruera Omonene ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebing’wanso binde." 
1Samuel6:16 Ekero abagambi baria b’Abafilisti baroche ayio bakairana gochia Ekironi ase rituko riria. 
1Samuel6:17 Abafilisti bakarua emegwekano eria y’amagumba, eroisirie korwa ase etahabu, ekaba okoruegwa gw’okomocha ase Omonene, omogwekano oyomo korwa ase kera oyomo bw’emechie eyio: Asidodi, na Gasa, na Askeloni, na Gati, na Ekironi." 
1Samuel6:18 Boigo bakarua emegwekano eria ye chimbeba eroisirie korwa ase chitahabu, oyomo korwa ase kera omochie orenge kogamberwa nabanene baria batano b’Abafilisti, emechie eyio yonsi yagiteire chindwaki na ebichie bionsi bitagiteire. Ne rigena riria rinene ase babegete Esanduku eria y’Omonene nigo rire kirori goika rituko ria rero agwo ase omogondo o Yoshua o Beti‐Semesi." 
1Samuel6:19 Omonene agaita abanto ba Beti‐Semesi emerongo etano na ebere korwa ase abanto chilifu emerongo etano, ekiagera barigereretie Esanduku eria. Abanto bakaba bakorera na kweumia, ekiagera Omonene aitete abanto abange ase egati yabo." 
1Samuel6:20 Erio abanto ba Beti‐Semesi bakabora, “Ning’o oranyare gotenena ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oyo Omochenu? Nase banto ki aragende gakorua asetore?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Ase igo bagatoma abanto ase baria bemenyete Kiriati‐Yearimu babatebie ng’a, “Abafilisti bairanirie Esanduku eria y’Omonene. Tirimboka gocha moyioyie.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Abanto ba Kiriati‐Yearimu bagacha, bakaira Esanduku eria y’Omonene, bakayebeka ase enyomba y’Abinadabu, ase ekegoro igoro; bagachora na gwatanana Eleazari, omwana oye omomura, abe okorenda Esanduku eria." 
1Samuel7:2 Korwa engaki eyio Esanduku eria y’Omonene ekabeera agwo Kiriati-Yearimu ase engaki entambe, emiaka emerongo ebere. Ase engaki eyio yonsi, Abaisraeli bonsi bakaba bakorera ase Omonene ng’a abakonye." 
1Samuel7:3 Erio Samweli agatebia Abaisraeli bonsi, “Onye mogochia koonchoka na koirana ase Omonene ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, morusie korwa asemore chinyasae chingeni chionsi, amo n’Asitaroti, mokorere Omonene bweka; erio nario arabatoorie korwa ase amaboko ’Abafilisti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Erio Abaisraeli bakarusia korwa asebare chinyasae chiria Baali na Asitaroti, bakamokorera Omonene bweka." 
1Samuel7:5 Samweli agateba, “Sangereria Abaisraeli bonsi agwo Misipa, erinde imbasabere aroro ase Omonene.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Abanto bagasangererekana agwo Misipa, bakabuucha amache, bakayaumora agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, bakeng’ata ase rituko erio, bagakwana aroro agwo, “Twakorire ebibe ase Omonene.” Erio Samweli akaba okogambera Abaisraeli agwo Misipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Ekero Abafilisti baigwete ng’a Abaisraeli basangererekanire agwo Misipa, abanene b’Abafilisti bakagenda gochia kobarwania. Abaisraeli bagachia koigwa amang’ana ayio, bakabairoka," 
1Samuel7:8 bagatebia Samweli, “Tobaisa gotiga kogenderera gotosabera ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, ng’a atotoorie korwa ase amaboko ’Abafilisti.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Erio Samweli akaimokia emanwa y’eng’ondi ekogonka, akayerua ase Omonene ekaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ekegima, agasabera Abaisraeli ase Omonene, na Omonene akaigwa ogosaba kwaye." 
1Samuel7:10 Ekero Samweli arenge korua ekeng’wanso keria ki’ogosambwa, Abafilisti bagacha korwania Abaisraeli, korende Omonene akabarentera okogukura okonene gwe chinkoba korwa igoro, akabatantania, na Abaisraeli bakabua Abafilisti." 
1Samuel7:11 Abaisraeli bakaimoka korwa agwo Misipa, bakabwatia Abafilisti goika Beti‐Kari, bakabaitera inchera." 
1Samuel7:12 Erio Samweli akaimokia rigena, akaritenenia gati ya Misipa na Seni, akariroka Ebeni‐Eseri, akabora, “Omonene otokonyire twaikire aiga.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Naboigo Abafilisti bakabugwa, tibanyora ribaga naende gosoa ase ense y’Abaisraeli. Okoboko kw’Omonene nigo kwarenge mamincha y’Abafilisti ase amatuko onsi Samweli arenge moyo." 
1Samuel7:14 Emechie yonsi egati y’Ekironi na Gati, eyio Abafilisti konya baurire Abaisraeli, ekairanigwa amo ne chingongo chiaetanaineo. Agwo boigo omorembe okaba ase egati y’Abaisraeli na Abaamori." 
1Samuel7:15 Samweli akaba omogambi ebina bw’Abaisraeli ase amatuko onsi arenge moyo. 
1Samuel7:16 Kera omwaka akaba okogenda goika Beteli, na Giligali, na Misipa, akaba okogambera Abaisraeli ebina ase emechie eyio yonsi." 
1Samuel7:17 Erio akaba okoirana Rama, ekiagera agwo nao bwoye orenge, na agwo akaba okogamba ebina bi’Abaisraeli, naende akaagachera Omonene egesasimero." 
1Samuel8:1 Ekero Samweli konya agotire akabeka abamura baye babe abagambi igoro y’Abaisraeli. 
1Samuel8:2 Omomura oye omotangi nigo are korokwa Yoeli, na oyo o kabere Abiya. Barabwo nigo babete abagambi agwo Beeri‐Seba." 
1Samuel8:3 Korende abamura ba Samweli tibakorete buna ise arenge gokora ase okobwatia oboronge; bakabotiga na bakerigeria chinibo, bakarigia riaaki na bakaonchorana oboronge." 
1Samuel8:4 Erio abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli bagasangererekana amo, bakagenda ase Samweli agwo Rama," 
1Samuel8:5 bakamotebia, “Rora bono aye kwagotire, na abamura bao tibari kobwatia chinchera chiao. Ase ayio tochorere omoruoti oranyare gotogambera buna ebisaku binde bionsi bibwate abaruoti.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Korende Samweli tancha amang’ana ayio bamotebetie, “Toe omoruoti atogambere.” Ase ayio Samweli agasaba Omonene." 
1Samuel8:7 Erio Omonene akamotebia, “Otegerere amang’ana abo baragotebie. Tari aye bangire, korende ninche bangire, timba omoruoti obo." 
1Samuel8:8 Korwa ekero keria nabarusetie Misiri goika rero iga bantigire inche, babeire bagokorera chinyasae ching’ao, na bono bagotigire aye buna bantigete inche." 
1Samuel8:9 Gaki bono, igwera amang’ana abo, korende obakurere mono, obatebie aya omoruoti orache kobagambera arabe ogokora.”"
