1Samuel8:10 Ase igo Samweli agatebia abanto baria baganetie omoruoti amang’ana onsi Omonene amotebetie. 
1Samuel8:11 Akabatebia, “Aya naro omoruoti oyio orabagambere arabakorere: Naire abana baino abamura, ababeke ase chigari chiaye, na abande ababeke babe abariini be chibarasi chiaye bamokorere. Abande babetererigwe baminyoke bosio bwe chigari chiaye." 
1Samuel8:12 Abande babekwe babe abatang’ani b’abarwani chilifu, na abande b’emerongo etano. Abande babe bakorema emegondo yaye na kogesa endagera yaye, abande babe bakoroisia ebirwanero bi’esegi na ebikorero bie chigari chiaye." 
1Samuel8:13 Naire abaiseke baino bachie koba abaroisia amaguta akweakwa, abande babe bakoruga endagera na koroisia emegati." 
1Samuel8:14 Naire na emegondo yaino y’endagera, na ey’emesabibu, na ey’emezeituni eyere emiya mono, ayee abasomba baye." 
1Samuel8:15 Narusie ensemo ya ikomi korwa ase rigesa riaino ri’emegondo y’endagera, na ey’emesabibu, ayee abwo bakomorenda, na abasomba baye." 
1Samuel8:16 Boigo naire abasomba baino, abamura na abaiseke, na abasae baino abaya, babe bakomokorera, ne chitigere chiaino chibe chikomokorera boigo." 
1Samuel8:17 Naende arusie ensemo ya ikomi y’amaicho aino, nainwe abanyene mobe abasomba baye." 
1Samuel8:18 Ase engaki eyio namobe mokorera nobororo ase engencho y’omoruoti oino, oyio mwechorerete, korende Omonene takoba ogotegerera okorera kwaino.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Korende abanto bakaanga gotegerera Samweli, bakabora, “Yaya, taibo! Nigo toganetie omoruoti atogambere." 
1Samuel8:20 Ntorigetie koba buna ebisaku binde; ntoganetie omoruoti ogotogambera na gototang’ana, ekero togochia korwana chisegi chiaito.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Ekero Samweli aigwete amang’ana aya abanto bakwanire, akayaira ase Omonene." 
1Samuel8:22 Omonene agatebia Samweli, “Igwera amang’ana abo, obachorere omoruoti.” Erio Samweli agatebia Abaisraeli bairane, kera omonto ase omochie oye." 
1Samuel9:1 Ase egesaku kia Benjamin narengeo omonto oyomo ore korokwa Kisi, mosinto bw’Abieli, o Serori, o Bekorati bw’Afia, omonto bw’egesaku kia Benjamin. Kisi nigo arenge omonto omonda." 
1Samuel9:2 Nabwate omwana omomura ore korokwa Saulo. Ere nigo arenge omonyakieni mono. Momura onde tarenge ase egati y’Abaisraeli obwate ekieni ekiya komobua. Ere nigo aetanetie abanto bande bonsi ase obotambe bw’omotwe korwa ase amareko gochia igoro. 
1Samuel9:3 Bono chitigere chia Kisi, ise Saulo, chigasira. Ase igo Kisi agatebia Saulo, “Imoka oire oyomo bw’abasomba, mogende korigia chitigere.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Bakagenda, bagaeta ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, na ense ya Salisa, korende tibachinyora. Naende bagaeta ase ense ya Saalimu, korende chitigere echio tichiarengeo. Nyuma y’ayio bagaeta ase orogongo rwa Benjamin, nonya naroro tibachinyora." 
1Samuel9:5 Ekero baigete ase ense ya Sufu, Saulo agatebia omosomba oria barenge komo, “Bono tiga toirane gochia nka. Ande nigo tata aratige korengereria igoro ye chitigere, ne ribaga ri’ayio abe ogotochandekera intwe.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Omosomba oria akamoiraneria, “Rora, ase omochie oyo omonto o Nyasae nareo, ere nomonto osikire; amang’ana onsi agokwana nigo agoikerana. Eta togende aroro, ande nabo aratotebie amang’ana igoro y’orogendo rwaito.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Saulo akaboria omosomba oye, “Onye tokogenda ase omonto oyio, inki tobwate tokomoirera? Endagera twabwate ase ebibekerero biaito yaerire, na keegwa kende titobwati tokoirera omonto oyio o Nyasae. Ninki tobwate?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Omosomba oria akamoiraneria naende, “Rora, nimbwate aa akang’ese gi’esekeli y’efeta. Eye ning’ee omonto oria o Nyasae, erinde atotebie enchera tokogenda.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (Agwo kare ase Abaisraeli, ekero omonto arenge kogenda koboria ring’ana korwa ase Nyasae nigo arenge goteba, “Inchuo togende ase omorori.” Omonto okorokwa omobani bono, kare nigo arenge korokwa omorori.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Saulo agatebia omosomba oye, “Gwatebire buya; inchuo togende.” Ase igo bakagenda ase omochie ase omonto oyio o Nyasae arenge." 
1Samuel9:11 Ekero barenge gotiira ekegoro gochia ase omochie, bakaumerana nabaiseke baare kogenda kobuucha amache, bakababoria, “Inee! Omorori nao are aa?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Abaiseke baria bakabairaneria, “Ee, nao are aa, oyio bosio bwaino. Genda bwango momonyore. Mbono achire ase omochie, ekiagera abanto ngochia bare korua ebing’wanso agwo ase ekegoro igoro." 
1Samuel9:13 Ekero mogosoa ase omochie namomonyore ritang’ani ataratiira gochia ase ekegoro koragera. Abanto tibakoragera ritang’ani ataraikao, ekiagera ere goika asesenie ekeng’wanso keria. Erio baria barangeirie banyare gochaka koragera. Ase ayio, genda bwango, ekiagera ase engaki eye nero moramonyore.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Ase ayio bakagenda ase omochie. Ekero barenge gosoa aroro bakarora Samweli ogocha koumerana nabarabwo, ekero arenge gotiira gochia aase agwo bakoruera ebing’wanso." 
1Samuel9:15 Bono rituko erimo, ekero Saulo ataracha aroro, Omonene konya omoorokeirie Samweli na omotebirie," 
1Samuel9:16 “Ankio engaki buna eye ninkorentere omonto korwa ase orogongo rwa Benjamin, naye omoake amaguta, erinde abe omonene igoro y’abanto baane Abaisraeli. Nere oratoorie abanto baane korwa ase amaboko ’Abafilisti, ekiagera narorire emechando y’abanto baane, na ekerero kiabo giaikire asende.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Ekero Samweli aroche Saulo, Omonene akamotebia, “Omonto oyio nere nagotebia amang’ana aye. Oyo nere orabe okogambera abanto baane.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Erio Saulo akamochiera Samweli agwo ase egeita, akamotebia, “Koranche ontebie ase omorori amenyete.”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samweli akamoiraneria, “Ninche omorori oyio. Genda motang’ane gochia aase agwo ebing’wanso bikoruerwa, ekiagera rero namorie endagera aroro amo nainche. Ankio ninkoe ribaga ogende, na inche ngotebie amang’ana onsi are ase ebirengererio biao." 
1Samuel9:20 Tochandeka ase engencho ye chitigere chiria chiasirete korwa ase amatuko atato aetire, ekiagera echio chianyorekanire. Inee! Ebinto bionsi ebiya bire ase egati y’Abaisraeli nase ng’o birabe? Nigo birabe asore na ase abanto bonsi b’enyomba ya iso.”" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo akairaneria akabora, “Inche nomonto bw’egesaku kia Benjamin egesaku egeke mono ase Abaisraeli, na eamate yane nero nenke mono ase chiamate chionsi chi’egesaku ekio. Nase ki rende gwakwanire asende ring’ana ringa buna erio?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Erio Samweli akaira Saulo amo nomosomba oye, akabasoyia ase enyomba y’abageni, akabaikaransia aase ay’amasikani, ase egati y’abageni bande emerongo etato." 
1Samuel9:23 Samweli agatebia omorugi bwe chindagera, “Renta egetari keria nakoa, nkagotebia ng’a okegache ensemo ao.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Ase ayio omorugi oria bwe chindagera akaimokia ekenama keria ekiya, agakebeka bosio bwa Saulo. Samweli agatebia Saulo, “Rora egetari eke kiagachetwe, kiabekirwe ase obosio bwao; okerie, ekiagera naye gwakegacheretwe ng’a oche gokeria ase engaki eyio ekero abageni barangerigwe.” Ase igo Saulo akaragera na Samweli ase rituko erio." 
1Samuel9:25 Ekero batirimbogete korwa aase aria ase ebing’wanso biare koruerwa, bakagenda mwa Samweli kerama igoro, na aroro agwo Samweli akagosoria na Saulo." 
1Samuel9:26 Ekero bwachia gokiamoka, Samweli akarangeria Saulo oyorenge ase ekerama igoro, akabora, “Imoka ngokoobe, ogende ase orogendo rwao.” Saulo akaimoka, na barabwo babere bakagenda bare amo." 
1Samuel9:27 Ekero baikire ang’e nensinyo y’omochie, Samweli agatebia Saulo, “Tebia omosomba oo aete atang’ane.” Omosomba oria akagenda bosio, na Samweli agatebia Saulo, “Beera aiga ake igo, na inche ningotebie amang’ana aya Nyasae akwanire.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Erio Samueli akaimokia echuba y’amaguta, akaumorera Saulo ase omotwe, akamonyunyunta, akamotebia, “Omonene ogoakire amaguta obe omotang’ani bw’Abaisraeli, abanto baye. Aye nogambere abanto b’Omonene na kobatooria korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa babo babaetanaine. Eke nakio kerabe ekemanyererio asore ng’a Omonene ogoakire amaguta ng’a obe omotang’ani igoro ase abanto bare omwando oye:" 
1Samuel10:2 Ekero okorua aa asende rero noumerane nabanto babere ang’e nembeera ya Raeli, ase orogongo rwa Benjamin ase Selisa. Barabwo nigo baragotebie ng’a chitigere chiria mwagendete korigia chiatokire. Iso otigire gochichandekera, na bono naye achandekerete, ogoteba: Naki ndakore indore omwana one?" 
1Samuel10:3 Erio norueo, ogenderere orogendo, oike ase omote onga buna omotontera ore agwo Tabori. Aroro agwo noumerane nabanto batato bagotiira gochia gosasima Nyasae agwo Beteli. Oyomo obo nabe obwate chimanwa chie chimbori isato, na oyonde obogoretie emegati etato, na oyonde ekerandi keroisirie korwa ase risankwa kere nedivai." 
1Samuel10:4 Barabwo mbagokwanie, bakoe emegati ebere, noyianche, oyebogorie korwa ase amaboko abo." 
1Samuel10:5 Nyuma y’ayio nogende gochia ekegoro kia Nyasae agwo Gibea, ase egetwori ki’Abafilisti kere. Agwo ase egesoero ki’omochie noumerane nekeombe ki’ababani bagotirimboka korwa ase ekegoro aase agwo ebing’wanso bikoruerwa, babe bakobugia amakano ne chikonu, na ebiroria, na amakano ’ebirigisa. Barabwo mbabe bakobaboka ase okobana." 
1Samuel10:6 Erio Omoika bw’Omonene noche igoro yao ne chinguru; naye nobane amo nabarabwo, na oonchorwe obe kore ne chingencho ching’ao." 
1Samuel10:7 Bono ekero ebimanyererio ebio birakoreke asore, okore rinde rionsi orarore, ekiagera Nyasae nigo are amo naye." 
1Samuel10:8 Erio ontang’anere gotirimboka gochia Giligali. Inche ninchiche aroro asore ase okorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebi’omorembe. Onganye aroro ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere goika inchiche asore, nkworokie aya ogwenerete gokora.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Ekaba ekero Saulo eonchorete gotigana na Samweli, Nyasae akaa Saulo enkoro ere ne chingencho ching’ao, na ebimanyererio biria bionsi bigakoreka ase rituko riria." 
1Samuel10:10 Ekero Saulo amo nomosomba oye baigete Gibea, ekeombe ekenene ki’ababani gekaumerana nere. Omoika o Nyasae ogacha igoro asare ne chinguru, nere agachaka kobaboka ase okobana ase egati y’ababani baria." 
1Samuel10:11 Abanto bonsi abwo konya bamomanyete agwo ritang’ani, ekero bamoroche okobana amo nababani baria, bagakwana barabwo ase barabwo, “Mang’ana ki aya amonyorire omwana o Kisi? Inee! Saulo nere nabeire oyomo bw’ababani?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Omonto omenyete aase aria akaboria, “Ise nere ng’o?” Ase engencho eyio amang’ana akaba agokwanwa iga: “Inee! Saulo nere nabeire oyomo bw’ababani?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Ekero Saulo akoorire kobaboka ase okobana, agatiira gochia ase ekegoro aase ebing’wanso biare koruerwa." 
1Samuel10:14 Ise moke Saulo akaboria Saulo na omosomba oye, “Ng’ai mwachiete?” Saulo akairaneria, “Nechitigere twagendete korigia, na ekero totachinyorete, tokagenda ase Samweli.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Ise moke akamotebia, “Koranche ontebie aya Samweli abatebetie.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo akamoiraneria, “Nigo atotebetie boronge ng’a chitigere chianyorekanire.” Korende amang’ana aya Samweli akwanete igoro y’oboruoti tamoyatebetie." 
1Samuel10:17 Erio Samweli akarangeria Abaisraeli basangererekane amo ase obosio bw’Omonene agwo Misipa," 
1Samuel10:18 akabatebia, “Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, otebire iga: Inche nigo nabang’anyetie korwa Misiri, nkabatooria korwa ase amaboko ’abanto b’amaruoti ande onsi, abwo barenge kobachanda." 
1Samuel10:19 Korende bono mwangire Nyasae oino oria obatooretie korwa ase obokong’u bwonsi na ogochandwa, mwatebire ng’a: Tobekere omoruoti atogambere. Gaki bono sangererekana ase obosio bw’Omonene, egesaku ase egesaku, na eamate ase eamate.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Ase igo Samweli akarenta ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli ang’e, na egesaku kia Benjamin kegachorwa ase ogoakerwa obomera." 
1Samuel10:21 Ekero arentire egesaku kia Benjamin ang’e, obomera bokagwera eamate ya Matiri, na ase eamate ya Matiri obomera bokagwera Saulo, omomura o Kisi, korende abanto bagachia komorigia tibamonyora." 
1Samuel10:22 Erio naende bakaboria Omonene, “Inee! Omonto oyio nachete aa?” Omonene akairaneria, “Rigereria oyio bwebisete ase ebinto bikogachwa.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Ase ayio bakaminyoka bakamorusia aroro, na ekero atenenete ase egati y’abanto bamoroche ng’a naetanetie abanto bande bonsi ase obotambe bw’omotwe korwa amareko gochia igoro." 
1Samuel10:24 Samweli agatebia abanto bonsi, “Aiga moroche ere oyio Omonene achorire. Monto onde tari aa ase egati y’abanto aba bonsi omoreng’aine.” Erio abanto bonsi bagaaka eriogi, bakabora, “Omoruoti oyo achie kare!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Erio Samweli agatebia abanto buna oboruoti bogwenerete kogambwa, na akarika emeroberio eyio ase ebuku akayebeka ase obosio bw’Omonene. Nyuma y’ayio Samweli akaa abanto ribaga, kera oyomo agende inka bwoye." 
1Samuel10:26 Saulo nere akagenda nka bwoye aria Gibea. Abanto bande abanene, abwo Nyasae konya akwanire ne chinkoro chiabo, bakamotunyana." 
1Samuel10:27 Korende abanto bande abarenge ababe bakabora, “Naki oyo arakore atotoorie?” Barabwo bakamochaya, tibamoirera biegwa binde. Korende ere akaba buna taigwete aya bakwanete." 
1Samuel11:1 Nahasi Omoamoni akagenda, agaetanana Yabesi ase ense ya Gileadi koyorwania esegi. Abanto bonsi ba Yabesi bakamotebia, “Kora okobwatana naintwe, erio tobe inse asore togokorere.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Nahasi akabairaneria, “Ninkore okobwatana nainwe komoranche ng’a ndusie eriso ria borio ria kera oyomo oino, erinde ndetere Abaisraeli bonsi obosooku.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Abagaaka ba Yabesi bakamotebia, “Toe ribaga ri’amatuko atano na abere, erinde totome abanto ase chingongo chionsi chi’Abaisraeli. Onde atatogeti oratotoorie, rirorio twerue asore.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Abatomwa baria bagaika Gibea ase Saulo amenyete, bagatebia abanto b’aroro amang’ana ayio, na abanto bonsi bakarera mono." 
1Samuel11:5 Ase ekero ekio Saulo nigo arenge ogocha korwa mogondo ogotema chiombe chiaye, akaboria, “Inki kiaba abanto aba bakorera iga?” Ase ayio bakamotebia amang’ana aria abanto ba Yabesi barentete." 
1Samuel11:6 Ekero Saulo aigwete amang’ana ayio, Omoika o Nyasae ogacha igoro asare, okamobeka chinguru; erio Saulo akaba nendamwamu enene." 
1Samuel11:7 Akabwata chiombe ibere, agachinachana ebing’ese, erio akaa abanto ebing’ese biria, nabarabwo bakabiira ase chingongo chionsi chi’Abaisraeli, bagateba amang’ana aye, “Omonto onde bwensi otambwateti inche Saulo amo na Samweli, chiombe chiaye nabo chiranachanwe iga.” Erio omoondoko bw’Omonene okabwata abanto, nabarabwo bagacha amo buna omonto oyomo." 
1Samuel11:8 Ekero Saulo abarete Abaisraeli agwo Bezeki, nigo barenge chilifu amagana atato (300,000), na Abayuda chilifu emerongo etato (30,000)." 
1Samuel11:9 Agatebia abanto baria batometwe, “Motebie abanto ba Yabesi o Gileadi: Ankio mobaso gati namonyore obosibore.” Abatomwa baria bakairana, bagatebia abanto ba Yabesi amang’ana ayio, na barabwo bakaba nomogoko omonene," 
1Samuel11:10 bagatebia Abaamoni, “Ankio inatwerue asemore, motokorere ande onsi morarore arabe buya asemore.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Rituko ria kabere Saulo akaroberia abanto baye ase ebiombe bitato, na barabwo bagacha mambia kobogokiamoka, bagasoa ase egetwori ki’Abaamoni, bakabaita kogenderera goika mobaso gati. Abwo batigarete bagesiarera, gose onde tatigara ore nonde amo." 
1Samuel11:12 Erio Abaisraeli bagatebia Samweli, “Mbarabi baria bakanete ng’a Saulo takobagambera. Renta abanto abwo, tobaite.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Korende Saulo agakana, agateba, “Monto onde tari oraitwe ase rituko ria rero, ekiagera Omonene orentire obobui ase Abaisraeli.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Samweli agatebia abanto, “Inchuo togende Giligali, erinde toirore oboruoti obo tobokore bobe oboyia.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Ase igo abanto bonsi bakagenda Giligali, na aroro agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene bakabeka Saulo akaba omoruoti. Boigo bakarua ebing’wanso bi’omorembe agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, na Saulo amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakaba nomogoko omonene mono." 
1Samuel12:1 Samweli agatebia Abaisraeli bonsi, “Rora, nabeire nkoigwa amang’ana aino; nakorire aya mwamboria, nabekire omoruoti orabagambere." 
1Samuel12:2 Bono omoruoti oino oyio orabaraae. Inche bono nagotire, namerire chimbuche; abamura baane nigo bare amo nainwe. Inche nabeire nkobaraa korwa obosae bwane goika rero iga." 
1Samuel12:3 Bono inche nao inde aa. Inwe mobe kirori asende ase obosio bw’Omonene na obw’omoakwa amaguta oye. Inee! Neng’ombe ya ng’o nairete? Gose netigere ya ng’o nairete? Ning’o naureretie, gose nakorerete bobe? Gose nkorwa ase okoboko kwa ng’o naetwe riaaki rikang’ukoria amaiso aane? Onye nakorete ayio, nimbairanerie ebio nairete.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Abanto bakairaneria, “Aye tigwatoriananetie kende, gose tigwatokorerete bobe, gose tikwairete gento ki’omonto onde bwensi.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Samweli akabatebia, “Rituko ria rero Omonene nigo are kirori asemore, boigo omoakwa amaguta oye nigo are kirori ng’a inwe timonyoreti gento kende gionsi ase okoboko kwane.” Barabwo bakairaneria, “Ee, Omonene nere kirori.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samweli agatebia abanto, “Omonene, oria ochorete Musa na Haroni, naende akarenta chisokoro chiaino korwa ase ense ya Misiri, nere kirori." 
1Samuel12:7 Gaki bono tenena, mokire‐kiri, erinde mbasoere ase obosio bw’Omonene ase okobainyoria ogokora gwonsi okoronge, okwo Omonene abakorerete inwe ne chisokoro chiaino." 
1Samuel12:8 Ekero Yakobo asoete Misiri, na Abamisiri bakabachanda, chisokoro chiaino chikarera ase Omonene ng’a achikonye, na Omonene agatoma Musa na Haroni. Barabwo bakabang’anyia korwa Misiri, bakabarenta bamenye ase ense eye." 
1Samuel12:9 Korende barabwo bakeba Omonene, Nyasae obo. Ase igo ere akababeka ase amaboko a Sisera, omotang’ani bw’abarwani b’omochie o Hazori na ay’Abafilisti, na ay’omoruoti bw’Abamoabu, nabarabwo bakabarwania." 
1Samuel12:10 Ase igo bakarera ase Omonene, bakabora; Twakorire ebibe, ekiagera twatigire Omonene; twakoreire chinyasae chiria chikorokwa Baali na Asitaroti. Bono totoorie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baito, naintwe ntogokorere aye." 
1Samuel12:11 Erio Omonene agatoma Yeruba‐Baali, na Baraki, na Yefita, na inche Samweli, akabatooria korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baino babaetanaine, nainwe mokaba mokomenya ase obotoereru." 
1Samuel12:12 Korende ekero mwaroche Nahasi, omoruoti bw’Abaamoni, ogocha kobarwania mogantebia: Ntorigetie omoruoti oratogambere, nonya Omonene orenge omoruoti oino." 
1Samuel12:13 “Gaki bono morigererie omoruoti oino mwachorire, oyo mwaboria moegwe. Rora, Omonene obekire omoruoti abagambere." 
1Samuel12:14 Komoramoiroke Omonene na komokorera, na koigwa eriogi riaye, na timwanga koigwera amachiko aye, naende onye inwe amo nomoruoti oyo okobagambera mokomotunyana Omonene, Nyasae oino, rirorio nebe buya." 
1Samuel12:15 Motaigwereti eriogi ri’Omonene, korende mokwanga koigwera amachiko aya, rirorio okoboko kwaye nigo korabe mamincha yaino buna kwarenge mamincha ye chisokoro chiaino." 
1Samuel12:16 Bono tenena, mokire‐kiri, morore ring’ana eri rinene Omonene arakore ase amaiso aino." 
1Samuel12:17 Inee! Bono tari engaki ye rigesa ri’engano? Nonya nabo nimosabe Omonene arente enkoba na embura, erinde momanye ng’a mwakorire obobe obonene ase okoboria ng’a moegwe omoruoti.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Ase igo Samweli agasaba Omonene, nere agatoma enkoba na embura ase rituko riria. Abanto bonsi bakoboa Omonene, bakoboa na Samweli." 
1Samuel12:19 Bagatebia Samweli, “Tosabere intwe, abasomba bao, ase Omonene, Nyasae oo, erinde titokwa. Twarorire ng’a amo nebibe biaito bionsi twamentire ebibe binde ebiaao bi’okoboria ng’a toegwe omoruoti.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samweli akabairaneria, “Timwoboa! Amaene, mwakorire amabe aya onsi, korende nonya nabo, timobaisa koonchoka gochia ensemo na gotiga koigwera Omonene, korende momokorere ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi." 
1Samuel12:21 Timoonchokera chinyasae chire bosa chitanyare kobakonya gose kobatooria, ekiagera nigo chire bosa." 
1Samuel12:22 Ase engencho y’erieta riaye Omonene takobaanga inwe abanto baye, ekiagera nigo anchete kobakora mobe abaye." 
1Samuel12:23 Amang’ana ayio abe aare nainche ng’a ninkore ebibe ase Omonene ase ogotiga kobasabera inwe. Ribaga ri’ayio nimborokie enchera ere engiya na endonge. 
1Samuel12:24 Moiroke Omonene bweka, momokorere ase obwegenwa bwe chinkoro chiaino chionsi, mobe mokoinyora aya onsi amanene abakoreire." 
1Samuel12:25 Korende onye mokogenderera gokora ebibe, rirorio nigo morasirigwe amo nomoruoti oino.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Saulo konya ogambire omwaka oyomo, na omwaka o kabere ekero agendererete kogambera Abaisraeli," 
1Samuel13:2 agachora abanto chilifu isato. Ase abwo abanto chilifu ibere bakaba amo nere agwo Mikimasi na ase ense y’ebitunwa ya Beteli, na abanto elifu eyemo bakaba amo na Yonathani aaria Gibea, ase orogongo rwa Benjamin. Abatigarete akabaa ribaga bakagenda kera omonto nka bwoye." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonathani agaita omotang’ani bw’abarwani b’Abafilisti agwo Gibea, na Abafilisti bakaigwa amang’ana ayio. Saulo akabugia egetureri ase ense eria yonsi, agateba, “Tiga Abaibirania baigwe.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Ase igo Abaisraeli bonsi bakaigwa amang’ana agokwanwa ng’a Saulo oitire omotang’ani bw’abarwani b’Abafilisti, naende ng’a Abaisraeli babeire okogechia ase Abafilisti. Abanto bakarangerigwa babwatane na Saulo bagende Giligali." 
1Samuel13:5 Erio Abafilisti bagasangererekana amo barwanie Abaisraeli. Nigo barenge ne chigari chilifu emerongo etato (30,000), na abariini chibarasi chilifu isano nemo (6,000), na abarwani bande abange buna omokenye ore engegu y’enyancha. Barabwo bagacha, bagatoora agwo Mikimasi, moocha ya Beti‐Aveni." 
1Samuel13:6 Abaisraeli bagachia korora ng’a bamigirwe nobokong’u, bagatang’ang’a na kwebisa ase amabwago, na ase chinsana na ebitare ime, nonya nase chingoro na ase amakuruma." 
1Samuel13:7 Abaibirania bande bakaamboka Yorodan, bakagenda ase ense ya Gadi na Gileadi. Korende Saulo ere nao atigarete agwo Giligali, na abanto bonsi abamotunyanete baare koiguswa ase obwoba." 
1Samuel13:8 Saulo akaganya Samweli amatuko atano na abere, buna Samweli konya amotebirie, na ekiagera Samweli atebanete abanto bagachaka goserebekana na gotiga Saulo." 
1Samuel13:9 Ase igo Saulo agateba, “Ndetere aa ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa na eki’omorembe.” Erio akarua ekeng’wanso keria ki’ogosambwa." 
1Samuel13:10 Erio agwo ekero akoorire korua ekeng’wanso keria, Samweli agacha. Saulo akagenda komorotota na komokwania." 
1Samuel13:11 Samweli akamoboria, “Inki eke gwakorire?” Saulo akamoiraneria, “Nigo narora ng’a abanto ngotama bare korwa asende, naende naye gwatebana, tocheti ase engaki eria gwatebete ng’a nochiche. Boigo Abafilisti konya basangererekanire agwo Mikimasi." 
1Samuel13:12 Erio nkarengereria: Bono Abafilisti mbabaise gocha asende aa Giligali ritang’ani ntaraboria ogwancherwa korwa ase Omonene. Ase igo ayio akambetereria korua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa.” 
1Samuel13:13 Samweli akamotebia, “Gwakorire egento ki’oboriri. Tikwabwatete ogochika okwo Omonene, Nyasae oo, akoete. Onye nkwaigwerete, Omonene anga nakora oboruoti bwao bobe obokong’u, bogenderere kobao botambe ase Abaisraeli." 
1Samuel13:14 Korende bono oboruoti bwao tibokogenderera. Omonene bwerigeirie omonto onde omogokirie ase enkoro yaye, omochikire ng’a abe okogambera abanto baye, ekiagera aye toigwereti aya Omonene agochigete.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Erio Samweli akaimoka, akarua Giligali, akagenda Gibea ase orogongo rwa Benjamin. Na Saulo akabara abanto abatigarete amo nere, na barabwo nigo barenge koreng’ana amagana atano na rimo." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulo, na Yonathani momura oye, amo nabanto barenge amo nabarabwo bakabeera agwo Geba o Benjamin, korende Abafilisti bagatoora agwo Mikimasi." 
1Samuel13:17 Ebiombe bitato bi’abarwani bikarua ase egetwori ki’Abafilisti; ekeombe ekemo gekaonchoka gochia Ofura, ase ense ya Sauli," 
1Samuel13:18 na egia kabere gekagenda Beti‐Horoni, na ekende gochia ase orobebe rorochie Rikura ria Seboimu na erooro." 
1Samuel13:19 Ase engaki eria omoturi ebioma tarenge ase ense yonsi y’Abaisraeli, ekiagera Abafilisti nigo boboete ng’a Abaisraeli mbabaise gweturera emioro gose amatimo." 
1Samuel13:20 Korende kera oyomo bw’Abaisraeli, oyo oganetie gotieria obokombe bwaye, gose ekoyo, gose egesire, gose omoyio oye, goika agende ase Abafilisti." 
1Samuel13:21 Nigo barenge goakana ekeng’ese gi’esekeli ase ogotiererigwa obokombe na ekoyo, na ebing’ese bibere bi’esekeli, ase ogotiererigwa egesire, na kogechoma ase ogokerambora." 
1Samuel13:22 Bono ase rituko ri’esegi onde tarenge ase abarwani ba Saulo na Yonathani, nonya noyomo, obwate omoro gose ritimo. Saulo bweka na Yonathani, momoura oye, nabwo barenge nabio." 
1Samuel13:23 Ekeombe ki’abarwani b’Abafilisti kegatomwa korenda enchera egochia ase Mikimasi. 
1Samuel14:1 Rituko erimo Yonathani, omomura o Saulo, agatebia omomura oyorenge komobogoreria ebirwanero. “Inchuo togende gochia ase eburi y’abarwani b’Abafilisti korwa ensinyo ngumbu.” Korende tatebetie ise amang’ana ayio." 
1Samuel14:2 Saulo nigo arenge otoorete ase orobebe rwa Gibea inse y’omote okorokwa omokomomanga agwo Migironi, na abanto abarenge amo nere nigo barenge koreng’ana amagana atano na rimo (600)." 
1Samuel14:3 Oyo orenge kobogoria egesibao ki’obokuani nere Ahia, mosinto bw’Ahitubu, momura omwabo Ikabodi. Ahitubu nere orenge mosinto o Finehasi o Eli, omokuani bw’Omonene agwo Silo. Abanto tibamanyete ng’a Yonathani konya ochiire." 
1Samuel14:4 Agwo ase Yonathani arigetie goetera ase ogoika eburi y’Abafilisti mbiarengeo ebitare bibere ebioge, ekemo kera ensemo y’oboeto. Ekemo kiarenge korokwa Bosesei na ekende Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Egetare ekemo nigo giachongororogete ensemo ya sugusu kororia Mikimasi, na ekende ensemo ya irianyi kororia Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonathani agatebia omomura oria omobogoreretie ebirwanero. “Inchuo togende gochia ng’umbu ase eburi y’abanto aba batarogeti. Ande nabo Omonene arakore egento asetore. Kende tikeri keratange Omonene tatokonya tobue, gatorabe abake gose abange.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Omomura oria akamoiraneria, “Kora onsi ayare ase ebirengererio biao. Genda, inche nigo inde amo naye, ninkore buna oganetie.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Erio Yonathani akamotebia, “Twamboke gochia aroro, tweorokie ase abanto aba." 
1Samuel14:9 Kobaratotebie: Tenena agwo moganye, intwe tochiche asemore; erio totenene aase aito, titogenda asebare." 
1Samuel14:10 Korende kobaratotebie: Inchuo, tiira gocha aa asetore, erio totiire, ekiagera ekio nakio kerabe ekemanyererio asetore ng’a Omonene obabekire ase amaboko aito.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Ase igo barabwo babere bakeorokia ase Abafilisti abwo barenge ase eburi, na barabwo bagateba, “Rigereria, Abaibirania abwo bagosoka korwa ase chingoro ase bebisete.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Erio abarendi babo b’eburi bakarangeria Yonathani amo nomobogoreria bw’ebirwanero biaye, bakabatebia, “Inchuo tiira gocha aa asetore, tobatebie ring’ana.” Yonathani agatebia omomura oria, “Mbwatie, totiire gochia aroro, ekiagera Omonene obabekire ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Bono Yonathani akagura gotiira namaboko na amagoro, na omobogoreria bw’ebirwanero biaye akamobwatia korwa nyuma, Yonathani agaakera Abafilisti inse, na omomura oria orenge komobwatia korwa nyuma, akabaita." 
1Samuel14:14 Ase ogoita okwo kwe ritang’ani, okwo Yonathani na omomura oria bakorete, nigo baitete abanto koreng’ana emerongo ebere ase egetii kiarenge keng’ana ekeng’ese ki’omogondo oremire ne chiombe ibere ase rituko erimo." 
1Samuel14:15 Omoondoko ogasoa ase abanto bonsi b’egetwori agwo ase egetii. Abanto b’eburi amo nabwo barenge abasakori, bonsi bagatengechigwa nomoondoko; goika nonya nense egatengechigwa. Omoondoko oria omonene nigo orwete ase Omonene." 
1Samuel14:16 Abarendi ba Saulo abarendete agwo Gibea ase orogongo rwa Benjamin bakarora Abafilisti baburukanire na goserebekana, bakominyoka gochia aaria na aaria." 
1Samuel14:17 Erio Saulo agatebia abanto abwo barenge nere, “Bara abanto morore gose ning’o otari aa asetore.” Na ekero bababarete bakarora ng’a Yonathani na omomura oyorenge komobogoreria ebirwanero tibaiyo." 
1Samuel14:18 Saulo agatebia Abiya, “Renta Esanduku ya Nyasae aiga.” (Ase engaki eria Esanduku eria nigo yarenge ase Abaisraeli.)" 
1Samuel14:19 Ekero Saulo agendererete gokwana nomokuani, eburu‐buru eyarenge ase egetwori ki’Abafilisti ekamentekana kobucha. Ase ayio Saulo akamotebia, “Tiga, tobaisa koboria Omonene.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Erio Saulo na abanto bonsi abarenge amo nere bagasangererekana amo, bagasoa ase esegi eria. Kobaikire agwo bakarora ng’a Abafilisti baitanire, kera oyomo noyonde nomoro, na eburu‐buru eria ekaba enene inono." 
1Samuel14:21 Bono Abaibirania abwo babwataine n’Abafilisti korwa agwo kare na komenya amo nabarabwo ase egetwori kiabo, bakairana bakabwatana n’Abaisraeli abwo barenge gotang’anwa na Saulo na Yonathani." 
1Samuel14:22 Boigo Abaisraeli bande, abwo konya bebisire ase ebitunwa bi’ense y’Efraimu, ekero baigwete ng’a Abafilisti batamire, nabarabwo bakababwatia nomokia gochia kobarwania" 
1Samuel14:23 Esegi eria ekagendererera korwanwa goika ng’umbu ya Beti‐Aveni. Igo Omonene agatooria Abaisraeli ase rituko riria. 
1Samuel14:24 Ase rituko riria Abaisraeli bagachandeka mono na kogoya, ekiagera Saulo atianetie abanto, agateba, “Aragererigwe omonto onde bwensi orarie gento omogoroba otaraika na ntarakoora korusia egesiomba ase ababisa baane.” Ase ayio, omonto onde tabete okoria endagera ase rituko riria." 
1Samuel14:25 Abanto bonsi bagacha ase rinani, na aroro agwo bakarora obooke bore inse." 
1Samuel14:26 Ekero basoete rinani erio bakarora ng’a riaichoire nobooke, onde taboriete, ekiagera nigo bairogete okoragereria koria gwa Saulo." 
1Samuel14:27 Korende Yonathani taigwete ekero ise achigete abanto ase okobatiania ng’a tibaria kende. Ase ayio, akarambaria enyimbo yarenge koboko kwaye akayechobia ase eriana rire nobooke ime, akaribwata, akariria. Erio amaiso aye akarora buya." 
1Samuel14:28 Korende omonto oyomo akamotebia, “Iso nigo abegete ogochika ogokong’u, agatiania abanto, akabatebia: Aragererigwe omonto onde bwensi orarie endagera ende yonsi ase rituko ria rero.” Na abanto abwo bakaborwa chinguru, bakagoyana ase enchara." 
1Samuel14:29 Erio Yonathani akairaneria, akabora, “Tata ochandire ense eye. Rora bono nkorora inde buya, ekiagera naria obooke boke." 
1Samuel14:30 Naki nanga yare gocha koba buya rituko ria rero, onye abanto mbabete ne ribaga ri’okoria na koigota ase ebisakorwa basakorete korwa ase ababisa babo. Nanga nigo twabua Abafilisti mono kobua.”" 
1Samuel14:31 Ase rituko riria Abaisraeli bagaita Abafilisti gochakera korwa Mikimasi goikera Ayaloni. Abaisraeli bakarosa mono ase okogoya, bare nenchara." 
1Samuel14:32 Ase ayio bakarindoka na koumokera ebisakorwa, bakaira ching’ondi ne chiombe, ne chimori, bagachinyenya na gochiria chire namanyinga ime yabo." 
1Samuel14:33 Ekero Saulo atebetigwe ng’a abanto bakorire ebibe ase Omonene ase okoria chinyama chire namanyinga ime yabo, akabora. “Mwakorire ogosaria. Bono torunkania rigena rinene gocha aiga asende.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Naende Saulo akabatebia, “Genda mwesiarerere gochia ase abanto, mobatebie ng’a kera omonto obwate eng’ombe gose eng’ondi ayerente ayenyenyere aiga, ariere chinyama echio aiga, tabaisa gokora ebibe ase Omonene ase okoria chinyama chire namanyinga ime yaye.” Ase ayio ase obotuko obwo kera omonto akarenta eng’ombe yaye agwo akayenyenyerao." 
1Samuel14:35 Agwo Saulo akaagachera Omonene egesasimero; ekio nakio egesasimero egetang’ani aagacherete Omonene. 
1Samuel14:36 Saulo agatebia abanto, “Inchuo, tochiere Abafilisti ase obotuko obo, tobasakore goika mambia kobogokiamoka; titotiga monto onde nonya noyomo abe moyo.” Bakamoiraneria, “Kora aya orarore are buya.” Korende omokuani akabatebia, “Ritang’ani, toike Nyasae ang’e aiga, tomoborie.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Erio Saulo akaboria Nyasae, “Inee! Ndatirimboka mbwatie Abafilisti? Nobarue obabeke ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli?” Korende Nyasae tamoiraneretie ase rituko erio." 
1Samuel14:38 Ase ayio Saulo agatebia abatang’ani bonsi b’abanto, “Suka gocha ang’e aa, morore na komanya ng’a mbibe ki biakorirwe aiga rero." 
1Samuel14:39 Ekeene, buna Omonene, are moyo, oyo ogotooria Abaisraeli, neba ng’a Yonathani, omwana one, okorire ebibe ebio, ere goika aitwe akwe.” Korende monto onde tamoiraneretie, nonya noyomo." 
1Samuel14:40 Erio Saulo agatebia Abaisraeli bonsi, “Inwe beera ensemo eyemo, na inche amo na Yonathani, omwana one, tobeere ensemo ende.” Abanto bakamoiraneria, “Kora aya orarore are buya.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Ase igo Saulo akabora, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nase ki kwangire koiraneria omosomba oo rituko ria rero? Onye okomocha okwo nokwane, gose nokwa Yonathani, omwana one, iraneria ase enchera y’obomera bwa Urimu, konye kore okw’Abaisraeli iraneria na Tumimu.” Igo obomera bokagwera Saulo na Yonathani, na abanto bagatooreka." 
1Samuel14:42 Saulo agateba, “Aka obomera ase egati yane na Yonathani, omwana one.” Obomera bokagwera Yonathani." 
1Samuel14:43 Erio Saulo agatebia Yonathani, “Ntebie amang’ana gwakorire.” Yonathani agateba, “Nigo nachobia mesia y’enyimbo yarenge koboko kwane ase eriana rire nobooke, nkariria; ase ayio, nao inde aa, bono goika nkwe.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Saulo agateba, “Nyasae ang’e egesusuro ekenene. Ekeene, aye Yonathani goika okwe.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Erio abanto bagatebia Saulo, “Inee! Yonathani, oyorentire obobui obonene iga, nere igo araitwe akwe? Yaya, taibo. Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, nonya nagatukia akamo k’omotwe oye tigakogwa inse ase riroba, ekiagera ase ogokonywa kwa Nyasae orentire obobui obwo ase rituko ria rero.” Ase igo abanto bagatooria Yonathani, takwa." 
1Samuel14:46 Nyuma y’ayio Saulo agatiga kobwatia Abafilisti; bakairana gochia nka sobo. 
1Samuel14:47 Ekero Saulo abeire omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli, akaba okorwania ababisa baye bonsi abamenyete ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi: Abamoabu, na Abaamoni, na Abaedomu, na abaruoti ba Soba, amo na Abafilisti. Akaba okobua abanto bonsi abwo arwanetie." 
1Samuel14:48 Akarwana noboremu, akabua nonya n’Abaameleki, na agatooria Abaisraeli korwa ase amaboko abwo konya babasakoire." 
1Samuel14:49 Abana abamura ba Saulo nabwo aba: Yonathani, na Isivi, na Malikisua; na amarieta ’abaiseke baye babere naro aya: omoiseke omotangi Merabu, na oria omoke Mikali." 
1Samuel14:50 Moga Saulo nigo arenge korokwa Ahinoamu omosubati bw’Ahimasi. Omochiki bw’abarwani b’esegi nigo arenge korokwa Abineri, mosinto o Neri, oyorenge ise moke Saulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kisi, ise Saulo, na Neri, ise Abineri, nigo barenge basinto b’Abieli." 
1Samuel14:52 Ase amatuko onsi Saulo arenge moyo akaba okorwana esegi entindi n’Abafilisti. Aande onsi Saulo arenge korora omonto orenge ne chinguru na orenge omoremu nigo amobegete kobeera amo nabarwani baye b’esegi. 
1Samuel15:1 Samweli agatebia Saulo, “Ninche oria Omonene atomete kogoaka amaguta okaba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli, abanto baye. Ase ayio, tegerera bono oigwe amang’ana ’Omonene." 
1Samuel15:2 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Ngochia inde korua egesusuro ase Abaameleki, ekiagera barabwo batangete Abaisraeli, ekero barenge ase orogendo rwabo korwa Misiri." 
1Samuel15:3 Ase ayio, genda oite Abaameleki, obasirie kegima, osirie nebinto bionsi babwate. Tobaisa kobatiga babe moyo, korende oite bonsi, abasacha na abakungu, abana na ebing’werere; oite ne chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chingamia ne chitigere.”" 
1Samuel15:4 Erio Saulo akarangeria abanto, akabaroberia agwo Telaimu. Abarwani b’esegi abarenge gotaara namagoro nigo baare chilifu amagana abere (200,000), amo nabwo korwa ase Abayuda chilifu ikomi (10,000)." 
1Samuel15:5 Saulo akagenda ase omochie bw’Abaameleki, akababoera agwo ase rigoko." 
1Samuel15:6 Erio agatebia Abakeni, “Eongore, morue ase Abaameleki timbaisa kobasiria amo nabarabwo. Inwe nigo mwabete abaya ase Abaisraeli, ekero baare korua Misiri.” Ase ayio Abakeni bakeongora, bakarua ase Abaameleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Saulo akarwania Abaameleki akababua, gochakera Havila goikera Suri, moocha ya Misiri." 
1Samuel15:8 Akabwata Agagi, omoruoti bw’Abaameleki, akamotiga ore moyo, korende abande bonsi pi akabaita nemioro." 
1Samuel15:9 Saulo amo nabanto baye bagatiga Agagi ore moyo; boigo bagatiga ching’ondi chingiya, ne chiombe, ne chimori chinoru, ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi, na echi chionsi chiarenge chingiya. Echio chionsi tibanchete gochisiria, korende bagasiria chionsi echio chiarenge chindeu ne chimbe." 
1Samuel15:10 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Samweli, rikamotebia," 
1Samuel15:11 “Naichanire ekiagera nabegete Saulo koba omoruoti, ere oonchokire, otigire konyigwera na tabwateti amachiko aane.” Ayio akamoichania Samweli, erinde akaba okorera ase Omonene obotuko obogima ng’a akonywe." 
1Samuel15:12 Rituko ria kabere Samweli akaimoka mambia chuni, agachia konyorana na Saulo, agateberigwa agwo ng’a Saulo nachicha Karimeli ase okweroiseria ekeinyorio, naende ogendire Giligali." 
1Samuel15:13 Erio Samweli akagenda ase Saulo, na Saulo akamokwania, akamotebia, “Omonene agosesenie. Naikeranirie aya Omonene anchigete.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Samweli akamoboria, “Inee! Eriogi eri ri’okwana gwe ching’ondi na ogwe chiombe inyigwete namato aane, neriaki?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Saulo akamoiraneria, “Abanto mbarenta ching’ondi ne chiombe korwa ase Abaameleki; nigo batiga echio chingiya mono chire moyo, erinde bachirue chibe ekeng’wanso ase Omonene, Nyasae oo, korende echinde chionsi nigo twachisiria kegima.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Erio Samweli akamotebia, “Kirakiri! Ngotebie aya Omonene antebetie ase obotuko obo bwaetete.” Saulo agateba, “Kwana aye!”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samweli akamotebia, “Nonya kwaroche aye omonyene ng’a toisaini gento, Inee, aye tori omotang’ani ase ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli? Omonene igo akoagete amaguta obe omoruoti ase Abaisraeli." 
1Samuel15:18 Omonene nigo agotomete, akagochika ogende, osirie kegima Abaameleki, abanto abwo ababe, obarwanie goika obaite obakoore." 
1Samuel15:19 Nase ki rende otaigwerete aya Omonene agochigete? Nase ki kwarindokerete na koumokera ebisakorwa, ogakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Saulo akairaneria Samweli, “Ee, naigwera aya Omonene antebetie; nagenda aase antomete, nkarenta Agagi, omoruoti bw’Abaameleki, nigo naita kegima Abaameleki bande bonsi." 
1Samuel15:21 Korende abanto mbarenta korwa ase ebisakorwa ching’ondi ne chiombe, echio chingiya mono chiaatananetwe ase ogosirigwa; mbachirenta, erinde bachirue chibe ekeng’wanso agwo Giligali ase Omonene, Nyasae oo.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Erio Samweli akamotebia, “Inee! Igo okorengereria ng’a Omonene nagokerete ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebing’wanso binde kobua okomoigwera? Naama! Okoigwera nokuya kobua ebing’wanso, na ogotegerera nokuya kobua ebitinya bie chimingichi." 
1Samuel15:23 Ogosaria kw’ogotaigwera nigo konga buna ebibe bi’oborogi, na oboenenu nigo bonga buna ebibe bi’ogosasima emegwekano. Ekiagera kwangire ring’ana ri’Omonene, nere boigo okwangire, tokogenderera koba omoruoti.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Erio Saulo agatebia Samweli, “Nakorire ebibe, ekiagera nasaririe ogochika kw’Omonene na amang’ana ao gwantebetie. Nigo nairogete abanto, nkaba nkoigwera okogania kwabo." 
1Samuel15:25 Gaki bono nagosabire, onyabere ebibe biane, oirane amo nainche, erinde inyare gosasima Omonene.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Samweli agakania Saulo, akamotebia, “Tinkonyara koirana amo naye, ekiagera kwangire ring’ana ri’Omonene, na Omonene okwangire, toba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Ekero Samweli arenge kweonchora kogenda, Saulo akabwata omokoba bw’eanga yaye y’okwambara, nero egatandoka." 
1Samuel15:28 Erio Samweli akamotebia, “Rituko ria rero Omonene otandoire oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli, naborobwo bwarure asore, oboeire omonto omoao ore omuya gokobua." 
1Samuel15:29 Nyasae, oyore Obonene bw’Abaisraeli, tagokwana oborimo, gose takweitia. Ere tari mwanyabanto erinde eitie.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Saulo agateba, “Inche nakorire ebibe, korende bono insike ase amaiso ’abagaaka b’abanto baane, na ase Abaisraeli; irana amo nainche, erio ngende gosasima Omonene, Nyasae oo.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Erio Samweli akairana, akabwatia Saulo, na Saulo agasasima Omonene." 
1Samuel15:32 Samweli akabora, “Ndetera Agagi, omoruoti bw’Abaameleki, aiga.” Agagi agacha asare, ore nomogoko agakwana, “Ekeene, obororo bw’amakweri bwaerire.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Korende Samweli akamotebia, “Buna omoro oo otigire abakungu bare bosa batari nabana, naboigo nyoko agochia gotigwa bosa atari nomwana ase egati y’abakungu bande.” Na aroro agwo Samweli akanachana Agagi ebing’ese ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
1Samuel15:34 Erio Samweli akagenda Rama, na Saulo akagenda bwoye agwo Gibea o Saulo." 
1Samuel15:35 Korwa ase engaki eyio Samweli tagendete korora Saulo naende nonya ng’ake, korende akagenderera koba nomoichano ase engencho yaye. Na Omonene agaichana, ekiagera konya abekire Saulo koba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli." 
1Samuel16:1 Omonene agatebia Samweli, “Ngoika ririri oragenderere koba nomoichano ase engencho ya Saulo. Inche namwangire, takogenderera koba omoruoti, bw’Abaisraeli. Ichoria orogunchara rwao amaguta, ngotome ogende o Yese, omonto o Bethlehemu, ekiagera nechoreire oyomo bw’abamura baye abe omoruoti.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Erio Samweli akamoboria, “Naki ndakore ngende? Saulo aise koigwa amang’ana ayio, nigo arang’ite.” Omonene akamoiraneria, “Bwata ritororo, oriire, otebe ng’a: Nekeng’wanso nachire komoruera Omonene." 
1Samuel16:3 Orangerie Yese ache ase ekeng’wanso, nainche ninkworokie aya orakore, erio oake omonto oyo ndagotebie amaguta.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samweli agakora ayio Omonene amochigete, akagenda Bethlehemu. Abagaaka b’omochie oria bagacha komorotota bakoiguswa bakamoboria, “Inee! Ngwachire namang’ana ’omorembe?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Samweli akabairaneria, “Ee, nachire nomorembe. Nigo nachire imoruere Omonene ekeng’wanso. Echene inwe abanyene, moche amo nainche ase ekeng’wanso ekio.” Erio agachena Yese amo nabamura baye na akabarangeria bache ase ekeng’wanso ekio." 
1Samuel16:6 Ekero bachete agwo, Samweli akarigereria Eliabu, erio akarengereria, “Ekeene, omonto oyo oteneine aiga ase obosio bw’Omonene, nere omoakwa amaguta oye.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Korende Omonene agatebia Samweli, “Torigereria ekieni kiaye, gose obotambe na obuya bw’ogokina kwaye; oyio namwangire, ekiagera tindi korigereria buna mwanyabanto akorigereria. Mwanyabanto nigo akorora ekieni gia isiko, korende inche Omonene nigo nkorora ime y’enkoro.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Erio Yese akarangeria Aminadabu, akamoetia ase obosio bwa Samweli. Samweli agateba, “Nonya noyo, Omonene tamochoreti.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Yese akarenta Sama. Boigo Samweli agateba, “Omonene tamochoreti oyo.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Yese akarenta abamura baye batano na babere bagaeta ase obosio bwa Samweli, korende Samweli akamotebia, “Omonene tachoreti onde omo ase aba.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Naende akaboria Yese, “Inee! Abamura bao bonsi nabwo aba?” Yese akamoiraneria, “Omoke omwabo nagatigarete korisia ching’ondi.” Erio Samweli agatebia Yese, “Toma omonto achie komorenta, titogoikaransa koragera ere ataracha aiga.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Erio Yese agatoma omonto korenta omwana oria omoke, Omwana oria nigo arenge omobariri, obwate amaiso amaya, naende orenge omonyakieni. Omonene agatebia Samweli. “Omomura oria nere oyio, moake amaguta.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Ase ayio Samweli akaimokia orogunchara rore namaguta, na agwo ase amasio ’abamura bamwabo agaaka Daudi amaguta. Omoika bw’Omonene ogacha igoro ase Daudi, na korwa rituko riria okabeera asare kogenderera. Erio Samweli akarua agwo, akairana Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Omoika bw’Omonene konya orure ase Saulo, omotigire, na omoika omobe okorwa ase Omonene okaba okomochanda." 
1Samuel16:15 Abasomba baye bakamotebia, “Rigereria bono, Omoika omobe okorwa ase Nyasae nkogochanda ore." 
1Samuel16:16 Gaki, omonene oito, tochike intwe abasomba bao, tokorigerie omonto omanyete kobugia obokano buya, na ekero omoika oyio omobe okorwa ase Nyasae ogocha igoro asore, omonto oyio nabe okobugia obokano, erinde aye obe buya naende.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Saulo akabatebia, “Mbuya, mondigerie omonto omanyete kobugia obokano buya momondetere aiga asende.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Erio oyomo bw’abasomba baye akamotebia, “Yese, omonto o Bethlehemu, nabwate omomura omanyete kobugia obokano buya. Ere nigo are omonto omoremu, omanyete korwana esegi; amo nayio nigo are omonyakieni, omanyete gokwana buya, na Omonene nigo are amo nere.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Ase ayio Saulo agatoma abanto gotebia Yese, “Ntomere Daudi, omwana oo omomura, oyio okorisia ching’ondi.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Yese akaimokia etigere, akayeberekia emegati na ekerandi kerosirie korwa ase amasankwa kere nedivai, akaimokia nemanwa y’embori, akaa Daudi, omwana oye ebinto ebio, akamotoma gochia ase Saulo." 
1Samuel16:21 Daudi agacha o Saulo, agachaka komokorera. Saulo akaba omwanchete mono, goika Daudi akaba okomobogoreria ebirwanero." 
1Samuel16:22 Erio Saulo agatoma amang’ana ase Yese, akamotebia, “Tiga Daudi abeere aiga abe ogonkorera, ekiagera namwanchire mono.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Ase engaki ende yonsi omoika oria omobe okorwa ase Nyasae ore gocha igoro ase Saulo, Daudi igo are okobugia obokano. Erio omoika oria omobe oba okorua ase Saulo, nere oba ogokanyeka na kweigwa buya naende." 
1Samuel17:1 Abafilisti bagasangereria abarwani babo korwana esegi agwo Soko, omochie ore ase orogongo rwa Yuda. Bagatoora aase akorokwa Efesi‐Damimu, egati ya Soko na Aseka." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulo amo n’Abaisraeli bagasangererekana, bagatoora ase ense omweremo ekorokwa Ela; nabarabwo bakarobera korwana n’Abafilisti." 
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisti bagatenena ase egetunwa ekemo, na Abaisraeli ase ekende, ne rikura ndiarenge ase egati yabo." 
1Samuel17:4 Erio agwo omonto ore korokwa Goliato, omonto bw’omochie o Gati, akaoroka korwa ase egetwori ki’Abafilisti. Ere nigo arenge etuoni y’esegi; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano na rimo na ekeng’ese." 
1Samuel17:5 Nigo abegete ekegogwa gi’etaai na egoti yaroisirie korwa ase ebioma, na oborito bw’egoti eyio nigo bwarenge koreng’ana chikiro emerongo etano, na isano na ibere (57)." 
1Samuel17:6 Ase amagoro aye nigo anaarete ebitange bi’etaai, boigo nabwate esimisi y’etaai abegete ireko." 
1Samuel17:7 Orotanga rwe ritimo riaye nigo rware buna omwaro omonene na oborito bw’ensonga ye ritimo riaye nigo bwarenge koreng’ana chikiro isano na ibere. Omonto ore komobogoreria enguba nigo arenge komotang’ana. 
1Samuel17:8 Goliato agacha bosio, agaaka eriogi ase abarwani b’Abaisraeli, akabora, “Nase ki mwachire na korobera ase okorwana esegi? Inee! Inche tindi Omofilisti, nainwe nabasomba ba Saulo? Chora omonto oyomo oino ache aa asende." 
1Samuel17:9 Omonto oyio karanyare korwana nainche na kong’ita, rirorio intwe natobe abasomba baino, korende kondamobue na komoita, rirorio inwe mobe abasomba baito, motokorere.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Omofilisti oria akagenderera gokwana, agateba, “Nachayire emeganda y’abarwani b’Abaisraeli ase rituko ria rero. Ing’a omonto, torwane nere.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Ekero Saulo amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi baigwete amang’ana ’Omofilisti oria, bagaichana na kwoboa mono." 
1Samuel17:12 Daudi nigo arenge omwana o Yese, Omoefarati korwa Bethlehemu ase orogongo rwa Yuda. Yese nigo abwate abamura batano na batato, na ase amatuko aria Saulo arenge omoruoti, Yese konya ogotire mono." 
1Samuel17:13 Abamura baye batato abanene konya bachiire korwana esegi amo na Saulo. Omomura oria omotangi nigo are korokwa Eliabu na oyo o kabere Abinadabu, na oyo o gatato Sama." 
1Samuel17:14 Daudi nere orenge omoke ase bonsi. Abwo batato abanene bakaba bakomobwatia Saulo. 
1Samuel17:15 Korende engaki ase engaki Daudi nigo arenge gotiga Saulo ogenda Bethlehemu korisia ching’ondi chia ise. 
1Samuel17:16 Ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, chimambia na emegoroba, Omofilisti oria nigo arenge gocha bosio, otenenao." 
1Samuel17:17 Rituko erimo Yese agatebia Daudi, omwana oye, “Imokia ebigara ebi bisambire, ebitonga bibere, oimokie nemegati eye ikomi ogende bwango, obiirere bamura bamino aaria ase egetwori." 
1Samuel17:18 Boigo oirere omochiki obo bw’abarwani elifu eyemo amabomba aya ikomi ay’amabeere abwatanire. Orore gose bamura bamino mbuya bare, naende ondetere ekemanyererio gete korwa asebare, erinde imanye buna bagendererete." 
1Samuel17:19 Saulo, na bamura bamino, na Abaisraeli bonsi nao bakare ase ense omweremo ya Ela korwana n’Abafilisti.”" 
1Samuel17:20 Rituko ria kabere, mambia chuni, Daudi agatigera omonto onde okorisia ching’ondi, akaimokia chindagera chiria, akagenda buna Yese konya amochikire. Ekero aigete ensinyo y’egetwori ase chigari chiabekire chigekengerete, akanyora emeganda konya yarobeire gochia korwana esegi yarenge goaka eriogi ri’esegi." 
1Samuel17:21 Abaisraeli bakeroberia ase okorwana na Abafilisti boigo, na emeganda eyio ebere nigo yarigereranetie." 
1Samuel17:22 Daudi agatiga endagera eyio ase omorendi bw’ebinto bi’esegi, akaminyoka gochia ase abarwani. Gaikireo agakwania abamwabo." 
1Samuel17:23 Ekero Daudi arenge gokwana nabarabwo, Goliato, etuoni eria, Omofilisti korwa Gati, akarua aase Abafilisti baroberete, akagenda bosio, agakwana amang’ana aria anarete gokwana botambe, na Daudi akayaigwa." 
1Samuel17:24 Ekero Abaisraeli baroche Goliato, bagatama bonsi, bakamwoboa mono." 
1Samuel17:25 Abaisraeli bagakwana na gotebania, “Moroche omonto oria ogocha? Nigo agocha gotochaya intwe Abaisraeli. Omoruoti oito naria eira ng’a natenenkie omonto oraite Goliato. Boigo namoe omoiseke oye abe mokaye, naende eamate yaye etigwe, teaka ebango ase egati y’Abaisraeli.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Erio Daudi agakwana nabanto bateneine ang’e nere, akababoria, “Inee! Omonto oraite Omofilisti oria, na koruseria Abaisraeli ogochaywa okwo, inki araegwe? Omofilisti oyo otarogeti, ninki aisaine goika are noboremu gochaya emeganda y’esegi ya Nyasae ore moyo?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Abanto bakairaneria, bakamotebia, “Amang’ana aria aria arakorerwe oyo oraite omonto oria.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Eliabu, omomura omonene omwabo Daudi, akaigwa buna agokwana nabanto. Akaba nendamwamu enene ase Daudi, agateba, “Ninki kiagera gwachicha aa? Ning’o gwatigera riicho riria rike rie ching’ondi chikare nka aaria ase erooro? Nimanyete oboenenu bwao na obobe bore ase enkoro yao. Nigo gwacha aa korora esegi rioka.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Daudi agateba, “Ninki nakora rende? Nokoboria gwoka naboria.”" 
1Samuel17:30 Erio Daudi akeonchora gochia ase omonto onde akaboria amang’ana aria konya aboririe, na abanto bakamoiraneria buna konya bamoiraneirie ritang’ani." 
1Samuel17:31 Ekero abanto baigwete amang’ana a Daudi, bakagenda bakayatebia Saulo, na Saulo akamorangeria." 
1Samuel17:32 Daudi agatebia Saulo, “Monto onde takwa omoyo ase okomwoboa Omofilisti oyio. Inche, omosomba oo, ningende komorwania.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Saulo agakania Daudi, akamotebia, “Tokonyara korwania Omofilisti oyio. Aye nomoke; ere nigo enaretie korwana esegi korwa obosae bwaye.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Korende Daudi agatebia Saulo, “Inche, omosomba oo, nabeire nkorisia ching’ondi chia tata, na ekero kende gionsi endo gose edubu yare gocha koira eng’ondi korwa ase riicho," 
1Samuel17:35 nigo nare koyeromeng’ana na koyeaka inse, naende natooria eng’ondi eria korwa ase omonwa oye, na onye endo gose edubu yare korindokera, nigo nare koyebwata chinderu, erinde nayeaka nayeita." 
1Samuel17:36 Inche, omosomba oo, nabeire ngoita chindo ne chidubu, naboigo buna nakorete ching’iti chiria ninkore n’Omofilisti oria otarogeti, oyochayire emeganda y’esegi ya Nyasae ore moyo.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Naende Daudi agateba, “Omonene oria ontooretie korwa ase chinchara chi’endo na echi’edubu, nigo arantoorie korwa ase amaboko ’Omofilisti oria.” Saulo akamotebia, “Gaki genda, na Omonene abe amo naye.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Erio Saulo akaimokia ebirwanero biaye bi’esegi, akabibekera Daudi, akamobekera na ekegogwa gi’etaai omotwe oye, na egoti eroisirie korwa ase ebioma." 
1Samuel17:39 Daudi akeboerania ebirwanero ebio amo nomoyio o birende, agateema kogenda, ekiagera konya taranara kweboerania ebinto buna ebio. Erio agatebia Saulo, “Tinkonyara gotaara nyeboeranetie ebinto ebio, ekiagera timbinareti.” Akabirusia na kobitiga." 
1Samuel17:40 Erio akaimokia enyimbo yaye ase okoboko kwaye, agachora amagena atano amaterere korwa ase akarooche, akayabeka ase esaro yaye y’oborisia, na enduruche akabogoria koboko kwaye. Na bono agasuka gochia ang’e n’Omofilisti oria." 
1Samuel17:41 Omofilisti oria agacha bosio, akamoika Daudi ang’e, na omobogoreria bw’enguba yaye omotang’aine." 
1Samuel17:42 Ekero Omofilisti oria aroche Daudi oyorenge omosae omobariri na omonyakieni, akamochaya mono." 
1Samuel17:43 Erio agatebia Daudi, “Inee! Nesese inde? Ogonchichera nenyimbo?” Agatiana ase chinyasae chiaye, akaragereria Daudi." 
1Samuel17:44 Naende Omofilisti oria agatebia Daudi, “Inchuo aiga asende, nainche ning’ee chinyoni ne ching’iti chi’orosana chinyama chi’omobere oo chichirie.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Daudi akamoiraneria, “Aye nigo ogonchichera kore nomoro, ne ritimo, na esimisi, korende inche nigo nkogochera ase erieta ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’emeganda y’esegi y’Abaisraeli, oyio gwachayire na komochecheria." 
1Samuel17:46 Rituko ria rero Omonene nakobeke ase okoboko kwane. Ninkoiyerie inse, na kobutora omotwe oo; ning’ee chinyoni ne ching’iti chi’orosana emebere ekwete y’abarwani b’Abafilisti; erio abanto b’ense yonsi mbamanye ng’a Abaisraeli nigo bare na Nyasae." 
1Samuel17:47 Boigo omoganda oyo bwonsi nomanye ng’a Omonene tari korenta obobui ase enchera y’emioro na amatimo. Esegi nigo ere ey’Omonene, nere nababeke inwe ase amaboko aito.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Omofilisti oria agachaka kogenda goikera Daudi ang’e, erio Daudi akaminyoka bwango gochia ase abarwani koumerana n’Omofilisti oria." 
1Samuel17:49 Daudi agasoyia okoboko kwaye ase esaro, akarusia rigena, akariruta nenduruche, agaaka Omofilisti oria obosio bwaye. Rigena riria rikarimera obosio bwaye ime, na ere akagwa inse maumama, agakwa." 
1Samuel17:50 Ase igo Daudi akabua Omofilisti oria, akamoita ne rigena ri’enduruche atari nomoro koboko kwaye." 
1Samuel17:51 Erio akaminyoka, agatenena ase omobere oye, agasomora omoyio oye korwa ase ekegocho, akamoita kegima ase okomobutora omotwe. Ekero Abafilisti baroche ng’a etuoni yabo yakure, bagatama." 
1Samuel17:52 Erio Abaisraeli na Abayuda bagaaka eriogi bakabwatia Abafilisti goikera Gati na ebiita bi’Ekironi. Abafilisti abaitetwe bakarara ase enchera korwa Saaraimu goikera Gati na Ekironi. 
1Samuel17:53 Erio Abaisraeli bakairana korwa ase baseretie Abafilisti bagasakora egetwori kiabo. 
1Samuel17:54 Daudi akaimokia omotwe bw’Omofilisti oria akayoira Yerusalemu, korende ebirwanero bia Goliato akabigacha ase eema yaye omonyene." 
1Samuel17:55 Ekero Saulo aroche Daudi okogenda korwania Omofilisti oria akaboria Abineri, omochiki bw’emeganda y’abarwani, “Abineri, omosae oyo, noyo ng’o”? Abineri akamoiraneria, “Aye omoruoti, ekeene buna ore moyo, inche timomanyeti.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Omoruoti agatebia Abineri, “Genda oborie omanye gose omosae oyo noyo ng’o?”" 
1Samuel17:57 Erio ekero Daudi arenge koirana ase egetwori gaitire Omofilisti oria, Abineri akamoira ase Saulo, Daudi nigo abogoretie omotwe o Goliato koboko kwaye." 
1Samuel17:58 Saulo akamoboria, “Omosae oyo, noyo ng’o ore?” Daudi akamoiraneria, “Inche nomwana bw’omosomba oo, Yese o Bethlehemu.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Ekero Daudi akoorire gokwana na Saulo, Yonathani akang’useka na Daudi akaba okomwancha mono, amwanchete buna eanchete ere omonyene." 
1Samuel18:2 Korwa rituko riria Saulo akaa Daudi ribaga komenya asare, gose tamotigete airane gochia nka o ise." 
1Samuel18:3 Erio Yonathani agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania na Daudi, ekiagera nigo amwanchete buna eanchete ere omonyene." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonathani akarusia egetambaa kiaye gi’okwambara agakea Daudi, akamoa nebirwanero biaye, na omoyio o birende, na obota, na orokini." 
1Samuel18:5 Aande onsi ase Saulo arenge gotoma Daudi, Daudi nigo arenge konyora obobui. Ase ayio Saulo akamobeka akaba omotang’ani bw’abarwani. Daudi igo anyorete ogwancherwa kw’abanto bonsi na okw’abasomba ba Saulo." 
1Samuel18:6 Ekaba ekero Daudi are koirana, ekero aitire Omofilisti oria, na abarwani b’esegi bakoirana boigo, abakungu bagacha korwa ase emechie yonsi bakana‐gotera na gotenga bare nomogoko, bakobugia ebikonu ne chinchigiri." 
1Samuel18:7 Abakungu bakaba bagotera, bakobora, “Saulo oitire chilifu chiaye, korende Daudi oitire chilifu chiaye emerongo na emerongo.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Ayio akagechia Saulo, goika akaba nendamwamu enene, agateba, “Abakungu aba batebire ng’a Daudi oitire chilifu emerongo na emerongo, korende asende, batebire ng’a ne chilifu rioka. Ninki rende giatigaire batamoeti goika bono otatiga oboruoti?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Korwa ase rituko riria na kogenderera Saulo akarorera Daudi ribero. 
1Samuel18:10 Rituko ria kabere omoika omobe okorwa ase Nyasae ogacha igoro ase Saulo, na ere akaba okobaboka buna ebarimo agwo nyomba mwaye. Daudi nigo arenge kobugia obokano buna anarete kera rituko, na Saulo nabwate ritimo koboko kwaye." 
1Samuel18:11 Saulo akarengereria ase enkoro yaye agetebia, “Nigo nkoruta ritimo, mbete Daudi imobwateranie enyasi.” Erio akamoruta Daudi ritimo ara kabere, korende Daudi akebacha." 
1Samuel18:12 Saulo akairoka Daudi mono, ekiagera Omonene nigo arenge amo na Daudi, korende konya otigire Saulo." 
1Samuel18:13 Ase ayio Saulo akamorusia korwa asare, akamobeka akaba omotang’ani bw’abarwani baye b’esegi elifu eyemo, na Daudi akaba ogotang’ana abanto aande onsi ase baare kogenda na koirana." 
1Samuel18:14 Daudi nigo arenge konyora obobui ase chinchera chiaye chionsi, ekiagera Omonene nigo arenge amo nere." 
1Samuel18:15 Ekero Saulo aroche ng’a Daudi onyorire obobui, akamwoboa mono kobua." 
1Samuel18:16 Korende Abaisraeli na Abayuda bonsi bakamwancha Daudi mono, ekiagera arenge kobatang’ana kogenda aande onsi ase baare kogenda na koirana." 
1Samuel18:17 Erio Saulo agatebia Daudi, “Rora, ninkoe Merabu, omoiseke one omotangi, abe mokao, onye kogonkorera buna omonto omoremu, erinde orwane esegi y’Omonene.” Saulo igo arengereretie ng’a Daudi nigo agochia goitwa n’Abafilisti, ng’a ere omonyene tabaisa komoita." 
1Samuel18:18 Daudi akairaneria Saulo, “Inche ninki ng’isaine na obogima bwane ninki boisaine, gose eamate ya tata inki eisaine ase egati y’Abaisraeli, erinde aye omoruoti obe tata biara?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Korende ekero engaki yaigete, Saulo arenge koa Daudi Merabu, omoiseke oye, akaonchora ebirengererio biaye, akaa Adirili Omomehola omoiseke oria akaba mokaye." 
1Samuel18:20 Mikali, omoiseke o Saulo, agancha Daudi, na ekero Saulo aigwete amang’ana ayio akagokigwa mono." 
1Samuel18:21 Bono Saulo akarengereria iga, “Nigo ndae Daudi omoiseke oyo, nere orabe okomotega, erinde agwe ase amaboko ’Abafilisti, nabarabwo bamoite.” Ase ayio Saulo agatebia Daudi eria kabere, “Bono onyuome omoiseke one, erinde inche imbe iso biara.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Erio Saulo agachika abasomba baye, akabora, “Kwana na Daudi bobisi, momotebie ng’a inche omoruoti nigo ngokirie nere, na abasomba baane bonsi nigo bamwanchete. Ase ayio bono momotebie ng’a inche imbe ise biara.”" 
1Samuel18:23 Ase igo abasomba ba Saulo bagatebia Daudi amang’ana ayio bobisi. Nere akabairaneria, “Inee! Inwe nigo moroche ng’a nering’ana rike omoruoti abe tata biara. Inche igo inde omonto omotaka mono, naende tindi na bonene bonde.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Abasomba abwo bagachia gotebia Saulo aya Daudi akwanete," 
1Samuel18:25 na Saulo akabachika batebie Daudi ng’a, “Omoruoti taganeti omoe enibo ende yonsi ase okomonyuomera omoiseke oye, otatiga aganetie omorentere amasankwa a isiko ay’ebiimo bi’obosacha bi’Abafilisti rigana erimo bakwete, na igo omoruserie egesiomba ase ababisa baye.” Ase enchera eyio Saulo nigo arengereretie ng’a Daudi agwe ase amaboko ’Abafilisti." 
1Samuel18:26 Ekero abasomba baria batebetie Daudi amang’ana aria Saulo atebete, Daudi akagokigwa naro ng’a omoruoti abe ise biara. Ekero engaki eria konya etaraika," 
1Samuel18:27 Daudi akaimoka, akagenda nabanto baye, agaita Abafilisti amagana abere, akabutora amasankwa abo a isiko ay’ebiimo bi’obosacha, akayarenta onsi ase omoruoti, erinde omoruoti abe ise biara. Erio Saulo akaa Daudi Mikali, akaba mokaye." 
1Samuel18:28 Saulo akarora na akamanya ng’a Omonene nigo arenge amo na Daudi, naende ng’a Mikali, omoiseke oye, nigo amwanchete Daudi." 
1Samuel18:29 Ase ayio Saulo akoboa Daudi mono kobua, naende akaba omobisa oye kogenderera ase obogima bwaye bwonsi." 
1Samuel18:30 Abanene b’Abafilisti bakaba bagocha korwana esegi, korende ase engaki ende yonsi Daudi akaba okonyora obobui kobua abasomba bonsi ba Saulo. Ase igo erieta riaye rigakuma mono na gotogigwa." 
1Samuel19:1 Saulo agakwana na Yonathani, omomura oye, na abasomba baye bonsi ng’a naganetie goita Daudi, korende Yonathani nigo anchete Daudi mono." 
1Samuel19:2 Yonathani agatebia Daudi, “Saulo tata nigo aganetie kogoita. Ase ayio bwerende mono ankio mambia; ogende aase are bobisi, bwebise." 
1Samuel19:3 Inche ningende ntenene ang’e ase tata ase egetii, aria ase orabeere, nkwane nere igoro yao, kondanyore amang’ana buna are, ningotebie.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Yonathani agakwana na Saulo ise amang’ana amaya igoro ya Daudi, akamotebia “Aye omoruoti, tobaisa gokorera Daudi, omosomba oo, bobe, ekiagera ere tana gokomochera, korende ase aya onsi abeire ogokora nigo agokonyete mono." 
1Samuel19:5 Ere taboraarete obogima bwaye, ekero aitete Omofilisti oria, na Omonene akanyorera Abaisraeli obobui obonene mono. Aye nkwaroche amang’ana ayio, na okagoka ase ayio. Nase ki rende orakore ebibe na goitera amanyinga omonto otari na komocha, ase ogoita Daudi?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Saulo akaigwera amang’ana a Yonathani, agatiana agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, Daudi tagoitwa.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Erio Yonathani akarangeria Daudi, akamotebia amang’ana ayio onsi. Nyuma y’ayio akamoira ase Saulo, na Daudi akaba ogokorera Saulo buna agwo ritang’ani." 
1Samuel19:8 Esegi egatuboka naende, na Daudi akagenda korwania Abafilisti, akababua obobui obonene mono. Barabwo bagatama korwa asare." 
1Samuel19:9 Rituko erimo ekero Saulo aikaransete nyomba mwaye, obwate ritimo ase okoboko kwaye, na Daudi nigo agendererete kobugia obokano, omoika omobe okorwa ase Nyasae ogaika igoro ase Saulo," 
1Samuel19:10 Saulo agateema kobeta Daudi ritimo amobwateranie enyasi, korende Daudi akebacha, ne ritimo riria rikabeta enyasi. Daudi agatama, agatooreka ase obotuko obwo." 
1Samuel19:11 Ase obotuko obwo Saulo agatoma abanto ase enyomba ya Daudi komoboera, erinde bamoite mambia kagosoka. Korende Mikali, moga Daudi, akamokurera, akamotebia, “Otetooreti ase obotuko obo, mambia goika oche oitwe.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Erio Mikali agaikeria Daudi goetera ase ekebao, na Daudi agatama agetooria." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikali akaimokia omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa orenge nyomba ime, akaywareria borere, akabeka amanya e chimbori asisire ase omotwe bw’omogwekano oria, erio akayobisia egetambaa." 
1Samuel19:14 Erio abanto batometwe na Saulo kwoyia Daudi bachete, na Mikali akabatebia, “Orwarire.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Saulo akabatoma naende ase Daudi, akabatebia, “Momobogorie noborere, momorente asende, erinde imoite.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Ekero abanto abwo basoete nyomba, bakarora omogwekano oria bw’ogosasimwa ore borere, na amanya e chimbori asisire abekire ase omotwe oye." 
1Samuel19:17 Erio Saulo akaboria Mikali, “Nase ki kwang’aina ase enchera buna eye, na ogatiga omobisa one agatama agetooria?” Mikali akamoiraneria, “Ere nigo antebetie: Ntiga ngende, timbaisa kogoita.”" 
1Samuel19:18 Ekero Daudi atamire na gwetooria, akagenda ase Samweli agwo Rama, akamotebia amang’ana onsi Saulo konya amokoreire. Erio Samweli na Daudi bakagenda Nayoti, bakamenyao." 
1Samuel19:19 Saulo agatebigwa ng’a Daudi nigo amenyete Nayoti aria Rama. 
1Samuel19:20 Ase ayio Saulo agatoma abanto boyie Daudi. Korende ekero abanto aba baigeteo, bakarora ekeombe ki’ababani bakobaboka ase okobana, na Samweli oteneineo buna omotang’ani obo. Omoika o Nyasae ogaika igoro asebare, nabarabwo boigo bagachaka kobana." 
1Samuel19:21 Ekero Saulo aigwete aya abanyorire, agatoma abanto bande, nabarabwo boigo bagachaka kobaboka ase okobana. Na ekero Saulo atomete abanto eria gatato nabwo bagachaka kobana." 
1Samuel19:22 Erio Saulo omonyene akagenda Rama, agaika ase ensoko enene y’amache yare agwo Seku, akaboria, “Ng’ai Samweli na Daudi bare?” Agatebigwa ng’a nao bakare Nayoti agwo Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Ase igo akagenda gochia Nayoti agwo Rama. Korende Omoika o Nyasae ogaika nonya nigoro yaye, na ere akaba okobana kagendererete nchera goika Nayoti agwo Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Ere boigo akarusia chianga chiaye akababoka ase okobana ase obosio bwa Samweli, akagwa inse, akarara agwo rituko rigima, omobaso na obotuko, ore getirianda. Ase ayio amang’ana nigo agotebwa: “Inee! Saulo nere nabeire oyomo bw’ababani?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Daudi agatama korwa Nayoti agwo Rama, akagenda ase Yonathani, akamoboria, “Ninki nakorire? Okomocha kwane, na ebibe biane mbiribi ase obosio bwa iso? Nase ki arigetie kong’ita?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonathani akamoiraneria, “Taibo, togokwa. Tata tari gokora gento kende gionsi, ekenene gose egeke, atantebeti. Nase ki tata arambise ring’ana erio, atamanyia? Ayio takoba bo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Daudi akairaneria ase ogotiana, agateba, “Iso igo amanyete buya ng’a aye nonyanchete mono, na ororire ng’a tari buya akomanyie ring’ana erio, ekiagera nigo riragoichanie mono. Korende ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, na buna aye ore moyo, ngetigarete egetambokero ekemo gioka egati yane na amakweri.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Erio Yonathani akamotebia, “Gento kende gionsi oganetie ningokorere.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Daudi agatebia Yonathani, “Ankio ne Rituko Rinene ri’Omotienyi Omoyia, nigo embetereretie ng’a ng’ikaranse koragera amo nomoruoti, korende ing’a ribaga ngende kwebisa agwo ase omogondo goika ankio ende mogoroba." 
1Samuel20:6 Kerabe ng’a iso tandochi ase omoyega oyio, omotebie: Daudi nigo ansaba ribaga ng’a aminyoke gochia Bethlehemu, omochie oye, ase okorua ekeng’wanso ki’omwaka amo neamate yaye yonsi." 
1Samuel20:7 Aise goteba: Ayio mbuya, rirorio inche, omosomba oo, ninyare koba nomorembe, korende karabe nendamwamu ase ayio, rirorio omanye ng’a bwerure gokora amabe." 
1Samuel20:8 Gaki onkorere inche, omosomba oo, amaya, ekiagera gwakorire okobwatana kw’ogotianania amo nainche ase obosio bw’Omonene. Korende onye okomocha kore asende, rirorio aye omonyene ong’ite? Nase ki okong’ira ase iso, erinde ere ang’ite?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonathani akairaneria, “Taibo! Takoba bo. Onye ndiria imanyete ekeene ng’a tata narengereretie kogokorera bobe, Inee, nanga rirorio tinagotebia amang’ana ayio.”" 
1Samuel20:10 Daudi akamoboria, “Iso karakoiranerie amang’ana amakong’u, Inee, ning’o orache gontebia ayio?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Erio Yonathani akamotebia, “Inchuo togende ase egetii.” Bonsi babere bakagendao," 
1Samuel20:12 na Yonathani akamotebia Daudi. “Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, abe kirori ase aya. Ase chinsa buna echi, ankio gose ankio ende, nindigie komanya ebirengererio bia tata buna bire igoro yao, na kondabimanye, ningotomere amang’ana, erinde obimanye." 
1Samuel20:13 Konye tata bwerure kogokorera bobe, rirorio Omonene ang’e inche Yonathani egesusuro onye tinkogotebia okogania gwa tata, na ngotige otame na bwetoorie. Omonene abe amo naye buna arenge na tata." 
1Samuel20:14 Onye ngendererete koba moyo, oorokie obwanchani bw’Omonene asende, erinde tinkwa," 
1Samuel20:15 gose tobaisa korusia obwanchani obwo korwa ase ororeria rwane nonya ng’ake, nonya nekero Omonene arasirie kera omobisa oo arue ase ense." 
1Samuel20:16 Agwo Yonathani agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania neamate ya Daudi, agateba, Omonene nae ababisa ba Daudi egesusuro.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Erio Yonathani akaboria Daudi arie eira na gotiana naende ng’a namwanche, ekiagera Yonathani nigo anchete Daudi buna eanchete ere omonyene." 
1Samuel20:18 Erio Yonathani agatebia Daudi, “Ankio ne Rituko Rinene ri’Omotienyi Omoyia, na ekiagera togochi‐gocha koba ase omoyega, ekerogo kiao nigo keratigare bosa." 
1Samuel20:19 Ankio ende otirimboke bwango gochia aase aria kwebisete rituko riria kwaganeirie. Obeere aroro, moino y’etui y’amagena aria." 
1Samuel20:20 Nindute emegwe etato gochia ang’e netui eria, buna negento nkorasa." 
1Samuel20:21 Erio nintome omosomba one arigie emegwe eria. Kondatebie omosomba oria: Rigereia, emegwe nigo ere magega ao, gocha ensemo yane, genda oyerente, rirorio aye Daudi ochiche, obe nomorembe. Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, togokorerwa bobe bonde." 
1Samuel20:22 Korende onye ngotebia omwana oria: Rigereria, emegwe eyio bosio bwao aaria moino, rirorio aye Daudi otame, ekiagera n’Omonene okogotebia ogende." 
1Samuel20:23 Nase amang’ana aria twakwanete, inche naye, tiga Omonene abe kirori ase egati yaito kogenderera botambe.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Ase igo Daudi akebisa mogondo na ekero ki’Omotienyi Omoyia omoruoti agaikaransa koragera. 
1Samuel20:25 Omoruoti agaikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye, ang’e nenyasi, buna botambe; na Yonathani agatenena bosio bwaye, na Abineri agaikaransa ensemo ya Saulo. Korende ekerogo gia Daudi kegatigara bosa." 
1Samuel20:26 Saulo takwanete gento kende ase rituko riria, ekiagera nigo arengereretie ng’a ring’ana gete riamonyorire Daudi; ande tagachenegeti." 
1Samuel20:27 Ase rituko ria kabere ri’omoyega bw’Omotienyi Omoyia, ekerogo gia Daudi nigo kiagendererete gotigara bosa, na Saulo akaboria Yonathani momura oye, “Nase ki momura o Yese atachete koragera igoro gose rero?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonathani akairaneria Saulo, “Daudi nigo amboria ribaga agende Bethlehemu," 
1Samuel20:29 agateba: Abanto b’eamate yane ngochia bare korua ekeng’wanso agwo ase omochie, na momura ominto onchikire ng’a imbeo. Ase ayio, onye nanyorire ogwancherwa asore, ing’a ribaga ngende korora abaminto. Aya naro agera atachicha ase endagera yao, aye omoruoti.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Erio Saulo akaba nendamwamu enene ase Yonathani, akamotebia, “Aye omwana bw’omokungu omosaria, nimanyete ng’a kwabwatanire na mosinto o Yese, ase okwerentera obosooku, na obosooku bw’obogetirianda bwa nyoko." 
1Samuel20:31 Nomanyete ng’a ekero mosinto o Yese agendererete koba moyo ase ense, aye tokonyara koba nomorembe, gose oboruoti tibokoba obwao. Ase ayio, toma abanto bamondetere; ere goika akwe.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Erio Yonathani akamoboria, “Nase ki araitwe akwe? Ngento ki akorire?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Agwo Saulo akaimokia ritimo akamoruta amobete. Bono Yonathani akamanya ng’a ise narigetie goita Daudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Yonathani akaimoka korwa ase emesa ore nendamwamu enene na tariete gento ase rituko erio ria kabere ri’Omotienyi Omoyia. Nigo abete oichanete ase engencho y’obosooku ise amokorerete ase okogania goita Daudi. 
1Samuel20:35 Emambia ya kabere, Yonathani amo nomwana oria omomura, bakagenda mogondo, ase engaki konya bachikanire na Daudi." 
1Samuel20:36 Agatebia omwana oria, “Minyoka origie emegwe eria nkoruta.” Ekero omwana oria arenge kominyoka, Yonathani akaruta omogwe, noro ogaeta igoro yaye, okagwa bosio bwaye." 
1Samuel20:37 Na ekero omwana oria aigete aase omogwe oria ogwete, Yonathani agaaka eriogi, akamotebia, “Omogwe oyio ore bosio bwao, aaria moino.”" 
1Samuel20:38 Erio Yonathani akarangeria omomura oria, akamotebia, “Minyoka bwango, tobaisa gotebana.” Na omwana oria agasangereria emegwe eria, erio akairana gocha ase omonene oye." 
1Samuel20:39 Omwana oria tamanyete ng’a ninki engencho y’amang’ana ayio, korende Yonathani na Daudi mbayamanyete." 
1Samuel20:40 Yonathani akaa omosae oria ebirwanero biaye akamotebia, “Genda, obiire ase omochie.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Ekero omwana oria achiire, Daudi akaoroka korwa ase etui aase ebisete, agatung’ama inse, akaumama na agekumba ara gatato. Erio Daudi na Yonathani bakanyunyuntana na korererana, korende Daudi akamenta korera mono." 
1Samuel20:42 Erio Yonathani akamotebia, “Genda nomorembe, na abe buna twatiananirie ase erieta ri’Omonene togateba: Omonene abe kirori ase egati yao nainche, na ase egati y’ororeria rwao na orwane, kogenderera botambe.”" 
1Samuel20:43 Erio Daudi akaimoka, akarua agwo, akagenda, na Yonathani akairana ase omochie." 
1Samuel21:1 Daudi akagenda ase Ahimeleki omokuani agwo Nobu. Ahimeleki agacha komorotota ore nobwoba na okoiguswa, akamoboria, “Nase ki ore aye bweka otari na monto onde?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Daudi akairaneria Ahimeleki omokuani, “Omoruoti onchikire gokora omoremo gete; ere nigo antebia ng’a timbaisa gotebia monto onde, erinde amanye igoro y’omoremo oyio antomire na gonchika ng’a nkore. Naende onchikire ng’a ng’umerane nabasomba baane aase gete." 
1Samuel21:3 Bono endagera ki obwate aa? Ing’a emegati etano, gose kende gionsi obwate aa.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Omokuani oria akairaneria Daudi, “Timbwati emegati eria ya botambe aiga, korende emegati eria ere emechenu nereo, na nigo ndakoyee onye abamura abwo betangete na kwerita korwa ase abakungu.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Daudi akairaneria omokuani, akamotebia, “Ekeene, twabeire twetangete korwa ase abakungu ase amatuko atato aerire, buna engencho yaito ere botambe, ekero tokogenda gokora emeremo gete; boigo ebikorero bi’abamura aba nigo bire ebichenu botambe, ekero tokogenda ase orogendo. Onye ayio are bo, naki rende rero ebikorero biabo tibiri ebichenu goetania?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Ase ayio omokuani akaa Daudi emegati eria emechenu, ekiagera mogati onde torengeo otatiga eria konya yarusigwe korwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, erinde eyere iberera ebekweo ase rituko erio." 
1Samuel21:7 Bono ase rituko erio omonto oyomo bw’Edomu, okorokwa Doegi, nao arenge ase obosio bw’Omonene osiekeireo. Ere nigo arenge omoteneneri bw’abarisia ba Saulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Daudi akaboria Ahimeleki, “Nobwate aa ritimo gose omoro? Inche tinarentanete omoro one, gose ebirwanero binde bionsi, ekiagera omoremo oyio omoruoti anchigete gokora nigo oganetie okorwe ase obwango.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Omokuani oria akamotebia, “Omoyio o Goliato, Omofilisti oria gwaitete agwo ase ense omweremo ya Ela, nore aa, oboire egetambaa na kogachwa magega y’egesibao ki’obokuani. Onye koyoganetie yoire, ekiagera onde omoao tori aa.” Daudi agateba, “Onde tori onga buna oyio, yong’e”." 
1Samuel21:10 Ase rituko erio Daudi akarua agwo, agatama korwa ase Saulo, akagenda ase Akisi, omoruoti o Gati," 
1Samuel21:11 Abasomba b’Akisi bakamokwana, “Inee! Oyo tari Daudi Omoruoti? Abakungu tibaterete igoro yaye kobagotenga, bakobora; Saulo oitire chilifu chiaye, korende Daudi oitire chilifu chiaye emerongo na emerongo?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Ekero Daudi aigwete amang’ana ayio, akayabeka ase ebirengererio biaye, akairoka Akisi, omoruoti o Gati, mono." 
1Samuel21:13 Ase igo akaonchora okoba gwe chingencho chiaye ase amasio abo, agekora buna ebarimo na kona‐koara ebisieri biabo; na agatiga amate akana‐konyororoka korwa monwa, agaitekera chinderu chiaye." 
1Samuel21:14 Akisi agatebia abasomba baye, “Rora omonto oyo nebarimo. Nase ki mwamorenta asende?" 
1Samuel21:15 Inee! Inche nigo mborire abanto chibarimo? Ninki kiagera mwarenta ebarimo eye gocha kogosoria obobarimo bwaye ase obosio bwane? Inee! Omonto buna oyo nanyore ribaga asoe nyomba mwane?” 
1Samuel22:1 Daudi akarua agwo, agatama gochia ase rikuruma ri’Adulamu. Ekero abamwabo, na eamate yaye bonsi, baigwete ayio, bakagenda agwo ase arenge." 
1Samuel22:2 Abanto bachandegete, na abwo babwate chisira, na abwo bataisanegete nobogima bwabo, bakamochera, nere akaba omotang’ani obo. Abanto abasacha abarenge amo nere nigo barenge koreng’ana amagana ane." 
1Samuel22:3 Naende Daudi akarua agwo, akagenda Misipa o Moabu; agatebia omoruoti o Moabu, “Koranche oe tata na baba ribaga bache kobeera aa, goika imanye aya Nyasae arankorere.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Daudi agatiga ise na ng’ina bare agwo ase omoruoti o Moabu; barabwo bakagenderera komenya agwo ase engaki yonsi Daudi abete bwebisete ase rikuruma. 
1Samuel22:5 Erio Gadi omobani agatebia Daudi, “Tokogenderera kobeera ase rikuruma eri; karueo, ogende ase ense ya Yuda.” Ase ayio Daudi akaruao akagenda ase rinani ria Hereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Rituko erimo Saulo nigo aikaransete inse y’omote onga buna ekerachuoki ase ekegoro agwo Gibea, obwate ritimo ase okoboko kwaye, na abasomba baye nigo bateneine bamoetanaine. Erio agatebigwa ng’a Daudi amo nabanto barenge komo barorekanire." 
1Samuel22:7 Saulo agakwana nabasomba baye, akabora, “Igwa inwe Ababenjamin! Inee! Mosinto o Yese nae kera oyomo oino emegondo y’endagera amo ney’emesabibu? Nakore inwe mwensi mobe abatang’ani b’abarwani chilifu na ab’amagana?" 
1Samuel22:8 Ayio naro agerire inwe mwensi mwakorire emeroberio ya bobisi ere mamincha yane? Onde tari ogontebia ng’a omwana one okorire okobwatana na mosinto o Yese, gose onde tari okondorera amabera antebie ng’a omwana one oseegetire abasomba baane babeire mamincha yane, erio bamboere buna ere rero iga.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Erio Doegi Omoedomu, oyo oteneine amo nabasomba ba Saulo, akairaneria, akabora, “Narora mosinto o Yese okogenda ase Ahimeleki, mosinto bw’Ahitubu, agwo Nobu." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimeleki akamoboreria ase Omonene, akamoa endagera airane ase orogendo rwaye; boigo akamoa na omoyio oria o Goliato Omofilisti.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Erio omoruoti agatoma abanto korangeria Ahimeleki omokuani, mosinto bw’Ahitubu, amo nabanto bonsi b’eamate yaye, na abakuani bonsi abarenge agwo Nobu. Abwo bonsi bakagenda ase omoruoti." 
1Samuel22:12 Saulo akabora, “Aye mosinto bw’Ahitubu, tegerera, oigwe.” Ere agaitaba, “Nao inde aa, Omonene one.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Saulo akamoboria, “Nase ki aye na mosinto o Yese mwabeire mamincha yane? Aye nkwamoa endagera, na omoyio o birende naende okaboria Nyasae ase engencho yaye? Ere obeire mamincha yane na okomboera buna ere rero iga.”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki akairaneria omoruoti, “Ning’o ase abasomba bao ore omwegenwa buna Daudi? Naende aye omoruoti igo ore ise biara. Daudi boigo nomoteneneri bw’abarendi bao. Nigo asikire mono ase enyomba yao." 
1Samuel22:15 Inee! Eye nengaki entang’ani nabeire nkomoboreria korwa ase Nyasae? Taibo aye omoruoti tobaisa kombarera inche, omosomba oo, gose eamate ya tata bobe bonde, ekiagera timanyeti gento kende gionsi ase ayio, kebe ekenene gose egeke.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Korende omoruoti agatebia Ahimeleki, “Aye amo nabanto bonsi b’eamate ya iso goika mokwe.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Erio omoruoti agatebia abarendi abwo bamoetanaine, “Imoka, moite abakuani abwo b’Omonene, ekiagera nigo babwataine na Daudi. Boigo barabwo mbamanyete ng’a otamire na tibantebetie.” Korende abasomba b’omoruoti bakaanga korambora amaboko abo ase ogoita abakuani b’Omonene." 
1Samuel22:18 Erio omoruoti agatebia Doegi, “Aye imoka oite abakuani abwo,” na Doegi, Omoedomu, akaimoka, akabaita. Ase rituko erio agaita abanto emerongo etano na etato, na batano, abwo babegete ebisibao bi’egatani." 
1Samuel22:19 Boigo Saulo agaita nomoro abanto bonsi barenge agwo Nobu, omochie bw’abakuani. Agaita abasacha, na abakungu, na abana amo nabwo bakogonka, ne chiombe, ne chitigere, ne ching’ondi." 
1Samuel22:20 Korende Abiatari bweka ase basinto b’Ahimeleki bw’Ahitubu, nere agatooreka, agatama gochia ase Daudi." 
1Samuel22:21 Abiatari agatebia Daudi ng’a Saulo oitire abakuani b’Omonene. 
1Samuel22:22 Erio Daudi agatebia Abiatari, “Rituko riria Doegi Omoedomu arenge aaria, inche nabo namanyete ng’a goika atebie Saulo; ase ayio ninche nagerete abanto b’eamate yao bonsi bagaitwa." 
1Samuel22:23 Menya aiga amo nainche, tibwoboa. Saulo nigo akorigia obogima bwane, na obwao boigo. Aye koramenye asende, tokonyorwa na bobe bonde.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Abanto bagatebia Daudi, “Abafilisti nkorwania bakare omochie o Keila, na basakoire chindagera chinyia korwa ase ebiooreri.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Ase ayio Daudi akaboria Omonene, “Nkogenda nde korwania Abafilisti abwo esegi?” Na Omonene akamotebia, “Genda obarwanie, na otoorie Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Korende abanto ba Daudi bakamotebia, “Rora ekero tore aiga ase ense ya Yuda nigo tokwoboa. Inee! Naki erabe rende onye tokogenda Keila korwania abarwani b’Abafilisti esegi? Titokwoboa kobua?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Erio Daudi akaboria Omonene naende, na Omonene akamoiraneria, “Imoka, ogende Keila, ekiagera nimbeke Abafilisti ase okoboko kwao.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Ase igo Daudi na abanto baye bakagenda Keila, bakarwania Abafilisti, bakababua. Bagaita Abafilisti abange mono, bagoosa chiombe chiabo. Igo Daudi agatooria abanto bamenyete agwo Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Ekero Abiatari, mosinto o Ahimeleki, atamete gochia ase Daudi agwo Keila, nigo arentete egesibao ki’obokuani." 
1Samuel23:7 Saulo agatebigwa ng’a Daudi osoire Keila. Erio agateba, “Nyasae obekire Daudi ase okoboko kwane, igo bwebwatire ere bweka, ekiagera osoire ase omochie obwate ebiita na ebisiekero.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Saulo akarangeria abanto bonsi bagende Keila koboera Daudi amo nabanto baye, na kobarwania esegi." 
1Samuel23:9 Daudi agachia komanya ng’a Saulo okorire omoroberio bw’ogocha komosiria, agatebia Abiatari omokuani, “Renta egesibao ekio ki’obokuani aiga.”"
