1Samuel23:10 Erio Daudi akabora, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, inche, omosomba oo, naigure ng’a Saulo ngocha are aiga Keila gosaria omochie ase engencho yane." 
1Samuel23:11 Inee! Abanto ba Keila nigo barandue, bambeke ase amaboko aye? Saulo nachiche buna inche omosomba oo, naigure? Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nagosoroire, koranche ontebie inche omosomba oo ekerabe.” Na Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ee, nachiche.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Naende Daudi akamoboria, “Inee! Abanto ba Keila nigo bagochia kondua inche amo nabanto baane, erinde batobeke ase okoboko gwa Saulo?” Omonene, akamoiraneria, “Ee, nababarue.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Erio Daudi na abanto baye abarenge koreng’ana amagana atano na rimo, bakaimoka, bakarua agwo Keila, bakana‐koong’anya gochia aande onsi ase baare konyara kogenda." 
1Samuel23:14 Ase igo Daudi akagenderera komenya ase amabwago ’ebitunwa ase erooro ya Sifu; na Saulo akagenderera kona‐komorigia kera rituko, korende Omonene tabegete Daudi ase amaboko aye." 
1Samuel23:15 Ekero Daudi arenge agwo Horesi, ase erooro ya Sifu, akaigwa ng’a Saulo konya ochire agwo korigia gosiria obogima bwaye." 
1Samuel23:16 Yonathani, mosinto o Saulo, akaimoka akagenda ase Daudi, aria Horesi, akamoremia na komobeka chinguru ase Nyasae." 
1Samuel23:17 Akamotebia, “Toiroka, ekiagera Saulo tata, tagokonyora agokorere bobe aye nobe omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, nainche nimbe oyo kabere asore. Tata namanyete ayio.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Erio abwo babere bagakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania ase obosio bw’Omonene. Daudi agatigara omenyete agwo Horesi, na Yonathani akairana gochia nka." 
1Samuel23:19 Abanto bande ba Sifu bakagenda ase Saulo agwo Gibea, bakamotebia, “Daudi nigo ebisete ase orogongo rwaito ase amabwago ’ebitunwa bia Horesi, ase ekegoro kia Hakila, irianyi ya Yesimoni." 
1Samuel23:20 Ase ayio, aye omoruoti, inchuo erinde okore buna kwaganetie, naintwe ntomobeke ase okoboko kwao.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Saulo akabairaneria, “Tiga Omonene abasesenie, ekiagera mwandoreire amabera." 
1Samuel23:22 Genda morore na koenekia ase amenyete, naende ng’a ning’o omororire oreo. Natebigwe ng’a ere nigo are omwoge mono ase okong’ainereria." 
1Samuel23:23 Ase ayio genda momanyererie buya aase onsi obwebiso bore, erio moirane asende montebie amaene, nainche ngende amo nainwe. Onye ore ase orogongo orwo, nimorigie ase egati ye chilifu chionsi chi’Abayuda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Barabwo bakaimoka bagatang’anera Saulo, bakagenda Sifu, korende Daudi amo nabanto baye nao barenge ase erooro ya Maoni, agwo ase Ekerubo Ekiomo, irianyi ya Yesimona." 
1Samuel23:25 Saulo na abanto baye bakagenda korigia Daudi, korende Daudi agatebigwa amang’ana ayio. Ase ayio akagenda ase egetare kiarenge ase erooro ya Maoni, akabeerao. Ekero Saulo aigwete ng’a Daudi ogendire agwo akamobwatia gochiao." 
1Samuel23:26 Saulo akagenda ensemo eyemo y’egetunwa, na Daudi na abanto baye bakagenda ensemo ende. Daudi nigo abete okoayerera gotama Saulo, na Saulo na abanto baye konya bachakire konaaria Daudi na abanto baye, ase okobabwata." 
1Samuel23:27 Erio omonto agacha ase Saulo akamotebia, “Irana, ayerera bwango, ekiagera Abafilisti bachire mobosokano korwania ense yaito.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Ase igo Saulo agatiga kobwatia Daudi, akairana, akagenda korwania Abafilisti. Ase ayio aase agwo akarokwa “Egetare ki’Ogwatananeka.”" 
1Samuel23:29 Daudi akarua aase agwo, akagenda, akamenya ase amakuruma ime ase ebitare bia Eni‐Gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Ekero Saulo airanete korwa ase okobwatia Abafilisti, agatebigwa ng’a Daudi nao are ase erooro ya Eni‐Gedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Erio Saulo akaira abarwani chilifu isato abachoretwe korwa ase Abaisraeli bonsi, akagenda korigia Daudi, na abanto baye ase Ebitare bie Chimori chi’Orosana." 
1Samuel24:3 Agaika ase amakuruma e ching’ondi agwo ase enchera, na agwo ase rikuruma erimo agasoa ase ogwekonya. Daudi amo nabanto baye nao baikaransete ime y’ekenunchi kie rikuruma erio." 
1Samuel24:4 Abanto ba Daudi bakamotebia, “Rituko eri ndiria Omonene agotebetie ng’a nabeke omobisa oo ase okoboko kwao, naye omokore buna oranche.” Erio Daudi agachoba ng’ora‐ng’ora, akabutora omokoba bw’eganchwa ya Saulo bobisi." 
1Samuel24:5 Korende nyuma y’ayio enkoro ya Daudi egachaka komogambia, ekiagera konya abutoire omokoba bw’eanga ya Saulo." 
1Samuel24:6 Agatebia abanto baye, “Tiga Omonene antange, timbaisa gokora obobe obwo ase omonene one, ekiagera ere nigo are omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Daudi akaebereria abanto baye ase okobatebia amang’ana ayio, na tabaa ribaga baumokere Saulo. Erio Saulo akaimoka korwa ase rikuruma erio, akagenderera orogendo rwaye." 
1Samuel24:8 Daudi nere akaimoka agasoka korwa ase rikuruma riria, akabwatia Saulo, akarangeria neriogi, agateba, “Aye omoruoti, omonene one!” Ekero Saulo eonchorete korigereria, Daudi agatung’ama inse, akaumama, akorokia amasikani." 
1Samuel24:9 Erio Daudi akaboria Saulo, “Nase ki okoigwera amang’ana abanto bagoteba ng’a inche Daudi ngokorigia inde ngokore bobe?" 
1Samuel24:10 Rigereria orore, rituko ria rero, agwo ase rikuruma ime, Omonene nigo akobeka ase okoboko kwane, na abanto bande nigo bambetereria ng’a ngoite, korende inche nagotiga kore moyo. Nigo nateba ng’a tinkorambora okoboko kwane kogokore aye omonene one bobe, ekiagera aye nomoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene." 
1Samuel24:11 Aye tata, rigereria orore omokoba bw’eanga yao, ore koboko kwane; nigo nayobutora, korende nkagotiga kore moyo, erio nario oramanye ng’a obobe gose ogosaria tibiri asende; inche tindakora ebibe asore, nonya gokorigia kong’ita." 
1Samuel24:12 Tiga Omonene arore oyore nokomocha, ninche gose naye. Omonene anduserie egesiomba, korende okoboko kwane tikogokora bobe." 
1Samuel24:13 Abanto abakoro nigo bagokwana iga: Obobe nigo bogosoka korwa ase abakori amabe. Ase ayio amaboko aane takogokorera bobe bonde. 
1Samuel24:14 Ning’o aye omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli gwachicheire? Ning’o okobwatia? Inee! Nesese ekwete okobwatia, gose nensona." 
1Samuel24:15 Tiga Omonene anache ekina ase egati yane naye, erio andwanerere na gontooria korwa ase okoboko kwao.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Ekero Daudi akoorire gokwana amang’ana aya, Saulo akamoboria, “Eri neriogi riao aye Daudi, omwana one!” Erio Saulo akarera," 
1Samuel24:17 agatebia Daudi, “Aye nigo ore omonyaboronge kombua, ekiagera kwang’akanire amaya ase amabe, korende inche nagoakanire amabe ase amaya." 
1Samuel24:18 Ase rituko ria rero kwaorokirie buna gwakorire amaya asende, ekiagera otang’ita ekero Omonene ambeka ase okoboko kwao." 
1Samuel24:19 Inee! Onye omonto onyorire omobisa oye, nanyare komotiga ore moyo? Ase ayio Omonene tiga akoe eng’eria yao ase amaya aya gwankoreire ase rituko ria rero." 
1Samuel24:20 Bono inche namanyire ng’a naye orabe omoruoti, na oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli mbogenderere koba ase okoboko kwao." 
1Samuel24:21 Gaki bono tiana ase obosio bw’Omonene ng’a togosiria ororeria rwane, naende ng’a togosiria erieta riane rirue ase enyomba ya tata, riebwe.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Ase ayio Daudi agatiana buna igo. Erio Saulo akagenda bwoye, na Daudi na abanto baye bakagenda komenya ase amakuruma ’egetare." 
1Samuel25:1 Samweli agakwa, na Abaisraeli bagasangererekana, bakagenda komoreera; bakamotindeka ase enka yaye agwo Rama. Erio Daudi akaimoka, agatirimboka gochia ase erooro ya Parani." 
1Samuel25:2 Narenge omonto oyomo korwa Maoni obwate amaicho aye agwo Karimeli. Ere nigo arenge omonda mono; nabwate ching’ondi chilifu isato ne chimbori elifu eyemo. Igo arenge koba okonacha ching’ondi chiaye amarionya agwo Karimeli. 
1Samuel25:3 Omonto oyio noyo bw’ororeria rwa Kalebu, nigo arenge korokwa Nabali, na mokaye Abigaeli. Omokungu oyio nigo arenge omong’aini mono na omonyakieni, korende omosacha oria nigo arenge omonto omotindi na omonyandamwamu." 
1Samuel25:4 Ekero Daudi arenge ase erooro akaigwa ng’a Nabali nkonacha arenge ching’ondi chiaye amarionya. 
1Samuel25:5 Erio agatoma abamura ikomi ase Nabali, akabatebia, “Genda ase Nabali agwo Karimeli, momoirere ogokwania kwane," 
1Samuel25:6 momotebie amang’ana aya aane: Omorembe obe asore, na ase enyomba yao, na ase binde bionsi obwate." 
1Samuel25:7 Naigure ng’a nkonacha ore ching’ondi chiao amarionya. Bono abarisia bao nigo barenge amo naintwe; titwabakorerete bobe bonde. Barabwo tibaiberetwe gento kende gionsi ase engaki yonsi barenge Karimeli. 
1Samuel25:8 Boria abasomba bao, nabarabwo mbakoenekerie bo. Ngochia koba tore nomoyega bwe Rituko Rinene; ase ayio tiga abamura abwo natomire asore banyore ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao. Ase ayio, obae barabwo amo nainche Daudi, omwana oo, gento kende obwate ogotoa.”" 
1Samuel25:9 Ekero abamura abwo Daudi atomete baigete ase Nabali, bakamotebia amang’ana onsi a Daudi. Erio bakaganya." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabali akabairaneria, agateba, “Daudi oyio, nere ng’o? Oyio omwana o Yese, nere ng’o? Ase amatuko aya abasomba abange nigo bagotama korwa ase abanene babo." 
1Samuel25:11 Inee! Ninyare koimokia endagera yane, na ekenyugwa kiane, na enyama ye ching’iti chiane nanyenyeire abanto bakonachera ching’ondi amarionya, na kobia abanto ntamanyeti aase bakorua?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Abamura baria Daudi atomete bakairana gochia asare, bakamotebia amang’ana ayio onsi Nabali abatebetie." 
1Samuel25:13 Erio Daudi akabatebia, “Kera omonto eboeranie omoyio oye o birende.” Na kera oyomo akeboerania omoyio oye, na Daudi nere boigo. Abanto amagana aane bagatiira amo na Daudi, na abanto amagana abere bagatigara nyuma korenda ebinto." 
1Samuel25:14 Oyomo bw’abasomba ba Nabali agatebia Abigaeli, moka Nabali, amang’ana ng’a, “Daudi natoma abanto korwa ase erooro gocha gokwania omonene oito, korende ere akabatogonyera." 
1Samuel25:15 Abanto aba nigo bakorete amaya asetore, titwanyoretwe na bobe bonde. Ekero twarenge amo nabarabwo gotaara ase ebitii titwaiberetwe gento kende gionsi." 
1Samuel25:16 Ase engaki yonsi twarenge amo nabarabwo korisia ching’ondi, barabwo nigo barenge asetore buna orwaki, omobaso na obotuko." 
1Samuel25:17 Bono omanye amang’ana ayio, na orengererie inki orakore, ekiagera omonene oito ngochia are gokorerwa bobe, amo nabanto b’enka yaye. Ere nomotindi mono, onde tari oranyare gokwana nere.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Erio agwo Abigaeli agasangereria emegati amagana abere na ebirandi bibere bi’amasankwa biichire nedivai, ne chinyama chie ching’ondi isano chiyekire, na ebigara bisambire ebitita ebinene bitano, na amasabibu amomo amabomba rigana erimo, na amako amomo amabomba amagana abere. Erio akabiberekia chitigere." 
1Samuel25:19 Abigaeli agatebia abasomba baye, “Tang’ana mogende, nainche nkobabwatia inde.” Korende tatebetie Nabali, omosacha oye." 
1Samuel25:20 Ekaba Abigaeli kariinire etigere yaye na ngoeta arenge ase egekengano kiarenge inse y’egetunwa, Daudi na abanto baye bagacha korwa bosio, ekaba goika aumerane nabarabwo." 
1Samuel25:21 Daudi konya otebire ng’a, “Amaene, mbosa narenge korenda enibo y’omonto oyo aiga ase erooro. Ende tiyasira nonya neyemo ase chinibo chiaye chionsi. Na bono ong’akanire amabe ase amaya." 
1Samuel25:22 Ekeene, Nyasae ang’e egesusuro bono na kogenderera onye mambia kobogokia tekonyora naitire na gosiria abanto abasacha bonsi bare amo na Nabali.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Ekero Abigaeli aroche Daudi agaika bwango korwa ase etigere, agekumba inse, akaumama ase obosio bwa Daudi." 
1Samuel25:24 Ekero atungaime inse ase amagoro a Daudi agateba, “Omonene one, okomocha okwo tiga kobarwe igoro yane; koranche ontige inche omosomba oo omokungu nkwane, naye otegerere amang’ana aane." 
1Samuel25:25 Omonene one, tobaisa kobara Nabali, omonto oyo omobe, ng’a nomonto ogwenerete. Nere okorokwa Nabali, na engencho y’erieta eri noboriri. Naboigo are omonto omoriri. Bono inche, omosomba oo omokungu, tinaroche abanto aba aye, omonene one, gwatomete." 
1Samuel25:26 Aye omonene one, Omonene nere ogotangire tigwaitera amanyinga na kweruseria egesiomba nokoboko kwao omonyene. Bono buna Omonene are moyo, na buna aye ore moyo, tiga ababisa bao, abwo bakorigia kogokora bobe, babe buna Nabali." 
1Samuel25:27 Na bono, omonene one, ebiegwa ebi inche omosomba oo nakorenteire, tiga biegwe abanto aba bakogotunyana aye omonene one." 
1Samuel25:28 Nasabire, onyabere okomocha kwane, inche omosomba oo omokungu. Ekeene, Omonene nakore enyomba yao egenderere kobao, ekiagera aye nigo okorwana esegi yaye; na amabe takonyorekana asore ase obogima bwao bwonsi." 
1Samuel25:29 Onye abanto bagokoimokera na korigia obogima bwao kobosiria, Omonene, Nyasae oo, narende obogima bwao, na gokobeka obeere amo nabare moyo, korende natugute obogima bw’ababisa bao buna rigena rikorutwa gochia aare nenduruche." 
1Samuel25:30 Omonene one, ekero Omonene agakoreire amaya ayio onsi akorierete eira ng’a nagokorere, naende okobekire obe omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli," 
1Samuel25:31 aye, omonene one, tokoba nomoichano gose nenkoro egokogambia, ng’a ngwaiterete amanyinga ’abanto batari na komocha, gose ng’a nkweruseretie egesiomba. Bono kerabe Omonene ogokoreire amaya ayio, ong’inyore inche omosomba oo.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Erio Daudi agatebia Abigaeli, “Atogigwe Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oyio ogotoma gwacha koumerana nainche ase rituko ria rero." 
1Samuel25:33 Obong’aini bwao botogigwe, naye boigo otogigwe, ekiagera rituko ria rero gwantangire ting’itera amanyinga na imbe nokomocha gose kweruseria egesiomba inche omonyene." 
1Samuel25:34 Ekeene buna Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, are moyo, oyontangire tinakora amabe asore, onye otaimogete bwango na koumerana nainche, monto onde tarenge nonya noyomo bw’abasacha b’enyomba ya Nabali anga ore gocha koba moyo goika mambia kobogokiamoka.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Erio Daudi agancha ebinto biria omokungu oria amoirerete, akamotebia, “Irana gochia bwoo nomorembe. Rora, naigure amang’ana ao, nanchire okoboria kwao.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Ekero Abigaeli aigete nka, akanyora Nabali obwate omoyega omonene oyoisaine omoruoti agokora. Nabali nigo arenge nomochengo ase enkoro yaye ime, ekiagera konya otindire mono. Ase ayio Abigaeli tamotebetie gento kende, korende akaganya goika bogakia mambia." 
1Samuel25:37 Kobwakiire mambia, na Nabali gatindokire, Abigaeli akamotebia amang’ana ayio. Erio enkoro yaye ekarianyeka, ekoma pa, ekaba buna rigena." 
1Samuel25:38 Naende nyuma y’amatuko ikomi kaerire Omonene agaaka Nabali, na ere agakwa." 
1Samuel25:39 Ekero Daudi aigwete ng’a Nabali okure, akabora, “Omonene atogigwe, ekiagera onduseirie egesiomba ase Nabali ase amabe onsi aya ere ankoreire; naende ontangire inche, omosomba oye, tinakora ebibe. Omonene oakanire obobe obwo, na kobobeka igoro ase Nabali omonyene.” Erio Daudi agatoma abanto bakwane n’Abigaeli, erinde amonyuome abe mokaye." 
1Samuel25:40 Ekero abasomba ba Daudi baigete ase Abigaeli agwo Karimeli, bakamotebia, “Daudi nigo atotomire asore, erinde tokoire obe mokaye.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abigaeli akaimoka, agatung’ama inse, akabora, “Rora, inche omosomba oye omokungu nigo inde ang’e gosibia amagoro ’abasomba b’omonene one.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abigaeli akebeka ang’e bwango, akaimoka akariina etigere, akagenda amo nabasomba baye abaiseke batano. Bagatunyana abanto abwo Daudi atomete, na omosubati oyio akaba moga Daudi." 
1Samuel25:43 Daudi konya onyuomire Ahinoamu korwa Yesireeli; ase igo abwo babere bakaba abakungu baye. 
1Samuel25:44 Saulo konya orure Mikali, omosubati oye, oyorenge moga Daudi, ase Paliti, mosinto o Laisi bw’omochie o Galimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Abanto bande ba Sifu bakagenda ase Saulo agwo Gibea, bakamotebia ng’a Daudi igo akebisete ase ekegoro gia Hakila kororia Yesimoni." 
1Samuel26:2 Erio Saulo akaimoka amo n’Abaisraeli bande chilifu isato abachoretwe korigia Daudi ase erooro ya Sifu. 
1Samuel26:3 Saulo agatoora ase ekegoro kia Hakila kororia Yesimoni ang’e nenchera, korende Daudi akagenderera kobeera agwo ase erooro, na ekero aigwete ng’a Saulo omobwatirie gocha ase erooro," 
1Samuel26:4 agatoma chirooti na igo akamanya na koenekia ng’a Saulo konya oikireo. 
1Samuel26:5 Daudi akaimoka, akagenda aase aria Saulo atoorete. Akarora aase aria Saulo araire amo n’Abineri, mosinto o Neri; omochiki bw’abarwani baye. Saulo nigo araire aase chigari chiabekire chikengete, na abarwani bamoetanaine." 
1Samuel26:6 Erio Daudi akaboria Ahimeleki Omohiti, na Abisai, momura omwabo Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, “Ning’o oranche gotirimboka amo nainche gochia ase Saulo ase egetwori kiaye?” Abisai akamoiraneria, “Ninche ndagende amo naye.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Ase igo ase obotuko obwo Daudi na Abisai bakagenda agwo ase abanto b’egetwori keria, bakanyora Saulo oraire aase chigari chiabekire chikengete. Saulo nigo asimisetie ritimo riaye ang’e nomotwe oye, na Abineri na abarwani bande b’esegi nigo baraire, bamoetanaine." 
1Samuel26:8 Abisai agatebia Daudi, “Rora Nyasae obekire omobisa oo ase okoboko kwao, ase ayio ing’a ribaga imobete ritimo erimo rioka, imobwateranie riroba, gose tinkomobeta kabere.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Daudi agakania Abisai, akamotebia, “Tokomoita, naki ning’o oranyare korambora okoboko kwaye igoro y’omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene amoite, na taegwa egesusuro?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Naende Daudi akabora, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, Omonene omonyene nere oraite Saulo, gose rituko ri’ogokwa kwaye nariike, gose nagende ase esegi na goitwa akwe." 
1Samuel26:11 Korende Omonene antange; tindambora okoboko kwane ase ogoita omoakwa amaguta oye. Imokia ritimo erio rire ang’e ase omotwe oye amo nekerandi keria ki’amache, togende.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Ase ayio Daudi akaimokia ritimo na ekerandi keria ki’amache korwa ensemo y’omotwe o Saulo. Erio Daudi na Abisai bakagenda. Monto onde taroche aya kagokorekana, gose koyamanya, na onde tatabobogete. Bonsi nigo baraire chitoro chindito, ekiagera Omonene abarenterete chitoro echio chindito." 
1Samuel26:13 Erio Daudi akaamboka gochia eng’umbu ende, agatenena aare ase ekegoro keria, bokaba oboare botari boke ase egati yabo." 
1Samuel26:14 Daudi akarangeria abarwani abwo b’esegi, na Abineri, mosinto o Neri, akabora, “Abineri, tori goitaba?” Abineri akairaneria, “Naye ng’o okorangeria omoruoti?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Daudi akaboria Abineri, “Aye tori omonto etuoni? Ning’o ore omoremu buna aye ase egati y’Abaisraeli? Nase ki rende otarendete omonene oo omoruoti? Omonto oyomo nacheteo goita Omonene oo omoruoti." 
1Samuel26:16 Eke gwakorire nigo kere ekebe. Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, nigo mogwenerete goitwa, ekiagera mwasinyirwe korenda omonene oino, oyore omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene. Bono ritimo ri’omoruoti, na ekerandi keria ki’amache kiarenge ang’e nomotwe oye, ng’ai bikare?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Erio Saulo akamanya eriogi ria Daudi, akamoboria, “Naye Daudi, omwana one, eriogi eri neriao?” Daudi akamoiraneria, “Ee omoruoti, omonene one, neriane.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Naende akabora, “Aye omonene one, nase ki okona‐kondigia inche omosomba oo ng’a ong’ite? Ninki nakorire. Nkomocha ki inde nakwo?" 
1Samuel26:19 Bono aye omoruoti, omonene one, igwa amang’ana aane, inche omosomba oo. Onye n’Omonene ogoseegetire ondigia ase ogonsiria, rirorio tiga anchere ekeng’wanso ekio, korende onye nabanto bakogoseegeta igoro asende, rirorio Omonene abaragererie, ekiagera rero iga banseririe ng’a tinyora omwando korwa ase Omonene, bagantebia: Genda okorere chinyasae ching’ao." 
1Samuel26:20 Gaki bono, totiga amanyinga aane aiteke aare korwa ase obosio bw’Omonene. Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli ochire kondigia inche inde ensona, buna omonto okorigia chinkware ase ebitunwa.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Erio Saulo akamotebia “Nakorire ebibe! Aye Daudi, omwana one, irana. Tinkogokorera amabe naende, ekiagera rituko ria rero obogima bwane nigo bwaba bw’engencho enene asore. Nakorire ayare oboriri, na igo nakorire okomocha okonene.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Daudi akamoiraneria, “Aye omoruoti, rora ritimo riao eri, toma omosae oyomo amboke arioyie." 
1Samuel26:23 Omonene nigo agoakana kera omonto buna oboronge bwaye bore, na obwegenwa boigo. Ase rituko ria rero Omonene nigo akobegete ase okoboko kwane, korende nkaanga korambora okoboko kwane igoro ase omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene." 
1Samuel26:24 Ase ayio, buna obogima bwao bwabete obw’engencho enene asende rituko ria rero, naboigo obogima bwane bore ase obosio bw’Omonene; ere nantoorie korwa ase emechando yonsi.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Erio Saulo agatebia Daudi, “Aye Daudi, omwana one, nosesenigwe. Aye nokore ebinto ebinge mono na kobua.” Daudi akabwatia enchera yaye, na Saulo akairana nka bwoye." 
1Samuel27:1 Daudi akarengereria ase enkoro yaye, akabora, “Rituko erimo ning’itwe na Saulo. Egento kerabe ekiya mono asende nogotama korwa aiga na kogenda ase ense y’Abafilisti. Erio nario Saulo ararusie moyo, tana kondigia naende aa ase chingongo chi’Abaisraeli, na nintooreke korwa ase okoboko kwaye.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Ase igo Daudi akaimoka amo nabanto baye amagana atano na rimo, akagenda ase Akisi, mosinto o Maoki, omoruoti o Gati." 
1Samuel27:3 Daudi amo nabanto baye bakamenya amo n’Akisi agwo Gati. Kera omonto nigo amenyete amo nabanto b’eamate yaye, na Daudi amo nabakungu baye babere, Ahinoamu korwa Yesireeli, na Abigaeli korwa Karimeli, oyio Nabali atigete ore omoboraka." 
1Samuel27:4 Ekero Saulo atebetigwe ng’a Daudi konya otamire gochia Gati, tagendete komorigia." 
1Samuel27:5 Erio Daudi agatebia Akisi, “Onye nanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, koranche ong’e aase nkomenya ase omochie ore isiko korwa ase omochie oo. Tari buya asende, omosomba oo, ngenderere komenya ase omochie omonene bw’oboruoti amo naye?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Ase ayio, ase rituko riria Akisi akaa Daudi Sikilagi. Ase engencho eyio omochie oyio o Sikilagi nigo ore oyo bw’abaruoti b’Abayuda goika rero iga." 
1Samuel27:7 Daudi akagenderera komenya ase ense y’Abafilisti ase engaki y’omwaka oyomo na emetienyi ene. 
1Samuel27:8 Ase engaki eyio Daudi na abanto baye bakaba bakogenda korwania Abagesuri, na Abagirisi, na Abaameleki. Abwo nigo barenge ababiare b’ense eyio korwa kare; nigo bamenyete goika Suri na goika orobebe rw’ense ya Misiri." 
1Samuel27:9 Daudi akaba okorwania ense eyio na goita abanto bonsi pi, abasacha na abakungu; agasakora ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chitigere, ne chingamia, akaira ne chianga. Erio aba okoirana gochia ase Akisi." 
1Samuel27:10 Ekero Akisi arenge koboria Daudi, “Insemo ki gwachiete korwania rituko ria rero?” “Daudi aba okomoiraneria,” “Ense ya Irianyi ere ey’Abayuda,” gose “Ense ya Irianyi ere eya Yerameeli,” gose “Ense ya Irianyi ere ey’Abakeni,”" 
1Samuel27:11 Daudi tarenge gotiga nonya nomonto oyomo, omosacha gose omokungu, ore moyo, ekiagera nigo arengereretie ng’a onde tabaisa kogenda Gati atebe ng’a, “Aya naro Daudi agotokorera.” Naboigo yarenge engencho ya Daudi ekero agendererete komenya ase ense y’Abafilisti." 
1Samuel27:12 Ase ayio Akisi akegena Daudi mono, akarengereria, “Bono Daudi okorire Abaisraeli bamwabo bamogeche kegima; ase igo ogenderere koba omosomba one botambe.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ase engaki eyio Abafilisti bagasangereria abarwani babo amo, erinde barwanie Abaisraeli, na Akisi agatebia Daudi, “Goika omanye ng’a aye amo nabanto bao nigo mogochia kondwanesia esegi.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Daudi akamoiraneria, “Ayio mbuya kegima; aye nomanye egento inche, omosomba oo, ndakore.” Akisi agatebia Daudi, “Ningokore obe omorendi bw’obogima bwane kogenderera botambe.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Bono Samweli konya okure, na Abaisraeli bonsi konya bamoreereire, bamotindekire ase omochie oye Rama. Boigo Saulo konya oseririe abanto barenge koboria amang’ana korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakure, amo nabaringoria bonsi." 
1Samuel28:4 Abafilisti bagasangererekana, bagatoora agwo Sunemu; Saulo nere agasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi amo, nabarabwo bagatoora agwo Giliboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Ekero Saulo aroche abarwani b’Abafilisti agasogwa nomoondoko, na enkoro yaye ekaiguswa mono." 
1Samuel28:6 Saulo akaboria komanya korwa ase Omonene, korende Omonene tamoiraneretie gento kende, nonya goetera ase chindoto, gose goetera ase Urimu, gose goetera ase ababani." 
1Samuel28:7 Erio Saulo agatebia abasomba baye, “Indigererie omokungu okoboria amang’ana korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakure, nimochiere, ndigie ogosemigwa korwa asare.” Abasomba baye bakamoiraneria, “Naama! Agwo Eni‐Dori omokungu buna oyio nareo.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Erio Saulo agekona, akabeka chianga ching’ao, akagenda amo nabanto bande babere, bagaika ase omokungu oyio botuko. Saulo agatebia omokungu oria, “Indagore ase omoika, ondetere omonto oria ndatore erieta riaye asore.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Amaene, aye nomanyete aya Saulo akorire, buna asiririe korwa ase ense eye abakungu abakoboria emeika y’abanto bakure amo nabaringoria bonsi. Nase ki rende okombeka ase oboreba, mbwatwe na gokwa?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Erio Saulo agatiana ase engencho y’omokungu oria, agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, aye tokonyora egesusuro ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Omokungu oria akamoboria, “Ning’o oganetie nkorangererie arorekane?” Saulo akamoiraneria, “Indangererie Samweli.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Korende ekero omokungu oria aroche Samweli, agakuura neriogi rinene agatebia Saulo, “Nase ki kwang’aina? Aye n’Saulo.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Omoruoti oria akamotebia, “Tibwoboa! Ninki kwarora?” Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Narorire enyasae egotiira korwa riroba inse.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Saulo akamoboria, “Naki ekerorekana?” Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Nomogaaka omogotu bwetubete egetambaa gi’okwambara.” Erio Saulo akamanya ng’a oyio n’Samweli, agatung’ama inse, akaorokia amasikani." 
1Samuel28:15 Samweli akaboria Saulo, “Nase ki gwanchandire okondeta korwa ase omotimoko one.” Saulo akairaneria, “Inche nigo nchandegete mono; Abafilisti nkondwania bare esegi, na Nyasae onyangire, tari kong’iraneria, goetera ase ababani, gose ase chindoto. Ase ayio nigo nakorangeirie, erinde ontebie eki ndakore.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samweli akairaneria, “Nase ki okomboria inche, onye Omonene okwangire na obeire omobisa oo?" 
1Samuel28:17 Omonene ogokoreire ayio akwanete goetera asende; okourire oboruoti korwa ase amaboko ao, oboeire omonto omoao, nere Daudi." 
1Samuel28:18 Tikwaigwerete eriogi ri’Omonene, gose goikerania egesusuro ki’endamwamu yaye entindi igoro y’Abaameleki. Ekio nakio kiagera Omonene akorire amang’ana ayio asore rero iga." 
1Samuel28:19 Boigo Omonene nache abeke Abaisraeli amo naye ase amaboko ’Abafilisti. Ankio aye amo nabamura bao moche kobeera amo nainche, na Omonene nache abeke abarwani b’esegi b’Abaisraeli ase amaboko ’Abafilisti.”" 
1Samuel28:20 Erio agwo Saulo agaaka inse, akarambereria ore nobwoba obonene ase amang’ana ayio a Samweli. Chinguru chikamoerera kegima, ekiagera tariete kende ase omobaso bwonsi na obotuko boigo." 
1Samuel28:21 Erio omokungu oria akamochera Saulo akarora ng’a osoirwe nomoondoko, akamotebia, “Rora inche omosomba oo omokungu nigonakoigwera na tinaegerete obogima bwane, nakora buna kwaganetie." 
1Samuel28:22 Gaki bono koranche inyigwe inche omosomba oo omokungu, tiga nkorentere endagera orie, erinde onyore chinguru, ogenderere norogendo rwao.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Ere akaanga, akabora, “Tinganeti koria,” korende abasomba baye amo nomokungu oria bakamosorora goika akaigwera amang’ana abo. Erio akaimoka korwa inse agwo, agaikaransa borere." 
1Samuel28:24 Omokungu oria nabwate emori enoru nka bwoye, akayenyenya bwango. Boigo akaimokia obosie, akabokonya, agakora emegati etabekiri memera, akayegekera." 
1Samuel28:25 Erio akarenta endagera eyio ase Saulo na abasomba baye, nabarabwo bakayeria. Nyuma y’ayio bakaimoka, bakagenda ase obotuko obwo." 
1Samuel29:1 Abafilisti bagasangereria abarwani babo bonsi b’esegi agwo Afeki, na Abaisraeli bagatoora ang’e nensoko yarenge agwo Yesireeli." 
1Samuel29:2 Abanene b’Abafilisti bagacha bagaeta baare nebiombe biabo bi’abanto amagana ne chilifu. Daudi na abanto baye bakaba bakorwa nyuma amo n’Akisi. 
1Samuel29:3 Erio abanene baria b’Abafilisti bakaboria, “Ninki Abaibirania aba bagokora aiga?” Akisi akabairaneria, “Oyo n’Daudi, omosomba o Saulo, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli. Oyio obeire omenyete amo nainche goetania omwaka oyomo, tinana korora komocha asare korwa riria achete asende goika rero iga.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Korende abanene b’Abafilisti bakaba nendamwamu enene ase Akisi, bakamotebia, “Irania omonto oyo agende aase kwamobegete amenye. Ere takogenda amo naintwe korwana esegi. Karaikeo nabo arabaise gotoonchokera, abe omobisa oito. Naki arakore anyore ogwancherwa ase omonene oye otatiga ase ogoita abanto baito." 
1Samuel29:5 Inee! Daudi tari ere oria abakungu baterete igoro yaye kobagotenga, bakabora: Saulo oitire chilifu chiaye, korende Daudi oitire chilifu chiaye emerongo na emerongo.”" 
1Samuel29:6 Erio Akisi akarangeria Daudi, akamotebia, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, nigo ndoche buya ng’a ogende amo nainche ase esegi. Korwa ekero gwachete asende goika rituko ria rero tinana korora okomocha asore, korende nonya naboigo, abanene aba tibagwancheti." 
1Samuel29:7 Ase ayio irana ogende nomorembe, erinde tobaisa gokora gento ase okogechia abanene b’Abafilisti.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Daudi akaboria Akisi, “Ngento ki nakorire? Korwa ekero inche, omosomba oo, nachete aa kogokorera, goika rituko ria rero, mbobe ki kwarorire asende bokogera tingenda korwania ababisa bao, aye omoruoti, omonene one?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akisi akamoiraneria, “Inche nimanyete buya ng’a nigo ore omoronge asende buna omomalaika bw’Omonene. Korende nonya nabo abanene b’Abafilisti bakanire ng’a aye Daudi tobaisa kogenda amo naintwe ase esegi." 
1Samuel29:10 Ase ayio, aye amo nabasomba bande b’Omonene oo baria bachete amo naye, moche moimoke mambia chuni erio mochake kogenda kobogokiamoka.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Ase igo Daudi amo nabanto baye bakaimoka mambia chuni, bagachaka orogendo rwabo, bakairana ase ense y’Abafilisti, korende Abafilisti bakagenda gochia Yesireeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Ase rituko ria gatato Daudi na abanto baye bagaika Sikilagi. Abaameleki konya bachakire esegi agwo Negebu na Sikilagi. Na bono konya babuire Sikilagi na koyosamba nomorero," 
1Samuel30:2 boosire abakungu na bonsi abarengeo, abake na abanene. Tibaitete monto onde, korende nigo babairete, bakagenda nabarabwo." 
1Samuel30:3 Ekero Daudi na abanto baye bachete ase omochie oyio, bakanyora ng’a osambirwe, na abakungu babo amo nabamura na abaiseke babo bairirwe ase obosomba." 
1Samuel30:4 Erio Daudi na abanto baria barenge komo bagaaka amariogi abo, bakarera mono goika chinguru chikabaerera." 
1Samuel30:5 Abakungu ba Daudi bonsi babere, Ahinoamu korwa Yesireeli, na Abigaeli, oyotigetwe omoboraka orenge moka Nabali o Karimeli, konya bairirwe ase obosomba nabarabwo." 
1Samuel30:6 Daudi akaba nemechando emenene, ekiagera abanto nigo barengereretie komoaka amagena bamoite. Barabwo nigo barenge nobororo obonge ase engencho y’abana babo abamura na abaiseke. Korende Daudi akanyora chinguru korwa ase Omonene Nyasae oye." 
1Samuel30:7 Daudi agatebia Abiatari omokuani, mosinto bw’Ahimeleki, “Ndetere egesibao ki’obokuani.” Abiatari akarentera Daudi egesibao keria." 
1Samuel30:8 Daudi akaboria Omonene, akabora, “Inee! Ndabwatia omoganda oyo bw’abauri? Nimbaikere gose?” Omonene akamoiraneria, “Babwatie! Nobatoorie abanto boosirwe.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Erio Daudi amo nabanto baye amagana atano na rimo bakagenda, bagaika ase akarooche ka Besori. Agwo abanto bande bagatigara nyuma." 
1Samuel30:10 Daudi amo nabanto amagana ane bakagenderera kobwatia ababisa baria. Abanto baria bande amagana abere bakarosa mono, bagasinywa kwamboka; ase igo bagatigara ase akarooche karia Besori." 
1Samuel30:11 Abanto baria ba Daudi bakanyora omomura omosae bw’Abamisiri agwo ase arenge aarabu, bakamorenta ase Daudi, bakamoa omogati akaria, na amache akanywa," 
1Samuel30:12 naende bakamoa amako amomo, na amabomba abere ay’amasabibu amomo, na ekero arire, akanyora chinguru. Ase engaki y’amatuko atato konya atana koria gento, gose konywa." 
1Samuel30:13 Daudi akamoboria, “Noyo ng’o ore? Seino ng’ai?” Omosae oria akairaneria, “Inche nigo inde omomura bw’Abamisiri na omosomba bw’omonto oyomo Omoameleki. Bono amatuko atato aerire korwa ekero omonene one antigete, ekiagera nabete omorwaire." 
1Samuel30:14 Intwe nigo twasanyorera Negebu aase Abakereti bamenyete, na ensemo ere ey’Abayuda na ey’abanto ba Kalebu. Boigo togasamba Sikilagi nomorero.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Daudi akamoboria, “Inee! Nonyare kong’ira na konyorokia aase abauri abwo bare?” Omomura oria akairaneria, “Tiana ase Nyasae ng’a tokong’ita, gose tokombeka ase okoboko kw’omonene one; rirorio ninkoire nkwoorokie aase omoganda oria ore.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Erio akaraa Daudi gochiao. Abauri abwo nigo baserebekanete aande onsi bakoria, bakonywa na kwegokia, ekiagera konya banyorire ebisakorwa ebinge korwa ase ense y’Abafilisti na ense ya Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Daudi akabarwania korwa mogoroba kobokomura‐mura goika mogoroba rituko ria kabere. Agaita abanto bonsi otatiga abamura amagana ane abariinete chingamia batamete. 
1Samuel30:18 Daudi akairania ebinto bionsi, na abanto bonsi, aba Abaameleki konya bairire, amo nabakungu baye babere." 
1Samuel30:19 Onde tasirete nonya noyomo, omoke gose omonene. Kera omwana, omomura gose omoiseke, o kera omonto nigo atooretigwe, na ebinto bionsi boigo. Daudi akairania abanto bonsi, na ebinto bionsi pi." 
1Samuel30:20 Boigo Daudi akairania ching’ondi, ne chimbori, ne chiombe. Abanto baye bagachitang’ania bosio bwaye, bagateba, “Ebi nebisakorwa bia Daudi.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Erio Daudi akairana gochia ase abanto baria amagana abere konya barosire batigarete agwo ase akarooche ka Besori. Ekero aigete ang’e, barabwo bagacha komorotota, ere na abanto baria barenge komo. Daudi akabachiera, akabakwania." 
1Samuel30:22 Korende abanto bande ababe abatagwenerete ase abwo bagendete na Daudi bakabora, “Ekiagera abanto aba tibagendete amo naintwe, titokobaa gento kende gionsi ase ebi twasakoire, otatiga kera omonto araegwe mokaye na abana baye, aire bwoye.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Korende Daudi akabatebia, “Abaminto, timobaisa gokora igo nebinto ebi Omonene atoiraneirie. Ere ototooririe, obekire ase amaboko aito abanto baria abauri abwo batoumokerete." 
1Samuel30:24 Ning’o oranyare kobaigwera ase amang’ana buna ayio? Yaya, buna abanto abwo bagendete korwana esegi bakoegwa ebisakorwa, naboigo nabwo batigarete nyuma korenda ebinto baraegwe. Nigo baragaberwe bareng’anie.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Korwa ase rituko erio Daudi agakora ring’ana erio rikaba ogochika ase Abaisraeli. Naboigo rire nonya ngoika rero iga. 
1Samuel30:26 Ekero Daudi aigete Sikilagi, agatoma ebiegwa ase abagaaka b’Abayuda abwo barenge abasani baye, akabora, “Ebiegwa ebi nebisakorwa korwa ase ababisa b’Omonene.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Naboigo abitomerete abagaaka ba Beteli na Ramoti agwo Negebu, na abwo b’emechie ya Yatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 na Aroeri, na Sifamoti, na Esitemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 na Rakali; abwo b’emechie y’Abayerameli, na Abakeni," 
1Samuel30:30 abwo ba Horima, na Bori‐Asani, na Ataki," 
1Samuel30:31 na Heburoni. Agatoma ebiegwa ase chinsemo echio chionsi ase arenge kona‐gotaarera amo nabanto baye. 
1Samuel31:1 Abafilisti bakarwania Abaisraeli, na Abaisraeli bagatama korwa asebare, bagaiterwa ase egetunwa kia Giliboa" 
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisti bakabwatia Saulo mono, na abamura baye, bagaita Yonathani, na Aminadabu, na Maliki‐Sua, abamura ba Saulo." 
1Samuel31:3 Esegi ekaba entindi mono igoro ya Saulo; abaruti emegwe bakamoromereria mono; ere akabwatwa nomoondoko omonene ase engencho ya barabwo. 
1Samuel31:4 Erio Saulo agatebia omonto oria omobogoreretie ebirwanero, “Somora omoyio, ombete nkwe, erinde abanto aba batarogeti tibabaisa kong’ita na gonchecheria.” Korende omonto oria akaanga, ekiagera abete nobwoba obonene. Erio Saulo agasomora omoyio oye omonyene, akegweria ase omoyio oyio bweka omonyene." 
1Samuel31:5 Ekero omobogoria ebirwanero aroche ayio, nere akegweria ase omoyio oye, agakwa amo na Saulo." 
1Samuel31:6 Nabo Saulo, na abamura baye batato, na omobogoria ebirwanero, amo nabanto baye bonsi, baitetwe ase rituko erio erimo." 
1Samuel31:7 Ekero Abaisraeli abwo barenge ensemo ende ase ense omweremo, na abwo narenge moocha ya Yorodan baigwete ng’a Abaisraeli konya batamire, na ng’a Saulo na abamura baye bakure, bagatiga emechie yabo bagatama. Erio Abafilisti bakagenda bakamenya ase emechie eyio." 
1Samuel31:8 Rituko ria kabere ekero Abafilisti bachete konuura ebinto korwa ase emebere y’abanto bakwete, bakanyora Saulo na abamura baye batato bakwete agwo ase egetunwa kia Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Abafilisti bakabutora omotwe o Saulo, bakaira na ebirwanero biaye, erio bagatoma abanto bararie amang’ana ayio ase ense yonsi y’Abafilisti, ase hekalu y’emegwekano yabo bagosasima, na ase abanto." 
1Samuel31:10 Erio bakabeka ebirwanero biaye ase enyomba y’Asitaroti, enyasae yabo enkungu, na omobere oye bakayotonga ase orwaki rwa Beti‐Sani." 
1Samuel31:11 Ekero abanto bamenyete Yabesi o Gileadi baigwete aya Abafilisti bakorete ase Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 abanto bonsi chituoni bakaimoka, bakagenda ase obotuko obogima, bakarusia omobere o Saulo, na ey’abamura baye, korwa ase orwaki rwa Beti‐Sani, bakayerenta Yabesi, bakayesambera aroro." 
1Samuel31:13 Erio bakabogoria amauga abo, bakayatindeka inse y’omote onga buna ekerachuoki agwo Yabesi, bakeng’ata ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
2Samuel1:1 Nyuma Saulo gakure, Daudi akairana korwa ase ogoita Abaameleki, akabeera agwo Sikilagi ase engaki y’amatuko abere." 
2Samuel1:2 Ase rituko ria gatato omonto agacha korwa ase egetwori gia Saulo; chianga chiaye nigo chiatandoire, na amaroba are ase omotwe oye. Ekero aigete ase Daudi, agekumba gochia inse ase okoorokia amasikani." 
2Samuel1:3 Daudi akamoboria, “Ng’ai okorwa?” Ere akamoiraneria, “Nigo natoorekire korwa ase egetwori ki’Abaisraeli.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Naende Daudi akamoboria, “Naki esegi egendererete? Nagosabire ontebie.” Omonto oria akamoiraneria, “Abanto abange batamire korwa ase esegi eria, na abande abange mono baitirwe bakure. Boigo Saulo amo na Yonathani, momura oye, baitirwe bakure.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Daudi akaboria omomura oria, “Naki gwakorete okamanya ng’a Saulo na Yonathani, momura oye, bakure?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Omomura oria akamoiraneria, “Nigo yaba ng’a nao nare ase egetunwa kia Giliboa, na aroro nkarora Saulo osigamerete ritimo riaye; chigari konya chiamoikereire ang’e, na abanto bariinete chibarasi bakomominyokia." 
2Samuel1:7 Agachia korigereria nyuma, akandora, akandangeria, na inche ngaitaba: Nao inde aa." 
2Samuel1:8 Erio akamboria: Naye ng’o? Nkamoiraneria ng’a n’Omoamelekiinde. 
2Samuel1:9 Ere agantebia: Koranche, ong’ike ang’e ong’ite, ekiagera nonya ngendererete koba moyo, nigo inde nobororo bw’ogokwa." 
2Samuel1:10 Ase ayio nkamoika ang’e, nkamoita, ekiagrea nigo namanyete ng’a tare koba moyo nyuma kagure. Nkamorusia egutwa y’obogambi yare motwe oye na egetange kiarenge koboko kwaye, narentire ebinto ebio aa asore, aye omonene one.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Erio Daudi akabwata chianga chiaye, agachitandora, na abanto bonsi abarenge amo nere bagakora bo." 
2Samuel1:12 Bakarera na kweumia, na kweng’ata goika mogoroba ase engencho ya Saulo na Yonathani, omwana oye, na ase engencho y’abanto b’Omonene na ey’Abaisraeli, ekiagera barabwo konya baitirwe nemioro." 
2Samuel1:13 Daudi akaboria omomura oria omotebia amang’ana ayio, “Aye noyo o arari ore?” Ere akamoiraneria, “Inche nigo inde omwana bw’Omoameleki ore omomenyi aa.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Daudi akamoboria, “Naki yabete otairogete korambora okoboko kwao ase ogoita omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Erio Daudi akarangeria omomura oyomo, akamotebia, “Inchuo omoite!” Omomura oria agaaka Omoameleki oria, akamoita," 
2Samuel1:16 ekiagera Daudi konya otebirie Omoameleki oria, “Okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ao, tiga kobarwe igoro yao, ekiagera kwebereire kirori aye omonyene, ekero gwateba ng’a gwaitire omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Daudi akoreera Saulo na Yonathani, momura o Saulo, nogotera oko gw’okweumia." 
2Samuel1:18 Agachika ng’a abanto b’egesaku kia Yuda borokererigwe ogotera okwo kw’obota korikire ase Ebuku ya Yashari. 
2Samuel1:19 “Inwe Abaisraeli, obonene bwaino bwasireire igoro ase ebigoro biaino! Chituoni chi’esegi chiaitirwe." 
2Samuel1:20 Timoteba amang’ana aya ase Gati, timoyararia ase chinchera chi’Askeloni. Timotiga abaiseke b’Abafilisti bachenge; timotiga abaiseke b’abanto baria batarogeti bagoke!”" 
2Samuel1:21 “Inwe ebigoro bia Giliboa, ogotoora kwe riime tikoba igoro asemore, gose embura tetwa, gose emegondo teba ekwama endagera ekoruegwa ase Omonene, ekiagera aroro agwo nao chinguba chie chituoni chiasareretigwe, na enguba ya Saulo etaagetwe amaguta naende." 
2Samuel1:22 Obota bwa Yonathani nigo bwaitete abanto abange, nigo bwaiterete amanyinga, bogaita abanto chituoni abarenge abanoru; naboigo omoro o Saulo torenge koirana bosa.”" 
2Samuel1:23 “Saulo na Yonathani barenge abanchwa baito, barenge gotogokia. Ase obogima na ase amakweri tibaatananetwe. Barabwo nigo barenge abaango kobua chinsoti, nigo barenge ne chinguru kobua chindo.”" 
2Samuel1:24 “Inwe abakungu b’Abaisraeli, reerera Saulo, nere obaboyetie chianga chie rigori rinene, chianga chimbariri chi’okwegokeria, agachichabera ebinto bi’etahabu.”" 
2Samuel1:25 “Chituoni chiaitirwe ase esegi! Yonathani nao araire ase ebigoro igoro, oitire.”" 
2Samuel1:26 “Aye Yonathani ominto, nigo inde nomoichano omonene ase engencho yao, aye nigo konya ongogetie mono. Obwanchani bwao nigo bwarenge bongogetie kobua obwanchani bw’abakungu.”" 
2Samuel1:27 “Chituoni chiaitirwe, na ebirwanero bi’esegi biasirigwe!”" 
2Samuel2:1 Nyuma y’ayio Daudi akaboria Omonene, “Inee! Ndagenda ase omochie onde bw’Abayuda inyoire?” Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ee, genda.” Naende Daudi akamoboria, “Norori?” Omonene akamoiraneria, “Heburoni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Ase igo Daudi agatiira gochiao amo nabakungu baye babere, Ahinoamu korwa Yesireeli, na Abigaeli, oyotigetwe omoboraka, orenge moka Nabali o Karimeli." 
2Samuel2:3 Boigo akairana abanto baye bonsi amo ne chiamate chiabo komenya ase emechie ya Heburoni. 
2Samuel2:4 Abayuda bagacha Heburoni, bagaaka Daudi amaguta akaba omoruoti igoro y’abanto b’egesaku kiabo. Ekero Daudi atebetigwe ng’a abanto ba Yabesi o Gileadi nabwo batindegete Saulo," 
2Samuel2:5 agatoma amang’ana gochia Yabesi o Gileadi gotebia abanto b’aroro, “Omonene abasesenie, ekiagera mwaorogetie obuya bwaino ase Saulo, omonene oino, ase okomotindeka." 
2Samuel2:6 Omonene abaorokerie obwanchani bwaye botari koera, na obwegenwa bwaye. Nainche boigo nimbakorere amaya, ekiagera mwakora ring’ana erio." 
2Samuel2:7 Ase ayio bono motenene bokong’u, mobe abaremu. Saulo, omonene oino, okure, na Abayuda bang’akire amaguta imbe omoruoti obo.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Bono Abineri, mosinto o Neri, orenge omotang’ani bw’abarwani ba Saulo. Ere konya oirire Isi‐Boseti, mosinto o Saulo, gochia Mahanaimu," 
2Samuel2:9 akamobeka koba omoruoti igoro ase abanto ba Gileadi, na Asuri, na Yesireeli, na Efraimu, na Benjamin, na igoro ase Abaisraeli bonsi." 
2Samuel2:10 Isi‐Boseti, mosinto o Saulo, konya okoorire emiaka emerongo ene ekero abegetwe koba omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli; akagamba ase engaki y’emiaka ebere. Korende abanto b’egesaku kia Yuda bakaba bakobwatia Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Ere akabagambera Abayuda agwo Heburoni ase engaki y’emiaka etano na ebere, na emetienyi etano nomo." 
2Samuel2:12 Abineri, mosinto o Neri, na abasomba ba Isi‐Boseti, mosinto o Saulo, bakarua Mahanaimu, bakagenda ase omochie o Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, na abanto ba Daudi bakagenda, bakaumerana nabarabwo ase ritibo ria Gibeoni. Abanto aba bakabeera ensemo eyemo ye ritibo riria, na abwo bande ensemo ende." 
2Samuel2:14 Abineri agatebia Yoabu, “Tiga abamura baimoke bagosorie ase amasio aito.” Yoabu agateba, “Tiga baimoke.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Erio bakaimoka, bakaroberia abanto ikomi na babere abatenenerete egesaku kia Benjamin na Isi‐Boseti, mosinto o Saulo, na abanto ikomi na babere abatenenerete Daudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Kera oyomo akabwata omotwe bw’oyo riare koamererania, na komobeta omoyio ase rikere; bonsi bakagwa inse bagakwa. Ase ayio, aase aria a Gibeoni akarokwa Helikati‐Hasurimu." 
2Samuel2:17 Esegi ekaba entindi mono ase rituko erio, na Abineri na Abaisraeli bakabugwa nabanto ba Daudi." 
2Samuel2:18 Abamura batato b’omokungu Seruya, Yoabu na Abisai, na Asaeli, nao barenge. Asaeli nigo arenge omominyoki mono buna egesia." 
2Samuel2:19 Ere agachaka kobwatia Abineri, na ekero arenge komobwatia taonchogete gochia aande, ensemo ya borio gose eya bomosi." 
2Samuel2:20 Abineri akeonchora, akamoboria, “Naye Asaeli?” Ere akairaneria, “Ee, ninche.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abineri akamotebia, “Gobera gochia ensemo ende, eya borio gose eya bomosi, obwatie omomura oyomo bw’abwo, oire ebirwanero biaye.” Korende Asaeli tancha koonchoka amotige." 
2Samuel2:22 Abineri akamotebia eria kabere, “Gobera, tiga kombwatia. Nigo orabaise kogera ngoake nkobwateranie inse. Igo naki ndakore ng’oroke ase obosio bwa Yoabu omino?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Korende Asaeli akaanga kogobera. Ase igo Abineri akamobeta enda nesimisi y’orotanga rwe ritimo, na rirorio rigasokera omogongo oye. Asaeli agaaka inse, agakwera agwo aase arenge, Abanto bonsi abachete agwo ase Asaeli akwerete, bagatenenao." 
2Samuel2:24 Korenge Yoabu na Abisai bakabwatia Abineri. Ekero erioba rigochia kogwa bagaika ekegoro ki’Ama, kerochie Gia, ase enchera ekogenda erooro ya Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Abanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin bagasangerererkana amo ase okoegera Abineri, bakagenda ase ekegoro igoro, bagatenenao." 
2Samuel2:26 Erio Abineri akarangeria Yoabu, akamoboria, “Inee! Nigo oganetie omoro oite abanto kogenderera botambe? Tomanyeti ng’a omoerio nobororo borabe? Nengaki eng’ana naki oraganye goika omanye gokania abanto bao tibabwatia abamwabo?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, buna Nyasae are moyo, onye otakwana, abanto baane anga nigo barenge kobabwatia goika mambia.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ase igo Yoabu akabugia egetureri, na abanto bonsi bagatenena, bagatiga kobwatia Abaisraeli, tibaba bakobarwania naende." 
2Samuel2:29 Abineri na abanto baye bakagenda ase obotuko boria obogima goetera ase Ekerubo Ekiomo; bakaamboka orooche rwa Yorodan, bagaeta egati ya Bitironi, bagaika Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Yoabu akairana korwa ase okobwatia Abineri; na ekero asangereretie abanto bonsi amo, bakanyora ng’a abasomba ba Daudi ikomi na kianda tibaiyo; boigo Asaeli taiyo." 
2Samuel2:31 Korende abanto ba Daudi konya baitire abanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin amagana atato, na emerongo etano nomo, abwo barenge amo n’Abineri." 
2Samuel2:32 Abanto bakaimokia omobere bw’Asaeli, bakayoira bakayotindeka ase embeera ya ise agwo Bethlehemu. Erio Yoabu na abanto baye bakaba bare ase orogendo ase obotuko obogima, na ekero baikire Heburoni bokabakiera aroro." 
2Samuel3:1 Esegi ase egati y’eamate ya Saulo na eya Daudi ekaba ekogenderera ase engaki entambe. Daudi akagenderera komenteka chinguru chiaye, korende abanto b’eamate ya Saulo bakagenderera koba aboro goetania." 
2Samuel3:2 Aba nabwo abamura Daudi aiboreretwe agwo Heburoni: Aminoni nere orenge omwana oye omotangi, omwana bw’Ahinoamu korwa Yesireeli." 
2Samuel3:3 Oyo o kabere Kileabu, omwana bw’Abigaeli, oyotigetwe omoboraka, orenge moka Nabali o Karimeli; na oyo o gatato Abisalomu o Maaka, mosubati o Talimai, omoruoti o Gesuri." 
2Samuel3:4 Oyo o kane Adonia o Hagiti, na oyo o gatano Sefatia bw’Abitali;" 
2Samuel3:5 na oyo o gatano na rimo Iteramu bw’Egila, moga Daudi. Abamura aba nabwo Daudi aiboreretwe agwo Heburoni." 
2Samuel3:6 Ekero esegi eyio yagendererete ase egati y’eamate ya Saulo na eya Daudi, Abineri akagenderera kwenyorera chinguru chinyinge ase egati y’eamate ya Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Saulo nabwate omokungu o sere‐sere ore korokwa Risipa, mosubati bw’Aya. Isi‐Boseti akaboria Abineri, “Nase ki mwamenyanire nomokungu o sere‐sere o tata?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Erio Abineri akaba nendamwamu enene ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio a Isi‐Boseti, akabora, “Inee! Inche nigo inde omotwe bw’esese korwa ase ense ya Yuda? Goika rituko ria rero ngendererete koba omwegenwa ase abanto b’eamate ya Saulo iso, na ase abamwabo, na ase abasani baye, ko tinakobeka ase okoboko gwa Daudi, na bono aye gwansoeire na gonkora koba nokomocha ase engencho y’omokungu oyo." 
2Samuel3:9 Nyasae ang’e egesusuro ekenene onye tingoikeraneria Daudi aya Omonene amorierete eira amokore: 
2Samuel3:10 Arusie oboruoti korwa ase enyomba ya Saulo, abobeke ase Daudi, na Daudi abe omoruoti, agambere Abaisraeli na Abayuda korwa Dani goika Beeri‐Seba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Na Isi‐Boseti tanyara koiraneria Abineri ring’ana nonya nerimo, ekiagera amoirogete." 
2Samuel3:12 Abineri agatoma abanto ase Daudi agwo Heburoni, akabora, “Ense eye neya ng’o? Kora okobwatana nainche, erio ngokonye na nkorentere Abaisraeli bonsi babwatane naye.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Daudi agatoma amairanerio, agateba, “Ayio namaya, ninkore bo. Korende ninganetie onkorere egento ekemo. Kogocha aa ondetere Mikali, mosubati o Saulo. Onye togokora bo, rirorio tokonyara kondora.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Erio Daudi agatoma abanto ase Isi‐Boseti, mosinto o Saulo, akabora, “Ing’iranerie Mikali mokane, oyio narierete boko, na ngaakana rigori ri’amasankwa a isiko ay’ebiimo bi’obosacha ay’Abafilisti rigana erimo, erinde imonyuome.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Erio Isi‐Boseti agatoma abanto barusie omokungu oria korwa ase Palitieli, omosacha oye, mosinto o Laisi." 
2Samuel3:16 Korende omosacha oye akamotunyana goika Bahurimu okona‐korera. Erio Abineri akamotebia, “Irana!” Ere akairana." 
2Samuel3:17 Agwo Abineri agakwana nabagaaka b’Abaisraeli, akabora, “Korwa ase chingaki chinde chiaetire mwabeire mokogania ng’a Daudi abe omoruoti oino." 
2Samuel3:18 Gaki bono, kora bo, ekiagera Omonene nariete eira igoro ya Daudi, agateba: Nintoorie Abaisraeli, abanto baane, goetera ase okoboko gwa Daudi, omosomba one. Nimbarusie korwa ase amaboko ’Abafilisti, na korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa babo bande bonsi.”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abineri agakwana nabanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin boigo. Erio akagenda Heburoni, agatebia Daudi amang’ana ayio Abaisraeli na Ababenjamin bonsi banchete gokora asare." 
2Samuel3:20 Ekero Abineri amo nabanto bande emerongo ebere baigete Heburoni ase Daudi, ere akabakorera omoyega." 
2Samuel3:21 Abineri agatebia Daudi, “Nkogenda inde nsangererie Abaisraeli bonsi ase ensemo yao, aye omoruoti, omonene one, erio bakore okobwatana amo naye, erinde onyore eki kwaganetie, obagambere bonsi pi.” Ase igo Daudi akaa Abineri ribaga, na Abineri akagenda nomorembe." 
2Samuel3:22 Kobachiire, Yoabu agacha korwa ase achiete gosakora amo nabasomba ba Daudi, nabarabwo mbabwate ebisakorwa ebinge. Korende Abineri konya ochiire, tarenge amo na Daudi agwo Heburoni, ekiagera Daudi konya omoeire ribaga, nere ogendire nomorembe." 
2Samuel3:23 Ekero Yoabu aigete amo nabarwani baye bonsi, ere agatebigwa ng’a Abineri, mosinto o Neri, nao arenge ase omoruoti, na omoruoti omoeire ribaga, ochiire ore nomorembe." 
2Samuel3:24 Erio Yoabu akagenda ase omoruoti, akamoboria, “Ninki eke gwakorire? Naigwa ng’a Abineri nacha aiga asore. Naki gwakora kwamoa ribaga ogenda?" 
2Samuel3:25 Tomanyeti Abineri, mosinto o Neri? Ere igo acha aa gokong’aina, naende amanye chinsemo ase okogenda na ebinto ebi ogokora.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Yoabu karure ase Daudi agatoma abanto babwatie Abineri bamwoyie korwa ase engoro y’amache ya Sira, korende Daudi tamanyete amang’ana ayio." 
2Samuel3:27 Ekero Abineri airanire Heburoni, Yoabu akamoira ensemo gati‐gati y’egeita, buna nigo arigetie gokwana nere bobisi, na agwo akamobeta ritimo enda goika agakwa. Nabo Abineri agaitwa ekiagera aitete Asaeli omwabo Yoabu." 
2Samuel3:28 Ekero Daudi aigwete amang’ana ayio, akabora, “Omonene namanyete ng’a inche na abanto baane titori na komocha ase obosio bwaye ase ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ’Abineri, mosinto o Neri." 
2Samuel3:29 Tiga okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga aye kobe igoro ya Yoabu, na igoro ase abanto b’eamate yaye: naende enyomba ya Yoabu teborwa omonto ogoiteka amache anga buna chimengere, gose oyore noborwaire bwa ukoma, gose oyo ogwesiirera enyimbo, gose oyo oraitwe nemioro, gose oyore omoremerwa bw’endagera.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Naboigo Yoabu na Abisai omwabo baitete Abineri, ekiagera ere aitete Asaeli omwabo ase esegi eria barwanete aaria Gibeoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Erio Daudi agachika Yoabu amo nabanto bonsi barenge amo nere batandore chianga chiabo na beboyie chigunia, erinde bareere Abineri. Omoruoti Daudi nere omonyene agatunyana oborere kobobogoirie." 
2Samuel3:32 Erio bagatindeka Abineri agwo Heburoni. Omoruoti akarera neriogi rinene agwo ase oboina bw’Abineri; na abanto bonsi bakarera. 
2Samuel3:33 Omoruoti akaba okweumia igoro y’Abineri, okobora, “Inee! Nabo Abineri agwenerete gokwa buna omonto omoriri?" 
2Samuel3:34 Aye Abineri, amaboko ao tasibetwe, gose amagoro ao tare kobekwa chingataare. Nigo kwagwa buna omonto ogoitwa nabakayayu.” Naende abanto bonsi bakagenderera komoreera." 
2Samuel3:35 Abanto bonsi bagacha koebereria Daudi arie endagera, korende Daudi agatiana, ogoteba, “Nyasae ang’e egesusuru bono na kogenderera onye nkoria endagera erioba ritaragwa.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Abanto bonsi bakarora ng’a ayio nigo abagweneire buna amang’ana onsi omoruoti are gokora abagwenerete. 
2Samuel3:37 Ase rituko riria Abaisraeli bonsi bakamanya ng’a omoruoti tarenge na komocha ase ogoitwa kw’Abineri, mosinto o Neri." 
2Samuel3:38 Erio omoruoti agatebia abasomba baye, “Timomanyeti ng’a rero omonto omonene, omogambi bw’Abaisraeli, okure?" 
2Samuel3:39 Nonya naagetwe amaguta nkaba omoruoti nachandekire, tindi na nguru. Abamura aba b’omokungu Seruya nabatindi, tinkobanyara. Omonene naakane egesiomba koreng’ana nobobe bwabo!”" 
2Samuel4:1 Ekero Isi‐Boseti, mosinto o Saulo, aigwete ng’a Abineri oitirwe agwo Heburoni, akerusia moyo, na Abaisraeli bonsi bagaichana na gokumia." 
2Samuel4:2 Mosinto oria o Saulo nabwate abanto babere abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi, abarenge abasakori. Oyomo nigo are korokwa Baana, na oria onde Rekabu. Barabwo nigo barenge basinto ba Rimoni o Beeroti, omochie bw’orogongo rwa Benjamin. (Beeroti nigo obaretwe koba bw’orogongo rwa Benjamin.)" 
2Samuel4:3 Abanto ba Beeroti konya batamire gochia Gitaimu, agwo nao bamenyete goika rero iga." 
2Samuel4:4 Yonathani, mosinto o Saulo, nabwate omwana oremarete amagoro. Omwana oyio konya okoorire emiaka etano ekero amang’ana ’ogokwa gwa Saulo na okwa Yonathani arentetwe korwa Yesireeli. Omoreri akaimokia omwana oria, na ekero arenge gotama, omwana oria agaakera inse, na igo akaba ekerema. Omwana oria nigo are korokwa Mefiboseti." 
2Samuel4:5 Rekabu na Baana, basinto ba Rimoni Omobeeroti, bagachaka orogendo rwabo, na ekero kia mobaso gati bagaika ase enyomba ya Isi‐Boseti, bakamonyora otimogete nyomba mwaye okendererete." 
2Samuel4:6 Barabwo bagekora buna nengano bagochia kwoyia. Ekero baigete nyomba ime, bakabeta Isi‐Boseti omoyio enda. Erio Rekabu na Baana omwabo bagatama." 
2Samuel4:7 Naboigo banyorete Isi‐Boseti oraire borere bwaye agwo ase akanyomba g’okorara bakamoika ang’e bakamoita, bakamobutora omotwe bakayoira; erio bakagenda ase obotuko bwonsi goetera ase enchera y’Ekerubo Ekiomo." 
2Samuel4:8 Bakaira omotwe oyio o Isi‐Boseti ase Daudi agwo Heburoni, bakamotebia, “Rora, oyo nomotwe o Isi‐Boseti, mosinto o Saulo, omobisa oo, oyo orenge korigia obogima bwao. Rero Omonene okoruseirie aye, omonene oito, egesiomba igoro ya Saulo na igoro y’ororeria rwaye.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Korende Daudi akairaneria Rekabu na Baana omwabo, abarenge basinto ba Rimoni Omobeeroti, akabora, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, oyo ontooretie korwa ase emechando emenge," 
2Samuel4:10 ekero omonto antebetie igoro y’ogokwa gwa Saulo, na okagete ng’a igo andeteire amang’ana amaya, inche nigo namobwatete nkamoita aaria Sikilagi. Oko nakwo ogoakana namoete ase amang’ana aye." 
2Samuel4:11 Inee! Tari bobe mono kobua, ekero abanto ababe baitire omonto omoronge karaire borere nyomba mwaye? Tinkomoruseria egesiomba na gosiria abwo bamoitire korwa ase ense?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Erio Daudi agachika abanto baye, barabwo bagaita Rekabu na Baana, bakababutora amaboko na amagoro, bakabasunga ang’e ne ritibo agwo Heburoni. Korende omotwe o Isi‐Boseti bakayoira, bakayotindeka ase embeera y’Abineri agwo Heburoni." 
2Samuel5:1 Abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli bakagenda ase Daudi agwo Heburoni, bakamotebia, “Naama! Intwe nigo tore abamo naye, aba amanyinga ayamo na omobere oyomo." 
2Samuel5:2 Ase engaki yaetire, ekero Saulo arenge omoruoti igoro yaito, naye kwarenge gotang’ana Abaisraeli kobakogenda korwana esegi, naende kobakoirana. Omonene konya ogotebirie ng’a naye orabe omorisia bw’Abaisraeli, abanto baye, na obe omogambi igoro yabo.”" 
2Samuel5:3 Ase igo abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli bagacha ase Daudi omoruoti agwo Heburoni; ere agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabarabwo ase obosio bw’Omonene agwo Heburoni. 
2Samuel5:4 Daudi konya okoorire emiaka emerongo etato ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo ene." 
2Samuel5:5 Agwo Heburoni akagambera Abayuda ase engaki y’emiaka etano na ebere, na emetienyi etano nomo, naende agwo Yerusalemu akagambera Abaisraeli bonsi amo n’Abayuda ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo etato, na atato." 
2Samuel5:6 Erio Daudi omoruoti na abanto baye bakagenda Yerusalemu, erinde barwanie Abayebusi, abanyene ense eria. Barabwo bagatebia Daudi. “Aye tokonyara gocha aiga nonya ng’ake; emeuko na ebirema nabwo baranyare kogoseria kegima.” Abayebusi nigo barengereretie ng’a Daudi takonyara gosoa aroro." 
2Samuel5:7 Korende Daudi akabua eburi ya Sayoni, oyo noro Omochie o Daudi." 
2Samuel5:8 Daudi agakwana ase rituko riria, “Onde bwensi otagete goita Abayebusi, tiga atiire gochia ase omotarobw’amache, aite emeuko eyio na ebirema ebio inche Daudi ngechete.” Ase ayio abanto nigo bagoteba, “Emeuko na ebirema tibakonyara gosoa ase enyomba.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Daudi akamenya ase eburi eyio, akayeroka “Omochie o Daudi.” Agwo Daudi akaagacha omochie oyeetanaine, gochakera korwa Milo na goikera ime ase eburi yarenge." 
2Samuel5:10 Daudi akamentekana mono koba ne chinguru, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, arenge amo nere." 
2Samuel5:11 Hiramu, omoruoti o Turo, agatoma abanto ase Daudi. Abwo bakamoirera emete y’emecharake. Boigo agatoma ababaachi, na abaagachi, na barabwo bakamoagachera enyomba." 
2Samuel5:12 Erio Daudi akamanya ng’a Omonene omokong’irie ase okoba omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, na oimokereirie igoro oboruoti bwaye ase engencho y’abanto baye Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Nyuma karure Heburoni, Daudi akamenta koira abakungu ba sere‐sere na abakungu bande korwa Yerusalemu; akaiborerwa abana bande abange, abamura na abaiseke." 
2Samuel5:14 Aya naro amarieta ’abana abwo baiboretwe asare agwo Yerusalemu; Samua na Sobabu, Nathani na Sulemani;" 
2Samuel5:15 Ibuhari na Elisua, Nefegi na Yafia;" 
2Samuel5:16 Elisama, na Eliada, na Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Ekero Abafilisti baigwete ng’a Daudi oakirwe amaguta koba omoruoti igoro y’Abaisraeli bonsi, bagatiira gochia komorigia. Daudi kaigure ayio, agatirimboka gochia ase eburi ime," 
2Samuel5:18 na Abafilisti bagacha bagesiarera ase ense omweya y’Abarefai. 
2Samuel5:19 Erio Daudi akaboria Omonene, “Inee! Ndagenda korwania Abafilisti? Nobabeke ase amaboko aane gose?” Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ee genda, nimbabeke ase amaboko ao.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Daudi agacha Baali‐Perasimu, akababua agwo. Erio akabora, “Omonene okoroorire ababisa baane buna chiooro chi’amache are nemerindo.” Ase igo aase aria akarokwa Baali‐Perasimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Abafilisti bagatiga emegwekano yabo y’ogosasimwa aroro, na Daudi na abanto baye bakayerusiao na koyeira." 
2Samuel5:22 Naende Abafilisti bakagendao eria kabere, bagesiarera ase rikura ri’Abarefai." 
2Samuel5:23 Naende Daudi akaboria Omonene, nere akamokania, akamotebia, “Tobaumokera korwa aa, korende ogende obanaarie korwa nyuma, erio obatubokere korwa ase emete ereo ekorokwa balisamu." 
2Samuel5:24 Ekero oraigwe eriogi ri’ebititiro bigoeta igoro ase emete eyio, erio bwebeke ang’e, omanye ng’a inche Omonene nasokire, nagotang’anire kobua abarwani b’Abafilisti.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Daudi agakora buna Omonene amotebetie, agaita Abafilisti korwa Geba goika Geseri." 
2Samuel6:1 Naende Daudi agasangereria abanto bonsi abachoretwe korwa ase Abaisraeli, chilifu emerongo etato (30,000)." 
2Samuel6:2 Ere na abanto abwo bonsi barenge komo bakagenda Baala‐Yuda kwoyia Esanduku ya Nyasae, eyio ekorokwa ase erieta ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda, oyomenyete nobonene igoro y’abakerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Korwa ase enyomba y’Abinadabu, agwo ekegoro igoro, bakarusia Esanduku eria, bakayebeka igoro ase egari enyia. Usa na Ahiyo, basinto b’Abinadabu, bakaba bakoraa Esanduku eyio ya Nyasae." 
2Samuel6:4 Kobayerusirie korwa ase enyomba y’Abinadabu agwo ekegoro igoro, Ahiyo nere oyetang’aine." 
2Samuel6:5 Daudi na Abaisraeli bonsi bakaba bagochenga na gotera ase ogotogia Omonene; bakabugia amakano, na ebibangarara, ne chindege, na ebinto binde bi’ogochengera." 
2Samuel6:6 Ekero barabwo baikire ase ekeooreri kia Nakoni, chiombe chiarenge kong’usa egari eria chikarichanigwa. Ase igo Usa akarambora okoboko kwaye gosiira Esanduku eyio ya Nyasae." 
2Samuel6:7 Erio Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene ase Usa, akamoaka, ekiagera akunete Esanduku eria ya Nyasae, na Usa agakwera agwo agwo." 
2Samuel6:8 Daudi akagechigwa mono, ekiagera Omonene aitete Usa, na igo akaroka aase aria Peresi‐Usa; naboigo akorokwa nonya ngoika rero iga." 
2Samuel6:9 Ase rituko riria Daudi akoboa Omonene, akaboria, “Naki rende ndakore imbe noboremu ndete Esanduku y’Omonene bwone?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Ase igo Daudi tancha koira Esanduku eria y’Omonene ase omochie okorokwa Omochie o Daudi, korende akayebogoria na koyebeka nyomba mwa’Obedi‐Edomu o Gati." 
2Samuel6:11 Ekabeera ase enyomba y’Obedi‐Edomu ase engaki y’emetienyi etato, na Omonene agasesenia Obedi‐Edomu na abanto bonsi b’enyomba yaye." 
2Samuel6:12 Daudi agatebigwa ng’a, ase engencho y’Esanduku eria ya Nyasae Omonene osesenirie abanto b’enyomba y’Obedi‐Edomu, amo nebinto bionsi abwate. Erio akagenda akoyia Esanduku eria korwa ase enyomba y’Obedi‐Edomu, akayerenta ase omochie oye ore nomochengo omonene." 
2Samuel6:13 Ekero abanto abwo babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Omonene bagendire ebitambokero bitano na ekemo, Daudi akanyenya eng’ombe eyemo, na emori eyemo enoru, chikaba ebing’wanso." 
2Samuel6:14 Daudi akaba ogotenga ne chinguru chiaye chionsi ase obosio bw’Omonene, obegete egesibao kiaroisirie korwa ase egatani." 
2Samuel6:15 Naboigo Daudi na Abaisraeli bonsi bakarenta Esanduku y’Omonene, bakaba bagoaka amariogi ’omogoko na kobugia egetureri." 
2Samuel6:16 Ekaba ekero Esanduku eria y’Omonene yare korentwa ase Omochie o Daudi, Mikali, mosubati o Saulo, akarigereria korwa ase ekebao, akarora Daudi omoruoti ogocharoka‐charoka na gotenga ase obosio bw’Omonene, akamochaya ase omoyo oye ime." 
2Samuel6:17 Abanto baria baare korenta Esanduku eria y’Omonene, bakayebeka aase aye eema ime, eema eria Daudi ayeteneneretie. Erio Daudi akarua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebi’omorembe agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
2Samuel6:18 Na ekero Daudi akoorire korua ebing’wanso biria, agasesenia abanto ase erieta ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
2Samuel6:19 Erio akagaba endagera ase omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, abasacha na abakungu; kera oyomo akaegwa omogati oyomo, na akanyama gake, na amasabibu amomo. Erio kera omonto akarua agwo, akagenda bwoye." 
2Samuel6:20 Ekero Daudi airanete inka bwoye gosesenia abanto baye, Mikali, mosubati o Saulo, agasoka korotota Daudi, akabora, “Mbonene ki omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akwenyorera rero ekero aorokirie obogetirianda bwaye ase abaiseke b’abasomba baye buna omonto omoriri.”" 
2Samuel6:21 Daudi akairaneria Mikali, “Nigo narenge gotenga na kogoka ase obosio bw’Omonene, oyo onchorete inche ribaga ria iso, na enyomba yaye yonsi, nkaba omogambi igoro y’Abaisraeli, abanto baye. Ase ayio, goika ngenderere gochenga ase Omonene." 
2Samuel6:22 Naende ninganetie nyekeyie goetania buna nakora aiga rero, imbe omoitongo. Nonya aye kogonchaya, abaiseke abwo b’abasomba gwakwana, barawo mbansike mono.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Na Mikali, mosubati o Saulo, taiborete mwana nonya noyomo goika ogokwa kwaye." 
2Samuel7:1 Bono omoruoti Daudi nigo amenyete ase enyomba yaye, na Omonene konya omoeire obotoereru korwa ase ababisa baye bonsi, abwo bamoetanaine." 
2Samuel7:2 Erio agatebia Nathani, omobani, “Rora, inche nigo imenyete ase enyomba eagachire nemecharake korende Esanduku ya Nyasae ero nigo emenyete ime ase eema.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathani agatebia omoruoti, “Genda okore ande onsi ayare ase ebirengererio biao, ekiagera Omonene nigo are amo naye.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Korende ase obotuko obwo, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Nathani, rikamotebia," 
2Samuel7:5 “Genda otebie Daudi, omosomba one, ng’a inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Inee! Nong’agachere enyomba ndamenye imeo?" 
2Samuel7:6 Korwa engaki eria nang’anyetie Abaisraeli korwa Misiri goika rituko ria rero inche tinana komenya ime ase enyomba, korende nabeire nkogenda aande onsi imenyete ase eema." 
2Samuel7:7 Aase aande onsi nabeire nkona‐kogenda amo n’Abaisraeli, tinana koboria mogambi onde bw’Abaisraeli, oyo nabegete akaba omorisia bw’abanto baane, nase ki otang’agachereti obomenyo bw’emecharake." 
2Samuel7:8 “Gaki bono naende kwana nomosomba one Daudi, omotebie amang’ana aya: Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Nigo nakorusetie korwa ase oborisia aase kware gotunyana ching’ondi, ngakobeka okaba omogambi bw’abanto baane Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel7:9 Nigo nare kogenda amo naye aande onsi ase kware kogenda na kobaseria gochia aare ababisa bao korwa ase obosio bwao. Ninkore erieta riao ribe rinene, buna amarieta ’abanto bande bare abanene ase ense." 
2Samuel7:10 Ninyorere abanto baane Abaisraeli aase ndababeke bamenye ase obotoereru. Abanto ababe tibakobachanda naende, buna babachandete kare." 
2Samuel7:11 Korwa engaki eria nachorete abagambi bagambere abanto baane Abaisraeli. Ninkoe obotoereru korwa ase ababisa bao bonsi. Kobua ayio onsi, inche Omonene nigo nkogotebia ng’a ninkoroiserie enyomba." 
2Samuel7:12 Ekero amatuko ao ay’ogokwa araike, na orare ase chisokoro chiao, nimbeke oyomo bw’oroiboro rwao abe omoruoti, ninkore oboruoti bwaye bobe ne chinguru." 
2Samuel7:13 Ere naagachere erieta riane enyomba, nainche ninkong’ie oboruoti bwaye bobe ne chinguru kogenderera botambe." 
2Samuel7:14 Inche nimbe ise, nere nabe omwana one. Ekero arakore ebibe nimoe egesusuro nenyimbo na amaakwa aya mwanyabanto bakoegwa." 
2Samuel7:15 Korende obwanchani bwane botari koera tinkoborusia asare buna naborusetie ase Saulo oyio natigeretie korwa ase obosio bwao. 
2Samuel7:16 Enyomba yao na oboruoti bwao nigo birakong’igwe bibe ne chinguru ase obosio bwane kare na kare, na ekerogo kiao ki’oboruoti nigo keratenene bokong’u kare na kare.”" 
2Samuel7:17 Nathani agatebia Daudi amang’ana ayio onsi buna ayaigwete na koyarora. 
2Samuel7:18 Erio Daudi omoruoti agasoa akabeera ase obosio bw’Omonene, akabora, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, inche inki ng’isaine, na eamate yane inki eisaine, ng’a aye gwankoreire amang’ana amaya iga?" 
2Samuel7:19 Naende ring’ana eri tiriisaini kende asore, aye Omonene Nyasae. Boigo gwakwanire igoro y’ororeria rwane, inche omosomba oo, na igoro y’ebiaare bigochi‐gocha. Ee, aye Omonene Nyasae, amang’ana ayio igo kwayakwanire ase mwanyabanto." 
2Samuel7:20 Inche Daudi, inki ndagotebie naende kobua ayio? Aye Omonene Nyasae, nigo omanyete inche, omosomba oo." 
2Samuel7:21 Ase engencho y’eira yao na koreng’ana nogwancha kwao, aye Omonene, gwakorire amanene ayio onsi, naende kwayamanyekanirie asende, inche omosomba oo." 
2Samuel7:22 Ase ayio, igo ore omonene, aye Omonene Nyasae! Onde tari onga buna aye, gose Nyasae onde tari, otatiga aye bweka, koreng’ana buna ayio konya twaigure namato aito." 
2Samuel7:23 Naende mbanto ba gesaku ki bare ase ense bare buna Abaisraeli bao, abwo aye Nyasae kwabooretie babe abanto bao, na igo gwakorire erieta riao rimanyekane. Ogakorera abanto bao abwo kwebooreretie korwa Misiri amang’ana amanene, na ay’ogokumia, ekiagera nigo gwaseretie korwa asebare abanto b’ebisaku amo ne chinyasae chiabo." 
2Samuel7:24 Aye gwekoreire abanto bao Abaisraeli babe abanto bao kare na kare, naye Omonene kwabeire Nyasae obo." 
2Samuel7:25 “Gaki bono, Omonene Nyasae, ikerania onsi aya kwariete eira igoro yane na ase ororeria rwane, na okore aya gwatebete ng’a nokore," 
2Samuel7:26 erinde erieta riao ritogigwe kare na kare. Erio abanto bariatore botambe, bagoteba: Omonene bw’Emeganda, nere Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli. Ase enchera eyio enyomba y’omosomba oo, inche Daudi, ekong’igwe ase obosio bwao." 
2Samuel7:27 Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, kwang’orokeirie inche, omosomba oo, aya onsi, kogoteba: Ninkoagachere enyomba. Ase ayio inche, omosomba oo, nabeire noboremu ase enkoro yane kogosaba ogosaba oko." 
2Samuel7:28 “Na bono, aye Omonene, aye naye Nyasae, na amang’ana ao naro ekeene, na kwandiereire inche, omosomba oo, eira ng’a onkorere ring’ana eri rigiya." 
2Samuel7:29 Gaki bono, koranche osesenie enyomba yane, inche omosomba oo, erinde egenderere kare na kare ase obosio bwao. Aye Omonene Nyasae, kwariete eira eyio. Ase igo enyomba yane, inche omosomba oo, esesenigwe kare na kare nogosesenigwa kwao.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Nyuma y’ayio Daudi akarwania Abafilisti, akababua, akabua nomochie obo omonene akayobeka inse y’obogambi bwaye." 
2Samuel8:2 Naende akabua Abamoabu. Akabachika barare inse ase chindwaro. Erio akarenga chindwaro ibere chi’abanto, agachika abwo baitwe bakwe, na abanto b’orwaro oromo agachika batigwe babe moyo. Bono Abamoabu bakaba abasomba ba Daudi bakaba bakomo rentera ebango." 
2Samuel8:3 Naende Daudi akabua Hadadeseri mosinto o Rehobu, omoruoti o Soba, ekero ere agendete kogareyia obogambi bwaye gochia ase orooche rw’Eufarati." 
2Samuel8:4 Daudi agoosa abariini chibarasi elifu eyemo, na amagana atano na abere (1,700), na abarwani abaare kogendera amagoro chilifu emerongo ebere (20,000). Erio akabutora chibarasi chinteng’e, korende agatiga chibarasi rigana erimo chibe chikong’usa chigari." 
2Samuel8:5 Na ekero Abasiiria ba Damesiki bachete gokonya Hadadeseri, omoruoti o Soba, Daudi akabarwania, agaita abanto chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere (22,000)." 
2Samuel8:6 Erio akabeka abarwani ase egati y’Abasiiria agwo Damesiki, na Abasiiria abwo bakaba abasomba ba Daudi bakaba bakomorentera ebango. Omonene akaa Daudi obobui aande onsi ase are kogenda korwana." 
2Samuel8:7 Daudi agasakora chinguba chie chitahabu, echio abasomba ba Hadadeseri babogoretie, agachiira Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel8:8 Naende omoruoti Daudi akaira chitaai chinyinge mono korwa Bera na Berotai, emechie Hadadeseri arenge kogambera." 
2Samuel8:9 Toi, omoruoti o Hamati, agachia koigwa ng’a Daudi obuire abarwani bonsi ba Hadadeseri," 
2Samuel8:10 agatoma Yoramu, momura oye, ase omoruoti Daudi amokwanie na komosesenia, ekiagera ere konya arwanirie Hadadeseri omobuirie. Hadadeseri nigo abete okona‐korwania Toi. Boigo Yoramu akairera Daudi ebinto bi’etahabu, na ebi’efeta, na ebi’etaai." 
2Samuel8:11 Ebinto ebio omoruoti Daudi akabiatananera Omonene, buna akorete ne chitaai ne chitahabu chiria arusetie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku biria abuete:" 
2Samuel8:12 Abaedomu, na Abamoabu, na Abaamoni, na Abafilisti, na Abaameleki. Boigo agaatananera Omonene ebisakorwa arusetie korwa ase Hadadeseri, mosinto o Rehobu, omoruoti o Soba." 
2Samuel8:13 Daudi akenyorera erieta rinene ekero arenge koirana, gaitire Abaedomu chilifu ikomi na isano na isato (18,000) ase Riranya ri’Omonyo." 
2Samuel8:14 Daudi akabeka abarwani aande onsi ase egati y’Abaedomu, na barabwo bonsi bakaba abasomba ba Daudi, na Omonene akaa Daudi obobui aande onsi ase arenge kogenda korwana." 
2Samuel8:15 Bono Daudi akaba okogambera Abaisraeli bonsi, akaba ogokorera abanto baye bonsi oboronge na ekeene." 
2Samuel8:16 Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, nere orenge omochiki bw’emeganda y’abarwani, na Yehosafati, mosinto bw’Ahiludi, nere orenge omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka." 
2Samuel8:17 Zadoki, mosinto bw’Ahitubu, na Ahimeleki, mosinto bw’Abiatari, nabwo barenge abakuani, na Seraya nere orenge omoriki;" 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, nere orenge omoteneneri bw’Abakereti, na Abapeleti, na basinto ba Daudi nabwo barenge abakuani." 
2Samuel9:1 Rituko erimo Daudi akaboria, “Inee! Monto onde natigarete ase enka ya Saulo inyare komokorera amaya ase engencho ya Yonathani?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Narengeo omosomba oyomo bw’enyomba ya Saulo, orenge korokwa Siba. Abanto bakamorangeria agende ase Daudi. Omoruoti akamoboria, “Naye Siba?” Ere akamoiraneria, “Ee, ninche omosomba oo.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Naende omoruoti akamoboria, “Inee! Monto onde natigarete ase enka ya Saulo inyare komokorera obuya bwa Nyasae?” Siba akamoiraneria, “Ee, nareo omonto oyomo, mosinto o Yonathani, ore ekerema.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Omoruoti akamoboria, “Ng’ai akare?” Siba akamoiraneria, “Nigo akare o Makiri, mosinto bw’Amieli, aaria Lo‐Debari.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Erio omoruoti agatoma abanto bagachia komwoyia korwa o Makiri, mosinto bw’Amieli, aaria Lo‐Debari." 
2Samuel9:6 Ekero Mefiboseti, mosinto o Yonathani o Saulo, achete ase Daudi, agatung’ama inse, akaumama ase okoorokia amasikani. Daudi akabora, “Mefiboseti.” Ere agaitaba, “Nao inde aa, inche omosomba oo!”" 
2Samuel9:7 Daudi akamotebia, “Toondoka, ekiagera ningokorere amaya ase engencho ya Yonathani iso. Ninkoiranerie emegondo yonsi ya Saulo, sokoro yao, naye nobe gokoragera ase emesa yane botambe.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboseti agatung’ama inse naende, akabora, “Inche inde buna esese ekwete. Ninki ing’isaine orankorere amaya buna ayio?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Erio omoruoti akarangeria Siba, omosomba o Saulo, akamotebia, “Ebinto bionsi ebiarenge bia Saulo, na bionsi ebia nyomba mwaye, nabieire omochokoro bw’omonene oo." 
2Samuel9:10 Aye, amo nabana bao na abasomba bao mobe mokomoremera emegondo. Norentere omochokoro bw’omonene oo okwama korwa mogondo, erinde anyore endagera, korende Mefiboseti omonyene, omochokoro bw’omonene oo, nigo arabe okoragera ase emesa yane botambe.” Siba nigo abwate abamura ikomi na batano na abasomba emerongo ebere." 
2Samuel9:11 Erio Siba akairaneria omoruoti, “Inche omosomba oo ninkore ayio onsi gwachikire.” Ase igo Mefiboseti akaba okoragera ase emesa ya Daudi, akaba buna oyomo bw’abana b’omoruoti." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboseti nabwate omwana omomura ore korokwa Mika. Abanto bonsi abarenge o Siba bakaba abasomba ba Mefiboseti. 
2Samuel9:13 Mefiboseti akaba okomenya Yerusalemu, ekiagera nigo arenge koragera ase emesa y’omoruoti. Ere nigo aremarete amagoro aye onsi abere." 
2Samuel10:1 Nyuma y’ayio omoruoti bw’Abaamoni agakwa, na Hanuni, omomura oye, akaba omoruoti ribaga riaye." 
2Samuel10:2 Daudi akabora, “Goika imokorere Hanuni, omomura o Nahasi, amaya, buna ise arenge gonkorera amaya.” Ase igo Daudi agatoma abanto bagende komoremia ase engencho y’ogokwa gwa ise. Ekero abasomba ba Daudi baigete ase ense y’Abaamoni," 
2Samuel10:3 Abaamoni bakaboria Hanuni, omonene obo, “Inee! Igo okagete ng’a Daudi nigo asigete iso ase ogotoma abanto gocha gokoremia? Taibo. Nigo abatomire bache koroota omochie na koyosaria.”" 
2Samuel10:4 Ase igo Hanuni akabwata abasomba abwo ba Daudi, akagingira chinderu chiabo ensemo eyemo, na akanacha chianga chiabo agachiikia ebinema, akabaseria bagende." 
2Samuel10:5 Abasomba abwo bakarora obosooku obonene mono, na ekero Daudi atebetigwe buna bakoretwe, agatoma abanto bachie kobarotota babatebie, “Omoruoti otebire ng’a mobeere agwo Yeriko goika chinderu chiaino chimere, erio monyare koirana nka.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Abaamoni bakamanya ng’a bagechirie Daudi. Ase igo bagasaba Abasiiria ba Beti‐Rehobu na Soba babae abarwani babo chilifu emerongo ebere (20,000), na omoruoti o Maaka ache amo nabarwani baye elifu eyemo (1,000); naende bagasaba baegwe abarwani chilifu ikomi na ibere (12,000) korwa Tobu." 
2Samuel10:7 Ekero Daudi aigwete ayio, agatoma Yoabu amo ne chituoni chionsi chi’esegi." 
2Samuel10:8 Abaamoni bakagenda bakarobera ase egeita ki’omochie; Abasiiria ba Soba, na abwo ba Rehobu, amo nabanto korwa Tobu na Maaka, barabwo bakarobera ao boka ase egetii." 
2Samuel10:9 Ekero Yoabu aroche ng’a esegi nigo ere bosio bwaye na nyuma, agachora abanto abakong’u abamanyete korwana esegi, akabaroberia barwane n’Abasiiria." 
2Samuel10:10 Abanto bande abatigari akababeka inse y’oboteneneri bw’Abisai, momura omwabo, akabaroberia barwane n’Abaamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Erio agatebia Abisai, “Onye Abasiiria bakombua, rirorio oche onkonye; korende onye Abaamoni bagokobua, rirorio inche ninchiche ngokonye." 
2Samuel10:12 Otenene bokong’u obe omoremu! Torwanerere abanto baito na emechie ya Nyasae oito. Tiga Omonene akore ayaroche are amaya.” 
2Samuel10:13 Agwo Yoabu na abanto barenge amo nere bagasuka gochia korwana n’Abasiiria, na barabwo bagatama korwa asare." 
2Samuel10:14 Abaamoni bagachia korora ng’a Abasiiria batamire, na barabwo boigo bagatama korwa ase Abisai, bagasoa omochie ime. Erio Yoabu agatiga korwana n’Abaamoni, akairana Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Ekero Abasiiria baroche ng’a babuirwe n’Abaisraeli, bagasangererekana bonsi amo." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadeseri agatoma abanto barente Abasiiria abwo barenge moocha y’orooche rw’Eufarati. Barawo bagacha Helamu, na Sobaki, omotang’ani bw’abarwani ba Hadadeseri, akabatang’ana." 
2Samuel10:17 Ekero Daudi atebetigwe amang’ana ayio agasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi, akaamboka Yorodani, akagenda Helamu. Aroro Abasiiria bakeroberia korwania Daudi esegi." 
2Samuel10:18 Abasiiria bagatama korwa ase amasio ’Abaisraeli, na Daudi agaita Abasiiria abagendia chigari amagana atano na abere (700), na abariini chibarasi chilifu emerongo ene (40,000), naende agaaka Sobaki, omotang’ani bw’abarwani, goika agakwerao." 
2Samuel10:19 Ekero abarwani bonsi abwo barenge inse ya Hadadeseri baroche ng’a babuirwe n’Abaisraeli, bagakora omorembe nabarabwo na kwebeka inse yabo. Ase ayio Abasiiria bakoboa gokonya Abaamoni naende." 
2Samuel11:1 Ase engaki y’ogosimeka, ekero abaruoti baare koba bakogenda korwana esegi, Daudi agatoma Yoabu na abasomba baye, amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi. Barabwo bagaita Abaamoni, bakanaaria omochie o Raba. Korende Daudi akabeera agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Ekaba ase rituko erimo chinsa chia mogoroba, Daudi akaimoka korwa borere bwaye, akariina kerama igoro, ase enyomba yaye y’oboruoti. Ekero arenge gotaarao, akarora omokungu ogwesibia, na omokungu oyio nigo arenge omonyakieni mono." 
2Samuel11:3 Erio agatoma omonto amanye ng’a omokungu oyo noyo ng’o. Agatebigwa ng’a, “Oria Bati‐Seba nomosubati o Eliamu, moka Uria Omohiti.”" 
2Samuel11:4 Erio Daudi agatoma abanto bamwoyie. Ere agacha ase Daudi, na Daudi akarara nere. Batiseba gakoorire gwechena korwa ase ogotechena kwaye, akaimoka, akairana mwaye." 
2Samuel11:5 Omokungu oria akaba morito; agatoma amang’ana ase Daudi, akabora, “Nabeire morito.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Erio Daudi agatoma amang’ana ase Yoabu akamotebia, “Toma Uria oyio Omohiti ache asende,” na Yoabu akamotoma ase Daudi." 
2Samuel11:7 Ekero Uria achete, Daudi akamoboria amang’ana igoro ya Yoabu buna are gokora, na amang’ana ’abanto, na buna esegi egendererete." 
2Samuel11:8 Naende agatebia Uria, “Genda bwoo, bwesibie amagoro otimoke.” Uria akarua nyomba mw’omoruoti, na Daudi akamotunyaneria ekeegwa." 
2Samuel11:9 Korende Uria akarara gesieri ki’enyomba y’omoruoti amo nabasomba bonsi b’omonene oye, tatirimboka gochia bwoye." 
2Samuel11:10 Abanto bagatebia Daudi ng’a Uria tagendete bwoye. Daudi akamoboria, “Inee! Tikwarwete ase orogendo? Nase ki otagendete bwoo?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria akamoiraneria, “Esanduku y’Omonene, na Abaisraeli amo n’Abayuda nigo bamenyete ase ebigutu isiko. Yoabu, omonene one, na abasomba baye nigo bagatoorete isiko ase egetii. Inee! Inche ngende nyomba mwane koria na konywa, na korara na mokane? Ekeene, buna aye ore moyo, na omoika oo ore moyo, inche tingokora ring’ana buna erio.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Daudi agatebia Uria, “Beera aiga rero naende, ankio nkoe ribaga ogende.” Ase igo Uria akabeera Yerusalemu ase rituko riria, ne rituko ria kabere boigo." 
2Samuel11:13 Daudi akamorangeria ache mwaye koragera na konywa amo nere, na igo akagera Uria agatinda. Ekero kia mogoroba Uria akagenda korara borere bwaye amo nabasomba b’omonene oye, korende tagenda bwoye." 
2Samuel11:14 Bogakia mambia, Daudi akarikera Yoabu rirube, akaa Uria amoirere." 
2Samuel11:15 Ase rirube erio nigo arigete iga: “Otang’anie Uria bosio bw’abarwani aase esegi ere entindi Erio morueo, momotige aroro aitwe akwe.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Ekero Yoabu anaaretie omochie, akabeka Uria aase amanyete ng’a naumerane nabarwani abatindi." 
2Samuel11:17 Abanto b’omochie oria bagasoka korwana na Yoabu, na abanto bande ase abasomba ba Daudi bagaitwa, na Uria Omohiti nere agaitwa."
