2Samuel11:18 Yoabu agatoma amang’ana onsi ase Daudi, buna esegi egendererete." 
2Samuel11:19 Agatebereria omotomwa oria, “Ekero gwatebirie omoruoti amang’ana onsi ay’esegi," 
2Samuel11:20 ande nabo arabe nendamwamu, akoborie: Naki mwakorete mokagenda ang’e nomochie? Inee! Timwamanyete ng’a abanto nigo bakoruta emegwe korwa ase orwaki?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ning’o oitete Abimeleki, mosinto o Yerubi‐Beseti? Tari omokungu orutete ensio korwa orwaki igoro, akamoita aaria Tebesi? Naki mwakorete mogaika orwaki ang’e igo? Omoruoti karakoberie igo, omotebie: Omosomba oo Uria Omohiti nere oitirwe boigo.”" 
2Samuel11:22 Erio omotomwa oria akagenda, agatebia Daudi amang’ana onsi aya Yoabu amotomete akwane." 
2Samuel11:23 Omonto oria agatebia Daudi, “Abanto baria nigo barenge ne chinguru chinyinge gotobua, bagatotubokera agwo ase egetii aarabu. Nonya naboigo ntwababua, tokabairania gochia ase egeita ki’omochie." 
2Samuel11:24 Abaruti emegwe bagatorasa intwe, abasomba bao, korwa orwaki igoro; abande b’abasomba bao bakure, na Uria Omohiti, omosomba oo, nere okure.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Daudi agatebia omotomwa oria, “Genda otebie Yoabu ng’a amang’ana ayio tabaisa komochanda, ekiagera omoro nigo ogoita oyo, oita noyonde. Omotebie ng’a abe ne chinguru, arwanie omochie oyio na koyosaria.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Ekero moka Uria aigwete ng’a omosacha oye okure, akaba okomoreera," 
2Samuel11:27 na ekero omokungu oria akoorire korera Daudi agatoma omonto komwoyia. Batiseba akaba moga Daudi, na nyuma y’ayio akamoiborera omwana omoisia. Korende amang’ana ayio Daudi akorete akagechia Omonene." 
2Samuel12:1 Erio Omonene agatoma Nathani ase Daudi. Nathani akagenda asare, akamotebia, “Abanto babere mbamenyete ase omochie gete, oyomo obo igo arenge omonda, na oria onde nomotaka." 
2Samuel12:2 Oria omonda nigo abwate ching’ondi ne chiombe chinyinge mono. 
2Samuel12:3 Korende oria omotaka tarenge na gento, otatiga abwate akamanwa agasigiti, akwo agorete ng’a atuge. Akamanwa akwo gakaba gakomenya inka amo nabana baye, gakaba gakoria endagera abwate na konywera korwa ase egekombe kiaye. Nigo kanarete korara ase egekuba kiaye, gakaba asare buna omwana oye omoiseke." 
2Samuel12:4 Omogeni agacha bw’omonto oria omonda, na ere tanchete komonyenyera embori gose eng’ondi korwa ase riicho riaye, korende akaira akamanwa karia k’eng’ondi k’omotaka oria, erio agakanyenyerao mogeni oye.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Bono Daudi akaba nendamwamu enene ase engencho y’omonda oria, agatebia Nathani, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, omonto oyio okorete amang’ana ayio goika akwe." 
2Samuel12:6 Ere goika amoiranerie akamanwa karia ara kane, ekiagera akora ring’ana erio, na ekiagera atabwate amabera.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Agwo Nathani agatebia Daudi, “Naye omonto oria. Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo agoteba iga: Inche nakoagete amaguta okaba omoruoti igoro y’Abaisraeli, nkagotooria korwa ase okoboko gwa Saulo." 
2Samuel12:8 Ngakoa abanto bonsi b’omonene oo, nkabeka abakungu baye ase amaboko ao. Ngakoa n’Abaisraeli na Abayuda. Onye ayio namake arenge, nabo naare gokomenta ayande amange kobua." 
2Samuel12:9 Nase ki gwachayire ring’ana riane inche Omonene, na gwakorire amabe ase obosio bwane? Gwaitire Uria Omohiti; okamorua, na Abaamoni bakamoita nomoro, naende kwairire mokaye koba mokao." 
2Samuel12:10 Bono omoro tokorua ase ororeria rwao, ekiagera gwanchayire, kwairire moka Uria akaba mokao." 
2Samuel12:11 Ee, Omonene otebire iga: Ningotubokerie obobe korwa ase enyomba yao; nkoure abakungu bao, mbae omonto omoao, nere arare nabarabwo maiso marore." 
2Samuel12:12 Aye nigo gwakorire ebibe ebio bobisi, korende inche nigo ndakoe egesusuro ekio maiso marore ase Abaisraeli bonsi baroche.”" 
2Samuel12:13 Daudi agatebia Nathani, “Nakoreire Omonene ebibe.” Nathani akamoiraneria, “Omonene okwabeire ebibe biao; togokwa." 
2Samuel12:14 Korende ekiagera gwakorire ayio kwagerire ababisa b’Omonene bamochaye, omwana oria oraiborwe goika akwe.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Erio Nathani akagenda bwoye. Omonene akarenta oborwaire ase omwana oria moka Uria aiborerete Daudi, na omwana oria akanyareka mono." 
2Samuel12:16 Agwo Daudi agasaba Nyasae ng’a omwana agwene, akeng’ata, akagenda nyomba akarara inse ase obotuko obogima." 
2Samuel12:17 Na abagaaka b’enyomba yaye bagacha bamoimokie korwa agwo inse, korende ere tancha, nonya nokoragera, taria amo nabarabwo." 
2Samuel12:18 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere omwana oria agakwa. Abasomba ba Daudi bakoboa komotebia ng’a omwana okure, naki nigo batebete, “Ekero omwana arenge moyo, togachia gokwana nere, korende tanchete gotoigwa. Naki rende toranyare komotebia ng’a omwana okure? Nigo arabaise gwekora bobe.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Korende Daudi akarora abasomba baye bakona‐komonyererana, akamanya ng’a omwana okure. Ase igo Daudi akababoria, “Inee! Omwana nakure?” Bakamoiraneria, “Ee, okure.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Daudi akaimoka korwa inse agesibia, ageaka amaguta, akaonchoreria chianga chiaye; agasoa ase enyomba y’Omonene agasasima. Erio akairana bwoye, akaboria endagera, akaegwa akaria." 
2Samuel12:21 Abasomba baye bakamotebia, “Ing’ana ki eri gwakora? Ekero omwana arenge moyo okeng’ata na korera korende bono omwana gakure, kwaimokire kwarageire.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Akabairaneria, “Ee, ekero omwana arenge moyo, nabo neng’atete na korera, nigo narengereretie ng’a ande Omonene nandorere amabera, erinde omwana abe moyo." 
2Samuel12:23 Korende bono okure, nase ki rende ndeng’ate? Inee! Ninyare komoirania abe moyo? Ninche ndagende aase agenda, korende ere takoirana asende.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Erio Daudi akaba okoremia Batiseba mokaye; akaba nere, na ere akaibora omwana omoisia, na Daudi akamoroka Sulemani. Na Omonene akaba bwanchete omwana oria," 
2Samuel12:25 agatoma amang’ana ase Nathani omobani, na ere akaroka omwana oria Yedidia, ase engencho y’Omonene." 
2Samuel12:26 Yoabu akarwania Raba bw’Abaamoni, akaira ensemo y’omochie eyarenge y’omoruoti." 
2Samuel12:27 Erio Yoabu agatoma abanto gochia ase Daudi komotebia, “Narwanirie Raba, nabwatire ensemo y’omochie ase amache aochaine." 
2Samuel12:28 “Gaki bono sangereria abanto abwo batigarete oetanane omochie, aye omonyene oyoire, inche timbaisa koyoira na igo orokwe ase erieta riane.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Ase igo Daudi agasangereria abanto bonsi, akagenda Raba, akayorwania, akayobua na koyoira." 
2Samuel12:30 Erio akarusia egutwa y’etahabu korwa ase omotwe bw’omoruoti bw’aroro. Oborito bw’egutwa eria nigo bwarenge koreng’ana chikiro emerongo etato na inye naende nigo yachabeire amagena e rigori rinene. Egutwa eyio ekabekerwa Daudi ase omotwe oye igoro. Ere agasakora ebinto ebinge mono bi’omochie oria: 
2Samuel12:31 agasokia abanto barenge ase omochie ime, akabanachana ne chinseke, amo nebikombe bi’ebioma na ebisire, akabaetia ase amariko are gosamba amatabori. Naboigo akorete abanto b’emechie yonsi y’Abaamoni. Erio Daudi akairana Yerusalemu amo nabanto bonsi." 
2Samuel13:1 Bono Abisalomu, mosinto o Daudi, narenge nomoiseke omwabo ore korokwa Tamari. Tamari nigo arenge omonyakieni mono. Omomura onde o Daudi ore korokwa Amunoni akaba omwanchete Tamari." 
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni agachandeka mono ase okomogania Tamari, omoiseke omwabo, goika agekora buna nomorwaire are. Omoiseke oria nigo arenge omwekungi; Amunoni agasinywa komokorera buna aganetie." 
2Samuel13:3 Korende ere nabwate omosani oyomo ore korokwa Yonadabu, mosinto o Simea, momura omwabo Daudi. Yonadabunigo arenge omong’aini mono bw’obong’ainereria." 
2Samuel13:4 Ere akaboria Amunoni, “Aye omwana bw’omoruoti, naki okana‐korea iga nomoichano, rituko ase rituko? Togontebia rende?” Amunoni akamoiraneria, “Nigo imwanchete Tamari, omoiseke omwabo Abisalomu, momura ominto.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu akamotebia, “Genda orare borere, bwekore buna nomorwaire ore. Na ekero iso arache gokorora, omotebie; Koranche otebie Tamari ominto ache andoiserie endagera aa ase ndoche, erinde andagerie nokoboko kwaye.”" 
2Samuel13:6 Agwo Amunoni akarara, agekora buna nomorwaire are. Ekero omoruoti achete korora Amunoni, nere akamotebia, “Koranche otebie Tamari ominto ache andoiserie emegati ebere aa ase ndoche, indie korwa ase okoboko kwaye.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Erio Daudi akarangeria Tamari korwa nyomba mwabo, akamotebia, “Genda nyomba mw’Amunoni, momura omino, omoroiserie endagera.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Tamari akagenda nyomba mw’Amunoni omwabo, na ere igo arenge oraire. Tamari akaimokia obosie, akabokonya, agakora emegati agwo ase Amunoni amorigereretie, akayesamba." 
2Samuel13:9 Naende akaimokia esani ere nemegati eria, akayeterekera Amunoni, korende ere akaanga koria. Amunoni agateba, “Tiga abanto bonsi barue aa asende.” Ase igo kera omonto agasoka isiko." 
2Samuel13:10 Amunoni agatebia Tamari, “Ndetere emegati eyio aa, inyerie korwa ase okoboko kwao.” Tamari akaimokia emegati eyio aroisetie, akayeirera Amunoni, momura omwabo, ase akanyomba ime." 
2Samuel13:11 Ekero amoirerete emegati eyio ang’e ng’a arie, Amunoni akamobwata, akamotebia, “Inchuo torare komo, moiseke ominto.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamari akamokania, akamotebia, “Yaya taibo, omwana ominto, tagonkorera obosooku buna iga. Amang’ana buna aya tagokoreka ase Abaisraeli. Tobaisa gokora obonyaka buna obo." 
2Samuel13:13 Ng’ai ngochia goeta nobosooku obo? Naye nigo orabe buna oyomo, bw’abakayayu bare ase Abaisraeli. Bono, koranche oborie omoruoti akoe ribaga onyuome.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Korende Amunoni tancha komoigwa. Ere akamobua chinguru, akamokorera obosooku ase okorara nere." 
2Samuel13:15 Nyuma y’ayio Amunoni akagecha Tamari okogecha okonene, na okogecha okwo amogecha gokaba okonene kobua obwanchani boria amwanchete ritang’ani. Amunoni akamotebia, “Imoka, orue aa!”" 
2Samuel13:16 Tamari akamoiraneria, “Yaya taibo, oyominto. Bono ogoseria oko ogonseria nigo kore okobe kobua amang’ana aya gwankoreire.” Korende Amunoni akaanga gotegerera amang’ana aye." 
2Samuel13:17 Amunoni akarangeria omomura ore komokorera, akamotebia, “Rusia omokungu oyo aa asende, omoire isiko, osieke egesieri bokung’u.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Omosomba agasokia Tamari, oria agasieka egesieri. Tamari nigo abegete eganchwa entambe, ekiagera chiganchwa buna echio nachio abaiseke abekungi b’omoruoti barenge kobeka." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamari ageaka ribu ase omotwe oye, agatandora eganchwa eria entambe abegete, akabeka amaboko motwe, akagenda okona‐korera ase eriogi rinene." 
2Samuel13:20 Erio Abisalomu omwabo akamoboria, “Inee! Amunoni omino nagokoreire amang’ana ’obosooku? Aye moiseke ominto, kirakiri; oyio noyomino, toichana ase enkoro yao. Tamari akamenya bw’Abisalomu omwabo, akaba otang’ang’ete na goichana mono.”" 
2Samuel13:21 Ekero omoruoti Daudi aigwete amang’ana ayio, akaba nekeririanda ekenene." 
2Samuel13:22 Abisalomu tarenge gokwana n’Amunoni nonya ne ring’ana erimo; nigo amogechete ekiagera ere akorerete Tamari, omoiseke omwabo, obosooku." 
2Samuel13:23 Nyuma y’emiaka ebere koyaerire, Abisalomu akaba nabanto baare konacha ching’ondi chiaye amarionya, aaria Baali‐Hasori, ang’e norogongo rwa Efraimu, agachika abamura bonsi b’omoruoti bagende aroro." 
2Samuel13:24 Abisalomu akagenda ase omoruoti, akamotebia, “Rora bono, inche, omosomba oo, nimbwate abanto bakonacha ching’ondi chiane amarionya. Koranche, aye omoruoti, ochiche amo nabasomba bao.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Korende omoruoti akamokania, akamotebia, “Yaya taibo, omwana one, titokogenda twensi. Toise kogenda twensi nigo torakobuchere.” Abisalomu akamosorora mono, korende omoruoti tancha kogenda, otatiga amosesenetie." 
2Samuel13:26 Erio Abisalomu akamoboria, “Onye togocha, koranche ong’e Amunoni ominto agende naintwe.” Omoruoti akamoboria, “Nase ki ere aragende nainwe?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Abisalomu agasorora omoruoti mono goika ere akamwanchera Amunoni amo nabamura bande bonsi baye bagende nere. 
2Samuel13:28 Abisalomu agachika abasomba baye, akabatebia, “Morigererie ekero Amunoni anyure atindire, na moigwe ekero ndabatebie ng’a moake Amunoni. Erio agwo momoake kegima, momoite akwe. Timwoboa! Inche nabachika ng’a mokore bo. Mobe abakong’u na abaremu.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Ase igo abasomba b’Abisalomu bagakora Amunoni buna Abisalomu abachigete. Nyuma y’ayio abamura bonsi b’omoruoti bakaimoka, bakariina, kera omonto eyombo yaye, bagatama." 
2Samuel13:30 Ekaba kobare inchera kogenda sobo, Daudi agatebigwa ng’a, “Abisalomu oitire abamura bao bonsi, onde tatigareti nonya noyomo.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Erio omoruoti akaimoka, agatandora chianga chiaye, akarara inse ase amaroba, na abasomba baye abateneineo bagatandora chianga chiabo." 
2Samuel13:32 Korende Yonadabu, mosinto o Simea omwabo Daudi, akabora, “Omonene one, tokaga ng’a mbonsi baitirwe; Amunoni nere bweka oitwa okwa. Aya igo Abisalomu ayaroberetie ase ebirengererio biaye korwa rituko riria Amunoni akorerete Tamari, omoiseke omwabo, amang’ana ’obosooku." 
2Samuel13:33 Gaki aye omoruoti, omonene one, tobaisa kwegena amang’ana ayio ng’a abamura bao bonsi mbaitire; Amunoni bweka nere okure.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Bono Abisalomu konya otamire. Omomura omorendi orenge otengerete agachia korigereria, akarora abanto abange mono bagotirimboka korwa ekegoro ensemo, magega yaye." 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu agatebia omoruoti, “Rigereria, abamura bao abwo bagocha, buna inche, omosomba oo, nagotebia.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Ekero akoorire gokwana, abamura b’omoruoti bakaoroka, bagaaka amariogi abo bakorera; na omoruoti boigo akarera, na abasomba baye bonsi bakarera ekerero ekenene." 
2Samuel13:37 Korende Abisalomu agatama, akagenda ase Talimai, mosinto bw’Amihudi, omoruoti bw’Abagesuri. Daudi akaba okoreera omwana oye rituko ase rituko." 
2Samuel13:38 Ekero Abisalomu atamete, akagenda akamenya Gesuri ase engaki y’emiaka etato." 
2Samuel13:39 Ekero omoruoti konya aremigwe nyuma y’ogokwa kw’Amunoni, akaba namaiga korora Abisalomu." 
2Samuel14:1 Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, akamanya ng’a omoruoti nigo aganetie Abisalomu mono." 
2Samuel14:2 Ase igo agatoma abanto bagende Tekoa kwoyia omokungu gete omong’aini korwao. Ekero achire Yoabu akamotebia, “Aye bwekore ng’a nigo okwereire; obeke chianga chi’ogokwerwa, tibweaka amaguta, bwekore buna omokungu obeire okweumia amatuko amange ekiagera akwereirwe." 
2Samuel14:3 Erio ogende ase omoruoti, omotebie amang’ana ndagotebie,” na Yoabu akamotebia aya agochia gokwana." 
2Samuel14:4 Omokungu oria o Tekoa, ekero aigete ase omoruoti, agatung’ama inse, akaumama ase okomosika, akabora, “Aye omoruoti, koranche onkonye.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Omoruoti akamoboria, “Emechando yao nereri?” Akamoiraneria, “Inche nomoboraka; omosacha one nigo akwete." 
2Samuel14:6 Inche, omosomba oo omokungu, nigo nabwate abana abamura babere, nabarabwo bagachaka kwomana kobare mogondo, gose onde tarengeo ore kobatoorania, na oyomo agaita oria, onde omwabo." 
2Samuel14:7 Abaamate baane bonsi banyimokeire inche, omosomba oo, bagontebia ng’a indue omomura oyio one bamoite, ekiagera aita oyomwabo. Baise komoita nigo ndabe tindi nomonyamwando. Naboigo bakare korigia korimia omorero one otigarete, tibatigera omosacha one erieta riaye riatorwe, gose onde oye atigare ase ense.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Omoruoti agatebia omokungu oria “Genda bwoo, ninkoroiserie amang’ana ayio.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Erio omokungu oria akamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, omonene one, tiga inche na eamate ya tata tobogorie okomocha kw’ebibe ebio. Asore omoruoti, gose ase ekerogo kiao ki’obogambi, komocha tikobao.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Omoruoti akamoiraneria, “Onde bwensi aise kogotebia amang’ana are mamincha yao, omorente asende, nere takogokuna naende.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Erio omokungu oria agateba, “Aye omoruoti, koranche oinyore Omonene, Nyasae oo, erinde omorusia egesiomba ki’amanyinga tamenta gosaria na goita omwana one.” Akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, nonya nagatukia akamo k’omwana oo tigakogwa inse.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Omokungu oria akabora, “Aye omoruoti, omonene one, ing’a inche, omosomba oo, ribaga nkwane ring’ana erimo asore.” Akamotebia, “Aye kwana.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Ase igo omokungu oria akabora, “Naki aye kwarobeirie amang’ana buna ayio are mamincha y’abanto ba Nyasae? Ase ogokwana ring’ana eri, aye omoruoti kwegambirie aye omonyene, ekiagera toeti omwana oo, oria otamete, ribaga airane nka." 
2Samuel14:14 Intwe twensi goika tokwe; nigo tore buna amache aitekire inse atanyare kobuuchwa naende. Nyasae tari gosiria obogima. Nigo akoroberia ng’a oria otamete taserigwa na gwatananwa korwa asare. 
2Samuel14:15 Bono nigo nacha gokwana aya asore, aye omonene one, ekiagera abanto banyoboirie. Ase igo inche omokungu, omosomba oo, nkarengereria ng’a nkwane naye omoruoti. Ande aye nonkorere aya inche, omosomba oo, nkoboria." 
2Samuel14:16 Ee, omoruoti, nonyigwe na ontoorie inche, omosomba oo, korwa ase okoboko kw’omonto oyo origetie gonsiria inche amo nomwana one na gotorusia korwa ase omwando o Nyasae." 
2Samuel14:17 Inche, omosomba oo, nkarengereria ng’a nonyare kong’a obotoereru, ekiagera aye, omoruoti one, nigo ore buna omomalaika o Nyasae ase okomanya gwatanana ayare amaya na ayare amabe. Omonene Nyasae abe amo naye!”" 
2Samuel14:18 Erio omoruoti agatebia omokungu oria, “Tobaisa kombisa gento kende gionsi ndakoborie.” Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Aye omonene one omoruoti, mboria.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Omoruoti akamoboria, “Inee! Yoabu takari amo naye ase aya onsi?” Omokungu oria akairaneria, akabora, “Ekeene, buna aye, omonene one omoruoti, ore moyo, monto onde tari oranyare gokana gose kwanga gokoiraneria amaborio ao na gotama gochia aande, ensemo ya borio gose eya bomosi. Ekeene, Yoabu, omosomba oo, nere omboretie inche, omosomba oo, ng’a nkwane amang’ana aya onsi." 
2Samuel14:20 Omosomba oo Yoabu nigo akorire aya, erinde akoonchorerie goetera ase ring’ana eri, korende aye, omonene one, nigo ore ne chisemi buna echi’abamalaika ba Nyasae; nomanyete amang’ana onsi ayare ase ense.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Nyuma y’ayio omoruoti agatebia Yoabu, “Naama! Nakoeire ribaga eri. Genda orente omosae oria Abisalomu.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Yoabu agatung’ama inse, akaumama ase omoruoti ase okomosika na komosesenia. Naende akabora, “Rero inche, omosomba oo, namanyire ng’a nanyorire ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, aye omoruoti, omonene one, ekiagera kwang’ikeraneirie okogania kwane.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Yoabu akaimoka, akagenda Gesuri, akarenta Abisalomu," 
2Samuel14:24 na omoruoti agateba, “Tiga amenye ao ase enka yaye omonyene; tabaisa gocha ase obosio bwane.” Ase igo Abisalomu akamenya bwoye oka, taba okororana nomoruoti." 
2Samuel14:25 Bono ase egati y’Abaisraeli bonsi monto onde tarenge orenge nogotogigwa ase ekieni kiaye buna Abisalomu. Nigo arenge omonyakieni mono; korwa ebisanyi bi’amagoro goika omotwe oye tarenge na kemocho kende. 
2Samuel14:26 Ere nigo arenge konacha etukia yaye omoerio o kera omwaka, ekiagera yare koba endito mono. Oborito bw’etukia yaye nigo bwarenge chikiro ibere na ekeng’ese, koreng’ana ekerengo kiare gokorerwa ase omoruoti." 
2Samuel14:27 Abisalomu nigo aiboreretwe abamura batato, na omoiseke oyomo ore korokwa Tamari. Ere nigo arenge omoiseke omonyakieni." 
2Samuel14:28 Abisalomu akamenya Yerusalemu emiaka ebere atana gochia kororana nomoruoti. 
2Samuel14:29 Erio Abisalomu akarangeria Yoabu, erinde amotome ase omoruoti, korende Yoabu akaanga gocha asare. Naende akamorangeria eria kabere, korende boigo akaanga, tacha." 
2Samuel14:30 Ase igo Abisalomu agatebia abasomba baye, “Rora omogondo o Yoabu nigo osinyaine noyone, noro bwamire esairi, genda motongie omorero esairi eria eyie.” Bakagenda, bakayetongia omorero ekayia." 
2Samuel14:31 Na bono Yoabu akaimoka, akagenda bw’Abisalomu, akamoboria, “Nase ki abasomba bao basambire esairi yane iga?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abisalomu akamoiraneria, “Rigereria, ngatoma abanto asore ng’a oche ogende ase omoruoti, omotebie amang’ana aane. Inki rende narwerete Gesuri? Nanga mbuya nare komenya aroro goika rero iga. Bono ninganetie korora omoruoti. Onye obobe bore asende ang’ite.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Ase igo Yoabu akagenda ase omoruoti, akamotebia amang’ana ayio. Erio omoruoti akarangeria Abisalomu; na ere akagenda ase omoruoti, agatung’ama inse akaumama ase obosio bwaye, na omoruoti akamonyunyunta." 
2Samuel15:1 Nyuma y’ayio Abisalomu akenyorera egari, ne chibarasi, na abanto emerongo etano barabe bakominyoka bosio bwaye." 
2Samuel15:2 Ase kera rituko Abisalomu nigo anarete koimoka mambia chuni, otenena enchera ensemo ase egeita ki’omochie. Na ekero omonto onde bwensi are gocha ore ne ring’ana akoira ase omoruoti agamberwe, Abisalomu omorangeria gocha asare, omoboria, “Aye mochie ki kwarwa?” Ekero omonto oyio amoiraneirie nase gesaku ki ki’Abaisraeli arwa," 
2Samuel15:3 Abisalomu omotebia, “Rora, amang’ana ao namaya, naende amaronge, korende monto onde tari aa omoruoti abegete orakoigwere.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Naende Abisalomu obora, “Onye nabekwa imbe omogambi ase ense eye, kera omonto ore ne ring’ana gose ekina gete anga nacha asende, nainche anga namokonya na komonyorera oboronge.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Omonto arenge goika asare na gotung’ama ase okoorokia amasikani, Abisalomu nigo arenge korambora okoboko kwaye obwata omonto oyio na komonyunyunta." 
2Samuel15:6 Naboigo Abisalomu akorete Abaisraeli bonsi abwo barenge gocha ase omoruoti ase okogamberwa ebina biabo. Ase enchera eyio Abisalomu akang’usa Abaisraeli bonsi bakamwancha. 
2Samuel15:7 Ekaba nyuma y’emiaka ene koyaerire, Abisalomu agatebia omoruoti, “Koranche ong’e ribaga ngende Heburoni goikerania eira yane narierete Omonene." 
2Samuel15:8 Naki inche, omosomba oo, ekero narenge imenyete Gesuri ya Siiria, nigo narierete Omonene eira ng’a karang’iranie Yerusalemu, erio nimbe nkomokorera agwo Heburoni.”" 
2Samuel15:9 Omoruoti akamotebia, “Genda nomorembe.” Ase igo Abisalomu akaimoka, akagenda Heburoni." 
2Samuel15:10 Korende Abisalomu agatoma abanto bobisi ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli babitebie, “Ekero moraigwe eriogi ri’egetureri, erio moake eriogi motebe: Bono Abisalomu obeire omoruoti o Heburoni!”" 
2Samuel15:11 Abanto amagana abere korwa Yerusalemu bakagenda amo n’Abisalomu. Abwo bachigetwe koba abageni, bakagenda batari na komocha, ekiagera tibamanyete amang’ana agochia gokorwa." 
2Samuel15:12 Ekero Abisalomu arenge korua ebing’wanso, agatoma abanto korangeria Ahitofali, omosemia bw’omoruoti Daudi, korwa ase omochie o Gilo. Obobe bwabo bw’okoba mamincha ya Daudi bokabucha, bokaba ne chinguru, na abanto abwo bakabwatana n’Abisalomu bakamentekana, bakaba abange." 
2Samuel15:13 Abanto bakairera Daudi amang’ana, bakamotebia, “Abaisraeli babwatanire n’Abisalomu bamoigwereire.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Erio Daudi agatebia abasomba baye bonsi, abwo barenge nere agwo Yerusalemu, “Imoka totame, onye torigetie gwetooria korwa ase Abisalomu. Ayerera bwango, Abisalomu tabaisa gocha gotoumokera na gotorentera amabe, gose aite abanto b’omochie nomoro.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Abasomba b’omoruoti bakamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, intwe abasomba bao nigo twebegete ang’e gokora rinde rionsi oratotebie.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Ase igo omoruoti akagenda, na abanto bonsi b’omochie oye bakamotunyana. Omoruoti agatiga abakungu baye ba sere‐sere ikomi bakorenda enyomba yaye." 
2Samuel15:17 Omoruoti akagenderera gotama, na abanto bonsi bakamotunyana korwa nyuma; bakaratenena ake ase enyomba yarenge ensinyo." 
2Samuel15:18 Abasomba baye bonsi bagaetera ensemo, bakamoetania, amo n’Abakereti bonsi, na Abapeleti bonsi, na Abagiti amagana atano na rimo, abwo bamobwatetie korwa Gati; bonsi bagaetania omoruoti." 
2Samuel15:19 Omoruoti akaboria Itai Omogiti, “Nase ki naye okogenda amo naintwe? Irana obeere nomoruoti oyio omoyia; aye nomomenyi ore, naende nigo gwaserigwa korwa seino." 
2Samuel15:20 Nigoro gwacha aa. Nase ki ndagotige ontunyane na kona‐koong’anya amo nainche, nainche timanyeti nonya naase ngochia? Irana amo nabamino, na Omonene akoorokerie obwanchani bwaye botari koera na obwegenwa bwaye.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Korende Itai akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, na buna aye omoruoti, omonene one, ore moyo, aande onsi ase ogochia, onye nase ogokwa, gose ase okoba moyo, agwo nao nainche, omosomba oo, ndabe.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Erio Daudi agatebia Itai, “Gaki eta, ogende bosio.” Itai Omogiti agaeta gochia bosio amo nabanto baye bonsi, na abana abake bonsi, abarenge amo nere." 
2Samuel15:23 Abanto b’ense eria bakarera namariogi amanene ekero abanto bonsi baare goeta, na omoruoti akaamboka akarooche ga Kidironi; abanto bonsi bakaamboka bakagenda ase enchera y’erooro." 
2Samuel15:24 Zadoki nao arenge na Abalawi bonsi. Barabwo babogoretie Esanduku ya Nyasae ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania. Abiatari nere agachao. Ababogoretie Esanduku eria ba kayetoora inse goika abanto bonsi bakaba barure ase omochie. 
2Samuel15:25 Erio omoruoti agatebia Zadoki, “Bogoria Esanduku ya Nyasae, oyeiranie ase omochie ime. Onye nkonyora ogwancherwa ase Omonene, ere nang’iranie, ayenyorokie naende amo n’Obomenyo bwaye omonyene." 
2Samuel15:26 Korende karantebie ng’a timogwenereti, inche nao inde aa, ankorere aya ararore are amaya asare.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Naende omoruoti agatebia Zadoki omokuani, “Aye nomorori. Irana ase omochie nomorembe. Oirane n’Ahimasi, omwana oo, na Yonathani, omwana o Abiatari, abana abwo babere baino." 
2Samuel15:28 Naama! Inche nigo nkoganyera ase ebiambokero bi’orooche aiga ase erooro goika inyore amang’ana korwa asemore.” 
2Samuel15:29 Ase igo Zadoki na Abiatari bakabogoria Esanduku ya Nyasae; bakayeirania Yerusalemu, nabarabwo bakabeera aroro." 
2Samuel15:30 Daudi agatiira gochia ase Egetunwa ki’Emezeituni igoro okona‐korera otubete omotwe oye, tabegete bikoroto; na abanto abarenge amo nere bagetuba emetwe yabo bakorera kobagotiira." 
2Samuel15:31 Ekero Daudi atebetigwe ng’a Ahitofeli nere nao akare ase abwo babwatanire n’Abisalomu, agasaba, “Omonene, onchora omoroberio bw’Ahitofeli obe bosa.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Ekero Daudi aigete ekegoro igoro, ase Nyasae are gosasimerwa, Husai Omoariki agacha komorotota; eganchwa yaye nigo yatandoire, na ebuse ere ase omotwe oye." 
2Samuel15:33 Daudi akamotebia, “Oise kogenda amo nainche nigo orabe egurube asende." 
2Samuel15:34 Korende oise koirana ase omochie na gotebia Abisalomu: Aye omoruoti, nigo ndabe omosomba oo buna narenge omosomba o iso agwo ritang’ani, naboigo bono ndabe omosomba oo, erio nario orankonye tosarie omoroberio bw’Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel15:35 Inee! Zadoki na Abiatari abakuani tibakari aroro? Gaki ing’ana rinde rionsi oraigwe ase enyomba y’omoruoti oribatebie. 
2Samuel15:36 Barabwo mbakabwate abana babo babere, Ahimasi, omwana o Zadoki, na Yonathani, omwana bw’Abiatari. Mobe mokobatoma bandetere kera ring’ana moraigwe.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Husai, omosani o Daudi, agasoa omochie o Yerusalemu ekero Abisalomu nere asoeteo." 
2Samuel16:1 Ekero Daudi agendire ake goetania egetunwa igoro, akaumerana na Siba, omosomba o Mefiboseti, ore ne chitigere ibere chibogoretie emegati amagana abere, na amabomba ’amasabibu amomo rigana erimo, na amabomba ’amako rigana erimo, amo nekerandi ekemo keroisirie korwa ase risankwa, kere nedivai." 
2Samuel16:2 Omoruoti akaboria Siba, “Naki gwakora kwarenta ebinto ebi?” Siba akamoiraneria, “Chitigere nechi ’abanto b’omoruoti bagochia koriina, na emegati na amatunda nebi’abamura abwo bagochia koria, na edivai baegwe banywe kobarosire ase erooro.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Omoruoti akamoboria, “Ng’ai omochokoro bw’omonene oo akare?” Siba akamoiraneria, “Yerusalemu akare. Nigo ateba ng’a rero Abaisraeli bamoiraneirie oboruoti bwa sokoro yaye.”" 
2Samuel16:4 Erio omoruoti agatebia Siba, “Rigereria, kera egento ekiarenge ekia Mefiboseti nebiao.” Siba akamotebia, “Nebekire inse asore. Koranche inyore ogwancherwa asore, aye omoruoti, omonene one.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Ekero omoruoti Daudi aigete Bahurimu, omonto bw’eamate ya Saulo ore korokwa Simei, mosinto o Gera, agasoka korwa ase omochie. Ere kagocha akana‐koragereria Daudi." 
2Samuel16:6 Akaba okoruta amagena ase Daudi omoruoti na ase abasomba baye bonsi, nonya abanto bonsi, amo nabaria chituoni, bamoetanaine, ase ensemo ya borio na eya bomosi." 
2Samuel16:7 Simei gakoragereria, akabora, “Karue aa! Karue aa! Aye omoiteri amanyinga! Aye omosaria!" 
2Samuel16:8 Aye nigo kwairete oboruoti korwa ase Saulo, na bono Omonene nkoruseria are abanto b’enyomba ya Saulo abwo gwaitete egesiomba. Bono Omonene obekire oboruoti ase okoboko kw’Aibsalomu, omwana oo. Rigereria, obobe bwao bwakoiraneire, aye omoiteri amanyinga.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Erio Abisai, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, agatebia omoruoti, “Naki esese eria ekwete egokoragereria iga, aye omoruoti, omonene one? Tiga ngende mbutore omotwe oye.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Omoruoti akabora, “Inki inde nainwe abamura b’omokungu Seruya? Onye okoragereria, ekiagera Omonene amotebirie ng’a andagererie inche Daudi, ning’o oranyare komoboria; Ninki kiagera ogokora iga?”" 
2Samuel16:11 Daudi agatebia Abisai na abasomba baye bonsi, “Rigereria, omwana one ndusetie ase enda yane, nere okondigia ang’ite. Bono omonto oyo bw’egesaku kia Benjamin, Inee, takondigia goetania? Motige andame. Omonene nere omotebirie ng’a andame." 
2Samuel16:12 Ande Omonene ororire amabe anyorete, nere ang’akane amaya ribaga ri’okoragererigwa okwo kwanyorire rero.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Daudi na abanto baye bakaba bagendererete enchera yabo, na Simei nere okona‐goeta ensemo y’egetunwa, okoragereria; akamoruta amagena, na komosiarera ebuse." 
2Samuel16:14 Omoruoti na abanto baye bonsi konya barosire ekero baigete aase gete. Ase igo bakaba bagotimokera aroro. 
2Samuel16:15 Abisalomu na abanto abwo bonsi b’Abaisraeli bagaika Yerusalemu, na Ahitofeli nigo arenge amo nere." 
2Samuel16:16 Ekero Husai Omoariki, omosani o Daudi, aigete ase Abisalomu, akamotebia, “Omoruoti, ochie kare! Omoruoti, ochie kare!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abisalomu akaboria Husai, “Inee! Obo nabwo obwegenwa ore nabwo ase Daudi, omosani oo? Naki otatunyanete omosani oo?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Husai akamoiraneria, “Yaya, taibo. Korende oyo Omonene achorire, na abanto abwo, na Abaisraeli bonsi, bachorire, inche nimbe oyoye, mbeere asare." 
2Samuel16:19 Naende ning’o ngwenerete nkorere? Tengwenereti nkorere aye, omwana oye? Ee, buna narenge gokorera iso, naboigo naye ndagokorere.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Erio Abisalomu agatebia Ahitofeli, “Bono buna tore aa, tosemie eki togwenerete gokora.”" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofeli akairaneria Abisalomu, “Soa nyomba, momenyane nabakungu ba sere‐sere abwo iso atiga bakorenda enyomba. Igo Abaisraeli bonsi bakoigwa ng’a kwagechigwe na iso, na abwo bonsi bagokobwatia nigo barabekwe chinguru.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Ase igo barabwo bagateneneria Abisalomu eema kerama igoro, na ere akarara nabakungu ba sere‐sere ba ise maiso marore ase Abaisraeli bonsi." 
2Samuel16:23 Ase engaki eria ogosemia kw’Ahitofeli gokaba ase abanto buna amairanerio omonto akonyora korwa ase Nyasae. Naboigo ogosemia kw’Ahitofeli kwabete ase Daudi na ase Abisalomu. 
2Samuel17:1 Nyuma y’ayio Ahitofeli agatebia Abisalomu, “Tiga nchore abanto chilifu ikomi na ibere (12,000), erinde mbwatie Daudi ase obotuko obo." 
2Samuel17:2 Inche imochiere mobosokano imogose ekero arosire na erusirie moyo. Abanto abwo bonsi bare komo mbatame, nainche ninyare goita omoruoti kare bweka." 
2Samuel17:3 Erio mbarente abanto bonsi asore, buna omoriakari akorentwa ase omosacha oye. Aye nomonto oyomo origetie oite; naende abanto bonsi babe nomorembe.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Ogosemia okwo gokagwenera Abisalomu na abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli. 
2Samuel17:5 Erio Abisalomu akabora, “Rangeria Husai Omoariki, toigwe nere, buna agototebia.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Na ekero Husai achete ase Abisalomu, Abisalomu akamotebia, “Aya naro Ahitofeli atosemirie. Naro tokobwatia gose? Onye taibo, aye totebie aya togokora.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Husai akairaneria Abisalomu, “Ogosemia okwo Ahitofeli abaeire tikori okuya ase ekero eke.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Naende Husai akamotebia, “Nomanyete iso na abanto baye, ng’a nabanto chituoni chi’esegi, bare abakong’u, naende nigo bare abatindi buna edubu yaurirwe chimanwa chiaye ase orosana. Iso nomonto omanyete korwana esegi, takorara botuko, ere nabanto baye." 
2Samuel17:9 Ande nonya mbono nigo ebisete ase engoro gete, gose ase ribwago. Kerabe ng’a abanto mbaitwe ekero esegi egochaka, onde bwensi karaigwe amang’ana ayio nigo aratebe ng’a abanto bare kobwatia Abisalomu babuirwe." 
2Samuel17:10 Igo nonya noyore omoremu buna endo, nigo arairianyeke kegima, ekiagera Abaisraeli bonsi mbamanyete ng’a iso nigo are etuoni y’esegi, na abanto baye nabatindi ase esegi." 
2Samuel17:11 Ase ayio ogosemia kwane noko: Orente Abaisraeli bonsi amo korwa Dani goika Beeri‐Seba babe abange buna omokenye ore engegu y’enyancha; naye omonyene ogende amo nabarabwo ase esegi. 
2Samuel17:12 Erio toorokere Daudi aande onsi aranyorekane, tomogwere buna riime rikogwa igoro ase riroba, gose titotiga onde bwensi abe moyo, ere gose monto onde bwensi bare komo." 
2Samuel17:13 Aise gosoa ase omochie onde bwensi, Abaisraeli bonsi nigo bararente chingori bachietananie omochie oyio, bayokurure gochia rooche ime, gose igena rinde tirigotigara nonya nerimo.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abisalomu na Abaisraeli bonsi bakabora, “Ogosemia kwa Husai Omoariki nokuya kobua koria kw’Ahitofeli.” Omonene nere ochigete ogosemia okwo okuya kw’Ahitofeli kwangwe, erinde arentere Abisalomu emechando." 
2Samuel17:15 Husai agatebia Zadoki na Abiatari, abakuani, “Ahitofeli osemirie Abisalomu na abagaaka b’Abaisraeli amang’ana aya na aya, korende inche nabasemia iga na iga." 
2Samuel17:16 Bono toma amang’ana bwango, mokurere Daudi ng’a tabaisa korara ase obotuko obo ase ebiambokero agwo ase erooro, korende goika amboke orooche, erinde tabaisa gosirigwa amo nabanto baye bonsi.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Bono Yonathani na Ahimasi nigo barenge baganyete ase ensoko y’Eni‐Rogeli, ekiagera boboete gosoa omochie ime babaise kororwa. Omoiseke omosomba oyomo nigo arenge okona‐kobairera amang’ana, nabarabwo bayairera omoruoti Daudi." 
2Samuel17:18 Korende rituko erimo omosae oyomo akabarora, agatebia Abisalomu amang’ana ayio. Ase ayio Yonathani na Ahimasi bakagenda ase enka y’omonto gete aaria Bahurimu. Omonto oyio nabwate engoro y’amache ase omochie oye, nabarabwo bakebisa imeo," 
2Samuel17:19 na omokungu bw’omonto oria akaimokia egekuneko, akayekuneka, akanekera endagera yaye igoro aroro; gose omonto onde tamanyete amang’ana ayio." 
2Samuel17:20 Ekero abasomba b’Abisalomu bachete ase omokungu oria nyomba ime, bakamoboria, “Ng’ai Yonathani na Ahimasi bare?” Omokungu oria akabatebia, “Bambokire orooche orwo, bachiire.” Ekero abanto baria babarigetie tibabarora, bakairana Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Nyuma barabwo kobachiire, baria babere bagasoka korwa ase engoro eria, bakaamboka orooche bwango, bakagenda ase omoruoti Daudi bakamotebia, “Imoka mwamboke orooche bwango, morue aa, naki aya na aya naro Ahitofeli arobeirie mamincha yaino.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Erio Daudi na abanto bonsi barenge komo bakaimoka, bakaamboka Yorodan. Bogachia gokia, bonsi konya bambokire; onde tatigarete otambogete." 
2Samuel17:23 Ekero Ahitofeli aroche ng’a ogosemia kwaye kwangirwe, akariina etigere yaye, akagenda omochie oye, na karobeirie amang’ana ’enyomba yaye, akagenda agesunga, agakwa. Gakure agatindekwa ase oboina bwa ise." 
2Samuel17:24 Daudi konya oikire Mahanaimu ekero Abisalomu ambogete Yorodan amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi barenge komo. 
2Samuel17:25 Abisalomu konya obekire Amasa koba omotang’ani bw’abarwani b’esegi ribaga ria Yoabu. Amasa nigo arenge mosinto o Yitira Omoisumaeli. Yitira nere omenyanete n’Abigaeli, omoiseke o Nahasi, mosubati omwabo Seruya, oyorenge ng’ina Yoabu." 
2Samuel17:26 Abisalomu amo n’Abaisraeli bagatoora ase ense ya Gileadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Ekaba Daudi gaikire Mahanaimu, akanyorana na Sobi, mosinto o Nahasi, korwa Raba, ase ense y’Abaamoni, na Makiri, mosinto bw’Amieli, korwa Lo‐Debari, na Barisilai Omogileadi korwa Rogelimu." 
2Samuel17:28 Barabwo bakarenta ebirarero, ne chisani, na ebikorero biroisirie korwa ase amaroba. Boigo bakarenta engano, na esairi, na obosie, na ebigara bisambire, ne ching’ende ao ao," 
2Samuel17:29 na obooke, na amaguta, ne ching’ondi, na amabomba ’amabeere e chiombe abwatanirie bibe endagera ase Daudi amo nabanto barenge komo. Abwo babirentete nigo batebete, “Abanto aba enchara yabanyarire, naende barang’ire na barosire aiga ase erooro.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Omoruoti Daudi akaroberia abanto baye, akabaatanana ase ebiombe bi’elifu elifu, na ebie rigana rigana, akababekera abatang’ani" 
2Samuel18:2 Erio agatoma abarwani bagende korwana esegi, bare ebiombe bitato, ekemo inse y’oboraai bwa Yoabu, ne egia kabere inse y’oboraai bw’Abisai, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, oyorenge ng’ina Yoabu boigo, na egia gatato inse y’oboraai bwa Itai korwa Gati. Omoruoti agatebia abanto baye, “Nigo nkogenda amo nainwe inche omonyene.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Korende abanto bakamoiraneria, “Aye tobaisa kogenda amo naintwe. Naki gatoratame, barabwo tibagotoraara. Nonya abanto baito nabaisa goitwa ekeng’ese ki’omobaro, tobagotoraara. Aye nigo ore bw’engencho enene asetore kobua abanto baito chilifu ikomi. Ase ayio igo erabe buya obeere ase omochie na gotokonya korwa aroro.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Omoruoti akabairaneria, “Aya mwarora ng’a namaya naro ngokora.” Ase ayio omoruoti agatenena geita ensemo ekero abarwani baare gosoka gochia isiko ase ebiombe bi’amagana ne chilifu." 
2Samuel18:5 Omoruoti agachika Yoabu, na Abisai, na Itai, akabatebia, “Ase engencho yane timokorera omosae oyio Abisalomu bobe.” Na abanto bonsi mbaigwete ekero omoruoti akoa abatang’ani abwo ogochika okwo igoro y’Abisalomu." 
2Samuel18:6 Abarwani ba Daudi bakagenda orosana korwania Abaisraeli, na esegi ekarwanerwa ase rinani ri’Efraimu." 
2Samuel18:7 Abaisraeli bakabugwa nabarwani ba Daudi. Ogoitwa okwo gokaba okonene, na ase rituko riria abanto chilifu emerongo ebere bagaitwa." 
2Samuel18:8 Esegi nigo yesiarerete ase orosana rwonsi rw’aase aria, na ase rituko riria abanto abange bagakwera ase rinani ime kobua abwo baitetwe nemioro." 
2Samuel18:9 Abisalomu akaumerana nabasomba ba Daudi mobosokano. Nigo ariinete eyombo yaye, nero egaeta inse y’omote onga buna omotontera ore ne chinsagia chinetu, na omotwe bw’Abisalomu okaaga ase omote oria igoro, nere agatigara osung’unaneteo, na eyombo yaye egaeta akaminyoka." 
2Samuel18:10 Omonto gete akamorora, akagenda ase Yoabu akamotebia, “Narora Abisalomu osung’unaine agwo moino ase omote onga buna omotontera.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Yoabu akamoiraneria, “Onye kwamorora, ninki kiaba tikwamoita ara rimo? Inche anga naba nomogoko inkoe chibesa chisekeli chie chifeta ikomi, amo norokini.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Omonto oria agatebia Yoabu, “Nonya kware kong’a chisekeli chie chifeta elifu eyemo, tinare korambora okoboko kwane igoro y’omwana bw’omoruoti, naki twensi ntwaigwete ekero omoruoti agochigete aye, na Abisai, na Itai, ogoteba: Ase engencho yane orende omosae oyio Abisalomu." 
2Samuel18:13 Onye nanga tinyigwera omoruoti, korende ing’ite omwana oye, ere anga naigwa amang’ana ayio, ekiagera nigo are komanya kera ring’ana. Inee! Aye omonyene ngonkengera kware?”" 
2Samuel18:14 Erio Yoabu akabora, “Tinkora gosaria chingaki gokwana naye boire.” Akaimokia amatimo atato, akabeta Abisalomu egekuba igoro, agachia konacha enkoro, ekero Abisalomu asung’unanete ase omote igoro ore moyo." 
2Samuel18:15 Erio abamura ikomi ababogoreretie Yoabu ebirwanero, bagaetanana Abisalomu, bakamoaka na komoita." 
2Samuel18:16 Nyuma y’ayio Yoabu akabugia egetureri ase ogotanga esegi, na abanto bakairana bagatiga kobwatia Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel18:17 Abanto bakaimokia omobere bw’Abisalomu, bakayoruta ase engoro entambe, agwo ase rinani, bakayotuba amagena akaba etui enene, na Abaisraeli bonsi bagatama kera omonto gochia bwoye." 
2Samuel18:18 Ekero Abisalomu arenge moyo konya bweagacheire egento buna esiiro, agakebeka agwo ase Ense Omweya y’Omoruoti gekaba ekeinyorio ki’erieta riaye; akarengereria ng’a tari na monyamwando. Akayeroka ase erieta riaye omonyene; na goika rero iga nigo ekorokwa Ekeinyorio ki’Abisalomu." 
2Samuel18:19 Ahimasi, mosinto o Zadoki, agatebia Yoabu, “Tiga iminyoke ntebie omoruoti amang’ana, buna Omonene amotooririe korwa ase ababisa baye.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Yoabu akamokania, akamotebia, “Yaya, rero tokonyara koba omonto okoira amang’ana amaya. Rituko rinde nonyare koira amang’ana amaya, korende tari rero, ekiagera omwana bw’omoruoti okure.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Erio Yoabu agatebia Omoetiopia oyomo, “Genda otebie omoruoti aya kwarora.” Na Omoetiopia oria agekumba inse ase obosio bwa Yoabu, akaminyoka kogenda." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimasi, mosinto o Zadoki, agatebia Yoabu eria kabere. “Ande onsi arabe, koranche ong’e ribaga iminyoke korwa nyuma y’Omoetiopia oria ng’irere omoruoti amang’ana.” Yoabu akamoboria, “Omwana one, gokominyoka, ninki orachie konyora? Ayio tari amang’ana amaya airwa.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ahimasi akamoiraneria, “Ayio tari mang’ana, ing’a ribaga ngende.” Yoabu akamoiraneria, “Minyoka rende.” Erio Ahimasi akaminyoka agaetania Omoetiopia oria agwo ase ense omweya ya Yorodan." 
2Samuel18:24 Bono Daudi nigo aikaransete egati y’ebiita bibere bi’omochie, egia isiko na ekia ime. Omorendi akariina gochia kerama igoro y’ebiita, ang’e norwaki. Na ekero arigereretie akarora omonto oyomo okominyoka gocha ore bweka." 
2Samuel18:25 Omorendi akarangeria gochia inse, agatebia omoruoti amang’ana ayio. Na omoruoti akamotebia, “Onye ore bweka nigo abwate amang’ana amaya.” Omonto oria akaba ogoika ang’e kobua." 
2Samuel18:26 Naende omorendi akarora omonto onde okominyoka gocha ore bweka. Erio akarangeria omorendi bw’egesieri, akamotebia, “Omonto onde oyio gocha ore bweka!” Omoruoti agateba, “Nere boigo namang’ana amaya abwate.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Omorendi agateba, “Nigo ndoche ng’a omominyoki oria bwe ritang’ani nigo anga buna Ahimasi, mosinto o Zadoki.” Erio omoruoti agateba, “Ere nomonto omuya, nigo akorenta amang’ana amaya.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimasi agaaka eriogi, agatebia omoruoti, “Nomorembe!” Naende agatung’ama inse, akaumama ase obosio bw’omoruoti, akabora, “Omonene, Nyasae oo, atogigwe, oyo obarusirieo abanto aba konya baimokirie amaboko abo igoro yao, aye omoruoti, omonene one.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Omoruoti akamoboria, “Inee! Omosae oria Abisalomu mbuya are?” Ahimasi akamoiraneria, “Ekero Yoabu antoma, inche, omosomba oo, nigo naigwa egetitiro ekenene, korende tinamanya engencho yaye.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Omoruoti akamotebia, “Tigera, otenene agwo ensemo,” na Ahimasi agatigera, agatenena ensemo." 
2Samuel18:31 Omoetiopia nere agacha, agatebia omoruoti, “Nakorenteire amang’ana amaya, aye omonene one. Rero Omonene okoruseirie egesiomba ase baria bakoimokera gokorwania.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Omoruoti akaboria Omoetiopia oria, “Inee! Omosae oria Abisalomu mbuya are?” Omoetiopia oria akamoiraneria, “Nigo nare kogania ng’a aya amonyora omosae oria, abanyore nababisa bao bonsi; boigo anyore nabaria bagokoimokera kogokorera bobe.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Omoruoti agachandeka mono, akariina gochia akanyomba karenge ase egeita igoro, akarera nobororo, akaba ogotaara‐taara na goteba, “Abisalomu, omwana one! Obee! Omwana one! Abisalomu, ntare gokwa ribaga riao! Abisalomu, omwana one!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Yoabu agatebigwa ng’a omoruoti Daudi nkorera are na kweumia ase engencho y’Abisalomu. 
2Samuel19:2 Ase igo omogoko bw’obobui okaonchoka okaba omoichano ase abanto bonsi ba Daudi, ekiagera ase rituko riria abanto nigo baigwete ng’a Daudi nkona‐korera are ase engencho y’omwana oye." 
2Samuel19:3 Ase rituko riria abanto bakaba bagochoba gosoa ase omochie ime buna abanto bagotama korwa ase esegi bare nobosooku ase engencho y’ayio. 
2Samuel19:4 Omoruoti agetuba obosio bwaye, akarera ase eriogi rinene, “Obee! Abisalomu, omwana one! Obee! Abisalomu, omwana one, omwana one!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Erio Yoabu agacha nyomba ase omoruoti, akamotebia, “Rero aye gwakorire abasomba bao bonsi barorire obosooku, abanto aba konya batooririe obogima bwao, na obw’abana bao, abamura na abaiseke, na obw’abakungu bao, na abakungu bao ba sere‐sere." 
2Samuel19:6 Nigo bwanchete abwo bakogechete na kogecha abwo bagwanchete. Naki rero kworokirie maiso marore ng’a abatang’ani na abasomba bao barabwo mbosa bare asore. Rero nario namanya ng’a onye Abisalomu moyo arenge, na intwe twensi tobe twakure, erio nanga nigo kwaigwa buya." 
2Samuel19:7 Gaki bono koranche, oimoke osoke isiko, okwane nabasomba bao, oremie chinkoro chiabo. Ase igo natianire ase Omonene ng’a otasogeti, monto onde tagotigara orabe amo naye goika mambia, na amang’ana ayio nigo arabe amabe kobua ayakonyorete korwa ekero kwarenge omosae goika rero iga.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Erio omoruoti agasoka, agaikaransa ase egeita ki’omochie. Abanto bonsi bagatebigwa ng’a omoruoti nao are ase egeita; na igo bakagenda asare. Abaisraeli bonsi konya batamire, kera omonto gochia inka bwoye." 
2Samuel19:9 Bakaba bakoamererania barabwo ase barabwo, bakabora, “Omoruoti nigo atotooretie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baito, na korwa ase amaboko ’Abafilisti, na bono otamire Abisalomu, otigire ense eye." 
2Samuel19:10 Abisalomu, oyo twaaka amaguta akaba omoruoti oito, okure ase esegi. Na bono, naki motari goteba ng’a moiranie Daudi abe omoruoti naende?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Daudi omoruoti agatoma abanto gochia ase Zadoki na Abiatari, abakuani, agateba, “Kwana nabagaaka b’Abayuda, mobamborerie: Naki rende mokoba abanto b’omoerio ase okong’irania inche omoruoti inka bwone, bono ekero amang’ana onsi aya Abaisraeli bakwanete aikerete nyomba mwane?" 
2Samuel19:12 Inwe nabanto baminto ab’amanyinga aane ne chinyama chiane. Naki rende morigetie koba ab’omoerio ase okong’irania inche omoruoti inka? 
2Samuel19:13 Naende motebie Amasa: Inee! Aye tori amanyinga aane ne chinyama chiane? Nyasae ang’e egesusuro bono na kogenderera onye aye tokoba omotang’ani bw’abarwani b’esegi botambe ribaga ria Yoabu.” 
2Samuel19:14 Abayuda bonsi bagancha amang’ana a Daudi mono, bakamotomera amang’ana ng’a airane amo nabasomba baye bonsi." 
2Samuel19:15 Ekero omoruoti are koirana gaikire Yorodan, akanyora Abayuda bachire Giligali komorotota na komwambokia Yorodan." 
2Samuel19:16 Na Simei, mosinto o Gera, Omobenjamin korwa Bahurimu, akaayerera amo n’Abayuda gochia korotota omoruoti Daudi." 
2Samuel19:17 Simei nigo arenge amo nabanto elifu eyemo b’egesaku kia Benjamin. Na Siba, omosomba o Saulo, na abamura baye ikomi na batano, na abasomba baye emerongo ebere, bakaayerera gochia ase Yorodan, bagaikao omoruoti ataraika." 
2Samuel19:18 Barabwo bakaamboka orooche gochia kwambokia abanto b’enka y’omoruoti na gokora ande onsi omoruoti aganetie. Ekero omoruoti abeire ang’e kwamboka Yorodan, Simei, mosinto o Gera, agatung’ama inse ase obosio bwaye," 
2Samuel19:19 akamotebia, “Omonene one, tombarera obobe, gose toinyora aria nagokorerete ase rituko riria kwaruete Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel19:20 Inche, omosomba oo, namanyire ng’a nakorete ebibe ekero keria, ayio naro agera naba oyo bwe ritang’ani korwa ase enyomba ya Yusufu gocha gokorotota aye omoruoti aiga rero.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Abisai, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, akabora, “Inee! Simei tagoitwa akwe, ekiagera amoragereretie omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Korende Daudi akamotebia, “Ninki inde nainwe, abana b’omokungu Seruya? Nigo moganetie koba mamincha yane. Bono ninche inde omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, na onde tari ase Abaisraeli oraitwe rero.”" 
2Samuel19:23 Na omoruoti agatebia Simei, “Togoitwa.” Naende agatiana ase ayio." 
2Samuel19:24 Erio Mefiboseti, omochokoro o Saulo, agatirimboka gochia korotota omoruoti. Korwa ekero keria omoruoti aruete Yerusalemu, Mefiboseti konya tana gwesibia amagoro aye, gose konacha chinderu, gose gosibia chianga chiaye, goika rituko riria omoruoti airanete nomorembe." 
2Samuel19:25 Ekero Mefiboseti achete korwa Yerusalemu gochia korotota omoruoti, omoruoti akamoboria, “Mefiboseti, naki otagendete amo nainche?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Mefiboseti akamoiraneria, “Omonene one, nomanyete ng’a nekerema inde. Nigo natebetie omosomba one, ng’a abekere etigere yane egeikaransero, nainche ndiine ngende nomoruoti, korende ere akang’aina." 
2Samuel19:27 Boigo agantebera oborimo asore aye omonene one, korende aye igo onga buna omomalaika o Nyasae: gaki kora aya oroche arabe amaya." 
2Samuel19:28 Abaamate ba tata bonsi pi nigo barenge asore buna abagwenerete gokwa, korende okambeka inche, omosomba oo, ase egati y’abwo bakoragera mwao. Bono aye omoruoti, mboronge ki kobua ayio ngokoboria na korera asore?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Omoruoti akamoiraneria, “Naki okona‐komenta gokwana amang’ana ayio ao? Inche natebire ng’a aye na Siba mwatanane amaremo a Saulo.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboseti akamoiraneria, “Omoruoti, tiga Siba ayaire onsi, inche naisanekire ng’a aye, omonene one, kwairanire inka buya.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Bono Barisilai Omogileadi nere konya ochire korwa Rogelimu gokooba omoruoti gochia Yorodan amboke amo nere. 
2Samuel19:32 Barisilai nigo arenge omogotu mono, konya okoorire emiaka emerongo etano na etato. Ere nigo arenge omonda mono, akaba okorageria omoruoti ekero ere arenge agwo Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel19:33 Omoruoti agatebia Barisilai, “Inchuo ogende amo nainche, nimbe ngokorageria aaria Yerusalemu.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Korende Barisilai akamoiraneria, “Emiaka yane nerenga etigarete ngochia koba moyo, ng’a ngende amo naye Yerusalemu komenyao?" 
2Samuel19:35 Nakoorire emiaka emerongo etano na etato, Inee, ninyare gwatanana ayare ay’okogokia na ayatari ay’okogokia? Ninyare koigwa obwansu bw’eki nkoria na eki nkonywa? Ninyare koigwa na kogokera eriogi ri’abateri, abasacha gose abakungu? Nase ki inche, omosomba oo, ngochia gokoraarereria aye, omonene one, omoruoti?" 
2Samuel19:36 Ninki rende aye omoruoti ogochia konduera eng’eria buna eyio. Tiga inche, omosomba oo, nyamboke Yorodan oka." 
2Samuel19:37 Nagosabire ontige inche, omosomba oo, ing’irane, erinde nkwere ase omochie one, ang’e nembeera ya tata na baba. Korende omosomba oo Kimuhamu, nao are aa, tiga amboke amo naye, omonene one, na omokorere aya orarore are amaya.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Omoruoti akamoiraneria, “Kimuhamu nagende amo nainche, nimokorere kende gionsi aye oraganie. Na ande onsi oramborie ningokorere aye.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Erio abanto bonsi bakaamboka Yorodan, omoruoti nere akaamboka; erio omoruoti akanyunyunta Barisilai na komosesenia, ere akairana gochia inka bwoye." 
2Samuel19:40 Omoruoti akagenda agaika Giligali na Kimuhamu akagenda amo nere. Abayuda bonsi, na abanto ekeng’ese ki’Abaisraeli nabarabwo bakagenda amo nere." 
2Samuel19:41 Erio Abaisraeli bonsi bagachiera omoruoti, bakamoboria, “Nase ki Abayuda baminto bakoibete aye na eamate yao, na abanto bao bonsi, na kobaambokia Yorodan?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Abayuda bonsi bakairaneria Abaisraeli, “Nigo twakorete igo, ekiagera omoruoti nigo are bw’eamate yaito. Nase ki rende mokobeea ase amang’ana ayio? Inee! Twarire gento kende ki’omoruoti? Gose otoeire keegwa kende?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Abaisraeli bakairaneria Abayuda, bakabora, “Omoruoti noyoito ara ikomi kobua buna are oyoino. Ase ayio, oyio Daudi noyoito bori. Nase ki mogotochaya? Inee! Titwarenge abe ritang’ani gokwana igoro y’okoirania omoruoti oito.” Korende amang’ana ’Abayuda nigo arenge amakong’u kobua ay’Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel20:1 Ekaba ng’a narenge agwo Giligali omonto omoomboganu, ore korokwa Seba, mosinto o Bikiri bw’egesaku kia Benjamin. Ere akabugia egetureri, akabora, “Ngetari ki tobwate ase Daudi? Titori nomwando na mosinto o Yese! Inwe Abaisraeli, genda kera omonto bwoye!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Ase igo Abaisraeli bonsi bagatiga Daudi, bakabwatia Seba, mosinto o Bikiri; korende Abayuda bakabwatia omoruoti obo korwa Yorodan goika Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Ekero Daudi aigete inka bwoye agwo Yerusalemu, akaira abakungu baye ikomi ba sere‐sere, abwo atigete bakorenda enyomba, akababeka aase baranyare korendwa, akaba okobarageria, korende tachiete koba nabarabwo. Barabwo bakaba basiekeire aase agwo ase amatuko onsi barenge moyo, bakaba bakomenya buna ababoraka." 
2Samuel20:4 Omoruoti agatebia Amasa, “Rangeria Abayuda bache asende ekero amatuko atato ataraera; naye obe aiga ase engaki eyio.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Amasa akagenda kobarangeria, korende agateba na, tairana ase engaki eria omoruoti, amobekerete." 
2Samuel20:6 Daudi agatebia Abisai, “Bono Seba, mosinto o Bikiri, nigo agochia gotorentera emechando kobua eria Abisalomu atorenterete. Ira abasomba baane momobwatie, erinde tabaisa kwenyorera emechie ye chindwaki na gotokora bobe mono kobua.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Erio abanto ba Yoabu, na Abakereti, na Abapeleti, ne chituoni chionsi, bagatunyana Abisai, bakarua Yerusalemu bakabwatia Seba, mosinto o Bikiri, bachie komobwata." 
2Samuel20:8 Ekero baigete ase rigena rinene agwo Gibeoni, Amasa agachia kobarotota. Yoabu nigo abegete chianga chiaye chi’esegi, na nigo eboeranetie omoyio o birende ase orokini. Ekero are gocha, omoyio oria okagwa inse." 
2Samuel20:9 Yoabu agakwania Amasa, “Mbuya ore oyominto?” Erio akamobwata chinderu nokoboko gw’okorio buna nigo arigetie komonyunyunta." 
2Samuel20:10 Amasa teritete korwa ase omoyio oria Yoabu abwate koboko kwaye. Ase igo Yoabu akamobeta omoyio oria enda, na amara akagwa inse. Erio agwo Amasa agakwa, na Yoabu tamoaka eria kabere. Nyuma y’ayio Yoabu na Abisai, momura omwabo, bakabwatia Seba, mosinto o Bikiri, gochia komoita." 
2Samuel20:11 Oyomo bw’abasomba ba Yoabu agatenena ang’e nomobere bw’Amasa akabora, “Oyo omwanchete Yoabu na oyore o Daudi, tiga atunyane Yoabu.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Na Amasa igo arenge kogara‐gara ase amanyinga, gati‐gati y’enchera enene. Ekero omosomba oria aroche ng’a abanto bonsi batenenire, akaimokia omobere bw’Amasa korwa inchera, akayoruta mogondo ime, akayobisia egetambaa." 
2Samuel20:13 Ekero arusetigwe inchera, abanto bonsi bagaeta, bagatunyana Yoabu, erinde babwatie Seba, mosinto o Bikiri, gochia komoita." 
2Samuel20:14 Seba agaeta egati ye chingongo chi’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, agaika omochie o Abeli Beti‐Maaka, na Ababeri bonsi bagasangererekana amo, bakamotunyana." 
2Samuel20:15 Abanto bonsi abarenge na Yoabu bagacha Abeli Beti‐Maaka, bakamonaaria, bakaagacha eburi bosio bw’omochie kororia orwaki, na abanto bagachaka gotagora orwaki ng’a baroiyerie inse." 
2Samuel20:16 Erio omokungu gete omong’aini akarangeria korwa ase orwaki rw’omochie, agateba, “Tegerera, tegerera! Tebia Yoabu ache aiga ang’e, nkwane nere.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Yoabu agasuka gochia ang’e asare, na omokungu oria akamoboria, “Naye Yoabu?” Akairaneria, “Ee, ninche.” Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Tegerera amang’ana aane, inche omosomba oo omokungu.” Yoabu akairaneria, “Nintegererete.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Erio omokungu oria akamotebia, “Agwo kare abanto nigo banarete goteba: Genda Abeli, omochie oyio, erinde onyore ogosemigwa; ayio naro arenge gokoora amang’ana abo." 
2Samuel20:19 Intwe nigo tore abanto b’omorembe na abegenwa ase Abaisraeli. Inee! Aye nigo origetie gosiria omochie oyo ore ng’ina ase egati y’Abaisraeli? Nase ki oganetie gosaria omwando bw’Omonene?” 
2Samuel20:20 Yoabu akamoiraneria, “Ayio tiga abe are nainche; timbaisa gosaria omochie na koyosiria." 
2Samuel20:21 Oyio tari oro omoroberio oito, korende omonto oyomo bw’ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, Seba, mosinto o Bikiri, oimokire koba mamincha y’omoruoti Daudi. Mosokie, nainche indue aa ase omochie oyo!” Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Rigereria, noruterwe omotwe oye ase orwaki igoro.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Erio omokungu oria akaebereria abanto bonsi ase chisemi, na barabwo bakabutora Seba, mosinto o Bikiri, omotwe, bakayoruta gochia isiko ase Yoabu. Erio Yoabu akabugia egetureri, na abanto bonsi bagaserebekana; kera omonto akagenda bwoye. Na Yoabu akairana Yerusalemu ase omoruoti." 
2Samuel20:23 Yoabu nigo arenge omochiki bw’abarwani bonsi b’esegi ase Abaisraeli, na Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, nere igo arenge igoro y’Abakereti na Abapeleti." 
2Samuel20:24 Adorama nigo abegetwe koba omoteneneri bw’emeremo ende yonsi. Yehosafati mosinto bw’Ahiludi, nigo arenge omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka." 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva nomoriki orenge, na Zadoki na Abiatari nabakuani barenge." 
2Samuel20:26 Amo nayio Ira Omoyairi nigo arenge omokuani ase Daudi. 
2Samuel21:1 Ase engaki y’obogambi bwa Daudi enchara nigo yarenge koba omwaka ase omwaka, ase engaki y’emiaka etato, na Daudi akaboria Omonene igoro y’ayio. Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ayio igo agokoreka ase engencho ya Saulo na enyomba yaye, ekiagera baiterete amanyinga ’abanto; ere naitete Abagibeoni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Daudi akarangeria Abagibeoni. (Barabwo tibarenge Abaisraeli; nigo barenge ekeombe giatigarete korwa ase Abaamori, na Abaisraeli konya babariereire eira ng’a babatige babe moyo, korende Saulo akarigia kobaita ase omokia oye, ase engencho y’Abaisraeli na Abayuda.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Daudi akaboria Abagibeoni, “Ninki nkobakorera? Nindigetie gokora okobwatanigwa ase engencho y’obobe mwakoreretwe, erinde mosesenie abanto b’Omonene.”" 
2Samuel21:4 Abagibeoni bakamoiraneria, “Titorigeti chifeta gose chitahabu korwa ase Saulo, gose korwa ase eamate yaye; intwe titorigeti goita omonto onde bwensi ase Abaisraeli.” Daudi akababoria, “Ninki rende nkobakorera?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Barabwo bakairaneria omoruoti, “Omonto oria akarigia gotosiria kegima ng’a titomenya ase Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel21:6 Ase ayio, tiga toegwe abamura batano na babere b’ororeria rwaye, erinde tobasunge ase obosio bw’Omonene aiga Gibea aase Saulo, omochore bw’Omonene, amenyete.” Omoruoti akabairaneria, “Nimbarue.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Omoruoti agatiga Mefiboseti, mosinto o Yonathani o Saulo, ase engencho y’eira Daudi na Yonathani barierereranete ase Omonene," 
2Samuel21:8 korende akairera Arimoni na Mefiboseti, abana abamura babere abwo Risipa, omosubati o Aya aiborerete Saulo. Naende akairera abamura batano, aba Mikali, omosubati o Saulo, aiborerete Adirieli, mosinto o Barisilai Omomehola." 
2Samuel21:9 Akababeka ase amaboko ’Abagibeoni, na barabwo bakabasunga ase egetunwa igoro, ase obosio bw’Omonene. Bonsi batano na babere bagaiterwa amo. Bagaitwa ase amatuko amatang’ani e rigesa, ekero bachakire kogesa endagera ekorokwa esairi." 
2Samuel21:10 Erio Risipa, mosubati o Aya, akaira chianga chie chigunia agachiaara ase egetare keria, akabeerao korwa omochakano bwe rigesa goika embura ekorwa igoro egachaka gotwera emebere y’abwo basungetwe, gose tatigete chinyoni chigwe ase emebere eyio mobaso, gose ching’iti chi’orosana chichicheo botuko." 
2Samuel21:11 Ekero Daudi atebetigwe ayio Risipa, mosubati o Aya, omokungu o sere‐sere o Saulo akorete," 
2Samuel21:12 akagenda akoyia amauga a Saulo na aya Yonathani, momura o Saulo, korwa ase abanto ba Yabesi o Gileadi. (Abanto abwo konya baibire emebere eyio korwa ase ekeooreri agwo Bati‐Sani aase Abafilisti babasungete, aase rituko riria baitete Saulo aaria Giliboa.)" 
2Samuel21:13 Daudi akarenta amauga a Saulo na aya Yonathani, momura o Saulo; boigo agasangereria amauga ’abanto baria batano na babere konya batongirwe." 
2Samuel21:14 Erio bagatindeka amauga a Saulo na aya Yonathani, omwana oye, ase ense ya Benjamin, aaria Zela, ase embeera ya Kisi ise. Barabwo bagakora onsi aya omoruoti achigete. Nyuma y’ayio Nyasae akaigwa aya basaberete ense eria." 
2Samuel21:15 Esegi ekaba naende ase egati y’Abafilisti na Abaisraeli, na Daudi agatirimboka amo nabarwani baye korwania Abafilisti. Daudi akaba orosire," 
2Samuel21:16 na Isi‐Benobu, oyomo bw’amamonto, nabwate ritimo riare noborito bwe chikiro isato na ekeng’ese, naende nabwate omoro omoyia; ere akarigia goita Daudi." 
2Samuel21:17 Korende Abisai, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, akamotooria, agaita Omofilisti oria. Erio abanto ba Daudi bagakania Daudi na gotiana ng’a, “Aye bono togosoka na kogenda ase esegi amo naintwe; aye nigo ore etaya y’Abaisraeli, toyerimia.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Nyuma y’ayio esegi yarenge n’Abafilisti aria Gobu, na Sibekai Omohusa agaita Safu, oyomo bw’amamonto." 
2Samuel21:19 Esegi ende yarenge n’Abafilisti agwo Gobu. Elihanani, mosinto o Yaare‐Oregimu korwa Bethlehemu, agaita Goliato korwa Gati. Orotanga rwe ritimo ria Goliato nigo rwarenge buna omwaro omonene." 
2Samuel21:20 Naende esegi yarenge Gati. Omonto omotambe narengeo. Nigo arenge nebiara bitano na ekemo ase kera okoboko, na bitano na ekemo ase kera okogoro; bionsi nigo biarenge emerongo ebere na bine. Ere boigo noyomo bw’amamonto orenge." 
2Samuel21:21 Ere akarama Abaisraeli, na Yonathani, momura o Simea omwabo Daudi, akamoita." 
2Samuel21:22 Abanto abwo bane nigo barenge ab’ororeria rw’amamonto korwa Gati. Barabwo nigo baitetwe na Daudi na abanto baye. 
2Samuel22:1 Oko nogotera Daudi atererete Omonene, ekero Omonene amotooretie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baye na aya Saulo." 
2Samuel22:2 Agateba: “Omonene nere egetare kiane na eburi yane enkong’u; nere Omotooria one. 
2Samuel22:3 Nyasae one nere egetare kiane, asare nao nyebisete, ere nenguba yane enkengerete, na orogunchara rwane rwandeterete ogotooreka, naende nere eburi yane enkong’u, na obotamero bwane. Ere n’Omotooria one, oyogontooria korwa ase obotindi." 
2Samuel22:4 Nindangerie Omonene, oyo ogwenerete gotogigwa, nigo arantoorie korwa ase ababisa baane.”" 
2Samuel22:5 “Emerindo y’amakweri konya yang’etananire, chiooro chi’obobe chikandetera obwoba." 
2Samuel22:6 Obobe bw’amakweri nigo bwang’etananete, emeeto y’amakweri egantega na kombwata." 
2Samuel22:7 Ase emechando yane nkarangeria Omonene; nkarera ase Nyasae one. Korwa ase Hekalu yaye akaigwa eriogi riane, ekerero kiane gekamoikera, ere agakeigwa.”" 
2Samuel22:8 “Erio ense ekanyegerigwa na koondoka, amaroso a igoro agatengechigwa. Ee, ense ekaiguswa, ekiagera Omonene arenge nendamwamu." 
2Samuel22:9 Erioki rigasoka korwa ase chimioro chiaye, na omorero ogosamba korwa ase omonwa oye: ee, omorero bw’amakara ogasoka korwa asare." 
2Samuel22:10 Akang’usa igoro gocha inse aa, nere agacha, riire rimwamu rikaba inse y’amagoro aye." 
2Samuel22:11 Akariina omokerubi, akairuruka; akarorekana igoro ye chimbaba chi’embeo." 
2Samuel22:12 Agetuba ere omonyene nomosunte, na amare amarito aichire amache." 
2Samuel22:13 Korwa ase obomeka‐meku obwo bwarenge bosio bwaye okomesa gokaruta ebibemberi bi’omorero.” 
2Samuel22:14 “Omonene agaaka enkoba korwa igoro, na eriogi ri’Oyore Igoro Mono rikaigugwa." 
2Samuel22:15 Akaruta emegwe, agaserebania ababisa baye, akabaaka nokomesa." 
2Samuel22:16 Erio ebiambokero bi’enyancha bikarorekana, na oboroso bw’ense bokaorokigwa aarabu, ekero Omonene abatogonyerete ase okwoga kw’omoika bwe chimioro chiaye.”" 
2Samuel22:17 “Omonene akarambora okoboko kwaye korwa igoro, akambwata, akandusia ase amache amange." 
2Samuel22:18 Agantooria korwa ase ababisa baane bare ne chinguru, na korwa ase abwo bangechete; barabwo nigo barenge ne chinguru kombua." 
2Samuel22:19 Ekero narenge nemechando bakandwania, korende Omonene akaba egekengero kiane." 
2Samuel22:20 Akang’ira aase arenge aagare, agantooria, ekiagera namogogetie.”" 
2Samuel22:21 “Omonene nigo ang’ete eng’eria y’obuya, ekiagera inde omoronge; nigo ansesenetie, ekiagera inde namaboko atari na komocha." 
2Samuel22:22 Inche nabeire nkobwatia chinchera chi’Omonene, tintigeti Nyasae one ase ogokora amabe." 
2Samuel22:23 Nabeire nkorenda amachiko aye onsi, na timbeti ngotiga emeroberio yaye echikire." 
2Samuel22:24 Nigo narenge omoikeranu asare, nkerenda korwa ase obobe." 
2Samuel22:25 Omonene ong’akanire, ekiagera ngokora ayare boronge, na ekiagera aroche ng’a nomochenu inde." 
2Samuel22:26 Aye Omonene nigo ore omwegenwa ase abwo bare abegenwa; nigo okweorokia ng’a nomoikeranu ore ase abwo bare abaikeranu. 
2Samuel22:27 Aye nigo ore omochenu ase abwo bare abachenu, nigo okwanga abwo bare abakorekanu." 
2Samuel22:28 Aye nigo ogotooria abanto bare abaitongo, korende amaiso ao nigo arigereretie abare abaenenu ase okobairania inse.”" 
2Samuel22:29 “Aye Omonene nigo ore etaya yane; Omonene one, nigo okoonchora omosunte one oba omobaso." 
2Samuel22:30 Konde amo naye, nigo ndasirie omoganda bw’esegi, na ekero inde na Nyasae one nincharoke chindwaki igoro.”" 
2Samuel22:31 “Enchera ya Nyasae neng’ikeranu; amang’ana aye ateemirwe na gotenena. Ere nenguba ase bonsi abakomotamera. 
2Samuel22:32 Inee! Ning’o ore Nyasae, otatiga Omonene? Ning’o ore egetare, otatiga Nyasae oito?" 
2Samuel22:33 Nyasae nere eburi yane ye chinguru, nigo akoraa omonto omoronge ase enchera agoeta." 
2Samuel22:34 Ere okorire amagoro aane abeire buna ay’egesia, onkong’irie na gontenenia ase ebitunwa." 
2Samuel22:35 Ere bworokereirie amaboko aane korwana esegi, erinde amaboko aane anyare gokumba obota bw’etaai.”" 
2Samuel22:36 “Aye kwang’eire enguba yao ase ogontooria, na ogokonywa kwao gwankorire nabeire omonene." 
2Samuel22:37 Kwang’eire aase aagare ngotaara, na amagoro aane tagotererigwa." 
2Samuel22:38 Nkabwatia ababisa baane, nkabasiria, gose tinairanete goika nkabakoora." 
2Samuel22:39 Nkabaaka inse nkabasenyenta, tibanyara koimoka, bakagwa inse y’amagoro aane, bakabugwa." 
2Samuel22:40 Aye nigo kwambegete chinguru chi’okorwana esegi; okabeka ababisa baane inse y’amagoro aane. 
2Samuel22:41 Ogaseria ababisa baane bagatama korwa asende, abangechete nkabasiria kegima." 
2Samuel22:42 Barabwo bakarigereria, korende onde tarenge obatooretie; bakarangeria Omonene, korende ere tabaigwa." 
2Samuel22:43 Nkabasunyunta bakaba ebuse ye riroba, nkabamionogora na kobatiringa buna esike ere ase chinchera.”" 
2Samuel22:44 “Aye gwantooririe korwa ase okoamererania nabanto baane, kwandendire nabeire omogambi bw’abanto b’ebisaku; abanto ntamanyete, bono babeire abasomba baane." 
2Samuel22:45 Abamenyi nigo bebegete inse yane, na ekero baigure chinkuma chiane, banyigwera." 
2Samuel22:46 Abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao berusirie moyo, kobagosoka korwa ase chiburi chiabo, nigo bakoiguswa.”" 
2Samuel22:47 “Omonene nigo are moyo! Ere oyore egetare kiane atogigwe! Nyasae, egetare ki’ogotooreka kwane, aimokererigwe igoro." 
2Samuel22:48 Nyasae nigo akonduseria egesiomba, nabeke abanto b’ebisaku inse yane." 
2Samuel22:49 Ere nigo antooretie korwa ase ababisa baane, akanyimokereria igoro ase abare mamincha yane, naende agantooria korwa ase abanto abatindi.”" 
2Samuel22:50 “Aye Omonene, ase ayio ningotogie ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, ninterere erieta riao ase okoritogia." 
2Samuel22:51 Nyasae ong’eire inche, omoruoti oye, obobui obonene, oorokirie obwanchani botari koera asende, inche omoakwa amaguta oye, inche Daudi, na ororeria rwane, goika kare na kare.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Aya naro amang’ana ’omoerio a Daudi, mosinto o Yese, omonto oyo oimokereretigwe igoro, omoakwa amaguta o Nyasae o Yakobo, omoteri bw’amatera agwansa ase Abaisraeli:" 
2Samuel23:2 “Omoika bw’Omonene ogokwana goetera asende, ring’ana riaye nigo rire ase omonwa one." 
2Samuel23:3 Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli okwanire, ere oyore egetare ki’Abaisraeli ontebirie: Oyo okogambera abanto ase oboronge, oyo okogambera ase okoiroka Nyasae," 
2Samuel23:4 nigo anga buna omobaso o mambia asebare, buna erioba rikobara emambia etari namare. Nigo anga buna obonyansi bogokina nyuma embura koyature.”" 
2Samuel23:5 “Inee! Ororeria rwane tirori boronge ase Nyasae? Takorete nainche okobwatana gwa kare na kare, okwo korobeirie gotari koonchoka? Inee! Nyasae tagonsesenia na gontooria, naende ang’e aya nganetie?" 
2Samuel23:6 Korende abanto ababe nigo bare buna amagwa atugutire, atari gokunwa namaboko." 
2Samuel23:7 Omonto takoyakuna otatiga abe obwate ebioma na orotanga rwe ritimo, barabwo nabasambwe nomorero aroro agwo.”" 
2Samuel23:8 Aya naro amarieta ’abarwani chituoni Daudi abwate: Yosebe‐Basebeti korwa Takemoni. Ere nigo arenge omonene bw’Abwo Batato, chituoni chi’abarwani. Ere agaita abanto amagana atano na atato ase engaki eyemo, ase okona‐kong’wana‐ng’wania ne ritimo riaye." 
2Samuel23:9 Na oyo o kabere bw’Abwo Batato n’Eleazari, mosinto o Dodai bw’eamate y’Ahohi. Ere nigo arenge na Daudi ekero baramete Abafilisti aase basangererekanete amo barwane esegi, na Abaisraeli bakairana nyuma." 
2Samuel23:10 Korende ere agatenena, agaita Abafilisti goika okoboko kwaye gokarosa gokananterera ase omoro. Omonene akabanyorera obobui obonene mono ase rituko riria. Erio abanto bakairana bagatunyana Eleazari, bagasakora ebisakorwa." 
2Samuel23:11 Na oyo o gatato ase abwo nere Sama, mosinto bw’Agee korwa Harari. Abafilisti konya basangererekanire agwo, Lehi, ase omogondo orenge oichire ne ching’ende chi’egatani. Abaisraeli bagatama korwa ase Abafilisti," 
2Samuel23:12 korende Sama agatenena ase omogondo gati, akayorwanerera, agaita Abafilisti, na Omonene akarenta obobui obonene mono." 
2Samuel23:13 Rituko erimo, ekero kie rigesa, abanto batato ase abwo abanene emerongo etato bakagenda ase Daudi maate ase rikuruma ri’Adulamu, na Abafilisti konya batoorire ase ense omweya y’Abarefai." 
2Samuel23:14 Ase engaki eyio Daudi nigo arenge ase eburi ime, na abarwani b’Abafilisti nigo barenge agwo Bethlehemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Daudi akaba okogania amache anywe, akabora, “Ntare konyora omonto andetere amache inywe korwa ase ensoko eyio ere ase egeita kia Bethlehemu!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Erio abanto baria batato bakabinya‐binyia egati y’Abafilisti aase batoorete, bakabuucha amache korwa ase ensoko eria yarenge ase egeita kia Bethlehemu, bakayairera Daudi. Korende Daudi tayanywa, otatiga ayaiterete koba ekeng’wanso gi’ekenyugwa ase Omonene," 
2Samuel23:17 akabora, “Omonene antange tinkora bo. Inee! Inywe amanyinga ’abanto bataegerete obogima bwabo?” Ase ayio akaanga, tayanywa. Ayio naro abanto Abwo Batato chituoni bakorete." 
2Samuel23:18 Abisai, momura omwabo Yoabu bw’omokungu Seruya ere nigo amanyekanete ase Baria Batato; akarwania abanto amagana atato, akababeta ne ritimo riaye, akabaita, akaba nerieta rinene ase Baria Batato." 
2Samuel23:19 Ase Baria Batato ere nigo abwate ogosikwa okuya goetania abande, akaba omoraai obo, korende tareng’anetie na Baria Batato be ritang’ani." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, nigo arenge omonto etuoni korwa Kabuseli. Ere agakora emeremo emenene, agaita abanto babere chituoni b’Abamoabu. Engaki ende, ekero ki’obokendu, na amagena ’embura yatwete, agasoa engoro agaita endo aroro." 
2Samuel23:21 Boigo agaita Omomisiri orenge omonene obwate ritimo. Akamochiera nenyimbo, akamoura ritimo riare koboko kwaye, akamoitera neritimo riria riaye omonyene." 
2Samuel23:22 Amang’ana aya naro Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, akorete; nere akaba nerieta rinene buna abanto Baria Batato chituoni." 
2Samuel23:23 Akanyora ogosikwa okuya ase egati ya baria emerongo etato, korende tareng’anetie na Baria Batato be ritang’ani. Daudi akamobeka akaba omorendi bw’obogima bwaye." 
2Samuel23:24 Abande ba baria emerongo etato nabwo aba: Asaeli, momura omwabo Yoabu, na Elihanani, mosinto o Dodo korwa Bethlehemu;" 
2Samuel23:25 Sama na Elika korwa Harodi; 
2Samuel23:26 Helesi korwa Peleti, na Ira, mosinto o Ikesi, korwa Tekoa;" 
2Samuel23:27 Abieseri korwa Anatoti, na Mebunai korwa Husa;" 
2Samuel23:28 Salimoni korwa Ahohi, na Maharai korwa Netofa;" 
2Samuel23:29 Helebu, mosinto o Baana, korwa Netofa, na Itai, mosinto o Ribai, korwa Gibea, bw’egesaku kia Benjamin." 
2Samuel23:30 Benaya korwa Piratoni, na Hidai korwa ase amagoko ang’e na Gaasi;" 
2Samuel23:31 Abi‐Aliboni korwa Araba na Asimaweti korwa Bahurimu; 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba korwa Saalaboni, na basinto ba Yaseni, na Yonathani;" 
2Samuel23:33 Sama korwa Harari na Ahiamu, mosinto o Sharari, korwa Harari;" 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti, mosinto bw’Ahasibai, omonto korwa Maaka; Eliamu, mosinto bw’Ahitofeli, korwa Gilo;" 
2Samuel23:35 Hesiro korwa Karimeli na Paarai korwa Ariba; 
2Samuel23:36 Igali, mosinto o Nathani, korwa Soba na Bani korwa Gadi;" 
2Samuel23:37 Seleki korwa Amoni na Naharai korwa Beroti, omobogoria ebirwanero bia Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya;" 
2Samuel23:38 Ira na Garebu korwa Itiri; 
2Samuel23:39 na Uria Omohiti. Bonsi nigo barenge emerongo etato, na batano na babere." 
2Samuel24:1 Naende Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene igoro y’Abaisraeli, agasukia enkoro ya Daudi akamotebia, “Genda obare Abaisraeli na Abayuda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Ase igo omoruoti agatebia Yoabu, omotang’ani bw’emeganda yaye y’abarwani, “Bono etanana ase egati y’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, korwa Dani goika Beeri‐Seba, mobare abanto, erinde imanye omobaro obo.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Korende Yoabu akairaneria omoruoti, “Omonene, Nyasae oo, amente abanto ara amagana atakobareka, na aye omonene one omoruoti obe moyo goika oyarore. Korende naki ring’ana eri riakogwenera aye omonene one omoruoti?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Korende ring’ana ri’omoruoti rikaba ne chinguru igoro ya Yoabu na abatang’ani b’abarwani. Ase igo Yoabu na abatang’ani bande bakarua ase omoruoti, bakagenda kobara Abaisraeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Barabwo bakaamboka Yorodan, bagatoora Aroeri, na korwa ase omochie oyio agwo ase egati ye rikura bakagenda Gadi, naende gochia Yeseri," 
2Samuel24:6 Erio bakagenda Gileadi na ase ense ya Tatimu‐Hodisi. Naende bakagenda Dani, na korwa Dani bagaetanana bagaika Sidoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Bakagenda Turo, omochie ore ne chindwaki, na ase emechie yonsi y’Abahivi, na ey’Abakanani. Nyuma y’ayio bakagenda Beeri‐Seba ase ense y’Abayuda, ensemo ya sugusu." 
2Samuel24:8 Nyuma y’emetienyi kianda na amatuko emerongo ebere, ekero baetananire ense yonsi, bakairana Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel24:9 Yoabu akaa omoruoti omobaro bw’abanto abaare konyara korwana esegi nemioro. Ase Abaisraeli nigo barenge abanto chilifu amagana atano na atato (800,000), na ase Abayuda chilifu amagana atano (500,000)." 
2Samuel24:10 Ekero Daudi akoorire kobara abanto, enkoro yaye ekamogambia. Erio agatebia Omonene, “Nakorire ebibe ebinene ase aya nakorire; korende bono Omonene, nagosabire onyabere inche omosomba oo, naki nigo nakorire egento ki’oboriri mono.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Ekero Daudi abogete mambia, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigachera Gadi, omobani, oyorenge omorori o Daudi, rikamotebia," 
2Samuel24:12 “Genda okwane na Daudi, omotebie ng’a inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Nabekire asore amang’ana atato; ase ayio chora erimo, eri ndagokorere.”" 
2Samuel24:13 Erio Gadi akagenda ase Daudi, akamomanyia amang’ana ayio, akamotebia, “Nigo origetie enchara eche ase ense yao emiaka etato? Gose nigo origetie otame korwa ase ababisa bao emetienyi etato? Gose nigo origetie oborwaire obobe bw’ogoita abanto bosoe ense yao amatuko atato? Bono rengereria mono na ong’e amairanerio imoirere oyio ontomete.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Daudi akairaneria Gadi, “Inche nasoire ase emechando emenene. Gaki, bono, tiga togwe ase okoboko kw’Omonene, ekiagera amabera aye namanene; korende ase amaboko a mwanyabanto tintageti ingweo.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Erio Omonene akarentera Abaisraeli oborwaire obobe, na borobwo bogaita abanto korwa mambia goika engaki yaragetwe; abanto chilifu emerongo etano na ebere (70,000) bagakwa korwa Dani goika Beeri‐Seba." 
2Samuel24:16 Ekero omomalaika aramborete okoboko kwaye asirie Yerusalemu, Omonene akaonchora ebirengererio biaye ase amabe ayio, agatebia omomalaika oria orenge gosiria abanto, “Bono aisanire, ororobia okoboko kwao.” Omomalaika konya oikire ang’e nekeooreri ki’Arauna Omoyebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Ekero Daudi aroche omomalaika oria orenge goita abanto, agatebia Omonene, “Rora, ninche inde omonyabibe, ninche nakorire obobe obo, korende ching’ondi echi chiane, inki chiakorete? Okoboko kwao tiga kobe igoro yane, na igoro y’enyomba ya tata.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Ase rituko erio Gadi akagenda ase Daudi, akamotebia, “Imoka oagachere Omonene egesasimero agwo ase ekeooreri ki’Arauna Omoyebusi.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Ase igo Daudi akaigwera amang’ana aya Omonene achigete goetera ase Gadi. 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna agachia korigereria akarora omoruoti na abasomba baye bagotiira gocha asare. Erio agasoka, agatung’ama inse, akaumama ase obosio bw’omoruoti." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna akamoboria, “Omonene one, naki gwachire aa asende inche omosomba oo?” Daudi akamoiraneria, “Nigo nachire ngore ekeooreri kiao, ing’agachere Omonene egesasimero aiga, erinde amaakwa atangwe korwa ase abanto.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Erio Arauna akairaneria Daudi, “Omonene one omoruoti, ira eki oraganie ase ekeng’wanso. Rora chiombe echi ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na ebikorero ebi bi’okoora amo namakorogoto bibe chinko okogesambera.”" 
2Samuel24:23 Arauna akaa omoruoti ebinto ebio bionsi, akamotebia, “Tiga Omonene Nyasae oo agwanchere.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Korende omoruoti akairaneria Arauna, “Yaya taibo, korende nigo nkobigora korwa asore ase rigori bikoonigwa: tinkoruera Omonene Nyasae ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa nebinto ntagoreti ase rigori.” Igo Daudi akagora ekeooreri ekio amo ne chiombe ase chibesa, chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etano." 
2Samuel24:25 Na Daudi akaagachera Omonene egesasimero, akarua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na eki’omorembe. Ase ayio Omonene akaigwa ogosaba gw’ense eria, na amarwaire agatangwa korwa ase Abaisraeli." 
1Kings1:1 Bono omoruoti Daudi konya ogotire mono, okoorire emiaka emenge; nonya ore kobisigwa amarangeti amange, tarenge koigwa riberera." 
1Kings1:2 Ase igo abasomba baye bakamotebia, “Tiga aye omonene oito omoruoti origerigwe omoiseke omwekungi; ere abe ogokorenda na kogokorera. Boigo abe ogokorarisia, akobekere riberera.”" 
1Kings1:3 Ase ayio bakarigia ase ense yonsi y’Abaisraeli, banyore omoiseke omwekungi omonyakieni. Bakanyora Abisagi Omosunemu, bakamorenta ase omoruoti." 
1Kings1:4 Omoiseke oria nigo arenge omonyakieni mono: ere akaba omokoreri bw’omoruoti, korende omoruoti tamenyanete nere." 
1Kings1:5 Adonia, omwana omomura bwa Hagiti, moga Daudi, akeimokereria igoro omonyene, ogoteba, “Ninche ndabe omoruoti.” Akenyorera chigari na abanto abariini chibarasi, na abanto emerongo etano barabe bagotang’ana bosio bwaye." 
1Kings1:6 Ise konya tana komotogonyera nonya ng’ake ase okomoboria, “Nase ki gwakora aya na aya?” Boigo Adonia nigo arenge omonto omonyakieni; ere nigo aiboretwe nyuma Abisalomu kaiboirwe." 
1Kings1:7 Adonia agakwana na Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, na Abiatari omokuani; barabwo bagancherana komokonya." 
1Kings1:8 Korende Zadoki omokuani, na Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, na Nathani omobani, na Simei, na Rei, na abarwani chituoni ba Daudi, barabwo tibabwatanete n’Adonia." 
1Kings1:9 Adonia akanyenya ching’ondi, ne chiombe, ne chimori chinoru, chikaba ekeng’wanso agwo ang’e n’Egetare gie Ching’iti kere ase ensoko y’Eni‐Rogeli, akarangeria abamura bamwabo bonsi, abwo abamura b’omoruoti, na abanto bonsi abanene b’obogambi bwa Yuda." 
1Kings1:10 Korende tarangeretie Nathani omobani, gose Benaya, gose abanto baria barenge abarwani chituoni, gose Sulemani, momura omwabo." 
1Kings1:11 Nathani akagenda ase Batiseba, akamotebia, “Inee! Aye toraigwa ng’a Adonia, omwana o Hagiti, obeire omoruoti, na Daudi, omonene oito, taramanya amang’ana ayio?" 
1Kings1:12 Ase ayio, bono tiga ngosemie, erinde otoorie obogima bwao obonyene, na obw’omwana oo Sulemani." 
1Kings1:13 Bono genda, osoe ara rimo ase omoruoti Daudi, omoborie: Inee! Aye omonene one omoruoti, tikwandierete inche, omosomba oo, eira y’ogotiana, ogateba: Sulemani, omwana oo omomura, nere oragambe nyuma yane; ere naikaranse ase ekerogo kiane ki’oboruoti? Nase ki rende Adonia abeire omoruoti?" 
1Kings1:14 Bono nebe ekero aye ogendererete gokwana nomoruoti, nainche boigo ninsoe mbeke amang’ana ao chinguru ase okoenekia ng’a nekeene.”" 
1Kings1:15 Batiseba akagenda ase omoruoti, agasoa akanyomba k’omoruoti. (Bono omoruoti konya obeire omogotu mono, na Abisagi, Omosunemu, nere orenge omokoreri oye.)" 
1Kings1:16 Batiseba agatung’ama inse ase okoorokia amasikani ase omoruoti, na omoruoti akamoboria, “Ninki oganetie?”" 
1Kings1:17 Batiseba akamotebia, “Omonene one, nkwandierete inche, omosomba oo, eira y’ogotiana ase Omonene, Nyasae oo, ogateba: Sulemani, omwana oo omomura, nere oragambe nyuma yane, nere oraikaranse ase ekerogo kiane ki’oboruoti." 
1Kings1:18 Na bono rora, Adonia bweeire oboruoti, na aye omonene one omoruoti, tomanyeti amang’ana ayio." 
1Kings1:19 Okorire ekeng’wanso, onyenyire chiombe, ne chimori chinoru; ne ching’ondi, ase obonge; naende orangeirie abana abamura bonsi b’omoruoti, na Abiatari omokuani, na Yoabu, omochiki bw’abarwani b’esegi, korende tarangereti Sulemani, omosomba oo." 
1Kings1:20 Na bono, omonene one omoruoti, amaiso ’abanto bonsi b’Abaisraeli naye arigereretie, obatebie ng’a ning’o oraikaranse ase ekerogo kiao ki’oboruoti, aye omoruoti one, nyuma gokwarureo." 
1Kings1:21 Onye taibo, nebe ekero aye, omonene one omoruoti, gwakure na korarare ase chisokoro chiao chiararete, inche na omwana one Sulemani toche kobarwa koba abamochi abanene.”" 
1Kings1:22 Ekero omokungu oria agendererete gokwana nomoruoti, Nathani omobani agacha aroro agwo." 
1Kings1:23 Omoruoti agatebigwa, “Nathani omobani, oyo aiga.” Na ekero achete ase obosio bw’omoruoti, agatung’ama inse akaumama." 
1Kings1:24 Nathani agakwana, akamoboria, “Omonene one omoruoti, Inee, nabo gwatebete ng’a, Adonia nere oragambe nyuma yao, aikaranse ase ekerogo kiao ki’oboruoti?"
