1Kings1:25 Rero ere otirimbokire, onyenyire chiombe, ne chimori chinoru, ne ching’ondi, ase obonge, naende orangeirie abana abamura bonsi b’omoruoti, na abachiki b’abarwani esegi, na Abiatari omokuani; na rora, igo bakoria na konywa ase obosio bwaye bagoteba: Adonia omoruoti ochie kare!" 
1Kings1:26 Korende inche, omosomba oo, na Zadoki omokuani, na Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, na Sulemani, omosomba oo, intwe tatorangereti." 
1Kings1:27 Inee! Ring’ana eri igo riakorirwe, naye omonene one omoruoti toratotebia intwe abasomba bao ng’a ning’o oraikaranse ase ekerogo kiao abe omoruoti nyuma yao?”" 
1Kings1:28 Omoruoti Daudi akairaneria, “Rangeria Batiseba achiche asende.” Ase ayio Batiseba agacha ase obosio bw’omoruoti, agatenenao." 
1Kings1:29 Na omoruoti akaria eira y’ogotiana, agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, oria otooretie obogima bwane korwa ase emechando yonsi," 
1Kings1:30 buna nakorierete eira y’ogotiana ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ngateba: Sulemani omwana oo, nere oragambe nyuma yane, na rero boigo ngokoriera inde eira eyio eyio.”" 
1Kings1:31 Erio Batiseba agatung’ama inse, akaumama ase okoorokia amasikani ase omoruoti, agakwana, “Tiga aye omonene one, omoruoti Daudi, ochie kare!”" 
1Kings1:32 Omoruoti agateba, “Indangererie Zadoki omokuani, na Nathani omobani, na Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada.” Erio abanto abwo bagacha ase obosio bw’omoruoti." 
1Kings1:33 Ere akabatebia, “Imoka mogende nabasomba baane, moriinie Sulemani, omwana one, ase eyombo yane, erio momotirimbokie gochia Gihoni." 
1Kings1:34 Aroro agwo Zadoki omokuani na Nathani omobani bamoake amaguta ase okomwatanana abe omoruoti okogambera Abaisraeli. Erio mobugie ebitureri bi’omochengo, motebe: Sulemani omoruoti ochie kare!" 
1Kings1:35 Nyuma y’ayio momokoobe gocha aiga nka asende, nere aikaranse ase ekerogo kiane ki’oboruoti, ekiagera nere orabe omoruoti ase ribaga riane; nere nachorire agambere Abaisraeli na Abayuda.”" 
1Kings1:36 Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, akairaneria omoruoti, “Amina. Tiga Omonene, Nyasae bw’omonene one omoruoti, anchere ayio." 
1Kings1:37 Buna koreng’ana Omonene abeire amo naye, omonene one, naboigo abe amo na Sulemani, erio akore ekerogo kiaye ki’oboruoti kebe ekenene goetania ekerogo kiao aye omoruoti Daudi, omonene one.”" 
1Kings1:38 Ase ayio, Zadoki omokuani, na Nathani omobani, na Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, na Abakereti, na Abapeleti bagatirimboka, bakariinia Sulemani ase eyombo y’omoruoti, erio bakamoira Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Aroro agwo Zadoki omokuani akabogoria orogunchara rw’amaguta korwa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, agaaka Sulemani amaguta ayio ase okomwatanana. Erio bakabugia egetureri, na abanto bonsi bagateba, “Omoruoti Sulemani ochie kare!”" 
1Kings1:40 Abanto bonsi bagatiira bakamotunyana, bakobugia ebiroria, bakaba nomochengo omonene mono, goika riroba rigatitira ase amariogi abo." 
1Kings1:41 Adonia na abageni bonsi baria barenge amo nere, ekero bakoorire omoyega obo, bakaigwa amariogi aria. Na ekero Yoabu ayaigwete amo nebiroria, akaboria, “Ninki engencho y’amariogi aya amanene are ase omochie?”" 
1Kings1:42 Ekero agendererete gokwana, rora, Yonathani, mosinto bw’Abiatari omokuani, agacha agwo. Adonia akamotebia, “Inchuo aiga ime, ekiagera aye nomonto bw’amasikani ore, okorenta amang’ana amaya.”" 
1Kings1:43 Yonathani akairaneria Adonia, “Taibo, amang’ana tari amaya, ekiagera omonene oito, omoruoti Daudi, obekire Sulemani obeire omoruoti." 
1Kings1:44 Omoruoti otomire amo nere Zadoki omokuani, na Nathani omobani, na Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, na Abakereti, na Abapeleti, nabarabwo bariinirie Sulemani ase eyombo y’omoruoti." 
1Kings1:45 Zadoki omokuani na Nathani omobani bamoakire amaguta agwo Gihoni, nere obeire omoruoti. Barabwo batiirire korwa agwo, bagochenga, goika omochie bwonsi obeire namariogi amanene ay’omochengo; nayio naro kwaigure." 
1Kings1:46 Sulemani nere oikaransire ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti. 
1Kings1:47 Nonya naboigo, abasomba b’omoruoti nigo bacha kogokera omonene oito, omoruoti Daudi, bagoteba: Nyasae oo akore erieta ria Sulemani rimanyekane mono kobua eriao, naende akore ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Sulemani kebue ekiao. Ere omoruoti nigo asasimete kare borere bwaye," 
1Kings1:48 agateba: Atogigwe Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oyo oeire oyomo ase oroiboro rwane ribaga goikaransa ase ekerogo kiane ki’oboruoti rituko ria rero, nainche neroreire ayio namaiso aane.”" 
1Kings1:49 Erio abageni bonsi b’Adonia bakaiguswa ase omoondoko, bakaimoka, na kera omonto akagenda enchera yaye." 
1Kings1:50 Adonia akoboa Sulemani mono, akaimoka, akagenda kobwata emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero." 
1Kings1:51 Sulemani agatebigwa ng’a Adonia omoirokire na obwatire emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero, ogoteba: “Ritang’ani tiga omoruoti Sulemani andiere eira y’ogotiana ng’a takong’ita inche, omosomba oye, nomoro.”" 
1Kings1:52 Sulemani agateba, “Karanyorekane ore omonto bw’ekeene, nonya nagatukia akamo k’omotwe oye tigakogwa inse; korende obobe koboranyorekane asare, goika akwe.”" 
1Kings1:53 Erio omoruoti Sulemani agatoma abanto nabarabwo bakamorusia agwo ase egesasimero, bakamorenta. Ere agacha agatung’ama, akaumama ase okoorokia amasikani ase omoruoti Sulemani, na Sulemani akamotebia, “Genda nka bwoo.”" 
1Kings2:1 Ekero engaki y’ogokwa gwa Daudi yaigete ang’e, agachika Sulemani, omwana oye, akamotebia," 
1Kings2:2 “Inche nabeire ang’e kogenda enchera eria abanto bonsi b’ense bakogenda. Obe omokong’u, bweorokie obe omonto oteneine boronge." 
1Kings2:3 Obwate onsi aya Omonene, Nyasae oo, agochikire, otaare ase chinchera chiaye, na orende amachiko aye, na emeroberio yaye yonsi, orende noborori bwaye, buna arikire ase amachiko a Musa, erio nario orasesenigwe ase kende gionsi ogokora, na aande onsi ase okogenda." 
1Kings2:4 Erio Omonene naikeranie ring’ana riaye, riria akwanete asende, agateba: Abana bao kobararende chinchera chiabo, na bataare ase obosio bwane ase obwegenwa ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi, na ase emioyo yabo yonsi, rirorio omonto takobora korwa ase ororeria rwao oyoraikaranse ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings2:5 “Aye nomanyete eki Yoabu, omwana bw’omokungu Seruya, akorete asende, ase ogoita abachiki baria babere b’abarwani esegi b’Abaisraeli: Abineri, mosinto o Neri, na Amasa, mosinto o Yeteri. Noinyorete buna aiterete amanyinga ase engaki y’omorembe buna nigo yarenge engaki y’esegi. Akabeka amanyinga atari na komocha ase orokini rwaye na ase ebikoroto bi’amagoro aye." 
1Kings2:6 Aye okore onsi koreng’ana nobong’aini bwao, korende tobaisa komotiga agende ne chimbuche chiaye aase abakure ore nomorembe." 
1Kings2:7 “Korende okorere abana ba Barisilai, Omogileadi, amaya, babe ase egati ya baria bakoragera amo naye, ekiagera ase obosani obo obuya, barabwo nabo bankorerete, ekero narenge gotoma korwa ase Abisalomu, momura omino." 
1Kings2:8 “Naende boigo nare aroro Simei, mosinto o Gera, omonto bw’egesaku kia Benjamin, korwa Bahurimu. Ere nandagereretie okoragereria okobe ase rituko riria nagendete Mahanaimu; korende ekero achete Yorodani koumerana nainche, nigo namorierete eira y’ogotiana ase Omonene, ngateba: Tinkogoita nomoro." 
1Kings2:9 Ase ayio bono, tobaisa komobara ng’a tari na komocha, ekiagera aye nomonto omong’aini; nomanye aye omonyene eki ogwenerete gokora asare, motige agende aase abakure ore ne chimbuche, ase engencho y’okomocha kwaye kw’ogoitera amanyinga.”" 
1Kings2:10 Daudi akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, erio agatindekwa ase Omochie o Daudi." 
1Kings2:11 Engaki Daudi agamberete Abaisraeli nigo yarenge emiaka emerongo ene; akagamba emiaka etano na ebere agwo Heburoni, na agwo Yerusalemu emiaka emerongo etato, na etato." 
1Kings2:12 Ase ayio, Sulemani agaikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Daudi ise, na oboruoti bwaye bokaba ne chinguru chinene mono." 
1Kings2:13 Adonia, omomura o Hagiti, akagenda ase Batiseba, ng’ina Sulemani. Omokungu oria akamoboria, “Igo gwachire nomorembe?” Adonia akairaneria, “Ee, nachire nomorembe.”" 
1Kings2:14 Naende akamotebia, “Nimbwate egento ngokwana naye.” Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Kwana.”" 
1Kings2:15 Adonia akamotebia, “Nomanyete ng’a oboruoti nobwane bwarenge, na Abaisraeli bonsi igo baganetie mbagambere, korende nonya naboigo, oboruoti bokaonchoka bokaba obwa momura ominto, ekiagera igo bwaba obwaye ase ogwancha kw’Omonene." 
1Kings2:16 Na bono nimbwate okoboria okomo ngokoboria, tonkania.” Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Boria.”" 
1Kings2:17 Adonia agakwana, “Nagosabire, genda oborie omoruoti Sulemani ang’e Abisagi, Omosunemu oria, abe mokaane. Nimanyete ng’a takogokania.”" 
1Kings2:18 Batiseba akamoiraneria, “Ayio mbuya; ninkwane nomoruoti ase engencho yao.”" 
1Kings2:19 Ase ayio Batiseba akagenda ase omoruoti Sulemani akwane nere ase engencho y’Adonia. Omoruoti agatenena korotota ng’ina, agatung’ama, akamworokia amasikani; erio agaikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye ki’oboruoti, agachika ng’ina arenterwe ekerogo, na ng’ina agaikaransa ase ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kw’omoruoti." 
1Kings2:20 Erio ng’ina akamotebia, “Nimbwate okoboria goke igo nkorenta asore, tobaisa kwanga.” Omoruoti akamotebia, “Boria okoboria kwao, baba; tinkwanga aya okoboria.”" 
1Kings2:21 Ng’ina agateba, “Tiga Abisagi, Omosunemu oria, aegwe Adonia, momura omino, abe mokaye.”" 
1Kings2:22 Omoruoti Sulemani akairaneria ng’ina, “Nase ki okoboria ng’a Abisagi, Omosunemu oria, aegwe Adonia abe mokaye? Moborerie aegwe noboruoti boigo, ekiagera ere momura ominto omonene; na Abiatari omokuani, na Yoabu, omwana bw’omokungu Seruya, babwatanire nere.”" 
1Kings2:23 Erio omoruoti Sulemani agatiana ase Omonene, agateba, “Nyasae ang’e egesusuro ekenene onye ring’ana eri riaye aboririe tirigochia kogera asirie obogima bwaye." 
1Kings2:24 Bono, ekeene buna Omonene are moyo, oria ombekire ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Daudi tata, na gonkong’ia, naende ong’eire oroiboro buna ariete eira, Adonia goika aitwe ase rituko ria rero.”" 
1Kings2:25 Omoruoti Sulemani agatoma Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, aite Adonia. Benaya akamoita agakwa." 
1Kings2:26 Omoruoti agatebia Abiatari omokuani, “Genda Anatoti ase oboremu bwao: aye igo ogwenerete okwe, korende inche tinkogoita ase engaki eye, ekiagera aye nkwabogoretie Esanduku y’Omonene Nyasae bosio bwa Daudi tata, naende ngwachandegete amo na tata ase emechando yaye yonsi.”" 
1Kings2:27 Ase ayio Sulemani agaseria Abiatari taba omokuani ase Omonene. Igo ring’ana riria Omonene konya akwanire agwo Silo igoro ase enyomba ya Eli rigaikeranigwa. 
1Kings2:28 Ekero Yoabu aigwete amang’ana ayio, agatama gochia ase Eema y’Omonene, akabwaterera emegwekano ye chingunchara chi’egesasimero. Ere igo abwatanete n’Adonia ase okomokonya, korende tabwatanete n’Abisalomu." 
1Kings2:29 Omoruoti Sulemani agatebigwa, “Yoabu otamire gochia ase Eema y’Omonene, na rora, nao are ase egesasimero.” Erio agatoma Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, akamotebia, “Genda oake Yoabu, omoite.”" 
1Kings2:30 Benaya akagenda ase Eema y’Omonene, agatebia Yoabu, “Omoruoti ogochikire osoke isiko.” Korende Yoabu agakana, “Yaya, aa nao ngokwera.” Benaya akagenda ase omoruoti, akamotebia amang’ana Yoabu atebete." 
1Kings2:31 Omoruoti akamotebia, “Kora buna atebire, gachie omoake, omoite na komotindeka. Ase enchera eye onduserie inche na enyomba ya tata egesiomba ase engencho y’amanyinga atari na komocha aria Yoabu aiterete." 
1Kings2:32 Omonene naite Yoabu ase okomocha kwaye kw’ogoitera amanyinga, ogokora okwo Daudi tata atamanyete. Yoabu nigo aitete nomoro Abineri mosinto o Neri, omochiki bw’abarwani esegi b’Abaisraeli, na Amasa mosinto o Yeteri, omochiki bw’abarwani esegi b’Abayuda. Abanto abwo babere nigo barenge abaronge, naende abaya komobua." 
1Kings2:33 Ase ayio, egesusuro gi’okomocha kw’ogoitera amanyinga nkebe igoro ase Yoabu, naende kebe igoro ase ororeria rwaye goika kare na kare. Korende ase Daudi, na ororeria rwaye, na enyomba yaye, na ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, omorembe okorwa ase Omonene nobeo kare na kare.”" 
1Kings2:34 Erio Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, akagenda, agaaka Yoabu, akamoita. Nere Yoabu agatindekwa ase enka yaye agwo ase erooro." 
1Kings2:35 Omoruoti akabeka Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, akaba omochiki bw’abarwani esegi ribaga ria Yoabu, na Zadoki omokuani akabekwa ribaga ri’Abiatari." 
1Kings2:36 Naende Omoruoti akarangeria Simei, akamotebia, “Eagachere enyomba ime ya Yerusalemu omenyeo, tobaisa korua aroro ogende aande onsi nonya ng’ake." 
1Kings2:37 Ekiagera ekero kende gionsi orasoke korwa aroro, bwamboke akarooche ga Kidironi, omanye ng’a gioka okwe; okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ao nigo korabe okwao.”" 
1Kings2:38 Simei agatebia omoruoti, “Egento gwatebire nekiya; buna aye omonene one omoruoti gwatebire, naboigo inche, omosomba oo, ndakore.” Ase ayio, Simei akamenya ase Yerusalemu amatuko amange." 
1Kings2:39 Korende ekaba ase omoerio bw’omwaka o gatato abasomba babere ba Simei bagatama, bakagenda ase Akisi, mosinto o Maaka, omoruoti o Gati. Simei agatebigwa ng’a abasomba baye nao bakare agwo Gati." 
1Kings2:40 Ase igo akaimoka akabekera etigere yaye egeikaransero, akariina igoro asere, akagenda Gati ase Akisi korigia abasomba baye; akabanyora, akabairania inka." 
1Kings2:41 Ekero Sulemani atebetigwe ng’a Simei narua Yerusalemu, akagenda Gati, naende akairana," 
1Kings2:42 akamorangeria, akamotebia, “Inche nigo nagotebetie ng’a orie eira y’ogotiana ase Omonene ng’a tobaisa korua Yerusalemu. Naende nkagokurera mono ngateba: Rituko orasoke korwa aroro agwo, na ogende aande onsi, goika okwe. Inee! Tigwanchete ng’a nonyigwere na okore bo?" 
1Kings2:43 Naki otarenda eira yao y’ogotiana ase Omonene amo naya nagochigete?” 
1Kings2:44 Boigo omoruoti agatebia Simei, “Nomanyete aye omonyene ase enkoro yao ime obobe bwonsi boria gwakorete ase Daudi tata. Omonene nakoiranerie obobe bwao." 
1Kings2:45 Korende inche omoruoti Sulemani ninsesenigwe, na ekerogo ki’obonene gia Daudi nagekorwe kebe ne chinguru kegenderere botambe ase obosio bw’Omonene.”" 
1Kings2:46 Omoruoti agachika Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, na ere akagenda agaaka Simei, akamoita. Ase ayio oboruoti bokabekwa chinguru ase okoboko gwa Sulemani." 
1Kings3:1 Sulemani agakora oboamate na Farao, omoruoti o Misiri. Akanyuoma omoiseke o Farao, akamorenta ase Omochie o Daudi akamenya aroro goika ekero akoorete koagacha enyomba yaye omonyene amo nenyomba y’Omonene ne chindwaki chiaetanaine Yerusalemu." 
1Kings3:2 Abanto nigo barenge koruera ebing’wanso ase ebisasimero biarenge aase aimokererete igoro, ekiagera nyomba ende yonsi konya teraagachwa ase baranyare gosasima erieta ri’Omonene." 
1Kings3:3 Sulemani nigo anchete Omonene, akabwatia emeroberio Daudi achigete, korende nigo aruete ebing’wanso na gosamba ubani agwo aase aimokererete igoro." 
1Kings3:4 Omoruoti akagenda Gibeoni gochia korua ekeng’wanso aroro, ekiagera nao arenge aase aimokererete igoro mono; akarua aroro ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa elifu eyemo." 
1Kings3:5 Agwo Gibeoni Omonene akaorokera Sulemani ase chindoto botuko, Nyasae akamotebia, “Boria egento oganetie nkoe.”" 
1Kings3:6 Sulemani agateba, “Aye kworokirie obwanchani obonene botari koera ase omosomba oo Daudi tata, ekiagera igo ataarete ase obosio bwao ase obwegenwa, na oboronge, na ekeene gi’enkoro yaye. Naye kwagendereire komworokia obwanchani obonene botari koera, kwamoeire omwana omomura aikaranse ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti, buna ere rero iga." 
1Kings3:7 Na bono, Omonene, Nyasae one, aye gwankorire inche, omosomba oo, nabeire omoruoti ribaga ria Daudi tata, nonya inde omwana omoke. Timanyeti buna nkogamba na koraa." 
1Kings3:8 Inche omosomba oo nigo inde ase egati y’abanto bao, aba gwachorire, abanto abange batanyare kobareka ase engencho y’obonge bwabo." 
1Kings3:9 Ase ayio, ing’a inche, omosomba oo, okomanya kw’obong’aini gw’okogambera abanto bao, erio nario ndamanye gwatanana amaya na amabe. Naki ning’o oranyare kogambera abanto aba bao abange?”" 
1Kings3:10 Omonene akagokigwa namang’ana ayio Sulemani aboretie. 
1Kings3:11 Nyasae akamotebia, “Ekiagera kwaboririe ring’ana eri, na tibweborereti aye omonyene oegwe obogima obotambe, gose obonda obonge, gose ogosirigwa kw’obogima bw’ababisa bao, korende kwaboririe ng’a oegwe okomanya kw’obong’aini ase okomanyereria ayare amaronge," 
1Kings3:12 rora, ninkore koreng’ana buna kwamboria. Ninkoe enkoro y’okomanya okonene kw’obong’aini, okwo monto onde atana koba nakwo, gose oyorache nyuma yao takoba nakwo." 
1Kings3:13 Naende ninkoe boigo ebinto binde otaboria; ninkoe obotenenku obonge na obonene bw’ogosikwa, na omoruoti onde tari orareng’anigwe naye ase amatuko ao onsi." 
1Kings3:14 Na korarende chinchera chiane, na emeroberio yane echikire, na amachiko aane amachenu, buna Daudi iso akorete, erio ningokore obe moyo amatuko amange.”" 
1Kings3:15 Sulemani akaboka, akamanya ng’a omaanoreirwe ayio goetera ase chindoto. Erio akagenda Yerusalemu, agatenena bosio bw’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene, akaruera Omonene ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa na eki’omorembe. Nyuma y’ayio agakorera abasomba baye bonsi omoyega." 
1Kings3:16 Erio abakungu abatayayi babere bagacha ase obosio bw’omoruoti, bagatenena aroro." 
1Kings3:17 Omokungu oyomo agakwana, agateba, “Aye omonene one, inche amo nomokungu oyo nigo tomenyete ase enyomba eyemo; nkaibora omwana ekero ere arenge ase enyomba eria." 
1Kings3:18 Erio rituko ria gatato nyuma inche konaiboire, omokungu oyo nere akaibora; nintwe tweka babere twarengeo, monto onde omoao tarenge ase enyomba eria." 
1Kings3:19 Na omwana bw’omokungu oyo agakwa botuko, ekiagera igo amorarerete." 
1Kings3:20 Erio akaboka botuko gati, akabogoria omwana one omoisia korwa ase rikere riane ensemo, ekero inche, omosomba oo, naraire chitoro, erio akaareria omwana one ase rikere riaye, na akarenta omwana oria oye okwete, akamwareria ase rikere riane." 
1Kings3:21 Ekero nabogete mambia ngonkie omwana one, nkanyora ng’a okure, korende ekero narigereretie omwana oria buya ase emambia eyio, nkarora ng’a oyo tari omwana oria naiborete.”" 
1Kings3:22 Korende omokungu oria o kabere agakana, “Yaya taibo, omwana oyo ore moyo, nere oyone, na omwana oria okwete nere oyoo.” Omokungu oria omotang’ani akabora, “Yaya, omwana oria okwete, nere oyoo, na omwana oyo ore moyo, nere oyone.” Naboigo bakwanete, bakoamererania ase obosio bw’omoruoti." 
1Kings3:23 Erio omoruoti agateba, “Oyomo nigo agoteba: Omwana oyo ore moyo, nere oyone, na omwana oria okwete, nere oyoo; na oyonde igo agokana: Yaya, omwana oo, nere okwete, na omwana one, nere ore moyo.”" 
1Kings3:24 Ase igo akaboria aegwe omoro. Na ekero arenteirwe omoro," 
1Kings3:25 agateba, “Butorane omwana oyo ore moyo ebing’ese bibere, ekeng’ese ekemo keegwe omokungu oyomo, na ekende keegwe oyonde.”" 
1Kings3:26 Erio omokungu oria omwana oye arenge moyo, ekiagera anchete omwana oye mono, agatebia omoruoti, “Aye omoruoti, tobaisa goita omwana, kae omokungu oyo omwana oyo ore moyo.” Korende oria onde agateba, “Omwana takoba oyone, gose oyoo; tiga anachanwe.”" 
1Kings3:27 Omoruoti akairaneria, agateba, “Omwana oyo ore moyo, kae omokungu oyo bwe ritang’ani, timobaisa konachana omwana oyo; omokungu oyo nere ng’ina.”" 
1Kings3:28 Abaisraeli bonsi bakaigwa chinkuma chi’ekina ekio omoruoti agambete; erio bakairoka omoruoti, ekiagera nigo baroche ng’a obong’aini bwa Nyasae nigo bwarenge ime yaye ase okogamba kw’oboronge." 
1Kings4:1 Omoruoti Sulemani igo agamberete Abaisraeli bonsi," 
1Kings4:2 na abanene abarenge komokonya nabwo aba: Asaria, mosinto o Zadoki, nere orenge omokuani;" 
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahiya, basinto ba Sisa, nabwo barenge abariki; Yehosafati, mosinto bw’Ahiludi, nere orenge omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka;" 
1Kings4:4 Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, nere orenge omochiki bw’abarwani esegi; Zadoki na Abiatari, nabwo barenge abakuani;" 
1Kings4:5 Asaria, mosinto o Nathani, nere orenge omoteneneri igoro ase abanene baria; Zabudi, mosinto o Nathani, nere orenge omokuani, naende nigo arenge omosani bw’omoruoti;" 
1Kings4:6 Ahisari, nere otenenerete enyomba y’obogambi; Adoniramu, mosinto o Abuda, nere otenenerete emeremo yagwenerete gokorwa." 
1Kings4:7 Sulemani nachorete abanto abanene ikomi na babere abarenge gosangereria endagera na koyerentera omoruoti amo nab’enyomba yaye. Kera oyomo ase aba ikomi na babere nigo arenge korenta endagera eisaine koriegwa ase omotienyi oyomo ase omwaka. 
1Kings4:8 Aya naro amarieta ’abanto abwo: Beni‐Huri agatenenera ense y’ebigoro y’Efraimu; 
1Kings4:9 Beni‐Dekeri agatenenera emechie ya Makasi, na Shaalabimu, na Beti‐Semesi, na Eloni, na Beti‐Hanani." 
1Kings4:10 Beni‐Hesedi agatenenera emechie y’Aruboti na Soko, na ense yonsi ya Hefa;" 
1Kings4:11 Beni‐Abinadab agatenenera Nafati‐Dori yonsi (nere onyuomete Tafati, omoiseke o Sulemani);" 
1Kings4:12 Baana, mosinto bw’Ahiludi, agatenenera emechie ya Taanaki na Megido, na Beti‐Sehani yonsi, eyio eikerete Saretani, irianyi ya Yesireeli, na korwa Beti‐Sehani goika Abeli‐Mehola, na ng’umbu ya Yoki‐Meamu." 
1Kings4:13 Beni‐Geberi agatenenera Ramoti o Gileadi, na Emechie ya Yairi Omomanase agwo Gileadi, na orogongo rw’Arigobu agwo Basani. Igo atenenerete emechie emerongo etano nomo emenene yagiteire chindwaki, na ebiita biabo nigo biarenge nemekorogoto." 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu, mosinto o Ido, agatenenera orogongo rwa Mahanaimu;" 
1Kings4:15 Ahimasi agatenenera orogongo rwa Nafutali (nere onyuomete Basemati, omoiseke o Sulemani);" 
1Kings4:16 Baana, mosinto o Husai, agatenenera orogongo rw’Aseri na omochie o Bealoti;" 
1Kings4:17 Yehosafati, mosinto o Parua, agatenenera orogongo rwa Isakaru;" 
1Kings4:18 Simei, mosinto bwa Ela, agatenenera orogongo rwa Benjamin;" 
1Kings4:19 Geberi, mosinto bwa Uri, agatenenera ense ya Gileadi yarenge kogamberwa na Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, na Ogi, omoruoti o Basani. Nigo arenge omoteneneri oyomo bweka ase ense eyio yonsi." 
1Kings4:20 Abayuda na Abaisraeli nigo barenge abange mono, buna omokenye o nyancha; barabwo bakaria na konywa, bakaba bakwegokia." 
1Kings4:21 Sulemani akaba okogambera amaruoti onsi, gochakera orooche rw’Eufarati na goikera ense y’Abafilisti, na goikera orobebe rwa Misiri. Abanto bonsi b’oboruoti bwaye nigo barenge komorentera ebango na bakaba bakomokorera ase obogima bwaye bwonsi." 
1Kings4:22 Endagera Sulemani arenge korenterwa ase rituko erimo nigo yarenge: obosie obonuke, ebitonga amagana atato, na obosie bonde, ebitonga amagana atano na rimo," 
1Kings4:23 ne chiombe ikomi chinoru chiare gotugerwa nyomba, ne chiombe chiare korisia getii, emerongo ebere, na ching’ondi rigana erimo, ne chinsune, ne chingabi, na amang’o, ne chinyoni chinoru." 
1Kings4:24 Sulemani nigo arenge kogambera chinse chionsi chiare bosongo y’Eufarati, korwa Tifusa goika Gasa. Ase igo nigo arenge kogambera abaruoti bonsi abarenge bosongo y’Eufarati, nigo arenge nomorembe ne chinse chionsi chiamoetanaine." 
1Kings4:25 Abayuda na Abaisraeli nigo bamenyete nomorembe korwa Dani goika Beeri‐Seba; kera omonto nigo arenge nemezeituni yaye na emeko yaye, ase emiaka yonsi Sulemani abagamberete." 
1Kings4:26 Sulemani nabwate ameri e chibarasi chilifu emerongo ene chiarenge kong’usa chigari, ne chibarasi chiare koriinwa, chilifu ikomi na ibere." 
1Kings4:27 Abateneneri baria abanene nigo barenge korenta chindagera ase omoruoti Sulemani na ase abanto bonsi abarenge koragera bwoye. Kera oyomo obo nigo are korenta endagera eisaine koriegwa ase omotienyi oyomo ase omwaka, endagera tiyarenge kobora." 
1Kings4:28 Kera omonto nigo arenge korenta esairi na obonyansi aase biaganeirie ase chibarasi chiare kong’usa chigari amo ne chibarasi chinde. 
1Kings4:29 Nyasae akaa Sulemani obong’aini ne chisemi goetania ekerengo; okomanya kwaye nigo kwarenge okonge, koreng’ana buna obonge bw’omokenye ore ase engegu y’enyancha." 
1Kings4:30 Obong’aini bwa Sulemani nigo bwabuete obw’abanto bonsi ba Moocha na obw’Abamisiri bonsi. 
1Kings4:31 Igo arenge omong’aini kobua abanto bonsi, kobua Etani Omoezara, na Hemani, na Kalikoli, na Darida, basinto ba Maholi; ne chinkuma chiaye chikagenda goika ase ebisaku bionsi biamoetanaine." 
1Kings4:32 Boigo nakwanete emereng’anio chilifu isato; na amatera aye nigo arenge elifu eyemo, na atano." 
1Kings4:33 Ere nigo arenge goteba igoro y’emete yonsi, emenene buna emecharake ya Lebanoni na ebimeri ebike buna hisopo eyekomera ase chindwaki. Boigo agateba igoro ye ching’iti, ne chinyoni, ne ching’iti chikwagura, ne chinswe." 
1Kings4:34 Abanto bakarwa ase chinse chionsi, bagacha koigwa obong’aini bwa Sulemani, na abaruoti bonsi b’ense bagatoma abanto bagachia komoigwa." 
1Kings5:1 Hiramu, omoruoti o Turo ekero aigwete ng’a Sulemani oakirwe amaguta na obeire omoruoti ribaga ria ise, agatoma abasomba baye asare, ekiagera Hiramu botambe igo anchete Daudi." 
1Kings5:2 Na Sulemani agatoma amang’ana ase Hiramu, akabora," 
1Kings5:3 “Nomanyete ng’a Daudi tata tanyarete koagacha enyomba ase ogosasimera erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oye, ekiagera ababisa nigo barenge komorwania chisegi chinsemo chionsi, goika ekero Omonene ababegete inse ase obogambi bwa Daudi." 
1Kings5:4 Korende bono Omonene, Nyasae one, ong’eire obotoereru korwa ase kera ensemo; ababisa tibari aande, gose amabe ande onsi." 
1Kings5:5 Omonene nigo atebetie Daudi tata: Omwana oo oria ndabeke abe ase ekerogo kiao ki’obonene nyuma yao, nere orang’agachere enyomba aase mogosasimera erieta riane. Ase ayio, naganirie koagacha enyomba aase togosasimera erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae one." 
1Kings5:6 Na bono aye, chika abanto bangechere emete emecharake ya Lebanoni. Abasomba baane mbabwatane nabasomba bao ase emeremo eyio, na inche ning’akane abasomba bao eng’eria ende yonsi orabeke. Nomanyete ng’a abanto baane tibamanyeti kogecha emete buna abanto ba Sidoni.”" 
1Kings5:7 Ekero Hiramu aigwete amang’ana a Sulemani, akaba nomogoko omonene, akabora, “Omonene atogigwe rituko ria rero, oyo oeire Daudi omwana omomura omong’aini agambere abanto aba abange.”" 
1Kings5:8 Erio agatoma amang’ana ase Sulemani, agateba, “Naigure amang’ana gwatomire asende; igo inde ang’e gokora onsi aya oganetie ase amang’ana ’emete emecharake na emetarakwa." 
1Kings5:9 Abasomba baane mbayetirimbokie korwa ase Lebanoni gochia ase enyancha, nainche ninyebeke amo inyesibe, eirwe nenyancha echeng’enenete, goika aase oganetie. “Aase agwo nao erasansorerwe, na aye oyerusieo. Erio ong’isanekerie okogania kwane ase okobaa abanto baane endagera yabo.”" 
1Kings5:10 Hiramu akaa Sulemani emete, emecharake na emetarakwa buna Sulemani aganetie." 
1Kings5:11 Sulemani akaa Hiramu obosie bw’engano ebitonga chilifu amagana abere (200,000) koba endagera ase abanto b’enyomba yaye, na amaguta amitire korwa ase amazeituni chilita chilifu isano na ibere, na amagana abere (7,200). Ebinto ebio Sulemani akaba okoa Hiramu ase kera omwaka." 
1Kings5:12 Omonene akaa Sulemani obong’aini buna amorierete eira. Omorembe okaba ase egati ya Hiramu na Sulemani, na aba babere bagakora okobwatana gw’okoigwana." 
1Kings5:13 Omoruoti Sulemani agakora omoroberio bw’abanto chilifu emerongo etato (30,000) korwa ase Abaisraeli bonsi, akababeka bakore emeremo yagwenerete gokorwa." 
1Kings5:14 Agaatanana abanto aba ase ebiombe bitato, kera ekeombe gekaba abanto chilifu ikomi. Kera ekeombe gekaba kegokora emeremo agwo Lebanoni ase omotienyi oyomo na kobeera inka ase emetienyi ebere. Adoniramu akabekwa gotenenera emeremo eyio yagwenerete gokorwa." 
1Kings5:15 Boigo Sulemani nabwate abanto chilifu emerongo etano na ebere (70,000) abarenge kobogoria chigurube, na abanto chilifu emerongo etano na etato (80,000) abarenge kobaacha amagena agwo ase ebitunwa." 
1Kings5:16 Naende Sulemani nabwate abanto chilifu isato na amagana atato (3,300) batenenerete abanto barenge gokora emeremo." 
1Kings5:17 Omoruoti akabachika babaache amagena amanene aye rigori rinene, erinde oboroso bw’enyomba bobekwe amagena abaachire buya." 
1Kings5:18 Naboigo abaagachi ba Sulemani, na aba Hiramu amo nabanto b’omochie o Gebali bagakora emeremo y’okobaacha na gosenia amagena na koroisia chibao ase oboagacho boria." 
1Kings6:1 Ase omwaka bw’amagana ane, na emerongo etano na etato, nyuma Abaisraeli kobarure ense ya Misiri, noro omwaka o kane bw’okogamba gwa Sulemani igoro y’Abaisraeli, ase omotienyi o Sivu, omotienyi o kabere, Sulemani agachaka koagacha enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Kings6:2 Enyomba eria omoruoti Sulemani aagacherete Omonene nigo yarenge iga: Obotambe bwaye nobw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano nomo, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo ebere, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro amaboko emerongo etato." 
1Kings6:3 Enyomba eria yaagachetwe bosio bwe Hekalu enyene nigo yarenge iga: Obotambe bwaye gochia ime nobw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo ebere, nigo bwareng’aine nobogare bwe Hekalu." 
1Kings6:4 Sulemani akaroisia ase enyomba eria ebibao bi’emete; ebibao ebio tibiarenge koigorwa. 
1Kings6:5 Naende akaagacha chinyomba chinde inse, chinyasi chiaye chichomeranirie ne chinyasi chi’enyomba enyene ase amakere na nyuma, akanachana ebinyomba imeo." 
1Kings6:6 Obogare bw’ebinyomba bia inse nigo bwarenge bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano, na ebie rirongo ria kabere amaboko atano na rimo, na ebie rirongo ria gatato amaboko atano na abere. Nigo akorete ebitambokero bikabwatana nenyasi ye Hekalu ase kera rirongo, erinde emeriibo egosiira kera rirongo etoorere ase ebitambokero ebio, etari gosoigwa ase enyasi." 
1Kings6:7 Ekero enyomba yaagachetwe, igo yaagachetwe namagena aseneirie agwo aase arenge kobaacherwa, erinde eriogi ri’enyundo, gose eri’egesire, gose eri’egekorero kende gionsi gi’ekioma tikeigugwa ase Hekalu ekero yaagachetwe." 
1Kings6:8 Egesoero kegosoera ebinyomba bia inse nigo kiarenge ensemo ya sugusu ye Hekalu na goetera ase ebiriinero abanto nigo barenge koriina gochia ase rirongo ria kabere, na korwa aroro bariina gochia ase rirongo ria gatato." 
1Kings6:9 Naboigo Sulemani akaagacha Hekalu, akayekoora. Akaroisia risang’ina ri’enyomba ne chibao chi’emecharake." 
1Kings6:10 Oboagacho bw’enyomba inse nigo bwatunyaine Hekalu, na kera rirongo nigo riarenge nobotambe gochia igoro ekerengo ki’amaboko atano. Oboagacho obwo nigo bwabwateranetigwe ne Hekalu ne chibao chi’emecharake." 
1Kings6:11 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Sulemani, rikamotebia," 
1Kings6:12 “Amang’ana igoro y’enyomba eye okong’agachera bono nigo arabe iga: Korabwatie emeroberio yane echikire na koigwera amachiko aane onsi na koyakora, erio nainche ning’ikeranie ring’ana riane asore, riria nakwanete na Daudi iso:" 
1Kings6:13 Inche nigo ndamenye aroro ase egati y’Abaisraeli, tingotiga abanto baane Abaisraeli.”" 
1Kings6:14 Sulemani akaagacha enyomba eria na akayekoora buna iga: 
1Kings6:15 Agatuba chinyasi chia ime y’enyomba yonsi korwa inse goika igoro ne chibao chi’emecharake, na inse y’enyomba akayetuba ne chibao chi’emetarakwa." 
1Kings6:16 Akaagacha akanyomba ka ime bosio kegima ase Hekalu ime, kabe Aase Aachenu Mono. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere; akanyomba karia akagatuba ne chibao chi’emecharake, korwa inse goika igoro." 
1Kings6:17 Ensemo y’enyomba yarenge Hekalu enyene nigo yarenge y’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ene. 
1Kings6:18 Chibao chi’emecharake chiatubete enyomba ime nigo chiarenge nemegwekano y’ebirandi, na ey’ebisicha, yabaachetwe ase chibao echio. Yonsi nigo yatubetwe nemecharake, na igena rinde tiriarorekanete." 
1Kings6:19 Ime ye Hekalu bosio kegima nigo aroisetie akanyomba aase Esanduku y’Okobwatana y’Omonene yarenge kobekwa. 
1Kings6:20 Obotambe bw’akanyomba karia ka ime nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere; naboigo obogare bwaye na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro, naende nigo kaoomire netahabu echenire. Bosio bw’akanyomba karia egesasimero gekaroisigwa, kegatubwa ne chibao chi’emecharake." 
1Kings6:21 Sulemani akaooma Hekalu ime netahabu engiya. Chingataare chiaoomire netahabu chikabekwa ase egesieri bosio bw’akanyomba ka ime. 
1Kings6:22 Nabo akaooma enyomba yonsi kegima netahabu; boigo akaooma egesasimero gi’Aase Aachenu netahabu. 
1Kings6:23 Sulemani akaroisia emegwekano y’abakerubi babere korwa ase emete y’emezeituni, akayebeka agwo ase akanyomba ka ime." 
1Kings6:24 Obotambe bwa kera orobaba rwa kera oyomo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano; korwa ensinyo y’orobaba oromo goika ey’oronde nigo bwarenge obotambe bw’amaboko ikomi. 
1Kings6:25 Omokerubi oria onde boigo nigo arenge bw’ekerengo ekio ekio. Abakerubi bonsi babere nigo barenge bareng’aine kegima ase ekerengo na bagwekaine ase ekieni. 
1Kings6:26 Obotambe bwa kera omokerubi nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ikomi. 
1Kings6:27 Abakerubi abwo bakabekwa ase akanyomba karia bosio ime ye Hekalu. Chimbaba chiabo nigo chiaramboire; orobaba oromo rw’omokerubi oyomo rogaika enyasi ensemo eyemo, na oromo rw’oyonde rogaika enyasi ensemo ende; gati‐gati y’enyomba orobaba ronde rwa kera omokerubi rogakunana." 
1Kings6:28 Abakerubi bonsi babere bakaoomwa netahabu. 
1Kings6:29 Sulemani agachabera chinyasi chionsi chie Hekalu, na echi’akanyomba ka ime, nemegwekano y’abakerubi, na ey’emekendo, na ey’ebisicha, yabaachetwe ase chibao echio." 
1Kings6:30 Inse ase ebinyomba ebio bibere akaooma netahabu. 
1Kings6:31 Ebisieri bibere bikaroisigwa korwa ase chibao chi’emezeituni bikabekwa ase egesoero gi’akanyomba ka ime. Emetobwa nigo yatenenirie ensemo eyemo ya isano y’enyasi. 
1Kings6:32 Ebisieri ebio bionsi bibere bi’emezeituni bigachaberwa nemegwekano y’abakerubi, na ey’emekendo, na ey’ebisicha, yabaachetwe ase chibao echio. Akaooma bionsi netahabu; boigo agasiarera abakerubi amo ne chibao chi’emekendo netahabu." 
1Kings6:33 Naende emetobwa y’egesieri gie Hekalu enyene ekaroisigwa korwa ase chibao chi’emezeituni ere ne chikoona inye," 
1Kings6:34 na ebisieri bibere bi’emetarakwa; kera egesieri nigo kiarenge ebing’ese bibere biare konyara koigorwa biaringanigwa. 
1Kings6:35 Ebisieri ebio bigachaberwa nemegwekano y’abakerubi, na ey’emekendo na ey’ebisicha, yabaachetwe ase chibao echio, bikaoomwa buya netahabu igoro y’emegwekano eyio." 
1Kings6:36 Naende Sulemani akaagacha chindwaki chi’eraaro ya ime. Chindwaro isato chie chindwaki echio agachiagacha namagena abaachire, na orwaro oromo akaroagacha ne chibao chi’emecharake." 
1Kings6:37 Oboroso bwe Hekalu bokabekwa ase omotienyi o Sivu, ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba gwa Sulemani." 
1Kings6:38 Na ase omotienyi o gatano na gatato, omotienyi o Bulu, ase omwaka o ikomi nomo, oboagacho bwe Hekalu bokaera buna yaroberetigwe. Ase igo Sulemani akaira emiaka etano na ebere ase okoagacha enyomba eria." 
1Kings7:1 Sulemani akaira emiaka ikomi na etato ase okoagacha enyomba yaye omonyene na koyekoora. 
1Kings7:2 Akaagacha enyomba ekorokwa Enyomba ye Rinani ria Lebanoni. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko rigana erimo, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo etano, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro amaboko emerongo etato. Ero nigo yaagachetwe amo ne chisiiro chi’emecharake chindwaro inye. Igoro ase chisiiro echio emiamba y’emecharake yabaachetwe ekabekwa." 
1Kings7:3 Enyomba nigo yarenge nekerama ki’emecharake igoro y’emiamba yabegetwe ase chisiiro chiria emerongo ene na isano, ikomi na isano ase kera orwaro." 
1Kings7:4 Enyomba eyio nigo yarenge nebibao bire ase chindwaro isato, kera ekebao kerigereretie ekende." 
1Kings7:5 Ebisoero bionsi na ebibao nigo biarenge ne chikoona inye, na ebibao nigo biarigerereranetie bire ase chindwaro isato." 
1Kings7:6 Boigo akaagacha omwaraache bwe chisiiro. Obotambe bwaye nobw’amaboko emerongo etano, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo etato. Bosio bw’enyomba eyio akaagacha egesona, na bosio aroro chisiiro chire nekerama." 
1Kings7:7 Naende akaagacha Enyomba y’Ekerogo ki’Oboruoti, eye ekarokwa naende Enyomba y’Ekegambero aase arenge kogambera ebina. Eye nigo yatubetwe ne chibao chi’emecharake korwa inse goika igoro." 
1Kings7:8 Naboigo enyomba yaye y’okomenya yaagachetwe magega y’enyomba eria y’ebina, egwekaine neyio. Naende Sulemani akaagachera mokaye, mosubati o Farao, enyomba egwekaine eria yaye." 
1Kings7:9 Echio chionsi nigo chiagachetwe namagena amaya e rigori rinene, abaachetwe koreng’ana nekerengo, akanachwa nemesumeno chinsemo chionsi korwa oboroso goika rigasio ri’enyasi. Amagena onsi nigo aroisetigwe bo, nonya naya e risiko amo nay’orwaki rw’eraaro y’enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Kings7:10 Amagena ’oboroso nigo arenge aye rigori rinene, amagena amanene na amarito, ayande ay’obotambe bw’amaboko ikomi, na ayande ay’amaboko atano na atato." 
1Kings7:11 Igoro y’oboroso narengeo amagena ande e rigori rinene, abaachetwe koreng’ana nekerengo, amo nemeriibo y’emecharake." 
1Kings7:12 Orwaki rw’eraaro enene igo rwaagachetwe namagena abaachire, abekire chindwaro isato gochia igoro, ne chibao chi’emecharake orwaro oromo. Naboigo norwaki rw’eraaro ya ime y’enyomba y’Omonene amo nenyomba yarenge bosio bw’aroro." 
1Kings7:13 Omoruoti Sulemani akarangeria Hiramu achiche korwa Turo. 
1Kings7:14 Hiramu nigo arenge omwana bw’omokungu omoboraka bw’egesaku kia Nafutali, na ise nigo arenge omonto o Turo, omoturi bwe chitaai. Hiramu omonyene nigo arenge nobong’aini obonge amo ne chisemi, omanyete gotura ebinto binde bionsi bie chitaai. Ere agacha ase Sulemani, akamokorera emeremo yaye yonsi." 
1Kings7:15 Hiramu akaroisia chisiiro ibere chi’etaai; obotambe bwa kera esiiro eyemo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ikomi na atato, na engori y’obotambe bw’amaboko ikomi na abere egaetanana kera esiiro." 
1Kings7:16 Naende akaroisia ebisure bibere bi’etaai enyititoire na kobombwa, akabibeka igoro ye chisiiro; obotambe gochia igoro bwa kera egesure nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano." 
1Kings7:17 Kera egesure igoro ye chisiiro nigo giachabeire nebichanga bitano na bibere biasisire goetanana. 
1Kings7:18 Akarosia emegwekano y’amakomomanga, akayebeka ase chindwaro ibere igoro y’ebichanga biarenge ase ebisure biria." 
1Kings7:19 Ebisure igoro ye chisiiro chiarenge ime y’enyomba ya bosio, nigo biabombire bigwekaine ebisicha; obotambe bwabo nobw’amaboko ane." 
1Kings7:20 Ebisure ebio nigo biarenge igoro ase chisiiro chiria ibere na igoro ye chinsemo chiatambeete gochia isiko. Emegwekano y’amakomomanga amagana abere yarenge ase chindwaro ibere ase kera egesure. 
1Kings7:21 Hiramu akabeka chisiiro chiria ase enyomba bosio bwe Hekalu; esiiro yabegetwe ensemo ya borio akayeroka Yakini, na eyabegetwe ensemo ya bomosi akayeroka Boasi." 
1Kings7:22 Ebisure nigo biabombire buna ebisicha nigo biarenge igoro ase chisiiro. Na igo emeremo ye chisiiro ekaera. 
1Kings7:23 Hiramu akaroisia egetuba ekenene korwa ase etaai enyititoire na kobombwa, ekaba egesingo. Ekerengo korwa ensemo eyemo goika eyende nigo kiarenge eki’amaboko ikomi. Obotambe gochia igoro nigo bwarenge bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano. Engori y’obotambe bw’amaboko emerongo etato ekanyara goetanana egetuba ekio." 
1Kings7:24 Ang’e nomogo emegwekano y’amasosa iyarengeo, ikomi ase kera ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo, yarandete ekeringero ekegima. Emegwekano eyio nigo yarenge chindwaro ibere, yabombire ase egento ekemo negetuba keria." 
1Kings7:25 Egetuba keria giaterekereretwe igoro y’emegwekano ye chiombe ikomi na ibere. Chiombe isato chikarigereria gochia sugusu, na isato gochia bosongo, na isato gochia irianyi, na isato gochia moocha; chinsemo chiabo chia nyuma chikarigereria gochia gati‐gati inse y’egetuba keria." 
1Kings7:26 Obonetu bw’etaai yaroiseretigwe egetubwa keria, nigo bwarenge obw’obogare bw’egesanyi gi’okoboko, na omogo okaroisigwa buna oyo bw’egekombe, gose obw’egesicha. Egetuba keria nigo kiarenge kobekwa amache aisaine ang’e chilita chilifu emerongo etano (50,000)." 
1Kings7:27 Naende Hiramu akaroisia ebibekerero ikomi bi’ebituba korwa ase chitaai. Obotambe bwa kera ekebekerero nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ane, na obogare bwaye amaboko ane, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro amaboko atato." 
1Kings7:28 Ebibekerero biria nigo biakoretwe iga: Chinsingo nchiarenge ase chinsemo chiabo ase egati ye chinsingo chie chikoona. 
1Kings7:29 Ase chinsingo echio yarengeo emegwekano ye chindo, na eye chieri, na ey’abakerubi; naboigo nase chinsingo chie chikoona igoro. Igoro na inse y’emegwekano eyio nigo yarenge emegwekano y’ebisicha biaroisirie chingata." 
1Kings7:30 Kera ekebekerero nigo kiarenge namagoro ane aroisetigwe korwa ase etaai. Ase chikoona chi’ekebekerero ebisiirero mbiarengeo. Ebisiirero ebio nigo biabombire nemegwekano y’ebisicha biaroisetigwe chingata ase kera ekemo. 
1Kings7:31 Omonwa bw’ekebekerero nigo orenge igoro ime y’orosingo rw’obotambe gochia igoro okoboko okomo. Omonwa oyio orenge egesingo otambeete gochia inse, obotambe bw’okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese, nao ebiechabero biarenge. Emetobwa yaye nigo yarenge ne chikoona, tiyarenge egesingo." 
1Kings7:32 Amagoro aye ane nigo abegetwe inse ye chinsingo chiaye, ne rinyongo riaye nigo ribwateranirie nekebekerero. Obotambe bwa kera okogoro nigo bwarenge obw’okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese." 
1Kings7:33 Amagoro ayio nigo aroisetigwe buna aye chigari. Amagoro amagima nigo aroisetigwe korwa ase etaai yanyititoire na kobombwa. Boigo amanyongo, ne chingata, na ebitingiro biaroisetigwe." 
1Kings7:34 Ebisiirero bine mbiarenge ase kera ekebekerero ase chikoona chiaye; biaroisetigwe bikaba egento ekemo nekebekerero. 
1Kings7:35 Igoro kegima ase kera ekebekerero nigo kiarenge orosingo rw’obogare bw’ekeng’ese gi’okoboko okomo; na igoro ase orosingo orwo nigo biarenge ebisiirero amo ne chinsingo chie chinsemo. Bionsi nigo biaroisetigwe bikaba egento ekemo nebisiirero. 
1Kings7:36 Ase ebisiirero na ase chinsingo emegwekano y’abakerubi, na eye chindo, na ey’emekendo, amo ney’ebisicha, ekamang’wa, buna ribaga riarenge ase kera ensemo." 
1Kings7:37 Naboigo akaroisia ebibekerero bionsi ikomi. Bionsi nigo biaroisetigwe korwa ase etaai enyititoire na kobombwa; nigo biareng’aine na nigo biagwekaine. 
1Kings7:38 Hiramu akaroisia na ebituba ikomi bie chitaai. Obogare bwa kera egetuba nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ane, na nigo kiare koira amache aisaine ang’e ne chilita amagana kianda. Naboigo aroisetie ebituba ikomi, ekemo ase kera ekebekerero." 
1Kings7:39 Akabeka ebibekerero bitano ensemo ya irianyi ye Hekalu, na bitano ensemo ya sugusu, na egetuba keria ekenene agakebeka ensemo ya irianyi ya moocha." 
1Kings7:40 Hiramu akaroisia ebituba, na ebichiko, na ebitaabo. Naboigo agakoora emeremo yonsi eyaetwe na Sulemani ng’a akore ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Kings7:41 Akaroisia chisiiro ibere, na ebisure bibere biabegetwe igoro ye chisiiro, na ebichanga bisisire biaetanaine, bigatuba chinsemo chi’ebisure echiatambeete gochia isiko," 
1Kings7:42 na emegwekano y’amakomomanga amagana ane eyabegetwe igoro y’ebichanga ebio, chindwaro ibere ase kera egesure kiarenge igoro ye chisiiro, erinde ensemo y’ebisure biria yatambeete etubwe." 
1Kings7:43 Naende akaroisia ebibekerero bi’ebituba amo nebituba ikomi biaterekereireo," 
1Kings7:44 na egetuba ekenene ekemo amo nemegwekano ye chiombe ikomi na ibere ekabekwa inse y’egetuba keria," 
1Kings7:45 ne chindogio, na ebichiko, na ebitaabo. Ebinto ebio bionsi biaatoire nigo biare ebibekerero bi’enyomba y’Omonene, Hiramu aroisereretie omoruoti Sulemani. Bionsi nigo biaroisetigwe korwa ase chitaai chisibirie buya." 
1Kings7:46 Ebinto ebio omoruoti akabibomba korwa ase etaai enyititoire, ime ase esike ebombire agwo egati ya Sukoti na Saretani ase Riranya ria Yorodan." 
1Kings7:47 Sulemani agatiga korenga ebinto ebi bionsi, ekiagera biarenge ebinge mono. Oborito bw’etaai eria tibwamanyekanete buna bwang’ana." 
1Kings7:48 Boigo Sulemani akaroisia ebinto binde bionsi biare kobekwa ase enyomba y’Omonene; egesasimero gi’etahabu, na emesa y’etahabu ase emegati yare koruegwa ase Nyasae yare kobekwa." 
1Kings7:49 Ebibekerero bie chitaya bitano biare kobekwa ensemo y’okorio, na bitano ensemo y’okobee, bosio bw’Aase Aachenu Mono; na emegwekano y’ebisicha, ne chitaya, amo nebinachi biakorire korwa ase chitahabu." 
1Kings7:50 Naende akaroisia chisani ne chigami, na ebitaabo bi’ogosambera ubani, ne chindogio chi’okorenta omorero, ne chimbata chi’ebisieri bi’akanyomba ka ime, Aase Aachenu Mono, na echi’ebisieri bie Hekalu enyene. Ebinto ebio bionsi nigo biaroisetigwe korwa ase chitahabu chichenire." 
1Kings7:51 Naboigo emeremo eye yonsi omoruoti Sulemani akorete ase enyomba y’Omonene ekaera. Na Sulemani agasoyia aroro ebinto ebi Daudi ise aatananete koba ebichenu: chifeta, ne chitahabu, na ebikorero; akabigacha ase chikungo chi’enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Kings8:1 Sulemani agasangereria amo abagaaka b’Abaisraeli, na abatang’ani bonsi b’ebisaku biabo, na baria qarenge abaraai be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, bache ase obosio bwaye agwo Yerusalemu, erinde bagende Sayoni, Omochie o Daudi, kwoyia Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene." 
1Kings8:2 Igo Abaisraeli bonsi bagacha ase omoruoti Sulemani ase Amatuko Amanene ase omotienyi bw’Etanimu, noro omotienyi o gatano na kabere." 
1Kings8:3 Ekero abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli bachete, abakuani bakaimokia Esanduku y’Omonene," 
1Kings8:4 bakayerenta amo n’Eema y’Omosangererekano na ebikorero bionsi ebichenu biarenge ime ase Eema eria. Abakuani na Abalawi nabwo barentete ebinto ebio. 
1Kings8:5 Omoruoti Sulemani amo nomoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, baria basangererekanete amo nere bagatenena bosio bw’Esanduku eria, bakaruera aroro ebing’wanso bie ching’ondi ne chiombe chinyinge mono chitaare konyara kobareka." 
1Kings8:6 Erio abakuani bakarenta Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene, bakayesoyia aase aye ase akanyomba ka ime, agwo Aase Aachenu Mono, bakayebeka inse ye chimbaba chi’abakerubi." 
1Kings8:7 Abakerubi abwo nigo baramborete chimbaba chiabo igoro y’aase aria Esanduku eria yarenge, bagatuba Esanduku eria amo nemiaro yaye yare kobogorerigwa." 
1Kings8:8 Emiaro eria nigo yarenge emetambe, ne chinsinyo chiabo chikarorekana korwa Aase Aachenu ase oyo oteneine bosio bw’Aase Aachenu Mono, korende tiyarenge kororekana korwa isiko; nero nao ere agwo goika rero iga." 
1Kings8:9 Egento kende ekeao tikiarenge ime ase Esanduku eria, otatiga chibao chiria ibere chi’amagena, chiria Musa abegete imeo, agwo Horebu ase Omonene akorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania n’Abaisraeli ekero barwete ase ense ya Misiri." 
1Kings8:10 Ekero abakuani barenge gosoka korwa ase Aase Aachenu, riire rigaichora enyomba y’Omonene," 
1Kings8:11 na igo abakuani tibarenge konyara kogenderera nobokoreri bwabo ase engencho ye riire riria, ekiagera obonene bw’Omonene bwaichorete ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Kings8:12 Erio Sulemani akabora, “Omonene obekire erioba igoro, korende otebire ng’a narigetie komenya ase omosunte ekerima." 
1Kings8:13 Bono nakoagacheire enyomba ebe obomenyo bwao, aase oramenye kogenderera botambe.”" 
1Kings8:14 Erio omoruoti akeonchora akarigereria abanto, agasesenia omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli ekero oteneine," 
1Kings8:15 agateba, “Atogigwe Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ere oyoikeranirie nokoboko kwaye aya arierete Daudi tata eira nomonwa oye, ogoteba:" 
1Kings8:16 Korwa rituko riria nang’anyetie abanto baane Abaisraeli korwa Misiri, tinachorete omochie onde bwonsi ase egati y’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli agwo ase nare koagacha enyomba, erinde erieta riane ribe aroro, korende nachorete Daudi agambere abanto baane Abaisraeli.”" 
1Kings8:17 Naende Sulemani agateba, “Igo kwarenge okogania gwa Daudi tata koagachera erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, enyomba." 
1Kings8:18 Korende Omonene akamotebia: Buna kwarengereretie koagachera erieta riane enyomba, nigo gwakorete buya, okabeka amang’ana ayio ime ase enkoro yao." 
1Kings8:19 Korende nonya naboigo, aye tokonyara koagacha enyomba eyio, otatiga omwana oo omomura oria oraiborwe korwa ase enda yao, nere oraagachere erieta riane enyomba." 
1Kings8:20 “Bono Omonene oikeranirie eira eria ariete, ekiagera inche natenenire ribaga ria Daudi tata, na ngoikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli, buna Omonene ariete eira, naende naagacheire erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, enyomba." 
1Kings8:21 Naende aroro agwo naroisirie aase Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene ekobeera. Okobwatana koria Omonene akorete ne chisokoro chiaito, ekero aching’anyetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
1Kings8:22 Erio Sulemani agatenena bosio bw’egesasimero ki’Omonene ase obosio bw’omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, akarambora amaboko aye gochia igoro," 
1Kings8:23 agakwana, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, Nyasae ande tari akogwekaine, igoro nonya ninse aa ase ense, aye bweka nigo okorenda okobwatana kw’ogotianania, naende nigo okoorokia obwanchani botari koera ase abasomba bao baria bare abegenwa asore ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi." 
1Kings8:24 Aye gwaikeranirie eira eria kwarierete omosomba oo Daudi tata. Aria gwakwanete nomonwa oo kwayaikeranirie nokoboko kwao rituko ria rero. 
1Kings8:25 Ase ayio aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ikerania bono aya kwarierete omosomba oo Daudi tata eira, ogateba; Takobora nonya ng’ake omonto korwa ase ororeria rwao oraikaranse ase obosio bwane ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti ki’Abaisraeli, onye abana bao bagochia korenda chinchera chiabo, erinde babwatie chinchera chiane, buna aye gwachibwatetie." 
1Kings8:26 Ase ayio, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, tiga ring’ana riao riria gwatebetie omosomba oo Daudi tata riikeranigwe." 
1Kings8:27 “Inee! Nekeene ng’a aye Nyasae nonyare komenya aa ase ense eye? Rora, igoro na igoro aare mono tekogoisana omenye, naki rende enyomba eye inche nakoagacheire eragoisane?" 
1Kings8:28 Korende aye Omonene, Nyasae one, koranche oigwe ogosaba kwane inche omosomba oo, na okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo, na oigwe ekerero na ogosaba oko inche omosomba oo nkogosaba bono iga." 
1Kings8:29 Tiga amaiso ao arigererie enyomba eye obotuko na omobaso aase aiga aye gwatebete igoro yaye: Erieta riane naribeere aroro. Ase ayio oigwe ogosaba oko inche, omosomba oo, ngosaba ndigereretie aase aiga." 
1Kings8:30 Naende aye oigwe okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo inche, omosomba oo, na okw’abanto bao Abaisraeli ekero bagosaba barigereretie aase aiga. Ee, oigwe aye korwa igoro ase obomenyo bwao bore, na ekero okoigwa bwabere." 
1Kings8:31 “Omonto karakorere omonto onde bobe na aborigwe koria emuma, erio achiche arie emuma eria bosio bw’egesasimero kiao ase enyomba eye," 
1Kings8:32 aye oigwe korwa agwo igoro, okore ogokora kwao, onachere abasomba bao ekina kia boronge. Tiga oria ore omomochi abogorie egesusuro gi’okomocha kwaye, na oria ore omoronge aegwe oboronge bwaye." 
1Kings8:33 “Ekero abanto bao Abaisraeli barabe babuirwe nababisa babo, ekiagera bakorire ebibe asore korende bagokoiranera naende na gotogia erieta riao, na ase enyomba eye bakogosaba na gokoboria ase oboitongo," 
1Kings8:34 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro. Bwabere ebibe bi’abanto bao Abaisraeli, naende obarente gocha ase ense eye kwaete chisokoro chiabo." 
1Kings8:35 “Ekero igoro erabe esiekire na embura tetwa, ekiagera bakorire ebibe asore, kobarasabe barigereretie aase aiga, naende batogie erieta riao na baonchoke batige ebibe biabo, ekero aye orabae egesusuro," 
1Kings8:36 rirorio aye oigwe korwa agwo igoro. Bwabere ebibe bi’abasomba bao Abaisraeli, okoborokereria enchera engiya bagwenerete kobwatia. Naende otwerie ense yao embura, ense eria kwaeire abanto bao ekaba omwando obo." 
1Kings8:37 “Kerabe enchara erache ase ense, gose oborwaire obobe bogoita, gose oborwaire bw’enyagetabo ase chindagera, gose obw’ogochirigisia, gose chingige, gose amakonde, gose ababisa bakoboera ase omochie onde bwonsi ase emechie yabo, gose obobe bonde bwonsi, gose oborwaire bonde bwonsi," 
1Kings8:38 oigwe ogosaba kwabo. Omonto onde bwensi, gose abanto bao bonsi Abaisraeli kobaragosabe na gokoboria ase oboitongo, kera oyomo omanyete emechando ere ase enkoro yaye, naende barambore amaboko abo gochia ase enyomba eye," 
1Kings8:39 obaigwe korwa agwo igoro ase obomenyo bwao bore. Bwabere, okore ogokora kwao, okorere kera oyomo koreng’ana nogokora kwaye, (ekiagera naye bweka omanyete chinkoro chia mwanyabanto bonsi,)" 
1Kings8:40 erinde banyare gokoiroka amatuko onsi bamenyete ase ense eria kwaete chisokoro chiaito. 
1Kings8:41 “Boigo onye omogeni korwa ase ense y’aare, oria otari bw’abanto bao Abaisraeli, okoigwa chinkuma chi’erieta riao rinene," 
1Kings8:42 (ekiagera abanto inabaigwe igoro y’erieta riao rinene, naende baigwe igoro y’okoboko kwao kore ne chinguru koramboire,) onye omogeni oyio ogocha aa kogosaba origereretie enyomba eye," 
1Kings8:43 oigwe korwa igoro agwo aase obomenyo bwao bore. Okorere omogeni oria amang’ana onsi akoboria, erinde abanto bonsi b’ense bamanye erieta riao, naende bakoiroke buna abanto bao Abaisraeli bakomanyete na bakoirogete, naende bamanye ng’a enyomba eye naagachire nigo ekorokwa ase erieta riao." 
1Kings8:44 “Abanto bao kobaragende ase esegi korwania ababisa babo ase enchera ende yonsi aye orabatome gochia, na kobaragosabe aye Omonene barigereretie omochie oyio gwachorire, na enyomba eye naagacheire erieta riao," 
1Kings8:45 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro ogosaba kwabo, na okoboria kwabo kw’oboitongo, na obae oboronge bwabo." 
1Kings8:46 “Omonto tari otagokora ebibe. Ase ayio baise kogokorera ebibe, na aye korabe nendamwamu asebare na kobabeka ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, na abwo baboose na kobaira ase ense y’ababisa ere aare gose ang’e, obaigwe." 
1Kings8:47 Kobararore okomocha kwabo ekero bare ase ense eria boosirwe gochia, beitie na koonchoka, naende bakogosaba ase oboitongo na koorokia ng’a bakorire ebibe na obokayayu, obaigwe." 
1Kings8:48 Onye bagweitia na koonchoka ase ebirengererio biabo bionsi na ase chinkoro chiabo chionsi, ekero bare ase ense eria y’ababisa babo, baria baboosete, na aroro bagosabe barigereretie gochia ase ense yabo, eria kwaete chisokoro chiabo, na barigererie omochie oyo gwachorire na enyomba eye naagachire ase ogosasima erieta riao," 
1Kings8:49 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro ase obomenyo bwao bore ogosaba kwabo na okoboria kwabo kw’oboitongo, obae oboronge bwabo." 
1Kings8:50 Bwabere abanto bao bakorire ebibe asore. Bwabere ogosaria kwabo gwonsi bakorire asore; okore ababisa babo, abwo baboosire babarorere amabeebe." 
1Kings8:51 Abanto aba nabanto bao, na omwando oo, oria kwarusetie korwa Misiri, ense eria yarenge buna eriko ri’ekebemberi ki’omorero." 
1Kings8:52 “Tiga amaiso ao abe atorigereretie namabera, inche omosomba oo amo nabanto bao Abaisraeli, otoigwe ekero kende gionsi togokorangeria ase oboitongo." 
1Kings8:53 Aye Omonene Nyasae, nigo kwabaatananete korwa ase egati y’abanto bonsi b’ense babe omwando oo, buna gwatebete goetera ase Musa, omosomba oo, ekero keria kwarusetie chisokoro chiaito korwa Misiri.”" 
1Kings8:54 Bono ekero Sulemani akoorete ogosaba oko gwonsi na okoboria Omonene ase oboitongo, akaimoka korwa ase egesasimero ki’Omonene aase atung’amete namaru aye inse oramborete amaboko aye gochia igoro," 
1Kings8:55 agatenena agasesenia omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, agakwana neriogi rinene, akabora," 
1Kings8:56 “Atogigwe Omonene oria oeire abanto baye Abaisraeli obotoereru buna abarierete eira! Nonya ne ring’ana erimo tiriri ritaikeranetigwe ase eira yaye yonsi engiya ariete goetera ase Musa, omosomba oye." 
1Kings8:57 Omonene, Nyasae oito, abe naintwe buna abete ne chisokoro chiaito; tabaisa gototiga gose gotwanga," 
1Kings8:58 korende aonchore chinkoro chiaito gochia asare, tonyare kobwatia chinchera chiaye, na kobwata amachiko aye na emeroberio yaye echikire, na onsi aya achigete chisokoro chiaito." 
1Kings8:59 Amang’ana aya aane nasabire ase oboitongo, tiga Omonene, Nyasae oito, abe okoyainyora omobaso na obotuko, naende ae abanto baye Abaisraeli oboronge bwabo koreng’ana buna okogania gwa kera rituko kore." 
1Kings8:60 Erio abanto b’ense yonsi banyare komanya ng’a Omonene nere Nyasae, naende enyasae ende teri." 
1Kings8:61 Ase ayio, tiga chinkoro chiaino chionsi chibe echi’ekeene ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, mobwatie emeroberio yaye echikire na mobwate amachiko aye buna mwakorire ase rituko ria rero.”" 
1Kings8:62 Erio omoruoti na abanto bonsi amo nere bakarua ekeng’wanso ase obosio bw’Omonene. 
1Kings8:63 Sulemani akarua ebing’wanso bi’omorembe ase Omonene, chiombe chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere, ne chingondi chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo ebere. Naboigo omoruoti amo nabanto bonsi bagaatanana enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Kings8:64 Ase rituko riria omoruoti agaatanana na gochena obogati‐gati bw’eraaro eria yarenge bosio bw’enyomba y’Omonene. Agwo nao aruerete ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebitinya bi’ebing’wanso bi’omorembe, ekiagera egesasimero gi’etaai ekiarenge ase obosio bw’Omonene nigo kiarenge egeke mono, tikiare goisana koira ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebitinya bi’ebing’wanso bi’omorembe." 
1Kings8:65 Ase ayio Sulemani amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi mbabwate Amatuko Amanene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, naende ase amatuko ande atano na abere, amatuko onsi nikomi na ane. Omosangererekano omonene nigo orenge gosangerereka korwa egesoero kia Hamati goika akarooche ka Misiri." 
1Kings8:66 Ase rituko ria gatano na gatato agatiga abanto bakagenda, na barabwo bagasesenia omoruoti, bakagenda chinka chiabo bare nomogoko na omosasoko ase chinkoro chiabo ase engencho y’obuya bwonsi boria Omonene akorerete Daudi, omosomba oye, na Abaisraeli, abanto baye." 
1Kings9:1 Ekero Sulemani konya akoorire koagacha enyomba y’Omonene, na enyomba y’oboruoti, na aande onsi ase anchete koagacha," 
1Kings9:2 Omonene akamoorokera eria kabere buna amoorokerete agwo Gibeoni ritang’ani. 
1Kings9:3 Omonene akamotebia, “Naigure ogosaba kwao na okoboria kwao kw’oboitongo. Naatananire na gochena enyomba eye kwaagachire, nabekire erieta riane ribe aroro kare na kare. Amaiso aane na enkoro yane mbibe aroro ase chingaki chionsi." 
1Kings9:4 Korabwatie chinchera chiane, buna Daudi iso achibwatetie, ase enkoro endonge na ase obwegenwa; na onye kogokora onsi aya nagochikire, na kobwata emeroberio yonsi echikire;" 
1Kings9:5 rirorio inche ninkong’ie ekerogo kiao ki’oboruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli kare na kare, buna narierete Daudi iso eira, ngateba: Takobora nonya ng’ake korwa ase ororeria rwao omonto oraikaranse ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti ki’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings9:6 Korende inwe na abanto be chinderia chiaino komoreonchore na montige, naende timorenda amachiko aane na emeroberio yane nabaeire, korende mogende gokorera chinyasae chinde na gochisasima," 
1Kings9:7 rirorio ninsirie Abaisraeli korwa ase ense eria nabaeire, na enyomba eye naatananire na koyechena ase engencho y’erieta riane ninyetige, tinkoyerigereria namaiso aane. Abaisraeli nababe omorabaaro ne ring’ana rigokwanwa nabanto b’ebisaku bionsi." 
1Kings9:8 Enyomba eye nebe rituuri riatagokire, na kera omonto ogoeta aase agwo naichanigwe na gokumia, na ekero monto onde akoboria: Nase ki Omonene akorire aya iga ase ense eye na ase enyomba eye?" 
1Kings9:9 Nigo barairanerie: Nekiagera barabwo batigete Omonene, Nyasae obo, oria orusetie chisokoro chiabo korwa ase ense ya Misiri, naende bakabwatana ne chinyasae ching’ao, bagachisasima na gochikorera. Amang’ana ayio agerire Omonene orentire amabe aya onsi igoro asebare.”" 
1Kings9:10 Sulemani akaira emiaka emerongo ebere ase okoagacha chinyomba chiria ibere, enyomba y’Omonene na ey’oboruoti." 
1Kings9:11 Hiramu, omoruoti o Turo, konya oeire Sulemani chibao chi’emecharake, na echi’emetarakwa, amo ne chitahabu ase ekerengo aganetie. Nyuma y’ayio omoruoti Sulemani akaa Hiramu emechie emerongo ebere yarenge ase ense ya Galili." 
1Kings9:12 Korende ekero Hiramu achete korwa Turo korora emechie eria, tiyamogogetie." 
1Kings9:13 Akabora, “Emechie eye kwang’eire, oyominto, naki ere?” Ase eyio igo ekorokwa ense ya Kabuli goika rero iga." 
1Kings9:14 Hiramu konya otomeire omoruoti chitahabu chikiro chilifu inye (4,000)." 
1Kings9:15 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’emeremo Sulemani abetereretie abanto bakore: Akababeka koagacha enyomba y’Omonene, na enyomba yaye omonyene, na Milo, na orwaki rwaetanaine Yerusalemu, na emechie ya Hasori, na Megido, na Geseri," 
1Kings9:16 (Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, konya ochire korwania Geseri na koyosakora, naende akayosamba nomorero. Agaita abanto ba Kanani baria bamenyete aroro, na koyorua buna ekeegwa ki’ogosokia omoiseke oye abe moga Sulemani." 
1Kings9:17 Bono Sulemani akaagacha Geseri naende). Boigo akaagacha Beti‐Horoni ya maate," 
1Kings9:18 na Baalati, na Tamari ore ase erooro, ase ense eria," 
1Kings9:19 na emechie yonsi ye chikungo, eria Sulemani abwate, na emechie ye chigari chiaye, na eye chibarasi, na oboagacho bonde bwonsi Sulemani aganetie koagacha agwo Yerusalemu, na agwo Lebanoni na ase ense yonsi y’oboruoti bwaye." 
1Kings9:20 Abanto aba Sulemani abetereretie gokora emeremo, nigo barenge abe chinderia chi’abanto b’ense ya Kanani, abwo Abaisraeli batanyarete kobua na gosiria kegima. Abanto abwo tibarenge Abaisraeli. Nigo barenge Abaamori, na Abahiti, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi. Abanto abwo bakagenderera koba abasomba, nabo bare goika rero iga." 
1Kings9:21  
1Kings9:22 Korende Sulemani takorete Abaisraeli bakaba abasomba. Barabwo nigo barenge abarwani b’esegi, na abakonyi b’oboruoti, na abachiki baye b’abarwani, na abatang’ani b’abarwani, na abachiki baye be chigari ne chibarasi chikoriinwa." 
1Kings9:23 Abateneneri abanene igoro y’emeremo ya Sulemani nigo barenge abanto amagana atano, na emerongo etano; abwo nigo batenenerete abanto barenge gokora emeremo eria." 
1Kings9:24 Korende mosubati o Farao akarua ase Omochie o Daudi, agatiira gochia komenya ase enyomba yaye eria Sulemani konya amoagacheire; nyuma y’ayio Sulemani akaagacha Milo." 
1Kings9:25 Ara gatato ase omwaka Sulemani nigo arenge korua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebing’wanso bi’omorembe ase egesasimero keria aagacherete Omonene. Boigo aba ogosamba ubani ase Omonene. Ase igo agakoora emeremo y’okoagacha enyomba y’Omonene. 
1Kings9:26 Omoruoti Sulemani akaroisia chimeeri agwo Esioni‐Geberi ere ang’e na Eloti, ase omosomo bw’Enyancha Embariri, ase ense ya Edomu." 
1Kings9:27 Hiramu agatoma abanto baye baria bamanyete emeremo ye chinyancha, bagasang’ana nabanto ba Sulemani." 
1Kings9:28 Barabwo bakagenda goika Ofiri, bakarenta korwa aroro chitahabu, chikiro chilifu ikomi na inye, na amagana atano (14,500), bakairera omoruoti Sulemani." 
1Kings10:1 Ekero eting’ana ya Seba aigwete chinkuma chia Sulemani igoro y’ayio akorete ase engencho y’erieta ri’Omonene, agacha komoteema ase okomoboria amang’ana amakong’u." 
1Kings10:2 Agacha Yerusalemu amo nabasomba baye abange barenge kogenda komo; boigo nabwate chingamia chiabogoretie ebinsari ne chitahabu chinyinge mono, na amagena e rigori rinene. Na ekero aigete ase Sulemani, akamotebia amang’ana onsi arenge ase ebirengererio biaye." 
1Kings10:3 Sulemani akamoiraneria amaborio aye onsi; nonya ne ring’ana erimo tiriabisekanete ase omoruoti, igo amanyete onsi na komoyorokia." 
1Kings10:4 Na ekero eting’ana eria ya Seba akoorire korora obong’aini bwonsi bwa Sulemani, na enyomba eria aagachete," 
1Kings10:5 na endagera yarenge korentwa ase emesa yaye, na buna abakonyi baye bamenyete, na buna abasomba baye baare komokorera, ne chianga chiabo babegete, na buna ababogoria babogoretie ebikombe, naende akarora buna omoruoti arenge gosamba ebing’wanso biaye ase enyomba y’Omonene, agakumia na koumata." 
1Kings10:6 Eting’ana eria egatebia omoruoti, “Chinkuma nabeire nkoigwa ekero narenge ase ense yane igoro y’emeremo yao, na obong’aini bwao, nechi’ekeene bori." 
1Kings10:7 Korende tinegenete amang’ana ayio nare koigwa goika ekero nachicha aa na kwerorera namaiso aane inche omonyene. Bono narorire ng’a tinatebetigwe nonya nekeng’ese ki’amang’ana aya. Obong’aini bwao, na obotenenku bwao biaetanirie amang’ana konya nkoigwa." 
1Kings10:8 Abanto bao na abasomba bao aba bagotenena botambe ase obosio bwao na obong’aini bwao, mbare negesio ekenene." 
1Kings10:9 Omonene, Nyasae oo, atogigwe, oria ogokigwe asore na okobekire ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti ki’Abaisraeli. Ekiagera Omonene anchete Abaisraeli botambe, agakobeka okaba omoruoti, erinde onyare konacha ekeene na oboronge.”" 
1Kings10:10 Erio eting’ana eria akaa omoruoti ebiegwa ebio arentete: Chitahabu chikiro chilifu isano (5,000), na ebinsari ebinge mono, na amagena e rigori rinene. Naende ebinsari tibiarentetwe kero kende gionsi ebinge koreng’ana buna biria eting’ana ya Seba yarenterete omoruoti Sulemani." 
1Kings10:11 Chimeeri chia Hiramu, chiria chiarentete chitahabu korwa Ofiri, chikarenta naende korwa aroro chibao chi’emete ekorokwa alumugu chinyinge mono, na amagena e rigori rinene." 
1Kings10:12 Korwa ase chibao chi’alumugu omoruoti akaroisia ebinto bi’enyomba y’Omonene, na ebi’enyomba y’omoruoti, naende akaroisia amakano na ebinto binde bikobugigwa nabateri. Chibao chi’emete buna eyio tichiana kororekana naende nonya ng’ake ase ense eye." 
1Kings10:13 Omoruoti Sulemani akaa eting’ana ya Seba ebinto bionsi aganetie na aboretie aegwe. Amo nebinto ebio Sulemani akamoa ebinto binde ebinge buna omoruoti anarete korua ebiegwa. Erio eting’ana eria akairana, akagenda ase ense yaye amo nabasomba baye." 
1Kings10:14 Etahabu yare korentwa ase Sulemani kera omwaka nigo yarenge goetania chikiro chilifu emerongo ebere na isato (23,000)." 
1Kings10:15 Boigo chitahabu chikarentwa korwa ase abaonchoreria b’ebinto, na baria barenge korenta ebinto korwa ase chinse chia isiko, na korwa ase abaruoti bonsi b’Arabia na abagambi bande barenge goakana ebango ase omoruoti." 
1Kings10:16 Omoruoti Sulemani akagoncha ching’aya amagana abere, agachiooma ne chitahabu chisunyuntire, na kera eng’aya nigo yarenge koira chitahabu chikiro isato na ekeng’ese." 
1Kings10:17 Naende akagoncha chinguba amagana atato agachiooma ne chitahabu chisunyuntire, na kera enguba nigo yarenge koira chitahabu ang’e chikiro ibere. Omoruoti agachibeka ime ase Enyomba ye Rinani ria Lebanoni." 
1Kings10:18 Omoruoti akaroisia ekerogo ki’oboruoti, akagechabera amaino e chinchogu na agakeooma netahabu echenire." 
1Kings10:19 Ekerogo keria ki’oboruoti nigo kiabwate ekeriinero kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na ekemo; ensemo ya nyuma ekerogo keria nigo kiamurumuntire igoro. Kera ensemo y’ekerogo mbiarengeo ebisiirero ase arenge gotoorera amaboko, na emegwekano ye chindo ebere yatenenirieo, oyomo ase kera ensemo." 
1Kings10:20 Na emegwekano ye chindo ikomi na ebere yatenenirie aroro, oyomo ase kera ensemo ya kera egetambokero. Omogwekano bw’ekerogo buna ekio tona koroisigwa ase obogambi bonde bwonsi." 
1Kings10:21 Ebikombe bionsi bi’okonywera bi’omoruoti Sulemani nigo biarenge ebie chitahabu, na ebikorero bionsi bi’Enyomba ye Rinani ria Lebanoni nigo biarenge bie chitahabu chichenire; binde tibiarenge bie chifeta. Ase amatuko a Sulemani efeta tiyabarire ng’a negento kie rigori." 
1Kings10:22 Omoruoti nabwate chimeeri chiaye chia Tarisisi chiarenge goeta chinyancha amo ne chimeeri chia Hiramu. Ara rimo ase emiaka etato chimeeri chia Tarisisi nigo chiarenge gocha chiarenta chitahabu ne chifeta, na amaino e chinchogu, ne chingoge amo ne chinyoni chi’ebieni ebiya." 
1Kings10:23 Ase igo omoruoti Sulemani akaba omonene kobua abaruoti bonsi b’ense ase obonda na obong’aini. 
1Kings10:24 Abanto korwa ase chinse chionsi bagacha ase Sulemani, erinde baigwe obong’aini boria Nyasae abegete ime yaye." 
1Kings10:25 Kera oyomo obo akaba okorenta ebiegwa biaye, ebinto bie chifeta, na ebie chitahabu, ne chianga, na ebirwanero, na ebinsari, ne chibarasi, ne chiyombo, ebinto ebinge mono, omwaka ase omwaka." 
1Kings10:26 Omoruoti Sulemani agasangereria amo chigari ne chibarasi chikoriinwa; nigo abwate chigari elifu eyemo, na amagana ane (1,400) ne chibarasi chikoriinwa chilifu ikomi na ibere (12,000). Echinde ase echio nigo chiabegetwe ase emechie ye chigari, ne chinde chikabekwa Yerusalemu ang’e ase omoruoti amenyete." 
1Kings10:27 Omoruoti akarenta chifeta chinyinge agwo Yerusalemu, chikabucha buna amagena, ne chibao chi’emecharake chiarenge chinyinge buna echi’emeko yarenge ase ense omweya." 
1Kings10:28 Sulemani nigo arenge korenterwa chibarasi korwa Misiri na Kue; na abaonchoreria baye igo barenge gochirenta korwa agwo ase ogoakana rigori gete. 
1Kings10:29 Kera egari yarenge korentwa korwa Misiri nigo yarenge goakanerwa rigori rie chisekeli chie chifeta amagana atano na rimo, na ebarasi nigo yarenge goakanerwa chisekeli rigana erimo, na emerongo etano. Na goetera ase abaonchoreria b’omoruoti abaruoti bonsi b’Abahiti na ab’Abasiiria nigo barenge kogora chigari ne chibarasi." 
1Kings11:1 Omoruoti Sulemani nigo anchete abakungu abange b’abanto b’ebisaku bitamomanyete Nyasae. Amo nomosubati o Farao naende nigo anchete abakungu b’Abamoabu, na Abaamoni, na Abaedomu, na Abasidoni, na Abahiti," 
1Kings11:2 abanto b’ebisakubiria Omonene akanetie Abaisraeli, akabatebia, “Timobaisa konyuomerana nabarabwo, ekiagera ekeene, nigo baraonchore chinkoro chiaino, erinde mogwe na koonchokera chinyasae chiabo.” Sulemani akabwatana nabarabwo, akabancha." 
1Kings11:3 Igo anyuomete abakungu amagana atano na abere, naende nabwate abakungu ba sere‐sere amagana atato. Abakungu baria baye bakaonchora enkoro yaye, erinde agatiga Omonene." 
1Kings11:4 Ee, ekero Sulemani konya agotire, abakungu baye bakaonchora enkoro yaye gochia ase chinyasae chinde, na ere tabete omwegenwa ase Omonene, Nyasae oye, buna Daudi ise arenge nenkoro y’obwegenwa." 
1Kings11:5 Sulemani igo atunyanete na gokorera Asitaroti, enyasae enkungu y’Abasidoni, na Milikomu, okogechia kw’Abaamoni." 
1Kings11:6 Sulemani agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, tamotunyanete ase obwegenwa, buna Daudi ise arenge gokora." 
1Kings11:7 Moocha ya Yerusalemu Sulemani akaroisia aase aimokererete igoro ase Kemosi, okogechia kw’Abamoabu, na ase Moleki, okogechia kw’Abaamoni, chinyasae chiria, chiarenge agosasimerwa." 
1Kings11:8 Naboigo aroiseretie abakungu baye bonsi baria anyuomete korwa ase ebisaku ebiaao; barabwo bagasamba ubani na bakarua ebing’wanso ase chinyasae chiabo. 
1Kings11:9 Omonene akaba nendamwamu ase Sulemani, ekiagera enkoro yaye yaonchogete korwa asare ere Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oria omoorokerete ara kabere," 
1Kings11:10 naende konya amochikire ase ring’ana erio, ng’a tabaisa gotunyana chinyasae chinde. Korende Sulemani tarenda amang’ana ayio Omonene amochigete." 
1Kings11:11 Ase ayio Omonene agatebia Sulemani, “Ekiagera gwakorire ayio, na tikwabwatete okobwatana kw’ogotianania, gose amachiko aane aya nagochigete, goika ntandorane na ndusie oboruoti korwa asore, imboe omosomba oo." 
1Kings11:12 Korende ase engencho ya Daudi ise tingokora ayio ase amatuko ao, korende nigo ndabotandorane korwa ase okoboko kw’omwana oo." 
1Kings11:13 Nonya naboigo, tinkorusia oboruoti bwonsi korwa ase omwana oo, nimoe egesaku ekemo, ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba one, naende ase engencho ya Yerusalemu, omochie oria nachorete.”" 
1Kings11:14 Omonene akarentera Sulemani omobisa, na omobisa oyio nere Hadadi, omonto bw’enyomba y’oboruoti bwa Edomu." 
1Kings11:15 Ase engaki Daudi arenge agwo Edomu, Yoabu, omochiki bw’emeganda y’esegi, akagenda gotindeka baria baitetwe. Ere na Abaisraeli bonsi barenge komo bagatigara agwo Edomu ase engaki y’emetienyi etano nomo, bagaita na gosiria kegima kera omosacha bw’aroro." 
1Kings11:16  
1Kings11:17 Korende Hadadi agatama gochia Misiri amo nabanto bande b’Edomu, abasomba ba ise. Na ekero keria Hadadi nigo arenge omosae omoke." 
1Kings11:18 Bakarua Midiani, bakagenda bagaika Parani, naende bakagenda amo nabanto bande korwa Parani, bagaika Misiri. Aroro bakagenda ase Farao, omoruoti o Misiri. Ere akamoa enyomba, naende akamochikera endagera arenge koba okonyora botambe; boigo akamoa oboremo." 
1Kings11:19 Hadadi akanyora ogwancherwa okonene ase obosio bwa Farao, na Farao akamonyuomeria mokoyoye, omoiseke omwabo Tapenesi mokaye, oyio orenge eting’ana." 
1Kings11:20 Na omoiseke omwabo Tapenesi akaiborera Hadadi Genubati, omwana omomura. Tapenesi agatacha omwana oyio agwo ase enyomba ya Farao, na Genubati akabeera ase enyomba ya Farao amo nabana abamura ba Farao." 
1Kings11:21 Hadadi, ekero arenge ase ense ya Misiri, akaigwa ng’a Daudi orarire ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, naende ng’a Yoabu, omochiki bw’emeganda y’esegi, nere okure, agatebia Farao, “Ing’a ribaga ngende ase ense yane.”" 
1Kings11:22 Korende Farao akamoboria, “Ngento ki kwaremeirwe aiga asende ekiagera okoboria ribaga ogende ase ense yao?” Hadadi akamoiraneria, “Aye ntiga rioka, ngende.”" 
1Kings11:23 Naende Nyasae akarentera Sulemani omobisa onde, na omobisa oyio nere Resoni, mosinto bw’Eliada, oria konya otamire korwa ase omonene oye Hadadeseri, omoruoti o Soba." 
1Kings11:24 Agwo kare ekero Daudi akoorire ogoita koria okonene ase egati yabo, oyio Resoni agasangereria abanto asare, na akaba omotang’ani bw’ekeombe keria ki’abaomboganu. Barabwo bakagenda Damesiki, bakaba bakogambera abanto b’aroro." 
1Kings11:25 Resoni nigo abete omobisa bw’Abaisraeli ase amatuko onsi aya Sulemani arenge kogamba, agakora ogosaria okonene buna Hadadi akorete; akagechia Abaisraeli, akaba okogambera Abasiiria." 
1Kings11:26 Oyomo bw’abasomba ba Sulemani nigo arenge korokwa Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, Omoefarati o Sereda. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Serua, ere nigo arenge omoboraka. Yeroboamu akaanga koigwera omoruoti." 
1Kings11:27 Aya naro agerete Yeroboamu akaba mamincha y’omoruoti. Sulemani nigo aagachete Milo, na agaticha egetongo kiarenge ase Omochie o Daudi ise." 
1Kings11:28 Omonto oria Yeroboamu nigo arenge omonto ore nomokia mono, na ekero Sulemani amoroche ng’a nigo arenge omokong’u ase emeremo yaye, akamobeka akaba omoteneneri igoro ase emeremo eria abanto b’egesaku kia Yusufu barenge kobetererigwa gokora." 
1Kings11:29 Na ase engaki eria, ekero Yeroboamu agendete isiko korwa Yerusalemu, omobani Ahiya korwa Silo akanyorana nere inchera. Ahiya igo ambarete egetambaa ekeyia; bono abanto aba babere bakaba boka aase aarabu." 
1Kings11:30 Ahiya akabwata egetambaa keria ekeyia ambarete, akagetandora ebing’ese ikomi na bibere," 
1Kings11:31 agatebia Yeroboamu, “Eimokerie aye omonyene ebing’ese ebi ikomi, ekiagera aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atebire: Rora inche igo inde ang’e gotandorana oboruoti mborusie korwa ase okoboko gwa Sulemani, nkoe ebisaku ikomi." 
1Kings11:32 Korende Sulemani ere atware egesaku ekemo, ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba one, na ase engencho ya Yerusalemu, omochie oria nachorete korwa ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings11:33 Aya nigo arakoreke, ekiagera bantigire na basasimire Asitaroti, enyasae enkungu y’Abasidoni, na Kemosi, enyasae y’Abamoabu, na Milikomu, enyasae y’Abaamoni, gose tibabwateti chinchera chiane na tibakorete ayare amaronge ase obosio bwane ase okorenda emeroberio yane echikire na amachiko aane, buna Daudi ise akorete." 
1Kings11:34 Nonya naboigo tinkorusia oboruoti bwonsi korwa ase okoboko gwa Sulemani, korende nimobeke abe omogambi ase engaki y’amatuko aye onsi are moyo. Aya ninkore ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba one, oria nachorete, oria orendete amachiko aane amachenu na emeroberio yane echikire." 
1Kings11:35 Nindusie oboruoti korwa ase okoboko kw’omwana oye; aye noegwe ebisaku ikomi," 
1Kings11:36 korende omwana oye nimoe egesaku ekemo, erio Daudi, omosomba one, botambe atware etaya ekomoreka ase obosio bwane agwo Yerusalemu, omochie nachorire mbeke erieta riane aroro." 
1Kings11:37 Ninkobeke ogambe igoro ase bionsi buna omoyo oo oganetie, naye nobe omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli." 
1Kings11:38 Koranyigwere na okore onsi aya nagochikire na obwatie chinchera chiane, na okore ayare amaronge ase amaiso aane ase okorenda emeroberio yane na amachiko aane buna Daudi, omosomba one, akorete, rirorio nimbe amo naye. Naende ningotenenerie egesaku kegendererete, buna nateneneretie Daudi, ninkobeke ogambere Abaisraeli." 
1Kings11:39 Ase enchera eyio ninchande abanto b’ororeria rwa Daudi, korende tekoba igo kogenderera botambe.”" 
1Kings11:40 Sulemani akarigia goita Yeroboamu, korende Yeroboamu akaimoka, agatama gochia Misiri, ase Sisaki, omoruoti o Misiri, akamenya agwo Misiri goika ekero Sulemani akwete." 
1Kings11:41 Bono amang’ana onsi igoro ya Sulemani, na aya onsi akorete, na obong’aini bwaye bwonsi nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora gwa Sulemani." 
1Kings11:42 Engaki Sulemani agambete agwo Yerusalemu igoro ase Abaisraeli nemiaka emerongo ene. 
1Kings11:43 Erio Sulemani akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase Omochie o Daudi ise, na Rehoboamu, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga ria ise." 
1Kings12:1 Rehoboamu akagenda Sekemu, ekiagera Abaisraeli bonsi konya bachiire aroro komobeka abe omoruoti." 
1Kings12:2 Na ekero Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, aigwete amang’ana ayio, akairana korwa Misiri aaria ase atamete gochia korwa ase omoruoti Sulemani. Abanto bakarangeria Yeroboamu, na ere amo nomosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli bakagenda, bagatebia Rehoboamu," 
1Kings12:3  
1Kings12:4 “Iso igo akorete rikorogoto riaito rikaba ririto. Ase ayio bono aye orikore ribe rigusu, bwororobie emeremo eria emekong’u iso atobekerete, naintwe natogokorere.”" 
1Kings12:5 Rehoboamu akabatebia, “Genda inwe, na nyuma y’amatuko atato moirane gocha aa asende.” Ase ayio abanto bakagenda." 
1Kings12:6 Erio omoruoti Rehoboamu akaboria ogosemia korwa ase abagaaka baria barenge gosemia Sulemani ise, ekero arenge moyo, akababoria, “Ngosemia ki mokong’a, erinde imbairanerie abanto aba?”" 
1Kings12:7 Abagaaka bakamoiraneria, “Onye koganetie gokorera abanto aba bono, oigwe okoboria kwabo na okwane amang’ana amaya asebare, erio barabwo nababe bakogokorera botambe.”" 
1Kings12:8 Korende Rehoboamu akaanga ogosemia kw’abagaaka baria na akarigia ogosemia korwa ase abamura baria bakinete komo, na bono barenge komokorera." 
1Kings12:9 Akababoria, “Ngosemia ki morang’e? Ninki ndairanerie abanto aba bamboretie ng’a inyororobie chigurube chiria tata ababekerete?”" 
1Kings12:10 Abamura baria bakinete komo bakamotebia, “Aya naro oratebie abanto abwo bakoboretie ng’a bwororobie rikorogoto riria iso akorete ririto: Ekiara gi’okoboko kwane nigo kere ekenetu kobua ekebono gia tata." 
1Kings12:11 Na bono rikorogoto riria rikong’u tata ababekerete, inche nigo ndarimente ribe ririto goetania. Tata nigo arenge kobang’wania ebiranya, korende inche nigo ndabe nkobang’wania ne chinkini chichomire chibonyi mesia.”" 
1Kings12:12 Yeroboamu amo nabanto bonsi bagacha ase Rehoboamu rituko ria gatato, buna omoruoti abatebetie ng’a bakore." 
1Kings12:13 Omoruoti akairaneria abanto baria amang’ana ase obotindi, akaanga ogosemia kw’abagaaka baria." 
1Kings12:14 Agakwana nabarabwo buna abamura baria bamosemetie, agateba, “Tata nigo akorete rikorogoto riaino rikaba ririto, korende inche nimbamentere ribe ririto goetania. Tata nigo arenge kobang’wania ebiranya, korende inche nigo ndabang’wanie ne chinkini chichomire chibonyi mesia.”" 
1Kings12:15 Ase ayio omoruoti taigwerete amang’ana ’abanto. Ayio nigo akorekanete n’Omonene, erinde ere anyare goikerania ring’ana riaye riria akwanete ase Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, goetera ase Ahiya, omobani oria korwa Silo." 
1Kings12:16 Ekero Abaisraeli bonsi baroche ng’a omoruoti nigo aangete kobaigwera, bakamoiraneria, bakamotebia, “Ngetari ki intwe tobwate ase Daudi? Titori nomwando na mosinto o Yese. Inwe Abaisraeli, genda kera omonto bwoye! Inwe abanto ba Daudi, erende inwe abanyene!” Ase igo Abaisraeli bakarua aroro agwo, bakagenda ase chinka chiabo." 
1Kings12:17 Rehoboamu agatigwa okogambera Abaisraeli baria bamenyete ase emechie y’Abayuda yoka. 
1Kings12:18 Erio omoruoti Rehoboamu agatoma Adorama, oria otenenerete emeremo y’okobetererigwa, gochia ase Abaisraeli, na barabwo bonsi bakamoaka amagena, agakwa; na Rehoboamu akaimoka bwango, akariina egari yaye, agatama gochia Yerusalemu." 
1Kings12:19 Ase ayio Abaisraeli babeire bare mamincha na gosaria igoro ase enyomba ya Daudi goika rero iga. 
1Kings12:20 Na ekero Abaisraeli bonsi baigwete ng’a Yeroboamu oiranire, bagatoma abanto bamorangerie ache ase omosangererekano, bakamobeka akaba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli. Omonto onde tari otunyanete abanto b’enyomba ya Daudi, otatiga abanto b’egesaku kia Yuda boka." 
1Kings12:21 Ekero Rehoboamu achete Yerusalemu, agasangereria abanto bonsi b’enyomba ya Yuda, na egesaku kia Benjamin, abanto chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na etato, abamanyete korwana esegi, bagende korwania Abaisraeli na bairanie oboruoti ase Rehoboamu, mosinto o Sulemani." 
1Kings12:22 Korende ring’ana ria Nyasae rigacha ase Semaya, omonto o Nyasae,"
