1Kings12:23 rikamotebia, “Tebia Rehoboamu, mosinto o Sulemani, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, otebie nabanto bonsi b’enyomba ya Yuda, na aba eya Benjamin, na abanto bande abatigari ng’a:" 
1Kings12:24 Aya naro Omonene atebire: Inwe timogenda korwania abanto bamino Abaisraeli. Irana kera omonto nka bwoye, ekiagera aya akorekire nigo akoretwe nainche.” Ase ayio abanto bakaigwera ring’ana ri’Omonene, bakairana gochia chinka chiabo, buna abatebetie." 
1Kings12:25 Erio Yeroboamu akaagacha omochie Sekemu ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, akamenya aroro, naende akarua agwo, akagenda akaagacha Penueli." 
1Kings12:26 Yeroboamu akarengereria ase enkoro yaye ime, “Bono oboruoti igo borabaise koirana bogende ase enyomba ya Daudi." 
1Kings12:27 Abanto aba baise kona kogenda korua ebing’wanso ase enyomba y’Omonene agwo Yerusalemu, chinkoro chiabo nigo chiramoiranere omonene obo Rehoboamu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, na kobaramoiranere nigo barang’ite.”" 
1Kings12:28 Ekero omoruoti arengereretie amang’ana ayio, akaroisia korwa ase etahabu emegwekano ebere ye chimori, agatebia abanto, “Igo mogochandeka mono kona kogenda Yerusalemu. Inwe Abaisraeli, rora aiga chinyasae chiaino, echi chiabarusetie ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
1Kings12:29 Akabeka eyemo Beteli na eya kabere agwo Dani. 
1Kings12:30 Egento eke gekagera bagakora ebibe, ekiagera abanto igo bagendete nonya ngoika Dani gosasima enyasae eyemo y’echio." 
1Kings12:31 Naende Yeroboamu akaroisia aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, agachora abakuani korwa ase egati y’abanto bonsi abwo batarenge Abalawi." 
1Kings12:32 Yeroboamu agachika Rituko Rinene ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o gatano na gatato, buna omogwekano bwe Rituko Rinene ase Abayuda. Ase egesasimero agwo Beteli ere omonyene akarua ebing’wanso ase emegwekano eria ye chimori aroisetie. Naende agwo Beteli akabeka abakuani b’aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa konya aroisirie." 
1Kings12:33 Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano, ase omotienyi o gatano na gatato, omotienyi achorete ere omonyene, akagenda ase egesasimero aroisetie, agatwara Rituko Rinene ase Abaisraeli na akariina ase egesasimero gosamba ubani." 
1Kings13:1 Ase ogochika kw’Omonene omonto o Nyasae akarua ase ense ya Yuda. Ere agacha Beteli ekero Yeroboamu ateneine ase egesasimero gosamba ubani. 
1Kings13:2 Na ase ogochika kw’Omonene omonto oria agaaka eriogi, akarera mamincha y’egesasimero, agateba, “Obee! Aye egesasimero, aye egesasimero! Omonene otebire iga: Rora, omwana omomura naiborwe ase enyomba ya Daudi, erieta riaye Yosia; ere nang’wansere igoro yao aye egesasimero, abakuani b’aase aimokererete igoro, baria bagosambera ubani igoro yao na amauga ’abanto nasamberwe igoro yao.”" 
1Kings13:3 Omonto oria o Nyasae akarua ekemanyererio ase rituko riria, agateba, “Eke nakio ekemanyererio Omonene akwanire: Rora, egesasimero eke nagetandoke, ne ribu riria rire igoro yaye riiteke.”" 
1Kings13:4 Ekero omoruoti Yeroboamu aigwete ogokwana okwo kw’omonto oria o Nyasae, koria arentete maminncha y’egesasimero agwo Beteli, akarambora okoboko kwaye korwa ase egesasimero, agateba, “Bwata omonto oyo!” Okoboko koria kwaye aramborete gochia ase omonto oria gokooma pa, goika tanyarete naende gokoringa." 
1Kings13:5 Egesasimero boigo kegatandoka, ne ribu rigaiteka koreng’ana buna ekemanyererio keria giatebetwe nomonto oria o Nyasae ase ogochika kw’Omonene." 
1Kings13:6 Omoruoti agatebia omonto oria o Nyasae, “Sorora Omonene na onsabere inyore ogwancherwa, erinde okoboko kwane kogwene.” Na omonto oria o Nyasae agasorora Omonene, na okoboko kw’omoruoti gokaba buna kwarenge ritang’ani." 
1Kings13:7 Erio omoruoti agatebia omonto oria o Nyasae, “Inchuo togende nyomba mwane, otimokere aroro, onyore chinguru naende, nainche ninkoe ekeegwa.”" 
1Kings13:8 Omonto oria o Nyasae akairaneria omoruoti, “Noisa kong’a ekeng’ese ki’obotenenku bwao, tinkogenda amo naye, gose tinkoria endagera gose konywa amache aase aiga." 
1Kings13:9 Naboigo nachikwa n’Omonene goetera ase ring’ana riaye. Ere agantebia: Tobaisa koria endagera ende yonsi, gose konywa amache, gose tobaisa koiranera ase enchera eria gwachiereteo.”" 
1Kings13:10 Ase ayio agaetera enchera eng’ao, tairanera ase enchera eria acherete agwo Beteli." 
1Kings13:11 Narenge omobani omogotu oyomo omenyete agwo Beteli. Abana baye abamura bagacha, bakamotebia amang’ana onsi omonto oria o Nyasae akorete ase rituko riria agwo Beteli, bakamotebia na amang’ana akwanete nomoruoti." 
1Kings13:12 Ise abamura baria akababoria “Nchera ki agenda?” Na abamura baye bakamworokia enchera omonto oria o Nyasae orwete ense ya Yuda agendete. 
1Kings13:13 Omobani oria omogotu agatebia abamura baye, “Imbekere etigere egeikaransero.” Erio bakabekera etigere egeikaransero, na omobani oria akariina etigere eria," 
1Kings13:14 akabwatia omonto oria o Nyasae, akamonyora oikaransete inse y’omote onga buna omotontera, akamoboria, “Naye omonto oria o Nyasae ochicha korwa ense ya Yuda?” Omoto oria akairaneria, “Ee, ninche.”" 
1Kings13:15 Omobani oria omogotu agatebia omonto oria o Nyasae, “Inchuo togende nka bwone, torie endagera.”" 
1Kings13:16 Korende omobani oria orwete ense ya Yuda akamoiraneria, “Tinkoirana amo naye, gose tingwancha ondoisie nyomba mwao; tinkoria endagera amo naye gose konywa amache aase aiga." 
1Kings13:17 Naboigo nachikwa n’Omonene goetera ase ring’ana riaye, agantebia: Tobaisa koria endagera gose konywa amache aase aria, gose tobaisa koirana enchera gwachiereteo.”" 
1Kings13:18 Omobani oria omogotu akamotebia, “Nainche igo inde omobani buna aye, na omomalaika nigo achigetwe n’Omonene agantebia: Genda omoiranie ache amo naye goika nyomba mwao, arie endagera na konywa amache.” Korende igo amotebetie oborimo." 
1Kings13:19 Ase ayio omonto oria o Nyasae akairana amo nomobani oria omogotu, akaria endagera na konywa amache ase enyomba yaye." 
1Kings13:20 Na ekero barenge baikaransete ase emesa, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase omobani oria omogotu, oria omoiranetie;" 
1Kings13:21 ere agaaka eriogi, akarera ase omonto oria o Nyasae orwete ense ya Yuda, akabora, “Omonene otebire ng’a kwangire koigwera ring’ana riaye, naende torendeti ogochika koria Omonene, Nyasae oo, agochigete." 
1Kings13:22 Ribaga ri’ayio kwairanire, naende kwarire endagera na kwanyure amache aase aiga. Aya Omonene agokanetie ng’a tokora igo. Ekiagera gwakorire igo, omobere oo gokwete tokonyara kobekwa ase chimbeera chie chisokoro chiao.”" 
1Kings13:23 Ekero omobani oria omogotu akoorire koria na konywa, akabekera etigere egeikaransero ase omobani oria airanetie araikaranse." 
1Kings13:24 Na ekero omobani oria orwete ense ya Yuda arenge ase orogendo inchera, akaumerana nendo, ero ekamoita agakwa. Omobere oye ogatugutwa ase enchera, na etigere na endo chigatenena mbarabare ase omobere oria." 
1Kings13:25 Abanto bagaeta aase aria, bakarora omobere otugutire ase enchera, na endo eteneine mbarabare ase omobere oria. Barabwo bakagenda bagateba amang’ana ayio ase abanto b’omochie, agwo ase omobani oria omogotu amenyete." 
1Kings13:26 Na ekero omobani oria omoiranetie korwa inchera, aigwete amang’ana ayio, agateba, “Oyio nomonto oria o Nyasae bwangete koigwera ring’ana ri’Omonene; ase ayio, n’Omonene omorua ase endo, nero yamotandoire na komoita, koreng’ana buna Omonene amotebetie.”" 
1Kings13:27 Erio agatebia abamura baye, “Imbekere etigere egeikaransero.” Nabarabwo bagakora bo." 
1Kings13:28 Ere akagenda, akanyora omobere otugutire ase enchera, na etigere na endo chiteneine mbarabare ase omobere oria. Endo tiyariete omobere oria, gose tiyaitete etigere eria, gose koyetandora." 
1Kings13:29 Omobani oria akaimokia omobere oria bw’omonto o Nyasae, akayobeka ase etigere igoro, erio akayoirania gochia ase omochie oye omonyene, akamoreera na akamotindeka." 
1Kings13:30 Ere akabeka omobere oria ase embeera yaye omonyene, na barabwo bakamoreera, na kera oyomo agateba, “Obee! Momura ominto!”" 
1Kings13:31 Ekero akoorire komotindeka agatebia abamura baye, “Ekero nainche ndakwe, montindeke ime ase embeera eyio ase omonto o Nyasae atindekire; mwarerie amauga aane mbarabare ase amauga aye." 
1Kings13:32 Ekeene, amang’ana aria araretie buna achigetwe n’Omonene, agasoera egesasimero agwo Beteli, naende agasoera aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa aria ase emechie ya Samaria, goika aikeranigwe.”" 
1Kings13:33 Nonya ayio onsi abete, Yeroboamu taonchogete korwa ase chinchera chiaye chimbe, korende akagenderera kobeka abakuani b’aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa korwa ase egati y’abanto bande bonsi. Omonto onde bwensi arigetie, nigo amwatananete koba omokuani bw’aase aria aimokererete igoro." 
1Kings13:34 Amang’ana ayio nigo abete ebibe ase enyomba ya Yeroboamu, na akagera ekanachwa na egasirigwa kegima korwa ase ense." 
1Kings14:1 Ase engaki eria Abiya, omomura o Yeroboamu akarwara." 
1Kings14:2 Ase ayio Yeroboamu agatebia mokaye, “Imoka, bwekone ase ogwetuba, erinde tomanyekana ng’a aye moka Yeroboamu; ogende Silo. Ahiya omobani nao akare, oria ontebetie ng’a nimbe omoruoti igoro ase abanto aba." 
1Kings14:3 Oire amo naye emegati ikomi, na amaandasi, na obooke egetono ekemo, ogende asare; ere nagotebie egento kegochia gokororekana ase omwana.”" 
1Kings14:4 Moka Yeroboamu akaimoka akagenda Silo, agacha ase enyomba y’Ahiya. Bono Ahiya tarenge korora, ekiagera amaiso aye konya oukoire ase engencho y’obogotu." 
1Kings14:5 Omonene agakwana n’Ahiya, akamotebia, “Rora, moka Yeroboamu ngocha are gokoboria amanye igoro y’omwana oye ore omorwaire. Aya na aya naro oramotebie.” Ekero omokungu oria achete asare agekora buna omokungu omoao." 
1Kings14:6 Korende ekero Ahiya aigwete eriogi ri’amagoro aye agotitiria, na ekero omokungu oria arenge gocha ase egesieri, Ahiya akamotebia, “Inchuo soa nyomba, aye moka Yeroboamu! Nase ki ogwekora koba buna omokungu omoao? Nachikirwe kogotebia amang’ana amakong’u." 
1Kings14:7 Genda otebie Yeroboamu: Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Nakoimokereretie igoro korwa ase egati y’abanto, naende ngakobeka okaba omoraai bw’abanto baane Abaisraeli." 
1Kings14:8 Naende ngatandorana oboruoti, nkaborusia korwa ase enyomba ya Daudi, ngakoboa aye, korende aye tobeti buna Daudi, omosomba one arenge, oria orendete amachiko aane, na agantunyana nenkoro yaye yonsi. Ere agakora onsi ayare amaronge ase amaiso aane." 
1Kings14:9 Korende aye gwakorire ayare amabe goetania baria bonsi bagotang’anerete. Naende gwekoreire chinyasae ching’ao, na kweroiseirie emegwekano enyititoire na kobombwa, na igo kwangechirie goika nabeire nendamwamu kwangire na konyeba." 
1Kings14:10 Ase ayio, rora, nindete obobe igoro ase enyomba yao aye Yeroboamu, ninsirie kegima kera omonto omosacha korwa ase enyomba yao, abasomba amo nabatari abasomba, ase egati y’Abaisraeli. Ninsirie kegima enyomba yao aye Yeroboamu, buna omonto akwabusa obonyira bwarua, kegima." 
1Kings14:11 Omonto onde bwensi bw’enyomba ya Yeroboamu orakwere ase omochie ime, chisese nachimorie, na onde bwensi orakwere isiko aarabu, chinyoni chia igoro nachimorie, ekiagera Omonene nere okwanire ring’ana eri." 
1Kings14:12 “Ase ayio, genda nka bwoo. Ekero amagoro ao agosoa ase omochie omwana oria nakwe." 
1Kings14:13 Abaisraeli bonsi mbamoreere na komotindeka. Omwana oria bweka ase eamate ya Yeroboamu, nere oratindekwe ase embeera ime, ekiagera asere oyio Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ororire egento kiamogokirie korwa ase enyomba ya Yeroboamu." 
1Kings14:14 Korende Omonene nechorere omoruoti oragambere Abaisraeli, na omoruoti oyio nasirie kegima enyomba ya Yeroboamu, na ayio nakoreke korwa bono." 
1Kings14:15 Omonene naake Abaisraeli abanyegerie buna egetonto gekonyegerigwa ime ase amache, nabasimore barue ase ense eye engiya aete chisokoro chiabo, abasiarere gochia ng’umbu y’Eufarati, ekiagera barabwo bakorire emete y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, na igo bagechirie Omonene obeire nendamwamu." 
1Kings14:16 Ere natige Abaisraeli ase engencho y’ebibe ebi Yeroboamu akorete, akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe.”" 
1Kings14:17 Erio moka Yeroboamu akaimoka, akagenda Tirisa, na ekero agotamboka omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri ki’enyomba omwana oria agakwa." 
1Kings14:18 Na Abaisraeli bonsi bakamotindeka na komoreera, koreng’ana buna ring’ana riria Omonene akwanete goetera ase omobani Ahiya, omosomba oye." 
1Kings14:19 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Yeroboamu akorete, buna arwanete chisegi, na buna agambete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings14:20 Yeroboamu akaba okogamba ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere, na ebere. Erio akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, na Nadabu, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings14:21 Bono Rehoboamu, mosinto o Sulemani, akagambera Abayuda. Ekero achagete kogamba konya okoorire emiaka emerongo ene nomo, akaba okogamba ase engaki y’emiaka ikomi, na etano na ebere, agwo Yerusalemu, omochie oria Omonene achorete korwa ase egati y’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, erinde abeke erieta riaye aroro. Ng’ina Rehoboamu nigo arenge korokwa Naama, omosubati bw’Abaamoni." 
1Kings14:22 Abayuda bagakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, bakagera akaba nendamwamu ase engencho y’ebibe biabo bakorete ebinge goetania ebi bionsi chisokoro chiabo chiakorete." 
1Kings14:23 Barabwo bakeagachera aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, ne chisiiro, na emete y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, igoro ase ebigoro bionsi na inse ya kera omote omobese." 
1Kings14:24 Mbarenge aroro ase ense eria abasacha abanyaka bakarigania ase obosooku. Abanto abwo bagakora okogechia konde gwonsi okwo abanto b’ebisaku biria Omonene aseretie korwa ase Abaisraeli barenge gokora. 
1Kings14:25 Ase omwaka o gatano bw’okogamba kwa Rehoboamu, Sisaki, omoruoti o Misiri, agacha, akarwania Yerusalemu." 
1Kings14:26 Akaira chikungo chionsi chi’enyomba y’Omonene na echi’enyomba y’omoruoti, akaira kera egento. Boigo akaira chinguba chionsi chi’etahabu, chiria Sulemani aroisetie." 
1Kings14:27 Erio Rehoboamu omoruoti akagoncha chinguba chi’etaai ribaga rie chinguba chiria chi’etahabu, agachibeka ase amaboko ’abanene b’oborendi, baria barenge korenda egesieri ki’enyomba y’omoruoti." 
1Kings14:28 Botambe ekero omoruoti arenge gosoa ase enyomba y’Omonene, abarendi nigo barenge gochibogoria, naende bachiirania ase enyomba y’oborendi." 
1Kings14:29 Na bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Rehoboamu, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings14:30 Esegi nigo yagendererete botambe ase egati ya Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu. 
1Kings14:31 Rehoboamu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa aase chiatindegetwe, ase omochie o Daudi. Ng’ina Rehoboamu nigo arenge korokwa Naama, omosubati bw’Abaamoni. Abiyamu, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings15:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, Abiyamu agachaka kogambera Abayuda," 
1Kings15:2 akaba okogamba ase engaki y’emiaka etato agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Maaka, omosubati bw’Abisalomu." 
1Kings15:3 Abiyamu akabwatia chingencho chia ise ase ogokora ebibe, na tarenge nobwegenwa bw’enkoro ase Omonene, Nyasae oye, buna Daudi, sokororia yaye arenge." 
1Kings15:4 Korende nonya naboigo, ase engencho ya Daudi Omonene, Nyasae oye, akamoa etaya agwo Yerusalemu ase ogotenenia omwana oye agambe, naende agakong’ia Yerusalemu." 
1Kings15:5 Aya igo akoregete, ekiagera Daudi nigo akorete ayare amaronge ase obosio bw’Omonene, na ase obogima bwaye bwonsi, tamochete gokora kende gionsi Omonene amochigete, otatiga ase amang’ana a Uria Omohiti oka amochete." 
1Kings15:6 Esegi nigo yagendererete koba egati ya Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu ase obogima bwonsi bwa Rehoboamu. 
1Kings15:7 Amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Abiyamu, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda. Na esegi nigo yarenge ase egati y’Abiyamu na Yeroboamu." 
1Kings15:8 Abiyamu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete agatindekwa ase Omochie o Daudi, na Asa, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings15:9 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere bw’okogamba kwa Yeroboamu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Asa agachaka kogambera Abayuda." 
1Kings15:10 Ere akaba okogamba ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, nomo, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina Asa nigo are korokwa Maaka, mosubati bw’Abisalomu." 
1Kings15:11 Asa agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, buna Daudi, sokororia yaye, akorete." 
1Kings15:12 Agasiria korwa ase ense eria abasacha baria abanyaka barenge korigania ase obosooku, naende akarusia aroro emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, eria chisokoro chiaye chiaroisetie." 
1Kings15:13 Boigo Asa akarusia Maaka ng’ina taba eting’ana, ekiagera nabwate omogwekano orenge okogechia oroiseretigwe Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, akabutora na akaiyeria inse omogwekano oria ng’ina abwate, akayosambera agwo ase akarooche ga Kidironi." 
1Kings15:14 Korende aase aimokererete igoro tarusetigweo. Nonya naboigo, ase obogima bwaye bwonsi Asa nigo arenge nenkoro y’obwegenwa ase Omonene." 
1Kings15:15 Akarenta ase enyomba y’Omonene ebiegwa ebi ise na ere omonyene baatananete bikaba ebichenu, chifeta, ne chitahabu, na ebikorero." 
1Kings15:16 Esegi nigo yagendererete koba egati y’Asa na Baasa, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, ase amatuko abo onsi." 
1Kings15:17 Baasa, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akagenda korwania Abayuda, akagitera omochie o Rama chindwaki, ng’a nario ribaga ritabaisa gotoka ase omonto onde bwensi gosoka gose gosoa kogenda ase Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
1Kings15:18 Erio Asa akarusia chifeta chionsi, ne chitahabu chionsi, echio chiatigarete ase chikungo chi’enyomba y’Omonene, na echi’enyomba y’omoruoti, agachibeka ase amaboko ’abasomba baye. Erio agatoma ebinto ebio gochia ase Damesiki ase Beni‐Hadadi, mosinto o Tabirimoni, o Hesioni, omoruoti o Siiria, amenyete, agateba," 
1Kings15:19 “Tiga okobwatana kw’ogotianania kobe ase egati yane naye, buna kwarenge ase egati ya tata na iso. Rora nagotomeire ekeegwa gie chifeta ne chitahabu. Genda osarie okobwatana okwo kwao gwakorete na Baasa, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, erinde arue ase ense yane antigane.”" 
1Kings15:20 Beni‐Hadadi akaigwera Asa omoruoti, agatoma abatang’ani b’abarwani baye, bakagenda bakarwania emechie y’Abaisraeli, bakabua Iyoni na Dani, na Abeli‐Beti‐Maaka, na Kinereti, yonsi, amo nense yonsi ya Nafutali." 
1Kings15:21 Na ekero Baasa aigwete amang’ana ayio, agatiga kogitera omochie o Rama, akagenda komenya agwo Tirisa." 
1Kings15:22 Erio omoruoti Asa akarua okoraria ase Abayuda bonsi, nonya nomonnto oyomo tatigetwe otakonye koira amagena a Rama, amo ne chibao chiarengeo, ebinto ebio bionsi Baasa arenge kogitera omochie oria; na ase ebinto ebio omoruoti Asa akagitera Geba ase orogongo rwa Benjamin amo na Misipa." 
1Kings15:23 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Asa, okobua kwaye na onsi aya akorete na emechie aagachete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda. Korende ekero ki’obogotu bwaye akarwara amagoro." 
1Kings15:24 Asa akarara, ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase omochie o Daudi, sokororia yaye, na Yehosafati, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings15:25 Nadabu, mosinto o Yeroboamu, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli ase omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akagamba ase engaki y’emiaka ebere." 
1Kings15:26 Ere agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, akabwatia chinchera chia ise ase ogokora ebibe ebio bikagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
1Kings15:27 Baasa, mosinto bw’Ahiya, omonto bw’enyomba ya Isakaru, agakora omoroberio bw’ogoita Nadabu, akamoaka, akamoitera agwo Gibetoni, omochie bw’Abafilisti. Nadabu na Abaisraeli bonsi nigo bebisete baboerete Gibetoni." 
1Kings15:28 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, noro Baasa, akamoita, naende akaba okogamba ribaga riaye." 
1Kings15:29 Na obwango boria abete omoruoti, agaita abanto bonsi b’enyomba ya Yeroboamu, tatigaretie nonya nomonto oyomo ore moyo ase abanto baye, korende akabasiria kegima, koreng’ana ne ring’ana riria Omonene akwanete goetera ase omosomba oye Ahiya, omonto korwa Silo." 
1Kings15:30 Aya nigo akoregete ase engencho y’ebibe bia Yeroboamu biria akorete, naende akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe, na ase engencho y’ayio Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, akaba nendamwamu." 
1Kings15:31 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Nadabu, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings15:32 Esegi nigo yagendererete koba egati y’Asa na Baasa, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, ase obogima bwabo bwonsi." 
1Kings15:33 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Baasa, mosinto bw’Ahiya, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli bonsi agwo Tirisa, na akagamba ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere na ene." 
1Kings15:34 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, akabwatia chinchera chia Yeroboamu ase ogokora ebibe ebio bikagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
1Kings16:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yehu, mosinto o Hanani, rigakwana mamincha ya Baasa, rigateba," 
1Kings16:2 “Nigo nakoimokereretie igoro korwa ase orotu, ngakobeka okaba omoraai bw’abanto baane Abaisraeli, na bono aye kwabwatirie chinchera chia Yeroboamu, naende kwagerire abanto baane Abaisraeli bakorire ebibe na bangechirie goika nabeire nendamwamu ase engencho y’ebibe biabo." 
1Kings16:3 Ase ayio ningosirie kegima, aye Baasa amo nabanto b’enyomba yao ebe buna enyomba ya Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati." 
1Kings16:4 Omonto onde bwensi ore bw’enyomba ya Baasa orakwere ase omochie ime, chisese nachimorie, na onde bwensi orakwere isiko aarabu, chinyoni chia igoro nachimorie.”" 
1Kings16:5 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Baasa, na aya onsi akorete, na okobua kwaye, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings16:6 Baasa akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete agatindekwa agwo Tirisa, na Ela omwana oye omomura akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings16:7 Naboigo ring’ana ri’Omonene rikarentwa nomobani Yehu, mosinto o Hanani, igoro ya Baasa na abanto b’enyomba yaye, ase engencho y’amabe onsi akorete ase amaiso ’Omonene. Omonene akagechigwa goika akaba nendamwamu ase engencho y’ayio onsi Baasa akorete ase okoba buna abanto b’enyomba ya Yeroboamu; boigo ekiagera asiretie abanto abwo." 
1Kings16:8 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere na etano nomo bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Ela, mosinto o Baasa, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli agwo Tirisa, akagamba emiaka ebere." 
1Kings16:9 Korende omosomba oye Simuri, omochiki bw’ekeng’ese gie chigari chiaye, agakora omoroberio bw’okomoita. Ekero Ela arenge agwo Tirisa okonywa na gotinda ase enyomba y’Arisa, oria otenenerete enyomba y’oboruoti aroro," 
1Kings16:10 Simuri agasoa nyomba, akamoaka, akamoiyeria inse na komoita. Ayio igo akorete ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere, na etano na ebere, bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda. Nyuma y’ayio Simuri akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings16:11 Ekero achagete kogamba, ase obwango boria ere ebegete omonyene goikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti, agaita abanto bonsi b’enyomba ya Baasa, tatigaretie omonto omosacha nonya noyomo ase eamate yaye gose ase abasani baye." 
1Kings16:12 Ase ayio Simuri agasiria kegima enyomba yonsi ya Baasa, koreng’ana buna ring’ana riria Omonene akwanete mamincha ya Baasa goetera ase Yehu omobani." 
1Kings16:13 Ayio nigo akoregete ase engencho y’ebibe bionsi bia Baasa, na ebia Ela, omwana oye. Barabwo bakagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe bikagechia Omonene bw’Abaisraeli, erinde akaba nendamwamu ase engencho y’emegwekano yabo bagosasima." 
1Kings16:14 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Ela, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ime ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings16:15 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere, na etano na ebere, bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Simuri akagamba ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere agwo Tirisa. Emeganda y’esegi egatoora korwania Gibetoni, omochie bw’Abafilisti." 
1Kings16:16 Abanto baria batoorete aria bakaigwa ng’a Simuri okorire omoroberio bw’ogoita omoruoti. Ase ayio, ekero Abaisraeli bonsi barenge ase egetwori ase rituko riria bakabeka Omuri, omochiki bw’emeganda y’esegi, akaba omoruoti obo." 
1Kings16:17 Bono Omuri akaimoka korwa Gibetoni amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi, bakagenda koboera Tirisa." 
1Kings16:18 Ekero Simuri aroche ng’a omochie obwatirwe, agasoa ase eburi y’enyomba y’omoruoti, agasamba enyomba y’omoruoti, na Simuri omonyene agesamberao." 
1Kings16:19 Ayio igo akoregete ase engencho y’ebibe akorete ase obosio bw’Omonene, ase okobwatia chinchera chia Yeroboamu, na ase ebibe akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
1Kings16:20 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Simuri, na omoroberio bw’ogoita akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings16:21 Bono Abaisraeli bagaatananeka chinsemo ibere, ekeng’ese ki’abanto bagatunyana Tibuni, mosinto o Ginati, baganetie komobeka abe omoruoti, na ekeng’ese kende bagatunyana Omuri." 
1Kings16:22 Abanto abatunyanete Omuri bakabua abanto batunyanete Tibuni, mosinto o Ginati; na ekero Tibuni akure, Omuri akaba omoruoti." 
1Kings16:23 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato nomo bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Omuri agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli, akagamba emiaka ikomi na ebere; akagamba agwo Tirisa ase engaki y’emiaka etano nomo." 
1Kings16:24 Akagora egetunwa gia Samaria korwa ase Semeri ase rigori rie chitalanta ibere chie chifeta, akaagacha omochie igoro yaye, akayogitera chindwaki, akaroka omochie oria aagachete Samaria, erieta ria Semeri, oyio orenge omonyene egetunwa keria." 
1Kings16:25 Omuri agakora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, agakora amabe goetania baria barengeo ritang’ani riaye." 
1Kings16:26 Ere nigo abwatetie chinchera chia Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, agakora ebibe buna ebiaye, boigo akagera Abaisraeli bakabikora. Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, akagechigwa, akaba nendamwamu ase engencho y’emegwekano yabo bagosasima." 
1Kings16:27 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Omuri akorete, na okobua okwo aorogetie, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings16:28 Omuri akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete agatindekwa agwo Samaria, na Ahabu, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings16:29 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba gw’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Ahabu, mosinto bw’Omuri, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli, agwo Samaria; ere akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere na ebere." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabu, mosinto bw’Omuri, agakora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene goetania bonsi abamotang’anerete." 
1Kings16:31 Ere akarora ng’a namang’ana amagusu kobwatia chingencho chia Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, na agakora ebibe buna ebiaye; amo nayio akanyuoma Yesebeli, omoiseke bw’Etabali, omoruoti bw’Abasidoni. Boigo agakorera enyasae Baali na koyesasima." 
1Kings16:32 Agatenenia egesasimero kia Baali ime ase enyomba ya Baali, eria aagachete agwo Samaria." 
1Kings16:33 Ahabu akaroisia omote bw’Asera, enyasae enkungu; agakora bobe mono goetania abaruoti bonsi baria bamotang’anerete, akagechia Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, goika akaba nendamwamu." 
1Kings16:34 Ase amatuko ’okogamba kwaye, Hieli o Beteli akaagacha Yeriko. Ekero abegete oboroso bw’omochie oyio, Abiiramu omwana oye omomura omotangi, agakwa; naende ekero atenenetie ebiita, Segubu, omwana oye omomura omokogoti, agakwa. Ayio igo akoregete koreng’ana ne ring’ana ri’Omonene, riria riakwanetwe na Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni." 
1Kings17:1 Elija, Omotisibi, omomenyi okorwa Gileadi, agatebia Ahabu, “Ekeene, buna Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, are moyo, ere oria ase obosio bwaye nteneine, riime gose embura tibikoba ase emiaka eye, otatiga ase ring’ana riane rioka.”" 
1Kings17:2 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Elija, rikamotebia," 
1Kings17:3 “Karue aase aiga, oonchoke gochia moocha, bwebise aroro ase akarooche ga Keriti, akwo kare moocha ya Yorodan." 
1Kings17:4 Nonywe amache korwa ase akarooche karia, inche nachikire ebigonkoru bikorentere endagera aroro.”" 
1Kings17:5 Ase ayio Elija akagenda, agakora buna ring’ana ri’Omonene riamochigete; akagenda akamenya agwo ase akarooche ga Keriti, moocha ya Yorodan." 
1Kings17:6 Ebigonkoru biria bikaba bikomorentera omogati na enyama, mambia na mogoroba; na Elija akaba okonywa amache korwa ase akarooche karia." 
1Kings17:7 Nyuma y’engaki enke akarooche karia kagakama, ekiagera embura tiyarenge gotwa ase ense." 
1Kings17:8 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Elija rikamotebia," 
1Kings17:9 “Imoka, ogende goika Sarefata, omochie o Sidoni omenye aroro. Rora nachikire omokungu omoboraka aroro orakoragerie.”" 
1Kings17:10 Ase ayio, akaimoka, akagenda Sarefata. Ekero aigete ang’e negeita ki’omochie, akarora omokungu omoboraka narengeo ogochora chinko. Elija akamorangeria, akamotebia, “Koranche ndetere amache make negetoono, inywe.”" 
1Kings17:11 Ekero omokungu oria arenge kogenda korenta amache, akamorangeria naende, akamotebia, “Ondetere negesamunye ki’omogati.”" 
1Kings17:12 Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, akamotebia, “Ekeene, buna Omonene, Nyasae oo, are moyo, timbwati gento kende keroisirie, otatiga mbwate obosie boisaine oroe oromo rwoka bore ekegancha, na amaguta amasinini oka are ase echuba. Bono inche nigo ngochora ebite ebi bike, erinde ndoiserie endagera asende na ase omwana one, erio torie toche tokwe.”" 
1Kings17:13 Elija agatebia omokungu oria, “Toiroka! Genda okore buna gwatebire, korende ritang’ani ondoiserie omogati omoke korwa ase obosio obwo, ondetere, erio nyuma yaye oroisie oyoo na oyo bw’omwana oo," 
1Kings17:14 ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, otebire iga: Obosie bore ase ekegancha kiao tibokoera, na amaguta are ase echuba yao takoera, goika rituko riria Omonene aratome embura ase ense.”" 
1Kings17:15 Omokungu oria akagenda, agakora buna Elija amotebetie, na omokungu oria, na Elija, na abanto bonsi b’enyomba y’omokungu oria bakaba bakonyora endagera eisaine ase amatuko amange." 
1Kings17:16 Obosie bwarenge ase ekegancha keria tibwaerete, gose amaguta arenge ase echuba eria taerete, koreng’ana buna ring’ana ri’Omonene, riria riakwanetwe n’Elija." 
1Kings17:17 Nyuma y’ayio omwana omomura bw’omokungu oria omoboraka, omwarigania bw’Elija, akarwara. Oborwaire bw’omwana oria bokaba obonene goika bokamoita," 
1Kings17:18 Omokungu oria agatebia Elija, “Aye omonto o Nyasae, mbobe ki obwate asende? Igo gwacha asende, erinde ebibe biane biinyorwe na okarenta ogokwa ase omwana one?”" 
1Kings17:19 Elija agatebia omokungu oria, “Renta omwana oyio oo asende.” Akaimokia omwana oria korwa ase egekuba kiaye, akamoira goika ase akanyomba ka irongo ase amenyete, akaareria omwana oria ase oborere bwaye." 
1Kings17:20 Erio akarera ase Omonene, akabora, “Omonene, Nyasae one, Inee, aye nigo kwarentire amaakwa igoro ase omokungu oyo omoboraka, imenyete mwaye, ase ogoita omwana oye?" 
1Kings17:21 Erio akaramamera omwana oria ara gatato, naende akarera ase Omonene,” “Aye Omonene Nyasae one, tiga obomoyo bw’omwana oyo bomoiranere naende.”" 
1Kings17:22 Omonene akaigwa ogosaba kw’Elija, na obomoyo bw’omwana oria bokamoiranera, ere agacha moyo." 
1Kings17:23 Elija akabogoria omwana oria, agatirimboka nere korwa ase akanyomba ka irongo, akamorenta enyomba ya inse, erio akamomoa ng’ina, akamotebia, “Rora omwana oo moyo are.”" 
1Kings17:24 Omokungu oria agatebia Elija, “Bono namanyire ng’a aye nomonto o Nyasae, naende ng’a ring’ana ri’Omonene rire ase omonwa oo neri’ekeene.”" 
1Kings18:1 Nyuma y’amatuko amange kaerire, ase omwaka o gatato, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Elija rikamotebia, “Genda bweorokie ase Ahabu, na inche nintome embura etwe igoro ase ense.”" 
1Kings18:2 Ase ayio Elija akagenda kweorokia ase Ahabu. Engaki eria enchara nigo yarenge endoro se agwo Samaria. 
1Kings18:3 Ahabu akarangeria Obadia, oria orenge omoteneneri igoro ase enyomba yaye. (Obadia nigo asigete Omonene mono." 
1Kings18:4 Ekero Yesebeli aitete ababani b’Omonene, Obadia nigo airete ababani rigana erimo, akabaatanana ebiombe bibere, kera ekeombe nigo kiabwate abanto emerongo etano, akababisa ase rikuruma, akaba okobarageria na kobaa amache bakonywa.)" 
1Kings18:5 Ahabu agatebia Obadia, “Togende toete ase ense yonsi na ase chinsoko chi’amache, na ase amagooko onsi; ande nabo torabaise konyora obonyansi, erinde totoorie chibarasi ne chiyombo chibe moyo, na titobaisa gosiria chitugo chinde.”" 
1Kings18:6 Erio bagaatanana ense eria ase egati yabo, bayetaare. Ahabu akagenda ensemo eyemo ere bweka, na Obadia ensemo ende ere bweka." 
1Kings18:7 Ekero Obadia arenge inchera kogenda, rora, Elija akaumerana nere. Obadia akamomanya, agatung’ama inse, akaumama, agateba, “Inee! Oyo naye Elija, omonene one?”" 
1Kings18:8 Elija akamoiraneria, “Ee, ninche. Genda otebie omonene oo ng’a inche Elija nao inde aiga.”" 
1Kings18:9 Obadia akamoiraneria, “Mbibe ki nakorire goika ondue inche, omosomba oo, na okombeka ase okoboko kw’Ahabu, ang’ite?" 
1Kings18:10 Ekeene, buna Omonene, Nyasae oo, are moyo, gesaku kende tikeri, gose oboruoti, aase omonene one ataratoma abanto gochia gokorigia. Na ekero abanto b’aroro baare gokana bagoteba: Ere tari aiga, omoruoti nigo are kobaboria barie emuma y’ogwetiania, ng’a ekeene tibana gokorora." 
1Kings18:11 Na bono aye nigo ogoteba ng’a ngende ntebie omonene one ng’a aye Elija nao ore aiga. 
1Kings18:12 Naende nebe ase obwango ekero narure asore, Omoika bw’Omonene nogotaborie okoire aase inche ntamanyeti. Ekero nagendire gotebia Ahabu, nere ache takonyora, nigo arang’ite, nonya inche, omosomba oo, nabeire inyirogete Omonene korwa obosae bwane." 
1Kings18:13 Inee! Aye omonene one tikwana gotebigwa eke nakorete ekero Yesebeli aitete ababani b’Omonene, buna nabisete ababani b’Omonene rigana erimo ase ebiombe bi’emerongo etano etano ase rikuruma ime, naende nkaba nkobarageria na kobaa amache?" 
1Kings18:14 Na bono aye nigo ogoteba ng’a ngende ntebie omonene one ng’a aye Elija nao ore aiga. Ere nigo arang’ite.” 
1Kings18:15 Elija akairaneria, agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene bw’Emeganda are moyo, oria inche inteneine ase obosio bwaye, rero goika inyeorokie ase Ahabu.”" 
1Kings18:16 Ase igo Obadia akagenda, agatebia Ahabu amang’ana ayio; erio Ahabu akagenda korotota Elija." 
1Kings18:17 Ekero Ahabu aroche Elija, akamoboria, “Inee! Naye oyo gwachandire Abaisraeli?”" 
1Kings18:18 Elija akamoiraneria, “Inche tinchandeti Abaisraeli, korende naye kwabachandire, aye amo nenyomba ya iso, ekiagera mwatigire amachiko ’Omonene na mwabwatirie chinyasae chikorokwa Baali." 
1Kings18:19 Bono toma amang’ana, orangerie Abaisraeli bonsi, erinde baumerane nainche igoro ase egetunwa gia Karimeli. Orangerie na ababani ba Baali amagana ane, na emerongo etano, na ababani b’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, amagana ane, abwo bakoragera amo na Yesebeli.”" 
1Kings18:20 Ase igo Ahabu agatoma abanto bagasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi na ababani bonsi ba Baali amo, agwo ase egetunwa gia Karimeli." 
1Kings18:21 Elija agaika abanto bonsi ang’e, agakwana, “Ngoika ririri mogochia koba ne chitang’utang’u more nebirengererio bire ara kabere? Onye Omonene nere Nyasae, momobwatie, korende onye Baali, mobwatie ere.” Abanto bagakira kiri, tibamoiraneria nonya ne ring’ana erimo." 
1Kings18:22 Erio Elija agatebia abanto, “Inche ninche bweka natigaire omobani bw’Omonene, korende ababani ba Baali namagana ane, na emerongo etano." 
1Kings18:23 Renta chieri ibere motoe. Tiga ababani abwo bechorere eeri eyemo, bayenachane ebitari, babibeke igoro ase chinko, korende tibabaisa gouta omorero aroro. Inche omonyene nindoisie eeri eyio ende, inyebeke igoro ase chinko, korende ting’uta omorero." 
1Kings18:24 Erio mosabe ase erieta ri’enyasae yaino na inche nsabe ase erieta ri’Omonene one; na Nyasae oria oriaranerie ase okorenta omorero, oyio nere Nyasae.” Abanto bonsi bakairaneria, “Ayio naro amang’ana amaya gwakwanire.”" 
1Kings18:25 Erio Elija agatebia ababani ba Baali, “Echorere eeri eyemo, erio moyeroisie ritang’ani, ekiagera inwe nabange more; mosabe ase erieta ri’enyasae yaino, korende timobaisa gouta omorero aroro.”" 
1Kings18:26 Bakaimokia eeri eria baetwe, bakayeroisia, bagasaba Baali ase okorangeria erieta riaye, korwa mambia goika mobaso gati bagaaka eriogi, bagoteba, “Aye Baali, toigwe, toiranerie!” Korende nonya neriogi rioka tiriarengeo, onde tabairaneretie. Bagachara‐charoka goetanana egesasimero keria baagachete." 
1Kings18:27 Bwachia koba mobaso gati, Elija akabachecheria, akabatebia, “Aka eriogi rinene kobua, ekiagera ere nenyasae. Ande nigo akare namang’ana akorengereria, gose ngotimoka akare, gose norogendo akare, gose nigo araire, goika aturwe.”" 
1Kings18:28 Ase ayio bagaaka eriogi rinene, bagekebia emeyio ne chinsara chi’amatimo, buna engencho yabo yarenge, goika amanyinga agacharara korwa ase emebere yabo." 
1Kings18:29 Korigochia kogoroba bakaba bakobaboka goikera omogoroba oyio ekero okoruegwa kw’endagera kware koruegwa, korende riogi tiriaigwetwe, onde tabairaneretie gose kobaigwa." 
1Kings18:30 Erio Elija agatebia abanto bonsi, “Inchuo ang’e asende.” Na abanto bonsi bagacha ang’e asare. Ere akaroisia egesasimero ki’Omonene, keria konya giatagoirwe kiaiyerigwe inse." 
1Kings18:31 Elija akabogoria amagena ikomi na abere, koreng’ana nomobaro bw’ebisaku bi’abamura ba Yakobo, oyio ring’ana ri’Omonene riachete asare rigateba, “Israeli nario rirabe erieta riao.”" 
1Kings18:32 Na ase amagena aria akaagachera egesasimero ase erieta ri’Omonene; naende akarema omotaro goetanana egesasimero keria. Omotaro oria nigo orenge nobogare bware goisana kobusurwa ebiee bibere bie chimbusuro. 
1Kings18:33 Agachoka chinko, akanachana eeri eria ebitari, akabibeka igoro ase chinko. Erio akabatebia, “Ichoria chinyongo inye namache, na moyaumore igoro ase ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na igoro ase chinko.”" 
1Kings18:34 Naende akabatebia, “Kora boigo eria kabere.” Barabwo bagakora boigo eria kabere. Naende akabatebia, “Kora boigo eria gatato.” Barabwo bagakora boigo eria gatato." 
1Kings18:35 Amache akaminyoka agaetanana egesasimero gionsi, na omotaro bwonsi ogaichora amache." 
1Kings18:36 Ase engaki y’okoruegwa gw’ekeng’wanso kia mogoroba, Elija omobani agacha ang’e, agasaba, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Israeli, tiga emanyekane ase rituko ria rero ng’a aye naye Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, naende ng’a inche nigo inde omosomba oo, naende ng’a nigo ngokora amang’ana aya onsi ase ring’ana riao." 
1Kings18:37 Ing’iranerie, aye Omonene, ing’iranerie, erio abanto aba bamanye ng’a naye Omonene ore Nyasae, oranyare koonchora chinkoro chiabo chikoiranere.”" 
1Kings18:38 Erio omorero bw’Omonene okagwa korwa igoro, ogasamba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, ne chinko chiria, na amagena, na amaroba, ogakamia amache aria arenge ase omotaro." 
1Kings18:39 Ekero abanto bonsi baroche ayio, bagatung’ama inse bakaumama, bagateba, “Omonene nere Nyasae! Omonene nere Nyasae!”" 
1Kings18:40 Erio Elija agatebia abanto, “Bwata ababani aba ba Baali, timotiga nonya noyomo atame.” Na abanto bakababwata, na Elija akabatirimbokia gochia ase akarooche ga Kisoni, akabaitera aroro agwo." 
1Kings18:41 Elija agatebia Ahabu, “Imoka, orie na onywe, ekiagera eriogi ri’embura riaigurwe rikogukura.”" 
1Kings18:42 Ase ayio Ahabu akaimoka, akaria na akanywa, korende Elija agatiira gochia ase egetunwa gia Karimeli igoro, agatung’ama inse akaumama, akabeka obosio bwaye gati‐gati y’amaru aye." 
1Kings18:43 Nyuma y’ayio Elija agatebia omosomba oye, “Tiira gochia igoro, origererie gochia ase enyancha.” Omosomba oye agatiira, akarigereria, akamotebia, “Tindochi gento kende.” Ase chintunda isano na ibere Elija akamotebia, “Genda origererie!”" 
1Kings18:44 Na ase entunda ya gatano na kabere omosomba oria agateba, “Narorire riire rike buna egesanyi gi’okoboko kw’omonto rikoimoka korwa ase enyancha.” Erio Elija akamotebia, “Genda otebie Ahabu abeke egari yaye ang’e, atirimboke, embura tebaisa komotanga.”" 
1Kings18:45 Engaki enke egaeta, na amare akamwamia igoro, na omwaga okagusa; embura egatwa enyinge mono. Ahabu akariina egari yaye, akagenda Yesireeli." 
1Kings18:46 Okoboko kw’Omonene gokaba amo n’Elija, ere agesiba ekenema norokini rwaye, akaminyoka agatang’ana bosio bw’Ahabu goika akagenda ase omochie o Yesireeli." 
1Kings19:1 Ahabu agatebia Yesebeli amang’ana onsi Elija akorete, buna aitete ababani bonsi nomoro." 
1Kings19:2 Erio Yesebeli agatoma omonto ase Elija, akamotebia, “Tiga chinyasae ching’e egesusuro ekenene, na goetania ekio, onye ankio ase engaki enga buna eye tingokora obogima bwao bobe buna obw’oyomo bw’abwo gwaitete." 
1Kings19:3 Elija akoboa, akaimoka agatama ase ogotooria obogima bwaye, agaika Beeri‐Seba ase ense ya Yuda. Agatiga omosomba oye aroro," 
1Kings19:4 na ere omonyene akagenda ase erooro orogendo rwe rituko erimo, agaikaransa inse y’omote okorokwa omoretemu, agesabera ng’a akwe, akabora,” “Bono Omonene, aya aisanire, ira obogima bwane, ekiagera inche tindi omuya kobua chisokoro chiane.”" 
1Kings19:5 Ase obotuko obwo Elija akarara inse ase omote oria omoretemu, na aroro omomalaika agacha akamokuna akamotebia, “Boka orie!”" 
1Kings19:6 Ere akarigereria, akarora ang’e nase omotwe oye omogati ogekeire igoro ase omorero bw’amakara na amache are ase egetoono. Akaria na akanywa, erio akarara." 
1Kings19:7 Naende omomalaika oria bw’Omonene agacha eria kabere, akamokuna, akamotebia, “Imoka orie, ekiagera orogendo norotambe okogenda.”" 
1Kings19:8 Elija akaboka, akaria, akanywa, na ase chinguru chi’endagera eyio akayegendera ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, omobaso na obotuko, agaika Horebu, egetunwa kia Nyasae." 
1Kings19:9 Aroro agasoa rikuruma ime, akararao ase obotuko boria. Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asare, rikamoboria, “Elija, ninki ogokora ime aa?”" 
1Kings19:10 Akairaneria, “Nabeire ne risemi asore aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, ekiagera Abaisraeli batigire okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania, batagoire ebisasimero biao, naende baitire ababani bao nemioro. Inche bweka natigaire; na bono nigo bakorigia basirie obogima bwane.”" 
1Kings19:11 Omonene akamotebia, “Soka ogende, otenene ase egetunwa igoro agwo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene!” Erio Omonene agaeta agwo, na omwaga ore ne chinguru ogatandora ebitunwa na gwata amagena ’ebitare agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, korende Omonene tarenge ime ase omwaga oria. Na ekero omwaga oerire, omotengecho bw’ense ogacha, korende Omonene tarenge ase omotengecho oria." 
1Kings19:12 Na ekero omotengecho oerire, omorero ogoka, korende Omonene tarenge ime ase omorero oria, na nyuma y’ayio eriogi rike ri’obotoereru rigacha." 
1Kings19:13 Na ekero Elija aigwete eriogi riria, agatuba obosio bwaye negetambaa kiaye gi’okwambara, agasoka isiko, agatenena ase egesoero kie rikuruma riria; na agwo eriogi rigacha asare, rigakwana, rikamoboria, “Elija, ninki ogokora aiga?”" 
1Kings19:14 Akairaneria, “Nabeire ne risemi asore aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, ekiagera Abaisraeli batigire okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania, batagoire ebisasimero biao, na baitire ababani bao nomoro, na inche bweka natigaire, nabarabwo igo bakorigia obogima bwane babosirie.”" 
1Kings19:15 Omonene akamotebia, “Irana, ogende enchera yao goika ase erooro ya Damesiki; na ekero oraike aroro, oake Hasaeli amaguta, omobeke abe omoruoti igoro y’Abasiiria." 
1Kings19:16 Naende Yehu, mosinto o Nimusi, omoake amaguta, omobeke abe omoruoti igoro y’Abaisraeli; na Elisha, mosinto o Safati, korwa Abeli‐Mehola omoake amaguta, abe omobani ase ribaga riao." 
1Kings19:17 Na onde bwensi oratame atooreke korwa ase omoro bwa Hasaeli naitwe na Yehu; na onde bwensi oratame atooreke korwa ase omoro o Yehu naitwe n’Elisha. 
1Kings19:18 Korende nonya naboigo, nintigare nabanto chilifu isano na ibere b’Abaisraeli bonsi, baria batabegete amaru abo inse ase ogosasima Baali, gose koyenyunyunta.”" 
1Kings19:19 Ase ayio akarua agwo, akagenda akanyora Elisha, mosinto o Safati, okoremia chiombe; ebisangio bie chiombe ikomi na bibere nigo biarenge bosio bwaye. Ere omonyene nigo arenge negesangio gia ikomi na kabere. Elija agaeta agwo, akarutera Elisha egetambaa kiaye ambarete" 
1Kings19:20 Elisha agatiga chiombe chiria, akaminyoka gochia ase Elija, akamotebia, “Tiga ngende konyunyunta tata na baba ase okobatiga, erio nkobwatie.” Elija akamotebia, “Irana ogende, nomanyete aya nagokoreire.”" 
1Kings19:21 Erio agatiga Elija, akairana, akanyenya chiombe chiaye ibere, akaiyeka chinyama ase omorero bw’amakorogoto aria, akaa abanto chinyama chiria, nabarabwo bakaria. Erio akaimoka akabwatia Elija, akaba okomokorera." 
1Kings20:1 Beni‐Hadadi, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, agasangereria abarwani baye b’esegi amo. Abaruoti emerongo etato na babere boigo barenge amo nere, ne chibarasi ne chigari. Barabwo bakagenda bakaboera omochie o Samaria, bakayorwania esegi." 
1Kings20:2 Beni‐Hadadi agatoma abanto gochia ase omochie ase Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akamotebia, “Aya naro inche Beni‐Hadadi ngoteba:" 
1Kings20:3 Chifeta chiao ne chitahabu chiao nechiane; boigo abakungu bao abanyakieni, na abana bao nabaane.”" 
1Kings20:4 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akairaneria, “Buna gwatebire aye omonene one, aye omoruoti, inche noyoo inde, na ebinto bionsi imbwate nebiao.”" 
1Kings20:5 Abanto baria batometwe bakairana naende, bagateba, “Aya naro Beni‐Hadadi agoteba: Natoma amang’ana asore ng’a ong’e chifeta chiao, ne chitahabu chiao, na abakungu bao, na abana bao." 
1Kings20:6 Nonya naboigo, nintome abasomba baane ankio, ase engaki buna eye, bariga‐rigie nyomba mwao, ne chinyomba chi’abasomba bao, erio baire kera egento ekerabagokie.”" 
1Kings20:7 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akarangeria abagaaka bonsi b’ense yaye, akabatebia, “Rora bono buna omonto oyo akorigia korenta emechando, igo atoma abanto, akagania imoe abakungu baane, na abana baane, ne chifeta, ne chitahabu, nainche timorineti.”" 
1Kings20:8 Erio abagaaka na abanto bonsi bakamotebia, “Tobaisa koigwa amang’ana ayio gose koyancha.”" 
1Kings20:9 Ase igo Ahabu agatebia abanto baria Beni‐Hadadi atomete, “Motebie omonene one omoruoti ng’a ayio onsi aganetie ase engaki entang’ani ninyakore, korende aya a nyuma tinkoyakora.” Abanto baria Beni‐Hadadi atomete bakairana, bakamoirera amang’ana ayio." 
1Kings20:10 Beni‐Hadadi agatoma amang’ana asare naende agateba, “Chinyasae ching’e egesusuro ekenene, na goetania, onye orotu rwa Samaria ndogoisana chinsanyi chi’abanto bonsi bagontunyana.”" 
1Kings20:11 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akairaneria, akabora, “Momotebie ng’a oyo okweboyia ebirwanero biaye tabaisa gwetogia buna oyo okobirusia.”" 
1Kings20:12 Ekero Beni‐Hadadi aigwete ring’ana erio, ekero arenge konywa amo nabaruoti bande ase chiema, agatebia abanto baye, “Eroberie!” Barabwo bakeroberia gochia korwania omochie oria." 
1Kings20:13 Na rora, omobani agacha ase Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Inee! Kwarorire omoganda oyo omonene bw’esegi? Rora, ninyobeke ase okoboko kwao ase rituko ria rero; naye nomanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabu akaboria, “Ngoetera ase ng’o?” Omobani oria akamoiraneria, agateba, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ngoetera ase abasomba abamura b’abagambi be chingongo chiabo.” Naende Ahabu akaboria, “Ning’o orachake esegi?” Omobani oria akairaneria, “Naye.”" 
1Kings20:15 Erio Ahabu akaroberia abasomba baria abamura b’abagambi be chingongo, amagana abere, na emerongo etato, na babere (232); naende nyuma y’ayio akaroberia Abaisraeli bonsi, na barabwo nigo barenge chilifu isano na ibere (7,000)." 
1Kings20:16 Mobaso gati, ekero Beni‐Hadadi amo nabaruoti baria emerongo etato na babere barenge komokonya banyure na gotinda agwo ase chiema, Abaisraeli bagachaka esegi." 
1Kings20:17 Abasomba baria abamura b’abagambi be chingongo bakagenda ritang’ani, na Beni‐Hadadi agatoma abatuki b’amang’ana; barabwo bakarenta amang’ana, bakamotebia, “Abanto ngocha bare korwa Samaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Nere akabatebia, “Onye igo bachire nomorembe, mobabwate, mobatige babe moyo; gose onye igo bachire korwana esegi, mobabwate, mobatige babe moyo.”" 
1Kings20:19 Korende abasomba baria abamura b’abagambi be chingongo amo nomoganda bw’esegi okobabwatia bakarua ase omochie, bakagenda," 
1Kings20:20 na kera oyomo orenge goita omobisa oye. Abasiiria bagatama, na Abaisraeli bakababwatia, korende Beni‐Hadadi, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, akariina ebarasi, agatama amo nabanto bande abariini be chibarasi." 
1Kings20:21 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akagenda agaita chibarasi agasaria chigari, agaita n’Abasiiria ase ogoita okonene." 
1Kings20:22 Naende omobani oria agacha ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akamotebia, “Inchuo otimoke onyore chinguru, rengereria mono egento ogwenerete gokora, ekiagera ekero ebimeri bigochaka gosomoria, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria nagochere gokorwania.”" 
1Kings20:23 Abasomba b’omoruoti bw’Abasiiria bakamotebia, “Chinyasae chiabo nigo chire chinyasae chi’ebitunwa, na ase ayio nigo chiaba ne chinguru gotobua; korende togende torwane nabanto abwo ase ense omweya, ekeene, goika tobe ne chinguru kobabua." 
1Kings20:24 Kora iga: Rusia abaruoti, kera oyomo ase emeremo yaye, na ase amabaga abo obeke abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi." 
1Kings20:25 Naende roberia abarwani b’esegi bang’ana buna abwo baitwa, ne chibarasi ne chigari ching’ana buna echio chiasirigwa, erio tobarwanie ase ense omweya; ekeene, goika tobe ne chinguru kobabua.” Omoruoti agancha amang’ana abo, naende agakora buna bamotebetie." 
1Kings20:26 Ekero ebimeri bigochaka gosomoria, Beni‐Hadadi akaroberia Abasiiria, akagenda Afeki korwania Abaisraeli." 
1Kings20:27 Abaisraeli bakaroberigwa na koariganerigwa chindagera, bakagenda korwania Abasiiria. Abaisraeli bagatoora korigererania n’Abasiiria, bakarorekana buna amaicho abere amake e chimbori, korende Abasiiria bagaichora aase aria." 
1Kings20:28 Omonto oria o Nyasae agacha ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Abasiiria batebire ng’a Omonene nigo are enyasae y’ebitunwa, korende tari enyasae y’ense omweya. Ase ayio, nimbeke omoganda oyo omonene bwonsi ase okoboko kwao, naye nomanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
1Kings20:29 Ase igo abarwani bonsi bagatoora bakarigererania ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. Erio ase rituko riria ria gatano na kabere bagachakana esegi, na ase rituko erimo Abaisraeli bagaita abarwani b’Abasiiria abaare gotaara namagoro, chilifu rigana erimo (100,000)." 
1Kings20:30 Abatigari b’Abasiiria bagatama gochia ase omochie o Afeki. Chindwaki chi’omochie oria chikagwera abanto abwo batigarete, chilifu emerongo ebere na isano na ibere (27,000). Beni‐Hadadi boigo agatama, agasoa ase akanyomba ka ime ase omochie." 
1Kings20:31 Abasomba baye bakamotebia, “Bono twaigure ng’a abaruoti b’enyomba y’Abaisraeli nigo bare namabera, tiga tweboyie chianga chie chigunia, na tonaarie chingori ase amagoti aito, erio tosoke, togende ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli; ande nabo arabaise gototiga tobe moyo.”" 
1Kings20:32 Ase ayio bakeboyia chigunia, naende bakanaara chingori ase amagoti abo, erio bakagenda ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, bagateba, “Omosomba oo Beni‐Hadadi nigo agosaba ng’a omotige abe moyo.” Ahabu akabora, “Inee! Nonya mbono moyo are? Ere momura ominto.”" 
1Kings20:33 Abanto baria nigo barenge barigereretie banyore ekemanyererio, na ekero baigwete ring’ana “Oyominto” bakairaneria bwango, “Ee, momura omino Beni‐Hadadi.” Erio omoruoti akabatebia, “Genda momorente!” Beni‐Hadadi agacha ase omoruoti, na omoruoti akamochika ariine egari yaye." 
1Kings20:34 Beni‐Hadadi akamotebia, “Emechie tata airete korwa ase iso ninkoyeiranerie; naye bweroiserie chinchera chi’oboonchoreria agwo Damesiki, buna tata akorete agwo Samaria.” Ahabu akamoiraneria, “Ase amang’ana ayio ningotige ogende.” Erio Ahabu agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nere, akamotiga agende." 
1Kings20:35 Omonto oyomo bw’aborokigwa b’ababani agatebia omogisangio oye ase ogochikwa kw’Omonene, “Nagosabire, ing’ake ong’ite!” Korende omonto oria akaanga komoaka." 
1Kings20:36 Erio omobani oria akamotebia, “Ekiagera kwangire koigwera eriogi ri’Omonene, rora, ase obwango obo okorua aa asende, endo negoite.” Erio kegima, ekero omonto oria aruete asare, akaumerana nendo ekamoita." 
1Kings20:37 Naende omobani oria akanyora omonto onde, akamotebia, “Nagosabire, ing’ake ong’ite?” Omonto oria akamoaka bokong’u, akamoniarora omobere." 
1Kings20:38 Omobani oria akagenda, akaganya omoruoti agwo ase enchera, agetuba negetambaa ase amaiso aye." 
1Kings20:39 Ekero omoruoti arenge goeta ase enchera eria, omobani oria akarera asare, akamotebia, “Inche omosomba oo nagendete ase esegi, na rora, omorwani bw’esegi agacha akarentana omonto asende, agantebia: Renda omonto oyo, aise gosira ase enchera ende yonsi, obogima bwao nabobe ribaga ri’obwaye, gose oakane rigori ri’etalanta eyemo y’efeta." 
1Kings20:40 Na buna inche omosomba oo nabwate emeremo emenge narenge gokora aa na aaria, omonto oria akagenda.” Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akamotebia, “Naboigo okonachwa gw’ekina kiao kerabe; aye omonyene gwakenachire.”" 
1Kings20:41 Erio bwango akarusia egetambaa ase amaiso aye, na omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akamanya ng’a ere noyomo bw’ababani." 
1Kings20:42 Omobani oria agatebia omoruoti, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ekiagera gwatigire omonto orure ase okoboko kwao, oria naruete ase ogosirigwa, bono obogima bwao nabobe ribaga ri’obwaye, na abanto bao nababe ribaga ri’abanto baye.”" 
1Kings20:43 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akagenda bwoye ore nomoichano na obororo bw’endamwamu, agaika Samaria." 
1Kings21:1 Naboti Omoyesireeli nabwate omogondo bw’emesabibu agwo Yesireeli, ang’e nenyomba y’Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abasamaria." 
1Kings21:2 Ahabu agatebia Naboti, “Ing’a omogondo oyo oo bw’emesabibu, erinde nsimeke chinyeni, ekiagera nigo ore ang’e na mwane, nainche ninkoe omogondo onde omuya mono ribaga riaye, gose onye gokorora ng’a mbuya, ninkoe chibesa.”" 
1Kings21:3 Korende Naboti akamotebia, “Tiga Omonene atange amang’ana ayio, timbaisa gokoa omwando one naetwe ne chisokoro chiane.”" 
1Kings21:4 Ahabu akagenda inka bwoye nenkoro y’obororo, naende akagechigwa mono, ekiagera Naboti, Omoyesireeli oria, akanire ng’a takomoa omwando oye aetwe ne chisokoro chiaye. Ahabu akarara borere bwaye, akaonchora obosio bwaye gochia ase enyasi, akaba taria gento." 
1Kings21:5 Korende Yesebeli mokaye agacha asare, akamoboria, “Nase ki enkoro yao ere nomoichano goika nonya nendagera otari koria?”" 
1Kings21:6 Ere akairaneria mokaye, “Nekiagera nakwana na Naboti Omoyesireeli, nkamoteiba ng’a ang’e omogondo oye bw’emesabibu, na inche imoe omogondo onde bw’emesabibu ribaga ri’oyoye, gose onye ogwancha imoe chibesa, korende akaanga, tancha kong’a omogondo oye bw’emesabibu.”" 
1Kings21:7 Yesebeli mokaye akamotebia, “Inee! Naye okogambera Abaisraeli, gose tari aye? Imoka! Orie endagera, tiga enkoro yao ebe nomosasoko; ninkonyorere omogondo bw’emesabibu o Naboti Omoyesireeli.”" 
1Kings21:8 Ase ayio omokungu oria akarika amarube, akabeka erieta ri’Ahabu na ekemanyererio kiaye ase amarube ayio, akayatoma gochia ase abagaaka, na ase abanene baria bamenyete amo na Naboti ase omochie oye." 
1Kings21:9 Omokungu oria akarika ase amarube aria, “Raria okweng’ata gokorwe, na mobeke Naboti ase amasio ’abanto ase okomoa amasikani." 
1Kings21:10 Naende mobeke abanto babere abatagwenereti, bamosoere oborimo, batebe ng’a oragereirie Nyasae na omoruoti. Erio momosokie isiko, momoake amagena goika akwe.”" 
1Kings21:11 Na abanto b’omochie, na abagaaka, na abanene b’omochie oyio, bagakora buna Yesebeli abatebetie. Buna koreng’ana arikire ase amarube aria atomete asebare," 
1Kings21:12 bakararia okweng’ata, na bakabeka Naboti ase amasio ’abanto ase okomoa amasikani." 
1Kings21:13 Abanto babere abatagwenereti bagacha, bagaikaransa kororia asare, bakamosoera ase amasio ’abanto, bagateba, “Naboti oragerere Nyasae na omoruoti.” Ase igo abanto bakamosokia isiko y’omochie, bakamoaka amagena goika agakwa." 
1Kings21:14 Erio bagatoma amang’ana ase Yesebeli, bagateba, “Naboti oakirwe amagena okure.”" 
1Kings21:15 Ase obwango ekero Yesebeli aigwete ng’a Naboti oakirwe amagena okure, agatebia Ahabu, “Imoka, oire omogondo bw’emesabibu o Naboti, Omoyesireeli, oria angete gokoa omoe chibesa, ekiagera bono tari moyo, okure.”" 
1Kings21:16 Erio kegima, ekero Ahabu aigwete ng’a Naboti okure, akaimoka akagenda ase omogondo oria bw’emesabibu o Naboti Omoyesireeli, akayoira okaba oyoye." 
1Kings21:17 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Elija, Omotisibi, rikamotebia," 
1Kings21:18 “Imoka, otirimboke oumerane n’Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, oyio omenyete Samaria. Rora nao are ase omogondo bw’emesabibu o Naboti, agwo ogendire koyoira obe oyoye." 
1Kings21:19 Omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene atebire: Aye nigo gwaita Naboti, naende kwairire omogondo oria obeire oyoo. Naende omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene atebire: Aase agwo chisese chiamenerete amanyinga a Naboti, nao chiramenere nayao.”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabu agatebia Elija, “Inee! Aye omobisa one, nkwanyorire.” Elija akairaneria, “Ee, nakonyorire, ekiagera aye kweoonirie aye omonyene gokora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
1Kings21:21 Rora, inche nindete amabe igoro yao; ningosirie kegima orueo, ninsirie korwa asore Ahabu kera omonto omosacha, omosomba na oyotari omosomba." 
1Kings21:22 Ninkore enyomba yao ebe buna eya Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, naende ebe buna enyomba ya Baasa, mosinto bw’Ahiya, ekiagera kwangechirie goika nabeire nendamwamu, naende kwagerire Abaisraeli bakorire ebibe." 
1Kings21:23 Omonene otebire boigo igoro ya Yesebeli; Chisese inachiriere Yesebeli agwo ase oboremo bwa Yesireeli. 
1Kings21:24 Omonto onde bwensi bw’enyomba y’Ahabu orakwere ase omochie ime, chisese nachimorie; na onde bwensi orakwere isiko aarabu, chinyoni chia igoro nchimorie.”" 
1Kings21:25 Omonto tari nonya noyomo orenge buna Ahabu, ere oyio bweoonetie ere omonyene gokora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekero Yesebeli mokaye amoseegetete." 
1Kings21:26 Agakora kera okogechia ase ogotunyana emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, buna Abaamori bakorete, baria Omonene aseretie korwa ase amasio ’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings21:27 Ekero Ahabu aigwete amang’ana aria, agatandora chianga chiaye, na akeboyia chigunia, na kweng’ata. Akararera chigunia, akaba omokanyeku ore nomoichano." 
1Kings21:28 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Elija, Omotisibi, rigateba," 
1Kings21:29 “Kwarorire buna Ahabu ekanyire ere omonyene, na obeire omoitongo ase obosio bwane? Ekiagera akorire igo, tinkorenta amabe ayio ase amatuko aye, korende nase amatuko ’omwana oye omomura ndarente amabe ayio ase enyomba yaye.”" 
1Kings22:1 Abasiiria na Abaisraeli bakagenderera ase emiaka etato batarenge nesegi barabwo ase barabwo. 
1Kings22:2 Korende ase omwaka o gatato Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akagenda ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings22:3 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agatebia abasomba baye, “Inwe momanyete ng’a Ramoti o Gileadi noyoito. Inee! Naki rende twakirire‐kiri, totarayoirania korwa ase amaboko ’omoruoti bw’Abasiiria?”" 
1Kings22:4 Erio akaboria Yehosafati, “Nogende amo nainche, torwanie Ramoti o Gileadi?” Yehosafati akamoiraneria, “Ee, ningende amo naye, na abanto baane amo nabanto bao, ne chibarasi chiane amo ne chibarasi chiao.”" 
1Kings22:5 Naende akamotebia, “Ritang’ani tiga toborie Omonene igoro y’amang’ana ayio.”" 
1Kings22:6 Erio omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agasangerereria ababani ang’e amagana ane amo, akababoria, “Nkogenda nde korwania Ramoti o Gileadi, gose yaya?” Barabwo bakamoiraneria “Genda, ekiagera Omonene nabeke omochie oyio ase okoboko kwao aye omoruoti.”" 
1Kings22:7 Korende Yehosafati akaboria, “Inee! Omobani onde bw’Omonene tari aiga, tonyare koboria goetera asare?”" 
1Kings22:8 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akairaneria Yehosafati, “Omonto oyomo natigarete toranyare koboria Omonene goetera asare, nere Mikaya, mosinto o Imula, korende inche nigo imogechete, ekiagera ere tari kobana amang’ana amaya igoro yane, korende namabe oka.” Yehosafati akamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, tobaisa gokwana igo.”" 
1Kings22:9 Erio omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akarangeria omosomba oye oyomo, akamochika, “Genda bwango orente Mikaya, mosinto o Imula!”" 
1Kings22:10 Bono omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli na Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, nigo baikaransete ase ebirogo biabo bi’oboruoti agwo ase ekeooreri ang’e negeita gia Samaria, babegete chianga chiabo chi’obonene, na ababani baria bonsi nigo barenge korua obobani bwabo ase amasio ’abaruoti baria." 
1Kings22:11 Zedekia, mosinto o Kenaana, akeroiseria chingunchara chi’ebioma, agakwana, “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Ase chingunchara echi nobetere Abasiiria goika basirigwe kegima.”" 
1Kings22:12 Ababani baria bonsi bakabana amang’ana ayio ayio, bagateba, “Genda Ramoti o Gileadi, noyobue. Omonene nayobeke ase okoboko kwao aye omoruoti.”" 
1Kings22:13 Omonto oria otometwe gochia korangeria Mikaya akagenda akamotebia, “Rora, amang’ana ’ababani bande nigo are ayamo, akoria eira y’egesio ekiya ase omoruoti; tiga ring’ana riao ribe erimo namang’ana abo; naye boigo okwane amang’ana okoria eira y’egesio ekiya ase omoruoti.”" 
1Kings22:14 Korende Mikaya agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, ring’ana Omonene arantebie, nario ndakwane.”" 
1Kings22:15 Ekero achete ase omoruoti, omoruoti akamoboria, “Inee! Mikaya, nkogenda tore korwania Ramoti o Gileadi, gose totige?” Nere akamoiraneria, “Genda, obue! Omonene nabeke Ramoti o Gileadi ase okoboko kwao aye omoruoti.”" 
1Kings22:16 Omoruoti akamotebia, “Ng’ara karenga nkogotebia bwetianie ng’a ontebie ekeene gioka ase erieta ri’Omonene.”" 
1Kings22:17 Mikaya akairaneria, “Narora Abaisraeli bonsi besiarerete igoro y’ebitunwa buna ching’ondi chitabwati omorisia, na Omonene agantebia: Aba tibabwati omoraai obo, tiga kera oyomo airane, agende nka bwoye ore nomorembe.”" 
1Kings22:18 Na omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agatebia Yehosafati, “Tinagotebia ng’a ere takobana amang’ana amaya igoro asende, korende namabe oka?”" 
1Kings22:19 Naende Mikaya akagenderera gokwana, agateba, “Ase ayio, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene. Inarora Omonene oikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, na emeganda yonsi y’abamalaika eteneine ensemo yaye y’okorio na ey’okobee." 
1Kings22:20 Na Omonene akaboria: Ning’o ogochia koebereria Ahabu, erinde agende Ramoti o Gileadi abuerwe aroro? Oyomo agakwana egento ekemo, na oyonde egento kende." 
1Kings22:21 Erio omoika ogacha ogatenena bosio bw’Omonene ogateba: Ninche ndamoebererie. 
1Kings22:22 Omonene akaboria omoika oria: Nase enchera ere naki oramoebererie? Omoika oria okairaneria: Igo nkoimoka ngende, imbe omoika bw’obong’ainereria ase emenwa y’ababani bonsi b’Ahabu. Omonene akayotebia: Genda omoebererie ase enchera eyio. Nobue." 
1Kings22:23 “Ase ayio, rora bono, Omonene obekire omoika bw’obong’ainereria ase omonwa bw’ababani abwo bonsi, ekiagera ochikire ng’a nonyore egesio ekebe.”" 
1Kings22:24 Erio Zedekia, mosinto o Kenaana, agaika ang’e ase Mikaya, akamoaka oroe ase orosea, akamoboria, “Naki omoika bw’Omonene okora orua asende, erinde okwana naye?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaya akamoiraneria, “Aye norore rituko riria oratame na gosoa ase ekenunchi bwebisa.”" 
1Kings22:26 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agateba, “Bwata Mikaya momoiranie ase Amoni omonene bw’omochie na ase Yoashi, omwana bw’omoruoti," 
1Kings22:27 mobatebie ng’a omoruoti otebire: Beka omonto oyio ime ase echela, momong’ate endagera na amache goika ing’irane ase omorembe.”" 
1Kings22:28 Mikaya akamoiraneria, “Onye gokoirana kore nomorembe, rirorio Omonene takwanete goetera asende,” Naende agateba, “Inwe abanto bonsi, igwa amang’ana aya.”" 
1Kings22:29 Bono omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli na Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, bakagenda korwania Ramoti o Gileadi." 
1Kings22:30 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agatebia Yehosafati, “Inche nigo ngwekona ase ogwetuba timanyekana, erio ngende ase esegi, korende aye obeke chianga chiao chi’oboruoti.” Na omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agekona ase ogwetuba tamanyekana, akagenda ase esegi." 
1Kings22:31 Bono omoruoti bw’Abasiiria konya ochikire abateneneri baye emerongo etato, na babere, be chigari, akabatebia, “Timobaisa korwana na monto onde bwensi, abe omoke gose omonene, korende morwane nomoruoti bw’Abaisraeli bweka.”" 
1Kings22:32 Ekero abateneneri be chigari baroche Yehosafati, bagateba, “Ere ekeene nomoruoti bw’Abaisraeli.” Ase ayio bakaonchoka bakarwana nere, na Yehosafati akarera rimo." 
1Kings22:33 Na ekero abateneneri be chigari baroche ng’a ere tarenge omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, bakaonchoka, bagatiga komobwatia." 
1Kings22:34 Korende omonto oyomo akaruta omogwe ase okorengia, akarasa omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli ase ribaga riarenge gati y’engobo y’ekioma ase egekuba kiaye. Erio omoruoti agatebia omogendia bw’egari yaye, “Onchora egari ondusie aa ase esegi, ekiagera narasirwe mono omobere one.”" 
1Kings22:35 Esegi eria ekaba entindi mono ase rituko riria, na omoruoti agatenenigwa na gosiirwa ase egari yaye, origereretie Abasiiria. Rigachia koba mogoroba agakwa, na amanyinga akarua ase orogoma ase abetetwe agaiteka gochia nyaro y’egari." 
1Kings22:36 Na ekero erioba riabeire ang’e kogwa, okoraria gokaigugwa ase abarwani b’esegi, kogateba, “Kera omonto tiga agende ase omochie oye na ase ense yaye!”" 
1Kings22:37 Erio omoruoti agakwa, akairwa Samaria, agatindekwa aroro." 
1Kings22:38 Abanto bagasiberia egari eria agwo ase ritibo ria Samaria, ne chisese chikamena amanyinga aye, na abakungu abatayayi bagesiberia ase ritibo riria, buna Omonene konya akwanire." 
1Kings22:39 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Ahabu, na aya onsi akorete, na enyomba y’amaino e chinchogu eria aagachete, na emechie yonsi eria aagachete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings22:40 Ahabu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, na Ahasia, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings22:41 Yehosafati, mosinto bw’Asa, agachaka kogambera Abayuda ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kw’Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
1Kings22:42 Yehosafati nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etato, na etano, ekero achagete kogamba; ere akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere na etano agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Asuba, mosubati o Silihi." 
1Kings22:43 Yehosafati akabwatia chinchera chionsi chi’Asa ise, taonchogete na gochitiga; agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene. Korende nonya naboigo aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa tatagoretwe, na abanto bakagenderera korua ebing’wanso na gosamba ubani aroro." 
1Kings22:44 Boigo Yehosafati agakora omorembe nomoruoti bw’Abaisraeli. 
1Kings22:45 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Yehosafati akorete, na okobua kwaye aorogetie, naende buna arwanete chisegi, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
1Kings22:46 Agasiria korwa ase ense eria abasacha baria abanyaka barenge korigania ase obosooku, baria batigarete ase amatuko ’Asa." 
1Kings22:47 Omoruoti tarenge agwo Edomu, korende nomokonyi oyomo orenge kogamba ase ribaga ri’omoruoti." 
1Kings22:48 Yehosafati akaroisia chimeeri chia Tarisisi, chiarenge kogenda Ofiri korenta chitahabu, korende tichiagendete, ekiagera chiasarekerete agwo Esioni‐Geberi." 
1Kings22:49 Erio Ahasia, mosinto bw’Ahabu, agatebia Yehosafati, “Tiga abasomba baane bagende amo nabasomba bao ase chimeeri.” Korende Yehosafati akaanga." 
1Kings22:50 Yehosafati akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase chiatindegetwe ase Omochie o Daudi, sokororia yaye; na Yehoramu, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Kings22:51 Ahasia, mosinto bw’Ahabu, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli agwo Samaria ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na kabere bw’okogamba kwa Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda; ere akagambera Abaisraeli emiaka ebere." 
1Kings22:52 Agakora ayare amabe ase amaiso ’Omonene, akabwatia chinchera chia ise, na echia ng’ina, na echia Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, abwo bagerete Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
1Kings22:53 Agakorera Baali, akayesasima, na buna ise akorete, akagechia Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, goika ere akaba nendamwamu." 
2Kings1:1 Nyuma y’ogokwa kw’Ahabu abanto ba Moabu bakaanga koigwera Abaisraeli. 
2Kings1:2 Ahasia omoruoti akagwa goetera ase etirisa korwa ase akanyomba ka irongo k’enyomba yaye agwo Samaria, na akaba orwarete. Ase ayio agatoma abanto, akabatebia, “Genda ase Baali‐Sebubu, enyasae y’Ekironi, moyeborie gose ningwene korwa ase oborwaire obo.”" 
2Kings1:3 Korende omomalaika bw’Omonene agatebia Elija Omotisibi, “Imoka ogende, oumerane nabanto baria omoruoti o Samaria atomire, obaborie: Inee! Nase ki mokogenda koboria Baali‐Sebubu, enyasae y’Ekironi? Nekiagera mokagete ng’a Nyasae tari ase Abaisraeli?" 
2Kings1:4 Ase ayio aya naro Omonene atebire: Aye togoika korwa ase oborere obwo kwariina korende ekeene, goika okwe.” Bono Elija akagenda," 
2Kings1:5 na abanto baria batometwe bakairana gochia ase omoruoti, nere akababoria, “Ninki kiagera mwairana?”" 
2Kings1:6 Barabwo bakairaneria, bakamotebia, “Omonto nachicha oumerana naintwe, ototebia ng’a toirane gocha asore, aye omoruoti gwatotomete, na kogotebia ng’a aya naro Omonene atebire: Nase ki ogotoma koboria Baali‐Sebubu, enyasae y’Ekironi? Nekiagera okagete ng’a Nyasae tari ase Abaisraeli? Ase ayio togoika korwa ase oborere obwo kwariina, korende ekeene, goika okwe.”" 
2Kings1:7 Omoruoti akababoria, “Naki omonto oyio arenge, oyio ochicha oumerana nainwe, na obatebia amang’ana ayio?”" 
2Kings1:8 Bakamoiraneria, “Igo abegete eganchwa eroisirie korwa ase amarionya, na bweboeretie orokini rwe riiyo kenema kiaye.” Omoruoti akabatebia, “Ekeene, oyio n’Elija Omotisibi.”" 
2Kings1:9 Erio omoruoti agatomera Elija omotang’ani bw’abarwani esegi emerongo etano, amo nabarwani baye emerongo etano. Omotang’ani oria akanyora Elija oikaransete ase egechuria ki’egetunwa, akamotebia, “Aye omonto o Nyasae, omoruoti otebire ng’a otirimboke ogende asare.”" 
2Kings1:10 Elija akairaneria omotang’ani oria bw’abarwani esegi emerongo etano, “Onye inche inde omonto o Nyasae, tiga omorero orwe igoro ogosambe na kogosiria, aye amo nabarwani bao emerongo etano.” Erio kegima omorero okarwa igoro, ogasamba omotang’ani oria amo nabarwani baye emerongo etano, okabasiria." 
2Kings1:11 Naende omoruoti agatoma omotang’ani onde bw’abarwani esegi emerongo etano, amo nabarwani baye emerongo etano. Nere agatiira, agatebia Elija, “Aye omonto o Nyasae, omoruoti ochikire ng’a otirimboke bwango, ogende asare.”" 
2Kings1:12 Korende Elija akabairaneria, “Onye inche inde omonto o Nyasae, tiga omorero orwe igoro ogosambe na kogosiria, aye amo nabarwani bao emerongo etano.” Erio omorero okarwa igoro, ogasamba omotang’ani oria amo nabarwani baye emerongo etano, okabasiria." 
2Kings1:13 Naende omoruoti agatoma omotang’ani onde bw’abarwani esegi emerongo etano amo nabarwani baye emerongo etano; nere agatiira, na gaikire aroro agatung’ama inse akaumama ase obosio bw’Elija, akamosorora, akamotebia, “Aye omonto o Nyasae, nagosabire, tiga obogima bwane na obw’abasomba bao aba emerongo etano bobe obw’engencho enene asore." 
2Kings1:14 Rora omorero okarwa igoro ogasamba abatang’ani baria babere b’abarwani emerongo etano, amo nabarwani babo bonsi, korende koranche, tiga obogima bwane bobe obw’engencho enene asore.”" 
2Kings1:15 Erio omomalaika bw’Omonene agatebia Elija, “Tirimboka, ogende amo nere; tobaisa komwoboa.” Erio Elija akaimoka, agatirimboka, akagenda amo nere ase omoruoti." 
2Kings1:16 Elija agatebia omoruoti, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ekiagera aye gwatomire abanto koboria korwa ase Baali‐Sebubu, enyasae y’Ekironi, okarengereria ng’a Nyasae tari ase Abaisraeli okoboria amang’ana, aye togoika korwa ase oborere obwo kwariina, korende ekeene, goika okwe.”" 
2Kings1:17 Ase igo Ahasia agakwa buna Omonene akwanete goetera ase Elija. Ahasia tabwate omwana omomura; ase igo Yoramu akaba omoruoti ase ribaga riaye, ase omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba kwa Yehoramu mosinto o Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
2Kings1:18 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Ahasia, na aya akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings2:1 Ase engaki eria Omonene aganetie koira Elija igoro ase enchera y’ekerambauti, Elija na Elisha nigo barenge ase orogendo rwabo korwa Giligali." 
2Kings2:2 Elija agatebia Elisha, “Aye beera aiga, ekiagera Omonene ontomire ngende Beteli.” Korende Elisha akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, naende buna aye ore moyo, tinkogotiga.” Ase igo bagatirimboka, bakagenda Beteli." 
2Kings2:3 Na aborokigwa b’ababani, abarenge agwo Beteli, bagacha ase Elisha, bakamoboria, “Inee! Nomanyete ng’a rituko ria rero Omonene nache aire omonene oo arue asore?” Ere akabairaneria, “Ee, namanyire ayio, korende inwe kira‐kiri.”" 
2Kings2:4 Naende Elija agatebia Elisha, “Aye beera aiga, ekiagera Omonene ontomire ngende Yeriko.” Korende Elisha akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, naende buna aye ore moyo, tinkogotiga.” Ase ayio bakagenda Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Aborokigwa b’ababani, abarenge agwo Yeriko, bagacha ase Elisha, bakamoboria, “Inee! Nomanyete ng’a rituko ria rero Omonene nache aire omonene oo arue asore?” Ere akabairaneria, “Ee, namanyire ayio, korende inwe kira‐kiri.”" 
2Kings2:6 Erio Elija agatebia Elisha, “Aye beera aiga, ekiagera Omonene ontomire ngende Yorodan.” Elisha akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, naende buna aye ore moyo, tinkogotiga.” Ase ayio, aba babere bakagenda orogendo rwabo." 
2Kings2:7 Aborokigwa b’ababani emerongo etano bakabatunyana, bagatenenera egeka aare, ekero baria babere bateneine ang’e na Yorodan." 
2Kings2:8 Elija akaimokia egetambaa kiaye gi’okwambara agakeringania, erio agaaka amache na kerokio. Amache agaatananekana gochia ensemo na ensemo, goika baria babere bagaeta aase aakamoku, bakaamboka ng’umbu." 
2Kings2:9 Ekero bambokire ng’umbu, Elija agatebia Elisha, “Boria egento ndanyare kogokorera ritang’ani ntararusigwa asore.” Elisha agateba, “Nagosabire, ong’e omoika oo ara kabere.”" 
2Kings2:10 Elija akamoiraneria, “Kwamboririe egento egekong’u. Korandore nkoirwa korwa asore, aye noyonyore, korende onye tokondora, rirorio takoba buna kwaboria.”" 
2Kings2:11 Buna barenge bagendererete ase orogendo rwabo, bakaba bagokwana amo, erio mobosokano egari y’omorero ne chibarasi chi’omorero chikabaatanana baria babere; na Elija akairwa igoro nekerambauti." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha akarora ekero Elija akoirwa igoro, akarera, “Tata ominto! Tata ominto! Aye nigo ore ase Abaisraeli buna chigari na abariini chibarasi.” Nyuma y’ayio tarora Elija naende nonya ng’ake. Erio Elisha akarusia chianga chiaye, agachitandorana ebing’ese bibere," 
2Kings2:13 na akaimokia egetambaa gi’okwambara ki’Elija keria kiagwete korwa asare, akairana, agatenena ase engegu ya Yorodan." 
2Kings2:14 Agwo agaaka amache negetambaa keria gi’okwambara kiarwete ase Elija, akabora, “Ng’ai Omonene, Nyasae bw’Elija, are?” Na ekero aakire amache, amache agaatananekana gochia ensemo na ensemo. Elisha agaeta aase aakamoku, akaamboka ng’umbu." 
2Kings2:15 Ekero aborokigwa b’ababani, baria barenge agwo Yeriko, bamoroche ore egeka egeke korwa asebare, bakabora, “Omoika bw’Elija nigo ore igoro ase Elisha.” Erio bakagenda komorotota, bagatung’ama inse, bakaumama ase obosio bwaye," 
2Kings2:16 bakamotebia, “Rora intwe abasomba bao ntobwate abanto emerongo etano bare ne chinguru, twagosabire, tiga abanto abwo bagende barigie omonene oo. Ande gose omoika bw’Omonene nomoimokirie igoro, na omorutire ase egetunwa gete, gose ase rikura.” Elisha akabakania agateba, “Timobaisa kobatoma.”" 
2Kings2:17 Korende ekero bagendererete komoboria, ere akarosa, agateba, “Batome rende.” Barabwo bagatoma abanto emerongo etano, bagachia komorigia ase engaki y’amatuko atato, tibamonyora." 
2Kings2:18 Bakairana, bagacha asare aase aganyete agwo Yeriko. Ere akabatebia, “Tinabakanetie ng’a timobaisa kogenda?”" 
2Kings2:19 Abanto b’omochie oria bagatebia Elisha, “Omochie oyo ore omuya, buna aye omonene oito oyoroche, korende amache areo namabe, ne riroba ri’ense eye tiriri kwama endagera.”" 
2Kings2:20 Elisha akabatebia, “Ndetera ebakuria enyia, mobeke omonyo ime.” Bakayerenta." 
2Kings2:21 Erio akagenda ase ensoko y’amache, agaitera omonyo oria aroro, agateba, “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Nagwenirie amache aya; korwa bono na kogenderera amakweri gose okwama amarandi amaroro tibikorwa ase amache aya.”" 
2Kings2:22 Ase ayio amache aria akagwenigwa na akagenderera koba amaya goika rero iga, buna Elisha atebete." 
2Kings2:23 Akarua aroro agwo, akagenda Beteli. Na ekero arenge ase orogendo rwaye, abana abamura abake bakarua ase omochie, bakamosekereria, bagaaka eriogi, bagateba, “Tiira gocha aa, aye nyaisio! Tiira gocha aa, aye nyaisio!”" 
2Kings2:24 Elisha akeonchora, na ekero abaroche, akabaragereria ase erieta ri’Omonene; ne chidubu ibere chiaberi chikarwa ase rinani, chigatandora abana baria abamura emerongo ene, na babere." 
2Kings2:25 Korwa aase agwo agatiira, akagenda goika egetunwa gia Karimeli, naende korwa aroro akairana gochia Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwa Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli, agwo Samaria, akagamba emiaka ikomi na ebere." 
2Kings3:2 Yoramu agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, nonya takorete buna ise na ng’ina bakorete, ekiagera narusetie esiiro y’enyasae Baali, eria ise aroisetie." 
2Kings3:3 Korende nonya naboigo, igo abwatanete nebibe bia Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, biria akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe; teatananete korwa ase birobio." 
2Kings3:4 Bono Mesha, omoruoti o Moabu, nigo arenge omotugi bwe ching’ondi, na kera omwaka nigo arenge korua ebango ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, chimanwa chie ching’ondi chilifu rigana erimo (100,000), naende amarionya e chimingichi chilifu rigana erimo (100,000)." 
2Kings3:5 Korende ekero Ahabu akure, omoruoti bw’Abamoabu akaanga koigwera omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings3:6 Ase engaki eria omoruoti Yoramu akarua Samaria, akaroberia Abaisraeli bonsi." 
2Kings3:7 Akagenda, agatoma amang’ana gochia ase Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agateba, “Omoruoti bw’Abamoabu bwangire konyigwera. Inee! Aye nogende amo nainche torwanie abanto ba Moabu?” Yehosafati akairaneria, “Ee, ningende amo naye, na abanto baane amo nabanto bao, ne chibarasi chiane amo ne chibarasi chiao.”" 
2Kings3:8 Naende akaboria, “Inee! Insemo ki toraetere kogenda?” Yoramu akairaneria, “Igo toraetere enchera y’erooro y’Edomu.”" 
2Kings3:9 Ase ayio omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akagenda amo nomoruoti bw’Abayuda, na omoruoti bw’Abaedomu. Na ekero bagendire orogendo rw’ogosiongorokana ase amatuko atano na abere, amache akabora abarwani esegi amo ne ching’iti chiarenge kobatunyana." 
2Kings3:10 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agateba, “Obobe nobwaito! Omonene otorangeirie intwe abaruoti batato atobeke ase amaboko Abamoabu.”" 
2Kings3:11 Erio Yehosafati akaboria, “Inee! Omobani bw’Omonene tari aa toranyare koboria Omonene goetera asare?” Omosomba oyomo bw’omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akairaneria, “Elisha, mosinto o Safati, nao are aiga, oria oumorete amache ase amaboko ’Elija.”" 
2Kings3:12 Yehosafati agateba, “Ring’ana ri’Omonene nigo rire amo nere.” Ase igo omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, na Yehosafati, na omoruoti bw’Abaedomu bakagenda asare." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha agatebia omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, “Inki inde naye? Genda aye ase ababani ba iso na aba nyoko!” Korende omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akamotebia. “Tinkogendao. Omonene nere otobekire intwe abaruoti batato ase amaboko Abamoabu.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elisha akabora, “Ekeene, buna Omonene bw’Emeganda are moyo, oria inche ngokorera, onye ntasigeti Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, anga tinarenge gwancha gokorora, gose gokorigereria." 
2Kings3:15 Korende bono ndetere omobugia obokano.” Na ekero omobugia oria arenge kobugia obokano, chinguru chi’Omonene chigacha igoro y’Elisha," 
2Kings3:16 na ere akabora, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Kunya chingoro chinyinge ase rigoko eri rikamoku." 
2Kings3:17 Naende aya naro Omonene agoteba: Nonya timokorora omwaga, gose embura, rigoko eri nariichore amache, erinde monywe, inwe ne chiombe chiaino, ne ching’ondi chiaino." 
2Kings3:18 Eke negento egeke ase Omonene; boigo nabeke Abamoabu ase amaboko aino. 
2Kings3:19 Nainwe mobue emechie yabo egiteire chindwaki na kera omochie omuya, naende namoteme kera omote omuya; boigo motiche na gosaria chinsoko chionsi chi’amache na mosarie kera oboremo obuya namagena.”" 
2Kings3:20 Rituko ria kabere mambia, ekero ki’engaki y’okorua ekeng’wanso, amache agacha korwa ensemo y’Edomu, goika agaichora orogongo roria." 
2Kings3:21 Ekero abanto bonsi ba Moabu baigwete ng’a abaruoti bachire korwana nabarabwo, bonsi abarenge ne chinguru kobogoria ebirwanero bakarangerigwa batang’ane bosio, abake na abanene."
