2Kings3:22 Mambia chuni, ekero baimogete na erioba rikaoroka rikabara ase amache, Abamoabu bakarora amache arenge bosio bwabo are amabariri buna amanyinga." 
2Kings3:23 Barabwo bagateba, “Aya namanyinga! Abaruoti baria barwanire barabwo ase barabwo na goitana. Ase ayio bono intwe Abamoabu, togende tosakore!”" 
2Kings3:24 Korende ekero Abamoabu bachete ase egetwori ki’Abaisraeli, Abaisraeli bakaimoka, bakabarwania goika abanto abwo bagatama korwa asebare. Abaisraeli bakagenderera kobatunyana gochia ase ense yabo bakabaita." 
2Kings3:25 Bagatagora emechie yabo bagasaria kera oboremo obuya. Kera omonto akaruta rigena ase oboremo goika amagena akabotuba kegima. Bagaticha kera ensoko y’amache na bagatema kera omote omuya. Amagena oka agatigara ase omochie o Kiri‐Hariseti, na abanto barenge koruta chinduruche bakayoetanana, bakayoumokera." 
2Kings3:26 Ekero omoruoti bw’Abamoabu aroche ng’a esegi yamobuire, akaira abanto amagana atano na abere babogoretie emioro, akagania amigererie gochia ase omoruoti bw’Abaedomu, korende tanyarete." 
2Kings3:27 Erio akaira igoro ase orwaki omwana omomura oye omotangi, oria orenge gocha kogamba ase ribaga riaye, akamorua akaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa. Agwo Abaisraeli bakagechigwa bagatiga korwana, bakairana gochia ase ense yabo." 
2Kings4:1 Omoboraka bw’omworokigwa oyomo bw’ababani akarera ase Elisha, akabora, “Omosacha one, omosomba oo, nakwete; aye nomanyete ng’a omosomba oo nigo amoirogete Omonene. Bono omoriegwa esira oye ochire koira abana abamura baane babere abakore babe abasomba baye.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elisha akamotebia, “Ninki nkogokorera? Ntebie ngento ki obwate nyomba mwao.” Omokungu oria agateba, “Inche omosomba oo omokungu timbwati gento kende gionsi nyomba mwane otatiga amaguta make ase rikondo.”" 
2Kings4:3 Elisha agatebia omokungu oria, “Genda ase emechie ase abagisangio bao, osabe oegwe ebibekerero ebinge bire bosa." 
2Kings4:4 Erio osoe nyomba mwao amo nabana bao, osieke egesieri, oumore amaguta ase ebibekerero ebio. Kera ekemo kogiaichoire okebeke ensemo.”" 
2Kings4:5 Omokungu oria akarua asare akagenda, agasoa nyomba mwaye amo nabamura baye, agasieka egesieri. Abamura baye bakamorentera ebibekerero, ne ere akaba okoumora amaguta." 
2Kings4:6 Ekero ebibekerero bionsi biaichorete, agatebia omwana oyomo, “Ndetere ekebekerero kende.” Omwana oye akamotebia, “Ekebekerero kende tikeiyo.” Erio amaguta agatiga gocha." 
2Kings4:7 Omokungu oria akagenda, agatebia omonto oria o Nyasae amang’ana ayio. Nere agatebia omokungu oria. “Genda, oonie amaguta ayio, oakane esira yao, na echiratigare nchigoisane aye na abana bao.”" 
2Kings4:8 Rituko erimo Elisha akagenda Sunemu, agwo ase omokungu omonda amenyete. Nere omosororerete arie endagera. Ase ayio, kero kende gionsi Elisha arenge goeta ase enchera eria nigo arenge gosoa enyomba eria oria endagera." 
2Kings4:9 Omokungu oria agatebia omosacha oye, “Narorire ng’a omonto oyo ogoeta aa botambe nomonto omochenu o Nyasae." 
2Kings4:10 Tiga tomoroiserie akanyomba igoro ase ekerama, tomobekere oborere aroro, na emesa, na ekerogo, na etaya, erinde engaki ende yonsi agocha asetore, osoa orarao.”" 
2Kings4:11 Rituko erimo Elisha agacha aase aria, agasoa akanyomba karia, agatimokera aroro," 
2Kings4:12 agatebia Gehasi, omosomba oye, “Rangeria omokungu oria Omosunemu.” Ekero amorangeretie, omokungu oria agacha, agatenena ase obosio bw’Elisha." 
2Kings4:13 Elisha agatebia Gehasi, “Bono boria omokungu oyo inki aganetie imokorere ase emeremo eye yonsi akorete ase engencho yaito. Moborie ande gose naganetie ngende ase omoruoti, gose ase omochiki bw’abarwani esegi, nkwane obuya bwaye.” Omokungu oria akairaneria, “Inche nigo imenyete buya ase egati y’abanto baminto.”" 
2Kings4:14 Elisha akaboria, “Ngento ki omokungu oyo agwenerete akorerwe?” Gehasi akairaneria, “Naremeire egento ekemo, tabwati omwana, na omosacha oye ogotire.”" 
2Kings4:15 Elisha agatebia Gehasi, “Morangerie!” Na ekero arangeretie omokungu oria, nere agatenena gesieri." 
2Kings4:16 Elisha akamotebia, “Ase engaki buna eye iga, ase omwaka ogocha, nobe kobwate omwana omoisia omoagate.” Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Yaya, omonene one, omonto o Nyasae, tobaisa kong’aina inche omosomba oo.”" 
2Kings4:17 Omokungu oria akaba morito na akaibora omwana omoisia, ase engaki eria eria Elisha konya amotebirie." 
2Kings4:18 Omwana oria gakinire, ekaba rituko erimo akagenda ase ise ase abanto barenge kogesa," 
2Kings4:19 akamotebia, “Omotwe nkonyatia ore! Oo, omotwe one!” Ise agatebia omosomba oye, “Mobogorie omoire ase ng’ina.”" 
2Kings4:20 Na ekero amoimogetie akamoira ase ng’ina, na omwana oria agaikaransa ase amaru a ng’ina goika mobaso gati, erio agakwa." 
2Kings4:21 Akamoira akamwareria ase oborere bw’omonto oria o Nyasae, agasieka egesieri akamotiga aroro, agasoka isiko." 
2Kings4:22 Omokungu oria akarangeria omosacha oye, akamotebia, “Toma omosomba oyomo gochia aaria amo netigere, ng’ayerere gochia ase omonto oria o Nyasae; naende ng’irane bwango.”" 
2Kings4:23 Omosacha oye akamoboria, “Nase ki okogenda asare rero? Rero tikori okooroka kw’omotienyi nonya n’Esabato.” Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Nabo erabe buya.”" 
2Kings4:24 Akabekera etigere egeikaransero, agatebia omosomba oye, “Tema etigere egende bwango, tobaisa koyeira ng’ora goika nagotebirie.”" 
2Kings4:25 Ase ayio agachaka orogendo, agaika ase omonto oria o Nyasae, agwo ase egetunwa gia Karimeli. Ekero omonto oria o Nyasae arochce omokungu oria ogocha, agatebia Gehasi, omosomba oye “Rigereria gochia aaria, Omosunemu oria ogocha!" 
2Kings4:26 Minyoka bwango omorotote na omoborie gose mbuya are, na omosacha oye na omwana gose mbuya bare.” Omokungu oria akairaneria Gehasi, “Ee, mbuya bare.”" 
2Kings4:27 Na ekero aigete ase egetunwa ase omonto oria o Nyasae, akabwata amagoro aye. Gehasi agacha komorusia aroro. Korende omonto oria o Nyasae akamotebia, “Motige, ekiagera nigo are nobororo obonge; na Omonene obisire amang’ana ayio korwa asende, tantebetie gento.”" 
2Kings4:28 Omokungu oria akaboria, “Inee! Nagosabete aye omonene one ong’e omwana? Tinakwanete: Tobaisa kong’aina inche.”" 
2Kings4:29 Elisha agatebia Gehasi, “Eboyie bwebeke ang’e, imokia enyimbo yane koboko kwao, ogende. Koraumerane na monto onde bwensi, tobaisa komokwania; na omonto onde bwensi karagokwanie, tobaisa goitaba; obeke enyimbo eye yane igoro ase obosio bw’omwana oria.”" 
2Kings4:30 Ng’ina omwana oria agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, na buna aye ore moyo, tinkogotiga.” Ase ayio Elisha akaimoka akamotunyana." 
2Kings4:31 Gehasi agatang’ana akagenda bosio, akabeka enyimbo eria igoro ase obosio bw’omwana oria, korende nonya neriogi gose ekemanyererio kende tikiarengeo ng’a omwana nabe moyo. Ase ayio akairana, akaumerana n’Elisha, akamotebia, “Omwana tacheti moyo.”" 
2Kings4:32 Ekero Elisha asoete nyomba, akarora omwana bwareirie igoro ase oborere bwaye okwete." 
2Kings4:33 Agasoa nyomba, agasieka egesieri; ere na omwana boka bakaba nyomba ime. Erio Elisha agasaba Omonene," 
2Kings4:34 akariina borere igoro, akerambora igoro ase omwana oria, akabeka omonwa oye igoro ase omonwa bw’omwana, na amaiso aye igoro ase amaiso ’omwana, na amaboko aye igoro ase amaboko ’omwana; na buna eramborete igoro ase omwana, omobere bw’omwana ogachaka koba ne riberera." 
2Kings4:35 Elisha akaimoka, agataarataara nyomba ime ara kabere, naende akariina borere, akerambora igoro ase omwana, na omwana oria agasimora ara gatano na kabere, erio akaramokia amaiso aye." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha akarangeria Gehasi, akamotebia, “Rangeria Omosunemu oyio!” Gehasi akamorangeria, na ekero omokungu oria achete, Elisha akamotebia, “Imokia omwana oo!”" 
2Kings4:37 Agacha agatung’ama ase amagoro Elisha, akaumama, erio akaimokia omwana oye, agasoka isiko." 
2Kings4:38 Elisha akagenda naende Giligali ekero enchara yarenge ase ense eria. Na aborokigwa b’ababani kobaikaransire ase obosio bwaye, agatebia omosomba oye, “Tereka enyongo eria enene riko, oroiserie aborokigwa b’ababani omosori!”" 
2Kings4:39 Oyomo obo akagenda mogondo kwaa chinyeni, na agwo akanyora ekemeri ki’orosana gekoranda, nere agatwa emiongo y’orosana korwa ase ekemeri keria, agaichoria egetambaa kiaye. Erio akayenachana, akayebeka ase omosori ime; tamanyete ng’a miongo ki yarenge." 
2Kings4:40 Bono endagera eria egaterekerwa abanto baria barie, korende ekero barenge koyeria, bakarera neriogi, “Aye omonto o Nyasae, obee! Endagera eye yatorenteire amakweri!” Barabwo tibanyara koyeria." 
2Kings4:41 Elisha agateba, “Renta obosie!” Erio akabobeka ase enyongo ime, agateba, “Bekera abanto endagera eye barie.” Bono egento gi’okorenta amabe tikiarenge ase enyongo eria ime." 
2Kings4:42 Omonto agacha korwa Baali‐Salisa, akarentera omonto oria o Nyasae emegati emerongo ebere y’esairi y’okwama ogotang’ani, na ebigara ebibese bire egunia ime. Elisha agateba, “Kae abanto barie!”" 
2Kings4:43 Korende omosomba oye agateba, “Naki ndanyare kobeka endagera eye ase amasio ’abanto rigana erimo?” Elisha agateba eria kabere, “Yee abanto barie, ekiagera aya naro Omonene atebire: Mbarie, naende batigarie eyende.”" 
2Kings4:44 Ase ayio agaterekera abanto, na barabwo bakaria, naende bagatigaria eyende, buna Omonene atebete." 
2Kings5:1 Naamani, omochiki bw’abarwani esegi b’omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, nigo arenge omonto bw’engencho enene ase obosio bw’omonene oye, na omonene oye nigo amosigete mono, ekiagera ase engencho ya Naamani Omonene aete Abasiiria obobui. Ere nigo arenge omonto etuoni y’esegi, korende oborwaire bwa ukoma mbwamoriete." 
2Kings5:2 Engaki eyemo, ekero Abasiiria bagendete gosakora, bagoosa omoiseke omoke korwa ase ense y’Abaisraeli, na ere akaba ogokorera moka Naamani emeremo." 
2Kings5:3 Omoiseke oria agatebia moka omonene oye, “Onye ndiria omonene one arenge koba amo nomobani oria okare agwo Samaria, omobani oria nanga namogwenia oborwaire bwaye bwa ukoma.”" 
2Kings5:4 Ase ayio Naamani akagenda agatebia omonene oye amang’ana aya omwana oria omoiseke bw’Abaisraeli amotebetie. 
2Kings5:5 Na omoruoti bw’Abasiiria akamotebia, “Genda bono iga, nainche nintome rirube ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli.” Naamani akagenda akairera omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli chitalanta chie chifeta ikomi, ne chisekeli chie chitahabu chilifu isano nemo, ne chianga chi’omoyega ikomi." 
2Kings5:6 Akairana rirube ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli riarikire iga, “Ekero rirube eri rikogoikera, omanye ng’a natomire Naamani, omosomba one, erinde omogwenie ase oborwaire bwaye bwa ukoma.”" 
2Kings5:7 Ekero omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli asomete rirube riria, agatandora chianga chiaye, akabora, “Inee! Inche Nyasae inde? Inde nokobua kw’ogoita na korenta moyo, erinde omonto oyo otoma amang’ana asende ng’a ngwenie omonto obwate oborwaire bwa ukoma? Rigereria monyare korora ng’a omoruoti oyo nigo arigetie eriomana asende.”" 
2Kings5:8 Korende Elisha, omonto oria o Nyasae, akaigwa ng’a omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli otandoire chianga chiaye, agatoma omonto ase omoruoti amotebie, “Ninki kiagera aye gwatandora chianga chiao? Tiga omonto oyio achiche asende, erio nario aramanye ng’a omobani nare ase Abaisraeli.”" 
2Kings5:9 Bono Naamani akagenda amo ne chibarasi ne chigari chiaye, agatenena ase egesieri ki’enyomba y’Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Elisha agatoma omonto asare, akamotebia “Genda bwesibie ase orooche rwa Yorodan ara gatano na kabere, na omobere oo noirane obe buna orenge ritang’ani, naye nocheneke.”" 
2Kings5:11 Naamani akagechigwa; erio akagenda, ogoteba, “Rora nigo narengereria ng’a ere nigo arenge gosoka gocha asende, atenene asabe ase erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oye, naende abeke okoboko kwaye igoro ase ndwarete, na agwenie oborwaire bwane bwa ukoma." 
2Kings5:12 Inee! Chindooche chia Damesiki, Abaana na Faripari, tichiri chingiya kobua chindooche chi’ense y’Abaisraeli? Inee! Tinarenge gwesibia ase chirochio ncheneke?” Bono akaonchoka akagenda ore nokogechigwa." 
2Kings5:13 Korende abasomba baye bakamochiera, bakamotebia, “Tata, onye omobani oyo nagotebia okore egento kere egekong’u, Inee, tikwarenge kogekora? Korende bono, nase ki otakomoigwera ekero agotebia: Genda bwesibie, naye nocheneke?”" 
2Kings5:14 Ase ayio agatirimboka, agasoa ase orooche rwa Yorodan ara gatano na kabere, buna omonto oria o Nyasae amotebetie. Omobere oye okairanerana okaba buna oyo bw’omwana omoke, ere agacheneka." 
2Kings5:15 Akairana ase omonto oria o Nyasae, ere amo nabanto bonsi barenge komo, agatenena ase obosio bwaye, akamotebia, “Bono namanyire ng’a Nyasae onde tari ase ense yonsi, otatiga oyo bw’Abaisraeli. Ase ayio bono, koranche oire ekeegwa korwa asende inche omosomba oo.”" 
2Kings5:16 Elisha agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, oria inche ngokorera, tinkoira ekeegwa nonya nekemo.” Naamani akamosorora anche abiire, korende Elisha akaanga." 
2Kings5:17 Erio Naamani agateba, “Onye taibo, nagosabire, tiga inche omosomba oo ng’egwe amaroba aisaine chigurube ibere, chiyombo ibere chiranyare kobogoria, ekiagera korwa bono na kogenderera inche omosomba oo tinkorua ebing’wanso ase enyasae ende yonsi, otatiga nase Omonene bweka." 
2Kings5:18 Tiga Omonene anyabere inche omosomba oo ase amang’ana aya: Ekero omonene one akogenda ase enyomba ya Rimoni gochia gosasima aroro ogwesiirera ase okoboko kwane, nainche boigo ekero keria nyekumbe ime ase enyomba ya Rimoni. Omonene anyabere inche, omosomba oo, ase ring’ana eri.”" 
2Kings5:19 Elisha akamotebia, “Genda nomorembe.” Korende ekero Naamani arure asare, agendire egeka egeke korwa aroro," 
2Kings5:20 Gehasi, omosomba bw’Elisha omonto oria o Nyasae, agateba, “Rigereria, omonene one otigire Naamani, Omosiiria oria, ogendire, na tancheti koegwa egento ase ebio arentire. Ekeene buna Omonene are moyo, inche iminyoke imobwatie, inyore egento korwa asare.”" 
2Kings5:21 Ase igo Gehasi akabwatia Naamani. Na ekero Naamani aroche omonto okominyoka korwa nyuma yaye, agaika korwa ase egari igoro, akagenda akaumerana nere, akamoboria, “Mang’ana ki aba?”" 
2Kings5:22 Gehasi akamoiraneria, “Amang’ana onsi namaya. Omonene one nigo antoma ng’a bono iga aborokigwa babere b’ababani bachire korwa ense y’ebigoro y’Efraimu, koranche obae etalanta eyemo y’efeta, ne chianga chi’omoyega ibere.”" 
2Kings5:23 Naamani akamotebia, “Koranche oire chitalanta ibere.” Igo akamosorora, akamosibera chitalanta ibere chie chifeta ase emebuko ebere, akamoa ne chianga ibere, agatweka abasomba baye babere. Barabwo bakabibogoria, bagatang’ana bosio bwa Gehasi." 
2Kings5:24 Ekero baigete agwo ase ekegoro, Gehasi akabirusia korwa ase amaboko abo, akabibeka nyomba ime. Erio agatiga abanto baria bakagenda." 
2Kings5:25 Agasoa nyomba, agatenena ase obosio bw’omonene oye Elisha, nere akamoboria, “Gehasi, ng’ai gese kwarenge?” Ere akairaneria, “Inche omosomba oo tinagendete aande.”" 
2Kings5:26 Korende Elisha akamotebia, “Inee! Tinagenda amo naye ase omoika, ekero omonto oria aonchoka korwa ase egari yaye oumerana naye? Inee! Eye nero engaki y’ogwancha chibesa, ne chianga, na emegondo y’emezeituni na ey’emesabibu, ne ching’ondi, ne chiombe, na abasomba, abasacha na abakungu?" 
2Kings5:27 Ase ayio, oborwaire bwa ukoma bwa Naamani nabokobwate aye na ororeria rwao kogenderera botambe.” Gehasi akarua ase obosio bw’Elisha, akagenda ore noborwaire bwa ukoma, orabete se." 
2Kings6:1 Aborokigwa b’ababani bagatebia Elisha, “Rora aase aiga tomenyete inse y’oboteneneri bwao igo are aake mono asetore." 
2Kings6:2 Tiga togende goika Yorodan, na kera oyomo ageche omote oyomo aroro, erinde toagachere enyomba aroro tokomenya.” Elisha akairaneria, “Genda!”" 
2Kings6:3 Oyomo obo akamotebia, “Koranche, ogende amo naintwe abasomba bao.” Elisha akamoiraneria, “Ee, ningende amo nainwe.”" 
2Kings6:4 Ase ayio akagenda amo nabarabwo, na ekero baigete Yorodan, bakagecha emete." 
2Kings6:5 Korende ekero oyomo obo arenge kogecha omote, egesire kegasomoka korwa ase omote, gekagwa ase amache ime. Omonto oria akarera, “Obee, omonene one! Egesire eke nigo giasabetwe korwa ase omonto onde.”" 
2Kings6:6 Omonto oria o Nyasae akamoboria, “Ng’ai kiagwera?” Ekero omonto oria amworogetie aase aria, Elisha akanacha egete, agakeruta gochia imeo, akagera egesire keria kegacheng’enena amache igoro." 
2Kings6:7 Erio akamotebia, “Keimokie!” Na omonto oria akarambora okoboko kwaye, agakeimokia." 
2Kings6:8 Engaki eyemo ekero omoruoti bw’Abasiiria arenge korwana chisegi n’Abaisraeli, agasemania nabasomba baye, agachora aase gete akobeka egetwori kiaye." 
2Kings6:9 Korende omonto oria o Nyasae agatoma amang’ana ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akamotebia, “Bwerende, tobaisa goetera aase aiga, ekiagera Abasiiria nao bakare.”" 
2Kings6:10 Na omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agatoma abanto gochia aase aria omonto oria o Nyasae amotebetie ase okomokurera. Na omoruoti agetooria, tari engaki eyemo gose ibere, korende chinyinge." 
2Kings6:11 Omoruoti bw’Abasiiria akaba oichanete ase ebirengererio biaye; akarangeria abasomba baye, akababoria, “Inee! Timokonyara gontebia monto ki ase egati yaito ore ensemo y’omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli?”" 
2Kings6:12 Oyomo bw’abasomba baye akamoiraneria, “Onde tari aa asetore, aye omoruoti omonene one, korende n’Elisha, omobani ore agwo ase Abaisraeli, nere ogotebia omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli amang’ana ogokwana ekero ore ase akanyomba kao g’okorara.”" 
2Kings6:13 Omoruoti agateba, “Genda morigie aase amenyete, erio ntome abanto bamobwate.” Bakamotebia ng’a naaria Dotani amenyete." 
2Kings6:14 Ase igo omoruoti agatoma gochia aroro chibarasi, ne chigari, na omoganda omonene bw’abarwani esegi, na barabwo bagaika aroro botuko, bakanaaria omochie." 
2Kings6:15 Ekero omosomba bw’omonto oria o Nyasae abogete mambia chuni, agasoka isiko, akarora omoganda oria bw’abarwani esegi, amo ne chigari ne chibarasi, agateba, “Obee, omonene one! Ninki togokora?”" 
2Kings6:16 Elisha agatebia omosomba oye, “Tibwoboa, ekiagera abwo bare amo naintwe nigo bare abange goetania baria bare nabarabwo.”" 
2Kings6:17 Erio Elisha agasaba, akabora, “Aye Omonene, nagosabire, ramokia amaiso aye, erinde arore.” Na Omonene akaramokia amaiso ’omosae oria, nere akarora chibarasi ne chigari chi’omorero nigo chiaichire ekegoro igoro, chietanaine Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Ekero Abasiiria bachete korwania Elisha, nere agasaba Omonene, akabora, “Nagosabire, oukorie abanto aba.” Ase ayio Omonene akabaukoria koreng’ana buna Elisha asabete." 
2Kings6:19 Elisha agatebia abanto baria, “Eye tari ero enchera, na omochie tari oro oyo; intunyane, nainche nimborokie omonto oria mokorigia.” Erio akabatang’ana gochia Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Ase obwango boria basoete Samaria, Elisha akabora, “Aye Omonene, ramokia amaiso ’abanto aba, erinde banyare korora.” Omonene akaramokia amaiso abo, nabarabwo bakarora, bakenyora ng’a ngati‐gati ya Samaria baare." 
2Kings6:21 Ekero omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli aroche abanto baria, akaboria Elisha, “Tata, ndaita abanto aba? Ndabaita?”" 
2Kings6:22 Elisha akairaneria, “Yaya, tobaita. Inee! Noite abanto gwosire nomoro oo gose nobota bwao? Bae endagera barie na amache banywe, erio bairane, bagende ase omonene obo.”" 
2Kings6:23 Ase igo omoruoti akabaroiseria omoyega omonene, na ekero bakoorire koria na konywa, akabaa ribaga, na barabwo bakagenda ase omonene obo. Abasiiria baria tibairanete naende nebiombe biabo korwania Abaisraeli." 
2Kings6:24 Ekaba nyuma y’amang’ana ayio, Beni‐Hadadi, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, akaroberia abarwani baye b’esegi, akagenda akanaaria omochie o Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Enchara enene yarenge agwo Samaria ekero keria bayonaaretie. Omotwe bw’etigere okaba okoonigwa ase rigori rie chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etano na etato, na amabi ’amaruma aisanete agatita akamo ase chisekeli chie chifeta isano." 
2Kings6:26 Ekero omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli arenge gotaara ase orwaki igoro, omokungu oyomo akarera asare, agateba, “Aye omoruoti, omonene one, inkonye!”" 
2Kings6:27 Omoruoti akamoiraneria, “Onye Omonene takogokonya, naki inche ndagokonye? Nkorwa ase ekeooreri, gose nkorwa ase egeteera gi’okomitera edivai?”" 
2Kings6:28 Naende akaboria omokungu oria, “Emechando yao nereri?” Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Omokungu nare aa tore komo agantebia: Rituko ria rero tiga torie omwana oo, na ankio torie oyone." 
2Kings6:29 Ase ayio tokaiyeka omwana one tokamoria. Ne rituko ria kabere nkamotebia ng’a arente omwana oye tomorie, korende ere konya obisire omwana oye.”" 
2Kings6:30 Ekero omoruoti aigwete amang’ana ’omokungu oria, agatandora chianga chiaye. Ere nigo arenge gotaara ase orwaki igoro, na abanto barenge ang’e bakarora obegete chianga chie chigunia korwa ime ase omobere oye." 
2Kings6:31 Na igo akabora, “Tiga Nyasae ang’e egesusuro bono na kogenderera onye omotwe bw’Elisha, mosinto o Safati, ogotigara igoro ase amareko aye rituko ria rero ritaraera.”" 
2Kings6:32 Elisha nigo aikaransete nyomba mwaye ime, na abagaaka nigo baikaransete amo nere. Bono omoruoti agatoma omonto korwa ase obosio bwaye atang’ane, korende ekero omonto oria ataraikao, Elisha agatebia abagaaka baria, “Mwarorire buna omoiti oria atomire omonto ache abutore omotwe one? Ekero omonto oria agocha mosieke egesieri, mokebwate bokong’u tabaisa gosoa nyomba. Inee! Ebititiro bi’amagoro ’omonene oye tibiri komotunyana?” Ekero agendererete gokwana nabarabwo, omotomwa oria agacha asare, agateba," 
2Kings6:33 “Emechando eye nigo yarure ase Omonene. Ninki rende nganyete inyore korwa ase Omonene?” 
2Kings7:1 Elisha akamoiraneria, “Igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene. Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ankio, engaki buna eye obosie obonuke bw’engano ebitita bibere nabionigwe ase rigori ri’esekeli eyemo, na obw’esairi ebitita bine ase esekeli eyemo, agwo ase egeita gia Samaria.”" 
2Kings7:2 Erio omotang’ani bw’abarwani esegi, oyio omoruoti egenete, agatebia omonto oria o Nyasae, “Nonya Omonene omonyene are koigora ebibao bia igoro, egento ekio tigekonyara koba.” Korende omonto oria o Nyasae agateba, “Aye noyarore namaiso ao, korende tokoria endagera eyio.”" 
2Kings7:3 Bono abanto bane barwarete oborwaire bwa ukoma mbarenge agwo ase egesoero ki’egeita. Barabwo bagatebania, “Ninki gekogera toikaranse aiga goika tokwe?" 
2Kings7:4 Toise goteba ng’a tosoe omochie ime, enchara nereo, nabo torakwe; na toise goikaransa aiga, boigo ntokwe. Ase ayio togende goika ase egetwori ki’Abasiiria. Kobaratotige, tobe moyo, ntogenderere koba moyo; kobaratoite ntobe twakure.”" 
2Kings7:5 Bakaimoka mambia ense etarakiamoka, bakagenda ase egetwori ki’Abasiiria, korende ekero baigete ase omochakano bw’egetwori keria bakanyora ng’a monto taiyo." 
2Kings7:6 Omonene ogerire omoganda bw’abarwani esegi b’Abasiiria baigure ebititiro bie chigari, ne chibarasi, na eriogi ri’omoganda omonene bw’abarwani esegi. Ase ayio konya batebanirie, “Ekeene, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli osabire abaruoti b’Abahiti na baria b’Abamisiri bache gotorwania.”" 
2Kings7:7 Erio bagatama ense etarakiamoka, bagatiga chiema chiabo, ne chibarasi chiabo, ne chitigere chiabo; bagatiga negetwori, bagatama ase ogotooria obogima bwabo." 
2Kings7:8 Ekero abanto baria barwarete oborwaire bwa ukoma baigete ase omochakano bw’egetwori bagasoa ase eema eyemo, bakaria endagera na konywa, bakabogoria chifeta, ne chitahabu, ne chianga, bakagenda bagachibisa. Naende bakairana, bagasoa ase eema ende, bakabogoria ebinto korwa aroro, bakagenda nabirobio bakabibisa." 
2Kings7:9 Erio bagatebania, “Aya tari aro amaronge togokora. Rituko ria rero neri’amang’ana amaya. Onye togokira na koganya goika bokie, ekeene, egesusuro ngetonyore. Ase ayio, inchuo togende, totebie abanto b’enyomba y’omoruoti amang’ana aya.”" 
2Kings7:10 Bakagenda, bakarangeria abarendi b’egeita ki’omochie, bakabatebia, “Iga twagenda ase egetwori ki’Abasiiria, twanyora ng’a monto onde tario nonya noyomo, gose titoigweti riogi ria monto; twanyora chibarasi chisibire, ne chitigere boigo, ne chiema chiteneine buna bachitigete.”" 
2Kings7:11 Erio abarendi b’egeita bakararia amang’ana ayio nonya ngoikera ase enyomba y’omoruoti. 
2Kings7:12 Na omoruoti akaimoka botuko, agatebia abasomba baye, “Tiga mbatebie egento Abasiiria barobeirie mamincha yaito. Bamanyire ng’a intwe igo tore nenchara; ase ayio basokire korwa ase egetwori bagendire kwebisa orosana batoboere, barengereretie ng’a ekero togosoka korwa ase omochie batobwate tore moyo, naende basoe omochie bayobwate.”" 
2Kings7:13 Oyomo bw’abasomba baye agateba, “Tiga totome abanto bagende boyie chibarasi isano korwa ase echio chitigarete ase omochie, baroote tomanye amang’ana buna are. Emechando erabanyore abanto abwo tekoba emebe kobua ey’abwo batigarete ase omochie, gose ey’Abaisraeli bonsi basiririe obogima bwabo." 
2Kings7:14 Ase igo bagachora abanto babere bakariina chigari chiare kong’uswa ne chibarasi, na omoruoti akabatoma gochia koroota abarwani esegi b’Abasiiria.”" 
2Kings7:15 Ase ayio bakababwatia goika Yorodan, bakarora chianga na ebinto binde Abasiiria batugutete inchera ekero barenge gotama. Abanto baria batometwe bakairana, bagatebia omoruoti amang’ana ayio." 
2Kings7:16 Abanto ba Samaria bakagenda bagasakora egetwori ki’Abasiiria. Ase ayio obosie obonuke bw’engano ebitita bibere bokaoonigwa ase esekeli eyemo, na obw’esairi ebitita bine ase esekeli eyemo, buna Omonene atebete." 
2Kings7:17 Bono omoruoti konya ochorire omotang’ani oria bw’abarwani esegi, ere omonyene egenete, abe omorendi bw’egeita. Abanto bakamotindachera agwo ase egeita goika agakwa, buna omonto oria o Nyasae atebete ekero omoruoti achete asare." 
2Kings7:18 Nigo abete buna omonto oria o Nyasae atebetie omoruoti, “Engaki buna eye ankio agwo ase egeita gia Samaria obosie bw’esairi ebitita bine na bioonigwe ase esekeli eyemo, na obosie obonuke bw’engano ebitita bibere ase esekeli eyemo.”" 
2Kings7:19 Omotang’ani oria bw’abarwani esegi nigo airaneretie omonto oria o Nyasae, agateba, “Nonya Omonene omonyene are koigora ebibao bia igoro, ayio takonyara koba.” Omonto oria o Nyasae nigo amoiraneretie, “Aye noyarore namaiso ao, korende tokoria endagera eyio.”" 
2Kings7:20 Ayio agakoreka asare, na abanto igo bamotindacherete agwo ase egeita, agakwa." 
2Kings8:1 Elisha agatebia omokungu oria konya abokeirie omwana oye koba moyo, “Imoka aye amo nabanto b’enyomba yao mong’anye korwa aase aiga, mogende momenye ase ense engeni aande onsi orarore, ekiagera Omonene ochikire enchara echiche ase ense eye, nero egenderere ase engaki y’emiaka etano na ebere.”" 
2Kings8:2 Ase igo omokungu oria akaimoka na agakora buna omonto oria o Nyasae amotebetie; akagenda amo nabanto b’enyomba yaye, akamenya ase ense y’Abafilisti ase engaki y’emiaka etano na ebere." 
2Kings8:3 Ase omoerio bw’emiaka eria etano na ebere, omokungu oria akairana korwa ase ense y’Abafilisti, akagenda ase omoruoti agasaba aegwe enyomba yaye, na oboremo bwaye." 
2Kings8:4 Bono omoruoti nigo arenge gokwana na Gehasi, omosomba bw’omonto oria o Nyasae, akamoboria amotebie amang’ana amanene Elisha konya akorire." 
2Kings8:5 Na ekero Gehasi agendererete gotebia omoruoti buna Elisha abogetie omonto okwete akaba moyo, akarora omokungu oria Elisha abogetie omwana oye akaba moyo ogocha gosaba omoruoti ng’a aegwe enyomba yaye, na oboremo bwaye. Gehasi akamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, omonene one, omokungu oria nere oyo, na omwana oria oye Elisha abogetie akaba moyo nere oyo.”" 
2Kings8:6 Ekero omoruoti aboretie omokungu oria, nere akamotebia amang’ana onsi. Ase ayio omoruoti agachora omoteneneri oyomo anyare gokonya omokungu oria, akamotebia, “Irania ebinto bionsi biria biarenge bi’omokungu oyo, amo nokwama gwonsi korwa ase oboremo boria, gochakera rituko riria aruete ase oboremo boria goika bono.”" 
2Kings8:7 Elisha akagenda Damesiki, na Beni‐Hadadi, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, nigo arenge omorwaire. Ekero Beni‐Hadadi atebetigwe ng’a omonto oria o Nyasae ochire," 
2Kings8:8 agatebia Hasaeli, “Imokia ekeegwa, ogende orotote omonto oria o Nyasae, oborie Omonene goetera asare, omanye gose ningwene korwa ase oborwaire obo.”" 
2Kings8:9 Ase igo Hasaeli akagenda korotota Elisha, akamoirera ebiegwa, ebinto ebiya mono bia Damesiki, ebinto biisaine kobogorigwa ne chingamia emerongo ene. Ekero aigete asare, agatenena ase obosio bwaye, agateba, “Omwana oo Beni‐Hadadi, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, ontomire gocha asore gokoboria gose nagwene korwa ase oborwaire bwaye.”" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha akamoiraneria, “Omonene nigo anyorokirie ng’a ere goika akwe, korende genda omotebie ng’a ekeene nagwene.”" 
2Kings8:11 Naende akarigereria omonto oria namaiso amomo pa goika omonto oria agaichana. Na Elisha, omonto o Nyasae, agachaka korera." 
2Kings8:12 Hasaeli akamoboria, “Ninki kiaba aye, omonene one, okorera?” Elisha akamoiraneria, “Nekiagera namanyire obobe boria orakore ase Abaisraeli; nosambe chiburi chiabo, noite abasae babo nomoro, naende nonachane abana babo abake ebing’ese, na abakungu babo bare barito noboore chinda chiabo.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hasaeli agateba, “Inche omosomba oo, inki ing’isaine? Inche inga buna esese. Naki ndanyare gokora egento buna ekio.” Elisha akamoiraneria, “Omonene onyorokirie ng’a aye nobe omoruoti bw’Abasiiria.”" 
2Kings8:14 Hasaeli akarua ase Elisha, akairana ase omonene oye. Nere akamoboria, “Naki Elisha agotebia?” Hasaeli akamoiraneria, “Nigo antebia ng’a ekeene aye nogwene.”" 
2Kings8:15 Korende rituko ria kabere akabogoria ekiebisio ki’oborere akagetobeka ase amache ime, agatuba obosio bw’omoruoti nakerokio, gekamoguba goika agakwa. Erio Hasaeli akaba omoruoti ribaga ria Beni‐Hadadi." 
2Kings8:16 Ase omwaka o gatano bw’okogamba kwa Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, ekero Yehosafati arenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Yehoramu, mosinto o Yehosafati, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings8:17 Nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etato, na ebere, ekero abete omoruoti, akagamba emiaka etano na etato, agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Kings8:18 Ere akanyuoma omoiseke bw’Ahabu, na buna abanto b’enyomba y’Ahabu bakorete, ere boigo akabwatia chinchera chi’abaruoti b’Abaisraeli. Agakora ayarenge amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
2Kings8:19 Korende nonya naboigo ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba bw’Omonene, Omonene tanchete gosiria enyomba ya Yuda, ekiagera ariete eira ng’a Daudi abe etaya kogenderera botambe, ere amo nororeria rwaye." 
2Kings8:20 Ase amatuko ay’okogamba kwa Yehoramu, Abaedomu bagasaria, bakaanga koigwera Abayuda, bakebekera omoruoti." 
2Kings8:21 Erio Yehoramu akagenda Sairi amo ne chigari chiaye chionsi chi’esegi. Akaimoka botuko amo nabachiki baye be chigari, bakarwania Abaedomu abwo babaetanaine, korende abarwani baye b’esegi bagatama, bakagenda chinka chiabo." 
2Kings8:22 Igo Abaedomu bagasaria, bakaanga kogamberwa n’Abayuda na babeire baatananegete goika rero iga. Naende ase engaki eyio eyio abanto b’omochie o Libuna nabarabwo bagasaria, bagatiga obogambi bw’Abayuda." 
2Kings8:23 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yehoramu, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings8:24 Yehoramu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa aase chiatindegetwe, ase Omochie o Daudi, na Ahasia, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings8:25 Ase omwaka o ikomi na kabere bw’okogamba kwa Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu, ekero arenge omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Ahasia, mosinto o Yehoramu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings8:26 Ahasia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na ebere, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba omwaka oyomo agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Atalia; ere nigo arenge omochokoro bw’Omuri, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings8:27 Ahasia akaba omoko bw’enyomba y’Ahabu, na igo akabwatia chinchera chi’abanto b’enyomba yaye. Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna abanto b’enyomba y’Ahabu bakorete." 
2Kings8:28 Ahasia akagenda amo na Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu, korwania Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, agwo Ramoti o Gileadi. Abasiiria bagaaka Yoramu chingoma." 
2Kings8:29 Omoruoti Yoramu akairana Yesireeli gochia korwarigwa chingoma chiria anyorete korwa ase Abasiiria aaria Rama, ekero arwanete na Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria. Ahasia, mosinto o Yehoramu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akagenda korora Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu agwo Yesireeli, ekiagera Yoramu nigo arenge omorwaire." 
2Kings9:1 Elisha omobani akarangeria oyomo bwa’borokigwa b’ababani, akamotebia, “Esibe ekenema kiao norokini, obogorie echuba ere namaguta, ogende Ramoti o Gileadi." 
2Kings9:2 Ekero oraike aroro origie Yehu, omwana omomura o Yehosafati, mosinto o Nimusi. Erio osoe ime, omotebie atenene atige abagisangio baye, omosoyie ase akanyomba ka ime." 
2Kings9:3 Oimokie echuba ere namaguta akweakwa, oyaumorere omotwe oye igoro, okwane: Aya naro Omonene atebire: Nagoakire amaguta, obe omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli. Erio oigore egesieri, osoke otame; tobaisa gotebana.”" 
2Kings9:4 Ase ayio omobani oria omosae akagenda Ramoti o Gileadi. 
2Kings9:5 Ekero aigete aroro akanyora abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi baikaransete kogamba, agateba, “Omonene, nimbwate amang’ana narentire asore.” Yehu akamoboria, “Nase ng’o ase egati ya intwe twensi obwate amang’ana?” Omobani oria akairaneria, “Nasore aye omochiki.”" 
2Kings9:6 Yehu akaimoka, agasoa enyomba, na omobani oria omosae akaumora amaguta aria igoro ase omotwe o Yehu, akabora, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Inche nagoakire amaguta obe omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, abanto baane." 
2Kings9:7 Naye oraite osirie abanto b’enyomba y’Ahabu, omonene oo, erinde inche nyeruserie egesiomba ase Yesebeli, ekiagera ere aiterete amanyinga ’abasomba baane ababani, na ay’abasomba baane bonsi, inche Omonene." 
2Kings9:8 Enyomba yonsi y’Ahabu goika esire erue aroro; inche ninsirie kera omonto omosacha korwa ase enyomba y’Ahabu, abasibire na abatasibiri ase Abaisraeli." 
2Kings9:9 Ninkore ab’enyomba y’Ahabu buna ab’enyomba ya Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, na buna ab’enyomba ya Baasa, mosinto bw’Ahiya." 
2Kings9:10 Chisese nachiriere Yesebeli ase oboremo agwo Yesireeli, na monto onde takomotindeka.” Erio akaigora egesieri agatama." 
2Kings9:11 Ekero Yehu asogete isiko, akagenda ase abasomba b’omonene oye, na barabwo bakamoboria, “Mang’ana ki? Nase ki omonto oria ebarimo achicha aa asore?” Yehu akabairaneria, “Inwe momanyete omonto oria ne chinkwana chiaye.”" 
2Kings9:12 Barabwo bakabora: “Ayio tari amaene; totebie bono.” Erio akabatebia, “Ere nigo antebia ng’a aya naro Omonene atebire: Inche nagoakire amaguta obe omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli.”" 
2Kings9:13 Ase obwango obwo kera omonto akarusia eanga yaye akayiaara ase ebiriinero, ayetache. Erio bakabugia ebitureri biabo, bakararia, “Yehu nere omoruoti!”" 
2Kings9:14 Yehu, Mosinto o Yehosafati o Nimusi, agakora omoroberio bw’ogoita Yoramu. Ase engaki eria Yoramu amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi nigo barendete agwo Ramoti o Gileadi ase engencho ya Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria." 
2Kings9:15 Korende Yoramu omoruoti konya oiranire gochia ase Yesireeli korwarigwa chingoma chiria Abasiiria bamoagete, ekero agendete korwania Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria. Ase ayio Yehu agateba, “Onye ebi nabio ebirengererio biaino, rirorio timotiga omonto onde bwensi asoke korwa ase omochie gochia goteba amang’ana ayio agwo Yesireeli.”" 
2Kings9:16 Yehu akariina egari yaye, akagenda Yesireeli, ekiagera Yoramu nao arenge orwarete, na Ahasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda konya ochiireo komorora." 
2Kings9:17 Ekero omorendi oteneine ase omorobiri o Yesireeli atengerete, akarora ekeombe kia Yehu kegocha, agateba, “Narorire ekeombe ki’abanto.” Yoramu akamotebia, “Toma omonto ariine ebarasai, agende aumerane nabarabwo na kobaboria gose namang’ana ’omorembe babwate.”" 
2Kings9:18 Ase ayio omonto oria akariina ebarasi, akagenda koumerana nere, akamotebia, “Omoruoti nigo akoboria gose namang’ana ’omorembe obwate.” Yehu akamoiraneria, “Ninki ogokorera omorembe? Irana nyuma yane ontunyane!” Omorendi oria akaira amang’ana, agateba “Omonto oria otomwa naika asebare, korende tari koirana gocha.”" 
2Kings9:19 Naende omonto o kabere omoriini ebarasi agatomwa agaika asebare, agateba, “Omoruoti nigo akoboria gose amang’ana omorembe mobwate.” Yehu akamoiraneria, “Ninki ogokorera omorembe? Irana nyuma yane, ontunyane!”" 
2Kings9:20 Naende omorendi oria akaira amang’ana, agateba, “Naika asebare, korende tari koirana gocha. Okogendia egari kwabo nigo konga buna okwa Yehu, mosinto o Nimusi, ekiagera ere nigo akominyokia egari buna ebarimo.”" 
2Kings9:21 Yoramu agateba, “Beka egari yane ang’e!” Barabwo bakabeka egari yaye ang’e. Erio Yoramu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, na Ahasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, bakagenda, kera oyomo ase egari yaye, koumerana na Yehu. Barabwo bakaumerana nere agwo ase omogondo o Naboti, Omoyesireeli." 
2Kings9:22 Ekero Yoramu aroche Yehu, akamoboria, “Yehu, nomorembe okorenta?” Yehu akairaneria, “Naki omorembe orakore obe, ekero obonyaka na oborogi obonge bwa Yesebeli nyoko bogendererete koba iga?”" 
2Kings9:23 Yoramu akaonchora egari yaye agatama, ogokurera Ahasia, “Ayee Ahasia, nigo totegire ase okong’ainwa!”" 
2Kings9:24 Erio Yehu akaruta omogwe ne chinguru chiaye chionsi, akarasa Yoramu gati y’amareko, na omogwe oria okarimera ime ase enkoro yaye, nere akagwa ime ase egari yaye." 
2Kings9:25 Yehu agatebia Bidikari, omorwani oye ore komorenda, “Moimokie, omotugute ase omogondo o Naboti Omoyesireeli. Inyora ekero aye na inche toriinete chibarasi, togatunyana Ahabu ise, buna Omonene akwanete amang’ana mamincha yaye." 
2Kings9:26 Omonene otebire iga: Ekeene, buna rituko ria igoro narora amanyinga a Naboti na ay’abana baye agoiterwa, ningoakanie egesiomba aiga ase oboremo obo. Ase ayio bono, moimokie momotugute ase omogondo oria buna Omonene atebete.”" 
2Kings9:27 Ekero Ahasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, aroche amang’ana aria, agatama gochia ase ensemo ya Beti‐Hagani. Yehu akamobwatia korwa nyuma, agateba, “Morase nere boigo!” Na ekero arenge ase egari yaye ime ogotiira gochia Guri, ang’e na Ibileamu, bakamorasa. Erio agatama goika Megido agakwera aroro." 
2Kings9:28 Abasomba baye bakamobogoria ase egari, bakamoira Yerusalemu, bakamotindeka ase embeera yaye ase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegetwe, agwo ase Omochie o Daudi." 
2Kings9:29 Ase omwaka o ikomi nomo bw’okogamba kwa Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu, Ahasia, konya ochakire kogambera Abayuda." 
2Kings9:30 Yehu akagenda Yesireeli, na ekero Yesebeli aigwete amang’ana ayio agasata amaiso aye na gochabera omotwe oye, akarigereria korwa ase ekebao." 
2Kings9:31 Na buna Yehu abete ogosoa ase egeita, omokungu oria agakuura, “Aye Simuri, aye gwaitete omonene oo, mang’ana ki?”" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu akarigereria gochia ase ekebao, akaboria, “Ning’o ore ase ensemo yane? Ning’o?” Abasacha bagombaetigwe babere, gose batato, bakamorigereria gochia isiko." 
2Kings9:33 Yehu akabatebia, “Tuguta omokungu oyio gocha inse aa!” Ase ayio bakamotuguta gochia inse; amanyinga aye agasiarokera enyasi amo ne chibarasi, Yehu akamotindachera inse ne chibarasi ne chigari." 
2Kings9:34 Yehu agasoa nyomba, akaragera akanywa. Erio agateba, “Bono tindeka omokungu oyo oragereirie, ekiagera ere nigo arenge omosubati bw’omoruoti.”" 
2Kings9:35 Korende ekero bagendete komotindeka, tibanyorete gento kende ase omobere oye otatiga ekeore, na amagoro, na ebisanyi bi’amaboko aye." 
2Kings9:36 Ekero bairanete, bagatebia Yehu amang’ana ayio, nere akabairaneria, agateba, “Eri ne ring’ana ri’Omonene riria akwanete goetera ase omosomba oye Elija Omotisibi: Agwo ase oboremo bore Yesireeli chisese nachirie omobere o Yesebeli." 
2Kings9:37 Na omobere o Yesebeli okwete nobe buna esike igoro ase oboremo bore Yesireeli, goika monto onde tari orayomanyererie ng’a oyo nomobere o Yesebeli.”" 
2Kings10:1 Ahabu nabwate abana abamura emerongo etano na ebere agwo Samaria. Yehu akarika amarube, akayatoma Samaria, ase abagambi abarenge Yesireeli, na ase abagaaka, na ase abarendi b’abana b’Ahabu, agateba," 
2Kings10:2 “Abana b’omonene oino nao bare nainwe, ne chigari ne chibarasi nao chire amo nainwe, amo nemechie egiteire chindwaki, boigo nebirwanero bionsi. Ase ayio, rirube rikobaikera," 
2Kings10:3 mochore oyore omuya mono, naende oisanerete, korwa ase egati y’abana abamura b’omonene oino, erio momobeke aikaranse ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia ise. Erio morwanerere enyomba y’omonene oino.”" 
2Kings10:4 Korende barabwo bakaba nobwoba obonene mono, bagateba, “Abaruoti babere tibanyarete kobua Yehu, naki intwe torakore tomobue?”" 
2Kings10:5 Ase ayio, ere oria otenenerete enyomba y’omoruoti, na oria otenenerete omochie, amo nabagaaka na abateneneri b’abana b’Ahabu, bagatoma amang’ana ase Yehu, bakabora, “Intwe nabasomba bao, nabo torakore onsi aya ogotochika. Titobeka onde bwensi koba omoruoti; aye kora kende gionsi oranche.”" 
2Kings10:6 Naende akabarikera rirube eria kabere, akabatebia, “Onye more ase ensemo yane, naende onye more ang’e konyigwera, butora emetwe y’abana b’omonene oino, na ankio, engaki buna eye mochiche asende aiga Yesireeli.” Abana b’omoruoti emerongo etano na ebere, nao bamenyete amo nabanto abanene b’omochie, baria batenenerete." 
2Kings10:7 Ekero rirube riria riabaikerete, bakaimokia abana b’omoruoti emerongo etano na ebere, bakabaita nemioro. Erio bakabeka emetwe yabo ebitonga ime, bakayetoma gochia ase Yehu agwo Yesireeli." 
2Kings10:8 Ekero omonto arentete amang’ana ng’a emetwe y’abana b’omoruoti yarentirwe, Yehu agateba, “Yebeke amo ase chitui ibere agwo ase egesoero ki’egeita, ebeereo goika mambia.”" 
2Kings10:9 Rituko ria kabere ekero asogete mambia, agatenena agakwana nabanto bonsi, akabora, “Inwe timori na komocha. Ninche nakora omoroberio mamincha y’omonene one, nkamoita, korende ning’o oita abaiga bonsi?" 
2Kings10:10 Ase ayio, manya ng’a ring’ana ri’Omonene tirikogwa inse bosa, riria Omonene akwanete igoro y’enyomba y’Ahabu. Ekeene, Omonene okorire aya akwanete goetera ase omosomba oye Elija.”" 
2Kings10:11 Erio Yehu agaita abanto bonsi baria batigarete b’enyomba y’Ahabu agwo Yesireeli, agaita nabanto baye abanene bonsi, na abasani baria bamanyaine, na abakuani baye, tatigaretie nonya noyomo." 
2Kings10:12 Yehu akaimoka, akagenda Samaria. Ekero arenge inchera, agaika Beti‐Ekedi aase abarisia barenge konachera ching’ondi amarionya," 
2Kings10:13 akaumerana nabamwabo Ahasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akaboria, “Inwe mbarabi?” Nabarabwo bakairaneria, “Intwe nigo tore abamwabo Ahasia, nigo tokogenda gokwania abana b’omoruoti, na ab’eting’ana, ng’ina omoruoti.”" 
2Kings10:14 Yehu agatebia abanto baye. “Babwate bare moyo!” Na barabwo bakababwata bare moyo, bakabaita na kobaruta ase engoro agwo ang’e na Beti‐Ekedi, abanto emerongo ene, na babere; tatigaretie nonya noyomo." 
2Kings10:15 Ekero Yehu aruete aase agwo akaumerana na Yehonadabu, mosinto o Rekabu, ogocha komorotota. Yehu akamokwania, akamoboria, “Enkoro yao nendonge ere asende buna eyane ere asore?” Yehonadabu akamoiraneria, “Ee, nendonge ere.” Yehu akamotebia, “Onye nabo, tobwatane amaboko.” Bakabwatana amaboko, na Yehu akamoriinia ase egari yaye ime." 
2Kings10:16 Akamotebia, “Inchuo amo nainche, orore risemi riane na omokia one ase Omonene!” Erio bakagenda komo ase egari ya Yehu." 
2Kings10:17 Na ekero aigete Samaria, agaita abanto bonsi batigarete ase enyomba y’Ahabu agwo Samaria, goika akabasiria kegima, buna Omonene atebete goetera ase Elija." 
2Kings10:18 Yehu agasangereria abanto bonsi, akabatebia, “Ahabu nigo akorerete Baali ake igo, korende inche Yehu nigo ndayekorere mono goetania." 
2Kings10:19 Ase ayio bono, ndangereria ababani bonsi ba Baali, na abakoreri baye bonsi, na abakuani baye bonsi; onde tabaisa gotigara otache, ekiagera inche ngochia nde korua ekeng’wanso ekenene ase Baali. Omonto onde bwensi oramoche, tachicha, takoba moyo.” Korende Yehu nigo akorete ayio ase obong’ainereria, erinde aite na gosiria abakoreri ba Baali." 
2Kings10:20 Yehu agachika, agateba, “Rangeria abanto babe nomosangererekano omochenu ase Baali!” Ase ayio, barabwo bakararia amang’ana ayio." 
2Kings10:21 Yehu agatoma amang’ana ase Abaisraeli bonsi, na abakoreri ba Baali bonsi bagacha, goika nonya nomonto oyomo tatigara otachete. Bagasoa enyomba ya Baali, na enyomba eria egaichora nabanto churi." 
2Kings10:22 Agatebia omoteneneri bwe chianga chi’ogosasimera, “Orentere abakoreri bonsi ba Baali chianga chiabo.” Ere akabarentera chianga." 
2Kings10:23 Yehu agasoa enyomba ya Baali amo na Yehonadabu, mosinto o Rekabu, agatebia abakoreri ba Baali “Rigia na morore ng’a omosomba bw’Omonene tari ase egati yaino nonya noyomo, korende nabakoreri ba Baali boka.”" 
2Kings10:24 Erio bagasoa korua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde. Yehu konya obekire abanto emerongo etano na etato isiko, abatebetie, “Omonto onde bwensi asemore oratige omonto atooreke ase abwo nkobeka ase amaboko aino, oyio goika akwe ribaga riaye.”" 
2Kings10:25 Ekero Yehu akoorete korua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, agatebia abarendi na abatang’ani, “Soa ime, mobaite, timotiga onde atooreke.” Kobaitire nemioro, abarendi na abatang’ani bakabatuguta isiko. Erio bagasoa akanyomba ka ime k’enyomba ya Baali," 
2Kings10:26 ne chisiiro chiateneneirie Baali bagachisokia korwa aroro, bagachisamba." 
2Kings10:27 Bagatagora omogwekano o Baali enyene na enyomba yaye, erio bakaroisia aase aria akaba echoo, naboigo ere nonya ngoika rero iga." 
2Kings10:28 Ase enchera eyio Yehu agasiria Baali korwa ase Abaisraeli. 
2Kings10:29 Korende tatigete kobwatia chinchera chia Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati; agakora ebibe biria Yeroboamu akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe. Tatigete emegwekano ye chimori chi’etahabu eria yarenge agwo Beteli na Dani." 
2Kings10:30 Omonene agatebia Yehu, “Ekiagera gwakorire buya ase ogokora ayare amaronge ase amaiso aane, naende gwakoreire enyomba y’Ahabu koreng’ana nebirengererio bi’enkoro yane, abana bao goika ekiaare gia kane mbabe bagoikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti ki’Abaisraeli.”" 
2Kings10:31 Korende Yehu tarendete na kobwata amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nenkoro yaye yonsi. Tatigete gokora ebibe biria Yeroboamu akorete, akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
2Kings10:32 Ase amatuko aria Omonene agachaka gokeyia ense y’Abaisraeli. Hasaeli akababua ase chinsemo chiabo chionsi," 
2Kings10:33 gochakera moocha ya Yorodan na kogenderera gochia irianyi goika Aroeri, omochie ore ang’e nakarooche k’Arinoni. Eye nense ya Gileadi na Basani, ase ebisaku bia Gadi na Reuben na ekeng’ese gi’ekia Manase biamenyete." 
2Kings10:34 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yehu, na aya onsi akorete, na okobua kwaye gwonsi, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings10:35 Na Yehu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa agwo Samaria, na Yehoahasi, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings10:36 Engaki Yehu agambete igoro ase Abaisraeli agwo Samaria nemiaka emerongo ebere, na etano na etato." 
2Kings11:1 Bono ekero Atalia, ng’ina Ahasia, aroche ng’a omwana oye okure, akaimoka, agaita eamate yonsi y’omoruoti." 
2Kings11:2 Korende Yehoseba, mosubati o Yehoramu omoruoti, omosubati omwabo Ahasia, akaira Yoashi, mosinto bw’Ahasia, bobisi korwa ase egati y’abana b’omoruoti, baria barenge ang’e goitwa. Omoiseke oria akamobeka amo nomoreri oye ase akanyomba g’okorara. Ase enchera eye akabisa Yoashi ng’a Atalia tamoita." 
2Kings11:3 Nyuma y’ayio Yoashi akaba okomenya amo na Yehoseba ase enyomba y’Omonene, ase abisetwe ase engaki y’emiaka etano nomo, ekero Atalia agendererete kogambera ense eria." 
2Kings11:4 Ase omwaka o gatano na kabere, Yehoyada agatoma amang’ana korenta abatang’ani b’abarendi amagana b’omoruoti, na ab’enyomba y’omoruoti, akabairana ase enyomba y’Omonene, agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabarabwo, na akagera bakaria chimuma agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene. Erio akaborokia omwana oria bw’omoruoti." 
2Kings11:5 Akabachika, akabora, “Eke nakio egento morakore: Ensemo eyemo ya isato yaino, baria bakorenda ase rituko ri’Esabato, barende enyomba y’Omoruoti," 
2Kings11:6 na ensemo ende ya isato barende ase Egeita gia Suri, na ensemo ende ya isato barende ase egeita magega y’abarendi. Naboigo mobe mokorenda ase enyomba y’omoruoti." 
2Kings11:7 Ebiombe bibere biaino biria bire ne ribaga ase rituko ri’Esabato, nigo birabe bikorenda enyomba y’Omonene ase omoruoti are." 
2Kings11:8 Moetanane omoruoti chinsemo chionsi, kera oyomo abwate ebirwanero biaye koboko, na omonto onde bwensi oraike ang’e ase abarendi goika aitwe akwe. Mobe amo nomoruoti aase ande onsi akogenda na koirana.”" 
2Kings11:9 Abatang’ani baria b’abarendi amagana bagakora onsi koreng’ana buna Yehoyada omokuani abachigete. Kera oyomo akarenta abanto baye, baria barenge gokora emeremo ase rituko ri’Esabato na baria barenge korua ase emeremo ase rituko erio. Igo bakagenda ase Yehoyada omokuani." 
2Kings11:10 Omokuani akaa abatang’ani baria amatimo ne chinguba chiria chiarenge echi’omoruoti Daudi; ebinto ebio biarenge ime ase enyomba y’Omonene. 
2Kings11:11 Na abarendi baria bagatenena korwa ensemo ya irianyi y’enyomba goika ensemo ya sugusu, bagaetanana omorouti ang’e negesasimero na enyomba yonsi; kera oyomo obo obwate ebirwanero koboko kwaye." 
2Kings11:12 Erio Yehoyada akarenta omwana oria omomura bw’omoruoti isiko, akamobekera egutwa ase omotwe oye, naende akamoa Ebuku y’Oborori. Erio Yoashi akararigwa ng’a obeire omoruoti, na agaakwa amaguta. Abanto bagaaka chinkobi, bagateba, “Omoruoti ochie kare!”" 
2Kings11:13 Ekero Atalia aigwete amariogi ’abarendi na ay’abanto bonsi, agasoa enyomba y’Omonene ase abanto basangererekanete." 
2Kings11:14 Atalia akarora omoruoti oteneine ang’e nesiiro buna engencho yarenge. Abatang’ani na abanto abarenge kobugia ebirombeta bateneine mbarabare y’omoruoti, na abanto bonsi b’ense eria nigo barenge nomochengo, bakobugia ebirombeta. Atalia agatandora chianga chiaye, akarera, “Oko nokoregwa! Nokoregwa!”" 
2Kings11:15 Yehoyada omokuani agachika abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi amagana, akabatebia, “Mosokie isiko, momobeke ase egati y’abarendi, na moite nomoro onde bwensi okomotunyana.” Omokuani tanchete omokungu oria aiterwe ime ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Kings11:16 Ase ayio bakabwata omokungu oria, bakamoetia ase egeita chibarasi chiarenge gosoera gochia ase enyomba y’omoruoti, bakamoitera aroro." 
2Kings11:17 Yehoyada agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania egati y’Omonene na omoruoti amo nabanto, ng’a barabwo babe abanto b’Omonene; boigo agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania egati y’omoruoti na abanto." 
2Kings11:18 Erio abanto bonsi b’ense eria bakagenda ase enyomba ya Baali, bakayetagora bakayeiyeria inse; ebisasimero biaye na emegwekano yaye agosasima bakabinachana ebing’ese, bagaita Matani, omokuani o Baali, agwo bosio bw’ebisasimero. Na Yehoyada omokuani akabeka abarendi barende enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Kings11:19 Nyuma y’ayio akaira abatang’ani baria b’amagana, na abarendi b’omoruoti, na abarendi b’enyomba y’omoruoti, na abanto bonsi b’ense eria, na barabwo bakarusia omoruoti korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene, bakamoetia ase Egeita ki’Abarendi gochia ase enyomba y’omoruoti. Erio omoruoti agaikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti." 
2Kings11:20 Abanto bonsi b’ense eria bakaba nomochengo; na omochie okaba omotoereru, ekiagera Atalia aitirwe nomoro, agwo ase enyomba y’omoruoti." 
2Kings11:21 Yoashi nigo arenge nemiaka etano na ebere ekero achagete kogamba. 
2Kings12:1 Ase omwaka o gatano na kabere bw’okogamba kwa Yehu, Yoashi agachaka kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo ene agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Sibia korwa Beeri‐Seba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoashi agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene ase amatuko aye onsi, ekiagera Yehoyada omokuani abete okomosemia." 
2Kings12:3 Korende nonya naboigo, aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa tatagoretwe. Abanto bakagenderera korua ebing’wanso na gosambera ubani aroro." 
2Kings12:4 Yoashi agatebia abakuani, “Chibesa chionsi chi’ebinto ebichenu chikorentwa ase enyomba y’Omonene, ne chibesa kera omonto arageire korua, ne chibesa chikoruegwa ase okobooria abanto koreng’ana ne rigori richikire, ne chibesa omonto akorua ase ogwancha," 
2Kings12:5 tiga abakuani bachibogorie, kera oyomo korwa ase abanto baye. Erio barabwo baroiserie enyomba aande onsi eganirie koroisigwa.”" 
2Kings12:6 Korende ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere na etato bw’okogamba kwa Yoashi omoruoti, abakuani tibaroisetie enyomba y’Omonene ase yatagogete." 
2Kings12:7 Ase ayio Yoashi omoruoti akarangeria Yehoyada omokuani na abakuani bande, agakwana nabarabwo agateba, “Ninki kiagera motari koroisia enyomba aase yatagokire? Bono timobaisa korusia chibesa chinde chionsi korwa ase abanto, korende morente chibesa chiria mobwate, erinde eroiserigwe ase yatagokire.”" 
2Kings12:8 Abakuani bagancha ng’a tibagochia korusia chibesa chinde korwa ase abanto, naende ng’a tibagochia koroisia enyomba ase yatagokire." 
2Kings12:9 Erio Yehoyada omokuani akarenta esanduku enkong’u akayebochora akabao ase ekemumeko kiaye, akayebeka mbarabare y’egesasimero ensemo y’okorio, ase abanto bare gosoera enyomba y’Omonene. Na abakuani baria barendete agwo ase egesieri ki’enyomba, akabeka ime ase esanduku eria chibesa chionsi chiarentetwe ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Kings12:10 Engaki ende yonsi chibesa chiarenge koba chinyinge ime ase esanduku omoriki bw’omoruoti na omokuani omonene nigo barenge gocha kobara chibesa chiria chiare korentwa ase enyomba y’Omonene na gochibeka ime ase emebuko, naende bayeboa." 
2Kings12:11 Ekero chibesa chiria chiarengirwe, nigo chiare koruegwa ase amaboko ’abanto baria batenenerete emeremo y’enyomba y’Omonene. Nabarabwo nigo barenge goakana ching’eria ase abasenia be chibao na abaagachi barenge gokora emeremo ase enyomba y’Omonene," 
2Kings12:12 na abaagachi b’amagena na ababaachi amagena. Naende nigo barenge kogora chibao, na amagena asenirie, ase okoroiseria enyomba y’Omonene aase yatagogete. Chibesa echio nigo chiaruetwe ase kera egento kiaganeirie ase okoroiseria enyomba eria." 
2Kings12:13 Korende korwa ase chibesa chiria chiarentetwe ase enyomba y’Omonene tibaroisetie chisani chie chifeta gose ebinachi, gose ebitaabo, gose ebirombeta, gose ebikorero binde bie chitahabu, gose ebie chifeta, ase enyomba y’Omonene," 
2Kings12:14 ekiagera chionsi chiaruetwe ase abakori emeremo abarenge koroisia enyomba ase echio. 
2Kings12:15 Abanto abwo barenge koegwa chibesa chiria tibarenge koborigwa koorokia omobaro, ekiagera barenge abegenwa." 
2Kings12:16 Chibesa chiarenge koruegwa ase okorongeyia okomocha, na echio chiarenge koruegwa ase ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe tichiarentetwe ase enyomba y’Omonene; echio nigo chiabete echi’abakuani." 
2Kings12:17 Ase engaki eria Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, akagenda akarwania Gati, akayobua. Korende ekero Hasaeli aonchogete kogenda korwania Yerusalemu," 
2Kings12:18 Yoashi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akaimokia ebiegwa bionsi biria Yehosafati, na Yehoramu, na Ahasia, chisokoro chiaye, abaruoti b’Abayuda, baatananete koba ebichenu, amo nebiegwa biaye omonyene bi’ogwancha, ne chitahabu chionsi chianyoretwe ase chikungo chi’enyomba y’Omonene na ey’omoruoti, Erio agatoma ebinto biria bionsi ase Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria. Erio Hasaeli agatiga Yerusalemu." 
2Kings12:19 Bono amang’ana onsi igoro ya Yoashi, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings12:20 Abasomba baye bagakora omoroberio bw’okomoita, bakamoitera ime ase enyomba yaye agwo Milo, agwo ase enchera ekogenda Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Abasomba baye, Yosakari, mosinto o Simeati, na Yehosabadi, mosinto o Someri, aba nabwo bamoitete agakwa. Yoashi agatindekwa ase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegetwe agwo ase Omochie o Daudi, na Amasia, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings13:1 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere na gatato bw’okogamba kwa Yoashi, mosinto bw’Ahasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Yehoahasi, mosinto o Yehu, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli agwo Samaria, na akagamba emiaka ikomi na etano na ebere." 
2Kings13:2 Ere agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene; akabwatia chingencho chia Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, ase ogokora ebibe biria ere akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe; teatananete korwa ase birobio." 
2Kings13:3 Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene ase Abaisraeli, na ekero ase ekero akaba okobabeka ase okoboko kwa Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, na ase okwa Beni‐Hadadi, mosinto o Hasaeli." 
2Kings13:4 Erio Yehoahasi agasaba Omonene, na Omonene akamoigwa, ekiagera aroche ogochandwa kw’Abaisraeli, buna omoruoti bw’Abasiiria abachandete." 
2Kings13:5 Ase ayio Omonene akaa Abaisraeli omotooria, obatooretie korwa ase amaboko ’Abasiiria. Nyuma y’ayio Abaisraeli bakagenderera komenya ase chinka chiabo buna agwo ritang’ani." 
2Kings13:6 Korende nonya naboigo, tibeatananete korwa ase ebibe bi’enyomba ya Yeroboamu, biria ere akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe, korende bakaba bakogenderera kobikora. Boigo omote bw’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, ogatigara agwo Samaria." 
2Kings13:7 Yehoahasi tatigareretigwe abarwani esegi otatiga abariini chibarasi emerongo etano, ne chigari ikomi, na abanto barenge gotaara namagoro chilifu ikomi, ekiagera omoruoti bw’Abasiiria aitete abanto bonsi bakaba buna orotu rw’ekeooreri rogotiringwa." 
2Kings13:8 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yehoahasi, na aya onsi akorete, na okobua kwaye, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings13:9 Yehoahasi akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa agwo Samaria, na Yehoasi, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings13:10 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na gatano na kabere, bw’okogamba kwa Yoashi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Yehoasi, mosinto o Yehoahasi, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli agwo Samaria, na akagamba emiaka ikomi na etano nomo." 
2Kings13:11 Nere agakora amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, teatananete korwa ase ekemo ki’ebibe biria Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe, korende akagenderera kobikora." 
2Kings13:12 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yehoasi, na aya onsi akorete, na okobua kwaye gw’okorwania Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings13:13 Yehoasi akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa agwo Samaria aase abaruoti b’Abaisraeli batindegetwe. Yeroboamu agaikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti kia Yehoasi." 
2Kings13:14 Ekero Elisha arenge noborwaire bw’amakweri Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akagenda komorora. Gaikireo agachaka korera, “Tata ominto! Tata ominto! Aye nigo ore ase Abaisraeli buna chigari na abariini chibarasi.”" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha akamotebia, “Imokia obota na emegwe!” Ase ayio akaimokia ebinto ebio." 
2Kings13:16 Naende akamotebia, “Ng’usa obota bwao!” Nere akabong’usa. Na Elisha akabeka amaboko aye ase amaboko ’omoruoti oria," 
2Kings13:17 akamotebia, “Igora ekebao kerochie moocha!” Yehoasi agakeigora. Erio Elisha akamotebia, “Rasa!” Nere akarasa. Elisha agakwana, “Omogwe bw’obobui bw’Omonene. Omogwe bw’obobui igoro y’Abasiiria. Aye norwanie Abasiiria agwo Afeki goika obasirie kegima.”" 
2Kings13:18 Erio Elisha agatebia omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, “Imokia emegwe!” Nere akayeimokia. Naende akamotebia, “Rasa inse ase riroba!” Nere akarasa inse ase riroba ara gatato, agatiga." 
2Kings13:19 Omonto oria o Nyasae akaba nendamwamu asare, akamotebia, “Nigo yagwenerete orase inse ara gatano, gose ara gatano na rimo; kware gokora igo nanga nigo kwabua Abasiiria na kobasiria kegima, korende bono nigo orabaake ara gatato rioka”." 
2Kings13:20 Na Elisha agakwa, agatindekwa. Bono ebiombe bi’Abamoabu bikaba bigocha ase ense eria ase omochakano bwa kera omwaka." 
2Kings13:21 Ekaba ekero omonto oyomo akwete arenge gotindekwa, ekeombe ekemo kia biria kegacha, na abanto babogoretie omobere oria, bakayoruta ase oboina bw’Elisha. Ekero ogweteo ogakuna amauga ’Elisha, okaboka na koba moyo, agatenena namagoro aye." 
2Kings13:22 Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, akaba ogochanda Abaisraeli ase amatuko onsi ay’okogamba kwa Yehoahasi." 
2Kings13:23 Korende Omonene nigo arenge nobwanchani asebare, na abarorerete amabera, akabairanera ase engencho y’okobwatana kw’ogotianania akorete na Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo, na igo tabasiretie. Tabatugutete korwa ase obosio bwaye nonya ngoika rero iga." 
2Kings13:24 Ekero Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, akwete, Beni‐Hadadi, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings13:25 Erio Yehoasi, mosinto o Yehoahasi, akaira naende korwa ase Beni‐Hadadi, mosinto o Hasaeli, emechie eyio ere konya airire korwa ase Yehoahasi ise ekero gi’esegi. Yehoasi akabua Beni‐Hadadi ara gatato, akairania emechie y’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings14:1 Ase omwaka o kabere ase okogamba kwa Yehoasi, mosinto o Yehoahasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Amasia, mosinto o Yoashi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings14:2 Ere nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na etano ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere na kianda, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Yehoadini o Yerusalemu." 
2Kings14:3 Amasia agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, korende nonya naboigo takorete buna Daudi, sokoro yaye, akorete. Nigo akorete onsi buna aya Yoashi ise akorete." 
2Kings14:4 Aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa agatiga kobao; abanto bakagenderera korua ebing’wanso na gosamba ubani igoro y’aase aria. 
2Kings14:5 Ekero oboruoti bwaye bwabete ne chinguru agaita abasomba baye baria baitete ise orenge omoruoti. 
2Kings14:6 Korende taitete abana b’abaiti baria. Agakora koreng’ana namang’ana arikire ase Ebuku y’Amachiko a Musa ase Omonene achigete: “Abaibori tibagoitwa ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abana babo, gose abana tibagoitwa ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abaibori babo; korende kera omonto nigo arakwe ase ebibe biaye omonyene.”" 
2Kings14:7 Amasia agaita Abaedomu chilifu ikomi agwo ase Riranya ri’Enyancha y’Omonyo; akaira omochie o Sela ase okorwana esegi, akayoroka Yokiteli; naboigo okorokwa goika rero iga." 
2Kings14:8 Erio Amasia agatoma abanto ase Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, oyorenge omwana o Yehoahasi, mosinto o Yehu, agateba, “Inchuo torigereranie obosio ase obosio!”" 
2Kings14:9 Na Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, agatoma amang’ana ase Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akamotebia, “Rigeri erimo ria Lebanoni rigatoma amang’ana ase omocharake ore Lebanoni, rigateba: Ing’a omoiseke oo, omwana one omomura amonyuome. Erio eng’iti y’orosana ya Lebanoni egaeta aase agwo egatiringera inse rigeri riria." 
2Kings14:10 Ekero kwabuire Abaedomu kwaenenire ase enkoro yao. Isaneka nobonene obwo, naende beera inka bwoo. Nase ki ogotubora emechando ebaise kogera ogwe aye amo n’Abayuda?”" 
2Kings14:11 Korende Amasia tanchete gotegerera. Ase ayio Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akagenda koumerana nere, na igo ere na Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, bakarigererania obosio ase obosio ase okorwana esegi agwo Beti‐Semesi, omochie bw’Abayuda." 
2Kings14:12 Abayuda bakabugwa n’Abaisraeli, bagatama, kera omonto gochia ase enka yaye." 
2Kings14:13 Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akabwatera Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agwo Beti‐Semesi. Amasia nigo arenge mosinto o Yoashi bw’Ahasia. Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akagenda Yerusalemu, agatagora orwaki rw’aroro ase obotambe bw’amaboko amagana ane, korwa Egeita gi’Efraimu goika Egeita gi’Ekoona." 
2Kings14:14 Akaira chitahabu chionsi, ne chifeta, na ebikorero bionsi bianyorekanete ase enyomba y’Omonene, na ase chikungo chi’enyomba y’omoruoti, agoosa nabanto abarengeo. Erio akairana Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Yehoasi akorete, na okobua kwaye, na buna arwanete esegi n’Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings14:16 Yehoasi akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa agwo Samaria ase abaruoti b’Abaisraeli batindegetwe, na Yeroboamu, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings14:17 Amasia, mosinto o Yoashi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akagenderera koba moyo emiaka ikomi na etano nyuma y’ogokwa kwa Yehoasi, mosinto o Yehoahasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings14:18 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Amasia nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda. 
2Kings14:19 Abanto bagakora omoroberio agwo Yerusalemu bw’ogoita Amasia, korende ere agatama gochia Lakisi. Abanto bagatomwa gochia Lakisi, bakamoitera aroro." 
2Kings14:20 Bakabogoria omobere oye ne chibarasi, bakayoira Yerusalemu, bakayotindeka aroro ase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegetwe, ase Omochie o Daudi." 
2Kings14:21 Erio Abayuda bonsi bakabeka Asaria akaba omoruoti ribaga ri’Amasia ise. Asaria nigo arenge nemiaka ikomi na etano nomo ekero keria. 
2Kings14:22 Ekero Amasia, omoruoti araire ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, Asaria akaagacha Elati, naende akayoirania ase Abayuda." 
2Kings14:23 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano bw’okogamba kw’Amasia, mosinto o Yoashi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Yeroboamu, mosinto o Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, agachaka kogamba agwo Samaria; ere akagamba emiaka emerongo ene nomo." 
2Kings14:24 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene; teatananete korwa ase ebibe biria Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
2Kings14:25 Akairania orogongo rw’Abaisraeli korwa ase egesoero kia Hamati, goikera ase Enyancha y’Ekerubo Ekiomo koreng’ana buna Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atebete goetera ase omosomba oye Yona mosinto bw’Amitai, omobani oria orwete Gati-Heferi." 
2Kings14:26 Omonene nigo aroche emechando y’Abaisraeli ng’a nemenene mono, ngochia koera bare bonsi, omosomba na oyo tari omosomba, naende monto onde tarenge ogokonya Abaisraeli." 
2Kings14:27 Korende Omonene konya tarateba ng’a nasirie erieta ri’Abaisraeli korwa ase ense. Ase ayio akabatooria goetera ase okoboko kwa Yeroboamu, mosinto o Yehoasi." 
2Kings14:28 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yeroboamu, na aya onsi akorete, na okobua kwaye, na buna arwanete, naende buna airanetie Damesiki na Hamati ase Abaisraeli, emechie konya yabeire ey’Abayuda, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings14:29 Yeroboamu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiarenge abaruoti b’Abaisraeli chiararete. Na Zakaria, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings15:1 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere, na etano na ebere, bw’okogamba kwa Yeroboamu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Asaria, mosinto bw’Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings15:2 Nigo arenge nemiaka ikomi na etano nomo ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo etano, na ebere, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Yekolia o Yerusalemu." 
2Kings15:3 Asaria agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, koreng’ana buna aya onsi Amasia ise akorete." 
2Kings15:4 Korende nonya naboigo, aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa tatagorete, na abanto bakagenderera korua ebing’wanso na gosamba ubani igoro y’aase aria." 
2Kings15:5 Omonene akarentera omoruoti oborwaire bwa ukoma bokaba bomoriete goika rituko ri’ogokwa kwaye. Ase igo omoruoti akamenya enyomba ere bweka ao. Yotamu, omwana oye omomura, akaba omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’obogambi, akagambera abanto b’ense eria." 
2Kings15:6 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Asaria, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings15:7 Asaria akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa aase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegetwe, agwo ase Omochie o Daudi, na Yotamu, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings15:8 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na etano na etato bw’okogamba gw’Asaria omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Zakaria, mosinto o Yeroboamu, akagambera Abaisraeli agwo Samaria ase engaki y’emetienyi etano nomo." 
2Kings15:9 Agakora ayare amabe ase amaiso ’Omonene, buna chisokoro chiaye chiakorete. Teatananete korwa ase ebibe biria Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
2Kings15:10 Salumu, mosinto o Yabesi, agakora omoroberio bw’okomoita, akamoitera ase amasio ’abanto, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings15:11 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Zakaria nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli. 
2Kings15:12 Ase ayio eira eria Omonene arierete Yehu ng’a abana baye goika ekiaare gia kane mbabe bagoikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti kw’Abaisraeli egaikeranigwa. 
2Kings15:13 Salumu, mosinto o Yabesi, agachaka kogamba ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na kianda, bw’okogamba gwa Usia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akagamba omotienyi oyomo agwo Samaria." 
2Kings15:14 Erio Menahemu, mosinto o Gadi, akarua Tirisa, akagenda Samaria, agaita Salumu, mosinto o Yabesi, agwo Samaria, naende akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings15:15 Bono amang’ana onsi igoro ya Salumu, na omoroberio oria bw’ogoita akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings15:16 Ase engaki eria Menahemu agasaria kegima omochie o Tifusa, agaita kera oyomo orenge imeo, na ase chingongo chionsi chiayoetanaine korwa Tirisa na kogenderera, ekiagera tibamoigorerete ebiita bi’omochie oria asoe. Boigo akoora abakungu bonsi b’aroro barenge barito." 
2Kings15:17 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na kianda, bw’okogamba gw’Asaria, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Menahemu, mosinto o Gadi, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli, akagamba emiaka ikomi agwo Samaria." 
2Kings15:18 Nere agakora ayare amabe ase amaiso ’Omonene; ase amatuko aye onsi teatananete korwa ase ebibe biria Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
2Kings15:19 Puli, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri agacha korwania ense eria, na Menahemu akaa Puli chibesa chie chifeta, chitalanta elifu eyemo, erinde amokonye na akore oboruoti bwaye bobe ne chinguru." 
2Kings15:20 Menahemu akarusia chibesa echio buna ebango korwa ase Abaisraeli abarenge abanda; kera oyomo obo akarua chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo etano. Chibesa echi akaa omoruoti bw’Abaasuri. Ase ayio omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akairana tamenya ase ense eria. 
2Kings15:21 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Menahemu, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings15:22 Menahemu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, na Pekahia, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings15:23 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etano bw’okogamba gw’Asaria, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Pekahia, mosinto o Menahemu, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli agwo Samaria, akagamba emiaka ebere." 
2Kings15:24 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene; teatananete korwa ase ebibe biria Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
2Kings15:25 Peka, mosinto o Remalia, omotang’ani bw’abarwani esegi baye, agakora omoroberio amo n’Abagileadi emerongo etano bw’ogoita Pekahia, barabwo bakamoitera agwo Samaria, agaita n’Arigobu na Arie, ase enyomba enene y’omoruoti." 
2Kings15:26 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Pekahia, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings15:27 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etano, na ebere, bw’okogamba gw’Asaria, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Peka, mosinto o Remalia, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli, agwo Samaria, akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere." 
2Kings15:28 Peka agakora ayare amabe ase amaiso ’Omonene. Teatananete korwa ase ebibe biria Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, akorete akagera Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe." 
2Kings15:29 Ase engaki y’okogamba gwa Peka, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Tigilati‐Pileseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, agacha akabwata Iyoni, na Abeli‐Beti‐Maaka, na Yanoa, na Kedesi, na Hasori, na orogongo rwa Gileadi, na orwa Galili, na ense yonsi ya Nafutali. Boigo agoosa abanto, akabaira ase ense y’Abaasuri." 
2Kings15:30 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere bw’okogamba kwa Yotamu, mosinto bwa Usia, Hosea, mosinto bwa Ela, agakora omoroberio bw’ogoita Peka, mosinto o Remalia; akamoita, naende akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings15:30 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere bw’okogamba kwa Yotamu, mosinto bwa Usia, Hosea, mosinto bwa Ela, agakora omoroberio bw’ogoita Peka, mosinto o Remalia; akamoita, naende akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings15:31 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Peka, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings15:32 Ase omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba gwa Peka, mosinto o Remalia, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Yotamu, mosinto bwa Usia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings15:33 Nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere, na etano, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka ikomi na etano nomo agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Yerusa, omosubati o Zadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Ere agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, buna aya onsi Usia ise akorete." 
2Kings15:35 Korende nonya naboigo, aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa agatigwa kobao; abanto bakagenderera korua ebing’wanso na gosambera ubani igoro y’aase agwo. Yotamu akaagacha Egeita kia Rogoro ki’enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Kings15:36 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yotamu, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings15:37 Ase amatuko aria Omonene agachaka gotoma Resini, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, na Peka, mosinto o Remalia, bakagenda korwania Abayuda." 
2Kings15:38 Yotamu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa aase chiatindegetwe, agwo ase Omochie o Daudi, sokoro yaye, na Ahasi omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings16:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na kabere bw’okogamba gwa Peka, mosinto o Remalia, Ahasi mosinto o Yotamu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings16:2 Ahasi nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka etano nomo agwo Yerusalemu. Ere takorete ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, Nyasae oye, buna Daudi sokoro yaye akorete," 
2Kings16:3 korende akabwatia chinchera chi’abaruoti b’Abaisraeli. Boigo agasamba omwana oye omomura akaba ekeng’wanso, koreng’ana nogokora gw’okogechia okwo abanto b’ebisaku banarete gokora, baria Omonene aseretie korwa ase Abaisraeli." 
2Kings16:4 Boigo akarua ebing’wanso na agasambera ubani agwo aase aimokererete igoro, na igoro ase ebigoro, na inse ya kera omote omobese." 
2Kings16:5 Resini, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, na Peka, mosinto o Remalia, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, bakagenda korwania Yerusalemu, bakanaaria Ahasi, korende tibabua omochie." 
2Kings16:6 Ase engaki eria Resini, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria akairania omochie o Elati ase Abasiiria ase ogoseria Abayuda korwa Elati. Nyuma y’ayio Abasiiria bagacha komenya Elati; nao bamenyete goika rero iga." 
2Kings16:7 Ahasi agatoma abanto ase Tigilati‐Pileseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, agateba, “Inche nomosomba oo, naende omwana oo. Inchuo ontoorie korwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, na okw’omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, aba bachire kondwania.”" 
2Kings16:8 Boigo Ahasi akaimokia chifeta ne chitahabu, echio chianyorekanete ase enyomba y’Omonene, na ase chikungo chi’enyomba y’omoruoti, agachitoma chikaba ekeegwa ase omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
2Kings16:9 Omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akamwanchera, akagenda Damesiki, akayobua agoosa abanto b’aroro, akabaira gochia Kiri, agaita Resini." 
2Kings16:10 Ahasi omoruoti akagenda Damesiki koumerana na Tigilati‐Pileseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, na ekero aroche egesasimero kiarenge aroro, agatoma omogwekano bw’egesasimero keria ase Uria omokuani, akaorokia boronge kegima buna kiaroisetigwe." 
2Kings16:11 Uria omokuani akaagacha egesasimero koreng’ana nomogwekano oria Ahasi omoruoti amotomerete korwa Damesiki, agakeroisia ritang’ani Ahasi ataraika aroro korwa Damesiki." 
2Kings16:12 Ekero omoruoti achete korwa Damesiki agakerora, akageika ang’e, akarua ekeng’wanso igoro yaye." 
2Kings16:13 Akarua ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kwaye kw’endagera, naende akaumora okoruegwa kwaye gw’ekenyugwa, na akanyororokeria amanyinga ’ebing’wanso bi’omorembe igoro ase egesasimero." 
2Kings16:14 Na egesasimero gi’etaai kiarenge ase egati y’egesasimero keria ekeyia na ase enyomba y’Omonene, agakebeka ensemo ya sugusu y’egesasimero keria." 
2Kings16:15 Ahasi omoruoti agachika Uria omokuani, akamotebia, “Igoro ase egesasimero keria ekenene asambere ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kia mambia, na okoruegwa kw’endagera kwa mogoroba, na ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ki’omoruoti, na okoruegwa kwaye kw’endagera, amo nebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa bi’abanto bonsi b’ense eye, na okoruegwa kwabo kw’endagera amo nokw’ebinyugwa. Naende onyororokerie amanyinga onsi ay’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ay’ebing’wanso binde igoro yaye. Korende egesasimero keria gi’etaai ogentigere indore inki ndagekorere.”" 
2Kings16:16 Uria omokuani agakora ayio onsi buna Ahasi omoruoti amochigete. 
2Kings16:17 Ahasi omoruoti akabutora emetobwa y’ebibekerero bi’ebituba, akarusia ebituba korwa aroro, akarusia negetuba keria ekenene giaterekereretwe igoro ase emegwekano ye chiombe yaroisirie korwa ase etaai akageterekerera inse aase atichire namagena." 
2Kings16:18 Oboeto bw’Egesona gi’Esabato bwatubire nekerama, obwo bwaagachire ase enyomba eria, na egesoero gia isiko ki’omoruoti, akabirusia korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene, ase engencho y’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
2Kings16:19 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Ahasi akorete nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda. 
2Kings16:20 Ahasi akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa aase chiatindegetwe, ase Omochie o Daudi; na Hezekia, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings17:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na kabere bw’okogamba kw’Ahasi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Hosea, mosinto o Ela, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli agwo Samaria, na akagamba emiaka kianda." 
2Kings17:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na kabere bw’okogamba kw’Ahasi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Hosea, mosinto o Ela, agachaka kogambera Abaisraeli agwo Samaria, na akagamba emiaka kianda." 
2Kings17:2 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, korende takorete amabe buna abaruoti b’Abaisraeli, abwo bamotang’anerete, bakorete." 
2Kings17:3 Salimaneseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akarwania Hosea, na Hosea akerua asare, akaba okomoa ebango." 
2Kings17:3 Salimaneseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akarwania Hosea, na Hosea akerua asare, akaba okomoa ebango." 
2Kings17:4 Nyuma y’engaki gete omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akamanya obobisi bwa Hosea buna konya atomire abanto ase So, omoruoti bw’Abamisiri, na buna atigete korua ebango ase omoruoti bw’Abaasuri buna arenge gokora omwaka ase omwaka. Ase ayio akamobwata akamosiba echela." 
2Kings17:4 Nyuma y’engaki gete omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akamanya obobisi bwa Hosea buna konya atomire abanto ase So, omoruoti bw’Abamisiri, na buna atigete korua ebango ase omoruoti bw’Abaasuri buna arenge gokora omwaka ase omwaka. Ase ayio akamobwata akamosiba echela." 
2Kings17:5 Omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akagenda ase ense eria, akaboera Samaria ase engaki y’emiaka etato." 
2Kings17:6 Ase omwaka o kianda bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akabwata Samaria, agoosa Abaisraeli, akabaira Asuri; akabeka abande ase omochie o Hala, na abande ang’e na Habori, orooche rwa Gosani, na abande ase emechie y’Abamedi." 
2Kings17:6 Ase omwaka o kianda bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akabwata Samaria, agoosa Abaisraeli, akabaira Asuri; akabeka abande ase omochie o Hala, na abande ang’e na Habori, orooche rwa Gosani, na abande ase emechie y’Abamedi." 
2Kings17:7 Aya igo akoregete, ekiagera Abaisraeli bakorete ebibe ase Omonene, Nyasae obo oyobarusetie ase ense ya Misiri na korwa ase okoboko gwa Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, na ekiagera bakorerete chinyasae ching’ao." 
2Kings17:8 Boigo bakaba bakobwatia chingencho chi’abanto b’ebisaku biria Omonene aseretie korwa ase amasio abo, na echi’abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings17:9 Abaisraeli bagakora bobisi ebinto ebibe ase Omonene, Nyasae obo. Bakeagachera aase aimokererete igoro ase bagosasimera, agwo aase abo onsi bamenyete, ase emerobiri y’okorenda yaagachire amo nemechie egiteire chindwaki." 
2Kings17:10 Bageteneneria chisiiro chi’ogosasima na emete y’Asera igoro ase kera ekegoro egetambe, na inse ya kera omote omobese." 
2Kings17:11 Agwo aase aimokererete igoro bagasamba ubani buna abanto b’ebisaku biria Omonene aseretie korwa asebare baare gokora. Bagakora ebinto bi’obokayayu, bakagechia Omonene goika akaba nendamwamu;" 
2Kings17:12 bagakorera emegwekano y’ogosasimwa eyio Omonene abakanetie ng’a tibayekorera. 
2Kings17:13 Omonene konya obeire ogokurera Abaisraeli na Abayuda goetera ase kera omobani, na ase kera omorori, ogoteba, “Onchoka, motige chinchera chiaino chi’obobe, na mobwate amachiko aane, na emeroberio yane echikire, koreng’ana namachiko onsi ayio nachigete chisokoro chiaino, ayio nabatomerete inwe goetera ase abasomba baane ababani.”" 
2Kings17:14 Korende tibaigwete; bagakong’ia ebigoti biabo buna chisokoro chiabo chiakorete, abwo batamwegenete Omonene, Nyasae obo." 
2Kings17:15 Abaisraeli bagachaya emeroberio yaye echikire na okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, koria akorete ne chisokoro chiabo, na ogokurerwa aruete asebare.
