Bagakora emegwekano y’ogosasimwa etagwenerete kende, bakayebwatia, bakabwatia chingencho chi’abanto b’ebisaku babaetanaine, abwo Omonene abakanetie ng’a tibakora buna barabwo." 
2Kings17:16 Bagatiga amachiko onsi ay’Omonene, Nyasae obo, bakabomba emegwekano ebere ye chimori; boigo bakaroisia omote bw’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, bagasasima erioba na omotienyi ne ching’enang’eni, na gokorera Baali enyasae eria." 
2Kings17:17 Barabwo bagasamba abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, bakaba ebing’wanso, naende bagakora oboriori na oborogi, bakerua abanyene gokora ebibe ase obosio bw’Omonene, bakamogechia goika akaba nendamwamu." 
2Kings17:18 Ase ayio Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene ase Abaisraeli na akabaseria korwa ase obosio bwaye; onde tatigarete otatiga egesaku ki’Abayuda gioka. 
2Kings17:19 Abayuda nabarabwo tibabwatete amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae obo, korende bakabwatia chingencho chiria Abaisraeli barentete." 
2Kings17:20 Omonene akaanga chinderia chionsi chi’Abaisraeli, akabaa egesusuro, akababeka ase amaboko ’abasakori goika akabaseria korwa ase obosio bwaye kegima." 
2Kings17:21 Ekero ataboranete Abaisraeli korwa ase enyomba ya Daudi, barabwo bakabeka Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati akaba omoruoti obo. Yeroboamu akang’usa Abaisraeli bagatiga gotunyana Omonene, akagera bagakora ebibe ebinene mono." 
2Kings17:22 Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe bionsi biria Yeroboamu akorete; tibeatananete korwa ase birobio. 
2Kings17:23 Ase igo Omonene akarusia Abaisraeli korwa ase obosio bwaye, buna akwanete goetera ase ababani, abasomba baye. Nabo Abaisraeli bakarusigwa korwa ase ense yabo abanyene, bakairwa Asuri, nao bare goika rero iga." 
2Kings17:24 Omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akarenta abanto korwa Babeli, na Kuta, na Awa, na Hamati, na Sefariwaimu, akababeka ase emechie ya Samaria bayemenye ribaga ri’Abaisraeli. Ase igo abanto abwo bakaira ense ya Samaria, bakamenya ase emechie y’aroro." 
2Kings17:25 Na ekaba ase omochakano obo bw’okomenya aroro tibamoirogete Omonene; ase ayio Omonene agatoma chindo ase egati yabo, chigaita abanto bande babo." 
2Kings17:26 Omoruoti bw’Abaasuri atebigwa ng’a abanto b’ebisaku biria arentete na akabeka ase emechie ya Samaria, tibamanyete amachiko a Nyasae bw’ense eria. Na bono Nyasae oria otomire chindo ase egati yabo, ne chindo chiria chiaitire abanto bande babo, ekiagera tibamanyeti amachiko a Nyasae bw’ense eria." 
2Kings17:27 Erio omoruoti bw’Abaasuari agachika, agateba, “Toma gochia aase aria oyomo bw’abakuani baria kwarusetie aroro, amenye aroro, orokererie abanto amachiko a Nyasae oria.”" 
2Kings17:28 Na igo oyomo bw’abakuni baria bairetwe korwa Samaria akagenda komenya agwo Beteli, akaba okworokereria abanto bamoiroke Omonene." 
2Kings17:29 Korende nonya nabo abanto ba kera egesaku bakaroisia chinyasae chiabo abanyene, bagachibeka ase chinyomba chi’aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, echio abanto ba Samaria baagachete; abanto ba kera egesaku bagakora igo ase emechie eria bamenyete." 
2Kings17:30 Abanto ba Babeli bakaroisia omogwekano bw’enyasae yabo Sukoti‐Benoti, bakayosasima na abanto ba Kuta omogwekano o Nerigali, na abanto ba Hamati oyo bw’Asima," 
2Kings17:31 na abanto ba Awa oyo o Nibuhasi, na Taritaki, na abanto ba Sefariwaimu, bagasamba abana babo bakaba ebing’wanso ase Adirameleki na Anameleki, chinyasae chia Sefariwaimu." 
2Kings17:32 Boigo bakamoiroka Omonene, bagachora korwa ase egati yabo abanto be chingencho ao ao bakaba abakuani b’aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, baria baruete ebing’wanso ase engencho yabo ase chinyomba chi’aase aria." 
2Kings17:33 Bakamoiroka Omonene, korende boigo bagakorera chinyasae chiabo abanyene, bagakora buna abanto b’ebisaku biria, ase bang’anyetigwe korwa, barenge gokora." 
2Kings17:34 Goika rituko ria rero nigo bagokora buna banarete gokora ritang’ani. Tibamoirogete Omonene, na tibari kobwatia emeroberio echikire, gose amachiko onsi aria Omonene achigete abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, oria arogete Israeli." 
2Kings17:35 Omonene agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabarabwo, akabachika, “Timobaisa koiroka chinyasae ching’ao, gose gotung’ama gochisasima; timochikorera gose timochiruera ebing’wanso." 
2Kings17:36 Korende mong’iroke inche Omonene. Nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri ase okobua okonene na ase okoboko koramboire; motung’ame monsasime inche bweka na monduere ebing’wanso. 
2Kings17:37 Emeroberio yane yonsi echikire, na amachiko aane onsi, aria nabarikerete, moyarende botambe na koyakorera. Timobaisa koiroka chinyasae chinde ching’ao," 
2Kings17:38 na timobaisa kweba okobwatana kw’ogotianania koria nakorete nainwe. Timobaisa koiroka chinyasae chinde ching’ao," 
2Kings17:39 korende mong’iroke inche Omonene, Nyasae oino; inche nimbarusie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baino.”" 
2Kings17:40 Korende nonya naboigo bakaanga tibaigwera, bagakora buna chingencho chiabo chintang’ani chiarenge." 
2Kings17:41 Ase ayio abanto b’ebisaku ebio bakamoiroka Omonene, na amo nayio bakaba bagokorera emegwekano yabo baare gosasima. Abana babo na abachokoro babo nabo bagokora goika rero iga, buna chisokoro chiabo chiare gokora." 
2Kings18:1 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, mosinto o Ela, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Hezekia, mosinto bw’Ahasi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings18:1 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, mosinto o Ela, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Hezekia, mosinto bw’Ahasi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agachaka kogamba." 
2Kings18:2 Nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere, na etano, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere, na kianda, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Abia, mosubati o Zakaria." 
2Kings18:3 Hezekia agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, buna Daudi, sokoro yaye, akorete." 
2Kings18:4 Agasaria aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, na agatagora chisiiro chigosasimerwa amo nomote bw’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu. Akabutorana ebing’ese eng’iti y’etaai eria Musa aroisetie, ekiagera goika ase amatuko aria Abaisraeli igo bagendererete koyesambera ubani; bakayeroka Nehusitani." 
2Kings18:5 Hezekia akaba ogosemeria Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli. Onde tabete buna ere ase egati y’abaruoti bonsi b’Abayuda baria bamobwatetie gose baria bamotang’anerete." 
2Kings18:6 Akaba omwegenwa ase Omonene, tatigete komoigwera, korende akabwata amachiko onsi aria Omonene achigete Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Omonene akaba amo nere na aande onsi Hezekia arenge kogenda akaba ogosesenigwa. Akaanga koigwera omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, taba okomokorera." 
2Kings18:8 Agaita Abafilisti, akaira ense yabo goikera Gasa na orogongo rw’aroro, akaira onsi, emerobiri y’okorenda amo nemechie yagiteire chindwaki." 
2Kings18:9 Ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kwa Hezekia omoruoti, noro omwaka o gatano na kabere bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, mosinto o Ela, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Salimaneseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akagenda korwania Samaria, akayoboera." 
2Kings18:9 Ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kwa Hezekia omoruoti, noro omwaka o gatano na kabere bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, mosinto o Ela, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Salimaneseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akagenda korwania Samaria, akayoboera." 
2Kings18:10 Na ase omoerio bw’omwaka o gatato Abaasuri bakayobua, bakayoira. Ase omwaka o gatano na rimo bw’okogamba kwa Hezekia, noro omwaka o kianda bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Samaria okairwa." 
2Kings18:10 Na ase omoerio bw’omwaka o gatato Abaasuri bakayobua, bakayoira. Ase omwaka o gatano na rimo bw’okogamba kwa Hezekia, noro omwaka o kianda bw’okogamba kwa Hosea, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, Samaria okairwa." 
2Kings18:11 Omoruoti bw’Abaasuri agoosa Abaisraeli, akabaira Asuri, akabeka abande ase omochie o Hala, na abande ang’e na Habori, orooche rwa Gosani, na abande ase emechie y’Abamedi." 
2Kings18:12 Aya nigo akoregete, ekiagera Abaisraeli tibaigwerete eriogi ri’Omonene, Nyasae obo, korende bagasaria okobwatana kw’ogotianania kwaye, amang’ana onsi aya Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, achigete, tibayaigwerete gose tibanchete koyakora." 
2Kings18:13 Ase omwaka o ikomi na kane bw’okogamba kwa Hezekia omoruoti, Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akagenda korwania emechie yonsi y’Abayuda, yagiteire chindwaki, akayeira." 
2Kings18:14 Erio Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agatoma amang’ana gochia ase omoruoti bw’Abaasuri agwo Lakisi, akamotebia, “Nakorire okomocha; ntige, irana ogende; egento kende gionsi oramborie ningekore.” Na omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akagania korwa ase Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, chitalanta chie chifeta amagana atato, ne chitalanta chie chitahabu emerongo etato." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekia akamoa chifeta chionsi chianyorekanete ime ase enyomba y’Omonene, na ase chikungo chi’enyomba y’omoruoti." 
2Kings18:16 Ase engaki eria Hezekia akaomora chitahabu korwa ase ebisieri bie Hekalu y’Omonene, na korwa ase emetobwa y’ebisieri eria ere omonyene aoomete, agachia omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
2Kings18:17 Korwa Lakisi omoruoti bw’Abaasuri agatoma abachiki abanene batato. Taritani, na Rabi‐Sarisi, na Rabi‐Sake, amo nabarwani abange b’esegi, gochia ase Hezekia agwo Yerusalemu. Bakagenda bagaika Yerusalemu, na ekero baigete bagatenena ang’e nomotaro bw’amache e ritibo ria rogoro, rire ase enchera ekogenda egetii ki’omosibia bw’ebitambaa bikoroisigwa chianga." 
2Kings18:18 Ekero barangeretie omoruoti, Eliakimu mosinto o Hilikia oyorenge omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, na Sebuna omoriki, na Yoa mosinto bw’Asafu, oyorenge omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka, bakagenda isiko asebare." 
2Kings18:19 Rabi‐Sake akabatebia ng’a batebie Hezekia. “Aya naro omoruoti omonene, oria bw’Abaasuri, agokwana: Nigoro ya gento ki obegete ogosemeria kwao?" 
2Kings18:20 Nigo okorengereria ng’a ogokwana kw’amang’ana gwoka nakwo koganeirie ase okomanya koba nokobua korwana esegi? Ning’o osemeretie oragokonye goika kwangire konyigwera? 
2Kings18:21 Rora bono, aye nigo osemeretie ense y’Abamisiri, eyio enga buna egetonto kebunegete. Omonto onde bwensi okogiesiirera nigo keramokebe okoboko. Naboigo Farao o Misiri are ase abanto bonsi bamosemeretie." 
2Kings18:22 “Inee! Inwe nigo mogontebia ng’a nigo mosemeretie Omonene, Nyasae oino? Tari ere oria aase aye aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa amo nebisasimero biaye Hezekia atagoire, agatebia Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu: Mobe mogosasima bosio bw’egesasimero eke aiga Yerusalemu?" 
2Kings18:23 Inchuo moigwane mobeke rigori nomonene one, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri. Nimbae chibarasi chilifu ibere, komoranyare konyora abariini be chibarasi echio." 
2Kings18:24 Naki oranyare kobua omoteneneri oyomo ore omoke ase egati y’abasomba b’omonene one, ekero osemeretie ense ya Misiri ase okonyora korwa aroro chigari na abariini chibarasi?" 
2Kings18:25 Inee! Nigo okagete ng’a inche nigo nachire korwania aase aiga na koasaria Omonene atancheti? Taibo. Omonene nere ontebia: Genda orwanie ense eria, oyesarie!”" 
2Kings18:26 Erio Eliakimu, mosinto o Hilikia na Sebuna, na Yoa, bagatebia Rabi‐Sake oria, “Koranche kwana naintwe, abasomba bao, ase omonwa bw’Ekearamaik, ekiagera ntoyomanyete; tobaisa gokwana naintwe ase omonwa bw’Ekeyuda ekero abanto bare ase orwaki igoro bategererete.”" 
2Kings18:27 Omochiki oria omonene akabairaneria, “Inee! Omonene one nantoma nkwane amang’ana aya ase omonene oo na asore aye? Tantomete ase inwe mweka, korende nase abanto baikaransete ase orwaki igoro; abwo banacheirwe ekina amo nainwe bagochia koria obonyira bwabo na konywa amache abo bagoitera.”" 
2Kings18:28 Erio omochiki oria omonene agatenena, agaaka eriogi rinene ase omonwa bw’Ekeyuda, agateba, “Igwa ring’ana ri’omoruoti omonene, ore omoruoti bw’Abaasuri!" 
2Kings18:29 Aya naro omoruoti agokwana: Timobaisa gwancha Hezekia abang’aine, ekiagera ere takonyara kobatooria korwa ase okoboko kwane." 
2Kings18:30 Timobaisa gwancha Hezekia abaebererie ng’a mosemerie Omonene, ekero agoteba: Ekeene, Omonene natotoorie, na omochie oyio tokobekwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
2Kings18:31 Timobaisa gotegerera amang’ana a Hezekia. Aya naro omoruoti bw’Abaasuri agoteba: Mokore omorembe nainche, moche asende, erio kera omonto ore asemore narie okwama kw’emesabibu yaye omonyene, na kera omonto narie okwama kw’emeko yaye omonyene, na kera oyomo oino nanywe amache ’ensoko yaye omonyene," 
2Kings18:32 goika inchiche imbarusie agwo mbaire ase ense egwekaine ense eye yaino, ense ere ne chindagera na edivai, ense ere nemegati, na emegondo y’emesabibu, ense ere nemete emezeituni na obooke, agwo ase moragenderere koba moyo timokwa. Timobaisa gotegerera Hezekia ekero akobang’aina ogoteba: Omonene natotoorie." 
2Kings18:33 Inee! Enyasae ende yonsi y’ebisaku yatooririe ense yaye korwa ase okoboko kwane inche omoruoti bw’Abaasuri? 
2Kings18:34 Ng’ai chinyasae chia Hamati na Aripadi chire? Ng’ai chinyasae chia Sefariwaimu na Hena, na Iwa chire? Inee! Chiatooririe Samaria korwa ase okoboko kwane?" 
2Kings18:35 Nereri ase egati ye chinyasae chionsi chie chinse yatooririe ense yaye korwa ase okoboko kwane? Nainwe mokorengereria ng’a Omonene natoorie Yerusalemu korwa ase okoboko kwane?” 
2Kings18:36 Korende abanto bagakira‐kiri, tibamoiraneria nonya ne ring’ana erimo, ekiagera omoruoti konya abakanirie, “Timobaisa komoiraneria.”" 
2Kings18:37 Erio Eliakimu, mosinto o Hilikia, oria orenge omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, na Sebuna omoriki, na Yoa, mosinto bw’Asafu, omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka, bagacha ase Hezekia ne chianga chiabo chitandogete, bakamotebia amang’ana onsi omochiki oria omonene akwanete." 
2Kings19:1 Ekero Hezekia omoruoti aigwete amang’ana ayio, agatandora chianga chiaye, akeboyia chianga chie chigunia, erio agasoa ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Kings19:2 Agatoma Eliakimu, oria orenge omoteneneri bw’enyomba yaye, na Sebuna omoriki, na abakuani abagaaka, beboyetie chianga chie chigunia, bakagenda ase Isaya omobani mosinto bw’Amosi." 
2Kings19:2 Agatoma Eliakimu, oria orenge omoteneneri bw’enyomba yaye, na Sebuna omoriki, na abakuani abagaaka, beboyetie chianga chie chigunia, bakagenda ase Isaya omobani mosinto bw’Amosi." 
2Kings19:3 Abanto abwo bakamotebia, “Aya naro Hezekia agoteba: Rituko ria rero neri’obororo na egesusuro, na ogochaywa. Abana babeire ang’e baiborwe, korende chinguru chi’okobasukia basoke chiaborire." 
2Kings19:4 Omoruoti bw’Abaasuri natoma omochiki oye omonene korama Nyasae ore moyo. Omonene, Nyasae oo, naigwe amang’ana ayio onsi na amoe egesusuro ase ayio. Bono aye sabera abanto batigarete.”" 
2Kings19:5 Ekero abasomba ba Hezekia omoruoti baigete ase Isaya," 
2Kings19:6 Isaya akabatebia, “Genda motebie omonene oino ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Tobaisa koiroka ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio kwaigure abasomba b’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri batebire ase okondama." 
2Kings19:7 Rora nimbeke omoika gete ime yaye, erio ekero araigwe chinkuma airoke, airane gochia ase ense yaye; nimoiyerie aitwe nomoro agwo ase ense yaye omonyene.”" 
2Kings19:8 Omochiki oria akairana, akanyora omoruoti bw’Abaasuri okorwana na Libuna, ekiagera aigwete ng’a omoruoti konya orure Lakisi." 
2Kings19:9 Na ekero omoruoti bw’Abaasuri aigwete amang’ana ng’a Tirihaka, omoruoti bw’Abaetiopia, ochire korwana esegi nere, agatoma abanto ase Hezekia naende, akabatebia," 
2Kings19:10 “Aya naro moratebie Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda: Tobaisa gwancha Nyasae oyio oo osemeretie akong’aine, erinde orengererie ng’a Yerusalemu tokobekwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
2Kings19:11 Aye kwaigure aya abaruoti b’Abaasuri bakoreire chinse chionsi, bachisaririe kegima. Inee! Aye bono notooreke?" 
2Kings19:12 Inee! Chinyasae chi’ebisaku chiatooririe ebisaku biria chisokoro chiane chiasiretie, ebisaku bia Gosani, na Harani, na Resefu, na abanto b’Edeni, baria barenge agwo Telasari?" 
2Kings19:13 Ing’ai omoruoti o Hamati are, gose omoruoti bw’Aripadi, na oyo bw’omochie o Sefariwaimu, na oyo o Hena, gose oyo o Iwa?”" 
2Kings19:14 Hezekia akaegwa rirube korwa ase abanto baria batometwe, akarisoma, erio akagenda ase enyomba y’Omonene, akarirambora ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
2Kings19:15 Aroro agwo agasaba ase obosio bw’Omonene, agateba, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, aye omenyete nobonene bwao igoro y’Abakerubi, aye naye Nyasae, naye bweka ore igoro y’amaruoti onsi ay’ense; naye gwatongete igoro na ense." 
2Kings19:16 Aye Omonene, tegerera oigwe! Aye Omonene, rigereria orore! Oigwe amang’ana a Senakeribu, aya atomire ase ogokorama aye Nyasae ore moyo." 
2Kings19:17 Aye Omonene, nekeene ng’a abaruoti b’Abaasuri basiririe abanto b’ebisaku ne chinse chiabo," 
2Kings19:18 batugutire chinyasae chi’abanto abwo ase omorero, ekiagera chirochio tichiri Nyasae, korende nemeremo y’amaboko ’abanto, chiroisirie korwa ase emete na amagena; ase ayio chigasirigwa." 
2Kings19:19 Bono Omonene, Nyasae oito, totoorie, nagosoroire totoorie korwa ase okoboko kwaye, erio amaruoti onsi ay’ense amanye ng’a aye Omonene, naye bweka ore Nyasae.”" 
2Kings19:20 Erio Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, agatoma amang’ana ase Hezekia, agateba, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naigure amang’ana gwansabire igoro ya Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
2Kings19:20 Erio Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, agatoma amang’ana ase Hezekia, agateba, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naigure amang’ana gwansabire igoro ya Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
2Kings19:21 Erio nario ring’ana Omonene akwanire: Aye Senakeribu, Sayoni omochie ore buna omoiseke omwekungi nigo ogochayete na kogosekerera; omochie o Yerusalemu nigo ogosingiseria omotwe magega yao." 
2Kings19:22 Aye ning’o gwasekereire na korama? Ning’o gwaakeire eriogi riao ase oboenenu na kweimokereirie igoro kore namaiso ’oboenenu? Aye kwabeire mamincha y’Omonene bw’Abaisraeli. 
2Kings19:23 Goetera ase abanto bao gwatomete kwamochecheirie Omonene, ekero gwatebire: Nase chigari chiane chinyinge nariinire goika ebichuria bi’ebitunwa, goika igoro kegima ya Lebanoni. Ngatema emecharake emetambe goetania eyende, na emetarakwa yaye emiya mono. Ngasoa ase ebinunchi biaye ime, na ime ase rinani riaye rinoru." 
2Kings19:24 Ngakunya chinsoko naende nkanywa amache ’abanto be chinse ching’ao, ngakamia chindooche chionsi chia Misiri ne ribarato ri’okogoro kwane." 
2Kings19:25 “Inee! Aye tikwana koigwa ng’a nigo nachigete ayio kare, ngakora emeroberio eyio ase amatuko a kare? Bono ngoikerania inde amang’ana ayio ng’a aye osarie emechie egiteire chindwaki ebe amaturi are chitui chi’amagena." 
2Kings19:26 Abanto be chinse echio nigo barenge abareu batari na nguru, bakaondoka na gosookigwa, bakaba buna ebimeri bire mogondo, na buna obonyansi oborere, buna obonyansi bomerete kerama igoro bogosusana botarakina." 
2Kings19:27 “Korende nimanyete ekero oikaransete, na ekero ogosoka isiko na okoirana. Boigo nimanyete buna ore nekeririanda asende." 
2Kings19:28 Ekiagera kwabeire na kerokio asende, na oboenenu bwao bwaikire ase amato aane, nimbeke ekegobanio ase chimioro chiao ime na ekeokio kiane ki’ogokoraa ase omonwa oo; ninkoiranie ogende ase enchera eria gwacherete." 
2Kings19:29 “Eke nakio ekemanyererio asore aye Hezekia: Omwaka oyo inamorie endagera ekwemeria yoka enyene, na omwaka o kabere boigo. Erio omwaka o gatato mobusure na kogesa, mosimeke emesabibu ase emegondo na morie okwama kwabo." 
2Kings19:30 Na abatigari b’enyomba ya Yuda abaratooreke mbaame buna ebimeri biirete emeri inse mono bikinete gochia igoro, bikwama amatunda," 
2Kings19:31 ekiagera abatigari mbache korwa ase Yerusalemu na korwa ase egetunwa gia Sayoni ekeombe ki’abanto baratooreke. Risemi ri’Omonene ndiikeranie ring’ana erio. 
2Kings19:32 “Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri: Ere tagocha ase omochie oyo, gose takorasa omogwe agwo; tagocha ase omochie oyo obogoretie chinguba, gose takoagacha orwaki bosio bwaye." 
2Kings19:33 Naende nigo agoteba ng’a ase enchera eria acherete, eyio nero arairanere, naende takonyara gosoa ase omochie oyo." 
2Kings19:34 Inche ning’egere omochie oyo na inyotoorie, ase engencho yane inche omonyene, na ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba one.”" 
2Kings19:35 Ase obotuko boria omomalaika bw’Omonene akagenda ase egetwori ki’Abaasuri, agaita abanto chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na etato na isano (185,000). Ekero abanto babogete mambia, bakarora emebere y’abanto bakwete aande onsi." 
2Kings19:36 Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akarua agwo, akagenda nka bwoye akamenya Nineva." 
2Kings19:37 Ekero arenge gosasima ime ase enyomba ya Nisiroki, enyasae yaye, Adarameleki na Sareseri, abamura baye, bakamoita nemioro; erio bagatama gochia ase ense y’Ararati, na Esara‐Hadoni, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings20:1 Ase amatuko aria Hezekia akarwara, akaba ang’e nogokwa. Isaya omobani mosinto bw’Amosi, agacha asare, akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ebeke ang’e amo nenyomba yao, ekiagera aye goika okwe, tokogwena.”" 
2Kings20:1 Ase amatuko aria Hezekia akarwara, akaba ang’e nogokwa. Isaya omobani mosinto bw’Amosi, agacha asare, akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ebeke ang’e amo nenyomba yao, ekiagera aye goika okwe, tokogwena.”" 
2Kings20:2 Hezekia akaonchora obosio bwaye gochia ase enyasi, erio agasaba Omonene, akabora," 
2Kings20:3 “Bono Omonene nagosoroire, inyora buna nabeire ngokobwatia ase obwegenwa na ase enkoro yane yonsi, naende buna nakorire ayare amaronge ase obosio bwao.” Erio Hezekia akarera nobororo." 
2Kings20:4 Na ekero Isaya atarasoka korwa ase eraaro ya gati, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asare, rikamotebia," 
2Kings20:5 “Irana otebie Hezekia, omoraai bw’abanto baane, ng’a inche Omonene, Nyasae o Daudi, sokoro yaye, nigo ngoteba iga: Naigure ogosaba kwao, narorire amariga ao. Rora, ninkogwenie. Rituko ria gatato notiire ogende ase enyomba yane, inche Omonene." 
2Kings20:6 Nimente emiaka ikomi na etano ase obogima bwao. Ningotoorie aye, amo nomochie oyo, korwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri; ning’egere omochie oyo ase engencho yane inche omonyene, na ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba one.”" 
2Kings20:7 Isaya agateba, “Renta ribomba ri’amako.” Na ekero riarentetwe rikabekwa igoro ase rigumba, na Hezekia akagwena." 
2Kings20:8 Hezekia akaboria Isaya, “Nkemanyererio ki ndaegwe ng’a Omonene nangwenie, naende ng’a nintiire ngende ase enyomba yaye rituko ria gatato?”" 
2Kings20:9 Isaya akamoiraneria, “Omonene nakoe ekemanyererio, erinde omanye ng’a nakore egento keria arire eira akore. Inee! Nigo oganetie omorengari bw’okorengera chinsa otambee ebitambokero ikomi gochia bosio gose gochia nyuma.”" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekia akairaneria, “Ne ring’ana rigusu omorengari otambee bosio ebitambokero ikomi, korende tiga omorengari oirane gochia nyuma ebitambokero ikomi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Isaya omobani akarera ase Omonene, na Omonene akairania omorengari bw’ekerengo gie chinsa ki’Ahasi ebitambokero ikomi, ebio konya biatambeire gochia bosio." 
2Kings20:12 Ase engaki eria omoruoti o Babeli, Merodaki‐Baladani, mosinto o Baladani, agatoma abanto bakaira ekeegwa ase Hezekia, ekiagera aigwete ng’a Hezekia nabete omorwaire." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia akabaroisia buya, erio akaboorokia ebinto bionsi biarenge ase chikungo chiaye chionsi: Chifeta, ne chitahabu, na ebinsari, na amaguta e rigori rinene, na ebirwanero biaye, na ebinto bionsi biagachire ase chinyomba chiaye. Tatigete gento kende gionsi ase enyomba yaye gose ase chimonga chi’oboruoti ataborogetie." 
2Kings20:14 Erio Isaya omobani agacha ase Hezekia omoruoti, akamoboria, “Ngento ki abanto aba bakwana? Ng’ai barwa bagacha asore?” Hezekia akamoiraneria, “Barabwo nigo barure ense y’aare, ense ya Babeli.”" 
2Kings20:15 Akamoboria, “Ngento ki barora nyomba mwao?” Hezekia akairaneria, “Nigo barora ebinto bionsi bire nyomba mwane; tikeri nonya negento ekemo ase amagachero aane ntaborokia.”" 
2Kings20:16 Erio Isaya agatebia Hezekia, “Igwa buna Omonene atebire:" 
2Kings20:17 Naama! Amatuko ngocha are, ekero ebinto bionsi bire ase enyomba yao, na ebinto bionsi chisokoro chiao chiagachete goika rero iga nabiimokigwe biirwe Babeli; nonya negento ekemo tikegotigara. Aya naro Omonene agoteba." 
2Kings20:18 Na abana bande bao abamura baria kwaiboreirwe nabairwe, babe abakoreri ase enyomba y’omoruotio Babeli.”" 
2Kings20:19 Hezekia agatebia Isaya, “Ring’ana ri’Omonene aye gwakwanire nerigiya”. Nigo arengereretie ng’a onye rioka omorembe na oborendi obuya biare gochia konyorekana ase obogima bwaye." 
2Kings20:20 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Hezekia, na okobua kwaye gwonsi, na buna aroisetie ritibo na omotaro ase okorenta amache ase omochie ime, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings20:21 Hezekia akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, na Manase, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings21:1 Manase nigo arenge nemiaka ikomi na ebere, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo etano, na etano, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Hebisiba." 
2Kings21:2 Manase agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, koreng’ana ne chingencho chi’okogechia chi’ebisaku biria Omonene aseretie korwa ase Abaisraeli." 
2Kings21:3 Akaagacha naende aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, aria Hezekia ise asaretie. Naende agatenenia ebisasimero bia Baali, na akaroisia omote bw’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, buna Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akorete. Agasasima erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni, ebitongwa bia igoro, akabikorera." 
2Kings21:4 Naende akaagacha ebisasimero ase enyomba y’Omonene ime, agwo ase Omonene akwanete igoro yaye agateba, “Ase Yerusalemu nao ndabeke erieta riane.”" 
2Kings21:5 Akaagachera ebitongwa biria bionsi bia igoro ebisasimero agwo ase chiraaro ibere chi’enyomba y’Omonene. 
2Kings21:6 Agasamba omwana oye omomura akamokora ekeng’wanso; akaba ogokora oborogi na oboragori, na akaboria ogosemigwa korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete, na akenaria oborogi bonde. Agakora amabe amange ase obosio bw’Omonene, akamogechia goika akaba nendamwamu." 
2Kings21:7 Omote oria bw’Asera obaachire akayobeka ime ase enyomba y’Omonene, eyio Omonene akwanete igoro yaye, agatebia Daudi na Sulemani, omwana oye omomura, “Ase enyomba eye na ase Yerusalemu, omochie oyio nachorire korwa ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, nao ndabeke erieta riane ribe aroro kogenderera botambe." 
2Kings21:8 Onye Abaisraeli bagochia korenda na gokora aya onsi nabachigete koreng’ana namachiko ayio Musa, omosomba one, abaete, rirorio tingotiga naende Abaisraeli barue ase ense eye naete chisokoro chiabo.”" 
2Kings21:9 Korende tibaigwerete, na Manase akabaebereria bagakora ayare amabe goetania aria abanto b’ebisaku bakorete, baria Omonene asiretie korwa ase amaiso ’Abaisraeli." 
2Kings21:10 Omonene agakwana goetera ase abasomba baye ababani, agateba," 
2Kings21:11 “Manase, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, okorire okogechia okonge. Ere okorire ogosaria okonge goetania koria Abaamori bakorete, baria barengeo ritang’ani asare, naende ogerire Abayuda bakorire ebibe ase engencho y’emegwekano yaye agosasima." 
2Kings21:12 Ase ayio, aya naro inche Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ngoteba; Rora, nindete igoro ya Yerusalemu na igoro y’Abayuda obobe obonene, na kera omonto noboigwe, na amato aye abere nabe akoeera." 
2Kings21:13 Nindambore igoro ase Yerusalemu ekerengo keria ki’egesusuro kiarengete Samaria, na ekebiro keria kiarengete enyomba y’Ahabu. Nintinyie Yerusalemu buna omonto agotinyia esani na koyeumamia ebe bosa." 
2Kings21:14 Nimbatugute abatigari b’omwando one, imbabeke ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, na barabwo babe abooswa bairwe nababisa babo," 
2Kings21:15 ekiagera bakorire ayare amabe ase obosio bwane, na botambe nigo kongechia nabeire nendamwamu, korwa ase amatuko aria chisokoro chiabo chiarwete Misiri goika rero iga.”" 
2Kings21:16 Amo nayio Manase naiterete amanyinga ay’abange batarenge na komocha, goika agaichora Yerusalemu ase chinsemo chionsi namanyinga ayio, komenta nebibe biria akorete akagera Abayuda bagakora ebibe na gokora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
2Kings21:17 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Manase, na aya onsi akorete, na ebibe biria akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings21:18 Manase akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase omogondo bw’enyomba yaye oria orenge o Usa; na Amoni, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere, na ebere, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka ebere agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Mesulemeti, mosubati o Harusi korwa Yotiba." 
2Kings21:20 Amoni agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna ise akorete." 
2Kings21:21 Akabwatia chinchera chionsi chiria ise abwatetie. Agakorera emegwekano eria ise akorerete, na akayesasima." 
2Kings21:22 Agatiga Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaye, tabwatetie enchera yaye." 
2Kings21:23 Abasomba b’Amoni bagakora omoroberio bw’okomoita, bakamoitera ase enyomba yaye ime." 
2Kings21:24 Korende abanto b’ense eria bagaita abanto bonsi baria bakorete omoroberio bw’ogoita Amoni omoruoti, na bakabeka Yosia, omwana oye omomura, akaba omoruoti ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings21:25 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Amoni na aya akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings21:26 Amoni agatindekwa ase embeera yaye ase omogondo o Usa; na Yosia, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings22:1 Yosia nigo arenge nemiaka etano na etato, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo etato nomo agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Yedida, mosubati bw’Adaya korwa Bosikati." 
2Kings22:2 Yosia agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, akabwatia chinchera chionsi chia Daudi sokoro yaye; taonchogete gochia aande onsi, ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee." 
2Kings22:3 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano ase okogamba kwa Yosia omoruoti agatoma Safani omoriki, mosinto bw’Asalia o Mesulamu, ase enyomba y’Omonene, agateba," 
2Kings22:4 “Genda ase Hilikia, omokuani omonene, omoborie abare chibesa chiarentirwe ase enyomba y’Omonene, echio abarendi b’egesieri basangereirie korwa ase abanto." 
2Kings22:5 Chibesa echi chiegwe abateneneri b’emeremo egokorwa ase enyomba y’Omonene, na barabwo bachiee abakori emeremo b’enyomba eyio, baria bakoyeroisia," 
2Kings22:6 na abasenia be chibao, na abaagachi, na abaagachi b’amagena. Naende chibesa chiria chigorwe chibao, na amagena abaachire ase okoagachera enyomba." 
2Kings22:7 Korende timobaboria borokie omobaro bwe chibesa chirabekwe ase amaboko abo, ekiagera nigo barachikorere emeremo ase obwegenwa.”" 
2Kings22:8 Hilikia, omokuani omonene, agatebia Safani omoriki, “Nanyorire ebuku y’Amachiko ase enyomba y’Omonene.” Hilikia akaa Safani ebuku eria, nere akayesoma." 
2Kings22:9 Nyuma y’ayio omoriki oria akagenda ase omoruoti, akamotebia, “Abasomba bao mbarusia chibesa chionsi chianyorekana ase enyomba, bakaa abakori emeremo abwo bare abateneneri b’emeremo egokorwa ase enyomba y’Omonene.”" 
2Kings22:10 Naende Safani agatebia omoruoti, “Hilikia omokuani nang’a ebuku.” Erio Safani agasomera omoruoti ebuku eria." 
2Kings22:11 Na ekero omoruoti aigwete amang’ana ’Ebuku eria y’Amachiko agatandora chianga chiaye. 
2Kings22:12 Erio agachika Hilikia omokuani, na Ahikamu, mosinto o Safani, na Akibori, mosinto o Mikaya, na Safani omoriki, na Asaia, omokoreri bw’omoruoti, akabatebia," 
2Kings22:13 “Genda moborie momanye korwa ase Omonene igoro yane, na igoro y’abanto baito, na igoro y’Abayuda bonsi, tomanye amang’ana are ase ebuku eye yanyorekanire. Endamwamu y’Omonene yokire asetore, ekiagera chisokoro chiaito tichiaigwerete amang’ana ’ebuku eye, na tichiakorete aya onsi arikire ase engencho yaito.”" 
2Kings22:14 Ase igo Hilikia omokuani, na Ahikamu, na Akibori, na Safani, na Asaia bakagenda koboria Hulda, omobani omokungu, mokaa Salumu, mosinto o Tikiwa, o Harasi. Salumu oyio nigo arenge omorendi bwe rigachero rie chianga. Ase ekero ekio Hulda nigo amenyete agwo Yerusalemu ase ensemo enyia." 
2Kings22:15 Omokungu oria akabatebia, “Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo agoteba ng’a mogende ase omonto oria obatomete gocha asende, momotebie:" 
2Kings22:16 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora inche Omonene nindete igoro y’aase aiga, na igoro y’abanto b’aiga, amabe aya onsi arikire ase ebuku eye omoruoti bw’Abayuda asomire." 
2Kings22:17 Barabwo bantigire inche na basambire ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao, na bangechirie goika nabeire nendamwamu ase engencho y’emeremo yonsi bakorire namaboko abo. Ase ayio, endamwamu yane neyoke igoro y’aase aiga, tegokendigwa." 
2Kings22:18 Korende ase omoruoti bw’Abayuda, oria obatoma erinde amanye korwa asende inche Omonene, aya naro moramotebie: Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba igoro y’amang’ana aya kwaigwete:" 
2Kings22:19 Ekero kwaigwa amang’ana aria, naye ogekanya, okaba omoitongo ase obosio bwane inche Omonene. Na ekero kwaigwete buna nakwanete igoro y’aase aiga, na igoro y’abanto b’aiga ng’a goika basirigwe na babe okoragererigwa, aye ogatandora chianga chiao, naende okarera ase obosio bwane. Naboigo inche Omonene nkogotebia ng’a nakoigure." 
2Kings22:20 Ase ayio, ningosangererie ase chisokoro chiao chiachiete; aye nobekwe ase embeera yao kore nomorembe, na amaiso ao takorora obobe boria bwonsi ndarente igoro y’aase aiga.” Barabwo bakairera omoruoti amang’ana ayio." 
2Kings23:1 Omoruoti agatoma abanto barangerie abagaaka bonsi b’Abayuda na aba Yerusalemu, bagasangererekana asare." 
2Kings23:2 Na omoruoti agatiira gochia ase enyomba y’Omonene amo n’Abayuda bonsi na abanto bonsi bamenyete Yerusalemu, na abakuani, na ababani, abanto bonsi, abake na abanene. Erio akabasomera amang’ana onsi aria arikire ase Ebuku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Ogotianania yanyorekanete ime ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Kings23:3 Omoruoti agatenena ang’e nesiiro, agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania ase obosio bw’Omonene, ng’a mbabwatie Omonene na kobwata amachiko aye, na oborori bwaye, na emeroberio yaye echikire, bayakore ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi na emioyo yabo yonsi, mbakore amang’ana onsi aganeirie nokobwatana oko kw’ogotianania, ayarikire ase ebuku eye. Erio abanto bonsi bakaria eira ng’a mbabwate okobwatana koria kw’ogotianania." 
2Kings23:4 Erio omoruoti agachika Hilikia, omokuani omonene, na abakuani, abakonyi baye, na abarendi b’egesieri, barusie korwa ase Hekalu y’Omonene ebikorero bionsi biaroisetwe ase ogosasimera Baali na Asera, na erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni chionsi chia igoro. Nyuma y’ayio akabisambera isiko ya Yerusalemu, agwo ase egetii gia Kidironi, akaira ribu riabo Beteli." 
2Kings23:5 Naende akarusia abakuani barenge gosasima emegwekano, baria abaruoti b’Abayuda babegete gosambera ubani agwo aase aimokererete igoro ase emechie y’Abayuda na goetanana Yerusalemu; naboigo nabaria barenge gosamba ubani ase Baali, na erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni chionsi chia igoro." 
2Kings23:6 Boigo akarenta omote oria bw’Asera korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene, akayosokia isiko ya Yerusalemu, akayoira gochia ase Rikura ria Kidironi, akayosamunyorera aroro, akayosia okaba orotu; erio akaruta orotu orwo igoro ase chimbeera agwo ase abanto baare gotindekwa." 
2Kings23:7 Agatagora na koiyeria inse chinyomba chi’abasacha abanyaka baare korigania ase obosooku, echio chiarenge ase enyomba y’Omonene. (Ime ase chinyomba chiria abakungu barenge koroiseria Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, chiema.)" 
2Kings23:8 Akarenta abakuani bonsi korwa ase emechie y’Abayuda, na ase ense yonsi korwa Geba goika Beeri‐Seba agakora aase onsi aimokererete igoro agwo ase abakuani barenge gosambera ubani akaba aatachenegeti. Na ebisasimero bi’aase aimokererete igoro arenge agwo ase ebiita bi’omochie, keria kiarenge ase egesoero ki’Egeita kia Yoshua, omotang’ani bw’omochie, na keria kiarenge ensemo y’okobee y’oyo ogosoera omochie, omoruoti akabitagora akabiyeria inse." 
2Kings23:9 Korende nonya abakuani b’aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa tibarenge ne ribaga gocha ase egesasimero ki’Omonene agwo Yerusalemu, bakaba bakoria emegati etabekiri memera amo nabamwabo." 
2Kings23:10 Boigo omoruoti agasaria Tofeti, aase agosasimerwa agwo ase Rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu, agaakora aatachenegeti ng’a onde tasambera omwana oye, omomura gose omoiseke, aroro abe ekeng’wanso ase enyasae eria Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Naende akarusia chibarasi chiria abaruoti b’Abayuda babegete ase egesoero ki’enyomba y’Omonene, echio baruete ase ogosasima erioba. Nigo chiarenge ang’e nakanyomba ka Nathani‐Meleki, omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, ime ase enyomba gete ensemo ya bosongo; agasamba chigari chiria chiatananetwe ase erioba." 
2Kings23:12 Agatagora na akaiyeria inse ebisasimero biarenge igoro ase ekerama ang’e nakanyomba ka igoro k’Ahasi, biria abaruoti b’Abayuda baagachete, na biria Manase aagachete ase chiraaro ibere chi’enyomba y’Omonene. Akabinachana ebing’ese, erio akaruta orotu rwabo ase akarooche ga Kidironi." 
2Kings23:13 Na aase aimokerete igoro agosasimerwa arenge moocha ya Yerusalemu, irianyi y’Egetunwa ki’Obosareku, aria Sulemani, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, aagacherete Asitaroti, okogechia kw’Abasidoni, na Kemosi, okogechia kw’Abamoabu, na Milikomu, okogechia kw’Abaamoni, omoruoti agaakora akaba aatachenegeti." 
2Kings23:14 Akanachana chisiiro chi’ogosasimerwa chikaba ebing’ese, na akanacha emete y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, agaichoria aase abo namauga ’abanto." 
2Kings23:15 Boigo agatagora egesasimero kiarenge agwo Beteli igoro y’aase aria aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa aria aroisetigwe na Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, oria ogerete Abaisraeli bagakora ebibe. Agasaria aase aria aimokererete igoro na agatagora egesasimero keria akagesenyenta gekaba orotu; agasamba omote bw’Asera." 
2Kings23:16 Ekero Yosia aonchogete, akarora chimbeera chiarenge ase ekegoro igoro, agatoma abanto bakarenta amauga korwa ase chimbeera chiria ime, erio akayasambera ase egesasimero, na ekio gekaba egetachenegeti, koreng’ana ne ring’ana ri’Omonene riararetigwe nomonto o Nyasae, oria obanete igoro ase ebinto ebio." 
2Kings23:17 Erio akabora, “Nkeinyorio ki keria narorire aaria ng’umbu?” Abanto b’omochie bakamoiraneria, “Eyio nembeera y’omonto o Nyasae oria orwete ense y’Abayuda na akabana igoro y’amang’ana aya gwakorire ase ogosaria egesasimero agwo Beteli.”" 
2Kings23:18 Akabatebia, “Tiga ere abeere aroro; onde tabaisa korusia amauga aye.” Ase ayio bagatiga amauga aye, amo nay’omobani oria onde orwete ase ense ya Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Yosia agatagora ne chinyomba chionsi chi’aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, echiarenge ase emechie ya Samaria, chiria abaruoti b’Abaisraeli baagachete bakagechia Omonene goika akaba nendamwamu. Agachikora buna akorete agwo Beteli." 
2Kings23:20 Agaitera abakuani bonsi b’aase aimokererete igoro, ase ebisasimero biarenge, na agasambera amauga ’abanto igoro yabo. Erio akairana gochia Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Erio Yosia omoruoti agachika abanto bonsi, akabatebia, “Mobe ne Rituko Rinene ri’Epasaka ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, buna arikire ase Ebuku eye y’Okobwatana kw’Ogotianania.”" 
2Kings23:22 Rituko ri’Epasaka buna eri konya tiriana koinyorwa korwa ase amatuko ’abagambi, baria bagamberete Abaisraeli, gose ase amatuko onsi ay’abaruoti b’Abaisraeli, gose ay’abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings23:23 Korende ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwa Yosia, Rituko erio Rinene ri’Epasaka rikainyorwa na korendwa ase Omonene, agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:24 Boigo Yosia akarusia abanto bonsi barenge koboria ogosemigwa korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete, na abarogi, na ebinyasae, na emegwekano ende y’ogosasimwa, na okogechia gwonsi kwarorekanete ase ense y’Abayuda na ase Yerusalemu. Nigo akorete ayio, erinde akore amang’ana onsi ay’amachiko aria arikire ase ebuku eria Hilikia omokuani anyorete agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Kings23:25 Moruoti onde tabete agwo ritang’ani orenge buna Yosia, oria omobwatetie Omonene nenkoro yaye yonsi, na omoyo oye bwonsi, ne chinguru chiaye chionsi, koreng’ana namachiko onsi a Musa; gose moruoti onde tanyorekanete buna ere ase abwo bamobwatetie korwa nyuma." 
2Kings23:26 Korende nonya naboigo, Omonene taonchogete atige obotindi obonene bw’endamwamu yaye yogete igoro ase Abayuda ase engencho y’okogechia gwonsi Manase konya akorire amogechirie." 
2Kings23:27 Na Omonene akabora, “Nindusie Abayuda korwa ase obosio bwane, buna narusetie Abaisraeli; nintugute Yerusalemu, omochie oyio nachorete, na enyomba eria natebete ng’a nimbeke erieta riane aroro.”" 
2Kings23:28 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yosia, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings23:29 Ase amatuko ’okogamba kwa Yosia, Farao Neko, omoruoti o Misiri, akagenda korwana nomoruoti bw’Abaasuri agwo ase orooche rw’Eufarati. Yosia omoruoti akagenda agwo korwana nere, na ekero Farao Neko amoroche, akamoitera agwo Megido." 
2Kings23:30 Abasomba baye bakamorusia Megido, bakabogoria omobere oye okwete ore ase egari ime, bakayoira Yerusalemu. Erio bakamotindeka ase embeera yaye omonyene. Abanto b’ense eria bakarenta Yehoahasi, omwana omomura o Yosia, bakamoaka amaguta, akaba omoruoti ase ribaga ria ise." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoahasi nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etato, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emetienyi etato agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Hamutali, mosubati o Yeremia korwa Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 Yehoahasi agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, koreng’ana buna aya onsi chisokoro chiaye chiakorete." 
2Kings23:33 Farao Neko akamobwata, akamosiba agwo Ribula ase ense ya Hamati, erinde tabaisa kogamba agwo Yerusalemu, naende akabekera abanto b’ense eria ebango ye chitalanta rigana erimo chie chifeta na etalanta eyemo y’etahabu." 
2Kings23:34 Farao Neko akabeka Eliakimu, omwana omomura o Yosia, akamobeka akaba omoruoti ase ribaga ria ise, na akaonchora erieta riaye, akamoroka Yehoyakimu. Akarusia Yehoahasi agwo, akamoira Misiri, nere agakwera aroro." 
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakimu akaa Farao chifeta ne chitahabu chiria, korende eyio nigo yamobetereretie kobekera ense eria ebango ase ogochinyora na goakana Farao echi achigete. Akarusia ebango ye chifeta ne chitahabu korwa ase abanto b’ense eria; kera omonto akarua ekerengo abekeretwe." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere, na etano, ekero achagete kogamba; akagamba emiaka ikomi nomo agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Sebida, mosubati o Pedaya korwa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Yehoyakimu agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna koreng’ana chisokoro chiaye chiakorete." 
2Kings24:1 Ase amatuko ay’okogamba kwa Yehoyakimu, Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, agacha aroro, na Yehoyakimu akaba inse y’okogamba kwaye ase emiaka etato, korende nyuma y’ayio akaanga komoigwera." 
2Kings24:2 Erio Omonene agatoma ebiombe bi’Abakalidayo, na Abasiiria, na Abamoabu, na Abaamoni, gochia korwania Yehoyakimu na gosaria ense y’Abayuda, buna akwanete goetera ase abasomba baye ababani." 
2Kings24:3 Ekeene amang’ana aya agacha igoro y’Abayuda ase ogochika kw’Omonene, erinde abarusie barue ase obosio bwaye ase engencho y’ebibe bia Manase na aya onsi akorete," 
2Kings24:4 mono ekiagera aiterete amanyinga ’abanto batari na komocha. Igo aichoretie Yerusalemu namanyinga ’abanto baria, na Omonene tarenge komwabera." 
2Kings24:5 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yehoyakimu, na aya onsi akorete, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda." 
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakimu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete na Yehoyakini, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Kings24:7 Omoruoti o Misiri taruete ase ense yaye naende, ekiagera omoruoti o Babeli konya oirire ense yonsi yarenge y’omoruoti o Misiri, gochakera akarooche ka Misiri goikera orooche rwa Eufarati." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakini nigo arenge nemiaka ikomi na etato, ekero abete omoruoti; akagamba emetienyi etato agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Nehusita, mosubati bw’Elianatani korwa Yerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Yehoyakini agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, koreng’ana naya onsi ise akorete." 
2Kings24:10 Ase engaki eria abasomba ba Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, bakagenda Yerusalemu, bakanaaria omochie bwonsi," 
2Kings24:11 na Nebukadinesaro omonyene agacha ase omochie oyio ekero abasomba baye bayonaaririe. 
2Kings24:12 Erio Yehoyakini, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akerua ase omoruoti o Babeli, ere omonyene, na ng’ina, na abasomba baye, na abanene baria bare komokonya, na abanene b’enyomba yaye. Ase omwaka o gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwaye, omoruoti o Babeli akaira Yehoyakini akamosiba," 
2Kings24:13 na buna Omonene atebete, agasakora chinibo chionsi chi’enyomba y’Omonene, na echi’enyomba y’omoruoti. Agaata ebikorero bionsi bie chitahabu ebiarenge ime ase Hekalu y’Omonene, biria Sulemani, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, aroisetie." 
2Kings24:14 Agoosa na koira abanto bonsi ba Yerusalemu, abanene bonsi, na bonsi abarenge ne chinguru chi’okorwana esegi, na abaroisia ebinto bonsi, na abaturi ebioma. Abanto bonsi bairetwe nigo barenge chilifu ikomi, abanto bande tibatigetwe aroro otatiga abwo barenge abataka mono b’ense eria." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinesaro akaira Yehoyakini goika Babeli. Boigo agoosa ng’ina omoruoti, na abakungu b’omoruoti, na abasomba b’enyomba yaye, na abatang’ani bande b’ense eria, akabarusia Yerusalemu, akabaira Babeli." 
2Kings24:16 Boigo agoosa abanto bonsi barenge ne chinguru, chilifu isano na ibere, akabaira Babeli. Akaira nabaroisia ebinto, na abaturi ebioma, elifu eyemo. Abanto aba bonsi nigo baare ne chinguru naende baisanerete korwana esegi." 
2Kings24:17 Omoruoti o Babeli akabeka Matania ise moke Yehoyakini akaba omoruoti ase ribaga riaye; akaonchora erieta riaye, akamoroka Zedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere nomo, ekero abete omoruoti, akagamba emiaka ikomi nomo agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Hamutali, mosubati o Yeremia korwa Libuna." 
2Kings24:19 Zedekia agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, koreng’ana buna onsi aria Yehoyakimu akorete." 
2Kings24:20 Endamwamu y’Omonene ase Yerusalemu na Abayuda nigo yagerete akabarusia ase obosio bwaye. Zedekia akaanga koigwera omoruoti o Babeli. 
2Kings25:1 Ase omwaka o kianda, rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi o ikomi bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro omoruoti o Babeli, ere amo nabarwani baye bonsi b’esegi bagacha korwania Yerusalemu; bakayonaaria na bakaagacha orwaki rw’ogwekengera koyoetanana." 
2Kings25:2 Igo omochie oria okaba onaaririe goika omwaka o ikomi nomo bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia omoruoti. 
2Kings25:3 Ase rituko ria kianda ri’omotienyi o kane enchara ekaba enene mono ase omochie oria goika endagera ekabora kegima ase abanto b’aroro. 
2Kings25:4 Erio chindwaki chi’omochie chikabochorwa, na abanto bonsi b’esegi bagatama botuko, bagaetera egeita kiarenge gatigati ye chindwaki ibere, ang’e nomogondo bw’omoruoti, nonya Abakalidayo banaaretie omochie chinsemo chionsi. Bakagenda gochia ase Ekerubo Ekiomo." 
2Kings25:5 Abarwani esegi b’Abakalidayo bakabwatia Zedekia omoruoti, bakamoikeera agwo ase ense omweya ya Yeriko ekero abarwani baye bonsi b’esegi konya bamotigire baserebekanire." 
2Kings25:6 Erio bakabwata omoruoti bakamoira ase omoruoti o Babeli agwo Ribula, nere akamonachera ekina." 
2Kings25:7 Bagaita abana ba Zedekia agwo ase amaiso aye, erio bakamokonora amaiso, bakamosiba ne chingatare, bakamoira Babeli." 
2Kings25:8 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere ri’omotienyi o gatano ase omwaka o ikomi na kianda bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, Nebusaradani, oyorenge omoteneneri bw’abarendi na omosomba bw’omoruoti o Babeli, agacha Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Ere agasamba enyomba y’Omonene na enyomba y’omoruoti, ne chinyomba chionsi chia Yerusalemu; agasamba kera enyomba enene." 
2Kings25:10 Abarwani esegi bonsi b’Abakalidayo, baria barenge amo nomoteneneri oria bw’abarendi, bagatagora chindwaki chiaetanaine Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:11 Nebusaradani omoteneneri bw’abarendi, agoosa na koira abanto aba konya batigaire ase omochie, na bonsi aba konya berure ase oyogokorera omoruoti o Babeli, akaira nabatigari bonsi b’omoganda." 
2Kings25:12 Korende omoteneneri oria bw’abarendi agatiga abanto bande baria barenge abataka mono, b’ense eria babeereo, babe bagokora emeremo ase emegondo y’emesabibu na gokora emeremo y’okorema." 
2Kings25:13 Abakalidayo bakabuna chisiiro chi’etaai chiria chiarenge ime ase enyomba y’Omonene, na ebibekerero bi’ebituba, na egetuba keria ekenene keroisirie korwa ase etaai, ebiarenge ase enyomba y’Omonene, Kobabibunire, bikaba ebing’ese, bakaira chitaai chiria chionsi Babeli." 
2Kings25:14 Boigo bakaira chindogio, na ebichiko, na ebinachi, na ebitaabo bi’ogosambera ubani, na ebikorero bionsi bie chitaai biarenge gokorerwa emeremo ase hekalu." 
2Kings25:15 Bakaira ne chindogio chi’okorenta omorero, amo ne chisani. Omoteneneri oria bw’abarendi akaira ebinto bionsi bie chitahabu na ebie chifeta." 
2Kings25:16 Chitaai chie chisiiro chiria ibere, na echi’egetuba keria ekenene, na echi’ebibekerero biria bi’ebituba, ebinto ebio bionsi Sulemani aroisetie ase enyomba y’Omonene, tibiarenge korengeka." 
2Kings25:17 Obotambe bw’esiiro eyemo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ikomi na atano na atato, na igoro ase esiiro egesure gi’etaai nkiarengeo; obotambe gochia igoro bw’egesure keria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atato. Egechanga na emegwekano y’amakomomanga biaetanaine egesure keria. Bionsi nigo biaroisirie korwa ase chitaai. Esiiro ya kabere nigo yarenge egwekaine eria entang’ani, yaetananirie nebichanga." 
2Kings25:18 Omoteneneri oria bw’abarendi akaira Seraya, omokuani omonene, na Sefania, omokuani o kabere, na abarendi b’egesieri batato." 
2Kings25:19 Naende akaira korwa ase omochie oria omonto oyomo orenge omoteneneri bw’abarwani esegi, na abanto batano b’ekegambero ki’omoruoti abanyoretwe ase omochie ime; na omoriki bw’abarwani esegi, oria orenge gokora omobaro bw’abanto b’ense eria amo nabanto emerongo etano nomo b’ense eria abanyorekanete ase omochie ime." 
2Kings25:20 Nebusaradani, omoteneneri bw’abarendi, akababwata, akabaira ase omoruoti o Babeli agwo Ribula." 
2Kings25:21 Omoruoti o Babeli akabaitera aroro agwo Ribula, ase ense ya Hamati, bagakwerao. Igo Abayuda bakarusigwa ase ense yabo bakairwa ase obosomba." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, akabeka Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu o Safani, akaba okogambera abanto batigarete ase ense y’Abayuda." 
2Kings25:23 Ekero abatang’ani bonsi b’abarwani esegi, amo nabanto babo, baigwete ng’a omoruoti o Babeli ochorire Gedalia agambere ense eria, bakagenda asare agwo Misipa. Abagendeteo nabwo aba: Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, na Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, na Seraya, mosinto o Tanahumeti korwa Netofa, na Yasania, omomura bw’omonto o Maaka, amo nabanto baye." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia agatiana ase abateneneri baria amo nabanto akabatebia, “Timoiroka ase engencho y’abatang’ani b’Abakalidayo; menya ase ense eye, mokorere omoruoti o Babeli, na amang’ana nabo arabe amaya asemore.”" 
2Kings25:25 Korende ase omotienyi o gatano na kabere Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, bw’Elisama bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, agacha amo nabanto ikomi, agaaka Gedalia, akamoita. Boigo agaita Abayuda na Abakalidayo baria barenge amo nere agwo Misipa." 
2Kings25:26 Erio abanto bonsi, abake na abanene, amo nabatang’ani b’abarwani esegi bakaimoka, bagatama gochia Misiri, ekiagera bairogete Abakalidayo." 
2Kings25:27 Ase omwaka oria Ewili‐Merodaki, omoruoti o Babeli, achagete kogamba akaba namabera ase Yehoyakini, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akamosibora korwa ase echela. Ayio nigo akoregete ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na gatano na kabere, omotienyi o ikomi na kabere, ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na gatano na kabere nyuma Yehoyakini omoruoti bw’Abayuda goosirwe," 
2Kings25:28 Ewili‐Merodaki agakwana amang’ana ’obwororo nere, naende akamoa amasikani amanene kobua ayio aete abaruoti bande barenge amo nere agwo Babeli." 
2Kings25:29 Ase igo Yehoyakini akaonchoreria chianga chiaye chi’obosibwa, na kera rituko ase obogima bwaye bwonsi akaba okoragera nomoruoti." 
2Kings25:30 Omoruoti akamoa endagera yaye, na kera egento kiaganeirie ase kera rituko ase obogima bwaye bwonsi." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu akaibora Seti, na Seti akaibora Enosu;" 
1Chronicles1:2 Enosu akaibora Kenani, na Kenani akaibora Mahalaleli, na Mahalaleli akaibora Yaredi;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Yaredi akaibora Enoku, na Enoku akaibora Metusela, na Metusela akaibora Lameki;" 
1Chronicles1:4 Lameki akaibora Nuhu, na Nuhu akaibora Shemu, na Hamu, na Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Abana abamura ba Yafeti nabwo aba: Gomeri na Magogu, Madai na Yavani, Tubali na Meseki, na Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Abana abamura ba Gomeri nabwo aba: Asikenasi na Rifati, na Togarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Na abana abamura ba Yavani nabwo aba: Elisha na Tarisisi, na Kitimu, na Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Abana abamura ba Hamu nabwo aba: Kusi na Misiri, Putu na Kanani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Na abana abamura ba Kusi nabwo aba: Seba na Havila, Sabuta na Raama, na Sabiteka. Na abana abamura ba Raama nabwo Seba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kusi akaibora Nimurodi. Nimurodi akaba omonto bwe ritang’ani ore nokobua ase ense. 
1Chronicles1:11 Misiri nere oiborete Abaludi na Abaanami, Abalehabi na Abanafutu," 
1Chronicles1:12 Abapaturusi na Abakasiluhi (korwa asebare nao Abafilisti barwete), na Abakafitori." 
1Chronicles1:13 Na Kanani akaibora Sidoni, omwana oye omotangi, na Heti," 
1Chronicles1:14 Abayebusi na Abaamori, na Abagirigasi;" 
1Chronicles1:15 Abahivi na Abaariki, na Abasini;" 
1Chronicles1:16 Abaarivadi na Abasemari, na Abahamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Abana abamura ba Shemu nabwo aba: Elamu na Asuri, Arifakisadi na Ludi, Aramu na Usi, Huli na Geteri, na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arifakisadi akaibora Sela, na Sela akaibora Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi akaibora abana babere abamura. Oria omotangi nigo arenge korokwa Pelegi, ekiagera ase amatuko aye abanto b’ense baatananegete, na omomura omwabo nigo arenge korokwa Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani akaibora Alimodadi na Selefu, Hasarmaweti na Yera;" 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu na Usali, na Dikila;" 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali na Abimaeli, na Seba;" 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri na Havila, na Yobabu. Abwo bonsi nigo barenge abana abamura ba Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Ororeria rwa Shemu narwo oro: Arifakisadi, na Sela," 
1Chronicles1:25 na Eberi, na Pelegi, na Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 na Serugi, na Nahori, na Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 na Aburamu nere Ibrahimu. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abana abamura ba Ibrahimu nabwo Isaka na Isumaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’ororeria rwabo. Omwana omomura omotangi o Isumaeli nere Nebayoti; na abande nabwo aba: Kedari na Adibeeli, na Mibusamu;" 
1Chronicles1:30 Misima na Duma, Masa na Hadadi, na Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi na Nafisi, na Kedema. Aba nabwo abana abamura ba Isumaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abana abamura ba Ketura, omokungu o sere‐sere o Ibrahimu, nabwo aba: Simurani na Yokisani, Medani na Midiani, Isibaki na Sua. Abana abamura ba Yokisani nabwo Seba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Abana abamura ba Midiani nabwo aba: Efa na Eferi, Hanoki na Abida, na Elidaa. Aba bonsi nigo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ibrahimu akaibora Isaka. Abana abamura ba Isaka nabwo Esau na Israeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Abana abamura b’Esau nabwo aba: Elifasi na Reueli, Yeusi na Yalamu, na Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Abana abamura b’Elifasi nabwo aba: Temani na Omari, Sefo na Gatamu, Kenasi ase Timuna, na Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Abana abamura ba Reueli nabwo aba: Nahati na Zera, Sama na Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Abana abamura ba Seiri nabwo aba: Lotani na Sobali, Sibeoni na Ana, Dishoni na Eseri, na Disani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Abana abamura ba Lotani nabwo Hori na Homamu; omosubati omwabo Lotani nigo arenge korokwa Timuna. 
1Chronicles1:40 Abana abamura ba Sobali nabwo aba: Aliani na Manahati, Ebali na Sefo, na Onamu. Na abana abamura ba Sibeoni nabwo Aya na Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Omwana omomura bw’Ana nere Dishoni. Abana ba Dishoni nabwo aba: Hamurani na Esibani, Itirani na Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Abana abamura b’Eseri nabwo aba: Bilihani na Sawani, na Akani. Abana abamura ba Disani nabwo Usi na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Aba nabwo abaruoti bagamberete ense y’Abaedomu, ekero omoruoti onde bwensi konya ataragambera Abaisraeli: Bela, mosinto o Beori, oyio omochie oye orenge korokwa Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ekero Bela akwete, Yobabu, mosinto o Zera, korwa Bosira, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ekero Yobabu akwete, Husamu, bw’ense y’Abatemani akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Chronicles1:46 Ekero Husamu akwete, Hadadi, mosinto o Bedadi, oria obuete Abamidiani ase ense ya Moabu, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye; na omochie oye noro Awiti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Ekero Hadadi akwete, Samula, oyo orwete Masereka, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Chronicles1:48 Ekero Samula akwete, Sauli oyo orwete Rehoboti, orenge ang’e norooche rw’Eufarati, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ekero Sauli akwete, Baali Hanani, mosinto bw’Akibori, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Chronicles1:50 Ekero Baali‐Hanani akwete, Hadadi akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye. Omochie oye nigo orenge korokwa Pai, na mokaye nigo arenge korokwa Mehetabeli, mosubati o Matiredi o Mesahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Na Hadadi agakwa. Abagambi b’Abaedomu nabwo aba: Timuna na Alifa, na Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama na Ela, na Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenasi na Temani, na Mibusari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magadieli na Iramu. Abwo nabwo barenge abagambi b’Abaedomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Aba nabwo abana abamura ba Israeli: Reuben, na Simeoni, Lawi na Yuda, Isakaru na Sabuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani na Yusufu, Benjamin na Nafutali, Gadi na Aseri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Abana abamura ba Yuda nabwo aba: Eri na Onani, na Sela. Aba batato nabwo Batisua, omosubati orwete Kanani, aiborerete Yuda. Eri, omwana omomura omotangi o Yuda, nigo arenge omobe ase obosio bw’Omonene, na Omonene akamoita." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamari, moka momura o Yuda, akaiborera Yuda Peresi na Zera. Yuda nigo abwate abana abamura batano." 
1Chronicles2:5 Abana abamura ba Peresi nabwo Hezironi na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Abana abamura ba Zera nabwo aba: Simuri na Etani, Hemani na Kalikuli, na Dara, bonsi mbatano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Karimi nigo abwate omomura oyomo orenge korokwa Akari oyo ochandete Abaisraeli ase amang’ana ’ebinto biatananetwe na koragererigwa. 
1Chronicles2:8 Asaria nigo arenge omwana omomura bw’Etani. 
1Chronicles2:9 Abana abamura ba Hezironi nabwo aba: Yerameeli na Ramu, na Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu akaibora Aminadabu, na Aminadabu akaibora Nahasoni, oyo orenge omotang’ani bw’abanto b’ororeria rwa Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahasoni akaibora Salima, na Salima akaibora Boazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boazi akaibora Obedi, na Obedi akaibora Yese." 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese akaibora Eliabu, omwana oye omomura omotangi, na Abinadabu oyo o kabere, na Simea oyo o gatato," 
1Chronicles2:14 na Netaneli oyo o kane, na Radai oyo o gatano," 
1Chronicles2:15 Osemu oyo o gatano na rimo, na Daudi oyo o gatano na kabere." 
1Chronicles2:16 Abaiseke bamwabo nabwo barenge Seruya na Abigaeli. Abana abamura b’omokungu Seruya nabwo aba: Abisai na Yoabu, na Asaeli, bonsi mbatato." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaeli akaibora Amasa, na ise Amasa nere Yeteri, Omoisumaeli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu, mosinto o Hezironi, akanyuoma Asuba. Asuba akamoiborera Yerioti omoiseke. Na abana abamura baye nabwo aba: Yeseri na Sobabu, na Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ekero Asuba akwete, Kalebu akanyuoma Efarata; ere akamoiborera Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri akaibora Uri, na Uri akaibora Besaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ekero Hezironi arenge nemiaka emerongo etano nomo, akanyuoma omoiseke o Makiri, ise Gileadi, Omokungu oria akamoiborera Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu akaibora Yairi, oyio obwate emechie emerongo ebere, na etato, ase ense ya Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Korende Abagesuri na Abaaramu bakaira korwa asare emechie etano nomo, emechie ya Yairi na Kenati amo nebichie biaetanaineo. Abanto bonsi bamenyeteo nigo barenge b’ororeria rwa Makiri ise Gileadi," 
1Chronicles2:24 Nyuma Hezironi gakure agwo Kalebu‐Eufarata, Abiya moga Hezironi akamoiborera Asuri, ise abanto ba Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Abana abamura ba Yerameeli, omomura omotangi o Hezironi, nabwo aba: Ramu, omomura oye omotangi, Buna na Oreni, Osemu na Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Boigo Yerameeli nabwate omokungu onde orenge korokwa Atara; nere orenge ng’ina Onamu. 
1Chronicles2:27 Abana abamura ba Ramu, omomura omotangi o Yerameeli, nabwo aba: Maasi na Yamini, na Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Abana abamura b’Onamu nabwo Samai na Yada. Abana abamura ba Samai nabwo Nadabu na Abisuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Moka Abisuri nigo arenge korokwa Abihaili, nere akamoiborera Ahabani na Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Abana abamura ba Nadabu nabwo Seledi na Apaimu; Seledi agakwa atabwati abana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaimu akaibora Ishi, na Ishi akaibora Sesani, na Sesani akaibora Alai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Abana abamura ba Yada, momura omwabo Sama, nabwo Yeteri na Yonathani. Yeteri agakwa atabwati abana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Abana abamura ba Yonathani nabwo Peleti na Sasa. Aba nigo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Yerameeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesani tabwate abana abamura, korende igo abwate abana abaiseke boka. Ere Sesani nabwate omosomba oye omomura Omomisiri orenge korokwa Yara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sesani akaa Yara, omosomba oye, omoiseke oye akaba mokaye; ere akaibora omomura orenge korokwa Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai akaibora Nathani, na Nathani akaibora Sabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabadi akaibora Efilali, na Efilali akaibora Obedi;" 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi akaibora Yehu, na Yehu akaibora Asaria;" 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria akaibora Helesi, na Helesi akaibora Eleasa;" 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa akaibora Sisimai, na Sisimai akaibora Salumu;" 
1Chronicles2:41 Salumu akaibora Yekamia, na Yekamia akaibora Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Abana abamura ba Kalebu omwabo Yerameeli nabwo aba: Mesha, omwana omomura oye omotangi, oyorenge ise Sifu, oyorenge ise Maresa, na Maresa orenge ise Heburoni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Abana abamura ba Heburoni nabwo aba: Kora na Tapua, Rekemu na Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema akaibora Rahamu, ise Yorikeamu. Rekemu akaibora Samai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Samai akaibora Maoni, na Maoni akaibora Beti‐Suri." 
1Chronicles2:46 Boigo Efa, omokungu o sere‐sere o Kalebu, akaibora Harani, na Moza, na Gasesi; na Harani boigo nabwate omomura orenge korokwa Gasesi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Abana abamura ba Yahadai nabwo aba: Regemu na Yotamu, Gesani na Peleti, Efa na Saafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, omokungu o sere‐sere o Kalebu, akaibora Seberi na Tirihana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Boigo omokungu oria akaibora Saafu, ise Madimana, na Sheva, ise abanto ba Makibena na aba Gibea. Omoiseke o Kalebu nigo arenge korokwa Asika." 
1Chronicles2:50 Aba nabwo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Kalebu. Abana abamura ba Huri, omwana omomura omotangi bw’Efarata, nabwo aba; Sobali, ise abanto ba Kiriati‐Yearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 na Salima, ise abanto ba Bethlehemu, na Harefu, ise abanto ba Beti‐Gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Sobali, ise abanto ba Kiriati‐Yearimu, nabwate abana abamura bande: Haroe na ekeng’ese ki’abanto ba Menuhoti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ne chiamate chia Kiriati‐Yearimu nachio echi: Abaitiri na Abaputi, Abasumati na Abamisira. Korwa ase abanto aba nao Abasori na Abaesitaoli barwete." 
1Chronicles2:54 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Salima nabwo abanto ba Bethlehemu, na Abanetofa, na abanto b’Ataroti‐Beti‐Yoabu, na ekeng’ese ki’Abamanahati, nabwo Abasori," 
1Chronicles2:55 amo ne chiamate chi’abariki baria bamenyete agwo Yabesi, nabwo Abatirati, na Abasimeati, na Abasukati. Aba nabwo Abakeni abarwete ase Hamati, ise abanto b’enyomba ya Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Aba nabwo abamura ba Daudi, abwo baiboretwe asare agwo Heburoni: Amunoni, omomura oye omotangi, oiboretwe n’Ahinoamu orwete Yesireeli, na oyo o kabere Danieli, oiboretwe n’Abigaeli orwete Karimeli;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Aba nabwo abamura ba Daudi, abwo baiboretwe asare agwo Heburoni: Amunoni, omomura oye omotangi, oiboretwe n’Ahinoamu orwete Yesireeli, na oyo o kabere Danieli, oiboretwe n’Abigaeli orwete Karimeli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 oyo o gatato Abisalomu, oiboretwe na Maaka, mosubati o Talimai, omoruoti o Gesuri; oyo o kane Adonia, oiboretwe na Hagiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 oyo o gatano Sefatia, oiboretwe n’Abitali, na oyo o gatano na rimo Iteramu, oiboretwe n’Egila moga Daudi." 
1Chronicles3:4 Abamura aba batano nomo nabwo Daudi aiboreretwe agwo Heburoni, aroro agwo ase agambete ase engaki y’emiaka etano, na ebere, na emetienyi etano nomo. Daudi akaba okogamba agwo Yerusalemu emiaka emerongo etato, na etato." 
1Chronicles3:5 Aba nabwo baiboretwe asare agwo Yerusalemu: Simea na Sobabu, Nathani na Sulemani. Aba nigo baiboretwe na Beti‐Sua, mosubati bw’Amieli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Daudi nabwate abamura bande, nabwo aba: Ibuhari na Elisama, na Elifeleti;" 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga na Nefegi, na Yafia;" 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama na Eliada, na Elifeleti; abwo nigo barenge kianda." 
1Chronicles3:9 Aba bonsi nabwo barenge abana abamura ba Daudi, naende nabwate abamura bande b’abakungu ba sere‐sere. Tamari nere orenge omoiseke omwabo abamura abwo." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ororeria rwa Sulemani narwo oro: Sulemani akaibora Rehoboamu, na Rehoboamu akaibora Abiya; Abiya akaibora Asa, na Asa akaibora Yehosafati;" 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehosafati akaibora Yehoramu, na Yehoramu akaibora Ahasia, na Ahasia akaibora Yoashi;" 
1Chronicles3:12 Yoashi akaibora Amasia, na Amasia akaibora Asaria, na Asaria akaibora Yotamu;" 
1Chronicles3:13 Yotamu akaibora Ahasi, na Ahasi akaibora Hezekia, na Hezekia akaibora Manase;" 
1Chronicles3:14 Manase akaibora Amoni, na Amoni akaibora Yosia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Abana abamura ba Yosia nabwo aba: Yohanani, omwana oye omotangi na Yehoyakimu, oyo o kabere, na Zedekia, oyo o gatato, na Salumu, oyo o kane." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ororeria rwa Yehoyakimu narwo oro: Yehoyakimu akaibora Yekonia, na Yekonia akaibora Zedekia." 
1Chronicles3:17 Abana abamura ba Yekonia, oyo bwosetwe, nabwo aba: Sealitieli," 
1Chronicles3:18 na Malikiramu, Pedaya na Senasari, Yekamia na Hosama, na Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Na abana abamura ba Pedaya nabwo Serubabeli na Simei. Abana abamura ba Serubabeli nabwo Mesulamu na Hanania, na Selomiti nere orenge omoiseke omwabo." 
1Chronicles3:20 Abamura bande batano ba Serubabeli nabwo aba: Hasuba na Oheli, Berekia na Hasadia, na Yusabi‐Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Abana abamura ba Hanania nabwo Pelatia na Yesaia, naende abamura ba Refaya, na ab’Arinani, na ab’Obadia, na aba Sekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Omwana o Sekania nere Semaya, na abana baye abamura nabwo aba: Hatusi na Igali, Baria na Nearia, na Safati; bonsi mbatano nomo." 
1Chronicles3:23 Abana abamura ba Nearia nabwo aba: Elionai na Hezekia, na Asirikamu; bonsi mbatato." 
1Chronicles3:24 Abana abamura b’Elionai nabwo aba: Hodawia na Eliasibu, Pelaya na Akubu, Yohanani na Delaya, na Anani; bonsi mbatano na babere." 
1Chronicles4:1 Abana abamura ba Yuda nabwo aba: Peresi na Hezironi, Karimi na Huri, na Sobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya, mosinto o Sobali, akaibora Yahati, na Yahati akaibora Ahumai na Lahadi. Korwa ase abwo nao Abasora barwete." 
1Chronicles4:3 Aba nabwo barenge abana abamura b’Etamu: Yesireeli na Isima, na Idibasi, na omoiseke omwabo nigo arenge korokwa Haseleliponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueli nigo arenge ise Abagedori, na Eseri ise Abahusa. Aba nabwo barenge abana abamura ba Huri, omwana omotangi o Efarata, ise abanto ba Bethlehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Asuri ise abanto ba Tekoa, nabwate abakungu babere, Hela na Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara akamoiborera Ahusamu na Heferi, Temeni na Hahasitari. Aba nabwo barenge abana abamura ba Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Abana abamura ba Hela nabwo aba: Sereti na Isihari, na Etinani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kosi nere orenge ise Anubu na Sobeba, na ise bwe chiamate chi’Aharibeli, mosinto o Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabesi nigo arenge namasikani amanene kobua abamura bamwabo. Ng’ina akamoroka Yabesi, ekiagera amoiborete ase obororo." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabesi akarangeria Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, akabora, “Onye aye ndiria kwarenge gonsesenia naende ogareyie obomenyo bwane, naende okoboko kwao kobe amo nainche, na ondende korwa ase obororo tibobaisa gonkora bobe.” Nyasae akamwanchera aya aganetie." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu, omomura omwabo o Suba, nere akaibora Mehiri, oria orenge ise Esitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Esitoni akaibora Beti‐Rafa na Pasea, na Tehina, ise abanto b’omochie o Nahasi. Aba nabanto bamenyete Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Abana abamura ba Kenasi nabwo Otinieli na Seraya; na abamura b’Otinieli nabwo Hatati na Meonotai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai akaibora Ofura. Seraya akaibora Yoabu ise Abageharasimu. Barabwo nigo barogetwe igo, ekiagera barenge abaroisia ebinto." 
1Chronicles4:15 Abana abamura ba Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune, nabwo aba: Iru na Ela, na Naamu; na omwana omomura bw’Ela nere Kenasi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Abana abamura ba Yehaleleli nabwo aba: Sifu na Zifa, Tiria na Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Abana abamura b’Ezara nabwo aba: Yeteri na Meredi, Eferi na Yaloni. Aba nabwo abana ba Bitia, mosubati o Farao, oria Meredi anyuomete: Omoiseke oye nigo are korokwa Miriamu, na abamura nabwo Samai na Isiba, ise abanto b’Esitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Meredi nabwate naende omokungu Omoyuda; nere akaibora Yeredi, ise abanto ba Gedori, na Heberi, ise abanto ba Soko, na Yekutieli, ise abanto ba Sanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Abana abamura ba Hodia, mosubati omwabo Nahamu, nigo barenge babere, oyomo nigo arenge ise Keila Omogarimi, na oyo o kabere n’Esitemoa bw’Abamaaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Abana abamura ba Shimoni nabwo aba: Amunoni na Rina, Beni‐Hanani na Tiloni. Abana abamura ba Ishi nabwo Soheti na Beni‐Soheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Abana abamura ba Sela, mosinto o Yuda, nabwo aba: Eri, ise abanto ba Leka, na Laada, ise abanto ba Maresa, na abe chiamate chi’abaroisia ebitambaa bi’egatani agwo Beti‐Asibea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 naende Yokimu na abanto ba Koseba, Yoashi na Sarafu, abwo barenge kogambera Abamoabu, naende Yasubi‐Lehemu. (Korende amang’ana aya namakoro.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Aba nabwo barenge abaroisia chinyongo na ababiare ba Netaimu na Gedera; aba nigo bamenyete amo nomoruoti, bakaba bakomokorera emeremo." 
1Chronicles4:24 Abana abamura ba Simeoni nabwo aba: Nemweli na Yamini, Yaribu na Zera, na Sauli." 
1Chronicles4:25 Sauli akaibora Salumu, na Salumu akaibora Mibusamu, na Mibusamu akaibora Misima." 
1Chronicles4:26 Misima akaibora Hamueli, na Hamueli akaibora Sakuri, na Sakuri akaibora Simei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simei nigo abwate abana abamura ikomi na batano nomo, na abaiseke batano nomo; korende abamura bamwabo tibabwate abana abange, gose chiamate chiabo chionsi tichiamentekanete buna echia Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Barabwo nigo bamenyete agwo Beeri‐Seba, na Molada, na Hasari‐Suali;" 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilaha, na Esemu, na Toladi;" 
1Chronicles4:30 Betueli, na Horima, na Sikilagi;" 
1Chronicles4:31 Beti‐Marikaboti, na Hasari‐Susimu, na Beti‐Biri, na Saaraimu. Eye nero yarenge emechie yabo goika ekero Daudi abete omoruoti." 
1Chronicles4:32 Na emechie yabo emeke nigo yarenge Etamu na Aini, Rimoni na Tokeni, na Asani; yonsi netano." 
1Chronicles4:33 Boigo mbabwate ebichie biabo biaetanaine emechie eyio goikeera Baali. Obo nabwo bwarenge obomenyo bwabo. Barabwo bakarika omoroberio bwe chinderia chiabo. 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobabu, na Yamuleki, na Yosha, mosinto bw’Amasia;" 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoeli, na Yehu, mosinto o Yosibia o Seraya bw’Asieli;" 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai na Yaakoba, Yesohaya na Asaia, Adieli na Yesimieli, na Benaya;" 
1Chronicles4:37 Sisa, mosinto o Sifi bw’Aloni, o Yedaya, o Simuri, o Semaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Aba iga batoire ase amarieta abo nabwo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo. Chiamate echi chikamentekana mono. 
1Chronicles4:39 Ase ayio barabwo bakang’anya gochia ase omochie o Gedori, ensemo ya moocha ye rikura, korigia oborisia ase chitugo chiabo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Aroro agwo ase banyorete oborisia obuya na obonoru, ense nigo yarenge engare, na entoereru, na ey’omorembe. Abanto bamenyete agwo ritang’ani nigo barenge abanto ba Hamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Abanto aba batoire ase amarieta abo bagacha ekero Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, arenge kogamba. Barabwo bagasaria chiema chi’abanto b’aroro na bagasiria Abameuni, abanto banyorekanete aroro; bakabasiria kegima na tibaiyo nonya goika rero iga. Erio bakamenya agwo ribaga riabo, ekiagera oborisia mbwarengeo ase chitugo chiabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Na abanto amagana atano b’egesaku gia Simeoni, bakagenda goika egetunwa gia Seiri, bakaba nabaraai babo: Pelatia na Nearia, Refaya na Usieli, basinto ba Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Barabwo bagasiria abanto abatigari b’Abaameleki, naende bakamenya aroro, nao bare goika rero iga." 
1Chronicles5:1 Reuben nigo arenge omwana omomura omotangi o Israeli. (Korende ekiagera nararete na moga ise, omwando oye bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi okaegwa abana abamura ba Yusufu, mosinto o Israeli. Korende Yusufu tarikiri ase omoroberio bw’okonyora omwando bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi." 
1Chronicles5:2 Nonya Yuda obete ne chinguru ase egati y’abamura bamwabo, na korwa asare nao omogambi arwete, omwando bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi nigo obete oyo o Yusufu.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Abana abamura ba Reuben, omwana omotangi o Israeli, nabwo aba: Hanoki na Palu, Hezironi na Karimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ororeria rwa Yoeli narwo oro: Yoeli akaibora Semaya, na Semaya akaibora Gogi, na Gogi akaibora Simei." 
1Chronicles5:5 Simei akaibora Mika, na Mika akaibora Reaya, na Reaya akaibora Baali." 
1Chronicles5:6 Baali akaibora Beera oria Tiligati‐Pileseri omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, oosete, akamoira ase obosomba. Beera orenge omoteneneri bw’abanto ba Reuben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Na abamwabo ase chiamate chiabo buna barigetwe ase omoroberio bwe chinderia chi’ebiare biabo nabwo aba: Yeieli, nere orenge omoteneneri obo, na Zakaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela, mosinto bw’Asasi o Sema, o Yoeli, Barabwo nigo bamenyete agwo Aroeri goikera orobebe rwa Nebo na Baali‐Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ensemo ya moocha bakamenya goikera egesoero ki’erooro egoikera orooche rw’Eufarati, ekiagera amaicho abo nigo abuchete mono ase ense ya Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ase engaki eria Saulo arenge kogamba bakarwana esegi n’Abahagari, bakabaita, na barabwo bakamenya ase chiema chiabo agwo ase ense yonsi moocha ya Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Gadi bakamenya sugusu y’abanto b’orwa Reuben agwo ase ense ya Basani, bagaikera omochie o Saleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoeli nere orenge omonene, na Safamu oyo o kabere, naende Yanai na Safati bakaba agwo Basani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Na abamwabo be chiamate chiabo nabwo aba: Mikaeli na Mesulamu, Seba na Yorai, Yakani na Sia, na Eberi, bonsi mbatano na babere." 
1Chronicles5:14 Aba nabwo barenge basinto b’Abihaili, mosinto o Huri o Yaroa, o Gileadi, o Mikaeli, o Yesisai, o Yado, o Busi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, mosinto bw’Abidieli, o Guni, nere orenge omoteneneri bwe chiamate chiabo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Barabwo bonsi bakamenya agwo Gileadi na Basani, na ase emechie y’aroro na ase oborisia bwonsi bwa Saroni goikera chinsinyo chiaye." 
1Chronicles5:17 Aba bonsi nigo babaretwe na korikwa ekero omobaro bwe chinderia chiabo okoretwe ase amatuko ’okogamba kwa Yotamu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, na aya okwa Yeroboamu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Abanto ba Reuben, na aba Gadi, na ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, nigo babwate abanto chituoni barenge kobogoria chinguba na emioro, naende nigo bamanyete korasa nemegwe abanto abang’aini ase esegi. Abwo nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ene na inye, na amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano nomo (44,760), nigo barenge bebegete ang’e korwana esegi." 
1Chronicles5:19 Bakaba bakorwana esegi n’Abahagari abarwete ase Yeturi na Nafisi, na Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ekiagera bamwegenete Nyasae bakarera ase okonyora ogokonywa, na Nyasae akaigwa ogosaba kwabo, na barabwo bakabua Abahagari na abanto bonsi barenge amo nabarabwo." 
1Chronicles5:21 Bagasakora chitugo chiabo: Chingamia chilifu emerongo etano (50,000), ne ching’ondi chilifu amagana abere na emerongo etano (250,000) ne chitigere chilifu ibere (2,000). Naende bagoosa abanto chilifu rigana erimo (100,000)," 
1Chronicles5:22 na bagaita abanto abange, ekiagera esegi yarenge eya Nyasae. Erio bakamenya aase abo goika engaki y’okong’anyigwa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Abanto ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase bakamenya ense eria; bakamentekana mono, bakamenya korwa orobebe rwa Basani goika Baali‐Herimoni, na Seniri, na egetunwa kia Herimoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Aba nabwo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo: Eferi na Ishi, Elieli na Asirieli, Yeremia na Hodawia, na Yadieli. Abwo nabanto chituoni bachiete nkuma ase okorwana esegi." 
1Chronicles5:25 Korende abanto b’ebisaku bia moocha bagakora ogosaria ase Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, bagakora obotayai, bakabwatia chinyasae chi’abanto b’ense eria, abwo Nyasae asiretie korwa asebare." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ase ayio Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli agaseegeta omoika o Puli, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri (nere Tiligati‐Pileseri), na Puli oyio akaira abanto b’ororeria rwa Reuben, na ab’orwa Gadi, na ekeng’ese ki ’egesaku kia Manase goika Hala na Habori, na Hara, na goika ase orooche rwa Goseni; nao bare goika rero iga." 
1Chronicles6:1 Abana abamura ba Lawi nabwo aba: Gerisoni na Kohati, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Abana abamura ba Kohati nabwo aba: Amuramu na Isari, Heburoni na Usieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Abana b’Amuramu nabwo aba: Haroni na Musa, na Miriamu omoiseke. Abana abamura ba Haroni nabwo aba: Nadabu na Abihu, Eleazari na Itamari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazari akaibora Finehasi, na Finehasi akaibora Abisua;" 
1Chronicles6:5 Abisua akaibora Buki, na Buki akaibora Usi;" 
1Chronicles6:6 Usi akaibora Seraya, na Seraya akaibora Merayoti;" 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoti akaibora Amaria, na Amaria akaibora Ahitubu;" 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubu akaibora Zadoki, na Zadoki akaibora Ahimasi;" 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimasi akaibora Asaria, na Asaria akaibora Yohanani;" 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanani akaibora Asaria (oyo nere orenge omokuani ase enyomba eria Sulemani aagachete agwo Yerusalemu); 
1Chronicles6:11 Asaria akaibora Amaria, na Amaria akaibora Ahitubu;" 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubu akaibora Zadoki, na Zadoki akaibora Salumu;" 
1Chronicles6:13 Salumu akaibora Hilikia, na Hilikia akaibora Asaria;" 
1Chronicles6:14 Asaria akaibora Seraya, na Seraya akaibora Yehosadaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehosadaki agooswa akairwa ense eng’ao, ekero Omonene aruete Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu bagooswa, bakairwa na Nebukadinesaro." 
1Chronicles6:16 Abana abamura ba Lawi nabwo aba: Gerisomu na Kohati, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Aya naro amarieta ’abana abamura ba Gerisomu: Libini na Simei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Abana abamura ba Kohati nabwo aba: Amuramu na Isari, na Heburoni, na Usieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Abana abamura ba Merari nabwo Mali na Musi. Echi nechiamate chi’abanto ba Lawi, chiatoire ase abaise:" 
1Chronicles6:20 Oro narwo ororeria rwa Gerisomu: Libini omomura oye, na Yahati omomura oye, na Sima omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:21 na Yoa omomura oye, na Ido omomura oye, na Zera omomura oye, na Yeateri omomura oye." 
1Chronicles6:22 Oro narwo ororeria rwa Kohati: Aminadabu omomura oye, na Kora omomura oye, na Asiri omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:23 na Elikana omomura oye, na Ebiasafu omomura oye, na Asiri omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:24 na Tahati omomura oye, na Urieli omomura oye, na Usia omomura oye, na Sauli omomura oye." 
1Chronicles6:25 Abana abamura b’Elikana nabwo Amasi na Ahimoti. 
1Chronicles6:26 Oro narwo ororeria rw’Ahimoti: Elikana omomura oye, na Sofai omomura oye, na Nahati omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:27 na Eliabu omomura oye, na Yerohamu omomura oye, na Elikana omomura oye." 
1Chronicles6:28 Abana abamura ba Samweli nabwo Yoeli, omwana oye omotangi, na Abiya, oyo o kabere." 
1Chronicles6:29 Oro narwo ororeria rwa Merari: Mali omomura oye, na Libini omomura oye, na Simei omomura oye, na Usa omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:30 na Simea omomura oye, na Hagia omomura oye, na Asaia omomura oye." 
1Chronicles6:31 Aba nabwo abanto Daudi abegete bakaba abateneneri b’amatera ase enyomba y’Omonene, ekero Esanduku eria yarenge nokobwatana kw’Omonene konya yabekirwe aroro." 
1Chronicles6:32 Nigo barenge gokora obokoreri bwabo bw’amatera agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano goika engaki eria Sulemani aagachete enyomba y’Omonene agwo Yerusalemu; barabwo bagakora emeremo yabo ase omoroberio ochikire. 
1Chronicles6:33 Aba nabwo abanto bakorete emeremo amo nororeria rwabo: Korwa ase ororeria rwa Kohati: Hemani, omonene bw’abateri, mosinto o Yoeli o Samweli,"
