1Chronicles6:34 bw’Elikana, o Yerohamu, bw’Elieli, o Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 o Sufu, bw’Elikana, o Mahati, bw’Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 bw’Elikana, o Yoeli, bw’Asaria, o Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 o Tahati, bw’Asiri, bw’Ebiasafu, o Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 o Isari, o Kohati, o Lawi, o Israeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Oyo o kabere nere Asafu, oyo bw’eamate ya Hemani. Ere nigo arenge gotenena ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio. Asafu nigo arenge mosinto o Berekia, o Simea," 
1Chronicles6:40 o Mikaeli, o Baseya, o Malikia," 
1Chronicles6:41 bw’Etini, o Zera, bw’Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 bw’Etani, o Sima, o Simei," 
1Chronicles6:43 o Yahati, o Gerisomu, o Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ase ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee mbarengeo abamwabo b’ororeria rwa Merari: Etani, mosinto o Kisi bw’Abidi, o Maluku," 
1Chronicles6:45 o Hasabia, bw’Amasia, o Hilikia," 
1Chronicles6:46 bw’Amusi, o Bani, o Semeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 o Mali, o Musi, o Merari, o Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Abalawi bamwabo bagachorwa gokora emeremo yonsi y’Eema nero enyomba ya Nyasae. 
1Chronicles6:49 Haroni amo nabamura b’ororeria rwaye bakaba bakorua ebing’wanso agwo ase egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa na gosambera ubani ase egesasimero ki’ogosambera ubani. Bagakora emeremo yonsi ime y’Aase Aachenu Mono, naende bagakora ayaganetigwe ase okobwatania Abaisraeli na Nyasae, koreng’ana namang’ana onsi Musa, omosomba o Nyasae, achigete." 
1Chronicles6:50 Oro narwo ororeria rwa Haroni: Eleazari omomura oye, na Finehasi omomura oye, na Abisua omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:51 na Buku omomura oye, na Usi omomura oye, na Seraya omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:52 na Merayoti omomura oye, na Amaria omomura oye, na Ahitubu omomura oye," 
1Chronicles6:53 na Zadoki omomura oye, na Ahimasi omomura oye." 
1Chronicles6:54 Echi nachio chinsemo abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni b’eamate ya Kohati bamenyete ase chingongo chiabo. Obomera bwe ritang’ani bokabagwera; 
1Chronicles6:55 ase igo bakaegwa Heburoni amo namarisio aetanaineo, agwo ase ense ya Yuda." 
1Chronicles6:56 Korende emegondo y’omochie amo nebichie b’omochie oyio bakaa Kalebu, mosinto o Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni bakaegwa emechie eye: Heburoni, omochie bw’obotamero, na Libuna, amo namarisio aetanaineo, Yatiri na Esitemoa amo namarisio aetanaineo," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hileni na Debiri amo namarisio aetanaineo; 
1Chronicles6:59 Asani na Beti‐Semesi amo namarisio aetanaineo. 
1Chronicles6:60 Na korwa ase egesaku kia Benjamin bakaegwa Geba na Alemeti, na Anatoti, emechie eyio yonsi amo namarisio aetanaineo. Emechie yabo yonsi ase chiamate chiabo nigo yarenge ikomi na etato." 
1Chronicles6:61 Abanto ba Kohati abatigarete bakaegwa emechie ikomi ase ogoakerwa obomera, bakayeegwa korwa ase eamate y’ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase." 
1Chronicles6:62 Abanto be chiamate chi’Abagerisomu bakaegwa emechie ikomi na etato agwo Basani korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku bia Isakaru, na Aseri, na Nafutali, na Manase agwo Basani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Abanto be chiamate chi’Abamerari bakaegwa emechie ikomi na ebere korwa ase ebisaku bia Reuben, na Gadi, na Sabuloni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Naboigo Abaisraeli baete Abalawi emechie amo namarisio aetanaineo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Emechie eyio yatoire bakabayea korwa ase ebisaku bia Yuda, na Simeoni, na Benjamin ase okoyeakera obomera." 
1Chronicles6:66 Na abanto be chiamate chinde chi’Abakohati bakaegwa emechie korwa ase orogongo rw’egesaku gi’Efraimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Bakaegwa Sekemu, omochie bw’obotamero ase ense y’Efraimu na Geseri," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokimeamu na Beti‐Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayaloni na Gati‐Rimoni, amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles6:70 Na korwa ase ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase Abakohati abatigarete bakaegwa Aneri na Bileamu amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio. 
1Chronicles6:71 Korwa ase ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase Abagerisomu bakaegwa Golani agwo Basani, na Asitaroti, amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles6:72 Na korwa ase egesaku gia Isakaru bakaegwa Kedesi na Daberati," 
1Chronicles6:73 na Ramoti, na Anemu, amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles6:74 Korwa ase egesaku gi’Aseri bakaegwa Masali na Abidoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 na Hukoki na Rebobu, amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles6:76 Na korwa ase egesaku kia Nafutali bakaegwa Kedesi agwo Galili, na Hamoni, na Kiriataimu, amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles6:77 Abamerari abatigarete bakaegwa korwa ase egesaku gia Sabuloni: Rimoni na Tabori amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio. 
1Chronicles6:78 Na ng’umbu ya Yorodan, ensemo ya moocha ya Yeriko, bakaegwa korwa ase egesaku kia Reuben: Beseri agwo aase aateremu, na Yahasi," 
1Chronicles6:79 na Kedemoti, na Mefati, amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles6:80 Na korwa ase egesaku kia Gadi bakaegwa Ramoti agwo Gileadi, na Mahanaimu," 
1Chronicles6:81 na Hesiboni, na Yaeseri amo namarisio aetanaine emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles7:1 Abana abamura ba Isakaru nabwo aba: Tola, na Pua, na Yasubu, na Simuroni, bonsi mbane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Abana abamura ba Tola nabwo aba: Usi na Refaya, na Yerieli, na Yamai, na Ibusamu, na Semueli. Aba nabwo abateneneri be chiamate chia Tola, abanto chituoni ase okorwana esegi ase ebigori biabo. Ase amatuko ’okogamba gwa Daudi nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere, na amagana atano na rimo (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Abana abamura ba Usi nabwo aba: Isiraya amo nabana baye abamura: Mikaeli, na Obadia, na Yoeli, na Isia, bonsi mbatano; na abwo nigo barenge abateneneri." 
1Chronicles7:4 Barabwo nigo babwate abakungu abange babaiborerete abana abamura abange. Ase igo barwete korwa ase chinderia chiabo abarwani esegi abakong’u chilifu emerongo etato na isano nemo (36,000)." 
1Chronicles7:5 Abanto bamwabo be chiamate chionsi chia Isakaru nigo barenge abakong’u ase esegi. Bonsi nigo barenge chilifu emerongo etano na etato na isano na ibere (87,000), buna barigetwe ase chinderia chiabo." 
1Chronicles7:6 Abana abamura ba Benjamin nabwo aba: Bela, na Bekeri, na Yediaeli, bonsi mbatato." 
1Chronicles7:7 Abana abamura ba Bela nabwo aba: Esiboni, na Usi, na Usieli, na Yerimoti, na Iri. Aba bonsi batano nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, abanto abakong’u ase esegi. Abwo barikire ase omoroberio bwe chinderia chiabo nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere, na emerongo etato, na bane (22,034)." 
1Chronicles7:8 Abana abamura ba Bekeri nabwo aba: Semira, na Yoashi, na Eliezeri, na Elioenai, na Omuri, na Yerimoti, na Abiya, na Anatoti, na Alemeti. Aba bonsi nigo barenge abana abamura ba Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Abwo barikire ase omoroberio bwe chinderia chiabo, amo nabateneneri be chiamate chiabo, nigo barenge abanto abakong’u ase esegi, abanto chilifu emerongo ebere, na amagana abere (20,200)." 
1Chronicles7:10 Abana abamura ba Yediaeli nabwo aba: Bilihani amo nabana baye abamura: Yeusi, na Benjamin, na Ehudi, na Kenaana, na Setani, na Tarisisi, na Ahisahari," 
1Chronicles7:11 Aba bonsi nabwo ab’ororeria rwa Yediaeli. Barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, naende nigo barenge abakong’u ase esegi. Omobaro obo nechilifu ikomi na isano na ibere, na amagana abere (17,200)." 
1Chronicles7:12 Supimu na Hupimu nigo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Iri, naende Abahusi nab’ororeria rw’Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Abana abamura ba Nafutali nabwo aba: Yaseeli, na Guni, na Yeseri, na Salumu. Nabwo abanto b’ororeria rwa Bilia." 
1Chronicles7:14 Abana abamura ba Manase nabwo aba: Asirieli, oria omokungu oye o sere‐sere, orenge Omoaramai amoiborerete. Boigo omokungu oria akaibora Makiri, ise Gileadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri akanyuomeria Hupimu omokungu, boigo akanyuomeria Supimu omokungu. Omoiseke omwabo nigo arenge korokwa Maaka. Omwana omomura o kabere o Manase nigo arenge korokwa Selofehadi. Selofehadi nigo abwate abana abaiseke boka." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka, moka Makiri, akaibora omwana omomura, akamoroka Peresi; na momura omwabo Peresi akarokwa Seresi. Abana abamura babere ba Peresi nabwo Ulamu na Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamu nabwate omwana omomura orenge korokwa Bedani. Aba nabwo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Gileadi, mosinto o Makiri o Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamoleketi omosubati omwabo Gileadi, akaibora Isi‐Hodi na Abieseri, na Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Abana ba Shemida nabwo aba: Ahiani, na Sekemu, na Liki, na Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Oro narwo ororeria rw’Efraimu: Sutela omomura oye, na Beredi omomura oye, na Tahati omomura oye, na Eleada omomura oye, na Tahati omomura oye," 
1Chronicles7:21 na Sabadi omomura oye, na Sutela omomura oye. Naende Efraimu nabwate abana babere, Eseri na Eleadi; baria abanto baiboretwe ase ense ya Gadi baitete, ekiagera bachete koiba chiombe chiabo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efraimu ise akaba okobareera ase amatuko amange, na abamura bamwabo bagacha komoremia." 
1Chronicles7:23 Erio Efraimu akaba na mokaye, na ere akanyora oborito, akaibora omwana omomura. Efraimu akaroka omwana oria Beria, ekiagera amang’ana amabe achete ase enka yaye." 
1Chronicles7:24 Omwana oye omoiseke nigo arenge korokwa Seera, oria oagachete Beti‐Horoni ya rogoro na eya maate, na Useni‐Seera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa nigo arenge omomura bw’Efraimu, na Resefu omomura oye, na Tela omomura oye, na Tahani omomura oye," 
1Chronicles7:26 na Ladani omomura oye, na Amihudi omomura oye, na Elisama omomura oye," 
1Chronicles7:27 na Nuni omomura oye, na Yoshua omomura oye." 
1Chronicles7:28 Chingongo chiabo bamenyete nachio Beteli na ebichie biaye, na ensemo ya moocha Naarani, na ensemo ya bosongo Geseri na ebichie biaye, na Sekemu na ebichie biaye, na Aya na ebichie biaye." 
1Chronicles7:29 Boigo ase ribebe ri’abanto ba Manase mbabwate Beti‐Sehani na ebichie biaye, na Taanaki na ebichie biaye, na Megido na ebichie biaye, na Dori na ebichie biaye. Ase emechie eyio na ebichie nao abanto b’ororeria rwa Yusufu, mosinto o Israeli, bamenyete." 
1Chronicles7:30 Abana abamura b’Aseri nabwo aba: Imuna, na Isiva, na Isivi na Beria, na omoiseke omwabo Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Abana abamura ba Beria nabwo Heberi, na Malikieli, oria orenge ise Birisaiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi nere orenge ise Yafileti, na Someri, na Hotamu, na ise omoiseke omwabo Sua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Abana abamura ba Yafileti nabwo aba: Pasaki, na Bimuhali, na Asiwati. Aba nabwo abana abamura ba Yafileti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Abana abamura ba Someri, omomura omwabo, nabwo aba: Roga, na Yehuba, na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Abana abamura ba Helemu, omomura omwabo, nabwo aba: Sofa, na Imuna, na Selesi, na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Abana abamura ba Sofa nabwo aba: Sua, na Hareneferi, na Suali, na Beri, na Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 na Beseri, na Hodi, na Sama, na Silisa, na Itirani, na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Abana abamura ba Yeteri nabwo aba: Yefune, na Pisipa, na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Abana ba Ula nabwo aba: Ara, na Hanieli, na Risia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Aba bonsi nigo barenge abanto b’ororeria rw’Aseri. Nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, abanto bamanyekanete ng’a nabakong’u ase esegi, abatang’ani b’abaraai. Abwo barigetwe korwa ase chinderia chiabo bagende korwana esegi nigo barenge chilifu emerongo ebere na isano nemo (26,000)." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamin nere orenge ise Bela, omwana oye omomura omotangi na Asibeli oyo o kabere, na Ahara oyo o gatato," 
1Chronicles8:2 na Noha oyo o kane, na Rafa oyo o gatano." 
1Chronicles8:3 Abamura ba Bela nabwo aba: Adari na Gera, na Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisua na Naamani, na Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera na Sefufani, na Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Abana abamura b’Ehudi nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, echio chiamenyete Geba. Barabwo bagooswa, bakairwa ase ense ya Manahati." 
1Chronicles8:7 Abamura abwo nabwo aba: Naamani na Ahiya, na Gera, oyio obairete aroro. Abana abamura baye nabwo Usa na Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Saharaimu akaibora abana abamura ase ense ya Moabu ekero konya aseririe Husimu na Baara, abakungu baye." 
1Chronicles8:9 Hodesi mokaye akamoiborera abana abamura, nabwo aba: Yobabu na Zibia, na Mesa, na Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yeusi na Sakia, na Mirima. Abana aba baye nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo." 
1Chronicles8:11 Naende Husimu akamoiborera abamura babere, nabwo Abitubu na Elipali." 
1Chronicles8:12 Abana abamura b’Elipali nabwo Eberi na Misamu, naende Semedi, oria oagachete emechie ya Omo na Lodi amo nebichie biabo." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria na Sema nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chi’abanto bamenyete agwo Ayaloni, nabwo baseretie abanyene ense ya Gati." 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahiyo na Sasaki, na Yeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 Sebadia na Aradi, na Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaeli, na Isipa, na Yoha; aba nigo barenge abana abamura ba Beria." 
1Chronicles8:17 Sebadia na Mesulamu, Hisiki na Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Isimerai na Isilia, na Yobabu; aba nigo barenge abana abamura b’Elipali." 
1Chronicles8:19 Yakimu na Sikiri, na Sabidi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elinai na Siletai, na Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya na Beraya, na Simurati; aba nigo baare abana abamura ba Simei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Isipani na Eberi, na Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abidoni na Sikiri, na Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania na Elamu, na Anitotia," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifudia na Penueli; aba nigo barenge abana abamura ba Sasaki. 
1Chronicles8:26 Samiserai na Seharia, na Atalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaresia na Elija, na Sikiri; aba nigo barenge abana abamura ba Yerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Aba nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo ase ebiaare biabo; nigo barenge abaraai abanene. Abwo nigo bamenyete Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles8:29 Ise Abagibeoni nigo amenyete agwo Gibeoni; omokungu oye nigo arenge korokwa Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Omwana oye omomura omotangi nere Abidoni; na abande nabwo aba: Suri na Kisi, Baali na Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori na Ahiyo, na Sekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikiloti (nere orenge ise Simea). Aba nigo bamenyete bakabebekana nabanto bamwabo agwo Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri akaibora Kisi, na Kisi akaibora Saulo, na Saulo akaibora Yonathani na Malikisua, na Abinadabu, na Esi‐Baali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Omwana omomura o Yonathani nere Meribu‐Baali; ere akaibora Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Abana abamura ba Mika nabwo aba: Pitoni na Meleki, na Tarea, na Ahasi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahasi akaibora Yehoada, na Yehoada akaibora Alemeti na Asimaweti, na Simuri, na Simuri akaibora Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza akaibora Binea; Rafa nigo arenge omomura oye, na Eleasa omomura oye, na Aseli omomura oye." 
1Chronicles8:38 Aseli nabwate abana abamura batano nomo, naya naro amarieta abo: Asirikamu na Bokeru, Isumaeli na Searia, Obadia na Hanani. Aba bonsi nigo barenge abana abamura b’Aseli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Abana abamura b’Eseki, momura omwabo, nabwo aba: Ulamu, omwana oye omotangi, na Yeusi, oyo o kabere, na Elifeleti, oyo o gatato." 
1Chronicles8:40 Abana abamura ba Ulamu nigo barenge abanto chituoni ase esegi, bamanyete koruta emegwe. Nigo babwate abana abamura na abachokoro abamura abange, bonsi nigo barenge rigana erimo, na emerongo etano. Aba bonsi nigo barenge abanto b’ororeria rwa Benjamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Abaisraeli bonsi nigo babaretwe na korikwa koreng’ana ne chinderia chiabo, na amang’ana abo nigo anyorekanete ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli. Abayuda nigo boosetwe bakairwa Babeli, ekiagera tibarenge abegenwa." 
1Chronicles9:2 Abanto batang’anete koirana na komenya sobo ase emechie yabo n’Abaisraeli bande, na abakuani, na Abalawi, na abakori emeremo be Hekalu." 
1Chronicles9:3 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Yuda, na orwa Benjamin, na orw’Efraimu, na orwa Manase, abwo bamenyete Yerusalemu nabwo aba:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai, omwana bw’Amihudi, mosinto bw’Omuri o Imuri, o Bani korwa ase ororeria rwa Peresi, mosinto o Yuda," 
1Chronicles9:5 na korwa Silo Asaia, omwana omotangi amo nabana baye abamura." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ase ororeria rwa Zera Yeueli amo nabanto bamwabo. Bonsi nigo barenge abanto amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo kianda (690)." 
1Chronicles9:7 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Benjamin nabwo aba: Salu, mosinto o Mesulamu o Hodawia, o Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 naende Ibunia, mosinto o Yerohamu, na Ela, mosinto o Usi o Mikiri, na Mesulamu, mosinto o Sefatia o Reueli, o Ibunia," 
1Chronicles9:9 amo nabanto bamwabo ase chinderia chiabo, nigo barenge amagana kianda, na emerongo etano, na batano nomo (956). Aba bonsi nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, kera oyomo ase eamate yaye." 
1Chronicles9:10 Abakuani aba nabwo bamenyete Yerusalemu: Yedaya na Yehoyaribu, na Yakini;" 
1Chronicles9:11 Asaria, mosinto o Hilikia o Mesulamu, o Zadoki, o Meraioti, bw’Ahitubu, omoteneneri omonene bw’enyomba ya Nyasae." 
1Chronicles9:12 Naende Adaya, mosinto o Yerohamu o Pasuri, o Malikia; na Maasai, mosinto bw’Adieli o Yasera, o Mesulamu, o Mesilemiti, o Imeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Amo nabwo barenge abamwabo, abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, elifu eyemo, na amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano nomo (1,760). Bonsi nigo barenge abamanyi ase ogokora emeremo ase enyomba ya Nyasae." 
1Chronicles9:14 Abalawi aba nabwo bamenyete Yerusalemu: Semaya, mosinto o Hasubu bw’Asirikamu, o Hasabia korwa ase eamate y’Abamerari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakibakari na Heresi, Galali na Matania, mosinto o Mika o Sikiri, bw’Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadia, mosinto o Semaya o Galali, o Yedutuni; na Berekia, mosinto bw’Asa bw’Elikana, oyomenyete ase emechie y’Abanetofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Aba nabwo abarendi b’ebiita bamenyete Yerusalemu: Salumu na Akubu, Talimoni na Ahimani, na abanto bande bamwabo. Salumu nere orenge omoteneneri obo." 
1Chronicles9:18 Abanto abwo bakaba bakorenda agwo ase Egeita ki’Omoruoti, ensemo ya moocha, goika engaki eye. Kare nabwo barenge abarendi b’egetwori ki’Abalawi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Salumu, mosinto o Kore bw’Ebiasafu, o Kora, amo nabanto bande b’eamate yaye, nabwo Abakora, nigo barenge abateneneri b’okorenda ase ebiita bi’Eema y’Omosangererekano, buna chisokoro chiabo chiarenge korenda ase egesoero ki’egetwori ki’Omonene." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehasi, mosinto bw’Eleazari, nere orenge omogambi agwo kare, na Omonene nigo arenge amo nere." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakaria, mosinto o Meselemia, nere orenge omorendi bw’egeita agwo ase egesoero ki Eema y’Omosangererekano." 
1Chronicles9:22 Abanto aba bonsi amagana abere, na ikomi na babere (212) nigo bachoretwe bakaba abarendi b’ebisoero bi’ebiita. Bakabarwa na korikwa ase chinderia chiabo. Daudi na Samweli omorori bakababeka ase emeremo, ekiagera babegenete." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ase igo barabwo amo nabamura be chinderia chiabo bakagenderera korenda ebiita bi’enyomba y’Omonene, nero Eema eria." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abarendi baria b’ebiita bakabeera aria korenda chinsemo chia moocha, na bosongo, na sugusu, na irianyi." 
1Chronicles9:25 Abanto bamwabo abarenge ase emechie yabo bakabetererigwa gocha koba amo nabarabwo ase kera rituko ria gatano na kabere ase engaki yachikire. 
1Chronicles9:26 Abalawi baria bane abarenge abateneneri b’emeremo y’okorenda ebiita nabwo batenenerete ebinyomba ne chikungo chi’enyomba ya Nyasae. 
1Chronicles9:27 Barabwo bakaba bakobeera isiko bagaetanana enyomba ya Nyasae, ekiagera emeremo y’oborendi nigo yabegetwe igoro asebare, naende nabwo barenge koigora enyomba eria kera emambia." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abalawi bande nabwo batenenerete ebikorero bi’emeremo, ekiagera nigo baganeirie kobibara ekero biarenge korentwa ime, na ekero biarenge koirwa isiko ase emeremo." 
1Chronicles9:29 Abande babo bagachorwa gotenenera chimesa na ebinto binde, na ebikorero ebichenu, na obosie obonuke, na edivai, na amaguta ’amazeituni, na ubani, na ebinsari." 
1Chronicles9:30 Abande b’abamura b’abakuani nigo babegetwe kwearigania na gwochogania ebinsari. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitia, oyomo bw’Abalawi, omomura omotangi o Salumu, omonto bw’eamate ya Kora, agatenenera emeremo y’okoroisia emegati ekoruegwa." 
1Chronicles9:32 Boigo abande bamwabo b’eamate ya Kohati bagatenenera emeremo y’okoroisia emegati yarenge koruegwa ase Omonene kera Esabato. 
1Chronicles9:33 Abande nigo barenge abateri abanene, boigo nabwo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abalawi. Barabwo nigo bamenyete ase ebinyomba bie Hekalu; tibarenge gokora emeremo ende emeao, ekiagera omobaso na obotuko nigo barenge ase emeremo baetwe gokora." 
1Chronicles9:34 Aba nabwo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo chi’Abalawi ase ebiaare biabo. Abwo nigo barenge abaraai baria bamenyete Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeieli ise Abagibeoni, nigo amenyete agwo Gibeoni na mo kaye nigo arenge korokwa Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Abidoni nere orenge omwana oye omomura omotangi, na abande nabwo aba: Suri na Kisi, Baali na Neri, na Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori na Ahiyo, Zakaria na Mikiloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikiloti nere orenge ise Simeamu. Aba boigo nigo bamenyete bakabebekana nabamwabo agwo Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri akaibora Kisi, na Kisi akaibora Saulo, na Saulo akaibora Yonathani na Malikisua, Abinadabu na Esi‐Baali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonathani akaibora Meribu‐Baali, na Meribu‐Baali akaibora Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Abana abamura ba Mika nabwo aba: Pitoni na Meleki, Tarea na Ahasi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahasi akaibora Yara, na Yara akaibora Alemeti na Asimaweti, na Simuri; nere Simuri akaibora Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza akaibora Binea, na Binea akaibora Refaya, na Refaya akaibora Eleasa, na Eleasa akaibora Aseli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Aseli nabwate abana abamura batano nomo, na amarieta abo naro aya: Asirikamu, na Bokeru, na Isumaeli, na Searia, na Obadia, na Hanani. Aba nabwo abana abamura b’Aseli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Bono Abafilisti bakarwania Abaisraeli, na Abaisraeli bagatama korwa asebare na bagaiterwa ase egetunwa kia Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilisti bakabwatia Saulo na abamura baye, bagaita Yonathani, na Abinadabu, na Malikisua, abamura ba Saulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Esegi ekaba entindi mono ase Saulo, na abaruti emegwe bakamoromereria, bakamorasa, bakamoaka chingoma." 
1Chronicles10:4 Erio Saulo agatebia omonto oria omobogoreretie ebirwanero, “Simora omoyio oo, ombete nkwe, erinde abanto aba batarogeti tibabaisa kong’ita na gonchecheria.” Korende omonto oria akaanga, ekiagera nigo abete nobwoba obonene. Ase ayio Saulo akabwata omoyio oye omonyene akegweria igoro yaye." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ekero omonto oria omobogoria ebirwanero aroche ng’a Saulo okure, nere akegweria ase omoyio oye omonyene, agakwa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Naboigo Saulo agakwa, ere na abamura baye batato amo nabanto baye bonsi." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ekero Abaisraeli bonsi abarenge ase ense eria omweremo baroche ng’a abarwani ’esegi babo batamire, na ng’a Saulo na abamura baye bakure, bagatiga emechie yabo bagatama. Erio Abafilisti bagacha, bakamenya ase emechie eyio." 
1Chronicles10:8 Rituko ria kabere, ekero Abafilisti bachete konuura ebinto korwa ase emebere y’abanto bakwete, bakanyora Saulo amo nabamura baye bakwete agwo ase egetunwa kia Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Bakamonuura ebinto biaye, bakanacha omotwe oye bakayoira, bakaira nebirwanero biaye, erio bagatoma abanto bararie amang’ana aya amaya ase ense yonsi y’Abafilisti, ase emegwekano yabo y’ogosasimwa na ase abanto." 
1Chronicles10:10 Bakabeka ebirwanero biaye ime ase hekalu ye chinyasae chiabo, erio bagasiberania omotwe oye ase hekalu ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Korende ekero abanto bonsi ba Yabeshi o Gileadi baigwete aya onsi Abafilisti bakorerete Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 abarwani bonsi chituoni bakagenda bakarusia omobere o Saulo na ey’abamura baye korwa ase yarenge, bakayerenta Yabesi. Erio bagatindeka amauga abo inse ase omote onga buna omotontera agwo Yabesi, erio bakeng’ata amatuko atano na abere." 
1Chronicles10:13 Naboigo Saulo akwete, ekiagera atarenge omwegenwa. Tarenge omwegenwa ase Omonene na tarendete amang’ana Omonene amochigete; naende akagenda korigia ogosemigwa korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakure, ase okoraagwa nero," 
1Chronicles10:14 na tarigetie okoraagwa korwa ase Omonene. Ase ayio Omonene akamoita, akarusia oboruoti asare, akaboa Daudi, mosinto o Yese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Erio Abaisraeli bonsi bagasangerereka ase Daudi agwo Heburoni bakamotebia, “Naama! Intwe nigo tore abamo naye, aba amanyinga ayamo, na omobere oyomo." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ase engaki yaetire, nonya nekero Saulo arenge omoruoti, naye kwarenge gotang’ana Abaisraeli kobaare korwana esegi naende kobakoirana. Na Omonene, Nyasae oo, akagotebia ng’a naye orabe omorisia bw’Abaisraeli, abanto baye, na koba omogambi igoro yabo.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Nabo abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli bagacha ase omoruoti agwo Heburoni; na aroro Daudi agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabarabwo ase obosio bw’Omonene, na barabwo bagaaka Daudi amaguta akaba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli, koreng’ana ne ring’ana riria Omonene akwanete goetera ase Samweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Daudi amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakagenda Yerusalemu, noro Yebusi, ase Abayebusi, abanto b’ense eria, barenge." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abanto ba Yebusi bakamotebia, “Aye tokonyara gocha aiga nonya ng’ake.” Korende nonya naboigo, Daudi akabua eburi ya Sayoni, oyio noro Omochie o Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daudi konya otebire, “Omonto onde bwensi orabe oyo bwe ritang’ani goita abanto ba Yebusi, ere oyio nabe omochiki omonene bw’abarwani.” Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, akaba oyo bwe ritang’ani kogenda aroro; ase ayio ere akaba omochiki." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi akaba okomenya ase eburi eria enkong’u, ase ayio ekarokwa Omochie o Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Erio akaagacha omochie goetanana onsi korwa Milo, okaba egesingo kegima; na Yoabu akaroisia omochie ase konya otagokire." 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi akamenta koba omonene, na koba nokobua, ekiagera Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo arenge amo nere." 
1Chronicles11:10 Aba nabwo abanto abanene chituoni ba Daudi, baria bamosiirete bokong’u ase oboruoti bwaye, amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakamobeka akaba omoruoti, koreng’ana ne ring’ana ri’Omonene igoro y’Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Oyo noro omobaro bw’abanto chituoni ba Daudi: Ritang’ani Yasobeamu korwa Hakimoni. Ere nigo arenge omonene bwa baria Batato. Ere akarwania abanto amagana atato ne ritimo riaye akabaita ase engaki eyemo. 
1Chronicles11:12 Na oyo o kabere bw’abwo Batato n’Eleazari, mosinto o Dodo, Omoahohi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Ere nigo arenge amo na Daudi agwo Pasi‐Damimu ekero Abafilisti basangererekanete amo, barwane esegi aase omogondo bw’esairi orenge. Ekero abanto batamete korwa ase Abafilisti," 
1Chronicles11:14 Eleazari agatenena gati gati y’omogondo oria, akaba omokong’u akayoegera, agaaka Abafilisti, akabaita. Omonene akabaa obobui obonene." 
1Chronicles11:15 Rituko erimo abanto batato ba baria abanene emerongo etato bagatirimboka gochia ase egetare, bakagenda ase Daudi agwo ase rikuruma ri’Adulamu, ekero abarwani esegi b’Abafilisti batoorete ase ense omweya y’Abarefai." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ase engaki eria Daudi nigo arenge ime ase eburi, na abarwani esegi b’Abafilisti nigo barenge Bethlehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Daudi akabora ase okogania okonene, “Ntare konyora omonto andetere amache inywe korwa ase ensoko eyio ere ase egeita kia Bethlehemu?”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Erio abanto baria Batato bakabinya‐binyia egati y’Abafilisti aase batoorete, bakabuucha amache korwa ase ensoko eria yarenge ase egeita kia Bethlehemu, bakayairera Daudi. Korende Daudi tayanywa otatiga ayaumorete akaba okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa ase Omonene," 
1Chronicles11:19 akabora, “Omonene ontange tiyanywa. Aya nigo anga buna nkonywa amanyinga ’abanto bataegerete obogima bwabo ase okorenta amache aya.” Ase ayio akaanga tayanywa. Ayio naro abanto abwo chituoni Batato bakorete." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisai, momura omwabo Yoabu, nigo amanyekanete ase baria Batato; akarwania abanto amagana atato akabaaka ne ritimo riaye, akabaita, na igo akaba nerieta rinene ase egati ya baria Batato." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ase baria Batato ere nigo abwate ogosikwa okuya goetania abande, akaba omoraai obo, korende tareng’anetie na baria Batato be ritang’ani." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, nigo arenge omonto etuoni korwa ase Kabuseli. Ere agakora emeremo emenene, agaita abanto babere chituoni b’Abamoabu. Engaki ende, ekero ki’obokendu na amagena ’embura yatwete, agasoa engoro agaita endo aroro." 
1Chronicles11:23 Naende agaita Omomisiri, omonto orenge nobotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano. Omomisiri oria nigo abwate ritimo koboko kwaye, riachomeire orotanga oronene buna omwaro, korende Benaya akamochiera nenyimbo, akamoura ritimo riarenge koboko kwaye, akamoitera ne ritimo riria riaye omonyene." 
1Chronicles11:24 Amang’ana aya naro Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, akorete. Nigo anyorete erieta rinene ase egati ya baria Batato." 
1Chronicles11:25 Nonya osikire kobua baria Emerongo Etato, tareng’anirie na baria Batato. Daudi akamobeka akaba omoteneneri bw’abarendi b’obogima bwaye." 
1Chronicles11:26 Abanto chituoni b’abarwani esegi nabwo aba: Asaeli momura omwabo Yoabu, na Elihanani, mosinto o Dodo korwa Bethlehemu." 
1Chronicles11:27 Samoti korwa Harodi na Helesi korwa Peleti; 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira, mosinto o Ikesi korwa Tekoa, na Abieseri korwa Anatoti;" 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai korwa Husa, na Ilai korwa Ahohi;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai korwa Netofa, na Heledi, mosinto o Baana korwa Netofa;" 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai, mosinto o Ribai korwa Gibea o Benjamin, na Benaya korwa Piratoni;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai korwa ase amakura ang’e na Gaasi, na Abieli korwa Ariba;" 
1Chronicles11:33 Asimaweti korwa Gahurimu na Eliaba korwa Saalaboni; 
1Chronicles11:34 basinto ba Hasemu korwa Gisoni na Yonathani, mosinto o Sagee, korwa Harari;" 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu, mosinto o Sakari korwa Harari, na Elifali, mosinto o Uri;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi korwa Mekera na Ahiya korwa Peloni 
1Chronicles11:37 Hesero korwa Karimeli, na Naara, mosinto bw’Esibai;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoeli, momura omwabo Nathani, na Mibihari, mosinto o Hagiri." 
1Chronicles11:39 Seleki korwa Amoni na Naharai korwa Beroti, omobogoria ebirwanero bia Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira na Garebu korwa Itiri; 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria Omohiti na Sabadi, mosinto bw’Alai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina, mosinto o Sisa bw’egesaku kia Reuben, omoraai bw’abanto b’egesaku ekio, na amo nere abanto emerongo etato;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani, mosinto o Maaka na Yosafati korwa Mitani;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Usia korwa Asitera; Sama na Yeieli, basinto ba Hotamu korwa Aroeri;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediaeli, mosinto o Simuri, na Yoha, momura omwabo, omonto o Tisi;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli korwa Mahawa Yeribai na Yosawia, basinto b’Elinamu, na Itima korwa Moabu;" 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli, na Obedi, na Yaasieli korwa Soba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Daudi nigo amenyete Sikilagi, ekero arenge kwebisa korwa ase Saulo, mosinto o Kisi. Abanto chituoni abarenge komokonya ase esegi bagacha asare." 
1Chronicles12:2 Abanto abwo nigo babwate amata, na nigo bamanyete koruta emegwe na amagena e chinduruche nokoboko gw’okorio amo nogw’okobee. Aba nigo barenge Ababenjamin, abanto bamwabo Saulo. Abanto aba nabwo aba:" 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahieseri orenge omonene obo, naende Yoashi; aba babere mbasinto ba Semaa korwa Gibea; Yesieli na Peleti basinto b’Asimaweti; Beraka na Yehu korwa Anatoti;" 
1Chronicles12:4 Isimaya korwa Gibeoni, omonto etuoni naende omoraai ase egati y’abanto baria Emerongo Etato; Yeremia na Yehasieli, Yohanani na Yosabadi korwa Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai na Yerimoti, Bealia na Semaria, na Sefatia korwa Harufi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elikana na Isia, Asareli na Yoeseri, na Yasobeamu, abarenge Abakora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Yoela na Sebadia, basinto ba Yerohamu, korwa Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Abagadi bande bakagenda kobwatia Daudi agwo ase eburi yarenge ase erooro. Abanto aba nigo barenge chituoni, bamanyete korwana chisegi, naende nigo bamanyete korwanera chinguba na amatimo. Amasio abo nigo arenge buna aye chindo, naende nigo barenge kominyoka buna chingabi igoro y’ebitunwa." 
1Chronicles12:9 Eseri nere orenge omotang’ani obo na Obadia oyo o kabere, na Eliabu oyo o gatato," 
1Chronicles12:10 na Misimana oyo o kane, na Yeremia oyo o gatano," 
1Chronicles12:11 na Atai oyo o gatano na rimo, na Elieli oyo o gatano na kabere," 
1Chronicles12:12 na Yohanani oyo o gatano na gatato, na Elisabadi oyo o kianda," 
1Chronicles12:13 na Yeremia oyo o ikomi, na Makibani oyo o ikomi na rimo." 
1Chronicles12:14 Abagadi aba nigo barenge abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi, na oyo otarenge ne chinguru nigo are konyara kobua abanto rigana erimo, na oyorenge ne chinguru nigo are konyara kobua abanto elifu eyemo." 
1Chronicles12:15 Aba nabwo abanto bambogete Yorodan ase omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, ekero orooche orwo rwaichorete goetania chingegu chinsemo chionsi, bagaseria abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense y’amaranya, ensemo ya moocha na eya bosongo." 
1Chronicles12:16 Abanto bande b’egesaku kia Benjamin, na ekia Yuda, bagacha ase eburi agwo ase Daudi arenge." 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi agasoka kobarotota akabatebia, “Onye igo mwachire buna abasani baane monkonye, rirorio enkoro yane nebwatane nainwe, korende onye nigo mwachire monsigane na kondua ase ababisa baane, nonya amaboko aane takorete okomocha konde gwonsi, rirorio Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito arore amang’ana ayio abae egesusuro.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Erio omoika ogacha igoro ase Amasai, omonene bw’abanto baria Emerongo Etato, nere agateba, “Aye Daudi, intwe nigo tore abanto bao; na nigo tokobwatana amo naye, aye omwana o Yese. Omorembe obe asore, na omorembe obe ase abakogokonya, ekiagera Nyasae oo, nere okogokonya.” Erio Daudi akabanchera, akababeka bakaba abatang’ani b’emeganda yaye y’esegi." 
1Chronicles12:19 Abanto bande b’egesaku kia Manase bagatama, bakagenda ase Daudi ekero arenge kogenda amo n’Abafilisti korwania Saulo. Korende Abafilisti tibaete Daudi ribaga abakonye, ekiagera ekero abagambi babo bagambete amo, bagateba, “Aise kogenda amo naintwe, ande nigo arabwatane amo na Saulo, omonene oye, igo batobutore emetwe.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ekero Daudi agendete Sikilagi, abanto aba b’egesaku kia Manase bagacha asare: Adina na Yosabadi, Yediaeli na Mikaeli, Yosabadi na Elihu, na Siletai. Aba nabwo barenge abateneneri b’abanto chilifu ba Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Barabwo bakaba bagokonya Daudi korwania ebiombe bi’abasakori. Abwo bonsi nigo barenge abanto chituoni, bakaba abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi." 
1Chronicles12:22 Rituko ase rituko abanto bakagenderera gocha ase Daudi komokonya, goika agatwara abarwani abange mono, buna abarwani esegi ba Nyasae." 
1Chronicles12:23 Oyo noro omobaro bw’emeganda y’abarwani esegi, baria bachete ase Daudi agwo Heburoni, buna Omonene achigete, erinde bamoe oboruoti boria bwarusetigwe ase Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:24 Abayuda ababogoretie chinguba na amatimo nigo barenge chilifu isano nemo, na amagana atano na atato (6,800), baisanerete ase okorwana esegi." 
1Chronicles12:25 Abasimeoni nigo barenge chilifu isano na ibere, ne rigana erimo (7,100), abanto chituoni abakong’u ase esegi." 
1Chronicles12:26 Abalawi nigo barenge chilifu inye, na amagana atano na rimo (4,600)," 
1Chronicles12:27 amo na Yehoyada, omoteneneri bw’eamate ya Haroni, na amo nere abanto chilifu isato, na amagana atano na abere (3,700);" 
1Chronicles12:28 na Zadoki, omomura etuoni, amo nabanto bamwabo abatang’ani b’esegi emerongo ebere, na babere (22)." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ababenjamin, abanto b’eamate ya Saulo, nigo barenge chilifu isato (3,000), nonya nase ekero ekio abange mono kobua b’abwo bagendererete kobwatana nenyomba ya Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:30 Korwa ase Abaefraimu: chilifu emerongo ebere, na amagana atano na atato (20,800), abanto chituoni ase esegi bamanyekanete ase chiamate chiabo." 
1Chronicles12:31 Abanto b’egesaku ekeng’ese kia Manase: chilifu ikomi na isano na isato (18,000), baria batoretwe amarieta abo bache kobeka Daudi abe omoruoti." 
1Chronicles12:32 Korwa ase Abaisakaru: abanto abang’aini abamanyi ebimanyererio bie chingaki, bamanyete egento Abaisraeli bagwenerete gokora, abateneneri amagana abere (200), amo nabamwabo abarenge inse ase obochiki bwabo." 
1Chronicles12:33 Korwa ase Abasabuloni: abarwani abakong’u baare nomoyo oyomo, baisanerete ase okorwana esegi, babwate ebirwanero biisaine, abanto chilifu emerongo etano (50,000)." 
1Chronicles12:34 Korwa Abanafutali: abachiki elifu eyemo (1,000), amo nabanto chilifu emerongo etato na isano na ibere (37,000), babwate chinguba na amatimo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Korwa ase Abadani: abanto baisanerete ase okorwana esegi, chilifu emerongo ebere na isano na isato, na amagana atano na rimo (28,600)." 
1Chronicles12:36 Korwa ase Abaaseri: abanto abakong’u baisanerete ase okorwana esegi, chilifu emerongo ene (40,000)." 
1Chronicles12:37 Korwa ase Abareuben na Abagadi, na ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, abwo bamenyete ng’umbu ya Yorodan, abanto babwate ebirwanero bionsi bi’okorwana esegi, chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo ebere (120,000)." 
1Chronicles12:38 Abarwani aba bonsi baisanerete ase okorwana esegi, na bagacha agwo Heburoni, bare nomoyo oyomo kobeka Daudi koba omoruoti igoro y’Abaisraeli bonsi. Boigo Abaisraeli bande bonsi nigo barenge nebirengererio ebimo bi’okobeka Daudi abe omoruoti." 
1Chronicles12:39 Abanto abwo bakabeera aroro amo na Daudi ase amatuko atato, bakaba bakoria na konywa, ekiagera abamwabo konya babaariganeirie ebinto bionsi." 
1Chronicles12:40 Abaamate bamwabo abamenyete ang’e amo nabwo bamenyete ase chingongo chia Isakaru na Sabuloni, na Nafutali, abwo bakarenta chindagera baberegetie chitigere ne chingamia, ne chiyombo, ne chiombe; bakarenta chindagera chinyinge mono; obosie, na amabomba ’amako amomo na ay’amasabibu amomo, na edivai, na amaguta ’amazeituni, ne chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ekiagera Abaisraeli nigo barenge nomogoko omonene." 
1Chronicles13:1 Daudi akaba ogosemania nabanene bonsi abarenge abatang’ani b’abarwani elifu eyemo na abe rigana erimo. 
1Chronicles13:2 Erio agakwana n’Abaisraeli bonsi basangererekanete, akabatebia, “Onye ekororekana buya asemore, naende onye kore ogwancha kw’Omonene, Nyasae oito, tiga totome abanto gochia aaria na aaria barangerie abaminto baria batigarete ase ense yonsi y’Abaisraeli, na abakuani na Abalawi bakare ase emechie eria ere namarisio, erinde bachiche babe amo naintwe." 
1Chronicles13:3 Erio torente naende Esanduku ya Nyasae oito ebeere amo naintwe, ekiagera ntwayetigete ase amatuko aria Saulo arenge kogamba.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Omosangererekano oria bwonsi bw’abanto ogancha gokora amang’ana ayio, ekiagera nigo abete amaronge ase abanto bonsi." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ase ayio Daudi agasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi korwa Sihori ya Misiri goika egesoero kia Hamati, erinde barente Esanduku eria ya Nyasae korwa Kiriati‐Yearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daudi amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakagenda Baala (noro Kiriati‐Yearimu), orenge bw’Abayuda, korenta korwa aroro Esanduku ya Nyasae, eyio ekorokwa ase erieta ri’Omonene, oyio omenyete nobonene bwaye igoro y’abakerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Bakarusia Esanduku eria ya Nyasae korwa ase enyomba y’Abinadabu, bakayebeka igoro ase egari enyia. Usa na Ahiyo nabwo barenge koraa egari eria." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi na Abaisraeli bonsi bakaba bagochenga ase obosio bwa Nyasae ne chinguru chiabo chionsi, bagotera na kobugia amakano ’ebirigisa, na amakano ande, na ebikonu, ne chisani chigoakanigwa na kwoga, na ebirombeta." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ekero baigete ase ekeooreri gia Kidoni, Usa akarambora okoboko kwaye gosiira Esanduku eria, ekiagera chiombe chiare kong’usa egari chiagochetwe." 
1Chronicles13:10 Erio Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene ase Usa, akamoaka, ekiagera akunete Esanduku eria; na Usa agakwera aroro ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
1Chronicles13:11 Daudi akagechigwa mono, ekiagera Omonene aitete Usa. Aase aria akarokwa Peresi‐Usa, naboigo akorokwa nonya ngoika rero iga." 
1Chronicles13:12 Ase rituko riria Daudi akairoka Nyasae, akabora, “Naki rende ndakore imbe noboremu ndete Esanduku ya Nyasae nka bwone?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ase ayio Daudi tairete Esanduku eria mwaye ase omochie okorokwa Omochie o Daudi, korende akayebogoria akayebeka nyomba mw’Obedi‐Edomu, Omogiti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Esanduku eria ya Nyasae ekabeera ase enka y’Obedi‐Edomu nyomba ime ase engaki y’emetienyi etato; na Omonene agasesenia enka y’Obedi‐Edomu na ebinto bionsi abwate. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hiramu, omoruoti o Turo, agatoma abanto ase Daudi, akamotomera nemete y’emecharake na abaagacheri amagena, na abasenia be chibao, erinde baagachere Daudi enyomba." 
1Chronicles14:2 Erio Daudi akamanya ng’a Omonene omokong’irie ase okoba omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, na omoimokereirie igoro ase engencho y’abanto baye Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Daudi akanyuoma abakungu bande agwo Yerusalemu, na abwo bakamoiborera abana abange, abamura na abaiseke." 
1Chronicles14:4 Aya naro amarieta ’abana baiboretwe asare agwo Yerusalemu: Samua na Sobabu, Nathani na Sulemani," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibuhari na Eliasama, na Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga na Nefegi, na Yafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama na Beliada, na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ekero Abafilisti baigwete ng’a Daudi oakirwe amaguta obeire omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli bonsi, bagatiira gochia komorigia. Daudi akaigwa ayio, akagenda koumerana nabarabwo ase okorwana esegi." 
1Chronicles14:9 Abafilisti bagacha gosakora agwo ase ense omweya y’Abarefai. 
1Chronicles14:10 Na Daudi akaboria Nyasae “Inee! Ndagenda korwania Abafilisti? Nobabeke ase amaboko aane gose?” Omonene akamoiraneria, “Ee, genda, nimbabeke ase amaboko ao.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Daudi akagenda goika Baali‐Perasimu, akababua agwo. Erio akabora, “Nyasae okoroorire ababisa baane goetera ase okoboko kwane, buna chiooro chi’amache are nemerindo chigokoroora.” Ase ayio bakaroka aase aria Baali‐Perasimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilisti bagatiga chinyasae chiabo aroro, na Daudi agachika abanto, bachisambe nomorero." 
1Chronicles14:13 Naende Abafilisti bakagenda aroro eria kabere bagasakora. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ekero Daudi aboretie Nyasae naende, Nyasae akamoiraneria, “Tobarwania esegi korwa aa, korende oetanane ogende obatubokere korwa nyuma ase emete ekorokwa balisamu ere." 
1Chronicles14:15 Na ekero oraigwe ebititiro bigoeta ase emete eyio igoro, erio ogende korwana esegi; omanye ng’a Nyasae ogotang’aneire kobua abarwani b’Abafilisti.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Daudi agakora buna Nyasae amochigete, na barabwo bagaita abarwani b’Abafilisti korwa Gibeoni goikera Geseri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Chinkuma chia Daudi chigasarera ase chinse chionsi; na Omonene akarentera abanto b’ebisaku bionsi obwoba, bakamoiroka." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daudi akeagachera chinyomba agwo ase Omochie o Daudi. Akaroisia aase ase Esanduku ya Nyasae yare kobekwa, naende akayeteneneria eema aroro." 
1Chronicles15:2 Erio Daudi akabora, “Onde takobogoria Esanduku eria ya Nyasae otatiga Abalawi boka, ekiagera Omonene nigo achorete Abalawi babe bakobogoria Esanduku y’Omonene, naende bamokorere kogenderera.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Daudi agasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi agwo Yerusalemu gochia korenta Esanduku eria y’Omonene gocha aase aye ayeroiseretie. 
1Chronicles15:4 Naende agasangereria amo abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni na Abalawi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Korwa ase eamate ya Kohati: Urieli, omotang’ani obo, amo nabamwabo rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere (120);" 
1Chronicles15:6 korwa ase eamate ya Merari: Asaia, omotang’ani obo, amo nabamwabo amagana abere, na emerongo ebere (220);" 
1Chronicles15:7 korwa ase eamate ya Gerisomu: Yoeli, omotang’ani obo, amo nabamwabo rigana erimo, na emerongo etato (130);" 
1Chronicles15:8 korwa ase eamate y’Elisafani: Semaya, omotang’ani obo, amo nabamwabo amagana abere (200);" 
1Chronicles15:9 korwa ase eamate ya Heburoni Elieli, omotang’ani obo, amo nabamwabo emerongo etano na etato (80);" 
1Chronicles15:10 korwa ase eamate ya Usieli: Aminadabu, omotang’ani obo, amo nabamwabo rigana erimo, na ikomi na babere (112)." 
1Chronicles15:11 Erio Daudi akarangeria abakuani Zadoki na Abiatari, naende Abalawi: Urieli na Asaia, Yoeli na Semaya, Elieli na Aminadabu," 
1Chronicles15:12 akabatebia, “Inwe nabateneneri be chiamate chi’Abalawi, echene inwe abanyene amo nabanto bamino, mochie kwoyia Esanduku eria y’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, moyebeke aase agwo inche nayeroiseirie." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ekiagera inwe timwayebogoretie engaki eria entang’ani, Omonene, Nyasae oito, atoete egesusuro; titwamorigetie buna atochigete.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Ase ayio abakuani na Abalawi bagechena abanyene, erinde bachie korenta Esanduku eria y’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Abalawi bakabogoria Esanduku eria ya Nyasae nemiaro igoro ase amareko abo, buna Musa abachigete koreng’ana ne ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
1Chronicles15:16 Boigo Daudi agachika abatang’ani b’Abalawi bachore abanto bamwabo babe abateri, baranyare kobugia ebinto bigoterera ase amariogi, ababugia amakano, na amakano ’ebirigisa, ne chisani chigoakanigwa na kwoga ase ogotera nomogoko." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ase igo Abalawi bagachora Hemani, mosinto o Yoeli, na ase abanto bamwabo Asafu, mosinto o Berekia, na ase ororeria rwa Merari abanto bamwabo Etani, mosinto o Kusaya." 
1Chronicles15:18 Ase okobakonya baria bachorire abanto bamwabo b’omoroberio o kabere: Zakaria na Yasieli, Semiramoti na Yeieli, Uni na Eliabu, Benaya na Maaseya. Naende bagachora Matitia na Elifelehu, na Mikineya, na abarendi b’egeita Obedi‐Edomu na Yeieli." 
1Chronicles15:19 Abateri baria Hemani na Asafu, na Etani babe bakobugia chisani chi’etaai chikobugigwa na kwoga." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zakaria na Yasieli, Semiramoti na Yehieli, Uni na Eliabu, Maaseya na Benaya, aba babe bakobugia amakano koreng’ana buna amariogi a igoro ay’Alamoti." 
1Chronicles15:21 Korende Matitia na Elifelehu, Mikineya na Obedi‐Edomu, Yeieli na Asasia babe abaraai ase okobugia amakano koreng’ana buna amariogi a inse a Seminiti." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania, omoraai bw’Abalawi ase amatera, abe omoteria, ekiagera namanyete emeremo eyio." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia na Elikana babe abarendi b’egeita ase Esanduku eria y’Omonene. 
1Chronicles15:24 Sebania na Yehosafati, Netaneli na Amasai, Zakaria na Benaya, na Eliezeri, abakuani, babe bakobugia ebirombeta bosio bw’Esanduku eria ya Nyasae. Obedi‐Edomu na Yehia mbarabwo babe abarendi b’egeita ase Esanduku eria." 
1Chronicles15:25 Ase ayio Daudi, na abagaaka b’Abaisraeli, na abatang’ani b’abarwani chilifu bakagenda kwoyia Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene, korwa ase enyomba y’Obedi‐Edomu, bagachenga nomogoko omonene mono." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ekiagera Nyasae akonyete Abalawi baria babogoretie Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene, bakarua ebing’wanso bie chieri isano na ibere, ne chimingichi isano na ibere." 
1Chronicles15:27 Daudi akabeka eanga engiya y’egatani, boigo n’Abalawi baria bonsi babogoretie Esanduku eria bakabeka, na abateri boigo, na Kenania, omoteria bw’abateri. Daudi akabeka negesibao ki’egatani." 
1Chronicles15:28 Ase ayio Abaisraeli bonsi bakarenta Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene. Bagaaka amariogi ’omochengo, bakabugia chingoma na eoirombeta, ne chisani chigoakanigwa chikwoga, naende bakabugia mono namakano, na amakano ’ebirigisa." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ekaba ekero Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene yare korentwa ase Omochie o Daudi, Mikali, mosubati o Saulo, akarigereria korwa ase ekebao, akarora Daudi omoruoti ogocharoka‐charoka na gotenga ore nomogoko, akamochaya ase omoyo oye ime." 
1Chronicles16:1 Kobarentire Esanduku eria ya Nyasae, bakayebeka ime ase eema eria Daudi ayeteneneretie, bakarua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebi’omorembe, ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
1Chronicles16:2 Na ekero Daudi akoorire korua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa na eki’omorembe agasesenia abanto ase erieta ri’Omonene. 
1Chronicles16:3 Naende akagaba endagera ase omoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, ase abasacha na abakungu; kera oyomo akaegwa omogati oyomo, na enyama inke, ne ribomba ri’amasasabibu amomo." 
1Chronicles16:4 Naende agachora abanto bande b’Abalawi bakaba abakoreri bosio bw’Esanduku eria y’Omonene, bakaba bagotogia Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, na komoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono na komobaka." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu nere orenge omotang’ani obo. Abaare komobwatia nabwo aba: Zakaria na Yeieli, Semiramoti na Yehieli, Matitia na Eliabu, Benaya na Obedi‐Edomu, na Yeieli, baria barenge kobugia amakano, na amakano ’ebirigisa. Asafu agaakania chisani chiarenge kwoga." 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaya na Yahasieli, abakuani, bakaba bakobugia ebirombeta botambe agwo bosio bw’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire Okobwatana kwa Nyasae." 
1Chronicles16:7 Rituko eri nario Daudi achigete ritang’ani ng’a ogotera gw’okomoiraneria Omonene ng’a mbuya mono goterwe n’Asafu na abanto bamwabo ase enchera eyio. 
1Chronicles16:8 Moiranerie Omonene ng’a mbuya mono! Rangeria erieta riaye ase ogokonywa, tebia abanto b’ebisaku ogokora kwaye." 
1Chronicles16:9 Terera Omonene, moterere amatera ay’okomotogia; raria ogokora kwaye kw’ogokumia." 
1Chronicles16:10 Etogerie erieta riaye richenu, abanto bonsi abakorigia Omonene basasoke ase chinkoro chiabo ime." 
1Chronicles16:11 Rigia Omonene amo ne chinguru chiaye, morigie mobe ase obosio bwaye botambe." 
1Chronicles16:12 Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Israeli, omosomba bw’Omonene, inwe abanto ba Yakobo, abachore b’Omonene, inyora ogokora kwaye kw’ogokumia na amakumia aye amo nebina anachete." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 Ere nere Omonene, Nyasae oito, ebina biaye nigo bire ase ense yonsi." 
1Chronicles16:15 Inyora botambe okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, goika ebiaare elifu mobe mokoinyora ring’ana achigete," 
1Chronicles16:16 na okobwatana koria kw’ogotianania akorete na Ibrahimu, na eira yaye y’ogotianania arierete Isaka." 
1Chronicles16:17 Eira eyio aenegetie koba ase Yakobo buna ogochika, ee, ase Israeli okobwatana gwa kare na kare," 
1Chronicles16:18 agateba, “Aye ninkoe ense ya Kanani ebe omwando bw’ororeria rwao.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Ase engaki eria nigo barenge abake ase omobaro, bakabarwa ng’a tibaisaini gento, nigo barenge abaeti ase ense eyio." 
1Chronicles16:20 Bakaba bagoetanana korwa ase egesaku ekemo gochia ase ekende, na korwa ase oboruoti obomo gochia ase obonde." 
1Chronicles16:21 Nyasae tatigete abanto bande babachande; agatogonyera abaruoti ase engencho yabo," 
1Chronicles16:22 agateba, “Timobaisa gokuna abaakwa amaguta baane, gose timokorera ababani baane bobe!”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Inwe abanto b’ense yonsi, moterere Omonene! Raria ogotooreka kwaye rituko ase rituko!" 
1Chronicles16:24 Raria obonene bwaye ase egati y’ebisaku, na ogokora kwaye kw’ogokumia ase abanto bonsi!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Omonene nigo are omonene mono, goika atogigwe, na airokwe goetania chinyasae chinde." 
1Chronicles16:26 Chinyasae chionsi chi’abanto b’ebisaku nemegwekano y’ogosasimwa rioka, korende Omonene nere otongete igoro chionsi." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ogosikwa na obonene nigo bire ase obosio bwaye, chinguru na omogoko nigo bire ase obomenyo bwaye." 
1Chronicles16:28 Inwe abe chiamate chi’abanto, togia Omonene! Motogie ase obonene bwaye na okobua kwaye!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Mobake Omonene ase obonene bw’erieta riaye; moche ase obosio bwaye morentane ebiegwa, mosasime Omonene mweboetie obochenu!" 
1Chronicles16:30 Inwe abanto b’ense yonsi, mobe mokoiguswa ase obosio bwaye, ee, ense nigo eteneine bokong’u, tekonyegerigwa." 
1Chronicles16:31 Tiga igoro chibe nomogoko na ense echenge, abanto b’ebisaku batebigwe: “Omonene nere okogamba.”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Tiga enyancha echenge ase okoeera, amo nebinto bionsi bire ime yaye, na emegondo echenge amo nebinto bionsi bireo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Erio emete ye rinani netere nomogoko ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekiagera ere ngocha are konachera ense ekina." 
1Chronicles16:34 Iraneria Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera ere nomuya; obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete kare na kare." 
1Chronicles16:35 Kwana: Aye Nyasae, ogotooreka gwaito, totoorie, otosangererie amo, na otoboorie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku, erinde totogie erieta riao richenu, na twetogerie ogotogigwa kwao." 
1Chronicles16:36 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atogigwe, korwa kare na kare, na gochia kare na kare! Erio abanto bonsi bagateba, “Amina!” Na bakamotogia Omonene." 
1Chronicles16:37 Ase ayio Daudi agatiga Asafu na abanto bamwabo agwo bosio bw’Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene babe abakoreri asare botambe, buna okogania gwa kera rituko kwarenge." 
1Chronicles16:38 Obedi‐Edomu na abanto bamwabo nigo barenge emerongo etano nomo, na batano na batato. Ere Obedi‐Edomu mosinto o Yedutuni, na Hosea, bakabekwa bakaba abarendi b’egeita." 
1Chronicles16:38 Obedi‐Edomu na abanto bamwabo nigo barenge emerongo etano nomo, na batano na batato. Ere Obedi‐Edomu mosinto o Yedutuni, na Hosea, bakabekwa bakaba abarendi b’egeita." 
1Chronicles16:39 Daudi akabeka Zadoki omokuani amo nabakuani bande bamwabo, babe bagokorera Omonene ase Eema yaye agwo aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa aaria Gibeoni." 
1Chronicles16:40 Kera emambia na omogoroba botambe babe bakorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, koreng’ana buna arigetwe ase amachiko aria Omonene aete Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Amo nabwo barenge Hemani na Yedutuni, na abanto baria bachoretwe na korikwa amarieta abo ase okoiraneria Omonene ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho y’obwanchani bwaye obwo bogendererete kare na kare." 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani na Yedutuni nigo bagachete ebirombeta ne chisani chiarenge kwoga ekero chiare goakanigwa, amo nebinto binde biare kobugigwa ekero amatera amachenu agoterwa. Abanto b’eamate ya Yedutuni bagachorwa korenda egeita." 
1Chronicles16:43 Erio abanto bonsi bakarua agwo, kera omonto akagenda nka bwoye, na Daudi akagenda bwoye gosesenia abanto b’enyomba yaye." 
1Chronicles17:1 Bono ekero Daudi amenyete ase enyomba yaye agakwana na Nathani omobani, agateba, “Rora inche nigo imenyete ase enyomba eagachire nemecharake, korende Esanduku ya Nyasae ero nigo ere ase eema ime.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathani agatebia Daudi, “Kora ande onsi ayare ase ebirengererio biao, ekiagera Nyasae nigo are amo naye.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Korende ase obotuko obwo, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Nathani, rikamotebia," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Genda otebie Daudi, omosomba one, ng’a inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Aye tokong’agachera enyomba imenye imeo." 
1Chronicles17:5 Korwa engaki eria nang’anyetie Abaisraeli goika rituko ria rero inche tinana komenya ime ase enyomba, korende nabeire nkona‐kogenda korwa eyemo goika eyende, na korwa obomenyo obomo goika obonde." 
1Chronicles17:6 Aase ande onsi nabeire nkona‐kogenda amo n’Abaisraeli, tinana koboria mogambi onde bw’Abaisraeli, oyo nabegete akaba omorisia bw’abanto baane ng’a nase ki atang’agachereti obomenyo bw’emecharake." 
1Chronicles17:7 “Ase ayio, aya naro oratebie Daudi, omosomba one, ng’a inche Omonene bw’Emeganda natebire iga: Nigo nakorusetie korwa ase kwarenge korisia ching’ondi, erinde obe gokogambera abanto baane Abaisraeli;" 
1Chronicles17:8 nainche nkaba amo naye aande onsi ase kware kogenda ngasiria ababisa bao bonsi korwa ase obosio bwao; inche ninkore erieta riao rimanyekane, buna amarieta ’abanto abanene b’ense amanyekanete." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ninchorere abanto baane Abaisraeli aase ndababekere bamenye, aase abo abanyene, na abakori amabe tibakobachanda naende nonya ng’ake buna babachandete agwo ritang’ani" 
1Chronicles17:10 korwa engaki eria nachorete abagambi igoro ase abanto baane Abaisraeli. Boigo nimbue ababisa bao bonsi. Na bono nigo ngokomanyia ng’a inche Omonene ninkoagachere enyomba. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ekero amatuko ao araikeranigwe na obe gokogenda korara ase chisokoro chiao chiararete, nimbeke oyomo bw’ororeria rwao, oyorarue ase oyomo bw’abamura bao, agambe; nainche ninkong’ie oboruoti bwaye." 
1Chronicles17:12 Oyio nere orang’agachere enyomba; nainche ninkong’ie ekerogo kiaye ki’oboruoti kebeo kogenderera botambe. 
1Chronicles17:13 Inche nimbe ise, nere nabe omwana one; tinkorusia obwanchani bwane botari koera korwa asare, buna naborusetie korwa ase oria orengeo ritang’ani asore." 
1Chronicles17:14 Korende nimokore agenderere kobeerao botambe ase enyomba yane, na ase oboruoti bwane, na obogambi bwaye bokong’igwe kobao botari nomoerio.”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Nathani agatebia Daudi amang’ana ayio onsi buna ayaigwete na korora. 
1Chronicles17:16 Erio Daudi omoruoti agasoa akabeera ase obosio bw’Omonene, akabora, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, inche ninki ing’isaine, na eamate yane ninki eisaine, ng’a aye gwankoreire amang’ana amaya iga?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Naende ring’ana eri tiriisaini kende asore, aye Nyasae. Boigo gwakwanire nainche omosomba oo, igoro y’enyomba yane na amang’ana akare bosio. Ee, Omonene Nyasae, gwankoreire koreng’ana nobomwanyabanto, kwanyimokereirie igoro." 
1Chronicles17:18 Inche Daudi, inki ndagotebie naende kobua ayio, ekiagera gwansikire iga? Aye nigo omanyete inche, omosomba oo." 
1Chronicles17:19 Aye Omonene, ase engencho yane inche, omosomba oo, na koreng’ana nobwanchani bwao aye omonyene, gwakorire amanene aya onsi, naende kwayakorire amanyekanire." 
1Chronicles17:20 Aye Omonene, onde tari onga buna aye, gose Nyasae onde tari otatiga aye bweka, koreng’ana buna ayio konya twaigure namato aito." 
1Chronicles17:21 Naende mbanto ba gesaku ki bare ase ense, bare buna abanto bao Abaisraeli, abwo aye Nyasae kwabooretie babe abanto bao, okenyorera erieta ase engencho y’amang’ana amanene na ay’ogokumia ase ogoseria abanto b’ebisaku bakarua ase obosio bw’abanto bao baria kwabooretie korwa Misiri?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Aye gwekoreire abanto bao Abaisraeli babe abanto bao kare na kare, naye Omonene kwabeire Nyasae obo." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Na bono aye Omonene, ikerania onsi aya kwariete eira igoro yane inche omosomba oo, na igoro y’ororeria rwane, na okore aya gwatebete ng’a noyakore," 
1Chronicles17:24 erinde erieta riao ribeo ritogigwe goika kare na kare. Erio abanto batebe: Omonene bw’Emeganda nere Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ekeene nere Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli. Ase enchera eyio enyomba y’omosomba oo, inche Daudi, ekong’igwe ase obosio bwao." 
1Chronicles17:25 Aye Nyasae one kwang’orokeirie inche omosomba oo, ng’a nong’agachere enyomba. Ase ayio inche, omosomba oo, nabeire noboremu ase enkoro yane kogosaba ogosaba oko." 
1Chronicles17:26 Na bono, aye Omonene, aye naye Nyasae, kwandiereire inche, omosomba oo, eira gonkorera ring’ana eri rigiya." 
1Chronicles17:27 Gaki bono, koranche osesenie enyomba yane inche erinde egenderere kare na kare ase obosio bwao. Aye Omonene, aya gwasesenirie nigo agoseseneka kare na kare.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Nyuma y’ayio Daudi akarwania Abafilisti, akababua, akaira omochie o Gati amo nebichie biaye korwa ase amaboko ’Abafilisti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Naende akabua Abamoabu, na barabwo bakaba abasomba ba Daudi, bakaba bakorenta ebango asare." 
1Chronicles18:3 Naende Daudi akabua Hadadeseri, omoruoti o Soba, agwo Hamati, ekero omoruoti oria agendete gokong’ia oboruoti bwaye aaria ase orooche rw’Eufarati." 
1Chronicles18:4 Daudi agoosa chigari elifu eyemo (1,000), na abariini chibarasi chilifu isano na ibere (7,000), na abarwani abaare kogenda namagoro chilifu emerongo ebere (20,000). Erio akabutora chibarasi chionsi chinteng’e otatiga chibarasi rigana erimo chikaba chikong’usa chigari." 
1Chronicles18:5 Na ekero Abasiiria ba Damesiki bachete gokonya Hadadeseri, omoruoti o Soba, Daudi akabarwania, agaita abanto chilifu emerongo eberena ibere (22,000)." 
1Chronicles18:6 Erio akabeka abarwani esegi ase egati y’Abasiiria agwo Damesiki, na Abasiiria abwo bakaba abasomba ba Daudi, bakaba bakomorentera ebango. Na Omonene akaa Daudi obobui aande onsi ase arenge kogenda korwana." 
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi agasakora chinguba chie chitahabu chiria abasomba ba Hadadeseri babogoretie, agachiira Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Naende akaira chitaai chinyinge korwa Tibati na Kuni, emechie ya Hadadeseri. Korwa ase chitaai echio Sulemani akaroiseria egetuba ekenene, ne chisiiro, na ebikorero binde bie chitaai." 
1Chronicles18:9 Tou, omoruoti o Hamati, agachia koigwa ng’a Daudi obuire abarwani bonsi ba Hadadeseri, omoruoti o Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 agatoma Hadoramu, omomura oye, ase omoruoti Daudi komokwania na komosesenia, ekiagera ere konya arwanirie Hadadeseri na omobuire. Hadadeseri nigo abete okonakorwania Tou. Boigo Tou agatoma ebinto bie chifeta, na ebie chitahabu, na ebie chitaai." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ebinto ebio boigo Daudi akabiatananera Omonene, buna akorete ne chifeta ne chitahabu biria asakorete korwa ase ebisaku binde bionsi, korwa ase Abaedomu, na Abamoabu, na Abaamoni, na Abafilisti, na Abaameleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abisai, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, agaita Abaedomu chilifu ikomi na isano na isato (18,000) agwo ase Riranya ri’Omonyo." 
1Chronicles18:13 Daudi akabeka abarwani aande onsi ase egati y’Abaedomu, na Abaedomu bonsi bakaba abasomba ba Daudi, na Omonene akaa Daudi obobui aande onsi ase arenge kogenda korwana esegi." 
1Chronicles18:14 Bono Daudi akaba okogambera Abaisraeli bonsi na akaba ogokorera abanto baye bonsi ayare boronge na ekeene. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, nere orenge omochiki bw’emeganda y’abarwani, na Yehosafati, mosinto bw’Ahiludi, nere orenge omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka." 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoki, mosinto bw’Ahitubu, na Ahimeleki, mosinto bw’Abiatari, nabwo barenge abakuani, na Sausa nere orenge omoriki." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada, nere orenge omoteneneri bw’Abakereti na Abapeleti; na basinto ba Daudi nabwo barenge abanene bamoetanaine." 
1Chronicles19:1 Nyuma y’ayio Nahasi, omoruoti bw’Abaamoni, agakwa, na omomura oye akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Chronicles19:2 Daudi akabora, “Goika inkorere Hanuni, omomura o Nahasi, amaya, ekiagera ise nigo arenge gonkorera amaya.” Ase igo Daudi agatoma abanto bagende komoremia ase engencho y’ogokwa gwa ise. Abasomba abwo ba Daudi bakagenda ase Hanuni agwo ase ense y’Abaamoni komoremia." 
1Chronicles19:3 Korende abatang’ani b’Abaamoni bagatebia Hanuni, “Inee! Igo okagete ng’a Daudi nigo asigete iso ase ogotoma abanto gocha gokoremia? Taibo. Abasomba baye nigo bachire koroota ense eye bayesarie.”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ase igo Hanuni akabwata abasomba ba Daudi akabagingira chinderu chiabo, na akabutora chianga chiabo chikaba ebimini, agachiikeria ebinema, erio akabaseria bakagenda." 
1Chronicles19:5 Abasomba abwo bakarora obosooku obonene mono, na ekero Daudi atebetigwe buna bakoretwe, agatoma abanto bachie kobarotota na kobatebia, “Omoruoti otebire ng’a mobeere agwo Yeriko goika chinderu chiaino chimere, erio monyare koirana nka.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Abaamoni bakamanya ng’a bekorire koba okogechia ase Daudi, erio Hanuni na Abaamoni bagatoma chifeta chitalanta elifu eyemo goakanera chigari na abariini chibarasi chiare korwa Mesopotamia na Aramu‐Maaka, na korwa Soba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Bagasaba chigari chilifu emerongo etato na ibere (32,000) amo nomoruoti o Maaka na abarwani baye b’esegi. Barabwo bagacha, bagatoora bosio bwa Medeba. Abaamoni bagasangererigwa korwa ase emechie yabo, bagacha korwana esegi." 
1Chronicles19:8 Ekero Daudi atebetigwe amang’ana ayio, agatoma Yoabu amo nabarwani bonsi chituoni b’esegi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Abaamori bagacha bakarobera agwo ase egesoero ki’omochie, na abaruoti baria konya bachire bakabeera boka aase aarabu." 
1Chronicles19:10 Ekero Yoabu aroche ng’a esegi nigo ere bosio na nyuma, agachora abanto abakong’u, abamanyete korwana esegi, akabaroberia barwane n’Abasiiria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Abanto bande abatigari akababeka inse y’oboteneneri bw’Abisai momura omwabo, akaroberia barwane n’Abaamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Erio agatebia Abisai, “Onye Abasiiria bakombua, rirorio oche onkonye, korende onye Abaamoni bagokobua, rirorio inche inchiche ngokonye." 
1Chronicles19:13 Otenene bokong’u, obe omoremu! Torwanere abanto baito na emechie ya Nyasae oito. Na igo Omonene akore ayaroche are amaya.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Agwo Yoabu na abanto barenge amo nere bagasuka bagaika ang’e n’Abasiiria ase okorwana esegi, na Abasiiria baria bagatama korwa asare." 
1Chronicles19:15 Abaamoni bagachia korora ng’a Abasiiria batamire, nabarabwo boigo bagatama korwa ase Abisai, momura omwabo Yoabu, bagasoa omochie ime. Erio Yoabu akagenda Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ekero Abasiiria baroche ng’a babuirwe n’Abaisraeli, bagatoma abanto korangeria Abasiiria, abarenge ng’umbu y’Eufarati, bache batang’anwe na Sofaki, omochiki bw’abarwani esegi ba Hadadeseri." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ekero Daudi atebetigwe amang’ana ayio, agasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi amo, akaamboka orooche rwa Yorodan, erio akagenda asebare, akaira abarwani baye b’esegi gochia kobarwania. Ekero Daudi aroberetie abarwani baye b’esegi korwania Abasiiria, barabwo bakamorwania." 
1Chronicles19:18 Abasiiria bagatama korwa ase amasio ’Abaisraeli; na Daudi agaita Abasiiria abagendia chigari chilifu isano na ibere (7,000), na abarwani barenge gotaara namagoro chilifu emerongo ene (40,000). Boigo agaita Sofaki, omochiki obo bw’abarwani esegi." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ekero abasomba ba Hadadeseri baroche ng’a babuirwe n’Abaisraeli, bagakora omorembe na Daudi, bakebeka inse yaye. Ase ayio Abasiiria tibanchete gokonya Abaamoni naende." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ase engaki y’ogosimeka ekero abaruoti baare koba bakogenda korwana esegi, Yoabu agatang’ana abarwani b’esegi, agasaria ense y’Abaamoni, akagenda koboera omochie o Raba, korende Daudi akabeera agwo Yerusalemu. Yoabu akarwania Raba, akayobua akayosaria." 
1Chronicles20:2 Erio Daudi akarusia egutwa y’etahabu korwa ase omotwe bw’omoruoti bw’aroro, akanyora ng’a oborito bw’egutwa eria nigo bwarenge koreng’ana chikiro emerongo etato na inye, naende nigo yachabeire amagena e rigori rinene. Egutwa eyio ekabekwa igoro y’omotwe o Daudi. Ere agasakora ebinto ebinge mono bi’omochie oria." 
1Chronicles20:3 Naende akabasokia abanto barenge ase omochie ime, akabanachana ne chinseke, na amakombe ’ebioma, na ebisire. Naboigo Daudi akorete abanto b’emechie yonsi y’Abaamoni. Erio akairana Yerusalemu amo nabanto baye." 
1Chronicles20:4 Nyuma y’ayio esegi ekaba ase egati y’Abaisraeli na Abafilisti agwo Geseri. Sibekai Omohusa agaita Sipai, omonto bw’ororeria rw’amamonto; na igo Abafilisti bakabugwa na kogamberwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Naende esegi ekaba n’Abafilisti; Elihanani, mosinto o Yairi, agaita Lahami, omomura omwabo Goliato korwa Gati, oria orotanga rwe ritimo riaye rwareng’aine omwaro omonene." 
1Chronicles20:6 Naende esegi ekaba agwo Gati. Omonto omotambe narengeo, oyorenge nebiara bitano na ekemo ase kera okoboko, na bitano na ekemo ase kera okogoro; bionsi nigo biarenge emerongo ebere na bine. Ere boigo noyomo bw’amamonto orenge." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ere akarama Abaisraeli, na Yonathani, omomura o Simea omwabo Daudi, akamoita." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abanto abwo nigo barenge ab’ororeria rw’amamonto korwa Gati. Abwo nigo Daudi na abanto baye babaitete. 
1Chronicles21:1 Saitani akagania gochanda Abaisraeli, agasukia enkoro ya Daudi ase okobara Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ase igo Daudi agatebia Yoabu na abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi, “Genda mobare Abaisraeli korwa Beeri‐Seba goika Dani, erio mondetere amang’ana imanye omobaro obo.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Yoabu agateba, “Omonene amente abanto baye bamentekane ara rigana ase omobaro obo. Inee! Aye omoruoti, omonene one, abanto aba bonsi tibari abasomba bao? Nase ki aye omonene one okogania gokora ayio? Nase ki ogochia korenta okomocha igoro ase Abaisraeli?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Korende ring’ana ri’omoruoti rikaba ne chinguru igoro ya Yoabu. Erio Yoabu akaimoka akagenda ase Abaisraeli bonsi, erio akairana gocha Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Yoabu akaa Daudi omobaro bw’abanto. Ase Abaisraeli bonsi abwo barenge komanya korwana esegi nemioro nigo barenge abanto emilioni eyemo, ne chilifu rigana erimo (1,100,000), na ase Abayuda abanto chilifu amagana ane na emerongo etano na ebere (470,000)." 
1Chronicles21:6 Korende Yoabu tabarete Abalawi na Ababenjamin, ekiagera ogochika koria omoruoti aruete nigo kwamogechetie." 
1Chronicles21:7 Amang’ana ayio akoregete akagechia Nyasae; ere akaa Abaisraeli amaakwa. 
1Chronicles21:8 Erio Daudi agatebia Nyasae, “Nakorire ebibe ebinene ase aya nakorire. Korende bono nagosabire, onyabere inche, omosomba oo, ogosaria kwane, naki nigo nakorire egento ki’oboriri obonene.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Omonene agakwana na Gadi, omorori o Daudi, akamotebia," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Genda okwane na Daudi, omotebie ng’a aya naro inche Omonene ngoteba: Nabekire asore amang’ana atato; ase ayio chora erimo, eri ngochia kogokorera.”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Erio Gadi akagenda ase Daudi akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Chora erimo eri oranche." 
1Chronicles21:12 Noganetie enchara echiche ase emiaka etato; gose nigo oganetie oserigwe nababisa bao ase engaki y’emetienyi etato, babe bakobabuna‐buna na kobaita nemioro; gose mochandwe nomoro bw’Omonene ase amatuko atato, ekero oborwaire obobe bw’ogoita abanto borache igoro ase ense eye yaino, na omomalaika bw’Omonene ogosaria ense y’Abaisraeli? Bono ntebia aya ngochia koiraneria oria ontoma.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Daudi akairaneria Gadi, “Inche nasoire ase emechando emenene. Gaki bono, tiga ingwe ase okoboko kw’Omonene, ekiagera amabera aye namanene mono; korende ase amaboko a mwanyabanto tintageti ingweo.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Erio Omonene akarentera Abaisraeli oborwaire obobe bw’ogoita; Abaisraeli chilifu emerongo etano na ebere (70,000) bagakwa." 
1Chronicles21:15 Nyasae agatoma omomalaika oye gochia ase Yerusalemu koyosaria; korende ekero omomalaika oria abete ang’e koyosaria, Omonene akaywechandera, akaonchoreria ebirengererio biaye igoro y’obobe boria, agatebia omomalaika oria ogendererete gosaria omochie, “Bono aisanire, ororobia okoboko kwao!” Omomalaika oria konya oikire ang’e nekeooreri ki’Orinani Omoyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Daudi akarigereria akarora omomalaika oria bw’Omonene oteneine gati y’ense na igoro; ere nabwate omoyio o birende ase okoboko kwaye okoramborete gochia igoro ya Yerusalemu, na Daudi na abagaaka babegete chianga chie chigunia, bagatung’ama inse bakaumama." 
1Chronicles21:17 Erio Daudi agatebia Nyasae, “Inee! Tari inche nachigete abanto bakabarwa? Ninche nakorire ebibe; nakorire amang’ana amabe mono. Korende ching’ondi echi, ninki chiakorire? Nagosabire aye Omonene, Nyasae one, tiga okoboko kwao kong’ake inche amo neamate ya tata; korende oborwaire tibobaisa goita abanto bao.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Erio omomalaika bw’Omonene agachika Gadi atebie Daudi ng’a agende atenenie egesasimero ase Omonene agwo ase ekeooreri ki’Orinani, Omoyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Ase ogochika kw’Omonene koria Gadi amotebetie Daudi, Daudi agatiira." 
1Chronicles21:20 Bono Orinani nigo arenge koora engano, na agwo akeonchora akarora omomalaika, na abana baye abamura bane abarenge amo nero bakebisa." 
1Chronicles21:21 Daudi agacha ase Orinani, na ekero Orinani amoroche akarua agwo ase ekeooreri, agacha agatung’ama, akaumama ase obosio bwa Daudi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi agatebia Orinani, “Ing’a ensemo eyio y’ekeooreri, ing’agachere Omonene egesasimero, erinde oborwaire botangwe korwa ase abanto. Inche ningoakanere rigori riaye rionsi.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Erio Orinani agatebia Daudi, “Ira ekeooreri ekio! Aye omonene one omoruoti, kora eki oranche. Rora, narure chiombe chibe ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebikorero ebi bi’okoorera bibe chinko, na engano ebe okoruegwa kw’endagera. Nakobieire bionsi.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Omoruoti Daudi agakania Orinani, akamotebia, “Yaya taibo, korende nigo ndabiakanere rigori riikeranu; tinkoira ekere ekiao koa Omonene gose okorua ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa eke ntaakanereti.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Ase igo Daudi akaa Orinani etahabu y’oborito bwe chisekeli amagana atano na rimo agoakanera ekeooreri keria. 
1Chronicles21:26 Daudi akaagachera Omonene egesasimero aroro, akarua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’omorembe, agasaba Omonene, nere akamoiraneria ase ogotoma omorero korwa igoro gocha ase egesasimero keria gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa." 
1Chronicles21:27 Erio Omonene agachika omomalaika oria, na ere akairania omoyio oye ime ase ekegocho." 
1Chronicles21:28 Korwa ase engaki eria, ekero Daudi aroche ng’a Omonene oiraneirie ogosaba kwaye ase ekeooreri ki’Orinani Omoyebusi, akarua ebing’wanso biaye aroro agwo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Korende ase engaki eria Eema y’Omonene, eria Musa atenenetie agwo ase erooro, na egesasimero gi’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa nigo kiarenge agwo aase aimokererete igoro aaria Gibeoni." 
1Chronicles21:30 Korende Daudi tagendete ase egesasimero keria koboria Nyasae, ekiagera nigo oboete omoyio oria bw’omomalaika bw’Omonene." 
1Chronicles22:1 Daudi agateba, “Aiga nao enyomba y’Omonene Nyasae erabe ase Abaisraeli bakoruera ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Daudi agachika abamenyi abarenge ase ense y’Abaisraeli basangererigwe amo, akababeka kobaacha amagena na koyaroisia ase okoagachera enyomba ya Nyasae." 
1Chronicles22:3 Naende Daudi akarenta ebioma ebinge bi’okoroisigwa emesumari y’ebisieri bi’ebiita amo nebibwatero, akarenta ne chitaai chinyinge chitare korengeka." 
1Chronicles22:4 Boigo akarenta chibao chi’emecharake chitare kobareka, ekiagera Abasidoni nigo barenterete Daudi emecharake emenge mono." 
1Chronicles22:5 Daudi nigo arengereretie ng’a Sulemani, omwana oye omoke otaramanya amange, na enyomba egochia koagachwa ase Omonene goika ebe engiya mono, naende eramanyekane ase ense yonsi ng’a nigo ere nobonene; na igo ere bweka goika abeke ebinto bionsi ang’e. Ase ayio Daudi agasangereria ebinto ebinge ekero atarakwa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Akarangeria Sulemani, omwana oye, akamochika aagache enyomba ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles22:7 Daudi agatebia Sulemani, “Omwana one, nigo biarenge ebirengererio biane ng’a ning’agachere erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae one, enyomba." 
1Chronicles22:8 Korende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia: Aye gwaiteire amanyinga amange, naende kwarwanire chisegi chinene; na ase engencho y’amanyinga aya amange gwaiteire ase obosio bwane tokonyara koagacha enyomba ase engencho y’erieta riane." 
1Chronicles22:9 Rora noiborerwe omwana omomura oyorabe omonto bw’omorembe; inche nimoe omorembe ase ababisa baye bonsi bamoetanaine. Nigo ararokwe Sulemani, na ase amatuko aye ning’ee Abaisraeli omorembe na obotoereru." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ere naagache enyomba ase engencho y’erieta riane. Ere nabe omwana one, nainche nimbe ise, na inche ninkore ekerogo kiaye ki’oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli kebe ne chinguru goika kare na kare." 
1Chronicles22:11 “Bono omwana one, Omonene abe amo naye, erio obe nokogenderera okuya ase okoagacha enyomba y’Omonene, Nyasae oo, buna akwanete igoro yao." 
1Chronicles22:12 Tiga Omonene akoe obong’aini na okomanya, erio ekero orabe gokogambera Abaisraeli obwate amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae oo." 
1Chronicles22:13 Korarende na kobwata emeroberio yonsi eyio Omonene achigete Musa ase engencho y’Abaisraeli nigo orasesenigwe. Obe omokong’u na omoremu! Toiroka, tobaisa gokwa omoyo!" 
1Chronicles22:14 Ase ogwechanda mono nasangereirie ebinto bi’okoagachera enyomba y’Omonene. Nasangereirie chitahabu chitalanta chilifu rigana erimo (100,000) ne chifeta chitalanta emilioni eyemo (1,000,000), ne chitaai amo nebioma ebinge mono, bitari korengeka. Boigo narentire chibao na amagena. Ase ebinto ebio naye omente ebinde." 
1Chronicles22:15 Nigo obwate abakori emeremo abange: ababaachi amagena, na abaagacheri amagena, na abasenia be chibao, na abanto bamanyete gokora emeremo ende yonsi" 
1Chronicles22:16 ase chitahabu, ne chifeta, na ebioma. Imoka, ochake gokora emeremo! Omonene abe amo naye.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Daudi agachika abaraai bonsi b’Abaisraeli ng’a babe bagokonya Sulemani, omwana oye, akabatebia," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Inee! Omonene, Nyasae oino, tari amo nainwe? Naende tabaete omorembe ase chinsemo chiaino chionsi? Ere obekire abanto abanyene ense eye ase okoboko kwane; na ense eye nkogambera yabekirwe inse y’Omonene na inse y’abanto baye." 
1Chronicles22:19 Bono beka ebirengererio biaino ne chinkoro chiaino ase okomorigia Omonene, Nyasae oino. Imoka moagache obomenyo Obochenu ase Omonene Nyasae, erinde Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene na ebikorero ebichenu bia Nyasae birentwe ime ase enyomba eye eraagachwe ase engencho y’erieta ri’Omonene.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Ekero Daudi konya agotire mono akabeka Sulemani, omomura oye, akaba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Daudi agasangereria abaraai bonsi b’Abaisraeli amo nabakuani na Abalawi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Abalawi abarenge nemiaka emerongo etato na goetania bakabarwa, na omobaro obo okaba chilifu emerongo etato na isano na isato (38,000)." 
1Chronicles23:4 Daudi agateba, “Abanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000) ase aba mbabe bagotenenera emeremo y’enyomba y’Omonene, na abanto chilifu isano nemo (6,000) nababe abateneneri na abagambi ebina;" 
1Chronicles23:5 abanto chilifu inye (4,000) nababe abarendi b’ebiita na abanto chilifu inye (4,000) babe bagotogia Omonene nebinto ebio bikobugigwa naroisirie ase okomotogeria.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Daudi agaatanana Abalawi ase ebiombe kobwatekana nabamura ba Lawi: Gerisoni na Kohati, na Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Abana abamura ba Gerisoni nabwo Ladani na Simei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Abana abamura ba Ladani nabwo aba batato: Yehieli, omoteneneri obo, na Setamu, na Yoeli." 
1Chronicles23:9 Abana abamura ba Simei nabwo aba batato: Selomoti na Hasieli na Harani. Aba nabwo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chia Ladani. 
1Chronicles23:10 Na abana abamura ba Simei nabwo aba bane: Yahati na Sina, Yeusi na Beria." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati nere orenge omoteneneri obo, na Sisa oyo o kabere, korende Yeusi na Beria tibabwate abana abamura abange; ase ayio bakabekeranigwa amo ase okobarwa, bakaba eamate eyemo." 
1Chronicles23:12 Abana abamura ba Kohati nabwo aba bane: Amuramu na Isari, Heburoni na Usieli." 
1Chronicles23:13 Abana abamura b’Amuramu nabwo Haroni na Musa. Haroni agaatananwa koba oyochenegete mono kogenderera botambe. Ere amo nabamura baye babe bagosamba ubani ase obosio bw’Omonene na komokorera, naende babe bagosesenia ase erieta riaye botambe." 
1Chronicles23:14 Abana abamura ba Musa, omonto o Nyasae, bakabareranigwa amo negesaku kia Lawi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Abana abamura ba Musa nabwo Gerisomu na Eliezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Ase abana ba Gerisomu Sebueli nere orenge omoteneneri obo. 
1Chronicles23:17 Ase abana b’Eliezeri Rehabia nere orenge omoteneneri obo. Eliezeri tabwate abana abamura bande; korende abana abamura ba Rehabia nigo barenge abange mono. 
1Chronicles23:18 Ase abana ba Isari, Selomiti nere orenge omoteneneri obo." 
1Chronicles23:19 Abana abamura ba Heburoni nabwo aba: Yeria nere orenge omoteneneri obo, na Amaria, oyo o kabere, na Yahasieli, oyo o gatato, na Yekameamu, oyo o kane." 
1Chronicles23:20 Abana abamura ba Usieli nabwo Mika, omoteneneri obo, na Isia, oyo o kabere." 
1Chronicles23:21 Abana abamura ba Merari nabwo Mali na Musi; na abana abamura ba Mali nabwo Eleazari na Kisi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazari nigo akwete atabwati abana abamura, korende nabwate abana abaiseke. Abanto bamwabo, abana abamura ba Kisi, bakanyuoma abaiseke baria." 
1Chronicles23:23 Abana abamura ba Musi nabwo aba batato: Mali, na Ederi, na Yeremoti." 
1Chronicles23:24 Abanto aba nabwo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Lawi ase chiamate chiabo amo nabateneneri be chiamate chiria, buna barigetwe kera oyomo ase erieta riaye. Abwo nigo barenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, na nigo baisanerete gokora emeremo y’obokoreri bw’enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Chronicles23:25 Daudi akabora, “Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oeire abanto baye obotoereru, na bono ere nigo amenyete Yerusalemu kare na kare." 
1Chronicles23:26 Ase ayio Abalawi tibaganeirie kobogoria Eema gose ebinto binde bionsi bi’obokoreri bw’Eema eria.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Ase amatuko ’omoerio o Daudi, Abalawi bonsi bakarikwa, aba konya bakoorire emiaka emerongo ebere na goetania." 
1Chronicles23:28 Emeremo yabo nebe ogokonya abwo b’ororeria rwa Haroni ase obokoreri bw’enyomba y’Omonene, na gotenenera chiraaro na ebinyomba ebike; boigo ogosibia ebinto bichenire, na gokora emeremo ende yonsi y’obokoreri bw’enyomba ya Nyasae." 
1Chronicles23:29 Naende babe bagotenenera emeremo y’emegati ekoruegwa ase Nyasae, na ey’obosie obonuke bw’okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ey’emegati ere emeoo etabekiri memera, na ey’ekarangeire orogio, na ey’obosie bwochoganirie amaguta, na ey’ebirengo binde bionsi." 
1Chronicles23:30 Barabwo babe bagotenenera kera rituko, mambia na mogoroba, bakoiraneria Omonene ng’a mbuya mono na komotogia."
