1Chronicles23:31 Nigo barenge gokonya ekero kende gionsi ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa biarenge koruegwa ase Omonene, ase Chisabato na ase Emetienyi Emeyia, na ase Amatuko Amanene ande. Nigo baroberetigwe gokora emeremo eyio koreng’ana nomobaro oganeirie, bakagenderera koyekora botambe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
1Chronicles23:32 Ase enchera eye mbabe bakorenda Eema y’Omosangererekano na Aase Aachenu, na bakonye abanto bamwabo ab’ororeria rwa Haroni ase obokoreri bw’enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ebi nabio ebiombe bi’abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni. Abana abamura ba Haroni nabwo aba: Nadabu na Abihu, Eleazari na Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadabu na Abihu bagakwa bagatiga ise ore moyo, barabwo tibabwate abana; na igo Eleazari na Itamari bakaba abakuani." 
1Chronicles24:3 Daudi agaatanana abwo b’ororeria rwa Haroni na akaroberia buna bakore emeremo. Zadoki bw’ororeria rw’Eleazari na Ahimeleki bw’ororeria rwa Itamari barabwo mbabete bakomokonya. 
1Chronicles24:4 Abanto b’ororeria rw’Eleazari bakanyorekana bare nabateneneri abange kobua abwo b’ororeria rwa Itamari. Ase ayio bakabeka abanto ikomi na batano nomo b’ororeria rw’Eleazari babe abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, na batano na batato b’ororeria rwa Itamari babe abateneneri be chiamate chiabo." 
1Chronicles24:5 Igo baatananetwe ase ogoakerwa obomera, bonsi ase enchera eyemo, ekiagera abateneneri abwo b’Aase Aachenu na abwo ba Nyasae nigo bachoretwe korwa ase ororeria rw’Eleazari amo norwa Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:6 Semaya, mosinto o Netaneli Omolawi, akarika amarieta abo agwo ekero omoruoti na abanene abarenge komokonya, na Zadoki omokuani, na Ahimeleki, mosinto bw’Abiatari, na abateneneri be chiamate chi’abakuani, na echi’Abalawi barigereretie. Chiamate chigachorwa ase ogoakerwa obomera, eyemo korwa ase ororeria rw’Eleazari, na eyende korwa ase orwa Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:7 Obomera obotang’ani bokagwera Yehoyaribu, na obwa kabere Yedaya;" 
1Chronicles24:8 obwa gatato bokagwera Harimu, na obwa kane Seorimu;" 
1Chronicles24:9 obwa gatano bokagwera Malikia, na obwa gatano na rimo Miyamini;" 
1Chronicles24:10 obwa gatano na kabere bokagwera Hakosi, na obwa gatano na gatato Abiya;" 
1Chronicles24:11 obwa kianda bokagwera Yesua, na obwa ikomi Sekania;" 
1Chronicles24:12 obwa ikomi na rimo bokagwera Eliasibu, na obwa ikomi na kabere Yakimu;" 
1Chronicles24:13 obwa ikomi na gatato bokagwera Hupa, na obwa ikomi na kane Yesebeabu;" 
1Chronicles24:14 obwa ikomi na gatano bokagwera Biliga, na obwa ikomi na gatano na rimo Imeri;" 
1Chronicles24:15 obwa ikomi na gatano na kabere bokagwera Hesiri, na obwa ikomi na gatano na gatato Hapisesi;" 
1Chronicles24:16 obwa ikomi na kianda bokagwera Petahiya, na obwa emerongo ebere Ezekieli;" 
1Chronicles24:16 obwa ikomi na kianda bokagwera Petahiya, na obwa emerongo ebere Ezekieli;" 
1Chronicles24:17 Obwa emerongo ebere na rimo bokagwera Yakini, na obwa emerongo ebere na kabere Gamuli;" 
1Chronicles24:18 obwa emerongo ebere na gatato bokagwera Delaya, na obwa emerongo ebere na kane Maasia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Oyo noro omoroberio obo bw’obokoreri bwabo bw’enyomba y’Omonene buna Haroni, sokoro yabo, abarobereretie koreng’ana buna Omonene Nyasae amochigete." 
1Chronicles24:20 Aba nabwo Abalawi bande: Subaeli bw’ororeria rw’Amuramu na Yehedia bw’ororeria rwa Subaeli; 
1Chronicles24:21 Isia, omoteneneri korwa ase ororeria rwa Rehabia;" 
1Chronicles24:22 Selomoti bw’ororeria rwa Isari, na Yahati bw’ororeria rwa Selomoti." 
1Chronicles24:23 Abana abamura ba Heburoni nabwo aba: Yeria omotangi, na Amaria oyo o kabere, na Yahasieli, oyo o gatato, na Yekameamu oyo o kane;" 
1Chronicles24:24 Mika bw’ororeria rwa Usieli, na Samiri bw’ororeria rwa Mika;" 
1Chronicles24:25 Isia omomura omwabo Mika, na Zakaria bw’ororeria rwa Isia." 
1Chronicles24:26 Abana abamura ba Merari nabwo Mali na Musi. Omwana omomura o Yaasia nere Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Merari ase Yaasia, omwana oye omomura, nabwo aba: Beno na Sohamu, Sakuri na Ibiri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Omwana o Mali n’Eleazari; ere tabwate abana abamura. 
1Chronicles24:29 Yerameeli nomwana omomura o Kisi. 
1Chronicles24:30 Abana abamura ba Musi nabwo aba: Mali na Ederi, na Yerimoti. Aba nabwo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Lawi koreng’ana ne chiamate chiabo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Abateneneri abwo be chiamate chiabo, abatang’ani amo nabamwabo abake, bagaaka obomera buna abamwabo, abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni, ekero Daudi omoruoti, na Zadoki, na Ahimeleki, na abatang’ani be chiamate chi’abakuani na echi’Abalawi barigereretie. Oyorenge omonene ase eamate ogaakerwa obomera koreng’ana buna oyorenge omoke." 
1Chronicles25:1 Daudi amo nabatang’ani abarenge komokonya bagaatanana ase obokoreri abamura bande b’Asafu, na aba Hemani, na aba Yedutuni, baria barenge gochia kobana ase okobugia amakano ao ao, na goakania chisani chikwoga. Omoroberio bw’abanto baria baetwe emeremo eria noro oyo:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Ase abana abamura b’Asafu nabwo aba: Sakuri na Yusufu, Netania na Asarela. Abamura aba bakaba inse y’oboraai bw’Asafu ise, oyorenge kobana inse y’oboraai bw’omoruoti." 
1Chronicles25:3 Amo na Yedutuni nigo barenge abamura baye: Gedalia na Seri, Yesaia na Simei, Hesabia na Matitia. Abamura aba batano nomo bakaba inse y’oboraai bwa Yedutuni ise, oyorenge kobana ase okobugia obokano ase okoiraneria Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono na komotogia." 
1Chronicles25:4 Amo na Hemani nigo barenge abamura baye: Bukia na Matania, Usieli na Sebueli, Yerimoti na Hanania, Hanani na Eliata, Gidaliti na Romamuti‐Eseri, Yosibekasa na Maloti, Horiti na Mahasioti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Aba nigo barenge abana abamura ba Hemani, omorori bw’omoruoti. Nyasae amorierete eira y’okomokong’ia; ase ayio akamoa abana abamura ikomi na bane, na abaiseke batato." 
1Chronicles25:6 Abwo bonsi nigo barenge inse y’oboraai bwa ise ekero barenge gotera agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene na goakania chisani chikwoga, amo na kobugia amakano, na amakano ’ebirigisa. Asafu na Yedutuni, na Hemani nigo barenge inse y’oboraai bw’omoruoti." 
1Chronicles25:7 Omobaro obo amo nabanto bamwabo borokereretigwe goterera Omonene, abamanyete gotera buya kegima, nigo barenge amagana abere, na emerongo etano na etato, na batano na batato (288)." 
1Chronicles25:8 Abwo bonsi, abake na abanene, aborokia na aborokigwa, bagaaka obomera ase ogwatanana emeremo yabo." 
1Chronicles25:9 Obomera obotang’ani bokagwera Yusufu ase eamate y’Asafu. Obwa kabere bokagwera Gedalia; ere amo nabamwabo na abana baye abamura nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:10 Obwa gatato bokagwera Sakuri; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:11 Obwa kane bokagwera Isiri; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:12 Obwa gatano bokagwera Netania; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:13 Obwa gatano na rimo bokagwera Bukia; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:14 Obwa gatano na kabere bokagwera Yesarela; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:15 Obwa gatano na gatato bokagwera Yesaia; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:16 Obwa kianda bokagwera Matania; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:17 Obwa ikomi bokagwera Simei; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:18 Obwa ikomi na rimo bokagwera Asareli; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:19 Obwa ikomi na kabere bokagwera Hasabia; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:20 Obwa ikomi na gatato bokagwera Subaeli; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:21 Obwa ikomi na kane bokagwera Matitia; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:22 Obwa ikomi na gatano bokagwera Yeremoti; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:23 Obwa ikomi na gatano na rimo bokagwera Hanania; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:24 Obwa ikomi na gatano na kabere bokagwera Yosibekasa; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:25 Obwa ikomi na gatano na gatato bokagwera Hanani; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:26 Obwa ikomi na kianda bokagwera Maloti; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:27 Obwa emerongo ebere bokagwera Eliata; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:28 Obwa emerongo ebere na rimo bokagwera Hotiri; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:29 Obwa emerongo ebere na kabere bokagwera Gidaliti; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:30 Obwa emerongo ebere na gatato bokagwera Mahasioti; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles25:31 Obwa emerongo ebere na kane bokagwera Romamuti‐Eseri; ere amo nabana baye abamura na abamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na babere. 
1Chronicles26:1 Aba nabwo abarendi b’ebiita: Korwa ase ororeria rwa Kora, Meselemia, omwana omomura o Kora bw’ororeria rw’Asafu." 
1Chronicles26:2 Abana abamura ba Meselemia nabwo aba: Zakaria omwana oye omotangi; Yediaeli oyo o kabere; Zebadia oyo o gatato; Yatinieli oyo o kane. 
1Chronicles26:3 Elamu oyo o gatano; Yehohanani oyo o gatano na rimo; Eliehoenai oyo o gatano na kabere. 
1Chronicles26:4 Abana abamura b’Obedi‐Edomu nabwo aba: Semaya omwana oye omotangi; Yehosabadi oyo o kabere; Yoa oyo o gatato; Sakari oyo o kane; Netaneli oyo o gatano; 
1Chronicles26:5 Amieli oyo o gatano na rimo; Isakaru oyo o gatano na kabere; Peuletai oyo o gatano na gatato. Nyasae nigo asesenetie Obedi‐Edomu. 
1Chronicles26:6 Semaya, omomura oye, akaiborerwa abana abamura bakaba abateneneri be chiamate chiabo; abwo nigo barenge abanto abakong’u ase emeremo yabo." 
1Chronicles26:7 Abana abamura ba Semaya nabwo aba: Otini na Refaeli, na Obedi, na Elisabadi; boigo Elihu na Semakia, abamura bamwabo Semaya, nigo barenge abamura abakong’u mono ase emeremo yabo." 
1Chronicles26:8 Aba bonsi nigo barenge b’ororeria rw’Obedi‐Edomu. Barabwo amo nabana babo abamura na abanto bamwabo nigo barenge abanto abakong’u, bamanyete gokora emeremo yabo. Bonsi abwo b’Obedi‐Edomu nigo barenge emerongo etano nomo na babere." 
1Chronicles26:9 Abana abamura ba Meselemia amo nabanto bamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na batano, abamanyete buya gokora emeremo yabo." 
1Chronicles26:10 Abana abamura ba Hosa b’ororeria rwa Merari nabwo aba: Simuri, omoteneneri obo, nonya tarenge omotangi, ise akamobeka akaba omoteneneri." 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilikia nigo arenge oyo o kabere, na Tebalia oyo o gatato, na Zakaria oyo o kane. Aba na abamura ba Hosa amo nabamwabo nigo barenge ikomi na batato." 
1Chronicles26:12 Abanto b’ebiombe ebio bi’abarendi b’ebiita amo nabatang’ani babo nigo babegetwe gokora emeremo ase enyomba y’Omonene buna Abalawi bamwabo barenge gokora. 
1Chronicles26:13 Abanto ba kera eamate, enke na enene, bagaaka obomera bamanye ngeita ki bararende." 
1Chronicles26:14 Obomera bokagwera Selemia ase okorenda egeita kia moocha. Naende bagaakera Zakaria, omomura oye, obomera, bokamochora korenda egeita gia sugusu. Ere nigo arenge omosemia omong’aini." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obomera bokagwera Obedi‐Edomu, bokamochora korenda egeita kia irianyi, na abamura baye bakaegwa korenda ebigachero." 
1Chronicles26:16 Supimu na Hosea bagachorwa korenda ensemo ya bosongo, agwo ase Egeita gia Saleketi, ase enchera egotiira, na oborendi obomo bogachikana nobonde." 
1Chronicles26:16 Supimu na Hosea bagachorwa korenda ensemo ya bosongo, agwo ase Egeita gia Saleketi, ase enchera egotiira, na oborendi obomo bogachikana nobonde." 
1Chronicles26:17 Abarendi batano nomo nigo barenge kobeera ensemo ya moocha kera rituko, na ensemo ya sugusu mbane kera rituko, na ensemo ya irianyi mbane kera rituko; na ase ebigachero babere babere." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ase akanyomba kaagachire ensemo ya bosongo, abarendi bane nigo barenge agwo ase enchera, na babere ase akanyomba karia." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ebi nabio biarenge ebiombe bi’abarendi b’ebiita korwa ase abanto b’ororeria rwa Kora na orwa Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Ahiya oyomo bw’Abalawi nere otenenerete chikungo chi’enyomba ya Nyasae, naende nere orendete ebiatananetwe bikaba ebichenu." 
1Chronicles26:21 Abamura b’ororeria rwa Ladani, nabwo Abagerisoni, nigo barenge abateneneri be chiamate chia Ladani Omogerisoni. Ase abwo nigo barenge Abayehieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Abamura babere b’Abayehieli, Setamu na Yoeli momura omwabo, abwo bakaba bagotenenera chikungo chi’enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Chronicles26:23 Ase ebiombe bie chinderia chi’Amuramu, na Isari, na Heburoni, na Usieli:" 
1Chronicles26:24 Sebueli, omomura o Gerisomu, mosinto o Musa, nere orenge omoteneneri omonene bwe chikungo chiria." 
1Chronicles26:25 Abanto bamwabo korwa ase Eliezeri nigo barenge Rehabia, omomura oye, na Yesaia omomura oye, na Yoramu omomura oye, na Sikiri omomura oye, na Selomiti omomura oye." 
1Chronicles26:26 Selomiti na abamwabo nabwo batenenerete chikungo chionsi chi’ebiegwa Daudi omoruoti aatananerete Omonene, amo nebio abateneneri be chiamate, na abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi chilifu na ab’amagana, na abachiki b’abarwani esegi baatananete bikaba ebichenu." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ebinto binde biasakoretwe ekero gi’esegi bigaatananwa bikaba ebiegwa ase ogokorerwa emeremo y’enyomba y’Omonene. 
1Chronicles26:28 Naboigo, nebiegwa bionsi biria Samweli omorori, na Saulo, mosinto o Kisi, na Abineri, mosinto o Neri, na Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya baatananete. Ebinto bionsi bikabekwa inse y’oborendi bwa Selomiti na abamwabo." 
1Chronicles26:29 Korwa ase Abaisari, Kenania na abamura baye bagachorwa gokora emeremo ya isiko buna abatang’ani b’emeremo ao ao, na abagambi ebina." 
1Chronicles26:30 Korwa ase Abaheburoni, Hasabia na abanto b’eamate yaye, elifu eyemo na amagana atano na abere (1,700), abanto abamanyete buya gokora emeremo yabo, bakabekwa ensemo ya bosongo ya Yorodan gotenenera Abaisraeli ase emeremo yonsi y’Omonene na ey’omoruoti." 
1Chronicles26:31 Korwa ase Abaheburoni, Yeria nere otenenerete abanto be chiamate chionsi chi’ororeria rwa Heburoni. (Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ene bw’okogamba gwa Daudi, obotuki bogakorwa, na abanto be chiamate echio abamanyete korwana esegi buya bakanyorekana agwo Yaeseri ya Gileadi)." 
1Chronicles26:32 Abanto baria abamwabo Yeria nigo barenge chilifu ibere, na amagana atano na abere (2,700), abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, bamanyete korwana esegi buya. Barabwo Daudi omoruoti akababeka bakaba abateneneri b’abanto b’egesaku kia Reuben, na ab’ekia Gadi, na ab’ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, ase emeremo ende yonsi ya Nyasae na ey’omoruoti." 
1Chronicles27:1 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’Abaisraeli na abateneneri be chiamate chiabo na obw’abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi chilifu na ab’amagana, na obw’abateneneri b’emeremo ende yonsi ase oboruoti. Kera omotienyi ase omwaka ekeombe ki’abanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000), nigo kiarenge gokora emeremo inse y’oboraai bw’omotang’ani bw’omotienyi oyio." 
1Chronicles27:2 Yasobeamu, mosinto o Sabidieli, nere otenenerete ekeombe egetang’ani, ase omotienyi bwe ritang’ani; ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ere nigo arenge bw’ororeria rwa Peresi, na orenge omochiki bw’abatang’ani bonsi b’abarwani esegi ase omotienyi bwe ritang’ani." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodadi bw’ororeria rw’Ahohi nere otenenerete ekeombe ki’omotienyi o kabere. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000). Mikiloti nere orenge omokonyi oye." 
1Chronicles27:5 Omoteneneri bw’ekeombe kia gatato, ase omotienyi o gatato, nere Benaya, mosinto o Yehoyada omokuani. Benaya nigo arenge omotang’ani omonene, na ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya nere orenge omonto etuoni, omanyekanete ase baria Emerongo Etato, naende orenge nomochiki obo. Amisabadi, omomura oye, nere orenge komokonya ase ekeombe ekio." 
1Chronicles27:7 Oyo o kane, Asaeli, omomura omwabo Yoabu, akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o kane, na Sebadia, omomura oye, akagetenenera nyuma yaye. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:8 Oyo o gatano, Samuti bw’ororeria rwa Isihari akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o gatano. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:9 Oyo o gatano na rimo, Ira, mosinto o Ikesi Omotekoa akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o gatano na rimo. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:10 Oyo o gatano na kabere, Helesi, Omopeloni bw’ororeria rw’Efraimu, akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o gatano na kabere. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:11 Oyo o gatano na gatato, Sibekai bw’ororeria rwa Husa Omozera akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o gatano na gatato. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:12 Oyo o kianda, Abieseri korwa Anatoti bw’ororeria rwa Benjamin akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o kianda. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:13 Oyo o ikomi, Maharai korwa Netofa bw’ororeria rwa Zera akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o ikomi. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:14 Oyo o ikomi na rimo, Benaya korwa Piratoni bw’ororeria rw’Efraimu akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o ikomi na rimo. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:15 Oyo o ikomi na kabere, Helidai korwa Netofa bw’ororeria rw’Otinieli akaba omoteneneri bw’ekeombe ki’omotienyi o ikomi na kabere. Ekeombe kiaye nigo kiarenge nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere na inye (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:16 Aba nabwo barenge abaraai b’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli: Eliezeri, mosinto o Sikiri, ase Abareuben; Sefatia, mosinto o Maaka, ase Abasimeoni;" 
1Chronicles27:17 Hasabia, mosinto o Kemueli, ase Abalawi; Zadoki ase abanto ba Haroni;" 
1Chronicles27:18 Elihu, oyomo bw’abamura bamwabo Daudi, ase Abayuda; Omuri, mosinto o Mikaeli, ase Abaisakaru;" 
1Chronicles27:19 Isimaya, mosinto bw’Obadia, ase Abasabuloni; Yerimoti, mosinto bw’Asirieli, ase Abanafutali;" 
1Chronicles27:20 Hosea, mosinto bw’Asasia, ase Abaefraimu; Yoeli, mosinto o Pedaya, ase ekeng’ese kende ki’egesaku kia Manase;" 
1Chronicles27:20 Hosea, mosinto bw’Asasia, ase Abaefraimu; Yoeli, mosinto o Pedaya, ase ekeng’ese kende ki’egesaku kia Manase;" 
1Chronicles27:21 Ido, mosinto o Zakaria, ase ekeng’ese ki’egesaku kia Manase, keria kiarenge agwo Gileadi; Yaasieli, mosinto bw’Abineri ase Ababenjamin;" 
1Chronicles27:22 Asareli, mosinto o Yerohamu, ase Abadani. Aba nabwo barenge abaraai b’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Daudi tabarete na korika abanto konya bataraika emiaka emerongo ebere, ekiagera Omonene nariete eira ng’a namente Abaisraeli babe abange buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoabu, omomura bw’omokungu Seruya, agachaka kobara Abaisraeli, korende takoorete emeremo eyio. Nyasae akaba nendamwamu ase Abaisraeli ase engencho y’okobarwa koria, na omobaro oyio tobekiri ase Ebuku y’ogokora gwa Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Asimaweti, mosinto bw’Adieli, agatenenera chimonga chi’omoruoti; na Yonathani, mosinto bwa Usia, agatenenera chimonga chi’ense eria, ase emechie emenene na emeke, na ase emerobiri." 
1Chronicles27:26 Esiri, mosinto o Kelubi, agatenenera abakori emeremo b’emegondo, abarenge koyerema." 
1Chronicles27:27 Simei Omoramati agatenenera emegondo y’emesabibu, na Sabidi Omosifumi agatenenera edivai ase yare kogachwa." 
1Chronicles27:28 Baali‐Hanani Omogederi agatenenera emezeituni na emeko agwo ase ense omweya. Na Yoashi agatenenera ebigachero bi’amaguta ’amazeituni. 
1Chronicles27:29 Sitirai Omosaroni agatenenera amaicho arenge korisia agwo Saroni, na Safati, mosinto bw’Adilai, agatenenera amaicho arenge korisia ase amakura." 
1Chronicles27:30 Obili Omoisumaeli agatenenera chingamia, na Yedaya Omomeroni agatenenera chitigere, na" 
1Chronicles27:31 Yasisi Omohagari agatenenera ching’ondi ne chimbori. Abe bonsi nigo barenge abateneneri ba chinibo chia Daudi omoruoti. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonathani, ise moke Daudi, nere orenge omosemia; nigo arenge omonto omong’aini naende omonyasemi. Ere na Yehieli, mosinto o Hakimoni, nigo barenge abateneneri b’abana abamura b’omoruoti." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli nere orenge omosemia bw’omoruoti, na Husai Omoariki nomosani bw’omoruoti orenge." 
1Chronicles27:34 Yehoyada, mosinto o Benaya, na Abiatari bakabekwa ase ribaga ri’Ahitofeli gakure. Yoabu nere orenge omochiki bw’abarwani esegi b’omoruoti." 
1Chronicles28:1 Daudi akarangeria abateneneri bonsi b’Abaisraeli bache Yerusalemu. Ase ayio abateneneri b’ebisaku, na ab’ebiombe biarenge gokorera omoruoti, na abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi chilifu na ab’amagana, na baria batenenerete chinibo chionsi chi’omoruoti ne chiombe chiaye, na echi’abana baye, amo nabateneneri b’enyomba y’omoruoti, na abanto bonsi chituoni, na abwo bonsi barenge abakong’u ase esegi, bagacha aroro." 
1Chronicles28:2 Erio omoruoti Daudi agatenena, agakwana, “Inwe baminto na abanto baane, inyigwe. Nigo narengereretie koagacha enyomba ase Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene erabekwe, eyio ere egeteni ki’amagoro ’Omonene, Nyasae oito, nkabeka ebinto ang’e ase okoagacha enyomba eyio." 
1Chronicles28:3 Korende Omonene Nyasae agankania, agantebia: Aye tokonyara koagacha enyomba ase engencho y’erieta riane, ekiagera kwarwanire chisegi na gwaiteire amanyinga ’abanto." 
1Chronicles28:4 Korende nonya naboigo, Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, aganchora korwa ase enyomba ya tata, akambeka nkaba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli kogenderera botambe. Nigo achorete Abayuda bakaba abaraai, na korwa ase Abayuda agachora enyomba ya tata, na ase egati y’abana baye Omonene akagokigwa nainche, akambeka nkaba omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli bonsi." 
1Chronicles28:5 Omonene ong’eire abamura abange, na ase abwo bonsi ochorire Sulemani aikaranse ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti ki’Abaisraeli abwo Omonene akogambera." 
1Chronicles28:6 “Omonene agakwana agantebia: Sulemani, omomura oo, nere oraagache enyomba yaane ne chiraaro chiane, ekiagera namochorire abe omwana one, na inche nimbe ise." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ninkore oboruoti bwaye bobe ne chinguru kare na kare karagenderere bokong’u kobwata na koigwera amachiko aane, na emeroberio yane echikire, buna agokora ase engaki eye." 
1Chronicles28:8 “Ase ayio bono aiga ase amasio ’Abaisraeli bonsi bare omosangererekano bw’Omonene, na ase obosio bwa Nyasae oito oyotoigwete, morende mono amachiko onsi ay’Omonene, Nyasae onio, na koyabwatia, erio nario moramenye ase ense eye engiya na koyetigera abana baino, ebe omwando obo kogenderera botambe nyuma yaino." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Naye Sulemani, omwana one, omomanye Nyasae one inche iso, naende omokorere nenkoro yao yonsi, na ase ogwancha kwao gwonsi, ekiagera Omonene nigo akorenga chinkoro chionsi, naende nigo amanyete kera omoroberio na ebirengererio bionsi. Koramorigie, ere nanche omonyore; korende onye gokomotiga, ere nigo aragotugute kare na kare." 
1Chronicles28:10 Bono bwerende, ekiagera Omonene ogochorire oagache enyomba ebe Obomenyo bwaye Obochenu. Obe omokong’u na okore ayio.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Erio Daudi akaa Sulemani, omwana oye, omogwekano bw’enyomba eria enke erabe bosio bwe Hekalu, na oyo bw’ebinyomba bie Hekalu, ne chikungo chie Hekalu, na obw’ebinyomba bia irongo, na ebinyomba bia ime, na obw’akanyomba k’Oboikaranso bw’Amabera." 
1Chronicles28:12 Naende akamoa omogwekano bw’ebinto bionsi arengereretie igoro y’okoagacha chiraaro chi’enyomba y’Omonene, na obw’ebinyomba bionsi biraetanane Hekalu biagachwe ase chimonga chi’enyomba ya Nyasae chiragachwe, amo ne chikungo chi’ebiegwa biare gocha gwatananwa bibe ebichenu." 
1Chronicles28:13 Boigo akamoa emeroberio y’ebiombe bi’abakuani na Abalawi buna barache gokora emeremo yonsi y’obokoreri bw’enyomba y’Omonene, na obw’ebinto bionsi bi’obokoreri bw’enyomba y’Omonene." 
1Chronicles28:14 Akamotebereria igoro y’oborito bwe chitahabu na obwe chifeta chikoroiserigwa kera egekorero kegokorerwa ase Hekalu," 
1Chronicles28:15 na oborito bwe chitahabu chi’ebibekerero bie chitaya na echie chitaya chiria, na obwa kera ekebekerero gie chitaya ao ao, na oborito bwe chifeta chia kera ekebekerero gie chitaya, ne chitaya chiria, koreng’ana nemeremo ya kera ekebekerero," 
1Chronicles28:16 na oborito bwe chitahabu chia kera emesa y’emegati ekoruegwa ase Nyasae, na obwe chifeta chikoroiserigwa chimesa chie chifeta." 
1Chronicles28:17 Akamotebereria igoro ye chigami, ne chisani, na ebitaabo biroisigwe korwa ase chitahabu chichenire na igoro ye chibakuri chie chitahabu, na echie chifeta, na oborito bwa kera eyemo;" 
1Chronicles28:18 na igoro y’egesasimero ki’ogosambera ubani, keraroisigwe korwa ase etahabu echenire. Akamotebereria boigo igoro y’omoroberio oyo bw’egari y’etahabu nero abakerubi baria baramborete chimbaba chiabo igoro y’Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’Omonene na bayetubete." 
1Chronicles28:19 Daudi agatebia Sulemani, “Aya onsi Omonene nigo andikerete nokoboko kwaye, akanyorokereria buna emeremo yonsi egochia gokoreka yare kobwatekana nomogwekano orwetwe.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Naende Daudi agatebia Sulemani, omwana oye, “Obe omokong’u, naende omoremu, erio okore ayio. Toiroka, gose tokwa moyo, ekiagera Omonene Nyasae, oyore Nyasae one, nigo are amo naye. Omonene takogotiga obugwe, goika emeremo yonsi y’enyomba yaye eere." 
1Chronicles28:21 Rora ebiombe bi’abakuani na Abalawi baria barakore emeremo yonsi y’enyomba ya Nyasae nao bare aa; kera omonto ore nogwancha, naende omanyete emeremo ende yonsi, nabe naye ase emeremo yonsi. Boigo abaraai bonsi amo nabanto bonsi nababe bagokora aya onsi orabachike.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Daudi omoruoti agakwana nomosangererekano bwonsi, agateba, “Sulemani, omwana one, oyo Nyasae achorire, nomoke, taramanya amange, na emeremo eye nigo ere emenene. Enyomba eye y’obonene tekoba ase mwanyabanto, korende nase Omonene Nyasae." 
1Chronicles29:2 Inche ase ogokora aya narenge konyara, nabekire ebinto ang’e ase okoagachera enyomba ya Nyasae one: chitahabu ase ebinto bie chitahabu, ne chifeta ase ebinto bie chifeta, ne chitaai ase ebinto bie chitaai, na ebioma ase ebinto bi’ebioma, ne chibao ase ebinto bie chibao. Amo nebinto ebio narure amagena e rigori rinene, buna oiniki na ayande ay’ogosata, ayare nebieni ao ao, akomeka‐meka, amo namagena ande amange amarabu akomeka‐meka." 
1Chronicles29:3 Boigo naende ekiagera nanchire na kwerwa ase enyomba ya Nyasae one, narure ase enyomba eye enchenu chinibo chiane chionsi chie chitahabu ne chifeta komenta ase ebinto ebio bionsi konya narure." 
1Chronicles29:4 Nkorua inde chitahabu, chitalanta chilifu isato, korwa ase Ofiri, ne chifeta chichenire chitalanta amagana atano na abere ase okooma chinyasi chi’enyomba," 
1Chronicles29:5 na ase emeremo ende yonsi egochia gokorwa nabaroisia ebinto, chitahabu ase ebinto bie chitahabu, ne chifeta ase ebinto bie chifeta. Ning’o ogochia kwerua ase ogwancha? Oyio tiga eatanane bweka omonyene ase Omonene rituko ria rero.”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Erio abateneneri be chiamate chiabo bakarua ebiegwa bi’ogwancha; abaraai b’ebisaku na abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi chilifu na ab’amagana, na abateneneri b’emeremo y’omoruoti boigo bakarua." 
1Chronicles29:7 Barabwo bakarua ase emeremo y’enyomba ya Nyasae chitahabu chitalanta chilifu isano ne chidarikoni chilifu ikomi, ne chifeta chitalanta chilifu ikomi, ne chitaai chitalanta chilifu ikomi na isano na isato, na ebioma chitalanta chilifu rigana erimo." 
1Chronicles29:8 Omonto onde bwensi obwate amagena e rigori rinene akayarua, na amagena ayio akabekwa ase ekungo y’enyomba y’Omonene, inse y’oborendi bwa Yehieli Omogerisoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Erio abanto bakaba nomogoko, ekiagera bonsi nigo baruete ase ogwancha, na ase chinkoro chieruete ase Omonene. Daudi omoruoti boigo akaba nomogoko omonene." 
1Chronicles29:10 Daudi agatogia Omonene ase obosio bw’omosangererekano bwonsi, akabora, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae o Israeli, sokoro yaito, kware gotogigwa korwa kare na gochia kare na kare!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Aye Omonene, obonene nobwao amo nokobua, na obomeka‐meku, na obobui, na obonguru. Ebinto bionsi bire igoro na ebire ase ense nebiao. Aye Omonene, oboruoti nobwao, naye omonyene bweimokereretie igoro okaba omotwe o bionsi." 
1Chronicles29:12 Obotenenku bwonsi na amasikani nigo bikorwa asore aye, naye okogamba igoro ase bionsi. Ase okoboko kwao chinguru na okobua nao bire; nobwate okobua kw’ogokinia na korua chinguru ase bonsi." 
1Chronicles29:13 Bono Nyasae oito, twakoiraneirie ng’a mbuya mono na gotogia erieta riao ri’obonene." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Korende inche ninki ing’isaine, na abanto baane ninki baisaine, goika twanyarire korua ebinto ase ogwancha buna oko? Ebinto bionsi nigo bikorwa asore; ase ayio ebinto biaruete ase okoboko kwao nabio twakoeire." 
1Chronicles29:15 Intwe nigo tore ase ense y’obogeni, naende nigo tore abaeti ase obosio bwao, buna chisokoro chiaito chionsi chiarenge; amatuko aito ay’okomenya ase ense nigo anga buna omorengari, na ogosemeria konde tikoiyo." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ee, aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, ebinto ebi bionsi ebinge twarure ase okoagacha enyomba ase engencho y’erieta riao richenu nigo bikorwa ase okoboko kwao, na bionsi nebiao aye omonyene." 
1Chronicles29:17 Nyasae one, nimanyete ng’a aye nigo okorenga enkoro, naende nigo ogokirie nayare ay’oboronge. Ase enkoro endonge narure ebinto ebio bionsi nogwancha; na bono narorire abanto bao abare aiga bagokoruera nogwancha, naende ase omogoko omonge." 
1Chronicles29:18 Aye Omonene, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Israeli chisokoro chiaito, tiga abanto bao, bagenderere koba nekerenga eke na ebirengererio ase chinkoro chiabo botambe kogenderera, naende oonchore chinkoro chiabo chibeere asore." 
1Chronicles29:19 Oe Sulemani, omwana one, enkoro yeruete asore, erinde arende amachiko ao, na oborori bwao, na emeroberio yao echikire, akore aya onsi na aagache enyomba eria y’obonene nabeire nkobeka ebinto bionsi ang’e ase okoyeagacha.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Erio Daudi agatebia omosangererekano bwonsi, “Togia Omonene, Nyasae oino!” Na omosangererekano bwonsi ogatogia Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, na agwo abanto baria bagatureka emetwe yabo, bagasasima Omonene naende bakaorokia amasikani ase omoruoti." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ne rituko ria kabere barabwo bakaruera Omonene ebing’wanso, bakamoruera nebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa; chieri elifu eyemo, ne chimingichi elifu eyemo, ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi elifu eyemo, amo nokoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa gwachikire amo nabirobio, naende akarua ebing’wanso ebinge ase engencho y’Abaisraeli bonsi." 
1Chronicles29:22 Nabarabwo bakaria na konywa ase obosio bw’Omonene ase rituko riria, bakaba nomogoko omonene. Bono eria kabere bakabeka Sulemani, mosinto o Daudi, akaba omoruoti obo; bakamoaka amaguta akaba omogambi ase ogokorera Omonene, na Zadoki agaakwa amaguta akaba omokuani." 
1Chronicles29:23 Erio Sulemani agaikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti bw’Omonene, akaba omoruoti ribaga ria Daudi ise, akaba ogosesenigwa, na Abaisraeli bonsi bakamoigwera." 
1Chronicles29:24 Abaraai bonsi, na abanto chituoni, amo nabamura bonsi ba Daudi omoruoti bakaria chiira ng’a mbabwatane nomoruoti Sulemani." 
1Chronicles29:25 Omonene akaa Sulemani erieta rinene ase egati y’Abaisraeli bonsi, naende akamoa oboruoti bore nobonene obwo ataete omoruoti onde bwensi omotang’anerete agwo ase Abaisraeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Bono Daudi, mosinto o Yese, konya ogambeire Abaisraeli bonsi." 
1Chronicles29:27 Akagambera Abaisraeli emiaka emerongo ene, emiaka etano na ebere agwo Heburoni, na emiaka emerongo etato na etato agwo Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Daudi agakwa ore omogotu mono bw’amatuko amange, nigo arenge omonto omonda osikire; na Sulemani, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
1Chronicles29:29 Bono amang’ana aria Daudi omoruoti akorete korwa omochakano goika omoerie nigo arikire ase chibuku chia Samweli omorori, na ase echia Nathani omobani, na ase echia Gadi omorori." 
1Chronicles29:30 Bakarika amang’ana onsi igoro y’okogamba kwaye, na okobua kwaye, na amang’ana onsi amonyorete ere amo n’Abaisraeli, na amaruoti ande onsi ay’ense." 
2Chronicles1:1 Sulemani, mosinto o Daudi, akanyora chinguru ase oboruoti bwaye, na Omonene, Nyasae oye, nigo arenge amo nere, na akamokora akaba omonene mono." 
2Chronicles1:2 Sulemani agasangereria Abaisraeli bonsi, abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi chilifu, na ab’amagana, na abagambi ebina, na abaraai bonsi b’Abaisraeli, nabwo abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles1:3 Erio akagenda amo nomosangererekano oyio bwonsi goika aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa arenge agwo Gibeoni, ekiagera Eema y’Omosangererekano ya Nyasae, eria Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, aroisetie aaria ase erooro, nao yarenge." 
2Chronicles1:4 Korende Esanduku eria ya Nyasae Daudi konya oyerentire korwa ase Kiriati‐Yearimu, goika aase aria ayeroiseretie, ekiagera konya oyeteneneirie eema agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Egesasimero gi’etaai keria Besaleli, mosinto o Uri o Huri, aroisetie nao kiarenge bosio bw’Eema y’Omonene, Sulemani amo nomosangererekano bwonsi bakaba bakogenda aroro koboria Omonene." 
2Chronicles1:6 Agwo Sulemani agatiira gochia ase egesasimero keria kiarenge agwo ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, na igoro yaye akaruera Omonene ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa elifu eyemo." 
2Chronicles1:7 Ase obotuko boria Nyasae akaorokera Sulemani, akamotebia, “Mboria aya oganetie nkoe!”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Sulemani akairaneria Nyasae, “Aye nkwaorogetie obwanchani obonene botari koera ase Daudi tata, na inche kwambekire nabeire omoruoti ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles1:9 Aye Omonene Nyasae, tiga eira yao kwarierete Daudi tata eikeranigwe bono, ekiagera kwambekire nabeire omoruoti igoro ase abanto abange banga buna orotu rw’ense." 
2Chronicles1:10 Bono ing’a obong’aini ne chisemi imanye koraa na gotang’ana abanto aba, ekiagera ning’o rende oranyare kogambera abanto aba bao abange buna aba?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Nyasae akairaneria Sulemani, “Ekiagera okogania okwo kore ime ase enkoro yao, naende toboreti oegwe obotenenku, gose obonda, gose ogosikwa, gose ogosirigwa kw’obogima bw’abanto baria bakogechete, gose toboreti oegwe obogima obotambe, korende kwaboririe oegwe obong’aini ne chisemi, erinde omanye kogambera abanto baane abwo nakobekire obe omoruoti obo," 
2Chronicles1:12 inche ninkoe obong’aini ne chisemi. Boigo ninkoe obotenenku ne chinibo, na ogosikwa oko omoruoti onde atana koegwa, gose oyorache korwa nyuma yao takoegwa.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Erio Sulemani akairana korwa agwo aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa agwo Gibeoni, korwa ase Eema y’Omosangererekano, akagenda Yerusalemu na akaba okogambera Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Sulemani agasangereria amo chigari ne chibarasi chikoriinwa; nigo abwate chigari elifu eyemo, na amagana ane, ne chibarasi chikoriinwa chilifu ikomi na ibere. Echinde ase echio nigo chiabegetwe ase emechie ye chigari, na echinde chikabekwa Yerusalemu, ang’e nase omoruoti amenyete." 
2Chronicles1:15 Omoruoti akarenta chifeta ne chitahabu chinyinge agwo Yerusalemu, chikabucha buna amagena; ne chibao chi’emecharake chiarenge chinyinge buna echi’emeko yarenge ase ense omweya." 
2Chronicles1:16 Sulemani nigo arenge korenterwa chibarasi korwa Misiri na korwa Kue; na abaonchoreria baye nigo barenge gochirenta korwa agwo ase ogochiakanera rigori gete. 
2Chronicles1:17 Bakarenta chigari korwa Misiri ase ogoakanera kera eyemo chisekeli amagana atano na rimo chie chifeta, na ebarasi eyemo nigo yare goakanerwa chisekeli rigana erimo, na emerongo etano; boigo abaruoti bonsi b’Abahiti na ab’Abasiiria nigo barenge kogora chigari ne chibarasi goetera ase abaonchoreria ba Sulemani." 
2Chronicles2:1 Sulemani akaroberia koagachera erieta ri’Omonene Hekalu, naende eagachere enyomba yaye y’oboruoti." 
2Chronicles2:2 Ase ayio akabeka abanto chilifu emerongo etano na ebere (70,000) bakaba bakobogoria chigurube, na abanto chilifu emerongo etano na etato (80,000) bakaba bakobaacha amagena agwo ase ebitunwa, na abanto chilifu isato, na amagana atano na rimo (3,600) bakaba abateneneri b’abanto abwo bonsi." 
2Chronicles2:3 Erio Sulemani agatoma amang’ana ase Huramu, omoruoti o Turo, akamotebia, “Buna kwarenge gokorera Daudi tata, kware komotomera emete y’emecharake na ere akeagachera enyomba amenyete ime, inkorera nainche boigo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Rora, inche nabeire ang’e koagachera erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae one, enyomba. Na enyomba eye nigo ndayiatanane na koyechena ase Omonene, erinde tonyare gosambera ubani ere nogotioka okuya asare, na kobeka emegati ebe ekoruegwa ase Nyasae kogenderera botambe. Boigo tobe tokorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa bia mambia na ebia mogoroba, na ebie Chisabato na ebi’Emetienyi Emeyia, na ebi’Amatuko Amanene ay’Omonene, Nyasae oito. Ebing’wanso ebio nigo biachikeretwe Abaisraeli babe bakobirua botambe." 
2Chronicles2:5 Enyomba inche ngochia koagacha nigo erabe enene mono, ekiagera Nyasae nomonene goetania chinyasae chinde chionsi." 
2Chronicles2:6 Korende ning’o oranyare komoagachera enyomba? Rora igoro na igoro aare mono tekomoisana amenyeo. Inche inki ing’isaine ng’a imoagachere enyomba, otatiga imoagachere aase ubani egosamberwa oka?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ase ayio bono, ntomere omonto omong’aini omanyete mono gokora emeremo ase chitahabu, ne chitaai, na ebioma, na koroisia ebitambaa bire nebieni bimonyinga, na ebibariri, na ebire buru, naende akore emeremo y’okomang’a. Ere abe ogokora emeremo amo nabakori b’emeremo eyio baria bare amo nainche aiga ase ense ya Yuda, na ase Yerusalemu, abwo Daudi tata abegete." 
2Chronicles2:8 Naende ntomere emecharake, na emetarakwa, na emete ekorokwa alugumu korwa Lebanoni, ekiagera nimanyete ng’a abasomba bao mbamanyete kogecha emete agwo Lebanoni. Na abasomba baane mbabe bagokora emeremo amo nabao," 
2Chronicles2:9 ase okondoiseria chibao chinyinge, ekiagera enyomba ngochia koagacha nigo erabe enene mono, naende ey’ogokumia." 
2Chronicles2:10 Ning’ee abasomba bao endagera, baria bagotema emete na gotandora chibao. Nimbae engano esenyentire ebitonga chilifu amagana abere (200,000), na esairi ebitonga chilifu amagana abere (200,000), na edivai chilita chilifu amagana atano na abere na emerongo ebere (720,000), na amaguta ’amazeituni chilita chilifu amagana atano na abere na emerongo ebere (720,000).”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Huramu, omoruoti o Turo, akairaneria ase rirube atomete ase Sulemani, rigoteba: “Ekiagera Omonene anchete abanto baye, okobekire aye koba omoruoti igoro asebare,”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Naende Huramu akarika: “Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atogigwe, oria okorete igoro na ense, oria oeire Daudi omoruoti omwana ore nobong’aini, omanyete gochora ayare amaya, oyio oraagachere Omonene Hekalu, naende eagachere enyomba y’oboruoti." 
2Chronicles2:13 Bono natomire asore Huramu‐Abi, omoroisia omong’aini ore nokomanya okonge." 
2Chronicles2:14 Ng’ina nigo arenge omokungu bw’egesaku kia Dani, na ise nigo arenge omonto o Turo. Ere nigo orokereretigwe akamanya buya gokora emeremo ase chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitaai, na ebioma, na amagena, ne chibao. Naende nigo amanyete koroisia ebitambaa bi’ebieni bimonyinga, na ebire buru, na ebibariri amo nebi’egatani engiya. Ere nigo amanyete emeremo ende yonsi y’okomang’a na gokora omogwekano onde bwonsi are gotebigwa ng’a ayokore. Tiga akore emeremo amo nabakori emeremo bao, na amo nabwo omonene one Daudi iso abegete." 
2Chronicles2:15 Ase ayio bono totomere intwe, abasomba bao, engano, na esairi, na amaguta ’amazeituni, na edivai, ebinto biria aye, omonene one, gwatebete ng’a nototomere." 
2Chronicles2:16 Erio intwe natoteme emete ende yonsi oganetie korwa Lebanoni na toyetome gocha asore eboire amo, erentwe asore nenyancha, ebe echeng’enenete goika Yopa, na korwa aroro oyioyie oyeire Yerusalemu aye omonyene.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Sulemani akabara na korika abasacha abamenyi bonsi barenge ase ense y’Abaisraeli buna Daudi ise akorete, akanyora ng’a nigo barenge abanto chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na isato, na amagana atano na rimo (153,600)." 
2Chronicles2:18 Akabeka abanto chilifu emerongo etano na ebere (70,000) bakaba bakobogoria chigurube, ne chilifu emerongo etano na etato (80,000) bakaba bakobaacha amagena ase ebitunwa, ne chilifu isato, na amagana atano na rimo (3,600) bakaba bagotebereria abanto bakore emeremo." 
2Chronicles3:1 Erio Sulemani agachaka koagacha enyomba y’Omonene agwo Yerusalemu, igoro ase egetunwa kia Moria, agwo ase Omonene aorokerete Daudi ise, Daudi nigo achorete aase agwo ase ekeooreri ki’Orinani Omoyebusi kiarenge." 
2Chronicles3:2 Agachaka koagacha ase rituko ria kabere ri’omotienyi o kabere bw’omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kwaye. 
2Chronicles3:3 Sulemani akabeka oboroso bw’enyomba ya Nyasae, na obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano nomo, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo ebere, koreng’ana nekerengo egekoro." 
2Chronicles3:4 Enyomba eria yaagachetwe bosio bwe Hekalu nigo yarenge iga: obogare bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere, na nigo bwareng’aine nobogare bwe Hekalu, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko rigana erimo na emerongo ebere. Sulemani akayeooma korwa ime ne chitahabu chichenire." 
2Chronicles3:5 Chinyasi chia ime chie Hekalu enyene agachituba ne chibao chi’emetarakwa, naende agachiooma ne chitahabu chingiya, agachichabera nemegwekano y’emekendo na ey’ebinyuri." 
2Chronicles3:6 Naende agachabera enyomba eria namagena e rigori rinene. Chitahabu chiria nigo chiarwete Parawaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Akaooma enyomba yonsi ne chitahabu; emiamba, na emetobwa, ne chinyasi, na ebisieri, ebinto ebio bionsi akabiooma ne chitahabu, akabaacha emegwekano y’abakerubi ase chinyasi." 
2Chronicles3:8 Akaroisia Aase Aachenu Mono, akanyomba karia ka ime. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwareng’aine na obogare bw’enyomba, amaboko emerongo ebere, na obogare boigo amaboko emerongo ebere; agakaooma ne chitahabu chingiya chie chitalanta amagana atano na rimo." 
2Chronicles3:9 Oborito bw’emesumari ye chitahabu nigo bwarenge chisekeli emerongo etano chie chitahabu. Ebinyomba bia irongo boigo bikaoomwa netahabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ime y’Aase Achenu Mono akaroisia emegwekano ebere y’abakerubi, akayeooma ne chitahabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Obotambe bwe chimbaba chionsi chi’abakerubi baria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ebere. Obotambe bw’orobaba oromo rw’omokerubi oyomo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano. Orwo rwaramboire rogaika enyasi y’enyomba. Na orobaba ronde rw’obotambe buna obwo rogakunana norobaba rw’omokerubi onde. 
2Chronicles3:12 Boigo ase omokerubi o kabere, orobaba oromo rw’obotambe bw’amaboko atano rwaramboire rogaika enyasi ende y’enyomba, na orobaba ronde rw’obotambe buna obwo rogakunana norobaba rw’omokerubi bwe ritang’ani." 
2Chronicles3:13 Chimbaba chi’abakerubi baria nigo chiaramboire chikaba nobotambe bw’amaboko emerongo ebere. Abakerubi abwo nigo bateneine namagoro abo, barigereretie gochia Aase Aachenu." 
2Chronicles3:14 Akaroisia etoto y’egetambaa korwa ase chiusi chire buru, ne chimonyinga, ne chimbariri, amo ne chiusi chi’egatani engiya, akayeroisia ebe nemegwekano y’abakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Bosio bw’enyomba akaroisia chisiiro ibere chire nobotambe gochia igoro bw’amaboko emerongo etato, na atano, na igoro ase kera eyemo akabeka egesure ki’obotambe bw’amaboko atano." 
2Chronicles3:16 Akaroisia ebinyuri, akabibeka igoro ase chisiiro chiria; akaroisia nemegwekano y’amakomomanga rigana erimo, akayebeka igoro ase ebinyuri biria." 
2Chronicles3:17 Agatenenia chisiiro chiria bosio bwe Hekalu, eyemo ensemo ya irianyi na eyende ensemo ya sugusu. Eria yarenge ensemo ya irianyi akayeroka Yakini, na eria yarenge ensemo ya sugusu akayeroka Boasi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Sulemani akaagacha egesasimero gi’etaai. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ebere, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo ebere, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro amaboko ikomi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Naende akaroisia egetuba ekenene mono korwa ase etaai enyititoire na kobombwa, ekaba egesingo. Ekerengo korwa ensemo eyemo goika eyende nigo kiarenge eki’amaboko ikomi. Obotambe gochia igoro nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano. Engori yaetananetigweo nigo yarenge ey’obotambe bw’amaboko emerongo etato." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ase rikere ri’egetuba keria kiarenge nobogare bw’amaboko ikomi emegwekano ye chiombe iyarengeo. Emegwekano eyio nigo yarenge ase chindwaro ibere, ekabombwa ekaba egento ekemo negetuba keria." 
2Chronicles4:4 Egetuba keria nigo kiabekereire igoro ase emegwekano ye chiombe ikomi na ibere; isato chikarigereria sugusu, na isato bosongo, na isato irianyi, na isato moocha. Egetuba keria nigo kiabegetwe igoro ase chirochio; chinsemo chiabo chia nyuma chikarigereria gochia gati‐gati, inse y’egetuba keria." 
2Chronicles4:5 Obonetu bw’etaai yaroiseretigwe egetuba keria nigo bwarenge buna obogare bw’egesanyi gi’okoboko, na omogo okaroisigwa buna oyo bw’egekombe, gose obw’egesicha. Egetuba keria nigo kiarenge kobekwa koira amache aisaine chilita chilifu emerongo etano nomo na isano na ibere, na amagana atano (67,500)." 
2Chronicles4:6 Boigo akaroisia ebituba bi’ogwesiberia, akabeka bitano ensemo ya irianyi, na bitano ensemo ya sugusu. Ime ase ebituba ebio nigo barenge gosiberia chinyama chi’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa; na abakuani barabwo nigo barenge gwesiberia ime ase egetuba keria ekenene." 
2Chronicles4:7 Naende akaroisia ebibekerero bie chitaya korwa ase chitahabu buna atebereretigwe, akabibeka ime ase Hekalu, bitano ensemo ya irianyi, na bitano ensemo ya sugusu." 
2Chronicles4:8 Naende akaroisia chimesa ikomi, agachibeka ime ase Hekalu isano ensemo ya borio, na isano ensemo ya bomosi; akaroisia ne chisani rigana erimo korwa ase chitahabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Akaroisia neraaro y’abakuani, na eraaro ende enene, akaroisia nebisieri bie chiraaro chiria, akabiooma ne chitaai." 
2Chronicles4:10 Akabeka egetuba keria ekenene ensemo ya borio gochia irianyi ya moocha. 
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu akaroisia chindogio na ebichiko, ne chisani. Naboigo Huramu agakoora emeremo aetwe na Sulemani akore ase enyomba ya Nyasae:" 
2Chronicles4:12 chisiiro ibere, na ebisure bibere biabegetwe igoro ye chisiiro chiria, na ebichanga bisisire biaetanaine bigatuba ebisure biatambeete gochia isiko, biria biabegetwe igoro ye chisiiro." 
2Chronicles4:13 Akaroisia nemegwekano y’amakomomanga amagana ane, ekabekwa ase ebichanga ebio, chindwaro ibere ase kera egesure kiarenge igoro ye chisiiro, erinde ebisure biria biatambeete gochia isiko bitubwe." 
2Chronicles4:14 Boigo akaroisia ebibekerero bi’ebituba amo nebituba biaterekereireo," 
2Chronicles4:15 na egetuba ekenene ekemo amo nemegwekano ye chiombe," 
2Chronicles4:16 ne chindogio, na ebichiko, ne chiuma, na ebikorero binde bionsi, Ebinto ebio bionsi Huramu‐Abu akabiroisia korwa ase chitaai chikomeka‐meka, buna Sulemani amotebetie akore ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles4:17 Ebinto ebio omoruoti akabiroisia korwa ase chitaai chinyititoire na kobombwa ime ase esike ebombire agwo ase egati ya Sukoti na Sereda, ase riranya ria Yorodan." 
2Chronicles4:18 Sulemani akaroisia ebinto ebi bionsi ebinge mono; ase igo oborito bwe chitaai chiria tibwarenge konyara korengeka na komanyekana buna bong’ana. 
2Chronicles4:19 Boigo Sulemani akaroisia ebinto binde biare kobekwa ase enyomba ya Nyasae: egesasimero gi’etahabu, ne chimesa ase emegati eyare koruegwa ase Nyasae yare kobekwa," 
2Chronicles4:20 na ebibekerero bie chitaya amo ne chitaya chiabo chiaroisetigwe korwa ase chitahabu chichenire chiarenge gwoka bosio bw’Aase Aachenu Mono, buna amang’ana achigetwe;" 
2Chronicles4:21 emegwekano y’ebisicha, ne chitaya, ne chigami biaroisetigwe korwa ase chitahabu chioka;" 
2Chronicles4:22 naboigo nebinachi, ne chisani, na ebitaabo bi’ogosambera ubani, ne chindogio chi’okorenta omorero; ebisieri bie Hekalu, ebio bi’Aase Aachenu Mono na ebi’Aase Aachenu biaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Emeremo yonsi Sulemani akorete ase enyomba y’Omonene ekaera. Erio Sulemani akarenta ime ase enyomba eria ebinto Daudi ise aatananete: Chifeta ne chitahabu, na ebikorero bionsi, akabigacha ime ase ebigachero bi’enyomba ya Nyasae." 
2Chronicles5:2 Sulemani agasangereria abagaaka b’Abaisraeli, na abatang’ani bonsi b’ebisaku biabo, na abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, agwo Yerusalemu, erinde bagende korenta Esanduku ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’Omonene, korwa ase Omochie o Daudi, noro Sayoni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Abasacha bonsi b’Abaisraeli bagasangererekana agwo ase omoruoti ekero kie Rituko Rinene ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere. 
2Chronicles5:4 Abagaaka bonsi bagacha, na Abalawi bakaimokia Esanduku eria," 
2Chronicles5:5 bakayerenta amo n’Eema y’Omosangererekano, na ebikorero ebichenu bionsi biarenge ime ase Eema eria; abakuani Abalawi nabwo babirentete." 
2Chronicles5:6 Omoruoti Sulemani amo nomoganda bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, baria basangererekanete asare, bagatenena bosio bw’Esanduku eria, bakaruera aroro ebing’wanso bie ching’ondi ne chiombe chinyinge mono chitarenge konyara kobareka." 
2Chronicles5:7 Bono abakuani baria bakarenta Esanduku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Ogotianania kw’Omonene, bakayesoyia aase aye, ase akanyomba ka ime agwo Aase Aachenu Mono, bakayebeka inse ye chimbaba chi’abakerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Abakerubi nigo baramborete chimbaba chiabo igoro y’aase aria Esanduku eria yarenge, bagatuba Esanduku eria amo nemiaro yaye yare kobogorerigwa." 
2Chronicles5:9 Emiaro eria nigo yarenge emetambe, goika chinsinyo chiabo chikarorekana korwa Aase Aachenu bosio bw’Aase Aachenu Mono, korende tiyarenge kororekana korwa isiko; ero nao ere goika rero." 
2Chronicles5:10 Egento kende ekeao tikiarenge ime ase Esanduku eria, otatiga chibao chiria ibere Musa abegete imeo agwo Horebu, aroro ase Omonene akorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania n’Abaisraeli, ekero barwete ase ense ya Misiri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Abakuani bonsi abarenge aroro ekero keria konya bechenire abanyene, nonya barenge b’ekeombe kende gionsi. Bono ekero abakuani bonsi basogete korwa ase Aase Aachenu," 
2Chronicles5:12 Abalawi bonsi abateri, nabwo Asafu, na Hemani, na Yedutuni, amo nabana babo abamura na abanto bamwabo babegete chianga chi’egatani engiya, babwate chisani barenge goakania na kwogia, na amakano, na amakano ’ebirigisa, bagatenena ensemo ya moocha y’egesasimero, amo nabakuani rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, ababugia ebirombeta." 
2Chronicles5:13 Nigo yarenge emeremo y’ababugia ebirombeta na abateri baigwekane bagoterera amo ase ogotogia Omonene na komoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono. Na amariogi ’amatera aimokereretigwe igoro, na ay’ebirombeta, na aye chisani chiarenge goakanigwa kwoga, na ay’ebinto binde biare kobugigwa, ekero baare gotogia Omonene, bagoteba, “Omonene nomuya, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe nigo bogendererete kare na kare.” Agwo enyomba y’Omonene egaichorwa ne riire," 
2Chronicles5:14 goika abakuani tibarenge konyara kogenderera nobokoreri bwabo ase engencho ye riire riria, ekiagera obonene bw’Omonene bwaichorete ase enyomba ya Nyasae." 
2Chronicles6:1 Erio Sulemani akabora: “Omonene otebire ng’a narigetie komenya ase omosunte ekerima. 
2Chronicles6:2 Bono nakoagacheire enyomba y’obonene, ebe obomenyo bwao aase oramenye kogenderera botambe.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Na omoruoti akeonchora, agasesenia omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli ekero oteneine," 
2Chronicles6:4 agateba, “Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli atogigwe, ere oyo oikeranirie nokoboko kwaye aya arierete Daudi tata eira nomonwa oye, agateba:" 
2Chronicles6:5 Korwa rituko riria nang’anyetie abanto baane korwa ase ense ya Misiri, tinachorete omochie onde bwonsi, ase egati y’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli, agwo ase nare koagacha enyomba, erinde erieta riane ribe aroro, naende tinachorete omonto nonya noyomo koba omonene igoro ase abanto baane Abaisraeli," 
2Chronicles6:6 korende bono nachorire Yerusalemu, erinde erieta riane ribeere aroro, naende nachorire Daudi agambere abanto baane Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles6:7 “Bono nigo kwarenge okogania gwa Daudi tata koagachera erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, enyomba." 
2Chronicles6:8 Korende Omonene akamotebia: Buna kwarengereretie koagachera erieta riane enyomba, nigo gwakorete buya kobeka amang’ana ayio ime ase enkoro yao." 
2Chronicles6:9 Korende nonya naboigo, aye tokonyara koagacha enyomba eyio otatiga omwana oo, omomura oria oraiborwe korwa ase enda yao, nere oraagachere erieta riane enyomba." 
2Chronicles6:10 “Bono Omonene oikeranirie eira ariete, ekiagera inche natenenire ribaga ria Daudi tata, naikaransire ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli, buna Omonene ariete eira, naende naagacheire erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, enyomba," 
2Chronicles6:11 na aroro agwo nabekire Esanduku eria ere ne chibao chirikire okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’Omonene, koria akorete n’Abaisraeli.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Erio Sulemani agatenena bosio bw’egesasimero ki’Omonene ase obosio bw’omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, akarambora amaboko aye." 
2Chronicles6:13 Sulemani konya oroisirie egetenenero korwa ase etaai; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano, na obogare bwaye amaboko atano, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro amaboko atano, na konya okebekire gati y’eraaro enene; agatenena igoro ase kerokio. Erio agatung’ama namaru aye bosio bw’omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abaisraeli, akarambora amaboko aye gochia igoro," 
2Chronicles6:14 agakwana, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, enyasae ende teri ekogwekaine, igoro gose inse aa ase ense, aye bweka nigo okorenda okobwatana kw’ogotianania, naende nigo okoorokia obwanchani bwao botari koera ase abasomba bao, baria bare abegenwa asore ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi." 
2Chronicles6:15 Aye gwaikeranirie eira eria kwarierete omosomba oo Daudi tata. Aria gwakwanete nomonwa oo, kwayaikeranirie nokoboko kwao rituko ria rero." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ase ayio aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, bono kora aya kwarierete omosomba oo Daudi tata eira, ogateba: Takoborwa nonya ng’ake omonto korwa ase ororeria rwao oraikaranse ase obosio bwane, ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti ki’Abaisraeli, onye rioka abana bao bagochia korenda chinchera chiabo, erinde babwatie ogochika kwane, buna aye kwabeire gokobwatia ogochika okwo ase obosio bwane." 
2Chronicles6:17 Ase ayio, aye Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, tiga ring’ana riao riria gwatebetie omosomba oo Daudi ribe eri’ekeene." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Korende, Inee, nekeene ng’a aye Nyasae nonyare komenya amo na mwanyabanto aiga ase ense? Rora igoro, na igoro aare mono, takogoisana komenya; naki rende enyomba eye nakoagacheire eragoisane?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Korende aye Omonene, Nyasae one, koranche oigwe ogosaba kwane, inche omosomba oo, na okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo; oigwe ekerero na ogosaba oko inche, omosomba oo, nkogosaba." 
2Chronicles6:20 Tiga amaiso ao abe akorigereria enyomba eye omobaso na obotuko, arigererie aase aiga aye kwarire eira kobeka erieta riao, erinde oigwe ogosaba oko inche omosomba oo ngosaba ndigereretie aase aiga." 
2Chronicles6:21 Naende aye oigwe okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo, inche omosomba oo, na okw’abanto bao Abaisraeli ekero bagosaba barigereretie aase aiga. Ee, oigwe aye korwa igoro agwo ase obomenyo bwao bore, na ekero okoigwa bwabere." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Omonto karakorere omonto onde bobe, na aborigwe koria emuma, erio achiche arie emuma eria bosio bw’egesasimero kiao ase enyomba eye," 
2Chronicles6:23 aye oigwe korwa agwo igoro, okore buna oranche gokora, onachere abasomba bao ekina. Tiga oria ore omomochi abogorie egesusuro gi’okomocha kwaye, na oria ore omoronge aegwe oboronge bwaye." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Onye abanto bao Abaisraeli babuirwe nababisa babo, ekiagera bakorire ebibe asore, korende bagokoiranera naende na gotogia erieta riao, na ase enyomba eye bakogosaba na gokoboria ase oboitongo," 
2Chronicles6:25 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro. Bwabere ebibe bi’abanto bao Abaisraeli, naende obarente gocha ase ense eye kwaete chisokoro chiabo." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Ekero igoro erabe yasiekirwe na embura tetwa, ekiagera bakorire ebibe asore, kobarasabe barigereretie aase aiga, naende batogie erieta riao na baonchoke batige ebibe biabo, ekero aye orabae egesusuro," 
2Chronicles6:27 rirorio aye oigwe korwa agwo igoro. Bwabere ebibe bi’abasomba bao Abaisraeli, oborokererie enchera engiya bagwenerete kobwatia. Naende orente embura igoro ase ense yao, eye kwaeire abanto bao yabeire omwando obo." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Kerabe enchara yachire ase ense, gose oborwaire obobe bogoita, gose oborwaire bw’enyagetabo ase chindagera, gose obw’ogochirigisia, gose chingige, gose amakonde, gose ababisa bakoboera ase omochie onde bwonsi ase emechie yabo, gose obobe bonde bwonsi borache, gose oborwaire bonde bwonsi;" 
2Chronicles6:29 omonto onde bwensi, gose abanto bao bonsi Abaisraeli kobaragosabe ase oboitongo, kera oyomo omanyete emechando ere ase enkoro yaye, na oboroso bwaye, na arambore amaboko aye gochia ase enyomba eye;" 
2Chronicles6:30 rirorio obaigwe korwa agwo aase obomenyo bwao bore. Bwabere, okore ogokora kwao, okorere kera oyomo koreng’ana nogokora kwaye gwonsi, ekiagera naye bweka omanyete chinkoro chia mwanyabanto." 
2Chronicles6:31 Igo banyare gokoiroka na kobwatia chinchera chiao chionsi ase amatuko onsi bamenyete ase ense eye kwaete chisokoro chiaito. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Boigo ekero omogeni, oria otari bw’abanto bao Abaisraeli, arabe okorwa ase ense y’aare ekiagera aigure igoro y’erieta riao rinene na igoro y’okoboko kwao ne chinguru koramboire, ekero nere arache asabe origereretie enyomba eye," 
2Chronicles6:33 oigwe korwa igoro agwo aase obomenyo bwao bore. Okorere omogeni oria amang’ana onsi arakoborie, erinde abanto bonsi b’ense barimanye erieta riao, naende bakoiroke, buna abanto bao Abaisraeli bakomanyete na gokoiroka, naende bamanye ng’a enyomba eye naagachire nigo ekorokwa ase erieta riao." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Abanto bao kobaragende korwania ababisa babo ase enchera ende yonsi aye orabatome gochia, na kobaragosabe aye Omonene barigereretie omochie oyio gwachorire, na enyomba eye naagacheire erieta riao," 
2Chronicles6:35 rirorio oigwe korwa agwo igoro ogosaba kwabo na okoboria kwabo kw’oboitongo, na obae oboronge bwabo." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Omonto tari otagokora ebibe. Ase igo baise kogokorera ebibe, na aye korabe nendamwamu asebare na obabeke ase amaboko ’ababisa babo bairwe ase ense eng’ao, ere aare gose ang’e;" 
2Chronicles6:37 kobararore okomocha kwabo ekero bare ase ense eria boosirwe gochia, kobareitie baonchoke, naende bakogosaba ase oboitongo na koorokia ng’a bakorire ebibe na obokayayu;" 
2Chronicles6:38 onye bagweitia na koonchoka ase ebirengererio biabo bionsi na ase chinkoro chiabo chionsi, ekero bare ase ense eria ase boosetwe gochia, na aroro agwo bagosabe barigereretie gochia ase ense yabo, eria kwaete chisokoro chiabo, na barigererie omochie oyo gwachorire na enyomba eye naagachire ase ogosasima erieta riao," 
2Chronicles6:39 rirorio oigwe korwa aase agwo igoro, ase obomenyo bwao bore, ogosaba kwabo na okoboria kwabo kw’oboitongo, obae oboronge bwabo na bwabere abanto bao abakorire ebibe asore." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Bono, aye Nyasae one, tiga amaiso ao arigererie na amato ao aigwe ayio onsi asabirwe aase aiga." 
2Chronicles6:41 Na bono, aye Omonene Nyasae, imoka ogende goika aase ao ase ogotimokera, aye amo n’Esanduku eria y’okobua kwao. Omonene Nyasae, tiga abakuani bao basiberanigwe nogotooreka; na abachenu bao tiga bagokere obuya bwao." 
2Chronicles6:42 Aye Omonene Nyasae, torusia obosio bwao korwa ase omoakwa amaguta oo! Inyora obwanchani bwao botari koera ase omosomba oo Daudi.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Ekero Sulemani akoorete ogosaba kwaye, omorero ogacha korwa igoro ogasamba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde, na obonene bw’Omonene bogaichora ase Hekalu ime." 
2Chronicles7:2 Abakuani tibarenge konyara gosoa ase enyomba y’Omonene, ekiagera obonene bw’Omonene bwaichorete ase enyomba eria y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles7:3 Ekero Abaisraeli bonsi baroche omorero orwete igoro, na baroche obonene bw’Omonene igoro ye Hekalu, bagatung’ama bakaumama gochia inse, bagasasima Omonene na komoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, bagateba, “Omonene nomuya, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe nigo bogendererete kare na kare.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Erio omoruoti amo nabanto bonsi bakarua ebing’wanso ase obosio bw’Omonene. 
2Chronicles7:5 Sulemani omoruoti akarua ebing’wanso, chiombe chilifu emerongo ebere na ibere (22,000), ne ching’ondi chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo ebere (120,000). Naboigo omoruoti amo nabanto bonsi bagaatanana enyomba ya Nyasae ekaba enchenu." 
2Chronicles7:6 Abakuaani bagatenena ase emeremo yabo y’obokuani, na Abalawi barengeo babwate ebinto bi’okobugigwa ase ogoterera Omonene, ebinto biria Daudi omoruoti konya aroisirie ase okoiraneria Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe nigo bogendererete kare na kare. Daudi nigo ababegete babe bagotera ogotera kw’ogotogia. Abakuani bakaba bakobugia ebirombeta, ekero Abaisraeli bonsi bateneine." 
2Chronicles7:7 Sulemani agaatanana na gochena obogati‐gati bw’eraaro eria yarenge bosio bw’enyomba y’Omonene. Agwo nao aruerete ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, na ebitinya bi’ebing’wanso bi’omorembe, ekiagera egesasimero gi’etaai keria Sulemani aroisetie tikiarenge konyara goisana ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na okoruegwa kw’endagera na ebitinya." 
2Chronicles7:8 Ase engaki eria Sulemani amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi mbabwate Amatuko Amanene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. Omosangererekano oyio omonene ogasangerereka gochakera korwa egesoero kia Hamati goikeera akarooche ka Misiri. 
2Chronicles7:9 Na ase rituko ria gatano na gatato bakaba nomosangererekano bw’ogosasima, ekiagera konya babeire barendete amatuko atano na abere ay’ogwatanana egesasimero, amo n’Amatuko Amanene atano na abere." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na gatato ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere agatiga abanto bakagenda ase chinka chiabo bare nomochengo na omogoko ase chinkoro chiabo, ase engencho y’obuya boria Omonene aorogetie ase Daudi na ase Sulemani, na ase Abaisraeli, abanto baye." 
2Chronicles7:11 Sulemani agakoora koagacha enyomba y’Omonene, na enyomba y’omoruoti, na ebio bionsi Sulemani aroberetie gokora ase enyomba y’Omonene na ase enyomba yaye omonyene; akabiikerania na kobikoora buya." 
2Chronicles7:12 Erio Omonene akaorokera Sulemani ase obotuko, akamotebia, “Naigure ogosaba kwao, nechoreire aase aiga abe enyomba y’okoruerwa kw’ebing’wanso." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ekero ndasieke igoro, erinde ntange embura tetwa, gose nchike chingige chisarie ense, gose ntome oborwaire bogoita ase egati y’abanto baane," 
2Chronicles7:14 na kerabe abanto baane, baria bakorokwa ase erieta riane, bekanyire abanyene babe abaitongo, basabe na korigia obosio bwane, na baonchoke batige chinchera chiabo chimbe, rirorio ninyigwe korwa aiga igoro, mbaabere ebibe biabo, naende ngwenie ense yabo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Bono amaiso aane narigererie, na amato aane nategerere aigwe ogosaba kogosabwa aase aiga." 
2Chronicles7:16 Bono nachorire na gwatanana enyomba eye, erinde erieta riane ribeere aroro kogenderera botambe. Amaiso aane na enkoro yane mbibe aroro ase chingaki chionsi." 
2Chronicles7:17 Aye korataare ase obosio bwane, buna Daudi iso ataarete, na korakore onsi aya nagochikire na kobwata emeroberio yane yonsi echikire," 
2Chronicles7:18 rirorio ninkore ekerogo kiao ki’oboruoti kebe ne chinguru, buna nakorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania na Daudi iso, nkamotebia: Omonto takobora korwa asore, oyio oragambere Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles7:19 Korende komoratige emeroberio yane echikire na amachiko aane, ayio nabekire ase amasio aino, naende mobe mogokorera chinyasae chinde na gochisasima;" 
2Chronicles7:20 rirorio nimbarusie korwa ase ense eye nabaeire; na enyomba eye naatananire na koyechena ase engencho y’erieta riane ninyetugute erue ase amaiso aane, naende ebe ring’ana rigokwanwa bobe nabanto b’ebisaku bionsi." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Enyomba eye ere nogosikwa na obonene, korende ekero ekio kera omonto orabe ogoeta naichanigwe na gokumia, naende aborie: Nase ki Omonene akorire aya ase ense eye, na ase enyomba eye?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Erio nairanerigwe: Nekiagera batigete Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, oria obarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Nigo babwatanete ne chinyasae ching’ao, bagachisasima na gochikorera; ayio naro agerire Omonene arentire amabe aya onsi igoro asebare.”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Ase omoerio bw’emiaka emerongo ebere, eria Sulemani airete ase okoagacha enyomba y’Omonene na enyomba yaye omonyene," 
2Chronicles8:2 akaagacha naende emechie eria Huramu amoete, erio akabeka Abaisraeli aroro bayemenye." 
2Chronicles8:3 Erio Sulemani akagenda koira orogongo rwa Hamati na Soba," 
2Chronicles8:4 akaagacha Tadimori agwo ase erooro, amo nemechie yonsi ase baare koagacha ebinto agwo Hamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Boigo naende akaagacha Beti‐Horoni ya rogoro, na Beti‐Horoni ya maate, akayegitera chindwaki na koyeroiseria ebiita amo nemekorogoto," 
2Chronicles8:6 akaagacha na Baalati na emechie yaye yonsi ase ebinto biarenge kogachwa, na emechie yonsi ye chigari chiaye, na eye chibarasi chiaye chikoriinwa, na amaagacho ande onsi Sulemani aganetie koagacha agwo Yerusalemu na Lebanoni, na aande onsi ase obogambi bwaye." 
2Chronicles8:7 Abanto Sulemani abetereretie gokora emeremo nigo barenge abe chinderia chi’abanto b’ense ya Kanani, abwo Abaisraeli batanyarete kobua na gosiria. Abanto abwo tibarenge Abaisraeli. Nigo barenge Abahiti, na Abaamori, na Abaperisi, na Abahivi, na Abayebusi. Abanto abwo bakagenderera koba abasomba, nabo bare goika rero iga." 
2Chronicles8:8  
2Chronicles8:9 Korende Sulemani takorete Abaisraeli babe abasomba ase okomokorera emeremo. Barabwo nigo babete abarwani esegi, na abanene b’oboruoti, na abachiki baye be chigari ne chibarasi chikoriinwa." 
2Chronicles8:10 Abateneneri abanene b’omoruoti Sulemani nigo barenge abanto amagana abere na emerongo etano; abwo nigo barenge kogambera abakori emeremo. 
2Chronicles8:11 Sulemani akang’anyia mokaye, mosubati o Farao, korwa ase Omochie o Daudi gochia ase enyomba eria amoagacherete, ekiagera nigo atebete, “Omokungu oyo takomenya ase enyomba ya Daudi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, ekiagera aase agwo ase Esanduku y’Omonene yarentirwe naachenu.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Erio Sulemani akarua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase Omonene igoro ase egesasimero ki’Omonene, keria aagachete agwo ang’e nenyomba yaagachetwe bosio bwe Hekalu ekabwateranigwa nero." 
2Chronicles8:13 Akabirua buna Musa achigete biruegwe ase kera Rituko Richenu: Chisabato, na Emetienyi Emeyia, na Amatuko Amanene ara gatato ase omwaka: Amatuko Amanene ay’Emegati etabekiri memera, na Amatuko Amanene e Chichuma, na Amatuko Amanene ay’Ebigutu." 
2Chronicles8:14 Akabwatia omoroberio o Daudi ise, akabeka ebiombe bi’abakuani ase ogokora emeremo yabo, na Abalawi ase emeremo yabo y’ogokonya abakuani na ase ogotera amatera ’ogotogia, na emeremo ende buna yaganeirie kera rituko. Boigo akabeka ebiombe bi’abarendi b’ebiita gokora emeremo yabo ase kera egeita buna yaganeirie kera rituko, buna Daudi, omonto oria o Nyasae, achigete ekorwe." 
2Chronicles8:15 Amang’ana onsi omoruoti achigete abakuani na Abalawi nigo aikeranetigwe kegima ase kera ring’ana rinde rionsi amo nerie chimonga. 
2Chronicles8:16 Bono emeremo yonsi Sulemani akorete ase enyomba y’Omonene, korwa okobekwa kw’oboroso goika ogoikeranigwa kw’oboagacho, ekaera. Igo enyomba y’Omonene ekaba eikeranete." 
2Chronicles8:17 Nyuma y’ayio Sulemani akagenda agwo Esioni‐Geberi na Eloti ase engegu y’enyancha, ase ense ya Edomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Huramu akamotomera chimeeri chiarenge kogendigwa nabagendia baye, amo nabanto bande bamanyete emeremo y’enyancha. Barabwo bakagenda goika Ofiri amo nabasomba ba Sulemani, bakarenta korwa aroro chitahabu chitalanta amagana ane, na emerongo etano, bakayeirera Sulemani omoruoti." 
2Chronicles9:1 Ekero eting’ana ya Seba aigwete chinkuma chia Sulemani, agacha Yerusalemu komoteema ase okomoboria amang’ana amakong’u, agacha amo nabasomba baye abange ne chingamia chiabogoretie ebinsari, ne chitahabu chinyinge, na amagena e rigori rinene. Na ekero aigete ase Sulemani, akamotebia amang’ana onsi arenge ase ebirengererio biaye." 
2Chronicles9:2 Sulemani akamoiraneria amaborio aye onsi; nonya ne ring’ana erimo tiriabisekanete ase Sulemani; nigo amanyete onsi na komoyorokia. 
2Chronicles9:3 Na ekero eting’ana ya Seba yaroche obong’aini bwonsi bwa Sulemani, na enyomba eria aagachete," 
2Chronicles9:4 na endagera yarenge korentwa ase emesa yaye, na akarora buna abakonyi baye bamenyete aroro, na buna abasomba baye baare komokorera, ne chianga babegete, na ababogoria ebikombe baye, ne chianga babegete, na ebing’wanso biaye bi’ogosambwa aruete ase enyomba y’Omonene, agakumia na koumaata." 
2Chronicles9:5 Eting’ana eria egatebia omoruoti, “Chinkuma nabeire nkoigwa ekero narenge ase ense yane igoro y’emeremo yao, na obong’aini bwao, nechi’ekeene kegima." 
2Chronicles9:6 Korende tinegenete amang’ana ayio, goika ekero nachire aa na neroreire namaiso aane inche omonyene. Bono narorire ng’a tinatebetigwe nonya nekeng’ese ki’obonge bw’obong’aini bwao. Nigo bwaetanirie amang’ana konya nkoigwa." 
2Chronicles9:7 Abanto bao, na abasomba bao, abagotenena botambe ase obosio bwao, na koigwa obong’aini bwao, mbare negesio ekenene." 
2Chronicles9:8 Omonene, Nyasae oo, atogigwe, oria ogokigwe asore na gokobeka ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, obe omoruoti ase obosio bwaye, ere Omonene, Nyasae oo! Ekiagera ere anchete Abaisraeli botambe, na akabakong’ia bakaba ne chinguru kare na kare, ogokorire aye koba omoruoti igoro asebare, erinde onyare konacha ayare ay’ekeene na oboronge.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Erio eting’ana eria ekaa omoruoti ebiegwa ebio arentete: Chitahabu ang’e chikiro chilifu isano (5,000), na ebinsari ebinge mono, na amagena e rigori rinene. Ebinsari binde tibiarentetwe ekero kende gionsi bireng’aine na biria eting’ana ya Seba yarenterete omoruoti Sulemani." 
2Chronicles9:10 Abasomba ba Huramu na abasomba ba Sulemani, baria barentete chitahabu korwa Ofiri, bakarenta boigo korwa aroro chibao chi’emete ekorokwa alugumu, amo namagena e rigori rinene." 
2Chronicles9:11 Korwa ase chibao chi’alugumu omoruoti akaroisia ebiriinero bi’enyomba y’Omonene, na ebi’enyomba y’omoruoti, naende akaroisia amakano, na amakano ’ebirigisa akobugigwa nabateri. Ebinto buna ebio tibiana‐kororekana naende nonya ng’ake ase ense y’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Omoruoti Sulemani akaa eting’ana ya Seba ebinto bionsi aganetie, na ebio asabete aegwe, goetania ekerengo ki’ebio ere arenterete omoruoti. Erio eting’ana eria akairana, akagenda ase ense yaye amo nabasomba baye." 
2Chronicles9:13 Chitahabu chiare korentwa ase Sulemani kera omwaka nigo chiarenge goetania chikiro chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000)." 
2Chronicles9:14 Boigo chitahabu chikaba chikorentwa nabaonchoreria b’ebinto, na baria barenge korenta ebinto korwa ase chinse chia isiko, naende chikarentwa nabaruoti b’Arabia na abagambi bande abarenge goakana ebango ase omoruoti." 
2Chronicles9:15 Omoruoti Sulemani akagoncha ching’aya amagana abere, agachiooma ne chitahabu chisunyuntire, na kera eng’aya ekaira etahabu esunyuntire ang’e chikiro isano na ibere." 
2Chronicles9:16 Naende akagoncha chinguba chinke amagana atato, agachioma ne chitahabu chisunyuntire, na kera enguba ekaira etahabu ang’e chikiro inye. Omoruoti agachibeka ime ase enyomba ekarokwa Enyomba ye Rinani ria Lebanoni." 
2Chronicles9:17 Omoruoti akaroisia ekerogo ekenene ki’oboruoti, akagechabera amaino e chinchogu, na agakeooma netahabu echenire." 
2Chronicles9:18 Ekerogo keria ki’oboruoti nigo kiabwate ekeriinero kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na ekemo, na egeteni ki’amagoro kiaroisirie korwa ase etahabu; bionsi nigo biabwatanirie nekerogo keria. Kera ensemo y’ekerogo mbiarengeo ebisiirero ase arenge gotoorera amaboko, na emegwekano ye chindo ebere yatenenirieo, oyomo ase kera ensemo." 
2Chronicles9:19 Na emegwekano ye chindo ikomi na ibere yatenenirie aroro, oyomo ase kera ensemo ya kera ekeriinero. Omogwekano bw’ekerogo ekio tona koroisigwa ase obogambi bonde bwonsi." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ebikombe bionsi bi’okonywera bi’omoruoti Sulemani nigo biarenge ebie chitahabu, na ebikorero bionsi bi’enyomba ye Rinani ria Lebanoni nigo biarenge bie chitahabu chichenire. Ase amatuko a Sulemani chifeta tichiabarire ng’a negento kie rigori rinene." 
2Chronicles9:21 Chimeeri chi’omoruoti nigo chiarenge kogenda Tarisisi chibogoretie abasomba ba Huramu. Ara rimo ase emiaka etato chimeeri chia Tarisisi nigo chiarenge gocha korenta chitahabu, ne chifeta, na amaino e chinchogu, naende chikaba chikorenta chingoge ne chinyoni chikorokwa tausi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Ase igo omoruoti Sulemani akaba omonene kobua abaruoti bonsi b’ense, ase obonda na obong’aini." 
2Chronicles9:23 Abaruoti bonsi b’ense bagacha ase Sulemani, erinde baigwe obong’aini bwaye boria Nyasae abegete ime yaye." 
2Chronicles9:24 Kera oyomo obo akaba okorenta ebiegwa biaye: ebinto bie chifeta na ebie chitahabu, ne chianga, na ebirwanero, na ebinsari, amo ne chibarasi ne chiyombo. Naboigo ekaba omwaka ase omwaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Sulemani nigo abwate ameeri chilifu inye (4,000) aye chibarasi, ne chigari, ne chibarasi chiare koriinwa chilifu ikomi na ibere (12,000). Echinde ase echio nigo chiabegetwe ase emechie ye chigari, na echinde ase omoruoti amenyete agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles9:26 Akagambera abaruoti bonsi babegetwe kogamba korwa orooche rw’Eufarati goika ase ense y’Abafilisti, na goika orobebe rw’Abamisiri." 
2Chronicles9:27 Omoruoti akarenta chifeta chinyinge agwo Yerusalemu, chikabucha buna amagena, ne chibao chi’emecharake nigo chiarenge chinyinge buna echi’emeko yarenge ase ense omweya." 
2Chronicles9:28 Chibarasi chikarentwa ase Sulemani korwa Misiri na korwa ase chinse chionsi. 
2Chronicles9:29 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Sulemani akorete, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire ase amariko a Nathani omobani, na ase obobani bw’Ahiya korwa Silo, na ase oborori bwa Ido omorori igoro ya Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati." 
2Chronicles9:30 Sulemani akagamba agwo Yerusalemu igoro y’Abaisraeli bonsi ase emiaka emerongo ene. 
2Chronicles9:31 Erio Sulemani akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase Omochie o Daudi ise, na Rehoboamu, omwana oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboamu akagenda Sekemu, ekiagera Abaisraeli bonsi konya bachiire aroro komobeka abe omoruoti." 
2Chronicles10:2 Na ekero Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, aigwete amang’ana ayio, akairana korwa Misiri aaria ase atamete gochia kwebisa korwa ase omoruoti Sulemani." 
2Chronicles10:3 Abanto bakarangeria Yeroboamu; ere amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bakagenda, bagakwana na Rehoboamu, bakamotebia," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Iso nigo akorete rikorogoto riaito rikaba ririto. Ase ayio bono aye orikore ribe rigusu, bwororobie emeremo eria emekong’u iso atobekerete, naintwe ntogokorere.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rehoboamu akabatebia, “Genda moirane aa asende naende nyuma y’amatuko atato.” Ase ayio bakagenda." 
2Chronicles10:6 Erio omoruoti Rehoboamu akaboria ogosemigwa korwa ase abagaaka baria barenge gosemia Sulemani ise, ekero arenge moyo, akababoria, “Ngosemia ki morang’e erinde ing’iranerie abanto aba?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Abagaaka baria bakamoiraneria, “Korabe omwororo ase abanto aba na kobagwenera, naende okwane amang’ana amaya asebare, barabwo nababe bakogokorera botambe.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Korende Rehoboamu akaanga ogosemia kw’abagaaka baria, akarigia ogosemigwa korwa ase abamura b’ekegori kiaye, abwo barenge komokorera." 
2Chronicles10:9 Akababoria, “Ngosemia ki morang’e? Ninki ndairanerie abanto aba bamboretie ng’a nyororobie rikorogoto riria tata ababekerete?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Abamura baria b’ekegori kiaye bakamotebia, “Aya naro oratebie abanto abwo bakoboretie ng’a bwororobie rikorogoto riria iso akorete ririto: Ekiara gi’okoboko kwane nigo kere ekenetu kobua ekenema gia tata." 
2Chronicles10:11 Na bono rikorogoto riria rikong’u tata ababekerete, inche nigo ndarimente ribe ririto goetania. Tata nigo arenge kobang’wania ebiranya, korende inche nigo ndabang’wanie ne chinkini chichomire chibonyi chinyoge chinga amagwa.”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Yeroboamu amo nabanto bonsi bagacha ase Rehoboamu omoruoti rituko ria gatato buna abatebetie bakore. 
2Chronicles10:13 Omoruoti akabairaneria amang’ana amatindi akaanga ogosemia kw’abagaaka baria. 
2Chronicles10:14 Agakwana nabarabwo buna abamura baria bamosemetie, agateba, “Tata nigo akorete rikorogoto riaino rikaba ririto, korende inche nimbamentere ribe ririto goetania. Tata nigo arenge kobang’wania ebiranya, korende inche nigo ndabang’wanie ne chinkini chichomire chibonyi chinyoge chinga amagwa.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Ase ayio omoruoti taigwerete amang’ana ’abanto. Ayio nigo akorekanete na Nyasae, erinde Omonene anyare goikerania ring’ana riria akwanete ase Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, goetera ase Ahiya, omobani oria korwa Silo." 
2Chronicles10:16 Ekero Abaisraeli bonsi baroche ng’a omoruoti nigo angete kobaigwera, bakamoiraneria, bagateba, “Ngetari ki intwe tobwate ase Daudi? Titori nomwando na mosinto o Yese. Inwe Abaisraeli, genda kera omonto bwoye! Inwe abanto ba Daudi, erende inwe abanyene!” Ase igo Abaisraeli bonsi bakarua aroro agwo, bakagenda ase chinka chiabo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Rehoboamu agatigwa okogambera Abaisraeli baria bamenyete ase emechie y’Abayuda boka. 
2Chronicles10:18 Erio omoruoti Rehoboamu agatoma Hadoramu, oria otenenerete emeremo y’okobetererigwa, korende Abaisraeli bakamoaka amagena agakwa. Na Rehoboamu akaimoka bwango, akariina egari yaye, agatama gochia Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Ase ayio Abaisraeli babeire bakwanga koigwera enyomba ya Daudi, goika rero iga." 
2Chronicles11:1 Ekero Rehoboamu achete Yerusalemu, agasangereria abanto b’enyomba ya Yuda, na ab’eya Benjamin, abanto chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na etato (180,000), abamanyete korwana esegi, ng’a bagende korwania Abaisraeli bairanie oboruoti ase Rehoboamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Korende ring’ana ria Nyasae rigacha ase Semaya, omonto o Nyasae, rigateba," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Tebia Rehoboamu, mosinto o Sulemani, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, otebie n’Abaisraeli bonsi bare ase orogongo rwa Yuda na orwa Benjamin ng’a" 
2Chronicles11:4 aya naro Omonene atebire: Inwe timogenda korwania abanto bamino. Irana kera omonto nka bwoye, ekiagera aya akorekire nigo akorirwe nainche.” Ase ayio abanto bakaigwera ring’ana ri’Omonene, bakairana, tibagenda korwania Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboamu akamenya Yerusalemu, na akaagacha emechie y’ogwekengera agwo Yuda." 
2Chronicles11:6 Akaagacha Bethlehemu, na Etamu, na Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 na Beti‐Suri, na Soko, na Adulamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 na Gati, na Maresa, na Sifu," 
2Chronicles11:9 na Adoraimu, na Lakisi, na Aseka," 
2Chronicles11:10 na Sora, na Ayaloni, na Heburoni, emechie eyio egiteire chindwaki ere ase orogongo rwa Yuda na orwa Benjamin." 
2Chronicles11:11 Akaagacha chiburi chiabo chikaba chinkong’u, akabeka abateneneri imeo, na akagacha chindagera na amaguta ’emezeituni aroro." 
2Chronicles11:12 Akabeka chinguba na amatimo ase emechie eyio yonsi, na akayekora ekaba emekong’u mono. Ase enchera eyio akagenderera kogambera Abayuda na Ababenjamin." 
2Chronicles11:13 Abakuani na Abalawi bagacha korwa ase ense y’Abaisraeli ase bamenyete, bakabwatana na Rehoboamu." 
2Chronicles11:14 Abalawi bagatiga amarisio abo, ne chinka chiabo, bakagenda ase ense y’Abayuda na Yerusalemu, ekiagera Yeroboamu amo nabamura baye nigo babaseretie korwa ase obokoreri bwabo bw’obokuani bw’Omonene."
