2Chronicles11:15 Agachora abakuani baye b’aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, na ab’ebirecha, na ab’emegwekano ye chimori chiria aroisetie." 
2Chronicles11:16 Abanto korwa ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, baria baruete chinkoro chiabo komorigia Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, bagatunyana Abalawi gochia Yerusalemu, bakarua ebing’wanso ase Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Bagakora oboruoti bw’Abayuda bokaba obokong’u, na ase engaki y’emiaka etato bakabeka Rehoboamu, mosinto o Sulemani, chinguru, ekiagera babwatetie chinchera chia Daudi na Sulemani ase emiaka eria etato." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboamu akanyuoma Mahalati, omoiseke o Yerimoti, mosinto o Daudi; ngina Mahalati nere Abihaili, omosubati bw’Eliabu, mosinto o Yese." 
2Chronicles11:19 Omokungu oria akaiborera Rehoboamu abana abamura: Yeusi, na Semaria, na Sahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Naende Rehoboamu akanyuoma Maaka, omoiseke bw’Abisalomu, nere akamoiborera Abiya, na Atai, na Sisa, na Selomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboamu agancha Maaka, mosubati bw’Abisalomu goetania abakungu baye bonsi abanyuome, na abwo ba sere‐sere. (Nigo abwate abakungu abanyuome ikomi na batano na batato, na abakungu ba sere‐sere emerongo etano nomo; nabwate abana abamura emerongo ebere na batano na batato, na abana abaiseke emerongo etano nomo.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehoboamu agachora Abiya, omwana omomura o Maaka, akaba omotang’ani ase abamwabo, ekiagera nigo aganetie komobeka abe omoruoti." 
2Chronicles11:23 Korende akaba omong’aini, akabeka abamura baye bande bakaba abateneneri ase chingongo chionsi chi’Abayuda na echi’Ababenjamin, na ase emechie yonsi yagiteire chindwaki; akabaa endagera na ebinto binde ase obonge, naende akabanyuomeria abakungu abange." 
2Chronicles12:1 Ekero obogambi bwa Rehoboamu bwanyorete chinguru, na ere omonyene abeire nokobua, agatiga amachiko ’Omonene, ere amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi." 
2Chronicles12:2 Ekiagera batabete abegenwa ase Omonene, Sisaki, omoruoti o Misiri, agacha akarwania Yerusalemu ase omwaka o gatano bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Rehoboamu." 
2Chronicles12:3 Sisaki agacha ne chigari elifu eyemo, na amagana abere (1,200), na abariini chibarasi chilifu emerongo etano nomo (60,000). Abanto bachete amo nere korwa Misiri, na Libia, na Suki, na Etiopia, nigo barenge abange batarenge kobareka." 
2Chronicles12:4 Sisaki akaira emechie eria y’Abayuda yagiteire chindwaki, agaikera Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Erio Semaya omobani akagenda ase Rehoboamu, na ase abanene b’Abayuda abwo basangererekanete agwo Yerusalemu ase okwoboa Sisaki, akabatebia, “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Inwe mwantigire inche, ase ayio nainche nabatigire inwe, nababekire ase okoboko gwa Sisaki.”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Erio abanene b’Abaisraeli, amo nomoruoti, bagekeyia bakaba abaitongo, bagateba, “Omonene nere omonyene oboronge.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Ekero Omonene aroche ng’a bekeeirie babeire abaitongo, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Semaya, rigoteba: “Bono barabwo bekeeirie babeire abaitongo; ase ayio tinkobasiria, korende nyuma y’engaki enke nimbaboorie, tingoitera endamwamu yane igoro ase Yerusalemu goetera ase okoboko gwa Sisaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Korende nonya naboigo, nimbakore babe abasomba baye, erio nario baranyare komanya ogwatananekana kore egati ase ogonkorera inche na ogokorera abaruoti be chinse.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Sisaki, omoruoti o Misiri, akagenda akarwania Yerusalemu, akaira chinibo chi’enyomba y’Omonene na echi’enyomba y’omoruoti; akaira kera egento. Boigo akaira chinguba chi’etahabu chiria Sulemani agonchete." 
2Chronicles12:10 Erio Rehoboamu omoruoti akagoncha chinguba chie chitaai ribaga rie chinguba chiria chie chitahabu, agachibeka chirendwe nabanene b’abarendi, baria barenge korenda egesieri ki’enyomba y’omoruoti." 
2Chronicles12:11 Botambe ekero omoruoti abete ogosoa enyomba y’Omonene, abarendi nigo barenge gochibogoria, naende bachiirania ase enyomba y’oborendi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ekiagera omoruoti ekeetie na akaba omoitongo, endamwamu y’Omonene ekamotiga, erinde tebaisa komosiria kegima; ase igo amang’ana akaba amaya ase Abayuda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Rehoboamu omoruoti akenyorera chinguru chi’okogamba agwo Yerusalemu. Nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ene nomo, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka ikomi na etano na ebere, agwo Yerusalemu, omochie oria Omonene achorete korwa ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, erinde erieta riaye ribeere aroro. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Naama, omosubati bw’Abaamoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Rehoboamu agakora ayare amabe, ekiagera tarwete enkoro yaye ase okomorigia Omonene." 
2Chronicles12:15 Bono amang’ana onsi igoro ya Rehoboamu, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire ase amariko a Semaya omobani, na ase aya Ido omorori, buna amang’ana e chinderia arikire. Esegi ekaba ekogenderera ase egati ya Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehoboamu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete agatindekwa ase Omochie o Daudi, na Abiya, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles13:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Yeroboamu, Abiya agachaka kogambera Abayuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Akagamba ase engaki y’emiaka etato agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Mikaya, mosubati o Urieli, korwa Gibea. Esegi yarenge gati y’Abiya na Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya akagenda korwana esegi, akaira abarwani esegi chilifu amagana ane (400,000), abanto chituoni chi’esegi bachoretwe, korende Yeroboamu agacha komorwania, akaroberia abarwani baye b’esegi chilifu amagana atano na atato (800,000), abanto chituoni." 
2Chronicles13:4 Na Abiya agatenena igoro ase egetunwa gia Semaraimu, agwo ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, akabora, “Aye Yeroboamu, nainwe Abaisraeli mwensi, ntegerera moigwe!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Inee! Inwe timomanyeti ng’a Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo aete Daudi, amo nororeria rwaye, oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli bobe asebare kare na kare, ase enchera y’okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’omonyo?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Korende Yeroboamu, mosinto o Nebati, omosomba o Sulemani, mosinto o Daudi, akarega omonene oye omoruoti, akaanga komoigwera." 
2Chronicles13:7 Abanto bande abachorochombu, abanto ababe, bagasangererekana ase Yeroboamu, bakaba abaengereria abakong’u ase Rehoboamu, mosinto o Sulemani, ekero Rehoboamu arenge omoyia ataranara emeremo yaye, na tarenge konyara kobabua." 
2Chronicles13:8 Bono inwe igo morengereretie korwania oboruoti bw’Omonene bore ase amaboko ’abanto b’ororeria rwa Daudi, ekiagera more omoganda omonene, naende ekiagera mobwate emegwekano ye chimori ye chitahabu eria Yeroboamu abaroiseirie ekaba chinyasae chiaino." 
2Chronicles13:9 Inee! Inwe timwaseria abakuani b’Omonene, abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni, na Abalawi, na mwebekire abakuani baino, buna abanto be chinse chinde bagokora? Bono omonto onde bwensi okorenta eeri ensae, gose chimingichi isano na ibere, gwatananwa na gochenwa, oyio nigo akoba omokuani bwe chinyasae chitari Nyasae bori." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Korende asetore intwe, Omonene nere Nyasae oito, na intwe titomotigeti. Intwe ntobwate abakuani bagokorera Omonene, baria bare b’ororeria rwa Haroni na Abalawi abare gokora emeremo yabo." 
2Chronicles13:11 Kera emambia na omogoroba nigo baare koruera Omonene ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na gosambera ubani ere nogotioka okuya, naende babeka igoro y’emesa y’etahabu emegati ekoruegwa ase Nyasae. Naende nigo barendete ebibekerero bie chitaya biroisirie korwa ase chitahabu, erinde chitaya chiria chigenderere gwoka kera omogoroba. Intwe nigo torendete amang’ana Omonene, Nyasae oito, achigete, korende inwe mwamotigire." 
2Chronicles13:12 Rora Nyasae nigo are amo naintwe, nere ototang’aine, na abakuani baye nigo babwate ebirombeta biabo bi’esegi bakobibugia, bagotorangeria tobarwanie inwe esegi. Inwe Abaisraeli, timobaisa korwana n’Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, ekiagera timokonyara kobua.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Yeroboamu konya otomire abarwani baetanane na koumokera Abayuda korwa magega; igo abarwani baye b’esegi bakaba bosio bw’Abayuda na baria batometwe nigo barenge magega yabo. 
2Chronicles13:14 Ekero Abayuda barigereretie bakarora ng’a esegi nigo yarenge bosio bwabo na magega abo, na igo bakarera ase Omonene, na abakuani bakabugia ebirombeta biria." 
2Chronicles13:15 Abanto ba Yuda bagaaka amariogi amanene ay’esegi; na ekero Abayuda barenge kwoga, Nyasae akabua Yeroboamu na Abaisraeli bonsi, ase obosio bw’Abiya na ase Abayuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Erio Abaisraeli bagatama korwa ase Abayuda, na Nyasae akababeka ase amaboko ’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya amo nabanto baye bagaita Abaisraeli ase ogoita okonene mono. Abanto baitetwe nigo barenge chilifu amagana atano (500,000), abanto abachore." 
2Chronicles13:18 Igo Abaisraeli bakabugwa bakabekwa inse y’obogambi bw’Abayuda, na Abayuda nigo babuete ekiagera basemeretie Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya akabwatia Yeroboamu, akamoura emechie eye: Beteli, na Yesana, na Efuroni, amo nebichie biabo." 
2Chronicles13:20 Yeroboamu tanyorete chinguru chi’okoirania oboruoti bwaye ase amatuko Abiya arenge kogamba, korende Omonene akamoaka erinde agakwa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Abiya akanyora chinguru chinyinge, akanyuoma abakungu ikomi na bane; akaiborerwa abana abamura emerongo ebere na babere, na abaiseke ikomi na batano nomo." 
2Chronicles13:22 Amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Abiya ne chinchera chiaye, ne chinkwana chiaye, nigo arikire ase omogano bw’omobani Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Abiya agakwa, akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase Omochie o Daudi, na Asa, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye. Ase amatuko aye ense eria nigo yabete nobotoereru ase engaki y’emiaka ikomi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa agakora ayare amaya naende amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, Nyasae oye." 
2Chronicles14:3 Akarusia ebisasimero ebigeni na agasaria aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, agatagora chisiiro, akanacha emete y’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu." 
2Chronicles14:4 Agachika Abayuda barigie Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, naende akabachika barende amachiko na emeroberio ende echikire." 
2Chronicles14:5 Akarusia korwa ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, na ebisasimero bi’ogosamba ubani. Na oboruoti boria bokaba bore nobotoereru inse yaye." 
2Chronicles14:6 Akaagacha emechie yagiteire chindwaki agwo ase ense ya Yuda, ekiagera ense eria nigo yarenge nobotoereru; tabwate chisegi ase amatuko aria, ekiagera Omonene amoete omorembe." 
2Chronicles14:7 Agatebia Abayuda, “Inchuo toagache emechie eye toyeetananie chindwaki amo nemerobiri, na ebiita bire nemekorogoto. Ense eye nigo egendererete koba eyaito, ekiagera twarigirie Omonene, Nyasae oito; intwe twamorigirie, na ere otoeire omorembe ase chinsemo chiaito chionsi.” Ase ayio bakaagacha na bagasesenigwa." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa nigo abwate abarwani esegi chilifu amagana atato (300,000) korwa ase Abayuda, mbabwate ching’aya na amatimo, na abarwani bande b’esegi chilifu amagana abere na emerongo etano na etato (280,000) korwa ase Ababenjamin mbabwate chinguba, bamanyete koruta emegwe. Abanto aba bonsi nigo barenge abe chinguru, chituoni ase okorwana esegi." 
2Chronicles14:9 Sera Omoetiopia amo nabarwani baye b’esegi emilioni eyemo (1,000,000) abarenge ne chigari amagana atato bagacha kobarwania esegi, bagaika Maresa." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa akagenda koumerana nere ase okorwana esegi. Bagatenenera agwo ase rikura ria Sefata ang’e na Maresa. 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa akarera ase Omonene, Nyasae oye, agateba, “Aye Omonene, onde tari onga buna aye ase ogokonya abatari ne chinguru na abare ne chinguru. Ase ayio, aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, otokonye, ekiagera naye tosemeretie, na ase erieta riao twachire korwana nomoganda oyo omonene. Aye Omonene, aye naye Nyasae oito, omonto onde tari orakobue.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Ase ayio Omonene akabua Abaetiopia ase obosio bwa Asa, na ase obosio bw’Abayuda; na Abaetiopia bagatama." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa amo nabanto barenge nere bakabwatia Abaetiopia goika Gerari, na Abaetiopia bagaitwa, nonya noyomo tatigetwe ore moyo; ekiagera Omonene na abarwani baye b’esegi nigo bababuete kegima. Abayuda bagasakora ebinto ebinge bakabiira." 
2Chronicles14:14 Bakabua na gosaria emechie yonsi yaetanaine Gerari, ekiagera Omonene abegete obwoba ase abanto b’emechie eria. Bagasakora ebinto korwa ase emechie eria yonsi, ekiagera ebinto ebinge bi’ogosakorwa mbiarengeo." 
2Chronicles14:15 Bagatagora na gosaria chiema chi’abanto baria babwate chitugo, bakaira ching’ondi ne chimbori chinyinge ne chingamia. Erio bakairana, bakagenda Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Omoika o Nyasae ogacha igoro y’Asaria, mosinto bw’Odedi." 
2Chronicles15:2 Ere akagenda korotota Asa, akamotebia, “Aye Asa, nainwe mwensi Abayuda na Ababenjamin, ntegerera moigwe! Omonene nigo are amo nainwe, ekero inwe more amo nere. Komoramorigie rirorio momonyore, korende komoramotige rirorio nere nabatige inwe." 
2Chronicles15:3 Ase engaki entambe Abaisraeli tibarenge na Nyasae bw’ekeene, na tibabwate omokuani orenge koborokereria, na tibabwate amachiko." 
2Chronicles15:4 Korende ekero babete nemechando bakairaneria Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, na komorigia, na ere akaba okonyorekana asebare." 
2Chronicles15:5 Ase chingaki chiria chintambe morembe torenge ase monto onde bwensi, oria orenge gosoka isiko, gose oyorenge koirana, ekiagera abanto bonsi be chinse chiria nigo barenge nemechando emenge." 
2Chronicles15:6 Egesaku gekaba gekorwana negesaku kende, na omochie okaba okorwana nomochie onde, ekiagera Nyasae nigo abarenterete emechando emenge ere ao ao goika bagasirania." 
2Chronicles15:7 Korende inwe mobe abaremu, timokwa emioyo; imonyore eng’eria y’emeremo yaino.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Ekero Asa aigwete amang’ana ’obobani bw’Odedi, akaba noboenenu, akarusia emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, okogechia koria, korwa ase ense yonsi y’Abayuda na Ababenjamin, na korwa ase emechie yonsi eria konya airire agwo ase ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu; naende akaroisia egesasimero ki’Omonene agwo ang’e nenyomba yaagachetwe bosio bw’enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles15:9 Agasangereria Abayuda na Ababenjamin bonsi, na abanto bonsi korwa ase Abaefraimu na Abamanase, na Abasimeoni, abarenge abamenyi ase egati yabo. Abanto abange korwa ase Abaisraeli konya batamire gochia asare, ekero baroche ng’a Omonene, Nyasae oye, nigo arenge amo nere." 
2Chronicles15:10 Bagasangererekana agwo Yerusalemu ase omotienyi o gatato bw’omwaka o ikomi na gatano bw’okogamba gwa Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Ase rituko riria bakaruera Omonene ebing’wanso korwa ase chitugo boosete, bakarua chiombe amagana atano na abere (700), ne ching’ondi ne chimbori chilifu isano na ibere (7,000)." 
2Chronicles15:12 Bagakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania ng’a bamorigie Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi, na emioyo yabo yonsi." 
2Chronicles15:13 Bagatianania ng’a monto onde bwensi orenge kwanga korigia Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, goika aitwe akwe, abe omwana gose omonto omonene, omosacha gose omokungu." 
2Chronicles15:14 Bakaria emuma ase erieta ri’Omonene, ase ogokwana neriogi rinene ase ogochenga, na ase okobugia ebirombeta na ebitureri." 
2Chronicles15:15 Abayuda bonsi bakaba nomochengo ase emuma eria bariete, ekiagera nigo batiananetie ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi, na bakarigia Omonene ase okogania kwabo gwonsi. Omonene akanyorekana asebare, na akabaa obotoereru ase chinsemo chiabo chionsi." 
2Chronicles15:16 Asa omoruoti akarusia Maaka ng’ina taba eting’ana, ekiagera konya otenenirie omote bw’okogechia, oroiseretigwe Asera, enyasae eria enkungu. Asa akayobutorana akayoiyeria inse, akayosenyenta na akayosambera agwo ase akarooche ga Kidironi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Korende aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa tarusetigwe korwa ase Abaisraeli. Korende nonya naboigo, Asa akaba omwegenwa ase Omonene amatuko aye onsi." 
2Chronicles15:18 Akarenta ase enyomba ya Nyasae ebiegwa ebi ise na ere omonyene baatananete koba ebichenu, chifeta, ne chitahabu, na ebikorero." 
2Chronicles15:19 Chisegi chinde tichiabete goika omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na etano, bw okogamba gwa Asa." 
2Chronicles16:1 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na etano nomo, bw’okogamba gwa Asa, Baasa, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akagenda korwania Abayuda, akaagacha na kogitera omochie o Rama chindwaki ng’a nario ribaga ritabaise gotoka ase omonto onde bwensi gosoka, gose gosoa kogenda ase Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Erio Asa akarusia chifeta ne chitahabu korwa ase chikungo chi’enyomba y’Omonene na korwa ase echi’enyomba y’omoruoti, agachitoma gochia ase Beni‐Hadadi, omoruoti o Siiria omenyete agwo Damesiki, agateba," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Tiga okobwatana kw’ogotianania kobe ase egati yane naye, buna kwarenge ase egati ya tata na iso. Rora nagotomeire chifeta ne chitahabu. Genda osarie okobwatana kwao gwakorete na Baasa, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, erinde arue ase ense yane, antigane.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Beni‐Hadadi akaigwera Asa omoruoti, agatoma abatang’ani b’abarwani baye, bakagenda bakarwania emechie y’Abaisraeli, bakabua Iyoni, na Dani, na Abeli‐Maimu, na emechie yonsi ase ebinto biagachire agwo ase orogongo rwa Nafutali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Ekero Baasa aigwete amang’ana ayio, agatiga kogita omochie o Rama, na emeremo yaye aroro egatenena." 
2Chronicles16:6 Erio Asa omoruoti akaira Abayuda bonsi, na barabwo bakagenda bakabogoria amagena onsi a Rama, ne chibao, ebinto biria Baasa arenge koagachera, na ase ebio Asa akaagachera Geba na Misipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ase engaki eria Hanani omorori agacha ase Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akamotebia, “Ekiagera gwasemeretie omoruoti o Siiria, na tigwasemeria Omonene, Nyasae oo, abarwani esegi b’omoruoti o Siiria batamire betooririe korwa ase okoboko kwao." 
2Chronicles16:8 Inee! Abanto b’Etiopia na aba Libia tibarenge omoganda omonene bw’abarwani esegi, naende tibabwate chigari chinyinge, na abariini chibarasi abange? Korende nonya naboigo, ekiagera aye gwasemeretie Omonene, akababeka ase okoboko kwao." 
2Chronicles16:9 Amaiso ’Omonene nigo origereretie aande onsi ase ense yonsi ase okoorokia okoboko kwaye kw’ogokonya abanto baria chinkoro chiabo chire chinyegenwa asare. Aye gwakorire amang’ana ’oboriri ase ogokora egento eke; na korwa bono na kogenderera nobe ne chisegi.” 
2Chronicles16:10 Erio Asa akaba nendamwamu ase omorori oria, akamobwata, akamobeka ase echela, agasoyia amagoro aye ase rikorogoto. Nigo agechete omorori oria mono, ekiagera akwanete amang’ana aria. Boigo ase engencho eyio Asa akaba omotindi mono, agachanda abanto bande." 
2Chronicles16:11 Aya onsi Asa akorete, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’Abaruoti b’Abayuda na ab’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles16:12 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato na kianda bw’okogamba kwaye, Asa akanyora oborwaire ase amagoro aye, na oborwaire obo bokaba obonene; korende nonya obete omorwaire, tarigetie Omonene, korende akarigia ogokonywa korwa ase abarwaria." 
2Chronicles16:13 Asa agakwa ase omwaka bw’emerongo ene nomo bw’okogamba kwaye, akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete." 
2Chronicles16:14 Erio agatindekwa ase oboina eroiseretie ere omonyene, agwo ase Omochie o Daudi. Bakamwareria ase ekerarero giaichoretigwe ebinsari na amarembo ao ao, ebinto bigotioka buya, biaroisetigwe nabaroisia abang’aini. Abanto bagauta omorero omonene ase okworokia amasikani ase engencho ya Asa." 
2Chronicles17:1 Yehosafati, omwana omomura bw’Asa, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye. Agakong’ia oboruoti bwaye ase ogwekengera ase Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Akabeka abarwani esegi ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda yagiteire chindwaki, na ase ense y’Abayuda, na ase emechie y’Efraimu eyio Asa ise abwate." 
2Chronicles17:3 Omonene akaba amo na Yehosafati, ekiagera abwatetie chinchera chie ritang’ani chia Daudi, sokoro yaye. Ere tasasimete Baali," 
2Chronicles17:4 korende akaba okorigia Nyasae o ise, na akabwata amachiko ’Omonene, na tabwatetie chinchera chi’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ase ayio Omonene agakora oboruoti bwaye bokaba ne chinguru ase okoboko kwaye, na Abayuda bonsi bakamorentera ebiegwa, ere akaba nobonda obonge na amasikani amanene." 
2Chronicles17:6 Akaba omoremu ase chinchera chi’Omonene, agasaria aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, na akarusia emete y’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, korwa ase Abayuda." 
2Chronicles17:7 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba kwaye, agatoma abanene b’obogambi bwaye, Beni‐Haili, na Obadia, na Zakaria, na Netaneli, na Mikaya, kworokereria ase emechie y’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Amo nabanene baria agatoma Abalawi aba: Semaya, na Netania, na Sebadia, na Asaeli, na Semiramoti, na Yehonathani, na Adonia, na Tobia, na Tobi‐Adonia. Naende amo n’Abalawi aba agatoma Elisama na Yehoramu abakuani." 
2Chronicles17:9 Barabwo bakaimokia ebuku y’ogochika kw’Omonene, bakagenda ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda, bakorokereria abanto." 
2Chronicles17:10 Omonene akaboyia amaruoti onsi e chinse chiaetanaine Abayuda, na onde tacha korwania Yehosafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Abafilisti bande bakarenta ebiegwa ase Yehosafati, amo ne chifeta chikaba ebango. Abaarabu boigo bakamorentera chimingichi chilifu isano na ibere, na amagana atano na abere (7,700), ne chigoree chilifu isano na ibere, na amagana atano na abere (7,700)." 
2Chronicles17:12 Yehosafati akamenta koba ne chinguru, na agwo ase ense y’Abayuda akaagacha chiburi na emechie, ase arenge kogacha ebinto." 
2Chronicles17:13 Nigo abwate ebinto ebinge biagachire ase ense y’Abayuda. Naende nabwate abarwani esegi, abanto chituoni, agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles17:14 Oyo noro orenge omoroberio obo, eamate ase eamate. Korwa ase Abayuda nigo barenge abateneneri aba b’abarwani esegi chilifu: Adina, omochiki amo nabarwani baye chituoni chilifu amagana atato (300,000)." 
2Chronicles17:15 Na oyo o kabere Yehohanani omochiki amo nabarwani baye chituoni chilifu amagana abere na emerongo etano na etato (280,000);" 
2Chronicles17:16 na oyo o gatato Amasia, mosinto o Sikiri, oyo bweruete ase ogwancha gokora emeremo y’Omonene; ere nigo abwate abarwani chituoni chilifu amagana abere (200,000)." 
2Chronicles17:17 Korwa ase Ababenjamin nigo arenge Eliada, omonto etuoni; ere nigo abwate abarwani chilifu amagana abere (200,000), babwate amata ne chinguba." 
2Chronicles17:18 Na oyo o kabere, Yehosabadi, obwate abarwani chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na etato (180,000), babwate ebirwanero ase okorwana esegi." 
2Chronicles17:19 Abanto aba bakaba bagokora emeremo y’omoruoti amo na baria bande abegete ase emechie yagiteire chindwaki ase ense yonsi y’Abayuda. 
2Chronicles18:1 Ekero Yehosafati abete omonda mono naende asikire, akanyuoma omokungu korwa ase enyomba y’Ahabu." 
2Chronicles18:2 Nyuma y’emiaka emeke akagenda ase Ahabu agwo Samaria. Nere akanyenyera Yehosafati, amo nabanto barenge amo nere, ching’ondi chinyinge ne chiombe; erio akamoebereria agende amo nere korwania Ramoti o Gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, agakwana na Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akamoboria, “Nogende amo nainche korwania Ramoti o Gileadi?” Yehosafati akamoiraneria, “Inche nigo inde buna aye, na abanto baane nigo bare buna abanto bao. Intwe ntobe amo naye ase okorwana esegi.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Naende Yehosafati agatebia omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, “Ritang’ani toborie Omonene igoro y’amang’ana aya.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Erio omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agasangereria ababani, abanto amagana ane, amo, akababoria, “Nkogenda tore korwania Ramoti o Gileadi, gose yaya?” Barabwo bakamoiraneria, “Genda, ekiagera Nyasae nabeke omochie oyio ase okoboko kwao, aye omoruoti.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Korende Yehosafati akaboria, “Inee! Omobani onde bw’Omonene tari aiga, tonyare koboria goetera asare?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akairaneria Yehosafati, “Omonto oyomo natigarete, toraborie Omonene goetera asare, nere Mikaya, mosinto o Imula, korende nigo imogechete, ekiagera ere tari kobana amang’ana amaya igoro yane, korende botambe namabe oka.” Yehosafati akamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, tobaisa gokwana igo.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Erio omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli akarangeria omosomba oyomo, akamochika, “Genda bwango orente Mikaya, mosinto o Imula.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Bono omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli na Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, nigo baikaransete ase ebirogo biabo bi’oboruoti, baikaransete agwo ase ekeooreri ang’e negeita gia Samaria, babegete chianga chiabo chi’obonene, na ababani baria bonsi nigo barenge korua obobani bwabo ase amaiso ’abaruoti baria." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedekia, mosinto o Kenaana, akeroiseria chingunchara chi’ebioma, agakwana, “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Ase chingunchara echi nobetere Abasiiria goika basirigwe kegima.”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Ababani baria bonsi bakabana amang’ana ayio ayio, bagateba, “Genda Ramoti o Gileadi, noyobue. Omonene nayobeke ase okoboko kwao, aye omoruoti.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Omonto oria otometwe gochia korangeria Mikaya akagenda, akamotebia, “Rora, amang’ana ’ababani bande nigo are ayamo, okoria eira y’egesio ekiya ase omoruoti; tiga ring’ana riao ribe erimo namang’ana abo; naye boigo okwane amang’ana okoria eira y’egesio ekiya ase omoruoti.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Korende Mikaya agateba, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, ring’ana Omonene aranetbie, nario ndakwane.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Ekero achete ase omoruoti, omoruoti akamoboria, “Inee! Mikaya, nkogenda tore korwania Ramoti o Gileadi, gose totige?” Ere akamoiraneria, “Genda, obue! Abanto baria nababekwe ase amaboko aino.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Omoruoti akamoboria, “Ng’ara karenga nkogotiania ng’a ontebie ekeene gioka ase erieta ri’Omonene?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Mikaya akairaneria, “Naroche Abaisraeli bonsi besiarerete igoro y’ebigoro buna ching’ondi chitabwati omorisia, na Omonene agantebia: Abanto aba tibabwati omoraai obo, tiga kera oyomo airane agende nka ore nomorembe!”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Na omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agatebia Yehosafati, “Tinagotebia ng’a ere takobana amang’ana amaya igoro yane, korende namabe oka?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Naende Mikaya akagenderera gokwana, agateba, “Ase ayio, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene. Inarora Omonene oikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, na emeganda yonsi y’abamalaika eteneine ensemo yaye y’okorio na ey’okobee." 
2Chronicles18:19 Na Omonene akaboria: Ning’o ogochia koebereria Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, erinde agende Ramoti o Gileadi abugwe? Oyomo agakwana egento ekemo, na oyonde egento kende." 
2Chronicles18:20 Erio omoika ogacha ogatenena bosio bw’Omonene ogateba: Ninche ndamoebererie. Omonene akaboria omoika oria: Nase enchera ere naki oramoebererie? 
2Chronicles18:21 Omoika oria okairaneria: Nigo nkoimoka ngende, imbe omoika bw’obong’ainereria ase emenwa y’ababani baria bonsi b’Ahabu. Omonene akayotebia: Genda omoebererie ase enchera eyio. Nobue." 
2Chronicles18:22 “Ase ayio rora bono, Omonene obaeire omoika bw’obong’ainereria ase emenwa y’ababani aba bao bonsi, ekiagera ochikire ng’a nonyore egesio ekebe.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Erio Zedekia, mosinto o Kenaana, agaika ang’e ase Mikaya, akamoaka oroe ase orosea, akamoboria, “Nase nchera ki omoika oria bw’Omonene orua asende, erinde ogakwana naye?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya akamoiraneria, “Aye norore ayio rituko riria oratame na gosoa ase ekenunchi bwebise.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agateba, “Bwata Mikaya momoiranie ase Amoni, omonene bw’omochie, na ase Yoashi, omomura bw’omoruoti," 
2Chronicles18:26 mobatebie ng’a aya naro omoruoti atebire: Beka omonto oyio ime ase echela, momong’ate endagera na amache goika ing’irane inde nomorembe.”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaya akamoiraneria, “Onye kogochia koirana kore nomorembe, rirorio Omonene takwaneti goetera asende.” Naende agateba, “Inwe abanto bonsi, igwa amang’ana ayio.”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Bono omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli na Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, bakagenda korwania Ramoti o Gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Na omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agatebia Yehosafati, “Inche nigo ngwekona ase ogwetuba timanyekana, erio ngende ase esegi, korende aye obeke chianga chiao chi’oboruoti.” Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli agekona ase ogwetuba tamanyekana; erio bakagenda ase esegi." 
2Chronicles18:30 Bono omoruoti bw’Abasiiria konya ochikire abateneneri baye be chigari, obatebirie, “Timobaisa korwana na monto onde bwensi, abe omoke gose omonene, korende morwane nomoruoti bw’Abaisraeli bweka.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Ekero abateneneri be chigari baroche Yehosafati, bagateba, “Nere omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli.” Ase ayio bakaonchoka bakarwana nere, na Yehosafati akarera mono, na Omonene akamokonya. Nyasae akabang’usa bakarua asare," 
2Chronicles18:32 ekiagera ekero abateneneri be chigari baroche ng’a ere tarenge omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, bakaonchoka, bagatiga komobwatia." 
2Chronicles18:33 Korende omonto oyomo akaruta omogwe ase okorengia bosa igo, akabeta omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli ase ribaga riarenge gati y’engobo y’ekioma, ase egekuba kiaye. Erio omoruoti agatebia omogendia bw’egari yaye, “Onchora egari ondusie ase esegi, ekiagera nabetirwe mono.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Esegi eria ekaba entindi mono ase rituko riria, na omoruoti agatenena ase egari yaye, origereretie Abasiiria, goika mogoroba; erio ekero erioba riabeire ang’e kogwa agakwa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akairana nka bwoye agwo Yerusalemu, orendire buya." 
2Chronicles19:2 Yehu omorori, mosinto o Hanani, akagenda korotota Yehosafati omoruoti, akamoboria, “Inee! Nabo ekogwenerete gokonya abanto ababe, naende gwancha baria bagechete Omonene? Ase engencho eyio endamwamu y’Omonene yagocheire." 
2Chronicles19:3 Korende nonya naboigo, obuya bonde mbore ime asore, aye gwasaretie emete y’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, ekarua ense eye, naende kwerure korigia Nyasae nenkoro yao.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Yehosafati akaba okomenya agwo Yerusalemu; akagenda ase abanto bamenyete gochakera Beeri‐Seba goikeera ense y’ebitunwa y’Efraimu, akabairania ase Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Agachora abagambi ebina ase ense eria yonsi, akababeka ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda yagiteire chindwaki, omochie ase omochie," 
2Chronicles19:6 akabatebia, “Rengereria egento mogokora, ekiagera timori gokorera mwanyabanto ase okogamba, korende n’Omonene mogokorera; ere nigo are amo nainwe ase okogamba na konacha ebina." 
2Chronicles19:7 Bono moiroke Omonene. Mwerende na momanye eki mogokora, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oito, tari koonchorana oboronge, gose tari gwanchereria abanto, gose tari koegwa riaaki.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Boigo agwo Yerusalemu, Yehosafati akabeka Abalawi bande, na abakuani, na abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, bakaba bakogamba ebina ribaga ri’Omonene, naende bagatorania amariomana. Ekero abagambi baria barenge koba bairanire agwo Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles19:9 akabachika, akabora, “Nigo morakore emeremo ase okomoiroka Omonene na ase obwegenwa, na ase chinkoro chiaino chionsi." 
2Chronicles19:10 Ekero kende gionsi ebina bikorentwa asemore korwa ase abanto bamino, baria bamenyete ase emechie yabo, onye nigoro y’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga, gose nigoro y’amang’ana ande onsi ay’amachiko na emeroberio yonsi echikire, rirorio mobakurere ng’a tibabaisa gokora okomocha ase Omonene, erinde endamwamu yaye tebaisa gocha igoro asemore na ase abanto baria bamino. Moise gokora bo, rirorio timokoba abamochi." 
2Chronicles19:11 Rigereria, Amaria, omokuani omonene, nabatenenere igoro ase amang’ana onsi ay’Omonene; na Sebadia, mosinto o Isumaeli, omonene bw’Abayuda, ere nabatenenere ase amang’ana onsi ay’omoruoti, na Abalawi mbabakorere buna abakonyi baino. Mobe abaremu ase ande onsi mogokora, na Omonene abe amo nabagokora ayare amaronge.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Ekaba nyuma y’ayio, Abamoabu na Abaamoni, na abanto bande bamenyete amo n’Abaamoni bagacha korwania Yehosafati esegi." 
2Chronicles20:2 Abanto bande bagacha bagatebia Yehosafati “Omoganda omonene mono bw’abanto korwa Edomu, ng’umbu y’enyancha ngocha ore gokorwania esegi; rora nao bare agwo Hasasoni‐Tamari (noro Eni‐Gedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Erio Yehosafati akaba nobwoba, akarigia Omonene; akararia ng’a Abayuda bonsi beng’ate." 
2Chronicles20:4 Abayuda bagasangererekana amo, bakarigia ogokonywa korwa ase Omonene. Ee, bagacha korwa ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda korigia Omonene." 
2Chronicles20:5 Yehosafati agatenena ase egati y’omosangererekano oria bw’Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu agwo ase eraaro enyia y’enyomba y’Omonene," 
2Chronicles20:6 agasaba,” “Aye Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito, Inee, aye tori Nyasae ore igoro? Tari aye okogamba igoro y’amaruoti onsi ay’ebisaku? Ase okoboko kwao okobua ne chinguru mbireo, goika onde tari oranyare gokobua." 
2Chronicles20:7 Aye Nyasae oito, tigwaseretie abanto ababiare b’ense eye ase amasio ’abanto bao Abaisraeli, okayea ororeria rwa Ibrahimu, omosani oo, ense eye ekaba eyabo kogenderera botambe?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Bono barabwo nao bamenyete, naende bakoagacheire Obomenyo Obochenu ase engencho y’erieta riao, bagoteba:" 
2Chronicles20:9 Obobe koborachiche igoro asetore, gose esegi, gose egesusuro, gose oborwaire bogoita, gose enchara, natotenene bosio bw’enyomba eye ase obosio bwao, ekiagera erieta riao nao rire ase enyomba eye. Igo ntonyare korera asore ase engencho y’emechando yaito, aye noigwe ototoorie." 
2Chronicles20:10 “Rora bono, Abaamoni na Abamoabu, na abanto b’ebigoro bia Seiri ngocha bare gotorwania. Ekero chisokoro chiaito Abaisraeli barwete ase ense ya Misiri, tikwabaete ribaga baete ase chingongo chiabo; ase ayio bakaba bakobaetanana." 
2Chronicles20:11 Bono kwarorire ng’a barabwo bachire gotosiria na gotoseria korwa ase ense eye yao gwatoeire ebe omwando oito. 
2Chronicles20:12 Aye Nyasae oito, Inee, aye tokobanachera ekina? Intwe titobwati chinguru chi’okorwana nomoganda oyo omonene, ogocha gotorwania. Titomanyeti eki togokora, korende nigo tokorigereretie aye ase okonyora ogokonyeka.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Ase engaki eyio abasacha bonsi b’Abayuda bagatenena ase obosio bw’Omonene: barabwo amo nabana babo ebing’werere, na abakungu babo, na abana babo bande." 
2Chronicles20:14 Omoika bw’Omonene ogacha igoro ase Yahasieli, mosinto o Zakaria o Benaya, o Yeieli, o Matania, Omolawi bw’ororeria rw’Asafu, ekero ateneine gati‐gati y’omosangererekano." 
2Chronicles20:15 Ere agakwana, “Igwa inwe Abayuda mwensi, na abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu, na aye omoruoti Yehosafati. Aya naro Omonene akobatebia: Timoiroka gose gokwa emioyo ase engencho y’omoganda oyo omonene; esegi teri eyaino, korende neya Nyasae." 
2Chronicles20:16 Ankio mogende mobarwanie; mobarore bagotiira ase egetiiro gia Sisi; namobanyore agwo ase ensinyo ye rikura, moocha y’erooro ya Yerueli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Inwe Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu, timokorwana esegi eye; mobeere aase aino, motenene, mokire‐kiri na morore obobui bw’Omonene ase engencho yaino. Timoiroka, gose timokwa emioyo. Ankio mosoke mobachiere, na Omonene nabe amo nainwe.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Erio Yehosafati na Abayuda bonsi, amo nabanto bamenyete Yerusalemu, bagatung’ama bakaumama ase obosio bw’Omonene, bakamosasima." 
2Chronicles20:19 Abalawi baria barenge Abakohati na Abakora bagatenena gotogia Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ase eriogi rinene mono." 
2Chronicles20:20 Bakaimoka mambia chuni, bakagenda gochia ase erooro ya Tekoa; na ekero basogete isiko, Yehosafati agatenena agakwana, “Inwe Abayuda na abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu inyigwe! Mwegene Omonene, Nyasae oino, monyore chinguru; egene nababani baye, na inwe inamobue." 
2Chronicles20:21 Ekero akoorete gosemania nabanto, akabeka abanto baare gochia goterera Omonene na komotogia beboetie chianga chinchenu. Barabwo bagatang’ana abarwani esegi bagotera,” “Moiranerie Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe nigo bogendererete kare na kare.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Ekero bachagete gotera na gotogia, Omonene agatoma abanto bakaumokera Abaamoni, na Abamoabu, na abanto b’ebigoro bia Seiri abwo bachete korwania Abayuda bagasirigwa kegima." 
2Chronicles20:23 Abaamoni na Abamoabu bakaumokera korwania abanto b’ebigoro bia Seiri, bakabasiria kegima, na ekero basiretie abanto abwo, Abaamoni na Abamoabu bagaitana, bagakoorana." 
2Chronicles20:24 Ekero Abayuda bachete ase omorobiri bw’oborendi agwo ase erooro na bakarigereria, bakarora ebitondo birambereretie inse; onde tatooregete nonya noyomo." 
2Chronicles20:25 Na ekero Yehosafati na abanto baye bagendete koira ebisakorwa korwa ase emeganda eria bakanyora chinibo ne chitugo chinyinge, na ebinto bie rigori rinene; bakabibogoria na kobiira, goika bagasinywa koira goetania. Ase amatuko atato bakagenderera kobiira, ekiagera biarenge ebinge mono." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ase rituko ria kane bagasangererekana ase Ebate ya Beraka, ekiagera agwo nao batogeretie Omonene. Aase agwo abeire akorokwa Ebate ya Beraka goika rero iga." 
2Chronicles20:27 Erio bakairana, kera oyomo bw’Abayuda na obw’abanto ba Yerusalemu, na Yehosafati akabatang’ana. Bakairana Yerusalemu bare nomochengo, ekiagera Omonene abaete obobui igoro ase ababisa babo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Bagacha Yerusalemu bakobugia amakano abo, na amakano abo ay’ebirigisa, na ebirombeta, bakagenda ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles20:29 Nyasae akoboyia amaruoti onsi ay’ense, ekero abanto b’aroro baigwete ng’a Omonene narwanetie ababisa b’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles20:30 Ense eria ase Yehosafati arenge kogambera ekaba nobotoereru, ekiagera Nyasae oye amoete omorembe ase chinsemo chionsi." 
2Chronicles20:31 Ase ayio Yehosafati akaba okogambera Abayuda. Nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etato, na etano, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere na etano, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Asuba, mosubati o Silihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Yehosafati akabwatia chinchera chia Asa ise, taonchogete na gochitiga. Agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene." 
2Chronicles20:33 Korende nonya naboigo, aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa tatagoretwe. Abanto konya tibaraonchokera Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo." 
2Chronicles20:34 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Yehosafati, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire ase amariko a Yehu, mosinto o Hanani, ayio are ime y’Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles20:35 Nyuma y’ayio Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akabwatana n’Ahasia, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, nonya omoruoti oria okorete amang’ana amabe mono." 
2Chronicles20:36 Akabwatana nere ase okoagacha chimeeri chikogenda Tarisisi. Bagachiagachera agwo Esioni‐Geberi. 
2Chronicles20:37 Erio Eliezeri, mosinto o Dodawahu korwa Maresa, akabana amabe igoro ya Yehosafati, akamotebia, “Ekiagera kwabwatanire n’Ahasia, Omonene nasarie ebinto kwaroisirie.” Ne chimeeri chiria chikabochoka tichianyara kogenda Tarisisi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Yehosafati akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase Omochie o Daudi, ase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegetwe, na Yehoramu, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yehoramu nabwate abamura bamwabo, abana ba Yehosafati: Asaria na Yehieli, Zakaria na Asariahu, Mikaeli na Sefatia. Aba bonsi nigo barenge basinto ba Yehosafati, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ise akabaa ebiegwa ebinene, chifeta ne chitahabu, ne chinibo chie rigori rinene, amo nemechie y’Abayuda yagiteire chindwaki; korende akaa Yehoramu oboruoti, ekiagera nere orenge omomura omotangi." 
2Chronicles21:4 Ekero Yehoramu airete oboruoti bwa ise, na kanyorire chinguru ase borobwo, agaita abamura bamwabo bonsi nomoro, boigo agaita abanene bande b’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoramu nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etato, na ebere, ekero abete omoruoti; akagamba emiaka etano na etato, agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles21:6 Akabwatia chinchera chi’abaruoti b’Abaisraeli, buna abanto b’enyomba y’Ahabu bakorete, ekiagera ere nigo anyuomete omoiseke o Ahabu. Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
2Chronicles21:7 Korende nonya naboigo, Omonene tanchete gosiria enyomba ya Daudi, ekiagera nakorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania na Daudi, naende nariete eira ng’a Daudi abe etaya ekomoreka botambe kogenderera, ere amo nororeria rwaye." 
2Chronicles21:8 Ekero Yehoramu arenge kogamba, Abaedomu bagasaria, bakaanga kogamberwa n’Abayuda, bakebekera omoruoti obo abanyene." 
2Chronicles21:9 Yehoramu akagenda amo nabatang’ani baye b’abarwani esegi, ne chigari chiaye chionsi. Ase obotuko boria akarwania Abaedomu abwo konya bamoetananire ase arenge, akabaita amo nabachiki babo be chigari." 
2Chronicles21:10 Ase igo Abaedomu bagasaria bakaanga kogamberwa n’Abayuda; naboigo ere goika rero iga. Ase engaki eria abanto b’omochie o Libuna boigo bagasaria, bakaanga kogamberwa na Yehoramu, ekiagera ere atigete Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaye." 
2Chronicles21:11 Akaroisia aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa agwo ase ense y’ebigoro ya Yuda, naende akagera abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu bakaba abategenwa, na akagera Abayuda bagatiga chinchera chindonge." 
2Chronicles21:12 Elija omobani agatomera Yehoramu rirube rigoteba, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae o Daudi sokoro yao, agoteba: Aye tobwateti chinchera chia Yehosafati iso, gose echi’Asa, omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles21:13 Ribaga ri’ayio kwabwatirie chinchera chi’abaruoti b’Abaisraeli, na kwagerire Abayuda na abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu babeire batari abegenwa, buna abanto b’enyomba y’Ahabu bagerete Abaisraeli tibaba abegenwa. Naende gwaitire abamura bamino, aba barenge ase enyomba ya iso, na barenge abaya gokobua." 
2Chronicles21:14 Rora Omonene narente amaakwa amanene igoro ase abanto bao, na ase abana bao, na ase abakungu bao, na enibo yao yonsi." 
2Chronicles21:15 Aye omonyene nonyore oborwaire obobe bw’enda goika amara ao abe agosoka isiko ase engencho y’oborwaire obwo, rituko ase rituko.”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Omonene agasukia Abafilisti na Abaarabu, abwo bare ang’e n’Abaetiopia, bakarwania Yehoramu esegi." 
2Chronicles21:17 Bakagenda ase ense y’Abayuda, bagasoa aroro, bagasakora chinibo chionsi chi’enyomba y’omoruoti, bakaira na abana baye abamura, na abakungu baye, tibatigete nonya nomwana omomura oyomo otatiga Yehoahasi, oria orenge omoke ase abana baye." 
2Chronicles21:18 Nyuma y’ayio onsi Omonene agaaka Yehoramu noborwaire bw’enda botarenge kogwenigwa. 
2Chronicles21:19 Nyuma y’amatuko atari make, ase omoerio bw’omwaka o kabere, amara aye agasoka ase engencho y’oborwaire boria; ere agakwa ase ogochandeka kw’obororo obonene. Abanto tibautete omorero bw’okworokia amasikani ase engencho yaye, buna bakorete ase engencho ye chisokoro chiaye." 
2Chronicles21:20 Yehoramu nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etato na ebere, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka etano na etato, agwo Yerusalemu. Ekero akwete, omonto onde tamoichanerete. Abanto bakamotindeka ase Omochie o Daudi, korende tari ase chimbeera chi’abaruoti." 
2Chronicles22:1 Abanto ba Yerusalemu bakabeka Ahasia, omwana omomura omoke o Yehoramu, akaba omoruoti ase ribaga riaye, ekiagera ekeombe ki’abanto bachete amo n’Abaarabu ase egetwori konya baitire abamura abanene bonsi ba Yehoramu. Ase igo Ahasia, omomura o Yehoramu, akaba omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahasia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na ebere, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba omwaka oyomo, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Atalia, omochokoro bw’Omuri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Nere boigo akabwatia chinchera chi’enyomba y’Ahabu, ekiagera ng’ina nere orenge komosemia akore ayare amabe." 
2Chronicles22:4 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna abanto b’enyomba y’Ahabu bakorete, ekiagera ekero ise akwete, abanto abwo bakaba abasemia baye, goika agaikera ogosirigwa kwaye." 
2Chronicles22:5 Akaigwera ogosemigwa kwabo, akagenda amo na Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, korwania Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, agwo Ramoti o Gileadi. Abasiiria bagaaka Yoramu chingoma." 
2Chronicles22:6 Akairana Yesireeli gochia korwarigwa chingoma chiria anyorete agwo Rama, ekero arwanete na Hasaeli, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria. Ahasia, mosinto o Yehoramu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akagenda korora Yoramu, mosinto bw’Ahabu, agwo Yesireeli, ekiagera nigo arenge omorwaire." 
2Chronicles22:7 Amang’ana aya nigo achigetwe na Nyasae ng’a okogwa kw’Ahasia kobe ase okogenda kwaye korora Yoramu. Ekero Ahasia aigete aroro, nigo agendete amo na Yoramu koumerana na Yehu, mosinto o Nimusi, oria Omonene aagete amaguta, erinde asirie enyomba y’Ahabu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Ekero Yehu arenge korua egesusuro igoro ase enyomba y’Ahabu, akanyora abanene b’Abayuda, na abana abamura b’abamura bamwabo Ahasia, baria barenge gokorera Ahasia, akabaita." 
2Chronicles22:9 Naende akarigia Ahasia. Nere akanyorekana bwebisete agwo Samaria, akarentwa ase Yehu, erio agaitwa. Abanto bakamotindeka, ekiagera nigo batebete, “Oyio nigo arenge omochokoro o Yehosafati, oria omorigetie Omonene nenkoro yaye yonsi.” Nyuma y’ayio omonto tarenge ase enyomba y’Ahasia oyo onyarete kogamba ase oboruoti boria." 
2Chronicles22:10 Ekero Atalia, ng’ina Ahasia, aroche ng’a omwana oye okure, akaimoka, agaita ab’enyomba yonsi y’omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Korende Yehoseba, mosubati o Yehoramu omoruoti, akarusia Yoashi, omwana bw’Ahasia, bobisi, korwa ase egati y’abana b’omoruoti, abwo barenge ang’e goitwa, akamoira amo nomoreri oye, akamobisa ase akanyomba gakorarwa. Aroro Yehoseba, mosubati o Yehoramu omoruoti, oyorenge moka Yehoyada omokuani, akabisa Yoashi korwa ase Atalia, erinde tamoita. Ayio nigo ayakorete, ekiagera arenge omosubati omwabo Ahasia." 
2Chronicles22:12 Yoashi akaba amo nabarabwo ase emiaka etano nomo, abisire ase enyomba ya Nyasae, ekero Atalia arenge kogamba igoro ase ense eria." 
2Chronicles23:1 Ase owaka o gatano na kabere Yehoyada akaba omoremu, akarangeria abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi b’amagana, agakora okobwatana nabarabwo. Abatang’ani aba nabwo aba: Asaria, mosinto o Yerohamu, na Isumaeli, mosinto o Yehohanani, na Asaria, mosinto bw’Obedi, na Maaseya, mosinto bw’Adaya, na Elisafati, mosinto o Sikiri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Barabwo bakagenda ase ense yonsi y’Abayuda, bagasangereria Abalawi korwa ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda amo nabateneneri be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, bakagenda Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles23:3 Omosangererekano bwonsi ogakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nomoruoti agwo ase enyomba ya Nyasae. Erio Yehoyada akabatebia, “Rora omwana bw’omoruoti! Tiga agambe, buna Omonene akwanete igoro y’ororeria rwa Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Eke nakio morakore: Ase inwe abakuani na Abalawi, inwe abamokorenda ase rituko ri’Esabato, ensemo ya isato yaino inamobe abarendi b’ebiita;" 
2Chronicles23:5 na ensemo ende ya isato babe bakorenda enyomba y’omoruoti, na ensemo ende ya isato ase Egeita ki’Oboroso; na abanto bande bonsi babeere ime ase chiraaro chi’enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles23:6 Omonto onde bwensi tabaisa gosoa enyomba y’Omonene otatiga abakuani na Abalawi abwo bare ab’ekerisio. Abwo mbanyare gosoa, ekiagera bachenekire, korende abanto bande goika babwate omoroberio ochikire n’Omonene." 
2Chronicles23:7 Abalawi mbaetanane omoruoti, kera oyomo abe obwate ebirwanero biaye koboko kwaye; na monto onde bwensi orasoe ase enyomba eria goika aitwe akwe. Mobe amo nomoruoti aase ande onsi akogenda na koirana.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Abalawi na Abayuda bonsi bagakora onsi koreng’ana buna Yehoyada omokuani abachigete. Kera oyomo akarenta abanto baye, baria barenge gokora emeremo ase rituko ri’Esabato, na baria barenge korua ase emeremo ase rituko riria, ekiagera Yehoyada omokuani tabaete ribaga bagende." 
2Chronicles23:9 Yehoyada omokuani akaa abatang’ani baria amatimo, ne ching’aya, ne chinguba echio chiarenge echia Daudi, chiabegetwe ase enyomba ya Nyasae." 
2Chronicles23:10 Akabeka abanto bonsi korenda omoruoti, kera omonto akaba obwate ebirwanero biaye koboko kwaye, bagatenena korwa ensemo ya irianyi y’enyomba goika ensemo ya sugusu, bagaetanana egesasimero na enyomba eria." 
2Chronicles23:11 Erio akarenta omwana oria bw’omoruoti isiko, akamobekera egutwa ase omotwe oye, naende akamoa Ebuku y’Oborori. Yoashi akararigwa koba omoruoti, na Yehoyada na abamura baye bakamoaka amaguta, bagateba, “Omoruoti ochie kare!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Ekero Atalia aigwete eriogi ri’abanto barenge gocharoka‐charoka na gotogia omoruoti, agasoa enyomba y’Omonene ase abanto basangererekanete." 
2Chronicles23:13 Na aroro akarora omoruoti oteneine ang’e nesiiro yaye agwo ase egesoero, na abatang’ani na abanto barenge kobugia ebirombeta mbateneine mbarabare ase omoruoti, na abanto bonsi b’ense eria nigo barenge nomochengo bakobugia ebirombeta. Abateria ababwate ebinto biabo bikobugigwa, bakaba batang’anete amatera ’ogotogia. Erio Atalia agatandora chianga chiaye, akarera, “Oko nokoregwa! Nokoregwa!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yehoyada omokuani agasokia abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi b’amagana, akabatebia, “Mosokie isiko, mobeke ase egati y’abarendi, na moite nomoro onde bwensi okomotunyana.” Omokuani nigo atebete ng’a tibabaisa komoitera ime ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles23:15 Ase ayio bakabwata omokungu oria, bakamoetia gochia ase enyomba y’omoruoti na bakamoira aroro ase Egeita gie Chibarasi, bakamoitera aroro agakwa." 
2Chronicles23:16 Yehoyada agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania egati yaye omonyene na abanto bonsi amo nomoruoti, ng’a babe abanto b’Omonene." 
2Chronicles23:17 Erio abanto bonsi bakagenda ase hekalu ya Baali, bakayetagora bakayeiyeria inse. Ebisasimero biaye na emegwekano yaye bakabinachana ebing’ese, bagaitera Matani, omokuani o Baali, agwo bosio bw’egesasimero." 
2Chronicles23:18 Yehoyada akabeka abarendi ase enyomba y’Omonene, bagatenenerwa nabakuani Abalawi, baria Daudi konya achorire batenenere enyomba y’Omonene. Barabwo babe bakorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase Omonene, koreng’ana buna arikire ase amachiko a Musa. Naende babe bakorua ebing’wanso biria ase omogoko na amatera, buna aroberetigwe na Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Akabeka abarendi bakorenda ebiita bi’enyomba y’Omonene na gotanga omonto onde bwensi otachenegete tasoa ime. 
2Chronicles23:20 Nyuma y’ayio akagenda amo nabatang’ani b’abarwani esegi b’amagana na abanto basikire, na abagambi b’abanto, na abanto bonsi b’ense eria, akarusia omoruoti korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene, bakamoetia ase Egeita kia Rogoro gochia ase enyomba y’omoruoti. Bakamoikaransia ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti." 
2Chronicles23:21 Abanto bonsi b’ense eria bakaba nomogoko, na omochie okaba omotoereru ekiagera Atalia konya aitirwe nomoro." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoashi agachaka kogamba ekero arenge nemiaka etano na ebere, na akagamba emiaka emerongo ene agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Sibia korwa Beeri‐Seba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Yoashi agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene ase amatuko onsi Yehoyada omokuani arenge moyo. 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoyada akamonyuomeria abakungu babere, na barabwo bakamoiborera abana, abamura na abaiseke." 
2Chronicles24:4 Nyuma y’ayio Yoashi akagania koroisia enyomba y’Omonene. 
2Chronicles24:5 Agasangereria abakuani na Abalawi, akabatebia, “Kera omwaka, genda ase emechie y’Abayuda, mosangererie chibesa korwa ase Abaisraeli bonsi, chibe ase okoroiseria enyomba ya Nyasae oino; mokore ayio ase obwango.” Korende Abalawi tibakorete ring’ana erio ase obwango." 
2Chronicles24:6 Omoruoti akarangeria Yehoyada, omokuani oria omonene, akamoboria, “Nase ki otaratebia Abalawi barente korwa ase Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu ebango yachigetwe na Musa, omosomba bw’Omonene, eyio omosangererekano ogwenerete korenta ase Eema y’Oborori?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Abana abamura b’Atalia, omokungu oria orenge gokora amabe amange, konya babochoire enyomba ya Nyasae basoire ime; boigo ebinto biatananeretwe ase enyomba y’Omonene, babibekire ase chinyasae chiria Baali." 
2Chronicles24:8 Ase ayio buna omoruoti achigete, esanduku ekaroisigwa ekabekwa isiko ase egeita ki’enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles24:9 Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu bakararerigwa barente ase Omonene ebango eria Musa, omosomba o Nyasae, abekerete Abaisraeli agwo ase erooro." 
2Chronicles24:10 Abatang’ani b’abanto, amo nabanto bonsi, bakabeka chibesa chiabo ime ase esanduku eria bare nomogoko, goika ebango yonsi ekarentwa." 
2Chronicles24:11 Engaki ende yonsi esanduku eria yare korentwa n’Abalawi ase abanto baria omoruoti achorete, na ekero barabwo baare korora ng’a chibesa chiabeire chinyinge, omoriki bw’omoruoti na omosomba bw’omokuani omonene nigo baare gocha barusia chibesa echio. Nyuma y’ayio bairania esanduku eria aase aye. Bakaba bagokora igo rituko ase rituko bagasangereria chibesa chinyinge." 
2Chronicles24:12 Omoruoti na Yehoyada bakaa abatenenerete emeremo y’enyomba y’Omonene chibesa chiria, na abwo bakarika abaagacheri amagena na abasenia be chibao baroiserie enyomba y’Omonene ase yatagogete; boigo bakarika abakori emeremo b’ebioma na ab’etaai baroisie enyomba eyio." 
2Chronicles24:13 Baria babegetwe gokora emeremo, bagakora omokia, na emeremo ekagenderera buya goika enyomba eria ekaroisigwa, ekaba buna enyia, naende enkong’u." 
2Chronicles24:14 Ekero emeremo eria yaerete chibesa chiria chiatigarete chikarentwa ase omoruoti na Yehoyada. Korwa ase chibesa echio chie chifeta na echie chitahabu ebikorero bi’enyomba y’Omonene bikaroisigwa, ebitaabo na ebinto binde bigokorerwa ase omosangererekano, na ebi’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’ogosambera ubani. Abanto bakaba bakorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase enyomba y’Omonene kogenderera botambe ase obogima bwonsi bwa Yehoyada." 
2Chronicles24:15 Yehoyada akaba omogotu mono, agakwa ekero akoorire emiaka rigana erimo, na emerongo etato." 
2Chronicles24:16 Abanto bakamotindeka agwo ase Omochie o Daudi, aase abaruoti barenge gotindekwa, ekiagera nigo akorete ayare amaya ase Abaisraeli, na ase Nyasae, na ase enyomba ya Nyasae." 
2Chronicles24:17 Nyuma Yehoyada gakure, abanene b’Abayuda bakagenda ase omoruoti bakoorokia amasikani asare, na omoruoti akabategerera." 
2Chronicles24:18 Abanto bagatiga enyomba y’Omonene, na Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, bagakorera emete y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, na emegwekano ende y’ogosasimwa. Ase ayio endamwamu y’Omonene egacha igoro ase Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu ase engencho y’okomocha kwabo." 
2Chronicles24:19 Korende nonya naboigo, Omonene agatoma ababani ase egati yabo, erinde babairanie asare; aba bakaba bakobakurera korende abanto tibabaigwerete." 
2Chronicles24:20 Omoika o Nyasae ogacha igoro ase Zakaria, mosinto o Yehoyada omokuani. Ere agatenena ase egati y’abanto, akabatebia, “Aya naro Nyasae agokwana: Nase ki mogosaria amachiko ’Omonene? Timokonyara gosesenigwa. Ekiagera inwe mwamotigire Omonene, nere obatigire inwe.”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Korende bagakora omoroberio bw’okomoita, na ase ogochika kw’omoruoti bakamoaka amagena ase eraaro y’enyomba y’Omonene goika agakwa." 
2Chronicles24:22 Yoashi omoruoti tainyorete obuya obo Yehoyada, ise Zakaria, konya amokoreire, korende agaita omwana oye. Ekero Zakaria arenge gokwa agateba, “Tiga Omonene arore aya na arusie egesiomba.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Ase omoerio bw’omwaka abarwani esegi b’Abasiiria bagacha korwania Yoashi. Bagacha ase Abayuda na ase abanto ba Yerusalemu, bagaita abanene bonsi b’abanto abwo. Na ebisakorwa bionsi basakorete bakairera omoruoti o Damesiki." 
2Chronicles24:24 Abasiiria nigo bachete nabarwani abake mono, korende Omonene akabeka abarwani abange mono ase amaboko abo, ekiagera Abayuda konya batigire Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo. Igo Yoashi akaegwa egesusuro." 
2Chronicles24:25 Abasiiria bakagenda bagatiga Yoashi ore oakirwe chingoma chimbe. Korende abasomba baye bagakora omoroberio bw’okomoita, ekiagera aiterete amanyinga ’omwana o Yehoyada omokuani; bakagenda bakamoitera borere bwaye, agakwa; na abanto bakamotindeka ase Omochie o Daudi, korende tibamotindegete ase chimbeera chi’abaruoti." 
2Chronicles24:26 Abamoitete nabwo aba: Sabadi, omomura o Simeati, omokungu bw’Abaamoni, na Yehosabadi, omomura o Simiriti, omokungu bw’Abamoabu." 
2Chronicles24:27 Amang’ana igoro y’abamura ba Yoashi na amang’ana akwanetwe igoro yaye, na buna aroisetie enyomba ya Nyasae, nigo arikire ase Ogotebereria kw’Ebuku y’Abaruoti. Amasia, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amasia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na etano, ekero achagete kogamba; ere akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere na kianda, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Yehoadani korwa Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles25:2 Amasia agakora ayare amaronge ase obosio bw’Omonene, korende tarenge nomoyo omoikeranu." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ase obwango obwo anyorete chinguru chi’oboruoti bwaye, agaita abasomba baye baria baitete omoruoti ise." 
2Chronicles25:4 Korende taitete abana b’abasomba baria. Agakora koreng’ana namang’ana arikire ase ebuku y’amachiko a Musa agwo ase Omonene achigete, “Abaibori tibagoitwa ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abana babo, gose abana tibagoitwa ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abaibori babo, korende kera omonto nigo arakwe ase engencho y’ebibe biaye omonyene.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amasia agasangereria Abayuda, akabeka kera eamate y’Abayuda na ey’Ababenjamin inse y’abatang’ani be chilifu na ab’amagana. Akabara abanto barenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na goetania, akanyora ng’a nigo barenge chilifu amagana atato (300,000), abanto bachoretwe, bamanyete korwana esegi namatimo ne chinguba." 
2Chronicles25:6 Agasaba abarwani chituoni chilifu rigana erimo (100,000) korwa ase Abaisraeli, akabaakanera chifeta chitalanta rigana erimo." 
2Chronicles25:7 Korende omonto oyomo o Nyasae agacha asare, akamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, tobaisa gotiga Abaisraeli, Abaefraimu aba, bagende amo naye, ekiagera Omonene tari amo nabarabwo." 
2Chronicles25:8 Okogenda, nogende aye kore noboremu. Korende Nyasae nagotige obugwe nababisa bao, ekiagera Nyasae nabwate okobua kw’ogokonya na okw’okoiyeria inse.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amasia akaboria monto oria o Nyasae, “Ngento ki togokora ase chitalanta chiria rigana erimo naakanire abarwani esegi b’Abaisraeli?” Omonto oria o Nyasae akamoiraneria, “Omonene nabwate okobua gokoa chinyinge mono goetania echio.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Amasia akaa abarwani esegi barwete Efraimu ribaga bairane ase chinka chiabo, na barabwo bakaba nendamwamu enene ase Abayuda, bakairana bare nekeririanda ekenene." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amasia akaba omoremu agatang’ana abanto baye, akagenda ase Riranya ri’Omonyo, agaita Abaseiri chilifu ikomi," 
2Chronicles25:12 na Abayuda bakabwata abanto bande chilifu ikomi bare moyo, bakabaira ase egechuria, ki’egetare igoro, bakabatuguta gochia inse, goika bakabunanekana bakaba ebing’ese." 
2Chronicles25:13 Abarwani esegi baria Amasia atancherete bagende nabarabwo korwana esegi, bakarwania emechie y’Abayuda, gochakera Samaria goikeera Beti‐Horoni, bagaita abanto chilifu isato (3,000), bagasakora ebinto ebinge." 
2Chronicles25:14 Ekero Amasia airanete korwa ase ogoita Abaedomu, akarentana chinyasae chi’Abaedomu, agachisasima na gochiruera ebing’wanso." 
2Chronicles25:15 Omonene akaba nendamwamu asare, akamotomera omobani komoboria, “Nase ki kwarigirie chinyasae chi’abanto, chiria chitabakonyete korwa ase okoboko kwao?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Ekero agendererete gokwana omoruoti akamoboria, “Inee! Ntwagochorire obe omosemia bw’omoruoti? Kira‐kiri! Noganetie togoite okwe?” Omobani oria agakira, erio agateba, “Namanyire ng’a Nyasae onachire ekina agoite, ekiagera gwakorire egento eke na kwangire koigwera ogosemia kwane.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agakwana nabasemia baye, erio agatoma amang’ana ase Yehoasi, mosinto o Yehoahasi o Yehu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, agateba, “Inchuo, torigereranie obosio ase obosio.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, agatoma amang’ana ase Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, agateba, “Rigeri ria Lebanoni rigatoma amang’ana ase omocharake ore Lebanoni, rigakwana: Karue omoiseke oo, omwana one omomura amonyuome. Erio eng’iti y’orosana ya Lebanoni egaeta aase agwo, egatiringera inse rigeri riria." 
2Chronicles25:19 Na bono aye nigo ogokwana iga: Rora, inche naitire Abaedomu; ase igo kweimokereirie igoro ase enkoro yao ime na kweenenia. Korende aye, beera agwo nka bwoo! Nase ki okorangeria emechando, erinde ogwe, aye amo n’Abayuda?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Korende Amasia tanchete gotegerera. Nyasae nigo achigete ng’a Abayuda babekwe ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, ekiagera barigetie chinyasae chi’Abaedomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 Yehoasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, akagenda, bakarigererania n’Amasia, ase okorwana esegi agwo Beti‐Semesi, omochie bw’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Abayuda bakabugwa n’Abaisraeli, na kera omonto agatama, akagenda nka bwoye." 
2Chronicles25:23 Amasia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, mosinto o Yoashi bw’Ahasia, akabwatwa na Yehoasi omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, agwo Beti‐Semesi, akarentwa Yerusalemu. Yehoasi karentire Amasia agwo Yerusalemu, agatagora orwaki rwa Yerusalemu korwa Egeita gi’Efraimu goika Egeita gi’Ekoona, obotambe bw’amaboko amagana ane." 
2Chronicles25:24 Akaira chitahabu chionsi, ne chifeta, na ebikorero bionsi bianyorekanete ase enyomba ya Nyasae, biria Obedi‐Edomu arendete; boigo akaira chinibo chi’enyomba y’omoruoti, agoosa nabanto abarengeo. Erio akairana Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amasia, mosinto o Yoashi, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akagenderera koba moyo emiaka ikomi na etano nyuma y’ogokwa kwa Yehoasi mosinto o Yehoahasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles25:26 Amang’ana ande onsi igoro y’Amasia, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’Abaruoti b’Abayuda na ab’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles25:27 Korwa engaki eria Amasia atigete Omonene, abanto ba Yerusalemu bagakora omoroberio bw’okomoita. Ere agatama gochia Lakisi, na abanto bagatomwa aroro, bakamoita." 
2Chronicles25:28 Bakabogoria omobere oye ne chibarasi, bakayoira ase Omochie o Daudi, bakamotindeka ase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegetwe." 
2Chronicles26:1 Ekero Usia arenge nemiaka ikomi na etano nomo, Abayuda bonsi bakamobeka akaba omoruoti ribaga ri’Amasia ise." 
2Chronicles26:2 Erio nyuma Amasia omoruoti kararire ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, Usia akagitera omochie bw’Eloti chindwaki, akayoirania ase Abayuda." 
2Chronicles26:3 Usia nigo arenge nemiaka ikomi na etano nomo, ekero achagete kogamba; akagamba emiaka emerongo etano, na ebere, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Yekolia korwa Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles26:4 Usia agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, buna Amasia ise akorete." 
2Chronicles26:5 Usia akaba okorigia Nyasae nenkoro yaye ase amatuko a Zakaria, oyorenge komworokereria amoiroke Nyasae. Na ekero arenge komorigia Omonene, Nyasae akaba okomosesenia." 
2Chronicles26:6 Usia akagenda akarwania Abafilisti esegi; agatagora orwaki rwa Gati, na orwa Yabune, na orw’Asidodi. Akaagacha naende emechie ase orogongo rw’Asidodi na aande onsi ase egati y’Abafilisti." 
2Chronicles26:7 Nyasae akamokonya, erinde akabua Abafilisti, amo n’Abaarabu abamenyete ase Guru‐Baali, na Abameuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Abaamoni bakarua ebango ase Usia; ere nigo abete nokobua okonene, ne chinkuma chiaye chigasarera gochia ase ense ya Misiri." 
2Chronicles26:9 Usia akaagacha emerobiri ase Yerusalemu agwo ase Egeita gi’Ekoona, na ase Egeita kie Rikura, na ase Chinsanganio, erio akayegitera chiburi." 
2Chronicles26:10 Naende akaagacha emerobiri ase erooro, na agakunya chinsoko chinyinge, ekiagera nigo abwate amaicho amange agwo ase ense omweya na ase ense eimokererete igoro eraire, Boigo nabwate abaremi abange, na abakori emeremo b’emegondo y’emesabibu agwo ase chinse chi’ebigoro na ase chinse chintobu, ekiagera nigo anchete oboremi." 
2Chronicles26:11 Naende Usia nabwate omoganda bw’abarwani esegi bamanyete korwana. Barabwo bakagenda korwana esegi, ekeombe ase ekeombe, koreng’ana buna babaretwe na korikwa na Yeieli omoriki, na Maaseya omoteneneri, inse y’obochiki bwa Hanania, omochiki bw’abarwani b’omoruoti." 
2Chronicles26:12 Omobaro bw’abateneneri be chiamate chiabo nigo barenge chilifu ibere, na amagana atano na rimo (2,600), abanto chituoni ase esegi." 
2Chronicles26:13 Inse y’obochiki bwabo nigo barenge abanto chilifu amagana atato na isano na ibere, na amagana atano (307,500). Barabwo nigo barenge korwana esegi ne chinguru na oboremu, gokonya omoruoti ase okorwania ababisa baye." 
2Chronicles26:14 Usia akagonchera abarwani baye chinguba, akabaturera na amatimo, akabaroiseria na ebigogwa, ne chingobo chi’ebioma, na amata, na amagena barenge koruta ne chinduruche." 
2Chronicles26:15 Akabeka abanto agwo Yerusalemu koroisia ebikorero bi’okorutera emegwe na amagena amanene. Ebikorero ebio bikabekwa ase emerobiri igoro na ase chikoona chie chindwaki, erinde emegwe na amagena amanene biraserwe nabirobio. Chinkuma chiaye chigasarera gochia aare, ekiagera nigo akonyetwe ase enchera y’ogokumia, goika akaba nokobua okonene." 
2Chronicles26:16 Ekero abete nokobua okonene, akaenena goika agesiria. Akaba omong’ainereria ase Omonene, Nyasae oye: agasoa ase Hekalu y’Omonene gosamba ubani igoro ase egesasimero ki’ogosambera ubani." 
2Chronicles26:17 Asaria amo nabakuani bande b’Omonene emerongo etano na etato barenge abaremu bagasoa Hekalu korwa nyuma yaye. 
2Chronicles26:18 Barabwo bagakania Usia omoruoti, bakamotebia, “Usia, aye tochikiri gosamba ubani ase Omonene, korende abakuani ab’ororeria rwa Haroni nabwo baatananetwe gosamba ubani. Aye soka korwa aiga Aase Aachenu, kwamochire. Omonene Nyasae tagokoa ogosikwa ekiagera gwakorire ayio.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Usia akaba nendamwamu enene agwo aase ateneine negetaabo ase okoboko kwaye gochia gosamba ubani, na ekero abete nendamwamu ase abakuani, oborwaire bwa ukoma bokamobwata ase obosio bwaye agwo bosio bw’abakuani, ime ase enyomba y’Omonene, ase egesasimero ki’ogosambera ubani." 
2Chronicles26:20 Asaria, omokuani omonene, na abakuani baria bakarigereria omoruoti, bakarora ng’a onyorire oborwaire bwa ukoma ase obosio bwaye. Bakamobwata, bakamosokia gochia isiko bwango, nere omonyene akaayerera agasoka isiko, ekiagera Omonene amoagete." 
2Chronicles26:21 Usia nigo abete noborwaire bwa ukoma goika ogokwa kwaye, na ase engencho y’ayio akamenya ao ere bweka, akarusananigwa korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene. Yotamu, omomura oye, akaba omoteneneri ase enyomba y’omoruoti, naende akaba okogambera abanto b’ense eria." 
2Chronicles26:22 Amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Usia, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire na Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Usia, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire na Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Usia akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, na agatindekwa ase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegetwe agwo ase oboremo bw’ogotindeka abaruoti, ekiagera nigo akwanetwe, “Oyo nigo arenge noborwaire bwa ukoma.” Yotamu, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotamu nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na etano ekero achagete kogamba na akagamba emiaka ikomi na etano nomo, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Yerusa, omosubati o Zadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene, koreng’ana buna aria onsi Usia ise akorete. Amo nayio tasoete ime ase Hekalu y’Omonene. Korende abanto bakagenderera gokora obobe obwo banarete gokora." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yotamu akaagacha Egeita kia Rogoro ki’enyomba y’Omonene, naende agakora emeremo emenene ase okoagacha orwaki rw’Ofeli." 
2Chronicles27:4 Boigo akaagacha emechie ase ense y’ebigoro, na ase amanani akaagacha chiburi na emerobiri." 
2Chronicles27:5 Akarwana nomoruoti bw’Abaamoni, akamobua, na ase omwaka oria Abaamoni bakaba bakomoa chifeta chiisaine chitalanta rigana erimo, na engano ebitonga chilifu rigana erimo (100,000), na esairi ebitonga chilifu rigana erimo (100,000). Abaamori bakaba bakomoa ebinto ebio ebirengo bireng’aine buna biria ase omwaka o kabere, na oyo o gatato." 
2Chronicles27:6 Ekiagera Yotamu abwatetie chinchera chi’Omonene, Nyasae oye, akaba nokobua okonene." 
2Chronicles27:7 Amang’ana ande onsi Yotamu akorete, ne chisegi chiaye chionsi, ne chinchera chi’obogima bwaye, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli na ab’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na etano, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka ikomi na etano nomo agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles27:9 Yotamu akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete; abanto bakamotindeka ase Omochie o Daudi. Ahasi, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahasi nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka ikomi na etano nomo, agwo Yerusalemu. Takorete ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene buna Daudi, sokoro yaye, akorete." 
2Chronicles28:2 Akabwatia chinchera chi’abaruoti b’Abaisraeli, naende akaroisia emegwekano ya Baali yanyititoire na kobombwa akayesasima." 
2Chronicles28:3 Agasamba ubani agwo ase Rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu. Naende agasamba abana baye bakaba ekeng’wanso, koreng’ana nogokora gw’okogechia okwo abanto banarete gokora, baria Omonene aseretie korwa ase amasio ’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles28:4 Akarua ebing’wanso na gosambera ubani agwo aase aimokererete igoro, na ase ebigoro, na inse ya kera omote omobese." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ase ayio Omonene, Nyasae oye, akabeka Ahasi ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abasiiria. Barabwo bakamobua, bagoosa abanto abange, bakabaira Damesiki. Boigo Omonene akamobeka ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli. Omoruoti oyio akamobua, agaita abanto abange." 
2Chronicles28:6 Ase rituko erimo Peka, mosinto o Remalia, agaita abanto chituoni chilifu rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere (120,000) agwo ase ense ya Yuda. Aya nigo akoregete bo, ekiagera Abayuda batigete Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo." 
2Chronicles28:7 Sikiri, omonto etuoni korwa Efraimu, agaita Maaseya, omomura bw’omoruoti, na Asirikamu, omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, na Elikana, oyo o kabere ase omoruoti." 
2Chronicles28:8 Abaisraeli bakabwata abanto bamwabo chilifu amagana abere (200,000): abakungu, na abana, abamura na abaiseke, bakabaira ase obosomba. Boigo bagasakora ebinto ebinge korwa ase abanto baria, bakabiira Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Odedi, omobani bw’Omonene, nao arenge. Ere akagenda korotota abarwani b’esegi, baria bachete Samaria, akabatebia, “Rora Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, nigo abete nendamwamu ase Abayuda, akababeka ase amaboko aino, korende inwe mwabaitire more nekeririanda, ekio kiamanyekanire igoro." 
2Chronicles28:10 Na bono nigo moganetie gokora Abayuda, na abanto ba Yerusalemu, abasacha na abakungu, babe abasomba baino. Inee! Inwe timori nebibe biaino abanyene mwakorire ase Omonene, Nyasae oino?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Bono inyigwere, irania abanto abwo mwosete korwa ase abanto bamino, ekiagera endamwamu entindi y’Omonene nigo ere igoro yaino.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Abanto bande abanene b’Abaefraimu: Asaria, mosinto o Yohanani, na Berekia mosinto o Mesilemoti, na Yehisikia, mosinto o Salumu, na Amasa, mosinto o Hadilai, bagatenena gokania abarwani baria barenge koirana korwa ase esegi," 
2Chronicles28:13 bakabatebia, “Timobaisa korenta aa abanto abwo mwosete; moise gokora bo, nigo morabaise kogera tobe nokomocha ase Omonene komenta amo nebibe na okomocha tore nakwo bono. Okomocha tobwate nigo kore okonene, na endamwamu entindi ya Nyasae nigo ere igoro ase Abaisraeli.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Ase ayio abarwani esegi bagatiga abanto baria boosete amo nebisakorwa ase amasio ’abanene baria na ase omosangererekano bwonsi. 
2Chronicles28:15 Abanto amarieta abo atoretwe bakaimoka, bakaboyia baria boosetwe barenge gesobono, bakababekera chianga na ebikoroto, bakabaa nendagera na ebinyugwa, bakabaaka namaguta. Naende bakariinia ase chitigere baria batarenge ne chinguru, bakaira baria bonsi boosetwe, amo nebisakorwa bionsi gochia Yeriko, Omochie bw’Emekendo, ase abamwabo bamenyete. Nyuma y’ayio bakairana Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ase engaki eria Ahasi omoruoti agatoma amang’ana ase omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akamoboria amokonye." 
2Chronicles28:17 Abaedomu konya barwanirie Abayuda bababuire na boosire abanto. 
2Chronicles28:18 Na Abafilisti konya baumokeire emechie y’ense omweya ya Yuda amo na Negebu, bakaira Beti‐Semesi, na Ayaloni, na Gederoti, na Soko, amo nebichie biaye, na Timuna amo nebichie biaye, na Gimoso amo nebichie biaye, bakamenya aroro." 
2Chronicles28:19 Omonene nigo aganetie kwororoberia Abayuda ase engencho y’Ahasi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, ekiagera ere arenterete Abayuda obosooku na tarenge omwegenwa ase Omonene." 
2Chronicles28:20 Erio Tiligati‐Pileseri, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akagenda akamorwania na komochanda ribaga ri’okomokonya." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahasi akaurereria enyomba y’Omonene, na enyomba y’omoruoti, na ey’abanene barenge nere, akaa omoruoti bw’Abaasuri ebango, korende ayio tamokonyete." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ahasi omoruoti oria oria akamenta gotaba omwegenwa ase Omonene, ase engaki eria anyorete emechando." 
2Chronicles28:23 Akarua ebing’wanso ase chinyasae chia Damesiki, chiria konya chiamobuire, agateba, “Chinyasae chi’abaruoti b’Abasiiria nachio chiabakonyete bakabua, goika nchiruere ebing’wanso, erinde chinkonye nainche.” Korende chirochio chikarenta ogosirigwa kwaye na okw’Abaisraeli bonsi." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ahasi agasangereria ebikorero bi’enyomba ya Nyasae, akabinachana ebing’ese, erio agasieka ebisieri bi’enyomba y’Omonene, akayeroiseria ebisasimero aase ande onsi agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Ase kera omochie bw’Abayuda akaroisia aase aimokererete igoro ogosambera ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao; Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaye, akagechigwa goika akaba nendamwamu." 
2Chronicles28:26 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Ahasi akorete, ne chinchera chiaye chionsi, korwa omochakano goika omoerio, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abayuda na ab’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ahasi akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, na abanto bakamotindeka ase omochie o Yerusalemu; tibamobegete ase chimbeera ase abaruoti b’Abaisraeli baare gotindekwa. Hezekia, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia agachaka kogamba ekero arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere, na etano, na akagamba emiaka emerongo ebere, na kianda, agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Abiya, omosubati o Zakaria," 
2Chronicles29:2 Hesekia agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene koreng’ana buna aya onsi Daudi, sokoro yaye, akorete." 
2Chronicles29:3 Ase omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba gwa Hezekia, akaigora ebisieri bi’enyomba y’Omonene, naende akabiroisia bikaba ebiyia." 
2Chronicles29:4 Akarenta abakuani na Abalawi, akabasangereria amo agwo ase eraaro, ensemo ya moocha," 
2Chronicles29:5 akabatebia, “Inwe Abalawi, inyigwere! Bono inwe echene, naende mochene enyomba y’Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, morusie korwa ase Obomenyo obo Obochenu kera egento kebokorete bokaba obotachenegeti." 
2Chronicles29:6 Chisokoro chiaito tichiabete chinyegenwa; nigo chiakorete ayare amabe ase amaiso ’Omonene, Nyasae oito, chikamotiga. Barabwo bakaonchora amasio abo korwa ase Obomenyo bw’Omonene, bakaa Omonene amagega." 
2Chronicles29:7 Bagasieka ebisieri bi’enyomba yaagachire bosio bwe Hekalu yabwateranirie nero, na bakarimia chitaya, na tibasambete ubani gose tibaruete ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ime y’Aase Aachenu, ase Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles29:8 Ase ayio endamwamu y’Omonene egacha igoro ase Abayuda, na ase abanto ba Yerusalemu. Omonene akabakora bakaba ebiorokererio bi’ogokurera, na aya abakorerete abeire ay’ogoichania na ay’okoondokia abanto. Aya moyaroche namaiso aino." 
2Chronicles29:9 Bono abatata baito baitirwe nemioro bakure; abana baito, abamura na abaiseke, na abakungu baito bairirwe obosomba ase engencho y’ayio." 
2Chronicles29:10 “Bono nigo kore okogania kwane ng’a nkore okobwatana kw’ogotianania n’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, erinde endamwamu yaye entindi etotige." 
2Chronicles29:11 Abana baane, timobaisa koba abakoombia, ekiagera Omonene obachorire mobe mogotenena ase obosio bwaye momokorere; inwe mobe abasomba baye, momosambere ubani.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Erio Abalawi aba bakaimoka: Mahati, mosinto bw’Amasai, na Yoeli, mosinto bw’Asaria, be chiamate chi’Abakohati; na korwa ase chiamate chia Merari: Kisi, mosinto bw’Abidi, na Asaria, mosinto o Yehaleleli; na korwa ase chiamate chia Gerisoni: Yoah, mosinto o Sima, na Edeni, mosinto o Yoa." 
2Chronicles29:13 Korwa ase chiamate chi’Elisafani; Simuri na Yeieli; na korwa ase chiamate chi’Asafu: Zakaria na Matania. 
2Chronicles29:14 Na korwa ase chiamate chia Hemani: Yehieli na Simei; na korwa ase chiamate chia Yedutuni: Semaya na Usieli. 
2Chronicles29:15 Abalawi aba bagasangereria abanto bamwabo, erio bonsi bagechena, bagasoa ase enyomba y’Omonene bakayechena buna omoruoti konya arure ogochika koreng’ana ne ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
2Chronicles29:16 Abakuani bagasoa ase chinsemo chia ime kegima chi’enyomba y’Omonene, bakayechena. Bagasokia korwa imeo ebinto bionsi biakorete Hekalu y’Omonene ekaba eyetachenegeti goikera ase eraaro, na korwa aroro Abalawi bakabibogoria bakabiira goika ase rikura ria Kidironi." 
2Chronicles29:17 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, bagachaka gochena Hekalu, na ase rituko ria gatano na gatato ri’omotienyi oyio bagaikera enyomba yaagachire bosio bw’enyomba y’Omonene na yabwateranirie nero. Naende bagasoa bakaba bagochena enyomba y’Omonene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na atato, na ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano, na rimo, ri’omotienyi oyio bwe ritang’ani bagakoora emeremo eria." 
2Chronicles29:18 Bakagenda ase Hezekia omoruoti, bakamotebia, “Twachenire enyomba yonsi y’Omonene, na egesasimero gi’okoruera ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, amo nebikorero biaye bionsi, na emesa y’emegati ekoruegwa ase Nyasae amo nebikorero biaye bionsi bi’emesa eyio." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ebikorero bionsi biria Ahasi omoruoti atugutete na akabianga ekero arenge kogamba, ekiagera tabete omwegenwa ase Omonene, twabiroisirie na kobichena. Rora, nao bire agwo bosio bw’egesasimero ki’Omonene.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Erio Hezekia omoruoti akaimoka mambia chuni, agasangereria abanene b’omochie, na barabwo bagatiira kogenda gochia ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles29:21 Bakaira chieri isano na ibere, ne chimingichi isano na ibere, ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi isano na ibere, ne chigoree isano na ibere, chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase engencho y’oboruoti, na Hekalu, na Abayuda. Agachika abakuani ab’ororeria rwa Haroni bachirue ase egesasimero ki’Omonene." 
2Chronicles29:22 Bakanyenya chieri chiria, na abakuani bakaimokia amanyinga e chieri echio, bakayaumora ase egesasimero; naende bakanyenya chimingichi chiria, na amanyinga e chimingichi echio naro bakayaumora ase egesasimero. Nyuma y’ayio bakanyenya chimanwa chiria chie ching’ondi na amanyinga e chimanwa echio naro akaumorwa ase egesasimero." 
2Chronicles29:23 Erio bakarenta chigoree chiria chi’ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase omoruoti na ase omosangererekano, na barabwo bakabeka amaboko abo igoro ase emetwe ye chigoree echio." 
2Chronicles29:24 Abakuani baga chinyenya, na amanyinga e chigoree echio bakayaumora ase egesasimero akaba ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase okobwatania Abaisraeli bonsi na Nyasae. Omoruoti nigo achigete ng’a ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa na eki’ebibe biruegwe ase engencho y’Abaisraeli bonsi." 
2Chronicles29:25 Ase enyomba y’Omonene omoruoti akabeka Abalawi barenge goakania chisani chikwoga, na amakano, na amakano ’ebirigisa, koreng’ana nogochika kwa Nyasae goetera ase Daudi, na Gadi omorori bw’omoruoti, na Nathani omobani." 
2Chronicles29:26 Abalawi bagatenena babwate ebinto bi’okobugigwa bia Daudi, na abakuani babwate ebirombeta." 
2Chronicles29:27 Erio Hezekia agachika ng’a ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa keruegwe ase egesasimero. Ekero ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa giachagete koruegwa, abanto bagachaka goterera Omonene; na ababugia ebirombeta bakabibugia bakoraagwa nebinto bi’okobugigwa bia Daudi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles29:28 Erio omosangererekano bwonsi ogasasima, na abateri bagatera, na ababugia ebirombeta bakabibugia ase amariogi amanene; bakagenderera goika okoruegwa gw’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kogakoorwa." 
2Chronicles29:29 Ekero okoruegwa gw’ekeng’wanso gwakoorirwe, omoruoti amo nabanto bonsi barenge amo nere bagekumba, bagasasima." 
2Chronicles29:30 Hezekia omoruoti amo nabagambi b’oboruoti bagachika Abalawi batere amatera ay’ogotogia Omonene ase amang’ana a Daudi na ay’Asafu omorori. Barabwo bagatera, bakaba bagotogia nomogoko, bagekumba na gosasima." 
2Chronicles29:31 Erio Hezekia agatebia abanto “Bono mwatananirwe ase Omonene na gochenwa. Inchuo ang’e, renta ebing’wanso bi’okonyenywa, na ebi’omorembe ase enyomba y’Omonene.” Omosangererekano okarenta ebing’wanso biria, na baria barenge ne chinkoro chi’ogwancha, bakarenta ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa."
