2Chronicles29:32 Omobaro bw’ebing’wanso biria omosangererekano orentete nigo orenge chieri emerongo etano na ebere, ne chimingichi rigana erimo, ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi amagana abere. Echio chionsi nigo chiaruetwe chikaba ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ebing’wanso biatananetwe nigo biarenge chieri amagana atano na rimo, ne ching’ondi chilifu isano." 
2Chronicles29:34 Korende abakuani nigo barenge abake mono, na tibanyarete korusia amasankwa korwa ase ching’iti chiria chionsi chianyenyetwe chikaba ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa. Ase ayio Abalawi bamwabo bakabakonya goika emeremo eria ekaera, na goika abakuani bande bakaba bachenekire. Abalawi bakaba ne chinkoro chindonge kobua abakuani ase ogwechena abanyene." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa nigo biarenge ebinge, na amo nebio ebitinya bi’ebing’wanso bi’omorembe, na okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa gochikire koruegwa amo na birobio. Na igo obokoreri ase enyomba y’Omonene bokaba bokoroberigwa buya." 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekia amo nabanto bonsi bakaba nomogoko ase ayio Nyasae akorerete abanto, ekiagera nigo abairanerete ase obwango." 
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekia agatoma amang’ana ase Abaisraeli na ase Abayuda bonsi, naende akarika amarube ase Abaefraimu na ase Abamanase ng’a bachiche ase enyomba y’Omonene agwo Yerusalemu korenda Rituko Rinene ri’Epasaka ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles30:2 Omoruoti na abagambi b’oboruoti bwaye, na omosangererekano bwonsi orenge Yerusalemu, konya bagambire amo korenda Rituko Rinene ri’Epasaka ase omotienyi o kabere." 
2Chronicles30:3 Tibarenge konyara korirenda ase engaki eria yachikire, ekiagera abakuani konya tibarechena baisane omobaro oyoganeirie, gose abanto konya tibarasangererekana agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Omoroberio oyio okaba omoronge ase omoruoti na ase omosangererekano bwonsi. 
2Chronicles30:5 Bakararia ase Abaisraeli bonsi korwa Beeri‐Seba goika Dani ng’a, abanto bachiche Yerusalemu barende Rituko Rinene ri’Epasaka ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ekiagera konya tiriana korendwa nabanto abange buna yachigetwe." 
2Chronicles30:6 Abanto abaare abaango bakaegwa amarube korwa ase omoruoti na abagambi b’oboruoti, bakayaira ase ense yonsi y’Abaisraeli na ey’Abayuda, bagateba buna bachigetwe nomoruoti, bagateba, “Inwe Abaisraeli, moiranere Omonene, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Israeli, erio nere nabairanere inwe aba more abatigari mwatoorekire korwa ase amaboko ’abaruoti b’Abaasuri." 
2Chronicles30:7 Timoba buna chisokoro chiaino na buna abanto bamino batarenge abegenwa ase Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, goika akabasiria buna moroche bono." 
2Chronicles30:8 Timoba abanyabigoti bikong’u buna chisokoro chiaino chiarenge, korende mwekeyie ase Omonene, moche Aase aye Aachenu achenire kare na kare, momokorere Omonene, Nyasae oino, erinde endamwamu yaye entindi ebatige." 
2Chronicles30:9 Komorairane ase Omonene, abamino na abana baino barorerwe amabera, na baria baboosete erio bairane ase ense eye, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oino, nabwate obwanchani na amabera. Ere takobatiga ekero morairane asare.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Abanto baria abaango bairete amarube bakagenda ase kera omochie ase ense y’Efraimu na eya Manase, na goika eya Sabuloni, korende abanto bakabachecheria na kobachaya." 
2Chronicles30:11 Abanto abake boka b’Aseri, na aba Manase, na aba Sabuloni bagekeyia, bagacha Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 Ase ense y’Abayuda okoboko kwa Nyasae nao kwarenge kobaa ebirengererio ebimo gokora ogwancha kw’Omonene, buna omoruoti na abagambi baria bachigete." 
2Chronicles30:13 Ase omotienyi o kabere, abanto abange mono bagasangererekana agwo Yerusalemu korenda Rituko Rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera." 
2Chronicles30:14 Bakaimoka bakarusia ebisasimero biarenge agwo Yerusalemu, na ebisasimero bionsi bi’ogosambera ubani bakabirusia aroro, bakabituguta ase Rikura ria Kidironi." 
2Chronicles30:15 Ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi o kabere, bakanyenya ching’ondi chi’Epasaka. Abakuani na Abalawi bakaba nobosooku; ase igo bagechena na korenta ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles30:16 Bagakora emeremo yabo, kera oyomo aase aye, koreng’ana namachiko a Musa, omonto o Nyasae. Abakuani bakanyororokeria amanyinga aria banyorete korwa ase amaboko ’Abalawi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Ekiagera abanto abange ase omosangererekano konya tibarechena, Abalawi bakanyenya chimanwa chie ching’ondi chi’Epasaka ase bonsi abatachenegete ase okobaatanana na kobachena ase Omonene." 
2Chronicles30:18 Abanto abange korwa ase Abaefraimu, na Abamanase, na Abaisakaru, na Abasabuloni, konya tibarechena; korende nonya naboigo, bakaria chinyama chie ching’ondi chi’Epasaka buna ogochika gotarenge goteba. Hezekia konya obasabeire, ogoteba, “Omonene, ase obuya bwao ororere kera oyomo amabera," 
2Chronicles30:19 oyio oonchoire enkoro yaye ase ogokorigia aye Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, Omonene Nyasae, nonya tachenegeti kobwatekana nomoroberio bwe Hekalu.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Ase ayio Omonene akaigwa ogosaba gwa Hezekia, akarorera abanto amabera." 
2Chronicles30:21 Abaisraeli abarenge Yerusalemu bakarenda Amatuko Amanene ay’Emegati etabekiri memera. Bagakora igo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, bare nomogoko omonene. Abalawi na Abakuani bakaba bagotogia Omonene rituko ase rituko, bakaba bagotera na kobugia amakano ne chinguru chiabo chionsi ase ogotogia Omonene." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekia akagokia Abalawi, akababeka chinguru ase ogokwana amang’ana ’oboremu asebare, ase engencho y’emeremo emiya bakorete ase Omonene. Abanto bakaria endagera y’omoyega oria ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, bakarua ebing’wanso bi’omorembe, bagaakera Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, ng’a mbuya mono." 
2Chronicles30:23 Omosangererekano bwonsi ogancherana korenda Amatuko Amanene ase amatuko ande atano na abere; ase ayio bakayarenda ase amatuko ande atano na abere, bare nomogoko." 
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akaa omosangererekano chieri elifu eyemo, ne ching’ondi chikoruegwa ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa chilifu isano na ibere; na abagambi b’oboruoti bwaye bakayoa chieri elifu eyemo, ne ching’ondi chilifu ikomi. Erio abakuani abange bagechena." 
2Chronicles30:25 Omosangererekano bwonsi bw’Abayuda, na abakuani, na Abalawi, na omosangererekano bw’Abaisraeli abachete korwa ase ense yabo, na abageni abachete korwa ase ense y’Abaisraeli, na abamenyi bamenyete ase ense y’Abayuda, bakaba nomogoko omonene." 
2Chronicles30:26 Bono omogoko omonene okaba agwo Yerusalemu. Korwa ase chingaki chia Sulemani, mosinto o Daudi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, amang’ana buna ayio tana koba rinde ase Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:27 Erio abakuani na Abalawi bagatenena, bagasesenia abanto, na amariogi abo akaigugwa, na ogosaba kwabo kogaika ase obomenyo obochenu bw’Omonene aaria igoro." 
2Chronicles31:1 Ekero Amatuko ayio onsi Amanene aerete, Abaisraeli bonsi abarenge aroro bakagenda ase emechie y’Abayuda bakanachana amatenenerio agosasimwa na bagatagora emete y’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, naende bagasaria aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa. Boigo bagasaria kegima ebisasimero biarenge agwo ase orogongo rwonsi rw’Abayuda, na orw’Ababenjamin, na orw’Abaefraimu, na orw’Abamanase. Erio Abaisraeli bonsi bakairana gochia ase emechie yabo, kera omonto akagenda bwoye." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekia akairania abakuani na Abalawi, akabaroberia ase ebiombe. Kera oyomo obo akabekwa ase ekeombe kiaye koreng’ana nemeremo yaye arenge gokora. Bakabekwa korua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebi’omorembe, na gokora emeremo agwo ase ebiita bi’egetwori ki’Omonene, naende ase ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono ase Omonene na komotogia namatera." 
2Chronicles31:3 Omoruoti akarua korwa ase chitugo chiaye ching’iti chiare koruegwa ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, ebia mambia na ebia mogoroba, na ebie Chisabato, na ebi’Emetienyi Emeyia, na ebi’Amatuko Amanene ande achikire ase amachiko ’Omonene." 
2Chronicles31:4 Naende agachika abanto abamenyete Yerusalemu barue ebing’wanso ebi Abalawi bachikeretwe koegwa, erinde barabwo banyare kwerua ase obokoreri bw’amachiko ’Omonene." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ekero Abaisraeli baigwete amang’ana omoruoti achigete, bakaba abaango korenta okwama kwe ritang’ani gwe chindagera, na okw’edivai, na okw’amaguta ’amazeituni, na okw’amooke, na okwama konde gwonsi kw’emegondo. Boigo bakarenta ensemo ya ikomi ya kera egento ase obonge." 
2Chronicles31:6 Abaisraeli na Abayuda, baria bamenyete ase emechie y’Abayuda, bakarenta ensemo ya ikomi ye chiombe na eye ching’ondi, ebinto baatananete ase Omonene, Nyasae obo; ebio bakabibeka amo, bikaba chitui." 
2Chronicles31:7 Ase omotienyi o gatato bagachaka korenta ebiegwa ebio, na abakuani bakagenderera kobichoka goika ase omotienyi o gatano na kabere." 
2Chronicles31:8 Ekero Hezekia amo nabagambi barenge ase oboruoti bwaye bachete bakarora chitui chiria, bagatogia Omonene na Abaisraeli, abanto baye." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekia akaboria abakuani na Abalawi igoro ye chitui chiria," 
2Chronicles31:10 na Asaria, omokuani omonene, oria orenge bw’enyomba ya Zadoki, akamoiraneria, “Korwa riria abanto bachagete korenta okoruegwa kwabo ase enyomba y’Omonene, intwe twabeire tokoria endagera eisaine, naende twatigairie enyinge mono. Intwe nigo tobwate ebinto ebio bionsi biatigaire, ekiagera Omonene asesenirie abanto baye.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Erio Hezekia agachika abanto baagache ebigachero ase enyomba y’Omonene. Na ekero babiaagachete," 
2Chronicles31:12 bakaba bakorenta ase obwegenwa ensemo yabo ya ikomi, amo nebinto biatananetwe ase Omonene. Konania Omolawi nere orenge omoteneneri bw’ebinto ebio, na Simei, omomura omwabo, nere orenge omokonyi oye." 
2Chronicles31:13 Korende Yehieli na Asasia, Nahati na Asaeli, Yerimoti na Yosabadi, Elieli na Isimakia, Mahati na Benaya, abwo nabwo barenge abakonyi ba Konania na Simei, momura omwabo. Nigo bachoretwe na Hezekia omoruoti na Asaria oyo otenenerete enyomba ya Nyasae." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore, mosinto o Imuna Omolawi, nigo arenge omorendi bw’egeita ki’ensemo ya moocha. Nere otenenerete ebiegwa bi’ogwancha biare koruegwa ase Nyasae; nigo arenge gwatanana ebiaruetwe ase Omonene amo nebiegwa biarenge ebichenu mono." 
2Chronicles31:15 Edeni na Miniamini, Yesua na Semaya, Amaria na Sekania, aba nabwo barenge abegenwa ase okomokonya ase emechie y’abakuani. Barabwo bakaba bagwatanana ebiegwa ebio ase abanto bamwabo, abagotu na abake, koreng’ana nebiombe biabo." 
2Chronicles31:16 Amo nayio bagaatananera abana abamura b’emiaka etato na goetania ebiegwa, abwo babarirwe na korikwa. Naende bagaatananera abwo babegetwe gokora emeremo yaganeirie ase enyomba y’Omonene kera rituko, koreng’ana nemeroberio y’ebiombe biabo." 
2Chronicles31:17 Omoroberio bw’ebiombe bi’abakuani nigo origetwe kobwatekana ne chiamate chiabo; na aba b’Abalawi barenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na goetania bakarikwa kobwatekana nemeremo ase ebiombe biabo. 
2Chronicles31:18 Abakuani nigo barigetwe amo ne chiamate chiabo chionsi, abana babo abake, na abakungu babo, na abana babo abamura na abaiseke, ekiagera nigo baganeirie koba abachenegete na babe bagokora emeremo yabo ase obwegenwa." 
2Chronicles31:19 Korende ase egati y’abakuani b’ororeria rwa Haroni, abamenyete ase amaremo aetanaine emechie yabo, ase kera omochie, abanto gete bagachorwa na korikwa amarieta abo. Barabwo bakaba bagwatanana ebiegwa biria ase kera omonto omosacha, ase egati y’abakuani, na ase kera Omolawi origetwe ase omoroberio." 
2Chronicles31:20 Ayio naro Hezekia akorete ase ense yonsi y’Abayuda; agakora ayare amaya na amaronge, na ay’obwegenwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oye." 
2Chronicles31:21 Ere agasesenigwa, ekiagera emeremo ende yonsi akorete ase enyomba ya Nyasae, ase okobwata amachiko onsi, na komorigia Nyasae oye, nigo ayakorete nenkoro yaye yonsi." 
2Chronicles32:1 Nyuma y’amang’ana ayio ay’obwegenwa gakorirwe, Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, agasoa ase ense y’Abayuda. Akanaaria emechie yagiteire chindwaki, akarengereria kobua emechie eyio ng’a ayebwate ebe eyaye." 
2Chronicles32:2 Ekero Hezekia aroche ng’a Senakeribu ochire oganetie korwania Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles32:3 agasemania nabanene b’oboruoti bwaye, na abanto baye chituoni batiche chintuboka na batange amache korwa ase chinsoko chiarenge isiko y’omochie, nabarabwo bakamokonya." 
2Chronicles32:4 Abanto abange bagasangererekana, bagatanga amache e chinsoko chionsi na ay’akarooche karenge ase orogongo roria rwonsi, bagateba, “Nase ki abaruoti b’Abaasuri barache banyore amache ekero bagocha aiga?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Erio omoruoti agachaka gokora emeremo nomokia omonene, akaroisia orwaki ase konya rwatagokire, na akaagacha emerobiri igoro yaye. Boigo akaagacha orwaki ronde isiko y’orwo, na agakong’ia Milo, egekengero keria kiarenge ase Omochie o Daudi. Naende akaroisia ebirwanero ebinge, akagoncha ne chinguba chinyinge." 
2Chronicles32:6 Akabeka abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi igoro ase abanto, akabasangereria amo agwo ase eraaro ase egeita ki’omochie, agakwana nabarabwo, akabaremia, ogoteba," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Mobe abakong’u na abaremu! Timwoboa gose timoondoka ase obosio bw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri na emeganda eyio ere amo nere. Oyore amo naintwe nigo are omonene komobua. 
2Chronicles32:8 Omoruoti oria nigo are ne chinguru chia mwanyabanto, korende Omonene, Nyasae oito, nigo are amo naintwe ase ogotokonya na gotorwanisia.” Abanto bakaba abaremu ase engencho y’amang’ana a Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Nyuma y’ayio, Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, oria onaaretie Lakisi amo nabarwani baye bonsi b’esegi, agatoma abasomba baye Yerusalemu ase Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, na ase Abayuda bonsi abwo barenge Yerusalemu, agateba," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Aya naro inche Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, ngokwana: Ninki mosemeretie, inwe abamonaaririe agwo Yerusalemu?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Inee! Hezekia tari kobasiria na kobatiga mokwe motari nendagera na ebinyugwa ekero akobatebia: Omonene, Nyasae oito, natotoorie korwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Inee! Hezekia oyo tari ere oria osaririe aase aimokererete igoro agwo ase Omonene agosasimerwa, amo nebisasimero biaye? Naende ere agachika Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu, ogoteba: Bosio bw’egesasimero ekemo nao morasasimere, na igoro ase kerokio mobe mokorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa." 
2Chronicles32:13 Inwe timomanyeti aya inche ne chisokoro chiane twakorerete abanto bonsi be chinse chinde? Inee! Chinyasae chi’ebisaku biria nchianyarete gokonya chinse chiria na gochirusia ase okoboko kwane? 
2Chronicles32:14 Nereri ase chinyasae chionsi chi’ebisaku biria chisokoro chiane chiasiretie kegima yanyarete gokonya abanto baye korwa ase okoboko kwane? 
2Chronicles32:15 Ase ayio, timobaisa gwancha Hezekia abang’aine, gose abasirie ase enchera eyio, na timobaisa komwegena, ekiagera enyasae ende y’egesaku kende gionsi, gose ey’oboruoti bonde, tiyana konyara gotooria abanto baye korwa ase okoboko kwane, gose korwa ase amaboko e chisokoro chiane. Nyasae oino nigo are bosa goetania chinyasae chiria; takonyara kobatooria korwa ase okoboko kwane!”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Na abasomba ba Senakeribu bakamenta korama Omonene Nyasae na Hezekia, omosomba oye." 
2Chronicles32:17 Senakeribu akarika rirube ri’ogochecheria Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agakwana amang’ana amabe igoro asare, agateba, “Buna koreng’ana chinyasae chi’ebisaku bie chinse chiasinyirwe gotooria abanto babo korwa ase okoboko kwane, naboigo na Nyasae bwa Hezekia takonyara gotooria abanto baye korwa ase okoboko kwane.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Abaasuri bagaaka eriogi rinene ase omonwa bw’Ekeyuda ase abanto ba Yerusalemu abarenge igoro ase orwaki ase okobagosa na koboboyia, erinde baire omochie oria." 
2Chronicles32:19 Bagakwana igoro ya Nyasae o Yerusalemu, buna bakwanete igoro ye chinyasae chi’abanto b’ebisaku b’ense eye, chiria chiaroisetigwe namaboko a mwanyabanto." 
2Chronicles32:20 Korende Hezekia omoruoti na Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi, bagasaba ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio na bakarera ase Nyasae o igoro ng’a abakonye." 
2Chronicles32:20 Korende Hezekia omoruoti na Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi, bagasaba ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio na bakarera ase Nyasae o igoro ng’a abakonye." 
2Chronicles32:21 Erio Omonene agatoma omomalaika oye agaita abarwani esegi bonsi b’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, baria barenge chituoni, na abatang’ani amo nabanene bonsi ase egetwori kiabo. Omoruoti oria akairana gochia ase ense yaye ore nobosooku obonene, na ekero asoete ase enyomba y’enyasae yaye, abamura baye bande bakamoaka, bakamoita nemioro." 
2Chronicles32:22 Naboigo Omonene akorete agatooria Hezekia na abanto ba Yerusalemu korwa ase okoboko gwa Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, na korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa babo bonsi. Erio akabaa obotoereru ase chinsemo chionsi." 
2Chronicles32:23 Abanto abange bakarentera Omonene ebiegwa agwo Yerusalemu, bakarentera na Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, ebinto bie rigori rinene. Korwa ase engaki eria na kogenderera Hezekia akaba okoegwa amasikani amanene nabanto b’ebisaku bionsi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Ase amatuko aria Hezekia akarwara, akaba ang’e nogokwa. Agasaba Omonene, na ere akamoiraneria ase okomworokia ekemanyererio." 
2Chronicles32:25 Korende ekiagera Hezekia arenge omonto omoenenu ase enkoro yaye tairaneretie ng’a mbuya mono ase amaya akoreretwe, Ase engencho eyio endamwanu y’Omonene egacha igoro asare, na ase Abayuda, na ase abanto ba Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Hezekia agekeyia, ageitia ase engencho y’oboenenu bw’enkoro yaye, na abanto ba Yerusalemu nabarabwo bagekeyia. Ase ayio endamwamu y’Omonene tiyacha igoro asebare ase amatuko a Hezekia." 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekia nigo abwate obotenenku obonge, na abanto abange nigo bamosigete. Akeagachera ebigachero ase arenge kobeka chifeta, ne chitahabu, na amagena e rigori rinene, na ebinsari, ne chinguba, na ebinto ao ao bie rigori rinene." 
2Chronicles32:28 Boigo akeagachera ebiage bie chindagera chiagesetwe, na ebigachero bi’edivai na ebi’amaguta ’amazeituni, na ameri e chitugo ao ao, amo naye ching’ondi." 
2Chronicles32:29 Akenyorera emechie emenge, na amaicho amange, ekiagera Nyasae konya omoeire obotenenku obonge mono." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia oyo nere oria otichete chintuboka chia rogoro chi’amache a Gihoni, erio akayagoberia gochia ase ensemo ya bosongo y’Omochie o Daudi. Akanyora ogosesenigwa ase emeremo yaye yonsi." 
2Chronicles32:31 Nonya nekero abanto batometwe nabanene ba Babeli baborie komanya igoro y’egekone giakorekanete ase ense eria, Nyasae akaramotiga ake amoteeme amanye onsi ayarenge ime ase enkoro yaye." 
2Chronicles32:32 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Hezekia akorete, na ogokora kwaye okuya, nigo arikire ase Okorora gwa Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi, ime ase Ebuku y’Abaruoti b’Abayuda na ab’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles32:32 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Hezekia akorete, na ogokora kwaye okuya, nigo arikire ase Okorora gwa Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi, ime ase Ebuku y’Abaruoti b’Abayuda na ab’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekia akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, agatindekwa ase egetirimboko ase chimbeera chi’ororeria rwa Daudi chiarenge. Abayuda bonsi na abanto ba Yerusalemu bakaorokia amasikani ase ogokwa kwaye. Na Manase, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase nigo arenge nemiaka ikomi na ebere, ekero achagete kogamba; akagamba emiaka emerongo etano, na etano, agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles33:2 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, koreng’ana ne chingencho chi’okogechia chi’ebisaku biria Omonene aseretie korwa ase Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles33:3 Akaagacha naende aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, aria Hezekia ise atagorete. Naende agatenenia ebisasimero bia Baali, akaroisia emete y’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, na agasasima erioba na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni chionsi, ebitongwa biria bia igoro, na akabikorera." 
2Chronicles33:4 Naende akaagacha ebisasimero ase enyomba y’Omonene ime, agwo ase Omonene akwanete igoro yaye, “Ase Yerusalemu nao ndabeke erieta riane kare na kare.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Akaagachera ebitongwa biria bionsi bia igoro ebisasimero agwo ase chiraaro ibere chi’enyomba y’Omonene. 
2Chronicles33:6 Agakora amabe amange ase obosio bw’Omonene, na Omonene akagechigwa goika akaba nendamwamu. Agasamba abana baye abamura bakaba ebing’wanso agwo ase Rikura ria basinto ba Hinomu, agakora oborogi, na oboragori, na oboriori, na akarigia ogosemigwa korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakwete, na akenaria oborogi bonde obonge." 
2Chronicles33:7 Omogwekano oria bw’ogosasimwa abaachete akayobeka ime ase enyomba ya Nyasae, enyomba eyio igoro yaye Nyasae atebetie Daudi na Sulemani, omwana oye omomura, “Ase enyomba eye, na ase Yerusalemu, omochie oyio nachorire korwa ase ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, nao ndabeke erieta riane ribe aroro kogenderera botambe." 
2Chronicles33:8 Onye Abaisraeli bagochia korenda na gokora onsi aya nabachigete, na babwate amachiko onsi na emeroberio yonsi echikire goetera ase Musa, rirorio tingotiga Abaisraeli barue ase ense eye naete chisokoro chiabo.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manase akaebereria Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu bagakora amabe goetania aria abanto b’ebisaku bakorete, baria Omonene aseretie korwa ase amasio ’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles33:10 Omonene agakwana na Manase na abanto bonsi, korende bakaanga koigwera." 
2Chronicles33:11 Ase ayio Omonene akarenta abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi b’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri igoro yabo; barabwo bakabwata Manase nekegobanio, bakamosiba ne chingataare chi’etaai, bakamoira Babeli." 
2Chronicles33:12 Ekero arenge ase emechando emenene, agasaba Omonene Nyasae oye, akamosorora; agekeyia ase oboitongo obonene ase obosio bwa Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaye." 
2Chronicles33:13 Ekero asabete igo, Nyasae aganchera ogosorora kwaye, akaigwa okoboria kwaye kw’oboitongo, na akamoirania Yerusalemu naende ase oboruoti bwaye. Erio Manase akamanya ng’a Omonene nere Nyasae." 
2Chronicles33:14 Nyuma y’ayio Manase akaroba orwaki rwa isiko rw’Omochie o Daudi, bosongo ya Gihoni, ase rikura gochia ase Egeita gie Chinswe, akaroetanania Ofeli, akaroagacha rokaba orotambe mono gochia igoro. Boigo akabeka abatang’ani b’abarwani esegi ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda yagiteire chindwaki." 
2Chronicles33:15 Akarusia chinyasae chingeni na emegwekano eria y’ogosasimwa korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene; boigo akarusia ebisasimero konya aagachire ase egetunwa igoro, ase enyomba y’Omonene yarenge agwo Yerusalemu, akabituguta gochia isiko y’omochie." 
2Chronicles33:16 Akaroisia naende egesasimero ki’Omonene gekaba ekeyia, erio akaruera aroro ebing’wanso bi’omorembe, na ebi’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono; agachika Abayuda bakorere Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 Abanto bakagenderera korua ebing’wanso agwo aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, korende nigo babiruete ase Omonene, Nyasae obo bweka." 
2Chronicles33:18 Bono amang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Manase, na ogosaba kwaye asabete Nyasae oye, na amang’ana abarori bakwanete nere ase erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles33:19 Amang’ana ’ogosaba kwaye, na buna Nyasae anchete ogosaba okwo kw’ogosorora, na igoro y’ebibe biaye bionsi, na ogotegenwa kwaye, na aase onsi aagachete aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, na buna atenenetie emete y’Asera, na emegwekano, ritang’ani konya atarekeyia omonyene, amang’ana aya onsi nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’Abarori." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manase akarara ase chisokoro chiaye chiararete, na abanto bakamotindeka ime ase enyomba yaye. Amoni, omomura oye, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na ebere, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka ebere agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles33:22 Agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna Manase ise akorete; akarua ebing’wanso ase emegwekano yonsi eria Manase ise aroisetie, naende akayekorera." 
2Chronicles33:23 Ere tekeetie ase obosio bw’Omonene na koba omoitongo buna Manase akorete, korende Amoni oyio akagenderera gokora amamocho goetania." 
2Chronicles33:24 Abasomba baye bagakora omoroberio bw’okomoita na bakamoitera ase enyomba yaye ime. 
2Chronicles33:25 Korende abanto b’ense eria bagaita abanto bonsi baria bakorete omoroberio bw’ogoita Amoni omoruoti; nyuma y’ayio bakabeka Yosia, omwana oye omomura, akaba omoruoti ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosia nigo arenge nemiaka etano na etato, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emiaka emerongo etato nomo, agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:2 Agakora ayare amaronge ase amaiso ’Omonene; akabwatia chinchera chionsi chia Daudi, sokoro yaye; taonchogete gochia aande onsi, ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee." 
2Chronicles34:3 Ase omwaka o gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwaye, ekero arenge omomura omoke, agachaka komorigia Nyasae o Daudi, sokoro yaye. Ase omwaka o ikomi na kabere bw’okogamba kwaye agachaka gosaria aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa na agachena ense y’Abayuda na Yerusalemu. Akanachana emete y’Asera amo nemegwekano yabaachire, na eyanyititoire na kobombwa." 
2Chronicles34:4 Abanto bagatagora ebisasimero bie chinyasae chiria Baali agwo ase obosio bwaye; na Yosia agatagora na koiyeria inse ebisasimero bi’ogosambera ubani ase erioba, ebiatenenirie igoro y’ebio bia Baali. Akanachana emete y’Asera; boigo agasaria emegwekano yabaachire na kobombwa, akabisia bikaba orotu, akarosiara igoro ase chimbeera chi’abanto baria barenge korua ebing’wanso ase emegwekano eyio." 
2Chronicles34:5 Agasambera amauga ’abakuani babo igoro ase ebisasimero biabo, agachena ense y’Abayuda na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:6 Na ase emechie y’orogongo rwa Manase, na orw’Efraimu, na orwa Simeoni, na goika ase orogongo rwa Nafutali ase amatongo abo aande onsi," 
2Chronicles34:7 agatagora ebisasimero, akanachana emete y’Asera, na emegwekano y’ogosasimwa akabisia bikaba orotu. Ase ense yonsi y’Abaisraeli agatagora na koiyeria inse ebisasimero bi’ogosambera ubani ase erioba. Erio akairana gochia Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwaye, ekero konya achenire ense eria na enyomba y’Omonene, Yosia agatoma Safani, mosinto bw’Asalia, na Maaseya, omogambi bw’omochie, na Yoa, mosinto o Yoahasi, omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka, koroisia enyomba y’Omonene, Nyasae oye, ebe enyia." 
2Chronicles34:9 Bakairera Hilikia, omokuani omonene, chibesa echi konya chiarentirwe ase enyomba ya Nyasae, na chiria Abalawi na abarendi b’ebisieri basangereretie korwa ase Abamanase na Abaefraimu, na korwa ase abanto abatigari b’Abaisraeli, na korwa ase Abayuda na Ababenjamin bonsi, na korwa ase abanto ba Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Chibesa chiria chikaegwa abateneneri b’emeremo yare gokorerwa ase enyomba y’Omonene; na barabwo bagachia abanto barenge koroisia enyomba y’Omonene na koyeagacha naende. 
2Chronicles34:11 Bagachia abasenia be chibao, na abaagachi bagore amagena abaachire, amo nemete y’okoroiseria emeriibo, na emiamba, ase okoagacha amaagacho aria abaruoti b’Abayuda batigete agatagoka." 
2Chronicles34:12 Abanto abwo bagakora emeremo ase obwegenwa. Aba nabwo abateneneri babegetwe igoro asebare: Yahati na Obadia, Abalawi b’ororeria rwa Merari, na Zakaria, na Mesulamu b’ororeria rwa Kohati, na Abalawi bonsi bamanyete kobugia ebinto bi’amatera." 
2Chronicles34:13 Barabwo bagatenenera ababogoretie chigurube, naende bakaba abatebereria b’abakori emeremo ao ao. Abande b’Abalawi bakaba abariki, na abande abateneneri ao ao, na abande abarendi b’ebiita." 
2Chronicles34:14 Ekero barenge korenta chibesa chiria konya chiarentirwe ase enyomba y’Omonene, Hilikia omokuani akanyora Ebuku y’Amachiko ’Omonene yarwetwe goetera ase Musa." 
2Chronicles34:15 Erio Hilikia agatebia Safani omoriki, “Nanyorire Ebuku y’Amachiko ime ase enyomba y’Omonene,” akaa Safani ebuku eria." 
2Chronicles34:16 Safani akaira ebuku eria ase omoruoti, naende akamotebia, “Emeremo yonsi kwaete abasomba bao nkoyekora bare." 
2Chronicles34:17 Bairire chibesa chionsi chianyorekanete ase enyomba y’Omonene, na bachibekire ase amaboko ’abateneneri b’emeremo amo nabakori emeremo.”" 
2Chronicles34:18 Erio Safani omoriki agatebia omoruoti, “Hilikia omokuani ong’eire ebuku eye.” Erio akayesoma agwo ase obosio bw’omoruoti." 
2Chronicles34:19 Ekero omoruoti aigwete amang’ana ’amachiko aria, agatandora chianga chiaye." 
2Chronicles34:20 Agachika Hilikia, na Ahikamu, mosinto o Safani, na Abidoni, mosinto o Mika, na Safani omoriki, na Asaia, omosomba bw’omoruoti, akabatebia," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Genda, moborie momanye korwa ase Omonene igoro yane na igoro y’abatigari b’Abaisraeli na ab’Abayuda, tomanye amang’ana are ase ebuku eye yanyorekanire. Endamwamu y’Omonene nentindi mono asetore, ekiagera chisokoro chiaito tichiaigwerete ring’ana ri’Omonene, naende tichiakorete onsi aya arikire ase ebuku eye.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikia amo nabanto omoruoti atomete bakagenda ase Hulda, omokungu omobani moka Salumu, mosinto o Tokihati o Hasira. Salumu nere orenge omorendi bwe rigachero rie chianga agwo Hekalu. (Ase ekero ekio Hulda nigo amenyete agwo Yerusalemu ase ensemo enyia.) Abanto abwo bagatebia omokungu oria amang’ana aria aria." 
2Chronicles34:23 Omokungu oria akabatebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Mogende ase omonto oria obatomete gocha asende, momotebie:" 
2Chronicles34:24 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora, nindete igoro y’aase aiga, na igoro y’abanto b’aiga okoragererigwa gwonsi korikire ase ebuku eye yasomwa ase omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Barabwo bantigire inche, na basambire ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao, na bangechirie nabeire nendamwamu ase engencho y’emeremo yonsi bakorire namaboko abo. Ase ayio endamwamu yane neiterwe igoro y’aase aiga, tegokendigwa." 
2Chronicles34:26 Korende ase omoruoti bw’Abayuda, oria obatoma, erinde amanye korwa asende inche Omonene, aya naro moramotebie: Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli agoteba: Ekero kwaigwa amang’ana aria," 
2Chronicles34:27 aye ogekanya okaba omoitongo ase obosio bwane inche Nyasae, naende ekero kwaigwa amang’ana igoro y’aase aiga, na igoro y’abanto bareo, ogatandora chianga chiao, naende okarera ase obosio bwane. Naboigo inche Omonene nkogotebia, ng’a nakoigure." 
2Chronicles34:28 Rora, ningosangererie ase chisokoro chiao chiachiete; aye nobekwe ase embeera yao kore nomorembe, na amaiso ao takorora obobe boria bwonsi ndarete igoro y’aase aiga, na igoro y’abanto bareo.” Ase igo barabwo bakairera omoruoti amang’ana ayio." 
2Chronicles34:29 Erio omoruoti agatoma amang’ana, agasangereria amo abagaaka b’Abayuda na aba Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles34:30 na agatiira gochia ase enyomba y’Omonene, amo n’Abayuda bonsi na bonsi abamenyete Yerusalemu, na abakuani, na Abalawi, ee, abanto bonsi, abanene na abake. Na aroro omoruoti akabasomera amang’ana onsi arikire ase Ebuku eria y’Okobwatana kw’Ogotianania, yanyorekanete ime ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
2Chronicles34:31 Omoruoti agatenena aase aye, agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania ase obosio bw’Omonene ng’a nabwatie Omonene, na abwate amachiko aye, na oborori bwaye, na emeroberio yaye echikire, nayakore nenkoro yaye yonsi na omoyo oye bwonsi, nakore amang’ana onsi aganeirie nokobwatana okwo kw’ogotianania, ayarikire ase ebuku eye." 
2Chronicles34:32 Agachika abanto bonsi abarenge agwo Yerusalemu na aba ase orogongo rwa Benjamin babwatane nokobwatana okwo kw’ogotianania, na abanto ba Yerusalemu bagakora koreng’ana nokobwatana koria kwa Nyasae ore Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo." 
2Chronicles34:33 Yosia akarusia okogechia gwonsi korwa ase orogongo rw’Abaisraeli, agachika Abaisraeli bonsi bakorere Omonene, Nyasae obo. Abanto tibaonchogete korwa ase Omonene bwe chisokoro chiabo ase obogima bwonsi bwa Yosia." 
2Chronicles35:1 Nyuma y’ayio Yosia akaba okorenda Rituko Rinene ri‐Epasaka ase Omonene, agwo Yerusalemu, na abanto bakanyenya chimanwa chie ching’ondi chi’Epasaka ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani." 
2Chronicles35:2 Akabeka abakuani ase emeremo yabo na akabaseegeta bakore emeremo y’enyomba y’Omonene. 
2Chronicles35:3 Agatebereria Abalawi baria barenge aborokia b’Abaisraeli, naende baatananetwe ase Omonene, akabora, “Beka Esanduku eyio enchenu ase enyomba eyio Sulemani, mosinto o Daudi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, aagachete. Korwa bono timogwenereti koyebogoria igoro ase amareko aino. Bono mokorere Omonene, Nyasae oino, mobakorere na abanto baye Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles35:4 Inwe ebeke ang’e, kera eamate ase ekeombe kiaye, koreng’ana nomoreberio o Daudi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli na oyo o Sulemani, omomura oye." 
2Chronicles35:5 Motenene agwo aase are aachenu buna abateneneri b’ebiombe bie chiamate chi’Abaisraeli bamino batari abakuani. Abalawi babekwe ase kera ekeombe. 
2Chronicles35:6 Monyenye ching’ondi chi’Epasaka, naende mwechene abanyene na moroisie ching’ondi echio ase engencho y’abanto bamino, erinde mokore koreng’ana ne ring’ana riria Omonene akwanete goetera ase Musa.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Erio Yosia akaa abanto barenge agwo ching’iti chi’ebing’wanso bi’Epasaka. Akarusia korwa ase amaicho aye omonyene chimanwa chie ching’ondi, na echie chimbori, chilifu emerongu etato (30,000), ne chiombe chilifo isato (3,000)." 
2Chronicles35:8 Abagambi abarenge amo nomoruoti bagancha koa abanto, na abakuani, na Abalawi, ching’iti chi’ebing’wanso. Hilikia na Zakaria, na Yehieli, abateneneri b’enyomba ya Nyasae, bakaa abakuani chimanwa chie ching’ondi chilifu ibere, na amagana atano na rimo (2,600), ne chiombe amagana atato (300), chibe ebing’wanso bi’Epasaka." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konania, amo na Semaya na Netaneli, abamura bamwabo, na Hasabia, na Yeieli, na Yosabadi, abanene b’Abalawi, bakaa Abalawi chimanwa chie ching’ondi, na echie chimbori, chilifu isano (5,000), chibe ebing’wanso bi’Epasaka, ne chiombe amagana atano (500)." 
2Chronicles35:10 Ekero konya okwebeka ang’e gwakorirwe, abakuani bagatenena aase abo, na Abalawi ase ebiombe biabo, koreng’ana buna omoruoti achigete." 
2Chronicles35:11 Bakanyenya chimanwa chie ching’ondi chi’Epasaka, erio abakuani bakaegwa amanyinga e chimanwa chiria, bakayanyororokia ekero Abalawi bagendererete korusia amasankwa." 
2Chronicles35:12 Bagaatanana chinyama chie ching’iti chi’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase abanto ba kera eamate, erinde barabwo banyare gochirua ase Omonene, buna arikire ase Ebuku ya Musa. Naboigo bakorete ne chiombe chiria." 
2Chronicles35:13 Bagasamba chinyama chie chimanwa chi’Epasaka ase omorero buna achikire, korende echi’ebing’wanso binde ebichenu bagachiyekera chinyongo, na ebitega, ne chisuguria; erio bwango bagachiirera abanto bonsi." 
2Chronicles35:14 Nyuma y’ayio Abalawi bakeroiseria chinyama, boigo bagachiroiseria na abakuani ab’ororeria rwa Haroni, ekiagera abakuani aba nigo barenge nemeremo emenge y’okorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa amo nebitinya bi’ebio goika botuko. Naboigo Abalawi beroiseretie chinyama, bakaroiseria nabakuani ab’ororeria rwa Haroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Na abateri, abanto b’eamate y’Asafu, nigo babeerete aase abo buna Daudi, na Asafu, na Hemani, na Yedutuni, omorori bw’omoruoti, bachigete. Abarendi b’ebiita bakabeera aase abo ase kera egeita. Tibatigete emeremo yabo, ekiagera Abalawi bamwabo mbabaroiseretie ebing’wanso biabo." 
2Chronicles35:16 Igo aya onsi ay’okomokorera Omonene nigo akoretwe ase rituko riria; nigo barendete Epasaka bakarua okoruegwa kw’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase egesasimero ki’Omonene, buna Yosia omoruoti achigete." 
2Chronicles35:17 Abaisraeli abarenge aroro bakarenda Epasaka ase engaki eria, naende bakagenderera korenda Rituko Rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera, ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere." 
2Chronicles35:18 Epasaka enga buna eyio konya tiyana korendwa ase egati y’Abaisraeli korwa amatuko a Samweli omobani. Moruoti onde bw’Abaisraeli konya tana korenda Epasaka buna eria Yosia arendete, ere amo nabakuani, na Abalawi, na Abayuda bonsi, na Abaisraeli abarengeo, na abanto ba Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Epasaka eyio enene nigo yarendetwe ase omwaka o ikomi, na gatano na gatato, bw’okogamba kwa Yosia." 
2Chronicles35:20 Nyuma y’ayio onsi, ekero Yosia konya aroisirie Hekalu, Neko, omoruoti o Misiri, agatiira kogenda korwana esegi agwo Karikemisi ase orooche rw’Eufarati, na Yosia akagenda korwana nere." 
2Chronicles35:21 Omoruoti o Misiri agatoma abanto ase Yosia, agateba, “Aye omoruoti bw’Abayuda, inki inche naye togokorerana? Rituko ria rero tindi gocha korwana esegi naye, korende nobogambi nkorwania, inde nesegi naborobwo, na Nyasae ochikire ngende bwango. Aye tiga koamererania na Nyasae, oria ore amo nainche, nabaise kogoita.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Korende Yosia tanchete koonchoka korwa ase Neko. Agekona ase ogwetuba ng’a tamanyekana, akagenda korwana na Neko agwo ase ense omweya ya Megido, taigwete amang’ana aye ayaruete ase Nyasae." 
2Chronicles35:23 Abarwani baria bakabwata amata, bakarasa Yosia omoruoti. Erio omoruoti oria agatebia abasomba baye, “Indusie aiga, ekiagera nabetirwe bobe.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Abasomba baye bakamobeka ase egari yaye ende, bakamoira Yerusalemu. Agakwera aroro, na agatindekwa ase chimbeera chie chisokoro chiaye. Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu bonsi bakaba bakomoreera." 
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremia akaroisia ogotera kw’amagombo igoro ya Yosia, na abateri bonsi, abasacha na abakungu, babeire bagwatora Yosia ase amatera abo ay’amagombo nonya ngoika rero iga. Ayio akaba engencho Abaisraeli benaretie. Ogotera okwo nigo korikire ase Ebuku y’Amatera ’Amagombo." 
2Chronicles35:26 Bono amang’ana ande onsi ay’ogokora kwa Yosia, na amaya aya akorete koreng’ana naya arikire ase amachiko ’Omonene," 
2Chronicles35:27 na ogokora kwaye kwe ritang’ani goika okw’omoerio nigo korikire ase Ebuku y’ogokora kw’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli na ab’Abayuda. 
2Chronicles36:1 Abanto b’ense eria bakabeka Yehoahasi, mosinto o Yosia, akaba omoruoti agwo Yerusalemu ase ribaga ria ise." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoahasi nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na etato, ekero achagete kogamba, na akagamba emetienyi etato agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:3 Omoruoti o Misiri agacha Yerusalemu akarusia Yehoahasi ase oboruoti, erio akabekera abanto b’ense eria ebango ye chitalanta rigana erimo chie chifeta, na etalanta eyemo y’etahabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Neko, omoruoti oyio o Misiri, akabeka Eliakimu, momura omwabo omoruoti oria arusetie, akaba omoruoti igoro ase Abayuda, na ase abanto ba Yerusalemu, na akaonchora erieta riaye, akamoroka Yehoyakimu. Neko akaira Yehoahasi, omomura omwabo Eliakimu, Misiri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimu nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere, na etano, ekero achagete kogamba, akagamba emiaka ikomi nomo, agwo Yerusalemu. Nere agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oye." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, agacha akarwana nere, akamobwata akamosiba ne chingataare, akamoira Babeli." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinesaro boigo akaira ebikorero binde bi’enyomba y’Omonene goika Babeli, akabibeka ase hekalu yaye agwo Babeli." 
2Chronicles36:8 Bono amang’ana ande onsi Yehoyakimu akorete, na okogechia akorete, na okomocha kwanyorekanete asare, nigo arikire ase Ebuku y’Abaruoti b’Abaisraeli na ab’Abayuda, na Yehoyakini, omwana oye omomura, akaba okogamba ase ribaga riaye." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakini nigo arenge nemiaka etano na etato ekero achagete kogamba; akagamba emetienyi etato na amatuko ikomi, agwo Yerusalemu. Nere agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
2Chronicles36:10 Ekero ki’ogoseboka kw’ebimeri, Nebukadinesaro omoruoti agatoma abanto bakamoira Babeli; akaira nebikorero bie rigori rinene bi’enyomba y’Omonene, erio akabeka Zedekia, omomura omwabo Yehoyakini, akaba omoruoti igoro ase Abayuda na ase abanto ba Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere nomo, ekero achagete kogamba; akagamba emiaka ikomi nomo agwo Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:12 Nere agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae oye, ekiagera tekeetie abe omoitongo ase obosio bwa Yeremia omobani, oria okwanete aya Omonene atebete." 
2Chronicles36:13 Zedekia akaanga koigwera Nebukadinesaro omoruoti, oria omoboretie gotiana ase erieta ria Nyasae. Agekora omonyabigoti bikong’u, na enkoro yaye ekaenena, tancha komoiranera Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Abakuani bonsi baria barenge abatang’ani babo, na abanto boigo bagasaria mono, tibaba abegenwa, bakabwatia okogechia gwonsi kw’abanto b’ebisaku, na enyomba y’Omonene eyio akorete ekaba enchenu agwo Yerusalemu, bakayekora ekaba eyetachenegeti." 
2Chronicles36:15 Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiabo, akagenderera kobatomera amang’ana ay’okobakurera goetera ase abatomwa baye, ekiagera arorerete abanto baye, na obomenyo bwaye, amabera." 
2Chronicles36:16 Korende bakagenderera gochecheria abatomwa ba Nyasae, bagachaya amang’ana aye, na bagachecheria ababani baye. Ase igo endamwamu y’Omonene ekaba enene igoro ase abanto baye, na gotooreka tikwanyorekana asebare." 
2Chronicles36:17 Ase ayio Omonene akarenta omoruoti bw’Abakalidayo oyobarwanetie, agaita abana babo abamura nomoro, agwo ase Hekalu yabo Enchenu, na tabete namabera ase onde bwensi, abamura gose abaiseke abekungi, ase abagotu gose abare ne chinguru. Bonsi bakabekwa ase amaboko ’omoruoti bw’Abakalidayo." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ebikorero bionsi bi’enyomba ya Nyasae, ebinene na ebike, ne chinibo chionsi chiarenge ase enyomba y’Omonene na ase enyomba y’omoruoti, na ase echi’abagambi barenge amo nere, ebinto ebio bionsi akabiira Babeli." 
2Chronicles36:19 Agasamba enyomba ya Nyasae na agatagora chindwaki chia Yerusalemu, agasamba ne chinyomba chionsi chi’oboruoti na agasaria ebikorero bionsi bie rigori rinene biarengeo." 
2Chronicles36:20 Abanto baria batooregete bataitetwe nemioro akabang’anyia gochia Babeli, barabwo bakaba abasomba asare na ase abanto b’ororeria rwaye, goika ekero oboruoti bw’Abaayemi bwabete ne chinguru." 
2Chronicles36:21 Igo ring’ana riria Omonene akwanete goetera ase Yeremia rigaikeranigwa, na ense eria nigo yatimogete. Ekero ense eria yatigarete ere amatongo, nigo yarendete Esabato, goika emiaka emerongo etano na ebere ekaera." 
2Chronicles36:22 Ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba gwa Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, Omonene agaikerania ayakwanete goetera ase Yeremia. Agaseegeta na koberora omoika o Koresi, omoruoti oria, akamosukia arike ring’ana na koriraria ase chinsemo chionsi chi’oboruoti bwaye, ogoteba:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Amang’ana aya naro inche Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, ngoteba: Omonene, Nyasae o igoro, ong’eire amaruoti onsi are ase ense. Ere onchikire imoagachere enyomba aaria Yerusalemu, omochie ore ase ense y’Abayuda. Onde bwensi ore ase egati yaino, ore bw’abanto baye, tiga atiire agende aroro, na Omonene, Nyasae oye, abe amo nere.”" 
Ezra1:1 Ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba gwa Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, Omonene agaikerania ayakwanete goetera ase Yeremia. Agaseegeta na koberora omoika bw’omoruoti oria, akamosukia arike ring’ana na koriraria ase chinsemo chionsi chi’oboruoti bwaye, ogoteba:" 
Ezra1:2 “Amang’ana aya naro inche Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, ngoteba: Omonene, Nyasae o igoro, ong’eire amaruoti onsi are ase ense. Ere onchikire imoaagachere enyomba aaria Yerusalemu, omochie ore ase ense y’Abayuda." 
Ezra1:3 Onde bwensi ore ase egati yaino, ore bw’abanto baye, tiga atiire gochia Yerusalemu, aaria ase ense y’Abayuda, erinde aagache enyomba y’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, na Nyasae oye abe amo nere. Ere nere Nyasae omenyete Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:4 Aande onsi onde obo atigarete ore omomenyi, abanto b’aase agwo bamokonye chifeta, ne chitahabu, na ebinto binde, ne chitugo, amo nebiegwa bi’ogwancha ase enyomba ya Nyasae aaria Yerusalemu.”" 
Ezra1:5 Erio abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abayuda na Ababenjamin amo nabakuani na Abalawi, kera omonto oyo Nyasae akunire omoika oye ng’a atiire, erinde aagache naende enyomba y’Omonene aaria Yerusalemu, bakebeka ang’e." 
Ezra1:6 Abanto bonsi abamenyete amo nabarabwo bakabakonya ase okobaa ebikorero bie chifeta, na ebie chitahabu na ebinto binde, ne chitugo, na ebinto bie rigori rinene, amo nebinto baruete ase ogwancha." 
Ezra1:7 Boigo omoruoti Koresi akairania ebikorero bi’enyomba y’Omonene, biria Nebukadinesaro arusetie Yerusalemu na akabigacha ase enyomba ye chinyasae chiaye." 
Ezra1:8 Ebikorero ebio Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, akabia Mitiredati, omoteneneri bwe chikungo. Mitiredati akabibara, akabia Sesibasari, omogambi bw’Abayuda." 
Ezra1:9 Oyo noro omobaro bw’ebinto ebio: Chisani chiroisirie korwa ase chitahabu, emerongo etato (30), ne chisani chiroisirie korwa ase chifeta, elifu eyemo (1,000), na ebitaabo bi’ogosambera ubani, emerongo ebere na kianda (29);" 
Ezra1:10 chibakuri chiroisirie korwa ase chitahabu, emerongo etato (30), na echiroisirie korwa ase chifeta, amagana ane, na ikomi (410), naende ebikorero binde, elifu eyemo (1,000)." 
Ezra1:11 Ebikorero bionsi biaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu ne chifeta nigo biarenge chilifu isano, na amagana ane (5,400). Ebio bionsi Sesibasari akabiira Yerusalemu; ekero abanto baria barenge ase obosomba baruete Babeli, bakagenda Yerusalemu." 
Ezra2:1 Aba nabwo abanto b’orogongo rwa Yuda, baria Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, airete Babeli ase obosomba, bairanete gocha Yerusalemu na ase ense y’Abayuda. (Kera oyomo akagenda komenya ase omochie oye" 
Ezra2:2 amo nabarenge kobaraa: Serubabeli na Yesua, Nehemia na Seraya, Reelaya na Moredekai, Bilisani na Misipari, Bigiwai na Rehumu, na Baana). Omobaro bw’abasacha baria b’Abaisraeli noro oyo:" 
Ezra2:3 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Parosi: chilifu ibere, ne rigana erimo, na emerongo etano na ebere, na babere (2,172);" 
Ezra2:4 aba orwa Sefatia: amagana atato, na emerongo etano na ebere, na babere (372);" 
Ezra2:5 aba orwa Ara: amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano na ebere, na batano (775);" 
Ezra2:6 aba orwa Pahati‐Moabu be chiamate chia Yesua na Yoabu: chilifu ibere, na amagana atano na atato, na ikomi na babere (2,812);" 
Ezra2:7 aba orwa Elamu: elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo etano, na bane (1,254);" 
Ezra2:8 aba orwa Satu: amagana kianda, na emerongo ene, na batano (945);" 
Ezra2:9 aba orwa Sakai: amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano nomo (760);" 
Ezra2:10 aba orwa Bani: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo ene, na babere (642);" 
Ezra2:11 aba orwa Bebai: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo ebere, na batato (623);" 
Ezra2:12 aba orwa Asigadi: elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo ebere, na babere (1,222);" 
Ezra2:13 aba orw’Adonikamu: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano nomo, na batano nomo (666);" 
Ezra2:14 aba orwa Bigiwai: chilifu ibere, na emerongo etano, na batano nomo (2,056);" 
Ezra2:15 aba orw’Adini: amagana ane, na emerongo etano, na bane (454);" 
Ezra2:16 aba orw’Ateri b’eamate ya Hezekia: emerongo kianda, na batano na batato (98);" 
Ezra2:17 aba orwa Besai: amagana atato, na emerongo ebere, na batato (323);" 
Ezra2:18 aba orwa Yora: rigana erimo, na ikomi na babere (112);" 
Ezra2:19 aba orwa Hasumu: amagana abere, na emerongo ebere, na batato (223);" 
Ezra2:20 aba orwa Gibari: emerongo kianda, na batano (95)." 
Ezra2:21 Abanto ba Bethlehemu: rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na batato (123);" 
Ezra2:22 abanto ba Netofa: emerongo etano, na batano nomo (56);" 
Ezra2:23 abanto b’Anatoti: rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (128);" 
Ezra2:24 abanto b’Asimaweti: emerongo ene, na babere (42);" 
Ezra2:25 abanto ba Kiriati‐Arimu, na Kefira, na Beroti: amagana atano na abere, na emerongo ene, na batato (743);" 
Ezra2:26 abanto ba Rama na Geba: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo ebere, na oyomo (621);" 
Ezra2:27 abanto ba Mikimasi: rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na babere (122);" 
Ezra2:28 abanto ba Beteli na Ai: amagana abere, na emerongo ebere, na batato (223);" 
Ezra2:29 abanto ba Nebo: emerongo etano, na babere (52);" 
Ezra2:30 abanto ba Magibisi: rigana erimo, na emerongo etano, na batano nomo (156);" 
Ezra2:31 abanto ba Elamu o kabere: elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo etano, na bane (1,254);" 
Ezra2:32 abanto ba Harimu: amagana atato, na emerongo ebere (320);" 
Ezra2:33 abanto ba Lodi, na Hadidi, na Ono: amagana atano na abere, na emerongo ebere, na batano (725);" 
Ezra2:34 abanto ba Yeriko: amagana atato, na emerongo ene, na batano (345);" 
Ezra2:35 abanto ba Sanaa: chilifu isato, na amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etato (3,630)." 
Ezra2:36 Omobaro bw’abakuani noro oyo: Abwo b’ororeria rwa Yedaya be chiamate chia Yesua: amagana kianda, na emerongo etano na ebere, na batato (973);" 
Ezra2:37 aba orwa Imeri: elifu eyemo, na emerongo etano, na babere (1,052);" 
Ezra2:38 aba orwa Pasuri: elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo ene, na batano na babere (1,247);" 
Ezra2:39 aba orwa Harimu: elifu eyemo, na ikomi na batano na babere (1,017);" 
Ezra2:40 Abalawi nabwo aba: Abe chiamate chia Yesua na Kadimeli, ab’ororeria rwa Hodawia: emerongo etano na ebere, na bane (74)." 
Ezra2:41 Abateri nabwo abanto b’ororeria rw’Asafu: rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (128)." 
Ezra2:42 Abarendi b’ebiita nabwo abe chiamate chia Salumu, na Ateri, na Talimoni, na Akubu, na Hatita, na Sobai; bonsi nigo barenge rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na kianda (139)." 
Ezra2:43 Abakori emeremo be Hekalu nabwo aba: Abanto be chiamate chia Siha, na Hasufa, na Tabaoti;" 
Ezra2:44 Kerosi, na Sia, na Padoni;" 
Ezra2:45 Lebana, na Hagaba, na Akubu;" 
Ezra2:46 Hagabu, na Salimai na Hanani;" 
Ezra2:47 Gideli, na Gahari, na Reaya:" 
Ezra2:48 Resini, na Nekoda, na Gasamu;" 
Ezra2:49 Usa, na Pasea, na Besai;" 
Ezra2:50 Asina, na Meunimu, na Nefusimu;" 
Ezra2:51 Bakubuki, na Hakufa, na Harihuri;" 
Ezra2:52 Basiluti, na Mehida, na Harisa;" 
Ezra2:53 Barikosi, na Sisera, na Tema;" 
Ezra2:54 Nesia na Hatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Abanto b’ororeria rw’abasomba ba Sulemani: Chiamate chia Sotai, na Hasofereti, na Peruda;" 
Ezra2:56 Yaala, na Darikoni, na Gideli;" 
Ezra2:57 Sefatia na Hatili, Pokereti‐Hasebaimu na Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Abakori emeremo bonsi be Hekalu, amo nabanto b’ororeria rw’abasomba ba Sulemani nigo barenge amagana atato, na emerongo kianda; na babere (392)." 
Ezra2:59 Aba nabwo abanto bachete korwa Teli‐Mela, na Teli‐Harisa, na Kerubu, na Adani, na Imeri, korende tibanyarete koorokia ase okomanyereria chiamate chiabo, nonya ne chinderia chiabo, gose ekeene ng’a n’Abaisraeli bare:" 
Ezra2:60 Abanto be chiamate chia Delaya, na Tobia, na Nekoda, bonsi namagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano na babere (652)." 
Ezra2:61 Boigo nase abakuani: Abanto be chiamate chia Habaya, na Hakosi, na Barisilai, oyio onyuomete oyomo bw’abaiseke ba Barisilai Omogileadi, na akarokwa ase erieta riaye." 
Ezra2:62 Abwo bakariga‐rigia korwa ase emeroberio ye chinderia gose mbanyore chisokoro chiabo, korende tichianyoretwe chirikire aroro. Ase ayio bakaangwa tibaba abakuani, ekiagera nigo babaretwe koba abatachenegeti." 
Ezra2:63 Omogambi akabakania ng’a tibabaisa koria endagera yarenge enchenu mono, goika engaki omokuani arenge gochia koboria Nyasae goetera ase Urimu na Tumimu." 
Ezra2:64 Omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto oiranete nigo orenge chilifu emerongo ene na ibere, na amagana atato, na emerongo etano nomo (42,360)," 
Ezra2:65 amo nabasomba babo, abasacha na abakungu, chilifu isano na ibere, na amagana atato, na emerongo etato, na batano na babere (7,337). Boigo mbabwate abateri, abasacha na abakungu, amagana abere (200)." 
Ezra2:66 Naende mbabwate chibarasi amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etato, na isano nemo (736), ne chiyombo amagana abere, na emerongo ene na isano (245)," 
Ezra2:67 ne chingamia amagana ane, na emerongo etato, na isano (435), ne chitigere chilifu isano nemo, na amagana atano na abere, na emerongo ebere (6,720)." 
Ezra2:68 Na abateneneri bande be chiamate chiria ekero bachete ase enyomba y’Omonene agwo Yerusalemu, bakarua ebiegwa bi’ogwancha ase okoagachera enyomba ya Nyasae aase aye." 
Ezra2:69 Bakarua buna barenge konyara, bakabeka ase ekungo y’ogokorerwa emeremo ebisamunye bie chitahabu bikorokwa chidariki, chilifu emerongo etano nomo na eyemo (61,000), na ebie chifeta bikorokwa chimina, chilifu isano (5,000), ne chianga chi’abakuani, rigana erimo (100)." 
Ezra2:70 Abakuani, na Abalawi, na abanto bande, bakaba bakomenya ase emechie yabo. Abateri, na abarendi b’ebiita, na abakori emeremo be Hekalu, nabarabwo bakaba bakomenya ase emechie yabo, na Abaisraeli bonsi ase emechie yabo." 
Ezra3:1 Ekero omotienyi o gatano na kabere oigete, na Abaisraeli bamenyete ase emechando yabo, bonsi bagasangererekana ase obomo agwo Yerusalemu." 
Ezra3:2 Erio Yesua, mosinto o Yosadaki, amo nabakuani bamwabo, na Serubabeli, mosinto o Sealitieli, na abanto bamwabo, bakaimoka koagacha egesasimero kia Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, bamoruere ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase kerokio, buna arikire ase amachiko a Musa, omonto o Nyasae." 
Ezra3:3 Bakaagacha egesasimero keria aase aye, erinde bamoruere Omonene ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa mambia na morogoba, ekiagera nigo bairogete abanto bamenyete ase ense eria." 
Ezra3:4 Barabwo bakaba bakorenda Rituko Rinene ri’Ebigutu, koreng’ana buna riachigetwe, na kera rituko bakaba bakorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase omobaro ochikire o kera rituko." 
Ezra3:5 Amo nayio bakaba bakorua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa bia botambe, na ebi’Omotienyi Omoyia, na ebi’Amatuko ande Amanene aatananetwe ase Omonene, amo nebing’wanso bi’ogwancha, ebio omonto arenge korua ase Omonene." 
Ezra3:6 Abanto bagachaka korua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase Omonene ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere, korende oboroso bwe Hekalu y’Omonene konya tiborabekwa." 
Ezra3:7 Abanto bakarua chibesa, bakaa abaagacheri b’amagena, na abasenia be chibao, naende bakarua chindagera, na ebinyugwa, na amaguta ’amazeituni, ase Abasidoni na Abaturo, erinde barente emecharake korwa Lebanoni goetera ase enyancha goika Yopa, koreng’ana buna Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi abaete ribaga." 
Ezra3:8 Ase omotienyi o kabere, omwaka o kabere, nyuma abanto kobairanire gocha ase enyomba y’Omonene agwo Yerusalemu, emeremo egachakwa. Serubabeli, mosinto o Sealitieli, na Yesua, mosinto o Yosadaki, bagachaka emeremo amo nabanto bamwabo, na abakuani, na Abalawi, na bonsi abachete Yerusalemu korwa ase obosomba. Abalawi bonsi abarenge nemiaka emerongo ebere na goetania bagachorwa gotenenera emeremo y’enyomba y’Omonene." 
Ezra3:9 Yesua na abamura baye amo nabamwabo, na Kadimeli na abamura baye, abanto b’ororeria rwa Hodawia, bakaba bagotenenera abakori emeremo b’enyomba ya Nyasae. Barabwo bakaba bagokonywa nabanto b’eamate ya Henadadi na abana babo, abarenge Abalawi." 
Ezra3:10 Ekero abaagachi bachagete kobeka oboroso bwe Hekalu y’Omonene, abakuani babegete chianga chi’obokuani bagacha nebirombeta, na Abalawi abarenge b’ororeria rw’Asafu babwate chisani chigoakanigwa kwoga, ase okomotogia Omonene, koreng’ana buna Daudi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, achigete." 
Ezra3:11 Bakaba bagotera na goitabererania, bagotogia Omonene na komoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, bagoteba, “Omonene nomuya, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye ase Abaisraeli nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare.” Abanto bonsi bagaaka amariogi amanene komotogia Omonene, ekiagera oboroso bw’enyomba y’Omonene konya bwabekirwe." 
Ezra3:12 Abange ase abakuani, na Abalawi, na abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, baria barenge abagotu, abaroche enyomba eria ye ritang’ani, bono ekero baroche oboroso bw’eyio enyia bwabekirwe, bakarera na koiyeria amariga. Korende abange bagaaka amariogi amanene ay’omogoko." 
Ezra3:13 Abanto tibanyarete gwatanana amariogi ’omogoko are goakwa korwa ase aria ay’okorera. Nigo baagete amariogi amanene mono akaigweka gochia aare mono. 
Ezra4:1 Bono ekero ababisa b’Abayuda, na ab’Ababenjamin baigwete ng’a abanto baria bairanire korwa ase obosomba naende ng’a nkoagachera bare Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, Hekalu," 
Ezra4:2 bakagenda ase Serubabeli, na ase abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, bakabatebia, “Tiga tobaagachisie, naintwe nabo togosasima Nyasae oino buna inwe mogokora, na ase chingaki korwa kare gese Esari‐Hadoni, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, oria otorentete aiga, twabeire tokorwa ebing’wanso ase Nyasae oyo.”" 
Ezra4:3 Korende Serubabeli, na Yesua, na abateneneri bande be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, bakabakania, bakabatebia, “Inwe timogwenereti motoagachisie enyomba ya Nyasae oito, korende nintwe tweka toraagachere Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, enyomba, buna Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi atochigete.”" 
Ezra4:4 Erio abanto b’ense eria bagaita Abayuda emioyo, bakaboboyia ng’a tibagenderera koagacha." 
Ezra4:5 Abanto abwo bakarenta abasemia baare goakanerwa, nabwo bakaba bakorua ogosemia okobe gosaria emeroberio yabo, bakaba bagokora igo korwa amatuko ’okogamba gwa Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, goikera ay’okogamba kwa Dario, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi." 
Ezra4:6 Ase omochakano bw’okogamba kw’Ahaswero, ababisa baria bakarika amang’ana ay’ogosoera abanto bamenyete ase orogongo rw’Abayuda, na ase Yerusalemu." 
Ezra4:7 Naende ase amatuko ’okogamba kw’Aritasasita, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, Bisilamu, na Mitiredati, na Tabeeli, na abanto bande babwataine komo, bakarikera Aritasasita rirube ase chinuguta chi’Ekearamaiki na ase omonwa oyio." 
Ezra4:8 Boigo Rehumu, omosemia omonene, na Simusai omoriki, bakarikera Aritasasita rirube bagosoera Yerusalemu." 
Ezra4:9 Erio Rehemu, omosemia omonene, na Simusai omoriki, na abande babwataine nabarabwo: abagambi ebina, na abagavuna, na abanene b’oboruoti, na Abaayemi, na Abaereki, na Abababeli, na Abasusa korwa ase ense y’Abaelamu," 
Ezra4:10 na abanto b’ebisaku binde biria Osinapari, oyorenge omonene naende osikire, arentete, akababeka komenya ase emechie ya Samaria na ase chinsemo chinde chi’orogongo roria, bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, bakarika rirube." 
Ezra4:11 Aya naro amang’ana e rirube riria riarigetwe: “Ase Aritasasita omoruoti. Intwe abasomba bao aba tomenyete aiga bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, twagokwanirie." 
Ezra4:12 “Aye omoruoti, bono manya ng’a Abayahudi aba barua asore, bagacha asetore aiga Yerusalemu, bachakire koagacha omochie oria oichire nogosaria na obobe. Nigo bare ang’e gokoora chindwaki chiaye na koroisia amaroso aye." 
Ezra4:13 Aye omoruoti, manya ng’a onye omochie oyo okoagachwa naende, ne chindwaki chiere koagachwa, rirorio abanto aba tibakorua ebango, gose echogo y’ebinto babwate, gose ebango ye chinchera, na ebitoki bi’omoruoti nigo birakee." 
Ezra4:14 Na ekiagera intwe tokonyora omonyo oito korwa ase enyomba yao, aye omoruoti, titogwancha korora aye gokorenterwa ogochaywa buna okwo. Ase ayio twatomire amang’ana ayio asore, aye omoruoti," 
Ezra4:15 erinde obotuki bokorwe ase chibuku aase amang’ana e chisokoro chiao arikire. Nonyore korwa ase amang’ana arigetwe ase chibuku chiria ng’a omochie oyo noyo bw’obobe na ogotaigwera, obeire okorenta emechando ase abaruoti, na ase chingongo chionsi, naende ng’a eburu‐buru na ogosaria nigo biarengeo korwa kare. Ayio agerete omochie oyio ogasarigwa." 
Ezra4:16 Intwe nigo togokomanyia, aye omoruoti, ng’a omochie oyo oise koagachwa naende, ne chindwaki chiaye chiagachwe chiere, rirorio orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati tirokoba orwao.”" 
Ezra4:17 Omoruoti agatoma amairanerio aya: “Ase Rehemu, omosemia omonene, na Simusai omoriki, na ase abanto baria bande babwataine nabarabwo bamenyete Samaria, boigo nase baria barenge ase orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, nabakwanirie." 
Ezra4:18 “Rirube mwatoma gocha asetore riasomirwe buya asende, nariigure." 
Ezra4:19 Nachika, na obotuki bogakorwa na amang’ana akanyorekana ng’a omochie oyio korwa kare obeire okorwania abaruoti, na ogotaigwera, na eburu‐buru amo namariomana mbiarenge imeo." 
Ezra4:20 Abaruoti barenge nokobua babeire bakogambera Yerusalemu na orogongo rwonsi rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, na abwo babeire bakorenterwa ebango na echogo y’ebinto na eye chinchera." 
Ezra4:21 Ase ayio inwe karue ogochika ng’a abanto abwo batangwe batige gokora emeremo, erinde omochie oyio otigwe, toagachwa naende goika ekero inche ndarue ogochika." 
Ezra4:22 Timobaisa gotebana ase amang’ana aya. Nase ki inche omoruoti ndanyore emechando?” 
Ezra4:23 Erio ekero rirube ri’omoruoti Aritasasita riasometwe ase Rehumu, na ase Simusai omoriki, na ase abanto abwo babwatanete nabarabwo, barabwo bakagenda Yerusalemu bwango kegima ase Abayahudi, na ase chinguru bakababetereria ng’a tibagenderera koagacha." 
Ezra4:24 Bono emeremo yare gokorwa ase enyomba ya Nyasae agwo Yerusalemu egasiekwa kegima na ekaba egendererete gosiekwa goika omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba kwa Dario, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi." 
Ezra5:1 Bono ekaba ng’a ase erieta ria Nyasae, oyore Omonene obo, ababani Hagai na Zakaria bw’ororeria rwa Ido mbabanete ase Abayahudi abamenyete ase ense ya Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
Ezra5:2 Erio Serubabeli, mosinto o Sealitieli, na Yesua, mosinto o Yosadaki, bagachaka koagacha naende enyomba ya Nyasae agwo Yerusalemu, na ababani ba Nyasae mbarengeo amo nabarabwo ase okobakonya." 
Ezra5:3 Ase engaki eyio Tatenai, omogavuna bw’orogongo orwo rwa bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, na Setari‐Bosenai, na abande babwataine nabwo, bagacha, bakababoria, “Ning’o obaa ribaga mokoagacha enyomba eye na gokoora koagacha orwaki orwo?”" 
Ezra5:4 Naende bakaboria iga, “Abaagachi b’oboagacho obo, naki bakorokwa?”" 
Ezra5:5 Korende eriso ria Nyasae obo nigo riarenge ririgereretie abagaaka b’Abayahudi, na abanto baria tibabatangete goika amang’ana aria amoikere Dario. Nyuma y’ayio bairanerigwe ase rirube igoro y’amang’ana ayio." 
Ezra5:6 Ase igo Tatenai, omogavuna bw’orogongo orwo rwa bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, na Setari‐Bosenai, na abagavuna bande baare kogamba amo nabarabwo ase orogongo orwo bagatoma rirube ase Dario omoruoti." 
Ezra5:7 Bakamotomera amang’ana arikire iga: “Ase Dario omoruoti, omorembe bwonsi obe asore!" 
Ezra5:8 “Nigo togokomanyia aye omoruoti ng’a intwe ntwagenda ase orogongo orwo rw’Abayuda, ase enyomba ya Nyasae oyore omonene. Nigo egendererete koagacherwa amagena amanene mono, ne chibao chibekire ase chinyasi. Ekeene, emeremo eye nigo egokorwa ase okwerwa okonene, na nigo esesenirie ase amaboko abo." 
Ezra5:9 “Agwo ntwakwana nabagaaka baria, tokababoria iga: Ning’o obaa ribaga mokoagacha enyomba eye na gokoora koagacha orwaki oro?" 
Ezra5:10 Naende ntwababoria amarieta abo, erinde tokorikere amarieta ’abatang’ani abwo babo." 
Ezra5:11 “Amang’ana aya naro batotebia: Intwe nigo tore abasomba ba Nyasae o igoro na ense, na nigo tokoagacha naende enyomba eria omoruoti omonene bw’Abaisraeli aagachete na akayekoora ase emiaka emenge yaetire." 
Ezra5:12 Korende ekiagera chisokoro chiaito chiagerete Nyasae o igoro akaba nendamwamu, ere akabeka abanto baria ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro Omokalidayo, omoruoti o Babeli, oria osaretie enyomba eye na akaira abanto Babeli." 
Ezra5:13 Korende ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba gwa Koresi, omoruoti o Babeli, ere Koresi naruete ogochika ng’a enyomba eye eagachwe naende." 
Ezra5:14 Na ebikorero bi’enyomba ya Nyasae biaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu ne chifeta, ebio Nebukadinesaro arusetie korwa ase Hekalu yarenge aiga Yerusalemu, akabiira akabibeka ase hekalu yare Babeli. Ebikorero ebio omoruoti Koresi akabirusia ase hekalu ya Babeli, akabia omonto okorokwa Sesibasari oyo abegete koba omogavuna," 
Ezra5:15 akamotebia ng’a arente ebikorero ebio, abibeke ime ase Hekalu ere aiga Yerusalemu, naende atige enyomba ya Nyasae eagachwe aase yarenge." 
Ezra5:16 Bono Sesibasari nere ochagete kobeka oboroso bw’enyomba ya Nyasae ere aiga Yerusalemu, na korwa engaki eyio goika rero iga, enyomba eye nigo egendererete koagachwa, teraera." 
Ezra5:17 “Gaki bono, aye omoruoti, onye amang’ana aya agokogwenera, ochike obotuki bokorwe ase amagachero e chibuku chi’oboruoti bwa Babeli, omanye gose Koresi omoruoti naruete ogochika ng’a enyomba ya Nyasae ere Yerusalemu eagachwe naende. Aye omoruoti ototomere aya orengereretie igoro y’amang’ana aya.”" 
Ezra6:1 Omoruoti Dario agachika, na obotuki bogakorwa ase chibuku chiagachire agwo Babeli ase amagachero ay’oboruoti." 
Ezra6:2 Na agwo Ekibatana, omochie omonene ase orogongo rw’Abamedia, ebuku ekanyorekana erikire amang’ana aya:" 
Ezra6:3 “Ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Koresi, ere akarua ogochika okwo: Enyomba ya Nyasae ere Yerusalemu, tiga eagachwe naende, na oboroso bwaye bokong’igwe, erinde ebing’wanso bionsi, amo na biria bi’ogosambwa, birentwe aroro na koruegwa. Obotambe bw’enyomba eyio gochia igoro bobe obw’amaboko emerongo etano nomo, na obogare bobe obw’amaboko emerongo etano nomo." 
Ezra6:4 Amagena aagachwe ase chindwaro isato, na orwaro oromo roagachwe ne chibao. Chibesa chiraakanerwe chirwe ase ekungo y’oboruoti." 
Ezra6:5 Naende ebikorero bi’enyomba ya Nyasae biroisirie korwa ase chitahabu ne chifeta, biria Nebukadinesaro arusetie korwa ase Hekalu yare Yerusalemu, akabiira Babeli, bionsi biiranigwe bibekwe naende ime ase Hekalu ere Yerusalemu; mobibeke ime ase enyomba ya Nyasae, kera ekemo aase aye.”" 
Ezra6:6 Ase ayio Dario akarika rirube iga: “Bono aye Tatenai, omogavuna bw’orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, na Setari‐Bosenai, na abagavuna bande abwo mokogamba komo agwo ase orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche roria, inwe beera aare kegima." 
Ezra6:7 Inwe tiga emeremo egokorwa ase enyomba eyio ya Nyasae egenderere; tiga omogavuna bw’Abayahudi, na abagaaka babo bagenderere koagacha naende enyomba ya Nyasae aase yarenge." 
Ezra6:8 Amo nayio nachikire amang’ana morakorere abagaaka abwo b’Abayahudi ase okoagacha enyomba eyio ya Nyasae naende. Emeremo yonsi nigo eraakanerwe korwa ase chibesa chi’ekungo y’oboruoti, echikorwa ase ebango eria ekorusigwa korwa ase orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati; mobe mokobaakana motari gotebana." 
Ezra6:9 Na kende gionsi abakuani bare agwo Yerusalemu baraganie baegwe. Kera rituko nigo baraegwe chieri chinsae, ne chimingichi gose ching’ondi, chibe ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase Nyasae o igoro. Boigo baegwe engano, na omonyo, na edivai, na amaguta ’amasabibu. Baegwe ebinto ebio, tibamocha kobiegwa." 
Ezra6:10 Igo mbanyare komoruera Nyasae o igoro ebing’wanso bikomogwenera, na gosabera obogima bwane, inche omoruoti, na obw’abamura baane." 
Ezra6:11 Boigo nachikire ng’a, monto onde bwensi oraonchore ring’ana eri, omwamba osomorwe korwa ase enyomba yaye, na ere omonyene atongwe ase oro, na enyomba yaye ekorwe ebe etui y’eubi." 
Ezra6:12 Tiga Nyasae, oyo obekire erieta riaye ribeere aroro, aonchore na koiyeria inse omoruoti onde bwensi, gose abanto, barateeme koonchora ogochika oko, gose gosaria enyomba eye ya Nyasae ere Yerusalemu. Inche Dario narure ogochika okwo, tiga koigwerwe kegima.”" 
Ezra6:13 Bono Tatenai, omogavuna bw’orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche roria, na Setari‐Bosenai, na abarenge kogamba komo, bagakora ase okwerwa amang’ana ayio onsi Dario omoruoti konya achikire." 
Ezra6:14 Abagaaka b’Abayahudi bakagenderera koagacha na konyora ogosesenigwa goetera ase obobani bwa Hagai na Zakaria bw’ororeria rwa Ido. Igo abanto bagakoora emeremo y’oboagacho obwo buna bachigetwe na Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, na buna Koresi, na Dario, na Aritasasita, abaruoti b’Abaayemi bachigete." 
Ezra6:15 Enyomba eria ekaagachwa ekaera ase rituko ria gatato ri’omotienyi okorokwa Adari, ase omwaka o gatano na rimo bw’okogamba kwa Dario, omoruoti." 
Ezra6:16 Bono Abaisraeli: abakuani, na Abalawi, na abanto bande abwo bairanete korwa ase obosomba, bagakora omoyega omonene bw’omogoko ase ogwatanana enyomba eria ya Nyasae na koyechena." 
Ezra6:17 Na ase ogwatanana enyomba eye na koyechena, bakarua chieri rigana erimo, ne chimingichi amagana abere, ne chimanwa chimingichi chie ching’ondi amagana ane, chikaba ebing’wanso. Boigo bakarua chigoree ikomi na ibere chikaba ebing’wanso bi’ebibe ase engencho y’Abaisraeli. Echio nigo chiaruetwe koreng’ana nomobaro bw’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli." 
Ezra6:18 Boigo bakabeka abakuani ase ebiombe biabo, na Abalawi ase emeremo yabo, ase okomokorera Nyasae agwo Yerusalemu, koreng’ana buna erikire ase ebuku ya Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, abanto baria bairanete korwa ase obosomba bakarenda Epasaka." 
Ezra6:20 Abakuani na Abalawi konya bechenire; bono bonsi nigo barenge abachenegete. Ase ayio bakanyenya chimanwa chiria chie ching’ondi chi’Epasaka ase engencho y’abwo bonsi bairanete korwa ase obosomba, na ase abakuani bamwabo, na ase barabwo abanyene." 
Ezra6:21 Chinyama chie chimanwa chiria nigo chiarietwe n’Abaisraeli baria bairanete korwa ase obosomba, boigo na kera omonto bweatananete korwa ase ogosaria kw’abanto b’ebisaku b’ense eria na kobwatana n’Abaisraeli ase ogosasima Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Ezra6:22 Ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere bakaba barendete Rituko riria Rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera bare nomogoko. Omonene nigo abarenterete omogoko oyio ase okoonchora enkoro y’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, erinde akabancha akabakonya mono ase emeremo y’enyomba ya Nyasae oyore Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Ezra7:1 Nyuma y’amang’ana aria kaerire ase engaki y’okogamba kw’Aritasasita, omoruoti bw’ense y’Ayemi, narengeo omonto okorokwa Ezara, mosinto o Seraya, bw’Asaria, o Hilikia," 
Ezra7:2 o Salumu, o Zadoki, bw’Ahitubu," 
Ezra7:3 bw’Amaria, bw’Asaria, o Merayoti," 
Ezra7:4 o Seraya, o Usi, o Buki," 
Ezra7:5 bw’Abisua, o Finehasi, bw’Eleazari, o Haroni, omokuani omonene." 
Ezra7:6 Ezara oyio akarua Babeli. Ere nigo arenge omworokia bw’amariko; nigo orokereretigwe na omanyete mono amachiko a Musa, ayio Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, aruete; na ekiagera okoboko kw’Omonene, Nyasae oye, kwarenge amo nere, omoruoti akamoa gento kende gionsi aboretie." 
Ezra7:7 Ase omwaka o gatano na kabere bw’okogamba kw’Aritasasita omoruoti, abande b’Abaisraeli, na abakuani, na Abalawi, na abateri, na abarendi b’ebiita, na abakori emeremo be Hekalu, bakagenda Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:8 Bono ase omwaka o gatano na kabere, omotienyi o gatano, bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti oria, Ezara agaika Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:9 Nigo achagete orogendo rwaye korwa Babeli ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, na agaika Yerusalemu rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o gatano, ekiagera okoboko kwa Nyasae oye kwarenge amo nere ase okomokonya." 
Ezra7:10 Ezara konya orure enkoro yaye kweorokereria amachiko ’Omonene na koyakora, naende nigo arenge kworokereria Abaisraeli emeroberio yaye, na okogamba kwaye kwa boronge." 
Ezra7:11 Amang’ana aya naro arikire ase rirube riria omoruoti Aritasasita aete Ezara, omokuani na omworokia bw’amariko, oyo bworokereretigwe na omanyete mono amachiko ’Omonene na emeroberio yaye echikire ase Abaisraeli:" 
Ezra7:12 “Inche Aritasasita, omoruoti bw’abaruoti, ngokorikera inde aye Ezara omokuani, aye kwegerete amachiko a Nyasae o igoro. Amakwania amo nayakobwatia ayio." 
Ezra7:13 “Nachikire ng’a monto onde bwensi bw’Abaisraeli, gose oyo bw’abakuani babo, gose oyo bw’Abalawi, oyomenyete ase oboruoti bwane, karanche kogenda Yerusalemu amo naye, tiga agende." 
Ezra7:14 “Inche omoruoti, amo nabasemia baane batano na babere, twagotomire ogende komanya amang’ana ’ense y’Abayuda, na aya Yerusalemu, kobwatekana namachiko a Nyasae oo, ayio obwate ase okoboko kwao." 
Ezra7:15 Naende oire chifeta ne chitahabu chiria inche omoruoti, na abasemia baane, twarure nogwancha ase Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oyio obomenyo bwaye bore Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:16 Boigo oire chifeta ne chitahabu chionsi, echio oranyore korwa ase ense yonsi ya Babeli, oire nokoruegwa kw’ogwancha okwo abanto na abakuani bararue ase enyomba ya Nyasae obo ere Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:17 “Obe omwegenwa, na ase chibesa echio ogore chieri, ne chimingichi, ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa bikoruegwa amo nebing’wanso ebio. Orue ebinto ebio ase egesasimero ki’enyomba ya Nyasae oo ere agwo Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Emeremo ende yonsi aye amo nabanto bamino morarore ere buya, chibesa chiratigare mochiyekorere, korende mokore igo kobwatekana nogwancha kwa Nyasae oino." 
Ezra7:19 Ebikorero ebio kwaeirwe gokorera emeremo ase enyomba ya Nyasae oo, obiire bionsi, obibeke ase obosio bwa Nyasae agwo Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:20 Ebinto binde bionsi biganeirie ase enyomba ya Nyasae oo, ebio ogwenerete korenta aroro, obigore ne chibesa chikorwa ase ekungo y’omoruoti." 
Ezra7:21 “Naende inche omoruoti Aritasasita narure ogochika ase abagachi bonsi be chikungo bare ase orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati ng’a, gento kende gionsi Ezara omokuani oyo bwegerete amachiko a Nyasae o igoro araganie korwa asemore, mogekorere ase oboronge." 
Ezra7:22 Momoe goikera chifeta chitalanta rigana erimo (100), na engano ebitonga elifu eyemo (1,000), na edivai chilita chilifu isato, na amagana atano na rimo (3,600), na amaguta ’amazeituni chilita chilifu isato, na amagana atano na rimo (3,600), na momoe omonyo otari na kerengo." 
Ezra7:23 Gento kende gionsi Nyasae o igoro arachike ng’a gekorwe, ekio gekorwe boronge ase engencho y’enyomba ya Nyasae o igoro, erinde endamwamu ya Nyasae tebaisa koba igoro y’oboruoti bwane, na abamura baane." 
Ezra7:24 Naende nigo tokobamanyia ng’a timobaisa kobeka ebango gose ogochoga ase onde bwensi bw’abakuani, gose Abalawi, gose abateri, gose abarendi b’ebiita, gose abakori emeremo be Hekalu, gose abakori emeremo bande b’enyomba ya Nyasae." 
Ezra7:25 “Bono aye Ezara kwaeirwe obong’aini na Nyasae oo. Obokorere emeremo ase ogochora abagambi ebina na abamanyi b’amachiko, erinde babe bakogamba ebina bi’abanto bonsi ase orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, aba bonsi bamanyete amachiko a Nyasae oo; na abatayamanyeti oborokererie bayamanye." 
Ezra7:26 Monto onde bwensi oraange koigwera amachiko a Nyasae oo, na ay’omoruoti, oyio anacherwe ekina kia boronge, kebe eki’ogokwa, gose eki’ogoserigwa, gose kourwa ebinto biaye, gose asibwe.”" 
Ezra7:27 Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito, atogigwe, oria obegete ring’ana eri ime ase enkoro y’omoruoti, oyobwanchire gokora enyomba y’Omonene ere Yerusalemu ebe ensiani mono." 
Ezra7:28 Ere Omonene oorokirie asende obwanchani bwaye botari koera ase obosio bw’omoruoti, na ase abasemia baye, na abanene bonsi bare gokonya omoruoti bare nokobua. Inche nkaba noboremu, ekiagera okoboko kw’Omonene, Nyasae one, kwarenge amo nainche, na igo ngasangereria abatang’ani b’Abaisraeli batiire amo nainche." 
Ezra8:1 Abanto aba nabwo abateneneri be chiamate echio chiaruete Babeli, chigatiira amo nainche, ekero Aritasasita arenge kogamba, na oyo nomoroberio bwe chinderia chiabo:" 
Ezra8:2 Korwa ase ororeria rwa Finehasi, Gerisomu; korwa ase orwa Itamari, Danieli; korwa ase orwa Daudi, Hatusi" 
Ezra8:2 Korwa ase ororeria rwa Finehasi, Gerisomu; korwa ase orwa Itamari, Danieli; korwa ase orwa Daudi, Hatusi" 
Ezra8:3 orwa Sekania; korwa ase orwa Parosi, Zakaria, amo nabwo barigetwe amo nere, abasacha rigana erimo, na emerongo etano (150);" 
Ezra8:4 korwa ase orwa Pahati‐Moabu, Eliehoenai, mosinto o Seraya, na amo nere abasacha amagana abere (200);" 
Ezra8:5 korwa ase orwa Satu, Sekania, mosinto o Yahasieli, na amo nere abasacha amagana atato (300);" 
Ezra8:6 korwa ase orw’Adini, Ebedi, mosinto o Yonathani, na amo nere abasacha emerongo etano (50);" 
Ezra8:7 korwa ase orw’Elamu, Yesaia, mosinto bw’Atalia, na amo nere abasacha emerongo etano na ebere (70);" 
Ezra8:8 korwa ase orwa Sefatia, Sebadia, mosinto o Mikaeli, na amo nere abasacha emerongo etano na etato (80);" 
Ezra8:9 korwa ase orwa Yoabu, Obadia, mosinto o Yehieli, na amo nere abasacha amagana abere, na ikomi na batano na batato (218);" 
Ezra8:10 korwa ase orwa Bani, Selomiti, mosinto o Yosifia, na amo nere abasacha rigana erimo, na emerongo etano nomo (160);" 
Ezra8:11 korwa ase orwa Bebai, Zakaria, mosinto o Bebai, na amo nere abasacha emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (28);" 
Ezra8:12 korwa ase orw’Asigadi, Yohanani, mosinto o Hakatani, na amo nere abasacha rigana erimo, na ikomi (110);" 
Ezra8:13 korwa ase orw’Adonikamu, abachete nyuma y’abande nabwo aba: Elifeleti, na Yeueli, na Semaya, na amo nabarabwo abasacha emerongo etano nomo (60);" 
Ezra8:14 korwa ase orwa Bigiwai, Utai na Sabudi, na amo nabarabwo abasacha emerongo etano na ebere (70)." 
Ezra8:15 Bono ngasangereria abanto abwo ase orooche rogotirimbokera gochia ase Ahawa, na agwo togatoora, tokabeera aroro ase amatuko atato. Ekero naitaaete abanto amo nabakuani, tinanyorete Abalawi aroro nonya noyomo." 
Ezra8:16 Erio ngatoma abanto korangeria Eliezeri na Arieli, Semaya na Elinatani, Yaribu na Elinatani, Nathani na Zakaria, na Mesualmu, abwo barenge abaraai b’abanto; boigo nkarangeria Yoyaribu na Elinatani, abarenge abanto abanyasemi." 
Ezra8:17 Ngatoma abanto abwo gochia ase Ido, omotang’ani bw’aase akorokwa Kasifa, bamotebie ere amo nabanto bamwabo, abarenge abakori emeremo be Hekalu abamenyete aroro ng’a batotomere abanto bache gokorera Nyasae oito ase enyomba yaye." 
Ezra8:18 Nyasae oito nigo atokonyete nokoboko kwaye okuya, bagatotomera Serebia orenge omonto omong’aini bw’ororeria rwa Mali, mosinto o Lawi o Israeli, amo nabamura baye na abamwabo, bonsi abanto ikomi na batano na batato." 
Ezra8:19 Boigo bagatoma Hasabia na Yesaia bw’ororeria rwa Merari, na abamwabo, na abana babo, bonsi nabanto emerongo ebere." 
Ezra8:20 Naende bagatoma abakori emeremo be Hekalu amagana abere, na emerongo ebere (220), ekeombe kere buna Daudi na abakonyi baye bachorete gokonya Abalawi ase emeremo yabo. Abwo bonsi nigo batoretwe ase amarieta abo." 
Ezra8:21 Erio agwo ase orooche rw’Ahawa, nkarareria abanto, nkabatebia ng’a tweng’ate, naende twekeyie tobe abaitongo ase obosio bwa Nyasae oito na korigia korwa asare oborendi obuya ase orogendo rwaito, intwe na abana baito, na ebinto biaito bionsi." 
Ezra8:22 Nigo nabete nobosooku kobooria omoruoti atoe ekeombe ki’abarwani esegi, na eki’abariini chibarasi ng’a bache gotorenda ase orogendo rwaito, ng’a titokorerwa bobe nababisa baito, ekiagera konya namotebirie ng’a okoboko kwa Nyasae oito nigo gokorenta amaya ase abwo bonsi bakomorigia, naende ng’a endamwamu yaye ere nokobua nigo ekoba igoro y’abwo bonsi bakomotiga." 
Ezra8:23 Ase engencho y’ayio tokeng’ata na koboria Nyasae oito, nere akaigwa okoboria gwaito kw’ogosorora." 
Ezra8:24 Erio ngachora abakuani ikomi na babere, abarenge abatang’ani: Serebia na Hasabia, amo nabakuani bande bamwabo ikomi." 
Ezra8:25 Bono nkabarengera chifeta, ne chitahabu; na ebikorero, ebio omoruoti, na abasemia baye, na abagambi bare komokonya, na Abaisraeli bonsi abarenge agwo, konya barure ase enyomba ya Nyasae." 
Ezra8:26 Ebi nabio nabaete: Chitalanta chie chifeta amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano (650), na ebikorero biaroisirie korwa ase chifeta bie rigori rie chitalanta rigana erimo (100), ne chitahabu chitalanta rigana erimo (100)," 
Ezra8:27 ne chibakuri emerongo ebere chiaroisirie korwa ase chitahabu chire chie rigori buna erie chidariki elifu eyemo, na ebikorero bibere biaroisirie korwa ase chitaai chichenire bire bie rigori buna erie chitahabu." 
Ezra8:28 Ngatebia abakuani, “Inwe nigo more abachenekire ase Omonene, na ebikorero nabirobio biachenekire. Chifeta ne chitahabu echio nigo chiarurwe chire ebiegwa bi’ogwancha ase Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito." 
Ezra8:29 Chigache na gochirenda goika ekero morachirenge ase obosio bw’abakuani abanene na Abalawi, na ase abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abaisraeli, bare Yerusalemu ime ase ebinyomba bi’enyomba y’Omonene.”" 
Ezra8:30 Ase ayio abakuani na Abalawi bakaimokia chifeta ne chitahabu echio barengerete amo nebikorero, erinde baire ebinto ebio Yerusalemu, ase enyomba ya Nyasae oito." 
Ezra8:31 Bono ase rituko ria ikomi na kabere ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani tokarua agwo ase orooche rw’Ahawa kogenda Yerusalemu. Okoboko kwa Nyasae oito nigo kwarenge amo naintwe gototooria korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baito, na korwa ase abanto barenge gotoboera inchera." 
Ezra8:32 Ekero twaigete Yerusalemu, tokabeera aroro ase obotoereru amatuko atato." 
Ezra8:33 Ase rituko ria kane togasoa ase enyomba ya Nyasae oito; erio chifeta, ne chitahabu, na ebikorero biria, bikarengwa bikabekwa ase amaboko a Meremoti omokuani, mosinto o Uria, oyorenge amo na Eleazari, mosinto o Finehasi, na ase Abalawi aba: Yosabadi, mosinto o Yesua, na Noadia, mosinto o Binui." 
Ezra8:34 Ebinto ebio bionsi bikabarwa bikarengwa oborito bwabo, na oborito bwa kera egento bokarikwa."
