Ezra8:35 Abanto abwo bairanete korwa ase obosomba bakarua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli; bakarua chieri ikomi na ibere ase engencho y’Abaisraeli bonsi, naende bakarua chimingichi emerongo kianda na isano nemo (96), ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi emerongo etano na ebere, na isano na ibere (77). Naende bakarua chigoree ikomi na ibere chikaba ebing’wanso bi’ebibe. Ching’iti echio chionsi nigo chiaruetwe chikaba ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase Omonene." 
Ezra8:36 Abanto abwo bakarenta amang’ana arigetwe nomoruoti, bakayaa abagambi abanene ase oboruoti, na abagavuna b’orogongo rwa bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, barabwo bonsi bakaba bagokonya abanto, bagakonya nenyomba ya Nyasae." 
Ezra9:1 Nyuma y’amang’ana ayio onsi kaerire, abatang’ani bagacha asende, bagantebia, “Abaisraeli, amo n’abakuani, na Abalawi, tibeatananeti korwa ase abanto abamenyete ase chinse echio. Nigo bagokora okogechia okwo Abakanani, na Abahiti, na Abaperisi, na Abayebusi, na Abaamoni, na Abamoabu, na Abamisiri, na Abaamori bagokora." 
Ezra9:2 Barabwo banyuomire abaiseke b’abanto abwo, naende banyuomeirie abamura babo abaiseke b’abanto abwo. Bono egesaku eke egechenu giochoganire nabanto be chinse echi. Abagambi na abatang’ani b’abanto nabwo bare abe ritang’ani ase ogokora okwo kw’ogotegenwa.”" 
Ezra9:3 Ekero naigwete amang’ana ayio, nigo natandorete chianga chiane na eganchwa yane, ngasunyora etukia yane, ne chinderu chiane, erio ngaikaransa ngaichana." 
Ezra9:4 Abanto bonsi abaigusetwe ase engencho y’amang’ana aria Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli akwanete igoro y’ogotegenwa kw’abanto baria bairanete korwa ase obosomba, bagasangererekana asende agwo ase naikaransete ing’ichanete goika engaki y’okoruegwa gw’ekeng’wanso kia mogoroba." 
Ezra9:5 Na ekero engaki y’okoruegwa gw’ekeng’wanso kia mogoroba yaigete, nkaimoka korwa aase aria naikaransete inyekeetie, imbegete chianga na omwambaro one otandogete, erio ngatung’ama inse nkaumama, nkarambora amaboko aane gochia ase Omonene, Nyasae one," 
Ezra9:6 ngasaba, “Aye Nyasae one, nabeire nobosooku, na obosio bwane bwabeire nomoichano; tinkonyara gokorigereria aye Nyasae one. Ebibe biaito biabuchire gotoetania goika igoro, na okomocha gwaito gwaikire agwo igoro." 
Ezra9:7 Korwa amatuko e chisokoro chiaito goika rero iga twabeire tore nokomocha okonene, na ase engencho y’ebibe biaito intwe, na abaruoti baito, twabeire tokobekwa ase amaboko ’abaruoti be chinse, na goitwa nemioro, na gwoswa, naende togasakorwa na twabeire tokonyora obosooku, buna ere goika rero iga." 
Ezra9:8 Omonene Nyasae oito ase engaki enke kwaorokirie obuya bw’amabera asetore, gwatotigire abatigari abatwatoorekire; gwatonyoreire obotamero ime y’Aase ao Aachenu. Nigo kwamorekeire amaiso aito ase engaki, erinde totimoke na tobe abayia ase obosibwa bwaito." 
Ezra9:9 Intwe nigo tore abasibwa; nonya naboigo, aye Nyasae oito toratotiga ase obosibwa bwaito. Aye gwatoorokeirie obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, na kwagerire twanyorire ogwancherwa ase abaruoti b’Abaayemi. Barabwo batoeire ribaga koagacha naende enyomba yao, eria yatagoretwe, aye Nyasae oito, na twaeirwe eburi egotokengera aiga ase ense y’Abayuda na ase Yerusalemu." 
Ezra9:10 “Na bono, aye Nyasae oito, ninki toranyare gokwana nyuma y’amang’ana aya onsi? Intwe twatigire kobwata amachiko ao," 
Ezra9:11 ayio gwachigete goetera ase abasomba bao ababani ogateba: Ense eria mogochia koira ebe eyaino nigo ere eyetachenegeti, ekiagera abanto b’aroro bayekorire yabeire enyaka ase okoyeichoria nogokora kwabo gw’okogechia korwa ensinyo eyemo goika eyende." 
Ezra9:12 Ase ayio, timobaisa gosokia abaiseke baino ase abamura babo, gose timobaisa kobarigeria omorembe gose ogosesenigwa. Mobe abakong’u na morie amaya ay’ense eye na moyetigere abana baino ebe omwando obo kogenderera botambe." 
Ezra9:13 Na bono nonya amang’ana aya onsi aikire gotonyora ase engencho y’ogokora gwaito okobe, na okomocha gwaito okonene, twarorire ng’a aye, Nyasae oito, totoeti egesusuro buna ebibe biaito bigwenerete, korende gwatotigeire abatigari buna aba iga." 
Ezra9:14 Inee! Ntosarie naende amachiko ao na tonyuomerane nabanto aba bagokora okogechia oko? Inee! Igo aye tokoba nendamwamu asetore na otosirie kegima, erinde abatigari tibanyorekana, gose monto onde atooreke?" 
Ezra9:15 Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo ore omonyene oboronge, korende gwatotigairie intwe tore abake boka abatwatoorekire, buna tore aiga rero. Rora, nigo tore aa ase obosio bwao tokoorokia okomocha gwaito, na monto tari oranyare gotenena ase obosio bwao ase engencho y’okomocha buna oko.”" 
Ezra10:1 Bono ekero Ezara agendererete gosaba na koorokia amamocho, okorera na oramaime inse bosio bw’enyomba ya Nyasae, omosangererekano omonene mono bw’Abaisraeli, abasacha na abakungu, na abana, bagacha asare. Abanto abwo bonsi nigo babete bakorera bare nobororo obonge." 
Ezra10:2 Erio Sekania, mosinto o Yehieli, oyo bw’eamate ya Elamu, agakwana na Ezara, akamotebia, “Intwe titori abegenwa ase Nyasae oito, ekiagera twanyuomire abakungu b’ebisaku ebiao bi’abanto b’ense eye. Nonya nabo, ogosemeria ngotigarete koba ase Abaisraeli." 
Ezra10:3 Bono tokore okobwatana kw’ogotianania na Nyasae oito, erinde toserie abakungu abwo bonsi amo nabana babo. Tokore igo ase okobwatia ogosemia kwao, aye omonene one, na okw’abanto abwo babeire nobwoba na koiguswa ase engencho y’amachiko a Nyasae oito. Tiga ring’ana erio rikorwe koreng’ana namachiko." 
Ezra10:4 Imoka, ekiagera emeremo eye naye echigete, na intwe nigo tore amo naye; kabe omoremu oyekore.”" 
Ezra10:5 Erio Ezara akaimoka, akaboria abakuani abarenge abatang’ani, na Abalawi, na Abaisraeli bonsi, koria eira na gotiana ng’a mbakore buna batebetigwe. Ase ayio bakaria eira, bagatiana." 
Ezra10:6 Ezara akarua agwo ase enyomba ya Nyasae, akagenda ase akanyomba ka Yehohanani, mosinto bw’Eliasibu, akabeera aroro; taria kende gose konywa, korende nigo abete okorera, ekiagera abanto baria barenge ase obosomba tibabete abegenwa." 
Ezra10:7 Erio amang’ana akararigwa ase ense yonsi y’Abayuda, na ase Yerusalemu, ng’a abanto abwo bairanete korwa ase obosomba basangererekane agwo Yerusalemu." 
Ezra10:8 Naende akararigwa ng’a monto onde bwensi orenge kwanga, tacha ase engaki y’amatuko atato, buna abatang’ani na abagaaka bachigete, oyio aurwe ebinto biaye, naende arusananigwe tabaisa koba oyomo bw’omoganda bw’abanto abwo barwete ase obosomba." 
Ezra10:9 Ase engaki eyio y’amatuko atato Abayuda bonsi na Ababenjamin bagasangererekana agwo Yerusalemu. Erio nigo riarenge rituko ri’emerongo ebere ri’omotienyi o kianda. Abanto abwo bonsi bagaikaransa ase eraaro isiko, bosio bw’enyomba ya Nyasae, bakaba bakoiguswa ase engencho ye ring’ana riria, naende ekiagera embura yarenge enyinge." 
Ezra10:10 Agwo Ezara omokuani agatenena, akabatebia, “Inwe timobeti abegenwa, mwanyuomire abakungu b’ebisaku ebiao; ase igo mwagerire amamocho ’Abaisraeli amentekanire." 
Ezra10:11 Gaki bono oorokia okomocha okwo ase Omonene, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaino, naende mokore ogwancha kwaye. Mweatanane korwa ase abanto b’ense eye na motige abakungu abwo b’ebisaku ebiao.”" 
Ezra10:12 Erio omosangererekano bwonsi okairaneria ase eriogi rinene, ogateba, “Amang’ana ayio nabo are, goika tokore buna gwatebire." 
Ezra10:13 Korende abanto aba nabange mono, na engaki eye ney’embura enyinge, titokonyara kogenderera gotenena aa isiko ase eraaro. Emeremo eye teri eye rituko erimo, gose ey’amatuko abere, ekiagera twamochire mono ase ring’ana eri." 
Ezra10:14 Gaki tiga abatang’ani baito batenenere omoganda bwonsi. Erio abanto bonsi bare ase emechie yaito banyuomire abakungu abwo b’ebisaku ebiao bache ase chingaki barachikwe; bachiche bare amo nabagaaka na abagambi ebina ba kera omochie. Ase enchera eyio nabakendie endamwamu ya Nyasae oito igoro ye ring’ana eri, erinde ebe yaonchokire etotige.”" 
Ezra10:15 Yonathani, mosinto bw’Asaeli, na Yaseya, mosinto o Tikiwa, barabwo tibanchete amang’ana aria, na Mesulamu na Sabetai Omolawi bakababwatisia." 
Ezra10:16 Abanto abairanete korwa ase obosomba bagakora buna batebetigwe. Ezara omokuani agachora abanto abarenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo, oyomo oyomo korwa ase kera eamate, na bonsi bakarikwa amarieta abo. Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi o ikomi, barabwo bagachaka gotuka amang’ana aria," 
Ezra10:17 na ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani bagakoora obotuki igoro y’abasacha bonsi aba konya banyuomire abakungu korwa ase ebisaku ebiao. 
Ezra10:18 Abanto be chiamate chi’abakuani konya banyuomire abakungu b’ebisaku ebiao nabwo aba: Ab’eamate ya Yesua, mosinto o Yosadaki, na abamwabo: Maaseya, na Eliezeri, na Yaribu, na Gedalia." 
Ezra10:19 Abwo bakaria eira goseria abakungu baria babo na barue kera oyomo emingichi eyemo korwa ase riicho riaye ebe ekeng’wanso gi’okomocha kwabo. 
Ezra10:20 Ab’eamate ya Imeri: Hanani na Sebadia; 
Ezra10:21 ab’eamate ya Harimu: Maaseya na Elija, Semaya na Yehieli, na Usia;" 
Ezra10:22 ab’eamate ya Pasuri: Elioenai na Maaseya, Isumaeli na Netaneli, Yosabadi na Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Abalawi nabwo aba: Yosabadi na Simei, Kelaya (nere Kelita) na Petahia, Yuda na Eliezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Oyo bw’abateri: Eliasibu, Abwo b’abarendi b’ebiita: Salumu, na Telemu, na Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Abaisraeli bande: Ab’eamate ya Parosi: Ramia na Isia, Malikia na Miyamini, Eleazari na Malikia na Benaya;" 
Ezra10:26 ab’eamate ya Elamu: Matania na Zakaria, Yehieli na Abidi, Yeremoti na Elija;" 
Ezra10:27 ab’eamate ya Satu: Elioenai na Eliasibu, Matania na Yeremoti, Sabadi na Asisa;" 
Ezra10:28 ab’eamate ya Bebai; Yehohanani na Hanania, Sabai na Atilai;" 
Ezra10:29 ab’eamate ya Bani: Mesulamu na Maluku, Adaya na Yasubu, Seali na Yeremoti;" 
Ezra10:30 ab’eamate ya Pahati‐Moabu: Adina na Kelali, Benaya na Maaseya, Matania na Besaleli, Binui na Manase;" 
Ezra10:31 ab’eamate ya Harimu: Eliezeri na Isia, Malikia na Semaya, Simeoni" 
Ezra10:32 na Benjamin, Maluku na Semaria;" 
Ezra10:33 ab’eamate ya Hasumu; Matenai na Matata, Sabadi na Elifeleti, Yeremia na Manase, na Simei;" 
Ezra10:34 ab’eamate ya Bani: Maadai na Amuramu, Ueli" 
Ezra10:35 na Benaya, Bedeya na Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Wania na Maremoti, Eliasibu" 
Ezra10:37 na Matania, Matenai na Yaasu;" 
Ezra10:38 ab’eamate ya Binui: Simei 
Ezra10:39 na Selemia, Nathani na Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 Makinadebai na Sasai, Sarai" 
Ezra10:41 na Asareli, Selemia na Semaria," 
Ezra10:42 Salumu na Amaria, na Yusufu;" 
Ezra10:43 ab’eamate ya Nebo: Yeieli na Matitia, Sabadi na Sebina, Yadai na Yoeli, na Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Abanto aba bonsi konya banyuomire abakungu b’ebisaku ebiao, na abande b’abwo konya baiboire abana." 
Nehemiah1:1 Aya namang’ana a Nehemia, mosinto o Hakalia. Ase omotienyi o Kisilewi, omwaka bw’emerengo ebere, ekero narenge ase eburi agwo Susa, omochie omonene," 
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani, oyomo bw’abaminto, agacha amo nabanto bande korwa ase ense y’Abayuda. Nkababoria igoro y’Abayahudi bande batigarete aroro bare moyo, abwo konya batoorekire korwa ase obosomba, naende nkababoria amang’ana igoro ya Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Bakang’iraneria, bagantebia, “Abatigari baria batooretigwe korwa ase obosomba bare ase orogongo rwabo, nigo bare ase emechando emenene na ogochaywa okonene Orwaki rwa Yerusalemu rwatagoirwe, na ebiita biaye biasambirwe.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Ekero naigwete amang’ana ayio, ngaikaransa inse, nkarera. Ase amatuko atai make nkaba nkobokia amagombo na kweng’ata amo nogosaba ase obosio bwa Nyasae ore igoro," 
Nehemiah1:5 ngateba, “Aye Omonene, Nyasae ore igoro, Nyasae Omonene bw’okoirokia, aye bwanchete na korenda okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania na kobaa obuya abwo bagwanchete na babwatete amachiko ao." 
Nehemiah1:6 Ndigererie oigwe ogosaba kwane, inche omosomba oo. Nigo ngosaba ase obosio bwao omobaso na obotuko, ase engencho y’abasomba bao Abaisraeli, na koorokia ebibe intwe Abaisraeli twakorire asore. Ee, ekeene, nonya ninche amo nabanto b’eamate ya tata twakorire ebibe." 
Nehemiah1:7 Twakorire ogosaria okobe mono asore, twatigire kobwata amachiko na emeroberio echikire, ebio gwachigete Musa, omosomba oo." 
Nehemiah1:8 Bono inyora amang’ana aria gwachigete Musa, omosomba oo, okamotebia: Inwe motabeti abegenwa, goika imbasiarere gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku ebiao." 
Nehemiah1:9 Korende komorang’iranere na kobwata amachiko aane, nonya mwaserigwe gochia ase chinsinyo chi’ense, nigo ndabasangererie korwa aase agwo, mbarente aase nachorire kobeka erieta riane ribeereo." 
Nehemiah1:10 “Omonene, aba nigo bare abasomba bao na abanto bao. Naye kwababooretie nokobua kwao okonene goetera ase okoboko kwao kore ne chinguru." 
Nehemiah1:11 Aye Omonene, igwa ogosaba kwane, inche omosomba oo, amo nogosaba kw’abasomba bao, abwo bare nomogoko ase okoiroka erieta riao. Insesenia inche, omosomba oo, rituko ria rero, inyore ogwancherwa ase obosio bw’omonto oyo.” Ase engaki eyio nigo narenge omobogoria bw’ebinyugwa bi’omoruoti." 
Nehemiah2:1 Ase rituko erimo, ase omotienyi o Nisani, omwaka bw’emerongo ebere bw’okogamba kw’Aritasasita, edivai ekarentwa asare, na inche nkayeimokia, nkamoyea. Inche konya tinana koba nomoichano ase obosio bwaye ase engaki ende yonsi." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ase ayio omoruoti akamboria, “Nase ki okororekana kore nomoichano iga, naye tori omorwaire? Ekio tikeri egento ekeao otatiga obororo bore ase enkoro yao.” Ekero akwanete igo, nkaba nobwoba obonene mono," 
Nehemiah2:3 nkamoiraneria, “Aye omoruoti ochie kare! Inki keragere tindorekana inde nomoichano ekero omochie oria, aase chimbeera ohie chisokoro chiane chire, ogendererete koba ritombe, na ebiita biaye biasarigwe nomorero?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Erio omoruoti akamboria, “Ngento ki oganetie okorerwe?” Inche nkagenderera gosaba Nyasae o igoro." 
Nehemiah2:5 Erio ngatebia omoruoti, “Onye yakogweneire aye omoruoti, na inche, omosomba oo, nanyora ogwancherwa ase obosio bwao, ong’e ribaga ngende ase ense y’Abayuda, ase omochie oria ase chisokoro chiane chiatindegetwe, erinde nyoagache naende.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Ekero eting’ana mokaye yaikaransete agwo, omoruoti akamboria, “Nengaki eng’ana naki oganetie kogenda, naende indi orairane?” Ekero naroche ng’a omoruoti bwanchire kong’a ribaga, nkamotebia engaki eisaine." 
Nehemiah2:7 Naende ngatebia omoruoti, “Onye kwanyancheire, indikere amarube ng’irere abagambi b’orogongo rore bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati, erinde bang’e ribaga ng’eteo ngende ase ense y’Abayuda." 
Nehemiah2:8 Naende orike rirube rinde ase Asafu, omorendi bwe rinani ri’omoruoti, erinde ang’e emete ngochia koroiseria emetobwa y’ebiita bi’eburi ere ase Hekalu, na ey’okoagachera orwaki rw’omochie, boigo ney’okoagachera enyomba yane ase nkomenya.” Omoruoti agankorera ayio onsi namoboretie, ekiagera okoboko okuya kwa Nyasae one nigo kwarenge amo nainche." 
Nehemiah2:9 Erio omoruoti agatoma amo nainche abarwani esegi, na abariini chibarasi, akang’a rirube nkairera abagambi abarenge bosongo y’orooche roria, nkabaria." 
Nehemiah2:10 Korende ekero Sanibalati korwa Beti-Horoni, na Tobia, omonene bw’orogongo rw’Abaamoni, baigwete ng’a omonto gete ochire gokorera Abaisraeli amaya, bakagechigwa bakaba nekeririanda ekenene mono." 
Nehemiah2:11 Ase igo ngacha Yerusalemu, nkabeerao ase engaki y’amatuko atato." 
Nehemiah2:12 Erio nkaimoka botuko amo nabanto bande bake. Tinatebetie monto onde amang’ana Nyasae konya abekire ime ase enkoro yane, ayio narenge gochia gokorera Yerusalemu. N’giti ende yonsi tiyarenge nainche otatiga eria nariinete ekero nachete." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ase obotuko obwo ngaetera ase Egeita kie Rikura, gochia ase Ensoko y’Enchoka, ngaika ase Egeita ki’Eubi, nkarata chindwaki chia Yerusalemu, echio chiatagoretwe, na ebiita biaye biria biasaretigwe nomorero." 
Nehemiah2:14 Naende ngaeta gochia ase Egeita gi’Ensoko na ase Ritibo ri’Omoruoti, korende aase akabora ase eng’iti eria nariinete egoetera." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ase obotuko obwo nkagenda ase rikura, nkarata orwaki, erio nkairanera aase naeterete, ase Egeita kie Rikura, erio nkairana gochia aase narenge." 
Nehemiah2:16 Abanene b’ensemo eria tibamanyete ase nagendete, gose eki narenge gokora, ekiagera konya tindatebia Abayahudi gento, gose abakuani, gose abanto basikire, gose abanene, gose abanto bande bonsi abaare gocha gokora emeremo." 
Nehemiah2:17 Korende bono nkabatebia, “Mwarorire emechando yatonyorire aa: Yerusalemu otagoirwe, na ebiita biaye biasambirwe. Inchuo toagache naende orwaki rwa Yerusalemu, erinde titobaisa kogenderera koba nobosooku bw’ogochaywa.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Naende nkabatebia ng’a okoboko kwa Nyasae one nigo kwarenge amo nainche gonkorera amaya, boigo nkabatebia amang’ana ’Aritasasita omoruoti antebetie. Barabwo bakabora, “Tochake koagacha omochie naende.” Ase ayio bakabekana chinguru gokora emeremo eyio emiya." 
Nehemiah2:19 Korende ekero Sanibalati korwa Beti-Horoni, na Tobia, omonene bw’orogongo rw’Abaamoni, na Gesemu Omoarabu, baigwete amang’ana ayio, bagatosekerera na gotochecheria, bakaboria, “Ngento ki eke mogokora? Nigo mogochia kwanga timoigwera omoruoti?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Erio nkairaneria, nkabatebia, “Nyasae o igoro natosesenie togenderere ase obuya; ase ayio intwe, abasomba baye, nkoagacha tore omochie oyo naende; korende inwe timobwati egetari kende gionsi aiga, gose timobwati oboronge gose okoinyorwa konde gwonsi ase Yerusalemu.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Erio Eliasibu, omokuani omonene, amo nabakuani bande bamwabo, bakaagacha Egeita gie Ching’ondi, bakagiatanana ase okogechena, bakabeka ebisieri biaye. Bagaatanana orwaki goikera ase Omorobiri bwe Rigana, naende goikera ase Omorobiri o Hananeli, bakarochena." 
Nehemiah3:2 Abanto ba Yeriko bakamobwatia, bakaagacha ensemo ende; na oyobwatetie abanto aba, n’Sakuri, mosinto o Imuri." 
Nehemiah3:3 Basinto ba Hasena bakaagacha Egeita gie Chinswe, bagakebekera emetobwa na ebisieri, na ebisiekero, na emekorogoto." 
Nehemiah3:4 Oyobwatetie abwo koagacha, i’Meremoti, mosinto o Uria o Hakosi. Oyobwatetie ere koagacha, i’Mesulamu, mosinto o Berekia o Meshesabeli. Oyo obwatetie ere n’Zadoki, mosinto o Baana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Abanto ba Tekoa bakabwatia abwo koagacha, korende abanene babo abasikire tibakumbete emegongo yabo ase ogokora emeremo y’Omonene obo." 
Nehemiah3:6 Yehoyada, mosinto o Pasea, na Mesulamu, mosinto o Besodeya, bakaagacha Egeita Egekoro, bagakebekera emetobwa, na ebisieri, na ebisiekero, na emekorogoto." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ababwatetie abwo koagacha, i’Melatia Omogibeoni, na Yadoni Omomeroni, na abanto ba Gibeoni, na aba Misipa, abwo barenge inse y’obogambi bw’omogavuna bw’orogongo rwa bosongo y’orooche rw’Eufarati." 
Nehemiah3:8 Oyobwatetie abwo koagacha, nere Usieli, mosinto o Harahaya, oyomo bw’abaturi be chifeta. Oyo omobwatetie koagacha nere Hanania, oyomo bw’abaroisia amaguta akweakwa, agotioka buya. Abwo bakaagacha Yerusalemu goikera aase are korokwa Orwaki Oronetu." 
Nehemiah3:9 Oyo obwatetie abwo koagacha, n’Refaya, mosinto o Huri, omogambi bw’ekeng’ese ki’orogongo rore rwa Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah3:10 Oyo obwatetie abwo koagacha, n’Yedaya, mosinto o Harumafu: ere akaagacha orwaki rwarochie mwaye. Oyomobwatetie koagacha, nere Hatusi, mosinto o Hasabineya." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malikia, mosinto o Harimu, na Hasubu, mosinto o Pahati-Moabu, bakaagacha ensemo ende; boigo bakaagacha Omorobiri bw’Eriko." 
Nehemiah3:12 Oyo omobwatetie koagacha, n’Salumu, mosinto o Halohesi, omogambi bw’ekeng’ese ki’orogongo rwa Yerusalemu. Abaiseke baye bakamokonya." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuni amo nabanto bamenyete Sanoa bakaroisia Egeita kie Rikura, bagakebekera ebisieri, na ebisiekero, na emekorogoto. Boigo bakaagacha orwaki ase obotambe bw’amaboko elifu eyemo, goika ase Egeita ki’Eubi." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malikia, mosinto o Rekabu, omogambi bw’orogongo rwa Beti-Hakeremu, akaagacha naende Egeita ki’Eubi, agakebekera ebisieri, na ebisiekero, na emekorogoto." 
Nehemiah3:15 Salumu mosinto o Koli-Hose, omogambi bw’orogongo rwa Misipa, akaagacha naende Egeita gi’Ensoko, agakeagachera ekerama na gokebekera ebisieri, na ebisiekero, na emekorogoto. Boigo akaagacha orwaki rwe Ritibo ria Siloa, eriarenge ang’e nomogondo bw’omoruoti, goikera ase ebiriinero biare gotirimbokerwa korwa ase Omochie o Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Oyobwatetie oyio, Nehemia, mosinto bw’Asubuki, omogambi bw’ekeng’ese ki’orogongo rwa Beti-Suri, akaagacha orwaki goikera ensemo yarochie chimbeera chia Daudi chiarenge ase ritibo riaremetwe, na goikera ase enyomba y’abanto abarenge nokobua." 
Nehemiah3:17 Ababwatetie Nehemia koagacha n’Abalawi inse y’oboteneneri bwa Rehemu, mosinto o Bani. Oyo omobwatetie, nere Hasabia, omogambi bw’ekeng’ese ki’orogongo rwa Keila; ere akaagacha ase orogongo rwaye." 
Nehemiah3:18 Nyuma yaye abamwabo bakaagacha, bare inse y’oboteneneri bwa Bawai, mosinto o Henadadi, omogambi bw’ekeng’ese ki’orogongo rwa Keila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Oyobwatetie oyio, n’Eseri, mosinto o Yesua, omogambi o Misipa; ere akaagacha korwa ensemo ende yarochie egetiiro gochia aase ebirwanero biarenge kogachwa goikera ase Chinsanganio." 
Nehemiah3:20 Oyobwatetie oyio, m’Baruki, mosinto o Sabai; ere agakora omokia akaagacha ensemo ende, gochakera ase Chinsanganio goikera ase egesieri ki’enyomba y’Eliasibu, omokuani omonene." 
Nehemiah3:21 Oyobwatetie oyio, i’Meremoti, mosinto o Uria o Hakosi; ere akaagacha ensemo ende, gochakera ase egesieri ki’enyomba y’Eliasibu goikera ase ensinyo y’enyomba eria." 
Nehemiah3:22 Ababwatetie Meremoti koagacha nabakuani abamenyete ase ense omweya. 
Nehemiah3:23 Nyuma y’abwo Benjamin na Hasubu bakaagacha ensemo y’enyomba yabo. Oyobwatetie abwo, n’Asaria, mosinto o Maaseya bw’Anania; ere akaagacha ensemo y’enyomba yaye." 
Nehemiah3:24 Oyobwatetie oyio, m’Binui, mosinto o Henadadi; ere akaagacha ensemo ende gochakera korwa ase enyomba y’Asaria goikera ase Chinsanganio naende oikera ase Ekoona." 
Nehemiah3:25 Oyobwatetie oyio, nere Paali, mosinto o Usai; ere akaagacha ensemo yarochie Chinsanganio na omorobiri ochongororogete korwa ase enyomba ya rogoro y’omoruoti, eyio yarenge ang’e neraaro y’echela. Oyobwatetie oyio, nere Pedaya, mosinto o Parosi." 
Nehemiah3:26 Ere akaagacha ensemo ende ya moocha, ang’e n’Egeita ki’Amache, na ase omorobiri ochongororogete gochia igoro. (Aase agwo nigo arenge ang’e n’Ofeli, ensemo y’omochie aase abakori emeremo be Hekalu bamenyete.’)" 
Nehemiah3:27 Abanto korwa Tekoa bakabwatia abwo, bakaagacha ensemo yarochie omorobiri oria omotambe, bagaikera orwaki rw’Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Korwa ase Egeita gie Chibarasi na kogenderera abakuani bakaagacha, kera oyomo ensemo yarenge ang’e nenyomba yaye." 
Nehemiah3:29 Oyobwatetie abwo, n’Zadoki, mosinto o Imeri; ere akaagacha ensemo yarenge ang’e nenyomba yaye, na nyuma yaye, Semaya, mosinto o Sekania, omorendi bw’Egeita kia Moocha." 
Nehemiah3:30 Hanania, mosinto o Selemia, na Hanuni, omomura o gatano na rimo o Salafu, abwo bakaagacha ensemo ende. Oyobwatetie abwo, i’Mesulamu, mosinto o Berekia; ere akaagacha ensemo ende yarenge ang’e nakanyomba kaye." 
Nehemiah3:31 Nyuma yaye, Malikia, oyomo bw’abaturi chifeta, akaagacha ensemo ende goikera ase enyomba y’abakori emeremo be Hekalu, na ey’abaonchoreria, agwo ang’e n’Egeita gi’Okorobera, na kogenderera goika ase akanyomba ka irongo agwo ase Ekoona." 
Nehemiah3:32 Ase egati y’akanyomba ka irongo agwo ase Ekoona na Egeita gie Ching’ondi, abaturi be chifeta na abaonchoreria bakaagacha aroro." 
Nehemiah4:1 Ekero Sanibalati aigwete ng’a intwe Abayahudi konya twachakire koagacha orwaki rw’omochie naende, akaba nekeririanda ekenene, agachaka gotochecheria." 
Nehemiah4:2 Agakwana ase amasio ’abanto bamwabo na ase abarwani esegi b’Abasamaria, agateba, “Ngento ki eke Abayahudi aba aboro abagundo bagokora? Inee! Mbanyare kweagachera naende omochie oyio? Mbarue ebing’wanso aase aa naende? Mbanyare gokoora emeremo eyio ase rituko erimo? Gose mbanyare koremora korwa ase chitui chi’amagena aya asambetwe bayakore abe amayia?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia Omoamoni, oyorenge ang’e nere, agateba, “Nabaagacha orwaki orwo naki, ekebwe geise koriina igoro nigo keraroiyerie rogwe inse.”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Ngasaba, “Aye Nyasae oito, igwa buna twachayirwe. Tiga ogochaya kwabo kobairanere, baurwe ebinto biabo, nabarabwo abanyene boswe bairwe ase obosomba." 
Nehemiah4:5 Tobaisa gotuba ebibe biabo, gose kobitinyia korwa ase obosio bwao, ekiagera bagerire kwabeire nendamwamu asetore intwe abaagachi.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Ase igo tokagenderera koagacha orwaki roria goika rokabwatanigwa, rogaikera ekeng’ese ki’obotambe bwaye gochia igoro, ekigaera abanto nigo babwate chinkoro chire morero ase ogokora emeremo eyio." 
Nehemiah4:7 Korende ekero Sanibalati, na Tobia, na Abaarabu, na Abaamoni, na Abaasidodi baigwete ng’a oboagacho bwe chindwaki chia Yerusalemu nigo bogendererete buya, naende ng’a aase abochogete nkoiranerigwa are, bakaba nendamwamu enene." 
Nehemiah4:8 Bakabwatana amo bakabekana omokia, erinde bagende bonsi amo ase okorwania Yerusalemu na koburukania abakori emeremo." 
Nehemiah4:9 Korende intwe togasaba Nyasae oito, tokabeka abanto barenge gotorenda omobaso na obotuko, ase engencho y’abanto abwo." 
Nehemiah4:10 Erio Abayahudi bagateba, “Chinguru chi’abakobogoria chigurube chiorobire, na amaoomo namange mono ase okogokomora, goika twasinyirwe gokora emeremo y’okoagacha orwaki.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Ababisa baito nigo bateba, “Abayahudi tibagotoigwa gose gotorora, goika tobabosokane, tobaite totange emeremo eyio.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Korende Abayahudi abamenyete ang’e nababisa baito, bakaba bagocha gotokurera nonya ngoika ara ikomi, ng’a ababisa abwo nigo barachiche korwa ase chinsemo chionsi batorwanie." 
Nehemiah4:13 Ase igo nkabeka abanto maate, magega y’orwaki, aase aasie; nkababeka eamate ase eamate, bare nebirwanero biabo: emioro, na amatimo, na amata." 
Nehemiah4:14 Nkarigereria nkamanya buna amang’ana arenge, Erio ngakwana nabanene basikire, na abatang’ani, na abanto bande bonsi, nkabatebia, “Timobaisa kwoboa ababisa abwo; moinyore Omonene, oyore nokobua, naende oyo bw’okoondokia, morwanere abanto bamino, na abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, na abakungu baino, ne chinka chiaino.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Ekero ababisa baito baigwete ng’a twamanyire emeroberio yabo, naende ng’a Nyasae oyesaririe, tokairana twensi ase okoagacha, na kera omonto agakora emeremo aetwe gokora." 
Nehemiah4:16 Ekaba korwa ase engaki eyio na kogenderera ng’a ekeng’ese ki’abasomba baane bakagenderera koagacha, na ekeng’ese kende bakabeka chianga chi’ebioma, babogoretie amatimo, ne chinguba, na amata; na abatang’ani bagatenenera Abayuda bonsi," 
Nehemiah4:17 abwo barenge koagacha orwaki. Abanto abwo barenge kobogoria chigurube, nigo barenge gokora emeremo nokoboko okomo, na okonde kobogoretie ekerwanero." 
Nehemiah4:18 Kera oyomo bw’abaagachi nigo eboeranetie omoyio oye o birende kenema kiaye ekero agendererete koagacha; na omobugia egetureri nigo ateneine ang’e nainche. 
Nehemiah4:19 Erio ngatebia abanene baria basikire, na abatang’ani, na abanto bande, “Emeremo nigo ere emenene, naende egareete, na intwe nigo twesiarerete ase orwaki rwonsi, na kera omonto nigo are aare korwa ase oyonde." 
Nehemiah4:20 Agwo aase ore koraigwe eriogi ri’egetureri, oche aa asetore; Nyasae oito natorwanere.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Ase ayio tokagenderera gokora emeremo emekong’u. Korwa mambia chuni, goika obotuko, ekero ching’enang’eni chiaorokire, ekeng’ese ki’abanto nigo bagendererete kobogoria amatimo abo." 
Nehemiah4:22 Boigo ngatebia abanto ng’a kera omonto amo nomosomba oye babeere aiga Yerusalemu, babe bakorenda botuko, na mobaso babe bagokora emeremo y’okoagacha." 
Nehemiah4:23 Ase igo inche, gose abaminto, gose abasomba baane, gose abarendi abarenge amo nainche, onde tarenge korusia chianga chia mobere; kera oyomo nigo abwate ekerwanero kiaye nonya nekero akogenda kobuucha amache." 
Nehemiah5:1 Abanto bande, abasacha na abakungu babo, bakarera na kwemurungania ase Abayahudi bamwabo." 
Nehemiah5:2 Abande bagateba, “Intwe amo nabana baito, abamura na abaiseke, nigo tore abange, ntoganetie tonyore endagera torie, erinde togenderere koba moyo.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Boigo abande bagateba, “Intwe nkobeka tore amaremo aito, na emegondo yaito y’emesabibu, ne chinyomba chiaito, bionsi bibe intenenera; bono otoe endagera, ekiagera tore nenchara.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Na abande bagateba, “Twasabire chibesa singo igoro y’amaremo aito, na emegondo yaito y’emesabibu, ase ogoakana ebango ase omoruoti." 
Nehemiah5:5 Bono emebere yaito nabo ere nengencho enene buna ey’abaminto, na abana baito nigo bare nengencho enene buna ababo, ko bono rora, yatobetereirie kobeka abana baito, abamura na abaiseke, ase obosomba. Abaiseke baito bande baikire koba abasomba, korende intwe titobwati okobua kw’ogotanga ring’ana erio tiriba bo, ekiagera abanto abaao nabwo babwate amaremo aito amo nemegondo yaito y’emesabibu.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Ekero naigwete amang’ana ’ebirero biabo nkaba nendamwamu enene; 
Nehemiah5:7 Nkarengereria inche omonyene gokora egento ase engencho y’ayio. Ngasoera abanto basikire na abatang’ani, nkabatebia, “Inwe nigo mokwenyorera ebitoki korwa ase abamino.” Erio nkarangeria omoganda omonene gocha kogamba igoro y’amang’ana ayio," 
Nehemiah5:8 nkayotebia, “Intwe ase okonyara gwaito twabooririe Abayahudi baminto tokabairania korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku ebio ase baoonetigwe gochia, korende inwe nigo mokoonia abanto bamino, erinde intwe tobaboorie korwa asemore tobairanie.” Abanene baria tibabwate nonya nering’ana erimo baare kobairaneria, korende nigo bakirete-kiri." 
Nehemiah5:9 Erio naende nkabatebia, “Amang’ana aya mogokora tari amaya. Inee! Tebagwenereti momoiroke Nyasae oito ase orogendo rwaino, erio nario abanto b’ebisaku, ababisa baito, batabe nengencho y’ogotochaya?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Inche omonyene amo nabaminto, na abasomba baane, twarure chibesa na endagera singo; bono totige koboria ebinto ebio, titoakanwa." 
Nehemiah5:11 Bono rituko ria rero bairanerie ebio bionsi baboreretigwe baakane: amaremo abo, na emegondo y’emesabibu na ey’emezeituni, ne chinyomba amo nebitoki bie chibesa mwabeire mokoboria.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Erio abatang’ani abwo bakairaneria, bagateba, “Goika toiranie ebinto ebio, gose titoboria ebitoki korwa asebare; ntokore buna gwatebire.” Agwo nkarangeria abakuani batianie abatang’ani abwo barie eira ng’a bakore buna batebetigwe." 
Nehemiah5:13 Erio ngasamunsa omoringo bw’omwambaro one, ngateba, “Naboigo kera oyomo oyotaikerania eira yaye, Nyasae amosamunse korwa ase abanto b’enyomba yaye, na korwa ase ebinto babwate. Ee, asamunswe abe bosa.” Omoganda bwonsi okairaneria, ogateba, “Amina,” na bakamotogia Omonene. Abanto baria bagakora buna bariete eira ng’a mbakore." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ase engaki eria yonsi y’emiaka ikomi na ebere, ekero narenge omogambi bw’ense ya Yuda, korwa omwaka bw’emerongo ebere, goika omwaka bw’emerongo etato na ebere, bw’okogamba kw’Aritasasita, inche gose abanto baminto titwariete endagera omogambi agwenerete koegwa." 
Nehemiah5:15 Kera omogambi ontang’anerete kogamba nigo arenge kobeka egurube endito igoro ase abanto na kobaboria barue endagera, na edivai, amo ne chibesa chisekeli chie chifeta emerongo ene. Nonya nabasomba babo nabo bakorerete abanto. Inche tinakorete buna abagambi abwo, ekiagera nigo namoirogete Nyasae." 
Nehemiah5:16 Inche nigo nakorete omokia, nkagenderera koagacha orwaki, gose titwagorete oboremo bonde, na abasomba baane nigo babete amo nainche ase ogokora emeremo eria." 
Nehemiah5:17 Abayahudi amo nabatang’ani babo abarenge koragera amo nainche nigo barenge rigana erimo, na emerongo etano. Naende abanto b’ebisaku binde abamenyete ase chinsemo chiaito chionsi nigo barenge gocha baragera amo nainche." 
Nehemiah5:18 Kera rituko endagera narenge korua neng’ombe eyemo, ne ching’ondi chinoru isano nemo, amo ne chingoko; na kera rituko ria ikomi nigo narenge korua ebirandi ebinge biroisirie korwa ase amasankwa, bire nedivai. Ase ebinto ebio bionsi tinarenge gosaba endagera eria abagambi bagwenerete koegwa, ekiagera abanto abwo nigo babogoretie egurube endito." 
Nehemiah5:19 Aye Nyasae one, ong’inyore ong’e amaya koreng’ana buna amaya nakoreire abanto aba." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanibalati, na Tobia, na Gesemu Omoarabu, amo nababisa bande baito, batebetigwe ng’a naagachire orwaki roria, naende ng’a konya naribirie aase onsi atagoretwe. (Nonya ase engaki eria konya tindabeka ebisieri ase ebiita.)" 
Nehemiah6:2 Erio Sanibalati na Gesemu bagatoma abanto gocha kondangeria, bagoteba, “Inchuo toumerane aiga ase oyomo bw’emechie ere ase ense omweya ya Ono.” Korende nigo barengereretie gochia gonkorera amabe." 
Nehemiah6:3 Erio ngatoma abanto asebare, nkabatebia, “Nigo ngokora emeremo ere emenene mono; tinkonyara gotirimboka gocha agwo. Nase ki ndatige emeremo etenene, ntirimboke gocha asemore?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Bagatoma abanto asende chintunda inye, bagokwana amang’ana aria aria, na inche nkaba nkobairaneria amang’ana aria aria konya nabatebirie ritang’ani." 
Nehemiah6:5 Naende ase entunda ya gatano, Sanibalati agatoma omosomba oye asende obwate rirube ritamumekeirie" 
Nehemiah6:6 Nigo riarikire iga: “Abanto b’ebisaku amo na Gesemu batebire ng’a aye amo n’Abayahudi bande nigo moganetie kwanga koigwera; naende ng’a nakio gekogera mokoagacha orwaki; na koreng’ana namang’ana ayio, aye noganetie koba omoruoti obo." 
Nehemiah6:7 Tari ayio oka, korende kwabekire ababani bakoraria agwo Yerusalemu ng’a naye omoruoti bw’Abayuda. Na bono omoruoti ngochia gotebigwa are amang’ana ayio; ase ayio inchuo toumerane naye tokwane komo.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Erio ngatoma amang’ana gochia asare, nkamoiraneria, “Amang’ana buna ayio tari ay’ekeene, ayio namang’ana ao aye omonyene okorengereria korwa ase enkoro yao na koyaroisia boigo.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Abanto baria bonsi nigo baganetie gotwoboyia, bakorengereria ng’a nigo bagochia gotoita emioyo, toborwe chinguru chi’ogokora emeremo eyio, erinde etenene. Korende ngasaba, “Aye Nyasae, ing’a chinguru na oboremu.”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Rituko erimo nkagenda ase enyomba ya Semaya, mosinto o Delaya o Mehetabeli, oyio osiekeire mwaye. Ere agantebia, “Togende komo ase enyomba ya Nyasae, ase Hekalu eria ime, tosieke ebisieri bie Hekalu, ekiagera abanto abwo ngocha bare kogoita. Nigo barache ase obotuko bwa rero, bagoite bagosirie.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Nkamoiraneria, nkamotebia, “Inee! Omonto onga buna inche ningwenerete gotama? Omonto onga buna inche ninyare gotama gochia ase Hekalu ime, ase ogotooria obogima bwane? Tinkonyara kogenda aroro.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Inche nkamanya ng’a tari Nyasae omotomete, korende Tobia na Sanibalati bamoete chibesa akwane amang’ana arache konyora inche." 
Nehemiah6:13 Semaya nigo aetwe chibesa ng’a anyoboyie, nainche nyancherane nere, na ase enchera eyio nkore ebibe; erio bakwane amang’ana amabe igoro y’erieta riane, na gonchecheria ase ogonchaya." 
Nehemiah6:14 “Aye Nyasae one, inyora amang’ana a Tobia na Sanibalati, boigo aya Noadia, omobani oria omokungu, amo nay’ababani bande, abaganetie konyoboyia.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Orwaki roria rokaira amatuko emerongo etano, na abere, rokaera ase rituko ria emerongo ebere na gatano ri’omotienyi bw’Elulu." 
Nehemiah6:16 Ekero ababisa baito bonsi baigwete ayio, na abanto b’ebisaku bionsi biatoetanaine bayaroche, bakaba nobwoba obonene, bagechaya na gwesookera abanyene, ekiagera nigo bamanyete ng’a emeremo eyio nigo yakoretwe na goikeranigwa ase ogokonywa kwa Nyasae oito." 
Nehemiah6:17 Ase amatuko ayio onsi abasike b’Abayuda nigo bagendererete konagotoma amarube amange ase Tobia, nere nabo agendererete kona-gotoma ayande ase okobairaneria." 
Nehemiah6:18 Abanto abange b’ense ya Yuda konya babwatanire na Tobia ase ogotianania, ekiagera ere nigo anyuomete omoiseke o Sekania, mosinto bw’Ara; boigo Yehohanani, momura oye, konya onyuomire omoiseke o Mesulamu, mosinto o Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Abayahudi abwo nigo barenge gotogia Tobia ase obosio bwane, na abwo nigo barenge komoirera amang’ana aane. Tobia omonyene akaba ogontomera amarube ay’okonyoboyia." 
Nehemiah7:1 Bono ekero orwaki konya rwaerire koagachwa, nkabeka ebisieri, nkabeka nabarendi b’ebiita na abateri, na Abalawi." 
Nehemiah7:2 Nkabeka Hanani, momura ominto, na Hanania oyo otenenerete eburi, babe abachiki ase omochie o Yerusalemu. Hanani nigo arenge omwegenwa, naende nigo amoirogete Nyasae kobua abanto bande." 
Nehemiah7:3 Nkabatebia, “Timobaisa koigora ebiita bia Yerusalemu, goika ekero omobaso obarire buya, na ekero abarendi batarainoka goika basieke ebisieri bokong’u nemekorogoto. Mochore abarendi korwa ase abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu, kera omonto abekwe aase aye ang’e nenyomba yaye.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Omochie oria nigo orenge omogare naende omonene, korende abanto barengeo nigo barenge abake ase omobaro, ne chinyomba konya tichiraagachwa imeo." 
Nehemiah7:5 Erio Nyasae akabeka amang’ana ase ebirengererio biane gosangereria abanene abasikire, na abatang’ani, na abanto bonsi, erinde barikwe ase omoroberio bwe chinderia chi’abachete ritangani. Abwo nigo barikire iga:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Aba nabwo abanto b’orogongo rwa Yuda, baria Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, airete ase obosomba, bairanete gocha Yerusalemu na ase ense y’Abayuda, (kera oyomo akagenda komenya ase omochie oye" 
Nehemiah7:7 amo nabarenge kobaraa: Serubabeli, na Yesua, Nehemia na Asaria, Raamia na Nahamani, Moredekai na Bilisani, Misipereti na Bigiwani, Nehumu na Baana): Omobaro bw’abasacha baria b’Abaisraeli noro oyo:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Parosi: chilifu ibere, ne rigana erimo, na emerongo etano na ebere, na babere (2,172);" 
Nehemiah7:9 aba orwa Sefatia: amagana atato, na emerongo etano na ebere, na babere (372);" 
Nehemiah7:10 aba orwa Ara, amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano, na babere (652);" 
Nehemiah7:11 aba orwa Pahati-Moabu, be chiamate chia Yesua na Yoabu: chilifu ibere, na amagana atano na atato, na ikomi na batano na batato (2,818);" 
Nehemiah7:12 aba orw’Elamu: elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo etano na bane (1,254);" 
Nehemiah7:13 aba orwa Satu: amagana atano na atato, na emerongo ene, na batano (845);" 
Nehemiah7:14 aba orwa Sakai: amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etano nomo (760);" 
Nehemiah7:15 aba orwa Binui: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo ene, na batano na batato (648);" 
Nehemiah7:16 aba orwa Bebai: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (628);" 
Nehemiah7:17 aba orw’Asigadi: chilifu ibere, na amagana atato, na emerongo ebere, na babere (2,322);" 
Nehemiah7:18 aba orw’Adonikamu: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano nomo, na batano na babere (667);" 
Nehemiah7:19 aba orwa Bigiwai: chilifu ibere, na emerongo etano nomo, na batano na babere (2,067);" 
Nehemiah7:20 aba orw’Adini: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo etano, na batano (655);" 
Nehemiah7:21 aba orw’Ateri b’eamate ya Hezekia: emerongo kianda, na batano na batato (98);" 
Nehemiah7:22 aba orwa Hasumu: amagana atato, na emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (328);" 
Nehemiah7:23 aba orwa Besai: amagana atato, na emerongo ebere, na bane (324);" 
Nehemiah7:24 aba orwa Harifu: rigana erimo, na ikomi na babere (112);" 
Nehemiah7:25 aba orwa Gibeoni: emerongo kianda, na batano (95)." 
Nehemiah7:26 Abanto ba Bethlehemu na Netofa: rigana erimo, na emerongo etano na etato, na batano na batato (188);" 
Nehemiah7:27 abanto b’Anatoti: rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (128);" 
Nehemiah7:28 abanto ba Beti-Asimaweti; emerongo ene, na babere (42);" 
Nehemiah7:29 abanto ba Kiriati-Yearimu, na Kefira, na Beeroti: amagana atano na abere, na emerongo ene, na batato (743);" 
Nehemiah7:30 abanto ba Rama na Geba: amagana atano na rimo, na emerongo ebere, na oyomo (621);" 
Nehemiah7:31 abanto ba Mikimasi: rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na babere (122):" 
Nehemiah7:32 abanto ba Beteli na Ai: rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na batato (123);" 
Nehemiah7:33 abanto ba Nebo o kabere: emerongo etano, na babere (52);" 
Nehemiah7:34 abanto ba Elamu o kabere: elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo etano, na bane (1,254);" 
Nehemiah7:35 abanto ba Harimu: amagana atato, na emerongo ebere (320);" 
Nehemiah7:36 abanto ba Yeriko: amagana atato, na emerongo ene, na batano (345);" 
Nehemiah7:37 abanto ba Lodi, na Hadidi, na Ono: amagana atano na abere, na emerongo ebere, na oyomo (721);" 
Nehemiah7:38 abanto ba Senaa: chilifu isato, na amagana kianda, na emerongo etato (3,930)." 
Nehemiah7:39 Omobaro bw’abakuani noro oyo: Ab’ororeria rwa Yedaya, bw’eamate ya Yesua: amagana kianda, na emerongo etano na ebere, na batato (973);" 
Nehemiah7:40 aba orwa Imeri: elifu eyemo, na emerongo etano, na babere (1,052)." 
Nehemiah7:41 Aba orwa Pasuri: elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo ene, na batano na babere (1,247);" 
Nehemiah7:42 aba orwa Harimu: elifu eyemo, na ikomi na batano na babere (1,017)." 
Nehemiah7:43 Abalawi nabwo aba: Abe chiamate chia Yesua o Kadimeli, ab’ororeria rwa Hodawia: emerongo etano na ebere, na bane (74)." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abateri, nabwo abanto b’ororeria rw’Asafu: rigana erimo, na emerongo ene, na batano na batato (148)." 
Nehemiah7:45 Abarendi b’ebiita, nabwo abe chiamate chia Salumu, na Ateri, na Talimoni, na Akubu, na Hatita, na Sobai: rigana erimo, na emerongo etato, na batano na batato (138)." 
Nehemiah7:46 Abakori emeremo be Hekalu nabwo aba: Abanto b’ororeria rwa Siha, na Hasufa, na Tabaoti;" 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerosi, na Sia, na Padoni;" 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana, na Hagaba, na Salimai;" 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanani, na Gideli, na Gahari;" 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaya, na Resini, na Nekoda;" 
Nehemiah7:51 Gasamu, na Usa, na Pasea;" 
Nehemiah7:52 Besai, na Meunimu, na Nefusimu;" 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakibuki, na Hakufa, na Harihuri;" 
Nehemiah7:54 Basiluti, na Mehida, na Harisa;" 
Nehemiah7:55 Barikosi, na Sisera, na Tema;" 
Nehemiah7:56 Nesia na Hatifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Abanto b’ororeria rw’abasomba ba Sulemani nabwo aba: Chiamate chia Sotai, na Sofereti, na Perida;" 
Nehemiah7:58 Yaala, na Darikoni, na Gideli;" 
Nehemiah7:59 Sefatia na Hatili, na Pokereti-Hasebamiu, na Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Abakori emeremo be Hekalu na abanto b’ororeria rw’abasomba ba Sulemani nigo barenge amagana atato, na emerongo kianda, na babere (392)." 
Nehemiah7:61 Abanto aba nabwo bachete korwa Teli-Mela, na Teli-Harisa, na Kerubu, na Adoni, na Imeri, korende tibanyarete koorokia ase okomanyereria chiamate chiabo, nonya ne chinderia chiabo gose ekeene ng’a n’Abaisraeli bare:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Abanto be chiamate chia Delaya, na Tobia, na Nekoda; bonsi namagana atano na rimo, na emerongo ene, na babere (642)." 
Nehemiah7:63 Boigo nase abakuani aba: Abanto be chiamate chia Habaya, na Hakosi, na Barisilai, oyio onyuomete oyomo bw’abaiseke ba Barisilai Omogileadi na akarokwa ase erieta riabo Barisilai." 
Nehemiah7:64 Abwo bakariga-rigia korwa ase emeroberio ye chinderia gose mbanyore chisokoro chiabo, korende tichianyoretwe chirikire aroro. Ase ayio bakaangwa tibaba abakuani, ekiagera nigo babaretwe koba abatachenegeti." 
Nehemiah7:65 Omogambi akabakania akabatebia ng’a tibabaisa koria endagera yarenge enchenu mono, goika engaki omokuani arenge gochia koboria Nyasae goetera ase Urimu na Tumimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto nigo orenge chilifu emerongo ene na ibere, na amagana atato, na emerongo etano nomo (42,360)," 
Nehemiah7:67 amo na abasomba babo, abasacha na abakungu, chilifu isano na ibere, na amagana atato, na emerongo etato, na batano na babere (7,337). Boigo mbabwate abateri, abasacha na abakungu, amagana abere, na emerongo ene, na batano (245)." 
Nehemiah7:68 Naende mbabwate chibarasi amagana atano na abere, na emerongo etato, na isano nemo (736), ne chiyombo amagana abere, na emerongo ene, na isano (245)," 
Nehemiah7:69 ne chingamia amagana ane, na emerongo etato, na isano (435), ne chitigere chilifu isano nemo, na amagana atano na abere, na emerongo ebere (6,720)." 
Nehemiah7:70 Abateneneri bande be chiamate chiabo mbaruete ebiegwa ase ogokorera emeremo. Omogavuna akabeka ase ekungo ebisamunye bie chitahabu bikorokwa chidariki, elifu eyemo (1,000), ne chisani emerongo etano (50), ne chianga chi’abakuani, amagana atano, na emerongo etato (530)." 
Nehemiah7:71 Abatang’ani bande be chinyomba chinde bakarua ase ekungo eyio y’ogokorerwa emeremo, ebisamunye bie chitahabu, chidariki chilifu emerongo ebere (20,000), na ebie chifeta bikorokwa chimina, chilifu ibere, na amagana abere (2,200)." 
Nehemiah7:72 Ebi abanto bande baruete nigo biarenge: ebisamunye bie chitahabu chidariki chilifu emerongo ebere (20,000), na ebisamunye bie chifeta, chimina chilifu ibere (2,000), ne chianga chi’abakuani, emerongo etano nomo, na isano na ibere (67)." 
Nehemiah7:73 Erio abakuani, na Abalawi, na abarendi b’ebiita, na abateri, na abanto bande, na abakori emeremo be Hekalu, amo n’Abaisraeli bande bakaba bakomenya ase emechie yabo. Ekero omotienyi o gatano na kabere oigete, Abaisraeli bonsi konya bamenyire ase emechie yabo." 
Nehemiah8:1 Ase engaki eyio abanto bonsi bakabwatana buna omonto oyomo, bagasangererekana ase eraaro agwo bosio bw’Egeita ki’Amache, bagatebia Ezara, oria orenge omworokia bw’amachiko, arente Ebuku y’Amachiko, a Musa, ayio Omonene aruete ase Abaisraeli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere, Ezara omokuani akarenta Ebuku eyio y’Amachiko ase omoganda bwonsi, abasacha na abakungu, abwo bonsi barenge konyara komanya aya baigwete." 
Nehemiah8:3 Agatenena bosio bw’Egeita ki’Amache, origereretie eraaro eria, na korwa mambia chuni goika mobaso gati akaba ogosomera abasacha na abakungu, na abwo bonsi barenge konyara komanya engencho y’amang’ana ayio. Abanto bonsi bagategerera koigwa ayarenge ase Ebuku eyio y’Amachiko." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezara, omworokia bw’amachiko, nigo atenenete igoro ase obotindiaro bwe chibao bwaroisetigwe ase emeremo eyio. Abatenenete ase ensemo yaye y’okorio nabwo aba: Matitia na Sema, Anaya na Uria, Hilikia na Maaseya. Na abatenenete ensemo yaye y’okobee, nabwo aba: Pedaya na Mishaeli, Malikia na Hasumu, Hasibadana na Zakaria, na Mesulamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezara agatenena agwo igoro goetania abanto bonsi na akamaanora ebuku ase amasio abo. Ekero ayemaanorete, abanto bonsi bagatenena." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezara agatogia Omonene Nyasae ore omonene. Abanto bonsi bakarambora amaboko abo gochia igoro, bagateba, “Amina! Amina!” Erio bagatung’ama bakaumama, bagasasima Omonene." 
Nehemiah8:7 Erio abanto bagatenena, kera oyomo aase aye, na Yesua na Bani, Serebia na Yamini, Akubu na Sabetai, Hodia na Maaseya, Kelita na Asaria, Yosabadi na Hanani, na Pelaya, amo n’Abalawi bande bakorokereria abanto amachiko." 
Nehemiah8:8 Abalawi abwo bagasoma buya mono amachiko a Nyasae korwa ase Ebuku eria. Naende bakaorokia engencho y’amang’ana ayio, erinde abanto bayaigwe na koyamanya." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ekero abanto baigwete amang’ana ayio agosomwa, bagasambeka chinkoro chiabo, bakarera. Nehemia oyorenge omogambi obo, na Ezara, omokuani na omworokia bw’amachiko, na Abalawi abwo borokereretie abanto bonsi, bagatebia abanto, “Rituko eri ria rero nerichenu ase Omonene, Nyasae oino; ase ayio timobaisa korera, gose kobokia amagombo.”" 
Nehemiah8:10 Erio Nehemia agatebia abanto, “Genda ase chinka chiaino, morie ebinoru biaino, monywe edivai enyansu, naende mobaatanere chindagera chiaino abwo batabwati, ekiagera rituko eri nerichenu ase Omonene oito. Timobaisa koba nomoichano, ekiagera omogoko bw’Omonene noro chinguru chiaino.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Abalawi bagaeta ase egati y’abanto, bakabakiria, bagoteba, “Kabe nobotoereru, ekiagera rituko eri nerichenu, timobaisa koba nomoichano.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Erio abanto bonsi bakagenda ase chinka chiabo, bakaba bakoria na konywa, bagaatanera chindagera chiabo baria batabwate, bakaba nomogoko, ekiagera konya bamanyire buya engencho y’amang’ana ayio bateberetigwe." 
Nehemiah8:13 Rituko ria kabere, abateneneri be chiamate chiabo chionsi amo nabakuani na Abalawi, bagacha ase Ezara, omworokia bw’amariko, erinde beorokererie amang’ana ’amachiko aria." 
Nehemiah8:14 Bakanyora amang’ana arikire ase amachiko ayio Omonene aruete ase Abaisraeli goetera ase Musa, ng’a Abaisraeli goika bamenye ase ebigutu ase Rituko Rinene ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere," 
Nehemiah8:15 naende ng’a ase engaki eyio goika bararie ase emechie yabo yonsi, na ase Yerusalemu, batebie abanto bagende ase ebigoro barente chinsagia chi’emezeituni, ere ase emegondo na eyere ase orosana, na echi’emeadasi, na echi’emekendo, na echi’emete ende ere namato amange, erio baagachere ebigutu buna erikire." 
Nehemiah8:16 Abanto bakarenta chinsagia echio, erio kera omonto akaagacha ekegutu igoro ase ekerama ki’enyomba yaye, gose ase ekeooreri kiaye, na ase chiraaro chi’enyomba ya Nyasae, na ase eraaro bosio bw’Egeita ki’Amache, na ase ey’Egeita ki’Efraimu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto bairanete korwa ase obosomba bakaagacha ebigutu bamenye imeo, ekiagera korwa ase engaki ya Yoshua, mosinto o Nuni, goika ase engaki eyio, Abaisraeli konya tibana gokora bo. Na bono bakaba nomogoko omonene." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kera rituko, korwa erie ritang’ani goikera eri’omoerio, Ezara akaba okobasomera Ebuku eria yarikire amachiko a Nyasae. Abanto bakagenderera korenda Amatuko aria Amanene ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, na ase rituko ria gatano na gatato bakaba nomosangererekano omonene bw’ogosasima, buna yachikire." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na kane ri’omotienyi oyio, Abaisraeli bonsi bagasangererekana amo, beng’atete na beboyetie chigunia, bageaka ebundo ase emetwe yabo." 
Nehemiah9:2 Abaisraeli konya berusananirie korwa ase abamenyi bonsi, na bagatenena koorokia ebibe biabo, amo nogokora okobe gwe chisokoro chiabo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Bagatenena kera oyomo aase aye, na Ebuku eria y’Amachiko ’Omonene, Nyasae obo, ekaba egosomwa asebare ase egeka gie chinsa isato, naende bakaba bakoorokia ebibe biabo na komosasima Omonene, Nyasae obo, ase egeka kende gie chinsa isato, ase rituko erio." 
Nehemiah9:4 Erio Yesua na Bani, Kadimeli na Sebania, Buni na Serebia, Bani na Kenani, bagatenena igoro y’obotindiaro bwachikeire Abalawi, bagasaba neriogi rinene ase Omonene, Nyasae obo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Abalawi aba: Yesua na Kadimieli, Bani na Hasabineya, Serebia na Hodia, Sebania na Petahia, bagatebia abanto, “Tenena motogie Omonene, Nyasae oino, momotogie korwa bono goika kare na kare. Ogotogigwa kobe ase erieta riaye rinene riimokereirie igoro goetania ogosesesenigwa na ogotogigwa gwonsi.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 “Aye naye Omonene, aye bweka. Naye gwatongete igoro, na igoro ya igoro chionsi, na emeganda yabo yonsi, na ense amo nebinto bionsi bireo, ne chinyancha, na ebinto bionsi bire imeo. Naye obirendete bigendererete kobao; ebitongwa bionsi bia igoro nigo bikogosasima." 
Nehemiah9:7 Aye Omonene Nyasae gwachorete Aburamu na okamorusia korwa Uri bw’Abakalidayo, erio okaonchora erieta riaye, okamoroka Ibrahimu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Okamorora ng’a nigo arenge nenkoro y’obwegenwa ase obosio bwao, erio ogakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania amo nere ng’a noe ororeria rwaye ense y’Abakanani, ey’Abahiti na Abaamori, ey’Abaperisi, na Abayebusi, na Abagirigasi, na bono gwaikeranirie ring’ana gwakwanete, ekiagera aye nomonyene oboronge.”" 
Nehemiah9:9 “Aye kwaroche emechando ye chisokoro chiaito aaria Misiri, naende okaigwa okorera kwabo agwo mbarabare ase Enyancha Embariri." 
Nehemiah9:10 Ogakora ebikone na amakumia mamincha ya Farao, mamincha y’abasomba baye bonsi na abanto bonsi b’ense yaye, ekiagera nkwamanyete buna abakorerete chisokoro chiaito bobe; boigo erieta riao rikamanyekana, rikaba rinene buna rire goika rero iga." 
Nehemiah9:11 Ogaatanana amache ’enyancha ase amasio e chisokoro chiaito, erinde bagaeta ase egati y’enyancha buna ense enyomo; okarimeria abachandi babo ase chindiba, buna rigena rikorutwa ase amache amanene ime." 
Nehemiah9:12 Ase omobaso okaraa Abaisraeli ne riire, na ase obotuko ne riire ri’omorero ase okobamorekera enchera baare goetera." 
Nehemiah9:13 Aye kwaigwete korwa igoro ase egetunwa gia Sinai, ogakwana nabarabwo korwa igoro, okabachikera emeroberio emeronge na okabaa amachiko ay’ekeene." 
Nehemiah9:14 Okaborokereria bakamanya Esabato yao Enchenu, naende okabaa emeroberio na amachiko goetera ase Musa, omosomba oo.”" 
Nehemiah9:15 “Ekero barenge nenchara, okabarentera endagera korwa igoro, na ekero barenge nerang’o, okabasokeria amache korwa ase egetare, naende okabatebia bagende koira ense eyio konya kwarire eira y’ogotiana ng’a nobayee." 
Nehemiah9:16 Korende chisokoro chiaito, barabwo bakaba abaenenu, bagakong’ia ebigoti biabo ase ogotaigwera, bakaanga kobwata amachiko ao." 
Nehemiah9:17 Bakaanga koigwera, gose tibarengereretie na koinyora amakumia gwakorete ase egati yabo; bagakong’ia ebigoti, bagachora omoraai abatang’ane koirana gochia Misiri ase obosomba. Korende aye naye Nyasae bw’okwabera, nigo ore omuya, naende omonyene amabera, tori omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu, aye nigo ore nobwanchani obonge botari koera, gose tikwabatigete." 
Nehemiah9:18 Barabwo bakeroiseria omogwekano bw’emori korwa ase etahabu enyititoire na kobombwa, bagateba ng’a oyo noro ore Nyasae oino obarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, bagakwana amang’ana ay’okorama okonene." 
Nehemiah9:19 Nonya naboigo, ase engencho y’amabera ao amanene tikwabatigete agwo ase erooro. Riire riria riarenge kobaraa ase omobaso tiriaruete asebare; gose riire riria ri’omorero tiriatigete kobamorekera ase enchera barenge goeta ase obotuko." 
Nehemiah9:20 Aye okabaa Omoika oo omuya koborokereria; tikwabarinete mana baare koria, naende nigo kwabaete amache baare konywa ekero barenge nerang’o." 
Nehemiah9:21 Ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene bagendererete kobeera ase erooro okabarenda, barabwo tibaremeretwe gento kende, nonya ne chianga chiabo tichiagotete, gose amagoro abo tabimbete.”" 
Nehemiah9:22 “Okabaa okobua igoro ase amaruoti; okabaatanera chinse ao ao. Bakaira ense ya Sihoni, omoruoti o Hesiboni, na eya Ogi, omoruoti o Basani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Okabaa abana abange buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro, na okabarenta ase ense eyio kwarierete chisokoro chiabo eira ng’a ebe eyabo." 
Nehemiah9:24 Ase ayio, abana babo bakagenda bakaira ense eyio. Aye okabua Abakanani, abanto b’ense eye, okababeka ase amaboko ’abanto bao, okabaa nabaruoti babo na abanto b’ense eye, erinde babakorere buna banchete." 
Nehemiah9:25 Barabwo bakaira emechie yagiteire chindwaki, na ense entenenku, bakaira ne chinyomba chiaichire nebinto ebiya, ne chinsoko chi’amache chiabaachetwe ase ebitare, na emegondo y’emesabibu na ey’emezeituni, na emete emenge y’amatunda. Bakaria, bakaigota na konora, bakaba nomogoko omonene ase obuya bwao obonge.”" 
Nehemiah9:26 “Nonya naboigo nigo bangete gokoigwera, bagasaria asore, bakaa amachiko ao amagega, bagaita ababani bao, abwo babakurerete bairane gochia asore; ase ayio bagakora okomocha okonge gw’okorama erieta riao." 
Nehemiah9:27 Ase ayio okababeka ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, na barabwo bakabachanda. Ekero barenge ase emechando yabo, bakarera asore; aye okabaigwa agwo igoro; na ase engencho y’amabera ao amange, okabaa abatooria abwo bakabatooria korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa babo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ekero konya banyorire obotoereru, bagakora ebibe asore naende; aye ogatiga ababisa babo bakababua na kobagambera. Nonya naboigo, ekero barenge gokoiranera na korera asore, nigo kwarenge kobaigwa korwa agwo igoro, na ase engencho y’amabera ao amange nigo kwabete gokobatooria ase chingaki chinyinge." 
Nehemiah9:29 Nigo kwabakurerete bairane babwate amachiko ao, korende ase engencho y’oboenenu bwabo bakaanga koigwera amachiko ao, bagakora ebibe ase emeroberio yao echikire, eyio omonto karayebwate nabe moyo. Bakaenena, bagakong’ia ebigoti tibaigwera." 
Nehemiah9:30 Ase emiaka emenge okabaremereria, okabakurera n’Omoika oo goetera ase ababani bao. Nonya naboigo tibaigwerete; erio okababeka ase amaboko ’abanto b’ebisaku ebiao." 
Nehemiah9:31 Korende ase engencho y’amabera ao amange, tikwabasiretie gose kobatiga, ekiagera aye Nyasae oito nomuya ore, na omonyene amabera.”" 
Nehemiah9:32 “Na bono, aye Nyasae oito, nigo ore omonene, na omobui, na oyo bw’okoirokia. Nigo orendete okobwatana kw’ogotianania, na obwanchani bwao boria bogendererete botambe. Tobara buna negento egesinini obokong’u obo bwonsi bwatonyorire. Korwa ase engaki eria abaruoti b’Abaasuri batogamberete goika rero, twabeire togochandeka intwe na abaruoti baito, na abanene baito, na abakuani baito, na ababani baito, ne chisokoro chiaito; ee, abanto bao bonsi." 
Nehemiah9:33 Nonya naboigo, aye nigo ore omonyene oboronge ase amang’ana aya onsi abeire agotonyora; aye nigo ore omwegenwa, korende intwe twakorire ayare amabe." 
Nehemiah9:34 Abaruoti baito, na abanene baito, na abakuani baito, ne chisokoro chiaito, tibabwatete amachiko ao, gose tibaigwerete ogokurera kwao kwabakurerete." 
Nehemiah9:35 Nonya bamenyete ase oboruoti bwabo abanyene, na kwabaeire amaya amange ase ense eria entenenku kwabaete, tibagokorerete gose tibaonchogete korwa ase ogokora kwabo okobe." 
Nehemiah9:36 Bono nigo tore abasomba aiga ase ense eye kwaete chisokoro chiaito ng’a barie okwama kwaye na kwegokeria amaya. 
Nehemiah9:37 Ase engencho y’ebibe biaito obotenenku bw’ense eye bwairirwe nabaruoti abwo babekirwe gotogambera. Abwo mbabwate okobua igoro ase emebere yaito, na ase chitugo chiaito, batokorere buna banchete, na intwe nigo tore nemechando emenene.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio onsi, bono nigo togokora okobwatana gotari koonchoka na tokorike, erinde abanene baito amo n’Abalawi baito, na abakuani baito, babeke ebimanyererio biabo ase korokwo." 
Nehemiah10:1 Ababegete ebimanyererio biabo ase okobwatana koria nabwo aba: Nehemia omogavuna, mosinto o Hakalia, na Zedekia." 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraya, na Asaria, na Yeremia;" 
Nehemiah10:3 Pasuri, na Amaria, na Malikia;" 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatusi, na Sebania, na Maluki;" 
Nehemiah10:5 Harimu, na Meremoti, na Obadia;" 
Nehemiah10:6 Danieli, na Ginetoni, na Baruku;" 
Nehemiah10:6 Danieli, na Ginetoni, na Baruku;" 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulamu, na Abiya, na Miyamini;" 
Nehemiah10:8 Maasia, na Biligai, na Semaya. Aba nabwo barenge abakuani." 
Nehemiah10:9 Abalawi nabwo aba: Yesua, mosinto bw’Asania, na Binui bw’eamate ya Henadadi, na Kadimeli;" 
Nehemiah10:10 abamwabo: Sebania na Hodia; Kelita, na Pelaya, na Hanani;" 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, na Rehobu, na Hasabia;" 
Nehemiah10:12 Sakuri, na Serebia, na Sebania;" 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, na Bani, na Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Abatang’ani b’abanto nabwo aba: Parosi, na Pahati-Moabu, na Elamu, na Satu, na Bani;" 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, na Asigadi, na Bebai;" 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonia, na Bigiwai, na Adini;" 
Nehemiah10:17 Ateri, na Hezekia, na Asuri;" 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia, na Hasumu, na Besai;" 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifu, na Anatoti, na Nebai;" 
Nehemiah10:20 Magipiasi, na Mesulamu, na Hesiri;" 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshesabeli, na Zadoki na Yadua;" 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, na Hanani, na Anaya;" 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, na Hanania, na Hasubu;" 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, na Hanania, na Hasubu;" 
Nehemiah10:24 Halohesi, na Pila, na Sobeki;" 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehumu, na Hasabuna, na Maaseya;" 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahiya, na Hanani, na Anani;" 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluku, na Harimu, na Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Abanto abatigarete, na abakuani, na Abalawi, na abarendi b’ebiita, na abateri, na abakori emeremo be Hekalu, na abanto bonsi konya berusananirie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku ase engencho y’amachiko a Nyasae, barabwo amo nabakungu babo, na abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, nabwo bonsi babwate obong’aini bw’okomanya," 
Nehemiah10:29 bakabwatana nabanto bamwabo basikire, bakaria eira bagatiana ng’a mbabwatie amachiko a Nyasae ayaruetwe goetera ase Musa, omosomba oye, naende ng’a mbarende na gokora amachiko onsi ay’Omonene, oyore Omonene oito, amo nemeroberio yaye yonsi echikire." 
Nehemiah10:30 Bagateba, “Titokorua abaiseke baito banyuomwe nabanto b’ense eye, gose titokonyuomeria abamura baito abaiseke babo." 
Nehemiah10:31 “Onye abanto b’ense eye bakorenta ebinto gose chindagera gotooneria rituko ri’Esabato, titokobigora ase Esabato gose ase rituko rinde richenu. Ase omwaka o gatano na kabere ntotige emegondo yaito etimoke teremwa, ne chisira titochiboria chiakanwe." 
Nehemiah10:32 “Twanchire ng’a kera omwaka, torue ensemo ya isato y’esekeli ekorerwe emeremo ase enyomba ya Nyasae oito." 
Nehemiah10:33 “Chibesa echio chiraruegwe ase engencho y’emegati ekoruegwa ase Nyasae, na okoruegwa kw’endagera kwa botambe, na ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa kia botambe, na ebie Chisabato, na Emetienyi Emeyia, na Amatuko Amanene achikire, na ebing’wanso ebichenu, na ebing’wanso bi’ebibe bigokora okobwatanigwa ase Abaisraeli, na ase engencho y’emeremo yonsi y’enyomba ya Nyasae oito." 
Nehemiah10:34 “Boigo intwe abakuani, na Abalawi, na abanto bande, twaakire obomera ng’a tomanye buna abanto be chiamate chiaito barabe bakorenta chinko, omwaka ase omwaka, echio chirabe chigosamba ebing’wanso ase egesasimero ki’Omonene, Nyasae oito, ase chingaki chichikire, na buna erikire ase Ebuku y’Amachiko." 
Nehemiah10:35 “Naende ntobe tokorenta okwama kwe ritang’ani kwe riroba riaito, na amatunda amatang’ani ay’emete yonsi, ase enyomba y’Omonene, omwaka ase omwaka." 
Nehemiah10:36 “Ntorete abana baito abaisia abatangi, ne chitugo chiaito chintangi ase abakuani abagokora emeremo ase enyomba ya Nyasae oito, buna erikire ase amachiko, torente ne chintangi chie chiombe, na echie chimbori, na echie ching’ondi." 
Nehemiah10:37 “Naende ntorente ase abakuani agwo ase ebinyomba ime, ase enyomba ya Nyasae oito, obosie bwaito bw’obotongora, na ebiegwa biaito, na amatunda ’emete yonsi, na edivai, na amaguta. Boigo ntorente ensemo ya ikomi y’okwama kwe riroba riaito ase Abalawi, ekiagera Abalawi nabwo bagosangereria chinsemo chia ikomi korwa ase emechie yonsi." 
Nehemiah10:38 Ekero Abalawi bakorenterwa chinsemo echio chia ikomi, omokuani, omonto bw’ororeria rwa Haroni, goika abe amo nabarabwo. Abalawi abwo mbarusie ensemo ya ikomi ye chinsemo echio chia ikomi, bayeire ase ebinyomba bi’enyomba ya Nyasae." 
Nehemiah10:39 Abaisraeli na Abalawi mbarente okoruegwa kwabo gwe chindagera, na okw’edivai, na amaguta, ase ebinyomba ebio. Agwo nao ebikorero bi’Aase Aachenu bire; boigo nao abakuani bagokora emeremo, na abarendi b’ebiita, na abateri bare. “Titogotiga enyomba ya Nyasae oito eborwe ebinto.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Abatang’ani b’abanto bakamenya Yerusalemu, na abanto bande bagaaka obomera gochora omonto oyomo korwa ase kera ekeombe ki’abanto ikomi, agende komenya Yerusalemu, omochie omochenu, na abanto aba kianda abatigari bagende komenya ase emechie ende." 
Nehemiah11:2 Abanto bagasesenia abwo bonsi beruete kogenda komenya Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Ase emechie emeke ase ense y’Abayuda, kera omonto bw’Abaisraeli bande bonsi, na abakuani, na Abalawi, na abakori emeremo be Hekalu, na abana b’abasomba ba Sulemani, akamenya ase omwando oye. Aba nabwo abanene be chingongo chi’ense y’Abayuda abamenyete Yerusalemu," 
Nehemiah11:4 abande barenge ab’ororeria rwa Yuda, na abande ab’orwa Benjamin. Ab’ororeria rwa Yuda nabwo aba: Ataya, mosinto o Usia, o Zakaria, bw’Amaria, o Sefatia, o Mahalaleli, bw’ororeria rwa Peresi;" 
Nehemiah11:5 Maaseya, mosinto o Baruku, o Koli-Hose, o Hasaya, bw’Adaya, o Yoyaribu, o Zakaria, bw’ororeria rwa Siloni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Abanto bonsi b’ororeria rwa Peresi abamenyete Yerusalemu, nigo barenge amagana ane, na emerongo etano nomo, na batano na batato (468). Bonsi nigo barenge chituoni chi’okorwana esegi." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ab’ororeria rwa Benjamin nabwo aba: Salu, mosinto o Mesulamu, o Yoedi, o Pedaya, o Kolaya, o Maaseya, o Itieli, o Yesaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Na nyuma yaye Gabai na Salai. Bonsi nabanto amagana kianda, na emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (928)." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoeli, mosinto o Sikiri, nere orenge omoteneneri obo; na Yuda, mosinto o Hasenua, akaba omoteneneri o kabere ase omochie oria." 
Nehemiah11:10 Abakuani nabwo aba: Yedaya, mosinto o Yoyaribu, na Yakini;" 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya, mosinto o Hilikia, o Mesulamu, o Zadoki, o Merayoti, o Ahitubu, omoteneneri bw’enyomba ya Nyasae," 
Nehemiah11:12 na abamwabo abarenge gokora emeremo ase enyomba ya Nyasae, bonsi nabanto amagana atano na atato, na emerongo ebere, na babere (822); Adaya, mosinto o Yerohamu, o Pelalia, bw’Amusi, o Zakaria; o Pasuri, o Malikia," 
Nehemiah11:13 na abamwabo, abarenge abateneneri be chiamate, bonsi nabanto amagana abere na emerongo ene, na babere (242); Amasai, mosinto bw’Asareli, bw’Asai, o Mesilemoti, o Imeri," 
Nehemiah11:14 na abamwabo, abanto abamanyete gokora emeremo buya, rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, na batano na batato (128). Omoteneneri obo nere Sabidieli, mosinto o Hagedolimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Abalawi nabwo aba: Semaya, mosinto o Hasubu, bw’Asirikamu, o Hasabia, o Buni." 
Nehemiah11:16 Sabetai na Yosabadi, abwo babere nabwo barenge abateneneri b’Abalawi abwo barenge gokora emeremo isiko ase enyomba ya Nyasae;" 
Nehemiah11:17 Matania, mosinto o Mika o Sabudi bw’ororeria rw’Asafu, oyorenge omoraai bw’amatera ase okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono amo nogosaba; Bakibukia, nere orenge oyo o kabere ase Matania; Abuda, mosinto o Samua o Galali bw’ororeria rwa Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abalawi bonsi abamenyete ase omochie oyio omochenu nigo barenge amagana abere, na emerongo etano na etato, na bane (284)." 
Nehemiah11:19 Abarendi b’ebiita nabwo aba: Akubu na Talimoni amo nabamwabo, abarenge korenda ase ebiita, bonsi nabanto rigana erimo, na emerongo etano na ebere, na babere (172)." 
Nehemiah11:20 Abande b’Abaisraeli, na ab’abakuani, na ab’Abalawi, bakaba bamenyete ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda, kera oyomo ase omwando oye." 
Nehemiah11:21 Korende abakori emeremo be Hekalu bakamenya agwo Ofeli. Siha na Gisipa nabwo barenge abateneneri b’abwo. 
Nehemiah11:22 Oyorenge omoteneneri bw’Abalawi abamenyete Yerusalemu, nere Usi, mosinto o Bani, o Hasabia, o Matania, o Mika. Usi nigo arenge oyomo bw’ororeria rw’Asafu, abanto abarenge abateneneri b’amatera ase enyomba ya Nyasae." 
Nehemiah11:23 Omoruoti nigo aruete ogochika igoro ase abanto b’eamate eyio, buna barenge gokora emeremo y’amatera agwo ase Hekalu, buna yaganeirie rituko ase rituko." 
Nehemiah11:24 Omoruoti nigo abegete Petahia, mosinto o Mesesabeli bw’ororeria rwa Sera, mosinto o Yuda, gotenenera abanto ase amang’ana onsi." 
Nehemiah11:25 Abayuda bande bakaba bamenyete ase ebichie ang’e namaremo abo. Abande bakamenya Kiriati-Ariba na ase ebichie biaye; abande bakamenya Diboni na ase ebichie biaye, na abande Yekabuseli na ase ebichie biaye;" 
Nehemiah11:26 abande bakamenya Yesua, na Molada, na Beti-Peleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 na Hasani-Suali, na Beeri-Seba, na ase ebichie biaye;" 
Nehemiah11:28 abande bakamenya Sikilagi, na Mekona na ase ebichie biaye;" 
Nehemiah11:29 abande bakamenya Eni-Rimoni, na Sora, na Yarimuti;" 
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa, na Adulamu na ase ebichie biabo, na Lakisi na amaremo narengeo, na Aseka na ase ebichie biaye. Ase ayio bakaba bakomenya gochakera Beeri-Seba goikera ase Rikura ria Hinomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Abanto b’egesaku kia Benjamin bakaba bakomenya gochakera Geba na kogenderera goikera Mikimasi, na Aiya, na Beteli na ase ebichie biaye;" 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatoti, na Nobu, na Anania;" 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasori, na Rama, na Gitaimu;" 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidi, na Seboimo na Nebalati;" 
Nehemiah11:35 Lodi, na Ono, na ase Rikura ri’Abaroisia Ebinto." 
Nehemiah11:36 Ebiombe binde bi’Abalawi ebiamenyete ase ense y’Abayuda bikaba bikobarwa amo nabanto ba Benjamin. 
Nehemiah12:1 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’abakuani na Abalawi abairanete korwa ase obosomba amo na Serubabeli, mosinto o Sealitieli, na Yesua. Abakuani nabwo aba: Seraya, na Yeremia na Ezara;" 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, na Maluku, na Hatusi;" 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekania, na Rehumu, na Meremoti;" 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, na Ginetoi, na Abiya;" 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamini, na Maadia, na Biliga;" 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaya, na Yoyaribu, na Yedaya;" 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, na Amoki, na Hilikia, na Yedaya. Abwo barenge abatang’ani b’abakuani na ab’abamwabo, ase amatuko a Yesua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Abalawi nabwo aba: Yesua na Binui, na Kadimieli, na Serebia, na Yuda, na Matania, oyio amo nabanto b’eamate yaye nabwo batenenerete emeremo y’amatera ay’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakibukia na Uno, abamwabo, bagatenena kororia asebare, ekero barenge gokora emeremo yabo ase Hekalu." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yesua akaibora Yoyakimu, na Yoyakimu akaibora Eliasibu, na Eliasibu akaibora Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 na Yoyada akaibora Yonathani, na Yonathani akaibora Yadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Ase amatuko a Yoyakimu abateneneri be chiamate chi’abakuani nabwo aba: Meraya ase eamate ya Seraya, na Hanania ase eamate ya Yeremia;" 
Nehemiah12:13 Mesulamu ase eamate y’Ezara, na Yehohanani ase eamate y’Amaria;" 
Nehemiah12:14 Yonathani ase eamate ya Maluki, na Yosefu ase eamate ya Sebania;" 
Nehemiah12:15 Adina ase eamate ya Harimu, na Helikai ase eamate ya Merayoti;" 
Nehemiah12:16 Zakaria ase eamate ya Ido, na Mesulamu ase eamate ya Ginetoni;" 
Nehemiah12:17 Sikiri ase eamate y’Abiya, na Pilitai ase eamate ya Miniamini, na eya Moadiya;" 
Nehemiah12:18 Samua ase eamate ya Biliga, na Yehonathani ase eamate ya Semaya;" 
Nehemiah12:19 Matenai ase eamate ya Yoyaribu, na Usi ase eamate ya Yedaya;" 
Nehemiah12:20 Kalai ase eamate ya Salai, na Eberi ase eamate y’Amoki;" 
Nehemiah12:21 Hasabia ase eamate ya Hilikia, na Netaneli ase eamate ya Yedaya." 
Nehemiah12:22 Omoroberio bw’abateneneri be chiamate chi’Abalawi okarikwa ase amatuko ’Eliasibu, na Yoyada, na Yohanani, na Yadua, Boigo oyo bw’abakuani okarikwa ekero Dario arenge omogambi bw’Abaayemi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Omoroberio bw’Abalawi abarenge abateneneri be chiamate chiabo okarikwa ase Ebuku y’Amang’ana ’Ebiro goikera ase amatuko a Yohanani, mosinto bw’Eliasibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Oyo noro omoroberio bw’abateneneri b’Abalawi: Hasabia, na Serebia, na Yesua, mosinto o Kadimeli. Abwo amo nabamwabo bande nabwo babegetwe ase ebiombe biateneneretwe korigererania ase ogoitabererania amatera ay’ogotogia na koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, buna Daudi, omonto o Nyasae, achigete." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania, na Bakibukia, na Obadia, na Mesulamu, na Talimoni, na Akubu, abarendi b’ebiita, nigo barenge korenda ebigachero agwo ase ebiita." 
Nehemiah12:26 Abanto abwo nigo barengeo ase amatuko a Yoyakimu, mosinto o Yesua o Yosadaki, na ase amatuko a Nehemia omogavuna, na ay’Ezara, oyorenge omokuani na omworokia bw’amariko." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ekero omochie o Yerusalemu orenge gwatananwa na gochenwa, Abalawi bakarentwa Yerusalemu korwa aase ande onsi ase bamenyete, erinde bache ase ogwatananwa okwo bare nomogoko, babe bakoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono namatera, na goakania chisani chikwoga, na amakano ao ao." 
Nehemiah12:28 Chiamate ch’abateri chigasangererigwa korwa ase chinsemo chionsi chia Yerusalemu, na korwa ase emechie y’Abanetofa." 
Nehemiah12:29 Boigo bagasangererigwa korwa Beti-Giligali na korwa ase orogongo rwa Geba, na Asimaweti, ekiagera abateri abwo konya baagachire emechie yabo goetanana Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Abakuani na Abalawi bagechena abanyene, bagache na nabanto bonsi amo nebiita, na orwaki roria." 
Nehemiah12:31 Erio nkarenta abanene b’Abayuda igoro ase orwaki, ngachora ebiombe bibere ebinene bikaba bigotaara igoro ase orwaki roria na gotera ogotera gw’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono. Ekeombe ekemo kegataara agwo igoro ase orwaki gochia ase ensemo y’okorio goikera ase Egeita ki’Eubi." 
Nehemiah12:32 Abanto babwatetie ekeombe ekio nabwo aba: Hosaya, na ekeng’ese ki’abanene b’Abayuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 Asaria, na Ezara, na Mesulamu;" 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda na Benjamin, na Semaya, na Yeremia." 
Nehemiah12:35 Ababwatetie abwo n’Abakuani babwate ebirombeta, na Zakaria, mosinto o Yonathani, o Semaya, o Matania, o Mikaya, o Sakuri bw’Asafu." 
Nehemiah12:36 Abande b’eamate ya Zakaria: Semaya na Asareli, Milalai na Gilalai, Maai na Netaneli, Yuda na Hanani. Abwo nigo babwate ebinto biare kobugigwa, ebio Daudi, omonto o Nyasae, achigete. Ezara, omworokia bw’amariko, akaba otang’anete ekeombe ekio." 
Nehemiah12:37 Agwo ase Egeita gi’Ensoko kiarenge bosio bwabo bakariina ase ebiriinero gochia ase Omochie o Daudi. Agwo bakariina ase orwaki rwarenge rogoro y’enyomba ya Daudi, gochia ase Egeita ki’Amache, ase ensemo ya moocha." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ekeombe kende ki’abateri baria barenge gotera amatera ay’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, bakagenda gochia ensemo y’okobee igoro ase orwaki roria, na inche amo nekeng’ese ki’abanto tokababwatia, tokagenda goetera ase Omorobiri bw’Eriko, gochia ase Orwaki Orogare." 
Nehemiah12:39 Naende togaetera Egeita gi’Efraimu, na Egeita Egekoro, na Egeita gie Chinswe, na Omorobiri o Hananeli, na Omorobiri bwe Rigana, goika ase Egeita gie Ching’ondi. Togakoorera orogendo rwaito agwo ase Egeita ki’Abarendi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Ase ayio ebiombe bi’abateri abarenge gotera amatera ay’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono bigatenena ime ase enyomba ya Nyasae, na inche amo nekeng’ese ki’abanene baria togatenena nabarabwo." 
Nehemiah12:41 Eliakimu na Maaseya, Miyamini na Mikaya, Elioenai na Zakaria, na Hanania, abarenge abakuani, bagatenena babwatete ebirombeta." 
Nehemiah12:42 Naende mbarengeo Maaseya na Semaya, Eleazari na Usi, Yehohanani na Malikia, Elamu na Eseri. Abateri abwo bagatera, na Yesirahia nere orenge omoraai obo." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ase rituko riria bakarua ebing’wanso ebinene, na bagachenga nomogoko omonene mono, ekiagera Nyasae abagogetie. Abakungu amo nabana boigo bagachenga, na omochengo oria orenge Yerusalemu okaigweka gochia aare." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ase engaki eria abanto bagachorwa korenda ebinyomba biarenge chikungo aase ebiegwa, na okwama kwe ritang’ani, ne chinsemo chia ikomi, biarenge kogachwa. Abanto abwo nigo barenge gosangereria korwa ase emegondo yonsi y’emechie ebinto biachikire ase amachiko biegwe abakuani na Abalawi, ekiagera emeremo y’abakuani na ey’Abalawi nigo yagogetie Abayuda." 
Nehemiah12:45 Abakuani na Abalawi bagakora emeremo ya Nyasae obo, na ey’ogochena. Abateri na abarendi b’ebiita bakaba bagokora emeremo yabo buna Daudi na Sulemani, omomura oye, bachigete." 
Nehemiah12:46 Ase amatuko aria a kare, aya Daudi na ay’Asafu, mbarengeo abaraai b’abateri, na abateri nigo barenge gotera amatera ay’ogotogia Nyasae na komoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
Nehemiah12:47 Ase amatuko a Serubabeli, na aya Nehemia, Abaisraeli bonsi nigo barenge korua kera rituko ebiegwa biachikeire abateri na abarendi b’ebiita. Boigo naende bakaba bakoa Abalawi ebitari ebi baatananeretwe, na Abalawi barabwo bakaa abanto b’ororeria rwa Haroni ebitari biabo." 
Nehemiah13:1 Ase rituko riria abanto bagasomerwa amang’ana korwa ase Ebuku ya Musa, na ekanyorekana erikire ng’a Abaamoni na Abamoabu tibakobarwa ase omosangererekano bw’abanto ba Nyasae nonya ng’ake," 
Nehemiah13:2 ekiagera tibachiete korotota Abaisraeli na kobaa endagera na amache. Barabwo bakaa Baalamu eng’eria ng’a aragererie Abaisraeli, korende Nyasae akaonchora okoragereria koria gokaba ogosesenigwa." 
Nehemiah13:3 Ekero Abaisraeli baigwete amachiko ayio asometwe asebare bakerusanania korwa ase abanto bonsi abarenge ab’ebisaku ebiao. 
Nehemiah13:4 Ekero engaki eyio konya etaraika, Eliasibu omokuani oria ochoretwe akaba omoteneneri ase ebinyomba biarenge chikungo, agwo ase enyomba ya Nyasae oito, nigo abwatanete na Tobia." 
Nehemiah13:5 Ere konya oroiseirie Tobia enyomba engare agwo aase konya barenge kogacha okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ubani, na ebikorero, ne chinsemo chia ikomi chi’endagera, na edivai, na amaguta ’amazeituni, ebinto biachikeretwe Abalawi, na abateri, na abarendi b’ebiita. Boigo ebiegwa biachikeretwe abakuani, nao biare kogachwa." 
Nehemiah13:6 Inche tinarenge Yerusalemu ekero amang’ana ayio abete iga, ekiagera ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na ebere, bw’okogamba kw’Aritasasita, omoruoti o Babeli, nario nagendete ase omoruoti oyio. Nyuma y’engaki ende nkaegwa ribaga," 
Nehemiah13:7 nkairana Yerusalemu, nkaigwa igoro y’ebibe ebio Eliasibu akorete ase okoroiseria Tobia enyomba agwo ase chikungo chi’enyomba ya Nyasae chiarenge." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ase ayio nkaba nendamwamu enene ngatuguta ebinto bia nyomba bia Tobia korwa ase enyomba eria. 
Nehemiah13:9 Nkarua ogochika, na aase agwo agachenwa, erio nkairaniao ebikorero bi’enyomba ya Nyasae, amo nokoruegwa kw’endagera na ubani." 
Nehemiah13:10 Naende nkanyora ng’a Abalawi na abateri konya batamire korwao, na kera oyomo konya ogendire ase omogondo oye, ekiagera tibaetwe chinsemo chiabo chiabatungetie." 
Nehemiah13:11 Erio nkomana nabanene nkababoria, “Nase ki enyomba ya Nyasae yatigirwe etarendiri?” Nkabasangereria na nkabeka kera omonto aase aye akore emeremo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Erio Abayuda bonsi bakarenta ase chikungo ensemo ya ikomi y’okoruegwa kw’endagera, na edivai, na amaguta ’amazeituni." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ngachora Selemia omokuani, na Zadoki, omworokia bw’amachiko, na Pedaya Omolawi, bakaba abagachi be chikungo. Naende nkabeka Hanani, mosinto o Sakuri o Matania, akaba omokonyi obo, ekiagera abwo bonsi nigo baberetwe kirori ng’a nabegenwa bare. Emeremo yabo nigo yarenge ey’ogwatananera Abayuda bamwabo ebinto." 
Nehemiah13:14 Aye Nyasae one, ong’inyore ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio. Tobaisa gotinyia ogokora kwane okuya nakorire ase enyomba yao na ase emeremo ere aroro ey’okogokorera." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ase engaki eyio nkarora agwo ase ense y’Abayuda abanto barenge komita edivai ase rituko ri’Esabato. Boigo bakarenta endagera na bakabekera chitigere chigurube; naende nigo barenge korenta edivai, na amasabibu, na amako, ne chigurube chinde ao ao ase Yerusalemu ase rituko ri’Esabato. Nkabakurera bokong’u tibabaisa koonia endagera ase rituko erio." 
Nehemiah13:16 Abanto ba Turo, abamenyete ase omochie oria, nigo barenge korenta chinswe, na ebinto binde bionsi, na kobiooneria Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu, ase rituko ri’Esabato." 
Nehemiah13:17 Erio inche nkomana nabanene b’Abayuda, nkabatebia, “Mbibe ki ebi mogokora ase ogokora rituko ri’Esabato koba eritachenegeti?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Inee! Chisokoro chiaino tichiakorete obobe buna obo, chikagera Nyasae oito akarenta amabe aya onsi asetore na ase omochie oyo? Bono nigo morigetie korentera Abaisraeli endamwamu ya Nyasae ere enene goetania, ase ogokora Esabato koba eyetachenegeti.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Ase ayio, ekero bwaisire koira, ekero Esabato etarachaka, nigo naruete ogochika ng’a ebiita bia Yerusalemu bisiekwe, na bigenderere gosiekwa goika ekero Esabato eraere. Nkabeka abasomba baane bande korenda ase ebiita barore ng’a gurube ende terentwa ime ase omochie, ase rituko ri’Esabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Abaonchoreria na abaoonia bande bonsi nigo barenge korara isiko ya Yerusalemu ase rituko rigima, gose abere." 
Nehemiah13:21 Korende nkabakurera na kobatebia, “Nase ki mobeerete isiko aa na korara aa ase enyasi? Moise gokora bo naende, goika mbakore bobe.” Korwa ase engaki eria na kogenderera tibarenge gocha ase rituko ri’Esabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ngachika Abalawi bechene, erio bachiche korenda ebiita na korenda rituko ri’Esabato ribe richenu. Aye Nyasae one, ing’inyore boigo ase engencho y’amang’ana aya, na ondorere amabera, ekiagera aye nigo ore nobwanchani botari koera." 
Nehemiah13:23 Ase engaki eria boigo nkarora Abayuda bande banyuomete abakungu korwa ase chinse chi’Abaasidodi na Abaamoni, na Abamoabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Ekeng’ese ki’abana babo nigo barenge gokwana omonwa bw’Egesidodi gose oyo bw’egesaku kende, korende tibamanyete gokwana omonwa bw’Ekeyuda." 
Nehemiah13:25 Erio nkomania abanto abwo, nkabaragereria; ngaaka abande abwo na gosunyora chitukia chiabo. Nkabatiania ase erieta ria Nyasae, nkabatebia, “Timobaisa gosokia abaiseke baino ase abamura b’ebisaku ebio, gose konyuomeria abamura baino abaiseke babo; gose inwe abanyene timobaisa konyuoma korwa aroro." 
Nehemiah13:26 Inee! Sulemani, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, takorete ebibe ase engencho y’abakungu banga buna abwo? Ase abaruoti bonsi b’ebisaku, omoruoti onde tarenge buna ere, ekiagera Nyasae nigo amwanchete, na akamobeka akaba omoruoti igoro y’Abaisraeli bonsi. Nonya naboigo, abakungu baria b’ebisaku ebio bakagera agakora ebibe." 
Nehemiah13:27 Inee! Nigo toragenderere koigwera amang’ana aino na tokore ebibe ebinene, naende tobe abatari abegenwa ase Nyasae oito, ase okonyuoma abakungu b’ebisaku ebiao?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Oyomo bw’abamura ba Yoyada, mosinto bw’Eliasibu, omokuani omonene, konya onyuomire omoiseke o Sanibalati Omohoroni; ase ayio nkamoseria korwa asende." 
Nehemiah13:29 Aye Nyasae one, inyora abanto abwo, ekiagera bakorire obokuani bwabeire obotachenegeti na basaririe okobwatana kw’obokuani okwo kwabeire ogotachenegeti, na Abalawi boigo babeire abatachenegeti."
