Psalms5:2 Aye omoruoti one, Nyasae one, tegerera oigwe amang’ana ’okorera kwane, ekiagera naye ngosaba." 
Psalms5:3 Omonene, aye nigo okoigwa ogosaba kwane ase engaki ya mambia; kobogokiamoka nigo nkobeka okogania kwane ase obosio bwao, erio naganya ndendete." 
Psalms5:4 Aye tori Nyasae bwanchete ogokora okobe. Oyogokora ebibe takonyara komenya amo naye. 
Psalms5:5 Abanto abaenenu tibakonyara gotenena ase obosio bwao, nigo ogechete abakori amabe bonsi." 
Psalms5:6 Aye nigo orasirie abanyaborimo bonsi; aye Omonene nigo ogechete abaiteri amanyinga na abang’ainereria. 
Psalms5:7 Korende ase engencho y’obonge bw’obwanchani bwao botari koera ninsoe ase enyomba yao; nigo ndasasime ndigereretie Hekalu yao Enchenu imbe ngokoiroka. 
Psalms5:8 Aye Omonene, nigo mbwate ababisa abange, ase ayio, ondaae ase oboronge bwao; roisia enchera yao ase ngoetera ebe endonge." 
Psalms5:9 Amang’ana ababisa baane bagokwana nay’oborimo, chinkoro chiabo nigo chire nemeroberio y’ogosiria kegima; emioyo yabo noboina bwasie, chimeme chiabo nigo chigokwana amang’ana amansu ay’ogosiria." 
Psalms5:10 Aye Nyasae, obae egesusuro ase ebibe biabo: emeroberio eyio bakorire tiga egere bagwe. Obaserie, ekiagera basaririe asore, na ekiagera bangire gokoigwera." 
Psalms5:11 Abanto bonsi abakogotamera mbabe nomogoko, barabwo mbatere kogenderera botambe na gochenga. Aye igo orakengere abwo banchete erieta riao, erio banyare koba nomogoko omonene ase engencho yao." 
Psalms5:12 Aye Omonene nigo ogosesenia omonyene oboronge na komotuba nobuya bwao bw’amabera bonga buna enguba. 
Psalms6:1 Omonene, tontogonyera ekero ore nendamwamu; tong’a egesusuro gi’okondongeyia ekero ore nekeririanda." 
Psalms6:2 Omonene, ndorera amabera, ekiagera inde omonyanyuru. Aye Omonene, ingwenie, ekiagera amauga aane nigo akonyegerigwa." 
Psalms6:3 Omoyo one ochandekire nomoondoko. Omonene, ngoika ririri oraganye otarankonya?" 
Psalms6:4 Aye Omonene, ing’iranere omboorie! Ontoorie ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao botari koera." 
Psalms6:5 Ase abwo bakure onde tari oranyare gokoinyora. Inee! Ning’o oranyare kogotogia korwa aase abakure? 
Psalms6:6 Nanyarekire ase okwerera kwane kw’obororo, kera obotuko nigo ngoteremia oborere bwane namariga, ebirarero biane biaichoirwe namariga." 
Psalms6:7 Obosio bwane bwomire pa ase engencho y’emechando, bwareeire ase engencho y’ababisa baane bonsi." 
Psalms6:8 Inwe mwensi abakori amabe, karue asende, ekiagera Omonene oigure okorera kwane." 
Psalms6:9 Omonene oigure okoboria kwane gw’okonyora amabera, ere bwancheire ogosaba kwane." 
Psalms6:10 Ababisa baane bonsi mbarore obosooku, bagoswe na koondokigwa mono, mbairane gochia nyuma bwango bare nobosooku." 
Psalms7:1 Omonene, Nyasae one, naye ngotamera, intoorie korwa ase abachandi baane, nkonye!" 
Psalms7:2 Onye taibo, nigo barantaborane bare buna chindo, bankurure gochia aase omonto onde atache gontooria." 
Psalms7:3 Omonene, Nyasae one, onye nakorire amang’ana aya, onye nakorire amabe namaboko aane," 
Psalms7:4 onye naakanire omosani one amabe, gose nasakoire ebinto bi’omobisa one engencho ende etaiyo," 
Psalms7:5 rirorio tiga omobisa one ambwatie na kombwata, erio antiringere inse asirie obogima bwane, ansarerie amasikani." 
Psalms7:6 Aye Omonene, imoka kore nendamwamu yao, imokerera igoro orwanie ekeririanda ki’ababisa baane! Inchuo onkonye! Aye gwachikire ekina." 
Psalms7:7 Abanto b’ebisaku bionsi tiga basangererekane bagoetanane, obagambere korwa ase ekerogo kiao ki’obonene aaria igoro." 
Psalms7:8 Omonene, naye okonachera abanto bonsi ekina. Aye Omonene, onachere inche ekina koreng’ana noboronge bwane, na buna ntari na komocha." 
Psalms7:9 Tiga ebibe bi’abakori amabe biere, korende omonto omoronge omotenenie bokong’u. Aye Nyasae omonyene oboronge nigo okorenga chinkoro na emioyo." 
Psalms7:10 Nyasae nere enguba yane, ere nigo agotooria abare ne chinkoro chindonge." 
Psalms7:11 Nyasae nigo are omogambi omoronge, na kera rituko nigo akoba nekeririanda ase abakori amabe." 
Psalms7:12 Omonto karaange gweitia, Nyasae natierie omoro oye, natinge obota bwaye na abobeke ang’e." 
Psalms7:13 Oroisirie ebirwanero biaye ase ogoita omonto oyio, akore emegwe yaye esambe buna omorero." 
Psalms7:14 Omonyabibe nigo aichire nobobe, nigo are inda nogosaria na koibora oborimo." 
Psalms7:15 Omonto oyio nigo agokunya eirima entambe, erio ogwa ere omonyene ase eirima eyio." 
Psalms7:16 Emechando yaye nigo ekomoiranera; na ogokora kwaye okobe nigo gokomogwera omonyene. 
Psalms7:17 Ning’akere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho y’oboronge bwaye; nintere ogotera kw’ogotogia erieta ri’Omonene, oyore Igoro Mono." 
Psalms8:1 Aye Omonene, aye Omonene oito, erieta riao naki rire nobonene obonge ase ense yonsi! Obonene bwao nigo bogotogigwa nonya ngoika igoro." 
Psalms8:2 Ase emenwa y’abana na ey’abakogonka nigo kweagacheire eburi bosio bw’ababisa bao, erinde okoiyeria inse ababisa bao na abakorusia egesiomba." 
Psalms8:3 Ekero nkorigereria gochia igoro, na korora emeremo gwakorete namaboko ao, omotienyi ne ching’enang’eni, ebi kwabegete aase abo;" 
Psalms8:4 omonto inki aisaine aye ogendererete komorengereria? Mwanyabanto ninki aisaine aye okomorenda? 
Psalms8:5 Kwamokorire koba inse ake asore aye omonyene, Nyasae; kwamoboirie obonene na amasikani." 
Psalms8:6 Kwamobekire kogambera ebinto bionsi gwatongete; kwabekire ebitongwa bionsi inse y’amagoro aye: 
Psalms8:7 ching’ondi chionsi ne chiombe, amo ne ching’iti chi’orosana," 
Psalms8:8 ne chinyoni chikoiruruka amo ne chinswe chi’enyancha, na kende gionsi kegoetanana ase chindiba chie chinyancha." 
Psalms8:9 Aye Omonene, aye Omonene oito, erieta riao naki rire nobonene ase ense yonsi!" 
Psalms9:1 Aye Omonene, ningoakere ng’a mbuya mono nenkoro yane yonsi. Nindarie emeremo yao yonsi y’ogokumia." 
Psalms9:2 Ningoke na gochenga mono ase engencho yao, nintere na gotogia erieta riao, aye Omonene Ore Igoro Mono." 
Psalms9:3 Ababisa baane nigo bakoirana nyuma, bagwe inse na gosirigwa ase obosio bwao." 
Psalms9:4 Aye kwanachire ekina kiane ase oboronge; noikaransete ase ekerogo kiao ki’obonene kore omonachi ebina omoronge. 
Psalms9:5 Aye gwatogonyeire abanto b’ebisaku na gosiria abakori amabe, gwasiririe amarieta abo, tibakoinyorwa kare na kare." 
Psalms9:6 Ababisa baerire, basirigwe kegima, gwatagoire emechie yabo, barabwo bebirwe, tibakoinyorwa nonya ng’ake." 
Psalms9:7 Korende Omonene nigo are omoruoti o kare na kare, obekire ang’e ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, erinde anache ekina." 
Psalms9:8 Nigo aragambie ense ase oboronge na konachera abanto ekina gi’ekeene atari gwanchereria. 
Psalms9:9 Omonene nigo are obotamero ase abwo bagokorerwa bobe, nere obotamero ase chingaki chi’emechando." 
Psalms9:10 Abwo bonsi bamanyete erieta riao, nigo bagosemeretie, ekiagera aye Omonene togotiga abwo bagokorigia." 
Psalms9:11 Tera amatera ase ogotogia Omonene oyomenyete Sayoni! Tebia ebisaku bionsi ogokora kwaye okonene! 
Psalms9:12 Ere oyo okorusia egesiomba ase okomocha kw’ogoitera amanyinga na koinyora abaichanete, tari kweba ekerero ki’abwo bagokorerwa bobe." 
Psalms9:13 Aye Omonene ndorere amabera! Rigereria orore emechando eye abanto bangechete bakondetera. Aye kwandusirie korwa ase ebiita bi’amakweri," 
Psalms9:14 erinde intenene ase abanto ba Sayoni, mbatebie ase ebiita biabo amang’ana onsi agerire nkogotogia; ningokere ogotooreka kwao." 
Psalms9:15 Abanto b’ebisaku bagure ase eirima bakunyete, na ase oboreba babisete babwatirwe abanyene." 
Psalms9:16 Omonene bwemanyekanirie ase okonacha ebina bia boronge; abakori amabe babwatirwe ase ogokora kwabo abanyene. 
Psalms9:17 Abakori amabe nigo bakogenda gochia aase abakure, naboigo nabanto bonsi b’ebisaku abwo bebire Nyasae." 
Psalms9:18 Abanto abaremerwa tibakwebwa kogenderera botambe, na ogosemeria kw’abagokorerwa bobe tikogosira nonya ng’ake." 
Psalms9:19 Omonene, inchuo! Totiga abanto babue, tiga abanto b’Ebisaku banacherwe ekina ase obosio bwao." 
Psalms9:20 Omonene, obaondokie! Tiga bamanye ng’a barabwo mwanyabanto bare rioka." 
Psalms10:1 Omonene, naki gwateneneire aare iga? Naki okwebisa, otari kororekana ase chingaki chi’emechando?" 
Psalms10:2 Abakori amabe baenenire na gokorera abaremerwa bobe. Tiga babwatwe abanyene ase emeroberio yabo y’obobe. 
Psalms10:3 Omonto omokori ebibe nigo agwetogeria okogania okobe gw’enkoro yaye; na omonto ore ne ribero nigo akoragereria Omonene na komochaya. 
Psalms10:4 Omokori amabe ase oboenenu bwaye nigo agoteba ng’a Nyasae takomoa egesusuro. Nigo akorengereria ng’a Nyasae tari. 
Psalms10:5 Omonto oyio nigo akogenderera gokina ase chinchera chiaye. Ebina biao okonacha nigo bire igoro mono, takobimanya; nigo agochaya ababisa baye bonsi." 
Psalms10:6 Nigo akorengereria ase enkoro yaye ime: “Tinkwoboa gento kende, tinkonyorwa na bobe bonde nonya ng’ake.”" 
Psalms10:7 Aya agokwana nigo aichire okoragereria, na obong’ainereria, na ogokorera abande bobe; oromeme rwaye nigo robwate amang’ana ’obobe na ogosaria." 
Psalms10:8 Nigo akwebisa ase emechie oboera abanto, oganya agwo ase ogoita abanto batari na komocha. Nigo agotengera konyora abatari na gokonywa konde," 
Psalms10:9 nigo akwebisa aase are bobisi, buna endo ere ase egetutu eboete, oganya ase okobwata abaremerwa; nigo akobabwata ekero akobakurura ase omoeto oye." 
Psalms10:10 Nigo akoramama buna endo kobaboera, erio obwata namaboko aye omonto otari na gokonywa konde." 
Psalms10:11 Igo akorengereria ase enkoro yaye ime, “Nyasae tagwechandera kende, obisire obosio bwaye ng’a tayarora nonya ng’ake.”" 
Psalms10:12 Omonene, inchuo! Nyasae rambora okoboko kwao, na tibweba abanto bachandegete!" 
Psalms10:13 Aye Nyasae, nase ki omonto omokori amabe akogochaya, na korengereria ng’a aye tokomoa egesusuro." 
Psalms10:14 Aye nigo okorora abachandekire na komanya okwerera kwabo, amang’ana ayio nigo oyabegete ase amaboko ao. Omonto otari na gokonywa konde nigo akwerua asore, ekiagera naye botambe ogokonya chintakana." 
Psalms10:15 Saria chinguru chi’abanto abakori amabe na abanyabibe, obae egesusuro ase amabe onsi bagokora goika toyarora naende." 
Psalms10:16 Omonene nigo are omoruoti o kare na kare; abanto b’Ebisaku batamomanyeti basirigwe ase ense yaye. 
Psalms10:17 Aye Omonene, nigo ogotegerera abanto abaitongo abagokogania; nigo okobaigwa na kobeka chinkoro chiabo chinguru." 
Psalms10:18 Igo okoa chintakana na abachandegete oboronge bwabo, erinde monto onde bw’ense tagenderera korenta okogosa naende." 
Psalms11:1 Omonene nere obotamero bwane. Nase ki rende mogontebia: “Iruruka buna enyoni gochia ase ebitunwa? 
Psalms11:2 Rigereria abakori amabe buna bagotinga amata abo, babeka chinsara chiabo ang’e ase chingori chi’amata, erinde barase abanto bare ne chinkoro chindonge." 
Psalms11:3 Onye amaroso atagoirwe, ngento ki omonto omoronge aranyare gokora?”" 
Psalms11:4 Omonene nigo are ase Hekalu yaye enchenu, ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene naaria igoro kere. Amaiso aye nigo amongerete, nigo arigereretie ase okorenga mwanyabanto." 
Psalms11:5 Omonene nigo akorenga abare abaronge na abakori amabe, korende omoyo oye nogechete abakori amabe na abagokorera abande obotindi." 
Psalms11:6 Natwerie abakori amabe omorero bw’amakara, amagena agosamba na omwaga ore ne riberera ritindi, nigo birabe egesusuro kiabo." 
Psalms11:7 Omonene nomonyene oboronge, nigo anchete ogokora kw’oboronge; abanto abare ne chinkoro chindonge mbarore obosio bwaye." 
Psalms12:1 Omonene, totoorie! Abakoirogete aye Nyasae baerire, abegenwa tibari konyorekana ase mwanyabanto." 
Psalms12:2 Abanto bonsi nigo bagotebania amang’ana ’oborimo; nigo bare okong’o nyamenwa ebere na gokwana amang’ana ay’okweansia. 
Psalms12:3 Omonene okirie emenwa y’abwo bagokwana amang’ana ’okweansia, ne chimeme chi’abwo bagwetogia ase amang’ana ’oboenenu." 
Psalms12:4 Barabwo nigo bagoteba, “Ase amang’ana ’emenwa yaito ntore ne chinguru, aya togokwana nigo agotokonya. Ning’o ore omonene gotobua?”" 
Psalms12:5 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Bono ninchiche, ekiagera abataka baregirwe na abaremerwa nkorera bare. Ning’ee oborendi obuya ase abwo basemeretie kobonyora.”" 
Psalms12:6 Amang’ana ’Omonene nigo are ay’obwegenwa na amachenu, nigo agwekaine efeta yasambirwe ase riera ri’omorero na koumorwa inse, yachenirwe ara gatano na kabere." 
Psalms12:7 Aye Omonene, otorende! Otokengere botambe korwa ase obobe bw’ekegori eke." 
Psalms12:8 Abakori amabe nigo bagoetanana chinsemo chionsi, na obonyaka bonde bwonsi bogotogigwa ase egati ya mwanyabanto." 
Psalms13:1 Omonene, ngoika ririri oragenderere konyeba? Ngoika kare na kare? Ngoika ririri orabe kobisete obosio bwao ng’a tondora?" 
Psalms13:2 Ngoika ririri ndabe ndemereretie emechando ase omoyo one, imbe nobororo ase enkoro yane rituko ase rituko? Ngoika ririri omobisa one arabe okogokera emechando yane?" 
Psalms13:3 Aye Omonene, Nyasae one, ondigererie, ong’iranerie ase ogosaba kwane! Ondamokie amaiso aane, timbaisa korara chitoro chi’amakweri." 
Psalms13:4 Totiga omobisa one atebe ng’a ombuire, na ababisa baane bonsi bachengere okogwa kwane." 
Psalms13:5 Ninsemerie obwanchani bwao botari koera, enkoro yane negokere ogotooreka gokorwa asore." 
Psalms13:6 Ningoterere aye Omonene, ekiagera gwankoreire amaya amange." 
Psalms14:1 Abanto abariri nigo bagoteba ase chinkoro chiabo ime, “Nyasae tari.” Barabwo nabasareku, bagokora amang’ana ay’okogechia; onde tari ogokora ayare amaya, nonya noyomo." 
Psalms14:2 Omonene nigo arigereretie mwanyabanto korwa igoro, arore gose monto onde nareo ore omong’aini, oyokomorigia Nyasae." 
Psalms14:3 Abanto bonsi basirire enchera, bonsi amo bagundire; onde tari ogokora amaya, nonya noyomo." 
Psalms14:4 Inee! Abanto aba bonsi abakori amabe tibari nokomanya? Nigo bakoria abanto baane ase okobaurereria buna bakoria endagera yabo; tibari korangeria Omonene abakonye. 
Psalms14:5 Erio agwo abanto abwo mbasogwe nomoondoko omonene mono, ekiagera Nyasae nigo are amo nabanto abaronge." 
Psalms14:6 Inwe abakori amabe nigo mogochaya omoroberio bw’omonto otari na nguru, korende Omonene nere obotamero bwaye." 
Psalms14:7 Naki yare koba buya onye ogotooreka ngwachera Abaisraeli korwa Sayoni! Ekero Omonene arairanerie abanto baye amaya abo, abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo mbachenge, ee, Abaisraeli mbabe nomogoko." 
Psalms15:1 Omonene, monto ki oranyare komenya ase obomenyo bwao? Ning’o oranyare komenya ase egetunwa kiao egechenu?" 
Psalms15:2 Nomonto oria orogendo rwaye rore oroikeranu, oria ogokora kwaye kore okuya, na amang’ana agokwana korwa ase enkoro yaye nay’ekeene," 
Psalms15:3 naende ere tari omogenki, omonto oyio tari gokorera monto onde bobe, gose tari gokwana onde bobe." 
Psalms15:4 Ere nigo agochaya oyobwangirwe na Nyasae, korende osika abwo bamoirogete Omonene. Karire eira na gotiana tari koonchoka, nonya egochia komorentera obokong’u." 
Psalms15:5 Ekero akorua chibesa chiaye singo tari kogania ebitoki, omonto oyio tari koira riaaki kogera omonto otari nokomocha agambigwe. Omonto ogokora oboronge ase amang’ana ayio onsi namenye ase obotoereru kare na kare." 
Psalms16:1 Aye Nyasae, ondende, ekiagera naye ngotamera." 
Psalms16:2 Nigo ngotebia Omonene, “Aye naye Omonene one, obuya bwonsi inde nabwo nigo bokorwa asore.”" 
Psalms16:3 Abanto abachenu bare ase ense nigo bare nobonene obonene; abwo nabwo bangogetie mono. 
Psalms16:4 Abwo bakominyokera chinyasae ching’ao, nigo bakwementera emechando. Tinkoumora okoruegwa kw’amanyinga okwo bakorua, gose tingwatora amarieta abo nebikoba biane." 
Psalms16:5 Omonene nere egetare kiane; nere akong’a onsi aya ngwenerete konyora; ere igo arendete aya antungetie. 
Psalms16:6 Ebintungetie biangwereire agwo aase are aagiya, ee, omwando one nigo ore omuya mono." 
Psalms16:7 Nigo ngotogia Omonene oyo ogonsemia, ase obotuko enkoro yane nigo egontebereria gokora igo." 
Psalms16:8 Botambe nigo ndigereretie Omonene; ere nigo are ensemo yane y’okorio, tinkwoboa." 
Psalms16:9 Ase igo enkoro yane nigo ere nomosasoko amo nomoyo one; nonya nomobere one nigo omenyete ase oborendi obuya. 
Psalms16:10 Aye togontiga agwo aase abakure, gose togotiga omochenu oo arore ogosareka." 
Psalms16:11 Aye nomanyie enchera ekogenda ase obogima; ase obosio bwao noreo omogoko omonge; ase ensemo yao y’okorio mboreo obwansu obuya goika kare na kare. 
Psalms17:1 Aye Omonene, tegerera oigwe okogania kwane kw’ogokorerwa oboronge, igwa okorera kwane na ogosaba kwane, omonwa one tori gokwana obong’ainereria." 
Psalms17:2 Aye omonyene onachere ekina gi’okong’a oboronge, amaiso ao nigo akorora ayare ay’ekeene." 
Psalms17:3 Aye kwarengire enkoro yane, nonya nase obotuko nigo ogonteema, kwauna‐unirie na tonyoreti gento, amabe are ase enkoro yane tinkoyakwana." 
Psalms17:4 Ande onsi abanto bagokora, na koreng’ana namang’ana ao natigire kobwatia chinchera chi’abasaria." 
Psalms17:5 Nabeire nkobwatia chinchera chiao botambe; amagoro aane tana‐gotererigwa. 
Psalms17:6 Nyasae, nigo ngokorangeria ng’a onkonye, ekiagera aye nong’itabere; tegerera oigwe amang’ana aane ngokoboria." 
Psalms17:7 Aye Omotooria bw’abagotamera okoboko kwao kwa borio korwa ase ababisa babo, oorokia obwanchani bwao bw’ogokumia." 
Psalms17:8 Indende buna orendete endorero y’eriso riao; intube ase ekiriri gie chimbaba chiao; 
Psalms17:9 mbise korwa ase abakori amabe, abarigetie gonsiria, korwa ase ababisa bang’etanaine bang’ite." 
Psalms17:10 Abanto abwo bare ne chinkoro chitari namabera nigo bagokwana amang’ana ’oboenenu. 
Psalms17:11 Bono bang’etananire ase chinsemo chionsi; banaaririe, erinde bambwate na konyiyeria inse." 
Psalms17:12 Barabwo nigo banga buna endo eganetie orotwari; buna endo ensae eboete ase egesarara. 
Psalms17:13 Omonene, imoka! Orwanie ababisa baane obabue! Ntoorie korwa ase abakori amabe ase okobarwania nomoro oo;" 
Psalms17:14 ee, Omonene, ntoorie nokoboko kwao korwa ase abanto abwo. Barabwo nabanto b’ense eye, egetari kiabo neki’obogima obo. Chinda chiabo chiisaneke nebinto ebio kwabagacheire, biisane nase abana babo, naende abachokoro babo batigerwe ebiatigaire." 
Psalms17:15 Korende inche nindore obosio bwao inde noboronge; ekero ndabokigwe ning’isaneke ase ogokorora. 
Psalms18:1 Aye Omonene chinguru chiane, ningwanchete mono!" 
Psalms18:2 Omonene nere egetare kiane na eburi yane enkong’u, nere Omotooria one, na Nyasae one, Nyasae one nere egetare kiane ndatamere; nere enguba egonkengera, na Omotooria one bwe chinguru, oyo ogonkengera bokong’u." 
Psalms18:3 Nindangerie Omonene, oyo ogwenerete gotogigwa, nigo arantoorie korwa ase ababisa baane." 
Psalms18:4 Obororo bw’amakweri bokong’etanana, chiooro chi’obobe chikandetera obwoba." 
Psalms18:5 Obobe bw’amakweri nigo bwang’etananete, emeeto y’amakweri egantega na kombwata." 
Psalms18:6 Ase emechando yane nkarangeria Omonene, nkarera ase Nyasae one ng’a ankonye. Korwa ase Hekalu yaye akaigwa eriogi riane, ekerero kiane gekamoikera, ere agakeigwa." 
Psalms18:7 Erio ense ekanyegerigwa na koondoka, na amaroso ’ebitunwa agatengechigwa. Ee, ense ekaiguswa, ekiagera Omonene arenge nendamwamu." 
Psalms18:8 Erioki rigasoka korwa ase chimioro chiaye, na omorero ogosamba ogasoka korwa ase omonwa oye; ee, omorero bw’amakara ogasoka korwa asare." 
Psalms18:9 Akang’usa igoro gocha inse aa, agacha; riire rimwamu rikaba inse y’amagoro aye." 
Psalms18:10 Akariina omokerubi, akairuruka, agacha ng’ora igoro ye chimbaba chi’embeo." 
Psalms18:11 Agetuba ere omonyenye nomosunte, na amare amarito aichire amache." 
Psalms18:12 Korwa ase obomeka‐meku obwo bwarenge bosio bwaye amagena ’embura na omorero bw’amakara bigasoka goetera ase amare aye. 
Psalms18:13 Omonene agaaka enkoba korwa igoro; na eriogi ri’Oyore Igoro Mono rikaigugwa; amagena ’embura na omorero bw’amakara bigacha. 
Psalms18:14 Akaruta emegwe yaye, agaserebania ababisa baye; akamesia chinkoba, akabatantania." 
Psalms18:15 Erio ebiambokero bi’enyancha bikarorekana, na amaroso ’ense akaorokigwa aarabu, ekero Omonene abatogonyerete ase ogwoka kw’omoika bwe chimioro chiaye." 
Psalms18:16 Omonene akarambora okoboko kwaye korwa igoro, akambwata, akandusia ase amache amange." 
Psalms18:17 Agantooria korwa ase omobisa one ore ne chinguru, na korwa ase abwo bangechete; barabwo nigo barenge ne chinguru kombua." 
Psalms18:18 Ekero narenge nemechando bakandwania, korende Omonene akaba egekengero kiane." 
Psalms18:19 Akang’ira aase arenge aagare; agantooria, ekiagera namogogetie." 
Psalms18:20 Omonene nigo ang’ete eng’eria y’obuya, ekiagera inde omoronge, nigo ansesenetie, ekiagera inde namaboko atari na komocha." 
Psalms18:21 Inche nabeire nkobwatia chinchera chi’Omonene, tintigeti Nyasae one ase ogokora obonyaka." 
Psalms18:22 Nabeire nkorenda amachiko aye onsi, na timbeti ngotiga emeroberio yaye echikire." 
Psalms18:23 Nigo narenge omoikeranu asare, nkerenda korwa ase obobe." 
Psalms18:24 Omonene ong’akanire, ekiagera ngokora ayare boronge, na ekiagera aroche ng’a amaboko aane achenekire." 
Psalms18:25 Aye Omonene, nigo ore omwegenwa ase abwo bare abegenwa, nigo okweorokia ng’a nomoikeranu ore ase abwo bare abaikeranu." 
Psalms18:26 Aye nigo ore omochenu ase abwo bare abachenu; nigo okwanga abwo bare abakorekanu. 
Psalms18:27 Aye nigo ogotooria abanto bare abaitongo, korende abwo bare namaiso ’oboenenu nigo okobairania inse." 
Psalms18:28 Ee, naye ogontongeria etaya yane; Omonene, Nyasae one, nigo akomoreka omosunte ore asende oba oborabu." 
Psalms18:29 Konde amo naye, nigo ndasirie omoganda bw’esegi; na ekero inde na Nyasae one nincharoke chindwaki igoro." 
Psalms18:30 Enchera ya Nyasae neng’ikeranu, amang’ana aye ateemirwe na gotenena. Ere nenguba ase bonsi abakomotamera." 
Psalms18:31 Inee! Ning’o ore Nyasae, otatiga Omonene? Ning’o ore egetare, otatiga Nyasae oito?" 
Psalms18:32 Nyasae nere okomboyia chinguru na kondenda ase enchera yane. 
Psalms18:33 Ere okorire amagoro aane abeire buna ey’egesia, onkong’irie na gontenenia ase ebitunwa." 
Psalms18:34 Ere bworokereirie amaboko aane korwana esegi, erinde amaboko aane anyare gotinga obota bw’etaai." 
Psalms18:35 Aye kwang’eire enguba yao ase ogontooria, okoboko kwao gw’okorio kogansiira; na ogokonywa kwao gwankorire nabeire omonene." 
Psalms18:36 Kwang’eire aase aagare ngotaara, na amagoro aane tagotererigwa." 
Psalms18:37 Nkabwatia ababisa baane, nkabaikeera inchera; gose tinairanete goika nkabakoora." 
Psalms18:38 Nkabaaka inse nkabasenyenta, tibanyara koimoka, bakagwa inse y’amagoro aane, bakabugwa." 
Psalms18:39 Aye nigo kwambegete chinguru chi’okorwana esegi; okabeka ababisa baane inse y’amagoro aane. 
Psalms18:40 Ogakora ababisa baane bagatama korwa asende; abangechete nkabasiria kegima. 
Psalms18:41 Abanto aba bakarera ng’a bakonywe, korende onde tarenge obatooretie, bakarangeria Omonene, korende ere tabaigwa." 
Psalms18:42 Nkabasunyunta bakaba ebuse ekoirurukigwa nomwaga; nkabatuguta buna ngotuguta esike ase enchera. 
Psalms18:43 Aye gwantooririe korwa ase okoamererania nabanto, kwambekire nabeire omogambi bw’abanto b’ebisaku; abanto ntamanyete, bono babeire abasomba baane." 
Psalms18:44 Ekero baigure chinkuma chiane nigo bakonyigwera; abamenyi nigo bagocha bebeka inse yane. 
Psalms18:45 Abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao berusirie moyo kobagosoka korwa ase chiburi chiabo, nigo bakoiguswa." 
Psalms18:46 Omonene nigo are moyo! Ere oyore egetare kiane atogigwe! Nyasae ore ogotooreka kwane aimokererigwe igoro. 
Psalms18:47 Nyasae nigo akonduseria egesiomba, nabeke abanto b’ebisaku inse yane." 
Psalms18:48 Ere nigo antooretie korwa ase ababisa baane, akanyimokereria igoro ase abare mamincha yane, naende agantooria korwa ase abanto abatindi." 
Psalms18:49 Aye Omonene, ase ayio ningotogie ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, ninterere erieta riao ase okoritogia." 
Psalms18:50 Nyasae ong’eire inche, omoruoti oye, obobui obonene, oorokirie obwanchani botari koera asende, inche omoakwa amaguta oye. Inche Daudi, na ororeria rwane, goika kare na kare." 
Psalms19:1 Igoro nigo chikoorokia obonene bwa Nyasae; na eaanga ya igoro eraria emeremo y’amaboko aye. 
Psalms19:2 Rituko erimo riatebia erinde obonene obo, na obotuko obomo bwarareria obotuko bonde ayio ayio." 
Psalms19:3 Chinkwana chinde tichiri aroro, gose omonwa onde ogokwanwa tori, na eriogi riabo tiriri koigugwa." 
Psalms19:4 Eriogi riabo riagendire, riesiareire ase ense engima, na amang’ana abo aikire chinsinyo chi’ense. Nyasae okorire igoro koba obomenyo bw’erioba." 
Psalms19:5 Erioba nigo rigosoka buna omonyuomi ogosoka korwa mwaye, na riagoka buna omogosoria omokong’u okominyoka chimbero." 
Psalms19:6 Nigo rigosoka korwa ensemo eyemo ya igoro, naende riekumba riagenda gochia ensemo ende; gento kende tikeri gekobisekana korwa ase riberera riaye." 
Psalms19:7 Amachiko ’Omonene namaikeranu, nigo agokora omoyo oba omoyia. Oborori bw’Omonene nobw’ekeene, nigo akong’ainiyia oyotamanyeti amange." 
Psalms19:8 Amachiko ’Omonene namaronge, nigo akogokia enkoro; ring’ana Omonene achikire nerironge, nigo rikorenta oborabu ase amaiso." 
Psalms19:9 Okomoiroka Omonene nering’ana richenegete, okwo koragenderere kare na kare; okogamba kw’Omonene nogw’ekeene, na okw’oboronge." 
Psalms19:10 Ayio onsi nigo are amaya kobua etahabu, ee, kobua etahabu echenire na amansu kobua obooke, ee, kobua richoe ri’obooke." 
Psalms19:11 Amo nayio nigo ogokurera omosomba oo; oyio okoyarenda nigo akoegwa eng’eria enene y’obuya. 
Psalms19:12 Ning’o oranyare komanya amamocho aye? Omonene, nchene korwa ase amamocho aane abisekanete." 
Psalms19:13 Ontange inche, omosomba oo, tinkora ebibe bi’obomwenu; tobitiga ebio bingambere! Rirorio nimbe ntari na komocha, nimbe omosibore korwa ase ogosaria okonene." 
Psalms19:14 Aye Omonene, Egetare kiane na Omobooria one, anchera amang’ana aane na ebirengererio bire ase enkoro yane." 
Psalms20:1 Tiga Omonene aigwe ogosaba kwao ase engaki y’emechando. Erieta ria Nyasae o Yakobo rikorende. 
Psalms20:2 Ere nagotomere ogokonywa korwa ase obomenyo bwaye obochenu, na akoe chinguru korwa ase Sayoni." 
Psalms20:3 Tiga ainyore okorua kwao gwonsi, anche na kogokera ebing’wanso biao bionsi bi’ogosambwa." 
Psalms20:4 Tiga akoe ogokania gw’enkoro yao, na aikeranie emeroberio yao yonsi." 
Psalms20:5 Erio toake amariogi ’omogoko ase engencho y’obobui bwao, toimokererie igoro ebendera y’erieta ria Nyasae oito! Tiga Omonene aikeranie okoboria kwao kw’oboitongo." 
Psalms20:6 Bono namanyire ng’a Omonene nae omoakwa amaguta oye obobui, namoiranerie korwa aase aye aachenu aaria igoro, namoe obobui goetera ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio." 
Psalms20:7 Abanto bande nigo basemeretie chigari chi’esegi, na abande chibarasi chi’esegi, korende intwe nigo tosemeretie erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oito." 
Psalms20:8 Barabwo nigo baragochwe bagwe inse korende intwe nigo toragororoke totenene boronge. 
Psalms20:9 Aye Omonene, kae omoruoti oo gwachorire obobui; otoiranerie ekero togokorangeria!" 
Psalms21:1 Aye Omonene, omoruoti nigo agokerete chinguru chiao, na gochengera obobui kwamoeire." 
Psalms21:2 Kwamoeire okogania gw’enkoro yaye; na totangeti aya aboretie korwa asore. 
Psalms21:3 Aye kwamorenteire ogosesenigwa okuya; kwamobekeire egutwa y’etahabu echenire ase omotwe oye. 
Psalms21:4 Akagosaba ng’a omoe obogima, naye okabomoa; okamoa amatuko amange amenye kogenderera botambe." 
Psalms21:5 Amasikani ’omoruoti nigo are amanene, ekiagera aye kwamokonyire; kwamoeire obonene obonge na ogosika okonene." 
Psalms21:6 Ee, kwamokorire koba ogoseseneka gwa kare na kare, kwamogokeire, ekiagera ore amo nere botambe." 
Psalms21:7 Omoruoti nigo asemeretie Omonene, na ase engencho y’obwanchani bw’Omonene Ore Igoro bogendererete botambe ere takonyara kwoboa." 
Psalms21:8 Aye Omoruoti, noikeere ababisa bao bonsi; nobwate nokoboko kwao gw’okorio abwo bakogechete." 
Psalms21:9 Ekero orabaorokere nobakore booke buna omorero ekebemberi. Omonene nabasirie nendamwamu yaye enene; omorero nobasambe, bayie baere." 
Psalms21:10 Aye noite abana babo, obasirie korwa ase ense, na ororeria rwabo orosirie kegima korwa ase mwanyabanto." 
Psalms21:11 Kobarabe bagokora emeroberio y’ogokora bobe, gose korengereria chinchera chi’okorenta emechando, tibakobua," 
Psalms21:12 ekiagera nobaserie batame, nobarenge emegwe ase amasio abo." 
Psalms21:13 Aye Omonene otogigwe ase engencho ye chinguru chiao, intwe ntobe togotera ogotera kw’ogotogia okobua kwao." 
Psalms22:1 Nyasae one, Nyasae one, naki gwantigire? Nabeire nkorera ng’a ontoorie, korende kwambeereire aare." 
Psalms22:2 Aye Nyasae one! Nigo nkorera ase omobaso, korende tori kong’iraneria; nase obotuko boigo, korende tindi konyora ogotimoka." 
Psalms22:3 Nonya naboigo, aye nigo ore omochenu; aye obwate obonene, Abaisraeli nkogotogia bare." 
Psalms22:4 Chisokoro chiaito nigo chiagosemeretie, ee, nigo chiagosemeretie, naye ogachitooria." 
Psalms22:5 Barabwo nigo barerete asore, bakanyora ogotooreka, nigo babete bagosemeretie, na tibasoogetigwe." 
Psalms22:6 Inche nerikonde, tindi omonto, nigo ngochecherigwa nabanto na gochaywa." 
Psalms22:7 Abanto bonsi abakondora nigo bagonchecheria na gonsekerera; nigo bagoaka amariogi asende na gosinga‐singisia emetwe yabo," 
Psalms22:8 bagoteba, “Omonto oyo nigo asemeretie Omonene ng’a namotoorie, tiga amotoorie, ekiagera agokirie nere!”" 
Psalms22:9 Omonene, naye kwandusetie ase enda ya baba; naye kwabete gokondenda buya ase amaboko a baba." 
Psalms22:10 Nigo narutetwe asore korwa ase okoiborwa kwane, na korwa ekero narenge ase enda ya baba naye kwarenge Nyasae one." 
Psalms22:11 Tobaisa kobeera aare korwa asende, ekiagera emechando nigo ere ange, na monto onde tari orankonye." 
Psalms22:12 Chieri chinyinge nching’etanaine, ee, chieri chiria chia Basani chire ne chinguru nigo ching’etanaine." 
Psalms22:13 Baasamirie emenwa yabo gocha asende, yabeire buna chindo chikoronya na koruma." 
Psalms22:14 Nabeire buna amache aiteirwe inse; amauga onsi ay’omobere one achoga‐chogire; enkoro yane yabeire buna obochoe, yanyititokire ime yane." 
Psalms22:15 Chinguru chiane chiang’ereire, nabeire buna ekegionkorio ekiomo pa, oromeme rwane rwabwatanire namang’ang’ura; aye kwanyareirie ase amaroba nkwete." 
Psalms22:16 Chisese nigo ching’etanaine aande onsi, ee, ekeombe ki’abakori amabe nigo kere chinsemo chionsi; bambetire ebisanyi bi’amaboko, na ebi’amagoro boigo." 
Psalms22:17 Amauga ’omobere one atongororire ninyare koyabara; abanto nigo bakondigereria na kogokera obobe bwane. 
Psalms22:18 Baatananire chianga chiane ase egati yabo; baakeire eganchwa yaane obomera. 
Psalms22:19 Korende aye Omonene, tobeera aare korwa asende; aye ore chinguru chiane, ayerera onkonye!" 
Psalms22:20 Ntoorie korwa ase ogoitwa nomoro, tooria obogima bwane korwa ase okobua gwe chisese chiria!" 
Psalms22:21 Ntoorie, ondusie ase emenwa ye chindo chiria; nkonya korwa ase chingunchara chie ching’era!" 
Psalms22:22 Nindarie erieta riao ase abaminto, ase egati y’omosangererekano ningotogie." 
Psalms22:23 Inwe aba momoirogete Omonene, motogie! Inwe mwensi ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo, togia obonene bwaye! Inwe Abaisraeli bonsi, moiroke!" 
Psalms22:24 Ere tari gochaya emechando y’abwo bachandegete, gose koyegecha, tabisete obosio bwaye asebare; ekero bamorangeretie nigo abaigwete." 
Psalms22:25 Ekero inde ase omosangererekano omonene ningotogie. Chiira nariete ning’ikerane agwo ase obosio bw’abanto bamoirogete Omonene. 
Psalms22:26 Abwo bare abaitongo mbanyore endagera barie baigote. Abanto bakorigia Omonene mbabe bakomotogia, ne chinkoro chiaino nchigenderere koba moyo goika kare na kare." 
Psalms22:27 Abanto be chinsemo chionsi chi’ense mbainyore Omonene, bamoonchokere; chiamate chionsi chi’ebisaku nchimosasime." 
Psalms22:28 Obogambi nobw’Omonene, nere okogamba igoro ase ebisaku bionsi." 
Psalms22:29 Ee, abanto abatenenku bonsi bare ase ense goika batung’ame ase obosio bw’Omonene, abwo bonsi bakogenda ase chimbeera ime mbatung’ame ase obosio bwaye; naboigo nabwo batanyare korenda obogima bwabo bogenderere." 
Psalms22:30 Abanto b’ororeria rwaye mbabe bakomokorera; mbabe bagokwana igoro y’Omonene ase ebiaare bigochi‐gocha. 
Psalms22:31 Oboronge bwaye mbobe bokorarigwa ase abanto bataraiborwa, ng’a ere oikeranirie onsi." 
Psalms23:1 Omonene nomorisia one, tinkoremerwa kende," 
Psalms23:2 Nigo agontimokeria ase obonyansi obobese na kondaa gochia ase amache amakenonoku akwongora ng’ora. 
Psalms23:3 Ere nigo agokora omoyo one koba omoyia na kondaa ase chinchera chiaye chia boronge, ase engencho y’erieta riaye." 
Psalms23:4 Ninsa goeta ase omwenya bw’ekiriri ki’amakweri, tinkoiroka bobe bonde, ekiagera aye Omonene nigo ore amo nainche, enyimbo yao na enungu yao nabindemie." 
Psalms23:5 Kwambekeire endagera ase amasio ’ababisa baane; kwang’akire amaguta omotwe one ase okonyarigania, gwaichoirie egekombe kiane, ngoiteka kere." 
Psalms23:6 Ekeene, obuya na obwanchani botari koera nabintunyane amatuko onsi ay’obogima bwane; nainche nimenye ase enyomba y’Omonene goika kare na kare." 
Psalms24:1 Ense na ebinto bire aroro nebi’Omonene; oboiko bwonsi nobwaye, amo nabanto bamenyeteo." 
Psalms24:2 Nigo abegete oboroso bwaye igoro ase chinyancha, akabokong’ia igoro ase chindooche." 
Psalms24:3 Ning’o oragwenere gotiira ase egetunwa ki’Omonene? Ning’o oragwenere gotenena aase aye aachenu? 
Psalms24:4 Nomonto oria obwate amaboko atari na komocha, na enkoro echenegete, noria otari gosasima chinyasae chi’oborimo, gose gotiana ase obong’ainereria." 
Psalms24:5 Omonto oyio nonyore ogosesenigwa korwa ase Omonene; boigo nanyore oboronge korwa ase Nyasae ore ogotooreka kwaye. 
Psalms24:6 Naboigo ekegori ki’abakomorigia kere; abwo bakorigia barore obosio bwa Nyasae o Yakobo. 
Psalms24:7 Inwe ebiita, imokereria emekorogoto yaino igoro! Inwe ebiita bia kare, igoka, erinde Omoruoti bw’obonene asoe ime!" 
Psalms24:8 Inee! Omoruoti oyio bw’obonene nere ng’o? Ere n’Omonene ore ne chinguru na okobua, ere n’Omonene Omobui ase chisegi." 
Psalms24:9 Inwe ebiita, imokereria emetwe yaino igoro! Inwe ebiita bia kare, igoka, erinde Omoruoti bw’obonene asoe ime!" 
Psalms24:10 Inee! Omoruoti oyio bw’obonene nere ng’o? Ere n’Omonene bw’Emeganda; ere n’Omoruoti bw’Obonene. 
Psalms25:1 Aye Omonene, ngocha nde asore nomoyo one bwonsi." 
Psalms25:2 Aye Nyasae one, naye nsemeretie, tontiga nsookigwe; totiga ababisa baane bagokere okobugwa kwane." 
Psalms25:3 Monto onde bwensi ogosemeretie totiga asookigwe; korende abwo batigire obwegenwa engencho ende etaiyo basookigwe. 
Psalms25:4 Omonene, imanyie chinchera chiao; inyorokererie oboeto bwao." 
Psalms25:5 Ondaae ase ekeene kiao na onyorokererie, ekiagera aye Nyasae nogotooreka kwane, aye nigo ngosemeretie." 
Psalms25:6 Omonene, inyora amabera ao na obwanchani bwao botari koera, ekiagera nao biarenge korwa kare." 
Psalms25:7 Aye Omonene, tobaisa koinyora ebibe na ogosaria bi’obosae bwane; ong’inyore ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, na ase engencho y’obuya bwao." 
Psalms25:8 Omonene nigo are omuya na omonyene oboronge, ase ayio nigo akworokereria abanyabibe enchera bagwenerete kobwatia." 
Psalms25:9 Ere nigo akoraa abanto bare abaitongo ase enchera endonge, naende aborokereria komanya enchera yaye." 
Psalms25:10 Chinchera chionsi chi’Omonene nigo chire echi’obwanchani, na echi’obwegenwa, ase abwo barendete okobwatana kwaye na oborori bwaye." 
Psalms25:11 Omonene, ase engencho y’erieta riao onyabere ogosaria kwane, ekiagera nokonene." 
Psalms25:12 Kera omonto omoirogete Omonene, oyio Omonene nigo akomworokereria enchera agwenerete gochora." 
Psalms25:13 Omonto oyio nagenderera gosesenigwa, na ororeria rwaye ndoire ense." 
Psalms25:14 Omonene nigo are omosani bw’abanto bamoirogete, nigo akobamanyia okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania." 
Psalms25:15 Botambe nigo nkoba imorigeretie Omonene, nere orarusie amagoro aane ase oboreba." 
Psalms25:16 Aye omonene, ing’iranere ondorere amabera, ekiagera nigo inde inche bweka, naende nchandegete." 
Psalms25:17 Omoichano nigo oichire ase enkoro yane, ndusie ase obokong’u bwane," 
Psalms25:18 ndigererie orore obororo bwane na ogochandwa kwane, na onyabere ebibe biane bionsi." 
Psalms25:19 Rora ababisa baane bonsi buna bare abange; na buna bangechete nobotindi obonge. 
Psalms25:20 Renda omoyo one na ontoorie; naye ngotamera tobaisa gontiga nsookigwe. 
Psalms25:21 Tiga obwegenwa na oboronge bindende, ekiagera naye nsemeretie." 
Psalms25:22 Aye Nyasae, booria Abaisraeli korwa ase emechando yabo yonsi." 
Psalms26:1 Aye Omonene, ing’a oboronge bwane; ekiagera nabeire ntari na komocha; naboigo ngosemeretie aye Omonene ntari ne chitang’u‐tang’u." 
Psalms26:2 Omonene, inteeme na ondenge; orenge enkoro yane na ebirengererio biane." 
Psalms26:3 Nigo ndigereretie obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe na gotaara ase obwegenwa bwao. 
Psalms26:4 Tindi gosanga nabanyaborimo, gose tindi kogosoria nabang’ainereria." 
Psalms26:5 Inche nigo ngechete gosanga nabanto bagokora amabe, na tingwancha goikaransa amo nabanto abakayayu." 
Psalms26:6 Nigo ngoisaba amaboko aane ase okoorokia ng’a tindi na komocha, erio naetanana egesasimero kiao, aye Omonene," 
Psalms26:7 imba ngotera neriogi rinene gokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono na koraria ogokora kwao kw’ogokumia. 
Psalms26:8 Aye Omonene, inche nigo nyanchete obomenyo bwao, aase obonene bwao bore." 
Psalms26:9 Tosiria omoyo one ekero ogosiria abanyabibe; gose obogima bwane ekero ogosiria abaiti. 
Psalms26:10 Abanto abwo bagokora emeroberio y’obonyaka, na amaboko abo a borio nigo aichire namaaki." 
Psalms26:11 Inche nigo inde norogendo rotari na komocha; indorere amabera na omboorie. 
Psalms26:12 Amagoro aane nigo agotenena aase aateremu; nintogie Omonene ase egati y’omosangererekano omonene. 
Psalms27:1 Omonene nere omobaso one, na ogotooreka kwane, ning’o ndanyare koiroka? Omonene nere eburi ekengerete obogima bwane, monto ki ndanyare kwoboa?" 
Psalms27:2 Ekero abakori amabe bakong’umokera ng’a bamere, ababisa baane abwo bangechete nigo baragochwe na kogwa." 
Psalms27:3 Neba omoganda omonene bw’esegi ong’etananire, enkoro yane tekoba nobwoba; gose abanto nabachicha kondwania esegi, inche nigo ndagenderere koba noboremu." 
Psalms27:4 Nasabire ring’ana erimo korwa ase Omonene. Erio nario nganetie: Imenye ase enyomba y’Omonene ase amatuko onsi ay’obogima bwane, erinde ndore oboseera bw’Omonene na kona‐koboiranerera ase Hekalu yaye." 
Psalms27:5 Ase engaki y’emechando nantube ase ekiriri kiaye; nambise ase eema yaye ime, Nanyimokie ambeke ase egetare igoro." 
Psalms27:6 Ninyimokererigwa igoro ase ababisa baane bang’etanaine. Ase eema yaye ime nindue ebing’wanso inde nomochengo; ninterere Omonene na komotogia. 
Psalms27:7 Aye Omonene, oigwe okorera kwane, indorere amabera na oiranerie ogosaba kwane." 
Psalms27:8 Aye gwatebire, “Indigie ondore obosio bwane.” Na enkoro yane nigo ekogotebia, “Omonene, inche igo nkorigia obosio bwao.”" 
Psalms27:9 Aye Nyasae one ore ogotooreka kwane, tobisa obosio bwao korwa asende; tontiga kore nendamwamu. Aye kwabeire kogonkonya botambe, tontuguta gose tontiga." 
Psalms27:10 Onye tata na baba baraba bagontiga, Omonene nang’ire imbe oyoye." 
Psalms27:11 Aye Omonene, inyorokererie enchera yao; indaae ong’eterie aase aateremu, ntooreke korwa ase ababisa baane." 
Psalms27:12 Tobaisa kondua ase ababisa baane bankore buna banchete; birori b’oborimo banyimokeire, bagontianera nobotindi." 
Psalms27:13 Naenekirie ng’a nindore obuya bw’Omonene; ase ense y’abanto bare moyo. 
Psalms27:14 Remereria oganye Omonene, kabe omoremu, tokwa omoyo; ee, remereria oganye Omonene!" 
Psalms28:1 Aye Omonene, egetare kiane, naye nkorangeria, tibwanga konyigwa. Oise gokira, inche nigo ndabe oyomo bw’abakogenda ase chimbeera." 
Psalms28:2 Igwa eriogi ri’ogosaba kwane, ekero nkorera asore onkonye, ekero ndamborete amaboko aane igoro gocha ase obomenyo bwao obochenu." 
Psalms28:3 Tobaisa gonsiria amo nabakori amabe na abasaria, abanto abagokwana amang’ana ’omorembe nabanto bande, korende ime ase chinkoro chiabo nigo babagechete." 
Psalms28:4 Bae egesusuro koreng’ana nogokora kwabo na ebibe biabo, obaakane koreng’ana nemeremo y’amaboko abo, obae eki bagwenerete konyora." 
Psalms28:5 Abanto abwo tibari kobara ng’a ogokora kw’Omonene, gose emeremo y’amaboko aye, negento; ase ayio nabaiyerie inse, takobaimokia naende." 
Psalms28:6 Omonene atogigwe! Ere oigure okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo. 
Psalms28:7 Omonene nere chinguru chiane na enguba yane; nere nsemeretie ase enkoro yane, ere nankonyete. Ase ayio ninde nomosasoko ase enkoro yane; nimbe nkomoterera na komoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
Psalms28:8 Omonene nigo are chinguru ase abanto baye, na obotamero bw’ogotooreka ase omoakwa amaguta oye." 
Psalms28:9 Aye Omonene, tooria abanto bao abare omwando oo, obe omorisia obo, obabogorie goika kare na kare." 
Psalms29:1 Inwe abana ba Nyasae, motogie Omonene, atora obonene bw’Omonene ne chinguru chiaye." 
Psalms29:2 Togia erieta ri’Omonene rire nobonene obonge; mosasime Omonene mweboetie obochenu. 
Psalms29:3 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikoigweka ase chinyancha igoro; Nyasae bw’obonene nigo agoaka enkoba, Omonene nigo akogukura igoro ye chinyancha chinyinge." 
Psalms29:4 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikoigweka rire nokobua; eriogi ri’Omonene nigo riichire nobonene. 
Psalms29:5 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikobuna emete emecharake, ee, nigo rikobuna emecharake ya Lebanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Nigo agotira‐tiria emete eyio buna emori egotiria, na ebitunwa bia Lebanoni na Sirioni buna eng’era ensae." 
Psalms29:7 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rikomesia chinsase chi’omorero. 
Psalms29:8 Eriogi ri’Omonene nigo rigotengechia erooro; ee, nigo rigotengechia erooro ya Kadeshi." 
Psalms29:9 Eriogi erio ri’Omonene nigo rikorekeria chingabi, nigo rigosabora emete y’amanani yaba bosa. Ase Hekalu yaye ebitongwa bionsi biatogia obonene bwaye." 
Psalms29:10 Omonene nigo aikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene kogambera chioora; Omonene nere omoruoti ase ekerogo kiaye kare na kare. 
Psalms29:11 Omonene nae abanto baye chinguru, naende abasesenie ase okobaa omorembe." 
Psalms30:1 Aye Omonene, ningotogie, ekiagera kwanyimokirie korwa inse, tigwatigete ababisa baane betogie igoro yane." 
Psalms30:2 Aye, Omonene, Nyasae one, nigo narerete asore ng’a onkonye, na bono kwangwenirie." 
Psalms30:3 Omonene, gwatooririe omoyo one korwa aase abakure, kwang’iraneirie obogima tingenda ase oboina ime." 
Psalms30:4 Inwe abachenu baye, tera amatera ay’okobaka Omonene, iraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase erieta riaye richenu." 
Psalms30:5 Omonene nigo akoba nendamwamu ase engaki ensinini yoka, korende obuya bwaye nigo bokoba ase obogima bw’omonto. Ekerero nabo keranyare kobao ase omogoroba, korende mambia omogoko na omochengo nigo bigocha." 
Psalms30:6 Ekero amang’ana onsi arenge amaya asende, ngateba ng’a tinkobugwa." 
Psalms30:7 Aye Omonene, ase engencho y’obuya bwao ogakora egetunwa kiane kegatenena bokong’u, korende ekero kwabisete obosio bwao nkaba nobwoba." 
Psalms30:8 Erio nkarera asore, aye Omonene, ngakoboria ase oboitongo:" 
Psalms30:9 Mbitoki ki aye oranyore onye ngokwa na gosoa ase oboina ime? Inee! Orotu rw’amaroba ndonyare kogotogia? Ndonyare koraria obwegenwa bwao? 
Psalms30:10 Aye Omonene, inyigwe, ondorere amabera! Omonene, inkonye!" 
Psalms30:11 Aye kwaonchoire omoichano one okaba omochengo; kwandusirie eanga y’emechando, kwambekeire ey’omogoko." 
Psalms30:12 Ase ayio, omoyo one nogenderere kogotogia, togokira. Aye Omonene, Nyasae one, ninkoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono kogenderera kare na kare." 
Psalms31:1 Aye Omonene, naye ngotamera, tobaisa gontiga nsookigwe; ntoorie goetera ase oboronge bwao!" 
Psalms31:2 Tegerera oigwe amang’ana aane, obe omwango gontooria. Kabe egetare kiane ngotamera, na eburi yane enkong’u, na ontoorie!" 
Psalms31:3 Aye naye egetare kiane na eburi yane; ase engencho y’erieta riao ondaae na kondenda. 
Psalms31:4 Indusie korwa ase oboreba bobisire bombwate, aye naye egekengero kiane." 
Psalms31:5 Aye Omonene, Nyasae omwegenwa, naye kwambooririe." 
Psalms31:6 Nigo ngechete abanto bagosasima emegwekano ere bosa, korende nigo ngosemeretie aye Omonene." 
Psalms31:7 Ningoke na gochenga ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao botari koera; aye igo ogwechandera emechando yane, na kondengereria mono ase ogochandwa kwane." 
Psalms31:8 Tombegeti ase amaboko ’omobisa one; korende gwatenenirie amagoro aane aase are aagare. 
Psalms31:9 Aye Omonene, ndorere amabera, ekiagera nigo mbwate emechando; amaiso aane arimeire ime ase engencho y’obororo, omoyo one ogoyire, naboigo nomobere one." 
Psalms31:10 Ase obogima bwane bwonsi nabeire inde nemechando; na ase emiaka yane yonsi nabeire inde nomoichano; chinguru chiane chiaerire ase engencho y’ogosaria kwane; amauga ’omobere one omire pa. 
Psalms31:11 Ababisa baane bonsi nigo bagonchecheria, na abasani baane boigo. Abanto baamanyete banyoboire; bonsi abakondora ase enchera nigo bagontama." 
Psalms31:12 Abanto banyebire buna bakweba omonto okure; nabeire buna enyongo yatekire. 
Psalms31:13 Nigo nkoigwa ababisa baane bakomonyererana; okogosa nigo kong’etanaine. Abwo nigo bagosangererekana amo kogamba, bagokora omoroberio bw’okong’ita." 
Psalms31:14 Korende inche nigo ngosemeretie aye Omonene. Nigo ngoteba, “Aye naye Nyasae one.”" 
Psalms31:15 Obogima bwane nigo bore ase amaboko ao; ntoorie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baane na ay’abachandi baane. 
Psalms31:16 Ing’onchorere obosio bwao, inche omosomba oo, ontoorie ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms31:17 Aye Omonene, tontiga nsookigwe, ekiagera nigo ngokorangeria. Tiga abakori amabe basookigwe, bagende aase abakure babe amamama." 
Psalms31:18 Kiria emenwa y’abwo bagokwana amang’ana ’oborimo, abwo bagokwana amang’ana amabe igoro y’oyore omoronge, na gokwana amang’ana ’oboenenu na ay’ogochaya." 
Psalms31:19 Naki obuya bwao bore obonge na obw’ogokumigwa, obwo kwagacheire abanto abakoirogete, ase amasio a mwanyabanto nigo okoboorokia ase abakogotamera." 
Psalms31:20 Nigo okobabisa agwo asore, ase okobarenda korwa ase emeroberio emebe y’abanto; nigo okobarenda ase ekiriri kiao korwa ase abanto abang’achi." 
Psalms31:21 Omonene atogigwe! Nigo anyorogetie obwanchani bwaye bw’ogokumia; akandenda ase omochie omokong’u. 
Psalms31:22 Ekero narenge nobwoba nigo narengereretie, ngateba; “Bono naserigwe gochia aare korwa ase obosio bwao!” Korende nigo kwaigwete okoboria kwane kw’oboitongo, ekero narerete asore ng’a onkonye." 
Psalms31:23 Mwanche Omonene, inwe abachenu baye mwensi! Omonene nigo akobarenda buya abanto bare abegenwa, korende nigo akorua egesusuro ase oyore omomwenu." 
Psalms31:24 Inwe mwensi aba momosemeretie Omonene, kabe ne chinguru, mobe abaremu!" 
Psalms32:1 Nasesenirie omonto oyo bwabeirwe ogosaria kwaye, na ebibe biaye biatubirwe." 
Psalms32:2 Nasesenirie omonto oyo Omonene atabarereti okomocha kwaye, oyo otari nobong’ainereria ase omoyo oye ime." 
Psalms32:3 Ekero konya ntaraorokia ebibe biane, omobere one okoma pa ase okwerera omobaso boira." 
Psalms32:4 Omobaso na obotuko okoboko kwao gokanditoera negesusuro; chinguru chiane chikaera buna amache akoera ekero ki’egurugura. 
Psalms32:5 Erio ngakoorokeria ebibe biane, gose tinakobisete okomocha kwane, ngateba, “Nimoorokerie Omonene ogosaria kwane,” erio okanyabera ebibe biane bionsi." 
Psalms32:6 Ase ayio, kera omonto oyokoirogete tiga agosabe ase engaki y’emechando. Ekero amache amange agotirimboka gocha bwango, tabaisa komoikera." 
Psalms32:7 Aye naye obwebiso bwane, nondendete korwa ase emechando, nimbe nomogoko na omochengo, ekiagera gwantooririe." 
Psalms32:8 Ninkworokererie na gokoraa ase enchera ogwenerete kogenda; ningosemie, na amaiso aane nakorigererie." 
Psalms32:9 Timoba buna chibarasi ne chiyombo chitari nobong’aini, echigwenerete chibekerwe chinkini na ebigobanio bi’ogochigambera." 
Psalms32:10 Omokori amabe nare namaakwa amange, korende oyomosemeretie Omonene, Omonene nigo amoetananeretie nobwanchani botari koera." 
Psalms32:11 Inwe abanyene oboronge, mogokere Omonene na komochengera; inwe mwensi abamore ne chinkoro chindonge, aka eriogi nomogoko." 
Psalms33:1 Inwe abanto abaronge, mochengere Omonene! Inwe abamore ne chinkoro chindonge goika motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms33:2 Moakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono ase okobugia amakano ’ebirigisa, motogie ase okobugia amakano are ne chinga ikomi!" 
Psalms33:3 Moterere ogotera okoyia, na kobugia ase eriogi rireng’aine buya na komochengera!" 
Psalms33:4 Naki ring’ana ri’Omonene nigo rire boronge, na ogokora kwaye gwonsi nigo agokora ase obwegenwa." 
Psalms33:5 Ere nigo anchete ayare boronge na ekeene, na ense nigo eichire nobwanchani bw’Omonene botari koera." 
Psalms33:6 Ase chinguru chie ring’ana ri’Omonene igoro egatongwa, na ase okobua kwe ring’ana riaye erioba na omotienyi ne ching’enang’eni bigatongwa." 
Psalms33:7 Igo agosangereria amache ’enyancha, buna amache are enyongo ime, obeka chindiba aase abo." 
Psalms33:8 Ense yonsi neiroke Omonene, na bonsi abamenyete ase ense bamwoboe." 
Psalms33:9 Naki ere agakwana, na ayio agakoreka; agachika, na ayio akabao." 
Psalms33:10 Omonene nigo akoonchorana emeroberio y’abanto b’ebisaku, na gosaria okogamba kwa mwanyabanto kwaba bosa." 
Psalms33:11 Okogamba kw’Omonene nigo goteneine kare na kare; emeroberio yaye nigo egendererete ebiaare ase ebiaare. 
Psalms33:12 Ngesesenirie egesaku eke Omonene are Nyasae obo, abanto aba achorete babe omwando oye." 
Psalms33:13 Omonene nigo arigereretie korwa igoro, oroche mwanyabanto bonsi." 
Psalms33:14 Korwa agwo ase aikaransete, nigo akobagambera bonsi abamenyete ase ense." 
Psalms33:15 Nere otongete chinkoro chi’abanto bonsi, namanyete korenga ogokora kwabo gwonsi." 
Psalms33:16 Omoruoti tari orabue nomoganda oye omonene bw’abarwani, gose etuoni teri eratoorigwe ne chinguru chiaye chinyinge." 
Psalms33:17 Gosemeria chibarasi chi’esegi, ayio mbosa, tichikonyara kobua, chinguru chiabo chinyinge tichigotooria omonto." 
Psalms33:18 Rora amaiso ’Omonene nigo abarigereretie abwo bamoirogete, abwo basemeretie obwanchani bwaye botari koera." 
Psalms33:19 Omonene natoorie emioyo yabo korwa ase amakweri, tibakwa ekero gi’enchara." 
Psalms33:20 Emioyo yaito nigo emoganyete Omonene, ere nere ogokonywa gwaito, na enguba yaito." 
Psalms33:21 Ee, chinkoro chiaito nchimogokerete, ekiagera tosemeretie erieta riaye richenu." 
Psalms33:22 Omonene, obwanchani bwao botari koera bobe amo naintwe, ekiagera naye togosemeretie." 
Psalms34:1 Nimbake Omonene chingaki chionsi, ase omonwa one nimotogie botambe." 
Psalms34:2 Ase omoyo one ninyetogerie Omonene, abwo bachayire tiga bayaigwe bagoke." 
Psalms34:3 Raria obonene bw’Omonene amo nainche toimokererie erieta riaye igoro twensi amo. 
Psalms34:4 Nkarangeria Omonene, nere akang’iraneria, akandusia korwa ase obwoba bwane bwonsi." 
Psalms34:5 Abwo bamorigereretie nigo bakomeka‐meka bare nomogoko, gose amasio abo takororekana are nobosooku." 
Psalms34:6 Omonto omotaka nigo akorera, na Omonene omoigwa, omotooria korwa ase emechando yaye yonsi." 
Psalms34:7 Omomalaika bw’Omonene nigo akorenda na goetanana abwo bamoirogete Omonene na kobatooria. 
Psalms34:8 Moteeme Omonene, morore ng’a nomuya. Nasesenirie omonto oria omotameire." 
Psalms34:9 Moiroke Omonene, inwe abachenu baye, naki abwo bamoirogete tibakoremerwa kende." 
Psalms34:10 Chindo chinsae nachinyare koremerwa na koba nenchara, korende abwo bakomorigia Omonene tibakoremerwa kende gionsi kere ekiya." 
Psalms34:11 Abana baane, inchuo montegerere, mborokererie buna moramoiroke Omonene." 
Psalms34:12 Inee! Aye nomonto bwanchete obogima? Oganetie obe moyo amatuko amange, na korora amaya?" 
Psalms34:13 Rirorio tanga oromeme rwao tirokwana amabe, na ebikoba biao tibikwana obong’ainereria." 
Psalms34:14 Otige amabe, okore amaya; origie omorembe na koyobwata mono." 
Psalms34:15 Amaiso ’Omonene nigo arigereretie abanyene oboronge, na amato aye nigo akoigwa ebirero biabo." 
Psalms34:16 Obosio bw’Omonene nigo bore mamincha y’abwo bagokora amabe, nabasirie korwa ase ense, tibainyorwa." 
Psalms34:17 Ekero abanyene oboronge bakorera ng’a bakonywe, Omonene nigo akobaigwa na kobatooria korwa ase emechando yabo yonsi." 
Psalms34:18 Omonene nigo are ang’e nabwo chinkoro chiabo chiabunekire, nigo akobatooria abwo berusirie moyo." 
Psalms34:19 Omonyene oboronge nigo akonyora emechando emenge, korende Omonene namotoorie korwa ase eyio yonsi;" 
Psalms34:20 nigo akorenda amauga aye onsi, rinde tiribunwa nonya nerimo." 
Psalms34:21 Obobe nigo boraite omokori amabe, na abwo bagechete omonyene oboronge nabagambigwe, banyore egesusuro." 
Psalms34:22 Omonene nigo akobooria emioyo y’abasomba baye, gose onde tari ase abwo bakomotamera orache kogambigwa." 
Psalms35:1 Aye Omonene, engereria abanto abwo bakoengererania nainche, rwania abwo bakondwania!" 
Psalms35:2 Bogoria enguba na eng’aya, imoka onkonye!" 
Psalms35:3 Aye orute abanto abwo bakombwatia ritimo na esimisi! Ontebie ase omoyo one, “Ninche Omotooria oo.”" 
Psalms35:4 Abanto abwo bakorigia gosiria obogima bwane, tiga babugwe na gosookigwa. Abwo bagokora emeroberio emebe y’okong’ita, tiga bairanigwe babe nobosooku." 
Psalms35:5 Barabwo tiga babe buna omoiriro okoirurukigwa nomwaga, na omomalaika bw’Omonene abe okobaiyeria." 
Psalms35:6 Omosunte na oboterere bibe ase enchera bagoetera, na omomalaika bw’Omonene abe okobabwata abasirie." 
Psalms35:7 Abanto abwo bambekeire oboreba bobisi engencho ende etaiyo, na bakunyire eirima ng’a basirie obogima bwane." 
Psalms35:8 Ogosirigwa tiga kobanyore mobosokano; oboreba obwo bantegeire tiga bobabwate barabwo abanyene, tiga bagwe imeo abanyene na gosirigwa." 
Psalms35:9 Omoyo one nogoke ase Omonene na gochenga ase engencho y’ogotooreka kwaye. 
Psalms35:10 Amauga onsi ay’omobere one natebe, “Aye Omonene, ning’o onga buna aye? Aye ogotooria oyo otari ne chinguru korwa ase oyore ne chinguru komobua, ee, nigo ogotooria oyo otari ne chinguru naende omoremerwa, korwa ase oyo okomochanda.”" 
Psalms35:11 Birori bi’oborimo nigo bakonyimokera, bakomboria ase amang’ana ntamanyeti." 
Psalms35:12 Abanto abwo nigo bakong’akana amabe ase amaya, nerusirie moyo." 
Psalms35:13 Ekero abanto abwo barwarete nigo neboyetie eanga y’okweumia na goichana; ngechanda ase okweng’ata, ngasaba nturegete omotwe." 
Psalms35:14 Nkabechandera buna nigo barenge abasani baane gose abaminto; nigo nabegete eanga y’okweumia, nturegete omotwe buna omonto okweumia ekero ng’ina akure." 
Psalms35:15 Korende ekero narenge ase emechando, nigo basangererekanete amo bakagoka. Abanto batagwenerete, aba ntamanyeti bakaba bagonchecheria batari gotiga." 
Psalms35:16 Abatamoirogeti Omonene nigo banchayete na gonchecheria, bakangecha bakaba bakondiananeria amaino." 
Psalms35:17 Omonene, ngoika ririri orabe koyarigereretie rioka? Intaborie korwa ase ogosiria barobeirie, tooria obogima bwane korwa ase chindo echio!" 
Psalms35:18 Erio ninkoiranerie ng’a mbuya mono agwo ase omosangererekano omonene, ningotogie ase omoganda omonene bw’abanto." 
Psalms35:19 Totiga ababisa baane bagoke igoro yane engencho ende etaiyo; totiga abwo bangechete bosa bagosimanera amaiso bankore bobe. 
Psalms35:20 Abanto abwo tibari gokwana amang’ana akorenta omorembe; nigo bakona‐korigia amang’ana ’obong’ainereria igoro y’abanto abwo bare abatoereru ase ense. 
Psalms35:21 Abwo nigo bagwasamia emenwa yabo bateba: “Ahaa! Ahaa! Ntwayarora namaiso aito.” 
Psalms35:22 Aye Omonene, kwarorire amang’ana ayio, tokira‐kiri. Omonene, tobaisa kobeera aare korwa asende!" 
Psalms35:23 Nyasae one ore Omonene one, tabobora, oimokerere igoro, erinde orwanerere oboronge bwane na amang’ana aane." 
Psalms35:24 Aye Omonene, Nyasae one, nacha ekina kiane koreng’ana noboronge bwao, tobaisa gotiga ababisa baane bagoke igoro yane." 
Psalms35:25 Tobatiga batebe, “Bono twamonyorire buna twaganetie.” Tobatiga batebe, “Bono twamobuire.”" 
Psalms35:26 Abanto abwo bakogokera emechando yane, tiga basookigwe na batantanigwe; abwo bagwetogia igoro yane, tiga baboigwe obosooku na ogochaywa." 
Psalms35:27 Abanto abwo banchete ng’a ng’egwe oboronge bwane, tiga baake eriogi ri’omogoko na omochengo, bagenderere goteba, “Omonene noyo bw’obonene! Ee, nigo agokirie namaya omosomba oye akonyora!”" 
Psalms35:28 Erio oromeme rwane ndogenderere koraria oboronge bwao, na ogotogigwa kwao, omobaso boira." 
Psalms36:1 Ebibe nigo bigokwana nomonto omokori amabe ase enkoro yaye ime; okomoiroka Nyasae tikori ase obosio bwaye. 
Psalms36:2 Omonto oyo nigo akweremia omonyene ase okweng’aina, ng’a ebibe biaye tibikomanyekana bigechwe." 
Psalms36:3 Amang’ana omonto oyio agokwana nigo are ay’ogosaria na obong’ainereria; ere otigire gokora amang’ana ’obong’aini na ayare amaya. 
Psalms36:4 Ekero araire borere bwaye nigo agokora emeroberio y’amabe, na kobwatia chinchera chitari chingiya, tari kwanga obobe bonde bwonsi." 
Psalms36:5 Aye Omonene, obwanchani bwao botari koera nigo bogoika aaria igoro, na obwegenwa bwao nigo boigete ase amare igoro." 
Psalms36:6 Aye Nyasae, oboronge bwao nigo boteneine bokong’u buna ebitunwa biao. Okogamba kwao nigo kore buna chindiba chintambe, aye nigo orendete mwanyabanto ne ching’iti boigo." 
Psalms36:7 Nyasae, naki obwanchani bwao bwa botambe bore obonene! Mwanyabanto nigo bagotamera ekiriri gie chimbaba chiao." 
Psalms36:8 Nigo bagoisanekigwa nobonoru bokorwa ase enyomba yao, aye nobae banywe korwa ase orooche rwao rw’okogokia." 
Psalms36:9 Naye ore ensoko y’obogima, na ase omobaso oo nigo tokorora omobaso." 
Psalms36:10 Genderera koorokia obwanchani bwao obonene ase abwo bakomanyete, na oboronge bwao ase abwo bare ne chinkoro chindonge." 
Psalms36:11 Totiga amagoro ’abaenenu ang’ike ang’e kondwania, gose amaboko ’abakori amabe anserie." 
Psalms36:12 Rora aase abakori amabe bagure inse, baiyerigwe tibakonyara koboka naende." 
Psalms37:1 Togechigwa ase engencho y’abakori amabe, toba ne ribero ase abakori amabe." 
Psalms37:2 Barabwo mbasirigwe bwango, basire buna obonyansi basusane buna ebimeri ebibese." 
Psalms37:3 Mosemerie Omonene okore ayare amaya, erio nario oramenye ase ense, obe korendire buya." 
Psalms37:4 Goka ase Omonene, ere nakoe okogania gw’enkoro yao." 
Psalms37:5 Erue ase Omonene mosemerie, nere nagokonye." 
Psalms37:6 Omonene naorokie oboronge bwao buna akoorokia oborabu, na ekeene kiao buna amasase a mobaso gati." 
Psalms37:7 Obe nobotoereru ase obosio bw’Omonene, omoganye noboremereria. Togechigwa nomonto okogenderera buya ase enchera yaye, omonto oyio okoroberia ogosaria." 
Psalms37:8 Bwetange korwa ase endamwamu, tiga ekeririanda kegima. Togechigwa; okogechigwa nigo koragere okore ebibe." 
Psalms37:9 Abanyabibe mbasirigwe kegima, korende abamoganyete Omonene mbaire ense ebe eyabo." 
Psalms37:10 Netigarete engaki ensinini, na omokori amabe asirigwe; nobe gokorigereria mono aase aye, takonyorekana oreo." 
Psalms37:11 Abaitongo mbaire ense ebe eyabo, barabwo mbagoke na goisaneka ase obonge bw’omorembe." 
Psalms37:12 Omokori amabe nigo agokora omoroberio bw’ogoita oyore omoronge, na komoriananeria amaino." 
Psalms37:13 Omonene nasekerere omokori amabe, ekiagera aroche ng’a rituko ri’ogosirigwa kwaye ndichiche." 
Psalms37:14 Abakori amabe nigo bagosomora emeyio yabo na batinga amata abo, erinde baite abanto abataka na abaremeire, baite na abakobwatia chinchera chi’oboronge." 
Psalms37:15 Emeyio yabo nebete chinkoro chiabo abanyene, na amata abo nabunwe." 
Psalms37:16 Ebinto ebike omonto omonyaboronge abwate, nigo bire ebiya kobua ebinge biria abakori amabe abange babwate." 
Psalms37:17 Abakori amabe mbaurwe chinguru echi babwate, korende Omonene nagenderere koa abanyaboronge chinguru." 
Psalms37:18 Omonene nigo amanyete amatuko ’abamoirogete, na omwando obo nogenderere kobao kare na kare." 
Psalms37:19 Barabwo tibari gosookigwa ase chingaki chi’amabe, ase chingaki chi’enchara nigo bakoigota." 
Psalms37:20 Korende abakori amabe mbasirigwe; ababisa b’Omonene nigo bare buna obuya bw’ebisicha, nigo barasire, ee, mbasire buna erioki rigosira kegima." 
Psalms37:21 Omokori amabe nigo akoira egento singo tagokeirania, korende omonto omoronge nigo are namabera na korua ebiegwa," 
Psalms37:22 Abanto abwo Omonene asesenirie mbaire ense ebe eyabo, korende abwo aragereirie mbasirigwe kegima." 
Psalms37:23 Omonene nigo akobeka orogendo rw’omonto omoronge chinguru, na kogokigwa narororwo." 
Psalms37:24 Omonto oyio naisa kogochwa, takogwa inse, ekiagera Omonene namobwatete okoboko kwaye." 
Psalms37:25 Nigo narenge omwana, bono nagotire, korende tinana‐korora omonto omoronge ogotigwa bosa, gose abana baye bakoborwa endagera." 
Psalms37:26 Omonto oyio nigo akogenderera kona‐korua ebiegwa na korua singo, abana baye nigo barasesenigwe." 
Psalms37:27 Tiga gokora amabe, kora ayare amaya, igo nario orachie kare." 
Psalms37:28 Omonene nigo anchete oboronge; tagotiga abachenu baye. Barabwo mbarendwe goika kare na kare, korende ororeria rw’abakori amabe ndosirigwe kegima." 
Psalms37:29 Abanyene oboronge mbaire ense ebe eyabo, erio bagenderere komenyao botambe." 
Psalms37:30 Omonwa bw’omonto omoronge nigo agokwana amang’ana ’obong’aini, na oromeme rwaye nigo rogosokia ay’ekeene." 
Psalms37:31 Amachiko a Nyasae oye nigo abeerete ase enkoro y’omonto oyio; ase agoeta tari gotererigwa. 
Psalms37:32 Omokori amabe nigo agotengera omonto omoronge, erio origia chinchera chi’okomoita." 
Psalms37:33 Omonene tagotiga omonto omoronge ase okobua kw’omokori amabe, gose takomotiga abugwe ekero asoeirwe ase ekegambero." 
Psalms37:34 Ganya Omonene na obwatie enchera yaye, nere nakoimokererie igoro akoe ense ebe eyao; erio norigererie orore buna abanyabibe bagosirigwa." 
Psalms37:35 Narorire omokori amabe otindire ase obomwenu, akaba okoranda buna omote ogokina ase amaroba amatobu." 
Psalms37:36 Nyuma y’amatuko amake ngaetera aase agwo, korende tarengeo, nkamorigia, korende tinamonyora aande." 
Psalms37:37 Rigereria omonto omoikeranu, ee, origererie omonto ore nenkoro endonge, norore ng’a omonto ogokora omorembe nere orachie kare." 
Psalms37:38 Korende abasaria mbasirigwe bonsi pi, na ororeria rw’abakori amabe tirokogenderera." 
Psalms37:39 Ogotooreka kw’abanyaboronge nigo gokorwa ase Omonene, ere nere obotamero bwabo ase chingaki chi’emechando." 
Psalms37:40 Omonene nigo akobakonya na kobatooria; nigo akobarusia korwa ase abakori amabe, obatooria, ekiagera bakomotamera." 
Psalms38:1 Omonene, tontogonyera ekero ore nendamwamu, tong’a egesusuro gi’okondongeyia ekero ore nekeririanda." 
Psalms38:2 Kwandasire emegwe yao yasoeire ime yane, kwanyiyeirie inse nokoboko kwao." 
Psalms38:3 Ase engencho y’ekeririanda kiao omobere one bwensi orwarire, nase engencho y’ebibe biane amauga aane nigo akonyatia." 
Psalms38:4 Ebibe biane biantubire nonya nomotwe bwonsi, bianditoeire na kombua." 
Psalms38:5 Amaote aane agundire atiokire bobe ase engencho y’oboriri bwane. 
Psalms38:6 Igo ng’umaime na koumata, nigo ingendererete korera na goichana omobaso boira." 
Psalms38:7 Chibachwa chiane nigo chikoyia buna omorero, omobere one bwonsi orwarire." 
Psalms38:8 Chinguru chiane chionsi chiaerire, nasenyentekire, nigo nkona‐kweumia ase engencho y’obororo bw’enkoro yane." 
Psalms38:9 Omonene, aye nigo omanyete okogania kwane gwonsi, na ogochandeka kwane tikobisekaneti asore." 
Psalms38:10 Enkoro yane nigo egotiesana, chinguru chiang’ereire; amaiso aane asoirwe orotutu, tindi korora." 
Psalms38:11 Abanchi na abasani baane babeereire aare korwa ase amaakwa aane, na abanto baminto boigo bambeereire aare." 
Psalms38:12 Abanto abwo baganetie gosiria obogima bwane bantegeire oboreba; na abwo baganetie gonkora bobe nigo bagokwana amang’ana ’ogosirigwa kwane, bakorengereria amang’ana ’obong’ainereria omobaso boira." 
Psalms38:13 Korende inche nabeire buna omotino, tindi koigwa, nabeire buna omonto rimama, tindi gokwana." 
Psalms38:14 Ee, inche nabeire buna omonto otari koigwa, buna oyo omonwa oye otabwati amang’ana okoiraneria." 
Psalms38:15 Korende Omonene, naye nsemereretie. Omonene, Nyasae one, naye oranyare koiraneria." 
Psalms38:16 Nigo nkogosaba ng’a ababisa baane tibagokera emechando yane; na tibetogeria okogwa kwane. 
Psalms38:17 Inche nabeereire ang’e kogwa, na obororo bwane nigo bogendererete kobeera asende." 
Psalms38:18 Bono nigo nkoorokia ogosaria kwane, neitirie ase engencho y’ebibe biane." 
Psalms38:19 Ababisa baane nigo bare abagima, naende bare ne chinguru, abwo bangechete bosa nabange bare." 
Psalms38:20 Abwo bagoakana amabe ase amaya nigo babeire ababisa baane, ekiagera ngokora ayare amaya." 
Psalms38:21 Omonene, tontiga! Aye Nyasae one, tobaisa kombeera aare!" 
Psalms38:22 Aye Omonene ore ogotooreka kwane, ayerera onkonye!" 
Psalms39:1 Ngateba, “Nindende orogendo rwane, timbaisa gokora ebibe ekero ngokwana. Nimbeke omonwa one ekeokio ekero abakori amabe bare ase obosio bwane.”" 
Psalms39:2 Igo narenge nkirete‐kiri, tinare gokwana, tinaba na koremigwa konde, obororo bwane bokamenteka mono," 
Psalms39:3 enkoro yane ekaba ekoyia ime yane. Ekero naare ndengereretie aya, omorero ogoka, tinare konyara gwetanga ogokwana kwane." 
Psalms39:4 Omonene, imanyie omoerio bw’amatuko aane, na ekerengo ki’amatuko aane naki keng’ana, erinde imanye ng’a obogima bwane nobweng’e." 
Psalms39:5 Naama! Amatuko kwang’ete nameng’e mono. Engaki y’obogima bwane nigo ere buna teri gento ase obosio bwao. Amaene, kera omonto, nonya bwetenenerete bokong’u, nigo agoeta bwango buna omwaga." 
Psalms39:6 Amaene, mwanyabanto nigo agotaara ore buna omogwekano okorora ase okorota; nigo agwechanda bosa; asangereria enibo, korende tamanyeti gose ning’o orache koyeria." 
Psalms39:7 Na bono Omonene, inki nganyete? Naye bweka nsemeretie." 
Psalms39:8 Ntoorie korwa ase ogosaria kwane, tontiga nsekererwe noyio ore omoriri." 
Psalms39:9 Nigo nkirete‐kiri, tindi komumora omonwa one, ekiagera aye naye gwakorete ayio." 
Psalms39:10 Rusia egesusuro kiao asende; naerire ase ogoakwa gw’okoboko kwao. 
Psalms39:11 Ekero okorongeyia omonto ase okomotogonyera ase engencho y’ebibe, nigo ogosiria obonene bwaye, koreng’ana buna ebigwankwa bikoria chianga. Amaene, mwanyabanto nigo anga buna omwaga." 
Psalms39:12 Aye Omonene, igwa ogosaba kwane, otegerere okorera kwane; tokira‐kiri ekero nkoiyeria amariga, ekiagera inche nomogeni oo inde, na omoeti buna chisokoro chiane chiarenge." 
Psalms39:13 Intige, inyore chinguru chinyia ntararua ase ense, na ntabeo naende." 
Psalms40:1 Nkaba imoganyete Omonene ase okoremereria, na ere akanyeonchorera akaigwa ekerero kiane." 
Psalms40:2 Ere akandusia korwa ase engoro y’obosareku, korwa ase etintira na esike; agatenenia amagoro aane ase egetare igoro, agankong’ia ase ngoeta." 
Psalms40:3 Akanyorokereria gotera ogotera okoyia, ogotera gw’okomotogia Nyasae oito. Abange nabayarore na koiroka, na igo mbamosemerie Omonene." 
Psalms40:4 Nasesenirie omonto oria omosemeretie Omonene, otari kweonchora gochia ase abanto abaenenu, gose ase abwo bagosira ase okoonchokera chinyasae chi’oborimo." 
Psalms40:5 Aye Omonene, Nyasae one, ogokora kwao na ebirengererio biao asetore nebi’ogokumia; onde tari orareng’anigwe naye. Ninganetie koraria ayio na koyakwana, korende namange mono, takobareka." 
Psalms40:6 Ebing’wanso na ebiruegwa tobiganeti, korende amato aane kwayatinoire. Ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’ebibe tobiganeti." 
Psalms40:7 Erio ngateba, “Rigereria, nachire; ase ebuku nigo erikire aya ngwenrete gokora." 
Psalms40:8 Aye Nyasae one, ninganetie nkore ogwancha kwao, amachiko ao nigo are ase enkoro yane ime.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ase omosangererekano omonene narandirie amang’ana amaya ay’oboronge; aye Omonene, nomanyete ng’a tingotanga ebikoba biane tibiyakwana." 
Psalms40:10 Tinyegachereti inche bweka oboronge bwao ase enkoro yane ime; korende nararirie obwegenwa bwao, na ogotooreka kwao. Timbiseti obuya bwao, na obwegenwa bwao, korwa ase omosangererekano omonene." 
Psalms40:11 Aye Omonene, tondina amabera ao! Obuya na obwegenwa bwao bindende botambe." 
Psalms40:12 Amabe amange atari kobareka nigo ang’etanaine. Ebibe biane biambuire, goika tinkonyara korora; biabeire ebinge kobua etukia y’omotwe one, goika nerusirie moyo." 
Psalms40:13 Omonene, koranche ontoorie! Omonene, oche bwango onkonye!" 
Psalms40:14 Abwo bonsi barigetie kong’ita, tiga basookigwe na batantanigwe bonsi amo, na abwo baganetie obobe banyore, tiga bairanigwe nyuma barore obosooku." 
Psalms40:15 Abwo bagonsiereria bagoteba, “Kiamonyorire!” Tiga bakirigwe‐kiri ase obosooku bwabo." 
Psalms40:16 Korende abwo bonsi bagokorigia, tiga bakogokere na kogochengera; abwo banchete ogotooreka kwao batebe botambe, “Omonene nigo are omonene!”" 
Psalms40:17 Inche nigo inde omotaka na omoremerwa, korende Omonene nigo akonyechandera. Naye ore ogokonywa kwane, na ogotooreka kwane. Aye Nyasae one, totebana!" 
Psalms41:1 Nasesenirie omonto oyo ogwechandera abataka. Ekero aranyorwe nemechando, Omonene namokonye." 
Psalms41:2 Omonene amorende na komokorera agenderere koba moyo, erinde arokwe oyosesenirie ase ense. Omonene tagotiga ababisa bamokorere buna banchete." 
Psalms41:3 Omonene namorende ekero are borere arwarete, namogusuerie oborwaire bwaye." 
Psalms41:4 Inche nigo natebete, “Omonene, indorera amabera, ingwenie omoyo one, ekiagera nakorire ebibe asore.”" 
Psalms41:5 Ababisa baane nigo bagokwana amang’ana amabe igoro yane, bateba, “Omonto oyo indi arakwe na erieta riaye riebwe kegima?”" 
Psalms41:6 Onde bwensi ogocha kondora nigo agokwana amang’ana ’oborimo, enkoro yaye nigo egosangereria amabe, erio ogenda isiko oraria amang’ana ayio amabe." 
Psalms41:7 Abwo bonsi bangechete nigo bakomonyererana igoro yane, nigo bakorire omoroberio bw’ogonkora bobe." 
Psalms41:8 Barabwo nigo bagoteba, “Noborwaire boramoite bwamonyorire, takoboka naende korwa ase araire.”" 
Psalms41:9 Nonya nomosani one negenete, tware koragera komo, ong’akire chintacho." 
Psalms41:10 Omonene, ndorera amabera, ngwenie, erinde ing’akane ababisa baane obobe bwabo." 
Psalms41:11 Ababisa baane tibagochenga igoro yane. Ase ayio nimanye ng’a aye nogokirie nainche. 
Psalms41:12 Aye gwankonyire, ekiagera tindi na komocha, kwambekire gotenena ase obosio bwao kogenderera botambe." 
Psalms41:13 Omonene Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atogigwe, buna yarenge korwa kare nabo erabe goika kare na kare. Amina. Amina." 
Psalms42:1 Buna koreng’ana engabi ekogania amache a rooche, naboigo omoyo one okoganetie aye Nyasae." 
Psalms42:2 Omoyo one nigo ore nerang’o asore aye Nyasae ore moyo. Ndiriri ndachiche ndore obosio bwao, aye Nyasae?" 
Psalms42:3 Omobaso na obotuko nigo nkorera, na amariga abeire endagera yane; botambe abanto nigo bakomboria, “Nyasae oo ng’ai are?”" 
Psalms42:4 Nigo nkoumora ayare ase omoyo one ime, ekero nkoinyora amang’ana aetire, buna narenge kogenda amo nomoganda bw’abanto gochia ase enyomba ya Nyasae, nkaba ngotera nomogoko neriogi rinene na koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono amo nabwo barenge koinyora na korenda Rituko Rinene." 
Psalms42:5 Aye omoyo one, nase ki kwabeire nomoichano? Nase ki otari nobotoereru? Semeria Nyasae! Igo ninyare komotogia naende ase ogotooreka gokorwa ase obosio bwaye." 
Psalms42:6 Nyasae one, enkoro yane yabeire nomoichano, ase ayio, nakoinyoire ekero inde ase ense ya Yorodani, na ase egetunwa kia Herimoni na ekia Misari." 
Psalms42:7 Endiba y’amache nigo ekorangeria endiba ende, ekero amache ’ebieera akoeera; chiooro chiao chionsi na emerindo yao biantubire." 
Psalms42:8 Ase omobaso Omonene nigo akong’a obwanchani bwaye botari koera, na ase obotuko nigo nkomotogia namatera na gosaba Nyasae oyore obogima bwane." 
Psalms42:9 Nigo ngotebia Nyasae ore egetare kiane, “Nase ki aye kwanyebire? Nase ki ngendererete korera ngochandwa nababisa baane?”" 
Psalms42:10 Ekero ababisa baane bagonchecheria, nigo nkoigwa buna amauga aane akonyatia. Nigo bagendererete kona‐komboria, “Nyasae oo, ng’ai are?”" 
Psalms42:11 Aye omoyo one, nase ki kwabeire nomoichano omonene? Nase ki otari nobotoereru? Semeria Nyasae! Igo ninyare komotogia naende ere oyore ogotooreka kwane, na Nyasae one." 
Psalms43:1 Aye Nyasae, ing’a oboronge bwane, ndwanerere nkonye korwa ase abanto batakoirogeti, ntoorie korwa ase abanto abang’ainereria, abatari abanyakeene." 
Psalms43:2 Aye Nyasae ore obotamero bwane, naki gwantigire? Ninki gekogera inche ngendererete kweumia, na ababisa baane bagendererete gonkorera bobe?" 
Psalms43:3 Ntomere oborabu bwao, na ekeene kiao, binyare kondaa, na kong’ikia ase egetunwa kiao egechenu kere obomenyo bwao." 
Psalms43:4 Erio ngende ase egesasimero kiao, aye Nyasae, Nyasae, aye oyore omogoko one omonene, nimbugie obokano na gotera ogotera gw’okogotogia, aye Nyasae ore Nyasae one." 
Psalms43:5 Aye omoyo one, nase ki kwabeire nomoichano omonene? Nase ki otari nobotoereru? Semeria Nyasae, ekiagera ninyare komotogia naende ere oyore ogotooreka kwane, na Nyasae one." 
Psalms44:1 Nyasae, intwe tweigwereire namato aito, chisokoro chiaito nchiatotebetie amang’ana gwakorete ase amatuko a kare." 
Psalms44:2 Aye omonyene nigo gwaseretie abanto b’ebisaku nokoboko kwao, korende chisokoro chiaito okabarenta okabasimeka aroro; nigo kwarentete emechando ase abanto b’ebisaku, korende chisokoro chiaito okabamentekania bakaranda." 
Psalms44:3 Abanto bao tibairete ense eria ase okoyerwania nemioro, gose tari chinguru chi’amaboko abo chiabarenterete obobui, korende nokoboko kwao gw’okorio ne chinguru chi’amaboko ao, amo noborabu bwaruete ase obosio bwao, ekiagera aye nigo kwagogetigwe nabarabwo." 
Psalms44:4 Aye naye omoruoti one, na Nyasae one, ase ayio, chika ng’a abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo baegwe obobui." 
Psalms44:5 Ase chinguru chiao nigo toraiyerie inse ababisa baito; goetera ase erieta riao nigo toratiringere inse abwo bagocha gotorwania esegi. 
Psalms44:6 Inche tinsemeretie obota bwane; gose omoro one tong’a obobui. 
Psalms44:7 Korende naye gwatoete obobui igoro y’ababisa baito, abwo batogechete nigo kwabasoogetie." 
Psalms44:8 Intwe ntogenderere gwetogia asore aye Nyasae, ntobe tokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase erieta riao kogenderera botambe." 
Psalms44:9 Nonya naboigo gwatotigire na gotosookia, tori kogenda amo nabarwani baito b’esegi." 
Psalms44:10 Gwatokorire gotama ababisa baito, na barabwo babeire bagosakora ebinto biaito." 
Psalms44:11 Aye kwarure ribaga toriegwe buna ching’ondi chikoriegwa, gwatosiareire gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku." 
Psalms44:12 Aye kwaoonirie abanto bao ase rigori risinini mono; tikwababekerete rigori rinene. 
Psalms44:13 Gwatokorire koba okogechia ase abanto baito; twabeire togochaywa na gosekererwa nabanto batoetanaine. 
Psalms44:14 Gwatokorire koba omorabaaro ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, twabeire togosingiserigwa emetwe nabanto." 
Psalms44:15 Ogochaywa kwane nigo kogendererete asende omobaso boira, na obosooku bwatubire obosio bwane" 
Psalms44:16 ekero nkoigwa amang’ana ’abagonchecheria na gonkwana bobe, na ekero nkorora obosio bw’omobisa na obw’oyo okorusia egesiomba." 
Psalms44:17 Amang’ana aya onsi atonyorire, nonya intwe titoraba togokweba, gose titorasaria okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania." 
Psalms44:18 Chinkoro chiaito tichionchogeti chigotige, gose titotigeti kobwatia enchera yao," 
Psalms44:19 erinde otoake na gototuguta ase chisese chi’orosana chimenyete, gose gototuba ekiriri ki’amakweri." 
Psalms44:20 Onye ntwebire erieta ria Nyasae oito, gose ntwaramboire amaboko aito ase ogosasima enyasae ende eng’ao," 
Psalms44:21 Inee, Nyasae tari komanya amang’ana ayio? Ere nigo amanyete obobisi bwonsi bore ime ase enkoro." 
Psalms44:22 Korende ase engencho yao nigo togoitwa omobaso boira, nigo tokobarwa buna ching’ondi chikonyenywa." 
Psalms44:23 Aye Omonene, boka oimokerere igoro? Nase ki oraire? Boka, tototuguta kegima!" 
Psalms44:24 Nase ki aye kwabisire obosio bwao korwa asetore? Nase ki aye kwebire emechando yaito na ogokorerwa bobe gwaito? 
Psalms44:25 Amaene, emioyo yaito yaiyerigwe inse ase orotu, emebere yaito yabwateranigwe inse ase riroba." 
Psalms44:26 Imokerera igoro, ochiche otokonye! Ototoorie ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms45:1 Enkoro yane nigo eichire namang’ana amaya, engero yane nigo ere igoro y’omoruoti; oromeme rwane nigo rore buna ekaramu y’omoriki omuya." 
Psalms45:2 Aye nigo ore omoseera kobua abanto bonsi; ebikoba biao nigo bigokwana amang’ana ’obwanchani. Ase ayio Nyasae ogosesenirie goika kare na kare. 
Psalms45:3 Aye omobui, eboeranie omoyio o birende ase ekenema kiao, aye nigo ore nobonene na ogosikwa okonene." 
Psalms45:4 Genda bosio nobobui na obonene! Okengere ekeene, na obwororo, na oboronge; na okoboko kwao gw’okorio ngokworokererie amang’ana ’ogokumia." 
Psalms45:5 Emegwe yao nigo ere emioge, nigo ekobeta chinkoro chi’ababisa bao aye omoruoti abanto nigo bakogwa inse yao." 
Psalms45:6 Aye Nyasae, ekerogo kiao ki’obonene nigo kegendererete kobao kare na kare. Enyimbo yao y’oboruoti nigo ere ey’oboronge." 
Psalms45:7 Aye nigo bwanchete oboronge na kogechete ebibe. Ase ayio, Nyasae, oyore Nyasae oo ogoakire amaguta, okorenteire omogoko kobua oyo bw’abande bamino." 
Psalms45:8 Chiganchwa chiao nigo chikouboka rimisu ri’amaguta a manemane, na ay’omogaka, na aya kasia. Korwa ase chinyomba chichabeire amaino e chinchogu abanto nigo bakobugia amakano na gokogokia." 
Psalms45:9 Abaiseke b’abaruoti nigo bare amo nabwo bakogokorera ase amasikani; eting’ana bwechaberete netahabu ekorwa Ofiri, nigo ateneine ase okoboko kwao gw’okorio." 
Psalms45:10 Aye omoiseke, igwa! Ntegerera mono! Eba bono abanto baino na ab’enyomba ya iso." 
Psalms45:11 Oboseera bwao mbogere omoruoti agosanere, ekiagera ere nomonene oo, goika bwekumbe ase obosio bwaye." 
Psalms45:12 Abanto ba Turo, abare abanda mono, nigo barakorentere ebiegwa, barigie ogwancherwa kwao." 
Psalms45:13 Omoiseke bw’omoruoti nigo are ime ase eero yaye ore nobonene, obegete eganchwa yaye eroiseirie etahabu." 
Psalms45:14 Nigo akoirwa ase omoruoti obegete chiganchwa chi’ebieni ao ao, nigo agotunyanwa nabaiseke abekungi abare abagisangio baye; bonsi nigo bakoirwa ase omoruoti." 
Psalms45:15 Nigo bakoirwa bare nomogoko na omochengo, erio basoigwa ase enyomba y’omoruoti." 
Psalms45:16 Abana bao abamura mbabe ribaga rie chisokoro chiao, naye nobabeke babe abagambi igoro ase ense yonsi." 
Psalms45:17 Ninkore erieta riao ribe rikoinyorwa nebiaare bionsi; ase ayio, abanto b’ebisaku mbabe bakogotogia goika kare na kare." 
Psalms46:1 Nyasae nobotamero bwaito, ne chinguru chiaito, botambe nigo are ang’e gotokonya ase engaki y’emechando." 
Psalms46:2 Ase ayio titokwoboa, ense neisa gotengechigwa na ebitunwa birutwe ase chindiba chi’enyancha," 
Psalms46:3 gose emerindo y’enyancha neba ekoruma na koimokerera igoro, na ebitunwa bibe bigotengechigwa ase ogoturubanigwa okwo." 
Psalms46:4 Orooche ndoreo chindooche chiaye chikogokia omochie o Nyasae, omochie ore obomenyo obochenu bw’Oyore Igoro Mono." 
Psalms46:5 Nyasae nigo amenyete imeo, tokonyegerigwa, ere nayokonye kobogokia mambia." 
Psalms46:6 Abanto b’ebisaku babeire neburuburu, amagambi aiyerigwe; Nyasae ogoaka eriogi riaye, ense nenyititoke." 
Psalms46:7 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo are amo naintwe, Nyasae o Yakobo nere obotamero bwaito." 
Psalms46:8 Inchuo morore aya Omonene akorire, orentire ogosirigwa ase ense." 
Psalms46:9 Otangire chisegi ase ense engima, obunire amata, osenyentire amatimo, osambire chigari nomorero." 
Psalms46:10 “Toerera, momanye ng’a ninche Nyasae; inche inde omonene ase abanto b’ebisaku, omonene ase ense.”" 
Psalms46:11 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo are amo naintwe, Nyasae o Yakobo nere obotamero bwaito." 
Psalms47:1 Inwe abanto bonsi, aka chinkobi, moterere Nyasae amatera ’omogoko neriogi rinene!" 
Psalms47:2 Omonene ore Igoro Mono nigo are oyo bw’okoirokia, ere nomoruoti omonene bw’ense yonsi." 
Psalms47:3 Omonene obekire abanto inse yaito, otoeire okobua kogambera abanto b’ebisaku." 
Psalms47:4 Nigo atochorerete omwando, oyio ore obwari bwa Yakobo, oria Omonene anchete." 
Psalms47:5 Nyasae otiirire namariogi ay’ogochengerwa, Omonene nigo akobugerigwa ebirombeta." 
Psalms47:6 Tera amatera ay’ogotogia Nyasae, tera amatera ay’ogotogia! Tera amatera ay’ogotogia omoruoti oito, tera amatera ay’ogotogia!" 
Psalms47:7 Nyasae nigo are omoruoti bw’ense yonsi, motogie namatera are nengencho." 
Psalms47:8 Nyasae nere okogamba igoro ase ebisaku; ere nigo aikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene kere egechenu. 
Psalms47:9 Abagambi b’abanto basangererekanire amo, babe abanto ba Nyasae o Ibrahimu. Chinguba chi’ense nigo chire echia Nyasae; ere oimokererigwe igoro mono kegima." 
Psalms48:1 Omonene nigo are omonene mono, goika atogigwe; ere goika atogigwe agwo ase omochie o Nyasae oito, ase egetunwa kiaye egechenu." 
Psalms48:2 Sayoni, egetunwa kia Nyasae egeseera, keimokererete igoro agwo sugusu, nigo kere omogoko bw’ense engima; omochie oyio noyo bw’omoruoti omonene."
