Psalms48:3 Agwo ase chiburi chi’omochie oyio, Nyasae bweorokirie ng’a nere obotamero bw’ogwekengera," 
Psalms48:4 Rora, abaruoti nigo basangererekanete, bagacha amo." 
Psalms48:5 Ekero baroche omochie oria, nigo bakumetie, bakaondoka, bagatama." 
Psalms48:6 Bagasogwa nobwoba, bakaiguswa, bagaichana na koba nobororo buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore." 
Psalms48:7 Nigo kwababunete buna chimeeri chia Tarisisi nomwaga okogusa korwa moocha. 
Psalms48:8 Amang’ana twaigwete, bono twayarorire agwo ase omochie bw’Omonene bw’Emeganda, omochie o Nyasae oito. Nyasae nigo ayorendete na koyokong’ia goika kare na kare." 
Psalms48:9 Nyasae, ekero tore ase Hekalu yao ime, nigo tokorengereria igoro y’obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms48:10 Nyasae, buna koreng’ana erieta riao rikumete, naboigo nogotogigwa kwao gokumete goikera chinsinyo chi’ense. Okoboko kwao gw’okorio nigo goichire noboronge." 
Psalms48:11 Tiga abanto b’egetunwa gia Sayoni bagoke; boigo nab’emechie y’Abayuda, ekiagera aye nigo okonacha ebina bia boronge." 
Psalms48:12 Taara moetanane Sayoni, mobare emerobiri yaye." 
Psalms48:13 Rigereria chindwaki chiaye, eta motaare ime ase chiburi chiaye; erio nario morache gotebia ebigori bigochi‐gocha:" 
Psalms48:14 “Nyasae oyo nere Nyasae oito o kare na kare. Ere nabe omoraai oito kogenderera botambe.” 
Psalms49:1 Inwe abanto bonsi, igwa amang’ana aya! Tegerera moigwe, inwe mwensi momenyete ase ense," 
Psalms49:2 inwe mwensi pi, abake na abanene, abanda na abataka amo!" 
Psalms49:3 Omonwa one nokwane amang’ana ’obong’aini, na ebirengererio bi’enkoro yane nigo birabe ebi’okomanya." 
Psalms49:4 Nintegerere amang’ana agokwanwa ase omoreng’anio, ning’orokie engencho yaye ase okobugia obokano." 
Psalms49:5 Inche tinkoba nobwoba ase chingaki chi’emechando, ekero amabe ’abachandi baane arabe ang’etananire." 
Psalms49:6 Tinkwoboa abanto abwo basemeretie obotenenku bwabo; barabwo nigo bare bakoenenera obonda bwabo bore obonge. 
Psalms49:7 Ekeene, omonto tari oranyare kobooria oyomwabo, gose koa Nyasae embooria y’ogotooria obogima bwaye." 
Psalms49:8 Rigori ri’okobooria omoyo oye nigo rire rinene mono, na mbooria ende teri eraisanere rigori erio," 
Psalms49:9 eyio eragere omonto agenderere koba moyo botambe, tabaisa kogenda ase embeera." 
Psalms49:10 Bonsi nigo bamanyete ng’a nonya nabanto abang’aini ngokwa bare, naboigo nabare abariri na amachara, erio batiga abanto abaao bakoira chinibo chiabo." 
Psalms49:11 Nigo bakorengereria ng’a nigo chirabeo kare na kare, na obomenyo bwabo ebiaare ase ebiaare; nigo bagwatora emegondo yabo ase amarieta abo." 
Psalms49:12 Korende mwanyabanto takonyara kogenderera koba nogosikwa, ere nigo anga buna ching’iti chigokwa chiasira." 
Psalms49:13 Obwo nabwo obosiru bw’abanto abwo besemeretie abanyene, omoerio obo abwo begenete amang’ana abo." 
Psalms49:14 Buna riicho rie ching’ondi nigo bakoirwa gochia aase abakure, amakweri naro arabe omorisia obo. Abwo bare abaronge mbabagambera kobogokiamoka, na ebieni biabo mbisirere agwo aase abakure aase are obomenyo bwabo." 
Psalms49:15 Korende Nyasae naboorie omoyo one, ayorusie korwa ase okobua gw’aase abakure, erinde ang’ire imenye asare." 
Psalms49:16 Tobaisa koiroka ekero omonto abeire omotenenku, na ebinto bire ase enyomba yaye biamentekanire." 
Psalms49:17 Ekero omonto oyio arakwe, takoira gento kende, obonene bwaye tibokomotunyana bogende inse aaria amo nere." 
Psalms49:18 Nonya omonto oyio ekero are moyo, ogweteba ng’a nigo asesenirie, ee, nonya ogotogigwa ekero ekoreire amaya," 
Psalms49:19 ere goika akwe, asangerereke ase chisokoro chiaye chire, echio chitarore oborabu naende." 
Psalms49:20 Mwanyabanto oyio osikire otabwati obong’aini, nigo anga buna ching’iti chigokwa chiasira." 
Psalms50:1 Nyasae omonguru, Nyasae Omonene, nigo agokwana, nigo agokwana na korangeria ense yonsi korwa moocha goika bosongo." 
Psalms50:2 Korwa Sayoni, omochie omoikeranu bw’oboseera, Nyasae omorekire korwao." 
Psalms50:3 Nyasae oito ngocha are, tagokirakiri; omorero okoria nigo otang’aine bosio bwaye, omwaga omotindi nigo omoetanaine." 
Psalms50:4 Ere nigo akorangeria igoro na ense chibe birori, ekero akonachera abanto baye ekina, ogoteba," 
Psalms50:5 “Sangereria abanto baane abegenwa bache asende, abwo bakorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania nainche ase okorua ebing’wanso.”" 
Psalms50:6 Igoro nigo chikoraria oboronge bwa Nyasae; Nyasae omonyene nere omonachi ebina. 
Psalms50:7 “Inwe abanto baane, tegerera moigwe, inche nkwane! Inwe Abaisraeli, inche nimbe nkorua oborori bore mamincha yaino. Inche Nyasae inde Nyasae oino." 
Psalms50:8 Tinkobatogonyera ase engencho y’ebing’wanso biaino; ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa nigo bire ase obosio bwane botambe. 
Psalms50:9 Tingwanchera chieri chikorwa ase ameeri aino, gose chigoree chikorwa ase amaicho aino," 
Psalms50:10 ekiagera ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana nechiane, ne chiombe chilifu chire ase ebigoro nechiane." 
Psalms50:11 Nimanyete chinyoni chionsi chire ase ebitunwa, ne ching’iti chinde chionsi chikonagoetanana ase ense nechiane." 
Psalms50:12 “Onye narenge nenchara, tinare kogotebia, ekiagera ense, na ebinto bionsi bireo nebiane." 
Psalms50:13 Inee! Inche ne chinyama chie chieri nkoria? Gose namanyinga e chimbori nkonywa? 
Psalms50:14 Aye omoruere Nyasae ekeng’wanso gi’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, naende ikerania ase Oyore Igoro Mono chiira kwamorierete." 
Psalms50:15 Ndangerie ase engaki y’emechando; inche ningokonye, naye nontogie.”" 
Psalms50:16 Korende Nyasae nigo agotebia omokori amabe, “Naye mboronge ki obwate okonagwatora amachiko aane? Gose kona‐gokwana‐kwana okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania?" 
Psalms50:17 Aye nigo ogechete amorokererio ay’okorongeyia, gwatugutire amang’ana aane gochia nyuma." 
Psalms50:18 Ekero okorora omoibi, nigo ogwancherana nere, boigo nigo okobwatana nabatomani." 
Psalms50:19 “Omonwa oo nigo ore omwango gokwana amang’ana ’obobe, na oromeme rwao nigo romanyete koroisia amang’ana ’obong’ainereria." 
Psalms50:20 Aye nigo ogoikaransa na konakogamba abanto bamino bobe; nigo okona‐kong’acha oyomino morwete enda eyemo. 
Psalms50:21 Kwabeire gokona‐gokora ayio, nainche nkirete‐kiri, nigo okagete ng’a inche nigo inde buna aye. Korende bono nkogotogonyera nde na kobeka ayio ase obosio bwao." 
Psalms50:22 “Inwe aba mwanyebire inche Nyasae, rengereria amang’ana aya mono; onye taibo, nimbaake mbatandorane, na monto onde tari orabatoorie." 
Psalms50:23 Onde bwensi okong’iraneria ng’a mbuya mono, okwo nakwo ekeng’wanso ki’ogonsika, na onde bwensi okobwatia chinchera chi’oboronge, oyio nimorentere ogotooreka kwane inche Nyasae.”" 
Psalms51:1 Aye Nyasae, ondorere amabera koreng’ana nobwanchani bwao botari koera; ase engencho y’obonge bw’amabera ao otinyie ogosaria kwane." 
Psalms51:2 Onsibie kegima korwa ase obobe bwane, na onchene korwa ase ebibe biane." 
Psalms51:3 Inche namanyire ogosaria kwane, na ebibe biane nigo bire bosio bwane botambe." 
Psalms51:4 Nagokoreire ebibe aye omonyene bweka, nakorire amabe ase amaiso ao. Aye omanyekane ng’a mboronge ore ekero ogokwana, na mboronge ore ekero okonacha ekina." 
Psalms51:5 Rora, inche nigo naiboretwe inde ne chingencho chi’ebibe; nigo narenge omonyabibe korwa ekero baba abogoretie oborito." 
Psalms51:6 Rora, aye nigo oganetie ekeene ase enkoro ime; ase ayio inyorokererie obong’aini bwao ase enkoro yane ime." 
Psalms51:7 Onsibie ne chinsagia chia hisopo, na inche nimbe omochenu; onsibie imbe omorabu se goetania amagena ’embura." 
Psalms51:8 Onkore imbe nomogoko na omochengo, amauga aane aya gwasenyentete agoke." 
Psalms51:9 Onchora obosio bwao, torora ebibe biane; otinyie obobe bwane bwonsi." 
Psalms51:10 Aye Nyasae, ontongere enkoro endabu, okore omoika ore ime yane obe omoyia na oyokong’ie." 
Psalms51:11 Tonyatanana korwa ase obosio bwao, nonya n’Omoika Omochenu toyorusia asende." 
Psalms51:12 Ong’iranerie omogoko okorwa ase ogotooreka kwao, okong’ie omoika one obe omoigweri." 
Psalms51:13 Erio inyorokererie abasaria chinchera chiao, na abanyene ebibe mbairane asore." 
Psalms51:14 Aye Nyasae, Nyasae bw’ogotooreka kwane, ontoorie, ting’itera amanyinga ’abanto, na oromeme rwane rotere mono oboronge bwao." 
Psalms51:15 Aye Omonene, omaanore ebikoba biane, na omonwa one norarie ogotogigwa kwao." 
Psalms51:16 Togokiri nekeng’wanso, ninsa gokerua; aye toganeti ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa." 
Psalms51:17 Ebing’wanso biancheire na Nyasae nemioyo emekanyeku; enkoro yabunekire na gwekeyia, aye Nyasae, tokoyechaya." 
Psalms51:18 Okorere Sayoni amaya ase amabera ao; oagache chindwaki chia Yerusalemu. 
Psalms51:19 Erio nario oragokigwe nebing’wanso bi’oboronge na ebi’ogosambwa; erio chieri nchiruegwe igoro ase egesasimero kiao. 
Psalms52:1 Aye omonto ore nokobua, nase ki ogwetogeria amabe aya ogokora? Obwanchani bwa Nyasae nigo bogendererete kare na kare." 
Psalms52:2 Aye omong’ainereria, oromeme rwao nigo rokoroberia amang’ana ’ogosaria; nigo ronga buna omoyio otukia omwoge." 
Psalms52:3 Aye nigo bwanchete amabe kobua amaya, nigo bwanchete gokwana oborimo kobua ekeene." 
Psalms52:4 Aye ore noromeme rw’obong’ainereria, nigo bwanchete gokwana amang’ana agosaria." 
Psalms52:5 Nyasae nakoiyerie inse kare na kare, nakobwate na kogotaboria korwa nyomba mwao, nagosimore korwa ase ense y’abare moyo." 
Psalms52:6 Abanyene oboronge mbarore ayio boboe, bamosekerere batebe," 
Psalms52:7 “Rora, omonto oyo bwangete gokora Nyasae abe obotamero bwaye, nigo egenete obonge bw’obonda bwaye omonyene, na akeenenia ase chinguru chiaye chi’ogosaria.”" 
Psalms52:8 Korende inche nigo inga buna omozeituni osebogete ase enyomba ya Nyasae ime. Nigo nsemeretie obwanchani bwa Nyasae botari koera goika kare na kare. 
Psalms52:9 Aye Nyasae, ngokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono kare na kare, ekiagera gwakorire ayio. Ase amasio ’abanto bao bare abegenwa nindarie erieta riao, ekiagera nerigiya." 
Psalms53:1 Abanto abariri nigo bagwetebia ase chinkoro chiabo ime, “Nyasae tari.” Barabwo nabasareku, nigo bagokora amang’ana amabe ay’okogechia; onde tari ogokora ayare amaya, nonya noyomo." 
Psalms53:2 Nyasae nigo arigereretie mwanyabanto korwa igoro arore gose monto onde nareo ore omong’aini, oyokomorigia Nyasae." 
Psalms53:3 Abanto bonsi bairanire nyuma, bonsi amo basarekire; onde tari ogokora amaya, nonya noyomo." 
Psalms53:4 Inee! Abanto abwo bagokora amabe, tibamanyeti gento? Nigo bakoria abanto baane ase okobaurereria buna bakoria endagera yabo; tibari kondangeria inche Nyasae mbakonye." 
Psalms53:5 Abwo nigo bagosogwa nomoondoko omonene mono, omoondoko buna oyio tona‐komanyekana nonya ndinde, Nyasae nasiarere amauga ’emebere y’ababisa abwo bakonaaretie. Nyasae nabasookie, ekiagera obaangire." 
Psalms53:6 Naki yare koba buya onye ogotooreka ngwachera Abaisraeli korwa Sayoni! Ekero Nyasae arairanerie abanto baye amaya abo, abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo mbachenge, ee, Abaisraeli mbabe nomogoko." 
Psalms54:1 Aye Nyasae, ntoorie ase engencho y’erieta riao, ong’e oboronge bwane goetera ase okobua kwao." 
Psalms54:2 Nyasae, igwa ogosaba kwane; tegerera oigwe amang’ana aane ngokwana." 
Psalms54:3 Abanto abamwenu bang’umokeire kong’ita, na abanto abatindi nigo baganetie obogima bwane; abwo tibakoirogeti aye Nyasae." 
Psalms54:4 Nimanyete ng’a Nyasae nere omokonyi one, Omonene nere orendete obogima bwane." 
Psalms54:5 Nairanerie ababisa baane obobe bwabo. Aye Omonene, obasirie, ekiagera igo ore omwegenwa." 
Psalms54:6 Omonene, ninkoruere ekeng’wanso inde nenkoro y’ogwancha, nimbe nkoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase erieta riao, ekiagera nerigiya." 
Psalms54:7 Aye gwantooririe ase emechando yonsi, na amaiso aane nigo arigereretie ababisa baane inde nomochengo." 
Psalms55:1 Aye Nyasae, tegerera oigwe ogosaba kwane, tobaisa kwebisa toigwa ogosaba kw’ogosorora kwane." 
Psalms55:2 Inyigwe na ong’iranerie; inche nigo nkona‐korera na kweumia inde nobororo. 
Psalms55:3 Ninde nobwoba ase engencho y’amariogi ’ababisa baane, na ase engencho y’obobe bw’abakori amabe. Abanto abwo nigo bakondetera amaakwa, bakongecha bare nendamwamu." 
Psalms55:4 Enkoro yane nigo ere nomoichano, nasoirwe nokogoswa kw’amakweri." 
Psalms55:5 Nasoirwe nobwoba na okoiguswa, nabuirwe nomoichano omonene." 
Psalms55:6 Bono nigo ngoteba, “Onye ndiria nabwate chimbaba buna riruma, nanga nigo nare koiruruka ngende gotimoka." 
Psalms55:7 Ee, nigo nanga nare kogenda aare, imbe ntoorete ase erooro." 
Psalms55:8 Nigo nare kominyoka chimbero, erinde inyenyorere aase nkwebisa, korwa ase omwaga omotindi na ekembugu‐mbugu.”" 
Psalms55:9 Aye Omonene, saria emeroberio y’abanto abwo, otantanie chimeme chiabo tibaigwana. Narorire obotindi na amariomana bire agwo ase omochie," 
Psalms55:10 bikoyoetanana igoro ase chindwaki omobaso na obotuko; amabe a mobosokano na emechando bire ase omochie oyio. 
Psalms55:11 Obosareku nigo boichire ime yaye, obong’ainereria na ogokorera abande bobe tibikorua ase chinchera chiaye." 
Psalms55:12 Onye nomobisa ore gonchecheria, nanga nigo nare koremereria; naende onye nomobisa ore gonkorera bobe ase oboenenu, nanga nigo nare kwebisa." 
Psalms55:13 Korende bono naye ogonkorera bobe, aye oyo kwarenge obomo nainche, omosani tomanyaine." 
Psalms55:14 Nigo tware koba tokogamba amo amang’ana amaya ay’ogosemania, naende nigo tware koba togosasima amo ase enyomba ya Nyasae." 
Psalms55:15 Tiga amakweri abachere ababisa baane mobosokano, bagende gochia aase abakure bare moyo; obobe nigo bore ase obomenyo bwabo, na ase chinkoro chiabo." 
Psalms55:16 Korende inche nigo nkomorangeria Nyasae, nere Omonene nantoorie." 
Psalms55:17 Kera omogoroba, na emambia, na mobaso gati, nigo nkwereera ase engencho y’emechando yane, na Omonene naigwe eriogi riane." 
Psalms55:18 Ere nantoorie, andende buya korwa ase esegi eyio nkorwana, ekiagera ababisa abange banyimokeire." 
Psalms55:19 Nyasae oyio obeire okogamba korwa kare, nanyigwe inche, erio abue abanto abwo, ekiagera abwo tibari koonchoka na komoiroka Nyasae." 
Psalms55:20 Oyorenge omosani one nigo aramborete okoboko kwaye, akore bobe ase abakorete omorembe nere, osaririe okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania." 
Psalms55:21 Chinkwana chiaye nigo chiarenge chinyororo kobua amaguta atundire, korende ebirengererio biaye nebi’esegi; amang’ana aye nigo arenge amororo kobua amaguta, nonya naboigo nigo akonachanacha buna emioro." 
Psalms55:22 Motweke Omonene chigurube chiao, nere nakobwate nokoboko kwaye akorende; ere tagotiga omonyaboronge abugwe namabe." 
Psalms55:23 Korende abanto abaiti na abang’ainereria aye Nyasae nobaturunkanie gochia ase eoromomo, ekero bataraika ase ekeng’ese ki’obogima bwabo, korende inche nimbe nkwegenete aye Omonene." 
Psalms56:1 Aye Nyasae, indorere amabera, ekiagera abanto nigo baganetie ng’a bang’ite bansirie kegima; omobaso boira ababisa baane nigo bakondwania esegi." 
Psalms56:2 Omobaso boira ababisa baane nigo bakondigia baamere, ee, mbare abange mono bakondwania ase oboenenu." 
Psalms56:3 Ekero inde nobwoba, nigo ngosemeretie." 
Psalms56:4 Ase okobua kwa Nyasae nintogie ring’ana riaye, ninsemeretie Nyasae ntari nobwoba. Inee! Mwanyabanto inki baranyare gonkorera?" 
Psalms56:5 Omobaso boira ababisa baane nigo bakoonchorana amang’ana aane; ebirengererio biabo bionsi nigo bire ebibe igoro yane. 
Psalms56:6 Nigo bagosangererekana amo baroberia komboera, barigererie kera egento ngokora; naboigo bagendererete korigia obogima bwane babosirie." 
Psalms56:7 Inee! Nabatooreke korwa ase obobe buna obwo? Taibo. Aye Nyasae, basirie abanto abwo kegima nendamwamu yao entindi." 
Psalms56:8 Omonene, aye nomanyete okoong’anya kwane, nigo osangereretie amariga aane okayabeka ase egetono kiao. Inee! Ayio onsi tarikiri ase ebuku yao?" 
Psalms56:9 Ekero ndarangerie Omonene, ababisa baane mbairanigwe gochia nyuma. Nimanyete kegima ng’a Nyasae nigo are ase ensemo yane." 
Psalms56:10 Ase okobua kwa Nyasae nintogie ring’ana riaye; ee, ase okobua kw’Omonene nintogie ring’ana riaye." 
Psalms56:11 Nigo nsemeretie Nyasae ntari nobwoba. Inee! Mwanyabanto inki aranyare gonkorera? 
Psalms56:12 Aye Nyasae, goika ng’ikeranie chiira nakorierete; naende ninkoruere ebing’wanso bi’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
Psalms56:13 Aye gwatooririe omoyo one korwa ase amakweri, ee, gwatangire amagoro aane tagwa, erinde inyare gotaara ase obosio bwao, aye Nyasae, ase oborabu bw’abwo bare moyo." 
Psalms57:1 Aye Nyasae, indorera amabera, indorera amabera, ekiagera naye natameire nomoyo one. Nintame nyebise inse ase ekiriri gie chimbaba chiao, goika omwaga bw’ogosiria oete." 
Psalms57:2 Inche nigo nkorera ase Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono, ase Nyasae oria okong’ikeraneria onsi." 
Psalms57:3 Omonene nantomere ogotooreka korwa igoro, nababue abwo bagonkorera bobe babe nobosooku. Nyasae naorokie amabera aye na ekeene kiaye." 
Psalms57:4 Omoyo one nigo oetananire ne chindo, nigo ndaire ase egati ya mwanyabanto bagoutoka omorero, amaino abo nigo are amoge buna amatimo ne chinsara, chimeme chiabo nigo chire emioro emioge." 
Psalms57:5 Aye Nyasae, oorokie ng’a nigo ore omonene goetania igoro chionsi, tiga obonene bwao bororekane ase ense yonsi." 
Psalms57:6 Ababisa bantegeire oboreba ase ngoeta, bamionogoreire inse. Bakunyire eirima ase enchera yane, korende mbarabwo abanyene bagure imeo." 
Psalms57:7 Aye Nyasae, enkoro yane nigo ere noboremu, ee, nigo ere noboremu; nintere na gochenga." 
Psalms57:8 Aye omoyo one, boka! Inwe amakano aane onsi, boka! Nainche nimboke mambia chuni." 
Psalms57:9 Aye Omonene, ase egati y’abanto ninkoiranerie ng’a mbuya mono, nimbe ngotera amatera ay’okogotogia ase egati y’ebisaku." 
Psalms57:10 Amabera ao nigo are amanene aigete aaria igoro; obwegenwa bwao nigo boigete igoro ase amare. 
Psalms57:11 Aye Nyasae, oorokia ng’a nigo ore omonene goetania igoro chionsi, tiga obonene bwao bororekane ase ense yonsi." 
Psalms58:1 Inwe abamokogamba, Inee, ngokwana more amang’ana ’ekeene? Inee! Nkonachera more abanto ebina bire boronge?" 
Psalms58:2 Yaya, nigo more nemeroberio emekorekanu ime ase chinkoro chiaino, amaboko aino nigo agokora obotindi bw’oborianania ase ense." 
Psalms58:3 Abakori amabe nigo basirete korwa chinda chi’abang’ina, abanyaborimo nigo bakoba abatantanu korwa engaki y’okoiborwa kwabo." 
Psalms58:4 Barabwo nigo babwate obosongo bonga buna obw’eng’iti, nigo banga buna rirubi rigoticha amato aye," 
Psalms58:5 erinde tiriigwa amariogi abanyamosira, gose ay’abaebia b’obong’aini." 
Psalms58:6 Aye Nyasae, obune amaino ’emenwa yabo; aye Omonene, gokora amagegu e chindo chinsae!" 
Psalms58:7 Abanto abwo tiga basirigwe kegima buna amache omogoko agoeta asira; ekero bakoruta emegwe yabo, eburoke." 
Psalms58:8 Barabwo tiga babe buna amakorominyo akonyititoka amarenda aera, na buna oborito bw’omokungu bokogwa botaraika engaki yaye." 
Psalms58:9 Omonene nabasirie bwango, ee, bwango kobua chinyongo chiaino chitarabwata riberera ri’omorero bw’amagwa, karabe amabese gose amasusanu." 
Psalms58:10 Omonyene oboronge nagoke ekero egesiomba kegoakanwa, natiringe amanyinga ’abanto abanyabibe." 
Psalms58:11 Erio abanto batebe, “Ekeene, abanyaboronge nigo bakonyora eng’eria yabo; ekeene, Nyasae nareo okonacha ebina ase ense.”" 
Psalms59:1 Aye Nyasae one, ntoorie korwa ase ababisa baane, indende korwa ase abanto aba banyimokeire gonkora bobe." 
Psalms59:2 Nkonye korwa ase abakori amabe; ntoorie korwa ase abaiteri amanyinga. 
Psalms59:3 Rora, abanto aba bebisete na komboera bang’ite, abanto abatindi basangererekanire amo bankore bobe; Omonene, ayio tari ase engencho y’ogosaria gose ebibe nakorire." 
Psalms59:4 Tindakora bobe bonde bokogera baminyoke gocha gonkora bobe. Omonene imoka, orore amang’ana ayio, onkonye!" 
Psalms59:5 Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, naye Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli! Imoka, orue egesusuro ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, tobaisa gotigaria nonya noyomo ore moyo ase abwo bagokora amabe ase obong’ainereria." 
Psalms59:6 Kera omogoroba nigo bakoirana, baetanana omochie, bakoga buna chisese." 
Psalms59:7 Oise kobarigereria, orore buna bakona‐gokwana‐kwana! Ebikoba biabo nigo bire buna emioro emioge, bateba, “Ning’o oranyare gotoigwa?”" 
Psalms59:8 Korende aye Omonene nigo okobasekerera, aye nigo ogochecheria abanto bonsi batakomanyeti." 
Psalms59:9 Aye Nyasae ore chinguru chiane, nimbe nkoganyete, ekiagera naye ore obotamero obokong’u." 
Psalms59:10 Nyasae one nigo agonchichera nobwanchani bwaye botari koera, Nyasae one nankore nchenge igoro y’ababisa baane." 
Psalms59:11 Aye Omonene, enguba yaito, tobaisa kobaita! Abanto baane nigo barabaise kweba. Obaomboganie ase chinguru chiao, erio omanye kobasiria." 
Psalms59:12 Ebibe nigo bire ase emenwa yabo, na amang’ana bagokwana namabe. Ase igo, tiga oboenenu bwabo bobabwate buna oboreba bokobwata. Barabwo nigo bakoragereria na gokwana amang’ana ’oborimo." 
Psalms59:13 Ase ayio, obasirie nendamwamu yao; basirie kegima, onde tanyorekana ore moyo nonya noyomo, erio abanto b’ense yonsi mbamanye ng’a Nyasae nere okogambera abanto ba Yakobo." 
Psalms59:14 Kera omogoroba nigo bakoirana, baetanana omochie, bakoga buna chisese." 
Psalms59:15 Nigo bakoong’anya korigia endagera, batayenyoreti nigo bakogeesa bokia." 
Psalms59:16 Korende inche nintere igoro y’okobua kwao, kera emambia nintere neriogi rinene igoro y’obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, ekiagera ase chingaki chi’emechando nigo kwabeire egekengero kiane na obotameru bwane." 
Psalms59:17 Aye Nyasae ore chinguru chiane, nintere ogotera gw’okogotogia; aye naye egekengero kiane, aye naye Nyasae onyanchete mono." 
Psalms60:1 Nyasae, aye gwatwangire na gwatosiareire, kwabeire kore nendamwamu, toiranerie amaya aito." 
Psalms60:2 Aye gwatengechirie ense na koyetandora; iraneria naende amatandoku ayio, ekiagera nigo egotengecha mono." 
Psalms60:3 Gwakorire abanto bao babeire nemechando emekong’u; gwatonyoisirie edivai yatotindirie na gotoong’anyia. 
Psalms60:4 Aye kwaeire abanto abwo bakoirogete ekemanyererio, kenyare koimokererigwa igoro ase ogotenenera ekeene." 
Psalms60:5 Igo nonyare gotooria abanto abwo gwanchete; otoe obobui goetera ase okoboko kwao gw’okorio, oigwe ogosaba gwaito." 
Psalms60:6 Nyasae okwanire korwa ase Obomenyo bwaye Obochenu, ogoteba, “Ase omochengo ninyatanane Sekemu, na ense omweya ya Sukoti inyiate chincherere." 
Psalms60:7 Gileadi neyane, na Manase neyane; Efraimu nekegogwa kiane gi’ekioma, na Yuda nenyimbo yane y’obogambi." 
Psalms60:8 Moabu negetaabo kiane ngoisabera; nindute egekoroto kiane igoro ase Edomu, ning’ake eriogi ri’okobua igoro y’ense y’Abafilisti.”" 
Psalms60:9 Ning’o orandaae ansoyie ase omochie ogiteire chindwaki? Ning’o orantang’ane gochia Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Aye Nyasae, Inee, ngwatotigire kegima? Aye tori kogenda amo nabarwani baito b’esegi." 
Psalms60:11 Tokonye torwanie ababisa baito tobabue, ekiagera ogokonywa kwa mwanyabanto mbosa." 
Psalms60:12 Ekero tore amo na Nyasae, inatokore amang’ana amanene, nere orabue ababisa baito na kobatiringera inse." 
Psalms61:1 Aye Nyasae one, igwa ekerero kiane; tegerera oigwe ogosaba kwane." 
Psalms61:2 Ekero enkoro yane yarusirie moyo, nigo ngokorangeria korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense. Aye ondaae gochia egetare keria kere egetambe mono kombua." 
Psalms61:3 Aye naye obotamero bwane, eburi enkong’u egonkengera korwa ase ababisa baane." 
Psalms61:4 Ing’a ribaga ingenderere komenya botambe ase eema yao; ninganetie inyore oborendi obuya inse y’ekiriri gie chimbaba chiao. 
Psalms61:5 Aye Nyasae kwaigure chiira chiane narire ase ogotiana, abanto bairogete erieta riao kwabaeire omwando obo." 
Psalms61:6 Omentere omoruoti amatuko agenderere koba moyo; emiaka yaye ebe ey’ebiaare ebinge. 
Psalms61:7 Tiga agenderere botambe koba omoruoti ase obosio bwao aye Nyasae; obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, na obwegenwa bwao, bimorende," 
Psalms61:8 Igo nimbe ngotera ase ogotogia erieta riao botambe, naende rituko ase rituko imbe ngoikeranie chiira chiane." 
Psalms62:1 Omoyo one nigo oganyete Nyasae bweka ase okonyora obotoereru; ogotooreka kwane nigo gokorwa asare. 
Psalms62:2 Ere nere bweka egetare kiane, na ogotooreka kwane, nere orwaki rwane, tinkonyegerigwa mono." 
Psalms62:3 Inee! Inwe mwensi, ngoika ririri moragenderere korwania omonto ore bweka, erinde momoakere inse, inwe mwensi amo, buna nigo are enyasi ere ang’e kogwa na orwaki rwatandokire?" 
Psalms62:4 Abanto abwo nigo bakoroberia bamoiyerie korwa ase obonene bwaye. Barabwo nigo bakogokigwa mono gokwana oborimo; nigo bagosesenia nebikoba biabo bosa, korende ase chinkoro chiabo ime nigo bakoragereria." 
Psalms62:5 Omoyo one nigo omoganyete Nyasae bweka ase okonyora obotoereru; ogosemeria kwane nigo gokorwa asare. 
Psalms62:6 Ere bweka negetare kiane, na ogotooreka kwane, na egekengero kiane egekong’u; tinkonyegerigwa." 
Psalms62:7 Ogotooreka kwane, na obonene bwane, nigo bikonyorekana ase Nyasae. Nyasae negetare kiane gie chinguru, na obotamero bwane." 
Psalms62:8 Inwe abanto, mwegene Omonene ase chingaki chionsi, morentere emechando yaino; Nyasae nere obotamero bwaito." 
Psalms62:9 Ekeene, mwanyabanto nigo bare buna omooki rioka, abanto baeire obonene nigo bare bosa; ekero bakorengwa nigo bare abagusu; bonsi nigo bare abagusu kobua omooki." 
Psalms62:10 Timobaisa gosemeria obourereria, timobaisa koba nogosemeria kwa bosa ase ebinto bi’oboibi. Onye obotenenku bwaino bwabeire obonge, timobaisa kobosemeria." 
Psalms62:11 Nyasae okwanire ara rimo, ee, nabeire nkoyaigwa chintunda ibere, ng’a Nyasae nere omonyene okobua." 
Psalms62:12 Aye Nyasae, nigo ore nobwanchani bogendererete botambe; aye nigo ogoakana omonto koreng’ana buna emeremo yaye ere." 
Psalms63:1 Aye Nyasae, Nyasae one, naye ngotang’ana korigia. Omoyo one nigo ore nerang’o asore, na omobere one nigo okoganetie, ase ense y’eguru‐gura enyomo pa etari namache." 
Psalms63:2 Nabeire ngokorigia ase Obomenyo Obochenu, erinde ndore okobua kwao na obonene bwao." 
Psalms63:3 Obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe nigo bore obuya kobua obogima, ase ayio nimbe nkogotogia nomonwa one." 
Psalms63:4 Nimbe nkona‐kogotogia ase obogima bwane bwonsi, ase erieta riao nindambore amaboko aane gochia igoro." 
Psalms63:5 Omoyo one oisanekire buna oyorire obonoru bw’emeseto na ebitinya, nimbe nkogotogia nomonwa one ore nebikoba bire nomogoko." 
Psalms63:6 Ekero indaire ase oborere bwane, nigo nkoba nkorengereretie, ase obotuko obogima ebirengererio biane nigo bikona‐gokoiranerera." 
Psalms63:7 Aye kwabeire ogokonyeka kwane, na inse y’ekiriri gie chimbaba chiao nintere nomogoko." 
Psalms63:8 Omoyo one nokobwaterere mono, ekiagera aye nonsiirete nokoboko kwao gw’okorio." 
Psalms63:9 Abanto abwo bakorigia gosiria obogima bwane, mbagende gochia inse kegima y’ense." 
Psalms63:10 Barabwo nigo bararuegwe baitwe nemioro, babe endagera ye chisese chi’orosana." 
Psalms63:11 Nonya naboigo omoruoti nabe okogoka ase Nyasae, na abanto bonsi abagotiana asare mbabe bagwetogia, korende emenwa y’abanto bagokwana oborimo nekirigwe." 
Psalms64:1 Aye Nyasae, igwa eriogi riane ekero nkorera; renda obogima bwane korwa ase omobisa oyo okongosa." 
Psalms64:2 Imbise korwa ase emeroberio ya bobisi y’abakori amabe, korwa ase eburu‐buru y’abakori ebibe." 
Psalms64:3 Abwo nigo bagotieria chimeme chiabo buna emioro, amang’ana bagokwana nigo are nobororo, anga buna chinsara." 
Psalms64:4 Korwa ase baboete nigo bakorasa omonto otari na komocha, bamorasa chinsara mobosokano batari nobwoba." 
Psalms64:5 Barabwo nigo bakobekana chinguru ase ogokora ebibe ebio barobeirie; nigo bagokwana amo igoro y’ogotegera abande oboreba bobisi, bagotebania, “Ning’o otoroche?”" 
Psalms64:6 Nigo bagokora emeroberio emebe, bagoteba, “Bono twakorire omoroberio oito omoikeranu.” Ekeene, ebirengererio bia ime bi’omonto, na enkoro yaye, nigo bisinyete." 
Psalms64:7 Korende Nyasae nabarase ensara yaye, na barabwo baraswe mobosokano." 
Psalms64:8 Nasirie abanto abwo ase engencho y’amang’ana amabe bagokwana; bonsi abarabe bakobarora mbasingisie emetwe yabo ase ogoichana. 
Psalms64:9 Erio abanto bonsi mbairoke, babe bakoraria emeremo ya Nyasae na komanya mono ayakorire." 
Psalms64:10 Abanyene oboronge mbabe nomogoko ase Omonene na komotamera. Abwo bare ne chinkoro chindonge mbabe bagwetogia. 
Psalms65:1 Aye Nyasae o Sayoni, ogotogigwa nokwao; goika togoikeranerie chiira chiaito." 
Psalms65:2 Aye nigo okoigwa ogosaba, ase ayio abanto bonsi mbache asore." 
Psalms65:3 Nonya ebibe biambuire aye nigo okwabera ogosaria okwo. 
Psalms65:4 Nasesenirie omonto oyio gwachorire na komoikia ang’e, amenye naye ase chigoora chiao. Intwe ntoisaneke nobuya bw’enyomba yao, Hekalu yao Enchenu." 
Psalms65:5 Aye Nyasae ore ogotooreka gwaito, ase ogokora kw’ogokumia ogotoigwa ase oboronge bwao; naye ore ogosemeria kw’abanto bamenyete ase ense, nonya ngoika chinsinyo chi’ense, na ase chinyancha chi’aare." 
Psalms65:6 Aye gwakong’irie ebitunwa ne chinguru chiao, ekiagera aye nigo bweboetie okobua." 
Psalms65:7 Aye nigo ogotoereria enyancha ekoruma, na emerindo yaye, naboigo namaroroche a mwanyabanto." 
Psalms65:8 Abamenyete ase chinsinyo chi’ense nigo bagokumia ebimanyererio biao. Abare ase erioba rigosoka korwa goikera ase rikogwa gochia, nigo okogera batera nomogoko." 
Psalms65:9 Aye nigo ogwechandera ense, kwayerentera embura, nigo okoyea obotenenku obonge mono; chindooche chiao aye Nyasae nigo chiichire namache. Ase okoroisia riroba igo nigo okoa abanto endagera." 
Psalms65:10 Aye nigo okorenta embura ase chinchwara chi’emegondo y’ense; nigo okwarania aase aimokererete igoro, erio gwatoma embura yororobia riroba na gosesenia ebigokina ase emegondo." 
Psalms65:11 Kwabekeire omwaka egutwa y’obuya bwao, amabarato ao nigo agotonya obonoru." 
Psalms65:12 Amarisia e chirooro nigo agotonya boigo, na ebigoro nigo bieboetie omogoko." 
Psalms65:13 Ebirubo nigo biichire namaicho e ching’ondi, na amakura nigo atubire ne chindagera. Kera egento nigo kegochenga nomogoko." 
Psalms66:1 Inwe abanto b’ense yonsi, aka eriogi ri’omogoko ase Nyasae;" 
Psalms66:2 terera obonene bw’erieta riaye, moe obonene ase okomotogia!" 
Psalms66:3 Motebie Nyasae: Naki ogokora kwao kore ogw’okwoboyia! Obobui bwao nigo bore obonene mono, goika ababisa bao bekeyie asore." 
Psalms66:4 Ense engima nigo ekogosasima na kogotogia, abanto bonsi nigo bagotera na gotogia erieta riao." 
Psalms66:5 Inchuo morore aya Nyasae akorire. Aya akorire ase egati ya mwanyabanto nigo are ay’okwoboyia. 
Psalms66:6 Ere akaonchora enyancha ekaba ense enyomo, erio abanto bakambokera aroro namagoro. Aroro agwo tokagoka mono asare." 
Psalms66:7 Omonene nere okogamba ase okobua kwaye kare na kare; amaiso aye nigo arigereretie ebisaku bionsi, ase igo abasaria tibabaisa kweimokereria igoro." 
Psalms66:8 Inwe abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, motogie Nyasae oito, tiga eriogi ri’okomotogia riigweke." 
Psalms66:9 Omonene nere otorendete tore moyo, tatotigeti totererigwe amagoro." 
Psalms66:10 Aye Nyasae gwatoteemire, ee, gwatoteemire buna efeta egoteemwa ase omorero." 
Psalms66:11 Nigo gwatotigete tokagwa ase egesibo aye nigo gwatotwegete egurube endito. 
Psalms66:12 Aye nigo kwarentete ababisa baito bagatotacha emetwe. Intwe nigo twaetete ime y’omorero na amache, korende nonya nabo, ogatorusiao, ogatobeka ase obuya obonge bore." 
Psalms66:13 Ninchiche ase enyomba yao, indetane ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa. Ning’ikeranie chiira nakorierete ase ogotiana," 
Psalms66:14 chiira chiria nakwanete nomonwa one, echio nariete ekero narenge ase emechando." 
Psalms66:15 Ninkorentere ching’iti chire chinoru chibe ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, ninchirue amo nekeng’wanso gie chimingichi kere ne rimisu rigiya. Nindue ne chieri ne chimbori chibe ebing’wanso." 
Psalms66:16 Inwe mwensi aba moirogete Nyasae, inchuo moigwe, nainche nimbatebie aya Omonene ankoreire." 
Psalms66:17 Inche nigo narerete neriogi rinene asare, na ogotogigwa kwaye nigo kwarenge ase oromeme rwane." 
Psalms66:18 Onye nabete ndengereretie amabe ase enkoro yane, Omonene anga tantegererete." 
Psalms66:19 Korende ekeene, Nyasae ontegereire; ee, oigure eriogi ri’ogosaba kwane." 
Psalms66:20 Nyasae atogigwe, ekiagera tangeti koigwa ogosaba kwane, gose tarusetie korwa asende obwanchani bwaye bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms67:1 Nyasae atororere amabera, atosesenie, atoraberie obosio bwaye." 
Psalms67:2 Tiga enchera yao emanyekane ase ense, na okobua kwao kw’ogotooria komanyekane ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi." 
Psalms67:3 Aye Nyasae, tiga abanto bagotogie; ee, abanto bonsi tiga bagotogie!" 
Psalms67:4 Tiga abanto b’ebisaku bagoke na gotera nomochengo; ekiagera aye nigo okonachera abanto ebina ase oboronge. Aye naye okoraa ebisaku bire ase ense. 
Psalms67:5 Aye Nyasae, tiga abanto bagotogie, ee, abanto bonsi tiga bagotogie!" 
Psalms67:6 Ense yamire okwama kwaye okonge, Nyasae, aye ore Nyasae oito, otosesenie!" 
Psalms67:7 Nyasae otosesenirie; ase igo, tiga abanto bare ase ense engima bamoiroke!" 
Psalms68:1 Tiga Nyasae aimokerere igoro, na ababisa baye basiarerwe, abanto abwo bamogechete, tiga batame barue asare." 
Psalms68:2 Tiga baserigwe gochia aare, buna erioki rikoirwa aare; abakori amabe tiga basirigwe barue ase obosio bwa Nyasae, basirigwe buna obochoe bokonyititoka ase omorero." 
Psalms68:3 Korende abanyene oboronge tiga babe nomogoko omonene, tiga babe nomochengo ase obosio bwa Nyasae, babe bagotera bare nomogoko." 
Psalms68:4 Moterere Nyasae, tera amatera agotogia erieta riaye. Moroiserie enchera ere agoetera ase chirooro. Erieta riaye n’Omonene, kabe nomochengo ase obosio bwaye!" 
Psalms68:5 Nyasae oria omenyete aase aye aachenu, nere ise bwe chintakana, na omorendi bw’ababoraka." 
Psalms68:6 Nyasae nigo akoa abatigirwe bosa chinka ase bakomenya. Nigo agosibora abanto basibire baseseneka, korende abasaria nigo bakomenya ase ense enyomo pa." 
Psalms68:7 Aye Nyasae, ekero gwatang’anete abanto bao na ogotaara ase erooro," 
Psalms68:8 ense nigo yatengechete, embura egatwa korwa igoro, na aye Nyasae nao kwarenge. Nonya negetunwa gia Sinai nigo giatengechete, ekero aye Nyasae kwarengeo; aye ore Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Psalms68:9 Aye Nyasae, nigo kwarentete embura enyinge mono, na igo omwando oo oria konya orosire okayoiraneria chinguru." 
Psalms68:10 Omoganda oo okanyora obomenyo aase agwo. Aye Nyasae, ase engencho y’obuya bwao, kwaeire abanto abataka aya baremeire." 
Psalms68:11 Omonene akarua ogochika, na omoganda omonene bw’abakungu bakararia amang’ana ayio:" 
Psalms68:12 “Abaruoti b’abarwani esegi batamire, ee, batamire!” Abakungu batigarete ase chinka ngwatanana bare ebisakorwa." 
Psalms68:13 Nonya bagendererete kobeera ase ameri e ching’ondi, nigo bare buna amaruma are ne chimbaba chiatubire nefeta, na amarionya abo atubire netahabu ekomeka‐meka." 
Psalms68:14 Ekero Omonene ore Omobui asiarerete abaruoti b’aase agwo, amagena ’embura agatwa ase egetunwa gia Salimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Aye egetunwa kia Basani, nigo ore egetunwa kia Nyasae, aye egetunwa kia Basani, nigo obwate ebichuria ebinge." 
Psalms68:16 Aye egetunwa ki’ebichuria ebinge, nase ki okorigereria ne ribero ase egetunwa ekio Nyasae achorire koba obomenyo bwaye? Ee, Nyasae ochorire komenya aroro kogenderera botambe." 
Psalms68:17 Chigari chia Nyasae nigo chire chilifu chinyinge mono, Omonene nigo are ase egati yabo buna nase Sinai, aase aye aachenu." 
Psalms68:18 Aye ogatiira gochia igoro ogoosa abasibwa, na okanyora ebiegwa ase egati ya mwanyabanto, ee, nonya nase egati y’abasaria, ng’a aye Omonene Nyasae onyare komenya aroro." 
Psalms68:19 Omonene atogigwe, rituko ase rituko nigo agotobogoreria chigurube chiaito. Nyasae nere ogotooreka gwaito." 
Psalms68:20 Nyasae oito nigo are Nyasae ogotooria. Nyasae ore Omonene nigo agototooria korwa ase amakweri. 
Psalms68:21 Omonene nasenyente emetwe y’ababisa baye, nasenyente ebiore bire netukia bi’abwo bakogenderera ne chinchera chiabo chi’ebibe." 
Psalms68:22 Korende Omonene agateba, “Ning’iranie abanto abwo korwa Basani, mbarente korwa ase chindiba chi’enyancha," 
Psalms68:23 erinde motache amanyinga abo namagoro aino, ne chisese chiaino chinyore ebitari biabo bi’ababisa baino.”" 
Psalms68:24 Aye Nyasae, omoganda oo ogotaara ororekanire; ee, aye Nyasae one, na omoruoti one, omoganda oria oo ogosoa ase obomenyo bwao obochenu." 
Psalms68:25 Abateri nigo batang’aine bosio, nyuma yabo abakobugia amakano, na ase egati yabo abaiseke bakobugia chinchigiri:" 
Psalms68:26 “Inwe abamore ab’ororeria rw’Abaisraeli, motogie Omonene Nyasae ase egati y’omosangererekano omonene.”" 
Psalms68:27 Abanto ba Benjamin, abare abasinini mono ase egati yabo, nao bare babatang’aine, na abanene b’Abayuda nao bare amo nomoganda obo, na abanene b’Abasabuloni na ab’Abanafutali." 
Psalms68:28 Aye Nyasae, oorokia okobua kwao; ee Nyasae, ayio gwatokoreire, genderera koyabeka chinguru." 
Psalms68:29 Abaruoti nigo bagokorentera ebiegwa ime ase Hekalu yao ere agwo Yerusalemu. 
Psalms68:30 Togonyera eng’iti eria y’orosana emenyete ase ebitonto ime, na amaicho e chieri amo ne chimori chiabo, nabwo abanto. Togonyera abanto goika bekeyie na gokoruera chifeta chiabo. Osiarere abanto banchete esegi." 
Psalms68:31 Abanto bare ne chinguru mbarue Misiri, na abanto b’Etiopia baayerere koramborera Nyasae amaboko abo." 
Psalms68:32 Inwe amaruoti are ase ense, tera motogie Nyasae; tera amatera ay’okomotogia Omonene!" 
Psalms68:33 Moterere ere oria oriinete igoro, igoro eria yarengeo korwa chingaki chia kare. Rora, nigo agoaka eriogi riaye rire ne chinguru riaigugwa." 
Psalms68:34 Inwe raria okobua kwa Nyasae, oyio obonene bwaye bore igoro y’Abaisraeli, na okobua kwaye nigo kore igoro onsi." 
Psalms68:35 Nyasae nigo are oyo bw’okogosa korwa ase obomenyo bwaye obochenu; ere Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli; nigo akoa abanto baye okobua ne chinguru. Nyasae atogigwe! 
Psalms69:1 Nyasae, intoorie, ekiagera amache aichoire, aikire ase omoyo one." 
Psalms69:2 Nigo ngendererete korimera ase etintira ime, aase tari ase ndanyare gotacha namagoro. Narimeire ase amache ase endiba entambe, na emerindo yantubire." 
Psalms69:3 Narosire ekiagera nkona‐korera, emioyo yane yomire pa. Amaiso aane abeire orotutu, nganyete Nyasae one." 
Psalms69:4 Abanto nigo bangechete bosa engencho ende etaiyo; nigo bare abange kobua etukia ere ase omotwe one. Ababisa baane nigo bagokwana oborimo igoro yane, baganetie gosiria obogima bwane, nigo bare ne chinguru chinyinge. Nigo naakanete ebi ntaibete." 
Psalms69:5 Aye Nyasae, nomanyete oboriri bwane, naki amamocho aane tabisekaneti korwa asore." 
Psalms69:6 Aye Nyasae bw’Emeganda, totiga abanto abwo bagosemeretie, bare ime yane, barore obosooku. Aye Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, totiga abanto abwo bagokorigia, bare ime yane, bachaywe." 
Psalms69:7 Inche nigo nachayirwe ase engencho yao, obosooku bwatubire obosio bwane." 
Psalms69:8 Inche nabeire omogeni ase abanto baminto, na omoeti ase abaminto twaiboretwe korwa ase enda eyemo." 
Psalms69:9 Risemi ri’enyomba yao riandire, emerumi y’abwo bakoramete nigo yangwerete." 
Psalms69:10 Ekero nabete nkorera ase omoyo one na kweng’ata, ngachaywa na gokwanwa bobe." 
Psalms69:11 Ekero neboyetie chigunia ase okweumia bakaba bakondabaara. 
Psalms69:12 Inche ngokwanwa bobe nabwo bagoikaransa ang’e negeita kogamba, abakonywa na gotinda bakoroisia amatera ay’ogonchecheria." 
Psalms69:13 Aye Omonene, naye ngosaba ase engaki yancheire. Aye Nyasae, inyigwere, ekiagera nigo ore nobwanchani botari koera, naende nigo ore omwegenwa ase ogotooria." 
Psalms69:14 Ntoorie, tindimera ase etintira ime! Ntoorie korwa ase ababisa baane, na korwa ase amache ’endiba entambe." 
Psalms69:15 Totiga emerindo entube, gose chindiba chimere, gose engoro emumekerie." 
Psalms69:16 Omonene, ing’iranerie, ekiagera obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe nigo bore obuya, ing’iranere, ekiagera amabera ao namange mono." 
Psalms69:17 Tobisa obosio bwao korwa asende inche omosomba oo; inyigwe bwango, ekiagera inche nigo inde ase emechando emenene." 
Psalms69:18 Inchuo ang’e asende, omboorie, nsibore korwa ase ababisa baane!" 
Psalms69:19 Aye nomanyete amabe nakoreirwe, na buna nasookigwe na gochaywa; nigo omanyete ababisa baane bonsi." 
Psalms69:20 Amabe ayio nakoreirwe asionoire enkoro yane, bono nerusirie moyo. Nigo nasemeretie ng’a ndorerwe amabeebe, korende tinayaroreretwe; nigo nasemeretie inyore abaremia, korende tinabanyora." 
Psalms69:21 Ekero narenge nenchara, abanto bakang’a amache ’endorwe ribaga ri’endagera, na ekero narenge nerang’o, bakang’a chinkama nkanywa." 
Psalms69:22 Tiga endagera ere ase amasio abo, ebe egesugunia asebare, na oboreba ase abwo bekagete ng’a mbuya bare." 
Psalms69:23 Oukorie amaiso abo: otengechie chibachwa chiabo kogenderera. 
Psalms69:24 Obaumorere ekeririanda kiao, na endamwamu yao yoke igoro yabo." 
Psalms69:25 Tiga omochie obo otigare bosa, monto onde tamenya ase chiema chiabo." 
Psalms69:26 Abanto abwo nigo bachandete omonto oria kwaagete, na bagokwana igoro y’obororo bw’oyio kwabetete." 
Psalms69:27 Menta obobe igoro ase obobe bwabo; tobatiga basoe ase oboronge bwao. 
Psalms69:28 Tiga amarieta abo atinyigwe korwa ase ebuku y’abare moyo, tarikwa amo nay’abanyene oboronge." 
Psalms69:29 Inche nigo inde ase emechando na obororo; aye Nyasae, ogotooreka kwao konyimokererie igoro." 
Psalms69:30 Nintogie erieta ria Nyasae ase okomoterera; nindarie obonene bwaye ase okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono. 
Psalms69:31 Ayio naro aragokie Omonene kobua komoruera eng’ombe koba ekeng’wanso, gose komoruera eeri ere ne chingunchara na ebitaago." 
Psalms69:32 Abwo bakoreire bobe mbarore ayio, bagoke; inwe aba mokorigia Nyasae, tiga chinkoro chiaino chikorwe chinyia." 
Psalms69:33 Omonene nigo akoigwa abanto baria baremeire; ere tari gochaya abanto baye abwo bare ase obosibwa. 
Psalms69:34 Tiga igoro na ense chitogie Omonene, naboigo na enyancha, na ebitongwa bionsi bire imeo." 
Psalms69:35 Nyasae natoorie Sayoni na aagache emechie y’Abayuda naende, abasomba baye mbayeire ebe eyabo na komenya aroro." 
Psalms69:36 Abanto b’ororeria rw’abasomba b’Omonene mbayeire ebe eyabo, boigo nabanto baria banchete erieta ri’Omonene mbamenye aroro." 
Psalms70:1 Aye Nyasae, koranche ontoorie! Omonene, oche bwango onkonye!" 
Psalms70:2 Abanto abwo barigetie gosiria obogima bwane, tiga basookigwe na gotantanigwa, na abwo baganetie ng’a obobe bonyore inche, tiga bairanigwe nyuma na gochaywa." 
Psalms70:3 Abwo bagonchaya na goteba: “Kiamonyorire!” Tiga bakirigwe‐kiri ase obosooku bwabo. 
Psalms70:4 Abwo bonsi bagokorigia, tiga bakogokere na kogochengera; abwo banchete ogotooreka kwao, tiga bagenderere goteba, “Nyasae atogigwe!”" 
Psalms70:5 Inche nigo inde omotaka na omoremerwa; aye Nyasae, inchuo bwango onkonye! Aye naye Omokonyi one, na Omotooria one. Aye Omonene, totebana!" 
Psalms71:1 Omonene, naye natameire, tontiga nsookigwe." 
Psalms71:2 Nkonye na onsibore goetera ase oboronge bwao; ntegerere, ontoorie!" 
Psalms71:3 Aye kabe egetare kiane ki’obotamero ase nkogenda botambe, aye gwanchire gontooria. Naki aye negetare kiane, na egekengero kiane egekong’u." 
Psalms71:4 Aye Nyasae one, ntoorie korwa ase okoboko kw’omokori amabe, indusie korwa ase okobua kw’oyo otari omoronge, na oyore omotindi." 
Psalms71:5 Aye Omonene Nyasae, naye ogosemeria kwane, nabeire nkwegenete korwa obwana bwane." 
Psalms71:6 Kwabeire gontenenerete korwa ekero ntaraiborwa, naye kwandusetie korwa ase enda ya baba. Naye ndabe nkona‐gotogia botambe." 
Psalms71:7 Inche nabeire buna egento ki’ogoichanerwa ase abanto abange, korende aye naye obotamero bwane obokong’u." 
Psalms71:8 Omonwa one noichorigwe nogotogigwa kwao, na omobaso boira ninkobake." 
Psalms71:9 Tobaisa gonchwara ekero ndabe nagotire, tontiga ekero chinguru chirabe chiang’ereire." 
Psalms71:10 Ababisa baane nigo bakongamba, basangererekanire gokora omoroberio bw’ogonsiria," 
Psalms71:11 bateba, “Nyasae omotigire, inchuo tomotunye, erinde tomobwate, onde tari oranyare komotooria.”" 
Psalms71:12 Aye Nyasae, tombeera aare, Nyasae one, inchuo bwango onkonye!" 
Psalms71:13 Ababisa abwo bakorigia obogima bwane, tiga basookigwe na gosirigwa kegima; abwo bakorigia gonkora bobe, tiga bachaywe na gochecherigwa mono." 
Psalms71:14 Korende inche nimbe nogosemeria botambe, na nimbe nkona‐kogotogia mono goetania." 
Psalms71:15 Nimbe nkoraria ogokora kwao kw’oboronge nomonwa one. Omobaso boira nimbe nkonagwatora ogotooreka kwao; okwo kore okonene ntanyare gokorenga. 
Psalms71:16 Aye Omonene Nyasae, nimbe nkoraria ogokora kwao okonene, nimbe nkona‐gotogia oboronge bwao, ee, ningotogie aye bweka." 
Psalms71:17 Aye Nyasae, kwabeire gokonyorokereria korwa obwana bwane, goika rero iga ningenderere konakoraria ogokora kwao kw’ogokumia." 
Psalms71:18 Aye Nyasae, tobaisa gonchwara ekero ndabe nagotire, namerire chimbuche chiarabire se, goika imbe narareirie abanto b’ebiaare bigochi‐gocha chinguru chiao, na okobua kwao." 
Psalms71:19 Aye Nyasae, oboronge bwao boigete aaria igoro mono. Aye nigo gwakorete amang’ana amanene mono. Ee, Nyasae, ning’o ore buna aye?" 
Psalms71:20 Ekero gwatotigete, nigo twaroche emechando emenge, korende nonyare gotokora abayia naende; torusie, ototiirie korwa ase chiirima chire ase ense." 
Psalms71:21 Aye omente obonene bwane, na ondemie naende." 
Psalms71:22 Aye Nyasae one, nimbe nkobugia obokano ase okogotogia, ekiagera aye nigo ore omwegenwa. Nimbe nkogoterera ase okobugia obokano bw’ebirigisa, aye Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Psalms71:23 Ning’ake eriogi rinene ri’omogoko nomonwa one, ekero ndabe ngotera amatera akogotogia. Nintere nomoyo one boigo, ekiagera aye gwantooririe." 
Psalms71:24 Omobaso boira oromeme rwane ndobe rokona‐gokwana igoro y’oboronge bwao, erinde abwo barigetie gonkora bobe basookigwe na gochaywa." 
Psalms72:1 Nyasae, kae omoruoti okobua gw’okogamba buna aye okogamba, na omwana bw’omoruoti agambe ase oboronge buna aye." 
Psalms72:2 Erio amanye konachera abanto bao ebina bi’oboronge na gokora ekeene ase abataka. 
Psalms72:3 Ebitunwa na ebigoro mbirentere abanto omorembe goetera ase oboronge. 
Psalms72:4 Tiga omoruoti abe okorwanerera abataka, na atoorie abana b’abaremeire, korende asenyente abanto bagokorera abande bobe." 
Psalms72:5 Abanto mbakoiroke, koreng’ana buna erioba na omotienyi bigendererete kobao, ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Psalms72:6 Ere tiga aike korwa igoro buna embura egotwa ase obonyansi oborere, na buna omonyirira ogotwa igoro ase riroba." 
Psalms72:7 Tiga omonyaboronge asesenigwe ase amatuko aye, na omorembe ogenderere kobao goika ekero omotienyi otabeo." 
Psalms72:8 Tiga omoruoti abe okogamba korwa ase enyancha eyemo goika eyende, na korwa ase orooche rw’Eufarati goika ase ensinyo y’ense." 
Psalms72:9 Abanto bamenyete ase erooro mbatung’ame ase obosio bwaye bamosike, na ababisa baye bamene orotu." 
Psalms72:10 Abaruoti ba Tarisisi na ab’ebisinka mbabe bakomorentera ebiegwa; naboigo nabaruoti ba Sheba na Seba mbamorentere ebango. 
Psalms72:11 Abaruoti bonsi mbatung’ame ase obosio bwaye bamosike, na abanto b’ebisaku bionsi mbamokorere." 
Psalms72:12 Ere nigo agotooria oyoremeire gakorangeria, naboigo nomotaka na oyotabwati onde okomokonya." 
Psalms72:13 Nigo are omwororo ase omoremerwa na ase omotaka, boigo nigo agotooria emioyo y’abaremeire." 
Psalms72:14 Nigo akobooria emioyo yabo korwa ase abachandi babo na korwa ase obotindi. Amanyinga abo nigo are nengencho enene asare. 
Psalms72:15 Tiga omoruoti agenderere koba moyo. Chitahabu chi’ense ya Seba chirentwe asare, tiga abanto babe bakomosabera botambe, boigo tiga abe okona‐gosesenigwa kera rituko." 
Psalms72:16 Tiga endagera yame enyinge ase ense, nonya nase ebitunwa igoro. Chindagera echio tiga china‐konyegerigwa buna emete ya Lebanoni. Abanto b’emechie tiga babuche babe buna obonyansi bw’ense." 
Psalms72:17 Erieta riaye tiga rigenderere kobao botambe, rikume koreng’ana buna erioba rigendererete kobao. Abanto mbabe bagosesenigwa ime yaye; abanto b’ebisaku bionsi tiga bamoroke oyosesenirie." 
Psalms72:18 Omonene Nyasae, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, tiga atogigwe, nere bweka ogokora amakumia." 
Psalms72:19 Tiga erieta riaye ri’obonene ritogigwe goika kare na kare; obonene bwaye tiga boichore ase ense yonsi. Amina, Amina!" 
Psalms72:20 Oyo noro omoerio bw’ogosaba gwa Daudi, mosinto o Yese." 
Psalms73:1 Ekeene, Nyasae nigo are omuya mono ase Abaisraeli, ee, ase abwo bare ne chinkoro chichenegete." 
Psalms73:2 Amagoro aane konya abeire ang’e kogochwa, konya nabeire ang’e gotererigwa," 
Psalms73:3 ekiagera nigo nabete ne ribero ase abanto abaenenu, ekero naroche ng’a abwo ababe nigo basesenirie." 
Psalms73:4 Barabwo tibari konyorwa nobokong’u bonde ase obogima bwabo; emebere yabo nigo ere emiya, naende emenoru." 
Psalms73:5 Tibabwati emechando buna abanto bande babwate; tibari konyora amaakwa buna abande. 
Psalms73:6 Ase ayio, obwerori nigo boetanaine amagoti abo, na obotindi nabwo beboyetie buna eanga." 
Psalms73:7 Amaiso abo nigo akogirigenta nobonoru, obotantanu bw’ebirengererio bie chinkoro chiabo nobonge mono." 
Psalms73:8 Nigo bagochecheria abande na gokwana ase okobakora bobe. Nigo bakweimokereria igoro na kobatianera. 
Psalms73:9 Emenwa yabo nigo egokwana amang’ana amabe are mamincha ya igoro; ne chimeme chiabo chiasokia ayakogenda ase ense engima. 
Psalms73:10 Ase ayio abanto babo nigo bakoonchoka bababwatia, nigo bakwong’otera amache abo are amange." 
Psalms73:11 Erio bateba, “Naki Nyasae arakore amanye? Inee! Ere Oyore Igoro Mono nabwate obong’aini?”" 
Psalms73:12 Naama! Naboigo abakori amabe bare; botambe nigo bare buya na bagendererete komenta obotenenku bwabo. 
Psalms73:13 Ekeene, mbosa nabeire ndendete enkoro yane ebe echenegete, mbosa nabeire ngoisaba amaboko aane ng’a timba nokomocha." 
Psalms73:14 Omobaso boira nabeire nkonyora amaakwa, na kera emambia nabeire nkonyora egesusuro gi’okondongeyia." 
Psalms73:15 Onye nakwanete amang’ana buna ayio, nigo narenge gocha koba oyotari omwegenwa ase ebiaare bi’abanto bao." 
Psalms73:16 Bono ekero nabete nkorengereria komanya engencho y’amang’ana ayio, amang’ana ayio akaba amakong’u asende," 
Psalms73:17 goika ekero nasoete ime ase obomenyo obochenu bwa Nyasae, erio nario namanyete omoerio bw’abanyabibe buna ore." 
Psalms73:18 Ekeene, aye Omonene nigo okobabeka aase are aaterere, aye nigo okobaturunkania kwabasiria kegima." 
Psalms73:19 Barabwo nigo bagosirigwa rioka, omoerio obo nomoondoko okobasiria." 
Psalms73:20 Nigo banga buna chindoto omonto akweba mambia gakoboka. Aye Omonene, naboigo bare asore buna omogwekano okororwa ase okorota, ekero okoimoka nigo okweba ebieni biabo." 
Psalms73:21 Ekero narenge nobororo ase omoyo ime, na enkoro yane ekaba buna eyabetirwe," 
Psalms73:22 nigo nabete omoriri mono, tinamanya gento; nkaba buna eng’iti y’orosana ase obosio bwao." 
Psalms73:23 Nonya naboigo, inche nigo ngendererete kobeera asore botambe, aye nigo obwatete okoboko kwane gw’okorio." 
Psalms73:24 Aye nigo okondaa na gonsemia, na nyuma y’ayio noche kong’ira onsoyie ase obonene." 
Psalms73:25 Inee! Ning’o naende imbwate aaria igoro, otatiga aye bweka? Ekero nkobwate, gento tikeri aiga ase ense nganetie." 
Psalms73:26 Omobere one na enkoro yane nabo biranyare koborwa chinguru, korende aye Nyasae, naye ore egetare gi’enkoro yane, naende naye egetare kiane goika kare na kare." 
Psalms73:27 Rora, abanto abwo bagweatanana korwa asore nabasire; aye nigo orasirie abwo batari abegenwa asore." 
Psalms73:28 Korende asende inche, nigo ere buya mono kobeera ang’e na Nyasae. Omonene Nyasae obeire obotamero bwane, ninyare koraria emeremo yaye yonsi." 
Psalms74:1 Nyasae, nase ki gwatotigire kegima? Ninki gekogera endamwamu yao yokire igoro ye ching’ondi chi’oborisia bwao?" 
Psalms74:2 Inyora omoganda bw’abanto bao, abwo kwenyorerete ase chingaki chia kare. Aye nigo kwababooretie babe egesaku kere omwando oo. Inyora egetunwa gia Sayoni, agwo ase kwabeire komenyete." 
Psalms74:3 Inchuo otaare aase agwo agendererete gosareka; ababisa nigo basaretie bionsi ebiarenge ime ase obomenyo boria obochenu. 
Psalms74:4 Ababisa bao nigo bakwoga aase abanto bao basangererekanete, barabwo batenenirie chibendera chiabo koba ebimanyererio biabo." 
Psalms74:5 Nigo yarorekanete buna nabanto bakogecha emete, bakaimokia ebisire kogecha rinani rinoru." 
Psalms74:6 Nigo baimogetie chinyundo na ebisire, bakabuna ebinto bionsi bie Hekalu biabachetwe korwa ase emete." 
Psalms74:7 Nigo basambete nomorero Obomenyo bwao Obochenu, bakaiyeria inse Obomenyo Obochenu bw’erieta riao, na bakabokora bokaba obotachenegeti." 
Psalms74:8 Abanto abwo bagateba ase emioyo yabo, “Goika tobasirie kegima.” Nigo basambete aase onsi abanto ba Nyasae bagosangererekana." 
Psalms74:9 Titorochi ebimanyererio biaito, na ababani tibari, na onde tari ase egati yaito omanyete ngoika ririri aya arabe." 
Psalms74:10 Aye Nyasae, ngoika ririri ababisa barabe bakona‐gochecheria? Inee! Ababisa aba nigo bagochia kona‐korama erieta riao kogenderera botambe?" 
Psalms74:11 Nase ki aye kwaringire okoboko kwao gw’okorio? Korambore korwa ase egekuba kiao, obasirie kegima." 
Psalms74:12 Nyasae, aye nigo ore omoruoti one, kwarengeo korwa kare, naye kwabeire kogokora emeremo y’ogotooria ense engima." 
Psalms74:13 Aye nigo gwatananete enyancha ase okobua kwao, ogasenyenta emetwe ye chinchoka chi’enyancha." 
Psalms74:14 Aye nigo gwasenyentete emetwe ya Leviatani, eng’iti eria enene y’okwoboyia, erio omobere oye okayoa ching’iti chi’erooro chikayoria." 
Psalms74:15 Aye nigo gwatubogetie chinsoko ne chindooche; boigo ogasiria amache e chindooche chinene, chigakamoka." 
Psalms74:16 Omobaso noyoo, na obotuko nobwao, naye gwatongete omotienyi na erioba." 
Psalms74:17 Naye gwachigete aase chimbebe chionsi chi’ense chikobeera, naende ogakora chingaki chie riberera na echi’obokendu." 
Psalms74:18 Aye Omonene, inyora buna ababisa bagendererete kogochecheria, na abatakoirogeti nigo bagendererete korama erieta riao." 
Psalms74:19 Tobaisa korua omoyo one, inche riruma riao, ase omoganda oria omobe; tibweba nonya ng’ake abanto bao abwo baregire." 
Psalms74:20 Oinyore okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania gwakorete naintwe; ense nigo eichire nobobe ase kera ensemo y’omosunte. 
Psalms74:21 Tobaisa gotiga abanto abwo bagokorerwa bobe basookigwe; tiga abanto abataka na abwo baremeire batogie erieta riao. 
Psalms74:22 Nyasae, imoka bwerwanerere aye omonyene; inyora buna abatakoirogeti bakogokorera echeche kera rituko." 
Psalms74:23 Tobaisa kweba okwoga kw’ababisa bao, ne riroroche ri’abakogochecheria rigotiira botambe." 
Psalms75:1 Aye Nyasae, nigo togokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, naende mbuya mono, ekiagera erieta riao nigo rire ang’e, nigo tokorareria emeremo yao y’ogokumia." 
Psalms75:2 “Ekero engaki nachigete eraike, inche Nyasae ninache ekina kia boronge." 
Psalms75:3 Ekero ense egotengechigwa amo na bonsi abamenyeteo, ninche omonyene nigo nkobwata chisiiro chiaye bokong’u." 
Psalms75:4 Nigo ngokania abanto bagwetogia: Timobaisa gwetogia, naende nintebie abakori amabe: Timobaisa komera chingunchara chi’obomwenu." 
Psalms75:5 Ee, timobaisa gochiimokereria igoro ase ogwekaga, gose gokwana amabe, inwe abamore abanyabigoti bikong’u.”" 
Psalms75:6 Obonene tibori korwa moocha, gose korwa bosongo, gose tibori korwa ase ebitunwa bi’erooro." 
Psalms75:7 Korende Nyasae nere okonacha ekina, okeyia oyomo, na oimokereria oyonde igoro." 
Psalms75:8 Omonene nabwate egekombe ase okoboko kwaye, geichire nedivai entindi yochoganirie, nayeumorere abakori amabe bonsi b’ense na kobabetereria bayenywe, bayekoore amo neturubo yaye." 
Psalms75:9 Korende inche nimbe nkona‐koraria obuya bw’Omonene kogenderera botambe; nimbe nkona‐gotera ogotera gw’okomotogia Nyasae o Yakobo. 
Psalms75:10 Omonene nabune kegima chingunchara chi’abakori amabe, korende echi’abanyaboronge nachiimokererie igoro." 
Psalms76:1 Nyasae nigo amanyekanete ase Abayuda, erieta riaye rire rinene mono ase Abaisraeli." 
Psalms76:2 Obomenyo bwaye Obochenu nigo bore agwo Salemu, ere nigo amenyete agwo Sayoni." 
Psalms76:3 Aroro agwo nabunete chinsara chi’amata chikomesa, boigo naende akabutorana chinguba, na emioro na ebirwanero binde bi’esegi." 
Psalms76:4 Aye nigo okomeka‐meka oichire nobonene kogocha korwa ase ebitunwa bi’ababisa kwabuire. 
Psalms76:5 Abare ne chinkoro chimwenu baurirwe ebinto konya basakoire, bono bararire chitoro chindito. Abarwani esegi bonsi basinyirwe korwana namaboko abo." 
Psalms76:6 Aye Nyasae o Yakobo, ekero gwatogonyerete abanto bariinete chibarasi, barabwo nigo bagwete inse, bakaba buna nigo bakwete, amo ne chibarasi chiabo." 
Psalms76:7 Aye bweka nigo ore oyo bw’okoondokia mono. Ning’o oranyare gotenena ase obosio bwao, ekero kwabeire nendamwamu?" 
Psalms76:8 Korwa agwo igoro, nigo kwamanyetie ense ebina biao; na ense ekoboa egakira‐kiri," 
Psalms76:9 ekero aye Nyasae gwatenenete konacha ekina na kobatooria abwo bonsi bagokorerwa bobe. 
Psalms76:10 Ekeene, endamwamu ya mwanyabanto nenyare kogera aye otogigwe; eyeratigare noyieboyie buna orokini." 
Psalms76:11 Inwe karie chiira ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, na mochiikeranie. Abanto bonsi bamoetanaine, tiga bamorentere ebiegwa, ere oria ogwenerete koirokwa." 
Psalms76:12 Ere nigo agokeyia abare abaenenu ase ense, abaruoti bonsi b’ense nigo bamwoboete." 
Psalms77:1 Nkorera nde ase Nyasae neriogi rinene, nigo nkorera mono asare ng’a anyigwe." 
Psalms77:2 Ase chingaki chi’emechando nigo nkorigia Omonene; ase obotuko nigo nkorambora okoboko kwane ase ogosaba ntari korosa, omoyo one nigo okwanga koremigwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ekero nkoinyora Nyasae, nigo nkorera, na ekero nkomorengereria, nigo ngokwa omoyo." 
Psalms77:4 Aye Omonene, nigo ogotanga amaiso aane takonyora chitoro. Nigo nchandegete mono, tinkonyara gokwana." 
Psalms77:5 Nigo nkoba nkorengereria igoro y’amatuko a kare, nkoinyora emiaka ya kare buna yarenge." 
Psalms77:6 Ase obotuko obogima nigo nkoinyora amatera aane: nigo nkoba nkorengereria ase enkoro yane ime, neriga‐rigia na kweboria:" 
Psalms77:7 “Inee! Omonene natotigire kegima? Tagotororera amabera rinde? 
Psalms77:8 Inee! Obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe mbwaerire kegima? Chiira chiaye nchiaikire omoerio? 
Psalms77:9 Nyasae nigo ebire koba omonyamabera? Inee! Nigo abeire nendamwamu, goika osiekire amabeebe?”" 
Psalms77:10 Erio ngateba, “Obo nobororo bwane, eye nengaki okoboko gw’okorio kw’Oyore Igoro Mono gwantomeire.”" 
Psalms77:11 Ning’inyore ogokora kwao aye Omonene; ee, ning’inyore amakumia ao a kare." 
Psalms77:12 Nimbe nkorengereria igoro y’emeremo yao yonsi, na imbe nkona‐koiranerera ogokora kwao gwe chinguru." 
Psalms77:13 Aye Nyasae, chinchera chiao nigo chire chinchenu. Nenyasae ereri ere enene buna Nyasae oito?" 
Psalms77:14 Aye nigo ore Nyasae ogokora amakumia; kwaorokirie okobua kwao ase egati ya mwanyabanto. 
Psalms77:15 Aye nigo gwatooretie abanto bao nokoboko kwao koramboire. Abanto abwo nigo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo na orwa Yusufu. 
Psalms77:16 Aye Nyasae, ekero amache akoroche, ee, ekero akoroche, nigo akwoboete, ne chindiba chikanyegerigwa." 
Psalms77:17 Amare agaitera amache; ne chinkoba chigaaka korwa igoro, chinsara chiao chikamesa ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Psalms77:18 Okogukura gw’enkoba nigo kwarenge ime ase ekerambauti, na ense egatengecha." 
Psalms77:19 Nigo gwakorete enchera yao ase enyancha, oboeto bwao bokaba ime ase amache amange mono, korende nonya naboigo amabarato ao tarorekanete aroro." 
Psalms77:20 Aye nigo kwaraaete abanto bao buna riicho rikoraagwa, ee, okabaraa goetera ase amaboko a Musa na Haroni." 
Psalms78:1 Inwe abanto baane, igwa amang’ana nkoborokereria, tegerera moigwe amang’ana ’omonwa one." 
Psalms78:2 Inche ninkwane ase omoreng’anio, nigo ndakwane ase emebayeno ya kare," 
Psalms78:3 amang’ana ayio twaigwete na koyamanya, ayio chisokoro chiaito chiatotebetie." 
Psalms78:4 Amang’ana ayio titokoyabisa ase abana babo; goika totebie ebiaare bigochi‐gocha ogokora kw’obonene bw’Omonene, na amakumia aye ay’okobua akorire." 
Psalms78:5 Ere nigo abegete oborori bwaye ase abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, na akaa Abaisraeli amachiko, ayio achigete chisokoro chiaito chiorokererie abana babo." 
Psalms78:6 Nigo aganetie ng’a abanto b’ebiaare bigochi‐gocha bayamanye, ee, nonya nabana b’ebiaare konya bataraiborwa, naende abwo bayatebie abana babo." 
Psalms78:7 Erio nario barabe bagosemeria Nyasae, na tibabaisa kweba emeremo yaye, korende babe bakobwata amachiko aye." 
Psalms78:8 Barabwo tibabaisa koba buna chisokoro chiabo, chiria chitaigwerete, naende chiasaretie; tichiarenge ne chinkoro chindonge, gose tichiarenge chinyegenwa ase Nyasae ase emioyo yabo." 
Psalms78:9 Abanto b’Efraimu, abwo babogoretie amata, bakaonchoka bagatama ase rituko ri’esegi." 
Psalms78:10 Barabwo tibarendete okobwatana kw’ogotianania kwa Nyasae, naende nigo bangete kobwatia amachiko aye." 
Psalms78:11 Bakeba amang’ana Omonene konya akorire, na ebikone biria konya aorokirie asebare." 
Psalms78:12 Ase amasio e chisokoro chiabo Nyasae nigo akorete amakumia agwo ase ense ya Misiri, ase orogongo rwa Soani." 
Psalms78:13 Omonene nigo aatananete amache ’enyancha, akaambokeria chisokoro chiabo aroro, agakora amache ayio agatenena buna orwaki." 
Psalms78:14 Ase chingaki chia mobaso nigo arenge kobaraa ne riire, na ase chingaki chia botuko abaraa ne riire ri’omorero." 
Psalms78:15 Ere agatandora ebitare agwo ase erooro, agasokeria abanto amache amange mono buna aye chindooche chinene." 
Psalms78:16 Agatubokia chindooche korwa ase ebitare ime, na amache agatirimboka buna aye chindooche chinene." 
Psalms78:17 Nonya naboigo abanto abwo nigo bamentete gokora ebibe ase Omonene, agwo ase erooro nigo basaretie ase Omonene Ore Igoro Mono." 
Psalms78:18 Barabwo nigo bateemete Nyasae ase chinkoro chiabo ime, bakagania baegwe endagera basanerete." 
Psalms78:19 Bagakwana amang’ana arenge mamincha ya Nyasae, bagateba, “Inee! Nyasae nanyare gototerekera endagera eisaine aa ase erooro?" 
Psalms78:20 Ee, amaene ere naagete egetare na amache agacharara korwao, ne chindooche chi’amache amange chikarwao, korende, Inee, nanyare boigo koa intwe abanto baye endagera? Nanyare gotoa na enyama torie?”" 
Psalms78:21 Ase ayio, ekero Omonene aigwete ayio, agaichorwa nekeririanda, akarwania abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo nomorero, ekiagera nigo abete nendamwamu enene mono ase Abaisraeli." 
Psalms78:22 Ayio nigo akoregete, ekiagera tibamwegenete Nyasae, naende tibegenete ng’a ere nanyare kobatooria." 
Psalms78:23 Korende nonya nabo, ere nigo achigete igoro, akaigora ebisieri bi’aroro;" 
Psalms78:24 akabatweria endagera ekorokwa mana, bakaba bakoyeria; ee, akabaa endagera korwa igoro." 
Psalms78:25 Ase ayio, mwanyabanto bakaria endagera y’abamalaika; Omonene akabatomera endagera enyinge mono." 
Psalms78:26 Akarenta omwaga o moocha okagusa igoro, na ase okobua kwaye akagusia omwaga korwa irianyi." 
Psalms78:27 Erio akabarentera chinyama chinyinge buna orotu, ne chinyoni chikoiruruka chinyinge buna omokenye ore ase enyancha;" 
Psalms78:28 agatiga chinyoni echio chikagwa gati‐gati y’egetwori kiabo, chigaetanana chiema chiabo." 
Psalms78:29 Erio abanto abwo bakaria chinyama bakaigota, ekiagera Nyasae nigo abaete eke basanerete." 
Psalms78:30 Korende ekero chinyama chiarenge ase emenwa yabo bagendererete gochitakuna, naende konya bataraisanekia obogworu bwabo." 
Psalms78:31 Omonene akaba nendamwamu enene asebare, agaita abanto abwo barenge ne chinguru goetania abande, agakoora kegima abamura b’Abaisraeli." 
Psalms78:32 Nonya naboigo, abanto abwo nigo bagendererete gokora ebibe, nonya ere okorete amakumia, tibamwegenete." 
Psalms78:33 Ase ayio agakoora amatuko abo, akayasiria, na emiaka yabo ekaera ase okoondokia." 
Psalms78:34 Ekero aitete abanto abatigari nigo bamorigetie; nigo baonchogete, bakamorigia ase ekeene." 
Psalms78:35 Nigo bainyorete ng’a Nyasae nere egetare kiabo; naende ng’a Nyasae Oyore Igoro Mono, nere Omobooria obo." 
Psalms78:36 Korende nigo bakwanete amang’ana amansu ase okomong’aina, bagakwana oborimo nemenwa yabo." 
Psalms78:37 Tibamobwatetie bokong’u ne chinkoro chiabo, gose tibarenge abegenwa ase okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania." 
Psalms78:38 Korende Omonene nigo arenge namabera, akaba okwabera ebibe biabo tabasiria; ase chingaki chinyinge nigo arenge gotanga endamwamu yaye, gose tarenge gotiga ekeririanda kiaye gioke mono." 
Psalms78:39 Nigo ainyorete ng’a barabwo mwanyabanto bagosira, nigo banga buna embeo egoeta na tekoirana." 
Psalms78:40 Ase chingaki chinyinge nigo babete bagosaria ase Omonene agwo ase erooro; bakaba bakomoichania aroro agwo. 
Psalms78:41 Nigo babete bakomoteema naende naende, bakaba bakomogechia ere oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Psalms78:42 Tibabete bakoinyora chinguru chi’okoboko kwaye, gose tibabete bakoinyora rituko riria ababooretie korwa ase ababisa babo," 
Psalms78:43 na buna akorete ebikone ebinge ase ense ya Misiri, na amakumia agwo ase orogongo rwa Soani." 
Psalms78:44 Aroro aaria Omonene nigo aonchorete amache e chindooche akaba amanyinga, abanto tibanyara koyanywa." 
Psalms78:45 Nigo arentete chingi chinyinge chikabachanda, na akabarentera ebioto bigasaria ense yabo." 
Psalms78:46 Akarenta chingeeti chigasaria ebimeri biabo, naende akarenta chingige chikaria endagera y’emegondo yabo bechanderete." 
Psalms78:47 Omonene nigo arentete amagena ’embura agasaria emesabibu yabo, agasaria nemeko yabo." 
Psalms78:48 Akarenta amagena ’embura agaita chiombe chiabo, ne chinkoba chigaita ching’ondi ne chimbori chiabo." 
Psalms78:49 Omonene akabatomera endamwamu yaye enene, na ekeririanda kiaye, na okogechigwa kwaye na emechando yonsi, ekeombe ekio ki’abamalaika b’ogosiria." 
Psalms78:50 Ere akaroiseria endamwamu yaye enchera; akabeka emioyo yabo ase amakweri, akabarentera oborwaire bokabaita." 
Psalms78:51 Agaita abana abatangi bonsi aaria Misiri, abwo barenge abatangi be chinguru chiabo ase chiema chia Hamu." 
Psalms78:52 Erio akang’anyia abanto baye buna ching’ondi chikong’anyigwa, akabaraa ase erooro buna riicho rikoraagwa." 
Psalms78:53 Akabaraa na kobarenda buya, na tibabete nobwoba, korende enyancha ekamera ababisa babo." 
Psalms78:54 Omonene akabarenta ase ense yaye enchenu, ase egetunwa keria enyorerete nokoboko kwaye gw’okorio." 
Psalms78:55 Agaseria abanto b’ebisaku korwa bosio bwabo. Nigo abaatananerete ense eyio ekaba emiando yabo, akabeka Abaisraeli bakamenya ase chiema chiabo." 
Psalms78:56 Erio bagateema Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono, bakamogechia, tibabwatete amachiko aye." 
Psalms78:57 Nigo baonchogete tibaba abegenwa, buna chisokoro chiabo chitabete abegenwa, bakaba abasaria buna obota bosaregete." 
Psalms78:58 Bakagechia Omonene ase engencho y’aase abo aimokererete igoro bagosasimera, na ekiagera basasimete emegwekano, Omonene akaba ne risemi." 
Psalms78:59 Ekero Nyasae aroche ayio, akaba nekeririanda, agatiga Abaisraeli kegima." 
Psalms78:60 Omonene akaanga eema yaye yarenge Silo, eema eria akorete obomenyo bwaye ase egati y’abanto." 
Psalms78:61 Nigo atigete eke kiarenge chinguru chiaye kegasakorwa, ekio kiarenge obonene bwaye agakerua ase amaboko ’ababisa." 
Psalms78:62 Ere nigo abete nendamwamu ase abanto abwo barenge omwando oye, akabarua bagaitwa nemioro." 
Psalms78:63 Omorero ogaita abamura babo, na abaiseke babo bakaborwa abakobanyuoma." 
Psalms78:64 Abakuani babo nigo baitetwe nemioro, na ababoraka babo tibanyarete kobareera." 
Psalms78:65 Erio Omonene akaboka buna nigo araire chitoro, na akaba buna omonto etuoni onyure edivai ogoaka eriogi;" 
Psalms78:66 agaaka abachandi baye bagatama gochia ase barwete, akababeka ase obosooku goika kare na kare." 
Psalms78:67 Omonene akaanga abanto b’ororeria rwa Yusufu, gose tachorete abanto b’egesaku gi’Efraimu," 
Psalms78:68 korende agachora abanto b’egesaku kia Yuda, na egetunwa gia Sayoni ekio anchete." 
Psalms78:69 Aroro akaagacha obomenyo bwaye obochenu bobeere igoro mono, nabobe obokong’u buna ense ekong’irie kogenderera botambe." 
Psalms78:70 Agachora Daudi omosomba oye, akamorusia korwa ase arenge korisia ching’ondi." 
Psalms78:71 Ee, akamorusia korwa ase arenge gotunyana ching’ondi chiare ne chimanwa chikogonka, akamokora akaba omorisia bw’ororeria rwa Yakobo, abanto baye, nabwo Abaisraeli omwando oye." 
Psalms78:72 Daudi akaba omorisia bw’abanto abwo ore nenkoro endonge, akaba okobaraa nokoboko kw’obong’aini." 
Psalms79:1 Aye Nyasae, abanto batakomanyeti bachire basoire ase omwando oo, barabwo bakorire Hekalu yao Enchenu yabeire eyetachenegeti, bakorire Yerusalemu obeire chitui chi’amagena." 
Psalms79:2 Baeire chinyoni emebere y’abasomba bao chiyerie, ee, chinyama chi’emebere y’abachenu bao ase ching’iti chi’orosana." 
Psalms79:3 Baiteire amanyinga abo buna amache ase chinsemo chionsi chia Yerusalemu, abakobatindeka baborire." 
Psalms79:4 Intwe twabeire okogechia ase abanto bamenyete ang’e naintwe, abanto batoetanaine nigo bagotochecheria na gotosekerera." 
Psalms79:5 Aye Omonene ngoika ririri oragenderere koba nendamwamu asetore? Inee! Ribero riao, ngoika ririri rigochia gwoka buna omorero?" 
Psalms79:6 Umora endamwamu yao igoro ase abanto b’ebisaku batakomanyeti, na igoro ase amagambi ayio atari gokorangeria oyakonye." 
Psalms79:7 Naki abanto abwo basiririe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, naende basaririe aase bamenyete." 
Psalms79:8 Tobaisa gotoa intwe egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe bie chisokoro chiaito; otorotote namabera ao bwango, ekiagera twabeire bosa kegima." 
Psalms79:9 Aye Nyasae ore ogotooreka gwaito, ase engencho y’obonene bw’erieta riao, tokonye; naende ase engencho y’erieta riao otoboorie, otwabere ebibe biaito!" 
Psalms79:10 Nase ki abanto b’ebisaku bakoboria, “Ng’ai Nyasae oyio obo are?” Ase amasio aito tiga abanto b’ebisaku bamanye buna okorusia egesiomba ase engencho y’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ’abasomba bao." 
Psalms79:11 Tiga ekerero ki’abasibire geike ase obosio bwao; tooria abanto abwo banacheirwe ekina bakwe, ekiagera aye nobwate okobua okonene." 
Psalms79:12 Aye Omonene, abanto abwo bamenyete ang’e bagochecheirie na kogochaya, obairanerie amabe ayio abo ara gatano na kabere." 
Psalms79:13 Erio intwe, abanto bao, aba tore abe riicho ri’oborisia bwao, natokoiranerie ng’a mbuya mono kogenderera botambe, na ebiaare ase ebiaare natobe tokogotogia." 
Psalms80:1 Aye omorisia bw’Abaisraeli, tegerera oigwe, aye okoraa abanto b’ororeria rwa Yusufu buna riicho rikoraagwa! Aye oyore ase oboikaranso bw’obonene igoro y’abakerubi, tomorekere!" 
Psalms80:2 Orokia chinguru chiao ase abanto b’Efraimu, na aba Benjamin, na aba Manase, na oche ototoorie!" 
Psalms80:3 Aye Nyasae, otokore tobe abayia, otoraberie obosio bwao, erio nario toratooreke." 
Psalms80:4 Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, ngoika ririri orabe gokogechigwa nogosaba kw’abanto bao?" 
Psalms80:5 Aye gwakorire amariga ’omoichano koba endagera yabo, kwabanyoisirie amariga amange mono." 
Psalms80:6 Aye gwatokorire twabeire abakwomanerwa ase egati y’abanto bare ang’e naintwe, na ababisa baito nigo bagendererete gotochecheria." 
Psalms80:7 Aye Nyasae bw’Emeganda, otoonchore tobe abayia, otoraberie obosio bwao, erio nario toratooreke." 
Psalms80:8 Aye Omonene nigo kwarentete omosabibu korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erio ogaseria abanto b’ebisaku korwa aase abo, okayosimeka aroro." 
Psalms80:9 Aye nigo kwayoraberetie aase na koaroisia, noro ogakina okaira emeri inse, okaranda ase ense eyio engima." 
Psalms80:10 Ekiriri ki’omosabibu oyio nigo giatubete ebitunwa, ne chinsagia chiaye chikaranda gochia aase emecharake ya Nyasae ere." 
Psalms80:11 Chinsagia echio chikaranda chigaikeera Enyancha Enene, na emeseboka yaye gochia ase orooche rw’Eufarati." 
Psalms80:12 Nase ki rende aye gwatagoire chindwaki chiaye, erinde bonsi abagoeta ase enchera batabora amasabibu aye?" 
Psalms80:13 Chimbeche chie rinani nigo chigosaria omosabibu oyio, ne ching’iti chi’orosana nigo chikoyotakuna." 
Psalms80:14 Aye Nyasae bw’Emeganda, yoiranere naende, rigereria korwa agwo igoro orore; bwechandere omosabibu oyio." 
Psalms80:15 Renda omote oyo gwasimegete nokoboko kwao gw’okorio, orosagia orwo gwechoreire na korobeka chinguru." 
Psalms80:16 Abanto bayosambire nomorero na koyogecha. Osirie abanto abwo ase okobea kwao! 
Psalms80:17 Orende nokoboko kwao omonto oyio gwachorire nokoboko kwao gw’okorio, mwanyabanto abwo aye gwechoreire." 
Psalms80:18 Erio titokoonchoka togotige; torende togenderere koba moyo, na intwe ntobe togotogia erieta riao." 
Psalms80:19 Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, tokore tobe abayia, otoraberie obosio bwao, erio nario toratooreke." 
Psalms81:1 Moterere Nyasae neriogi rinene, ekiagera nere chinguru chiaito, aka eriogi ri’omogoko ase Nyasae o Yakobo." 
Psalms81:2 Tera ogotera kw’ogotogia, mobugie chinchigiri amo namakano ’ebirigisa, na amakano ande." 
Psalms81:3 Mobugie egetureri ase rituko ri’Omotienyi Omoyia, na ekero oorokire omogima, ase ogosika rituko riaito ri’omoyega richikire." 
Psalms81:4 Oyio nigo ore omoroberio ochikire ase Abaisraeli, na aya Nyasae o Yakobo achikire." 
Psalms81:5 Ekero Omonene aetete ense ya Misiri, agachika omoroberio oyio ase abanto ba Yusufu. Nkaigwa enkwana y’omonwa ntamanyete egoteba:" 
Psalms81:6 “Ninche narusetie chigurube korwa ase amareko aino, na ngasibora amaboko aino korwa ase ebitonga bi’okobogoria chigurube." 
Psalms81:7 Ekero mwarenge nemechando nigo mwandangeretie, na inche nkabatooria, nigo nabairaneretie korwa ime y’enkoba ase nebisete, nkabateema agwo ase amache a Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Inwe abanto baane, igwa ekero nkobakurera! Inwe Abaisraeli, onye ndiria mware konyigwera!" 
Psalms81:9 Timoba nenyasae ende eng’ao ase egati yaino, timotung’amera na gosasima enyasae engeni." 
Psalms81:10 Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, ninche nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Ase ayio, asamia emenwa yaino ebe yasie, na inche imbaragerie." 
Psalms81:11 “Korende abanto baane tibaigwete eriogi riane; Abaisraeli abwo nigo bangete kegima konyigwera. 
Psalms81:12 Ase ayio nkabatiga babwatie obomwenu bwe chinkoro chiabo, erinde bakore buna koreng’ana konya barobeirie abanyene." 
Psalms81:13 Onye ndiria abanto abwo baane bantegererete! Onye Abaisraeli mbabwatetie chinchera chiane! 
Psalms81:14 Rirorio nanga nabuete ababisa babo bwango, na okoboko kwane nkoba kware mamincha yabo." 
Psalms81:15 Abwo bangechete inche Omonene, nigo baare gocha gotung’ama asende bare nobwoba, na amatuko abo nagenderere kobao kare na kare." 
Psalms81:16 Korende inwe nigo narenge gocha kobaa engano enoru, na kobaisanekia nobooke korwa ase egetare.”" 
Psalms82:1 Nyasae nigo agotenena ase omosangererekano oye omochenu, ase egati ye chinyasae nigo akonacha ekina." 
Psalms82:2 “Inee! Ngoika ririri moragenderere konacha ebina bitari noboronge? Ngoika ririri moragenderere gwanchereria abanto ababe? 
Psalms82:3 Kae abataka ne chintakana oboronge bwabo; boigo nabwo bagokorerwa bobe, na abaremeire." 
Psalms82:4 Tooria abatari na nguru, na aba tabwati kende, basibore korwa ase amaboko ’abakori amabe.”" 
Psalms82:5 Abanto abwo tibamanyeti gento, tibari nobong’aini, nigo bagotaara bakona‐kouna‐una ime ase omosunte; amaroso ’ense anyegerigwe." 
Psalms82:6 Natebire ng’a: “Inwe nechinyasae; inwe mwensi nabana b’Omonene Ore Igoro Mono. 
Psalms82:7 Korende nigo morakwe buna mwanyabanto bande, na obogima bwaino boere buna obw’abanene b’ense.”" 
Psalms82:8 Aye Nyasae, imoka, ogambie ense ekina, ekiagera abanto b’ebisaku bionsi nabao." 
Psalms83:1 Aye Nyasae, tokira‐kiri! Nyasae, totoerera na gotimoka." 
Psalms83:2 Rora, ababisa bao buna bagokora riroroche; abwo bakogechete baimokereirie emetwe igoro ase oboenenu." 
Psalms83:3 Nigo bagokora emeroberio y’obong’ainereria igoro y’abanto bao; abwo nigo bagosemania kobakorera bobe abanto bao abwo orendete. 
Psalms83:4 Nigo bagotebania: “Inchuo tobasirie tibaba egesaku naende, tiga erieta ri’Abaisraeli riebwe kegima!”" 
Psalms83:5 Abanto abagambire ase omoyo oyomo na bakorire okobwatana mamincha yao nabwo aba; 
Psalms83:6 abanto bamenyete ase chiema chi’Edomu na Abaisumaeli; Abamoabu na Abahagari; 
Psalms83:7 Abagebali, na Abaamoni, na Abaamaleki; Abafilisti amo nabamenyete Turo." 
Psalms83:8 Boigo Abaasuri babwatanire nabwo ase ogokonya abanto b’ororeria rwa Loti. 
Psalms83:9 Omonene, obakore buna gwakorete Abamidiani, na buna gwakorete Sisera na Yabini agwo ase orooche rwa Kisoni." 
Psalms83:10 Abwo nigo baiteretwe agwo Eni Dori; bakaba esike ase riroba. 
Psalms83:11 Okore abanto babo basikire buna gwakorete Orebu na Seebu, na abanene babo babe buna Seba na Salimuna," 
Psalms83:12 ekiagera batebete, “Inchuo toire amarisio a Nyasae abe ayaito.”" 
Psalms83:13 Aye Nyasae one, tiga abanto abwo bairurukigwe buna orotu, ee, buna omoiriro okoirurukigwa nomwaga." 
Psalms83:14 Buna omorero ogokoora rinani, na buna ekebemberi ki’omorero kegosamba ebitunwa," 
Psalms83:15 naboigo batunyanerie omwaga oo bw’omoubera, na obaondokie nekembugu‐mbugu kiao." 
Psalms83:16 Aye Omonene, kora amasio abo abe nobosooku obonene, erinde babe bakorigia erieta riao." 
Psalms83:17 Abanto abwo tiga babe nobosooku na omoichano goika kare na kare; ee, tiga basookigwe na basire kegima." 
Psalms83:18 Abanto abwo tiga bamanye ng’a naye bweka okorokwa Omonene, nigo ore Oyore Igoro Mono igoro y’ense yonsi." 
Psalms84:1 Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, naki obomenyo bwao bore oboseera!" 
Psalms84:2 Omoyo one nore namaiga amange kobeera ase chigoora chi’Omonene; enkoro yane na omobere one nigo bigoterera Nyasae ore moyo nomogoko omonene. 
Psalms84:3 Enchiro nigo ekonyora obomenyo, na egesingororo nigo gekwenyorera egeswa ase amage aye akobeera, agwo ase egesasimero kiao, aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, aye Omoruoti one, na Nyasae one." 
Psalms84:4 Mbasesenirie abanto abwo bamenyete ase enyomba yao, abwo bakona‐gotera botambe ase okogotogia." 
Psalms84:5 Mbasesenirie abanto abwo bakonyora chinguru chiabo korwa asore; abwo chinkoro chiabo chiganetie kogenda Sayoni. 
Psalms84:6 Ekero abanto abwo bagoeta ase Rigoko ria Baka, nigo bakorikora riaba aase e chinsoko chi’amache; na embura ye ritang’ani nigo ekorirentera ogosesenigwa okonge." 
Psalms84:7 Barabwo mbabe bakomenta koba ne chinguru kogenderera botambe, mbarore Nyasae ayobuete chinyasae agwo Sayoni." 
Psalms84:8 Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, igwa ogosaba kwane, tegerera onyigwe, aye Nyasae o Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Aye Nyasae ore enguba yaito, origererie obosio bw’omoakwa amaguta oo." 
Psalms84:10 Mbuya kobeera ase enyomba yao rituko erimo rioka kobua kobeera amatuko chilifu chinyinge aande onsi; mbuya koba omorendi bw’egesieri ki’enyomba yao aye Nyasae one, kobua kobeera ase obomenyo bw’abakori amabe." 
Psalms84:11 Omonene Nyasae nigo are erioba na enguba, ere nigo agotoa amabera na obonene; ere takorina abare ne chinkoro chindonge gento kende gionsi kere ekiya." 
Psalms84:12 Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, nasesenirie omonto okwegenete." 
Psalms85:1 Omonene, kare nigo kwarenge namabera ase ense yao, nigo kwairaneretie abanto ba Yakobo amaya abo." 
Psalms85:2 Aye nigo kwaberete abanto bao obobe bwabo, nigo gwatubete ebibe biabo bionsi." 
Psalms85:3 Boigo ngwatigete koba nekeririanda, ngwatigete kegima kogechigwa nabarabwo." 
Psalms85:4 Aye Nyasae, Omotooria oito, otoiranere, rusia ekeririanda kiao korwa asetore." 
Psalms85:5 Inee! Nigo ogochia koba nendamwamu asetore kogenderera botambe? Inee! Endamwamu yao nigo egendererete koba ase ebiaare bionsi? 
Psalms85:6 Inee! Togotokora abayia naende, erinde intwe abanto bao tobe nomogoko asore?" 
Psalms85:7 Aye Omonene, otoorokerie obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, na otoe ogotooreka kwao." 
Psalms85:8 Nimbe nkoigwa amang’ana Omonene Nyasae agokwana; ere nigo agokwana amang’ana ’omorembe ase abanto baye abachenu, tobatiga baonchokere oboriri naende." 
Psalms85:9 Ekeene, ogotooreka kwaye nigo kore ang’e ase abanto bairogete Omonene; obonene mbobe bomenyete ase ense yaito." 
Psalms85:10 Aase agwo obwanchani bogendererete botambe na ekeene mbiumerane, boigo oboronge na omorembe mbinyunyuntane." 
Psalms85:11 Aase agwo obwegenwa mbooroke ase ense, na oboronge mborigererie korwa igoro." 
Psalms85:12 Ekeene, Omonene narue ayare amaya, na orogongo rwaito rorue okwama kwaye." 
Psalms85:13 Oboronge mbotang’ane bosio bwaye, naende bobwatie ase aetete." 
Psalms86:1 Aye Omonene, integerera, onyigwe na ong’iranerie, ekiagera nigo inde omotaka na omoremerwa." 
Psalms86:2 Orende omoyo one, ekiagera nigo nkoirogete; aye Nyasae one, intoorie inche omosomba oo, ekiagera nigo ngosemeretie." 
Psalms86:3 Aye Omonene, indorera amabera, ekiagera nigo nkorera asore omobaso boira." 
Psalms86:4 Gokia omoyo one inche omosomba oo, ekiagera narentire omoyo one asore aye Omonene." 
Psalms86:5 Omonene, aye nigo ore omuya na oyo okwabera; nigo okoorokia obwanchani obonge ase abagokorangeria obakonye." 
Psalms86:6 Omonene, tegerera oigwe ogosaba kwane, igwa ekerero ki’ogosorora kwane."
