Psalms86:7 Ekero inde nemechando nigo ngokorangeria, ekiagera aye nigo okonyigwa na kong’iraneria." 
Psalms86:8 Omonene, enyasae teri enga buna aye, gose emeremo ende teri enga buna eyao." 
Psalms86:9 Ebisaku bionsi gwatongete mbichiche, bitung’ame ase obosio bwao kogosasima, mbitogie erieta riao, aye Omonene." 
Psalms86:10 Aye naye ore omonene, nigo ogokora amakumia; aye naye bweka ore Nyasae." 
Psalms86:11 Aye Omonene, inyorokererie enchera yao, nigo nganetie kobwatia ekeene kiao; renda enkoro yane, erinde inyiroke erieta riao." 
Psalms86:12 Aye Omonene Nyasae one, nigo nkoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono nenkoro yane yonsi, nindarie obonene bw’erieta riao goika kare na kare." 
Psalms86:13 Naki obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe nigo bore obonene asende; aye kwabooririe omoyo one korwa aase abakure. 
Psalms86:14 Nyasae, abanto abaenenu banyimokeire kondwania esegi; ekeombe ki’abanto abatindi nigo bakorigia basirie obogima bwane, abwo tibakoirogeti nonya ng’ake." 
Psalms86:15 Korende aye Omonene nigo ore Nyasae bw’amabera na obuya; tori omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu, nigo ore nobwanchani botari koera, na obwegenwa." 
Psalms86:16 Ing’iranerie na ondorere amabera, ong’e inche omosomba oo chinguru chiao, intoorie inche omwana bw’omosomba oo omokungu." 
Psalms86:17 Inyorokie ekemanyererio ki’obuya bwao, erinde abanto bangechete bakerore na gosookigwa, ekiagera aye Omonene gwankonyire na kondemia." 
Psalms87:1 Omochie oria obegetwe oboroso n’Omonene nigo oteneine igoro ase ebitunwa ebichenu. 
Psalms87:2 Omonene nigo anchete ebiita bia Sayoni kobua aande onsi ase abanto ba Yakobo bamenyete. 
Psalms87:3 Aye omochie o Nyasae, amang’ana ’obonene nigo agokwanwa igoro yao." 
Psalms87:4 Ase abanto abwo bamanyete inche ninyatore Rahabu, na Abababeli, na Abafilisti, na Abaturo, amo nabanto b’Etiopia, na goteba, “Oyo na oyo nao baiboreretwe ime aaria.”" 
Psalms87:5 Igoro ya Sayoni amang’ana aya nakwanwe. “Omonto oyo na oria nao baiboreretwe ime yaye,” na Omonene ore Igoro Mono nere orabe okoyokong’ia." 
Psalms87:6 Ekero Omonene arakore omobaro bw’abanto, nigo ararike, “Oyo na oyo nao baiboreretwe ime aaria.”" 
Psalms87:7 Ekero bagotera na bagotenga nigo bagoteba, “Chinsoko chiaito chionsi nigo chire ime yao.”" 
Psalms88:1 Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’ogotooreka kwane, omobaso na obotuko nigo nkorera asore ng’a onkonye." 
Psalms88:2 Ogosaba kwane tiga goike ase obosio bwao, tegerera oigwe okorera kwane." 
Psalms88:3 Omoyo one nigo oichire nemechando, na obogima bwane bwaikire ang’e kogenda aase abakure." 
Psalms88:4 Inche nabareranigwe amo nabwo bakogenda ase embeera, chinguru chiang’ereire." 
Psalms88:5 Natigirwe inde buna oyomo bw’abakure, buna abwo baitetwe, bono bare ase chimbeera ime. Nabeire buna abwo aye otainyoreti nonya ng’ake, kwabaatananire korwa ase okoboko kwao." 
Psalms88:6 Kwambekire inse kegima ase embeera ime; agwo aase are omosunte na aatambe gochia inse. 
Psalms88:7 Egesusuro kiao nigo kere ekerito igoro yane, kwambagoreire emerindo yao yonsi yantubire kegima." 
Psalms88:8 Kwabekire aare abagisangio baane twamanyaine, gwankorire nabeire okogechia asebare; nasiekereirwe, tinkonyara gosoka." 
Psalms88:9 Amaiso aane amwamire ase okweumia; Aye Omonene, kera rituko nigo ngokorangeria, ndamborete amaboko aane gocha asore." 
Psalms88:10 Inee! Abakure nkobakorera ore amakumia? Inee! Abwo nkoimoka bare na kogotogia? 
Psalms88:11 Inee! Obwanchani bwao ngokwanwa bore ime ase chimbeera, gose obwegenwa bwao agwo aase aasareku?" 
Psalms88:12 Inee! Amang’ana ao ay’ogokumia namanyire agwo ase omosunte ime? Gose oboronge bwao mbomanyire agwo ase ense y’okwebwa? 
Psalms88:13 Aye Omonene, nigo nkorera asore, onkonye, nonya nemambia ogosaba kwane nigo kogoika asore." 
Psalms88:14 Omonene, nase ki gwatugutire omoyo one? Nase ki kwabisire obosio bwao korwa asende?" 
Psalms88:15 Korwa obwana bwane nabeire inde nemechando, nabeire ang’e nogokwa, ndemereretie okogosa kwao, tindi nogokonywa konde nonya nogoke." 
Psalms88:16 Endamwamu yao entindi yantubire kegima, amaakwa ao ansiririe." 
Psalms88:17 Nigo ang’etanaine buna amache omobaso boira; abwatanire amo, na amigire inche." 
Psalms88:18 Aye gwatananire omwanchwa one na omosani one bambeereire aare, na omosunte obeire omogisangio one." 
Psalms89:1 Aye Omonene, goika kare na kare ninterere obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, nindarie obwegenwa bwao ase ebiaare bionsi." 
Psalms89:2 Ninkwane ng’a obwanchani bwao mbogendererete botambe bwakorirwe kobao goika kare na kare; aaria igoro nigo okong’etie obwegenwa bwao. 
Psalms89:3 Aye nigo gwatebete, “Nakorire okobwatana nomochore one, narire eira y’ogotiana ase Daudi omosomba one." 
Psalms89:4 Ninkore oroiboro rwao rogenderere koba ne chinguru botambe, nintenenie ekerogo kiao ki’obonene kebe ase ebiaare bionsi.”" 
Psalms89:5 Aye Omonene, igoro nchitogie emeremo yao y’ogokumia, naende obwegenwa bwao boigo ase omosangererekano bw’abachenu bao." 
Psalms89:6 Inee! Ning’o ore agwo igoro oranyare koreng’anigwa n’Omonene? Nkereki ase ebitongwa bia Nyasae kenga buna ere? 
Psalms89:7 Ere nigo are Nyasae oirokire ase ekegambero ki’abachenu, bonsi abamoetanaine nigo bamoirogete." 
Psalms89:8 Aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, ning’o obwate okobua buna okwao? Ee, Omonene, obwegenwa bwao nigo bogoetanaine." 
Psalms89:9 Aye nigo okogambera enyancha ekoimokerera igoro; ekero emerindo yaye ekoimokerera igoro, aye nigo okoyotoereria." 
Psalms89:10 Aye nigo gwasenyentete enchoka eria Rahabu ekaba buna egetondo, nokoboko kwao kore ne chinguru ogasiarera ababisa bao." 
Psalms89:11 Igoro neyao, na ense neyao, ense na ebinto bionsi bireo naye kwabitongete." 
Psalms89:12 Naye gwatongete sugusu na irianyi; egetunwa gia Tabori, na ekia Herimoni, nigo bigotogia erieta riao nomogoko." 
Psalms89:13 Okoboko kwao nigo kore nokobua, ee, nigo kore ne chinguru; okoboko kwao gw’okorio nigo koimokererete igoro." 
Psalms89:14 Oboronge na ekeene nabio bire oboroso bw’okogamba kwao, obwanchani bwa kare na kare, na obwegenwa, nigo bitang’aine bosio bwao." 
Psalms89:15 Mbasesenirie abanto abwo bamanyete goaka eriogi ri’omogoko asore, abwo bagotaara ase oborabu bokorwa ase obosio bwao aye Omonene." 
Psalms89:16 Abwo nigo bagochengera erieta riao omobaso boira; na goetera ase oboronge bwao nigo bakoimokererigwa igoro. 
Psalms89:17 Aye nigo ore obonene bwabo ne chinguru chiabo; ase engencho y’ogwancherwa kwao chingunchara chiaito chiakinire. 
Psalms89:18 Oyore enguba yaito noyo bw’Omonene, ee, omoruoti oito noyo bw’Oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Psalms89:19 Kare ngwakwanete nabegenwa bao ase okorora, okabatebia, “Narentire ogokonywa goetera ase oyomo ore nokobua, naimokereirie igoro oyomo nachorire korwa ase egati y’abanto." 
Psalms89:20 Nanyorire Daudi, omosomba one, namoakire amaguta aane amachenu ase okomwatanana asende." 
Psalms89:21 Okoboko kwane nkobe amo nere botambe, ee, okoboko kwane nkomobeke chinguru." 
Psalms89:22 Ababisa tibakomobwata mobosokano, na abakori amabe tibakomochanda." 
Psalms89:23 Ninsenyente ababisa baye ase obosio bwaye, abwo bamogechete nimbae amaakwa." 
Psalms89:24 Obwegenwa na obwanchani bwane bogendererete botambe mbibe amo nere; ase erieta riane orogunchara rwaye ndokine. 
Psalms89:25 Nimbeke enyancha inse y’okoboko kwaye, ne chindooche nchibe inse y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio." 
Psalms89:26 Ere nabe okorera asende na goteba; Aye naye Tata, naye Nyasae one, na Egetare kiane ki’ogotooreka." 
Psalms89:27 Erio inche nimokore abe omwana one omotangi, abe omoruoti ore omonene kobua abaruoti bande bonsi b’ense." 
Psalms89:28 Obwanchani bwane botari koera nimoborendere kare na kare, na okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania nkorete nere ngotenene bokong’u." 
Psalms89:29 Ninkore oroiboro rwaye rogenderere kobao botambe, na ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene nkegenderere kobao buna igoro erabe ereo." 
Psalms89:30 “Onye abanto b’ororeria rwaye bagochia gotiga amachiko aane, baange koigwera emeroberio yane echikire," 
Psalms89:31 na onye bagochia gosaria aya nachikire. Baange kobwata amachiko aane," 
Psalms89:32 rirorio nimbae egesusuro, mbaake nenyimbo ase engencho y’ogosaria kwabo, na mbang’wanie ebiranya ase engencho y’ebibe biabo." 
Psalms89:33 Korende obwanchani bwane bogendererete botambe tinkoborusia asare, tingotiga koba omwegenwa asare." 
Psalms89:34 Tinkonyara gosaria okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, gose tinkoonchora ring’ana nakwanire nomonwa one." 
Psalms89:35 “Ase obochenu bwane natianire rimo ng’a tingokwana oborimo ase Daudi. 
Psalms89:36 Oroiboro rwaye ndogenderere kobao botambe, na ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene nkegenderere kobao, buna erioba rirabe rireo ase obosio bwane." 
Psalms89:37 Nkegenderere kobao buna omotienyi, oborori obwo bwa igoro nigo bore obwegenwa.”" 
Psalms89:38 Korende bono, aye Omonene kwangire omoakwa amaguta oo, kwabeire nendamwamu enene asare." 
Psalms89:39 Bono gwatigire okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania gwakorete nomosomba oo, kwarutire egutwa yaye y’obogambi inse kwayemwamirie." 
Psalms89:40 Gwatagoire chindwaki chiaye chionsi gwatagoire amaagacho aye onsi are amakong’u abeire amatombe. 
Psalms89:41 Abanto bonsi bagoetera aase agwo nigo bakomosakora, abamenyete ang’e nere nigo bakomochecheria." 
Psalms89:42 Abwo bakomochanda aye kwabaeire chinguru chinyinge, na kwagerire ababisa baye bonsi bagoke." 
Psalms89:43 Kwairanirie omoro oye bw’esegi, tori komoa chinguru chi’okorwana esegi." 
Psalms89:44 Kwamourire obonene bwaye, gwaakeire inse ekerogo kiaye ki’obogambi." 
Psalms89:45 Kwanachire amatuko aye ay’obosae abeire ameng’e, boigo kwamotubire nobosooku obonge mono." 
Psalms89:46 Aye Omonene, ngoika ririri oragenderere kwebisete? Inee! Ngoika ririri endamwamu yao eragenderere gwoka buna omorero?" 
Psalms89:47 Aye Omonene, inyora buna obogima bwane bore obweng’e, nigo gwatongete mwanyabanto bonsi bakwe igo." 
Psalms89:48 Monto ki orabe moyo otakwe? Ning’o oranyare gotooria omoyo oye korwa ase chinguru chi’amakweri? 
Psalms89:49 Omonene, ng’ai obwanchani bwao bwa kare na kare bore, obwo ase obwegenwa bwao kwarierete Daudi eira?" 
Psalms89:50 Aye Omonene, ing’inyore inche omosomba oo buna ingokorerwa echeche; nigo ndemereretie emerumi y’abanto abange." 
Psalms89:51 Omonene, ababisa bao nigo bagonchecheria, ee, nigo bagochecheria amabarato ’omoakwa amaguta oo." 
Psalms89:52 Omonene atogigwe kare na kare! Amina. Amina. 
Psalms90:1 Omonene, aye nigo ore obotamero bwaito ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Psalms90:2 Ritang’ani ebigoro bitarabao, gose konya otaratonga ense, korwa kare na kare aye naye Nyasae." 
Psalms90:3 Aye nigo okoonchorana abanto bairana, baba amaroba naende, gwateba, “Inwe mwanyabanto, irana!”" 
Psalms90:4 Asore aye, emiaka elifu eyemo nigo ere buna rituko ria igoro koriaetire, buna engaki enke y’okorenda botuko." 
Psalms90:5 Nigo ogokorobanania mwanyabanto buna eooro, baeta bwango buna chindoto. Barabwo nigo bare buna obonyansi bokomera mambia;" 
Psalms90:6 mambia nigo bogokina bwasicha, mogoroba bwanachwa bwoma." 
Psalms90:7 Intwe nigo togosirigwa nendamwamu yao, twaondokigwa nekeririanda kiao." 
Psalms90:8 Amabe aya twakorire nigo oyabegete ase obosio bwao, na ebibe biaito bia bobisi nigo bire maiso marore asore." 
Psalms90:9 Obogima bwaito bwonsi nigo bokoera bwango inse y’ekeririanda kiao, nigo togokoora emiaka yaito buna ogoita egekoe" 
Psalms90:10 Emiaka y’obogima bwaito nemerongo etano na ebere; onye tore ne chinguru, eba emerongo etano na etato; na obogima obo nigo boichire nobokong’u na emechando, nigo bogoeta bwango, na intwe tweiruruka twasira." 
Psalms90:11 Ning’o omanyete okobua kw’endamwamu yao, na ogw’ekeririanda kiao, erinde akoiroke?" 
Psalms90:12 Tworokererie, tomanye obweng’e bw’obogima bwaito, erinde chinkoro chiaito chibe nobong’aini." 
Psalms90:13 Omonene, irana asetore! Ngoika ririri orabe kogotebana? Otororere intwe, abasomba bao, amabera!" 
Psalms90:14 Kobogokia mambia, otoisanekie nobwanchani bwao botari koera, erinde tochenge na kogoka amatuko aito onsi." 
Psalms90:15 Otogokie amatuko ang’ana buna ayio twachandegete, na emiaka eng’ana buna eria twanyorete amabe." 
Psalms90:16 Tworokie intwe, abasomba bao, ogokora kwao, na abana baito oborokie obonene bwao." 
Psalms90:17 Obosiani bw’Omonene, Nyasae oito, bobe igoro yaito, na emeremo y’amaboko aito oyesesenie asetore, ee, osesenie emeremo y’amaboko aito!" 
Psalms91:1 Ere oyomenyete inse y’oborendi bw’Oyore Igoro Mono, na otimogete ase ekiriri ki’oyore Omobui," 
Psalms91:2 oyio nigo aranyare goteba, “Omonene nere obotamero bwane, na orwaki rwane, nere Nyasae one oyo nsemeretie.”" 
Psalms91:3 Ere nagotoorie korwa ase omoeto bw’omotegi, na korwa ase amarwaire amabe agoita." 
Psalms91:4 Ere nagotube namarionya aye, ase chimbaba chiaye ime nonyore obotamero. Obwegenwa bwaye nenguba na eng’aya asore." 
Psalms91:5 Tokwoboa okogoswa ekero kia botuko, gose omogwe okorutwa mobaso," 
Psalms91:6 nonya namarwaire amabe agoeta ase omosunte, gose amabe ande onsi agoita mobaso." 
Psalms91:7 Abanto elifu eyemo nabaisa kogwa ase rikere riao, gose chilifu ikomi ase ensemo yao ya borio, korende ayio tagokonyora aye." 
Psalms91:8 Norigererie namaiso ao, orore buna abakori amabe bakoegwa egesusuro." 
Psalms91:9 Ekiagera kwabekire Omonene obeire egekengano kiao, na Oyore Igoro Mono obotamero bwao," 
Psalms91:10 amabe ande onsi tagokonyora, na amaakwa ande onsi tagocha ase enka yao." 
Psalms91:11 Naki Nyasae nagochikere abamalaika baye bakorende ase chinchera chiao chionsi. 
Psalms91:12 Barabwo nabakoimokie ase amaboko abo, erinde togochwa okogoro kwao ne rigena." 
Psalms91:13 Notache chindo na amarubi, notiringe chindo chinsae ne chinchoka." 
Psalms91:14 Naki oyo obwatanire nainche ase obwanchani nimotoorie, nimorende, ekiagera namanyete erieta riane." 
Psalms91:15 Ekero arandangerie, inche nimoitabere, inche nigo inde amo nere ase engaki y’emechando. Nimotoorie, naende nimoe ogosika." 
Psalms91:16 Nimoisanekie nobogima obotambe na komworokia ogotooreka kwane. 
Psalms92:1 Nigo ere buya gokoakera aye Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, na gotera ase ogotogia erieta riao, aye Omonene Ore Igoro Mono." 
Psalms92:2 Kera emambia nigo ere buya koraria obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, na kera obotuko koraria obwegenwa bwao," 
Psalms92:3 ase okobugia obokano bore ne chinga ikomi, na amakano ande are namariogi amaya." 
Psalms92:4 Aye Omonene, ogokora kwao nigo kongogetie; ninchenge ase engencho y’emeremo y’amaboko ao." 
Psalms92:5 Aye Omonene, emeremo yao nigo ere emenene mono, na ebirengererio biao nigo bire ebia ime mono." 
Psalms92:6 Omonto omoriri takonyara kobimanya, na oyo otari nobong’aini takonyara komanya amang’ana buna ayio." 
Psalms92:7 Abakori amabe nabaisa koreereta buna obonyansi, na abakori ebibe bonsi babe bagosicha buya, korende omoerio obo nogosirigwa goika kare na kare." 
Psalms92:8 Aye Omonene, nigo ore omonene mono kare na kare." 
Psalms92:9 Aye Omonene, Naama! Ababisa bao mbasirigwe; na abakori ebibe bonsi mbasiarerwe gochia aande onsi." 
Psalms92:10 Gwakinirie orogunchara rwane rwabeire buna orw’eng’era, kwang’umoreire amaguta amayia." 
Psalms92:11 Narorire namaiso aane ababisa baane bakobugwa, naigure namato aane igoro y’abakori amabe abanyimokerete." 
Psalms92:12 Omonyene oboronge naseboke buna omokendo, nakine buna omocharake o Lebanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Abwo basimekire ase enyomba y’Omonene, nigo baragenderere koreereta ase chigoora chia Nyasae oito." 
Psalms92:14 Abwo nigo bakogenderera goseboka nonya bagotire, nigo baragenderere kobesea." 
Psalms92:15 Ayio nigo akworokia ng’a Omonene nigo are omonyene oboronge, ere nere egetare kiane, na obokorekanu tibori ime yaye." 
Psalms93:1 Omonene nere okogamba, nigo eboetie obonene. Omonene nigo asiberanetie chinguru. Ase ayio ense nigo eteneine bokong’u tekonyegerigwa." 
Psalms93:2 Ekerogo kiao ki’obonene nigo kiabekire aroro korwa kare, ekiagera aye nao kwarenge korwa kare." 
Psalms93:3 Aye Omonene, amache aimokereire igoro, amache nkoeera are neriogi, ee, aimokereirie emerindo yaye igoro." 
Psalms93:4 Omonene nere obwate okobua okonene aria igoro; okobua kwaye nigo kobuete okoruma kw’amache, ee, okw’amache amange na okw’emerindo y’enyancha." 
Psalms93:5 Aye Omonene, oborori bwao nigo boteneine bokong’u. Obochenu nabwo bore ogochaberwa kw’enyomba yao goika kare na kare." 
Psalms94:1 Aye Omonene Nyasae ogoakana egesiomba, aye Nyasae ogoakana egesiomba, oorokia oborabu bwao." 
Psalms94:2 Aye omonachi ebina bw’ense, imoka oe abanto abaenenu eng’eria koreng’ana buna ogokora kwabo kore!" 
Psalms94:3 Omonene, ngoika ririri abanyabibe barag nderere gwetogia? Ngoika ririri?" 
Psalms94:4 Abakori amabe bonsi nigo bagwetogia, nigo bagokwana‐kwana amang’ana amabe." 
Psalms94:5 Aye Omonene, abwo nigo bagosamunyorana abanto bao, na gochanda abanto bare omwando oo." 
Psalms94:6 Nigo bagoita ababoraka na abamenyi, ne chintakana nigo bagochiita;" 
Psalms94:7 erio bateba, “Omonene tari korora amang’ana ayio, Nyasae o Yakobo tari komanya ayio.”" 
Psalms94:8 Inwe aba motamanyeti gento, kabe nokomanya! Inwe abariri, ndiriri morabe abang’aini?" 
Psalms94:9 Inee! Oyo otongete amato, tari koigwa? Ere oyo otongete amaiso, tari korora?" 
Psalms94:10 Oyo okorongeyia ebisaku, tari korua ebisusuro? Ere nigo akworokereria mwanyabanto bamanye obong’aini." 
Psalms94:11 Omonene nigo amanyete ebirengererio bia mwanyabanto, ng’a nigo bire bosa." 
Psalms94:12 Nasesenirie omonto oyio aye Omonene okorongeyia na komworokereria amachiko ao," 
Psalms94:13 naende kwamoa ogotimoka ase amatuko ’emechando, goika ekero abakori amabe bararemerwe chimbeera chiabo." 
Psalms94:14 Omonene tagotuguta abanto baye, takonyara gotiga abwo bare omwado oye." 
Psalms94:15 Ebina mbinachwe ase oboronge naende, na abanto bonsi bare ne chinkoro chindonge mbabobwatie." 
Psalms94:16 Ning’o oratenene andwanerie abakori amabe? Ning’o oratenene ankonye korwa ase abakori ebibe? 
Psalms94:17 Onye Omonene atankonyete, omoyo one nigo orenge gocha kobeera ase obokiriru bw’amakweri bwango." 
Psalms94:18 Ekero naroche ng’a natererigwe, aye Omonene, obwanchani bwao bwa botambe nigo bwansiirete tinagwa." 
Psalms94:19 Ekero enkoro yane ere nogwechanda okonge, okoremia kwao okonge nigo gokogokia omoyo one." 
Psalms94:20 Inee! Abanto b’ekegambero egekorekanu mbabwatane naye? Abwo nigo bakorenta obokong’u ase okoonchorana amachiko. 
Psalms94:21 Nigo bakoumokera amo omoyo bw’oyore omonyaboronge, banachera oyotari nokomocha ekina ki’ogokwa." 
Psalms94:22 Korende Omonene obeire egekengero kiane egekong’u, ee, Nyasae one negetare ngotamera." 
Psalms94:23 Ere nabae egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo, na abasirie ase engencho y’ogosaria kwabo; ee, Omonene, Nyasae oito, nabasirie kegima." 
Psalms95:1 Inchuo, tomoterere Omonene nomogoko, inchuo, tomochengere oyore egetare ki’ogotooreka gwaito!" 
Psalms95:2 Inchuo, togende ase obosio bwaye ase okomoakera ng’a mbuya mono, tomochengere namatera ay’ogotogia!" 
Psalms95:3 Naki Omonene nere Nyasae ore omonene, nere Omoruoti omonene obuete chinyasae chionsi." 
Psalms95:4 Ere nigo abwatete amakura ’ense ase okoboko kwaye, naboigo nebitunwa ebitambe bire ebiaye." 
Psalms95:5 Enyancha neyaye, ekiagera nere oyetongete, okoboko kwaye nakwo kwabombete ense enyomo." 
Psalms95:6 Inchuo, twekumbe ase obosio bw’Omonene, totung’ame asare, ekiagera nere ototongete." 
Psalms95:7 Ere nere Nyasae oito, na intwe nigo tore abanto b’oborisia bwaye, nigo tore ching’ondi chire ase oborendi bwaye. Naki yare koba buya onye rituko ria rero mwategerera eriogi riaye!" 
Psalms95:8 Timokong’ia chinkoro chiaino, buna abakoro bakorete aaria Meriba; na buna bakorete ase rituko riria aaria Masa agwo ase erooro." 
Psalms95:9 Aaria chisokoro chiaino nigo chianteemete, nonya chiaroche emeremo yane nigo chiandengete." 
Psalms95:10 Ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, nigo nagechetigwe nekiaare keria, ngateba, “Abanto aba nabasareku ase chinkoro chiabo ime, tibaraareti chinchera chiane.”" 
Psalms95:11 Ase ayio ngatiana ase endamwamu yane ng’a tibagosoa ase ogotimoka kwane. 
Psalms96:1 Moterere Omonene ogotera okoyia, aye ense yonsi, moterere Omonene!" 
Psalms96:2 Moterere Omonene, motogie erieta riaye, mobe mokoraria ogotooreka kwaye rituko ase rituko." 
Psalms96:3 Raria obonene bwaye ase egati y’ebisaku, na ogokora kwaye kw’ogokumia ase abanto bonsi!" 
Psalms96:4 Omonene nigo are omonene mono, goika atogigwe, goika airokwe goetania chinyasae chinde." 
Psalms96:5 Chinyasae chionsi chi’abanto b’ebisaku nemegwekano y’ogosasimwa rioka, korende Omonene nere otongete igoro chionsi." 
Psalms96:6 Ogosikwa na obonene nigo bire ase obosio bwaye, chinguru na oboseera nigo bire ase obomenyo bwaye obochenu." 
Psalms96:7 Inwe abe chiamate chi’abanto, togia Omonene! Motogie ase obonene bwaye na okobua kwaye." 
Psalms96:8 Mobake Omonene ase obonene bw’erieta riaye, moche ase chigoora chiaye, morentane ebiegwa." 
Psalms96:9 Mosasime Omonene mweboetie obochenu! Inwe abanto b’ense yonsi, mobe mokoiguswa ase obosio bwaye." 
Psalms96:10 Tebia abanto bonsi b’ebisaku, “Omonene nere okogamba. Ense nigo eteneine bokong’u, tekonyegerigwa. Omonene nanachere abanto ekina atari gwanchereria.”" 
Psalms96:11 Tiga igoro chibe nomogoko, tiga enyancha echenge ase okoeera, amo na bionsi ebire ime yaye!" 
Psalms96:12 Emegondo echenge amo nebinto bionsi bire ime yabo! Erio emete yonsi ye rinani netere nomogoko 
Psalms96:13 ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekiagera ngocha are, ee, ngocha are konachera ense ekina. Nigo aranachere ense ekina ase oboronge, na anachere abanto ekina ase obwegenwa." 
Psalms97:1 Omonene nere omoruoti. Aye ense, goka! Na inwe ebisinka ebinge, chenga!" 
Psalms97:2 Amare na omosunte ekerima nigo bimoetanaine; oboronge na ekeene nabio bire oboroso bw’ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene. 
Psalms97:3 Omorero nigo otang’aine bosio bwaye, oro nigo ogosamba ababisa baye abwo bamoetanaine." 
Psalms97:4 Okomesa kwaye gwe chinkoba nigo gokomoreka ense eye; ense nigo ekorora okomesa okwo yatengechigwa. 
Psalms97:5 Ebitunwa nigo bikonyititoka buna obochoe ase obosio bw’Omonene, ee, ase obosio bw’Omonene bw’ense yonsi." 
Psalms97:6 Igoro chionsi nigo chikoraria oboronge bwaye, na abanto bonsi barora obonene bwaye." 
Psalms97:7 Abanto bonsi abagosasima emegwekano nigo bagosookigwa, ee, abwo bagwetogeria emegwekano y’ogosasimwa ere bosa; inwe chinyasae chionsi, tung’ama ase obosio bwaye." 
Psalms97:8 Abanto ba Sayoni nigo bakoigwa ayio bagoka, na ab’emechie ya Yuda bachenga, ekiagera aye Nyasae kwanachire ebina." 
Psalms97:9 Aye Omonene, naye ore omonene goetania ense yonsi, aye kwaimokererigwe igoro kobua chinyasae chionsi." 
Psalms97:10 Inwe abamwanchete Omonene, gecha obobe! Ere nigo akorenda emioyo y’abachenu baye; nigo akobatooria korwa ase amaboko ’abakori amabe." 
Psalms97:11 Oborabu nigo bokomochera oyore omoronge, na omogoko obachera abare ne chinkoro chindonge." 
Psalms97:12 Inwe mwensi abamore abaronge, goka ase Omonene, moake ng’a mbuya mono ase erieta riaye richenu." 
Psalms98:1 Moterere Omonene ogotera okoyia, ekiagera okorire amang’ana ay’ogokumia; obuire nokoboko kwaye gw’okorio, ee, nokoboko kwaye ogochenu." 
Psalms98:2 Omonene okorire ogotooreka kwaye komanyekane, oorokirie oboronge bwaye ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku;" 
Psalms98:3 oinyoire obwanchani bwaye bogendererete botambe, na obwegenwa bwaye, obwo aorogetie ase Abaisraeli. Chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense chiarorire ogotooreka kwa Nyasae oito." 
Psalms98:4 Aye ense yonsi, aka eriogi ri’omogoko ase Omonene, tera ogotera kw’omogoko na motogie ase amariogi amanene." 
Psalms98:5 Terera Omonene ase okobugia amakano, ee, ase okobugia amakano tera namariogi amaya." 
Psalms98:6 Moake amariogi ’omogoko ase Omonene ore omoruoti ase okobugia ebirombeta na ebitureri. 
Psalms98:7 Tiga enyancha ebe ekoruma amo nebinto bionsi bire ime yaye, boigo nense na abanto bonsi bamenyeteo." 
Psalms98:8 Chindooche tiga chiake chinkobi, na ebitunwa tiga bitere nomogoko amo," 
Psalms98:9 ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekiagera ngocha are konachera ense ekina. Ere nanachere ense ekina ase oboronge, na abanto nabanachere ekina atari gwanchereria." 
Psalms99:1 Omonene nere okogamba! Ase ayio, abanto b’ebisaku nigo bakoiguswa. Omonene nigo amenyete nobonene bwaye igoro y’abakerubi, na ense nigo egotengechigwa." 
Psalms99:2 Omonene nigo are omonene ase Sayoni, oimokererigwe igoro kobua abanto b’ebisaku bionsi." 
Psalms99:3 Abanto bonsi tiga batogie erieta riaye rinene na eri’okoirokia. Ere nigo are omochenu. 
Psalms99:4 Aye omoruoti ore nokobua, nigo bwanchete ekeene, aye gwakorire oboronge botenene bokong’u, nigo okonacha ebina bi’ekeene na oboronge ase abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Moimokererie Omonene, Nyasae oito, igoro, mosasime agwo ase egeteni kiaye ki’amagoro! Ere nigo are omochenu." 
Psalms99:6 Musa na Haroni nigo barenge abamo b’abakuani b’Omonene, boigo Samweli nigo arenge oyomo bw’abanto barenge korangeria erieta riaye. Abanto abwo nigo barangeretie Omonene ng’a abakonye, nere akabaigwa." 
Psalms99:7 Nigo akwanete nabarabwo, ore ime ase riire. Abanto abwo nigo babwatete oborori bwaye, na amachiko abaete." 
Psalms99:8 Aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, nigo kwaigwete abanto baria, nigo kwarenge Nyasae, kwarenge kobaabera, nonya naboigo nigo kwarenge kobaa egesusuro ase engencho y’ogokora kwabo okobe." 
Psalms99:9 Moimokererie Omonene, Nyasae oito, igoro! Inchuo mosasimere ase egetunwa kiaye egechenu, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae oito, nigo are omochenu." 
Psalms100:1 Inwe abanto b’ense yonsi, moterere Omonene more nomochengo!" 
Psalms100:2 Mokorere Omonene more nomogoko, moche ase obosio bwaye na komoterera amatera ’omochengo!" 
Psalms100:3 Manya ng’a Omonene nere Nyasae. Nere ototongete, na intwe nabaye tore; nigo tore abanto baye, ne ching’ondi chie riicho riaye." 
Psalms100:4 Soa ase ebiita biaye na komoakera ng’a mbuya mono, soa ase chigoora chiaye na komotogia! Moakere ng’a mbuya mono, motogie erieta riaye!" 
Psalms100:5 Naki Omonene nomuya, na obwanchani bwaye nobwa kare na kare, na obwegenwa bwaye nigo bogendererete ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Psalms101:1 Nintere igoro y’amabera ao na oboronge bwao; ningoterere aye Omonene. 
Psalms101:2 Nigo nganetie na korenda enchera y’oboronge. Inee! Ndiriri orache asende? Nigo nganetie imbe norogendo ororonge ase enyomba yane imenyete. 
Psalms101:3 Tinkobeka ase obosio bwane ing’ana rinde rionsi ri’obobe; nigo ngechete ogokora kw’abanto bagotiga obwegenwa, tinkonyara kobwatwa ne chingencho chiabo." 
Psalms101:4 Nimbeere aare korwa ase abwo bare ne chinkoro chi’obokorekanu, ring’ana rinde rionsi ri’obobe ribe aare nainche." 
Psalms101:5 Ninsirie omonto okona‐gokwana bobe omonto onde bobisi, tinkoremereria omonto omoenenu na omweanchi." 
Psalms101:6 Amaiso aane narigereretie abegenwa bare ase ense, abwo mbamenye amo nainche. Omonto okobwatia chinchera chi’oboronge, oyio nabe ogonkorera." 
Psalms101:7 Omonto okwenaria obong’ainereria takomenya ase enyomba yane, oyo ogoteba oborimo takobeera ase obosio bwane." 
Psalms101:8 Kera emambia nimbe ngosiria abakori amabe bonsi abare ase ense, nindusie abakori ebibe bonsi korwa ase omochie bw’Omonene." 
Psalms102:1 Aye Omonene, igwa ogosaba kwane; ekerero kiane tiga geike asore." 
Psalms102:2 Tobaisa kobisa obosio bwao korwa asende ase engaki inde nemechando, integerere onyigwe, ong’iranerie bwango ase rituko ngokorangeria." 
Psalms102:3 Amatuko ’obogima bwane nigo agoeta bwango na gosira buna erioki, amauga ’omobere one nigo akoyia buna omorero bw’amakara." 
Psalms102:4 Enkoro yane yaakirwe yabeire buna obonyansi bwagekirwe na kwoma; nigo nkweba koria endagera yane," 
Psalms102:5 ekiagera nigo ngendererete korera na kweumia, amauga ’omobere one abwatanire ne chinyama chi’omobere one." 
Psalms102:6 Inche nigo inga buna etekere ere ase erooro, gose buna enyakweumia etigarete komenya aase amaturi." 
Psalms102:7 Tindi korara chitoro; nigo inga buna enyoni etigarete yoka kerama igoro. 
Psalms102:8 Ababisa baane nigo bagonchecheria omobaso boira; abwo bangechete, kobakoragereria nigo bagwatora erieta riane." 
Psalms102:9 Nigo nkoria ribu buna nkoria endagera, na ekenyugwa kiane nigo ngokeburukania namariga," 
Psalms102:10 ekiagera kwabeire nekeririanda na endamwamu asende. Aye kwambwatire na gwantugutire gochia aare. 
Psalms102:11 Amatuko aane nigo agoeta buna omorengari o mogoroba; nasusanire buna obonyansi. 
Psalms102:12 Korende aye Omonene nigo ore omogambi goika kare na kare; erieta riao nigo rigendererete ase ebiaare bionsi. 
Psalms102:13 Aye noimokerere igoro ororere Sayoni amabera; ekiagera eye nero engaki y’okoywancha; ee, engaki eria yachigetwe yaikire." 
Psalms102:14 Abasomba bao nigo banchete amagena aye, na nigo bare namabeebe ase orotu rwaye." 
Psalms102:15 Ebisaku bionsi mbiiroke erieta ri’Omonene, na abaruoti bonsi b’ense mbairoke obonene bwaye." 
Psalms102:16 Omonene naagache Sayoni naende, nere orarorekane aroro ore ase obonene bwaye." 
Psalms102:17 Nabe okoigwa ogosaba kw’abanto batigirwe bosa, tagochaya ogosorora kwabo." 
Psalms102:18 Amang’ana ayio tiga arikwe agachwe ase engencho y’ekiaare kegochi‐gocha, erinde abanto abwo bataraiborwa, nabarabwo bache gotogia Omonene." 
Psalms102:19 Korwa aaria igoro aase aye aachenu Omonene nigo arigereretie gocha aa, ee, nigo arigereretie gocha ase ense," 
Psalms102:20 erinde aigwe okweumia kw’abasibwa, na gosibora abwo konya banacheirwe ekina ki’ogokwa." 
Psalms102:21 Erio abanto banyare koraria erieta ri’Omonene ase Sayoni, na ogotogigwa kwaye agwo Yerusalemu," 
Psalms102:22 ekero ekio abanto b’ebisaku bionsi mbasangererekane amo namaruoti ase ogosasima Omonene. 
Psalms102:23 Ere okeeirie chinguru chiane konde ase orogendo, bweng’eirie amatuko aane." 
Psalms102:24 Nigo ngoteba, “Aye Nyasae one, takondusia aiga ekero inde ase egati‐gati y’obogima bwane. “Omonene, aye nigo oreo kare na kare, ase ebiaare bionsi." 
Psalms102:25 Agwo kare nigo kwabegete oboroso bw’ense, na igoro chionsi nigo chire emeremo y’amaboko ao." 
Psalms102:26 Echio chionsi nchisirigwe, korende aye nigo oreo kare na kare, echio chionsi nchigote buna eanga, ekiagera aye nigo ogochionchoreria buna eanga ekoonchorerigwa, ee, nigo chirasirigwe kegima." 
Psalms102:27 Korende aye naye oria oria, na emiaka yao tekoba nomoerio." 
Psalms102:28 Abana b’abasomba bao mbamenye ase oborendi obuya, ne chinderia chiabo chigenderere komenya ase obosio bwao.”" 
Psalms103:1 Aye omoyo one, togia Omonene, na bionsi ebire ime yane bitogie erieta riaye richenu." 
Psalms103:2 Aye omoyo one, togia Omonene, tobaisa kweba obuya bwaye bwonsi agokoreire." 
Psalms103:3 Nere ogokwabera ebibe biao bionsi, na kogwenia amarwaire ao onsi." 
Psalms103:4 Nigo akobooria obogima bwao korwa ase embeera na gokobekera egutwa y’obwanchani bogendererete botambe amo namabera. 
Psalms103:5 Ere nigo agoisanekia okogania kwao namaya, erinde otigara koba omosae buna ekeongo kegwekerora." 
Psalms103:6 Omonene nere okorua oboronge na ekeene ase abwo bonsi bagokorerwa bobe. 
Psalms103:7 Nere omanyekanetie chinchera chiaye ase Musa, naboigo nogokora kwaye ase Abaisraeli." 
Psalms103:8 Omonene nigo are omonyene amabera na obuya, tari omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu, nigo are nobwanchani botari koera." 
Psalms103:9 Ere tari kona‐gotogonyera ase chingaki chionsi, gose takogenderera kogacha endamwamu yaye botambe." 
Psalms103:10 Omonene tari gotokorera aya togwenerete ase engencho y’ebibe biaito, gose tari gotoa egesusuro koreng’ana nobobe bwaito." 
Psalms103:11 Koreng’ana buna igoro ere aare mono korwa ase ense, naboigo obwanchani bwaye bore obonene ase abanto bamoirogete." 
Psalms103:12 Naende koreng’ana buna moocha ere aare mono korwa bosongo, naboigo Omonene akorusia ebibe biaito korwa asetore biabeera aare." 
Psalms103:13 Koreng’ana buna ise abana akoba namabera asebare, naboigo n’Omonene akoba namabera ase abwo bamoirogete." 
Psalms103:14 Ere nigo amanyete buna totongire, nigo akoinyora ng’a nigo tore orotu bosa." 
Psalms103:15 Amatuko ’omonto nigo anga buna obonyansi, omonto nigo akoba buna egesicha gekoreereta ase omogondo;" 
Psalms103:16 ekero omwaga ogocha, okerusiao giasira pi, aase aye tari komanya ng’a nkiarengeo." 
Psalms103:17 Korwa kare goika kare na kare obwanchani bw’Omonene nigo bore ase abwo bamoirogete, na oboronge bwaye nigo borabe ase chinderia chiabo" 
Psalms103:18 ase abwo bakobwata okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, naende bakoinyora amachiko aye na koyaigwera." 
Psalms103:19 Omonene nigo abegete ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene aaria igoro, na oboruoti bwaye nigo bokogambera onsi." 
Psalms103:20 Inwe abamalaika b’Omonene, motogie; inwe abamore ne chinguru chinene na mogokora aya agochika ekero mwaigure eriogi rie ring’ana riaye." 
Psalms103:21 Togia Omonene, inwe emeganda yaye yonsi, na inwe abasomba baye, aba mogokora ogwancha kwaye!" 
Psalms103:22 Togia Omonene, inwe ebitongwa biaye bionsi, motogie aande onsi ase akogamba. Aye omoyo one, togia Omonene!" 
Psalms104:1 Aye omoyo one, togia Omonene! Omonene, Nyasae one, aye nigo ore omonene mono; nigo bweboetie ogosikwa na obonene." 
Psalms104:2 Aye nigo bwetubete oborabu buna ogwetuba egetambaa gi’okwambara, kwaramboire igoro buna eema eramboire." 
Psalms104:3 Aye nigo bwarete emiaro y’obomenyo bwao ase amache, gwakorire amare abeire egari yao, nigo ogoeta kore ase chimbaba chi’embeo." 
Psalms104:4 Gwakorire abamalaika bao babeire chimbeo, na abasomba bao babeire ebibemberi bi’omorero." 
Psalms104:5 Aye nigo otenenetie ense bokong’u igoro ase amaroso aye, tebaisa konyegerigwa nonya ng’ake." 
Psalms104:6 Nigo kwayetubete chindiba buna eanga egotuba, amache akabeera igoro ase ebitunwa." 
Psalms104:7 Ekero gwatogonyerete amache ayio, nigo atamete, na ekero aigwete eriogi riao ri’okogukura, nigo aayererete agatama." 
Psalms104:8 Agatiira gochia ebitunwa igoro, na agatirimboka gochia ase amakura inse, agaika aase kwayachikerete." 
Psalms104:9 Nigo kwabegete chimbebe aase amache atanyare goetania, erinde tabaisa gotuba ense yonsi naende." 
Psalms104:10 Nigo ogotubokia chinsoko ase amagoko, amache aba agoeta ase egati y’ebitunwa." 
Psalms104:11 Chinsoko echio nigo chikoa ching’iti chionsi amache chianywa, ne chitigere chi’orosana nigo chikoyanywa, na erang’o yasira." 
Psalms104:12 Chinyoni nigo chikomenya ang’e na chirochio, nigo chikoba chigotera ekero chigwete ase chinsagia chi’emete." 
Psalms104:13 Korwa agwo igoro ase omenyete, nigo ogotweria ebitunwa embura, na ense nigo egoisaneka nokwama kw’emeremo yao." 
Psalms104:14 Nigo okomeria obonyansi ching’iti chikorisia, naende kwanyorera abanto ebimeri bagokorera, na igo kwabanyorera chindagera korwa ase riroba." 
Psalms104:15 Abanto nigo bakonywa edivai na baba nomogoko; nigo bakweaka amaguta, bagirigenta amasio abo, naende baria endagera, erinde emebere yabo yanyora chinguru." 
Psalms104:16 Emete y’Omonene nigo egoisaneka namache, ee, emecharake ya Lebanoni, eyio Omonene asimegete." 
Psalms104:17 Chinyoni nigo chikoagacha ebiswa biabo ase emete eyio, amaagonga nigo akoagacha ebiswa biabo aroro ase emetarakwa." 
Psalms104:18 Ebitunwa ebitambe nabio bire obomenyo bwe chimbori chi’orosana, emienya y’ebitare nero obotamero bw’ebisengi." 
Psalms104:19 Aye kwabekire omotienyi obeire ekemanyererio gie chingaki, na erioba nigo rimanyete boronge ekero rigwenerete kogwa." 
Psalms104:20 Aye nigo okorenta omosunte bwaba botuko, erio ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana chiachaka gotaara." 
Psalms104:21 Chindo chinsae nigo chikoronya ekero chigotwara, chiarigia endagera yabo korwa ase Nyasae." 
Psalms104:22 Ekero erioba rigochia kooroka chiairana, chiagenda korara ase amakuruma abo." 
Psalms104:23 Mwanyabanto nigo bakogenda ase emeremo yabo, bayekora goika mogoroba." 
Psalms104:24 Aye Omonene, naki ogokora kwao kore okonene! Okwo gwonsi nigo okogokora nobong’aini, ense nigo eichire nebitongwa biao." 
Psalms104:25 Enyancha nero enene naende engare; nigo eichire nebitongwa bire moyo bitari kobareka, ebike na ebinene." 
Psalms104:26 Chimeeri nao chigoeta, na Leviatani, eng’iti eria enene y’okwoboyia gwatongete, ekonagoswenenao." 
Psalms104:27 Ebitongwa ebio bionsi naye bisemeretie, erio oe kera ekemo endagera yaye ase engaki egwenerete." 
Psalms104:28 Ekero kwabieire endagera, nigo bikoyesangereria; ekero kwaramboire okoboko kwao, nigo bigoisaneka nebinto bire ebiya." 
Psalms104:29 Ekero kwabisire obosio bwao, nigo bikoba nobwoba obonene; na ekero okobiura omoika obo, nigo bigokwa, biairana ase amaroba ime." 
Psalms104:30 Ekero ogotoma omoika oo, nigo bigotongwa, naende gwakora ense yaba enyia." 
Psalms104:31 Tiga obonene bw’Omonene bogenderere kobao kare na kare; Omonene tiga agokere emeremo yaye. 
Psalms104:32 Ere nigo akorigereria ense, nero yatengecha, nigo agokuna ebitunwa, na birobio biasokia erioki." 
Psalms104:33 Ninterere Omonene ase obogima bwane bwonsi, nimbe ngotera ase ogotogia Nyasae one ekero inde moyo." 
Psalms104:34 Tiga Omonene agokigwe nebirengererio ebio biane, ekiagera inche nigo ngogete asare." 
Psalms104:35 Abanyabibe tiga basirigwe korwa ase ense, abakori amabe tibabaisa kobao. Aye omoyo one, togia Omonene, Motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms105:1 Moiranerie Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, rangeria erieta riaye ase ogokonywa, tebia abanto b’ebisaku ogokora kwaye." 
Psalms105:2 Terera Omonene, moterere amatera ay’okomotogia, raria ogokora kwaye kw’ogokumia!" 
Psalms105:3 Etogerie erieta riaye richenu, abanto bonsi abakorigia Omonene basasoke ase chinkoro chiabo." 
Psalms105:4 Rigia Omonene amo ne chinguru chiaye, morigie obosio bwaye botambe." 
Psalms105:5 Inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Ibrahimu, omosomba bw’Omonene, ee, inwe abanto ba Yakobo, abachore b’Omonene, inyora emeremo y’ogokumia, eria akorire, inyora ebikone biaye, na ebina biaye bi’ekeene arure." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Ere nere Omonene, Nyasae oito, ebina biaye nigo bire ase ense yonsi." 
Psalms105:8 Botambe nigo akoinyora okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, boigo goika ebiare elifu eyemo nigo akoinyora ring’ana achigete," 
Psalms105:9 na okobwatana koria gw’ogotianania akorete na Ibrahimu, na eira yaye y’ogotianania amorierete Isaka." 
Psalms105:10 Okobwatana okwo akagokong’ia gokaba ogochika ase Yakobo, ee, ase Israeli okobwatana gwa kare na kare," 
Psalms105:11 akamotebia, “Ninkoe ense ya Kanani ebe egetari oraire kebe omwando oo.”" 
Psalms105:12 Ase engaki eria nigo barenge abanto abake ase omobaro, bakabarwa ng’a tibaisaini gento; nigo barenge abaeti ase ense eyio." 
Psalms105:13 Bakaba bagoetanana korwa ase egesaku ekemo gochia ase ekende, na korwa ase oboruoti obomo gochia ase obonde." 
Psalms105:14 Nyasae tatigete abanto bande babachande; agatogonyera abaruoti ase engencho yabo," 
Psalms105:15 agateba, “Timobaisa gokuna abaakwa amaguta baane, gose timokorera ababani baane bobe.”" 
Psalms105:16 Ekero Omonene arentete enchara ase ense, na asiretie chindagera chiabo chionsi," 
Psalms105:17 konya otomire omonto agwo ritang’ani, nere Yusufu konya oonigwe obeire omosomba." 
Psalms105:18 Nigo asibetwe chingatare chigasionora amagoro aye, naende akabekerwa eteyo y’ekioma ase rigoti riaye," 
Psalms105:19 goika ayabanete agaikerana. Ase ayio ring’ana ri’Omonene rikaenekia ng’a Yusufu nomoronge. 
Psalms105:20 Omoruoti agatoma abanto bakamosibora, ee, oyorenge omogambi bw’abanto akamosibora." 
Psalms105:21 Akamobeka akaba omoteneneri bw’enyomba yaye, amo nebinto bionsi abwate," 
Psalms105:22 erinde abe ogotebereria abanene b’oboruoti boria buna anchete, na kworokereria abagaaka baye b’oboruoti chisemi." 
Psalms105:23 Erio Abaisraeli bagacha Misiri; Yakobo akaba omomenyi ase ense ya Hamu. 
Psalms105:24 Omonene agasesenia abanto abwo bakabucha mono, naende bakaba ne chinguru chinyinge kobua abachandi babo." 
Psalms105:25 Omonene akaonchora chinkoro chi’Abamisiri, erinde bakagecha abanto baye, erio bagakorera abasomba b’Omonene amabe ay’obong’ainereria." 
Psalms105:26 Omonene agatoma Musa, omosomba oye, na Haroni, oyio konya achorire." 
Psalms105:27 Barabwo bakaorokia ebimanyererio ase egati y’abanto, bagakora ebikone agwo ase ense ya Hamu." 
Psalms105:28 Omonene agatoma omosunte, na ense eria ekamwama ti. Barabwo tibangete koigwera amang’ana aye." 
Psalms105:29 Akaonchora amache abo akaba amanyinga, na ayio akagera chinswe chiabo chigakwa." 
Psalms105:30 Ebioro bigacha bigaichora ase ense yabo nonya nase ebinyomba bi’okorara bi’abagambi babo. 
Psalms105:31 Omonene agakwana, ne chingi chinyinge mono chigacha, ne chinsona boigo ase ense eria yonsi." 
Psalms105:32 Akarenta amagena ’embura ribaga ri’embura, chinkoba chikamesa aande onsi ase ense eria." 
Psalms105:33 Agasaria emesabibu na emeko yabo, emete y’ense eria ekabunwa." 
Psalms105:34 Agakwana, ne chingige chigacha, chirochio chikabiara chikaba chinyinge," 
Psalms105:35 chikaria chigakoora ebimeri bi’ense eria, boigo chikaria okwama kwe riroba riabo." 
Psalms105:36 Omonene agaita abana abatangi bonsi ase ense eria, ne ching’iti chintangi, ogotongora gwe chinguru chiabo chionsi." 
Psalms105:37 Erio Omonene akang’anyia Abaisraeli korwa aroro bare ne chifeta ne chitahabu, monto onde tarenge ase abanto baye oborire chinguru." 
Psalms105:38 Abamisiri nigo babete nomogoko ekero Abaisraeli bang’anyete, ekiagera obwoba konya bwabagwereire ase engencho y’Abaisraeli." 
Psalms105:39 Omonene akarambora riire rigatuba abanto baye, na omorero okaba okobamorekera botuko." 
Psalms105:40 Ekero baboretie eki bakoria, ere agatoma chinkware, boigo akabaigotia nendagera korwa igoro." 
Psalms105:41 Akabochora egetare, na amache agasoka korwao, akaminyoka ase erooro buna orooche." 
Psalms105:42 Omonene akainyora eira eria enchenu ariete, boigo akainyora Ibrahimu, omosomba oye." 
Psalms105:43 Ase igo akang’anyia abanto baye korwa ase ense eria bakaba bagochenga, abanto abwo baye achorete bakaba bagotera nomogoko." 
Psalms105:44 Akabaa chinse chi’abanto b’ebisaku chikaba echiabo, akabaa nebinto abanto abwo konya bechandeire." 
Psalms105:45 Ayio nigo akoregete, erinde Abaisraeli baigwere emeroberio yaye echikire, naende barende amachiko aye. Motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms106:1 Motogie Omonene! Moakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera ere nomuya, na obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms106:2 Ning’o oranyare goteba ogokora okonene kw’Omonene, gose koraria obonene bwaye bwonsi?" 
Psalms106:3 Mbasesenirie abanto abwo bagokora ekeene, abwo bagokora oboronge ase chingaki chionsi." 
Psalms106:4 Omonene, ong’inyore ekero okororera abanto bao amabera, onchichere, ontoorie!" 
Psalms106:5 Erio inyare korora amaya abanto bao abachore baranyore, na inche inyare kogokera omogoko bw’abanto bao, naende inyare gwetogia amo nabanto bare omwando oo." 
Psalms106:6 Intwe twakorire ebibe buna chisokoro chiaito chiakorete; twakorire ayare amabe mono, ee, twakorire ayare amabe." 
Psalms106:7 Ekero chisokoro chiaito chiarenge Misiri, tichiarengereretie igoro y’emeremo yao y’ogokumia; tichiainyorete obwanchani bwao obonge bogendererete botambe, korende chigasaria asore aaria ase Enyancha Embariri." 
Psalms106:8 Nonya naboigo Omonene akabatooria ase engencho y’erieta riaye, ng’a anyare komanyekania okobua kwaye okonene." 
Psalms106:9 Nigo atogonyerete Enyancha eria Embariri egakamoka, erio agaetia Abaisraeli aroro buna nase ense enyomo." 
Psalms106:10 Naboigo Omonene akabatooria korwa ase amaboko ay’ababagechete na kobabooria korwa ase chinguru chi’ababisa babo. 
Psalms106:11 Amache akamera kegima abachandi baria babo; onde tatigarete ore moyo nonya noyomo. 
Psalms106:12 Erio bakegena ring’ana ri’Omonene, agwo bagatera ase okomotogia." 
Psalms106:13 Korende ase obwango bakeba ogokora kwaye, tibaganyete Omonene abasemie." 
Psalms106:14 Barabwo nigo babete nobotoonu bw’okogania endagera. Bagateema Nyasae agwo ase erooro. 
Psalms106:15 Ere akabaa egento baboretie baegwe, korende akabatomera oborwaire bw’okobareyia." 
Psalms106:16 Ekero abanto b’egetwori babete ne ribero ase Musa, na ase Haroni, oyio orenge omochenu o Nyasae," 
Psalms106:17 riroba rikabwereka rikamera Datani, na rikamumekeria abanto b’ekeombe ki’Abiiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Boigo omorero ogatuboka agwo ase egati y’ekeombe kiabo, ekebemberi ki’omorero kegasamba abakori amabe baria." 
Psalms106:19 Abanto bakaroisia omogwekano bw’emori agwo Horebu, erio bagasasima omogwekano oria obombire." 
Psalms106:20 Barabwo bakaonchoreria oyorenge obonene bwabo, bakaonchokera omogwekano bw’eng’ombe ekorisia obonyansi." 
Psalms106:21 Bakeba Nyasae, Omotooria obo, oria okorete amang’ana amanene aaria Misiri;" 
Psalms106:22 oria okorete ogokora kw’ogokumia ase ense ya Hamu, naende agakora amang’ana ay’okoondokia aaria ase Enyancha Embariri." 
Psalms106:23 Ase ayio Omonene akarengereria ng’a abasirie, korende Musa, omochore oye, agatenena ase obosio bwaye buna omobwatania, ase ogotanga endamwamu yaye teita abanto." 
Psalms106:24 Abanto bagachaya ense eria yarenge engiya, ekiagera tibegenete eira y’Omonene." 
Psalms106:25 Ekero barenge ase chiema chiabo ime nigo bemurunganetie, tibaigwera eriogi ri’Omonene." 
Psalms106:26 Ase ayio akarambora okoboko kwaye igoro yabo, agatiana ng’a abatige bakwere agwo ase erooro," 
Psalms106:27 naende ng’a asiarere abanto b’ororeria rwabo, bagende komenya ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku ase chinse ao ao." 
Psalms106:28 Abaisraeli bakabwatana na Baali, enyasae ya Peori, bakaria ebing’wanso biarenge koruegwa ase chinyasae chitari moyo." 
Psalms106:29 Ase igo ogokora okwo kwabo gokagechia Omonene goika akaba nendamwamu, na oborwaire bogoita bogatuboka ase egati yabo." 
Psalms106:30 Erio Finehasi agatenena agaakanera amabe ayio akoretwe, na oborwaire boria bogatiga goita abanto." 
Psalms106:31 Ase engencho y’ogokora okwo Finehasi akabarwa ng’a nomonyene oboronge aare, ebiaare ase ebiaare kogenderera botambe." 
Psalms106:32 Abanto bakagechia Omonene agwo ase amache a Meriba, na ase engencho yabo Musa agasoa ase emechando." 
Psalms106:33 Nigo bagechetie enkoro ya Musa, goika agakwana amang’ana nobororo, ase ogotarengereria buya." 
Psalms106:34 Abaisraeli tibaitete basirie kegima abanto b’ebisaku, buna Omonene konya achikire." 
Psalms106:35 Korende nigo basang’ananete nabanto abwo bakeorokereria ogokora kwabo. 
Psalms106:36 Nigo bakorerete emegwekano yabo baare gosasima, na eyio ekaba amareba asebare." 
Psalms106:37 Barabwo nigo baruete abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, bakaba ebing’wanso ase ebirecha." 
Psalms106:38 Bagaitera amanyinga ’abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, abatari na komocha, abwo baruete bakaba ebing’wanso ase emegwekano bagasasima ase ense ya Kanani; na ense eria ekaba eyetachenegeti ase engencho y’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ayio." 
Psalms106:39 Ase ayio abanto abwo bagesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase engencho y’ogokora kwabo, bagakora obonyaka tibaba abegenwa." 
Psalms106:40 Erio Omonene akaba nendamwamu ase abanto baye, na akagechigwa nabanto bare omwando oye." 
Psalms106:41 Akababeka ase amaboko ’abanto b’ebisaku, erinde abanto abwo babagechete bakaba bakobagambera." 
Psalms106:42 Ababisa babo bakabakorera bobe, bakababua bakababeka inse y’obogambi bwabo." 
Psalms106:43 Ase chingaki chinyinge Omonene nigo arenge kobatooria, korende ase ogosemania kwabo bagachora gosaria asare: ase igo bakaba bagochandeka mono ase engencho y’ebibe biabo." 
Psalms106:44 Nonya naboigo nabechanderete ase emechando yabo, akaigwa ekerero kiabo." 
Psalms106:45 Ase engencho yabo nigo ainyorete okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, akabarorera amabeebe, ekiagera are nobwanchani bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms106:46 Nigo agerete abwo babagoosete bakabarorera amabera. 
Psalms106:47 Aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, totoorie; tosangererie amo, otorusie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku, erio tonyare gotogia erieta riao richenu, na gochengera obonene bwao." 
Psalms106:48 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atogigwe korwa kare goika kare na kare; na abanto bonsi pi batebe, “Amina.” Togia Omonene!" 
Psalms107:1 Moakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera ere nomuya, na obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms107:2 Abanto abwo Omonene abooretie tiga bakwane igo, abwo abooririe korwa ase okoboko kw’omochandi." 
Psalms107:3 Obasangereirie obarentire korwa ase chinse ao ao, korwa moocha na bosongo, na korwa sugusu na irianyi." 
Psalms107:4 Abanto abwo nigo babete bakonagoetanana ase erooro enyomo, tibanyorete mochie onde ase baare komenya." 
Psalms107:5 Nigo babete nenchara na erang’o goika bakerusia moyo. 
Psalms107:6 Erio bakarera ase Omonene ase engencho y’emechando yabo, ere akabatooria korwa ase obokong’u bwabo." 
Psalms107:7 Akabaraa ase enchera endonge, goika akabaikia ase omochie banyarete komenya." 
Psalms107:8 Tiga abanto baakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho y’obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe na ase emeremo y’ogokumia akobakorera mwanyabanto. 
Psalms107:9 Omonene nigo agoisanekia oyore nerang’o, na oyore nenchara omoigotia namaya." 
Psalms107:10 Abanto nigo bamenyete ase omosunte na ase ekiriri ki’amakweri, nigo basibire ase emechando, basibeire chingataare," 
Psalms107:11 ekiagera bangete koigwera ring’ana ria Nyasae, bagachaya ogosemia kw’Oyore Igoro Mono." 
Psalms107:12 Agakanya chinkoro chiabo ase okobaa obokong’u, bakaiyerigwa inse, na monto onde tarengeo okobakonya." 
Psalms107:13 Erio bakarera ase Omonene ase engencho y’emechando yabo, ere akabatooria korwa ase obokong’u bwabo." 
Psalms107:14 Akabarusia korwa ase omosunte ekerima, akabutora chingataare basibeire." 
Psalms107:15 Tiga baakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho y’obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe, na ase emeremo y’ogokumia akoreire mwanyabanto." 
Psalms107:16 Ere nigo abunete ebisiekero bie chitaai, na akabuna emekorogoto y’ebioma ekaba ebing’ese." 
Psalms107:17 Abande bakaririeka, ekiagera babwatetie enchera y’ogosareka, na bakaba bagochandeka ase engencho y’ebibe biabo." 
Psalms107:18 Kera endagera ekaba engundo asebare, bakaba ang’e gosoa ase ebiita bi’amakweri." 
Psalms107:19 Erio bakarera ase Omonene ase engencho y’emechando yabo, ere akabatooria korwa ase obokong’u bwabo." 
Psalms107:20 Akabatomera ring’ana riaye, akabagwenia, akabatooria korwa ase chimbeera." 
Psalms107:21 Tiga baakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho y’obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe, na ase emeremo y’ogokumia akoreire mwanyabanto." 
Psalms107:22 Tiga barue ebing’wanso bi’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, naende bararie ogokora kwaye ase ogotera nomogoko." 
Psalms107:23 Abwo bagendete ne chimeeri ase enyancha, bagakora oboonchoreria ase chinyancha chinene," 
Psalms107:24 mbaaroche ogokora kw’Omonene, ee, ogokora kwaye kw’ogokumia ime ase chindiba." 
Psalms107:25 Ere agachika ekembugu‐mbugu gekaimoka, kerokio gekaimokereria igoro emerindo y’enyancha," 
Psalms107:26 Emerindo eyio ekaimokerera igoro, naende ekairana inse, na ase ayio abanto bakerusia moyo ase omoichano." 
Psalms107:27 Bakaba bakoong’anya na gotabataba buna abanto batindire, na obong’aini bwabo bwonsi bokabaerera." 
Psalms107:28 Erio bakarera ase Omonene ase engencho y’emechando yabo, nere akabatooria korwa ase obokong’u bwabo." 
Psalms107:29 Agachika ekembugu‐mbugu keria, kegakira‐kiri, na emerindo y’enyancha egatoerera." 
Psalms107:30 Erio bakaba nomogoko, ekiagera banyorete obotoereru, na Omonene akabaikia ase ekiambokero keria baganetie." 
Psalms107:31 Tiga baakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ase engencho y’obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe, na ase emeremo y’ogokumia akoreire mwanyabanto." 
Psalms107:32 Tiga babake Omonene agwo ase omosangererekano bw’abanto, bamotogie nase abagaaka bagoikaransa kogamba." 
Psalms107:33 Omonene akaonchora chindooche chikaba erooro, ne chinsoko chikaba ense enyomo." 
Psalms107:34 Akaonchora na ense ere entobu ekaba ekerubo ki’omonyo, ase engencho y’obobe bw’abanto bamenyeteo." 
Psalms107:35 Boigo akaonchora erooro ekaba ritibo riichire amache, na ense enyomo egatuboka chinsoko chi’amache." 
Psalms107:36 Aroro agwo nigo arentete abanto bare nenchara; barabwo bakaagacha omochie aroro bakamenyao. 
Psalms107:37 Barabwo nigo bakobusura emegondo, naende basimeka emesabibu, bakanyora okwama okonene mono." 
Psalms107:38 Omonene akabasesenia bakabucha mono, tatigete omobaro bwe chitugo chiabo okee." 
Psalms107:39 Ekero bakeetigwe na kworoba ase engencho y’ogokorerwa bobe na gochandwa," 
Psalms107:40 Omonene agachaya abanene baria babachandete, bakaba bakoong’anya ase chirooro chitari ne chinchera." 
Psalms107:41 Korende ere nigo akorusia abaremeire korwa ase emechando, na obuchia chiamate chiabo chiaba buna amaicho." 
Psalms107:42 Abanyaboronge nigo bakorora amang’ana ayio na bagoka mono; korende abakori amabe nigo bagokira‐kiri baumata. 
Psalms107:43 Omonto onde bwensi ore omong’aini, tiga aigwe amang’ana aya, tiga arengererie mono amanye obwanchani bw’Omonene bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms108:1 Aye Nyasae, enkoro yane nigo ere noboremu! Nintere na gochenga! Omoyo one bwonsi, boka!" 
Psalms108:2 Inwe amakano aane onsi, boka! Nainche nimboke mambia chuni." 
Psalms108:3 Aye Omonene, ninkoiranerie ng’a mbuya mono ase egati y’abanto, nimbe ngotera amatera ay’okogotogia ase egati y’ebisaku." 
Psalms108:4 Amabera ao nigo are amanene aigete aaria igoro, obwegenwa bwao nigo boigete igoro ase amare." 
Psalms108:5 Aye Nyasae, oorokie ng’a nigo ore omonene goetania igoro chionsi. Tiga obonene bwao bororekane ase ense yonsi." 
Psalms108:6 Intoorie nokoboko kwao gw’okorio na oigwe aya nkogosaba. 
Psalms108:7 Nyasae orire eira korwa ase obomenyo bwaye obochenu, ogoteba, “Ase omochengo ninyatanane Sekemu, na ense omweya ya Sukoti inyiate chincherere." 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi neyane, na Manase neyane; Efraimu nekegogwa kiane gi’ekioma, na Yuda nenyimbo yane y’obogambi." 
Psalms108:9 Moabu negetaabo kiane ngoisabera, nindute egekoroto kiane igoro ase Edomu, ning’ake eriogi ri’okobua igoro y’ense y’Abafilisti.”" 
Psalms108:10 Ning’o orandaae ansoyie ase omochie ogiteire chindwaki? Ning’o orantang’ane gochia Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Aye Nyasae, Inee, ngwatotigire kegima? Aye tori kogenda amo nabarwani baito b’esegi." 
Psalms108:12 Tokonye, torwanie ababisa baito tobabue, ekiagera ogokonywa gokorwa ase mwanyabanto mbosa." 
Psalms108:13 Ekero tore amo na Nyasae, inatokore amang’ana amanene, nere orabue ababisa baito na kobatiringera inse." 
Psalms109:1 Aye Nyasae ningotogie, tobaisa gokira‐kiri." 
Psalms109:2 Abakori amabe abare abang’ainereria nigo bagokwana igoro yane, ee, nigo bagokwana oborimo igoro yane." 
Psalms109:3 Bang’etananire bagokwana amang’ana ’obogechi, nigo bakondwania engencho ende etaiyo." 
Psalms109:4 Nonya inche mbanchete, barabwo nigo bangechete, ee, nonya ngendererete kobasabera." 
Psalms109:5 Nigo bakong’akana amabe ase amaya aane na kongecha ase obwanchani bwane. 
Psalms109:6 Chora omonto omobe agambere omobisa one, na tiga oria omosoeri atenene ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio amosoere." 
Psalms109:7 Ekero agambigwe ekina, tiga abarerwe okomocha, nonya nogosaba kwaye kobarwe ng’a nebibe." 
Psalms109:8 Amatuko aye tiga abe amake, na oboteneneri bwaye omoao aboire." 
Psalms109:9 Tiga abana baye batigwe bare chintakana, na omokungu oye atigwe ore omoboraka." 
Psalms109:10 Abana baye babe bakoombogana na kona‐gosaberera, bagende kona‐korigia endagera aare korwa ase amaturi bamenyete." 
Psalms109:11 Tiga abamoete ebinto singo bache baire ebinto biaye bionsi; abanto abaao bache basakore ebi bakorerete emeremo emekong’u. 
Psalms109:12 Monto onde tabaisa koba omuya asare, gose onde taba namabera ase abana baye bare chintakana." 
Psalms109:13 Tiga ororeria rwaye rosirigwe, na erieta riaye riebwe kegima ase ekiare gia kabere." 
Psalms109:14 Ebibe bie chisokoro chiaye biinyorwe ase obosio bw’Omonene, na ebibe bia ng’ina tibibaisa gotinyigwa." 
Psalms109:15 Ebibe biabo tiga bigenderere kobeera ase obosio bw’Omonene botambe; na barabwo tibabaisa koinyorwa ase ense nonya ng’ake. 
Psalms109:16 Omonto oyio tainyorete koorokia amabera, korende abataka, na abaremerwa, na abasionoire chinkoro chiabo, nigo abachandete goika ogokwa kwabo." 
Psalms109:17 Ere nigo anchete koragereria, bono tiga okoragereria okwo komoiranere. Ere tanchete gosesenia, ase ayio ogosesenigwa kobe aare asare." 
Psalms109:18 Nigo ambarerete okoragererigwa buna egoti yaye akwambara; bono tiga konywere ase omobere oye buna amache akonywera ase omobere, na buna amaguta akweakwa akonywera aika ase amauga aye." 
Psalms109:19 Tiga okoragererigwa okwo kobe buna egetambaa akwambara, naende kobe buna orokini akweboeria botambe." 
Psalms109:20 Tiga Omonene abaakane igo abwo bagonsoera, abwo bagokwana bobe igoro y’obogima bwane." 
Psalms109:21 Korende aye Nyasae, Omonene one, ondwanerere ase engencho y’erieta riao, intoorie, ekiagera obwanchani bwao bwa botambe nigo bore obuya." 
Psalms109:22 Inche nigo inde omotaka oremeire mono, na nigo inde nobororo ase enkoro yane ime." 
Psalms109:23 Nigo ngoeta buna omorengari o mogoroba, nigo nkoirurukigwa buna chingige." 
Psalms109:24 Amaru aborirwe chinguru ase engencho y’okweng’ata, na omobere one oreeire mono." 
Psalms109:25 Nabeire omonto ogosekererwa nabansoeri; ekero bakondora, nigo bagokumia basingisia emetwe yabo." 
Psalms109:26 Aye Omonene, Nyasae one, inkonye! Intoorie, ekiagera aye nigo obwate amabera amange!" 
Psalms109:27 Tiga abansoeri abwo bamanye ng’a aya nigo arure ase okoboko kwao. Aye Omonene, naye gwakorire aya." 
Psalms109:28 Barabwo tiga bandagererie, korende aye onsesenie. Tiga abwo bagonkorera bobe barore obosooku, korende inche, omosomba oo, imbe nomogoko." 
Psalms109:29 Tiga abansoeri baboigwe ogochaywa, tiga obosooku obwo bobatube buna egetambaa gi’okwambara." 
Psalms109:30 Ning’iranerie Omonene ng’a mbuya mono kegima nomonwa one, nimbe nkona‐komotogia ase egati y’abanto abange." 
Psalms109:31 Omonene nateneine ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kw’omotaka, ase okomotooria korwa ase abwo bakomonachera ekina ki’ogokwa." 
Psalms110:1 Omonene agatebia Omonene one, “Ikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio goika mbeke ababisa bao babe inse y’amagoro ao.”" 
Psalms110:2 Korwa Sayoni Omonene narambore enyimbo yao y’obogambi ere nokobua, atebe, “Gamba ase egati y’ababisa bao.”" 
Psalms110:3 Abanto bao mberue nogwancha kwabo, ekero orasangererie abarwani bao b’esegi. Abamura bao mbache asore beboetie oboseera obochenu, buna riime ria mambia." 
Psalms110:4 Omonene otianire, takoonchora ebirengererio biaye: “Aye nigo ore omokuani goika kare na kare, koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Omonene nigo ateneine ase ensemo y’okoboko kwao gw’okorio; ere nasenyente abaruoti ase rituko ri’endamwamu yaye. 
Psalms110:6 Nanachere abanto b’ebisaku ekina, ense neichore nebitondo; nasenyente emetwe y’abagambi b’ense engima." 
Psalms110:7 Nabe okonywa amache ’ensoko ekero are ase orogendo rwaye, ase ayio naimokererie omotwe oye igoro kabuire." 
Psalms111:1 Togia Omonene! Ning’ake ng’a mbuya mono ase Omonene nenkoro yane yonsi, agwo ase omosangererekano bw’abanto bare ne chinkoro chindonge." 
Psalms111:2 Ogokora kw’Omonene nigo kore okonene, Abwo bagokogokera nigo bagokweorokereria erinde bakomanye." 
Psalms111:3 Ogokora kw’Omonene nigo kore okw’ogosikwa okonene na obonene, na oboronge bwaye nigo bogendererete kobao goika kare na kare." 
Psalms111:4 Omonene okorire ogokora kwaye kw’ogokumia kobe gokoinyorwa, ere nigo are nobuya na amabera." 
Psalms111:5 Nigo akoa abanto abwo bamoirogete endagera; nabe ogendererete koinyora okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania goika kare na kare. 
Psalms111:6 Oorokeirie abanto baye okobua kw’ogokora kwaye ase okobaa emiando y’abanto b’ebisaku. 
Psalms111:7 Ogokora kw’amaboko aye nigo kore okw’obwegenwa na okw’oboronge, na amachiko aye onsi nay’obwegenwa." 
Psalms111:8 Amachiko ayio nigo ateneine bokong’u kare na kare, aikeranigwe ase ekeene na oboronge." 
Psalms111:9 Ere otomeire abanto baye okoboorigwa, na ochikire okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania kobeo goika kare na kare. Erieta riaye nigo rire richenu na eri’okoirokwa." 
Psalms111:10 Okomoiroka Omonene, oyio noro omochakano bw’obong’aini, bonsi abagokora ayio nigo bare nokomanya okuya. Ogotogigwa kwaye nogwa kare na kare." 
Psalms112:1 Togia Omonene! Nasesenirie omonto oyio omoirogete Omonene, na ogokirie mono koigwera amachiko aye." 
Psalms112:2 Oroiboro rwaye ndobe nokobua ase ense; ekiaare ki’abare ne chinkoro chindonge ngesesenigwe. 
Psalms112:3 Obotenenku na obonda mbibe ase enyomba yaye, na oboronge bwaye mbogenderere kobao botambe." 
Psalms112:4 Omonene nigo ogochera abanyaboronge buna omobaso okobara ase omosunte, ore nobuya, na amabera, na oboronge." 
Psalms112:5 Nasesenirie omonto ore namabera na okorua ebinto singo, boigo ogokora amang’ana aye onsi ase oboronge." 
Psalms112:6 Omonyaboronge takonyegerigwa nonya ng’ake, nabe okoinyorwa kare na kare." 
Psalms112:7 Takwoboa amang’ana amabe akoigwa, enkoro yaye nigo ere endemu esemeretie Omonene." 
Psalms112:8 Enkoro yaye teri koirianyeka gose kwoboa, ere nigo akoremereria goika abamochandi babugwe." 
Psalms112:9 Ere nigo akoa abataka ebiegwa ore nomoyo omorabu; oboronge bwaye mbogenderere kobao kare na kare; orogunchara rwaye ndokine ase ogosikwa. 
Psalms112:10 Ekero omonto omonyabibe akorora ayio, nigo agoichana ogechigwa, oriania amaino aye, orea osira. Okogania kw’omonyabibe nigo kogosira." 
Psalms113:1 Togia Omonene! Inwe abasomba b’Omonene, motogie, ee, togia erieta riaye!" 
Psalms113:2 Erieta ri’Omonene ritogigwe korwa bono goika kare na kare! 
Psalms113:3 Erieta ri’Omonene ribe rigotogigwa korwa ekero erioba rikooroka goika ekero rikogwa! 
Psalms113:4 Omonene nigo are omonene igoro ase ebisaku bionsi, na obonene bwaye nigo boetanaine igoro chionsi." 
Psalms113:5 Ning’o onga buna Omonene, Nyasae oito, oria omenyete aaria igoro mono," 
Psalms113:6 na origereretie gocha inse aa arore igoro na ense. 
Psalms113:7 Nigo akoimokia omotaka korwa ase obotaka obwere, na koimokia omoremerwa korwa ase ribu," 
Psalms113:8 obabeka baikaransa amo nabwo bare nokobua, baria bakogambera abanto baye." 
Psalms113:9 Nigo akoa omokungu omogomba chinguru chi’okoibora, oba nomogoko ase enka yaye. Omonene atogigwe!" 
Psalms114:1 Ekero Abaisraeli barwete Misiri, ee, ekero abanto ba Yakobo barwete ase abanto barenge gokwana omonwa omoao," 
Psalms114:2 Abayuda bakaba aase aachenu ay’Omonene, na Abaisraeli bakaba ab’obogambi bwaye." 
Psalms114:3 Enyancha ekarora ayio egatama, na orooche rwa Yorodan rokanacheka, rokairana nyuma." 
Psalms114:4 Ebitunwa bigachara‐charara buna chimingichi, na ebigoro buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi." 
Psalms114:5 Aye enyancha, ninki kwaroche, erinde ogatama? Aye Yorodani, ninki kiabete asore, erinde okanacheka okairana nyuma?" 
Psalms114:6 Inwe ebitunwa, ninki kiagerete mogachara‐charara buna chimingichi, nainwe ebigoro boigo buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi?" 
Psalms114:7 Aye ense, tengechigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, ee, ase obosio bwa Nyasae o Yakobo." 
Psalms114:8 Oyio oonchorete egetare gekaba ritibo ri’amache, ne rigena rikong’u rikaba ensoko y’amache." 
Psalms115:1 Aye Omonene, intwe titobaisa gotogigwa, korende erieta riao rioka ritogigwe, ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao bwa botambe, na ase obwegenwa bwao." 
Psalms115:2 Nase ki abanto b’ebisaku batakomanyeti baraborie, “Ng’ai Nyasae oyio obo are?”" 
Psalms115:3 Nyasae oito nigo are igoro, na nigo agokora rinde rionsi agwancha." 
Psalms115:4 Emegwekano abanto abwo bagosasima nigo eroisirie korwa ase chifeta ne chitahabu, nigo ere emeremo y’amaboko a mwanyabanto." 
Psalms115:5 Nigo ebwate emenwa, korende teri gokwana, nebwate amaiso, korende teri korora." 
Psalms115:6 Nebwate amato, korende teri koigwa, nebwate chimioro, korende teri konyonka eigwe rimisu." 
Psalms115:7 Nebwate amaboko, korende teri kobwata gento, nebwate amagoro, korende teri gotaara; gose tebwati eriogi ri’ogokwana." 
Psalms115:8 Abakoroisia emegwekano eyio nabo barabe buna ero ere; naboigo na baria bayiegenete. 
Psalms115:9 Inwe Abaisraeli, mosemerie Omonene; ere nere Omokonyi oino na enguba yaino." 
Psalms115:10 Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Haroni, mosemerie Omonene; ere nere Omokonyi oino na enguba yaino." 
Psalms115:11 Inwe abamoirogete Omonene, mosemerie Omonene; ere nere Omokonyi oino na enguba yaino." 
Psalms115:12 Omonene obeire ogotoinyora, natosesenie; nasesenie Abaisraeli, nasesenie nab’ororeria rwa Haroni." 
Psalms115:13 Ere nasesenie bonsi abamoirogete, nasesenie abake na abanene." 
Psalms115:14 Tiga Omonene abamentekanie, inwe amo ne chinderia chiaino." 
Psalms115:15 Mosesenigwe n’Omonene, oria otongete igoro na ense." 
Psalms115:16 Igoro chionsi nechi’Omonene, korende ense ero oyeire mwanyabanto." 
Psalms115:17 Abakure tibari gotogia Omonene, na ase abwo bagendire aase aakiriru onde tari okomotogia." 
Psalms115:18 Korende intwe ntogenderere gotogia Omonene, korwa bono goika kare na kare. Motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms116:1 Nigo inyanchete Omonene, ekiagera oigure eriogi riane na ogosaba kwane." 
Psalms116:2 Ere ontegereire onyigure, ase ayio, ekero inde moyo nimbe nkona‐komorangeria ng’a ankonye." 
Psalms116:3 Ebisibo bi’amakweri nigo biang’etananete; ogoichanigwa gw’aase abakure gokambwata; nigo nabete nemechando na omoichano. 
Psalms116:4 Erio nkarangeria erieta ri’Omonene, ngasaba, “Aye Omonene, tooria omoyo one.”" 
Psalms116:5 Omonene nigo are nobuya na oboronge; Nyasae oito nigo are omonyene amabera. 
Psalms116:6 Ere nigo akorenda abanto abakanyeku; ekero nabete nemechando, nigo antooretie." 
Psalms116:7 Aye omoyo one, irana obe nobotoereru, ekiagera Omonene ogokoreire amaya amange." 
Psalms116:8 Aye Omonene kwarusirie omoyo one ase amakweri, gwatinyirie amariga korwa ase amaiso aane, kwarendire amagoro aane tingochiri ingwe." 
Psalms116:9 Nimbe ngotaara ase obosio bw’Omonene, inde ase ense y’abanto bare moyo." 
Psalms116:10 Nigo negenete, na ase engencho eyio ngakwana, “Inche nigo nchandegete mono”" 
Psalms116:11 na ase ogochandeka kwane ngateba, “Mwanyabanto bonsi nabanyaborimo.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ngento ki ndarue ing’iranerie Omonene ase engencho y’amaya aya ankoreire? 
Psalms116:13 Ninyimokie egekombe ki’ogotooreka, ndangerie erieta ri’Omonene." 
Psalms116:14 Ning’ikeranie chiira chiane ase Omonene agwo ase amasio ’abanto baye bonsi. 
Psalms116:15 Ekero abanto abachenu b’Omonene bagokwa, amakweri ayio nigo are ay’engencho enene asare." 
Psalms116:16 Omonene, inche nigo inde omosomba oo; nigo inde omosomba oo, omwana bw’omokungu ore omosomba oo. Aye gwasiboire chingataare chiansibete." 
Psalms116:17 Ase ayio nindue asore ekeng’wanso ki’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, naende ndangerie erieta ri’Omonene nkonywe." 
Psalms116:18 Ning’ikeranie chiira chiane ase Omonene agwo ase amasio ’abanto baye bonsi. 
Psalms116:19 Ninchiikeranie ase chigoora chi’enyomba y’Omonene gati‐gati yao aye Yerusalemu. Omonene atogigwe! 
Psalms117:1 Inwe abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, motogie Omonene! Inwe abanto bonsi, mobake!" 
Psalms117:2 Obwanchani bwaye bwa botambe nigo bore obonene asetore, na obwegenwa bwaye nigo bogenderete goika kare na kare. Motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms118:1 Moakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera ere nomuya; obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms118:2 Tiga Abaisraeli batebe, “Obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare.”" 
Psalms118:3 Tiga abanto b’enyomba ya Haroni batebe, “Obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare.”" 
Psalms118:4 Tiga abanto abwo bairogete Omonene batebe, “Obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ekero narenge nemechando nkamorangeria Omonene; nere akang’iraneria, akambeka aase aagare." 
Psalms118:6 Omonene kare ase ensemo yane, tinkonyara kwoboa. Mwanyabanto ninki baranyare gonkorera?" 
Psalms118:7 Omonene nigo are ase ensemo yane; ningoke ase engencho y’okobugwa kw’abwo bangechete. 
Psalms118:8 Nigo ere buya komotamera Omonene, kobua gosemeria mwanyabanto." 
Psalms118:9 Nigo ere buya komotamera Omonene kobua gosemeria abagambi. 
Psalms118:10 Abanto b’ebisaku bionsi nigo bang’etananete kondwania, korende ase erieta ri’Omonene nkabasiria." 
Psalms118:11 Nigo bang’etananete ase chinsemo chionsi, korende ase erieta ri’Omonene nkabasiria." 
Psalms118:12 Nigo bang’umokerete buna chinchoke, korende bakarima buna omorero bw’amagwa; ase erieta ri’Omonene nkabasiria." 
Psalms118:13 Nigo natwometwe bokong’u ng’a ingwe, korende Omonene agankonya." 
Psalms118:14 Omonene nere chinguru chiane na ogotera kwane, obeire ogotooreka kwane." 
Psalms118:15 Tegerera moigwe amatera ’omogoko igoro y’obobui, ayio akorwa ase obomenyo bw’abanyene oboronge, agoteba, “Okoboko gw’okorio kw’Omonene nigo kogokora amang’ana ’ogokumia." 
Psalms118:16 Okoboko gw’okorio kw’Omonene nigo koimokererete igoro, ee, okoboko gw’okorio kw’Omonene nigo kogokora amang’ana ’ogokumia.”" 
Psalms118:17 Inche tingokwa, korende nimbe moyo, erinde ndarie ogokora kw’Omonene." 
Psalms118:18 Omonene obeire okong’a egesusuro ekenene gi’okondongeyia, korende tantigeti inkwe." 
Psalms118:19 Inyigorere ebiita bi’oboronge, erio nsoere aroro imbe ngoaka ng’a mbuya mono ase Omonene." 
Psalms118:20 Eke nakio egeita ki’Omonene, abanyene oboronge nabwo barasoere aroro." 
Psalms118:21 Nagoakeire ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera kwanyigure, aye kwabeire ogotooreka kwane." 
Psalms118:22 Rigena riria abaagachi bangete riabeire rigena rinene ri’ekoona. 
Psalms118:23 Ring’ana eri nigo riarure ase Omonene, na rirorio nogokumia ase amaiso aito." 
Psalms118:24 Rituko eri nario Omonene akorire, tiga tobe nomogoko, tochenge ase rirorio." 
Psalms118:25 Aye Omonene, twagosabire ototoorie! Omonene, twagosoroire, tiga abe buya asetore!" 
Psalms118:26 Nasesenirie oyio ogocha ase erieta ri’Omonene! Intwe nigo tokobasesenia korwa ase enyomba ya Nyasae. 
Psalms118:27 Omonene nere Nyasae, ere otoeire omobaso. Bogoria chinsagia chi’emete, mochake rituko rinene, mogende gochia ase egesasimero kere nemegwekano ye chingunchara!" 
Psalms118:28 Aye naye Nyasae one, nimbe nkogoakera ng’a mbuya mono; Nyasae one, nimbe nkona‐gokobaka." 
Psalms118:29 Moakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera ere nomuya, na obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms119:1 Mbasesenirie abwo chinchera chiabo chire chindonge, abwo bagendererete kobwatia amachiko ’Omonene." 
Psalms119:2 Mbasesenire abwo barendete oborori bwaye, abwo bakorigia Omonene ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi," 
Psalms119:3 abwo batari gokora amabe, korende nigo bakobwatia chinchera chiaye." 
Psalms119:4 Aye gwatoeire amachiko ao, toyarende nomokia." 
Psalms119:5 Nigo nganetie ng’a chinchera chiane chibe chindonge, erinde ndende emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:6 Rirorio tingosookigwa ekero ndabe ndigereretie amachiko ao onsi. 
Psalms119:7 Ekero ndabe neorokereirie okogamba kwao kw’oboronge, rirorio nimbe nkona‐kogotogia nenkoro endonge." 
Psalms119:8 Ninyigwere amachiko ao; tobaisa gontiga. 
Psalms119:9 Naki omonto omosae arakore arende orogendo rwaye robe orochenu? Nase okoigwera ring’ana riao. 
Psalms119:10 Inche nigo ngokorigia nenkoro yane yonsi; ondende timbaisa gotiga amachiko ao. 
Psalms119:11 Nagachire ring’ana riao ase enkoro yane ime, ng’a tinkora ebibe asore." 
Psalms119:12 Aye Omonene otogigwe. Inyorokererie emeroberio yao echikire. 
Psalms119:13 Nimbe nkona‐koraria aya onsi gwanchikire nomonwa oo. 
Psalms119:14 Nigo inde nomogoko omonene ase okorenda oborori bwao; kobua koba nobotenenku obonene. 
Psalms119:15 Nimbe nkorengereria mono igoro y’amachiko ao, naende imbe nkorigereria chinchera chiao chionsi." 
Psalms119:16 Ningokere emeroberio yao echikire; tinkweba ring’ana riao. 
Psalms119:17 Inkorera amaya, inche omosomba oo, erio nario ndabe moyo, mbwate ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:18 Indamokie amaiso, inyare korora amang’ana ’ogokumia ay’amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:19 Inche nigo inde omoeti ase ense, tobaisa kombisa amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:20 Enkoro yane yasionoirwe namaiga, chingaki chionsi nigo eganetie komanya ebina biao." 
Psalms119:21 Aye nigo ogotogonyera abanto abaenenu, abwo baragereirie, abwo batigire kobwata amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:22 Onduserie ogochecherigwa na ogochaywa kwabo, ekiagera inche nigo ndendete oborori bwao." 
Psalms119:23 Abagambi nabaikaransa amo koroberia bankore bobe, korende inche, omosomba oo, nigo nkona‐koiranerera emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:24 Nigo ngokerete oborori bwao, ekiagera nabwo bogonsemia." 
Psalms119:25 Omoyo one otiringeirwe ase riroba, ing’a obogima oboyia koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:26 Ekero naorogetie onsi aya konya nakorire, nigo kwanyigwete; inyorokererie emeroberio yao echikire!" 
Psalms119:27 Inyorokererie, erinde imanye chinchera chi’amachiko ao, nimbe nkona koiranerera ogokora kwao kw’ogokumia." 
Psalms119:28 Omoyo one obuirwe nemechando, imbeke chinguru koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:29 Tiga chinchera chi’obong’ainereria chibe aare asende, ase obuya bwao inyorokererie amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:30 Inche nachorire enchera y’ekeene, nabekire ase obosio bwane aya gwanchikire." 
Psalms119:31 Aye Omonene, nabwatereire oborori bwao, tobaisa gontiga nsookigwe." 
Psalms119:32 Ekero oramanyie enkoro yane obuya bwao, niminyoke inyigwere amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:33 Aye Omonene, inyorokererie enchera y’emeroberio yao echikire; na inche ninyerende goika omoerio." 
Psalms119:34 Imanyie amachiko ao, erinde inyabwate na koyarenda nenkoro yane yonsi." 
Psalms119:35 Indaae imbwatie enchera y’amachiko ao, ekiagera inche nigo ingokirie naro." 
Psalms119:36 Oonchore enkoro yane yanche oborori bwao, na toyetiga ebe nokogania kwe ribero." 
Psalms119:37 Oonchore amaiso aane tarigereria amang’ana atagwenereti; ing’a obogima oboyia mbwatie chinchera chiao. 
Psalms119:38 Ikerania asende, inche omosomba oo, eira kwandierete, eira eyio okoa abakoirogete." 
Psalms119:39 Induserie amang’ana ’ogochaywa inyirogete, ekiagera aya gwachikire nigo are amaya." 
Psalms119:40 Rora, inche nigo nganetie koigwera amachiko ao; ing’a obogima oboyia goetera ase oboronge bwao." 
Psalms119:41 Aye Omonene, oorokia asende obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, naende ontoorie buna kwandierete eira." 
Psalms119:42 Erio inyore ring’ana ndairanerie abwo bagonchecheria, ekiagera nigo inyegenete ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:43 Tobaisa korusia nonya ng’ake ring’ana ri’ekeene korwa ase omonwa one, ekiagera nigo nsemeretie aya gwachikire." 
Psalms119:44 Nimbe nkoigwera amachiko ao botambe goika kare na kare. 
Psalms119:45 Nimbe ngotaara ase obosibore, ekiagera neorokereirie amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:46 Nindarie oborori bwao ase amasio ’abaruoti ntari nobosooku. 
Psalms119:47 Inche nigo inde nomogoko ase amachiko ao, ekiagera ayio ninyanchete." 
Psalms119:48 Nindambore amaboko aane mbwate amachiko ao nyanchete, na nimbe nkorengereria igoro y’emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:49 Inyora ring’ana riao gwakwanete asende inche omosomba oo, ekiagera ase rirorio kwang’eire ogosemeria." 
Psalms119:50 Egekondemia ase emechando yane neke: Ring’ana riao nigo rigonkora naba omoyia. 
Psalms119:51 Abanto abamwenu nigo bagonchecheria mono, nonya naboigo tindi gotiga amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:52 Aye Omonene, ekero nkoinyora okogamba kwao korwa kare, nigo nkoba nokoremigwa." 
Psalms119:53 Nigo inde nokogechigwa okonene ase engencho y’abakori amabe, ekiagera bagosaria amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:54 Ekero imenyete ase enyomba yane y’obogeni, nabeire nkona‐gotererera emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:55 Aye Omonene, nigo nkoinyora erieta riao botuko, nigo ndendete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:56 Oko nakwo ogosesenigwa kwane, ng’a nabeire indendete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:57 Omonene, aye negetare kiane; narire eira koigwera amang’ana ao." 
Psalms119:58 Nigo nkogosorora nenkoro yane yonsi: Ondorere amabera koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao. 
Psalms119:59 Nigo narengereretie igoro ye chinchera chiane, nkaonchora amagoro aane nkabwatia oborori bwao." 
Psalms119:60 Nigo nkoayerera, tingotebana koigwera amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:61 Chingori chi’abakori amabe chiang’etananire, korende tinkweba amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:62 Nigo nkoboka botuko gati kogoakera ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera okogamba kwao nokoronge." 
Psalms119:63 Inche nigo inde omogisangio bw’abwo bonsi bakoirogete, abwo barendete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:64 Aye Omonene, obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe nigo boichire ase ense, nyorokererie imanye emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:65 Aye Omonene, koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao gwankoreire inche omosomba oo obuya obonge." 
Psalms119:66 Inyorokererie imanye kogamba buya na imbe ne chisemi, ekiagera nigo inyegenete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:67 Ekero konya ntaraegwa egesusuro, nigo narenge omosiru, korende bono nigo indendete ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:68 Aye nigo ore omuya, naende nigo ogokora amaya, ase ayio inyorokererie emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:69 Abanto abamwenu nigo bakongamba na gokwana oborimo igoro yane, korende inche nigo ndendete amachiko ao nenkoro yane yonsi." 
Psalms119:70 Chinkoro chiabo nigo chinorete buna ebitinya, korende inche nigo inde nomogoko ase amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:71 Nigo yabete buya mono asende konyora egesusuro keria, ekiagera ayio naro agerete neorokereirie emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:72 Amachiko ao gwakwanete nigo are amaya asende, kobua chitahabu ne chifeta chilifu chinyinge." 
Psalms119:73 Amaboko ao naro ambombete akandoisia, ing’a obong’aini, erinde inyare kweorokereria amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:74 Abanto abwo bakoirogete mbandore bagoke, ekiagera nsemeretie ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:75 Aye Omonene, nimanyete ng’a ebina biao nebia boronge, naende ng’a nigo kwang’a egesusuro gi’okondongeyia kore nobwegenwa." 
Psalms119:76 Tiga obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe bondemie, koreng’ana buna kwarire eira asende, inche omosomba oo." 
Psalms119:77 Ondorere amabera, erinde imbe moyo; inche nigo ngokerete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:78 Tiga abanto abamwenu barore obosooku, ekiagera bankoreire bobe engencho ende etaiyo, korende inche nigo nkona koiranerera amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:79 Tiga abanto abwo bakoirogete bache asende. Abwo bamanyete oborori bwao. 
Psalms119:80 Tiga enkoro yane ebe etari na komocha ase emeroberio yao echikire, erinde timbaisa konyora obosooku." 
Psalms119:81 Omoyo one ogoyire ase okogania ogotooreka kwao, nigo nsemeretie ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:82 Amaiso aane arosire ase okoganya ring’ana riao, nigo nkoboria, “Indi aye orache kondemia?”" 
Psalms119:83 Inche nabeire buna ekerandi ki’edivai gekorire korwa ase risankwa kere ase erioki, nonya naboigo, tindeba emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:84 Ngoika ririri inche omosomba oo ndagenderere koremereria? Ndiriri oranache ekina ase abanto abwo bagonchanda? 
Psalms119:85 Abanto abamwenu batabwateti amachiko ao nigo bankunyeire chiirima. 
Psalms119:86 Amachiko ao onsi nigo are ay’ekeene, korende abanto nigo bagonchanda engencho ende etaiyo. Koranche onkonye!" 
Psalms119:87 Barabwo babeire ang’e gonsiria aiga ase ense, nonya naboigo, tintigeti amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:88 Ing’a obogima oboyia ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao bwa botambe, erinde imbwatie oborori bwao gwakwanete." 
Psalms119:89 Aye Omonene, ring’ana riao nigo riteneine bokong’u aaria igoro goika kare na kare." 
Psalms119:90 Obwegenwa bwao nigo bogendererete ase ebiaare bionsi; aye gwakoreire ense aase aye, ero nigo eteneine bokong’u." 
Psalms119:91 Ebinto bionsi nigo bigendererete kobao goika rero buna aye kwabichigete, ekiagera bionsi nigo bikogokorera." 
Psalms119:92 Onye ogochika kwao gotarenge omogoko one nanga nigo nasirete ase emechando yane. 
Psalms119:93 Inche tinkonyara kweba amachiko ao, ekiagera aye kwang’eire obogima oboyia goetera ase aro." 
Psalms119:94 Inche noyoo, ntoorie! Nigo nabeire nkona‐koinyora amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:95 Abakori amabe nigo bakomboera ng’a bansirie, korende nigo inyigwerete oborori bwao." 
Psalms119:96 Narorire ng’a gento kende tikeri kere noboikeranu, korende amachiko ao namaikeranu." 
Psalms119:97 Aa! Naki inyanchete amachiko ao! Naro nkona‐koiranerera omobaso boira. 
Psalms119:98 Amachiko ao nigo agonkora naba omong’aini kobua ababisa baane, ekiagera ayio nigo are asende chingaki chionsi." 
Psalms119:99 Inche nigo inde nokomanya okonge kobua aborokia baane, ekiagera nigo nkona‐korengereria mono igoro y’oborori bwao." 
Psalms119:100 Nigo imanyete amange kobua abanto abagotu, ekiagera mbwatete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:101 Nigo ntangete amagoro aane tabaisa kobwatia enchera ende yonsi y’obobe, erinde inyare korenda ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:102 Tindi gotiga aya gwachikire, ekiagera naye kwanyorokereirie." 
Psalms119:103 Amang’ana ao naki are amansu asende! Ee, nigo are amansu ase omonwa one kobua obooke." 
Psalms119:104 Amachiko ao ang’eire obong’aini, ase ayio nigo ngechete kera enchera y’obong’ainereria."
