Psalms119:105 Ring’ana riao netaya ase amagoro aane na omobaso ase enchera ngoeta. 
Psalms119:106 Natianire ng’a ning’ikeranie eira eyio yane; nimbwatie aya onsi gwachikire ase oboronge. 
Psalms119:107 Aye Omonene, nigo nchandegete mono, ing’a obogima oboyia koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:108 Omonene, anchera ogosaba kwane kw’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, na inyorokererie aya gwachikire." 
Psalms119:109 Ase chingaki chionsi tinaborarete obogima bwane, na tinyebeti amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:110 Abakori amabe babekire omoeto ase ngoeta, korende tintantaniri korwa ase amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:111 Oborori bwao nabwo omwando one goika kare na kare, ee, nabwo enkoro yane egokerete mono." 
Psalms119:112 Narure enkoro yane korenda amachiko ao, botambe goika omoerio." 
Psalms119:113 Nigo ngechete abanyamenwa ebere, korende nigo inyanchete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:114 Aye naye ore egekengero kiane, na enguba yane, nigo nsemeretie ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:115 Inwe abakori amabe, karue asende, erinde inyare korenda amachiko a Nyasae one." 
Psalms119:116 Ing’a chinguru buna kwarire eira, erinde imbe moyo, tobaisa gontiga indore obosooku ase ogosemeria kwane." 
Psalms119:117 Nsiire bokong’u, indende buya, inyare gosika botambe emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:118 Aye nigo okwanga abwo bagotantana korwa ase emeroberio yao echikire; ee, obong’ainereria bwabo nigo bore bosa." 
Psalms119:119 Aye nigo obarete abakori amabe bonsi b’ense koba bosa buna amabiria; ase ayio inche nigo inyanchete oborori bwao. 
Psalms119:120 Omobere one nigo okoiguswa ore nobwoba asore, naende nairokire ebina biao." 
Psalms119:121 Inche nakorire amang’ana are ay’ekeene na ay’oboronge; tontiga ase abachandi baane. 
Psalms119:122 Ontenenere inche omosomba oo inyore amaya; totiga abanto abamwenu bankore bobe. 
Psalms119:123 Amaiso aane arosire ase okoganya ogotooreka gokorwa asore, amo nogoikeranigwa kw’eira yao y’oboronge." 
Psalms119:124 Nkorere amaya inche omosomba oo koreng’ana nobwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, naende onyorokererie imanye emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:125 Inche nigo inde omosomba oo, ing’a okomanya, erinde imanye oborori bwao." 
Psalms119:126 Engaki yaikire aye Omonene ogwenerete gokora ogokora kwao, ekiagera basaririe amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:127 Ase ayio inche nigo nyanchete amachiko ao kobua etahabu, ee, kobua etahabu echenire." 
Psalms119:128 Na ase ayio nigo ndoche ng’a amachiko ao onsi namaronge. Nigo ngechete kera enchera y’obong’ainereria. 
Psalms119:129 Oborori bwao nigo bore obw’ogokumia, ase ayio nigo mbobwatete nomoyo one bwonsi." 
Psalms119:130 Ekero amang’ana ao amaanoirwe nigo akorua omobaso na koa oyotamanyeti amange obong’aini. 
Psalms119:131 Nigo ngwasamia omonwa one na gwesesa, ekiagera nigo inde namaiga imanye amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:132 Ndigererie, ondorere amabera buna egwenerete abwo banchete erieta riao." 
Psalms119:133 Kong’ia orogendo rwane koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao, totiga obobe bongambere." 
Psalms119:134 Mboorie korwa ase ogokorerwa bobe nabanto, erio nario ndanyare korenda amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:135 Mbarerie inche omosomba oo obosio bwao, na onyorokererie emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:136 Nigo nkorera, naitekia amariga amange mono, ekiagera abanto tibarendeti amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:137 Aye Omonene nigo ore omonyene oboronge, na ebina biao nigo bire ebia boronge." 
Psalms119:138 Gwachikire oborori bwao ase oboronge, na ase obwegenwa bwonsi." 
Psalms119:139 Risemi riane riandire, ekiagera ababisa baane bebire ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:140 Ring’ana riao riateemirwe, nigo riteneine bokong’u, na inche omosomba oo nigo ndianchete." 
Psalms119:141 Nigo inde oyo otasikiri, naende inchayire, korende nonya naboigo tinkweba amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:142 Oboronge bwao nigo bore obwa kare na kare, na amachiko ao nigo are ay’ekeene." 
Psalms119:143 Emechando na omoichano bianyorire, korende nigo ngokerete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:144 Oborori bwao nigo bore oboronge goika kare na kare; on g’e okomanya, erinde imbe moyo." 
Psalms119:145 Aye Omonene, nigo ngokorangeria nenkoro yane yonsi, inyigwe, na inche nimbwate emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:146 Nigo nkorera asore, ontoorie, erinde mbwate oborori bwao." 
Psalms119:147 Nigo nkoboka mambia chuni gokorangeria ng’a onkonye, ninsemeretie amang’ana ao." 
Psalms119:148 Nigo nkogeesa botuko bokia, mbe nkona‐koiranerera ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:149 Omonene, igwa eriogi riane ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao botari koera; ong’e obogima oboyia koreng’ana nokogamba kwao." 
Psalms119:150 Abwo bakominyokera amabe bambereire ang’e; abwo nigo bare aare korwa ase amachiko ao. 
Psalms119:151 Korende aye Omonene nigo ore ang’e, na amachiko ao onsi nigo are ay’ekeene." 
Psalms119:152 Korwa kare nimanyete korwa ase oborori bwao ng’a naye kwabobegete bobeo goika kare na kare. 
Psalms119:153 Rigereria emechando yane, ontoorie, ekiagera tinyebeti amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:154 Indwanerere, omboorie, ong’e obogima oboyia koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:155 Ogotooreka nigo kore aare korwa ase abakori amabe, ekiagera barabwo tibari korigia emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:156 Aye Omonene, amabera ao nigo are amanene; ong’e obogima oboyia koreng’ana nokogamba kwao." 
Psalms119:157 Abagonchanda na abare ababisa baane nigo bare abange, korende tinkogobera korwa ase oborori bwao." 
Psalms119:158 Ekero nkorigereria abatari abegenwa nigo nkogechigwa nabarabwo, ekiagera tibabwateti ring’ana riao." 
Psalms119:159 Aye Omonene, rora buna nyanchete amachiko ao! Ong’e obogima oboyia koreng’ana nobwanchani bwao botari koera." 
Psalms119:160 Amang’ana ao onsi nay’ekeene, na okogamba kwao gwonsi kw’oboronge nogwa kare na kare." 
Psalms119:161 Abagambi nigo bagonchanda engencho ende etaiyo, korende enkoro yane nigo eirogete amang’ana ao." 
Psalms119:162 Nigo nkogokera ring’ana riao, naba buna oyo onyorire ebisakorwa ebinge." 
Psalms119:163 Nigo ngechete kegima oborimo bonde bwonsi, korende nigo nyanchete amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:164 Ara gatano na kabere ase rituko nigo nkogotogia, ase engencho y’emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:165 Abwo banchete amachiko ao nigo bare nomorembe omonene mono, kende tikeri gekobagocha." 
Psalms119:166 Aye Omonene, nigo nganyete ng’a ontoorie, naende nigo ngokora buna amachiko ao agoteba." 
Psalms119:167 Omoyo one nigo obwatete oborori bwao, nigo mbwanchete mono mono." 
Psalms119:168 Nigo imbwatete amachiko ao, na oborori bwao, ekiagera nigo omanyete chinchera chiane chionsi." 
Psalms119:169 Aye Omonene, tiga okorera kwane goike ase obosio bwao; ing’a obong’aini koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao!" 
Psalms119:170 Tiga ogosaba kwane goike asore; ontoorie koreng’ana ne ring’ana riao! 
Psalms119:171 Nimbe nkona‐kogotogia nebikoba biane, ekiagera aye kwanyorokereirie imanye emeroberio yao echikire." 
Psalms119:172 Oromeme rwane ndotere ring’ana riao, ekiagera amachiko ao onsi nigo are amaronge." 
Psalms119:173 Okoboko kwao, tiga kobe ang’e gonkonya, ekiagera nachorire kobwatia amachiko ao." 
Psalms119:174 Aye Omonene, nigo inde namaiga ng’a ontoorie, na amachiko ao nigo angogetie mono." 
Psalms119:175 Tiga omoyo one obe moyo, erinde ngotogie, na aya gwachikire, tiga ankonye." 
Psalms119:176 Inche nasirire buna eng’ondi ensiru ndigie inche omosomba oo, ekiagera tinyebeti amachiko ao." 
Psalms120:1 Ekero inde nemechando nigo nkorera ase Omonene, ere nigo akonyigwa." 
Psalms120:2 Aye Omonene, ntoorie korwa ase abanto bagokwana oborimo, bare ne chimeme chi’obong’ainereria." 
Psalms120:3 Inwe abamore ne chimeme chi’obong’ainereria, ngento ki moraegwe, na mang’ana ki naende morakorerwe?" 
Psalms120:4 Mobetwe chinsara chinyoge chi’omorwani etuoni, na mosambwe nomorero bw’amakara ’omote okorokwa omoretemu." 
Psalms120:5 Obobe nobwane, ekiagera inde omomenyi agwo Meseki, nigo imenyete ase egati y’Abakedari." 
Psalms120:6 Nabeire imenyete ase engaki entambe ase egati y’abanto bagechete omorembe. 
Psalms120:7 Inche nigo ngokora omorembe, korende ekero ngokwana, barabwo nigo baganetie esegi." 
Psalms121:1 Ninyimokererie amaiso aane gochia ase ebitunwa. Ogokonywa kwane, ng’ai korarwe?" 
Psalms121:2 Ogokonywa kwane nigo korarwe ase Omonene, oyotongete igoro na ense." 
Psalms121:3 Ere tagotiga okogoro kwao gotererigwe; oyokorendete tagosundoka. 
Psalms121:4 Ee, ere omorendi bw’Abaisraeli tagosundoka, gose takorara." 
Psalms121:5 Omonene nere omorendi oo, nere ekiriri kiao ase ensemo y’okoboko kwao kwa borio." 
Psalms121:6 Erioba tirikogoaka omobaso, gose omotienyi obotuko." 
Psalms121:7 Omonene nakorende korwa ase amabe onsi, narende omoyo oo." 
Psalms121:8 Omonene nakorende kogosoka na kogosoa, korwa bono na goika kare na kare." 
Psalms122:1 Nigo nabete nomogoko ekero abanto bantebetie, “Inchuo, togende ase enyomba y’Omonene!”" 
Psalms122:2 Aye Yerusalemu, bono amagoro aito nigo ateneine aa ase ebiita biao." 
Psalms122:3 Aye Yerusalemu kwaagachirwe naende, aye nomochie obwateranirie amo." 
Psalms122:4 Agwo nao ebisaku bigotiira gochia, ebio bire ebisaku bi’Omonene. Abaisraeli abwo nigo bachigetwe ng’a babe bakoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase erieta ri’Omonene." 
Psalms122:5 Agwo nao ebirogo bi’okonacherwa ekina bire, ebirogo bi’obonene bi’enyomba ya Daudi." 
Psalms122:6 Sabera Yerusalemu, erinde obe nomorembe! Abanto abwo bagwanchete basesenigwe." 
Psalms122:7 Omorembe obe ase chindwaki chiao ime, na ogosesenigwa kobe ase chinyomba chiao chi’oboruoti." 
Psalms122:8 Ase engencho y’abaminto na abagisangio baane, nigo ngokoganeria omorembe." 
Psalms122:9 Ase engencho y’enyomba y’Omonene Nyasae oito ninkorigerie amaya. 
Psalms123:1 Ninyimokererie amaiso aane gocha asore, agwo igoro ase omenyete." 
Psalms123:2 Rora buna abasomba basemeretie omonene obo, na abasomba abaiseke basemeretie omokungu ore omonene obo; naboigo naintwe tosemeretie Omonene, Nyasae oito, goika abe otororeire amabera." 
Psalms123:3 Aye Omonene, otororere amabera, koranche otororere amabera, ekiagera twabeire togochecherigwa mono goetania." 
Psalms123:4 Twaichoirwe necheche y’abwo beisanekerete, na ogochaywa kw’abamwenu." 
Psalms124:1 Inee! Naki yare gocha koba onye Omonene atabete ase ensemo yaito? Tiga Abaisraeli bairanerie. 
Psalms124:2 Onye Omonene atabete ase ensemo yaito, ekero abanto batoumokerete gotorwania," 
Psalms124:3 nanga nigo batomerete gatore moyo, ekiagera babete nendamwamu enene asetore;" 
Psalms124:4 naende eooro nigo yarenge gocha gotokorobanania, amache nigo arenge gocha goeta igoro yaito;" 
Psalms124:5 ee, amache aichoreranete nigo arenge gocha gotomera kegima." 
Psalms124:6 Omonene atogigwe, ekiagera tatoruete totaboranwe namaino ’abanto abwo." 
Psalms124:7 Emioyo yaito yatoorekire buna enyoni egotooreka korwa ase egesugunia ki’omotegi. Egesugunia kiabutokire, naintwe twaminchoirie na gotama." 
Psalms124:8 Ogokonywa gwaito nigo gokorwa ase erieta ri’Omonene, oyio otongete igoro na ense." 
Psalms125:1 Abwo bamosemeretie Omonene nigo banga buna egetunwa gia Sayoni getari konyegerigwa, korende nigo kegendererete kobao botambe." 
Psalms125:2 Buna ebitunwa bietanaine Yerusalemu, naboigo n’Omonene aetanaine abanto baye korwa bono na goika kare na kare." 
Psalms125:3 Enyimbo y’obogambi bw’abakori amabe tekogenderera kogambera omwando bw’abanto abaronge; abwo babaise korambora amaboko abo ase ogokora amabe. 
Psalms125:4 Omonene, bakorere amaya abanto abwo bare abaya, abwo bare ne chinkoro chindonge!" 
Psalms125:5 Korende abwo bakogobera gochia ase chinchera chiabo chi’obosiru, Omonene nabarusieo amo nabagokora amabe. Omorembe obe ase Abaisraeli!" 
Psalms126:1 Ekero Omonene atoiraneretie intwe aba Sayoni amaya aito, nigo twabete buna nkorota tore." 
Psalms126:2 Erio emenwa yaito egaichorwa namaseko, ne chimeme chiaito chigatera nomogoko. Erio abanto b’ebisaku bagatebania, “Omonene okoreire abanto abwo amang’ana amanene.”" 
Psalms126:3 Ee, Omonene otokoreire amang’ana amanene; ase ayio ntore nomogoko." 
Psalms126:4 Aye Omonene, toiranerie amaya aito, buna okoirania chindooche ase Ense ya Irianyi." 
Psalms126:5 Abwo bakobusura bare namariga mbagese bare nomochengo. 
Psalms126:6 Nigo bagosoka bakoiyeria amariga, babogoretie chimbusuro gochia kobusura mbairane bare nomochengo, babogoretie emesaima yabo bagesire." 
Psalms127:1 Onye Omonene takoagacha enyomba, abwo bakoyeagacha nigo bagokora emeremo ya bosa. Onye Omonene takorenda omochie omonto oyio okoyorenda nigo akorenda bosa." 
Psalms127:2 Nigo ere bosa asemore koboka mambia chuni na gokora emeremo emekong’u ase okonyora endagera, naende mwanyorwa gochia korara. Korende Omonene nigo agwechandera abanto baye anchete, nonya nekero baraire chitoro." 
Psalms127:3 Rora, abana nigo bare omwando okorwa ase Omonene, ekiagera oroiboro rokorwa ase enda nigo rore ekeegwa." 
Psalms127:4 Abana omonto akonyora kare ne chinguru chi’oboke bwaye, nigo banga buna chinsara chire koboko kw’omorwani etuoni." 
Psalms127:5 Nasesenirie omonto oyo oichoretie esaro yaye ne chinsara echio. Oyio takobugwa ekero arabe okogamberana nababisa baye agwo ase egeita. 
Psalms128:1 Nasesenirie kera omonto omoirogete Omonene, naende obwatete chinchera chiaye." 
Psalms128:2 Aye nobe gokonyora okwama kw’emeremo y’amaboko ao; nosesenigwe, na amang’ana onsi nigo arabe buya asore." 
Psalms128:3 Mokao nabe ase enyomba yao buna omosabibu okwama amasabibu; abana bao nigo barabe buna ebisebo bi’omozeituni, baikaranse baetanane emesa yao." 
Psalms128:4 Rora, naboigo omonto oria omoirogete Omonene arasesenigwe." 
Psalms128:5 Omonene agosesenie korwa Sayoni! Erio orore obuya bwa Yerusalemu ase amatuko onsi ore moyo," 
Psalms128:6 naende orore abachokoro bao. Omorembe obe ase Abaisraeli! 
Psalms129:1 “Ababisa nigo batochandete korwa oboke bwaito.” Nabo Abaisraeli bagoteba. 
Psalms129:2 “Ee, barabwo nigo batochandete korwa oboke bwaito, korende tibana‐gotobua." 
Psalms129:3 Abaremi bakang’ororia emegongo yaito, bagakora emeng’ororia yabo emetambe.”" 
Psalms129:4 Omonene nigo are omonyene oboronge, ere obutoire chingori chi’abakori amabe." 
Psalms129:5 Abwo bonsi bagechete Sayoni, tiga basookigwe na koonchorwa gochia nyuma." 
Psalms129:6 Barabwo tiga babe buna obonyansi bore kerama igoro, bogosusana botarakina;" 
Psalms129:7 tibori goichora okoboko kw’omosangereria, gose kobogwa omosaima okoboko." 
Psalms129:8 Abanto bagoeta inchera tibakonyara goteba, “Omonene abasesenie!” Gose goteba, “Nkobasesenia tore inwe ase erieta ri’Omonene!”" 
Psalms130:1 Aye Omonene, nigo nkorera asore, korwa ase chindiba ime." 
Psalms130:2 Omonene, igwa eriogi riane; tegerera oigwe eriogi ri’ogosaba kwane." 
Psalms130:3 Aye Omonene, onye kware gokora omobaro bw’ebibe, ning’o ore konyara gotenena ase obosio bwao?" 
Psalms130:4 Korende aye nigo ore omwaberi, erinde onyare koirokwa." 
Psalms130:5 Inche nigo nganyete Omonene, ee, omoyo one nigo omoganyete; nigo nsemeretie ring’ana riaye." 
Psalms130:6 Omoyo one nigo oganyete Omonene, kobua abarendi baganyete ng’a bokie, ee, kobua abarendi baganyete ng’a bokie." 
Psalms130:7 Inwe Abaisraeli, mosemerie Omonene, ekiagera Omonene nigo are nobwanchani bogendererete botambe, na ogotooreka okonge nigo gokorwa asare." 
Psalms130:8 Ere naboorie Abaisraeli korwa ase ebibe biabo bionsi. 
Psalms131:1 Omonene, ase enkoro yane tindi kweimokereria igoro, gose tindi omwerori. Inche tinyechandeti kwerigeria amang’ana amanene, gose ayare amakong’u mono asende." 
Psalms131:2 Korende inche nigo intoereretie omoyo one; buna omwana otigire okogonka oagatire koboko kwa ng’ina, ee, naboigo omoyo one ore ime yane." 
Psalms131:3 Inwe Abaisraeli, mosemerie Omonene korwa bono na goika kare na kare." 
Psalms132:1 Aye Omonene, oinyore Daudi, ase engencho y’obokong’u bwonsi bwamonyorete." 
Psalms132:2 Oinyore buna ariete eira na gotiana asore aye Omonene ore Chinguru chia Yakobo, agateba," 
Psalms132:3 “Tingosoa nyomba mwane, gose tinkoriina borere korara;" 
Psalms132:4 tingwancha korara chitoro, gose gosundoka," 
Psalms132:5 goika inyore aase, agwo arabe obomenyo bw’Oyore Chinguru chia Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Naama! Agwo Efarata tokaigwa amang’ana igoro y’Esanduku y’Okobwatana, tokayenyora aaria ase orosana rwa Yearimu." 
Psalms132:7 “Inchuo togende ase obomenyo bw’Omonene, tosasime agwo ase egeteni kiaye ki’amagoro!”" 
Psalms132:8 Aye Omonene, imoka ochiche aase ao ogotimokera, aye amo n’Esanduku eria ekworokia okobua kwao." 
Psalms132:9 Tiga abakuani bao beboyie oboronge, na abanto bao abachenu babe bagoaka amariogi ’omogoko." 
Psalms132:10 Ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba oo, tobaisa kwanga korigereria omoakwa amaguta oo." 
Psalms132:11 Aye Omonene, tokonyara gotiga eira eyio kwarierete Daudi ase ogotiana, ogateba: “Oyomo bw’oroiboro rwao nimobeke aikaranse ase ekerogo kiao ki’obogambi." 
Psalms132:12 Abana bao kobarabwate okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, na oborori bwane ndaborokererie, rirorio abana babo boigo mbabe bagoikaransa ase ekerogo kiao ki’obogambi kogenderera botambe.”" 
Psalms132:13 Omonene ochorire Sayoni; nigo aganetie obe obomenyo bwaye, otebire," 
Psalms132:14 “Aase aa nao obotimokero bwane bwa botambe, aa nao ndabe nkomenya, ekiagera naanchire." 
Psalms132:15 Ninsesenie omochie oyo obe nebinto bionsi biganeirie, abaremeire endagera nimbaigotie." 
Psalms132:16 Nimboyie abakuani b’omochie oyo nogotooreka, na abachenu baye mbabe bagoaka amariogi ’omogoko." 
Psalms132:17 Aroro agwo nimererie Daudi orogunchara, ekiagera naroiseirie omoakwa amaguta one etaya ekomoreka." 
Psalms132:18 Ninsookie ababisa baye kegima, korende egutwa y’omotwe oye omonyene negenderere komekameka.”" 
Psalms133:1 Rora buna ere buya na okogokia okonene ekero abanto abamo bakomenya amo, baigwanaine." 
Psalms133:2 Amang’ana ayio nigo anga buna amaguta akweakwa are amaya mono, akonyororoka gochia ase chinderu chia Haroni, aitekera omokoba bwe rigoti ri’eganchwa yaye." 
Psalms133:3 Naende nigo anga buna riime ria Herimoni, rigotonya igoro y’ebitunwa bia Sayoni. Aroro agwo Omonene ochikire ogosesenigwa na obogima botari nomoerio." 
Psalms134:1 Inchuo motogie Omonene, inwe abasomba baye mwensi, inwe abamokomokorera ase enyomba yaye botuko." 
Psalms134:2 Rambora amaboko aino gochia Aase Aachenu, motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms134:3 Omonene, oria otongete igoro na ense, agosesenie korwa Sayoni!" 
Psalms135:1 Motogie Omonene! Togia erieta ri’Omonene! Inwe abasomba b’Omonene, motogie!" 
Psalms135:2 Inwe aba mogotenena ase enyomba y’Omonene, agwo ase chigoora chi’enyomba ya Nyasae oito, motogie!" 
Psalms135:3 Motogie Omonene, ekiagera ere nigo are omuya, terera erieta riaye, ekiagera nigo rire eriansu." 
Psalms135:4 Omonene bwechoreire Yakobo, bwechoreire Abaisraeli koba abaye bori." 
Psalms135:5 Inche nigo imanyete ng’a Omonene nigo are omonene; ee, Omonene oito nigo are igoro ye chinyasae chionsi." 
Psalms135:6 Kende gionsi Omonene agwancha gokora nigo akogekora; gokerabe ase ense, gose igoro, gose ase enyancha, gose ase chindiba." 
Psalms135:7 Nere okorenta amare korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense; nere okorenta chinkoba chire nembura, na omwaga okogusa korwa ase ebigancha biaye." 
Psalms135:8 Nere oitete abana abatangi ba Misiri, ne ching’iti chintangi boigo." 
Psalms135:9 Nere okorete ebikone na amakumia ase egati yao, aye Misiri, na ase Farao amo nabasomba baye." 
Psalms135:10 Omonene nigo asiretie ebisaku ebinge, na agaita abaruoti barenge ne chinguru;" 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamori, na Ogi, omoruoti o Basani; boigo agasiria amaruoti onsi a Kanani." 
Psalms135:12 Ense y’Ebisaku ebio akayea Abaisraeli, abanto baye, ekaba omwando obo." 
Psalms135:13 Aye Omonene, erieta riao nigo rigendererete kobao goika kare na kare. Nobe gokoinyorwa nebiaare bionsi." 
Psalms135:14 Omonene narwanerere abanto baye, narorere abasomba baye amabera." 
Psalms135:15 Emegwekano egosasimwa nabanto b’ebisaku nigo eroisirie korwa ase chifeta ne chitahabu; nigo ere emeremo y’amaboko a mwanyabanto. 
Psalms135:16 Nigo ebwate emenwa, korende teri gokwana, nebwate amaiso, korende teri korora," 
Psalms135:17 nebwate amato, korende teri koigwa, gose tebwati omoika bw’okoeyana." 
Psalms135:18 Abakoroisia emegwekano eyio nigo banga buna ero, ee, naboigo abwo bonsi bayiegenete." 
Psalms135:19 Inwe Abaisraeli, togia Omonene! Nainwe ab’ororeria rwa Haroni, togia Omonene!" 
Psalms135:20 Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Lawi, togia Omonene! Nainwe aba momoirogete Omonene, motogie!" 
Psalms135:21 Omonene tiga atogigwe korwa Sayoni, Omonene oria omenyete Yerusalemu. Motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms136:1 Moakere Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera ere nomuya; obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:2 Moakere Nyasae, oyobuete chinyasae, ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:3 Moakere Omonene bw’abanene ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:4 Nere bweka okorete amakumia amanene, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:5 Ere ase obong’aini bwaye nigo atongete igoro, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:6 Ere oramborete ense, akayiaara ase amache, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:7 Ere okorete emebaso eria emenene, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:8 Akabeka erioba rigambe mobaso, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:9 Akabeka omotienyi ne ching’enang’eni bigambe botuko, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:10 Ere nigo aitete abana abatangi ba Misiri, ne ching’iti chintangi boigo, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:11 Erio akang’anyia Abaisraeli korwa ase Abamisiri, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:12 Akabarusia aroro nokoboko kwaye gwe chinguru koramboire, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:13 Ere nigo aatananete Enyancha Embariri, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:14 Erio akaambokeria Abaisraeli aroro, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:15 Ere akarimeria Farao amo nemeganda yaye ase Enyancha Embariri, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:16 Ere nigo araaete abanto baye goetera ase erooro, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:17 Ere nigo aitete abaruoti barenge ne chinguru, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:18 Ere nigo aitete abaruoti abakumete, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:19 Agaita Sihoni, omoruoti bw’Abaamoni, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:20 Agaita na Ogi, omoruoti o Basani, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:21 Akabaura chinse chiabo chikaba omwando bw’abanto baye, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:22 Chinse echio chikaba omwando bw’Abaisraeli, abasomba baye, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:23 Ere nigo atoinyorete ekero twarenge aboro, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:24 Ere nigo atotooretie korwa ase ababisa baito, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:25 Ere nigo akorua endagera oa ebitongwa bionsi bire moyo, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms136:26 Moakere Nyasae o igoro ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare." 
Psalms137:1 Nigo twarenge goikaransa ase chingegu chie chindooche chia Babeli, twaba tokorera ekero twarenge koinyora Sayoni." 
Psalms137:2 Aroro agwo nigo twasungete amakano aito ase emete enga buna emesobeti. 
Psalms137:3 Abanto baria batwosete bakagania tobaterere, abachandi abwo baito bakagania tobagokie, bagateba, “Toterere ogotera gwa Sayoni.”" 
Psalms137:4 Naki torakore totere ogotera kw’Omonene ase ense engeni? 
Psalms137:5 Aye Yerusalemu, inse gokweba, rirorio okoboko kwane gw’okorio kogatae." 
Psalms137:6 Onye tingokoinyora aye Yerusalemu, erinde obe omogoko one omonene mono, rirorio tiga oromeme rwane robwatane namang’ang’ura." 
Psalms137:7 Aye Omonene, inyora amabe aya abanto b’Edomu bakorete ase rituko riria Yerusalemu obwatetwe; buna batebete, “Yotagore kegima! Yotagore amo noboroso bwaye!”" 
Psalms137:8 Inwe abanto ba Babeli nigo mogochia gosirigwa. Nabe negesio oyio ogochia kobaakana amabe aya mwabeire mogotokorera. 
Psalms137:9 Nabe negesio omonto oyio ogochia koira abana baino abake na kobaakera ase amagena ’Ebitare. 
Psalms138:1 Aye Omonene, nigo nkogoakera ng’a mbuya mono nenkoro yane yonsi, ningoterere na kogotogia ase obosio bwe chinyasae." 
Psalms138:2 Nigo ngosasima ndigereretie gochia ase Hekalu yao Enchenu, naaka ng’a mbuya mono ase erieta riao, na ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao bogendererete botambe, na ase obwegenwa bwao. Aye gwakorire eira yao koba enene goetania onsi aya erieta riao riatotebetie." 
Psalms138:3 Ase rituko riria nakorangeretie, nigo kwanyigwete, okaremia omoyo one, okambeka chinguru." 
Psalms138:4 Aye Omonene, abaruoti bonsi b’ense mbagotogie, ekero baraigwe amang’ana akorwa ase omonwa oo;" 
Psalms138:5 mbabe bagotera igoro y’ogokora kwao, aye Omonene, ekiagera obonene bwao nigo bore obonene mono." 
Psalms138:6 Nonya Omonene ore igoro aare, nigo aroche abanto abaitongo, korende abare abaenenu nigo akobamanya kobare aare." 
Psalms138:7 Nimba ngoeta ase egati y’emechando, aye nigo ondendete ngenderere koba moyo; aye nigo okorambora okoboko kwao igoro y’ababisa baane bare nendamwamu, na okoboko kwao gw’okorio gwantooria." 
Psalms138:8 Aye Omonene nonyare goikerania aya kwandierete eira, ekiagera obwanchani bwao nigo bogendererete goika kare na kare. Tobaisa kweba emeremo y’amaboko ao." 
Psalms139:1 Aye Omonene kwariga‐rigirie ime yane, kwamanyire inche." 
Psalms139:2 Aye nigo omanyete ekero ing’ikaransete, na ekero inkoimoka. Nigo omanyete ebirengererio biane bionsi kore aare." 
Psalms139:3 Ekero ngotaara gose kondaire nigo omanyete; aye nigo omanyete chinchera chiane chionsi. 
Psalms139:4 Nonya nekero ntarakwana ring’ana rinde rionsi, Naama, aye Omonene nigo orimanyete kegima." 
Psalms139:5 Aye nigo ong’etanaine ase chinsemo chionsi, na nigo obegete okoboko kwao igoro yane ondendete." 
Psalms139:6 Okomanya okwo nigo kore okw’ogokumia asende; nigo kore okonene mono, tinkonyara gokomanya." 
Psalms139:7 Ng’ai ndagende, erinde ntigane n’Omoika oo? Gose ng’ai ndatame gochia, indue ase obosio bwao?" 
Psalms139:8 Ninsa koriina gochia igoro, aye nao ore; ninsa kwara ekerarero kiane agwo aase abakure, aye nao ore." 
Psalms139:9 Ninsa koirurukigwa namasase a mambia, ingende komenya ase chinsinyo chi’enyancha," 
Psalms139:10 nonya naroro okoboko kwao nkondaae, ee, okoboko kwao gw’okorio nkombwate." 
Psalms139:11 Ninsa goteba, “Tiga omosunte ontube kegima, na oborabu bong’etanaine boonchoke bobe omosunte”," 
Psalms139:12 nonya nomosunte tori omosunte asore, obotuko nigo bokoraba se, bwaba buna omobaso, asore omusunte na oborabu nigo bigwekaine." 
Psalms139:13 Naye gwatongete ebire ase enda yane ime, nigo kwambwatanetie amo ase enda ya baba." 
Psalms139:14 Nigo nkogotogia, ekiagera natongetwe ase enchera y’ogokumia, na ey’ogoichania. Ogokora kwao nigo kore okuya kw’ogokumia! Igo nimanyete amang’ana ayio buya ase omoyo one." 
Psalms139:15 Amauga ’omobere one tabisekanete asore, ekero natongetwe bobisi, ekero nabombetwe ase ense ime." 
Psalms139:16 Amaiso ao nigo andoche ekero narenge enche ase enda ya baba ime, amatuko aane onsi nigo arigetwe ase ebuku yao, na akaroberigwa ritang’ani rituko rinde ritaraika." 
Psalms139:17 Aye Nyasae, ebirengererio biao nigo bire ebikong’u asende kobimanya, naende nebinge mono bitanyare kobareka." 
Psalms139:18 Inse kobibara, nigo bire ebinge goetania omokenye. Ekero nkoboka, nigo ngendererete kobeera amo naye." 
Psalms139:19 Aye Nyasae, naki yare gocha koba buya onye ngwaita abakori amabe, onye abagoitera amanyinga mbarua asende." 
Psalms139:20 Abwo nigo bagokwana bobe igoro yao; nigo bare abaenenu bagokora ebibe asore. 
Psalms139:21 Omonene, Inee, tingecheti abwo bakogechete? Tinkonyinyeera abwo bagosaria asore?" 
Psalms139:22 Abwo nigo mbagechete mono mono, nigo mbabarete ng’a nababisa baane." 
Psalms139:23 Aye Nyasae, ndiga‐rigie omanye enkoro yane. Nteeme omanye ebirengererio biane." 
Psalms139:24 Origererie timbwatia enchera y’obosiru, na ondaae ase enchera ya kare na kare." 
Psalms140:1 Aye Omonene, ntoorie korwa ase abanto ababe; indende korwa ase abanto abatindi!" 
Psalms140:2 Abanto abwo nigo bakoroberia amabe ase chinkoro chiabo ime, baba bakona‐korwana esegi botambe." 
Psalms140:3 Chimeme chiabo nigo chire chinyoge buna echie ching’iti chingenda inse; obosongo bw’amarubi nigo bore ase ebikoba bi’emenwa yabo. 
Psalms140:4 Aye Omonene, indende korwa ase amaboko ’abakori amabe; intoorie korwa ase abanto abatindi, abwo barobeirie kobeka ebigocha ase ngoeta." 
Psalms140:5 Abanto abaenenu babekire oboreba bobisi ase ngoetera, bantegeire ebichanga bimbwate, babekire emeeto ase oboeto bwane bwonsi." 
Psalms140:6 Natebirie Omonene: Aye Nyasae one, aye Omonene, tegerera oigwe ogosaba kwane." 
Psalms140:7 Aye Nyasae, Omonene one, Omotooria one omokong’u, aye nigo ogotuba omotwe one ase engaki y’esegi." 
Psalms140:8 Omonene, tobaisa koa abakori amabe aya baganetie; tobaisa gosesenia emeroberio yabo emebe, babaise gwetogia." 
Psalms140:9 Totiga ababisa abwo bang’etananire babue, tiga obobe bw’amang’ana bagokwana bobairanere abanyene." 
Psalms140:10 Tiga omorero bw’amakara obagwere, barabwo batugutwe ase omorero, barutwe ase chingoro chintambe tibaruao." 
Psalms140:11 Totiga abagenki bagenderere koba ase ense. Obobe nigo bogotwara abanto abatindi ase omoayerero bwabasiria. 
Psalms140:12 Nimanyete ng’a Omonene narwanerere abagokorerwa bobe, nae abataka oboronge bwabo." 
Psalms140:13 Ekeene, abanyene oboronge mbaake ng’a mbuya mono ase erieta riao, abare ne chinkoro chindonge mbamenye ase obosio bwao." 
Psalms141:1 Omonene, nigo ngokorangeria, ayerera oche bwango! Tegerera oigwe eriogi riane ekero ngokorangeria." 
Psalms141:2 Bwanchere ogosaba kwane buna ubani, na amaboko aane aimokereirie igoro oyanchere buna ekeng’wanso kia mogoroba!" 
Psalms141:3 Aye Omonene, beka omorendi ase omonwa one, abe okorenda ebikoba biane." 
Psalms141:4 Totiga enkoro yane egobere yanche amang’ana amabe. Tontiga inare gokora ayare amabe amo nabwo bagokora ebibe; tingosanga amo nabarabwo ase emeyega. 
Psalms141:5 Tiga oyore omonyaboronge ang’ake na antogonyere ase obwanchani, okwo nigo konga buna amaguta akweakwa, na omotwe one toyaanga. Botambe nigo ogosaba kwane kore mamincha y’abakori amabe." 
Psalms141:6 Ekero abagambi babo baraturunkanigwe ase egetare, abanto mbanche amang’ana aane ng’a namaya." 
Psalms141:7 Amauga aito nigo asiareire ase omogo bw’embeera, buna ebisamunye bie chinko, gose ebi’amagena bigosiarerwa ase riroba igoro." 
Psalms141:8 Korende amaiso aane nigo arigereretie gocha asore, aye Omonene; naye ngotamera, tibwanga omoyo one." 
Psalms141:9 Indende korwa ase emeeto bantegeire; na korwa ase amareba ’abakori amabe. 
Psalms141:10 Tiga abakori amabe abwo bagwe ase ebichanga biabo abanyene, korende inche ntooreke." 
Psalms142:1 Nigo nkorera neriogi ase okorangeria Omonene, naaka eriogi ase okomosaba amabera." 
Psalms142:2 Nigo nkorenta obokong’u bwane ase obosio bwaye na komotebia emechando yane. 
Psalms142:3 Ekero nkoba buna oyo okogireka, aye nomanyete ase ngoetera. Agwo ase ngoeta ababisa bambekeire amareba." 
Psalms142:4 Ekero nkorigereria ase ensemo yane y’okorio, tindi korora monto aroro ogonkonya; gose tindi korora aase ndatamere, monto onde tari okonyechandera." 
Psalms142:5 Aye Omonene, nigo nkorera asore; nigo ngoteba: Naye ore obotamero bwane, na egetare kiane aiga ase ense y’abanto bare moyo." 
Psalms142:6 Tegerera oigwe ekerero kiane, ekiagera nachandekire mono! Ntoorie korwa ase abanto abwo bagonchanda, ekiagera nigo babwate chinguru kombua." 
Psalms142:7 Osibore omoyo one korwa ase obosibwa, erinde imbe ngotogia erieta riao. Abanyene oboronge mbang’etanane, ekiagera gwankoreire amaya." 
Psalms143:1 Aye Omonene, oigwe ogosaba kwane; ase engencho y’oboronge bwao otegerere ogosorora kwane, ong’iranerie ase engencho y’obwegenwa bwao." 
Psalms143:2 Tobaisa kong’ira inche omosomba oo ase ekegambero, ekiagera ase abwo bare moyo onde tari ore omoronge asore." 
Psalms143:3 Omobisa one obeire okorigia omoyo one; obeire ogontiringera inse ase amaroba, ong’ikaransirie ase omosunte, nabeire buna omonto okwete kare." 
Psalms143:4 Ase ayio omoika ore ime yane oborirwe chinguru, na enkoro yane yairianyekire." 
Psalms143:5 Nigo nkoinyora amatuko a kare, na korengereria igoro y’ogokora kwao gwonsi, naba nkona‐koiranerera emeremo y’amaboko ao." 
Psalms143:6 Nigo nkorambora amaboko aane gocha asore, omoyo one nigo ore nerang’o asore, buna riro ba rirang’ete embura." 
Psalms143:7 Aye Omonene, ing’iranerie bwango! Omoika nkong’erera ore! Tombisa obosio bwao mbaise koba buna abwo bakogenda ase chimbeera." 
Psalms143:8 Kera emambia omanyie obwanchani bwao bogenderere botambe, ekiagera naye nyegenete. Inyorokererie enchera ngwenerete kobwatia, ekiagera narure omoyo one asore." 
Psalms143:9 Aye Omonene, ntoorie korwa ase ababisa baane; nagotameire ombise." 
Psalms143:10 Inyorokererie imanye gokora ogwancha kwao, ekiagera naye ore Nyasae one! Tiga Omoika oo omuya ondaae ase enchera ere endonge." 
Psalms143:11 Aye Omonene, ing’a obogima oboyia ase engencho y’erieta riao; na ase engencho y’oboronge bwao rusia omoyo one korwa ase emechando." 
Psalms143:12 Ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao bwa botambe, siria ababisa baane; siria kegima abwo bonsi bagochanda omoyo one, ekiagera inche nigo inde omosomba oo." 
Psalms144:1 Atogigwe Omonene, oyore egetare kiane; bworokereirie amaboko aane amanye korwana esegi, ne ebiara bimanye korwana." 
Psalms144:2 Ere nigo are nobwanchani asende, naende orwaki rwane, obwebiso bwane obokong’u na Omobooria one. Ere nenguba yane, nere ngotamera, ekiagera nabeke abanto baane inse yane banyigwere." 
Psalms144:3 Aye Omonene, omonto ninki aisaine goika okomwechandera, gose mwanyabanto ninki are, aye okomorengereria?" 
Psalms144:4 Omonto nigo are buna omooki, amatuko aye nigo anga buna omorengari ogoeta." 
Psalms144:5 Omonene, kumba igoro chiao ochiche inse aa! Kuna ebitunwa, erinde bisokie erioki." 
Psalms144:6 Mesia chinkoba chiao oserebanie ababisa, ruta chinsara chiao obasirie kegima!" 
Psalms144:7 Rambora okoboko kwao korwa agwo igoro, ondusie na ontoorie korwa ase amache aya amange, na korwa ase amaboko ’abanto be chinse chingeni," 
Psalms144:8 abwo bagokwana oborimo nemenwa yabo, na amaboko abo a borio agokora ay’obong’ainereria." 
Psalms144:9 Aye Nyasae, ningoterere ogotera okoyia, ninkobugerie obokano bore ne chinga ikomi." 
Psalms144:10 Aye nigo okoa abaruoti obobui, naye gwatooretie Daudi, omosomba oo, korwa ase omoro bw’obobe." 
Psalms144:11 Ondusie na ontoorie korwa ase amaboko ’abanto be chinse chingeni, abwo bagokwana oborimo nemenwa yabo, na amaboko abo a borio agokora ay’obong’ainereria." 
Psalms144:12 Tiga abamura baito ase oboke bwabo babe buna ebimeri biakinire bire ne chinguru, na abaiseke baito babe buna ebisigisa bie chikoona bibaachire buya bikogwenera chinyomba chi’oboruoti." 
Psalms144:13 Tiga ebiage biaito biichore chindagera, bigaache chindagera ao ao, ne ching’ondi chiaito chire ase ebitii chibiare chilifu ne chilifu." 
Psalms144:14 Tiga chiombe chiaito chibe ne chinguru, ende tebaisa korekera, gose gochia bogima. Ekerero kende gionsi tikeba ase chinchera chiaito." 
Psalms144:15 Mbasesenirie abanto bakonyora ogosesenigwa okwo. Ee, mbasesenirie abanto abwo Nyasae are Omonene obo." 
Psalms145:1 Aye Nyasae one na omoruoti one, ninkobake, nimbe ngotogia erieta riao goika kare na kare." 
Psalms145:2 Kera rituko nimbe nkogotogia, nintogie erieta riao goika kare na kare." 
Psalms145:3 Omonene nigo are omonene, nagwenerete atogigwe mono; obonene bwaye tibokomanyekana buna bore." 
Psalms145:4 Emeremo yao netogigwe ebiaare ase ebiaare. Mbirarie ogokora kwao kore okonene. 
Psalms145:5 Nimbe nkorengereria mono igoro y’obonene bwao bw’ogosikwa okonene, na igoro y’emeremo yao y’ogokumia." 
Psalms145:6 Abanto mbabe bakoraria ogokora kwao okonene gw’okoirokia, nainche nimbe nkoraria obonene bwao." 
Psalms145:7 Mbararie chinkuma chi’obuya bwao obonge, babe bagotera namariogi amanene gotogia oboronge bwao." 
Psalms145:8 Omonene nigo are nobwanchani obonge, na amabera amange; tari omwango ase okoba nendamwamu, nigo aichire nobwanchani bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms145:9 Omonene nigo are omuya ase abanto bonsi, naende nigo are namabera ase ebitongwa biaye bionsi." 
Psalms145:10 Aye Omonene, ebitongwa biao bionsi nigo bikogoakere ng’a mbuya mono, na abachenu bao bonsi mbagotogie." 
Psalms145:11 Mbabe bakoraria obonene bw’oboruoti bwao, naende babe bagokwana igoro y’okobua kwao," 
Psalms145:12 bamanyie mwanyabanto ogokora kwao okonene, na obonene bw’ogosikwa kw’oboruoti bwao." 
Psalms145:13 Oboruoti bwao nobwa kare na kare, na okogambera kwao nigo kogendererete ase ebiaare bionsi. Omonene nigo are omwegenwa ase amang’ana aye onsi, na oichire nobuya ase ogokora kwaye gwonsi." 
Psalms145:14 Omonene nigo akobwata bonsi abakogwa, nigo akogororokia abwo bakumbirwe gochia inse." 
Psalms145:15 Amaiso ’ebitongwa bionsi nigo akorigereretie nogosemeria, naye nigo okobia chindagera chiabo ase chingaki chigwenerete." 
Psalms145:16 Aye nigo okomaanora okoboko kwao, kwarua amaya na goisanekia kera egetongwa kere moyo." 
Psalms145:17 Omonene nigo are omonyene oboronge ase chinchera chiaye chionsi, na omuya ase ogokora kwaye gwonsi." 
Psalms145:18 Omonene nigo are ang’e ase abanto abwo bakomorangeria; abwo bonsi bakomorangeria ase ekeene. 
Psalms145:19 Omonene nigo agoikeraneria abamoirogete okogania kwabo; boigo nigo akoigwa ekerero kiabo na kobatooria. 
Psalms145:20 Omonene nigo arendete bonsi abamwanchete; korende nasirie abakori amabe bonsi. 
Psalms145:21 Omonwa one nobe ogokwana ogotogigwa kw’Omonene; tiga ebitongwa bionsi bitogie erieta riaye richenu bono na goika kare na kare. 
Psalms146:1 Togia Omonene! Aye omoyo one, togia Omonene!" 
Psalms146:2 Nimbe ngotogia Omonene kongendererete koba moyo, ninterere Nyasae one ase okomotogia kondagenderere kobao." 
Psalms146:3 Timobaisa gosemeria abagambi, gose mwanyabanto abwo batanyare gokonya kende." 
Psalms146:4 Ekero omoika orure ase omonto, ere nigo akoirana ase amaroba, ase arwete. Ase rituko erio erio emeroberio yaye nigo egosira." 
Psalms146:5 Nasesenirie omonto oyio Nyasae o Yakobo are ogokonywa kwaye, oyio osemeretie Omonene, Nyasae oye," 
Psalms146:6 Nyasae oria otongete igoro na ense, na enyancha, na ebinto bionsi bire imeo. Ere nigo agendererete koba omwegenwa goika kare na kare." 
Psalms146:7 Omonene nigo akoa abwo bagokorerwa bobe oboronge bwabo, na abare nenchara nigo akobaa endagera. Omonene nigo agosibora abwo basibire." 
Psalms146:8 Omonene nigo akoramokia emeuko amaiso na kogororokia abwo bakumbirwe gochia inse. Omonene nigo anchete abanyaboronge. 
Psalms146:9 Omonene nigo akorenda abanto abageni, nigo akoa chintakana na ababoraka ogosemeria, korende chinchera chi’abakori amabe nigo agochisiria." 
Psalms146:10 Omonene nagambe goika kare na kare; aye Sayoni, Nyasae oo nagambere ebiaare bionsi." 
Psalms147:1 Motogie Omonene! Nigo ere buya komoterera Nyasae oito ase okomotogia, ayio naro amaya mono na atogwenerete." 
Psalms147:2 Omonene naagache Yerusalemu naende, nasangererie amo Abaisraeli abwo baserebanetigwe." 
Psalms147:3 Nigo akogwenia abwo chinkoro chiabo chiasionoirwe, na koboa amaote abo." 
Psalms147:4 Nigo amanyete omobaro bwe ching’enang’eni chionsi; boigo kera eyemo nigo ayerogete erieta. 
Psalms147:5 Omonene oito nigo are omonene mono, ne chinguru chiaye nechinyinge; obong’aini bwaye tibokorengeka." 
Psalms147:6 Omonene nigo akoimokereria abanto abaitongo igoro, korende abakori amabe nigo akobaiyeria inse." 
Psalms147:7 Moterere Omonene na komoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono; bugeria Nyasae oito amakano namariogi amaya! 
Psalms147:8 Omonene nigo agotuba igoro namare, bwariganeria ense embura, nigo akomeria obonyansi ase ebitunwa." 
Psalms147:9 Nere okoa ching’iti chionsi endagera yabo, naende orageria amage ’ebigonkoru ekero akorera." 
Psalms147:10 Omonene tagokiri ne chinguru chie chibarasi, gose ase omoayerero bw’omonto," 
Psalms147:11 korende nigo agokirie nabanto abwo bamoirogete, abwo basemeretie obwanchani bwaye bogendererete botambe." 
Psalms147:12 Aye Yerusalemu, togia Omonene! Aye Sayoni, togia Nyasae oo!" 
Psalms147:13 Ere nigo agokong’ia emekorogoto y’ebiita biaino; nigo agosesenia abana bamenyete ime yao. 
Psalms147:14 Omonene nigo akobeka omorembe oba ase chimbebe chiao, naende nigo agoichoria engano ere engiya mono." 
Psalms147:15 Nigo agotoma amachiko aye gocha ase ense, ne ring’ana riaye riaranda bwango." 
Psalms147:16 Ere nigo akorenta amagena ’embura agwekaine amarionya amarabu, oyasiarera buna agosiara ribu." 
Psalms147:17 Nigo agosiarera amagena ayio buna amaemba enkomba. Ning’o oraremererie obokendu bwaye? 
Psalms147:18 Nigo agotoma ring’ana riaye, na amagena ayio amakendu anyititoke. Erio ogusia embeo amache agenda." 
Psalms147:19 Ere nigo akomanyia abanto ba Yakobo ring’ana riaye, ee, Abaisraeli emeroberio yaye na amachiko aye." 
Psalms147:20 Omonene tana‐gokorera abanto b’ebisaku binde amang’ana buna ayio, barabwo tibamanyeti amachiko aye. Motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms148:1 Motogie Omonene! Motogie Omonene korwa agwo igoro! Momotogie agwo igoro mono! 
Psalms148:2 Inwe abamalaika baye mwensi, motogie, nainwe emeganda yaye yonsi, motogie!" 
Psalms148:3 Aye erioba, na aye omotienyi, motogie, nainwe ching’enang’eni chionsi chikobara, motogie." 
Psalms148:4 Inwe igoro ya igoro chionsi, motogie Nainwe amache are igoro ya igoro, motogie!" 
Psalms148:5 Ebinto ebio bionsi tiga bitogie erieta ri’Omonene, ekiagera nere ochigete, na ebio bigatongwa," 
Psalms148:6 Omonene obibekire bigenderere kobao goika kare na kare; nigo abibekerete ogochika okwo gotaetanigwe. 
Psalms148:7 Motogie Omonene korwa ase ense, nainwe ebitongwa bie chinyancha ne chindiba chionsi!" 
Psalms148:8 Motogie, inwe omorero na amagena ’embura, na obokeng’entu, na amare, na aye omwaga omotindi ogoikerania aya achigete!" 
Psalms148:9 Motogie Omonene, inwe ebitunwa na ebigoro bionsi, nainwe emete ekwama amatunda, na emecharake yonsi," 
Psalms148:10 nainwe ching’iti chi’orosana na echitugire chionsi, nainwe echikwagura amo ne chinyoni chionsi!" 
Psalms148:11 Motogie inwe abaruoti b’ense na abanto bonsi, nainwe abagambi na abanachi ebina mwensi," 
Psalms148:12 nainwe abamura na abaiseke mwensi, nainwe abanto abagotu na abana." 
Psalms148:13 Inwe mwensi, togia erieta ri’Omonene, ekiagera erieta riaye nario rioka rire rinene rikobakwa; obonene bwaye nigo boetanaine ense na igoro." 
Psalms148:14 Omonene omeririe abanto baye chingunchara, erinde abachenu baye bonsi bamotogie; ee, Abaisraeli abwo bare ang’e nere bamotogie! Motogie Omonene!" 
Psalms149:1 Motogie Omonene! Terera Omonene ogotera okoyia, motogie ase omosangererekano bw’abanto abegenwa." 
Psalms149:2 Tiga Abaisraeli bagokere Omotongi obo; abanto ba Sayoni tiga bachengere Omoruoti obo! 
Psalms149:3 Batogie erieta riaye ase ogotenga, babe bakobugia chinchigiri na amakano." 
Psalms149:4 Omonene nigo agokirie nabanto baye; abwo bare abaitongo nigo akobachabera ogotooreka. 
Psalms149:5 Tiga abegenwa bachenge ase obonene, babe bagotera nomogoko kobare ase amarere abo." 
Psalms149:6 Tiga ogotogigwa okonene kwa Nyasae kobe ase emenwa yabo, na ase amaboko abo babogorie emeyio ya birende ere nobwoge chinsemo ibere," 
Psalms149:7 erinde barusie egesiomba ase egesaku, na bae abanto egesusuro." 
Psalms149:8 Boigo banyare gosiba abaruoti babo nebinyuri, na abanene babo ne chingataare chi’ekioma," 
Psalms149:9 erinde babanachere ekina kerikire. Obo nabwo obonene bw’abegenwa bonsi b’Omonene. Motogie Omonene! 
Psalms150:1 Motogie Omonene! Motogie Nyasae agwo ase obomenyo bwaye obochenu, motogie agwo igoro eyio yatongetwe ase okobua kwaye!" 
Psalms150:2 Motogie ase engencho y’ogokora kwaye okonene; motogie koreng’ana nobonene bwaye bore ne chinguru chinyinge goetania! 
Psalms150:3 Motogie ase okobugia ebitureri; motogie ase okobugia amakano onsi! 
Psalms150:4 Motogie ase okobugia chinchigiri na gotenga; motogie ase okobugia amakano na ebiroria! 
Psalms150:5 Motogie ase ogoakania chisani chikwoga amariogi are inse; motogie ase ogoakania chisani chikwoga amariogi are igoro! 
Psalms150:6 Tiga ebitongwa bionsi bire moyo bitogie Omonene! Motogie Omonene! 
Proverbs1:1 Eye nero emereng’anio ya Sulemani mosinto o Daudi, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
Proverbs1:2 Emereng’anio eyio eragere abanto bamanye obong’aini na amorokererio ay’okorongeyia, naende bamanye amang’ana are nengencho." 
Proverbs1:3 Korwa ase ero abanto mbanyore amorokererio akorenta obong’aini, na oboronge, na ekeene, na ogokora kw’oboronge." 
Proverbs1:4 Emereng’anio eyio nigo erae abatamanyeti amange bamanye chisemi, naende nigo erorokererie ekegori egeke getware okomanya na emeroberio emiya." 
Proverbs1:5 Ase okoigwa emereng’anio eyio omonto omong’aini nigo akong’aiinia goetania, na oyore nokomanya bwenyorera ogosemigwa okuya." 
Proverbs1:6 Korwa ase emereng’anio eyio abanto mbanyare kweorokereria emereng’anio na eki egoteba; boigo mbamanye amang’ana ’abanto abang’aini na emebayeno yabo. 
Proverbs1:7 Okomoiroka Omonene, noro omochakano bwe chisemi. Abariri nigo bagochaya obong’aini na amorokererio." 
Proverbs1:8 Omwana one, igwera amorokererio a iso, na tobaisa gotiga aya nyoko akogochika." 
Proverbs1:9 Ayio nigo arabe buna egetinti gechabeire ase omotwe oo, na buna chisonoi chingiya chire ase rigoti riao." 
Proverbs1:10 Omwana one, abanyabibe kobarakoebererie ng’a mobwatane nabarabwo, tobaisa gwancha." 
Proverbs1:11 Baise kogotebia, “Inchuo ogende amo naintwe; toboere abanto tobaite, toumokere onde bwensi otari na komocha." 
Proverbs1:12 Inchuo tobamere kobare moyo, buna aase abakure akomera, bagende abagima ase embeera." 
Proverbs1:13 Erio tonyore chinibo chionsi chie rigori rinene, toichorie chinyomba chiaito nebisakorwa ebio." 
Proverbs1:14 Inchuo obwatane amo naintwe; tobe nekegancha ekemo.” 
Proverbs1:15 Omwana one, tobaisa gotaara amo nabarabwo. Otange okogoro kwao tikobaisa gotacha ase bagoeta," 
Proverbs1:16 ekiagera amagoro abo nigo akominyoka gochia ase ogokora amabe, na nigo bare abaango ase ogoitera amanyinga." 
Proverbs1:17 Nigo ere bosa gotegera chinyoni ebisugunia ekero chibiroche. 
Proverbs1:18 Abanto abwo nigo bakoboera goitera amanyinga abo abanyene, baumokera obogima bwabo abanyene." 
Proverbs1:19 Naboigo omoerio bwe chinchera chiabo ore, baria baganetie konyora chinibo ase ribero. Chinibo chiria nigo chigosiria obogima bw’abwo bagochinyora." 
Proverbs1:20 Obong’aini nigo bogoaka eriogi rinene ase chinchera, boigo nase chichiiro." 
Proverbs1:21 Nigo bogoaka eriogi rinene ase emseangererekano emenene y’abanto, naende ase ebiita bi’emechie, bwateba:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Ngoika ririri inwe abamotamanyeti amange moranche ogotamanya kwaino? Ngoika ririri abachecheria baregokie nogochecheria kwabo, na abariri bageche chisemi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Moise koonchoka moigwe ogokurera kwane, rirorio nimbaiterere omoika one, mbamanyie amang’ana aane." 
Proverbs1:24 Nabeire nkobarangeria, korende mwangire konyigwera; nabeire nkorambora okoboko kwane, korende monto onde tari okorigereirie." 
Proverbs1:25 Mwachayire ogosemia kwane gwonsi, gose onde tari oigwerete ogokurera kwane." 
Proverbs1:26 Ase ayio inche nimbasekerere ekero emechando erabachere. Nimbachecherie ekero obwoba borabachere; 
Proverbs1:27 ee, ekero obwoba borabachere buna ekembugu‐mbugu, na emechando buna ekerambauti, boigo ekero obokong’u na omoichano birabachere." 
Proverbs1:28 Erio barabwo mbandangerie, korende tinkobaigwa; mbandigie, korende tibakonyora inche." 
Proverbs1:29 Barabwo nigo bagechete chisemi tibancheti komoiroka Omonene. 
Proverbs1:30 Tibancheti koigwera ring’ana riane ri’okobasemia nonya nerimo; nigo bachayete ogokurera kwane gwonsi. 
Proverbs1:31 Ase ayio mbarie okwama kw’ogokora kwabo, baisaneke nemeroberio yabo abanyene" 
Proverbs1:32 Okoirana nyuma kw’abwo batamanyeti amange nkobaite, na ogoisaneka kw’abariri nkobasirie barabwo abanyene." 
Proverbs1:33 Korende monto onde bwensi oranyigwere namenye ase omorembe, ere nabe nobotoereru na takoiroka bobe bonde.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Omwana one, ancha amang’ana aane, ogache amachiko aane ase enkoro yao," 
Proverbs2:2 erinde oigwe obong’aini, naende orue enkoro yao ebe nokomanya." 
Proverbs2:3 Obe gokorangeria korigia chisemi, naende osorore onyore okomanya." 
Proverbs2:4 Origie obong’aini buna okorigia chifeta, obogira‐girie buna okoriga‐rigia chinibo chibisire." 
Proverbs2:5 Oise gokora bo, rirorio nomanye komoiroka Omonene, naende nigo oranyare komomanya Nyasae." 
Proverbs2:6 Omonene nere okoa abanto obong’aini; chisemi na okomanya nigo bikorwa ase omonwa oye. 
Proverbs2:7 Abare ne chinkoro chindonge Omonene nigo abagacherete obong’aini oboikeranu. Ere nigo are enguba ase abanto abwo bagotaara ase oboronge. 
Proverbs2:8 Nigo arendete chinchera chi’abagokora ekeene, naende orenda chinchera chi’abamoirogete." 
Proverbs2:9 Koranyigwere, rirorio nomanye ayare boronge na ekeene, na ayagwenerete: ee, nomanye chinchera chionsi chire chingiya," 
Proverbs2:10 na obong’aini mbosoe ase nekoro yao, ne chisemi nigo chiragokie omoyo oo." 
Proverbs2:11 Emeroberio y’ebirengererio ebiya nekorende, na okomanya okuya ngokorende boigo." 
Proverbs2:12 Obong’aini mbokorusie korwa ase chinchera chi’obobe na korwa ase abanto bagokwana amang’ana ’obosiru. 
Proverbs2:13 Abanto abwo nigo bagotiga chinchera chi’oboronge, babwatia chinchera chi’omosunte." 
Proverbs2:14 Nigo bakogokera ase ogokora amabe, naende bagokera chingencho chionsi chi’obobe." 
Proverbs2:15 Chinchera chiabo nigo chire chinkorekanu, nigo bagotaara ase chinchera chire borogochi." 
Proverbs2:16 Obong’aini obwo mbogotoorie korwa ase omokungu onde bwensi omotayayi, oyio ogokwana amang’ana okweansia korwa ase omonwa oye," 
Proverbs2:17 oyio otigire omwanchi bw’oboke bwaye, naende bwebire okobwatana kw’ogotianania kwa Nyasae oye." 
Proverbs2:18 Ere amo nab’enyomba yaye nigo bagotirimboka gochia ase amakweri, ne chinchera chiaye nigo chikobaraa gochia aase abakure." 
Proverbs2:19 Monto onde bwensi ogochiera omokungu oyio tari koirana naende, takoiranera chinchera chi’obogima." 
Proverbs2:20 Ase ayio, obwatie enchera y’abanto abaya, na otaare ase oboeto bw’abanyaboronge." 
Proverbs2:21 Ekiagera abare ne chinkoro chindonge mbamenye ase ense, na abaikeranu mbagenderere komenya aroro." 
Proverbs2:22 Korende abakori amabe mbaitwe barue ase ense, na abasaria mbasirigwe kegima." 
Proverbs3:1 Omwana one, tobaisa kweba amorokererio aane, korende tiga enkoro yao ebwate amachiko aane." 
Proverbs3:2 Ayio nagere omenye amatuko amange, na emiaka emenge, naende ogendererete koba nomorembe." 
Proverbs3:3 Totiga obuya na ekeene birue asore; obisibe ase rigoti riao, na obirike ase enkoro yao." 
Proverbs3:4 Igo nario oranyore ogwancherwa na okomanya okuya ase obosio bwa Nyasae, na ase mwanyabanto." 
Proverbs3:5 Osemerie Omonene nenkoro yao yonsi; tobaisa gosemeria okomanya kwao. 
Proverbs3:6 Orengererie Omonene, omoorokie ase chinchera chiao chionsi, nere narongeyie oboeto bwao." 
Proverbs3:7 Tobaisa gwekora omong’aini ase okorora kwao omonyene; omoiroke Omonene na bweatanane korwa ase amabe. 
Proverbs3:8 Korakore igo, ayio nagwenie omobere oo abeke emeseto y’amauga ao chinguru." 
Proverbs3:9 Osike Omonene ne chinibo chiao chionsi na ogotongora kwao gwonsi kw’endagera. 
Proverbs3:10 Erio ebiage biao mbiichore nendagera enyinge na ebimitero biao biichore nedivai engiya. 
Proverbs3:11 Omwana one, tobaisa kwanga gose gochaya ogoaka kw’Omonene kw’ogokorongeyia." 
Proverbs3:12 Omonto onde bwensi Omonene anchete nigo akomorongeyia, buna ise omwana akorongeyia omwana oria agokirie nere." 
Proverbs3:13 Nare nomogoko omonto oyio onyorire obong’aini naende ore nokomanya. 
Proverbs3:14 Obong’aini nigo bobwate ebitoki ebinge kobua ebie chifeta na ebie chitahabu. 
Proverbs3:15 Nigo bore nengencho enene kobua amagena akomeka‐meka e rigori rinene, gose tokoboreng’ania na kende gionsi oganetie." 
Proverbs3:16 Obong’aini nigo bobwate obogima bw’amatuko amange ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, na ase okoboko kwaye gw’okobee nigo bobwate obonda obonge amo nogosikwa." 
Proverbs3:17 Chinchera chiaye nigo chire echi’omogoko, na oboeto bwaye bwonsi nigo bore obw’omorembe." 
Proverbs3:18 Nigo bore omote bw’obogima ase abwo babobwatererete; na kera omonto ogendererete kobobwata bokong’u nasesenirie. 
Proverbs3:19 Omonene nigo abegete oboroso bw’ense nobong’aini bwaye, na agakong’ia igoro nokomanya kwaye." 
Proverbs3:20 Ase obong’aini bwaye chindiba nigo chikobochoria, na amare atonyia riime." 
Proverbs3:21 Omwana one, bwata bokong’u obong’aini obuya na okomanya; tobaisa gotiga ebio birue ase obosio bwao." 
Proverbs3:22 Igo ebio mbibe obogima ase omoyo oo, na ogwechabera okuya ase rigoti riao." 
Proverbs3:23 Erio notaare ase enchera yao kore noborendi obuya, gose tokogochwa okogoro kwao." 
Proverbs3:24 Ekero ogochia korara, toba nobwoba, koraire nonyore chitoro chingiya." 
Proverbs3:25 Tobaisa kwoboa okogosa kogocha mobosokano, gose ogosirigwa kw’abanyabibe kogocha buna omoubera." 
Proverbs3:26 Omonene nabe ogosemeria kwao, ere narende okogoro kwao tikobaisa kobwatwa ase oboreba." 
Proverbs3:27 Tobaisa korina abaremerwa amaya aya bagwenerete konyora, onye ayio are ase okobua kwao kobak onya." 
Proverbs3:28 Ekero obwate egento ase engaki eyio kware koa omonto omino, tobaisa komotebia, “Genda ochiche ankio, nario ndagekoe.”" 
Proverbs3:29 Tobaisa gokora emeroberio gokorera omonto omino bobe; oyio omenyete amo naye, ogosemeretie ng’a anyore oborendi obuya." 
Proverbs3:30 Tobaisa koamererania na monto onde engencho ende etaiyo, onye taragokorera bobe bonde." 
Proverbs3:31 Tobaisa koba ne ribero ase omonto otari gokora ay’oboronge, gose tobaisa kwega chinchera chiaye," 
Proverbs3:32 ekiagera abanto abasareku nigo bare okogechia ase Omonene, korende obobisi bwaye nigo bore ase abwo bare ne chinkoro chindonge." 
Proverbs3:33 Okoragereria kw’Omonene nigo kore ase chinyomba chi’abakori amabe, korende nigo agosesenia chinka chi’abanyene oboronge." 
Proverbs3:34 Omonene nigo agochecheria abwo bagochecheria, korende abaitongo nigo akobaa obuya na amabera." 
Proverbs3:35 Abanto abang’aini mbanyore omwando bw’obonene, korende abariri mbabogorie obosooku." 
Proverbs4:1 Inwe abana baane, igwa amorokererio aane inche iso; tegerera mono, erinde monyare koba nokomanya." 
Proverbs4:2 Inche nigo nkobaa amorokererio amaya; timotiga aya nabachikeire. 
Proverbs4:3 Nigo narenge omwana, narenge na tata; nigo narenge omwororo nanchire na baba, ekiagera nigo narenge omomoima." 
Proverbs4:4 Tata akanyorokereria, agantebia, “Tiga amang’ana aane abeere ase enkoro yao ime; orende amachiko aane, erio nario orabe moyo.”" 
Proverbs4:5 Enyorere obong’aini na okomanya, tobaisa kobieba! Tibwanga koigwera amang’ana ngokwana korwa ase omonwa one." 
Proverbs4:6 Tobaisa gotiga obong’aini, ekiagera borobwo mbokorende. Obwanche, na borobwo mbogere ogenderere koba buya." 
Proverbs4:7 Obong’aini nigo bore obw’engencho enene. Ase ayio, enyorere obong’aini, na kende gionsi okorigia, rigia obe nokomanya." 
Proverbs4:8 Obobare koba nengencho enene, naborobwo mbogokinie; koraboboanie nigo borakorentere ogosikwa." 
Proverbs4:9 Mbobeke ase omotwe oo ekiore gechabeire, naende bokoe egutwa y’obonene." 
Proverbs4:10 Aye omwana one, igwa amang’ana aane, oyaanche, igo nario emiaka y’obogima bwao erabe emenge." 
Proverbs4:11 Inche nakworokereirie enchera y’obong’aini; nakoraaire ase oboeto bore oboronge. 
Proverbs4:12 Ekero orabe kogotaara, togotererigwa, na ekero orabe gokominyoka, tokogochwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Bwata amorokererio bokong’u, toyatiga arue asore; yarende, ekiagera naro obogima bwao." 
Proverbs4:14 Tobaisa kobwatia enchera y’abakori amabe, gose tobwatia chinchera chi’abanto ababe." 
Proverbs4:15 Bweatanane korwa ase enchera eyio, toyebwatia, korende ogobere oetere ensemo, ogende bosio." 
Proverbs4:16 Abanto abwo tibari korara goika barore ng’a bakorire amabe. Onye tibarakorera omonto amabe, tibari korara chitoro." 
Proverbs4:17 Endagera yabo bakoria nogokora amabe, na edivai yabo bakonywa nobotindi." 
Proverbs4:18 Korende enchera y’abanyene oboronge nigo enga buna amasase a mambia; ayio akogenderera koraba goetania goika bwakia se. 
Proverbs4:19 Enchera y’abakori amabe nigo enga buna omosunte ekerima; tibari komanya ebinto bikobagocha. 
Proverbs4:20 Omwana one, tegerera oigwe amang’ana aane! Igwera amang’ana nkogotebia." 
Proverbs4:21 Amang’ana ayio tabaisa korua ase amaiso ao. Yagache ime ase enkoro yao. 
Proverbs4:22 Ayio nigo are obogima ase oyio oyanyorire, naende nigo akogwenia omobere oye bwonsi." 
Proverbs4:23 Renda enkoro yao kobua ande onsi orendete, ekiagera nao chinsoko chi’obogima chikorua." 
Proverbs4:24 Tuguta chinkwana chi’obokorekanu korwa ase omonwa oo, na amang’ana ’obong’ainereria korwa ase ebikoba biao." 
Proverbs4:25 Tiga amaiso ao arigererie gochia bosio, na ebioge bi’amaiso ao biramokigwe boronge." 
Proverbs4:26 Rongeyia oboeto bw’amagoro ao, ne chinchera chiao chionsi chibe chindonge." 
Proverbs4:27 Togobera gochia aande, ensemo y’okorio gose ey’okobee. Rusia okogoro kwao korwa ase ebibe." 
Proverbs5:1 Omwana one, tegerera oigwe obong’aini bwane! Igwera okomanya kwane!" 
Proverbs5:2 Erio nario oramanye korenda ebirengererio biao, na ebikoba biao birende chisemi." 
Proverbs5:3 Ebikoba bi’omokungu omonyaka nigo bigotonyia ayare amansu buna obooke, na omonwa oye nigo ore omoterere kobua amaguta akweakwa." 
Proverbs5:4 Korende omoerio bw’omokungu oyio nigo ore omororo buna ekemeri ekeroro, na omwoge buna omoyio o birende otieririe chinsemo chionsi ibere." 
Proverbs5:5 Amagoro aye nigo akoraa gochia ase amakweri, na amatambokero aye araa gochia aase abakure." 
Proverbs5:6 Ere tari gotaara enchera ekogenda ase obogima; orogendo rwaye nigo rokona‐koonchaonchoka, ere tamanyeti ayio." 
Proverbs5:7 Ase ayio, inwe abana baane, ntegerere; timobaisa gotiga amang’ana aane." 
Proverbs5:8 Erende obeere aare korwa ase omokungu oyio; tobaisa goika ang’e negesieri ki’enyomba yaye. 
Proverbs5:9 Oise gokora bo, nigo orae abanto abaao amasikani ao, na emiaka yao ebaise konachwa nabanto batari namabera." 
Proverbs5:10 Naende abanto abaao nigo baraire chinibo chiao chionsi, na bionsi ebi gwakoreire emeremo biirwe nabanto abwo." 
Proverbs5:11 Omoerio oye norere, obokie amagombo ekero chinyama chi’omobere oo chiaerire," 
Proverbs5:12 notebe, “Naki nakorete nkagecha ogokurerwa, na enkoro yane egachaya okorongeigwa!" 
Proverbs5:13 Tinaigwerete amorokererio ’aborokia baane, gose tinategererete koigwera abarenge konyorokereria." 
Proverbs5:14 Nigo nabete ang’e gosira kegima ase egati y’omoganda osangererekanete.” 
Proverbs5:15 Kanywe amache okobucha korwa ase egesima kiao, na aya agosoka korwa ase ensoko yao." 
Proverbs5:16 Inee! Chinsoko chiao nchigwenerete gwesiarera gochia aare, ne chindooche chiao chi’amache ase chinchera?" 
Proverbs5:17 Tiga chinsoko echio chibe echiao aye bweka na tari echi’abanto abaao. 
Proverbs5:18 Tiga ensoko yao esesenigwe, naye ogokere omokungu bw’oboke bwao," 
Proverbs5:19 oyore buna ensune eyanchire na buna engabi ensiani. Tiga obosiani bwaye bokong’use, na ogokigwe nere chingaki chionsi. Obwanchani bwaye tiga bokogokie kogenderera." 
Proverbs5:20 Omwana one, nase ki okogokigwa nomokungu omonyaka? Nase ki okoboania omokungu bw’omonto omoao?" 
Proverbs5:21 Chinchera chi’omonto nigo chirorekanete maiso marore ase Omonene, na Omonene nigo arigereretie ogokora kwaye gwonsi." 
Proverbs5:22 Ebibe bi’omokori amabe nigo bikomobwata omonyene; nasibwe ne chingori chire ebibe biaye. 
Proverbs5:23 Omonto oyio nigo arakwe, ekiagera angete ogokurerwa, na ase engencho y’oboriri bwaye obonene nasire." 
Proverbs6:1 Omwana one, ande kwerure koba intenenera ase omonto omino, na kwarire eira ase omonto omoao na kobwatana nere amaboko." 
Proverbs6:2 Bono amang’ana gwakwanete korwa ase omonwa oo akobwatire buna oboreba. 
Proverbs6:3 Ase ayio omwana one, bono nigo ore inse y’okobua kw’omonto oyio, na onye korigetie gwetooria korwa asare okore iga: Kabe omoitongo, ogende asare omosorore, erinde agosibore korwa ase eira eyio." 
Proverbs6:4 Tobaisa korara gose gosundoka; 
Proverbs6:5 minyoka buna engabi egotama erue ase omotwari, na buna enyoni egotama erue ase omotegi." 
Proverbs6:6 Aye ore omworo, genda ase amage, origererie orore buna agokora emeremo nomokia onyore obong’aini." 
Proverbs6:7 Ayio tabwati omogambi, gose omoteneneri, gose omoraai," 
Proverbs6:8 korende nigo agosangereria chindagera chiabo ekero chikonyorekana, achigacha goika ekero ki’eguru‐gura." 
Proverbs6:9 Aye omworo, ngoika ririri oragenderere korara? Ndiriri oraboke korwa ase chitoro chiao?" 
Proverbs6:10 Orare ake igo, bwegondie ake igo; oringanie amaboko otimoke," 
Proverbs6:11 erio obotaka mbogochere buna omouri agocha, na oboremerwa boche buna omonto obwate ebirwanero agocha." 
Proverbs6:12 Omonto otagwenereti kende ore omokori amabe nigo agoeta‐eta, ogokwana oborimo korwa ase omonwa oye." 
Proverbs6:13 Nigo agosimera ebioge bi’amaiso aye, naende nigo agosimera amagoro, na okworokia ebimanyererio namaboko aye." 
Proverbs6:14 Ogoitania abanto nigo goichire ase enkoro yaye, botambe nigo akoroberia korenta amabe; nigo agosimeka chimbusuro chi’amariomana." 
Proverbs6:15 Ase engencho eyio emechando nemochere mobosokano; nigo arasirigwe mobosokano atanyare gotoorigwa. 
Proverbs6:16 Mbire ebinto bitano na ekemo Omonene agechete, ee, mbire bitano na bibere bire okogecha asare, nabio ebi:" 
Proverbs6:17 Okorigereria kw’oboenenu, na oromeme rogokwana oborimo, na amaboko agoitera amanyinga atari na komocha;" 
Proverbs6:18 enkoro ekoroberia ebirengererio bi’amabe, na amagoro akominyoka gochia gokora amabe;" 
Proverbs6:19 kirori bw’oborimo, ogokwana oborimo, na omonto ogosimeka chimbusuro chi’ogoitania ase egati y’abanto abamo." 
Proverbs6:20 Omwana one, igwera aya inche iso nkogochika, na totiga amorokererio a nyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Yasibe, agenderere kobeera botambe ase enkoro yao, naende oyasibe ase rigoti riao." 
Proverbs6:22 Ekero orabe kogotaara, ayio nakoraae; ekero orabe koraire, nakorende, na ekero orabe gokoboka, ayio nakwane naye." 
Proverbs6:23 Amachiko nigo are etaya, na amorokererio nigo are oborabu; ogokurera gw’okorongeigwa nigo kore enchera y’obogima." 
Proverbs6:24 Nigo korakorende korwa ase omokungu omonyaka, na korwa ase amang’ana ’oromeme rwaye oroterere rokoebereria." 
Proverbs6:25 Tobaisa komogania ase enkoro yao ime ase engencho y’ekieni kiaye ekiya; amaiso aye tabaisa gokong’usa. 
Proverbs6:26 Ase engencho y’omokungu omotayayi omonto nigo akoremerwa oborwa nonya negesamunye ki’omogati, na omokungu bw’omonto omoao nigo akorigia obogima bw’omonto obosaria." 
Proverbs6:27 Inee! Omonto nabogorie omorero ayobeke ase egekuba kiaye, ne chianga chiaye tichiyia?" 
Proverbs6:28 Gose nataare ase rieera ri’omorero, na amagoro aye tayia?" 
Proverbs6:29 Naboigo erabe ase omonto ogotomana nomokungu bw’omonto onde; onde bwensi okoba nomokungu oyio goika aegwe egesusuro. 
Proverbs6:30 Abanto tibari gochaya omoibi onye ore koiba endagera ekiagera are nenchara. 
Proverbs6:31 Nonya naboigo omoibi oria kanyorirwe, goika airanie ara gatano na kabere; nigo araakane ebinto bionsi abwate nyomba mwaye." 
Proverbs6:32 Omonto ogotomana nomokungu onde bwensi, oyio tabwati chisemi; oyo ogokora ayio nigo agwesaria ere omonyene." 
Proverbs6:33 Omonto oyio nigo arabe namaakwa naende asirie amasikani onsi, obosooku bwaye tibogotinyigwa boeere." 
Proverbs6:34 Risemi nigo rigokora omosacha oba nekeririanda, na takoba namabera ekero akorusia egesiomba." 
Proverbs6:35 Ere tagwancha embooria ende yonsi, naegwa ebiegwa ebinge takobiancha." 
Proverbs7:1 Omwana one, renda amang’ana aane, na obeke amachiko aane abeere ime yao." 
Proverbs7:2 Bwata amachiko aane, erinde obe moyo; orende amorokererio aane buna orendete endorero y’eriso riao." 
Proverbs7:3 Oyasibe ase ebiara bi’amaboko ao, na oyarike oyabeke ase enkoro yao." 
Proverbs7:4 Tebia obong’aini, “Aye naye mosubati ominto”, na obomanyi oboroke omosani oo momanyaine," 
Proverbs7:5 erinde bikorende korwa ase omokungu omonyaka ogokwana amang’ana ay’okoebereria. 
Proverbs7:6 Nigo narigereretie isiko goetera ase ekebao ki’enyomba yaane na ebichanga bi’aroro. 
Proverbs7:7 Ase egati y’abanto batamanyeti amange, nkarora omomura ore ase egati y’abamura bande otabwati chisemi." 
Proverbs7:8 Oyio nigo arenge goeta ase enchera yarenge ang’e nekoona agwo ase omokungu oria omonyaka amenyete agechoba‐chobania gochia ase enyomba yaye 
Proverbs7:9 mogoroba kobokomura‐mura, ekero ki’omosunte bw’obotuko." 
Proverbs7:10 Rora, omokungu agacha akaumerana nomomura oria. Omokungu oria nigo abegete chianga chi’obotayayi orenge omong’ainereria ase enkoro yaye." 
Proverbs7:11 Nigo arenge omonyariogi otari kogoma nyomba mwaye. 
Proverbs7:12 Nigo agosioma‐siomia aande onsi ase chinchera na ase chichiiro, na ase kera amatabekania oba oganyete." 
Proverbs7:13 Erio omokungu oria akaboania omomura oria na komonyunyunta, akomorigereria namaiso, atari nobosooku, akomotebia," 
Proverbs7:14 “Nariete eira korua ebing’wanso bi’omorembe; rituko ria rero nayeikeranirie. 
Proverbs7:15 Ayio naro agera nacha gokorotota, nigo nakorigirie nomokia ng’a nkorore, na bono nakonyorire." 
Proverbs7:16 Naarire oborere bwane nebirarero ebiya, na ebitambaa bimatonto bikorwa Misiri." 
Proverbs7:17 Naboumoreire manemane, na amaguta ’omogaka, na ay’omodalasini botioke buya." 
Proverbs7:18 Inchuo togokanie ase obotuko bwonsi goika mambia; inchuo twegokie nobwanchani. 
Proverbs7:19 Omosacha one taiyo, ochiire orogendo orotambe." 
Proverbs7:20 Nigo aira chibesa chire omobuko na nigo arairane omotienyi kobeire omonene,”" 
Proverbs7:21 Omokungu oria akaebereria omomura oria namang’ana amansu ao ao, na ase amang’ana ’ebikoba ebiterere akamobua." 
Proverbs7:22 Ase obwango obwo omomura oria agatunyana omokungu oria buna eng’ombe ekoirwa konyenywa, gose buna omosibwa obwatirwe ogochia kobekwa chingataare." 
Proverbs7:23 Ee, akamotunyana goika ensara ekamobeta egaika riini ime. Nigo abete buna enyoni ekoayerera gochia ase ebisugunia na tamanyete ng’a ayio nobogima bwaye agosiria." 
Proverbs7:24 Inwe abana baane, ntegerera morengererie mono amang’ana nkobatebia." 
Proverbs7:25 Chinkoro chiaino tichibaisa koonchorwa na kobwatia chingencho chi’omokungu buna oyio; gose orogendo rwaye tirobaisa gosiria obogima bwaino. 
Proverbs7:26 Omokungu oyio oiyeirie abanto abange, ee, oitire omoganda omonene." 
Proverbs7:27 Enyomba yaye nero enchera ekogenda aase abakure; ee, enchera eyio nigo ekogenda ase chiero chi’amakweri." 
Proverbs8:1 Inee! Obong’aini tibori korangeria? Okomanya tikori goaka eriogi rinene? 
Proverbs8:2 Obong’aini nigo bogotenena aase aimokererete igoro, ang’e nenchera engendi, nigo bokobeera ase amatabekania e chinchera." 
Proverbs8:3 Mbarabare ase ebiita bosio bw’omochie ase ebisoero bi’ebiita nigo bogokwana neriogi rinene, bwateba;" 
Proverbs8:4 “Inwe abanto, ninwe nkorangeria; eriogi riane nigo rigochera mwanyabanto." 
Proverbs8:5 Inwe aba motamanyeti amange, egera obong’aini; na inwe abariri, egera okomanya." 
Proverbs8:6 Tegerera moigwe, ekiagera nigo ndakwane amang’ana amaya mono; amang’ana akorwa ase omonwa one nay’oboronge." 
Proverbs8:7 Amang’ana ngokwana nay’ekeene; amang’ana ’obobe nigo are okogechia ase ebikoba biane. 
Proverbs8:8 Amang’ana aane onsi ngokwana nigo are ay’oboronge, ande tari are ay’oborimo, gose ay’obokorekanu." 
Proverbs8:9 Nigo akoigweka buya ase omonto oyio okoyamanya, naende namaronge ase abwo banyorire chisemi." 
Proverbs8:10 Ancha amorokererio aane kobua efeta, ne chisemi kobua etahabu echenire." 
Proverbs8:11 Obong’aini nigo bore obuya kobua amagena akomeka‐meka aye rigori rinene, tibokoreng’anigwa nebinto bionsi bire ebiya biganeirie." 
Proverbs8:12 Inche obong’aini nakorire okomanya kwabeire obomenyo bwane, nigo inde ne chisemi, naende nimanyete kogamba buya." 
Proverbs8:13 Okomoiroka Omonene nokogecha obobe; nigo ngechete oboenenu, na obwerori, na orogendo orobe, boigo namang’ana ’obong’ainereria." 
Proverbs8:14 Inche nigo nkorua ogosemia na obong’aini bw’ekeene; nigo inde nokomanya na okobua. 
Proverbs8:15 Ase obokonyi bwane abaruoti nigo bakogamba, na abagambi nigo bakobeka amachiko ay’ekeene." 
Proverbs8:16 Ase obokonyi bwane abagambi nigo bakogamba, boigo nabanene na abanachi ebina bonsi." 
Proverbs8:17 Nigo nyanchete abwo banyanchete; na abwo bakondigia nomokia mbanyore. 
Proverbs8:18 Ninche nkorua obonda na ogosikwa, amo nobotenenku na oboronge bitari koera." 
Proverbs8:19 Okwama nkorua nigo kore okuya kobua etahabu, ee, kobua etahabu engiya, na ebitoki nkorua mbibuete efeta enchore." 
Proverbs8:20 Nigo nkobwatia enchera y’oboronge, naba ngotaara ase oboeto bw’ekeene." 
Proverbs8:21 Nigo nkoa abwo banyanchete obotenenku na goichoria chikungo chiabo. 
Proverbs8:22 Omonene nigo arenge nainche korwa omochakano bwe chinchera chiaye, agwo kare konya ataratonga kende gionsi;" 
Proverbs8:23 nao narenge korwa agwo kare na kare, nonya nense konya etarabao." 
Proverbs8:24 Inche nigo naiboretwe chindiba chitarabao, nonya ne chinsoko chi’amache." 
Proverbs8:25 Nigo naiboretwe oboroso bw’ebitunwa botarabekwa, na ebigoro bitarabao," 
Proverbs8:26 ekero ataratonga ense ne riroba riaye, nonya norotu." 
Proverbs8:27 Ekero atongete igoro chionsi nao narenge, boigo nekero abekerete amache chimbebe." 
Proverbs8:28 Ekero abegete igoro ekabao, na ekero abegete chinsoko chigosokia amache korwa ase chindiba ne chinguru," 
Proverbs8:29 na ekero abekerete chinyancha chimbebe, amache tabaisa goetania ogochika kwaye; na ekero abegete amaroso ’ense nao narenge." 
Proverbs8:30 Inche nigo narenge amo nere buna oyomanyete emeremo eyio buya. Kera rituko nigo arenge kogokigwa nainche, na inche nkaba inde nomogoko ase obosio bwaye botambe." 
Proverbs8:31 Nigo nagokerete ense yaye emenyire nabanto, na nkaba nsasokerete mwanyabanto." 
Proverbs8:32 “Na bono, inwe abana baane, ntegerere moigwe, mbasesenirie abwo barendete chinchera chiane," 
Proverbs8:33 Igwera amorokererio! Ancha obong’aini, timobwanga!" 
Proverbs8:34 Nasesenirie omonto oyio okonyigwera; oyio okorenda ase ebiita biane kera rituko, oganyete ase ebisieri biane." 
Proverbs8:35 Omonto onyorire inche, oyio onyorire obogima; naende nancherwe n’Omonene." 
Proverbs8:36 Korende oyio otari nainche nigo akwenachera ekina ere omonyene. Bonsi abangechete nigo banchete amakweri.” 
Proverbs9:1 Obong’aini nigo bweagacherete enyomba. Nigo bwebaacherete chisiiro isano na ibere. 
Proverbs9:2 Bwanyenyire ching’iti chiaye; bwochoganirie edivai yaye, bwariganirie emesa yaye." 
Proverbs9:3 Bwatomire abasomba baye abaiseke gochia aase aimokererete igoro mono a omochie korangeria abanto, bogoteba:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Oyo otamanyeti amange, tiga ache aa!” Na ase oyore omoriri bwateba:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Inchuo orie endagera yane, na onywe edivai nochoganirie!" 
Proverbs9:6 Tiga oboriri bwao, erinde obe moyo! Obwatie enchera y’okonyora okomanya!”" 
Proverbs9:7 Omonto ogokurera omonyacheche, nigo akwenyorera obororo; na oyogotogonyera omonto omokori amabe nigo akwenyorera ogochaywa." 
Proverbs9:8 Tobaisa gokurera omonto omochayi; oyio nigo arakogeche. Kurera omonto omong’aini, oyio nigo aragwanche." 
Proverbs9:9 Orokereria omonto omong’aini, oyio nigo aragenderere koba omong’aini goetania. Orokereria omonto omoronge, oyio namente koba ne chisemi." 
Proverbs9:10 Okomoiroka Omonene, oyio noro omochakano bw’obong’aini, na okomomanya Oyore Omochenu nabwo obomanyi." 
Proverbs9:11 Ase ogokonywa kwane amatuko ao nabe amange, na emiaka y’obogima bwao nementwe." 
Proverbs9:12 Korabe nobong’aini, borobwo mbogokonye; korende korabe omochayi, obochayi obwo mbokoiranere." 
Proverbs9:13 Omokungu omoriri nigo are omonyariogi. Ere nigo are bosa, na tamanyeti ring’ana rinde." 
Proverbs9:14 Nigo agoikaransera ekerogo ase egesieri ki’enyomba yaye, agwo aase aimokererete igoro ase omochie," 
Proverbs9:15 aba okorangeria abaeti bare ase orogendo rwabo," 
Proverbs9:16 oteba, “Onde bwensi otamanyeti amange, tiga ache aa!” Na ase oyore omoriri oteba," 
Proverbs9:17 “Amache aibire nigo are amansu, na omogati okorierwa aase a bobisi nigo okogokia.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Korende oyio ogosoa aroro tamanyeti ng’a amakweri nareo, naende ng’a abageni b’omokungu oyio nigo bare agwo aase abakure." 
Proverbs10:1 Eye nemereng’anio ya Sulemani. Omwana omomura omong’aini nigo akogokia ise, korende oyore omoriri nigo akorentera ng’ina omoichano." 
Proverbs10:2 Chinibo chi’ogokora okobe tichiri gokonya kende, korende oboronge nigo bogotooria korwa ase amakweri." 
Proverbs10:3 Omonene tari gotiga omonyene oboronge abe nenchara; korende nigo akwanga okogania kw’abakori amabe. 
Proverbs10:4 Omonto ogokora emeremo namaboko amoro nigo akoba omotaka, korende amaboko are nomokia nigo akorenta obotenenku." 
Proverbs10:5 Omwana omomura ogosangereria chindagera engaki ye rigesa nigo are omong’aini, korende oyo okorara engaki eyio nigo akorenta obosooku." 
Proverbs10:6 Ogosesenigwa nigo gokobeera ase omotwe bw’omonyene oboronge, korende obochege nigo boichire ase emenwa y’abakori amabe." 
Proverbs10:7 Okoinyorwa kw’omonyene oboronge nigo gokorenta ogosesenigwa, korende erieta ri’omokori amabe nigo riragunde." 
Proverbs10:8 Omonto ore omong’aini ase enkoro yaye nigo anchete amachiko, korende oyogokwana amang’ana atagwenereti nigo arasirigwe," 
Proverbs10:9 Omonto okobwatia chinchera chi’oboronge nigo ararendwe buya, korende oyo okobwatia chinchera chimbe nigo aramanyekane." 
Proverbs10:10 Omonto ogosimera amaiso ase okogenka nigo akorenta emechando, na oyogokwana amang’ana atagwenereti nigo arasirigwe." 
Proverbs10:11 Omonwa bw’omonyene oboronge nigo onga buna ensoko y’obogima, korende obochege nigo boichire ase emenwa y’abakori amabe." 
Proverbs10:12 Obogechi nigo bokorenta eriomana, korende obwanchani nigo bogotuba ebibe bionsi." 
Proverbs10:13 Obong’aini nigo bokonyorekana ase omonwa bw’omonto omomanyi, korende oyo otari nokomanya nigo agwenerete aakwe enyimbo ase omogongo oye." 
Proverbs10:14 Abanto abang’aini nigo bakogacha chisemi, korende omonwa bw’omonto omoriri nigo okorenta ogosirigwa ang’e." 
Proverbs10:15 Obotenenku bw’omonto omonda nigo bore asare buna omochie ogiteire chindwaki, korende obotaka nabwo ogosirigwa kw’abataka." 
Proverbs10:16 Ogokora kw’omonyene oboronge nigo gokomoraa gochia ase obogima, korende okonyora kw’omokori amabe nigo gokomoraa gochia ase ebibe." 
Proverbs10:17 Omonto okoigwera ogokurerwa nigo abwatetie enchera egochia ase obogima, korende oyo okwanga koigwera ogokurerwa nigo agosira." 
Proverbs10:18 Omonto obisete okogecha ime yaye nigo agokwana oborimo korwa ase omonwa oye, na oyo ogotaaria obogenki nigo are omoriri." 
Proverbs10:19 Omonto ogokwana amang’ana amange tari komocha korenta ogosaria, korende oyo orendete omonwa oye nigo are omong’aini." 
Proverbs10:20 Oromeme rw’omonyene oboronge nigo ronga buna efeta echorire korende ebirengererio bi’omokori amabe tibigwenereti kende. 
Proverbs10:21 Ebikoba bi’omonyene oboronge nigo bikorenta amaya ase abanto abange, korende abariri nigo bagokwa, ekiagera baborirwe okomanya." 
Proverbs10:22 Ogosesenigwa kw’Omonene nigo gokorenta obotenenku, na ere tari komenta obororo ase ogosesenigwa okwo." 
Proverbs10:23 Omonto omoriri nigo agokora ebibe buna egosori, korende omonto ore nokomanya nigo agokora ayare ay’obong’aini." 
Proverbs10:24 Aya omokori amabe airogete namochere, korende aya omonyene oboronge aganetie naikeranigwe." 
Proverbs10:25 Ekero omwaga ekembugu‐mbugu egoeta, omokori amabe nigo agosira, korende omonyene oboronge nigo are oboroso boteneine bokong’u kare na kare." 
Proverbs10:26 Buna obokang’iti bokoba ase amaino na erioki rikoba ase amaiso, naboigo omonto omworo akoba ase abwo bakomotoma abakorere emeremo." 
Proverbs10:27 Okomoiroka Omonene nigo gokomenta amatuko amange ase obogima, korende emiaka y’omokori amabe nigo erakeeigwe." 
Proverbs10:28 Ogosemeria kw’abanyene oboronge nigo koraikeranigwe ase omogoko, korende okw’abakori amabe nigo korasire." 
Proverbs10:29 Enchera y’Omonene nigo ere egekengero egekong’u ase abanyene oboronge, korende nigo erasirie abagokora ebibe." 
Proverbs10:30 Omonyene oboronge takonyegerigwa, korende omokori amabe takogenderera komenya ase ense." 
Proverbs10:31 Omonwa bw’omonyene oboronge nigo ogokwana ay’obong’aini, korende oromeme rokong’ainereria ndosirigwe." 
Proverbs10:32 Ebikoba bi’omonyene oboronge nigo bimanyete gokwana amang’ana agwanchwa, korende omonwa bw’omokori amabe nigo ogokwana ayatagwenereti." 
Proverbs11:1 Ekerengero ki’oborito ki’obong’ainereria nigo kere okogechia ase Omonene, korende egi’ekeene nigo gekomogokia." 
Proverbs11:2 Ekero oboenenu bwachire, nobosooku nario bogocha, korende obong’aini nigo bokonyorekana ase abanto abaitongo." 
Proverbs11:3 Obwegenwa bw’abanyene oboronge nigo bokobaraa, korende obokorekanu bw’abatari abegenwa nigo bokobasiria." 
Proverbs11:4 Chinibo tichiri gokonya kende ase rituko ri’endamwamu, korende oboronge nigo boratoorie korwa ase amakweri." 
Proverbs11:5 Oboronge bw’omonto omoikeranu nigo borarongeyie chinchera chiaye, korende omokori amabe, obobe bwaye mbomoiyerie." 
Proverbs11:6 Oboronge bw’abanto bare ne chinkoro chindonge mbobatoorie, korende abasaria nigo barabwatwe nokogania kwabo okobe." 
Proverbs11:7 Ekero omokori amabe agokwa, ogosemeria kwaye nigo kogokwa amo nere, ee, aya abwo batamoirogeti Nyasae basemeretie nigo agosira." 
Proverbs11:8 Omonyene oboronge nigo akorusigwa ase emechando, erio omokori amabe osoa ase emechando ribaga riaye." 
Proverbs11:9 Oyo otamoirogeti Nyasae nigo agosiria abanto bande namang’ana agokwana korwa ase omonwa oye, korende goetera ase obong’aini abanyene oboronge mbatoorigwe." 
Proverbs11:10 Ekero abanyene oboronge bagendererete koba buya, abanto b’omochie nigo bakogoka, na ekero abakori amabe bagosira nigo bagoaka amariogi ’omochengo." 
Proverbs11:11 Goetera ase ogosesenia kw’abanyene oboronge omochie nigo okoimokererigwa igoro, korende goetera ase chinkwana chi’abakori amabe nigo okoiyerigwa." 
Proverbs11:12 Omonto ogochaya omonto onde, oyio nigo aborire obong’aini, korende omonto omong’aini nigo agokira‐kiri." 
Proverbs11:13 Omonto okona‐goeta‐etia obogenki nigo akoorokia obobisi, korende oyobwate omoika bw’obwegenwa tari koorokia obobisi." 
Proverbs11:14 Ase ogosemia okuya gotari, egesaku nigo gekogwa, korende ase abasemia abange abaya bare, oborendi obuya mboreo." 
Proverbs11:15 Omonto okwerua koba intenenera ase omonto omoao nigo agwesoyia ase emechando, korende oyo okwanga koba intenenera nigo erendete buya." 
Proverbs11:16 Omokungu omwesiki nigo akogenderera gosikwa botambe, korende abanto abaurereria abatindi nigo bakonyora chinibo ase chinguru." 
Proverbs11:17 Omonto ore namabera nigo akwerentera amaya, korende omonto omotindi nigo agwechanda ere omonyene." 
Proverbs11:18 Omokori amabe nigo akwenyorera eng’eria y’obong’ainereria, korende oyo ogosimeka oboronge nigo akwenyorera eng’eria y’ekeene." 
Proverbs11:19 Omonto ore omwegenwa ase oboronge bwaye nabe moyo, korende oyo okorigia obobe na kobobwatia nakwe." 
Proverbs11:20 Abanto abakorekanu ase chinkoro chiabo nigo bare okogechia ase Omonene, korende abare norogendo ororonge nigo bakomogokia." 
Proverbs11:21 Ekeene, Omonto omobe goika anyore egesusuro, korende oroiboro rw’abanyene oboronge ndotoorigwe." 
Proverbs11:22 Omokungu omonyakieni tari na semi nigo anga buna ebonyi y’etahabu ere ase chimioro chi’embeche. 
Proverbs11:23 Okogania kw’abanyene oboronge nigo gokorenta amaya, korende okw’abakori amabe nigo gokobarentera egesusuro."
