Proverbs11:24 Nare omonto okorua ebinto ebinge, ere nigo akomenteranigwa ebinge goetania, na nare oyonde ore omogoko otari korua, ere nigo akogenderera kona‐koremerwa." 
Proverbs11:25 Omonto okorua nomoyo bw’ogwancha natenenkigwe; nere oyokorua amache agokendia erang’o, nere naegwe amache agokendia erang’o yaye." 
Proverbs11:26 Omonto oria okwegachera endagera ase obong’iti, nigo akoragererigwa nabanto, korende ogosesenigwa nigo kore igoro ase omotwe bw’oria okoyeoonia." 
Proverbs11:27 Omonto ogokora omokia korigia ayare amaya, oyio nigo akonyora ayare amaya, korende oyokorigia ay’obobe, obobe nigo bokomonyora." 
Proverbs11:28 Omonto osemeretie chinibo chiaye nigo aragwe, korende abanyene oboronge mbareerete buna amato ’emete." 
Proverbs11:29 Omonto okorenta emechando ase enyomba yaye nigo aranyore ayare buna embeo bosa; oyore omoriri nigo arabe omosomba bw’omonto ore nenkoro y’obong’aini. 
Proverbs11:30 Okwama kw’omonyaboronge nigo kore omote bw’obogima, na omonto omong’aini nigo akong’usa emioyo y’abanto obakonya." 
Proverbs11:31 Onye omonyene oboronge okonyora eng’eria yaye aiga ase ense, Inee, omokori amabe na omonyabibe, abwo tibakoegwa eng’eria yabo goetania?" 
Proverbs12:1 Onde bwensi bwanchete amorokererio akomorongeyia, oyio nigo anchete chisemi, korende oyo ogechete ogokurerwa tabwati ebirengererio." 
Proverbs12:2 Omonto omuya nigo akonyora ogwancherwa korwa ase Omonene, korende oyogokora emeroberio y’obobe nigo akonacherwa ekina n’Omonene." 
Proverbs12:3 Ogotamoiroka Nyasae tigokoagacha omonto na komokong’ia, korende omori bw’omonyaboronge tokonyegerigwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Omokungu omuya nigo are egutwa y’omosacha oye, korende omokungu okorenta obosooku nigo are buna obogundo ase amauga ’omosacha oye." 
Proverbs12:5 Ebirengererio bi’omonyene oboronge nigo bire ebi’ekeene, korende ogosemia kw’abakori amabe nigo kore okw’obong’ainereria." 
Proverbs12:6 Amang’ana abakori amabe nigo akoboera na goitera amanyinga, korende aya abanyene oboronge bagokwana nigo agotooria abanto." 
Proverbs12:7 Abakori amabe nigo bagosirigwa, tibakobao naende, korende enyomba y’omonyene oboronge netenene bokong’u." 
Proverbs12:8 Omonto nigo agotogigwa buna obong’aini bwaye bore, korende oyore nebirengererio ebikorekanu nigo agochaywa." 
Proverbs12:9 Omonto omoitongo ogwekorera emeremo yaye omonyene nigo are omuya kobua omonto ogwekora koba omonene, korende tabwati endagera." 
Proverbs12:10 Omonyene oboronge nigo agochandekera obogima bwe chitugo chiaye, korende enkoro y’omokori amabe nigo ere entindi." 
Proverbs12:11 Omonto ogokora emeremo ase omogondo oye nanyore endagera enyinge, korende oyo okobwatia amang’ana atagwenereti, oyio tamanyeti kende." 
Proverbs12:12 Omokori amabe nigo akogania ebionga bi’abanto ababe, korende omori bw’omonyene oboronge nigo ogoseboka bwama." 
Proverbs12:13 Omonto omobe nigo agotegwa nogosaria gokorwa ase ebikoba biaye, korende omonyene oboronge natooreke korwa ase emechando." 
Proverbs12:14 Okwama kw’amang’ana omonto agokwana nigo gokomorentera amaya akomoisanekia, na emeremo y’amaboko ’omonto nigo ekomoiranera." 
Proverbs12:15 Enchera y’omonto omoriri nigo ekororekana ase amaiso aye ng’a nendonge, korende omonto omong’aini nigo akoigwera ogosemigwa." 
Proverbs12:16 Okobeea kw’omonto omoriri nigo gokomanyekana rimo rioka, korende omonto omong’aini nigo akoombia otuba obobe." 
Proverbs12:17 Omonto bwanchete gokwana ekeene nigo akoorokia oboronge, korende kirori bw’oborimo nigo agokwana ay’obong’ainereria." 
Proverbs12:18 Omonto nare otari korengereria aya agokwana, na amang’ana aye nigo anga buna omoro ogokeba, korende oromeme rw’omonto omong’aini nigo rokorenta amang’ana akogwenia." 
Proverbs12:19 Ebikoba bigokwana ekeene mbigenderere kobao botambe, korende oromeme rogokwana oborimo nigo rokobao ase engaki enke yoka." 
Proverbs12:20 Obong’ainereria nigo bore ase chinkoro chi’abwo bakoroberia amabe, korende abwo bakoroberia ay’omorembe nigo bakogera omogoko oba." 
Proverbs12:21 Amabe takobanyora abanyene oboronge, korende abakori amabe mbanyorwe namabe amange." 
Proverbs12:22 Ebikoba bigokwana oborimo nigo bire okogechia ase Omonene, korende abare abegenwa ase ogokora kwabo nigo bakomogokia." 
Proverbs12:23 Omonto omong’aini nigo akobisa aya amanyete, korende abariri nigo bakoraria oboriri korwa ase chinkoro chiabo." 
Proverbs12:24 Okoboko kw’omonto omonyamokia nkogambe, korende oyore omworo nabetererigwe akore emeremo emekong’u." 
Proverbs12:25 Ogoichana kore ase enkoro y’omonto nigo gokomoiyeria, korende ring’ana rigiya nigo rikomorentera omogoko." 
Proverbs12:26 Omonyene oboronge nigo are omoraai omuya bw’omogisangio oye, korende chinchera chi’abakori amabe nigo chikobatang’ana chiabasiria." 
Proverbs12:27 Omonto omworo tari koiyeka nonya neki arusirie ase orotwari, korende omokia nigo ore enibo ere nengencho enene ase omonto." 
Proverbs12:28 Ase enchera y’oboronge obogima mboreo, na amakweri tari ase enchera eyio." 
Proverbs13:1 Omwana omong’aini nigo akoigwera amorokererio a ise, korende oyore omochayi tari gwancha ogokurerwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Okwama kw’amang’ana omonto agokwana nigo gokomorentera amaya, korende okogania kw’abatari abegenwa nigo kore okw’obotindi." 
Proverbs13:3 Omonto orendete omonwa oye, oyio nigo arendete obogima bwaye, korende oyogokwana amang’ana ateriteti, goika asirigwe." 
Proverbs13:4 Omonto omworo nigo are omosaneri, korende takonyora kende, korende oyore nomokia nigo agoisanekigwa." 
Proverbs13:5 Omonyene oboronge nigo agechete oborimo, korende omokori amabe nigo agokora ay’okogechia na ay’obosooku." 
Proverbs13:6 Oboronge nigo bokorenda oyore norogendo ororonge, korende ebibe nigo bikomosiria omokori amabe." 
Proverbs13:7 Omonto nare ogwekora ng’a nomonda are, korende nigo are omotaka, na oyonde bwekora ng’a nomotaka are, korende nigo are omonda mono." 
Proverbs13:8 Embooria y’obogima bw’omonto omonda nechinibo chiaye, korende omonto omotaka tari kogoswa nonde." 
Proverbs13:9 Oborabu bw’abanyene oboronge nigo bokomoreka nomogoko, korende etaya y’abakori amabe nerime." 
Proverbs13:10 Oboenenu nigo bokorenta okoamererania, korende baria bakoigwera ogosemigwa nigo bakoba nobong’aini." 
Proverbs13:11 Enibo enyorire ase obwango ase enchera y’obobe nigo egosira, korende ey’ekonyorekana ase okoyekorera emeremo nementekane." 
Proverbs13:12 Egesemeirie kogiatebanire nigo gekogera enkoro yarwara, korende ogosemeria kogwaikeranigwe nigo kore omote bw’obogima." 
Proverbs13:13 Omonto ogochaya Ring’ana nigo arasirigwe narirorio, korende oyokoiroka ogochika nanyore eng’eria y’obuya." 
Proverbs13:14 Amorokererio ’omonto omong’aini nigo are ensoko y’obogima, ekiagera nigo agokonya omonto tabwatwa noboreba bw’amakweri." 
Proverbs13:15 Okomanya okuya nigo gokorenta ogwancherwa, korende enchera y’abatari abegenwa nigo ekoraa gochia ase obosiru." 
Proverbs13:16 Omonto omong’aini nigo agokora emeremo yaye ne chisemi, korende omonto omoriri nigo akoraria oboriri bwaye." 
Proverbs13:17 Omotomwa otari omwegenwa nigo akogwa ase emechando, korende oyore omwegenwa nigo akogwenia." 
Proverbs13:18 Omonto okwanga koigwera amorokererio akomorongeyia, obotaka na obosooku nigo biramonyore, korende oyokoigwera ogokurerwa nanyore amasikani." 
Proverbs13:19 Okogania gwaikeranigwe nigo kore ogwansu ase omoyo, korende okoonchoka gotiga amabe, okwo nigo kore okogechigwa ase abariri." 
Proverbs13:20 Omonto ogotaara nabanto abang’aini nigo arabe omong’aini, korende oyo ogosanga nabariri nanyorwe namabe." 
Proverbs13:21 Amang’ana amabe nigo agotunyana abanyene ebibe, korende abanyene oboronge nabaegwe amaya." 
Proverbs13:22 Omonto omuya nigo agotiga omwando ase abana baye, na ase abachokoro baye, korende obotenenku bw’abanyene ebibe nigo bogacheire abanyene oboronge." 
Proverbs13:23 Oboremo oboyia bw’omonto omotaka nigo bokwama endagera enyinge, korende enyinge nigo egosiara‐siarerwa yasira ase engencho y’obobe." 
Proverbs13:24 Omonto okorina omwana oye ekeranya nigo amogechete, korende oyo omwanchete tari gotebana okomorongeyia." 
Proverbs13:25 Omonyene oboronge nigo abwate endagera ekomoisanekia, korende enda y’omokori amabe nigo ekogenderera kogania." 
Proverbs14:1 Omokungu omong’aini nigo akoagacha mwaye, korende oyore omoriri nigo agotagora mwaye na maboko aye." 
Proverbs14:2 Omonto omoirogete Omonene nigo akobwatia enchera y’oboronge, korende oyo omochayete nigo are omokorekanu ase chinchera chiaye." 
Proverbs14:3 Aya omoriri agokwana nigo are enyimbo y’oboenenu, korende aya abang’aini bagokwana nigo akobarenda." 
Proverbs14:4 Ase chiombe chi’okorema chitari, ebiage nigo bikoba bosa, korende ase chinguru chie chiombe chire, endagera enyinge nigo ekonyorekana." 
Proverbs14:5 Kirori ore omwegenwa tari gokwana oborimo, korende oyotari omwegenwa nigo agokwana oborimo bwoka." 
Proverbs14:6 Omonto ore omochecheria narigia obong’aini, takobonyora, korende chisemi nigo chikonyorekana ase omonto ore omwango ase okomanya." 
Proverbs14:7 Karue ase omonto omoriri, ekiagera tokonyora obong’aini korwa ase aya agokwana." 
Proverbs14:8 Obong’aini bw’omonto ore nokomanya nigo bokomokonya omanya buna chinchera chiaye chire, korende oboriri bw’abanto abariri nigo bokobang’aina." 
Proverbs14:9 Abanto abariri nigo bagokora echeche nebibe, korende abanyene oboronge nigo bagwancherana barabwo ase barabwo." 
Proverbs14:10 Enkoro enyene nigo emanyete obororo bwaye, na omonto omoao takonyara gwatanerwa omogoko bw’enkoro eyio." 
Proverbs14:11 Enyomba y’omokori amabe nesirigwe, korende ekegutu ki’omonyene oboronge nkegenderere gosesenigwa." 
Proverbs14:12 Enchera nere ekororekana ase omonto ng’a nendonge, korende omoerio bw’enchera eyio namakweri." 
Proverbs14:13 Nonya omonto ogoseka, enkoro yaye nabo eranyare koba nomoichano, na omoerio bw’omogoko oyio nobororo." 
Proverbs14:14 Omonto ogure korwa ase okwegena kwaye, nabo araisaneke nokwama gwe chinchera chiaye, na omonto omuya nigo agoisaneka ase omoyo oye." 
Proverbs14:15 Oyotamanyeti amange nigo akwegena kera ring’ana, korende oyomanyete nigo akorigereria aase agochia." 
Proverbs14:16 Omonto omong’aini nigo akwoboa na kwerenda korwa ase amabe, korende omoriri nigo akoba omoremu ase ogokora amabe." 
Proverbs14:17 Omonto okogechigwa bwango nigo agokora ay’oboriri, na omonto okoroberia ay’obobe nigo akogechwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Abatamanyeti amange, oboriri nigo bokoba omwando obo, korende abare nokomanya nigo bakoegwa chisemi chiaba egutwa yabo." 
Proverbs14:19 Abanto ababe goika bekumbe ase amasio ’abanto abaya, na abakori amabe bekumbe ase ebiita bi’abanyene oboronge." 
Proverbs14:20 Omonto omotaka nigo agechire nonya nase abanto bamwabo, korende omonda nigo abwate abasani abange." 
Proverbs14:21 Omonto ogochaya omonto onde nigo agokora ebibe, korende oyokororera abachandegete amabera nasesenigwe." 
Proverbs14:22 Inee! Abwo bakoroberia ayare amabe tibari gosira? Na abwo bakoroberia amaya, Inee, tibari konyora amabera na ekeene?" 
Proverbs14:23 Ebitoki nigo bikonyorekana korwa ase emeremo ende yonsi, korende ogokwana amang’ana amasa, okwo nigo gokorenta okoremerwa." 
Proverbs14:24 Obonda nigo bore egutwa y’abanto abang’aini, korende oboriri bw’abanto abariri nigo bore oboriri bwoka." 
Proverbs14:25 Kirori ogokwana ekeene nigo agotooria obogima, korende oyogokwana oborimo nigo are omosigaani." 
Proverbs14:26 Oyo okomoiroka Omonene nigo are nogosemeria gw’okorendwa bokong’u, na abana baye mbanyore aase bagotamera." 
Proverbs14:27 Okomoiroka Omonene nakwo ensoko y’obogima eragere omonto eatanane korwa ase amareba ’amakweri. 
Proverbs14:28 Obonge bw’abanto nabwo bore obonene bw’omoruoti, korende ase abanto bare abake omogambi obo nigo agosirigwa." 
Proverbs14:29 Omonto otari kogechigwa bwango nigo abwate okomanya okonene, korende oyo okoberoroka bwango nigo agokinia oboriri bwaye." 
Proverbs14:30 Enkoro y’omogoko nigo ere obogima bw’omobere, korende ribero nigo rire obogundo bw’amauga." 
Proverbs14:31 Omonto ogokorera omotaka bore nigo agochaya Omotongi bw’omotaka oyio, korende oyore omwororo ase oria oremeire nigo asigete Omotongi." 
Proverbs14:32 Omokori amabe nigo agotugutwa riarua ase engencho y’ogokora kwaye okobe, korende omonyene oboronge nigo agokwa ore nogosemeria." 
Proverbs14:33 Obong’aini nigo bomenyete ase enkoro y’omonto ore nokomanya, korende ase enkoro y’omoriri nigo bwemanyekanetie obonyene." 
Proverbs14:34 Oboronge nigo bogokinia egesaku, korende ebibe nigo bire obosooku ase abanto bande bonsi." 
Proverbs14:35 Omosomba ogokora emeremo nobong’aini nigo agwancherwa nomoruoti, korende endamwamu y’omoruoti nigo ekoba igoro ase oria okomorentera obosooku." 
Proverbs15:1 Okoiraneria kw’obwororo nigo kogokendia endamwamu, korende amang’ana ’obotindi nigo agoseegeta endamwamu." 
Proverbs15:2 Oromeme rw’omonto omong’aini nigo rogokwana aye chisemi chingiya, korende emenwa y’abariri nigo ekoumora ay’oboriri." 
Proverbs15:3 Amaiso ’Omonene nigo aroche ande onsi, nigo arigereretie ababe amo nabaya." 
Proverbs15:4 Oromeme rw’obokanyeku nigo rore omote bw’obogima, korende orw’obokorekanu nigo rogotandora enkoro." 
Proverbs15:5 Omoriri nigo agochaya amorokererio a ise akomorongeyia, korende oyokoigwera ogokurerwa nigo akong’ainia." 
Proverbs15:6 Enyomba y’omonyene oboronge nigo ere enene, korende ebitoki bi’abakori amabe nigo biichire nemechando." 
Proverbs15:7 Ebikoba bi’abang’aini nigo bikoraria chisemi, korende chinkoro chi’abariri tichiri gokora bo." 
Proverbs15:8 Ekeng’wanso ki’abakori amabe nigo kere okogechia ase Omonene, korende ogosaba kw’abare ne chinkoro chindonge nigo gokomogokia." 
Proverbs15:9 Enchera y’omokori amabe nigo ere okogechia ase Omonene, korende nigo anchete oyo okobwatia oboronge." 
Proverbs15:10 Egesusuro ekenene nkemonyore oyotigire enchera y’oboronge, na oyo ogechete ogokurerwa goika akwe." 
Proverbs15:11 Aase abakure ne chioora chi’obosiru nigo bire maiso marore ase Omonene. Inee! Tari mono kobua chinkoro chia mwanyabanto? 
Proverbs15:12 Omonyacheche tancheti omonto okomokurera, tagwancha kogenda ase abang’aini." 
Proverbs15:13 Enkoro ere nomosasoko nigo ekorenta omogoko ase obosio, korende onye enkoro ere nomoichano, omoyo nigo okoba nobororo." 
Proverbs15:14 Enkoro y’omonto ore nokomanya nigo ekorigia chisemi, korende emenwa y’abariri nigo ekwerageria oboriri." 
Proverbs15:15 Amatuko onsi ay’omonto ochandegete nigo are amabe, korende oyore nenkoro y’omosasoko nigo akogenderera koba nomoyega o botambe." 
Proverbs15:16 Mbuya koba nebinto ebike amo nokomoiroka Omonene, kobua koba ne chinibo chinyinge amo nemechando." 
Proverbs15:17 Mbuya koria chinyeni more nobwanchani, kobua koria chinyama chie chiombe chinoru na mogechaine." 
Proverbs15:18 Omonto ore nenkoro ekoberoroka bwango nigo agoseegeta eriomana, korende oyore omwororo nigo agokanya eriomana." 
Proverbs15:19 Enchera y’omonto omworo nigo enga buna orobago rw’amagwa, korende ey’abanyene oboronge nigo ere enene erongeete." 
Proverbs15:20 Omwana omong’aini nigo akogokia ise, korende oyore omoriri nigo agochaya ng’ina." 
Proverbs15:21 Oboriri nigo bore omogoko ase omonto otabwati okomanya, korende omonto omong’aini nigo akobwatia chinchera chi’oboronge." 
Proverbs15:22 Ase ogosemania gotari, emeroberio nigo egosareka, korende ase abaesmia abange abaya bare nigo egokinigwa." 
Proverbs15:23 Omonto nigo akogokera okoiraneria okuya gokorua ase omonwa oye, ne ring’ana rigokwanwa ase engaki egwenerete, nigo rire rigiya mono." 
Proverbs15:24 Enchera y’omonto omong’aini nigo egotiira gochia ase obogima, erinde omonto oyio tabaisa kogenda inse agwo aase abakure." 
Proverbs15:25 Omonene nigo agotagora enyomba y’omonto omoenenu, korende arenda chimbebe chi’omoboraka." 
Proverbs15:26 Ebirengererio ebibe nigo bire okogechia ase Omonene, korende amang’ana amaya nigo akomogokia." 
Proverbs15:27 Omonto ore ne ribero ase okorigia ebitoki ase enchera etari endonge nigo akorenta emechando ase enyomba yaye, korende oyo ogechete riaaki nabe moyo." 
Proverbs15:28 Enkoro y’omonyene oboronge nigo ekorengereria aya ekoiraneria, korende emenwa y’abakori amabe nigo ekoumora ayare amabe." 
Proverbs15:29 Omonene nigo are aare korwa ase abakori amabe, korende nigo akoigwa ogosaba kw’abanyene oboronge." 
Proverbs15:30 Amaiso are nomosasoko nigo akogokia enkoro, na amang’ana amaya akorentwa nigo akogokia amauga." 
Proverbs15:31 Omonto ogotegerera na koigwera ogokurerwa gokorenta obogima namenye amo nabanto abang’aini. 
Proverbs15:32 Omonto okwanga ogokurera, oyio nigo agochaya obogima bwaye omonyene, korende oyokoigwera ogokurerwa nigo akoba nokomanya." 
Proverbs15:33 Okomoiroka Omonene, nakwo amorokererio akorenta obong’aini, na oboitongo nigo bogotang’anera ogosikwa." 
Proverbs16:1 Mwanyabanto nigo agokora emeroberio ase enkoro yaye, korende aya oromeme rokoiraneria nigo akorwa ase Omonene." 
Proverbs16:2 Chinchera chionsi chi’omonto nigo chikororekana asare omonyene ng’a neching’ikeranu, korende Omonene nigo akorenga omoika o mwanyabanto." 
Proverbs16:3 Motweke Omonene emeremo yao, na emeroberio yao nesesenigwe." 
Proverbs16:4 Omonene okorire kera egento ase engencho gete, nonya nabakori amabe ase engencho ye rituko ri’emechando." 
Proverbs16:5 Kera omonto ore omoenenu nigo are okogechia ase Omonene; omonto oyio goika aegwe egesusuro. 
Proverbs16:6 Ase amabera, na obwegenwa, embooria yaakanirwe ase engencho y’ebibe, na ase okomoiroka Omonene omonto nigo akweatanana korwa ase amabe." 
Proverbs16:7 Ekero chinchera chi’omonto chiagokirie Omonene, Omonene nigo agokora nonya nababisa b’omonto oyio babwatana nere." 
Proverbs16:8 Mbuya koba nebinto ebike amo noboronge kobua koba ne chinibo chinyinge chikonyorwa ase oborianania. 
Proverbs16:9 Ase enkoro yaye ime omonto nigo akoroberia chinchera chiaye, korende Omonene nere okoraa amatambokero aye." 
Proverbs16:10 Chinkwana chinchenu nchigwenerete koba ase ebikoba bi’omoruoti, na omonwa oye tomocha ekero akonacha ebina." 
Proverbs16:11 Ekerengero ki’oborito gi’ekeene nigo gekorwa ase Omonene, na ebirengero bionsi bire ase chisaro nigo bire ogokora kwaye." 
Proverbs16:12 Ekero abaruoti bagokora amabe nigo bakorenta ay’okogechia, ekiagera goetera ase oboronge ekerogo ki’obogambi nigo kegokong’igwa." 
Proverbs16:13 Amang’ana amaronge agokwanwa nigo akogokia omoruoti, nere nigo abanchete abwo bagokwana ay’oboronge." 
Proverbs16:14 Endamwamu y’omoruoti nigo enga buna abatomwa bakorenta amakweri, korende omonto omong’aini nigo akoyekanya." 
Proverbs16:15 Omosasoko ore ase obosio bw’omoruoti nigo ore obogima, na ogwancherwa kwaye nigo konga buna amare agotwa embura y’okwamia endagera." 
Proverbs16:16 Konyora obong’aini, ayio namaya kobua konyora etahabu, na okoba nobomanyi nigo kogwenerete kobua koba nefeta." 
Proverbs16:17 Ogweatanana korwa ase amabe, eyio nero enchera enene y’abanyene oboronge; na omonto orendete enchera yaye, nigo arendete obogima bwaye." 
Proverbs16:18 Oboenenu nigo bogotang’anera ogosirigwa, na omoika bw’obomwenu nigo ogotang’anera okogwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Nigo ere buya koba nomoyo bw’oboitongo na komenya amo nabataka kobua gwatanana ebisakorwa amo nabaenenu. 
Proverbs16:20 Omonto okoigwera Ring’ana nanyore amaya, na oyo okomosemeria Omonene nasesenirie." 
Proverbs16:21 Omonto ore omong’aini ase enkoro yaye narokwe omomanyi, ne chinkwana chingiya nigo chikomenta chisemi." 
Proverbs16:22 Obong’aini nigo bore ensoko y’obogima ase omong’aini, korende oboriri nigo bore egesusuro ase oboriri." 
Proverbs16:23 Enkoro y’omonto omong’aini nigo ekworokereria omonwa oye ong’aiinie, naende yamenta chisemi ase ebikoba biaye." 
Proverbs16:24 Amang’ana akogokia nigo anga obooke bokorwa ase richoe, nigo are amansu ase omoyo naende nigo akogwenia omobere." 
Proverbs16:25 Enchera nere ekororekana ase omonto ng’a nendonge, korende omoerio bw’enchera eyio namakweri." 
Proverbs16:26 Okogania kw’omonto nigo gokomobetereria gokora emeremo, ekiagera nigo aganetie gweisanekia ere omonyene." 
Proverbs16:27 Omonto otagwenereti kende nigo akona‐koremora amabe, ne chinkwana chiaye nigo chinga omorero ogosamba." 
Proverbs16:28 Omonto omonyaborimo nigo akona‐gotaara‐taaria amang’ana akorenta eriomana, na omogenki nigo akorenta obobisa ase abanto banchaine." 
Proverbs16:29 Omonto omotindi nigo akoebereria omonto onde omoraa gochia ase enchera embe. 
Proverbs16:30 Omonto ogosimera ebioge bi’amaiso aye nigo akoroberia amabe, na oyo ogotakuna omonwa oye nigo agoikerania amabe." 
Proverbs16:31 Chimbuche chire ase omotwe negutwa y’obonene, eyio nigo ekonyorekana ase enchera y’oboronge." 
Proverbs16:32 Omonto otari omwango ase okogechigwa nigo abuete omorwani etuoni, na oyomanyete kogambera enkoro yaye nigo abuete oyo okobua omochie na koyoira." 
Proverbs16:33 Obomera nigo bokorutwa ase esaro ime, korende Omonene nere ogochora oyo bokogwera." 
Proverbs17:1 Nigo ere buya konyora ritonge eriomo ri’obokima na koba nobotoereru kobua kobeera ase enyomba eichire endagera y’omoyega ere neriomana. 
Proverbs17:2 Omosomba omong’aini nagambere omwana bw’omonene oye, oyio ogokora amang’ana ’obosooku, naende naatananerwe omwando amo nabana b’omonene oye." 
Proverbs17:3 Efeta nigo egoteemerwa ase enyongo ekoyenyititora, na etahabu yateemerwa ase omorero ekebemberi, korende Omonene nere okorenga chinkoro." 
Proverbs17:4 Omokori amabe nigo agotegerera oigwera amang’ana ’obokorekanu, na omonyaborimo nigo akoigwera chinkwana chi’ogosiria." 
Proverbs17:5 Omonto ogochecheria omotaka nigo agochaya Omotongi bw’omotaka oyio, na oyokogokera emechando yanyorire abande, takomocha konyora egesusuro." 
Proverbs17:6 Abachokoro nigo bare egutwa ye chisokoro chiabo, na obonene bw’abana nigo bore abaibori babo." 
Proverbs17:7 Amang’ana amaya tagwenereti omoriri, ne chinkwana chi’oborimo tichigwenereti omogambi nonya ng’ake." 
Proverbs17:8 Riaaki nigo ringa buna rigena rikomeka‐meka ase amaiso ’omonto oria okoriegwa, ekiagera nigo akorengereria ng’a kende gionsi ararikorere nigo riramorentere ebisio." 
Proverbs17:9 Omonto okwabera aya akomocherwa nigo akorigia obwanchani, korende oria okona‐koinyora nigo agosarania abasani." 
Proverbs17:10 Omonto ore nobomanyi nigo akweorokereria korwa ase ogotogonyerwa okomo, kobua omonto omoriri otari kweorokereria korwa ase ogoakwa ebiranya rigana erimo." 
Proverbs17:11 Omonto omosaria nigo akonakorigia gokora amabe oka, natomerwe omonto omotindi amoe egesusuro." 
Proverbs17:12 Mbuya omonto aumerane neng’iti entindi ekorokwa edubu yaurirwe chimanwa chiaye, kobua koumerana nomonto omoriri ase oboriri bwaye." 
Proverbs17:13 Omonto ogoakana amabe ase amaya, obobe tibokorua ase enyomba yaye." 
Proverbs17:14 Ogochaka eriomana nigo konga buna amache aigoreirwe, ase ayio tiga amang’ana ’eriomana atarabucha." 
Proverbs17:15 Omonto ogwanchera omokori amabe ng’a nomonyakeene, na oria okonachera omonyakeene ekina, abwo bonsi nigo bare okogechia ase Omonene." 
Proverbs17:16 Inee! Chibesa omonto omoriri abwate ase okoboko kwaye agochia kogora obong’aini nechia ki, na ere tari nokomanya?" 
Proverbs17:17 Omosani nigo akoba nobwanchani ase chingaki chionsi, na oyomino nigo aiboire akonye ase engaki y’emechando." 
Proverbs17:18 Omonto oremeire chisemi nigo akobwatana amaboko na kwerua koba intenenera ase omonto onde. 
Proverbs17:19 Omonto bwanchete eriomana nigo anchete ogosaria, na oyokoimokereria egesieri kiaye igoro nigo akwerigeria ogosirigwa." 
Proverbs17:20 Omonto ore omokorekanu ase enkoro yaye tari goseseneka, na oyobwate oromeme rw’ogosiria nigo akonyorwa nemechando." 
Proverbs17:21 Oyo oiboire omwana omoriri nigo akoba nomoichano, na ise omwana oyio tari koba nomogoko." 
Proverbs17:22 Enkoro ere nomogoko nigo ekogwenia buna eriogo, korende omoichano ore ase enkoro nigo okwomia emeseto y’amauga." 
Proverbs17:23 Omokori amabe nigo akoegwa riaaki bobisi, erinde asarie chinchera chi’ekina." 
Proverbs17:24 Omonto ore nokomanya nigo akorigereria gochia ase obong’aini, korende omonto omoriri nigo akorigereria gochia ase chinsinyo chi’ense." 
Proverbs17:25 Omwana omomura omoriri nigo agoichania ise, naende nigo akorenta obororo ase ngina omoiborete." 
Proverbs17:26 Tari buya korua egesusuro ase omonto omoronge, boigo tari buya goaka abanto abasike ase engencho y’oboronge bwabo." 
Proverbs17:27 Omonto omong’aini nigo akwerita ase amang’ana agokwana, na omonto ore nokomanya nigo abwate omoika bw’oboremereria." 
Proverbs17:28 Nonya nomonto omoriri, ekero agokira, nigo akobarwa ng’a nomong’aini are; gakomumeka omonwa oye nigo akorokwa omong’aini." 
Proverbs18:1 Omonto bweanchete omonyene, nigo akweganeria ayaye oka; nigo akwanga otindia nonya nase onsi ayare amaya." 
Proverbs18:2 Omoriri tari kogokigwa nay’obong’aini, korende nigo anchete gokwana ayare ase enkoro yaye omonyene." 
Proverbs18:3 Ekero omokori amabe agocha, ogochaywa nigo kogocha boigo, na ogochaywa okwo nigo gokorenta obosooku." 
Proverbs18:4 Amang’ana akorua ase omonwa bw’omonto nigo anga buna amache e chindiba, ensoko y’obong’aini nigo enga buna amache ’orooche akominyoka." 
Proverbs18:5 Tari buya gwanchereria omokori amabe na gosaria ekina ki’omonyene oboronge. 
Proverbs18:6 Chinkwana chi’omoriri nigo chikorenta eriomana, na omonwa oye nigo okorangeria ogoakwa." 
Proverbs18:7 Omonwa bw’omoriri nigo okomorentera ogosirigwa, ne chinkwana chiaye nigo chikoba omoeto asare." 
Proverbs18:8 Amang’ana ’omogenki nigo are buna endagera enyansu; naro nigo agotirimboka gochia ase enkoro ime. 
Proverbs18:9 Omonto ogokora emeremo yaye nobworo nigo are oyomwabo omosaria. 
Proverbs18:10 Erieta ri’Omonene nigo rire orwaki orokong’u; omonyene oboronge nigo akorotamera oba orendire buya. 
Proverbs18:11 Omonto omonda nigo akorengereria ng’a obotenenku bwaye nigo bonga buna omochie omokong’u, naende buna orwaki orotambe gochia igoro rokomorenda." 
Proverbs18:12 Oboenenu bw’enkoro y’omonto nigo bogotang’anera ogosirigwa, na oboitongo nigo bogotang’anera ogosikwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Omonto okoiraneria ring’ana atarariigwa buya, obwo noboriri asare, na nigo akonyora obosooku." 
Proverbs18:14 Omoika bw’oboremu nigo okogera omonto oremereria ogochandeka, korende omoika ore nomoichano ning’o orayoremererie." 
Proverbs18:15 Enkoro y’omonto omong’aini nigo ekonyora chisemi, na ogoto kwaye nigo kogochirigia." 
Proverbs18:16 Ebiegwa bi’omonto nigo bikomoigorera enchera na komobeka amo nabanto abanene. 
Proverbs18:17 Omonto gekwaneire ritang’ani nigo akororekana ng’a nekeene agokwana, korende omonto omoao gachire, nigo akoorokia amang’ana ayio buna are." 
Proverbs18:18 Obomera nabwo bogokoora okoamererania na gwatanana abanene abwo bakoamererania. 
Proverbs18:19 Nigo ere aakong’u koirania ase obosani omonto omocheirwe, kobua koirania omochie omokong’u, na eriomana nigo ringa buna emekorogoto y’ebiita bi’orwaki orokong’u." 
Proverbs18:20 Omonto nigo agoisanekia enda yaye nogokwana kw’omonwa oye, akoigotigwa nokwama kw’omonwa oye." 
Proverbs18:21 Amakweri na obogima nigo bire ase chinguru chi’oromeme, na abwo banchete korokorera emeremo mbanyore okwama kwaye." 
Proverbs18:22 Omonto onyorire omokungu omuya, oyio onyorire ekeegwa ekiya na ay’ogwancherwa korwa ase Omonene." 
Proverbs18:23 Ekero omonto omotaka agokwana nigo agosorora, korende omonda nigo akoiraneria ase obotindi." 
Proverbs18:24 Omonto obwate abasani abange nigo akwerentera emechando, korende nare omosani bw’ekeene baigwanaine kobua oyomwabo." 
Proverbs19:1 Omonto omotaka ore omwegenwa nigo are omuya kobua oyore omong’ainereria ase chinkwana chiaye naende omoriri. 
Proverbs19:2 Tari buya omonto aborwe okomanya ase omoyo oye, na oyore namagoro amaango, nigo agosira." 
Proverbs19:3 Oboriri bw’omonto nigo bokomosiria ase enchera yaye, erio enkoro y’omonto oyio yagechigwa ase Omonene." 
Proverbs19:4 Omonto omonda nigo akonyora abasani abange, korende omotaka nigo akwangwa nomosani oye." 
Proverbs19:5 Kirori bw’oborimo takomocha konyora egesusuro, na omonto ogokwana oborimo takomocha konyora egesusuro kiaye." 
Proverbs19:6 Abanto abange nigo bakorigia ogwancherwa korwa ase abanene b’obogambi, na abange nigo bakoba abasani b’omonto okorua ebiegwa nomoyo omorabu." 
Proverbs19:7 Omonto omotaka nigo akogechwa nabanto bamwabo bonsi, gose tikori ogokumia ng’a abasani baye bamotigire. Nigo egenete amang’ana abo, ko aba bosa asare." 
Proverbs19:8 Omonto okonyora obong’aini, oyio nere obwanchire obogima bwaye, na oyo okorenda obomanyi bwaye nanyore amaya." 
Proverbs19:9 Kirori bw’oborimo takomocha konyora egesusuro, na oyo ogokwana oborimo goika asire." 
Proverbs19:10 Tari buya omonto omoriri amenye ase obogima bw’okwegokia; onye ere bo, tari buya omosomba agambere abagambi nonya ng’ake." 
Proverbs19:11 Obong’aini bw’omonto nigo bokogera oremereria okogechigwa, na okoombia okomocha nigo kore obonene bwaye." 
Proverbs19:12 Ekero omoruoti abeire nekeririanda nigo anga buna endo ekoruma, korende ogwancherwa kwaye nigo konga buna riime rire ase obonyansi." 
Proverbs19:13 Omwana omomura omoriri nigo akorentera ise amabe, na omokungu okona‐kwomana nigo anga buna amatoima ’embura akona‐gotonya." 
Proverbs19:14 Chinyomba ne chinibo nigo chire omwando abana bakonyora korwa ase abaise korende omokungu omong’aini nigo are ekeegwa korwa ase Omonene. 
Proverbs19:15 Obworo nigo bokorentera omonto chitoro chindito, na omonto buna oyio goika abe nenchara." 
Proverbs19:16 Omonto orendete amachiko, oyio nigo arendete obogima bwaye, korende oyo otari korenda chinchera chiaye nigo arakwe." 
Proverbs19:17 Omonto okororera omotaka amabera, oyio nigo akorua singo ase Omonene, na Omonene namoakane ase ogokora okwo kwaye." 
Proverbs19:18 Orokereria omwana oo omomura ase okomorongeyia ekero ogosemeria koreo, gose tobaisa komoganeria amakweri." 
Proverbs19:19 Omonto ore nekeririanda, ekeene goika anyore egesusuro; oise komotanga kagokora bobe nigo okomoseegeta." 
Proverbs19:20 Igwera ogosemigwa naende bwanche okworokererigwa, igo nario oranyore obong’aini boragokonye ase chingaki chire bosio." 
Proverbs19:21 Emeroberio emenge nere ase enkoro y’omonto, korende nonya naboigo emeroberio y’Omonene nero eratenene." 
Proverbs19:22 Okogania kw’omonto nigo gokworokia obuya bwaye, na omonto omotaka nigo are omuya mono kobua omonyaborimo." 
Proverbs19:23 Okomoiroka Omonene nigo gokorenta obogima, na omonto ore nokoiroka okwo nigo agoisaneka, gose amabe takomonyora." 
Proverbs19:24 Omonto omworo nigo akobeka okoboko kwaye ase esani y’endagera, gose tagokoimokia gocha ase omonwa oye." 
Proverbs19:25 Aka omonto omonyacheche, na abanto batamanyeti amange mbeorokererie korwa ase ayio; togonyera omonto ore nokomanya, ere nigo aranyore chisemi." 
Proverbs19:26 Omwana ore omotindi ase ise na ogoseria ng’ina, nigo akorenta obosooku na ogochaya." 
Proverbs19:27 Omwana one, onye tokoigwera amorokererio nigo orasire korwa ase amang’ana akorenta chisemi." 
Proverbs19:28 Kirori omobe nigo agochecheria oboronge, na omonwa bw’omokori amabe nigo ogworerete ebibe." 
Proverbs19:29 Ekina ki’abanyacheche nigo kenachire, na abariri mbang’wanigwe ebiranya ase emegongo yabo." 
Proverbs20:1 Edivai nigo ekorenta echeche, ekenyugwa egetindi nigo gekorenta eriomana; na onde bwensi otari gokianga nigo akoborwa obong’aini." 
Proverbs20:2 Okogosa kw’omoruoti nigo konga buna okoruma kw’endo, na oyo okomogechia oba nendamwamu, oyio nigo akogera obogima bwaye bosirigwe." 
Proverbs20:3 Nigo are amasikani ase omonto ogwetanga korwa ase eriomana, korende kera omonto ore omoriri nigo akona‐kwomana." 
Proverbs20:4 Omonto omworo tari korema ase engaki egwenerete, na ekero rigesa riaikire, nigo akogenda gosuma, takonyora gento." 
Proverbs20:5 Emeroberio ere ase enkoro y’omonto nigo enga buna amache are ase endiba, korende omonto ore nokomanya nigo akoyabucha korwa aroro." 
Proverbs20:6 Abanto abange nigo bakweraria ng’a nabaya bare, korende ning’o oranyare konyora omonto omwegenwa bori?" 
Proverbs20:7 Omonto omonyene oboronge obwatetie chinchera chindonge, abana baye mbasesenigwe korwa nyuma yaye." 
Proverbs20:8 Omoruoti ogoikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye gi’ekegambero nigo agoserebania amabe onsi namaiso aye. 
Proverbs20:9 Ning’o oranyare goteba, “Nasibekire ase enkoro yane; nachenekire korwa ase ebibe biane”?" 
Proverbs20:10 Ebirengero bi’oborito, na ebi’obonge, bire ara kabere, nigo bire okogechia ase Omonene." 
Proverbs20:11 Nonya nomwana nigo amanyekanete ase ogokora kwaye, gose orogendo rwaye nigo rorabe ororonge na orw’ekeene." 
Proverbs20:12 Ogoto gokoigwa, na eriso rikorora, bionsi bibere n’Omonene obikorete." 
Proverbs20:13 Tobaisa gwancha chitoro, obaise koba omotaka; ramokia amaiso ao, naye nonyore endagera enyinge." 
Proverbs20:14 Omogori egento nigo agoteba: “Eke tigeisaini gento”, na ekero akeirire bwetogia." 
Proverbs20:15 Etahabu nere, na amagena amange e rigori rinene, korende ebikoba bigokwana ay’obong’aini nigo binga buna amagena e rigori rinene akomeka‐meka." 
Proverbs20:16 Ira eanga y’omonto oyo bwerure koba intenenera ase omonto omoao, ira ebi abwate, ekiagera bwerure ase engencho y’omonto otamanyekaneti." 
Proverbs20:17 Endagera ekonyorwa ase enchera y’obong’ainereria, nigo ekoba enyansu ase omonto, korende nyuma yaye omonwa bw’omonto oyio nigo ogoichorwa nomokenye." 
Proverbs20:18 Emeroberio nigo egoikeranigwa goetera ase ogosemia okuya na gokorwana esegi, oyerwanie nogosemania okuya." 
Proverbs20:19 Omonto okona‐goeta‐etia obogenki nigo akoorokia obobisi, ase ayio tobaisa kobwatana nomonto otari kwerita ase amang’ana aye." 
Proverbs20:20 Omonto oraragererie ise, gose ng’ina, oyio etaya yaye nerimigwe ekero ki’omosunte ekerima." 
Proverbs20:21 Oise koba ne ribero ase okonyora omwando bwango korwa omochakano, omoerio oye tori gosesenigwa." 
Proverbs20:22 Tobaisa goteba, “Goika ng’akane amabe nakoreirwe.” Oganye Omonene, nere oragokonye." 
Proverbs20:23 Ebirengo bi’oborito bire ara kabere nigo bire okogechia ase Omonene, na ekerengero gi’okoreng’anania ki’oborimo nigo kere ekebe." 
Proverbs20:24 Omonene nere okoraa chinchera chi’omonto, ase ayio naki omonto aranyare komanya chinchera chiaye?" 
Proverbs20:25 Nigo ekoba omoeto ase omonto karabe omwango ase ogwatanana egento kebe egechenu, na nyuma yaye oba okorengereria aya arierete eira." 
Proverbs20:26 Omoruoti ore omong’aini nigo akomanya abakori amabe obaatanana, erio obatiringera inse namagoro e chigari." 
Proverbs20:27 Omoika ore ase omonto, noro etaya y’Omonene; nigo ekomoreka na komanya amang’ana onsi are ime y’enkoro y’omonto." 
Proverbs20:28 Obuya na obwegenwa, nabio bikorenda omoruoti, na ekerogo kiaye ki’obogambi nigo kegokong’igwa namabera." 
Proverbs20:29 Chinguru nachio chire obonene bw’abamura, korende chimbuche nigo chire obwari bw’abanto abagotu." 
Proverbs20:30 Obororo bw’ogoakwa nenyimbo nigo bogosibia ebibe, boigo ogoakwa kw’ebiranya nigo kogosoa ase enkoro ime kwayesibia." 
Proverbs21:1 Enkoro y’omoruoti nigo enga buna orooche rore ase okoboko kw’Omonene; na Omonene nigo akomoraa gochia aande onsi buna aganetie. 
Proverbs21:2 Kera enchera y’omonto nigo ekororekana ng’a neya boronge asare, korende Omonene nigo akorenga chinkoro." 
Proverbs21:3 Ogokora oboronge na ekeene, ayio naro Omonene agwancha kobua ebing’wanso." 
Proverbs21:4 Amaiso are noboenenu, na enkoro y’obomwenu, ebio nigo bire etaya y’abakori amabe, bikobaraa bakora ebibe." 
Proverbs21:5 Emeroberio y’omonto omong’aini nigo ekomorentera ebitoki ebinge, korende omonto okoayerera nigo akogenderera koremerwa." 
Proverbs21:6 Chinibo chikonyorwa ase oromeme rw’obong’ainereria, nigo chire buna omooki okoera bwango, na buna amareba akorenta amakweri." 
Proverbs21:7 Obourereria bw’abakori amabe mbobasirie barueo, ekiagera bangire gokora ayare ay’oboronge." 
Proverbs21:8 Enchera y’omomochi nigo ere enkorekanu, korende ogokora kw’oyore nenkoro endonge nigo kore okoronge." 
Proverbs21:9 Mbuya komenya ase ekenunchi kia irongo, kobua komenya ase enyomba amo nomokungu omonyariomana." 
Proverbs21:10 Omoyo bw’omokori amabe nigo okogania gokora ebibe, na omonto oyio tari kororera omonto onde amabera." 
Proverbs21:11 Ekero omonto omonyacheche akonyora egesusuro, oria otamanyeti amange nigo akoba omong’aini; na ekero omonto omong’aini akworokererigwa nigo akonyora chisemi." 
Proverbs21:12 Omonyene oboronge nigo akorigereria enyomba y’omokori amabe; ere nigo akoiyeria abakori amabe inse basire. 
Proverbs21:13 Omonto oria ogosieka amato aye ng’a taigwa ekerero ki’omotaka, nere ekero ararere takoigugwa." 
Proverbs21:14 Ekeegwa gekoruegwa bobisi nigo kegokendia endamwamu, ne riaaki ribisire ase eanga ime nigo rigokendia ekeririanda." 
Proverbs21:15 Ekero ekeene giakorirwe, ayio nigo akoba omogoko bw’abanyene oboronge, korende ase abakori amabe nomoichano." 
Proverbs21:16 Omonto ogotiga enchera y’obomanyi, oyio nabeere ase omosangererekano bw’abanto bakwete." 
Proverbs21:17 Omonto bwanchete emegoko goika abe omotaka; na oyobwanchete kwegokia nedivai na amaguta takoba omonda. 
Proverbs21:18 Omokori amabe nigo agosoa ase emechando y’omonyene oboronge, oba embooria yaye, na oyo otari omwegenwa oba embooria y’oyore nenkoro endonge." 
Proverbs21:19 Mbuya komenya ase ense y’erooro, kobua komenya nomokungu omonyariomana, naende omonyandamwamu." 
Proverbs21:20 Omonto omong’aini nigo akorenda chinibo chi’engencho enene amo namaguta ase enka yaye, korende omoriri nigo agochiria bobe chiaera." 
Proverbs21:21 Omonto okorigia oboronge na obwororo, oyio nanyore obogima, na amasikani, na oboronge." 
Proverbs21:22 Omonto omong’aini nigo akoumokera omochie ore nabarwani esegi chituoni oyobua, erio otagora chindwaki chiria abanto abwo basemeretie." 
Proverbs21:23 Omonto orendete omonwa oye, na oromeme rwaye, oyio nigo etangerete emechando." 
Proverbs21:24 Omonto ore omoenenu na omwerori, na ogokora kwaye kore okw’obomwenu, nigo akorokwa “Omonyacheche”." 
Proverbs21:25 Okogania kw’omonto omworo nigo gokomoita okwa, ekiagera nigo akwanga gokora emeremo namaboko aye." 
Proverbs21:26 Omonto omong’iti nigo akweganeria kera egento botambe, korende omonyene oboronge nigo akorua na tari kong’itia." 
Proverbs21:27 Ekeng’wanso ki’omokori amabe nigo kere okogechia, Inee, tari bobe mono goetania ekero agokerua nebirengererio ebibe?" 
Proverbs21:28 Kirori bw’oborimo nasire, korende omonto ogotegerera nagenderere gokwana." 
Proverbs21:29 Omokori amabe nigo agokong’ia obosio bwaye, korende oyore nenkoro endonge nigo akorenda orogendo rwaye." 
Proverbs21:30 Obong’aini tibori, gose okomanya, gose ogosemia, biranyare koamererania n’Omonene." 
Proverbs21:31 Chibarasi nigo chikobekwa ang’e kogenda korwana esegi, korende obobui nigo bokorua ase Omonene." 
Proverbs22:1 Erieta rigiya nigo rigwenerete gochorwa kobua chinibo chinyinge, na okomanyekana okuya nigo kobuete efeta na etahabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Omonda na omotaka nigo bamenyete ase obogima obomo; Omonene nere omotongi o bonsi. 
Proverbs22:3 Omonto omong’aini nigo akororera emechando korwa aare, bwebisa, korende oyotamanyeti amange nigo akogenderera gochia bosio, oumerana nero, erio ochandeka." 
Proverbs22:4 Abare abaitongo bamoirogete Omonene nigo bakonyora obotenenku, na ogosikwa, na obogima." 
Proverbs22:5 Amagwa na emeeto nigo bitegire ase chinchera chi’abanto abakorekanu, korende oyo orendete omoyo oye goika eatanane korwa ase birobio." 
Proverbs22:6 Orokereria omwana abwatie enchera egwenerete, na ekero abeire omogotu takoyetiga." 
Proverbs22:7 Omonto omonda nigo akogambera omotaka; na omonto ogosaba aegwe singo nigo akoba omosomba bw’oria omoa singo. 
Proverbs22:8 Oyogosimeka obobe, nagese ogosareka, na enyimbo y’endamwamu yaye nigo erasire bosa." 
Proverbs22:9 Omonto obwate eriso ri’amabera nasesenigwe, ekiagera bwatananeire omotaka endagera." 
Proverbs22:10 Seria omonyacheche, na eriomana ndiere, ee, eriomana na ogochaya mbisire." 
Proverbs22:11 Omonto bwanchete enkoro echenegete, na ebikoba biaye bigokwana ayare ay’obuya, omoruoti nabe omosani oye." 
Proverbs22:12 Amaiso ’Omonene nigo arigereretie na korenda oyore nokomanya, korende nigo akoonchorana na gosaria amang’ana ’abatari abegenwa." 
Proverbs22:13 Omonto omworo nigo agoteba, “Endo nere isiko! Nigo ndabaise gochia goiterwa ase chinchera.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Omonwa bw’omokungu omotayayi nigo ore eirima entambe, na omonto onde bwensi Omonene agechigwe nere goika agwe ase eirima eyio." 
Proverbs22:15 Oboriri nigo bosiberanirie ime ase enkoro y’omwana, korende ekeranya gekorongeyia amamocho nigo gekoborusieo." 
Proverbs22:16 Ere oyo ogokorera abataka bobe ase ogwetenenkia ere omonyene, gose okorua ebiegwa ase abanda, goika aremerwe." 
Proverbs22:17 Tega ogoto kwao oigwe amang’ana abanto abang’aini bagokwana, na obeke amorokererio aane ime ase enkoro yao." 
Proverbs22:18 Nigo erabe buya korayarende ime yao, erinde abe ang’e ase ebikoba biao koyakwana." 
Proverbs22:19 Rituko ria rero nakoyamanyirie, ee, nakoyamanyirie, erinde omosemerie Omonene." 
Proverbs22:20 Inee! Tinkorikereti amang’ana amanene ay’ogosemia na ay’amorokererio? 
Proverbs22:21 Ayio nakworokererie ayare ay’oboronge na ay’ekeene, erinde okwane ay’oboronge na ekeene ase abwo bagotomete." 
Proverbs22:22 Tobaisa koura omotaka ekiaye, ekiagera are omotaka, gose agwo ase egeita tobaisa gokorera bobe omonto ochandegete." 
Proverbs22:23 Omonene narwanerere abataka, na abwo bakobaurereria Omonene nabasirie." 
Proverbs22:24 Tobaisa gokora obosani nomonto ore omwango ase okobeea gose tobaisa kogenda amo nomonto ore nekeririanda. 
Proverbs22:25 Oise kobwatana noyio, nigo orenarie chinchera chiaye, erio obwatwe ase oboreba." 
Proverbs22:26 Tobaisa koba oyomo bw’abanto abwo bakobwatana amaboko, gose bakwerua koba intenenera ase chisira chi’abanto bande." 
Proverbs22:27 Nobaise kourwa oborere bwao okorarera, ekiagera tobwati gento ogoakana." 
Proverbs22:28 Tobaisa gotumana orobebe orokoro orwo chisokoro chiao chiabegete. 
Proverbs22:29 Oise korora omonto omanyete emeremo yaye buya, oyio natenene ase amasio ’abaruoti, tagokorera abanto bande bonsi emeremo." 
Proverbs23:1 Ekero ogoikaransa koria endagera amo nomogambi, orengererie mono ng’a ning’o ore ase obosio bwao." 
Proverbs23:2 Onye kore nenchara, obeke omoyio ase ring’orong’oche riao." 
Proverbs23:3 Tobaisa kogania chindagera chiaye chinyansu, ekiagera nigo chire echi’obong’ainereria." 
Proverbs23:4 Tobaisa gwechanda mono ng’a obe omonda; tobaisa gosemeria obong’aini bwao omonyene. 
Proverbs23:5 Tobaisa korigereria ebio bire bosa, ekiagera obonda nigo bogochoma chimbaba, bwairuruka buna ensoti ekoiruruka yarimera igoro." 
Proverbs23:6 Tobaisa koria endagera y’omonto ogokomogorera, gose tobaisa kogania chindagera chiaye chinyansu." 
Proverbs23:7 Buna omonto akorengereria ime ase enkoro yaye, naboigo are. Nigo akogotebia, “Karie na konywa”, korende enkoro yaye tegwancheti." 
Proverbs23:8 Ayio nigo aragere oroke endagera eria kwaria, naende amang’ana ao amaya asire bosa." 
Proverbs23:9 Tobaisa gokwana amang’ana ao ase omonto omoriri aigwete, ekiagera nigo arachaye obong’aini bw’amang’ana ao." 
Proverbs23:10 Tobaisa gotumana orobebe orokoro, gose totumana osoe ase emegondo ye chintakana," 
Proverbs23:11 ekiagera Omobooria obo nigo are ne chinguru, ere nachirwanerere akorwanie aye." 
Proverbs23:12 Karue enkoro yao oigwe amorokererio, na amato ao aigwe amang’ana e chisemi." 
Proverbs23:13 Tobaisa gotiga korongeyia omwana oo; koramoake ekeranya, tagochia gokwa." 
Proverbs23:14 Ee, koramoake ekeranya nigo oratoorie obogima bwaye korwa aase abakure." 
Proverbs23:15 Omwana one, onye enkoro yao ekoba nobong’aini, rirorio enkoro yane nigo eragoke." 
Proverbs23:16 Ekero ebikoba biao birakwane amang’ana amaronge, nigo ndabe nomogoko ime yane." 
Proverbs23:17 Enkoro yao tebaisa koba ne ribero ase abanyene ebibe, korende aye ogenderere komoiroka Omonene kera rituko." 
Proverbs23:18 Ekeene, eng’eria nekare bosio, na ogosemeria kwao tikogosira bosa." 
Proverbs23:19 Aye omwana one, igwa na obe nobong’aini, naende orende enkoro yao ebwatie enchera endonge." 
Proverbs23:20 Tobaisa koba ase egati y’abagotinda nedivai, gose ase egati y’abakoria chinyama bobe," 
Proverbs23:21 ekiagera abagotinda, na abaria bobe, mbabe abataka; na obogondereria bwe chitoro nigo boraboyie omonto amachanchabe." 
Proverbs23:22 Igwera iso okoiborete, na tobaisa gochaya nyoko ekero agotire." 
Proverbs23:23 Gora ekeene, na tobaisa gokeoonia; boigo gora obong’aini, na amorokererio, na obomanyi." 
Proverbs23:24 Ise bw’omonto ore omonyene oboronge nigo akoba nomogoko omonene. Ere oyoiboire omwana omomura omong’aini nagokigwe nere. 
Proverbs23:25 Bagokie iso na nyoko, tiga oria okoiborete akogokere." 
Proverbs23:26 Omwana one, ing’a enkoro yao, na amaiso ao tiga agokere chinchera chiane." 
Proverbs23:27 Omokungu omotayayi nigo anga engoro entambe gochia inse, na omokungu bw’omonto onde nigo anga egesima ekenyerere." 
Proverbs23:28 Ee, omokungu oyio nigo akoboera buna omouri, nigo akomentekania abasaria ase egati ya mwanyabanto." 
Proverbs23:29 Ning’o oyio ore nobobe? Ning’o oyio oichanete? Ning’o oyio okorwana na kwerera? Ning’o oyio oakirwe chingoma chitagwenerete aakwe? Ning’o oyio obariiretie amaiso? 
Proverbs23:30 Nabanto abwo bakona‐konywa edivai ase chingaki chintambe, na abwo bakona‐korigia konywa edivai yochoganirie neyende." 
Proverbs23:31 Tobaisa korigereria edivai koyabariirire, ekero ekobera ase egekombe na koirana inse ng’ora ng’ora." 
Proverbs23:32 Omoerio nigo ekoroma buna eng’iti na korasa buna rirubi. 
Proverbs23:33 Amaiso ao nigo ararore amang’ana amageni, na ebirengererio biao mbibe ebikorekanu." 
Proverbs23:34 Nigo orabe buna omonto oraire ase egati‐gati y’enyancha, gose buna omonto ore ase omote omotambe igoro okoirwa esiororia." 
Proverbs23:35 Aye nigo oratebe, “Nigo bang’agete bororo, korende tinyigweti bobe; nigo bang’wanetie bokong’u, korende tinyigweti kende. Indi ngocha koboka? Ngende korigia eyende.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Aye tobaisa koba ne ribero ase abakori amabe, gose togania koba amo nabarabwo," 
Proverbs24:2 ekiagera ebirengererio biabo nigo bikoroberia ay’ogosiria, na ebikoba biabo nigo bigokwama ayakorenta emechando." 
Proverbs24:3 Enyomba nigo ekoagachwa nobong’aini na yakong’igwa goetera ase okomanya. 
Proverbs24:4 Ase chisemi chire, chiero chi’enyomba eyio nigo chigoichorigwa nebinto ao ao bi’engencho enene, na ebi’okogokia." 
Proverbs24:5 Omonto omong’aini nigo are ne chinguru, na oyore nokomanya nigo akoorokia okobua okonene." 
Proverbs24:6 Ase ogosemia kw’obong’aini kore, nonyare korwana esegi, na ase abasemia abange abaya bare, obobui nigo bokonyorekanao." 
Proverbs24:7 Obong’aini nigo bore egento kere aare korwa ase omonto omoriri; ere tari komaanora omonwa oye agwo ase egeita. 
Proverbs24:8 Ere oyokoroberia gokora amabe narokwe omonto okorenta emechando. 
Proverbs24:9 Ebirengererio bi’oboriri nebibe, na omonyacheche nigo are okogechia ase abanto." 
Proverbs24:10 Korarose na gotang’ang’a ase engaki y’obokong’u rirorio aye nigo ore omoreu otari na nguru. 
Proverbs24:11 Tooria abwo bakoirwa gochia gokwa; irania abwo bakoirwa gochia goitwa. 
Proverbs24:12 Oise goteba, “Intwe titwamanyete amang’ana aya”, Inee, oyio okorenga chinkoro tamanyeti ayio? Oyio origereretie omoyo oo nigo amanyete ayio, na nigo araakane kera omonto buna ogokora kwaye kore." 
Proverbs24:13 Aye omwana one, karie obooke, ekiagera nobuya; obooke bogotonya korwa ase eriana nigo bore obwansu asore." 
Proverbs24:14 Manya ng’a obong’aini buna obwo mboganeirie ase omoyo oo, korabonyore, rirorio nonyore amaya ase amatuko agochi‐gocha, na ogosemeria kwao tikogosira bosa." 
Proverbs24:15 Aye omokori amabe, tobaisa koboera omonyene oboronge ase amenyete, tosaria aase aye agotimokera." 
Proverbs24:16 Omonyene oboronge nigo akogwa ara gatano na kabere, naende oboka, korende abakori amabe nigo bagosira ekero banyorire emechando." 
Proverbs24:17 Tobaisa kogoka ekero omobisa oo agure, na enkoro yao tebaisa gosasoka ekero agochirwe." 
Proverbs24:18 Omonene nigo ararore okogoka okwo agechigwe, erio aonchore endamwamu yaye erue ase omobisa oo." 
Proverbs24:19 Aye togechigwa ase engencho y’abagokora amabe, gose tobaisa koba ne ribero ase abakori amabe." 
Proverbs24:20 Abagokora amabe tibakonyora amaya ase amatuko agochi‐gocha; etaya y’abakori amabe nerimigwe. 
Proverbs24:21 Aye omwana one, omoiroke Omonene, oiroke na omoruoti, tobaisa gosang’anana nabasaria." 
Proverbs24:22 Abwo nigo baranyore emechando ya mobosokano, na ning’o oranyare komanya ogosirigwa kwabo?" 
Proverbs24:23 Amang’ana aya boigo nay’abang’aini. Tari buya gwanchereria abanto ekero ebina bikonachwa. 
Proverbs24:24 Oyo ogotebia omonto omomochi, “Aye tori nokomocha”, oyio abanto mbamoragererie, na abanto b’ebisaku nigo baramogeche." 
Proverbs24:25 Korende abwo bakoa omomochi egesusuro mbanyore amaya amo nogosesenigwa okuya. 
Proverbs24:26 Omonto okoiraneria amairanerio amaronge nigo anga okonyunyuntwa kw’ebikoba. 
Proverbs24:27 Roisia emeremo yao isiko onsi, naende kora emeremo yao ya mogondo eere, na nyuma y’ayio oagache enyomba yao." 
Proverbs24:28 Tobaisa koba kirori o bosa mamincha y’omonto onde, na tobaisa kong’ainereria nebikoba biao." 
Proverbs24:29 Tobaisa goteba, “Goika nainche imokorere buna ankorera; goika imoakane buna ogokora kwaye kore.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ngaeta ase omogondo bw’omonto omworo, na ase omogondo bw’emesabibu bw’omonto otari nobong’aini." 
Proverbs24:31 Nkarora omogondo oyio omerire amagwa, na amasa ayotubire, na amagena aagacheire chindwaki chiaye konya atagokire." 
Proverbs24:32 Nkayorigereria na korengereria mono igoro y’omogondo oyio, nkanyora amorokererio aya:" 
Proverbs24:33 Okorara ake, na ogosundoka ake, na okoringania amaboko ake," 
Proverbs24:34 goika obotaka bogochere buna omouri, na okoremerwa kogochere buna omorwani esegi." 
Proverbs25:1 Eye nero emereng’anio ya Sulemani, eyio abanto ba Hezekia omoruoti bw’Abayuda, basangereretie." 
Proverbs25:2 Nigo bore obonene bwa Nyasae kobisa amang’ana; korende nobonene bw’abaruoti gokora obotuki ase amang’ana. 
Proverbs25:3 Buna koreng’ana igoro ere aare mono etatukwe emanywe, na ayare ase ense inse boigo, ne chinkoro chi’abaruoti tichigotukwa chimanywe." 
Proverbs25:4 Rusia amabiria korwa ase efeta, na omoturi nanyore efeta akoroiseria egekorero ekiya." 
Proverbs25:5 Rusia abakori amabe korwa ase obosio bw’omoruoti, erio ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene nigo keragenderere gokong’igwa noboronge." 
Proverbs25:6 Tobaisa gwetang’anania ase obosio bw’omoruoti, gose tobaisa kwebeka aase abanene bare." 
Proverbs25:7 Nigo erabe buya mono ekero oratebigwe, “Inchuo gocha aa”, kobua gokoiranigwa gochia goikaransa nyuma ribaga ri’abanto abasike." 
Proverbs25:8 Toba omwango kogenda ase ekegambero. Inee! Inki orakore ase omoerio, ekero omonto oyio gwasoerete arakobue nobe nobosooku?" 
Proverbs25:9 Onye aye omonyene kobwate amang’ana nomonto onde, kwana nere, korende tobaisa koorokia obobisi bw’omonto omoao." 
Proverbs25:10 Oise koboorokia, na omonto onde aise koigwa ayio, nigo aragosookie, na erieta riao risareke kogenderera botambe." 
Proverbs25:11 Ring’ana rigokwanwa ase enchera egwenerete nigo ringa buna amatunda amororo amaya mono abekire ase egekabu keroisirie korwa ase efeta. 
Proverbs25:12 Omonto omong’aini ogokurera oyokoigwera nigo are buna ebonyi ne chisonoi biroseirie chitahabu. 
Proverbs25:13 Omotomwa ore omwegenwa nigo are ase abwo bakomotoma buna amache amakendu ase engaki ye rigesa, ekiagera nigo akogera emioyo yabo yaba emeyia." 
Proverbs25:14 Omonto ogwetogia ng’a nare nomoyo omorabu, ko tari korua ebiegwa, nigo anga amare na omwaga bitari korenta embura." 
Proverbs25:15 Oboremereria nigo bokwororobia omogambi, na oromeme rw’obwororo nigo rokobuna riuga." 
Proverbs25:16 Onye kwanyorire obooke, karie ekerengo kegoisaine; oise kogeetania nigo oraboroke." 
Proverbs25:17 Amagoro ao tanara kona‐kogenda ase enyomba y’omosani oo, nigo arabaise korosa naye, erinde akogeche." 
Proverbs25:18 Omonto okoba kirori bw’oborimo ase omonto onde nigo anga buna enungu y’esegi, gose omoro, gose ensara enyonge." 
Proverbs25:19 Ogosemeria omonto otari omwegenwa ase engaki y’emechando, nigo enga buna erino ribunegete gose okogoro goteng’eretie." 
Proverbs25:20 Omonto ogotera amatera ’omogoko ase omonto obwate enkoro ere nobororo nigo anga buna okorusia eanga ase engaki y’obokendu gose kobeka egento ekeroro ase eriote. 
Proverbs25:21 Onye omobisa oo ore nenchara, moe endagera arie; onye ore nerang’o, moe amache anywe." 
Proverbs25:22 Igo nobeke omorero bw’amakara ase omotwe oye, na Omonene nakoe eng’eria yao." 
Proverbs25:23 Omwaga okogusa korwa sugusu nigo okorenta embura, naboigo nomonto omogenki akorenta okobeeana." 
Proverbs25:24 Mbuya komenya ase ekenunchi kia irongo igoro, kobua komenya ase enyomba amo nomokungu omonyariomana." 
Proverbs25:25 Amang’ana amaya akorentwa korwa ase ense y’aare nigo anga buna amache amakendu ase omonto ore nerang’o. 
Proverbs25:26 Omonyene oboronge okorua ribaga ase omokori amabe nigo anga buna orooche rore netintira na buna ensoko yasarekire. 
Proverbs25:27 Tari buya koria obooke obonge, na abwo bakwerigeria obonene, obonene bwabo nigo borabe bosa." 
Proverbs25:28 Omonto otamanyeti kwegambera omonyene nigo anga buna omochie chindwaki chiaye chiatagoirwe. 
Proverbs26:1 Buna koreng’ana obokendu bogocha ase engaki y’egurugura, gose embura egotwa ase engaki ye rigesa, naboigo ere bobe omonto omoriri konyora amasikani." 
Proverbs26:2 Buna enchiro ekona‐koong’anya, na buna egesingororo gekoiruruka, naboigo na okoragereria gotari nengencho gotaikerere oria oragererigwe." 
Proverbs26:3 Ekeranya nigo kere ase ogoaka ebarasi, na ekeokio ase okoraa etigere, naboigo nenyimbo ere ase ogoaka omogongo bw’omonto omoriri." 
Proverbs26:4 Tobaisa koiraneria omonto omoriri buna oboriri bwaye bore, nigo orabaise koba omoriri buna are." 
Proverbs26:5 Moiranerie omonto omoriri buna oboriri bwaye bore, tabaisa gwekaga ng’a nomong’aini are." 
Proverbs26:6 Omonto ogotoma amang’ana ase okoboko kw’omonto omoriri, oyio nigo akobutora amaboko aye omonyene bwerentera emechando." 
Proverbs26:7 Omoreng’anio ogokwanwa nomonwa bw’omoriri nigo onga buna omonto egesegora, okogoro kwaye gotari gokora emeremo." 
Proverbs26:8 Omonto okoa omoriri amasikani, nigo anga buna oyokoruta omobuko ore nebinto bie rigori rinene ase etui y’amagena." 
Proverbs26:9 Omoreng’anio okorwa ase omonwa bw’omonto omoriri nigo onga buna rigwa rikobeta okoboko kw’omonto otindire amarwa. 
Proverbs26:10 Omonto omanyete emeremo nigo agwekorera emeremo emiya, korende oyore omoriri nigo akorika onde bwensi ogoeta, na emeremo yasareka." 
Proverbs26:11 Omonto omoriri okoiranera gokora oboriri bwaye nigo anga esese ekoiranera amaroki aye enyene. 
Proverbs26:12 Oise korora omonto ogwekora omong’aini, ogosemeria nkore ase omonto omoriri kobua ase oyio." 
Proverbs26:13 Omonto omworo nigo agoteba, “Endo nere isiko, ee, endo nere ase chinchera chi’omochie.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Omonto omworo nigo akonakweoncha‐onchora buna egesieri gekona‐koonchorwa ase chimbata gesibeire. 
Proverbs26:15 Omonto omworo nigo akobeka okoboko kwaye ase esani y’endagera, orosa gokobogoria gocha ase omonwa oye." 
Proverbs26:16 Omonto omworo nigo akwerora ng’a nomong’aini are abuete abanto batano na babere barakwane amang’ana are nengencho. 
Proverbs26:17 Omonto orenge goeta na gwesoyia ase eriomana ritarenge eriaye nigo anga buna oyo okobwata amato ’esese. 
Proverbs26:18 Omonto okong’aina omonto onde, na nyuma yaye omotebia, “Negosori yoka nare gokora asore,” oyio nigo anga buna ebarimo ekoruta ebigenga bi’omorero, ne chinsara, na amakweri." 
Proverbs26:19  
Proverbs26:20 Ase chinko chitari, omorero nigo okorima, naboigo nase omogenki atari, eriomana nigo rigosira." 
Proverbs26:21 Omonyariomana ogoseegeta amariomana nigo anga buna amakara akogenderera koyia, gose chinko chikogera omorero ogenderera gwoka." 
Proverbs26:22 Amang’ana omonto omoitania nigo are buna endagera enyansu egotirimboka gochia ase enda inse. 
Proverbs26:23 Omonto obwate amang’ana amansu ase ebikoba biaye, korende ore nobobe ase enkoro yaye, nigo anga buna egekorero ki’amaroba giatekire keoomire nefeta." 
Proverbs26:24 Omonto omogechi nigo akobisa ase ebikoba biaye, obong’ainereria bore ase enkoro yaye." 
Proverbs26:25 Ekero agokwana amang’ana are amansu, tobaisa komwegena, ekiagera nabwate ay’okogechia atano na abere, ase enkoro yaye ime." 
Proverbs26:26 Naisa gotuba okogecha kwaye nobong’ainereria, obokayayu bwaye goika bomanyekane nomosangererekano bwonsi." 
Proverbs26:27 Omonto okorema eirima, nere omonyene oragwe imeo; na omonto ogoturunkania rigena, nere omonyene rirairanere rimogwere." 
Proverbs26:28 Omonto ore noromeme rogokwana oborimo, nigo akogecha abanto abwo amang’ana aye achandire bobe, na omonwa ogokwana amang’ana ay’okweansia nigo okorenta ogosirigwa." 
Proverbs27:1 Tobaisa gwetogeria rituko ri’ankio, ekiagera tomanyeti aya rituko rikorenta." 
Proverbs27:2 Aye omonyene tobaisa gwetogia, korende tiga omonto onde agotogie; tiga omonto omoao agotogie, korende tari ebikoba biao omonyene." 
Proverbs27:3 Rigena neririto na omokenye nomorito, korende okogechigwa kw’omonto omoriri nigo kore okorito kobua ebinto ebio bibere." 
Proverbs27:4 Endamwamu nentindi, na ekeririanda nigo kegosiria, korende ning’o oranyare koremereria ribero?" 
Proverbs27:5 Ogotogonyera kwa maiso marore nigo kore okuya kobua obwanchani bobisegete. 
Proverbs27:6 Ogoakwa gokorwa ase omosani nigo kore okw’obwegenwa, korende okonyunyunta kw’omobisa nigo kore okw’obong’ainereria." 
Proverbs27:7 Omonto oigotete nigo agochaya nonya nobooke, korende oyore nenchara nonya nendagera ere endoro nigo ekomwansera." 
Proverbs27:8 Omonto ogotama korwa bwoye nigo anga buna enyoni ekong’anya korwa ase egeswa kiaye. 
Proverbs27:9 Amaguta akweakwa na amanukato nigo bikogokia enkoro, naboigo bore obwororo bw’omosani oyo okorua ogosemia okuya." 
Proverbs27:10 Tobaisa kweba omosani oo, na omosani o iso; rituko kwanyorire emechando togenda ase enka y’oyomino. Mbuya koba nomogisangio ase engaki eyio, kobua koba noyominto omenyete aare." 
Proverbs27:11 Omwana one, kabe nobong’aini na ogokie enkoro yane, erio nario ndanyore ring’ana nkoiraneria omonto ogonchaya." 
Proverbs27:12 Omonto omong’aini nigo akororera emechando aare bwebisa, korende oyotamanyeti amange nigo akogenderera gochia bosio oumerana nero, erio ochandeka." 
Proverbs27:13 Ira eanga y’omonto oyo bwerure koba intenenera ase omonto omoao, ira ebi abwate, ekiagera bwerure ase engencho y’omonto otamanyekaneti." 
Proverbs27:14 Omonto okoboka mambia chuni oaka eriogi gosesenia omogisangio oye, oyio nabarerwe okoragererigwa." 
Proverbs27:15 Omokungu omonyariomana nigo anga buna amatoima ’embura akona‐gotonya. 
Proverbs27:16 Omonto ogotanga omokungu buna oyio, okwo nigo konga ogotangwa kw’omwaga gose okobwata amaguta nokoboko gw’okorio." 
Proverbs27:17 Ekioma nigo kegotieria ekioma kende, naboigo nomonto agotieria omonto onde." 
Proverbs27:18 Omonto okorenda omoko narie okwama kw’omoko oyio, na oyio okorenda omonene oye, oyio nanyore ogosikwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Ekero okorigereria ase amache ime nigo okorora obosio bwao, naboigo nebirengererio bi’enkoro y’omonto bikororekana ase omonto onde." 
Proverbs27:20 Buna aase abakure na embeera bitari goisaneka, naboigo namaiso a mwanyabanto atari goisaneka." 
Proverbs27:21 Buna koreng’ana efeta egoteemerwa ase enyongo ekonyititora, na etahabu ase omorero ekebemberi, naboigo omonto agoteemwa na komanyekana ase ogosikwa kwaye." 
Proverbs27:22 Omonto omoriri nomobekerania ase ekonu ime, omoswageranie amo nobori, oboriri bwaye tibogosira." 
Proverbs27:23 Manya buya chingencho chie ching’ondi ne chimbori chiao, na orende riicho riao buya." 
Proverbs27:24 Obonda tibori kogenderera kobao botambe, na egutwa y’obogambi teri kogenderera kobao ekiaare ase ekiaare." 
Proverbs27:25 Ekero obonyansi obokoro bwasirire, na oboyia nigo bokomera, na ebimeri bi’ebitunwa biasangererigwa," 
Proverbs27:26 ching’ondi nigo chikonachwa amarionya akoroisigwa chianga, ne chimbori chiaoonigwa ase okogora omogondo." 
Proverbs27:27 Erio nonyore amabeere e chimbori agoisaine aye na abanto b’enka yao, boigo nase abasomba bao abaiseke." 
Proverbs28:1 Abakori amabe nigo bagotama nonya onde tari kobabwatia, korende abanyaboronge nigo bare abaremu buna chindo chinsae." 
Proverbs28:2 Ekero ense yasaririe nigo ekoba nabagambi abange, korende eye ebwate abanto bare nobong’aini na okomanya, obogambi nigo bokogenderera gotenena bokong’u." 
Proverbs28:3 Omonto omotaka ore nokobua ogokorera abataka bande bobe ase okobaurereria, nigo anga buna embura enyinge egosaria chindagera." 
Proverbs28:4 Abanto batigire amachiko nigo bagotogia abakori amabe, korende abarendete amachiko nigo bakoamererania nabwo." 
Proverbs28:5 Abakori amabe tibamanyeti ayare amaronge, korende abwo bakomorigia Omonene nigo bamanyete onsi." 
Proverbs28:6 Omonto omotaka okobwatia oboronge nigo are omuya kobua omonda ore omokorekanu. 
Proverbs28:7 Omwana orendete amachiko nigo are omong’aini, korende oyore omogisangio bw’abaria bobe nigo akorenta obosooku ase ise." 
Proverbs28:8 Omonto okomenta chinibo chiaye ase enchera etari ey’ekeene ase okogania ebitoki, oyio nigo agochisangereria chibe echi’omonto okororera abataka amabera." 
Proverbs28:9 Omonto okoonchora ogoto kwaye taigwera amachiko, nonya nogosaba kwaye nigo kore okogechia." 
Proverbs28:10 Omonto ogosiria abare ne chinkoro chindonge, na kobaraa ase enchera ende, oyio nagwe ase eirima eria aremire ere omonyene, korende abwo batari na komocha mbanyore omwando omuya." 
Proverbs28:11 Omonto omonda nigo akwerengereria ng’a nomong’aini are, korende omonto omotaka ore nokomanya nigo aramotuke amomanye." 
Proverbs28:12 Ekero abanyene oboronge babuire, obonene obonge nigo bokobao, korende ekero abakori amabe bakogamba, abanto nigo bakwebisa." 
Proverbs28:13 Omonto okobisa ebibe biaye tagosesenigwa, korende oyo okobiorokia na kobitiga narorerwe amabera." 
Proverbs28:14 Nasesenirie omonto omoirogete Omonene botambe, korende oyo okong’etie enkoro yaye nanyore emechando eramosirie." 
Proverbs28:15 Omogambi omokayayu okogambera abanto abataka nigo anga buna endo ekoruma, gose edubu yagechigwe." 
Proverbs28:16 Omogambi otari nobong’aini nigo are omochandi omotindi, korende oria ogechete konyora ebitoki bitari bi’oboronge, nigo akogenderera kogamba ase amatuko amange." 
Proverbs28:17 Onye omonto oritoeirwe nokomocha kw’ogoitera amanyinga ’omonto onde, tiga abe okona‐gotama goika akwe, na onde tagokonya omonto oyio." 
Proverbs28:18 Omonto otari na komocha ase chinchera chiaye natoorigwe; korende oyore omokorekanu ase chinchera chiaye nasire ase eyemo y’echio. 
Proverbs28:19 Omonto ogokora emeremo ase omogondo oye nanyore endagera enyinge, korende oyokobwatia emeroberio etagwenereti nigo arabe omotaka omorabu se." 
Proverbs28:20 Omonto ore nenkoro endonge nanyore ogosesenigwa okonge, korende oyo okoayerera ase okoba omonda takomocha konyora egesusuro." 
Proverbs28:21 Tari buya gokora ogwanchereria ase abanto, korende ase engencho y’agasamunye k’omogati omonto nigo agwekora koba omosaria." 
Proverbs28:22 Omonto obwate ribero nigo akoayerera koba omonda, gose tari korengereria ng’a obotaka mbomonyore." 
Proverbs28:23 Omonto ogotogonyera oyo oiranire nyuma ase okomorongeyia nanyore ogwancherwa kobua oria okomong’aina namang’ana amansu. 
Proverbs28:24 Omonto okoura ise gose ng’ina enibo yabo, erio oteba, “Ebi tibiri ebibe,” oyio nigo are omogisangio bw’oyogosiria." 
Proverbs28:25 Omonto ore ne ribero nigo agoseegeta eriomana, korende oyosemeretie Omonene natenenkigwe." 
Proverbs28:26 Oyobwesemeretie ere omonyene, oyio nomoriri, korende oyo okobwatia obong’aini natoorigwe." 
Proverbs28:27 Omonto ogokonya abataka takoremerwa, korende oyo ogotuba amaiso aye ng’a tarora abataka nanyore okoragererigwa okonge." 
Proverbs28:28 Ekero abakori amabe bakogamba, abanto nigo bakwebisa, korende ekero basirigwe, abanyaboronge nigo bakomentekana." 
Proverbs29:1 Omonto okona‐gokurerwa botambe ase okorongeigwa, korende okong’ia ebigoti, oyio nasirigwe mobosokano, tagokonywa." 
Proverbs29:2 Ekero abanyene oboronge bakogamba, abanto nigo bakoba nomogoko, korende ekero abakori amabe bakogamba, abanto nigo bagochandeka na korera." 
Proverbs29:3 Oyo bwanchete obong’aini nigo akomogokia ise, korende oyogotaara amo nabakungu abatayayi nigo agosiria chinibo chiaye." 
Proverbs29:4 Omoruoti ogokora ay’oboronge nigo akogera ense yaye yagenderera gotenena bokong’u, korende oyo okorigia amaaki nigo akoyeiyeria." 
Proverbs29:5 Omonto okong’aina omonto onde namang’ana amansu, oyio nigo agwetegera oboreba ase amagoro aye." 
Proverbs29:6 Omonto omonyabibe nigo agotegwa nobosareku bwaye, korende omonyene oboronge nigo agotera nomogoko na gochenga." 
Proverbs29:7 Omonyene oboronge nigo agwechandera oboronge bw’abataka, korende omokori amabe tamanyeti kende." 
Proverbs29:8 Abanyacheche nigo bakoburukania omochie, korende abanto abang’aini nigo bagokendia endamwamu." 
Proverbs29:9 Ekero omonto omong’aini akoamererania nomoriri, oria omoriri nigo akogechigwa na goseka, tari gokirakiri." 
Proverbs29:10 Abanto bare nerang’o y’ogoitera amanyinga nigo bakogecha oyo otari na komocha, korende abare ne chinkoro chindonge nigo bakomorenda." 
Proverbs29:11 Omonto omoriri nigo agosokia endamwamu yaye yonsi, korende oyore omong’aini nigo akoyetanga otoerera." 
Proverbs29:12 Omogambi aise gwancha amang’ana ’oborimo, abasomba baye bonsi nigo barabe abakori amabe." 
Proverbs29:13 Omotaka na omochandi nigo bamenyete amo; Omonene nere okobaa bonsi babere oborabu bw’amaiso. 
Proverbs29:14 Omoruoti okogambera abataka ase oboronge, obogambi bwaye mbogenderere gotenena bokong’u." 
Proverbs29:15 Ekeranya na ogotogonyera ase okorongeyia nigo bikorenta obong’aini, korende omwana ogotigwa okora buna anchete, nigo akorentera ng’ina obosooku." 
Proverbs29:16 Ekero abakori amabe bakomentekana, ogosaria nigo gokomentekana, korende abanyene oboronge mbarore okogwa kw’abwo." 
Proverbs29:17 Rongeyia omwana oo omomura, ere nakorentere ogotimoka, nigo ararente omosasoko omonge ase enkoro yao." 
Proverbs29:18 Ase okomaanorerwa kw’amang’ana gotari, abanto tibari gwetanga gokora amabe, korende nasesenirie oyo obwatete amachiko." 
Proverbs29:19 Amang’ana oka amasa takorongeyia omosomba, ekiagera naba oyamanyete, takoyaigwera." 
Proverbs29:20 Oise korora omonto ore omwango ase ogokwana, ogosemeria nkore ase omonto omoriri kobua ase oyio." 
Proverbs29:21 Omonto ogotuga omosomba oye na omoa ebinto bionsi aganetie korwa obwana bwaye, omosomba oyio nabo araire omwando oye." 
Proverbs29:22 Omonto obwate endamwamu nigo agoseegeta eriomana, na oyo okogechigwa nigo akorenta ogosaria okonge." 
Proverbs29:23 Oboenenu bw’omonto nigo bokomokeeyia, korende oyore nomoika bw’oboitongo nigo akonyora ogosikwa okonene." 
Proverbs29:24 Omonto ore omogisangio bw’omoibi nigo agechete obogima bwaye obonyene; nigo akoigwa ogotianerwa gw’okoragereria, korende okira takoorokia gento." 
Proverbs29:25 Okobairoka mwanyabanto nigo gokoba oboreba, korende omonto omosemeretie Omonene nigo arendire buya." 
Proverbs29:26 Abanto abange nigo bakorigia ogwancherwa gokorwa ase omogambi, korende kera omonto nigo akonyora oboronge korwa ase Omonene." 
Proverbs29:27 Omonto otari omoronge nigo are okogechia ase oyo ore omoronge, na oyore nenkoro endonge nigo are okogechia ase omokori amabe." 
Proverbs30:1 Aya naro amang’ana ’Aguri, mosinto o Yake o Masa. Omonto oyio agatebia Itieli na Ukali:" 
Proverbs30:2 “Ekeene, inche nigo inde omoriri otagwenereti korokwa omonto, gose timbwati obomanyi bwa mwanyabanto." 
Proverbs30:3 Inche tineorokereretie obong’aini, erinde imomanye oyore Omochenu." 
Proverbs30:4 Ning’o oriinete gochia igoro na goika gocha aa inse? Ning’o osangereirie omwaga ase enkundi yaye? Ning’o obwatire amache na koyaboa ase eanga yaye? Ning’o okong’etie chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense? Naki oyio akorokwa, na omwana oye naki akorokwa? Ntebia onye koyamanyete!" 
Proverbs30:5 “Kera ring’ana ria Nyasae nigo rienekirie ng’a neri’ekeene. Ere nenguba ase abwo bakomotamera, barendwe." 
Proverbs30:6 Tobaisa komenta kende ase amang’ana aye, nigo arabaise kogotogonyera, naye obe omonyaborimo.”" 
Proverbs30:7 Amang’ana abere naro nagosabire, toyandina ntarakwa." 
Proverbs30:8 Orusie korwa asende ayare a bosa na oborimo. Tobaisa kong’a obotaka gose obotenenku, korende ong’e endagera engwenerete." 
Proverbs30:9 Oise konyigotia mono, nigo ndakwange ntebe, “Omonene nere ng’o?” Gose inse koba omotaka nigo ndabaisa koiba na ndetere erieta ria Nyasae one obosooku." 
Proverbs30:10 Tobaisa kogenka omosomba ase omonene oye, nigo arakoragererie, erinde obe nokomocha." 
Proverbs30:11 Ekegori nkere gekoragereria abaise na tikeri gosesenia abang’ina. 
Proverbs30:12 Abanto mbare bakwerora ng’a nabaikeranu bare, korende tibachenegeti korwa ase obobe bwabo." 
Proverbs30:13 Abanto mbare bagwekaga ng’a nabaya bare na korigereria namaiso aichire nobomwenu. 
Proverbs30:14 Abanto mbare babwate amaino anga emioro, ne chintakunero chi’amaino abo nigo chinga emeyio; barabwo nigo bakoria na gosiria abataka bare ase ense; nigo bakoura abaremeire bare ase abanto." 
Proverbs30:15 Rikorominyo ndibwate abaiseke babere; barabwo nigo bakorangeria, “Toe, toe!” Mbire ebinto bitato bitari goisaneka; ee, mbire bine bitari goteba ng’a biaisanekire, nabio ebi;" 
Proverbs30:16 aase abakure, na enda engomba, ne riroba rirang’ete amache, na omorero. Ebio tibiana goteba, “Twaisanekire.”" 
Proverbs30:17 Eriso ri’omonto ogochecheria ise na gochaya ng’ina ndirusigwe nebigonkoru bie rigoko na ririegwe namage e chinsoti. 
Proverbs30:18 Ebinto mbire bitato bire bi’ogokumia asende; ee, mbire bine ebio ntamanyeti, nabio ebi:" 
Proverbs30:19 enchera y’ensoti igoro, na ey’eng’iti igoro ase egetare, na ey’emeeri igoro ase amache ’enyancha, na enchera y’omosacha gochia ase omoiseke." 
Proverbs30:20 Eyio nenchera y’omokungu omotomani: Nigo akoria na otinyia omonwa oye, erio oteba, “Inche tindakora obonyaka bonde.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Nare amang’ana atato akonyegeria ense, ee, nare ane etanyare koyaremereria, naro aya:" 
Proverbs30:22 Ekero omosomba akoba omoruoti, na omonto omoriri akoigota endagera," 
Proverbs30:23 na ekero omoiseke otanchiri akonyuomwa, na omoiseke omosomba akoba ribaga ri’omokungu oria agokorera emeremo." 
Proverbs30:24 Mbire ebinto bine ebisinini mono ase ense, korende bire nobong’aini obonge, nabio ebi:" 
Proverbs30:25 Amage nigo are ebitongwa bitari ne chinguru, korende nigo akogacha endagera yabo agocha koria engaki y’egurugura." 
Proverbs30:26 Ebisengi tibibwati chinguru, korende nigo bikoroisia ase bikomenya ase ebitare ime." 
Proverbs30:27 Chingige tichibwati omoruoti, korende nigo chikogendera amo emeganda emeganda." 
Proverbs30:28 Esagara nabo erabogorigwe nokoboko kw’omonto, korende nabo ekomenya ase chinyomba chi’abaruoti." 
Proverbs30:29 Mbire ebinto bitato bikogokia ase ogotaara kwabo, ee, mbire bine bire nogotaara okuya, nabio ebi:" 
Proverbs30:30 Endo ere ne chinguru chinyinge kobua ching’iti chinde, na teri kwoboigwa na ng’iti ende," 
Proverbs30:31 na etuoni egwesigoria, na egoree, na omoruoti okoraa abarwani baye b’esegi." 
Proverbs30:32 Onye kwabeire omoriri na kweimokereirie igoro, gose onye kwabeire gokorengereria amabe, beka okoboko kwao ass omonwa oo, oyotube." 
Proverbs30:33 Amabeere agotundwa nigo akorua amaguta, na okomintontoria emioro, amanyinga nigo ararueo. Naboigo ogoseegeta na koba nendamwamu, ayio nigo akorenta okorwana." 
Proverbs31:1 Amang’ana aya naro Lemweli omoruoti orokereretigwe na ng’ina: 
Proverbs31:2 Naki aye omwana one? Naki aye omwana bw’enda yane? Ninki ndagotebie, aye omwana bw’eira yane nariete?" 
Proverbs31:3 Tobaisa gosireria chinguru chiao ase abakungu, gose chinchera chiao ase barabwo, ekiagera nigo bagosiria abaruoti." 
Proverbs31:4 Aye Lemweli, okonywa edivai tikogwenereti abaruoti, gose abagambi tibabaisa kogania ebinyugwa bigotindia." 
Proverbs31:5 Baise konywa, nigo barebe amachiko, na baonchorane oboronge bwa bonsi abachandegete." 
Proverbs31:6 Oyo ogochia gosira moe ekenyugwa kegotindia, na edivai ase oyo oichanete ase omoyo oye." 
Proverbs31:7 Tiga banywe, erinde beebe obotaka bwabo, na tibabaisa kona‐koinyora emechando yabo." 
Proverbs31:8 Maanora omonwa oo, okwanere rimama, orwanerere oboronge bw’abwo batigirwe bachandegete." 
Proverbs31:9 Maanora omonwa oo, ogambe ebina bi’ekeene, orwanerere oboronge bw’abataka na obaremeire." 
Proverbs31:10 Ning’o oranyare konyora omokungu omuya? Omokungu omuya nigo are nengencho enene kobua amagena e rigori rinene. 
Proverbs31:11 Enkoro y’omosacha oye nigo emwegenete, gose omosacha oyio takoremerwa konyora ebitoki." 
Proverbs31:12 Ase obogima bwaye bwonsi omokungu oyio nigo agokorera omosacha oye amaya, gose tari korenta amabe asare." 
Proverbs31:13 Omokungu oyio nigo akorigia amarionya e ching’ondi ne chiusi chi’egatani, okora emeremo namaboko aye ore nomoyo omuya." 
Proverbs31:14 Nigo anga chimeeri chi’abaonchoreria; nigo akorenta endagera korwa ase ense y’aare. 
Proverbs31:15 Nigo akoboka kobore botuko, oroiseria abanto b’enyomba yaye endagera, na oa abasomba baye abaiseke eyebatungetie." 
Proverbs31:16 Nigo akorigia omogondo oyogora, na korwa ase ebitoki bi’emeremo y’amaboko aye nigo agosimeka emesabibu." 
Proverbs31:17 Nigo akweboyia chinguru buna orokini, okora emeremo emekong’u namaboko aye." 
Proverbs31:18 Nigo akorora ng’a emeremo yaye nigo ekorenta ebitoki, na etaya yaye teri korima nyomba mwaye botuko." 
Proverbs31:19 Nigo abwate egekorero akoroiseria chiusi namaboko aye na egete agochiranderera nebiara biaye. 
Proverbs31:20 Nigo akorambora okoboko kwaye okonya abataka, ee, nabaremeire nigo akobaramborera amaboko aye." 
Proverbs31:21 Ere tari kwoboa chingaki chi’obokendu, ekiagera abanto bonsi b’enyomba yaye nigo babwate chianga chie riberera chiroisirie korwa ase chiusi chimonyinga." 
Proverbs31:22 Omokungu oyio nigo akweroiseria ebirarero; chianga chiaye nigo chiroisirie korwa ase egatani engiya ne chiusi chimbariri. 
Proverbs31:23 Omosacha bw’omokungu oyio nigo amanyekanete ase ebiita bi’omochie, agwo ase agoikaransa ogamba ebina amo nabagaaka b’ense eyio." 
Proverbs31:24 Omokungu oyio nigo akoroisia chianga chi’egatani engiya, ochioonia; naende nigo akoroisia chinkini, ochiooneria abaonchoreria bande." 
Proverbs31:25 Nigo akweboyia chinguru na amasikani, na igo nabe nomogoko ase chingaki chigochi‐gocha." 
Proverbs31:26 Amorokererio akorua ase omonwa oye nigo are ay’obong’aini, na obwororo nigo bore ase oromeme rwaye." 
Proverbs31:27 Nigo akoroberia buya amang’ana ’enyomba yaye, gose tari koria endagera atari gokorera emeremo." 
Proverbs31:28 Abana baye nigo bakoboka bamoroka “Oyosesenirie”, naboigo nomosacha oye nigo akomotogia, oteba:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Abakungu abange bakorire ayare amaya mono, korende aye kwababuire bonsi.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Obonyakieni nigo bokong’ainereria, na ekieni ekiya nigo kere bosa, korende omokungu omoirogete Omonene, oyio nere oranyare gotogigwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Kae omokungu oyio okwama kw’emeremo y’amaboko aye, na tiga atogigwe agwo ase ebiita ase ogokora kwaye gwonsi." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Aya naro amang’ana ’omorandia mosinto o Daudi, omoruoti o Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Omorandia nigo agoteba: Mbosa na bosa kegima, mbosa, bosa. Amang’ana onsi mbosa." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mbitoki ki omonto akonyora ase okwerosia gokora emeremo emekong’u aiga inse y’erioba? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Ekegori ekemo nigo kegoeta, na ekende giacha, korende ense nigo egendererete kobao." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Erioba nigo rigosoka naende riarimera, erio riaayerera gochia aase rigosoka korwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Embeo nigo ekogusa gochia irianyi, naende yaonchoka yagusa gochia sugusu; nigo ekona‐goetanana yagenderera kogusa, naende yagenderera goetanana naende naende." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Chindooche chionsi nigo chikogenda ase enyancha, korende tiyana goichora. Amache ayio nigo akoirana gochia ase chindooche echio chiachakerete, naende agenderera kogenda." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Amang’ana onsi agokorwa nigo akorenta omoroso otanyare gokwaneka. Amaiso tari goisaneka naya akorora, na amato tari goisaneka naya akoigwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Aya arengeo kare, naro agochia kobao naende. Aya akoregete kare, naro agochia gokoreka naende. Ande tari are amayia inse y’erioba." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Inee! Ing’ana rinde ndireo rigokwanwa ng’a neriyia? Yaya. Kera ring’ana nao riarenge korwa kare, intwe konya totarabao." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Amang’ana aetire takoinyorwa, gose ayagochi‐gocha takoinyorwa nabwo bakorwa nyuma." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Inche omorandia nigo narenge omoruoti igoro ase Abaisraeli, agwo Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nkerua nenkoro yane korigia na komanya ase obong’aini amang’ana onsi agokoreka inse y’erioba. Nigo ere emeremo etari y’omogoko Nyasae aeire mwanyabanto bechande ase okoyekora. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Narigereirie kera egento kegokorwa inse y’erioba, narorire ng’a bionsi nigo bire bosa; ebi omonto akominyokera konyora nigo bire buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Egento giachiire bogeka tigekorongeigwa, na ekiaremire tigekobareka." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nkerengereria inche omonyene, “Nenyoreire obong’aini obonge kobua abwo bonsi bantang’anerete kogamba agwo Yerusalemu. Enkoro yane yanyorire obong’aini obonge na okomanya okonge.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Naende nkerua nenkoro yane komanya obong’aini, na obobarimo, na oboriri, korende nigo nanyorete ng’a ayio onsi akominyokerwa konyorwa nigo are buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ekiagera ase obong’aini obonge bore, nao omoichano omonge ore, na omonto okomenta chisemi, nigo akomenta obororo." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ngakwana nenkoro yane, ngateba, “Bono ninteeme ndore naki omogoko ore, imbe nkwegokia omonyene.” Korende nonya nayio onsi nigo arenge bosa." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nkanyora ng’a amaseko nigo are obobarimo, na omogoko tori gokora gento kende ekiya." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ekero ebirengererio biane biarenge koraagwa nobong’aini, nkagania kogokia omobere one nekenyugwa ki’edivai, nkarigia kobwatia oboriri obwo, erinde ndore ayare amaya agwenerete mwanyabanto bakore inse y’erioba, ase amatuko ayio amake bagendererete koba moyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ngakora emeremo emenene; nkeagachera chinyomba na gwesimekera emesabibu ase emegondo. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nkeroiseria emegondo na emegondo ende y’amatunda, erio ngasimeka emete y’amatunda ao ao." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Nkeroiseria amatibo ase nare korusia amache nasiarera emete egokina ase rinani. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Nkagora abasomba, abasacha na abakungu; abwo bakanyiborera abasomba bande ase enka yane; nigo nabwate amaicho amange e chiombe, ne chimbori, ne ching’ondi, nkabua abwo bonsi bantang’anerete kogamba agwo Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Boigo ngasangereria chifeta ne chitahabu, amo ne chimonga chi’abaruoti na echie chingongo chi’oboruoti bwane; ngatwara abateri, abasacha na abakungu, naende ngatwara abakungu abange mwanyabanto bagosanera." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ase ayio nkaba omonto bw’amasikani amanene, nkabua abwo bantang’anerete kogamba agwo Yerusalemu; boigo obong’aini bwane bokagenderera kobeera ime yane." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Egento kende gionsi narenge korora na gokegania tinare gwetanga gokenyora, gose tinarinete enkoro yane omogoko onde bwensi, ekiagera enkoro yane nigo yagokerete aya onsi nechanderete, na omogoko oyio noro orenge eng’eria yane y’emeremo yonsi nechanderete." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Nyuma y’ayio nkarengereria igoro y’emeremo eyio nakorete namaboko aane, na buna nayiechanderete. Naama! Ayio onsi nigo arenge bosa, na aya naminyokerete konyora nigo are buna embeo bosa, gose bitoki binde tibiri konyorekana inse y’erioba." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Nkaonchora ebirengererio biane korigereria obong’aini na obobarimo, na oboriri. Omonto oyio okobekwa oboruoti ribaga ri’oyio orengeo, ninki arakore? Tagokora kende otatiga keria oyio omotang’ani akorete." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Erio nkamanya ng’a obong’aini nigo bobuete oboriri, buna oborabu bobuete omosunte." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Omonto omong’aini nigo abwate amaiso ase omotwe oye, korende omonto omoriri nigo agotaara ase omosunte; nonya nabeigo, nkarora ng’a bonsi nigo bakonyorwa negento ekemo." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Erio nkeboria, “Ande, amang’ana akomonyora omoriri naro aranyore nainche, nase ki rende inche nabeire nobong’aini obonge?” Ase ayio ngetebia ng’a aya boigo mbosa." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Buna ere ase omonto omong’aini, naboigo ere nase omoriri, onde takogenderera koinyorwa; bonsi nigo barabe bebirwe kegima ase amatuko agochi‐gocha. Inee! Omonto omong’aini tagokwa buna oria omoriri agokwa?"
