Ecclesiastes2:17 Ase ayio nkagecha obogima, ekiagera emeremo egokorwa inse y’erioba, nigo ekorenta obororo asende. Ayio onsi mbosa, na aya akominyokerwa konyorwa nigo are buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nkagecha emeremo yonsi, eyio nabete ngwechandera inse y’erioba, ekiagera goika ntigere omonto orambwatie ebinto ebio nakorire." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ning’o omanyete gose omonto oyio nigo arabe omong’aini, gose nigo arabe omoriri? Korende oyio goika aire ebinto ebio bionsi nechandeire inde nobong’aini kobinyora inse y’erioba. Ayio boigo mbosa." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ase ayio ngachaka goichana na gokwa omoyo ase engencho y’emeremo yonsi nechanderete inse y’erioba. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Omonto nigo agokora emeremo emekong’u nobong’aini bwaye, ne chisemi, na okomanya kwaye, konyora ebinto, korende nyuma yaye atigera omonto omoao otabiechanderete okwegokia nabirobio. Ayio boigo mbosa, naende mbobe mono." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ngento ki omonto aranyore ekero akorire emeremo emekong’u na kwerosia mono inse y’erioba? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Nigo akoba nobokong’u ase amatuko aye onsi are moyo, na emeremo yaye emekong’u nigo ere ey’omoichano; nonya nase obotuko obogima ebirengererio biaye tibiri gotimoka. Ayio boigo mbosa." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Egento ekiya omonto aranyare gokora nokoria na konywa, na kogokera ebinto ebio echandeire kobinyora. Nkamanya ng’a nonya nayio nigo akorwa ase okoboko kwa Nyasae." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ning’o oranyare koria, gose konyora omogoko, onye tari amo n’Omonene?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nyasae nigo akoa omonto oyo okomogokia obong’aini, naende omoa okomanya, na omogoko, korende nigo akoa omonyabibe emeremo y’ogosangereria ebinto na kobigacha, korende omonto oria abie oria ogogetie Nyasae. Ayio boigo mbosa, na aya akominyokerwa konyorwa nigo are buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Kera egento nkere nekero kiaye, na aiga inse y’erioba kera ekegokorekana nkere nengaki yaye." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Nere engaki y’okoiborwa, na ey’ogokwa; engaki y’ogosimeka, na ey’ogosimora ekio giasimegetwe;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 engaki y’ogoita, na ey’okogwenia; engaki y’ogotagora, na ey’okoagacha;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 engaki y’okorera, na ey’ogoseka; engaki y’okobokia amagombo, na ey’ogotenga;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 engaki y’ogosiarera amagena, na ey’okoyasangereria; engaki y’okoboania, na ey’ogotaboania;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 engaki y’okorigia, na ey’ogosiria; engaki y’okogacha, na ey’ogotuguta;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 engaki y’ogotandora, na ey’okobareera; engaki y’ogokira, na ey’ogokwana;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 engaki y’ogwanchana, na ey’okogechana; engaki y’esegi, na ey’omorembe." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Inee! Mbitoki ki omonto akonyora ase emeremo yonsi agwechandera? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Narorire obokong’u obwo Nyasae aeire mwanyabanto bechande naborobwo. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Okorire kera egento kiabeire egeseera ase engaki yaye, naende obekire ime ase chinkoro chia mwanyabanto engaki etabe nomoerio. Korende nonya naboigo tibakonyara komanya aya Nyasae akorete korwa omochakano goika omoerio." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Namanyire ng’a gento kende tikeri kere ekiya kerabagwenere otatiga babe nomogoko, naende bakore ayare amaya ekero bare moyo." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Omonto kararie na konywa, naende egokie ase ebio echandeire, ekio nekeegwa kia Nyasae." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Namanyire ng’a gento kende gionsi Nyasae agokora nigo gekogenderera kobao kare na kare; gento kende tigekomentwa ase ekio, gose kende tigekorusigwa korwa ase ekio. Nyasae nere okorire igo, erinde mwanyabanto bamoiroke." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Amang’ana areo bono, nao arenge korwa kare; na ayio agochia koba, boigo nao arenge korwa kare. Nyasae nigo akorigia ayio aetire." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Naende nkarora aiga inse y’erioba ng’a aase ekeene kegwenerete koba, nao obobe bore, na aase oboronge bogwenerete koba, nao boigo obobe bore." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Erio ngateba ase enkoro yane ime ng’a Nyasae nanachere abanyaboronge ekina, na abanyabibe boigo, ekiagera obekire engaki ase kera ring’ana, na ase kera emeremo." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Naende ngateba ase enkoro yane ime ng’a Nyasae nigo agoteema mwanyabanto kobaenekia ng’a barabwo nigo banga buna ching’iti. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Amang’ana akonyora ching’iti naro ayio akobanyora mwanyabanto; buna ching’iti chigokwa, naboigo na mwanyabanto bagokwa. Omoika noyomo ore ase ching’iti na ase mwanyabanto; mwanyabanto tabueti ching’iti kende. Amang’ana onsi mbosa." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Mwanyabanto nigo bakogenda aase ching’iti chikogenda; mwanyabanto nigo baruete ase amaroba, ne ching’iti naboigo; nigo bakoirana ase amaroba, naboigo na chirochio." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ning’o omanyete gose omoika o mwanyabanto nigoro ogochia, na oyo bwe ching’iti ogenda inse y’ense?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ase ayio nkarora ng’a gento kende tikeri kere ekiya, otatiga omonto agokere emeremo yaye; ekio nakio egetari kiaye. Ning’o orachie komoirania ache korora na komanya ayakoregete nyuma yaye?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Naende nkarigereria nkarora ogokora okobe kware gokorwa inse y’erioba. Nkarora abwo bagokorerwa bobe bakorera, na monto onde tarengeo okobaremia, ekiagera abwo barenge kobakorera bobe nigo barenge nokobua, na onde tarengeo okobaremia." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Nkarora ng’a nigo ere buya ase abakure kobua ase abare moyo. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Korende ase oyo otaraiborwa, oyio otararora ogokora okobe kore aiga inse y’erioba, nigo ere buya asare kobua ase abwo bonsi bare moyo na abakure." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Nkarora emeremo eye emekong’u egokorwa, na omokia bwonsi bw’ogwechanda ase ogokora emeremo, ayio nigo agokorwa, ekiagera omonto akoba ne ribero ng’a abue oyonde. Ayio boigo mbosa, na aya akominyokerwa konyorwa nigo are buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Omoriri nigo agwetumata, na bweria omobere oye orea." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Mbuya koba negento geichire oroe oromo na koba nomorembe, kobua koba nebinto biichire chindoe ibere na koba nogwechanda na kominyokera konyora ebire buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Naende nkarora obosa kegima bore inse y’erioba: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Nare omonto otabwate omwana gose omwabo; ere nigo agendererete gwechanda gokora emeremo emekong’u, na amaiso aye tari goisaneka ne chinibo; omonto oyio tana kweboria, “Ning’o ngochandekera gokorera na kwerina omogoko bwonsi?” Aya naro mbosa, na ogwechanda gotari nomogoko." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Nigo ere buya koba babere kobua oyomo, ekiagera mbanyore eng’eria engiya ase emeremo yabo bagokora." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Oyomo karagwe, oyonde namogororokie; korende obobe nobwaye oria ore bweka ekero aragwe, na onde tari oramogororokie." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Abanto babere kobararare amo mbaigwe riberera korende naki oyomo arakore aigwe riberera kare bweka? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Omonto aise korwania oyomo ore bweka, namobue, korende onye bare babere, takobabua. Engori esisire nemegoye etato teri kobutoka bwango." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Omwana omosae omotaka ore nobong’aini nigo’are omuya kobua omoruoti omogotu ore omoriri, otari gwancha gosemigwa;" 
Ecclesiastes4:14 neba ng’a omosae oria nigo aruete echela akabekwa oboruoti, gose nigo aiboretwe ore omotaka ase obogambi bw’omoruoti oria." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nkarora abanto bonsi abamenyete inse y’erioba bakobwatia omosae oria ogochia kobekwa oboruoti ribaga ri’oria orengeo. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Abanto abwo arenge koraa tibare kobareka. Nonya naboigo abwo barachiche nyuma y’abwo tibakomogokera. Ekeene, aya naro mbosa, na aya akominyokerwa konyorwa nigo are buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Orende amagoro ao ekero ogosoa ase enyomba ya Nyasae; mbuya kogenda aroro ase ogotegerera kobua korua ebing’wanso ebi abariri bakorua, ekiagera abwo tibamanyeti ng’a nigo bagokora ebibe." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Tobaisa koba omwango ase ogokwana amang’ana, gose enkoro yao teba enyango gokwana ase obosio bwa Nyasae, ekiagera ere nigo are igoro, naye nigo ore inse aa ase ense; ase ayio tiga amang’ana ogokwana abe amake." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Chindoto nigo chigocha korwa ase ogwechanda okonge, ne chinkwana chinyinge nigo chikorenta amang’ana ’oboriri." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ekero kwarire eira ase Nyasae, tobaisa gotebana koyeikerania, ekiagera ere tari kogokigwa nabanto abariri. Ikerania eira kwariete." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Mbuya toria eira kobua koria eira na toyeikerania. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Tobaisa gotiga amang’ana ’omonwa oo agere okore ebibe, gose tobaisa gotebia omomalaika o Nyasae ng’a oko nokomocha gwakora. Nase ki oragere Nyasae agechigwe nogokwana kwao, na asarie emeremo y’amaboko ao?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ekero amang’ana atari nengencho amentekanire, ne chindoto chiamentekanire, obobe nigo bokoba obonge; korende aye omoiroke Nyasae." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Korarore agwo ase obogambi abataka bagokorerwa bobe, na ekeene na oboronge biarusigweo ase enchera y’obotindi, amang’ana ayio tagoichania; omonene oyio okogamba nigo arigereirie noria ore omonene komobua, naende mbare abwo bare abanene kobua abagambi abwo babere." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Mbuya ase ense ere nomoruoti okogamba buya na korigereria ng’a abanto nkorema bare emegondo yabo. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Omonto bwanchete chibesa, tagoisaneka nachirochio; gose oyobwanchete obotenenku, tagoisaneka nebitoki biaye. Ayio boigo mbosa." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ekero obotenenku bokomentekana, boigo nabwo bakoboria nigo bakomentekana; bono mbuya ki oria omonyene akonyora, otatiga akoborora namaiso rioka?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Chitoro chi’omokori emeremo nigo chire chingiya mono, neba ng’a nigo abwate egento egeke akoria, gose ebinge; korende obotenenku bw’omonto omonda tibokomotiga arare chitoro." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Obobe obore obobe mono narorire inse y’erioba nabwo obo: chinibo chinyinge chikogachwa nigo chiranyare gosiria omonto ochigachete. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Chinibo echio nigo chigosira ase egesio ekebe, na ekero omonto oyio aiboire omwana omomura nigo akonyorekana ore bosa, tabwati kende akomoa." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Buna aiboretwe ore getirianda korwa ase enda ya ng’ina, naboigo aragende ore getirianda buna achete, gose takoira kende ase ebio echandeire mono kobinyora." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Obo boigo nobobe bw’obororo; onye okorua ase ense ogenda buna achete, mbitoki ki abwate ase ogwechanda gokora emeremo emekong’u y’okominyokia aya are buna embeo bosa?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Ase obogima bwaye bwonsi nigo abeire okoria endagera ore ase omosunte, obeire ogwechanda ore nobororo na okogechigwa." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Naama! Aya narorire are amaya na agwenerete nokoria na konywa na koba nomogoko ase ebinto ebio bionsi omonto echandeire aiga inse y’erioba, ase engaki y’amatuko amake Nyasae amoeire; ekio nakio egetari kiaye." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Onye Nyasae oeire omonto obotenenku ne chinibo, naende omoeire okobua gw’okwegokia ase ebinto ebio na kobikorera ase obuya bwaye, boigo koba nomogoko ase emeremo yaye, ayio onsi nigo are ebiegwa bia Nyasae." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Omonto oyio takogenderera koinyora amatuko aetire ay’obogima bwaye, ekiagera Nyasae nigo akomoa omogoko ase enkoro yaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Mbore obobe narorie aiga inse y’erioba boritoerete mwanyabanto. Obobe obwo nabwo obo: 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Nyasae oeire omonto obotenenku, ne chinibo, na ogosikwa, na omonto oyio taremeiri gento kende ase ebio bionsi aganetie, korende Nyasae tamoeti okobua gw’okwegokia ase ebinto ebio; omonto omoao nigo akobiira bwegokia nabirobio. Ayio naro mbosa, naende nogwechanda okobe." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Onye omonto oiboire abana rigana erimo, na abe moyo ase engaki y’emiaka emenge, ee, nonya amatuko ’obogima bwaye abeire amange, korende tegogetie ase ebinto ebiya bi’obogima obwo, na tatindekwa ase amasikani, nigo ngoteba ng’a omwana okwerete enda ya ng’ina nigo are buya kobua omonto oyio." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Omwana oyio okwete nigo achete egento bosa, naende nigo akogenda gochia ase omosunte, na omosunte oyio otuba erieta riaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Omwana oria taroche erioba, gose tamanyete gento kende, korende nonya naboigo nigo akonyora omotimoko kobua omonto oria," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 nonya omonto oria ogochia komenya emiaka chilifu ibere, korende tanyora omogoko ase obogima bwaye. Inee! Abwo bonsi babere tibakogenda aase amo?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Emeremo yonsi omonto akwerosia gokora nokonyora egento akoria, korende nonya naboigo tari koigota." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Mbuya ki omonto omong’aini abwate kobua oyore omoriri? Gose ninki omonto omotaka akonyora, oria omanyete buna akwerenda ase abare moyo?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Eki amaiso aroche nigo kere buya kobua eki okogania ng’a okenyore. Ayio boigo mbosa, na okominyokia aya are buna embeo bosa." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Gento kende gionsi kereo nigo kiarogetwe erieta korwa kare, naende nigo yamanyekanete eki omonto are gocha koba. Mwanyabanto takonyara koamererania noria ore ne chinguru komobua." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ogokwana okonge nigo gokorenta amang’ana amange are bosa. Inee! Ayio mbuya ki akorenta ase mwanyabanto? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ning’o omanyete egento kere ekiya ase omonto, ekero amenyete amatuko amake ase obogima bore bosa, agoeta buna omorengari? Ning’o oranyare gotebia omonto amang’ana arabe korwa nyuma yaye aiga inse y’erioba?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Erieta rigiya nigo ribuete amaguta amaya akweakwa, ne rituko ri’ogokwa nigo rire rigiya kobua eri’okoiborwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Mbuya kogenda ase enyomba y’ebirero kobua kogenda ase enyomba y’omoyega bw’okwegokia, ekiagera oyio noro omoerio o kera omonto, na abare moyo mbabeke amang’ana aya ase chinkoro chiabo." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Omoichano nigo ore omuya kobua amaseko, ekiagera omoichano okororekana ase obosio nigo ogokora enkoro yaba nomogoko." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Chinkoro chi’abanto abang’aini nigo chikoba ase enyomba y’ebirero, korende chinkoro chi’abariri nigo chire ase enyomba y’okwegokia." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mbuya omonto gotegerera ogotogonyerwa kw’omonto omong’aini kobua gotegerera ogotera kw’abariri. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ogoseka kw’abariri nigo konga amagwa akoyia atoreka inse y’enyongo ere riko. Ayio boigo mbosa. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ekeene, emoko nigo ekoonchora omonto omong’aini oba omoriri, ne riaaki nigo rigosaria ebirengererio." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Omoerio bw’egento nigo ore omuya kobua omochakano oye; na omonto omoremereria nigo are omuya koba omonto omoenenu. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Tobaisa koba omwango ase okogechigwa, ekiagera okogechigwa nigo komenyete ase chinkoro chi’abariri." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Tobaisa goteba, “Nase ki amatuko a kare arenge amaya kobua aya bono?” Okoboria okwo tikori okw’obong’aini." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Obong’aini nigo bore obuya buna omwando, na nigo bogokonya abwo baroche erioba." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Obong’aini nigo bogotokonya buna chibesa chigotokonya, korende obuya bw’omonyasemi mboria ng’a obong’aini nigo bokorenda obogima bw’oyio ong’ainiire." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Rengereria emeremo ya Nyasae! Ning’o oranyare korongeyia egento Omonene akorire borogochi? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ekero amatuko ao are amaya kabe nomogoko, na ekero are amabe rengereria ng’a Nyasae nere okorire ayio onsi abere, erinde omonto tabaisa komanya erirache komobwatia korwa nyuma yaye." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ase obogima obo bwane obore bosa narorire kera egento; narorire omonto omonyaboronge ogosira ore ase oboronge bwaye, na omonyabibe okogenderera koba moyo amatuko amange ore ase ebibe biaye." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Tobaisa koba omoronge goetania, gose koba omong’aini goetania. Nase ki okweita aye omonyene?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Tobaisa koba omobe goetania, gose tobaisa koba omoriri. Nase ki oganetie gokwa engaki yao etaraika?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Nigo ere buya ng’a obwate ring’ana eri erimo, na totiga neria kabere, ekiagera omonto omoirogete Nyasae namanye eki agokora ase kera ring’ana." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Obong’aini nigo bogokora abare abang’aini koba ne chinguru chibuete echi’abagambi ikomi bare ase omochie oyomo. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ekeene, omonto tari aiga ase ense ore omoronge ogokora amaya otari gokora ebibe." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Tobaisa gotegerera amang’ana onsi abanto bagokwana, nigo orabaise koigwa omosomba oo ogokoragereria." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Aye omonyene nomanyete ase enkoro yao ng’a ase chingaki chinyinge kwabeire gokoragereria abanto bande. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Aya onsi ngateema koyaenekia ase enchera y’obong’aini, ngateba, “Goika imbe nobong’aini.” Korende obong’aini obwo bokabeera aare korwa asende." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Amang’ana aria nigo akare aare mono, naende akare aatambe gochia inse, aatambe mono, ning’o oranyare koyatuka?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Erio ngachaka korengereria imanye, na gotuka, na korigia obong’aini, na komanya buna ebinto bionsi bire; naende nkagania komanya obobe bw’oboriri, na oboriri obore obobarimo." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Erio nkanyora egento ekeroro kebuete amakweri. Egento ekio nakio omokungu enkoro yaye yarenge egesugunia na omoeto, naende amaboko aye are chingataare. Omonto ogogetie Nyasae tari kobwatwa nomokungu oyio, korende omonyabibe ere nigo akobwatwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Omorandia nigo agoteba iga: Naama! Amang’ana ayio nkayamanya, ekero nabekeranetie ring’ana erimo ase erinde koyamanya onsi." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Aya nabeire nkona‐koyairanerera korigia komanya buna are, korende tindayamanya. Ase abanto elifu eyemo nkanyora omosacha oyomo, korende ase abwo bonsi tinanyorete omokungu nonya noyomo." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Naama! Egento gioka narigirie nanyorire neke: Nyasae nigo atongete mwanyabanto bare abaikeranu, korende barabwo batukire chinchera chinyinge chi’okobaisanekia." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ning’o onga buna omonto omong’aini? Ning’o omanyete engencho y’amang’ana? Obong’aini nigo bogokora obosio bw’omonto bwagirigenta, nigo bokoonchora obokong’u bw’okororekana kwaye." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Inche nigo nkogosemia: Oigwere amang’ana omoruoti achikire, ekiagera nkwarierete Nyasae eira." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Toayerera gotiga obokoreri ase obosio bwaye, na tobwatana nogokora okobe, ekiagera ere nigo agokora onsi ayanchete." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ring’ana ri’omoruoti nigo rire nokobua. Ning’o oranyare komotebia, “Aye ngento ki eke ogokora?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Omonto okoigwera amachiko takonyorwa namabe, na enkoro y’omonto omong’aini nigo ekomanya engaki na enchera y’okonacha boronge." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kera ring’ana ndibwate engaki yaye na enchera yaye y’okonacha boronge, na emechando y’omonto nigo ekomoritoera." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Omonto tamanyeti ayagochia koba, na ning’o oranyare komotebia buna amang’ana arabe?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Monto onde tari obwate okobua igoro y’omoika, gose igoro ye rituko ri’ogokwa kwaye; ogotooreka tikori ase esegi, gose obobe tibogotooria abwo bakobokora." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ayio onsi nigo nayaroche ekero nabegete ebirengererio biane kwegera aya onsi agokorwa aiga inse y’erioba, ekero omonto oyomo akogambera omonto onde na komokorera bobe ase okomochanda." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Nkarora abakori amabe batindekirwe batimogete, na abwo baare gokora ayare boronge barure ase Obomenyo bw’Oyore Omochenu, bakebwa ase omochie. Ayio boigo mbosa." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Mwanyabanto nigo bakwerua ase chinkoro chiabo gokora ayare amabe, ekiagera ebibe tibiri konacherwa ekina bwango." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Omonyabibe nakora ebibe ara rigana, naende agenderere koba moyo ase engaki entambe; nonya naboigo, nimanyete ng’a nigo erabe buya ase abwo bamoirogete Nyasae, ekiagera bamoirogete." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Korende abakori amabe tibakonyora amaya ayio, gose obogima bwabo tibokoba obotambe. Nigo banga buna omorengari ogoeta, ekiagera tibamoirogete Nyasae." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Nare amang’ana a bosa kegima agokorekana aiga ase ense; mbareo abanto abanyaboronge bakonyorwa negesusuro ki’ogokora kw’abanyabibe, na boigo abanyabibe banyora obuya bw’ogokora kw’abanyaboronge. Ase ayio ngateba, “Ayio boigo mbosa.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ngatogia omogoko, na nkarora ng’a mwanyabanto tabwati gento kende kere ekiya aiga inse y’erioba, otatiga arie na anywe, na kwegokia nayio. Ayio naro aranyare kobeera asare ekero agendererete gokora emeremo emekong’u ase obogima obo are moyo, obo Nyasae amoeire aiga inse y’erioba." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ekero nabegete ebirengererio biane komanya obong’aini na korora emeremo emekong’u abanto bagokora aiga ase ense, batari korara chitoro omobaso gose obotuko." 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Erio nkarora ng’a omonto takonyara komanya emeremo ende yonsi ya Nyasae egokorekana aiga inse y’erioba. Omonto naisa gwechanda mono ase okorigia koyemanya, takonyara koyemanya. Nonya omonto omong’aini ogoteba ng’a namanyete, takonyara koyemanya." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nkarengereria igoro y’amang’ana aya onsi, ngateema komanya buna abanyene oboronge na abare nobong’aini bare ase okoboko kwa Nyasae, amo nogokora kwabo, gokorabe okw’obwanchani gose okw’okogecha. Monto onde tamanyeti amang’ana are bosio." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Egento nekemo gekobanyora bonsi, omonyene oboronge na omonyabibe, oyore omuya na ochenegete na oyo otachenegeti, oyo okorua ebing’wanso na oyo otari kobirua. Buna ekoba ase omonto omuya, naboigo ekoba nase omonyabibe; buna ekoba ase oria okoria eira y’ogotiana, naboigo ekoba nase oria otari koria eira y’ogotiana." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Obo nabwo obobe ase aya onsi agokorekana aiga inse y’erioba, ng’a egento nekemo gekobanyora bonsi; chinkoro chia mwanyabanto nigo chiichire obobe na obobarimo ekero bare moyo, na nyuma y’ayio nigo bakogenda ase abakure." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Korende omonto ore ase egati y’abare moyo nare nogosemeria, na esese ere moyo nigo ekonyora amaya kobua endo ekwete." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ee, abare moyo mbamanyete ng’a mbakwe, korende abakure tibamanyeti gento kende, na tibagenderereti konyora eng’eria; tibakoinyorwa nonya ndinde." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Obwanchani bwabo, na okogecha, ne ribero, bionsi ebio nigo biasirete amo nabarabwo. Tibabwati nonya ng’ake egetari kende ase ayio agokorwa aiga inse y’erioba." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Aye bono genda, orie endagera yao nomogoko, na onywe edivai yao kore nomosasoko ase enkoro yao, ekiagera Nyasae bwanchire emeremo yao." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Tiga chianga chiao chibe chindabu botambe, na amaguta okweakwa tamocha ase omotwe oo." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Ase amatuko onsi ay’obogima obo bore bosa, obo Nyasae akoeire omenye aiga inse y’erioba, omenye nomogoko amo nomokungu oo bwanchete. Okomenya nomogoko, nakio egetari kiao ase obogima obo, ekero ogendererete gwechanda ase emeremo emekong’u inse y’erioba." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Gento kende gionsi okoboko kwao koranyare gokora, gekore ne chinguru chiao chionsi; ekiagera agwo aase abakure ase oragende, meremo ende tekaiyo, gose okorengereria, gose chisemi, gose obong’aini." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Nkarora aiga inse y’erioba ng’a tari abwo bakominyoka bwango bakobua, gose ababwate chinguru tari barabwo bakobua esegi, gose abare nobong’aini tari barabwo bakonyora endagera, gose abare nokomanya tari barabwo babwate chinibo, gose abanyasemi tari barabwo bakonyora ogwancherwa; korende kera omonto nigo akonyorwa nengaki yaye na egesio kiaye." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Amo nayio mwanyabanto onde tamanyeti engaki yaye. Buna koreng’ana chinswe chikobwatwa ase ekeonga ase egesio ekebe, ne chinyoni ase obosugunia, naboigo na mwanyabanto bakonyorwa nengaki embe, babwatwa mobosokano." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Amang’ana aya naro naroche igoro y’obong’aini aiga inse y’erioba, naro akarorekana asende ng’a namanene;" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Norenge omochie omoke omenyire nabanto abake; omoruoti orenge omonene mono agacha koyorwania esegi; akayonaaria, akaagacha chiburi chinene chi’ogwekengera ase okoyorwania." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Korende ase omochie oyio akanyorekana aroro omonto omotaka orenge omong’aini, na ase obong’aini bwaye agatooria omochie oria. Nonya naboigo, monto onde tari oinyorete omotaka oria." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Erio ngateba, “Obong’aini nigo bore obuya mbobuete chinguru, nonya obong’aini bw’omonto oria omotaka bwachayetwe, na amang’ana aye tarenge koigwerwa.”" 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Nigo ere buya gotegerera amang’ana omonto omong’aini agokwana ase obotoereru kobua gotegerera amang’ana ’omogambi ogoaka eriogi ase egati y’abanto abariri. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Obong’aini nigo bore obuya kobua ebirwanero bi’esegi; korende omonyabibe oyomo nigo agosaria amaya amange. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Chingi chikwete nigo chikogundia amaguta akweakwa atioka bobe; naboigo na oboriri obosinini bokobua obong’aini na amasikani. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Enkoro y’omonto omong’aini nigo ekomoraa gochia borio, korende ey’omoriri nigo ekomoraa gochia bomosi." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ekero omonto omoriri agotaara inchera nigo akoborwa okomanya, na igo omanyia kera omonto ng’a ere nomoriri." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Omogambi karabe nendamwamu asore, tobaisa gotiga emeremo yao, ekiagera oboremereria nigo boragere ebibe ebinene biaberwe." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Aiga inse y’erioba narorire obobe, na obobe obo nigo bokorentwa nabagambi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Omoriri nigo akoegwa amasikani amanene, ekero abanto abanda bagendererete goikaransa aase a inse." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Narorire abasomba bariinete chibarasi, na abagambi bagotaara namagoro buna abasomba." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Omonto ogokunya eirima, nere oragwe imeo, na oyo okobochora enyasi, eng’iti engenda inse nemorome." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Oyo ogwatia amagena nigo araakwe naro, na oyo ogwatia emete, ande nanyore obokong’u asero." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Onye omonto tagotieria ekioma ekero giatuire, rirorio goika abeke chinguru chinyinge ase ogokora emeremo nakerokio, korende obong’aini nigo bogokonya omonto abue." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Omoebia ching’iti chingenda inse aise gotiga eng’iti emorome ritang’ani atarayeebia, rirorio omoebia oyio nigo arabe bosa." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Amang’ana akorua ase omonto omong’aini nigo akogera bwanchwa, korende aya akorua ase ebikoba bi’omoriri nigo akomosiria." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Oyio omoriri nigo agochaka gokwana amang’ana ’oboriri, naende oyakoora nobobarimo." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Omoriri nigo are omonyamang’ana mange. Monto onde tamanyeti aya agochia koba. Ning’o oranyare komotebia ekegochia koba korwa nyuma yaye. 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Emeremo y’omoriri nigo ekomorosia, goika osinywa komanya enchera ekogenda ase omochie." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Obobe nobwao, aye ense, ekero omoruoti oo are omwana, na abagambi bao bakobeera ase emeyega y’okwegokia ase chingaki chia mambia." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Nosesenirie aye ense, ekero omoruoti oo are omonto omosike na omosibore; na abagambi bao bakoragera ase engaki egwenerete, ase okonyora chinguru, korende tari ase ogotinda." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ekero omonto are omworo ekerama ki’enyomba yaye nigo gekogwa, na ase engencho y’obworo obwo embura nigo egotwa imeo." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Emeyega ye chindagera nigo ekorenta omogoko, na edivai nigo egokora omonto bweigwa buya, na ase chibesa nonyare kogora ebinto bionsi." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Tobaisa koragereria omoruoti nonya nase ebirengererio biao, gose tobaisa koragereria omonto omonda ekero ore ase akanyomba kao g’okorara. Oise gokora bo, enyoni nebaise koira amang’ana ao, gose egetongwa kere ne chimbaba ngetebe amang’ana ayio." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Eteria endagera yao igoro ye chinyancha, na nyuma y’amatuko amange noyenyore." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Atanana ebi obwate oe abanto batano na babere, gose batano na batato, ekiagera tomanyeti amabe agochia konyora ense." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Amare gaichoire nembura, nigo embura eyio egotwa igoro ase ense, na omote koragwe ororie ensemo ya irianyi gose eya sugusu, nigo oragenderere kobeera inse agwo ase ogwete." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Omonto okona‐korigereria komanya igoro y’embeo tagosimeka, na oyo okona‐korigereria amare buna are takogesa." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Buna otamanyeti ase embeo ekogusa gochia, gose buna amauga ’omwana ore ase enda ya ng’ina agokina, naboigo tokonyara komanya emeremo ya Nyasae oyio ogokora amang’ana onsi." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Busura embusuro yao mambia, nonya mogoroba totiga koyebusura, ekiagera tomanyeti eye erame, neye gose neria, gose nchionsi amo chirame buya." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Omobaso nigo ore omwansu, na amaiso nigo akogokigwa korora erioba." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Omonto karagenderere koba moyo ase engaki y’emiaka emenge, tiga agokere engaki eyio yonsi, korende goika ainyore ng’a amatuko ’omosunte nabe amange mono. Onsi aya agochi‐gocha nigo are bosa." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Aye omosae, gokera engaki y’obosae bwao, tiga enkoro yao ekorentere omogoko ase amatuko ’obosae bwao; bwatia chinchera chi’okogania gw’enkoro yao, na aya amaiso ao akorora. Korende oinyore ng’a ase ayio onsi Nyasae nakorangerie ase ekina." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Ase ayio tiga aya akogochanda arue ase enkoro yao, na aya akorenta obororo ase omobere oo arue boigo, ekiagera obosae na obuya bw’obogima nigo bore bosa." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Inyora Omotongi oo ekero ore omosae, ekero amatuko amabe ataracha, na emiaka eyio emebe etaraika ang’e ekero oratebe, “Tindi nomogoko koba moyo ase engaki buna eye!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Omoinyore ekero erioba, na omobaso, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni, bitarabekwa omosunte, gose amare atarairanerana embura koyature." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Engaki eyio abarendi b’enyomba mbaiguswe, na abasacha bare ne chinguru bekumbe, na abagosia batige gosia ekiagera bare abake ase omobaro, na abwo batengerete korwa ase ebibao, batubwe norotutu." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Ebisieri birochie ase chinchera mbisiekwe, na amariogi ay’ogosia nakee; amariogi e chinyoni natabobore omonto korwa ase chitoro, na amariogi ’abaiseke bagotera nakee." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Abanto nigo barabe nobwoba ase ebitiiro, na okogoswa kobe ase chinchera. Emelozi nesiche, na ebisase bibe bikwagura ng’ora ng’ora, na okogania gwonsi ngosire. Eyio nengaki mwanyabanto aragende ase obomenyo bwaye bwa kare na kare; abakona‐korera mbabe bakomochiera ekero ase ekero." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Engori eroisirie korwa ase efeta nebutorwe, na egetaabo keroisirie korwa ase etahabu ngiatwe, na enyongo yatwe agwo ase ensoko y’amache, na ekebara‐bara nkebunwe agwo ase egesima ki’amache." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Erio orotu ndoirane, ase riroba buna rwarenge, na omoika oirane gochia ase Nyasae oria oyoruete." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Ase ayio omorandia nigo agoteba. Aya mbosa, bosa; onsi mbosa kegima." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ekiagera omorandia oria arenge omong’aini, akagenderera kworokereria abanto chisemi na korua ogosemia okuya. Agasangereria na gotuka, naende akaroisia emereng’anio emenge." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Akarigia konyora amang’ana arenge kogokia, akarika amang’ana ’ekeene ase oboronge." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Amang’ana abanto abang’aini bagokwana nigo anga buna chimbambo chinyoge, na aya basangereirie anga buna emesumari eakeire bokong’u. Ayio onsi nebiegwa korwa ase Omorisia oyomo." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Aye omwana one, kobua ase aya onsi, igwera ogokurerwa oko. Okorika ebitabu ebinge tikori nomoerio; ogosoma okonge nigo gokorosia omobere." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Amang’ana onsi aigurwe, Omoerio bw’amang’ana onsi noyo: Omoiroke Nyasae na obwate amachiko aye, ekiagera ayio naro abanto bonsi bagwenerete bakore." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Nyasae narente kera ogokora ase ekina ekero aranachere obobisi bwonsi ekina, karabe amaya gose amabe." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ogotera okuya gwa Sulemani. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Tiga anyunyunte nokonyunyunta kw’omonwa oye. Obwanchani bwao nobuya kobua edivai. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Amaguta ao akweakwa nigo are ne rimisu rigiya; erieta riao nigo ringa buna amaguta aumoirwe, ase ayio abaiseke abekungi nigo bagwanchete." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ing’use nkobwatie, tominyoke kogenda. Omoruoti ondetire ase chiero chiaye. Ntokogokere na kogochengera, ntotogie obwanchani bwao kobua edivai. Ekeene, nigo bagwanchete bori." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Inwe abakungu ba Yerusalemu, inche nigo inde omomwamu ti, nonya naboigo nigo inde oyo bw’okogokia. Nigo inga buna chiema chia Kedari, naende buna ebitambaa bi’ogosungwa bia Sulemani." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Timobaisa kondigereria, ekiagera inde omomwamu ti; nomobaso bw’erioba onsambire. Abamura ba baba nigo bambeete, bakambeka korenda emegondo y’emesabibu, korende omogondo one bw’emesabibu tinarendete." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Aye omwanchi bw’omoyo one, ntebie ng’ai okorisia riicho riao. Ng’ai okoriira riakenderera mobaso gati? Nase ki ndabe nkona‐gotayaya ase egati y’amaicho ’abagisangio bao?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Aye ore omoseera kobua abakungu bonsi; onye tomanyeti, bwatia amabarato e riicho, obe gokorisia chimanwa chiao chie chimbori ang’e ne chiema chi’abarisia." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Aye omwanchi one, nigo ngokoreng’ania nebarasi eaberi ekong’usa egari ya Farao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Chinsea chiao nechinseera, chichabeire nebinto bi’oboseera, ne rigoti riao nigo richabeire ne chisonoi." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Intwe ntokoroiserie ebinyuri bie chitahabu bi’ogwechabera, ebitonire ne chifeta." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ekero omoruoti arenge aase aye agotimokera, amaguta aane akorokwa narada agatioka rimisu rigiya." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Omwanchi one nigo are asende buna omobuko o manemane, oyo nkobeka ase egekuba kiane." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Omwanchi one nigo are asende buna egesago ki’ebisicha bikorokwa hena, bire ase emegondo y’emesabibu y’Eni‐Gedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Naama! Aye omwanchi one, naki ore omoseera mono! Ee, nabo ore omoseera mono. Ekieni ki’amaiso ao nigo kenga eki’amaruma." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Aye omwanchi one, nigo ore omoseera. Ee, aye nigo ore oyo bw’okogokia, oborere bwaito togotimokera nigo bonga obonyansi obwororo." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Ebisigisa bi’enyomba yaito nebi’emecharake, ne chindote nechi’emetarakwa." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Inche nigo inga egesicha gia Saroni gekorokwa rosi, naende egesicha ekiya kie rikura." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ee, koreng’ana buna egesicha ekiya kere ase egati y’amagwa, naboigo omwanchi one are ase egati y’abaiseke." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Koreng’ana buna omote bw’amapera osimekire ase egati y’emete y’orosana, naboigo omwanchi one are ase egati y’abamura. Nigo naikaransete ase ekiriri kiaye inde nomogoko, na amatunda aye akanyansera." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Ere akang’ira ase enyomba y’omoyega, na obwanchani bwaye nigo bore buna ebendera igoro yane." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ong’e amasabibu amomo indie imbe nobogima oboyia, ong’e na amapera imbe ne chinguru, ekiagera amaiga ’obwanchani anyarire." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Okoboko kwaye kwa bomosi nigo kore inse y’omotwe one, na okwa borio nigo komboanetie." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Inwe abakungu ba Yerusalemu, nigo nkobasorora, nkobatiania ase chingabi ne chinsune chi’orosana ng’a timobaisa gotabobora obwanchani, gose koboichania, goika bobe bwancheranire obonyene." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Tegerera moigwe eriogi ri’omwanchi one! Rora oyio ogocha! Nigo agocharoka‐charoka igoro ase ebitunwa, na gocharara ase ebigoro." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Omwanchi one nigo anga engabi gose ensune ensae. Rora, bono nigo ateneine magega y’enyasi y’enyomba yaito. Origereretie gocha ime goetera ase chitirisa, goetera ase ekebao kiabekire ebitange." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Omwanchi ngokwana are na gontebia: “Aye omwanchi one, nigo ore omuya, imoka, inchuo togende," 
SongOfSongs2:11 ekiagera bono engaki y’obokendu yaerire, boigo engaki y’embura yaerire." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ebisicha biasichire ase ense, engaki y’amatera yaikire, ee, eriogi ri’amatera ’amaruma riaigurwe ase ense yaito." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Emeko yachakire kwama amako, na emesabibu yachakire gosicha, nigo egotioka rimisu rigiya. Aye omosani one omuya, imoka togende!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Aye riruma riane ore ase omwenya bw’egetare, agwo ase obwebiso bw’egetare, tiga indore obosio bwao, naende inyigwe eriogi riao, ekiagera eriogi riao neriansu, na obosio bwao noboseera." 
SongOfSongs2:15 “Tobwatere ebibwe, ebibwe biria ebike, ebio bigosaria emegondo y’emesabibu, korwa ekero emesabibu yaito yasichete.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Inche nigo inde oyo bw’omwanchi one, nere noyone; nigo akorisia riicho riaye ase egati y’ebisicha ebiya." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Ekero rigochia kogoroba na emerengari egochia gosira, aye omwanchi one, onchoka gocha asende, ominyoke buna engabi, gose buna ensune ensae igoro ase egetunwa kere chinchwara." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Botuko ekero naraire borere bwane, nkamorigia oria omoyo one bwanchete, nkamorigia, korende tinamonyora." 
SongOfSongs3:2 “Bono nigo nkoimoka ngende ase omochie, ng’ete ase chinchera chiaye na ase ebiooreri biaye, ndigie omwanchi bw’omoyo one.” Nkamorigia, korende tinamonyora." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Ekero abarendi barenge goetanana omochie koyorata, bakanyora inche, na inche nkababoria, “Mwarora omwanchi bw’omoyo one?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ase obwango obwo naruete ase abarendi abwo, nkanyora omwanchi bw’omoyo one. Nkamotarera tinamotiga agende; nigo namorentete mwa baba, nkamosoyia gochia ase eero y’oyio onyiborete." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Inwe abakungu ba Yerusalemu, nigo nkobasorora, nkobatiania ase chingabi na ase chinsune chi’orosana ng’a timobaisa gotabobora obwa’nchani gose koboichania, goika bobe bwancheranire obonyene." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ning’o oria ogocha korwa ase erooro onga buna rikundesi ri’erioki? Nigo eagete amaguta a manemane na ubani, na ebinto bisiire bigotioka buya." 
SongOfSongs3:7 Rora aaria, ekerogo gi’okobogoreria Sulemani, geetananire nabanto emerongo etano nomo, abare chituoni chi’Abaisraeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Abwo bonsi nigo beboeranetie emeyio ya birende, na nigo bare abanto bamanyete korwana esegi. Kera oyomo nigo eboeranetie omoyio kenema, orendete ase okogoswa kwa botuko." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Omoruoti Sulemani nigo eroiseretie ekerogo keria korwa ase emete ya Lebanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Amatenenerio aye nigo aroiseirie chifeta, na ekiegeko kiaye nigo kiaroiseirie chitahabu; egeikaransero kiaye nigo giatubire negetambaa kemonyinga. Abakungu ba Yerusalemu nigo bagechaberete ime, bare nomoyo bw’ogwancha." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Inwe abakungu ba Sayoni, inchuo morore Sulemani omoruoti obegete ekiore keria ng’ina amobekerete ase rituko riria Sulemani akoreretwe enyangi, rituko riria ri’omogoko bw’enkoro yaye." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Aye omwanchi one, naki ore omoseera! Naama! Nigo ore omoseera! Korwa ime y’egietubo kiao ekieni ki’amaiso ao nigo kenga eki’amaruma; etukia yao nigo enga buna riicho rie chimbori, nigo chigotirimboka ase ebitirimboko bia Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amaino ao nigo anga ching’ondi chiaberi chianachirwe amarionya, chiarure gosibigwa chiarabire se, chionsi nigo chikobiara chisare, na manwa ende teri gokwa." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Ebikoba biao nigo binga eusi embariri, omonwa oo nigo ore oyo bw’okogokia, chinsea chiao chitubire ime ase egietubo kiao; nigo chinga buna ebing’ese bie ritunda rikomomanga." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Rigoti riao nigo ringa buna omorobiri o Daudi, oyio oagachetwe koba rigachero ri’ebirwanero. Agwo nao ching’aya elifu eyemo chisungire, chionsi nigo chire echi’abarwani esegi bare chituoni." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Chimbeere chiao nigo chinga buna chimanwa ibere buna chisare chi’engabi chikorisia agwo ase egati y’ebisicha ebiya. 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ekero rigochia kogoroba na emerengari egochia gosira, ningende ase egetunwa ase manemane ekoruerwa na ase ekegoro ki’ogosambera ubani." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Aye omwanchi one, nigo ore omoseera bori, tori na kemoa kende!" 
SongOfSongs4:8 Aye omoriakari one, togende torue aa Lebanoni, torue Lebanoni, togende komo. Otirimboke korwa ase egechuria ki’egetunwa ki’Amana, na ekia Seniri na Herimoni. Orue ase amakuruma e chindo, na ase ebitunwa chingo chimenyete." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Aye moiseke ominto, omoriakari one, kwang’usire enkoro yane na kwangokirie, okorigereria kw’amaiso ao kwang’usire enkoro yane, ee, esonoi eyemo yoka ye chisonoi chia igoti riao yang’usire." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Aye moiseke ominto, omoriakari one, obwanchani bwao naki bore obuya mono! Naki bore obuya mono kobua edivai! Ne rimisu ri’amaguta ao ogweaka nigo ribuete ebinsari bionsi!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Aye omoriakari one, ebikoba biao nigo bikonyororokia obooke; obooke na amabeere nigo bire inse y’oromeme rwao. Rimisu rie chianga chiao nigo ringa eria Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Moiseke ominto, omoriakari one, naye omogondo ogiteire, naye ensoko y’amache egiteire, na entuboka emumekire na ebekire ekemanyererio." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Buna omogondo ore namakomomanga aye nigo okwama amatunda amaya mono, na ebisicha bikorokwa hena mbireo, na ebimeri bikorokwa narada," 
SongOfSongs4:14 na ebimeri bigosegwa safarani; boigo kalamusi, na omodalasini, na emete yonsi ya ubani, na manemane, na omogaka, amo nebinsari ebiya mono." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Aye nigo onga buna ensoko y’amache are moyo ere mogondo, naende nigo onga buna chindooche chikorwa Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Aye embeo ekorwa sugusu, imoka! Na aye eyekorwa irianyi, inchuo! Gusa igoro y’omogondo one, tiga rimisu riaye rigiya rirurukigwe rirande. Tiga omwanchi one ache ase omogondo oye, arie amatunda are amaya mono." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Aye moiseke ominto, omoriakari one, nasoire ase omogondo one, ngosangereria inde manemane amo nebinsari biane bigotioka buya; nkoria inde eriana amo nobooke bwane, nkonywa inde edivai yane amo namabeere aane. Inwe abasani, ragera na monywe! Inwe abanchani, kanywe mono!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Inche nigo narenge indaire, korende enkoro yane nigo yategesetie. Igwa! Omwanchi one oyio ogontura. Moiseke ominto, omwanchi one, riruma riane na omoikeranu one, inyigorere! Inyigorere, ekiagera omotwe one otoorire riime, na etukia yane yanyiire nembura ya botuko." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Narusirie eanga, inee, inyebeke naende? Nesibirie amagoro, inee, inyabeke eubi naende?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Erio omwanchi one akabeka okoboko kwaye ase ekebao, erio nkaba nomosasoko omonene ime ase enkoro yane." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Nkaimoka gochia koigorera omwanchi one, amaboko aane akanyororokia manemane, na ebiara biane bigatonyia manemane ase obobwato bw’egesiekero." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ngachia koigorera omwanchi one, korende nkanyora ng’a ochiire. Omoyo one okairianyeka ekero akwanete. Nkaba nkomorigia, korende tinamonyorete. Nkamorangeria, korende taitabete." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Ekero abarendi barenge goetanana omochie koyorata, bakanyora inche, bakang’aka chingoma; bakang’ura egetambaa gi’okwambara, abarendi baria barendete chindwaki." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Inwe abakungu ba Yerusalemu, nigo nkobasorora ng’a mokonyora omwanchi one, momotebie ng’a amaiga ’obwanchani anyarire." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Aye ore omoseera kobua abakungu bonsi, inee, omwanchi oyio oo, naki abuete abanchi bande? Ee, omwanchi oyio oo, naki abuete abanchi bande, goika gwatosoroire iga?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Omwanchi one nigo are omorabu se okomeka‐meka, naende omobariri; nigo are nogwatananekana korwa ase abanto chilifu ikomi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Omotwe oye nigo ore omuya onga etahabu echenire, etukia yaye nigo ere omosamugoku bw’obwari; nigo ere emwamu ti buna amarionya ’ekegonkoru." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaiso aye nigo agwekaine amaruma are ase chindooche, ee, nigo anga amaruma asibigwe namabeere, naende nigo anga amagena akomeka‐meka achokire buya." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Chinsea chiaye nigo chinga buna ebigondo bi’ebimeri bi’ebinsari, bigotioka rimisu rigiya. Ebikoba biaye nigo binga buna ebisicha ebiya, nigo bigotonyia manemane." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Amaboko aye nigo anga buna etahabu ebombire buya, echabeire amagena akomeka‐meka. Omobere oye nigo onga buna amaino e chinchogu aroisirie buya, na gochaberwa namagena e rigori rinene akorokwa safiro." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amagoro aye nigo anga chisiiro chi’amagena amarabu se akomeka‐meka, abekire ase chinterekerero chie chitaabu chingiya. Okororekana kwaye nigo konga buna okwa Lebanoni, ekieni kiaye nigo kere ekiya buna eki’emecharake," 
SongOfSongs5:16 Chinkwana chiaye nigo chire chinyansu mono, chingencho chiaye chionsi nigo chire echi’ogosanerwa mono. Inwe abakungu ba Yerusalemu, naboigo omwanchi one are, oyio ore omosani one." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Aye ore omoseera kobua abakungu bonsi, ng’ai omwanchi oo achiire? Omwanchi oyio oo, ng’ai aonchokire gochia? Togende amo naye tomorigie." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Omwanchi one mogondo agenda, ogendire ase ebigondo bi’ebimeri bi’ebinsari. Ogendire korisia riicho riaye ase emegondo, naende nao akare kona‐gosangereria ebisicha ebiya." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Inche nigo inde oyo bw’omwanchi one, nere nigo are oyone; nigo akorisia riicho riaye agwo ase ebisicha ebiya bire." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Aye omwanchi one, nigo ore omoseera buna omochie o Tirisa; nigo ore bw’okogokia buna Yerusalemu, na oyo bw’okoirokia buna abarwani esegi babogoretie ebendera." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Onchora amaiso ao otige kondigereria, ekiagera ambuire; etukia yao nigo enga buna riicho rie chimbori, chigotirimboka ase ebitirimboko bia Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amaino ao nigo anga riicho rie ching’ondi chiaberi chianachirwe amarionya, chiarure gosibigwa chiarabire se, chionsi nigo chikobiara chisare, na manwa ende teri egokwa." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Chinsea chiao nigo chitubire ime ase egietubo kiao, nigo chinga buna chimbaara chie ritunda rikomomanga." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Mbareo abakungu chiting’ana chi’omoruoti emerongo etano nomo, na abakungu ba sere‐sere emerongo etano na etato, boigo mbareo abaiseke abekungi abange batari kobareka." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Korende oyomo bweka nere omwanchi one, nere riruma riane omoikeranu. Ere nigo are omwana omomoima ng’ina abwate, oyo omoiborete nigo amwanchete. Abaiseke abwo bakamorora, bakamoroka oyosesenirie; abakungu baria chiting’ana na baria ba sere‐sere boigo bakamorora, bakamotogia." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ning’o oyio okorigereria buna erioba rigotonga mambia? Ning’o oyio ore omuya buna omotienyi, na okomeka‐meka buna erioba? Ere nigo are oyo bw’okoirokia buna abarwani esegi babogoretie chibendera chiabo." 
SongOfSongs6:11 Inche nigo natirimbogete gochia ase omogondo bw’emete enga buna emelozi; nkagenda ase rikura korora ebimeri ebiya buna bikoreereta, na korora gose emesabibu yachakire goseboka. Na emekomomanga gose yachakire gosicha." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ekero konya ntaramanya, omoyo one okang’ira, okambeka ase egari y’omogambi bw’abanto baane." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Irana! Irana, aye Omosulamiti! Irana! Irana, erinde tokorigererie! Nase ki mokondi gereria inche Omosulamiti, buna mokorigereria ogotenga kw’ebiombe bibere bi’abarwani esegi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Aye omoiseke bw’omogambi, naki ebisanyi bi’amagoro ao bire ebiya ase ebikoroto ime! Naki amariagati ao amerete buya, are buna emeremo y’omoroisia omong’aini." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ekenyobu kiao nigo keborongosire buya buna egetaabo getari koererwa edivai yochoganirie. Enda yao nigo ere buna etui y’engano, eetananeirie ebisicha ebiya." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Chimbeere chiao nigo chinga buna chimanwa ibere chire chisare chi’engabi. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Rigoti riao nigo ringa buna omorobiri oroiseirie amaino e chinchogu, amaiso ao nigo anga buna amatibo a Hesiboni, ang’e negeita kia Bati‐Rabimu. Emioro yao nigo enga buna omorobiri o Lebanoni orochie Damesiki." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Omotwe oo nigo osongoire buna egetunwa gia Karimeli. Etukia y’omotwe oo ekona‐gosanyoka nigo ere ekieni kemonyinga; eyio yang’usire omoruoti. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Naki aye ore omoseera naende oyo bw’okogokia mono! Aye omwanchi bw’okogokia! 
SongOfSongs7:7 Aye nigo okinete buna omokendo, ne chimbeere chiao nigo chire buna ebisago bi’amasabibu." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Nkarengereria: Nkoriina inde omokendo oyo, imbwaterere chinsagia chiaye. Naki yare koba buya onye chimbeere chiao nchiaba buna ebisago bi’amasabibu, ne rimisu ri’omonwa oo ribe buna eri’amapera," 
SongOfSongs7:9 na omonwa oo obe buna edivai ere engiya mono. Ee, edivai eyio nigo egetirimboka gochia ime y’omwanchi one, naende yanyororoka ng’ora ng’ora, yakuna ebikoba bi’abwo baraire." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Inche nigo inde oyo bw’omwanchi one, ere nigo are namaiga asende." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Aye omwanchi one, inchuo togende ase amaremo aito, tobeere ase emechie botuko," 
SongOfSongs7:12 toimoke mambia chuni togende ase emegondo y’emesabibu, torore gose yachakire goseboka, naende gose amasabibu amanokire na gosicha, boigo gose amakomomanga asichire. Aroro agwo ninkoboanie nobwanchani bwane." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Aye omwanchi one, amatunda amansu nigo agotioka rimisu rigiya mono, na igoro y’ebisieri biaito nareo amatunda ao ao are amaya mono, amakoro na amayia; ayio nasangereirie ase ogokogachera." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Onye ndiria kwarenge koba momura ominto, kwagongete orobeere rwa baba! Onye ndiria naumeranete naye isiko, nanga nigo nare gokonyunyunta, na onde tare gonchaya." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nigo nanga nakorentete mwa baba, obe gokonyorokereria. Nigo nare gocha gokoa onywe edivai yochoganirie ebinsari, naende nkoe amache amitire korwa ase amakomomanga aane." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Okoboko kwaye kwa bomosi nigo kore inse y’omotwe one, na okwa borio komboanetie." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Inwe abakungu ba Yerusalemu, nigo nkobasorora na kobatiania ng’a timobaisa gotabobora obwanchani na koboichania, goika bobe bwancheranire obonyene." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Monto ki oria ogotiira gocha aa korwa ase erooro, oyio bweegegete omwanchi oye? Agwo inse y’omote bw’amapera inche nigo nagoturete oboke. Aroro agwo nyoko nigo arenge nobororo bw’okobina akoibore, ee, agwo nao nyoko akoiborerete ore nobororo." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Imbeke ase enkoro yao imbe buna ebonyi ere nekemanyererio, ee, buna ebonyi ere nekemanyererio ase okoboko kwao. Obwanchani nigo bore ne chinguru buna amakweri, ne ribero nigo rire ritindi buna embeera. Ogwoka kw’obwanchani nigo konga ebibemberi bi’omorero, ee, nekebemberi gekorwa ase Omonene." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amache are amange mono takonyara gokendia obwanchani, gose chindooche tichikonyara koboiranana. Omonto naisa korua obotenenku bwonsi bw’enyomba yaye konyora obwanchani, oyio nigo arachaywe." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Intwe ntobwate omoiseke ominto ore omoke, korende taracha chimbeere; ekero engaki yaye erache akorigigwa anyuomwe, ninki torakorere omoiseke oyio ominto?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ere karabe orwaki, ntoagache igoro yaye omorobiri oroiseirie efeta, korende karabe egesieri, rirorio ntomosiekere ne chibao chi’emecharake." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Inche nigo inde orwaki, ne chimbeere chiane nigo chinga buna emerobiri; ase ayio nkaba ase amaiso aye buna oyo onyorire omorembe." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Sulemani nabwate omogondo bw’emesabibu agwo Baali‐Hamoni, akayotigera abarendi, na kera omorendi nigo arenge korenta chibesa chie chifeta elifu eyemo goakanera amatunda." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Korende omogondo bw’emesabibu oyore oyone bori ninche omonyene nyorendete. Aye Sulemani, ira chilifu chiao, na abarendi b’amatunda baire amagana abere." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Aye oria omenyete ase emegondo, abagisangio baane nigo bategererete baigwe eriogi riao, tiga nainche indiigwe." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Aye omwanchi one, minyoka bwango, obe buna engabi gose ensune ensae ekominyoka igoro ase ebitunwa bire nebimeri bigotioka buya." 
Isaiah1:1 Aya namaroro Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, aroche igoro y’ense y’Abayuda na omochie o Yerusalemu ekero Usia, na Yotamu, na Ahasi, na Hezekia, barenge abaruoti ase ense y’Abayuda." 
Isaiah1:1 Aya namaroro Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, aroche igoro y’ense y’Abayuda na omochie o Yerusalemu ekero Usia, na Yotamu, na Ahasi, na Hezekia, barenge abaruoti ase ense y’Abayuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Inwe igoro, na aye ense, tegerera moigwe, ekiagera Omonene okwanire, ogoteba: “Abana nabeire nkorera na kobakinia basaririe asende." 
Isaiah1:3 Eng’ombe nigo emanyete omonyene, na etigere nigo emanyete aase omonene oye akoyeera endagera, korende Abaisraeli tibamanyeti kende, ee, amaene, abanto baane tibamanyeti kende gionsi.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Obobe nobwaino inwe egesaku kere nebibe ebinge, inwe abanto moritoeire nobobe, inwe oroiboro rw’abasaria, abanto abakorekanu, mogokora ogosaria. Mwangire Omonene, mwachayire Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, mwairanire nyuma na mwamotigire kegima." 
Isaiah1:5 Nase ki mogendererete gosaria? Nigo moganetie konyora egesusuro goetania? Omotwe bwonsi orwarire, na enkoro yanyarekire." 
Isaiah1:6 Korwa egesanyi gi’okogoro inse goika omotwe igoro, aande tari are buya. Chingoma nchireo, na obobimbu, na amaote akorua amaira. Amaote ayio tasibiri na kobogwa, gose taakiri amaguta ororobe." 
Isaiah1:7 Ense yaino yasarigwe yatigaire ere bosa, emechie yaino yasambirwe nomorero; abanto b’egesaku ekeao barire okwama kw’emegondo yaino ase amaiso aino. Ense yasarigwe na koonchoranwa nabarabwo." 
Isaiah1:8 Omoiseke oria Sayoni otigirwe buna egesa gi’okorendera kere ase omogondo bw’emesabibu giatigirwe bosa; nigo anga buna ekegutu kere ase omogondo bw’amasosa, na buna omochie oboeire." 
Isaiah1:9 Onye Omonene bw’Emeganda atatotigerete abatigari bake, nanga nigo twabete buna Sodomu na Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Inwe abagambi ba Sodomu, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene! Inwe abanto ba Gomora, tegerera moigwe amorokererio a Nyasae oito!" 
Isaiah1:11 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ebing’wanso biaino ebinge mokorua asende, ninki ndakore nabirobio? Nigo narosire nebing’wannso bi’ogosambwa bie chimingichi, na ebitinya bie ching’iti chinoru. Tingokiri namanyinga e chieri, gose aye chimanwa chie ching’ondi, gose aye chigoree." 
Isaiah1:12 Ning’o okobaboria ng’a morentane ebinto ebio bionsi ekero mogocha ase obosio bwane na gotaara‐taara ase chiraaro chiane? 
Isaiah1:13 Tiga korenta asende ebing’wanso bi’obong’ainereria; ogosambwa kwa ubani kwabeire okogechia asende, naboigo nemeyega y’Emetienyi Emeyia, ne Chisabato, na emesangererekano mokorangeria. Tinkonyara koremereria emesangererekano buna eyio yasarigwe nebibe." 
Isaiah1:14 Inche nigo ngechete emeyega y’Amatuko Amanene na ey’Emetienyi Emeyia; eyio yabeire egurube endito asende, narosire ase okona‐koyeremereria." 
Isaiah1:15 “Ekero morarambore amaboko aino ase ogosaba, inche nigo ndatube amaiso aane timbarora, na ekero morabe mogosaba mono, tinkobaigwa ekiagera amaboko aino nigo aichire amanyinga." 
Isaiah1:16 Esibie na mwechene; rusia ogokora kwaino okobe korwa ase amaiso aane; tiga gokora ayare amabe. 
Isaiah1:17 Mweorokererie gokora ayare amaya, rigia ay’oboronge; bakonye abwo bagokorerwa bobe; rwanerera chintakana, na monyorere ababoraka oboronge bwabo.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inchuo togamberane nonya ebibe biaino biabariirire, mbisibigwe birabe se, bibe buna amagena ’embura; nonya biabeire ebibariri burure, mbirabe se bibe buna amarionya amarabu e ching’ondi." 
Isaiah1:19 Komoranche koigwera, rirorio morie amaya ay’ense," 
Isaiah1:20 korende komoraange koigwera naende komorasarie, goika moitwe nemioro. Nabo inche Omonene natebire nomonwa one.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Omochie oyio orenge omwegenwa obeire buna omokungu omotayayi. Agwo kare nigo orenge konacha ebina bia boronge, na oboronge nigo bwarenge ime yaye, korende bono abanto baye babeire abaiti." 
Isaiah1:22 Chifeta chiao chiabeire bosa buna amabiria, na edivai yao yochoganigwe namache." 
Isaiah1:23 Abatang’ani bao nigo bare abasaria, naende babeire abagisangio b’abaibi. Kera oyomo obo nigo anchete riaaki, na nigo are omwango kwerigeria ebitoki. Tibari korwanerera chintakana, nigo bakwanga koigwa amang’ana ’ababoraka." 
Isaiah1:24 Ase ayio Omonene, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, ore Omobui ase egati y’Abaisraeli, otebire iga: “Naama! Ning’itere endamwamu yane ase ababisa baane, naende inche omonyene ninyeruserie egesiomba asebare." 
Isaiah1:25 Ning’onchore okoboko kwane kobe igoro yao, konyititore, korusie amabiria ao buna ogosisikerigwa kwe ribu na korusia ayatakogwenereti." 
Isaiah1:26 Nimbae naende abagambi ebina buna baria be ritang’ani, na abasemia buna baria ba kare. Nyuma y’ayio norokwe Omochie bw’Oboronge, na Omochie bw’Obwegenwa.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Omochie o Sayoni nigo oraboorigwe goetera ase ekina kia boronge na abaonchokire ime yaye mbaboorigwe goetera ase oboronge. 
Isaiah1:28 Korende abasaria na abanyabibe nigo barasirigwe amo; na abwo batigire Omonene mbasirigwe boigo. 
Isaiah1:29 Inwe namobe nobosooku ase emete eyio enga emetontera mwagokerete, na ase emegondo eyio mwachorete." 
Isaiah1:30 Inwe namobe buna omotontera oyo amato aye omire, na buna omogondo oborirwe amache." 
Isaiah1:31 Abanto bare ne chinguru nababe buna amasakwe amomo, na emeremo yabo ebe buna chinsase chi’omorero, abwo mbasambwe bayiere amo, na onde tari orarimie omorero oyio." 
Isaiah2:1 Ring’ana eri nario Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, aroche igoro y’Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu:" 
Isaiah2:1 Ring’ana eri nario Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, aroche igoro y’Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu:" 
Isaiah2:2 Nebe ase amatuko ’omoerio, ng’a egetunwa ki’enyomba y’Omonene ngekong’igwe kebe eki’engencho enene kobua ebinde; naende keimokererigwe igoro geetanie ebigoro, na ebisaku bionsi mbiendoke gochiao." 
Isaiah2:3 Ee, abanto abange mbagendeo batebanie: “Inchuo, totiire gochia ase egetunwa ki’Omonene, togende ase enyomba ya Nyasae o Yakobo, erinde atworokererie chinchera chiaye, na intwe tonyare kobwatia oboeto bwaye.” Amachiko ’Omonene nasoke korwa Sayoni, ne ring’ana riaye ndirue Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah2:4 Erio Omonene nanache ekina ase egati y’ebisaku, nae abanto abange oboronge bwabo, barabwo mbature emioro yabo ebe amakombe akorema, na amatimo abo abe emeyio chinkuro; egesaku tigekoimokera egesaku kende nemioro, gose abanto tibakweorokereria korwana esegi naende." 
Isaiah2:5 Inwe abanto b’enyomba ya Yakobo inchuo totaare ase omobaso bw’Omonene. 
Isaiah2:6 Aye Omonene kwangire abanto bao, abwo bare ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo, ekiagera barabwo baichoirwe ne chingencho chi’abanto ba moocha, na nigo bagokora oboringoria buna obw’Abafilisti; boigo babwatanire nabanto be chinse chingeni." 
Isaiah2:7 Ense yabo nigo eichire ne chifeta ne chitahabu, ne chinibo chiabo tichiri nomoerio. Ense yabo nigo eichire ne chibarasi, ne chigari chiabo tichikoera." 
Isaiah2:8 Ense yabo nigo eichire nemegwekano y’ogosasimwa, nigo bagotung’ama inse basasima emeremo y’amaboko abo, eyio bakorire nebiara biabo abanyene." 
Isaiah2:9 Ase enchera eyio abanto nigo barakeeigwe, ee, abanene babo nigo barairanigwe inse; tobaisa kobaabera." 
Isaiah2:10 Inwe soa ase egetare ime, moreme chingoro mwebiseo, motame korwa ase okoirokia kw’Omonene, na korwa ase obonene bwaye bore obonene." 
Isaiah2:11 Okorigereria kw’obomwenu bwa mwanyabanto nkoiranigwe inse, na oboenenu bwabo mbokeeigwe, na ase rituko erio Omonene bweka naimokererigwe igoro." 
Isaiah2:12 Omonene bw’Emeganda ochikire rituko erimo arasirie abwo bonsi bare abaenenu na abamwenu, na bonsi abakweimokereria igoro mbairanigwe inse." 
Isaiah2:13 Rituko erio ndisirie emecharake yonsi ya Lebanoni ere emetambe echongororogete gochia igoro mono; boigo ndiikere nemete yonsi ya Basani enga buna emetontera," 
Isaiah2:14 na ebitunwa bionsi ebitambe, na ebigoro bionsi biimokererete igoro," 
Isaiah2:15 na emerobiri yonsi emetambe, ne chindwaki chinkong’u," 
Isaiah2:16 ne chimeeri chionsi chia Tarisisi, na ebinto ebiya biroisirie ase obong’aini." 
Isaiah2:17 Obomwenu bwa mwanyabanto mbokeeigwe, na oboenenu bwabo mboiranigwe inse, na ase rituko erio Omonene bweka naimokererigwe igoro." 
Isaiah2:18 Emegwekano yonsi egosasimwa nesirigwe kegima. 
Isaiah2:19 Abanto mbasoe ase amakuruma ’ebitare, na ase chingoro chire ase riroba; mbatame korwa ase okoirokia kw’Omonene, na korwa ase obonene bwaye bore obonene, ekero araimoke kwoboyia ense." 
Isaiah2:20 Ase rituko erio abanto mbatugute emegwekano yabo ye chifeta na eye chitahabu, ebinto ebio beroiseretie ase okobisasima, mbabitugutere ching’uko na ebitabora mato." 
Isaiah2:21 Erio basoe ase emienya y’ebitare, na ase obotandoku bw’aroro, mbatame korwa ase okoirokia kw’Omonene, na korwa ase obonene bwaye bore obonene mono, ekero araimoke kwoboyia ense." 
Isaiah2:22 Ase ayio, batige mwanyabanto, abwo okoeyana kwabo gwe chimioro kore embeo bosa. Omonto, ninki aisaine?" 
Isaiah3:1 Naama! Omonene, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, narusie korwa ase Yerusalemu, na korwa ase Abayuda, kera egento basemeretie na ebi begenete; narusieo endagera yonsi, na amache onsi." 
Isaiah3:2 Narusie korwao abanto bare chituoni na abarwani bande b’esegi, na abagambi ebina, na ababani, na abaringoria, na abagaaka," 
Isaiah3:3 na abatang’ani b’abarwani emerongo etano, na abanto abasike, na abasemia, na abaroisia abang’aini, na abaragori bamanyete oborogi mono." 
Isaiah3:4 Nigo agoteba: “Nimbeke abasae babe abanene babo, na abataraisana kogamba babagambere.”" 
Isaiah3:5 Abanto mbachandane, kera omonto nabe ogochanda oyonde, na kera omonto nabe ogochanda omogisangio oye; omwana omoke naenenere omonto omogotu, na omonto otarochi nchera nachaye omonto osikire." 
Isaiah3:6 Engaki eyio omonto nabwate oyomwabo baiboire komo amotebie, “Aye nobwate chianga okobeka, ase ayio kabe omogambi oito, otenenere obogambi obo bwanyegerigwe.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Korende ase rituko erio oyio nakane bokong’u, atebe, “Inche tinkonyara koba omogwenia; ase enyomba yane endagera teiyo, gose eanga, ase ayio timokonyara kombeka imbe omoraai bw’abanto.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Yerusalemu otagoirwe, na Abayuda bagure, ekiagera chinkwana chiabo na ogokora kwabo biabeire mamincha y’Omonene, na ase engencho eyio bagechirie amaiso ’Omonene ore nobonene." 
Isaiah3:9 Okororekana kw’amaiso abo kwababereire kirori; nigo bakoraria ebibe biabo buna Abasodomu bakorete, tibari kobibisa. Obobe nobwabo! Barabwo abanyene berenteire obobe obwo." 
Isaiah3:10 Tebia abanyene oboronge ng’a amang’ana nabe amaya asebare, barabwo mbarie okwama kw’ogokora kwabo." 
Isaiah3:11 Obobe nobwabo abakori amabe! Amang’ana nabe amabe asebare, ekiagera aya amaboko abo abeire agokora, naro barakorerwe abanyene." 
Isaiah3:12 Abanto baane nigo bagochandwa nabana, na abakungu nabwo bakobagambera. Inwe abanto baane, abaraai baino babatantanirie enchera, babasiririe ase enchera mogoeta." 
Isaiah3:13 Omonene obeire ang’e korenta ekina, otenenire konachera ebisaku ekina." 
Isaiah3:14 Omonene nachake kogambia abagaaka na abagambi b’abanto baye, atebe, “Ninwe mwarire omogondo one bw’emesabibu, na ebisakorwa bi’abataka nigo bire ase chinyomba chiaino." 
Isaiah3:15 Omonene Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nigo akoboria iga: Ninki mokorengereria goika mwasunyuntire abanto baane na gosia amasio ’abataka?”" 
Isaiah3:16 Omonene nigo agoteba, “Abakungu ba Sayoni nigo bare aberori, nigo bagotaara basongorete amagoti, na bagoaka‐akania amaiso are nokogania okobe; nigo bagotira‐tiria kobakogenda na kwogia chinchigiri chire amagoro abo." 
Isaiah3:17 Ase ayio Omonene nae abakungu ba Sayoni oborwaire bw’ogosunyora chitukia chiabo, naende abaasiorie chianga abatige bare getirianda.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Ase rituko erio Omonene nabaure ebinto bionsi bechaberete: ebitange bi’amagoro, na ebitinti, ne chisonoi chi’amagoti," 
Isaiah3:19 na ebigera bi’amato, ne chitaai chi’amaboko, na ebiechabero bia metwe," 
Isaiah3:20 na ebinyuri bi’amagoro, ne chinkini chi’okweboeria, ne chichuba chire namaguta agotioka, na ebite bi’ogwekong’era," 
Isaiah3:21 ne chibonyi chire nebimanyererio, na ebigera bie chimioro," 
Isaiah3:22 ne chiganchwa chi’emeyega, ne chigoti chi’okwambara, na ebiambaro bi’amareko, na emebuko ya koboko," 
Isaiah3:23 na ebirore, ne chianga chi’egatani chie rigori rinene, na ebigogwa, na ebietubo." 
Isaiah3:24 Ribaga ri’ogotioka okuya nobogundo borabeo, ne ribaga ri’orokini nengori erabeo, ne ribaga ri’etukia eroisirie buya nerisio rirabeo, ne ribaga ri’okobeka chiganchwa chi’emeyega mweboyie chigunia, ne ribaga ri’oboseera mbabe namasambo are ekemanyererio gi’okobugwa." 
Isaiah3:25 Abanto baino mbaitwe nemioro, na abarwani baino chituoni mbakwere ase esegi." 
Isaiah3:26 Ebiita bi’omochie oyio mbirere na kobokia amagombo; nigo oraikaranse inse obe otigarete bosa. 
Isaiah4:1 Ase engaki eyio abakungu batano na babere mbabwate omosacha oyomo, bamotebie, “Intwe abanyene ntwenyorere endagera tokoria ne chianga tokobeka, korende tiga rioka torokwe abakungu bao, erinde otoruserie obosooku.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Ase engaki eyio Omoseboka bw’Omonene noseboke ore omoseera na ore nobonene, na okwama gw’ense nkobe obonene na obosiani bw’Abaisraeli abaratooreke." 
Isaiah4:3 Erio nebe ng’a kera omonto otigarete ase Sayoni, na ase Yerusalemu, narokwe omochenu, kera oyomo oyorikire ase egati y’abwo bare moyo ase Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah4:4 Ase omoika bw’okonacha ekina na gochena, Omonene nasibie obobe bw’abakungu ba Sayoni, naende achene abanto ba Yerusalemu korwa ase okomocha kwabo kw’ogoitera amanyinga." 
Isaiah4:5 Igoro y’Egetunwa gia Sayoni gionsi, na igoro y’abanto bonsi basangererekaneteo, Omonene natonge riire na erioki bibeo mobaso, na omorero okomesa obeo botuko; na igoro y’obonene obwo bwonsi egietubo gi’okorenda nkebekweo." 
Isaiah4:6 Ekiriri nkebeo ki’ogokenderera korwa ase omobaso, naende kebe obotamero na oborendi bw’ogwekengera korwa ase embura y’omoubera." 
Isaiah5:1 Bono nimoterere omwanchi one, nintere igoro y’omwanchi one na igoro y’omogondo oye bw’emesabibu. Omwanchi one nabwate omogondo bw’emesabibu ase ekegoro egetobu." 
Isaiah5:2 Akayorema, agachora amagena ase okoyobonga, akarigia emesabibu emiya akayesi meka aroro; ase egati yaye akaagacha omorobiri bw’okoyorendera, agakunya egeteera gi’okomitera amasabibu. Erio akaganya ore nogosemeria ng’a omogondo mbwame amasabibu amaya, korende okama amasabibu amegarori." 
Isaiah5:3 Ase ayio bono, inwe abanto momenyete Yerusalemu, na inwe Abayuda, nababoririe monache ekina ase egati yane na omogondo one." 
Isaiah5:4 Inee! Ngento ki nanga nayokorerete goetania, ekio ntakorete? Ekero nasemeretie ng’a mbwame amasabibu amaya, Inee, nase ki bwamete amasabibu amegarori?" 
Isaiah5:5 Bono nkobatebia inde eki ngochia gokora ase omogondo oyio one bw’emesabibu: Nintagore orobago rwaye, ntagore na orwaki rwaye, na omogondo oyio obe okorisigwa na gotiringwa." 
Isaiah5:6 Ninyotige ogenderere gosareka; emesabibu tegososwa gose koburugerwa; amageri na amagwa mbikineo na koyotuba; boigo ninchike amare tayotweria embura. 
Isaiah5:7 Abaisraeli nabwo omogondo bw’emesabibu bw’Omonene bw’Emeganda, na Abayuda nabwo ekemeri kiaye asimegete na gokegokera. Ekero asemeretie arore ogokora kw’oboronge, akarora abande bagokorerwa bobe, na ekero asemeretie arore oboronge, akaigwa ebirero." 
Isaiah5:8 Obobe nobwabo abwo bakwementera enyomba ase enyomba, naende bementera oboremo ase oboremo, goika bakoora aase onsi, erinde ng’a barabwo boka bamenye ase ense eyio engima." 
Isaiah5:9 Omonene bw’Emeganda otianire ase inche inyigwete ogoteba, “Ekeene, chinyomba chinyinge, chinene ne chingiya, goika chitigare bosa chitamenyiri nabanto." 
Isaiah5:10 Omogondo bw’emesabibu ore chieka ikomi nigo orame amasabibu akomitwa aisaine egetonga ekemo gioka, na embusuro eichire ebitonga ikomi nigo erame eyeisaine egetonga ekemo gioka.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Obobe nobwabo abwo bakoimoka mambia chuni, baminyoka gochia konywa ebinyugwa bigotindia, abwo bakogenderera kobeera agwo goika obotuko bokia, erinde edivai eyio yabasamba na kobaonchorana." 
Isaiah5:12 Ase emeyega yabo nigo bakoba bare namakano ao ao, ne chinchigiri, na ebiroria, na edivai, korende tibari korengereria ogokora kw’Omonene, gose tibari korora emeremo y’amaboko aye." 
Isaiah5:13 Ase ayio, abanto baane nigo bagwoswa na koirwa ase obosomba ase ogotaba nobong’aini; abanene babo abasike nigo bagokwa nenchara, na omoganda obo ore neburu‐buru orang’ire mono ase okoborwa amache." 
Isaiah5:14 Ase ayio, aase abakure atoonire na gwasamia omonwa oye goetania ekerengo, na abare nobonene ase omochie oyio, na emeganda ere aroro, na ebiombe bire neburu‐buru, na bonsi abagochenga ime yaye, mbatirimboke gochia aase agwo." 
Isaiah5:15 Mwanyabanto onde bwensi nigo arakumbwe, na abanto abanene bakeeigwe gocha inse, na amaiso ’obomwenu nigo arakanywe." 
Isaiah5:16 Korende Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo akoimokererigwa igoro goetera ase ekina gi’ekeene, na Nyasae ore Omochenu bweorokia ng’a nomochenu are ase oboronge bwaye." 
Isaiah5:17 Aase agwo nao ching’ondi chirabe chikorisia abe buna oborisia bwabo, na amatuuri atigirwe nabanda nairwe nabarisia bakonakong’anya‐ng’anya." 
Isaiah5:18 Obobe nobwabo abwo bakweng’usera obobe ne chingori chi’obong’ainereria, abwo bakweng’usera ebibe buna ne chingori chie chigari," 
Isaiah5:19 bateba, “Tiga Omonene ache bwango, aayererie emeremo yaye, erinde toyerore. Tiga aya Oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli aroberetie asuke gocha ang’e aikerane, erio nario toranyare koyamanya.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Obobe nobwabo abwo bakoroka ayare amabe amaya, na ayare amaya amabe, na babeka omosunte ase oborabu bore, na oborabu ase omosunte ore, na babeka obororo ribaga ri’obwansu, na obwansu ribaga ri’obororo." 
Isaiah5:21 Obobe nobwabo abwo bagwekora abang’aini, naende bagwekora abamanyi." 
Isaiah5:22 Obobe nobwabo abwo bare chituoni ase okonywa edivai, naende bare abaremu ase ogwochogania amo ebinyugwa bigotindia," 
Isaiah5:23 abwo bakoegwa riaaki baa oyore nokomocha oboronge, erio barina omonyene oboronge oboronge bwaye." 
Isaiah5:24 Ase ayio, buna koreng’ana chimeme chi’omorero chigosamba amasakwe, na buna obonyansi obwomo bokoyia bwasira, naboigo na omori bw’abanto abwo oragunde, na ebisicha biabo birurukigwe buna orotu, ekiagera bangire amachiko ’Omonene bw’Emeganda, na bachayire ring’ana ri’Omonene bw’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Ase ayio endamwamu y’Omonene yokire ase abanto baye, na ere oramboire okoboko kwaye asebare obaakire. Ebitunwa biatengechigwe, na emebere y’abanto bakwete nebe buna eubi ase chinchera. Nonya ayio onsi agochia koba igo, endamwamu yaye tekoera; okoboko kwaye nigo koragenderere korua egesururo." 
Isaiah5:26 Omonene natenenie ekemanyererio gi’okorangeria egesaku kemenyete aare, nabugie omororia akerangerie geche korwa ensinyo y’ense, na rora, nkeminyoke geche bwango." 
Isaiah5:27 Ase abanto abwo onde takorosa, gose kogochwa, gose gosundoka, gose korara chitoro, gose orokini rwa kenema tirokonyanyoka, gose chinuga chi’ebikoroto tichikobutoka." 
Isaiah5:28 Emegwe yabo nigo ere emioge, na amata abo nigo atingire; ebitaago bie chibarasi chiabo nigo binga buna amagena amakong’u, na amagoro e chigari chiabo nigo akominyoka buna ekerambauti." 
Isaiah5:29 Ooruma kwabo nigo konga buna okw’endo, nigo bakoruma buna chindo chinsae na koronya; nigo bakobwata na koira ebisakore na abooswa, na onde tari oranyare gotooria." 
Isaiah5:30 Ee, ase rituko erio nigo bararumere abanto buna enyancha ekoruma. Omonto kararigererie ense, nigo ararore omosunte na emechando, na oborabu mbotubwe nomosunte." 
Isaiah6:1 Ase omwaka oria omoruoti Usia akwete, nkarora Omonene oikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene kiaimokererete igoro. Egesicho kiaye nigo kiarenge kegokurura inse nigo giaichorete ase Hekalu yonsi." 
Isaiah6:2 Goetanana ase Omonene, abaserafi mbateneine aroro; kera oyomo obo nigo abwate chimbaba isano nemo, na kera oyomo nigo atubete obosio bwaye ne chimbaba ibere, na amagoro aye ne chimbaba ibere, na akairurukera chimbaba chinde ibere." 
Isaiah6:3 Bakarangerania, bagateba, “Omochenu, Omochenu, Omochenu, nere Omonene bw’Emeganda; obonene bwaye bwaichoire ase ense engima.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Amariogi ay’okorangerania koria agatengechia oboroso bw’emetobwa ya inse y’ebisieri bie Hekalu, na erioki rigaichora ime ase enyomba eria." 
Isaiah6:5 Erio ngateba, “Obobe nobwane, ekiagera nasirire! Inche nigo mbwate ebikoba bitachenegeti, na nigo imenyete ase egati y’abanto babwate ebikoba bitachenegeti; naende amaiso aane arorire Omoruoti, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Erio omoserafi oyomo akairuruka gocha asende, obogoretie ase okoboko kwaye rikara rire nomorero, erio arusetie ne rigami korwa ase egesasimero." 
Isaiah6:7 Erio agakuna omonwa one ne rikara riria, agateba, “Rora, rikara eri ri’omorero riakunire ebikoba biao; ogosaria kwao kwarusigweo, na ebibe biao biaabeirwe.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Nyuma y’ayio nkaigwa Omonene okoboria, “Ning’o ngotoma, na ning’o oranyare koba omotomwa oito?” Nkairaneria ngateba, “Nao inde aa, ntome.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Omonene agantebia, “Genda otebie abanto aba: Okoigwa, nkoigwa more, korende timori komanya gento, na okorora, nkorora more, korende timori korengereria." 
Isaiah6:10 Okore chinkoro chi’abanto aba chibe chinkong’u, na amato abo abe amarito ase okoigwa, na amaiso abo aukore, erinde tibabaisa korora namaiso abo, gose koigwa namato abo, gose komanya ne chinkoro chiabo, baonchoke, bagwenigwe.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Erio nkaboria, “Aye Omonene, ngoika ririri amang’ana ayio arabe igo?” Nere akairaneria, agantebia, “Ngoika ekero emechie erabe yasarigwe etamenyiri nabanto, ne chinyomba chiatigirwe bosa, na ense ebe yasarigwe kegima na yabeire amatongo." 
Isaiah6:12 Inche Omonene ning’anyie abanto abwo korwa ase ense eyio bagende aare, na aase agwo aratigwe are bosa, nabe aange mono ase ense eyio." 
Isaiah6:13 Nebe ng’a ensemo eyemo ya ikomi yatigaire ere aroro, barabwo boigo mbasirigwe, buna koreng’ana omote onga omotontera otemirwe, egesike giatigaireo.” Egesike ekio nigo kerabe embusuro enchenu." 
Isaiah7:1 Ekero Ahasi, mosinto o Yotamu mosinto o Usia, arenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Resini, omoruoti bw’Abasiiria, na Peka, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, mosinto o Remalia, abwo babere bagatiira gochia Yerusalemu koyorwania, korende tibanyarete koyobua." 
Isaiah7:2 Ekero amang’ana aigete ase abanto b’enyomba ya Daudi ng’a Abasiiria babwatanire n’Abaefraimu, enkoro y’omoruoti amo nechi’abanto baye chikanyegerigwa buna emete ye rinani ekonyegerigwa nomwaga." 
Isaiah7:3 Erio Omonene agatebia Isaya, “Genda amo na Seari‐Yasuba, momura oo, morotote Ahasi agwo ase omotaro bw’amache e ritibo ria rogoro ase enchera ekogenda egetii ki’omosibia ebitambaa bikoroisigwa chianga," 
Isaiah7:4 omotebie: Erende, kabe nobotoereru toiroka. Tokwa omoyo ase engencho y’endamwamu enene ya Resini oyio ore amo n’Abasiiria, na eya mosinto o Remalia, abwo bare buna ebigenga bibere bikoimokia erioki." 
Isaiah7:5 Abasiiria amo n’Abaefraimu, na mosinto o Remalia, bakorire emeroberio emebe igoro yao bagoteba:" 
Isaiah7:6 Inchuo togende torwanie ense y’Abayuda toyioboyie, toyebue ebe eyaito, erinde tobeke mosinto o Tabeeli abe omoruoti aroro.”" 
Isaiah7:7 “Korende aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ayio tagokorekana, gose tagoikeranigwa," 
Isaiah7:8 ekiagera Damesiki noro omochie omonene bw’Abasiiria, na Resini nere omogambi o Damesiki; na ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo etano nomo, na etano, Abaefraimu mbasenyentwe basirigwe kegima, tibagenderera koba egesaku." 
Isaiah7:9 Samaria noro omochie omonene bw’Abaefraimu, na mosinto o Remalia nere omogambi o Samaria. “Onye timori nokwegena timokogenderera kobao.”" 
Isaiah7:10 Omonene agakwana na Ahasi naende, akamotebia," 
Isaiah7:11 “Boria Omonene, Nyasae oo, akoe ekemanyererio; tiga kerwe aase abakure inse, gose kerwe igoro mono.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Korende Ahasi akairaneria, “Tinkonyara koboria, na tinkonyara komoteema Omonene.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Erio Isaya agateba, “Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Daudi, igwa bono! Inee! Namang’ana amasinini mono asemore korosia abanto, na bono mwamorosirie na Nyasae one boigo?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ase ayio Omonene omonyene nabae ekemanyererio eke: Naama! Omoiseke omwekungi nabe morito, erio aibore omwana omoisia, namoroke erieta riaye Imanueli." 
Isaiah7:15 Ekero omwana oyio arabe omanyire kwanga amabe na gochora amaya, nabe okoria amaguta ’amabeere na obooke." 
Isaiah7:16 Ekero omwana oria ataramanya kwanga amabe, na gochora amaya, ense y’abaruoti abwo babere bagokogechia nebe yatigirwe bosa." 
Isaiah7:17 “Omonene narente amatuko amabe igoro asore, na ase abanto bao, na ase abanto b’ororeria rwa iso, amatuko buna ayio atana koba bo rinde korwa ekero Abaefraimu beatananete korwa ase Abayuda; narente omoruoti bw’Abaasuri.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Ase engaki eye Omonene nabugie omororia, arangerie chingi echio chimenyete ase omochakano bw’ebirooche bia Misiri, naende arangerie chinchoke chire ase ense y’Abaasuri." 
Isaiah7:19 Echio chionsi nchiche chimenye ase amagoko, na ase chingako chi’ebitare, na ase ebitutu bi’amagwa, na ase ebitii bionsi." 
Isaiah7:20 Ase engaki eyio Omonene narente omoyio o tukia korwa ng’umbu y’orooche rw’Eufarati, noro omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akigitere chitukia chi’emetwe yabo, na agingire amarionya ’amagoro ne chinderu chiabo." 
Isaiah7:21 Ase engaki eyio omonto nabe otugete ritororo erimo, ne ching’ondi ibere;" 
Isaiah7:22 echio nchikamwe amabeere amange, nere abe okonyora amaguta amange, na kera omonto orabe otigaire ore moyo ase ense eyio nabe okoria amaguta na obooke." 
Isaiah7:23 Ase amatuko ayio, aase arenge kwama emesabibu elifu eyemo, aisanete chisekeli chie chifeta elifu eyemo, namere amageri na amagwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Abanto mbache agwo babwate amata ne chinsara, ekiagera orogongo orwo rwonsi rwamerire amageri na amagwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Ase ebigoro bionsi mwarenge korema namakombe, timokogendao korema naende, ekiagera nigo morairoke amageri na amagwa; aase agwo nabe ase chiombe chigochwarwa ne ching’ondi chiaatiringe." 
Isaiah8:1 Omonene agantebia, “Imokia ebao enene ekorikwa, orike amariko aya mwanyabanto baranyare gosoma buya, orike: Maheri‐Salali Hasi‐Basi.”" 
Isaiah8:2 Inche nkerigeria abanto abegenwa babe birori, nabwo Uria omokuani, na Zakaria, mosinto o Yeberekia." 
Isaiah8:3 Erio nkaba nomokungu one orenge omobani, na ere akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoisia, na Omonene agantebia, “Moroke Maheri‐Salali Hasi‐Basi." 
Isaiah8:4 Nebe ekero omwana oyio ataramanya gwatora Tata gose Baba, nonyore ng’a obotenenku bwonsi bwa Damesiki, na ebisakorwa bia Samaria, biaikire koirwa ase omoruoti bw’Abaasuri.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Omonene agakwana eria kabere, agantebia," 
Isaiah8:6 “Abanto aba bangire amache a Silo akwongora ng’ora, bagokire na kobwatana na Resini, naende na mosinto o Remalia." 
Isaiah8:7 Ase ayio, rora inche Omonene nkorenta inde igoro y’abanto abwo amache ’orooche are amange, naende are ne chinguru, ayio naro omoruoti bw’Abaasuri amo nobonene bwaye bwonsi. Amache ayio naichore aete chingegu igoro, aiteke gochia aande onsi." 
Isaiah8:8 Aro naminyoke ne chinguru igoro y’ense y’Abayuda, aichore, agenderere gochia bosio aike ase rigoti.” Ee, aye Imanueli, amache ayio nigo ararambore chimbaba chiaye atube obogare bw’ense yao." 
Isaiah8:9 Inwe abanto aba, kora eburu‐buru, nonya naboigo goika mosenyentwe! Ee, inwe mwensi abamore ase chinse chi’aare, igwa ayio! Eboyie mokong’e, goika mosenyentwe! Ee, eboyie goika mosenyentwe!" 
Isaiah8:10 Inchuo amo mosemanie, korende nigo korabe bosa; kwana ring’ana riaino, korende tirikoba, ekiagera Nyasae nigo are amo naintwe." 
Isaiah8:11 Omonene akabeka igoro asende okoboko kwaye kore ne chinguru, agakwana nainche, agankurera ng’a timbaisa kobwatia chinchera chi’abanto aba, agateba," 
Isaiah8:12 “Timobaisa koroka emeroberio ng’a nemebe, eyio abanto aba bakoroka ng’a nemebe, gose timobaisa kwoboa amang’ana boboete, gose kende tikebaondokia inwe." 
Isaiah8:13 Korende inwe tiga inche Omonene bw’Emeganda imbe nchenegete asemore; ninche bweka morairoke na konyoboa. 
Isaiah8:14 Ere nabe aase aino aachenu, korende ase ebisaku ebi bibere bi’Abaisraeli nabe rigena rikogocha, na egetare gekoiyeria inse, naende abe omoeto na oboreba ase abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah8:15 Abanto abange mbagochwe na kogwa, mbasenyentwe, mbategwe na kobwatwa.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Eboeranie oborori, na obeke amachiko aane ekemanyererio, ime ase chinkoro chi’aborokigwa baane." 
Isaiah8:17 Nimoganyete Omonene, oyio otubire obosio bwaye korwa ase ororeria rwa Yakobo; nimbe imosemeretie." 
Isaiah8:18 Naama! Inche amo nabana aba Omonene ang’eire nigo tore ebimanyererio na emegwekano ase egati y’Abaisraeli, ebio bikorwa ase Omonene bw’Emeganda, oyio omenyete ase Egetunwa gia Sayoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Ekero abanto barabatebie, “Genda moborie abwo bakorigia ogosemigwa korwa ase emeika y’abanto bakure, naende moborie abaragori, abwo bakomonyererana na komumura,” inwe mobairanerie iga: “Inee! Tegwenereti abanto komorigia Nyasae obo? Naki erabe ng’a toborie emeika y’abakure ase engencho y’abanto bare moyo?”" 
Isaiah8:20 Moiranere amachiko na oborori! Abanto batari gokwana koreng’ana namang’ana ayio, ekeene, omobaso o mambia torababarera." 
Isaiah8:21 Abanto mbaetanane ase ense yonsi, bare nemechando emenene mono, na enchara, na ekero babeire nenchara mbabe nekeririanda ekenene, baragererie omoruoti obo na Nyasae obo. Mbaonchore amasio abo barigererie gochia igoro," 
Isaiah8:22 naende baonchoke barigererie ense inse, korende nigo bararore obororo, na omosunte, na ogoichanigwa okonene, erio basoigwe ase omosunte ekerima." 
Isaiah9:1 Omosunte tokogenderera koba ase ogochandeka kore bono. Amatuko a kare Omonene nigo atigete ense ya Sabuloni, na eya Nafutali, na chirochio chigachaywa, korende ase amatuko agochi‐gocha narente obonene bw’ogosikwa ase ense ere ang’e nenchera ekogenda ase enyancha, ng’umbu ya Yorodan, nero Galili, ense y’abanto b’ebisaku." 
Isaiah9:2 Abanto abwo barenge gotaara ase omosunte, bono barorire omobaso omonene; abwo bamenyete ase ense y’ekiriri ki’amakweri omobaso obabareire." 
Isaiah9:3 Aye Omonene gwasesenirie egesaku, na kerokio kiabuchire, kwarure omogoko, na oro obeire omonge; abanto abwo nigo bare nomochengo ase obosio bwao, buna abanto bakoba nomochengo ase engaki ye rigesa, na buna bakogoka ekero bagwatanana ebisakorwa."
