Isaiah9:4 Aye kwabunire rikorogoto riarenge ririto asebare, kwabunire enyimbo eria yarenge goaka amareko abo, enyimbo eyio yarenge ey’abachandi babo, buna gwakorete ase engaki y’Abamidiani." 
Isaiah9:5 Ebikoroto bi’abarwani esegi bagotitiria ase esegi, ne chianga chionsi chiaakirwe amanyinga, ebio bionsi mbisambwe nomorero." 
Isaiah9:6 Omwana oiboirwe ase engencho yaito, intwe twaeirwe omwana omomura; obogambi mbobe ase amareko aye, ere nigo ararokwe: “Omosemia bw’Ogokumia, Nyasae bw’Okobua, Tata o Kare na Kare, Omogambi bw’Omorembe.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Obogambi bwaye nigo borabe obonene, na omorembe oye tokoba nomoerio igoro ase ekerogo ki’obonene gia Daudi na ase oboruoti bwaye. Obwo nigo borakong’igwe ase ekeene na oboronge, korwa bono na goika kare na kare. Risemi ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda ndikore amang’ana ayio." 
Isaiah9:8 Omonene otomire ring’ana kogambia ororeria rwa Yakobo, narirorio ndibaikere Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Abanto bonsi mbarimanye, nonya nabamenyete ase ense y’Abaefraimu, na ey’Abasamaria, abwo bagokwana noboenenu na obomwenu bwe chinkoro, bateba," 
Isaiah9:10 “Amaagacho ’amatabori agure inse, korende nigo torayaagache namagena abaachire. Emeko yagechirwe, korende ntosimeke emecharake ribaga ri’eyio.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Omonene oseegetire na korenta ababisa ba Resini bache kobarwania. 
Isaiah9:12 Abasiiria bamenyete moocha, na Abafilisti bamenyete bosongo, baasamirie emenwa yabo bamere Abaisraeli. Nonya ayio are bo, Omonene taratiga endamwamu yaye; nigo agendererete korambora okoboko kwaye kobaa egesusuro." 
Isaiah9:13 Abanto tibamoiranerete oria obaete egesusuro, gose tibamorigetie Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
Isaiah9:14 Ase ayio ase rituko erimo rioka Omonene nanache omotwe bw’Abaisraeli na ekemincha, boigo nanache orosagia rw’omokendo na esaka." 
Isaiah9:15 Omogaaka bw’amasikani nere omotwe, na omobani okworokereria oborimo nere ekemincha." 
Isaiah9:16 Abwo bakoraa abanto aba mbabasirie, na abwo bakoraagwa nabanto abwo mbasirigwe." 
Isaiah9:17 Ase ayio Omonene tari nomogoko ase abasae babo, na tari namabera ase chintakana na ababoraka babo, ekiagera kera omonto nomosaria ase Nyasae, na omokori amabe, na kera oyomo nigo agokwana ay’oboriri. Ase engencho y’ayio onsi Omonene taratiga endamwamu yaye; nigo agendererete korambora okoboko kwaye kobaa egesusuro." 
Isaiah9:18 Obobe nigo bogosamba buna omorero; noro nigo ogosamba amageri na amagwa, nigo ogosamba rinani rinoru, riaerera ase erioki richongororogete gochia igoro." 
Isaiah9:19 Endamwamu y’Omonene bw’Emeganda yasambire ense; abanto nigo banga buna chinko chigwokia omorero, na monto onde takororera oyomwabo amabera." 
Isaiah9:20 Abanto abwo nigo bakona‐gotaboria ebinto ase ensemo ya borio, korende nigo bagendererete koba nenchara; nigo bakwenyorera ebinto korwa ase ensemo ya bomosi, korende tibari koigota. Kera oyomo nigo akoria chinyama chi’omobere bw’oyomwabo." 
Isaiah9:21 Abanto ba Manase mbarie aba Efraimu, na aba Efraimu mbarie aba Manase, na abwo amo mbaonchokere Abayuda. Ase engencho y’ayio Omonene taratiga endamwamu yaye; nigo agendererete korambora okoboko kwaye kobaa egesusuro." 
Isaiah10:1 Obobe nobwabo abwo bakobeka amachiko atari aya boronge, na abariki abakona‐korika amang’ana ay’ogokorera abande bobe." 
Isaiah10:2 Barabwo nigo bakoonchorana ebina bi’abaremeire na koura abataka b’abanto baane oboronge bwabo, erinde ababoraka babe ebisakorwa biabo, ne chintakana chiaurererigwa." 
Isaiah10:3 Ngento ki morakore ase rituko riria egesusuro kegocha? Ninki morakore ekero ekembugu‐mbugu kerache korwa aare? Ning’o moratamere abakonye? Ning’o moratigere obotenenku bwaino? 
Isaiah10:4 Kende tikegotigara otatiga moragwe inse, mweringanie ase egati y’abasibwa, gose mogwe ase egati y’ebitondo. Nonya ayio are bo, Omonene taratiga endamwamu yaye; nigo agendererete korambora okoboko kwaye kobaa egesusuro." 
Isaiah10:5 “Obobe nobw’Abaasuri, abwo bare enyimbo y’endamwamu yane; okogechigwa kwane nigo kore enungu ase amaboko abo." 
Isaiah10:6 Nimbatome gochia korwania egesaku ekio giasaririe ase Nyasae, ee, nimbachike bagende korwania abanto abwo nabeire nendamwamu asebare, mbasakore ebinto bi’abanto abwo bibe ebiabo, naende mbabatiringere inse buna esike ere ase chinchera." 
Isaiah10:7 “Korende omoruoti bw’Abaasuri takagerete ayio, gose tayarengereretie. Ere nigo aganetie goita na gosiria ebisaku ebinge." 
Isaiah10:8 Ere nigo agoteba iga: Inee! Abachiki baane bonsi tibari abaruoti? 
Isaiah10:9 Inee! Omochie o Kalino tobuetwe buna Kari‐Kemisi, na Hamati buna Aripadi, na Samaria buna Damesiki?" 
Isaiah10:10 Onye okoboko kwane kwaigete ase amaruoti arenge gosasima emegwekano, emegwekano eyio yabombire yarenge emenene kobua eya Yerusalemu na Samaria." 
Isaiah10:11 Inee, tingokora ase Yerusalemu, na ase emegwekano yaye egosasimwa, buna nakorete ase Samaria na ase emegwekano yaye?”" 
Isaiah10:12 Ekero Omonene arabe okoorire gokora emeremo yaye yonsi ase Egetunwa gia Sayoni, na ase Yerusalemu, nae omoruoti bw’Abaasuri egesusuro ase engencho y’ogwetogia kwaye, na oboenenu bw’okweimokereria igoro." 
Isaiah10:13 Omoruoti oyio nigo agoteba: “Ase chinguru chi’amaboko aane nakorire ayio, boigo nase obong’aini bwane, ekiagera nimbwate okomanya. Nasukirie chimbebe chi’abanto na kobaura chinibo chiabo, na ase chinguru chiane chire buna echi’eeri nabeire nkoiyeria abagambi korwa ase ebirogo biabo." 
Isaiah10:14 Okoboko kwane nigo kwairete chinibo chi’abanto buna ebiswa bie chinyoni bikoirwa. Nigo nkobongania ense yonsi buna amagena e chinyoni atigirwe akobonganigwa; onde tanyegeretie orobaba rwaye, gose komaanora omonwa oye, gose kwemunyia.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Inee! Egesire nkenyare gwetogia igoro y’oyio okogekorera emeremo? Gose omosumeno mbwekore koba nengencho enene kobua oyio okonacha noro? Aise koba bo, nanga nigo are gotebwa ng’a enyimbo nebogorie oyio oyebogoretie, gose egete nkebogorie oyio otari omote." 
Isaiah10:16 Ase ayio Omonene, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, natome oborwaire bw’okoreeyia abanto abanoru, na obonene bw’omoruoti oyio botongigwe boyie buna omorero." 
Isaiah10:17 Oborabu bw’Abaisraeli mboonchoke bobe omorero, na oyore Omochenu obo nabe ekebemberi ki’omorero. Omorero oyio nosambe na gosiria amagwa na amageri ase rituko erimo." 
Isaiah10:18 Buna koreng’ana oborwaire bokoria omobere bw’omonto bwayokoora, naboigo obonene bwe rinani ri’Abaisraeli amo nemegondo yabo ekwama birasirigwe kegima. Omonene nigo arasirie omoyo amo nomobere." 
Isaiah10:19 Emete ye rinani riaye eratigare, nigo erabe emeke mono, eyio nonya nomwana aranyare kobara na koyerika." 
Isaiah10:20 Nebe ase amatuko ayio abatigari b’Abaisraeli na abwo b’ororeria rwa Yakobo baratooreke, tibakogenderera kweegeka ase egesaku ekio kiabaagete, korende ase obwegenwa nigo bareegeke ase Omonene, oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Abatigari, abwo bare b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, mbamoiranere Nyasae Omobui." 
Isaiah10:22 Nonya Abaisraeli bare abange buna omokenye ore nyancha, abatigari boka nabwo barairane. Ogosirigwa gwachikirwe ogokong’u nigo korache buna eooro kore noboronge." 
Isaiah10:23 Omonene oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, narente ogosirigwa ase ense yonsi, buna achikire." 
Isaiah10:24 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, agoteba: “Inwe abanto baane momenyete Sayoni, timoiroka Abaasuri nonya bakobaaka nenyimbo na koyeimokereria igoro, buna Abamisiri bakorete." 
Isaiah10:25 Engaki enke yatigaire, endamwamu yane asemore eere, erio eonchoke gosiria Abaasuri." 
Isaiah10:26 Inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ninyimokererie omocharichi one igoro, ng’wanie barabwo, buna nang’wanetie Abamidiani agwo ase egetare ki’Orebu. Ninyimokererie enyimbo yaane igoro y’enyancha, buna nakorete igoro y’Abamisiri." 
Isaiah10:27 Ase engaki eyio chigurube Abaasuri babegete ase amareko aino nchirusigweo, na amakorogoto babegete ase amagoti aino nabunwe ase obonetu bwaino.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Ababisa bachire Ayati, baetire ase egati ya Migironi; babekire ebinto biabo Mikimasi." 
Isaiah10:29 Baeteire ase ekiambokero, batoorire agwo Geba babeere aroro ase obotuko obwo; abanto ba Rama babeire nobwoba, na aba Gibea, omochie o Saulo, batamire." 
Isaiah10:30 Inwe abanto ba Galimu, rera neriogi rinene! Inwe aba Laisa, tegerera moigwe! Obee! Inwe ab’Anatoti abaremerwa!" 
Isaiah10:31 Abanto ba Madimena nigo bagendererete gotama, na abamenyete Gebimu ngotama bare ase ogwetooria." 
Isaiah10:32 Rituko erio ababisa mbabeere agwo Nobu, barambore amaboko abo na koyasungusia igoro y’egetunwa ki’abanto ba Sayoni, ekio kere egetunwa kia Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Rora, Omonene, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, nabutore chinsagia ne chinguru chi’okwoboyia; emete ere emetambe mono negechwe egwe inse, na eyechongororogete gochia igoro nekumbwe gochia inse." 
Isaiah10:34 Naimokie egesire agechere emete ye rinani rire rinoru, na Lebanoni amo nemete ereo neiyerigwe inse ne chinguru chi’Oyore Omobui." 
Isaiah11:1 Omoseboka norue ase ritina ria Yese riabutoretwe, na egesebo keramere korwa ase emeri yaye, nkiame amatunda." 
Isaiah11:2 Omoika bw’Omonene nobeere igoro asare; omoika bw’obong’aini na okomanya, omoika bw’ogosemia na okobua; omoika bwe chisemi na okomoiroka Omonene." 
Isaiah11:3 Omogoko oye nobe ase okomoiroka Omonene. Ere takogamba ebina buna amaiso aye ararore, gose takonacha ebina buna araigwe namato aye." 
Isaiah11:4 Korende nigo arabae abataka oboronge bwabo ase okonacha ebina, tagokora ogwanchereria ase abaitongo b’ense. Naake ense nenyimbo y’omonwa oye, naite abakori amabe nomoika bw’omonwa oye." 
Isaiah11:5 Oboronge nabwo borabe orokini rw’ekenema kiaye, na obwegenwa bobe orokini rw’okweboeria." 
Isaiah11:6 Esese y’orosana nemenye amo nemanwa y’eng’ondi, na engo nerare amo nemanwa y’embori; emori, na endo, na eng’ombe enoru nachibe chikogosoria amo, na omwana omoke nabe ogochiraa." 
Isaiah11:7 Eng’ombe na edubu nchiriserie amo, emori y’eng’ombe na emanwa y’edubu nchirare amo. Endo nebe ekorisia obonyansi buna eng’ombe." 
Isaiah11:8 Omwana okogonka nabe okogosoria ase engoro ye rirubi, boigo omwana omotache nabe ogosoyia okoboko kwaye ase engoro ye ring’ere." 
Isaiah11:9 Aase onsi ase egetunwa kiane egechenu, ayare amabe, gose ayagosiria tagokorekana aroro; ekiagera ense neichorwe nabanto bamomanyete Omonene, buna amache aichire ase enyancha." 
Isaiah11:10 Ase engaki eyio Oyore Egesebo kie ritina ria Yese natenene abe ekemanyererio ase abanto; abanto b’ebisaku mbamorigie, na obomenyo bwaye mbobe nobonene obonge." 
Isaiah11:11 Nebe ase engaki eyio Omonene narambore okoboko kwaye eria kabere koirania abatigari b’abanto baye korwa Asuri, na Misiri, na Patirosi, na Etiopia, na Elamu, na Shinari, na Hamati, na korwa ase ebisinka ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha." 
Isaiah11:12 Natenenie ekemanyererio ase abanto b’ebisaku, na asangererie Abaisraeli abwo baseretigwe, naende asangererie Abayuda bonsi besiarerete ase chinsinyo inye chi’ense." 
Isaiah11:13 Ribero Abaefraimu babwate ndisire, na abwo bakwoboyia Abayuda mbasirigwe; Abaefraimu tibakogenderera koba ne ribero ase Abayuda, na Abayuda tibakogenderera kwoboyia Abaefraimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Abayuda na Abaefraimu mbaumokere Abafilisti korwa ensemo ya bosongo, naende mbasakore abanto ba moocha. Erio barwanie Abaedomu na Abamoabu; Abaamoni mbabe bakoaigwera." 
Isaiah11:15 Omonene nasarie kegima omosomo bw’enyancha ya Misiri; nasungusie okoboko kwaye arente omwaga oguse igoro ase Orooche rwa Eufarati, erio arwatanane robe ebiambokero bitano na bibere, erinde abanto bambokere aroro buna ase ense enyomo." 
Isaiah11:16 Enchera enene neroiserigwe abatigari b’abanto baye abatoorigwe korwa Asuri. Enchera eyio nebe buna eria Abaisraeli baeterete kobakorua Misiri. 
Isaiah12:1 Ase rituko erio notebe: “Aye Omonene, ninkoiranerie ng’a mbuya mono, nonya kwarenge nendamwamu asende, bono endamwamu eyio yantigire, na aye kwandemirie." 
Isaiah12:2 Rora, Nyasae nere ogotooreka kwane; nimosemerie, tinkwoboa. Omonene Nyasae nere chinguru chiane, ere nimoterere; ere obeire ogotooreka kwane.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Inwe mobuuche amache korwa ase chinsoko chire nogotooreka, more nomogoko." 
Isaiah12:4 Ase rituko riria motebe: “Moiranerie Omonene ng’a mbuya mono, rangeria erieta riaye; raria ogokora kwaye ase egati y’ebisaku, raria ng’a erieta riaye nerinene mono.”" 
Isaiah12:5 “Tera amatera ay’okomotogia Omonene, ekiagera okorire ayare amaya mono. Amang’ana ayio tiga amanyekane ase ense yonsi." 
Isaiah12:6 Inwe abamomenyete Sayoni, aka eriogi, motere nomogoko, ekiagera ere oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli nigo are omonene ase egati yaino.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Aya naro amang’ana Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, aroche igoro ya Babeli:" 
Isaiah13:1 Aya naro amang’ana Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, aroche igoro ya Babeli:" 
Isaiah13:2 Tenenia ebendera igoro ase egetunwa getari na mete; aka eriogi rinene ase abarwani esegi, basime namaboko basoe ase ebiita bi’abanto abasike." 
Isaiah13:3 Inche omonyene nachikire aba neatananeire koba abachenu, narangeirie abanto baane bare chituoni baikeranie aya nachikire ase endamwamu yane. Abanto abwo bagokerete obobui bwane." 
Isaiah13:4 Tegerera moigwe amariogi ’emeganda y’abanto bakwoga igoro ase ebitunwa! Tegerera moigwe amariogi ay’okomumura kw’amaruoti ’ebisaku asangererekanire amo. Omonene bw’Emeganda nkoroberia are emeganda y’esegi. 
Isaiah13:5 Omonene ngocha are amo nebirwanero bi’endamwamu yaye korwa ense y’aare, ase chinsinyo chia igoro, erinde asirie ense yonsi." 
Isaiah13:6 Inwe rera nobororo, ekiagera rituko ri’Omonene riabereire ang’e; nigo rirachiche buna ogosiria gokorwa ase Omonene Omobui." 
Isaiah13:7 Ase ayio, amaboko ’abanto bonsi nigo araborwe chinguru, ne chinkoro chiabo chirianyeke ase obwoba." 
Isaiah13:8 Abanto mbabe nobwoba obonene; inababe nomoichano na obororo. Ee, mbabe nobororo buna obw’omokungu okobina agonkie, mbarigereranie bare nogokumia na omoichano na amaiso abo amwame ti." 
Isaiah13:9 Rora, rituko ri’Omonene ngocha rire; nigo rire ritindi ri’ekeririanda na endamwamu egwoka, ndisarie ense ebe bosa na gosiria kegima abanyabibe bamenyeteo." 
Isaiah13:10 Ching’enang’eni chire igoro, na ebiombe biamwabo, tichikorua oborabu bwabo; erioba naribe omosunte ekero rigosoka mambia, na omotienyi tokobara." 
Isaiah13:11 Inche Omonene ning’ee ense egesusuro ase engencho y’obobe bwaye, na abanyabibe ase engencho y’ogosaria kwabo. Ninsirie obomwenu bw’abwo bare abatindi, ninkeyie oboenenu bw’abaichire nobochege." 
Isaiah13:12 Ninkore omobaro o mwanyabanto obe omoke kobua oyo bw’etahabu echenire, ee, omobaro obo nobe omoke kobua oyo bw’etahabu ekorwa Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Ase rituko ri’ekeririanda kiane inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nintengechie igoro chionsi na inyegerie ense erue aase aye goetera ase endamwamu yane egwoka. 
Isaiah13:14 Kera omonto nabe buna engabi egoserigwa, na buna ching’ondi chitari nomorisia; kera oyomo nairane ase abanto baye, na kera oyomo natame gochia ase ense yaye." 
Isaiah13:15 Onde bwensi oranyorwe, nabetwe ritimo, na onde bwensi orabwatwe, naitwe nomoro." 
Isaiah13:16 Abana babo ebing’werere mbasenyentwe ase amasio ’abaibori babo, chinyomba chiabo nchisakorwe, na abakungu babo mbakorerwe ay’obosooku." 
Isaiah13:17 Rora, inche Omonene ninseegete Abamedi abwo batabare chifeta ne chitahabu koba nengencho enene." 
Isaiah13:18 Barabwo mbaite abamura b’abwo ase okobabeta chinsara, tibakororera abana bare inda, gose abana bande, amabera." 
Isaiah13:19 Babeli oyio ore obonene bw’amaruoti, na obwari na obonene bw’Abakalidayo, nobe buna Sodomu na Gomora, ekero Nyasae konya ayosaririe." 
Isaiah13:20 Babeli tokomenywa nonya ng’ake nebiaare binde bionsi, nonya n’Omoarabu tagotenenia eema yaye agwo, gose abarisia tibakorenta ching’ondi ne chimbori chitimokereo." 
Isaiah13:21 Ching’iti chi’orosana nchimenyeo, ne chinyakweumia nchiichore ase chinyomba chireo, chisagero nchibe chimenyeteo, na amarengari nabe akona‐gotenga aroro." 
Isaiah13:22 Chinyang’au nchibe chikwamuma ase emerobiri yabo, ne chisese chi’orosana nchibe chikorera ase chinyomba chiabo chi’obonene. Engaki yaye yaikire ang’e; amatuko aye tagotambeeigwa." 
Isaiah14:1 Omonene narorere ororeria rwa Yakobo amabera, nachore Abaisraeli abwo naende, abarente bamenye ase ense yabo. Abanto abaao mbabwatane nab’ororeria rwa Yakobo, bamenye amo nabarabwo." 
Isaiah14:2 Ebisaku binde mbikonye Abaisraeli koirana ase ense yabo, na Abaisraeli mbabakore babe abasomba babo, abasacha na abakungu, mbabe bakobakorera agwo ase ense y’Omonene. Abaisraeli mboose abwo baboosete kare, na bagambere abwo barenge kobakorera bobe." 
Isaiah14:3 Nebe ekero Omonene abaeire ogotimoka korwa ase emechando yaino, na obokong’u, na emeremo emekong’u mwarenge gokorigwa," 
Isaiah14:4 erio mokwane amang’ana aya y’ogochecheria omoruoti o Babeli, motebe: “Naki omochandi oria akirigwe! Obotindi bw’ogochandwa gwaito bwaerire!" 
Isaiah14:5 Omonene obunire enyimbo y’abakori amabe, enyimbo eyio y’abagambi," 
Isaiah14:6 abwo baagete abanto nendamwamu, na bakaba bakobaaka batari gotiga. Nigo bagamberete ebisaku nendamwamu, bakaba bakobichanda batari namabera." 
Isaiah14:7 Bono ense engima nigo etimogete na gotoerera. Abanto bagokire na gotera. 
Isaiah14:8 Nonya nemetarakwa nigo egokerete okobugwa kwao, na emecharake ya Lebanoni nigo egoteba: Gese gwakaiyeretigwe inse, omotemi emete onde tana gotochera." 
Isaiah14:9 “Aase abakure abeire nomoegaego gocha gokorotota ekero okogenda aroro; emerengari y’abakure yaturirwe ase engencho yao, ee, abwo bonsi barenge abatang’ani b’ense. Abwo bonsi barenge abaruoti b’ebisaku batenenigwe barue ase ebirogo biabo." 
Isaiah14:10 Abwo bonsi mbakwane, bagotebie: Bono naye kwaurirwe chinguru buna intwe, gwatogwekanire." 
Isaiah14:11 Obonene bwao amo namariogi ’amakano ao biarentirwe aiga aase abakure; ebinyegera nabio ekerarero kiao na amakonde naro ekiebisio kiao. 
Isaiah14:12 “Aye eng’enang’eni ya mambia, omwana bw’ogokiamoka, naki kwagure korwa igoro! Aye oria kwaiyeretie ebisaku, naki gwatugutetwe gocha inse?" 
Isaiah14:13 Nigo gwatebete ase enkoro yao ime: Inche nintiire gochia igoro aaria, ngende ng’etanie ching’enang’eni chia Nyasae, nimbeke ekerogo kiane ki’obonene aaria igoro. Ning’ikaranse ase egetunwa ki’omosangererekano aaria sugusu aare." 
Isaiah14:14 Nintiire ngende ng’etanie amare are igoro mono, ninyekore imbe buna Oyore Igoro Mono." 
Isaiah14:15 Korende bono aye kwairirwe gochia aase abakure ase engoro entambe. 
Isaiah14:16 “Abanto abwo barakorore mbakorigererie baasamie emenwa yabo bakumie, mbabe bakorengereria igoro yao, batebe: Inee! Omonto oyo nere oria otengechetie ense, oria onyegeretie amaruoti?" 
Isaiah14:17 Nere oyio osaretie ense ekaba erooro, naende akaonchorana emechie y’ense, oria otarenge gosibora abasibwa baye bagende ase chinka chiabo?" 
Isaiah14:18 “Abaruoti bonsi b’ebisaku nigo baraire nobonene bwabo, kera oyomo ase embeera yaye," 
Isaiah14:19 korende aye totindekiri; nigo otugutire buna orosagia rotanchiri. Nigo oraire ase egati y’abanto baitetwe nemioro, bagatugutwa ase chingoro chi’amagena buna ebitondo bigotachwa namagoro." 
Isaiah14:20 Aye togotindekwa buna abaruoti bande, ekiagera gwasaririe ense yao, naende gwaitire abanto bao. Ororeria rw’abakori amabe tirogwatorwa nonya ng’ake." 
Isaiah14:21 Beka abanto ang’e, baite abamura b’omoruoti oyio; abana abwo nigo baraitwe ase engencho y’okomocha gwa chisokoro chiabo, tibabaisa koimokerera igoro baire ense na koyeichoria nemechie.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Nimbaimokere, nsarie Babeli kegima, ninsirie erieta riaye na abatigari bare aroro. Tingotiga abana aroro gose abachokoro. Inche Omonene bw’Emeganda natebire ayio." 
Isaiah14:23 Ninkore Babeli obe obomenyo bw’ebirongo, naende obe ne chitente chi’amache. Ninyoabusere ekiabuso ki’ogosiria. Inche Omonene bw’Emeganda natebire ayio.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Omonene bw’Emeganda otianire, ogoteba, “Ekeene, buna narobeirie, nabo arabe, na buna nachikire, goika aikerane." 
Isaiah14:25 Ninsenyente Abaasuri aiga ase ense yane, nimbatiringere inse agwo ase ebitunwa biane. Ase enchera eyio amakorogoto abo narusigwe ase amagoti ’Abaisraeli, ne chigurube chiabo chirusigwe ase amareko abo.”" 
Isaiah14:26 Aya naro achikirwe igoro y’ense yonsi, na oko nakwo okoboko koramboire igoro ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi." 
Isaiah14:27 Omonene bw’Emeganda ochikire gokora amang’ana ayio, ning’o oranyare koyatanga taba? Oramboire okoboko kwaye, ning’o oranyare gokoringa?" 
Isaiah14:28 Ase omwaka oria Ahasi omoruoti akwete, amang’ana aya naro araretigwe:" 
Isaiah14:29 Inwe Abafilisti mwensi, timobaisa kogoka ng’a enyimbo eria yabaagete yabunirwe; korwa ase ritina ri’eng’iti eria ende ere nobosongo obotindi nesoke, na korwa ase eyio enchoka ekoiruruka netuboke." 
Isaiah14:30 Abare abataka mono mbaragerigwe, na abaremeire bamenye nobotoereru. Korende abare ritina riaino mbaite nenchara, na abatigari baino nimbaite." 
Isaiah14:31 Aye egeita, eumie! Aye omochie, rera! Inwe Abafilisti mwensi, ichana ase obwoba! Erioki nkorwa rire sugusu, na ase egati yabo onde tari oranyorwe." 
Isaiah14:32 Mang’ana ki omonto arabairanerie abatomwa b’egesaku keria? Obairanerie ng’a Omonene obekire oboroso bwa Sayoni, na abanto baye abachandire mbanyore obotamero aroro." 
Isaiah15:1 Aya naro amang’ana igoro y’ense ya Moabu: Ari o Moabu nosarigwe ase obotuko obomo, nosirigwe kegima! Ee, na Kiri o Moabu osarigwe ase obotuko obomo, osirigwe kegima!" 
Isaiah15:2 Abanto ba Diboni batiirire gochia aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, barereo. Nigo bakweumia ase engencho ya Nebo na Medeba; kera omonto okigitire etukia yaye, ogingire ne chinderu." 
Isaiah15:3 Abanto nigo beboyetie chigunia baichanete agwo ase chinchera, abande nigo bariinete ebirama igoro, na abande bare ase ebiraario; kera omonto nigo akweumia na koiyeria amariga." 
Isaiah15:4 Abanto ba Hesiboni na Eleale nigo bakorera neriogi rinene. Eriogi riabo nigo rikoigweka goikera Yahasi. Ase ayio abarwani esegi ba Moabu bakorera neriogi rinene; chinkoro chiabo chiaondokire. 
Isaiah15:5 Enkoro yane nkoreera ere ense ya Moabu. Abanto baye ngotamera bare Soari na Egilati‐Selisia; nigo bagotiira gochia Luhiti bakorera. Nigo bagoaka amariogi ay’okorera kw’ogosirigwa agwo ase enchera ekogenda Horonaimu. 
Isaiah15:6 Orooche rwa Nimurimu rwakamire amache; obonyansi bwomire, na bonde tibori komera, ekemeri kende ekebese tikeri aroro." 
Isaiah15:7 Ebinto ebinge konya benyoreire, ne chinibo chionsi babeire bagachete mbabibogorie bamboke nabirobio ase Orooche rw’Emesobeti." 
Isaiah15:8 Eriogi ri’okorera kwabo riaichoire ase ense ya Moabu; ekerero ekio giaikire Egilaimu na Beeri‐Elimu. 
Isaiah15:9 Nonya nechindooche chia Dimoni chiaichoire namanyinga, ningenderere korenta amabe ande ase Dimoni. Nindete endo eite Abamoabu, abwo bagotama na abwo batigarete ase ense yabo." 
Isaiah16:1 Tomera omogambi bw’ense ebango ye chimanwa chie ching’ondi korwa ase omochie o Sela, goetera ase erooro, gochia ase egetunwa ki’omochie o Sayoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Abanto b’emechie ya Moabu mbabe bakonakoong’anya gochia ase chingegu chi’orooche rw’Arinoni, babe buna chinyoni chikoiruruka chiaserigwe korwa ase ebiswa biabo." 
Isaiah16:3 Barabwo nigo bagoteba: “Tosemie, tokorere ay’oboronge, tokendererie inse y’ekiriri kiaino mobaso gati. Tobise intwe abatwaserigwe, timobaisa gotorua intwe abatwatamire." 
Isaiah16:4 Tiga Abamoabu, abanto baito, abwo baserigwe bamenye amo nainwe; kabe obotamero bwabo korwa ase abwo bakogania kobasiria, goika abachandi babo babe basirire, na abwo barenge kobatiringera inse babe basirigwe korwa ase ense eyio." 
Isaiah16:5 Erio ekerogo ki’obonene ngetenenigwe ase obwanchani bogendererete botambe. Oyomo ore omwegenwa naikaransere ekerogo ekio, oyomo korwa ase obomenyo bwa Daudi. Ere nabe okogamba ase ekeene, na gokora ayare ay’oboronge.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Twaigure buna Abamoabu bare abetogia, barabwo nigo bare aberori mono, na abamwenu, na abaenenu, na abanyandamwamu, korende ogwetogia kwabo nigo kore okw’obong’ainereria." 
Isaiah16:7 Ase ayio Abamoabu mbarere; kera omonto tiga areere ense ya Moabu. Eng’ererie moichane, ekiagera mwaborirwe amabomba ’amasabibu amomo akwama Kiri‐Hareseti." 
Isaiah16:8 Emegondo ere Hesiboni yasusanire amo nemesabibu ere Sibuma. Abanene b’ebisaku babutoire chinsagia chi’emesabibu, echio chiarandete chigaika Yaeseri, na chikagenderera goika ase erooro. Emerande yaye nigo yarandete, ekaamboka enyancha." 
Isaiah16:9 Ase ayio nkorera ase engencho y’emesabibu ya Sibuma, buna aba Yaeseri bakoyereera. Inwe aba Hesiboni na ab’Eleale, nigo nkobaiyereria amariga amange, ekiagera ekero mogotora amatunda na kogesa endagera, eriogi ri’esegi riabachera." 
Isaiah16:10 Omogoko na omochengo biasirigwe korwa ase emegondo ekwama mono; bono amatera tari goterwa ase emegondo y’emesabibu, amariogi ’omogoko tari goakwa aroro; monto onde tari okomita amasabibu ase ebiteera bi’okomitera. Nasiririe amariogi ’omochengo e rigesa." 
Isaiah16:11 Ase ayio, enkoro yane nigo ekoreera Abamoabu neriogi buna eri’obokano, nkoreera nde aba Kiri‐Heresi ase omoyo one ime." 
Isaiah16:12 Nonya Abamoabu bagwechanda na kwerosia gotiira gochia aase aimokererete igoro bagosasima, gose babe bakogenda ase chihekalu chiabo gosaba, tibakonyara konyora ogokonywa konde gwonsi." 
Isaiah16:13 Ring’ana erio nario Omonene akwanete igoro y’ense ya Moabu agwo kare. 
Isaiah16:14 Korende bono Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase engaki y’emiaka etato, emiaka buna ey’omorikwa emeremo, nonyore ng’a obonene bw’Abamoabu bwachayirwe amo nemegada yabo emenene boigo. Abatigari babo nigo barabe abake mono abataisanere gento kende.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Aya naro amang’ana igoro ya Damesiki: “Naama! Damesiki tokogenderera koba omochie; nosarigwe, otumbwe amo obe chitui." 
Isaiah17:2 Emechie y’Aroeri neng’anywe etigwe ere bosa. Nigo erabe amarisio. Chitugo nchibe chikorara aroro, na onde tari orachioboyie." 
Isaiah17:3 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Chiburi chi’Efraimu nchisarigwe kegima, na oboruoti bwa Damesiki mbosirigwe; na abatigari b’Abasiiria mbaurwe obonene bwabo buna Abaisraeli bauretwe." 
Isaiah17:4 “Ase engaki eyio obonene bw’abanto ba Yakobo mbokeeigwe kegima, na obonetu bw’emebere yabo mboree." 
Isaiah17:5 Nigo erabe buna ekero omogesi akogesa namaboko aye ebigara bi’endagera eteneine, na buna ekero omonto agochora ebigara bi’endagera ase ense omweremu y’Abarefai." 
Isaiah17:6 Ee, abanto abake mono mbatigareo, banga buna ekero omote bw’emezeituni okonyegerigwa, amazeituni abere, gose atato, atigare ase omote igoro, na ane, gose atano, atigare ase chinsagia. Nabo Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba.”" 
Isaiah17:7 Ase engaki eyio abanto mbarigie ogokonywa korwa ase Omotongi obo, mbabe namasikani ase Oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Tibagosemeria ebisasimero ebire emeremo y’amaboko abo, gose tibakorigereria emete eteneneirie Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, gose ebisasimero bi’ogosambera ubani, ebi baroisirie nebiara biabo." 
Isaiah17:9 Ase engaki eyio emechie yabo egiteire chindwaki nebe buna amatombe are ase amanani na ase ebitunwa igoro, ayio atigetwe ekero Abaisraeli bachete aroro. Emechie eyio nesarigwe etigare ere bosa." 
Isaiah17:10 Inwe mwebire Nyasae ore ogotooreka kwaino, na timori koinyora Egetare kere obotamero bwaino. Ase ayio nigo mokoroisia emegondo emiya, mwasimeka emesabibu emiegarori." 
Isaiah17:11 Nonya yare koba ng’a ase rituko erio okoyesimeka noyegitere orobago, na mambia yaye esiche, okwama kwaye nigo korasirigwe ekero rituko ri’emechando rirache, rire nobororo botari gokwaneka." 
Isaiah17:12 Obee! Okwogana okwo kw’abanto abange nogwa ki? Nigo bakwogana buna amache ’enyancha. Okomumura okwo kw’ebisaku nogwa ki? Nigo bakomumura buna amache are ne chinguru. 
Isaiah17:13 Abanto b’ebisaku nigo bakomumura buna amache amange, korende Omonene nabatogonyere, nabarabwo batame gochia aare: mbaserigwe, babe buna omoiriro okoirurukigwa nomwaga igoro ase ebitunwa, na buna orotu rokoirurukigwa nekembugu‐mbugu." 
Isaiah17:14 Ekero kia mogoroba, rora, obwoba mboreo, na mambia botarakiamoka, abakwoboyia tibaiyo. Eke nakio egetari ki’abachandi baito, abwo bagotosakora." 
Isaiah18:1 Obobe nobw’ense eyio ogoakanigwa gwe chimbaba gokoigweka, ense ere ng’umbu ye chindooche chi’Etiopia," 
Isaiah18:2 eyio egotoma abatomwa goetera ase orooche rwa Naili bariinete amaato aroisirie korwa ase amauncho! Inwe abatomwa more abaango, genda ase abanto b’egesaku bare abatambe babwate emebere emeterere ekomeka‐meka, bairokire nabanto bare ang’e, na abare aare. Egesaku ekio nigo kere ne chinguru, naende gekona‐kobua, na ense yabo chindooche chinachete." 
Isaiah18:3 Inwe mwensi ababiare b’ense, inwe abamomenyeteo, ekero ebendera ekoimokererigwa ase egetunwa igoro, morigererie! Ekero egetureri gekobugigwa, motegerere!" 
Isaiah18:4 Aya naro Omonene antebetie: “Nintegerere korwa aiga ase obomenyo bwane inde nobotoereru, imoreke buna amasase ’erioba akomoreka. Nigo ndabe buna riire rigotonya riime ase engaki y’omobaso omororo bwe rigesa.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Ekero chindagera chiakoorire gosicha ne rigesa ritaraika, na amasabibu achakire kwama, Omonene nasose chinsagia nomoyio enkuro, na ebisebo bigokina abirusieo." 
Isaiah18:6 Chinsagia echio chionsi nchitigerwe chinyoni chi’ebitunwa ne ching’iti chi’ense. Chinyoni chintindi nchimenyeo ase engaki y’omobaso, ne ching’iti chionsi chi’ense ase engaki y’obokendu." 
Isaiah18:7 Ase engaki eyio Omonene bw’Emeganda narenterwe ebiegwa nabanto abwo bare abatambe babwate emebere emeterere ekomeka‐meka, abwo bairokire nabanto bare ang’e na abare aare. Egesaku ekio nigo kere ne chinguru, naende nigo gekona‐kobua, na ense yabo nigo ere ne chindooche chinyinge. Ebiegwa ebio nigo birarentwe ase Egetunwa gia Sayoni, agwo ase erieta ri’Omonene rimenyete." 
Isaiah19:1 Aya naro amang’ana igoro ya Misiri: Rora, Omonene nigo ariinete riire rikominyoka bwango ogocha Misiri. Erio agwo emegwekano egosasimwa y’Abamisiri nenyegerigwe ase obosio bwaye, ne chinkoro chi’Abamisiri nigo chirairianyeke." 
Isaiah19:2 “Inche Omonene ninseegete Abamisiri baitane boka abanyene; kera omonto nigo ararwane noyomwabo, na kera omoamate arwane nomoamate omwabo. Ninseegete abanto b’omochie oyomo barwane nab’omochie onde, na oboruoti borwane noboruoti bonde." 
Isaiah19:3 Nindusie omoika bw’Abamisiri orue asebare, ninsarie emeroberio yabo; barabwo mbabe bakogenda korigia ogosemigwa korwa ase emegwekano egosasimwa, na korwa ase abaragori, na korwa ase abwo bakorangeria emeika y’abakure, na korwa ase abarogi." 
Isaiah19:4 Nimbeke Abamisiri ase amaboko ’omonene ore omotindi; omoruoti bw’okobaondokia nabagambere.” Nabo Omonene, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, atebire." 
Isaiah19:5 Amache ’orooche rwa Naili nakame pi, na orooche orwo ndokame kegima." 
Isaiah19:6 Chindooche chigochiao nigo chiragunde chitioke, na amache ’emetaro agwo Misiri nakee aere; ebitonto na amauncho mbiome." 
Isaiah19:7 Amaranya amo nemegondo ere mbarabare y’orooche rwa Naili mbiome bisareke kegima. 
Isaiah19:8 Abanto bakoruba ne chindobio ase orooche rwa Naili mbarere na kobokia amagombo, na abwo bakoruta ebionga aroro mbaumate." 
Isaiah19:9 Abwo bakoroisia chiusi chi’egatani, na abakoroisia ebitambaa bi’ebamba, mberusie moyo." 
Isaiah19:10 Abwo bare chisiiro chi’abanto b’ense mbasenyentwe, na bonsi abarikire gokora emeremo mbaichane." 
Isaiah19:11 Abagambi ba Soani nigo bare abariri kegima; na abasemia abang’aini ba Farao nigo bagosemia ay’oboriri. Naki moranyare gotebia Farao: “Intwe nabana b’abanto abang’aini, abana b’abaruoti abakoro?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Ng’ai abanto bao abang’aini bare? Onye bareo, tiga bagotebie na gokomanyia aya Omonene bw’Emeganda arobeirie igoro ya Misiri." 
Isaiah19:13 Abagambi ba Soani babeire abariri, na aba Memifisi bang’ainirwe. Abwo bare buna amagena e chikoona ase ebisaku biabo batantanirie ense ya Misiri." 
Isaiah19:14 Omonene obekire omoika bw’obotantanu ase egati y’abanto b’aroro, nabarabwo bakorire ense ya Misiri yatindire ase ogokora kwaye gwonsi, nigo ekogaragara, buna omonto otindire okwegaragaria ase amaroki aye." 
Isaiah19:15 Ense ya Misiri tegosesenigwa ase ogokora konde gwonsi, kobe ogokora kw’omotwe gose ogw’ekemincha, okw’orosagia rw’omokendo gose orw’egetonto." 
Isaiah19:16 Ase engaki eyio Abamisiri mbabe buna abakungu, baiguswe bare nobwoba ase obosio bw’Omonene bw’Emeganda, ekero ararambore okoboko kwaye agosungusie igoro yabo." 
Isaiah19:17 Abamisiri mbabe bakoiroka abanto b’ense y’Abayuda; ekero Omomisiri araigwe ense y’Abayuda egwatorwa nabe nobwoba obonene, ekiagera Omonene bw’Emeganda okorire omoroberio ore mamincha y’Abamisiri." 
Isaiah19:18 Ase engaki eyio abanto b’emechie etano y’ense ya Misiri mbabe bagokwana omonwa bw’Abakanani, naende babe bakobwatana n’Omonene bw’Emeganda na gotiana ase erieta riaye. Oyomo bw’emechie eyio nigo orarokwe Omochie bw’Erioba." 
Isaiah19:19 Ase engaki eyio egesasimero nkeagacherwe Omonene agwo ase egatigati ya Misiri, boigo rigena rire buna esiiro nditenenerigwe Omonene agwo ase ribebe ri’ense eyio." 
Isaiah19:20 Ebinto ebio mbibe ekemanyererio na kirori ase Omonene bw’Emeganda, agwo ase ense ya Misiri. Ekero abanto ba Misiri barabe bakorera ase Omonene kobagokorerwa bobe, ere nabatomere omotooria abarwanerere abatoorie." 
Isaiah19:21 Omonene nemanyekanie ase Abamisiri; na Abamisiri mbabe bakomomanya Omonene ase amatuko ayio. Mbabe bakomosasima na komoruera ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, naende mbabe bakoriera Omonene chiira na gochiikerania." 
Isaiah19:22 Omonene naake ense ya Misiri, nayeake na koyegwenia, na abanto b’aroro mbamoiranere Omonene, ere naigwe ogosaba kwabo abagwenie." 
Isaiah19:23 Ase engaki eyio enchera enene nebeo ekorwa Misiri goika Asuri. Abaasuri mbabe bakogenda Misiri, na Abamisiri babe bakogenda Asuri; Abamisiri na Abaasuri mbabe bagosasimera amo." 
Isaiah19:24 Ase engaki eyio Abaisraeli mbabwatane n’Abamisiri na Abaasuri, na ebisaku ebio bitato mbibe ogosesenigwa ase ense engima," 
Isaiah19:25 ekiagera Omonene bw’Emeganda nabasesenie, atebe: “Imosesenirie inwe Abamisiri, abamore abanto baane, nainwe Abaasuri, abamore emeremo y’amaboko aane, nainwe Abaisraeli, abamore omwando one.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Ase omwaka oria Taritani, omochiki omonene bw’abarwani b’Abaasuri, atometwe na Sarigoni, omoruoti obo, agende ase omochie bw’Asidodi; ere akayorwania esegi, akayobua." 
Isaiah20:2 Ase engaki eyio Omonene agakwana na Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, akamotebia, “Genda orusie egunia obegete ase omobere oo, na ebikoroto obegete ase amagoro ao.” Isaya agakora bo, akaba ogotaara getirianda, na tabegete ebikoroto." 
Isaiah20:2 Ase engaki eyio Omonene agakwana na Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, akamotebia, “Genda orusie egunia obegete ase omobere oo, na ebikoroto obegete ase amagoro ao.” Isaya agakora bo, akaba ogotaara getirianda, na tabegete ebikoroto." 
Isaiah20:3 Erio Omonene agateba, “Buna koreng’ana Isaya, omosomba one, abeire okona‐gotaara goetanana aaria na aaria ase emiaka etato yaetire, ore getirianda na atabegeti bikoroto, obeire ekemanyererio na omogwekano bw’amang’ana arabe ase Abamisiri na ase Abaetiopia," 
Isaiah20:4 naboigo omoruoti bw’Abaasuri araire abasomba korwa Misiri, naire na Abaetiopia abooswa. Nigo baraire abanto abake na abanene bare getirianda na batabegeti bikoroto, gose batatubeti chinyonga chiabo, na igo ense y’Abamisiri erenterwe obosooku." 
Isaiah20:5 Abanto abwo basemeretie Abamisiri na betogeretie Abaetiopia mbabe baichanete na gosooka. 
Isaiah20:6 Ase engaki eyio abanto bamenyete ase ense ere ang’e nenyancha mbakwane, batebe: Rora amang’ana abanyorire abanto abwo intwe twasemeretie na kobatamera ng’a batokonye korwa ase omoruoti bw’Abaasuri! Bono, naki intwe toranyare gotooreka?”" 
Isaiah21:1 Aya naro amang’ana igoro y’erooro ere ang’e nenyancha. Koreng’ana buna ekembugu‐mbugu gekobongia ase ense ya irianyi naboigo na obobe bokorwa ase erooro, ense eyio ekoondokia mono." 
Isaiah21:2 Inche norokigwe okorora kore ogokong’u mono; abaurereria nigo bagendererete kourereria, na abasaria bagendererete gosaria. Inwe Abaelamu, genda morwane! Inwe Abamedia, genda moboere! Ninsirie obororo bwonsi bwarentirwe n’Abababeli." 
Isaiah21:3 Ase ayio chibachwa chiane chianyegerigwe, obororo bwansoire, obororo buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore; naichanire mono, tindi koigwa; nabeire nobwoba obonene, tindi korora." 
Isaiah21:4 Enkoro yane nigo egotiesana, omoondoko ombwatire; engaki ya mogoroba eyio naganyete yang’onchokeire na kondetera obwoba." 
Isaiah21:5 Abanto nigo bakwarigania endagera bayebeka ase emesa, babeka abarendi bakorenda, naende baria na konywa. Bono inwe abagambi, imoka, moake chinguba chiaino ebitinya." 
Isaiah21:6 Amang’ana aya naro Omonene antebetie, “Genda mobeke omorendi atengere, nere oyio nabararerie abatebie amang’ana ararore." 
Isaiah21:7 Omonto oyio kararore abariini chibarasi bagocha babere babere, na abariini chitigere, na abe chingamia, tiga ategerere mono, ee, ategerere buya kegima.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Omonto oyio ontengerete akarangeria neriogi buna eri’endo, “Aye Omonene, nigo ngotenena igoro ase egetengero omobaso boira; nigo inde ase emeremo yane ase obotuko bwonsi." 
Isaiah21:9 “Bono abariini chibarasi ngocha bare babere babere.” Na omotengeri oria agaaka eriogi riaye naende, agateba, “Babeli ogure! Ogure kegima! Emegwekano yaye yonsi y’ogosasimwa yasenyentirwe na gotiringerwa inse.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Inwe abanto baane, aba mwaoorirwe ase ekeooreri buna obori na koirurwa, amang’ana naigure korwa ase Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, naro nkobarareria." 
Isaiah21:11 Aya naro amang’ana igoro ya Edomu. Omonto nkondangeria are korwa Seiri, okoboria, “Omorendi, mang’ana ki igoro y’obotuko? Omorendi, mang’ana ki igoro y’obotuko?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Omorendi nigo akoiraneria: “Emambia yachire, nonya naboigo obotuko nao bore. Onye moganetie koboria erinde momanye, boria; moirane moche naende.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Aya naro amang’ana igoro y’Abaarabu. Inwe abagendi b’ense ya Dedani, mobe mokorara ase amanani ’ense y’Arabia." 
Isaiah21:14 Inwe abanto momenyete ase ense ya Tema, abwo bare nerang’o, bae amache, na abwo bagotama, bae endagera." 
Isaiah21:15 Abanto abwo nigo batamire korwa ase ogoitwa nemioro, na korwa ase emeyio yasomoirwe, na korwa ase amata atingirwe, na korwa ase emechando y’esegi." 
Isaiah21:16 Ase ayio Omonene ontebirie iga: “Ekero omwaka oyomo otaraera omwaka onga buna oyo bw’omorikwa, obonene bwonsi bwa Kedari mbosirigwe boere." 
Isaiah21:17 Abanto chituoni b’Abakedari, abamanyete koruta chinsara, nigo baratigare abake mono. Inche Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, natebire amang’ana ayio.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Aya naro amang’ana igoro ye Rikura ri’Amaroro. Mang’ana ki abeire inwe mwensi mwariinire gochia birama igoro? 
Isaiah22:2 Aye omochie oichire neburu‐buru na okwogana, aye ore nomochengo bw’obobe, abanto bao abaitirwe tibaitiri nemioro, gose tibakweti ase esegi." 
Isaiah22:3 Abagambi bao bonsi batamire bare amo, nigo babwatirwe batararaswa chinsara. Abanto bao bonsi banyoretwe nigo babwatetwe, nonya konya batamire gochia aare." 
Isaiah22:4 Ase ayio inche ngateba, “Tobaisa kondigereria, ntige ndere nobororo ing’iyerie amariga; tobaisa gwechanda kondemia ase engencho y’ogosarigwa kw’omochie bw’abanto baane.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, ochorire engaki ere nobotantanu, na ogotiringerwa inse, na omoichano, na engaki eyio nigo erache igoro ye Rikura ri’Amaroro. Ase engaki eyio chindwaki nchitagorwe chigwe inse, na ebirero mbiigweke gochia ase ebitunwa." 
Isaiah22:6 Abaelamu nigo babogoretie chinsara, bagacha amo nabariini chigari na abe chibarasi; na abanto ba Kiri bagasokia chinguba chiabo." 
Isaiah22:7 Amakura aino are amaya mono aichoirwe ne chigari, na abariini chibarasi mbateneine ase ebiita." 
Isaiah22:8 Egekengero ki’Abayuda nigo kiarusetigweo kegima. Ase engaki eyio mokarigia ebirwanero biarenge kogachwa ase Enyomba ye Rinani. 
Isaiah22:9 Erio mokanyora ng’a obotandoku bwe chindwaki chi’omochie o Daudi bwabeire obonge; inwe mogatanga amache tarua ase Ritibo ria Maate. 
Isaiah22:10 Mokabara chinyomba chia Yerusalemu, na mogachitagora ase okoroisia orwaki robe orokong’u." 
Isaiah22:11 Mokaagacha etangi y’amache agwo ase egati ye chindwaki chiria ibere, erinde monyore amache akorwa ase ritibo rikoro, korende timwamorigeretie Oyio okorete ayio, gose timwamorengereretie Oyio okorete omoroberio oyio agwo kare." 
Isaiah22:12 Ase engaki eyio Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nigo abatebetie ng’a morere na kobokia amagombo, na mokigite chitukia chi’emetwe yaino, na kweboyia chigunia." 
Isaiah22:13 Ribaga ri’ogokora igo mokagoka na gochenga; mokanyenya chiombe ne ching’ondi, mokaba mokoria chinyama na konywa edivai, mogateba, “Tiga torie na konywa, ekiagera ankio natokwe.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Omonene bw’Emeganda nere onyorokirie amang’ana ayio na gontebia, “Ekeene, timokwaberwa ebibe ebio nonya ng’ake.” Omonene bw’Emeganda otebire ayio." 
Isaiah22:15 Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, agoteba: “Inchuo ogende ase Sebuna, oyio ore omogachi na omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’obogambi, omotebie:" 
Isaiah22:16 Aye ninki ogokora aiga, na monto ki obwate aa? Nase ki ogwekunyera oboina aase are igoro mono? Inee! Nigo okwebaachera oboina aiga ase egetare bobe obomenyo bwao?" 
Isaiah22:17 Aye nonya kore omonto bwe chinguru, Naama, Omonene nakobwate bokong’u, akorute gochia aare mono." 
Isaiah22:18 Nigo arakoborongose buna omopira, akorute gochia ase ense ere engare; agwo nao orakwere. Naende nao chigari chiao chi’obonene chirabe, ekiagera aye kwabeire omonto bw’obosooku ase enyomba y’omonene oo." 
Isaiah22:19 Inche Omonene ninkorusie orue ase emeremo yao, naende nkoiyerie korwa aase ao." 
Isaiah22:20 “Ase engaki eyio nindangerie omosomba one Eliakimu, mosinto o Hilikia," 
Isaiah22:21 imobekere eganchwa yao y’obogambi, naende imoboerie orokini rwao. Nimbeke obogambi bwao ase okoboko kwaye, ere nabe ise bw’abanto ba Yerusalemu na Abayuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Nimbeke ekeigorero ki’enyomba ya Daudi ase amareko aye; ere nabe okoigora, na onde tari oranyare gosieka; nabe ogosieka na onde tari oranyare koigora." 
Isaiah22:23 Nimokong’ontere akong’e buna omosumari okong’onteire ase enyasi enkong’u, na ere nabe ekerogo ki’amasikani ase enyomba ya ise." 
Isaiah22:24 “Abanto bonsi b’enyomba ya ise, na abana baye, ne chinderia chiabo, mbabe bakomosemeria abakonye. Ebikorero bionsi, ebisinini na ebinene, mbimosung’unane." 
Isaiah22:25 Korende ase engaki eyio omosumari oria okong’onteretwe ase enyasi enkong’u nosimorwe korwao ogwe inse, ne chigurube chiasungireo nchigwe, chisamunyokane.” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire." 
Isaiah23:1 Aya naro amang’ana igoro ya Turo. Inwe abe chimeeri chia Tarisisi, rera, ekiagera Turo osarigwe, chinyomba tichiyo, gose ekiambokero. Abanto b’ense ya Kuporo babamanyirie amang’ana ayio." 
Isaiah23:2 Inwe abamomenyete ase egesinka, tegerera mokire‐kiri! Abaonchoreria ba Sidoni, abwo bagotaara ne chimeeri, kare nigo baichorete ase ense yaino." 
Isaiah23:3 Nigo bataarete ase chinyancha chinene, na ebitoki biaino nigo biarenge chimbusuro chia Sihori, na okwama kwe riranya ri’Orooche rwa Naili. Ninwe mwarenge abaonchoreria b’ebisaku bionsi." 
Isaiah23:4 Aye Sidoni, rora obosooku; enyancha ere neburi enkong’u y’enyancha yatebire iga: “Inche tinana kobina, gose koibora, tinana korera abana abamura, gose gokinia abaiseke abekungi.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Ekero Abamisiri baraigwe amang’ana ayio igoro ya Turo, nigo baraichane mono." 
Isaiah23:6 Inwe abamomenyete ase egesinka, amboka, mogende Tarisisi, morere!" 
Isaiah23:7 Inee! Oyo nomochie oria oino oichire nomogoko, omochie oyio oagachetwe ase chingaki chia kare, oyio amagoro ’abanto baye abogoretie gochia komenya ase chinse chi’aare?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ning’o oroberetie amang’ana aya onsi mamincha ya Turo? Omochie oyio orenge kobekera abaruoti chigutwa, na abaonchoreria baye nigo barenge abagambi, na abaoonia baye nigo basikire ase ense." 
Isaiah23:9 Omonene bw’Emeganda nere oroberetie ayio ase okoiyeria inse oboenenu bw’obonene na gochaya abanene bonsi b’ense. 
Isaiah23:10 Inwe abanto ba Tarisisi, menteka, moichore ase ense yaino, mobe buna amache ’orooche rwa Naili; kende tikeri kerabatange." 
Isaiah23:11 Omonene oramboire okoboko kwaye igoro y’enyancha, onyegeirie amaruoti; orure ogochika igoro ya Kanani ng’a chiburi chiaye chitagorwe." 
Isaiah23:12 Ere agateba, “Aye omochie o Sidoni orenge buna omoiseke omwekungi, korende bono gwakoreirwe bobe, tokonyara koba nomogoko naende. Imoka ogende Kuporo, nonya naroro tokonyara gotimoka.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Rigereria ense y’Abakalidayo! Abanto aba tibarenge egesaku. Abaasuri nabwo barentete ching’iti chi’orosana komenya aroro. Abwo bakaagacha chindwaki chi’okoboera, bakaonchorana chinyomba chi’obogambi chi’omochie oyio, bakayotagora okaba etui." 
Isaiah23:14 Inwe abe chimeeri chia Tarisisi rera, ekiagera chiburi chiaino chiatagoirwe." 
Isaiah23:15 Ase amatuko ayio omochie o Turo mbwebwe ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo etano na ebere, emiaka ereng’aine ey’obogima bw’omoruoti oyomo. Emiaka eyio emerongo etano na ebere ekoera, nebe ase Turo buna arikire ase ogotera kw’omotayayi;" 
Isaiah23:16 “Aye omokungu omotayayi konya kwebirwe, imokia obokano, oetanane ase omochie bwonsi, otere neriogi rigiya, otere amatera amange, erio nario orainyorwe.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Emiaka eyio emerongo etano na ebere koyaerire, Omonene nachiche korora omochie o Turo; omochie oyio noiranere chingencho chiaye chinkoro, ochake gokora obonyaka amo namaruoti onsi are ase ense." 
Isaiah23:18 Ebikonyorekana korwa ase oboonchoreria bwaye, na ebitoki bi’ogokora kwaye kw’obonyaka mbiatananwe ase Omonene, tibigosangererigwa na kogachwa. Ebio banyorire ase oboonchoreria nigo biranyorere abanto abwo bamenyete ase obosio bw’Omonene endagera eisaine, ne chianga chingiya chikobekwa." 
Isaiah24:1 Naama! Omonene nasarie ense, ayetige ere bosa; nayeonchorane ayeumamie, na abanto bamenyeteo abasiarere gochia aaria na aaria." 
Isaiah24:2 Amang’ana nayamo arabanyorere abanto bonsi; buna arabe ase abanto, naboigo arabe ase abakuani; buna arabe ase omosomba, naboigo arabe ase omonene oye; buna arabe ase omosomba omokungu, naboigo arabe ase omokungu ore omonene oye; buna arabe ase oyokogora, naboigo arabe ase oyokoonia; buna arabe ase oyokorua singo, naboigo arabe ase oyokoegwa singo; buna arabe ase oyogotura esira, naboigo arabe ase oyogoturwa esira." 
Isaiah24:3 Ense nesarigwe kegima ebe bosa, ekiagera n’Omonene otebire ring’ana erio." 
Isaiah24:4 Ense nigo ekweumia na kogenderera gosira; oboiko bwonsi bwagoyire, ngochia gosira bore, na abare abanene b’ense baereirwe chinguru." 
Isaiah24:5 Ense yasarigwe nabanto bamenyeteo; barabwo basaririe amachiko, bangire koigwera emeroberio echikire, naende basaririe okobwatana kw’ogotianania gwa kare na kare." 
Isaiah24:6 Ase ayio okoragererigwa nkogendererete gosiria ense; abanto bamenyeteo nigo bachandegete ase engencho y’okomocha kwabo kw’ebibe, basambirwe, na abanto abake boka batigaireo." 
Isaiah24:7 Edivai enyia nigo ekobokia amagombo, na emesabibu yasusanire, na abanto bonsi barenge nomogoko bw’enkoro nigo baichanete." 
Isaiah24:8 Omogoko bw’eriogi rie chinchigiri oerire, na eriogi ri’abwo bagochenga riaerire, na omogoko bw’eriogi ri’amakano oerire." 
Isaiah24:9 Bono abanto tibagenderereti gotera ekero bakonywa edivai; ebinyugwa bigotindia biabeire ebiroro ase abwo bakobinywa. 
Isaiah24:10 Omochie oyio obwate eburu‐buru otagoirwe; kera enyomba ereo yasiekirwe, monto onde tari ogosoa aroro." 
Isaiah24:11 Okorera okonene kwaigwekanire ase chinchera, ekiagera edivai teiyo; omogoko bwonsi oerire, na omochengo bw’ense osirire." 
Isaiah24:12 Omochie osarigwe kegima; ebiita biatagoirwe na konacha‐nachanwa. 
Isaiah24:13 Amang’ana ayio naro arabinyore ebisaku bire ase ense; ense nebe buna ekero emezeituni ekonyegerigwa ase okoarora amatunda, na buna ogochorwa kw’amazeituni amatigari." 
Isaiah24:14 Erio abanto mbaake amariogi batere nomogoko, mbaake amariogi korwa ase enyancha, batogie obonene bw’Omonene." 
Isaiah24:15 Ase ayio inwe abamore moocha, motogie Omonene; abamore ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha, togia erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah24:16 Korwa chinsinyo chi’ense twaigure amatera ay’ogotogia obonene bw’Oyore Omonyene Oboronge. Korende nigo ngoteba, “Naki nachandekire! Naki nachandekire! Obobe nobwane! Abakorekanu nigo bagendererete gokorekania, ee, nigo bagendererete gokorekania mono.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Inwe abamomenyete ase ense, obwoba, na eirima, na omoeto, nigo bibaganyete." 
Isaiah24:18 Nebe ng’a oyogotama kaigure eriogi ri’okogosa nagwe ase eirima, na oyo orasoke korwa ase eirima eyio nabwatwe nomoeto, ekiagera chitirisa chia igoro chiaigoirwe, oboroso bw’ense bwanyegerigwe." 
Isaiah24:19 Ense yabwerekire, ee, yabwerekire kegima, yatandoirwe ebing’ese; ense yatengechigwe ne chinguru chintindi." 
Isaiah24:20 Ense yatindire buna oyotindire amarwa; nigo ekorunda‐rundigwa buna oborunda‐rundia bw’omote. Ogosaria kwaye kwayeritoereire, negwe, tekonyara koboka naende." 
Isaiah24:21 Ase engaki eyio Omonene narue egesusuro ase emeganda ere igoro, aaria igoro, narue egesusuro ase abaruoti b’ense, aiga ase ense." 
Isaiah24:22 Barabwo mbasangererigwe amo buna abasibwa, babekwe ase engoro eyemo; mbasiekerwe buna abasibwa, na ekero amatuko amange aerire mbaegwe egesusuro." 
Isaiah24:23 Erio omotienyi tokorua oborabu bwaye, na erioba tirikobara, ekiagera Omonene bw’Emeganda nabe okogamba ase egetunwa gia Sayoni, na ase Yerusalemu, na ase abagaaka b’aroro naorokie obonene bwaye." 
Isaiah25:1 Aye Omonene, naye Nyasae one; ninkoimokererie igoro, nintogie erieta riao; aye gwakorire amang’ana ’ogokumia emeroberio yao korwa kare nigo ere ey’obwegenwa na ekeene." 
Isaiah25:2 Aye gwatagoire omochie, kwayokorire obeire etui y’amagena, omochie oyio konya ogiteire chindwaki obeire ritongo. Gwasaririe chinyomba chinene chi’omochie bw’abamenyi, omochie oyio tokoagachwa naende." 
Isaiah25:3 Ase ayio, abanto bare ne chinguru mbagotogie, emechie y’ebisaku ebitindi nekoiroke." 
Isaiah25:4 Aye kwabeire egekengero egekong’u ase abataka, ee, kwabeire egekengero ase abaremeire ekero bare nemechando; kwabeire obotamero ase engaki y’embura omoubera, na ekiriri ekero ki’omobaso omororo. Okogosa kw’abanto abatindi nigo konga embura omoubera egotwoma enyasi," 
Isaiah25:5 na buna omobaso bw’eguru‐gura. Aye gwakiririe amariogi ’ababisa; buna omobaso omororo ogokendigwa ne riire, naboigo namatera ’abanto abwo abatindi arakendigwe." 
Isaiah25:6 Aiga ase egetunwa eke Omonene bw’Emeganda naroiserie abanto b’ebisaku bionsi omoyega bw’ebinto ebinoru, omoyega bw’edivai engiya mono, ee, oyo bw’ebinto ebinoru biichire emeseto, na edivai engiya ekenonoire." 
Isaiah25:7 Aiga ase egetunwa eke Omonene nasarie na korusia egietubo getubete abanto bonsi, ee, egietubo ekio keramboire igoro y’ebisaku bionsi." 
Isaiah25:8 Omonene Nyasae nasirie amakweri goika kare na kare, natinyie amariga korwa ase amaiso ’abanto bonsi, nasirie ogochaywa kw’abanto baye korwa ase ense yonsi. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah25:9 Ase rituko erio mbatebe iga: “Rora, oyo nere Nyasae oito; oyo nere twakaganyire, erinde anyare gototooria. Oyo nere Omonene, twakaganyire; tiga togoke na gochenga, ekiagera otorenteire ogotooreka.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Okoboko kw’Omonene nkobeere igoro y’egetunwa eke, korende Abamoabu mbatiringerwe inse aase abo buna obonyansi obwomo bogotiringeranigwa ase engoro y’esike." 
Isaiah25:11 Barabwo mbarambore amaboko abo buna omonto akorambora amaboko aye ase ogoaka entimbu, korende Omonene nasirie oboenenu bwabo amo nobong’ainereria bw’emeremo y’amaboko abo." 
Isaiah25:12 Natagore emerobiri emetambe y’ogwekengera ere ase chindwaki chiabo, nayeiyerie inse kegima, ee, negwe inse ase riroba." 
Isaiah26:1 Ase rituko erio ogotera oko ngoterwe ase ense y’Abayuda; “Intwe nigo tomenyete ase omochie omokong’u. Omonene otoeire ogotooreka kobe chindwaki ne chiburi chiaito. 
Isaiah26:2 Igora ebiita bi’omochie oyio, erinde egesaku kere noboronge na obwegenwa kenyare gosoa imeo." 
Isaiah26:3 Omonto ore nebirengererio ebironge asore, aye Omonene nigo okomoa omorembe omoikeranu, ekiagera agosemeretie." 
Isaiah26:4 Mosemerie Omonene botambe, ekiagera Omonene Nyasae nere egetare gia kare na kare." 
Isaiah26:5 Ere okeeirie abanto abwo beimokereretie igoro, otagoire omochie oria ochongororogete gochia igoro, oyoiyeirie inse kegima, ee, oyoiyeirie inse ase riroba." 
Isaiah26:6 Amagoro ’abanto abataka nayotiringere inse, na ay’abaremerwa nayotache.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Enchera y’abanyene oboronge nenteremu; naye okoyekora yaba enteremu. 
Isaiah26:8 Aye Omonene, intwe nigo tokoganyete kogocha konacha ebina biao; okona‐koinyora erieta riao nakwo kore okogania kw’emioyo yaito." 
Isaiah26:9 Omoyo one nigo ogokogania ase obotuko, omoika ore ime yane nigo ogokorigia kobogokiamoka. Ekero orarente ebina biao igoro ase ense, abanto bamenyeteo nigo bakweorokereria oboronge." 
Isaiah26:10 Omokori amabe naisa gwanchererigwa, takweorokereria oboronge; ekero are ase ense egokora oboronge nigo arakore ay’obokorekanu, takorora obonene bw’Omonene." 
Isaiah26:11 Aye Omonene kwaramboire okoboko kwao, korende barabwo tibagokorora. Tiga barore risemi obwate ase abanto bao, erinde basooke; omorero osambete ababisa bao, tiga obasambe nabarabwo." 
Isaiah26:12 Aye Omonene, notorentere omorembe, ekiagera emeremo twabeire togokora, naye kwabeire gokoyetokorera." 
Isaiah26:13 Aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, abanene bande babeire bagotogambera, korende erieta riao rioka nario tomanyete." 
Isaiah26:14 Barabwo bakure, tibakoba moyo naende, babeire amarengari, tibakoboka; ase ayio kwabaeire egesusuro na kobasiria, kwabasiririe, tibakoinyorwa nonya ng’ake." 
Isaiah26:15 Aye Omonene, gwakorire egesaku eke kementekane; ee, gwakementekanirie; ase ayio aye gwatogigwe, kwagareeirie ense y’egesaku eke." 
Isaiah26:16 Aye Omonene, ekero barenge nemechando nigo bakorigetie, ekero kwabaete egesusuro, nigo bagosabete mono." 
Isaiah26:17 Aye Omonene, nigo twabete asore buna omokungu ore morito, okobina aibore, ekero engaki yaye yaikire, nigo akoromwa nobororo." 
Isaiah26:18 Intwe twabeire tore barito, twabeire tokobina na kweganchorana, korende ekero twaiborete tokaibora embeo bosa. Titorenteti ogotooreka konde ase ense, gose abanto tibaiboretwe ase ense." 
Isaiah26:19 Abanto baino bakwete mbabe moyo naende; emebere y’abakwete neboke. Inwe abwo moraire ase amaroba ime, boka, motere nomogoko! Riime riao nigo rire eri’oborabu; riroba ndibairanie abakwete." 
Isaiah26:20 Inwe abanto baane, inchuo mosoe ase chiero chiaino mwesiekere aroro; mwebise aroro ase engaki enke, goika endamwamu eyio ebe yaetire." 
Isaiah26:21 Rora, Omonene ngosoka are korwa aase aye, ae abanto bamenyete ase ense egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo. Okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga ase ense nkobe maiso marore, na ense tekogenderera kobisa abanto abwo baitetwe." 
Isaiah27:1 Ase engaki eyio Omonene nae Leviatani, eng’iti eria y’okwoboyia, enyango ekwemiina, egesusuro. Nayeite nomoro oye ore omokong’u na omonene, na ore ne chinguru; boigo naite enchoka eria ere ime ase enyancha." 
Isaiah27:2 Ase engaki eyio omogondo bw’emesabibu ore nedivai enyinge nobeo. Notererwe ogotera oko: 
Isaiah27:3 “Inche Omonene, ninche inde omorendi bw’omogondo bw’emesabibu, nigo nkoyoitororera amache kera engaki; nigo inyorendete obotuko na omobaso, erinde onde tabaisa koyosaria." 
Isaiah27:4 Inche tindi nendamwamu. Nonya amagwa na amageri are gocha kondwania nigo nare koyarwania na koyasambera amo. 
Isaiah27:5 Tiga abanto babwaterere oborendi bwane mbarende ne chinguru chiane; tiga bakore omorembe nainche, ee, barabwo mbabe nomorembe nainche.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Ase amatuko agochi‐gocha Omonene nae abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo ribaga baseboke, ee, Abaisraeli mbasokie ebisicha na ebisebo, mbaame amatunda aichore ase ense yonsi." 
Isaiah27:7 Inee! Omonene naagete Abaisraeli buna aagete ababisa babo? Gose Abaisraeli mbaitetwe buna ababisa babo baitetwe? 
Isaiah27:8 Aye nigo kwaamereranetie nabarabwo okabaa egesusuro ase ekerengo, okarenta omwaga omotindi korwa moocha, okabaseria." 
Isaiah27:9 Ase ayio, abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo mbachenwe korwa ase ogosaria kwabo, na okorusigwa okwo kw’ebibe nkorente okwama ogoikeranu, ekero amagena onsi ay’ebisasimero arasenyentwe buna amagena ’echooka, na emete y’Asera, enyasae eria enkungu, na ebisasimero bi’ogosambera ubani, biratagorwe bionsi." 
Isaiah27:10 Omochie ogiteire chindwaki ong’anyirwe, otamirwe na gotigwa bosa, obeire buna erooro; agwo nao chimori chikorisia na korara, chiaba chikoria amato e chinsagia chireo." 
Isaiah27:11 Ekero chinsagia chiomire, nigo chikobuneka, abakungu bacha bachiira bachiutera omorero. Abanto b’egesaku eke tibari nobong’aini, ase ayio oria obatongete takobarorera amabeebe, gose kobarorera amabera." 
Isaiah27:12 Ase engaki eyio Omonene nabaswage inwe Abaisraeli buna chinyeke chi’endagera na kobachora oyomo oyomo. Nigo arachakere ase orooche rwa Eufarati na goikera ase akarooche ka Misiri. 
Isaiah27:13 Ekero engaki eyio eraike, engoma nebugigwe, na abanto abwo basirerete ase ense y’Abaasuri, na baria baseretigwe gochia ase ense ya Misiri, mbache gosasima Omonene ase egetunwa egechenu agwo Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Obobe nobwao aye ore egutwa y’oboenenu bw’abanto ba Efraimu batindire. Nigo ore buna egesicha giasusanire, obwari bw’obonene bwao bwasirire. Nigo ore ase egetunwa igoro, igoro ye rikura ritobu ri’abwo babuirwe nedivai." 
Isaiah28:2 Rora, Omonene nabwate oyomo ore nokobua ne chinguru; oyio nigo anga buna embura y’amagena, na buna omwaga omotindi ogosaria, na buna omoubera ore nembura enyinge oraiyerie ebinto bionsi inse ne chinguru." 
Isaiah28:3 Egutwa y’oboenenu y’abanto b’Efraimu batindire netiringwe namagoro; 
Isaiah28:4 na egesicha giasusanire kere obwari bw’obonene bwaye, ekio kere ase egetunwa igoro agwo ase rikura ritobu nkebe buna ogotongorwa kw’amako agotang’anera rigesa, ayio omonto akorora oyatwa, na ekero ayabekire koboko oyaria." 
Isaiah28:5 Ase engaki eyio Omonene bw’Emeganda nabe egutwa y’obonene, na ekiore ki’obwari ase abanto baye abatigari," 
Isaiah28:6 naende nabe omoika bw’ogokora ayare ay’ekeene ase abwo bakogamba ekina, naende nabe chinguru chiabo abwo bagoseria ababisa agwo ase egeita." 
Isaiah28:7 Abanto aba nabarabwo batindire edivai; nigo bakoong’anya ase okonywa ebinyugwa bigotindia; abakuani na ababani batindire nebinyugwa bigotindia, na ekero bakorora amaroro nigo bakomocha, nigo bagotantana ekero bakonacha ebina." 
Isaiah28:8 Chimesa chiabo chionsi chiaichoire namaroki, na aase ande tari atari nobonyinyeri." 
Isaiah28:9 Nigo bagoteba: “Ning’o Isaya aganetie kworokereria obong’aini, na ning’o ere aranyare komanyia amang’ana aye amaya? Inee! Nabana abake abwo batachirwe, abwo batigigwe kogonka?" 
Isaiah28:10 Nigo agotoa ogochika igoro ase ogochika, ee, ogochika igoro ase ogochika; ring’ana igoro ase ring’ana, ee, ring’ana igoro ase ring’ana; aiga make, na aaria make.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Ekeene, Omonene nakwane nabanto aba goetera ase abanto b’ebisaku ebiao, abwo bagokwana omonwa omogeni." 
Isaiah28:12 Omonene nigo atebetie abanto abwo: “Aiga naase agotimokerwa, tiga abwo barosire batimokere aiga, erinde banyore chinguru naende.” Korende abanto abwo tibaigwerete." 
Isaiah28:13 Ase ayio ring’ana ri’Omonene asebare nigo rirabe iga: “Ogochika igoro ase ogochika, ee, ogochika igoro ase ogochika; ring’ana igoro ase ring’ana, ee, ring’ana igoro ase ring’ana; aiga make, na aaria make,” erinde kobagotaara babe bakogwa kenyuma‐nyuma, babutokane, babe bagotegwa na kobwatwa." 
Isaiah28:14 Ase ayio, inwe abachecheria aba mokogambera abanto ba Yerusalemu, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Isaiah28:15 Inwe nigo mogoteba, “Intwe twakorire okobwatana kw’ogotianania namakweri, na twabwatanire naase abakure; ekero emechando eyio emebe erache tegotoika ang’e, ekiagera twakorire oborimo bwabeire obotamero bwaito, na obong’ainereria bwabeire egekengero giaito.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Ase ayio Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Rora inche nkobeka nde rigena ri’oboroso ase Sayoni, rigena rikong’u riateemirwe, rigena ri’ekoona ri’engencho enene rire oboroso obokong’u; na onde bwensi orariegene, takorua aroro." 
Isaiah28:17 Ninkore ekeene kebe ekerengo gi’okorenga, na oboronge bobe ekebiro gekorenga. “Nindete embura y’amagena yabuse kegima oborimo bore obotamero bwaino, na emegoko ebonganie obwebiso bwaino.”" 
Isaiah28:18 Erio okobwatana kw’ogotianania koria mwakorete namakweri ngosarigwe, na okobwatana kwaino mwakorete naase abakure tigokogenderera kobao; ekero emechando eyio emebe erache, goika motiringerwe inse" 
Isaiah28:19 Buna koreng’ana emechando eyio erabe ekona‐gocha nebanyore inwe, nebe ekona‐gocha emambia ase emambia, ee, omobaso na obotuko. Nigo erabe emechando emebe y’okoondokia ase okoigwa amang’ana ayio atomirwe." 
Isaiah28:20 Oborere nigo bore obweng’e omonto agosinywa kwerambora igoro ase borobwo, na ekiebisio nigo kere ekenyerere mono omonto atanyare kwebisia." 
Isaiah28:21 Omonene naimoke akore buna akorete ase egetunwa gia Perasimu; nabe nendamwamu buna abete ase Rikura ria Gibeoni; nakore ogokora kwaye kore okogeni, nakore emeremo yaye ere ey’ogokumia." 
Isaiah28:22 Ase ayio, bono timogenderera gochecheria, ebisibo biaino tibibaisa gokong’igwa, ekiagera naigure korwa ase Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, ogochika kw’ogosirigwa gw’ense engima, okwo gotanyare gotigwa." 
Isaiah28:23 Tegerera moigwe eriogi riane; igwera amang’ana aane ngokwana! 
Isaiah28:24 Inee! Omonto okorema ng’a asimeke chimbusuro nigo akogenderera kona‐korema rioka? Inee! Omonto oyio nigo akogenderera kona‐koboosa rioka? 
Isaiah28:25 Omonto oyio ekero akoorire koroisia riroba, Inee, tari kobusura obotu bw’ebinsari bikorokwa dili na komini; naende obusura engano ase chindwaro, na esairi aase aye, na engano ende ase chingito?" 
Isaiah28:26 Nyasae oye nigo akomworokereria enchera engiya y’ogokora emeremo eyio. 
Isaiah28:27 Dili teri koorerwa nekeoorero gi’ekioma, gose komini teri koorwa namagoro e chigari, korende bionsi bibere nigo bigosusurerwa omote." 
Isaiah28:28 Ekero omonto akoora engano, Inee, nkoyesunyunta are? Yaya, tari kogenderera koyeoora naende naende, nigo arabaise koyesenyenta namagoro ’egari ekong’uswa ne chibarasi chiaye." 
Isaiah28:29 Amorokererio ayio nigo akorwa ase Omonene bw’Emeganda; ere nigo are omosemia bw’ogokumia, na obong’aini bwaye nobonene mono." 
Isaiah29:1 Obobe nobwao aye Arieli, Arieli, omochie ase Daudi arenge gotoora. Omwaka ase omwaka imogenderere korenda Amatuko aino Amanene, na emeyega yaino." 
Isaiah29:2 Inche Omonene nindete emechando asore Arieli, okorera na okweumia mbibe ime yao, na aye omochie nobe asende Arieli bori." 
Isaiah29:3 Nintoore asore ngoetanane, ng’agache chiburi chi’okoboera na gokorwania." 
Isaiah29:4 Erio abanto bamenyete ime yao mbaiyerigwe inse, babe bagokwana korwa riroba inse, na amang’ana abo naigweke korwa ase orotu ime ng’ora ng’ora, ee, amariogi abo narwe inse ye riroba buna eriogi ri’ekerecha, nigo barabe bakomonya korwa ase orotu ime." 
Isaiah29:5 Korende ababisa bao bare omoganda omonene mbairurukigwe buna orotu; na omoganda bw’abare abatindi noirurukigwe buna omoiriro gochia aare. Amang’ana ayio nigo arabe mobosokano, ee, nigo arabe mobosokano mono." 
Isaiah29:6 Omonene bw’Emeganda naake abanto bao ne chinkoba, na omotengecho bw’ense, na egeturi ekenene, na ekerambauti, na embura omoubera, na amasaria ’omorero ogosamba." 
Isaiah29:7 Abanto abange b’ebisaku bionsi abwo bakorwania Arieli, ee, bonsi abakorwania omochie oyio, na gotagora chiburi chiaye, na koyorentera emechando, nigo barasirigwe, beebwe buna okorota gokwebwa, ee, buna okorora kwa botuko gokwebwa." 
Isaiah29:8 Abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, abwo bakorwania Egetunwa gia Sayoni, nigo barabe buna omonto ore nenchara akorota ng’a nkoragera are, korende gakoboka bwenyora ore nenchara, gose buna oyore nerang’o akorota ng’a nkonywa are amache, korende gakoboka bwenyora ore nerang’o." 
Isaiah29:9 Tenena mokumie, ee, mokumie! Ekore mobe emeuko, mogenderere goukora! Etindie, korende tari ase okonywa edivai; ong’anya, korende tari ase okonywa ekenyugwa kegotindia." 
Isaiah29:10 Omonene obaitereire inwe omoika bw’okorara chitoro chindito; oukoirie amaiso ’ababani, abwo bare amaiso aino, na otubire emetwe y’abarori, abwo bare emetwe yaino." 
Isaiah29:11 Amaroro ayio onsi ay’obobani ebei re asemore buna amang’ana ’ebuku emumekeirie na kobekwa ekemanyererio. Ekero abanto bakoira ebuku eyio ase omonto omanyete gosoma, bamotebia: “Soma amang’ana ’ebuku eye,” ere nigo agokana oteba: “Tinkonyara, ekiagera amang’ana aya nigo abeire buna ay’ebuku emumekeire ebekire ekemanyererio.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Naende bayea oyotamanyeti gosoma, bamotebia: “Soma amang’ana ’ebuku eye,” nere nigo agokana, oteba, “Timanyeti gosoma.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Abanto aba nigo bakong’ika ang’e ase ogokwana nemenwa yabo na gonsika nebikoba biabo, korende chinkoro chiabo nigo chire aare korwa asende, na okonyiroka kwabo nigo kore amachiko mwanyabanto borokereretie." 
Isaiah29:14 Ase ayio, rora, ningenderere gokora amang’ana ay’ogokumia ase abanto aba, ee, amang’ana ayio nigo arabe ay’ogokumigwa na goichanwa; obong’aini bw’abanto babo bare abang’aini mbosire, na okomanya kw’abamanyete mono nkobiswe.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Obobe nobw’abanto abwo bagokora emeroberio yabo erio bayebisa aase aatambe ng’a Omonene tayerora. Abanto abwo nigo bagokora ogokora kwabo ase chinchera chi’omosunte, erio bateba, “Ning’o otoroche? Ning’o otomanyete?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Inwe nigo mokoonchorana amang’ana bobe. Inee! Omokori chinyongo nareng’anigwe nesike? Egento keroisirie ngetebie oyokeroisetie, “Tari aye kwandoisetie”; gose egento omonto abombete nkemotebie, “Tomanyeti kende”?" 
Isaiah29:17 Engaki netigarete enke, erio rinani ria Lebanoni riraonchorwe ribe omogondo okwama chindagera chinyinge; na omogondo oria orenge kwama chindagera chinyinge oonchorwe obe rinani." 
Isaiah29:18 Ase engaki eyio emetino nebe ekoigwa amang’ana arikire ase ebuku, na emeuko yarenge ekorora buna rikongori na omosunte, nerore buya namaiso abo." 
Isaiah29:19 Erio abanto abaitongo nabanyore omogoko omoyia kobare ime ase Omonene, na abataka bare ase mwanyabanto mbagokere Omonene ore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah29:20 Abakoirokia abande mbasirigwe, na abachecheria tibakobao; abwo bonsi bakorigia gokora amabe mbaitwe tibabao." 
Isaiah29:21 Omonene nasirie abanto abwo bagosiria abande namang’ana abo, abwo bakobeka omoeto ase oyo okogamba ebina agwo ase egeita, bakwana oborimo na koonchorana oboronge bw’omonto ore omoronge." 
Isaiah29:22 Ase ayio Omonene, oria obooretie Ibrahimu, okwanire amang’ana aya igoro y’ororeria rwa Yakobo, “Abanto ba Yakobo tibakogenderera koba nobosooku; amasio abo takoirura nonya ng’ake naende." 
Isaiah29:23 Ekero abana babo bararore emeremo y’amaboko aane, eye nakorete ase egati yabo, mbachene erieta riane ime yabo, naende banche ng’a inche n’Omochenu o Yakobo inde, mbabe bateneine banyirogete inche Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Erio abwo basirire ase omoika mbaegwe okomanya, na abwo bakwemurungania mbanche amorokererio.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Obobe nobwaino inwe abana baane abamore abasaria, aba mogokora emeroberio etari eyane, nigo mogokora okobwatana okwo gotari okw’omoika one, na mwamenta ebibe igoro ase ebibe binde." 
Isaiah30:2 Inwe nigo mokogenda ase Misiri korigia ogokonywa korwa ase Farao, korende timori korigia ogosemigwa korwa asende. Nigo mokorigia obotamero ase ekiriri kia Misiri." 
Isaiah30:3 Ase ayio chinguru chia Farao nchionchoke chibe obosooku bwaino; na obotamero bwaino ase ekiriri kia Misiri mbobarentere ogochaywa. 
Isaiah30:4 Nonya abagambi baino bare ase omochie o Soani, na abatomirwe baikire ase omochie o Hanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 kera oyomo nasooke, ekiagera mosemeretie abanto b’egesaku batanyare kobaa ebitoki binde, korende nobosooku na ogochaywa.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Aya naro amang’ana igoro ye ching’iti chia Irianyi. Abanto abwo nigo bagoeta ase ense ere nemechando na omoichano, ase chindo chiaberi ne chindo chinde chimenyete amo namarubi, ne chinchoka chikoiruruka. Nigo bakobeerekia chitigere chinibo chiabo, ne chikungo chiabo bachibeka ase chisukubi chie chingamia, bagenda ase abanto batabae bitoki binde." 
Isaiah30:7 Ogokonywa kwa Misiri nigo kore bosa; ase ayio narokire ense eyio “Rahabu etari gokora gento.” 
Isaiah30:8 Bono genda, orike amang’ana ayio ase ebao agwo ase amasio abo, na oyarike ime ase ebuku, erinde abe kirori ase amatuko agochi‐gocha goika kare na kare." 
Isaiah30:9 Abanto aba nigo bare abasaria, abana abanyaborimo, abana batari koigwera amachiko ’Omonene." 
Isaiah30:10 Nigo bagotebia abarori b’amaroro: “Timobaisa korora amang’ana,” na batebia ababani: “Timobaisa gotobanera amang’ana amaronge; totebie amang’ana amororo aya agotwansera, motobanere ay’obong’ainereria." 
Isaiah30:11 Karue inchera, gobera korwa ase oboeto, morusie asetore Oyio ore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ase ayio, Oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli otebire iga: “Inwe mwachayire ring’ana eri, mwanchire amang’ana ’obobe na obong’ainereria, naro mosemeretie." 
Isaiah30:13 Ase ayio, okomocha oko kw’ebibe nkobe asemore buna obotandoku bore ase orwaki orotambe rwekumbire, rore ang’e kogwa, na okogwa kwaye nigo korache bwango mobosokano." 
Isaiah30:14 Okogwa okwo nkobe buna ogwatwa kw’enyongo y’omokori chinyongo egotinerwa inse, nonya norogio oromo rw’enyongo eyio tirori gotoka omonto araancharere omorero, gose arabuchere amache korwa ase ensoko.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae, Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli agoteba: “Komorang’iranere mobe abatoereru imotooreke; ase oboremereria na ogosemeria monyore chinguru.” Korende inwe mwangire gokora bo." 
Isaiah30:16 Nigo mogoteba ng’a moriine chibarasi chikominyoka mono, motame. Ee, goika motame. Inwe moganetie gotama ne chibarasi chinyango, korende ababisa baino abwo bakobabwatia nigo bare abaminyoki kobabua." 
Isaiah30:17 Abanto baino elifu eyemo mbaserigwe ase okogoswa nomonto oyomo, gose nabanto batano, goika abatigari baino babe buna omoenga oyomo ore ase egetunwa igoro, na buna ekemanyererio keimokereirie ase ekerogo igoro." 
Isaiah30:18 Ase ayio Omonene nigo aganyete ng’a anyare kobakorera amaya; na ase ayio, neimokererie igoro mono goika abe okobarorera amabera, ekiagera Omonene nigo are Nyasae bw’oboronge. Mbasesenirie abanto bonsi abamoganyete." 
Isaiah30:19 Inwe abanto momenyete Sayoni agwo Yerusalemu, timokogenderera korera naende. Ekeene, Omonene nabakorere amaya ekero mokorera asare; ekero araigwe eriogi ri’okorera kwaino nabairanerie." 
Isaiah30:20 Nonya Omonene ogochia kobaa inwe omogati ekero more nemechando, na amache ekero more nobororo, aborokia baino tibakogenderera kwebisa, korende mobe mokobarora namaiso aino." 
Isaiah30:21 Komorabe mwagobeire korwa ase enchera gochia ensemo y’okorio, gose ey’okobee, inwe namoigwe korwa nyuma yaino amang’ana aya: “Enchera neye, yebwatie.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Ase engaki eyio moimokie emegwekano yaino mogosasima, eyio ebachire na koomwa ne chifeta, na eyende ebombire na koomwa netahabu, moyetugute buna ebinto bitachenegeti, moyetebie: “Karue aa asetore!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Erio ekero morabe mogosimeka chimbusuro chiaino, Omonene nachitwerie embura, erinde chindagera chiaino chiame, nainwe monyore chindagera chinyinge chingiya. Ekero ekio chitugo chiaino nchinyore amarisio amagare." 
Isaiah30:24 Chiombe ne chitigere chiaino, echio mokoremia ase emegondo yaino, nchinyore chindagera chingiya chisongire noroteru na goswagwa, chiochoganirie nomonyo, chirie." 
Isaiah30:25 Ase rituko erio ekero ogoitwa okonene korabe, ne chindwaki chinkong’u chiraiyerigwe, chindooche nchituboke korwa ase ebitunwa ebitambe bionsi na ebigoro biimokererete igoro." 
Isaiah30:26 Oborabu bw’omotienyi mborabe se buna omobaso bw’erioba, na omobaso bw’erioba nobare ara gatano na kabere, buna okobara kw’amatuko atano na abere. Amang’ana ayio nigo arakorekane ekero Omonene araboe chingoma na agwenie amaakwa aagete abanto baye." 
Isaiah30:27 Rora, erieta ri’Omonene ngocha rire korwa aare. Nigo agocha ore nendamwamu egwoka, ne rikundesi rinene ri’erioki; amang’ana ’ebikoba biaye nigo aichire nekeririanda, na oromeme rwaye nigo rore buna omorero ogosiria." 
Isaiah30:28 Omoika bw’Omonene oye nigo onga orooche roichire goika ebigoti. Nasonge abanto b’ebisaku negesongero ki’ogosiria; ase emenwa yabo nigo arabeke ebinto ase emenwa yabo bi’okobatantania. 
Isaiah30:29 Inwe motere ogotera buna nokw’omoyega omochenu bw’obotuko; chinkoro chiaino nchibe nomogoko buna ekero abanto bakobugia ebiroria kobagotiira gochia ase egetunwa ki’Omonene, ere oyore Egetare ki’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Omonene naake eriogi riaye ri’obonene na abanto bariigwe, na ogoaka kw’endamwamu gokorwa ase okoboko kwaye kororekane. Nigo araake goetera ase omorero ogosamba na gosiria, na omwaga bwe chinguru, na embura y’omoubera, na amagena ’embura." 
Isaiah30:31 Ase eriogi ri’Omonene, na ase ogoaka nenyimbo yaye, Abaasuri mbaondoke mono." 
Isaiah30:32 Omonene naimokie enyimbo yaye abae egesusuro, na ekero arabe ogoaka abanto abwo, abanto baye mbabe bakobugia chinchigiri na amakano. Omonene omonyene nere orabarwanie esegi aande onsi." 
Isaiah30:33 Aase ogosambera ebing’wanso bi’okogechia nigo aroisetigwe kare; ee aase agwo nigo aroiseretigwe omoruoti. Aase agwo nigo are aatambe na aagare, aichorigwe chinko na omorero. Omoika bw’omonwa bw’Omonene, onga buna omorero bw’amagena akoyia, noro orayouterere." 
Isaiah31:1 Obobe nobwabo abwo bagotirimboka gochia Misiri korigia ogokonywa, abwo basemeretie chibarasi ne chigari, ekiagera chire chinyinge, na abariini chibarasi, ekiagera bare ne chinguru, korende tibari korigia Oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, gose korigia ogosesenigwa korwa ase Omonene oyio." 
Isaiah31:2 Ere nigo are omong’aini na nigo akorenta obobe gose tari koonchora amang’ana aye. Nae eamate y’abakori amabe egesusuro, boigo nae abakonyi b’abagokora amabe egesusuro." 
Isaiah31:3 Abamisiri nigo bare mwanyabanto, tibari Nyasae; chibarasi chiabo nigo chire emebere, tichiri emeika. Ekero Omonene ararambore okoboko kwaye, abwo bagokonya mbagochwe, na abwo bagokonywa bagwe; bonsi nigo barasirigwe amo." 
Isaiah31:4 Aya naro Omonene antebetie; “Buna koreng’ana endo ensae ekoronya ase eng’iti yaitire, na teri kogoswa namariogi ’omoganda bw’abarisia, gose teri kwoboa egeturi kiabo, naboigo inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ndache korwana ase Egetunwa gia Sayoni, na ase ekegoro kiaye." 
Isaiah31:5 Buna koreng’ana chinyoni chikorambora chimbaba chiabo, naboigo inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ndaegere Yerusalemu; ninyorende na koyobooria; ninyororere amabera na koyotooria.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Inwe Abaisraeli, moiranere oria mwasaretie asare mokamotiga." 
Isaiah31:7 Engaki ngocha ere kera omonto aratugute emegwekano yaye agosasima eroisirie korwa ase chifeta ne chitahabu, eyio mwaroisetie namaboko aino, na igo mogakora ebibe." 
Isaiah31:8 “Abaasuri mbaitwe nemioro, korende tari eya mwanyabanto, ee, emioro etari eya mwanyabanto nebasirie. Abanto abwo mbatame korwa ase esegi, na abamura babo mbairwe ase obosomba, bakore emeremo ase okobetererigwa." 
Isaiah31:9 Oyore egetare kiabo natame ore nomoondoko omonge; na abakogamba amo nere mbatame ase okogoswa ekero bararore ebendera y’esegi.” Omonene, oyio omorero oye ore ase Sayoni, na ekebemberi kiaye ki’omorero kere Yerusalemu, otebire amang’ana ayio." 
Isaiah32:1 Rora, omoruoti naoroke oragambe ase oboronge, na abagambi b’obogambi mbagambe bakore ay’ekeene." 
Isaiah32:2 Kera oyomo obo nabe buna obwebiso ekero omwaga okogusa, na buna ekeigamero ekero embura y’omoubera egotwa; boigo mbabe buna chindooche chire ase ense enyomo, na buna ekiriri ki’egetare ekenene ase ense etari namache." 
Isaiah32:3 Erio amaiso ’abanto abwo bakorora tagoukora, na amato ’abanto abwo bakoigwa naigwe." 
Isaiah32:4 Erio abanto abwo batarenge ne chinkoro chi’oboremereria mbabe nebirengererio bi’okomanya, na abwo barenge gotutura mbamanye gokwana buya na koigugwa buya." 
Isaiah32:5 Ase engaki eyio omonto omoriri takorokwa omosike, gose omong’ainereria takorokwa omonto omwegenwa." 
Isaiah32:6 Omonto omoriri nigo agokwana amang’ana ’oboriri; ebirengererio biaye nigo bigokora emeroberio y’ogokora ebibe; nigo akwenaria gokora aya atari e chingencho chinchenu; nigo agokwana bobe igoro y’Omonene, na otiga korageria abare nenchara, na orina abare nerang’o amache." 
Isaiah32:7 Ebirwanero bi’omong’ainereria nigo bire ebi’obobe; ere nigo agokora emeroberio y’obosooku gosiria abachandegete ase okobatebera oborimo, nonya nekero barabwo bagokwana ay’oboronge bwabo." 
Isaiah32:8 Korende omonto omosike nigo akoroberia ay’obosike, na nigo agotenena ase ay’obosike." 
Isaiah32:9 Inwe abakungu mweisanegetie, imoka, montegerere! Inwe abaiseke motechandereti kende, tegerera, moigwe amang’ana ngokwana!" 
Isaiah32:10 Inwe abakungu motechandereti kende, ekero amatuko aetanetie omwaka aerire mobe mogochandeka, ekiagera emesabibu tekwama, ne rigesa rie chindagera tirikoba." 
Isaiah32:11 Ase ayio inwe abakungu motechandereti kende, iguswa, mwechabore chianga chiaino mobe getirianda, erio mweboyie chigunia." 
Isaiah32:12 Moake‐ake ebikuba biaino, ekiagera emegondo yaino emiya, na emesabibu yaino ekwama mono, yasarigwe," 
Isaiah32:13 na ekiagera amagwa na amageri biamerire ase ense y’abanto baane, mweake‐ake ase engencho ye chinyomba chi’emegoko chire ase omochie oyio oichire nomochengo." 
Isaiah32:14 Chinyomba chi’oboruoti nchitigwe chire bosa, omochie oichire nabanto nong’anywe, eburi na emerobiri y’obotengerero mbibe amakuruma kare na kare; agwo nao chitigere chi’orosana chiregokerie, na omochie oyio obe oborisia bw’amaicho e ching’iti." 
Isaiah32:15 Nyuma y’ayio ntoitererwe Omoika korwa igoro, na aase arenge erooro abe omogondo okwama chindagera chinyinge, na omogondo okwama chindagera chinyinge noonchorwe obe rinani." 
Isaiah32:16 Erio ekeene ngekorwe ase ense y’erooro, na oboronge bokorwe ase omogondo okwama chindagera chinyinge." 
Isaiah32:17 Ayaratoke korwa ase oboronge nomorembe, na okwama kw’oboronge nobotoereru na ogosemeria kwa botambe." 
Isaiah32:18 Abanto baane mbamenye ase chinyomba chire nomorembe babe barendire buya, mbabe batimogete ase obotoereru." 
Isaiah32:19 Ekero embura y’amagena erabe egotwa neiyerie emete ye rinani, na omochie oino noiranigwe inse mono." 
Isaiah32:20 Imosesenirie inwe aba mogosimeka chimbusuro mbarabare ase amache onsi, mogotiga chiombe ne chitigere chiagenda aande onsi." 
Isaiah33:1 Obobe nobwaino inwe aba mogosiria, ko inwe timwana gosirigwa! Obobe nobwaino inwe abaurereria, ko inwe timwana kourererigwa! Ekero morabe mwakoorire gosiria, nainwe mosirigwe, na ekero morabe mwakoorire kourereria, nainwe mourererigwe." 
Isaiah33:2 Aye Omonene, tororere amabera; twabeire togosemeretie. Kabe chinguru chiaito kera rituko, na ototoorie ase engaki y’emechando." 
Isaiah33:3 Ekero aye gwakanire neriogi ringa buna eri’okogukura, abanto b’ebisaku nigo bagotama, na ekero kwaimokereire igoro, barabwo nigo bagoserebekana." 
Isaiah33:4 Abanto nigo bagocha babasakora buna chingeeti chigosakora, na buna chingige chikoumokera, nabarabwo nabo bakobaumokera." 
Isaiah33:5 Omonene nigo aimokererete igoro, ekiagera nigo amenyete igoro mono; naichorie Sayoni nekeene na oboronge." 
Isaiah33:6 Ase chingaki chiaino Omonene nabae oborendi obuya, na obonge bw’ogotooreka, na obong’aini, na okomanya; okomoiroka Omonene nakwo korabe enibo yaino." 
Isaiah33:7 Igwa, abanto abwo bare chituoni nigo bakorera mono agwo isiko, na abwo batomirwe bare namang’ana ’omorembe nigo bakorera bare nobororo." 
Isaiah33:8 Chinchera chinene chiasarekire, omoeti tari ogoeta aroro. Okobwatana kw’ogotianania gwasarigwe; emechie yachayirwe, na abanto tibasikiri." 
Isaiah33:9 Ense nigo ekweumia, yaereirwe chinguru; rinani ria Lebanoni riasookire na gosusana; rikura ria Saroni riabeire buna Ekerubo Ekiomo, na emete ya Basani na Karimeli yaarorokire amato." 
Isaiah33:10 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Bono ningororoke ntenene, bono ninyimokerere igoro inyetogie." 
Isaiah33:11 Inwe nigo morabe barito bw’obonyansi obwomo, moibore amasakwe. Omoika oino bw’okoeyana noro omorero orabasambe moere." 
Isaiah33:12 Abanto mbasambwe bayie babe ribu, na buna amagwa akobutorwa asambwa nomorero.”" 
Isaiah33:13 Inwe abamomenyete aare, igwa aya nakorire; nainwe abamomenyete ang’e ancha na koorokia okobua kwane."
