Isaiah33:14 Abanyabibe bare Sayoni basoirwe nobwoba; omoondoko obabwatire abwo batamoirogeti Nyasae. “Monto ki oito oranyare koremereria amenye nomorero ogosiria? Ning’o ore asetore oranyare komenya ime ase omorero oyio ogendererete gwoka kare na kare?” 
Isaiah33:15 Omonto okobwatia oboronge na gokwana amang’ana ’oboronge, oyio ogechete okonyora kw’ogokorera abande bobe na otangete amaboko aye tabwata riaaki, oyio otichete amato aye tabaisa koigwa amang’ana igoro y’ogoitera amanyinga, naende otari korigereria amang’ana ’obobe," 
Isaiah33:16 oyio nere oramenye aase are igoro. Ebitare ebikong’u mbibe ebikengero biaye; naegwe endagera yaye, na amache aye tagosira." 
Isaiah33:17 Amaiso aino arore omoruoti ore ase obwari bwaye; narore ense ere engare mono. 
Isaiah33:18 Chinkoro chiaino nchirengererie igoro y’obwoba boria na goteba: “Inee! Oria orenge kobeka ebango, ng’ai are? Oria orenge korusia ebango, ng’ai are? Oria orenge kobara emerobiri, ng’ai are?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Timokorora abanto baria abatindi naende, abanto babwate ogokwana ogokong’u motari komanya, abwo bagokwana emenwa emeao ase okong’ung’ura motari komanya." 
Isaiah33:20 Rigereria Sayoni, omochie oyio ase togosangererekana ase Amatuko aito Amanene! Erio amaiso ao narore Yerusalemu, obomenyo bw’obotoereru, eema etari kona‐kong’anya‐ng’anyigwa; eyio ebirochi biaye bitari gosimorwa, gose chingori chiaye chitari kobutoka." 
Isaiah33:21 Aroro agwo Omonene natoorokere ore nobonene, nabe asetore buna chindooche na ebirooche, ase amaato agosukigwa nemegango ataete, gose chimeeri chinene chitaete." 
Isaiah33:22 Omonene nere omonachi ebina oito, nere omogambi oito. Omonene nere omoruoti oito, natotoorie." 
Isaiah33:23 Chingori chi’omoenga bw’emeeri chianyega‐nyegire, tichikonyara gosiberania omoenga bokong’u aase aye, gose korambora ebitambaa. Erio ebinto ebinge mbisakorwe biatananwe, nonya nebisegora mbisakore ebinto." 
Isaiah33:24 Onde tari bw’omochie oyio oratebe: “Inche nigo nindwarete”, ekiagera abanto abamenyete aroro mbabe baabeirwe obobe bwabo." 
Isaiah34:1 Inwe abanto b’ebisaku, inchuo ang’e, motegerere moigwe; inwe abanto, igwera! Tiga ense etegerere amo na bionsi ebireo, ee, oboiko bwonsi na ebigosoka korwao." 
Isaiah34:2 Omonene obeire nendamwamu enene ase ebisaku bionsi, na obeire nekeririanda ase emeganda yabo yonsi y’esegi; obanacheire ekina gi’okobasiria, obarure baitwe." 
Isaiah34:3 Emebere y’abanto baraitwe nigo eratugutwe isiko, na ogotioka kw’obogundo bw’ebitondo ebio nigo koratioke aande onsi; amanyinga ’emebere eyio natirimboke korwa ase ebitunwa igoro." 
Isaiah34:4 Erioba, na omotienyi ne ching’enang’eni mbisirigwe; igoro neringwe buna amakaratasi, ee, ebitongwa ebio bia igoro mbiiyerigwe inse buna amato amomo ay’emesabibu na ay’emeko akogwa." 
Isaiah34:5 Omoro one onyure na koigota aiga igoro; rora, ngotirimboka ore oe Abaedomu egesusuro, abanto abwo nanacheire ekina." 
Isaiah34:6 Omoro bw’Omonene oichoirwe namanyinga, otubirwe nebitinya, ee, oichoirwe namanyinga e chimanwa chie ching’ondi, na aye chimbori, na otubirwe nebitinya bie chinyigo chie chimingichi. Omonene ngokora are ekeng’wanso agwo Bosira, na ogoitwa okonene nkobe ase ense y’Abaedomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Ching’era nachirochio nchiiyerigwe inse, ne chieri chinene ne chinke boigo. Ense yabo nenyiigwe namanyinga, ne riroba riabo rinore nebitinya, ekiagera" 
Isaiah34:8 erio nerituko ri’Omonene ri’ogoakana egesiomba, ee, oyio nomwaka bw’ogoakana amabe akoretwe ase Sayoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Amache e chindooche chia Edomu naonchoke abe buna eramu, ne riroba ri’ense eyio ndibe buna eramu ekoyia omorero." 
Isaiah34:10 Omorero oyio nogenderere koyia obotuko na omobaso, tokorimigwa; erioki riaye ndichongororoke gochia igoro kogenderera botambe. Ense eyio nebe esaregete ekiaare ase ekiaare; monto onde tari oraete ase egati y’ense eyio nonya ndinde." 
Isaiah34:11 Chinsoti na ebirongo mbimenye aroro; ense eyio nebe eye chinyakweumia na ebigonkoru. Omonene narambore igoro yaye ekerengero gi’okoyetantania na ekebiro gi’okoyerentera obosiru. 
Isaiah34:12 Abanto abasike tibagotokao baranyare kobekwa bagambe; abagambi babo bonsi nigo barasire. 
Isaiah34:13 Amagwa namere ase chinyomba chi’oboruoti, amasa na amageri mbimere ase chiburi chi’aroro. Nabe obomenyo bwe chisese chi’orosana ne chisagero." 
Isaiah34:14 Aase agwo ching’iti chi’orosana nchiumeraneo ne chinyang’au ase obotuko amarengari nabe akorangerania, na ekerecha gete ngeche aroro kenyore aase kegotimokera." 
Isaiah34:15 Aase agwo chinyakweumia nchiagache ebiswa biabo, chibiare amagena na goturagia ebichuchu, na chibisangererie ase ekiriri gie chimbaba chiabo ime; ee agwo amakoru nasangererekaneo, kera erimo neriamwabo." 
Isaiah34:16 Rigia korwa ase ebuku y’Omonene, mosome: Nonya nekemo ki’ebitongwa ebio tigekobora kobeera aroro, kera ekemo goika kebe nekiamwabo. Omonene ochikire amang’ana ayio, na Omoika oye nobisangererieo." 
Isaiah34:17 Omonene oakeire ebitongwa ebio obomera, na okoboko kwaye kwabiatananeire ense nekerengero, ebe eyabo kogenderera botambe, mbigenderere komenya aroro ekiaare ase ekiaare." 
Isaiah35:1 Erooro na ense enyomo nchibe nomogoko; ee, erooro nechenge na gosicha buna ebisicha ebiya." 
Isaiah35:2 Nigo erasiche ebisicha ebinge, erio echenge na gotera nomogoko. Neegwe obonene buna obw’ebitunwa bia Lebanoni, na obwari buna obwa Karimeli na Saroni. Abanto mbarore obonene bw’Omonene, ee, mbarore obonene bwa Nyasae oito na obonguru bwaye." 
Isaiah35:3 Amaboko are amoro yabeke chinguru; kong’ia amaru arosire. 
Isaiah35:4 Tebia abanto abwo babwate chinkoro chinyoba: “Mobe abaremu, timwoboa! Naama! Nyasae oino nache korusia egesiomba. Rora, Nyasae nache kobaruseria egesiomba. Ere nache kobatooria.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Erio amaiso ’emeuko aramokigwe, na amato ’emetino atinorwe." 
Isaiah35:6 Ebisegora mbichara‐charoke buna chinsune, ne chimeme chi’amamama nchitere nomogoko. Chindooche nchisoke ase erooro, na ebirooche ase ekerubo ekiomo." 
Isaiah35:7 Ense y’omokenye ogosamba nebe ritibo ri’amache, na ase ense enyomo chinsoko chi’amache nchitubokeo; aase chisese chi’orosana chiamenyete, obonyansi, na ebitonto, na amauncho mbimereo." 
Isaiah35:8 Enchera enene eroisirie buya nebeo; eyio nigo erarokwe “Enchera Enchenu”. Abanto batachenegeti tibagoetao; enchera eyio nigo erabe ey’abanto aba boka. Abagoeta aroro, nonya bare abariri, tibagosira." 
Isaiah35:9 Endo tekobao ase enchera eyio, gose eng’iti ende y’orosana tegochao, chirochio tichikonyorekana aroro, korende abanto baboorigwe nabwo barataare ase enchera eyio." 
Isaiah35:10 Abanto abwo Omonene abooririe mbairane, baike Sayoni bagotera; omogoko o kare na kare nobe igoro ase emetwe yabo buna egutwa; mbabe nomogoko na omochengo, obororo na omoichano mbiere kegima asebare." 
Isaiah36:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na kane bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Hezekia, Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akagenda, akarwania emechie yonsi y’Abayuda yagiteire chindwaki, akayebua." 
Isaiah36:2 Erio omoruoti oyio bw’Abaasuri agatoma Rabi‐Sake korwa Lakisi amo nabarwani esegi abange agende ase Hezekia agwo Yerusalemu. Rabi‐Sake agatenena ase omotaro bwe ritibo ria rogoro ase enchera ekogenda ase egetii ki’omosibia bw’ebitambaa bikoroisigwa chianga. 
Isaiah36:3 Erio Eliakimu, mosinto o Hilikia, omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, na Sebuna omoriki, na Yoa mosinto bw’Asafu, oyorenge omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka, bagacha aroro." 
Isaiah36:4 Rabi‐Sake akabatebia ng’a batebie Hezekia iga: “Aya naro omoruoti omonene, oria bw’Abaasuri, agokwana: Nigoro yang’o obegete ogosemeria kwao?" 
Isaiah36:5 Nigo okorengereria ng’a ogokwana kw’amang’ana gwoka nakwo koganeirie ase okomanya korwana esegi na koyebua? Ning’o osemeretie oragokonye goika kwangire konyingwera inche? 
Isaiah36:6 Rora bono, aye nigo osemeretie ense y’Abamisiri, eyio enga buna egetonto kebunegete. Omonto onde bwensi okogiesiirera, ekio nigo keramokebe okoboko. Naboigo Farao omoruoti o Misiri are ase abanto bonsi abwo bamosemeretie." 
Isaiah36:7 “Inee! Inwe nigo mogontebia ng’a nigo mosemeretie Omonene, Nyasae oino? Tari ere oria aase aye aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa amo nebisasimero biaye Hezekia atagoire, agatebia Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu: Mobe mogosasima bosio bw’egesasimero eke!" 
Isaiah36:8 Inchuo moigwane mobeke rigori nomonene one, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri. Nimbae chibarasi chilifu ibere komoranyare konyora abariini be chibarasi echio." 
Isaiah36:9 Naki moranyare kobua omoteneneri oyomo ore omoke ase egati y’abasomba b’omonene one, ekero mosemeretie ense ya Misiri ase okonyora chigari na abariini chibarasi?" 
Isaiah36:10 Inee! Nigo mokagete ng’a inche nigo nachire korwania ense eye na koyesaria Omonene atancheti? Taibo; Omonene nere ontebia: Genda orwanie ense eria oyesarie!” 
Isaiah36:11 Erio Eliakimu, na Sebuna, na Yoa, bagatebia Rabi‐Sake, “Koranche okwane naintwe, abasomba bao, ase omonwa bw’Ekearamaiki, ekiagera ntoyomanyete; tobaisa gokwana naintwe ase omonwa bw’Ekeyuda ekero abanto bare ase orwaki igoro bategererete.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Rabi‐Sake agateba, “Inee! Omonene one nigo antoma nkwane amang’ana aya ase omonene oino na asemore mweka? Yaya, tantomete ase inwe mweka, korende nase abanto baikaransete ase orwaki igoro, abwo banacheirwe ekina amo nainwe bagochia koria obonyira bwabo na konywa amasinyoro abo bagoitera.”" 
Isaiah36:13 Erio Rabi‐Sake agatenena, agaaka eriogi rinene ase omonwa bw’Ekeyuda, agateba, “Igwa ring’ana ri’omoruoti omonene, ore omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
Isaiah36:14 Aya naro omoruoti agokwana: Timobaisa gwancha Hezekia abang’aine, ekiagera ere takonyara kobatooria." 
Isaiah36:15 Timobaisa gwancha Hezekia abasirie ng’a mosemerie Omonene ekero agoteba: Ekeene, Omonene natotoorie, na omochie oyo tokobekwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
Isaiah36:16 Timobaisa gotegerera amang’ana a Hezekia. Aya naro omoruoti bw’Abaasuri agoteba: Kora omorembe nainche, moche asende. Erio kera omonto asemore narie okwama kw’emesabibu na okw’emeko yaye omonyene, na kera oyomo oino nanywe amache ’ensoko yaye omonyene," 
Isaiah36:17 goika inchiche imbarusie agwo mbaire ase ense egwekaine buna ense eyio yaino, ense ere ne chindagera, na edivai, ense ere nemegati na emegondo y’emesabibu." 
Isaiah36:18 Morende mono, ekero Hezekia akobang’aina, ogoteba: Omonene natotoorie. Inee! Enyasae ende yonsi y’ebisaku yatooririe ense yaye korwa ase okoboko kwane inche omoruoti bw’Abaasuri?" 
Isaiah36:19 Ng’ai chinyasae chia Hamati na Aripadi chire? Inee! Chinyasae chia Sefariwaimu, ng’ai chire? Chiatooririe ense ya Samaria korwa ase okoboko kwane?" 
Isaiah36:20 Nereri ase egati ye chinyasae chionsi chie chinse echio yatooririe ense yaye korwa ase okoboko kwane? Nainwe nigo mokorengereria ng’a Omonene natoorie Yerusalemu korwa ase okoboko kwane?” 
Isaiah36:21 Korende abanto bagakira‐kiri, tibamoiraneria nonya ne ring’ana erimo, ekiagera omoruoti konya ochikire iga: “Timobaisa komoiraneria.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Erio Eliakimu, mosinto o Hilikia, oria orenge omoteneneri bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, na Sebuna omoriki, na Yoa mosinto bw’Asafu, omoriki bw’amang’ana are gokoreka, bagacha ase Hezekia bare ne chianga chitandogete, bakamotebia amang’ana ayio Rabi‐Sake akwanete." 
Isaiah37:1 Ekero omoruoti Hezekia aigwete amang’ana ayio, agatandora chianga chiaye, akeboyia chianga chie chigunia, erio agasoa ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
Isaiah37:2 Agatoma Eliakimu, oria orenge omoteneneri bw’enyomba yaye, na Sebuna omoriki, na abakuani abagaaka, beboyetie chianga chie chigunia, bagende ase Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi." 
Isaiah37:2 Agatoma Eliakimu, oria orenge omoteneneri bw’enyomba yaye, na Sebuna omoriki, na abakuani abagaaka, beboyetie chianga chie chigunia, bagende ase Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi." 
Isaiah37:3 Abanto abwo bakamotebia, “Aya naro Hezekia agoteba: Rituko ria rero neri’obororo, na egesusuro, na ogochaywa, buna ekero abana babeire ang’e baiborwe, korende chinguru chi’okobasukia basoke chiaborire." 
Isaiah37:4 Ande nabo erabe ng’a ekero omoruoti bw’Abaasuri atomete Rabi‐Sake korama Nyasae ore moyo, ere Omonene, Nyasae oino naigwete ayio. Ere nabae egesusuro ase amang’ana ayio. Ase ayio sabera abanto abwo batigarete bare moyo.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Ekero abasomba ba Hezekia omoruoti baigete ase Isaya," 
Isaiah37:6 Isaya akabatebia, “Motebie omonene oino ng’a Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Tobaisa kwoboa ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio kwaigure abasomba b’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri batebire na kondama." 
Isaiah37:7 Rora, nimbeke omoika gete ime yaye, erio ekero araigwe chinkuma nairoke, airane gochia ase ense yaye; nimorue aitwe nomoro, agwo ase ense yaye omonyene.”" 
Isaiah37:8 Rabi‐Sake akairana, ekiagera aigwete ng’a omoruoti bw’Abaasuri orure Lakisi, akamonyora okorwana na Libuna." 
Isaiah37:9 Na ekero omoruoti bw’Abaasuri aigwete amang’ana ng’a Tirihaka, omoruoti bw’Abaetiopia, ochire korwana esegi nere, agatoma abanto ase Hezekia naende, akabatebia," 
Isaiah37:10 “Aya naro moratebie Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda: Tobaisa gwancha Nyasae oyio oo osemeretie akong’aine, erinde orengererie ng’a Yerusalemu tokobekwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
Isaiah37:11 Rora, aye kwaigure aya abaruoti b’Abaasuri bakoreire chinse chionsi, bachisaririe kegima. Inee! Aye bono notooreke?" 
Isaiah37:12 Inee! Chinyasae chi’ebisaku chiatooririe ebisaku biria chisokoro chiane chiasiretie, ebisaku bia Gosani, na Harani, na Resefu, na abanto ba Edeni, baria barenge agwo Telasari?" 
Isaiah37:13 Ng’ai omoruoti o Hamati are, gose omoruoti bw’Aripadi, na oyo bw’omochie o Sefarawaimu, na oyo o Hena, na oyo o Iwa?”" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekia akaegwa rirube korwa ase abanto baria batometwe, akarisoma, erio akagenda ase enyomba y’Omonene, akarirambora ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Isaiah37:15 Hezekia agasaba Omonene, agateba," 
Isaiah37:16 “Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, aye omenyete nobonene bwao igoro y’Abakerubi, aye naye Nyasae, aye bweka, igoro y’amarouti onsi ay’ense; naye gwatongete igoro na ense" 
Isaiah37:17 Aye Omonene, tegerera oigwe! Aye Omonene, rigereria orore! Oigwe amang’ana onsi a Senakeribu, aya atomire ase ogokorama aye Nyasae ore moyo." 
Isaiah37:18 Aye Omonene, ekeene, abaruoti b’Abaasuri basiririe abanto b’ebisaku ne chinse chiabo," 
Isaiah37:19 batugutire chinyasae chi’abanto abwo ase omorero, ekiagera chirochio tichiri Nyasae, korende nemeremo y’amaboko ’abanto, chiroisirie korwa ase emete na amagena, na ase ayio chigasarigwa." 
Isaiah37:20 Bono Omonene, Nyasae oito, totoorie korwa ase okoboko kwaye, erinde amaruoti onsi are ase ense anyare komanya ng’a aye naye bweka ore Omonene.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Erio Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, agatoma amang’ana ase Hezekia, akomotebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Aye gwansabire igoro ya Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
Isaiah37:21 Erio Isaya, mosinto bw’Amosi, agatoma amang’ana ase Hezekia, akomotebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Aye gwansabire igoro ya Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri." 
Isaiah37:22 Ase ayio, eri nario ring’ana Omonene akwanire: Aye Senakeribu, Sayoni, omochie ore buna omoiseke omwekungi, nigo agochayete na kogosekerera; omochie o Yerusalemu nigo okogosingiseria omotwe magega yao." 
Isaiah37:23 Aye ning’o gwasekereire na korama? Ning’o gwaakeire eriogi riao ase ’oboenenu na kweimokereria igoro namaiso ’oboenenu? Aye kwabeire mamincha y’Omonene bw’Abaisraeli. 
Isaiah37:24 Goetera ase abasomba bao gwachecheirie Omonene ekero gwatebire iga: Nase chigari chiane chinyinge nariinire goika ebichuria bi’ebitunwa, goika igoro kegima ya Lebanoni. Ngatema emecharake yaye yare emetambe goetania eyende, na emetarakwa yaye emiya mono. Ngasoa ase ebinunchi biaye ime, na ime ase rinani rinoru." 
Isaiah37:25 Ngakunya, nkanyora amache nkonywa, ngakamia chindooche chionsi chia Misiri ne chimbaratero chi’amagoro aane." 
Isaiah37:26 “Inee! Aye tikwana koigwa ng’a nigo nachigete ayio kare, ngakora emeroberio eyio ase amatuko a kare? Bono ngoikerania inde amang’ana ayio ng’a aye osarie emechie egiteire chindwaki ebe amaturi are chitui chi’amagena." 
Isaiah37:27 Abanto be chinse echio nigo barenge abareu batari na nguru, bakaondoka na gosookigwa, bakaba buna ebimeri bire mogondo, na buna obonyansi oborere bomerete kerama igoro bogosusana botarakina." 
Isaiah37:28 “Nimanyete ekero oikaransete na ekero ogosoka isiko, na ekero okoirana. Boigo nimanyete buna ore nekeririanda asende." 
Isaiah37:29 Ekiagera kwabeire na kerokio asende, na oboenenu bwao bwaikire ase amato aane, nimbeke ekegobanio ase chimioro chiao ime, na egento kiane ki’ogokoraa ase omonwa oo, ninkoiranie ogendere enchera eria gwacherete." 
Isaiah37:30 “Eke nakio ekemanyererio asore Hezekia: Omwaka oyo inamorie endagera ekwemeria yoka enyene, na omwaka o kabere boigo. Erio omwaka o gatato imobusure na kogesa, imosimeke emesabibu ase emegondo na morie okwama kwabo." 
Isaiah37:31 Na abatigari b’enyomba ya Yuda abaratooreke mbaame babe buna ebimeri biirete emeri inse mono na gokina gochia igoro, bikwama amatunda," 
Isaiah37:32 ekiagera abatigari mbache korwa Yerusalemu, na korwa ase egetunwa gia Sayoni, ekeombe ki’abanto baratooreke. Risemi ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda ndiikeranie amang’ana ayio." 
Isaiah37:33 “Ase igo, aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri: Ere tagocha ase omochie oyo, gose takoruta omogwe aroro; tagocha ase omochie oyo ne chinguba, gose takoagacha eburi bosio bwaye." 
Isaiah37:34 Naende nigo agoteba ng’a enchera eria acherete, eyio nero arairanere, gose takonyara gosoa ase omochie oyo." 
Isaiah37:35 Inche ning’egere omochie oyo na koyotooria ase engencho yane inche omonyene, na ase engencho ya Daudi, omosomba one.”" 
Isaiah37:36 Erio omomalaika bw’Omonene akagenda ase egetwori ki’Abaasuri agaita abanto chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo etano na etato na isano (185,000). Ekero abanto babogete mambia, bakarora emebere y’abanto bakwete ere aande onsi." 
Isaiah37:37 Senakeribu, omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, akarua agwo, akagenda nka bwoye, akamenya Nineva." 
Isaiah37:38 Ekero arenge gosasima ime ase enyomba ya Nisiroki, enyasae yaye, Adarameleki na Sareseri, abamura baye, bakamoita nemioro, erio bagatama gochia ase ense y’Ararati. Ezara‐Hadoni, omomura oye, akaba omoruoti ribaga riaye." 
Isaiah38:1 Ase amatuko aria Hezekia akarwara, akaba ang’e nogokwa. Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi, agacha asare, akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ebeke ang’e, amo nenyomba yao, ekiagera aye goika okwe, tokogwena.”" 
Isaiah38:1 Ase amatuko aria Hezekia akarwara, akaba ang’e nogokwa. Isaya omobani, mosinto bw’Amosi, agacha asare, akamotebia, “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ebeke ang’e, amo nenyomba yao, ekiagera aye goika okwe, tokogwena.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Hezekia akaonchora obosio bwaye gochia ase enyasi, agasaba Omonene," 
Isaiah38:3 akabora, “Bono Omonene nagosoroire, inyora buna nabeire ngokobwatia ase obwegenwa, na ase enkoro yane yonsi, naende nakorire ayare amaronge ase obosio bwao.” Erio. Hezekia akarera nobororo." 
Isaiah38:4 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Isaya, rikamotebia," 
Isaiah38:5 “Irana otebie Hezekia ng’a inche Omonene, Nyasae o Daudi sokoro yaye, nigo ngoteba iga: Naigure ogosaba kwao, narorire amariga ao. Rora, nakomentire emiaka ikomi na etano ase obogima bwao." 
Isaiah38:6 Ningotoorie aye amo nomochie oyo, korwa ase okoboko kw’omoruoti bw’Abaasuri; ning’egere omochie oyo." 
Isaiah38:7 “Eke nakio ekemanyererio asore korwa ase Omonene, ng’a naikeranie amang’ana ayio atebire:" 
Isaiah38:8 Rora, ase ekerengero gie chinsa ki’Ahasi ninkore omorengari oria otambeire ekero erioba riereerire oirane gochia nyuma ebitambokero ikomi.” Ase ayio erioba rikairania omorengari oye ebitambokero ikomi ase ekerengero keria." 
Isaiah38:9 Nyuma Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, kagwenire korwa ase oborwaire bwaye, akarika ogotera oko:" 
Isaiah38:10 Nigo narengereretie ng’a ngochia gokwa inde ase emiaka y’oboke bwane; ningende ase ebiita bi’aase abakure, naurirwe emiaka yane yatigarete." 
Isaiah38:11 Ngateba, “Tinkorora Omonene naende ase ense y’abare moyo, gose korora monto onde bwensi ase aba bamenyete ase ense eye y’obosiru." 
Isaiah38:12 Obomenyo bwane bwatagoirwe na korusigwa asende buna eema y’omorisia, naringire obogima bwane buna omoroisia ebitambaa akobiringa; nabutoirwe korwa ase egekorero; ekero botaraira, aye nigo okoeria obogima bwane." 
Isaiah38:13 Nigo nkorera ase obotuko bwonsi ng’a nkonywe; Omonene obunire amauga aane buna endo ekobuna ebi yaitire; ekero botaraira ere nigo akoeria obogima bwane. 
Isaiah38:14 Nigo nkorera buna egesingororo gose ebarara; nigo nkweumia buna riruma. Amaiso aane arosire ase okorigereria gochia igoro. Aye Omonene, nigo inde nemechando emenene, indwanerere!”" 
Isaiah38:15 Inki bono ngokwana? Omonene nere okwanire nainche, nere omonyene okorire amang’ana aya. Ase igo nintaare inde nobokanyeku ase emiaka yane yonsi, ase engencho y’obororo bwonsi bw’omoyo one." 
Isaiah38:16 Aye Omonene, ase okoba namang’ana buna ayio, abanto nigo bakoba moyo, na obogima bw’omoika one nao bore ase ayio, na bono ingwenie kegima na onkore imbe moyo." 
Isaiah38:17 Naama! Nigo narenge nobororo obonge, na obororo obwo bokandetera omorembe. Ase obwanchani bwao gwatooririe omoyo one korwa ase engoro y’obosareku; gwatugutire ebibe biane bionsi gochia nyuma yao." 
Isaiah38:18 Abare aase abakure tibagokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, abwo bakure tibakogotogia; abwo bakogenda ase chimbeera ime tibagosemeria obwegenwa bwao." 
Isaiah38:19 Omonto ore moyo nere orakoiranerie ng’a mbuya mono, buna inche ngokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase rituko ria rero; ise abana nere agokora obwegenwa bwao bwamanyekana ase abana baye." 
Isaiah38:20 Omonene nantoorie; ase ayio ntobe togotera amatera, ase okobugia amakano aane, ase obogima bwaito bwonsi, agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
Isaiah38:21 Bono Isaya konya otebire iga: “Tiga baimokie ribomba ri’amako, baribeke ase rigumba ria Hezekia, erinde agwene.”" 
Isaiah38:22 Boigo Hezekia konya oboririe iga: “Nkemanyererio ki gekonyorokia ng’a ningende ase enyomba y’Omonene?” 
Isaiah39:1 Ase engaki eria omoruoti o Babeli Merodaki‐Baladani, mosinto o Baladani, agatoma abanto bakaira rirube na ebiegwa ase Hezekia, ekiagera aigwete ng’a Hezekia nabete omorwaire, naende ng’a konya ogwenire." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia akabaroisia buya, erio akaborokia chimonga chiaye chionsi, ne chifeta, ne chitahabu, na ebinsari, na amaguta e rigori rinene, na ebirwanero biaye bionsi, na ebinto bionsi biagachire ase chinyomba chiaye. Tatigete gento kende gionsi ase enyomba yaye, gose ase chikungo chi’oboruoti bwaye, ataborogetie." 
Isaiah39:3 Erio omobani Isaya agacha ase Hezekia, omoruoti akamoboria, “Ngento ki abanto aba bakwana? Ng’ai barwa bagacha asore?” Hezekia akamoiraneria, “Barabwo nigo barwa Babeli, ense y’aare, bagacha asende.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Isaya akamoboria, “Ngento ki barora ase enyomba yao?” Hezekia akairaneria, “Nigo barora ebinto bionsi bire ase enyomba yane, tikeri nonya negento ekemo ase amagachero aane ntaborokia.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Erio Isaya agatebia Hezekia, “Bono igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene bw’Eganda:" 
Isaiah39:6 Naama! Amatuko ngocha are, ekero ebinto bionsi bire ase enyomba yao, na ebinto bionsi chisokoro chiao chiagachete goika rero iga nabiimokigwe biirwe Babeli. Nonya negento ekemo tikegotigara. Aya naro Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah39:7 Boigo abana bande bao abamura, abwo kwaiboreirwe, inabairwe, bachie koba abakoreri ase enyomba y’omoruoti o Babeli.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Erio Hezekia agatebia Isaya, “Ring’ana ri’Omonene aye gwakwanire nerigiya.” Naende akamotebia, “Omorembe na okorendwa okuya nigo bigochia koba ase obogima bwane.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Remia abanto baane! Ee, remia abanto baane! Nabo Nyasae oino atebire." 
Isaiah40:2 Kwana amang’ana ’obwororo ase Yerusalemu, moyorarerie ng’a emechando yaye yaerire, na ebibe biaye biabeirwe, naende ng’a Yerusalemu onyorire okwaberwa ara kabere korwa ase okoboko kw’Omonene ase ebibe biaye bionsi." 
Isaiah40:3 Igwa eriogi ri’oyogoaka egeturi ogoteba: “Roisia enchera y’Omonene ase erooro; rongeyia enchera enene ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, agwo ase erooro." 
Isaiah40:4 Kera rigoko nditichwe rimokerere igoro, na kera egetunwa na ekegoro nabiiranigwe inse, aase atareng’aini nareng’anigwe, na aase are ebitunwa‐tunwa naaranigwe." 
Isaiah40:5 Obonene bw’Omonene mboorokigwe, na mwanyabanto bonsi mbaborore bare amo. Omonene nere okwanire amang’ana ayio.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Eriogi rigoteba, “Raria amang’ana!” Na erinde rikoboria, “Mang’ana ki nkoraria?” “Raria ng’a mwanyabanto bonsi nigo banga buna obonyansi, obuya bwabo bwonsi nigo bonga egesicha kere mogondo." 
Isaiah40:7 Obonyansi nigo bokwoma, na ebisicha boigo, ekero Omonene abiuteire omoika oye; naboigo na mwanyabanto banga buna obonyansi." 
Isaiah40:8 Ee, obonyansi nigo bokwoma, na ebisicha boigo, korende ring’ana ria Nyasae oito nigo rirabeo goika kare na kare.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Aye Sayoni, omoraria bw’amang’ana amaya, tiira gochia ase ebitunwa ebitambe igoro. Aye Yerusalemu, omoraria bw’amang’ana amaya, aka eriogi riao ne chinguru; ee, aka eriogi mono, toiroka; tebia emechie y’Abayuda iga: “Rora Nyasae oino!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Rora, Omonene Nyasae ngocha are ore nokobua, okoboko kwaye nkobe gokogamba. Naama! Nigo agocha obwate eng’eria yaye, na ebiasakoire nigo bire ase obosio bwaye." 
Isaiah40:11 Narisie riicho riaye buna omorisia akorisia ching’ondi chiaye, nasangererie chimanwa chie ching’ondi achiagate, nachibogorie ase egekuba kiaye, na echi chire ne chimanwa ching’are nachiraae ng’ora ng’ora." 
Isaiah40:12 Ning’o orengire amache e chinyancha noroe rw’okoboko kwaye? Ning’o oramboire ebiara bi’amaboko aye korenga igoro? Ning’o obekire orotu rw’ense ase ekerengero, gose ning’o orengire ebitunwa na ebigoro nekerengero?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ning’o okoraa Omoika bw’Omonene, gose ning’o okomosemia na komotebereria?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ning’o Omonene akoboria amosemie amang’ana buya? Ning’o omworokereretie oboeto bw’oboronge, na komworokia okomanya, gose komworokia enchera y’okomanya?" 
Isaiah40:15 Naama! Ebisaku nigo binga buna entonyi y’amache egotonya korwa ase enyongo. Nigo bireng’anirie norotu orosinini rore ase esani ekorengera; rora, nigo akoimokia ebisinka buna orotu orosinini." 
Isaiah40:16 Emete ye rinani ria Lebanoni tegoisana ebe chinko chigouterwa omorero, ne ching’iti chionsi chireo tichigoisana chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa." 
Isaiah40:17 Ebisaku bionsi nigo bire bosa ase obosio bwaye, nigo abibarete buna negento bosa, bitaisaini kende." 
Isaiah40:18 Nyasae, ning’o moramoreng’anie, gose mogwekano ki moramoreng’anie?" 
Isaiah40:19 Omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa nigo okobombwa nomoroisia ebinto, erio omoturi oyooma netahabu, naende oyoroiseria ebinyuri bi’efeta." 
Isaiah40:20 Omonto ore omotaka otabwati ebinge akorua nigo agochora omote otari kogunda, origia omoroisia omong’aini omanyete kobaacha, ere omobaachera omogwekano otari gosuka." 
Isaiah40:21 Inee! Timwana komanya? Timwana koigwa? Timwana gotebigwa amang’ana ayio korwa omochakano? Timwana koyamanya korwa omochakano bw’oboroso bw’ense? 
Isaiah40:22 Ere nere oikaransete ase orosingo rw’ense, na abamenyete ase ense nigo banga buna ebisase; nere okorambora igoro chionsi buna egetambaa gekoramborwa, ee, nigo agochirambora buna eema ekomenywa ekoramborwa." 
Isaiah40:23 Omonene nigo agokeyia abagambi baba bosa, na abagambi ebina b’ense boigo baba bosa." 
Isaiah40:24 Abwo nigo banga buna ebimeri bisimekire masomberera, bitaireti emeri inse. Omonene nigo akobaguseria embeo, boma, na omoubera noro obairurukia buna okoirurukia obonyansi obwomo." 
Isaiah40:25 Oyore Omochenu nigo akoboria iga: “Ning’o rende moranyare kondeng’ania, ng’a imbe buna oyio?”" 
Isaiah40:26 Rigereria gochia igoro morore! Ning’o otongete ebinto ebio bionsi? Nere oria okoraa emeganda y’ebitongwa ebio ase omobaro obo, na koroka kera ekemo erieta riaye. Okobua kwaye nokonene mono, ne chinguru chiaye nigo chire nokobua, ase ayio kende tikeremeti nonya nekemo." 
Isaiah40:27 Inwe abanto ba Yakobo, inwe Abaisraeli, nase ki mogoteba ng’a Omonene tarochi chinchera chiaino, naende ng’a ere Nyasae obarinire oboronge bwaino?" 
Isaiah40:28 Inee! Timwana komanya gose koigwa, ng’a Omonene nigo are Nyasae o kare na kare, na Omotongi bwe chinsinyo chi’ense? Ere tari kogoya gose korosa. Obong’aini bwaye tibokorigigwa bomanyekane buna bore." 
Isaiah40:29 Ere nigo akoa omonto oyo ogoyire chinguru, na oyo otari na nguru nigo akomomentera chinguru." 
Isaiah40:30 Abasae mbagoye na korosa, na abamura mbagochwe bagwe inse," 
Isaiah40:31 korende abwo baganyete na gosemeria Omonene mbaegwe chinguru chinyia, mbairuruke gochia igoro ne chimbaba buna echi’ebiongo; mbabe bakominyoka batari korosa, mbabe bagotaara batari kogoya." 
Isaiah41:1 “Inwe ebisinka ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha, mokire‐kiri, montegerere, tiga abanto b’ebisaku banyore chinguru chinyia, tiga basuke gocha ang’e, bakwane; toche amo, toike ang’e ase ekina." 
Isaiah41:2 “Ning’o orangeretie oyomo korwa moocha, oria oumeranete nobobui aande onsi ase agendete? Ere nigo akobeka abanto b’ebisaku inse y’okobua kwaye, erinde atachere abaruoti inse y’amagoro aye; oyio nigo agoita abanto b’ebisaku nomoro, obakora baba buna orotu, na ase obota bwaye nigo akobasiarera buna obonyansi obwomo." 
Isaiah41:3 Nigo akobabwatia, oeta na orendire buya, ase chinchera atana goeta rinde." 
Isaiah41:4 Ning’o okorete na goikerania aya? Ning’o orangeretie ebiaare bi’abanto korwa omochakano? Ninche Omonene, ninche oyo bw’omochakano; ninche oyo bw’omoerio, ninche Ere.”" 
Isaiah41:5 Ebisinka ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha chiarorire ayio chiamwoboire, chinsinyo chi’ense nigo chigotengechigwa; chiasukire gocha ang’e." 
Isaiah41:6 Kera omonto nigo agokonya omogisangio oye; oyomo otebia oyonde, “Kabe omoremu!”" 
Isaiah41:7 Omosenia bwe chibao nigo akobeka omoturi bw’etahabu omokia, na omoturi ebioma obeka omoturagi chinguru, oteba, “Oborembo bw’okobwatania nobuya.” Erio babwatania omogwekano nemesumari tonyegera." 
Isaiah41:8 “Korende inwe Abaisraeli, abasomba baane, inwe nabanto ba Yakobo nachorete, inwe nigo more ab’ororeria rwa Ibrahimu, omosani one." 
Isaiah41:9 Nigo nabarusetie korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense, nkabarangeria korwa ase chinsinyo chi’aare mono, nkabatebia: Inwe nabasomba baane, nabachorire, timbaangeti." 
Isaiah41:10 Ase ayio timoiroka, inche nigo inde amo nainwe, timoichana, inche ninche Nyasae oino; nimbabeke chinguru, mbakonye, nimbasiire nokoboko gw’okorio kw’oboronge bwane." 
Isaiah41:11 “Rora, abwo bonsi babagechete mbasookigwe na gotantanigwa; abwo bakobaengereria mbabe bosa basirigwe." 
Isaiah41:12 Nigo morabarigie abwo bakobasoera, ko timokobanyora; abwo barenge kobarwania nigo barabe bosa kegima." 
Isaiah41:13 Ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, nimbabwate amaboko aino a borio. Ninche nkobatebia inwe: Timoiroka, nimbakonye." 
Isaiah41:14 “Inwe ororeria rwa Yakobo ronga buna rikonde, inwe ekeombe egeke ki’Abaisraeli, timoiroka! Inche Omonene nimbakonye. Ninche Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli inde Omobooria oino.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah41:15 “Rora, nimbakore inwe mobe egekorero gi’okoora, kere ekiya na kere namaara amoge; inwe moore ebitunwa, mobisamunyore, imokore ebigoro bibe buna omoiriro." 
Isaiah41:16 Mobisiare, na omwaga obirurukie gochia aare, erio ekembugu‐mbugu kebisiarere. Inwe abanyene mogoke ase Omonene na komwetogeria oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Isaiah41:17 “Ekero abataka na abaremeire barabe bakorigia amache na tibayanyora, ekero chimeme chiabo chirabe chiabwatanire namang’ang’ura; inche Omonene nimbaigwe, inche Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli tinkobatiga." 
Isaiah41:18 Nindete chindooche korwa ase ebigoro ebiomo, ne chinsoko nchituboke ase amagoko ime; ning’onchore erooro ebe ritibo ri’amache, na ense enyomo ebe ne chinsoko chire namache." 
Isaiah41:19 Nimerie emecharake ase erooro, boigo nimerie aroro emekonge, na emeadasi, na emezeituni. Ee, nimerie emetarakwa na emete" 
Isaiah41:20 ende egwekaine emeuru, na emebeno amo, erinde abanto mbarore na komanya, naende mbarengererie bamanye bonsi amo, ng’a nokoboko kw’Omonene gwakorire ayio, ee, ere oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli nere otongete ebio bionsi.”" 
Isaiah41:21 Omonene, Omoruoti bw’abanto ba Yakobo, nigo agoteba iga: “Renta amang’ana aino, renta oborori bwaino botoenekerie." 
Isaiah41:22 Tiga baborente bototebie aya agochia koba; tiga bototebie amang’ana a kare buna arenge, erinde tonyare koyarengereria na komanya buna aikeranetigwe, naende botoorokerie buna amang’ana agochia koba." 
Isaiah41:23 Totebie aya agochi‐gocha, erinde tomanye ng’a inwe ne chinyasae; kora amang’ana amaya, gose amabe erinde tokorora ayio tokumie." 
Isaiah41:24 Naama! Inwe nigo more bosa kegima, na emeremo yaino nero mbosa kegima; oyo obachorire inwe na kobasasima nigo are okogechia." 
Isaiah41:25 “Inarangeretie omonto korwa sugusu, ere ochire; ee, nigo namorusirie korwa moocha, ere narangerie erieta riane akonywe, natiringere abagambi inse buna esike egotiringwa, na buna omokori chinyongo agotiringa esike." 
Isaiah41:26 Ning’o obanete amang’ana ayio agwo kare, erinde tonyare komanya ng’a amang’ana oyio atebete nay’ekeene? Onde tari nonya noyomo oyaorogetie na koyararia; onde tari oigwete komokoyakwana." 
Isaiah41:27 Ninche Omonene nigo narenge omotang’ani gotebia Sayoni: Rigereria, morore abwo! Ninche narenterete Yerusalemu abwo bararetie amang’ana amaya." 
Isaiah41:28 Korende ekero narigereretie tinaroche monto onde, nonya nase egati yabo mosemia onde tarengeo; ekero naboretie, onde tarengeo ong’iraneretie." 
Isaiah41:29 Naama! Chinyasae echio chionsi mbosa. Emeremo eyio y’abanto nigo ere bosa kegima, ee, emegwekano eyio abanto babombete nigo enga embeo bosa.”" 
Isaiah42:1 “Rora, omosomba one oyio inche nabekire chinguru ime yaye; omochore one omoyo one ogokirie nere. Namobekeire Omoika one, nere orarente oboronge ase abanto b’ebisaku." 
Isaiah42:2 Ere takorera, gose tagoaka eriogi rinene, gose takoritiga riigugwe ase chinchera." 
Isaiah42:3 Egetonto giatachetwe tagokebuna, gose orotambe rw’etaya rokoimoka erioki takororimia. Ase obwegenwa bwaye narente oboronge." 
Isaiah42:4 Ere takorosa gose gokwa omoyo; goika abe orentire oboronge ase ense na kobokong’ia, na ebisinka, ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha nchibe chiganyete amachiko aye.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Omonene Nyasae, oyotongete igoro chionsi na gochirambora, oyo bwarete ense na bionsi ebikorwao, oyo oete abanto bareo obogima, na kobaa omoika abwo bagotaara aroro, nigo agoteba iga:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Inche ninche Omonene, nakorangeirie ase oboronge; nakobwatire okoboko kwao nkorendete. Goetera asore ninkore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabanto, obe omobaso bw’abanto b’ebisaku." 
Isaiah42:7 Oramokie amaiso ’emeuko, osibore abasibwa korwa ase echela, na abwo bamenyete ase omosunte korwa ase obosibwa bwabo." 
Isaiah42:8 “Inche ninche Omonene, erio nario erieta riane; tindi koa omonto onde obonene bwane; tinkoa emegwekano egosasimwa ogotogigwa kwane." 
Isaiah42:9 Rora, amang’ana natebete agwo kare aikeranire, na bono nigo nkobarareria amang’ana amayia, nkobayamanyia atarakorekana.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Moterere Omonene ogotera okoyia; motogie korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense! Inwe abaeti ase enyancha amo nebinto bionsi bire imeo, inwe abamomenyete ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha, motogie Omonene!" 
Isaiah42:11 Tiga erooro na emechie ereo biake amariogi, na abamenyete ase emechie ya Kedari boigo. Abanto bamenyete ase omochie o Sela mbatere nomogoko, baake eriogi korwa ase ebichuria bi’ebitunwa igoro." 
Isaiah42:12 Abwo bonsi batogie Omonene na koraria obonene bwaye ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha. 
Isaiah42:13 Omonene naoroke buna etuoni y’esegi, na buna omorwani esegi abokie omokia oye; nigo agoaka eriogi ri’esegi na kwoga mono, nigo akweorokia ng’a nare nokobua igore y’ababisa baye." 
Isaiah42:14 “Inche nabeire nkirete‐kiri ase engaki entambe, nabeire ngendererete gwetanga na gokira; korende bono ning’ake eriogi buna eri’omokungu okobina aibore; ning’use omoika na goita egekoe." 
Isaiah42:15 Ninsarie kegima ebitunwa na ebigoro, ninyomie ebimeri biabo bionsi; ning’onchore chindooche chibe ense enyomo, ninkamie amatibo.”" 
Isaiah42:16 “Nindaae abanto bare emeuko ase enchera batana komanya, nimbatang’ane ase oboeto batana komanya. Ning’onchore omosunte ore bosio bwabo obe oborabu, aase atareng’aini naaranigwe. Ayio naro ndabakorere, tingotiga goikerania amang’ana aane." 
Isaiah42:17 Korende abanto basemeretie emegwekano egosasimwa mbairanigwe nyuma, basookigwe, ekiagera nigo bagotebia emegwekano eyio ebombire; Inwe ninwe chinyasae chiaito.”" 
Isaiah42:18 “Inwe abamore emetino, tegerera moigwe, nainwe abamore emeuko, rigereria monyare korora!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ning’o ore omouko otatiga omosomba one? Ning’o ore omotino buna omonto one natomire? Ning’o ore omouko buna omwegenwa one, gose buna omosomba one inche Omonene?" 
Isaiah42:20 Omosomba one nigo akorora ebinto ebinge, korende tari kobirengereria ng’a nebi’engencho enene; nigo atinogete amato aye, korende tari koigwa.”" 
Isaiah42:21 Ase engencho y’oboronge bwaye Omonene nigo agogete koa amachiko aye okobua na ogosikwa. 
Isaiah42:22 Korende abanto aba baibirwe na gosakorwa, bonsi bategirwe na kogwa ase chiirima; nigo babisire ase chinyomba chi’obosibwa; bairirwe, onde tari orabatoorie, boosirwe, onde tari ogoteba: “Tiga bairanigwe.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Ning’o asemore oranyare gotegerera amang’ana aya, erio ayarengererie na koyaigwera ase chingaki chigochi‐gocha." 
Isaiah42:24 Ning’o oruete abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo ase amaboko ’abasakori? Ning’o oruete Abaisraeli ase amaboko ’abauri? Inee! Tari Omonene oria twakorete ebibe asare? Tokaanga kobwatia chinchera chiaye, naende tokaanga koigwera amachiko aye." 
Isaiah42:25 Ase ayio Omonene akaumora ekeririanda kiaye ase abanto, akabaumorera endamwamu yaye egwoka, na esegi entindi. Abanto bakaba bagosambwa nomorero ase chinsemo chionsi, ko tibamanyete kende, ee, omorero oria okabasamba, korende tibarengereretie ayio ime ase chinkoro chiabo." 
Isaiah43:1 Inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, inwe Abaisraeli, aya naro Omonene oria obatongete na kobabomba agoteba; “Timoiroka, ekiagera inche nababooririe; nabarangeirie ase amarieta aino; inwe nabaane." 
Isaiah43:2 Ekero morabe mogoeta ase amache ime, nimbe amo nainwe; namoba mogoeta ase chindooche, tichikobamera. Namoete ase omorero, timogosambwa, gose omorero ekebemberi tokobasiria." 
Isaiah43:3 Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, ninche Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, ninche Omotooria oino. Nigo naruete Abamisiri bakaba embooria ase engencho yaino, nkarua Abaetiopia na Abaseba ribaga riaino." 
Isaiah43:4 Inwe nigo more ab’engencho enene ase amaiso aane, mwabeire mosikire, nainche nigo mbanchete; ase ayio nindue abanto b’ebisaku basirigwe ribaga riaino, erinde obogima bwaino botoorigwe." 
Isaiah43:5 Ase ayio, timoiroka, inche nigo inde amo nainwe. “Nindete abanto b’ororeria rwaino korwa moocha, na korwa bosongo nimbasangererie." 
Isaiah43:6 Nintebie chinse chia sugusu: Tiga abanto baane barue agwo, ne chinse chia irianyi: Timobatanga! Renta abamura baane korwa aare, na abaiseke baane korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense." 
Isaiah43:7 Kera omonto okorokwa ase erieta riane, oyio inche natongete anyore obonene bwane, kera oyomo oyio inche nabombete na komotonga, tiga ache.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Renta abanto bonsi bare emeuko nonya babwate amaiso, na abare emetino nonya babwate amato." 
Isaiah43:9 Tiga abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bache amo, ee, tiga abanto bonsi basangererekane bache. Ning’o ore ase egati yabo oranyare koraria amang’ana aya? Ning’o oranyare gotworokia amang’ana ayabete kare? Tiga barente birori biabo, erinde baorokie oboronge bwabo, na ekero baraigwe batebe: “Nekeene mogoteba.”" 
Isaiah43:10 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inwe nigo more birori baane, abasomba baane nachorire, erinde monyare komanya inche na konyegena, naende momanye ng’a inche ninche Ere. Enyasae ende teri yantang’anerete, ende teri erabombwe nyuma yane.”" 
Isaiah43:11 “Inche ninche Omonene, ninche bweka inde Omotooria, naende onde tari." 
Isaiah43:12 Nigo narentete ogotooreka, nkabarareria ayio, nainwe mokayaigwa, na enyasae engeni tiyarenge ase egati yaino; inwe nigo more birori baane ng’a inche ninche Nyasae.” Naboigo Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah43:13 “Ee, inche ninche Nyasae; nigo ngendererete koba oyio oyio. Omonto tari oranyare gotooria omonto onde korwa ase okoboko kwane, nigo ngokora emeremo, na onde tari oranyare koyetanga.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Aya naro Omonene, Omobooria oino oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: “Ase engencho yaino nintome abarwani esegi gochia Babeli baserie abanto b’aroro, erinde batame; ee, Abakalidayo abwo baserigwe gochia ase chimeeri chiabo echio bagokerete." 
Isaiah43:15 Inche ninche Omonene, Omochenu oino, ninche omotongi oino inwe Abaisraeli, ninche inde omoruoti oino.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Omonene oroisetie enchera ase enyancha ime, ee, oboeto ase amache amange are ne chinguru," 
Isaiah43:17 akarenta aroro chigari chi’esegi ne chibarasi, na abarwani esegi amo ne chituoni chiabo, erio akabaiyeria inse, tibatenena naende; nigo basiretigwe bakarima buna orotambe rw’etaya. Aya naro Omonene oyio agoteba:" 
Isaiah43:18 “Timobaisa koinyora amang’ana a kare, gose korengereria igoro y’ebinto biaetire." 
Isaiah43:19 Naama! Ninkore ring’ana riyia; ring’ana erio riachakire kooroka; Inee! Timorirochi? Nindoisie enchera ase erooro, nintubokie chindooche ase ense enyomo," 
Isaiah43:20 erinde ching’iti chi’orosana amo nebibwe ne chisagero chinywe chintogie. Ekero ekio nintubokie amache ase erooro, ne chindooche ase ense enyomo, ng’ee abanto baane, abwo nachorire, amache banywe," 
Isaiah43:21 abanto abwo netongeire, erinde bararie ogotogigwa kwane.”" 
Isaiah43:22 “Inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, timwandangeretie, ee, inwe Abaisraeli, timwanyechanderete." 
Isaiah43:23 Inwe timwandeterete ching’ondi chiaino chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa, gose timwansigete ase okonduera ebing’wanso biaino. Inche timbaroseti ase okonduera okoruegwa kw’endagera, gose timbachandeti ase ogonsambera ubani." 
Isaiah43:24 Timwangorerete ebinto bigotioka buya ne chibesa chiaino. Timwang’isanegetie nebitinya bi’ebing’wanso biaino. Taibo! Korende nigo mwandosirie nebibe biaino; mwanchandire nogosaria kwaino. 
Isaiah43:25 “Inche ninche bweka ngotinyia ogosaria kwao, ase engencho yane inche omonyene, na tinkoinyora ebibe biao." 
Isaiah43:26 Ong’inyorie, tokwane komo, aye na inche; okwane amang’ana ao, erinde onyore oboronge bwao." 
Isaiah43:27 Sokoro yao bwe ritang’ani nigo akorete ebibe, na abarenge abakwani b’amang’ana ao bagasaria asende," 
Isaiah43:28 Ase ayio ngatiga abanene b’Aase Achenu bakaba abatachenegeti, nkarua abanto ba Yakobo bakaba okoragererigwa, ee, nkarua Abaisraeli ase ogochaywa.”" 
Isaiah44:1 “Aye Yakobo, omosomba one, aye Israeli nagochorire, bono igwa!" 
Isaiah44:2 Omonene, oria ogotongete ase enda ya nyoko, naende okogokonya, nigo agoteba iga: Aye Yakobo, omosomba one, aye Yerusalemu, omochore one, toiroka." 
Isaiah44:3 “Ning’umore amache ase abare nerang’o, nintubokie chindooche ase ense enyomo. Ning’umore Omoika one igoro ase abanto b’ororeria rwao, ninsesenie abana bao." 
Isaiah44:4 Abwo mbakine buna obonyansi, bakine buna emesobeti ere ase chindooche mbarabare." 
Isaiah44:5 Oyomo natebe ng’a noyo bw’Omonene are, na oyonde eroke erieta ria Yakobo, na oyonde arike ase okoboko kwaye ng’a ere noyo bw’Omonene, erio eroke Omoisraeli, erieta ri’ogosikwa.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Aya naro Omonene, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli na Omobooria obo, oyore Omonene b’Emeganda, agoteba: “Ninche oyo bwe ritang’ani, na oyo bw’omoerio; onde tari, otatiga inche bweka inde Nyasae." 
Isaiah44:7 Ning’o oranyare kobana buna inche, buna nabanete korwa ekero keria nabegete abanto abwo ba kare? Tiga ararie amang’ana ayio na koyanyorokia. Oyio tiga atebie abanto amang’ana are bosio agochia gokoreka." 
Isaiah44:8 Timoiroka, gose kwoboa! Inee! Tinabatebetie amang’ana ayio korwa kare na kobayamanyia? Inwe nigo more birori baane. Inee! Nyasae onde nareo, otatiga inche? Getare kende tikeri. Nimanyete ng’a kende tikeri.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Abanto abwo bonsi bakoroisia emegwekano y’ogosasimwa nigo bare bosa, na emegwekano eyio teri kobarentera buya bonde. Abwo bakoyebera birori tibakorora, gose tibakomanya gento kende; ase igo mbasookigwe." 
Isaiah44:10 Ning’o okwebaachera enyasae na kwebombera ogosasimwa bitari gokonya nonyang’ake? 
Isaiah44:11 Naama! Abatunyani bonsi b’emegwekano eyio mbasookigwe, na abakoyeroisia nigo bare mwanyabanto. Abwo bonsi tiga basangererekane amo, bache bosio; bonsi amo nigo baraondoke, basooke." 
Isaiah44:12 Omoturi ebioma nigo akobogoria enturago yaye otura ekioma. Nigo agokebeka igoro ase omorero bw’amakara, ogesamba, erio okebomba ase ogokebaraga nokoboko kwaye kore ne chinguru. Ekero agendererete koroisia omogwekano oyio, nigo akoba nenchara na erang’o ogoya." 
Isaiah44:13 Omosenia chibao nigo akorambora ekerengo, bwata omong’ororia nekaramu ase ebao. Erio oyesenia neranda, oyeng’ororia ekeringerera, naende oyebaacha yaba omogwekano bw’omonto omonyakieni, oyobeka nyomba ime." 
Isaiah44:14 Omonto nigo akogenda ase rinani ogecha emecharake, gose bwechorera emete ao ao enga buna emetontera, oyetiga egokina agwo ase rinani, gose bwesimekera omobunduki, embura yaba ekoyokinia." 
Isaiah44:15 Omote oria gokinire nigo okoba chinko chi’omonto oria; ere nigo akonyonacha ekeng’ese outera omorero agwota na korugera endagera, na ekeng’ese kende okebacha kiaba enyasae agosasima, nigo gekoba omogwekano ere oba okoyosasima." 
Isaiah44:16 Ase ekeng’ese kende omonto oria nigo agoutera omorero, osambera chinyama, ochiria na koigota, na ekero autire omorero oria nigo agoteba, “Ee, bono nabeire ne riberera; omorero oyo nomuya!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ekeng’ese egetigari ki’omote oria nigo agokebaacha ogekora enyasae, omogwekano agosasima; nigo agotung’ama bosio bwaye oyosasima oteba, “Ntoorie, ekiagera naye enyasae yane!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Abanto bagokora ayio nabariri, tibamanyeti kende. Amaiso abo aukoire, tibakonyara korora, na ebirengererio biabo biasarigwe, tibakonyara komanya." 
Isaiah44:19 Monto onde tari ase abwo okorengereria mono, gose ore nobong’aini na okomanya erinde atebe, “Ekeng’ese ki’omote oyio nageutera omorero, nkayorugera endagera, boigo nkayosambera chinyama nkaria. Inee! Korwa ase ekio egetigari ningekore egento gi’okogechia? Ningekore enyasae ngosasima, eroisirie korwa ase omote?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Oyio nigo asemeretie ayare buna ribu; enkoro yaye yang’ainekire, yamosiririe, takonyara gwetooria na goteba, “Egento eke mbwate koboko kwane gw’okorio neki’oborimo.”" 
Isaiah44:21 “Inwe abanto ba Yakobo, inwe Abaisraeli, inyora amang’ana aya, ekiagera inwe nabasomba baane. Inwe Abaisraeli, tinkobeeba." 
Isaiah44:22 Natinyirie ogosaria kwaino buna ngotinyia riire, na ebibe biaino buna ngotinyia ritaturi. Ing’iranere, ekiagera nababooririe.”" 
Isaiah44:23 Inwe igoro chionsi, tera nomogoko, ekiagera Omonene oikeranirie ayio; naye ense yonsi, aka eriogi ri’omochengo! Inwe ebitunwa, na amanani, na kera omote ore aroro, tera nechinguru chinyinge, ekiagera Omonene obooririe abanto ba Yakobo, neorokie ase egati y’Abaisraeli ore nobonene." 
Isaiah44:24 Aya naro Omonene, Omobooria oo, oyogotongete ase enda ya nyoko, agoteba: “Ninche Omonene natongete ebinto bionsi; ninche bweka naramborete igoro chionsi, nkaara ense gochia chinsinyo chionsi, na onde tarengeo onkonyete." 
Isaiah44:25 Inche nigo ngosaria ebimanyererio bi’ababani b’oborimo na gokora abaringoria baba chiosi. Nigo nkoirania nyuma obong’aini bw’abang’aini na gokora okomanya kwabo kwaba oboriri. 
Isaiah44:26 Inche nigo ngokora ring’ana ri’omosomba one riaba ne chinguru na goikerania emeroberio y’abatomwa baane. Ninche ngoteba igoro ya Yerusalemu ng’a nomenywe, na igoro y’emechie y’Abayuda ng’a neagachwe naende; ninche ndatenenie amaagacho ayio agwete inse." 
Isaiah44:27 Ninche ngoteba igoro ye chindiba chie chinyancha ng’a chiome pa, ninche ndakamie chindooche chiaye." 
Isaiah44:28 Nigo ngoteba igoro ya Koresi ng’a namobekire abe omorisia bw’abanto baane; ere naikeranie ogwancha kwane gwonsi, na atebe igoro ya Yerusalemu ng’a oagachwe naende, naende atebe igoro ye Hekalu ng’a oboroso bwaye bobekwe naende.”" 
Isaiah45:1 Omonene ochorire Koresi, omobwatire okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, amobuere ebisaku na aure abaruoti okobua kwabo. Amoigorere ebisieri, na ebiita tibisiekwa. Bono aya naro Omonene akomotebia:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Inche nintang’ane bosio bwao, ninyaranie ebitunwa na ebigoro, nimbuna‐bune ebiita bie chitaai, nimbutorane emekorogoto y’ebioma." 
Isaiah45:3 Ninkoe chinibo chibisire ase omosunte, na obotenenku bore aase a bobisi, erinde onyare komanya ng’a inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, ngokorangeria ase erieta riao." 
Isaiah45:4 Nigo ngokorangeria ase erieta riao ase engencho ya Yakobo, omosomba one, ee, ase engencho ya Israeli, omochore one. Nakoeire erieta ri’amasikani, nonya aye tomanyeti inche.”" 
Isaiah45:5 “Inche ninche Omonene, onde tari; Nyasae onde tari otatiga inche bweka. Nigo nakoboyirie chinguru nonya aye tomanyeti inche." 
Isaiah45:6 Nigo ngokora ayio, erinde abanto bamenyete moocha na bosongo banyare komanya ng’a onde tari otatiga inche bweka. Inche ninche Omonene, na onde tari." 
Isaiah45:7 Ninche Omotongi bw’oborabu na omosunte, nigo nkorenta omorembe, narenta na amabe; Inche ninche Omonene, ngokora ayio onsi." 
Isaiah45:8 Inwe igoro chionsi, tonyia amatoima, oboronge tiga borwe igoro, botwe buna amare agotwa embura; ense tiga emaanoke, eichorwe nogotooreka na oboronge. Ninche Omonene natongire ayio.”" 
Isaiah45:9 “Obobe nobw’oyio okoamererania n’Omotongi oye, oyio ore ekegonkorio ase egati y’ebinde. Inee! Esike neborie omoroisia iga: Ninki eke okoroisia? Gose ekeroisirie ngetebie omoroisia iga: Aye tobwati amaboko?" 
Isaiah45:10 Obobe nobw’oyio okoboria ise: Inki aye okoibora? Gose koboria ng’ina: Inki eke obogoretie inda yao ogochia koibora?” 
Isaiah45:11 Aya naro Omonene, oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli na Omotongi obo, agoteba: “Mborie inche igoro y’amang’ana agochia koba; ntige inyechandere abana baane, ekiagera abwo nemeremo y’amaboko aane." 
Isaiah45:12 Ninche natongete ense, ngatonga na abanto, nkababeka aroro; amaboko aane naro aramborete igoro, erio ngachika erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni, kera ekemo kebeere aase aye." 
Isaiah45:13 Inche Omonene naimokirie Koresi ase oboronge, nindongeyie chinchera chiaye chionsi; ere naagache omochie one, nasibore abanto baane boosetwe barue ase obosomba, tagoakanwa kende, gose koegwa ng’eria ende.” Omonene bw’Emeganda nere otebire ayio." 
Isaiah45:14 Aya naro Omonene agoteba; “Abamisiri ne chinibo chiabo bechanderete, na Abaetiopia na oboonchoreria bwabo, na abanto ba Seba bare abatambe, bonsi mbache asore, babe abao amo ne chinibo chiabo. Barabwo mbagotunyane basibire chingataare, batung’ame asore, bagosabe, batebe: Ekeene, Nyasae nigo are ime yao, onde tari, Nyasae onde tari otatiga ere bweka.”" 
Isaiah45:15 Aye Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, aye Omotooria, ekeene, aye naye Nyasae ore bobisi." 
Isaiah45:16 Abanto bonsi bakoroisia emegwekano egosasimwa, mbasookigwe na gotantanigwa, ee, bonsi pi mbasookigwe na goichana mono." 
Isaiah45:17 Abaisraeli mbatoorigwe n’Omonene ase ogotoorigwa gwa kare na kare, inwe Abaisraeli timogosookigwa, gose gotantanigwa kare na kare." 
Isaiah45:18 Omonene oyio otongete igoro chionsi, nere Nyasae, nere otongete ense akayebeka oboroso obokong’u. Tayetongete ng’a ebe bosa, nigo ayetongete emenywe. Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Inche ninche Omonene, onde tari." 
Isaiah45:19 Inche Omonene tinakwanete aase a bobisi, gose ase ense y’omosunte; tinatebetie abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo ng’a bandigie bosa. Inche Omonene nigo ngokwana ayare ay’ekeene, na koraria ayare ay’oboronge.”" 
Isaiah45:20 “Inwe abamore abatigari korwa ase ebisaku, sangererekana amo mosuke gocha ang’e! Abanto abwo bakobogoria emegwekano egosasimwa eroisirie korwa ase emete, abwo bagendererete gosaba chinyasae chitanyare kobatooria, tibari nokomanya." 
Isaiah45:21 Raria na morente amang’ana aino! Tiga bagambere amang’ana abo amo. Ning’o oyakwanete agwo kare? Ning’o oyararetie kare? Inee! Tari inche Omonene nayakwanete? Inche nigo inde Nyasae omonyene oboronge na Omotooria. Nyasae onde tari otatiga inche bweka.” 
Isaiah45:22 “Inwe abe chinsinyo chi’ense, ng’onchokere mbatoorie, ekiagera inche ninche Nyasae, onde tari otatiga inche bweka." 
Isaiah45:23 Netianirie inche omonyene; ring’ana riarure ase omonwa one ase oboronge, tirikoonchoka. Kera riru naribekwe inse ase obosio bwane, na kera oromeme ndotiane asende.”" 
Isaiah45:24 “Kera omonto nakwane igoro yane na goteba: Oboronge ne chinguru nigo bire ase Omonene bweka; bonsi abamogechete mbache asare basookigwe. 
Isaiah45:25 Abanto bonsi b’ororeria rwa Israeli mbanyore oboronge na gwetogia ase Omonene.” 
Isaiah46:1 “Beli yagure inse, na Nebo yekumbire; emegwekano ye chinyasae chiria eberekire ne ching’iti ne chiombe; ebinto ebio bibogoirie nigo bire chigurube chindito ase ching’iti echio chiarosire." 
Isaiah46:2 Chinyasae echio nigo chiekumbete gochia inse amo, tichikonyara gotooria chigurube chiria, echio chinyene nigo chigwoswa chiairwa ase obosomba." 
Isaiah46:3 “Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo, inwe abatigari bonsi b’Abaisraeli, inwe aba nabeire mbabogoretie korwa ekero mwarenge ase chinda chi’abanyoko, na korwa ekero mwaagatire ase amaboko ’abanyoko, inyigwere!" 
Isaiah46:4 Ninche ndabe amo nainwe nonya ngoika engaki y’obogotu bwaino, ekero morabe mwagotire kegima ne chimbuche chiarabire se, nimbe nkobabogoria. Ninche nabatongete, nimbarende, nimbabogorie na kobatooria." 
Isaiah46:5 “Ning’o moranyare kondeng’ania ng’a imbe buna oyio? Ning’o moranyare kongwekania ng’a togwekane nere? 
Isaiah46:6 Abanto nigo bakoumora chitahabu korwa emebuko yabo na korenga chifeta nekerengero, erio baakanera omoturi bw’etahabu, nere oyeroisia yaba enyasae, na abanto abwo batung’ama bosio bw’enyasae eyio bayesasima." 
Isaiah46:7 Erio bayeimokia bayebeka ase amareko abo, bayebogoria, bayetereka aase aye, yabeera aroro; tekonyara gotigera korwa aase agwo. Omonto naisa korera ase enyasae eria, ero tekonyara komoigwa gose komotooria korwa ase emechando yaye." 
Isaiah46:8 “Inwe abasaria, inyora amang’ana ayio, moyarengererie mono." 
Isaiah46:9 Inyora amang’ana abete kare; inche ninche Nyasae, onde tari; ninche Nyasae, onde tari onga buna inche." 
Isaiah46:10 Korwa omochakano nigo nararetie aya agochia koba; agwo kare nigo nabanete aya ataraba, ngateba: Emeroberio yane goika eikerane, onsi aya nganetie ninyakore." 
Isaiah46:11 Nindangerie ensoti eche korwa moocha, na omonto okorwa ense y’aare nache akore aya naroberetie. Aya nakwanire, goika nyaikeranie, na aya narobeirie, goika nyakore." 
Isaiah46:12 “Inwe abamore abanyabigoti bikong’u, inwe abamore aare korwa ase oboronge, inyigwera!" 
Isaiah46:13 Narentire oboronge bwane ang’e, tibori aare, na ogotooreka kwane tikogotebana; nimbeke ogotooreka ase Sayoni; ning’ee Abaisraeli obonene bwane.”" 
Isaiah47:1 “Aye Babeli onga buna omoi seke omwekungi, aye omochie bw’Abakalidayo, ika korwa agwo, ikaransa ase amaroba otari nekerogo ki’obonene! Bono tokorokwa omwororo na omwereria nonya ng’ake." 
Isaiah47:2 Bono bogoria ensio osere obosie! Rusia egietubo otubete obosio bwao, ringa eganchwa yao eike ase amariagati, erio oete ase amache ime." 
Isaiah47:3 Obogetirianda bwao tibogotubwa, na obosooku bwao mbororekane. Nindusie egesiomba na tinkororera nonya noyomo amabera.”" 
Isaiah47:4 Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli nere Omobooria oito; Omonene bw’Emeganda nario erieta riaye. 
Isaiah47:5 “Aye Babeli, omochie bw’Abakalidayo, ikaransa ase omosunte okire‐kiri, tokorokwa eting’ana y’amaruoti naende." 
Isaiah47:6 Inche nigo nabete nendamwamu ase abanto baane, ngakora omwando one okaba oyo otachenegeti. Nkababeka ase okoboko kwao, aye tikwabete namabera asebare, korende nigo gwakorerete abanto abagotu bobe, okabaa chigurube chindito mono." 
Isaiah47:7 Aye nigo gwatebete ng’a nobe eting’ana kare na kare. Tikwarengereretie amang’ana ayio. Gose tikwainyorete buna omoerio bw’amang’ana ayio arabe.” 
Isaiah47:8 “Ase ayio, aye bwanchete kwegokia, igwa amang’ana aya! Aye oikaransete na kwegaara, gwateba ase enkoro yao; Inche ninche, onde tari otatiga inche bweka, tingotigwa imbe omoboraka, gose tingokwerwa abana.”" 
Isaiah47:9 Amang’ana aya abere nagochere mobosokano ase rituko erimo; abana bao mbakwe, na omosacha oo akwe, obe omoboraka; ayio onsi nagochere, nonya oborogi bwao, na oboringoria bwao, bire ebinge mono." 
Isaiah47:10 “Nigo kwabete noboremu ase ogokora kwao okobe, ogateba:” “Onde tandochi.” “Obong’aini bwao, ne chisemi chiao, nigo biagosiretie, ogateba ase enkoro yao ime:” “Inche ninche, onde tari otatiga inche bweka.”" 
Isaiah47:11 “Amabe nakonyore, ayio oborogi botanyare koyatanga, amaakwa nakonyore, ayio otanyore embooria ende ekoyarusiao. Ogosirigwa nkogochere mobosokano, amang’ana ayio otamanyete ng’a nabe bo." 
Isaiah47:12 Bwata bokong’u oboringoria bwao obonge na oborogi bwao, ebinto ebio gwechanderete korwa obwana bwao; ande nabo birabaise kogokonya, ande nabo birabaise goseria emechando yao." 
Isaiah47:13 Aye kwabeire gokwerosia ase okorigia abasemia abange, abwo bakoringoria ayare igoro, tiga bache kogotooria, na abakomongera ching’enang’eni chia igoro, abwo bagokobanera aya agochia gokonyora ekero omotienyi oorokire, bateba ng’a mang’ana gete nabe asore." 
Isaiah47:14 Rora, abanto abwo nigo banga amasakwe, omorero nigo okoyasamba ayia aera, tari konyara gwetooria korwa ase chinguru chi’omorero. Amasakwe ayio takoyia abe omorero bw’amakara, omonto araikaranseo aywote." 
Isaiah47:15 Abanto abwo kwabeire kogokora emeremo nabarabwo, naboigo bare, abwo kwabeire kogokora oboonchoreria nabarabwo korwa obwana bwao. Kera oyomo nabwatie enchera yaye, onde tari oragotoorie.”" 
Isaiah48:1 “Inwe ab’enyomba ya Yakobo, aba mokorokwa Abaisraeli, na more ab’ororeria rwa Yuda, naende mogotiana ase erieta ri’Omonene na komoorokia Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, korende tari ase ekeene na oboronge, igwa amang’ana aya!" 
Isaiah48:2 Inwe nigo mokweroka ng’a nab’omochie omochenu more, naende ng’a nigo mosemeretie Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oyokorokwa Omonene bw’Emeganda.”" 
Isaiah48:3 “Amang’ana akorekanete agwo kare, inche konya nayararirie ritang’ani; amang’ana ayio nigo aruete ase omonwa one nkabayamanyia. Erio mobosokano nkayakora na koyaikerania." 
Isaiah48:4 Nigo namanyete ng’a inwe nabamwenu more, naende nigo mobwate ebigoti ebikong’u binga buna ekioma, na amasio aino namakong’u buna etaai." 
Isaiah48:5 Ase ayio inabarareretie amang’ana ayio kare konya ataraba, ekero konya ataraikerana nkabayatebia; nigo nakorete bo, erinde timobaisa gocha goteba: Emegwekano yaito togosasima, eyebaachire, gose eyebombire, nero yarenta ayio.”" 
Isaiah48:6 “Inwe mwaigure amang’ana ayio, bono yarore onsi! Inee! Timokoyaorokia? Korwa bono na kogenderera nkobaorokeria inde amang’ana amayia, amang’ana konya abisekanete motana komanya." 
Isaiah48:7 Amang’ana ayio mbono atongirwe, tarengeo kare, timwana koyaigwa rinde, otatiga rituko ria rero; igo nario motabaise goteba ng’a nkorwa kare mwayamanyete." 
Isaiah48:8 Korwa amatuko a kare timwana koyaigwa, gose koyamanya, naki amato aino tatinoretwe moyaigwe. Nigo namanyete ng’a timwarenge koba abegenwa, ekiagera mwabeire abasaria korwa okoiborwa kwaino." 
Isaiah48:9 Natebanirie endamwamu yane ase engencho y’erieta riane, na ase engencho y’ogotogigwa kwane nayetangire, timbaisa kobasiria." 
Isaiah48:10 Rora nabachenire, ko tari buna efeta egochenwa; nabateemire ase okobaetia ase omorero bw’emechando." 
Isaiah48:11 Nigo nakorire ayio ase engencho yane, ee, ase engencho yane inche omonyene, tingotiga erieta riane rikorwe ribe eritachenegeti. Tinkoa onde obonene bwane.”" 
Isaiah48:12 “Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo, inwe Abaisraeli, aba narangeretie, ntegerere! Inche ninche Ere, ninche omochakano na omoerio." 
Isaiah48:13 Okoboko kwane nakwo kwabegete oboroso bw’ense, na okoboko kwane gw’okorio gokarambora igoro chionsi; ekero nkorangeria igoro na ense, nigo chigotenena amo.”" 
Isaiah48:14 “Sangererekana amo inwe mwensi, moigwe! Ning’o ase chinyasae echio obanete amang’ana aya? Omonto oyio Omonene anchete nere oraikeranie okogania kw’Omonene igoro ya Babeli, nere orarwanie Abakalidayo." 
Isaiah48:15 Inche ninche nakwanire na komorangeria, namorentire, nimosesenie ase ogokora kwaye.”" 
Isaiah48:16 “Inchuo ang’e asende, moigwe amang’ana aya: Korwa omochakano tinabete ngokwana bobisi, korwa ekero keria amang’ana aya abete, inche nao narenge.” Bono Omonene Nyasae ontomire amo n’Omoika oye." 
Isaiah48:17 Aya naro Omonene, Omobooria oo, Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: “Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oo, ninche ngokworokereria okore aya agokorentera amaya, ninche nkogotang’ana ase enchera ogwenerete kobwatia." 
Isaiah48:18 “Naki yare koba buya onye nkwaigwera amachiko aane! Rirorio omorembe nigo orenge kogochera buna amache a rooche na oboronge bogochere buna emerindo y’enyancha. 
Isaiah48:19 Oroiboro rwao nigo rware gocha koba oronge buna omokenye, na ororeria rwao robuche robe oronge buna chinche chi’omokenye. Amarieta abo tarenge gocha korusigwa, gose gosirigwa, korwa ase obosio bwane.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Soka korwa Babeli, tama korwa ase ense y’Abakalidayo; raria amang’ana aya neriogi ri’omogoko, ee, moyararie! Toma amang’ana ayio gochia ase chinsinyo chi’ense, motebe, “Omonene obooririe abanto ba Yakobo, omosomba oye.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Ekero Omonene aetetie abanto baye ase erooro, tibabete nerang’o, nigo abatubokeretie amache korwa ase egetare, akabochora egetare, na amache agatimboka gocha isiko." 
Isaiah48:22 Omonene otebire, “Omokori amabe tabwati omorembe.”" 
Isaiah49:1 Inwe abanto momenyete ase ebisinka, na ase chinse chionsi chire aare, tegerera monyigwe! Omonene nigo andangeretie konde ase enda ya baba, nigo andogete erieta konde enda ime." 
Isaiah49:2 Agatieria omonwa one okaba buna omoro omwoge, akambisa ime ase ekiriri gi’okoboko kwaye; agantieria nkaba buna ensara enyoge, agansoyia ase omobirangwa ime, akambisa aroro." 
Isaiah49:3 Erio agantebia: “Aye nomosomba one Israeli, ase engencho yao nintogigwe.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Korende ngateba: “Nabeire ngokora emeremo emekong’u bosa, natugutire chinguru chiane bosa, ntanyoreti gento kende; nonya naboigo, ekeene, oboronge bwane nigo bokorwa ase Omonene, na eng’eria yane nigo ekorwa ase Nyasae one.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Natebigwe ring’ana n’Omonene, oria ontongete ase enda ya baba ng’a nimbe omosomba oye, erinde ng’iranie ororeria rwa Yakobo gochia asare, na nsangererie Abaisraeli gochia asare. Inche nanyorire amasikani ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae one obeire chinguru chiane." 
Isaiah49:6 Nigo agoteba iga: “Ayio tagoisana asore obe omosomba one ase okoiraneria ab’ebisaku bia Yakobo amaya abo, na koirania abatigari b’Abaisraeli boka. Boigo ningokore obe omobaso bw’abanto b’ebisaku; erinde ogotooreka kwane kogende goike ase chinsinyo chi’ense.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Aya naro Omobooria bw’Abaisraeli, Omochenu obo, oria ochayetwe kegima na kogechwa na mwanyabanto; oria ore omosomba bw’abagambi, atebire: “Abaruoti mbarore ayio, bagororoke batenene, na abagambi batung’ame, ase engencho y’Omonene oyore omwegenwa, oyio ore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, oyio ogochorire.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Ase engaki yancheire, nakoiraneretie ogosaba kwao, ase rituko ri’ogotooreka, nagokonyete, nabeire nkorendete, na goetera asore nakorire okobwatana kw’ogotianania nabanto, erinde oiranerie ense amaya aye na gwatanana emiando yasaretigwe." 
Isaiah49:9 Otebie abasibwa: Soka korwa ase obosibwa, na otebie abare ase omosunte: Eorokie! Barabwo mbabe bakoragerigwa ekero bare ase orogendo, mbanyore oborisia bwabo ase ebigoro na ase ebitunwa biarenge bosa." 
Isaiah49:10 Tibakoba nenchara, gose erang’o, eguru‐gura na omobaso tibikobasamba, ekiagera Omonene oria obaroreire amabera nabaraae, nabatang’ane gochia ase chinsoko chi’amache." 
Isaiah49:11 “Nindoisie chinchera ase ebitunwa biane bionsi, ne chinchera chiane chinene nchiroisigwe chiimokerere igoro." 
Isaiah49:12 Rora, abanto mbache korwa chinse chi’aare, abande barue sugusu, na abande bosongo, na abande barue ense ya Sinimu.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Inwe igoro chionsi, tera nomogoko; naye ense, aka eriogo ri’omochengo; inwe ebitunwa, tera mono, ekiagera Omonene oremirie abanto baye, ororeire abachandegete baye amabera." 
Isaiah49:14 Korende abanto ba Sayoni nigo bagoteba: “Omonene ototigire, Omonene oito otwebire.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Inee! Omokungu neebe omwana oye akogonkia, erinde tarorera omwana aiborete amabera? Ee, abakungu nabo bareebe, korende inche tinkobeeba inwe." 
Isaiah49:16 Rora, nigo imang’erete amarieta aino ase ebisanyi bi’amaboko aane; ne chindwaki chigoetanaine nigo chire ase obosio bwane botambe." 
Isaiah49:17 “Abana bao nigo bakoayerera gocha, na abagosaretie nigo bagotama korwa asore." 
Isaiah49:18 Ramokia amaiso ao, origererie orore; bonsi mbasangererekane amo bachiche asore. Omonene otebire ng’a ekeene, buna Ere are moyo, abwo bonsi babe buna ogwechabera kwao, nigo oreboyie buna omoriakari akweboyia." 
Isaiah49:19 “Ekeene, ense eyio yaino yasaretigwe kegima, egatigwa bosa, korende bono nebe enke mono, ekiagera abaramenyeo nigo barayebuchere; abanto abwo babakorerete bobe batamire gochia aare mono." 
Isaiah49:20 Nebe ase engaki eyio abana kwauretwe barakwane ase oigwete, batebe: Aase aiga naagote mono, togareerie tonyore aase tokomenya." 
Isaiah49:21 Erio nokwane ase enkoro yao, bweborie: Ning’o onyiborerete abana aba? Nigo nasiretie abana baane, ngatigwa inde bosa buna omogomba, nigo noosetwe nkana‐gotayaya. Inee! Ning’o ondererete abana aba? Naama! Nigo natigetwe inde bosa, abana aba ng’ai barenge?”" 
Isaiah49:22 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Rora, nindambore okoboko kwane gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku, nintenenie ekemanyererio kiane bakerore; erio abanto abwo mbarente abana bao abamura, bababegete bikuba, na abana bao abaiseke bababegete mareko." 
Isaiah49:23 Abaruoti mbabe abareri b’abana bao, ne chiting’ana chiabo chibe chikobarageria. Abwo mbatung’ame inse, baumame ase obosio bwao, bamene ebuse y’amagoro ao. Erio nonyare komanya ng’a ninche Omonene; abwo bansemeretie tibagosookigwa.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Inee! Omonto ore ne chinguru naurwe egiasakoire? Gose oyore noboronge naurwe abasibwa baye? 
Isaiah49:25 Ee, aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Nonya nabasibwa b’oyore ne chinguru mbarusigweo, na egiasakoretwe noyore omotindi ngetoorigwe, inche Omonene ning’amereranie noyio ogokoamereria, nintoorie abana bao." 
Isaiah49:26 Abanto abwo bakogochanda nimbabetererie barie chinyama chi’emebere yabo abanyene, na banywe amanyinga abo, abatindie buna edivai egotindia. Erio abanto bonsi mbamanye ng’a ninche Omonene inde Omotooria oo, na Omobooria oo, Omonguru o Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Aya naro Omonene akoboria: “Ng’ai rirube ri’ogotigana rire, riria naete nyoko ng’a totigane? Gose monto ki nabwate esira yaye nkabaoonia inwe asare? Taibo! Ebibe nabio biagerete mokaoonigwa, na ogosaria kwaino nakwo kwagerete nyoko agaserigwa." 
Isaiah50:2 “Nase ki ntanyorete nonya nomonto oyomo ekero nachete? Nase ki nonya nomonto oyomo atanyitaberete ekero narangeretie? Inee! Okoboko kwane nigo kweng’eire gotanyare kobooria? Gose inche nigo naborirwe chinguru chi’ogotooria? Naama! Ekero ngotogonyera enyancha, amache nigo agosira; nigo ngokora chindooche chiaba erooro; chinswe chireo nigo chikoborwa amache, chiakwa chiagunda." 
Isaiah50:3 Nigo nkoboyia igoro nomosunte, erio nayetuba neanga y’okweumia.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Omonene Nyasae ong’eire oromeme buna orw’abeorokereretie, erio nario ndamanye gokwana ring’ana rikorenta oboremu ase oyo orosire. Emambia ase emambia nigo agontura, otabobora amato aane, nigo agontabobora inyigwe buna oyo okworokererigwa." 
Isaiah50:5 Ee, Omonene Nyasae otinoire amato aane; nainche tinyangeti koigwera, gose tinaonchogete gochia nyuma." 
Isaiah50:6 Nigo naonchorete omogongo one gochia ase abwo bayoagete, na ekenyinyiro kiane ase abwo basunyorete chinderu chiane. Tinabisete obosio bwane korwa ase abwo banchayete na gontwera amate." 
Isaiah50:7 Omonene Nyasae nankonye; ase ayio tinkobugwa nogochaywa; na ase ayio nakorire obosio bwane bwabeire obokong’u buna rigena, nimanyete ng’a tingosookigwa." 
Isaiah50:8 Ere oyokong’a oboronge bwane nigo are ang’e nainche. Onye nabo, ning’o oranyare koamererania nainche? Tiga ache totenene amo. Oyo ogonsoera, ng’ai are? Tiga ache ang’e nainche." 
Isaiah50:9 Naama! Omonene Nyasae nankonye; monto ki oranyare konachera ekina ng’a nomomochi inde? Rora, abwo bonsi nabagote buna eanga, mbariegwe buna eanga ekoriegwa nebigwankwa." 
Isaiah50:10 Ning’o ore asemore omoirogete Omonene na koigwera eriogi ri’omosomba oye? Oyio ogotaara ase omosunte otari korora omobaso, tiga egene erieta ri’Omonene na amosemerie Nyasae." 
Isaiah50:11 Naama! Inwe mwensi aba mogouta omorero, na gwesiberania ebieri, genda mosambwe nomorero oino, na ase ebieri biaino mwatongirie! Aya naro moranyore korwa ase okoboko kwane, morare inse more nobororo." 
Isaiah51:1 “Inwe aba mokorigia oboronge, ee, inwe aba mokondigia inche Omonene, tegerera monyigwe! Rigereria egetare ase mwabaachetwe korwa," 
Isaiah51:2 ee, rigereria Ibrahimu, sokoro yaino, na engoro ase mwakunyetwe korwa, na Sara oyo obaiborete. Ekero Ibrahimu arenge bweka, nigo namorangeretie, nkamosesenia, nkamomentekania." 
Isaiah51:3 “Omonene naremie Sayoni, naremie abatigarete bare ase amaturi. Naroisie aase aye abete erooro, abe buna omogondo o Edeni, na ense enyomo yaye ebe buna omogondo bw’Omonene. Omogoko na omochengo mbibe bikoigweka ime yaye, boigo okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, na amatera ay’ogotogia, mbibeo." 
Isaiah51:4 “Inwe abanto baane, inyigwere; inwe abanto b’egesaku kiane, tegerera monyigwe! Nindue ogochika kwane, na oboronge bwane mbobe omobaso ase abanto bonsi." 
Isaiah51:5 Oboronge bwane nigo bore ang’e, ogotooreka kwane ngocha kore, amaboko aane nagambie abanto bonsi ekina kia boronge; abanto bamenyete ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha nigo banganyete, basemerie okoboko kwane." 
Isaiah51:6 “Imokia amaiso aino morigererie igoro, naende morigererie ense inse aa. Igoro chionsi nchisire buna erioki, na ense negote buna eanga. Abanto bamenyeteo nigo barakwe buna ebichuni, korende ogotooreka kwane nkogenderere kobao kare na kare, na oboronge bwane tibokoera nonya ng’ake." 
Isaiah51:7 “Inwe aba momanyete oboronge, ntegerera moigwe, inwe aba amachiko aane are ime ase chinkoro chiaino; timoiroka abwo bakobachaya, gose timoondoka ekero bakobachecheria." 
Isaiah51:8 Ebigwankwa mbirie abanto abwo buna bikoria chianga, na amakonde nabarie buna akoria amarionya e ching’ondi; korende oboronge bwane nigo boragenderere kobao kare na kare, na ogotooreka kwane ase ebiaare bionsi.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Aye okoboko kw’Omonene, imoka, bwebeke chinguru, imoka! Imoka buna kwaimogete ase amatuko a kare, ee, imoka buna kwaimogete ase ebiaare bia kare. Inee! Tari aye kwanachanete Rahabu, okabeta enchoka eria?" 
Isaiah51:10 Inee! Tari aye gwakametie amache ’enyancha, amache e chindiba chintambe chi’enyancha, erio okaroisia enchera aroro, erinde ababooretigwe bakaambokerao?" 
Isaiah51:11 Abatooretigwe n’Omonene mbairane, bache Sayoni bagotera; omogoko o kare na kare nobe igoro ase emetwe yabo; mbabe nomogoko na omochengo. Obororo na omoichano mbiere kegima." 
Isaiah51:12 “Inche ninche nkobaremia. Aye naye ng’o okoiroka mwanyabanto abwo bagokwa? Mwanyabanto abwo bagosira buna obonyansi. 
Isaiah51:13 Aye kwebire Omonene, Omotongi oo, oyio bwarete igoro, na akabeka oboroso bw’ense. Omobaso boira aye nigo ogendererete kwoboa ekeririanda ki’omochandi oo buna nigo are ang’e kogoseria. Korende ng’ai ekeririanda ki’omochandi kere?" 
Isaiah51:14 Oria bwosetwe na agasibwa nasiborwe bwango; ere tagokwa na koirwa ase embeera, na takoborwa endagera." 
Isaiah51:15 “Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oo, nigo ngoturubania enyancha, emerindo yaye yaba ekoeera. Omonene bw’Emeganda, nario erieta riane." 
Isaiah51:16 Nabekire amang’ana aane ase omonwa oo, naende nakobisire ase ekiriri gi’okoboko kwane. Nindambore igoro mbeke oboroso bw’ense, nintebie abanto ba Sayoni: Inwe nabanto baane.”" 
Isaiah51:17 Inwe abanto ba Yerusalemu, boka, imoka motenene! Inwe mwanyure korwa ase okoboko kw’Omonene egekombe ki’endamwamu yaye; inwe mwanyure korwa ase egekombe ekio, mwanyuereranirie eturubo mwatindire." 
Isaiah51:18 Ase abamura bonsi aiborete onde tari okomoraa, ase abwo arerete, onde tari okomobwata okoboko." 
Isaiah51:19 Amang’ana aya abere akonyorire: Ogosirigwa na ogotigwa bosa, ogoitwa nenchara na emioro. Ning’o orakororere amabeebe? Gose ning’o orakoremie?" 
Isaiah51:20 Abamura bao bagoyire, nigo baraire ase amatabekania e chinchera chionsi, buna chingabi chiabwatirwe nemeeto. Omonene Nyasae oo obeire nendamwamu asebare, obaeire egesusuro." 
Isaiah51:21 Ase ayio, aye ochandegete, aye gwatindire, ko tari ase ogotinda kw’edivai, igwa amang’ana aya:" 
Isaiah51:22 Aya naro Omonene agoteba, oyio ore Omonene, Nyasae oo, okorwanerera abanto baye: “Naama, narusirie korwa ase amaboko ao egekombe ekio okonywera na gotinda, egekombe ki’endamwamu yane togokenywera naende." 
Isaiah51:23 Egekombe ekio ninkebeke ase amaboko ay’abakogochanda, abwo bagotebirie: Ekumbe, toete igoro yao. Aye gwakorire omogongo oo koba buna riroba rigotachwa, naende buna enchera ase abanto bagoeta.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Aye Sayoni, imoka, bwebeke chinguru, imoka! Ee, aye Yerusalemu, omochie omochenu, eboyie chianga chiao chinseera; korwa bono abanto batarogeti na abatachenegeti, tibagosoa ime yao nonya ng’ake." 
Isaiah52:2 Aye Yerusalemu, esamunse korwa ase orotu, tenena na oikaranse aase ao. Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, esibore amakorogoto mwasiberetwe ase amagoti aino." 
Isaiah52:3 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Inwe nigo mwaoonetigwe timwaakaneretwe kende, na nigo moraboorigwe motari goakanerwa chibesa." 
Isaiah52:4 Ee, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Abanto baane nigo bagendete Misiri agwo kare, bakaba abamenyi aroro, na Abaasuri bakabachanda engencho ende etarengeo." 
Isaiah52:5 Ase ayio, Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Bono ninki imbwate aiga ekero abanto baane bairirwe obosomba engencho ende etaiyo? Ee, Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Abagambi abwo bakobachanda nigo bakobaakera amariogi, na erieta riane nigo richayire omobaso boira kogenderera botambe." 
Isaiah52:6 Ase ayio, abanto baane mbamanye erieta riane; ee, ase ayio, ase rituko riria mbamanye ng’a ninche Omonene ngokwana, inche nao inde aa.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Naki amagoro abo are amaseera, abwo bakorenta amang’ana amaya, bagoeta igoro ase ebitunwa, abwo bakoraria omorembe, na barenta obotomwa obore namang’ana amaya. Nigo bakoraria ogotooreka, batebia Sayoni: “Nyasae oo nere okogamba.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Igwa, abarendi baino ngoaka bare eriogi, bonsi amo nigo bagotera nomogoko, barorire namaiso abo buna Omonene akoirana gocha Sayoni." 
Isaiah52:9 Inwe amatombe a Yerusalemu, tera amo namariogi amanene, ekiagera Omonene oremirie abanto baye, obooririe Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Omonene oorokirie okoboko kwaye ogochenu ase amaiso ebisaku bionsi, ne chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense nchirore ogotooreka kwa Nyasae oito." 
Isaiah52:11 Inwe aba mokobogoria ebikorero bi’Omonene, imoka, morue aase aa, timobaisa gokuna egento getachenegeti, soka korwa ase egati y’omochie oyo, mwechene inwe abanyene." 
Isaiah52:12 Ekero morasoke korwao, timokoayerera, gose timogotama, ekiagera Omonene natang’ane bosio bwaino; ee, ere Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli nababwatie korwa nyuma abe obarendete." 
Isaiah52:13 Naama! Omosomba one naseseneke ase ogokora kwaye, nakinigwe na koimokererigwa igoro, nabe omonene mono." 
Isaiah52:14 Abanto abange nigo baichanete ase engencho yaye, ekiagera ekieni kiaye nigo giasaretigwe bobe goetania eki’onde bwensi, omobere oye tororekanete buna oyo o mwanyabanto." 
Isaiah52:15 Bono ebisaku ebinge mbimokumie, na abaruoti nigo baramumekerie emenwa yabo ase engencho yaye, ekiagera mbarore amang’ana batana gotebigwa, na aya batana koigwa mbayamanye." 
Isaiah53:1 Ning’o bwegenire amang’ana aya twararetie? Ning’o Omonene amaanoreire okoboko kwaye? 
Isaiah53:2 Omosomba oyio nigo akinete ase obosio bwaye buna ekemeri ekerere, na buna egesabo ki’omote kegokina korwa ase riroba eriomo, tabwate ekieni ekiya, gose obonene bw’omobere; ekero twamorigereretie, titwaroche buya bonde asare bogotong’usa." 
Isaiah53:3 Ere nigo achayetwe, akaangwa nabanto; ere nigo arenge omonto bw’obororo, naende onarete omoichano. Abanto nigo batubete amasio abo ng’a tibamorora; nigo achayetwe, naintwe tokamobara ng’a oyotagwenereti kende." 
Isaiah53:4 Ekeene, ere obogoirie omoichano oyo otogwenerete intwe, na bwetwekire obororo bwaito; intwe nigo twamobarete ng’a oakirwe na Nyasae, naende ng’a ere omoeire egesusuro na obororo." 
Isaiah53:5 Korende nigo aagetwe chingoma ase engencho y’ogosaria gwaito, agakoborwa ase engencho y’obobe bwaito. Ere akaegwa egesusuro, erinde intwe tonyore omorembe, ase ogoakwa kwaye intwe twagwenigwe." 
Isaiah53:6 Intwe twensi konya twasirire buna ching’ondi chinsiru; kera omonto nigo abwatetie enchera yaye omonyene, na Omonene omotwekire obobe bwaito intwe twensi." 
Isaiah53:7 Agakorerwa bobe na gochandwa, nonya naboigo tamaanorete omonwa oye. Buna emanwa y’eng’ondi ekoirwa konyenywa, na buna eng’ondi etari kwana ase omonachi bw’amarionya, naboigo ere tamaanorete omonwa oye." 
Isaiah53:8 Korwa ase ogokorerwa bobe, na okonacherwa ekina, akaiiwa goitwa. Ning’o ase ekiaare kiaye orengereretie ng’a nigo arusetigwe ase ense y’abwo bare moyo, na goakwa ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto baane?" 
Isaiah53:9 Akaroiserigwa embeera amo nechi’abakori amabe, korende gakure, agatindekwa ase abanda bagotindekwa, ekiagera takorete amabe, gose obong’ainereria tibwaruete ase omonwa oye." 
Isaiah53:10 Korende Omonene nigo anchete komokobora, akamokora akaba omorwaire; ekero arabe orure obogima bwaye bobe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, nario ararore oroiboro rwaye na abe moyo amatuko amange; ogwancha kwa Nyasae ngokoreke goetera ase amaboko aye." 
Isaiah53:11 Ere narore okwama kw’emechando y’omoyo oye na goisaneka; ase obong’aini bwaye omosomba one omonyene oboronge nakore abanto abange babe abanyene oboronge, ekiagera nabogorie ebibe biabo." 
Isaiah53:12 Ase ayio, nimwatananere abange babe egetari kiaye; ere naatanerwe ebisakorwa amo nabare ne chinguru, ekiagera aruete obogima bwaye agakwa, akabarwa buna noyomo bw’abasaria. Nigo abogoretie ebibe bi’abanto abange, agasabera abasaria." 
Isaiah54:1 “Aye ore omogomba otaiborete, tera; aye otana kobina ase okoibora, aka eriogi rinene ri’ogotera kw’omochengo! Omonene otebire ng’a abana b’oyo otigetwe bosa nigo bare abange kobua ab’oyo obwate omosacha. Nabo Omonene agoteba.”" 
Isaiah54:2 “Gareyia aase okobeka eema yao; orambore ebitambaa bi’eema yao. Tobaisa gotiga korambora chingori na gokong’ia ebirochi! 
Isaiah54:3 Aye norande gochia ensemo y’okorio na ey’okobee, na oroiboro rwao ndoire chinse chi’ebisaku na gokora emechie yasaretigwe emenywe naende.”" 
Isaiah54:4 “Tobaisa koiroka, ekiagera togosookigwa; toichana, ekiagera togosookigwa; mbwebe obosooku kwarenge nabwo korwa oboke bwao, na tokoinyora nonya ng’ake ogochaywa kw’oboboraka bwao," 
Isaiah54:5 Omotongi oo nere omosacha oo, Omonene bw’Emeganda nario erieta riaye. Ere oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli nere Omobooria oo; nigo akorokwa Nyasae bw’ense engima.”" 
Isaiah54:6 Nyasae oo nigo agoteba iga: “Inche Omonene nakorangeirie aye ore buna omokungu bwangetwe, oichanete ase omoyo oye, ee, nakorangeirie aye ore buna omokungu oseretigwe ekero arenge omoriakari." 
Isaiah54:7 Nigo nagotigete ase engaki enke mono, korende ninkororere amabera amange, nkoiranie." 
Isaiah54:8 Ekero nabete nekeririanda ekenene, nigo nabisete obosio bwane korwa asore ase engaki enke, korende ase obwanchani bwa kare na kare ninkororere amabera.” Nabo Omonene, oyore Omobooria oo atebire." 
Isaiah54:9 “Amang’ana aya nigo are asende buna aria abete ekero kia Nuhu. Nigo natianete ng’a amache buna aria achete ekero kia Nuhu, tagocha ase ense naende; naboigo natianire ng’a tinkogenderera koba nendamwamu asore, gose tinkogotogonyera." 
Isaiah54:10 Nonya nebitunwa nabiisa kong’anya, na ebigoro bitengeche, obwanchani bwane bogendererete botambe tibokorua asore, na okobwatana kwane kw’omorembe tigokonyegerigwa.” Nabo Omonene, oyogokororera amabera, agoteba."
