Isaiah54:11 “Aye omochie ochandire, aye kwabeire gokoruta‐rutwa gochia aaria na aaria nomoubera, otari koremigwa nonde, rora, ninkoagacha namagena ao akomeka‐meka, nimbeke oboroso bwao namagena e rigori rinene akorokwa safiro." 
Isaiah54:12 Ning’agache emerobiri yao namagena akorokwa agati, na ebiita biao mbiagache namagena akorokwa sumaridi, ne chindwaki chiao chionsi nchiagache namagena ande e rigori rinene.”" 
Isaiah54:13 “Abana bao bonsi mbabe bakworokererigwa n’Omonene, na omorembe omonge nobe amo nabarabwo." 
Isaiah54:14 Goetera ase oboronge nokong’igwe; ogokorerwa bobe tigokogoika ang’e, ekiagera gento kende tikeri kerakoirokie; tokoba nobwoba, ekiagera eke gekwoboyia tigekogoika ang’e." 
Isaiah54:15 Omonto oraseegete esegi, tari inche ndamotome; onde bwensi oraseegete esegi asore, nigo aragwe ekero agokorwania." 
Isaiah54:16 “Naama! Natongire omoturi bw’ebioma, oyio ogoutera omorero bw’amakara na aroisie ebirwanero buna bigwenerete koba. Boigo natongire omosaria bw’okobisaria." 
Isaiah54:17 Ebirwanero biaroisigwe ase ogokorwania, tibikonyora okobua, kera oromeme rorakoimokere kogosoera, aye norobue ase ekina. Oyo noro omwando bw’abasomba baane inche Omonene, na oboronge bwabo obokorwa asende.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah55:1 “Naama! Inwe mwensi abamore nerang’o, inchuo monywe amache! Inwe aba motabwati chibesa, inchuo mogore endagera morie! Inchuo mogore edivai na amabeere motari goakana chibesa, gose korua kende." 
Isaiah55:2 Nase ki mokorua chibesa chiaino kogora egento getari endagera? Nase ki mokwerosia gokora emeremo ase eke getari goisanekia? Ntegerere moigwe, nainwe morie eyere engiya, namogokere endagera enoru." 
Isaiah55:3 “Tegerera moigwe, erio moche asende. Igwa! Erio nario moranyare koba moyo. Ninkore nainwe okobwatana kw’ogotianania gwa kare na kare, naende nimbaorokerie obwanchani bwane bwa botambe obo narierete Daudi eira." 
Isaiah55:4 Rora, nigo namobegete abe kirori one ase abanto, naende abe omoraai na omochiki igoro ase abanto." 
Isaiah55:5 Naama! Aye norangerie abanto b’ebisaku otamanyeti, na abanto b’ebisaku batakomanyeti mbaminyoke gocha asore, ase engencho y’Omonene, Nyasae oo, oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, ekiagera okoeire obonene.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Morigie Omonene ekero akonyorekana, morangerie erinde abakonye ekero are ang’e!" 
Isaiah55:7 Tiga omokori amabe atige chinchera chiaye, na oyo otari omoronge atige ebirengererio biaye. Omonto oyio tiga airane ase Omonene, nere amororere amabera, ee, ase Nyasae oito, ere namwabere kegima." 
Isaiah55:8 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ebirengererio biane tibiri buna ebiaino, gose chinchera chiaino tichiri buna echiane." 
Isaiah55:9 Buna koreng’ana igoro ere igoro mono korwa ase ense, naboigo ne chinchera chiane chire igoro mono kobua echiaino, na ebirengererio biane nabo bire kobua ebiaino." 
Isaiah55:10 “Buna embura na amagena ’embura bigotwa korwa igoro, na tibikoirana gochia igoro, korende nigo bikonyiyia riroba, erinde ebimeri biamera na kwama, erio ense yama chimbusuro chikobusurwa, na endagera ekoriegwa," 
Isaiah55:11 naboigo ne ring’ana rikorwa ase omonwa one rirabe. Tirikong’iranera bosa, korende ndiikeranie okogania kwane, naende ndikore aya naritomete rikore." 
Isaiah55:12 “Inwe mosoke more nomogoko, motang’anwe more nomorembe. Ebitunwa na ebigoro mbitere ase amasio aino, na emete yonsi y’orosana neake chinkobi." 
Isaiah55:13 Aase amagwa are, emetarakwa nemereo, na aase amageri are emeadasi nemereo. Eyio nebe ekoraria obonene bw’Omonene na ekemanyererio gia kare na kare getasarigwe nonya ng’ake.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Renda ayare ay’oboronge oyakore, ekiagera ogotooreka kwane nigo kore ang’e gocha, na bwango oboronge bwane mbooroke." 
Isaiah56:2 Nasesenirie oyo ogokora ayio, mwanyabanto oyo okoyabwata bokong’u, oyio okorenda Esabato, tayekora ebe eyetachenegeti, omonto oyio ogotanga okoboko kwaye tigokora amabe ande onsi.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Omonto bw’egesaku ekeao obwatanire n’Omonene tabaisa goteba iga: “Ekeene, Omonene nigo aranyatanane korwa ase abanto baye”, na oyo ore omogomba tateba iga: “Rora, inche nigo inde omote omwomo.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Abanto abagomba abarendete Chisabato chiane, abwo bachorire gokora ogwancha kwane, naende babwatete okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania," 
Isaiah56:5 amarieta abo nainyorwe ime ase enyomba yane, na ime ye chindwaki chiane. Ayio nabe ogosesenigwa kobua abana abamura na abaiseke. Nimbae erieta ria kare na kare ritasirigwe." 
Isaiah56:6 “Abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao barabwatane n’Omonene ase okomokorera, na banche erieta ri’Omonene, erinde babe abasomba baye, kera oyomo orarende Esabato na tayekora ebe eyetachenegeti, naende abwate okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania," 
Isaiah56:7 abwo bonsi nimbarente ase egetunwa kiane egechenu, mbakore babe nomogoko ime ase enyomba yane y’ogosaba. Ekero barabe bakorua ebing’wanso biabo bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde, igoro ase egesasimero kiane, nimbianchere, ekiagera enyomba yane nerokwe enyomba y’ogosaba ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae, oyio ogosangereria Abaisraeli abaseretigwe, agoteba: “Ninsangererie abanto bande abaao amo kobua abwo konya basangererigwe.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Inwe ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana, inwe ching’iti chionsi chi’amanani, inchuo morie!" 
Isaiah56:10 Abarendi b’abanto aba nigo bare emeuko, bonsi pi tibari nokomanya, bonsi nigo bare chisese chinkubu chitanyare gokoga; nigo chiraire inse chikorota, chianchete obogondereria." 
Isaiah56:11 Chisese echio nigo chire chindia bobe, tichiri koigota. Na abarisia boigo tibari nobong’aini; bonsi baonchokeire chinchera chiabo, kera oyomo nigo akwerigeria ebitoki korwa ase kera emeremo." 
Isaiah56:12 Nigo agoteba, “Inchuo mbanyorere edivai tonywe, totinde nekenyugwa egetindi, rituko ri’ankio nabo rirabe rinene buna rero, naende rietanie eri.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Omonto omonyene oboronge nigo agosira, na monto onde tari okorengereria igoro y’ayio; abegenwa b’Omonene nigo bakorusigwao, na monto onde takomanya engencho yaye. Omonyene oboronge nigo akorusigwa korwa ase obobe," 
Isaiah57:2 osoa ase omorembe. Abwo bagotaara ase oboronge nigo bakoba batimogete ase chimbeera chiabo. 
Isaiah57:3 “Inwe abana b’omokungu omoringoria, inwe ab’ororeria rw’oyore omotomani na omotayayi, suka gocha ang’e aa." 
Isaiah57:4 Inee! Inwe ning’o mogochecheria? Ning’o mwasameirie emenwa na mwasokirie chimeme? Inwe nigo more abanto b’ogosaria na oroiboro rw’abang’ainereria. 
Isaiah57:5 Inwe nigo mogosambeka nokogania okobe ase egati y’emete enga emetontera, na inse ya kera omote omobese. Nigo mogoiteera abana baino agwo ase amagoko, inse y’ebitare." 
Isaiah57:6 Amagena amaterere are ase chindooche, ayio naro egetari kiao; ayio naro agotungetie. Ayio naro kwabeire gokoumorera okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa, na koyaruera okoruegwa kw’endagera. Inee! Nindemererie ogokora buna okwo?" 
Isaiah57:7 Nigo okobeka ekerarero kiao ase egetunwa keimokererete igoro mono, erio gwatiira gochiao korua ekeng’wanso." 
Isaiah57:8 Gwatenenia ekeinyorio kiao korwa ase egesieri moino y’emetobwa. Gwantigire inche, gwasioririe ekiebisio kiao, gwasoire aroro gwakegareeirie. Aye ogechorera oyomo, ogancha korara nere, ekero kwaroche okogosima nokoboko." 
Isaiah57:9 Nigo kwaimogetie amaguta, okairera omoruoti, okamoirera na amaguta ao amange agotioka buya. Nigo gwatomete abanto bao gochia ase chinse chi’aare, ee, nonya ngochia aase abakure." 
Isaiah57:10 Nigo kwerosetie norogendo rwao rw’enchera entambe. Nonya naboigo tigwatebete ng’a ogosemeria tikori. Nigo kwamentetwe chinguru chinyia; ase ayio tikwagoyete. 
Isaiah57:11 “Ning’o kwoboete na okamoiroka goika ogakwana oborimo? Tikware kong’inyora gose ondengererie? Inee! Tinabete ndemereretie ase engaki entambe, naye tikwabete gokonyiroka?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ningotebie buna oboronge bwao bore na buna ogokora kwao kore, birobio tibikonyara kogokonya." 
Isaiah57:13 Ekero orabe gokorera, tiga emegwekano ogosasima gwasangereirie egotoorie. Omwaga noyeire gochia aare, ee, embeo bosa neyeire. Korende oyo orantamere naire ense ebe omwando oye, ee, naire egetunwa kiane egechenu.”" 
Isaiah57:14 Amang’ana aya nakwanwe: “Ticha gocha igoro! Ticha gocha igoro! Oroisie enchera! Rusia kera ekegocha kere ase enchera y’abanto baane!” 
Isaiah57:15 Aya naro Oyio ore Igoro Mono, Oyio oragambe goika kare na kare, Oyio erieta riaye n’Omochenu, agoteba: “Inche nigo imenyete aase aachenu are igoro mono, boigo nigo imenyete amo noyio enkoro yaye yeitirie na gwekeyia, erinde ninkore omoika bw’oyore omoitongo obe omoyia, na koa obogima ase oyio enkoro yaye yeitirie." 
Isaiah57:16 Tinkogenderera koamererania gose koba nendamwamu kare na kare. Inse gokora bo, emeika yabo amo nemioyo eyio natongete, nigo eragireke ase obosio bwane." 
Isaiah57:17 Abanto nigo babwate okogania okobe kwe ribero; ase ayio nigo bagokora ebibe bikagera nkaba nendamwamu asebare, nkabaaka. Nigo nabisete obosio bwane, nkaba nendamwamu, korende barabwo nigo bagendererete gotiga obwegenwa na kobwatia chinchera chie chinkoro chiabo." 
Isaiah57:18 “Narorire chinchera echio chiabo, korende nimbagwenie. Nimbaraae na kobaremia, nindemie na abwo bakorera." 
Isaiah57:19 Nimbeke ase ebikoba biabo okwama okuya, bikwane omorembe ase abwo bare aare na abare ang’e, na inche nimbagwenie.” Nabo Omonene agoteba." 
Isaiah57:20 “Korende abakori amabe nigo banga buna enyancha yaturubanigwe, etanyare gotoerera; amache aye nigo agosiara etintira na eubi gocha igoro.”" 
Isaiah57:21 Nyasae one nigo agoteba iga: “Omokori amabe tari nomorembe.” 
Isaiah58:1 “Aka eriogi rinene, tobaisa gokira, aka eriogi buna eri’egetureri! Tebia abanto baane ogosaria kwabo, batebie abwo bare ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo ebibe biabo." 
Isaiah58:2 Abanto abwo nigo bakondigia kera rituko, na nigo bagokirie bamanye chinchera chiane. Nigo banga buna egesaku kegokora oboronge getana gotiga amachiko a Nyasae obo. Barabwo nigo bakomboria mbagambie ebina bi’oboronge, nigo baganetie Nyasae abaike ang’e.”" 
Isaiah58:3 “Abanto abwo nigo bagoteba: Nase ki tokweng’ata, na aye Omonene tori korengereria amang’ana ayio? Nase ki togwekeyia, na aye tori korora ayio? Omonene nigo agoteba: Rora rituko eri mokweng’ata nigo mokwerigeria aya akobagokia inwe abanyene, naende mwachanda abakori emeremo baino bonsi." 
Isaiah58:4 Rora, inwe nigo mokweng’ata ase okwomana na okoamererania. Nigo mogoakana chinkundi chi’ogokora amabe. Okweng’ata kwaino buna okwe rituko ria rero nigo kogotanga ogosaba kwaino tikoigugwa igoro." 
Isaiah58:5 Inee! Oko nakwo okweng’ata inche nganetie? Inee! Eye nero enchera endonge omonto agwekeyia? Ogwekumba omotwe buna risakwe, na kweboyia chigunia amo nokweaka ribu? Inee! Ayio naro mokoroka okweng’ata ne rituko rikomogwenera Omonene?”" 
Isaiah58:6 “Okweng’ata inche nanchire noko: Mosibore chingataare chi’obobe; mosibore chinkini chi’amakorogoto, bae abachandegete ribaga bagende, na mobune kera rikorogoto." 
Isaiah58:7 Mwatananere abare nenchara endagera yaino; abanto abataka batabwati chinka, mobarente ase chinyomba chiaino; ekero mokorora omonto ore getirianda, momoboyie. Timobaisa kwanga gokonya abare nomobere na amanyinga buna inwe.”" 
Isaiah58:8 “Korakore igo, omobaso oo nobare buna ensakia ya mambia, na okogwenigwa kwao nkogoikere bwango; oboronge bwao mbogotang’ane, na obonene bw’Omonene nabogotunyane korwa nyuma, bobe bokorendete." 
Isaiah58:9 Erio norangerie, na Omonene nakoiranerie, norere, nere natebe iga: Nao inde aa.” “Koratige kobekera abande amakorogoto, na kobaraga nekiara, na kobakwana bobe;" 
Isaiah58:10 korakonye abare nenchara na oe oyochandegete eki’aremeire, rirorio omobaso oo nobare ase omosunte, na obotuko bwao mbobe buna mobaso gati." 
Isaiah58:11 Igo Omonene nakoraae kogenderera botambe, nagoisanekie nebinto ebiya, nakong’ie amauga ’omobere oo, naye obe buna omogondo ogoitororerwa amache, na buna ensoko y’amache etari gokama." 
Isaiah58:12 Abanto bao mbaagache naende amatombe aria a kare, noagache amaroso ’ebiaare ebinge; aye norokwe” “Omoroisia bw’aase atagogete”, na “Oyokoroisia chinchera chibe chinyia, erinde ense emenywe”." 
Isaiah58:13 “Koratange okogoro kwao ase rituko ri’Esabato na bwetange tokora amang’ana ao agokogokia ase rituko riane richenu; koraroke Esabato ebe omogoko oo, rituko riria richenu ri’Omonene rituko ri’ogosikwa; korarisike otari kobwatia chinchera chiao omonyene, gose kwerigeria aya agokogokia, na tokwana amang’ana atagwenereti," 
Isaiah58:14 rirorio nonyore omogoko asende inche Omonene, nainche ningoetie ase ebitunwa bi’ense igoro, nkoe omwando o Yakobo, sokoro yao, oyorie.” Omonene nere okwanire amang’ana ayio korwa ase omonwa oye." 
Isaiah59:1 Naama! Okoboko kw’Omonene tikori okweng’e, erinde ere asinywe gotooria, gose amato aye tatineti atanyare koigwa." 
Isaiah59:2 Taibo, obobe bwaino nabwo bwabaatananire korwa ase Nyasae oino. Ebibe biaino biagerire Omonene obisire obosio bwaye korwa asemore, ase igo tari koigwa ogosaba kwaino." 
Isaiah59:3 Amaboko aino abeire ayatachenegeti ase ogoitera amanyinga ’abanto, na ebiara biaino biabeire ebitachenegeti ase engencho y’obobe, Nigo mogokwana oborimo nebikoba biaino, ne chimeme chiaino chisokia aya atari ay’oboronge." 
Isaiah59:4 Onde tari ogokwana ay’oboronge, onde tari omonyakeene ase ekegambero. Abanto abwo nigo begenete amang’ana a bosa na gokwana oborimo; nigo bakoba barito b’ayare amabe, baibora ogosirigwa." 
Isaiah59:5 Nigo bagoturagia amagena ’amarubi na koroisia chiusi chie chinyambobe. Oyo okoria amagena abo nigo agokwa, na ekero rigena erimo ri’ayio riatirwe rirubi nigo rigosoka korwao." 
Isaiah59:6 Chiusi chiria bakoroisia ng’a chibe chianga, korende chianga echio tichigotuba emebere y’abanto. Emeremo y’abanto abwo nigo ere ey’ebibe, nigo benaretie gokora ay’obotindi namaboko abo." 
Isaiah59:7 Amagoro abo nigo are amaango ase ogokora amabe; nigo bakoayerera goitera amanyinga ’abanto batari na komocha. Ebirengererio biabo nebi’ebibe. Ogosaria na ogosiria nigo bire ase chinchera chiabo. 
Isaiah59:8 Abanto abwo tibamanyeti enchera y’omorembe, na oboronge tibori ase bagoeta; nigo bagoeta ase chinchera chinkorekanu, na onde bwensi ogoeterao takomanya amang’ana ’omorembe." 
Isaiah59:9 Ase ayio, okogamba ebina bi’ekeene nigo gotobeerete aare, na oboronge tibori gotoikeeria. Nigo togosemeria ng’a torore oborabu, korende twarora omosunte; nigo togosemeria ng’a torore omobaso, korende twataara ase omosunte ekerima." 
Isaiah59:10 Nigo tokona‐gotaba‐taba ase enyasi y’enyomba buna abanto emeuko, nigo tokona‐kouna‐una buna abatabwati amaiso; intwe nigo tokogochwa mobaso gati buna mbwamura‐murire. Ase egati y’abare ne chinguru nigo tonga buna abakwete." 
Isaiah59:11 Intwe twensi nigo tokwamuma buna chidubu, na tweumia buna amaruma; nigo toganetie ay’oboronge, korende tibori aande; nigo toganetie ogotooreka, korende nigo kore aare naintwe." 
Isaiah59:12 Ogosaria gwaito kwamentekanire na kwabuchire ase obosio bwao, na ebibe biaito biatobereire birori. Ogosaria gwaito nigo kore amo naintwe, twamanyire obobe bwaito." 
Isaiah59:13 Twasaririe na komokana Omonene, twairanire nyuma, twatigire komobwatia Nyasae oito; nigo togokwana amang’ana ay’ogokorera abande bobe, na ay’ogotaigwera; nigo togokwana amang’ana ’obong’ainereria akorwa ase chinkoro chiaito." 
Isaiah59:14 Okogamba ebina bi’ekeene gwatugutirwe gochia nyuma, na oboronge nigo bobeerete aare. Ekeene, giatiringeirwe inse, giatugutirwe ase amakoori, oboronge tibori konyora ribaga bosoe." 
Isaiah59:15 Ekeene kiaborire, na oyo ogotiga obobe nere ogwoswa oirwa. Omonene ororire ng’a ekeene tikeri gokorwa, na amang’ana ayio amogechirie mono." 
Isaiah59:16 Omonene akarora ng’a monto onde tarenge aande, agakumia ng’a onde tarenge gwesoyia gokonya. Erio okoboko kwaye omonyene gokamorentera ogotooreka, na oboronge bwaye bokamokonya." 
Isaiah59:17 Omonene akeboyia oboronge bokaba buna engobo y’ekioma ase egekuba kiaye, akabeka ogotooreka gokaba buna ekegogwa gi’ekioma ase omotwe oye, akeboyia egesiomba gekaba eanga yaye, naende akeboyia ekeririanda gekaba ekiambaro kiaye." 
Isaiah59:18 Omonene nabaakane koreng’ana buna ogokora kwabo kore. Nabe nendamwamu ase abwo bakomoengereria, naakane ababisa baye koreng’ana nogokora kwabo; abanto b’ebisinka na abe chinse chire ang’e ne chinyancha nabaakane koreng’ana nogokora kwabo." 
Isaiah59:19 Abanto ba bosongo mbairoke erieta ri’Omonene, na aba moocha bairoke obonene bwaye. Ekero ababisa barachiche buna orooche rokominyoka, omwaga bw’Omonene nobaserie." 
Isaiah59:20 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inche ninchiche mboorie abanto ba Sayoni, na abwo ba Yakobo baonchoke na batige ogosaria kwabo." 
Isaiah59:21 Oko nakwo okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania ndakore nabanto abwo: Omoika one oyio ore igoro asore, na amang’ana aane aya nabekire ime ase omonwa oo, ayio takorua ase omonwa oo, gose ase emenwa y’abana bao, gose ase emenwa y’abachokoro bao, korwa bono goika kare na kare.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah60:1 “Imoka obare, ekiagera omobaso oo ochire, na obonene bw’Omonene bwakobareire." 
Isaiah60:2 Rora, omosunte notube ense, na omosunte ekerima notube abanto b’ebisaku, korende aye, Omonene nakomorekere, na obonene bwaye mbororekane igoro yao." 
Isaiah60:3 Abanto b’ebisaku mbang’uswe nomobaso oo, na abaruoti mbache, bang’uswe namasase akobara korwa asore.”" 
Isaiah60:4 “Imokia amaiso ao igoro, origererie chinsemo chionsi, abanto bonsi basangererekanire amo bagocha asore. Abamura bao mbache korwa aare na abaiseke bao mbabogorigwe namaboko, barentwe." 
Isaiah60:5 Ekero orarore ayio nobe nomogoko, ogirigente; enkoro yao netwoma‐twome na kogareea, ekiagera obotenenku obore ase enyancha mbogochere, na obw’abanto b’ebisaku mborentwe asore.”" 
Isaiah60:6 “Amaicho amange e chingamia amo ne chimori chiabo narentwe asore korwa Midiani na Efa. Abanto bonsi ba Seba mbache asore, mbarente chitahabu na ubani, bararie ogotogigwa kw’Omonene." 
Isaiah60:7 Amaicho onsi e chitugo korwa ense ya Kedari nasangererigwe arentwe asore, chimingichi chia Nebayoti nchigokorere; nchichiche ase egesasimero kiane chiruegwe, nainche nchianchere, na igo ninkore enyomba yane y’obonene ebe nobonene goetania.”" 
Isaiah60:8 “Mbarabi aba bagoeta buna amare agoeta igoro, aba banga buna amaruma akoiruruka gochia ase ebiswa biabo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Abanto bamenyete ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha mbanganye inche Omonene; chimeeri chia Tarisisi nchibe chintang’ani korenta abanto bao bakorwa chinse chi’aare; mbarentane chifeta ne chitahabu chie chinse echio. Ebinto ebio nigo birarentwe ase ogotogia erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oo, ere ore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli, ekiagera okoeire obonene.”" 
Isaiah60:10 “Abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao mbaagache chindwaki chiao, na abaruoti babo mbabe bakogokorera. Ekero narenge nendamwamu, nigo nakorenterete amaakwa, korende ase obwanchani bwane nakororeire amabera." 
Isaiah60:11 Omobaso na obotuko ebiita biao mbibe biigoire botambe, tibigosiekwa, na abanto mbabe bagokorentera obotenenku bw’ebisaku, na abaruoti babo babe bakobatang’ana." 
Isaiah60:12 Abanto b’ebisaku na ab’amaruoti abaraange kogokorera mbasirigwe, ee, abanto abwo nigo barasirigwe kegima.”" 
Isaiah60:13 “Obonene bwa Lebanoni mborentwe bobe obwao, emetarakwa na emeuru, na emebunduki, nerentwe gochabera aase Obomenyo bwane Obochenu bore, na inche ninkore aase amagoro aane agotenena abe nobonene." 
Isaiah60:14 Abana b’abwo bagokorerete bobe, mbache asore bagotung’amere na koumama. Abwo bonsi bagochayete mbatung’ame ase amagoro ao; mbakoroke Omochie bw’Omonene, Sayoni bw’Oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli.”" 
Isaiah60:15 “Aye nigo kwarenge omochie otigetwe na kogechwa, monto onde tarenge goeta ime yao, korende bono ningokore obe nobonene goika kare na kare, na aye nobe omochie orarente omogoko ekiaare ase ekiaare." 
Isaiah60:16 Aye nogonke amabeere ’abanto b’ebisaku, nogonke korwa ase ebikuba bi’abaruoti; aye nomanye ng’a inche Omonene, ninche Omotooria oo, ninche Omobooria oo, Omonguru o Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah60:17 “Ninkorentere chitahabu ribaga rie chitaai, ne chifeta ribaga ri’ebioma, ne chitaai ribaga rie chibao, na ebioma ribaga ri’amagena. Ninkore abateneneri bao babe ab’omorembe, na abwo bagokogambera babe bakogokorera ay’oboronge." 
Isaiah60:18 Amang’ana ’obotindi takoigugwa ase ense yao, gose ay’ogosaria na ogosiria ase chimbebe chiao ime. Nigo oraroke chindwaki chiao” “Ogotooreka”, na ebiita biao “Ogotogigwa.”" 
Isaiah60:19 “Erioba tirigokobareria omobaso ase engaki y’omobaso, gose omotienyi togokoa oborabu ase obotuko, korende Omonene nere orabe omobaso oo o kare na kare; na Nyasae oo nabe obonene bwao bokomeka‐meka." 
Isaiah60:20 Erioba riao tirikorimera nonya ng’ake, gose omotienyi oo togosira, ekiagera Omonene nere orabe omobaso oo o kare na kare, na amatuko ao ay’omoichano naere." 
Isaiah60:21 Abanto bao bonsi mbabe abanyene oboronge, mbaire ense ebe eyabo kare na kare; barabwo nigo barabe ekemeri kiane nasimegete, emeremo y’amaboko aane, erio inche ntogigwe." 
Isaiah60:22 Oyore omoke nabuche abe chilifu, na oyo otari na nguru nabe egesaku kere nokobua. Inche ninche Omonene; ekero engaki yane eraike ning’ayererie ayio.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Omoika bw’Omonene Nyasae nigo ore igoro yane; ekiagera Omonene ong’akire amaguta, erinde ndanderie abataka amang’ana amaya; ontomire kogwenia abasionoirwe chinkoro chiabo, na ndarie obosibore ase abasibwa, naende inyigorere abanto basibire basoke." 
Isaiah61:2 Ontomire ndarie omwaka bw’Omonene bwancheire, ne rituko ria Nyasae oito ri’okorusia egesiomba, rituko araremie bonsi abaichanete." 
Isaiah61:3 Ontomire ase abwo baichanete bare Sayoni, mbabekere chigutwa chi’ebisicha ase emetwe yabo ribaga rie ribu, na mbaake amaguta ay’omogoko ribaga ri’omoichano, naende mbabekere chingobo chi’amasikani ribaga ri’emeika yairianyekire. Erio barokwe “Emete y’oboronge”, mbabe ebimeri Omonene asimegete, erinde atogigwe." 
Isaiah61:4 Barabwo mbaagache naende amaturi a kare, mbatenenie amaagacho a kare asaretigwe; mbaroisie naende emechie eria yatagoretwe, aase agwo atigetwe asaregete nebiaare ebinge." 
Isaiah61:5 Abamenyi mbabe bakobariseria amaicho aino, na abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao mbabe bakobaremera emegondo yaino na kobarendera emesabibu yaino." 
Isaiah61:6 Inwe nigo morarokwe abakuani b’Omonene; abanto mbabaroke abakoreri ba Nyasae oito, moegwe morie obotenenku bw’abanto b’ebisaku, na gwetogeria obonene obwo bwabo." 
Isaiah61:7 Ribaga ri’obosooku bwaino monyore egetari ara kabere, na abwo bachayetwe mbanyore omogoko ase ebitari biabo; na igo barabwo mbanyore ebitari ara kabere agwo ase ense yabo, mbabe nomogoko o kare na kare." 
Isaiah61:8 “Inche Omonene nigo nyanchete oboronge, nigo ngechete obourereria na ogokora okobe. Nimbe omwegenwa, erinde ng’ee abanto baane eng’eria yabo, na ninkore nabarabwo okobwatana kw’ogotianania gwa kare na kare." 
Isaiah61:9 Abana babo mbamanyekane ase abanto b’ebisaku, na abanto b’ororeria rwabo mbamanyekane ase abanto bonsi. Abanto bonsi barabe bakobarora mbabamanye na baorokie ng’a abwo nabanto Omonene asesenirie.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Ningoke mono ase Omonene, omoyo one nochenge ase Nyasae one, ere omboyirie chianga chi’ogotooreka, ontubire nomwambaro bw’oboronge, buna omonyuomi akobeka ekiore ekero ki’enyangi, na buna omoriakari agwechabera ebinto bie rigori rinene." 
Isaiah61:11 Buna koreng’ana ebimeri bikomera korwa riroba ime, na buna ebisimekire ase omogondo bigokina, naboigo Omonene Nyasae ararente oboronge na ogotogia, bibe ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku bionsi." 
Isaiah62:1 Ase engencho ya Sayoni tinkonyara gokira, na ase engencho ya Yerusalemu tingotimoka, goika oboronge bwaye bororekane buna okobara kwe risase, na ogotooreka kwaye kororekane kore buna ekemore kegwoka." 
Isaiah62:2 Abanto b’ebisaku mbarore oboronge bwao, na abaruoti bonsi barore obonene bwao; erio aye orokwe erieta riyia, rirarue ase omonwa bw’Omonene." 
Isaiah62:3 Aye nobe egutwa enseera y’obonene ere ase okoboko kw’Omonene, na esombe y’omogambi ere ase okoboko kwa Nyasae oo." 
Isaiah62:4 Tokogenderera korokwa “Oyotigetwe”, na ense yao tekogenderera korokwa “Eyetigire bosa”, korende norokwe “Oyo inche Omonene nagokigwe nere”, na ense yao nerokwe “Eye enyuomire”, ekiagera Omonene nigo agokirie naye, na ense yao nenyuomwe." 
Isaiah62:5 Buna omomura akonyuoma omoiseke omwekungi, naboigo na abamura bao barakonyuome; na buna omonyuomi akogokera omoriakari oye, naboigo Nyasae oo arakogokere." 
Isaiah62:6 Aye Yerusalemu, nabekire abarendi igoro ase chindwaki chiao. Abwo tibagokira nonya ng’ake, omobaso na obotuko. Inwe aba mokomorangeria Omonene mokonywe, timobaisa gokira gose gotimoka, na timotiga Omonene atimoke," 
Isaiah62:7 goika abe oiraneirie Yerusalemu amaya aye na koyokora obe ogotogigwa ase ense. 
Isaiah62:8 Omonene orire eira na gotiana oramborete okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, na ase okoboko kwaye gw’okobua, ogoteba: “Tinkorua endagera yao ng’ee ababisa bao bayerie, na abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao tibakonywa edivai yao gwakoreire emeremo emekong’u." 
Isaiah62:9 Taibo, korende abwo barayegese nabwo barayerie, erio batogie Omonene; na abwo baratore amasabibu nabwo baranywe edivai, agwo ase chigoora chi’Aase aane Aachenu.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Eta, eta, mosoere ase ebiita, moroiserie abanto enchera; ticha enchera eyio eimokerere igoro, rusia amagena korwa aroro; tenenia ekemanyererio abanto bakerore." 
Isaiah62:11 Naama! Omonene oraririe amang’ana ase ense yonsi, ogoteba: “Tebia abanto ba Sayoni ng’a ogotooreka kwaino kwabereire ang’e; Omonene ngocha are obwate eng’eria yaye, na okonyora kwaye nigo gotang’aine bosio bwaye.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Barabwo mbarokwe “Abanto abachenu”, na “Ababoorigwe n’Omonene”, na aye omonyene norokwe “Omochie origigwe”, na “Omochie otatigwe.”" 
Isaiah63:1 Ning’o oyio okorwa Edomu, oyio okorwa Bosira obegete chianga chimbariri burure, oyio bweboyetie obonene, ogotaara ore ne chinguru chinyinge? “Oyio ninche, ngokwana ase oboronge inde nokobua kw’ogotooria.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Nase ki chianga chiao chire chimbariri burure, buna echi’oyo ogotacha egeteera gi’okomita emesabibu?" 
Isaiah63:3 “Nabeire ngotacha egeteera gi’okomita amasabibu inche bweka; onde tari ase abanto orenge amo nainche. Nigo nagetachete inde nendamwamu, ee, nkagetindacha inde nekeririanda. Amanyinga ’obogima bw’abanto akanyororokera chianga chiane, na bono nigo mbwate ebitamase bi’amanyinga ase chianga chiane." 
Isaiah63:4 Rituko ri’okorusia egesiomba nigo riarenge ase enkoro yane ime, na omwaka bw’okobooria abanto oikire." 
Isaiah63:5 Nkarigereria, korende omokonyi onde tarenge aande; ngaichana, korende oyogonsiira tarenge aande. Ase ayio, okoboko kwane kore ne chinguru gokandetera ogotooreka, na ekeririanda kiane gekambeka chinguru." 
Isaiah63:6 Ngatindachera abanto b’ebisaku bionsi inse, inde nendamwamu, nkabatindia inde nekeririanda, nkaumora amanyinga abo ase riroba.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ninyatore obwanchani bw’Omonene bogendererete botambe. Nintogie Omonene ase engencho y’amang’ana amaya onsi atokoreire, na obuya obonene akoreire Abaisraeli, koreng’ana na amabera aye na obonge bw’obwanchani bwaye bogendererete botambe." 
Isaiah63:8 Omonene agateba: “Ekeene, aba nabanto baane, abanto batakore amang’ana ’obong’ainereria,” akaba Omotooria obo." 
Isaiah63:9 Ase ogochandwa kwabo gwonsi nere ochandegete, na omomalaika orwete ase obosio bw’Omonene akabatooria. Ekiagera abanchete, na abarorerete amabera, akabatooria. Nigo abete okobabogoria na kobarenda ase amatuko onsi a kare." 
Isaiah63:10 Korende abanto abwo nigo basaretie ase Omonene, bagaichania Omoika oye Omochenu. Ase ayio Omonene akaonchoka, akaba omobisa obo, ere omonyene akabarwania." 
Isaiah63:11 Erio abanto bakainyora amatuko aria a kare, bakainyora na Musa, bagateba, “Ng’ai are oria bwambogetie abanto ase enyancha, amo nabarisia be riicho riaye? Ng’ai are oria obegete Omoika oye Omochenu ase egati yabo?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ng’ai are oria okoboko kwaye kw’obonene kwarenge ase ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Musa, oria bwatananete amache ’enyancha ase amasio ’abanto, erinde akenyorera erieta rigotogigwa kare na kare?" 
Isaiah63:13 Ere akabaetia ase chindiba ime buna chibarasi chigoeta ase erooro, barabwo tibagochetwe aande.”" 
Isaiah63:14 Buna koreng’ana chiombe chikoirwa ase rikura korisigwa, naboigo Omoika bw’Omonene oete abanto baria ogotimoka. Ee, nigo kwaraaete abanto bao, erinde okenyorera erieta ri’obonene." 
Isaiah63:15 Omonene, rigereria inse aa, korwa agwo igoro ase obomenyo bwao obochenu bore, na obonene bwao bore. Ng’ai risemi riao, ne chinguru chiao, bire? Okonyechandera kwao, na amabera ao asende, ng’ai bire? Ekeene, biatangirwe korwa asende." 
Isaiah63:16 Aye Omonene, naye Tata oito; Ibrahimu tatomanyete, na Israeli boigo tatomanyete, korende aye Omonene, naye Tata oito. “Omobooria oito korwa kare,” nario erieta riao." 
Isaiah63:17 Omonene, naki gwatotigire togosaria na gotiga chinchera chiao? Aye gwakorire chinkoro chiaito chiabeire chinkong’u chitari gokoiroka. Toiranere ase engencho y’abasomba bao, na ase engencho y’ebisaku bire omwando oo." 
Isaiah63:18 Intwe abanto bao abachenu nigo twabete abanyene ense eye ase engaki enke yoka: ababisa baito bagacha bagatiringera inse Aase Aachenu. 
Isaiah63:19 Twabeire buna abanto aye otana kogambera rinde, na buna abanto batari korokwa ase erieta riao." 
Isaiah64:1 Aye Omonene, naki otari gotandora igoro oike gocha inse aa, erinde ebitunwa bitengechigwe ase obosio bwao?" 
Isaiah64:2 Nigo yarenge koba buna omorero ogosamba chinsagia chi’emete, naende buna omorero okoberia amache, na igo ogere erieta riao rimanyekane ase ababisa bao, na abanto b’ebisaku batengechigwe ase obosio bwao." 
Isaiah64:3 Aye nigo gwakorete amang’ana ’ogokumia totakagerete ng’a nabe, ogacha inse aa, na ebitunwa bigatengechigwa ase obosio bwao." 
Isaiah64:4 Korwa amatuko a kare onde tana koigwa nogoto kwaye, gose korora neriso riaye, Nyasae onga buna aye ogokorera abwo bagosemeretie amaya." 
Isaiah64:5 Aye nigo okorotota abwo bagokora ay’oboronge bare nomogoko, abwo bagokoinyora bare ase chinchera chiao. Rora, aye nigo kwagechetigwe, ekero twakorete ebibe; twabeire tore ase ebibe biaito ase engakientambe. Inee! Ntonyare gotooreka?" 
Isaiah64:6 Intwe twensi twabeire buna abatachenegeti; oboronge bwaito bwonsi nigo bore buna eanga ere ne riko. Nigo togosusana buna rito, na ebibe biaito nigo bigotoira aare buna omwaga okoira amato amomo." 
Isaiah64:7 Monto onde tari okorangeria erieta riao akonywe, onde tari ogotaboboka akobwate bokong’u; aye kwabisire obosio bwao titoborora, na igo gwatigire ebibe biaito bigotokoora." 
Isaiah64:8 Nonya naboigo, aye Omonene, naye Tata oito; intwe nigo tore esike, naye omokori chinyongo. Intwe twensi nigo tore emeremo y’amaboko ao." 
Isaiah64:9 Aye Omonene, toba nendamwamu enene mono, togenderera koinyora ebibe biaito botambe. Torigererie, otoinyore, twensi nigo tore abanto bao." 
Isaiah64:10 Emechie yao emechenu yasarigwe yabeire orosana, na Sayoni obeire erooro, na Yerusalemu obeire bosa." 
Isaiah64:11 Enyomba yaito enchenu naende engiya mono, agwo ase chisokoro chiaito chiasoete ime kogotogia, bono yasambirwe nomorero; aase aito onsi arenge akogokia abeire amaturi." 
Isaiah64:12 Aye Omonene, Inee, nigo ogochia gwetanga torora amang’ana aya? Inee! Nigo ogochia gokira‐kiri na gotochanda mono?" 
Isaiah65:1 “Nigo nanyorekanete ase abwo batarenge koboria igoro yane; nigo narenge koorokera abwo batarenge kondigia. Ngatebia egesaku getarenge korangeria erieta riane gekonywe: Nao inde aa. Nao inde aa. 
Isaiah65:2 Omobaso boira nigo nabeire ndamborete amaboko aane korangeria abanto abasaria batari koigwera, abwo bakobwatia enchera etari engiya ey’emeroberio yabo abanyene." 
Isaiah65:3 Abanto aba nigo bakongechia na gokora bobe ase obosio bwane botambe; nigo bakoruera ebing’wanso ase emegondo ime na basambera ubani igoro ase ebisasimero bi’amatabori. 
Isaiah65:4 Nigo bakogenda ase chimbeera baikaransa aroro, na ase obotuko baba bakobeera aase are bobisi. Abanto abwo nigo bakoria chinyama chie chimbeche, na babwate omosori bw’ebinto bi’okogechia ase ebibekerero biabo." 
Isaiah65:5 Nigo bagotebia abande:” “Tigera korwa asetore, mobeere aare, ekiagera intwe twatananirwe tobe abachenu kobua inwe.” “Abanto aba nigo bare erioki rire ase chimioro chiane inche Omonene, na nigo bare omorero ogendererete koyia omobaso boira.”" 
Isaiah65:6 Rora, amang’ana aya nigo arikire ase obosio bwane, agoteba: “Inche tingokira, goika mbaakane, ee, goika mbaakane ogokora kwabo kobe ase ebikuba biabo." 
Isaiah65:7 Ee, Omonene otebire iga: Nimbaakane ase engencho y’obobe bwabo, amo nobwe chisokoro chiabo, ekiagera basamberete ubani igoro ase ebitunwa, na igo bakandamera agwo ase ebigoro. Ritang’ani nimbarengere ogoakanwa kwabo ase ogokora kwabo, nkobeke ase ebikuba biabo.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Buna koreng’ana edivai ekonyorekana korwa ase egesago ki’omosabibu, na abanto bateba: Timogesaria, ekiagera ogosesenigwa nkore ime yaye, naboigo ndakore ase engencho y’abasomba baane, tingoita na gosiria abanto abwo bonsi." 
Isaiah65:9 Nindete omoiborwa korwa ase Yakobo, na omonyamwando korwa ase Yuda oraire ebitunwa biane; abachore baane mbaire ense, na abasomba baane mbamenye aroro." 
Isaiah65:10 Ense omweya ya Saroni nebe oborisia bw’amaicho e ching’ondi, na Ebate y’Akori ebe aase chiombe chikorara. Aase agwo naegwe abanto baane abwo babeire bakondigia." 
Isaiah65:11 “Korende inwe aba mogontiga inche Omonene na kweba egetunwa kiane egechenu, mwaba mokwarigania emesa ase enyasae ekorokwa Gadi, na mwaichoria ebikombe nedivai yochoganirie ase Meni, enyasae ende." 
Isaiah65:12 Ninchike emioro ebaite, nainwe mwensi mobe mogwekumba na gotung’ama moitwe, ekiagera ekero nabarangeretie, timwaitabete, na ekero nare gokwana, timwategererete, korende nigo mwakorete ayarenge amabe ase obosio bwane, mogachora gokora aya atangogeti.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Naama! Abasomba baane mbabe bakonyora endagera bakoria, korende inwe mobe nenchara. Rora, abasomba baane mbanyore ekenyugwa bakonywa, korende inwe mobe nerang’o. Naama! Abasomba baane mbagoke, korende inwe mosooke." 
Isaiah65:14 Ee, abasomba baane mbabe bagotera bare nomosasoko ase chinkoro chiabo, korende inwe mobe mokorera more nobororo ase chinkoro chiaino, mobe mokweng’ereria ase omoika bw’omoichano." 
Isaiah65:15 Namotige amarieta aino aragererigwe nabachore baane, nainche Omonene Nyasae nimbaite inwe, korende abasomba baane nimbaroke ase erieta eriaao." 
Isaiah65:16 Kerabe omonto okwerigeria ogosesenigwa ase ense, oyio nandigie inche Nyasae bw’ekeene imosesenie, na onde bwensi ase ense eye orabe ogotiana, nabe ogotiana asende inche Nyasae bw’ekeene; rirorio nebe ng’a emechando emetang’ani yebirwe na kobiswa korwa ase amaiso aane." 
Isaiah65:17 “Rigereria, nintonge igoro chinyia, na ense enyia. Amang’ana e ritang’ani takoinyorwa gose takorengererigwa." 
Isaiah65:18 Korende inwe mobe nomogoko na omochengo goika kare na kare ase engencho y’ayio ndatonge; rora, nintonge Yerusalemu obe oyo bw’omochengo, na abanto baye babe nomogoko." 
Isaiah65:19 Inche Omonene ninchengere Yerusalemu na kogokera abanto baane; eriogi ri’ebirero tirikoigugwa ase Yerusalemu nonya ng’ake, gose okorera kw’emechando." 
Isaiah65:20 Aroro agwo omwana takobao orakoore amatuko amake oka, gose omonto omogotu takobao otaikeranie amatuko ’obogima bwaye. Oyo orakwe ase oboke bwaye goika abe okoorire emiaka rigana erimo, na omonyabibe takoragererigwa goika abe okoorire emiaka rigana erimo." 
Isaiah65:21 Abanto mbaagache chinyomba na gochimenya, mbasimeke emesabibu ase emegondo yabo, babe bakoria okwama kw’emegondo eyio." 
Isaiah65:22 Tibakoba bakoagacha chinyomba, na abanto abaao bachimenye; tibakoba bagosimeka endagera na abanto abaao bayerie. Buna koreng’ana obogima bw’omote bore, naboigo nobogima bw’abanto baane borabe, na abachore baane mbabe bakogokera emeremo y’amaboko abo ase engaki entambe." 
Isaiah65:23 Barabwo tibakoba bagokora emeremo ya bosa, gose tibakoibora abana barakwe mobosokano, ekiagera bare oroiboro rw’abasesenirie n’Omonene, na abana babo boigo." 
Isaiah65:24 Nebe ng’a ekero batarandangeria nimbairanerie, na ekero barabe bagenderere gokwana nimbaigwe." 
Isaiah65:25 Esese y’orosana na emanwa y’eng’ondi nchibe chikoriseria amo, endo nebe ekorisia obonyansi buna eng’ombe, na orotu ndobe endagera y’eng’iti engenda inse. Ogokora bobe na ogosiria konde gwonsi tikogokorwa ase egetunwa kiane egechenu. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Isaiah66:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Igoro nero ekerogo kiane ki’obonene, na ense negeteni kiane ki’amagoro; inyomba ki moranyare kong’agachera? Gose ng’ai aase are ndanyare gotimokera?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ebinto ebi bionsi ninche nabitongete, ase ayio bionsi pi bikabao. Korende omonto ore omoitongo, ore nomokia bw’ogweitia ase engencho y’ebibe biaye, na okoiguswa ase ring’ana riane, oyio nere ndarigererie.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah66:3 “Oyo okonyenya eng’ombe nere oyio ogoita na omonto, na oyo okorua emanwa y’eng’ondi koba ekeng’wanso nere oyio okobuna esese ebigoti; oyo okorua okoruegwa kw’endagera nere oyio okorua amanyinga ’embeche, na oyo ogosamba ubani nere oyio ogosesenia omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa. Abanto abwo bachorire chinchera chiabo abanyene, na emioyo yabo nigo egokerete ayio bagokora ay’okogechia." 
Isaiah66:4 Ase ayio nainche nimbachorere amaakwa abo na kobarentera obwoba, ekiagera ekero nabarangeretie, onde taitabete, na ekero nakwanete, onde tategererete; nigo bakorete ayarenge amabe ase obosio bwane, nigo bachorete gokora aya atangogeti.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Inwe aba mokoiguswa ase ring’ana ri’Omonene, igwa ring’ana riaye: “Abamino ababagechete na kobaseria ase engencho y’erieta riane batebire iga: Tiga Omonene aegwe obonene, erinde torore omogoko oino. Korende barabwo abanyene mbasookigwe." 
Isaiah66:6 Tegerera moigwe okwoga kore ase omochie ime. Igwa eriogi rikorwa ase Hekalu! Erio neriogi ri’Omonene ekero akoa ababisa baye egesusuro. 
Isaiah66:7 “Omochie oyio onga buna omokungu okoibora atarachaka kobina; ekero konya ataraba nobororo bw’okobina, akaibora omwana omoisia." 
Isaiah66:8 Ning’o ona‐koigwa amang’ana anga buna ayio? Ning’o ona‐korora amang’ana anga buna ayio? Inee! Ense nenyare koiborwa ase rituko erimo? Gose egesaku nkeiborwe ara rimo? Korende ekero omochie o Sayoni ochagete kobina okaibora abana baye erio kegima.” 
Isaiah66:9 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inee! Ninkore engaki y’okoibora eike, ko abana tibaiborwa? Naende Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Inee! Inche nimbe oyo okorua chinguru abana baiborwa, naende ninsieke enda teibora?”" 
Isaiah66:10 “Inwe aba mwanchete Yerusalemu, yogokere na koyochenga! Nainwe mwensi aba mokoyoreera, goka amo noro na gochenga!" 
Isaiah66:11 Bono gonka na moisaneke namabeere aye, monyore okoremigwa ase egekuba kiaye; ee, gonka mono na mogokere obonge bw’obonene bwaye!”" 
Isaiah66:12 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Naama! Nimente ogosesenigwa ase Yerusalemu kobe buna orooche, ninyorentere na obotenenku bw’ebisaku bobe orooche rwaichoire amache, erinde mogonke, naende moimokigwe mobekwe kwaa, moagatwe na gochanchimwa." 
Isaiah66:13 Buna ng’ina agochanchima omwana, naboigo nainche nkobachanchima inwe; ee, nabo morachanchimwe agwo Yerusalemu.”" 
Isaiah66:14 Ekero morarore amang’ana ayio, mosasoke ase chinkoro chiaino; amauga ’emebere yaino nareerete buna obonyansi oborere; erio abanto mbamanye ng’a okoboko kw’Omonene nigo kore amo nabasomba baye, naende ng’a ekeririanda kiaye nigo kere igoro y’ababisa baye." 
Isaiah66:15 “Rora, Omonene nachiche nomorero, ne chigari chiaye chi’esegi chire buna ekembugu‐mbugu. Nigo ararente endamwamu yaye ere nobotindi na ogotogonyera kwaye kore ne chimeme chi’omorero." 
Isaiah66:16 Omonene nanachere abanto ekina na kobaa egesusuro ki’ogosambwa nomorero na goitwa nemioro, na abwo baraitwe n’Omonene nigo barabe abange." 
Isaiah66:17 “Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Abanto bagweatanana na gwechena ase ogosasima ime ase ebigondo bagotang’anwa noyomo ore ase egatigati yabo, abwo bakoria enyama y’embeche, na eye chimbeba, na ey’okogechia konde gwonsi, abwo bonsi mbasirigwe amo." 
Isaiah66:18 Inche Omonene nigo imanyete emeremo yabo, na ebirengererio biabo. Ninchiche gosangereria abanto b’ebisaku bionsi abagokwana emenwa ao ao, nabarabwo mbache barore obonene bwane." 
Isaiah66:19 Nimbeke ekemanyererio ase egati y’abwo; abande b’abwo baratooreke nimbatome bagende ase abanto b’ebisaku, bagende Tarisisi, na ase abanto ba Puli na Ludi, abwo bamanyete korasa nemegwe, bagende Tubali na Yavani, na ase ebisinka ne chinse chi’enyancha chire aare, ase abanto batana koigwa chinkuma chiane, na agwo mbabararerie abanto b’ebisaku obonene bwane." 
Isaiah66:20 Abwo mbarusie abanto bamino korwa ase ebisaku bionsi, erio babarente asende inche Omonene buna bakorenta okoruegwa kw’endagera. Nigo barabariinie chibarasi, ne chigari, na ebirogo bi’okobabogoreria, ne chiyombo, ne chingamia, mbabarente Yerusalemu, ase egetunwa kiane egechenu. Nigo barabarente buna Abaisraeli bakorenta okoruegwa kw’endagera kore ime ase ebikorero ebichenu, bakorenta ase enyomba yane.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Isaiah66:21 Naende Omonene otebire: “Nimbeke abande b’abwo babe abakuani na Abalawi.” 
Isaiah66:22 “Buna koreng’ana igoro chiragenderere kobeera ase obosio bwane, naboigo ne chinderia chiaino chiragenderere kobao amo nerieta riaino boigo.” Nabo Omonene atebire. Naende otebire iga:" 
Isaiah66:23 “Korwa omoyega bw’Omotienyi Omoyia goika oyo bw’Omotienyi onde Omoyia, na korwa Esabato goika Esabato ende, abanto bonsi mbache gosasima ase obosio bwane." 
Isaiah66:24 Ekero barasoke isiko mbarore emebere ekwete y’abanto abwo basaretie korwa asende inche Omonene. Amakonde arabe akoria emebere yabo tagokwa, na omorero orabe okobasamba tokorima. Abwo bakwete mbabe okogechia okobe ase abanto bonsi.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Aya namang’ana akwanetwe na Yeremia, mosinto o Hilikia, oyo orenge oyomo bw’abakuani abarenge ase omochie bw’Anatoti, agwo ase orogongo rwa Benjamin." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia ase omwaka o ikomi na gatato bw’okogamba kwa Yosia mosinto bw’Amoni, omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah1:3 Naende rikamochera ekero Yehoyakimu, mosinto o Yosia, arenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda. Nyuma y’ayio Omonene akaba ogokwana nere ase chingaki chinyinge goika omoerio bw’omwaka o ikomi na rimo bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia mosinto o Yosia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, na omoerio bw’omotienyi o gatano bw’omwaka oria, ekero abanto ba Yerusalemu boosetwe bakairwa ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende rigantebia: 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ekero konya ntaragotonga ase enda ya nyoko nakomanyete, na ekero konya otaraiborwa nagwatananete; nigo nagwatananete na kogochena obe omobani bw’ebisaku.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Erio nkamoiraneria, “Oo! Omonene Nyasae! Inche tinkomanya gokwana, ekiagera inde omwana omoke.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Korende Omonene agantebia, “Tobaisa gokwana ng’a aye nomwana omoke ore, korende ase abanto bande bonsi ndagotome, goika ogende, na amang’ana ande onsi ndagochike, naro orabatebie." 
Jeremiah1:8 Tobaisa kobairoka, ekiagera inche nigo inde amo naye kogokonya. Inche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Omonene akarambora okoboko kwaye, agakuna omonwa one, agantebia, “Rora, nabekire amang’ana aane ime ase omonwa oo." 
Jeremiah1:10 Naama! Rituko ria rero nakoeire okobua igoro y’ebisaku, na igoro y’amaruoti, obe kogosimora na gotagora, kogosaria na koonchorana, gokoagacha na gosimeka.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia: “Yeremia, ngento ki oroche?” Nkamoiraneria, “Nigo ndoche enyimbo y’omote okorokwa omolozi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Kwarorire boronge, ekiagera inche nigo ntengerete, indore ng’a ring’ana riane riaikeranire ase ekeene.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende eria kabere, rikamboria: “Ngento ki oroche?” Nkairaneria, “Nenyongo indoche, ere namache akobera; omonwa oye nigo orochie gocha aa korwa sugusu.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Obobe nabotuboke korwa sugusu, erinde bobachere abanto bonsi bare ase ense eye." 
Jeremiah1:15 Rora, inche Omonene nigo ngoteba: Nkorangeria nde ebisaku bionsi bi’amaruoti a sugusu bichiche aa. Abaruoti babo mbatenenie ebirogo biabo bi’obonene agwo ase abanto bagosoera ase ebiita bia Yerusalemu, na ase chindwaki chiaye chinsemo chionsi, boigo nase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ninachere abanto b’aroro ekina mbae egesusuro ase engencho y’obobe bwabo, ekiagera bantigire inche, basambeire chinyasae ching’ao ubani, naende basasimire emeremo y’amaboko abo." 
Jeremiah1:17 Korende aye kabe omoremu, oimoke, ogende obatebie amang’ana onsi nkogochika. Tobaisa koboboa. Oise koboboa, inche nigo ndakwoboyie ase amasio abo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Naama! Ase rituko ria rero nagokong’irie obe buna omochie ogiteire chindwaki, na buna esiiro y’ekioma, naende buna chindwaki chi’etaai. Nigo orabe kogotenena bokong’u, tokobugwa nense eye yonsi, gose nabaruoti b’Abayuda, gose abanene b’oboruoti boria, gose abakuani b’aroro, gose abanto bonsi b’ense eye." 
Jeremiah1:19 Barabwo mbakorwanie, korende tibagokobua, ekiagera inche nigo inde amo naye ngokonye. Nabo inche Omonene ngoteba.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Jeremiah2:2 “Genda orarie ase abanto ba Yerusalemu, obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Nainyoire buna kwarenge omwegenwa ekero kwarenge omoke, buna kwanyanchete ekero kwarenge omoriakari one, naende buna kwabete kogontunyana agwo ase erooro, ense eria etarenge gosimekwa kende kiameo." 
Jeremiah2:3 Inwe Abaisraeli, nigo mwaatananetwe koba abachenu asende inche Omonene, ogotongora gw’okwama kwane. Abanto bonsi abariete ogotongora okwo nigo babete nokomocha; amabe nigo abanyorete. Nabo inche Omonene ngoteba.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo ne chiamate chionsi chi’Abaisraeli, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Jeremiah2:5 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Mbobe ki chisokoro chiaino chiaroche asende, erinde chigantiga, chikagenda gosasima emegwekano ere bosa?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Barabwo tibaboretie: Inee! Omonene oria otorusetie ase ense ya Misiri, ng’ai are? Ere nigo atoraaete ase erooro, ense eria ere enyomo ere namaoromomo, ense y’eguru‐gura enyomo pa ere ekiriri ki’amakweri. Ense eria omonto atarenge konyara goeta ase egati yaye, agwo omonto nonya noyomo atamenyete." 
Jeremiah2:7 Nkabarenta ase ense y’omoigoto, monyare kogoka ase okwama kwaye na ebinto biaye ebiya. Korende ekero mwachete, mogakora ense yane ekaba entwambu, mogakora omwando one nabaete okaba okogechia." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abakuani tibaboretie: Ng’ai Omonene are? Baria barenge kworokereria amachiko aane, tibamanyete inche; abagambi bagasaria asende; ababani bakaba bakobana ase erieta ri’enyasae ekorokwa Baali; barabwo bagatunyana na gokorera ebinto bitarenge kobakonya.”" 
Jeremiah2:9 Omonene otebire iga: “Inche ningendererete kobagambia inwe ekina, boigo ningambie abana baino, na ororeria rwabo." 
Jeremiah2:10 Amboka gochia ase ebisinka bi’Abakuporo, morore, gose motome abanto gochia Kedari bauna‐unie buya, barore gose egento buna ekio kiana gokorekana aroro." 
Jeremiah2:11 Inee! Gesaku kende kiana koonchoreria chinyasae chiaye, nonya tichiri echi’ekeene? Korende abanto baane bang’onchoreirie inche inde obonene bwabo, banchire egento getari kobakonya." 
Jeremiah2:12 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Inwe igoro chionsi, kumia ase ayio, kabe nobwoba, moiroke na koiguswa!" 
Jeremiah2:13 Abanto baane bakorire amabe abere: bantigire inche inde ensoko y’amache amaya ay’obogima; bakunyire ebisima biabo bi’amache, ebisima biremogete, bitanyare kogacha amache nonya ng’ake.”" 
Jeremiah2:14 “Inee! Abaisraeli nabasomba bare? Gose nigo baiboretwe bare abasomba? Onye taibo, nase ki rende bakoirwa ase obosomba?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Chindo chiarumire asebare, chiarumire namariogi amanene; chirochio chiasaririe ense yabo yabeire erooro; emechie yabo yabeire amaturi atamenyiri nabanto." 
Jeremiah2:16 Abanto ba Memifisi na aba Tapanesi baikaranseire emetwe yaino. 
Jeremiah2:17 Inee! Tari inwe abanyene mwerenteire emechando eye, ekiagera mwantigire inche Omonene, Nyasae oino, ekero naganetie kobaraa ase orogendo rwaino?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Ngento ki mogochia konyora ase okogenda Misiri konywa amache ’orooche rwa Sihori? Gose inki mogochia konyora ase okogenda Asuri konywa amache ’orooche rw’Eufarati? 
Jeremiah2:19 “Obobe bwaino nabobarentere egesusuro; okogwa kwaino korwa ase okwegena nkogere motogonyerwe. Goika momanye na korora ng’a mwerenteire obobe na obororo ekero mwantigire inche Omonene, Nyasae oino, na timonyirogeti.” Nabo Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, atebire." 
Jeremiah2:20 Naende Omonene otebire iga: “Agwo kare inwe nigo mwerusetie rikorogoto riaino, mokaba mwesiboire, mogateba: Titorigeti koba abakoreri b’Omonene. Igoro ase kera ekegoro egetambe, na inse ya kera omote omobese, mogatung’ama mogasasima, timwabete abegenwa asende." 
Jeremiah2:21 Inche nkabasimeka buna omosabibu omuya, korwa ase chimbusuro chingiya mono. Naki rende inwe mwaonchokire na gwesaria, mwagwekanire omosabibu bw’orosana?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Inwe namoisa gwesiberia esabuni ere ne chinguru chi’okorusia riko, ebimoa bi’okomocha kwaino nigo bigendererete koba ase obosio bwane." 
Jeremiah2:23 Naki inwe moranyare goteba: Titori abatachenegeti, titwabwatetie chinyasae chikorokwa Baali? Rigereria chinchera chiaino ase amakura ime, inyora na komanya egento mwakorire; mwabeire buna engamia eaberi ekominyoka gochia aaria na aaria.”" 
Jeremiah2:24 Mwabeire buna etigere eaberi y’orosana enarete ase erooro, ekero ere nokogania nigo ekoeyana mono na gwesesa. Ning’o oranyare gotanga etigere ase okogania kwaye? Etigere etuoni ekoyerigia tekwerosia enyene, ekiagera engaki yaye egoika eganetie erieme neoroke enyene." 
Jeremiah2:25 Renda amagoro aino, timobaisa koba motari nebikoroto, naende timobaisa koba nerang’o. Korende inwe nigo mogoteba: Ayio namang’ana a bosa; nigo twanchete chinyasae chingeni, na echio chioka nachio torabe tokobwatia." 
Jeremiah2:26 “Buna koreng’ana omoibi akoba nobosooku ekero abwatirwe, naboigo n’Abaisraeli bararore obosooku barabwo amo nabaruoti babo, na abanene b’oboruoti bwabo, na ababani babo." 
Jeremiah2:27 Inwe mwensi abamogoteba ng’a, omote noro iso, ne rigena nario nyoko, nigo morasookigwe. Ayio nigo arakoreke, ekiagera mwantigire na kong’a amagega; timong’onchorereti amasio aino. Korende ekero more nemechando mwabora: Inchuo ototoorie." 
Jeremiah2:28 “Inwe Abayuda, ng’ai chinyasae chiaino chire, echio mweroiseretie? Tiga chiche, erinde chibatoorie ekero more nemechando, ekiagera buna emechie yaino ere emenge, nabo nachirochio chire chinyinge." 
Jeremiah2:29 Inche Omonene nakwanire iga: Nase ki mokwemurungania asende? Inwe mwensi mwasaririe asende. 
Jeremiah2:30 Nkaa abana baino egesusuro, korende tikiabarongeetie. Emioro yaino abanyene egaita ababani baino, buna nigo yarenge endo egoita." 
Jeremiah2:31 Inwe Abaisraeli b’ekegori eke, igwera ring’ana riane, inche Omonene. Inee! Inche nigo nabeire buna erooro asemore? Gose nigo nabeire buna ense y’omosunte ekerima asemore? Nase ki inwe abanto baane mogoteba ng’a mobwate obosibore, na timorigeti kong’iranera inche?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Inee! Omoiseke omwekungi nanyare kweba ebinto biaye bi’ogwechabera? Gose omoriakari nkweba are chianga chiaye chi’enyangi? Korende abanto baane banyebire ase amatuko amange mono. 
Jeremiah2:33 Imomanyete buya mono korigia abanchi, nonya nabakungu abanyaka begire chinchera chiaino chimbe." 
Jeremiah2:34 Chianga chiano nigo chibwate ebimoa bi’amanyinga ’abanto abataka batari nokomocha. Ekero mwabaitete timwabanyorete bakobochora chinyomba chiaino, korende nase okogania kwaino mwabaitete." 
Jeremiah2:35 “Nigo mogendererete goteba: Intwe titori nokomocha, na ase ayio Omonene tari nendamwamu asetore. Ekiagera mwakanire ng’a timokoreti ebibe, nimbanachere ekina." 
Jeremiah2:36 Nase ki mokwerosia kobwatia chinchera ching’ao? Inwe mwasookigwe n’Abamisiri buna mwasoogetigwe n’Abaasuri. 
Jeremiah2:37 Nigo morarue asebare, mwetwegete amaboko ase emetwe, ekiagera Omonene bwangire abanto abwo mosemeretie, rirorio timokonyora ogosesenigwa amo nabarabwo.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Omonto karatigane nomokungu oye, na omokungu oria airwe nomonto omoao, inee, omosacha oria omotang’ani nairanere omokungu oria naende? Ense eria tekoba entwambu ase enchera eyio? Inwe mwakorire obotomani nabanchi abange. Na bono moganetie koirana asende?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Rigereria gochia ebitunwa igoro, morore! Ng’aase ki atigarete motakorereti obonyaka bwaino? Mwabeire mogoikaransa ase chinchera mbarabare motengerete buna Omoarabu ase erooro, moganyete abanchi baino. Mwakorire ense yabeire entwambu ase engencho y’obonyaka bwaino na obokayayu bwaino." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ase engencho eyio embura rigengo yatangirwe tegotwa, naboigo nembura y’okwamia endagera. Korende nonya naboigo, amasio aino nigo anga buna ay’abakungu abatayayi, timorochi obosooku." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Na bono iga mwachakire kondangeria mogoteba: Aye tata, aye naye gwatwanchete korwa obwana bwaito." 
Jeremiah3:5 Inee! Omonene nigo aratobee goika kare na kare, na endamwamu yaye nigo eragenderere kobao goika omoerio? Ee, inwe nabo mogoteba, naende nigo mogendererete gokora amabe onsi buna moranyare.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Ekero omoruoti Yosia arenge kogamba, Omonene agakwana nainche, agantebia, “Kwarorire amang’ana aya Abaisraeli batari abegenwa bakorire? Nigo batiirire gochia ase kera ekegoro egetambe, na bakagenda inse ya kera omote omobese, bagakorera obonyaka aroro." 
Jeremiah3:7 Inche nigo narengereretie ng’a ekero bakoorire gokora amang’ana ayio onsi, nigo barang’iranere, korende tibang’iranereti; na Abayuda, abwo batarenge abegenwa, abare buna abasubati bamwabo Abaisraeli, mbaroche amang’ana ayio." 
Jeremiah3:8 Inche nigo naseretie Abaisraeli, abwo bairanete nyuma, nkabaa rirube ri’ogotigana, ekiagera tibarenge abegenwa asende. Nonya naboigo Abayuda, abwo bare buna abasubati bamwabo, tibaroche obosooku, korende barabwo boigo bakagenda gokora obonyaka." 
Jeremiah3:9 Tibabarete obonyaka gose ngento; ase ayio bagakora ense eye ekaba entwambu ase ogotaba abegenwa asende, bakaba bagosasima amagena na emete." 
Jeremiah3:10 Amo nayio onsi Abayuda, abwo bare buna abasubati bamwabo Abaisraeli, batarenge abegenwa, tibang’iranerete ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi, korende ase okong’ainereria gwoka.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah3:11 Erio Omonene agantebia: “Abaisraeli batarenge abegenwa babeire abaronge kobua Abayuda baria bare abang’ainereria. 
Jeremiah3:12 Genda orarie amang’ana aya gochia sugusu, obatebie ng’a inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Inwe Abaisraeli motari abegenwa, ing’iranere; tinkogenderera koba nendamwamu asemore ekiagera ninde namabera. Ninche Omonene nakwanire." 
Jeremiah3:13 Inwe ancha rioka ng’a nabamochi more, naende ng’a mwasaririe asende inche Omonene, Nyasae oino; mwabeire mokogenda gochia aaria na aaria inse y’emete yonsi emebese mogosasima chinyasae ching’ao, timwaigwerete eriogi riane.” Omonene otebire ayio." 
Jeremiah3:14 Naende Omonene otebire iga: “Inwe abana baane motari abegenwa, ing’iranere, ekiagera ninche Omonene oino. Nindusie oyomo oino korwa ase kera omochie, na babere korwa ase kera eamate, mbarente ase egetunwa gia Sayoni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Nimbae inwe abarisia abaya, abarangokie ase enkoro yane, abarabaragerie bare nobong’ani na okomanya." 
Jeremiah3:16 Omonene nigo agoteba ng’a ase amatuko ayio, ekero morabuche na komentekana ase ense eyio, abanto tibagokwana nonya ng’ake igoro y’Esanduku y’Okobwatana kw’Omonene. Eyio tekoinyorwa naende, gose korengererigwa; gose eyende tekoroisigwa." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ase engaki eyio Yerusalemu norokwe Oboikaranso bw’Omonene. Ebisaku bionsi nabisangererekane agwo Yerusalemu, ase obosio bw’Omonene, na tibikogania gotunyana naende oboenenu bwe chinkoro chi’obobe." 
Jeremiah3:18 Ase amatuko ayio, Abayuda na Abaisraeli nababe amo nabarabwo, bachiche korwa ase ense ya sugusu goika ase ense eria naete chisokoro chiaino ekaba omwando obo.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 “Inche Omonene nigo narengereretie buna nare konyara kobabeka inwe ase egati y’abana baane, erinde mbae ense ere engiya mono, ense y’omwando ere engiya kobua ey’ebisaku binde bionsi. Nigo narengereretie ng’a inwe namondoke Tata, na timware koonchoka montige." 
Jeremiah3:20 Korende koreng’ana buna omokungu otari omwegenwa agotiga omosacha oye, naboigo nainwe timori abegenwa asende, mogantiga. Inche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Eriogi riaigurwe igoro ase ebitunwa bire bosa, eriogi ri’Abaisraeli ri’okorera na ogosorora, ekiagera barubanirie chinchera chiabo, banyebire inche Omonene, Nyasae obo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Inwe abanto motari abegenwa, ing’iranere, nainche ningwenie ogotegena kwaino. Inwe nigo mogoteba: “Intwe twakoiraneire, ekiagera naye Omonene, Nyasae oito." 
Jeremiah3:23 Amaene nigo ere bosa koba nogosemeria ase ebigoro na ase chigosori chimbe chire aroro. Omonene, Nyasae oito, nere ore ogotooreka kw’Abaisraeli." 
Jeremiah3:24 Korwa amatuko a kare ay’obwana bwaito, enyasae eria y’obosooku yasiririe emeremo eye chisokoro chiaito chiakorete; yasiririe chitugo chiabo, na abana babo, abamura na abaiseke." 
Jeremiah3:25 Tiga torare inse tobe nobosooku, na echayo ebe asetore, ekiagera twasaririe ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, korwa obwana bwaito goika rero iga, intwe amo ne chisokoro chiaito. Titwamoigwerete Omonene, Nyasae oito.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Omonene otebire iga: “Inwe Abaisraeli, onye morigetie koirana asende, ing’iranere. Motugute emegwekano yaino mogosasima ere okogechia ase obosio bwane, motari nechitang’u‐tang’u." 
Jeremiah4:2 Komoratiane ase ekeene na oboronge, mogoteba: Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, rirorio abanto b’ebisaku bionsi mbesesenie ime yaye, naende mbetogie asare.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Aya naro Omonene agotebia Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu: “Chaka korema embuna timobaisa kobusura ase amagwa ime. 
Jeremiah4:4 Inwe Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu, earokie inwe abanyene, mwerue ase Omonene! Arokia chinkoro chiaino! Motakoreti bo, rirorio endamwamu yane nigo eraoroke igoro asemore buna omorero, na omonto tari orayerimie. Ayio onsi nigo arabe nase engencho y’ogokora kwaino okobe.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Tebia Abayuda, na morarie ase Yerusalemu: “Bugia egetureri ase ense eye yonsi, moake eriogi rinene, motebe: Sangererekana amo, togende ase emechie egiteire chindwaki." 
Jeremiah4:6 Imokia ekemanyererio kiorokie enchera egochia Sayoni; tama motooreke, timobaisa gotebana, ekiagera nkorenta nde obobe na ogosaria okonene korwa sugusu.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Endo yaimokire korwa ase riraro riaye; oria ogosiria ebisaku oimokire, orure aase aye, akore ense yaino ebe bosa; emechie yaino nesarigwe ebe amaturi, atamenyiri nabanto." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ase ayio, eboyie chigunia, morere na kweng’ereria, ekiagera endamwamu enene y’Omonene nigo ere asetore, teraonchoka etotige." 
Jeremiah4:9 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio abaruoti amo nabanene b’oboruoti tibakoba noboremu, abakuani mbaondoke na ababani mbakumie.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Erio ngateba, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, kwabang’ainire abanto aba ba Yerusalemu, ekiagera kwabatebetie ng’a mbabe nomorembe, korende bono omoro obeire ang’e kobaita.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ase engaki eyio abanto aba amo naba Yerusalemu mbatebigwe ring’ana eri: “Omwaga ogosamba buna omorero noguse korwa ase ebigoro bi’erooro gochia ase abanto baane. Omwaga oyio tokoba oyo bw’okoirurera gose bw’ogosonga," 
Jeremiah4:12 korende omwaga oyio ninyotome obe omotindi mono goetania. Bono ninche ndabanachere ekina.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Rora, omobisa nigo agotochera buna amare, nigo abwate chigari chi’esegi chinga buna ekerambauti; chibarasi chiaye nigo chikominyoka chimbero kobua ekeongo. Obobe nobwaito! Ee, twasirigwe." 
Jeremiah4:14 Inwe abanto ba Yerusalemu, chena chinkoro chiaino korwa ase obobe, erinde motoorigwe. Ngoika ririri moragenderere kogacha ebirengererio bi’obobe ime yaino?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Omonto orure ase orogongo rwa Dani, orentire amang’ana neriogi rinene, nigo akoraria obobe korwa ase ense y’Efraimu." 
Jeremiah4:16 Kurera abanto b’ebisaku ng’a amabe ngocha are; raria ase Yerusalemu, motebe: Abagochia koboera ngocha bare korwa ase ense y’aare, bagoaka eriogi ase emechie y’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Ekiagera Abayuda basaririe asende, ababisa babo mbabaetanane buna abarendi b’omogondo bakoyoetanana. Omonene okwanire." 
Jeremiah4:18 Chinchera chiaino, na ogokora kwaino, nabio biagerire amang’ana ayio abanyorire inwe. Oko nakwo ogosirigwa kwaino, na nigo kore nobororo obonge. Obororo obwo bwasoire ime ase chinkoro chiaino." 
Jeremiah4:19 Obee! Obee! Obororo bw’enda yane bwabeire obonene. Enkoro yane nigo egontwoma mono, tinkonyara gokira; naigure eriogi ri’egetureri, ogotaboborwa gw’esegi." 
Jeremiah4:20 Obobe nigo bokoromeng’ana obobe bonde, ense yonsi yasarigwe. Chiema chiane chiasarigwe mobosokano; ebietubo bie chiema chiane biatandoirwe." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ngoika ririri ndagenderere korora ekemanyererio gi’esegi, na koigwa eriogi ri’egetureri rikobugigwa?" 
Jeremiah4:22 “Abanto baane nigo bare abariri, tibamanyeti inche. Barabwo nigo bare buna abana batari nobong’aini, tibamanyeti gento kende. Nigo bare aboge mono ase ogokora ebibe, korende tibamanyeti gokora amaya.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Nkarigereria ense, nkarora yabeire bosa, gento tikiarengeo; nkarigereria gochia igoro, na oborabu bonde tibwarengeo." 
Jeremiah4:24 Nkarigereria gochia ase ebitunwa, nkarora birobio bigotengechigwa, na ebigoro bionsi bikonyegerigwa gochia aaria na aaria." 
Jeremiah4:25 Nkarigereria, nkarora omonto taiyo nonya noyomo; chinyoni chionsi konya chiatamire." 
Jeremiah4:26 Nkarigereria, nkarora ense yarenge kwama, yabeire erooro, emechie yaye yonsi yasarigwe, ekaba amatombe ase obosio bw’Omonene, ase engencho y’endamwamu yaye enene." 
Jeremiah4:27 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Ense yonsi nesarigwe etigare bosa, korende tinkoyesiria kegima." 
Jeremiah4:28 Ase engencho eyio ense nereere na kweumia, igoro nchionchoke chimwame ti, ekiagera ninche nakwanire, naganirie gokora ayio; tinkonyara gweitia gose koonchora ebirengererio biane.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Abanto ba kera omochie mbatame ekero baraigwe amariogi ’abariini chibarasi na ay’abwo babwate amata, mbatame gochia ase amanani, bebise ase ebitare ime. Emechie yonsi netigare bosa, nonya nomonto oyomo tagotigara aroro." 
Jeremiah4:30 Aye oyo gwatigirwe bosa na gwasarigwe, ninki orengereretie ekero okobeka chianga chimonyinga, naende ogwechabera nebinto bie chitahabu, na gosata amaiso ao? Nigo ogwechabera bosa. Abanchi bao bagochayire, na nigo bakorigia gosiria obogima bwao." 
Jeremiah4:31 Naigure okorera buna okw’omokungu okobina aibore; ekerero ekenene buna eki’oyo okoibora omwana omotangi. Okorera okwo nigo kore okorera gwa Sayoni, omoiseke one, ngwesacha are ang’use omoika, okorambora amaboko aye, okorera: “Nakure! Nkong’ita bare!”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Minyoka gochia aaria na aaria ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu, morigererie na komanya. Moriga‐rigie ase chichiiro morore gose monyore omonto oyomo ogokora oboronge na korigia ekeene, erinde inche Omonene inyare kwabera omochie oyo." 
Jeremiah5:2 Nonya bagokwana, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo,” nigo bagotiana ase obong’ainereria." 
Jeremiah5:3 Aye Omonene, Inee, amaiso ao tari korigereria ay’ekeene? Aye okobaaka, korende tibaigwete obororo; aye okobaa egesusuro, korende bangire korongea. Bakaba bakong’etie amasio abo pa, bakaanga gweitia bairane." 
Jeremiah5:4 Erio nkarengereria, “Abanto aba nabataka. Barabwo tibari nobong’aini, ekiagera tibamanyeti enchera y’Omonene, gose ogochika kwa Nyasae obo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ningende ase abanto abanene, nkwane nabarabwo, ekiagera barabwo mbamanyete enchera y’Omonene na ogochika kwa Nyasae obo.” Korende nabarabwo bonsi boigo konya babunire rikorogoto na kobutora ebisibo basiberetwe," 
Jeremiah5:6 Ase engencho eyio endo nerue rinani ebaite; esese y’orosana nerue erooro ebasirie; engo nebaboere ase emechie yabo. Kera omonto ogosoka korwa aroro natandoranwe, ekiagera ogosaria kwabo nokonge, na okogwa kwabo kw’ogontiga nokonene." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Naki ndakore mbaabere? Abana baino bantigire, nigo bagotiana ase chinyasae ching’ao. Ekero nabaete ebinto biisaine nigo babete bagotomana, bakagenda ase chinyomba chi’abakungu abanyaka." 
Jeremiah5:8 Nigo barenge buna chibarasi chiaragerigwe buya chire nokogania, kera omonto akaba okogania omokungu bw’omogisangio oye.”" 
Jeremiah5:9 Naende Omonene akaboria: “Inee! Tinkobaa egesusuro ase amang’ana aya? Tinkweruseria egesiomba ase egesaku buna eke? 
Jeremiah5:10 “Genda moriine ase chindwaki chi’omochie oyio moyosarie, korende timoyokoora kegima. Moarorie chinsagia chi’emesabibu yaye chirueo, ekiagera echio tichiri echi’Omonene." 
Jeremiah5:11 Abanto b’enyomba ya Israeli na eya Yuda tibari abegenwa asende nonya ng’ake. Inche Omonene nakwanire.” 
Jeremiah5:12 Barabwo bakwanire oborimo igoro ase Omonene, batebire, “Omonene tagokora gento kende. Intwe titokorenterwa amabe; titogocherwa korwanigwa nemioro, gose enchara tegocha asetore." 
Jeremiah5:13 Ababani nigo barabe buna embeo ekogusa, tibabwati ring’ana ria Nyasae. Ase ayio barabwo mbakorerwe amang’ana ayio.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, agoteba: “Ekiagera bakwanire ring’ana eri: Naama, inche ninkore amang’ana aane are ime ase omonwa oo abe buna omorero; abanto aba nababe buna chinko, na omorero oria nobasambe.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inwe abanto b’enyomba ya Israeli, nkorenta nde egesaku kerue ense y’aare, kere nechinguru, naende kiarengeo korwa chingaki chia kare, ekio motamanyeti omonwa obo, gose timokomanya ogokwana kw’omonwa obo." 
Jeremiah5:16 Chigochi chie chinsara chiabo nigo chinga buna chimbeera chiasie, bonsi nigo bare abanto chituoni." 
Jeremiah5:17 Barabwo mbarie okwama gwe chindagera chiaino, na abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, ne ching’ondi ne chiombe chiaino, na amasabibu na amako aino. Emechie yaino egiteire chindwaki, eyio mosemeretie, barabwo nabayetagore nemioro.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Naende Omonene otebire, “Nonya nase amatuko ayio tinkobasiria inwe kegima." 
Jeremiah5:19 Abanto baino kobarakoborie: Nase ki Omonene, Nyasae oito, atokoreire amang’ana aya onsi? Aye oiranerie ng’a inche natebire: Koreng’ana buna mwaonchokire mwantigire, naende mwasasimire chinyasae ching’ao aiga ase ense yaino, naboigo mogochia koba abasomba b’abanto abaao ase ense etari eyaino.”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Tebia abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo amang’ana aya, oyararie ase Abayuda:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Inwe abanto abariri motari nobong’aini, igwa amang’ana aya, mobwate amaiso, ko timori korora, mobwate amato, ko timori koigwa." 
Jeremiah5:22 Inee! Inwe timokonyiroka inche Omonene? Timokoiguswa ase obosio bwane? Nigo nabegete omokenye okaba orobebe rw’enyancha, egetango kia botambe enyancha etanyare gotamboka. Nonya nemerindo ekorotwoma, tekonyara korotagora. Nonya ekoimokerera igoro, tekonyara goeta orobebe roria." 
Jeremiah5:23 Korende abanto aba nigo bare ne chinkoro chinkong’u chi’ogotaigwera, baonchokire bantigire." 
Jeremiah5:24 Barabwo tibari gokwana ase chinkoro chiabo: Tiga tomoiroke Omonene, Nyasae oito, oyogotoa embura ase engaki yaye egwenerete; embura y’omochakano na ey’okwamia endagera, naende nere ogotorendera chichuma chibekire ase rigesa." 
Jeremiah5:25 Na bono amamocho aino abatangire timonyora ebinto ebio, na ebibe biaino biatangire ebinto ebiya mwarenge gocha koegwa." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Abakori amabe nigo bakonyorekana ase egati y’abanto baane; abwo nigo bagotega buna abategi be chinyoni, nigo bakobeka amareba babwate abanto." 
Jeremiah5:27 Buna koreng’ana egesera geichire ne chinyoni, naboigo ne chinyomba chiabo chiaichoire nebinto bisakoire; ase engencho eyio babeire ne chinguru, na abanda mono." 
Jeremiah5:28 Banorire na koneta. Tibari gotiga gokora amabe. Tibari kogambera chintakana ebina bi’oboronge bagere bakire, gose tibari gokorera abataka oboronge.”" 
Jeremiah5:29 Naende Omonene okwanire iga: “Inee! Tinkobaa egesusuro ase engencho y’ogokora okwo? Tinkweruseria egesiomba igoro ase egesaku kegokora amang’ana buna ayio? 
Jeremiah5:30 Ogokora gw’okogechia na ogw’okoirokia gwakorekanire ase ense eye. 
Jeremiah5:31 Ababani nigo bakobana oborimo, na abakuani nigo bagwancherana namang’ana abo. Abanto baane nigo banchete amang’ana ayio, korende ninki morakore ekero omoerio orache?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Inwe abanto ba Benjamin, sangererekana amo, motame korwa ase Yerusalemu, erinde mwetoorie. Bugia egetureri ase Tekoa, imokereria ekemanyererio igoro ase Beti‐Hakeremu, ekiagera obobe na ogosaria okonene biarorekanire korwa sugusu." 
Jeremiah6:2 Sayoni oria ogwekaine omoiseke omuya, naende omwereria, ninyosarie." 
Jeremiah6:3 Abarisia mbachiche aroro namaicho abo, batenenie chiema chiabo chinsemo chiaye chionsi; kera omorisia nenyorere aroro aase aye akorisia ching’ondi chiaye." 
Jeremiah6:4 Nigo bagoteba: “Twebeke ang’e korwania Sayoni. Imoka togende toyorwanie mobaso gati! Obobe nobwaito, ekiagera nkoira bore, na emerengari ya mogoroba yamentire koba emetambe." 
Jeremiah6:5 Imoka togende toyorwanie botuko, totagore chinyomba chiaye chi’oboruoti.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Gecha emete, agacha eburi, moboere Yerusalemu. Omochie oyio goika oegwe egesusuro, ekiagera nomochie omobe, ogendererete gochanda abanto bareo." 
Jeremiah6:7 Buna koreng’ana ensoko ekorua amache aye amakenonoku, naboigo na Yerusalemu ogendererete gokora obobe bwaye, obotindi na ogosaria nigo biichire imeo. Amarwaire na amaote aye nigo bire ase obosio bwane botambe." 
Jeremiah6:8 Inwe abanto ba Yerusalemu, tiga amang’ana aya abe ogokurerwa asemore; motaigwereti, inche nigo ndarue asemore mbatige, erio mbasirie, na ense yaino ebe buna erooro etamenyiri nabanto.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Chora abatigari b’Abaisraeli, buna amasabibu amatigari agochorwa. Kabe gokorambora okoboko kwao naende, buna omosangereria amasabibu akoyarusia ase chinsagia." 
Jeremiah6:10 “Ning’o ngotebia aigwe gonkomokurera? Naama! Amato abo tarogeti, tibakonyara gotegerera. Amang’ana ’Omonene abeire echeche asebare, tibari kogokigwa naro." 
Jeremiah6:11 Ase ayio naichoirwe nendamwamu ekorwa ase Omonene, narosire ase okoyetanga. “Yeumore igoro ase abana bare ase enchera y’omochie, na igoro ase ebiombe bi’abasae. Omosacha na omokungu mbairwe, boigo abanto abagotu amo nabwo bagotire mono." 
Jeremiah6:12 Abanto abaao mbaire chinyomba chiabo, amo nabakungu babo na emegondo yabo. Ee, nindambore okoboko kwane, ing’ee abanto b’ense eye egesusuro." 
Jeremiah6:13 Naki abanto babo bonsi, korwa omoke goika omonene, nigo bare ne ribero ri’okonyora ebitoki bi’obong’ainereria. Abakuani na ababani boigo nigo bagokora amang’ana ’oborimo." 
Jeremiah6:14 Batubire amaote ’abanto baane rioka, bagoteba: Omorembe, omorembe, na omorembe tori aande." 
Jeremiah6:15 Inee! Ekero bakorete ebinto ebi bi’okogechia, mbabete nobosooku? Yaya, tibabete nobosooku nonya ng’ake, gose tibaorogetie amasio are nobosooku. Ase engencho eyio nabagwe amo nabanto baria bande baragwe, ekero ndarue egesusuro asebare, nabarabwo nabagwe. Ninche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah6:16 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Tenena ase chinchera, morigererie, moborie momanye chinchera chia kare, ase enchera engiya ere; moyebwatie, nario moranyore obotoereru ase obogima bwaino. “Korende abanto bakaanga, bagateba: Intwe titorigeti koyebwatia." 
Jeremiah6:17 Inche Omonene nkabeka abarendi igoro asemore, nkabachika ng’a bategerere eriogi ri’egetureri, korende barabwo bakaanga, bakabora: Titokoritegerera.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Ase ayio, inwe abanto b’ebisaku, na inwe omoganda bwonsi, tegerera moigwe amang’ana agochia kobanyora abwo bangire." 
Jeremiah6:19 Aye ense, igwa! Naama! Nkorenta inde obobe igoro ase abanto aba, obobe obwo bore okwama kw’emeroberio yabo emebe, ekiagera bangire koigwa amang’ana aane; na ogochika kwane bakwangire." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ubani eria bakondetera korwa Seba, ninki erangwenere, gose ebinto bigotioka buya bakorenta korwa ase ense y’aare? Ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa nabiangire, nonya nebing’wanso biaino binde tibingogeti." 
Jeremiah6:21 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Naama! Nimbeke ebigocha ase amasio ’abanto aba, erio bibagoche bagwe. Abaise na abana babo abamura nabagwe amo: naboigo abagisangio babo na abasani babo amo.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Rora, abanto ngocha bare korwa ense ya sugusu. Egesaku ekenene kere ne chinguru gekorwa aare ase chinsinyo chi’ense." 
Jeremiah6:23 Abanto abwo nigo bagocha babwate amata na amatimo. Nigo bare abatindi batari namabera. Eriogi ri’ebititiro biabo nigo rikoeera buna enyancha ekoeera. Nigo bariinete chibarasi, baroberete buna abanto bagochia korwana esegi, bachire kobarwania inwe abanto ba Sayoni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Twaigure amang’ana igoro y’esegi eyio, amaboko aito aborirwe chinguru; twasoirwe nomoondoko, na obororo buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore bwatosoire." 
Jeremiah6:25 Timosoka isiko kogenda ase emegondo, gose timotaara ase enchera, ekiagera ababisa baino babwate emioro nao bare, na obwoba bwabeire ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Jeremiah6:26 Inwe abanto baane, eboyie chigunia, egara‐garie ase ribu, morere na kobokia amagombo buna omonto okoreera omwana oye omomoima okure. Morere mono, ekiagera oria ogosiria nigo aratochere mobosokano." 
Jeremiah6:27 “Nakobekire aye obe gokorenga abanto baane, naende obateeme buna omoturi ebioma agoteema ebioma biaye, erio obamanye na goteema chinchera chiabo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Bonsi nigo bare abasaria na abanyabigoti bikong’u; nigo bagotaaria obogenki; nigo bare buna etaai na ekioma, bonsi nigo bagokora ay’ogosaria." 
Jeremiah6:29 Omoguba ogouta omorero nigo ogouterera mono, korende ribiria tiriri gwatananwa. Ogochenwa okwo nigo kore okwa bosa, ekiagera obobe tibori korusigwao." 
Jeremiah6:30 Abwo nigo bararokwe chifeta chiangirwe ekiagera inche Omonene nabangire.” 
Jeremiah7:1 Ring’ana rigacha ase Yeremia korwa ase Omonene, rikamotebia" 
Jeremiah7:2 “Genda agwo ase egeita ki’enyomba y’Omonene, na aroro agwo orarie ring’ana eri: Igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene, inwe abanto bonsi ba Yuda aba mogosoa ase ebiita ebio komosasima." 
Jeremiah7:3 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Onchora chinchera chiaino, na ogokora kwaino, na inche nimbatige mogenderere komenya aase aiga." 
Jeremiah7:4 Timobaisa kwegena amang’ana ’obong’ainereria ayio agotebwa: Mbuya tore. Eye nero Hekalu y’Omonene, eye nero Hekalu y’Omonene, eye nero Hekalu y’Omonene!" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Onchora chinchera chiaino na ogokora kwaino, naende mokorerane oboronge, kera omonto noyonde." 
Jeremiah7:6 Motige gokorera bobe omonto omomenyi ore asemore, ne chintakana, na ababoraka, gose aase aiga timoitera amanyinga ’abanto batari na komocha, naende motige gosasima chinyasae ching’ao chiria chirabarentere ogosirigwa." 
Jeremiah7:7 Komoraonchoke, erio inche nimbatige mogenderere komenya aase aiga ase ense naete chisokoro chiaino agwo kare ng’a ebe eyabo kogenderera botambe." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Bono inwe nigo mwegenete amang’ana ’obong’ainereria atari kobakonya. 
Jeremiah7:9 Inee! Nigo mogochia kogenderera koiba, na goita, na gotomana, na gotiana ase oborimo, na gosamba ubani ase enyasae eria Baali, naende gosasima chinyasae chinde ching’ao, echio motamanyeti." 
Jeremiah7:10 Ayio onsi nigo mokoyakora, naende mwachicha ase obosio bwane ase enyomba eye ekorokwa ase erieta riane mwateba: Twatoorigwe! Erio mogendererete gokora okogechia okwo?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Inee! Enyomba eye ekorokwa ase erieta riane iyabeire rikuruma ri’abauri asemore? Inche omonyene narorire amang’ana ayio mogokora. Nabo inche Omonene natebire. 
Jeremiah7:12 Genda bono aase nechorerete agwo Silo; agwo nao ritang’ani nabegete erieta riane rimenyeo. Mwerorere egento nakorete aase aria ase engencho y’obokayayu bw’abanto baane Abaisraeli. 
Jeremiah7:13 Naende inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Bono mwakorire amang’ana aya onsi, timorigeti koigwera ekero ngendererete gokwana nainwe, na ekero nabarangeretie timwaitabete." 
Jeremiah7:14 Ase engencho eyio ninkore enyomba eye ekorokwa ase erieta riane, eye inwe mwegenete, buna nakorete Silo, na ense eye naete chisokoro chiaino amo nainwe ebe boigo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Nimbaserie morue ase obosio bwane, buna naseretie abanto bamino, ororeria rwonsi rw’Efraimu." 
Jeremiah7:16 “Aye Yeremia, tobaisa gosabera abanto aba, gose korera ase engencho y’abwo. Tobaisa gocha gonsorora ase engencho y’abwo, ekiagera tingokoigwa." 
Jeremiah7:17 Inee! Aye torochi amang’ana bagokora agwo ase emechie y’Abayuda, na ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Abana nigo bagochora chinko, na abaise bauta omorero, na abakungu bagokonya obosie koroisia emegati ase enyasae enkungu eria ekorokwa Eting’ana ya Igoro. Naende baumora okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa ase chinyasae ching’ao, bangechia naba nendamwamu." 
Jeremiah7:19 Inche Omonene nigo nkoboria: Inee! Ninche bakogechia? Tibari gwekorera barabwo abanyene amabe na konyora obosooku? 
Jeremiah7:20 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ning’umore endamwamu yane enene, na okogechia kwane igoro y’aase aiga, na igoro ase mwanyabanto, ne ching’iti, na emete y’orosana, na ase chindagera chionsi chi’emegondo. Endamwamu eyio yane nigo eroke buna omorero, na onde tari oranyare koyerimia.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: “Menta ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa ase ebing’wanso binde, morie chinyama echio." 
Jeremiah7:22 Rituko riria narusetie chisokoro chiaino korwa ase ense ya Misiri, tinabatebetie gose tinabachigete igoro ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde." 
Jeremiah7:23 Korende nkabachika, nkabatebia: Monyigwere, na inche nimbe Nyasae oino, na inwe mobe abanto baane. Mobwatie chinchera chionsi nabachikire, erio nario erabe buya asemore." 
Jeremiah7:24 Korende abanto abwo tibanyigwerete, korende bakabwatia ogosemania kwabo abanyene, na oboenenu bwe chinkoro chiabo chi’ebibe. Bakairana gochia nyuma, gose tibagendererete gochia bosio." 
Jeremiah7:25 Korwa engaki eria chisokoro chiaino chiaruete ase ense ya Misiri goika rituko ria rero nabeire nkogenderera gotoma abasomba baane ababani asemore, rituko ase rituko." 
Jeremiah7:26 Nonya naboigo tibanyigwerete, gose gotegerera amang’ana aane, korende bakaba abanyabigoti bikong’u. Bakagenderera gokora amabe mono kobua chisokoro chiabo." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Aye Yeremia, obatebie amang’ana ayio onsi, korende barabwo tibakogotegerera. Nobarangerie, korende tibakogoitabera." 
Jeremiah7:28 Erio obatebie ng’a egesaku eke nakio getamoigwereti Omonene, Nyasae obo, naende tigiancheti Omonene akerongeyie. Ekeene giasirire korwa ase emenwa yabo.”" 
Jeremiah7:29 “Kigita chitukia chiaino, mochitugute, aka eriogi ri’okweng’ereria agwo ase ebigoro bire bosa, ekiagera Omonene bwangire na otigire abanto b’ekegori eke, kiagerire ere abeire nendamwamu." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Omonene otebire: Abanto ba Yuda bakorire ebibe ase obosio bwane, babekire emegwekano y’okogechia ase enyomba eria ekorokwa ase erieta riane, bayekorire yabeire eyetachenegeti." 
Jeremiah7:31 Barabwo baroisirie aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa agwo ase Tofeti, aaria ase Rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu. Agwo basambire abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, nomorero, amang’ana inche ntachigete gose atana koba ase ebirengererio biane." 
Jeremiah7:32 Naende Omonene otebire: Rora, amatuko ngocha are, aase aria atarokwe Tofeti, gose Rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu, korende ndirokwe Rikura ri’Okonyenyera. Abanto mbatindekwe agwo Tofeti, ekiagera aase ande tari." 
Jeremiah7:33 Emebere yabo ekwete nebe endagera ye chinyoni chia igoro ne ching’iti chi’orosana. Omonto tagochiseria ekero chikoria emebere eyio. 
Jeremiah7:34 Ase emechie y’Abayuda na ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu ninsirie eriogi ri’omogoko na eri’omochengo, na eriogi ri’omonyuomi na eri’omoriakari, ekiagera ense yabo nebe bosa.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase engaki eyio amauga ’abaruoti b’Abayuda, na ay’abanene b’oboruoti obwo, na ay’abakuani, na ay’ababani, na aya bonsi abamenyete Yerusalemu, narusigwe ime ase chimbeera chiabo." 
Jeremiah8:2 Nasiarerwe inse y’erioba, na omotienyi ne ching’enang’eni chionsi, ebinto ebio abanto aba banchete gokorera, bakabirigia mono na kobitunyana, naende bakabisasima. Amauga ayio tagosangererigwa amo, gose gotindekwa, korende nabe buna obwoyo bore ase riroba."
