Jeremiah8:3 Abanto abaratigare b’egesaku eke ekebe, baria bare moyo ase chinsemo chionsi ase nabaseretie gochia, mbaganie ogokwa kobua koba moyo. Inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nakwanire." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Aye Yeremia, okwane nabarabwo, obatebie ng’a aya naro inche Omonene ngoteba: Ekero abanto bakogwa, inee, tibari koimoka naende? Onye omonto oonchokire na otigire enchera, tari koonchoka oirana?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Nase ki inwe abanto ba Yerusalemu mogendererete gontiga iga? Mwancheranire nokong’ainererigwa, na mwangire kong’iranera." 
Jeremiah8:6 Nabeire ngotegerera buya mono, korende timori gokwana ekeene. Onde tari ogweitia na koonchoka atige obobe bwaye na koboria: Ngento ki nakorire? Kera omonto nigo agendererete gokora buna anchete, ogwekanire ebarasi ekominyoka gochia ase okorwana esegi." 
Jeremiah8:7 Nonya ne riagonga nigo rimanyete chingaki chiaye, boigo riruma, na egesingororo, na ekeongo nigo chikomanyereria chingaki chiabo chi’okoirana, korende abanto baane tibamanyeti emeroberio inche Omonene nachikire." 
Jeremiah8:8 Naki moranyare goteba ng’a nabang’aini more, naende ng’a mobwate amachiko ’Omonene ase egati yaino? Rora aborokia b’amariko abare abang’ainereria barikire amachiko ’Omonene na koyaonchorana ase okong’ainereria." 
Jeremiah8:9 Abanto abang’aini mbasookigwe mbaichanigwe na gotang’ang’a, ekiagera bangire ring’ana ri’Omonene. Mbong’aini ki bore asebare?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ase ayio ning’ee abanto abaao abakungu babo, na emegondo yabo ninyee abanto barababue. Abanto aba bonsi, korwa omoke goika omonene, nigo bare neribero ri’okonyora ebitoki bi’obong’ainereria. Abakuani na ababani boigo nigo bagokora amang’ana ’oborimo." 
Jeremiah8:11 Batubire amaote ’abanto baane rioka, bagoteba: Omorembe, omorembe, na omorembe tori aande." 
Jeremiah8:12 Inee! Ekero bakorete ebinto ebi bi’okogechia, mbabete nobosooku? Yaya, tibabete nobosooku nonya ng’ake, gose tibaorogetie amasio are nobosooku. Ase engencho eyio nabagwe amo nabanto baria bande baragwe; ekero ndarue egesusuro asebare nabarabwo nabagwe. Ninche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah8:13 Naende Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Nimbarusie mbasirie kegima. Amasabibu takonyorekana ase emesabibu yabo, gose amako ase emeko yabo. Nonya namato ’emete asusanire na kwoma. Ebinto nabaete konya biasirire korwa asebare.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Nase ki toikaransete tokirete‐kiri? Inchuo tosangererekane amo, togende tosoe ase emechie egiteire chindwaki, erinde tokwere aroro. Omonene, Nyasae oito, otonacheire ekina tosire, otoeire amache abekire obosongo tonywe, ekiagera twakorire ebibe asare." 
Jeremiah8:15 Nigo twasemeretie ng’a tonyore omorembe, korende amabe agacha. Tokagania togwenigwe, korende obwoba bogatochera." 
Jeremiah8:16 Chibarasi chi’ababisa baito nigo chikwana korwa Dani, na ase amariogi ay’okwoga gwe chibarasi chiaberi, ense yonsi nigo ekonyegera. Nigo bagocha gosaria ense yaito na ebinto bireo; basarie omochie, basirie nabanto bamenyeteo." 
Jeremiah8:17 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Rora nkobatomera nde ching’iti chingenda inse chire nobosongo; amarubi atatangwe ase okoyaroga, nachirochio nachibarome.”" 
Jeremiah8:18 Obororo bwane nobonene mono, tibokogwenigwa. Narwarire ase enkoro yane ime." 
Jeremiah8:19 Tegerera! Abanto baane nkorera bare korwa ase chinsemo chionsi chi’ense, bakoboria: “Inee! Omonene tari ase Sayoni? Omoruoti o Sayoni tari aroro?” Omonene nigo agoteba; “Nase ki abanto bangechirie nabeire nendamwamu ase ogosasima emegwekano yabo ebombire amo ne chinyasae chiabo chingeni?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Abanto nigo bakorera: “Rigesa riaerire, etoigo yaerire, naintwe titotooregeti.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Ase engencho y’emechando y’abanto baane enkoro yane yachandekire. Nigo nkorera na kweumia, ekiagera naichoirwe nomoondoko." 
Jeremiah8:22 Inee! Amaguta akogwenia naborire Gileadi? Omorwaria tari aroro? Nase ki abanto baane bataragwenigwa? 
Jeremiah9:1 Onye ndiria omotwe one ore koba buna ensoko y’amache, na amaiso aane buna orooche rw’amariga, nigo nare korera omobaso na obotuko ase engencho y’ogoitwa kw’abanto baane bakwete." 
Jeremiah9:2 Onye ndiria nare konyora aase ngotimokera ase erooro, anga nagenda aare, ntige abanto baane, ekiagera bonsi nabatomani, bagosasima emegwekano; barabwo nomoganda bw’abasigaani." 
Jeremiah9:3 Abanto abwo nigo bagokumba chimeme chiabo buna amata; oborimo nigo bomentete koba obonge kobua ekeene ase ense yabo. Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Nigo bagendererete komenta ebibe ase ebibe binde, gose tibamanyeti inche.”" 
Jeremiah9:4 Kera omonto goika erite korwa ase omogisangio oye, gose onde tabaisa kwegena oyomwabo, ekiagera kera oyomo nomoitania, are na kera omogisangio nigo agoetanana gokwana amang’ana ’obogenki." 
Jeremiah9:5 Kera omonto nigo akong’aina omogisangio oye; nonya noyomo tari gokwana ekeene, ekiagera banaririe chimeme chiabo gokwana oborimo. Nigo bagokwana oborimo goika berosirie ase ogokora amabe." 
Jeremiah9:6 Omonene otebire ng’a ase omenyete abanto nigo bagokora oborianania ase oborianania bonde. Na obong’ainereria ase obong’ainereria bonde, bangire konyigwera." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Nimbanyititore ase okobachena na kobateema. Ngento ki rende ndanyare gokorera abanto baane?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Chimeme chiabo nigo chinga buna chinsara chigoita, ekiagera nigo chigokwana amang’ana ’obong’ainereria. Kera omonto nigo agokwana amang’ana ’omorembe ase omogisangio oye ase ebikoba igoro, korende ime ase enkoro yaye nigo akoroberia komotegera oboreba." 
Jeremiah9:9 Inee! Tinkobaa egesusuro ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio? Tinkweruseria egesiomba ase egesaku kenga buna eke?” Nabo Omonene akwanire. 
Jeremiah9:10 “Nindere ase engencho y’ebitunwa, ninyeumie ase engencho y’amarisia e chirooro, ekiagera biomire na gosareka. Monto onde tagoeta ase egati yabo, na amariogi e chiombe chikwana tari koigugwa; chinyoni ne ching’iti chi’orosana chiatamire chiachiire." 
Jeremiah9:11 “Ninsarie Yerusalemu obe chitui chi’amaturi na amakuruma e chisese chi’orosana. Ninsarie emechie ya Yuda ebe bosa aase omonto atanyare komenya.” 
Jeremiah9:12 Aye Omonene ng’ai omonto omong’aini are oyoranyare komanya engencho y’amang’ana aya? Ning’o aye Omonene gwakwanire nere, oyio oranyare goteba egekogera ense yabeire ritongo, na yasarekire buna erooro omonto atanyare goeta ase egati yaye?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Omonene nigo akoiraneria: “Aya nigo akorekanire, ekiagera batigire ogochika kwane nabaete, bangire konyigwera na kobwatia chinchera chiane." 
Jeremiah9:14 Basaririe na babwatirie ebirengererio bie chisokoro chiabo, batunyanire chinyasae chikorokwa Baali, buna chisokoro chiabo chiaborokereretie." 
Jeremiah9:15 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Rora, nae abanto aba ebimeri ebiroro barie, na amache are nobosongo banywe." 
Jeremiah9:16 Nimbaserie gochia ase ebisaku ebio barabwo gose chisokoro chiabo chitabimanyete, nimbatomere abarwani esegi bare nemioro babaite babasirie kegima.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Rengereria amang’ana aya! Rangeria abakungu abamanyete kobokia amagombo bachiche! Toma abanto barangerie abakungu abegerete ayio bachiche!” 
Jeremiah9:18 Abakungu abwo tiga baayerere gocha barere na kobokia amagombo asetore, erinde amariga aiteke korwa ase amaiso aito, na amaiso aito aichorwe naro." 
Jeremiah9:19 Eriogi ri’okorera riaigwekanire korwa Sayoni, rikobora: “Twasirigwe kegima! Twanyorire obosooku obonene. Goika torue ase ense yaito, ekiagera ababisa batagoire chinyomba chiaito.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Inwe abakungu, igwera ring’ana ri’Omonene; amato aino tiga aigwe ring’ana akwanire. Orokereria abaiseke baino bamanye kobokia amagombo, na kera omokungu orokererie omogisangio oye amanye kweumia." 
Jeremiah9:21 Amakweri aeteire ase ebibao biaito, asoire ase chinyomba chiaito chi’obonene, aitire abana ase chinchera, na abasae ase chichiiro." 
Jeremiah9:22 Kwana: “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Abanto mbakwe, na emebere yabo esiarerwe aande onsi, ebe buna esike ase emegondo, na buna emesaima yatigetwe nabagesi, onde takoyesangereria.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Omonto omong’aini tabaisa gwetogeria obong’aini bwaye, gose oyore omonene obonene bwaye, gose oyore omonda obonda bwaye." 
Jeremiah9:24 Korende onye omonto origetie gwetogia, tiga etogie ng’a namanyete inche, ekiagera inche Omonene nigo inde nobwanchani botari koera. Ngokora ayare ay’ekeene na oboronge ase ense, ekiagera ayio naro akongokia. Ninche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 Naende Omonene nigo agoteba: “Rora, amatuko ngocha are, inche ndabae egesusuro abanto baria bonsi barogete, ko nonya nabo nigo bare buna abatarogeti." 
Jeremiah9:26 Abanto abwo nabwo aba: Abamisiri, na Abayuda, na Abaedomu, na Abaamoni, na Abamoabu, amo nabanto bonsi bamenyete ase erooro, abwo bakonacha chitukia chiabo mesia. Abanto aba bonsi b’ebisaku tibarogeti, boigo na Abaisraeli bonsi tibarogeti ase chinkoro chiabo ime.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Inwe Abaisraeli, igwa amang’ana Omonene agoteba." 
Jeremiah10:2 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Timobaisa kweorokereria chingencho chi’abanto b’ebisaku, gose ebimanyererio bikorwa igoro tibibaisa kobaondokia, ebio nigo bikoondokia abanto b’ebisaku." 
Jeremiah10:3 Chinyasae abanto b’ebisaku bagosasima nigo chire echi’oborimo. Omote ore rinani ime nigo okogechwa, na omoroisia omong’aini oyobaacha nekoyo na oroisia emegwekano." 
Jeremiah10:4 Abanto nigo bakoyeooma ne chifeta ne chitahabu, bayeakerania bokong’u nenyundo na emesumari, erinde tenyegerigwa." 
Jeremiah10:5 Emegwekano eyio yabo nigo enga buna ebinto bikogosa chinyoni chire ase emegondo y’amasosa. Emegwekano eyio tekonyara gokwana; nigo ekobogorigwa, ekiagera teri gotaara. Timobaisa koyeiroka, ekiagera tegokora bobe bonde bwensi, gose tekonyara gokora gento kende ekiya.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Aye Omonene, onde tari okogwekaine; aye naye Omonene, na erieta riao nigo rire nokobua okonene." 
Jeremiah10:7 Aye Omoruoti bw’ebisaku, ning’o otagwenereti gokoiroka. Aye nogwenerete oirokwe. Onde tari okogwekaine ase abang’aini bonsi b’ebisaku, gose ase amaruoti abo onsi." 
Jeremiah10:8 Barabwo bonsi tibamanyeti gento, nabariri bare. Naki ogosemigwa korwa ase emegwekano eyio nemete bosa." 
Jeremiah10:9 Eyio nefeta eturire ekorwa Tarisisi, na etahabu ekorwa Ufasi. Nigo ere emeremo y’omoroisia omong’aini na omoturi bw’etahabu. Chianga emegwekano eyio ekobekerwa nigo chire chimbariri ne chimonyinga, chiroisirie nabanto abang’aini." 
Jeremiah10:10 Korende Omonene nere Nyasae bw’ekeene, Nyasae ore moyo, Omoruoti o kare na kare. Ense nigo egotengechigwa ase endamwamu yaye, ebisaku tibikonyara koremereria ekeririanda kiaye." 
Jeremiah10:11 Mobatebie ng’a chinyasae chiria chitatongete igoro na ense nachisire, tichiba inse y’erioba." 
Jeremiah10:12 Omonene nere otongete ense ase okobua kwaye; agatonga ebinto bionsi bi’ense ase obong’aini bwaye, na akarambora igoro ase okomanya kwaye." 
Jeremiah10:13 Ase eriogi riaye amache are igoro chionsi akoeera neriogi, nigo akorenta ritaturi korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense. Nere okorenta chinkoba chire nembura, na omwaga ogusa korwa ase ebigancha biaye." 
Jeremiah10:14 Kera omonto nigo are omoriri ase obong’aini bwaye, na kera omoturi nigo agosookigwa nemegwekano y’ogosasimwa aroisirie, ekiagera emegwekano yaye ney’obong’ainereria, tebwati omoika ime yabo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Eyio mbosa kegima, emeremo eyio nesekererwe. Ekero eraegwe egesusuro, nesirigwe kegima." 
Jeremiah10:16 Omonene oria ore egetari kia Yakobo tagwekaini emegwekano eyio. Ere nere otongete ebinto bionsi. Abaisraeli nigo bare egesaku kere omwando oye; Omonene bw’Emeganda nario erieta riaye. 
Jeremiah10:17 Inwe abwo mwaetananirwe nababisa, sangereria ebinto biaino morue aase agwo." 
Jeremiah10:18 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Ase engaki eye ninserie ne chinguru abwo bonsi bamenyete ase ense eye, nimbarentere ogoichana goika baigwe obororo.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 “Obobe nobwaito, ekiagera twasunyuntirwe. Amaote aito tari kogwenigwa. Intwe nigo twarengereretie: Ekeene, eye nemechando, korende goika toremererie." 
Jeremiah10:20 Chiema chiaito chiasarekire; Chingori chi’ogochisibera chiabutoirwe. Abana baito basirire, tibari aande. Omonto tari ogotenenia chiema naende. Onde tari oratosungere ebitambaa bie chiema chiaito." 
Jeremiah10:21 “Abarisia babeire abariri, tibari korigia oboraai korwa ase Omonene. Ase ayio, tibari kogenderera konyora amaya, riicho riabo rionsi riasiareirwe." 
Jeremiah10:22 Tegerera moigwe! Ebirage bigocha. Riroroche ri’omoganda omonene riaigurwe rigocha korwa sugusu, gocha gosaria emechie y’Abayuda ebe amaturi, ase chisese chi’orosana chiramenye.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 Aye Omonene, nimanyete ng’a enchera y’omonto tekoraagwa nere omonyene, gose omogendi takonyara koraa orogendo rwaye ere omonyene." 
Jeremiah10:24 Aye Omonene, ondongeyie ase okong’a egesusuro, korende ase ekerengo kegwenerete gioka, gose tonkora bo ekero ore nendamwamu, ekiagera nigo orabaise gonsiria." 
Jeremiah10:25 Itera endamwamu yao ase ebisaku bitakomanyeti na ase abanto batari korangeria erieta riao bakonywe. Barabwo basiririe abanto ba Yakobo, ee, babamerire kegima na kobasiria, basaririe obomenyo bwabo bwabeire bosa." 
Jeremiah11:1 Ring’ana rikarua ase Omonene rigacha asende inche Yeremia," 
Jeremiah11:2 rigantebia: “Igwa amang’ana ’okobwatana kw’ogotianania, kwana n’Abayuda na abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah11:3 obatebie: Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Aragererigwe omonto otari koigwera amang’ana ’okobwatana oko" 
Jeremiah11:4 nachigete chisokoro chiaino, ekero nachirusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, ense eria yarenge buna eriko rigosamba. Nigo nabatebetie ng’a kobaranyigwere na bakore onsi aya nabachigete, erio nario baare gocha koba abanto baane, na inche imbe Nyasae obo." 
Jeremiah11:5 Ase enchera eyio nigo nare konyara goikerania eira y’ogotiana narierete chisokoro chiabo ng’a nimbae ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, buna akoregete goika rituko ria rero.” Inche Yeremia nkairaneria, nkabora, “Ee, Omonene, tiga abe bo.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Genda ase emechie y’Abayuda na ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu, orarie amang’ana aya onsi, otebie abanto bategerere amang’ana ’okobwatana okwo na koyakora." 
Jeremiah11:7 Ekero narusetie chisokoro chiaino korwa ase ense ya Misiri, nigo nachikurerete mono ng’a chinyigwere, nonya ngoika rituko ria rero ningendererete gochikurera." 
Jeremiah11:8 Korende tichianyigwerete gose gontegerera. Kera omonto nigo akong’etie enkoro yaye, akagenderera gokora ebibe. Nigo nachichigete chibwate okobwatana koria, korende chikaanga. Ase ayio nkabaikeraneria amang’ana onsi ay’okobwatana koria.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Naende Omonene agantebia, “Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu bareganire." 
Jeremiah11:10 Abwo baonchokire bairaneire ebibe bie chisokoro chiabo, chiria chiangete koigwera amang’ana aane. Bairaneire gosasima chinyasae ching’ao na gochikorera. Ee, Abaisraeli amo n’Abayuda basaririe okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete ne chisokoro chiabo." 
Jeremiah11:11 Ase engencho eyio inche Omonene nkobarentera inde ogosiria, na barabwo tibakonyara gwetooria, na ekero bararere asende, tinkobaigwa." 
Jeremiah11:12 Engaki eria abanto bare ase emechie y’Abayuda, na aba Yerusalemu nabasambere chinyasae echio ubani na korera ase chirochio ng’a chibakonye, korende tichikonyara kobatooria ekero ogosirigwa korabachere." 
Jeremiah11:13 Inwe abanto ba Yuda, chinyasae chiaino nigo chire chinyinge buna emechie yaino ere emenge, na buna chinchera chia Yerusalemu chire chinyinge, naboigo nebisasimero bi’obosooku bire, biria mwaroiseretie Baali, enyasae eria mogosambera ubani." 
Jeremiah11:14 Ase ayio, aye tobaisa gosabera abanto aba, gose korera asende ase engencho ya barabwo, ekiagera inche tinkobaigwa ekero barandangerie ase engencho y’emechando yabo.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 “Abanto aba nyanchete bakorire okogechia. Inki rende bagokora ase enyomba yane? Inee! Chiira bakoria, na ebing’wanso bakorua, nabinyare koonchora ogosirigwa kwabo gokobachera? Ekero mwakorire ebibe, nario mokogoka?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Agwo kare inche Omonene nigo nabarogete” “Omozeituni omobese obwate amazeituni amaya”, korende bono narentire okogukura okonene na koyotongia omorero, ne chinsagia chiaye chiyie chisareke." 
Jeremiah11:17 “Inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nabasimegete, korende bono nachikire amabe abachere, ekiagera inwe Abaisraeli na Abayuda mwangechirie namabe aino ay’ogosamba ubani ase Baali nkaba nendamwamu.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Omonene akamanyia igoro y’ebibe ebio, nainche nkabimanya; nere akanyorokia aya barenge gokora." 
Jeremiah11:19 Korende inche nkaba buna emanwa y’eng’ondi enyororo ekoirwa konyenywa. Tinamanyete ng’a nigo baroberetie amabe asende. Bagakwana iga; “Tiga tosirie omote oyo amo namatunda aye. Tiga toyobutore orue ase ense y’abanto bare moyo, erinde erieta riaye risire kegima tiriinyorwa nonya ng’ake.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 “Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda okonacha ebina ase oboronge; aye okoriga‐rigia ebirengererio bi’enkoro, tiga ndore gokorusia egesiomba asebare, ekiagera nabekire amang’ana aane asore.”" 
Jeremiah11:21 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’abanto b’Anatoti, abwo bakorigia kong’ita, bagoteba ng’a timbaisa kobana ase erieta ri’Omonene, bateba ng’a inse gokora igo nigo barang’ite." 
Jeremiah11:22 Ee, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Nimbae egesusuro; abamura babo nabaitwe ase esegi, na abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, nabakwe nenchara." 
Jeremiah11:23 Gose monto onde obo nonya noyomo tagotigara ore moyo, ekiagera ase omwaka bw’egesusuro kiabo nindetere abanto b’Anatoti amabe.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Aye Omonene, ekero nkoamererania naye, nigo okonyorekana kore omonyene oboronge. Nonya nabo, ngokwana inde naye igoro y’amang’ana ’oboronge. Nase ki chinchera chi’abakori amabe chikoba nogosesenigwa? Nase ki abanto abang’ainereria bagendererete koba buya?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Aye kwabasimekire, nabarabwo bairire emeri inse. Nigo bagokina, naende baama. Barabwo nigo bakomanyete ase emenwa yabo rioka, korende chinkoro chiabo nigo chire aare naye." 
Jeremiah12:3 Korende aye Omonene nomanyete inche, nigo ondoche, na nigo ogoteema ebirengererio biane gose mbire asore. Barusieo abwo ababe buna ching’ondi chigochia konyenywa, obabeke ensemo baganye rituko bagochia konyenywa." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ngoika ririri ense erabe ekorera, na obonyansi bw’ebitii bobe bogendererete kwoma? Ching’iti ne chinyoni chiasirigwe ase engencho y’obobe bw’abanto bamenyeteo, abwo bagoteba: “Omonene takorora amatuko aito ay’omoerio.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 “Onye gokorosa ase okoamererania nabanto bakominyoka namagoro, naki rende oranyare gochia koamererania ne chibarasi chikominyoka? Na onye gokogwa ekero omenyete ase ense ere nomorembe, naki orakore ase amanani amanoru a Yorodan?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Nonya nabamino, abanto b’eamate ya iso, babeire abang’ainereria asore, nigo bagokuura korwa nyuma yao. Nabaisa gokwana amang’ana amaya asore, tobaisa kobegena.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 “Inche natigire abanto baane, natigire abanto bare omwando one. Nabekire abanchwa baane ase amaboko ’ababisa babo." 
Jeremiah12:8 Abanto bare omwando one babeire buna endo ere ase rinani. Baakire amariogi abo mamincha yane. Ase engencho eyio nabagechire. 
Jeremiah12:9 Inee! Abanto bare omwando one nigo babeire buna enyoni ere enkanga ekorigia endagera eetananire ne chinde chire ase orotwari? Genda osangererie ching’iti chi’orosana chionsi chiche koria! 
Jeremiah12:10 Abarisia abange basaririe omogondo one bw’emesabibu, batiringeire inse omogondo one. Bakorire omogondo one oyorenge kongokia ogwekanire buna erooro ere bosa." 
Jeremiah12:11 Bayotigire ore bosa, na ekiagera otigirwe ore bosa, nkorera ore asende. Ense yonsi yabeire erooro, korende omonto tari okorengereria amang’ana ayio." 
Jeremiah12:12 Abasaria batiirire gochia ase ebigoro bi’erooro. Omoro bw’Omonene nigo ogoita na gosaria korwa ensinyo eyemo y’ense goika ensinyo ende. Onde tari omenyete nomorembe. 
Jeremiah12:13 Babusuire engano, korende mbagese amagwa. Babeire bakwerosia ase emeremo, korende tibanyoreti ebitoki. Mwanyorire obosooku ase ogotanyora rigesa, ekiagera Omonene abeire nendamwamu enene asemore.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’abagisangio baane ababe, abwo bagosaria omwando oria naeire Abaisraeli: “Nimbarusie barue ase ense yabo, naende nindusie Abayuda barue ase egati yabo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Na nyuma y’ayio, ekero nabarusirie ase ense eyio, nimbarorere amabera naende, mbairanie naende kera omonto ase omwando oye, na ase ense yaye." 
Jeremiah12:16 Onye ekero ekio abanto abwo bakweorokereria chinchera chi’abanto baane, na gotiana ase erieta riane, bagoteba: Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, buna abwo kare borokereretie abanto baane gotiana ase erieta ri’enyasae Baali, erio nario ndabasesenie na kobairaneria amaya abo, ase egati y’abanto baane." 
Jeremiah12:17 Korende onye egesaku kende gionsi kegochia kwanga konyigwera, rirorio ninkerusieo ngesirie kegima. Ninche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Aya naro Omonene antebirie: “Genda ogore orokini rw’egatani orobeke kenema kiao, korende tobaisa korotobeka ase amache.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Ase ayio, nkagora orokini buna Omonene anchigete, nkeboeria kenema kiane." 
Jeremiah13:3 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende eria kabere, rigantebia," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Imekia orokini orwo kwagora, obegete kenema, ogende goika orooche rw’Eufarati, orobise ase omwenya bw’egetare ime.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Nkagenda nkarobisa aase agwo buna Omonene anchigete. 
Jeremiah13:6 Nyuma y’amatuko amange gaetire Omonene agantebia, “Imoka ogende goika Eufarati, orusie orokini roria nagochigete ng’a orobise aroro, ororente aa.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Nkagenda goika Eufarati, ngakunya aase narobisete, nkarorusia, nkanyora rwasarekire kegima na rororwo tirwagwenerete kende gionsi." 
Jeremiah13:8 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende naende, rigantebia," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ase enchera eyio nabo inche ndasarie oboenenu bw’Abayuda na oboenenu obonene mono bw’abanto ba Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah13:10 Abanto aba abanyabibe bangire koigwera amang’ana aane; babwatirie ebirengererio bie chinkoro chiabo chi’oboenenu, batunyanire chinyasae ching’ao, naende nachio bagokorera na gochisasima. Ase ayio nababe buna orokini orwo rore bosa, rotagwenereti kende gionsi." 
Jeremiah13:11 Buna orokini rokweboerigwa rokwomerera omobere bw’omonto, naboigo nakorete abanto bonsi b’Abaisraeli na bonsi b’Abayuda, erinde banyomerere, babe abanto baane na korenta ogotogigwa na ogosika ase erieta riane, korende barabwo tibanyigwerete. Nabo inche Omonene ngoteba.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Omonene agantebia, “Aye, kwana nabarabwo, obatebie: Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Kera ekeguru nageichorigwe nedivai. Barabwo nigo barakoiranerie ng’a mbamanyete buya kegima ng’a kera ekeguru nigo kegoichorigwa edivai." 
Jeremiah13:13 Erio obatebie: Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Nintindie abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense eye, amo nabaruoti bare ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Daudi, na abakuani, na ababani, na abanto bonsi ba Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah13:14 Nimbatwomanie omonto ase omonto. Nintwomanie abaise na abana babo abamura, gose tinkobarorera amabeebe gose amabera ande onsi ng’a timbaita.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah13:15 Inwe igwa, motegerere; timobaisa koenena, ekiagera Omonene nere okwanire." 
Jeremiah13:16 Motogie Omonene, Nyasae oino, ritang’ani atararenta omosunte nainwe mogochwe amagoro, ekero rikogoroba ase ebitunwa. Ase engaki eria morabe mosemeretie konyora oborabu, naonchore oborabu obwo bobe obomwamu na abokore bobe omosunte omonene." 
Jeremiah13:17 Korende onye timogotegerera, inche nindere bobisi ase engencho y’oboenenu bwaino. Nindere nobororo obonge, na amariga amange aiteke korwa ase amaiso aane, ekiagera riicho ri’Omonene rioosirwe na koirwa ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah13:18 Omonene agantebia, “Tebia omoruoti na ng’ina bekeyie babe abaitongo ekiagera chigutwa chiabo chingiya chiarusigwe ase emetwe yabo.”" 
Jeremiah13:19 Emechie y’ensemo ya irianyi yasiekirwe ebiita biaye, monto onde takobiigora. Abayuda bonsi boosirwe bairirwe ase obosomba, bairirwe kegima." 
Jeremiah13:20 Imokereria amaiso aino igoro, rora abanto baria bagocha korwa sugusu. Inee! Ng’ai rire riicho riria rigiya kwaetwe?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Ninki oratebe ekero abanto abwo gwakorire koba abasani bao barabe abatang’ani igoro asore? Inee! Tokoba nobororo obonene buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore? 
Jeremiah13:22 Oise kweboria ase enkoro yao ime ng’a nase ki amang’ana ayio agocheire, manya ng’a nase engencho y’ebibe biao ebinene. Ebibe ebio biagerire chianga chiao chiasiorigwe na obogetirianda bwao bwarorekanire." 
Jeremiah13:23 Inee! Omoetiopia nanyare koonchora ekieni kie risankwa riaye, gose engo nenyare koonchora amatonto aye? Onye naboigo, inwe aba mwanarire gokora ebibe rirorio monyare gokora amaya." 
Jeremiah13:24 Nimbasiarere buna omoiriro ogosiarerwa nomwaga korwa ase erooro. 
Jeremiah13:25 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Eke nakio kerabe egetari kiaino ndabae, ekiagera mwanyebire na mwasemeirie amang’ana ’oborimo." 
Jeremiah13:26 Inche omonyene nimbasiorie chianga chiaino chiike amasio aino igoro, erinde obogetirianda bwaino bororekane." 
Jeremiah13:27 Narorire okogechia kwaino, na obonyaka bwaino obobe, na obotomani bwaino. Narorire ng’a timwarenge abegenwa asende, nigo mwasasimete chinyasae ching’ao ase ebigoro bire ase ebitii. Aye Yerusalemu, obobe nobwao! Nengaki eng’ana naki oraire otarachenwa?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ring’ana eri ri’Omonene rikamochera Yeremia. Omonene akamotebia igoro y’eguru‐gura: 
Jeremiah14:2 “Ense y’Abayuda nkorera ere, na ebiita biaye biatagoirwe, biagure inse. Abanto b’ense eyio baiyerigwe inse, nkweumia bare, ekerero ki’abanto ba Yerusalemu giaikire igoro." 
Jeremiah14:3 Abanto abanene nigo bagotoma abasomba babo bagende korenta amache, bagoika ase chinsoko, banyora amache taiyo; bairana ne chinyongo chire bosa. Nigo bagosookigwa na gokwa emioyo, baba batubete emetwe yabo." 
Jeremiah14:4 Ekiagera embura teri gotwa ase ense, ne riroba riomire pa, abaremi barorire obosooku na gotuba emetwe yabo." 
Jeremiah14:5 Chingabi chire orosana nigo chigotiga chimanwa chiabo ching’are chire chioka, ekiagera obonyansi bwaborire." 
Jeremiah14:6 Chitigere chi’orosana nigo chigotenena ase ebigoro igoro, nigo chikoeyana bwango buna chisese chi’orosana. Amaiso abo agoyanire ekiagera ebimeri biasirire.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 “Aye Omonene, nonya ebibe biaito bigotosoera, otokonye ase engencho y’erieta riao; twairanire nyuma ara aange, twakorire ebibe asore." 
Jeremiah14:8 Aye oyore ogosemeria kw’Abaisraeli, na Omotooria obo ase engaki y’emechando, nase ki aye okoba buna omomenyi ase ense eye, buna omoeti okogobera arigie aase arare ase obotuko bwoka?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Nase ki aye okoba buna omonto otantanigwe, buna oyore nokobua, korende otanyare gotooria? Korende nonya naboigo, aye Omonene nigo ore ase egati yaito, naintwe nigo tokorokwa ase erieta riao; tobaisa gototiga.”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’abanto aba: “Barabwo nigo banchete okona‐koombogana, tibari gotanga amagoro abo. Ase engencho eyio inche Omonene tinkobanchera, korende goika ing’inyore ebibe biabo, nimbae egesusuro ase ebibe ebio.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Omonene agankania, agantebia, “Tobaisa gonsaba ase engencho y’abanto aba ng’a mbasesenie." 
Jeremiah14:12 Nabaisa kweng’ata, inche tinkoigwa okorera kwabo; gose nabaisa korua ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, tingwanchera ebinto ebio. Goika mbaite nemioro, na enchara na amarwaire agoita, erinde mbasirie kegima.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Erio inche ngateba, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, Naama, ababani nigo bagotebia abanto ng’a tibakorora esegi ekobachera, gose enchara, ekiagera nkwabarierete eira ng’a omorembe nobe ase ense yabo.”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Naende Omonene agantebia, “Ababani abwo nigo bakobana oborimo ase erieta riane. Inche tinabatomete, gose tinabachigete, gose tinakwanete nabarabwo. Barabwo nigo bakobabanera amaroro ’oborimo, na oboringoria bwa bosa, na obong’ainereria bw’ebirengererio biabo abanyene." 
Jeremiah14:15 Ase ayio inche Omonene nigo ngoteba igoro ase ababani abwo bakobana goetera ase erieta riane batatomiri nainche: Barabwo nigo bagokwana ng’a esegi na enchara tibikonyara korentwa ase ense eye. Ababani abwo nabaitwe nemioro, na enchara, goika basirigwe kegima." 
Jeremiah14:16 Abanto babaneirwe nababani abwo, mbakwe nenchara, nabaitwe nemioro, batugutwe ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu, na monto onde tari orabatindeke. Abakungu babo, na abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, nabakorwe boigo. Naboigo ndabairanerie amabe abo.”" 
Jeremiah14:17 Omonene agantebia ng’a ntebie abanto abwo ring’ana eri: “Amariga nigo agoiteka korwa ase amaiso aane obotuko na omobaso, gose tagokama goiteka, ekiagera omoiseke oria omwekungi, engencho yaye abanto baane, oakirwe, bwatirwe chingoma chimbe chitanyare kogwenigwa." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ekero ngosoka gochia ase ebitii, nigo nkorora ebitondo biaitirwe nemioro, na ekero ngosoa ase omochie, nigo nkorora abanto bachandegete nenchara. Ababani amo nabakuani nigo bakona‐goetanana, korende tibamanyeti ense eye bakogenda.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Inee! Nkwangire Abayuda kegima? Nigo kwagechire Sayoni? Nase ki gwatoakire, na onde tari ogotogwenia? Nigo twasemeretie konyora omorembe, korende titori koyonyora. Togasemeria okogwenigwa, korende tokaba nomoondoko." 
Jeremiah14:20 Aye Omonene, twamanyire obobe bwaito na ebibe bie chisokoro chiaito, twakorire ebibe asore." 
Jeremiah14:21 Ase engencho y’erieta riao, koranche tototuguta. Totiga ekerogo kiao ki’obonene gechaywe. Inyora okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania gwakorete naintwe, gose togosaria." 
Jeremiah14:22 Inee! Emegwekano y’ogosasimwa y’abanto b’ebisaku nenyare korenta embura? Gose igoro enyene enyare korenta embura? Inee! Aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, tari aye tosemeretie? Nigo togosemeretie, ekiagera naye gwakorire aya onsi." 
Jeremiah15:1 Erio Omonene agakwana nainche, agantebia, “Nonya Musa na Samweli barenge gotenena ase obosio bwane gonsorora, tinarenge koonchoka indorere abanto aba amabera. Baserie barue ase obosio bwane, bagende kegima." 
Jeremiah15:2 Barabwo kobarakoborie ng’a ng’ai bakogenda, obatebie: Aya naro Omonene agoteba:” “Abanto baria bagochia gokwa ase oborwaire bogoita, baitwe naborobwo, na abagochia goitwa nemioro, baitwe nero; baria bagochia gokwa ase enchara, bakwe nenchara, na baria bagochia gwoswa, booswe bairwe." 
Jeremiah15:3 “Inche Omonene nigo nachikire ng’a amaakwa e chingencho inye nabanyore abasirie: Emioro ebaite, ne chisese chibatandorane, ne chinyoni amo ne ching’iti chi’orosana chibarie na kobasiria." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ninkore amagambi onsi are ase ense aichanigwe na koondoka ase amang’ana arabanyore ase engencho y’obobe obwo Manase, mosinto bwa Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, akorete agwo Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Inwe abanto ba Yerusalemu, ning’o orabarorere amabeebe, gose abechandere, gose oraonchoke gocha asemore, baborie amang’ana aino?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Inwe abanyene mwanyangire, mwairanire nyuma, mwantigire. Ase engencho eyio naramboire okoboko kwane kobasiria kegima, ekiagera narosire ase okobarorera amabera." 
Jeremiah15:7 Inche nabasongire ase emechie yonsi y’ense yabo. Naitire abana babo; nasiririe abanto baane, ekiagera tibang’onchokereti batige chinchera chiabo." 
Jeremiah15:8 Abakungu ababoraka batigaire abange mono kobua omokenye o nyancha; narentire abaiti baitire abamura mobaso gati na batigire abang’ina bare bosa; narentire obororo na omoondoko gocha igoro asebare mobosokano. 
Jeremiah15:9 Nonya nomokungu oiborete abana batano na babere, nigo akogireka ase omoichano; erioba ri’obogima bwaye riagure kobore mobaso, osookigwe na goichanigwa. Nindue abatigari baitwe nemioro y’ababisa babo”. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah15:10 Obobe nobwane! Ninki kiagerete baba akanyibora? Nigo inde omonto okwomanigwa, nigo nkoamereranigwa ase ense eye yonsi. Tinana koa omonto onde egento singo, gose koegwa singo nonde, erinde inyore ebitoki, korende kera omonto nigo akondagereria." 
Jeremiah15:11 Omonene otebire: “Ekeene, ninkobeke chinguru, ngosesenie. Ase engaki y’emechando nimbetererie ababisa bao batung’ame ase obosio bwao." 
Jeremiah15:12 Inee! Omonto nanyare kobuna ekioma, ekio gekorwa sugusu, gose etaai?" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Obotenenku ne chinibo chiaino nimbirue bibe ebisakorwa, tibigoakanwa, ekiagera mwakorire ebibe ebinge ase ense yaino yonsi." 
Jeremiah15:14 Nimbakore mobe abasomba mokorere ababisa baino ase ense inwe motamanyeti, ekiagera endamwamu yane nigo ere buna omorero outirwe, noro nosambe kogenderera botambe.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 “Ee, Omonene, nomanyete buya; ong’inyore, onkonye na konduseria egesiomba ase baria bagonchanda. Aye nomoremereria ore, tobaisa kondusiao. Nomanyete ng’a ase engencho y’erieta riao nachayirwe na gokorerwa bobe." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ekero nanyorete amang’ana ao, ayio nigo abete endagera yane, ee, amang’ana ao agaichoria enkoro yane nomochengo, akangokia, ekiagera inche nigo nkorokwa ase erieta riao, aye Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda." 
Jeremiah15:17 Tinaikaransete amo nekeombe ki’abanto banchete esekererio, gose tinegogetie ase kende gionsi ekebe. Nigo nabete ngoikaransa ao inche bweka, ekiagera okoboko kwao kwanditoerete, aye kwang’ichoirie nekeririanda." 
Jeremiah15:18 Nase ki obororo bwane bogendererete botari koera, na amaote aane atari kogwena? Inee! Aye nigo okoba asende buna akarooche ntasemereti, akwo amache aye agokama?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Aye korairane, ninkoe ribaga ong’iranere, naye notenene ase obosio bwane. Aye korakwane amang’ana amaronge, na tari amang’ana atari nengencho, rirorio nobe ribaga ri’omonwa one. Abanto abwo mbakoiranere aye, korende aye tokobairanera barabwo." 
Jeremiah15:20 Inche ningokore obe orwaki orokong’u rw’etaai ase abanto aba. Barabwo mbakorwanie esegi, korende tibagokobua, ekiagera inche nigo inde amo naye, ngokonye na kogotooria. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ningokonye nkorusie ase amaboko ’abakori amabe na korwa ase abanto abatindi.” 
Jeremiah16:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Tobaisa konyuoma omokungu bw’aase aiga, gose koiborera abana, abamura na abaiseke, aase aiga." 
Jeremiah16:3 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’abana, abamura na abaiseke, abwo baiboreire aiga, naboigo igoro y’abang’ina na abaise babaiborerete aiga ase ense eye:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Amarwaire amabe nabaite bakwe. Tibakoreerwa, gose gotindekwa, korende emebere yabo nigo erabe buna obwoyo igoro ase ense. Nigo baraitwe nemioro na enchara, na emebere yabo ekwete nebe endagera ye chinyoni chia igoro na eye ching’iti chi’ense." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Tobaisa gosoa ase enyomba ase abanto bakorera gose kobokia amagombo, na tobaisa koreera onde bwensi, gose kobaichanera. Inche narusirie omorembe one na obwanchani bwane bwa botambe, na amabera aane korwa ase abanto aba." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abanto abanene na abake bare ase ense eye goika bakwe. Tibagotindekwa, na monto onde tari orabareere, gose gwekeba omobere, gose gokigita etukia ase engencho yabo." 
Jeremiah16:7 Monto onde takoa oria okwereire endagera ase okomoremia; na oria okoreera ise gose ng’ina takoremigwa ase okoegwa ekenyugwa. 
Jeremiah16:8 “Tobaisa gosoa enyomba y’abanto bagokora omoyega na goikaransa agwo ase okoria na konywa amo nabarabwo. 
Jeremiah16:9 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Ase engaki yaino ekero morigereretie ninsirie eriogi ri’omogoko, na erie chigosori, na eri’omonyuomi, na eri’omoriakari." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Ekero oratebie abanto amang’ana aya onsi, barabwo babe bagokoboria: Nase ki Omonene arentire obobe obo obonene asetore? Obobe bwaito mborobi? Ebibe twakorire ase Omonene, Nyasae oito, mbiribi?" 
Jeremiah16:11 Erio obairanerie, obatebie ng’a Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Chisokoro chiaino nigo chiantigete, chikarigia chinyasae ching’ao, chigachikorera na gochisasima, chigantiga na chikaanga korenda amachiko aane." 
Jeremiah16:12 Nainwe mwakorire amabe kobua chisokoro chiaino, ekiagera kera oyomo oino nigo akobwatia obomwenu bw’enkoro yaye embe, bwanga konyigwera." 
Jeremiah16:13 Ase engencho eyio nimbaserie morue ase ense eye, mogende ase ense inwe motamanyeti, gose chisokoro chiaino chitamanyete. Ase ense eyio namokorere chinyasae ching’ao omobaso na obotuko, gose tinkobarorera amabera.”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Omonene otebire ng’a amatuko ngocha are, ekero abanto batakwane: “Ekeene, buna omonene are moyo, oyio orusetie Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Jeremiah16:15 Ribaga ri’ayio nigo barakwane: “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, oyio orusetie Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya sugusu, na korwa ase chinse chionsi, agwo ase abaseretie gochia”. Ayio nakoreke, ekiagera inche nimbairanie, mbarente ase ense yabo abanyene, eyio naete chisokoro chiabo." 
Jeremiah16:16 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Nindangerie abarubi abange bachiche, barube abanto aba; nyuma y’ayio nindangerie abatwari abange bachiche batware abanto korwa ase kera egetunwa, na kera ekegoro, na korwa ase amakuruma ’ebitare." 
Jeremiah16:17 Amaiso aane nigo aroche chinchera chiabo chionsi. Tibakonyara kwebisa korwa asende. Nigo ndoche ebibe biabo. 
Jeremiah16:18 Nimbae egesusuro ara kabere ase engencho y’obobe na ebibe biabo, ekiagera bakorire ense ere omwando one koba eyetachenegeti ase okoyeichoria nemegwekano y’okogechia etari moyo.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Aye Omonene, naye chinguru chiane na orwaki rwane, nigo ore obotamero bwane ase rituko ri’emechando. Ebisaku bie chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense mbichiche asore na goteba: “Chisokoro chiaito nigo chianyorete obong’ainereria bwoka buna omwando, na emegwekano y’ogosasimwa ere bosa, eyio tekonyara gokonya kende." 
Jeremiah16:20 Inee! Omonto nanyare kweroiseria chinyasae? Yaya, taibo. Echio tichiri Nyasae.”" 
Jeremiah16:21 “Ase ayio, rora, ase engaki eyio ninyemanyekanie ase abanto bamanye chinguru chiane na okobua kwane, erinde bamanye ng’a erieta riane n’Omonene." 
Jeremiah17:1 “Ebibe bi’Abayuda nigo birikire nekaramu y’ekioma, na komang’erwa ne rigena rikong’u rikorokwa alimasi, ase chinkoro chiabo ime, na ase emegwekano ye chingunchara ere ase ebisasimero biabo." 
Jeremiah17:2 Naboigo abana babo nigo bagendererete gosasima ase ebisasimero biabo, na ase emete yabo y’Asera, enyasae yabo enkungu, na ase emete emebese, na ase ebigoro ebitambe," 
Jeremiah17:3 na ase ebitunwa bire ase egetii aarabu. Nindue obotenenku bwaino ne chinibo chiaino, bisakorwe biirwe, na nigo moegwe egesusuro ki’ebibe biaino mwakorire ase ense yaino yonsi." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ase ayio namotige omwando oyo nabaete, na inche mbatige mokorere ababisa baino ase ense inwe motamanyeti, ekiagera endamwamu yane nigo ere buna omorero outire, nosambe kogenderera botambe.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Oragererigwe omonto oyo osemeretie mwanyabanto na kwegena chinguru chia mwanyabanto, oyio okoonchoka ase enkoro yaye ontiga inche Omonene." 
Jeremiah17:6 Omonto oyio nigo anga buna egetutu ki’erooro kiomire, takorora amang’ana ande onsi amaya akomochera. Namenye aase aomo agwo ase erooro, ase ense ere nomonyo etamenyiri na onde." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Nasesenirie omonto oria omosemeretie Omonene, ekiagera Omonene nere ogosemeria kwaye." 
Jeremiah17:8 Omonto oyio nigo anga buna omote osimekire ase orooche mbarabare, na emeri yaye nigo ekoranda gochia ase orooche ime. Omote oyio tori kwoboa eguru‐gura, ekiagera amato aye nigo akogenderera koba amabese; tori gochandeka ase engencho y’eguru‐gura, tori gotiga kwama okwama kwaye." 
Jeremiah17:9 “Enkoro nigo ere eng’ainereria mono goetania ebinto bionsi, na nigo ere ensareku kegima. Ning’o orayemanye buna ere?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Inche Omonene nigo nkoriga‐rigia ebirengererio bia mwanyabanto, na korenga chinkoro chiabo, erinde ng’ee kera omonto koreng’ana ne chinchera chiaye, na buna okwama kw’ogokora kwaye kore.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Omonto okonyora obotenenku ase enchera y’obong’ainereria, nigo anga buna enkware ekorarera amagena etabiareti. Obotenenku obwo nigo bogosira korwa asare gaikire obogima bwaye gati, ase omoerio oye nigo agotigara ore omoriri." 
Jeremiah17:12 Aase Hekalu yaito Enchenu ere, nao agwo ekerogo ki’obonene kiabegetwe korwa omochakano." 
Jeremiah17:13 Aye Omonene ore ogosemeria kw’Abaisraeli, abanto abwo bagotigire nigo banyorire obosooku; ee, abwo baonchokire na kogotiga nigo barasire buna ririko ririkire ase riroba, ekiagera bagotigire aye Omonene ore ensoko y’amache are moyo." 
Jeremiah17:14 Aye Omonene, ingwenie, nainche ningwene; intoorie, nainche nintooreke, ekiagera naye ngotogia." 
Jeremiah17:15 Rora, abanto nigo bakomboria: “Ng’ai ring’ana ri’Omonene rire? Tiga riikeranigwe.”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Omonene, tinana gotiga koba omorisia gose gotiga kogotunyana, gose tinana kogania ng’a rituko ri’ogosiria richiche. Omonene, nomanyete amang’ana ayio. Aya nakwanete nigo akwanetwe ase obosio bwao." 
Jeremiah17:17 Tobaisa kong’ondokia, ekiagera naye ore obotamero bwane ase rituko ri’emechando." 
Jeremiah17:18 Abanto abwo bagonchanda tiga barenterwe obosooku, korende inche timbaisa korenterwa obosooku. Barabwo tiga baichanigwe, korende inche ting’ichanigwa. Rituko ri’emechando tiga richiche igoro asebare, basirigwe nogosirigwa ara kabere." 
Jeremiah17:19 Aya naro Omonene antebetie: “Genda otenene ase Egeita ki’Abanto, agwo ase abaruoti b’Abayuda bagosoera na gosokera, naende ase ebiita binde bionsi bia Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah17:20 obatebie iga: Inwe abaruoti b’Abayuda na inwe Abayuda mwensi, na inwe mwensi aba Yerusalemu, aba mogosoera ebiita ebi, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Jeremiah17:21 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Onye moganetie gotooria obogima bwaino, mwerende, timobaisa kobogoria egurube ende yonsi ase rituko ri’Esabato, gose koyesoyia ase ebiita bia Yerusalemu ase rituko erio." 
Jeremiah17:22 Rituko ri’Esabato timobaisa gosokia egurube ende yonsi korwa ase chinyomba chiaino na koyebogoria, gose timobaisa gokora emeremo ende yonsi, korende morende rituko ri’Esabato ribe richenu, buna nachigete chisokoro chiaino." 
Jeremiah17:23 Korende barabwo nigo baangete tibaigwerete gose gotegerera; nigo barenge abanyabigoti bikong’u ng’a tibabaisa koigwa na gwancha amorokererio. 
Jeremiah17:24 “Naende Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Monyigwere, timorenta egurube ende yonsi ase ebiita bi’omochie oyo ase rituko ri’Esabato; morende rituko ri’Esabato ribe richenu, na timokora emeremo ende yonsi ase rituko erio." 
Jeremiah17:25 Komoranyigwere igo, rirorio abaruoti abarache goikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Daudi nabasoere ase ebiita bi’omochie oyo. Abaruoti abwo amo nabanene b’oboruoti obwo, na abanto ba Yuda, na aba Yerusalemu, nababe bakoriina ne chibarasi, na abanto nabagenderere komenya ase omochie oyo botambe." 
Jeremiah17:26 Abanto nabachiche korwa ase emechie y’Abayuda, na korwa ase chinsemo chionsi chiaetanaine Yerusalemu, na korwa ase ense ya Benjamin na ense omweya, na korwa ase ense y’ebitunwa, na Negebu. Barabwo mbarente ase enyomba y’Omonene ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ubani, na okuruegwa gw’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
Jeremiah17:27 Goika monyigwere, erinde morende rituko ri’Esabato ribe richenu, gose timobaisa gosoyia egurube ende yonsi ase ebiita bia Yerusalemu ase rituko erio. Onye timokonyigwera, rirorio inche nintongie omorero ase ebiita bi’omochie oyio, noro nosambe na osirie chinyomba chi’oboruoti chire agwo Yerusalemu, na omorero oyio tokorimigwa.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Ring’ana rikarwa ase Omonene rigacha asende inche Yeremia, rigantebia," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Imoka, otirimboke, ogende ase enyomba y’omokori chinyongo, ningotebie amang’ana aane.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Ase ayio nkagenda ngaika ase enyomba eyio y’omokori chinyongo. Ere nigo arenge gokora emeremo ase emesa yaye y’okoroisia chinyongo. 
Jeremiah18:4 Enyongo y’amaroba arenge koroisia egasareka ase okoboko kwaye. Ase ayio akabomba esike eria naende, akaroisia enyongo ende buna aganetie ebe." 
Jeremiah18:5 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Inwe Abaisraeli, Inee, tinkonyara kobakora inwe buna omokori chinyongo oyo akorete? Ee, inwe Abaisraeli, buna koreng’ana esike ere ase okoboko kw’omokori chinyongo, naboigo nainwe more ase okoboko kwane." 
Jeremiah18:7 Engaki ende yonsi ndakwane igoro y’egesaku, gose oboruoti, ng’a ngochia koborusia inde aroro, mbotagore na kobasiria kegima," 
Jeremiah18:8 na abanto b’oboruoti obwo nakwanire amang’ana aane igoro asebare, kobaraonchoke na batige ebibe biabo, na inche ning’onchoke ntige amabe aria nare gochia gokora asebare." 
Jeremiah18:9 Na engaki ende yonsi inche ndakwane igoro y’okoagacha na gokinia abanto b’egesaku gose oboruoti," 
Jeremiah18:10 na abanto abwo kobarakore ebibe ase obosio bwane baange konyigwera, inche ning’onchoke, ntige amaya aria narengereretie kobakorera." 
Jeremiah18:11 Bono tebia Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu ng’a: Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Naama! Nkoroisia inde na nkore emeroberio emebe igoro asemore. Kera oyomo tiga airane atige chinchera chi’obobe, morongeyie chingencho chiaino na ogokora kwaino." 
Jeremiah18:12 Korende barabwo mbatebe: Ayio namang’ana a bosa. Ntoganetie tokore buna torengereretie, kera oyomo nigo arabwatie obomwenu bw’enkoro yaye embe.”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Boria abanto b’ebisaku gose bana koigwa amang’ana anga buna ayio. Abaisraeli, abwo banga buna omoiseke omwekungi, bakorire amang’ana are amabe mono." 
Jeremiah18:14 Inee! Amagena ’embura a Lebanoni ana koruao atige ebitare bia igoro? Gose ebirooche bikorwa ase ebitare biana koborwa amache amakendu? 
Jeremiah18:15 Korende abanto baane banyebire, basambire ubani ase emegwekano bagosasima. Ase ayio bagochirwe na kogwa ase chinchera chiabo, ekiagera batigire goeta ase chinchera chia kare, baetire ase ebinchera gose tari ase enchera enene." 
Jeremiah18:16 Basaririe ense yabo na koyekora ey’ogoichanerwa, na ey’ogosekererigwa kare na kare. Kera omonto ogoeta aroro nigo agokumia na gosingisia omotwe oye." 
Jeremiah18:17 Nimbaserebanie ase obosio bw’ababisa babo, buna omwaga o moocha ogoserebania. Ning’onchoke imbae omogongo, gose tinkoborokia obosio bwane ase rituko ri’emechando yabo.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Abanto bagakwana, bagatebania, “Inchuo tokore omoroberio bw’ogoita Yeremia. Ntobwate abakuani, na barabwo tibagotiga gotworokereria, gose abanto abang’aini tibagotiga gotosemia, gose ababani tibagotiga gotorareria amang’ana. Inchuo tomosoere titobaisa koigwera amang’ana aye nonya nerimo.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 “Aye Omonene, inyigwe, tegerera amang’ana aya ababisa baane bagokwana." 
Jeremiah18:20 Inee! Amaya naakanwe namabe? Abanto bakunyire engoro, erinde basirie obogima bwane. Omonene, ing’inyore buna natenenete ase obosio bwao kobasabera na gokwana amang’ana amaya ase engencho yabo, erinde aye oonchoke na otige endamwamu yao korwa asebare." 
Jeremiah18:21 Ase ayio, oite abana babo nenchara, orue abwo abanyene babugwe nababisa babo na baitwe nemioro; tiga abakungu babo bakwerwe nabana babo amo nabasacha babo, batigwe babe ababoraka. Abanto babo abasacha baitwe namarwaire, na abamura babo baitwe nemioro ase esegi." 
Jeremiah18:22 Obarentere abauri mobosokano, erinde ebirero biigugwe korwa ase chinyomba chiabo, ekiagera bakunyire eirima, erinde basirie obogima bwane: babekire oboreba ng’a amagoro aane abwatwe." 
Jeremiah18:23 Korende aye Omonene nomanyete omoroberio obo bw’okong’ita. Tobaisa kobaabera ebibe biabo, gose tobitinyia birue ase obosio bwao. Obatige babugwe ase obosio bwao, obakorere ayio ekero ore nendamwamu.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Omonene agakwana nainche agantebia, “Genda ogore enyongo korwa ase omokori chinyongo. Ogende nabagaaka b’abanto, na abagaaka b’abakuani," 
Jeremiah19:2 goika ase Rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu rire ase Egeita gie Chindogio, na aroro agwo orarie amang’ana inche ndagotebie," 
Jeremiah19:3 Okwane iga: Inwe abaruoti ba Yuda, na Abayuda mwensi, na abanto ba Yerusalemu, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene. Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naama! Nkoreta nde amang’ana amabe mono igoro y’aase aiga, na kera oyomo orayaigwe nigo araichane." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ninkore ayio, ekiagera abanto bantigire na bakorire aase aiga abeire aya atachenegeti ase ogosamba ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao, chiria barabwo, gose chisokoro chiabo, gose abaruoti b’Abayuda, batamanyete, Naende baichoirie aase aiga namanyinga ’abanto batari na komocha." 
Jeremiah19:5 Barabwo baagachire aase aimokererete igoro ase enyasae Baali, erinde bayesambere abana babo abamura babe ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa asere, amang’ana inche ntachigete gose kobatebia, gose amang’ana atana koba ase ebirengererio biane." 
Jeremiah19:6 Naende Omonene otebire,” “Rora, amatuko ngocha are, aase aria atarokwe Tofeti, gose Rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu, korende nigo rirarokwe Rikura ri’Okonyenyera." 
Jeremiah19:7 Na ase aase aiga ninsarie omoroberio bw’Abayuda na obw’abanto ba Yerusalemu. Nindue abanto b’emechie eyio baitwe nemioro ase obosio bw’ababisa babo na ase amaboko ’abanto baria bakorigia gosiria obogima bwabo. Nindue emebere yabo ekwete ebe endagera ye chinyoni na eye ching’iti chi’orosana. 
Jeremiah19:8 Ning’onchore omochie oyo osareke kegima, oichanerwe. Kera omonto orabe ogoeta ase egati yaye naichanigwe mono na gokumia ase engencho y’ogosareka kwaye." 
Jeremiah19:9 Nintige abanto barie emebere y’abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, ee, kera omonto narie omobere bw’omogisangio oye ase engaki eyio y’emechando eria ababisa babo na abanto baria bakorigia gosiria obogima bwabo bararente asebare.”" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Aye Yeremia, bwate enyongo eye ase amasio ’abanto abwo moragende komo," 
Jeremiah19:11 obatebie amang’ana aya: Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Naboigo inche ndakore abanto aba amo nomochie oyo, buna omonto agwata enyongo etanyare koroisigwa naende. Abanto nabatindeke ebitondo biabo agwo Tofeti, goika aase ande abore barabitindeke.”" 
Jeremiah19:12 Naende Omonene otebire: “Naboigo ndakore aase aiga amo nabanto bamenyeteo, omochie oyo obe buna Tofeti." 
Jeremiah19:13 Chinyomba chia Yerusalemu, na echi’abaruoti b’Abayuda, chinyomba chionsi echio igoro ase ebirama biabo abanto basambire ubani ase ogosasima erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni chionsi chia igoro, naende okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa biaumoirwe ase chinyasae ching’ao, chinyomba echi nachikorwe chibe echitachenegeti buna Tofeti.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Erio Yeremia akairana korwa Tofeti ase Omonene konya amotomire gochia koraria amang’ana ’obobani obwo; agacha agatenena ase eraaro ye Hekalu y’Omonene, agatebia abanto bonsi:" 
Jeremiah19:15 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naama! Inche nkorenta inde ase omochie oyo omonene na ase emechie yaye yonsi amang’ana onsi amabe natebete ng’a nindete, ekiagera abanto nigo bare abanyabigoti bikong’u bangire koigwera amang’ana aane.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Ekero Pasuri omokuani, mosinto o Imeri, oyorenge omoteneneri omonene bw’enyomba y’Omonene, aigwete Yeremia okobana amang’ana ayio," 
Jeremiah20:2 agaaka Yeremia omobani, akamosiba ase rikorogoto ang’e n’Egeita kia Rogoro kia Benjamin, agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
Jeremiah20:3 Rituko ria kabere, ekero Pasuri asiborete Yeremia korwa ase rikorogoto, Yeremia akamotebia, “Omonene tagokoroka Pasuri, korende okorokire Omwoboyia ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Jeremiah20:4 Naki Omonene otebire ng’a nagokore obe omwoboyia ase aye omonyene, na ase abasani bao bonsi, na ababisa babo mbabaite nemioro ase obosio bwao. Omonene nabeke Abayuda bonsi ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli, nabaire gochia Babeli ase obosomba na abaite nemioro," 
Jeremiah20:5 Nindue obotenenku bw’omochie oyio, ne chinibo chiaye chionsi, na ebinto bi’amagori amanene bireo ne chikungo chionsi chi’abaruoti b’Abayuda, mbibeke ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, na abwo babisakore na kobiira Babeli." 
Jeremiah20:6 Aye Pasuri, na abanto bonsi bamenyete ase enka yao, namwoswe, moirwe ase obosomba. Aye noirwe Babeli, nokwereo na otindekweo, aye amo nabasani bao bonsi, abwo kwabeire gokobanera amang’ana ’oborimo.”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Aye Omonene, nigo kwang’ebereretie, okambua, na inche nkeeberereka. Igo ore ne chinguru kombua. Aye kwambuire. Abanto nigo bagonsekerera ase rituko rigima; kera omonto nigo agonchecheria." 
Jeremiah20:8 Ekero kende gionsi ngokwana, nigo nkorera, nigo ngoaka eriogi nteba, “Obotindi na ogosaria!” Botambe nigo ngochecherigwa na gosekererigwa ase engencho ye ring’ana riao, aye Omonene." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ekero natebete: “Bono tinkoinyora Omonene, gose gokwana ase erieta riaye nonya ng’ake,” rirorio rikaba ase enkoro yane na ase amauga aane buna omorero ogosamba osiekeireo. Nkarosa mono korikiria ime asende, tinanyarete gwetanga tindisokia." 
Jeremiah20:10 Nabeire nkoigwa abanto bakomonyererana, na obwoba nigo bore ase chinsemo chionsi. Barabwo bateba, “Tomosoere, ee, tiga tomosoere!” Nabo abasani baane bonsi, abwo twanchaine, basemeretie ng’a ingwe. Nigo bagoteba, “Ande nabo araebererigwe, erinde tomobue, erio tweruserie egesiomba asare.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Korende Omonene ore Omobui bw’esegi nigo are amo nainche. Ase ayio, abachandi baane nabagochwe na kogwa; barabwo tibakombua. Nabarore obosooku obonene, ekiagera tibakonyara kobua. Ogochaywa kwabo kwa botambe tigokwebwa." 
Jeremiah20:12 Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, aye okorenga abanto ase oboronge, nigo omanyete chinkoro na ebirengererio. Ase ayio, nduserie egesiomba ase ababisa baane, ekiagera nabekire amang’ana aane asore." 
Jeremiah20:13 Moterere Omonene, momotogie! Ere otooririe obogima bw’abaremerwa na kobarusia ase amaboko ’abakori amabe." 
Jeremiah20:14 Riragererigwe rituko erio naiboretwe, rituko riria baba anyiborete ribe ritari nogosesenigwa." 
Jeremiah20:15 Aragererigwe omonto oria orentete amang’ana ase tata, akamotebia, “Kwaiboreirwe omwana omoisia”, na nigo akamogokia mono." 
Jeremiah20:16 Omonto oyio, tiga abe buna emechie eria Omonene asiretie atari namabera. Oyio tiga aigwe ebirero bi’obororo mambia, na amariogi’okogoswa mobaso gati," 
Jeremiah20:17 ekiagera tang’itete ekero narenge ase enda ya baba. Onye nabete bo anga baba nere obete embeera yane, enda yaye nanga nigo yagendererete koba enene botambe." 
Jeremiah20:18 Nase ki nasogete korwa ase enda ya baba, korora emechando na obororo, na nkoba nobosooku ase amatuko amange?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Aya naro amang’ana Omonene arentete ase Yeremia, ekero Zedekia omoruoti amotomerete Pasuri, mosinto o Malikia, na Zefania, mosinto o Maaseya, bakamotebia," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Toborerie korwa ase Omonene, ekiagera Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, ngocha are gotorwania esegi; ande Omonene nabo arabaise gotokorera amakumia aye, erinde omoruoti oyio atotige tatorwania.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Erio Yeremia akabairaneria, “Tebia Zedekia" 
Jeremiah21:4 ng’a aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naama! Ebirwanero ebio mobwate ase amaboko aino korwaneria omoruoti o Babeli na Abakalidayo, abwo babanaaririe isiko ye chindwaki, inche omonyene nimbionchore na mbisangererie amo gati‐gati y’omochie oyio." 
Jeremiah21:5 Inche omonyene mbarwanie inwe nokoboko kwane kore ne chinguru, imbe nendamwamu, na obotindi, na okogechigwa okonene." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ning’ite abanto abamenyete ase omochie oyio, ng’ite ne ching’iti chireo. Oborwaire bogoita mboite mwanyabanto ne ching’iti.”" 
Jeremiah21:7 Naende Omonene otebire, “Nyuma y’ayio nimbeke Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, na abasomba baye, na abanto b’omochie oyo, baria bataitwe noborwaire, gose nemioro, gose nenchara, mbabeke ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, na ase amaboko ’ababisa babo. Abwo bakorigia obogima bwabo. Takobarorera amabeebe, gose kobatiga mobe moyo, gose kobarorera amabera." 
Jeremiah21:8 “Otebie abanto aba ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora, nabekire ase amasio aino enchera y’obogima na ey’amakweri." 
Jeremiah21:9 Omonto orabeere ase omochie oyo ime naitwe nemioro, na enchara, na oborwaire; korende oyorasoke korwa imeo na kwerua ase amaboko ’Abakalidayo, abwo banaaretie omochie, oyio nere orabe moyo, na tabaisa goitwa ase esegi." 
Jeremiah21:10 Inche naonchoire obosio bwane korwania omochie oyo, tinkoyororera amabera, korende ninyorentere amabe. Nobekwe ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli, nere ayosambe nomorero.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Kwana nabanto b’enyomba y’omoruoti bw’Abayuda, obatebie: Igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene," 
Jeremiah21:12 inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Daudi. Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Mobe mokonacha ekina kia boronge kera emambia; omonto oria ourererigwe momorusie ase okoboko kw’omochandi oye. Motakoreti bo, endamwamu yane enga buna omorero ogosamba nayoke, na onde takoyerimia. Ayio nakoreke ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino okobe." 
Jeremiah21:13 Inwe abanto momenyete ase rikura, nainwe aba momenyete ase amabwago ’ebitare bi’omweya, inche nabangire. Nabo inche Omonene natebire. Inwe nigo mogokwana iga: Ning’o oranyare gotirimboka gocha aa gotorwania, gose ning’o oranyare gosoa aa ase tomenyete?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Inche nimbae egesusuro koreng’ana nokwama kw’ogokora kwaino. Nabo inche Omonene natebire. Nintongie omorero ase rinani ri’omochie oyio, ninsambe ebinto bionsi biyoetanaine.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Tirimboka gochia ase enyomba y’omoruoti bw’Abayuda, okwane amang’ana aya:" 
Jeremiah22:2 Aye omoruoti bw’Abayuda oikaransete ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Daudi, aye amo nabasomba bao, na abanto bao mogosoera ebiita ebi, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Jeremiah22:3 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Kora ayare ay’ekeene na oboronge, naende motoorie omonto ourererigwe korwa ase okoboko kw’omochandi oye. Timobaisa gokorera abamenyi ne chintakana bobe, gose ababoraka, gose koba abatindi asebare, na aase aiga timobaisa goitera amanyinga ’omonto otari na komocha." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ekeene, komoraigwe ring’ana eri, abaruoti mbagenderere goikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Daudi, mbabe bagosoera ebiita bi’omochie bariinete chigari ne chibarasi, barabwo amo nabasomba babo, na abanto babo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Korende onye timokoigwera amang’ana aya, inche omonyene netianirie ng’a enyomba eye nebe bosa. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’enyomba y’oboruoti bw’Abayuda: “Aye nigo ore asende buna Gileadi, na buna egetunwa kia Lebanoni, korende nonya naboigo, ekeene, ningokore obe buna erooro, na buna omochie otamenyiri nabanto." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nintome abanto bache kogosiria; kera oyomo agochere obwate ebirwanero biaye bi’esegi, nabarabwo nabageche emete y’emecharake, eria ere emiya mono asemore, na bayerute ase omorero." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Abanto b’ebisaku ebinge nabaetere ase omochie oyo, babe bakoborania: Nase ki Omonene akorire omochie oyo omonene osarekire iga?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Nabairanerigwe: Aya nigo akorekire, ekiagera abanto b’omochie oyo batigete okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’Omonene, Nyasae obo, bakaonchokera gosasima na gokorera chinyasae ching’ao.”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Timobaisa koreera omonto okure, gose komobokeria amagombo; korende momoreere mono oyochiire aare, ekiagera oyio takoirana naende korora ense yaye ase aiboreretwe." 
Jeremiah22:11 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro ya Salumu, mosinto o Yosia, Salumu oria ogamberete Abayuda ribaga ria ise na akagenda agatiga aase aa: “Ere takoirana aiga nonya ng’ake," 
Jeremiah22:12 korende aase airetwe obosomba, nao arakwere, gose takoirana gocha aa ase ense ayerore naende.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 Obobe nobw’omonto oyio okoagacha enyomba yaye ase chinchera chitari chia boronge, na ase oborianania koroisia chiero chinene chi’enyomba yaye; oyio ogokora omogisangio oye amokorere emeremo bosa, na tari komoakana eng’eria yaye." 
Jeremiah22:14 Obobe nobwaye omonto oyio ogokwana: “Ninyeagachere enyomba enene, enachanire chiero chinene ase rirongo riaye. Nigo akobochora chitirisa chingare ase enyomba eria, naende ochabera chinyasi nemecharake na oyeaka erangi embariri ye rigori rinene." 
Jeremiah22:15 Inee! Nigo okagete ng’a aye nomoruoti ore, ekiagera okoamererania nabande ase okoagachera emecharake? Inee! Iso tariete endagera na konywa, naende agakora ayare ay’ekeene na oboronge? Ee, ase engencho eyio amang’ana nigo abete amaya asare." 
Jeremiah22:16 Ere nigo arenge konacha ebina ebironge ase abataka na ase abaremerwa, ase igo amang’ana akaba amaya asare. Inee! Ase ogokora igo tari rirorio okomanya inche? Nabo Omonene akwanire." 
Jeremiah22:17 Amaiso ao na enkoro yao nigo bire ne ribero ri’okonyora ebitoki, na ogoitera amanyinga ’omonto otari nokomocha, na kwenaria obourereria na obotindi.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro ya Yehoyakimu mosinto o Yosia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda: “Abanto tibakomoreera na gokwana: Obee! Momura ominto! Gose: Obee! Mosubati ominto! Onde tari oramoreere na gokwana: Obee! Omonene! Obee! Naki arenge omonene!" 
Jeremiah22:19 Ere nigo aratindekwe buna etigere egotindekwa. Nigo arakururwe atugutwe isiko y’ebiita bia Yerusalemu.” 
Jeremiah22:20 Tiira gochia Lebanoni, morere, moake amariogi agwo Basani, morere korwa Abarimu, ekiagera abanchwa bao basirigwe." 
Jeremiah22:21 Inche nigo nakwanete naye, ekero kwarenge nogosesenigwa, korende ogakana ogateba: “Inche tinkogotegerera.” Ayio naro kwabeire kogokora korwa oboke bwao; tikwarenge konyigwera." 
Jeremiah22:22 Omwaga noirurukie abarisia bao bonsi, na abanchwa bao nabooswe, bairwe ase obosomba, erio aye norore obosooku na gotang’ang’a ase engencho y’ebibe biao bionsi." 
Jeremiah22:23 Inwe abanto ba Lebanoni, mwabeire more nobotoereru ase ebiswa biaino ime, ase egati y’emecharake. Ekeene, namweumie ekero moraigwe obororo, obororo buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore." 
Jeremiah22:24 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, nonya aye Konia omoruoti bw’Abayuda, kore mosinto o Yehoyakimu, kwarenge koba ebonyi ere nekemanyererio kiane ebekire ase okoboko kwane gw’okorio, nabo nare kogosomora." 
Jeremiah22:25 Naende ninkobeke ase amaboko abanto abwo bakorigia obogima bwao, abwo oirogete. Ninkobeke ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, na ase okoboko kw’Abakalidayo." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ningoserie ne chinguru amo na nyoko okoiborete, erinde mogende ase ense eng’ao ase motaiboreretwe, mokwereo." 
Jeremiah22:27 Na ase ense moraganie koirana gochiao, timokonyara.”" 
Jeremiah22:28 Inee! Omonto oyo Konia nigo abeire buna enyongo yatekire, egekorero onde ataganeti? Nase ki rende ere amo nabana baye barutirwe gochia ase ense batamanyeti?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Aye ense, ense, ense! Igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Rika igoro y’omonto oyio ng’a tari nabana, obeire omonto otasesenetigwe ase obogima bwaye. Ororeria rwaye tirogotoka roraikaranse ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti gia Daudi agambere Abayuda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Obobe nobw’abarisia abwo bagosaria na goserebania ching’ondi chie riicho riane. Nabo Omonene atebire. 
Jeremiah23:2 Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba igoro y’abarisia, abwo babekire korenda abanto baane: “Inwe mwaserebanirie riicho riane, mwariseririe gochia aare, gose timwariechanderete. Naama! Nimbae inwe egesusuro ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino okobe." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ase ayio inche omonyene ninsangererie abatigari be riicho riane, mbarusie korwa chinse chionsi agwo ase nabasiarerete gochia; nimbairanie gocha ase obweri bwabo, na barabwo nabaibore na komentekana." 
Jeremiah23:4 Nimbabekere abarisia, abwo barabarende, na abanto baane tibakoba nobwoba nonya ng’ake, gose tibakoondoka, gose onde takonyara gosira. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Amatuko ngocha are ekero ndasebokie oyomo ore Omoseboka omoronge o Daudi. Oyio nabe omoruoti, oragambe nobong’aini na konacha ebina bi’ekeene na ebi’oboronge ase ense." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ase amatuko aye Abayuda nabatoorigwe na Abaisraeli bamenye ase obotoereru, na oyio narokwe: Omonene Nere Oboronge Bwaito.”" 
Jeremiah23:7 Ase ayio Omonene otebire ng’a amatuko ngocha are, ekero abanto batakwane: “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, oyio orusetie Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri.”" 
Jeremiah23:8 Ribaga ri’ayio nigo barakwane: “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, oyio orusetie na koraa ororeria rw’Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya sugusu, na korwa ase chinse chionsi agwo ase abaseretie gochia.” Erio mbamenye ase ense yabo abanyene." 
Jeremiah23:9 Amang’ana igoro y’ababani: Enkoro yane yairianyekire ime yane, amauga aane onsi atengechire; nabeire buna omonto otindire ase okonywa, na buna oyo edivai yabuire, ase engencho y’Omonene na ase amang’ana aye amachenu." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ense eye nigo eichire nabatomani, nigo ekweumia ase engencho y’okoragererigwa, na amarisia ’erooro omire. Orogendo rw’abanto nigo rore orobe, ne chinguru chiabo nigo chire ase ogokora aya atari amaronge." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Ababani na abakuani tibamoirogeti Nyasae. Nonya nase enyomba yane obobe bwabo bwarorekanire.” Nabo Omonene atebire. 
Jeremiah23:12 “Ase ayio chinchera chiabo nachibe asebare buna chinchera chinterere ase omosunte, agwo ase baraserigwe gochia, bagweo. Nindete obobe igoro asebare ase omwaka oria ndabae egesusuro.” Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Naroche oboriri ase ababani ba Samaria, nigo barenge kobana ase erieta ri’enyasae Baali, na gotantania abanto baane Abaisraeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Korende narorire ababani ba Yerusalemu bakorire obobe goetania. Nigo bagokora obotomani na gosiarera oborimo. Nigo bakobeka abakori amabe chinguru, erinde onde taonchoka na gotiga ebibe biaye. Bonsi babeire asende buna abanto ba Sodomu, na abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu babeire buna aba Gomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba igoro y’ababani abwo: “Naama! Nimbae ekemeri ekeroro barie, nimbae namache are nobosongo banywe. Korwa ase ababani ba Yerusalemu, ogotamoiroka Nyasae gwesiareire ase ense yonsi.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Timobaisa koigwera amang’ana ’ababani abwo bakonakobabanera na kobaichoria nogosemeria kw’obong’ainereria. Barabwo nigo bagokwana amaroro aye chindoto chie chinkoro chiabo, gose tari ayakorwa ase omonwa one inche Omonene." 
Jeremiah23:17 Abwo nigo bagendererete gotebia abanto baria bachayete ring’ana riane: Omonene otebire ng’a namonyore omorembe. Naende batebia baria bakobwatia obomwenu bwe chinkoro chiabo: Amabe tagocha asemore.” 
Jeremiah23:18 Ning’o ase egati y’ababani abwo otenenire ase ekegambero ki’Omonene koigwa na komanya ring’ana riaye? Gose ning’o otegereire ring’ana riaye na oriigure? 
Jeremiah23:19 Rora, omwaga omotindi okorwa ase Omonene, oichire nendamwamu yaye enga buna ekerambauti osokire; nigo egocha igoro ase emetwe y’abanyabibe." 
Jeremiah23:20 Omonene takoonchoka atige endamwamu yaye, goika aikeranie okogania kw’ebirengererio biaye ase okonacha ekina. Nigo morache komanya buya amang’ana ayio ase amatuko agocha." 
Jeremiah23:21 “Inche tinatomete ababani abwo, korende nigo baminyogete boka abanyene; tinakwanete nabarabwo, korende nigo bagendererete kobana." 
Jeremiah23:22 Korende onye ababani abwo mbaigwerete ogosemia kwane, nanga mbararetie amang’ana aane ase abanto baane, na nigo barenge gocha koonchora abanto batige ebibe biabo na ogokora kwabo okobe." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Inee! Inche nigo inde Nyasae ore ang’e rioka? Tindi Nyasae ore aare boigo? 
Jeremiah23:24 Naende inche Omonene nigo ngoteba: Inee! Omonto nanyare kwebisa aase are bobisi inche ntamorore? Tari inche oria inde aande onsi, igoro na ense?" 
Jeremiah23:25 Naigure amang’ana ’ababani abwo bagokwana, abwo bakobana oborimo ase erieta riane, bagoteba. Inche narotete, ee, narotete!" 
Jeremiah23:26 Inee! Ngoika ririri oborimo boragenderere koba ime ase chinkoro chi’ababani abwo bakobana obong’ainereria bwe chinkoro chiabo? 
Jeremiah23:27 Ababani abwo barengereirie ng’a abanto baane nigo barebe erieta riane ase engencho ye chindoto chiabo babe bagotebania buna chisokoro chiabo chiebete erieta riane, chikaonchokera Baali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Omobani oria obwate chindoto, tiga achikwane, korende oyobwate ring’ana riane, tiga arikwane ase obwegenwa. Inee! Omoiriro, ninki oisaine ekero okoreng’anigwa nengano? Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah23:29 Inee! Ring’ana riane tiriri buna omorero, naende buna enyundo egwatia ebitare? Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah23:30 Naende omonene otebire: Inche nigo inde mamincha y’ababani abwo bakoiba na koura abande amang’ana aane. 
Jeremiah23:31 Boigo inche nigo inde mamincha y’ababani abwo bagokwana amang’ana abo abanyene na goteba ng’a Omonene otebire bo. 
Jeremiah23:32 Naende nigo inde mamincha y’ababani abwo bakobana chindoto chi’oborimo, naende bachitebia abanto baane na igo babasiria. Ase ayio tibari gokonya abanto aba nonya ng’ake. Inche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ekero oyomo bw’abanto aba, gose omobani, gose omokuani, arakoborie: Egurube y’Omonene nereri? Obairanerie, obatebie: Ninwe egurube yaye, ere nabaserie morueo." 
Jeremiah23:34 Omobani, gose omokuani, gose omonto onde bwensi bw’abanto aba karakwane Egurube y’Omonene, inche nimoe egesusuro, ere amo neamate yaye." 
Jeremiah23:35 Inwe nigo mogwenerete koborania, kera omonto nomogisangio oye, na kera oyomo noyomwabo: Mang’ana ki Omonene airaneria? Gose: Narari akwanire?" 
Jeremiah23:36 Korende timobaisa gwatora nonya ng’ake ring’ana eri: Egurube y’Omonene, ekiagera ring’ana ri’omonto nario rire egurube asare ere omonyene. Inwe mwasaririe na koonchorana amang’ana a Nyasae ore moyo, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda. Nyasae oito." 
Jeremiah23:37 Amang’ana aya naro oraborie ababani abwo: Ninki Omonene akoiraneirie? Gose: Narari akwanire? 
Jeremiah23:38 Omonene nigo agoteba ng’a inwe moise kogenderera gokwana: Egurube y’Omonene, na kwanga koigwera, korende mogokwana amang’ana ayio Omonene abakanirie ng’a timobaisa gokwana bo," 
Jeremiah23:39 rirorio inche nimbaserie morue ase obosio bwane, inwe amo nomochie oyio nabaete inwe ne chisokoro chiaino." 
Jeremiah23:40 Inche nindete igoro asemore ogochaywa, na obosooku, ebio bigenderere koba asemore kare na kare.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Nyuma Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, kairire Yekonia, mosinto o Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, amo nabanene b’oboruoti boria, na abaroisia b’ebinto, na abaturi b’ebioma, gochia Babeli, Omonene akanyorokia okorora oko: Bosio bwe Hekalu y’Omonene nkarora ebitonga bibere biarenge namako." 
Jeremiah24:2 Egetonga ekemo nigo kiarenge namako amaya mono amatobu, aya atongoretwe, na egetonga kende nigo kiarenge namako amabe mono atarenge konyara koriegwa." 
Jeremiah24:3 Omonene akamboria, “Yeremia, ninki ekio oroche?” Nkamoiraneria, “Namako amaya, ee namaya mono, na ayande amabe, ee, namabe mono atanyare koriegwa.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Abayuda abwo narusirie aase aiga na kobaira ase obosomba ase ense y’Abakalidayo nimbabare ng’a nabaya buna amako ayio are amaya." 
Jeremiah24:6 Nimbarende na kobakorera amaya goika mbairanie naende ase ense eye. Nimbatenenie gose tinkobatagora, nimbasimeke gose tinkobasimora." 
Jeremiah24:7 Nimbae chinkoro chi’okomanya ng’a inche ninche Omonene; nababe abanto baane, na inche nimbe Nyasae obo, ekiagera barabwo nabang’iranere ne chinkoro chiabo chionsi.”" 
Jeremiah24:8 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Korende Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, amo nabanene b’oboruoti bwaye, na abanto ba Yerusalemu nigo baratigare ase ense eye, na baria bamenyete Misiri nimbakore babe buna amako ayio amabe atanyare koriegwa." 
Jeremiah24:9 Nindete amabe amanene igoro asebare, na abanto b’amaruoti onsi mbaichanigwe na koondoka ekero barabarore, ekiagera nimbatige bachaywe na gosekererwa, naende babe omorabaaro ne ring’ana rigokwanwa bobe, na abanto mbabe bakoragereria ase erieta riabo." 
Jeremiah24:10 Nimbatomere chisegi, baitwe nemioro, na abande bakwe nenchara na amarwaire. Mbasirigwe kegima, barue ase ense eyio nabaete barabwo ne chisokoro chiabo.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kwa Yehoyakimu mosinto o Yosia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia amang’ana igoro y’Abayuda bonsi. (Oyio noro orenge omwaka omotang’ani bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli.)" 
Jeremiah25:2 Yeremia omobani agakwana amang’ana ayio ase Abayuda bonsi na ase abanto bonsi ba Yerusalemu, akabatebia," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ebere na etato, gochakera omwaka o ikomi na gatato bw’okogamba kwa Yosia mosinto bw’Amoni, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, goika rituko ria rero, ring’ana ri’Omonene riabeire rigochicha asende, na inche nabeire nkoribatebia inwe ntari gotiga, korende inwe mwabeire mokwanga koriigwera." 
Jeremiah25:4 Ase chingaki echi chionsi Omonene obeire okobatomera abasomba baye ababani, atari gotiga, korende mwangire koigwera, gose gotegerera moigwe." 
Jeremiah25:5 Abwo babeire bakobatebia,” “Kera oyomo oino aonchoke atige chinchera chiaye chi’ebibe na ogokora kwaye okobe, erio nario moramenye ase ense eye Omonene aete chisokoro chiaino kare, nainwe obayeeire ebe eyaino kogenderera botambe." 
Jeremiah25:6 Nigo babakanetie ng’a timobaisa koonchokera chinyasae ching’ao ase ogochikorera na gochisasima; mobaise kogechia Omonene abe nendamwamu ase emeremo y’amaboko aino. Moise koigwera amang’ana ayio, rirorio Omonene takobaa egesusuro." 
Jeremiah25:7 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Nonya naboigo timwanyigwerete. Ribaga ri’ayio nigo mwangechetie nkaba nendamwamu ase engencho y’emeremo y’amaboko aino, na nkabaa egesusuro.”" 
Jeremiah25:8 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Ekiagera mwabeire mokwanga konyigwera," 
Jeremiah25:9 nindangerie ebisaku bionsi bia sugusu, na Nebukadinesaro, omosomba one, omoruoti o Babeli. Barabwo nimbarente barwanie ense eye na abanto bareo, naende barwanie ebisaku bionsi bietanaine aiga. Ninsirie abanto b’aiga kegima, nimbakore babe egento ki’ogoichanerwa na eki’ogosekererigwa, na ense eye nebe bosa kogenderera botambe." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ninsirie korwa asebare eriogi ri’omogoko na eri’omochengo, na eriogi ri’omonyuomi na eri’omoriakari. Eriogi ri’orogena rogosia tirikoigugwa, gose oborabu bwe chitaya tibokobao." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ense eye yonsi nesareke ebe amaturi na ebisaku ebi nabimokorere omoruoti o Babeli ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo etano na ebere. 
Jeremiah25:12 Nyuma y’emiaka emerongo etano na ebere koyaerire, ning’ee omoruoti o Babeli amo negesaku kiaye, na ense y’Abakalidayo, egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo; ninkore ense eria ebe bosa kogenderera botambe. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah25:13 Amang’ana onsi nakwanete igoro ya Babeli, ayarikire ase ebuku eye, ayio Yeremia abanete mamincha y’ebisaku bionsi, ninyarente igoro ase ense eria." 
Jeremiah25:14 Nimbaakane obobe bwabo na emeremo y’amaboko abo. Ebisaku ebinge na abaruoti abanene nabakore abanto ba Babeli babe abasomba babo.” 
Jeremiah25:15 Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, antebirie: “Bogoria egekombe eke ki’edivai y’endamwamu korwa ase okoboko kwane, erio oe ebisaku bionsi ase ndagotome gochia, biyenywe." 
Jeremiah25:16 Barabwo banywe, batinde bataba‐tabe, babe buna chiosi, ase engencho y’esegi ndarente igoro asebare.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Ase ayio nkaimokia egekombe keria korwa ase okoboko kw’Omonene, nkaa ebisaku bionsi ase antomete gochia, nkabinyoisia edivai eria y’endamwamu yaye." 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusalemu na emechie yonsi y’Abayuda, amo nabaruoti na abanene b’oboruoti bwabo, bakaegwa bakanywa edivai eria, erinde ense yabo esarigwe ebe bosa, na abanto bakorora ayio mbakumie babachaye, na baragererie ase erieta riabo, buna ere goika rero iga." 
Jeremiah25:19 Aba nabwo abanto bande banyosetigwe edivai eria: Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, na abasomba baye, na abanene b’oboruoti bwaye, amo nabanto baye bonsi," 
Jeremiah25:20 abanto bonsi abamenyete amo nabarabwo, na abaruoti bonsi b’ense ya Usi, na abaruoti b’Abafilisti baare ase emechie y’Asikeloni, na Gasa, na Ekironi, na abatigarete b’Asidodi;" 
Jeremiah25:21 abanto ba Edomu na Moabu, na ab’Amoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 abaruoti bonsi ba Turo na Sidoni, na ab’ebisinka, na abe chinse chire ng’umbu mbarabare y’enyancha;" 
Jeremiah25:23 emechie ya Dedani, na Tema, na Busi, na abanto bonsi abwo bakonacha chitukia chiabo;" 
Jeremiah25:24 abaruoti bonsi b’Arabia na ab’ebisaku ebio bisang’anaine bimenyete ase erooro; 
Jeremiah25:25 abaruoti bonsi ba Simuri, na Elamu, na Media;" 
Jeremiah25:26 abaruoti bonsi ba sugusu, abare aare na abare ang’e, kera oyomo nanywe edivai eria, na oyonde amobwatie. Amaruoti onsi pi are ase ense nanywe edivai eyio. Erio omoruoti o Sesaki, noro Babeli, nabe oyo bw’omoerio koyenywa." 
Jeremiah25:27 Erio ngatebigwa ng’a mbatebie amang’ana aya: “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Kanywe, motinde na moroke, mogwe inse na timoimoka naende, ase engencho y’esegi ndarente ase egati yaino." 
Jeremiah25:28 Abanto abwo kobaraange kobogoria egekombe ekio korwa ase okoboko kwao na konywa edivai eria, obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire: Goika moyenywe." 
Jeremiah25:29 Naama! Inche nachakire korenta amabe igoro ase omochie oyio okorokwa ase erieta riane. Inee! Nigo mokorengereria ng’a nigo moratigwe timoegwa egesusuro? Goika monyore egesusuro, ekiagera nindete esegi erwanie abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense.” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire." 
Jeremiah25:30 “Aye Yeremia, obane amang’ana aya onsi igoro asebare, obatebie: Omonene narume korwa igoro, naake eriogi riaye korwa ase obomenyo bwaye obochenu. Narume ne chinguru igoro ye riicho riaye; naake eriogi buna eri’abanto bakomita amasabibu. Naake eriogi buna eri’ebanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense." 
Jeremiah25:31 Eriogi riaye nariigweke ase chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense, ekiagera Omonene nabwate ekina nebisaku bionsi. Narente abanto bonsi ase ekina, abakori amabe nabaitwe nemioro. Inche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Rora, obobe naboche ase egesaku ekemo, bogende ase ekende, na ekembugu‐mbugu nageche korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense." 
Jeremiah25:33 Ase rituko riria emebere y’abanto baraitwe n’Omonene, nesiarerwe korwa ase ensinyo eyemo y’ense goika eyende. Abwo tibakoreerwa, gose gosangererigwa na gotindekwa. Nababe buna obwoyo ase ense." 
Jeremiah25:34 “Inwe abarisia, bokia amagombo morere! Inwe abanene be riicho, egara‐garie ase ribu, ekiagera rituko ri’okonyenywa kwaino na ogoserebanigwa kwaino riachire; namosirigwe mogwe buna chimingichi chiachorirwe chinyenywe." 
Jeremiah25:35 Abarisia tibakonyora ase baratamere; abanene be riicho tibagotooreka. 
Jeremiah25:36 Igwa eriogi ri’okorera kw’abarisia, na okobokia kw’amagombo kw’abanene be riicho. Omonene osaririe oborisia bwabo." 
Jeremiah25:37 Obomenyo bwarenge bw’obotoereru bwasarigwe ase endamwamu entindi y’Omonene. 
Jeremiah25:38 Omonene otigire abanto baye, buna endo egotiga riraro riaye. Ense yabo yasarigwe na gotigwa bosa, ase engencho y’obotindi bw’abachandi, na ase engencho y’endamwamu entindi y’Omonene.”" 
Jeremiah26:1 Ekero Yehoyakimu, mosinto o Yosia, achagete kogambera Abayuda, ring’ana rigacha korwa ase Omonene, rigantebia," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Otenene ase eraaro y’enyomba y’Omonene, na okwane nabanto b’emechie yonsi y’Abayuda bagocha gosasima ase enyomba eyio. Obatebie amang’ana onsi pi, ayio ndagochike okwane nabarabwo. Tobaisa gotiga nonya ne ring’ana erimo otabatebie." 
Jeremiah26:3 Ande ekero barayaigwe, nabo barabaise koigwera, na kera omonto aonchoke na atige chinchera chiaye chimbe, erinde agere nainche ng’onchoke ntige amabe aria narengereirie kobakorera ase engencho y’ogokora kwabo okobe.”" 
Jeremiah26:4 Omonene nigo antebetie ng’a ntebie abanto iga: “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Onye mwangire konyigwera, na timobwateti amachiko aane nabaete," 
Jeremiah26:5 na mwangire koigwera amang’ana ’abasomba baane ababani, abwo nabete nkobatomera naende naende," 
Jeremiah26:6 rirorio inche ninsarie enyomba eye ebe buna Silo, na ebisaku bionsi bi’ense bibe bikoragereria ase erieta ri’omochie oyo.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Abakuani na ababani, na abanto bonsi bakaigwa Yeremia ogokwana amang’ana ayio ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
Jeremiah26:8 Ekero Yeremia akoorete gokwana amang’ana ayio onsi Omonene amochigete akwane ase abanto bonsi, erio abakuani, na ababani, na abanto bonsi bakamobwata, bagateba, “Aye goika oitwe okwe!”" 
Jeremiah26:9 Nase ki kwabana ase erieta ri’Omonene gwateba ng’a enyomba eye ebe buna Silo, naende ng’a omochie oyo nosirigwe obe bosa, monto onde tamenya aroro? Abanto bonsi bakamoetanana agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene."
