Jeremiah26:10 Ekero abanene b’oboruoti bw’Abayuda baigwete amang’ana ayio, bakarua ase enyomba y’omoruoti, bakagenda ase enyomba y’Omonene, erio bagaikaransa ase egesoero kiarenge korokwa Egeita Ekeyia, agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
Jeremiah26:11 Abakuani na ababani bagatebia abanene baria b’oboruoti amo nabanto bonsi, “Omonto oyo nigo agwenerete anacherwe ekina ki’ogokwa, ekiagera nigo abana mamincha y’omochie oyo, buna mweigwera namato aino.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Erio Yeremia agakwana nabanene bonsi b’oboruoti, na abanto bonsi, akabatebia, “Omonene nere ontoma kobana mamincha y’enyomba eye na omochie oyo amang’ana ayio onsi mwaigwa." 
Jeremiah26:13 Ase ayio, onchora chinchera chiaino, na ogokora kwaino, momoigwere Omonene, Nyasae oino, nere natige tarenta igoro asemore amabe ayio konya akwanire." 
Jeremiah26:14 Korende asende inche, rora, nigo inde ase amaboko aino. Kora asende aya morarore are amaya na amaronge asemore." 
Jeremiah26:15 Korende momanye ase ekeene ng’a mokong’ita, okomocha kw’ogoitera amanyinga ay’oyotari nokomocha nakobe igoro yaino, na ase omochie oyo, na ase abanto bonsi bareo, ekiagera ekeene, Omonene nere ontoma nkwane amang’ana ayio onsi ase moigwete.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Erio abanene baria b’oboruoti, na abanto bonsi bagakwana, bagatebia abakuani na ababani, “Omonto oyo tabwati okomocha gokogera anacherwe ekina ki’ogokwa, ekiagera okwanire naintwe ase erieta ri’Omonene oito.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Nyuma y’amang’ana ayio, abagaaka bande b’ense eria bagatenena, bagakwana nabanto basangererekanete agwo, bakabatebia," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Ekero Hezekia arenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Mika korwa Mosereti nabanete, agatebia Abayuda bonsi: Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire:” “Sayoni noremwe buna omogondo okoremwa Yerusalemu nobe chitui chi’amaturi, na egetunwa ki’enyomba y’Omonene nkebe egetunwa kie rinani." 
Jeremiah26:19 Inee! Hezekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, amo n’Abayuda bonsi mbaitete Mika? Yaya, Hezekia nigo amoirogete Omonene na komosorora anyore ogwancherwa asare. Na Omonene agatiga amabe aria konya atebire ng’a akorere abanto baria. Na bono intwe nigo tore ang’e mono kwerentera amabe amanene.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Narenge omonto oyomo korwa Kiriati‐Yearimu orenge korokwa Uria, mosinto o Semaya. Oyio nere akabana ase erieta ri’Omonene mamincha y’omochie oyo na ense eye, agakwana amang’ana buna aria a Yeremia." 
Jeremiah26:21 Ekero Yehoyakimu omoruoti, amo nabarwani baye b’esegi, na abanene b’oboruoti, baigwete amang’ana a Uria, akarigia komoita, korende ekero Uria aigwete ayio akairoka agatama gochia ase Misiri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Omoruoti Yehoyakimu agatoma Elinatani, mosinto bw’Akibori, amo nabanto bande bakagenda Misiri," 
Jeremiah26:23 bakoyia Uria korwa aroro, bakamorenta ase Yehoyakimu omoruoti, na ere akamoita nomoro, agatuguta omobere oye aase abanto bande bonsi barenge gotindekwa." 
Jeremiah26:24 Korende Ahikamu, mosinto o Safani, akarenda Yeremia tabekwa ase amaboko ’abanto bamoite." 
Jeremiah27:1 Ekero Zedekia omoruoti, mosinto o Yosia, achagete kogambera Abayuda, ring’ana rigacha asende inche Yeremia korwa ase Omonene" 
Jeremiah27:2 Aya naro Omonene antebetie: “Eroiserie chingori ne rikorogoto, obibeke ase rigoti riao." 
Jeremiah27:3 Toma abanto abwo bachete Yerusalemu korora Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, erinde baire ebinto ebio ase omoruoti bw’Abaedomu, na oyo bw’Abamoabu, na oyo bw’Abaamoni, na oyo o Turo, na oyo o Sidoni." 
Jeremiah27:4 Aye ochike abatomwa abwo batebie abanene babo ng’a aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Aya naro amang’ana aane moratebie abanene baino:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Ninche ase okobua kwane ne chinguru chiane, natongete ense, na mwanyabanto, ne ching’iti chionsi chire ase ense. Ninche nkoyea omonto onde bwensi nanchire koa." 
Jeremiah27:6 Bono narure chinse echio chionsi nachibekire ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, omosomba one. Boigo nabekire ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana ase okoboko kwaye chimokorere." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ebisaku bionsi nabimokorere, naende bikorere omwana oye omomura, na omochokoro oye omomura, nabigenderere gokora boigo goika ekero engaki y’okogwa gw’ense yaye eraike; nyuma y’ayio ense yaye nebe ensomba ekorere ebisaku ebinge na abaruoti abanene bare ne chinguru." 
Jeremiah27:8 “Korende onye abanto b’egesaku kende gionsi, gose ab’abaruoti, tibagokorera Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, nabanche gosoyia amagoti abo ase rikorogoto riaye, inche omonyene ning’ee egesaku ekio egesusuro, geitwe nemioro, na enchara, na oborwaire, goika ning’ee omoruoti oyio okobua asirie egesaku ekio kegima. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah27:9 Ase ayio, timobaisa koigwera ababani baino, gose abaringoria, gose abarogi bande bonsi, abwo bakobatebia ng’a timogochia komokorera omoruoti o Babeli." 
Jeremiah27:10 Abanto abwo nigo bakobang’aina na bagere moirwe ase ense y’aare; inche nimbaserie morue aiga mochie gosira. 
Jeremiah27:11 Korende egesaku kende gionsi keranche gosoyia amagoti abo ase rikorogoto ri’omoruoti o Babeli na komokorera, inche ningetige kebeere ase ense yaye koyerema na koyemenya.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah27:12 Amang’ana ayio naro natebetie Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda: “Mosoyie amagoti aino ase rikorogoto ri’omoruoti o Babeli, momokorere ere amo nabanto baye, nainwe namobe moyo." 
Jeremiah27:13 Nase ki aye amo nabanto bao moganetie gokwa ase ogoitwa nemioro na enchara, na oborwaire? Ayio naro Omonene atebire arakoreke ase egesaku kende gionsi keraange gokorera omoruoti o Babeli." 
Jeremiah27:14 Timobaisa koigwera amang’ana ’ababani abwo bakobatebia ng’a: Timokorera omoruoti o Babeli. Ase ogoteba igo, obwo noborimo." 
Jeremiah27:15 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Inche timbatometi abwo, korende nigo bakobana amang’ana ’oborimo ase erieta riane, nayio nagere inche mbaserie morue aiga mochie gosira, inwe amo nababani abwo bakobabanera oborimo.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Erio ngakwana nabakuani na abanto bonsi, nkabatebia, “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Timobaisa koigwera amang’ana ’abanto baino, abwo bakobabanera, bagoteba: Rora, ebikorero bi’enyomba y’Omonene nabiiranigwe korwa Babeli bwango iga. Obwo noborimo bakobabanera." 
Jeremiah27:17 Timobaisa kobaigwera; inwe korera omoruoti o Babeli, nario morabe moyo. Nase ki omochie oyo orasarigwe obe amaturi?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Onye barabwo bare ababani b’ekeene, na onye ring’ana ri’Omonene rire asebare, tiga basorore Omonene bw’Emeganda ng’a ebikorero ebio bitigarete ase enyomba y’Omonene na ase enyomba y’Omoruoti bw’Abayuda agwo Yerusalemu bitigwe tibiirwa Babeli.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba igoro ye chisiiro, na egetuba keria ekenene, na ebibekerero binde biatigarete ase omochie oyo," 
Jeremiah27:20 ebio Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, atairete ekero keria airete korwa ase Yerusalemu Yekonia mosinto o Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, amo nabanene bonsi b’Abayuda na aba Yerusalemu, akabaira Babeli ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah27:21 “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba igoro y’ebikorero biria biatigarete ase enyomba y’Omonene, na ase enyomba y’omoruoti bw’Abayuda na ase Yerusalemu:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Ebinto ebio nabiirwe goika Babeli bigenderere kobeerao, goika ekero rituko riria ndabianchere birusigweo birentwe aase aiga.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Ekaba ase omwaka oyio, ekero Zedekia achagete kogamba, ase omotienyi o gatano bw’omwaka o kane, omobani korwa omochie o Gibeoni, Hanania, mosinto bw’Asuri, agakwana nainche ime ase enyomba y’Omonene. Ekero abakuani na abanto bonsi baigwete, agantebia ng’a," 
Jeremiah28:2 aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atebire: “Nabunire rikorogoto ri’omoruoti o Babeli." 
Jeremiah28:3 Ekero emiaka ebere etaraera ning’iranie gocha aase aiga ebikorero bionsi bi’enyomba y’Omonene, ebio Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, arusetie aiga, akabiira Babeli." 
Jeremiah28:4 Boigo ning’iranie Yekonia mosinto o Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, amo nabanto bonsi bairetwe Babeli ase obosomba korwa ase ense y’Abayuda, ekiagera nimbune rikorogoto ri’omoruoti o Babeli.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah28:5 Erio Yeremia omobani akairaneria Hanania omobani, agwo ase amasio ’abakuani na ase abanto bonsi bateneine ime ase enyomba y’Omonene," 
Jeremiah28:6 akamotebia, “Amina. Tiga Omonene akore ayio. Ee, tiga akore amang’ana ayio kwabanire aikerane, erio airanie korwa Babeli ebikorero bi’enyomba y’Omonene na abanto bairetwe obosomba." 
Jeremiah28:7 Korende tegerera oigwe amang’ana aya ngokwana naye aiga ekero abanto bonsi baigwete. 
Jeremiah28:8 Ababani abwo bagotang’anerete aye na inche ase chingaki chia kare nigo babanete igoro y’esegi, na enchara, na oborwaire bogoita, ng’a mbichiche ase chinse chinyinge na ase amaruoti are ne chinguru." 
Jeremiah28:9 Korende igoro ase omobani okobana ng’a omorembe nobe, amang’ana ’omobani oyio karaikeranigwe rirorio oyio nomonyakeene, naende namanyekanete ng’a ekeene Omonene nere omotomete.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Erio Hanania, omobani oria, akarusia rikorogoto riria korwa ase rigoti ria Yeremia omobani, akaribuna." 
Jeremiah28:11 Hanania agakwana ase abanto bategererete, agateba: “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Emiaka ebere etaraika nabo ndabune rikorogoto ria Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, rirue ase amagoti ’ebisaku bionsi.” Korende Yeremia omobani akarua agwo, akagenda." 
Jeremiah28:12 Engaki ende, nyuma Hanania omobani karusirie rikorogoto riria ase rigoti ria Yeremia omobani na koribuna, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Genda otebie Hanania ng’a inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Aye nkwabuna rikorogoto ri’omote, korende ribaga ri’erio Omonene naroisie eri’ekioma." 
Jeremiah28:14 Nimbeke ase amagoti ’abanto b’ebisaku bionsi rikorogoto ri’ekioma, erinde babe abasomba ba Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, nabarabwo mbamokorere, ekiagera inche Omonene namoeire ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana boigo.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Erio Yeremia omobani agatebia Hanania omobani, “Aye Hanania, tegerera oigwe, Omonene tagotometi aye, korende kwaeire abanto ribaga begene oborimo." 
Jeremiah28:16 Ase engencho eyio Omonene otebire ng’a nagoite orue ase ense. Nokwe ase omwaka oyo, ekiagera gwakwanire amang’ana agerire abanto basaririe ase Omonene.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Ase omotienyi o gatano na kabere ase omwaka oria Hanania omobani agakwa. 
Jeremiah29:1 Yeremia omobani agatoma rirube korwa Yerusalemu gochia ase abagaaka b’abanto barenge ase obosomba na ase abakuani, na ababani, na abanto bonsi aba Nebukadinesaro oosete korwa Yerusalemu, akabaira Babeli ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah29:2 Erio nigo riarigetwe nyuma y’omoruoti Yekonia, na ng’ina, na abasomba b’enyomba y’oboruoti abagombaetigwe, na abanene b’oboruoti bw’Abayuda na aba Yerusalemu, na abaroisia b’ebinto, na abaturi b’ebioma, kobarure Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah29:3 Rirube erio rikaegwa Elasa, mosinto o Safani, na Gemaria, mosinto o Hilikia, abwo Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, atomete Babeli ase Nebukadinesaro omoruoti. Aya naro amang’ana arikire ase rirube erio:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, atebire ase abanto bonsi narusetie Yerusalemu nkaira Babeli ase obosomba:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Moagache chinyomba agwo, momenyeo. Rema emegondo, mosimeke endagera, morie okwama okwo." 
Jeremiah29:6 Monyuome abakungu babaiborere abana, abamura na abaiseke. Nyuomeria abamura baino abakungu, na abaiseke baino mobasokie, erinde baibore abana, abamura na abaiseke. Momentekane mobuche agwo, gose omobaro oino tobaisa gokea." 
Jeremiah29:7 Morigerie omochie oyio ase nabatomire gochia amaya; sabera omochie oyio ase Omonene, ekiagera obuya bwaye nabwo bore obwaino." 
Jeremiah29:8 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Timobaisa kong’ainwa nababani baino, na abaringoria baino, abwo bare ase egati yaino, gose timobaisa korengereria igoro ye chindoto chiaino mokorota." 
Jeremiah29:9 Abwo nigo bakobabanera oborimo ase erieta riane, ekiagera inche timbatometi. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah29:10 “Aya naro Omonene atebire: Ekero emiaka emerongo etano na ebere echikire mokobeera agwo Babeli eraere, erio nimbachere, ning’ikeranie eira yane asemore, mbairanie aase aiga." 
Jeremiah29:11 Naki inche nimanyete emeroberio mbwate asemore, emeroberio y’obuya na omorembe, gose tari ey’amabe, na emeroberio y’okobaa ogosemeria ase amatuko aino agochi‐gocha." 
Jeremiah29:12 Erio namondangerie mochiche asende mosabe, nainche nimbaigwe." 
Jeremiah29:13 Namondigie monyoore, komorandigie ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi." 
Jeremiah29:14 Inche Omonene natebire iga: Namondigie monyoore, nainche nimbairanerie amaya aino. Nimbasangererie korwa ase ebisaku bionsi ne chinsemo chionsi ase nabaseretie gochia, mbarente gocha aase nabarusetie nkabaira ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Aya naro narikire, ekiagera inwe mwatebire ng’a Omonene obaeire ababani agwo ase ense ya Babeli." 
Jeremiah29:16 Aya naro Omonene atebire igoro y’omoruoti oikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene gia Daudi, na igoro y’abanto bonsi bamenyete ase omochie oyo, abamino baria batairetwe ase obosomba amo nainwe," 
Jeremiah29:17 ee, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Rora, abwo nkobatomera nde esegi, na enchara, na oborwaire bogoita. Nimbakore babe buna amako are amabe mono atanyare koriegwa." 
Jeremiah29:18 Nimbatunyanerie esegi na enchara, na oborwaire bogoita. Nimbakore babe okoirokia ase amaruoti onsi are ase ense na abanto b’ebisaku bionsi ase ndabe nabaseririe gochia. Abanto nigo barabe bakoragereria ase erieta riaino, naende babe bagoichana na gokumia, babachaye." 
Jeremiah29:19 Ayio nigo arakoreke, ekiagera bangete koigwera amang’ana aane goetera ase abasomba baane ababani, abwo nabete ngotoma asebare naende naende. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah29:20 Inwe abanto bonsi narusetie Yerusalemu nkabaira Babeli ase obosomba, tegerera moigwe ring’ana ri’Omonene!" 
Jeremiah29:21 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba igoro y’Ahabu, mosinto o Kolaya, na igoro ya Zedekia, mosinto o Maaseya, abwo bakobabanera oborimo ase erieta riane: Naama! Nimbabeke ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, ere nabaitere agwo ase amasio aino." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ase engencho yabo abanto barusetigwe ase ense y’Abayuda, bakairwa Babeli ase obosomba, ekero barabe bakoragereria na gokwana amang’ana ’okoragererigwa okwo: Tiga Omonene agokore obe buna Zedekia na Ahabu, abwo omoruoti o Babeli agekerete ase omorero." 
Jeremiah29:23 Barabwo bakorire obonyaka ase egati y’Abaisraeli, ekiagera batomanire nabakungu b’abagisangio babo, naende bakwanire amang’ana ’oborimo ase erieta riane, ayio inche ntabachigete. Ninche omonyene imanyete ayio, naende ninche inde kirori. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Amang’ana aya naro oratebie Semaya, omonto o Nehelamu:" 
Jeremiah29:25 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Aye gwatomire rirube ase erieta riao gochia ase abanto bonsi bare Yerusalemu, na ase Sefania, mosinto o Maaseya omokuani, na ase abakuani bonsi. Ase rirube erio kwarikire iga:" 
Jeremiah29:26 Omonene okobekire aye Sefania obe omokuani ribaga ria Yehoyada. Bono aye obe omoteneneri ase enyomba y’Omonene obe igoro ya kera omonto okobaboka kobana ng’a omobwate na komosoyia ase rikorogoto na komobekera engataare y’ekioma ase rigoti riaye. 
Jeremiah29:27 Bono naki rende otaratogonyera Yeremia oyio okorwa Anatoti ogendererete kobabanera inwe? 
Jeremiah29:28 Yeremia otomire amang’ana gocha aiga Babeli, ogoteba: Namobeere ase obosomba ase engaki entambe; ase ayio agacha chinyomba momenye, moreme emegondo na mosimeke chindagera, morie okwama kwabo.”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Sefania omokuani agasoma rirube erio ekero Yeremia omobani ategererete. 
Jeremiah29:30 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia:" 
Jeremiah29:31 “Toma amang’ana gochia ase abanto bonsi bare ase obosomba, obatebie: Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro ya Semaya Omonehelamu: Ekiagera Semaya obabaneire ntamotometi, ere ogerire inwe kwegena oborimo." 
Jeremiah29:32 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene atebire: Naama! Ning’ee Semaya Omonehelamu egesusuro, ere amo nororeria rwaye. Omonto takonyorekana ore moyo ase abanto baye, oyio orarore amang’ana amaya aya ndakorere abanto baane, ekiagera ere ogerire abanto basaririe ase Omonene!” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah30:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Amang’ana onsi nagotebetie, yarike ase ebuku," 
Jeremiah30:3 ekiagera amatuko ngocha are ekero ndairanerie abanto baane Abaisraeli na Abayuda amaya abo; mbarente ase ense eyio naete chisokoro chiabo, na barabwo nabayeire ebe eyabo.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah30:4 Amang’ana aya naro Omonene akwanete igoro y’Abaisraeli na Abayuda: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Aya naro inche Omonene ngoteba: Twaigure eriogi ri’okorera kw’omoondoko, okorera kw’obwoba na tikori okw’omorembe." 
Jeremiah30:6 Boria momanye; Inee, omosacha nabe morito aibore omwana? Nase ki rende narorire kera omosacha abwatete enda namaboko aye buna omokungu okobina aibore? Nase ki kera omonto aonchokire obosio bwaye?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Obee! Naki rituko riria rire rinene! Rinde tiriri ringa buna rirorio. Eyio nengaki y’emechando y’abanto ba Yakobo, korende nonya naboigo mbatoorigwe korwa ase emechando eyio.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Nebe ekero rituko riria riraike, nimbune amakorogoto, ninyerusie ase amagoti abo. Nimbasansore chingataare basibeire, na barabwo tibakoba abasomba b’abanto b’egesaku ekeao nonya ng’ake." 
Jeremiah30:9 Korende mbamokorere Omonene, Nyasae obo, bamokorere na Daudi, omoruoti obo, oyio ndabatenenerie.”" 
Jeremiah30:10 “Inwe abanto ba Yakobo, timoiroka, inwe Abaisraeli, timoondoka, ekiagera naama, nimbatoorie korwa ase ense y’obosomba. Abanto ba Yakobo mbairane banyore omorembe na obotoereru; monto onde tari oraboboyie”" 
Jeremiah30:11 Naende Omonene otebire: “Inche nigo inde amo nainwe mbatoorie, ninsirie kegima ebisaku bionsi, ebio ase nabasiarerete gochia, korende inwe tinkobasiria kegima. Nimbae egesusuro gi’okobarongeyia ase oboronge, tinkobatiga nonya ng’ake timbaa egesusuro.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Ogochandeka kwaino tigokogwenigwa, amaote aino abeire amabe mono." 
Jeremiah30:13 Monto onde tari orabarwanerere. Eriogo ri’amaote aino tiriri, okogwenigwa tikori asemore." 
Jeremiah30:14 Abanchi baino bonsi babatigire, tibari kobechandera, ekiagera inche nabaakire inwe ogoakwa kw’obobisa. Nabaeire egesusuro ntari namabera, ekiagera okomocha kwaino nokonene, na ebibe biaino biamentekanire." 
Jeremiah30:15 Nase ki mokorera ase engencho y’emechando yaino? Obororo bwaino tibokogwenigwa. Ogosaria kwaino nokonene, na ebibe biaino biamentekanire. Ayio naro agerire nabakoreire igo." 
Jeremiah30:16 Ase igo bonsi abarabasirie inwe nabarabwo mbasirigwe, na ababisa baino bonsi, kera oyomo obo nairwe obosomba. Abwo baraboose, nabarabwo mbooswe, abwo barabasakore, nabarabwo mbasakorwe." 
Jeremiah30:17 Omonene otebire iga: Inche nimbasebokie naende, ningwenie amaote aino, ekiagera abanto nigo babarogete inwe abamotugutire, na bateba ng’a Sayoni nomochie otigetwe, monto onde atayochandekereti.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Naama! Ning’iranie abanto ba Yakobo ase chiema chiabo, nimbe namabera ase obomenyo bwabo. Omochie o Yerusalemu noagachwe naende ase orenge. Na enyomba y’omoruoti neagachwe ase yarenge." 
Jeremiah30:19 Abanto abwo nabatere amatera ay’ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, mbaake amariogi ’omochengo. Nimbamentekanie babuche, na omobaro obo tokoba omoke. Ningere basikwe na tibakobarwa ng’a tibaisaini gento." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abana babo mbabe abange buna kare, omoganda obo nonyore chinguru ase obosio bwane, abwo bakobachanda, nimbae egesusuro." 
Jeremiah30:21 Omonene obo nigo arabe omonto obo abanyene, na omogambi obo nigo ararue ase egati yabo. Nimosukie gocha ang’e asende, nere nang’ike ang’e, ekiagera monto ki orabe noboremu kong’ika ang’e bweka ntamong’useti.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah30:22 “Inwe namobe abanto baane, na inche nimbe Nyasae oino.”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Rora omwaga bw’Omonene! Endamwamu yaye yachire buna omwaga bw’ekerambauti, noguse igoro ase emetwe y’abanyabibe." 
Jeremiah30:24 Endamwamu entindi y’Omonene tekonyara koirana ebatige goika abe oikeranirie ekina kiaye na gokora buna okogania kwaye kore. Amang’ana ayio nigo morache koyamanya buya ase amatuko agochi‐gocha. 
Jeremiah31:1 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase engaki egocha, inche nimbe Nyasae bw’ebisaku bionsi bi’Abaisraeli, na barabwo nababe abanto baane.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Abanto abwo batooregete korwa ase ogoitwa nemioro, mbanyorete amabera agwo ase erooro. Ekero Abaisraeli baganetie banyore obotoereru," 
Jeremiah31:3 inche Omonene nkabaorokera korwa aare. Nabeire mbanchete nobwanchani bwa kare na kare. Ase ayio obuya bwane bwa botambe bwabang’usire. 
Jeremiah31:4 Naende inwe Abaisraeli, abamore asende buna omoiseke omwekungi, nimbaagache nainwe moagacheke, mokong’e. Inwe namwechabere chinchigiri naende, erio mochenge mogotenga amo nabwo bagochenga." 
Jeremiah31:5 Mosimeke emesabibu ase emegondo y’ebitunwa bia Samaria. Abwo barasimeke nabarie okwama okwo. 
Jeremiah31:6 Rituko ngocha rire ekero abarendi bararangerie korwa ase ense y’ebigoro y’Efraimu, batebe: Imoka togende Sayoni ase Omonene Nyasae oito.”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Tera neriogi ri’omogoko ase engencho y’abanto ba Yakobo, moake amariogi ase engencho yaye oyore omonene bw’ebisaku. Raria na goaka ng’a mbuya mono, erio motebe: Omonene obooririe abanto baye, abatigari b’Abaisraeli." 
Jeremiah31:8 Rora, nimbarente korwa ase ense ya sugusu, mbasangererie korwa chinsinyo chi’ense. Amo nabarabwo mbachiche emeuko na ebirema, abakungu bare barito na abakobina baibore, nabairane aase aiga bare omoganda omonene." 
Jeremiah31:9 Ekero barairane mbache bakorera, korende inche nimbatang’ane mbairanie gocha bagosaba. Nimbatang’ane gochia ase chindooche chi’amache, mbaeterie ase enchera engiya ase batagochwe. Inche nigo inde ise bw’Abaisraeli, na Efraimu nomwana one omotangi." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Inwe abanto b’ebisaku, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene, morirarie ase ebisinka na ase chinse chi’aare echire ang’e ne chinyancha, motebe: Oria osiarerete Abaisraeli, nabasangererie naende, ere nabarisie buna omorisia akorisia ching’ondi chiaye." 
Jeremiah31:11 Omonene obooririe abanto ba Yakobo, obatooririe korwa ase amaboko ’abanto bare ne chinguru kobabua." 
Jeremiah31:12 Nabachiche bagotera neriogi rinene igoro y’egetunwa gia Sayoni; nabaayerere gochia ase obuya bw’Omonene, gochia ase endagera, na edivai, na amaguta ’amazeituni, na ase chimanwa chie ching’ondi, na echie chimbori, ne chimori chie chiombe. Obogima bwabo nabobe buna omogondo ogoitororerwa amache; barabwo tibakogoya nonya ng’ake." 
Jeremiah31:13 Erio abaiseke abekungi mbatenge na bagoke, abanto abake na abagotu nababe nomogoko. Ning’onchore ebirero biabo bibe omogoko. Nimbaremie, mbae omosasoko ribaga ri’omoichano." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ninyigotie na goisanekia abakuani nebinto ebinoru; abanto baane mbaisaneke nobuya bwane. Nabo Omonene atebire.” 
Jeremiah31:15 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Eriogi riaigurwe Rama, okorera na okweumia nobororo. Raeli nkobareera are abana baye; tancheti aremigwe ase engencho y’abana baye, ekiagera tibaiyo.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Naende aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Tiga korera mono iga, takoiyeria amariga, ekiagera emeremo yao nenyorerwe eng’eria yaye, abwo nabairane korwa ase ense y’ababisa babo, Inche Omonene nakwanire." 
Jeremiah31:17 Naende ngoteba iga: Ogosemeria nkore asore ase amatuko agochi‐gocha, na abana bao nabairane gocha ase ense yabo." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Naigure Efraimu okorera, ogoteba: Aye kwang’akire ase okondongeyia, na inche narongeire buna emori etorokereiri, ng’iranie, na inche ning’iranigwe, ekiagera naye Omonene, Nyasae one." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ekero nagotigete nigo neitetie, nkaonchoka; nyuma konorokererigwe, nigo neagete ebachwa, ngatureka omotwe one nkarora obosooku, ekiagera nabogoretie obosooku bw’obosae bwane." 
Jeremiah31:20 “Inee! Efraimu tari omwana one nyanchete? Ere nere ongogetie mono. Nonya nkomotianera, nigo imorengereretie botambe. Enkoro yane nigo emwechanderete, ekeene, nimororere amabera.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Ebekere ebimanyererio ase enchera yao, beka ekiorokererio kegokoraa ase ogoetera. Rengereria mono igoro y’enchera enene, enchera eyio gwaeterete. Irana inwe Abaisraeli abamore buna omoiseke omwekungi, irana ase emechie yaino." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ngoika ririri oragenderere konakoong’anya, aye omoiseke one otari omwegenwa? Omonene natonge ring’ana riyia ase ense, omokungu nabe okorenda omosacha.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: “Ekero ndairanerie abanto bairetwe obosomba amaya abo, nabakwane naende amang’ana aya ase ense y’Abayuda na ase emechie ereo: “Omonene agosesenie aye obomenyo bw’abanyaboronge, aye ekegoro egechenu." 
Jeremiah31:24 Abayuda mbamenye ase emechie yabo yonsi amo. Boigo abaremi na abarisia baria bakona‐koong’anya mbamenyeo. 
Jeremiah31:25 Nintimokie na goisanekia abanto abwo barosire; na kera omonto ogoyire nimoisanekie na komoigotia.” 
Jeremiah31:26 (Aroro agwo nkaboka korwa ase chitoro, nkarigereria, ne chitoro chiane nigo chiarenge chingiya asende.)" 
Jeremiah31:27 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Amatuko ngocha are, ekero inche ndabusure ense y’Abaisraeli, na ey’Abayuda, ne chimbusuro chia mwanyabanto na echie ching’iti." 
Jeremiah31:28 Buna nabeire mbarigereretie ase okobasimora, na kobatagora, na kobaonchorana, na kobasiria, na kobarentera amabe, naboigo ndabarigererie ase okobaagacha na kobasimeka. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ekero amatuko aria araike, tibagokwana iga nonya ng’ake: “Abaise babo barire amasabibu amaroro, na amaino ’abana babo abeire nobokang’iti." 
Jeremiah31:30 Kera omonto nigo arakwe ase engencho y’obobe bwaye omonyene. Kera omonto orarie amasabibu amaroro, amaino aye nabe nobokang’iti.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 Omonene otebire iga: “Rora, amatuko ngocha are, ekero ndakore okobwatana okoyia kw’ogotianania nenyomba y’Abaisraeli na ey’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Okobwatana okwo tigokoba buna koria nakorete ne chisokoro chiabo, ekero nabarusetie nokoboko kwane korwa ase ense ya Misiri, okwo basaretie nonya inche narenge buna omosacha obo.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah31:33 Naende Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Oko nakwo okobwatana ndakore n’Abaisraeli nyuma y’amatuko ayio: Nimbeke amachiko aane ime yabo; ninyarike ase chinkoro chiabo. Inche nimbe Nyasae obo, na barabwo mbabe abanto baane." 
Jeremiah31:34 Engaki eyio tibakogenderera kworokererania, kera omonto ogotebia omogisangio oye, gose oyomwabo: Manya Omonene, ekiagera bonsi pi nabamanye inche, korwa omonto omoke mono goika omonene mono. Inche nimbaabere obobe bwabo; tinkoinyora ebibe biabo nonya ng’ake,” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah31:35 Aya naro Omonene agoteba, “Ere oyogotoa erioba riabara mobaso, na gochika omoroberio bw’omotienyi obara botuko amo ne ching’enang’eni, ere oyio ogoserokia enyancha erinde yaeera, oyio erieta riaye n’Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
Jeremiah31:36 Omoroberio oyo obekirwe ase ebinto ebio oise korusigwa asende, ororeria rw’Abaisraeli nigo rorasire tirobao, tibakoba egesaku ase obosio bwane kogenderera botambe.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah31:37 Naende aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Igoro chionsi chiise korengwa na komanyekana, na amaroso ’ense aise gotukwa na komanyekana buna ere, erio inche nintugute ororeria rw’Abaisraeli ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio onsi bakorire.”" 
Jeremiah31:38 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Amatuko ngocha are ekero omochie oria oraagachwe naende asende, gochakera ase Omorobiri o Hananeli goikera ase Egeita gi’Ekoona." 
Jeremiah31:39 Orobebe rwaye rw’okoyorenga narogende aare, rorongee gochia ase ekegoro kia Garebu, naende roonchoke rogende roike Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Rikura rionsi rire nemebere ekwete, ne ribu, amo nemegondo yonsi ere agwo goikera akarooche ga Kidironi, na goika ekoona ekorokwa Egeita gie Chibarasi, gochia ase ensemo ya moocha; chinsemo echio nchibe chinchenu asende inche Omonene. Tichikoonchoranwa gose gosarigwa nonya ng’ake.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia ase omwaka o ikomi bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda. Omwaka oyio nigo orenge omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli." 
Jeremiah32:2 Ase engaki eyio abarwani b’esegi b’omoruoti o Babeli nigo baboerete Yerusalemu, na Yeremia omobani agasiekerwa ase egoora y’echela yarenge ase enyomba y’omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, konya omosibire, ogoteba, “Nase ki okobana kogoteba ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora, nkobeka nde omochie oyo ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli, ayoire." 
Jeremiah32:4 Na Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, tagotooreka korwa ase amaboko ’Abakalidayo, korende ekeene, goika abekwe ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli, akwane nere obosio ase obosio, na kororana nere amaiso ase amaiso." 
Jeremiah32:5 Oyio naire Zedekia Babeli, nere agenderere komenya aroro goika inche Omonene imochiere. Namoisa korwania Abakalidayo timokobabua. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Erio Yeremia agateba, “Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Naama! Hanameli, mosinto o Salumu iso moke, nache asore, agotebie ng’a ogore omogondo oye ore agwo Anatoti, ekiagera omwando oyo naye otungetie, oyogore na koyobooria.”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Erio Hanameli, omomura o tata moke, agacha asende agwo ase nasibire, buna Omonene konya akwanire, agantebia, “Gora omogondo one ore agwo Anatoti, ase ense ya Benjamin, ekiagera naye ochigete oyogore na koyobooria obe oyoo.” Erio inche nkamanya ng’a riria nigo riarenge ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Jeremiah32:9 Korwa ase Hanameli, momura o tata moke, nkagora omogondo orenge agwo Anatoti. Nkamorengera chibesa chisekeli chie chifeta ikomi, na isano na ibere." 
Jeremiah32:10 Nkarika ekaratasi y’okoyogora, nkayebeka ekemanyererio kiane nkayemumeka; nkarangeria birori, naende nkarenga chibesa chiria ase ekerengo ki’oborito." 
Jeremiah32:11 Nkabogoria okobwatana koria gw’okogora omogondo komumekire, korikire emeroberio na amang’ana achikire, amo nokonde kogwekaine koria, korende gotamumekeirie." 
Jeremiah32:12 Erio nkaa Baruku, mosinto o Neria, o Maseya, okobwatana koria agwo ase obosio bwa Hanameli, momura o tata moke, na ase amasio a birori baria konya barikire amarieta abo ase okobwatana okwo, boigo nase amasio ’Abayahudi bonsi abwo baikaransete ase egoora y’enyomba y’abasibwa." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ngachika Baruku agwo ase abanto bonsi baigwete, nkamotebia," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Imokia okobwatana oko gw’okogorana kw’omogondo, okwo komumekeirie na okwo gotamumekeiri, obeke amakaratasi ayio abeere ase ekeguru gekorire korwa ase amaroba, erinde agenderere kobao ase engaki entambe." 
Jeremiah32:15 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli agoteba: Chinyomba na emegondo, amo nemegondo y’emesabibu nabigorwe naende ase ense eye.”" 
Jeremiah32:16 “Nyuma konaeire Baruku, mosinto o Neria, okobwatana koria gw’okogorana kw’oboremo ngasaba Omonene nkabora:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Aye Omonene Nyasae! Naye gwatongete igoro chionsi, na ense, ase okobua kwao na ase okoboko kwao koramboire. Tikeri nonya negento ekemo kegosinyete." 
Jeremiah32:18 Aye nigo okoorokia obwanchani bwao bwa botambe ase abanto chilifu chinyinge, korende nigo okorua egesusuro ase abana ase engencho y’okomocha kw’abaise. Aye Nyasae ore Omonene bwe chinguru, erieta riao nario Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
Jeremiah32:19 Aye nigo ore omonene bw’ogosemia, na omobui ase ogokora kwao. Amaiso ao nigo arigereretie chinchera chionsi chia mwanyabanto; naye okoa kera omonto eng’eria yaye koreng’ana ne chinchera chiaye, na okwama kw’ogokora kwaye." 
Jeremiah32:20 Aye Omonene kwaorogetie ebikone na amakumia ase ense ya Misiri, naende ase amatuko aya nigo ogendererete kobiorokia ase Abaisraeli na ase mwanyabanto bonsi. Aye kwenyoreire erieta rinene goika rituko ria rero." 
Jeremiah32:21 Nigo kwang’anyetie abanto bao Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri, ase enchera y’ebikone na amakumia, na okobua okonene, na okoboko koramboire kore ne chinguru, na ase okoondokia okonene," 
Jeremiah32:22 okabaa ense eye kwarierete chisokoro chiabo eira kobayea, ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke." 
Jeremiah32:23 Korende ekero bachete ase ense eye na koyeira ebe eyabo, tibakoigwerete gose tibabwatetie amachiko ao. Ebinto bionsi kwabachigete bakore, tibabikorete nonya nekemo. Ase engencho eyio kwarentire amabe aya onsi igoro asebare." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Rora, chiburi chi’ogwekengera chiaagachirwe ase chinsemo chionsi chi’omochie, erinde omochie oirwe. Ase engencho y’esegi, na enchara, na oborwaire, Abakalidayo abwo nabanyare koyoira. Omonene, amang’ana gwakwanete aikeranire, na bono kwayarorire." 
Jeremiah32:25 Korende nonya naboigo, aye Omonene nigo gwanchigete ng’a ngore omogondo ng’akane chibesa, naende ndigie birori, nonya omochie oyio obekirwe ase amaboko ’Abakalidayo.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Rora, inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae bw’abanto bonsi. Inee! Egento nkere gensinyete?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Ase ayio, aya naro inche Omonene ngoteba: Rora nkobeka nde omochie oyo ase amaboko ’Abakalidayo, ee, ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, goika ayoire." 
Jeremiah32:29 Abakalidayo abwo bayonaaretie nabache bayotongie omorero, bayosambe amo ne chinyomba echio igoro ase ebirama biabo mware gosambera ubani ase enyasae Baali, naende mokarua okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa ase chinyasae ching’ao, na igo mokangechia nkaba nendamwamu." 
Jeremiah32:30 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Abaisraeli na Abayuda babeire bagendererete gokora ebibe ase obosio bwane korwa obwana bwabo. Ee, Abaisraeli tibakorete kende ekiya, otatiga amabe oka, ayio akangechia nkaba nendamwamu ase engencho y’emeremo y’amaboko abo." 
Jeremiah32:31 Korwa engaki omochie oyo oagachetwe goika rero iga, abanto baye babeire bakongechia na kogera endamwamu yane yoke. Bono goika nyosirie orue ase obosio bwane," 
Jeremiah32:32 ekiagera Abaisraeli, na Abayuda, amo nabaruoti babo, na abanene b’amaruoti abo, na abakuani babo, na ababani babo, na abanto bonsi ba Yuda, na aba Yerusalemu, bakorete ebibe bikagera nkaba nendamwamu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Barabwo baonchokire bang’eire amagega abo gose tari amasio abo. Nonya nabeire nkoborokereria kogenderera botambe, bangire gotegerera amorokererio aane." 
Jeremiah32:34 Bakarenta emegwekano y’ogosasimwa ere okogechia ase enyomba eyio ekorokwa ase erieta riane, na igo bakayekora ekaba eyetachenegeti." 
Jeremiah32:35 Bakaagachera Baali aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa, agwo ase Rikura ria mosinto o Hinomu, na aroro bakarua abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, ase enyasae Moleki. Amang’ana ayio inche ntabachigete, gose atarenge ase ebirengererio biane, ng’a bakore okogechia okwo, na ayio akagera Abayuda bonsi bagakora ebibe.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba igoro y’omochie oyo mogoteba ng’a obekirwe ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli, osirigwe nemioro, na enchara, na oborwaire bogoita:" 
Jeremiah32:37 “Naama! Ninsangererie abanto abwo korwa ase chinse chionsi ase nabaseretie gochia, ekero narenge nendamwamu, na ekeririanda, na okogechigwa. Nimbairanie aase aiga, naende mbabeke bamenye ase obotoereru." 
Jeremiah32:38 Barabwo mbabe abanto baane, na inche imbe Nyasae obo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Nimbakore babe nomoyo oyomo, erinde babe bakobwatia enchera eyemo; erio nario barang’iroke kogenderera botambe, ase engencho y’obuya bwabo, na obw’abana babo bararwe nyuma yabo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ninkore amo nabarabwo okobwatana kw’ogotianania kogenderera botambe, erinde tinkoonchoka ntige kobakorera amaya. Nimbeke obwoba ime ase chinkoro chiabo banyiroke, erinde tibabaisa koonchoka bantige." 
Jeremiah32:41 Nimbe nomogoko omonene ase okobakorera amaya, nimbasimeke ase ense eye imbe nobwegenwa bw’enkoro yane yonsi na omoyo one bwonsi.”" 
Jeremiah32:42 Aya naro Omonene agoteba, “Buna koreng’ana narentete amabe aria onsi amanene igoro ase abanto aba, naboigo ngochia kobarentera amaya onsi aya nabarierete eira kobarentera." 
Jeremiah32:43 Ense eye abanto bagokwana ng’a yasarigwe, yabeire erooro ase abanto batanyare komenya, gose ching’iti, naende ng’a yabekirwe ase amaboko ’Abakalidayo, rora, emegondo negorwe naende aiga." 
Jeremiah32:44 Emegondo negorwe chibesa, na okobwatana gw’okoyegora korikwe, erinde amarieta arikwe na kobekwa ekemanyererio, na okobwatana koria komumekerigwe ase birori bare. Ayio nigo arakoreke ase orogongo rwa Benjamin, na ase chinsemo chionsi chia Yerusalemu, na ase emechie y’Abayuda, na ase emechie ere ase ense y’ebigoro na ase ense omweya, na ase emechie ya Negebu. Ning’iranie abanto boosetwe bache ase ense yabo.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah33:1 Ekero Yeremia agendererete kobeera ase egoora y’enyomba y’abasibwa agwo ase enyomba y’oboruoti, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asare eria kabere, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Aya naro Omonene oyotongete ense, oyo oyebombete akayekora egenderere kobao, ere oyio erieta riaye n’Omonene, agoteba:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Ndangerie, nainche ninkoiranerie, ninkoorokerie amang’ana amanene abisekanete, ayio aye otana komanya." 
Jeremiah33:4 Naende aya naro inche Omonene bw’Abaisraeli ngoteba igoro ye chinyomba chi’omochie oyo, na igoro ye chinyomba chi’abaruoti b’Abayuda, chiria chiatagoretwe nabwo baagachete chindwaki chi’ogwekengera, naende bakorwana esegi:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Abanto ngocha bare korwania Abakalidayo baichorie chinyomba nemebere ekwete y’abanto abwo ndaite nendamwamu yane enene na ekeririanda kiane. Nabisire obosio bwane ase omochie oyo ase engencho y’obobe bwabo. 
Jeremiah33:6 Korende nonya naboigo ningwenie abanto b’omochie oyo, babe nemebere emiya. Nimbagwenie mbae omorembe na obotoereru ase obonge." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ning’iranerie Abayuda na Abaisraeli amaya abo, mbaagache babe buna barenge agwo ritang’ani." 
Jeremiah33:8 Nimbachene korwa ase okomocha kwabo, na korwa ase ebibe bionsi bakorire asende; nimbaabere ebibe biabo bionsi na ogosaria bakorire asende." 
Jeremiah33:9 Omochie oyio nobe okongokia ase ogontogia na okombaka ase amasio ’ebisaku bionsi bire ase ense, ebio biraigwe chinkuma chi’amang’ana nakoreire abanto b’omochie oyio. Abanto b’ebisaku mbairoke na koiguswa ase obwoba, ekiagera nakoreire omochie oyio amaya, naende nayosesenirie.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Aya naro Omonene agoteba, “Abanto nigo bagokwana ng’a aase aiga asarekire, abeire buna erooro, abanto tibaiyo, gose ching’iti, ee, amaene emechie y’Abayuda ne chinchera chia Yerusalemu biatigaire bosa; abanto tibaiyo, gose ching’iti." 
Jeremiah33:11 Korende aase agwo eriogi ri’omogoko na eri’omochengo nariigugwe naende, eriogi ri’omonyuomi na eri’omoriakari, na amariogi ’abateri abwo bagotera ekero bakorenta okoruegwa gw’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase enyomba y’Omonene. Mbabe bagotera iga:” “Iraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase Omonene bw’Emeganda, ekiagera Omonene nomuya, obwanchani bwaye nigo bogendererete botambe. Inche Omonene ning’iranerie ense obuya bwaye bwe ritang’ani.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah33:12 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba, “Aase aiga are buna erooro ase abanto batamenyeti, gose ching’iti, korende emechie yaye yonsi nemenywe nabarisia bakorisia ching’ondi naende." 
Jeremiah33:13 Ase emechie y’ense y’ebigoro, na ey’ense omweya, na eya Irianyi, na ey’orogongo rwa Benjamin, na ase chinsemo chionsi chia Yerusalemu, na ase emechie y’Abayuda, amaicho nabe agoeta inse y’okoboko kw’oyomo okoyabara.” Nabo Omonene agoteba." 
Jeremiah33:14 Omonene otebire, “Naama! Amatuko ngocha are ndaikeranie eira narierete chiamate chi’Abaisraeli na echi’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Ase amatuko ayio na engaki eyio ninkore Omoseboka bw’oboronge oseboke korwa ase ororeria rwa Daudi. Oyio nanache ebina bi’ekeene na oboronge ase ense eye. 
Jeremiah33:16 Ase amatuko ayio Abayuda mbatoorigwe, na abanto ba Yerusalemu bamenye ase obotoereru. Na Omoseboka oyio nigo orarokwe: Omonene Nere Oboronge Bwaito.”" 
Jeremiah33:17 Aya naro Omonene agoteba, “Omonto takobora ase ororeria rwa Daudi oraikaranse ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
Jeremiah33:18 Boigo omonto takobora korwa ase egesaku ki’Abalawi orarue ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase obosio bwane, na ogosamba okoruegwa kw’endagera, na korua ebing’wanso binde kogenderera botambe.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Nakorete okobwatana kwane igoro y’omobaso na obotuko, erinde bibe bikororekana ase chingaki chiabo chichikire, na okobwatana okwo tikogosareka." 
Jeremiah33:21 Boigo okobwatana kwane nakorete na Daudi, omosomba one, ngotenene. Omonto takobora ase ororeria rwaye oraikaranse ase ekerogo kiaye ki’oboruoti. Boigo nokobwatana kwane nabakuani b’ororeria rwa Lawi ngotenene." 
Jeremiah33:22 Buna koreng’ana emeganda ye ching’enang’eni chia igoro na omokenye ore nyancha bitanyare kobarwa, naboigo ororeria rwa Daudi, omosomba one, na orw’Abalawi abakuani bagonkorera, rotanyare kobarwa, ekiagerainche nindomente na korobuchia.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Inee! Kwaigure amang’ana abanto aba bagokwana? Nigo bagoteba: Omonene bwangire ebisaku biria bibere achorete. Nigo bachayire abanto baane, gose tibababareti koba egesaku." 
Jeremiah33:25 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Inche nakorete okobwatana igoro y’omobaso na obotuko, na emeroberio echikeire igoro na ense. Onye ntakong’etie okobwatana okwo," 
Jeremiah33:26 nanga nangete nororeria rwa Yakobo, na orwa Daudi omosomba one, na tinchora omonto bw’ororeria rwaye agambere oroiboro rwa Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo. Nimbairanerie amaya abo na kobarorera amabera.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, ekero Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, amo nabarwani baye bonsi b’esegi, na amaruoti onsi ayarenge inse y’obogambi bwaye, na abanto bonsi barenge korwania Yerusalemu na emechie yaye, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah34:2 “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Genda okwane na Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, omotebie ng’a aya naro inche Omonene ngoteba: Rora, nkobeka inde omochie oyo ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli. Omoruoti oyio nayosambe nomorero." 
Jeremiah34:3 Aye togotooreka korwa ase okoboko kwaye. Goika obwatwe na kobekwa ase okoboko kwaye, erinde mororane nomoruoti o Babeli, amaiso ase amaiso, na gokwana nere morigereranetie obosio ase obosio, aye goika oirwe Babeli." 
Jeremiah34:4 Aye Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene, ekiagera aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro yao: Aye togoitwa nomoro." 
Jeremiah34:5 Aye nigo orakwe kore nomorembe, na buna abanto basambete ebinsari bigotioka buya ase ogotindekwa gwe chisokoro chiao, na abaruoti abwo bagotang’anerete, naboigo abanto barasambe ebinsari ase ogotindeka, na bakoreere aye, bagoteba; Obee, omonene! Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Erio Yeremia omobani agatebia Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda amang’ana ayio onsi agwo Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah34:7 ekero abarwani esegi b’omoruoti o Babeli bagendererete korwania Yerusalemu na emechie ya Lakisi na Aseka, emechie y’Abayuda, konya yatigaire yagiteire chindwaki." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia nyuma Zedekia omoruoti gakoorire gokora okobwatana nabanto bonsi ba Yerusalemu ng’a obosibore borarigwe ase egati yabo. 
Jeremiah34:9 Kera omonto asibore abasomba baye Abaibirania, abasacha na abakungu, erinde monto onde tabaisa gokora Omoyahudi, omonto omwabo, abe omosomba." 
Jeremiah34:10 Abanene b’oboruoti amo nabanto bonsi abakorete okobwatana ng’a kera omonto asibore omosomba oye, omosacha gose omokungu, bakaigwa amang’ana ayio na bakabasibora." 
Jeremiah34:11 Korende nyuma y’ayio abanto nigo baonchorete ebirengererio biabo, bakairania abasomba babo, abasacha na abakungu, abwo konya basiboirwe, na bakababetereria koba abasomba." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ring’ana eri ri’Omonene eriachete ase Yeremia rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Nigo nakorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania ne chisokoro chiaino ekero nachirusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, nkabasibora korwa ase ense eria y’obosomba, nkabatebia:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Ase omoerio bw’omwaka o gatano na kabere kera oyomo oino asibore Omoibirania, omonto omwabo, oyoonetigwe asare na obeire okomokorera ase engaki y’emiaka etano nomo; ere goika aegwe obosibore. Korende chisokoro chiaino tichianyigwerete gose gotegerera chiigwe amang’ana aane." 
Jeremiah34:15 Rero iga mweitia mogakora amang’ana are amaronge ase amaiso aane, mokararia obosibore, kera omonto ase omogisangio oye. Boigo mogakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania ase obosio bwane, agwo ase enyomba eyio ekorokwa ase erieta riane." 
Jeremiah34:16 Nyuma y’ayio mokaonchora ebirengererio biaino, mogakora erieta riane rikaba eritachenegeti, ekiagera kera oyomo oino nigo airania abasomba baye, abasacha na abakungu, abwo konya mwasiboire buna barabwo baganetie. Na bono mwabarentire na kobabetereria koba abasomba baino naende." 
Jeremiah34:17 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba: Inwe mwangire konyigwera, na koraria obosibore kera omonto ase oyomwabo, na ase omogisangio oye. Rora inche nkobaa nde inwe obosibore bwaino; obosibore obwo nabwo obo: Nigo moraitwe nemioro, na oborwaire bogoita, na enchara. Na amaruoti onsi ay’ense naondoke ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio ndabakorere inwe." 
Jeremiah34:18 Abanto abwo basaretie okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete nabarabwo, gose tibarendete amang’ana ’okobwatana koria barabwo bakorete ase obosio bwane, inche nimbakorere buna barabwo bakorete ase emori eria y’okobwatana, bayenachanete ebing’ese bibere, erio bagaeta ase egati y’ebing’ese biria." 
Jeremiah34:19 Barabwo amo nabanene b’oboruoti bw’Abayuda, na aba Yerusalemu, na abateneneri b’enyomba y’omoruoti, na abakuani, na abanto bonsi b’ense eye, baria baetete ase egati y’ebing’ese bi’emori eria," 
Jeremiah34:20 nimbabeke ase amaboko ’ababisa babo na ase amaboko ’abanto bakorigia gosiria obogima bwabo. Nabaitwe bakwe, na emebere yabo ebe endagera ye chinyoni ne ching’iti chi’orosana." 
Jeremiah34:21 Na Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, amo nabanene b’oboruoti bwaye, nimbabeke ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, na ase amaboko ’abanto bakorigia gosiria obogima bwabo. Nimbabeke ase amaboko ’abarwani b’omoruoti o Babeli abwo konya babatigire." 
Jeremiah34:22 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga:” “Naama! Ninchike abanto abwo bairane ase omochie oyo. Nabayorwanie na koyobwata, naende bayosambe nomorero. Ninsarie emechie y’Abayuda ebe bosa temenywa nonde.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Ekero Yehoyakimu, mosinto o Yosia, arenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda, ring’ana rigacha ase Yeremia korwa ase Omonene, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Genda ase abanto b’eamate ya Rekabu, okwane nabarabwo, obarente ase eero eyemo y’enyomba y’Omonene, obae edivai banywe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Ase ayio inche nkaira Yasania, omwana o Yeremia, mosinto o Habasinia, amo nabamura bamwabo, na abana baye bonsi, na abanto bonsi b’eamate y’Abarekabu." 
Jeremiah35:4 Nkabarenta ase enyomba y’Omonene ase eero y’abana ba Hanani, mosinto o Igidalia, omonto o Nyasae. Eero eyio nigo yarenge ang’e neria y’abanene b’obogambi eyarenge irongo y’eria ya Maaseya mosinto o Salumu, omorendi bw’egesieri." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ngatereka bosio bw’abanto b’eamate ya Rekabu ebitoono biaichire edivai, nkabaa nebikombe, nkabatebia, “Kanywe edivai eyio.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Korende barabwo bakairaneria, bakabora, “Intwe titokonywa edivai, ekiagera Yonadabu, mosinto o Rekabu, sokoro yaito, natokanetie ng’a titobaisa konywa edivai nonya ng’ake, intwe gose chinderia chiaito." 
Jeremiah35:7 Boigo naende agatokania, agatotebia ng’a titobaisa koagacha chinyomba gose kobusura chimbusuro, gose gosimeka, gose gotwara emegondo y’emesabibu, korende ng’a tomenye ase chiema ase amatuko aito onsi, erio nario toragenderere koba moyo ase ense eye intwe tore abamenyi." 
Jeremiah35:8 Ase ayio intwe na abakungu baito, na abana baito, abamura na abaiseke, twabeire toigwerete Yonadabu, mosinto o Rekabu, sokoro yaito, ase amang’ana onsi atochigete ng’a titobaisa konywa edivai ase amatuko aito onsi." 
Jeremiah35:9 Intwe titoagacheti chinyomba chi’okomenya, gose titobwati emegondo y’emesabibu, gose ey’okobusura, gose chimbusuro." 
Jeremiah35:10 Intwe twabeire tokoigwera na kogenderera komenya ase chiema. Twakorire amang’ana onsi aya Yonadabu, sokoro yaito, atochigete." 
Jeremiah35:11 Korende ekero Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, achete korwania ense eye, tokairoka abarwani b’esegi b’Abakalidayo na aba b’Abasiiria erio togatebania; Inchuo, togende Yerusalemu. Bono Yerusalemu tomenyete.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Genda okwane n’Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu, obaborie: Inee! Timori gwancha amorokererio na koigwera amang’ana aane inche Omonene?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Amang’ana aria Yonadabu, mosinto o Rekabu, achigete abana baye ng’a tibabaisa konywa edivai, nigo aigwereire na korendwa goika rituko ria rero. Onde tari bw’ororeria roria okonywa edivai, ekiagera baigwerete ogochika gwa sokoro yabo. Inche nabeire ngokwana nainwe kogenderera botambe, korende mwangire konyigwera." 
Jeremiah35:15 Nabeire ngendererete gotoma abasomba baane ababani asemore kobatebia: Kera oyomo oino aonchoke, atige chinchera chiaye chimbe, na ogokora kwaye okobe, gose timobaisa korigia chinyasae ching’ao na gochikorera. Komorakore igo, mogenderere komenya ase ense eyio naete chisokoro chiaino. Korende timwategererete moigwe amang’ana aane, gose timwanyigwerete." 
Jeremiah35:16 Abanto b’ororeria rwa Yonadabu, mosinto o Rekabu, babeire baigwerete na korenda ogochika baetwe na sokoro yabo, korende abanto aba bangire konyigwera inche." 
Jeremiah35:17 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, oyore Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naama! Inche nkorenta nde amabe onsi nakwanete achiche igoro y’Abayuda na abanto bonsi ba Yerusalemu, ekiagera nabeire ngokwana nabarabwo, korende barabwo bangire koigwera; nabeire nkobarangeria, korende bangire goitaba.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Korende Yeremia agakwana nabanto b’eamate y’Abarekabu, agateba, “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Mwaigwereire amang’ana aria Yonadabu, sokoro yaino, abachigete, na mwarendire emeroberio yaye yonsi, na gokora amang’ana onsi abachigete." 
Jeremiah35:19 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Omonto takobora korwa ase ororeria rwa Yonadabu, mosinto o Rekabu, oratenene ase obosio bwane kare na kare.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kwa Yehoyakimu, mosinto o Yosia, igoro y’Abayuda, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Imokia ebuku, orike ime yaye amang’ana onsi nakwanete naye igoro y’Abaisraeli na Abayuda, na igoro y’ebisaku bionsi. Orike kera egento gochakera rituko riria nakwanete naye, ekero Yosia arenge kogamba, goika rituko ria rero." 
Jeremiah36:3 Ande nebe ng’a Abayuda mbaigwe amang’ana aria amabe naganirie gokora asebare, kera omonto nabaise koonchoka atige chinchera chiaye chimbe, na ase ayio, inche nimbaabere ogosaria kwabo na ebibe biabo.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Erio Yeremia akarangeria Baruku, mosinto o Neria, akamotebia amang’ana onsi ere omonyene atebetigwe n’Omonene, na Baruku akaba okoyarika ase ebuku ekero Yeremia arenge koyakwana." 
Jeremiah36:5 Yeremia agatebia Baruku iga: “Inche natangirwe tingenda ase enyomba y’Omonene. 
Jeremiah36:6 Ase ayio, aye genda aroro ase rituko ri’okweng’ata osomere abanto amang’ana onsi ay’Omonene korwa ase ebuku eye kwarika ekero narenge koyakwana. Obasomere aase baranyare koigwa buya, obasomere n’Abayuda bonsi abwo barache korwa ase emechie yabo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Ande nebe ng’a abanto abwo nabasabe Omonene na komosorora, na kera oyomo aonchoke atige chinchera chiaye chimbe, ekiagera Omonene okwanire ng’a narente endamwamu yaye enene, na ekeririanda igoro ase abanto aba.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Ase ayio Baruku, mosinto o Neria, agakora onsi aya Yeremia konya amochikire, agasoma korwa ase ebuku amang’ana ’Omonene, agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
Jeremiah36:9 Ase omotienyi o kianda, omwaka o gatano bw’okogamba kwa Yehoyakimu mosinto o Yosia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, abanto bonsi abamenyete Yerusalemu, na bonsi abaruete ase emechie y’Abayuda, bagacha Yerusalemu, bakararia ng’a abanto beng’ate ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Jeremiah36:10 Erio agwo ase enyomba y’Omonene, ekero abanto bonsi bategererete, Baruku agasoma amang’ana a Yeremia arikire ase ebuku eria abwate. Ayio nigo akorete ase eero ya Gema ria, mosinto o Safani omoriki. Eero eria nigo yarenge ase egoora ya rogoro agwo ase egesoero ki’Egeita Ekeyia ki’Omonene." 
Jeremiah36:11 Ekero Mikaya mosinto o Gema ria, omochokoro o Safani, aigwete amang’ana ayio onsi ay’Omonene arikire ase ebuku eria," 
Jeremiah36:12 agatirimboka gochia ase enyomba y’omoruoti, agasoa ase eero y’omoriki. Aroro agwo nao abanene aba bonsi b’oboruoti barenge baikaransete: Elisama omoriki, na Delaya, mosinto o Semaya, na Elinatani, mosinto bw’Akibori, na Geramia, mosinto o Safani, na Zedekia, mosinto o Hanania, amo nabanene bonsi." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaya akabatebia amang’ana onsi aigwete ekero Baruku asomete ebuku eria ase abanto bategererete. 
Jeremiah36:14 Erio abanene abwo bonsi bagatoma Yehudi mosinto o Netania, omochokoro o Selemia, omocho kororia o Kusi, korangeria Baruku na komotebia, “Imokia ebuku eyio gwasoma ase abanto bategererete, ochiche nero.” Ase ayio Baruku, mosinto o Neria, akabogoria ebuku eria, aga cha asebare," 
Jeremiah36:15 bakamotebia, “Ikaransa, otosomere ebuku eyio.” Na Baruku agakora bo." 
Jeremiah36:16 Ekero baigwete amang’ana ayio, bakaonchoka bakarigererania bare nobwoba, bagatebia Baruku, “Goika totebie omoruoti amang’ana aya.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Erio bakaboria Baruku, “Totebie, naki gwakorete okarika amang’ana aya onsi? Inee! Nigo kwayarigete ekero Yeremia are koyakwana?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku akabairaneria, akabatebia, “Ee, ekero Yeremia agendererete gokwana amang’ana aya, inche nario nagendererete koyarika newino ase ebuku eye.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Erio abanene baria b’oboruoti bakamotebia, “Aye amo na Yeremia, genda mwebise. Timobaisa komanyia monto onde ase more.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Abanene baria bakaira ebuku eria, bakayebeka ase eero eria y’Elisama omoriki, erio bakagenda ase omoruoti agwo ase egoora, bakamotebia amang’ana ayio onsi." 
Jeremiah36:21 Erio omoruoti agatoma Yehudi agende korenta ebuku eria. Yehudi akayerenta korwa ase eero y’Elisama omoriki, erio akayesomera omoruoti amo nabanene bonsi b’oboruoti bwaye, abwo bamoetanaine." 
Jeremiah36:22 Engaki eria ase omotienyi o kianda nigo yarenge ey’obokendu, na omoruoti nigo aikaransete ase enyomba amenyete ekero keria, na omorero nigo ore gwoka ase eriko bosio bwaye." 
Jeremiah36:23 Ekero Yehudi asomire chinsemo isato, gose inye, chi’amang’ana aria, omoruoti akabogoria omoyio, agachinachana, agachiruta riko ase omorero, chikayia. Omoruoti akagenderera kona‐gokora boigo goika ebuku eria yonsi ekayia ekaera ase omorero oria." 
Jeremiah36:24 Korende ase abanto aba, omoruoti gose abasomba baye, abwo baigwete amang’ana aria agosomwa, onde tabete nobwoba, gose tibatandorete chianga chiabo." 
Jeremiah36:25 Nonya nekero Elinatani, na Delaya, na Gemaria basororete omoruoti ng’a tabaisa gosamba ebuku eria, tabaigwerete." 
Jeremiah36:26 Erio omoruoti agachika Yerameeli, momura oye, na Seraya, mosinto bw’Asirieli, na Selemia, mosinto bw’Abudeeli, ng’a babwate Baruku omoriki amo na Yeremia omobani, korende Omonene konya obabisire." 
Jeremiah36:27 Nyuma omoruoti gasambire ebuku eria yabwate amang’ana aya Baruku arigete ekero Yeremia are koyakwana, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Imokia ebuku ende, orike amang’ana aria onsi arenge ase eria entang’ani, eria Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, asambete." 
Jeremiah36:29 Otebie Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Aye gwasambire ebuku eye na koboria Yeremia ng’a nase ki arikire amang’ana imeo ng’a omoruoti o Babeli nachiche asarie ense eye na gosiria abanto bonsi ne ching’iti chionsi." 
Jeremiah36:30 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro ya Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda: Omonto takonyorekana ase ororeria rwaye oragambe ase ekerogo ki’obonene gia Daudi. Omobere o Yehoyakimu okwete notugutwe isiko obe aroro ase omobaso omororo na ase obokendu bwa botuko." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ere amo nororeria rwaye na abasomba baye nimbae egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo. Nindete igoro asebare, na ase abanto ba Yerusalemu, na Abayuda, amabe onsi aria nakwanete ng’a nimbayarentere, nonya nabo bakaanga koigwera.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Erio Yeremia akaimokia ebuku ende, akayea Baruku omoriki, mosinto o Neria; nere akarika ase ebuku eyio amang’ana aya Yeremia akwanete. Akarika amang’ana onsi aria arenge ase ebuku eria entang’ani, eria Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, asambete ase omorero. Boigo amang’ana ande amange buna ayio namentetwe ase ebuku eyio." 
Jeremiah37:1 Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, akabeka Zedekia, mosinto o Yosia, koba omoruoti bw’Abayuda ribaga ria Konia, mosinto o Yehoyakimu." 
Jeremiah37:2 Korende Zedekia amo nabasomba baye, na abanto b’ense eria, tibaigwerete amang’ana Omonene atomete goetera ase Yeremia omobani." 
Jeremiah37:3 Omoruoti Zedekia agatoma Yehukali, mosinto o Selemia, na Zefania omokuani, mosinto o Maaseya, gochia ase Yeremia komotebia, “Otosabere ase Omonene, Nyasae oito.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Ase engaki eria Yeremia nabwate ribaga ri’ogotaara egati y’abanto, ekiagera konya tarabekwa ase echela." 
Jeremiah37:5 Abarwani esegi ba Farao konya barure Misiri, na ekero Abakalidayo, abwo baboerete Yerusalemu, baigwete amang’ana igoro y’abarwani esegi ba Misiri, bagatiga Yerusalemu, bakagenda." 
Jeremiah37:6 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia omobani, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Genda otebie omoruoti bw’Abayuda, oyio obatoma moche komboria amang’ana: Naama! Abarwani ba Farao, abwo baare gocha kobakonya, mbairane gochia Misiri, ase ense yabo." 
Jeremiah37:8 Nyuma y’ayio Abakalidayo nabairane gocha naende ase omochie oyo, bayobwate na koyosamba nomorero." 
Jeremiah37:9 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Timobaisa kweng’aina na goteba ng’a Abakalidayo tibakoirana gocha kobarwania; goika bairane gocha. 
Jeremiah37:10 Nonya yare koba ng’a ngochia kobua more abarwani esegi bonsi b’Abakalidayo abwo bagocha kobarwania, erinde batigare abanto baakirwe chingoma boka, baraire ase chiema chiabo, abanto abwo nabo baraimoke basambe omochie oyo nomorero.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Abarwani esegi b’Abakalidayo bagatiga Yerusalemu, ekero abarwani esegi ba Farao barenge nchera gocha." 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremia akarua Yerusalemu, akagenda ase ense y’Ababenjamin, erinde anyore oboremo obo bwamotungetie ase egati y’abanto bande." 
Jeremiah37:13 Ekero Yeremia aigete ase Egeita kia Benjamin, akaumera omoteneneri bw’abarendi ore korokwa Iriya. Ere nigo arenge mosinto o Selemia bw’Anania. Oyio akabwata Yeremia omobani, akamotebia, “Aye nigo ogotama gochia kobwatana n’Abakalidayo.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremia akamotebia, “Obwo noborimo, tinkogenda kobwatana n’Abakalidayo.” Korende Iriya tancha koigwa amang’ana a Yeremia. Akamobwata akamoira ase abagambi." 
Jeremiah37:15 Abanene b’oboruoti boria bakagechigwa mono ase Yeremia; bakamoaka mono, bakamosiekera ase enyomba ya Yonathani omoriki, eyio konya yakorirwe ebe echela," 
Jeremiah37:16 Yeremia nigo asiekeretwe ase akanunchi gakunyire ase enyomba inse, akaba omenyete aroro ase amatuko amange." 
Jeremiah37:17 Nyuma y’ayio Zedekia omoruoti agatoma abanto barente Yeremia asare, na aroro ase enyomba yaye akamoboria bobisi, “Inee! Ing’ana rinde ndire rikorwa ase Omonene?” Yeremia akamoiraneria, akamotebia, “Ee, ndireo.” Erio akamotebia, “Aye nobekwe ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Erio Yeremia akaboria Zedekia omoruoti, “Mang’ana ki amabe nakorire asore, gose ase abasomba bao, gose ase abanto aba goika kwambekire ase echela?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Ng’ai bare ababani baria bao bakobanerete bakogotebia ng’a, omoruoti o Babeli takonyara koirana gocha gokorwania na korwania ense eye?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Aye omoruoti, omonene one, tegerera oigwe; igwera ogosorora oko kwane kw’oboitongo nkogosorora. Bono tobaisa kong’irania gochia ase enyomba eria ya Yonathani omoriki; oise gokora bo, nigo ndabaise gochia gokwera aroro.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Erio Zedekia omoruoti agachika ng’a Yeremia abekwe ase egoora y’abarendi, naende agachika ng’a kera rituko Yeremia aegwe omogati orenge koroisigwa agwo ase Enchera y’Abaroisia Emegati. Nigo agendererete koegwa omogati goika ekero emegati yonsi yaerete ase omochie. Ase ayio Yeremia akagenderera kobeera ase egoora eria y’abarendi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Bono Sefatia, mosinto o Matani, na Gedalia, mosinto o Pasuri, na Yukali, mosinto o Selemia, na Pasuri, mosinto o Malikia, mbaigwete ekero Yeremia akwanete nabanto bonsi akabatebia," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Omonto oratigare kobeera ase omochie oyo naitwe nomoro, gose nenchara, gose noborwaire bogoita, korende oyo orasoke korwa aiga, na erue ase Abakalidayo, oyio nagenderere koba moyo. Oyio natooreke, tabaisa goitwa ase esegi." 
Jeremiah38:3 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ekeene, omochie oyo nobekwe ase amaboko ’abarwani esegi b’omoruoti o Babeli obe oyobo.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Erio abanene b’oboruoti bagatebia omoruoti, “Tiga omonto oyo aitwe. Nigo agoita emioyo y’abarwani esegi batigarete ase omochie oyo, amo ney’abanto bonsi ase okobatebia amang’ana buna ayio. Omonto oyo taganereti abanto amang’ana amaya, korende nigo abaganeretie amabe basire.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Zedekia omoruoti agatebia abagambi baria, “Rora nigo are ase amaboko aino, ekiagera inche omoruoti tinkonyara gokora amang’ana are mamincha yaino.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Abagambi abwo bakaira Yeremia, bakamotirimbokeria chingori gochia ase engoro ya Malikia, omomura bw’omoruoti. Engoro eyio nigo yarenge ase egoora y’abarendi tiyarenge namache, korende netintira yoka yarengeo; na Yeremia akarateera imeo." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ebedi‐Meleki Omoetiopia, omosomba bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, akaigwa ng’a abagambi baria babekire Yeremia ime ase engoro eria. Ekero ekio omoruoti nigo aikaransete ase Egeita kia Benjamin." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ase ayio Ebedi‐Meleki akarua ase enyomba y’omoruoti, akagenda ase omoruoti arenge, agakwana nere, akamotebia," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Aye omoruoti, omonene one, abanto bakorire bobe mono ase amang’ana onsi bakorire ase Yeremia omobani ase okomobeka ime ase engoro eria. Bono ere nigo arakwereo ase engencho y’enchara, ekiagera emegati yonsi yaerire korwa ase omochie.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Erio omoruoti agachika Ebedi‐Meleki, Omoetiopia oria, akamotebia, “Ira abanto emerongo etato korwa aiga, ogende amo nabarabwo, na morusie Yeremia omobani korwa ase engoro ime, atarakwa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ase ayio, Ebedi‐Meleki akagenda amo nabanto baria ase enyomba ase ekenunchi, inse ye rigachero, akarusia korwa aroro amachanchabe ne chianga chingotu, agachisiba chingori, agachitirimbokia gochia ase engoro inse ase Yeremia." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi‐Meleki, Omoetiopia oria, agatebia Yeremia, “Agia chianga echio ase chintigatigi chiao, oagie ne chingori korwa inse.” Yeremia agakora bo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Abanto abwo bakang’usa Yeremia ne chingori chiria korwa ase engoro eria, bakamorusiao. Na Yeremia akagenderera kobeera ase egoora y’abarendi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Nyuma y’ayio Zedekia omoruoti agatoma abanto ase Yeremia omobani bakamorenta asare agwo ase egesoero kia gatato ki’Enyomba y’Omonene. Erio omoruoti agakwana na Yeremia, akamotebia, “Ngokoboria inde ring’ana; tobaisa kombisa gento kende gionsi.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremia akairaneria Zedekia, akabora, “Ndagotebia ring’ana erio, Inee, nobe nobomaene ng’a tokong’ita? Naende ndagotebia amang’ana ay’okogosemia, nontegerere?”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Erio Zedekia omoruoti agatiana bobisi ase Yeremia, akabora, “Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo, oria ototongete agatoa obogima obo, tinkonyara kogoita gose gokobeka ase amaboko ’abanto abwo bakorigia basirie obogima bwao.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Erio Yeremia agatebia Zedekia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Aye korerue ase amaboko ay’abakogamba inse y’omoruoti o Babeli, notigwe obe moyo, na omochie oyo togosambwa nomorero; aye amo nabanto b’eamate yao namotigwe mobe moyo." 
Jeremiah38:18 Korende koraange kwerua ase abagambi baria b’omoruoti o Babeli, rirorio omochie oyo nobekwe ase amaboko ’Abakalidayo, na barabwo mbayosambe nomorero, naye omonyene tokorua ase amaboko abo otooreke.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Zedekia omoruoti akairaneria Yeremia, akamotebia, “Noboire Abayahudi baria batamete bakabwatana n’Abakalidayo. Inse kwerua, nigo ndabaise gochia kobekwa ase amaboko abo, na barabwo banchecherie ase ogonchanda.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremia akamotebia, “Tokobekwa ase amaboko abo. Igwera amang’ana ’Omonene aya nkogotebia, erio nario amang’ana arabe amaya asore, aye notigwe obe moyo." 
Jeremiah38:21 Omonene onyorokirie amang’ana arabe asore onye gokwanga kwerua. 
Jeremiah38:22 Amang’ana ayio naro aya: Abakungu bonsi barache gotigwa ase enyomba y’omoruoti bw’Abayuda mbairwe gochia ase abagambi bare inse y’omoruoti o Babeli. Nigo barabe bagokwana iga:” “Abasani bao kwegenete nigo bakong’ainete, barabwo bagakobua. Bono amagoro ao arateerire ase etintira, abwo beonchoire, bagotigire." 
Jeremiah38:23 “Abakungu bao bonsi na abana bao abamura nabairwe ase Abakalidayo, naye omonyene tokorwa ase amaboko abo otooreke, korende omoruoti o Babeli nakobwate; na omochie oyo nosambwe nomorero.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Erio Zedekia agatebia Yeremia omobani, “Tobaisa gotebia monto onde amang’ana aya twakwanire naye. Oise gotebia onde ayio, goika okwe." 
Jeremiah38:25 Korende abanene baria b’oboruoti kobaraigwe amang’ana ng’a inche nakwana naye, naende bachiche asore bakoborie ng’a obatebie amang’ana gwakwana nainche omoruoti, na ninki nagotebia, bagokoboria ng’a tobabisa gento ng’a nario batagoite," 
Jeremiah38:26 erio obairanerie, obatebie: Nigo nasorora omoruoti ng’a tabaisa kong’irania naende gochia ase enyomba ya Yonathani, mbaise gochia gokwerao.”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Agwo abanene baria bonsi b’oboruoti bagacha ase Yeremia, bakamoboria amang’ana ayio, na Yeremia akabairaneria buna omoruoti konya amosemirie. Ase ayio abanene baria bagatiga amang’ana ayio, ekiagera konya taramanyekana." 
Jeremiah38:28 Erio Yeremia akagenderera kobeera ase egoora eria y’abarendi goika rituko riria omochie o Yerusalemu obwatetwe na koirwa. 
Jeremiah39:1 Ase omotienyi o ikomi, omwaka o kianda bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, amo nabarwani baye bonsi b’esegi, bagacha bakaboera Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah39:2 Na ase rituko ria kianda ri’omotienyi o kane bw’omwaka o ikomi nomo, bakabochora chindwaki chi’omochie oria." 
Jeremiah39:3 Ekero omochie o Yerusalemu obwatetwe, abanene baria bonsi b’oboruoti bwa Babeli bagasoa ime, bagaikaransa ase Egeita kia Gati‐gati. Abanene abwo nabwo aba: Nerigali‐Sareseri, na Namigari‐Nebo, na Sari‐Sekemu omoteneneri bw’abasomba b’omoruoti, na Nerigali‐Sareseri, omoringoria omonene amo nabanene bande bonsi b’omoruoti o Babeli." 
Jeremiah39:4 Ekero Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, amo nabarwani baye bonsi, baroche abanene abwo bagatama botuko, bagasoka korwa ase omochie, bagaeta ase omogondo bw’omoruoti, bakagenda bagasokera egeita kiarenge gati‐gati ye chindwaki ibere. Bagatama gochia ase Ekerubo Ekiomo." 
Jeremiah39:5 Korende abarwani esegi b’Abakalidayo bakababwatia. Bagaikera Zedekia agwo ase ense eraire ya Yeriko. Ekero bamobwatete, bakamoira ase Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, agwo ase omochie o Ribula, ase ense ya Hamati, na Nebukadinesaro akamonachera ekina." 
Jeremiah39:6 Agwo Ribula omoruoti o Babeli agaita abana abamura ba Zedekia; agaita nabanene bonsi b’Abayuda. 
Jeremiah39:7 Nyuma y’ayio agakonora Zedekia amaiso, erio akamosiba ne chingataare, akamoira Babeli." 
Jeremiah39:8 Naende Abakalidayo bagasamba enyomba y’omoruoti oyio amo ne chinyomba chi’abanto, naende bagatagora chindwaki chia Yerusalemu, bagachiiyeria inse." 
Jeremiah39:9 Erio Nebusaradani, omochiki bw’abarendi, akabwata abanto batigarete ase omochie amo na baria batamete gochia asare, akabaira Babeli ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah39:10 Korende omochiki oyio omonene agatigaria abanto bande ase ense y’Abayuda; baria barenge abataka mono, batabwate gento kende, abwo akabaa emegondo y’emesabibu na ase ekero ekio akabaa nemegondo ende." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, agachika Nebusaradani, omochiki bw’abarendi, igoro ya Yeremia, akamotebia," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Ira Yeremia, omorende buya mono. Tobaisa komokorera amang’ana ande amabe, korende amang’ana aragotebie omokorere”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Ase ayio Nebusaradani, omochiki bw’abarendi, na Nebusasibani, omoteneneri bw’abasomba b’omoruoti, na Nerigali‐Sareseri, omoringoria omonene, na abanene bonsi abarenge amo nomoruoti o Babeli," 
Jeremiah39:14 bagatoma abanto barusie Yeremia korwa ase egoora y’abarendi. Abanto abwo bakamobeka ase oborendi bwa Gedalia mosinto bw’Ahikamu, omochokoro o Safani, amoire nka. Bono Yeremia akaba omenyete amo nabanto bande." 
Jeremiah39:15 Agwo ritang’ani, ekero Yeremia agendererete komenya ase egoora eria y’abarendi, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asare, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Genda, otebie Obedi‐Meleki, Omoetiopia oria, ng’a aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naama! Amang’ana aane nakwanete igoro ase omochie oyo ninyaikeranie, tari ase okoyorentera amaya, korende ninyorentere obobe. Aye nobeo ase rituko erio orore buna agokoreka." 
Jeremiah39:17 Korende inche Omonene ningotoorie ase rituko erio, gose tokonyara kobekwa ase amaboko ’abanto abwo aye bwoboete." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ekeene, inche ningotoorie togoitwa nomoro. Aye notooreke togoitwa ase esegi, ekiagera aye nigo onsemeretie inche. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia nyuma Nebusaradani, omochiki bw’abarendi, kamorusirie korwa ase omochie o Rama, aase arenge osibire ne chingataare amo nabanto ba Yerusalemu na Abayuda baria bairetwe Babeli ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah40:2 Omochiki oria bw’abarendi akaira Yeremia ensemo, akamotebia, “Omonene, Nyasae oo, nararetie ng’a amang’ana aya amabe nayenyore ense eye." 
Jeremiah40:3 Omonene orentire amang’ana ayio amabe, ere okorire buna akwanete. Ekiagera mwakorete ebibe ase Omonene, gose timwamoigwerete, amang’ana aya amabe abanyorire." 
Jeremiah40:4 Rora, rituko ria rero nkorusia nde chingataare echio ase amaboko ao, nagosiboire. Korarore ng’a mbuya ogende amo nainche Babeli, inchuo togende, nainche ninkorende buya mono. Korende korarore ng’a tari buya kogenda amo nainche Babeli, tobaisa kogenda. Rigereria ense yonsi nigo ere ase obosio bwao; genda aase orarore are buya na boronge asore.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Ekero Yeremia atarairana kogenda, omochiki oria akamotebia, “Irana ogende komenya ase Gedalia mosinto bw’Ahikamu, mochokoro o Safani, oyio omoruoti o Babeli achorete koba omogambi ase emechie y’Abayuda. Nomenye amo nere na amo nabanto bande, gose genda aande onsi ase oranche.” Erio omochiki oria akamoa endagera amo nebiegwa binde, akamotiga agende aase aganetie." 
Jeremiah40:6 Erio Yeremia akairana, akagenda komenya na Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu, agwo Misipa, akaba omenyete amo nabanto bande, abwo batigarete ase ense eria." 
Jeremiah40:7 Abachiki bonsi b’abarwani esegi b’Abayuda, amo nabanto babo, abwo batigarete ase chinsemo chinde ase ense eyio, bakaigwa ng’a omoruoti o Babeli obekire Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu, koba omogambi ase ense eria, agambere abanto abarenge abataka mono, abasacha na abakungu, amo nabana, abwo batairetwe Babeli ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah40:8 Ase igo Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, na Yohanani, na Yonathani, basinto ba Karea, na Seraya, mosinto o Tanahumeti, na basinto ba Efai korwa Netofa, na Yesania, mosinto bw’omonto oyomo korwa Maaka, amo nabanto babo, bagachiera Gedalia agwo Misipa." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia mosinto bw’Ahikamu, mochokoro o Safani, akariera abachiki baria amo nabanto babo eira na gotiana, akabatebia, “Timobaisa kwoboa gokorera Abakalidayo mobeere ase ense eye, mobe mokomokorera omoruoti o Babeli, nainwe namomenye buya motari na bokong’u." 
Jeremiah40:10 Inche omonyene nimenye agwo Misipa, imbe omoteneneri oino ase obosio bw’Abakalidayo abwo bagocha asetore, korende inwe mobe mogosangereria na kogacha ase ebigachero biaino edivai, na amatunda ay’ekero ki’omorakeera, na amaguta, na mogenderere komenya ase emechie eyio mwairire ebe eyaino.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Abayahudi bonsi abarenge ase ense y’Abamoabu, na abwo bamenyete ase egati y’Abaamoni, na ase ense y’Abaedomu, na ase chinse chinde, bakaigwa ng’a omoruoti o Babeli natigaretie Abayahudi bande ase ense yabo, naende ng’a konya obekire Gedalia mosinto bw’Ahikamu, mochokoro o Safani, obeire omogambi igoro ase abanto abwo." 
Jeremiah40:12 Ase igo Abayahudi abwo bonsi bakairana korwa ase chinsemo chionsi echio ase konya baserigwe gochia, bagacha ase ense yabo, ase Gedalia agwo Misipa. Aroro agwo bagasangereria na kogacha edivai na amatunda ay’ekero ki’omorakeera." 
Jeremiah40:13 Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, na abaraai bonsi b’abarwani esegi, abwo barenge ase chinsemo chinde chi’ense eria, bagacha ase Gedalia agwo Misipa" 
Jeremiah40:14 bakamoboria, “Inee! Nomanyete ng’a Baalisi, omoruoti bw’Abaamoni, otomire Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, agoite?” Korende Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu, tegenete amang’ana ayio." 
Jeremiah40:15 Erio Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, agakwana na Gedalia bobisi agwo Misipa, akamotebia, “Ing’a ribaga ngende ing’ite Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, na omonto onde tari oramanye amang’ana ayio. Nase ki ere aragoite, erinde Abayahudi bonsi bachire asore baserebekane, na abatigari b’Abayuda basire?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Korende Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu, agatebia Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, “Tobaisa gokora egento buna ekio, ekiagera aye nigo ogokwana oborimo igoro ya Isumaeli.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Ase omotienyi o gatano na kabere ase omwaka oria, Isumaeli mosinto o Netania, mochokoro bw’Elisama, oyorenge omonto bw’enyomba y’obogambi na omoteneneri omonene igoro ase abanene barenge gokorera omoruoti, amo nabanto bande ikomi, bagacha ase Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu, agwo Misipa. Ekero barenge koria endagera amo bonsi agwo Misipa," 
Jeremiah41:2 Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, amo nabanto baria ikomi barenge komo, bagatenena bagaaka Gedalia mosinto bw’Ahikamu, mochokoro o Safani, nomoro, bakamoita. (Gedalia oria omoruoti o Babeli konya abekire koba omogambi ase ense eria.)" 
Jeremiah41:3 Naende Isumaeli agaita Abayahudi bonsi barenge amo na Gedalia agwo Misipa, agaita nabarwani esegi b’Abakalidayo abwo banyorekanete bare aase agwo." 
Jeremiah41:4 Rituko ria kabere Gedalia gaitirwe, na monto onde konya taramanya amang’ana ayio," 
Jeremiah41:5 abanto emerongo etano na etato bakarua Sekemu, na Silo, na Samaria, bakagenda ase enyomba y’Omonene, babwate okoruegwa kw’endagera na ubani. Abanto abwo nigo bagingerete chinderu chiabo, na batandorete chianga chiabo, na emebere yabo nigo yakeba‐kebire," 
Jeremiah41:6 Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, agacha korwa Misipa gocha kobarotota okorera. Ekero aumeranete nabarabwo, akabatebia, “Inchuo ase Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Ekero abanto abwo basoete ase omochie, Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, amo nabanto bande barenge komo, bagaita abanto abwo, erio bakaruta emebere yabo ime ase engoro yakunyire." 
Jeremiah41:8 Korende mbarengeo abanto ikomi ase abwo, babatebetie Isumaeli, “Totoita, ntobwate engano, na esairi na amaguta, na obooke, tokabisete ase emegondo.” Ase ayio akabatiga, tabaita ekero aitete baria bande bamwabo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Engoro eria ase Isumaeli atugutete emebere yonsi y’abanto baria aitete, nigo yarenge eria Asa omoruoti akunyete gotanga Baasa, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, tarwania omochie; korende bono Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, akayeichoria nemebere y’abanto baitetwe." 
Jeremiah41:10 Erio Isumaeli akaira ase obosomba abanto batigarete agwo Misipa, akaira nabaiseke b’omoruoti, na abanto bonsi batigarete, abwo Nebusaradani, omochiki bw’abarendi, atigete ase okoboko kwa Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu. Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, akabaira ase obosomba, akagenda gochia ase ense y’Abaamoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Korende ekero Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, amo nabatang’ani b’abarwani esegi bonsi barenge amo nere, baigwete amang’ana ayio amabe, Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, akorete," 
Jeremiah41:12 bakagenda amo nabarwani esegi babo bonsi komorwania. Bakamochiera, bakamonyora ase ritibo rinene agwo Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Ekero abanto bonsi, abwo Isumaeli airete, baroche Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, amo nabatang’ani b’abarwani esegi, bakaba nomogoko omonene." 
Jeremiah41:14 Ase igo abwo bonsi Isumaeli konya arusirie Misipa na kobaira ase obosomba, bakairana, bagacha ase Yohanani, mosinto o Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Korende Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, amo nabanto bande batano na batato, bagatama korwa ase Yohanani, bakagenda ase Abaamoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Erio Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, amo nabatang’ani b’abarwani esegi, abarenge amo nere, bakairana korwa Gibeoni abanto abatigari, abarwani esegi, na abakungu, na abana, na abasomba, abwo Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, arusetie Misipa, ekero aitete Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu." 
Jeremiah41:17 Bakagenda, bakabeera ase enyomba y’abageni agwo Kimuhamu, ang’e na Bethlehemu, na korwa aroro mbaganetie kogenda ase ense ya Misiri" 
Jeremiah41:18 Nigo boboete Abakalidayo, ekiagera Isumaeli, mosinto o Netania, konya oitire Gedalia, mosinto bw’Ahikamu, oyio omoruoti o Babeli konya abekire koba omogambi ase ense eria." 
Jeremiah42:1 Erio abachiki bonsi b’abarwani esegi, amo na Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, na Yesania, mosinto o Hosaya, na abanto bonsi, korwa omoke goika omonene, bagacha," 
Jeremiah42:2 bagakwana na Yeremia omobani, bakamotebia, “Nigo togokoboria otoigwe, koranche otosabere intwe abatigari ase Omonene, Nyasae oito. Nigo twarenge abange, korende bono twatigaire abake mono ase omobaro, buna otoroche igaa." 
Jeremiah42:3 Otosabere ase Omonene, Nyasae oo, atworokie enchera togwenerete kobwatia, na eki togwenerete gokora.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Yeremia omobani akairaneria, akabatebia, “Naigure amang’ana aino; inche ngochia inde kobasabera ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, buna mwamboririe, na amang’ana ande onsi Omonene arabairanerie, nimbatebie, tinkobabisa nonya nerimo timbatebia.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Erio bagatebia Yeremia, “Tiga Omonene abe kirori bw’ekeene na oyo bw’obwegenwa igoro asetore onye titogochia gokora koreng’ana onsi aya Omonene, Nyasae oo aratotebie goetera asore." 
Jeremiah42:6 Amang’ana ayio karabe amaya gose amabe, intwe goika tomoigwere Omonene, Nyasae oito, oyio asare twagotomire; ekiagera toise komoigwera Omonene, Nyasae oito, amang’ana nabe amaya asetore.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Nyuma y’amatuko ikomi, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Erio Yeremia akarangeria Yohanani, mosinto o Karea amo nabachiki bonsi b’abarwani esegi, abwo barenge amo nere, na abanto bonsi korwa omoke goika omonene," 
Jeremiah42:9 akabatebia, “Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, oyio ase mwantomete erinde ng’ire ogosaba kwaino ase obosio bwaye, agoteba:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Komoragenderere komenya ase ense eye, erio inche nimbaagache na tinkobaiyeria inse; nimbasimeke, na tinkobasimora, ekiagera neitirie ase engencho y’amabe aria." 
Jeremiah42:11 Timobaisa koiroka omoruoti o Babeli, oyio mwoboete; timomoiroka, ekiagera inche nigo inde amo nainwe, mbatoorie na kobarusia korwa ase okoboko kwaye. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah42:12 Nimbarorere amabera, ngere nere abarorere amabera, erinde abatige mogenderere komenya ase ense yaino." 
Jeremiah42:13 “Korende inwe komorange komoigwera Omonene, Nyasae oino, na goteba ng’a timokonyara kogenderera komenya ase ense eye," 
Jeremiah42:14 naende moise goteba ng’a nigo moganetie kogenda ase ense ya Misiri ase motarore esegi, gose koigwa egetureri gi’esegi, gose ase motabe nenchara y’okoborwa endagera,"
