Jeremiah42:15 rirorio inwe abatigari b’Abayuda, igwa ring’ana Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Onye mwanachire ekina ng’a mogende Misiri komenya aroro," 
Jeremiah42:16 rirorio emioro eyio moirogete, amo nenchara, nabibatunyane, bibaikeere agwo ase ense ya Misiri, bibaitere aroro." 
Jeremiah42:17 Abanto bonsi abwo bamanoire kogenda Misiri komenya aroro goika baitwe nemioro na enchara, na oborwaire bogoita. Onde tari oranyare gotigara tanyorwa nobobe obwo inche ngochia korenta igoro asebare.”" 
Jeremiah42:18 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: “Koreng’ana buna narentete endamwamu yane enene igoro ase abanto ba Yerusalemu, naboigo ndayerente igoro asemore, ekero moragende Misiri. Inwe nigo morabe mogokwanwa ekero abanto barabe bakoragereria, na ekero abanto bakobarora nigo barakumie na goichana, naende mobe mogochecherigwa. Timokoirana gocha korora aase aiga naende." 
Jeremiah42:19 “Inwe abatigari b’Abayuda, Omonene obatebirie ng’a timobaisa kogenda Misiri. Manya kegima ng’a inche nabakureire inwe rituko ria rero." 
Jeremiah42:20 Nigo mweng’ainete ekero mwantomete ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, mogantebia: Genda otosabere ase Omonene, Nyasae oo, na amang’ana ande onsi Omonene, Nyasae oito, aragotebie, aye gokoyatotebia goika toyakore." 
Jeremiah42:21 Rituko ria rero inche nabatebirie amang’ana onsi Omonene antomete ng’a mbatebie, korende inwe mwangire komoigwera Omonene, Nyasae oito." 
Jeremiah42:22 Ase ayio, bono manya na mobe nobomaene ng’a inwe mokwe ase ogoitwa nemioro, na enchara, na oborwaire bogoita, aase agwo mwaganirie kogenda komenya buna abamenyi.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Ekero Yeremia akoorete gotebia abanto bonsi amang’ana ayio Omonene, Nyasae obo, amotomete kobatebia," 
Jeremiah43:2 Asaria, mosinto o Hosaya, na Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, amo nabanto abamwenu bonsi, bagatebia Yeremia, “Ayio noborimo ogokwana. Omonene Nyasae oito tagotometi ng’a otokanie titogenda Misiri komenyao." 
Jeremiah43:3 Korende Baruku, mosinto o Neria, nere ogoseegetire obe mamincha yaito na gotobeka ase amaboko ’Abakalidayo, erinde batoite gose batoire Babeli ase obosomba.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Nonya Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, gose abachiki b’abarwani esegi, gose abanto bonsi, tibamoigwerete Omonene, erinde bagenderere komenya ase ense eria y’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ribaga ri’ayio Yohanani, mosinto o Karea, amo nabachiki baria bonsi, bakaira Misiri Abayuda bonsi abatigari, abwo bairanete komenya ase ense y’Abayuda, abwo baruete korwa ase ebisaku ebio ase baseretigwe gochia." 
Jeremiah43:6 Bakaira abasacha, na abakungu, na abana, na abaiseke b’omoruoti, na kera omonto Nebusaradani, omochiki bw’abarendi, atigete ase oborendi bwa Gedalia mosinto bw’Ahikamu, omochokoro o Safani; bakaira na Yeremia omobani, na Baruku, mosinto o Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Bakagenda nabanto abwo ase ense ya Misiri, gochia ase omochie o Tapanesi, ekiagera tibamoigwerete Omonene." 
Jeremiah43:8 Ekero barenge agwo Tapanesi, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Bogoria amagena amanene ase amaboko ao, erio oyaoomeranie inse, ang’e negesoero ki’enyomba ya Farao, agwo Tapanesi. Okore ayio ekero Abayuda baroche." 
Jeremiah43:10 Erio obatebie: Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naama! Inche Omonene nindangerie Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, omosomba one, ere nabeke ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene igoro ase amagena aya natubire aiga, nabe okwara na kogetuba omogeke oye bw’obonene." 
Jeremiah43:11 Ere nache aake ense ya Misiri, erio abanto bagochia goitwa noborwaire bogoita, baitwe naborobwo; na abagochia gwoswa bairwe; na abagochia goitwa nemioro, baitwe nero." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ere natongie chihekalu chie chinyasae chiria. Ase enchera eyio nachene ense ya Misiri buna omorisia akorusia chinda chire ase eanga yaye akwambara. Nebukadinesaro gakoorire gokora ayio, nairane ase ense yaye nomorembe." 
Jeremiah43:13 Natagore emegwekano y’amagena egosasimwa agwo Heliopolis ase ense ya Misiri. Nasambe nomorero chinyomba chie chinyasae chia Misiri.” 
Jeremiah44:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia igoro y’Abayahudi bonsi bamenyete ase ense ya Misiri, agwo ase emechie ya Migidoli, na Tapanesi, na Memifisi, na ase orogongo rwa Patirosi, rigateba:" 
Jeremiah44:2 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Inwe mwarorire amabe onsi narentete ase Yerusalemu, na ase emechie yonsi y’Abayuda. Nonya ngoika rero emechie eyio nigo esaregete, na onde tamenyeti aroro," 
Jeremiah44:3 ekiagera abanto nigo bakorete ebibe, bakangechia, na inche nkaba nendamwamu asebare, Barabwo nigo basambete ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao, naende bagachikorera. Chinyasae echio batamanyete, gose inwe timochimanyeti, nonya nechisokoro chiaino tichiachimanyete." 
Jeremiah44:4 “Korende nonya naboigo, inche nigo nagendererete gotoma abasomba baane ababani kobatebia: Timobaisa gokora amang’ana ’okogechia aya inche Omonene ngechete." 
Jeremiah44:5 Korende abanto abwo tibaigwerete, gose gontegerera, erinde baonchoke korwa ase obobe, gose batige gosamba ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ase engencho eyio nkarenta ekeririanda kiane na endamwamu yane ase emechie y’Abayuda ne chinchera chia Yerusalemu, na bikaba amaturi bitamenyiri, buna bire goika rero iga." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Bono aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Nase ki mogwekorera inwe abanyene obobe obo obonene? Nigo morigetie gosiria kegima abasacha na abakungu, na abana bakogonka, na abana bande, korwa ase Abayuda, na timotigaria nonya noyomo?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Nase ki mokongechia nkoba nendamwamu ase engencho y’emeremo y’amaboko aino ase ogosamba ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao agwo ase ense ya Misiri momenyete? Inee! Nigo mogokora ayio ase ogwesiria kegima, erinde abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bi’ense babachecherie na koragereria ase erieta riaino?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Inee! Nigo mwebire obobe bwe chisokoro chiaino na obw’abaruoti b’Abayuda, na obw’abakungu babo, na obwaino, na obw’abakungu baino, obwo bwakoretwe ase ense y’Abayuda na ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Goika rituko ria rero monto onde tari bwekeeirie ase okoba omoitongo, gose koiroka na kobwata amachiko aane, na emeroberio nabegete ase amasio aino, na ase amasio e chisokoro chiaino." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli agoteba: Naama! Nanachire ekina, ase ebirengererio biane ng’a nimbarentere amaakwa na kobasiria inwe Abayuda bonsi." 
Jeremiah44:12 Nindusie abatigari b’Abayuda, abwo babekire ebirengererio biabo gochia komenya buna abamenyi ase ense ya Misiri, mbasirie bonsi pi. Mbakwere agwo ase ense ya Misiri ase ogoitwa nemioro na enchara. Ee, mbasirigwe ase ogoitwa nemioro na enchara, korwa omonto omoke goika omonene. Nababe bagokwanwa ekero abanto bakoragereria, na ekero abanto bakobarora nigo barakumie na goichana, naende babe bakoragererigwa na gochecherigwa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Nindue egesusuro ase abanto bamenyete ase ense ya Misiri, buna nakorete ase abanto ba Yerusalemu; nimbasirie ase ogoitwa nemioro, na enchara, na oborwaire bogoita." 
Jeremiah44:14 Nonya nomonto oyomo ase abatigari b’Abayuda abwo bachete komenya ase ense ya Misiri tagotooreka, gose koirana gochia ase ense y’Abayuda, eyio baganetie bairane gochia komenyao. Tibakonyara koirana, otatiga abanto bake abaratooreke.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Erio abasacha bonsi abamanyete ng’a abakungu babo konya basambire ubani ase chinyasae ching’ao, amo nabakungu bonsi bateneine agwo, na omosangererekano omonene, na abanto bonsi abamenyete ase orogongo rwa Patirosi ase ense ya Misiri, bakairaneria Yeremia, bakamotebia," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Igoro y’amang’ana ayio gwakwanire asetore ase erieta ri’Omonene, intwe titokoigwera." 
Jeremiah44:17 Korende intwe nigo togochia gokora buna twarire eira gokora. Tosambe ubani ase Eting’ana ya Igoro, naende toumore okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa asere, buna twakorete intwe amo ne chisokoro chiaito, na abaruoti baito amo nabanene baito. Ayio nigo tware koyakora ase emechie y’Abayuda na ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu. Ekero keria nigo twabwate endagera enyinge, naende tokagenderera gosesenigwa, na titwanyoretwe namabe ande onsi." 
Jeremiah44:18 Korende gese twatigete gosamba ubani na koumora okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa ase Eting’ana ya Igoro, twabeire tokoremerwa kera egento, naende twabeire togosirigwa ase ogoitwa nemioro na enchara.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Na abakungu bagateba, “Ekero twasambete ubani na koumora okoruegwa gwaito gw’ekenyugwa ase Eting’ana ya Igoro, naende tokayeroiseria emegati yabekire omogwekano oye, abasacha baito nigo bancheranete nayio.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Erio Yeremia akairaneria, agatebia abanto bonsi, abasacha na abakungu, abwo bonsi bakwanete amang’ana ayio, akabora," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Igoro ya ubani eria mwasambete agwo ase emechie y’Abayuda na ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu, inwe ne chisokoro chiano, na abaruoti baino, na abanene baino b’oboruoti, na abanto bonsi b’ense eyio, Inee, nigo mokagete ng’a Omonene tainyoreti amang’ana ayio onsi?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Ekeene, Omonene tare konyara koremereria nogokora kwaino okobe, na okogechia okwo mwakorete. Ase ayio ense yaino yasarigwe yabeire bosa, naende yaragererigwe, temenyiri na onde; naboigo ere goika rero iga." 
Jeremiah44:23 Amabe aya nigo abanyorire goika rituko eri ria rero, ekiagera inwe mwasambete ubani, naende mogakora ebibe ase Omonene, gose timwamoigwerete gose kobwatia amachiko aye, na emeroberio yaye echikire, na oborori bwaye.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Naende Yeremia agakwana nabanto bonsi amo nabakungu bonsi, akabatebia, “Inwe Abayuda bonsi aba more ase ense ya Misiri, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Jeremiah44:25 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Inwe amo nabakungu baino mwakorire na goikerania namaboko aino ayio mwakwanete nemenwa yaino, mogateba: Goika tokore buna twariete eira gokora; tosambe ubani ase Eting’ana ya Igoro, naende toumore okoruegwa kw’ebinyugwa asere. Bono inwe kora bo, moikeranie chiira chiaino!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Korende inwe Abayuda mwensi momenyete ase ense ya Misiri, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene! Ere nigo agoteba iga: Naama! Netianirie ase erieta riane rinene ng’a, erieta erio tirigwatorwa nonya ng’ake naende nomonwa bw’Omoyuda onde bwensi aiga ase ense yonsi ya Misiri, atebe: Ekeene, buna Omonene Nyasae are moyo." 
Jeremiah44:27 Rora, nigo mbarigereretie korwa igoro ase okobarentera amabe, gose tari amaya. Abayuda bonsi abare ase ense ya Misiri mbasirigwe ase ogoitwa nemioro, na enchara, goika baere kegima." 
Jeremiah44:28 Abaratooreke korwa ase emioro mbarue ase ense ya Misiri, bairane ase ense y’Abayuda, abanto abasinini mono ase omobaro. Abatigari bonsi b’Abayuda abagendete komenya ase ense ya Misiri nabamanye gose ring’ana neriang’o riragenderere koba eri’ekeene, eriane gose eriabo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Omonene otebire iga: Eke nakio kerabe ekemanyererio asemore, ng’a nimbae egesusuro aase aiga, erinde monyare komanya ng’a amang’ana aane nabe okobarentera amabe." 
Jeremiah44:30 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Nimbeke Farao Hofura, omoruoti o Misiri, ase amaboko ’ababisa baye, abwo bakorigia gosiria obogima bwaye, buna nabegete Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, oria orenge omobisa oye, na origetie komoita.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Aya naro amang’ana Yeremia akwanete na Baruku, mosinto o Neria, na Baruku akayarika buna Yeremia ayakwanete, ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kwa Yehoyakimu oyorenge mosinto o Yosia na omoruoti bw’Abayuda:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “Aye Baruku, aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, akogotebia:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Nigo gwakwanete ng’a obobe nobwao, ekiagera Omonene omentire omoichano ase obororo bwao, naende ng’a kwarosire ase ogochandeka kwao, gose tori nogotimoka." 
Jeremiah45:4 “Amang’ana aya naro aye Yeremia oramotebie: Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Naama! Egento naagachete nagetagore, na eki nasimegete nagesimore, engencho yaye nense engima." 
Jeremiah45:5 Inee! Aye nigo okwerigeria ebinto ebinene. Tobaisa kobirigia, ekiagera rora, inche nkorenta nde emechando igoro ase mwanyabanto bonsi, korende nintoorie obogima bwao toitwa ase esegi aase ande onsi oragende.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah46:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia omobani igoro y’ebisaku. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ring’ana eri rigakwanwa igoro ya Misiri, na igoro y’abarwani b’esegi ba Farao Neko, omoruoti o Misiri, abarenge ang’e norooche rw’Eufarati agwo Karikemisi, abwo Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, abuete ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kwa Yehoyakimu mosinto o Yosia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Beka chinguba ne ching’aya ang’e, mogende bosio ase esegi." 
Jeremiah46:4 Inwe abariini chibarasi beka chibarasi ang’e mochiriine. Beka ebigogwa biaino bi’ebioma, mwebeke ang’e, tieria amatimo aino. Beka chigoti chiaino chi’ebioma." 
Jeremiah46:5 Ninki kiagera aya ndoche akorekire? Baondokire na koirana nyuma; abarwani babo chituoni babuirwe, batamire ase okoayerera batari korigereria nyuma; obwoba nigo bore ase chinsemo chionsi. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah46:6 Baria bamanyete kominyoka chimbero tibakonyara gotama, nonya nabarwani bare chituoni tibagotooreka. Agwo sugusu, ang’e norooche rw’Eufarati, bagochirwe na kogwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ning’o oyo onga buna orooche rwa Naili rwaichoire, oyo onga buna chindooche chiaichoire amache?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Misiri nigo ekoimokerera igoro buna orooche rwa Naili. Nigo ekoimokerera igoro buna chindooche chiaichoire amache. Misiri eria egateba,” “Ninyimokerere igoro ntube ense, ninsarie na gosiria emechie na abanto bamenyeteo." 
Jeremiah46:9 Chika chibarasi chigende bosio, ne chigari chigende ne chinguru. Tiga chituoni chi’esegi chigende bosio: Abaetiopia na Abaputi, nabwo ababogoria be chinguba, na Abaludi nabwo abarwaneri amata.”" 
Jeremiah46:10 Rituko riria neri’Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda; rituko ri’okorusia egesiomba, eruserie egesiomba, ase ababisa baye. Omoro nobarie oigote kegima; nonywe amanyinga abo oichore. Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nabe nekeng’wanso ase ense ya sugusu, ang’e norooche rw’Eufarati." 
Jeremiah46:11 Inwe abanto ba Misiri more buna abaiseke abekungi, tiira gochia ase Gileadi monyore amaguta akogwenia. Namoisa konyora amariogo amange a bosa asemore, okogwenigwa tikori asemore." 
Jeremiah46:12 Abanto b’ebisaku baigure amang’ana igoro y’obosooku bwaino, na ebirero biaino biaichoire ase ense, ekiagera omorwani etuoni ogochirwe na kogwa igoro ase etuoni ende. Bonsi bagwereranire amo." 
Jeremiah46:13 Ring’ana eri nario Omonene atebetie Yeremia igoro y’ogocha kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, ase okobua ense ya Misiri:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Kwana aya ase Misiri, moyararie ase Migidoli, ee, yararie ase Memifisi na Tapanesi: Tenena, bwebeke ang’e, ekiagera omoro nosirie ase chinsemo chiao chionsi." 
Jeremiah46:15 Nase ki abanto baino bare ne chinguru batamire? Tibatenenete, ekiagera Omonene abaseretie." 
Jeremiah46:16 Agatiga emeganda yaino ekagochwa na kogwa, erio bagakwana na gotebania Omonto ase omonto: Imoka, toirane ase abanto baito, ase ense yaito twaiboreretwe, totame korwa ase omoro bw’abagotochanda." 
Jeremiah46:17 “Nigo bakorera igoro ya Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, na komoroka Omosiru oyosiririe chingaki chiaye." 
Jeremiah46:18 Omoruoti, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inde moyo, oyomo onga buna Tabori ase egati y’ebitunwa binde na onga buna Karimeli, egetunwa kere ang’e nenyancha, ngocha are." 
Jeremiah46:19 Inwe abanto ba Misiri, beka chigurube chiaino ang’e, mong’anye mogende ase obosomba, ekiagera Memifisi nosirigwe otigare bosa, otamenyiri na monto." 
Jeremiah46:20 Misiri nigo onga buna ritororo rigiya, korende ekiaramba kiarure sugusu na kiayorasire." 
Jeremiah46:21 Abarwani esegi barangeretigwe gokonya nigo banga buna chimori chinoru. Beonchoire batamire bonsi amo, gose tibakonyara gotenena korwana esegi. Naki rituko ri’emechando yabo riabaikeire; eye nengaki bakoegwa egesusuro kiabo." 
Jeremiah46:22 Misiri nigo egochura neriogi ringa buna eri’eng’iti egwekurura. Ababisa ba Misiri nigo bagocha bare ne chinguru. Nigo bagocha bare nebisire buna abagochia kogecha chinko. 
Jeremiah46:23 Omonene nigo agoteba ng’a mbageche rinani ri’ense eria nonya rire rinoru mono ritaetwe nonde, ekiagera abwo nigo bare abange mono kobua chingige, tibakonyara kobareka." 
Jeremiah46:24 Abanto ba Misiri nabanyore obosooku, nababekwe ase amaboko ’abanto bakorwa sugusu.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo agoteba iga, “Rora, nkorenta nde egesusuro igoro ase Amoni, enyasae ya Tebesi, na ase Farao na Misiri, na ase chinyasae chi’ense eyio, na ase abaruoti b’aroro, na ase Farao omonyene, na ase abanto bonsi baria bamosemeretie." 
Jeremiah46:26 Nimbabeke ase amaboko abwo bakorigia gosiria obogima bwabo, na ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, na ase abasomba baye. Korende nyuma y’ayio abanto nabamenye ase ense ya Misiri, buna engaki ya kare. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Korende inwe abanto ba Yakobo, abasomba baane, timoiroka. Inwe Abaisraeli, timokwa emioyo. Naama! Nimbatoorie korwa ase ense y’aare. Abanto ba Yakobo nabairane bamenye ase obotoereru na korendwa, na monto onde tari oraboboyie." 
Jeremiah46:28 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Inwe abanto ba Yakobo, abasomba baane, timoiroka, ekiagera inche nigo inde amo nainwe. Ninsirie kegima ebisaku bionsi ebio ase nabasiarerete gochia, korende inwe tinkobasiria kegima. Nimbae inwe egesusuro gi’okobarongeyia ase oboronge, tinkobatiga nonya ng’ake timbaa egesusuro.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia igoro y’Abafilisti ekero Farao atarabua Gasa, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah47:2 “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Naama! Amache naimokerere igoro korwa sugusu, naichore aminyoke buna emegoko emenene, naichore na gotuba ense na bionsi ebire aroro; namere emechie na bonsi abamenyeteo. Erio abanto mbarere, na abamenyi bonsi b’ense eyio mbarere na kweng’ereria." 
Jeremiah47:3 Ekero baraigwe amariogi ’ebititiro bi’ebitaago bie chibarasi, na okwoga kw’amagoro e chigari. Abaise tibakorigia nyuma barore ase abana babo bare; ekiagera amaboko abo nigo araborwe chinguru." 
Jeremiah47:4 Rituko ngocha rire ekero Abafilisti bonsi barasirigwe, na abatigarete gokonya Turo na Sidoni basirigwe boigo. Omonene nasirie Abafilisti, abare abatigari ase egesinka gia Kafitori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gasa yatigaire bosa, Asikeloni osirire kegima. Inwe abatigari ase rikura riria, ngoika ririri moragenderere gwekeba?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Aye omoyio o birende bw’Omonene, ngoika ririri orabe kogendererete otari gotoerera? Irana ime ase ekegocho kiao, okire na gotimoka." 
Jeremiah47:7 Naki omoyio orakore okire‐kiri na gotimoka, ekero Omonene ayochikire gokora emeremo? Oyochikire orwanie Asikeloni ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba igoro y’Abamoabu: “Obobe nobwa Nebo, ekiagera osarigwe! Kiriataimu onyorire obosooku, ekiagera obwatirwe, chindwaki chiaye chiatagoirwe na obosooku bwachire," 
Jeremiah48:2 ogotogigwa kw’Abamoabu gwasirire. Ababisa bare Hesiboni barobeirie gokora ense eria bobe. Nigo bagotebania: Inchuo tosirie abanto baye tibabaisa koba egesaku naende. Aye omochie o Madimena boigo nokirigwe‐kiri, omoro nokobwatie korwa nyuma." 
Jeremiah48:3 Eriogi ri’okorera nariigugwe korwa Horonaimu, rigoteba: Ogotigara bosa na ogosirigwa okonene." 
Jeremiah48:4 “Ense ya Moabu yasarigwe, abana baye nigo bakorera mono." 
Jeremiah48:5 Nigo bagotiira gochia Luhiti bakorera; ekero bagotirimboka korwa Horonaimu, eriogi ri’okorera kw’ogosirigwa nigo rikoigugwa." 
Jeremiah48:6 Tama! Motoorie obogima bwaino, mobe buna egetutu getigarete gioka ase erooro." 
Jeremiah48:7 “Ekiagera inwe mosemeretie emeremo yaino, na obotenenku bwaino, inamwoswe moirwe ase obosomba, na enyasae eria Kemosi neirwe ase obosomba, amo nabakuani baye na abanene b’obogambi bwaye." 
Jeremiah48:8 Oyio ogosaria na gosiria nachiche ase kera omochie, mochie onde togotooreka. Rikura amo nense omweya nabisarigwe, buna Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah48:9 “Kae ense ya Moabu chimbaba, eirurukere etame; emechie yaye yonsi nesirigwe, ebe amaturi atamenyiri na monto." 
Jeremiah48:10 Oragererigwe omonto oria ogokora emeremo y’Omonene nobworo, na oragererigwe oria ogotanga omoro oye toitera amanyinga." 
Jeremiah48:11 “Abamoabu babeire barendire bamenyete ase obotoereru korwa ase oboke bwabo. Babeire buna edivai etarakenonorwa korwa ase eturubo. Tibana koumorwa korwa ase ekebekerero ekemo gochia ase ekende, gose tibana gwoswa bairwe ase obosomba. Ase ayio rimisu riabo nabo rigendererete koba buna riarenge, na ogotioka kwabo tikwana koonchoka." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Ase ayio, bono amatuko ngocha are, ndatome abaumori babaumore, erinde ebibekerero ebio bitigare bibe bosa, erio biatwe." 
Jeremiah48:13 Na abanto ba Moabu nabarore obosooku ase enyasae eria Kemosi, buna Abaisraeli baroche obosooku ase enyasae ya Beteli oyio basemeretie." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Naki mogoteba: Intwe nabarwani chituoni, abanto tore ne chinguru ase okorwana esegi?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Oyogosaria na gosiria ense ya Moabu na emechie yaye ochire; abamura baye bare abaya mono baitirwe. Nabo omoruoti, oyore Omonene bw’Emeganda, otebire." 
Jeremiah48:16 Emechando y’Abamoabu yabeire ang’e mono, na egeku nigo gekoayerera kobachera." 
Jeremiah48:17 “Inwe abwo momenyete ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi, nainwe abwo momanyete erieta riaye, morere! Motebe: Naki enyimbo eria ere nokobua na obonene yabunirwe!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Inwe abanto ba Diboni, ika korwa ase obonene bwaino, moikaranse inse ase amaroba; oyio ogocha gosiria Abamoabu nabachere inwe; atagore chindwaki chiaino chinkong’u." 
Jeremiah48:19 Inwe abanto momenyete Aroeri, tenena ase enchera ensemo, motengere! Moborie abasacha abwo bagotama, na abakungu abagwetooria: Mang’ana ki ayio akorekire?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Ense ya Moabu yasookigwe, ekiagera yasirigwe; rera na kweumia! Tebia abamenyete ase chinsemo chi’orooche rw’Arinoni ng’a ense ya Moabu yasirigwe kegima." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Ekina kianachirwe igoro y’ense eraire eimokererete igoro ya Holoni, na Yahasa, na Mefaati," 
Jeremiah48:22 na Diboni, na Nebo, na Beti‐Dibulataimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 na Kiriataimu, na Beti‐Gamuli, na Beti‐Meoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 na Kerioti, na Bosira, na emechie yonsi y’ense ya Moabu ere aare na ang’e." 
Jeremiah48:25 Chingunchara chi’Abamoabu chiabutoirwe, na amaboko abo abunirwe.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Kae Abamoabu banywe batinde, ekiagera beimokereirie igoro mamincha y’Omonene. Barabwo mbaroke, naende begara‐garie ime ase amaroki abo, abanto mbabasekerere." 
Jeremiah48:27 Inee! Inwe timwabasekererete Abaisraeli? Abwo banyorekanete bare ase ekeombe ki’abaibi? Gose nase ki mwarenge gosinga‐singisia emetwe yaino ekero mware gokwana igoro yabo? 
Jeremiah48:28 “Inwe abanto momenyete Moabu, karue ase emechie yaino, mogende komenya ase ebitare, mobe buna riruma rikoagacha egeswa kiaye ime y’omwenya bw’egetare." 
Jeremiah48:29 Twaigure igoro y’oboenenu bw’Abamoabu; nigo bare abaenenu mono. Twaigure buna beimokereirie igoro, na buna bagwekaga na koba nobomwenu, na buna bare ne chinkoro chi’obwerori." 
Jeremiah48:30 Inche Omonene nigo imanyete ribero riabo. Ogwetogia kwabo nigo kore okw’obong’ainereria, naboigo nogokora kwabo kore." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ase engencho eyio, nindeere ense ya Moabu, nindeere abanto bonsi ba Moabu, boigo nindeere abanto ba Kiri‐Heresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Inwe abanto ba Sibuma, nimbareere mono kobua koreera abanto ba Yaeseri. Aye omochie o Sibuma nigo onga buna omosabibu, ne chinsagia chiao chiarandire gochia ng’umbu y’enyancha, chiaikire enyancha ya Yaeseri. Korende ekero kie rigesa omosaria ochire gosaria emesabibu na okwama kwabo." 
Jeremiah48:33 Omogoko na omochengo biarusigwe korwa ase ense ya Moabu eyio ekwama ase obonge. Nasiririe edivai korwa ase ebimitero; monto onde tari okomita edivai ogotera ore nomochengo. Eriogi rigoakwa tiriri eri’omogoko. 
Jeremiah48:34 “Abanto ba Hesiboni na ab’Eleale nigo bakorera, na eriogi riabo riaigurwe goika Eleale na Yahasi; boigo ndigugwe korwa ase Soari goika Horonaimu na Egilati‐Selisia. Na amache a Nimirimi nakame na gosira." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ninsirie Abamoabu, abwo bakorua ebing’wanso agwo aase aimokererete igoro na gosamba ubani ase enyasae yabo." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Ase igo enkoro yane nigo ekobareera Abamoabu na abanto ba Kireresi, ase eriogi buna eri’ekeroria. Obonda benyorerete bwasirigwe." 
Jeremiah48:37 Kera omonto akigite etukia y’omotwe oye, ogingire ne chinderu chiaye boigo. Abanto bonsi nabekebe amaboko abo, na kweboyia chigunia ebinema biabo." 
Jeremiah48:38 Ase chinyomba chionsi chi’ense ya Moabu, na ase chinchera chiaye, okorera gw’okweumia gwoka nakoigweke aroro, ekiagera naatire ense ya Moabu buna enyongo egwatwa, eyio monto onde atari gwechandera. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah48:39 Abanto nkorera bare, bagoteba: Naki Abamoabu baitirwe na gosirigwa. Naki Abamoabu baonchoire amagega abo bare nobosooku, babeire egento ki’ogosekererigwa na eki’ogoichanerwa ase abanto bonsi ababaetanaine.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Egesaku gete nkeiruruke bwango buna ekeongo, kerambore chimbaba chiaye igoro y’Abamoabu." 
Jeremiah48:41 Emechie amo ne chindwaki chire chinkong’u mbibwatwe. Ase rituko erio chinkoro chi’abarwani esegi ba Moabu bare chituoni nachiondoke; barabwo babe buna abakungu bakobina ase okoibora. 
Jeremiah48:42 Abanto ba Moabu nabasirigwe kegima tibagenderera koba egesaku, ekiagera beimokereretie igoro mamincha y’Omonene." 
Jeremiah48:43 Inwe abamomenyete Moabu, omoondoko, na eirima, na omoeto, nigo bibaganyete. Omonene otebire ayio." 
Jeremiah48:44 Onde bwensi oratame ase engencho y’omoondoko nagwe ase eirima, na oyo orasoke korwa ase eirima nabwatwe nomoeto. Nindete ayio igoro y’Abamoabu ase omwaka ndabae egesusuro kiabo. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah48:45 Abare gotama bagatenena ase ekiriri kia Hesiboni batari ne chinguru. Omorero okarua ase Hesiboni, chimeme chi’omorero korwa ase ense ya Sihoni, ogasaria amasio ’Abamoabu, na ogasamba ebiototeri bi’emetwe y’abanto banchete esegi." 
Jeremiah48:46 Obobe nobwaino, inwe abanto ba Moabu! Abanto bagosasima Kemosi basirigwe. Abana baino abamura boosirwe, na abaiseke baino bairirwe obosomba." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Korende ase amatuko agochi‐gocha ning’iranerie Abamoabu amaya abo. Nabo inche Omonene natebire.” Ayio naro arakoreke ase Abamoabu. 
Jeremiah49:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’Abaamoni: “Inee! Abaisraeli tibabwati abana? Tibabwati abakoira omwando? Nase ki enyasae Milikomu yairire omwando o Gadi, na abanto baye bamenyete ase emechie ya Gadi?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Rora, amatuko ngocha are inche ndarente esegi, na ekerero gi’esegi keigugwe ase omochie o Raba, ase ense y’Abaamoni. Omochie oyio otigare amaturi ore bosa, na emechie yaye esambwe nomorero. Erio Abaisraeli mbaire omwando korwa ase abwo babayourete. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah49:3 Inwe abanto ba Hesiboni, rera mono, ekiagera Ai osarigwe! Inwe abakungu ba Raba, rera! Mweboyie chigunia, mobokie amagombo, mobe mokominyoka gochia aaria na aaria ase chinka chionsi, ekiagera enyasae eyio Milikomu neirwe ase obosomba amo nabakuani baye, na abanene abakogamba nero." 
Jeremiah49:4 Inwe abaiseke baane ababiare motari abegenwa, nase ki mogwetogia ng’a amakura aino naichire chindagera? Inwe mwegenete obonda bwaino mogoteba ng’a onde tari oranyare kobarwania." 
Jeremiah49:5 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, otebire iga: Rora, nindete omoondoko igoro asemore korwa ase abanto bonsi babaetanaine. Inwe moserigwe, na kera omonto atame gochia bosio rioka, gose monto onde tagotoka orasangererie abwo batamire." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Korende nyuma y’ayio ning’iranerie Abaamoni amaya abo. Inche Omonene nakwanire.” 
Jeremiah49:7 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba igoro y’Abaedomu: “Inee! Obong’aini mbwaerire korwa Temani? Ogosemia ngwasirire korwa ase abanyasemi? Obong’aini bwabo mbwasirire kegima? 
Jeremiah49:8 Inwe abanto momenyete Dedani, onchoka motame, mwebise aase aakong’u, ekiagera ning’ee ororeria rw’Esau emechando ase rituko erio ndamoe egesusuro." 
Jeremiah49:9 Inee! Abasangereria amasabibu baare gocha asemore, tibarenge kobatigera nonya naria agotigara? Na abaibi bagocha botuko tibarenge gosakora ebi baganetie bioka?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Nachoboire abanto b’Esau na kobatiga bosa; nasioririe aase bakwebisa, bono tibakonyora aase bakwebisa. Abanto b’ororeria rwabo na abamwabo basirigwe, boigo nabanto bamenyete ang’e, bonsi basirigwe gose nonya noyomo tatigareti." 
Jeremiah49:11 Batige abana abwo batabwati abaise, inche nimbarende bagenderere koba moyo, na ababoraka baino, tiga bansemerie.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Onye abanto baria batagwenerete konywa egekombe ki’egesusuro bakenywerete, Inee, inwe nigo moratigwe timonyora egesusuro? Goika monyore egesusuro; ase ayio goika mokenywere." 
Jeremiah49:13 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Inche omonyene natianire ng’a omochie o Bosira nobe bosa. Ekero abanto bakoyorora mbaondoke na koyochecheria, naende babe bakoragereria ase erieta riaye. Na emechie yaye yonsi nesirigwe ebe amaturi kogenderera botambe.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Naigure amang’ana korwa ase Omonene; omonto otomirwe ase egati y’ebisaku, kobitebia: “Sangererekana amo, mochiche korwania omochie o Bosira, imoka moyorwanie!" 
Jeremiah49:15 Naki ningokore obe omoke ase egati y’ebisaku. Abanto bonsi nabagochaye. 
Jeremiah49:16 Okogosa kwao na oboenenu bw’enkoro yao biakong’ainire. Aye omenyete ime ase emienya y’ebitare, aye obwaterererete egetunwa egetambe, korende nonya koagachete egeswa kiao aaria igoro mono buna ekeongo, inche ninkorusie aroro ngotabokanie gocha inse. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edomu nosarigwe obe ekiorokererio gi’okoondokia. Kera omonto oraetere aase agwo naondoke na goichanigwa ase engencho y’amaakwa aye. 
Jeremiah49:18 Omonene nigo agoteba ng’a koreng’ana buna Sodomu na Gomora na emechie yarenge ang’e noro yasiretigwe, naboigo Edomu orasirigwe; monto onde takomenya aroro, gose omoeti takogobera aroro." 
Jeremiah49:19 Rora, buna koreng’ana endo egosoka korwa ase rinani rinoru ria Yorodani, erinde yagenda goita ching’ondi chire ime ase obweri obokong’u, naboigo na inche ndachiere Abaedomu mobosokano, mbaserie batame korwa aroro. Onde bwensi ndachore nimobeke abe omorisia igoro asebare. Ning’o oranyare koreng’anigwa nainche? Ning’o orambekere rituko indue omobaro? Morisia ki oranyare kweegerera ase obosio bwane?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ase ayio tegerera moigwe omoroberio inche Omonene nakorire igoro y’Abaedomu, na okogania kwane mbwate igoro ase abanto ba Temani: Ekeene, nonya nabana babo mbakururwe buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi chigokururwa chiairwa. Ekeene, ense yabo nebaichanere." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ekero abanto b’Edomu baragwe, eriogi riabo naritengechie ense; na eriogi ri’okorera kwabo narigugwe gochia ase Enyancha Embariri." 
Jeremiah49:22 Naama! Egesaku gete nkeimokerere igoro keiruruke bwango buna ekeongo, kerambore chimbaba chiaye igoro y’omochie o Bosira. Ase rituko erio chinkoro chi’abarwani esegi b’Edomu bare chituoni nachiondoke, na barabwo babe buna omokungu okobina ase okoibora.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Amang’ana igoro ya Damesiki naro aya: “Abanto ba Hamati na ab’Aripadi basookire, ekiagera baigure amang’ana amabe; chinkoro chiabo chiabeire nobwoba. Nigo bachandegete babeire buna enyancha yaburukanigwe etanyare gotoerera." 
Jeremiah49:24 Abanto ba Damesiki babeire aboro tibari na nguru; beonchoire gotama, ekiagera obwoba bwabasoire. Basoirwe nomoichano na ogochandeka buna omokungu okobina ase okoibora." 
Jeremiah49:25 Naki omochie oria omanyekanete mono, naende inche nagokerete, ong’anyirwe iga na otigirwe bosa?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ase ayio, ase rituko riria abamura b’omochie oyio nabaitwe bagwe ase chinchera chiaye, na abarwani esegi baye bonsi mbaitwe. Nabo inche Omonene bw’Emeganda natebire." 
Jeremiah49:27 Nintongie omorero ase chindwaki chia Damesiki, noro nosambe chinyomba chi’omoruoti Beni‐Hadadi.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro ya Kedari, na igoro y’amaruoti a Hasori, ayio Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, abuete: “Imoka, mogende Kedari! Mosirie abanto ba moocha." 
Jeremiah49:29 Mosakore chiema chiabo na amaicho abo, na ebietubo bie chiema chiabo, na ebinto biabo bionsi; boigo moire chingamia chiabo. Morere igoro yabo, motebe: Obwoba nigo bore ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Jeremiah49:30 “Inwe abanto ba Hasori, tama, mogende mwebise aase aakong’u, ekiagera Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, okorire omoroberio bw’okobarwania, na nigo are nebirengererio bi’okobakora bobe. Nabo Omonene atebire:" 
Jeremiah49:31 Imoka, mogende korwania egesaku ekio kemenyete ase obotoereru getechandereti ing’ana rinde, ekio getabwati ebiita gose emekorogoto y’ogosiekera, egesaku ekio kemenyete gioka. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah49:32 “Mosakore, moire chingamia chiabo, ne chiombe chiabo chibe echiaino. Abanto abwo bakogingira chitukia chiabo nimbaserie mbasiarere gochia ase kera ensemo y’ense. Nimbarentere emechando korwa ase kera ensemo. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hasori nosareke, omenywe ne chisese chi’orosana, obe amaturi kogenderera botambe, gose monto onde takomenya aroro, gose omoeti takogobera aroro.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Ase omochakano bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yeremia omobani igoro y’ense y’Elamu, rikamotebia," 
Jeremiah49:35 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Rora, nimbune amata ’Abaelamu, ayio are chinguru chi’okobua kwabo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Nindete chimbeo inye korwa ase chinsemo inye chia igoro, erinde nsiarere abanto b’Elamu bagende ase chinsinyo echio chionsi; gose egesaku tikeri keratigare ekio abanto b’Elamu batatamere." 
Jeremiah49:37 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Ningere abanto b’Elamu boboe ababisa babo, boigo boboe nabanto baria bakorigia basirie obogima bwabo. Nimbarentere amabe, na endamwamu yane yoke igoro yabo. Nimbatunyanerie emioro, baitwe basirigwe kegima." 
Jeremiah49:38 Nimbeke oboikaranso bwane bw’obonene agwo ase ense y’Abaelamu, nsirie omoruoti obo amo nabanene babo b’oboruoti. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah49:39 Korende ase amatuko agochi‐gocha ning’iranerie Abaelamu amaya abo. Nabo Omonene atebire.” 
Jeremiah50:1 Aya naro Omonene akwanete goetera ase Yeremia omobani igoro y’omochie o Babeli na ense engima y’Abakalidayo: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Kwana ase egati y’ebisaku, mobirarerie! Imokereria igoro ebendera na morarie! Timobaisa kobisa amang’ana aya, korende motebe: Babeli obwatirwe, enyasae Beli yasookigwe, na Merodaki yatirwe. Emegwekano egosasimwa ereo yasookigwe, ne chinyasae chi’aroro chiatirwe." 
Jeremiah50:3 “Egesaku kiarure sugusu gocha korwania Babeli. Nagesarie ense eyio ebe buna erooro, na monto onde takomenya aroro; abanto nabatame ne ching’iti boigo.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase amatuko ayio, na ase engaki eyio, Abaisraeli amo n’Abayuda nabache amo babe bakorera na kondigia inche, Nyasae obo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Barabwo mbaborie bamanye enchera ekogenda Sayoni, babe bakoonchora amasio abo gochia aroro, batebania: Inchuo tobwatane n’Omonene, tokore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nere, okwo koragenderere botambe gotanyare kwebwa." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Abanto baane babeire buna ching’ondi chinsiru. Abarisia babo babasiririe, ekiagera babeire bakona‐kobaong’anyia ase ebitunwa. Nigo bakona‐koong’anya buna ching’ondi, bakobaetanania korwa ase ebitunwa goika ase ebigoro; ase igo abanto baane bebire obweri bwabo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Abanto bande bonsi babanyorete nigo babakorete bobe. Ababisa babo babeire bagoteba: Intwe titori nokomocha ase ogokora iga, ekiagera barabwo bakorire ebibe ase Omonene obo, oyore obomenyo bwabo bw’ekeene, Omonene oyio orenge ogosemeria gwe chisokoro chiabo." 
Jeremiah50:8 “Tama korwa Babeli, morue ase ense y’Abakalidayo, mobe buna chigoree chigotang’ana bosio bwe riicho." 
Jeremiah50:9 Naama! Inche ngoseegeta nde omoganda bw’ebisaku ebinene, korwa ase ense ya sugusu, na barabwo bebeke ang’e korwania Babeli bayobue korwa ensemo eria ya sugusu. Chinsara chiabo nigo chinga buna omorwani omong’aini ore neganga otari koirana bosa." 
Jeremiah50:10 Ense y’Abakalidayo nesakorwe, nabwo bonsi bakoyesakora nabaisaneke nebisakorwa ebio.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Inwe aba mwasakorete omwando one, nonya mwagogete na gochenga, naende more nokogania buna ritororo riarisirie obonyansi, na mogokwana buna chibarasi chituoni," 
Jeremiah50:12 nyoko nabe nobosooku obonene, ee, omochie oyo okoiborete noichanigwe. Rora, ase egati ye chinse chi’ense oyio obe omoke mono kobua, nobe erooro enyomo ere bosa." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ase engencho y’endamwamu y’Omonene Babeli nosirigwe kegima, gose tokomenywa rinde. Kera omonto orabe ogoeta Babeli nakumie na goichana mono ase engencho y’amaakwa aye." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Inwe mwensi momanyete gokumba amata, ebeke ang’e morwanie Babeli ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi. Yorute chinsara, timotiga nonya neyemo, ekiagera okorire ebibe ase Omonene." 
Jeremiah50:15 Imoka, aka eriogi ri’esegi ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi. Babeli bwerure omonyene; chiburi chiaye chiagure, chindwaki chiatagoirwe na koiyerigwa inse. Ekio negesiomba Omonene akorusia. Ase ayio, rusia egesiomba ase omochie oyio. Buna koreng’ana Babeli okorete moyokore boigo." 
Jeremiah50:16 Siria kegima korwa Babeli omobusuri na oyokoimokia omoyio bwe rigesa, ekero engaki eyio yaikire. Ase engencho y’obwoba bw’omochandi, kera omomenyi nairane ase abanto baye, kera oyomo natame gochia ase ense yaye omonyene." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Abaisraeli nigo banga buna ching’ondi chigoserigwa ne chindo na goserebanigwa gochia aaria na aaria. Ritang’ani omoruoti bw’Abaasuri akababua na kobasiria, na bono omoerio Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, otakunire amauga abo." 
Jeremiah50:18 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Naama! Nindetere omoruoti o Babeli, amo nense yaye, egesusuro, buna nakorete ase omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ning’iranie Abaisraeli gocha ase obomenyo bwabo naende. Nabarabwo nabarie chindagera chiabo agwo ase egetunwa gia Karimeli, na ase orogongo rwa Basani, na okogania kwabo nagoisanekigwe agwo ase ebigoro bi’Efraimu, na ase Gileadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Ase amatuko ayio, na ase engaki eyio, ogosaria nakorigigwe ase Abaisraeli, ko tigokonyorekana, na ebibe ase Abayuda, ko tibikonyorekana, ekiagera inche Omonene ninyabere abanto abwo ndatigarie koba abatigari.”" 
Jeremiah50:21 Omonene otebire, “Genda morwanie ense ya Merataimu na abanto ba Pekodi. Mobabwatie korwa nyuma, mobaite na kobasiria kegima, mokore onsi aya nabachikire." 
Jeremiah50:22 Eriogi ri’esegi riachire ase ense amo nogosirigwa okonene. 
Jeremiah50:23 Naki enturago eria yaagete ense engima yaakirwe na gwateka! Naki Babeli osirigwe, na abanto baichanigwe ase okoyorora igo!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Aye Babeli, nagotegire noboreba, kwabwatirwe, nonya tikwamanyete ayio; kwanyorirwe na kobwatwa, ekiagera nkwamorwanetie Omonene." 
Jeremiah50:25 Omonene oigoire ase agachete ebirwanero biaye, na ase endamwamu yaye obisokirie, ekiagera Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nabwate emeremo agokora ase ense y’Abakalidayo." 
Jeremiah50:26 Inchuo morwanie ense eyio korwa ase chinsemo chionsi, moigore ebiage biaye; mobeke ebinto bire imeo amo, bibe buna chitui chi’endagera. Mosirie ense eyio kegima; timobaisa gotigaria nonya negento ekemo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Moite abarwani babo b’esegi banga buna chieri, mobaite bonsi pi. Obobe nobwabo, ekiagera rituko ri’ogosirigwa kwabo riachire, eyio nengaki yabo y’okonyora egesusuro." 
Jeremiah50:28 “Igwa eriogi ri’abanto bagotama korwa ase ense ya Babeli, bakoraria ase Sayoni igoro y’Omonene, Nyasae oito, buna akoruseria Hekalu yaye egesiomba." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Rangeria abanto bamanyete korwanera amata bachiche korwania Babeli. Moyoboere ase chinsemo chionsi, timotiga nonya nomonto oyomo atame atooreke. Yoakane koreng’ana nogokora kwaye. Buna koreng’ana oro okorete tiga okorerwe boigo, ekiagera omochie oyio oenenire ase Omonene, oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ase rituko erio abamura b’omochie oyio, nabaitwe, bakwere agwo ase chinchera, na abarwani baye bonsi b’esegi nabasirigwe kegima. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Naende inche Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, natebire: Aye Babeli ore omoenenu, igwa, inche nabeire mamincha yao; rituko riao riaikire, engaki eye ngokoa egesusuro." 
Jeremiah50:32 Oyio ore omoenenu nagochwe na kogwa, gose monto onde takomogororokia. Nintongie omorero ase emechie y’ense eyio noro nosambe chinsemo chiaye chionsi." 
Jeremiah50:33 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Abaisraeli amo n’Abayuda nigo bachandire. Abanto abwo babairete ase obosomba nigo bababwatete bokong’u, bangire kobaa ribaga bagende sobo." 
Jeremiah50:34 Korende omobooria obo nigo are ne chinguru. Omonene bw’Emeganda nario erieta riaye. Ekeene, ere nabarwanerere, erinde arente obotoereru na omotimoko ase ense, korende narente omorero ase abanto bamenyete Babeli." 
Jeremiah50:35 “Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Omoro obe igoro ase Abakalidayo, na igoro ase abanto bamenyete Babeli, na igoro ase abanene b’oboruoti obwo, na igoro ase abanto abang’aini b’ense eyio!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Omoro obe igoro ase abaringoria, erinde babe abariri! Omoro obe igoro ase abarwani baye bare chituoni, erinde basirigwe!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Omoro obe igoro ase chibarasi ne chigari chia Babeli! Omoro obe igoro ase abarwani esegi b’ense eng’ao, abare ase egati yabo, erinde obakore babe buna abakungu! Omoro obe igoro ase chinibo chiabo erinde chisakorwe!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Egurugura nebe igoro ase chindooche chiaye, erinde chikame amache! Ense eyio nigo eichire nemegwekano y’ogosasimwa, na abanto mbabe buna chibarimo ase ogosasima emegwekano eyio!" 
Jeremiah50:39 “Ase ayio ching’iti chi’orosana, amo ne chinyang’au, ne chisagero nachimenye ase ense eyio. Abanto tibagocha komenyao nonya ng’ake, korwa ekiaare goika ekiaare kogenderera botambe." 
Jeremiah50:40 Buna yabete ekero keria Nyasae asiretie emechie ya Sodomu na Gomora, amo nemechie yarenge ang’e neyio, naboigo monto onde takomenya Babeli, gose mwanyabanto onde takomenya aroro. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Naama! Abanto ngocha bare korwa sugusu, egesaku ekenene mono amo nabaruoti abange baseegetirwe korwa chinsinyo chi’ense." 
Jeremiah50:42 Abanto abwo nigo babwate amata na amatimo, nigo bare abatindi, abatari namabera. Amariogi abo nigo akoeera buna okoeera kw’enyancha. Nigo bariinete chibarasi, berobeirie buna omonto bwebekire ang’e ase esegi, erinde babarwanie inwe, abanto ba Babeli.”" 
Jeremiah50:43 “Omoruoti o Babeli oigure amang’ana igoro yabo, amaboko aye aborirwe chinguru, omoichano omosoire, na obororo buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore.”" 
Jeremiah50:44 “Rora, buna koreng’ana endo egosoka korwa ase rinani rinoru ria Yorodan, erinde yagenda goita ching’ondi chire ime ase obweri obokong’u, naboigo na inche ndachiere abanto ba Babeli mobosokano, mbaserie batame korwa aroro. Onde bwensi ndachore nimobeke abe omorisia igoro asebare. Ning’o oranyare koreng’anigwa nainche? Ning’o orambekere rituko indue omobaro? Morisia ki oranyare kweegera ase obosio bwane?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ase ayio, tegerera moigwe omoroberio inche Omonene nakorire igoro y’abanto ba Babeli, na okogania kwane mbwate igoro y’ense y’Abakalidayo. Ekeene, nonya nabana babo mbakururwe buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi chigokururwa chiairwa. Ee, ekeene, ense yabo nebaichanere." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ekero Babeli orabwatwe, ense netengechigwe, na eriogi riaye narigugwe ase egati y’ebisaku.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Rora, inche ninseegete omoika bw’ogosiria Babeli na abanto bamenyete aroro bare mamincha yane." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ase rituko riria ri’emechando nintomere abanto ba Babeli abairuri babairure, batige ense yabo ebe bosa." 
Jeremiah51:3 Timobaisa gotiga abarwani bakumbe amata na korasa chinsara chiabo, gose kobeka chigoti chi’ebioma. Timororera abamura b’aroro amabera. Mosirie abarwani baye b’esegi bonsi pi." 
Jeremiah51:4 Abanto abwo mbaitwe ase ense y’Abakalidayo, babe bakwete ase chinchera chi’emechie yabo." 
Jeremiah51:5 Nyasae, Omonene bw’Emeganda, tatigeti Abaisraeli na Abayuda, nonya ense yabo yabeire nebibe ebinge ase Omonene ore omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Tama korwa Babeli, kera omonto atoorie obogima bwaye. Timobaisa gosirigwa ekero ense eyio eraegwe egesusuro kiaye, ekiagera eye nero engaki Omonene akorusia egesiomba, ayeakane buna koreng’ana nogokora kwaye kore." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babeli nigo yarenge buna egekombe gi’etahabu ase okoboko kw’Omonene; ebisaku bionsi bi’ense bikanywera korwa ase kerokio bigatinda. Ebisaku bikanywa edivai ya Babeli, erio bigatinda, bikaba buna chibarimo." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babeli ogure mobosokano na gosirigwa, Yoreere mobogorie amaguta akogwenia amaote aye, ande nabo ense eria erabaise kogwenigwa." 
Jeremiah51:9 Nanga nabo twagwenetie Babeli, korende togwenetigwe. Togende, totige Babeli; kera omonto agende ase ense yaye, ekiagera obobe bwa Babeli bwaikire igoro nonya nase amare." 
Jeremiah51:10 “Omonene otorenteire oboronge bwaito. Inchuo torarie ase Sayoni emeremo y’Omonene, Nyasae oito." 
Jeremiah51:11 “Tieria chinsara! Imokia chinguba! Omonene oseegetire emeika y’abaruoti b’Abamedi, ekiagera nigo aroberetie gosiria Babeli. Ekio negesiomba Omonene akoruseria Hekalu yaye." 
Jeremiah51:12 Tenenia ebendera ase chindwaki chia Babeli! Kora oborendi bobe obokong’u ase okobeka abarendi. Beka abanto bebise na koboa, ekiagera Omonene orobeirie na goikerania amang’ana aria akwanete ase abanto bamenyete Babeli." 
Jeremiah51:13 Aye omenyete aase amache amange are, ore omonda bwe chinibo chinyinge, korende omoerio oo oikire, naboigo na okogania kwao okonge." 
Jeremiah51:14 Omonene bw’Emeganda bwetianirie ogoteba: Ekeene, ninkorentere abanto abange mono buna chingige, bachiche gokorwania, na barabwo nabakobue na baake eriogi ri’obobui.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 “Omonene nere otongete ense ase okobua kwaye, nere oyetenenetie goetera ase obong’aini bwaye, na ase okomanya kwaye akarambora igoro." 
Jeremiah51:16 Ekero agokwana neriogi riaye, amache are igoro nigo akoruma. Nigo agokora ritaturi riaimokerera igoro korwa ase chinsinyo chi’ense. Nigo akomesia na korenta embura, naende orenta omwaga ogusa korwa ase ebigachero biaye." 
Jeremiah51:17 Kera omonto nigo are omoriri, tamanyeti gento, na kera omoroisia etahabu nigo agosookigwa nemegwekano yaye y’ogosasimwa, ekiagera emegwekano eyio ney’obong’ainereria, tebwati omoika ime yaye." 
Jeremiah51:18 Eyio nigo ere bosa, nesekererwe, ekero eraegwe egesusuro, nesirigwe." 
Jeremiah51:19 Korende oyore egetari o Yakobo tagwekaini emegwekano eyio; nere otongete ebinto bionsi. Abaisraeli nigo bare egesaku ki’omwando oye; Omonene bw’Emeganda nario erieta riaye.” 
Jeremiah51:20 “Aye nenturago na ekerwanero kiane gi’esegi; goetera asore ning’ake ebisaku bibe ebisamunye, ninsirie amaruoti." 
Jeremiah51:21 Goetera asore ninsamunyore chibarasi na abanto bachiriinete; ninsamunyore ne chigari na abagochigendia. 
Jeremiah51:22 Goetera asore ninsamunyore abasacha na abakungu, ninsamunyore abanto abagotu na abake, ninsamunyore abamura na abaiseke;" 
Jeremiah51:23 goetera asore ninsamunyore abarisia ne riicho riabo, ninsamunyore abaremi ne chiombe chiabo; boigo goetera asore ninsamunyore abagavuna na abachiki.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Agwo ase amasio aino ning’akane Babeli na Abakalidayo bonsi obobe bwabo bwonsi bakorete ase Sayoni. 
Jeremiah51:25 Aye egetunwa kegosiria, gwasiririe ense yonsi, rora, inche nabeire mamincha yao; nindambore okoboko kwane asore; nkobwate ngoturunkanie korwa ase emienya y’ebitare, erio nkoonchore obe egetunwa giasambirwe." 
Jeremiah51:26 Igena rinde tirikorusigwa asore ribe eri’ekoona, gose kobekwa ase oboroso, korende aye nosarigwe ogenderere koba ritongo kogenderera botambe.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Tenenia ebendera y’esegi igoro ase ense! Bugia egetureri ase egati y’ebisaku! Beka ebisaku ang’e birwanie Babeli. Rangeria amaruoti ayorwanie, ee, rangeria Ararati, na Mini, na Asikenasi. Chora abatang’ani b’esegi bayoumokere. Renta chibarasi chinyinge buna chingige chikogosa." 
Jeremiah51:28 Beka ebisaku ang’e biche korwania Babeli. Rangeria abaruoti b’Abamedi amo nabagavuna na abakonyi babo, na kera ense ere ase obogambi bwaye." 
Jeremiah51:29 Erio ense etengeche na koiguswa ase obororo, ekiagera omoroberio bw’Omonene bw’ogosaria Babeli noikeranigwe, na ere nasirie ense eyio ebe bosa temenywa na monto." 
Jeremiah51:30 Abarwani chituoni ba Babeli batigire korwana esegi. Nigo bagendererete kobeera ase chiburi ime, ekiagera tibari ne chinguru, babeire buna abakungu. Chinyomba chia Babeli chiasambirwe, na emekorogoto yabo y’ebiita yabunirwe." 
Jeremiah51:31 Omominyoki oyomo naminyoke aumerane noyonde, na omotomwa oyomo naminyoke aumerane noyonde, kogenda gotebia omoruoti o Babeli ng’a omochie obwatirwe ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi," 
Jeremiah51:32 naende ng’a ebiambokero biabwatirwe, amaagacho ogwekengera asambirwe nomorero, na abarwani esegi baondokire." 
Jeremiah51:33 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, agoteba: Abanto ba Babeli babeire buna ekeooreri gi’okoorera kiaroisigwe ase ogotachwa. Engaki netigarete enke, erio rigesa riaye riike." 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, ondiire, onsegenyire; ontigire inde bosa buna ekebekerero getabwati gento. Omerire inche buna enchoka ekomera egento. Oichoirie enda yaye nebinto biane ebiya, ontigire inde bosa." 
Jeremiah51:35 Obobe bw’obotindi bwakoretwe asende na ase abaminto nabobekwe igoro ya Babeli. Tiga abanto ba Sayoni batebe: Okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga aito, tiga kobe igoro ase Abakalidayo.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Ase ayio aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Naama! Nimbarwanerere inwe, mbaruserie egesiomba. Ninkamie enyancha ya Babeli, nkamie ne chinsoko chiaye chionsi." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babeli nosirigwe obe etui y’amatongo ase chisese chi’orosana chiramenye. Abanto tibakomenya aroro, korende nigo barabe bagoichanigwa na koyochecheria." 
Jeremiah51:38 Abanto ba Babeli nabaronye amo buna chindo chikoronya; nabarere buna chindo chinsae. 
Jeremiah51:39 Ekero bare ne ribero rinene, nimbakorere omoyega, erinde banywe, batinde na kogoka. Erio barare chitoro chintambe, tibaboka. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah51:40 Nimbarente banyenywe buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi, ne chimingichi amo ne chigoree chikonyenywa.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 “Naki Sesaki, nero Babeli, eyere ogotogigwa gw’ense yonsi, yabwatirwe na koondokia ebisaku binde!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Enyancha yaumokire igoro ase Babeli, emerindo y’enyancha yayetubire." 
Jeremiah51:43 Emechie y’ense eyio yasirigwe yabeire ey’okoondokia, yabeire enyomo na erooro, ense etamenyiri na monto onde, na mwanyabanto onde tagoeta aroro." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ning’ee enyasae Beli ya Babeli egesusuro, nindusie korwa ase omonwa oye ebi yamerete. Ebisaku tibikogenderera gocha ase enyasae eyio. “Chindwaki chia Babeli chiagure." 
Jeremiah51:45 Inwe abanto baane, tama morue aroro! Kera omonto atoorie obogima bwaye korwa ase endamwamu enene y’Omonene." 
Jeremiah51:46 Timokwa emioyo, gose timoiroka, ekero moraigwe amang’ana agocha ase ense. Omwaka oyomo nigo moraigwe amang’ana gete, na omwaka onde moigwe ayande. Boigo obotindi nigo bore ase ense, na omogambi oyomo nigo akorwana noyonde." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ase ayio, amatuko ngocha are, ekero ndarente egesusuro ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa ya Babeli. Ense eyio yonsi nenyore obosooku, na abanto baye mbaiterwe aroro agwo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Erio igoro na ense, na ebinto bionsi bireo, mbitere nomochengo, ekero abasaria bararue sugusu gocha gosaria Babeli. Nabo inche Omonene natebire." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babeli goika esirigwe, ekiagera yagerete Abaisraeli abange bagakwa, naende boigo yaitete abanto abange mono b’ense yonsi.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 “Inwe abamwatoorekire korwa ase emioro, genda, timobaisa gotebana. Mong’inyore inche Omonene, ekero more ase ense y’aare, moyorengererie mono Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Inwe nigo mogoteba: Intwe twanyorire obosooku, ekiagera twabeire togochecherigwa. Obosooku bw’ogochaywa bwatubire amaiso aito, ekiagera abanto b’egesaku ekegeni basoire chinsemo chinchenu chi’enyomba y’Omonene oito." 
Jeremiah51:52 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Ase engencho eyio, rora, amatuko ngocha are, ekero ndanachere emegwekano egosasimwa ya Babeli ekina na abanto bonsi baakirwe chingoma nababe bakonakweumia ase ense eyio yonsi." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babeli, noisa gotiira gochia igoro, noisa kwegitera chindwaki chinkong’u, ne chintambe gochia igoro, inche nintome abagosiria bayosirie. Inche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Jeremiah51:54 “Tegerera moigwe ekerero gekorwa Babeli. Eriogi ri’ogosirigwa okonene riarure ase ense y’Abakalidayo. 
Jeremiah51:55 Inche Omonene nasiririe Babeli; nakiririe amariogi amanene arengeo. Emerindo egocha aroro nigo ekoeera buna amache amange, eriogi riabo rinene nigo riraigugwe." 
Jeremiah51:56 Abagosiria bachire gosiria Babeli; abarwani baye chituoni bairirwe, amata abo abunirwe. Inche Omonene Nyasae nigo inde Nyasae bw’ogoakana egesiomba, ekeene goika ngeakane kegima." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ninyoisie na gotindia abanene b’oboruoti bwa Babeli na abanto baye abang’aini; na abagambi baye, na abachiki baye, na abarwani baye chituoni. Barabwo mbarare chitoro chintambe, tibaboka. Nabo inche omoruoti inde Omonene bw’Emeganda ngoteba.”" 
Jeremiah51:58 Aya naro inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ngoteba: “Chindwaki chinetu chia Babeli nachiyerigwe inse, na ebiita biaye ebitambe gochia igoro mbisambwe nomorero. “Emeremo abanto bagokora nebe bosa; ebisaku nigo bikwerosia bosa ase emeremo erasambwe nomorero.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Aya naro amang’ana Yeremia omobani achigete Seraya mosinto o Neria, omochokoro o Maaseya, ekero agendete Babeli amo na Zedekia, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, ase omwaka o kane bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia. Seraya nigo arenge omoteneneri bw’aase agotimokerwa." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremia akarika ase ebuku obobe bwonsi bware gocha konyora Babeli, amo namang’ana ande onsi igoro ya Babeli." 
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremia agatebia Seraya, “Ekero oraike Babeli, orore ng’a gwasomire amang’ana aya onsi." 
Jeremiah51:62 Erio otebe: Aye Omonene gwatebire ng’a nosirie aase aiga kegima, gento kende tikemenyao, mwanyabanto gose ching’iti, na ense eye nesirigwe ebe erooro kogenderera botambe." 
Jeremiah51:63 Na ekero gwakoorire gosoma ebuku eye, oyesiberanie rigena, oyerute ime ase orooche rw’Eufarati." 
Jeremiah51:64 Erio otebe iga: Naboigo Babeli erarimere, gochia inse, teimoka naende nonya ng’ake, ase engencho y’obobe nkorenta ase ense eyio, goika obwo bobagoyie.” Amang’ana a Yeremia aereire aiga." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo ebere nomo, ekero aetwe oboruoti, akagamba emiaka ikomi nomo agwo Yerusalemu. Ng’ina nigo arenge korokwa Hamutali, mosubati o Yeremia, omonto korwa Libuna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Zedekia oyio agakora ayare amabe ase obosio bw’Omonene, koreng’ana buna aria onsi Yehoyakimu akorete." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ekeene, endamwamu y’Omonene ase Yerusalemu na ase Abayuda nigo yagerete akabarusia ase obosio bwaye. Ase engaki eyio Zedekia akaanga koigwera omoruoti o Babeli." 
Jeremiah52:4 Ase omwaka o kianda, rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi o ikomi bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, amo nabarwani baye bonsi b’esegi bagacha korwania Yerusalemu. Barabwo bakayonaaria na bakaagacha orwaki rw’ogwekengera rokayoetanana." 
Jeremiah52:5 Igo omochie oria okaba onaaririe goika omwaka o ikomi nomo bw’okogamba gwa Zedekia omoruoti. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ase rituko ria kianda ri’omotienyi o kane, enchera ekaba enene mono ase omochie oria ime, goika endagera akabora kegima ey’abanto bakoria." 
Jeremiah52:7 Erio chindwaki chi’omochie chikabochorwa, na abanto bonsi b’esegi bagatama botuko, bagaetera ase egeita kiarenge gati‐gati ye chindwaki ibere, ang’e nomogondo bw’omoruoti, nonya Abakalidayo banaaretie omochie ase chinsemo chionsi. Bagatama gochia ase Ekerubo Ekiomo." 
Jeremiah52:8 Abarwani esegi b’Abakalidayo bakabwatia Zedekia omoruoti, bakamoikeera agwo ase ense omweya ya Yeriko, ekero abarwani baye bonsi b’esegi konya bamotigire na goserebekana." 
Jeremiah52:9 Erio bakabwata omoruoti oria, bakamoira ase omoruoti o Babeli agwo ase omochie o Ribula, ase ense ya Hamati, na ere akamonachera ekina." 
Jeremiah52:10 Agwo Ribula omoruoti oria agaita abana abamura ba Zedekia ase amaiso aye, agaita nabanene bonsi b’oboruoti bw’Abayuda." 
Jeremiah52:11 Naende agakonora amaiso a Zedekia, akamosiba nebinyuri, akamoira Babeli, akamobeka ase echela, akamotiga aroro goika rituko ri’ogokwa kwaye." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ase rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi o gatano, ase omwaka o ikomi na kianda bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, Nebusaradani, oyorenge omoteneneri bw’abarendi na omosomba bw’omoruoti o Babeli, agacha Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Ere agasamba enyomba y’Omonene, na enyomba y’Omoruoti, ne chinyomba chionsi chia Yerusalemu; agasamba kera enyomba enene." 
Jeremiah52:14 Abarwani esegi bonsi b’Abakalidayo, na baria barenge amo nomoteneneri oria bw’abarendi, bagatagora chindwaki chionsi chiaetanaine Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:15 Erio Nebusaradani, omoteneneri oria bw’abarendi, agoosa akaira ase obosomba abanto bande baria barenge abataka mono, amo nabanto bande konya batigaire ase omochie; boigo akaira abanto baria konya batameire omoruoti o Babeli bamokorere, akaira nabaroisia b’ebinto abatigarete." 
Jeremiah52:16 Korende Nebusaradani oria omoteneneri bw’abarendi agatiga abanto bande barenge abataka mono b’ense eria babeere aroro. Abwo bakaba bakoroiseria emegondo y’emesabibu na gokora emeremo y’okorema. 
Jeremiah52:17 Abakalidayo bakabuna chisiiro chie chitaai chiria chiarenge ime ase enyomba y’Omonene, na ebibekerero bi’ebituba, na egetuba keria ekenene mono kiaroisirie korwa ase etaai ebiarenge ase enyomba y’Omonene. Kobabibunire bikaba ebing’ese, bakaira etaai eria yonsi Babeli." 
Jeremiah52:18 Boigo bakaira chindogio, na ebichiko, na ebinachi, ne chisani, na ebitaabo bi’ogosambera ubani, na ebikorero bionsi bie chitaai biarenge gokorerwa emeremo ase Hekalu." 
Jeremiah52:19 Bakaira ne chibakuria chinke, ne chindogio chi’okorenta omorero, ne chisani, ne chinyongo, na ebibekerero bie chitaya, na ebitaabo bi’ogosambera ubani, na ebikombe bi’okoruerwa kw’ebinyugwa. Omoteneneri oria bw’abarendi akaira ebinto bionsi bie chitahabu chichenire, na ebie chifeta chichenire." 
Jeremiah52:20 Oborito bwe chitaai chiaroisetie chisiiro chiria ibere, na egetuba keria ekenene mono, na emegwekano ye chieri ikomi na ebere yeroisirie korwa ase chitaai eyio yaimokereretie egetuba keria igoro, amo nebibekerero bionsi biria Sulemani omoruoti aroisetie ase enyomba y’Omonene, nigo bwaetanetie ekerengo." 
Jeremiah52:21 Kera eyemo ye chisiiro chiria nigo yarenge nobotambe bw’amaboko ikomi na atano na atato, na engori y’obotambe bw’amaboko ikomi na abere ekayeetanana. Nigo yaroisetigwe buna omobirangwa na obonetu bw’etaai yaroisetie omobirangwa oria nigo bwarenge obogare bw’ebiara bine." 
Jeremiah52:22 Na igoro ase kera esiiro, egesure nkiarengeo kiaroiseirie etaai, na obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano. Egechanga na emegwekano y’amatunda amakomomanga biaroisirie korwa ase chitaai, nigo biaetanaine egesure keria." 
Jeremiah52:23 Ase chinsemo chiaye narengeo amakomomanga emerongo kianda, na atano na rimo. Amakomomanga onsi arenge igoro ase egesure ekemo ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi nigo arenge rigana erimo." 
Jeremiah52:24 Omoteneneri oria bw’abarendi akaira Seraya, omokuani omonene, na Safania, omokuani o kabere, na abarendi b’egesieri batato." 
Jeremiah52:25 Naende akaira korwa ase omochie oria omonto oyomo orenge omochiki bw’abarwani esegi, na abanto batano na babere b’ekegambero ki’omoruoti, abanyoretwe ase omochie ime, na omoriki bw’omochiki oria bw’abarwani esegi, oria orenge gokora omobaro bw’abanto b’ense eria, amo nabanto emerongo etano nomo b’ense eria, abanyorekanete ase omochie ime." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebusaradani, omoteneneri bw’abarendi, akababwata, akabaira ase omoruoti o Babeli agwo Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:27 Omoruoti o Babeli akabaita bagakwera agwo Ribula, ase ense ya Hamati. Ase igo Abayuda bakarusigwa ase ense yabo, bakairwa ase obosomba." 
Jeremiah52:28 Oyo noro omobaro bw’abanto Nebukadinesaro airete ase obosomba: ase omwaka o gatano na kabere akaira Abayahudi chilifu isato, na emerongo ebere, na batato (3,023)." 
Jeremiah52:29 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano na gatato. Nebukadinesaro akaira korwa Yerusalemu abanto amagana atano na atato, na emerongo etato na babere (832)." 
Jeremiah52:30 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere, na gatato, bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro Nebusaradani, omoteneneri bw’abarendi, akaira Abayahudi amagana atano na abere, na emerongo ene na batano (745); bonsi Abanto abairetwe nigo barenge chilifu inye, na amagana atano na rimo (4,600)." 
Jeremiah52:31 Ase omwaka oria Ewili‐Merodaki akaba omoruoti o Babeli akarorera Yehoyakini amabera na ogosika, akamorusia echela. Ayio nigo akoregete ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na gatano na kabere, omotienyi o ikomi na kabere, ase omwaka bw’emerongo etato, na gatano na kabere, nyuma Yehoyakini goosirwe." 
Jeremiah52:32 Ewili‐Merodaki agakwana amang’ana ’obwororo nere, naende akamoa amasikani amanene kobua ayio aete abaruoti bande barenge amo nere agwo Babeli." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ase igo Yehoyakini akaonchoreria chianga chiaye chi’obosibwa, na kera rituko ase obogima bwaye bwonsi akaba okoragera nomoruoti." 
Jeremiah52:34 Omoruoti akamoa endagera yaye botambe na kera egento arenge kogania ase kera rituko ase obogima bwaye bwonsi goika ekero ki’ogokwa kwaye. 
Lamentations1:1 Naki omochie oyo otigaire bosa, oyio orenge oichire nabanto! Naki otigaire buna omoboraka, oyio orenge omonene ase egati y’ebisaku! Oyio orenge buna eting’ana ase egati y’emechie, bono obeire omosomba." 
Lamentations1:2 Nigo okorera nobororo botuko bokia, na amariga nigo agoiteka ase chimboto chiaye; ase abanchi baye bonsi onde tari okomoremia; abasani baye bamong’ainire, babeire ababisa baye." 
Lamentations1:3 Abayuda bairirwe ase obosomba, babeire nemechando na obokong’u batari gotimoka. Nigo bamenyete ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku; abakobabwatia babaikereire kobare nemechando." 
Lamentations1:4 Chinchera chikogenda Sayoni nigo chiichanete, ekiagera onde tari ogocha ase Amatuko Amanene achikire; ebiita biaye bionsi nigo bitigarete bosa, na abakuani baye bonsi nigo baichanete. Abaiseke baye abekungi nigo baumatete, na omochie omonyene nigo ore nobororo obonge." 
Lamentations1:5 Ababisa baye babeire abanene baye, ee, ababisa baye nigo bagendererete goseseneka. Omonene oyotomeire emechando ase engencho y’ogosaria kwaye okonge, na ababisa baye bairire abana baye ase obosomba." 
Lamentations1:6 Ogosikwa gwonsi kwarure ase abanto ba Sayoni; abagambi baye babeire buna chingabi chitabwati ase chikorisia; batamire korwa ase abakobabwatia, tibari ne chinguru." 
Lamentations1:7 Ekero abanto ba Yerusalemu barenge nemechando na obokong’u, bakaba bakoinyora ebinto ebiya mono barenge nabio ase amatuko a kare. Agwo ekero bagwete ase amaboko ’abachandi, onde tarenge ore kobakonya, abachandi babo bakobachecheria ase engencho y’okogwa kwabo." 
Lamentations1:8 Abanto ba Yerusalemu bakorire ebibe ebinene; ase ayio babeire okogechia, bonsi ababasigete babachayire, ekiagera barorire obogetirianda bwabo. Ee, omochie omonyene nkweumia ore, bweonchoire gochia nyuma." 
Lamentations1:9 Riko riaye nigo riarenge ase chianga chiaye, torengereretie igoro y’omoerio oye. Ase ayio okogwa kwaye gokaba ogw’okoondokia, torenge nonde okoyoremia. “Aye Omonene, rigereria emechando yane, ekiagera omobisa one ngwetogia are!”" 
Lamentations1:10 Omobisa oyio oramboire amaboko aye gochia gosakora ebinto bionsi bie rigori rinene bire ase omochie ime; ee, omochie oyio ororire abanto b’ebisaku bagosoa Aase aye Aachenu, agwo aye Omonene gwakanete ng’a tibasoa ase omosangererekano oo." 
Lamentations1:11 Abanto bonsi b’omochie nigo baumatete, ekero barigereretie endagera; barabwo baoonirie chinibo chiabo bagore endagera barie, erinde banyore chinguru. “Aye Omonene, koranche ondigererie, ekiagera nachayirwe.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Inee! Inwe mwensi aba mogoeta inchera aa, aya nigo are amang’ana a bosa asemore? Rigereria morore gose emechando ende ere buna eyane, eyio yarentetwe asende, eyio Omonene andeterete, ekero arenge nendamwamu egwoka." 
Lamentations1:13 “Otomire omorero korwa igoro osambire amauga aane oyabuire, otegire oboreba ase amagoro aane; ong’iranirie nyuma; ontigire inde bosa, ntari ne chinguru omobaso boira." 
Lamentations1:14 “Ogosaria kwane okonge nigo gwasiberanetigwe nokoboko kwaye, gokaba rikorogoto gokabekwa ase rigoti riane; na ase enchera eyio akang’ura chinguru. Omonene nigo ambegete ase amaboko ay’abwo ntanyare kobua." 
Lamentations1:15 “Omonene bwangire abanto bonsi chituoni, abamenyete ime yane, orangeirie omosangererekano bw’abanto, erinde osenyente abamura baane. Abayuda abwo banga buna omoiseke omwekungi, Omonene obatiringeire inse, babeire buna amasabibu agotiringwa ase ekemitero." 
Lamentations1:16 “Ase engencho y’amang’ana aya nigo nkorera, amaiso aane nigo akoiyeria amariga, oyio okondemia nigo are aare korwa asende, oyio okong’a chinguru chinyia; abana baane batigaire bare boka, ekiagera ababisa baane bambuire.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Abanto ba Sayoni basamunsire amaboko abo, korende onde tari okobaremia. Omonene ochikire igoro y’abanto ba Yakobo ng’a abanto abwo babaetananire babe ababisa babo; Yerusalemu obeire okogechia asebare." 
Lamentations1:18 “Omonene nomonyene oboronge, nonya naboigo inche tinyigwereti amachiko aye. Inwe abanto bonsi, tegerera moigwe, morigererie emechando yane, abaiseke baane abekungi, na abamura baane, boosirwe na koirwa ase obosomba.”" 
Lamentations1:19 “Inche nkarangeria abanchi baane ng’a bankonye, korende bakang’aina; abakuani baane na abagaaka bagakwera ase omochie ime, ekero barenge korigia endagera barie banyore chinguru chinyia." 
Lamentations1:20 “Aye Omonene, rigereria buna inde ase emechando, omoyo one oonchokanire, na enkoro yane yaonchoranirwe, ekiagera nabeire oyo otari omoigweri. Abana baane baitirwe nemioro ase chinchera, na amakweri abeire ase enka yane," 
Lamentations1:21 “Abanto baigure buna ng’umatete, na onde tari nonya noyomo okondemia. Ababisa baane bonsi baigure igoro y’emechando yane, bagokire ng’a naye gwakorire aya. Renta rituko riria gwatebete ng’a orarente, na barabwo babe buna inche." 
Lamentations1:22 “Tiga obobe bwabo bwonsi bororekane ase obosio bwao, obae egesusuro; buna kwang’ete inche ase engencho y’ogosaria kwane, ekiagera nigo ng’umatete mono, na enkoro yane yanyarekire.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Naki Omonene atubire omochie o Sayoni nomosunte, ekero arenge nendamwamu! Otugutire obonene bokomeka‐meka bw’Abaisraeli korwa igoro gocha inse aa. Ere tainyoreti egeteni ki’amagoro aye, ase rituko ri’endamwamu yaye." 
Lamentations2:2 Omonene oiyeirie inse obomenyo bwonsi bw’abanto ba Yakobo atari namabera, otagoire chiburi chi’ense y’Abayuda, ekero arenge nendamwamu; osiririe oboruoti, na ourire abanene baye amasikani." 
Lamentations2:3 Obutoire chingunchara chionsi chi’Abaisraeli ore nendamwamu yaye entindi, orusirie okoboko kwaye gw’okorio korwa asebare ase amasio ’ababisa babo: ere osambire abanto ba Yakobo buna omorero ekebemberi ogosamba ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Lamentations2:4 Ere otingire obota bwaye buna omobisa agotinga, otenenire na kobong’usa nokoboko kwaye gw’okorio buna omochandi; agaita bonsi aba twetogeretie. Igoro y’obomenyo bw’abanto ba Sayoni, oumoire ekeririanda kiaye kere buna omorero." 
Lamentations2:5 Omonene obeire buna omobisa, osiririe Abaisraeli; osiririe chinyomba chiaye chionsi chi’oboruoti, otagoire chiburi chiaye chinkong’u; naende omenteire abanto ba Yuda okorera na okweumia." 
Lamentations2:6 Ere oiyeirie inse orobago rwaye rore buna orw’omogondo, ee, osaririe aase emesangererekano y’ogosasima ekobeera. Omonene otigire abanto bebire Amatuko Amanene ne Chisabato agwo Sayoni, na ase okogechigwa kwaye okonene bwangire omoruoti na omokuani." 
Lamentations2:7 Omonene bwangire egesasimero kiaye, otigire Aase aye Aachenu asarigwe; otigire chindwaki chiaye ase amaboko ’ababisa. Abanto bakuurire ime ase enyomba y’Omonene, buna nase rituko ri’omosangererekano bw’ogosasima." 
Lamentations2:8 Omonene onachire ase ebirengererio biaye gosaria chindwaki chi’omochie o Sayoni, oramboire engori y’okorengera. Tagotanga okoboko kwaye tayosaria; otigire chiburi ne chindwaki chikweumia, chionsi amo nigo chiumatete." 
Lamentations2:9 Ebiita biaye biarimeire ase riroba, emekorogoto yaye yabunirwe na gosarigwa. Omoruoti oye, na abagambi baye, nigo bamenyete ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku bitabwati amachiko, na ababani baye tibari konyora amaroro korwa ase Omonene." 
Lamentations2:10 Abagaaka b’omochie o Sayoni nigo baikaransete inse bakirete‐kiri, besiarerete ebuse ase emetwe yabo na kweboyia chigunia, abaiseke abekungi ba Yerusalemu nigo baturegete emetwe yabo gochia inse." 
Lamentations2:11 Amaiso aane arosire ase okoiyeria amariga, omoyo one oonchokanire, na enkoro yane yachandekire ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’omochie bw’abanto baane, ekiagera abana, nonya nabakogonka, nigo bakona‐kogireka ase chinchera chi’omochie." 
Lamentations2:12 Barabwo nigo bakoboria abang’ina: “Ng’ai endagera ere, na edivai?” Nigo bakona‐kogireka na korara ase chinchera chi’omochie buna abaakirwe chingoma, batweka mo ase amaboko ’abang’ina." 
Lamentations2:13 Aye omochie o Yerusalemu, ninki ndagotebie? Ninki ndakoreng’anie? Mang’ana ki anga buna ayao ndagotebie, erinde nkoremie, aye Sayoni ore buna omoiseke omwekungi? Ogosarigwa kwao nokonene buna enyancha ere enene, ning’o oranyare gokogwenia?" 
Lamentations2:14 Ababani bao nigo bakobarorera amaroro ’obong’ainereria are bosa, tibakoorokeretie obobe bwao, erinde nario orairanerigwe amaya ao; korende aya amaroro abo ayakworogetie, nigo arenge ay’oborimo, agerete ogatantanigwa." 
Lamentations2:15 Abanto bonsi abagoeta inchera nigo bagoaka chinkobi ase okogochaya, nigo bakobugia emeroria na gosingiseria omochie o Yerusalemu emetwe, bakobora: “Inee! Omochie oyio noro orenge korokwa omoikeranu bw’obosiani, na omogoko bw’ense yonsi?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Ababisa bao bonsi baasamirie emenwa yabo gokobugeria emeroria na gokoriananeria amaino, bakobora: “Twayosaririe! Ee, rituko eri nario twaganetie, bono twariikeire, twarirorire!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Omonene okorire aya achigete ng’a ayakore, oikeranirie ring’ana riaye aroberetie agwo kare, otagoire atari namabera, otigire ababisa bao bagochenga igoro yao, ere okinirie chingunchara chi’ababisa bao." 
Lamentations2:18 Chinkoro chiabo nigo chikorera ase Omonene. Ee, aye orwaki rw’omochie o Sayoni, tiga amariga ao aiteke buna orooche, omobaso na obotuko! Tobaisa korosa, gose gotimokia amaiso ao." 
Lamentations2:19 Imoka, orere botuko bokie! Ekero oborendi bw’obotuko bogochaka, oumore ayare ase enkoro yao ime ase obosio bw’Omonene, buna okoumora amache! Rambora amaboko ao asare osabere obogima bw’abana bao, abwo bagoyire nenchara ase amatabekania e chinchera chionsi." 
Lamentations2:20 Aye Omonene, rigereria orore! Ning’o gwakorerete buna ayio? Inee! Abakungu mbarie oroiboro rwabo, abana abwo barerete ase amaboko abo? Inee! Abakuani na ababani mbaiterwe agwo Aase Aachenu ay’Omonene?" 
Lamentations2:21 Abamura na abagaaka nigo baraire ase chinchera inse, abaiseke baane, na abamura baane, baitirwe nemioro; ase rituko ri’endamwamu yao kwabaitire otari namabera." 
Lamentations2:22 Buna ase rituko ri’omoyega omonene okarangeria ababisa baane bakanyoboyia korwa chinsemo chionsi; ase rituko ri’endamwamu y’Omonene onde tatooregete, gose gotigara, ase abwo nabogoretie na kobarera. Ababisa baane babasiririe." 
Lamentations3:1 Inche nomonto narorire emechando inse y’endamwamu y’Omonene ere buna enyimbo. 
Lamentations3:2 Ontang’anire na kong’etia ase omosunte, gose tari ase omobaso" 
Lamentations3:3 Ekeene, nigo akona‐koonchora okoboko kwaye igoro yane, ekero ase ekero omobaso boira." 
Lamentations3:4 Otigire chinyama chi’omobere one, ne risankwa, bigosareka; obunire amauga aane." 
Lamentations3:5 Onsibire ase eburi ime na ong’etananeirie obororo na obokong’u. 
Lamentations3:6 Ombekire imenye ase omosunte, buna abanto baria bakwete kare." 
Lamentations3:7 Onsiekeire ase chinsemo chionsi, tinkonyara gosoka; onsibeire ebinyuri ebirito." 
Lamentations3:8 Nonya nkorera neriogi rinene ng’a nkonywe, ere bwangire koigwa ogosaba kwane." 
Lamentations3:9 Oribirie chinchera chiane namagena abaachire, oonchoranire oboeto bwane." 
Lamentations3:10 Nigo amboerete buna edubu, enyang’au entindi, ekoboera, na buna endo eboerete eite." 
Lamentations3:11 Oonchoranire chinchera chiane na kombutorana ebing’ese, ontigire ntang’ang’ete bosa." 
Lamentations3:12 Otingire obota bwaye, na ombekire imbe ekerenga akoruta chinsara." 
Lamentations3:13 Ere ondasire ne chinsara chi’egochi yaye, chiasoire ase chinyigo chiane." 
Lamentations3:14 Inche nabeire oyo ogosekererwa nabanto baane bonsi, na engeero y’ogochaya kwabo omobaso boira." 
Lamentations3:15 Ong’ichoirie nobororo, ong’eire ekenyugwa ekeroro nanyure." 
Lamentations3:16 Obunire amaino aane ase ogontakunia chinche chi’amagena, ontubire neribu." 
Lamentations3:17 Aye kwarusirie omorembe ase omoyo one, na inche nebire ayare ay’omogoko." 
Lamentations3:18 Ngateba, “Chinguru chiane chiaerire, na ogosemeria kwane ase Omonene boigo.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Inyora emechando yane, na obokong’u bwane, buna nanyure ay’obororo na obosongo." 
Lamentations3:20 Omoyo one nigo ogendererete koyainyora, na bwekeeirie ime yane." 
Lamentations3:21 Korende amang’ana aya nigo nkoyainyora ase omoyo one, ase ayio ninde nogosemeria." 
Lamentations3:22 Nobwanchani bw’Omonene botari koera ng’a titosiriri, ekiagera amabera aye tari koera;" 
Lamentations3:23 nigo bire ebiyia ase kera emambia, ee, obwegenwa bwao nigo bore obonene." 
Lamentations3:24 Omonene nere egetari kiane, ayio naro omoyo one ontebirie, ase ayio nimosemeretie." 
Lamentations3:25 Omonene nigo are omuya ase onde bwensi omoganyete, ee, nomuya ase oyo okomorigia." 
Lamentations3:26 Nigo ere buya ase omonto okoba nobotoereru na koganya ogotooreka gokorwa ase Omonene. 
Lamentations3:27 Nigo ere buya ase omonto okobogoria rikorogoto ekero are omoke. 
Lamentations3:28 Tiga aikaranse ao bweka akire‐kiri, ekiagera Omonene nere omotwekire egurube eyio." 
Lamentations3:29 Tiga abete omonwa oye ase riroba akire‐kiri, aande nabo ogosemeria korabeo." 
Lamentations3:30 Tiga aonchore orosea rwaye gochia ase oyio okomoaka, na oyio aisaneke noborami." 
Lamentations3:31 Omonene tagotuguta omonto goika kare na kare. 
Lamentations3:32 Nonya omobekire ase omoichano, namororere amabera naende, ase engencho y’obwanchani bwaye obonene bwa botambe." 
Lamentations3:33 Ere tari gwancha gochanda mwanyabanto, gose kobaichania." 
Lamentations3:34 Omonto ogotiringera inse abasibwa bonsi bare ase ense," 
Lamentations3:35 gose koonchorana oboronge bw’omonto ase obosio bw’Oyore Igoro Mono," 
Lamentations3:36 gose gokorekania ekina ki’omonto onde bwensi. Inee! Ayio Omonene nkoyaanchera are? 
Lamentations3:37 Ning’o okwanete ring’ana, na rirorio rigakoreka, onye Omonene tarichigete rikorwe?" 
Lamentations3:38 Inee! Amabe na amaya, tari korwa ase omonwa bw’Oyore Igoro Mono?" 
Lamentations3:39 Nase ki rende mwanyabanto ore moyo akwemurunganeria? Nase ki akwemurungania ekero akonyora egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biaye. 
Lamentations3:40 Tiga twetuke intwe abanyene na toteeme chinchera chiaito, erio tomoiranere Omonene!" 
Lamentations3:41 Tiga toimokererie chinkoro chiaito igoro, na amaboko aito, gochia ase Nyasae ore igoro, totebe:" 
Lamentations3:42 “Intwe twasaririe asore, twabeire abatari abaigweri, naye togotwabera." 
Lamentations3:43 “Aye gwetubire endamwamu na gwatochandire, gwaitire, gose tobeti namabera." 
Lamentations3:44 Aye omonyene gwetubire riire, ng’a ogosaba gwaito tikogoika ang’e." 
Lamentations3:45 Aye gwatokorire twabeire eubi na abaangire, ase egati y’ebisaku bi’ense." 
Lamentations3:46 “Ababisa baito bonsi baasamirie emenwa yabo gotosekerera. 
Lamentations3:47 Obwoba ne chiirima biatocheire amo nogosaria na ogosirigwa. 
Lamentations3:48 Amaiso aane nigo agoitera amariga amange buna amache a rooche, ase engencho y’ogosirigwa kw’omochie bw’abanto baane." 
Lamentations3:49 “Amaiso aane abeire agoitera amariga atari gokama, gose korosa," 
Lamentations3:50 goika ekero Omonene ararigererie korwa igoro na arore ayio onsi. 
Lamentations3:51 Amaiso aane agerire nabeire nomoichano ase omoyo one ase engencho y’abaiseke bonsi b’omochie one. 
Lamentations3:52 “Nigo narenge korigigwa buna enyoni nabwo barenge ababisa baane engencho ende etaiyo. 
Lamentations3:53 Bakanduta ase engoro ime inde moyo, na konduta amagena." 
Lamentations3:54 Amache agaichora agaeta ase omotwe one igoro, ngateba: Omoerio one oikire." 
Lamentations3:55 “Aye Omonene, nigo narangeretie erieta riao korwa ase engoro entambe," 
Lamentations3:56 na aye okaigwa okorera kwane; toticha amato ao ase ogwechanda kwane ekero nkorera. 
Lamentations3:57 Aye nigo kwang’igete ang’e ase rituko riria narerete asore, ogantebia: Toondoka!" 
Lamentations3:58 “Aye Omonene, kwarwanereire omoyo one na gwatooririe obogima bwane." 
Lamentations3:59 Kwarorire obobe obo nakoreirwe, onache ekina kiane ase oboronge." 
Lamentations3:60 Aye kwarorire buna ababisa baane baganetie korusia egesiomba, na buna bakorire emeroberio emebe asende." 
Lamentations3:61 “Aye Omonene, noigwete okorama kwabo, na emeroberio yabo yonsi igoro yane." 
Lamentations3:62 Aya abwo bakondwania bagokwana na korengereria, nigo bare mamincha yane omobaso boira." 
Lamentations3:63 Rora, ekero abwo baikaransete, na ekero bakoimoka, ninche engeero yabo bagochaya." 
Lamentations3:64 “Aye Omonene, nobaakane koreng’ana nogokora kw’amaboko abo." 
Lamentations3:65 Otube chinkoro chiabo nomosunte; okoragereria kwao kobe igoro yabo. 
Lamentations3:66 Aye Omonene, babwatie nendamwamu yao, obasirie, basire korwa inse y’erioba!”" 
Lamentations4:1 Naki etahabu yasiririe obomeka‐meku bwaye! Naki etahabu echenire yaonchokire! Amagena ay’Aase Aachenu asiareirwe ase amatabekania e chinchera chionsi. 
Lamentations4:2 Abamura ba Sayoni abare nengencho enene, abwo bareng’anirie ne chitahabu chingiya, naki yabeire ng’a bareng’anigwe ne chinyongo chi’amaroba, echire emeremo y’amaboko ’abakori chinyongo?" 
Lamentations4:3 Nonya ne chisese chi’orosana nkogonkia chire chimanwa chiabo, korende abakungu b’omochie bw’abanto baane babeire abatindi, buna chisagero chire ase erooro." 
Lamentations4:4 Chimeme chi’abana bakogonka chiabwatanire namang’ang’ura ase engencho y’erang’o; abana abake nigo bagosaba endagera, korende monto onde tari okobaa." 
Lamentations4:5 Abanto abwo barenge koria endagera engiya mono bakwereire ase chinchera; na abwo barenge kweboyia chianga chimonyinga, nigo baraire ase chitui chie ribu." 
Lamentations4:6 Aya nigo abanyorete, ekiagera ebibe biakorire ase omochie bw’abanto baane nigo biarenge ebinene kobua ebi’abanto ba Sodomu, omochie oyio nigo oonchoranetwe ase etagika eyemo, na okoboko kw’onde tikwayokunete." 
Lamentations4:7 Abagambi baye nigo barenge komeka‐meka kobua amagena ’embura, nigo barenge abarabu se kobua amabeere, emebere yabo nigo yarenge emebariri kobua amagena amabariri, na okororekana kwabo nigo kwarenge buna safiro, rigena rie rigori rinene." 
Lamentations4:8 Bono amaiso abo abeire amamwamuti kobua embiro, tibari komanywa agwo ase chinchera; amasankwa ’emebere yabo abwatanire namauga abo, omire pa buna amasabo amomo." 
Lamentations4:9 Mbare negesio abwo bagokwa ase ogoitwa nemioro kobua abwo enchara egoita, ekiagera barabwo nigo bakogenderera korea na korea, ase okoborwa gw’okwama kw’emegondo." 
Lamentations4:10 Amaboko ’abakungu abare namayianda aiyekire abana babo abanyene; abwo nigo babete endagera yabo, ekero omochie bw’abanto baane orenge gosirigwa." 
Lamentations4:11 Omonene oumoire okogechigwa kwaye, ee, oumoire endamwamu yaye entindi; na ase Sayoni otongirie omorero, osambire amaroso aye." 
Lamentations4:12 Abaruoti b’ense, na abanto bonsi bamenyeteo, tibegenete ng’a omochandi, gose omobisa onde bwensi, nkonyara arenge gosoa ase ebiita bia Yerusalemu."
