Lamentations4:13 Ayio nigo akoregete ase engencho y’ebibe bi’ababani baye, na ebi’abakuani baye, abwo baiterete amanyinga ’abanyene oboronge, agwo ase omochie ime." 
Lamentations4:14 Barabwo bakaba bakoong’anya ase chinchera bare buna emeuko bakaba bakwegindia amanyinga, na onde tarenge gokuna chianga chiabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Abanto bakagobera, bakabora, “Karue aa! Inwe timochenegeti! Karue aa! Karue aa! Timokuna abanto!” Ase ayio barabwo bagatama na koombogana. Abanto b’ebisaku bakabakwana bakabora, “Tibakogenderera komenya asetore.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Okobea kw’Omonene kwabasiareire, takobechandera naende; abakuani tibasigetwe, na abagaaka tibaroreretwe amabera." 
Lamentations4:17 Amaiso aito arosire ase okorigereria, na okoganya bosa ng’a natokonywe; korwa ase ebitengero biaito, nigo twaganyete egesaku getanyare gototooria." 
Lamentations4:18 Ababisa baito nigo batoboerete, titwarenge konyara gotaara ase chinchera chiaito. Engaki yaito nigo ere ang’e koera; amatuko aito abarirwe; ee, omoerio oito oikire." 
Lamentations4:19 Abachandi baito nigo baare abaango kobua chinsoti chikoiruruka, nigo batoseretie gochia ase ebitunwa igoro, bagatoboera ase erooro" 
Lamentations4:20 Omoakwa amaguta bw’Omonene, oyio orenge omoika bw’obogima bwaito, akabwatwa ne chiirima chiabo, oyio nere twatebete ng’a ase ekiriri kiaye nao toramenye ase egati y’ebisaku." 
Lamentations4:21 Inwe abanto ba Edomu, inwe abamomenyete ase ense ya Usi, goka na gochenga! Nonya nasemore egekombe nkebaikere, monywe motinde goika motigare getirianda." 
Lamentations4:22 Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, egesusuro ki’ebibe biaino giaikeranigwe. Omonene takogenderera gokoira ase obosomba; korende inwe abanto ba Edomu, Omonene nabae egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biaino, ee, naorokie ebibe biaino maiso marore." 
Lamentations5:1 Aye Omonene, inyora aya atonyorire, origererie orore ogochaywa gwaito." 
Lamentations5:2 Omwando oito oeirwe abanto abaao, chinyomba chiaito chiaeirwe abamenyi." 
Lamentations5:3 Twabeire buna chintakana, chitari nabaise, abababa nigo banga buna ababoraka." 
Lamentations5:4 Amache tokonywa goika toakane chibesa, ne chinko togwota nigo tokogora." 
Lamentations5:5 Abachandi baito bigo batobwatete amogoti, nigo tokorosa mono, titori konyora ogotimoka." 
Lamentations5:6 Twaramboreire Abamisiri na Abaasuri amaboko batoe endagera egotoisana. 
Lamentations5:7 Chisokoro chiaito nigo chiakorete ebibe, bono tichiyo; goika tobogorie egesusuro ki’ebibe biabo." 
Lamentations5:8 Abasomba nabwo bagotogambera, na onde tari ogototooria korwa ase amaboko abo." 
Lamentations5:9 Nigo tokonyora endagera yaito ase okobeka obogima bwaito ase emechando, ekiagera emioro nere ase erooro." 
Lamentations5:10 Amasankwa ’emebere yaito nigo are ne riberera buna erie riko, ekiagera enchara nigo egotosamba buna omorero." 
Lamentations5:11 Abakungu baito bare Sayoni bakoreirwe amabe, boigo nabaiseke abekungi abare ase emechi y’Abayuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Abagambi baito babwatirwe na gosungwa, na abagaaka baito tibasikiri." 
Lamentations5:13 Abamura baito nabwo bakobogoria chingena chigoserwa, na abana abake nigo bakoritoerwa ase okobogoria chinko, bagwa." 
Lamentations5:14 Abagaaka tibari goikaransa geita ki’omochie, na abamura batigire kobugia amakano abo." 
Lamentations5:15 Omogoko bwe chinkoro chiaito osirire; ogotenga gwaito kwaonchokire kwabeire ebirero. 
Lamentations5:16 Chigutwa chiarenge ase emetwe yaito chiagure inse. Obobe nobwaito, ekiagera twakorire ebibe!" 
Lamentations5:17 Ase engencho y’ayio chinkoro chiaito chiarwarire, na ase engencho y’ayio amaiso aito abeire orotutu." 
Lamentations5:18 Ekiagera egetunwa gia Sayoni giatigaire kere bosa, chisese chi’orosana nao chigotaara." 
Lamentations5:19 Korende aye omonene nigo oragambe kare na kare, ekerogo kiao ki’obogambi nigo kerabeo ebiaare ase ebiaare." 
Lamentations5:20 Naki gwatwebire kogenderera botambe? Naki gwatotigire ase engaki entambe iga? 
Lamentations5:21 Aye Omonene, toiranie gocha asore, erinde toiranigwe, onchora amatuko aito oyakore abe amayia, abe buna aria a kare!" 
Lamentations5:22 Gose ngwatotangire kegima? Nigo ogendererete kogechigwa mono naintwe? 
Ezekiel1:1 Ase rituko ria gatano, omotienyi o kane, omwaka bw’emerongo etato, ekero inche Ezekieli namenyete ang’e norooche rwa Kebari amo nabooswa bande, igoro ekamaanoka, nkarora amaroro akorwa ase Nyasae." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ee, ase rituko ria gatano ase omotienyi oyio, omwaka o gatano bw’ogwoswa kwa Yehoyakimu omoruoti," 
Ezekiel1:3 ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende inche Ezekieli omokuani, mosinto o Busi, agwo ang’e norooche rwa Kebari, ase ense y’Abakalidayo, na okoboko kw’Omonene gokang’ikera aroro." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ekero narigereretie nkarora ekembugu‐mbugu gekorwa sugusu. Riire rinene riaare gwoka omorero rigacha, na obomeka‐meku bokarietanana ase chinsemo chionsi. Boigo korwa ime ase omorero oyio, obomeka‐meku bonga buna obw’etahabu bokarorekana." 
Ezekiel1:5 Korwa ase egati y’omorero oria bikarorekanao ebitongwa bine bire moyo. Oko nakwo kwarenge okororekana kwabo: Nigo biagwekaine mwanyabanto," 
Ezekiel1:6 korende kera ekemo nigo kiabwate amasio ane, ne chimbaba inye." 
Ezekiel1:7 Amagoro abo nigo arongeete, na ebisanyi bi’amagoro abo nigo biagwekaine ebi’emori. Ebitongwa ebio nigo biarenge komeka‐meka buna etaai ekomeka‐meka." 
Ezekiel1:8 Inse ye chimbaba chiabo, ase chinsemo chiabo inye, nigo biabwate amaboko buna aya mwanyabanto. Amasio abo ne chimbaba chiabo nigo biarenge iga:" 
Ezekiel1:9 Chimbaba chiabo nigo chiakunaine, na ebitongwa biria tibiarenge koonchoka, korende bikaba bikogenda gochia bosio rioka." 
Ezekiel1:10 Okororekana kw’amasio a kera ekemo ki’ebitongwa ebio bine nigo kwarenge iga: Amasio abo a bosio nigo arenge buna aya mwanyabanto, na aya a borio nigo arenge buna aye chindo, na aya a bomosi nigo arenge buna aye chiombe; boigo kera ekemo nigo kiabwate obosio buna obw’ensoti." 
Ezekiel1:11 Amasio abo nabo arenge igo. Chimbaba chiabo nigo chiaramboire gochia igoro; chimbaba ibere chia kera ekemo chigakunana nechi’ekende, na ibere chinde chia kera ekemo chigatuba emebere yabo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Kera ekemo gekaba gekogenda gochia bosio rioka; aase omoika orenge kogenda gochia, nao biarenge kogenda. Ekero biarenge kogenda tibiarenge koonchoka, korende bikaba bikogenda bosio rioka." 
Ezekiel1:13 Okororekana kw’ebitongwa ebio nigo kwarenge buna omorero bw’amakara ogwoka buna ebimore bigoetanana ase egati yabo. Omorero oria nigo orenge komoreka mono, na korwa ase omorero oyio okomesa gw’enkoba gokaruao." 
Ezekiel1:14 Erio ebitongwa biria bire moyo bikaba bikominyoka gochia aaria na aaria, buna okomesa gw’enkoba." 
Ezekiel1:15 Ekero narigereretie ebitongwa biria, nkarora amagoro ’egari ane, kera okomo kore bosio bwa kera egetongwa goteneine inse." 
Ezekiel1:16 Amagoro ayio onsi nigo areng’aine. Ebieni biabo nigo biarenge buna berulo, rigena rikomeka‐meka. Kera okogoro nigo kwaroisirie kogasoanigwa nokonde." 
Ezekiel1:17 Ekero amagoro ayio arenge kogenda, nigo arenge kogenda ase chinsemo inye chionsi, tarenge koonchoka, akaba akogenda gochia bosio rioka." 
Ezekiel1:18 Amagoro ayio ane nigo arenge ne chibonyi chingare chi’okoondokia, chiaichire namaiso ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Ezekiel1:19 Ekero ebitongwa biria biarenge kogenda, naboigo na amagoro aria naro arenge kogenda amo nabirobio mbarabare, na ekero ebitongwa biria biarenge koimokerera igoro korwa ase riroba, naboigo na amagoro aria arenge koimokerera igoro." 
Ezekiel1:20 Aande onsi ase omoika orenge kogenda, nao na ebitongwa biria biarenge kogenda; naboigo na amagoro aria arenge kogenda amo nabirobio, ekiagera omoika bw’ebitongwa biria nigo orenge ime y’amagoro aria." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ekero ebitongwa biria biarenge kogenda, na amagoro aria nabo arenge kogenda; ekero biarenge gotenena, naro nabo arenge gotenena; ekero biarenge koimokerera igoro korwa inse ase riroba, naro nabo arenge koimokerera igoro mbarabare yabo, ekiagera omoika bw’ebitongwa biria bire moyo nigo orenge ime ase amagoro aria." 
Ezekiel1:22 Igoro ase emetwe y’ebitongwa biria, egento nkiarengeo kenga buna eaanga igoro yaroiseirie ebirore bikomekameka na komesa, na kerokio nigo kiaarire igoro ase emetwe yabo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Inse y’eaanga eria kera egetongwa nigo kiaramborete chimbaba chiaye ibere chigakunana nechi’ekende, na kera ekemo kegatuba omobere oye ne chimbaba chinde ibere." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ekero ebitongwa ebio biarenge kogenda, okoeera gwe chimbaba chiabo nigo kwarenge ase amato aane buna okw’amache amange, buna eriogi ri’Omonguru, ee, nigo kwarenge buna okwoga kw’emeganda y’esegi. Ekero biarenge gotenena, nigo biarenge kwororobia chimbaba chiabo gochia inse." 
Ezekiel1:25 Korwa igoro y’eaanga eria yarenge igoro y’emetwe y’ebitongwa ebio okwoga gokaruao, na birobio bigatenena na kwororobia chimbaba chiabo gochia inse." 
Ezekiel1:26 Igoro y’eaanga eria yarenge igoro y’emetwe yabo norengeo omogwekano bw’ekerogo ki’obonene keroisirie korwa ase safiro, rigena rikomeka‐meka; ase omogwekano oria bw’ekerogo ki’obonene naikaranseteo oyomo ekieni kiaye kiarenge buna eki’omonto." 
Ezekiel1:27 Korwa ase ensemo ekororekana buna nekebono ki’omogwekano oyio na gochia igoro nkarora obomeka‐meku buna obw’etaai boetananire negento kenga buna omorero, na korwa ase ekebono kiaye gochia inse nkarora egento kenga omorero. Omogwekano oria nigo oetananire noborabu bware komoreka." 
Ezekiel1:28 Oborabu boria bwarenge komoreka chinsemo chiaye chionsi, nigo bwagwekaine nomokubinyongo ase engaki y’embura. Okororekana okwo nakw’obonene bw’Omonene. Ekero naroche ayio ngatung’ama inse nkaumama; erio nkaigwa eriogi ri’oyomo ogokwana." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ere agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, tenena namagoro ao, inche nkwane naye.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Ekero akwanete nainche, Omoika ogasoa ime yane, ogantenenia, erio nkamotegerera oria orenge gokwana nainche." 
Ezekiel2:3 Ere agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, nkogotoma inde gochia ase Abaisraeli, egesaku ekio getari koigwera, ekio giantigire inche. Abanto abwo amo ne chisokoro chiabo babeire bagosaria asende nonya ngoika rero iga." 
Ezekiel2:4 Abanto abwo nigo bakong’etie amasio abo ne chinkoro chiabo. Asebare nao nkogotoma gochia, goika obatebie iga: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba." 
Ezekiel2:5 Kobaraigwe, gose baange koigwa (ekiagera barabwo negesaku getari koigwera), mbamanye ng’a omobani obeire ase egati yabo." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Korende aye mwanyabanto, tobaisa kobairoka, gose koiroka amang’ana abo, nonya goetananire namageri na amagwa, naende komenyete ase egati y’ebiuge. Ee, tobaisa kwoboa ekero orarore amasio abo, gose kwoboa amang’ana abo, ekiagera abwo nigo bare egesaku getari koigwera." 
Ezekiel2:7 Amang’ana nkogotebia naro orabatebie kobarayategerere gose bayaange, ekiagera barabwo negesaku getari koigwera." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Korende aye mwanyabanto, tegerera aya nkogotebia; tobaisa koba oyo otari koigwera buna egesaku eke getari koigwera. Asamia omonwa oo, orie egento eke ngokoa.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Ekero narigereretie, nkarora okoboko koramboire gocha asende, na ase okoboko okwo ebuku yaringire iyarengeo." 
Ezekiel2:10 Ebuku eria ekaramborwa ase obosio bwane; nero nigo yarikire bosio na nyuma. Amang’ana arikire aroro nigo arenge ay’amagombo, na okweumia, na okorera kw’obobe." 
Ezekiel3:1 Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, karie egento ekio kwaeirwe; karie ebuku eye, erio ogende gokwana n’Abaisraeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ase ayio ngaasamia omonwa one, na ere akang’a ebuku eria inyerie." 
Ezekiel3:3 Naende agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, karie ebuku eye ngokoa eichore ase enda yao.” Erio nkayeria, egansa ase omonwa one buna obooke." 
Ezekiel3:4 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, imoka ogende ase Abaisraeli, okwane nabarabwo amang’ana aane." 
Ezekiel3:5 Tindi kogotoma ase abanto bagokwana omonwa omoao otamanyeti, korende ase Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel3:6 Gose tindi kogotoma ase abanto b’ebisaku ebinge bagokwana emenwa emekong’u, abwo ogokwana kwabo otanyare komanya. Ekeene, onye narenge kogotoma gochia ase abanto buna abwo, nigo barenge gokoigwera." 
Ezekiel3:7 Abaisraeli tibagokoigwera aye, ekiagera tibari konyigwera inche; Abaisraeli bonsi bakong’irie amasio abo igoro, ne chinkoro chiabo boigo." 
Ezekiel3:8 Rora, nakorire obosio bwao bobe obokong’u buna ayabo, na obosio bwao igoro bobe obokong’u buna ayabo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ee, nakorire obosio bwao igoro bobe obokong’u buna rigena rikorokwa elimasi, rire rikong’u kobua amagena ande. Tobairoka gose koboboa ekero orarore amasio abo, ekiagera abwo nigo bare egesaku getari koigwera.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Omonene akagenderera gokwana nainche, agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, amang’ana onsi nkogotebia oyagache ase enkoro yao ime, oyaigwe namato ao." 
Ezekiel3:11 Oimoke ogende ase abanto bamino abwo boosetwe, obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba, kobaragotegerere gose baange kogotegerera.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Erio Omoika okanyimokereria igoro, nkaigwa korwa nyuma yane eriogi buna eri’ogoaka gw’enkoba, rigoteba: “Obonene bw’Omonene botogigwe korwa agwo ase bore!”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Nkaigwa na eriogi rie chimbaba chi’ebitongwa biria bire moyo chigokunana, na eriogi ri’amagoro aria arenge mbarabare yabo riarenge buna eri’ogoaka gw’enkoba." 
Ezekiel3:14 Omoika okanyimokereria igoro, okang’ira aase aao, na inche nkagenda inde nobororo bogwoka ase omoika one, korende okoboko kw’Omonene gokambeka chinguru." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ngaika Telabibu ase abanto baria boosetwe bamenyete, ang’e norooche rwa Kebari; nkagenderera kobeera amo nabarabwo aase agwo ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere inde nomoichano omonene." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ekero amatuko atano na abere aerete, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel3:17 “Aye mwanyabanto, nakobekire obe omorendi bw’Abaisraeli. Ekero kende gionsi oraigwe ring’ana rikorwa ase omonwa one, aye obatebie ring’ana erio riane ri’okobakurera." 
Ezekiel3:18 Kondatebe omokori amabe: Ekeene aye goika okwe, na aye koratige tomokurera, gose tokwana nomokori amabe oyio ase okomokurera, erinde atige chinchera chiaye chi’obobe atoorie obogima bwaye, rirorio omokori amabe oyio nakwe ore ase ebibe biaye, korende amanyinga aye ninyaganie korwa ase okoboko kwao." 
Ezekiel3:19 Korende aye korakurere omokori amabe oyio, na ere aange koonchoka korwa ase ebibe biaye, ne chinchera chiaye chi’obobe, oyio goika akwe ore ase ebibe biaye, korende aye omonyene nobe gwatooririe obogima bwao." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Naende omonyaboronge karaonchoke atige oboronge bwaye na akore ebibe, inche nimobekere ekegocha ase enchera yaye goika akwe. Onye tikwamokurerete, ere nakwe ase engencho y’ebibe biaye, na ogokora kwaye kw’oboronge akorete ritang’ani tigokoinyorwa, korende amanyinga aye ninyaganie korwa ase okoboko kwao." 
Ezekiel3:21 Korende korakurere omonyaboronge ng’a takora ebibe, na ere abe takora ebibe, ekeene, ere nabe moyo, ekiagera aigwerete ogokurerwa, na aye nobe gwatooririe obogima bwao.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Aroro agwo okoboko kw’Omonene gokambeka chinguru, ere agantebia, “Imoka, ogende ase ense omweya, na aroro aaria inche ninkwane naye.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Erio nkaimoka, nkagenda aaria ase ense omweya, na obonene bw’Omonene bogatenena aroro buna boria konya narorire ang’e norooche rwa Kebari; ekero naboroche, ngatung’ama inse, nkaumama." 
Ezekiel3:24 Erio Omoika ogasoa ime yane, ogantenenia, na Omonene agakwana nainche, agantebia, “Genda bwesiekere nyomba mwao." 
Ezekiel3:25 Korende aye mwanyabanto, rora nosibwe ne chingori, erinde tonyara kogenda ase egati y’abanto bao." 
Ezekiel3:26 Inche nimbwatanie oromeme rwao namang’ang’ura, na aye obe rimama osinywe kobakurera; barabwo nigo bare egesaku getari koigwera." 
Ezekiel3:27 Korende ekero ndakwane naye, nimaanore omonwa oo, na aye obatebie iga: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba. Omonto oganetie koigwera, tiga aigwere, na oyo otaganeti koigwera, tiga aange, ekiagera barabwo negesaku getari koigwera." 
Ezekiel4:1 “Aye mwanyabanto, imokia ritabori, oribeke bosio bwao, erio orimang’ere omogwekano bw’omochie o Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Oyogitere orwaki rw’okoyoboera ase chinsemo chionsi, na oyoetananie neburi boigo, naende oyobekere ebitwori bi’abarwani esegi, na otenenie ebikorero bi’ogotagorera ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Ezekiel4:3 Oimokie esani y’ekioma, oyetenenie buna orwaki ase egati yao na omochie oyio; oyorigererie, oyoboere na ogenderere koyoboera. Ayio nabe ekemanyererio ase Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Erio aye orarere orobega rwao rw’okobee, obe kobogoretie obobe bw’Abaisraeli igoro yao. Koreng’ana namatuko ayio orabe koraire igo, naboigo orabogorie obobe bwabo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Nagochikeire amatuko amagana atato, na emerongo kianda (390); amatuko ayio nigo anga buna emiaka y’egesusuro ki’obobe bwabo, eyio nero engaki orabe kobogoretie obobe bw’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ekero orabe gwakoorire korara engaki eyio, naende orarere orobega rwao rw’okorio, na obe kobogoretie obobe bw’Abayuda. Nagochikeire amatuko emerongo ene, rituko erimo ndibe buna omwaka oyomo." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Bwasiorie eanga korwa ase okoboko kwao, origererie Yerusalemu oyio oboeire, erio obane mamincha y’oro." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ningosibe ne chingori, erinde tonyara koonchoka gochia ensemo ende yonsi goika obe gwakoorire amatuko ao ay’okoyoboera." 
Ezekiel4:9 Oimokie engano, na esairi, ne ching’ende, ne chinchorogo, na amaemba, na engano ende, erio obeke ebinto ebio ase ekebekerero ekemo, obiochoganie, obiroisie emegati. Eyio nero orabe gokoria ase engaki eyio y’amatuko amagana atato, na emerongo kianda, orabe koraire." 
Ezekiel4:10 Endagera yao orabe gokoria nigo erarengwe, nigo erabe ey’ekerengo gie chisekeli emerongo ebere ase rituko erimo. Eyio nero orabe gokoria rituko ase rituko." 
Ezekiel4:11 Amache orabe gokonywa naro goika arengwe, abe inse y’elita eyemo ase rituko erimo; naboigo orabe gokonywa rituko ase rituko." 
Ezekiel4:12 Oroisie endagera yao buna emegati y’esairi, oyeroiserie ase abanto baroche igoro y’omorero bw’obonyira obwomo bwa mwanyabanto.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Erio Omonene agateba, “Naboigo Abaisraeli bararie endagera etachenegeti ekero barabe bare ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku biria ase ndabaserie gochia.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Erio nkamoiraneria, nkamotebia, “Yaya, Omonene Nyasae, Naama, inche tinana gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka; korwa obwana bwane goika bono iga, tinana koria enyama y’eng’iti ekwete enyene, gose eyeitire ne ching’iti chinde; enyama ende yonsi y’okogechia tiyana gosoa ase omonwa one.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Ase ayio Omonene agantebia, “Bono ninkoe ribaga okoroiseria endagera yao igoro y’omorero bw’obwoyo obwomo bwe chiombe ribaga ri’omorero bw’obonyira bwa mwanyabanto.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Naende Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, ngochia inde gokeyia endagera ase Yerusalemu. Nigo bararengerwe endagera bakoria, na bayerie bare nobwoba. Boigo goika barengerwe amache bakonywa, na bayanywe bare nomoichano." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ninkore ayio, erinde baborwe endagera na amache, na baichanerane omonto noyomwabo, na barabwo nigo bararee na kogireka ase engencho y’egesusuro ki’obobe bwabo." 
Ezekiel5:1 “Aye mwanyabanto, imokia omoyio o birende omwoge, bwekigite etukia y’omotwe oo, ne chinderu chiao; erio orente ekerengero orengere etukia eyio na oyiatanane." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ensemo eyemo ya isato y’etukia eyio oyesambere gati‐gati y’omochie, ekero amatuko ay’okoyoboera kaerire; na ensemo ende ya isato oyeake nomoyio oria goetanana ase omochie oria; na ensemo ende ya isato oyesiarere eirurukigwe nomwaga, na inche ninyebwatie nomoro one." 
Ezekiel5:3 Oimokie etukia inke igo, oyesiberanie ase omokoba bw’eganchwa yao." 
Ezekiel5:4 Naende oimokie inke igo korwa ase eyio, oyerute ase omorero oyesambe, na korwa ase eyio omorero norueo bwesiarere gochia ase Abaisraeli bonsi.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Oyo noro Yerusalemu; nayobekire ase egati‐gati y’abanto b’ebisaku, ne chinse chinde chiyoetanaine." 
Ezekiel5:6 Korende Yerusalemu okorire ebibe kobua abanto b’ebisaku na bwangire koigwera amachiko aane, naende okorire ebibe kobua chinse echio chiyoetanaine, ekiagera bwangire koigwera aya nachigete, gose kobwatia emeroberio yane echikire.”" 
Ezekiel5:7 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Inwe mwabeire abebura‐buria kobua ebisaku ebio bibaetanaine, gose timobwateti emeroberio yane echikire, gose timorendeti amachiko aane, na timobwateti nonya namachiko ’ebisaku ebio bibaetanaine.”" 
Ezekiel5:8 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Rora, inche ninche inde mamincha yaino, nimbachere, mbanachere ekina agwo ase egati yaino, ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ase engencho y’ogosaria kwaino gwonsi gw’okogechia nimbae egesusuro ntana korua kero kende gionsi, gose tinkonyara gokerua nonya ng’ake naende." 
Ezekiel5:10 Ekero ekio abaibori mbarie abana babo, na abana mbarie abaibori babo, agwo ase egati yaino. Nimbanachere ekina, na abatigari baino nimbasiarere gochia ase chinsemo chionsi chi’ense.”" 
Ezekiel5:11 Ase ayio Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Ekeene, buna inde moyo ekiagera inwe mwakorire Obomenyo, bwane Obochenu bwabeire obotachenegeti ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino kw’obokayayu, na okogechia kwaino gwonsi, nimbaserie kegima; eriso riane tirikobarigereria namabeebe, gose inche tinkobarorera amabera." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ensemo eyemo ya isato y’abanto baino mbaitwe namarwaire agoita, na bakwe nenchara, agwo ase omochie ime, na ensemo ende ya isato mbaitwe nemioro agwo ase chinsemo chionsi isiko y’omochie; na ensemo ende ya isato nimbasiarere gochia ase chinsemo chionsi, mbabwatie inde nomoro." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Ase enchera eyio ning’umore endamwamu yane, na obotindi bwane, igoro asebare, erinde ing’isaneke. Ekero ndabe naumoire endamwamu yane asebare, mbamanye ng’a ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio inde ne risemi." 
Ezekiel5:14 Aye omochie, ningosirie obe amaturi na oyo ogochaywa nabanto b’ebisaku bigoetanaine, na ase amasio ’abanto bonsi abagoeta asore." 
Ezekiel5:15 “Ekero ndabe nendamwamu na obotindi na gokonachera ekina na gokoa egesusuro ki’ogokorongeyia, aye nobe kogochaywa na gosekererwa, na ekero abanto b’ebisaku biria bigoetanaine barakorore, nigo barorokererigwe na goichanigwa. Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio." 
Ezekiel5:16 Ekero ekio nindase abanto bao chinsara chiane chi’enchara, chibaite na kobasiria kegima. Ekero ndakore ayio ninkeyie endagera yabo bakoria ebe enke na enchara egenderere komenteka." 
Ezekiel5:17 Nintome enchara ne ching’iti chi’orosana asore, ebio mbiite abana bao; boigo ningotomere amarwaire agoita na ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga amo nomoro. Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, rigereria gochia ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, obane mamincha yabo," 
Ezekiel6:3 otebe: Inwe ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene Nyasae! Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agotebia inwe ebitunwa, na ebigoro, ne chindooche, na amakura: Rora, inche nindete omoro asemore na ninsarie aase aino aimokererete igoro mogosasimera." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ebisasimero biaino mbisarigwe kegima, naboigo na ebisasimero biaino bi’ogosambera ubani. Abanto abwo baraitwe mbatugutwe bosio bw’emegwekano yaino mogosasima." 
Ezekiel6:5 Nimbeke emebere ekwete y’Abaisraeli bosio bw’emegwekano yabo bagosasima, na amauga aino ninyasiarere chinsemo chionsi chiebisasimero biaino." 
Ezekiel6:6 Aase aande onsi morabe momenyete, emechie yaino nesirigwe, na aase aino aimokererete igoro mogosasimera natagorwe na atigwe bosa, na emegwekano yaino mogosasima nebutoranwe tebao naende; boigo na amatenenerio aino aya mogosasimera erioba nabutorwe agwo inse, naboigo na ebisasimero biaino bi’ogosambera ubani, na emeremo yaino yonsi mwakorire esirigwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Abanto baraitwe mbagwe ase egati yaino, na inwe monyare komanya ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Korende nonya naboigo nintige abande baino babe moyo. Abande b’abwo baratooreke korwa ase emioro mbasiarerwe gochia ase chinse chinde, babe bamenyete ase egati y’ebisaku." 
Ezekiel6:9 Abwo baratooreke korwa ase emioro na koirwa ase obosomba ase egati y’ebisaku mbabe bakong’inyora, ekiagera nasenyentete chinkoro chiabo chi’obokayayu, echio chiantigete, na nkaukoria amaiso abo, ayio atengerete ase okogania emegwekano yabo bagosasima. Mbachandeke na kwegecha boka abanyene, ase engencho y’ebibe bakorire, na ase engencho y’okogechia kwabo gwonsi." 
Ezekiel6:10 Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. Amang’ana nakwanete ng’a nimbarentere amabe ayio tarenge amang’ana a bosa.” 
Ezekiel6:11 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba, “Samunsa amaboko aino, na motinere amagoro aino inse, morere: Obee! Obee! Nase engencho y’obobe bwonsi bw’okogechia kw’Abaisraeli obwo bwagerire ng’a baitwe nemioro, na enchara, na amarwaire." 
Ezekiel6:12 Omonto orabe okare aare, oborwaire mbomoite, na oyore ang’e naitwe nomoro, na oyo otigaire na orendire, enchara nemoite. Ase enchera eyio inche Omonene ning’umore ekeririanda kiane igoro yabo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Ekero emebere y’abanto baitirwe erabe eraire ase egati y’emegwekano yabo bagosasima eetanaine ebisasimero biabo igoro y’ebigoro bionsi, na igoro y’ebichuria bi’ebitunwa bionsi, na inse y’emete yonsi emebese, na inse ya kera omote onga buna omotontera, agwo aase aande onsi ase baruerete ebinto bigosokia rimisu rigiya ase emegwekano yabo bagosasima, erio nario baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel6:14 Nindambore okoboko kwane mbaake, insirie ense yabo nyetige bosa, ee, aase aande onsi bamenyete nabe bosa kobua erooro ya Dibula. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel7:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agotebia ense y’Abaisraeli: Oyo nomoerio! Omoerio ngocha ore ase chinsemo inye chi’ense eye." 
Ezekiel7:3 “Bono omoerio ogocheire, na inche nkorenta nde endamwamu yane ebe igoro asore, na ninkonachere ekina koreng’ana nogokora kwao; ninkoe egesusuro ase engencho y’ogokora kwao gwonsi gw’okogechia." 
Ezekiel7:4 Tinkoombia ng’a tinkorochi, gose tingokororera amabera, korende ninkoe egesusuro ase engencho y’ogokora kwao, na ogokora kwao gw’okogechia ngokoiranere. Erio nario oramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Rora, obobe ngocha bore, obobe borabe bogoetania bonde bwonsi." 
Ezekiel7:6 Omoerio ngocha ore, ee, omoerio ngocha ore okonyore! Naama! Ngocha ore!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Inwe abanto momenyete ase ense eye, bono egeku nkobachera kere. Engaki yao yaikire; rituko ri’omoichano ngocha rire; tirikoba rituko ri’ogoaka amariogi ’omogoko igoro ase ebitunwa." 
Ezekiel7:8 “Bono yatigaire engaki enke, inche ng’umore okogechigwa kwane na goikerania endamwamu yane igoro asemore. Nimbanachere ekina koreng’ana nogokora kwaino, nimbae egesusuro ase engencho y’okogechia kwaino gwonsi." 
Ezekiel7:9 Tinkoombia ng’a timbarochi, gose tinkobarorera amabera, korende nimbae egesusuro ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino, na ogokora kwaino gw’okogechia nkobairanere. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene nabaakire." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Naama! Rituko riria ngocha rire! Ngocha rire! Egeku nkobachera kere! Enyimbo y’okobaaka yasebokire, na obomwenu bwareeretire." 
Ezekiel7:11 Okorega okwo gwakinire, kwabeire enyimbo igoro y’abwo bagokora amabe. Omonto obo tagotigara nonya noyomo; obotenenku bwabo mbosirigwe amo na kende gionsi babwate, na obonene bwabo bwonsi mboere." 
Ezekiel7:12 “Engaki eria ngocha ere, rituko riria riaikire ang’e; omogori tabaisa kogoka, gose omoonia tabaisa korera, ekiagera endamwamu yane nigo egochia kobanyora abanto abwo bonsi." 
Ezekiel7:13 Omoonia tari gocha koiranerigwa egento ekio aoonetie nonya ogendererete koba moyo. Aya abanetwe igoro y’omoganda bwonsi tagotigwa taikeranigwa. Onde tari ase abwo bagokora ebibe oranyare gotooria obogima bwaye. 
Ezekiel7:14 Babugirie ebitureri na kobeka ebinto bionsi ang’e, korende nonya noyomo tari oragende ase esegi eyio, ekiagera endamwamu yane nigo ere igoro y’omoganda bwonsi." 
Ezekiel7:15 “Ogoitwa nemioro nigo kore isiko, na oborwaire bogoita, na enchara, nigo bire ase omochie ime. Omonto okare isiko y’omochie naitwe nomoro, na oyore ase omochie ime, enchara na oborwaire mbimoite." 
Ezekiel7:16 Korende abaratigare bare moyo mbatame gochia ase ebitunwa igoro, babe buna amaruma are ase amakuruma, bonsi mbabe bakorera, kera oyomo ase engencho y’ebibe biaye." 
Ezekiel7:17 Mbairianyeke amaboko abo aborwe chinguru, na amaru abo ororobe, abe buna amache." 
Ezekiel7:18 Mbeboyie chigunia, batubwe nomoondoko. Amasio abo nabe nobosooku, na emetwe yabo esunyoke etukia ebe amasio." 
Ezekiel7:19 Mbatugute chifeta chiabo ase chinchera; chitahabu chiabo nchibarwe chibe buna egento ki’eubi. Chifeta ne chitahabu chiabo tichikonyara kobatooria ase rituko ri’endamwamu y’Omonene. Ebinto ebio tibigoisanekia okogania kwabo, gose tibikobaigotia, ekiagera nigo biabete ebigocha bikagera bagakora ebibe." 
Ezekiel7:20 Nigo baenenerete obwari bw’ebinto ebio, na korwa ase ebio bakaroisia emegwekano yabo y’okogechia na ey’obosooku. Ase ayio ninkore ebinto ebio bibe buna eubi asebare." 
Ezekiel7:21 “Inche nindete abanto abaao basakore ebinto ebio, na abakori amabe b’ense mbabiegwe, babikore bibe ebitachenegeti." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ning’o nchore obosio bwane korwa asebare, erinde bakore ekungo yane ebe eyetachenegeti; abauri mbasoe aroro na koyekora ebe eyetachenegeti." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Roisia ebinyuri, ekiagera ense yaichoirwe nogoiterwa kw’amanyinga, na obotindi bwaichoire ase omochie ime." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ase ayio nindete ebisaku bire ebibe mono biire chinyomba chiabo. Ninsirie obomwenu bw’abare ne chinguru, na aase abo aachenu abe atachenegeti." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ekero ogosirigwa korabachere mbarigie omorembe, korende tibakoyonyora." 
Ezekiel7:26 Amaakwa nabe agotunyanwa na amaakwa ande, na amang’ana amabe nabe agotunyanwa nayande amabe. Abanto mbarigie amaroro korwa ase ababani; abakuani mbasinywe kworokereria amachiko, na abagaaka mbasinywe gosemia." 
Ezekiel7:27 Omoruoti nabe okweumia, na abagambi mbatubwe nomoichano; amaboko ’abanto b’ense eye nabe akoiguswa ase obwoba. Nimbakorere koreng’ana nogokora kwabo; nimbagambie koreng’ana buna barenge kogamba. Erio nario baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Ekaba ase rituko ria gatano, omotienyi o gatano na rimo, omwaka o gatano na rimo, ekero narenge ng’ikaransete nyomba mwane amo nabagaaka b’Abayuda, okoboko kw’Omonene Nyasae kogacha igoro yane." 
Ezekiel8:2 Nkarigereria, nkarora omogwekano bw’omonto ore nekieni kenga omorero. Korwa ase ensemo ekarorekana buna ekebono kiaye gochia inse omorero norengeo, na korwa ase ekebono kiaye gochia igoro nkarora obomeka‐meku buna obw’etaai." 
Ezekiel8:3 Akarambora omogwekano onga buna okoboko, akabwata etukia y’omotwe one. Erio Omoika okanyimokereria igoro ase egati y’ense na igoro, na ase okorora gokorwa ase Nyasae Omoika okang’ira Yerusalemu. Okang’ira goika ase egesoero ki’eraaro ya ime, goetera ase egeita kiarochie sugusu. Aroro agwo nao omogwekano obekire, oyio obogetie risemi ria Nyasae." 
Ezekiel8:4 Naama! Obonene bwa Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli nao bwarenge, nkaborora buna naboroche ase ense omweya." 
Ezekiel8:5 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, imokia amaiso ao igoro, origererie gochia sugusu.” Ase ayio nkarigereria gochia sugusu, nkarora omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa, oria obogetie risemi ria Nyasae oteneine ensemo ya sugusu y’egesoero ki’egeita kegochia ase egesasimero." 
Ezekiel8:6 Naende Omonene akamboria, “Aye mwanyabanto, Inee, kwarorire egento Abaisraeli bagokora? Nigo bagokora ebibe ebinge bi’okogechia aase aiga, na bagonseria gochia aare korwa Aase aane Aachenu. Korende norore okogechia okonene kobua okwo.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Erio akandeta ase egesieri ki’eraaro, na ekero narigereretie nkarora ekebao ase enyasi." 
Ezekiel8:8 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, bochora enyasi eyio.” Ekero nabochorete gochia ime, nkarora egesieri." 
Ezekiel8:9 Agantebia, “Soa gochia ime, erinde orore ebibe bi’okogechia okonene bagokorera aase aiga.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Ase ayio ngasoa ime, nkarigereria enyasi chinsemo chionsi, nkarora kera egesaku gie ching’iti chi’okogechia, na emegwekano yonsi Abaisraeli bagosasima, biamang’eire ase chinyasi." 
Ezekiel8:11 Abagaaka b’Abaisraeli emerongo etano na ebere, amo na Yasania, mosinto o Safania, nigo bateneine ase egati y’emegwekano eyio y’ogosasimwa. Kera oyomo nigo abwate ase amaboko aye egetaabo ki’ogosambera ubani, na erioki ria ubani richongororogete gochia igoro." 
Ezekiel8:12 Omonene akamboria, “Aye mwanyabanto, kwarorire egento abagaaka b’Abaisraeli bagokora ase omosunte, kera oyomo ase akanunchi kaye k’emegwekano y’ogosasimwa? Barabwo nigo bagoteba: Omonene tatorochi. Ere otigire ense eye.”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Naende agantebia, “Norore okogechia okonene kobua okwo barabwo bagokora.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Erio akang’ira ase egesoero ki’egeita gia sugusu ase enyomba y’Omonene, na aroro nkarora abakungu baikaranseteo bakoreera enyasae ekorokwa Tamusi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Erio Omonene akamboria, “Aye mwanyabanto, kwarorire amang’ana aya? Norore okogechia okonene kobuete oko.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Naende akang’ira ase eraaro ya ime y’enyomba y’Omonene. Agwo ase egesieri gie Hekalu y’Omonene egati y’enyomba ya bosio na egesasimero, nkarora abasacha koreng’ana emerongo ebere, na batano. Barabwo nigo baete Hekalu y’Omonene amagega, barigereretie gochia moocha. Abwo nigo barenge gosasima erioba barigereretie gochia moocha." 
Ezekiel8:17 Erio akamboria, “Aye mwanyabanto, kwarorire amang’ana aya? Inee! Aya namang’ana amagusu mono ase Abayuda ng’a bakore ebibe bi’okogechia, ebio bagokorera aase aiga? Nigo bagochia goichoria ense yonsi nobobe na bangechie imbe nendamwamu naende naende? Rora buna babekire orosagia rw’omosabibu ase chimioro chiabo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Ase ayio, nimbakorere amabe inde nendamwamu. Tinkoombia ng’a timbarochi, gose tinkobarorera amabera. Nabaisa korera baake eriogi rinene asende, tinkobaigwa.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Nkaigwa Omonene ogoaka eriogi rinene, ogoteba, “Tebia abwo bachikirwe gosaria omochie bache, kera oyomo ache ore nekerwanero kiaye ase okoboko kwaye.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Erio abanto batano nomo bagacha korwa ase egeita kia rogoro kerochie sugusu. Kera oyomo agacha obwate ekerwanero kiaye ki’ogoita koboko kwaye, bare amo nomonto obegete eanga y’egatani, bwebeoranetie ekaramu akorikera, ere kenema kiaye. Abanto abwo bagasoa ime, bagatenena ang’e negesasimero kiaroisirie korwa ase etaai." 
Ezekiel9:3 Obonene bwa Nyasae bw’Abaiisraeli konya bwaimokereire igoro korwa ase omokerubi, agwo ase bwarenge, bokagenda ase omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri ki’enyomba eria. Erio Nyasae akarangeria omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani bweboeranetie ekaramu akorikera," 
Ezekiel9:4 akamotebia, “Soa oete ase omochie o Yerusalemu bwonsi, obeke ekemanyererio ase obosio bwa kera omonto oichanete na korera ase engencho y’ebibe bi’okogechia bigokorwa ase omochie oyio.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Nkaigwa ogotebia abanto baria bande, “Mobwatie omonto oyio korwa nyuma, moetanane ase omochie bwonsi, moite abanto; timoombia ng’a timobarochi, gose timobarorera amabera." 
Ezekiel9:6 Moite mosirie kegima abagaaka, na abamura, na abaiseke, na abana, amo nabakungu, korende timobaisa gokuna omonto obekeire ekemanyererio keria. Mochakere Aase aane Aachenu.” Ase ayio bagachaka goita abagaaka bateneine bosio bw’enyomba eria." 
Ezekiel9:7 Erio Omonene akabatebia, “Mokore enyomba yane ebe eyetachenegeti; moichorie chiraaro chiaye nebitondo bi’abanto. Nyuma y’ayio mosoe ase omochie” Ase ayio bagasoa ase omochie, bagaita abanto." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ekero abwo bagendererete goita abanto, ngatigara inche bweka. Erio ngatung’ama inse nkaumama, nkarera ase Omonene, nkamoboria, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, Inee, nigo ogochia gosiria Abaisraeli bonsi abwo batigaire ase okoumora endamwamu yao ase Yerusalemu?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Omonene akang’iraneria, agantebia, “Ebibe bi’Abaisraeli na Abayuda nigo bire ebinene mono. Ense nigo eichire nogoiterwa kw’amanyinga, na omochie nigo oichire nobokorekanu bw’ogosaria amachiko, ekiagera abanto nigo bagoteba: Omonene otigire ense eye, ere tari korora kende." 
Ezekiel9:10 Inche tinkoombia ng’a timbarochi, gose tinkobarorera amabera, goika mbaakane ogokora kwabo kobairanere.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Erio omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani, na bweboeranetie ekaramu akorikera, akairana akarenta amang’ana, agateba, “Nakorire buna gwanchigete.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Nkarigereria, nkarora igoro ase eaanga eria yarenge igoro y’emetwe y’abakerubi egento kenga buna safiro, rigena rikomeka‐meka, nabaachire buna ekerogo ki’obonene." 
Ezekiel10:2 Omonene agatebia omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani, “Genda ase egati‐gati y’amagoro aria anga chinyange, are inse y’omokerubi, bwanchare namaboko ao omorero bw’amakara ore ase egati y’abakerubi baria, oyosiarere igoro y’omochie.” Erio akagenda imorigereretie." 
Ezekiel10:3 Abakerubi abwo nigo bateneine ensemo y’okorio y’enyomba y’Omonene, ekero omonto oria asoeteo, ne riire rigaichora ase eraaro ya ime." 
Ezekiel10:4 Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokaimokerera igoro, bokarua ase omokerubi oria, bokagenda ase omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri ki’enyomba eria; enyomba eria egaichorwa ne riire, na eraaro egaichorwa nobomeka‐meku bw’obonene bw’Omonene." 
Ezekiel10:5 Eriogi ri’ogoakania chimbaba chi’abakerubi baria rikaigugwa ase eraaro ya isiko, buna eriogi ria Nyasae Omobui ekero agokwana." 
Ezekiel10:6 Ekero Omonene achigete omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani agende korusia omorero korwa ase egati‐gati y’amagoro aria anga chinyange, korwa ase egati‐gati y’abakerubi, omonto oria agasoa agatenena ang’e nokomo kw’amagoro aria." 
Ezekiel10:7 Omokerubi oria oyomo akarambora okoboko kwaye ase egati‐gati y’abakerubi bande, na agaanchara omorero bw’amakara orenge ase egati‐gati y’abakerubi baria bande, akayobeka ase amaboko ’omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani, na omonto oria akayobogoria, agasoka noro isiko." 
Ezekiel10:8 Nkarora inse ye chimbaba chi’abakerubi baria egento gekororekana buna okoboko kw’omonto. 
Ezekiel10:9 Nkarigereria nkarora amagoro aria anga chinyange ane mbarabare y’abakerubi, okomo kore ang’e ase kera omokerubi. Amagoro aria nigo arenge kororekana anga buna kurusolito, rigena rikomeka‐meka." 
Ezekiel10:10 Amagoro aria ane nigo agwekaine, kera okogoro nigo kwaroisirie kogasoanigwa nokonde." 
Ezekiel10:11 Ekero amagoro ayio arenge kogenda, nigo arenge kogenda ase chinsemo inye chionsi, tarenge koonchoka, akaba akogenda gochia bosio rioka, korende ase okogoro kwa bosio kwarenge kogenda gochia, onsi nigo arenge kobwatia gochiao atari koonchoka ekero akogenda." 
Ezekiel10:12 Emebere y’abakerubi baria, na emegongo yabo, na amaboko abo, ne chimbaba chiabo, amo namagoro aria abakerubi baria bane babwate, nigo biaichire namaiso ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Ezekiel10:13 Nkaigwa amagoro aria akorokwa “Oborundarundia”. 
Ezekiel10:14 Kera omokerubi nigo abwate amasio ane; obosio bwe ritang’ani nigo bwarenge buna obw’omokerubi, na obwa kabere buna obwa mwanyabanto, na obwa gatato buna obw’endo, na obwa kane buna obw’ensoti." 
Ezekiel10:15 Amakerubi abwo bakaimoka gochia igoro. Ebitongwa ebio nabio biria naroche ang’e norooche rwa Kebari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Ekero abakerubi baria barenge kogenda naboigo na amagoro aria naro arenge goeta mbarabare yabo, na ekero abakerubi baria barenge korambora chimbaba chiabo ase okoimoka gochia igoro, amagoro aria tarenge gwatananeka korwa asebare." 
Ezekiel10:17 Ekero barenge gotenena, na amagoro aria naro atenena; ekero barenge koimoka gochia igoro, na amagoro aria aimoka amo nabarabwo, ekiagera omoika bw’ebitongwa biria nigo orenge ime yabo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokarua ase omoriibo o inse bw’egesieri ki’enyomba y’Omonene, bokagenda bogatenena igoro y’abakerubi baria." 
Ezekiel10:19 Erio nkarora abakerubi baria bakorambora chimbaba chiabo na koimokerera igoro korwa ase riroba ekero bagendete, na amagoro aria naro akagenda amo nabarabwo. Bagatenena ase egesoero ki’egeita kia moocha kegochia ase enyomba y’Omonene, na obonene bwa Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli nigo bwarenge igoro yabo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ebitongwa ebio nabio biria naroche bire inse ya Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli ang’e norooche rwa Kebari, na nkamanya ng’a abwo nabakerubi barenge." 
Ezekiel10:21 Kera oyomo nigo abwate amasio ane, ne chimbaba inye, na inse ya kera orobaba egento nkiarengeo gekororekana buna okoboko kwa mwanyabanto." 
Ezekiel10:22 Amasio abo nigo agwekaine kegima buna aria naroche agwo ang’e norooche rwa Kebari. Kera oyomo akagenderera gochia bosio atari koonchoka. 
Ezekiel11:1 Omoika okanyimokereria igoro, okang’ira ase egeita ki’enyomba y’Omonene kiarochie moocha. Na rora, agwo ase egesieri ki’egeita mbarengeo abasacha emerongo ebere, na batano, na ase egati yabo nkarora Yasania, mosinto bw’Asuri, na Peletia, mosinto o Benaya, abwo barenge abagambi b’abanto." 
Ezekiel11:2 Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, abanto aba nabwo bagokora emeroberio y’ogokora ebibe na korua ogosemia kw’ogokora amabe ase omochie oyo." 
Ezekiel11:3 Barabwo nigo bagoteba ng’a engaki teraika ang’e tokoagacha chinyomba; omochie oyo nenyanyeni ekoiyeka, na intwe nechinyama." 
Ezekiel11:4 Ase ayio, aye mwanyabanto, bana ayare mamincha, yabo; ee babanere.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Omoika bw’Omonene ogacha igoro asende, ogantebia, “Batebie ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Inwe Abaisraeli, naboigo mogokwana; inche nigo imanyete ayare ase chinkoro chiaino ime." 
Ezekiel11:6 Mwaitire abanto abange goetania, ase omochie oyo, mwaichoirie chinchera chiaye nebitondo." 
Ezekiel11:7 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Abwo mwaitire baraire ase omochie ime nabwo chinyama, na omochie oyo noro enyanyeni ekoiyeka; korende inwe abanyene nimbasokie korwa ase omochie oyo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Inwe nigo moirogete ogoitwa nemioro, nindete emioro ebaite. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel11:9 Nimbarusie ase omochie oyo, mbabeke ase amaboko ’abanto abaao, na mbanachere ekina." 
Ezekiel11:10 Inwe imoitwe nemioro. Nimbanachere ekina agwo ase ribebe ri’Abaisraeli. Erio momanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. 
Ezekiel11:11 Omochie oyo tori gochia koba buna enyanyeni asemore, na inwe timori koba chinyama ime yaye; inche nimbanachere ekina agwo ase ribebe ri’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel11:12 Erio momanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. Inwe mwangire kobwatia emeroberio yane echikire, gose timori gokora aya nachikire, korende nigo mogokora koreng’ana namachiko ’abanto b’ebisaku ebio bibaetanaine.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Ekero nagendererete kobana, Pelatia, mosinto o Benaya, agakwa. Erio ngatung’ama inse nkaumama, nkarera neriogi rinene, nkabora, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, Inee, nigo ogochia goita osirie kegima abatigari b’Abaisraeli?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Aye mwanyabanto, abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu nigo bagokwana igoro y’abanto bamino ab’egesaku kiao, ee, igoro y’Abaisraeli bonsi, bagoteba: Barabwo nigo bare aare korwa ase Omonene, ense eye nintwe twaeirwe ebe eyaito." 
Ezekiel11:16 “Ase ayio obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nonya nabaseririe gochia aare ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku na kobasiarera gochia ase chinse chionsi, inche omonyene nabeire inde obomenyo bwabo obochenu ase engaki eyio enke, agwo ase chinse echio baseretigwe gochia." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Ase ayio obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nimbasangererie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku, na korwa ase chinse echio ase nabasiarerete gochia, erio mbairanie inwe Abaisraeli, mbae ense yaino." 
Ezekiel11:18 Ekero barabe bairanire ase ense eyio, mbatugute korwa aroro emegwekano egosasimwa ey’obosooku, na okogechia gwonsi." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ekero ekio nimbae enkoro eyemo, naende mbeke omoika omoyia ime yabo. Nindusie korwa asebare chinkoro chire chinkong’u buna rigena, erio mbae echire chinyororo buna chinyama." 
Ezekiel11:20 Erio nario barabwatie emeroberio yane echikire, babwatie na amachiko aane na koyaigwera. Barabwo mbabe abanto baane, na inche nimbe Nyasae obo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Korende abanto abwo chinkoro chiabo chikobwatia emegwekano y’obosooku bagosasima, na okogechia, nimbaakane ogokora kwabo kobairanere.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae agoteba." 
Ezekiel11:22 Erio abakerubi bakarambora chimbaba chiabo, na amagoro arenge mbarabare yabo; na obonene bwa Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli bokaba igoro yabo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Erio obonene bw’Omonene bokaimokerera igoro korwa ase omochie oria, bokagenda bogatenena igoro ase egetunwa kere moocha y’omochie." 
Ezekiel11:24 Ase okorora naetwe, Omoika o Nyasae okanyimokereria igoro, okang’ira ase ense y’Abakalidayo, ase abanto abwo boosetwe barenge. Nyuma y’ayio okorora koria naroche gokarua asende." 
Ezekiel11:25 Erio ngatebia abanto abwo bonsi boosetwe amang’ana onsi aya Omonene konya anyorokirie. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel12:2 “Aye mwanyabanto omenyete ase egati y’abanto batari koigwera; abwo babwate amaiso akorora, korende tibari korora, na amato akoigwa, korende tibari koigwa, ekiagera barabwo tibari koigwera." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Ase ayio, aye mwanyabanto, ebeke ang’e amo nebinto biao, obe buna omonto okong’anya korwa ase ense yaye, ong’anye mobaso ekero abanto baroche. Ong’anye korwa aase ao otaare goika aase aande kobaroche. Ande nabo barabaise komanya nonya bare abanto batari koigwera." 
Ezekiel12:4 Osokie ebinto biao isiko mobaso kobaroche, ebinto buna ebi’oyo okong’anya korwa ase ense yaye, na rigoika mogoroba, ogende aye bweka kobaroche, buna oyo okong’anya korwa ase ense yaye." 
Ezekiel12:5 Obochore ekebao ase enyasi ekero abanto abwo bakoroche, erio obogorie ebinto biao oetereo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Ekero omosunte ochire, obeke ebinto biao ireko, ekero abanto bakorigereretie. Otube obosio bwao torora ense, ekiagera nagokorire aye obe ekemanyererio ase egesaku ki’Abaisraeli.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Inche ngakora buna nachigetwe; mobaso gati ngasokia ebinto biane isiko, nkaba buna nkong’anya inde, na riachia koba mogoroba, nkabochora enyasi namaboko aane. Ekero omosunte ochire, nkabeka ebinto biane ireko, nkagenda ekero abanto barigereretie." 
Ezekiel12:8 Rituko ria kabere mambia, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel12:9 “Aye mwanyabanto, ekeene, Abaisraeli abwo batari koigwera mbakoborie ng’a ninki ekio ogokora." 
Ezekiel12:10 Bono obairanerie, obatebie: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Okoorokerigwa oko nigo kore igoro y’omogambi o Yerusalemu, amo n’Abaisraeli bonsi bare imeo." 
Ezekiel12:11 Obatebie ng’a aye nigo ore ekemanyererio asebare, na buna aye gwakorire nabarabwo nabo barakore, mbang’anyigwe bairwe ase obosomba." 
Ezekiel12:12 Omogambi ore ase egati yabo naimokie ebinto biaye abibeke ireko agende; ekero omosunte ochire abochore ekebao ase enyasi aetereo; nigo aratube obosio bwaye tabaisa korora ense namaiso aye. 
Ezekiel12:13 Nimobekere ekeonga kiane abwatwe ase oboreba bwane; erio imoire Babeli, ase ense y’Abakalidayo; nonya naboigo takoyerora namaiso aye, korende nao arakwere." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ninsiarere gochia ase chinsemo chionsi abanto bonsi abamoetanaine ase okomokonya, na abarwani baye bonsi b’esegi boigo, naende nimbabwatie nomoro one." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Ekero ndabaserie gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku na mbasiarere gochia ase chinse ching’ao, barabwo mbamanye ng’a ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel12:16 Korende nintigarie abanto bake korwa ase egati yabo bataitwe nemioro, gose nenchara, gose noborwaire bogoita, erinde kobare agwo ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku ase barairwe, banyare koorokia ebibe biabo bi’okogechia bakorire. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel12:18 “Aye mwanyabanto, karie endagera yao kore nomoondoko, na onywe amache ao gokoiguswa na gochandeka." 
Ezekiel12:19 Otebie abanto bamenyete ase ense eye ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba igoro y’abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu ase ense y’Abaisraeli: Barabwo mbarie endagera yabo bare nomoichano na mbanywe amache abo bare nobwoba, ekiagera ense yabo nesakorwe na ebinto bionsi bireo, etigwe ere bosa ase engencho y’obobe obwo abanto bareo bakorire." 
Ezekiel12:20 Emechie eyio emenyire nesarigwe kegima, na ense etigwe ere bosa. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel12:22 “Aye mwanyabanto, ninkwana ki eye mogokwana ase ense y’Abaisraeli, mogoteba: Amatuko abanetwe abeire amange mono, na amaroro ’obobani abeire bosa?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Ase ayio batebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ninsirie enkwana eyio, tibayekwana naende ase ense y’Abaisraeli. Korende batebie: Amatuko ayio abeire ang’e, na amaroro onsi ay’obobani goika aikeranigwe." 
Ezekiel12:24 “Amaroro ’obobani ay’okong’ainereria, gose oboringoria bw’okweansia, tibikoba ase egati y’Abaisraeli nonya ng’ake." 
Ezekiel12:25 Inche Omonene ninkwane ring’ana nganetie gokwana, na rirorio goika riikerane, tirigotebana nonya ng’ake. Inwe egesaku getari koigwera, ase amatuko aino ninkwane ring’ana ndiikeranie. Nabo inche Omonene Nyasae natebire.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel12:27 “Aye mwanyabanto, Abaisraeli nigo bagoteba iga: Okorora koria ere arorire nokw’amatuko atabe bwango; nigo akobana igoro ye chingaki chikare aare chitaracha." 
Ezekiel12:28 Ase ayio obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Amang’ana aane tagotebana nonya ng’ake taikeranigwa, onsi aya nakwanire goika aikeranigwe. Ninche Omonene Nyasae nakwanire.”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel13:2 “Aye mwayabanto, bana mamincha y’ababani b’Abaisraeli, abwo bakobana amang’ana akorwa ase ebirengererio biabo abanyene, obatebie: Igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene!" 
Ezekiel13:3 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Obobe nobw’ababani abwo abariri bakobwatia emeika yabo abanyene, na tibabwati korora konde gwonsi bagokwana." 
Ezekiel13:4 Inwe Abaisraeli, ababani baino nigo banga buna ebibwe bimenyete ase amaturi." 
Ezekiel13:5 Barabwo tibatiirete gochia aase atagoire, gose tibagiterete Abaisraeli chindwaki, erinde bekengere ase esegi ye rituko ri’Omonene." 
Ezekiel13:6 Amaroro abo nay’obong’ainereria, na oboringoria bwabo nobw’oborimo. Barabwo nigo bagoteba iga: Omonene otebire bo. Korende Omonene tabatometi. Nonya naboigo, nigo basemeretie ng’a Omonene naikeranie amang’ana abo babanire." 
Ezekiel13:7 Inee! Tari amaroro ’obong’ainereria barorire, naende nigo bakoringoria oboringoria bw’oborimo, ekero bagokwana ng’a Omonene otebire bo, na inche Omonene tinkwaneti ayio?" 
Ezekiel13:8 “Ase ayio aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ekiagera mwakwanire ay’obong’ainereria naende mwarorire amaroro ay’oborimo, rora, inche nigo inde mamincha yaino. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Ezekiel13:9 Okoboko kwane ngoake ababani abwo bakorora amaroro ’obong’ainereria, naende nigo bakoringoria oboringoria bw’oborimo. Barabwo tibakobeera ase omosangererekano bw’abanto baane, gose tibakorikwa amo n’Abaisraeli, gose tibagosoa ase ense y’Abaisraeli. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene Nyasae." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Ababani abwo basiririe abanto baane, babaebereirie na kobatebia: Omorembe; na omorembe tori aande. Ekero abanto baagachire orwaki barabwo nigo bakoroaka echooka etochoganiri buya." 
Ezekiel13:11 Ase ayio goika otebie ababani abwo bagoaka orwaki orwo echooka eyio ng’a orwaki orwo narogwe. Embura y’omoubera netwe amo namagena amanene, na ekembugu‐mbugu biroiyerie inse." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ekero orwaki orwo rorabe rwagure inse, Inee, abanto tibakobaboria: Ng’ai echooka eria mwaroagete ere bono?" 
Ezekiel13:13 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nintome ekembugu‐mbugu inde nendamwamu na ekeririanda, nintome embura ere ne chinguru, naende ase endamwamu yane nintome embura ere namagena amanene, nsarie bionsi kegima." 
Ezekiel13:14 Erio inyiyerie inse orwaki orwo mwaagete echooka, erinde oboroso bwaye botuborwe. Ekero orwaki orwo roragwe, inwe imoitwe mokwereo. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel13:15 “Ase ayio ning’umore endamwamu yane eerere ase okoiyeria orwaki roria na gosiria baria baroagete echooka eria. Erio nimbatebie: Orwaki roria tiroiyo, nonya mbaria baroagete echooka tibaiyo." 
Ezekiel13:16 Abwo nabwo barenge ababani baria b’Abaisraeli babanete igoro ya Yerusalemu, na baroche amaroro ay’omorembe, nonya omorembe torengeo. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel13:17 “Aye mwanyabanto, barigererie abakungu b’abanto bao, abwo bakobana amang’ana akorwa ase ebirengererio biabo abanyene, obane amang’ana are mamincha yabo." 
Ezekiel13:18 Obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Obobe nobwabo abakungu abwo bakobarera ebimoya bire namaebi, babisiba ase amaboko abo, naende babarera ebitambaa bagotuba emetwe y’abanto abake na abanene, erinde babarichania. Inee! Inwe abakungu aba, nigo mogochia korigia abanto baane na kobarichania, mobasirie, erinde inwe mogenderere koba moyo na kwenyorera ebitoki?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Inwe mwankorire nabeire buna nigo inde oyotachenegeti ase egati y’abanto baane, ase okogania esairi eichire roe, na ebisamunye bi’omogati. Mwaitire abatagwenerete goitwa, na abagwenerete goitwa mwatigire koba moyo. Ayio nigo mwayakorire ase okong’ainereria abanto baane, abwo bagwancherana nay’oborimo." 
Ezekiel13:20 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora nagechire ebimoya bire namaebi, ebio mokobwatera abanto buna nechinyoni mokobwata; nimbibutore korwa ase amaboko aino, erinde nsibore abanto abwo mwabwatire, barabwo batame buna chinyoni." 
Ezekiel13:21 Boigo nintandore ebietubo biaino, ndusie abanto baane korwa ase amaboko aino, tibakogenderera koba abooswa asemore. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel13:22 “Ase engencho y’oborimo bwaino mwagerire abanyene oboronge baichanire ase chinkoro chiabo, abwo inche ntaichanetie. Nigo mwagerire abakori amabe koba noboremu, erinde tibaonchoka batige chinchera chiabo chi’obobe, erinde batoorie obogima bwabo." 
Ezekiel13:23 Ase ayio timokogenderera korora amaroro ay’obong’ainereria, gose kwenaria oboringoria. Nindusie abanto baane korwa ase amaboko aino. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Abagaaka bande b’Abaisraeli bagacha asende, bagaikaransa ase obosio bwane." 
Ezekiel14:2 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel14:3 “Aye mwanyabanto, abanto aba baeire emegwekano bagosasima ribaga koba ase chinkoro chiabo, na emegwekano eyio yabeire ekegocha gekobaraa gochia gokora ebibe. Inee! Ninyanche abanto banga buna abwo baborie amang’ana korwa asende?" 
Ezekiel14:4 “Ase igo, kwana nabarabwo, obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Omonto onde bwensi bw’Abaisraeli orae emegwekano yaye agosasima ribaga ase enkoro yaye, na emegwekano eyio ebe ekegocha gekomoraa gochia gokora ebibe, naende abe ogocha ase omobani, oyio ninche Omonene omonyene ndamoiranerie buna agwenerete ase engencho y’emegwekano yaye emenge agosasima." 
Ezekiel14:5 Erio nario ndanyare koirania chinkoro chi’Abaisraeli gocha asende, abwo baatananirwe korwa asende ase engencho y’emegwekano yabo bagosasima." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Ase ayio, tebia Abaisraeli ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Eitie moonchoke, motige gosasima emegwekano yaino; onchoka motige ebibe biaino bionsi bi’okogechia." 
Ezekiel14:7 “Omonto onde bwensi bw’Abaisraeli, gose omomenyi omenyete ase egati yabo, oreatanane korwa asende na koa emegwekano eyio ribaga ase enkoro yaye, eyio ekoba ekegocha gekomoraa gochia gokora ebibe, naende abe ogocha ase omobani komboria amang’ana goetera asare, oyio ninche Omonene omonyene ndamoiranerie." 
Ezekiel14:8 Nigo ndamobee, erinde abe ekiorokererio na omobayeno ogokwanwa nabanto, naende imwatanane kegima korwa ase abanto baane. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Omobani karang’aineke akwane ring’ana ri’obobani, rirorio ninche Omonene nang’ainire omobani oyio; nindambore okoboko kwane imoite arue ase egati y’Abaisraeli, abanto baane." 
Ezekiel14:10 Abwo mbabogorie egesusuro ki’ebibe biabo, egesusuro ki’omobani na eki’omonto oria ochete koboria amang’ana korwa asare, nigo kerabe ekemo." 
Ezekiel14:11 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba ng’a ase enchera eyio Abaisraeli tibakorua asende bachie gosira, gose gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka nonya ng’ake ase engencho y’ogosaria kwabo gwonsi, korende mbabe abanto baane, na inche imbe Nyasae obo.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel14:13 “Aye mwanyabanto, onye ense egokora ebibe asende ase ogokora aya atari ay’obwegenwa, nindambore okoboko kwane igoro yaye, ninsirie endagera nyerentere enchara, naende ng’ite mwanyabanto ne ching’iti," 
Ezekiel14:14 nonya abanto aba batato: Nuhu, na Danieli, na Ayubu, barenge kobao, oboronge bwabo tibware gotooria monto onde bwensi, otatiga mbarabwo boka bware gotooria.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Ezekiel14:14 nonya abanto aba batato: Nuhu, na Danieli, na Ayubu, barenge kobao, oboronge bwabo tibware gotooria monto onde bwensi, otatiga mbarabwo boka bware gotooria.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Gose inse korenta ching’iti chi’orosana chintindi chichiche ase ense eyio chiyesarie ebe bosa, erinde monto onde tabaisa goeta ase ense eyio ase engencho ye ching’iti echio," 
Ezekiel14:16 nonya abanto abwo batato barenge koba ase ense eyio, ekeene, buna inche Omonene Nyasae inde moyo, tibare konyara gotooria abana bareo, abamura gose abaiseke. Mbarabwo boka baare gotoorigwa, korende ense ero esarigwe ebe bosa.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Gose inse gotoma omoro ase ense na ntebe: Omoro tiga oetere ense eye, naende insirie kegima mwanyabanto ne ching’iti," 
Ezekiel14:18 nonya abanto abwo batato barenge kobao, ekeene, buna inche Omonene Nyasae inde moyo, tibare konyara gotooria abana bareo, abamura gose abaiseke, korende mbarabwo boka baare gotoorigwa.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Gose inse gotoma oborwaire bogoita ase ense eyio, ing’umore endamwamu yane egere ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga, ng’ite mwanyabanto ne ching’iti aroro," 
Ezekiel14:20 nonya Nuhu, na Danieli, na Ayubu barenge kobao, ekeene, buna inche Omonene Nyasae inde moyo, oboronge bwabo tibware gotooria abana bareo, abamura gose abaiseke, otatiga mbarabwo boka bware gotooria.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel14:20 nonya Nuhu, na Danieli, na Ayubu barenge kobao, ekeene, buna inche Omonene Nyasae inde moyo, oboronge bwabo tibware gotooria abana bareo, abamura gose abaiseke, otatiga mbarabwo boka bware gotooria.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel14:21 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Naki erabe emechando emenene goetania ekero ndatome ase Yerusalemu ebisusuro biane bine: omoro, na enchara, ne ching’iti chintindi, na oborwaire bogoita, erinde ng’ite na gosiria mwanyabanto amo ne ching’iti!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Nonya naboigo mbatigare abanto bande bare moyo, amo nabana babo, abamura na abaiseke. Abwo mbasoke korwao bache asemore. Ekero barache, morigererie orogendo rwabo, na ogokora kwabo. Erio nario moraisaneke ng’a egesusuro ekio naruete igoro ya Yerusalemu, na aya onsi nayokorerete ase engencho y’ebibe biaye nay’oboronge." 
Ezekiel14:23 Barabwo mbabaremie, na ekero morarore chinchera chiabo, na ogokora kwabo, nigo moramanye ng’a aya nakorerete omochie oyio tinakorete engencho ende etaiyo. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel15:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, Inee, naki omote bw’omosabibu nobuete emete ende yonsi, ase ogotogigwa, gose orosagia rw’omosabibu rore ase egati y’emete ende ere rinani?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Inee! Omote oyio nonachwe okorerwe moremo onde? Gose abanto mbaroisie egekongo korwa ase omote oyio basungere egento kende gionsi. 
Ezekiel15:4 Nigo okoba chinko orutwa riko. Ekero omorero osambire chinsinyo chiaye chionsi, na obogati bwaye bwarurirwe, Inee, bono moremo ki orakorerwe?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Naama! Ekero omosabibu oyio orenge omogima togwenerete gokorerwa moremo onde bwensi, bono ekero oire na korurwa nomorero, moremo ki orakorerwe?" 
Ezekiel15:6 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Buna omote bw’omosabibu ore ase egati y’emete ende ere ase rinani orauterwe omorero oyie, naboigo ndatugute abanto ba Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Nigo ndababee; nonya bagochia gotooreka korwa ase omorero, naende omorero noro orabasirie. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene, nababeeire." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ninsirie ense eyio ebe bosa, ekiagera bakorire aya atari ay’obwegenwa. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel16:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, manyia Yerusalemu okogechia kwaye." 
Ezekiel16:3 Tebia Yerusalemu ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae akoyotebia: “Aye nigo kwaiboreretwe ase ense ya Kanani. Iso nigo arenge Omoamori, na nyoko n’Omohiti orenge." 
Ezekiel16:4 Rituko kwaiboretwe ororera rwao tirwanachetwe, gose tigwasibetigwe namache orabe, gose tikwaagetwe omonyo, gose tikwabekeretwe eanga y’obwana." 
Ezekiel16:5 Monto onde takororerete amabeebe agokorere ring’ana nonya nerimo ase ayio, gose gokororera amabera; korende nigo gwatugutetwe isiko aarabu, ekiagera rituko erio kwaiboretwe nigo kwagechetwe." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Ekero naetete agwo ase kwarenge, ngakorora gokwegara‐garia ime ase amanyinga ao, nkagotebia: Buna oraire ase amanyinga ao ime, obe moyo; ee, nkagotebia: Buna oraire ase amanyinga ao ime, obe moyo." 
Ezekiel16:7 Nkagokinia okamenteka okaba chilifu ne chilifu, buna ebimeri bire ase riroba. Ogakina okaba omonene na omonyakieni: chimbeere chiao chigakina, na etukia yao boigo; korende nonya naboigo, nigo kwarenge getirianda, tikwabegete kende." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ekero naende naetete asore, ngakorigereria, nkarora ng’a gwaikire engaki y’ogwanchwa. Nkagotuba nomwambaro one, nkabisia obogetirianda bwao. Naende ngakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania naye, erio aye okaba oyone. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Erio nkagosibia namache, ngasibia amanyinga ao onsi na kogoaka amaguta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ngakobekera eanga eroisirie ere nebieni ao ao, ngakobekera na ebikoroto bie risankwa riterere ri’eng’iti ya rooche. Ngakoboyia egetambaa ki’egatani engiya, naende ngakobekera egietubo ki’ariri." 
Ezekiel16:11 Nkagochabera nebinto bi’obwari, na ase amaboko ao ngakobekera chibangiri, ne chisonoi igoti riao." 
Ezekiel16:12 Nkabeka ebonyi ase emioro yao, na ebigera ase amato ao, na egutwa enseera ase omotwe oo." 
Ezekiel16:13 Ase ayio, aye ogachaberwa ne chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chianga chiao nigo chiarenge echi’egatani engiya, na echi’ariri, na echiroisirie chire nebieni ao ao. Boigo okaria endagera yaroiseretigwe nobosie obonuke, na okaria obooke, na amaguta. Erio okaba omonyakieni mono, ogasesenigwa, ogaikera ekerengo ki’oboruoti." 
Ezekiel16:14 Okamanyekana ase ebisaku ase engencho y’oboseera bwao. Oboseera bwao nigo bwarenge oboikeranu, ekiagera ninche nakoboete.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Korende aye nigo gwasemeretie oboseera bwao, erio ogekora omotayayi, ekiagera kwamanyekanete mono, ogekayayia ase abaeti bonsi, ogechwara ase onde bwensi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Okaira chianga chiao, ogachabera aase aimokererete igoro akaba nebieni ao ao, na aroro agwo ogakorera obonyaka bwao. Amang’ana anga buna ayio tana gokorekana korwa kare, na tagokorekana nonya ng’ake." 
Ezekiel16:17 Naende okaimokia ebinto biao ebiya bie chitahabu na ebie chifeta nakoete, erio okeroiseria emegwekano ogosasima enga abasacha, erio ogakora obonyaka nero." 
Ezekiel16:18 Naende okaira chianga chiao chiare nebieni ao ao, ogatuba emegwekano eria, na okabeka amaguta aane na ubani yane ase amasio abo." 
Ezekiel16:19 Omogati one nakoete, na obosie obonuke, na amaguta amaya, na obooke, ebio okabirua ase emegwekano eyio koba rimisu rigiya rikoyegwenera; ee, nabo gwakorete.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Naende okaira abana bao, abamura na abaiseke, abwo kwanyiborerete, okabarua bakaba ebing’wanso ase emegwekano eyio, okabasiria. Inee! Obonyaka obwo bwao ne ring’ana rike?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Nering’ana rike aye kwaruete abana baane bakaba ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa ase emegwekano eyio? 
Ezekiel16:22 Ase engaki eyio kwarenge gokora ebibe bi’okogechia, na obotayayi, tikwainyorete amatuko aria ay’oboke bwao, ekero kwarenge getirianda otabegete kende, na kwarenge kwegaragaria ime ase amanyinga ao.”" 
Ezekiel16:23 Ase ayio Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga, “Obobe nobwao! Nyuma kogwakorire amabe aya onsi," 
Ezekiel16:24 okeagachera ebinyomba bi’emegwekano ogosasima, na ase kera enchera kwaagachire aase aimokererete igoro ogosasimera." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ase kera amatabekania e chinchera kwaagachire aase aimokererete igoro ogosasimera, kwanyakairie oboseera bwao, gwechwarire ase onde bwensi ogoeta, na gwakorire obonyaka obonge." 
Ezekiel16:26 Nigo gwakorete obonyaka n’Abamisiri, abanto abwo mosinyaine bare nokogania okobe; okamenta obonyaka bwao, na okagera nkagechigwa nkaba nendamwamu." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Rora, naramboire okoboko kwane kogoaka, nakeeirie endagera yao, naende nakorure nakobekire ase abakungu b’Abafilisti, abwo bakogechete naende barorire obosooku ase ogokora kwao kw’obonyaka, erinde bagokore buna banchete." 
Ezekiel16:28 “Naende ngwakorete obonyaka n’Abaasuri, ekiagera tigwaisanegete, ee, ngwakorete obotayayi nabarabwo, nonya naboigo tigwaisanegete." 
Ezekiel16:29 Nkwamentete obotayayi bwao, okagenda nonya ngochia ase ense y’Abakalidayo, abwo bare abaonchoreria, na barabwo boigo tibagoisanegetie.”" 
Ezekiel16:30 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Naki enkoro yao ere nokogania okonene kw’ogwanchwa, ekiagera gwakorire aya onsi, ayare buna ogokora kw’omokungu omonyaka otari korora obosooku." 
Ezekiel16:31 Kweagacheire ebinyomba bi’emegwekano ogosasima ase amatabekania onsi e chinchera, na ase kera enchera kwaagachire aase aimokererete igoro ogosasimera. Nonya naboigo tikwarenge buna omokungu omotayayi onde bwensi, ekiagera nigo gwachayete ogoakanerwa gwe chibesa." 
Ezekiel16:32 Aye omokungu omotomani nigo gwatigete omosacha oo okaba kore nabasacha abaao! 
Ezekiel16:33 Abasacha nigo bakorwa chibesa baa abakungu abatayayi, korende aye nigo okorua echiao kwaa abanchi bao ase okobaebereria bache korwa chinsemo chionsi bakore obonyaka naye." 
Ezekiel16:34 Aye nigo ore nogwatananeka korwa ase abakungu bande abatayayi. Monto onde tagotunyanete arigie gokora obonyaka naye, korende naye omonyene kwaruete chibesa ase obonyaka obwo. Ase ayio nigo ore nogwatananeka korwa ase abatayayi bande." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Ase ayio, aye omotayayi, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene!" 
Ezekiel16:36 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Obosooku bwao bwaorokigwe isiko, na obogetirianda bwao tibotubiri ekero ogokora obonyaka nabanchi bao. Naende nigo gwasasimete emegwekano yao y’okogechia na okarua abana bao bakaba ekeng’wanso ase emegwekano eyio." 
Ezekiel16:37 Ase ayio ninsangererie abanchi bao abwo kwegokeretie, na bonsi abwo gwanchete, na abwo kwagechete; nimbasangererie korwa ase chinsemo chionsi bagoetanane, ngwasiorie, erinde barore obogetirianda bwao." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ninkonachere ekina buna abakungu basaririe chiira chi’okonyuomana kwabo na buna abaiteri amanyinga bakonacherwa ekina; amanyinga ao ninyaitere inde nendamwamu ne risemi. 
Ezekiel16:39 Ninkobeke ase amaboko ’abanchi bao; barabwo mbatagore ebinyomba biria kweagacherete bi’emegwekano ogosasima amo naase ao aimokererete igoro. Naende mbakorusie chianga chiao, na baire ebinto biao ebiya bi’ogwechabera, bagotige kore getirianda otabegeti eanga." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Abwo mbagochere amo nomoganda omonene, bagoake amagena na gokobutorana nemioro." 
Ezekiel16:41 Mbasambe chinyomba chiao, naende bakonachere ekina ase amasio ’abakungu abange. Ningotange tokora obonyaka, na tokogenderera korua chibesa ase obonyaka naende." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ase enchera eyio ning’isanekie endamwamu yane asore, ne risemi riane ndirue asore, erio nario ndabe nobotoereru, gose tinkogechigwa naende." 
Ezekiel16:43 Ekiagera otainyorete amatuko aria ay’oboke bwao, korende kwabeire gokongechia nogokora kwao gwonsi, rora, ningoakane ogokora kwao gokoiranere, na igo togokora ogokora okwo kw’obosooku gokomenta ase ebibe binde bi’okogechia gwakorire.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel16:44 “Rora, omonto onde bwensi oganetie gokwana omoreng’anio, nigo arakwane igoro yao, atebe: Buna ng’ina omosubati are, nabo nomosubati oye are." 
Ezekiel16:45 Aye omosubati nigo onga nyoko, oria bwangete omosacha oye, na abana baye; naende nigo onga basubati bamino, abwo bangete abasacha babo, na abana babo. Nyoko nigo arenge Omohiti na iso n’Omoamiori orenge." 
Ezekiel16:46 “Mosubati omino omonene nere Samaria, oyio omenyete amo nabaiseke baye ensemo yao ya sugusu, na mosubati omino omoke nere Sodomu, oyio omenyete amo nabaiseke baye ensemo ya irianyi." 
Ezekiel16:47 Aye tigwaisanegete ase okobwatia chinchera chiabo, gose aria gwakorete koreng’ana nokogechia kwabo, korende ase engaki enke yoka aye ogakora ayare amabe kobua ayabo, ase chinchera chiao chionsi." 
Ezekiel16:48 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, Sodomu, mosubati omino, na abaiseke baye, tibarakora buna aye gwakorire amo nabaiseke bao." 
Ezekiel16:49 Naama! Ebi nabio biarenge ebibe bia Sodomu, mosubati omino: Ere amo nabaiseke baye nigo barenge abaenenu na abaigotu b’endagera, naende nigo barenge nobotoereru, korende tibechanderete abataka na abaremerwa." 
Ezekiel16:50 Nigo barenge abamwenu, na bakaba bagokora ay’okogechia ase obosio bwane, Ase ayio, ekero naroche amang’ana ayio, nigo nabarusetieo." 
Ezekiel16:51 “Samaria tiyakorete ebibe, nonya nekeng’ese kereng’aine ebiao; aye gwakorire ebibe ebinge bi’okogechia kobua emechie eyio. Ase engencho eyio kwagerire basubati bamino barorekanire bare abanyaboronge, ekero ebibe biao bikoreng’anigwa nebiabo." 
Ezekiel16:52 Bono aye bogoria obosooku bwao bw’ogochaywa, ekiagera kwagerire basubati bamino banyorire obotamero. Ebibe biao bi’okogechia biabeire ebinge kobua ebiabo; bono barabwo nigo bakororekana ng’a nabanyaboronge bare gokobua. Ase ayio, kabe nobosooku bw’ogochaywa, ekiagera kwagerire basubati bamino barorekanire bare abanyaboronge." 
Ezekiel16:53 “Inche ninsibore abasibwa b’emechie eye: abasibwa ba Sodomu amo nab’abaiseke baye, na aba Samaria amo nab’abaiseke baye. Boigo naye Yerusalemu ningosibore kore ase egati yabo," 
Ezekiel16:54 erinde obogorie ogochaywa kwao orore obosooku ase engencho y’ayio onsi gwakorire, na ase enchera eyio nobarentere okoremia." 
Ezekiel16:55 Aya naro arabe ase abasubati bamino: Sodomu na abaiseke baye nabairanerigwe amaya abo, babe buna barenge ritang’ani, na Samaria na abaiseke baye mbairanerigwe amaya abo, babe buna barenge ritang’ani. Naye boigo na abaiseke bao moiranerigwe amaya aino, mobe buna mwarenge ritang’ani." 
Ezekiel16:56 Inee! Sodomu, mosubati omino, tabete omobayeno kwarenge gokwana ase okomochaya, ekero kwarenge noboenenu." 
Ezekiel16:57 Ekero keria ebibe biao konya bitaraorokigwa maiso marore? Bono kwabeire buna ere. Abaiseke b’ense ya Edomu, na ab’Abafilisti, abwo bagoetanaine ase chinsemo chiao chionsi, nigo bagochayete." 
Ezekiel16:58 Bono goika obogorie egesusuro ki’ogokora kwao okobe, na okogechia kwao gwonsi.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Ezekiel16:59 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ningokorere koreng’ana buna gwakorire, ekiagera gwachayire eira gwatianete, na gwasaririe okobwatana kw’ogotianania." 
Ezekiel16:60 Nonya naboigo ning’inyore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete naye ase amatuko aria ay’obobe bwao, ninkore naye okobwatana kw’ogotianania koragenderere goika kare na kare." 
Ezekiel16:61 Erio aye oinyore ogokora kwao obe nobosooku, ekero oraire basubati bamino abanene na abake. Ninkobae babe abaiseke bao, korende tari ase engencho y’okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania koria nakorete naye." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ninkong’ie okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania koria nakorete naye; erio nario oramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. 
Ezekiel16:63 Ekero ndabe nakwabeire aya onsi gwakorire, aye noyainyore erinde oumate okirekiri, tomumora omonwa oo, ase engencho y’obosooku bwao. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel17:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, kwana omobayeno, otebie Abaisraeli omoreng’anio." 
Ezekiel17:3 Obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekeongo ekenene kiabwate chimbaba chinene, na amarionya e chimbaba chiaye namatambe, na omobere oye nigo otubire namarionya arenge nebieni ao ao, kegacha Lebanoni, gekabutora enkoro y’omocharake." 
Ezekiel17:4 Erio gekabutora nenkoro y’omote oria mesia, gekayeira gochia ase ense y’oboonchoreria, gekayebeka ase omochie bw’abaonchoreria." 
Ezekiel17:5 Naende gekaimokia embusuro y’ense eyio gekayesimeka ase riroba ritobu, gekayesimeka ase egati y’emete enga emesobeti ase amache amange arenge." 
Ezekiel17:6 Embusuro eria ekamera, ekaba omosabibu omweng’e orandete mono; emerande yaye ekaranda gochia ase ekeongo keria nemeri yaye, ekabeera ase giateneine. Ase igo ekaba omosabibu ore ne chinsagia na ebisebo." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Korende nkiarengeo ekeongo kende ekenene kiabwate chimbaba chinene, na amarionya amange. Korwa aase omosabibu oria osimekire okaroria emeri yaye gochia ase ekeongo keria, naende ogakumba chinsagia chiaye gochia ase kiarenge ng’a keyonyorere amache." 
Ezekiel17:8 Korende omosabibu oyio konya osimekirwe ase riroba ritobu, ase amache amange arenge, erinde onyare gosokia chinsagia, bwame amasabibu na obe omosabibu omuya." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Aye otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inee! Omosabibu oria nogenderere gokina buya? Togosimorwa amo nemeri yaye, na amasabibu aye ataborwe, otigwe okwoma? Ee, amato aye onsi nome. Tokogania chinguru chinyinge, gose abanto abange, ase okoyosimora amo nemeri yaye." 
Ezekiel17:10 Naama! Nonya osimekirwe naende, Inee, nogenderere gokina buya? Tokwoma kegima ekero omwaga okorwa moocha orayoguserere? Gose bwome kegima agwo ase osimekire?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel17:12 “Boria egesaku eke getari koigwera: Timomanyeti engencho y’amang’ana aya? Batebie: Rora, omoruoti o Babeli nachete Yerusalemu, akaira omoruoti na abagambi b’aroro goika Babeli." 
Ezekiel17:13 Ere akaimokia omoiborwa bw’enyomba y’omoruoti, agakora okobwatana kw’ogotianania nere, na akamotebia arie eira y’ogwetiania, (Abanto b’ense eria baare nokobua akabaira" 
Ezekiel17:14 ng’a oboruoti boria tiboba ne chinguru na kweimokereria igoro, korende okobwatana kw’ogotianania nere onye boganetie kogenderera:)" 
Ezekiel17:15 Ere oyio agasaria okobwatana koria, agatoma abanto ase ense ya Misiri gosaba aegwe chibarasi na abarwani esegi abange. Inee! Omonto ogokora amang’ana buna ayio nasesenigwe? Natooreke? Omonto osaririe okobwatana kw’ogotianania natooreke?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, omoruoti oyio ochayire eira yaye atianete ase omoruoti o Babeli, oria omobegete akaba omoruoti, na osaririe okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania, oyio goika akwere aaria Babeli." 
Ezekiel17:17 Farao na abarwani baye b’esegi abange tibakonyara gokonya omoruoti oyio ase esegi, ekero chiburi chiraagachwe, amo ne chindwaki chi’okoboera ase ogosiria abanto abange." 
Ezekiel17:18 Takonyara gotooreka abe moyo, ekiagera achayete eira yaye atianete, na agasaria okobwatana kwaye kw’ogotianania." 
Ezekiel17:19 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, ekiagera achayete eira eria atianete asende, na agasaria okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, nimoakane ogokora kwaye komoiranere." 
Ezekiel17:20 Nimobekere ekeonga kiane, abwatwe ase oboreba bwane; erio imoire Babeli, na aroro agwo imonachere ekina ase engencho y’okomocha kw’ogotaba omwegenwa asende." 
Ezekiel17:21 Abarwani baye b’esegi abaratame mbaitwe nemioro, na abatigari mbasiarerwe gochia ase chinsemo chionsi chi’ense. Erio nario moramanye ng’a ninche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Nonya ninche nimbutore enkoro y’omocharake omotambe, ee, nimbutore enkoro y’omote oria mesia egesebo ekerere, inche omonyene ngesimeke ase egetunwa egetambe igoro." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ningesimeke igoro ase egetunwa egetambe ki’Abaisraeli, na omote oria nosokie chinsagia na kwama amatunda, obe omocharake omuya. Chinyoni chia kera egesaku nchimenye ase chinsagia chiaye na gokenderera ase ekiriri kiaye." 
Ezekiel17:24 Emete yonsi egokina korwa ase riroba nemanye ng’a ninche Omonene, ninche ngokeyia emete emetambe, naende nakinia eyere emieng’e. Nigo nkwomia emete ere emebese, naende nasebokia na koreeretia eyomire. “Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio, goika nyakore.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende naende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel18:2 “Ninki engencho y’omorabaaro oyo okoiranererwa gokwanwa ase ense y’Abaisraeli: “Abaise barire amasabibu amabese amaroro, na amaino ’abana babo abeire nobokang’iti?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene buna inche inde moyo, timokogenderera gokwana omorabaaro oyo ase ense y’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Naama! Emioyo y’abanto bonsi neyane; koreng’ana buna omoyo o ise ore oyone, boigo noyo bw’omwana ore oyone. Omonto oyio ogokora ebibe, nere orakwe." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Origererie orore omonto ore omoronge, ogokora ayare boronge na ekeene." 
Ezekiel18:6 Ere tari koria ebing’wanso bikoruegwa igoro ase ebitunwa, gose tari korigereria emegwekano Abaisraeli bagosasima; tari gokora obonyaka nomokungu bw’omonto onde, gose tari koba nomokungu ekero are nomotienyi," 
Ezekiel18:7 gose tari gokorera monto onde bobe, korende nigo akoirania egento omonto amoete koba intenenera ase esira. Ere tari koura onde gento kiaye, korende nigo akoa oyore nenchara endagera, na oyore getirianda omobekera eanga." 
Ezekiel18:8 Ekero akorua singo tari kwementera gento gose koboria ebitoki. Nigo agotanga amaboko aye takora obobe; nigo akonacha ekina kia boronge ase egati y’omonto na omonto onde. 
Ezekiel18:9 Omonto oyio aise gokora bo, na abwatie emeroberio yane echikire, na abwate amachiko aane, na akore ayare boronge, oyio nigo are omonyaboronge; ekeene, nabe moyo. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Ande omonto oyio nabe ng’a oiboire omwana omomura oyore omoibi na omoiti, gose abe ogokora erimo ri’ayio" 
Ezekiel18:11 ise omonyene atakorete, korende arie ebing’wanso bikoruegwa ase ebitunwa igoro, naende akore obonyaka nomokungu bw’omonto onde." 
Ezekiel18:12 Ere nigo agokorera abataka na abaremerwa bobe, na kourereria abanto ebinto biabo, gose tari koirania egento aetwe koba intenenera, ere nigo akorigereria emegwekano egosasimwa na gokora ay’okogechia." 
Ezekiel18:13 Ekero akorua singo nigo akwementera egento ase okoboria ebitoki. Inee! Omonto buna oyio nabe moyo? Yaya takoba moyo. Ekiagera akorire okogechia okwo gwonsi goika akwe. Okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga aye nkobe igoro yaye. 
Ezekiel18:14 “Ande omonto oyio nabe ng’a oiboire omwana omomura, ere arore ebibe bionsi ise akorete, korende airoke na takora amang’ana buna ayio." 
Ezekiel18:15 Ere taria ebing’wanso bikoruerwa ase ebitunwa igoro, gose tarigereria emegwekano Abaisraeli bagosasima, gose takora obonyaka nomokungu bw’omonto onde;" 
Ezekiel18:16 tagokorera monto onde bobe, gose takoira egento koba intenenera, gose takourereria omonto enibo yaye, korende nigo arabe okoa oyore nenchara endagera, na oyore getirianda amobekere eanga." 
Ezekiel18:17 Naende nigo aratange okoboko kwaye takorera oyochandegete bobe, na abe tari koboria ebitoki gose kwementera egento, korende nigo arendete amachiko aane na kobwatia emeroberio yane echikire. Oyio tagokwa ase engencho y’ebibe bia ise, korende ekeene, goika abe moyo." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ise ere ekiagera akorerete abanto bobe ase obotindi, na akaurereria oyomwabo, naende agakora aya atarenge amaya ase egati y’abanto baye, ekeene, ere goika akwe ase engencho y’ebibe biaye." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Inwe nigo mokoboria: Ninki keragere omwana atanyore emechando ase engencho y’ebibe bia ise? Nigo nkobairaneria iga: Ekero omwana akorire ayare amaya na amaronge, na obeire okorenda emeroberio yane echikire na ayekore, ekeene, nabe moyo." 
Ezekiel18:20 Omonto ogokora ebibe nere orakwe. Omwana tagochandwa ase engencho y’ebibe bia ise, gose ise tagochandwa ase engencho y’ebibe bi’omwana oye. Omonyaboronge nanyore eng’eria y’oboronge bwaye, na omonyabibe nanyore eng’eria y’obobe bwaye." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Korende omokori amabe karatige ebibe biaye bionsi ebio akorire, na arende emeroberio yane yonsi echikire, naende akore ayare amaya na amaronge, ekeene, nabe moyo, tagokwa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ebibe biaye bionsi akorete tibikoinyorwa, erinde agambigwe, korende nabe moyo, ekiagera akorire ayare ay’oboronge."
