Ezekiel18:23 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae akoboria; Inee! Aye nigo okagete ng’a inche nigo ingokirie nogokwa kw’omokori amabe? Yaya, nigo nganetie omokori amabe aonchoke, atige enchera yaye embe abe moyo." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Korende omonyaboronge karatige oboronge bwaye na akore ebibe, naende akore okogechia okwo omokori amabe agokora, Inee, oyio nabe moyo? Yaya, oboronge bwaye bwonsi obwo konya akorire tibokoinyorwa; goika akwe, ekiagera atabete omwegenwa, korende agakora ebibe." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Inwe nigo mogoteba: Enchera y’Omonene teri endonge. Inwe Abaisraeli, igwa bono: Inee! Enchera yane nero etari endonge? Chinchera chiaino, tari chirochio chitari chindonge?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ekero omonto omonyaboronge akoonchoka otiga gokora ay’oboronge, erio okora ebibe, oyio goika akwe ase engencho y’ayio; ee, ase engencho y’ebibe akorire goika akwe." 
Ezekiel18:27 Korende omokori amabe karaonchoke atige ebibe akorire, na akore ayare amaya na ayare boronge, oyio natoorie omoyo oye." 
Ezekiel18:28 Ekiagera arengereirie aya akorete na aonchokire korwa ase ogosaria kwaye gwonsi akorete, ekeene, nabe moyo, tagokwa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Korende Abaisraeli nigo bagoteba: Enchera y’Omonene teri endonge. Inwe Abaisraeli, chinchera chiane nachio chitari chindonge? Inee! Chinchera chiaino tari chirochio chitari chindonge?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Aya naro inche Omonene, Nyasae ngoteba: Inwe Abaisraeli ase engencho y’ayio nimbanachere ekina, kera omonto anacherwe buna chinchera chiaye chire. Onchoka! Motige ogosaria kwaino gwonsi, erinde obobe bwaino tiboba ekegocha gi’okobasiria." 
Ezekiel18:31 Motugute ogosaria kwaino gwonsi, okwo mwakorire asende, mwenyorere chinkoro chinyia na omoika omoyia. Inwe Abaisraeli, nase ki moganetie gokwa?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Inche tingokiri nogokwa kw’omonto onde bwensi; ase ayio oonchoka mobe moyo. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.” 
Ezekiel19:1 Aye tera ogotera gw’okobokia amagombo igoro y’abagambi b’Abaisraeli," 
Ezekiel19:2 otebe: “Nyoko naki arenge? Nigo arenge endo eaberi! Nigo arenge korara na koramama ase egati ye chindo, akaba okorera abana baye ase egati ye chindo chire ne chinguru." 
Ezekiel19:3 Endo eria eaberi egakinia emanwa yaye eyemo, ero ekaba endo ere ne chinguru, ekeorokereria gotwara, ekaba ekoria abanto." 
Ezekiel19:4 Abanto b’ebisaku bakaigwa chinkuma chiaye; bakayeremera eirima, ero ekagwa imeo, bakayegobania nekegobanio, bakayeira Misiri." 
Ezekiel19:5 Ekero eng’ina yaganyete, na ogosemeria kwaye gokaera, ekaimokia emanwa yaye ende, ekayetuga ekaba endo ere nechinguru." 
Ezekiel19:6 Ero ekaba egotaara ase egati ye chindo, ee, ekaba endo ere ne chinguru, ekeorokereria gotwara, nero ekaba ekoria abanto." 
Ezekiel19:7 Egatagora chiburi chiabo chinkong’u, egasiria emechie yabo ekaba bosa. Ekero endo eyio yarenge koruma, ense yonsi ekaba egoichana amo nabanto bonsi bamenyeteo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Erio abanto b’ebisaku bakarua ase chinsemo chiabo, bakeroberia ase okoyerwania, bakayebekera ekeonga, ero ekagwa ase eirima yabo ime." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bakayegobania nekegobanio, bakayebeka ase egesaisero, bakayeira ase omoruoti o Babeli. Aroro agwo bakayesiekera ase eburi enkong’u, ng’a eriogi riaye tiribaisa koigweka ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 “Nyoko nigo arenge buna omosabibu ase egati y’emesabibu, osimekire ase amache mbarabare, Okaba okwama mono na okaba ne chinsagia chinyinge, ekiagera osimegetwe ase amache amange are." 
Ezekiel19:11 Omosabibu oyio ogakinia chinsagia chinkong’u, chiaisanete gokorwa chinyimbo chi’abagambi. Ritina riaye rigatambea gochia igoro ase egati ye chinsagia chiaye chinyinge mono. Omote oyio okarorekana gochia aare ore ritutu rinene." 
Ezekiel19:12 Korende omosabibu oria ogasimorwa ase engencho y’endamwamu, ogatugutwa inse; omwaga okagusa korwa moocha, okayuomia; amasabibu aye akang’urorwa korwao, ritina riaye rikong’u rikoma, rigasambwa nomorero rikaera." 
Ezekiel19:13 Bono omote oyio osimekirwe ase erooro, ense enyomo etari namache." 
Ezekiel19:14 Omorero okarua ase chinsagia chiaye, okagenderera gosamba amasabibu aye, totigaretie orosagia rwaisanete koba enyimbo y’omogambi. “Oko nakwo ogotera gw’okobokia amagombo koragenderere goterwa ase okobokia amagombo.”" 
Ezekiel20:1 Ase rituko ria ikomi, omotienyi o gatano, omwaka o gatano na kabere, abagaaka bande b’Abaisraeli bagacha koboria amang’ana korwa ase Omonene, bagaikaransa ase obosio bwane." 
Ezekiel20:2 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Aye mwanyabanto, kwana nabagaaka abwo b’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inee! Nigo mwachire koboria momanye amang’ana korwa asende? Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, tingwancha mborigwe amang’ana nainwe. Ninche Omonene natebire ayio." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Aye mwanyabanto, Inee, noganetie kobanachera ekina? Aye nobanachere ekina? Onye naboigo rirorio bamanyie ogokora kw’okogechia gwe chisokoro chiabo," 
Ezekiel20:5 obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase rituko riria nachorete Abaisraeli, nigo nariete eira y’ogotiana ase ororeria rwa Yakobo, nkeorokia na kwemanyekania asebare, agwo ase ense ya Misiri. Nigo natianete asebare, ngateba: Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Ezekiel20:6 Rituko riria nigo natianete asebare, nkabatebia ng’a nimbarusie korwa ase ense ya Misiri, mbaire ase ense konya nabanyoreire, ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, ense ere nobonene goetania chinse chionsi." 
Ezekiel20:7 Nkabatebia iga: Kera oyomo oino tiga atugute korwa asare ebinto bi’okogechia ebio anchete korigereria, timobaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase engencho y’emegwekano eyio Abamisiri bagosasima. Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Ezekiel20:8 Korende abanto abwo bagasaria asende, bakaanga konyigwera. Nonya noyomo tatugutete ebinto ebio bi’okogechia banchete korigereria, gose onde tatigete emegwekano eyio Abaisraeli barenge gosasima. Erio nkarengereria kobaumorera endamwamu yane, agwo ase ense ya Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Korende ayio nakorete nigo nayakorete ase okorenda erieta riane tirikorwa ribe eritachenegeti nebisaku ebio Abaisraeli bamenyete ase egati yabo. Ase amasio ’ebisaku ebio nemanyekanetie ase Abaisraeli ase okobarusia ase ense ya Misiri. 
Ezekiel20:10 “Ase ayio nkabarusia korwa ase ense ya Misiri, nkabarenta ase erooro." 
Ezekiel20:11 Agwo nkabaa emeroberio yane echikire, na nkaborokereria amachiko aane, na omonto orayabwate nabe moyo goetera asaro." 
Ezekiel20:12 Naende nkabaa Chisabato chiane chikaba ekemanyererio ase egati yane na barabwo, erio banyare komanya ng’a ninche Omonene nkobachena." 
Ezekiel20:13 Korende Abaisraeli bagasaria asende, agwo ase erooro; tibabwatetie emeroberio yane echikire, korende bakaanga amachiko aane ayio omonto karayabwate nabe moyo goetera asaro. Bagasaria mono Chisabato chiane, bagachikora chikaba echitachenegeti. Erio nkarengereria kobaumorera endamwamu yane agwo ase erooro, mbasirie kegima." 
Ezekiel20:14 Korende ayio nakorete nigo nayakorete ase okorenda erieta riane tirikorwa ribe eritachenegeti ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku, abwo ase narusetie Abaisraeli korwa." 
Ezekiel20:15 Naende nkaria eira y’ogotiana agwo ase erooro ng’a tinkobaira ase ense eria konya nabaeire, ense entenenku ere namabeere na amooke, ense ere nobonene goetania chinse chinde chionsi." 
Ezekiel20:16 Aya nigo nayakorete, ekiagera baangete amachiko aane, bakaanga kobwatia emeroberio yane echikire; bagakora Chisabato chiane chikaba echitachenegeti. Chinkoro chiabo nigo chianchete emegwekano yabo barenge gosasima." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Nonya naboigo nkabarorera amabera, gose tinabasiretie kegima agwo ase erooro." 
Ezekiel20:18 Nigo nakurerete abana babo agwo ase erooro, nkabatebia: Inwe timobaisa kobwatia emeroberio eyio chisokoro chiaino chiachigete, gose timobaisa konara chingencho chiabo, gose timobaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogosasima emegwekano yabo." 
Ezekiel20:19 Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino; mobwatie emeroberio yane echikire. Mobwatie amachiko aane na koyakora!" 
Ezekiel20:20 Morende Chisabato chiane chibe chinchenu, erinde chibe ekemanyererio ase egati yane nainwe; erio nario moranyare komanya ng’a inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino." 
Ezekiel20:21 “Korende abana baria bagasaria asende; tibabwatetie emeroberio yane echikire, na tibarendete amachiko aane na tibayakorete, amachiko ayio omonto karayabwate nabe moyo goetera asaro. Bagakora Chisabato chiane chikaba echitachenegeti. Erio nkarengereria kobaumorera ekeririanda kiane, erinde endamwamu yane eerere igoro yabo agwo ase erooro." 
Ezekiel20:22 Korende tinakorete bo, ekiagera nigo narendete erieta riane tirikorwa ribe eritachenegeti ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku abwo ase narusetie Abaisraeli korwa." 
Ezekiel20:23 Erio nkaria eira y’ogotiana, agwo ase erooro, ng’a mbasiarere ase egati y’ebisaku, na kobaserebania gochia ase chinse chionsi." 
Ezekiel20:24 Nigo nakorete bo, ekiagera tibabwatete amachiko aane na tibayakorete, korende nigo baangete koigwera emeroberio yane echikire, na bagakora Chisabato chiane chikaba echitachenegeti, na amaiso abo nigo arigereretie emegwekano eyio chisokoro chiabo chiarenge gosasima." 
Ezekiel20:25 “Erio nkabaa emeroberio echikire etarenge emiya, na amachiko atarenge kobarentera obogima." 
Ezekiel20:26 Nkabatiga bagesoyia ase ogotacheneka goetera ase ebiegwa biabo, nkabatiga bagasamba abana babo bonsi abatangi bakaba ebing’wanso. Nigo nakorete ayio ase okobaondokia, banyare komanya ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Ase ayio, aye mwanyabanto, kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase amang’ana ayio chisokoro chiaino nigo chiandamete ase ogotaba abegenwa asende." 
Ezekiel20:28 Nkabarenta ase ense eyio nabarierete eira ng’a nimbayee. Na aase aande onsi baroche aimokererete igoro, gose emete yabwate chinsagia chinyinge, nao barenge koruera ebing’wanso biabo na okoruegwa konde, ebio biarenge okogechia asende. Aroro agwo bakaruera ebing’wanso bire ne rimisu rigiya, na bakaumora okoruegwa kwabo kw’ebinyugwa." 
Ezekiel20:29 Erio nkababoria: Aase agwo aimokererete igoro ase mogochia naaki? Ase ayio, aase buna agwo nigo akorokwa Aase Aimokererete Igoro Agosasimerwa, nabo akorokwa goika rero iga." 
Ezekiel20:30 Ase ayio, tebia Abaisraeli ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae akoboria: Inee! Nainwe nigo mwesoirie ase ogotacheneka ase okobwatia chingencho chie chisokoro chiaino na gokora obokayayu ase ogosasima emegwekano yabo y’okogechia?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Nonya ngoika rero iga, ekero mokorua ebiegwa biaino, na gosamba abana baino babe ebing’wanso, nigo mogwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogosasima emegwekano yaino yonsi. Naende inwe Abaisraeli, Inee, ninyanchete momborie amang’ana? Ekeene buna inche inde moyo, tingwancha momborie. Ninche Omonene Nyasae natebire ayio." 
Ezekiel20:32 Amang’ana mokorengereria tagoikeranigwa nonya ng’ake, ekiagera nigo mogoteba: Ntoganetie tobe buna abanto b’ebisaku binde na abe chinse chinde, tosasime emete na amagena." 
Ezekiel20:33 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, nindambore okoboko kwane kore nokobua na ning’umore ekeririanda kiane, nimbe nkobagambera inwe." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ee, ase okoboko kwane kore nokobua koramboire, na ase okoumora ekeririanda kiane, nimbarusie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku, mbasangererie korwa ase chinse echio mwasiareretwe gochia." 
Ezekiel20:35 Erio mbarente ase erooro y’abanto b’ebisaku, na aroro agwo nimbanachere ekina obosio ase obosio." 
Ezekiel20:36 Nimbanachere inwe ekina buna nanacherete chisokoro chiaino ekina, agwo ase erooro y’ense ya Misiri. Nabo inche Omonene Nyasae natebire." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Nimbaetie inwe inse y’enyimbo yane y’oborisia, mbasoyie ase egesibo gi’okobwatana." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ninyatanane korwa asemore abatari koigwera, na abasaririe asende. Nimbarusie korwa ase ense eria bare abamenyi, korende barabwo tibagosoa ase ense y’Abaisraeli. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae akobatebia inwe Abaisraeli: Kera oyomo oino agenderere gosasima omogwekano oye! Korende ase engaki erache ekero morabe mokonyigwera timokora erieta riane richenu ribe eritachenegeti ase okorua ebiegwa biaino na gosasima emegwekano yaino. 
Ezekiel20:40 Inche Omonene Nyasae nigo ngoteba iga: Agwo ase egetunwa kiane egechenu, egetunwa egetambe ki’Abaisraeli, nao Abaisraeli bonsi bare ase ense barabe bagonkorera. Aroro agwo nimbanchere, na aroro agwo ninyanchere okoruegwa kwaino, na ebiegwa biaino bire ebiya mono, amo nebinto bionsi morabe mogwatanana bibe ebichenu." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ekero ndabe nabarusirie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku na kobasangereria korwa ase chinse echio nabasiarerete gochia, erio nimbanchere buna ogotioka kwe rimisu rigiya. Ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku ninyeorokie asemore inde omochenu." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ekero ndabarente ase ense y’Abaisraeli eyio nariete eira na gotiana ng’a ninyee chisokoro chiaino, erio momanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel20:43 Agwo ase ense eria namoinyore chinchera chiaino, na ogokora kwaino gwonsi, ase okwo mwabeire mogwesoyia ase ogotacheneka; inwe mwegeche abanyene ase engencho y’amabe onsi mwakorire." 
Ezekiel20:44 Inwe Abaisraeli, ekero ndabakorere amaya ase engencho y’erieta riane, tinkobakorera koreng’ana ne chinchera chiaino chimbe, gose koreng’ana nogokora kwaino kw’obosareku; erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel20:46 “Aye mwanyabanto, rigereria gochia ensemo ya irianyi, oyerarerie ring’ana rire mamincha yaye, na obane igoro ye rinani ri’ense ya Negebu." 
Ezekiel20:47 Otebie rinani ria Negebu iga: Igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene. Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora, nintongie omorero ime yao, noro nosambe osirie emete emebese, na emiomo yonsi. Omorero oyio ekebemberi tokorimigwa, na amasio ’abanto bonsi korwa irianyi goika sugusu nasambwe noro." 
Ezekiel20:48 Abanto bonsi mbarore ng’a inche ninche Omonene nayotongirie, tokonyara korimigwa nonde.”" 
Ezekiel20:49 Erio ngateba, “Ayee, Omonene Nyasae! Abanto aba nigo bagokwana igoro yane baboria: Inee! Omonto oyo tari gokwana ase emebayeno?”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel21:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, rigereria gochia Yerusalemu, orarie ring’ana rire mamincha y’Aase Aachenu, na obane mamincha y’ense y’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel21:3 Otebie abanto b’ense eyio ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora inche nigo inde mamincha yao, ninsomore omoyio one korwa ase ekeraaro, ninsirie korwa asore abanyaboronge amo nabakori amabe." 
Ezekiel21:4 Ekiagera ninsirie korwa asore abanyaboronge amo nabakori amabe, omoyio one nosomorwe korwa ase ekeraaro kiaye, oite abanto bonsi korwa irianyi goika sugusu." 
Ezekiel21:5 Erio abanto bonsi mbamanye ng’a ninche Omonene nasomoire omoyio one korwa ase ekeraaro kiaye, tinkoyoirania ime naende." 
Ezekiel21:6 “Aye mwanyabanto, ichana, ee, ichana obe buna oyo obunekire chibachwa, obe nobororo ase amasio ’abanto abwo." 
Ezekiel21:7 Ekero barakoborie: Nase ki oichanete iga? Obairanerie, obatebie: Nase engencho y’amang’ana amabe agochi gocha. Ekero arache, kera omonto nairianyeke ase enkoro yaye, na amaboko ’abanto bonsi naborwe chinguru; kera omonto nakwe omoyo, na amaru ’abanto bonsi nororobe abe buna amache. Naama! Amabe ayio ngocha are, goika aikeranigwe. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel21:8 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel21:9 “Aye mwanyabanto, bana otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene agoteba: Otebe iga: “Omoyio otierigwe, ee, otierigwe na gosenigwa;" 
Ezekiel21:10 otierigwe, erinde oite ogoita okonene, osenigwe, erinde omese buna okomesa gw’enkoba. Inee! Inatoyogokere? Enyimbo y’omwana one nigo yachayete kera omote." 
Ezekiel21:11 Ase ayio omoyio oyio orurwe otierigwe, erinde obekwe ang’e okorerwe emeremo; otierigwe na gosenigwa, obekwe ase okoboko kw’omoiti." 
Ezekiel21:12 Aye mwanyabanto, rera na goichana! Omoyio oyio orentirwe oite abanto baane, oite na abagambi b’Abaisraeli. Barabwo barurwe baitwe nomoyio amo nabanto baane. Ase ayio aka amariagati ao." 
Ezekiel21:13 Okorengwa nkoreo. Inee! Naki gwachayete enyimbo? Tekonyara koba buya asore. Nabo Omonene atebire. 
Ezekiel21:14 “Aye mwanyabanto, bana oake chinkobi. Tiga omoyio oyio ogochia goita omentwe chinguru ara kabere, nonya ng’ara gatato; oyio nomoyio bw’ogoita bw’oyio omonene, na omoyio oyio obaetananire ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Ezekiel21:15 Nabekire ensonga y’omoyio oyio agwo ase ebiita biabo bionsi, erinde chinkoro chiabo chirianyeke, na abange babo bagwe. Omoyio oyio otierigwe bwogee na komesa, osomoirwe ase ogoita." 
Ezekiel21:16 Ebeke ang’e oetere, orenge ensemo ya borio na eya bomosi, aande onsi ase obwoge bochigete." 
Ezekiel21:17 Inche boigo ning’ake chinkobi, ing’isanekie ekeririanda kiane. Ninche Omonene nakwanire.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel21:19 “Aye mwanyabanto, eroiserie chinchera ibere chikworokia ase omoro bw’omoruoti o Babeli oraetere. Echio ibere nigo chirarwe ase ense eyemo. Naende otenenie ekemanyererio ase amatabekania ’omochie." 
Ezekiel21:20 Bworokie enchera ase omoro oraetere, eyemo gochia ase Raba ase ense y’Abaamoni, na eyende ase Yerusalemu, omochie ogiteire chindwaki, ase ense y’Abayuda." 
Ezekiel21:21 Omoruoti o Babeli nigo ateneine ase amatabekania e chinchera chiria ibere ogokora oboringoria; nigo agotierania chinsara, na okoboria korwa ase ebinyasae biaye, naende nigo akorigereria riini." 
Ezekiel21:22 Ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio obomera nigo bokogwera Yerusalemu, erinde abekeo ebikorero bi’ogotagorera, arere okorera kw’ogoita na goaka eriogi ri’esegi. Nigo arabekeo ebikorero bi’ogotagorera ebiita, na koagacha chiburi ne chindwaki chi’ogwekengera." 
Ezekiel21:23 Korende ase abanto ba Yerusalemu amang’ana ayio nigo ararorekane koba oboringoria bw’oborimo, ekiagera bariereranete eira y’ogotianania. Korende nigo aragere ebibe biabo biinyorwe, erinde babwatwe." 
Ezekiel21:24 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekiagera mwagerire ebibe biaino biainyoirwe, na ogosaria kwaino gwakorirwe kororekane maiso marore, na ase ayio onsi mwakorire, ebibe biaino biarorekanire, ee, ekiagera mwainyoirwe iga, inamobwatwe nokoboko gwe chinguru.”" 
Ezekiel21:25 “Aye otachenegeti, aye omokori amabe ore omogambi bw’Abaisraeli, rituko riao ri’okonyora egesusuro ki’omoerio ki’ebibe biao riaikire." 
Ezekiel21:26 Rusia egetambaa kia motwe amo negutwa. Amang’ana takogenderera koba buna are bono. Ayio konya akeeigwe naimokererigwe igoro, na ayio konya aimokererigwe igoro nakeeigwe. Nabo Omonene Nyasae agoteba." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ning’onchorane oboruoti obo, ee, nimboonchorane, nimboonchorane; tibobao nonya ng’ake goika oyio oboruoti obo bore obwaye achiche, oyio nere ndaboe." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Aye mwanyabanto, bana otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba igoro y’Abaamoni, na igoro y’okorama kwabo, otebe: “Omoyio, ee, omoyio osomoirwe ase ogoita, otierigwe na gosenigwa, nigo okomesa buna enkoba." 
Ezekiel21:29 “Nigo bakobarorera inwe amaroro ’oborimo, na kobaringorera ay’oborimo, bateba ng’a monyare koba abamogotacha ebigoti bi’abakori amabe abwo batachenegeti, ekiagera rituko riabo riachire baraegwe egesusuro ki’omoerio ki’ebibe biabo." 
Ezekiel21:30 “Irania omoyio ase ekeraaro kiaye! Agwo ase ense mwatongeretwe, ense y’obobiare bwaino, nao ndabanachere ekina." 
Ezekiel21:31 Nimbaumorere ekeririanda kiane, na mbautere omorero bw’endamwamu yane; nimbabeke ase amaboko ’abanto abatindi, abamanyete goita na gosiria kegima." 
Ezekiel21:32 Inwe mobe chinko chigouterwa omorero; amanyinga aino naiterwe igoro ase ense. Timokoinyorwa nonya ng’ake. Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio.” 
Ezekiel22:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel22:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, Inee, nonachere omochie oiteire amanyinga ’abanto abange ekina? Onye nabo, yworokie ebibe biaye bionsi bi’okogechia," 
Ezekiel22:3 oyotebie: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye omochie gwaiteire amanyinga ’abanto ase egati‐gati yao, na gwesoirie ase ogotacheneka ase ogosasima emegwekano, bono engaki yao yaikire." 
Ezekiel22:4 Aye kwabeire nokomocha, ekiagera gwaitire abanto abange, naende gwesoirie ase ogotacheneka ase ogosasima emegwekano kwaroisirie. Ase engencho eyio kwagerire amatuko ao asukire gocha ang’e; gwaikire omoerio bw’emiaka yao. Bono ningotige ochaywe nabanto b’ebisaku, na ochecherigwe ne chinse chionsi." 
Ezekiel22:5 Abwo bamenyete ang’e naye, na abwo bare aare, mbagochecherie aye otari nerieta rigiya, oichire neburuburu." 
Ezekiel22:6 Rora, abagambi b’Abaisraeli bamenyete ime yao, kera oyomo nigo asemeretie chinguru chiaye omonyene ase ogoitera amanyinga." 
Ezekiel22:7 Aye omochie, abaise na abang’ina abare ime yao bachayirwe, na abamenyi bamenyete ime yao bakoreirwe bobe, ne chintakana na ababoraka boigo." 
Ezekiel22:8 Gwachayire ebinto biane ebichenu, naende gwakorire Chisabato chiane chiabeire echitachenegeti." 
Ezekiel22:9 Abang’achi bande bamenyete ime yao bakogera amanyinga aiteka. Abanto bao bande nigo bakoriera ebing’wanso igoro ase ebitunwa; na abande nigo bare abatomani," 
Ezekiel22:10 na abande nigo bagotomana nabakungu b’abaise, na abande nigo bakoba nabakungu kobare nomotienyi." 
Ezekiel22:11 Omonto oyomo nigo agokora ebibe bi’okogechia ase ogotomana nomokungu bw’omonto onde, na oyonde okora ay’okogechia ase okoba na moka momura oye, na oyonde okora ay’okogechia ase okoba nomoiseke omwabo, omwana o ise." 
Ezekiel22:12 Abanto bao bande nigo bakoegwa riaaki baita abande. Aye nigo okorua singo gwasaba ebitoki ase okwementera, aye nigo okwenyorera ebitoki ase okorianania omogisangio oo, naende kwanyebire inche. Nabo Omonene Nyasae agoteba." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Ase igo, rora ninduta‐rute amaboko aane igoro ase ebitoki bi’oborianania kwanyorire, na ase amanyinga ’abanto gwaitire ase egati yao." 
Ezekiel22:14 Ase amatuko ndarente egesusuro asore, Inee, nogenderere koba noboremu gose amaboko ao nabe ne chinguru? Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio, goika inyaikeranie." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ninsiarere abanto bao gochia ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, na gochia ase chinse chinde. Ninsirie ogokora okobe korwa asore." 
Ezekiel22:16 Aye nigo orasoigwe ase ogotacheneka ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku, erio omanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel22:18 “Aye mwanyabanto, Abaisraeli babeire asende buna amabiria. Bonsi nigo banga buna etaai, ne ribati, na ekioma, ne risasi, bire ase eriko ri’omorero, ee, beonchoire babeire buna amabiria e chifeta." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekiagera inwe mwensi mwabeire buna amabiria, rora nimbasangererie, mbarente ase egati‐gati ya Yerusalemu," 
Ezekiel22:20 buna abanto bagosangereria amagena e chifeta, na aye chitaai, na ay’ebioma, na ay’amasasi, na ay’amabati, na bayabeka ase eriko ri’omorero ase okoyanyititora. Naboigo ndabasangererie inwe inde nendamwamu na ekeririanda, imbabeke imeo mbanyititore." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ee, nimbasangererie mbautere omorero bw’endamwamu yane, na inwe monyititokere imeo." 
Ezekiel22:22 Buna efeta ekonyititorwa ase eriko ri’omorero naboigo nainwe moranyititorwe ase egati‐gati y’omochie oyio; erio momanye ng’a ninche Omonene naumoire endamwamu yane igoro asemore.” 
Ezekiel22:23 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel22:24 “Aye mwanyabanto, otebie ense: Aye nigo ore ense etachenegeti, gose embura tegotwa igoro asore ase rituko ri’endamwamu yane." 
Ezekiel22:25 Ababani bareo bakorire emeroberio emebe, nigo banga buna chindo chikoruma chigotandorana ebi chiaitire. Barabwo basiririe emioyo y’abanto, na bairire chinibo chiabo, na ebinto bi’amagori amanene; bagerire abakungu abange batigaire bare ababoraka ase omochie ime." 
Ezekiel22:26 Abakuani baye basaririe ogochika kwane, na bakorire ebinto biane ebichenu biabeire ebitachenegeti. Tibakoreti ogwatananekana ase egati y’egento kere egechenu, na egetari egechenu, gose tiborokerereti abanto baatanane ebinto bitachenegeti korwa ase ebichenegete, naende bamiamirie amaiso abo ng’a tibasika Chisabato chiane, na ase enchera eyio bankorire koba buna oyo otachenegeti ase egati yabo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abagambi baye nigo banga buna chisese chi’orosana chigotandorana ebi chiaitire. Baitire abanto abange ase okwenyorera ebitoki ase enchera etari ey’obwegenwa. 
Ezekiel22:28 Ababani babo babaakire echooka etochoganiri buya; nigo bakobarorera amaroro ’oborimo na kobaringoreria oborimo, bateba: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba, na Omonene takwaneti bo." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abanto b’ense eyio bakorire obobe bw’ogochanda abande, begeire obouri, naende bachandire abataka na abaremeire, boigo bakorire abamenyi bobe, batari noboronge bw’ogokora bo." 
Ezekiel22:30 Nkarigia omonto ase egati yabo oranyare koagacha orwaki, na gotenena ase obosio bwane aase agwo atagoretwe, erinde akengere ense eyio, timbaisa koyesaria, korende tinanyorete onde." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ase ayio naumoire ekeririanda kiane igoro asebare; nabasiririe nomorero bw’endamwamu yane. Ogokora kwabo nkobairanere. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.” 
Ezekiel23:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel23:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, mbarenge abaiseke babere ba ng’ina omo." 
Ezekiel23:3 Ekero barenge abaiseke bagakora obonyaka agwo Misiri. Aroro agwo bakaba bakobwatwa‐bwatwa chimbeere chiabo, bagasiria obwekungi bwabo." 
Ezekiel23:4 Oria omonene nigo arenge korokwa Ohola, na oria omoke Oholiba. Abwo bakaba abaane, bakaibora abana, abamura na abaiseke. Engencho y’amarieta abo nero ere: Ohola nere Samaria, na Oholiba nere Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ohola, ekero arenge oyone, nigo arenge gokora obonyaka, akaba nokogania okobe ase abanchi baye Abaasuri." 
Ezekiel23:6 Barabwo nigo barenge abarwani esegi, barenge kobeka chianga chimonyinga, barenge abagambi na abachiki bonsi nigo barenge abamura abaya bagosanerwa, barenge abariini chibarasi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ase ayio agakora obonyaka nabasacha bonsi b’Abaasuri, abarenge nebieni ebiya, na ase enchera eyio agesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogosasima emegwekano y’abwo barenge nokogania okobe asare." 
Ezekiel23:8 Ohola tatigete obonyaka bwaye, boria anarete gokora korwa ekero arenge Misiri, ekiagera ase oboiseke bwaye abasacha nigo barenge gokora obonyaka nere, bagasiria obwekungi bwaye, bakaumora okogania kwabo okobe igoro asare." 
Ezekiel23:9 Ase ayio nkamorua na komobeka ase amaboko abanchi baye Abaasuri, abwo arenge nokogania okobe asebare." 
Ezekiel23:10 Ekero barabwo bamokorerete obosooku obwo, bakaira abana baye, abamura na abaiseke, ere akaba okorabaarwa nabakungu bande ekero anacheretwe ekina." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Nonya Oholiba, mosubati omwaabo, oroche ayio, ere nigo abete omosareku goetania ase okoba nokogania okobe, na gokora obonyaka; obobe bwaye nigo bwabete obonge goetania obwa Ohola, mosubati omwabo." 
Ezekiel23:12 Akaba nokogania okobe ase abamura b’Abaasuri, abwo barenge abagambi, na abachiki, na abarwani esegi beboeranetie ebirwanero, na abariini be chibarasi. Bonsi nigo barenge abamura abaya b’ogosanerwa." 
Ezekiel23:13 Nkamorora bwesoirie ase ogotacheneka; bonsi babere, ogokora kwabo nigo kwarenge okomo." 
Ezekiel23:14 “Korende Oholiba akagenderera koba omonyaka goetania. Akarora emegwekano y’abasacha emeng’eire ase enyasi, eyarenge emegwekano y’Abakalidayo, yaakire erangi embariri ye rigori rinene." 
Ezekiel23:15 Nigo yasibeire chinkini ase ebinema biabo na emetwe yabo nigo yanareire ebitambaa ebiya mono. Abasacha baria bonsi nigo baare kororekana ng’a nabarwani abanene. Ekero aroche emegwekano eyio y’abanto ba Babeli, ababiare b’ense ya Kalidayo," 
Ezekiel23:16 akaba nokogania okobe asebare, agatoma abanto ase ense ya Kalidayo ase abanene abwo konya arorire emegwekano yabo." 
Ezekiel23:17 Abanene ba Babeli bagacha, bagakora obonyaka nere, na ase okogania koria okobe bakamosoyia ase ogotacheneka, na nyuma gasoigwe ase ogotacheneka, akabatiga, akabagecha." 
Ezekiel23:18 Korende akagenderera gokora obonyaka bwaye maiso marore, akaorokia nobogetirianda bwaye, goika inche nkagechigwa nere buna nagechetigwe na Ohola, mosubati omwabo." 
Ezekiel23:19 Nonya naboigo akagenderera gokora obonyaka bwaye maiso marore; akaba okoinyora amatuko ’oboiseke bwaye, ekero arenge gokora obonyaka ase ense ya Misiri." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ere akaba nokogania okobe ase abatomani baria baare nokogania kw’omobere buna chitigere chire, naende bagasokia oroiboro buna chibarasi chigosokia orwabo." 
Ezekiel23:21 Bono aye kwaganirie obonyaka bw’oboiseke bwao, buna ekero Abamisiri barenge kobwata‐bwata chimbeere chiao chiarenge echi’oboiseke bwao." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Ase ayio, aye Oholiba, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Naama! Ninseegete abanchi bao abwo kwagechetigwe nabarabwo, nimbarente bakorwanie korwa ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Ezekiel23:23 Ee, nindete abanto ba Babeli, na Abakalidayo bonsi, na abanto ba Pekodi, na aba Soa, na aba Koa, na Abaasuri bonsi mbache amo nabwo; bonsi nigo barenge abamura abaya b’ogosanerwa, na abagambi, na abarwani abanene, bonsi nabariini chibarasi barenge." 
Ezekiel23:24 Mbagochere babwate ebirwanero, ne chigari ao ao, na omoganda omonene bw’abanto babwate chinguba, ne ching’aya, babegete ebigogwa bi’ebioma, bakoumokere korwa chinsemo chionsi. Inche nimbachike bakonachere ekina kobwatekana namachiko abo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Nimbe nekeririanda asore, ng’ee barabwo ribaga babe abatindi mono asore. Mbakobutore chimioro na amato, na abatigari babo mbaitwe nemioro. Abanto abwo mbaire abana bao, abamura na abaiseke, na abatigari bao mbasambwe nomorero." 
Ezekiel23:26 Boigo mbakorusie chianga, na baire ebinto biao ebiya bwechaberete." 
Ezekiel23:27 Ase enchera eyio ninsirie obosooku na obonyaka bwao kwarentanete korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erinde tobaisa korigereria Abamisiri, gose koinyora ense eria naende." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Naama! Ninkobeke ase amaboko ’abanto abwo ogechete, baria kwagechetigwe nabarabwo okabatiga." 
Ezekiel23:29 Barabwo mbakogeche mono, bakoure ebinto biao bionsi, ebio gwechanderete okabinyora. Nigo baragotige kore getirianda, otari na gento ogwetuba. Erio obosooku bw’obonyaka bwao bororekane. Obosooku bwao na obonyaka gwakorire" 
Ezekiel23:30 biakorenteire amang’ana ayio, ekiagera gwakorire obonyaka nabanto b’ebisaku, na ogwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogosasima emegwekano yabo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Aye kwabwatirie chingencho chia mosubati omino. Ase engencho eyio ninkoe egekombe ki’egesusuro buna eki naruete asare. 
Ezekiel23:32 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Aye nonywere egekombe ki’egesusuro giaetwe mosubati omino, kere ekegare naende egetambe gochia inse. Nosekererwe ase ogochaywa, ekiagera egekombe ekio nigo geichire." 
Ezekiel23:33 Nigo oratinde mono, naende obe nobororo obonge. Egekombe ekio gia Samaria, mosubati omino, negekombe ki’obwoba na ogosirigwa." 
Ezekiel23:34 Nigo orabetererigwe onywe okoore ekenyugwa ekio gionsi, ee, goika omene ebisamunye biaye kogiatekire, naende oarie chimbeere chiao nabirobio. Ninche Omonene Nyasae nakwanire ayio." 
Ezekiel23:35 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekiagera kwanyebire inche, naende kwaonchokire, kwang’eire omogongo, goika obogorie egesusuro ekio ase engencho y’obosooku na obonyaka bwao.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, Inee, nonachere Ohola na Oholiba ekina? Onye nabo, obatebie ogokora kwabo gw’okogechia." 
Ezekiel23:37 Barabwo bakorire obotomani, na baiteire amanyinga ’abanto namaboko abo; bakorire obotomani nemegwekano yabo bagosasima. Basambire abana babo banyiborerete babeire endagera y’emegwekano eyio." 
Ezekiel23:38 Tari ayio oka bakorete asende, korende ase rituko erio nigo bakorete Aase aane Aachenu akaba aatachenegeti, naende bagakora Chisabato chiane chikaba echitachenegeti." 
Ezekiel23:39 Nigo banyenyete abana babo bakaba ebing’wanso ase emegwekano yabo bagosasima ase rituko erio bachete Aase aane Aachenu, bagaakora akaba aatachenegeti. Rora, amang’ana ayio naro bakorete ase enyomba yane ime." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Naende nigo batomete amang’ana bakarangeria abanto korwa chinse chi’aare. Barabwo bagacha, na ase engencho yabo aye ogesibia, ogeaka amaiso ao chirangi ao ao, na ogechabera nebinto ebiya." 
Ezekiel23:41 Erio ogaikaransa igoro ase egeikaransero ki’obonene, na emesa iyarenge bosio bwao, na igoro ase emesa eria okabekao ubani yane, na amaguta aane." 
Ezekiel23:42 Amariogi ’okwoga akaigugwa korwa agwo, na amo nabanto barengeo batari namasikani; abande abagotinda bakarentwa korwa ase erooro, na barabwo bakabekera abakungu ebigera ase amaboko abo, ne chigutwa chingiya ase emetwe yabo." 
Ezekiel23:43 Erio nkeboria: Inee! Abanto aba abanyaka nigo bagochia gokora obonyaka nomokungu oyo okorire obonyaka ase engaki entambe? 
Ezekiel23:44 Barabwo bakaba bagosoa ase omokungu oyio buna abasacha bagosoa ase omokungu omotayayi. Ase igo abasacha abwo bagasoa ase Ohola na Oholiba bagakora obonyaka. 
Ezekiel23:45 Abanto abanyaboronge mbabanachere ekina buna ekio abakungu abatomani na abaiti bakonacherwa, ekiagera barabwo nigo bare abatomani, na baiteire amanyinga ’abanto namaboko abo.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Nimbarentere omoganda bw’abanto babakorere bobe na kobasakora. 
Ezekiel23:47 Abanto abwo mbabaake amagena, naende mbabaite nemioro yabo. Boigo mbaite abana babo, abamura na abaiseke, basambe chinyomba chiabo nomorero." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ase enchera eyio ninsirie obonyaka boria korwa ase ense yaino, erinde abakungu bande beorokererie tibabaisa gokora obonyaka buna obwo." 
Ezekiel23:49 Egesusuro ki’obonyaka bwaino nkebe igoro yaino, ee, imonyore egesusuro ki’ebibe biaino bi’ogosasima emegwekano. Erio momanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene Nyasae.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Ase rituko ria ikomi, omotienyi o ikomi, omwaka o kianda, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel24:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, rika erieta rie rituko ria rero, ekiagera rituko eri nario omoruoti o Babeli achire korwania Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Kwana nabanto aba batari koigwera, obatebie omoreng’anio. Otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba:” “Tereka enyongo riko, ee, oyetereke, oumore amache ime yaye." 
Ezekiel24:4 Obeke ebitari bie chinyama imeo, bionsi ebire ebiya, ekenama ne rireko, oyeichorie amauga, ochore ayare amaya." 
Ezekiel24:5 Ebitari ebio obirusie korwa ase eng’ondi enchore ere ase riicho riao; otumbe chinko chinyinge inse y’enyongo, oute omorero obiyeke buya, oiyekeranie amauga amo." 
Ezekiel24:6 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Obobe nobw’omochie oyo oiterete amanyinga ’abanto, oyio onga buna enyongo eroisirie korwa ase etaai yaboosire, na oboboosu bwaye tibokorwao. Orusie korwa imeo egetari ase egetari otari gochora ng’a nkereki okorusia." 
Ezekiel24:7 Amanyinga ’abanto b’omochie oyio oiterete nigo agendererete kobeera imeo. Tayaumorete ase riroba riyatube na koyabisa, korende nigo ayaumorete igoro ase egetare." 
Ezekiel24:8 Nigo natigete amanyinga ayio aiteretwe agenderere kobeera igoro ase egetare atatubiri, erio nario aragere imbe nendamwamu na ndusie egesiomba." 
Ezekiel24:9 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Obobe nobw’omochie oyo oiterete amanyinga ’abanto! Nainche boigo nintumbe chinko chibe chinyinge, ase omorero." 
Ezekiel24:10 Beka chinko chinyinge, na omorero ogenderere gwoka mono, erinde oiyeke chinyama chiyie kegima, na omosori oyie oere, na amauga ayie arigise." 
Ezekiel24:11 Erio otige enyongo eyio ere bosa igoro ase omorero bw’amakara, eyie esambwe, erinde etaai y’enyongo eyio eyie ebariire burure; riko rire imeo rigokomoke, na oboboosu bw’enyongo eyio boyie bonyititoke boere." 
Ezekiel24:12 Inche nabeire nkwerosia ngokora emeremo bosa. Oboboosu bw’enyongo eyio tibokoruao neisa gosambwa nomorero. 
Ezekiel24:13 Kwabeire oyotachenegeti ase engencho y’obonyaka bwao. Nateemire kogochena, korende tochenegeti. Tokonyara gocheneka korwa ase ogotacheneka kwao goika inche ndete endamwamu yane igoro asore." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio. Goika aikerane. Ninkore ring’ana erio, tingotiga. Tinkoba namabera, gose tingweitia. Goika onacherwe ekina koreng’ana ne chinchera chiao, na ogokora kwao. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel24:16 “Aye mwanyabanto, rora, goetera ase ogokwa kwa mobosokano nindusie korwa asore oyore omogoko bw’amaiso ao; nonya naboigo tomoreera gose kobokia amagombo, gose amariga taiteka korwa ase amaiso ao." 
Ezekiel24:17 Oichane, korende oremererie torera; tobaisa koreera oria okure. Bwetube egetambaa ase omotwe oo, obeke ebikoroto ase amagoro ao. Tobaisa gotuba obosio bwao, gose tobaisa koria endagera y’ebirero.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Mambia rituko ria kabere ngakwana nabanto, na mogoroba yaye omokungu one agakwa. Rituko riare koribwatia ngakora buna konya nachikirwe." 
Ezekiel24:19 Erio abanto bakamboria, “Nonyare gototebia engencho y’amang’ana aya, na eyagera gwakora iga?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Erio nkabairaneria, nkabatebia ng’a ring’ana ri’Omonene ndiacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel24:21 “Kwana n’Abaisraeli, obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora, ninkore Aase aane Aachenu abe aatachenegeti, aase ayio are obonene bwe chinguru chiaino, na omogoko bw’amaiso aino, na okogania kw’emioyo yaino. Abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, abwo mwatigete nyuma, mbaitwe nemioro." 
Ezekiel24:22 Nainwe nabo morakore buna inche nakorire. Timobaisa gotuba chinderu na emenwa, gose timoria endagera y’ebirero." 
Ezekiel24:23 Erio motige ebitambaa bibe ase emetwe yaino, na ebikoroto ase amagoro aino. Timobaisa kobokia amagombo gose korera, korende imoree ase engencho y’ebibe biaino, na mobe mokorererana." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ase enchera eyio Ezekieli nabe ekiorokererio asemore. Inwe mokore kera egento agokora. Ekero amang’ana ayio araikeranigwe, erio momanye ng’a ninche Omonene Nyasae.”" 
Ezekiel24:25 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, nomanye ng’a ase rituko erio ndarusie korwa asebare ekio kere chinguru chiabo, na omogoko obo, na obonene bwabo, na omogoko bw’amaiso abo, na okogania gwe chinkoro chiabo, naende abana babo, abamura na abaiseke," 
Ezekiel24:26 ase rituko erio omonto oratooreke natame gochia asore, akorentere amang’ana." 
Ezekiel24:27 Erio omonwa oo nokunorwe ochake gokwana nomotami oria, tokogenderera koba rimama; ase igo aye nobe ekiorokererio ase abanto abwo, nabarabwo mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel25:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, onchoka origererie Abaamoni, obane mamincha yabo." 
Ezekiel25:3 Obatebie baigwe ring’ana ri’Omonene Nyasae, otebe: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe nigo mwagogete, mogateba: Ahaa! Ahaa! Ekero Aase aane Aachenu akoretwe akaba aatachenegeti, na ekero ense y’Abaisraeli yatigarete bosa, na ekero Abayuda bairetwe ase obosomba." 
Ezekiel25:4 Ase ayio, nimbarue mbabeke ase amaboko ’abanto ba moocha, mobe ababo. Barabwo mbabeke chiema chiabo ase egati yaino, naende mbaagache obomenyo bwabo aroro; mbarie okwama kwaino na banywe amabeere aino." 
Ezekiel25:5 Nindue omochie o Raba obe oborisia bwe chingamia, na emechie y’Abaamoni ebe ameeri ’amaicho. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel25:6 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe nigo mwaagete chinkobi, naende mogatinera amagoro aino inse, mokagoka ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi ase engencho y’amabe anyorete ense y’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel25:7 Ase ayio, rora, nindambore okoboko kwane igoro asemore mbae egesusuro, nimbarue mwoswe nebisaku binde. Nimbaite mbasirie korwa ase abanto, ee, mbasirie kegima, morue ase chinse echio. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel25:8 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Abamoabu na Abaseiri nigo bagokwana ng’a Abayuda nigo banga buna abanto b’ebisaku binde bionsi. 
Ezekiel25:9 Ase engencho eyio ninyasiore ense ya Moabu, agwo ase egetirimboko ase emechie ere, eyio ere obonene bw’ense eria, nero Beti‐Yesimoti, na Baali‐Meoni, na Kiriataimu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Nimbeke ense eria amo nense y’Abaamoni ase amaboko ’abanto ba Moocha, chibe echiabo, na Abaamoni abwo tibakoba bakoinyorwa nabanto b’ebisaku binde nonya ng’ake." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ninachere Abamoabu ekina, erio bamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel25:12 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Abaedomu bakoreire Abayuda bobe ase okorusia egesiomba, na babeire nokomocha ase okobakorera igo." 
Ezekiel25:13 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nindambore okoboko kwane mamincha y’Abaedomu; ning’ite nsirie kera omonto, na kera eng’iti. Ninsarie ense eyio ebe bosa. Abanto mbaitwe nemioro korwa Temani goika Dedani." 
Ezekiel25:14 Nindusie egesiomba kiane ase ense y’Abaedomu goetera ase amaboko ’Abaisraeli, abanto baane. Barabwo mbakorere Abaedomu koreng’ana nendamwamu yane, na ekeririanda kiane. Erio Abaedomu mbanyare komanya egesiomba kiane. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel25:15 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Abafilisti barusirie egesiomba bare nobobisa ase chinkoro chiabo, na ase okogecha kogendererete botambe basiririe ababisa babo kegima." 
Ezekiel25:16 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nindambore okoboko kwane mbae Abafilisti egesusuro, ning’ite Abakereti, mbasirie kegima, naende nsirie kegima abwo baratigare ase chinse chia ng’umbu mbarabare y’enyancha." 
Ezekiel25:17 Nindusie egesiomba ekenene mono asebare, nimbe nendamwamu y’okobaa egesusuro. Erio bamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene, ekero ndarusie egesiomba asebare.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi, omwaka o ikomi nomo, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, omochie o Turo ogokeire ogosarigwa kwa Yerusalemu na goteba: Ahaa! Ahaa! Egeita ki’abanto giatagoirwe, kianyigokeire. Bono inche ninyetenenkie, ekiagera Yerusalemu osarekire." 
Ezekiel26:3 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye Turo, rora, inche nabeire mamincha yao, nindete abanto b’ebisaku ebinge mono bakorwanie, buna emerindo y’enyancha ekoimokerera igoro." 
Ezekiel26:4 Abwo mbasarie chindwaki chia Turo, batagore nemerobiri y’ogotengerera. Inche nincheche riroba riaye rionsi, erinde aase agwo atigare are egetare gioka." 
Ezekiel26:5 Omochie oyio nobe aase abarubi bakwanekera ebionga biabo agwo ase egati y’enyancha. Ninche Omonene Nyasae nakwanire. Omochie oyo nosakorwe nabanto b’ebisaku. 
Ezekiel26:6 Abanto b’emechie yaye emeke ere ase engegu mbaitwe nemioro. Erio nario baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. 
Ezekiel26:7 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora, nindete omoruoti ore omonene kobua abaruoti bande bonsi, Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, ache korwa sugusu amo ne chibarasi, ne chigari, na abariini be chibarasi, na omoganda omonene bw’abarwani esegi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Omoruoti oyio naite nemioro abanto b’emechie yao emeke ere ase ense yao. Ere nigo araagache orwaki rw’ogwekengera rogoetanane, na areme eburi bosio bwao, naende aagache ekerama kebe eng’aya agwekengera." 
Ezekiel26:9 Natege egekorero ki’ogotagorera chindwaki chiao achisarie, natagore emerobiri y’ogotengera nebisire biaye." 
Ezekiel26:10 Chibarasi chi’omoruoti oyio nigo chire chinyinge mono, nachiimokie ebuse enyinge egotube kegima. Ekero arabe ogosoa ase ebiita biao buna abanto bagosoa ase omochie otagoirwe, chindwaki chiao nigo chiratengeche ase okwoga kw’abariini chibarasi ne chigari ao ao." 
Ezekiel26:11 Chibarasi chiaye nchitiringe chinchera chiao chionsi nebitaago biabo, omoruoti oyio naite abanto bao nemioro, naende atagore amatenenerio ao amanene anga chisiiro agwe inse." 
Ezekiel26:12 Abanto abwo mbakoure obotenenku bwao bwonsi, na mbaire ebinto biao bi’oboonchoreria; mbatagore chindwaki chiao ne chinyomba chiao chingiya. Nigo baraimokie amagena, ne chibao, na amaroba, babirute ase chinyancha ime." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ninsirie amariogi ’amatera are ime yao, na ay’amakano naro, taigugwa naende." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ninkoonchore obe egetare gioka ase abarubi bakwanekera ebionga biabo. Aye Turo tokoagachwa naende, ekiagera ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel26:15 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agotebia Turo: Inee! Ekero aye oraiyerigwe inse na gosarigwa, ebisinka tibigotengechigwa neriogi erio, na ase okweumia kw’abanto baakirwe ekero ogoitwa okonene korabe ase egati yao?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Erio abagambi bonsi bare ase ense ere enyancha mbarabare mbarue ase ebirogo biabo bi’obonene, barusie emiambaro yabo, naende barusie chianga chiabo chire nebieni ao ao. Barabwo mbabe bakoiguswa, nigo baraikaranse inse ase amaroba, babe bakona‐koiguswa na goichana igoro yao." 
Ezekiel26:17 Erio barabwo mbakoreere, babokie amagombo batebe: “Aye omochie omenyire nabanto be chinyancha, naki gwasarigwe! Aye omochie omanyekanete mono, aye kwarenge ne chinguru ase enyancha, nigo gwaichanetie bonsi abamenyete ime yao na kobaondokia." 
Ezekiel26:18 Bono ebisinka mbiiguswe ase rituko ri’ogokwa kwao, ee, ebisinka bire ase enyancha mbigoichanere ekero orasirigwe." 
Ezekiel26:19 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ningosirie obe omochie ore bosa buna emechie etamenyiri. Nindete chindiba chigotube, na amache amange agotube boigo." 
Ezekiel26:20 Ningotugute gochia ase embeera ime, ogende ase abanto ba kare bachiete. Ninkobeke omenye ime ye riroba, aase agwo asaretigwe kare, obeere amo nabanto abwo bagendete ase chimbeera ime. Aye tokomenywa naende, korende inche ninkore amang’ana amanene ase ense y’abare moyo." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ningosirie ase enchera y’okoondokia mono, tokogenderera kobao; abanto mbakorigie, korende tibagokonyora naende nonya ng’ake. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel27:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, tera ogotera gw’okoreera omochie o Turo." 
Ezekiel27:3 Otebie Turo oyio ore ase egesoero ki’enyancha, naende ogokora oboonchoreria nabanto abange bamenyete ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha: Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba:” “Aye Turo, nigo ogokwana ng’a nigo ore omoseera omoikeranu." 
Ezekiel27:4 Chimbebe chiao nigo chiigete enyancha gati; abaagachi bao nabwo bagokorete okaba omoseera omoikeranu. 
Ezekiel27:5 Chibao chiao chionsi nigo chiaroisetigwe korwa ase emete ekorokwa emebunduki ya Seniri, abanto bakarenta emecharake korwa Lebanoni, bagakoroiseria omoenga." 
Ezekiel27:6 Bakaroisia emegango korwa ase emete enga emetontera ya Basani. Bakaroisia risang’ina riao korwa ase chibao chi’emete emiya barusetie ase engegu ya Kuporo, chiachabeire amaino e chinchogu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Egetambaa ki’ebieni ao ao kwabegete ase omoenga, nigo kiaroisetigwe korwa ase egatani engiya ya Misiri; ekio nigo kiarenge ekemanyererio kiao. Egietubo kiao ki’ogokenderera kere buru na ekemonyinga, nigo kiarusetigwe korwa ase ebisinka bi’Elisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Abanto ba Sidoni na ab’Ariwadi nabwo barenge bagosukia amaato ao nemegango. Aye Turo, abanto abang’aini nigo bamenyete ime yao, barabwo nigo barenge abagendia be chimeeri chiao." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abagaaka amo nabanto abang’aini ba Gebali nigo bamenyete ime yao; abwo nabwo barenge goticha aase ao aatandogete. Chimeeri chionsi chi’enyancha nigo chiarenge gocha asore, na abanto barenge imeo bakaba bakoonchorerania ebinto naye." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Abarwani esegi b’Ayemi, na Ludi na Puti, nigo barenge abarwani bao b’esegi. Nigo basungete chinguba chiabo na ebigogwa biabo bi’ebioma ase chinyasi chiao. Barabwo nigo bakorenterete obonene." 
Ezekiel27:11 Abarwani esegi b’Ariwadi, amo nabarwani bao b’esegi, bakarenda chindwaki chiao ase chinsemo chionsi, na abanto ba Gamadi nabwo bateneine ase emerobiri yao y’ogotengerera. Barabwo bagasunga ching’aya chiabo ase chinyasi chiao chinsemo chionsi; boigo bagakora oboseera bwao bokaba oboikeranu." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Abatarisisi bagacha asore bagakora oboonchoreria naye, okanyora korwa asebare chifeta, na ebioma ao ao, na amabati; naye okabaooneria ebinto ao ao, ekiagera kwabwate obotenenku obonge." 
Ezekiel27:13 Naende ogakora oboonchoreria nense ya Giriki, na eya Tubali, na eya Meseki. Chinse echio chigakooneria abanto, ne ebinto bie chitahabu, na aye okabaooneria ebinto biao." 
Ezekiel27:14 Abanto ba Togarima bagakooneria chibarasi chi’emeremo na echi’esegi, ne chiyombo, naye okabaooneria ebinto biao." 
Ezekiel27:15 Abanto ba Dedani bagakora oboonchoreria naye; boigo abe chinse chinyinge chiarenge ang’e nenyancha bakaba bagokora oboonchoreria naye, bakagoakana amaino e chinchogu ne chibao chi’emete ekorokwa eboni." 
Ezekiel27:16 Abasiiria bagakora oboonchoreria naye, ekiagera kwabwate ebinto ebinge bi’obotenenku; bagakorentera amagena e rigori rinene akorokwa alimasi, na erangi emonyinga, na ebitambaa bi’ebieni ao ao, na egatani engiya, na amakorongote, na amagena akorokwa agati, bakagora ebinto biao." 
Ezekiel27:17 Abanto ba Yuda na ab’ense y’Abaisraeli bagakora oboonchoreria naye; bagakorentera engano ekorwa Miniti, na amazeituni, na obooke, na amaguta ’amazeituni, na amaguta akogwenia." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ekiagera aye nigo kwabwate obotenenku bwa kera egento, na ebinto ebinge kwaroisetie, abanto ba Damesiki bagakora oboonchoreria naye, bagakorentera edivai ya Heliboni, na amarionya amarabu e ching’ondi." 
Ezekiel27:19 Boigo abanto ba Wedani na aba Yavani bagakorentera ebioma bikomeka‐meka, na ebinsari bia kasia na ebia kalamusi." 
Ezekiel27:20 Abanto ba Dedani bagakora oboonchoreria naye, bagakorentera ebitambaa bi’ebiikaransero bikobekwa ase chibarasi." 
Ezekiel27:21 Abanto b’Arabia na abagambi bonsi ba Kedari, bagancha gokorentera chimanwa chie ching’ondi, ne chimingichi, ne chimbori, ase okoonchorerania naye." 
Ezekiel27:22 Abaonchoreria ba Seba na aba Raama bagakorentera ebinsari ao ao ebiya mono, na amagena e rigori rinene, ne chitahabu, naye okabaooneria ebinto biao ebiya kwabwate." 
Ezekiel27:23 Abanto ba Harani, na aba Kane, na aba Edeni, nabwo abaonchoreria ba Seba, na ab’Asuri, na aba Kilimadi, bagakora oboonchoreria naye." 
Ezekiel27:24 Abwo bagakorentera chianga chingiya mono, na ebitambaa bire buru na ebiroisirie ebieni ao ao, na emegeke y’ebieni ao ao, ne chingori chinkong’u." 
Ezekiel27:25 Chimeeri chia Tarisisi chikabogoria ebinto bi’oboonchoreria bwao. “Bono ogaisaneka ogaichorwa nebinto ebinge agwo ase kwarenge ase egati y’enyancha. 
Ezekiel27:26 Abanto barenge gosukia amaato ao nemegango, bagakoira aase amache amange are. Omwaga okorwa moocha okagusa ogakobunerao, agwo ase egati y’enyancha." 
Ezekiel27:27 Obotenenku bwao, na ebinto biao bionsi na oboonchoreria bwao, na abanto bao be chimeeri, na abagendia bao ba chirochio, na abwo barenge aase ao atandogete, na abarwani bao bonsi b’esegi abare ime yao, na omoganda oo bwonsi ore ime yao, bonsi nigo bararimere ime y’enyancha amo nebinto bionsi, ase rituko ri’ogosirigwa kwao." 
Ezekiel27:28 Eriogi ri’okorera kw’abagendia chimeeri chiao, nditengechie ense eyio egoetanaine." 
Ezekiel27:29 Abanto bonsi abagoata amache nemegango mbatige chimeeri chiabo; abagokora emeremo ase chimeeri amo nabagendia, mbagende ase engegu, bateneneo." 
Ezekiel27:30 Abwo mbakoreere aye namariogi amanene, bare nobororo obonge, mbasiarere ebuse ase emetwe yabo, begara‐garie ase ribu igoro." 
Ezekiel27:31 Mbakigite chitukia chiabo ase engencho yao, na beboyie chigunia; nigo barabe bagokoreera nobororo bwe chinkoro chiabo, babokie amagombo bare nobororo." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ekero barabe bagokoreera, mbabokie amagombo ase engencho yao, babe bagoteba: Mochie ki onga buna Turo, oyo okirigwe bono agwo ase egati y’enyancha?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ekero ebinto biao bi’oboonchoreria biaruete ase chinyancha, nigo gwaisanegetie abanto abange; obotenenku bwao obonge, na oboonchoreria bwao, nigo bwatenengetie abaruoti b’ense." 
Ezekiel27:34 Bono kwabunirwe na gosirigwa ime ase chindiba chi’enyancha; ebinto biao bi’oboonchoreria na abakoreri bao bonsi barimeire amo naye. 
Ezekiel27:35 “Abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha baichanire ase engencho yao, na abaruoti bao bonsi baondokire mono, na obwoba nigo bwarorekanire ase amasio abo." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abaonchoreria bare ase egati y’abanto, nigo bagokumirie na kobugia emeroria. Aye gwaikeire ogosirigwa gw’okoondokia, tokobao naende nonya ng’ake.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel28:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, tebia omoruoti o Turo ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Enkoro yao yeimokereirie igoro, aye nigo ogoteba: Inche nigo inde Nyasae, nigo ing’ikaransete ase ekerogo kia Nyasae ase egati y’enyancha. Korende aye nigo ore mwanyabanto rioka, tori Nyasae, nonya kwarengereirie ase enkoro yao ng’a nigo ore Nyasae." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ee, nigo ore omong’aini kobua Danieli, na obobisi tibori bobisekanete korwa asore." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ee, nigo ore omong’aini kobua Danieli, na obobisi tibori bobisekanete korwa asore." 
Ezekiel28:4 Obong’aini bwao, na okomanya kwao, biakonyoreire obotenenku obonge; aye gwasangereirie chitahabu ne chifeta ase chikungo chiao." 
Ezekiel28:5 Goetera ase obong’aini bwao bw’oboonchoreria, obotenenku bwao bwamentekanire; aye bono kwaenenire ase enkoro yao ase engencho y’obotenenku bwao obonge." 
Ezekiel28:6 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekiagera aye kwarengereirie ng’a nigo ore omong’aini buna Nyasae," 
Ezekiel28:7 ninkorentere abanto b’egesaku ekegeni, egetindi kebuete ebisaku binde bionsi. Abwo mbakorwanie esegi, erinde basarie obwari obwo kwenyoreire ase obong’aini bwao, na bakore obonene bwao bokomeka‐meka bobe obotachenegeti." 
Ezekiel28:8 Mbagotugute gochia ase embeera ime, aye nokwe ogokwa buna okw’abwo baitetwe nemioro bakarutwa agwo ase enyancha ime." 
Ezekiel28:9 Ekero orabe ase amaboko abanto abwo, bakogoita, Inee, nogenderere gokwana ase amasio abo ng’a aye Nyasae ore? Aye nigo ore mwanyabanto, orabe ase amaboko ay’abwo bakogoita, tori Nyasae." 
Ezekiel28:10 Aye nokwere ase amaboko ’abanto b’egesaku ekegeni, buna abanto batarogeti bagokwa. Ninche Omonene Nyasae nakwanire ayio.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel28:12 “Aye mwanyabanto, bokia amagombo igoro y’omoruoti o Turo, omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye nigo kwarenge omoikeranu goetania ebitongwa bionsi bi’obonene; nigo gwaichire nobong’aini, naende kwarenge omosiani omoikeranu." 
Ezekiel28:13 Nigo kwamenyete ime ya Edeni, omogondo o Nyasae. Nigo gwachaberetwe namagena ao ao e rigori rinene: Saridio, na topasio, na yasipi, na kurusolito, na berulo, na oiniki, na safiro, na sumaridi, na alimasi. Boigo nigo gwachaberetwe ne chitahabu. Ebinto biao bikobugigwa nigo biaroisetigwe ase rituko riria gwatongetwe." 
Ezekiel28:14 Aye nigo kwarenge omokerubi oagetwe amaguta, ogatuba oboagare obonene. Inche nigo nakobegete ase egetunwa egechenu kia Nyasae, agwo ase kwarenge kona‐gotaara ase egati y’amagena are nomorero." 
Ezekiel28:15 Chingencho chiao nigo chiarenge ching’ikeranu, korwa rituko erio gwatongetwe goika ekero obobe bwanyorekanete ime yao." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ekero gwakorete oboonchoreria obonge, ogaichorwa nobobe; ase igo ogakora ebibe. Ase ayio nkagoseria buna egento getachenegeti, okarua ase egetunwa kia Nyasae, ee, aye omokerubi ogatuba oboagare obonene, nagosiririe korwa ase amagena aria are nomorero." 
Ezekiel28:17 Enkoro yao nigo yeimokereretie igoro ase engencho y’obosiani bwao, aye ogasaria obong’aini bwao ase engencho y’obomeka‐meku bwao. Ase ayio ngakoiyeria inse, nkagotiga ase amaiso ’abaruoti bagosekerere." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ase engencho y’ebibe biao ebinge, na oboonchoreria bwao botari bw’oboronge, ogakora aase ao aachenegete akaba aatachenegeti. Ngasokia omorero korwa ase egati yao, na omorero oyio okagosiria, ngakoonchora okaba ribu igoro ase ense, agwo ase amaiso ’abanto bonsi bakoroche." 
Ezekiel28:19 Abanto bonsi abakomanyete nigo baragoichane. Aye gwaikire ase ogosirigwa gw’okoondokia, tokobao naende nonya ng’ake.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel28:21 “Aye mwanyabanto, rigereria gochia Sidoni, obane mamincha yaye," 
Ezekiel28:22 otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye Sidoni, rora, inche nigo inde mamincha yao, ning’orokie obonene bwane ase egati yao. Ekero ndakonachere ekina na nkworokie obochenu bwane, erio abanto mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel28:23 Nindete oborwaire bogoita ime yao, na amanyinga aiteke ase chinchera chiao. Norwanigwe esegi korwa ase chinsemo chionsi, na abanto baitwe bakwere ase egati yao. Erio abanto mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Korende ase Abaisraeli, chimbambo gose amagwa tibikobao bibabete ekero bagendererete komenya ase egati y’abanto abwo babaetanaine babachayete. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene Nyasae." 
Ezekiel28:25 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ninsangererie Abaisraeli, mbarusie korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku agwo ase basiareretwe gochia, na ning’orokie obochenu bwane asebare ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku; erio mbarente bamenye ase ense yabo eria naete Yakobo, omosomba one." 
Ezekiel28:26 Mbamenye nobotoereru ase ense eyio; baagache chinyomba, naende basimeke emesabibu ase emegondo. Barabwo mbamenye nobotoereru, ekero ndanachere abanto bonsi babaetanaine ekina, abwo babachayete. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae obo.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Ase rituko ria ikomi na kabere, omotienyi o ikomi, omwaka o ikomi, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, rigereria gochia ase Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, obane mamincha yaye, na mamincha ya Misiri yonsi." 
Ezekiel29:3 Kwana nere, omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, rora, inche nigo inde mamincha yao; aye ore enchoka enene eraire gati‐gati ye chindooche chiao, kogoteba: Orooche oro rwa Naili norwane, ninche omonyene narotongete." 
Ezekiel29:4 Nimbeke ebigobanio ase chinsea chiao, ntige chinswe chire ase chindooche chiao chibwaterere ase amagonko ao, erio nkong’use nkorusie ase chindooche chiao, amo ne chinswe chionsi chie chindooche chiao chibwatererete ase amagonko ao." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ningotugute ase erooro, aye amo ne chinswe chionsi chie chindooche chiao. Omobere oo nogwe ase egetii aarabu. Aye tokorusigwao oirwe; ninkorue obe endagera ye ching’iti chi’orosana na eye chinyoni." 
Ezekiel29:6 Erio abanto bonsi abamenyete Misiri mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. “Abamisiri nigo barenge buna emoti Abaisraeli begenete. 
Ezekiel29:7 Ekero bakoboanetie namaboko abo, aye okabuneka, okabang’waroria amareko abo. Ekero bagwesiirerete okabuneka, ogatengechia ebibono biabo." 
Ezekiel29:8 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora, nindete omoro igoro yao, nsirie mwanyabanto ne ching’iti." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ense y’Abamisiri nesarigwe, ebe bosa; erio Abamisiri mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. “Aye Misiri nigo gwatebete: Orooche oro rwa Naili norwane, ninche narotongete." 
Ezekiel29:10 Ase ayio, inche nigo inde mamincha yao, na mamincha ye chindooche chiao. Ninsarie ense ya Misiri kegima ebe bosa korwa Migidoli goika Siwene ase orobebe rw’Etiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Monto onde tagotaara ase ense eyio, gose eng’iti tegotaara goeterao. Ense eyio nebe etamenyiri nabanto ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ninsarie ense ya Misiri kegima ebe bosa ase egati ye chinse chinde chisaregete. Emechie yao negenderere koba esaregete ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene agwo ase egati y’emechie ende eng’anyire egatigwa ere bosa. Ninsiarere Abamisiri gochia ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, mbaserie gochia ase chinse ao ao." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekero emiaka emerongo ene yaerire, ninsangererie Abamisiri, mbarusie korwa ase egati y’abanto abwo ase basiareretwe gochia." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ning’iranie Abamisiri, mbarente bamenye ase ense ya Patirosi, ensemo ya irianyi, ense eyio yarenge eyabo. Aroro agwo mbabe noboruoti botari ne chinguru." 
Ezekiel29:15 Oboruoti obwo mbobe oboke goetania amaruoti ande onsi. Tibokonyara kweimokereria igoro boetanie ebisaku binde. Nimbokeyie bobe oboke kegima, erinde tibobaisa kogambera ay’ebisaku binde." 
Ezekiel29:16 Tibokogenderera koba ogosemeria ase Abaisraeli. Onye Abaisraeli bagochia korigia ogokonywa korwa ase Abamisiri, rirorio mbabe bakoinyora ebibe biabo, na mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene Nyasae.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, omwaka bw’emerongo ebere, na etano na ebere, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Aye mwanyabanto, Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, agatiga abarwani baye b’esegi bagokora emeremo agwo ase omochie o Turo. Kera omotwe ogasunyoka etukia, na kera rireko rikaniaroka. Korende nonya naboigo, ere na abarwani baye b’esegi, tibaakaneretwe ng’eria ende yonsi ase ogokorera Turo emeremo." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora, nimbeke ense ya Misiri ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli; ere naire obotenenku bwa Misiri, nayesakore na koira ebinto bire aroro. Ebinto ebio mbibe eng’eria y’abarwani baye b’esegi." 
Ezekiel29:20 Namoeire ense ya Misiri ase okomoakanera emeremo akorete, ekiagera barabwo bankorerete inche emeremo. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ase rituko erio nintige orogunchara rw’Abaisraeli romere, nimaanore omonwa oo okwane ase egati yabo. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel30:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, bana otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Eumie, morere:” “Obee! Naki rituko eri rire?”" 
Ezekiel30:3 “Rituko riria riaikire ang’e, ee, rituko ri’Omonene riaikire ang’e. Nigo rirabe rituko ri’amare, engaki y’okogambigwa kw’abanto b’ebisaku." 
Ezekiel30:4 Omoro nochiche igoro ya Misiri, na emechando emenene nebe aaria Etiopia, ekero abanto ba Misiri baraitwe, na obotenenku bwabo boirwe, na amaroso ’ense eria naiyerigwe inse.”" 
Ezekiel30:5 “Abanto ba Etiopia, na aba Libia, na aba Ludi, na abanto bonsi bagasang’anana amo, na aba Kubu, na abanto b’ense y’okobwatana; abwo bonsi mbaitwe nemioro, bakwe amo n’Abamisiri." 
Ezekiel30:6 “Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Abanto abwo bonsi abagokonya Abamisiri mbagwe, na okobua kwabo kw’obonene ngosirigwe; abanto mbaitwe nemioro ase ense eye korwa Migidoli goikera Siwene. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ense eyio nesarigwe ebe bosa ase egati ye chinse chinde chisaregete chikaba bosa, na emechie yaye nesarigwe ebe bosa ase egati y’emechie ende esaregete ekaba bosa." 
Ezekiel30:8 Erio ekero ndabe natongirie omorero agwo Misiri, na abakonyi baye bonsi basirigwe, barabwo mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Ekero rituko erio rirache, abatomwa mbarue asende, bariine chimeeri bagende Etiopia, baondokie abanto b’aroro, abwo batakagereti ng’a bobe bonde mbobanyore. Omoichano nobachere ase rituko riria ri’ogosirigwa kwa Misiri. Ee, rora, emechando eyio ngocha ere!" 
Ezekiel30:10 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ninsirie obotenenku bwa Misiri goetera ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli." 
Ezekiel30:11 Omoruoti oyio amo nabanto baye, abanto abatindi mono goetania ab’ebisaku binde, mbarentwe basarie Misiri kegima. Nigo baraite abanto b’aroro nemioro, na ense eyio eichorwe nebitondo." 
Ezekiel30:12 Inche ninkamie chindooche chiome pa, na ng’oonie ense eyio ase amaboko ’abanto ababe. Nindete abanto b’ebisaku ebigeni basarie ense na kera egento kere imeo. Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ninsirie emegwekano egosasimwa, ee, ninsirie kegima chinyasae chi’oborimo chia Memifisi, gose omogambi takoba ase ense ya Misiri; ase igo nindete obwoba ase ense eyio." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ninsarie ense ya Patirosi esire ebe bosa, ninsambe Soani nomorero, na inachere omochie okorokwa No ekina." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ning’umore ekeririanda kiane igoro y’omochie o Sini, oria ore obotamero obokong’u bwa Misiri; ninsirie emeganda ya No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ninsambe Misiri nomorero; obororo obonge mboichanie Sini. No notagorwe ogwe inse, na Memifisi noumokerwe nababisa ekero kia mobaso." 
Ezekiel30:17 Abamura ba Oni, na aba Pi‐Beseti, mbaitwe nemioro, na abanto bande babo bairwe ase obosomba." 
Ezekiel30:18 Omosunte notube Tehafenehesi ekero ndabune rikorogoto ria Misiri, ne chinguru chi’obonene bwaye nchiere. Riire nditube Misiri, na abanto b’emechie yaye bairwe ase obosomba." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ase enchera eyio ninachere Abamisiri ekina; erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Ase rituko ria gatano na kabere, omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, omwaka o ikomi nomo, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Aye mwanyabanto, inche nabunete okoboko gwa Farao, omoruoti o Misiri; na rora, tikwana koboerwa ebitete kogwene, erinde kobe ne chinguru kobwate omoro naende." 
Ezekiel30:22 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nigo inde mamincha ya Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, nimbune amaboko aye onsi, koria kore nechinguru amo na koria kwabunegete; ning’iyerie omoro korwa ase okoboko kwaye." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ninserie Abamisiri gochia ase ebisaku binde, mbasiarere gochia ase chinse ao ao." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ninkong’ie amaboko ’omoruoti o Babeli, mbeke omoro one ase okoboko kwaye, korende amaboko a Farao ninyabune, erinde achandeke ase obosio bw’omoruoti o Babeli, abe okona‐kweumia ore buna omonto oakire chingoma chikomoita." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ee, ninkong’ie amaboko ’omoruoti o Babeli, korende aya Farao naborwe chinguru. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. Ekero ndabeke omoro one ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o Babeli, ere nayorage gochia ase ense ya Misiri." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ninserie Abamisiri gochia ase ebisaku, mbasiarere gochia ase chinse ao ao. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, omotienyi o gatato, omwaka o ikomi nomo, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, kwana na Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, amo nomoganda oye, oborie:” “Ning’o orareng’anigwe naye ase obonene bwao?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Naama! Ense y’Abaasuri nigo yarenge buna omocharake o Lebanoni, obwate chinsagia chingiya chire nekiriri ekiya. Nigo okinete gochia igoro, ogaetania chinsagia chi’emete ende." 
Ezekiel31:4 Omote oyio okaba okonyora amache na gokina; chinsoko chia inse chikayotambeyia. Chindooche nigo chiaetanaine ase osimekire, nyuma yaye chindooche echio chikaba chikonyosia emete yonsi ye rinani amache." 
Ezekiel31:5 “Ase ayio omocharake oria ogakina, Ogatambea ogaetania emete yonsi ye rinani, chinsagia chiaye chikamentekana, na ebisagia biaye bigatambea, ase engencho y’amache amange arengeo akayokinia." 
Ezekiel31:6 Chinyoni chionsi chikaagacha ebiswa biabo ase chinsagia chiaye, ne ching’iti chikabiarera inse ye chinsagia chiaye; inse y’ekiriri kiaye abanto b’ebisaku bionsi ebinene bikamenyao." 
Ezekiel31:7 Omote oria okaba omuya mono ase obonene bwaye na ase chinsagia chiaye chintambe, ekiagera emeri yaye yaigete inse ase amache amange arenge." 
Ezekiel31:8 Emecharake ende ey’omogondo o Nyasae tiyayoetaneti, gose emebunduki tiyarenge ne chinsagia buna echiaye; na emeuru tiyarenge nebisagia buna ebiaye. Ee, omote onde bw’omogondo o Nyasae torenge omosiani buna oro." 
Ezekiel31:9 Nigo nayokorete okaba omosiani ase engencho y’obonge bwe chinsagia chiaye, goika emete yonsi ya Edeni, omogondo o Nyasae, ekayobwaterwa ribero." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekiagera kweimokereretie igoro na ogakina ogaetania emete ende, na enkoro yao ekaenenera obotambe bwaye," 
Ezekiel31:11 ninkobeke ase amaboko ay’oyore nokobua ase egati y’ebisaku. Oyio ekeene nigo arayokorere buna anchete, ekiagera inche nayotugutire ase engencho y’ogokora kwaye okobe." 
Ezekiel31:12 Abanto b’ebisaku ebigeni, abare abatindi mono goetania ab’ebisaku binde, mbayogeche bayotige inse. Chinsagia chiaye nchigwe, chibeere igoro ase ebitunwa na inse ase amagoko onsi. Ebisagia biaye mbibuneke bibeere ase chindooche chionsi chi’ense eria. Abanto bonsi bare ase ense eria mbatame, barue ase ekiriri kiaye bayotige." 
Ezekiel31:13 Ase ritina riaye, erio rirabe rigwete inse chinyoni chionsi nchiche chibeereo, na ase chinsagia chiaye ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana nchibeereo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Ayio nigo arakoreke, erinde mote onde bwensi ore ase amache tobaisa kweenenia ase obotambe bwaye, gose gwetambeyia gochia igoro ase amare; gose emete ende yonsi ekonyora amache tekina gochia igoro yeenenie, ekiagera yonsi yachikeirwe ogokwa esoe inse ye riroba ase mwanyabanto bakure basoete." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase rituko erio omote oria ogendete aase abakure ngachika ebirero birerwe; nigo natubete chindiba ase engencho yaye, ngatanga chindooche chiaye, nkaochania amache amanene. Nigo nachigete egetunwa kia Lebanoni keyobokerie amagombo, na emete yonsi y’orosana egasusana ase engencho yaye." 
Ezekiel31:16 Nigo natengechetie ebisaku ase okogwa kwaye, ekero nayogechete nkayotuguta gochia aase abakure, ase abwo bagendete ase chimbeera. Erio emete yonsi ya Edeni, na eyechorire ere emiya mono ya Lebanoni, yonsi eye ekonywa amache, ekaba ekweremia emenyene agwo inse ye riroba." 
Ezekiel31:17 Emete eyio egasoa amo noro gochia aase abakure ase abwo baitetwe nemioro basoete, ee, emete eyio nigo yaikaransete ase ekiriri kiaye ase egati y’ebisaku ase okoyokonya." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Norori ase emete yonsi ya Edeni oreng’anigwe naye ase ogosikwa na obonene? Aye noirwe amo nemete ende yonsi ya Edeni, otugutwe inse ye riroba amo nero; nobe amo nabwo batarogeti, abaitetwe nemioro. “Ayio naro arakoreke ase Farao amo nomoganda oye bwonsi. Omonene Nyasae otebire ayio.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, omotienyi o ikomi na kabere, omwaka o ikomi na kabere, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, rera obokie amagombo igoro ya Farao, omoruoti o Misiri, omotebie: Aye nigo kwareng’anetigwe nendo ensae ase egati y’ebisaku, nigo onga eng’iti enene mono buna eng’oina ere enyancha ime. Nigo kwaberogetie korwa ase chindooche chiao, okaburukania amache namagoro ao, okabokia etintira y’amache e chindooche chiabo." 
Ezekiel32:3 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Nindute ekeonga kiane igoro yao, nakio omoganda omonene orakong’use okobeke ase rikuru riane ime." 
Ezekiel32:4 Erio ngotugute igoro ase ense enyomo, na nkorute aase aarabu, agwo ndangerie chinyoni chionsi chikogwere, ne ching’iti chire ase ense engima chikorie chiigote." 
Ezekiel32:5 Nintugute chinyama chi’omobere oo ase ebitunwa igoro, na obogundo bwao boichore ase amagoko." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ninyoisie ense nemegoko y’amanyinga ao, aichore aike ase ebitunwa igoro, ne chindooche chiichorwe naro." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ekero ekio ndagosirie nintube igoro, imbeke omosunte ase ching’enang’eni; nintube erioba ne riire, na omotienyi tokobara." 
Ezekiel32:8 Emebaso yonsi ya igoro ninyetube omosunte ase engencho yao, nindete omosunte nase ense yao. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ekero ndarentere abanto b’ebisaku amang’ana igoro y’ogosirigwa kwao, ning’ichanie chinkoro chi’abanto abange ase chinse echio otamanyeti." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ning’ichanie abanto abange na abaruoti babo mboboe mono ase engencho yao, ekero ndabe nkomesia omoro one ase amasio abo. Ee, ase rituko ri’okogwa kwao mbabe bakonakoiguswa kera engaki, kera omonto ase engencho y’obogima bwaye." 
Ezekiel32:11 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Omoro bw’omoruoti o Babeli norentwe igoro yao. 
Ezekiel32:12 Nindete abarwani chituoni, abare abatindi goetania ebisaku bionsi, abwo mbaite emeganda yao nemioro. Barabwo mbasirie obonene bwa Misiri bobe bosa, na emeganda yaye yonsi nesirigwe." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ning’ite ching’iti chionsi chikorisia mbarabare ase amache amange are; amagoro a mwanyabanto, gose ebitaago bie ching’iti, tibikogenderera goturubania amache ayio biyasarie." 
Ezekiel32:14 Erio nintige amache areo akenonoke, ne chindooche chiminyoke buna amaguta. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ekero ndasarie ense ya Misiri ebe bosa, na ebinto bionsi bireo bisirigwe, naende nsirie abanto bonsi bamenyeteo, erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel32:16 Ayio naro amagombo arabokigwe igoro ya Misiri. Abakungu b’ebisaku mbabokie amagombo igoro yaye, na igoro y’emeganda yaye yonsi. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Ase rituko ria ikomi na gatano, omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, omwaka o ikomi na kabere, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Aye mwanyabanto, bokeria emeganda ya Misiri amagombo, obatugute abanto baye gochia inse, amo nabanto b’ebisaku bire nobonene, bagende aase abakure agwo ase chimbeera, ase abakure bagendete." 
Ezekiel32:19 “Aye Misiri, ning’o obuete ase obosiani? Tirimboka ogende inse orare amo nabatarogeti?" 
Ezekiel32:20 “Abanto ba Misiri mbaitwe barare amo nabwo baitetwe nemioro. Emioro y’okobasiria yarurwe. Ase ayio rusia ense eyio aroro amo nemeganda yaye yonsi. 
Ezekiel32:21 Korwa agwo aase abakure abare ne chinguru ase egati ye chituoni mbakwane igoro y’Abamisiri na abakonyi babo, batebe: Baria batarogeti baitirwe nemioro, bachiire inse aa korara." 
Ezekiel32:22 “Abaasuri nao bakare amo nemeganda yabo yonsi, chimbeera chiabo nigo chibaetanaine ase chinsemo chionsi. Bonsi baitirwe nemioro bakure." 
Ezekiel32:23 Chimbeera chiabo nigo chikare inse aatambe, na emeganda yabo nigo eetanaine chimbeera chiabo ase chinsemo chionsi. Bonsi baitirwe nemioro bakure; abanto abwo kare barentete obwoba ase ense y’abare moyo." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Abaelamu nao bakare amo nemeganda yabo yonsi eetanaine chimbeera chiabo. Bonsi baitirwe nemioro bakure. Abwo bonsi barentete obwoba ase ense y’abare moyo; nigo bagendete gochia aase abakure ekero konya batararoka na bono babogoirie obosooku bwabo amo nabwo bagendire ase chimbeera. 
Ezekiel32:25 Abaelamu amo nemeganda yabo yonsi banyorire amarere abo ase egati y’abwo baitetwe nemioro, ne chimbeera chi’emeganda yabo nigo chibaetanaine. Abwo bonsi bagaitwa nemioro ekero konya batararoka. Agwo kare nigo barentete obwoba ase ense y’abare moyo. Bono babogoirie obosooku amo nabwo bagendire ase chimbeera, ee, nigo babekire ase egati y’abwo baitetwe nemioro." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Abameseki na Abatubali nao bakare amo nemeganda yabo yonsi, ne chimbeera chi’emeganda eyio nigo chibaetanaine ase chinsemo chionsi. Abwo bonsi nabanto batarogeti, nigo baitetwe nemioro. Agwo kare nigo barentete obwoba ase ense y’abare moyo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Inee! Abwo batarogeti tibakorara amo ne chituoni chi’esegi chiagendete gochia aase abakure amo nebirwanero biabo bi’esegi, na emioro yabo ebekire inse y’emetwe yabo, na ebibe biabo bakorete tibiatubete amauga abo? Barabwo nigo barentete obwoba ase ense y’abare moyo buna chituoni chi’esegi chigokora." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Naboigo nainwe Abamisiri, morasenyentwe, morare amo nabatarogeti, abwo baitetwe nemioro." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Abaedomu nao bakare amo nabaruoti babo, na abagambi babo bonsi. Nonya barenge nokobua nigo baraire amo na baria baitetwe nemioro, batarogeti bagendete ase chimbeera." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Abagambi bonsi ba sugusu nao bakare amo n’Abasidoni bonsi; bonsi bagendire gochia ase abwo baitetwe nemioro. Ase engencho y’obwoba barentete ekero barenge nokobua, bono babeire nobosooku. Nigo baraire batarogeti amo na baria baitetwe nemioro; nigo babogoretie obosooku bwabo bare ase egati y’abwo bagendete ase chimbeera." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekero Farao ararore abwo baitetwe, nigo areremie ase engencho y’emeganda yaye yonsi eyio yaitetwe nemioro." 
Ezekiel32:32 “Inche nigo naete Farao ribaga arente obwoba ase ense y’abare moyo; ase ayio ere amo nomoganda oye bwonsi barare ase egati y’abatarogeti, abwo baitetwe nemioro. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel33:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, tebia abanto bamino ng’a ekero ndarente omoro igoro ase ense, na abanto b’ense eyio bachore omonto oyomo obo, bamobeke abe omorendi obo," 
Ezekiel33:3 omonto oyio kararore omoro oyio ogocha igoro ase ense, abugie egetureri ki’ogokurera abanto." 
Ezekiel33:4 Omonto onde bwensi oraigwe eriogi ri’egetureri ekio, korende taigwera ogokurerwa okwo, omoro koramonyore omoite, okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga aye, nakobarwe igoro yaye." 
Ezekiel33:5 Ere nigo aigwete eriogi ri’egetureri, korende taigwera ogokurerwa okwo, ase ayio okomocha kw’ogoiteka kw’amanyinga aye nakobarwe igoro yaye. Korende karaigwere ogokurerwa okwo, natoorie obogima bwaye." 
Ezekiel33:6 Korende omorendi oria kararore omoro ogocha, na tabugia egetureri, erinde abanto bakurerwe, na omoro oria ochiche oite omonto onde obo, omonto oyio nakwe ore ase ebibe biaye, korende inche ninganie amanyinga ’omonto oyio korwa ase okoboko kw’omorendi oria." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Ase ayio, aye mwanyabanto, nakobekire obe omorendi bw’Abaisraeli. Kero kende gionsi oraigwe ring’ana rikorwa ase omonwa one, obakurere ribaga riane." 
Ezekiel33:8 Kondatebie omonto omokori amabe: Aye omokori amabe, goika okwe, na aye okire tokwana omokurere ng’a aonchoke korwa ase enchera yaye embe, omokori amabe oria nakwe ore ase ebibe biaye, korende ninganie amanyinga aye korwa ase okoboko kwao." 
Ezekiel33:9 Korende korakurere omokori amabe ng’a aonchoke atige enchera yaye, na ere aange koyetiga, oyio nakwe ore ase ebibe biaye, korende aye notoorie omoyo oo." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Ase ayio aye mwanyabanto, inyoria Abaisraeli aya bagokwana, bateba: Ogosaria gwaito, na ebibe biaito biatoritoeire, na ebio bigendererete gotochanda na gotoreyia. Naki rende toranyare koba moyo?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Batebie ng’a inche Omonene Nyasae nigo ngoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, tindi kogokera ogokwa kw’omokori amabe, korende nigo nganetie omokori amabe aonchoke, atige enchera yaye embe abe moyo. Ase ayio onchoka, onchoka, motige chinchera chiaino chimbe! Inwe Abaisraeli, nase ki moganetie mokwe?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Aye mwanyabanto, tebia abanto bao ng’a ekero omonyaboronge aratige oboronge bwaye akore ebibe, oboronge boria bwaye tibokomotooria; na ekero omokori amabe araonchoke atige obobe bwaye, obobe boria bwaye tibokomoita, kareitie na kobotiga. Omonyaboronge takoba moyo ase engencho y’oboronge bwaye rituko riria arakore ebibe." 
Ezekiel33:13 Kondatebie omonyaboronge ng’a nabe moyo, korende ere asemerie oboronge bwaye na akore aya atari ay’oboronge, rirorio ogokora kwaye konde gwonsi kw’oboronge akorete tigokoinyorwa; ere nakwe ase engencho y’ayio atari oboronge akorire." 
Ezekiel33:14 Naende, kondatebie omokori amabe: Aye goika okwe, korende karaonchoke atige ebibe biaye, akore ayare ay’ekeene na oboronge," 
Ezekiel33:15 ere karairanie egento airete gekaba intenenera, naende airanie eki aureretie, na abwatie emeroberio echikire ey’obogima atari gokora ebibe, omonto oyio, ekeene nabe moyo, tagokwa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ase ebibe ebio akorete takobarerwa nonya nekemo; ere okorire ayare ay’ekeene na oboronge, ekeene goika abe moyo." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Abanto b’egesaku kiao nigo bagoteba: Chinchera chi’Omonene tichiri echi’ekeene, korende chinchera chiabo nachio chitari echi’ekeene." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ekero omonyaboronge aratige oboronge bwaye akore aya atari ay’oboronge, oyio nakwe ase engencho y’ayio." 
Ezekiel33:19 Na omokori amabe karaonchoke, atige amabe aye, erio akore ayare ay’ekeene na oboronge, nabe moyo ase engencho y’ayio." 
Ezekiel33:20 Korende inwe Abaisraeli nigo mogendererete goteba: Chinchera chi’Omonene tichiri echi’ekeene. Ninachere kera omonto ekina koreng’ana nogokora kwaye.” 
Ezekiel33:21 Ase rituko ria gatano, omotienyi o ikomi, omwaka o ikomi na kabere, nyuma gotwairirwe ase obosomba, omonto konya otamire korwa Yerusalemu, agacha asende, agantebia, “Omochie oria obuirwe.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Mogoroba ekero omonto oyio ataracha asende, okoboko kw’Omonene konya gwachire igoro yane, na ase emambia eria omonto oria otamete konya ataraika asende, Omonene konya omaanoire omonwa one, na tinagendererete koba rimama." 
Ezekiel33:23 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel33:24 “Aye mwanyabanto, abanto abwo bamenyete ase amaturi aaria ase ense y’Abaisraeli, nigo bagokwana, bateba: Ibrahimu nigo arenge omonto oyomo, na ere akanyora ense eye ekaba eyaye; korende intwe nigo tore abange, ekeene, ense eye nero twaeirwe ebe eyaito." 
Ezekiel33:25 “Ase ayio, batebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe nigo mokoria enyama ere namanyinga, naende nigo mokorigereria emegwekano yaino mogosasima, boigo inwe nigo mogoitera amanyinga ’abanto. Inee! Naki moranyare koira ense eye ebe eyaino?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Inwe nigo mwegenete emioro yaino; nigo mogokora ay’okogechia, kera oyomo oino nigo agotomana nomokungu bw’omonto onde. Inee! Naki moranyare koira ense eye ebe eyaino?"
