Ezekiel33:27 “Aye goika obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, abanto abwo bamenyete ase amaturi mbaitwe nemioro, na abare isiko nintome ching’iti chi’orosana chibarie; abwo bamenyete ase ebitare na ime ase amakuruma, amarwaire amabe nabaite." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ninsarie ense eyio ebe bosa kegima, ne chinguru chiabo echio chibaenenetie nchiere pi. Ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli mbitigare bosa, monto onde takoba ogoetera aroro." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ekero ndabe nasaririe kegima ense eyio yabo ebe bosa, ase engencho y’ebibe biabo bionsi bi’okogechia bakorire, erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel33:30 “Aye mwanyabanto, abanto bao nigo bagosangererekana amo agwo ase chinyasi, na ase ebisieri bie chinyomba, bagamba igoro yao, na kera omonto okwana nomogisangio oye, batebania: Inchuo togende, toigwe ng’a naki ring’ana rikorwa ase Omonene rigoteba." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ase ayio nigo bagocha asore buna abagocha ase omosangererekano, baikaransa ase obosio bwao buna abanto baane, barabwo baigwa amang’ana ogokwana, korende tibari koyakorera. Nigo bakworokia obwanchani obonge ase ebikoba igoro, korende ime ase chinkoro chiabo nigo bakwerigeria ebitoki." 
Ezekiel33:32 Naama! Aye kwabeire asebare buna omonto obwate eriogi rigiya ogotera amatera ay’okogokia, naende okobugia obokano buya. Nigo bakoigwa amang’ana ayio ao, korende tibari koyakorera." 
Ezekiel33:33 Korende ekero amang’ana ayio araikeranigwe (ekiagera goika aikeranigwe), erio nario baramanye ng’a omobani narenge ase egati yabo.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel34:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, bana, otebie abarisia b’Abaisraeli ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae akobatebia: Obobe nobwaino, inwe abarisia b’Abaisraeli, ekiagera mwabeire mokwerageria inwe mweka abanyene! Inee! Tegwenereti abarisia barisie ching’ondi?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Nigo mokoria echire chinoru, naende mwabeka chianga chiroisirie korwa ase amarionya abo; ee, nigo mokonyenya echire chinoru, korende timori korisia riicho erio moriigotie." 
Ezekiel34:4 Echio chire chindeu, timori gochibeka chinguru, na echire chindwaire, timori gochigwenia, na echibunegete, timori gochiboera ebitete, na echiaserebekanire, timori gochiirania asende, na echiasirire, timori gochirigia; mwabeire mogochigambera ase ogochibetereria more nobotindi." 
Ezekiel34:5 Ase ayio chiaserebekanire gochia aande onsi, ekiagera chitabwati omorisia, chiabeire endagera ye ching’iti chionsi chi’orosana, ee chiaserebekanire." 
Ezekiel34:6 Bono ching’ondi chiane nigo chigotayaya ase ebitunwa bionsi, na ase kera ekegoro egetambe. Ching’ondi chiane chiaserebekanire gochia aande onsi ase ense, na onde tari ogochirigia gose gochiitaa." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Ase ayio, inwe abarisia, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Ezekiel34:8 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, ching’ondi chiane chiabeire chigotwarwa na koba endagera ya kera eng’iti y’orosana, ekiagera omorisia ataiyo, naende abarisia baane tibagendeti korigia ching’ondi chiane, korende babeire bakwerageria boka abanyene, na tari ching’ondi chiane bakorageria." 
Ezekiel34:9 Ase ayio, inwe abarisia, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Naama! Inche nigo inde mamincha y’abarisia abwo. Ninganie ching’ondi chiane korwa ase amaboko abo; nimbaange, tibakogenderera koba abarisia be ching’ondi chiane; abarisia abwo tibakogenderera kwerageria boka abanyene. Nintoorie ching’ondi chiane korwa ase emenwa yabo tichiba endagera yabo." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Naama! Ninche bweka omonyene ndarigie ching’ondi chiane, nchinyore na gochirenda." 
Ezekiel34:12 Buna koreng’ana omorisia akorigia ching’ondi chiaye chiaserebekanire, ochisangereria amo naende, naboigo nainche ndasangererie ching’ondi chiane, nchitoorie korwa ase chinsemo chionsi aase chiaserebekanete gochia ase rituko rie rirumbe na omosunte omonene." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ninchirusie korwa ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku binde, nchisangererie korwa ase chinse ao ao, erio nchirente ase ense yabo abanyene. Nimbe ngochirisia igoro ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, na ase chindooche, na ase chinsemo chionsi chi’ense eyio chimenyire nabanto." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ninchirisie ase oborisia obuya. Ee, nchibe chikorisia ase oborisia obonoru bw’ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Inche omonyene nindisie ching’ondi chiane, naende nchinyore aase chigotimokera. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel34:16 “Echiasirete ninchirigie nchinyore, na echio chiaserebekanete nchiiranie asende; echibunegete ninchiboere ebitete, na echire chindeu ninchibeke chinguru; korende echire chinoru naende chire ne chinguru ninchisirie, ee, ninchigambie ekina kia boronge." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe ching’ondi chiane, ninache ekina ase egati y’eng’ondi na eng’ondi ende, na ase egati ye chimingichi ne chigoree." 
Ezekiel34:18 Inee! Nigo are amang’ana amagusu asemore ng’a komwanyorire oborisia obuya, mwatiringera inse namagoro aino obonyansi obwatigaire? Naende komwanyure amache amakenonoku, mwaturubania namagoro aino ayatigaire?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Inee! Ching’ondi chiane nigo chirabe chikorisia obonyansi mwatiringire namagoro aino, naende chinywe amache ayio mwaturubanirie namagoro aino?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agochitebia: Inche bweka omonyene ninache ekina ase egati ye ching’ondi chinoru ne chindeu." 
Ezekiel34:21 Nigo mogosukia chiria chindeu namakere aino, na amareko, naende mwachitwoma ne chingunchara chiaino, goika mwachisiarera gochia ase chinsemo chionsi chi’aare." 
Ezekiel34:22 Ase ayio nintoorie ching’ondi chiane, gose tichikoba chigotwarwa buna ching’iti. Ninache ekina ase egati y’eng’ondi na eng’ondi ende." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ninchibekere omorisia oyomo achirisie, nere Daudi, omosomba one. Ere nachirisie, abe omorisia obo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Inche Omonene nimbe Nyasae obo; na Daudi, omosomba one, abe omogambi ase egati yabo. Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ninkore okobwatana kw’omorembe amo nabarabwo. Ninsirie ching’iti chintindi chirue ase ense eyio, na abanto baane mbamenye ase erooro na babe bakorara ase amanani bare nobotoereru." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Nimbasesenie barabwo abanyene, na nigo ndasesenie aase onsi aetanaine egetunwa kiane. Nimbatwerie embura ase chingaki chindonge; embura eyio nebe ey’ogosesenia." 
Ezekiel34:27 Emete y’emegondo inayame amatunda abo, ne riroba ndiame endagera yaye; barabwo abanyene mbamenye ase ense eyio bare nobotoereru. Ekero ndabune amakorogoto arue ase amagoti abo, mbatoorie korwa ase amaboko ay’abwo babakorete abasomba, erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel34:28 Tibagotwarwa buna ching’iti naende nabanto b’ebisaku, gose ching’iti chi’orosana tichikobaria. Mbabe bamenyete bare noborendi obuya, gose onde tari oraboboyie." 
Ezekiel34:29 Nimbamererie ebimeri bibe ogotogigwa okuya; barabwo mbamenye ase ense eyio, na enchara tekobaria ebaite, gose tibakoba bagochaywa nabanto batamomanyeti Nyasae." 
Ezekiel34:30 Barabwo mbamanye ng’a inche Omonene, Nyasae obo, nigo inde amo nabarabwo, naende ng’a Abaisraeli barabwo nabanto baane. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Inwe neching’ondi chiane, ee, nigo more ching’ondi chie riicho riane, inwe nigo more mwanyabanto, na inche nigo inde Nyasae oino. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel35:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, rigereria gochia ase Egetunwa gia Seiri, obane mamincha yaye," 
Ezekiel35:3 ogetebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba:” “Aye Egetunwa gia Seiri, inche nigo inde mamincha yao, nindambore okoboko kwane igoro yao, ngosarie obe bosa." 
Ezekiel35:4 Nintagore emechie yao ebe amaturi, na ebe ense esaregete kegima ere bosa; erio nario oramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel35:5 “Nigo kwagendererete koba nobobisa ime ase enkoro yao igoro y’Abaisraeli, okabarua bagaitwa nemioro ase engaki y’emechando yabo, ekero baikerete engaki y’egesusuro ki’ebibe biabo." 
Ezekiel35:6 Ase ayio, Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, ningotige amanyinga ao aiteke, na ogoiteka okwo kw’amanyinga ao ngokobwatie: aye togecheti ogoiteka kw’amanyinga, ase ayio, ogoiteka kw’amanyinga ao ngokobwatie." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ase enchera eye ninsarie kegima Egetunwa gia Seiri kebe bosa tikemenywa naende, ng’ite kera omonto oyogosoa aroro, na oyogosoka korwao." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ning’ichorie ebitunwa biao nabanto baraitwe nemioro; ee, abwo baraitwe nemioro mbagwe ase ebigoro biao, na ase amakura ao, na ase chindooche chiao." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ninkoonchore ogenderere koba bosa botambe, na emechie yao tekomenywa naende. Erio nario moramanye ng’a ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Aye nigo gwatebete: Ebisaku ebi bibere mbibe ebiane, ne chinse echio ibere chibe echiane, na intwe tochigambere, nonya Omonene omenyeteo." 
Ezekiel35:11 Ase ayio, inche Omonene Nyasae nigo ngoteba iga: Ekeene, buna inche inde moyo, ningokorere koreng’ana nendamwamu yao, ne ribero riao, erio kwaorogetie, ekiagera ogechete Abaisraeli. Ekero ndakonachere ekina, nimanyekane ase egati yabo." 
Ezekiel35:12 Erio nario oramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. Inche naigure amang’ana ao ay’okorama gwakwanire mamincha y’ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, kogoteba: Biasarigwe biabeire bosa, biabekirwe ase amaboko aito tobirie." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ekeene, naigure amang’ana aino amange ay’ogwetogia mwakwanire mamincha yane." 
Ezekiel35:14 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ense yonsi negoke ekero ndagosarie obe bosa. 
Ezekiel35:15 Ekiagera kwagokerete ogosarigwa kw’omwando bw’Abaisraeli, ningosarie aye obe bosa. Ee, ningosarie aye egetunwa gia Seiri obe bosa, aye Edomu engima. Erio nario abanto baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel36:1 “Aye mwanyabanto, bana otebie ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli: Inwe ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene!" 
Ezekiel36:2 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ababisa baino babasekereire, bagoteba: Ahaa! Aase aimokererete igoro a kare ase baare gosasimera abeire aaito." 
Ezekiel36:3 “Ase ayio, bana otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe ebitunwa, ababisa baino babasaririe babatigire bosa, babamerire ase chinsemo chionsi, erinde monyare koba enibo y’ebisaku biatigarete, naende abanto babeire bakobakwana bobe na kobachaya." 
Ezekiel36:4 Ase ayio inwe ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene Nyasae! Aya naro Omonene Nyasae akobatebia inwe ebitunwa, na ebigoro, ne chindooche, na amakura, na amaturi, na emechie eng’anyire na gosakorwa, naende echayire nebisaku bire ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Ee, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba. Ekeene, nakwanire inde ne ribero rigwoka igoro y’ebisaku bitigarete, na igoro y’Abaedomu bonsi, abwo bairire ense yane koba eyabo, bare ne chinkoro chigogete na ebirengererio bi’oboenenu, erinde baserie abanyene ense, na koyesakora." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Aye bana igoro y’ense y’Abaisraeli, otebie ebitunwa, na ebigoro, na amaranya, na amakura, ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora, nakwanire inde ne risemi na ekeririanda, ekiagera mwachandekire ase ogochaywa nabanto b’ebisaku." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Naimokirie okoboko kwane igoro na goteba: Ekeene, abanto abwo b’ebisaku babaetanaine mbachaywe barabwo boka abanyene." 
Ezekiel36:8 Korende inwe ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, mokinie chinsagia, mwame amatunda ase Abaisraeli, abanto baane, ekiagera barabwo babeire ang’e koirana inka sobo." 
Ezekiel36:9 Rora, inche nigo inde ase ensemo yaino, nimbairanere, inwe namoremwe na kobusurwa." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ninsangererie abanto abange bache asemore bamenyeo, ee, Abaisraeli bonsi; emechie yaino nemenywe naende, na amatombe naro naagachwe naende." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ninsangererie gocha asemore abanto abange, ne ching’iti chinyinge. Abanto mbamentekane babuche, ne ching’iti boigo. Nintige momenywe buna engaki eria ya kare, na nimbakorere amaya abuete aria amatang’ani. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel36:12 Nindete Abaisraeli, abanto baane, bataare igoro yaino, mbabaire inwe, na inwe mobe omwando obo. Timokogenderera goita abana babo." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Abanto nigo bagoteba ng’a aye ense nigo okoria abanto, naende gwaitire abana b’egesaku kiao." 
Ezekiel36:14 Ase ayio bono tokogenderera koria abanto, gose goita abana b’egesaku kiao. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel36:15 Tinkogotiga osekererwe nabanto b’ebisaku nonya ng’ake, gose togochaywa nabanto. Aye togotiga egesaku kiao kegwe. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel36:17 “Aye mwanyabanto, ekero Abaisraeli bamenyete ase ense yabo, bakayekora ekaba eyetachenegeti goetera ase chinchera chiabo na ogokora kwabo, ekiagera ogokora kwabo nigo kwabete ase obosio bwane buna ogotacheneka kw’omokungu, ekero are nomotienyi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Nkaumora endamwamu yane asebare, ekiagera baiterete amanyinga ’abanto ase ense eye, na ekiagera bakorete ense ekaba eyetachenegeti ase ogosasima emegwekano." 
Ezekiel36:19 Nkabasiarera gochia ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, bakaba besiarerete ase chinse ao ao. Nkabanachera ekina koreng’ana norogendo rwabo, na ogokora kwabo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Korende aase aande onsi bagendete ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku ebio, nigo bakorete erieta riane richenu rikaba eritachenegeti, na abanto bagakwana igoro yabo, bagateba: Aba nabwo abanto b’Omonene, nonya naboigo baserigwe korwa ase ense eyio yaye." 
Ezekiel36:21 Korende ngechandera erieta riane richenu erio Abaisraeli bagerete rigakorwa rikaba eritachenegeti ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku ebio ase bagendete.” 
Ezekiel36:22 “Ase ayio, tebia Abaisraeli ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe Abaisraeli, tingokora ayio ase engencho yaino, korende nase engencho y’erieta riane richenu, erio mwakorire koba eritachenegeti ase egati y’ebisaku ebio ase mwagendete." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ninchene erieta riane rinene, erio riakoretwe rikaba eritachenegeti ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, erieta erio inwe mwakorete rikaba eritachenegeti ase egati yabo. Ekero ndeorokie ase amaiso abo ng’a nomochenu inde ase egati yaino, erio nario abanto b’ebisaku baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel36:24 Nimbasangererie inwe korwa ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku na korwa ase chinse chionsi, erio mbarente ase ense yaino." 
Ezekiel36:25 Nimbanyororokerie amache amakenonoku, na inwe mocheneke korwa ase ogotacheneka kwaino gwonsi, na korwa ase emegwekano yaino mogosasima. Ee, nimbachene." 
Ezekiel36:26 Nimbae chinkoro chinyia, na mbeke omoika omoyia ime yaino; nindusie korwa ase emebere yaino chinkoro echio chire chinkong’u buna rigena, naende mbae echire chinyororo buna chinyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Nimbeke omoika one ime yaino, erio mbaonchore mobwatie emeroberio yane echikire, morende amachiko aane na moyakore." 
Ezekiel36:28 Inwe momenye ase ense eyio naete chisokoro chiaino; inwe mobe abanto baane, na inche imbe Nyasae oino." 
Ezekiel36:29 Nimbatoorie korwa ase ogotacheneka kwaino gwonsi. Nimbarentere endagera, inyementekanie mono, tingotiga enchara eche asemore." 
Ezekiel36:30 Nimente amatunda ase emete, na emegondo yame chindagera chinyinge, nario abanto b’ebisaku batabaise kobasekerera ase engencho y’enchara." 
Ezekiel36:31 Erio moinyore chinchera chiaino chimbe, na ogokora kwaino gotarenge okuya, mwegeche inwe abanyene ase engencho y’obobe bwaino, na ogokora kwaino gw’okogechia." 
Ezekiel36:32 Inwe Abaisraeli, tingokora amaya ayio ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino; momanye amang’ana ayio buya kegima. Inwe goika mosookigwe ase engencho y’ogokora kwaino. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Ezekiel36:33 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase rituko erio ndabe nabachenire korwa ase ebibe biaino bionsi, nindue ribaga emechie eyio emenywe, na amaagacho ayio atagoretwe aagachwe naende." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ense eyio yatigetwe ere bosa neremwe naende, gose abaeti tibakoyerora egendererete koba bosa." 
Ezekiel36:35 Abanto mbatebe:” “Ense eye yasaretigwe egatigwa ere bosa, bono yabeire buna omogondo o Edeni, na emechie eyio yatagoretwe egatigwa ere amaturi, bono yamenyirwe na kogiterwa chindwaki." 
Ezekiel36:36 Erio abanto b’ebisaku ebio biatigarete bibaetanaine mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene naagachire aase agwo aasaretigwe, naende nasimekire chimbusuro ase emegondo yatigarete ere bosa. Ninche Omonene nakwanire, goika nkore ayio.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ninyanchere Abaisraeli bamborie ng’a mbakorere ayio; mbabuchie babe buna amaicho e ching’ondi. 
Ezekiel36:38 Nimbamentekanie babe abange buna ching’ondi chichenegete chirabe echi’ebing’wanso agwo Yerusalemu, ase engaki y’Amatuko Amanene; barabwo mbaichore ase emechie yatigetwe ere amatombe. Erio nario baramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Okoboko kw’Omonene kogacha igoro yane, na Omonene akang’ira goetera ase Omoika oye, akambeka ase egati ye rikura riaichire amauga." 
Ezekiel37:2 Akang’etia ase egati y’amauga aria, nkarora ng’a nigo arenge amange mono ase rikura riria, naende nkarora ng’a nigo arenge amomo pa." 
Ezekiel37:3 Erio akamboria, “Aye mwanyabanto, amauga aya nanyare koba moyo?” Nkairaneria, nkamotebia: “Aye Omonene Nyasae, naye omanyete.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Naende agantebia, “Banera amauga aya, oyatebie: Inwe amauga amomo, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene!" 
Ezekiel37:5 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae akobatebia inwe amauga: Rora, nimbeke omoika bw’obomoyo ime yaino, na inwe mobe moyo naende." 
Ezekiel37:6 Nimbabekere emeki, mbabekere ne chinyama, nimbatube ne risankwa, naende mbautere omoika bw’obomoyo, na inwe mobe moyo naende. Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Ase ayio nkabana buna Omonene anchigete: na ekero nagendererete kobana, nkaigwa eriogi rinene riarenge negetitiro; amauga ayio agacha amo, riuga rikabwatana neriuga riamwabo." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ekero narigereretie, nkarora emeki egacha igoro y’amauga aria, ne chinyama chikaba ase emeki, ne risankwa rikabituba, korende omoika torenge ime yabo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Naende Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, bana orangerie omoika, bana oyotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye omoika, inchuo korwa ase chimbeo inye chi’ense, erio outere aba iga baitetwe omoika bw’obomoyo, erinde babe moyo naende.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Erio nkabana buna Omonene anchigete. Omoika bw’obomoyo ogasoa ime yabo, barabwo bakaba moyo, bagatenena namagoro abo; nigo barenge omoganda omonene mono." 
Ezekiel37:11 Agwo Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, amauga aya naro egesaku gionsi ki’Abaisraeli. Rora, barabwo nigo bagoteba: Amauga aito omire pa, na ogosemeria gwaito gwasirire; intwe bono twasirigwe kegima." 
Ezekiel37:12 Ase ayio, bana ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe abanto baane, rora, ninyigore chimbeera chiaino, mbarusieo, erinde mbairanie gochia inka, ase ense y’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Inwe abanto baane, ekero ekio ndaigore chimbeera mbarusieo, erio nario moramanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel37:14 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Nimbeke omoika one ime yaino, na inwe mobe moyo. Nimbarente, mbabeke ase ense yaino. Erio momanye ng’a ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio, boigo nayakorire.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel37:16 “Aye mwanyabanto, imokia enyimbo oyerike: Ase Abayuda na ase Abaisraeli abwo babwatanire nabarabwo. Naende imokia enyimbo ende oyerike: Ase enyomba ya Yusufu (nero eya Efraimu) na ase Abaisraeli bonsi babwatanire nenyomba eyio." 
Ezekiel37:17 Chinyimbo echio ochibwatanie amo chibe enyimbo eyemo ere ase okoboko kwao. 
Ezekiel37:18 Ekero abanto bamino barakoborie iga: Inee! Nototebie engencho gwakorera iga? 
Ezekiel37:19 Obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Rora, ninyimokie enyimbo y’enyomba ya Yusufu (eyio ere ase okoboko gwa Efraimu) amo nebisaku bi’Abaisraeli, ebio biabwatanire nero; erio inyebwateranie amo nenyimbo y’Abayuda, erinde chibe enyimbo eyemo ere ase okoboko kwane." 
Ezekiel37:20 “Chinyimbo echio orabe kwarikire ochibwate ase okoboko kwao agwo ase amaiso ’abanto. 
Ezekiel37:21 Erio obatebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Naama! Nindusie Abaisraeli korwa ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku agwo ase bairetwe, mbasangererie korwa ase chinsemo chionsi, mbarente ase ense yabo." 
Ezekiel37:22 Nimbakore babe egesaku ekemo ase ense eyio, agwo ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli. Omoruoti oyomo nabe okogambera bonsi. Tibakogenderera koba ebisaku bibere, gose gwatananeka babe amaruoti abere." 
Ezekiel37:23 Tibakogenderera gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogosasima emegwekano yabo, gose ase ogokora kwabo gw’okogechia, gose ase ogosaria kwabo konde gwonsi. Nimbatoorie korwa ase obomenyo bwabo bwonsi agwo aase bakorerete ebibe, nimbachene. Erio mbabe abanto baane, na inche nimbe Nyasae obo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Daudi, omosomba one, nere orabe omoruoti obo, na barabwo mbabe nomorisia oyomo, mbabwatie emeroberio yane echikire, naende babwate amachiko aane na koyakora." 
Ezekiel37:25 Mbamenye ase ense eyio chisokoro chiabo chiamenyete, eyio naete Yakobo, omosomba one. Barabwo mbamenyeo, boigo na abana babo, na abachokoro, na abachokororia, goika kare na kare; na Daudi, omosomba one, nere orabe omogambi obo goika kare na kare." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ninkore okobwatana kw’omorembe amo nabarabwo; okwo nigo korabe ogwa kare na kare. Nimbabeke aroro, mbamentekanie. Nimbeke Obomenyo bwane Obochenu bobe ase egati yabo kogenderera botambe." 
Ezekiel37:27 Obomenyo bwane mbobe amo nabarabwo, na inche nimbe Nyasae obo, na barabwo mbabe abanto baane." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ekero Obomenyo bwane Obochenu boragenderere kobeera amo n’Abaisraeli kogenderera botambe, erio abanto b’ebisaku mbamanye ng’a inche Omonene nigo ngochena Abaisraeli.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Ezekiel38:2 “Aye mwanyabanto, onchoka origererie Gogi bw’ense ya Magogi, oyore omogambi bw’ense ya Rosi, na eya Meseki, na eya Tubali, obane mamincha yaye," 
Ezekiel38:3 omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye Gogi, omogambi omonene bw’ense ya Rosi, na eya Meseki, na eya Tubali, inche nigo inde mamincha yao." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ninkoonchore gochia nyuma, ning’agie ebigobanio ase chintakunero chiao erinde nkorente aye amo nabarwani bao bonsi b’esegi, ne chibarasi, na abariini be chibarasi, bonsi ababogoretie ebirwanero bi’esegi; omoganda oyio omonene nigo orabe obogoretie ching’aya, ne chinguba, na emioro." 
Ezekiel38:5 Abarwani b’Ayemi, na aba Etiopia, na aba Libia, mbabe amo nabarabwo; bonsi mbabe babogoretie chinguba na ebigogwa b’ebioma." 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeri amo nomoganda oye bwonsi bw’esegi, na egesaku gia Togarima kemenyete aare, ensemo ya sugusu, amo nemeganda yaye yonsi, ee, abanto abange mbache amo naye." 
Ezekiel38:7 Eariganie, bwebeke ang’e, aye amo nomoganda oyio osangererekanire asore. Aye obe omoraai obo." 
Ezekiel38:8 Nyuma y’amatuko amange noche korootwa naende. Ase emiaka egochi‐gocha nogende ase ense eria yarenge nesegi, korende bono nigo ere nobotoereru, ense eria ase abanto basangereretigwe korwa ase ebisaku ebinge, agwo ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli biarenge bigendererete koba bosa botambe. Abanto bonsi b’aroro nigo barentetwe korwa ase ebisaku ao ao, na bono nao bamenyete bare nomorembe." 
Ezekiel38:9 Aye notiire, obachiere buna ekembugu‐mbugu, obe buna riire otube ense, aye na emeganda yao yonsi, na abanto abange bare amo naye." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase engaki eyio aye nigo orabe nemeroberio ase ebirengererio biao, oraroberie gokora ayare amabe." 
Ezekiel38:11 Aye nigo oratebe iga: Ngochiera inde ense ere nemechie etagiteiri chindwaki; ning’umokere abanto abwo begaarete bare nobotoereru; bonsi nigo bamenyeteo bategitereti chindwaki, tibabwati ebiita gose emekorogoto egosieka." 
Ezekiel38:12 Norengererie gochia gosakora na kwenyorera ebinto ase okorambora okoboko kwao gochia aase arenge bosa na bono amenyirwe nabanto. Ee, norambore okoboko kwao gochia ase abanto basangereretigwe korwa ase ebisaku ao ao, na bono mbabwate chitugo na ebinto ebinge, agwo ase bamenyete egati‐gati y’ense." 
Ezekiel38:13 Erio abanto ba Seba, na aba Dedani, na abaonchoreria ba Tarisisi, amo nabatang’ani babo bonsi banga chindo chinsae mbakoborie: Nigo gwachire gwosa na gosakora? Inee! Nigo gwasangereirie emeganda yao gocha koira ebisakorwa, buna chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitugo, na ebinto, erinde oire ebisakorwa ebinge?" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Ase ayio, aye mwanyabanto, bana otebie Gogi ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase engaki eyio Abaisraeli, abanto baane, mbabe bamenyete ase obotoereru, nario oramanye amang’ana ayio." 
Ezekiel38:15 Erio noche korwa aase ao, agwo sugusu y’aare; nigo orache amo nabanto abange, bonsi bariinete chibarasi, bare omoganda omonene ore nabarwani esegi abange." 
Ezekiel38:16 Aye Gogi, nochiche korwania Abaisraeli, abanto baane. Noche buna riire otube ense eyio. Ase amatuko agochigocha ninkorente orwanie ense yaane, erinde abanto b’ebisaku bamanye inche, ekero ndeorokie ase amaiso abo ng’a inche inde omochenu ase egati yaino." 
Ezekiel38:17 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye naye omonto oria nakwanete igoro yao ase chingaki chia kare goetera ase abasomba baane ababani b’Abaisraeli; barabwo bakaba bakobana emiaka ase emiaka ng’a ninkorente orwanie Abaisraeli. 
Ezekiel38:18 “Korende ase rituko erio Gogi arache korwania ense y’Abaisraeli, endamwamu yane entindi inayoke buna omorero. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel38:19 Nakwanire inde nerisemi na ekeririanda kenga omorero ng’a ekeene ase rituko erio omotengecho omonene nobe ase ense y’Abaisraeli. 
Ezekiel38:20 Erio chinswe chire nyancha, ne chinyoni chia igoro, ne ching’iti chire ase ense, na chionsi echikwagura ase riroba, nchitengechigwe ase obosio bwane, amo nabanto bare ase ense. Ebitunwa mbitegoke bigwe inse amo nebitare, na kera oboagacho mbogwe inse." 
Ezekiel38:21 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Nindete omoro orwanie Gogi agwo ase ebitunwa biane bionsi, erio kera omonto aite oyomwabo nomoro." 
Ezekiel38:22 Nimonachere ekina goetera ase oborwaire bogoita, na ogoiteka kw’amanyinga; nindete igoro yaye, na igoro y’emeganda yaye y’esegi, na abanto abange bare amo nere, embura ere nomoubera, na amagena are nomorero mbibaite." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ninyeorokie ng’a inche nomonene na omochenu; ninyemanyekanie ase amasio ’ebisaku ebinge. Erio abanto mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene. 
Ezekiel39:1 “Aye mwanyabanto, bana igoro ya Gogi, omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Aye Gogi, rora, inche nigo inde mamincha yao, aye omogambi omonene bw’ense ya Rosi, na eya Meseki, na eya Tubali." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ninkoonchore na gokoraa korwa sugusu y’aare mono, nkorente ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Aroro agwo ning’ake obota bore ase okoboko kwao gw’okobee bogwe inse, ne chinsara chire ase okoboko kwao gw’okorio chigwe inse boigo." 
Ezekiel39:4 Nokwere igoro ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli, aye amo nemeganda yao yonsi y’esegi, na abanto abwo bare amo naye. Erio nindangerie chinyoni chia kera egesaku, ne ching’iti chi’orosana, chiche chirie chinyama chi’emebere yaino." 
Ezekiel39:5 Inwe nigo morakwere ase egetii aarabu, ekiagera ninche Omonene Nyasae nakwanire ayio." 
Ezekiel39:6 Nintome omorero osambe ense ya Magogi amo nabanto abwo begaarete bare nobotoereru, agwo ase ebisinka na ase chinse chire ang’e nenyancha. Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ase ayio nindigererie ng’a erieta riane richenu ndimanyekane ase egati y’Abaisraeli, abanto baane; tingotiga erieta riane rigenderere gokorwa eritachenegeti. Erio abanto b’ebisaku mbamanye ng’a ninche Omonene, oyore Omochenu bw’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 “Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: Rora, amang’ana ayio ngocha are, aikeranigwe ase rituko riria nakwanete ng’a ayio nabe." 
Ezekiel39:9 Erio abanto abamenyete ase emechie y’Abaisraeli mbagende basangererie ebirwanero; chinguba, ne ching’aya, na amata, ne chinsara, ne chisimisi, na amatimo, babikore chinko bagoutera omorero ase engaki y’emiaka etano na ebere." 
Ezekiel39:10 Ase engaki eyio Abaisraeli tibakogenda orosana gotenya chinko, gose gotema emete ase amanani. Ebirwanero ebio mbibe chinko chiabo bagoutera omorero. Barabwo mbasakore ebinto bi’abwo babasakorete, na baure abwo babaurete chinibo chiabo. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Ase rituko erio nindue Rigoko ri’Abaeti rire moocha y’enyancha, agwo ase ense y’Abaisraeli, erinde Gogi amo nemeganda yaye yonsi batindekwe aroro. Ase ayio ase rigoko erio chimbeera nchitange abaeti. Nigo rirarokwe Rigoko ri’Emeganda ya Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Abaisraeli mbaire emetienyi etano na ebere ase okobatindeka, erinde bachene ense eyio." 
Ezekiel39:13 Abanto bonsi b’ense eyio mbagenderere kobatindeka, na ayio abe ogotogigwa kwabo. Aya nigo arakoreke ase rituko riria ndaorokie obonene bwane. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Ezekiel39:14 Nyuma emetienyi etano na ebere koyaerire mbachore abanto barabe bakona‐goeta aase aande onsi ase ense eyio babe bakorigia abwo bakwete batigarete riroba igoro, na abande babe bakobatindeka ase ogochena ense eyio." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ekero abwo bakorigia abakwete, barabe bagoeta ase ense eyio, kobaranyore riuga ri’omonto okwete, goika batenenie ekemanyererio aroro goika abwo bagotindeka bachie koritindeka ase Rigoko ri’Emeganda ya Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Boigo omochie orabeo norokwe Hamona. Ase enchera eyio mbachene ense eyio. 
Ezekiel39:17 “Aye mwanyabanto, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Kwana na kera egesaku gie chinyoni na egie ching’iti chi’orosana, ochitebie: Esangererie, moche amo korwa ase chinsemo chionsi, mochiche ase omoyega omonene bw’ekeng’wanso nabaroiseirie. Oyio nigo orabe omoyega omonene bw’ekeng’wanso igoro ase ebitunwa bi’Abaisraeli; inwe imorie chinyama, monywe na amanyinga." 
Ezekiel39:18 Imorie chinyama chi’abarwani esegi bare ne chinguru, na monywe amanyinga ’abagambi b’ense, abwo banga buna chimingichi, ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi, ne chimbori, ne chieri, chionsi chire chinoru chia Basani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Imorie ebitinya goika moigote kegima, naende monywe amanyinga goika motinde; ekiagera oyio nomoyega bw’ekeng’wanso nabaroiseirie." 
Ezekiel39:20 Agwo ase emesa yane imorie chinyama chie chibarasi, na echi’abanto chituoni, na echi’abarwani bonsi b’esegi, erinde moigote kegima. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel39:21 “Inche ning’orokie obonene bwane ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, erinde abwo bonsi barore ekina nanachire, na buna okoboko kwane gokorua egesusuro ase ababisa baane." 
Ezekiel39:22 Ase rituko erio na kogenderera botambe, Abaisraeli mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae obo." 
Ezekiel39:23 Abanto b’ebisaku mbamanye ng’a Abaisraeli nigo bairetwe ase obosomba ase engencho y’obobe bwabo, ekiagera tibabete abegenwa asende. Ase ayio inche nkabisa obosio bwane korwa asebare, erio nkabarua nkababeka ase amaboko ’ababisa babo, na bonsi bagaitwa nemioro." 
Ezekiel39:24 Nigo nabakorerete ayio koreng’ana nogotacheneka kwabo, na ogosaria kwabo, naende nkabisa obosio bwane korwa asebare." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Bono ning’iranie abooswa ba Yakobo; nindorere egesaku gionsi ki’Abaisraeli amabera; nimbe ne risemi ase erieta riane richenu." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ekero Abaisraeli baramenye ase ense eyio bare nobotoereru, na monto onde takoboboyia, erio mbabwatwe nobosooku ase engencho y’ogosaria gwonsi bakorete." 
Ezekiel39:27 Ayio nigo arabe ekero ndabasangererie mbarusie korwa ase egati y’abanto, na korwa ase chinse chi’ababisa babo. Goetera asebare ninyeorokie ase amasio ’abanto b’ebisaku ng’a inche nomochenu inde." 
Ezekiel39:28 Erio mbamanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene Nyasae obo, ekiagera ninche nabaruete bakairwa ase obosomba bamenye ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku; naende ninche ndabasangererie na kobairania ase ense yabo. Tingotiga nonya nomonto oyomo obo agenderere kobeera ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku ebio." 
Ezekiel39:29 Bono tinkobisa obosio bwane naende korwa asebare. Ning’umore omoika one igoro y’Abaisraeli. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.” 
Ezekiel40:1 Ase omwaka bw’emerongo ebere, na etano, bw’okong’anyigwa gwaito, ase omochakano bw’omwaka, ase rituko ria ikomi ri’omotienyi, ase omwaka o ikomi na kane nyuma omochie kobuirwe, ee, ase rituko riria riria okoboko kw’Omonene gokaba igoro yane gokang’ira aaria." 
Ezekiel40:2 Erio ase okorora naetwe na Nyasae, ere akang’ira gochia ase ense y’Abaisraeli, akambeka igoro ase egetunwa egetambe mono. Aroro agwo nkarora egento kenga oboagacho bw’omochie ore ensemo ya irianyi." 
Ezekiel40:3 Omonene akang’ira aase agwo, nkarora omonto, na okororekana kwaye nigo kwarenge buna ogw’etaai; omonto oyio nigo abwate engori y’egatani na emoti y’okorengera ase okoboko kwaye; ere nigo ateneine ang’e negeita." 
Ezekiel40:4 Omonto oria agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, rigereria orore namaiso ao, na otegerere oigwe namato ao, naende orengererie mono igoro y’aya onsi ngochia gokworokia, ekiagera aye nigo kwarentirwe aase aiga, erinde nkworokie amang’ana ayio. Amang’ana ayio onsi orarore, oyatebie Abaisraeli.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Nkarora orwaki rwaetanaine eraaro y’enyomba eria chinsemo chionsi. Emoti yarenge ase okoboko kw’omonto oria nigo yarenge nobotambe bw’amaboko atano na rimo, na kera ekerengo gi’okoboko gekamentwa eki’egesanyi ekemo. Omonto oria akarenga orwaki. Obogare bwaye bokaba emoti eyemo, na obotambe bwaye gochia igoro emoti eyemo." 
Ezekiel40:6 Naende akagenda ase egeita kiarochie moocha, akariinera ekeriinero kiaye. Erio akarenga obogare bw’egesona inse agwo ase oboagacho bw’egeita, bokaba emoti eyemo." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ebinyomba bi’oborendi mbiarengeo, kera akamo nigo karenge nobotambe bw’emoti eyemo, na obo gare bw’emoti eyemo boigo. Ribaga eriarenge gati‐gati y’ebinyomba ebio nigo riarenge ri’obotambe bw’amaboko atano, na ekerengo ki’egesona ki’oboagacho bw’egeita nigo kiarenge eki’emoti eyemo." 
Ezekiel40:8 Boigo akarenga ensemo y’egesona ime, nero ekaba ey’ekerengo ki’emoti eyemo." 
Ezekiel40:9 Boigo akarenga obogare bw’egesona keria, borobwo bokaba obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano na atato, ne chisiiro chiaye nigo chiarenge echi’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere. Egesona keria nigo kiarochie ase enyomba." 
Ezekiel40:10 Oboagacho obwo bw’egeita kia moocha nigo bwarenge nebinyomba bi’oborendi, bitato ensemo eyemo, na bitato ensemo ende; bionsi nigo biarenge nekerengo ekemo, ne chisiiro chie chinsemo chionsi ibere nigo chiarenge echi’ekerengo ekemo." 
Ezekiel40:11 Naende akarenga obogare bw’egeita kia ime, naborobwo bokaba obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi, na obotambe bw’egesoero bokaba obw’amaboko ikomi na atato." 
Ezekiel40:12 Orosenge ndwarenge bosio bw’ebinyomba biria bi’oborendi, na obogare bw’egesona keria nigo bwarenge obw’okoboko okomo. Ebisona bi’ebinyomba ebio bie chinsemo chionsi ibere nigo biareng’aine. Kera akanyomba nigo karenge nobogare bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano na rimo, na obotambe bwaye boigo." 
Ezekiel40:13 Naende akarenga obotambe korwa ase akanyomba akamo goika ase akande karenge ensemo ende y’egesoero. Obotambe obwo bokaba obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano. Ebisieri bi’ebinyomba ebio nigo biachikaine. 
Ezekiel40:14 Akarenga chindwaro chie chisiiro chiarenge ase chinsemo ibere ime y’egesoero, na obotambe obwo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano nomo, na isiko goetanana chisiiro echio amabaga narengeo." 
Ezekiel40:15 Obotambe korwa ase oboagacho bw’egeita gia isiko gochia ase obw’egeita kia ime nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano. 
Ezekiel40:16 Ebibao biasiekeire ebitange nigo biarenge ase chinyasi chi’ebinyomba biria bi’oborendi, na ase emetobwa yabo, ne chinsemo chionsi chi’oboagacho obwo, ne chisiiro nigo chiachabeire nemegwekano y’emekendo." 
Ezekiel40:17 Omonto oria akang’ira goika ase eraaro ya isiko yatichire inse namagena ase chinsemo chionsi, na aroro agwo nkarora ebinyomba emerongo etato biaagachire igoro y’amagena ayio." 
Ezekiel40:18 Obogare bw’aase aria atichire nigo bwareng’aine nobwe rikere ri’amaagacho are biita. Aase aria atichire nigo arenge aase are inse. 
Ezekiel40:19 Naende akarenga obotambe korwa ase oboagacho bw’egeita gia inse gochia ase obw’egeita ki’eraaro ya ime, naborobwo bokaba obw’amaboko rigana erimo. Ekerengo gi’ensemo ya moocha na eya sugusu nigo biareng’aine." 
Ezekiel40:20 Naende akagenda ase oboagacho bware geita ki’eraaro ya isiko kiarochie sugusu, na akarenga obotambe na obogare bwaye." 
Ezekiel40:21 Ebinyomba bi’oborendi ebiarenge ime y’oboagacho boria, bitato ase ensemo eyemo, na bitato ase ensemo ende, ne chisiiro, na egesona, nigo biareng’aine nebi’oboagacho bware geita kie ritang’ani. Obotambe bw’oboagacho boria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano, na obogare bwaye nobw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ebibao biaye, na egesoero kiaye, na emegwekano eria y’emekendo, bionsi ebio nigo biareng’aine na biria bi’oboagacho bware geita kiarochie moocha. Ekeriinero kiare nebitambokero bitano na bibere nkiarengeo kiare koriinerwa gochiao, na egesona kiaye nigo kiarenge ime y’oboagacho obwo." 
Ezekiel40:23 Kororia ase oboagacho obwo bwa geita gia sugusu, oboagacho bonde mbwarengeo bw’egeita kiare gosoerwa gochia ase eraaro ya ime. Obwo nabwo bwareng’aine noboagacho bw’egeita kiarochie moocha. Akarenga obotambe korwa ase oboagacho bonde goika ase obonde, bokaba obw’amaboko rigana erimo." 
Ezekiel40:24 Omonto oria akang’ira gochia ase ensemo ya irianyi, na aroro nkarora oboagacho bware geita. Akarenga chisiiro chiaye na egesoero kiaye, na ebirengo ebio nigo biarenge buna ebi’ebinde." 
Ezekiel40:25 Ebibao nigo biarenge ase oboagacho obwo ase chinsemo chionsi, na ase egesona kiaye, nabirobio nigo biareng’aine nebinde. Obotambe bw’oboagacho boria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano, na obogare bwaye obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano." 
Ezekiel40:26 Ekeriinero kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na bibere nkiarengeo kiare koriinerwa gochiao; egesona kiaye nigo kiarenge ime y’oboagacho obwo. Emegwekano y’emekendo nigo yachabeire ase chisiiro chiaye chiarenge ase chinsemo ibere. 
Ezekiel40:27 Agwo ase ensemo ya irianyi oboagacho mbwarengeo bware negeita kegosoerwa goika ase eraaro ya ime. Akarenga obotambe korwa ase oboagacho bonde goika ase obonde, bokaba obw’amaboko rigana erimo." 
Ezekiel40:28 Omonto oria akang’ira ase eraaro ya ime goetera ase oboagacho bware geita ase ensemo ya irianyi, akaborenga, naborobwo nigo bwareng’aine nayande." 
Ezekiel40:29 Ebinyomba biaye bi’oborendi, ne chisiiro, na egesona, nigo biareng’aine nebi’amaagacho ande. Boigo ebibao mbiarengeo ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi, na ase egesona. Obotambe bw’oboagacho boria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano, na obogare bwaye obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano." 
Ezekiel40:30 Ebisona nigo biarenge ase chinsemo chionsi; obotambe bwabo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano, na obogare bwabo obw’amaboko atano." 
Ezekiel40:31 Egesona kiaye kiarochie ase eraaro ya isiko, na emegwekano y’emekendo nigo yachabeire ase chisiiro chiaye, na ekeriinero kiaye nigo kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na bitato biare koriinerwa gochiao." 
Ezekiel40:32 Naende akang’ira ase eraaro ya ime goetera ase oboagacho bware geita ensemo ya moocha, akaborenga, naborobwo nigo bwareng’aine nayande." 
Ezekiel40:33 Ebinyomba biaye bi’oborendi, ne chisiiro, na egesona, nigo biareng’aine nebi’amaagacho ande. Boigo ebibao mbiarengeo ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi, na ase egesona. Obotambe bw’oboagacho boria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano, na obogare bwaye obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano." 
Ezekiel40:34 Egesona kiaye nigo kiarochie ase eraaro ya isiko, na emegwekano y’emekendo nigo yachabeire ase chisiiro chiaye chiarenge ase chinsemo ibere, na ekeriinero kiaye nigo kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na bitato biare koriinerwa gochiao." 
Ezekiel40:35 Erio akang’ira ase oboagacho bware geita ase ensemo ya sugusu, akaborenga; naborobwo nigo bwareng’aine nayande." 
Ezekiel40:36 Ebinyomba biaye bi’oborendi, ne chisiiro, na egesona, nigo biareng’aine nebi’amaagacho ande. Ebibao nigo biarenge ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi. Obotambe bw’oboagacho boria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano, na obogare bwaye obw’amaboko emerongo ebere na atano." 
Ezekiel40:37 Chisiiro chiaye nigo chiarochie ase eraaro ya isiko, na emegwekano y’emekendo nigo yachabeire ase chisiiro chiria chiarenge ase chinsemo ibere, na ekeriinero kiaye nigo kiarenge nebitambokero bitano na bitato biare koriinerwa gochiao." 
Ezekiel40:38 Ebinyomba mbiarengeo amo nebisieri biabo ang’e ne chisiiro agwo ase amaagacho onsi arenge nebiita; agwo nao ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa biarenge gosiberigwa. 
Ezekiel40:39 Agwo ase rikere ri’oboagacho obwo ime, chimesa ibere nchiarengeo ase kera ensemo. Igoro ase chimesa echio nao ching’iti chi’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’ebibe, na ebi’okomocha, biarenge konyenyerwa." 
Ezekiel40:40 Naende chimesa chinde ibere nchiarenge agwo isiko ase baare gotiirera gochia ase egeita kia ime ki’oboagacho bwarochie sugusu; boigo ase ensemo ende y’egesoero ekio nchiarengeo chimesa chinde ibere. 
Ezekiel40:41 Chimesa echio chionsi ase ebing’wanso biarenge konyenyerwa nigo chiarenge isano na isato, inye nigo chiarenge ase rikere erimo ri’oboagacho, na inye ase rikere rinde." 
Ezekiel40:42 Naende nchiarengeo chimesa inye ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa chiaroisirie korwa ase amagena abaachire. Igoro yabo nao ebinto biarenge gokorerwa emeremo ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde, biarenge kogachwa. Obotambe bwa kera emesa nigo bwarenge obw’okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese, na obogare bw’okoboko okomo na ekeng’ese boigo, na obotambe gochia igoro nigo bwarenge obw’okoboko okomo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Ase omogo o kera emesa ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi, ebigobanio mbiarengeo; obotambe bwa kera ekemo nigo bwarenge buna obogare bw’egesanyi gi’okoboko; na igoro ye chimesa echio nao chinyama chi’ebing’wanso chiarenge kobekererwa." 
Ezekiel40:44 Isiko y’oboagacho bw’egeita kia ime gochia ase eraaro ya ime, ebinyomba bibere bi’abateri mbiarengeo, akamo kaare ang’e negeita gia sugusu karochie irianyi, na akande ensemo y’egeita kia moocha karochie sugusu." 
Ezekiel40:45 Omonto oria agantebia, “Akanyomba aka karochie irianyi nak’abakuani bagokora emeremo ase Hekalu," 
Ezekiel40:46 na akwo karochie sugusu nak’abakuani bagokora emeremo ase egesasimero. Aba nab’ororeria rwa Zadoki, abwo boka korwa ase ororeria rwa Lawi bancheire gocha ang’e ase Omonene komokorera emeremo.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 Naende omonto oria akarenga eraaro ya ime; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko rigana erimo, na obogare bwaye boigo; egesasimero nigo kiarenge bosio bwe Hekalu." 
Ezekiel40:48 Erio akang’ira ase egesona gie Hekalu, akarenga emetobwa yabekireo, na kera oyomo okaba obogare bw’amaboko atano. Obogare bw’egeita nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atato ensemo eyemo, na atato ensemo ende." 
Ezekiel40:49 Obogare bw’egesona ekio nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ebere, na obotambe bwaye gochia ime obw’amaboko ikomi na rimo. Nkiarengeo ekeriinero kiare koriinerwa gochiao. Ase kera ensemo bosio bw’emetobwa eria, chisiiro nchiarengeo." 
Ezekiel41:1 Erio omonto oria akang’ira ase Hekalu, akarenga emetobwa; obogare bwabo bokaba obw’amaboko atano na rimo kera ensemo, koreng’ana nobogare bwe Hekalu." 
Ezekiel41:2 Obogare bw’egesieri nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ikomi, na obwe chinyasi nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano kera ensemo. Boigo akarenga Aase Aachenu; obotambe bwaye bokaba obw’amaboko emerongo ene, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo ebere." 
Ezekiel41:3 Naende akagenda ase akanyomba kaime. Erio akarenga emetobwa y’egesieri, na obogare bwabo bokaba obw’amaboko abere. Akarenga na egesieri, gekaba ekerengo ki’amaboko atano na rimo, na obogare bwaye amaboko atano na abere." 
Ezekiel41:4 Akarenga obotambe bw’akanyomba karia kare moino y’Aase Aachenu, bokaba obw’amaboko emerongo ebere, na obogare bwaye bokaba amaboko emerongo ebere boigo. Omonto oria agantebia, “Aiga nao Aase Aachenu Mono.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Naende akarenga enyasi ye Hekalu; obonetu bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano na rimo, na obogare bw’ebinyomba biaetanaine Hekalu nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko ane." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ebinyomba ebio biaetanaine Hekalu nigo biarenge namarongo atato, kera rirongo nigo riabwate ebinyomba emerongo etato. Ebitambokero nigo biachomeranirie ase enyasi ye Hekalu, erinde emeriibo y’ebinyomba biria egatoorera aroro, tiyasoete ase enyasi eria ime." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ebinyomba biria biaetanaine Hekalu nigo biaagachetwe iga: Ebia inse nigo biarenge ebinyerere, korende ebia gati‐gati na ebia igoro bikagareigwa kobwatia ebitambokero biria. Ase rikere rie Hekalu ebiriinero mbiarengeo ebiare koriinerwa gochia ase rirongo ria gatato goetera ase eria kabere." 
Ezekiel41:8 Nkarora oboroso bwaetanaine Hekalu bwatichire; obotambe bw’oboroso boria bw’ebinyomba biria biaagachire amo, nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano na rimo gochia igoro." 
Ezekiel41:9 Obonetu bw’enyasi ya isiko y’ebinyomba biria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko atano, na ensemo y’oboroso boria yasogete isiko yatigetwe nigo yarenge nobogare bw’obotambe bw’amaboko atano." 
Ezekiel41:10 Gati‐gati y’oboroso boria bwatichire na ebinyomba biaagachire ao bioka, ribaga ndiarengeo eri’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo ebere riaetanaine Hekalu." 
Ezekiel41:11 Ebisieri biarenge gosoerwa ase ebinyomba biria; ekemo nigo kiarochie ase ensemo ya sugusu, na ekende ensemo ya irianyi. Obogare boria bwatigarete bosa botaagachiri nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Ezekiel41:12 Oboagacho obwarenge ao, ensemo ya bosongo, nigo bwarenge nobogare bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano na ebere. Obonetu bw’enyasi yonsi y’enyomba eria nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko atano, na obotambe bwaye amaboko emerongo kianda." 
Ezekiel41:13 Naboigo omonto oria akarenga Hekalu eria; obotambe bwaye bokaba obw’amaboko rigana erimo, na obotambe bw’egoora na oboagacho bwarenge ao amo ne chindwaki chiaye bokaba amaboko rigana erimo." 
Ezekiel41:14 Obogare bwa bosio bwe Hekalu ensemo ya moocha, amo neraaro nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo." 
Ezekiel41:15 Akarenga obotambe bw’enyomba yaagachire magega amo nebisona biaye biarochie ase chinsemo ibere, bokaba nekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo. Boigo akarenga Aase Aachenu Mono, ne chinyomba chinde chiare ime y’eraaro." 
Ezekiel41:16 Boigo omonto oria akarenga emeriibo ya inse y’ebisieri, na ebibao biasiekeire ebioma, na ebisona bi’amarongo atato bi’enyomba, na emeriibo y’ebisieri igoro yatubire ne chibao, na obotambe korwa inse goika ase ebibao. Ebibao ebio nigo biarenge bitubire." 
Ezekiel41:17 Igoro y’ebisieri na ime y’enyomba, na isiko, ne chinyasi chionsi ime na isiko, mbiabwate ebirengo biabo." 
Ezekiel41:18 Emegwekano y’abakerubi na ey’emekendo iyarengeo. Ase kera egati y’abakerubi, omokendo norengeo, na kera omokerubi nigo arenge namasio abere;" 
Ezekiel41:19 obosio bw’omonto bokarigereria omokendo ensemo eyemo, na obw’endo bokarigereria omokendo ensemo ende. Emegwekano eyio nigo yaroisirie ase enyomba yonsi." 
Ezekiel41:20 Emegwekano eyio y’abakerubi na ey’emekendo nigo yachabeire korwa inse goika ase egesieri igoro ase enyasi ye Hekalu ime. 
Ezekiel41:21 Emetobwa y’ebisieri nigo yareng’aine obogare na obotambe, boigo na bosio bw’Aase Aachenu Mono." 
Ezekiel41:22 Egesasimero kiaroisirie korwa ase chibao nkiarengeo; obotambe bwaye gochia igoro nobw’amaboko atato, na obotambe bwaye amaboko abere. Nigo kiarenge ne chikoona ne chinterekerero, ne chinyasi, chionsi nigo chiaroisirie korwa ase chibao. Omonto oria agantebia: “Eye nemesa ere ase obosio bw’Omonene.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Aase Aachenu amo n’Aase Aachenu Mono nigo abwate emerangwa ebere. 
Ezekiel41:24 Kera egesieri nigo kiarenge nemerangwa ebere yare koigorwa korwa gati‐gati, yaringanigwa kera oyomo gochia ase ensemo yaye." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ase omorangwa bw’Aase Aachenu emegwekano y’abakerubi na ey’emekendo nigo yachabeire aroro yagwekaine eria yarenge ase chinyasi. Ekerama gie chibao nigo kiarenge bosio bw’egesona isiko. 
Ezekiel41:26 Agwo ase chinyasi chi’egesona, na echi’ebinyomba biaagachire ase amakere ensemo na ensemo, ebibao biasiekeire ebioma na emegwekano y’emekendo mbiarengeo." 
Ezekiel42:1 Omonto oria akang’ira ase eraaro ya isiko erochie sugusu, na akang’ira ase enyomba rirondo yanachanire ebinyomba yarenge gati y’aase atigire ataagachire na oboagacho bwa sugusu." 
Ezekiel42:2 Obotambe bw’enyomba eria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko rigana erimo, na obogare bwaye amaboko emerongo etano, na egesoero nigo kiarochie sugusu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Korwa aase atigire ataagachire arenge nobogare bw’amaboko emerongo ebere gochia ase eraaro ya isiko yatichire namagena, ebitambokero mbiarengeo biare gotirimbokerwa gochia ase amarongo atato ay’enyomba eria." 
Ezekiel42:4 Bosio bw’ebinyomba biria aase arenge goeterwa narengeo; obogare bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi, na obotambe bwaye amaboko rigana erimo. Ebisieri bi’ebinyomba biria nigo biarochie sugusu." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ebinyomba bia igoro nigo biarenge ebieng’e gochia ime kobua biria binde, ebia gati na ebia inse." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ebinyomba ebio biaagachetwe ase rirongo ria gatato tibiabwate chisiiro buna chigoora. Ase ayio ebinyomba bia igoro nigo biarenge ebieng’e gochia ime kobua ebia inse na ebia gati. 
Ezekiel42:7 Orwaki ndwarenge mbarabare y’ebinyomba biria rwarochie gochia ase eraaro ya isiko. Obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano. 
Ezekiel42:8 Obotambe bw’ebinyomba biarochie ase eraaro ya isiko nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano, na obotambe bw’ebio biarenge ang’e ne Hekalu amaboko rigana erimo." 
Ezekiel42:9 Inse y’ebinyomba ebio, ensemo ya moocha egesoero nkiarengeo ase omonto aranyare gosoera korwa ase eraaro ya isiko." 
Ezekiel42:10 Enyomba eria rirondo yanachanire ebinyomba yarenge ang’e norwaki oronetu rwarenge irianyi, egati y’aase atigire ataagachire na oboagacho bwa irianyi." 
Ezekiel42:11 Bosio bw’ebinyomba ebio aase arenge goeterwa narengeo. Ebinyomba ebio nigo biareng’aine na biria biarenge ensemo ya sugusu. Obotambe bwabo na obogare nigo bwarenge buna obw’ebio. Aase abo onsi arenge goeterwa nigo areng’aine buna aase aria aande, na emeroberio ende yonsi amo nebisieri nigo biarenge buna emeroberio eria ende." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ebisieri biabo nigo biarenge buna ebi’ebinyomba bia sugusu. Egesieri nkiarenge ase omochakano bw’aase aria arenge goeterwa, engencho yaye aase arenge ensemo ya moocha ang’e norwaki ase omonto aranyare goetera." 
Ezekiel42:13 Omonto oria agantebia, “Ebinyomba ebio bire ensemo ya sugusu, na ebia irianyi, kororia aase atigire ataagachiri, ebio nebichenu. Abakuani abwo bagotenena ase obosio bw’Omonene nao barabe bakoriera ebing’wanso bire ebichenu mono; agwo nao barabeke ebing’wanso bire ebichenu mono: okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebing’wanso bi’ebibe, na ebi’okomocha, ekiagera aase agwo naachenu." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ekero abakuani barabe bagosoa Aase Aachenu tibagosoka korwa agwo gocha ase eraaro ya isiko bataruseti chianga chi’obokoreri bwabo, bachitige ase ebinyomba, ebio, ekiagera nebichenu bire. Goika babeke chianga ching’ao ekero bagosoka gochia aase abanto bare.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Ekero omonto oria konya akoorire korenga aase e Hekalu a ime, agansokia isiko goetera ase egeita kiarenge ensemo ya moocha, erio akarenga aase onsi aetanaine Hekalu." 
Ezekiel42:16 Akaimokia emoti, akarengera ensemo ya moocha, ekaba chimoti amagana atano." 
Ezekiel42:17 Erio akaonchoka, akarenga ensemo ya sugusu, ekaba chimoti amagana atano." 
Ezekiel42:18 Akarenga ensemo ya irianyi, ekaba chimoti amagana atano." 
Ezekiel42:19 Naende akaonchoka gochia ensemo ya bosongo, akayerenga ekaba chimoti amagana atano." 
Ezekiel42:20 Naboigo akarenga chinsemo chionsi inye chi’aase aria. Orwaki nigo rwaetanaineo; obotambe bwaye nigo bwarenge obwe chimoti amagana atano, na obogare bwaye boigo. Orwaki orwo nigo rwatananete aase aachenu korwa aase ataatananetwe abe aachenu." 
Ezekiel43:1 Nyuma y’ayio akang’ira goika ase egeita kiarochie moocha. 
Ezekiel43:2 Nkarora obonene bwa Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli bogocha korwa moocha; eriogi ri’ogocha kwaye nigo riarenge koeera buna eri’amache amange, na ense ekamorekwa nobonene bwaye." 
Ezekiel43:3 Obonene obwo naroche ase okorora nigo bwarenge buna boria naroche ekero nachete gosaria omochie o Yerusalemu, na buna okorora koria konya narorire agwo ase orooche rwa Kebari. Erio ngatung’ama inse nkaumama." 
Ezekiel43:4 Obonene bw’Omonene bogasoa Hekalu goetera ase egeita kia moocha. 
Ezekiel43:5 Aroro agwo Omoika okany’imokereria igoro, okang’ira ase eraaro ya ime, na nkarora obonene bw’Omonene bwaichoire ase Hekalu eria yonsi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Erio omonto agatenena mbarabare asende, na nkaigwa omonto onde ogokwana nainche korwa ime ye Hekalu eria," 
Ezekiel43:7 agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, aase aiga nao ekerogo kiane ki’obonene kere, naende nao amagoro aane agotacha. Aiga nimenye ase egati y’Abaisraeli kogenderera botambe. Na Abaisraeli gose abaruoti babo tibakogenderera gokora erieta riane richenu ribe eritachenegeti, goetera ase obonyaka bwabo bw’ogosasima emegwekano, na emebere ekwete y’abaruoti babo, na aase abo aimokererete igoro." 
Ezekiel43:8 Ekero barabwo babekire emeriibo yabo ya inse ang’e neyane, na emetobwa yabo ang’e neyane, batigire orwaki rwabo ase egati yabo na inche, nigo bakorire erieta riane richenu riabeire eritachenegeti, ekiagera bakorire ay’okogechia. Ase ayio nabasiririe inde nendamwamu." 
Ezekiel43:9 Tiga barusie korwa asende obonyaka bwabo bw’ogosasima emegwekano, na emebere ekwete y’abaruoti babo, erio nario ndamenye ase egati yabo kogenderera botambe." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Aye mwanyabanto, tebia Abaisraeli amang’ana ayio igoro y’enyomba eyio, erinde basookigwe ase engencho y’amabe abo. Tiga barenge oboagacho obwo obuya." 
Ezekiel43:11 Onye bakoba nobosooku ase engencho y’amabe onsi bakorire, rirorio oborokie omogwekano bw’enyomba eyio buna erobeirie, na aase aye agosoerwa na aase agosokerwa, na okororekana kwaye, amo nemeroberio yaye yonsi, na amachiko aye. Oyarikere agwo ase amasio abo, erinde babwate emeroberio yaye yonsi na koyekora." 
Ezekiel43:12 Oko nakwo ogochika gwe Hekalu: Igoro y’egetunwa, na aase onsi areo, nabe aachenu mono; ee, okwo nakwo ogochika gwe Hekalu." 
Ezekiel43:13 “Ebi nabio ebirengo bi’egesasimero, ase ekerengo ki’amaboko amo neki’obogare bw’egesanyi: Enterekerero yaye nigo yarenge ey’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo korwa inse gochia igoro, na obogare gochia ase egesasimero ekenyene okoboko okomo. Orosingo roetanaine omogo bw’enterekerero eria nigo rwarenge orw’ekerengo gi’ekeng’ese gi’okoboko okomo gochia igoro. Eyio nigo yarenge enterekerero yaye." 
Ezekiel43:14 Korwa enterekerero inse goika egetambokero kie ritang’ani ki’egesasimero ekenyene nigo kiarenge obotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko abere gochia igoro, na obogare gochia ime okoboko okomo; na korwa ase egetambokero keria egeke gochia ase ekere ekenene, nigo bwarenge obotambe bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko ane, na obogare bwaye okoboko okomo." 
Ezekiel43:15 Aase bagoutera omorero na gosambera ebing’wanso igoro y’egesasimero nigo arenge ay’ekerengo ki’amaboko ane gochia igoro, na korwa aroro emegwekano ene ye chingunchara yaroisirie yarochie igoro." 
Ezekiel43:16 Na eriko riria nigo riarenge eri’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na abere, obotambe na obogare nigo biareng’aine." 
Ezekiel43:17 Egetumo ki’egesasimero nigo kiarenge egi’ekerengo ki’amaboko ikomi na ane, obotambe na obogare nigo biareng’aine. Orosingo rwaetanaine omogo oye nigo rwarenge nobogare bw’ekerengo gi’ekerengo gi’ekeng’ese gi’okoboko okomo. Enterekerero y’egesasimero nigo yarenge ey’ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo ase chinsemo chionsi na ekeriinero kiaye nigo kiarenge ensemo ya moocha.”" 
Ezekiel43:18 Naende omonto oria agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Eye nero emeroberio echikire erakorwe ase egesasimero ase rituko erio kerabe kiaagachirwe, erinde ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa biruerwe aroro, na amanyinga nabe akonyororokerigwa igoro yaye." 
Ezekiel43:19 Ase rituko erio oe abakuani Abalawi b’ororeria rwa Zadoki eeri ensae ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe. Abwo nabwo baeirwe ribaga ri’okong’ika ang’e ase ogonkorera. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire. 
Ezekiel43:20 Erio oimokie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso ekio, oyagindie ase emegwekano eria ene ye chingunchara ere ase egesasimero, na ase chikoona inye chi’egesasimero, na igoro ase orosingo rw’egesasimero chinsemo chionsi. Ase enchera eyio nochene egesasimero na kogekorera okobwatanigwa." 
Ezekiel43:21 Naende oire eeri eria oyerue ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe, oyesambere aase achikire, isiko y’Aase Aachenu." 
Ezekiel43:22 Rituko ria kabere orue egoree ensae, etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe; na egesasimero gechenwe buna giachenetwe nekeng’wanso ki’eeri eria." 
Ezekiel43:23 Ekero gwakoorire kogechena igo, orente eeri ensae na emingichi korwa ase riicho, chionsi ibere chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Ezekiel43:24 Erio ochirente ase obosio bw’Omonene, na abakuani bachinyororokerie omonyo na gochirua chibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene." 
Ezekiel43:25 Kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere mobe mokorua egoree eyemo ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe; boigo mobe mokorua eeri ensae na emingichi korwa ase riicho, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Ezekiel43:26 Ase enchera eyio, ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere, mobe mogokorera egesasimero okobwatanigwa na kogechena, mogiatanane kebe egechenu." 
Ezekiel43:27 Ekero amatuko ayio atano na abere aerire, rituko ria gatano na gatato na kogenderera abakuani mbabe bakorua igoro ase egesasimero ekio ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’omorembe; erio nario inche ndabanchere. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Erio omonto oria akang’ira gochia ase egeita gia isiko kiarenge ensemo ya moocha ye Hekalu; egeita ekio nigo giasiekire. 
Ezekiel44:2 Omonene agantebia, “Egeita eke nigo keragenderere gosiekwa, tigekoigorwa rinde, na monto onde tagosoera aroro, ekiagera aiga nao Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, asoerete ime. Ase ayio goika kegenderere gosiekwa." 
Ezekiel44:3 Omogambi bweka nere oraikaranseo ariere endagera ase obosio bw’Omonene. Nigo arasoere goetera gesona ki’oboagacho bore geita, naende asokere enchera eyio eyio.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Naende akang’ira, akang’eteria ase egeita gia sugusu, bosio bwe Hekalu; nkarigereria nkarora obonene bw’Omonene bwaichoire ase enyomba y’Omonene. Agwo ngatung’ama inse nkaumama." 
Ezekiel44:5 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, rengereria mono, origererie namaiso ao, na oigwe namato ao amang’ana onsi ngochia kogotebia igoro y’emeroberio echikire ase enyomba y’Omonene, na amachiko onsi igoro y’enyomba eye. Origererie mono buna abanto baranyare gosoa ase enyomba y’Omonene na buna baranyare gosoka." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Otebie abanto b’egesaku ki’Abaisraeli, abwo bare abasaria, ng’a aya naro inche Omonene Nyasae ngoteba: Inwe Abaisraeli, tiga ogokora kwaino gw’okogechia goisanere agwo." 
Ezekiel44:7 Inwe mwarentire ime ase enyomba yane enchenu abanto b’ebisaku ebigeni abatarogeti ase chinkoro chiabo, na ase emebere yabo, kobeera ime ase enyomba yane na mwayekorire yabeire eyetachenegeti, ekero mokorua asende okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebitinya, na amanyinga. Inwe mwasaririe okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, boigo mwakorire ogokora konde gwonsi gw’okogechia." 
Ezekiel44:8 Inwe abanyene timobeti mogokorera ebinto biane ebichenu, korende mwabekire abanto abaao bakaba bakobikorera ase enyomba yane enchenu ribaga riaino." 
Ezekiel44:9 “Ase ayio, aya naro inche Omonene Nyasae ngoteba: Omonto onde bwensi bw’egesaku ekegeni otarogeti ase enkoro, na ase omobere, ore ase egati y’Abaisraeli, tabaisa gosoa ase enyomba yane enchenu." 
Ezekiel44:10 “Abalawi abwo baruete asende bagantiga, bakagenda gosasima emegwekano yabo, ekero Abaisraeli bande basaretie; egesusuro ki’ogosaria kwabo nkebairanere." 
Ezekiel44:11 Nabo baranyare gokora emeremo ase enyomba yane enchenu, naende bagenderere korenda ebiita bi’enyomba yane na gokora emeremo ende ase enyomba eyio; mbabe bakonyenya ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso binde ase engencho y’abanto, mbabe bagotenena ase amasio abo kobakorera." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ekiagera abakuani abwo batenenete ase amasio ’abanto gokorera emegwekano yabo bagosasima, na igo bakaba ekegocha ase Abaisraeli, bakagera barabwo bagakora ebibe, ase ayio inche Omonene Nyasae natianire ng’a egesusuro ki’ogosaria kwabo goika kebairanere." 
Ezekiel44:13 Tibagocha ang’e ase ebinto biane ebichenu, gose ase ebio bire ebichenu mono. Goika berorere obosooku bw’ogokora kwabo gw’okogechia okwo babeire bagokora." 
Ezekiel44:14 Korende nimbabeke babe abarendi be Hekalu, babe bagokora emeremo ende yonsi eganeirie aroro." 
Ezekiel44:15 “Korende abakuani Abalawi, abwo b’ororeria rwa Zadoki, abwo bagendererete gonkorera ase enyomba yane enchenu, ekero Abaisraeli bande basaretie bagantiga, barabwo mbache ang’e nainche bankorere, mbabe bagotenena ase obosio bwane banduere ebitinya na amanyinga. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel44:16 Barabwo mbasoe ase enyomba yane enchenu, bache ang’e nemesa yane bankorere, naende bagenderere korenda amang’ana aane nachikire." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ekero barabe bagosoa ase ebiita bigosoerwa ase eraaro ya ime, babeke chianga chiroisirie korwa ase egatani. Tibabaisa kobeka chianga chiroisirie korwa ase amarionya, ekero bagendererete gokora emeremo agwo ase amaagacho are egeita kegosoerwa ase eraaro ya ime, na ime ase enyomba." 
Ezekiel44:18 Barabwo mbabeke ase emetwe yabo ebitambaa biroisirie korwa ase egatani, naende babeke chisirwari chi’egatani; tibakweboeria kende gionsi keragere bagiramore." 
Ezekiel44:19 Ekero batarasoka gochia ase abanto bare ase eraaro ya isiko goika barusie chianga echio chi’obokoreri, bachitige agwo ase ebinyomba biria ebichenu, na babeke chianga ching’ao. Batakoreti bo, nigo barabaise gochena abanto ne chianga echio chiabo." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Abakuani abwo tibagokigita chitukia chi’emetwe yabo, gose tibagochitiga chitambee, korende nigo barachinache chieng’ee." 
Ezekiel44:21 Omokuani onde bwensi takonywa edivai ekero agochia gosoa ase eraaro ya ime. 
Ezekiel44:22 Ere takonyuoma omokungu omoboraka, gose oyotiganire nomosacha oye, korende nanyare konyuoma omoiseke omwekungi bw’ororeria rw’Abaisraeli, gose nabo aranyare konyuoma omokungu omoboraka bw’omokuani." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Barabwo mborokererie abanto baane bamanye gwatanana ebinto bire ebichenu na ebitaatananiri koba ebichenu, naende baborokererie bamanye gwatanana ebinto bichenegete na ebitachenegeti." 
Ezekiel44:24 Ekero amariomana are ase abanto, abakuani mbabe abagambi b’ebina, mbabe bakogamba ebina ase okobwatia oboronge bwane. Mbarende emeroberio yane echikire, na amachiko aane ay’Amatuko Amanene. Boigo mbarende Chisabato chiane chibe chinchenu." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Omokuani tabaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase ogokuna egetondo ki’omonto okure. Nare ne ribaga gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase abanto aba: ise, na ng’ina, na omwana oye, omomura gose omoiseke, na momura omwabo, na moiseke omwabo oyotaraba nomosacha." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ekero omokuani oyio achenirwe nabarerwe amatuko atano na abere. 
Ezekiel44:27 Ase rituko riria arasoe ase eraaro ya ime ase obokoreri bwaye agwo Aase Aachenu, goika arue ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’ebibe. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Omwando obo nigo orabe iga: Ninche omonyene inde omwando obo. Timokobaa enibo ende yonsi, ekiagera ninche omonyene inde enibo yabo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Barabwo mbabe bakoria okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebing’wanso bi’ebibe, na ebi’okomocha, na kera egento keraatananwe na gokungwa asende korwa ase egati y’Abaisraeli nkebe eki’abakuani." 
Ezekiel44:30 Moe abakuani okwama kwaino ogotang’ani gwa kera egento; boigo mobae okorua kwaino, na obosie bw’ogotongora kwaino. Erio nario ogosesenigwa koragenderere koba ase chinyomba chiaino." 
Ezekiel44:31 Abakuani tibabaisa koria enyama ende yonsi y’enyoni gose ey’eng’iti ekwete yoka enyene, gose eitire ne ching’iti chinde." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Ekero morabe mogoaka obomera ase ogwatera abanto ense yaino ebe emiando yabo, mwatananere na Omonene emonga yaye ebe enchenu. Obotambe bw’emonga eyio nigo borabe obw’ekerengo gie chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), na obogare bwaye chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000). Emonga eyio engima nigo erabe enchenu." 
Ezekiel45:2 Korwa ase oboremo obwo mwatanane aase Hekalu eraagachwe. Obotambe bwaye nigo borabe obwe chimoti amagana atano (500), na obogare bwaye chimoti amagana atano (500) boigo. Eraaro eetanaineo nigo erabe nobogare bw’ekerengo ki’amaboko emerongo etano." 
Ezekiel45:3 Ase oboremo obwo obochenu mwatanane ensemo ere nobotambe bwe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), na obogare bwe chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000), agwo nao moraagache Aase Aachenu Mono." 
Ezekiel45:4 Oboremo obwo mbobe ensemo enchenu y’ense eye, bobe obw’abakuani abwo bare abakoreri b’Aase Aachenu bagotenena ase obosio bw’Omonene. Nao baraagache chinyomba chiabo, naende nao arabe aase aachenu ase Hekalu eraagachwe." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ensemo ende eisaine obotambe bwe chimoti emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), na obogare chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000), nebe ey’Abalawi, abwo bagokora emeremo ase Hekalu; eyio nebe omwando obo ase baraagache emechie bakomenya." 
Ezekiel45:6 “Naende mwate ensemo ende eye ebebekaine noboremo obwo obochenu ebe nobogare bwe chimoti chilifu isano (5,000), na obotambe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000). Eyio nebe ase omochie omonene oraagachwe, ase Abaisraeli bande bonsi baranyare komenya." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Ensemo ende yatwe eegwe omogambi. Eyio nigo erabe ase chinsinyo chionsi ibere chi’oboremo boria obochenu, na obw’omochie oria omonene, ensemo ya moocha na eya bosongo. Korwa ensinyo ya bosongo y’oboremo boria obochenu, na boria bw’omochie omonene, oboremo bw’omogambi bogaree gochia bosongo boreng’ane nobwa kera egesaku, na ensemo ya moocha boigo bogaree gochia moocha." 
Ezekiel45:8 Ensemo eyio nebe ey’omogambi agwo ase ense y’Abaisraeli. Abagambi baane tibabaisa kogenderera gochanda abanto baane, korende batige kera egesaku ki’Abaisraeli kemenye ase orogongo rwaye." 
Ezekiel45:9 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Inwe abagambi b’Abaisraeli, amabe ayio mwakorire aisanire. Motige kegima ogokora okobe na okourereria; monache ebina bi’ekeene na oboronge; timoseria abanto baane korwa ase chinka chiabo. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Goika motware ebirengero bi’ekeene mokorengera oborito na obonge bw’ebinto bionsi. 
Ezekiel45:11 Ekerengero gia efa (gose egetonga) na ekia bati (gose ensiongo) bibe ekerengo ekemo. Kera ekemo getware ensemo eyemo ya ikomi y’ekerengero gekorokwa homeri. Ekerengero kiaino ekenene mokorengera kebe ekie homeri. 
Ezekiel45:12 “Ase chibesa, esekeli eyemo nigo ebwate chigera emerongo ebere; emina eyemo nigo ebwate chisekeli emerongo etano nomo (emerongo ebere, na emerongo ebere na isano, na ikomi na isano)." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Oko nakwo okorua morarente: Ebimunu bibere korwa ase ebitonga ikomi bi’engano, na ebimunu bibere korwa ase ebitonga ikomi bi’esairi." 
Ezekiel45:14 Morue amaguta ekerengo gechikire, ebituba bibere korwa ase ekori eyemo. (Ekori eyemo nigo ereng’aine ne homeri eyemo; nigo ebwate chibati ikomi)." 
Ezekiel45:15 “Korwa ase amaicho are ase amarisio ’Abaisraeli morue eng’ondi eyemo korwa ase ching’ondi amagana abere, ebe okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebi’omorembe, ase ogokora okobwatanigwa ase abanto. Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Abanto bonsi b’ense eye goika baire okoruegwa okwo ase omogambi ore ase Abaisraeli. 
Ezekiel45:17 Nigo erabe emeremo y’omogambi arue ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’ebinyugwa, ase Amatuko Amanene, na ase emeyega y’Omotienyi Omoyia, na ase Chisabato, engencho yaye Amatuko Amanene achikire ase Abaisraeli. Ere narue ebing’wanso bi’ebibe, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, ase ogokora okobwatanigwa ase Abaisraeli.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, moire eeri ensae etari na kemocho ase omobere oye ase ogochena Hekalu." 
Ezekiel45:19 Omokuani aimokie amanyinga make ay’ekeng’wanso ekio ki’ebibe, agindie emetobwa y’egesieri gie Hekalu, ne chikoona inye chi’egesasimero, na emetobwa y’egesoero kegochia ase eraaro ya ime." 
Ezekiel45:20 Okore boigo ase rituko ria gatano na kabere ri’omotienyi, ase engencho y’omonto onde bwensi okorire ebibe atancheti, gose ayakorete ase oboriri bwaye. Ase enchera eyio mokore okobwatanigwa ase Hekalu." 
Ezekiel45:21 “Ase rituko ria ikomi na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani mobe ne Rituko Rinene ri’Epasaka, na ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere naro moyabwate na mobe mokoria emegati etabekiri memera." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ase rituko erio omogambi arue eeri ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase engencho yaye omonyene, na ase engencho y’abanto bonsi b’ense eyio." 
Ezekiel45:23 Ase kera rituko ase engaki y’amatuko ayio atano na abere, omogambi oria nabe okorua ase Omonene chieri isano na ibere, ne chimingichi isano na ibere, chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, chibe ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, naende abe okorua egoree eyemo kera rituko ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe." 
Ezekiel45:24 Naende arue okoruegwa kw’endagera, egetonga ekemo amo na kera eeri, na egetonga ekemo amo na kera emingichi, na amaguta ebituba bine amo na kera egetonga ekemo gi’okoruegwa kw’endagera." 
Ezekiel45:25 “Gochakera rituko ria ikomi na gatano ri’omotienyi o gatano na kabere, na kogenderera, ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere Aria Amanene, omogambi oria arue ebing’wanso bi’ebibe buna biria amo nebi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na okw’amaguta." 
Ezekiel46:1 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Egeita kia moocha kegosoerwa gochia ase eraaro ya ime, goika kegenderere gosiekwa ase engaki yonsi y’amatuko atano na rimo ay’ogokora emeremo, korende ase rituko ri’Esabato, na eri’Omotienyi Omoyia, goika keigorwe." 
Ezekiel46:2 Omogambi asoe goetera ase egesona ki’oboagacho bore geita, atenene ase omotobwa bw’egesieri kere aroro. Omogambi oria abe ogosasimera agwo ase egesoero ekero abakuani bagendererete korua ebing’wanso biaye bi’ogosambwa na ebi’omorembe. Erio omogambi asoke isiko, korende egeita keria tigesiekwa goika mogoroba." 
Ezekiel46:3 Kera Esabato, na kera Omotienyi Omoyia, abanto b’ense eyio goika babe bagosasimera agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene agwo ase egesoero ki’egeita ekio." 
Ezekiel46:4 Ase rituko ri’Esabato omogambi arue ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa ase Omonene, chimanwa chie ching’ondi isano nemo, na emingichi eyemo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Ezekiel46:5 Amo nemingichi eria arue okoruegwa kw’endagera egetonga ekemo, na amo ne chimanwa chiria chie ching’ondi arue okoruegwa kw’endagera ekerengo aranyare korua; boigo amo na kera egetonga gi’okoruegwa kw’endagera arue ebituba bine bi’amaguta." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ase rituko ri’Omotienyi Omoyia arue eeri ensae eyemo, ne chimanwa chie ching’ondi isano nemo, na emingichi eyemo, chionsi chibe chitari na kemocho ase emebere yabo." 
Ezekiel46:7 Amo neeri eria arue okoruegwa kw’endagera egetonga ekemo na amo nemingichi eria boigo, na amo ne chimanwa chiria chie ching’ondi arue okoruegwa kw’endagera ase ekerengo aranyare korua; boigo amo na kera egetonga gi’okoruegwa kw’endagera arue ebituba bine bi’amaguta." 
Ezekiel46:8 Ekero omogambi oria arasoe aetere egesona ki’oboagacho bore geita, naende airanere enchera eyio eyio." 
Ezekiel46:9 “Ekero abanto b’ense eyio barache ase obosio bw’Omonene gosasima ase Amatuko Amanene, abwo barasoere egeita gia sugusu gocha gosasima, goika basokere egeita kia irianyi; na abwo barasoere egeita kia irianyi goika basokere egia sugusu; monto onde tairanera ase asoerete, korende airanere egeita kerochie ase ekio asoerete." 
Ezekiel46:10 Omogambi asoe ime amo nabanto, na ekero bagosoka, nere asoke amo nabarabwo." 
Ezekiel46:11 Ase engaki y’emeyega, na ey’Amatuko Amanene achikire, morue okoruegwa kw’endagera egetonga ekemo amo na kera eeri eyemo, na okoruegwa kw’endagera egetonga ekemo amo na kera emingichi eyemo, na amo nechimanwa chie ching’ondi okoruegwa kw’endagera ekerengo moranyare korua, na amo na kera egetonga gi’okoruegwa kw’endagera ebituba bine bi’amaguta." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Ekero omogambi ararente ase Omonene okorua kwaye kw’ogwancha, gakorabe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gose eki’omorembe, aigorerwe egeita kerochie moocha. Nigo ararue ekeng’wanso kiaye ki’ogosambwa, na eki’omorembe, ase enchera buna eria agokora ase rituko ri’Esabato. Gasokire, egeita keria giasiekwa." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Kera emambia, rituko ase rituko, obe gokorua ase Omonene emanwa y’eng’ondi yakoorire omwaka oyomo etari na kemocho ase omobere oye, ebe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa." 
Ezekiel46:14 Boigo kera emambia orue ase Omonene okoruegwa kw’endagera ebimunu bine, na egetuba ekemo na ekeng’ese amaguta ochoganirie nobosie bw’okoruegwa koria kw’endagera. Oyo noro omoroberio ochikire orabe okogenderera botambe." 
Ezekiel46:15 Ase enchera eyio emanwa y’eng’ondi, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, na amaguta, mbibe bikoruegwa kera emambia, rituko ase rituko, bibe ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa keragenderere koruegwa botambe." 
Ezekiel46:16 “Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: Omogambi karae oyomo bw’abana baye abamura oboremo bw’orogongo rwaye, oboremo obwo mbobe omwando bw’oyio oboegwa; ee, omwando oyio nigo orabe oyo bw’abana b’omomura oyio." 
Ezekiel46:17 Korende onye okoa omosomba oye oboremo bw’orogongo rwaye, omosomba oria nigo aragenderere gotwara ekeegwa ekio goika engaki y’omwaka bw’obosibore eike, erio akeiranie ase omogambi oria. Omwando oyo nigo ore oyo bw’omogambi oria, na orachie koegwa abana baye." 
Ezekiel46:18 Omogambi takoura abanto emiando yabo ayee abana baye, korende nigo arae abana baye emiando korwa ase omwando oye omonyene. Igo monto onde tari ase abanto baane oraurwe enibo yaye.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Erio omonto oria akang’eteria ase egesoero kiarenge ang’e negeita, agansoyia ase ebinyomba ebichenu bi’abakuani biarenge sugusu, nkarora aase aria korwa nyuma, ensemo ya bosongo." 
Ezekiel46:20 Naende agantebia, “Aase aiga nao abakuani baraiyekere ebing’wanso bi’okomocha, na ebi’ebibe, naende nao bararugere okoruegwa kw’endagera, erinde tibabaisa korenta ebinto ebio ase eraaro ya isiko, babaise gocha gochena abanto.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Naende akang’ira ase eraaro ya isiko, akang’etia ase chikoona chiaye inye, na nkarora ase kera ekoona ekeooreri nkiarengeo." 
Ezekiel46:22 Ebiooreri ebio bine biare ase chikoona chi’eraaro nigo biagiteire. Obotambe bwabo nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo ene, na obogare amaboko emerongo etato, bionsi nigo biareng’aine." 
Ezekiel46:23 Orwaki nigo rwaetanaine kera ekemo ki’ebiooreri ebio bine. Inse ase orwaki mbarabare amariko akorugerwa naroisirieo. 
Ezekiel46:24 Omonto oria agantebia: “Aya namariko ase abwo bagokora emeremo ye Hekalu bakoiyekera ebing’wanso abanto bakorua.” 
Ezekiel47:1 Nyuma y’ayio omonto oria akang’ira gochia ase egesieri gie Hekalu. Nkarora amache akorwa inse y’egesona gie Hekalu, agotirimboka gochia moocha ase enyomba eria yarochie. Amache aria agaeta korwa inse y’ensemo ya moocha ye Hekalu agwo irianyi y’egesasimero." 
Ezekiel47:2 Erio omonto oria agansokia isiko akang’eteria ase egeita gia isiko kiarochie sugusu, akang’etanania gochia ase egeita kiarochie moocha; aroro agwo nkarora amache akorwa ensemo ya irianyi y’egeita." 
Ezekiel47:3 Omonto oria nigo abwate emoti y’okorengera, akagenda, akabwatia orooche gochia moocha, akarenga obotambe bw’amaboko elifu eyemo, na agwo akanyambokia ase amache, na amache aria akaang’ika ase ebitarenge bi’amagoro." 
Ezekiel47:4 Naende akabwatia orooche roria, akarenga obotambe bw’amaboko ande elifu eyemo, akanyambokia ase amache aria, naro akang’ika ase amaru. Naende akarenga amaboko elifu eyemo ende, akanyambokia ase amache, naro akang’ika ase ekenema." 
Ezekiel47:5 Naende akarenga amaboko elifu eyemo ende, bono konya rwabeire orooche oronene ntare konyara gotaara imeo. Amache aria konya aichoire mono, tinare konyara kwamboka otatiga ase ogoaka entimbu." 
Ezekiel47:6 Omonto oria akamboria, “Aye mwanyabanto, kwarorire aya?” Erio akang’irania, akang’etia mbarabare ase engegu y’orooche orwo." 
Ezekiel47:7 Ekero nare goeta ase engegu eyio nkarora emete emenge ase chingegu chi’orooche orwo ase chinsemo chionsi. 
Ezekiel47:8 Omonto oria agantebia, “Amache aya nigo akogenda ase ensemo ya moocha gochia riranya ria Yorodan, na ekero arasoe ase enyancha ere namache are nomonyo nansie amache ayio abe amaya." 
Ezekiel47:9 Aase aande onsi amache ayio aragende, kera egetongwa kere moyo kemenye ime yaye nkegenderere koba moyo, ne chinswe chinyinge mono nchibeo. Ee, ekero amache aria araike ase enyancha eria, amache ’enyancha eria nanse abe amaya, na kera egento nkenyore obogima." 
Ezekiel47:10 Abarubi mbatenene ase engegu y’orooche orwo gochakera Eni‐Gedi na goikera Eni‐Egelaimu. Aase agwo nabe ase ebionga bikorutwa, na ebisaku ebinge bie chinswe mbibe aroro buna bire ase Enyancha eria Enene." 
Ezekiel47:11 Korende amache are ase chitente chiaye, na amatibo aye, tagwansa abe amaya, korende nigo aragenderere koba nomonyo." 
Ezekiel47:12 Ase chingegu chi’orooche orwo chinsemo chionsi ibere emete y’ebisaku ao ao ekwama amatunda akoriegwa nemereo. Amato ’emete eyio tagosusana, gose emete eyio tekomocha kwama amatunda. Kera omotienyi nigo erame amatunda amayia, ekiagera amache agocha ase emete eyio nigo arabe akorua ase Hekalu. Ase ayio amatunda ’emete eyio nabe endagera, na amato abo nabe eriogo rikogwenia abanto.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Echi nachio chirabe chimbebe chi’ense egochia gwatananerwa ebisaku ikomi na bibere bi’Abaisraeli ebe emiando yabo. Ororeria rwa Yusufu rororwo roegwe ebitari bibere. 
Ezekiel47:14 Mobaatere mobareng’anerie kera omonto ensemo yaye. Nigo netianetie koa chisokoro chiaino ense eye; ase ayio ense eyio nebe omwando oino. 
Ezekiel47:15 “Eri nario rirabe ribebe riaino: Ribebe ria sugusu richakere korwa ase Enyancha Enene, rietere emechie ya Heteloni, na Sedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 na Hamati, na Berota, na Sibiraimu, eyio ere ase egati y’omochie o Damesiki, na oyo o Hamati. Naende rigenderere goika Haseri‐Atikoni ere ang’e ne ribebe ria Haurani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Ase ayio ribebe erio richakere korwa ase enyancha rigenderere goika Hasari‐Enoni, omochie ore ase ribebe ria Damesiki, naende rigenderere gochia sugusu goika ase orogongo rwa Hamati. Nario rirabe ribebe ria sugusu." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Ribebe ria moocha richakere korwa ase egati ya Haurani na Damesiki, ribwatie orooche rwa Yorodan, gati ya Gileadi na ense y’Abaisraeli, rigenderere kobwatia Enyancha y’Omonyo. Naboigo morariate. Erio nario rirabe ribebe ria moocha." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Ribebe ria irianyi richakere korwa Tamari, rigenderere goikera ase amache a Kadeshi‐Meriba; korwa agwo rigenderere kobwatia akarooche ka Misiri, ritwomere Enyancha Enene. Erio nario rirabe ribebe ria irianyi." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Enyancha Enene nero erabe ribebe ria bosongo goikera ase egesoero kia Hamati. Eyio nero erabe ribebe ria bosongo. 
Ezekiel47:21 “Naboigo moraaterane ense eyio koreng’ana buna inwe ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli more. 
Ezekiel47:22 Moyiaterane ase ogoaka obomera, ebe emiando yaino na ey’abamenyi bare ase egati yaino baiborerete abana ase egati yaino. Abwo babe asemore buna ababiare b’Abaisraeli, baegwe emiando ase egati y’ebisaku biaino inwe Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel47:23 Omomenyi goika aegwe omwando oye agwo ase egesaku ekio ase amenyete. Nabo inche Omonene natebire. 
Ezekiel48:1 “Oyo noro omoroberio buna ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli biramenye: Egesaku kia Dani keegwe orogongo rwa sugusu. Ribebe riabo ribwatie enchera ya Heteloni agwo ase egesoero kia Hamati, rigenderere gochia Hasari‐Enoni, omochie ore ase ribebe ria sugusu ria Damesiki. Orogongo orwo rwa Dani nigo rorabe korwa ensinyo ya moocha y’ense eyio goika ensinyo ya bosongo." 
Ezekiel48:2 Egesaku gi’Aseri keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Dani korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:3 Egesaku kia Nafutali keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norw’Aseri korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:4 Egesaku kia Manase keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Nafutali korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:5 Egesaku gia Efraimu keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Manase korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo.
