Ezekiel48:6 Egesaku kia Reuben keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Efraimu korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:7 Egesaku kia Yuda keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Reuben korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:8 “Orogongo robebekaine norwa Yuda korwa moocha goika bosongo, nigo roratigwe robe aase mokoruera okoruegwa ogochenu. Obogare bwaye nigo borabe obwe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), na obotambe bwaye nigo borabe buna obwa kera egesaku korwa moocha goika bosongo. Gati‐gati y’orogongo orwo aase aachenu nao arabe." 
Ezekiel48:9 “Orogongo orwo morotige robe orw’Omonene; obotambe bwaye nigo borabe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), na obogare chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000)." 
Ezekiel48:10 Abakuani mbanyore orogongo rwabo korwa ase orwo orochenu. Orogongo rwabo nigo rorabe nobotambe bwe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000) korwa moocha goika bosongo, na korwa sugusu goika irianyi robe chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000). Aase aachenu ay’Omonene nigo arabe gati‐gati y’oboremo obwo." 
Ezekiel48:11 Orogongo orwo nigo rorabe orw’abakuani abwo bachenekire, abwo b’ororeria rwa Zadoki. Abwo nigo babete abegenwa asende, tibantigete buna Abalawi bande bakorete ekero Abaisraeli basaretie bagantiga." 
Ezekiel48:12 Orogongo orwo nigo rorabe aase mokoruera okoruegwa ogochenu aatananire korwa ase ensemo eria ere enchenu. Nigo rorabe orochenu mono robebekane norw’Abalawi. 
Ezekiel48:13 Abalawi baegwe orogongo robebekane norw’abakuani; nigo rorabe nobotambe bwe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), na obogare chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000). Obotambe bwe chingongo chionsi nigo borabe chimoti chilifu, emerongo ebere na isano (25,000) na obogare chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000)." 
Ezekiel48:14 Orogongo orwo tirobaisa koonigwa gose koonchorerigwa; orogongo orwo rore oruya goetania echinde chionsi tiroegwa onde, ekiagera nigo rore orochenu ase Omonene." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Orogongo roratigare rore nobogare bwe chimoti chilifu isano (5,000), na obotambe chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), nigo rorabe orw’abanto bande bonsi, baraagache emechie yabo aroro, naende robe orw’oborisia. Agwo nao omochie omonene oraagachwe gati‐gati." 
Ezekiel48:16 Ekerengo ki’omochie oyio nigo kerabe iga: Ensemo ya sugusu chimoti chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500), na ensemo ya irianyi chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500), na ensemo ya moocha chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500), na ensemo ya bosongo chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500)." 
Ezekiel48:17 Omochie oyio nigo orabe namarisio buna iga: Oborisia bwa sugusu nigo borabe obw’ekerengo gie chimoti amagana abere, na emerongo etano (250), na obwa irianyi amagana abere, na emerongo etano (250), na obwa moocha amagana abere, na emerongo etano (250), na obwa bosongo amagana abere, na emerongo etano (250)." 
Ezekiel48:18 Orogongo orwo roratigare robebekaine na roria orochenu, nigo rorabe orw’ekerengo gie chimoti chilifu ikomi (10,000) gochia moocha, na chilifu ikomi (10,000) gochia bosongo. Endagera erame aroro nigo erabe ey’abwo barabe bagokora emeremo ase omochie oyio ime." 
Ezekiel48:19 Abakori emeremo b’omochie oyio ab’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli mbabe bakorema orogongo orwo. 
Ezekiel48:20 “Orogongo roria rwonsi orochenu nigo rorabe orw’ekerengo gie chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere na isano (25,000), chinsemo chionsi nigo chirabe chireng’aine. Oro narwo orogongo orochenu amo norw’omochie oyio." 
Ezekiel48:21 “Orogongo roratigare robebekaine na roria orochenu amo norw’omochie ase kera ensemo nigo rorabe orw’omogambi. Chingongo echio nigo chirachakere iga: Oromo korwa ase orogongo roria orochenu rw’ekerengo gie chimoti chilifu emerongo ebere, na isano (25,000), rogenderere gochia moocha koreng’ana ne chingongo chiria chi’ebisaku, na oronde gochia bosongo koreng’ana ne chingongo chiria chi’ebisaku. Chingongo echio nigo chirabe echi’omogambi. Orogongo orwo orochenu ase Hekalu erabe nigo rorabe gati‐gati." 
Ezekiel48:22 Chingongo chi’omogambi nigo chirabebekane norw’Abalawi na orw’omochie, naende chibe ase egati y’orw’Abayuda na orw’Ababenjamin." 
Ezekiel48:23 “Ebisaku binde biratigare biegwe chingongo chiabo buna iga: Egesaku kia Benjamin keegwe orogongo rwaye korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:24 Egesaku gia Simeoni keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Benjamin, korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo." 
Ezekiel48:25 Egesaku gia Isakaru keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Simeoni korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:26 Egesaku gia Sabuloni keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Isakaru, korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo." 
Ezekiel48:27 Egesaku kia Gadi keegwe orogongo rwaye robebekane norwa Sabuloni korwa ensinyo ya moocha goika eya bosongo. 
Ezekiel48:28 “Ribebe ria irianyi nigo rirabebekane norongogo rwa Gadi. Nigo riragenderere korwa Tamari gochia ase amache a Kadeshi‐Meriba, na korwa aroro ribwatie akarooche ka Misiri ritwomere Enyancha Enene." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Eye nero ense moraatanane ase ogoaka obomera, ebe emiando y’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli. Ebio nabio birabe ebitari biabo. Nabo inche Omonene Nyasae natebire." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Ebi nabio birabe ebiita bi’omochie oyio orabe nekerengo gie chimoti chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500):" 
Ezekiel48:31 Ebiita bitato nigo birabe ensemo ya sugusu. Ebiita ebio nigo birarokwe iga: Egeita kia Reuben, na ekia Yuda, na ekia Lawi. Ebiita bionsi nigo birarokwe kobwatekana namarieta ’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli." 
Ezekiel48:32 Ensemo ya moocha eyerabe nekerengo gie chimoti chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500), ebiita bitato mbibeo: Egeita kia Yusufu, na ekia Benjamin, na ekia Dani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Ensemo ya irianyi eyerabe nekerengo gie chimoti chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500), ebiita bitato mbibeo: Egeita gia Simeoni, na egia Isakaru, na egia Sabuloni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Ensemo ya bosongo eyerabe nekerengo gie chimoti chilifu inye, na amagana atano (4,500), ebiita bitato mbibeo: Egeita kia Gadi, na egia Aseri, na ekia Nafutali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Goetanana omochie bwonsi nigo orabe ekerengo gie chimoti chilifu ikomi na isano na isato (18,000). Korwa rituko erio omochie oyio nigo orarokwe Omonene Nao Are Aa.”" 
Daniel1:1 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba kwa Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, Nebukadinesaro, omoruoti o Babeli, agacha Yerusalemu akayoboera." 
Daniel1:2 Omonene akabeka Yehoyakimu, omoruoti bw’Abayuda, ase okoboko kwa Nebukadinesaro. Boigo akaa Nebukadinesaro ribaga aire ebikorero binde bi’enyomba ya Nyasae, na ere akabiira ase ense ya Shinari, ase enyomba y’enyasae yaye, akabibeka ase ekungo y’enyomba eria." 
Daniel1:3 Erio omoruoti agachika Asipenasi, omoteneneri bw’abasomba b’enyomba yaye, arente abamura korwa ase egati y’Abaisraeli, abare ab’enyomba y’omoruoti, na abande abarenge ab’amasikani." 
Daniel1:4 Abamura abwo goika babe abatari na kemocho ase emebere yabo, naende babe abanyabieni, bare abang’aini abaranyare kweorokereria chisemi, barabe abaango b’okomanya, baraisanere gokorera omoruoti ase enyomba yaye. Asipenasi aborokererie bamanye amariko ’Abakalidayo, naende bamanye gokwana Egekalidayo." 
Daniel1:5 Omoruoti agachika ng’a kera rituko babe bakoegwa endagera buna eria ere omonyene are koria, naende babe bakonywa edivai buna eria ere omonyene are konywa. Nigo barenge gochia kworokererigwa ase engaki y’emiaka etato; nyuma y’ayio barentwe ase obosio bw’omoruoti, babe bakomokorera." 
Daniel1:6 Ase egati y’abwo bachoretwe, korwa ase Abayuda nabwo aba: Danieli, na Hanania, na Mishaeli, na Asaria." 
Daniel1:7 Omoteneneri oria omonene akabaroka amarieta amayia, akaroka Danieli Beli‐Tesasari, na Hanania Sadaraka, na Mishaeli Meshaka, na Asaria Abedi‐Nego." 
Daniel1:8 Korende Danieli akanacha ase ebirengererio biaye ng’a tabaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka ase okoria endagera buna eria omoruoti are koria, gose konywa edivai buna eria omoruoti are konywa. Ase ayio agasaba omoteneneri oria omonene amoe ribaga tabaisa gwesoyia ase ogotacheneka." 
Daniel1:9 Nyasae akaa Danieli ogwancherwa na obuya ase obosio bw’omoteneneri oria omonene. 
Daniel1:10 Omoteneneri oria agatebia Danieli, “Nairokire ng’a omonene one omoruoti, oyio obachikerete endagera yaino, na ebinyugwa biaino, ekero arabarore ng’a amasio aino anyirire kobua ay’abamura bande b’ekegori kiaino, nigo arambutore omotwe.”" 
Daniel1:11 Erio Danieli agakwana nomorendi oria obegetwe nomoteneneri oria omonene bw’abasomba b’omoruoti ng’a arende Danieli, na Hanania, na Mishaeli, na Asaria, akamotebia," 
Daniel1:12 “Koranche ototeeme intwe abasomba bao ase engaki y’amatuko ikomi, obe kogotoa chindagera chikwama korwa ase riroba tokoria, na amache tokonywa." 
Daniel1:13 Nyuma y’ayio origererie amasio aito na ay’abamura abwo bakoria endagera ekorwa ase omoruoti, na korarore buna tokororekana, otokorere buna oranche.”" 
Daniel1:14 Omorendi oria akaigwera amang’ana aria abo, akabateema ase engaki y’amatuko ikomi." 
Daniel1:15 Ekero amatuko aria ikomi aerete, amasio abo akarorekana are amaya, na emebere yabo ere emeterere kobua ey’abamura bande, baria barenge koria endagera eria yare korwa ase omoruoti." 
Daniel1:16 Ase ayio omorendi oria akabatiga tibaria endagera eria, na tibanywa edivai eria, bachikeretwe, akaba okobaa chindagera chikwama korwa ase riroba." 
Daniel1:17 Nyasae akaa abamura baria bane chisemi na obomanyi bw’okomanya amariko ao ao, na obong’aini bwonsi; naende akaa Danieli obong’aini bw’okomanya engencho y’amaroro ne chindoto." 
Daniel1:18 Ekero engaki eria yachigetwe nomoruoti Nebukadinesaro ng’a abamura baria bonsi barentwe asare yaigete, omoteneneri oria omonene akabaira ase omoruoti oria." 
Daniel1:19 Omoruoti agakwana nabarabwo, na ase abwo bonsi onde tanyorekanete omogogetie buna Danieli, na Hanania, na Mishaeli, na Asaria. Ase ayio abwo bane bakaba bakomokorera omoruoti." 
Daniel1:20 Ase amang’ana ande onsi omoruoti ababoretie igoro y’obong’aini na obomanyi, akabanyora ng’a nigo bamanyete ara ikomi goetania abaringoria na abaragori barenge ase oboruoti bwaye bwonsi." 
Daniel1:21 Danieli akagenderera kobeera ase enyomba y’omoruoti goika omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Koresi. 
Daniel2:1 Ase omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba kwa Nebukadinesaro ere akarota chindoto; ase ayio agachandeka ase ebirengererio biaye, tarara chitoro." 
Daniel2:2 Erio omoruoti agachika ng’a abaringoria na abaragori, na abarogi, amo n’Abakalidayo bamanyete oborogi, barentwe, erinde bamotebie chindoto chiaye. Ase ayio abanto abwo bonsi bagacha ase obosio bwaye." 
Daniel2:3 Ere akabatebia, “Narotete chindoto, na ebirengererio biane nigo bichandegete, Ninganetie montebie chindoto chiria.”" 
Daniel2:4 Abakalidayo baria bagatebia omoruoti ase omonwa bw’Ekearamaik, “Aye omoruoti ochie kare! Totebie intwe abasomba bao chindoto echio, na intwe ntonyare kogotebia engencho yaye.”" 
Daniel2:5 Omoruoti akabairaneria, akabatebia, “Amang’ana aane tari koonchoka, na motantebeti chindoto chiane amo nengencho yaye, nigo morabutoranwe ekiimo ase ekiimo, ne chinyomba chiaino nchitagorwe chibe amatombe." 
Daniel2:6 Korende komorantebie chindoto chiria amo nengencho yaye, rirorio nimbae ebiegwa, na eng’eria, na amasikani amanene. Bono ntebie chindoto chiria amo nengencho yaye.”" 
Daniel2:7 Bakairaneria omoruoti eria kabere, “Aye omoruoti, tobebie intwe abasomba bao chindoto chiria, na intwe ntogotebie engencho yaye.”" 
Daniel2:8 Omoruoti akairaneria, akabatebia, “Ekeene, namanyire ng’a nigo moganetie koegwa chingaki, ekiagera mwamanyire ng’a amang’ana aane tari koonchoka." 
Daniel2:9 Korende motantebeti chindoto chiria, ogochika nkore okomo gwoka narure igoro yaino. Mwabeire mokobwatana ase ogontebia oborimo na amang’ana ’obong’ainereria, mosemeretie ng’a chingaki nchionchorwe. Ase ayio goika montebie aya narotete, erio nario ndamanye ng’a mwamanyire engencho yaye moyentebie.”" 
Daniel2:10 Abakalidayo baria bakairaneria omoruoti, bakamotebia, “Monto onde tari ase ense eye oranyare koorokia ring’ana erio aye omoruoti oganetie komanya, ekiagera omoruoti onde tari, nonya ore omonene mono, gose ore nokobua kore naki, oboririe egento kenga buna ekio korwa ase abaringoria, gose abaragori, gose korwa ase Abakalidayo bamanyete oborogi." 
Daniel2:11 Egento eke aye omoruoti kwaboririe nigo kere egekong’u mono, na onde tari oranyare gokeorokia ase omoruoti otatiga chinyasae, na echio tichimenyeti amo na mwanyabanto.”" 
Daniel2:12 Ase engencho y’amang’ana ayio, omoruoti akaba nendamwamu na ekeririanda ekenene, agachika ng’a abang’aini bonsi ba Babeli basirigwe." 
Daniel2:13 Ase ayio ogochika gokaruegwa ng’a abanto abwo bonsi baitwe, na Danieli amo na baria bamwabo barigigwe baitwe boigo." 
Daniel2:14 Ekero Arioki, omochiki bw’abarendi b’omoruoti, agendete ng’a aite abanto abang’aini ba Babeli, Danieli agakwana nere ore nobong’aini na obomanyi bw’amasikani," 
Daniel2:15 akamoboria, “Nase ki omoruoti arure ogochika ogotindi iga?” Erio Arioki agatebia Danieli amang’ana onsi." 
Daniel2:16 Danieli akagenda ase obosio bw’omoruoti, akamosaba amoe engaki achiche komotebia engencho ye chindoto chiria." 
Daniel2:17 Erio Danieli akairana gochia inka, agatebia Hanania, na Mishaeli, na Asaria, abamwabo, amang’ana aria," 
Daniel2:18 akabatebia ng’a basabe Nyasae ore igoro abarorere amabera, aborokie obobisi boria, erinde ere omonyene na baria bamwabo tibasirigwa amo nabanto baria abang’aini bande ba Babeli." 
Daniel2:19 Erio obobisi boria bokamaanorwa ase Danieli ase okorora kwa botuko. Ase ayio Danieli akamotogia Nyasae ore igoro, agateba:" 
Daniel2:20 “Erieta ria Nyasae ritogigwe goika kare na kare! Obong’aini na okobua nebiaye. 
Daniel2:21 Ere nigo akoonchora ebiro ne chingaki; nigo akorusia abaruoti, naende obeka abande; nigo akoa abang’aini obong’aini bwabo, na abamanyi okomanya kwabo." 
Daniel2:22 Nigo akoorokia ay’obobisi bwa ime, nigo amanyete ayare ime ase omosunte; na omobaso nigo ore amo nere." 
Daniel2:23 Aye Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiane, nagoakeire ng’a mbuya mono na kogotogia, ekiagera aye kwang’eire obong’aini ne chinguru, bono kwamanyirie inche aya twagosabete, ekiagera gwatoorokeirie aya omoruoti aganetie komanya.”" 
Daniel2:24 Ase engencho eyio Danieli akagenda ase Arioki, oria omoruoti achorete ng’a aite abanto abang’aini ba Babeli, akamotebia, “Tobaisa goita abang’aini ba Babeli; ng’ire ase obosio bw’omoruoti, imotebie engencho ye chindoto chiria.”" 
Daniel2:25 Erio bwango Arioki akaira Danieli ase obosio bw’omoruoti, akamotebia, “Nanyorire omonto korwa ase egati y’abooswa baria b’Abayuda oranyare kogotebia aye omoruoti engencho ye chindoto chiao.”" 
Daniel2:26 Omoruoti akaboria Danieli, oria orogetwe Beli‐Tesasari, “Inee! Aye nonyare gontebia chindoto echio narotete na engencho yaye?”" 
Daniel2:27 Danieli akairaneria omoruoti, akamotebia, “Onde tari ase abanto abang’aini, gose abaragori, gose abaringoria, gose abanto bamanyete igoro ye ching’enang’eni oranyare koorokia obobisi obo aye omoruoti kwaboririe," 
Daniel2:28 korende Nyasae ore igoro nere oranyare koorokia obobisi. Nere orakomanyie aye omoruoti Nebukadinesaro amang’ana agochia gokorekana ase amatuko agochi‐gocha. Chindoto chiao na okorora kwarora, ekero kwaraire borere, nachio echi:" 
Daniel2:29 “Aye omoruoti, ekero kwaraire borere bwao, okarengereria amang’ana agochia gokorekana ase amatuko agochi‐gocha, na ere oria okoorokia obobisi nigo agokomanyia amang’ana agochia gokorekana." 
Daniel2:30 Bono obobisi obo bwamaanoirwe asende, tari ng’a inche nigo imbwate obong’aini goetania abanto bande bonsi bare moyo, korende ng’a aye omoruoti omanyigwe engencho ye chindoto chiria, naende onyare komanya ebirengererio bire ase omoyo oo." 
Daniel2:31 “Aye omoruoti, ase okorora kwao okarora omogwekano omonene mono, oteneine ase obosio bwao. Omogwekano oyio nigo orenge omotambe, okomeka‐meka noborabu obonene, na okororekana kwaye nigo kwarenge gw’okoondokia." 
Daniel2:32 Omotwe bw’omogwekano oria nigo oroisetigwe korwa ase etahabu engiya mono; egekuba kiaye na amaboko aye nigo biaroisetigwe korwa ase chifeta, na enda yaye na amariagati aye nigo biaroisetigwe korwa ase chitaai." 
Daniel2:33 Amagoro aye nigo aroisetigwe korwa ase ebioma, na ebisanyi bi’amagoro nigo biarenge ekeng’ese ki’ebioma, na ekeng’ese ki’amaroba." 
Daniel2:34 Ekero kwarigereretie okarora rigena rigotegoka ritakuniri namaboko a mwanyabanto, rigaaka amagoro ’omogwekano oria arenge ay’ebioma na amaroba, rikayasamunyora akaba ebisamunye." 
Daniel2:35 Erio ebioma biria, na amaroba, ne chitaai, ne chifeta, ne chitahabu, bionsi ebio bigasamunyoranwa, bikaba buna omoiriro ore ase ekeooreri ekero ki’eguru‐gura. Omwaga okairurukia ebinto biria gochia aare nonya nokoba kwabo tikwarorekana aande. Korende rigena riria riagete omogwekano oria rigakina, rikaba egetunwa ekenene kegaichora ase ense engima." 
Daniel2:36 “Oko nakwo okorota kwarotete, na bono intwe ntogotebie aye omoruoti engencho yaye." 
Daniel2:37 Aye omoruoti nigo ore omonene goetania abaruoti bande. Nyasae ore igoro okoeire oboruoti, na okobua, ne chinguru, na obonene," 
Daniel2:38 naende obekire mwanyabanto ase amaboko ao obagambere aande onsi ase bamenyete; okobekire ogambere boigo ching’iti chi’ense ne chinyoni chionsi; na omotwe oria bw’etahabu kwaroche noro aye. 
Daniel2:39 Korwa nyuma yao oboruoti bonde bore oboke ase obwao mbooroke, na nyuma y’oboruoti obwo, obonde bwa gatato bore obw’etaai mbooroke, na borobwo mbogambere ense yonsi." 
Daniel2:40 Naende oboruoti bwa kane mbooroke, bore obokong’u buna ekioma kegoaka na gosenyenta ebinto bionsi. Buna koreng’ana ekioma kegosenyenta ebinto, oboruoti boria nabo borasenyente na gosiria onsi." 
Daniel2:41 Na buna kwaroche ebisanyi na ebiara bi’amagoro biarenge ekeng’ese ki’amaroba na ekeng’ese ki’ebioma, engencho yaye nero eye: Oboruoti obwo mbwatananekane. Korende chinsemo chinde chire chinkong’u buna ekioma nachibe ime ase oboruoti obwo, buna koreng’ana kwarora ekioma keburukaine namaroba." 
Daniel2:42 Na buna ebiara bi’amagoro biarenge ekeng’ese ki’ebioma na ekeng’ese ki’amaroba, naboigo oboruoti boria borabe obokong’u ensemo eyemo, na ensemo ende obworo." 
Daniel2:43 Buna kwarora ekioma keria keburukaine namaroba, naboigo abanto barasang’anane ase okonyuomerana, korende tibakonyara kobwatana amo buna koreng’ana ekioma getari kobwatana namaroba." 
Daniel2:44 Ase amatuko ’abaruoti abwo Nyasae ore igoro narente oboruoti botanyare gosarigwa, gose okobua kw’oboruoti obwo tibokoegwa egesaku kende. Obwo mbosenyente amaruoti onsi na koyasiria, na borobwo obonyene mbogenderere kobao goika kare na kare," 
Daniel2:45 buna koreng’ana kwaroche rigena rigotegoka rinyene korwa ase egetunwa, ritategoiri namaboko a mwanyabanto, ne rigena riria rigaaka na gosamunyora ekioma, na etaai, na amaroba, na efeta, na etahabu. Nyasae ore omonene okomanyirie aye omoruoti amang’ana agochi‐gocha. Chindoto chiao nechi’ekeene, na engencho yaye nagotebirie ney’ekeene.”" 
Daniel2:46 Erio Nebukadinesaro omoruoti agatung’ama inse akaumama, akaorokia amasikani ase Danieli, agachika ng’a ekeng’wanso na ubani biruegwe ase Danieli." 
Daniel2:47 Omoruoti agatebia Danieli, “Ekeene, Nyasae oino nere Nyasae ore igoro ye chinyasae chionsi, na Omonene bw’abaruoti, naende nere okomaanora obobisi. Namanyire aya, ekiagera aye kwamaanoire obobisi obo.”" 
Daniel2:48 Erio omoruoti akaa Danieli amasikani amanene, na ebiegwa ebinene ebinge, naende akamobeka akaba omogambi igoro ase orogongo rwonsi rwa Babeli na omoteneneri omonene igoro y’abang’aini bonsi ba Babeli." 
Daniel2:49 Danieli akaboria Nebukadinesaro, na ere akabeka Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, bakaba abanene igoro ase amang’ana ’orogongo rwa Babeli, korende Danieli akabeera ase enyomba y’omoruoti." 
Daniel3:1 Nebukadinesaro omoruoti akaroisia omogwekano korwa ase etahabu; obotambe bw’omogwekanooria nigo bwarenge obw’amaboko emerongo etano nomo, na obogare bwaye obw’amaboko atano na rimo; akayotenenia ase ense omweya ya Dura, agwo ase orogongo rwa Babeli." 
Daniel3:2 Erio omoruoti Nebukadinesaro agatoma abanto basangererie amo abagambi abanene b’oboruoti bwaye, na abagambi be chingongo chiaye, na abagavuna, na abasemia, na abagachi be chikungo, na abagambi ebina, na abamanyi b’amachiko, na abanene bande bonsi b’oboruoti bwaye. Abwo bonsi nigo barangereretigwe ase ogwatanana na gosesenia omogwekano oria Nebukadinesaro omoruoti konya atenenirie." 
Daniel3:3 Erio abagambi baria abanene, na abagambi be chingongo, na abagavuna, na abasemia, na abagachi be chikungo, na abagambi ebina, na abamanyi b’amachiko, na abanene bande bonsi b’ense eria, bagacha gwatanana na gosesenia omogwekano oria omoruoti Nebukadinesaro konya atenenirie. Ekero bateneine bosio bw’omogwekano oria," 
Daniel3:4 omoraria agaaka eriogi rinene, akabora, “Inwe abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, na ab’emenwa yonsi, mwachikirwe" 
Daniel3:5 ng’a ekero moraigwe eriogi ri’ebitureri, na ebiroria, na amakano ao ao, na amarandi, na amariogi a kera egento ki’amatera, goika motung’ame inse, mosasime omogwekano bw’etahabu, oria Nebukadinesaro omoruoti atenenirie." 
Daniel3:6 Omonto onde bwensi otatung’ameti na koumama ase okoyosasima, erio agwo kegima oyio narutwe ase eriko ri’omorero ekebemberi.”" 
Daniel3:7 Ase ayio ekero abanto b’ebisaku bionsi na ab’emenwa yonsi baigwete eriogi ri’ebitureri, na ebiroria, na amakano ao ao, na amariogi a kera egento ki’amatera, bonsi bakaba bagatung’ama na gosasima omogwekano bw’etahabu, oria omoruoti konya atenenetie." 
Daniel3:8 Bono abanto bande b’Abakalidayo bakagenda bagasoera Abayahudi. 
Daniel3:9 Bagakwana, bagatebia Nebukadinesaro omoruoti, “Aye omoruoti, ochie kare!" 
Daniel3:10 Aye omoruoti nigo kwarua ogochika ng’a kera omonto okoigwa eriogi ri’ebitureri, na ebiroria, na amakano ao ao, na amarandi, na amariogi a kera egento ki’amatera, goika atung’ame inse na gosasima omogwekano oria bw’etahabu," 
Daniel3:11 naende ng’a omonto onde bwensi otatung’ameti inse na koumama ase okoyosasima, oyio goika arutwe ase eriko ri’omorero ekebemberi." 
Daniel3:12 Bono mbare aa abanto bande b’Abayahudi abwo gwachorete gotenenera amang’ana ’orogongo oro rwa Babeli: Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego. Aye omoruoti, abanto aba bachayire amachiko ao; barabwo tibari gokorera chinyasae chiao gose gotung’ama na koumama ase ogosasima omogwekano oria bw’etahabu aye gwatenenetie.”" 
Daniel3:13 Erio omoruoti Nebukadinesaro akaba nekeririanda egetindi, agachika ng’a Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, barentwe asare, na abamura baria batato bakarentwa ase obosio bwaye." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadinesaro akababoria, “Inwe Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, Inee, nekeene ng’a inwe timori gokorera chinyasae chiane, gose timori gosasima omogwekano oria bw’etahabu ntenenetie?" 
Daniel3:15 Bono mobe ang’e, ekero moraigwe eriogi ri’ebitureri, na ebiroria, na amakano ao ao, na amarandi, na amariogi a kera egento ki’amatera motung’ame inse moumame ase ogosasima omogwekano oria naroisirie, ayio naro arabe buya asemore; korende onye timokoyosasima, rirorio agwo kegima goika morutwe ase eriko ri’omorero ekebemberi. Inee! Nenyasae ereri eranyare kobatooria korwa ase amaboko aane?”" 
Daniel3:16 Erio Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, bakairaneria omoruoti oria, bakamotebia, “Aye Nebukadinesaro, titoganeti gokoiraneria igoro y’amang’ana aya." 
Daniel3:17 Aye omoruoti, Nyasae oito, oria togokorera, nanyare gototooria korwa ase eriko ri’omorero ekebemberi, na korwa ase amaboko ao." 
Daniel3:18 Korende nonya tagochia gototooria korwa asore aye omoruoti, goika omanye ng’a intwe titogwancha gokorera chinyasae chiao, gose gosasima omogwekano bw’etahabu, oyio gwatenenetie.”" 
Daniel3:19 Erio Nebukadinesaro agaichorwa nekeririanda, na obosio bwaye bokaonchoka igoro ya Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego. Agachika ng’a omorero bw’eriko riria omentwe obe omonene ara gatano na kabere kobua oyo o botambe." 
Daniel3:20 Agachika abarwani esegi barenge ne chinguru basibe Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, babarute ime ase eriko riria ri’omorero ekebemberi." 
Daniel3:21 Ase ayio abamura baria batato bagasibwa bare ne chisirwari chiabo, ne chiganchwa chiabo, na emiambaro yabo, ne chianga chinde, bakarutwa ase eriko riria ri’omorero ekebemberi." 
Daniel3:22 Bono ekiagera ogochika kw’omoruoti kwarenge ogotindi, na ase ayio omorero bw’eriko riria konya omentirwe obeire omonene mono, chimeme chi’omorero oria chigasamba na goita abanto baria barutete Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, ase omorero oria." 
Daniel3:23 Abanto baria batato: Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, bakagwa ase eriko riria ri’omorero ekebemberi basibire." 
Daniel3:24 Erio Nebukadinesaro omoruoti agakumia na goichana, agatenena ase obwango, akaboria abasemia baye, “Inee! Titwarutete abanto batato boka ase omorero basibire?” Bakamoiraneria, “Ee, aye omoruoti, ayio namaene.”" 
Daniel3:25 Omoruoti akabairaneria, akabatebia, “Na bono nindoche abanto bane basiboire, bagotaara ime ase omorero, na barabwo tibayieti aande nonya ng’ake; omonto oria o kane nigo akororekana buna omwana bw’enyasae.”" 
Daniel3:26 Ase ayio Nebukadinesaro akagenda ang’e nomonwa bw’eriko riria ri’omorero ekebemberi, agaaka eriogi, akarangeria, “Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, inwe abasomba ba Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono, soka korwa ime agwo, moche aiga!” Erio Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, bagasoka korwa ase omorero oria." 
Daniel3:27 Abagambi abanene b’oboruoti, na abagambi be chingongo, na abagavuna, na abasemia b’omoruoti bagasangererekana amo, bakarora ng’a omorero oria torenge nokobua konde gwonsi igoro ase emebere y’abanto baria; chitukia chi’emetwe yabo tichiarurogete, ne chianga chiabo tichiayiete, gose tibatiogete rimisu ri’omorero." 
Daniel3:28 Erio Nebukadinesaro agaaka eriogi, agateba, “Atogigwe Nyasae o Sadaraka, na o Meshaka, na bw’Abedi‐Nego, oyio otomire omomalaika oye gotooria abasomba baye abwo bamosemeretie na bangete koigwera ogochika kwane inche omoruoti, bakarua emebere yabo esire kobua gokorera na gosasima enyasae ende yonsi, otatiga Nyasae obo bweka." 
Daniel3:29 “Bono narure ogochika ng’a omonto onde bwensi bw’egesaku kende gionsi, gose bw’omonwa onde bwensi, orakwane mamincha ya Nyasae o Sadaraka, na o Meshaka, na bw’Abedi‐Nego, oyio nabutoranwe ekiimo ase ekiimo, na enyomba yaye netagorwe ebe rituuri, ekiagera enyasae ende teri eranyare gotooria ase enchera buna eye.”" 
Daniel3:30 Omoruoti akabeka Sadaraka, na Meshaka, na Abedi‐Nego, bakaba abanene ase orogongo rwa Babeli." 
Daniel4:1 Omoruoti Nebukadinesaro agatoma amang’ana gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, na ab’emenwa yonsi, baria bamenyete ase ense yonsi, akabatebia: “Omorembe omentekane asemore!" 
Daniel4:2 Inche narorire ng’a mbuya ing’orokie ebimanyererio na amakumia Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono ankoreire.” 
Daniel4:3 “Naki ebimanyererio biaye bire ebinene, na amakumia aye are nokobua okonene! Oboruoti bwaye nigo bore obwa kare na kare, na obogambi bwaye nigo bogendererete ekiaare ase ekiaare." 
Daniel4:4 “Inche Nebukadinesaro nigo namenyete nomogoko ase enyomba yane, nkaba ngendererete goseseneka ase enyomba yane y’oboruoti." 
Daniel4:5 Nkarota okorota kwang’ondogetie; ekero naraire borere bwane, nkarora okorora gokaba kogonchanda ase ebirengererio biane." 
Daniel4:6 Ase ayio nkarua ogochika ng’a abanto abang’aini bonsi ba Babeli barentwe ase obosio bwane, erinde bantebie engencho ye chindoto chiria." 
Daniel4:7 Erio abaringoria, na abaragori, na Abakalidayo bamanyete oborogi, na abamanyete igoro ye ching’enang’eni, bagacha asende. Inche nkabatebia chindoto chiria, korende tibanyarete gontebia engencho yaye." 
Daniel4:8 Omoerio oye Danieli agacha ase obosio bwane, ere oria okorokwa Beli‐Tesasari, erieta ri’enyasae yane, na omoika bwe chinyasae chinchenu nigo ore ime yaye. Nkamoorokeria chindoto chiria, nkamotebia:" 
Daniel4:9 Aye Beli‐Tesasari, omonene bw’abaringoria, namanyire ng’a omoika bwe chinyasae chinchenu nigo ore ime yao, naende namanyire ng’a obobisi tibori bore obokong’u asore. Chindoto narotete nachio echi, na aye intebie engencho yaye." 
Daniel4:10 “Oko nakwo okorora naroche ekero naraire borere bwane: Nkarora omote omonene orenge omotambe mono oteneine ase egati‐gati y’ense. 
Daniel4:11 Omote oria nigo ogendererete gokina, okaba ne chinguru, ogatambea gochia igoro, okarorekana ase chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense." 
Daniel4:12 Amato aye nigo arenge amaya, na amatunda aye nigo arenge amange; ase omote oria endagera nao yarenge goisanekia abanto bonsi. Ching’iti chi’orosana nao chiare konyora ekiriri chigokenderera inse yaye, ne chinyoni chikaba chikomenya ime ase chinsagia chiaye, na kera egetongwa kere moyo gekanyora endagera yaye korwao." 
Daniel4:13 “Ekero naraire borere bwane, nkarora ase okorora kwane omorendi omochenu ogoika korwa igoro." 
Daniel4:14 Ere agaaka eriogi rinene, agateba: Gecha omote oyio na onache chinsagia chiaye, osose amato aye na osiarere amatunda aye; ching’iti chi’orosana chitame korwa aroro, ne chinyoni chirue ase chinsagia chiaye." 
Daniel4:15 Korende otige egesike kere nemeri yaye ase riroba, kebe gesibire nekenyuri gi’ekioma na etaai, agwo ase obonyansi oborere bw’orosana. “Egesike ekio tiga kenyirirerwe ne riime rikorwa igoro, na egetari ki’omoruoti oyio kebe amo ne ching’iti chi’orosana, agwo ase egati y’ebimeri bi’ense." 
Daniel4:16 Enkoro yaye neonchorwe teba eya mwanyabanto naende; naegwe enkoro buna eye ching’iti ase ebiro bitano na bibere. 
Daniel4:17 Okonachwa kw’amang’ana aya kwarurwe nabarendi baria abachenu, na ogochika oko nigo kwarurwe na baria abachenu. Ase igo abare moyo banyare komanya ng’a Oyore Igoro Mono nere okogambera oboruoti bwa mwanyabanto, naende nere okoa oboruoti obwo ase onde bwensi aranche, naende nigo akobeka oria ore omoke mono ase egati y’abanto agambe ase oboruoti obwo." 
Daniel4:18 “Echio nachio chindoto inche Nebukadinesaro omoruoti narota. Aye Beli‐Tesasari, intebie engencho yaye, ekiagera abanto abang’aini bonsi bare ase oboruoti bwane basinyirwe gontebia engencho yaye, korende aye nonyare, ekiagera omoika bwe chinyasae chinchenu nigo ore ime yao.”" 
Daniel4:19 Erio Danieli, oyo orenge korokwa Beli‐Tesasari, agaichanigwa ase ekero egeke ase engencho y’amang’ana aria, na ebirengererio biaye bikamoichania. Omoruoti akamotebia, “Beli‐Tesasari, chindoto echi na engencho yaye, tibigoichania.” Beli‐Tesasari akairaneria, akamotebia, “Omonene one, naki yare koba buya onye chindoto echi nchiaba igoro y’abwo bakogechete, na engencho yaye ebe igoro y’ababisa bao." 
Daniel4:20 Omote oria kwaroche orenge omonene mono, na omotambe gochia igoro, naende okarorekana ase chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense;" 
Daniel4:21 amato aye arenge amaya, na amatunda aye namange, na ase omote oria endagera nao yarenge goisanekia abanto bonsi. Inse yaye ching’iti chi’orosana nao chiare konyora ekiriri chigokenderera, na ase chinsagia chiaye chinyoni chikaba chikomenyao." 
Daniel4:22 “Aye omoruoti, omote oria naye omonyene. Aye gwakinire, kwabeire ne chinguru. Obonene bwao bwakinire, bwaikire igoro, na obogambi bwao bwaikire ase chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense." 
Daniel4:23 Naende aye omoruoti, ekero kwarigereretie, okarora omorendi oria omochenu ogoika korwa igoro ogoteba: Gecha omote oyo oyosirie, korende otige egesike kiaye kere nemeri yaye ase riroba. Ogetige gesibire nekenyuri gi’ekioma na etaai, agwo ase obonyansi oborere bw’orosana, kenyirirerwe ne riime rikorwa igoro; egetari ki’omoruoti oyio kebe amo ne ching’iti chi’orosana ase ebiro bitano na bibere." 
Daniel4:24 “Aye omoruoti, engencho ye chindoto chiria neye: Okonachwa kw’amang’ana aya nigo kwarurwe n’Oyore Igoro Mono gocha asore, aye omoruoti, omonene one." 
Daniel4:25 Noserigwe gochia aare korwa ase mwanyabanto, na obomenyo bwao nigo borabe amo ne ching’iti chi’orosana. Nobetererigwe orisie obonyansi buna eng’ombe, na nonyirirerwe ne riime rikorwa igoro, ase ebiro bitano na bibere, goika onyare komanya ng’a Oyore Igoro Mono nere okogambera oboruoti bwa mwanyabanto, naende nere okoa oboruoti obwo ase onde bwensi aranche." 
Daniel4:26 Na buna amang’ana achigetwe ng’a egesike ki’omote getigwe amo nemeri, oboruoti bwao nabokoiranere ekero keria oramanye ng’a Oyore Igoro Mono nere okogamba." 
Daniel4:27 “Ase ayio, aye omoruoti, ancha ogosemia oko kwane. Tokora ebibe, na chaka gokora oboronge; tiga obobe bwao, na ororere abagokorerwa bobe amabera. Ande nabo oranyare komenterwa ogosesenigwa ase amatuko ao.”" 
Daniel4:28 Ayio onsi akamonyora Nebukadinesaro omoruoti. 
Daniel4:29 Ekero emetienyi ikomi na ebere yachia koera, akariina kerama igoro ki’enyomba y’oboruoti agwo Babeli, agataara aroro," 
Daniel4:30 agaaka eriogi, akabora, “Inee! Oyo tari Babeli omochie omonene, oyo inche naagachire ne chinguru chiane, na okobua kwane, obe obomenyo bw’omoruoti, erinde obe ogotogigwa kw’obonene bwane?”" 
Daniel4:31 Ekero agendererete gokwana, eriogi rikarwa igoro, rigoteba “Aye omoruoti Nebukadinesaro, aya naro ogotebigwa: Oboruoti bwarusigwe asore;" 
Daniel4:32 aye noserigwe korwa ase mwanyabanto, omenye amo ne ching’iti chi’orosana, nobe gokorisia obonyansi buna eng’ombe. Okoore ebiro bitano na bibere goika ekero oramanye ng’a Oyore Igoro Mono nere okogambera oboruoti bwa mwanyabanto, na nere okoa oboruoti obwo ase onde bwensi aranche.”" 
Daniel4:33 Ase engaki eyio ring’ana riria rigaikeranigwa igoro ya Nebukadinesaro. Agaserigwa korwa ase mwanyabanto, akaba okorisia obonyansi buna eng’ombe; omobere oye okaba okonyirirerwa ne riime rikorwa igoro, goika etukia yaye egakina ekaba entambe buna amarionya ’ensoti, ne chinchara chiaye chigakina chikaba buna echie chinyoni." 
Daniel4:34 “Ekero engaki eyio yaerete, inche Nebukadinesaro nkarigereria gochia igoro, na obong’aini bwane bokang’iranera. Erio nkamotogia Oyore Igoro Mono, nkamobaka na komosika ere oyoreo goika kare na kare.” “Okogamba kwaye nigo kore ogwa kare na kare, na oboruoti bwaye nigo bogendererete ekiaare ase ekiaare." 
Daniel4:35 Abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense nigo babarire ng’a nigo bare bosa. Ere nigo agokorera emeganda ya igoro buna anchete, akorera na mwanyabanto bare ase ense boigo. Onde tari oramotange, gose komoboria: Ngento ki ekio ogokora?”" 
Daniel4:36 Ase engaki eyio obong’aini bwane bokang’iranera, na obonene bw’oboruoti bwane, na obw’amasikani aane, bikang’iranera boigo. Abasemia baane, na abanto baane abanene bagacha kondigia, na inche nkairanerigwa oboruoti bwane, na nkamenterwa okobua okonene goetania." 
Daniel4:37 Bono inche Nebukadinesaro nigo nkomotogia Omoruoti ore igoro na komobaka, ekiagera ogokora kwaye gwonsi nokwa boronge, ne chinchera chiaye boigo, na abwo bare abaenenu nigo akobakeyia." 
Daniel5:1 Omoruoti Belisasari agakora omoyega omonene, akarangeria abanto abanene koreng’ana elifu eyemo b’oboruoti bwaye, akaba okonywa edivai amo nabanto abwo elifu." 
Daniel5:2 Ekero anyure edivai atindire, agachika ng’a ebikorero biria bie chitahabu na ebie chifeta ebio Nebukadinesaro ise asakorete korwa ase Hekalu agwo Yerusalemu, birentwe, erinde ere, na abanene b’oboruoti bwaye, na abakungu baye, na abakungu baye ba sere‐sere, banywere ebikorero ebio edivai." 
Daniel5:3 Erio bakarenta ebikorero biria bie chitahabu na ebie chifeta, ebio biasakoretwe korwa ase Hekalu, enyomba eria ya Nyasae agwo Yerusalemu; omoruoti, na abanene baria, na abakungu baye, na abakungu baye ba sere‐sere, bakabinywera." 
Daniel5:4 Bakanywa edivai na bagatogia chinyasae chiroisirie korwa ase chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitaai, na ebioma, na emete, na amagena." 
Daniel5:5 Mobosokano ebiara bi’okoboko kw’omonto bikaoroka, bikarika ase rioomo ri’enyasi y’enyomba y’omoruoti kororia ase ekebekerero gi’etaya, na omoruoti akarora okoboko koria gokorika." 
Daniel5:6 Erio agwo obosio bw’omoruoti bokaonchoka bokarachoka, na ebirengererio biaye bikamochanda; ebiimo bi’omobere oye bikororoba, na amaru aye agaakana." 
Daniel5:7 Omoruoti agaaka eriogi rinene, agachika ng’a abaragori na Abakalidayo bamanyete oborogi, na abamanyete igoro ye ching’enang’eni, barentwe, Agatebia abang’aini baria ba Babeli, “Omonto onde bwensi orasome amariko aya, naende antebie engencho yaye, ere nabekerwe eanga emonyinga, naende abekerwe chisonoi chie chitahabu igoti riaye, ere oyio nabekwe abe omogambi o gatato ase oboruoti obo.”" 
Daniel5:8 Erio abanto abang’aini bonsi b’omoruoti bagasoa ime, korende tibanyarete gosoma amariko aria, gose gotebia omoruoti engencho yaye." 
Daniel5:9 Belisasari omoruoti agachandeka mono ore nomooondoko, na obosio bwaye bokaonchoka bokarachoka, na abanene b’oboruoti bwaye bakaondoka." 
Daniel5:10 Eting’ana, ng’ina omoruoti, akaigwa amang’ana aya omoruoti na abanene baria barenge gokwana, erio agasoa ase enyomba eria y’omoyega agateba, “Aye omoruoti ochie kare! Tobaisa gochandeka ase ebirengererio biao, gose obosio bwao boonchoke borachoke." 
Daniel5:11 Omonto oyomo nare aiga ase oboruoti bwao, omoika bwe chinyasae chinchenu ore ime yaye. Ase engaki eria iso arenge kogamba, omonto oyio akarorekana ore noborabu, na okomanya, na obong’aini bore buna obwe chinyasae, ime yaye. Omoruoti Nebukadinesaro iso akamobeka akaba omonene bw’abaringoria, na abarogi, na Abakalidayo bamanyete oborogi, na abamanyete igoro ye ching’enang’eni, ee, nabo omoruoti iso akorete," 
Daniel5:12 ekiagera omoika omuya mono, na okomanya, na obong’aini bw’okomanya engencho ye chindoto, na koorokia engencho y’emebayeno, na korongeyia obokong’u, biarenge ime ase omonto oria Danieli, oria omoruoti arogete Beli‐Tesasari. Bono tiga Danieli arangerigwe, nere oratebe engencho y’amariko aya.”" 
Daniel5:13 Erio Danieli akarentwa ase obosio bw’omoruoti, na omoruoti akamoboria: “Inee! Naye Danieli oria, oyomo bw’abanto baria boosetwe korwa ase ense y’Abayuda, oria omoruoti tata arentete korwa ase ense eria?" 
Daniel5:14 Naigure igoro yao ng’a omoika bwe chinyasae chinchenu nigo ore ime yao, naende ng’a oborabu, na okomanya, na obong’aini obuya mono, nigo bikonyorekana ime yao" 
Daniel5:15 Bono abanto abang’aini na abarogi mbarentwa ase obosio bwane basome amariko aya, naende bantebie engencho yaye, korende tibanyarete gontebia engencho y’amang’ana aya." 
Daniel5:16 Korende naigure ng’a aye nonyare koorokia engencho y’amang’ana, na korongeyia obokong’u. Bono koranyare gosoma amariko ayio na komanyia engencho yaye, rirorio nobekerwe eanga emonyinga, na obekerwe chisonoi chie chitahabu igoti riao, aye nobe omogambi o gatato ase oboruoti obo.”" 
Daniel5:17 Erio agwo Danieli akairaneria omoruoti, akamotebia, “Gacha ebiegwa biao, na kae omonto omoao ebio oganetie kong’a. Korende nonya naboigo, inche ningosomere aye omoruoti amariko aya, naende ngotebie engencho yaye." 
Daniel5:18 “Aye omoruoti, Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono naete Nebukadinesaro iso oboruoti, na obonene, na ogotogigwa, na okobua okonene," 
Daniel5:19 na ase engencho y’obonene obwo amoete, abanto bonsi, na ebisaku, na abanto b’emenwa ao ao, bakaba bagotengechigwa na koiroka ase obosio bwaye. Omonto onde bwensi ere aganetie goita, nigo arenge komoita, na oyo aganetie gotiga abe moyo, nigo arenge komotiga oba moyo; na oyo aganetie gokinia abe omonene, nigo arenge komokinia, na oyo aganetie gokeyia, nigo arenge komokeyia." 
Daniel5:20 Korende ekero enkoro yaye yeimokereretie igoro, na omoika oye okong’ete na koenena, nigo aseretigwe korwa ase ekerogo kiaye ki’oboruoti, akaurwa obonene bwaye." 
Daniel5:21 Nigo aseretigwe korwa ase mwanyabanto, na enkoro yaye ekaonchorwa ekaba buna eye ching’iti, akabetererigwa komenya amo ne chitigere chi’orosana na korisia obonyansi buna eng’ombe; omobere oye okanyirirerwa ne riime rikorwa igoro, goika ekereo amanyete ng’a Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono nere okogambera oboruoti bwa mwanyabanto, na nere okobeka onde bwensi anchire abe omogambi." 
Daniel5:22 “Aye Belisasari ore omwana oye, tibwekeeti ase enkoro yao nonya kwamanyete amang’ana ayio onsi," 
Daniel5:23 korende kweimokereirie igoro mamincha y’Omonene ore igoro. Ebikorero bi’enyomba yaye biarentirwe ase obosio bwao; aye amo nabanto b’oboruoti bwao, na abakungu bao, na abakungu bao ba sere‐sere, babinywereire edivai. Aye kwabeire kogotogia chinyasae chiroisirie korwa ase chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitaai, na ebioma, na emete na amagena, echio chitari korora, gose koigwa, gose chitamanyeti gento, korende Nyasae oria obomoyo bwao bore ase okoboko kwaye, ne chinchera chiao chionsi chire ase okobua kwaye, tomotogeti." 
Daniel5:24 Ayio naro agerete Nyasae agatoma okoboko koria gokarika amariko aya. 
Daniel5:25 “Amariko arigetwe naro aya: MENE, MENE, TEKELI, NA‐PARISINI." 
Daniel5:26 Engencho y’amang’ana ayio nero eye: MENE, engencho yaye: Nyasae obarire amatuko ’oboruoti bwao obokoorire;" 
Daniel5:27 TEKELI, engencho yaye: kwarengirwe ase ekerengero na kwanyorekanire noremeire;" 
Daniel5:28 PARISINI, engencho yaye: oboruoti bwao bwatananirwe, bwaeirwe Abamedi na Abaayemi.”" 
Daniel5:29 Erio Belisasari akarua ogochika ng’a Danieli abekerwe eanga emonyinga, ne chisonoi chie chitahabu igoti riaye, na ararigwe ng’a ere nomogambi o gatato ase obogambi obo." 
Daniel5:30 Ase obotuko obwo obwo Belisasari, omoruoti bw’Abakalidayo, agaitwa agakwa," 
Daniel5:31 na Dario Omomedi akaira oboruoti obwo. Ere nigo arenge nemiaka emerongo etano nomo, na ebere." 
Daniel6:1 Dario akarora ng’a mbuya abeke abagambi abanene b’oboruoti rigana erimo, na emerongo ebere, babe bakogamba ase oboruoti bwaye bwonsi." 
Daniel6:2 Naende akabeka abanene batato igoro ase abwo; Danieli nigo arenge oyomo obo. Abagambi baria abanene nigo barenge koba bakorua omobaro ase abwo batato, erinde omoruoti tabaisa gosirerwa nenibo." 
Daniel6:3 Danieli akamanyekana kobua abanene baria bande, na kobua abagambi baria abanene, ekiagera abwate omoika omuya mono ime yaye; na omoruoti akarengereria komobeka igoro y’oboruoti bwonsi." 
Daniel6:4 Erio abanene baria na abagambi baria abanene bakarigia banyore okomocha ase okogamba kwa Danieli, erinde bagende komosoera, korende tibanyorete kende gionsi ekebe, gose okomocha asare, ekiagera ere nigo arenge omwegenwa; okomocha gose gento kende ekebe tibianyorekanete asare." 
Daniel6:5 Erio abanto abwo bagatebania, “Titokonyara konyora okomocha konde gwonsi ase Danieli okwo torabwatererie tomosoere, otatiga torarigie okomocha kobwatekana buna amoirogete Nyasae oye.”" 
Daniel6:6 Abanene baria bande, na abagambi baria abanene bakabwatana amo, bakagenda ase omoruoti, bakamotebia, “Aye omoruoti Dario, ochie kare!" 
Daniel6:7 Abanene bonsi b’oboruoti, na abagambi bonsi be chingongo, na abagambi baria abanene, na abasemia, na abagavuna, bancheranire ng’a aye omoruoti obeke richiko na okaane bokong’u ng’a monto onde bwensi tabaisa gosaba enyasae ende yonsi, gose omonto onde, otatiga aye bweka aye omoruoti, ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etato. Aise gokora ayio, rirorio arutwe ase engoro ye chindo." 
Daniel6:8 Bono aye omoruoti, beka richiko erio na orikong’ie, naende oribeke ekemanyererio kiao, erinde tiribaisa koonchorwa, koreng’ana buna amachio ’Abamedi na Abaayemi atari koonchorwa.”" 
Daniel6:9 Ase ayio Dario omoruoti akabeka ekemanyererio kiaye ase amariko e richiko riria. 
Daniel6:10 Ekero Danieli amanyete ng’a amariko e richiko riria abekirwe ekemanyererio, akagenda nyomba mwaye, akariina gochia ase akanyomba ka irongo ase chitirisa chiaigoire kororia Yerusalemu, akaba ogotung’ama ara gatato ase kera rituko, akaba ogosaba na goakera Nyasae oye ng’a mbuya mono, buna anarete botambe." 
Daniel6:11 Bono abanto baria bagatubokera Danieli amo, bakamonyora ogosaba okorangeria Nyasae oye amokonye." 
Daniel6:12 Abanto baria bakagenda ase omoruoti, bakamoboria igoro ye richiko riria: “Aye omoruoti, Inee! Tikwabeka ekemanyererio kiao ase richiko riria, ogateba ng’a ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo etato monto onde bwensi orasasime enyasae ende eng’ao, gose omonto onde, otatiga aye bweka aye omoruoti, oyio arutwe ase engoro ye chindo?” Omoruoti akairaneria, “Ee, richiko erio nigo riteneine bokong’u ritaonchorwe, koreng’ana buna amachiko ’Abamedi na Abaayemi atari koonchorwa.”" 
Daniel6:13 Erio bakairaneria, bakamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, Danieli, oria oyomo bw’Abayuda baria boosetwe, ere tari gokoigwera, gose koigwera richiko riria kwabegete ekemanyererio kiao, korende nigo agokora ogosaba kwaye botambe ara gatato kera rituko.”" 
Daniel6:14 Ekero omoruoti aigwete amang’ana aria, agachandeka mono, akarigia enchera y’ogotooria Danieli. Goika ekero erioba korikogwa akaba ogendererete korigia enchera y’okomotooria." 
Daniel6:15 Naende abanto baria bagatubokera omoruoti bare amo, bakamotebia, “Aye omoruoti, manya ng’a amachiko ’Abamedi na Abaayemi naya, ng’a ogochika konde gwonsi omoruoti abekire na kogokong’ia tigokoonchorwa nonya ng’ake.”" 
Daniel6:16 Erio omoruoti akarua ogochika ng’a Danieli arentwe. Danieli akarentwa, akarutwa ase engoro ye chindo. Omoruoti agatebia Danieli, “Nyasae oo, oria ogokorera botambe nagotoorie.”" 
Daniel6:17 Rigena rikarentwa rigakuneka ase omonwa bw’engoro eria, erio omoruoti akabeka ekemanyererio kiaye omonyene amo nebi’abanene b’oboruoti bwaye, erinde amang’ana ande onsi Danieli akoreretwe taonchorwa." 
Daniel6:18 Erio omoruoti akairana, akagenda nyomba mwaye, akeng’ata ase obotuko boria bwonsi. Tancha chigosori na kogokerwa konde gwonsi bikorwe, ne chitoro chikamobora." 
Daniel6:19 Mambia kobogokiamoka omoruoti akaimoka akaayerera gochia ase engoro eria ye chindo. 
Daniel6:20 Ekero aigete ang’e nengoro eria ase Danieli arutetwe, akarangeria neriogi ri’omoichano, akaboria Danieli, “Aye Danieli, omosomba o Nyasae ore moyo, Inee, Nyasae oo, oria ogokorera botambe, ogotooririe korwa ase chindo?”" 
Daniel6:21 Erio Danieli akairaneria omoruoti, “Aye omoruoti, ochie kare!" 
Daniel6:22 Nyasae one natomete omomalaika oye, agasieka emenwa ye chindo, na chirochio tichiankorerete bobe bonde, ekiagera nigo nanyorekanete ng’a tindi na komocha ase obosio bwaye; naboigo nase obosio bwao, aye omoruoti, tinkoreti komocha konde.”" 
Daniel6:23 Omoruoti akaba nomogoko omonene mono, agachika ng’a Danieli arusigwe ase engoro eria. Ase ayio Danieli akarusigwa aroro na tanyorekanete oarire aande onsi ase omobere oye, ekiagera nigo amosemeretie Nyasae oye." 
Daniel6:24 Erio omoruoti agachika ng’a abanto baria basoerete Danieli barentwe. Erio bakarutwa ase engoro eria ye chindo, barabwo amo nabana babo, na abakungu babo, na ekero bataragwa gochia inse y’engoro eria, chindo chiria chikabaumokera, chikabuna‐buna amauga onsi ay’emebere yabo." 
Daniel6:25 Nyuma y’ayio Dario omoruoti akarika amang’ana, akayatoma ase abanto bonsi, na ebisaku, na abanto b’emenwa ao ao, bamenyete ase ense yonsi, akabatebia: “Omorembe omentekane asemore:" 
Daniel6:26 Bono narure ogochika ng’a abanto bonsi bare ase oboruoti bwane baiguswe na koiroka ase obosio bwa Nyasae o Danieli.” “Ere nere Nyasae ore moyo, nigo areo goika kare na kare; oboruoti bwaye tibogosirigwa nonya ng’ake, na okogamba kwaye nkogenderere gotari nomoerio." 
Daniel6:27 Ere nigo agokonya na gotooria, nigo agokora ebikone na amakumia igoro na ase ense; ere otooririe Danieli korwa ase chinguru chie chindo.”" 
Daniel6:28 Bono Danieli oyio agasesenigwa akanyora okobua ase engaki y’okogamba kwa Dario na ey’ogwa Koresi Omoayemi. 
Daniel7:1 Ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba kwa Belisasari, omoruoti o Babeli, Danieli akarota chindoto, akarora amaroro ekero araire borere bwaye. Erio akarika akaorokia amang’ana aroche ase chindoto chiria." 
Daniel7:2 Aya naro amang’ana Danieli atebete: “Ase okorora kwane kwa botuko nkarora chimbeo inye chia igoro chigocha ne chinguru, chigaturubania enyancha enene." 
Daniel7:3 Ching’iti chinene inye chigatiira korwa ase enyancha ime; okororekana kwabo nigo kwarenge ao ao. 
Daniel7:4 Eng’iti entang’ani nigo yagwekaine endo, korende yabwate chimbaba buna echi’ensoti. Buna nabete ndigereretie, chimbaba chiaye nigo chiasimoire, ero ekaimokererigwa igoro korwa ase riroba, egatenenigwa namagoro abere buna omonto, ekaegwa enkoro ya mwanyabanto." 
Daniel7:5 “Naende nkarora eng’iti ya kabere yagwekaine edubu ekaimokerera igoro na kogunkwaria rikere riaye erimo; nigo yabwate chimbaru isato ase omonwa oye, gati‐gati y’amaino aye. Eng’iti eria egatebigwa: Imoka, orie chinyama chinyinge!" 
Daniel7:6 “Nyuma y’ayio nkarora eng’iti ende yagwekaine engo, korende ase omogongo oye nigo yabwate chimbaba inye buna echie chinyoni. Eng’iti eyio nigo yabwate emetwe ene; nero ekaegwa okobua gw’okogamba." 
Daniel7:7 “Naende nkarora ase amaroro aria a botuko eng’iti ya kane. Nigo yarenge ey’okoondokia na koirokia, boigo nigo yarenge ne chinguru chinyinge. Nigo yabwate amaino amanene ay’ebioma; ekaria na kobutorana, na eke yatigaretie ekagetindachera inse namagoro aye. Eyio nigo yarenge nogwatananekana korwa ase ching’iti chiria chiayetang’anerete; ero nigo yabwate chingunchara ikomi." 
Daniel7:8 Buna narenge ndigereretie na korengereria igoro ye chingunchara chiria, nkarora orogunchara ronde oroke rokooroka korwa ase egati‐gati ye chingunchara chiria. Orogunchara roria oroke rogasimora chingunchara isato ase echio ikomi chiarotang’anerete, rogachisimora amo nememio‐mio. Nkarora orogunchara roria robwate amaiso buna ay’omonto, na omonwa orenge gokwana amang’ana ’oboenenu." 
Daniel7:9 “Ekero narigereretie nkarora ebirogo bi’obonene bigoterekwa, na omonto omokoro bw’amatuko amange agaikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye. Chianga chiaye nigo chiarenge chindabu se se, na etukia y’omotwe oye nigo yarenge endabu buna amarionya ’eng’ondi endabu asibirie; ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene nigo kiarenge chimeme chi’omorero ogwoka, na amagoro ’ekerogo ekio nigo arenge omorero ogwoka." 
Daniel7:10 Orooche rw’omorero rogasoka korwa asare. Chilifu ne chilifu bakamokorera; ne chilifu ikomi ara chilifu ikomi bagatenena ase obosio bwaye. Ab’ekegambero bagaikaransa kogamba, ne chibuku chikamaanorwa." 
Daniel7:11 “Ekero narigereretie ekaba ng’a orogunchara roria rwagendererete gokwana amang’ana ’oboenenu. Ase engencho eyio nkarora eng’iti eria egaitwa, na omobere oye ogasarigwa okarutwa ase omorero ogasambwa." 
Daniel7:12 Ching’iti chiria chinde chiatigarete chikaurwa chinguru chiabo chi’okogamba, korende chigatigwa chigendendererete koba moyo goika ase ebiro ne chingaki chiachikeretwe." 
Daniel7:13 “Naende nkarora ase amaroro aane a botuko oyomo onga buna omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ogocha amo namare a igoro, agaika ang’e ase omonto oria omokoro bw’amatuko amange, akarentwa ase obosio bwaye." 
Daniel7:14 Ere oyio akaegwa okobua gw’okogamba, na obonene, na oboruoti, erinde abanto bonsi, na ebisaku, na abanto b’emenwa ao ao, bamokorere. Obogambi bwaye nobwa kare na kare, tibokoera, na oboruoti bwaye tibokobugwa." 
Daniel7:15 “Inche Danieli ngachandeka ase omoika one, na amaroro aria naroche akang’ondokia." 
Daniel7:16 Ngachiera oyomo bw’abanto baria bateneine aroro, nkamoboria antebie ekeene gionsi igoro y’amang’ana aria. Omonto oria agantebia na komanyia engencho y’amang’ana aria onsi iga:" 
Daniel7:17 Ching’iti echio chinene inye, abwo nabaruoti bane baraoroke ase ense." 
Daniel7:18 Korende abachenu b’Oyore Igoro Mono nabanyore oboruoti boragenderere goika kare na kare, ee goika kare na kare." 
Daniel7:19 “Erio nkagania komanya ekeene igoro y’eng’iti eria ya kane, eyarenge nogwatananekana korwa ase chiria chinde. Nigo yarenge ey’okooondokia mono, yabwate amaino ’ebioma ne chinchara chi’etaai; ekaria na kobutorana, na eke yatigaretie ekagetindachera inse namagoro aye." 
Daniel7:20 Naende nkagania komanya igoro ye chingunchara chiria ikomi chiarenge ase omotwe oye, na igoro y’orogunchara roria ronde oroke rwamerete korwa nyuma, orwo bosio bwaye isato ase chiria ikomi chiagweteo. Orogunchara orwo nigo rwabwate amaiso, na omonwa orenge gokwana amang’ana ’oboenenu, naende rokarorekana nigo rore oronene kobua echinde chiamwabo." 
Daniel7:21 “Buna nabete ndigereretie, nkarora orogunchara roria rokarwania abachenu esegi, rokababua," 
Daniel7:22 goika omonto oria omokoro bw’amatuko amange agacha, na abachenu b’Oyore Igoro Mono bakaegwa oboronge bwabo, na engaki egaika ekero abachenu bairete oboruoti boria." 
Daniel7:23 “Aya naro akwanete igoro y’eng’iti eria ya kane, agateba: Oboruoti bwa kane mbobe ase ense, borobwo nigo borabe nogwatananekana korwa ase amaruoti ande onsi. Nigo borarie ense yonsi na koyetindachera inse, naende boyebutorane ebe ebing’ese." 
Daniel7:24 Chingunchara chiria ikomi, abwo nabaruoti ikomi baraoroke, na nyuma yabo omoruoti onde naoroke. Ere nigo arabe nogwatananekana korwa ase abwo bamotang’anerete, nabue abaruoti batato." 
Daniel7:25 Ere nakwane amang’ana are mamincha y’Oyore Igoro Mono, naende narosie abachenu b’Oyore Igoro Mono na kobachanda; narengererie koonchora ebiro, na amachiko. Abachenu mbabekwe ase okoboko kwaye ase ekero ekemo, na ebiro bibere, na ekeng’ese gi’ekero." 
Daniel7:26 Korende ab’ekegambero mbaikaranse bagambe, bamoure okobua kwaye, na obogambi bwaye mbosirigwe boere kegima." 
Daniel7:27 Oboruoti, na okobua gw’okogamba, na obonene bw’amaruoti are inse y’erioba, mbiegwe abanto abachenu b’Oyore Igoro Mono. Oboruoti bwaye mbobe obwa kare na kare, na bonsi abaare kogamba mbamokorere na komoigwera." 
Daniel7:28 “Oyo noro omoerio bw’amang’ana ayio. Inche Danieli nkaba ng’ondogete ase ebirengererio biane, na obosio bwane bokaonchoka bokarachoka; korende nkagacha amang’ana aria ase enkoro yane ime.”" 
Daniel8:1 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba kwa Belisasari omoruoti, inche Danieli nkarora okorora konde nyuma ya koria kwe ritang’ani." 
Daniel8:2 Ase okorora kwane nkarora ng’a nigo narenge ase eburi y’omochie o Susa, agwo ase orogongo rwa Elamu. Ekero narengeo ase okorora kwane, nkarora inde ang’e norooche rwa Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Nkarigereria nkarora emingichi yabwate chingunchara ibere eteneine ase engegu y’orooche. Chingunchara chionsi ibere nigo chiarenge chintambe, korende oromo nigo rwarenge orotambe kobua oronde, na orwo orotambe nigo rwamerete korwa nyuma y’orwo ronde." 
Daniel8:4 Nkarora emingichi eria egotwoma gochia ensemo ya bosongo, na eya sugusu, na eya irianyi; eng’itiende tiyarenge konyara gotenena ase obosio bwaye, gose onde tarenge konyara gotooria korwa ase okobua kwaye. Nigo yarenge gokora buna yanchete, naende ekaba egokora amang’ana amanene." 
Daniel8:5 Ekero narenge ndengereretie amang’ana ayio, nkarora egoree egocha korwa bosongo, egaeta ase ense engima etari gotacha inse. Nigo yabwate orogunchara rw’ogokumia gati‐gati y’amaiso aye." 
Daniel8:6 Egachiera emingichi eria yabwate chingunchara ibere, eria naroche eteneine ase engegu y’orooche, ekarindokera emingichi eria ere nekeririanda ekenene." 
Daniel8:7 Nkarora egosuka gochia ang’e ase emingichi eria; egatwoma emingichi eria, ere nekeririanda ekenene ekayeiyeria inse, ekabuna chingunchara chiaye ibere. Emingichi eria tiyarenge ne chinguru chi’okorwana negoree eria, korende ekaiyerigwa inse na gotiringwa negoree eria. Onde tarenge konyara gotooria emingichi eria korwa ase okobua kw’egoree eria." 
Daniel8:8 Erio egoree eria egakora amang’ana amanene mono. Ekero yabete ne chinguru chinyinge, orogunchara rwaye oronene rokabuneka, na ase ribaga riaye chingunchara inye chi’ogokumia chikamerao chiarochie gochia ase chinsemo inye chia igoro." 
Daniel8:9 Korwa ase oromo rw’echio orogunchara ronde rokamera korwao; orwo rogakina mono gochia irianyi, na gochia moocha, na gochia ase ense eria engiya mono." 
Daniel8:10 Orogunchara orwo rogakina mono, rogaika ase emeganda ya igoro, rokaiyeria emeganda ende ne ching’enang’eni gocha inse aa, rogachitiringerao." 
Daniel8:11 Ee, orogunchara roria rogekinia na gwetogia igoro y’Omogambi bw’emeganda eria, rokarusia korwa ase Omogambi oria ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko, rogatagora Obomenyo bwaye Obochenu." 
Daniel8:12 Omoganda oria amo nekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gia kera rituko bikaruegwa na kobekwa ase okobua kw’orogunchara roria ase engencho y’ogosaria. Ekeene kegatugutwa inse, na orogunchara roria rokagenderera koba nokobua." 
Daniel8:13 Erio nkaigwa omochenu oyomo ogokwana, na omochenu onde akaboria oria orenge gokwana, “Nengaki eng’ana naki okorora okwo igoro y’ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko gokworokia? Nengaki eng’ana naki ogosaria kw’ogosiria korabe, na okoruegwa kw’Obomenyo Obochenu na okw’omoganda oria biratiringerwe inse korabe?”" 
Daniel8:14 Omochenu oria bwe ritang’ani akang’iraneria, “Nase engaki ye chimogoroba ne chimambia chilifu ibere, na amagana atato (2,300); nyuma y’ayio Obomenyo Obochenu mbochenwe.”" 
Daniel8:15 Ekero inche Danieli naroche okorora koria na nkarigia imanye engencho yaye, nkarora oyomo ogwekaine mwanyabanto oteneine ase obosio bwane." 
Daniel8:16 Nkaigwa eriogi ri’omonto rikorangeria korwa gati‐gati y’orooche rwa Ulai, rigoteba, “Aye Gabirieli, momanyie omonto oyio engencho y’okorora okwo!”" 
Daniel8:17 Ase ayio agacha ang’e ase nateneine; ekero aigete asende nkaondoka, nkagwa inse maumama. Korende omonto oria agantebia, “Aye mwanyabanto, manya ng’a okorora koria nigo gokworokia chingaki chi’omoerio.”" 
Daniel8:18 Ekero agendererete gokwana nainche, chitoro chinene chikambwata gontung’aime inse ng’umaime, korende agankuna, agantenenia, na inche ngatenena boronge." 
Daniel8:19 Nyuma y’ayio agantebia, “Rora, ningotebie aya agochia koba ase omoerio bw’endamwamu y’Omonene, ekiagera okorora okwo nigo gokworokia igoro y’engaki y’omoerio." 
Daniel8:20 “Emingichi eria kwaroche yabwate chingunchara ibere, abwo nabaruoti b’Abamedi na Abaayemi," 
Daniel8:21 na egoree eria yabwate amanya, oyio nomoruoti bw’Abagiriki, na orogunchara roria oronene rwarenge gati‐gati y’amaiso aye, oyio nomoruoti obo bwe ritang’ani." 
Daniel8:22 Orogunchara roria rwabunegete na aase aye chingunchara inye chikamera aroro, engencho yaye nere eye: Amaruoti ane naoroke korwa ase egesaku ekio, korende takoba nokobua buna koria kwa roria rwe ritang’ani." 
Daniel8:23 “Ase engaki y’omoerio bw’amagambi ayio, ekero abasaria barabe baikeire ekerengo kiabo ki’omoerio, omoruoti omotindi mono oichire nobong’ainereria naoroke." 
Daniel8:24 Ere nabe nokobua okonene mono, korende tari ase chinguru chiaye ere omonyene. Narente ogosiria okonene gw’okoondokia, nabue ase kende gionsi arakore. Nasirie abanto bare nokobua amo nabanto abachenu." 
Daniel8:25 Ase obong’aini bwaye bw’obong’ainereria nagenderere konyora okobua ase kende gionsi arakore, na ase ebirengererio biaye ere omonyene nekinie na koenena. Naite abanto abange mobosokano batakureiri. Naimokerere igoro koamererania n’Omogambi bw’abagambi. Erio nasenyentwe, korende tari nokoboko kwa mwanyabanto." 
Daniel8:26 Okorora okwo igoro ye chimogoroba ne chimambia gwakwanetwe nogw’ekeene. Kogache okobise, ekiagera nigo koraire amatuko amange komanye goikeranigwa.”" 
Daniel8:27 Inche Danieli nkaborwa chinguru, nkaba omorwaire ase amatuko amake. Nyuma y’ayio nkaimoka gochia gokora emeremo ase omoruoti, korende ngaichanigwa ase engencho y’okorora okwo, na onde tarenge omanyete engencho yaye." 
Daniel9:1 Ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba kwa Dario, mosinto bw’Ahaswero bw’ororeria rw’Abamedi, oyobegetwe akaba omoruoti kogambera Abakalidayo," 
Daniel9:2 ee, ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba kwaye, inche Danieli nkamanya korwa ase Amariko Amachenu igoro y’omobaro bw’emiaka eria ring’ana ri’Omonene riatebetie Yeremia omobani, ng’a emiaka emerongo etano na ebere nigo yarenge gocha koera, Yerusalemu ogendererete koba rituuri." 
Daniel9:3 Erio nkamorigereria Omonene Nyasae, nkamorigia nogosaba, na okoboria kw’oboitongo, na ase okweng’ata, nkeboyia chigunia na kweaka ribu." 
Daniel9:4 Nkamosaba Omonene, Nyasae one, nkaorokia ebibe biaito, ngateba: “Aye Omonene, ore Nyasae omonene, naende ore bw’okoorokia, aye okorenda okobwatana kwao kw’ogotianania na koorokia obwanchani bwao botari koera ase baria bagwanchete na kobwata amachiko ao." 
Daniel9:5 “Intwe twakorire ebibe na ayare amabe, twakorire obokayayu na ogosaria; twaonchokire, twatigire amachiko ao, na emeroberio yao echikire." 
Daniel9:6 Titwaigwerete abasomba bao ababani, baria barenge gokwana ase erieta riao ase abaruoti baito, na abanene baito, ne chisokoro chiaito, na ase abanto bonsi b’ense eye." 
Daniel9:7 Aye Omonene, nigo ogokora oboronge botambe, korende intwe botambe nigo tokwerentera obosooku buna iga rero, intwe abanto ba Yakobo, na abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu, na Abaisraeli bonsi, baria bare ang’e na abare aare ase chinse chionsi ase kwabaseretie gochia, ekiagera titwabete abegenwa asore." 
Daniel9:8 Aye Omonene, obosooku nigo bore asetore, na ase abaruoti baito, na ase abagambi baito, na ase chisokoro chiaito, ekiagera twakorire ebibe asore." 
Daniel9:9 Aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, nigo obwate amabera, naende nigo ogotwabera, nonya twasaririe asore." 
Daniel9:10 Titwaigwerete eriogi riao aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, ase okobwatia amachiko ao, ayio gwatochigete goetera ase abasomba bao ababani." 
Daniel9:11 Abaisraeli bonsi basaririe amachiko ao, baonchokire tibari koigwera eriogi riao. Ase ayio okoragererigwa okwo gwatianete koumora igoro yaito, okwo korikire ase amachiko a Musa, omosomba oo, aye Nyasae, gwatocheire, ekiagera intwe twakorire ebibe asore." 
Daniel9:12 Gwaikeranirie amang’ana ao, ayio gwakwanete asetore, na ase abagambi baria barenge gotogambera, ase ogotorentera amaakwa amanene. Inse y’erioba ayio akorekanire ase Yerusalemu tana gokorekana aande." 
Daniel9:13 Koreng’ana buna arikire ase amachiko a Musa, amaakwa ayio onsi atocheire. Nonya nabo titwasabete Omonene, Nyasae oito, atororere amabera; titwaonchogete korwa ase amabe aito na titwaigwete ekeene kiao." 
Daniel9:14 Ase ayio, aye Omonene nigo kwarenge nobomaene bw’ogotorentera amaakwa ayio, ekiagera aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, nigo ore omonyene oboronge ase ogokora kwao gwonsi, korende intwe titwaigwerete eriogi riao." 
Daniel9:15 “Na bono aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, aye kwarusetie abanto bao korwa ase ense ya Misiri nokoboko kwao kore nokobua, na kwemanyekanirie goika rituko ria rero. Intwe twakorire ebibe na ayare amabe." 
Daniel9:16 Aye Omonene, koreng’ana nogokora kwao gwonsi kw’oboronge koranche orusie endamwamu yao, na ekeririanda kiao, korwa ase Yerusalemu, omochie oo, ee, korwa ase egetunwa kiao egechenu. Ase engencho y’ebibe biaito, na ebie chisokoro chiaito, Yerusalemu amo nabanto bao babeire bagokwanwa bobe, ase egati y’abanto baria bonsi batoetanaine." 
Daniel9:17 Ase ayio bono, aye Nyasae oito, igwa ogosaba kwane inche omosomba oo, na ogosorora kwane, na ase engencho yao aye Omonene oraberie Obomenyo bwao Obochenu ase obosio bwao, Obomenyo obwo bore rituuri." 
Daniel9:18 Aye Nyasae one, tegerera oigwe, rigereria orore ogosirigwa gwaito, na omochie oyo okorokwa ase erieta riao. Intwe titori korenta ogosaba gwaito asore ng’a nabanyaboronge tore, korende nase engencho y’amabera ao amange." 
Daniel9:19 Aye Omonene, igwa! Aye Omonene, abera! Aye Omonene, tegerera oigwe, na okore emeremo yao; ase engencho yao aye omonyene totebana! Aye Nyasae one, kora ayio, ekiagera omochie oo nigo okorokwa ase erieta riao, na abanto bao boigo.”" 
Daniel9:20 Erio agwo nkagenderera gokwana na gosaba, nkaorokia ebibe biane, na ebi’abanto baane Abaisraeli na korenta ogosorora kwane ase obosio bw’Omonene, Nyasae one, ase engencho y’egetunwa egechenu kia Nyasae one." 
Daniel9:21 Ekero nagendererete gosaba, Gabirieli, omonto oria konya narorire ase okorora koria kwe ritang’ani, aganchichera bwango okoiruruka. Nigo yarenge engaki y’okoruegwa gw’ekeng’wanso kia mogoroba." 
Daniel9:22 Akanyorokereria, agantebia, “Aye Danieli, bono nigo nachire nkoe obong’aini na okomanya." 
Daniel9:23 Ekero gwachagete ogosorora kwao, ring’ana rikaruegwa, na bono inche nachire gokoritebia, ekiagera aye nigo bwanchire mono; ase ayio rengereria igoro ye ring’ana riria, na omanye engencho y’okorora koria." 
Daniel9:24 “Chichuma emerongo etano na ebere nachio chiachikirwe ase abanto bao, na ase omochie oo omochenu, gokoora ogosaria na gosiria ebibe, na gokora okobwatanigwa ase engencho y’obobe, naende korenta oboronge bwa kare na kare na kobeka okorora koria na obobani boria ekemanyererio, boigo goaka Aase Aachenu Mono amaguta na koachena." 
Daniel9:25 Ase ayio, omanye na korengereria ng’a korwa engaki eria ring’ana riaruetwe igoro ya Yerusalemu ng’a noagachwe naende, goika ase engaki y’ogocha kw’oyomo Omoakwa Amaguta, oyore omogambi, nachibe chichuma isano na ibere. Naende ase chichuma emerongo etano nomo, na ibere, omochie noagachwe amo ne chinchera chiaye ne chiburi chiaye, korende ase engaki y’emechando emenene." 
Daniel9:26 Nyuma ye chichuma echio emerongo etano nomo, na ibere, Omoakwa Amaguta oria naitwe, tari ase engencho yaye ere omonyene. Abanto b’omogambi orache mbasirie omochie oyo amo n’Obomenyo Obochenu. Omoerio oye noche buna chiooro, na goika omoerio esegi nebeo, ekiagera nigo ochikeretwe ogosirigwa korwa kare." 
Daniel9:27 Ere nakore okobwatana ogokong’u kw’ogotianania nabanto abange ase echuma eyemo; na ase egati‐gati y’echuma eyio nakoore ebing’wanso na okoruegwa gwonsi tibiruegwa naende. Oyokorenta obobe bw’okogechia nigo arache okoiruruka gosiria. Ayio nigo aragenderere goika egesusuro ki’ogosirigwa achikeretwe korwa kare geikeranigwe.” 
Daniel10:1 Ase omwaka o gatato bw’okogamba gwa Koresi, omoruoti bw’Abaayemi, Danieli oria orogetwe Beli‐Tesasari akamaanorerwa komanya ring’ana, ne ring’ana erio nigo riarenge eri’ekeene, rikararia ng’a emechando emenene neche. Danieli akamanya engencho ye ring’ana riria, na ey’okorora koria." 
Daniel10:2 Ase engaki eria inche Danieli nigo narenge nkona‐kweumia ase engaki ye chichuma isato. 
Daniel10:3 Tinarenge koria endagera engiya, gose koria enyama, gose konywa edivai. Tinarenge kweaka amaguta nonya ng’ake ase chichuma chiria isato." 
Daniel10:4 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na kane ri’omotienyi bwe ritang’ani, ekero nateneine ase engegu y’orooche roria oronene rwa Tigirisi," 
Daniel10:5 nkarigereria, nkarora omonto obegete eanga y’egatani, bweboeretie kenema kiaye norokini roroisirie korwa ase etahabu engiya ekorwa Ufasi." 
Daniel10:6 Omobere oye nigo orenge komeka‐meka buna berulo, rigena rie rigori rinene; obosio bwaye nigo bwarenge kororekana buna okomesa kw’embura, na amaiso aye nigo arenge gwoka buna ebieri bi’omorero. Amaboko na amagoro aye nigo arenge komeka‐meka buna etaai yasenigwe. Eriogi ri’amang’ana aye nigo riarenge kwoga buna eri’omoganda omonene bw’abanto." 
Daniel10:7 Ninche bweka Danieli naroche okorora koria abanto baria barenge amo nainche tibakoroche, korende obwoba obonene bokabasoa, erio bagatama bakebisa." 
Daniel10:8 Ngatigara inche bweka ndigereretie okorora koria, ne chinguru chikang’erera, ekieni kiane gekaonchoka gekarachoka, ne chinguru chionsi chikarua asende." 
Daniel10:9 Erio nkaigwa eriogi ri’amang’ana aye; ekero nariigwete, nkaba ne chitoro chinene, nkagwa inse nkaumama." 
Daniel10:10 Nkarora okoboko kogonkuna, gokanyimokia, ngatung’ama namaru, ngasigamera inse nebisanyi bi’amaboko nkoiguswa." 
Daniel10:11 Omonto oria agantebia, “Aye Danieli, omonto bwanchire mono, tegerera oigwe amang’ana aya ngokwana naye, imoka otenene boronge, ekiagera bono natomirwe asore.” Ekero agendererete gokwana ring’ana erio nainche, ngatenena boronge nkoiguswa." 
Daniel10:12 Erio agantebia, “Aye Danieli, tibwoboa, ekiagera korwa rituko rie ritang’ani kwaruete enkoro yao ase okomanya, naende ogekeyia ase obosio bwa Nyasae oo, amang’ana ao nigo aigwetwe, na bono inche nachire ase engencho y’amang’ana aria ao." 
Daniel10:13 Omogambi bw’oboruoti bw’Abaayemi akaamererania nainche ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ebere, na rimo, korende Mikaeli, oyomo bw’abagambi baria abanene, agacha gonkonya, ekiagera konya nabeire nteneine inche bweka koamererania nabaruoti b’Abaayemi." 
Daniel10:14 Bono inche nachire gokworokia aya agochia konyora abanto bao ase amatuko agochi‐gocha, ekiagera okorora okwo nigo gokworokia ay’amatuko akare bosio.”" 
Daniel10:15 Ekero akoorete gokwana nainche amang’ana aya, ngetureka gochia inse, nkaba rimansu." 
Daniel10:16 Erio oria ogwekaine mwanyabanto agakuna ebikoba biane, na inche nkamaanora omonwa one ngakwana. Ngatebia oria oteneine ase obosio bwane, “Aye Omonene one, okorora oko kwandeteire omoichano, ne chinguru chiarure asende." 
Daniel10:17 Naki inche omosomba oo ndanyare gokwana naye, Omonene one? Chinguru chionsi chiarure asende, na tindi nomoika ime yane.”" 
Daniel10:18 Naende oria ogwekaine mwanyabanto agankuna, na akambeka chinguru," 
Daniel10:19 agantebia, “Aye omonto bwanchire mono, tibwoboa, omorembe obe amo naye! Tenena bokong’u, naende obe omoremu!” Ekero arenge gokwana nainche, nkanyora chinguru, nkamotebia, “Aye Omonene one, kwana, ekiagera kwambekeire chinguru!”" 
Daniel10:20 Erio akamboria, “Inee, kwamanyire ekiagera nacha aa asore? Bono nkoirana inde ngende korwania omogambi bw’Abaayemi, na ekero ndabe namobuire, erio agwo omogambi bw’Abagiriki nachiche." 
Daniel10:21 “Nonya nabo ninkworokie aya arikire ase Ebuku y’Ekeene. Onde tari oranyare gonkonya otatiga Mikaeli, omogambi oino," 
Daniel11:1 “na inche nigo natenenete komokonya na komobeka chinguru ase omwaka bwe ritang’ani bw’okogamba kwa Dario Omomedi. 
Daniel11:2 “Bono nkogotebia inde ayare ay’ekeene. Naama! Abaruoti bande batato nabaoroke ase ense y’Ayemi. Naende omoruoti o kane naoroke, nigo arabe omonda kobua abwo batato bonsi. Ekero aranyore chinguru goetera ase obonda bwaye, naseegete bonsi bagende korwania oboruoti bw’Abagiriki." 
Daniel11:3 “Erio omoruoti ore ne chinguru chinene naoroke, abe okogamba nokobua okonene na akore buna anchete ere omonyene." 
Daniel11:4 Korende ekero omoruoti oyio aranyore chinguru chinene, oboruoti bwaye mbosareke bwatananeke ase chinsemo inye chi’ense, tibokoegwa abanto b’ororeria rwaye, tibokoba nokobua buna koria ere abwate. Oboruoti bwaye mbotegorwe boegwe abanto abaao." 
Daniel11:5 “Omoruoti o irianyi nabe ne chinguru, korende oyomo bw’abagambi b’oboruoti bwaye nabe ne chinguru komobua, na oboruoti bwaye mbobe obonene mono." 
Daniel11:6 Nyuma y’emiaka etari meke, omoruoti o irianyi nakore okobwatana nomoruoti o sugusu. Omoruoti o irianyi nasokie omoiseke oye ase omoruoti o sugusu ase ogokora okobwatana. Omokungu oyio takogenderera koba nokobua okwo araegwe, na omoruoti oria o sugusu takogenderera koba nokobua kwaye. Omokungu oria narusigweo aitwe, ere amo nabwo bamorentete, oyo omoiborete na oria omoete okobua ase engaki eria." 
Daniel11:7 Erio omonto natoke korwa ase omori bw’omokungu oria, oyio nache arwanie abarwani esegi b’omoruoti o sugusu, asoe ase chiburi chiaye, akore ase abanto buna anchete na kobabua." 
Daniel11:8 Ere nasakore chinyasae chiabo, na emegwekano yabo bagosasima ebombire, na ebikorero biabo ebiya biroisirie korwa ase chifeta ne chitahabu, abiire Misiri. Erio ase emiaka emeke natige korwania omoruoti o sugusu." 
Daniel11:9 Nyuma y’ayio omoruoti o sugusu nache korwania omoruoti o irianyi, korende goika airane gochia ase ense yaye omonyene." 
Daniel11:10 “Abamura b’omoruoti o sugusu mbebeke ang’e, basangererie abarwani esegi abange mono, oyomo agende aumokere ense eria nomoganda oye omonene oresiarere aande onsi, naende bairane eria kabere barwane gochia bosio bw’eburi yaye." 
Daniel11:11 Erio omoruoti oyio o irianyi nabe nendamwamu enene, nache korwania omoruoti o sugusu, na oria o sugusu nasangererie omoganda omonene bw’abarwani esegi, korende barabwo nababekwe ase okoboko kw’omoruoti o irianyi." 
Daniel11:12 Ekero omoruoti oyio o irianyi arabe osiririe omoganda oria, enkoro yaye inayeimokererie igoro, korende naisa goita chilifu chinyinge, takonyara kobua." 
Daniel11:13 “Omoruoti o sugusu nasangererie omoganda omonene bw’abarwani esegi obuete oria bwe ritang’ani, erio nyuma y’emiaka emeke nairane ore nomoganda omonene na ebinto ebinge biganeirie ase esegi." 
Daniel11:14 Ase engaki eyio eyio abanto bande abange mbaimokere omoruoti o irianyi, naende abanto abasaria b’egesaku kiao nabeimokererie igoro ase ogwetogia, erinde bai keranie okorora koria aye kwaroche, mbagochwe bagwe." 
Daniel11:15 Erio omoruoti o Sugusu nache aagache chiburi, abue omochie ogiteire chindwaki. Abarwani esegi b’omoruoti o irianyi mbabugwe, nonya nabarwani baye abachore tibakonyara kobua, ekiagera mbaborwe chinguru." 
Daniel11:16 Omoruoti oria o sugusu orachere oria o irianyi, nakore buna aranche; gose monto onde tari oramobue. Oyio natenene ase ense eria ere engiya mono, na ogosirigwa ngoche goetera ase okoboko kwaye." 
Daniel11:17 “Omoruoti oyio o sugusu nakore omoroberio, ache nokobua kw’oboruoti bwaye bwonsi, Natoeme gokora okobwatana nomoruoti o irianyi ase okomoa omoiseke oye abe mokaye, erinde asarie oboruoti boria kegima, korende amang’ana ayio tagosesenigwa, gose komokonya ere omonyene." 
Daniel11:18 Nyuma y’ayio naonchokere korwania ebisinka ne chinse chire ang’e nenyancha, nabue ebisinka ebinge ne chinse boigo. Korende omochiki oyomo bw’abarwani esegi namobue asirie ogochaya kwaye, ee, namoiranerie ogochaya okwo." 
Daniel11:19 Nairane agende ase chiburi chi’ense yaye omonyene, korende nagochwe agwe, takonyorekana naende." 
Daniel11:20 “Naende naoroke omoruoti onde ase ribaga riaye, ere natome omobangi bw’ebango aete ase ense eria ere obonene bw’oboruoti bwaye, Ase engaki y’amatuko amake omoruoti oria naitwe, korende tari ase engencho y’endamwamu, gose ase esegi." 
Daniel11:21 “Naende naoroke omoruoti onde omokorekanu ase ribaga ri’oria oitetwe. Oyio ere takoegwa amasikani ase oboruoti obwo. Nigo arache ng’ora ng’ora ase obong’ainereria bw’okweansia aire oboruoti. 
Daniel11:22 Ere nasirie abarwani esegi abange baria baramochere; boigo nasirie omogambi oria arakore okobwatana kw’ogotianania nere. 
Daniel11:23 Nyuma okobwatana kogwakorirwe nere, nakore ay’obong’ainereria, anyore okobua nonya obwate abanto abake boka." 
Daniel11:24 Nigo arache ng’ora ng’ora, asoe ase chinsemo chintobu chi’ense eria; nigo arakore amang’ana chisokoro ne chisokororia chiaye chitakorete, nasiarere ase egati y’abanto baye ebinto aureretie, na ebi asakorete, ne chinibo. Nakore emeroberio y’okorwania chiburi chinkong’u, korende ase engaki enke yoka." 
Daniel11:25 “Ere nabe noboremu, asangererie abarwani esegi abange mono gochia korwania omoruoti o irianyi, na omoruoti o irianyi nere nebeke ang’e korwana esegi nomoganda omonene mono ore ne chinguru, korende takobua, ekiagera nakorerwe emeroberio y’obong’ainereria." 
Daniel11:26 Abanto baria bakoria endagera amo nere mbamosirie, na abarwani baye b’esegi mbaserebekane, na abange mbaitwe bakwe." 
Daniel11:27 Abaruoti abwo babere mbabe bakoroberia ng’a bakore amabe, baikaranse ase emesa eyemo babe bagotebania oborimo, korende ayio tagosesenigwa, na omoerio nigo oraike ase engaki eria echikire." 
Daniel11:28 Omoruoti oria o sugusu nairane gochia ase ense yaye, aire ebinto ebinge asakoire, na enkoro yaye neroberie mamincha y’okobwatana koria ogochenu, na ekero arabe oikeranirie ayio, nairane gochia ase ense yaye omonyene." 
Daniel11:29 “Naende ase engaki echikire nairane gochia ase ense ya irianyi, korende ase engaki eyio amang’ana takoba buna aye ritang’ani." 
Daniel11:30 Chimeeri chia Kitimu nchiche komorwania, nere noboe atame airane, naonchore ekeririanda kiaye mamincha y’okobwatana ogochenu. “Ekero arabe oiranire nabe ogotegerera na koigwera abwo batigire okobwatana okwo ogochenu." 
Daniel11:31 Abarwani bande b’esegi batometwe nere mbakore Obomenyo Obochenu bobe botachenegeti, nabarusieo ekeng’wanso ki’ogosambwa gwa kera rituko, na agwo mbatenenie okogechia koria kogosiria." 
Daniel11:32 Abwo bagokora amabe ase okobwatana okwo ere nabang’use namang’ana ay’okweansia goika bagotige kegima, korende abanto baria bamomanyete Nyasae obo mbatenene bokong’u bakore ayabagwenerete bakore." 
Daniel11:33 Abwo bare nobong’aini ase egati y’abanto mborokererie abange babe nokomanya. Korende ase engaki enke abande babo nabaitwe nemioro, na abande basambwe nomorero, na abande bairwe ase obosomba, na abande basakorwe ebinto biabo." 
Daniel11:34 Ekero emechando eyio erabachere, abanto ba Nyasae nabanyore ogokonywa ogoke. Abanto abange mbabwatane nabarabwo ase obong’ainereria bw’okweansia." 
Daniel11:35 Abande b’abwo bare abang’aini nabanyorwe nemechando eyio, erinde ogocheneka kobe ase egati yabo, basibeke goika engaki y’omoerio oyo oraike ase engaki eria echikire." 
Daniel11:36 “Omoruoti oria nigo arakore buna anchete. Ase obomwenu bwaye neimokererie igoro ase kera enyasae, nakwane amang’ana ’ogokumia mamincha ya Nyasae oyobuete chinyasae chionsi. Nagenderere konyora chinguru goika ekeririanda kia Nyasae geikeranigwe. Aria aroberetigwe ng’a nabe goika aikeranigwe." 
Daniel11:37 Omoruoti oria tagosika chinyasae chie chisokoro chiaye, gose eye abakungu banchete, gose enyasae ende yonsi, ekiagera neimokererie igoro ase chionsi." 
Daniel11:38 Ase ribaga riabo nasike enyasae ekorenda chiburi; enyasae eye chisokoro chiaye chitamanyete nigo arayesike ase okoyeruera chitahabu, ne chifeta, na amagena e rigori rinene, na ebiegwa ebiya mono." 
Daniel11:39 Ase ogokonywa kw’enyasae engeni nekorere chiburi chinkong’u buna anchete. Abanto baria baranche ng’a nomogambi are, nabae obonene bw’ogosikwa. Nababeke babe abagambi igoro ase abanto abange na nabaatananere ense ebe eng’eria yabo." 
Daniel11:40 “Ase engaki y’omoerio omoruoti o irianyi namoumokere, korende omoruoti oria o sugusu nigo aramorindokere buna ekembugu‐mbugu ore ne chigari, na abariini be chibarasi, ne chimeeri chinyinge. Nigo arasoe ase chinse ao ao nomoganda omonene, aichore aoorie goeterao." 
Daniel11:41 “Boigo nasoe ase ense eria engiya, nasirie chinse chinyinge, korende Abaedomu na Abamoabu, na abanto abange b’Abaamoni, barabwo mbatoorigwe korwa ase okoboko kwaye." 
Daniel11:42 Narambore okoboko kwaye asirie chinse chinyinge, na ense ya Misiri tegotooreka." 
Daniel11:43 Nabe nokobua igoro ye chikungo chie chitahabu ne chifeta, na igoro y’ebinto bie rigori rinene bia Misiri. Abanto ba Libia na ab’Etiopia mbabe bakobwatia chimbaratero chiaye." 
Daniel11:44 Korende amang’ana ararwe moocha na sugusu namoichanie, erio asoke ore nekeririanda ekenene aite abanto abange abasirie kegima." 
Daniel11:45 Natenenie eema yaye y’oboruoti ebe ase egati y’enyancha na egetunwa keria egechenu ki’obonene. Korende nonya naboigo naikere omoerio oye, na monto onde tari oramokonye." 
Daniel12:1 “Ase engaki eyio Mikaeli, omogambi oria omonene naoroke, atenenere abanto bao. Erio nebe engaki y’emechando emenene mono, eye etana koba rinde korwa ekero egesaku kia mwanyabanto giachagete kobao goika ase engaki eyio. Korende ase engaki eyio, abanto bao mbatoorigwe, kera oyomo oyo erieta riave riranyorekane ririkire ase ebuku eria." 
Daniel12:2 Abange b’abwo baraire ase riroba ime mbaboke, abande banyore obogima bwa kare na kare, na abande banyore obosooku na ogochaywa gwa kare na kare." 
Daniel12:3 Abwo bare abang’aini mbabe bakomeka‐meka buna amasase a igoro, na abwo baonchorete abange bakanyora oboronge mbameka‐meke buna ching’enang’eni goika kare na kare." 
Daniel12:4 “Korende aye Danieli, mumekeria amang’ana aya, obeke ebuku eye ekemanyererio goika engaki y’omoerio. Ase engaki eyio abanto abange nabaminyoke gochia aaria na aaria koriga‐rigia, na okomanya kwabo nkomentekane.”" 
Daniel12:5 Erio inche Danieli nkarigereria nkarora abanto babere bateneine ase engegu y’orooche, oyomo ase engegu eyemo, na oyonde ase engegu ende." 
Daniel12:6 Oyomo akaboria omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani oteneine ase amache a rooche igoro, “Nengaki eng’ana naki erabe goika omoerio oche, na amakumia aya abe?”" 
Daniel12:7 Omonto oria obegete eanga y’egatani, oria oteneine ase amache a rooche igoro, akarambora okoboko kwaye gw’okorio na ogw’okobee gochia igoro; nkamoigwa ogotiana asare oyore moyo goika kare na kare ng’a aya nigo araikeranigwe ase ekero ekemo, na ebiro bibere, na ekeng’ese gi’ekero, na ekero okobua kw’abanto abachenu korabe gwasirigwe kegima." 
Daniel12:8 Nkaigwa amang’ana aria, korende tinamanya engencho yaye. Ase ayio nkaboria, “Aye Omonene one, omoerio bw’amang’ana aya, naki orabe?”" 
Daniel12:9 Akairaneria agantebia, “Aye Danieli, karue aa ogende, ekiagera amang’ana aya amumekerigwe na kobekwa ekemanyererio goika engaki y’omoerio." 
Daniel12:10 Abanto abange mbacheneke na koraba, babe basibekire, korende abakori amabe mbagenderere gokora amabe, onde tagotoka ase abakori amabe orabe nokomanya, korende abare nobong’aini mbamanye." 
Daniel12:11 “Korwa ase engaki eyio ebing’wanso bia kera rituko mbirusigwe aroro, na okogechia kw’ogosaria ngotenenigweo, nabe amatuko elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo kianda (1,290)."
