Daniel12:12 Nasesenirie omonto oria oraganye aikere amatuko elifu eyemo, na amagana atato, na emerongo etato na atano (1,335)." 
Daniel12:13 “Korende aye Danieli, genda goika engaki eyio y’omoerio eike, ekero orabe gotimogete, noche koboka onyore egetari kiao ase engaki y’omoerio bw’amatuko ayio.”" 
Hosea1:1 Eri nario ring’ana ri’Omonene riacherete Hosea, mosinto o Beeri, ase amatuko aria Usia, na Yotamu, na Ahasi, na Hezekia, barenge abaruoti b’Abayuda, na ekero Yeroboamu, mosinto o Yehoasi, arenge omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
Hosea1:2 Agwo ekero Omonene achagete gokwana goetera ase Hosea, Omonene akamotebia iga: “Genda onyuome omokungu omotayayi, onyore abana b’obotayayi, ekiagera ense eye yantigire inche Omonene ase ogokora obotayayi obonene.”" 
Hosea1:3 Ase ayio Hosea akagenda, akanyuoma Gomeri, omoiseke o Dibulaimu, na omokungu oyio akaba morito, akamoiborera omwana omoisa." 
Hosea1:4 Omonene agatebia Hosea, “Moroke Yesireeli, ekiagera engaki netigarete enke, ndarue egesusuro ase ororeria rwa Yehu, ndusie egesiomba ki’amanyinga aria abanto bamenyete Yesireeli baiterete. Ninsirie kegima oboruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
Hosea1:5 Ase rituko erio nimbune amata ’Abaisraeli agwo ase ense omweremo ya Yesireeli.” 
Hosea1:6 Naende Gomeri akaba morito, akaibora omwana omoiseke. Erio Omonene agatebia Hosea, “Moroke Lo‐Ruhama, ekiagera tinkonyara kogenderera koba namabera ase Abaisraeli, gose tinkobaabera nonya ng’ake." 
Hosea1:7 Korende nindorere Abayuda amabera. Inche Omonene, Nyasae obo, nimbatoorie ne chinguru chiane, gose tari ase okorwana namata, gose nemioro, gose ne chibarasi chi’esegi, gose nabariini be chibarasi.”" 
Hosea1:8 Ekero Gomeri atachire Lo‐Ruhama, akaba morito naende, akaibora omwana onde omoisia." 
Hosea1:9 Omonene agatebia Hosea, “Moroke Lo‐Ami, ekiagera inwe timori abana baane, na inche tinkoba Nyasae oino.”" 
Hosea1:10 Korende nonya naboigo, Abaisraeli nigo barabuche mono, babe buna omokenye o nyancha, tibakorengeka gose kobareka. Nebe ng’a ase barenge gotebigwa: Inwe timori abana baane, bono mbatebigwe: Inwe nabana ba Nyasae ore moyo." 
Hosea1:11 Abayuda na Abaisraeli mbasangererekane amo, bechorere oyomo abe omotwe obo okobaraa, barue ase ense eye. Ee, rituko erio ria Yesireeli nigo rirabe rinene." 
Hosea2:1 “Mobaroke abamino abamura Ami, na abamino abasubati Ruhama." 
Hosea2:2 “Mosorore nyoko, ee, momosorore, ekiagera ere tari omokungu one, na inche tindi omosacha oye. Tiga atige obonyaka borue ase obosio bwaye, na obotomani borue ase egekuba kiaye." 
Hosea2:3 Atakoreti bo, nimochabore chianga chiaye, imotige getirianda abe bosa buna ase rituko riria aiboretwe. Nimokore abe buna erooro, na buna ense enyomo, nimotige akwe ase engencho y’erang’o." 
Hosea2:4 Tinkororera abana baye amabera, ekiagera nigo bare abana b’omokungu omotayayi." 
Hosea2:5 Ng’ina nigo arenge omotayayi, ee, oyo obaiborete nigo arenge gokora obonyaka. Nigo atebete: Nimbe ngotunyana abanchi baane, abwo bakong’a endagera nkoria, na amache, na amarionya e ching’ondi, na egatani, na amaguta, na edivai." 
Hosea2:6 “Ase engencho eyio nintiche enchera yaye namagwa, ning’agache orwaki roramotange ase agoetera." 
Hosea2:7 Nabe okobwatia abanchi baye, korende takobaikeera; nabarigie, korende takobanyora. Erio natebe: Bono nkoirana inde, ngende ase omosacha one bwe ritang’ani, ekiagera engaki eria narenge asare nigo narenge buya kobua bono." 
Hosea2:8 “Omokungu oria tamanyete ng’a ninche narenge komoa endagera, na edivai, na amaguta, naende ninche narenge komoa chifeta ne chitahabu chinyinge, echio abanto beroiseretie enyasae Baali." 
Hosea2:9 Ase ayio ning’iranie endagera yane, na edivai yane, ekero engaki eraikerane, boigo ning’ire amarionya aane e ching’ondi, na egatani, ebio namoete atube obogetirianda bwaye." 
Hosea2:10 Bono nimochabore chianga chiaye ase amasio ’abanchi baye, imotige ore getirianda, gose monto onde tari oranyare komotooria korwa ase okoboko kwane." 
Hosea2:11 Ninsirie kegima omogoko oye bwonsi, na Amatuko aye Amanene ay’Emetienyi Emeyia, ne Chisabato chiaye, na emeyega yaye echikire." 
Hosea2:12 Ninsirie emesabibu yaye, na emeko yaye, ebio akwanete igoro yabo, agateba ng’a eyio nero eng’eria yaye abanchi baye bamoete. Inche ninsirie emete eyio ebe orosana, ne ching’iti chi’orosana chiyerie." 
Hosea2:13 Ning’ee omokungu oyio egesusuro ase engencho y’amatuko ayio akorerete chinyasae chiria Baali emeyega, agachisambera ubani, naende agechabera ebigera bi’amato na ebinto binde bi’ogwechabera, ekero arenge gotunyana abanchi baye, korende akanyeba.” Nabo Omonene agoteba." 
Hosea2:14 “Ase ayio nimoebererie, imoire ase erooro, erinde nkwane nere amang’ana amororo ay’obwanchani." 
Hosea2:15 Ekero ararue agwo nimoiranerie emegondo yaye y’emesabibu, naende ninkore Ebate y’Akori ebe egesieri ki’ogosemeria. Aroro agwo natere buna ekero keria arenge omoke, ekero aruete ase ense ya Misiri." 
Hosea2:16 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Ase rituko erio nondoke omosacha oo, gose tokogenderera kondoka Baali yao." 
Hosea2:17 Nindusie amarieta e chinyasae Baali korwa ase omonwa bw’omokungu oyio, tichiatorwa nonya ng’ake ase amarieta abo." 
Hosea2:18 “Ase rituko riria, ninkore okobwatana ne ching’iti chi’orosana, ne chinyoni, ne ching’iti chikwagura inse, ase engencho y’abanto baane. Ninsirie korwa ase ense eye amata, na emioro, na esegi, ntige batimoke bare nobotoereru." 
Hosea2:19 “Ninkoriere boko nkonyuome obe oyone goika kare na kare; ee, ninkoriere boko ase oboronge na ekeene, na ase obwanchani botari koera, na ase amabera." 
Hosea2:20 Ee, ninkoriere boko ase obwegenwa, naye omanye ng’a ninche Omonene." 
Hosea2:21 Inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: Ase rituko erio nebe ng’a ninyigwe ogosaba kwa igoro, na igoro nchiigwe ogosaba gw’ense." 
Hosea2:22 Erio ense eiranerie erue endagera, na edivai, na amaguta ’amazeituni, na ebinto ebio mbiigwe ogosaba kwa Yesireeli." 
Hosea2:23 Nimosimeke ase ense eye abe oyone. Nimororere amabera oyio otaroreretwe amabera, nintebie abwo batarenge abanto baane: Bono inwe nabanto baane, na barabwo mbatebe: Aye naye Nyasae oito.”" 
Hosea3:1 Omonene agantebia, “Genda omwanche naende omokungu oyio nonya ogokora obotomani nomwanchi oye, omwanche buna Omonene anchete Abaisraeli, nonya baonchokeire chinyasae ching’ao, naende banchire amasabibu amomo.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ase igo nkamogora chisekeli chie chifeta ikomi na isano, na esairi ebitonga ikomi na bitano." 
Hosea3:3 Nkamotebia, “Ogenderere komenya nainche amatuko amange kore omweriti ase engencho yane. Tobaisa gokora obonyaka, gose koba oyo bw’omosacha onde omoao, na inche ningenderere kwerita ase engencho yao.”" 
Hosea3:4 Naboigo Abaisraeli baragenderere komenya ase amatuko amange batabwati omoruoti gose omogambi, batari korua ebing’wanso, gose gosasima amagena atenenirie, gose koba negesibao ki’obokuani, gose ebinyasae bibekire ase chinyomba." 
Hosea3:5 Nyuma y’ayio Abaisraeli nabairane, barigie Omonene, Nyasae obo, na Daudi, omoruoti obo; mbamoiroke Omonene, barigie obuya bwaye ase amatuko ay’omoerio." 
Hosea4:1 Inwe Abaisraeli, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene, ekiagera obeeigwe nabamenyete ase ense eye: “Obwegenwa gose obwanchani tibori aroro, na abanto b’ense eye tibamomanyeti Nyasae." 
Hosea4:2 Nigo bagotiana na gokwana oborimo; nigo bagoita na koiba, naende bakora obotomani. Nigo bagosaria amachiko onsi, na ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga nigo gokobwatigwa nokonde." 
Hosea4:3 Ase engencho eyio ense nigo ekorera ase okweumia, na kera omonto omenyeteo nigo achandegete na kogoya; boigo ching’iti chi’orosana, ne chinyoni, ne chinswe ngokwa chire." 
Hosea4:4 “Monto onde tabaisa koba omoengereria, gose monto onde tasoera onde. Nonya nabo inwe nigo mogosoera abakuani." 
Hosea4:5 Aye nogochwa mobaso na botuko, na omobani agochwe amo naye. Inche ninsirie nyoko." 
Hosea4:6 Abanto baane nigo bagosirigwa, ekiagera batari nokomanya. Ekiagera aye kwangire komanya inche, nainche ninkwange, toba omokuani one. Ekiagera kwangire koigwera amachiko aane inche Nyasae oo, boigo nainche ninyange abana bao." 
Hosea4:7 “Buna abakuani bagendererete kobucha, naboigo bagendererete gokora ebibe asende. Ase ayio ning’onchore obonene bwabo bobe obosooku." 
Hosea4:8 Nigo bakwerageria ebibe bi’abanto baane, nigo bakogania bakore obobe." 
Hosea4:9 Buna erabe ase abanto, naboigo erabe nase omokuani. Nindue egesusuro asebare bonsi ase engencho ye chinchera chiabo, nimbaakane koreng’ana nogokora kwabo." 
Hosea4:10 Mbaragere, korende tibakoigota; mbabe bagokora obonyaka, korende tibakomentekana, ekiagera bantigire inche Omonene, na baonchokeire chinyasae ching’ao." 
Hosea4:11 “Obotomani, na edivai, na ekenyugwa kegotindia, nigo bikoura abanto okomanya kwabo." 
Hosea4:12 Abanto baane nigo bakorigia ogosemigwa korwa ase ekeengwe ki’omote, na enyimbo yabo nigo ekobaorokeria aya baganetie komanya. Omoika bw’obotomani obasiririe, barabwo batigire Nyasae obo bachiire gotayaya." 
Hosea4:13 Nigo bakoruera ebing’wanso ase ebitunwa igoro, na basambera ubani ase ebigoro, inse y’emete enga buna emetontera, na inse y’emesobeti, na inse y’ebirachuoki, ekiagera agwo nao ebiriri ebiya bire. “Ase ayio, abaiseke baino nigo bagokora obonyaka, na baka bamura baino nigo bagokora obotomani." 
Hosea4:14 Ekero abaiseke baino barabe bagokora obonyaka na korua ebing’wanso, na baka bamura baino barabe bagokora obotomani, tinkobaa egesusuro, ekiagera abasacha abanyene nigo bakogenda ao bakora obonyaka nabatayayi be chihekalu, na abanto batari nokomanya goika basirigwe kegima." 
Hosea4:15 “Inwe Abaisraeli, nonya mogokora obotomani, timobaisa gotiga Abayuda bakore ogosaria okwo. Timobaisa kogenda Giligali, gose gotiira gochia ase Beti‐Aveni, gose timobaisa gotiana mogoteba: Ekeene, buna Omonene are moyo." 
Hosea4:16 Abaisraeli babeire abaenenu buna ritororo rienenu ritari kogambereka. Inee! Omonene nanyare kobarisia buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi chikorisigwa ase egetii ekegare? 
Hosea4:17 Egesaku gi’Efraimu kiabwatanire nemegwekano kegosasima, tiga getigweo." 
Hosea4:18 Kobanyure batindire, nigo bakwerua kegima ase obotomani botambe; abwo bare chinguba chi’abanto nigo banchete ay’obosooku." 
Hosea4:19 Ekembugu‐mbugu nkebaabuse ne chinguru chiaye, na barabwo mbasookigwe ase engencho y’ebing’wanso biabo." 
Hosea5:1 “Inwe abakuani, igwa ring’ana eri! Inwe Abaisraeli, tegerera moigwe! Inwe ab’enyomba y’omoruoti, tegerera moigwe! Ekina kianachirwe igoro yaino, ekiagera mwabeire oboreba agwo Misipa, na ekeonga getegire agwo ase Tabori igoro." 
Hosea5:2 Abasaria nigo bagendererete komenta obobe bwabo, korende bonsi nimbae egesusuro." 
Hosea5:3 Nimbamanyete Abaefraimu, na Abaisraeli tibakonyara kwebisa korwa asende. Inwe Abaefraimu mwakorire ay’obonyaka, ee, Abaisraeli besoirie ase ogotacheneka." 
Hosea5:4 “Ogokora kwabo kwabatangire tibairanera Nyasae obo. Omoika bw’obotomani nigo ore ime yabo, tibamomanyeti Omonene." 
Hosea5:5 Oboenenu bw’Abaisraeli nigo bobaberete kirori. Abaisraeli na Abaefraimu mbagochwe bagwe ase engencho y’ebibe biabo, na Abayuda mbagwe amo nabarabwo." 
Hosea5:6 Mbaire amaicho e chitugo chiabo bagende korigia Omonene, korende tibakomonyora, ekiagera nabe bweatananirie korwa asebare." 
Hosea5:7 Barabwo tibabete abegenwa ase Omonene. Nigo baiborete abana batari abaye. Ase ayio, emeyega y’Omotienyi Omoyia nebasirie amo nemeganda yabo." 
Hosea5:8 “Bugia ebitureri bi’esegi agwo Gibea, na mobugie ebirombeta agwo Rama! Aka eriogi ri’ogotabobora agwo Beti‐Aveni! Inwe abanto ba Benjamin, ababisa nkobabwatia bare." 
Hosea5:9 Abaefraimu mbasirigwe kegima ase rituko riria ri’egesusuro. Ase egati y’ebisaku bi’Abaisraeli inche nararirie, ayarache goikeranigwa ekeene." 
Hosea5:10 “Abagambi b’Abayuda nigo babeire buna abwo bagotumana chimbebe; ase ayio nimbaumorere ekeririanda kiane buna amache. 
Hosea5:11 Abaefraimu baregirwe na gotiringerwa inse ase ekina, ekiagera beruete ase okobwatia emeroberio ya bosa." 
Hosea5:12 Ase ayio nimbe buna ekegwankwa kegosaria ase Abaefraimu, na buna obogundo ase Abayuda." 
Hosea5:13 “Abaefraimu mbaroche oborwaire bwabo, na Abayuda amagumba abo. Ase ayio Abaefraimu bakagenda ase Abaasuri, bakarangeria omoruoti Yarebu. Korende omoruoti oyio takonyara kobagwenia korwa ase oborwaire bwaino, gose amagumba aino," 
Hosea5:14 Nimbe buna endo ase Abaefraimu, na buna endo ensae ase Abayuda. Inche omonyene nimbwate eke natwarire nkeire; ee, nkeire, na onde tari oragetoorie." 
Hosea5:15 “Ning’irane ngende ase obomenyo bwane, goika babe bamanyire okomocha kwabo, erinde bache kondigia. Ee, ekero bare nemechando mbaayerere gocha kondigia.”" 
Hosea6:1 Abanto nigo bagotebania: “Inchuo, tomoiranere Omonene! Ekiagera nere ototaboranire, naende nere oratogwenie; nere otoakire chingoma, nere oratoboe chingoma chiaito." 
Hosea6:2 Nyuma y’amatuko abere natokore tobe abayia. Ase rituko ria gatato natotenenie, na intwe ntogenderere koba moyo ase obosio bwaye." 
Hosea6:3 Intwe tiga tomomanye Omonene, ee, tiga tokore omokia tomomanye. Okooroka kwaye nigo korabe ogw’ekeene buna ogosoka kw’erioba; natochere buna embura, ee, buna embura ekwamia endagera na konyiyia riroba." 
Hosea6:4 “Inwe Abaefraimu, ngento ki ndabakorere? Inwe Abayuda, ngento ki ndabakorere? Obwanchani bwaino nigo bonga buna ritaturi, na buna riime ria mambia rigosira bwango." 
Hosea6:5 Ase engencho eyio nabaakire goetera ase ababani baane, nabaitire namang’ana akorwa ase omonwa one; ebina biane nkobanachera nigo bikooroka buna omobaso." 
Hosea6:6 Inche Omonene nigo nkogokigwa nobwanchani kobua kogokigwa nebing’wanso; nigo nkogokigwa ng’a imomanye inche Nyasae kobua kogokigwa nebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa. 
Hosea6:7 “Abanto aba basaririe okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, buna Adamu agosaretie. Ase amang’ana ayio babeire abatari abegenwa asende." 
Hosea6:8 Omochie o Gileadi nigo oichire nabanto abakori amabe, chimbaratero chiabo nigo chiichire amanyinga." 
Hosea6:9 Abakuani nigo banga buna ekeombe ki’abauri keboerete abanto, nigo bagoitera abanto ase enchera ekogenda Sekemu. Ee, nigo bagokora ayare amabe mono." 
Hosea6:10 Narorire ase Abaisraeli egento ekebe gi’okogechia; agwo nao Abaefraimu bagokorera obonyaka, ee, Abaisraeli besoirie ase ogotacheneka." 
Hosea6:11 “Nainwe Abayuda boigo, mwarikeirwe engaki ye rigesa ri’ogokora kwaino, ekero ndasibore abooswa b’abanto baane." 
Hosea7:1 “Ekero nganetie kogwenia Abaisraeli, ogosaria kw’Abaefraimu na ogokora okobe kw’Abasamaria nigo gokororekana maiso marore. Barabwo nigo bagokora ay’obong’ainereria; abaibi nigo bagotagora chinyomba basoa ime, na ebiombe bi’abauri nigo bikourereria isiko." 
Hosea7:2 Barabwo tibari korengereria ng’a inche nigo ng’inyorete ogokora kwabo gwonsi okobe. Bono ogokora okwo kwabo okobe kwabaetananire onsi nigo kore ase obosio bwane. 
Hosea7:3 “Nigo bakogokia omoruoti nogokora kwabo okobe, na kogokia abagambi nobong’ainereria bwabo." 
Hosea7:4 Abwo bonsi nigo bare abatomani. Nigo banga buna eriko ri’okogekera emegati riutire omorero, na omoroisia bw’emegati nigo agotiga koigereria omorero goika abe okonyire ribomba ri’obosie na ememera ebe yaribotirie." 
Hosea7:5 Ase rituko rinene ri’omoruoti oito abagambi bakanywa edivai endoro goika ekabarwaria, na ere omonyene akarambora okoboko kwaye, akabwatana nabanyacheche." 
Hosea7:6 Chinkoro chiabo nigo chiare gwoka nokogania okobe buna eriko rigwoka omorero. Ase obotuko bwonsi, okogania okwo nigo gokorara, na mambia kobwakire kwaba kogwoka buna omorero ekebemberi." 
Hosea7:7 “Abanto abwo bonsi nigo bagwoka buna omorero o riko, bagosiria abagambi babo b’ebina. Abaruoti babo bonsi bagure, na onde tari ase abwo okondangeria imokonye." 
Hosea7:8 “Abaefraimu bochoganire nabanto b’ebisaku. Nigo banga buna omogati otaonchoiri kogekeire. 
Hosea7:9 Abanto b’ebisaku ebigeni bakoorire chinguru chiaye, na ere tamanyeti amang’ana ayio; chimbuche chiamerire ase omotwe oye, nere tamanyeti ayio." 
Hosea7:10 Oboenenu bw’Abaisraeli bwababereire kirori. Nonya naboigo, tibari komoiranera Omonene, Nyasae obo, gose komorigia." 
Hosea7:11 Abaefraimu nigo banga buna riruma ririri, ritari nokomanya. Nigo bagosaba ogokonywa korwa Misiri, naende bagenda Asuri." 
Hosea7:12 Ekero barabe bakogendao, nindambore ekeonga kiane mbabwatere imeo buna chinyoni chikobwatwa. Nimbae egesusuro ase okobarongeyia, koreng’ana buna omosangererekano obo bworokererigwe." 
Hosea7:13 “Obobe nobwabo, ekiagera batamire korwa asende. Mbasirigwe, ekiagera basaririe asende bantigire. Nanga nabatooria, korende babeire bagokwana oborimo igoro yane." 
Hosea7:14 Tibari korera asende korwa ase chinkoro chiabo, korende nigo bakona‐kwerera ase amarere abo. Nigo bagosangererekana amo bachandekerete endagera na edivai, ekero bagendererete gosaria asende." 
Hosea7:15 Nonya naborokereretie na gokong’ia amaboko abo, nigo bagendererete koroberia amabe igoro yane." 
Hosea7:16 Barabwo nigo bakoonchoka, korende tari gochia ase Oyore Igoro Mono. Nigo banga buna obota bootokanete. Abagambi babo mbaitwe nemioro ase engencho y’obotindi bwe chimeme chiabo. Ring’ana erio ndigere ense ya Misiri ebasekerere na kobachaya." 
Hosea8:1 “Beka egetureri monwa mokebugie! Omobisa ngocha are igoro y’enyomba y’Omonene buna ekeongo, ekiagera abanto basaririe okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania, na batigire amachiko aane." 
Hosea8:2 Abaisraeli nigo bakorera asende, kera oyomo oteba: Aye Nyasae one, intwe Abaisraeli ntokomanyete." 
Hosea8:3 Barabwo bangire amang’ana are amaya, ase ayio ababisa mbababwatie." 
Hosea8:4 “Abaisraeli bebekeire abaruoti, batamboreti, bebekeire abagambi abwo ntamanyeti, na korwa ase chifeta ne chitahabu chiabo beroiseirie emegwekano bagosasima; ayio nigo arabarentere ogosirigwa." 
Hosea8:5 Aye Samaria, omogwekano oria bw’emori ore ase egati yao yabeire okogechia asende. Endamwamu yane nigo egwoka igoro y’abanto abwo. Ngoika ririri baragenderere koba iga bataracheneka?" 
Hosea8:6 Omogwekano oyio nigo oruete ase Abaisraeli. Nigo oroisetigwe nomoroisia bw’ebinto, oyio tari oro Nyasae. Omogwekano oria bw’emori ore Samaria nosenyentwe obe ebisamunye." 
Hosea8:7 Abanto abwo babusuire embeo, mbagese ekembugu‐mbugu. Ebimeri bigokina ase emegondo yabo tibigosomoria, ase ayio tibikwama chindagera. Biise kwama, abanto b’ebisaku ebigeni mbache bachigese." 
Hosea8:8 Abaisraeli bamerirwe. Bono nigo bare ase egati y’ebisaku babarire koba buna egekorero getagwenereti kende. 
Hosea8:9 Bagendire Asuri, babeire buna etigere y’orosana ere ao yoka; ee, Abaefraimu benyoreire abanchi." 
Hosea8:10 Ee, nonya benyoreire abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao ng’a babakonye, nimbasangererie amo bwango, mbakeyie babe inse y’ogochandwa kw’omoruoti oria bw’abagambi." 
Hosea8:11 “Ekiagera Abaefraimu beagacheire ebisasimero ebinge bikogera bakore ebibe, ebio biabeire ebibe asebare." 
Hosea8:12 Nonya nare korika amachiko aane asebare ara chilifu ikomi, tibaare koyancha, korende bayabarire koba egento ekegeni asebare." 
Hosea8:13 Nigo banchete korua ebing’wanso asende, erinde barie chinyama chi’ebing’wanso ebio, korende inche Omonene timbagokereti. Bono ning’inyore okomocha kwabo mbae egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo; barabwo bairane gochia Misiri." 
Hosea8:14 “Abaisraeli bebire Omotongi obo, baagachire chinyomba chi’obonene, na Abayuda baagachire emechie emenge egiteire chindwaki, korende nindete omorero ase emechie eyio, na oro nosambe amaagacho abo bagwekengera.”" 
Hosea9:1 Inwe Abaisraeli, timobaisa kogoka gose gochenga buna abanto b’ebisaku bagokora, ekiagera inwe mwakorire obotomani, mwatigire Nyasae oino. Mwagokeire eng’eria y’obotomani ase kera ekeooreri gi’okoorera." 
Hosea9:2 Korende ebiooreri bi’okoorera na ebimitero bi’edivai tibigoisanekia abanto, na edivai enyia tekonyorekana asebare." 
Hosea9:3 Barabwo tibakogenderera komenya ase ense y’Omonene; Abaefraimu mbairane gochia ase ense ya Misiri, na agwo Asuri babe bakoria endagera etachenegeti." 
Hosea9:4 Tibakorua okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa gi’edivai ase Omonene, ere takogokera ebing’wanso bararue asare. Okoruegwa okwo kw’endagera bararue asare nigo korabe buna endagera y’ebirero; na omonto onde bwensi orayerie nigo arabe oyo otachenegeti, ekiagera endagera eyio erabe egoisanekia oyore nenchara rioka, tekorentwa ase enyomba y’Omonene." 
Hosea9:5 Ninki morakore ekero Rituko Rinene ri’omoyega bw’Omonene riraike? 
Hosea9:6 Rora, abanto abwo batamire ng’a tibabaisa gosirigwa; ense ya Misiri nebasangererie amo, na omochie o Memifisi nobatindeke. Amasa namere aase babegete chinibo chiabo chie chifeta, chiria chianchire, na amagwa namere ase chinyomba chiabo ime." 
Hosea9:7 Amatuko ’egesusuro aikire, ee, amatuko ay’ogoakanera ogokora kw’abanto aikire. Abaisraeli mbamanye ayio. Omobani obeire omoriri, na omonto ore nomoika obeire ebarimo, ekiagera obobe bwaino bwabeire obonge, na okogecha kwaino kwabeire okonene." 
Hosea9:8 Abaefraimu nigo barenge abarendi ba Nyasae, korende bono babeire emeeto y’obotegi ase chinchera chiabo chionsi; obobisa bwabo nigo bore ime ase enyomba ya Nyasae obo." 
Hosea9:9 Besaririe kegima buna yabete ase amatuko aria a kare agwo Gibea. Omonene nainyorete ebibe biabo, abae egesusuro." 
Hosea9:10 “Inche Omonene nigo nanyorete Abaisraeli banga buna emesabibu ase erooro; nigo naroche chisokoro chiaino chinga buna okwama ogotang’ani kw’emeko. Korende bakagenda Baali‐Peori, bakerua abanyene gosasima enyasae eria y’obosooku, bakaba okogechia buna enyasae eria banchete ere." 
Hosea9:11 Obonene bw’Abaefraimu mboiruruke buna enyoni bogende. Okoibora tigokoba asebare, gose abakungu tibakoba barito, bonsi mbagombae." 
Hosea9:12 Baise gokinia abana, ning’ite abana abwo, onde tagotigara ore moyo nonya noyomo. Obobe nobwabo abanyene, ekero inche ndabatige." 
Hosea9:13 “Nkarora Abaefraimu banga buna omogondo omuya buna Turo orenge, korende ase rituko erimo mbabe bakoira abana babo gochia goitwa." 
Hosea9:14 Aye Omonene, bae eki ogwenerete kobaa, ogombayie chinda chiabo, ne chimbeere chiabo chiome pa." 
Hosea9:15 “Obobe bwabo bwonsi nigo bore Giligali, agwo nao nachakerete kobagecha. Nimbaserie barue ase enyomba yane ase engencho y’ogokora kwabo okobe. Tinkogenderera kobancha; abagambi babo bonsi nigo bare abasaria." 
Hosea9:16 Abaefraimu baakirwe, omori obo bwomire, tibakonyara kwama okwama. Nabaisa koibora, goika ing’ite abana abwo banchete.”" 
Hosea9:17 Nyasae one nabaange, ekiagera baangete komoigwera; mbabe bakonagotayaya ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku." 
Hosea10:1 Abaisraeli nigo banga buna omosabibu okororekana ore omuya mono okwama amasabibu. Buna koreng’ana okwama kwabo kwamentekanete, naboigo bagendererete koagacha ebisasimero ebinge; na buna bagendererete gotenenka, naboigo bagendererete gotenenia chisiiro bagosasima." 
Hosea10:2 Nigo bare abang’ainereria ase chinkoro chiabo; ase ayio goika baegwe egesusuro gi’okomocha kwabo. Omonene natagore ebisasimero biabo, atagore ne chisiiro chiabo bagosasima." 
Hosea10:3 Erio abanto abwo mbatebe, “Titobwati omoruoti, ekiagera titomoirogeti Omonene. Inee! Toraba nomoruoti, ngento ki aratokorere?”" 
Hosea10:4 Nigo bagokwana amang’ana atari nengencho, naende betiania ase oborimo ekero bagokora okobwatana kw’ogotianania; ase igo ekina nigo gekobachera buna ekemeri kere nobosongo ase emetaro ya mogondo." 
Hosea10:5 Abanto bamenyete Samaria mbatengechigwe ase engencho y’omogwekano bw’emori bagosasima agwo Beti‐Aveni. Abwo bakoyosasima mbarere, na abakuani baye mbeng’ererie, ekiagera obonene bwaye bwasirigwe." 
Hosea10:6 Omogwekano oyio noirwe Asuri, oegwe omoruoti Yarebu buna ekeegwa. Abaefraimu mbabe nobosooku, na Abaisraeli mbasookigwe boigo ase engencho y’emeroberio yabo abanyene." 
Hosea10:7 Omoruoti o Samaria nasirigwe arueo buna riuro rigosira korwa ase amache igoro. 
Hosea10:8 Aase aimokererete igoro agosasimerwa agwo Aveni, ase Abaisraeli bakoreire ebibe, nasirigwe. Amagwa na amageri mbimere ase ebisasimero biabo; erio abanto abwo batebie ebitunwa: “Totube”, na ebigoro: “Togwere”." 
Hosea10:9 “Inwe Abaisraeli, nigo mwagendererete gokora ebibe korwa ase amatuko aria mwarenge Gibea, na goika bono nigo mogendererete gokora bo. Inee! Esegi y’okorusia egesiomba igoro y’abakori amabe tiyababuete agwo Gibea?" 
Hosea10:10 Ekero ndaganie, nimbae egesusuro gi’okobarongeyia, erio abanto b’ebisaku ebiaao mbasangererekane amo, babachere amo babae egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biabo bibere." 
Hosea10:11 “Abaefraimu nigo barenge buna ritororo riorokereretigwe buya, rianchete koora, inche nigo nabegete rikorogoto ase ebigoti biabo ebiya. Bono nimbekere Abaefraimu rikorogoto, nonya n’Abayuda goika babe bakorema, na aba Yakobo goika babe bakobosa." 
Hosea10:12 Ebusurere oboronge, mogese ayare ay’obwanchani, eremere chimbuna chiaino, ekiagera eye nero engaki y’okomorigia Omonene, erinde ache abatwerie oboronge buna embura egotwa." 
Hosea10:13 Mwasimekire ayare amabe, mwagesire aya atari ay’oboronge, mwarire ayare okwama kw’oborimo. “Nigo mwasemeretie ogokora kwaino, na obonge bw’abarwani esegi baino chituoni." 
Hosea10:14 Ase ayio eriomana rie chisegi ndibe ase egati y’abanto baino, ne chiburi chiaino chisarigwe, buna omoruoti Salimani asaretie Beti‐Aribeli ase rituko riria ri’esegi, abang’ina amo nabana babo banachanetwe bakaba ebing’ese." 
Hosea10:15 Naboigo na abanto ba Beteli barabakore ase engencho y’obobe bwaino obonene. Kobogokiamoka omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli naitwe akwe.” 
Hosea11:1 “Ekero Israeli arenge omwana, nigo namwanchete, na korwa Misiri nkarangeria omwana one." 
Hosea11:2 Buna bagendererete korangerigwa, nabo bagendererete kona‐kwerusanania. Nigo babete bakorua ebing’wanso ase chinyasae Baali, na bagasamba ubani ase emegwekano barenge gosasima." 
Hosea11:3 Ninche norokereretie Abaefraimu gotaara, nkababogoria namaboko aane, korende abanto abwo tibamanyete ng’a nigo naganetie kobagwenia." 
Hosea11:4 Nigo nabang’usete ne chingori chinyororo, ee, ne chingori chi’obwanchani. Nigo nororobetie rikorogoto igoro ye chinsea chiabo, ngekumba gochia inse nkabarageria.”" 
Hosea11:5 “Barabwo mbairane gochia ase ense ya Misiri, na Abaasuri mbabagambere, ekiagera bangire koirana gocha asende." 
Hosea11:6 Omoro nogwere emechie yabo nobotindi, nosarie emekorogoto y’ebiita biabo na gosaria kende gionsi ase engencho y’emeroberio yabo abanyene." 
Hosea11:7 Abanto baane nigo banchete gontiga, nonya bakorangerigwa gochia ase Oyore Igoro Mono, onde tari okomotogia, nonya noyomo.”" 
Hosea11:8 “Inwe Abaefraimu, naki ndakore mbatige? Inwe Abaisraeli, naki ndakore mbatige morue asende? Naki ndakore mbatige buna natigete Adima? Naki ndakore mbakorere buna nakorerete Seboimu? Enkoro yane nigo egwoka, na amabera aane onsi abokire ime yane." 
Hosea11:9 Tinkobaa egesusuro konde nendamwamu egwoka, gose tingosiria Abaefraimu naende, ekiagera inche nigo inde Nyasae, tindi mwanyabanto. Inche nigo inde Omochenu imenyete ase egati yaino, na tingocha asemore inde nekeririanda." 
Hosea11:10 “Abanto abwo mbabwatie Omonene; ere narume buna endo, ee, narume, na abanto baye mbache korwa bosongo bakoiguswa." 
Hosea11:11 Mbairuruke buna chinyoni korwa Misiri, bache bakoiguswa, na buna amaruma korwa ase ense y’Asuri. Nimbabeke bamenye ase chinka chiabo.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Hosea11:12 Abaefraimu bang’etananire namang’ana ’oborimo, na Abaisraeli boigo namang’ana ’obong’ainereria; na Abayuda nigo bagendererete gosaria ase Nyasae, oria ore Omochenu na Omwegenwa." 
Hosea12:1 Abaefraimu nigo bakwerageria embeo, babwatia embeo ya moocha. Kera rituko nigo bakomenta gokwana oborimo, na gokora ay’obotindi. Nigo bakobwatana n’Abaasuri, babe bakoira amaguta ’amazeituni ase ense ya Misiri." 
Hosea12:2 Omonene nabwate amang’ana akwomania Abayuda, nae abanto ba Yakobo egesusuro koreng’ana ne chinchera chiabo, nabaakane koreng’ana nogokora kwabo." 
Hosea12:3 Ekero Yakobo arenge inda ya ng’ina, nigo abwatete egetingiro kia momura omwabo, na ekero abete omonto omonene, agakinana na Nyasae." 
Hosea12:4 Ee, nigo akinanete nomomalaika, akamobua; akarera, akamosorora ng’a amororere amabera. Agwo Beteli Yakobo akaumerana na Nyasae, na Ere agakwana naintwe." 
Hosea12:5 Omonene nere Nyasae bw’Emeganda. Omonene nario erieta riaye. 
Hosea12:6 Ase ayio, aye irana ase Nyasae oo. Obwatie obwanchani na oboronge, na obe komosemeretie Nyasae oo botambe." 
Hosea12:7 Omoonchoreria nigo abwate ebirengero bi’obong’ainereria ase amaboko aye, nigo anchete gokora oborianania." 
Hosea12:8 Abaefraimu nigo bagoteba, “Amaene twabeire abanda, twenyoreire obotenenku; ase emeremo yaito yonsi monto onde tari oranyare gotosoera ng’a nigo twanyorire obonda obo ase enchera y’ebibe bi’oborianania.”" 
Hosea12:9 Korende inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, korwa ekero keria mwarenge Misiri, nimbabeke momenye ase chiema naende, buna yarenge Amatuko Amanene aria achikire." 
Hosea12:10 “Nigo narenge gokwana nababani, nkaba nkobaorokeria amaroro amange ao ao, na goetera ase ababani nkaba ngokwana nabarabwo ase emereng’anio." 
Hosea12:11 Onye ebibe bire ime ya Gileadi, abanto b’aroro goika basire. Onye abanto ba Giligali bakoruera ebing’wanso bie chieri aroro ase ebisasimero biabo, birobio mbisarigwe bibe buna chitui chi’amagena ase emetaro y’emegondo.”" 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo nigo atamete gochia ase ense y’Aramu, ere Israeli agakora emeremo ase okonyora omokungu, ee, akarisia ching’ondi ase okonyora omokungu." 
Hosea12:13 Goetera ase omobani Omonene akang’anyia Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri, na goetera ase omobani abanto abwo bakaba barendire." 
Hosea12:14 Abaefraimu abwo bagechetie Omonene goika ere akaba nendamwamu enene mono; ase ayio Omonene obo nabeke okomocha kw’ogoiterwa kw’amanyinga abo kobe igoro yabo; nabairanerie okogechia kwabo. 
Hosea13:1 Ekero Abaefraimu barenge gokwana, abanto nigo barenge koiguswa; nigo beimokereretie igoro ase egati y’Abaisraeli; korende bakarenta okomocha ase ogosasima enyasae Baali, na ase ayio bagakwa." 
Hosea13:2 Nigo bagendererete gokora ebibe goetania, bakaroisia emegwekano ye chifeta bagosasima, eyio babombete nobong’aini. Eyio yonsi nemeremo yaroisirie nabaroisia b’ebinto. Nigo bagoteba igoro y’abwo: “Abwo bakorua abanto baba ebing’wanso, nigo bakonyunyunta emegwekano eyio ye chimori.”" 
Hosea13:3 Ase ayio abanto abwo nabasire buna ritaturi ria mambia, gose buna riime rigosira bwango, na buna omoiriro okoirurukigwa nomwaga korwa ase ekeooreri, gose buna erioki rigoetera ase ekebao riasira." 
Hosea13:4 “Inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, korwa ekero mwarenge ase ense ya Misiri. Timwabete momanyete enyasae ende yonsi otatiga inche; omotooria onde tari otatiga inche." 
Hosea13:5 Ninche nabarendete ase erooro, ense eria enyomo pa egosamba." 
Hosea13:6 Korende ekero banyorete endagera eisaine, bakaria bakaigota, erio bakaenena na kweimokereria igoro; ase ayio bakanyeba." 
Hosea13:7 Ase engencho eyio nkaba buna endo asebare, nkababoera ase chinchera chiabo buna engo ekoboera." 
Hosea13:8 Nimbaumokere buna edubu yaurirwe chimanwa chiaye, mbatandore ebikuba biabo, erinde mbaite mbarie buna endo ekoria, ee, nimbe buna eng’iti y’orosana mbatandorane." 
Hosea13:9 “Inwe Abaisraeli mwesiririe inwe abanyene ase okoba mamincha yane, inche oyo narenge ogokonyeka kwaino." 
Hosea13:10 Bono ng’ai omoruoti oino are, erinde abatoorie ase emechie yaino yonsi? Ng’ai abagambi ebina baino bare, inwe abamwatebete: Toe omoruoti na abagambi batogambere?" 
Hosea13:11 Nkabaa omoruoti inde nendamwamu, naende namorusirie inde nekeririanda." 
Hosea13:12 “Obobe bw’Abaefraimu nigo bosibire amo, na ebibe biabo nigo birikire bigachire." 
Hosea13:13 Obororo bonga buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore mbobachere, nigo bonga buna omwana otari nokomanya osinyirwe gosoka korwa ase enda ya ng’ina ekero engaki yaye yaikire." 
Hosea13:14 Nimbaboorie korwa ase okobua gw’aase abakure, na nimbatoorie korwa ase amakweri. Aye amakweri, amaako ao ng’ai are? Aye aase abakure, ng’ai ogosiria kwao kore? Ogweitia gwasirire korwa ase amaiso aane?" 
Hosea13:15 Abaefraimu nabaisa koibora babuche ase egati y’abamwabo, omwaga korwa moocha noche, ee, omwaga bw’Omonene noche korwa ase erooro. Erio ebisima biabo bi’amache biome, ne chinsoko chiabo chikame. Omwaga oyio nosirie kegima chinibo chiabo banchete." 
Hosea13:16 Abanto ba Samaria mbaegwe egesusuro, ekiagera basaririe ase Nyasae obo, mbaitwe nemioro, na abana babo banachanwe ebing’ese. Abakungu babo bare barito mbatandorwe chinda.”" 
Hosea14:1 Inwe Abaisraeli, irana ase Omonene Nyasae oino, ekiagera ebibe biaino nabio biabagochire na kobaiyeria." 
Hosea14:2 Irana ase Omonene, momotebie amang’ana aya: “Toruserie obobe bwaito bwonsi obwo twakorire, bwanchere ayare amaya, naintwe torue asore ogotogia kw’ebikoba biaito konga buna okoruegwa kw’ebing’wanso bie chieri." 
Hosea14:3 Abaasuri tibakonyara gototooria; titokoriina chibarasi gose titokogenderera koroka emeremo y’amaboko aito Nyasae oito. Aye Omonene nigo okoorokia amabera ase oyore entakana.” 
Hosea14:4 “Ningwenie abwo batigire obwegenwa bwabo. Nimbanche nenkoro yane yonsi, ekiagera endamwamu yane yabatigire." 
Hosea14:5 Nimbe buna riime ase Abaisraeli, na barabwo mbasiche buna ebisicha ebiya, mbakinie emeri buna emete ya Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:6 Ebisebo biabo mbirande, na obwari bwabo nabobe buna obw’emezeituni, ne rimisu riabo ndiesiarere buna eri’emete ya Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Abwo baramenye inse ase ekiriri kiabo bairane, bagenderere koreereta buna ebimeri bia mogondo mbasiche, na obonene bwabo bobe buna obw’emesabibu ya Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Inwe Abaefraimu, naki ngokora nemegwekano yaino mogosasima? Ninche omonyene naigure ogosaba kwaino inwe Abaefraimu, nimbairanerie, naende ninche mbarendete. Inche nigo inde buna omotarakwa omobese; na okwama kwaino nigo gokonyorekana ime yane.”" 
Hosea14:9 Oyore omong’aini, nere oramanye amang’ana aya; oyore nokomanya, nere orayarengererie. Chinchera chi’Omonene nigo chire chindonge, na abanyene oboronge nabwo baraetere aroro, korende abasaria nigo baragochwe bagwe ase chirochio." 
Joel1:1 Eri nario ring’ana ri’Omonene riachete ase Yoeli, mosinto o Petueli." 
Joel1:2 Inwe abagaaka, igwa amang’ana aya! Inwe abanto bonsi abamomenyete ase ense eye, tegerera moigwe! Inee! Amang’ana buna aya anagokorekana ase amatuko aino, gose ase amatuko e chisokoro chiaino?" 
Joel1:3 Yatebie abana baino, na abana baino bayatebie abana babo, na abana babo bayatebie ekegori kende." 
Joel1:4 Endagera chinyanchaba chiatigaretie, chingige chikayeria, na eye chingige chiatigaretie, ebisase bikayeria, na eye ebisase biatigaretie, chingeeti chikayeria." 
Joel1:5 Inwe abamwatindire nebinyugwa ebiroro, boka morere! Inwe mwensi aba mokonywa edivai, bokia amagombo, ase engencho y’edivai enyia, ekiagera yarusigwe korwa ase emenwa yaino." 
Joel1:6 Egesaku kere ne chinguru getari kobareka kiaumokeire ense yane nigo kebwate amaino anga buna ay’endo, na amagegu aye nigo anga buna ay’endo eaberi." 
Joel1:7 Giasaririe emesabibu yane, kiabunire emeko yane; kiayesaboire, na gotuguta amasabo inse, ne chinsagia chi’emete eyio chiarabire se." 
Joel1:8 Rera na kobokia amagombo buna omoiseke omwekungi obegete chianga chie chigunia, okwereirwe nomosacha bw’oboke bwaye." 
Joel1:9 Okoruegwa kw’endagera na ogw’ekenyugwa biatangirwe, tibirentwa ase enyomba y’Omonene. Abakuani abare abakoreri b’Omonene nigo bakorera." 
Joel1:10 Emegondo yatigaire bosa; riroba nigo rikorera ekiagera endagera yasirigwe, edivai enyia tekobao na amaguta ’emezeituni akeeire kegima." 
Joel1:11 Inwe abaremi ichana na gosooka, nainwe abaroiseria b’emesabibu, rera, ekiagera engano na esairi biasirigwe amo nokwama gwonsi kw’emegondo." 
Joel1:12 Emesabibu yomire, na emeko boigo. Emekomomanga, na emekendo, na emete y’amapera, ee, emete ende yonsi y’emegondo yomire. Omogoko bw’abanto oerire." 
Joel1:13 Inwe abakuani, eboyie chigunia, morere, nainwe abakoreri b’egesasimero, bokia amagombo! Inwe abakoreri ba Nyasae one, eboyie chigunia, morere ase Hekalu ime ase obotuko bwonsi, ekiagera okoruegwa kw’endagera na ogw’ekenyugwa biatangirwe, tibirentwa ase enyomba ya Nyasae oino." 
Joel1:14 Raria engaki y’okweng’ata ogochenu; rangeria omosangererekano bw’ogosasima! Sangereria abagaaka na abanto bonsi b’ense eye, bache ase enyomba y’Omonene, Nyasae oino, erinde morere ase Omonene." 
Joel1:15 Obobe nobwaito, ekiagera rituko ri’Omonene nigo rire ang’e, rirarente ogosirigwa korwa ase Omonguru." 
Joel1:16 Inee! Endagera tesiriri korwa ase amaiso aito na omogoko na omochengo korwa ase enyomba ya Nyasae oito? 
Joel1:17 Chimbusuro chiomeire ase riroba ime; ebiage biatigaire bosa na ebigancha biasarekire, ekiagera endagera yaborire." 
Joel1:18 Chitugo chirochio nigo chikonakwana, amaicho e chiombe achandekire, ekiagera obonyansi bwaborire chikorisia, nonya namaicho e ching’ondi achandekire." 
Joel1:19 Aye Omonene, inche nigo nkorera asore, ekiagera eguru‐gura enga buna omorero yomirie amarisio ’erooro, na eyio enga buna chimeme chi’omorero yasambire emete yonsi y’orosana." 
Joel1:20 Nonya ne ching’iti chi’orosana nigo chikorera asore, ekiagera chindooche chiakamire, amache taiyo, ee, omorero oria osambire amarisio ’erooro." 
Joel2:1 Bugia egetureri ase Sayoni, ee, bugia egetureri ki’ogotabobora ase egetunwa kiane egechenu. Tiga abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense baiguswe, ekiagera rituko ri’Omonene ngocha rire; nigo rire ang’e." 
Joel2:2 Nigo rirabe rituko ri’omosunte na eri’amataturi, rituko ri’amare na omosunte ekerima. Omoganda omonene bwe chinguru nochiche, nigo orarande igoro ase ebitunwa buna ogokiamoka kwa mambia. Omogwekano bw’amang’ana ayio tana koba korwa kare, gose takoba nonya ng’ake ase ebigori bigochi‐gocha." 
Joel2:3 Bosio bwabo omorero nigo ogosamba, na magega yabo chimeme chi’omorero nigo chigosamba boigo. Bosio bwabo ense eyio yarenge buna omogondo o Edeni, korende magega yabo ekaba buna erooro yatigaire bosa, korwa ase chingige echio onde tari oratame atooreke." 
Joel2:4 Okororekana kwabo nigo konga buna ogwe chibarasi; nigo chikominyoka buna chibarasi chi’okorwana esegi. 
Joel2:5 Ekero chigoeta igoro ase ebitunwa, ebititiro biabo nigo binga buna ebie chigari, naende nigo binga buna ogotoreka kw’omorero ogosamba amasakwe; chirochio nigo chire buna abarwani esegi bare ne chinguru baroberigwe." 
Joel2:6 Ekero abanto bagochirora nigo bagoichana, amaiso ’abanto bonsi nigo akoonchoka arachoka." 
Joel2:7 Nigo chikominyoka gochia korwana esegi buna abarwani esegi chituoni; nigo chikoriina chindwaki igoro buna abarwani esegi. Kera eyemo nigo eragenderere gochia bosio, ende teri eragobere esire enchera ebwatetie." 
Joel2:8 Tichikomigererania, kera eyemo nigo egoeta omong’ororia oye; nigo chigoeta gati‐gati y’ebirwanero, tichigotangeka." 
Joel2:9 Nigo chikorindokera omochie, na kominyoka ase chindwaki igoro; nigo chikoriina ase chinyomba chisoa ime na chietera ase chitirisa buna abaibi." 
Joel2:10 Ense netengeche bosio bwabo, na igoro nchinyegerigwe. Erioba na omotienyi nabibekwe omosunte; ne ching’enang’eni tichikobara." 
Joel2:11 Eriogi ri’Omonene ndiigugwe bosio bw’omoganda oye bw’esegi, ekiagera omoganda oye bw’esegi nigo ore omonene mono; echio chigoikerania amang’ana aye, nigo chire ne chinguru. Rituko ri’Omonene nigo rire rinene na eri’okoirokia. Ning’o oranyare koriremereria?" 
Joel2:12 Omonene otebire, “Nonya mbono ng’iranere ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi, ase okweng’ata, na okorera, na okweng’ereria." 
Joel2:13 Tandora chinkoro chiaino ase ogweitia, gose tari ogotandora chianga chiaino.” Irana gochia ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, ekiagera ere nomuya na omonyamabera; ere tari omwango ase okoba nendamwamu; obwanchani bwaye nobwa botambe, nigo akoonchoka otiga kobarentera amabe." 
Joel2:14 Ning’o omanyete, ande gose Omonene naonchoke atige kobarentera amabe, korende abatigere ogosesenigwa, erinde moruere Omonene, Nyasae oino, okoruegwa kw’endagera, na ogw’ekenyugwa?" 
Joel2:15 Bugia egetureri ase Sayoni; raria engaki y’okweng’ata ogochenu, rangeria omosangererekano bw’ogosasima!" 
Joel2:16 Sangereria abanto amo, ochene omosangererekano oyio; sangereria abagaaka, sangereria nabana, nonya nabakogonka. Tiga omonyuomi asoke korwa mwaye, na omoriakari korwa eero mwaye." 
Joel2:17 Abakuani abwo bakomokorera Omonene tiga barere ase egati y’egesona na egesasimero, bakwane iga, “Aye Omonene, rorera abanto bao amabera; totiga abanto abwo bare omwando oo bachecherigwe, bakwanwe bobe ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku. Nase ki abanto baraborie: Ng’ai Nyasae obo are”?" 
Joel2:18 Erio Omonene akaba ne risemi ase engencho y’ense yaye, akarorera abanto baye amabeebe." 
Joel2:19 Omonene akairaneria abanto baye, akabatebia, “Rora, nkobatomera nde endagera, na edivai, na amaguta, na inwe namoisaneke; tinkobatiga mogenderere gochaywa ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku." 
Joel2:20 Ninserie omoganda okorwa sugusu orue asemore, obeere are, ninyoserie ogende ase ense enyomo ere bosa, ensemo etang’aine egende gochia ase Enyancha ya Moocha, na ensemo ekorwa nyuma egende gochia ase Enyancha ya Bosongo. Ogotioka kw’obogundo bwaye nkoimokerere igoro, ekiagera okorire ayare amanene mono.”" 
Joel2:21 “Aye ense, toiroka! Aye orogongo, goka na gochenga, ekiagera Omonene okorire ayare amanene." 
Joel2:22 Inwe ching’iti chi’orosana, timoiroka, ekiagera amarisio are ase erooro amerire obonyansi; emete yamire amatunda, emeko na emesabibu yamire okwama kwabo okonene.”" 
Joel2:23 “Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, goka, mochenge ase Omonene, Nyasae oino, ekiagera obaeire embura entang’ani ebaisaine; nere okobatweria embura botambe, eye ritang’ani na ey’okwamia endagera." 
Joel2:24 Ebiooreri bikoorerwa mbiichorwe ne chindagera; na ebimitero mbiichore nedivai na amaguta goika biiteke. 
Joel2:25 Nimbairanerie ebi’emiaka eria biasaretigwe ne chinyanchaba, ne chingige, na ebisase, ne chingeeti, omoganda oyio omonene natomete gocha ase egati yaino." 
Joel2:26 Monyore endagera enyinge mokoria moigote, erio motogie erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oino, oyio obakoreire amakumia. Abanto baane tibagochaywa naende." 
Joel2:27 Erio namomanye ng’a inche nigo inde ase egati y’Abaisraeli, naende ng’a inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, naende Nyasae onde omoao tari. Abanto baane tibagochaywa naende.”" 
Joel2:28 “Nebe ase amatuko agochi‐gocha, nimbaiterere abanto bonsi Omoika one; abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, inababane, na abagaaka baino nabarote chindoto, na abamura baino nabarore amaroro." 
Joel2:29 Naboigo ase amatuko ayio nimbaiterere abasomba baane, abasacha na abakungu, Omoika one." 
Joel2:30 “Ning’orokie ebikone igoro na ase ense; amanyinga, na omorero, ne rikundesi ri’erioki." 
Joel2:31 Erioba narionchoke ribe omosunte, na omotienyi nobe amanyiga, ekero rituko riria ri’Omonene, erire rinene, na eri’okoondokia, ritaracha." 
Joel2:32 Naende nebe ng’a kera oyorarangerie erieta ri’Omonene natoorigwe, ekiagera ase egetunwa gia Sayoni, na ime ya Yerusalemu, mbabe aroro abanto baratooreke, buna Omonene atebire, na ase egati y’abwo baratigare nigo barabe abwo Omonene arangeirie.”" 
Joel3:1 “Rora, ase amatuko ayio, na ase engaki eyio, inche Omonene ning’iranerie Abayuda, na abanto ba Yerusalemu, bare ase obosomba, amaya abo." 
Joel3:2 Ninsangererie abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, mbatirimbokie gochia ase Rikura ria Yehosafati; aroro agwo nimbanachere ekina, ekiagera mbasiarerete Abaisraeli, abwo bare omwando one, gochia ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, naende baatananire ense yane." 
Joel3:3 Baakeire abanto baane obomera, baoonirie abana abamura, erinde banyore abakungu abatayayi, na baoonirie abana abaiseke, erinde banyore edivai bakonywa." 
Joel3:4 “Inwe Turo na Sidoni, ne chingongo chionsi chi’Abafilisti, ngento ki mogonkorera? Inee! Nigo moganetie kong’iraneria egento? Moise korusia egesiomba igoro yane, nimbairanerie ogokora kwaino kobe igoro yaino bwango mono." 
Joel3:5 Inwe mwaimokirie chifeta ne chitahabu chiane, na mwairire ebinto biane ebiya bingwenerete gochia ase chihekalu chiaino." 
Joel3:6 Mwarusirie Abayuda na abanto ba Yerusalemu korwa ase chingongo chiabo, mwabaoonirie ase Abagiriki." 
Joel3:7 Korende bono nimbarangerie barue aase aria mwabaoonetie gochia, erinde mbairanerie inwe ogokora kwaino kobe igoro yaino." 
Joel3:8 Inche Omonene, ning’oonie abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, ase Abayuda, na barabwo babaoonie ase abanto ba Seba, abwo bamenyete aare mono. Ninche Omonene nakwanire ayio.”" 
Joel3:9 Raria amang’ana aya ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku: Ebeke ang’e ase esegi! Seegeta abarwani chituoni! Tiga abarwani bonsi bachiche ang’e bachake esegi. 
Joel3:10 Tura amakombe aino abe emioro, na emeyio yaino chinkuro ebe amatimo! Tiga oyore omworo atebe, “Nainche nigo inde etuoni.”" 
Joel3:11 Inwe abanto b’ebisaku momenyete ase chinsemo chionsi, ayerera bwango mooche, sangererekana amo. Aye Omonene, renta abarwani bao b’esegi bare chituoni!" 
Joel3:12 “Tiga abanto b’ebisaku baseegetane, bache ase Rikura ria Yehosafati. “Aroro agwo nao ndanachere abanto b’ebisaku bionsi babaetanaine ekina." 
Joel3:13 Soyia emeyio chinkuro mogondo, mogese, ekiagera rigesa riaikire. Soa ime motindache, ekiagera ekemitero ki’edivai kiaichoire. Chinyongo chiaichoire na goiteka, ekiagera obobe bwabo bwabeire obonene.”" 
Joel3:14 Emeganda na emeganda nigo ere ase Rikura ri’Ekina, ekiagera rituko ri’Omonene ng’ang’e rire agwo ase Rikura ri’Ekina." 
Joel3:15 Erioba na omotienyi mbibekwe omosunte, ne ching’enang’eni tichikobara." 
Joel3:16 Omonene narume korwa Sayoni, aake eriogi riaye korwa Yerusalemu; igoro na ense nchitengechigwe. Korende Omonene nabe obotamero bw’abanto baye, na eburi enkong’u y’Abaisraeli." 
Joel3:17 “Erio namomanye ng’a inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae oino, imenyete Sayoni, egetunwa kiane egechenu. Yerusalemu nobe omochie omochenu, na abanto b’ebisaku ebigeni tibagosoa aroro nonya ng’ake." 
Joel3:18 “Ase rituko erio ebitunwa mbitonyie edivai enyansu, na ebigoro mbiichore amabeere, ne chindooche chionsi chi’Abayuda nachiichorwe namache. Ensoko netuboke korwa ase enyomba y’Omonene, enyiyie ense omweya ya Sitimu." 
Joel3:19 “Ense ya Misiri nesarigwe ebe bosa, na Edomu nero nebe erooro ere bosa, ekiagera abanto b’aroro mbakorerete Abayuda amabe; nigo baiterete ase ense yabo amanyinga ’abanto batarenge na komocha." 
Joel3:20 Korende ense y’Abayuda nemenywe kare na kare, na Yerusalemu boigo, ekiaare ase ekiaare." 
Joel3:21 Ninsibie okomocha kwabo kw’ogoitera amanyinga, okwo ntasibetie ritang’ani. Inche Omonene nigo ngendererete komenya Sayoni.”" 
Amos1:1 Aya naro amang’ana Amosi, oyomo bw’abarisia ba Tekoa, aroche. Ase amaroro nigo orogetigwe amang’ana ayio igoro y’Abaisraeli miaka ebere ekero omotengecho bw’ense konya otaracha. Ekero ekio Usia nere orenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda, na Yeroboamu, mosinto o Yehoasi, nere orenge omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli." 
Amos1:2 Amosi agateba, “Omonene natogonye korwa Sayoni, aake eriogi riaye korwa Yerusalemu. Amarisio ’abarisia naichane, obonyansi bw’egetunwa gia Karimeli igoro mbwome.”" 
Amos1:3 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto ba Damesiki ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora, ekiagera barabwo baoorire Abagileadi nebioorero bi’ebioma." 
Amos1:4 Ase ayio nintome omorero ase enyomba ya Hasaeli; oro nosambe osirie kegima chinyomba chinkong’u chia Beni‐Hadadi. 
Amos1:5 Nimbune emekorogoto y’ebiita bia Damesiki; ninsirie abanto bamenyete ase ense omweya y’Aveni, na oyio obwate enyimbo y’omogambi agwo Beti‐Edeni. Abanto ba Siiria mbairwe ase obosomba gochia ase ense ya Kiri.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos1:6 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto ba Gasa ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora. Barabwo nigo bairete abanto egesaku ekegima gochia ase ense ya Edomu, bakabakora abasomba." 
Amos1:7 Ase ayio nintome omorero ase chindwaki chia Gasa; oro nosambe osirie chinyomba chinkong’u chi’aroro. 
Amos1:8 Ninsirie abanto bamenyete Asidodi, na oyo obwate enyimbo y’obogambi agwo Asikeloni. Ning’onchore okoboko kwane kobe mamincha ya Ekironi, na abatigari b’Abafilisti mbasirigwe.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Amos1:9 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto ba Turo ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora. Barabwo nigo bairete abanto egesaku ekegima ase ense ya Edomu, tibainyorete okobwatana kw’ogotianania kw’obomwabo." 
Amos1:10 Ase ayio nintome omorero ase chindwaki chia Turo; oro nosambe osirie chinyomba chinkong’u chi’aroro.” 
Amos1:11 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto ba Edomu ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora. Barabwo nigo babwatetie abamwabo bare nemioro, tibabete namabera nonya ng’ake; nigo bagendererete koba nendamwamu na ekeririanda botambe." 
Amos1:12 Ase ayio nintome omorero ase omochie o Temani; oro nosambe osirie chinyomba chinkong’u chia Bosira.” 
Amos1:13 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’Abaamoni ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora. Barabwo nigo boorete abakungu ba Gileadi barenge barito, ekero barenge kogareyia orogongo rwabo." 
Amos1:14 Ase ayio nintongie omorero ase chindwaki chia Raba; oro nosambe osirie chinyomba chinkong’u chi’aroro. Ase rituko erio ebikuuro bi’esegi mbiigugwe, boigo ndibe rituko ri’omwaga na ekembugu‐mbugu." 
Amos1:15 Omoruoti amo nabagambi b’oboruoti bwaye mbooswe bairwe ase obosomba.” Nabo Omonene atebire. 
Amos2:1 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto ba Moabu ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora. Barabwo nigo basambete amauga ’omoruoti o Edomu akaba ribu." 
Amos2:2 Ase ayio nintome omorero ase ense ya Moabu; oro nosambe osirie chinyomba chinkong’u chia Kerioti. Abamoabu mbakwe ase ebikuuro bi’esegi, na ase eriogi ri’ebitureri bi’esegi." 
Amos2:3 Ninsirie omogambi ebina korwa ase egati yabo, nimoite amo nabagambi b’aroro.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos2:4 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’Abayuda ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora. Barabwo nigo bachayete amachiko ’Omonene, gose tibabwatete emeroberio yaye echikire, korende amang’ana ’obong’ainereria bwabo, ayio chisokoro chiabo chiarenge kobwatia abasiririe." 
Amos2:5 Ase ayio nintome omorero ase ense y’Abayuda; oro nosambe osirie chinyomba chinkong’u chia Yerusalemu.” 
Amos2:6 Aya naro Omonene atebire: “Ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’Abaisraeli ara gatato, ee, ara kane, tingotanga egesusuro tikebanyora. Barabwo nigo baoonetie omonyene oboronge ase rigori ri’efeta, na omotaka bakamoonia ase rigori ri’ebikoroto bibere." 
Amos2:7 Abanto abwo nigo bagotiringera emetwe y’abataka ase orotu rw’ense, naende nigo bagokorekania amang’ana ’omonto omoitongo. Omomura na ise nigo bagokora obonyaka nomoiseke oyomo, na igo bakora erieta riane riaba eritachenegeti." 
Amos2:8 Mbarabare ase kera egesasimero barabwo nigo bakorara inse igoro ye chianga chikobekwa kebwaterero. Ase enyomba y’enyasae yabo banywa edivai y’abwo bagambetigwe bakarusigwa chibesa. 
Amos2:9 “Korende ase engencho y’Abaisraeli, inche Omonene ngasiria Abaamori abwo barenge abatambe buna emecharake, naende abakong’u buna omote onga buna omotontera. Nigo nasiretie amatunda abo, ngasimora nemeri yabo yonsi." 
Amos2:10 Ninche nabarusetie inwe korwa ase ense ya Misiri, erio nkabaraa ase erooro ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, na inwe mokaira ense y’Abaamori ekaba eyaino." 
Amos2:11 Erio ngachora abana baino bande bakaba ababani, na abamura bande nkabaatanana bakaba Aberwa baane. Inwe Abaisraeli, Inee, amang’ana ayio tari bo are?” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos2:12 “Korende inwe mokaa Aberwa abwo beritete edivai bakanywa, mogakania ababani tibabana." 
Amos2:13 Rora nimbaritoere gochia inse buna egari eichire chigurube ekoritoerwa. 
Amos2:14 Ekero ekio abanto bamanyete kominyoka chimbero, mbasinywe gotama, na abwo bare ne chinguru, mbaborwe chinguru, na abarwani esegi bare chituoni, tibagotooria obogima bwabo." 
Amos2:15 Omonto omanyete koruta chinsara, tagotenena arwane, gose oyomanyete kominyoka chimbero, tagwetooria, na omoriini ebarasi tagwetooria." 
Amos2:16 Ase rituko erio omonto ore omoremu mono ase egati y’abarwani chituoni, natame ore getirianda.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos3:1 Inwe Abaisraeli, tegerera moigwe amang’ana aya Omonene akwanire igoro yaino, ee, igoro y’egesaku eke gionsi narusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri:" 
Amos3:2 “Ninwe mweka imanyete ase chiamate chionsi chi’ense. Ase ayio nimbae egesusuro ase engencho y’ebibe biaino bionsi.” 
Amos3:3 Inee! Abanto babere mbataarere amo onye tibabwataini? 
Amos3:4 Inee! Endo nerume ase rinani, onye teraita eke yare gotwara? Gose endo ensae nkoruma ere, onye terabwata kende ekoria?" 
Amos3:5 Inee! Enyoni nebwatwe onye tetegeiri obosugunia? Gose omoeto notegoke onye tobwateti gento? 
Amos3:6 Inee! Egetureri gi’esegi nkebugigwe ase omochie, na abanto tibaba nobwoba? Amang’ana amabe nabe ase omochie, Omonene atayatometi?" 
Amos3:7 Ekeene, Omonene Nyasae tagokora ring’ana rinde rionsi ritang’ani ataramaanora obobisi bwaye ase abasomba baye ababani." 
Amos3:8 Endo koyarumire, monto ki otari kwoboa? Omonene Nyasae gakwanire, ning’o otari koraria obobani obwo?" 
Amos3:9 Raria amang’ana ayio ase chinyomba chinkong’u chi’Asidodi, na echi’ense ya Misiri, motebie abanto bare aroro: “Inchuo, mosangererekane amo igoro ase ebitunwa bia Samaria, morore eburu‐buru ere aroro, na buna abanto bachandire.”" 
Amos3:10 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Abanto abwo tibamanyeti gokora ayare amaya. Nigo bagachete ebinto bi’obouri na ebi’oboibi ase chinyomba chiabo chinkong’u.” 
Amos3:11 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Ababisa mbanaarie ense eye, baiyerie chindwaki chiaino inse, echio mwekengerete, ne chinyomba chiaino chinkong’u chisakorwe.”" 
Amos3:12 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Buna koreng’ana omorisia agotaboria korwa ase omonwa bw’endo amauga ’amagoro abere, gose egetabo ki’ogoto, naboigo n’Abaisraeli barataborigwe, abwo bamenyete Samaria baikaransete ase ebirogo ebiororo na ase emeito etubire nebitambaa bi’ariri.”" 
Amos3:13 Omonene Nyasae, oyore Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nigo agoteba iga: “Tegerera moigwe amang’ana aya, erio moyararie ase ororeria rwa Yakobo." 
Amos3:14 Ase rituko erio ndarue egesusuro ase Abaisraeli ase engencho y’ebibe biabo, ninsarie na gotagora ebisasimero bia Beteli; nintagore na koiyeria inse emegwekano ye chingunchara ere ase ebisasimero biria." 
Amos3:15 Nintagore chinyomba ase mokobeera ekero ki’obokendu amo nechio mokobeera ekero ki’egurugura; boigo ninsarie chinyomba chichabeire amaino e chinchogu, ne chinyomba chinene nchisirigwe kegima.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos4:1 Igwa ring’ana eri inwe chiombe chia Basani, inwe abamomenyete ase Egetunwa gia Samaria, inwe abamochandete abataka na gokorera abaremeire bobe, inwe abamogotebia abasacha baino: “Torentere egento tonywe!”" 
Amos4:2 Ase ayio Omonene Nyasae otianire ase obochenu bwaye, ogoteba: “Rora, amatuko ngocha are, ababisa baino barabang’use nebigobanio babarusie aiga, na abatigari baino bang’uswe ne chindobio." 
Amos4:3 Nigo moraeterigwe ase chinyasi chibochogete, kera omokungu oyomo ase oyomo, morutwe ase Harimoni.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos4:4 “Inchuo Beteli, mokorere ebibe aroro; boigo inchuo Giligali, momente gokora ebibe aroro. Kera emambia mobe mokorenta ebing’wanso biaino; na ase kera rituko ria gatato morente ensemo yaino ya ikomi." 
Amos4:5 Mosambe emegati ebekire ememera ebe okoruegwa gw’okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, mochike na koraria igoro y’okoruegwa kwaino kw’ogwancha, ekiagera ayio naro inwe Abaisraeli mwanchete gokora.” Nabo Omonene Nyasae atebire." 
Amos4:6 “Inche tinabaete gento kende mogotakuna ase emechie yaino yonsi, na endagera ekabora aase aino onsi. Korende nonya naboigo timwairanete gocha asende.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos4:7 “Ekero emetienyi etato konya yatigaire endagera yame ngatanga embura tiyatwa. Nigo narenge gotoma embura yatwa ase omochie oyomo, korende nayetanga tegotwa ase emechie ende; nigo narenge koyerenta yatwa ase omogondo oyomo, korende nayetanga ase emegondo ende, ero yaba ekwoma." 
Amos4:8 Ekero ekio abanto b’emechie ebere, gose etato, bakaba bakona‐goetanana gochia ase omochie oyomo korigia amache banywe, korende tibanyora ayakobaisana. Nonya naboigo timwairanete gocha asende.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos4:9 “Nkabarentera oborwaire bw’enyagetabo, na obw’okorigisia chindagera chiaino; emegondo yaino emenge, amo ney’emesabibu, na emeko yaino, na emezeituni yaino ekariegwa ne chingige. Korende nonya naboigo, timwairanete gocha asende.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos4:10 “Nigo nabarenterete amaakwa anga buna aria narentete Misiri; naende ngaita abamura baino nemioro; nkabaura chibarasi chiaino, nkabatiokeria obogundo bw’abanto baino baitetwe, agwo ase ebitwori biaino. Korende nonya naboigo timwairanete gocha asende.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos4:11 “Ngasiria abanto bande baino, buna inche Nyasae nasiretie Sodomu na Gomora, na inwe nigo mwarenge buna ekegenga giataboretigwe korwa riko. Korende nonya nabo, timwairanete gocha asende.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos4:12 “Inwe Abaisraeli, amang’ana ayio naro ndabakorere. Ase ayio, ekiagera ngocha kobakorera ayio, ebeke ang’e, moumerane nainche Nyasae oino.”" 
Amos4:13 Rora, oria otongete ebitunwa na embeo, oria okoorokeria mwanyabanto ebirengererio biabo bamanya buna bire, oria okoonchora emambia yaba omosunte, oria ogoeta otacha ebitunwa bi’ense, Omonene Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nario erieta riaye." 
Amos5:1 Inwe Abaisraeli, igwa amang’ana ’okorera kwane gw’okobokia amagombo ase engencho yaino:" 
Amos5:2 “Abaisraeli banga buna omoiseke omwekungi bagure, tibakonyara koboka naende; batigirwe bagwete ase ense yabo, monto onde tari orabagororokie batenene.”" 
Amos5:3 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba: “Omochie bw’Abaisraeli otomete abarwani esegi elifu eyemo, bono nigo otigarete ne rigana erimo, na oyotomete rigana erimo, bono nigo otigarete na ikomi.”" 
Amos5:4 Aya naro Omonene agotebia Abaisraeli: “Ndigie inche, erio nario morabe moyo." 
Amos5:5 Korende timogenda Beteli, gose timosoa Giligali, gose timogenda goika Beeri‐Seba, ekiagera abanto ba Giligali mbairwe ase obosomba, na Beteli nosirigwe kegima.”" 
Amos5:6 Morigie Omonene, nario morabe moyo; motakoreti bo, Omonene nigo arachere ororeria rwa Yusufu arosirie buna omorero ogosiria, na onde tari orayorimie atoorie Beteli." 
Amos5:7 Inwe nigo mokoonchorana ayare amaronge aba ay’obororo, na mwatuguta oboronge inse ase riroba." 
Amos5:8 Oria otongete egetuse gie ching’enang’eni chiria isano na ibere, na ekio gekorokwa Orioni, oria okoonchora omosunte ekerima oba emambia, naende oonchora omobaso oba obotuko, oria okorangeria amache ’enyancha oyaumora igoro ase ense, Omonene, nario erieta riaye." 
Amos5:9 Ere nigo akorenta ogosiria kwa mobosokano ase abwo bare ne chinguru, boigo nagere ogosareka gochere chiburi chinkong’u." 
Amos5:10 Abanto nigo bagechete oria okorwanerera ekeene agwo ase ekegambero kere geita, na bagechigwa noyo ogokwana ay’ekeene." 
Amos5:11 Ase ayio, buna koreng’ana mwatindacheire abataka inse na kobaura engano yabo ebe ebango, nebe ekero moraagache chinyomba chi’amagena abaachire, timogochimenya, na ekero morasimeke emesabibu ase emegondo emiya, timokonywa edivai yaye." 
Amos5:12 Inche nimanyete ogosaria kwaino ng’a nokonene na ebibe biaino ng’a nebinene mono. Nigo mogochanda omonyaboronge, boigo mokoegwa riaaki, erio mwaseria abataka korwa ase ekegambero kere geita tibakonyora oboronge bwabo." 
Amos5:13 Ase engencho eyio, omonto ore omong’aini nakire‐kiri ase engaki buna eyio, ekiagera eyio nengaki embe." 
Amos5:14 Rigia ayare amaya, na tari ayare amabe, erio nario morabe moyo. Komorakore bo, Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nabe amo nainwe, buna inwe mwatebire." 
Amos5:15 Gecha ayare amabe, na mwanche ayare amaya. Motenenere oboronge agwo ase ekegambero kere geita. Komorakore bo, ande nabo Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, ararorere abatigari ba Yusufu amabera." 
Amos5:16 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, oyore Omonene, atebire: “Ebirero mbibe ase chiraaro chionsi chi’omochie, na ase chinchera chiaye chionsi abanto barere bakobuga: Obee! Obee! Mbarangerie abaremi bache korera, na abamanyete kobokia amagombo bache kweng’ereria." 
Amos5:17 Ebirero mbibe ase emegondo yonsi y’emesabibu. Ayio onsi nigo arabe, ekiagera inche Omonene ning’ete ase egati yaino mbaite.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos5:18 Obobe nobwaino inwe abamoganetie rituko ri’Omonene riike! Nase ki moganetie rituko riria ri’Omonene? Rituko erio nigo rirabe eri’omosunte, gose tirikoba eri’omobaso." 
Amos5:19 Nigo erabe buna ekero omonto agotama korwa ase endo, aumerane nedubu, gose ekero agosoa mwaye atoorera okoboko kwaye ase enyasi, na eng’iti emorome." 
Amos5:20 Rituko riria ri’Omonene nigo rirabe eri’omosunte, tirikoba eri’oborabu, ee, neri’omosunte ekerima, na omobaso tokobara nonya ng’ake." 
Amos5:21 “Inche nigo ngechete na gochaya Amatuko aino Amanene. Tingokiri nemesangererekano yaino y’ogosasima. 
Amos5:22 Namoisa kondetera ebing’wanso biaino bi’ogosambwa, na okoruegwa kw’endagera, tinkobianchera; na tingwancha nonya nokorigereria ndigererie ching’iti chiaino chinoru chikoruegwa chibe ebing’wanso bi’omorembe." 
Amos5:23 Rusia korwa asende okwoga kwaino kw’amatera, tingwancha ntegerere amariogi ’amakano aino." 
Amos5:24 Korende tiga ekeene kegenderere buna amache amange, na oboronge bobe buna orooche amache aye atari koera nonya ng’ake." 
Amos5:25 “Inwe Abaisraeli, Inee, ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene mwarenge ase erooro, mwandeterete ebing’wanso amo nokoruegwa konde?" 
Amos5:26 Inwe mobogorie Sikuti, omogwekano oyio mogosasima buna omoruoti oino, na Kiyuni, enyasae yaino ye ching’enang’eni mweroiseretie." 
Amos5:27 Ase engencho eyio inche nimbaire ase obosomba ase ense ere ng’umbu ya Damesiki.” Nabo Omonene atebire. Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nario erieta riaye." 
Amos6:1 Obobe nobwabo abwo bamenyete buya agwo Sayoni, na abwo batoererete ase ebitunwa bia Samaria, abwo bare abasike b’egesaku egetang’ani, eki Abaisraeli bagochiera." 
Amos6:2 Genda goika Kaline, moyorore, naende mogende goika Hamati, oyio ore omochie omonene, naende motirimboke gochia Gati bw’Abafilisti. Inee! Barabwo nigo bare buya kobua abanto b’amaruoti aya are aiga? Gose chingongo chiabo nechinene kobua orogongo rwaino?" 
Amos6:3 Obobe nobwaino, inwe abamogoteba ng’a rituko ri’obobe ng’are rire, na mwanchera ogokora okobe kw’obotindi kobeera ase egati yaino." 
Amos6:4 Obobe nobwaino inwe aba mokorarera amarere achabeire amaino e chinchogu, naende mwaba mokwerambora ase ebirogo biaino bigwotota. Nigo mokoba mokoria chimanwa chie ching’ondi chichorire, ne chimori chinoru korwa ase ameeri." 
Amos6:5 Inwe nigo mogotera amatera ay’okwoga, na mweroiseria amakano ao ao, aya mokobugia, buna Daudi akorete." 
Amos6:6 Nigo mokonywa edivai korwa ase ebitaabo ebinene, naende mweaka amaguta e rigori rinene, korende timoichanereti ogosirigwa kw’ororeria rwa Yusufu." 
Amos6:7 Ase ayio, inwe mobe abe ritang’ani koirwa ase obosomba, na emegoko y’emeyega yaino neere." 
Amos6:8 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nigo agoteba iga: “Inche Omonene netianirie ngoteba: Nigo ngechirie noboenenu bw’abanto ba Yakobo, na nigo ngechete chinyomba chiabo chinkong’u. Ase ayio nintige omochie osirigwe amo nebinto bionsi bireo.”" 
Amos6:9 Nebe ng’a onye abasacha ikomi batigaire ase enyomba eyemo, nabarabwo goika bakwe." 
Amos6:10 Omoamate bw’omonto oyio okure nache kobogoria amauga amo noyo ogochia koyasamba. Omoamate oria narangerie onde bwensi otigarete ase enyomba eria ime, amoborie, “Onde nare aa motigarete komo?” Omonto oria nairanerie, akane, “Yaya.” Erio omoamate oria namotebie “Kira‐kiri! Twerende titobaisa gwatora erieta ri’Omonene.”" 
Amos6:11 Ase ayio rora, Omonene narue ogochika ng’a chinyomba chire chinene na echire chinke chiiyerigwe inse chisamunyokane." 
Amos6:12 Inee! Chibarasi nchinyare kominyoka igoro ase egetare? Gose omonto nanyare korema egetare ne chiombe? Korende inwe mwaonchoire ayare ay’oboronge abeire obosongo, na okwama kw’oboronge kwabeire obororo buna chinkama." 
Amos6:13 Inwe nigo mokogokera egento kere bosa, mogoteba, “Inee! Titwenyorerete chingunchara goetera ase chinguru chiaito abanyene?”" 
Amos6:14 Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, agoteba: “Inwe Abaisraeli rora, nimbarentere abanto b’egesaku gete; barabwo mbabachande gochakera ase egesoero kia Hamati goikera ase akarooche g’Ekerubo Ekiomo.”" 
Amos7:1 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae anyorogetie ase amaroro: Nkamorora ogotonga chingige ekero obonyansi bwachagete goseboka; okwo nogoseboka gwa kabere ekero obonyansi bw’omoruoti konya bwagekirwe. 
Amos7:2 Ekero chingige chiria chiakoorire koria ebimeri bionsi bi’ense, inche ngasaba, ngateba, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, nagosoroire bwabere! Naki abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo baranyare koba moyo, ekero bare abake iga?”" 
Amos7:3 Ase ayio, Omonene akaonchora ebirengererio biaye, agateba, “Ayio bono takoba bo.”" 
Amos7:4 Aya naro Omonene anyorogetie ase amaroro: Nkarora Omonene Nyasae ogocha korua egesusuro goetera ase omorero; omorero oyio ogasamba chindiba chinene, naende ogachaka gosamba nense ekoremwa." 
Amos7:5 Erio nkamotebia, “Aye Omonene Nyasae, nagosoroire, tiga tobaisa gokora ayio. Naki abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo baranyare koba moyo ekero bare abake iga?”" 
Amos7:6 Erio Omonene Nyasae akaonchora ebirengererio biaye, agateba, “Naya boigo takoba bo.”" 
Amos7:7 Aya naro Omonene anyorogetie ase amaroro: Nkamorora oteneine igoro y’orwaki rwaagachetwe ase okorengwa nekebiro, na ase okoboko kwaye nabwate ekebiro." 
Amos7:8 Omonene akamboria, “Amosi, ngento ki eke oroche?” Nkamoiraneria, nkamotebia, “Eke nekebiro.” Erio Omonene agantebia, “Rora, nindenge abanto baane Abaisraeli nekebiro eke. Tinkobaetania nonya ng’ake." 
Amos7:9 Aase aimokererete igoro, ase abanto b’ororeria rwa Isaka bagosasimera bosa, na aase ande onsi Abaisraeli bagosasimera natagorwe abe bosa. Ning’ite abanto b’enyomba ya Yeroboamu nemioro.”" 
Amos7:10 Erio Amasia, omokuani o Beteli, agatoma amang’ana ase Yeroboamu, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, komotebia, “Amosi oseegetire Abaisraeli bonsi babe mamincha yao; na ense eye tekonyara koremereria amang’ana aye onsi." 
Amos7:11 Amang’ana aya naro akwanire: Yeroboamu naitwe nemioro, na Abaisraeli mbarusigwe ase ense yabo bairwe ase obosomba.”" 
Amos7:12 Naende Amasia agatebia Amosi, “Aye omorori, tama ogende ase ense y’Abayuda; aroro agwo nonyore endagera okoria, na obe gokobanera aroro." 
Amos7:13 Korende tobaisa kobanera aiga Beteli naende nonya ng’ake, ekiagera aiga naase aachenu a omoruoti, naende aa nao hekalu y’obogambi bwonsi.”" 
Amos7:14 Erio Amosi akairaneria Amasia, akamotebia, “Inche tindi omobani, gose omwana bw’omobani bworokereretigwe obobani, nigo narenge omorisia, naende omorendi bw’emeko." 
Amos7:15 Korende Omonene akandusia korwa ase narenge korisia ching’ondi, agantebia: Genda obanere abanto baane Abaisraeli." 
Amos7:16 Ase ayio, igwa ring’ana ri’Omonene. Aye nigo ogonkania ng’a timbaisa kobana mamincha y’Abaisraeli na tindandia mamincha y’ororeria rwa Isaka." 
Amos7:17 Ase ayio, aya naro amang’ana Omonene agoteba: Mokao nabe omotayayi, abe ogokora obonyaka ase omochie omonene, na abana bao, abamura na abaiseke, mbaitwe nemioro. Oboremo bwao mbwatananwe ase okorengwa nengori; aye omonyene nokwere ase ense etachenegeti. Abaisraeli goika barusigwe ase ense yabo, bairwe ase obosomba.”" 
Amos8:1 Aya naro Omonene Nyasae anyorogetie ase amaroro: Nkarora egetonga kere namatunda amatobu. 
Amos8:2 Omonene akamboria, “Amosi, ngento ki eke oroche?” Nkamoiraneria, nkamotebia, “Negetonga kere namatunda amatobu.” Erio Omonene agantebia, “Omoerio ocheire abanto baane Abaisraeli. Tinkobaetania nonya ng’ake.”" 
Amos8:3 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio amatera agoterwa ase chihekalu naonchoke abe okorera gw’okweumia. Emebere y’abanto bakwete nigo erabe emenge aande onsi; abanto nigo barabe bakoyetuguta bakirete‐kiri.” 
Amos8:4 Inwe aba mokourereria abaremeire na gosiria abataka bare ase ense, igwa amang’ana aya." 
Amos8:5 Inwe nigo mogoteba, “Ndiriri omoyega bw’Omotienyi Omoyia oraere, erinde toonie chimbusuro chiaito? Naende ndiriri Esabato eraere, erinde toonie engano? Erio toyerenge nekemunu egeke, na tokinie rigori ri’esekeli, naende tobe tokong’ainereria nebirengero bi’obourereria." 
Amos8:6 Boigo togore abataka ase rigori rie chifeta, na abaremerwa ase rigori ri’ebikoroto bibere, na toonie engano embe ere namakoyo buna eyere engiya.”" 
Amos8:7 Omonene otianire ase Oyore Obonene bw’abanto ba Yakobo, ogoteba, “Ekeene, tinkweba ogokora kwabo nonya ng’ake." 
Amos8:8 Inee! Ense tegotengechigwa ase engencho eyio, na kera omonto omenyete imeo arere na kobokia amagombo. Ee, ense engima nenyegerigwe na koimokererigwa igoro buna orooche rwa Naili roichire, nigo egotwoma‐twomana, naende yairana inse, buna orooche roria rwa Misiri”" 
Amos8:9 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio nintige erioba rigwe mobaso gati, na nindete omosunte ase ense ekero omobaso obarete." 
Amos8:10 Ning’onchore emeyega yaino ebe ebirero, na amatera aino abe okorera gw’okobokia amagombo. Nindete omoichano ase abanto bonsi, erio beboyie chigunia, na kera omonto akigite etukia y’omotwe oye. Mbatige mobe buna omonto okoreera omwana oye omomoima, na omoerio oye nobe rituko ri’obororo.”" 
Amos8:11 Omonene Nyasae nigo agoteba iga: “Rora, amatuko ngocha are, ndarente enchara ase ense, tari enchara y’endagera, gose tari erang’o y’amache, korende nenchara ye ringana ri’Omonene." 
Amos8:12 Abanto mbatayaye korwa ase enyancha goika ase enyancha ende, na korwa sugusu goika moocha; mbaminyoke gochia aaria na aaria, babe bakorigia ring’ana ri’Omonene, korende tibakorinyora." 
Amos8:13 Ase rituko erio abaiseke abekungi abanyabieni na abamura mbagoyane ase okoba nerang’o. 
Amos8:14 Abanto abwo bagotiana ase ebibe bi’Abasamaria, bagoteba: Aye Dani, ekeene, buna enyasae yao ere moyo, naende bateba: Ekeene, buna enchera egochia Beeri‐Seba egendererete kobao, abanto abwo goika bagwe, tibaboka rinde.”" 
Amos9:1 Nkarora Omonene oteneine ang’e negesasimero, ere agateba, “Aka ebisure bie chisiiro goika emeriibo y’emetobwa y’egesieri inse etengeche; ebisure bibunanekane bigwere emetwe y’abanto bonsi. Abaratigare nimbaite nemioro. Onde tari oratame, gose oratooreke, nonya noyomo." 
Amos9:2 Nabaisa korema basoe inse agwo aase abakure, okoboko kwane nigo korabarusieo; nabaisa koriina baike igoro nimbatabokanie gochia inse aa." 
Amos9:3 Nabaisa kwebisa ase egechuria ki’egetunwa gia Karimeli, nimbarigie mbarusieo; nabaisa gosoa ase enkori y’enyancha inse bebise ng’a timbarora, aroro agwo ninchike eng’iti engenda inse ebarome." 
Amos9:4 Nabaisa koirwa ase obosomba nababisa babo, aroro agwo ninchike emioro ebaite. Nimbaonchorere amaiso aane mbakorere ayare amabe na tari ayare amaya.”" 
Amos9:5 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, karakune ense, ero nigo ekonyititoka, na ebitongwa bionsi bireo bibe bikorera. Ense engima neimokererigwe igoro, naende eiranigwe inse, buna orooche rwa Naili rore agwo Misiri." 
Amos9:6 Oria okoagacha chiero chiaye aaria igoro, na obeka obokumbe bwaye igoro y’ense na kobokong’ia, oria okorangeria amache ’enyancha, oyaumora igoro ase ense, Omonene nario erieta riaye." 
Amos9:7 “Inwe Abaisraeli, Inee, timonga buna Abaetiopia asende? Inee! Tinabarusetie inwe Abaisraeli korwa ase ense ya Misiri, na Abafilisti korwa ase ense ya Kafitori, na Abaasuri korwa Kiri?” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos9:8 “Rora inche Omonene Nyasae nigo ndarigererie namaiso aane obogambi obwo bogokora ebibe. Nimbosirie borue ase obosio bw’ense, korende tingosiria kegima abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Amos9:9 “Naama! Ninchike ng’a Abaisraeli basongwe ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, buna obori bogosongwa. Korende nonya nenyeke ensinini tekogwa inse." 
Amos9:10 Abanyabibe bonsi b’abanto baane, abwo bagoteba ng’a amabe takobanyora gose kobakorera kende, mbaitwe nemioro." 
Amos9:11 “Rituko ngochicha rire ekero ndatenenie esaiga eria ya Daudi yagwete, ning’agache naende aase agwo atagogete, ngororokie amatombe aye; ninyeagache naende, ebe buna yarenge agwo kare." 
Amos9:12 Abaisraeli mbaire ensemo entigari ya Edomu, boigo mbaire chinse chi’ebisaku ebio bikorokwa ase erieta riane.” Nabo Omonene, oyio orakore ayio, agoteba." 
Amos9:13 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Rora amatuko ngocha are, ekero omoremi araikeere omogesi, na omomiti amasabibu araikeere omobusuri chimbusuro. Ebitunwa mbitonyie edivai enyansu, na ebigoro mbiichore edivai." 
Amos9:14 Ning’iranie abanto baane Abaisraeli korwa ase obosomba. Barabwo mbaagache naende emechie eyio yasiretigwe bamenyeo, mbasimeke emesabibu na konywa edivai yaye; boigo mbareme emegondo, basimeke chindagera na koria okwama kw’emegondo eyio." 
Amos9:15 Nimbairanie mbabeke bamenye ase ense yabo, tibagotegorwa korwa ase ense eyio nabaete.” Nabo Omonene, Nyasae oino, atebire." 
Obadiah1:1 Oko nokorora kw’Obadia. Aya naro Omonene Nyasae agoteba igoro y’egesaku kia Edomu, ee, twaigure amang’ana korwa ase Omonene, na omotomwa otomirwe gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku, ogoteba: “Imoka, togende korwania Abaedomu esegi!”" 
Obadiah1:2 “Rora, ningokore obe omoke ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, obe kogochaywa mono." 
Obadiah1:3 Oboenenu bw’enkoro yao bwakong’ainire, aye omenyete ime y’emienya y’ebitare; agwo ase omenyete aimokererete igoro. Nigo ogokwana ase enkoro yao ime, gweteba: Ning’o orang’iyerie gochia inse?”" 
Obadiah1:4 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Noisa koagacha egeswa kiao aaria igoro buna ekeongo, ee, nokebeke ase egati‐gati ye ching’enang’eni, inche ninkoiyerie korwa aroro.”" 
Obadiah1:5 “Abaibi gose abasakori baise kogochera botuko, aye nosirigwe kegima. Ekeene, nigo baraibe binde bionsi baganetie. Inee! Abasangereria b’amasabibu baare kogochera, tibarenge kogotigera nonya naria agotigara?" 
Obadiah1:6 Naki abanto b’ororeria rwa Esau bakoriga‐rigigwa ne chinibo chiabo chibisire chiaorokigwe maiso marore! 
Obadiah1:7 Abanto baria bonsi kwabwatanete nabarabwo bagoseririe gochia ase orobebe, abanto baria gwakorete omorembe nabarabwo bakong’ainire na gokobua. Abasani bao mokoria komo bagotegeire oboreba, bagoteba: Ng’ai obong’aini bwao bore?”" 
Obadiah1:8 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio ninsirie abanto abang’aini ba Edomu, naende ninsirie okomanya gwonsi korwa ase Egetunwa gia Esau." 
Obadiah1:9 Inwe Abatemani, abarwani baino b’esegi bare chituoni mbaondoke, na kera oyomo ore ase Egetunwa gia Esau naitwe asirigwe kegima.”" 
Obadiah1:10 “Ekiagera mwaureretie na goita abanto bamino b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, namosookigwe na gosirigwa goika kare na kare." 
Obadiah1:11 Inwe nigo mwatenenete ensemo ase rituko riria, ekero abanto b’ense engeni bairete chinibo chiabo, bagasoa ebiita bia Yerusalemu, bakayoakera obomera. Naboigo nainwe mwarenge buna barabwo." 
Obadiah1:12 Timobaisa kogoka ase rituko riria amabe arache ase abanto bamino. Gose timobaisa gochenga ase rituko ri’ogosirigwa kw’Abayuda, gose timobaisa gokwana noboenenu ase rituko ri’emechando yabo." 
Obadiah1:13 Inwe timosoa ase egeita ki’abanto baane ase rituko ri’amaakwa abo; gose timogokera emechando yabo ase rituko ri’amaakwa abo, gose timorambora amaboko aino koira chinibo chiabo ase rituko ri’amaakwa abo." 
Obadiah1:14 Inwe timobaisa gotenena ase amatabekania e chinchera goita abanto ba Edomu kobagotama, gose timobeka abatooregete babo bache gosirigwa ase rituko riria ri’emechando yabo.”" 
Obadiah1:15 “Rituko ri’Omonene ng’ang’e rire gochera abanto b’ebisaku bionsi. Buna mwabeire mogokora, naboigo nainwe morakorerwe. Ogokora kwaino nkobairanere inwe abanyene." 
Obadiah1:16 Buna mwabeire mokonywera igoro ase egetunwa kiane egechenu, naboigo nabanto b’ebisaku bionsi baragenderere konywa botambe, ee, mbanywe bakoore nonya neturubo yonsi, na babe buna tibarengeo.”" 
Obadiah1:17 “Korende ase egetunwa gia Sayoni mbabe aroro abaratooreke na aase agwo nabe aachenu. Abanto b’enyomba ya Yakobo nabairanerigwe ense yabo. 
Obadiah1:18 Abanto b’enyomba ya Yakobo mbabe omorero, na ab’enyomba ya Yusufu mbabe buna ekebemberi ki’omorero, na ab’enyomba ya Esau mbabe buna amasakwe amomo. Abanto ba Yakobo na aba Yusufu mbasambe abanto ba Esau babasirie. Onde tari oratigare ase enyomba yaye, ekiagera n’Omonene okwanire ayio." 
Obadiah1:19 Abanto b’ense ya Negebu mbaire Egetunwa gia Esau, na ab’ense omweya mbaire ense y’Abafilisti. Mbaire na ense y’Abaefraimu na ey’Abasamaria chibe echiabo; na abanto ba Benjamin mbaire Gileadi ebe eyabo." 
Obadiah1:20 Abarwani esegi b’Abaisraeli abwo bairetwe ase obosomba mbairane bamenye ase ense ya Kanani gochia ase omochie o Sarefata. Abanto ba Yerusalemu bairetwe ase obosomba, abwo bamenyete Sefaradi, mbaire emechie ya Negebu ebe eyabo." 
Obadiah1:21 Erio abatooria mbariine ase Egetunwa gia Sayoni, bagambere Egetunwa gia Esau. Omonene omonyene nere orabe omoruoti.”" 
Jonah1:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yona mosinto bw’Amitai, rikamotebia:" 
Jonah1:2 “Imoka ogende Nineva, omochie oria omonene, oake eriogi ri’okoyokurera, ekiagera ogokora kwaye okobe gwaikire ase obosio bwane.”" 
Jonah1:3 Korende Yona akaimoka, agatama gochia Tarisisi ng’a arue ase obosio bw’Omonene. Agatirimboka gochia Yopa, na agwo akanyora emeeri ekogenda Tarisisi. Erio agaakana chibesa chi’orogendo, agasoa ime, akagenda amo nabanto bande gotama gochia Tarisisi ng’a arue ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
Jonah1:4 Korende Omonene akagusia omwaga omonene mono igoro ase enyancha, na ekembugu‐mbugu gie chinguru kegacha ase enyancha, na emeeri ekaba ang’e kobuneka." 
Jonah1:5 Erio abagendia b’emeeri bakaondoka, na kera oyomo akarangeria enyasae yaye ng’a emokonye. Abanto abwo bakaimokia chigurube chiarenge ase emeeri ime, bagachituguta gochia ase enyancha ime, ng’a nario emeeri eragusue. Bono Yona ere konya otirimbokire gochia nyaro ime y’emeeri, na aroro nigo araire chitoro chinene mono." 
Jonah1:6 Omochiki bw’emeeri akagenda asare akamoboria, “Naki oraire chitoro iga okirete‐kiri? Imoka orangerie Nyasae oo! Ande Nyasae oyio nabo arabaise gotorengereria atokonye titosira.”" 
Jonah1:7 Abanto baria bagatebania, “Tiga toake obomera tomanye gose ning’o ogerire amabe aya atocheire.” Erio bagaaka obomera, na obomera obwo bokagwera Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Ase ayio abanto baria bakamoboria, “Totebie gose ning’o ogerire amabe aya atonyorire. Meremo ki ogokora aye? Ng’ai kwarure? Ense yao nereri? Ngesaku ki ore?”" 
Jonah1:9 Ere akabairaneria, “Inche n’Omoibirania inde, na nigo inyirogete Omonene, Nyasae o igoro, oyo otongete enyancha na ense enyomo.”" 
Jonah1:10 Erio abanto baria bakairoka mono, bakamoboria, “Mang’ana ki aya gwakorire?” Abanto baria nigo bamanyete ng’a Yona nigo arenge gotama korwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekiagera konya obatebirie amang’ana ayio." 
Jonah1:11 Erio abanto baria bakamoboria, “Ngento ki tokogokorera, erinde enyancha etotoerere?” Ekembugu‐mbugu keria nigo kiagendererete kona‐koburukania enyancha mono goetania." 
Jonah1:12 Ere akabairaneria, akabatebia, “Inyimokie, mondute ase enyancha ime; ero netoerere asemore, ekiagera namanyire ng’a ninche nagerire ekembugu‐mbugu kiabacheire.”" 
Jonah1:13 Nonya naboigo abanto baria bagateema ne chinguru gosukia emeeri eria gochia ase engegu, korende tibanyarete, ekiagera ekembugu‐mbugu keria nigo kiagendererete koburukania enyancha mono goetania." 
Jonah1:14 Ase ayio abanto baria bakarera ase Omonene, bagateba, “Aye Omonene, twagosoroire, tototiga tosire ase engencho y’obogima bw’omonto oyo. Tobaisa gotobarera okomocha kw’ogokwa kw’omonto otari na komocha, ekiagera aye Omonene gwakorire buna bwanchete.”" 
Jonah1:15 Erio bakaimokia Yona, bakamoruta ase enyancha ime; ero ekaba nobotoereru." 
Jonah1:16 Erio agwo abanto baria bakairoka Omonene mono, bakamoruera ekeng’wanso na komoriera chiira." 
Jonah1:17 Bono Omonene agachika enswe enene ekamera Yona, na Yona akabeera ime ase enda y’enswe eria amatuko atato, omobaso na obotuko." 
Jonah2:1 Ekero Yona arenge ime ase enda y’enswe eria, agasaba Omonene, Nyasae oye, agateba," 
Jonah2:2 “Ekero narenge ase emechando, nigo nasabete Omonene, na ere akang’iraneria. Korwa ime ase enda y’aase abakure nigo narerete, aye Omonene okaigwa eriogi riane." 
Jonah2:3 Aye nigo kwandutete gochia ase chindiba, inse kegima y’enyancha, ne chiooro chi’enyancha chiang’etananire. Na emerindo yao yonsi ekaimokerera igoro egantuba." 
Jonah2:4 Ase ayio inche nkarengereria ng’a natugutirwe korwa ase obosio bwao, korende nindigererie naende gochia ase Hekalu yao Enchenu." 
Jonah2:5 Nigo narimerete ase amache ime, na endiba ekang’etanana, enderema ya nyancha ekaranderera omotwe one."
