Jonah2:6 Nigo narimerete ngaika inse kegima y’ebitunwa, ase ense eria emekorogoto yaye yansiekerete goika kare na kare. Nonya naboigo, aye Omonene, Nyasae one, nigo kwandusetie ase embeera inde moyo." 
Jonah2:7 Ekero omoyo one ogiregete ime yane, nigo nakoinyorete aye Omonene, na ogosaba kwane gokagoikera agwo ase Hekalu yao Enchenu." 
Jonah2:8 Abanto abwo bakoonchokera emegwekano egosasimwa ere bosa, abwo nigo bagweatanana korwa ase Oyore Amabera abo." 
Jonah2:9 Korende inche nindue ekeng’wanso gi’okogoakera ng’a mbuya mono, eki nariete eira ng’a ninkerue, ing’ikeranie. Ogotooreka nigo gokorwa ase Omonene!”" 
Jonah2:10 Erio Omonene agakwana nenswe eria, akayechika; ero ekaroka Yona, ekamobeka ase engegu." 
Jonah3:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Yona eria kabere, rikamotebia," 
Jonah3:2 “Imoka ogende Nineva, omochie oria omonene, erio orarieo amang’ana ndagotebie.”" 
Jonah3:3 Ase ayio Yona akaimoka, akagenda Nineva buna Omonene amochigete. Omochie oria nigo orenge omonene mono, oisaine orogendo rw’amatuko atato ase okoyobutokania." 
Jonah3:4 Yona agachaka goeta ase omochie oria, akaira rituko erimo, agaaka eriogi agateba, “Atigaire amatuko emerongo ene oka, erio Nineva oonchoranwe.”" 
Jonah3:5 Abanto ba Nineva bakegena amang’ana a Nyasae, bakararia okweng’ata, na abanto bonsi pi, korwa omonene goika omoke, bakeboyia chigunia." 
Jonah3:6 Ekero amang’ana ayio aigete ase omoruoti, ere akaimoka korwa ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, akarusia engobo yaye y’obonene, akeboyia chigunia, agaikaransa ase ribu igoro." 
Jonah3:7 Erio amang’ana akararigwa ase Nineva bwonsi kobwatekana nogochika kw’omoruoti amo nabannene b’oboruoti bwaye, agateba: “Monto onde tabaisa koria kende; nonya neng’iti ende yonsi, gose eng’ombe, tichibaisa korisigwa, gose konyoisigwa." 
Jonah3:8 Korende kera omonto eboyie egunia, ne ching’iti boigo chitubwe chigunia. Kera oyomo arere ne chinguru ase Nyasae aonchoke atige obobe bwaye na obourereria bore ase amaboko aye." 
Jonah3:9 Ning’o omanyete, ande nabo Nyasae arabaise koonchora ebirengererio biaye, erinde atige endamwamu yaye entindi, intwe titosirigwa.”" 
Jonah3:10 Ekero Nyasae aroche aya bakorete, buna baonchogete bagatiga ogokora kwabo kw’ebibe, ere akaonchora ebirengererio biaye, tabakorera aria konya atebire ng’a abakorere." 
Jonah4:1 Yona akagechigwa namang’ana ayio, akaba nendamwamu." 
Jonah4:2 Erio agasaba Omonene, agateba, “Aye Omonene, Inee, amang’ana aya tari aro natebete ekero narenge ase ense yane? Naende nakio kiagerete ngatama gochia Tarisisi, ekiagera nigo namanyete ng’a aye nigo ore Nyasae oichire nobuya na amabera; tori omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu, na obwanchani bwao obonene nigo bogendererete botambe, naende nigo okoonchora ebirengererio biao, tokobakorera amabe." 
Jonah4:3 Ase ayio, aye Omonene, bono nagosoroire ng’a orusieo obogima bwane ontige inkwe, ekiagera nigo ere buya asende gokwa kobua kogenderera koba moyo.”" 
Jonah4:4 Erio Omonene akamoboria, “Inee! Igo mboronge ogokora ase okogechigwa igo?”" 
Jonah4:5 Bono Yona agasoka korwa ase omochie oria, agaikaransa ase ensemo ya moocha y’omochie. Agwo akeagachera ekegutu, agaikaransa imeo gokenderera koganya arore ayare gochia gokorekana ase omochie oria." 
Jonah4:6 Erio Omonene Nyasae akameria omobono ogakina, na Yona agakenderera inse yaye, agatimoka korwa ase okorosa kwaye. Ase ayio akagokigwa mono nomobono oria." 
Jonah4:7 Korende rituko ria kabere mambia, Nyasae agachika rikonde rikaria omobono oria, erinde ogasusana." 
Jonah4:8 Ekero erioba riatiirire gocha igoro, Nyasae akarenta omwaga okagusa korwa moocha orenge nomobaso omororo se, na omobaso oria ogasamba Yona bobe ase omotwe goika akagireka. Erio akagania akwe, agateba, “Nigo ere buya asende gokwa kobua kogenderera koba moyo.”" 
Jonah4:9 Korende Nyasae akaboria Yona, “Inee! Mboronge igo aye okogechigwa ase engencho y’omobono oyio?” Yona akairaneria, akamotebia, “Ee, nigo inde noboronge kogechigwa, nonya ngoika ogokwa.”" 
Jonah4:10 Omonene akamotebia, “Aye kwaroreire omobono oyo amabera, nonya tikwaywechanderete ase ogokora emeremo asoro, gose ase okoyokinia; nigo omerete ase obotuko obomo, naende ogasira ase obotuko obomo." 
Jonah4:11 Inee! Inche tingwenereti koba namabeebe ase Nineva, omochie oyio omonene, agwo ase abanto goetania chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo ebere (120,000) bamenyeteo? Abanto abwo tibamanyete gwatanana ayare ensemo ya borio na ayare ase eya bomosi. Boigo omochie oyio nobwate ching’iti chinyinge mono chitugireo.”" 
Micah1:1 Eri nario ring’ana ri’Omonene riachete ase Mika, oyo omenyete agwo Moreseti, ekero Yotamu, na Ahasi, na Hezekia, barenge abaruoti b’Abayuda. Omonene akamomaanorera ayare gochia koba igoro ya Samaria na Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:2 Inwe abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, igwa amang’ana aya! Aye ense na ebinto bionsi bireo, tegerera moigwe amang’ana aya! Omonene Nyasae, oyore ase Hekalu yaye enchenu, tiga abe kirori igoro yaino." 
Micah1:3 Rora, Omonene ngosoka are korwa aase aye; ere ngoika are gocha aa, atache ebitunwa bi’ense." 
Micah1:4 Ebitunwa ebio mbinyititoke inse yaye, na amagoko nabwereke, binyititoke buna obochoe bokonyititoka ase omorero, na bibe buna amache akoba ekero aumoirwe ase egetirimboko." 
Micah1:5 Ayio nigo arabe ase engencho y’ogosaria kw’abanto ba Yakobo, na ebibe b’Abaisraeli. Inee! Ogosaria okwo kore ase abanto ba Yakobo nkoroki? Tari okwo gwa Samaria? Na ogosaria okwo kw’ogosasimera aase aimokererete igoro kore ase Abayuda nkoroki? Tari okwo kwa Yerusalemu?" 
Micah1:6 “Ase ayio nintagore Samaria obe chitui chi’amagena, obe omogondo ase emesabibu erasimekwe. Ninturunkanie amagena ’omochie oyio gochia ase rigoko, nintubore amaroso aye atigwe maiso marore." 
Micah1:7 Emegwekano yaye yonsi egosasimwa nesamunyoranwe; ebiegwa bionsi biaruetwe ase obonyaka mbisambwe nomorero. Ninsirie emegwekano yaye yonsi egosasimwa, ekiagera ebinto ebio nebiegwa biaruetwe ase obonyaka, ebio mbiiranigwe bibe ebiegwa bi’obonyaka.”" 
Micah1:8 Ase engencho eyio nimbokie amagombo na korera. Ninyechabore chianga imbe getirianda, nyeumie buna ekebwe, na korera buna esagero," 
Micah1:9 ekiagera chingoma chiaye tichikogwenigwa. Obobe buna obwo bwaikire ase Abayuda, bwaikire nase ebiita bia Yerusalemu ase abanto baane bamenyete." 
Micah1:10 Timobaisa koraria amang’ana ayio ase Gati, gose timobaisa korera nonya ng’ake. Mwegara‐garie ase orotu igoro, mweitie agwo Beti‐Le‐Afura." 
Micah1:11 Inwe abanto ba Safiri, eta mogende more getirianda, mobe nobosooku. Abanto ba Saanani tibasogete isiko. Okorera kwa Beti‐Hasaeli tigokobatiga mobeere aroro." 
Micah1:12 Abanto bamenyete Maroti nigo baganyete mono ng’a baremigwe; amaakwa arure ase Omonene, aikire ase egeita kia Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:13 Inwe abamomenyete Lakisi, sibera chibarasi chigari, ekiagera inwe abanto b’omochie oyio nigo mwarenge gokora ebibe, mokagera abanto ba Sayoni bagakora ebibe ebio. Ogosaria kw’Abaisraeli nigo kwanyorekanete ime yaino." 
Micah1:14 Ase ayio aye karue ebiegwa bi’ogotigana ase abanto bamenyete Mosereti‐Gati. Chinyomba chire agwo Akisibu nchibe buna chindooche chikong’aina abaruoti b’Abaisraeli. 
Micah1:15 Inwe abamomenyete Maresa, nimbarentere oyorababue. Oyore Obonene bw’Abaisraeli naike Adulamu." 
Micah1:16 Mokigite chitukia chi’emetwe yaino ase okoreera abana baino mwanchete. Tiga emetwe yaino etigare bosa buna omotwe bw’ensoti, ekiagera abana baino mbairwe ase obosomba." 
Micah2:1 Obobe nobwabo abwo bagokora emeroberio y’ogokora amabe na bayebeka ang’e kobare ase amarere abo; mambia kobwakire baba bakoyaikerania, ekiagera nigo ere ase okobua kw’amaboko abo." 
Micah2:2 Abwo nigo bakoba ne ribero ri’okonyora emegondo, bayaire ne chinguru, bagania ne chinyomba bachiira. Nigo bakoura omonto enyomba yaye, ee, bamoura na omwando oyo." 
Micah2:3 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene agoteba: Rora, nkoroberia inde amabe igoro yaino inwe ab’egesaku eke, na timokonyara korusia amagoti aino korwa ase amabe ayio, gose timokonyara gotaara moeneno, ekiagera nigo erabe engaki embe." 
Micah2:4 Ase rituko erio abanto mbatonge omorabaaro igoro yaino, babe bakobabokeria amagombo ’omoichano bagotera: “Twasirigwe kegima, Omonene oeire abanto abaao egetari ki’abanto baane, ee, ekeene okerusirie korwa asende, ogabeire abasaria emegondo yaito.”" 
Micah2:5 Ase engencho eyio onde tari orarambore engori y’okorengera egetari ase omosangererekano bw’Omonene. 
Micah2:6 Abanto abwo nigo bakobana iga: “Timobaisa kobana! Onde tagwenereti kobana igoro y’amang’ana buna ayio; ogochaywa tikogotonyora. 
Micah2:7 Inwe abanto b’ororeria rwa Yakobo, Inee, amang’ana aya nagwenerete gokwanwa: Omoika bw’Omonene nigo ore omwango kogechigwa? Oko nakwo ogokora kwaye? Inee! Amang’ana aane tari korenta amaya ase omonto ore nenkoro endonge?" 
Micah2:8 “Korende ase amatuko aya mwaimokeire abanto baane buna ababisa. Nigo mokwaboria ebiambaro bi’abwo bagotaara bare nomorembe bataganeti esegi. 
Micah2:9 Nigo mogoseria abakungu b’abanto baane korwa ase chinka chiabo echio bagokerete, mwaura abana babo obonene bokorwa asende tibabonyora nonya ng’ake." 
Micah2:10 Inwe imoka morue aa, ekiagera aase aino mogotimokera tari aa. Ase engencho y’ogotacheneka kwaino aase aa nasarigwe nogosaria okonene." 
Micah2:11 “Omonto omonyaborimo aise gokwana amang’ana a bosa na ay’obong’ainereria, atebe: Inche nigo nkobabanera igoro y’edivai na ebinyugwa binde bigotindia, omobani oyio nere abanto aba baranche." 
Micah2:12 “Inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo, nimbasangererie inwe mwensi, ee ekeene, ninsangererie abatigari b’Abaisraeli buna ching’ondi chigosangererigwa chiabekwa ase obweri obomo, na buna riicho rie ching’ondi rikorisia aase aamo, mbabe bakwoga, ekiagera bare abange." 
Micah2:13 “Oyo okobaatera enchera nabatang’ane; barabwo mbagareyie, baetere ase egeita, basoke isiko. Omoruoti obo nabaraae, ee, Omonene nabatang’ane bosio bwabo.”" 
Micah3:1 Inche ngateba: “Inwe abatang’ani b’abanto ba Yakobo, inwe abagambi b’Abaisraeli, igwa! Inee! Tebagwenereti inwe momanye ayare ay’oboronge?" 
Micah3:2 Inwe nigo mogechete ayare amaya, mwancha ayare amabe. Nigo mogosaabora amasankwa ’emebere y’abanto baane, na mwongoria chinyama korwa ase amauga abo." 
Micah3:3 Inwe nigo mokoria chinyama chi’emebere y’abanto baane. Nigo mogosaabora amasankwa abo, mwabuna amauga abo mwayakora ebing’ese. Naende mwanachana emebere yabo buna chinyama chikobekwa ase egetega chikonachanwa." 
Micah3:4 Erio mbarere ase Omonene, korende ere takobaigwa. Ase engaki eyio ere nababise obosio bwaye, ekiagera babeire bagokora ayare amabe.”" 
Micah3:5 Aya naro Omonene agoteba igoro y’ababani abwo bakoraa abanto baane gochia ase obosiru, abwo bagoteba ng’a omorembe noreo, ekero baeirwe egento barire, korende bakora esegi ase abwo batabaeti egento bakobeka monwa." 
Micah3:6 Ase ayio obotuko mbobachere timorora amaroro, na omosunte nobachere timomanya igoro y’amang’ana agochi‐gocha. Erioba ndirimere tiribarera ababani, ne rituko ndionchoke ribe omosunte igoro asebare." 
Micah3:7 Abarori mbasookigwe, na abaringoria boigo. Abwo bonsi mbatube emenwa yabo, ekiagera Nyasae takobairaneria gento kende." 
Micah3:8 Korende inche naichoirwe ne chinguru chi’Omoika bw’Omonene, na oboronge, na oboremu, erinde ntebie abanto ba Yakobo ogosaria kwabo, na Abaisraeli ebibe biabo." 
Micah3:9 Inwe abatang’ani b’abanto ba Yakobo, abagambi b’Abaisraeli, igwa amang’ana aya! Inwe nigo mogechete ayare ay’ekeene, na mogokorekania onsi ayare amaronge;" 
Micah3:10 inwe nigo mokoagacha Sayoni ase ogoitera amanyinga, na Yerusalemu ase ogokora okobe." 
Micah3:11 Abatang’ani b’omochie oyio nigo bakogamba ebina ase okoegwa riaaki, na abakuani baye nigo bakworokereria ase ogoakanerwa, na ababani baye nigo bagokora oboringoria ase okoegwa chibesa. Nonya naboigo nigo bakweegeka ase Omonene, bateba, “Inee! Omonene tari ase egati yaito? Amang’ana amabe tagotonyora.”" 
Micah3:12 Ase ayio, ase engencho yaino Sayoni noremwe buna omogondo, na Yerusalemu nobe amaturi, na egetunwa gie Hekalu kebe egetunwa kere ne rinani." 
Micah4:1 Nebe ase amatuko ’omoerio ng’a egetunwa ki’enyomba y’Omonene ngekong’igwe, kebe ekenene goetania ebitunwa binde, nkeimokererigwe igoro goetania ebigoro binde; abanto abange mbaendoke gochiao." 
Micah4:2 Abanto b’ebisaku ebinge mbabe bakogendao bagoteba: “Inchuo totiire gochia ase egetunwa ki’Omonene, gochia ase enyomba ya Nyasae o Yakobo, erinde atworokererie chinchera chiaye, na intwe tochibwatie.” Amachiko narue Sayoni, ne ring’ana ri’Omonene ndiiche korwa Yerusalemu." 
Micah4:3 Erio Omonene nanache ekina ase egati y’abanto abange, nagambie boronge ebisaku bire ne chinguru bimenyete aare. Abanto mbature emioro yabo y’esegi ebe amakombe, na amatimo abo abe emeyio chinkuro. Egesaku ekemo tigekoimoka korwania ekende, gose abanto tibakweorokereria korwana esegi nonya ng’ake." 
Micah4:4 Kera omonto nigo araikaranse inse y’emesabibu yaye na ase emeko yaye, na onde takoboboyia, ekiagera Omonene bw’Emeganda nere okwanire ayio." 
Micah4:5 Kera egesaku nigo kerabwatie erieta ri’enyasae yaye, korende intwe nigo torabwatie erieta ri’Omonene Nyasae oito goika kare na kare." 
Micah4:6 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio ninsangererie ebirema, naende ninsangererie abwo naseretie, na bonsi abwo naete amaakwa." 
Micah4:7 Nintige abare ebirema babe abatigari, na abwo baseretigwe babe egesaku kere ne chinguru. Omonene nabagambere agwo ase Egetunwa gia Sayoni, korwa bono na goika kare na kare." 
Micah4:8 “Naye Omorobiri bw’Oborendi, aye ekegoro ki’omochie o Sayoni, obogambi bwao obokoro mbokoiranere, ee, obogambi bw’omochie o Yerusalemu.”" 
Micah4:9 Bono, ninki okorera neriogi rinene? Inee! Omoruoti tari ime yao? Abasemia bao mbasirigwe goika kwabeire nobororo buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore?" 
Micah4:10 Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, bina moigwe obororo buna obw’omokungu okobina aibore; korwa bono karue ase omochie, momenye ase chinsana. Mogende Babeli, na aroro motoorigwe. Aroro agwo Omonene nabatoorie korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baino." 
Micah4:11 Bono abanto b’ebisaku ebinge basangererekanire amo babarwanie esegi, bagoteba: “Tiga omochie oyio okorwe obe oyotachenegeti, naintwe tobe torigereretie Sayoni.”" 
Micah4:12 Korende abanto abwo tibamanyeti ebirengererio bi’Omonene, gose tibamanyeti omoroberio oye ng’a obasangereirie amo buna emesaima ere ase ekeooreri gi’okoorera." 
Micah4:13 “Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, imoka moore, ekiagera ninkore chingunchara chiaino chibe echi’ebioma, na ebitaago biaino bibe ebi’etaai, erinde moake abanto abange, mobasamunyore.” Ebinto biabo morasakore mobiatanane bibe ebichenu ase Omonene, ne chinibo chiabo chibe echi’Omonene bw’ense engima." 
Micah5:1 Aye Omochie bw’emeganda, sangereria emeganda yao y’esegi. Ababisa banaaririe omochie oito bayorwanie esegi. Barabwo mbaake omogambi bw’Abaisraeli orosea rwaye nenyimbo." 
Micah5:2 “Korende aye Bethlehemu Efarata, aye ore omoke ase egati ye chiamate chi’egesaku ki’Abayuda, korwa asore nang’orokere oyomo orabe omogambi bw’Abaisraeli. Oyio nao arenge korwa agwo kare, ee, korwa kare na kare.”" 
Micah5:3 Ase ayio Omonene natige abanto baye goika engaki eike, ekero oyio okobina araibore; erio nario abanto bamwabo abatigari barairane gocha ase Abaisraeli." 
Micah5:4 Ekero oyio oraiborwe arache, narisie riicho riaye ore ne chinguru chi’Omonene, ee, narisie nobonene bw’erieta ri’Omonene, Nyasae oye. Riicho riaye ndibe rirendire buya, ekiagera bono ere nabe omonene goika chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense." 
Micah5:5 Omorisia oyio nabe omorembe oito. Ekero Abaasuri barache ase ense yaito gotorwania na basoe ase chinyomba chiaito chi’obonene, intwe ntosokie abarisia batano na babere, na abagambi batano na batato, babatange." 
Micah5:6 Barabwo mbasirie ense y’Abaasuri nemioro, na ense ya Nimurodi bayesirie nemeyio ya birende. Boigo mbatotoorie korwa ase Abaasuri ekero barasoe ase ense yaito goetera ase chimbebe chiaito." 
Micah5:7 Erio abatigari ba Yakobo mbabe ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku ebinge, buna riime rigotonya korwa ase Omonene, na buna embura engiya egotwera obonyansi, embura eria tegotebana koganya monto gete, gose mwanyabanto onde bwensi." 
Micah5:8 Ee, abatigari abwo ba Yakobo mbabe ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku ebinge, babe buna endo ere ase egati ye ching’iti chire ase rinani, na buna endo ensae ere ase egati ye riicho rie ching’ondi, eyio ekero yasoire ase riicho nigo egotachera inse na gotandorana eyaitire, na onde tari oranyare koyetooria." 
Micah5:9 Ase enchera eyio amaboko aino naimokererigwe igoro y’abachandi baino, na inwe mosirie kegima ababisa baino bonsi." 
Micah5:10 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio ninsirie chibarasi chiaino, ne chigari chiaino chirue asemore kegima." 
Micah5:11 Ninsarie emechie yonsi ere ase ense yaino, naende nintagore chindwaki chiaino echio mogwekengera." 
Micah5:12 Ninsirie oborogi korwa ase amaboko aino, na abaringoria tibakonyorekana asemore nonya ng’ake." 
Micah5:13 Ninsirie emegwekano yaino yonsi amo, ne chisiiro chiaino, ebinto ebio mogosasima, na inwe timokogenderera gosasima emeremo y’amaboko aino." 
Micah5:14 Ninsimore emete y’Asera eyio mogosasima, ninyerusie korwa asemore, ninkore emechie yaino ebe bosa." 
Micah5:15 Ninyeruserie egesiomba ase abanto b’ebisaku, abwo batari koigwera, inde nendamwamu na ekeririanda.”" 
Micah6:1 Bono inwe tegerera moigwe aya Omonene agoteba: Imoka, mwekwanere agwo bosio bw’ebitunwa, na motige ebigoro biigwe amariogi aino." 
Micah6:2 “Inwe ebitunwa, nainwe ebitare, ninwe more oboroso bw’ense, tegerera moigwe ogosoera kw’Omonene! Ere nabwate amang’ana nabanto baye, nare nekina n’Abaisraeli." 
Micah6:3 “Inwe abanto baane, ngento ki nabakoreire? Nase amang’ana ki nabarosirie? Ng’iranerie!" 
Micah6:4 Nigo nabarusetie korwa ase ense ya Misiri; nkababooria korwa ase ense y’obosomba, inche ngatoma Musa, na Haroni, na Miriamu, bakaba bakobaraa." 
Micah6:5 Inwe abanto baane, inyora egento Balaki, omoruoti o Moabu, aroberetie gokora, na buna Baalamu, mosinto o Beori, amoiraneretie. Boigo inyora amang’ana akoregete ekero mwarenge ase orogendo korwa Sitimu gochia Giligali, erinde monyare komanya ogokora kw’oboronge kwane inche Omonene.”" 
Micah6:6 “Ngento ki ndarentere Omonene, na ntung’ame ase obosio bwa Nyasae ore igoro? Inee! Nigo ndache ase obosio bwaye, ndetane ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, gose chimori chiakoorire omwaka oyomo?" 
Micah6:7 Inee! Omonene nagokigwe ne chimingichi chilifu, gose ne chindooche chi’amaguta chilifu ikomi? Inee! Nindue omwana one omotangi ase engencho y’ogosaria kwane, omwana oyio ore okwama kw’obogima bwane, abe ekeng’wanso ki’ebibe ase engencho y’omoyo one?”" 
Micah6:8 Aye mwanyabanto, Omonene okworokirie ayare amaya. Ninki Omonene aganetie korwa asore otatiga okore ayare ay’oboronge, na bwanche gokora ayare ay’obwanchani, naende otaare ase oboitongo ase obosio bwa Nyasae oo." 
Micah6:9 Omonene nigo akorangeria abare ase omochie, na omonto oirogete erieta riaye nere omong’aini. Eriogi riaye nigo rigoteba: “Igwa igoro y’egesusuro na ning’o ogechikire." 
Micah6:10 Inee! Chinibo chi’obourereria nchigenderere kobeera ase chinyomba chi’abakori amabe? Na ebirengero bitaikeraneti biragereirie mbibeereo? 
Micah6:11 Ninyare gwanchera ebirengero bi’obourereria, gose amagena ’obong’ainereria ay’okorengera abeere ase chisaro ime?" 
Micah6:12 Abanto abanda bare ase egati yaino baichire nobourereria, na abwo bamenyete agwo nigo bagokwana oborimo, ne chimeme chiabo nigo chire echi’obong’ainereria." 
Micah6:13 Ase engencho y’ebibe biaino nimbaake timogwena rinde, mbasirie kegima." 
Micah6:14 Ekero morabe mokoragera, timokoigota; nigo moragenderere koba nenchara. Mosangererie na kwegachera ebinto, korende ebio mwegacheire nimbirue bisirigwe nemioro." 
Micah6:15 Imosimeke chindagera, korende timogochigesa. Imomite amazeituni, korende timokweaka amaguta korwao; imomite amasabibu, korende timokonywa edivai ekorwao." 
Micah6:16 Inwe nigo mwabeire mokobwatia amachiko ’Omuri, na ogokora gwonsi kw’enyomba y’Ahabu, naende mwabeire mokoigwera ogosemia kwabo. Ase ayio nimbasirie kegima, na abamenyete ime yao babe bagochaywa, na igo mobogorie okoramwa okwo abanto baane barametwe.”" 
Micah7:1 Obobe nobwane, ekiagera nabeire nkororekana buna ekero amatunda ’omorakera agosangererigwa, na ayatigaire ase emesabibu achorirwe. Ebisago bi’amasabibu bikoriegwa tibiyo, na amako amatang’ani, aya nganetie, taiyo." 
Micah7:2 Abanto bamoirogete Nyasae basirire korwa ase ense, na oyore nenkoro endonge tari ase egati y’abanto. Bonsi nigo bakoboera abanto baitere amanyinga abo. Kera omonto nigo akobwata, oyomwabo noboreba." 
Micah7:3 Abanto aba nigo bare nomokia gokora ayare amabe namaboko abo. Omogambi nigo anchete aegwe riaaki, na omogambi ebina boigo; omonto ore nokobua nigo agosaba aegwe ebi aganetie ase okogania kwaye okobe, na nigo babwateranete amo." 
Micah7:4 Oyore omuya goetania abande ase egati yabo nigo anga buna egetutu kere namagwa, na oyore nenkoro endonge nigo are nobobe kobua orobago rogiteire amagwa. Ekero rituko ri’abarendi bao, riria ri’egesusuro kiao riraike, abanto mbabe nomoichano." 
Micah7:5 Tobaisa kwegena omogisangio oo, gose gosemeria omosani oo. Orende amang’ana akorwa ase omonwa oo, nonya mokao tayamanya." 
Micah7:6 Omwana omomura nigo agochaya ise, na omwana omoiseke nigo akoamererania na ng’ina, na moka momura oamererania na ng’ina biara. Ababisa b’omonto nabanto b’enyomba yaye omonyene." 
Micah7:7 Korende inche omonyene nindigererie Omonene; ninganye inde nogosemeria ase Nyasae ore ogotooreka kwane; Nyasae one nanyigwe. 
Micah7:8 Aye omobisa one, togokera okogwa kwane; ekero ndagwe, nintenene naende; ekero ndabe inde ase omosunte, Omonene nabe etaya yane." 
Micah7:9 Ekiagera nakorire ebibe ase Omonene, nindemererie endamwamu yaye, goika ere agambe amang’ana aane na ang’e oboronge bwane. Ere nandete ase omobaso, na inche ningokere oboronge bwaye." 
Micah7:10 Erio oria ore omobisa one arore ayio, na obosooku mbomotube oria omboretie, “Ng’ai Omonene, Nyasae oo, are?” Nimorigererie ngoke; ere natiringerwe inse buna esike ere inchera." 
Micah7:11 Rituko ndiche ekero chindwaki chiao chiraagachwe. Ase rituko erio chimbebe chiao nchigareeigwe. 
Micah7:12 Ase rituko erio abanto mbagochere korwa Asuri na korwa ase emechie ya Misiri, ee, korwa Misiri goika orooche rwa Eufarati, na korwa ase enyancha eyemo goika ase eyende, na korwa ase egetunwa ekemo goika ase ekende." 
Micah7:13 Korende ense netigwe ebe bosa ase engencho y’abanto bamenyeteo; okwo korabe okwama kw’ogokora kwabo okobe. 
Micah7:14 Risia abanto bao nenyimbo yao abanto abwo bare riicho ri’omwando oo, rimenyete ao rioka ase rinani ime agwo Karimeli. Oritige rikorisia agwo Basani na Gileadi, buna yarenge ase amatuko a kare." 
Micah7:15 “Nimborokie amakumia buna nakorete ekero mwaruete ase ense ya Misiri.” 
Micah7:16 Ekero abanto b’ebisaku bararore ayio mbasooke, ekiagera chinguru chiabo chiabuirwe. Mbatube emenwa yabo namaboko abo, na amato abo natine." 
Micah7:17 Barabwo mbamene orotu rwe riroba buna ching’iti chingenda inse. Mbarue ase chinyomba chiabo chinkong’u bakoiguswa bekurure inse buna amakonde; mbakoonchokere aye Omonene, Nyasae oito, bare nobwoba obonene, ee, mbakoiroke aye." 
Micah7:18 Inee! Nyasae onde nare onga buna aye? Aye nigo okwabera abatigari abare omwando oo ebibe biabo, na kweba obobe bwabo. Aye tori kogenderera koba nendamwamu yao goika kare na kare, ekiagera bwanchete koorokia obwanchani bwao botari koera." 
Micah7:19 Aye notoiranere, otororere amabera naende; notiringere ebibe biaito inse y’amagoro ao, nobitugute bionsi ime ase chindiba chi’enyancha." 
Micah7:20 Aye noorokerie ororeria rwa Yakobo obwegenwa bwao, na orwa Ibrahimu obwanchani bwao botari koera, buna kwarierete chisokoro chiaito eira korwa ase amatuko a kare, ogatiana." 
Nahum1:1 Aya naro amang’ana amakong’u igoro ya Nineva arikire ase ebuku y’okorora kwa Nahumu Omoelikosi. 
Nahum1:2 Omonene nigo are Nyasae bwe risemi, ere nigo akweruseria egesiomba na koba nendamwamu enene. Omonene nigo akweruseria egesiomba ase abwo bakoamererania nere; nigo akobagachera ababisa baye ekeririanda." 
Nahum1:3 Omonene tari omwango bw’okoba nendamwamu, korende nigo are nokobua okonene; tari gotiga koa abamochi egesusuro. Enchera y’Omonene nigo ere ase omwaga na ekembugu‐mbugu; na amare nigo are orotu rw’amagoro aye." 
Nahum1:4 Ere nigo agotogonyera enyancha, amache asira, nigo agosiria amache e chindooche chionsi. Ense ya Basani nigo egosusana, na egetunwa gia Karimeli boigo; oboseera bwa Lebanoni nigo bokogoyana." 
Nahum1:5 Ebitunwa nigo bigotengechigwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, ebigoro nigo bikonyititoka. Ense nigo ekonyegerigwa ase obosio bwaye, ee, ense amo nebitongwa bionsi bireo." 
Nahum1:6 Ning’o oranyare gotenena ase ekeririanda kiaye tikemosiria? Gose ning’o oranyare koremereria obotindi bw’endamwamu yaye? Ekeririanda kiaye nigo kiaumoirwe buna omorero, na ebitare nigo bigotandoka ase obosio bwaye." 
Nahum1:7 Omonene nomuya; ere neburi enkong’u ase engaki y’emechando, nigo abamanyete abwo bakomotamera." 
Nahum1:8 Korende nasirie kegima aase omochie oria ore, narente eooro enene mono, nabwatie ababisa baye gochia ase omosunte." 
Nahum1:9 Inki mokoroberia igoro y’Omonene? Ere nabasirie kegima, takorenta egesusuro eria kabere." 
Nahum1:10 Nabaisa kobwatana buna amagwa akweringania, na gotinda nekenyugwa kegotindia, goika bayie baere buna obonyansi obwomo." 
Nahum1:11 Omonto oyomo naruete asore, akaroberia amabe igoro y’Omonene, akarua ogosemia okobe kw’ogosiria." 
Nahum1:12 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: “Nabaisa koba abange bare ne chinguru, goika basirigwe tibabao naende. Nonya nabeire nkobachanda inwe, bono tinkogenderera kobachanda naende nonya ng’ake." 
Nahum1:13 Bono nimbutore amakorogoto aria ababisa bababekerete, naende mbutorane chingataare babasiberete.”" 
Nahum1:14 Aya naro Omonene achikire igoro yao: “Ororeria tirogotoka roratorwe ase erieta riao. Ninsirie korwa ase enyomba ye chinyasae chiao emegwekano yao ogosasima, eyio ebaachire na eyio ebombire. Ninkoroiserie oboina bwao, ekiagera aye nigo ore omokayayu.”" 
Nahum1:15 Rigereria ase ebitunwa, orore amagoro ay’oyio okorenta amang’ana amaya ay’omogoko na koraria amang’ana ’omorembe! Inwe Abayuda, renda Amatuko aino Amanene, moikeranie chiira chiria mwariete. Abakori amabe tibagocha kobarwania naende, ekiagera basirigwe kegima." 
Nahum2:1 Oyo ogosiria oimokire gocha kobarwania. Renda chiburi chiaino more nebirwanero, morende ne chinchera; eboyie ebinema biaino mokong’e, mobe ne chinguru chinyinge." 
Nahum2:2 Omonene nkoirania are obonene bw’abanto ba Yakobo, ee, obwo bore obonene bw’Abaisraeli, ekiagera abasakori babasakoire na kobatiga bare bosa, babunire chinsagia chi’emesabibu yabo, bachitugutire inse." 
Nahum2:3 Chinguba chi’ababisa babo bare chituoni nigo chiabeire chimbariri, abarwani babo b’esegi nigo babegete chianga chimbariri. Chigari chiabo nigo chikomesa buna omorero, ekero chiroberete gocha korwana. Amatimo abo achomeire chintanga chi’emetarakwa nigo agotimitigwa mono." 
Nahum2:4 Chigari chi’esegi nigo chigotitiria ase chinchera; nigo chikobagachana ase chiraaro chi’omochie; nigo chikomesa buna ebieri bi’omorero, na kominyoka buna okomesa kw’embura." 
Nahum2:5 Ere nigo ainyorete abarwani baye b’esegi abanene, korende ekero bagocha nigo barabe bakona‐kogochwa. Barabwo nigo bakoayerera gochia ase chindwaki, na gotenenia ebiekengero." 
Nahum2:6 Ebiita bire ase chindooche biaigoirwe, enka y’omoruoti yaichoirwe nomoondoko." 
Nahum2:7 Eting’ana goika echaborwe chianga eirwe; abaiseke baye abasomba nigo bakorera na kweumia buna amaruma, bagoaka‐aka ebikuba biabo." 
Nahum2:8 Korwa kare Nineva nigo orenge buna ritibo riichire amache, korende bono abanto ngotama bare. Nigo bagotebigwa: “Tenena! Tenena!” Korende onde tari okorigereria nyuma." 
Nahum2:9 Sakora chifeta! Sakora ne chitahabu! Obotenenku na obonge bwe chinibo bireo tibikoera. 
Nahum2:10 Ogotigwa bosa, na okong’anywa, na ogosarigwa, biabeireo; chinkoro chiarianyekire, na amaru nigo agoaka‐akana. Chibachwa nigo chigwatigwa, na amasio a bonsi aonchokire arabire se ase omoondoko." 
Nahum2:11 Amaraaro e chindo, ng’ai are? Ng’ai chindo chinsae chikoriera? Ng’ai chindo chituoni, ne chiaberi, ne chimanwa chiabo, chiarenge gotaara chitarenge kwoboigwa nonde?" 
Nahum2:12 Endo nigo yatandoranete eke yaitete kegaisana chimanwa chiaye; naende egaita ekaa chindo chiaye chiaberi. Nigo yaichoretie amakuruma aye nebi yaitete, ne chingoro chiaye nebi yasakorete." 
Nahum2:13 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Rora, inche nigo inde mamincha yao; ninsambe chigari chiao chiimoke erioki, ning’ite chindo chiao chinsae nomoro; ninsirie ebinto gwasakorete birue ase ense, na eriogi ri’abanto bao gwatomete tirikoigugwa nonya ng’ake.”" 
Nahum3:1 Obobe nobwaye omochie oyio oiteire amanyinga amange, oyio oichire noborimo na obouri, oyio otari gotiga gosakora na koira!" 
Nahum3:2 Igwa eriogi ri’emecharichi egoaka, na ogochura kw’amagoro e chigari, na ogw’okominyoka gwe chibarasi, na okorunda kw’amagoro e chigari." 
Nahum3:3 Abariini be chibarasi nigo bakominyoka gochia bosio; emioro nigo ekomesigwa, na amatimo akobarigwa. Emeganda y’abanto yaitirwe, ebitondo nigo birorekanete aande onsi. Emebere y’abanto bakwete tekobareka, nigo ekogocha abanto aande onsi." 
Nahum3:4 Ayio onsi nigo achete ase engencho y’obonyaka obonge bw’omochie oyo. Oyio orenge omotayayi omonyakieni bwenaretie oborogi; nigo asiretie abanto b’ebisaku nobonyaka bwaye, ne chiamate chinyinge noborogi bwaye." 
Nahum3:5 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Rora, nigo inde mamincha yao, ningwasiorie chianga chiao, na abanto b’ebisaku barore obogetirianga bwao, na amaruoti arore obosooku bwao." 
Nahum3:6 “Ningosiarere eubi y’okogechia, ningotige ochaywe, nobe gokorigererigwa na gosekererigwa." 
Nahum3:7 Kera omonto orabe ogokorora nigo aregose atenenere aare, atebe: Nineva otigirwe bosa, ning’o orayororere amabeebe? Ng’ai toranyore oyokoyoremia?”" 
Nahum3:8 Aye Nineva, Inee, nomuya ore kobua Tebesi, omochie ore ase orooche rwa Naili oetananire namache? Enyancha nero yarenge egekengero kiaye, na amache naro arenge orwaki rwaye." 
Nahum3:9 Abaetiopia na Abamisiri batarenge korengeka nabwo barenge chinguru chiaye; Abaputi na Abalibia nabwo barenge koyokonya. 
Nahum3:10 Korende nonya naboigo, abanto b’omochie oyio nigo bairetwe ase obosomba. Abana baye nigo basenyenteretwe agwo ase amatabekania e chinchera chionsi. Abanto baye abasike nigo baakeretwe obomera, na abanto baye abanene bagasibwa nebinyuri." 
Nahum3:11 Naye boigo notinde bwerusie moyo. Aye boigo norigie aase okwebisa korwa ase ababisa bao. 
Nahum3:12 Chiburi chiao chionsi nigo chinga buna emeko ere nokwama kwe ritang’ani. Ekero egotengechigwa, amako abo nigo akoaroroka, agwa ase emenwa y’abanto baria bakoyaria." 
Nahum3:13 Rora, abarwani bao b’esegi nigo banga abakungu, na ebiita bi’ense yao nigo biigoire biasie ase ababisa bao. Omorero osambire emekorogoto y’ebiita biao." 
Nahum3:14 Buucha amache oyagache, ekiagera noche koboerwa, okong’ie chiburi chiao. Soa ase engoro, otiringe esike, bwebeke ang’e obombe amatabori." 
Nahum3:15 Aroro agwo omorero nogosambe, na omoro nogoite okorie buna chingeeti chikoria. Aye menteka obuche buna chingeeti, na buna chingige." 
Nahum3:16 Nigo kwamentete abaonchoreria bao bakaba abange goetania ching’enang’eni chia igoro, bakaba buna ebisase bie chingige, bakaria ense bakairuruka, bakagenda." 
Nahum3:17 Abagambi bao nigo banga buna chingige, na abaraai bao nigo banga buna amasendo e chingige chigosoa ase chimbago ime ekero ki’obokendu; ekero omobaso obarire chiairuruka chiagenda, onde takomanya ase chiagenda." 
Nahum3:18 Aye omoruoti bw’Abaasuri, abarisia bao nigo baraire, na abanto bao abasike nigo basundogete. Abanto bao baserebanigwe ase ebitunwa igoro; na onde tari okobasangereria." 
Nahum3:19 Okogwenigwa tikori ase ogoakwa kwao, eriote riao riabeire riibe, tirikogwena. Abanto bonsi abaraigwe aya akonyorire nigo baraake chinkobi ase engencho y’okogwa kwao. Inee! Onde nare otanyoretwe nobobe bwao bwa botambe?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Aya naro amang’ana amakong’u omobani Habakuki aroche ase okorora. 
Habakkuk1:2 Aye Omonene, ngoika ririri ndabe nkorera ng’a onkonye, naye tori konyigwa? Gose ngoika ririri ndabe ngokorangeria ase engencho y’obotindi, naye tori gontooria?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Naki gwantigire narorire amabe buna aya? Naki ondigereretie ing’etananire nemechando? Ogosirigwa na ogokorerwa bobe nigo bire ase obosio bwane; amariomana na ogotaigwana nigo bireo. 
Habakkuk1:4 Ase engencho eyio amachiko tari ne chinguru, na oboronge tibori gokorwa. Abakori amabe nigo baetanaine abanyaboronge, na ebina nigo bikonachwa bobe." 
Habakkuk1:5 “Rigereria morore ayare ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, mokumie na goichanigwa. Ngochia gokora inde ring’ana ase amatuko aino, eri motegene moise koritebigwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Naama! Nindete Abakalidayo, egesaku keria kere egetindi, naende kere ne chinkoro chigwoka, kegoeta ase chinse chionsi kemenye ase obomenyo botari obwabo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Barabwo nabanto bakoondokia na kwoboyia; oboronge bwabo na okobua kwabo nigo bikorwa ase barabwo abanyene. 
Habakkuk1:8 “Chibarasi chiabo nigo chikominyoka bwango kobua chingo, nigo chire chintindi kobua chisese chi’orosana chigotwara mogoroba; abariini babo be chibarasi nigo bagochararacharara. Ee, abariini babo be chibarasi nigo bakorwa aare, nigo bakoiruruka buna ekeongo kegochia kobwata eke gekoria." 
Habakkuk1:9 “Abanto abwo bonsi nigo bagocha gokora ay’obotindi. Nigo bakorigereria gochia bosio bare nomokia buna omwaga okorwa moocha; nigo bagosangereria abasibwa abange buna omokenye. 
Habakkuk1:10 Nigo bagochecheria abaruoti, na gosekerera abagambi. Nigo bagochaya kera eburi enkong’u, baagacha chiburi chiabo, babua bachiira." 
Habakkuk1:11 Erio baeta bwango buna omwaga, bagenderera gochia bosio; abanto abwo bare abamochi, ne chinguru chiabo nachio enyasae yabo.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 Aye Omonene, Nyasae one, Omochenu one, tari aye oreo korwa kare na kare? Ase ayio titogokwa. Aye Omonene, egetare giaito, aye kwabachikire batogambie ekina, kwababekire batoe egesusuro ki’ogotorongeyia." 
Habakkuk1:13 Aye ore namaiso amachenu mono atari korigereria amabe na aya atari ay’oboronge, naki orakore oremererie korora abanto batari abegenwa, na okire‐kiri ekero abakori amabe bagosiria abare abanyaboronge kobabua?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Aye gwakorire abanto babe buna chinswe chi’enyancha, na buna ebitongwa bikwagura bitabwati omogambi obo." 
Habakkuk1:15 Barabwo nigo bakobabwata nebigobanio biabo babakurura nekeonga kiabo na kobasangereria ase ekeonga kiabo bakorubera; erio bagoka na gochenga. 
Habakkuk1:16 Ase ayio nigo bakorua ebing’wanso ase ekeonga kiabo na kogesambera ubani, ekiagera ebinto ebio nabio bikobanyorera ebinoru na endagera enyinge." 
Habakkuk1:17 Inee! Abwo nigo bagochia konakorusia abanto b’ebisaku ase ekeonga kiabo babasirie batari namabera? 
Habakkuk2:1 Inche nintenene korenda, ee, nintenene igoro ase omorobiri bw’ogotengera, ndore aya Omonene arantebie, na buna ndairanerie igoro y’okorera kwane." 
Habakkuk2:2 Omonene akang’iraneria, agantebia, “Rika okorora okwo ase ebao namariko amaya, erinde oyo okoyasoma ayasome buya." 
Habakkuk2:3 Okorora okwo nigo koganyete engaki yaye eike. Nigo gokoayerera goikerane, tigokomocha goikerana. Nonya gokororekana ng’a gwatebanire, ekeene goika goikerane, tikogotebana." 
Habakkuk2:4 Rora, oyo okweimokereria igoro, omoyo oye tori omoronge, korende omonyene oboronge nabe moyo goetera ase okwegena kwaye." 
Habakkuk2:5 “Edivai nigo ere buna omoonchoreria omong’ainereria; omonto omwerori tari kogenderera koba nobotoereru. Okogania kwaye nigo gokogarea kwaba buna aase abakure; nigo konga buna amakweri atari goisaneka. Nigo agosangereria abanto b’ebisaku bionsi gocha asare na gokora abanto be chinse chionsi koba abaye.” 
Habakkuk2:6 Abanto aba bonsi nigo baramokorere echeche baroisie engero y’okomochecheria batebe, “Obobe nobwaye oyo‐gosangereria amo ebinto bitari ebiaye, na bwetweka ebinto airete bibe ntenenera. Ngoika ririri aragenderere gokora igo?”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Inee! Abanto baria kwairete ebinto biabo tibakogochera mobosokano, na bagochande, bakobwate bakoire ase obosomba." 
Habakkuk2:8 Ekiagera aye gwasakoire ebisaku ebinge, abanto b’ebisaku ebitigari mbagosakore aye; gwaiteire amanyinga ’abanto abange, na ogakora ayare amabe ase ense na ase emechie, na ase bonsi abamenyeteo." 
Habakkuk2:9 Obobe nobwaye omonto oria okonyora ebitoki bi’obobe na kobirenta ase enyomba yaye, erinde bweagachera egeswa kiaye aase aimokererete igoro ng’a abe noborendi korwa ase okobua kw’amabe." 
Habakkuk2:10 Aye kwarenteire enyomba yao obosooku ase ogoita abanto abange, na igo gwakorire ebibe bi’ogosiria obogima bwao aye omonyene." 
Habakkuk2:11 Amagena ’enyasi naake eriogi na emiamba ye rirongo neyairanerie. 
Habakkuk2:12 Obobe nobw’omonto oyio okoagacha omochie ase ogoitera amanyinga na kobeka oboroso bw’omochie ase ogokora ebibe. 
Habakkuk2:13 Abanto nigo bakwerosia gokora emeremo eyio erasambwe nomorero, na abanto b’ebisaku nigo bakwerosia gokora emeremo ere bosa. Rora, ayio nigo arure ase Omonene." 
Habakkuk2:14 Ense neichorigwe nokomanya kw’obonene bw’Omonene buna chinyancha chiichire namache. 
Habakkuk2:15 Obobe nobw’omonto oria okoa omonto onde ekenyugwa giochoganirie nobosongo kiamotindia, erinde anyare korigereria obogetirianda bwaye." 
Habakkuk2:16 Aye nigo gwaichoirwe nobosooku ribaga ri’ogosikwa. Aye kanywe, obe omonto otarogeti! Egekombe ki’egesusuro kere ase okoboko gw’okorio kw’Omonene nakegochere; na oboosoku mbotube obonene bwao." 
Habakkuk2:17 Obobe bwakoretwe ase Lebanoni mbogotube, na ogosirigwa gwe ching’iti koria gwachiondogetie; aye noegwe egesusuro, ekiagera gwaiterete amanyinga ’abanto, na ogakora amabe ase ense, na ase emechie, na ase abanto bamenyeteo." 
Habakkuk2:18 Omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa, mbitoki ki okorentera oyio okoyobomba? Oyio nomogwekano obombire ore omworokia omong’ainereria? Oyio oyoroisetie nigo asemeretie emeremo y’amaboko aye ere chinyasae chitari gokwana." 
Habakkuk2:19 Obobe nobwaye omonto oria ogotebia egento kebaachire korwa ase omote: Boka! Na otebia rigena ritanyare gokwana: Imoka! Inee! Ebinto ebio mbinyare gokworokereria enchera? Rora, ebio nigo bioomire ne chitahabu ne chifeta, korende omoika tori ime yabo." 
Habakkuk2:20 “Korende Omonene nao are ase Hekalu yaye Enchenu; tiga ense yonsi ekire‐kiri ase obosio bwaye.” 
Habakkuk3:1 Oko nogosaba kw’omobani Habakuki. 
Habakkuk3:2 Aye Omonene, naigure chinkuma chiao, nairokire. Omonene, ogokora kwao tiga kobe okoyia ase emiaka eye, tiga komanyekane ase emiaka eye. Ekero ore nendamwamu oinyore amabera." 
Habakkuk3:3 Nyasae ngocha are korwa Temani ee, Ere oyore Omochenu ngocha are korwa ase egetunwa gia Parani. Obonene bwaye mbotube igoro chionsi, na ense neichorwe nogotogigwa kwaye." 
Habakkuk3:4 Okobara kwaye nigo konga buna okw’erioba, gokomoreka korwa ase okoboko kwaye, aroro agwo obobui bwaye nao bobisire." 
Habakkuk3:5 Amarwaire agoita nigo atang’aine bosio bwaye, na amaakwa nigo akobwatia chimbaratero chiaye." 
Habakkuk3:6 Ekero agotenena, ense nigo agotengechigwa, na ekero akorigereria, abanto b’ebisaku nigo bakonyegerigwa. Ebitunwa biarengeo korwa kare nigo bikorimera gochia inse. Ere nigo agotaara ase chinchera chiaye chia kare." 
Habakkuk3:7 Nkarora chinyomba chire Kusani chichandegete, ne chieema chi’ense ya Midiani chikanyegerigwa." 
Habakkuk3:8 Inee! Aye Omonene nigo ogechirie ne chindooche, gose endamwamu yao nigo ere igoro ase chirochio? Inee! Nigo ore nekeririanda ase chinyancha, ekiagera nigo gwachete ne chibarasi chiao koriinete chigari chiao chi’obobui?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Obota bwao bwaorokigwe maiso marore amo nemegwe ye ring’ana riao kwarierete ebisaku eira. Nigo gwatandorete ense ne chindooche. 
Habakkuk3:10 Ebitunwa nigo biakoroche, bikanyegerigwa, amache e chiooro agaeta; chindiba chigaaka amariogi, chikaimokia amaboko abo gochia igoro." 
Habakkuk3:11 Ekero emegwe yao yarenge korunda na komesa, ne ritimo riao riarenge komekameka, na erioba na omotienyi bigatenena aase abo." 
Habakkuk3:12 Aye nigo gwaetete ase ense kore nekeririanda, okamionogorera abanto b’ebisaku inse kore nendamwamu." 
Habakkuk3:13 Aye nigo gwasogete ase ogotooria abanto bao, ee, okarentera omoakwa amaguta oo ogotooreka. Nigo gwasenyentete ekerama ki’enyomba y’omokori amabe, okayetagora korwa ase oboroso goika ase egechuria." 
Habakkuk3:14 Aye nigo kwabetete emetwe y’abarwani esegi babo namatimo abo abanyene, ekero batocherete buna ekembugumbugu kegocha gotoserebania bare nomochengo gotosiria buna abataka bagosirigwa bobisi." 
Habakkuk3:15 Nigo gwaetete ase enyancha ne chibarasi chiao, ogaetera ase emerindo yarenge koeera ne chinguru." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ekero naigwete amang’ana ayio, enda yane egatengechigwa, ebikoba biane bikaiguswa ekero naigwete okoeera okwo, amauga ’omobere one akarwara na kogunda, ngatengechigwa aase nateneine. Nimbe ndemereretie ase rituko riria ri’emechando, ekero omobisa arache korwania egesaku giaito." 
Habakkuk3:17 Emeko tegosicha, na emesabibu tekwama; emezeituni nigo erabe bosa tiyama, na emegondo tekwama chindagera. Amaicho e ching’ondi nasirigwe korwa ase ameri, na amaicho e chiombe takobao." 
Habakkuk3:18 Nonya naboigo ningokere Omonene, ninchengere Nyasae ore ogotooreka kwane." 
Habakkuk3:19 Nyasae oyore Omonene, nere chinguru chiane; nigo agokora amagoro aane abe amaango buna ay’ensune, nigo agontaaria ase ebitunwa biane igoro. Ase omoteria. Ogotera kogoterwa ase okobugigwa kw’amakano aane." 
Zephaniah1:1 Eri nario ring’ana ri’Omonene riachete ase Sefania, mosinto o Kusi, o Gedalia bw’Amaria, bw’Hezekia, ekero Yosia, mosinto bw’Amoni, arenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ninsirie kegima kera egento kerue ase ense. 
Zephaniah1:3 Ninsirie mwanyabanto, ne ching’iti, ne chinyoni chia igoro, ne chinswe chi’enyancha. Ninsirie nebikorenta okogocha amo nabakori amabe; ee, ninsirie mwanyabanto korwa ase ense.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Nindambore okoboko kwane igoro y’Abayuda, na igoro y’abanto bonsi abamenyete Yerusalemu. Ninsirie korwa aase aiga abatigari abwo bagosasima Baali, na amarieta ’ababani na ay’abakuani abagokorera emegwekano." 
Zephaniah1:5 Ninsirie baria bakoriina kerama igoro gosasima erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni boigo ninsirie abanto baria bagonsasima inche Omonene na batiana asende, naende batiana nase enyasae eria Milikomu." 
Zephaniah1:6 Ninsirie abairanire nyuma batigire kombwatia inche Omonene, na baria batari kondigia inche Omonene, gose komboria amang’ana.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Tegerera okire‐kiri ase obosio bw’Omonene Nyasae! Rituko ri’Omonene nigo rire ang’e; Omonene bwariganirie ekeng’wanso, bwatananire abwo arangeirie ase ekegeni kiaye na abasesenie." 
Zephaniah1:8 Nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko riria ri’ekeng’wanso kiane inche Omonene nindue egesusuro ase abagambi, na ase abamura b’omoruoti, na ase bonsi ababegete chianga chie chinse chingeni." 
Zephaniah1:9 “Boigo rituko erio nindue egesusuro ase bonsi abwo bagotamboka ase omoriibo bw’egesieri inse, na ase baria baichoirie ase chinyomba chi’abanene nebinto bi’obourereria, na ebi’obong’ainereria.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase rituko erio eriogi ri’okorera ndigugwe korwa ase Egeita gie Chinswe, na okweumia nkoigugwe korwa ase ensemo enyia y’omochie, na endumo enene korwa ase ebigoro." 
Zephaniah1:11 Inwe abamomenyete ase ensemo eye ekorokwa Ekonu, rera, ekiagera abaonchoreria bonsi basirigwe, na abasangereria bonsi be chibesa basirigwe." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Ase engaki eria nimbe nkorigarigia Yerusalemu ase okoyomoreka ne chitaya; nindue egesusuro ase abanto baria bamenyete bare nobotoereru, buna edivai ekirete ase eturubo, abwo bagwetebia ase chinkoro chiabo: Omonene takonyara gokora kende, amaya gose amabe." 
Zephaniah1:13 Chinibo chiabo nchisakorwe, ne chinyomba chiabo nchisarigwe chitigwe bosa. Nabaisa koagacha chinyomba, tibagochimenya, nabaisa gosimeka emesabibu, tibakonywa edivai ekorwao.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Rituko rinene ri’Omonene ng’ang’e rire, nigo rire ang’e mono rikoayerera. Tegerera oigwe, rituko ri’Omonene ngocha rire! Abarwani esegi chituoni nigo bakorera bare nobororo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Rituko riria nigo rire eri’endamwamu, ne rituko ri’emechando na obororo, ne rituko ri’ogosirigwa na ogotigara bosa, ne rituko ri’omosunte na omorumbe, ne rituko ri’amare na omosunte ekerima." 
Zephaniah1:16 Rituko riria neri’okobugigwa kw’ebitureri na okorera gw’esegi igoro y’emechie egiteire chindwaki, na igoro y’emerobiri emetambe mono." 
Zephaniah1:17 “Nindete emechando emenene igoro ya mwanyabanto goika babe bagotaba‐taba buna emeuko, ekiagera bakorire ebibe asende inche Omonene. Amanyinga abo naumorwe buna eogoto, na emebere yabo netugutwe buna esike.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Ase rituko riria ri’endamwamu y’Omonene chifeta chiabo ne chitahabu chiabo tibikonyara kobatooria. Ense yonsi nesambwe esirigwe nomorero bwe risemi riaye. Mobosokano narente omoerio bw’okoondokia ase abanto bonsi bamenyete ase ense. 
Zephaniah2:1 Inwe abanto b’egesaku getari korora obosooku, esangererie inwe abanyene, mweborie," 
Zephaniah2:2 ekero aya achigetwe ataraikeranigwa, ekero rituko riria rirairurwe buna omoiriro okoirurwa na endamwamu entindi y’Omonene etarabachera, ee, ekero rituko ri’endamwamu y’Omonene ritarabachera." 
Zephaniah2:3 Inwe mwensi abamore abaitongo ase ense eye, inwe abamobwatete amachiko aye, morigie Omonene; rigia oboronge, rigia ay’obokanyeku. Ande nabo morabaise gokengerwa ase rituko riria ri’endamwamu y’Omonene." 
Zephaniah2:4 Omochie o Gasa nong’anyigwe, na oyo bw’Asikeloni notigwe ore bosa; abanto b’Asidodi nabaserigwe, na omochie bw’Ekironi notagorwe." 
Zephaniah2:5 Obobe nobwaino inwe abanto momenyete ase enyancha mbarabare inwe egesaku ki’Abakereti! Aye Kanani, ense y’Abafilisti, ring’ana ri’Omonene nigo rire mamincha yao. “Ningosirie goika monto onde tatigara omenyete ime yao.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Ense eyio ere mbarabare y’enyancha nebe amarisio aase abarisia barabe namakuruma abo na ameri ’amaicho abo. 
Zephaniah2:7 Ense eyio nebe egetari ki’abatigari b’Abayuda, nao barabe bakorisia chitugo chiabo na korara ase chinyomba chire agwo Asikeloni chingaki chia mogoroba. Omonene, Nyasae obo, nabainyore, abarusie ase obosibwa bwabo." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Naigure Abamoabu bagochecheria abanto baane na Abaamoni bakobarama na kobachecheria, naende buna bagwetogia ase ogotumana chimbebe chiabo, na gosoa ase ense yabo.”" 
Zephaniah2:9 Ase ayio Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo agoteba iga: “Ekeene, buna inde moyo, ense ya Moabu nebe buna Sodomu, na ense y’Abaamoni nebe buna Gomora, ense ere namasa ne chingoro chire nomonyo, aase agwo nabe agendererete gosareka botambe. Abatigari b’abanto baane mbasakore abanto abwo, na abatooregete b’egesaku kiane mbaboose babakore babe abasomba babo.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Okwo nakwo korabe ogoakanwa kwabo ase engencho y’oboenenu bwabo, ekiagera bachecheretie na gwetogia igoro y’abanto b’Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
Zephaniah2:11 Omonene nabaondokie. Nakore chinyasae chionsi chire ase ense eyio chibe bosa. Abanto be chinse chi’ebisaku mbamosasime, kera oyomo aase aye." 
Zephaniah2:12 “Nainwe Abaetiopia boigo inche Omonene nimbaite nomoro one.” 
Zephaniah2:13 Omonene narambore okoboko kwaye gochia sugusu asirie Abaasuri; nasirie na Nineva obe bosa, na ayuomie obe erooro." 
Zephaniah2:14 Aase agwo nabe ase amaicho e chitugo akorara, ne ching’iti chi’orosana ao ao; chinsoti ne ching’iti chinke chinga buna ebirongo nchimenye ase ebisure bi’emetobwa yaye; chinyakweumia nachieumie ase chitirisa, na ogosareka goike ase emeriibo ya bisieri inse, ekiagera emecharake y’amaagacho abo nesareke." 
Zephaniah2:15 Oyo noro omochie oria orenge nomogoko, omenyete nobotoereru, orenge gwetogia, oteba: “Inche ninche inde bweka, na onde tari onga buna inche.” Naki omochie oyio osarigwe otigaire bosa, obeire aase ching’iti chi’orosana chigotimokera! Kera omonto oraete ang’e noro nigo arabugie omororia ase ogokumia na gosamunsa amaboko aye." 
Zephaniah3:1 Obobe nobwaye omochie oria osaririe na obeire oyo otachenegeti, oyio ochandire abanto baye!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Tori koigwera eriogi rinde rionsi, tori gwancha korongeigwa; tori komosemeria Omonene, gose komoika Nyasae oye ang’e." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abagambi bare ime yaye nigo banga buna chindo chikoronya, na abagambi ebina baye nigo banga buna chisese chi’orosana chikoria mogoroba, tichiri gotigaria kende goika mambia." 
Zephaniah3:4 Ababani baye nigo bagwetogia ase amang’ana abo abanyene; nigo bare abanto abang’ainereria; abakuani baye bakorire ekere egechenu koba egetachenegeti, na basaririe amachiko." 
Zephaniah3:5 Omonene nigo agendererete gokora ayare ay’oboronge ime y’omochie oria, tari gokora ayare amabe; emambia ase emambia nigo akoorokia oboronge bwaye bwamoreka; ere tari komocha koboorokia, korende abwo batari abanyaboronge tibari korora obosooku." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Nasiririe abanto b’ebisaku; chiburi chiabo chi’ogwekengera nachitagoire. Natigire chinchera chiabo chire bosa, onde tari ogoetera aroro; emechie yabo yatagoirwe yabeire amaturi, onde tamenyeti aroro." 
Zephaniah3:7 Nigo natebetie abanto b’omochie oyo ng’a goika banyiroke na banche amorokererio ay’okobarongeyia, erinde tinsiria aase abo bamenyete, buna nabachikerete. Korende nigo bagendererete koba ababe goetania ase ogokora kwabo gwonsi.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 Bono Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Ase ayio monganye goika rituko riria riike ekero ndaimoke koira abooswa baane, ekiagera nanachire amang’ana aane ng’a nsangererie abanto b’ebisaku, na ab’amaruoti mbabeke amo, mbaumorere ekeririanda kiane na endamwamu yane yonsi entindi; ense yonsi esambwe nomorero bwe risemi riane." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Ase engaki eyio ning’iranerie abanto enkwana y’emenwa echenegete, erinde bonsi babe bakorangeria erieta riane inche Omonene, na bagonkorera bare nomoyo oyomo." 
Zephaniah3:10 Nonya nkorwa ng’umbu ye chindooche chi’Etiopia abanto baane abwo bagonsasima, abwo basiareretwe, mbandetere ebing’wanso." 
Zephaniah3:11 Ase rituko erio inwe timogosookigwa ase engencho y’ogosaria gwonsi okwo mwakorete asende. Ekero ekio nindusie korwa ase egati yaino abanto baria abaenenu abeimokereria igoro, na inwe timokogenderera kweimokereria igoro mamincha y’egetunwa kiane egechenu." 
Zephaniah3:12 Nintige ase egati yaino abanto abaitongo abagwekeyia. Abwo mbabe bagotamera erieta riane inche Omonene. 
Zephaniah3:13 Abatigari b’Abaisraeli tibagokora ayare amabe, gose tibagokwana oborimo; chinkwana chi’obong’ainereria tichikorua ase emenwa yabo. Mbabe bakoragera na korara, na onde tari araboboyie.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, tera neriogi rinene! Inwe Abaisraeli, aka eriogi! Inwe abanto ba Yerusalemu, goka na gochenga ne chinkoro chiaino chionsi!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Omonene orusirie asemore ekina eke konya mwanacheirwe, oseririe ababisa baino. Omonene, omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, nigo are ase egati yaino, timokoiroka bobe bonde." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ase rituko riria amang’ana aya nakwanwe ase Yerusalemu: “Aye Sayoni, toiroka; totiga amaboko ao abe amoro." 
Zephaniah3:17 Omonene, Nyasae oo, oyomenyete ase egati yao, nigo are omorwani etuoni okogotooria. Ere nigo akogokerete nomogoko omonene. Nabe okirete‐kiri ore nobwanchani bwaye; akogokere nogotera kw’omogoko.”" 
Zephaniah3:18 “Ninsangererie amo abwo baichanete, ekiagera berusananirie korwa ase omosangererekano bw’ogosasima. Barabwo nigo bare abao, betwekire chigurube chi’ogochaywa." 
Zephaniah3:19 Rora, ase engaki eyio ning’ee abakogochanda bonsi egesusuro. Nintoorie ebirema, na nsangererie abwo baseretigwe. Abwo mbabe bagotogigwa na komanyekana buya, agwo ase kera ense babeire bachayire." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ase engaki eyio nimbarente inka, ee, ase engaki eyio nimbasangererie. Nimbae erieta rinene rimanyekane, mobe mogotogigwa ase egati y’abanto bonsi b’ense, ekero ndabairanerie amaya aino moyarore.” Nabo Omonene akwanire." 
Haggai1:1 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani, omotienyi o gatano na rimo, omwaka o kabere, ekero Dario arenge omoruoti, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigatomwa goetera ase Hagai omobani, rigacha ase Serubabeli mosinto o Sealitieli, oyorenge omogavuna bw’Abayuda, na ase Yoshua omokuani omonene, mosinto o Yehosadaki." 
Haggai1:2 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Abanto aba nigo bagokwana ng’a engaki teraika ekero enyomba y’Omonene egwenerete koagachwa naende.” 
Haggai1:3 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha goetera ase Hagai omobani, rikaboria:" 
Haggai1:4 “Inee! Eye nero engaki inwe mogwenerete komenya ase chinyomba chinyasi chiabo chitubire ne chibao chingiya, ekero enyomba eye egendererete koba ritombe?”" 
Haggai1:5 Ase ayio bono, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Inwe rengereria buna chinchera chiaino chiabeire." 
Haggai1:6 Nigo mokobusura chimbusuro chinyinge, korende mwagesa chinke; nigo mokoragera, korende timori koigota; nkonywa more, korende timori goisaneka; nigo mokobeka chianga, korende timori koigwa riberera; oyo okonyora eng’eria, nigo akoyenyora erinde oyebeka ase omobuko obochogete." 
Haggai1:7 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Rengereria buna amang’ana aino abeire." 
Haggai1:8 Tiira gochia ase ebitunwa igoro, morente emete moagachere enyomba eye, erio nario ndagokigwe nero, naende inyeorokie ng’a inche ninde nobonene.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Haggai1:9 “Nigo mwasemeretie monyore ebinge, korende mokanyora ebike; na ekero mwabirentete inka, nkabirurukia bikagenda. Inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo nkobaboria: Nase ki yabete bo? Nekiagera enyomba yane yatigirwe egendererete koba ritombe, na kera oyomo oino nigo echanderete enyomba yaye omonyene." 
Haggai1:10 Ase engencho eyio, riime rikorwa igoro riatangirwe na ense tekwama endagera." 
Haggai1:11 Narentire eguru‐gura ase ense, na ase ebitunwa, na ase endagera, na ase emesabibu, na ase emezeituni, na ase kende gionsi kegokina ase riroba. Boigo nayerentire ase abanto, na ase emeremo yonsi abanto bagokora.”" 
Haggai1:12 Erio Serubabeli, mosinto o Sealitieli, na Yoshua omokuani omonene, mosinto o Yehosadaki, amo nabatigari bonsi b’abanto bakaigwera eriogi ri’Omonene, Nyasae obo, na amang’ana ’omobani Hagai, oyio Omonene, Nyasae obo, atomete; abanto bakaba bakomoiroka Omonene." 
Haggai1:13 Erio Hagai, omotomwa bw’Omonene, agakwana nabanto amang’ana ’Omonene, akabatebia, “Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Inche nigo inde amo nainwe.”" 
Haggai1:14 Erio Omonene agasukia omoika o Serubabeli mosinto o Sealitieli, oyorenge omogavuna bw’Abayuda, na oyo o Yoshua omokuani omonene, mosinto o Yehosadaki, na oyo bw’abatigari bonsi b’abanto. Bonsi amo bagacha bagakora emeremo ase enyomba y’Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae obo." 
Haggai1:15 Ayio nigo akorekanete ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na kane, omotienyi o gatano na rimo, omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Dario." 
Haggai2:1 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na rimo, omotienyi o gatano na kabere, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha goetera ase Hagai omobani, rigateba:" 
Haggai2:2 “Kwana na Serubabeli mosinto o Sealitieli, omogavuna bw’Abayuda, na Yoshua omokuani omonene, mosinto o Yehosadaki, na abatigari bonsi b’abanto, obaborie:" 
Haggai2:3 Ning’o otigarete ase egati yaino oyo oroche obonene bw’enyomba eria entang’ani? Moise koreng’ania eye neria ya kare, naki eye ekororekana ase amaiso aino? Inee! Teri kororekana asemore ng’a negento bosa?" 
Haggai2:4 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Aye Serubabeli, obe omokong’u na aye Yoshua omokuani omonene, mosinto o Yehosadaki, obe omokong’u, nainwe abanto bonsi abamore ase ense eye, mobe abakong’u ase ogokora emeremo, ekiagera inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo inde amo nainwe." 
Haggai2:5 Ekero mwaruete ase ense ya Misiri nigo nabarierete eira ng’a botambe nigo ndabe amo nainwe; ase ayio Omoika one nigo ogendererete komenya ase egati yaino; timoiroka. 
Haggai2:6 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Ara rimo naende, engaki enke yatigaire nintengechie igoro chionsi, na ense, na enyancha, amo nense enyomo." 
Haggai2:7 Naende Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Boigo nintengechie ebisaku bionsi, erinde ayaganeirie nabanto b’ebisaku bionsi aoroke, na inche ing’ichorie enyomba yane nobonene." 
Haggai2:8 Chifeta nechiane, ne chitahabu nechiane. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire." 
Haggai2:9 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba ng’a obonene bw’enyomba eye ya bono nabobe obonene goetania obw’eria ya kare. Aase aiga nindete omorembe obe okogambao. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire.” 
Haggai2:10 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na kane, omotienyi o kianda, omwaka o kabere, bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Dario, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Hagai omobani, rikamotebia:" 
Haggai2:11 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Boria abakuani naki amachiko agoteba. 
Haggai2:12 Omonto aise kobogoria enyama enchenu ase omogo bw’eanga yaye akwambara, na akune nomogo bw’eanga eria omogati, gose endagera eiyekire, gose edivai, gose amaguta ’amazeituni, gose endagera ende yonsi, Inee, ekio giakunwa nkebe egechenu?” Abakuani bakairaneria, “Yaya.”" 
Haggai2:13 Naende Hagai akaboria, “Onye omonto obeire oyotachenegeti ase ogokuna egetondo karakune ekemo ase ebinto ebio, Inee, ekio nakebe egetachenegeti?” Abakuani bakairaneria, bagateba, “Ee, nkebe egetachenegeti.”" 
Haggai2:14 “Erio Hagai akairaneria, agateba,” “Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Naboigo nabanto aba, na egesaku eke, bare ase obosio bwane, na kera omoremo bagokora namaboko abo nabo ore, na kende gionsi eke bakorua aroro nigo kere egetachenegeti." 
Haggai2:15 “Ase ayio nigo nkobaboria ng’a korwa rituko ria rero mobe mokorengereria buna yarenge ekero keria rigena konya ritarabekwa igoro ase rigena rinde, ase okoagacha Hekalu y’Omonene." 
Haggai2:16 Ninki kiabete ase amatuko aria? Ekero omonto arenge kogenda ase etui y’emesaima ng’a anyore emesaima emerongo ebere, onyora ikomi yoka, na ekero arenge kogenda ase amasabibu akomiterwa ng’a anyore ebibekerero emerongo etano biichire edivai, onyora emerongo ebere bioka." 
Haggai2:17 Nigo nabaagete ase okobarentera oborwaire enyagetabo, na obw’okorigisia, na embura y’amagena ase chindagera chiaino mwakorerete emeremo. Nonya naboigo timwang’iranerete. Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Haggai2:18 Korwa rituko ria rero, rituko ri’emerongo ebere na kane, omotienyi o kianda, ekero oboroso bwe Hekalu y’Omonene bwabegetwe, na kogenderera, morengererie buna arabe!" 
Haggai2:19 Inee! Chimbusuro nchire ase ebiage? Inee! Emesabibu, na emeko, na emekomomanga, na emezeituni tiyangeti kwama? Korende korwa rituko ria rero nimbasesenie.”" 
Haggai2:20 Ase rituko riria ri’emerongo ebere na kane, omotienyi oria o kianda, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase Hagai naende, rikamotebia," 
Haggai2:21 “Kwana na Serubabeli, omogavuna bw’Abayuda, omotebie ng’a inche nintengechie igoro chionsi amo nense." 
Haggai2:22 Ning’onchorane ebirogo bi’obonene bw’abaruoti, ninsirie chinguru chi’amaruoti ’abanto b’ebisaku. Ning’onchorane chigari na abachiriini; chibarasi nchigwe amo nabachiriinete, kera omonto naite oyomwabo nomoro." 
Haggai2:23 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Ase rituko riria ninkoire aye Serubabeli omosomba one, mosinto o Sealitieli. Naende Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Ningokore obe buna ebonyi ere nekemanyererio kiane, ekiagera nagochorire. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Ase omotienyi o gatano na gatato, omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba kwa Dario ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha ase omobani Zakaria, mosinto o Berekia o Ido, rikamotebia," 
Zechariah1:2 “Omonene nigo agechetigwe mono ne chisokoro chiaino. 
Zechariah1:3 Ase ayio tebia abanto: Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Ing’iranere inche Omonene bw’Emeganda, nainche nimbairanere. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Zechariah1:4 Timobaisa koba buna chisokoro chiaino, abwo ababani ba kare barerete asebare, bakabatebia: Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Onchoka, motige chinchera chiaino chimbe, na ogokora kwaino okobe. Korende chisokoro chiaino tichiategererete chinyigwere. Nabo Omonene agoteba." 
Zechariah1:5 Bono chisokoro chiaino ng’ai chire? Na ababani baino, ng’ai bare? Inee! Mbagendererete koba moyo botambe?" 
Zechariah1:6 Amang’ana aane na emeroberio yane echikire, ayio naruete goetera ase abasomba baane ababani nigo yasoete ase chinkoro chie chisokoro chiaino. Barabwo nigo beitetie bagateba: Buna Omonene bw’Emeganda arengereretie gotokorera ase engencho ye chinchera chiaito na ogokora gwaito, naboigo atokoreire.”" 
Zechariah1:7 Ase rituko ri’emerongo ebere na kane, omotienyi o ikomi nomo, noro okorokwa Sebati, omwaka o kabere bw’okogamba kwa Dario, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende inche omobani Zakaria, mosinto o Berekia o Ido." 
Zechariah1:8 Nkarora ase okorora kwa botuko omonto oriinete ebarasi embariri. Omonto oyio nigo ateneine ase egati y’emete ekorokwa emehadasi yarenge ase rigoko. Na nyuma yaye nchiarengeo chibarasi chinde chimbariri, na echire chibarati, ne chindabu." 
Zechariah1:9 Erio nkaboria Omonene one, ninki engencho ye chibarasi echi? Omomalaika oria okwanete nainche, agantebia. “Ninkworokie engencho ye chibarasi echi.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Ase ayio omonto oria oteneine ase egati y’emehadasi eria akang’iraneria, agantebia, “Chibarasi echio nachio Omonene atomire chietanane ase ense yonsi.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Chibarasi chigatebia omomalaika bw’Omonene, oria oteneine ase egati y’emehadasi eria, “Twaetananire ase ense yonsi, twarorire ng’a ense yonsi nigo etoererete ekirete‐kiri.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Erio omomalaika oria bw’Omonene akaboria, “Aye Omonene bw’Emeganda, ngoika ririri orabe otari kororera Yerusalemu, na emechie y’Abayuda amabera, eyio kwabeire kogechirie mono nero ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo etano na ebere (70)?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Omonene akairaneria amang’ana amaya na ay’okoremia ase omomalaika ori a okwanete nainche. 
Zechariah1:14 Ase ayio omomalaika oria agantebia, “Raria, otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Nigo inde ne risemi rinene ase engencho ya Yerusalemu na Sayoni." 
Zechariah1:15 Nigo ngechirie mono nabanto b’ebisaku ebio batoererete, bakirete‐kiri, ekiagera ekero nagechetigwe ake nabarabwo, nigo bamentete korenta emechando." 
Zechariah1:16 Ase ayio, aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Inche nairanire Yerusalemu na koyororera amabera. Enyomba neagachwe imeo, na engori y’okorengera eramborwe igoro ya Yerusalemu. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire." 
Zechariah1:17 “Raria naende, otebe ng’a aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Emechie yane neichorigwe nogosesenigwa okonge, na inche Omonene nindemie Sayoni naende, na ninchore Yerusalemu obe oyone naende.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Naende nkarigereria, nkarora chingunchara inye." 
Zechariah1:19 Erio nkaboria omomalaika oria konya okwanire nainche, “Ninki engencho ye chingunchara echi?” Ere akairaneria, agantebia, “Chingunchara echi nachio chiasiarerete Abayuda, na Abaisraeli, na abanto ba Yerusalemu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Erio Omonene akanyorokia abaturi b’ebioma bane. 
Zechariah1:21 Naende nkaboria, “Abanto aba, ninki bacha gokora aa?” Ere akairaneria, agantebia, “Chingunchara chiria chiasiarerete Abayuda gochia aaria na aaria, goika monto onde tanyarete koimokia omotwe oye igoro. Bono abanto aba bachire gochiondokia na kobutora chingunchara chi’abanto b’ebisaku, baria baimokereretie chingunchara chiabo igoro y’ense y’Abayuda, chigasiarera abamenyeteo.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Naende nkarigereria, nkarora omonto obwate engori y’okorengera ase okoboko kwaye." 
Zechariah2:2 Erio nkamoboria, “Ng’ai okogenda?” Ere akairaneria agantebia, “Yerusalemu ngochia korenga, erinde imanye obogare bwaye, na obotambe bwaye.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Erio nkarora omomalaika oria konya okwanire nainche ogocha, na omomalaika onde agacha koumerana nere," 
Zechariah2:4 akamotebia, “Minyoka, otebie omomura oria obwate engori y’okorengera ng’a Yerusalemu nomenywe buna emechie etagiteiri chindwaki, ekiagera nobe nabanto abange ne chitugo chinyinge." 
Zechariah2:5 Omonene otebire ng’a nere bweka omonyene orabe orwaki rw’omorero ase chinsemo chionsi chi’omochie oyio, ere neorokie imeo abe obonene bwaye.”" 
Zechariah2:6 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Imoka! Imoka motame, morue ase ense ya sugusu, ekiagera ninche nabasiarerete buna ngosiarera chimbeo inye chia igoro.” Nabo Omonene agoteba." 
Zechariah2:7 “Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, inwe abamomenyete amo nabanto ba Babeli, imoka motame, mwetoorie!”" 
Zechariah2:8 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: “Ere oyontomire ase abanto b’ebisaku abwo babasakorete ing’orokie obonene bwaye, ekiagera oyo orabakune inwe, oyio nabe okunire endorero y’eriso riaye." 
Zechariah2:9 Rora, ninsamunse amaboko aane igoro yabo, barabwo mbabe abasomba b’abwo barenge kobakorera.” Erio nario moramanye ng’a Omonene bw’Emeganda ontomire." 
Zechariah2:10 “Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, goka na gochenga! Naama! Ngocha inde komenya ase egati yaino.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Zechariah2:11 “Ase ekero ekio abanto b’ebisaku ebinge mbabwatane nainche Omonene; barabwo mbabe abanto baane. Ee, inche nimenye ase egati yaino.” Erio nario moramanye ng’a Omonene bw’Emeganda nere ontomire gocha asemore." 
Zechariah2:12 Omonene naire Abayuda babe omwando oye ore ase ense eye enchenu, nachore Yerusalemu obe omochie oye naende." 
Zechariah2:13 Inwe abanto bonsi, tegerera mokire‐kiri ase obosio bw’Omonene, ekiagera otenenire ngosoka are korwa ase Obomenyo bwaye Obochenu." 
Zechariah3:1 Naende Omonene akanyorokia Yoshua, omokuani omonene, oteneine ase obosio bw’omomalaika bw’Omonene, na Saitani oteneine ase ensemo ya borio ya Yoshua okomosoera." 
Zechariah3:2 Erio Omonene agatebia Saitani, “Aye Saitani, inche Omonene ningotogonyere! Ee, inche Omonene nachorire Yerusalemu, ningotogonyere! Inee! Omonto oyo tari ekegenga giataboretigwe korwa ase omorero ime?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Bono Yoshua nigo ateneine ase obosio bw’omomalaika, obegete chianga chire ne riko." 
Zechariah3:4 Erio omomalaika oria agachika abwo bateneineo ase okomokorera, akabatebia, “Morusie chianga echio chire ne riko.” Nyuma y’ayio omomalaika oria agatebia Yoshua, “Naama! Narusirie ebibe biao korwa asore, ninkobekere chianga chingiya chi’omoyega.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Erio inche ngateba, “Bono mobekere egetambaa ekerabu motwe.” Ase igo bakamobekera egetambaa ekerabu motwe na bakamobekera ne chianga chiria chingiya, ekero omomalaika oria bw’Omonene ateneineo." 
Zechariah3:6 Erio omomalaika oria bw’Omonene akamoenekeria Yoshua, akamotebia," 
Zechariah3:7 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Korabwatie chinchera chiane, na obwate aya nagochikeire, rirorio nogambere enyomba yane, na orende chiraaro chiane. Ninkoe ribaga ogochera asende amo nabwo bagonkorera aiga." 
Zechariah3:8 Aye Yoshua, omokuani omonene, tegerera oigwe amang’ana aya, aye amo nabagisangio bao, abwo baikaransete ase obosio bwao, ekiagera abwo nabanto bare ekemanyererio ki’amang’ana agochigocha: Naama! Inche nintome omosomba one okorokwa Omoseboka." 
Zechariah3:9 Rigereria, ase obosio bwa Yoshua nabekire rigena erimo; nareo amaiso atano na abere arigereretie rigena erio. Inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo ngoteba iga: Nimang’ere ase rigena erio ririko ririgwenerete, na nindusie ebibe bi’ense eye ase rituko erimo." 
Zechariah3:10 Ase rituko erio kera oyomo oino narangerie oyomwabo ache, baikaranse komo inse y’emesabibu na emeko yaye.” “Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Omomalaika oria okwanete nainche ritang’ani agacha naende, agantura buna omonto oraire agoturwa korwa ase chitoro." 
Zechariah4:2 Ere akamboria, “Ninki oroche?” Nkairaneria, nkamotebia, “Nigo ndoche ekebekerero gie chitaya keroiseirie etahabu yoka, na igoro yaye egetaabo ki’amaguta ngeterekereireo, ne chitaya isano na ibere nchireo, na emebirangwa etano na ebere ekorenta amaguta nigo esoete ase kera etaya ebekire igoro yaye." 
Zechariah4:3 Mbarabare ase ekebekerero keria gie chitaya nereo emezeituni ebere, oyomo ensemo y’okorio na oyonde ensemo y’okobee.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Erio nkaboria omomalaika oria okwanete nainche, “Omonene one, ninki engencho y’ebinto ebi?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Erio akang’iraneria, akamboria, “Inee! Tomanyeti engencho y’ebinto ebi?” Nkamoiraneria, “Yaya, omonene one, timanyeti.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Erio akairaneria, agantebia, “Eri nario ring’ana ri’Omonene riachierete Serubabeli, rikamotebia: Ayio tagokoreka ase chinguru, gose ase okobua kw’omonto, korende nase Omoika one. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Zechariah4:7 Aye egetunwa ekenene, ninki oisaine ase obosio bwa Serubabeli? Noiranigwe inse obe buna ense omweya. Serubabeli nabeke rigena ri’ogokoorera, abanto kobaakire eriogi, bagoteba: Obuya, obuya bobe igoro yaye!”" 
Zechariah4:8 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Zechariah4:9 “Serubabeli obekire oboroso bw’enyomba eye namaboko aye, boigo nere orayekoore namaboko aye. Erio nario oramanye ng’a Omonene bw’Emeganda nere ontomete asemore." 
Zechariah4:10 Ning’o orachaye rituko ri’amang’ana amake kagochaka, ekero amaiso aria atano na abere ararore ekebiro ase okoboko gwa Serubabeli, nagoke? “Ayio atano na abere namaiso ’Omonene arigereretie chinsemo chionsi chi’ense.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Naende nkaboria omomalaika oria, “Emezeituni eye ebere, oyomo ore ensemo y’okorio na oyonde ensemo y’okobee y’ekebekerero keria gie chitaya, neya ki?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Nkamoboria okoboria gwa kabere, “Ninki engencho ye chinsagia echio ibere chi’emezeituni chire mbarabare ase emebirangwa eyio ebere eroiseirie etahabu, eyio amaguta agoetera?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Akairaneria, akamboria, “Inee! Tomanyeti engencho y’ebinto ebi?” Nkamokania, “Yaya, omonene one, timanyeti.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Erio agantebia, “Aba nabwo abaakwa amaguta babere, abagotenena ase okomokorera Omonene bw’ense engima.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Nkaimokia amaiso aane naende, nkarora ebuku eringanirie ekoiruruka." 
Zechariah5:2 Omomalaika oria akamboria, “Ninki oroche?” Nkairaneria, nkamotebia, “Nigo ndoche ebuku eringanirie ekoiruruka; obotambe bwaye nobw’amaboko emerongo ebere, na obogare bwaye amaboko ikomi.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Erio agantebia, “Okwo nokoragererigwa gwachiereire ense yonsi. Kera oyokoiba narusigwe korwa aiga, buna koreng’ana arikire ase ebuku eyio, na kera oyogotiana narusigwe boigo korwa aiga, buna koreng’ana arikire ase ebuku eyio." 
Zechariah5:4 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Nintome ebuku eyio ase enyomba y’omoibi, na ase enyomba y’oyo ogotiana ogotiana kw’oborimo ase erieta riane; ebuku eyio nebeere ase chinyomba chi’abanto abwo echisirie kegima, chibao chiabo amo namagena abo.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Omomalaika oria orenge gokwana nainche agacha naende, agantebia, “Imokia amaiso ao, orore ngento ki keria kegocha.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Nkamoboria, “Ngento ki keria?” Akang’iraneria agantebia, “Keria negetonga gi’okorenga kegocha; kerokio nigo getenenerete obobe bw’abanto b’ense yonsi.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Nkarigereria, nkarora ekemumeko kiaroiseirie risasi gekomumoka, na omokungu oikaransete ase egetonga keria ime." 
Zechariah5:8 Omomalaika oria agateba, “Obo nabwo Obobe.” Erio akaigatera omokungu oria ime ase egetonga keria, agakong’ontera ekemumeko igoro ase omonwa bw’egetonga keria." 
Zechariah5:9 Erio nkaimokia amaiso aane, nkarora abakungu babere bakooroka. Embeo egasoa ase chimbaba chiabo chiarenge buna echie riagonga. Abakungu abwo bakaimokia egetonga keria, bakairuruka nakerokio gochia gati‐gati y’ense na igoro." 
Zechariah5:10 Nkaboria omomalaika oria orenge gokwana nainche, “Ng’ai bakoira egetonga keria?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Akairaneria, agantebia, “Nigo bagokeira ase ense ya Sinari, na aroro agwo baagachere omokungu oria enyomba, erinde ekoera bamobekeo, abeere aase aye.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Naende nkarigereria nkarora chigari inye chigosoka korwa ase egati y’ebitunwa bibere, na ebitunwa biria nigo biarenge ebi’etaai." 
Zechariah6:2 Egari ye ritang’ani nigo yarenge kong’uswa ne chibarasi chimbariri, na eya kabere ne chibarasi chimwamu," 
Zechariah6:3 na eya gatato ne chibarasi chindabu, na eya kane ne chibarasi chire matonto, chionsi nigo chiarenge ne chinguru mono." 
Zechariah6:4 Erio nkaboria omomalaika oria orenge gokwana nainche, “Omonene one, ninki engencho ye chibarasi echi?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Ere akairaneria, agantebia, “Echi nechimbeo inye chia igoro chikogenda korwa ase konya chiteneine agwo ase obosio bw’Omonene bw’ense yonsi." 
Zechariah6:6 “Egari eria ekong’uswa ne chibarasi chimwamu nigo ekogenda ase ense ya sugusu, na eria ye chibarasi chindabu eyebwatie, na eria ye chibarasi chire matonto nigo ekogenda gochia ase ense ya irianyi.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Ekero chibarasi chiria chiarenge ne chinguru mono chiasogete chikagania kogenda goetanana ase ense yonsi. Omomalaika oria agachitebia, “Genda moetanane ase ense yonsi.” Nachirochio chigakora bo." 
Zechariah6:8 Erio omomalaika oria agaaka eriogi, agantebia, “Naama! Chibarasi echio chiagendete ase ense ya sugusu chiatoereirie omoika one ase ense eria.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Zechariah6:10 “Oegwe ebiegwa korwa ase Helidai na Tobia, na Yedaya, abanto abwo bairane korwa Babeli ase barenge abasomba. Ase rituko erio erio ogende ase enyomba ya Yosia, mosinto o Sefania, ase basoete." 
Zechariah6:11 Ekero kwaeirwe chifeta ne chitahabu oroisie egutwa korwa ase ebinto ebio, oyebeke ase omotwe o Yoshua omokuani omonene, mosinto o Yehosadaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Okwane nere, omotebie ng’a aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Naama! Oyomo nachiche okorokwa Omoseboka, ere naseboke korwa aase aye, aagache Hekalu y’Omonene" 
Zechariah6:13 Ee, ere naagache Hekalu y’Omonene, abe omoruoti osikire, aikaranse ase ekerogo kiaye ki’oboruoti. Naende nere orabe omokuani ase ekerogo kiaye; na abwo babere mbaigwane babe bakogamba amang’ana ay’omorembe." 
Zechariah6:14 Egutwa eyio negenderere kobeera ime ase Hekalu y’Omonene koba ekeinyorio kia Helidai, na Tobia, na Yedaya, na Heni, mosinto o Sefania." 
Zechariah6:15 “Abanto bamenyete aare mbachiche gokonya koagacha Hekalu y’Omonene. Erio nario moramanye ng’a Omonene bw’Emeganda nere ontomete asemore. Amang’ana ayio nigo araikerane koraigwe eriogi ri’Omonene, Nyasae oino.”" 
Zechariah7:1 Ase rituko ria kane, omotienyi o kianda noro Kisilewi, omwaka o kane bw’okogamba kw’omoruoti Dario, ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende inche Zakaria." 
Zechariah7:2 Abanto ba Beteli konya batomire Sareseri, na Regemu‐Meleki, na abanto bande babo bagende gosaba Omonene, erinde banyore ogwancherwa korwa asare;" 
Zechariah7:3 boigo baborie abakuani b’enyomba y’Omonene bw’Emeganda na ababani. “Inee! Ntogenderere korera na kweng’ata ase omotienyi o gatano, buna twabeire togokora ase engaki y’emiaka emenge?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Erio ring’ana ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda rigacha asende, rigantebia," 
Zechariah7:5 “Kwana nabanto bonsi b’ense eye, na abakuani, obaborie: Ekero mwarenge kweng’ata na korera ase kera omotienyi o gatano, na oyo o gatano na kabere, ase chingaki echi chionsi chi’emiaka emerongo etano na ebere, Inee, nigo mwarenge kweng’ata ase engencho yane?" 
Zechariah7:6 Na ekero mokoria na konywa, Inee, timori gokora ayio ase ogweisanekia inwe abanyene?" 
Zechariah7:7 “Inee! Amang’ana ayio agwenerete mono tari aro Omonene orenge gokwana goetera ase ababani ba kare, ekero ekio Yerusalemu omenyire nabanto, na igo orenge osesenirie ore nemechie yaye yayoetanaine, naende abanto bamenyete ase ense ya irianyi na ase ense omweya?”" 
Zechariah7:8 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene rigacha asende inche Zakaria, rigantebia," 
Zechariah7:9 “Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Monache ebina bia boronge, na kera omonto abe nobwanchani na amabera ase oyomwabo." 
Zechariah7:10 Timokorera ababoraka bobe, gose chintakana, gose abamenyi bare ase egati yaino, gose abataka. Omonto tabaisa koroberia ase enkoro yaye akorere oyomwabo bobe." 
Zechariah7:11 “Korende abanto bakaba abamwenu, bakaanga koigwera, bagaticha amato abo ng’a tibabaisa koigwa." 
Zechariah7:12 Bagakong’ia chinkoro chiabo pa buna rigena rikorokwa elimasi ng’a tibabaisa koigwera amachiko na amang’ana ’Omonene bw’Emeganda atomete n’Omoika oye goetera ase ababani ba kare. Ase engencho eyio Omonene bw’Emeganda akaba nendamwamu enene. 
Zechariah7:13 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Buna koreng’ana barabwo bataigwerete ekero nabarangeretie, bono nainche tinkoigwa ekero barandangerie." 
Zechariah7:14 Ase ayio nigo ndarente ekembugu‐mbugu mbasiarere gochia ase abanto b’ebisaku, abwo batabamanyeti. Ense eye egatigwa ere bosa, na omonto onde tarenge goeta ase egati yaye, gose koiranao, ekiagera ense eyio engiya nigo egotigwa ere bosa.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Ring’ana ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Zechariah8:2 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Inche nigo inde ne risemi rinene mono ase engencho ya Sayoni; ee, risemi erio riagerire nabeire nendamwamu enene ase engencho yaye." 
Zechariah8:3 Aya naro Omonene agoteba: Ning’irane gocha ase Sayoni, imenye ase egati‐gati ya Yerusalemu, na Yerusalemu norokwe Omochie bw’Obwegenwa, na egetunwa ki’Omonene bw’Emeganda nakerokwe Egetunwa Egechenu." 
Zechariah8:4 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Abagaaka na abang’ina nabanyorekane ase chinchera chia Yerusalemu naende, kera oyomo nabe nenyimbo yaye agwesiirera, ekiagera babeire abagotu mono." 
Zechariah8:5 Naende ase chinchera chi’omochie oyio abana abange, abamura na abaiseke, inababe bakogosoreria aroro." 
Zechariah8:6 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Onye amang’ana ayio are ay’ogokumia ase abatigari b’egesaku eke, Inee, nabe ay’ogokumia asende boigo inche Omonene bw’Emeganda?" 
Zechariah8:7 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Rora, nintoorie abanto baane, mbarente korwa ase chinse chia moocha na bosongo." 
Zechariah8:8 Ekero nabarentire, nabamenye ase egati‐gati ya Yerusalemu babe abanto baane, na inche imbe Nyasae obo ase obwegenwa na oboronge." 
Zechariah8:9 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Mobe abaremu! Inwe bono mwabeire mokoigwa amang’ana ayio ababani barenge gokwana, ekero oboroso bw’enyomba y’Omonene bw’Emeganda bware kobekwa, ng’a Hekalu neagachwe naende." 
Zechariah8:10 Agwo ritang’ani ase amatuko ayio, monto onde bwensi tarenge konyora eng’eria ende ase emeremo arenge gokora, gose ng’iti ende yonsi yarenge gokora emeremo tiyarenge goakanerwa. Ase engencho y’obobisa onde tarenge na morembe kagosoka gose gakoirana, ekiagera nigo naseegetete kera omonto kwomana noyomwabo." 
Zechariah8:11 Korende bono tingokorera abatigari b’abanto aba buna nakorerete ab’amatuko aria a kare. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebire. 
Zechariah8:12 Bono mbasimeke chimbusuro chiabo bare nomorembe; emesabibu inayame amasabibu, ne riroba narirente okwama kwaye, boigo na igoro nachirente riime. Nimbae abanto aba abatigari ebinto bionsi bibe ebiabo." 
Zechariah8:13 Inwe Abayuda na Abaisraeli, buna koreng’ana abanto b’ebisaku barenge koragereria ase erieta riaino, bono ekero ndabatoorie, abanto mbabe bagosesenia ase erieta riaino, Timoiroka, korende mobe abaremu!" 
Zechariah8:14 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Buna koreng’ana naroberetie kobarentera amabe, ekero chisokoro chiaino chiakorete ebibe chikagera nkaba nendamwamu, gose tinaonchorete omoroberio oyio," 
Zechariah8:15 boigo ase amatuko aya narobeirie gokora amaya ase abanto ba Yerusalemu na ase Abayuda. Ase ayio timoiroka! 
Zechariah8:16 Amang’ana aya naro morakore: Kera omonto akwane ekeene noyomwabo; monache ebina bia boronge na ebi’omorembe agwo ase ebiita biaino. 
Zechariah8:17 Timobaisa gokora emeroberio emebe ase chinkoro chiaino ase ogokorerana bobe inwe ase inwe, gose timobaisa gwancha gotiana ogotiana kw’oborimo, ekiagera amang’ana ayio onsi nigo inyagechete. Nabo Omonene atebire.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Naende ring’ana ri’Omonene bw’Emeganda rigacha asende, rigantebia:" 
Zechariah8:19 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Chingaki chi’okweng’ata ase omotienyi o kane, na oyo o gatano, na oyo o gatano na kabere, na oyo o ikomi, nachibe ase Abayuda chingaki chi’omogoko na omochengo, na Amatuko Amanene ay’okwegokia. Ase ayio mwanche ekeene na omorembe." 
Zechariah8:20 “Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Engaki ngocha ere, ekero abanto abange bararue ase emechie emenge, bache aa." 
Zechariah8:21 Abanto b’omochie oyomo mbagende batebie ab’omochie onde: Inchuo togende bwango, torigie ogwancherwa ase obosio bw’Omonene, ee, inchuo torigie Omonene bw’Emeganda! Nainche nkogenda inde." 
Zechariah8:22 Abanto abange, na abanto b’ebisaku ebinge bire ne chinguru, mbachiche Yerusalemu korigia Omonene bw’Emeganda, na korigia ogwancherwa ase obosio bwaye."
