Zechariah8:23 Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba: Ase amatuko ayio abanto ikomi ba kera egesaku bagokwana emenwa ao ao mbache babwate omokoba bw’omwambaro bw’Omoyahudi, batebe: Intwe ntorigetie kogenda amo nainwe, ekiagera twaigure ng’a Nyasae nigo are amo nainwe.”" 
Zechariah9:1 Eri nering’ana rikong’u riakwanetwe n’Omonene igoro y’ense ya Hadaraki, riikere nonya nomochie o Damesiki. Amaiso ’abanto b’ebisaku amo nay’Abaisraeli nigo arigereretie Omonene." 
Zechariah9:2 Boigo ring’ana erio riikere ense ya Hamati esinyaine na Damesiki, riikere na Turo na Sidoni, nonya abanto b’aroro bare abang’aini mono." 
Zechariah9:3 Turo bweagacheire chiburi chinkong’u, naende osangereirie chindwenyi chie chifeta chinyinge buna orotu, ne chitahabu chinyinge buna eubi ere ase chinchera." 
Zechariah9:4 Korende rora, Omonene nayoure chinibo chiaye, na atugute okobua kwaye ase enyancha, na omochie oyio omonyene nosambwe nomorero." 
Zechariah9:5 Ekero Asikeloni orarore ayio, noiroke mono; Gasa boigo noro noiroke na goichana; naboigo n’Ekironi, ekiagera ogosemeria kwaye gwasirigwe. Omoruoti o Gasa nasirigwe, na abanto tibakomenya Asikeloni." 
Zechariah9:6 Asidodi nomenywe nabanto batarochi inchera, na inche Omonene ninsirie kegima oboenenu bw’Abafilisti." 
Zechariah9:7 Nindusie amanyinga ’ebing’wanso korwa ase emenwa yabo, na okogechia koria korwa ase amaino abo; na barabwo nababe abatigari ba Nyasae oito, nababe buna abagambi b’egesaku ki’Abayuda, abanto b’Ekironi nababe abatigari ba Nyasae oito, nababe buna abagambi b’egesaku ki’Abayuda, abanto b’Ekironi nababe buna Abayebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Erio inche Omonene nindende enyomba yane, erinde abarwani b’esegi tibabaisa goeterao gose koiranerao; na abachandi b’abanto baane tibabaisa gochao, ekiagera bono inche ninyerigererie namaiso aane." 
Zechariah9:9 Inwe abanto ba Sayoni goka mono! Ee, inwe abanto ba Yerusalemu, aka eriogi ri’omochengo! Rora, omoruoti oino nkobachera are; ere nomonyene oboronge na omobui. Nigo are omokanyeku oriinete etigere, ee, oriinete emori y’etigere, akamori g’etigere." 
Zechariah9:10 Ninsirie chigari chi’esegi korwa ase abanto ba Efraimu, ne chibarasi chi’esegi korwa Yerusalemu. Ninsirie na amata ’esegi. Omoruoti oyio nararerie abanto b’ebisaku omorembe. Obogambi bwaye nabobe korwa enyancha eyemo goika eyende, na korwa ase Orooche rwa Eufarati goika ase chinsinyo chi’ense." 
Zechariah9:11 “Ase engencho y’amanyinga ’okobwatana okwo nakorire naye ninsibore abasibwa bao, mbarusie ase engoro etari namache." 
Zechariah9:12 Inwe abasibwa more nogosemeria, irana ase eburi yaino. Ase rituko ria rero nigo nkobarareria inwe ng’a nimbae amaya ara kabere." 
Zechariah9:13 Nakumbire Abayuda buna nkumbete obota bwane, naagirie Abaefraimu buna ensara ng’agetie ase obota bwane. Aye Sayoni, ninkore abana bao abamura babe buna amatimo, barwanerie abamura b’Abagiriki; ningokore obe buna omoro bw’omorwani esegi etuoni.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Omonene naoroke igoro y’abanto baye, ne chinsara chiaye chisoke buna okomesa gw’enkoba. Omonene Nyasae nabugie egetureri, achiche nekembugu‐mbugu gekorwa sugusu." 
Zechariah9:15 Omonene bw’Emeganda nakengere abanto baye, barabwo mbasirie ababisa babo, batiringe amagena e chinduruche chiabo. Mbanywe batinde, baake amariogi, babe buna abanto batindire edivai. Mbaichorigwe buna ebitaabo bi’amanyinga ’ebing’wanso, na babe buna chikoona chi’egesasimero chiichire amanyinga." 
Zechariah9:16 Ase rituko riria Omonene, Nyasae obo, nabatoorie, ekiagera nigo bare abanto be riicho riaye. Barabwo nigo bare buna amagena e rigori rinene abekire ase egutwa, akomeka‐meka na komoreka ase ense yaye." 
Zechariah9:17 Ee, naki obuya bwaye na obosiani bwaye bore bw’ogokumia! Endagera yaye nenorie abamura baye bagirigente, na edivai yaye enyia nenorie abaiseke baye bagirigente." 
Zechariah10:1 Inwe saba Omonene abatwerie embura y’okwamia endagera ase engaki yaye. Omonene natonge amare akomesa, na atwerie abanto embura na koa kera oyomo endagera korwa mogondo." 
Zechariah10:2 Ebinyasae bire ase chinyomba nigo bigokwana amang’ana are bosa, na amaroro ’abaringoria nay’oborimo. Abaroti chindoto nigo bagokwana chindoto chi’obong’ainereria, na baremia abande ase okoremia kwa bosa. Ase engencho eyio abanto nigo bagotayaya buna riicho rie ching’ondi, bachandegete, ekiagera tibabwati omorisia." 
Zechariah10:3 “Endamwamu yane nigo egwoka igoro y’abarisia, ning’ee chigoree chiria egesusuro, ekiagera inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo ndendete riicho riane nabwo abanto b’enyomba ya Yuda; nindikore ribe ebarasi yane engiya y’esegi." 
Zechariah10:4 Rigena ri’ekoona narinyorekane korwa ase abanto abwo. Boigo korwa asebare ekerochi ki’eema na obota bw’esegi mbinyorekane, naende kera omogambi nanyorekane korwa asebare." 
Zechariah10:5 Barabwo mbabe buna chituoni chi’esegi, batiringere ababisa babo inse buna eubi ere ase chinchera. Mbarwane, ekiagera inche Omonene nigo inde amo nabarabwo, basookie abariini be chibarasi.”" 
Zechariah10:6 “Ning’ee Abayuda chinguru, ee, nintoorie abanto b’egesaku kia Yusufu. Nimbairanie bamenye inka, ekiagera nabaroreire amabera; barabwo mbarorekane buna inche konya timbaangeti, ekiagera inche ninche Omonene, Nyasae obo, ninyigwe ogosaba kwabo." 
Zechariah10:7 Abanto ba Efraimu mbabe buna chituoni chi’esegi, bagoke ase chinkoro chiabo buna abanyure edivai. Abana babo mbarore ayio, bagoke, mbagokere Omonene ase chinkoro chiabo ime." 
Zechariah10:8 “Nimbasime, mbasangererie amo, ekiagera nababooririe, na barabwo mbamentekane babe abange buna barenge kare." 
Zechariah10:9 Nonya nabasiarerete gochia ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, mbabe bakong’inyora ase chinse chiria chi’aare. Barabwo mbabe moyo amo nabana babo, naende bairane inka." 
Zechariah10:10 Nimbairanie inka korwa ase ense ya Misiri, nimbasangererie korwa ase ense y’Asuri; mbabeke ase ense ya Gileadi na ase Lebanoni, mbaichore aroro goika baborwe aase bakomenya." 
Zechariah10:11 Ekero baraete ase egati y’enyancha y’emechando, inche Omonene ning’ake emerindo yaye, ne chindiba chionsi chi’orooche rwa Naili nchikame; na igo oboenenu bw’Abaasuri mbotiringerwe inse, na enyimbo y’obogambi ya Misiri nesirigwe." 
Zechariah10:12 Inche nimbeke abanto baane chinguru ime yane inche Omonene, barabwo mbabe bagotaara ase erieta riane.” Omonene okwanire ayio." 
Zechariah11:1 Aye Lebanoni, igora ebisieri biao, erinde omorero osambe emecharake yao." 
Zechariah11:2 Aye omotarakwa, rera, ekiagera omocharake oiyerigwe inse. Emete ere nobonene yasirigwe. Inwe emete enga emetontera ere Basani, rera, ekiagera rinani rinoru riaiyerigwe inse." 
Zechariah11:3 Tegerera moigwe buna abarisia bakorera bono ekero obonene na obuya bwabo bwasirigwe! Tegerera moigwe buna chindo chinsae chikoruma bono ekero rinani rinoru ria Yorodan riasirigwe! 
Zechariah11:4 Aya naro Omonene, Nyasae one, agoteba: “Risia riicho rie ching’ondi echio chiachikeirwe konyenywa." 
Zechariah11:5 Abanto bagochigora nigo bagochinyenya, tibari korora ng’a mbare nokomocha, na abwo bagochioonia nigo bagoteba: Omonene atogigwe, ekiagera twenyoreire obonda obonge. Nonya nabarisia babo abanyene tibari gochirorera amabera." 
Zechariah11:6 “Bono tinkogenderera kororera abanto b’ense eye amabera. Naama! Nindue kera oyomo agwe ase okoboko kw’oyomwabo, na ase okoboko kw’omoruoti oye; abaruoti babo mbasarie ense, na inche tingotooria nonya nomonto oyomo korwa ase amaboko abo.” Nabo Omonene agoteba." 
Zechariah11:7 Ase ayio nkaba nkorisia riicho rie ching’ondi chiria chiarenge gochia konyenywa, ee, ching’ondi chiria chiachandegete. Nkaimokia chinyimbo ibere, eyemo nkayeroka “Ogwancherwa” na eyende “Obomo”. Erio nkaba nkorisia ching’ondi chiria." 
Zechariah11:8 Ngasiria abarisia batato ase omotienyi oyomo. Erio nkagechigwa ne ching’ondi chiane, nachirochio chikangecha." 
Zechariah11:9 Erio ngateba: “Inche tinkobarisia inwe rinde. Oyo ogokwa, tiga akwe, na oyo ogosirigwa, tiga asirigwe, na abatigari babe bakorianana.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Erio nkaimokia enyimbo eria yane yarenge korokwa “Ogwancherwa”, nkayebuna, na igo ngasaria okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania okwo konya nakorire nabanto bonsi." 
Zechariah11:11 Ase ayio okobwatana koria kogasarigwa ase rituko riria, ne ching’ondi chiria chiachandegete, chiria chiansemeretie chikamanya ng’a ring’ana riria riakoretwe nigo riarwete ase Omonene." 
Zechariah11:12 Erio ngatebia abanto baria: “Onye moroche ng’a mbuya, ing’a eng’eria yane; onye taibo, yegache.” Barabwo bakarenga chibesa chie chifeta emerongo etato chikaba eng’eria yane." 
Zechariah11:13 Omonene agantebia “Chirute ase omokori chinyongo.” (Rigori eri rinene nakoreretwe nabanto baria.) Erio nkaimokia chibesa chiria chie chifeta emerongo etato, ngachiruta ase enyomba y’Omonene, ase omokori chinyongo oria." 
Zechariah11:14 Nyuma y’ayio nkabuna enyimbo eria ya kabere yarenge korokwa “Obomo,” na igo ngasaria okoigwana kwarenge ase egati y’Abayuda na Abaisraeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Erio Omonene agantebia, “Bono imokia ebikorero bi’omorisia oyio otagwenereti kende." 
Zechariah11:16 Rora, nkorenta nde omorisia ase ense eye oyio otari gwechandera ching’ondi echio chigochia gokwa, gose korigia chinsiru, gose korwaria echiabunekire, gose korageria echire buya, korende nigo ararie chinyama chi’echire chinoru na achimiora‐miorie nonya nebitaago biabo." 
Zechariah11:17 Obobe nobwaye omorisia oyio otagwenereti, oyio ogotiga riicho rie ching’ondi! Tiga omoro oake okoboko kwaye na eriso riaye ria borio. Tiga okoboko kwaye kwome pa, na eriso riaye ria borio riukore kegima!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Eri ne ring’ana rikong’u ri’Omonene igoro y’Abaisraeli: Aya naro Omonene agoteba, oyio oramborete igoro chionsi na akabeka oboroso bw’ense, oyio otongete omoika ime ase omonto:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Rora, inche nigo inde ang’e gokora Yerusalemu obe buna egekombe kere nekenyugwa kegotindia ase abanto bonsi bamenyete ase chinsemo chiaye chionsi, boigo nkebanyore Abayuda ekero Yerusalemu orache koboerwa." 
Zechariah12:3 Ekero engaki eyio eraike, ninkore Yerusalemu obe buna rigena ririto ase abanto bonsi; bonsi abarateeme korietweka mbateke chingoma abanyene. Abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bi’ense nabasangererekane amo bayoumokere." 
Zechariah12:4 Ase engaki eyio nindutere kera ebarasi omoondoko, na omonto oyeriinete abe ebarimo. Korende nimbe ndigereretie na korenda Abayuda, ekero ndaukorie chibarasi chi’abanto b’ebisaku.” Nabo Omonene atebire." 
Zechariah12:5 Erio abagambi b’egesaku ki’Abayuda mbetebie ase chinkoro chiabo ime: “Abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu nigo babwate chinguru goetera ase Omonene bw’Emeganda, Nyasae obo." 
Zechariah12:6 “Ase engaki eria ninkore abagambi b’egesaku ki’Abayuda babe buna orogio rore nomorero ogosamba chinko, naende buna ekieri ki’omorero ogosamba emesaima y’amasakwe. Barabwo mbasambe abanto bonsi bamenyete ase chinsemo chiabo chionsi, basirie aande onsi, ensemo ya borio na eya bomosi, korende Yerusalemu nogenderere kobeera ase ore bono." 
Zechariah12:7 “Inche Omonene nintoorie obomenyo bw’Abayuda ritang’ani, erinde abanto b’enyomba ya Daudi, na aba Yerusalemu, tibabaisa gwetogia ng’a mbare nobonene igoro y’Abayuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Ase engaki eyio Omonene nakengere abanto bamenyete Yerusalemu, erinde oyore omworo mono ase egati yabo abe buna Daudi, na abanto b’enyomba ya Daudi babe buna Nyasae, ee, buna omomalaika bw’Omonene oyo obatang’aine." 
Zechariah12:9 Ase engaki eyio ninganie gosiria abanto b’ebisaku bionsi barache korwania Yerusalemu. 
Zechariah12:10 “Ning’umorere abanto b’enyomba ya Daudi, na aba Yerusalemu, omoika bw’amabera na ogosaba. Ekero barandigererie mbarore oyo babetete babe bakondeera, buna omonto okoreera omwana oye omomoima; mbandeere bare nobororo buna obw’omonto okoreera omwana oye omotangi." 
Zechariah12:11 Ase engaki eyio, ebirero ebirabe ime ya Yerusalemu mbibe ebinene buna ebio biabete igoro ya Hadadi‐Rimoni agwo ase ense omweya ya Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Abanto b’ense eye mbeumie, kera eamate ase ensemo yaye; eamate y’enyomba ya Daudi ensemo yaye, na abakungu babo ensemo yabo; eamate y’enyomba ya Nathani ensemo yaye, na abakungu babo ensemo yabo;" 
Zechariah12:13 eamate y’enyomba ya Lawi ensemo yaye, na abakungu babo ensemo yabo; eamate ya Simei ensemo yaye, na abakungu babo ensemo yabo;" 
Zechariah12:14 chiamate chionsi chiatigaire chieumie, kera eyemo ensemo yaye, na abakungu babo ensemo yabo." 
Zechariah13:1 “Ekero engaki eyio eraike, ensoko netuboke ase abanto b’enyomba ya Daudi, na ase abanto ba Yerusalemu, erinde basibigwe korwa ase ebibe biabo, na ogotacheneka kwabo." 
Zechariah13:2 Ase engaki eyio ninsirie amarieta ’emegwekano egosasimwa ase ense eye, tagwatorwa naende nonya ng’ake. Boigo nindusie ababani amo nomoika bw’ogotacheneka korwa aiga.” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Zechariah13:3 Nigo erabe ng’a omonto aise kooroka kobana, ng’ina na ise abwo bamoiborete bamotebie, “Aye tokonyara koba moyo, ekiagera nigo okobana oborimo ase erieta ri’Omonene.” Ekero omonto oyio agendererete kobana, abaibori abwo baye mbamobete ritimo." 
Zechariah13:4 Ase engaki eyio kera omobani nabe nobosooku ase amaroro aye ekero akobana; gose onde takobeka eganchwa eroiseirie amarionya ase okong’aina abanto. 
Zechariah13:5 Kera oyomo obo nigo arakane atebe: “Inche tindi omobani, korende nigo inde omoremi, ekiagera korwa obwana bwane nigo nagoretwe ngakorwa omosomba." 
Zechariah13:6 Omonto karamoborie,” “Ng’ai kwanyorete ebimanyererio ebi bie chingoma bire ase amaboko ao?” Ere nairanerie, “Ebi nigo nabinyorete korwa ase enyomba y’abwo inyanchete.”" 
Zechariah13:7 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Aye omoro, imoka orwanie omorisia one, oyio ore oyomo nainche. Aka omorisia oyio, erinde ching’ondi chiserebekane; erio inche ing’onchore okoboko kwane igoro ya chiria chire chindeu.”" 
Zechariah13:8 Ee, inche Omonene nigo ngoteba iga: “Nigo erabe ng’a chinsemo ibere ase isato chi’abwo bamenyete ase ense eria mbaitwe basirigwe, korende ensemo eyemo y’abwo netigare ere moyo." 
Zechariah13:9 Abanto b’ensemo eyio eyemo ya isato nimbaetie ase omorero ime, mbasibie buna efeta egosibigwa, na mbateeme buna etahabu egoteemwa. Barabwo mbarangerie erieta riane ng’a batoorigwe, na inche nimbaigwe. Inche nintebe: Abanto abwo nabaane. Barabwo mbairanerie: Omonene nere Nyasae oito.”" 
Zechariah14:1 Rora, rituko ri’Omonene ngocha rire, ekero ebinto biaino birasakorwe biatananerwe agwo ase egati yaino." 
Zechariah14:2 Inche Omonene ninsangererie abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bache korwania Yerusalemu. Omochie oyio nobugwe, ne chinyomba chisakorwe, na abakungu bakorerwe ay’obosooku. Ekeng’ese ki’abanto b’omochie oyio mbairwe ase obosomba, korende abaratigare tibagosirigwa korwa ase omochie oyio." 
Zechariah14:3 Erio Omonene nasoke arwanie ebisaku ebio, buna arwanete kare ase rituko ri’esegi." 
Zechariah14:4 Ase rituko erio Omonene natenene ase Egetunwa ki’Emezeituni kerochie Yerusalemu ensemo ya moocha. Egetunwa ekio ngetandoke ase chinsemo ibere korwa moocha goika bosongo, ne rikura rigare naribe ase egati‐gati; agwo ekeng’ese ekemo ki’egetunwa ekio ngesuke gochia sugusu, na ekende gochia irianyi." 
Zechariah14:5 Inwe imotame moetere ase rikura riria rire ase egati y’ebitunwa biane, ekiagera nigo riraikere Aseli, ee, nabo moratame buna mwatamete ekero omotengecho bw’ense obete ekero Uzia arenge omoruoti bw’Abayuda. Ase engaki eyio Omonene, Nyasae one, nachiche amo nabachenu bonsi." 
Zechariah14:6 Ase rituko erio omobaso tokobara, obokendu mbobeo." 
Zechariah14:7 Naribe rituko ritari buna amatuko ande, rimanyekanete n’Omonene, tirikoba omobaso gose obotuko. Ase rituko erio oborabu nabobe ekero kia mogoroba." 
Zechariah14:8 Ase rituko erio amache are moyo nasoke korwa Yerusalemu. Ekeng’ese ki’amache ayio agende gochia ase Enyancha ya Moocha, na ekeng’ese kende gochia ase Enyancha ya Bosongo. Nagenderere goeta ase chingaki chie riberera na echi’obokendu." 
Zechariah14:9 Omonene nabe omoruoti bw’ense engima. Ase engaki eyio Omonene nere orabe ere bweka, na erieta riaye ribe rirorio rioka." 
Zechariah14:10 Ekero ekio ense eye yonsi neonchorwe ebe ense omweya korwa Geba goika Rimoni, irianyi ya Yerusalemu. Korende Yerusalemu oro nogenderere kobeera igoro agwo aase aye, korwa ase Egeita kia Benjamin goika ase Egeita kie Ritang’ani, na goika ase Egeita gi’Ekoona, na korwa ase Omorobiri bwa Hananeli goika ase ebimitero bi’edivai bi’omoruoti." 
Zechariah14:11 Abanto mbamenye Yerusalemu, okoragererigwa tigokobao, ekiagera omochie oyio nigo orabe nobotoereru." 
Zechariah14:12 Amaakwa aya naro Omonene ararue ase abanto abwo bonsi barache korwania abanto ba Yerusalemu: Chinyama chi’emebere yabo nchigunde ekero bagendererete gotenena namagoro abo, na amaiso abo nagunde ekero are ase chinyongo chiabo ime, ne chimeme chiabo inachigunde ase emenwa yabo ime." 
Zechariah14:13 Ase engaki eyio Omonene nabarentere obotantanu, abanto mbaonchokerane, baitane kera oyomo noyomwabo." 
Zechariah14:14 Nonya n’Abayuda mbarwanie abanto ba Yerusalemu. Obotenenku obonge bwe chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chianga, mbosangererigwe korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bamenyete ase chinsemo chionsi." 
Zechariah14:15 Amaakwa amabe buna ayio nache boigo ase chibarasi, ne chiyombo, ne chingamia, ne chitigere, ne ching’iti chinde chionsi chire ase ebitwori biabo." 
Zechariah14:16 Erio omonto onde bwensi oratigare ore moyo korwa ase abanto b’ebisaku abwo bachete korwania abanto ba Yerusalemu nabe ogotiira omwaka ase omwaka gochia gosasima Omoruoti, nere Omonene bw’Emeganda, naende narende Amatuko Amanene ay’Ebigutu." 
Zechariah14:17 Onye abanto b’egesaku kende gionsi kere ase ense bakwanga kogenda Yerusalemu gosasima Omoruoti, nere Omonene bw’Emeganda, rirorio embura tegotwa ase ense yabo." 
Zechariah14:18 Onye abanto ba Misiri tibagotiira gochia aroro gosasima, nabarabwo nababorwe embura. Ayio naro amaakwa Omonene arae abanto bonsi abatari gotiira gochia korenda Amatuko Amanene ay’Ebigutu." 
Zechariah14:19 Ekio nakio kerabe egesusuro ase Abamisiri na ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, abwo baraange gotiira gochia korenda Amatuko Amanene ay’Ebigutu." 
Zechariah14:20 Ase engaki eyio chindege chisungeire chibarasi nchirikwe amang’ana aya: “Chinchenu, chiatananirwe ase Omonene,” ne chinyongo chire ase enyomba y’Omonene nchibe chinchenu buna ebitaabo bire ase egesasimero." 
Zechariah14:21 Kera enyongo ere Yerusalemu, na ase ense y’Abayuda, nebe enchenu ase Omonene bw’Emeganda, erinde kera oyomo okorua ekeng’wanso achiche gochioyia aiyekere chinyama chi’ekeng’wanso. Ase engaki eyio omoonchoreria takogenderera koba ase enyomba y’Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
Malachi1:1 Aya naro amang’ana amakong’u Omonene atomerete Abaisraeli goetera ase Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inche nimbanchete inwe.” Korende inwe nigo mokoboria: “Naki otwanchete?” Omonene nigo akoiraneria, “Inee! Esau tarenge oyomwabo Yakobo? Inche nigo namwanchete Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 na nkaba ngechete Esau na ngasaria ense yaye y’ebitunwa ekaba erooro, na omwando oye nkaa chisese chi’orosana chikamenyao.”" 
Malachi1:4 Abaedomu kobaratebe: “Nonya twaakirwe, ngochia tore koagacha naende aase aria asaretigwe agatigara bosa.” Korende Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Nabo baranyare koagacha naende, korende inche goika ntagore amaagacho ayio, erinde ense eyio erokwe ey’abakori amabe, abwo inche Omonene inde nendamwamu asebare kogenderera botambe.”" 
Malachi1:5 Namwerorere amang’ana ayio namaiso aino; erio motebe: “Omonene nigo are omonene nonya nisiko y’ense y’Abaisraeli.” 
Malachi1:6 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Omwana nigo asigete ise, na omosomba osigete omonene oye. Onye inche inde iso, amasikani aino asende, ng’ai are? Na onye inde omonene, okonyiroka kwaino, ng’ai kore? Inwe abakuani nigo mochayete erieta riane, naende nigo mokoboria: Nase enchera ki tochayete erieta riao?" 
Malachi1:7 Nimbatebie: Nigo mokorenta ase egesasimero kiane okoruegwa kw’endagera gotari ogochenu. Erio mwaboria: Nase inchera ki twagokorire oyotachenegeti. Nimbairanerie: Nase okorengereria ng’a emesa yane inche Omonene ney’ogochaywa. 
Malachi1:8 Inee! Ekero mokorua eng’iti eukorete koba ekeng’wanso, ayio tari bobe? Gose ekero mokorua eye eremarete, gose endwaire, ayio tari bobe? Moraisa korua eng’iti buna eyio ase omogavuna oino, Inee, nagokigwe nainwe, gose abanchere?” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda akoboria." 
Malachi1:9 “Inwe abakuani, sorora Nyasae, erinde atororere amabera. Inee! Naroreire onde bwensi oino amabera, ekero mokorua okoruegwa konga buna okwo korwa ase amaboko aino?” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda akoboria." 
Malachi1:10 Naende Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Onye ndiria arenge gotoka omonto nonya noyomo korwa asemore asieke ebisieri bie Hekalu, erinde timobaisa kogenderera gouta omorero ase egesasimero kiane bosa, ekiagera tingokiri nainwe, gose tingwanchera ebing’wanso korwa ase amaboko aino." 
Malachi1:11 Korwa ekero erioba rigosoka goika ekero rikorimera, erieta riane nigo rigendererete koba rinene ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, na ase kera aase ubani nigo egosamberwa ase erieta riane, na okoruegwa gochenegete nigo gokorentwa. Ee, erieta riane nigo rigendererete koba rinene ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Malachi1:12 “Korende inwe nigo mokorikora ribe eritachenegeti ekero mogoteba ng’a emesa yane yakorirwe koba eyetachenegeti na gochaya okoruegwa gokorentwa aroro. 
Malachi1:13 Inwe nigo mogoteba: Amang’ana aya atorosirie, naende mwagenderera gonchaya inche Omonene bw’Emeganda. Nigo mokondetera eng’iti eurereirie, gose eye eremarete, gose erwarete, ebe ekeng’wanso. Inee! Ninyare gwanchera ebinto buna ebio korwa ase amaboko aino?” Nabo Omonene akoboria." 
Malachi1:14 “Oragererigwe omonto oria omong’ainereria obwate emingichi ase riicho riaye, eyio ariete eira ng’a ayerue, korende orenta asende inche Omonene eng’iti eng’ao ere na kemocho ase omobere oye. Inche nigo inde omoruoti omonene, na erieta riane nigo rire eri’okoirokwa ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku.” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Malachi2:1 “Bono inwe abakuani, amang’ana aya nigo achikirwe asemore." 
Malachi2:2 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: Onye timogotegerera amang’ana ayio na koyabeka ase chinkoro chiaino ime, erinde mosike erieta riane, rirorio nindete okoragererigwa asemore, ndagererie ogosesenigwa kwaino. Ee, naikire koragereria ogosesenigwa okwo, ekiagera timori kobeka amang’ana ayio ase chinkoro chiaino." 
Malachi2:3 Nintogonyere ororeria rwaino, nintube amaiso aino nesike ye ching’iti echio mokorua chibe ebing’wanso. Abanto mbabarente bababeke ase esike eyio." 
Malachi2:4 Erio nario moramanye ng’a inche nabachikerete amang’ana ayio, erinde okobwatana kwane kw’ogotianania nakorete na Lawi kogenderere kobao botambe. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Malachi2:5 “Okobwatana kw’ogotianania nakorete nere nokw’obogima na omorembe. Okwo nigo namoete, erinde anyiroke. Ere akanyiroka, akaba okoiguswa ase engencho y’erieta riane." 
Malachi2:6 Amorokererio amaronge nigo arenge ase omonwa oye, na obobe tibwanyorekanete ase ebikoba biaye. Nigo abete ogotaara nainche ase omorembe na oboronge, na akaonchora abanto abange korwa ase ebibe." 
Malachi2:7 Ebikoba bi’omokuani goika birende chisemi, na abanto barigie okworokererigwa korwa ase omonwa oye, ekiagera nigo are omotomwa one inche Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
Malachi2:8 “Korende inwe mwagobeire korwa ase enchera, mwagerire abanto abange bagochirwe ase engencho y’amorokererio aino; ase igo mwasaririe okobwatana kw’ogotianania okwo nakorete na Lawi. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Malachi2:9 Inwe mwangire kobwatia chinchera chiane; nigo mogwanchereria abanto ekero mokworokereria amachiko. Ase ayio nimbatige mochaywe na gokeeigwa ase amasio ’abanto bonsi.” 
Malachi2:10 Inee! Intwe twensi titobwati Tata oyomo? Tari ere Nyasae oyomo ototongete? Nase ki rende totari abegenwa intwe ase intwe? Nase ki togosaria okobwatana kw’ogotianania okwo Nyasae akorete ne chisokoro chiaito? 
Malachi2:11 Abayuda bakorire aya atari ay’obwegenwa, na ay’okogechia akorirwe ase egati y’Abaisraeli, na ase Yerusalemu, ekiagera Abayuda bakorire Obomenyo Obochenu obwo Omonene anchete bwabeire obotachenegeti, banyuomire abaiseke b’abanto bagosasima enyasae engeni." 
Malachi2:12 Omonene nasirie korwa ase chinyomba chia Yakobo onde bwensi ogokora amang’ana ayio karabe omworokia gose omworokigwa, nonya noyokorenta ekeng’wanso ase Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
Malachi2:13 Amang’ana ande mogokora naya: Nigo mogotuba egesasimero ki’Omonene namariga aino, mwaba mokorera na kweumia, na ase ayio Omonene tagwanchera ebing’wanso biaino nonya ng’ake, gose takogokigwa nabirobio korwa ase amaboko aino." 
Malachi2:14 Inwe nigo mokoboria: “Nase ki atari kobianchera?” Nekiagera Omonene arenge kirori ase egati yao na omokungu bw’oboke bwao, oyio aye otari omwegenwa asare, nonya ore omokiare oo, na omokungu oo ase okobwatana kw’ogotianania." 
Malachi2:15 Omonto oyomo takorete bo, oria omoika ogendererete gotigara ime yaye. Ninki oria oyomo aganetie? Nigo aganetie ororeria rwatananwe robe orwa Nyasae. Ase engencho eyio, mwerende mono, erinde onde tabaisa koba oyo otari omwegenwa ase omokungu bw’oboke bwaye." 
Malachi2:16 Omonene, Nyasae bw’Abaisraeli, nigo agoteba iga: “Inche nigo ngechete ogotigana, naende nigo ngechete ng’a omonto nigo agwetuba obotindi buna agwetuba eanga.” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba. Ase engencho eyio mwerende timobasia koba abatari abegenwa." 
Malachi2:17 Inwe mwarosirie Omonene namang’ana aino. Nigo mokoboria: “Naki twamorosirie?” Nekiagera mogoteba ng’a kera omonto ogokora ebibe nigo are omuya ase obosio bw’Omonene, naende ng’a Omonene nigo akogokigwa noyio. Naende mwaboria; “Ng’ai Nyasae oyo okonacha ebina are?”" 
Malachi3:1 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Rora, nintome omotomwa one andoiserie enchera, na Omonene oyio mokorigia nache mobosokano ase Hekalu yaye; nere omotomwa bw’okobwatana kw’ogotianania oyio moganetie. Ee, ngocha are.”" 
Malachi3:2 Korende ning’o oranyare gotenena koremereria rituko ri’Omonene, na ning’o oranyare gotenena ase ogwekengera ekero akooroka? Ere nigo anga buna omorero bw’omoturi ebioma, na buna esabuni y’omosibia chianga." 
Malachi3:3 Ere naikaranse buna oyo ogosamba na gosibia chifeta. Ere nachene Abalawi, abasibie buna chitahabu ne chifeta chigosibigwa, erinde banyare korua ebing’wanso bi’oboronge ase Omonene." 
Malachi3:4 Erio ebing’wanso bi’Abayuda, na ebi’abanto ba Yerusalemu, bigokie Omonene, buna ase amatuko aria a kare, na ase emiaka ya kare." 
Malachi3:5 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Nimbaike ang’e ase okonacha ekina. Nimbe kirori omwango igoro y’abarogi na abatomani, na abagotiana oborimo, na abagokorera abarikwa emeremo bobe ase okobarina ching’eria chiabo, na abagokorera ababoraka ne chintakana bobe, na abakoonchorana oboronge bw’abamenyi, korende tibanyirogeti." 
Malachi3:6 “Inche Omonene tindi koonchoka, na ase engencho eyio, inwe ab’ororeria rwa Yakobo timwasiretigwe." 
Malachi3:7 Korwa ase amatuko e chisokoro chiaino inwe mwagoberete mogatiga emeroberio yane echikire, timwayebwatete. Bono inche Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo ngoteba iga: Ing’iranera, nainche nimbairanere. Korende inwe nigo mokoboria: Tokoiranere ase inchera ki?" 
Malachi3:8 Inee! Omonto nanyare konyibera inche Nyasae ebiane? Korende inwe mwanyibeire ebiane. Inwe nigo mokoboria: Ninki twakoibeire? Mwanyibeire ensemo ya ikomi na okoruegwa konde. 
Malachi3:9 Mwaragererigwe nokoragererigwa, ekiagera inwe egesaku eke gionsi mwanyibeire ebiane." 
Malachi3:10 Inwe renta ensemo ya ikomi eng’ikeranu ase ekungo y’enyomba yane, erinde endagera ebe ase enyomba yane. Ase enchera eyio inwe monteeme gose tinkobaigorera ebibao bia igoro mbaumorere ogosesenigwa okonge mono gotari korengeka. Nabo inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ngoteba." 
Malachi3:11 Nintogonyere ebigosaria okwama kwe riroba riaino, tibigosaria, gose amasabibu aino takoaroroka kare amarere. Nabo inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ngoteba." 
Malachi3:12 Erio abanto b’ebisaku bionsi inababaroke abasesenirie, ekiagera ense yaino nebe y’okogokia. Nabo inche Omonene bw’Emeganda ngoteba.”" 
Malachi3:13 Omonene nigo agoteba iga: “Inwe mwakwanire amang’ana amakong’u igoro yane. Korende nigo mokoboria: Mang’ana ki amakong’u twakwanire igoro yao? 
Malachi3:14 Inwe mwatebire: Okomokorera Nyasae, ayio namang’ana a bosa. Mbuya ki twanyorire ase okobwata amachiko aye, gose ase ogotaara ase obosio bw’Omonene bw’Emeganda tore nomoichano?" 
Malachi3:15 Bono nigo tokoroka abwo bare abaenenu ng’a mbasesenirie. Abakori amabe nabwo bagendererete konyora amaya; tari ayio oka, korende nonya nekero bagoteema Nyasae nigo bagokonywa.”" 
Malachi3:16 Erio abanto abwo bamoirogete Omonene bakaba bagokwana barabwo ase barabwo; Omonene agategerera, akaigwa amang’ana abo, na ebuku y’ekeinyorio ekarikwa ase obosio bwaye ase okoinyora abwo bamoirogete na barengereretie igoro y’erieta riaye." 
Malachi3:17 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Abanto aba mbabe abanto baane bori ase rituko erio ndakore ring’ana, nimbarorere amabera buna omonto akorora amabera ase omwana oye okomokorera." 
Malachi3:18 Erio imorore ogwatananeka ase egati y’omonyaboronge na omokori amabe, na ase egati y’oyogonkorera inche Nyasae na oria otari gonkorera.”" 
Malachi4:1 Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteba iga: “Rora, rituko ngocha rire rigosamba buna omorero o riko ogosamba. Erio abanto abaenenu bonsi, na abakori amabe bonsi, mbabe buna obonyansi obwomo, ne rituko erio rigocha nigo rirabasambe kegima, tirigotiga omori gose orosagia." 
Malachi4:2 Korende asemore inwe abamoirogete erieta riane, erioba ri’oboronge ndioroke rire nokogwenia inse ye chimbaba chiaye. Inwe imosoke mobe mogotiratiria buna chimori ekero chigosokigwa korwa ase obweri." 
Malachi4:3 Ase rituko erio ndakore ring’ana erio, inwe imotiringe abakori amabe namagoro aino, na barabwo mbabe buna ribu.” Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteba." 
Malachi4:4 “Inwe inyora amachiko a Musa, omosomba one, na emeroberio yonsi namochigete agwo ase egetunwa kia Horebu, orokererie Abaisraeli bonsi." 
Malachi4:5 “Rora, nimbatomere Elija omobani atang’anere rituko riria rinene ri’Omonene ri’okoondokia ritaracha." 
Malachi4:6 Ere nairanie chinkoro chi’abaise gochia ase abana babo, na echi’abana gochia ase abaise, erinde ekero ndache timbaisa goaka ense eye nokoragererigwa.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Gaki, naboigo kamogocha korora okogechia kw’ogosaria gwatebetwe nomobani Danieli, kogotenena aase aachenu (oyogosoma amanye)," 
Luke3:25 o Matathia, o Amos, o Nahum, o Esili, o Nagai," 
Luke3:25 o Matathia, o Amos, o Nahum, o Esili, o Nagai," 
Romans9:25 Naboigo akwanete ase ebuku ya Hosea, “Abanto baria batarenge abanto baane, nimbaroke abanto baane; na oyotarenge omwanchwa one, nimoroke omwanchwa one.”"
